Genesis1:1 Pa citendekelo Lesa abumbile umulu ne sonde. 
Genesis1:2 Isonde lyalifye icimfulumfulu, kabili tamwali kantu nelyo kamo. Imfifi yakupile pali bemba uwashika no mupashi wakwa Lesa waleshinguluka pa mulu wa menshi." 
Genesis1:3 Elyo Lesa atile, “Nakube ulubuuto,” awe no kubuuta kwabuuta." 
Genesis1:4 Lesa amona nokuti ulubuuto lwawama. Elyo Lesa alekanya ulubuuto ne mfifi. 
Genesis1:5 Lesa ainika ulubuuto, “Akasuba,” imfifi yena ainika, “Ubushiku.” Kabili bwaila elyo bwaisaca, e bushiku bwakubalilapo." 
Genesis1:6 Kabili Lesa atile, “Nakube ulwelele ulwakulekanya amenshi pakati, pakuti yapatulukane pabili.”" 
Genesis1:7 Lesa apanga ulwelele ulwakulekanya amenshi, yamo yaba pesamba, yambi pa mulu wa lwelele. Kanshi efyo cali." 
Genesis1:8 Lesa ainika ulwelele “Umulu.” Kabili bwaila, elyo bwaisaca, e bushiku bwalenga shibili." 
Genesis1:9 Kabili Lesa atile, “Amenshi ya mwisamba lya mulu nayalongane mu ncende imo, pakuti kube umushili uwauma.” Kanshi efyo cali." 
Genesis1:10 Lesa ainike umushili uwauma ati, “Umulundu.” Elyo amenshi ayalongene mu ncende imo ati, “Bemba.” Lesa amona nokuti naciwama." 
Genesis1:11 Kabili Lesa atile, “Umulundu naupuuke ifimena ifya misango yonse, ifilimwa ifitwala imbuto mu misango yafiko, ne miti ya pesonde iyitwala ifitwalo fya mikoli mu misango yafiko.” Kanshi efyo cali." 
Genesis1:12 Elyo pa mulundu papuuka ifimena ifya misango yonse, ifilimwa ifitwala imbuto mu misango yafiko, elyo ne miti ya pesonde iyitwala ifitwalo fya mikoli mu misango yafiko. Elyo Lesa amona nokuti naciwama." 
Genesis1:13 Kabili bwaila, elyo bwaisaca, e bushiku bwalenga shitatu." 
Genesis1:14 Kabili Lesa atile, “Mu mulu namube ifisaniko ifyakulekanya akasuba no bushiku, fibe ifyakwishibilako imyaka, inshita shalekana lekana mu myaka, elyo ne nshiku," 
Genesis1:15 kabili fibe ifisaniko mu mulu ifyakuleta ulubuuto pesonde.” Kanshi efyo cali. 
Genesis1:16 Lesa epakupanga ifisaniko fibili ifikalamba. Icisaniko cakulilepo cakuteeka akasuba, elyo icacepelepo cakuteeka ubushiku. Elyo apanga ne ntanda." 
Genesis1:17 Ifisaniko Lesa afibika mu mulu pakuti fileleta ulubuuto pesonde," 
Genesis1:18 fileteeka akasuba no bushiku, kabili filelekanya ulubuuto ne mfifi. Elyo Lesa amona ukuti naciwama." 
Genesis1:19 Kabili bwaila, elyo bwaisaca, e bushiku bwalenga shine." 
Genesis1:20 Kabili Lesa atile, “Mu menshi namulesenya ifibumbwa fyabumi, ne fyuni nafilepupuka mu lwelele pa mulu we sonde.”" 
Genesis1:21 Kanshi Lesa epakubumba ifibumbwa ifyabumi ifikalamba nganshi ifyaba muli bemba, ne fyabumi ifya misango yonse ifikala mu menshi ne fyuni ifya misango yonse. Elyo Lesa amona nokuti naciwama." 
Genesis1:22 Lesa afipaala, asosa ati, “Fyalaneni, mufule, mwisule bemba, ne fyuni nafisande fifule pesonde.”" 
Genesis1:23 Kabili bwaila, elyo bwaisaca, e bushiku bwalenga shisano." 
Genesis1:24 Kabili Lesa atile, “Pesonde napabe ifibumbwa fyabumi mu misango yafiko, ifitekwa, ifikulaika pa mushili ne nama sha mpanga imisango yonse.” Kanshi efyo cali." 
Genesis1:25 Lesa epakupanga inama sha mpanga mu misango yashiko, ifitekwa nafyo mu misango yafiko, elyo na fyonse ifikulaika pa mushili mu misango yafiko. Elyo Lesa amona nokuti naciwama." 
Genesis1:26 Elyo Lesa atile, “Natupange umuntu mu cata cesu, uwakupalana na ifwe. Baleteeka isabi lya mu menshi, ifyuni fya mu lwelele, ifitekwa, elyo ne fikulaika pa mushili fyonse.”" 
Genesis1:27 Kanshi Lesa epakubumba umuntu mu cata cakwe. Amubumba mu cata cakwe. Ababumba umwaume no mwanakashi. 
Genesis1:28 Lesa abapaala, elyo asosa ati, “Fyalaneni, mufule, mwisule pesonde no kupanasha. Muleteeka isabi lya mu menshi, ifyuni fya mu lwelele ne fyabumi fyonse ifyenda pa mushili.”" 
Genesis1:29 Elyo Lesa atile, “Namupeela ifilimwa fya mbuto fyonse pano isonde ne miti yonse iya fitwalo umwaba inseke, efili nokuba ifyakulya fyenu." 
Genesis1:30 Kabili ku finama fya mpanga fyonse ifya pano isonde, ifyuni fya mu lwelele fyonse, ifikulaika pa mushili ne fyaba no bumi fyonse, nafipeela ifyani na mabula ya miti efyo fyakulalya.” Kanshi efyo cali." 
Genesis1:31 Lesa amona ifintu fyonse ifyo apangile ukuti nafiwama nganshi. Kabili bwaila, elyo bwaisaca, e bushiku bwalenga mutanda." 
Genesis2:1 Kanshi efyo umulu ne sonde ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo fyapwililile ukupangwa. 
Genesis2:2 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali Lesa ninshi napwisha imilimo alebomba. Kanshi pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali Lesa alituushishe, aleka imilimo yakwe yonse." 
Genesis2:3 Elyo Lesa apaala ubushiku bwalenga cine lubali, kabili abucita ukuba ubwamushilo. Pantu pali ubu bushiku epo atuushishe ku milimo yonse iya bubumbo." 
Genesis2:4 Ubu e butantiko bwa ntendekelo ya mulu ne sonde ilyo fyapangilwe. Ilyo Yawe Lesa abumbile umulu ne sonde," 
Genesis2:5 pesonde tapali icimpusa nelyo cimo kabili tapali nelyo cimo icamenenepo, pantu Yawe Lesa ali talalokeshapo imfula pesonde. Elyo takwali umuntu uwakulima umushili." 
Genesis2:6 Lelo kwali amenshi ayalefuma mu mushili no kulatapilila umushili mpanga yonse. 
Genesis2:7 Elyo Yawe Lesa abumba umuntu ukufuma ku lukungu lwa kwiloba. Kabili amuputilisha umupu wabumi mu myona no muntu aba umumi. 
Genesis2:8 Kabili Yawe Lesa alima ibala lwa ku kabanga mu Edeni. Elyo mulya mwine abikamo no muntu uo abumbile. 
Genesis2:9 Yawe Lesa amesha pa mushili imiti iya misango yonse, imiti iyisuma mukumoneka, kabili iya fitwalo ifyawama ukulyako. Pakati ke bala pali umuti wabumi no muti wakwishiba ifisuma ne fibi." 
Genesis2:10 Mu Edeni mwafumine umumana uwakutapilila ibala. Ukufuma mulya walekene mu milonga ine. 
Genesis2:11 Ishina lya mumana wakubalilapo ni Pishoni. Uyu mumana wapita uwashokana mu calo conse ica Hafila umusangwa golide. 
Genesis2:12 Kabili golide wa muli cilya calo musuma. Elyo mulasangwa ne finyamuti ifyanunka ubusaka na mabwe ya onikisi. 
Genesis2:13 Ishina lya mumana walenga ibili ni Gihoni. Uyu mumana wapita uwashokana mu calo conse ica Kushi. 
Genesis2:14 Ishina lya mumana walenga itatu ni Tigilisi. Uyu wena wapita lwa ku kabanga ka musumba wa Ashuri. Elyo umumana walenga ine ni Yufurate. 
Genesis2:15 Yawe Lesa abuulile umuntu amubika na mwibala lya Edeni pakuti alelimamo no kulalisunga. 
Genesis2:16 Elyo Yawe Lesa akonkomesha umuntu ati, “Kuti walyako ku miti yonse iya mwibala," 
Genesis2:17 lelo umuti wakwishiba ifisuma ne fibi, wena wikalyako, pantu ubushiku ukalyakofye ninshi ukafwa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Elyo Yawe Lesa asosele ati, “Taciweme ukuti umuntu abe eka. Nalamubumbila uwakumwafwa uumulingile.”" 
Genesis2:19 Kanshi Yawe Lesa abumbile ukufuma ku mushili inama shonse isha mu mpanga ne fyuni fyonse ifya mu lwelele. Elyo afitwala fyonse ku muntu pakuti amone amashina alefinika. Kanshi ishina lintu aitile conse icabumi, elyali e shina lyaciko." 
Genesis2:20 Kanshi umuntu epakwinika amashina ifitekwa fyonse, ifyuni fyonse ifya mu lwelele, elyo ne nama sha mpanga shonse. Lelo pali ifi fyonse tapali cakwafwa Adamu icamulingile." 
Genesis2:21 Kanshi Yawe Lesa epakulenga umuntu apone mu tulo utwingi. Ilyo umuntu acili mu tulo, Yawe Lesa afumya ulubafu lumo ku muntu, abwesesha no munofu apo alufumishe." 
Genesis2:22 Ku lubafu afumishe ku muntu umwaume, Yawe Lesa abumbako umwanakashi, amutwala na ku mwaume." 
Genesis2:23 Elyo umwaume asosa ati, “Kanshi uyu nomba e fupa lyafuma ku mafupa yandi, e munofu wafuma ku munofu wandi. Akulaitwa ‘umwanakashi’ pantu afuma ku mwaume.”" 
Genesis2:24 Kanshi eco umwaume ashiila wishi na nyina auminkana no mukashi wakwe, elyo aba babili baba umubili umo." 
Genesis2:25 Umwaume no mukashi wakwe bali ubwamba, lelo tabaleumfwa insoni." 
Genesis3:1 Nomba insoka yali incenjeshi nganshi ukucila pa nama shonse isha mpanga isho Yawe Lesa apangile. Elyo yaipusha umwanakashi aiti, “Bushe cine cine Lesa atile mwilalyako ku muti onse uwa mwibala?”" 
Genesis3:2 Umwanakashi ayasuka insoka ati, “Kuti twalya ifitwalo fya muti onse uwa mwibala," 
Genesis3:3 lelo Lesa atile, ‘Tamufwile ukulyako ifitwalo fya muti waba pakati ke bala, kabili tamufwile na kwikatako, pantu mukafwa.’”" 
Genesis3:4 Insoka yayasuka umwanakashi aiti, “Awe cinefye tamwakafwe nakalya." 
Genesis3:5 Pantu Lesa alishiba ukuti ilyo mukalyako, amenso yenu yakesuka elyo mukaba nga Lesa, mukeshiba ifisuma ne fibi.”" 
Genesis3:6 Ilyo umwanakashi amona ukuti ifitwalo fya muti fisuma ukulya, ifyayemba mukumoneka kabili kuti fyafwaikwa pakukwata amano, asabako ifitwalo fimo alya. Elyo fimbi apeelako umulume uo bali nankwe, nao alya." 
Genesis3:7 Elyo bonse babili amenso yabo yaisuka, baishiba nokuti bali ubwamba. Kanshi epakubilinkanya amabula ya mukunyu, eyo bafwala." 
Genesis3:8 Cilya caba ku cungulo umwaume no mukashi wakwe baumfwa uko Yawe Lesa aleenda mwibala. Batiina Yawe Lesa babelama mu miti ya mwibala. 
Genesis3:9 Lelo Yawe Lesa epakwita umwaume ati, “Bushe uli kwi?”" 
Genesis3:10 Umwaume ayasuka ati, “Nacumfwa uko uleenda mwibala, elyo nakwata umwenso, ico ndi ubwamba, epakubelama.”" 
Genesis3:11 Elyo Yawe Lesa amwipusha ati, “Nga nani akwebele ati uli ubwamba? Bushe naulya icitwalo ca muti ico nakuleseshe ukulyako?”" 
Genesis3:12 Umwaume ayasuka ati, “Umwanakashi wampeele ukuba nankwe kuno, eumpeele icitwalo ca muti, na ine nalya.”" 
Genesis3:13 Elyo Yawe Lesa aipusha umwanakashi ati, “Nga ici ucitile cinshi?” Umwanakashi ayasuka ati, “Ni nsoka eimbepele, na ine elyo nalya.”" 
Genesis3:14 Elyo Yawe Lesa aebele insoka ati, “Pa mulandu wa ici cintu ucitile, Walapishiwa pa fitekwa fyonse na pa nama sha mpanga shonse. Wakulakulaikafye pefumo lyobe, kabili inshiku shonse isha bumi bobe, wakulalya ulukungu." 
Genesis3:15 Nkabika ukupatana pakati ka iwe no mwanakashi, kabili na pakati ka bufyashi bobe no bufyashi bwa mwanakashi. Akashonaula umutwe obe, elyo iwe ukamusuma ku citende cakwe.”" 
Genesis3:16 Ku mwanakashi atile, “Nkakufushisha amacushi nganshi pakupaapa umwana. Ukalaumfwa ubukali pakupaapa abana. Ukalakabila umulume obe, elyo nao akalakuteeka.”" 
Genesis3:17 Kuli Adamu atile, “Pantu wacumfwila umukashi obe, elyo walya na ku muti nakukonkomeshe ukuti, ‘Taufwile ukulyako,’ “Walapishiwa umushili pa mulandu wa iwe. Inshiku shonse isha bumi bobe wakulacula pakumona icakulya cakulafumamo." 
Genesis3:18 Umushili wakulamesha imyunga na bacilasa, kabili ukalalyafye ifilimwa fya mwibala." 
Genesis3:19 Kwilibe lya pa mpumi yobe eko ukalamwena icakulya, mpaka ukabwelele kwiloba apo eko wafumine. Pantu uli lukungu kabili ku lukungu kwine eko ukabwelela.”" 
Genesis3:20 Adamu ainike umukashi wakwe ishina lya Efa, pantu e nyina wa bantu bonse." 
Genesis3:21 Yawe Lesa epakupangila Adamu na Efa ifyakufwala ifyampapa, elyo abafwika no kubafwika." 
Genesis3:22 Elyo Yawe Lesa asosele ati, “Umuntu ali kwati ni umo pali ifwe, kukwishiba ifisuma ne fibi. Kanshi tewakuleka ukuti akasabe ifitwalo ku muti upeela ubumi akalye kabili akabelele umumi.”" 
Genesis3:23 Kanshi Yawe Lesa epakutamfya umuntu mwibala lya Edeni pakuti alelima umushili uo amufumisheko. 
Genesis3:24 Panuma yakutamfyamo umuntu, Yawe Lesa abika mwibala lya Edeni ku kabanga bakerubi elyo no lupanga ulwalebilima umulilo, ulwaleyafye konse konse pakulesha umuntu ukuya ku muti wabumi." 
Genesis4:1 Adamu akumene no mukashi wakwe Efa, nao aimita elyo apaapa umwana ishina lyakwe ni Kaini. Efa epakusosa ati, “Ku bwafwilisho bwakwa Yawe nimpokelela umwana umwaume.”" 
Genesis4:2 Panuma Efa afyele umwana umwaume Abeli, munyina kwa Kaini. Abeli aleteka ifitekwa, Kaini ena ali mulimi." 
Genesis4:3 Mu kuya kwa nshiku, Kaini aletele ifisabo fya mwibala lyakwe ngo mutuulo kuli Yawe." 
Genesis4:4 Lelo Abeli ena aletele ifyamafuta ya mabeli ya fitekwa fyakwe atuula kuli Yawe. Yawe asekelele muli Abeli no mutuulo wakwe," 
Genesis4:5 lelo tasekelele muli Kaini no mutuulo wakwe. Kanshi Kaini epakufulwa nganshi, aponya ne cinso." 
Genesis4:6 Elyo Yawe epakweba Kaini ati, “Cinshi ufulilwe? Cinshi icinso cobe ciponene?" 
Genesis4:7 Bushe nga wacita icilungeme tekuti upokelelwe? Nomba nga taucitile icilungeme, ninshi ububi nabukulalilila pa mwinshi obe, bulefwaya iwe, lelo ufwile ukubucimfya.”" 
Genesis4:8 Elyo Kaini aebele munyina Abeli ati, “Natuleya mu mpanga.” Ilyo bacili mu mpanga, Kaini afukukila munyina amwipaya." 
Genesis4:9 Elyo Yawe aipusha Kaini ati, “Bushe munonko Abeli ali kwi?” Kaini ayasuka ati, “Nshishibe iyoo! Bushe nine kasunga wakwa munyinane?”" 
Genesis4:10 Yawe amweba ati, “Cinshi ucitile? Umfwa! Umulopa wakwa munonko ulepunda kuli ine ukufuma ku mushili." 
Genesis4:11 Nomba walapishiwa, kabili watamfiwa pa mushili upokelele umulopa wakwa munonko iminwe yobe isumishe." 
Genesis4:12 Ilyo wakulalima umushili, tawakulakupa ifisabo. Tawakulatuusha, wakulalulumbafye pesonde.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kaini epakweba Yawe ati, “Uku kukandwa kwankosela nganshi." 
Genesis4:14 Ilelo wantamfya pa calo, kabili nshili na kumonekela pa cinso cobe. Nakulalulumbafye ukwabula ukutuusha pesonde, na onse uukankumanya akanjipaya.”" 
Genesis4:15 Lelo Yawe amwasuka ati, “Awe iyoo. Nga cakuti umuntu aipaya Kaini, akacula ku cilandushi candi imiku cine lubali.” Kanshi Yawe epakubika icishibilo pali Kaini pakuti onse uwamukumanya tamwipeye." 
Genesis4:16 Kaini epakufuma pa cinso cakwa Yawe, aya ikala mu calo ca Nodi ku kabanga ka Edeni." 
Genesis4:17 Kaini akumene no mukashi wakwe, nao aimita, elyo apaapa no mwana ishina lyakwe ni Enoki. Elyo Kaini akuula umusumba awinika ne shina lyakwa mwane Enoki." 
Genesis4:18 Enoki ewafyele Iradi. Elyo Iradi e wishi wakwa Meuyaeli. Meuyaeli nao e wishi wakwa Metushaeli, elyo Metushaeli e wishi wakwa Lameki." 
Genesis4:19 Lameki aupile abanakashi babili, umo ni Ada elyo umbi ni Sila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada ewafyele Yabali. Yabali ali e cikolwe ca bantu abateka ifitekwa, kabili bekala mu matenti." 
Genesis4:21 Munyina kwa Yabali, ishina lyakwe ni Yuba. Yuba e cikolwe ca bakalisha we seese no mutolilo." 
Genesis4:22 Sila ewafyele Tuba Kaini. Tuba Kaini ewalefula ifibombelo fyalekana lekana ifya fyela no mukuba. Nkashi yakwa Tuba Kaini ali ni Naama. 
Genesis4:23 Lameki aebele abakashi bakwe ati, “Ada na Sila kutikeni kuli ine, mwe bakashi bakwa Lameki umfweni amashiwi yandi. Nalipaya umuntu uwancenene, umulumendo uwankusulwile." 
Genesis4:24 Nga cakuti icilandushi pali Kaini miku cine lubali, ninshi icilandushi ca pali Lameki miku amakumi cine lubali na cine lubali (77).”" 
Genesis4:25 Adamu akumene no mukashi wakwe nakabili, elyo Efa apaapa umwana umwaume amwinika ne shina lya Seti nokutila, “Lesa nampeelelapo umwana umwaume umbi pali Abeli uo Kaini aipeye.”" 
Genesis4:26 Seti nao afyele umwana umwaume amwinika ne shina lya Enoshi. Ni pa nshita ine ilya elyo abantu batampile ukupepa Yawe. 
Genesis5:1 Ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Adamu. Ilyo Lesa abumbile umuntu, amubumbile mu cata cakwe." 
Genesis5:2 Ababumbile umwaume no mwanakashi elyo abapaala. Ilyo ababumbile abetile nokuti, “Bantu.”" 
Genesis5:3 Ilyo Adamu aikele imyaka umwanda umo na makumi yatatu (130) elyo afyele umwana umwaume uwamupala, uwaba mu cata cakwe, amwinika ne shina lya Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Panuma ya kufyalwa kwakwa Seti, Adamu aikele imyaka imyanda cine konse konse (800), kabili alifyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:5 Imyaka yonse pamo Adamu aikele umumi yali imyanda pabula na makumi yatatu (930), elyo afwa." 
Genesis5:6 Ilyo Seti aikele imyaka umwanda umo na isano (105) elyo afyele Enoshi. 
Genesis5:7 Kabili panuma yakufyala Enoshi, Seti aikele umumi imyaka imyanda cine konse konse na cine lubali (807), afyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:8 Imyaka yonse pamo Seti aikele yali imyanda pabula ne kumi limo na ibili (912), elyo afwa." 
Genesis5:9 Ilyo Enoshi aikele imyaka amakumi pabula (90), afyele Kenani." 
Genesis5:10 Kabili panuma yakufyala Kenani, Enoshi aikele imyaka imyanda cine konse konse ikumi limo na isano (815), afyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:11 Imyaka yonse pamo Enoshi aikele yali imyanda pabula na isano (905), elyo afwa." 
Genesis5:12 Ilyo Kenani aikele imyaka amakumi cine lubali (70), elyo afyele Mahalale." 
Genesis5:13 Kabili panuma yakufyala Mahalale, Kenani aikele imyaka imyanda cine konse konse na makumi yane (840), afyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:14 Imyaka yonse pamo Kenani aikele yali imyanda pabula ne kumi limo (910), elyo afwa." 
Genesis5:15 Ilyo Mahalale aikele imyaka amakumi mutanda na isano (65), afyele Yaledi." 
Genesis5:16 Kabili panuma yakufyala Yaledi, Mahalale aikele imyaka imyanda cine konse konse na makumi yatatu (830), afyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:17 Imyaka yonse pamo Mahalale aikele umumi yali imyanda cine konse konse amakumi pabula na isano (895), elyo afwa." 
Genesis5:18 Ilyo Yaledi aikele imyaka umwanda umo amakumi mutanda na ibili (162), afyele Enoki." 
Genesis5:19 Kabili panuma yakufyala Enoki, Yaledi aikele imyaka imyanda cine konse konse (800), afyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:20 Imyaka yonse pamo Yaledi aikele yali imyanda pabula amakumi mutanda na ibili (962), elyo afwa." 
Genesis5:21 Ilyo Enoki aikele imyaka amakumi mutanda na isano (65), afyele Metusela." 
Genesis5:22 Kabili panuma yakufyala Metusela, Enoki aendele na Lesa pa myaka imyanda itatu (300), kabili afyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:23 Imyaka yonse pamo iyo Enoki aikele yali imyanda itatu amakumi mutanda na isano (365). 
Genesis5:24 Enoki aendele na Lesa, elyo alekele ukulamoneka, ico Lesa alimusendele." 
Genesis5:25 Ilyo Metusela aikele imyaka umwanda umo amakumi cine konse konse na cine lubali (187), afyele Lameki." 
Genesis5:26 Kabili panuma yakufyala Lameki, Metusela aikele imyaka imyanda cine lubali amakumi cine konse konse na ibili (782), kabili afyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:27 Imyaka yonse pamo iyo Metusela aikele yali imyanda pabula amakumi mutanda na pabula (969), elyo afwa." 
Genesis5:28 Ilyo Lameki aikele imyaka umwanda umo amakumi cine konse konse na ibili (182), afyele umwana umwaume." 
Genesis5:29 Amwinike ishina lya Noa, asosa ati, “Uyu eukatuletela icitalaliko mu macushi yakubomba ne minwe yesu apo Yawe alilapisha umushili.”" 
Genesis5:30 Panuma ya kufyala Noa, Lameki aikele imyaka imyanda isano amakumi pabula na isano (595), kabili afyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis5:31 Imyaka yonse pamo iyo Lameki aikele yali imyanda cine lubali na makumi cine lubali na cine lubali (777), elyo afwa." 
Genesis5:32 Panuma Noa ali ne myaka imyanda isano (500), afyele Shemu, Hamu na Yafeti." 
Genesis6:1 Ilyo abantu batendeke ukulafula pesonde, kabili balafyala na bana abanakashi," 
Genesis6:2 abana baume bakwa Lesa bamona ukuti abana banakashi aba bantu bali abayemba. Kanshi epakulaupa onse uo umwine alefwaya. 
Genesis6:3 Elyo Yawe atile, “Umupashi wandi tauli nakubelelela ukucushanya no muntu pantu mwinakufwa. Umuntu inshiku shakwe shili nokubafye imyaka umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120).”" 
Genesis6:4 Banefilimu bali pesonde mu nshiku shilya elyo na panuma ilyo abana baume bakwa Lesa baleupa abana abanakashi ba bantu kabili bafyalamo na bana. Bali ni mpalume sha pakale, abantu abalumbwike nganshi." 
Genesis6:5 Yawe amona ukuti bwafulisha ububi bwa muntu pano isonde, elyo ne mitontonkanishishe mu mutima wakwe nayo ilolelefye lyonse ku bubi." 
Genesis6:6 Yawe alanguluka pali ico abumbile umuntu pesonde, no mutima wakwe wakalipa." 
Genesis6:7 Elyo Yawe asosa ati, “Ndi nokulofya ukufuma pano isonde umuntu uo nabumbile pamo pene ne nama, ifikulaika pa mushili ne fyuni fya mu lwelele. Pantu ninanguluka pakufibumba.”" 
Genesis6:8 Lelo Noa asanga ukusekelelwa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. 
Genesis6:9 Ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Noa. Noa ali umuntu umololoke, uwakaele pa bantu ba pali ilya nshita, kabili aleenda na Lesa." 
Genesis6:10 Noa ali na bana abaume batatu, Shemu, Hamu na Yafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Nomba isonde lyalubana pa cinso cakwa Lesa kabili pesonde paiswilefye icimfulunganya. 
Genesis6:12 Lesa amona ifyo isonde lyalubana, pantu abantu bonse pesonde balubana mu mibeele yabo." 
Genesis6:13 Kanshi Lesa epakweba Noa ati, “Ine nalaonaula abantu bonse, pantu isonde liswilemo icimfulunganya pa mulandu wabo. Icine cine ndebonaula bonse pamo ne sonde line." 
Genesis6:14 Iwe uipangile icibwato ica mbao isha miti iyakosa iya saipulasi. Mukati ka cibwato upangemo imiputule. Elyo ushingule amanenekela mukati na kunse ya cibwato. 
Genesis6:15 Ifi efyo uli nokupanga icibwato. Cili nokuba amakubiti imyanda itatu (300) mubutali, mubufumo mwena amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) elyo mukusumbuka namo amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30)." 
Genesis6:16 Ukapangilepo umutenge pa cibwato. Elyo mupepi no mutenge ukashemo insolokoto iyilepele kubiti umo ukushinguluka ubwato. Umwinshi ukaubike mu mbali ya cibwato. Ukapange icibwato ica fiputulwa fitatu ifyatuntikana, cimo panshi, cimo pakati elyo na cimo pamulu." 
Genesis6:17 Nalaleta ilyeshi pano isonde kukonaula conse icabumi pesamba lya mulu, conse icibumbwa icipema. Icintu conse pesonde cikaloba." 
Genesis6:18 Nomba iwe nkapangana nobe icipangano candi. Iwe uli nokwingila mu cibwato pamo na bana bobe abaume, umukashi obe na bakashi ba bana bobe." 
Genesis6:19 Uli nokwingisha mu cibwato ifyabumi fyonse fibili fibili, icilume ne cikota, pakuti ukafisunge ifituntulu." 
Genesis6:20 Fibili pa misango yonse iya fyuni, fibili pa misango yonse iya nama elyo na fibili fibili pa fibumbwa ifikulaika pa mushili fikesa kuli iwe, uli nokufisenda mu cibwato pakuti fikekale ifituntulu." 
Genesis6:21 Ukasende imisango yonse iya fyakulya fyonse ifili nokuliwa, ukafitutile nge fyakulya fyenu elyo nefyo mukaba nafyo.”" 
Genesis6:22 Noa epakucita fyonse ifyo Lesa amukonkomeshe. 
Genesis7:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Noa ati, “Ingila mu cibwato, iwe pamo no lupwa lobe lonse pantu ninkusanga ukuba umololoke muli ino nkulo." 
Genesis7:2 Pa nama ishishakowela ubuule pali cila musango washiko ishilume cine lubali ne shikota nasho cine lubali. Pa nama ishakowela ubuule pali cila musango washiko inama shibili, iyilume ne ikota." 
Genesis7:3 Kabili pa misango yonse iya fyuni, ubuule pali cila musango wafiko ifilume cine lubali ne fikota cine lubali. Uli nokucita ifi pakufisunga ifituntulu cila musango wafiko pesonde lyonse." 
Genesis7:4 Kwashala inshiku cine lubali elyo nkalokesha imfula pesonde pa nshiku amakumi yane, ikalaloka akasuba no bushiku. Efyo nkonaula ifintu fyonse mpanga yonse pano isonde ifyo nabumbile.”" 
Genesis7:5 Kabili Noa acitile fyonse ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. 
Genesis7:6 Noa ali ne myaka imyanda mutanda (600) ilyo ilyeshi lyaishile pesonde. 
Genesis7:7 Noa, abana bakwe abaume, umukashi wakwe na bakashi ba bana bakwe baingile mu cibwato pakupusuka ku menshi ye lyeshi." 
Genesis7:8 Inama shibili shibili ishishakowela ne shakowela, ifyuni ne fikulaika pa mushili fibili fibili mu musango wafiko," 
Genesis7:9 icilume ne cikota, fyaisa kuli Noa, fyaingila mu cibwato ngefyo Lesa akonkomeshe Noa." 
Genesis7:10 Kabili panuma ya nshiku cine lubali (17) ne lyeshi lyaisa pesonde. 
Genesis7:11 Mu mwaka Noa afikile pa myaka imyanda mutanda (600), pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) mu mweshi wabubili, pali bulya bushiku epo utumfukumfuku twa bemba washika twalepwike elyo ne fipunda fyonse mu mulu fyaisuka." 
Genesis7:12 Kabili imfula epakuloka pesonde akasuba no bushiku, inshiku amakumi yane (40)." 
Genesis7:13 Pali bulya bwine bushiku Noa, abana bakwe abaume Shemu, Hamu na Yafeti, no mukashi wakwe na bakashi ba bana bakwe batatu baingile mu cibwato." 
Genesis7:14 Baingilemo ne misango yonse iya nama sha mpanga, imisango yonse iya fitekwa, imisango yonse iya fikulaika pa mushili, imisango yonse iya fyuni, elyo ne misango yonse iya fyakwata amapindo." 
Genesis7:15 Kanshi fyonse ifyabumi fibili fibili, icilume ne cikota fyaingile na Noa mu cibwato." 
Genesis7:16 Kanshi inama ishaingile mu cibwato shali ishilume ne shikota mu misango yonse iya fyabumi ngefyo Lesa akonkomeshe Noa. Elyo Yawe amwisalila mu cibwato. 
Genesis7:17 Pa nshiku amakumi yane, amenshi yakonkenyepofye ukufulilako pesonde. Kabili ilyo amenshi yasuka yafula, yaimya icibwato calaelela pamulu." 
Genesis7:18 Amenshi yalafulilako ukwimina pa mulu we sonde ne cibwato calaelela pa menshi. 
Genesis7:19 Kanshi amenshi yaima icine cine pa mulu we sonde icakuti ne mpili shonse ishalepa pesamba lya mulu shasukile shaibila. 
Genesis7:20 Amenshi yakonkenyepofye ukwima yasukile yacila pa mpili ishaibile mu menshi amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15). 
Genesis7:21 Kanshi ifintu fyonse ifyabumi ifyenda pesonde fyaloba, ifyuni, ifitekwa, inama sha mpanga, fyonse ifikulaika pa mushili na bantu bonse." 
Genesis7:22 Ifintu fyonse ifikala ku mulundu, ifipemena mu myona umupu wabumi fyafwa." 
Genesis7:23 Kanshi Lesa aonawile pesonde ifintu fyonse ifyaba no bumi, umuntu, inama, ifikulaika pa mushili ne fyuni fya mu lwelele, fyonse alifyonawile pesonde. Abashelepofye ni Noa nabo ali nabo mu cibwato." 
Genesis7:24 Ilyeshi lyaiswile pesonde inshiku umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150). 
Genesis8:1 Lelo Lesa aibukishe Noa ne nama shonse isha mpanga ne fitekwa fyonse ifyali nankwe mu cibwato. Elyo aimya icimwela calapupa pesonde, na menshi yalacepa." 
Genesis8:2 Pali iyi nshita utumfukumfuku twali muli bemba washika ne fipunda fya mu mulu fyacilikwa, ne mfula yaleka ukuloka ukufuma mu mulu." 
Genesis8:3 Amenshi pesonde yalakama buce buce. Panuma ya nshiku umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150) amenshi yasuka yacepa. 
Genesis8:4 Pa bushiku bwalengele ikumi limo na cine lubali (17), mu mweshi walenga cine lubali, elyo icibwato caya ikala pa mpili sha Ararati." 
Genesis8:5 Amenshi yakonkenyepo ukukama mpaka na mu mweshi walenga ikumi. Elyo pa bushiku bwakubalilapo mu mweshi walenga ikumi, pa mulu wa mpili patampa ukumoneka." 
Genesis8:6 Panuma ya nshiku amakumi yane (40), Noa aisula insolokoto apangile mu cibwato," 
Genesis8:7 elyo atuma mwankole, alapupukafye, aleti aya kabili abwela mpaka nelyo amenshi yakamine pa mushili." 
Genesis8:8 Kabili Noa atuma inkunda pakuti imone amenshi nga nayakama pa mushili. 
Genesis8:9 Nomba inkunda yafilwa ukusanga apakwikala, pantu amenshi ninshi yalifye mpanga yonse pesonde. Kanshi inkunda epakubwelela kuli Noa mu cibwato. Noa nao epakutambika ukuboko, aikata inkunda, aingisha na mu cibwato umo ali." 
Genesis8:10 Noa apembelako na shimbi inshiku cine lubali elyo nakabili atuma inkunda ukufuma mu cibwato. 
Genesis8:11 Ilyo inkunda yabwela mu cungulo, moneni ku mulomo waiko yabwela ili no lulembelya lwa miolifa! Elyo Noa aishiba ukuti kanshi amenshi nayakama pesonde." 
Genesis8:12 Kabili Noa apembelako inshiku na shimbi cine lubali elyo nakabili atuma inkunda, lelo uyu muku wena tayabwelele iyoo." 
Genesis8:13 Kanshi amenshi yakamine pesonde pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi mu mweshi wakubalilapo ilyo Noa ali ne myaka imyanda mutanda na umo (601). Elyo Noa afumyapo umutenge pa cibwato, amona nokuti umushili nauma." 
Genesis8:14 Pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27) mu mweshi walenga ibili, lyena umushili waumafye ndi." 
Genesis8:15 Elyo Lesa aebele Noa ati," 
Genesis8:16 “Fuma mu cibwato, iwe no mukashi obe, abana bobe abaume na bakashi babo." 
Genesis8:17 Fumya mu cibwato fyonse ifyabumi ifyo uli nafyo, ifyuni, inama na fyonse ifikulaika pa mushili, pakuti filefyalana, fisande, fifule nganshi pesonde.”" 
Genesis8:18 Kanshi Noa epakufuma mu cibwato pamo na bana bakwe abaume, umukashi wakwe na bakashi ba bana bakwe." 
Genesis8:19 Inama shonse na fyonse ifikulaika pa mushili, ifyuni fyonse na fyonse ifyenda pesonde fyafuma mu cibwato mu misango yafiko." 
Genesis8:20 Elyo Noa akuulile Yawe ubulambo, abuulapo inama shimo pa shishakowela ne fyuni ifishakowela, afituula nge lambo lyakoca pa bulambo." 
Genesis8:21 Yawe aumfwa ukuti cena icisuma icakusekesha, asosa mu mutima wakwe ati, “Nshakatale nakabili ndapisha umushili pa mulandu wa muntu, nangu imitontonkanishe ya mu mutima wakwe yabipa ukufuma ku bwaice bwakwe. Kanshi nshakatale mbwekeshapo nakabili ukonaula ifyabumi fyonse ngefi ncitile." 
Genesis8:22 “Inshita yonse ilyo isonde likabako, lyonsefye takwakatale akupwa inshita yakubyala ne nshita yakulobolola, impepo no kukaba, pamwela no lusuba, akasuba no bushiku.”" 
Genesis9:1 Elyo Lesa apaalile Noa na bana bakwe abaume, abeba ati, “Fyalaneni, mufule, mwisushe isonde." 
Genesis9:2 Inama shonse isha mpanga, ifyuni fyonse ifya mu lwelele, ifyabumi fyonse ifikulaika pa mushili ne sabi lyonse ilya muli bemba, fyakulamukwatila umwenso no kulamutiina. Ifi fyonse nafilubwila mu minwe yenu." 
Genesis9:3 Fyonse ifyabumi ifyenda fikaba ifyakulya kuli imwe. Namupeela fyonse nga filya fine namupeele imisalu. 
Genesis9:4 Lelo tamufwile ukulya inama umuli umulopa, pantu mu mulopa emwaba ubumi." 
Genesis9:5 Kabili pa mulopa wenu uwabumi nkafwaya ukulubwililapo. Na pa mulopa wa nama wine nkafwaya ukulubulwilapo. Kabili nkalandula pa muntu onse uwasumya umulopa mukwipaya umuntu munankwe. 
Genesis9:6 “Uyo onse uwasumya umulopa wa muntu, nao umuntu ali nokusumya umulopa wakwe, pantu Lesa abumbile umuntu mu cata cakwe." 
Genesis9:7 “Nomba imwe, fyalaneni, musande, mufule nganshi pesonde no kufulilapo.”" 
Genesis9:8 Kabili Lesa aebele Noa na bana bakwe abaume ali nabo ati," 
Genesis9:9 “Na ine nomba nalapangana na imwe icipangano pamo na ba mu ndupwa shenu abakafyalwa kuntanshi," 
Genesis9:10 na ku fyabumi fyonse ifyo muli nafyo, ifyuni, ifitekwa, inama sha mpanga shonse, fyonse ifyo ufumine nafyo mu cibwato, na fyonse ifyabumi pesonde." 
Genesis9:11 Ine napangana na imwe icipangano ukuti, ifyaba no bumi fyonse tafyakatale afyonaulwa ku menshi ye lyeshi nakabili. Kabili takwakatale akuba ilyeshi ilyakonaula isonde.”" 
Genesis9:12 Elyo Lesa atile, “Ici e cishibilo ca cipangano nalapangana na imwe na fyonse ifyabumi ifyo muli nafyo, icipangano cakulabako lyonse umukonkanina inkulo." 
Genesis9:13 Nabika umukolamfula wandi mu makumbi, ewakulaba icishibilo ca cipangano ico napangana ne sonde." 
Genesis9:14 Ilyo lyonse nalonganika amakumbi pa mulu we sonde, no mukolamfula wamoneka mu makumbi," 
Genesis9:15 nakulaibukisha icipangano candi napangana na imwe ne misango yonse iya fyabumi. Amenshi tayakabale nakabili ayaba ilyeshi ilyakonaula ifintu fyonse ifyabumi. 
Genesis9:16 Ilyo lyonse umukolamfula ukalamoneka mu makumbi, ine nkalaumona no kwibukisha icipangano icakubelelela Lesa apangana ne misango yonse iya fyabumi pesonde.”" 
Genesis9:17 Elyo Lesa aeba Noa ati, “Ici e cishibilo ca cipangano ico ine napangana ne fyabumi fyonse pesonde.”" 
Genesis9:18 Abana baume bakwa Noa abo afumine nabo mu cibwato ni Shemu, Hamu na Yafeti. (Hamu e wishi wakwa Kenani)." 
Genesis9:19 Aba ebali abana baume batatu abakwa Noa, ni kuli bena ekwatuntuka abantu bonse abasalanganina pesonde." 
Genesis9:20 Noa ali mulimi, kabili ewabalilepo ukulima ibala lya myangashi." 
Genesis9:21 Ilyo anweneko umwangashi, alikolelwe, elyo alala ubwamba mwitenti lyakwe." 
Genesis9:22 Hamu wishi wakwa Kenani amwene ukuti wishi ali ubwamba, elyo aebako bamunyina babili abali panse." 
Genesis9:23 Shemu na Yafeti bena epakubuula insalu babika pa mabeya yabo. Elyo balaya cimfutyanuma, baya fimba na wishi uwali ubwamba. Amenso baloseshe kumbi pakukanamona wishi uwali ubwamba." 
Genesis9:24 Ilyo Noa umwangashi wamukololoka, elyo aumfwa nefyo umwana wakwe uwacepeshepo mu myaka amucitile," 
Genesis9:25 Noa epakutila, “Kenani alapishiwa! Akalaba umusha walekeleshako kuli bamunyina.”" 
Genesis9:26 Noa kabili atile, “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Shemu! Kenani ena akaleba umusha wakwa Shemu!" 
Genesis9:27 Lesa engalundako impanga ku calo cakwa Yafeti. Yafeti engalaikala mu matenti yakwa Shemu. Kabili Kenani akaleba umusha wakwe.” 
Genesis9:28 Panuma ya lyeshi, Noa aikele umumi imyaka imyanda itatu na makumi yasano (350)." 
Genesis9:29 Imyaka yonse pamo iyo Noa aikele yali imyanda pabula na makumi yasano (950), elyo afwa." 
Genesis10:1 Ubu e butantiko bwa ndupwa sha bana baume bakwa Noa: Shemu, Hamu na Yafeti. Panuma ya lyeshi bamwana Noa nabo balifyele abana abaume." 
Genesis10:2 Bamwana Yafeti abaume ni Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yafani, Tubali, Mesheki na Tirasi." 
Genesis10:3 Bamwana Gomeri abaume ni Ashikenasi, Rifati na Togama." 
Genesis10:4 Bamwana Yafani abaume ni Elisha, Tashishi, abena Kitimu na bena Rodanimu." 
Genesis10:5 Ukufuma muli aba bantu emwatuntunka abasalanganina mu lulamba lwa bemba mu mipaka yabo, mu mikowa yabo na mu mishobo yabo, bonse umwabela indimi shabo." 
Genesis10:6 Bamwana Hamu abaume ni Kushi, Misraimu, Puti na Kenani." 
Genesis10:7 Bamwana Kushi abaume ni Seba, Hafila, Sabuta, Rama na Sabuteka. Bamwana Rama abaume ni Sheba na Dedani." 
Genesis10:8 Kushi ali e wishi wakwa Nimurodi. Nimurodi ewabalilepo ukuba icita icamaka pano isonde. 
Genesis10:9 Nimurodi ali ni fundi uwamaka pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Kanshi ekwatula ne nsonselo yakuti, “Nga Nimurodi, fundi uwamaka pa cinso cakwa Yawe!”" 
Genesis10:10 Imisumba iyo Nimurodi abalilepo ukuteeka ni Babiloni, Ereki, Akadi na Kaline. Iyi misumba yonse ya mu calo ca Shina." 
Genesis10:11 Ilyo afumine muli ici calo ca Shina, aile ku Asiria, uko aile kuula umusumba wa Ninife, Rehoboti Iri na Kala," 
Genesis10:12 elyo na Reseni, uwabela pakati ka Ninife na Kala, e musumba ukalamba." 
Genesis10:13 Misraimu e cikolwe ca bena Ludi, abena Anamu, abena Lehabu, abena Nafutu," 
Genesis10:14 abena Patulusi na bena Kaselu ukwatuntuka Abafilisiti elyo na bena Kafuto. 
Genesis10:15 Kenani ewali wishi wakwa Sidoni, ibeli lyakwe, kabili ewali icikolwe ca bena Hiti," 
Genesis10:16 abena Yebusi, abena Amoli, abena Girigashi," 
Genesis10:17 abena Hifi, abena Aki, abena Sini," 
Genesis10:18 abena Afadi, abena Semari na bena Hamati. Panuma imikowa ya bena Kenani yalisa salangana." 
Genesis10:19 Kabili imipaka ya bena Kenani yatampile ukufuma ku Sidoni ukulola ku Gela ukufika na ku Gasa. Elyo kabili ukulola ku Sodoma, Gomora, Adima na Seboimu, ukufikafye na ku Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Aba e bana baume bakwa Hamu mu mikowa yabo na mu ndimi shabo, mu mipaka na mu mishobo yabo." 
Genesis10:21 Shemu umukalamba wakwa Yafeti nao alifyele abana abaume. Kabili Shemu e cikolwe ca bana baume bakwa Eberi. 
Genesis10:22 Abana abaume abakwa Shemu ni Elamu, Ashuri, Afakisadi, Ludi na Aramu." 
Genesis10:23 Abana abaume abakwa Aramu ni Usi, Huli, Geteri na Mesheki." 
Genesis10:24 Afakisadi ewafyele Shela, elyo Shela nao afyele Eberi." 
Genesis10:25 Eberi afyele abana abaume babili. Umo ishina lyakwe ni Pelegi, pantu ni mu nshita yakwe emo bayakenye isonde. Munyina ali ni Yokitani." 
Genesis10:26 Yokitani afyele Alumodadi, Shelefu, Hasalimafeti, Yera," 
Genesis10:27 Hadoramu, Usali, Dikila," 
Genesis10:28 Obali, Abimaeli, Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofiri, Hafila na Yobabu. Aba bonse bana abaume abakwa Yokitani." 
Genesis10:30 Bonse aba baleikala mu citungu ca mpili icabelele ku kabanga ukufuma ku Mesha ukulola ku Sefali. 
Genesis10:31 Aba e bana baume bakwa Shemu mu mikowa na mu ndimi shabo, mu mipaka na mu mishobo yabo." 
Genesis10:32 Iyi e mikowa ya bana baume bakwa Noa ukukonka ifyo batantama mukufyalwa na mu mishobo yabo. Ni kuli aba bantu ekwafuma imishobo yasalanganina pano isonde panuma ya lyeshi. 
Genesis11:1 Pesonde ponse palelandwafye ululimi lumo, kabili na mashiwi yalebomfiwa yamo yene." 
Genesis11:2 Ilyo abantu baselele no kulola lwa ku kabanga, basangile iwanga mu calo ca Shina, emo baikala." 
Genesis11:3 Balalanshanya abati, “Iseni tutame amatafwali tuyoce na bwino.” Kanshi babomfeshe amatafwali mu nshita yakubomfya amabwe. Elyo babomfeshe amanenekela mu nshita yakubomfya indaka." 
Genesis11:4 Elyo batile, “Iseni tuikuulile fwe bene umusumba no lupungu mukati ulwakuti lukafike na ku mulu pakuti tukalumbuke, kabili twikasalanganina pesonde lyonse.”" 
Genesis11:5 Lelo Yawe epakwika kukwisa mona umusumba no lupungu abantu balekuula. 
Genesis11:6 Elyo Yawe atile ati, “Moneni, nga cakuti aba bantu bali umutundu umo, kabili balelanda ululimi lumo batendeka ukucita ici, lyena pafyo bengatontonkanya tapakabe nelyo cimo ico bakafilwa ukucita." 
Genesis11:7 Iseni, natwike tuye fulunganya ululimi lwabo pakuti belaumfwa umulolele ifyo umunankwe alelanda.”" 
Genesis11:8 Kanshi ukufuma kuli ilya ncende Yawe epakubasalanganishisha pesonde lyonse, baleka no kukuula umusumba." 
Genesis11:9 Eco uyu musumba balewitila Babele, pantu ni muli uyu musumba emo Yawe afulunganishishe ululimi lwe sonde lyonse. Ukufuma muli uyu musumba, Yawe abasalanganishishe pesonde lyonse." 
Genesis11:10 Ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Shemu. Imyaka ibili panuma ye lyeshi, ilyo Shemu ali ne myaka yakufyalwa umwanda umo (100), afyele umwana umwaume ishina lyakwe ni Afakisadi." 
Genesis11:11 Kabili panuma yakufyala Afakisadi, Shemu aikele imyaka imyanda isano (500), alifyele abana na bambi abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis11:12 Ilyo Afakisadi ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu na isano (35), afyele Shela." 
Genesis11:13 Kabili panuma yakufyala Shela, Afakisadi aikele imyaka imyanda ine na itatu (403), alifyele abana na bambi abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis11:14 Ilyo Shela ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30), afyele Eberi." 
Genesis11:15 Kabili panuma yakufyala Eberi, Shela aikele imyaka imyanda ine na itatu (403), alifyele abana na bambi abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis11:16 Ilyo Eberi ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu na ine (34), afyele Pelegi." 
Genesis11:17 Kabili panuma yakufyala Pelegi, Eberi aikele imyaka imyanda ine na makumi yatatu (430), alifyele abana na bambi abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis11:18 Ilyo Pelegi ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30), afyele Reu." 
Genesis11:19 Kabili panuma yakufyala Reu, Pelegi aikele imyaka imyanda ibili na pabula (209), alifyele abana na bambi abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis11:20 Ilyo Reu ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu na ibili (32), afyele Serugi." 
Genesis11:21 Kabili panuma yakufyala Serugi, Reu aikele imyaka imyanda ibili na cine lubali (207), alifyele abana na bambi abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis11:22 Ilyo Serugi ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30), afyele Naho." 
Genesis11:23 Kabili panuma yakufyala Naho, Serugi aikele imyaka imyanda ibili (200), alifyele na bambi abana abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis11:24 Ilyo Naho ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na pabula (29), afyele Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Kabili panuma yakufyala Tera, Naho aikele imyaka umwanda umo ikumi limo na pabula (119), alifyele abana na bambi abaume na banakashi." 
Genesis11:26 Ilyo Tera ali ne myaka amakumi cine lubali (70), afyele Abramu, Naho na Harani." 
Genesis11:27 Ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Tera. Tera afyele Abramu, Naho na Harani. Harani nao ewafyele Loti." 
Genesis11:28 Harani afwilile mu Uri mu musumba afyalilwemo mu calo ca Kaludea, ninshi na wishi Tera acili umumi." 
Genesis11:29 Abramu na Naho bonse babili balyupile. Abramu aupile Sarai. Naho nao aupile Milika mwana Harani. Uyu Harani ewafyele Milika na Isika. 
Genesis11:30 Lelo Sarai takwete mwana, pantu ali ni ŋumba." 
Genesis11:31 Tera abuulile umwana wakwe Abramu, umwishikukulu wakwe Loti mwana Harani na nafyala Sarai, muka Abramu umwana wakwe, elyo bonse pamo bafumine mu musumba wa Uri mu calo ca Kaludea baile na ku calo ca Kenani. Nomba ilyo bafikile ku musumba wa Harani uko eko bacitile icifulo." 
Genesis11:32 Tera ali ne myaka imyanda ibili na isano (205) ilyo afwilile mu musumba wa Harani. 
Genesis12:1 Yawe aebele Abramu ati, “Fuma mu calo cobe, ku bantu bobe na ku ba mu ŋanda yakwa wiso, uye na ku calo nkakulanga." 
Genesis12:2 “Nkalenga ukuti ukabe umushobo uukalamba kabili nkakupaala. Nkalenga ishina lyobe likalumbuke nganshi, kabili ukaba ipaalo" 
Genesis12:3 Nkapaala abo abakakupaala, Kabili na onse uukakulapisha nkamulapisha. Kabili na bantu bonse aba pano isonde bakapaalilwa muli iwe.”" 
Genesis12:4 Kanshi Abramu epakuya ngefyo Yawe amwebele. Loti nao aile nankwe. Abramu ali ne myaka amakumi cine lubali (75) ilyo afumine ku Harani. 
Genesis12:5 Abramu asendele umukashi wakwe Sarai na Loti mwana munyina. Asendele ifyuma fyonse anonkele mu Harani na basha bonse akwete. Bonse baima ukulaya ku calo ca Kenani, kabili basuka bafika. Ilyo bafikile mu calo ca Kenani," 
Genesis12:6 Abramu apitile pakati ka cilya calo aya fika ukwabela icimuti icakosa ica oki ica More mu Shekemu. Pali ilya nshita abena Kenani ebali muli cilya calo. 
Genesis12:7 Yawe amonekele kuli Abramu amweba ati, “Nkapeela ici calo ku bufyashi bobe.” Kanshi Abramu epakukuulila Yawe uwamumonekele ubulambo pa ncende ine iyo." 
Genesis12:8 Ilyo Abramu afumine pali iyo ncende, aile lwa ku calo ca mpili ku kabanga ka musumba wa Betele, eko acitile inkambi yakwe, ninshi Betele ali ku masamba, elyo Ai ku kabanga. Uku nako alikuulileko Yawe ubulambo no kupepa Yawe." 
Genesis12:9 Kabili Abramu epakwima akonkanyapo ubulendo ukulaya ku matololo ya Negebu. 
Genesis12:10 Nomba icipowe caliponene mu calo, Abramu epakuya ku Egupto aya ikalako ngo mweni pantu icipowe calibipishe." 
Genesis12:11 Ilyo ali mupepi no kwingila mu Egupto, aebele umukashi wakwe Sarai ati, “Nalishiba ukuti uli mwanakashi uwayemba." 
Genesis12:12 Ilyo abena Egupto baleya kumona, baleya tila, ‘Uyu mukashi wakwe.’ Elyo ine bakanjipaya, lelo iwe bakakusha umumi." 
Genesis12:13 Ubebe auti, uli nkashi yandi, epakuti balensunga bwino kabili tabanjipaye pa mulandu wa iwe.”" 
Genesis12:14 Ilyo Abramu afikile mu Egupto, abena Egupto bamwene ukuti Sarai mwanakashi uwayemba nganshi mukumoneka." 
Genesis12:15 Ilyo bacilolo bakwa Farao bamumwene, baya takisha ukuyemba kwakwe kuli Farao, elyo baisa bamutwala na kwisano lyakwe." 
Genesis12:16 Farao alasunga Abramu bwino pa mulandu wakwa Sarai. Kabili apeela Abramu impaanga, iŋombe, bapunda, ababomfi abaume na banakashi ne ngamila." 
Genesis12:17 Lelo Yawe aletele Farao na ba mu ŋanda mumwakwe amalwele ayabipisha pa mulandu wakwa Sarai muka Abramu. 
Genesis12:18 Kanshi Farao epakwita Abramu, amwipusha ati, “Cinshi ici wacita kuli ine? Cinshi ushanjebele ukuti mukashi obe?" 
Genesis12:19 Cinshi wanjebele auti, ‘Ni nkashi yandi,’ walenga nokuti mubuule abe umukashi wandi? Kanshi nomba umukashi obe uyu, mubuule, uleya no kuya.”" 
Genesis12:20 Elyo Farao akonkomesha abantu bakwe pali Abramu. Nabo bamushindika, aya no mukashi wakwe na fyonse ifyo akwete." 
Genesis13:1 Kanshi ilyo Abramu afumine mu Egupto abwelele ku matololo ya Negebu, ali no mukashi wakwe na fyonse ifyo akwete, kabili Loti aile nankwe." 
Genesis13:2 Abramu aba umukankala nganshi, akwata ifitekwa, silifa na golide." 
Genesis13:3 Ukufuma ku Negebu, apitile mu ncende ishalekana lekana, asuka afika na ku Betele pa ncende imo pakati ka Betele na Ai, apo kale acitile inkambi yakwe," 
Genesis13:4 kabili apo akuulile ubulambo bwantanshi. Pali iyi incende epo Abramu apepele Yawe. 
Genesis13:5 Nomba Loti uwaleendauka na Abramu nao alikwete imikuni ya mpaanga, imbushi ne ŋombe pamo na matenti." 
Genesis13:6 Lelo impanga baleikalapo yacepa ilyo bali pamo pantu icuma bakwete califulishe icakuti bafilwa no kwikala pamo. 
Genesis13:7 Bakacema ba fitekwa fyakwa Abramu balaumana na bakacema ba fitekwa fyakwa Loti. Pali iyo nshita ninshi abena Kenani na bena Perisi nabo bene baleikala muli ici calo. 
Genesis13:8 Elyo Abramu aebele Loti ati, “Tatufwile ukulaumana iwe na ine, nangu bakacema bobe na bakacema bandi, pantu tuli ba mu lupwa lumo." 
Genesis13:9 Bushe icalo conse ici tekuti cibe cobe? Natupatulukane, iwe nga uleya ku kuso, ine ninshi ndeya ku kulyo. Elyo nga cakuti iwe uleya ku kulyo, ine ninshi ndeya ku kuso.”" 
Genesis13:10 Loti ainuna amenso amona iwanga lyonse ilya Yordani ukuti mwaliba amenshi kwatifye ni mwibala lyakwa Yawe, nangu kwati mushili wa mu Egupto ukulola ku Soari. Ili cali ilyo Yawe ali talaonaula Sodoma na Gomora." 
Genesis13:11 Kanshi aba bantu babili epakupatulukana. Loti asalapo umwine iwanga lyonse ilya Yordani, aima alungama na ku kabanga." 
Genesis13:12 Abramu ashala aleikala mu calo ca Kenani elyo Loti aleikala mu musumba wa mwiwanga, kabili acitile inkambi yakwe mupepi no musumba wa Sodoma." 
Genesis13:13 Nomba abantu ba mu Sodoma bali ababi kabili balebifya nganshi kuli Yawe. 
Genesis13:14 Panuma yakupatukana kwakwa Loti na Abramu, Yawe aebele Abramu ati, “Inuna amenso, uloleshe ukufuma apo pene wiminine, ku kapinda ka kuso, ku kapinda ka kulyo, ku kabanga na ku masamba." 
Genesis13:15 Icalo conse ici ulemona, nkacipeela kuli iwe na bana bobe." 
Genesis13:16 Nkalenga ukuti abana bobe bakafule kwati lukungu lwa pano isonde. Nga cakuti umuntu kuti apenda ulukungu, ninshi lyena kuti apenda na bana bobe." 
Genesis13:17 Ima, wende ukuya mubutali na mu bwipi bwa calo, pantu ni kuli iwe ndecipeela.”" 
Genesis13:18 Kanshi Abramu epakusesha inkambi yakwe aya ikala mupepi ne miti ikulu iya oki iyakwa Mamure ku Hebuloni, kulya kwine eko akuulile Yawe ubulambo." 
Genesis14:1 Mu nshiku shilya Amurafeli imfumu ya ku Shina, Arioki imfumu ya ku Elasari, Kedolaomeri imfumu ya ku Elamu na Tida imfumu ya ku Goimu," 
Genesis14:2 baile mukulwisha Bera imfumu ya ku Sodoma, Berisha imfumu ya ku Gomora, Shinabu imfumu ya ku Adima, Shemeberi imfumu ya ku Seboimu ne mfumu ya ku Bela, emukutila Soari." 
Genesis14:3 Ishi mfumu shonse ishakonkapo shisano shalyumfwene no kulonganya ifita fyashiko mwishika lya Sidimu, emukutila Bemba wa Mucele." 
Genesis14:4 Pa myaka ikumi limo na ibili (12) ishi mfumu shateekelwe na Kedolaomeri, lelo mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na itatu (13) shalimusangukile." 
Genesis14:5 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ine (14) Kedolaomeri pamo ne mfumu aleumfwana nasho baile cimfya abena Refaimu mu Ashitaloti Kanaimu, abena Susi mu Hamu, abena Emi mu Shafe Kiriataimu," 
Genesis14:6 elyo na bena Hori mu calo ca mpili ica mu Seiri, ukufikafye na ku Elu Parani mupepi na ku matololo." 
Genesis14:7 Elyo bayaluluka, baya na ku Eni Mishipati, (emukutila ni Kadeshi), kabili bacimfishe icalo conse ica bena Amaleki na bena Amoli abaleikala mu Hasasoni Tama." 
Genesis14:8 Elyo imfumu ya mu Sodoma, imfumu ya mu Gomora, imfumu ya mu Adama, imfumu ya mu Seboimu, ne mfumu ya mu Bela (emukutila Soari), balimine no kuya tantamika ifita fyabo mwishika lya Sidimu" 
Genesis14:9 kukulwisha Kedolaomeri imfumu ya mu Elamu, Tida imfumu ya mu Goimu, Amurafeli imfumu ya mu Shina na Arioki imfumu ya mu Elasari. Kanshi emukutila imfumu shine (4) shalelwisha imfumu shisano (5)." 
Genesis14:10 Nomba mwishika lya Sidimu mwali ifilindi ifingi ifya manenekela. Ilyo imfumu ya ku Sodoma ne ya ku Gomora shafulumwike, shawilile mu filindi, lelo shimbi shena shafulumukile ku mpili." 
Genesis14:11 Imfumu shilya shimbi shine (4) epakutapa ifyuma fyonse ne fyakulya fyonse ifya mu Sodoma na Gomora, shaya no kuya." 
Genesis14:12 Kabili shasendele Loti, mwana munyina Abramu ne fyuma fyakwe, pantu aleikala mu Sodoma." 
Genesis14:13 Elyo umo uwapusunswikeko aisa shimikilako Abramu Umuhibulu. Abramu aleikala mupepi ne miti ikulu iya oki iyakwa Mamure umwina Amoli, munyina wakwa Eshikoli na Aneri, elyo aba bonse balipangene ukulaafwana na Abramu." 
Genesis14:14 Ilyo Abramu aumfwile ukuti Loti lupwa lwakwe nabamusenda bunkole, Abramu aimishe ababomfi imyanda itatu ikumi limo na cine konse konse (318), abafyalilwe mu ŋanda yakwe, abasambilile ifyabulwi, basupila bashamfumu ukufika ku Dani." 
Genesis14:15 Mu nshita ya bushiku Abramu ayakenye abantu bakwe pakubalwisha, babacimfya no kubasupila mpaka na ku Hoba, lubali lwa ku kapinda ka kuso ka Damasiko." 
Genesis14:16 Apokolwele ifyuma fyonse batapile abwesha na lupwa lwakwe Loti ne fyuma fyakwe, pamo pene na banakashi na bantu bambi." 
Genesis14:17 Ilyo Abramu abwelulwike kukucimfya imfumu Kedolaomeri ne shamfumu shali nankwe, imfumu ya mu Sodoma yaishile mukumukumanya mwishika lya Shafe ilyo batila ishika lya mfumu." 
Genesis14:18 Elyo Melikisedeki imfumu ya ku Salemu aletele umukate no mwangashi. Ali shimapepo wakwa Lesa Umupulami. 
Genesis14:19 Apaalile Abramu ati, “Apaalwe Abramu kuli Lesa Umupulami, Kabumba wa mulu ne sonde." 
Genesis14:20 Kabili napaalwe Lesa Umupulami, uwaposele abalwani bobe mu minwe yobe.” Elyo Abramu apeela Melikisedeki icintu cimo pekumi ica fintu fyonse." 
Genesis14:21 Elyo imfumu ya mu Sodoma yaebele Abramu aiti, “Ifintu fyonse ifyo utapile sunga, lelo mbwesesha abantu.”" 
Genesis14:22 Lelo Abramu aebele imfumu ya mu Sodoma ati, “Naimya ukuboko kwandi kuli Yawe, Lesa Umupulami, Kabumba wa mulu ne sonde, kabili nalilapa" 
Genesis14:23 ukuti pa fintu fyobe fyonse ine nshakabuulepo nelyo cimo nangufye bushishi nangufye ni ntambo sha ndyato shobe. Epakuti wikatala ausosa ati, ‘Nine nalenga ukuti Abramu abe umukankala.’" 
Genesis14:24 Ine nshabuulepofye nelyo cimo kanofye ifyo abantu bandi balile elyo ne cakaniko ca bantu naile nabo Aneri, Eshikoli na Mamure. Leka babuulepo icakaniko cabo.”" 
Genesis15:1 Panuma ya ifi fintu, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Abramu mu cimonwa aliti, “Abramu witiina, Nine nkwela yobe, nine icilambu cobe icikulu nganshi, kabili nkakulambula apakalamba nganshi.”" 
Genesis15:2 Lelo Abramu ayaswike ati, “We Mfumu Yawe, cinshi wingampeela apo nshakwata mwana, elyo uukapyana icuma candi ni Eliese umwina Damasiko?”" 
Genesis15:3 Kabili Abramu atile, “Mona tawampeela abana. Kanshi mushafye uwa mu ŋanda mumwandi eukaba impyani yandi.”" 
Genesis15:4 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Abramu aliti, “Uyu muntu takabe impyani yobe, lelo umwana uo ukaifyalila eukaba impyani yobe.”" 
Genesis15:5 Elyo Yawe amufumisha panse alamweba ati, “Lolesha mu mulu, upende intanda nga kuti washipenda.” Elyo Yawe amweba nokuti, “Ifi fine efikaba na bana bobe.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abramu atetekele Yawe, na Yawe pali ici amumwene ukuti mololoke pa cinso cakwe." 
Genesis15:7 Yawe amwebele nokuti, “Nine Yawe uwakufumishe mu musumba wa Uri uwa bena Kaludea pakuti nkupeele ici calo cibe cobe.”" 
Genesis15:8 Nomba Abramu ayaswike ati, “We Mfumu Yawe, nga ine kuti naishiba shani ukuti ici calo cikaba candi?”" 
Genesis15:9 Kanshi Yawe epakumweba ati, “Ndetela umusepela wa ŋombe ikota iya myaka itatu, imbushi ikota iya myaka itatu, sukusuku uwa myaka itatu, pamo pene ne cipele cimo na kabondo ka nkunda.”" 
Genesis15:10 Abramu epakuya letela Yawe ifi fyonse, afiputula pakati, cila cipandwa acibika icalolenkana ne cibiye. Ifyuni fyena tafiputwile pakati." 
Genesis15:11 Elyo amakubi yawila pa fitumbi fya nama ne fyuni, lelo Abramu afitamfyapo." 
Genesis15:12 Ilyo akasuba kaba mukuwa, Abramu apona mu tulo utwingi, elyo imfifi ikalamba kabili iyakutiina yamukupa." 
Genesis15:13 Elyo Yawe amweba ati, “Wishibe icine cine ukuti aba mu lupwa lobe bakaba abeni mu calo icishili cabo. Muli ico calo bakaba abasha, kabili bakabacusha nganshi pa myaka imyanda ine (400)." 
Genesis15:14 Lelo nkakanda uyo mushobo ukabateeka ubusha. Elyo panuma bakafumamo nabasenda ifyuma ifingi. 
Genesis15:15 Lelo iwe ukaya mu cibote ukwaba ifikolwe fyobe, kabili bakakushiika mu bukote bwine bwine." 
Genesis15:16 Mu nkulo yalenga shine, elyo aba mu lupwa lobe bakabwelela muli cino calo pantu ububi bwa bena Amoli tabulati bubipishe ukufikapo.”" 
Genesis15:17 Ilyo akasuba kawa no kufiita kwafiita, elyo kwamoneka inongo umulefuuka icushi no lubingu lulebilima, fyapita pakati ka fipande fya nama." 
Genesis15:18 Pali ubo bwine bushiku Yawe apangene icipangano na Abramu, asosa ati, “Aba mu lupwa lobe ebo napeela ici calo, ukufuma ku mumana wa mu Egupto ukufika na ku mumana ukalamba Yufurate," 
Genesis15:19 icalo ca bena Keni, ica bena Kenasi, ica bena Kadimo," 
Genesis15:20 ica bena Hiti, ica bena Perisi, ica bena Refaimu," 
Genesis15:21 ica bena Amoli, ica bena Kenani ica bena Girigashi ne ca bena Yebusi.”" 
Genesis16:1 Nomba Abramu takweteko mwana ku mukashi wakwe Sarai. Lelo Sarai alikwete umukashana umusha ishina lyakwe ni Haga umwina Egupto. 
Genesis16:2 Kanshi Sarai aebele Abramu ati, “Mona, Yawe alintana ubufyashi, kanshi kabiye usendame no musha wandi umukashana, nalimo kuti amfyalilako abana.” Abramu nao asuminisha ifyalandile Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Panuma Abramu aikala imyaka ikumi limo (10) mu Kenani, elyo Sarai abuulile umusha wakwe umukashana Haga umwina Egupto, amupeela na kuli wiba Abramu pakuti abe umukashi wakwe." 
Genesis16:4 Abramu epakusendama na Haga nao aba na pabukulu. Ilyo Haga amwene ukuti ali pabukulu, ayamba ukusuula nakulu." 
Genesis16:5 Elyo Sarai aebele Abramu ati, “Iyi misuula Haga ankwatile ibe pali iwe. Nine nakupeele uyu musha wandi umukashana, lelo apo amwene ukuti ali pabukulu nansuula. Yawe engapingula pakati ka iwe na ine.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abramu epakweba Sarai ati, “Umusha obe ali mu minwe yobe, umucitile conse ico ulemona ukuti nacilungama.” Kanshi Sarai epakulacusha Haga, elyo Haga nao amufulumuka." 
Genesis16:7 Malaika wakwa Yawe asangile Haga mu matololo mupepi na kamfukumfuku akabelele mu mbali ya musebo walolele ku Shuri. 
Genesis16:8 Malaika epakusosa ati, “Haga we musha wakwa Sarai, ni kwi wafuma kabili uleya kwi?” Haga amwasuka ati, “Ndefulumuka kuli mama Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Elyo Malaika wakwa Yawe amweba ati, “Bwelelamo kuli nokokulu, ulemupetamina.”" 
Genesis16:10 Malaika alundapo ukumweba ati, “Nkasandulula nganshi aba mu lupwa lobe, takwakabe wakubapenda ku bwingi.”" 
Genesis16:11 Kabili malaika wakwa Yawe amweba nokuti, “Nomba uli pabukulu, ukapaapa umwana umwaume. Elyo ukamwinike ne shina lya Ishimaeli, pantu Yawe naumfwa ukulilishika kobe." 
Genesis16:12 Umwana obe akaba nga punda wa mpanga. Ukuboko kwakwe kukalwisha umuntu onse, nao ukuboko kwa muntu onse kukamulwisha. Akekala umulwani kuli bamunyina bonse.”" 
Genesis16:13 Elyo Haga ainika Yawe uwalandile nankwe ishina ati, “Niwe Lesa uumona ine,” pantu atile, “Nimona Lesa uumona.”" 
Genesis16:14 Kanshi eico bainikila icishima icabela pakati ka Kadeshi na Beredi abati Bere Lai Roi, emukutila “Icishima ca Wabumi uumona ine.”" 
Genesis16:15 Kanshi Haga asukile afyalila Abramu umwana umwaume, nao Abramu ainika umwana Haga afyele ishina lya Ishimaeli." 
Genesis16:16 Abramu ali ne myaka amakumi cine konse konse na mutanda (86) ilyo Haga amufyalile Ishimaeli. 
Genesis17:1 Ilyo Abramu afikile pa myaka amakumi pabula na pabula (99), Yawe alimumonekele, amweba ati, “Nine Lesa Umwine wa maka yonse. Uleenda pa cinso candi nokuba uwabula icilubo." 
Genesis17:2 Nkafikilisha icipangano candi pakati ka iwe na ine, kabili nkafusha ubufyashi bobe nganshi.”" 
Genesis17:3 Abramu awa ubukupeme, elyo Lesa asosa ati," 
Genesis17:4 “Kanshi ici e cipangano candi na iwe, icakuti ukaba icikolwe ca mishobo iyingi." 
Genesis17:5 Nomba tawakulaitwa Abramu, ishina lyobe nomba niwe Abrahamu pantu ninkucita icikolwe ca mishobo iyingi." 
Genesis17:6 Nkakupeelesha ubufyashi. Kuli iwe kukafuma imishobo iyingi, kabili kuli iwe kukafuma na bashamfumu.”" 
Genesis17:7 “Icipangano nkapangana nobe na ba mu lupwa lobe abakakonkapo umukonkanina inkulo, cikaba cakubelelela. Nkaba Lesa obe kabili nkalaba Lesa wa ba mu lupwa lobe abakakonkapo pali iwe." 
Genesis17:8 Icalo conse ica Kenani umo ucili umweni, nkacipeela kuli iwe na ku ba mu lupwa lobe abali nokukukonkapo, cikabe cenu pe. Elyo na ine nkaba Lesa wabo.”" 
Genesis17:9 Kabili Lesa aebele Abrahamu ati, “Elyo na imwe, mufwile ukusunga icipangano candi, iwe na ba mu lupwa lobe abakakonkapo umukonkanina inkulo." 
Genesis17:10 Ici e cipangano candi na iwe na ba mu lupwa lobe abakakonkapo. Icipangano mwakulasunga nici, umwaume onse uo muleikala nankwe ali nokusembululwa." 
Genesis17:11 Mukalesembulula inkanda ya ku mpela ya bwaume, ici cikaba e cishibilo ca cipangano pakati ka ine na imwe." 
Genesis17:12 Kanshi umukakonkanina inkulo shenu, umwaume onse uwikala pakati kenu, nga aba ne inshiku cine konse konse (8) apo afyalilwa, ali nokusembululwa. Cibe umwana obe umwaume nangu umubomfi onse umwaume uwafyalilwa mu ŋanda yobe nangu uwakuti wamushitafye ku benafyalo, te wa mu lupwa lobe, bonse bali nokusembululwa." 
Genesis17:13 Umubomfi umwaume uwafyalwa mu ŋanda yobe nangu wakushitafye ne ndalama shobe, bonse bafwile ukusembululwa. Icipangano candi ku mibili yenu cili nokuba icipangano ca pe." 
Genesis17:14 Umwaume onse uushasembululwa, uo bashasembulula inkanda ya ku mpela ya bwaume, wakutamfyafye afume ku bantu bandi. Pantu naonaula icipangano candi.”" 
Genesis17:15 Kabili Lesa aebele Abrahamu ati, “Palwakwa Sarai umukashi obe, nomba tawakulamwita Sarai, ishina lyakwe lili nokuba ni Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ine nkapaala Sara, kabili nkalenga Sara akakufyalile umwana umwaume. Ine nkamupaala pakuti akabe nyina wa mishobo. Bashamfumu ba bantu bakafuma muli ena.”" 
Genesis17:17 Abrahamu awa ubukupeme, alaseka, ayipusha ati, “Bushe umuntu kuti afyala umwana ilyo ali ne myaka umwanda umo (100)? Bushe Sara akafyala umwana ilyo ali ne myaka amakumi pabula (90)?”" 
Genesis17:18 Kanshi Abrahamu epakweba Lesa ati, “Shi mwingalekafye Ishimaeli aleba uwapaalwa pa cinso cenu!”" 
Genesis17:19 Lelo Lesa amweba ati, “Awe iyoo, umukashi obe Sara akakufyalila umwana umwaume na iwe ukamwinika ishina lya Isaki. Kabili nkapangana nankwe icipangano icakubelelela na ba mu lupwa lwakwe abakamukonkapo." 
Genesis17:20 Niŋumfwa nefyo walanda pali Ishimaeli. Cine cine nkamupaala. Kabili nkamupeelesha ubufyashi, na ba mu lupwa lwakwe bakafula nganshi. Akaba wishi wa bakateeka ikumi limo na babili (12). Nkalenga no lupwa lwakwe ukuba umushobo uukalamba." 
Genesis17:21 Lelo nkapangana icipangano candi na Isaki uo Sara akakufyalila uyu mwaka uleisa pa nshita ino ine.” 
Genesis17:22 Ilyo Lesa apwa ukulanda na Abrahamu, afumapo." 
Genesis17:23 Pali bulya bwine bushiku, Abrahamu abuulile umwana wakwe Ishimaeli, umwaume onse uwa mu ŋanda yakwe, abasha bafyalilwe mumwakwe nangu abo ashitile ne ndalama, abasembulula inkanda ya ku mpela ya bwaume, ngefyo Lesa amwebele." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahamu asembulwilwe ilyo ali ne myaka amakumi pabula na pabula (99). 
Genesis17:25 Elyo mwane Ishimaeli ena asembulwilwe ilyo ali ne myaka ikumi limo na itatu (13). 
Genesis17:26 Abrahamu no mwana wakwe Ishimaeli bonse babili basembulwilwefye ubushiku bumo bwine. 
Genesis17:27 Abaume bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa Abrahamu, abasha abafyalilwe mumwakwe nabo bonse abo ashitile ku beni, basembulwilwe ubushiku bumo pamo na Abrahamu." 
Genesis18:1 Yawe amonekele kuli Abrahamu mupepi ne miti ikulu iya oki iyakwa Mamure ilyo aikele pa mwinshi we tenti lyakwe ninshi akasuba nakabalikisha nganshi. 
Genesis18:2 Cilya ainuna amenso, amona abaume batatu beminine mupepi napo ali. Ilyo abamona afuma ulubilo pa mwinshi we tenti lyakwe aya kukubakumanya, elyo akontamina panshi," 
Genesis18:3 asosa ati, “We mfumu napapata, nga cingamusekesha, wipitafye pa mubomfi obe." 
Genesis18:4 Lekeni balete utumenshi utwakusamba ku makasa yenu, elyo mutuusheko mwisamba lya muti." 
Genesis18:5 Lekeni muleteleko utwakulya, pakuti mubweshe amaka, lyena elyo mukonkanyepo ubulendo bwenu, pantu mwaisa pita pa mubomfi wenu.” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Cisuma, cita ifyo fine walanda.”" 
Genesis18:6 Kanshi Abrahamu aile bwangu bwangu mwitenti kuli Sara, amweba ati, “Endesha, buula ifikopo fitatu ifya bunga ubwapeleka bwino, ukasawile elyo upangeko imikate.”" 
Genesis18:7 Elyo abutukila ukwali iŋombe, asalapo iciponti icisuma kabili icanakilila, acipeela na ku mubomfi. Umubomfi nao bwangu bwangu acipekanya." 
Genesis18:8 Elyo Abrahamu abuula umukaka uwatimba no wasongoloka ne nama apekenye, afiteka napo bali. Ilyo balelya Abrahamu aiminine mupepi nabo mwisamba lya muti." 
Genesis18:9 Abo bantu bamwipushe abati, “Bushe Sara umukashi obe ali kwi?” Abrahamu abasuka ati, “Ali mwitenti.”" 
Genesis18:10 Elyo umo pa beni bakwe asosa ati, “Icine cine uyu mwaka uleisa nga pa nshita ino ine nkesa kupempula, kabili umukashi obe Sara akaba no mwana umwaume.” Kanshi Sara ali pa mwinshi we tenti ilyali kunuma yakwa Abrahamu alekutika." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahamu na Sara bali abakote ne myaka iyingi nganshi. Sara nao inshita yakufyala ninshi yalipita. 
Genesis18:12 Kanshi Sara epakuseka uko ali eka, pantu aletontonkanya ati, “Ilyo ninakuka na shikulu nao mukote, bushe nine ningaibika nakabili mu fyakuisansamusha!”" 
Genesis18:13 Elyo Yawe aebele Abrahamu ati, “Cinshi ico Sara asekela no kusosa ukuti, ‘Bushe cine cine nine ningakwata umwana nomba ilyo ndi umukote?’" 
Genesis18:14 Bushe kwaliba icintu ico Yawe engafilwa? Uyu mwaka uleisa pa nshita ilya nandilepo nkabwela nakabili, elyo Sara akaba no mwana umwaume.”" 
Genesis18:15 Sara ico aumfwa umwenso, abepa ati “Awe ine nshaciseka.” Lelo Yawe amweba ati, “Ee waciba nuseka.”" 
Genesis18:16 Ilyo balya bantu baimine ukuti baleya, ico bali apasansama, baloleshe lwa panshi ku Sodoma. Abrahamu nao aya alebashindika." 
Genesis18:17 Elyo Yawe asosa ati, “Bushe mfise kuli Abrahamu ifyo nalacita?" 
Genesis18:18 Pantu Abrahamu akaba umushobo ukalamba kabili uwamaka. Kabili imishobo yonse iya pano isonde ikapaalilwa muli ena. 
Genesis18:19 Pantu nalimusala pakuti akalange abana bakwe na ba mu ŋanda yakwe abakamukonkapo ukulakonka inshila yakwa Yawe, mukucita ifyalungama no kuba no mulinganya, pakuti Yawe akacitile Abrahamu ifyo amulaya.”" 
Genesis18:20 Elyo Yawe atila, “Ukuilishanya kwa pali Sodoma na Gomora nakukulisha nganshi, no bubifi bulimo nabubipisha nganshi," 
Genesis18:21 eco nalailako kukumona ifyo bacita nga nafibipa ukulingana no kuilishanya kwafika kuli ine. Elyo nga teifyo, ndeya ishiba.”" 
Genesis18:22 Elyo balya bantu bapilibuka, balaya lwa ku Sodoma, lelo Abrahamu ena ashala naiminina pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Genesis18:23 Elyo Abrahamu apalama, aipusha Yawe ati, “Bushe cine cine walaonaula abalungami pamo na babifi?" 
Genesis18:24 Bushe nga cakuti mu musumba mulimo abantu abalungami amakumi yasano (50), bushe uleonaula umusumba? Bushe tekuti uleke ube pa mulandu wa aba bantu abalungami abalimo amakumi yasano (50)?" 
Genesis18:25 Nacitaluke kuli iwe ukucita ica musango uyu, ukwipaya abalungami pamo na babi, teti ucitile abalungami cimo cine na babi. Nacitaluke kuli iwe! Bushe kapingula we sonde lyonse tali nakucita mulinganya?”" 
Genesis18:26 Yawe amwasuka ati, “Nga nasanga mu musumba wa Sodoma muli abantu abalungami amakumi yasano (50), nshaye onaula musumba pa mulandu wabo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Abrahamu asosele nakabili ati, “Ine ne ulifye ulukungu, kabili imito, nine napama ukulanda ku Mfumu," 
Genesis18:28 bushe nga cakuti pa balungami amakumi yasano (50) pabulilafye basano, bushe kuti waonaula umusumba pa mulandu wakuti pabulila abantu abalungami basano?” Yawe ayasuka ati, “Iyoo tekuti ngonaule musumba nga nasangamo abantu abalungami amakumi yane na basano (45).”" 
Genesis18:29 Abrahamu asosa nakabili ati, “Nga cakuti mwasangamofye amakumi yane (40)?” Yawe ayasuka ati, “Tekuti ngonaule musumba pa mulandu wa makumi yane (40).”" 
Genesis18:30 Kabili Abrahamu ati, “We Mfumu wifulwa, nalalanda nakabili. Nga cakuti mwasangwafye amakumi yatatu (30)?” Yawe amwasuka ati, “Tekuti ngonaule musumba nga cakuti nasangamo amakumi yatatu (30).”" 
Genesis18:31 Abrahamu asosa ati, “Apo nomba nimpama ukulanda ku Mfumu, nga cakuti mwasangwafye amakumi yabili (20)?” Yawe amwasuka ati, “Pa mulandu wa abo amakumi yabili (20) tekuti ngonaule musumba.”" 
Genesis18:32 Kabili Abrahamu asosa ati, “Nga cakuti Imfumu tayafulwe, kanjipushekofye umuku umo uwakulekelesha, nga cakuti mwasangwafye ikumi limo epela?” Yawe amwasuka ati, “Pa mulandu wa abo ikumi limo tekuti ngonaule musumba.”" 
Genesis18:33 Cilya Yawe apwa ukulanda na Abrahamu, aya no kuya, Abrahamu nao abwelamo kumwakwe." 
Genesis19:1 Bamalaika balya babili bafikile icungulo mu Sodoma, Loti aikele pa mpongolo ya musumba. Cilya abamona, Loti aima, aya na kukubakumanya, abafukamina, akontamina panshi." 
Genesis19:2 Loti abeba ati, “Mwe mfumu shandi, shimwingesa ku ŋanda ya mubomfi wenu, eko musendame, musambe na ku makasa. Elyo mailo lucelocelo kuti mwatola ubulendo bwenu mwalaya.” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Awe, ifwe tulesendamafye panse.”" 
Genesis19:3 Lelo Loti apamfya nganshi icakuti basuka baya nankwe kabili baingila na mu ŋanda yakwe. Elyo abapekanishisha icakulya, abapangila imikate iyabulamo intutumushi, nabo balya." 
Genesis19:4 Ilyo abeni tabalati baye na kukusendama, abaume bonse ukufuma mu fitungu fyonse ifya musumba wa Sodoma, abaice na bakalamba, baisa shinguluka iŋanda." 
Genesis19:5 Elyo balabilikisha kuli Loti abati, “Bushe abantu beshile kumobe muno bushiku bali kwi? Balete pano panse uleke tubembuke nabo.”" 
Genesis19:6 Loti epakufumina panse kukubakumanya, asha aisalako ne ciibi." 
Genesis19:7 Abeba ati, “Iyoo bane, mwicita icabipa ifyo." 
Genesis19:8 Moneni ninkwata abana bandi babili abakashana abashatala abakuma ku mwaume. Kanshi lekeni ebo muletele, elyo mwe bene mubacite ico mulefwaya. Lelo mwicita nelyo cimo kuli aba baume, pantu beni bandi na ine ndi nokubasunga bwino.”" 
Genesis19:9 Nabo bayasuka abati, “Fumako!” Kabili batile, “Uyu muntu aisafye kuno ngo mweni, elyo nomba alefwaya no kulatupingula! Tulekucita icabipisha ukucila na pa beni bobe.” Elyo balasunkila Loti kunuma, basuka baba mupepi nokuti bapankule iciibi." 
Genesis19:10 Lelo balya bantu babili abali mukati, bafumya amaboko batintila Loti mu ŋanda, baisalako ne ciibi." 
Genesis19:11 Kabili baleta akafifi pa menso ya bantu abali pa mwinshi wa ŋanda, abaice na bakalamba, icakuti bafilwa no kusanga apali iciibi." 
Genesis19:12 Balya bantu babili baebele Loti abati, “Bushe nukwatamo abantu bobe bambi muli uno musumba, basofyala, nangu abana bobe abaume na banakashi, nangu aba mu lupwa lobe bambi? Bafumyemo muli uno musumba" 
Genesis19:13 pantu twalaonaula ino ncende. Ukuilishanya pa bantu ba mu musumba uyu kuli Yawe nakukula, eico Yawe atutumine kukonaula umusumba.”" 
Genesis19:14 Kanshi Loti epakufuma, ayalanda na bashifyala abakobekele bamwane, abeba ati, “Endesheni, fumeni muno musumba, pantu Yawe alaonaula uno musumba.” Lelo bashifyala bena balatontonkanya ukuti alesekafye." 
Genesis19:15 Ilyo cafikile ku macaca, bamalaika balacincisha Loti abati, “Ala endesha! Senda umukashi obe na bamwano babili abakashana abali pano, epali na imwe mwalobela kumo ilyo umusumba walakandwa.”" 
Genesis19:16 Ilyo alashingashinga, balya bantu babili epakwikata Loti no mukashi wakwe na bamwane babili abakashana pa maboko babafumisha na kunse ya musumba, pantu Yawe alibomfwilile uluse." 
Genesis19:17 Ilyo babafumisha kunse ya musumba, umo pali balya abeba ati, “Butukeni mwalafwa! Tecakwesha ukucebukila kunuma, nangu ukwiminina pa ncende imo mwiwanga! Butukilenifye ku mpili, epali na imwe mwalobelamo.”" 
Genesis19:18 Loti wena abasuka ati, “Iyoo, mwe mfumu shandi napapata!" 
Genesis19:19 Umubomfi wenu nasanga uluse pa cinso cenu kabili namunanga icikuku icikalamba pakupususha ubumi bwandi. Lelo ku mpili kwena teti mbutukileko, pantu ndefwa nshilafikako nge cinkunka ici cafika." 
Genesis19:20 Moneni umusumba uyu mupepi, eko mbutukile, kabili musumba uunono. Lekeni eko mbutukile, kamusumbafye akanono, teifyo fine? E mulandu betila aka kamusumba Sowa. Lyena ninshi ndepusuka.”" 
Genesis19:21 Umo pali balya amwasuka ati, “Cisuma kanshi, neci cine walomba nakusuminisha. Akamusumba walandapo kena nshakonaule iyoo." 
Genesis19:22 Kanshi endesha eko ubutukile. Pantu ine nshacite nelyo cimo kanofye ilyo wafikako.” 
Genesis19:23 Loti afikile mu Sowa ninshi akasuba nakatula," 
Genesis19:24 Elyo Yawe alokesha pali Sodoma na Gomora umulilo wa fyanunka nga maluti. Fyafumine kuli Yawe ku mulu. 
Genesis19:25 Efyo Yawe aonawile iyi misumba, iwanga lyonse, abantu bonse abaleikala muli iyi misumba, elyo na fyonse ifyamenene mu mushili." 
Genesis19:26 Lelo muka Loti acebukila kunuma, kabili asanguka impinda ya mucele." 
Genesis19:27 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, lucelocelofye, Abrahamu aima aya ku ncende iyo aimininepo pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Genesis19:28 Alolesha mwisamba lwa ku Sodoma na ku Gomora ne calo conse ice wanga, amona uko icushi cilefutumuka kwati cushi cilefuma mwilungu lya mulilo." 
Genesis19:29 Kanshi ilyo Lesa aonawile imisumba ya mwiwanga, aibukishe Abrahamu, afumya na Loti mu busanso ubwaonawile imisumba Loti aleikalamo." 
Genesis19:30 Loti ali no mwenso wakwikala mu Sowa. Kanshi epakufuma mu Sowa, aya ikala ku mpili mu lucengo pamo na bamwane babili abanakashi." 
Genesis19:31 Ubushiku bumo uwamukalamba aebele uwamwaice ati, “Batata nabakota, elyo mu calo conse tamuli umwaume nangu umo uwakutuupa ngefyo caba mu fyalo fyonse." 
Genesis19:32 Kanshi leka tunwenshe batata umwangashi, elyo tulale nabo pakuti ulupwa lwesu lukatwalilile ukupitila muli batata.”" 
Genesis19:33 Kanshi cilya bwaila balenga shibo ukukolwa umwangashi. Elyo uwamukalamba epakuya lala na wishi. Lelo wishi taishibe ilyo aishile lala nangu ilyo afuminepo. 
Genesis19:34 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, uwamukalamba aebele uwamwaice ati, “Mailo ubushiku nalilala na batata. Kanshi na lelo ubushiku tubanwenshe umwangashi bakolwe, elyo na iwe uleya lala nabo pakuti ulupwa lwesu lukatwalilile ukupitila muli batata.”" 
Genesis19:35 Kanshi ilyo caba ubushiku, balenga wishi ukukolwa umwangashi. Elyo uwamwaice nao aya lala na wishi. Lelo wishi taishibe ilyo aishile kukulala nangu ilyo afuminepo." 
Genesis19:36 Kanshi bamwana Loti bonse babili epakwimita kuli shibo. 
Genesis19:37 Uwamukalamba asuka apaapa umwana umwaume, amwinika ne shina lya Moabu. Moabu e cikolwe ca bantu abo na lelo beta abena Moabu." 
Genesis19:38 Uwamwaice nao asuka apaapa umwana umwaume, amwinika ne shina lya Ben Ami, nao e cikolwe ca bantu abo na lelo beta abena Amoni." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahamu afumine kulya ku Mamure aya ku citungu ca matololo ya Negebu. Aile ikala pakati ka Kadeshi na Shuri. Aikele mu Gerari ngo mweni. 
Genesis20:2 Ilyo Abrahamu ali mu Gerari, pali Sara umukashi wakwe atile, “Ni nkashi yandi.” Kanshi Abimeleki imfumu ya mu Gerari epakutuma abakuya buula Sara no kumuleta kumwakwe." 
Genesis20:3 Lelo ubushiku bumo Lesa amonekele Abimeleki mu ciloto, amweba ati, “Iwe walafwa pa mulandu wa uyu mwanakashi ubuulile, pantu alyupwa.”" 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleki kwena ali talati akumane na Sara. Kanshi Abimeleki epakusosa ati, “Bushe we Mfumu kuti walofya abantu ababula umulandu?" 
Genesis20:5 Bushe Abrahamu umwine tewanjeba ati, ‘Sara ni nkashi yandi?’ Bushe Sara umwine tewanjeba ati, ‘Abrahamu ni ndume yandi?’ Ine ncitile ici no mutima usuma, kabili ukwabula icilubo.”" 
Genesis20:6 Elyo Lesa amwasuka mu ciloto ati, “Ninjishiba ukuti ucitile ici no mutima usuma. E mulandu wine na ine nengele ukuti wikumana na Sara, pantu nga naubifya kuli ine" 
Genesis20:7 Kanshi bwesesha Sara ku mulume wakwe pantu ni kasesema, nao alekupepelako kabili uleba umumi. Lelo nga taumubweseshemo, wishibe ukuti iwe na bantu bobe bonse cine cinefye mukafwa.”" 
Genesis20:8 Kanshi lucelocelo ubushiku bwakonkelepo Abimeleki alongenye ababomfi bakwe. Elyo abashimikilako no mulandu onse nabo baikatwa no mwenso nganshi. 
Genesis20:9 Abimeleki epakwita Abrahamu, amweba ati, “Cinshi watucitila ifi? Cinshi nabifya kuli iwe pakuti ulete ishamo lyakula ifi pali ine ne calo candi? Ifintu wancita tafifwile ukucitika.”" 
Genesis20:10 Kabili Abimeleki aipusha Abrahamu ati, “Mulandu nshi wacitila ifi?”" 
Genesis20:11 Abrahamu ayasuka ati, “Ine naletontonkanya ukuti, kuno abantu tekuti bakwate akatiina kuli Lesa, kabili kuti banjipaila pa mukashi wandi." 
Genesis20:12 Kwena cacine ni nkashi yandi, batata ebamufyele lelo bamayo tebamufyala. Kanshi ine nalimuupa, mukashi wandi." 
Genesis20:13 Kanshi ilyo Lesa amfumishe kumwesu no kunenga ukuti ndelulumba mu fyalo, naebele Sara ukuti, ‘Ifi efyo wingalanga ukuntemwa, konse uko twakulaya, uleeba abantu auti, ine ndi ndume yobe.’”" 
Genesis20:14 Kanshi Abimeleki epakubuula impaanga ne ŋombe, abasha abaume na banakashi, apeela Abrahamu elyo amubwesesha na Sara umukashi wakwe." 
Genesis20:15 Kabili Abimeleki aebele Abrahamu ati, “Mona conse ici calo candi, kuti waikala konse uko ulefwaya.”" 
Genesis20:16 Kuli Sara, Abimeleki atile, “Mona napeela ndume yobe indalama sha mashekeli ya silifa ikana limo (1,000). Ubu bupe bwakulanga abantu bonse abo muli nabo ukuti tapali nelyo cimo ico walufyanya. Kanshi nomba bonse baishiba ukuti uli wakaele.”" 
Genesis20:17 Elyo Abrahamu apepa kuli Lesa nao aposha Abimeleki no mwina mwakwe na basha bakwe abanakashi pakuti balekwata abana nakabili," 
Genesis20:18 pantu Yawe alisele ubufyashi ku banakashi bonse abali mu ŋanda yakwa Abimeleki, pali ico Abimeleki abuulile Sara, muka Abrahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Kanshi Yawe alangulukile Sara pamo ngefyo asosele. Kabili Yawe epakucitila Sara ico amulaile. 
Genesis21:2 Sara epakuba pabukulu, pa nshita ine ilya Lesa alaile epo Sara afyalile Abrahamu umwana umwaume ninshi Abrahamu mukote." 
Genesis21:3 Abrahamu nao epakwinika umwana umwaume uo Sara amufyalile ishina lya Isaki. 
Genesis21:4 Ilyo ubushiku bwalenga cine konse konse apo Isaki afyalilwe bwafikile, Abrahamu amusembulula ukukonka nefyo Lesa amukonkomeshe." 
Genesis21:5 Abrahamu ali ne myaka yakufyalwa umwanda umo (100) ilyo mwane Isaki afyelwe. 
Genesis21:6 Sara epakusosa ati, “Lesa nandetela inseko, elyo na onse uukomfwako akaseka pamo na ine.”" 
Genesis21:7 Kabili alundapo nokuti, “Nga nani ali nokweba Abrahamu ukuti Sara akonshapo abana? Lelo mu bukote bwakwe nimufyalila umwana.”" 
Genesis21:8 Umwana asuka akula, asumuka. Ubushiku Isaki asumwike, Abrahamu acitile imitebeto iyikalamba." 
Genesis21:9 Lelo Sara amwene ukuti umwana wakwa Haga umwina Egupto uo afyele kuli Abrahamu, alayangala pamo na Isaki," 
Genesis21:10 elyo Sara aeba Abrahamu ati, “Tamfya uyu mwanakashi umusha pamo no mwana wakwe, pantu uyu mwana wa musha tekuti akapokeko ifyuma ukasha pamo no mwana wandi Isaki.”" 
Genesis21:11 Ifi fyasosele Sara fyacushishe Abrahamu, pantu mwana Haga nao wine ali mwana wakwe." 
Genesis21:12 Lelo Lesa aebele Abrahamu ati, “Wileka aya mashiwi pa mwaice no musha obe Haga yakucushe. Umfwa fyonse ifyo Sara akwebele pantu ni kuli Isaki eko ukakwatila abantu ba mu lupwa lobe." 
Genesis21:13 Umwana wa musha nao nkalenga ukuti akabe umushobo uukalamba, pantu nao wine mwana obe.”" 
Genesis21:14 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, lucelocelofye Abrahamu abuula icakulya ne nyambi umwali amenshi apeela Haga. Afibika pa kubeya kwakwa Haga, amweba no kuya pamo no mwana. Elyo Haga afumapo, aya alelulumba mu matololo ya Beresheba." 
Genesis21:15 Ilyo amenshi yapwa mu nyambi, Haga asha alalika umwaice mu cimpusa." 
Genesis21:16 Elyo afumapo aya ikala apataliko, pantu mu mutima wakwe aleti, “Nshilefwaya kumonako uko umwaice alefwa.” Elyo ati ekale nga filya, atampa ukulalila." 
Genesis21:17 Lesa alyumfwile uko umwaice alelila. Elyo malaika wakwa Lesa abilikisha Haga ukufuma ku mulu amweba ati, “Haga cinshi cilekucusha? Witiina nelyo cimo. Lesa naumfwa ukulila kwa mwaice palya alele." 
Genesis21:18 Ima, buula umwaice umutalalike, pantu nkalenga ukuti akabe umushobo ukalamba.”" 
Genesis21:19 Elyo Lesa aisula amenso yakwa Haga nao amona icishima ca menshi. Kanshi elyo ayako, aisusha amenshi mu nyambi, apeela no mwaice anwa." 
Genesis21:20 Lesa alesunga umwaice ilyo alekula. Aleikala mu matololo, kabili ali fundi uwacenjela ukwipaya inama mukubomfya ubuta ne mifwi." 
Genesis21:21 Ilyo aleikala mu matololo ya Parani, nyina amufwaila umwanakashi umwina Egupto, eo aupa." 
Genesis21:22 Pa nshita ilya Abimeleki no mukalamba wa fita fyakwe Fikoli baishile kuli Abrahamu, bamweba abati, “Iwe Lesa aba nobe muli fyonse ifyo ucita." 
Genesis21:23 Kanshi nomba lapa pa cinso cakwa Lesa ukuti, iwe tawakancenjeshe ine nelyo abana bandi nangu aba mu lupwa lwandi. Ulange uluse kuli ine na ku calo cino uleikalamo ngo mweni ngefyo ine nakulanga.”" 
Genesis21:24 Abrahamu epakusosa ati, “Ee, nalapa.”" 
Genesis21:25 Elyo Abrahamu ailishenye kuli Abimeleki pa mulandu wa cishima ca menshi ico ababomfi bakwa Abimeleki bamupokele ku maka. 
Genesis21:26 Lelo Abimeleki asosa ati, “Ine nshishibe abantu abacita ifyo. Iwe tawanjebako ici cintu. Ni lelofye naumfwa pali ici cintu.”" 
Genesis21:27 Elyo Abrahamu abuula impaanga ne ŋombe apeela Abimeleki. Aba bantu babili epakupangana icipangano. 
Genesis21:28 Elyo Abrahamu apatula pa mukuni wa fitekwa utwana twa mpaanga utukota cine lubali. 
Genesis21:29 Elyo Abimeleki aipusha Abrahamu ati, “Bushe walosha mwi pakupatula utwana twa mpaanga utukota cine lubali no kutubika tweka?”" 
Genesis21:30 Abrahamu amwasuka ati, “Iwe buula utu twana twa mpaanga twandi utukota cine lubali, etwakwiminina bukambone ukuti nine naimba ici cishima.”" 
Genesis21:31 Kanshi eico iyi ncende baita Beresheba, pantu eko aba bantu babili balapile umulapo." 
Genesis21:32 Ilyo bapwile ukupangana icipangano ku Beresheba, Abimeleki no mukalamba wa fita fyakwe Fikoli babwelelemo ku calo ca Bafilisiti," 
Genesis21:33 Abrahamu ena alimbile umuti wa tamarisiki mu Beresheba, epo alapepela Yawe, Lesa wa pe na pe." 
Genesis21:34 Kabili Abrahamu aikele ngo mweni inshita iikalamba mu calo ca Bafilisiti. 
Genesis22:1 Nomba panuma ya ifi fintu, Lesa aeseshe Abrahamu. Lesa amwitile ati, “Abrahamu!” Abrahamu nao ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi!”" 
Genesis22:2 Elyo Lesa amweba ati, “Buula mwano, umwana obe umo mpo, Isaki, uo watemwa, uye ku citungu ca Moriya. Uli nokuya muleka nge lambo lyakoca kulya kwine pa lupili lumo ulo nkakulanga.”" 
Genesis22:3 Ilyo bwaishileca, lucelocelofye, Abrahamu ateyenye punda wakwe. Elyo abuula ababomfi bakwe babili na mwane Isaki. Ilyo aputaula inkuni ishingalinga ukocela ilambo, elyo aima alaya na ku ncende Lesa amulangilile." 
Genesis22:4 Pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu, Abrahamu alinwine amenso amona ilya ncende bamulangilile apatali." 
Genesis22:5 Elyo Abrahamu aebele ababomfi bakwe ati, “Imwe shaleni pano na punda. Ine no mwaice twaya kulya, tuye pepa elyo tulebwelela kuno kwine.”" 
Genesis22:6 Abrahamu abuula inkuni shakocela ilambo, atwika na mwane Isaki. Umwine ena asenda umulilo no mwele. Kabili bonse babili baima balaya." 
Genesis22:7 Isaki elyo aipusha wishi Abrahamu ati, “Tata!” Abrahamu ayasuka ati, “Ni shani mwana wandi?” Isaki amweba ati, “Umulilo ne nkuni fyena epo fili, nga nomba umwana wa mpaanga uwakuleka ilambo lyakoca ali kwi?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahamu amwasuka ati, “Mwana wandi, Lesa umwine aletupeela umwana wa mpaanga uwakuleka ilambo lyakoca.” Bonse babili bakonkanyapo ukulaya." 
Genesis22:9 Cilya bafika ku ncende Lesa amulangilile, Abrahamu akuulapo ubulambo, abikapo ne nkuni bwino bwino. Elyo akaka mwane Isaki, amulalika na pa mulu wa nkuni pa bulambo." 
Genesis22:10 Elyo afungulula ukuboko, abuula umwele pakuti epaye mwane." 
Genesis22:11 Lelo malaika wakwa Yawe amwita ukufuma ku mulu ati, “Abrahamu, Abrahamu!” Abrahamu ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi!”" 
Genesis22:12 Malaika amweba ati, “Wiyipaya mwaice, wimucita nelyo cimo. Nomba naishiba ukuti walikwatila Lesa akatiina, pantu taukene ukundekela mwano, nao uwabafye umo mpo.”" 
Genesis22:13 Abrahamu ati acebukile kunuma, amona sukusuku naikatwa ku nsengo mwiteshi, eko alungama aya mubuula, eo alekela Lesa ilambo lyakoca pa malo yakwa mwane." 
Genesis22:14 Kanshi Abrahamu epakwinika ilya ncende ishina ilyakuti, “Yawe alapeela.” Eico ukufika na lelo bapetila abati, “Pa lupili lwakwa Yawe alapeela.”" 
Genesis22:15 Kabili malaika wakwa Yawe aita Abrahamu ukufuma ku mulu umuku wabubili," 
Genesis22:16 amweba ati, “Yawe asosa ati, nalapa napo ndi, apo wacita ici cintu, taukene kundekela mwano, uwabafye umo mpo," 
Genesis22:17 cine cinefye nkakupaala. Nkasandulula aba mu lupwa lobe, bakafula kwati ni ntanda sha mu mulu, kabili kwati musensenga wa pa lulamba lwa bemba. Aba mu lupwa lobe bakacimfya no kupoka imisumba ya balwani babo." 
Genesis22:18 Pantu iwe naubeela amashiwi yandi, imishobo yonse pano calo ikapaalilwa mu bufyashi bobe.”" 
Genesis22:19 Elyo Abrahamu abwelela ku babomfi bakwe, bonse pamo babwelelamo ku Beresheba no kwikala eko aisa ikala." 
Genesis22:20 Panuma ya ifi fintu, Abrahamu aumfwile amashiwi yakuti, “Milika alikwata abana abaume kuli munonko Naho." 
Genesis22:21 Usi e beli, uwakonkapo ni Busi, elyo ni Kemueli wishi wakwa Aramu," 
Genesis22:22 elyo ni Kesedi, Haso, Pilidashi, Yidilafu na Betueli.”" 
Genesis22:23 Uyu Betueli e wishi wakwa Rebeka. Aba bana abaume cine konse konse, e bana Milika afyele kuli Naho munyina kwa Abrahamu." 
Genesis22:24 Elyo muli Reuma umukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga, Naho afyelemo abana abaume, Teba, Gahamu, Tahashi na Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Sara aikele pano calo imyaka umwanda umo na makumi yabili na cine lubali (127). 
Genesis23:2 Afwilile ku Kiriati Aba, emukutila ku Hebuloni mu calo ca Kenani. Elyo Abrahamu aingile mukuloosha Sara, alalila umukashi wakwe." 
Genesis23:3 Elyo Abrahamu aimine, asha icitumbi ca mukashi wakwe, aya kukulanda na bena Hiti."
