Genesis23:4 Abeba ati, “Ine kuno ndi mweni naisakofye. Kanshi nshitisheniko impanga kuno iyakuti ibe inshinshi umwakuti nje shiika umukashi wandi.”" 
Genesis23:5 Abena Hiti bayasuka Abrahamu abati," 
Genesis23:6 “Shikulu! Umfwa kuli ifwe. Iwe uli kanabesa wamaka pakati kesu. Kanshi salapofye inindi iyiwamishe emo ushiike umuntu obe uyo afwile. Pali ifwe tapali nelyo umo uulekulesha ukushiika mu nindi yakwe uyo muntu obe afwile.” 
Genesis23:7 Elyo Abrahamu aima, akontamina abekalacalo abena Hiti." 
Genesis23:8 Abeba ati, “Kanshi umfweni nga mulefwaya ukuti nshiike umukashi wandi kuno, ninshi munandileko kuli Efuloni mwana Sohari" 
Genesis23:9 pakuti anshitishe ulucengo lwakwe ulwa ku Makipela, ulwabela ku mpela ya mpanga yakwe. Mumwipushe ukuti anshitishe pa cinso cenu pa mutengo uulingene ne mpanga, pakuti na ine njikwatile inshinshi pakati kenu.”" 
Genesis23:10 Kanshi Efuloni umwina Hiti ali palya pene pa bantu bakwe. Elyo ayasuka Abrahamu ninshi na bena Hiti bonse abaishile ku mpongolo ya musumba wakwe baleumfwako. 
Genesis23:11 Amweba ati, “Iyoo shikulu, umfwa kuli ine, nalakupeela ilya mpanga pamo pene no lucengo lwine ululimo. Nakupeela ilya mpanga pa cinso ca bantu bandi, kanshi shiikamo umuntu obe uufwile.”" 
Genesis23:12 Nakabili Abrahamu akontamina abekalacalo," 
Genesis23:13 elyo aeba Efuloni ninshi abantu baleumfwako ati, “Nkutikeni nga kuti mwatemwa. Nalalipila umutengo impanga ili nokushitwapo. Iwe suminafye ukupoka indalama, pakuti ine nshiikemo umuntu wandi uufwile.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efuloni epakwasuka Abrahamu ati," 
Genesis23:15 “Shikulu umfwa kuli ine, umutengo wa mpanga ni ndalama amashekeli ya silifa imyanda ine (400). Nomba pakati kesu, ngesho ndalama ni cinshi? Kashiikefye umuntu obe uufwile.”" 
Genesis23:16 Kanshi Abrahamu epakusuminisha umutengo Efuloni alandile. Amupimina indalama, umutengo alandile ninshi na bena Hiti baleumfwako. Amupimina amashekeli ya silifa imyanda ine ukukonka icipimo abamakwebo balebomfya pali ilya nshita." 
Genesis23:17 Efyo kanshi impanga yakwa Efuloni ku Makipela, iyalungatene na Mamure, yayalwike impanga yakwa Abrahamu. Emukutila impanga no lucengo lwalimo, elyo ne miti yonse iyali mukati ka mipaka ya mpanga," 
Genesis23:18 fyonse fyayalwike ifintu fyakwa Abrahamu pa cinso ca bena Hiti na bantu bonse abaliko pa mpongolo ya musumba. 
Genesis23:19 Ilyo ifi fyapwa, Abrahamu epakushiika umukashi wakwe Sara mu lucengo ulwa mu mpanga ya Makipela ukulungatana na Mamure, uwabela ku Hebuloni, mu calo ca Kenani." 
Genesis23:20 Kanshi impanga no lucengo ulwalimo ifya bena Hiti, fyayaluka fyaba fyakwa Abrahamu umwakuti aleshiika abantu bakwe." 
Genesis24:1 Abrahamu asukile akula, akota nganshi. Yawe nao alimupaalile muli fyonse." 
Genesis24:2 Ubushiku bumo Abrahamu aebele umukalamba wa babomfi bakwe, mushika wa fyuma fyakwe fyonse, ati, “Pisha iminwe yobe pesamba lye tanta lyandi." 
Genesis24:3 Ndefwaya ulape kuli Yawe, Lesa wa mulu na pano isonde ukuti tawakafwaile umwana wandi Isaki umwanakashi wakuupa pa bakashana ba muno calo ndeikalamo, abena Kenani." 
Genesis24:4 Lelo uli nokuya ku calo candi uko natula na kuli ba lupwa lwandi, eko ukaye buulila umwana wandi Isaki umwanakashi wakuupa.”" 
Genesis24:5 Umubomfi nao amwipusha ati, “Nga kanshi cikaba shani nga cakuti umwanakashi talefwaya ukwisa na ine kuli cino calo? Bushe ninshi nkaba nokubweseshamo mwano ku calo uko wafumine?”" 
Genesis24:6 Abrahamu amwasuka ati, “Tecakwesha ukubwesesha umwana wandi kuli cilya calo!" 
Genesis24:7 Yawe, Lesa wa mu mulu uwamfumishe mu ŋanda ya batata na mu calo nafyalilwemo, uwalandile no kundaya no mulapo ati, ‘Cino calo nkacipeela ku ba mu lupwa lobe.’ Yawe akatangisha malaika wakwe ku ntanshi yobe epakuti kulya kwine eko ukaye buula umwanakashi uwakuti umwana wandi akoope." 
Genesis24:8 Lelo ngo mwanakashi talefwaya ukwisa nobe, lyena ninshi tapali mulandu wakusungila uyu umulapo. Lelo umwana wandi wena wikamubweseshamo kulya.”" 
Genesis24:9 Kanshi umubomfi epakupisha iminwe yakwe pesamba lye tanta lyakwa shikulu wakwe Abrahamu, alapa no mulapo wakucita ifyo Abrahamu amwebele." 
Genesis24:10 Elyo umubomfi abuulilepo ikumi limo pa ngamila shakwa shikulu wakwe Abrahamu aya no kuya. Asendele ne fintu ifyalekana lekana ifyawamishepo pa fintu shikulu wakwe akwete. Aima aya ku Aramu Naharaimu elyo alola na ku musumba wa Naho. 
Genesis24:11 Cilya afika, aleka ingamila shafukama mupepi ne cishima, kunse ya musumba. Ilyo ninshi cali cungulo inshita abanakashi baya kukutapa amenshi." 
Genesis24:12 Elyo alapepa ati, “We Yawe, Lesa wakwa shikulu Abrahamu, shi wingancitila lelo ico nyendele. Langa uluse kuli shikulu Abrahamu." 
Genesis24:13 Mona, ine njiminine kuno ku cishima, na bakashana ba mu musumba balaisa kukutapa amenshi." 
Genesis24:14 Kanshi cibe ukuti umukashana uo ndeisa eba nati, ‘Sendamika umutondo obe uleke nwemo amenshi,’ nao nga aleisa sosa ati, ‘Nwamo, kabili nalapeela ne ngamila shobe nasho shine amenshi,’ ninshi eo nabe uo wasalila umubomfi obe Isaki. Kuli ici, eko ndeishibila ukuti naulanga uluse kuli shikulu wandi.”" 
Genesis24:15 Kutifye talati apwe no kupepa, Rebeka aisa, nasenda no mutondo pa kubeya. Uyu mukashana ali ni mwana Betueli, uo Naho munyina kwa Abrahamu afyele muli Milika umukashi wakwe." 
Genesis24:16 Umukashana ali uwayemba nganshi kabili nacisungu, uushatala akuma ku mwaume. Rebeka atentemukila ku cishima, atapila amenshi mu mutondo elyo alabweluluka." 
Genesis24:17 Elyo umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu abutukilako amukumanya. Aeba Rebeka ati, “Napapata leka nwemo utumenshi mu mutondo obe.”" 
Genesis24:18 Rebeka ati, “Aleni kanshi shikulu nabanwemo.” Awe bwangu bwangu aisha umutondo, amwikatila, no mubomfi anwamo." 
Genesis24:19 Panuma ya kumupa amenshi yakunwa, Rebeka asosa ati, “Kanje ntapileko ingamila shenu nasho amenshi mpaka shipwe ukunwa.”" 
Genesis24:20 Bwangu bwangu aitulwila na menshi yali mu mutondo mu mulimba. Elyo abutukila nakabili ku cishima kukutapa amenshi. Atapafye ayengi ayakunwa ingamila shonse. 
Genesis24:21 Umubomfi wena ninshi alifye tondolo alelolekesha umukashana pakuti amone nga cine cine Yawe amucitila ico aendele. 
Genesis24:22 Ilyo ingamila shapwa ukunwa amenshi, umubomfi elyo abuula imbalaminwe ya ku myona iya golide iya citika wa shekeli, afwika umukashana ku myona. Elyo amufwika na makosa yabili aya golide ku maboko aya mashekeli ikumi." 
Genesis24:23 Elyo aipusha umukashana ati, “Bushe niwe mwana ani? Napapata njebako. Bushe ku ŋanda kwa bawiso, kuti kwabako incende ukwakuti twaisa sendamako ubushiku bwa lelo?”" 
Genesis24:24 Umukashana ayasuka ati, “Nine mwana Betueli uwafyelwe kuli Naho muli Milika.”" 
Genesis24:25 Kabili umukashana alundapo nokuti, “Natukwata ifyakuti ingamila shalya ne cani cakuti shalalapo. Elyo natukwata ne ncende ukwakuti na imwe mwalala ubushiku bwa lelo.”" 
Genesis24:26 Elyo umubomfi akontamina panshi alapepa Yawe. 
Genesis24:27 Asosa ati, “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, Lesa wakwa shikulu wandi Abrahamu, uushileka kulanga uluse ne cishinka cakwe kuli shikulu wandi. Kabili na ine wine ni Yawe euntungulwile muli ubu bulendo bwa kwisa ku ŋanda yakwa munyina kwa shikulu wandi.”" 
Genesis24:28 Umukashana elyo abutwike ulubilo aya shimikila nyina na ba mu ŋanda ifyacitike. 
Genesis24:29 Nomba Rebeka alikwete ndume yakwe ishina lyakwe ni Labani. Elyo Labani afuma bwangu bwangu mukukumanya ulya muntu ku cishima. 
Genesis24:30 Ilyofye Labani amwene ukuti Rebeka ali ne mbalaminwe ya mu myona, nafwala na makosa ku maboko, aumfwa na Rebeka ifyo ashimika ifintu umuntu amwebele, ilyo ayako, asanga umubomfi eminine ne ngamila shakwe mupepi ne cishima." 
Genesis24:31 Amweba ati, “Natuleya ku ŋanda, imwe mwe bapaalwa na Yawe. Nga cinshi ico mwiminine kuno kunse? Nimpekanya iŋanda ne ncende ya ngamila.”" 
Genesis24:32 Kanshi umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu epakuya ku ŋanda. Labani ena akakula ifipe pa ngamila, ashanshila ifyani, ashipeela ne fyakulya. Elyo aleta amenshi pakuti umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu na bantu ali nabo basambe ku makasa." 
Genesis24:33 Elyo baleta icakulya, lelo umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu asosa ati, “Ine nshalye mpaka ntale nande umulandu nyendele.” Labani ati, “Kanshi nabalande.”" 
Genesis24:34 Nao asosa ati, “Ine ndi mubomfi wakwa Abrahamu." 
Genesis24:35 Yawe alipaala shikulu apakalamba nganshi, amulenga nokuti abe umukankala wa fyuma. Alimupeela imikuni ya mpaanga, imbushi ne ŋombe, silifa na golide, ababomfi abaume na banakashi, ingamila na bapunda." 
Genesis24:36 Kabili Sara muka shikulu Abrahamu, alimufyalila umwana umwaume mu bukote. Uyu mwana eo shikulu Abrahamu apeela ifyuma fyakwe fyonse." 
Genesis24:37 Kabili shikulu wandi alengele nokuti ndape umulapo. Anjebele ati, ‘Wikafwaila umwana wandi Isaki umwanakashi wakuupa pa bakashana abena Kenani aba muno calo ndeikalamo." 
Genesis24:38 Lelo uli nokuya ku ba mu ŋanda yakwa tata, ba lupwa lwandi, eko ukaye buulila umwana wandi Isaki umwanakashi wakuupa.’" 
Genesis24:39 Elyo ine naipwishe shikulu wandi nati, ‘Bushe cikaba shani nga cakuti umwanakashi akaana ukwisa na ine kuno?’" 
Genesis24:40 Nao shikulu anjaswike ati, ‘Yawe uwaishiba ifyo ine nyenda pa cinso cakwe, akakutumina malaika wakwe uwakuba nobe, pakuti akakucitile ico ukendela. Epakuti ukasange umwanakashi ukufuma kuli ba lupwa bakwa tata, ba lupwa lwandi, uwakuti umwana wandi akese upa." 
Genesis24:41 Lelo nga waya kuli ba lupwa lwandi ninshi umulapo wapwa, nangu abene nga ebakaana ukuti umulete ninshi nalyo line umulapo wapwa.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Ilyo nacifika ilelo pa cishima, nacisosa nati, ‘We Yawe, Lesa wakwa shikulu Abrahamu, shi wingancitila ico nyendele pali luno lwendo." 
Genesis24:43 Mona, njiminine mupepi ne cishima ca menshi, nga cakuti umukashana umo aisa kukutapa amenshi, na ine mwebe nati napapata leka nweko amenshi mu mutondo obe," 
Genesis24:44 nao nga aisa ayasuka ati nwamo, ne ngamila shobe nasho nalashitapilako amenshi, ninshi uyo mukashana abe eo Yawe asalila umwana wakwa shikulu wandi.’" 
Genesis24:45 Ilyo nshilapwa ukupepa mu mutima wandi, Rebeka aisa, nasenda no mutondo pa kubeya kwakwe. Atentemukila pa cishima, atapa na menshi. Na ine namweba nati, ‘Napapata mpeelako amenshi nwe.’" 
Genesis24:46 Bwangu bwangu aisha umutondo pa kubeya ati nokuti, ‘Nweni, nalaya tapila ne ngamila shenu amenshi shinwe.’ Nanwa, elyo apeela ingamila amenshi shanwa." 
Genesis24:47 Elyo namwipusha nati, ‘Bushe niwe mwana ani?’ Nao ayasuka ati, ‘Nine mwana Betueli umwana mwaume wakwa Naho uo Milika afyele kuli ena.’ Elyo namufwika imbalaminwe ya ku myona na makosa ku maboko yakwe." 
Genesis24:48 Elyo nakontamina panshi nalapepa Yawe. Nalumbanya Yawe, Lesa wakwa shikulu wandi Abrahamu, uuntungulwile mu nshila iyalungama kukwisa buulila umwishikulu wakwa munyina shikulu wandi ukuti abe umukashi wa mwana wakwe." 
Genesis24:49 Kanshi nomba nga mulelanga icitemwiko no bufumacumi kuli shikulu wandi, njebeni, elyo nga teifyo naco cine njebeni epakuti njishibe ifyakucita.”" 
Genesis24:50 Labani na Betueli bamwasuka abati, “Ici cintu ni kuli Yawe cafuma, kanshi ifwe tekuti tukwate icakulandapo." 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka uyu, mubuule, umusende, uleke akaye ba umukashi wa mwana wakwa sokulu, ngefyo Yawe alandile.”" 
Genesis24:52 Cilya umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu aumfwa ifyo balanda, akontamina panshi alapepa Yawe." 
Genesis24:53 Elyo umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu abuula ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya ifya golide na silifa ne fyakufwala apeela Rebeka. Kabili apeelako ndume yakwa Rebeka na nyina ifyabupe ifyamutengo nganshi. 
Genesis24:54 Elyo umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu pamo na bantu ali nabo balalya no kunwa, no kusendama basendama uko kwine. Ilyo babuka ulucelo, umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu abeba ati, “Lekeni mbwelelemo kuli shikulu.”" 
Genesis24:55 Lelo ndume yakwa Rebeka na nyina basosa abati, “Lekeni umukashana ekaleko inshiku ikumi limo nangu ukucilapo, elyo ninshi akaleya.”" 
Genesis24:56 Umubomfi nao asosa ati, “Mwileka nkokole kuno, apo Yawe nafikilisha ico naendele, lekenifye ndeya kuli shikulu.”" 
Genesis24:57 Elyo basosa abati, “Kanshi katwite umukashana, tumfwe ifyo alaisa sosa.”" 
Genesis24:58 Elyo baita Rebeka, bamwipusha abati, “Bushe bati uleya noyu muntu?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Ee ndeya.”" 
Genesis24:59 Kanshi epakuleka nkashi yabo Rebeka no muleshi wakwe ukuti baleya no mubomfi wakwa Abrahamu na bantu bakwe. 
Genesis24:60 Elyo bapaala Rebeka no kumweba abati, “We nkashi yesu ukasanduluke, amakana na makana. Kabili aba mu lupwa lobe bengalacimfya impongolo sha balwani babo.”" 
Genesis24:61 Elyo Rebeka na bakashana balemubombela baima, banina pa ngamila bakonka no mubomfi wakwa Abrahamu. Kanshi efyo umubomfi asendele Rebeka no kuya aya." 
Genesis24:62 Mu nshita iyo, Isaki ninshi alifuma ku cishima ca Bere Lai Roi, aleikala mu matololo ya Negebu." 
Genesis24:63 Ubushiku bumo cilya akasuba kalasumbila kukuwa, Isaki aya aletandala mwibala. Elyo ati enune amenso, amona ingamila shileisa." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka nao ati enune amenso amona Isaki, elyo aika pa ngamila" 
Genesis24:65 aipusha umubomfi wakwa Abrahamu ati, “Bushe ulya muntu aleisa mwibala kukutukumanya nani?” Umubomfi amwasuka ati, “Ni shikulu wandi.” Elyo Rebeka abuula insalu afimba pa menso." 
Genesis24:66 Umubomfi epakushimikila Isaki fyonse ifyo acitile. 
Genesis24:67 Isaki epakwingisha Rebeka mwitenti lyakwa nyina Sarah, amubuula ukuba umukashi wakwe. Efyo Rebeka asangwike umukashi wakwe. Isaki alitemenwe Rebeka, no mutima wakwe watalala ukufuma apo nyina afwilile." 
Genesis25:1 Abrahamu alyupile umwanakashi umbi, ishina lyakwe ni Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Ketura afyele kuli Abrahamu abana aba, Simurani, Yokishani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaki na Shua." 
Genesis25:3 Yokishani afyele Sheba na Dedani. Abena Ashurimu, abena Letushi na bena Leumimu bonse ba mu lupwa lwakwa Dedani." 
Genesis25:4 Abana bakwa Midiani bena ni Efah, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida na Eluda. Aba bonse ba mu lupwa lwakwa Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahamu apeele ifyuma fyonse fintu akwete kuli Isaki. 
Genesis25:6 Lelo ilyo acili umumi, Abrahamu apeele ifyabupe ku bana abaume aba mu bakashi bakwe abashaupilwe mu bwinga no kubatuma ukuya ikala mu calo ca ku kabanga pakuti bataluke ku mwana wakwe Isaki." 
Genesis25:7 Abrahamu aikele umumi pano calo imyaka yonse pamo umwanda umo na makumi cine lubali na isano (175). 
Genesis25:8 Abrahamu asukile aleka umweo. Afwa mu bukote bufwaikwa, umukote uwa myaka iyingi. Epakuya lala ku fikolwe fyakwe." 
Genesis25:9 Abana bakwe abaume Isaki na Ishimaeli bamushiikile mu lucengo lwa Makipela, mu mpanga yakwa Efuloni mwana Sowa umwina Hiti, lwa ku kabanga ka Mamure." 
Genesis25:10 Iyi e mpanga Abrahamu ashitile ku bena Hiti. Kabili umu mwine emo Abrahamu no mukashi wakwe Sara bashiikilwe. 
Genesis25:11 Ilyo Abrahamu afwile, Lesa apaalile umwana wakwe Isaki. Isaki nao epakwikala ku Bere Lai Roi." 
Genesis25:12 Ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Ishimaeli umwana umwaume uo Abrahamu afyele muli Haga umwina Egupto, umusha mwanakashi wakwa Sara." 
Genesis25:13 Aya e mashina ya bana abaume bakwa Ishimaeli umo bakonkanine ukufyalwa. Ibeli ni Nebaiyoti, elyo pakonka Keda, Adibeli, Mibisamu," 
Genesis25:14 Mishima, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadadi, Tema, Yetu, Nafishi na Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Kanshi aba e bamwana Ishimaeli. Kabili aya e mashina ya bakateeka ba mikowa yabo ikumi limo na ibili (12) ayo bainikeko imishi yabo ne nkambi shabo. 
Genesis25:17 Ishimaeli aikele umumi imyaka yonse pamo umwanda umo na makumi yatatu na cine lubali (137). Elyo aleka umweo no kufwa afwa, aya no kwalala ifikolwe fyakwe." 
Genesis25:18 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa Ishimaeli baleikala mu calo ca pakati ukufuma ku Hafila ukufika na ku Shuri, mupepi no mupaka wa Egupto ukulola ku Asiria. Ishimaeli tabaleumfwana na bamunyina bonse." 
Genesis25:19 Kanshi ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Isaki mwana Abrahamu. Wishi wakwa Isaki ni Abrahamu. 
Genesis25:20 Isaki ali ne myaka amakumi yane (40) ilyo aupile Rebeka. Wishi wakwa Rebeka ali ni Betueli umwina Aramu mu Padani Aramu. Ndume yakwa Rebeka ali ni Labani umwina Aramu. 
Genesis25:21 Isaki alepepelako umukashi wakwe kuli Yawe, pantu Rebeka ali ni ŋumba. Yawe alyumfwile ipepo lyakwe, na Rebeka umukashi wakwe epakuba pabukulu." 
Genesis25:22 Lelo ilyo abana bacili mwifumo balakusana. Elyo Rebeka asosa ati, “Nga cinshi calancitikila ifi?” Kanshi Rebeka epakuya kukumfwa ifyo Yawe alesosapo." 
Genesis25:23 Yawe nao amweba ati, “Mwifumo lyobe muli imishobo ibili. Ukafyala abantu babili abakapusana. Umo akakwata amaka ukucila umubiye. Umukalamba eukatumika umwaice.”" 
Genesis25:24 Ilyo inshita yafikile iyakupaapa, mwifumo lyakwa Rebeka mwali bampundu abaume beka beka." 
Genesis25:25 Uwabalilepo ukufyalwa, ali uwakashika na mapipi umubili onse kwati ni nsalu ya mafufu. Kanshi epakumwinika ishina lya Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Panuma munyina nao afyalwa, ekete ku citende cakwa Esau. Kanshi nao bamwinika ishina lya Yakobo. Isaki ali ne myaka amakumi mutanda (60) ilyo Rebeka afyele aba bampundu." 
Genesis25:27 Ilyo aba bana bakulile, Esau aishile ba umubamfi uwine wine uwa nama, umuntu uwakusabantafye mu mpanga. Yakobo wena ali umuntu uwapetama, atemenwe ukwikala pa mushi." 
Genesis25:28 Isaki, uwalefwaya inama sha mpanga atemenwe Esau. Lelo Rebeka atemenwe Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Ubushiku bumo Yakobo aleipika ifyakulya, Esau nao afuma mu mpanga ali ne nsala nganshi." 
Genesis25:30 Esau aebele Yakobo ati, “Endesha, mpeelako ndye ifyo fyakulya ifyakashika, pantu insala yansuma nganshi.” (Eico Esau bamwinikile ne shina lya Edomu.)" 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo amwasuka ati, “Pakubala nshitisha insambu sha bubeli bobe.”" 
Genesis25:32 Esau amweba ati, “Mona ine ndi pakufwa, nga kanshi insambu sha bubeli shikamombela nshi?”" 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo amweba ati, “Pakubala lapa kuli ine.” Esau alapa na kuli Yakobo, ashitisha ne nsambu sha bubeli bwakwe kuli Yakobo." 
Genesis25:34 Elyo Yakobo amupeelako umukate no muto we landa. Esau alya umukate anwa no muto we landa, elyo aima alaya noko aleya. Kanshi efyo Esau asuulile insambu sha bubeli bwakwe." 
Genesis26:1 Kanshi mu calo mwaliponene icipowe na cimbi nga cilya caponene kale mu nshita yakwa Abrahamu. Isaki epakuya ku Gerari kuli Abimeleki imfumu ya Bafilisiti. 
Genesis26:2 Elyo Yawe amonekela kuli Isaki, amweba ati, “Wikaya ku Egupto, ukekale mu calo ndekweba ukwikalamo." 
Genesis26:3 Pa nshita ino ikala muli cino cine calo ngo mweni, kabili nakulaba nobe, no kupaala nkakupaala. Kabili ni kuli iwe na ba mu lupwa lobe eko nkapeela ifi fyalo fyonse, efyo nkafikilisha umulapo nalapile kuli wiso Abrahamu." 
Genesis26:4 Nkasandulula aba mu lupwa lobe nge ntanda sha mu mulu, kabili ebo nkapeela ifi fyalo fyonse. Elyo imishobo yonse pano calo ikapaalilwa mu ba mu lupwa lobe," 
Genesis26:5 pantu Abrahamu alembeela kabili alebaka ifyo mfwaya, amafunde yandi, ifipope fyandi elyo ne fyebo fyandi.”" 
Genesis26:6 Kanshi Isaki epakwikala mu Gerari. 
Genesis26:7 Nomba ilyo abantu ba kuli ilya ncende bamwipwishe pa mukashi wakwe, Isaki abebele ati, “Ni nkashi yandi.” Asosele ukuti ni nkashi yandi ico aletiina ukulanda ati “Mukashi wandi.” Atontonkenye ukuti, “Abantu ba ino ncende kuti banjipaya pa mulandu wakwa Rebeka pantu aba uwayemba.”" 
Genesis26:8 Cilya aikalako inshiku ishingi, ubushiku bumo Abimeleki imfumu ya Bafilisiti yalolesha pa nsolokoto, yamona Isaki alecenya umukashi wakwe Rebeka." 
Genesis26:9 Kanshi Abimeleki epakwita Isaki, amweba ati, “Rebeka cine cine mukashi obe. Nga cinshi wasosele auti, ‘Rebeka ni nkashi yandi?’” Isaki amwasuka ati, “Pantu natontonkenye ukuti nalimo kuti banjipaila pa mulandu wakwa Rebeka.”" 
Genesis26:10 Elyo Abimeleki asosa ati, “Cinshi ico wacitila ici kuli ifwe? Umwaume nga cakuti aile sendama no mukashi obe, ninshi nga niwe watuletele umulandu.”" 
Genesis26:11 Kanshi Abimeleki epakupeela icipope ku bantu bonse ati, “Umuntu onse uukacusha uyu muntu nangu umukashi wakwe akepaiwa.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isaki alibyelemo imbuto muli cilya calo. Kabili muli uyo wine mwaka asombwelemo imbuto ishingi, imiku umwanda umo pafyo abyele. Yawe alipaalile Isaki," 
Genesis26:13 eico Isaki aba nomba umukankala ne fyuma fyakwe fyalafulilakofye, asuka aba umukankala nganshi." 
Genesis26:14 Akwata imikuni iyingi iya mpaanga ne mbushi ne ya ŋombe na babomfi abengi, icakuti Abafilisiti bamufimbila." 
Genesis26:15 Kanshi Abafilisiti baisushamo iloba mu fishima ababomfi bakwa wishi baimbile ninshi Abrahamu wishi acili umumi. 
Genesis26:16 Elyo Abimeleki aebele Isaki ati, “Fuma kuno mwesu, pantu naukwatisha amaka ukutucila.”" 
Genesis26:17 Kanshi Isaki epakufumako aya cita inkambi mwishika lya ku Gerari, eko no kwikala aikala." 
Genesis26:18 Isaki afukula ifishima ifyaimbilwe ninshi Abrahamu wishi epo acili, ifyo Abafilisiti bashiikile panuma ya mfwa yakwa Abrahamu. Isaki afinika na mashina ayo yene wishi afinike." 
Genesis26:19 Kabili ababomfi bakwa Isaki balimbile icishima mwishika, basangamo na kamfukumfuku ka menshi." 
Genesis26:20 Lelo bakacema ba mu Gerari balaumanya bakacema bakwa Isaki, balabeba abati, “Aya menshi yesu.” Kanshi Isaki epakwinika icishima ishina lya Eseki, pantu abena Gerari balepusaninapo nankwe." 
Genesis26:21 Kabili ababomfi bakwa Isaki baimba icishima cimbi, lelo naco cine balaumaninapo. Kanshi Isaki epakucinika ishina lya Sitina." 
Genesis26:22 Kanshi epakufumako kulya, aya imba icishima cimbi. Pali ici cena tapali nelyo umo uwalemumanya, acinika ne shina lya Rehoboti, asosa ati, “Nomba Yawe natupeela incende iyifungulwike, kanshi tukasanduluka muli ici calo.”" 
Genesis26:23 Ukufuma uko, Isaki aile ku Beresheba." 
Genesis26:24 Ubo bwine bushiku, mu nshita ya bushiku, Yawe amumonekela, amweba ati, “Nine Lesa wakwa wiso Abrahamu. Witiina nelyo cimo, pantu ndi nobe. Nkakupaala, kabili nkasandulula no lupwa lobe, pa mulandu wa mubomfi wandi Abrahamu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Isaki epakukuulako ubulambo, elyo alapepa Yawe. Uku kwine acitile inkambi yakwe, na babomfi bakwe baimbako icishima." 
Genesis26:26 Kanshi Abimeleki na Ahusati uwalemupandako amano, elyo na Fikoli umukalamba wa fita fyakwe, afumine ku Gerari aisa kuli Isaki." 
Genesis26:27 Isaki abepusha ati, “Cinshi mwaishila kuli ine apo mwalimpata, kabili mwalintamfya na kumwenu?”" 
Genesis26:28 Bamwasuka abati, “Natumonafye bwino bwino ukuti Yawe aba na iwe. Kanshi twatile, ‘Pafwile ukuba umulapo wakusuminishanya pakati kesu,’ pakati kesu na iwe. Kanshi leka tupangane na iwe" 
Genesis26:29 ukuti tawakatucite nelyo cimo icabipa, nga filya ifwe tatwacitile nelyo cimo icakukucusha. Lelo ifwe twalekusungafye bwino no kuleka ukuti ufume kumwesu umutende. Nomba Yawe nakupaala.”" 
Genesis26:30 Isaki elyo abapekanishisha imitebeto, balya no kunwa banwa." 
Genesis26:31 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo ulucelocelo, cila muntu alapa umulapo ku mubiye. Isaki epakubaleka baya, nabo bafumako umutende." 
Genesis26:32 Pali ubo bwine bushiku ababomfi bakwa Isaki baishile mushimikila pa cishima baimbile. Bamweba abati, “Natusanga amenshi.”" 
Genesis26:33 Isaki acinika ishina lya Shiba. Eico ukufika na lelo umusumba witwa Beresheba. 
Genesis26:34 Ilyo Esau afikile pa myaka amakumi yane (40), aupile Yuditi mwana Beri umwina Hiti, elyo na Basemati mwana Eloni, nao umwina Hiti." 
Genesis26:35 Aba banakashi baleleta isakamika kuli Isaki na Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Ilyo Isaki akotele, na menso yakwe yanakuka icakuti alafilwa no kumona, aitile umwana mwaume mukalamba Esau, amweba ati, “We mwana wandi!” Nao mwane ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi.”" 
Genesis27:2 Isaki amweba ati, “Mona, nomba ninkota, kabili nshishibe no bushiku ningafwa." 
Genesis27:3 Kanshi nomba buula ifyanso fyobe, imifwi yobe no buta bobe, uye mu mpanga mukulunga, unjipaileko inama." 
Genesis27:4 Elyo wise umpekanishisheko icakulya icanunkila, cilya natemwa, ulete njise ndye. Epakuti nkupaale ilyo nshilafwa.”" 
Genesis27:5 Kanshi Rebeka aleumfwako ilyo Isaki alelanda kuli mwane Esau. Ilyo aile mu mpanga mukulunga inama nokuti alete," 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka aeba mwane Yakobo ati, “Mona, naumfwako ifyo bawiso bacilaeba munonko Esau, baleti," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Undetele inama elyo umpekanishishe icakulya icanunkila icakuti ndye, uleke nkupaale pa cinso cakwa Yawe ilyo nshilafwa.’" 
Genesis27:8 Kanshi we mwana wandi, umfwa bwino kuli ine, ucite nefyo ndekweba." 
Genesis27:9 Kabiye ku mukuni wa mbushi, undeteleko utwana twa mbushi tubili utusuma pakuti njise mpekanishishe bawiso icakulya icanunkila umusango bacitemenwamo." 
Genesis27:10 Elyo wise utwalile bawiso balye pakuti bakupaale ilyo bashilafwa.” 
Genesis27:11 Lelo Yakobo aebele nyina Rebeka ati, “Munyinane Esau muntu uwamapipi, lelo ine ndi muntu wa mubili uwatelela." 
Genesis27:12 Nga cakuti batata baya mpampanta, cileya moneka kwati ndebomfya ubucenjeshi. Lyena ninshi te paalo ndeya poka, lelo kuiletelelafye ukulapishiwa.”" 
Genesis27:13 Nyina amweba ati, “We mwana wandi, leka uko kulapishiwa kukese pali ine. Iwe citafye ifyo nandile. Kabiye, kandetele utwana twa mbushi.”" 
Genesis27:14 Kanshi Yakobo epakuya buula utwana twa mbushi, atuleta kuli nyina. Nyina nao epakupekanya icakulya icanunkila mu musango wishi atemenwe." 
Genesis27:15 Elyo Rebeka abuula ifyakufwala ifyawamishe ifyali mu ŋanda ifya mwana mukalamba Esau, afwika no mwana wakwe mwaice Yakobo." 
Genesis27:16 Elyo apomba impapa sha twana twa mbushi ku maboko yakwa Yakobo na mu mukoshi umushali mapipi. 
Genesis27:17 Apeela mwane Yakobo mu minwe icakulya icanunkila no mukate apangile. 
Genesis27:18 Yakobo aya kuli wishi, asosa ati, “Tata wandi!” Wishi nao ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi. Niwe ani we mwana wandi?”" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo ayasuka wishi ati, “Nine Esau ibeli lyenu. Nincita ifyo mwacinjeba. Aleni imeni mulyeko inama yandi, pakuti mumpeele ipaalo lyenu.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isaki aipusha mwane ati, “We mwana wandi, apa pene epo wasanga inama?” Yakobo ayasuka ati, “Ni Yawe, Lesa wenu uwampeela ishuko.”" 
Genesis27:21 Elyo Isaki aebele Yakobo ati, “Palama kuno mwana wandi uleke nkupampante, pakuti njishibe nga cine niwe mwana wandi Esau nangu iyoo.”" 
Genesis27:22 Yakobo epakupalama kuli wishi Isaki. Wishi nao alamupampanta elyo asosa ati, “Ishiwi lyena lishiwi lyakwa Yakobo, lelo amaboko yena maboko yakwa Esau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Isaki taishibe ukuti ni Yakobo pantu amaboko yakwe yali na mapipi kwati yakwa Esau munyina. Kanshi Isaki epakupaala Yakobo. 
Genesis27:24 Lelo Isaki amwipusha ati, “Bushe cine cine niwe mwana wandi Esau?” Yakobo ayasuka ati, “Ee nine wine.”" 
Genesis27:25 Elyo Isaki asosa ati, “Mwana wandi, ndetelako inama wipeye mukulunga, uleke ndye, pakuti nkupaale.” Yakobo epakumuletela inama no kulya alya. Amuletelako no mwangashi, nao anwa." 
Genesis27:26 Elyo Isaki wishi amweba ati, “Palama kuno mwana wandi untomone pakumposha.”" 
Genesis27:27 Kanshi Yakobo epakuya tomona Isaki pakumuposha. Cilya Isaki aumfwa icena ca nsalu shakwe, alamupaala, no kusosa ati, “Eya! Icena ca mwana wandi caba kwati cena ca mwibala ilyo Yawe apaala." 
Genesis27:28 Lesa engakupeela umume wa ku mulu, no mushili uwafunda, ne fisabo ifingi no mwangashi upya." 
Genesis27:29 Imishobo ingalakutumika na bantu bonse balekunakila. Niwe ube imfumu ya bamunonko, na bana abaume bakwa noko bengalakunakila. Abo abakulapisha nabo balapishiwe, na bakupaala nabo bapaalwe.”" 
Genesis27:30 Atilefye cilya Isaki apwa ukupaala Yakobo, na Yakobo afuma pali wishi, Esau munyina nao abwela kukulunga." 
Genesis27:31 Esau nao apekanya icakulya icanunkila, atwala na kuli wishi. Elyo aeba wishi ati, “Tata wandi, imeni mulyeko inama njipeye kukulunga pakuti mumpeele ne paalo lyenu.”" 
Genesis27:32 Isaki wishi amwipusha ati, “Bushe niwe ani?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Nine mwana wenu, ibeli lyenu Esau.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaki epakulakanka no mwenso ukalamba ati, “Nga kanshi uwacibamba inama no kundetela nani? Nalyafye ili line ninshi taulaisa elyo nimupaala, kabili nalala napaalwa.”" 
Genesis27:34 Cilya Esau aumfwa ifyo wishi alanda, alila umusowa uukalamba kabili uukali, alaeba wishi ati, “Mpaaleni, na ine, tata wandi!”" 
Genesis27:35 Lelo Isaki amweba ati, “Munonko acisa mu bucenjeshi, napoka ne paalo lyobe.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esau epakusosa ati, “Bushe tacalungama ukumwinika ishina lya Yakobo? Nomba ancenjesha imiku ibili. Alimpokele insambu sha bubeli bwandi. Kabili apoka ne paalo.” Elyo aipusha ati, “Bushe tamunshilileko ipaalo?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaki ayasuka Esau ati, “Mona nimusonta ukuba imfumu yobe, kabili nimupeela ba lupwa lwakwe bonse ukuba ababomfi bakwe. Elyo nimupeela ifyakumusunga, ifisabo elyo no mwangashi upya. Kanshi finshi fimbi ningakucitila mwana wandi?”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau aebele wishi ati, “Bushe tata mwakwatafye ipaalo limo epela? Tata wandi mpaaleniko na ine wine!” Elyo Esau asansula ishiwi lyakwe alalila." 
Genesis27:39 Isaki wishi epakwasuka mwane ati, “Icifulo cobe cikaba ukutali na ku mushili uwafunda, cikaba ukutali na ku mume wa mu mulu." 
Genesis27:40 Ni ku lupanga eko ukamwena ukwikala umumi. Kabili ukalatumika munonko. Lelo ilyo ukalwisha, lyena elyo ukafuma mwikoli lyakwe.”" 
Genesis27:41 Kanshi Esau nomba alipatile Yakobo, pa mulandu we paalo wishi amupeele. Alaisosha umwine ati, “Inshiku shakuloosha batata shilifye mupepi. Elyo ninshi nkepaya munyinane Yakobo.”" 
Genesis27:42 Ilyo Rebeka bamwebeleko ifyo umwana mukalamba Esau alandile, Rebeka epakutuma abakwita Yakobo umwana mwaice. Amweba ati, “Mona munonko Esau aleitalalika umutima ne pange lya kukwipaya." 
Genesis27:43 Kanshi nomba we mwana wandi, cita ifyo nalakweba, fulumukila kuli ndume yandi Labani ku Harani." 
Genesis27:44 Uye ikala nankwe pa nshita ino mpaka munonko icipyu cikapwe. 
Genesis27:45 Ilyo munonko akaleka ukukufulilwa kabili akalabe nefyo wamucita, elyo nkakutumina amashiwi ukabwelulukeko. Nga cinshi ningalekela ukuti ndufye abana bandi bonse babili mu bushiku bumo bwine?”" 
Genesis27:46 Kabili Rebeka aebele Isaki ati, “Ine nintendwa ukuba umumi pa mulandu wa aba banakashi abena Hiti. Nga cakuti Yakobo nao aupa umwanakashi umo pa banakashi ba muli cino calo pali aba abena Hiti, ine ninshi no kufwa kwawama.”" 
Genesis28:1 Kanshi Isaki aitile Yakobo no kumupaala, amukonkomesha ati, “Iwe wikopa umwanakashi umwina Kenani." 
Genesis28:2 Ima akuya ku calo ca Padani Aramu kwa Betueli, sokulu uwafyala banoko. Uli nokuupa umo pa bakashana bamwana Labani ndume ya banoko." 
Genesis28:3 Lesa Umwine wa maka yonse engakupaala, akakupeele ubufyashi, akakusandulule, mpaka ukabe ibumba lya mishobo ya bantu." 
Genesis28:4 Lesa engakupeela iwe pamo na ba mu lupwa lobe ipaalo apeele Abrahamu, pakuti cino calo umo nomba wikala ngo mweni, ukacipoke cikabe calo cobe.”" 
Genesis28:5 Elyo Isaki aleka Yakobo ukuya, nao aya ku calo ca Padani Aramu, kuli Labani mwana Betueli umwina Aramu, ndume yakwa Rebeka, nyina wakwa Yakobo na Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Nomba Esau aumfwile ukuti Isaki alipaala Yakobo kabili alimutuma ku Padani Aramu pakuti eko akaye upila. Kabili aumfwile nokuti, ilyo amupaalile, alimukonkomeshe ati, “Wikopa umwanakashi umwina Kenani”" 
Genesis28:7 elyo nokuti Yakobo nao alibeela wishi na nyina aliya na ku Padani Aramu. 
Genesis28:8 Esau epakushininkisha ukuti wishi Isaki tatemwa abanakashi abena Kenani. 
Genesis28:9 Kanshi Esau ekuya kuli Ishimaeli mwana Abrahamu, aupa na Mahalati mwana Ishimaeli, nkashimbiye kwa Nebaiyoti, ukulunda pa bakashi akwete kale." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo afumine ku Beresheba, alungama ku Harani." 
Genesis28:11 Ilyo afikile pa ncende imo, ico akasuba kawa, epo asendama ubo bushiku. Abuulapo ilibwe limo epo asaila, alala nokulala." 
Genesis28:12 Alota iciloto umo amwene umutanto ushimpile panshi, kabili ufikile na mu mulu. Elyo bamalaika bakwa Lesa balenina no kwika pa mutanto." 
Genesis28:13 Pa mulu wauko, amona Yawe naiminina. Elyo amweba ati, “Nine Yawe, Lesa wakwa wiso Abrahamu kabili Lesa wakwa Isaki. Ici calo ulelepo niwe nkapeela pamo na ba mu lupwa lobe." 
Genesis28:14 Aba mu lupwa lobe bakafula kwati lukungu lwa pano isonde. Mukasalangana ukufika na ku masamba, ku kabanga, ku kapinda ka kuso na ku kapinda ka kulyo. Kabili imishobo yonse iya pano isonde ikapaalilwa muli iwe no lupwa lobe." 
Genesis28:15 Mona, ine naba nobe lyonse, nakulakusunga konse uko wakulaya. Kabili nkakubwesesha kuli cino cine calo. Nshakakulekeleshe mpaka nkacite fyonse ifyo nakulaya.”" 
Genesis28:16 Cilya Yakobo abuuka mu tulo, asosa ati, “Cine cine pano pantu Yawe epo ali, na ine nshacishiba.”" 
Genesis28:17 Yakobo epakumfwa umwenso, asosa nokuti, “We ncende nobe ulakatama! Iyi ncende teyafye, ni ŋanda yakwa Lesa! Iyi e mpongolo ya ku mulu.”" 
Genesis28:18 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo lucelocelo, Yakobo abuula ilibwe asailepo, alimika pakuti libe icakwibukishishako. Elyo aitila amafuta pa mulu we libwe." 
Genesis28:19 Yakobo ainika iyo ncende ishina lya Betele, nangu uyu musumba kale waleitwa Lusi." 
Genesis28:20 Elyo Yakobo alaya icilayo ati, “Nga cakuti Lesa akulaba na ine, no kunsunga pali ulu lwendo ndipo, no kulampeela ifyakulya ne fyakufwala," 
Genesis28:21 pakuti nkabwelele na ku ŋanda ya batata umutende, ninshi Yawe ewakulaba Lesa wandi." 
Genesis28:22 Kabili ilibwe njiminike lyakulaba e ŋanda yakupepelapo Lesa. Kabili pali fyonse ifyo ukampeela, nkalabuulapo cimo pekumi no kukupeela.”" 
Genesis29:1 Kanshi Yakobo alikonkenyepo ulwendo lwakwe, asuka afika na ku calo ca bantu babela ku kabanga." 
Genesis29:2 Mu mpanga iyo amona icishima ca menshi ne mikuni ya mpaanga itatu ilele mupepi ne cishima," 
Genesis29:3 pantu muli ici cishima baletapa amenshi ayakuti imikuni inwe. Icilibwe balecilika pa cishima cali icikalamba. Baleti cilya imikuni ya fitekwa yalongana, bakacema bakunkulusha bafumyapo icilibwe balecilika pa cishima, elyo batapa amenshi yakuti ifitekwa finwe. Kabili elyo balebwekesha icilibwe cakucilika pa cishima pa ncende yaciko." 
Genesis29:4 Elyo Yakobo aipwishe bakacema ati, “Mwe bamunyinane bushe ni kwi mwafuma?” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Twafuma mu Harani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Abepusha ati, “Bushe mwalishiba Labani, umwishikulu wakwa Naho?” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ee twalimwishiba.”" 
Genesis29:6 Yakobo abepusha ati, “Bushe ali umutende?” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Ee alifye umutende, no mwana wakwe umukashana Rakeli, uyu aleisa ali ne mpaanga.”" 
Genesis29:7 Elyo Yakobo abeba ati, “Moneni akasuba kacili katuntulu. Ino taili nshita yakulonganika ifitekwa. Imwe fipeelenifye amenshi finwe, elyo mufibwekeshemo kukulya.”" 
Genesis29:8 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Teti tucite ifyo kano imikuni yonse yalongana ne cilibwe bacilika pa cishima bacikunkulushapo. Lyena elyo tulenwesha ifitekwa amenshi.”" 
Genesis29:9 Ilyo acili alelanda nabo, awe Rakeli aisa ali ne mpaanga shakwa wishi, pantu ali ni kacema mwanakashi." 
Genesis29:10 Cilya Yakobo amona Rakeli mwana Labani nalume, ali ne mpaanga shakwa Labani, awe Yakobo aya kunkulushapo icilibwe balecilika pa cishima. Apeela na menshi ku mpaanga shakwa nalume, shanwa." 
Genesis29:11 Elyo Yakobo atomona Rakeli pakumuposha, atendeka nokulila, aleikatisha." 
Genesis29:12 Alaeba Rakeli ati, “Ine ndi lupwa lwa bawiso, nine mwana Rebeka.” Kanshi Rakeli epakubutuka aya ebako wishi." 
Genesis29:13 Cilya Labani aumfwa ifyo Rakeli amweba ukuti ni Yakobo mwana nkashi yakwe, Labani abutuka kukumukumanya. Awe amukukutila, kabili amutomona pakumuposha, elyo amusenda kumwakwe. Yakobo nao epakumushimikilako ifi fintu fyonse." 
Genesis29:14 Labani epakumweba ati, “Iwe uli lupwa lwandi pakatifye.” Yakobo aikele na Labani umweshi umo utuntulu." 
Genesis29:15 Labani epakumweba ati, “Bushe iwe ico uli lupwa lwandi, eco wingamombelafye ukwabula kulipilwa? Awe njebafye amalipilo ulefwaya.”" 
Genesis29:16 Labani ali na bana abakashana babili. Ishina lya wamukalamba ni Leya, elyo uwamwaice ni Rakeli." 
Genesis29:17 Leya ali na menso ayafuuka, lelo Rakeli ali no mubili uusuma kabili uwayemba." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo atemenwe Rakeli. Kanshi aebele Labani ati, “Nkamubombela pa myaka cine lubali pa mwana wenu umukashana Rakeli umwaice bantu.”" 
Genesis29:19 Labani nao asosa ati, “Cena ico cawamapo ukuti namupeela kuli iwe ukucila ku muntu umbi. Iwe ikalafye kuno kwine kumwandi.”" 
Genesis29:20 Kanshi Yakobo abombele imyaka cine lubali pakuti bamupeele Rakeli. Lelo iyo myaka yamonekefye kwati ni nshiku shampendwa ico atemenwe Rakeli. 
Genesis29:21 Elyo Yakobo aebele Labani ati, “Mpeeleni umukashi wandi. Inshita mwapimine naipwa ndefwaya tulelala nankwe.”" 
Genesis29:22 Kanshi Labani epakulonganika abantu bonse aba kulya kwine, atebeta ne mitebeto." 
Genesis29:23 Lelo cilya caba icungulo, Labani abuula mwane Leya amutwala kuli Yakobo, na Yakobo asendama nankwe." 
Genesis29:24 Kabili Labani apeela mwane Leya umwanakashi uwakumubombela, umukashana umusha wakwe, Silipa." 
Genesis29:25 Kutifye cilya bwaca, Yakobo asanga ukuti ni Leya! Elyo aebele Labani ati, “Ngeco mwancitila ifi cinshi? Ine ilyo nalemubombela, nalefwaya Rakeli, bushe teifyo? Bushe kanshi cinshi mwancenjesesha?”" 
Genesis29:26 Labani amwasuka ati, “Ifwe kuno tatwaba na lutambi ulwakuufya umwaice ilyo umukalamba wakwe talati opwe." 
Genesis29:27 Kanshi tala pwisha umulungu wakusefya ubwinga, lyena elyo tukakupeela no mwaice bantu wine, lelo ukamombela imyaka na imbi cine lubali.”" 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo nao acita ifyo Labani asosele. Apwisha umulungu wakusefya ubwinga ali na Leya, elyo Labani amupeela mwane Rakeli ukuba umukashi wakwe." 
Genesis29:29 Labani apeela mwane Rakeli umwanakashi uwakumubombela, umukashana umusha wakwe, Bilua." 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo epakulasendama na Rakeli wine. Lelo Yakobo atemwishishepo Rakeli ukucila Leya. Kanshi alundilepo ukubombela Labani na imbi imyaka cine lubali. 
Genesis29:31 Ilyo Yawe amwene ukuti Yakobo tatemenwe Leya, apeele Leya ubufyashi, lelo Rakeli wena ali ŋumba." 
Genesis29:32 Leya epakuba pabukulu apaapa no mwana umwaume. Amwinika ne shina lya Rubeni, pantu asosele ati, “Nico Yawe namona ubulanda bwandi. Nomba umulume wandi cine cine akantemwa.”" 
Genesis29:33 Awe Leya aba nakabili pabukulu, apaapa no mwana umwaume, asosa ati, “Nico Yawe alyumfwa ukuti nshatemwikwa, eico ampeelela umwana na umbi.” Kanshi epakumwinika ishina lya Simeoni." 
Genesis29:34 Leya nakabili aba pabukulu, apaapa no mwana umwaume. Lyena asosa ati, “Nomba ino nshita umulume wandi akansakamana, pantu nimufyalila abana abaume batatu.” Kanshi epakumwinika ishina lya Levi." 
Genesis29:35 Nakabili Leya aba pabukulu, apaapa no mwana umwaume. Elyo asosa ati, “Lino lyena ndelumbanya Yawe.” Kanshi epakwinika umwana ishina lya Yuda. Awe Leya atala aiminina mu bufyashi." 
Genesis30:1 Ilyo Rakeli amwene ukuti tafyalile Yakobo umwana nelyo umo, afimbila nkashimbiye Leya. Kanshi alaeba Yakobo ati, “Mpeela abana, nga teifyo ndi nokufwa!”" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobo asuka amufulilwa, amweba ati, “Bushe ine ndi Lesa uushakupeela bufyashi bwakufyala abana?”" 
Genesis30:3 Elyo Rakeli amweba ati, “Bilua uyu, umusha wandi umwanakashi, usendame nankwe, pakuti akamfyalileko abana, na ine nkakwate abana kuli uyu.”" 
Genesis30:4 Kanshi Rakeli epakubuula Bilua, amupeela kuli Yakobo ukuti abe umukashi wakwe. Yakobo epakusendama na Bilua." 
Genesis30:5 Awe Bilua aba pabukulu, amufyalila no mwana umwaume." 
Genesis30:6 Elyo Rakeli asosa ati, “Lesa nancitila umulinganya. Naumfwa ukupapata kwandi, nampeela no mwana umwaume.” Na pa mulandu wa ici epakumwinika ishina lya Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Nakabili Bilua umusha wakwa Rakeli aba pabukulu, afyalila Yakobo umwana umwaume uwalengele babili." 
Genesis30:8 Rakeli epakusosa ati, “Natulwishanya nganshi na nkashi nandi, no kucimfya nine ncimfishe.” Kanshi epakumwinika ishina lya Naftali." 
Genesis30:9 Ilyo Leya amwene ukuti aleka ukufyala abana, abuula umusha wakwe Silipa, amupeela kuli Yakobo ukuti abe umukashi wakwe." 
Genesis30:10 Elyo Silipa umusha wakwa Leya afyalila Yakobo umwana umwaume. 
Genesis30:11 Leya epakutila, “Yangu we shuko busuma!” Kanshi Leya epakwinika umwana ishina lya Gadi." 
Genesis30:12 Kabili Silipa umusha wakwa Leya epakufyalila Yakobo umwana mwaume uwabubili. 
Genesis30:13 Lyena Leya epakutila, “Yangu ifyo nasansamuka! Abanakashi bakalanjita, insansa.” Kanshi Leya epakumwinika ishina lya Asheri." 
Genesis30:14 Pa nshita yakuseepa iŋanu, Rubeni aile ku mabala. Ku mabala asangako ifimpusa fya mandarake aletela nyina Leya. Rakeli epakweba Leya ati, “Napapata mpeelako tumishila twa mandarake tumo twa mwana obe.”" 
Genesis30:15 Lelo Leya amwasuka ati, “Bushe ukumpoka umulume wandi kwalicepa icakuti ulefwaya upoke na mandarake wa mwana wandi?” Rakeli epakusosa ati, “Cisuma nga wampeelako mandarake wa mwana obe, ninshi lelo ubushiku kuti wasendama na Yakobo.”" 
Genesis30:16 Kanshi icungulo ilyo Yakobo abwela ku mabala, Leya aya kukumukumanya, amweba ati, “Lelo uleisa sendama na ine. Ine nindipila pali iwe na mandarake wa mwana wandi.” Kanshi Yakobo nao epakusendama na Leya ubo bushiku." 
Genesis30:17 Lesa nao aumfwa imipapatile yakwa Leya. Leya epakuba pabukulu, afyalila na Yakobo umwana umwaume uwalengele basano." 
Genesis30:18 Elyo Leya asosa ati, “Lesa anambula pakupeela umusha wandi ku mulume wandi.” Kanshi Leya epakwinika umwana ishina lya Isaka." 
Genesis30:19 Leya nakabili aisa ba pabukulu, afyalila na Yakobo umwana umwaume uwalengele mutanda." 
Genesis30:20 Leya epakusosa ati, “Lesa nampeela ubupe ubukankala. Ili lyena umulume wandi akulancindika, pantu nimufyalila abana abaume mutanda.” Kanshi Leya epakwinika umwana ishina lya Sebuloni." 
Genesis30:21 Panuma Leya afyele umwana umwanakashi, wena amwinika ishina lya Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Elyo Lesa aibukisha Rakeli, aumfwa nefyo alepapata, epakumupeela ubufyashi." 
Genesis30:23 Rakeli aba pabukulu, apaapa no mwana umwaume, epakusosa ati, “Lesa namfumya insoni pa mubili.”" 
Genesis30:24 Kanshi Rakeli epakwinika umwana ishina lya Yosefu. Kabili asosa nokuti, “Cawama nga Yawe enganundilapo umwana umwaume na umbi.”" 
Genesis30:25 Panuma Rakeli afyele Yosefu, Yakobo aebele Labani ati, “Nomba lekeni ndeya, mbwelelemo ku calo kumwesu." 
Genesis30:26 Mpeeleni abakashi bandi na bana, pantu ni pa mulandu wa aba bantu eco nalemubombela. Kanshi lekenifye ndeya. Namwishiba imilimo namubombela.”" 
Genesis30:27 Lelo Labani aebele Yakobo ati, “Nga cingamusekesha, namupapata mwikale kuno kwine. Ni mukupendula emo naishibila ukuti Yawe alimpaala pa mulandu wa iwe.”" 
Genesis30:28 Elyo Labani alundapo nokuti, “Iwe njebafye amalipilo ulefwaya, na ine nalakulipila.”" 
Genesis30:29 Yakobo amweba ati, “Imwe namwishiba imilimo namubombela, nefyo ifitekwa fyenu fisandile ico nine mfisunga." 
Genesis30:30 Ilyo nshilaisa kuno mwakwete ifitekwa ifinono, nomba nafisanda nganshi. Kabili konse uko naleba Yawe alemupaala. Nga nomba ine, ni lilali nkatampa ukubombela aba mu ŋanda yandi?”" 
Genesis30:31 Labani epakwipusha Yakobo ati, “Bushe finshi ndi nokukupeela?” Yakobo amwasuka ati, “Awe mwimpeela nelyo cimo. Lelo nga mwancitila ici cintu cimofye, lyena ndekonkanyapo ukucema ifitekwa fyenu no kulafisunga." 
Genesis30:32 Kanshi lekeni lelo mpite mu fitekwa fyenu fyonse no kufumyamo impaanga shonse isha fisemba nangu isha mabala, utwana twa mpaanga tonse utwafiita, ne mbushi shonse isha mabala nangu isha fisemba, efili nokuba amalipilo yandi." 
Genesis30:33 No bufumacumi bwandi bukamonekela kuntanshi, ilyo lyonse mukalaisa mukupituluka mu malipilo mwandipila. Imbushi yonse iyo nkakwata nga taili na fisemba nelyo amabala nangu akana ka mpaanga konse akashili kafiita ninshi kuti mwatila fyaibwafye.”" 
Genesis30:34 Labani asuminisha ati, “Cisuma natulecita ifyo fine walanda.”" 
Genesis30:35 Ubo bwine bushiku, Labani wena afumyapo imbushi shonse ishilume isha mindoloshi nangu isha mabala, imbushi shonse ishikota isha fisemba nangu isha mabala (shonse ishakwete ifisemba fyabuuta), elyo no twana twa mpaanga tonse utwafiita. Apeela na bana bakwe abaume ukuti ebo baleshisunga." 
Genesis30:36 Elyo ashitalusha kuli Yakobo ubulendo bwa nshiku shitatu. Mu nshiku isho Yakobo wena ashele alecema ifitekwa fyakwa Labani fyonse ifyashelepo. 
Genesis30:37 Elyo Yakobo abuulile imisambo ibishi iya muti wa popula, uwa alumondi no wa pulane. Asukulako ifipapa fya misambo apangamo ifisemba ifyabuuta no kusha icimuti ca mukati cilemoneka. Kanshi imisambo yalamoneka iya fisemba ifyabuuta." 
Genesis30:38 Elyo Yakobo abika iyi misambo asukwileko mu milimba pakuti fibe intanshi ilyo ifitekwa fileisa kukunwa amenshi. Alecita ifyo pantu ni pakwisa kukunwa amenshi elyo ishilume shaletamfya ishikota. 
Genesis30:39 Kanshi ico ifitekwa fyaletamfya pantanshi ya misambo iyo asukwileko, epakulafyala utwana utwa mindoloshi nangu utwa fisemba nangu utwa mabala." 
Genesis30:40 Elyo Yakobo apatulapo utwana twa mpaanga twaba tweka, lelo alenga ishashele shonse shiloleshanye ne mpaanga shakwa Labani isha mindoloshi ne shafiita. Mukucita ifi alesunga ifitekwa fyakwe fyeka, kabili taleleka ukuti fisankane ne fyakwa Labani." 
Genesis30:41 Ilyo lyonse ifitekwa filume ifyatuuluka fyaletamfya ifitekwa ifikota ifyatuuluka, Yakobo alebika imisambo ya fisemba mu milimba pantanshi ya fitekwa ilyo filetamfiwa, pakuti fitamfiwe ilyo fili mu mupepi ne misambo ya fisemba" 
Genesis30:42 Lelo nga fitekwa ifyanakuka, awe lyena Yakobo talebika misambo mu milimba. Kanshi mukucita ifyo, Labani akwatafye ifitekwa ifyanakuka, elyo Yakobo wena ifyatuuluka." 
Genesis30:43 Ni muli uyu musango Yakobo asukile aba umukankala nganshi. Akwata imikuni ikalamba iya fitekwa, ababomfi abaume na banakashi, ingamila na bapunda." 
Genesis31:1 Yakobo aumfwile ukuti bamwana Labani balesosa abati, “Yakobo nabuula ifyuma fyonse shifwe akwete. Kabili ubukankala buntu akwete, abufumishe ku fintu fyakwa shifwe.”" 
Genesis31:2 Elyo Yakobo amona ukuti Labani talemulolesha bwino nga kale. 
Genesis31:3 Yawe epakweba Yakobo ati, “Bwelelamo ku calo ca fikolwe fyobe na ba mu lupwa lobe, elyo na ine nakulaba na iwe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Kanshi Yakobo atumine amashiwi kuli Rakeli na Leya ukuti bese mu mpanga ukwali ifitekwa fyakwe. 
Genesis31:5 Elyo abeba ati, “Nimona ukuti bawiso tabandolesha bwino nga filya cali kale. Lelo Lesa wa batata aba na ine." 
Genesis31:6 Imwe namwishiba ukuti nalibombela bawiso na maka yandi yonse," 
Genesis31:7 lelo bawiso balincenjesha pakwalula amalipilo yandi imiku ikumi. Lelo Lesa tabaleka ukuti bancitile icakungonawila umutende. 
Genesis31:8 Nga cakuti basosa abati, ‘Ifitekwa ifya mabala efikaba amalipilo yobe, lyena ninshi ifitekwa fyonse fyalafyala utwana utwa mabala.’ Kabili nga cakuti basosa abati, ‘Ifitekwa fya mindoloshi efikaba amalipilo yobe,’ nalyo ninshi ifitekwa fyonse fyalafyala utwana utwa mindoloshi." 
Genesis31:9 Kanshi Lesa napokolola bawiso ifitekwa, nomba afipeele kuli ine." 
Genesis31:10 “Pa nshita inama shitamfyanya, limo nalilotele iciloto. Muli ici ciloto namwene ukuti basawe baletamfya bali aba mindoloshi, bamo aba fisemba, bambi nabo abamabala." 
Genesis31:11 Kabili muli ici ciloto malaika wakwa Lesa anjeba ati, ‘Yakobo!’ Na ine nayasuka nati, ‘Epo ndi.’" 
Genesis31:12 Malaika epakunjeba ati, ‘Inuna amenso, mona basawe bonse abaletamfya, bamo ba mindoloshi, bamo ba fisemba, elyo bambi ba mabala. Ncitile ifi pantu nalimona ifyo Labani akucitila." 
Genesis31:13 Nine Lesa uwakumonekele ku Betele, kulya waimike ilibwe waitilapo amafuta, elyo wandaya ne cilayo. Kanshi nomba fuma muli cino calo bwangu, ubwelele ku calo kumwenu.’”" 
Genesis31:14 Elyo Rakeli na Leya bamwaswike abati, “Bushe ifwe tucili natukwata ifyakupokako pa fyuma fya cishilano fya batata?" 
Genesis31:15 Bushe ifwe tata tatumonafye nga benafyalo? Alitushitishafye kabili alilya ne mpango apokele pali ifwe. 
Genesis31:16 Cine cine ifyuma Lesa apoka batata, nomba fyuma fyesu na bana besu. Eico citafye ifyo Lesa akwebele.”" 
Genesis31:17 Elyo Yakobo aninika abakashi bakwe na bamwane pa ngamila," 
Genesis31:18 atangisha pantanshi ifitekwa fyakwe fyonse, pamo pene ne fyuma fyonse anonkele mu Padani Aramu, epakulabwelelamo kuli wishi Isaki mu calo ca Kenani." 
Genesis31:19 Ilyo Labani aile kukubeya impaanga, Rakeli ashele aiba utulubi utwali e milungu yakwa wishi iya pa ŋanda yakwe." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo nao acenjelela Labani umwina Aramu, afyuka ukwabula ukumwebako." 
Genesis31:21 Kanshi afyukile asenda ne fintu fyonse ifyo akwete, ayabuka no mumana wa Yufurate, alungama ku calo ca mpili isha mu Gileadi." 
Genesis31:22 Pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu baisa eba Labani ukuti Yakobo alifyuka. 
Genesis31:23 Labani epakusenda ba lupwa lwakwe, bakonka Yakobo pa nshiku cine lubali, bamusanga mu calo ca mpili isha mu Gileadi." 
Genesis31:24 Elyo ubushiku, Lesa amonekela Labani umwina Aramu mu ciloto, amweba ati, “Ucenjele, wiesha kulanda kuli Yakobo nelyo cimo, icisuma nangu icibi.”" 
Genesis31:25 Labani asangile Yakobo ninshi acita inkambi mu calo ca mpili sha mu Gileadi. Elyo Labani na ba lupwa lwakwe nabo bacita inkambi uko kwine. 
Genesis31:26 Labani epakweba Yakobo ati, “Bushe cinshi ucitile ifi? Walincenjesha, kabili wasenda na bana bandi abanakashi kwati ni bankole ba mu nkondo." 
Genesis31:27 Bushe cinshi wafyukile mu bumfisolo no kuncenjesha wancenjesha? Bushe cinshi ushanjebeleko? Ala nga nalikufishapo ne nsansa, tuleimba no kulisha insombo na maseese." 
Genesis31:28 Tawalekele nokuti ntomone abeshikulu bandi na bana bandi abanakashi pakubafishapo. Tamwali mano muco wacitile. 
Genesis31:29 Ine ninkwata amaka yakukucitapo cimo icibi, lelo Lesa wakwa wiso anjebele ubushiku ati, ‘Ucenjele, wiesha kulanda kuli Yakobo nelyo cimo, icisuma nelyo icibi.’" 
Genesis31:30 Kwena ico ufumineko nico walefuluka ukubwelela ku ŋanda yakwa wiso. Nomba cinshi waibile imilungu yandi?” 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo ayasuka Labani ati, “Nali no mwenso, pantu naletontonkanya ukuti limbi kuti mwampoka abana benu abanakashi ku makafye." 
Genesis31:32 Lelo nga cakuti mwasanga umo ali ne milungu yenu, wena wakwipayafye. Kanshi fwayeni mwe bene pa cinso ca ba lupwa lwesu nga palipo icintu cenu cimo ico nsendele. Elyo nga epo cili, mucibuule.” Yakobo taishibe ukuti ni Rakeli ewaibile imilungu yakwa Labani." 
Genesis31:33 Kanshi Labani epakuya mwitenti lyakwa Yakobo, na mwitenti lyakwa Leya, na mwitenti lya basha banakashi babili, lelo monse tatusangilemo iyoo. Ilyo afuma mwitenti lyakwa Leya, elyo aingila mwiteni lyakwa Rakeli." 
Genesis31:34 Kanshi Rakeli ninshi nafumya tulubi ele tubika mu cakwikalapo pa ngamila kabili no kwikala ninshi epo ekele. Labani afwaya mu fipe fyonsefye, awe nokuti atusange nakalya." 
Genesis31:35 Elyo Rakeli aebele wishi ati, “Mukwai mwimfulilwa ico nafilwa ukwiminina pa cinso cenu, ala nico ndi kumpepo.” Labani wena abikapofye ukulafwaya, lelo nokuti asange imilungu yakwe nakalya." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobo afulwa, alaebaula Labani. Aipusha Labani ati, “Bushe mulandu nshi nacita? Bushe bubifi nshi nacita pakuti mulenunga nge nama?" 
Genesis31:37 Nomba apo mwafwaya mu fipe fyandi fyonse, bushe cipe cenu nshi musangilemo? Cibikeni pa cinso ca ba lupwa lwenu na ba lupwa lwandi uleke bapingule pali ifwe babili." 
Genesis31:38 Twikele nenu imyaka amakumi yabili (20). Impaanga shenu ishikota ne mbushi shenu ishikota tashaleponya mafumo, kabili nshalilepo sukusuku nangu sawe nelyo umo pa mikuni yenu." 
Genesis31:39 Ilyo ifiswango fyaleipayapo icitekwa cenu cimo, nshaleleta iyo nama ifwile kuli imwe, lelo nalepyanikishapofye icitekwa candi ne mwine. Kabili mwalenjeba no kufutilapo inama abantu baleiba akasuba nangu ubushiku." 
Genesis31:40 Kanshi akasuba nalepya ku cipuki, elyo ubushiku kututumafye ku mpepo ukwabula ukumona utulo. Ifi efyali ubumi bwandi." 
Genesis31:41 Pa myaka yonse iyi amakumi yabili (20) twaikele na imwe, efyo ubumi bwandi bwali. Namubombele imyaka ikumi limo na ine (14) pa bana benu abanakashi babili. Kabili namucemene ifitekwa fyenu pa myaka mutanda (6), lelo mwabikilepofye ukwalula amalipilo yandi imiku ikumi limo." 
Genesis31:42 Ukwabula ukuti Lesa wakwa tata, Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Lesa uo tata Isaki atiina, abe na ine, awe ukwabula no kutwishika, nga mwantamfyafye nja iminwe nkutwa. Lelo Lesa alimona ifyo nacula nefyo nabombesha na maboko yandi, eico lelo ubushiku acimukalipilila.”" 
Genesis31:43 Labani ayasuka Yakobo ati, “Aba banakashi bana bandi, abana nabo bana bandi, elyo ne fitekwa fine nafyo fitekwa fyandi. Fyonse ifi ulemona fyandi. Nomba kwena finshi lelo ningacitila abana bandi nangu aba bana bafyala?" 
Genesis31:44 Ale nomba, iwe na ine natucite icipangano pakuti cibe e cakushinina pakati kesu.”" 
Genesis31:45 Elyo Yakobo abuula ilibwe aliminika pakuti libe icakwibukishishako. 
Genesis31:46 Kabili aeba ba lupwa lwakwe ati, “Longanyeni amabwe,” nabo babuula amabwe bayatulika umwina. Elyo balya icakulya mupepi no mwina wa mabwe." 
Genesis31:47 Labani awinika ishina lya Yega Saduta, Yakobo wena awinika ishina lya Galedi." 
Genesis31:48 Elyo Labani asosa ati, “Uyu mwina wa mabwe ewaba lelo icakutushinina iwe na ine.” Kanshi eico uyu mwina waleitilwa Galedi." 
Genesis31:49 Kabili apa pene paleitwa Misipa pantu Labani asosele ati, “Yawe engalatubebeta, iwe na ine ilyo tukaleka ukwikala pamo." 
Genesis31:50 Elyo kabili nga walacusha abana banakashi bandi nangu waupilapo abanakashi na bambi, nangu tapali umbi na ifwe, uli nokwibukisha ukuti kambone wesu pali iwe na ine ni Lesa.”" 
Genesis31:51 Labani alundapo ukweba Yakobo nokuti, “Mona umwina wa mabwe, mona ne libwe ili, ifi njiminike pakati ka iwe na ine." 
Genesis31:52 Uyu mwina wa mabwe e kambone ne libwe ili e kambone ukuti ine nshakacile uyu mwina ukwisa uko uli kukukucusha, elyo na iwe tawakacile uyu mwina neli libwe ukwisa uko ndi kukuncusha." 
Genesis31:53 Lesa wakwa Abrahamu na Lesa wakwa Naho, Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo akatupingule ifwe bonse babili.” Yakobo nao epakulapa mwishina lyakwa Lesa uo wishi Isaki atiina." 
Genesis31:54 Yakobo atuula ne lambo kulya kwine ku calo ca mpili, kabili aitako na ba lupwa lwakwe ku mitebeto. Panuma yakulya, basendama uko kwine ubo bushiku." 
Genesis31:55 Lucelocelo cilya bwaca, Labani atomona abeshikulu bakwe na bamwane pakubashalikapo, kabili abapaala elyo aima, abwelelamo na kumwakwe." 
Genesis32:1 Yakobo nao alimine ukuya noko alungeme. Elyo bamalaika bakwa Lesa bamukumanya. 
Genesis32:2 Ilyo abamona, asosa ati, “Iyi e nkambi ya fita fyakwa Lesa.” Kanshi epakwinika iyo ncende ishina lya Mahanaimu." 
Genesis32:3 Yakobo atangisha inkombe kuli Esau munyina mu mpanga ya Seiri, mu calo ca Edomu." 
Genesis32:4 Ashikonkomesha ati, “Ifi efyo muli nokulanda kuli shikulu Esau amuti, ‘Umubomfi obe Yakobo asosa ukuti, naleikala na Labani ngo mweni, kabili ili lyonse ukufika na nomba eko naleikala." 
Genesis32:5 Nalikwata iŋombe na bapunda, impaanga ne mbushi, abasha abaume na banakashi. Kanshi natuma aya mashiwi kuli iwe shikulu wandi, pakuti unsekelele bwino.’”" 
Genesis32:6 Ilyo inkombe shabwelele kuli Yakobo shasosa ashiti, “Twaile fika kuli munonko Esau. Kabili alifye mu nshila mukwisa kukumanya, ali na baume imyanda ine (400).”" 
Genesis32:7 Yakobo umwenso wamwikata, kabili asakamana. Kanshi ayakanya abantu mu mabumba yabili, impaanga ne mbushi ne ŋombe ne ngamila nasho acita ifyo fine." 
Genesis32:8 Yakobo aletontonkanya ukuti, “Nga cakuti Esau aisa lwisha ibumba limo, ninshi ibumba libiye kuti lyapusuka.”" 
Genesis32:9 Elyo Yakobo apepele ati, “We Lesa wakwa tata Abrahamu, we Lesa wakwa tata Isaki, we Yawe we wanjebele auti, ‘Bwelelamo ku calo kumwenu, na kuli ba lupwa lobe, ine nkamona ukuti fyonse fyakuwamina.’" 
Genesis32:10 Ine nshilingile uluse lonse ulu wankwatile, no bufumacumi bonse ubo walanga ku mubomfi obe. Ilyo nayabwike uyu mumana wa Yordani, nalifye ne nkonto epela, lelo nomba ndi na mabumba yabili." 
Genesis32:11 Napapata, wingampususha kuli munyinane Esau. Pantu ine ndetiina, kuti aisa ndwisha, elyo aipaya banyina na bana babo." 
Genesis32:12 Lelo walandile auti, ‘Ine nkamona ukuti fyonse fyakuwamina, elyo nkalenga nokuti aba mu lupwa lobe bakabe kwati musensenga wa kuli bemba, uo umuntu ashingapenda.’”" 
Genesis32:13 Yakobo ubo bushiku alele pali iyo ine ncende. Elyo pa fintu akwete, asalapo fimo ifyakupeela Esau munyina." 
Genesis32:14 Abuulapo imbushi shikota imyanda ibili (200) na basawe amakumi yabili (20), impaanga ishikota imyanda ibili (200) na basukusuku amakumi yabili (20)," 
Genesis32:15 ingamila ishaleonsha no twana twashiko amakumi yatatu (30), iŋombe ishikota amakumi yane (40) na bacilume wa ŋombe ikumi limo, elyo na bapunda abakota amakumi yabili (20) na bapunda abalume nabo ikumi limo." 
Genesis32:16 Elyo abikako ababomfi bakwe abakusunga cila mukuni. Kabili abeba ati, “Imwe tangileniko, muleshapo incende pakati ka mukuni umo no mukuni ubiye.”" 
Genesis32:17 Akonkomesha no mubomfi wali pantanshi ati, “Ilyo Esau munyinane akukumanya, akwipusha nokuti, ‘Bushe iwe uli muntu wakwa ani? Ni kwi uleya? Bushe nani umwine ishi nama shili pantanshi yobe?’" 
Genesis32:18 Elyo uli nokusosa auti, ‘Ishi ni nama sha mubomfi obe Yakobo. Ishi nama e bupe atuma kuli iwe, we mfumu yandi Esau, kabili ali panuma aleisa.’”" 
Genesis32:19 Efyo akonkomesha no mubomfi wabubili no wabutatu na bonse bambi abalecema imikuni ya fitekwa ati, “Muli nokulanda amashiwi yamo yene kuli Esau, ilyo mwamukumanya." 
Genesis32:20 Kabili mushininkishe ukusosa amuti, ‘Umubomfi obe Yakobo ali panuma yesu aleisa.’” Pantu Yakobo aletontonkanya ukuti, “Ku bupe ubu ndetangisha, nkamunasha ku mutima. Elyo kuntanshi ilyo tukamonana nankwe, lyena nalimo kuti ampokelela.”" 
Genesis32:21 Kanshi ubupe bwakwa Yakobo epakutangila, lelo umwine ashala asendama ubo bushiku mu nkambi." 
Genesis32:22 Ubo bwine bushiku Yakobo aima, abuula abakashi bakwe babili, abasha bakwe abanakashi babili na bana bakwe abaume ikumi limo na umo (11), elyo ayabuka umumana wa Yaboku." 
Genesis32:23 Aleka bonse bayabuka umumana, panuma elyo ayabusha ifintu fyonse ifyo akwete." 
Genesis32:24 Kanshi Yakobo epakushala eka. Elyo bashashala no muntu mpakafye na ku macaca. 
Genesis32:25 Ilyo uyo muntu amona ukuti teti anshe Yakobo, uyo muntu epakuma Yakobo pa mfyufyu ya lutungu, awe no lutungu lwafyutuka ninshi bacili balelwishanya." 
Genesis32:26 Elyo uyo muntu aebele Yakobo ati, “Leka ndeya, pantu nomba caba ku macaca.” Lelo Yakobo amwasuka ati, “Awe nshakuleke uye, kano ninshi ushe wampaala.”" 
Genesis32:27 Uyo muntu aipusha Yakobo ati, “Bushe ishina lyobe niwe ani?” Yakobo ayasuka ati, “Nine Yakobo.”" 
Genesis32:28 Elyo uyo muntu asosa ati, “Nomba tawakulaitwa ishina lya Yakobo, lelo Israeli, pantu naulwishanyana na Lesa na bantu, kabili naubansha.”" 
Genesis32:29 Yakobo amweba ati, “Napapata njebako ishina lyobe.” Nao amwasuka ati, “Cinshi uleipushisha ishina lyandi?” Awe apopene apaala na Yakobo." 
Genesis32:30 Kanshi Yakobo epakwinika iyo ncende ishina lya Penieli. Asosa ati, “Pantu natushimpana na Lesa amenso, elyo kabili ncili umumi.”" 
Genesis32:31 Yakobo afumine pa Penieli cilya akasuba kasansuka, kabili alesunta pakwenda ku mulandu wa lutungu lwakwe." 
Genesis32:32 Kanshi ukufika na lelo abena Israeli tabalya mushipa washinta mu mfyufyu ya lutungu, pantu ni pa mushipa wa mfyufyu ya lutungu epo Yakobo auminwe." 
Genesis33:1 Ilyo Yakobo ainwine amenso, amwene Esau aleisa ali na bantu bakwe imyanda ine (400). Kanshi Yakobo epakupatulula abana. Bamo abatwala kuli Leya, bambi kuli Rakeli na ku basha bakwe abanakashi babili." 
Genesis33:2 Abika abasha bakwe abanakashi na bana babo pantanshi, elyo akonkeshapo Leya na bamwane, elyo Rakeli na Yosefu bena panuma." 
Genesis33:3 Yakobo umwine ena abatangilila bonse. Cilya aya alepalama kuli munyina, afukama no kukontamina panshi imiku cine lubali (7)." 
Genesis33:4 Lelo Esau abutuka ulubilo kukumanya munyina. Amufukatila kabili amukumbatila no kumutomona pakumuposha. Na bonse babili balalila. 
Genesis33:5 Elyo Esau ainuna amenso amona abanakashi na bana babo, aipusha Yakobo ati, “Nga aba muli nabo ni bani?” Yakobo ayasuka ati, “Aba, bana abo Lesa, ku luse lwakwe, apeela umubomfi obe.”" 
Genesis33:6 Elyo abasha banakashi babili na bana babo bapalama kuli Esau, bakontamina panshi." 
Genesis33:7 Elyo pakonka Leya na bamwane, nabo baisa mufukamina no kukontamina panshi. Pakulekelesha Yosefu na Rakeli nabo baisa fukamina Esau no kukontamina panshi." 
Genesis33:8 Elyo Esau aipwishe Yakobo ati, “Bushe cinshi ulefwaya ukucita ne mikuni ya fitekwa filya nkumenye?” Yakobo amwasuka ati, “Ala shikulu ndefwaya ukuti munsekelele.”" 
Genesis33:9 Lelo Esau amweba ati, “Awe munyinane ine nalikwata ifitekwa ifingi. Iwe sungafye ifitekwa fyobe.”" 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo nao ati, “Iyoo, napapata, nga cakuti naunsekelela, poka ubupe bwandi. Pantu ine, pakumona impumi yobe, cili kwati ndemona impumi yakwa Lesa, pali ifi wampokelela bwino." 
Genesis33:11 Kanshi napapata pokelela ubupe bakuletele, pantu Lesa ku luse lwakwe alimpeela fyonse ifyo nkabila.” Elyo Yakobo abikapofye ukupapata, asuka Esau apoka ubupe." 
Genesis33:12 Elyo Esau asosa ati, “Ale kanshi natutampeko ubulendo bwesu, twalaendela pamo.”" 
Genesis33:13 Lelo Yakobo amweba ati, “Shikulu nawishiba ukuti abana tabalakosa, kabili ine nine ndi nokusunga impaanga, imbushi ne ŋombe ishileonsha utwana. Elyo nga cakuti bashensha lunkwa lunkwa akasuba konse nangufye pa bushiku bumo, inama shonse ninshi shikafwa." 
Genesis33:14 Kanshi shikulu, natangilekofye, na ine ne mubomfi wenu nakulaisa buce buce ukulingana napo ifitekwa fili pantanshi na bana bandi bakulaendela, mpaka nkese fika kuli iwe shikulu ku Seiri.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau epakusosa ati, “Kanshi leka nkushileko abantu bamo abakwenda nabo.” Yakobo ayasuka ati, “Nga ico ulecitila ifyo cinshi? Ine ico ndefwayafye cakuti iwe shikulu unsekelele.”" 
Genesis33:16 Kanshi pali ubo bwine bushiku, Esau aima abwelelamo ku Seiri." 
Genesis33:17 Lelo Yakobo wena aya ku Sukoti, eko aikuulila iŋanda, kabili akuulako ne misakuta umwakwikala ifitekwa fyakwe. Kanshi eco betila ilya ncende Sukoti." 
Genesis33:18 Panuma ilyo Yakobo abwelele ukufuma ku Padani Aramu, afikilefye umutende ku musumba wa Shekemu mu calo ca Kenani. Acita ne nkambi mupepi no musumba." 
Genesis33:19 Iyi mpanga acitilepo inkambi ashitile pa ndalama isha silifa umwanda umo (100) kuli bamwana Hamori wishi wakwa Shekemu. 
Genesis33:20 Muli iyi ncende, emo akuula ubulambo, abwinika ne shina lya Eli Elohe Israeli." 
Genesis34:1 Nomba Dina umwana umukashana uo Yakobo afyele muli Leya, aile alepempula abanakashi ba muli cilya calo." 
Genesis34:2 Shekemu mwana Hamori umwina Hifi uwaleteeka iyo ncende, ati amone umukashana amwikata, alala nankwe ku makafye." 
Genesis34:3 Kanshi umutima wakwa Shekemu walifye pali Dina mwana Yakobo. Atemwa nganshi umukashana, kabili alalanda nankwe amashiwi yakumunashanasha." 
Genesis34:4 Elyo Shekemu aebele wishi Hamori ati, “Tata mbuulileniko uyu mukashana ukuba umukashi wandi.”" 
Genesis34:5 Ilyo Yakobo aumfwile ukuti mwane Dina nabamubifya, bamwane abaume bali mu mpanga balecema ifitekwa, kanshi tacitilepo nelyo cimo mpaka ilyo babwelele ku mushi." 
Genesis34:6 Elyo Hamori wishi wakwa Shekemu afumine kukuya landa na Yakobo. 
Genesis34:7 Nomba bamwana Yakobo ilyo baumfwile ifyacitike, apopenefye bafuma mu mpanga babwela. Baumfwile ubulanda nganshi no kufulwa apakalamba, pantu Shekemu acitile icintu icamusebanya nganshi ku bena Israeli pakulala no mwana umwanakashi wakwa Yakobo. Acitile icintu icishifwile kucitika." 
Genesis34:8 Lelo Hamori abeba ati, “Umwana wandi Shekemu aposele umutima wakwe pa mwana wenu umukashana. Ndemupapata mupeeni umukashana abe umukashi wakwe." 
Genesis34:9 Lekenifye tuleupana. Imwe muleufya abana benu abanakashi kuli ifwe, na ifwe tuleufya abana besu abanakashi kuli imwe." 
Genesis34:10 Kuti mwaikala na ifwe konse uko mulefwaya muli cino calo. Muleikalamo kabili kuti mwakwata ne cuma pamo ne mpanga.” 
Genesis34:11 Elyo Shekemu aebele wishi kwa Dina na bandume yakwe ati, “Nga cingamusekesha, ine nkamupeela conse ico mukalomba." 
Genesis34:12 Mpingwilenifye impango pa mukashana, elyo no bukulu bwa bupe ndi nokuleta apo mutemenwe. Ine fyonse ifyo mulenjeba ndelipila, cikulufye mumpeele umukashana abe umukashi wandi.”" 
Genesis34:13 Pa mulandu wakuti Shekemu alibifishe nkashi yabo Dina, bamwana Yakobo bayasuka Shekemu na Hamori wishi mu bucenjeshi." 
Genesis34:14 Babeba abati, “Awe ifwe teti tucite ica musango uyo. Ifwe tekuti tupeele nkashi yesu ku muntu uushasembululwa. Ico kuti caba icamusebanya nganshi kuli ifwe." 
Genesis34:15 Ifwe pakuti twingasumina ukulaupana na imwe, kano bonse abaume benu balasembululwa." 
Genesis34:16 Lyena tukalaufya abakashana besu kuli imwe, na ifwe tukalaupa abakashana benu. Elyo ninshi tukalaikala na imwe, tukabe umutundu umo na imwe." 
Genesis34:17 Lelo nga mwakaana ukusembululwa, ninshi twalasenda nkashi yesu, tuleya.”" 
Genesis34:18 Amashiwi bamwana Yakobo abaume balandile yalisansamwishe Hamori na mwane Shekemu. 
Genesis34:19 Umulumendo wena, bwangu bwangu acita nefyo bamwana Yakobo abaume balandile, pantu alitemenwe umukashana mwana Yakobo. Uyu mulumendo ewacindamishe pali bonse pa ba mu ŋanda yakwa Hamori wishi." 
Genesis34:20 Kanshi Hamori na mwane Shekemu balimine baya na ku mpongolo ya musumba kukushimikila abantu baleikala nabo mu musumba. 
Genesis34:21 Babeba abati, “Aba bantu, baliba bwino kuli ifwe. Natubaleke bekale mu calo cesu no kukwatamo icuma, pantu icalo cesu cikulu. Elyo kuti twalaupa abana babo abanakashi nabo balaupa abana besu abanakashi." 
Genesis34:22 Lelo aba bantu bakasuminisha ukuti tuleikala nabo ngo mutundu umo, kulila abaume besu bonse basembululwa nga filya bena basembululwa." 
Genesis34:23 Bushe ninshi ifitekwa fyabo, ifyuma fyabo ne nama shabo shonse, tafikaba fintu fyesu fyonse? Kanshi natusuminishanye nabo, lyena bakulaikala na ifwe.”" 
Genesis34:24 Awe abaume bonse aba mu musumba basuminisha Hamori na mwane Shekemu, na baume bonse aba mu musumba basembululwa no kusembululwa." 
Genesis34:25 Ilyo papitile inshiku shitatu, ninshi abaume bacili balekalipwa ku filonda fyakusembululwa, abana bakwa Yakobo abaume babili, Simeoni na Levi bandume yakwa Dina, babuula impanga shabo, baingila mu musumba, ninshi aba mu musumba tabenekele iyoo, baipaya na baume bonse." 
Genesis34:26 Baipaya Hamori no mwana wakwe Shekemu ku lupanga. Elyo bafumya Dina mu ŋanda yakwa Shekemu baya no kuya. 
Genesis34:27 Panuma yakwipaya aba bantu, abana bambi abakwa Yakobo baisa tapa umusumba uo babifishemo nkashi yabo." 
Genesis34:28 Basenda impaanga shabo ne mbushi, iŋombe shabo na bapunda, elyo ne fintu fyabo fyonse bakwete mu musumba na mu mabala." 
Genesis34:29 Basendafye ifyuma fyabo fyonse na bakashi babo na bana babo, elyo batapa na fyonse ifyali mu mayanda." 
Genesis34:30 Elyo Yakobo aebele Simeoni na Levi ati, “Imwe, mwandetelelafye. Aba bantu bekala muli cino calo abena Kenani na bena Perisi bakampata nganshi. Ifwe tulifye abampendwa, elyo nga cakuti baikatana pamo, bandwisha, ine na ba mu ŋanda yandi tukaloba.”" 
Genesis34:31 Lelo bamwane, bamwasuka abati, “Bushe bali nokucita nkashi yesu kwati ni cilende?”" 
Genesis35:1 Elyo Lesa aebele Yakobo ati, “Akuya ku Betele eko uye ikala. Kulya kwine eko uli nokukuulila Lesa ubulambo, uwakumonekele ilyo walefulumuka munonko Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Kanshi Yakobo epakweba aba mu ŋanda mumwakwe na bonse abali nankwe ati, “Poseni utulubi twa milungu ya benafyalo uto muli nato, kabili muisangulule, mufwale ne fyakufwala ifisuma." 
Genesis35:3 Elyo twalaima tuninike ukuya ku Betele eko nkaya kuulila Lesa ubulambo. Lesa alengafwako lyonse ilyo nali mu mafya, kabili konse uko naleya aleba na ine.”" 
Genesis35:4 Kanshi nabo epakuleta kuli Yakobo utulubi twabo utwa benafyalo elyo no tumipeto twa ku matwi. Yakobo afishiika mwisamba lya cimuti ca oki ica ku Shekemu. 
Genesis35:5 Elyo batendeka ukuya. Lelo takwali nelyo umo uwakubasupila, pantu umwenso ukufuma kuli Lesa waishile pa bantu abali mu misumba iyabashingulwike." 
Genesis35:6 Yakobo na bantu bonse abali nankwe basuka bafika ku Lusi, e Betele wine mu calo ca Kenani." 
Genesis35:7 Uku kwine eko Yakobo akuula ubulambo. Kabili ainika iyi ncende ishina lya Eli Betele pantu ni pali iyo ine ncende Lesa aisokolwelele kuli ena ilyo alefulumuka kuli munyina Esau. 
Genesis35:8 Elyo Debora umuleshi wakwa Rebeka afwa. Batentemuka bamushiika mwisamba lya cimuti ca oki ica ku Betele. Kanshi epakwinika iyi ncende Aloni Bakuti. 
Genesis35:9 Ilyo Yakobo abwelele ukufuma ku calo ca Padani Aramu, Lesa nakabili alimumonekele, no kupaala alimupaalile." 
Genesis35:10 Lesa amwebele ati, “Ishina lyobe niwe Yakobo, lelo nomba tabakulakwita Yakobo, bakulakwita ishina lya Israeli. ”" 
Genesis35:11 Kanshi Lesa epakumwinika ishina lya Israeli. Kabili Lesa amwebele ati, “Nine Lesa Umwine wa maka yonse. Mube no bufyashi, musanduluke nganshi. Umushobo ne mishobo iyingi ikafuma muli iwe kabili iwe ukafyala ne shamfumu." 
Genesis35:12 Icalo napeele Abrahamu na Isaki, niwe wine napeela, kabili nkacipeela na ku ba mu lupwa lobe abakakukonkapo.”" 
Genesis35:13 Elyo Lesa afumapo, asha Yakobo pa ncende ine iyo alandile nankwe." 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo wena abuulile ilibwe lyakwibukishishako, aliminika pa ncende ine iyo Lesa alandile nankwe. Elyo aitila pa libwe umutuulo wa fyakunwa, kabili aitilapo na mafuta." 
Genesis35:15 Yakobo ainike incende Lesa alandilepo nankwe ishina lya Betele. 
Genesis35:16 Yakobo na bantu ali nabo balifumine ku Betele. Ilyo baile balepalama ku Efulati, Rakeli akomwa ne fumo kabili lyalamucusha nganshi." 
Genesis35:17 Kabili ilyo acili alecula nganshi pakupaapa, nacimbusa aebele Rakeli ati, “Witiina, pantu walapaapa umwana umwaume na umbi.”" 
Genesis35:18 Kanshi ilyo alaleka umweo, pantu ali pakufwa, ainika umwana wakwe ishina lya Beni Oni. Lelo wishi wena amwinike ishina lya Benjamini." 
Genesis35:19 Kanshi Rakeli afwa, bamushiika na mupepi ne nshila ya ku Efulati, e Betelemu wine." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo aiminike pa luputa lwakwa Rakeli ilibwe ilyakwibukishishako. Kabili ukufika na lelo, ili libwe ecakwishibilako uluputa lwakwa Rakeli." 
Genesis35:21 Elyo Israeli akonkenyepo ulwendo lwakwe, acitile inkambi yakwe ukucila pa lupungu lwa Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Ilyo Israeli aleikala muli iyo mpanga, Rubeni aile lala na Bilua umukashi wakwa wishi uo ashaupile mu bwinga. Elyo Israeli alyumfwileko pali uyu mulandu. Bamwana Israeli abaume bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
Genesis35:23 Bamwana Leya, ni Rubeni ibeli lyakwa Yakobo, elyo Simeoni, Levi, Yuda, Isaka, na Sebuloni." 
Genesis35:24 Bamwana Rakeli ni Yosefu na Benjamini. 
Genesis35:25 Bamwana Bilua umusha wakwa Rakeli ni Dani na Naftali. 
Genesis35:26 Bamwana Silipa umusha wakwa Leya, ni Gadi na Asheri. Aba e bana abaume abo Yakobo afyele ilyo ali mu calo ca Padani Aramu." 
Genesis35:27 Kabili Yakobo alimine abwelelamo kumwabo kuli wishi Isaki ku Mamure, mupepi na Kiriati Aba, kabili e Hebuloni wine, uku Abrahamu na Isaki baleikala nga beni." 
Genesis35:28 Isaki aikele umumi pano calo imyaka umwanda umo na makumi cine konse konse (108). 
Genesis35:29 Isaki epakuleka umweo. Afwa nokufwa ninshi ali umukote uwa myaka iyingi, epakuya ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Elyo bamwane abaume Esau na Yakobo bamushiika." 
Genesis36:1 Ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Esau, ishina limbi ni Edomu." 
Genesis36:2 Esau aupile abanakashi abena Kenani. Aupile Ada mwana Eloni umwina Hiti, na Olibama mwana Ane, kabili umwishikulu wakwa Sibeoni umwina Hifi." 
Genesis36:3 Aupile na Basemati mwana Ishimaeli, kabili e nkashimbiye wakwa Nebaiyoti." 
Genesis36:4 Ada afyele kuli Esau, Elifasi. Basemati nao afyele Reueli," 
Genesis36:5 elyo Olibama afyele Yeushi, Yalamu na Kora. Aba e bana abaume Esau afyele mu calo ca Kenani." 
Genesis36:6 Elyo Esau asendele abakashi bakwe, abana abaume na banakashi na bonse aba mu ŋanda mumwakwe, elyo ne fitekwa fyakwe ne nama shonse shimbi ne fintu fyonse anonkele mu calo ca Kenani. Esau epakuya ku calo cimbi icatalwike no kwali Yakobo munyina." 
Genesis36:7 Ifintu bakwete fyalifulishe nganshi icakuti bafilwa ukulaikala pamo. Icalo baleikalamo casuka cacepa ku mulandu wa fitekwa fyabo. 
Genesis36:8 Kanshi Esau, ishina limbi ni Edomu, epakuya ikala mu calo ca mpili isha mu Seiri." 
Genesis36:9 Ulu e lupwa lwakwa Esau, icikolwe ca bena Edomu, abaleikala mu calo ca mpili isha mu Seiri." 
Genesis36:10 Aya e mashina ya bana baume bakwa Esau: Ni Elifasi, umwana umwaume uo Esau afyele mu mukashi wakwe Ada, elyo na Reueli, umwana umwaume uo afyele mu mukashi wakwe Basemati." 
Genesis36:11 Abana abaume abakwa Efasi, ni Temani, Oma, Sefo, Gatamu na Kenasi." 
Genesis36:12 Elifasi mwana Esau alikwetepo no mukashi uo ashaupile mu bwinga, ishina lyakwe ni Timuna umo afyele Amaleki. Aba e beshikulu abaume abakwa Ada muka Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Abana abaume abo Reueli afyele ni Nahati, Sera, Shamaya na Misa. Aba e beshikulu bakwa Basemati muka Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Abana abaume abo Esau afyele mu mukashi wakwe Olibama mwana Ane, kabili mwishikulu wakwa Sibeoni ni Yeushi, Yalamu na Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Aba ebali ifikolwe fya mikowa pa ba mu lupwa lwakwa Esau. Pa bana abaume bakwa Elifasi, ibeli lyakwa Esau, abali fikolwe fya mikowa ni Temani, Oma, Sifo," 
Genesis36:16 Kora, Gatamu na Amaleki. Aba ebali ifikolwe fya mikowa mu lupwa lwakwa Elifasi mu Edomu. Kabili bali beshikulu bakwa Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Pa bana abaume abakwa Reueli mwana Esau, abali fikolwe fya mikowa ni Nahati, Sera, Shamaya na Misa. Aba ebali ifikolwe fya mikowa mu lupwa lwakwa Reueli mu Edomu. Kabili aba bali beshikulu bakwa Basemati muka Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Pa bana abaume abo Esau afyele mu mukashi wakwe Olibama, abali ifikolwe fya mikowa ni Yeushi, Yalamu na Kora. Aba ebali ifikolwe fya mikowa ifya mu lupwa lwakwa Olibama muka Esau, kabili Olibama ali umwana umwanakashi wakwa Ane." 
Genesis36:19 Aba bonse bali ba mu lupwa lwakwa Esau, ishina limbi Edomu, kabili bali e fikolwe fya mikowa yabo." 
Genesis36:20 Aba e bana abaume abakwa Seiri umwina Hori, abaleikala muli cilya calo ni Lotani, Shobali, Sibeoni, Ane," 
Genesis36:21 Dishoni, Eseri na Dishani. Aba bonse ni bamwana Seiri abaleikala mu Edomu, e fikolwe fya mikowa ya bena Hori." 
Genesis36:22 Bamwana Lotani abaume ni Hori na Homamu. Nkashi yakwe ena ali ni Timuna. 
Genesis36:23 Bamwana Shobali abaume bali ni Alifani, Manaati, Ebali, Shefo na Onamu." 
Genesis36:24 Bamwana Sibeoni abaume ni Aia na Ane. Uyu Ane eulya wasangile utumfukumfuku twa menshi yakaba mu matololo ilyo alecema bapunda bakwa Sibeoni wishi. 
Genesis36:25 Bamwana Ane bena ni Dishoni na Olibama umwana mwanakashi wakwa Ane. 
Genesis36:26 Bamwana Dishoni abaume ni Hemudani, Eshibani, Itirani na Kerani." 
Genesis36:27 Bamwana Eseri abaume ni Biluani, Safani na Akani." 
Genesis36:28 Bamwana Dishani abaume ni Usi na Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Elyo abali fikolwe fya mikowa ya bena Hori ni Lotani, Shobali, Sibeoni, Ane," 
Genesis36:30 Dishoni, Eseri na Dishani. Aba bantu e fikolwe fya mikowa yabo ukukonka ifyo bayakanikene mu calo ca Seiri." 
Genesis36:31 Ishi e mfumu ishateekelepo mu calo ca Edomu lintu mu Israeli tamulati mube imfumu nangu imo. 
Genesis36:32 Bela umwana umwaume wakwa Beori ali imfumu mu calo ca Edomu. Ishina lya musumba wakwe ni Dinaba. 
Genesis36:33 Ilyo Bela afwile, Yobabu mwana Sera uwafumine ku Bosira ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
Genesis36:34 Ilyo Yobabu afwile, Hushamu uwafumine ku calo ca bena Temani ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
Genesis36:35 Ilyo Hushamu afwile, Hadadi mwana Bedadi uwacimfishe abena Midiani mu calo ca Moabu ewamupyene pa bufumu. Ainike umusumba wakwe ishina lya Afiti." 
Genesis36:36 Ilyo Hadadi afwile, Samula uwafumine ku Masireka, ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
Genesis36:37 Ilyo Samula afwile, Shauli uwafumine ku Rehoboti umusumba uwali pa mumana ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
Genesis36:38 Ilyo Shauli afwile, Bali Hanani mwana Akibo ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
Genesis36:39 Ilyo Bali Hanani mwana Akibo afwile, Hadadi ewamupyene pa bufumu. Ishina lya musumba wakwe ni Pau. Elyo ishina lya mukashi wakwe ni Metabeli, mwana Matiredi, kabili umwishikulu wakwa Mesabu." 
Genesis36:40 Abali ifikolwe fya mu lupwa lwakwa Esau ukulingana na mashina ya mikowa yabo ne fitungu fyabo ni Timuna, Alifa, Yeteti," 
Genesis36:41 Olibama, Elaya, Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 Kenasi, Temani, Mibisa," 
Genesis36:43 Magidieli na Iramu. Kanshi aba e fikolwe fya mikowa ya mu Edomu ukulingana ne fifulo fyabo mu calo baikelemo. Esau wena e cikolwe ca bena Edomu bonse. 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo wena aleikala mu calo ca Kenani umo wishi aikele ngo mweni kale. 
Genesis37:2 Ubu e butantiko bwa lupwa lwakwa Yakobo. Ilyo Yosefu ali akalumendo aka myaka ikumi limo na cine lubali (17), alecema ifitekwa pamo na bamunyina abaume bamwana Bilua na bamwana Silipa abakashi bakwa wishi. Kabili Yosefu aleisa kukushimikila shibo ifintu ifibi bamunyina balecita." 
Genesis37:3 Israeli alitemenwe Yosefu ukucila pali bamwane abaume bonse pantu amufyele mu bukote. Eico amubilile umwingila uwayemba, kabili uwa maboko ayatali." 
Genesis37:4 Ilyo bamunyina bamwene ukuti eo shibo atemenwe ukucila pali bonse, awe bamupata, kabili tekumusosha ne shiwi lisuma iyoo." 
Genesis37:5 Ubushiku bumo, Yosefu alilotele iciloto. Ilyo ashimikileko bamunyina, awe bena elyo bacilileko ukumupata." 
Genesis37:6 Abebele ati, “Umfweniko iciloto ndotele." 
Genesis37:7 Twaciba tulekaka imyanshi ya ŋanu mwibala. Awe umwanshi wandi waima, waiminina. Elyo imyanshi yenu yashinguluka umwanshi wandi, yawinamina.”" 
Genesis37:8 Bamunyina bamweba abati, “Bushe iwe niwe ukaba imfumu yesu? Bushe iwe niwe ukalatuteeka mwa?” Kanshi bena epakumupata nganshi, pa mulandu wa ciloto cakwe na pafyo alandile." 
Genesis37:9 Nakabili Yosefu alilotelele iciloto ashimikilako na bamunyina. Abeba ati, “Umfweniko, nacilota iciloto na cimbi. Ili lyena akasuba no mweshi ne ntanda ikumi limo na lumo fyacilanjinamina.”" 
Genesis37:10 Ilyo ashimikilako wishi na bamunyina, wishi alamukalipila ati, “Bushe canshi ico ciloto ulotele, bushe cine cine ine na noko na bamunonko, nifwe tukese kukukwinamina?”" 
Genesis37:11 Bamunyina bena bamufimbila, lelo wishi ena aletontonkanyapo lyonse pali uyu mulandu." 
Genesis37:12 Bamunyina kwa Yosefu baile ku Shekemu, eko balecemena ifitekwa fyakwa shibo." 
Genesis37:13 Elyo Israeli aebele Yosefu ati, “Nawishiba ukuti bamunonko balecemena ifitekwa mupepi na ku Shekemu. Kanshi isa nkutumeko.” Yosefu nao ayasuka ati, “epo ndi.”" 
Genesis37:14 Israeli amweba ati, “Kanshi kabiyeko uye mona nga bamunonko bali umutende ne fitekwa nga fili bwino, elyo ukabwele ukese nshimikilako.” Israeli ali mwishika lya Hebuloni ilyo amutumine. Awe Yosefu asukile afika ku Shekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Umuntu umo amusanga alelulumba mu mabala. Uyo muntu amwipusha ati, “Bushe finshi ulefwaya?”" 
Genesis37:16 Yosefu amwasuka ati, “Ni bamunyinane ebo ndefwaya. Bushe kuti mwanjebako uko balecemena ifitekwa?”" 
Genesis37:17 Umuntu ayasuka ati, “Kuno balifumako. Naumfwile balesosa abati, ‘Natuleya ku Dotani.’” Kanshi Yosefu epakuya ukwaile bamunyina, abasanga na ku Dotani." 
Genesis37:18 Awe bamumona akatalamukila ilyo talati afike apo bali, bapangana ukumwipaya." 
Genesis37:19 Balaebana abati, “Ala kalota wa filoto ulya aleisa." 
Genesis37:20 Aleni natumwipaye, tumupose na mu cilindi cimo pali ifi, elyo tukalande ukuti, ciswango e camulile. Lyena tukamona ifyo ifiloto fyakwe fikatumbula.”" 
Genesis37:21 Ilyo Rubeni aumfwile ifi, aesha ukupususha Yosefu kuli bamunyina. Abeba ati, “Awe ukumwipaya kwena iyoo." 
Genesis37:22 Twilofya bumi bwakwe. Muposenifye mu cilindi ici kuno mu matololo, lelo mwimucita cibi nelyo cimo.” Rubeni ico asosele ifyo, nico alefwaya ukumupusushako, elyo amubweseshe kuli wishi." 
Genesis37:23 Kanshi cilya Yosefu afika kuli bamunyina, bamufuula umwingila uwayemba kabili uwa maboko ayatali uo afwele." 
Genesis37:24 Elyo bamusenda baya muposa mu cilindi. Ico cilindi cali icauma, tamwali amenshi." 
Genesis37:25 Ilyo baikele balelya icakulya, elyo bamona ibumba lya bena Ishimaeli abamakwebo balefuma ku Gileadi. Ingamila shabo shasendele ifipe ifyafina umwali ifinyamuti ifyanunka ubusaka, amafuta yakupangilako umuti, elyo ne finyamuti ifyanunka ubusaka muri ifyo balefitwala ku Egupto." 
Genesis37:26 Yuda epakweba bamunyina ati, “Finshi tukamwenamo nga twaipaya munyinefwe, twafisa nokuti natumwipaya?" 
Genesis37:27 Kanshi natumushitishefye ku bena Ishimaeli, twimucita cibi nelyo cimo, kabili kwena ni munyinefwe, mulopa wesu.” Awe bamunyina bamusuminisha." 
Genesis37:28 Kanshi cilya abena Midiani abamakwebo balepita, bamunyina bafumya Yosefu mu cilindi, bamushitisha pa ndalama sha silifa amashekeli amakumi yabili (20) ku bena Ishimaeli, nabo epakumusenda ku Egupto." 
Genesis37:29 Ilyo Rubeni abwelelemo ku cilindi asanga ukuti Yosefu talimo. Kanshi alepaula insalu shakwe.
