Genesis37:30 Elyo abwelelamo kuli bamunyina abeba ati, “Umwaice talimo mu cilindi! Bushe ine ndecita shani?”" 
Genesis37:31 Elyo baipaya imbushi, babuula no mwingila wakwa Yosefu, batumpika na mu mulopa." 
Genesis37:32 Babuula umwingila uwayemba uwa maboko ayatali bautwala kuli shibo. Bamweba abati, “Natusanga uyu mwingila. Ceceteni mumone nga mwingila wa mwana wenu?”" 
Genesis37:33 Israeli nao awishiba, ati, nokuti, “Ee mwingila wa mwana wandi! Iciswango cimo icikali nacimwipaya no kumulya nacimulya. Cine cinefye iciswango nacilepaula Yosefu.”" 
Genesis37:34 Elyo Yakobo alepula ifyakufwala fyakwe, afwala insalu shabulanda. Kabili amuloosha pa nshikufye ishingi." 
Genesis37:35 Abana bakwe bonse abaume na banakashi baisa kukumutalalika umutima, lelo akaana ukutalalikwa. Abeba ati, “Ndekeni, nakulalooshafye mpaka nkaye ku calo ca bafwa, nkaye ku mwana wandi.” Kanshi efyo wishi alooseshe mwane Yosefu." 
Genesis37:36 Mu nshita iyo, ninshi abena Midiani balishitisha Yosefu mu Egupto kuli Potifa cilolo umo uwakwa Farao uwali kangalila wa fita fyakulonda kwisano." 
Genesis38:1 Pa nshita ilya, Yuda alifumine kuli bamunyina, atentemuka aya kukwikala no muntu umo umwina Adulamu, ishina lyakwe ni Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Kulya kuntu eko Yuda amwene umukashana mwana Shua umwina Kenani. Awe amuupa no kulala balala nankwe. 
Genesis38:3 Umukashana asuka aba pabukulu, afyala no mwana umwaume. Yuda amwinika ne shina lya Ere." 
Genesis38:4 Kabili muka Yuda aba pabukulu, afyala no mwana umwaume. Wena amwinika ishina lya Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Nakabili aisa fyala na umbi umwana umwaume, wena amwinika ishina lya Shela. Uyu mwana afyalilwe mu Kesibu." 
Genesis38:6 Yuda afwaile Ere ibeli lyakwe umwanakashi wakuupa, ne shina lya mwanakashi ni Tama." 
Genesis38:7 Lelo Ere ibeli lyakwa Yuda alibifya pa cinso cakwa Yawe, kanshi Yawe epakumulenga ukuti afwe." 
Genesis38:8 Elyo Yuda epakweba Onani ati, “Kabiye kuli bukwe bobe upyane munonko, pakuti ufikilishe umulimo obe uwakufyalilako munonko abana.”" 
Genesis38:9 Onani ico aishiba ukuti abana tabakabe abana bakwe kanshi lyonse ilyo alala na muka munyina alapemena panshi pakuti ekafyalila munyina bana. 
Genesis38:10 Ici cintu alecita tacasansamwishe Yawe. Kanshi Yawe epakumulenga ukuti nao afwe. 
Genesis38:11 Yuda epakweba Tama nafyala ati, “Kanshi kuti waikala nga mukamfwilwa ifyo fine kumwenu kuli bawiso, mpaka umwana wandi Shela akakule.” Alandile ifyo, ico aletiina ukuti nalimo nao kuti afwa nga bamunyina, kanshi Tama epakuya aya ikala kuli bawishi." 
Genesis38:12 Panuma ya nshita itali muka Yuda mwana Shua aisa fwa. Cilya inshita yakuloosha yapwa, Yuda epakwima aya ku Timuna ku bantu abalebeya impaanga shakwe amasako. Aile na cibusa wakwe Hira umwina Adulamu." 
Genesis38:13 Ilyo abantu baeba Tama abati, “Sofyala alaya ku Timuna kukubeya impaanga shakwe,”" 
Genesis38:14 Tama afuula insalu shabumukamfwilwa, aifimba ne citambala pakuti eishibikwa. Elyo aikala pa mpongolo ya ku Enaimu iyabela ku musebo walola ku Timuna, pantu Tama alimwene ukuti nangu Shela nomba nakula, lelo Yuda tamuufishe kuli Shela pakuti abe umukashi wakwe." 
Genesis38:15 Ilyo Yuda amwene Tama, wena alatontonkanya ukuti ni cilende, pantu Tama alifimbile ku menso yakwe." 
Genesis38:16 Awe Yuda aya ukwali Tama mumbali ya musebo, pantu taishibe ukuti ni nafyala. Yuda amweba ati, “Ale, ndefwaya tulale nobe.” Nao Tama amwipusha ati, “Finshi ulempeela pakulala nobe?”" 
Genesis38:17 Yuda amwasuka ati, “Ndeya kutumina akana ka mbushi pa fitekwa fyandi.” Tama amwasuka ati, “Bushe tawampeeleko icintu cimo icakuba icikatilo, mpaka ukatume akabushi?”" 
Genesis38:18 Yuda ati, “Bushe cikatilo nshi ndekupeela?” Tama ayasuka ati, “Ni nshimbi yobe iyakufwatikilako no mwando waiko, elyo ne nkonto iyo mu minwe yobe.” Yuda apeela ifi fyonse kuli Tama, elyo alala nankwe. Kanshi Tama epakwimita pa mulandu wakulala na Yuda." 
Genesis38:19 Elyo aimapo aya nokuya. Afuula icitambala cakwe, afwala nakabili insalu shabumukamfwilwa." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda alibuulile akana ka mbushi akapeela kuli cibusa wakwe umwina Adulamu pakuti aye mupokela ku mwanakashi ifyo ashile nge cikatilo, lelo tamusangile." 
Genesis38:21 Elyo aipusha abantu ba kulya kuntu ali ati, “Bushe ulya cilende wa ku mfuba aciba mu mbali ya musebo pa mpongolo ya ku Enaimu ali kwi?” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Awe kuno takwaba cilende wa ku mfuba.”" 
Genesis38:22 Kanshi cibusa wakwe abwelela kuli Yuda amweba ati, “Awe nshimusangile. Kabili na bantu bekala kulya kwine basosele abati ‘Kuno takwaba cilende wa ku mfuba.’”" 
Genesis38:23 Elyo Yuda asosa ati, “Kafisunge pantu kuti twasebaninapofye. Kabili nacimutumina akana ka mbushi, lelo tawacimusangakofye.”" 
Genesis38:24 Papitile nalimo imyeshi itatu, elyo baishile eba Yuda abati, “Nokofyala Tama ni cilende. Kabili ali ne fumo lya mu bulalelale.” Yuda epakusosa ati, “Mufumisheni panse mumoce afwe.”" 
Genesis38:25 Cilya balamufumisha panse Tama atuma amashiwi kuli shifyala Yuda ati, “Ili fumo ndi nalyo, lyafuma ku mwine wa ifi fintu. Moneni nga kuti mwamwishiba umwine wa nshimbi yakufwatikilako no mwando waiko elyo ne nkonto.”" 
Genesis38:26 Awe Yuda afishiba, asosa nokuti, “Tama nalungika ukucila ine, pantu nshamupeela mwana wandi Shela ukuti amuupe.” Kanshi tatalile alala na Tama nakabili." 
Genesis38:27 Ilyo inshita yakupaapa yafikile, mwifumo lyakwa Tama mwali abana abaume babili, bampundu." 
Genesis38:28 Ilyo acili pakupaapa, mpundu umo afumisha ukuboko panse. Nacimbusa abuula ubushishi ubwakashika cee akaka ku kuboko elyo asosa ati, “Uyu ewabalilapo ukufyalwa.”" 
Genesis38:29 Lelo umwana abweseshamo ukuboko na munyina ewaisa fuma. Nacimbusa epakusosa ati, “Yangu efyo waipekela apakufumina!” Kanshi epakumwimika ishina lya Peresi." 
Genesis38:30 Elyo munyina uwali no bushishi bwakashika cee ku kuboko nao afyalwa, wena bamwinika ishina lya Sera." 
Genesis39:1 Ilyo basendele Yosefu ku Egupto, Potifa umwina Egupto e wamushitile ku bena Ishimaeli abamuletele kulya. Potifa ali umo pa babomfi bakwa Farao, kabili ali kangalila wa fita fyalelonda kwisano." 
Genesis39:2 Yawe aleba na Yosefu, elyo ali uwashuka muli fyonse alebomba. Kabili aleikala mu ŋanda yakwa shikulu wakwe umwina Egupto." 
Genesis39:3 Shikulu wakwe alimwene ukuti Yawe ali na Yosefu, kabili nokuti ni Yawe alemupeela ishuko muli fyonse alebomba." 
Genesis39:4 Kanshi Yosefu epakusanga ukutemwikwa pa cinso cakwa shikulu wakwe, amucita no mutumishi wakwe. Potifa amusonta ukuba kangalila wa ŋanda yakwe, amupa na maka yakusunga ifintu fyonse akwete." 
Genesis39:5 Ukufumafye pa nshita Potifa abikile Yosefu ukuba kangalila wa ŋanda ne fintu fyonse Potifa akwete, Yawe apaala iŋanda ya mwina Egupto pa mulandu wakwa Yosefu. Ipaalo lyakwa Yawe lyali pa fintu fyonse Potifa akwete, mu ŋanda elyo na mu mabala." 
Genesis39:6 Potifa asuka abika fyonse ifyakwete mu maboko yakwa Yosefu. Apo Yosefu ewalefisunga, wena talesakamana nelyo cimo, kanofye icakulya alelya. Yosefu ali no mubili usuma, kabili uwayemba pa menso." 
Genesis39:7 Awe umuila inshiku, muka shikulu wakwe alakumbwa Yosefu. Asuka amweba ati, “Isa tulale nobe.”" 
Genesis39:8 Lelo Yosefu akaana. Aeba muka shikulu wakwe ati, “Shikulu tasakamana ku cintu nelyo cimo pa ŋanda apo ine epo ndi. Fyonse ifyo akwata abika mu maboko yandi." 
Genesis39:9 Takuli wakwata maka muli ino ŋanda ukucila ine. Kabili shikulu takaanya nelyo cimo, kanofye iwe, pantu iwe uli mukashi wakwe. Nga kanshi kuti nacita shani icintu icabipa ifyo elyo no kubifya kuli Lesa?”" 
Genesis39:10 Lelo nangu muka Potifa abikilepofye ukulansha Yosefu cila bushiku, Yosefu wena alekaana ukulala nankwe nangufye ukuba nankwe." 
Genesis39:11 Nomba ubushiku bumo Yosefu aile mu ŋanda kukubombamo imilimo yakwe, elyo mu ŋanda tamwali mubomfi nelyo umo pa babomfi balebombamo." 
Genesis39:12 Muka Potifa epakwikata Yosefu ku cakufwala, amweba ati, “Ale isa, tulale nobe.” Lelo Yosefu amusha ne cakufwala mu minwe, abutukila panse." 
Genesis39:13 Ilyo muka Potifa amona ukuti Yosefu afulumukila panse, lelo asha icakufwala mu minwe yakwe," 
Genesis39:14 muka Potifa aita ababomfi abalebomba mu ŋanda, alabeba ati, “Moneni, uyu Muhibulu bamuleta kuno kukutusebanya. Acisa muno pakuti tulale nankwe, na ine elyo napunda." 
Genesis39:15 Ilyo aumfwa uko napundisha, elyo abutukila panse asha ne cakufwala cakwe apo ndi.”" 
Genesis39:16 Muka Potifa asungile icakufwala cakwa Yosefu mpaka nelyo shikulu wakwe abwelele kumwakwe. 
Genesis39:17 Elyo umukashi amushimikila umulandu onse ati, “Ulya Muhibulu umusha waleta, acisa uko naciba kukunsebanya." 
Genesis39:18 Lelo ilyo acumfwa uko napundisha, abutukila panse, asha ne cakufwala cakwe apo naciba.”" 
Genesis39:19 Ilyo shikulu wakwa Yosefu aumfwile ifyo umukashi amushimikile ati, “Ifi efyo umusha obe ancitile,” afulwa nganshi." 
Genesis39:20 Shikulu wakwa Yosefu amuposa mu cifungo, mu ncende umo balefungila abafungwa ba mfumu. Awe nao emo alaikala." 
Genesis39:21 Lelo Yawe ali na Yosefu kabili amukwatila icitemwiko icishipwa. Alenga nokuti atemwikwe ku cinso cakwa kasunga wa bafungwa. 
Genesis39:22 Kanshi nomba kasunga wa bafungwa apeela Yosefu umulimo wakulaangalila bonse abali mu cifungo, kabili ewalemona pali fyonse ifyalecitika mulya." 
Genesis39:23 Kasunga wa bafungwa aleka no kulasakamana pa milimo iyo apeele Yosefu ukulabomba, pantu Yawe ali na Yosefu, kabili alemupeela ishuko muli fyonse ifyo alebomba." 
Genesis40:1 Ilyo papitile inshita, katumika wa lukombo lwa mfumu ya mu Egupto no walepanga umukate balilufyenye kuli shikulwibo Farao, imfumu ya mu Egupto." 
Genesis40:2 Farao epakufulilwa aba babomfi babili, umukalamba wa bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu, no mukalamba wa balepangila imfumu umukate." 
Genesis40:3 Kanshi epakubaposa mu cifungo mu ŋanda ya waleyangalila ifita fyalelonda kwisano, nakabili umo mwine emo na Yosefu afungilwe." 
Genesis40:4 Kangalila wa bamalonda apeela Yosefu umulimo wakubasunga, no kubatumika ewalebatumika. Elyo kabili balikokwelemo mu cifungo." 
Genesis40:5 Ubushiku bumo, katumika wa lukombo lwa mfumu no walepangila imfumu imikate, abali mu cifungo, cila umo alilotele iciloto pa bushiku bumo bwine. Kabili cila ciloto cali nomo calolele." 
Genesis40:6 Ulucelo cilya Yosefu aingilamo asanga ukuti bali abasakamana. 
Genesis40:7 Kanshi aipusha ababomfi bakwa Farao abo ali nabo mu cifungo mu ŋanda yakwa shikulu wakwe ati, “Cinshi ico mwalamonekela bulanda bulanda lelo?”" 
Genesis40:8 Bamwasuka abati, “Nico ifwe bonse babili natulota ifiloto, lelo tapali nelyo umo uwakutwilwilako.” Elyo Yosefu abeba ati, “Bushe ukwilula ifiloto te mulimo wakwa Lesa? Aleni njebeniko ifiloto fyenu.”" 
Genesis40:9 Kanshi umukalamba wa bakatumika aebele Yosefu iciloto cakwe. Amweba ati, “Mu ciloto candi, nacimona umwangashi pantanshi yandi," 
Genesis40:10 uyu mwangashi waciba ne misambo itatu. Cilya amabula yafuma, apopene na maluba yabalula yatwala ne fisansangu fya myangashi iyapya." 
Genesis40:11 Ulukombo lwakwa Farao lwaciba mu minwe, elyo nabuula imyangashi nakamina mu lukombo lwakwa Farao, nabika no lukombo mu minwe yakwe.”" 
Genesis40:12 Yosefu amweba ati, “Nalakwilwila iciloto cobe. Imisambo iyo itatu, ni nshiku shitatu." 
Genesis40:13 Mu nshikufye shitatu, Farao akakufumya mu cifungo, akakubwesha na ku mulimo walebomba. Ukabika ulukombo mu minwe yakwa Farao, nga filya fine walecita ilyo walebomba umulimo wa bukatumika wa lukombo lwa mfumu." 
Genesis40:14 Lelo ilyo ukekala bwino, wikandabako, ukankwatile uluse. Ukansoseleko kuli Farao pakuti akamfumye muno mu cifungo." 
Genesis40:15 Pantu ine bamfumishefye ku maka mu calo ca Bahibulu, elyo na kuno kwine nshacitapo mulandu uwakumposela mu cifungo.”" 
Genesis40:16 Ilyo umukalamba wa balepanga imikate amona ukuti Yosefu ailwila umunankwe ifyakumuwamina, aeba Yosefu ati, “Na ine ninkwata iciloto. Nacilota ninsenda pa mutwe imiseke itatu iya mikate." 
Genesis40:17 Mu museke waciba pamulu, mwaciba ifyakulya fya misango yonse ifyaocewa ifyakutwalila Farao. Lelo ifyuni fyacilalya mu museke wine nsendele pa mutwe.”" 
Genesis40:18 Yosefu amweba ati, “Nalakwilwila iciloto cobe. Iyo miseke itatu, ni nshiku shitatu." 
Genesis40:19 Mu nshiku shitatu, Farao akakufumya mu cifungo, akakuputuleko umutwe no kukukulika ku cimuti. Elyo ifyuni fikesa lya iminofu yobe.”" 
Genesis40:20 Nomba ubushiku bwalengele shitatu bwali e bushiku Farao afyelwemo. Kanshi Farao acitila ababomfi bakwe imitebeto. Afumya mu cifungo, pa cinso ca babomfi bakwe bonse, umukalamba wa bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu no mukalamba wa balepangila imfumu imikate." 
Genesis40:21 Umukalamba wa bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu amubwesesha ku mulimo wakwe, pakuti nakabili abike ulukombo mu minwe yakwa Farao." 
Genesis40:22 Lelo umukalamba wa balepanga imikate wena, alimukulikile nga mulya mwine Yosefu abelwilile ifiloto fyabo." 
Genesis40:23 Umukalamba wa bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu wena taibukishe kuli Yosefu iyoo, amulabako." 
Genesis41:1 Ilyo papitile imyaka ibili iyituntulu Farao alotele iciloto. Alotele eminine pa lulamba lwa mumana wa Nailo. 
Genesis41:2 Awe iŋombe ishikota cine lubali ishatuuluka kabili ishaina ubusaka shafuma mu mumana, elyo shalalya icani ca mu lulamba lwa mumana." 
Genesis41:3 Kabili panuma, mu mumana wa Nailo mwafuma iŋombe ishikota cine lubali ishaonda kabili ishibi. Nasho shaya iminina apali ishibiye pa lulamba lwa mumana." 
Genesis41:4 Elyo iŋombe isho ishibi kabili ishaonda shalya iŋombe ishatuuluka kabili ishaina ubusaka. Awe Farao ashibuka mu tulo. 
Genesis41:5 Kabili Farao apona mu tulo, alota iciloto na cimbi. Awe amona imisonso cine lubali iyaisulamo inseke ishisuma ishatuuluka ilemena pa lupimbili lumofye." 
Genesis41:6 Elyo panuma ulupimbili lwatwala imisonso imbi cine lubali, iyi yena yali iyapapa iyauminina ku mwela uwakaba uwa ku kabanga." 
Genesis41:7 Imisonso iyapapa yamina imisonso cine lubali iya nseke ishatuuluka ishisuma. Farao elyo ashibuka mu tulo, aishiba ukuti aciba alelotafye." 
Genesis41:8 Ulucelo Farao alifye uwasakamana. Kanshi epakwita abalecita amalele na bamano bonse mu Egupto. Farao abebako ifiloto alotele, lelo tapali nelyo umo uwakuti amwilwile." 
Genesis41:9 Elyo umukalamba wa bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu aebele Farao ati, “Ilelo naibukisha ifyo nalufyanya." 
Genesis41:10 Limo Farao alifulilwe ababomfi bakwe, aposa ine no mukalamba wa balepanga imikate mu cifungo mu ŋanda yakwa kangalila wa fita ifilonda kwisano." 
Genesis41:11 Cila umo pali ifwe babili alilotele iciloto pa bushiku bumo bwinefye. Cila ciloto cali nomo calolele. 
Genesis41:12 Twalimo no mulumendo umo Umuhibulu, umusha wakwa kangalila wa bamalonda. Twalyebeleko uyo mulumendo ifiloto fyesu. Alitwilwilile filoto fyesu, cila umo amwilwila umwalolele iciloto cakwe." 
Genesis41:13 Kabili ifintu fyaishile citikafye ngomo mwine atwilwilile. Ine nalibwelele pa mulimo wandi, lelo umunandi wena alikulikwe.”" 
Genesis41:14 Kanshi Farao alitumine abakwita Yosefu. Baya mufumya mu cifungo bamuletafye bwangu bwangu. Yosefu atala abeya, afwala ne fyakufwala fimbi elyo aisa pa cinso cakwa Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao aebele Yosefu ati, “Ine nalilota iciloto, lelo tapali nelyo umo uwakunjilwilako. Lelo nalyumfwa uko balanda pali iwe ukuti, nga umo akweba ifyo alotele, kuti wamwilwila.”" 
Genesis41:16 Yosefu amwasuka ati, “Teine ndeilula, lelo ni Lesa euleilwila Farao ifyakumuwamina.”" 
Genesis41:17 Elyo Farao aebele Yosefu ati, “Ine nalotele ninjiminina pa lulamba lwa mumana wa Nailo." 
Genesis41:18 Elyo mu mumana mwafuma iŋombe ishikota cine lubali ishatuuluka kabili ishaina ubusaka, shalalya ne cani ca mu lulamba lwa mumana." 
Genesis41:19 Elyo panuma ya ishi, mu mumana mwafuma iŋombe shimbi ishikota cine lubali ishapampauka, ishibi nganshi kabili ishaonda. Nshatala mona iŋombe ishabipa ngesho mu calo conse ca Egupto." 
Genesis41:20 Isho iŋombe ishaonda kabili ishibi shalya iŋombe cine lubali ishaina, ishabalilepo ukufuma mu mumana." 
Genesis41:21 Lelo panuma yakulya iŋombe ishaina, nalyo line shashalafye ishibi nga kale. Umuntu nelyo umo tekuti eshibe ukuti nashilya iŋombe shaina. Elyo nabuuka." 
Genesis41:22 Kabili mu ciloto candi namona imisonso ya ŋanu cine lubali iyaisulamo inseke ishisuma ishatuuluka, naimena ku lupimbili lumofye." 
Genesis41:23 Elyo panuma lwatwala imisonso imbi cine lubali, iyi yena yali iyapapa kabili iyauminina ku mwela uwakaba uwa ku kabanga." 
Genesis41:24 Iyo misonso iyapapa yamina imisonso cine lubali iya nseke ishisuma. Nalishimikila abacita amalele ifi filoto, lelo tapaba uwakuti anjilwileko.”" 
Genesis41:25 Elyo Yosefu aebele Farao ati, “Ifiloto fyakwa Farao filolelefye ku cintu cimo cine. Lesa nasokolwela Farao ifyo alaswa acite." 
Genesis41:26 Isho ŋombe ishikota ishisuma cine lubali myaka cine lubali, elyo ne misonso iyisuma iya ŋanu, nayo myaka cine lubali. Kanshi ifi filoto fyonse filolelefye ku cintu cimo cine." 
Genesis41:27 Elyo ne ŋombe ishikota isho cine lubali ishaonda kabili ishibi ishafumine mu mumana panuma, nasho myaka cine lubali. Elyo ne misonso iyapapa cine lubali iyauminina ku mwela wa ku kabanga uwakaba, e myaka cine lubali iya cipowe." 
Genesis41:28 Kanshi efilya nacilanda kuli Farao ukuti, Lesa nalanga Farao ifyo alaswa acite." 
Genesis41:29 Imyaka cine lubali iyalaisa, mukaba ifyakulya ifingi nganshi mu calo conse ica Egupto." 
Genesis41:30 Lelo panuma, pakakonka imyaka cine lubali iya cipowe. Abantu bakalaba nokuti mwali ifyakulya ifingi mu calo ca Egupto, pantu icipowe cikonaula icalo." 
Genesis41:31 Abantu tabakebukishe ukuti mu calo mwali ifyakulya ifingi, pantu icipowe cikakonkapo, cikabipisha nganshi." 
Genesis41:32 Umulandu Farao alotele iciloto cimo cine imiku ibili, nico Lesa cine cine napanga ukucita ici cintu, kabili takokole ukucicita.”" 
Genesis41:33 “Kanshi nomba Farao nafwaye umuntu uwacenjela kabili uwamano, amupeele amaka yakwangalila icalo conse ica Egupto." 
Genesis41:34 Farao nasonte na bakangalila mu calo abakupoka icipande ca fisabo cimo pa fipande fisano fya fisabo bakalasombola mu myaka cine lubali ilyo kukaba ifisabo ifingi. 
Genesis41:35 Farao abapeele amaka yakulonganika ifyakulya fya myaka iyi isuma no kututila iŋanu mu misumba umo bakalasungila ifyakulya. 
Genesis41:36 Ifi fyakulya fyakubika mu matala ya misumba, fyakwisa mukubomfya mu myaka cine lubali iya cipowe ico cikapona pa calo ca Egupto. Epakuti icalo cikonaulwa ku cipowe.”" 
Genesis41:37 Aya matontonkanyo yamoneke bwino kuli Farao na babomfi bakwe bonse. 
Genesis41:38 Elyo Farao asosele ku babomfi bakwe ati, “Bushe ni kwi twingasanga umuntu uwaba ngoyu, umwaba umupashi wakwa Lesa?”" 
Genesis41:39 Farao epakweba Yosefu ati, “Apo ni Lesa uulengele ukuti wishibe ifi fyonse, tapali muntu nelyo umo uwacenjela kabili uwamano nga iwe." 
Genesis41:40 Kanshi niwe wine walaba cilolo mukalamba we sano lyandi, na bantu bandi bonse bakulabeela ifyo wabakonkomesha. Ninefye nakulakucilako ico ine ndi mfumu.”" 
Genesis41:41 Elyo Farao aebele Yosefu ati, “Kanshi nomba, ine niwe nasonta ukuba cilolo mukalamba wa calo conse ica Egupto.”" 
Genesis41:42 Farao epakufuula imbalaminwe yakwe iyabufumu iyakufwatikilako, afwika na Yosefu ku munwe. Amufwika ne nsalu ishabuuta ubusaka kabili amufwika no munyololo wa golide mu mukoshi." 
Genesis41:43 Amuninika mwiceleta lyakwe ilyabubili nge nkonkani yakwe, na bantu bali pantanshi yakwe balepunda abati, “Mufukamineni!” Kanshi efyo amupeele amaka yakuba cilolo mukalamba wakwe uwa calo conse ica Egupto." 
Genesis41:44 Elyo Farao aebele Yosefu ati, “Ine nine Farao imfumu, lelo mu calo conse ica Egupto tamwakabe nelyo umo uwakucita cimo, ukwabula ukuti iwe usuminishe.”" 
Genesis41:45 Farao ainika Yosefu ishina lya Sefenati Panea. Kabili apeela Yosefu umukashana Asenati umwana wakwa Potifera shimapepo wa ku Oni ukuti abe umukashi wakwe. Yosefu nao aya alepitana mu calo conse ica Egupto. 
Genesis41:46 Yosefu ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ilyo atampile ukulabombela Farao imfumu ya calo ca Egupto. Yosefu epakusha Farao aya aletandala mu calo conse ica Egupto. 
Genesis41:47 Mu myaka ilya cine lubali iya fisabo ifingi, umushili wameseshe ifisabo ifingi nganshi." 
Genesis41:48 Yosefu alongenye ifyakulya fyonse ifyasombwelwe mu Egupto muli iyo myaka ya fisabo ifingi, afitutila mu misumba. Muli cila musumba atutilamo ifyakulya basombwele mu mabala yashingulwike uyo musumba." 
Genesis41:49 Yosefu atutile iŋanu ishingi nganshi, shafulilefye kwati musensenga wa muli bemba. Shalifulishe icakuti aleka no kupenda ku mulandu wa bwingi." 
Genesis41:50 Ilyo imyaka ya cipowe tailaisa, Yosefu afyele abana babili abaume muli Asenati mwana Potifera, shimapepo wa ku Oni." 
Genesis41:51 Yosefu ainike ibeli lyakwe ishina lya Manase nokusosa ati, “Pantu Lesa nalenga ukuti ndabe amacushi yandi yonse na kuli bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa tata.”" 
Genesis41:52 Cikonkebeli wena amwinike ishina lya Efulemu, nokusosa ati, “Pantu Lesa nalenga ukuti nsanduluke mu calo umo nalecula.”" 
Genesis41:53 Cilya imyaka cine lubali iya fyakulya ifingi yapita," 
Genesis41:54 elyo imyaka cine lubali iya cipowe nayo yatampa ngefyo Yosefu asosele. Mu fyalo fyonse fimbi mwapona icipowe, lelo mu calo conse ica Egupto mwena ifyakulya emo fyali." 
Genesis41:55 Cilya abena Egupto bonse batampa ukumfwa icipowe, abantu balalomba Farao ukuti abapeeleko ifyakulya. Elyo Farao aeba abena Egupto bonse ati, “Kabiyeni kuli Yosefu, mucite ifyo alemweba.”" 
Genesis41:56 Cilya icipowe cakumana icalo conse elyo Yosefu aisula amayanda yonse batutilemo iŋanu, alashitisha na ku bena Egupto pantu mu calo conse mwaponene icipowe icibi." 
Genesis41:57 Abantu mu fyalo fyonse nabo balaisa kukushita iŋanu kuli Yosefu pantu icipowe icibi caponene pesonde lyonse. 
Genesis42:1 Ilyo Yakobo aumfwile ukuti mu Egupto mwena iŋanu emo shali, aebele bamwane abaume ati, “Bushe cinshi mwikalile muleloleshanyafye?" 
Genesis42:2 Ine nalyumfwa ukuti mu Egupto mwena iŋanu emo shili. Kanshi eko muye, mukaye tushitilako shimo, epakuti tukabe abomi twikafwa ku nsala.”" 
Genesis42:3 Kanshi bamunyina kwa Yosefu ikumi limo epakwima balaya ku Egupto kukushita iŋanu. 
Genesis42:4 Lelo Yakobo talekele Benjamini, umwaice wakwa Yosefu, ukuti aye na bamunyina. Aletiina ukuti epali icibi cimo camuponena." 
Genesis42:5 Kanshi bamwana Israeli pamo na bantu bambi balile kukushita iŋanu, pantu na mu Kenani mwine mwaliponene icipowe." 
Genesis42:6 Nomba Yosefu ewapeelwe amaka yakuteeka icalo conse ica Egupto. Kanshi ewaleshitisha iŋanu ku bena Egupto bonse. Awe bamunyina kwa Yosefu ilyo bafika, bamufukamina, bakontamina panshi." 
Genesis42:7 Cilya Yosefu abamona, abeshiba apopene, lelo acita kwati tabeshibe iyoo. Abalansha bukali bukali, abepusha ati, “Bushe imwe mwafuma kwi?” Bamwasuka abati, “Twafuma ku calo ca Kenani, twaisa kukushita ifyakulya.”" 
Genesis42:8 Nangu Yosefu wena aishibe bamunyina, bena tabamwishibe iyoo." 
Genesis42:9 Elyo Yosefu aibukisha ifiloto alotele pali bena, elyo abeba ati, “Muli nengu imwe! Mwishilefye kukulengula apakusanshila icalo cesu.”" 
Genesis42:10 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Iyoo shikulu, ifwe fwe babomfi bobe twishilefye kukushita ifyakulya." 
Genesis42:11 Kabili ifwe bonse pano tuli bana ba muntufye umo. Fwe babomfi bobe tuli bantu bacishinka, tatuli nengu iyoo.”" 
Genesis42:12 Yosefu wena abeba ati, “Awe iyo! Muli nengu mwishilefye mukumona umo mwingasanshila icalo cesu.”" 
Genesis42:13 Bamwasuka abati, “Fwe babomfi bobe tuli bamunyina. Twaba ikumi limo na babili, abana abaume aba muntufye umo uwikala mu calo ca Kenani. Kasuli ena ali na shifwe, lelo umbi ena tabapo.”" 
Genesis42:14 Yosefu abeba ati, “Ala nifyo fine nandile ukuti imwe muli nengu." 
Genesis42:15 Kabili muleeshiwa muli ici cintu. Napali Farao umumi! Imwe tamwakafume kuno kano kasuli wenu akese kuno. 
Genesis42:16 Tumenipo umo pali imwe uwakuya buula munyinenwe. Imwe bonse mulesungwa mu cifungo epakuti tumone nga ifyo mulelanda cine cine fyacishinka, lelo nga teifyo na pali Farao ninshi muli nengu.”" 
Genesis42:17 Elyo ababika mu cifungo pa nshiku shitatu. 
Genesis42:18 Pa bushiku bwalengele shitatu Yosefu abeba ati, “Citeni ici nga mube abomi, pantu ine naliba na katiina kuli Lesa." 
Genesis42:19 Imwe nga muli bantu bacishinka, lekeni munyinenwe umo ashale kuno mu cifungo. Elyo imwe bambi bonse mubwelelemo, mutwale iŋanu ku ndupwa shenu ishili mu cipowe." 
Genesis42:20 Lelo muli nokuleta kasuli wenu kuli ine pakuti nkashininkishe amashiwi yenu, no kufwa ninshi tamwakafwe.” Awe nabo efyo bacita." 
Genesis42:21 Balalanshanya abati, “Cine cine tulekandilwa pa mulandu wakwa munyinefwe. Twalimwene ifyo ali no bulanda ilyo aletupapata ukuti twimulofya, lelo ifwe tatwamumfwile nakalya. E mulandu wine ili shamo litwishile.”" 
Genesis42:22 Rubeni epakubeba ati, “Bushe nshamwebele ukuti mwicita mwaice cibi nelyo cimo? Lelo tamwateseshe nakalya. Awe nomba tuli nokukandwa pa mulandu wakumwipaya.”" 
Genesis42:23 Bamunyina bena tabaishibe ukuti Yosefu aletesha ifyo balelanda umo filolele, pantu pali uwalemwalwila ifyo balanda." 
Genesis42:24 Yosefu afuma apo bali, aya mukulila. Elyo kabili abwela uko bali, alalanda nabo. Afumya Simeoni apo bali, amukaka ninshi balemonako." 
Genesis42:25 Yosefu akonkomeshe ukwisusha iŋanu mu mifuko ya bamunyina, no kubwesesha cila umo indalama shabo mu mufuko wakwe. Kabili akonkomesha ukubapeelako ifyakulya fya pa bulendo. Awe fyonse ifyo fyalicitilwe." 
Genesis42:26 Bamunyina kwa Yosefu bakakila imifuko ya ŋanu pali bapunda babo, balaya nokuya." 
Genesis42:27 Apo basendeme, umo pali bamunyina akakula umufuko wakwe pakuti abuulemo ifyakulisha punda wakwe, elyo amona indalama shakwe pa mulu wa ŋanu." 
Genesis42:28 Aebele bamunyina ati, “Ine nabambwesesha indalama shandi, ishi shili pamulu mu mufuko.” Awe imitima yafuma, balaipushanya balekankafye ku mwenso abati, “Cinshi ici ico Lesa atucitila ifi?”" 
Genesis42:29 Ilyo bafikile kuli shibo Yakobo mu calo ca Kenani, bamushimikileko fyonse ifyabacitikile. Bamweba abati," 
Genesis42:30 “Umuntu uteeka icalo ca Egupto alandile kuli ifwe bukali bukali, atucitile kwati ifwe tuli nengu sha calo." 
Genesis42:31 Lelo ifwe twamwebele twati, ‘Ifwe tuli bantu bacishinka, tatuli nengu iyoo." 
Genesis42:32 Tuli bamunyina ikumi limo na babili (12) na shifwe umofye. Umo wena tabapo, elyo kasuli ali na shifwe mu calo ca Kenani.’" 
Genesis42:33 Elyo uyo muntu ateeka icalo ca Egupto atweba ati, ‘Pakuti njishibe ukuti muli bantu bacishinka, mulenshila munyinenwe kuno, elyo bambi musende iŋanu ku ndupwa shenu ishili mu cipowe, nokuya muleya." 
Genesis42:34 Lelo muli nokuleta kuli ine munyinenwe kasuli wenu, lyena elyo nkeshiba ukuti tamuli nengu, muli bantu bacishinka. Elyo na ine nkamubwesesha munyinenwe, lyena kuti mwacita amakwebo muli cino calo.’”" 
Genesis42:35 Ilyo batampile ukufukumuna iŋanu mu mifuko yabo, cila muntu asangamo akafunda ka ndalama shakwe mu mufuko wakwe. Cilya shibo na bamwane bamona utufunda twa ndalama, awe baikatwa no mwenso." 
Genesis42:36 Shibo Yakobo abeba ati, “Imwe namumpwila abana bandi. Yosefu tabapo, elyo na Simeoni nao talipo, kabili nomba mulefwaya ukusenda Benjamini. Fyonse nafimbipila!”" 
Genesis42:37 Elyo Rubeni aeba wishi ati, “Ine nga nshibweseshe Benjamini kuli imwe, ninshi mukepaye abana bandi abaume babili. Mubikeni mu minwe yandi, nkamubwesha kuli imwe.”" 
Genesis42:38 Lelo Yakobo abeba ati, “Umwana wandi wena tamwakaye nankwe. Munyina alifwa, elyo uyu wine eka ewashalapo. Pantu nga aponena mu busanso pa bulendo bwenu ninshi nimwe mukalenga nkaya ku calo ca bafwa ne cikonko mu bukote bwandi.”" 
Genesis43:1 Nomba icipowe calibipile nganshi mu calo ca Kenani. 
Genesis43:2 Kanshi ilyo bapwile ukulya iŋanu baile shita ku Egupto, shibo Yakobo abebele ati, “Kabiyeni nakabili, muye tushitilako utwakulya na tumbi.”" 
Genesis43:3 Lelo Yuda amweba ati, “Ulya muntu alitukonkomeshe ati, ‘Tatwakamonane na imwe nga tamwishile na munyinenwe.’" 
Genesis43:4 Kanshi nga cakuti mwaleka munyinefwe aye na ifwe, lyena tuleya kukumushitilako icakulya." 
Genesis43:5 Lelo nga tamulekele ukuti aye na ifwe, awe ninshi na ifwe tatwaye. Pantu ulya muntu atwebele ati, ‘Tatwakese monana na imwe, kano mwaisa na munyinenwe.’”" 
Genesis43:6 Israeli epakubepusha ati, “Nga cinshi mwambikila mu bucushi pakweba uyo muntu ukuti mwalikwata munyinenwe na umbi?”" 
Genesis43:7 Bamwasuka abati, “Ala uyo muntu, mwinefye wabikilepo ukutwipusha pali ifwe bene na pa lupwa lwesu. Atwipwishe ati, ‘Bushe shinwe epo acili? Bushe mwalikwatapo na munyinenwe na umbi?’ Kanshi ifwe twayaswikefye ifyo atwipwishe. Bushe nga kuti twaishiba shani ukuti aletweba ati, ‘Mukalete munyinenwe kuno?’”" 
Genesis43:8 Elyo Yuda aeba Israeli wishi ati, “Lekeni kanshi nine nsende umwaice, kabili twalaimafye nombaline, pakuti imwe na ifwe na bana besu tube abomi, twifwa ku cipowe." 
Genesis43:9 Ine ne mwine nkasakamana ukusunga ubumi bwakwe. Muli nokubika umulandu wa pali Benjamini pali ine. Nga nshimubweseshe kuli imwe, no kumuteka apa pa cinso cenu, ninshi nkaba no mulandu kuli imwe inshiku shonse isha bumi bwandi." 
Genesis43:10 Atukanashingashinga nga twaliyako no kubwelako imiku ibili.” 
Genesis43:11 Elyo shibo Israeli abeba ati, “Kanshi nga nifyo cili nokuba, ninshi mucite ifi. Mubuule ifintu ifyawamisha ifyo twakwata muli cino calo kuno, mubike mu mifuko yenu. Elyo mukafitwale ngo bupe kuli uyo muntu. Mukasende utumafuta twakupangilako umuti, utubuci, ifinyamuti ifyanunka ubusaka, amafuta yalesha ifitumbi ukubola muri, ne nseke sha kamuti ka pisitakio na ka alumondi." 
Genesis43:12 Musende indalama ishakushitamo, elyo ne shakubweseshamo pali shilya babikile mu mifuko yenu, limbi balufyenyefye." 
Genesis43:13 Sendeni na munyinenwe muleya nombaline ukuli uyo muntu. 
Genesis43:14 Lesa Umwine wa maka yonse enganasha uyo muntu ku mutima akamukwatile uluse, akaleke mukabwele na ulya munyinenwe umbi elyo na Benjamini. Kwena nga efyo ndi nokufwilwa, kacikabe ifyo fine.”" 
Genesis43:15 Kanshi bamwana Yakobo balisendele ifyabupe, indalama shakushitamo ne shakubweseshamo, kabili basendele na Benjamini wine. Baima balaya ku Egupto, baya ituula na kuli Yosefu." 
Genesis43:16 Cilya Yosefu amona ukuti Benjamini ali nabo, aeba kasunga wa ŋanda yakwe ati, “Senda aba bantu kumwandi. Wipayepo inama imo wipike. Aba bantu tulelya nabo akasuba.”" 
Genesis43:17 Awe umubomfi acita ngefyo Yosefu amwebele, atwala na bantu ku ŋanda kwa Yosefu." 
Genesis43:18 Kanshi abo bantu epakwikatwa no mwenso ico babatwala ku ŋanda kwa Yosefu. Bena balatontonkanya abati, “Ico batuletela kuno, mulandu wa ndalama shilya babikile mu mifuko yesu pa bulendo bwakubalilapo. Alefwaya ukuti atucimfye, atwikate, atucite abasha bakwe, elyo abuule na bapunda besu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Kanshi epakuya kuli kasunga wa ŋanda yakwa Yosefu, balanda nao ilyo bacili pa mwinshi wa ŋanda." 
Genesis43:20 Bamweba abati, “Twapapata mukwai, ifwe twalishile kuno kale kukushita ifyakulya." 
Genesis43:21 Lelo apo twasendeme, ilyo twakakwile imifuko yesu, cila muntu asangile indalama shakwe shonse apo shapelele mu mufuko wakwe pa mulu wa ŋanu. Kanshi natushibwesha, tuli nasho." 
Genesis43:22 Kabili natwisa na shimbi ishakushitamo icakulya. Tatwaishiba uwabikile indalama shesu mu mifuko yesu.” 
Genesis43:23 Umubomfi wakwa Yosefu ati, “Tekeni imitima, mwitiina. Lesa wenu, Lesa wakwa shinwe, ewamupeele isho ndalama mu mifuko yenu. Ine nalipokele indalama mwampeele.” Elyo aya fumya Simeoni amuleta kuli bamunyina." 
Genesis43:24 Kasunga wa ŋanda abuulile abo bantu no kubengisha mu ŋanda yakwa Yosefu. Abapeela amenshi yakusamba amakasa, elyo apeela bapunda babo icakulya." 
Genesis43:25 Bamunyina bapekanya ubupe bwabo ubwakwisa peela Yosefu nga aisa ilyo akasuba kaba pakati ka mutwe. Pantu balyumfwile ukuti bali nokulya kulya kwine. 
Genesis43:26 Cilya Yosefu aisa mumwakwe, bamunyina bamupeela ifyabupe ifyo baishile nafyo mu ŋanda, elyo bamukontamina no kumukontamina." 
Genesis43:27 Yosefu abepusha nga bali umutende, elyo atila, “Nga shinwe umukote mwanjebeleko, bushe ali umutende? Bushe ali umumi?”" 
Genesis43:28 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ee, shifwe umubomfi wenu acili umumi kabili ali umutende.” Awe bamukontamina nganshi pakulanga umucinshi." 
Genesis43:29 Ilyo alebalolesha, amona Benjamini munyina uo afyelwe nao inda imo. Abepusha ati, “Bushe uyu e munyinenwe kasuli, ulya mwanjebeleko?” Elyo aeba Benjamini ati, “Lesa akupaale mwana wandi.”" 
Genesis43:30 Ico amona munyina, Yosefu aumfwa icikonko, bwangu bwangu afumapo aya alefwaya incende ukwakulilila. Awe aya ku muputule wakwe eko alalilila." 
Genesis43:31 Panuma yakusamba pa menso, afuma ashipikisha, asosa nokuti, “Leteni icakulya.”" 
Genesis43:32 Yosefu bamutwalila ifyakulya eka, na bamunyina nabo beka, na bena Egupto abalelya nankwe nabo babatwalila icakulya beka, pantu abena Egupto tabafwaya nelyo panono kulya pamo na Bahibulu, cintu ico bapata." 
Genesis43:33 Bamunyina babateka pantanshi yakwa Yosefu. Baikala ukukonka umo bafyalilwe, ukufuma kwibeli ukufika na kuli kasuli. Elyo bamunyina baloleshanya, bapapa pakumona ifyo baikala." 
Genesis43:34 Icakulya balabapeela ukufuma kwitebulo lyakwa Yosefu. Ifyakulya bapeele Benjamini fyali ifingi imiku isano ukucila umuntu onse umbi. Kanshi balya no kunwa, basansamuka pamo na Yosefu." 
Genesis44:1 Elyo Yosefu akonkomeshe kasunga wa ŋanda yakwe ati, “Buula imifuko ya aba bantu, wisushemo ifyakulya ukulingana na papelele amaka yabo ayakufisenda. Kabili ubike indalama shakwa cila muntu lwa pa mulu wa fyakulya mu mufuko wakwe." 
Genesis44:2 Elyo ubike ulukombo lwandi, lulya ulwa silifa, mu mufuko wakwa kasuli. Ulubike lwa pa mulu wa fyakulya pamo ne ndalama shakwe ishakushitamo iŋanu.” Nao acita fyonse ngefyo Yosefu amwebele." 
Genesis44:3 Cilya bwaca ulucelo babaleka balaya na bapunda babo. 
Genesis44:4 Kutifye cilya baya, tabalati bafike ukutali no musumba, Yosefu aeba kasunga wa ŋanda yakwe ati, “Ima konka balya bantu nombalinefye. Ilyo ulebasanga ubebe auti, ‘Bushe cinshi mwancitila ifibi pa fisuma mucitile?" 
Genesis44:5 Cinshi mwaibila ulukombo lwandi ulwa silifa? Bushe lulya lukombo telo shikulu wandi anwenamo no kupendwilamo? Ici cintu mwacita cibi.’” 
Genesis44:6 Kanshi ilyo umubomfi abasangile nao abebele aya yene mashiwi. 
Genesis44:7 Nabo bamweba abati, “Shikulu bushe cinshi mwalandila ifyo? Awe cakaana, ababomfi benu tekuti bacite ica musango uyo!" 
Genesis44:8 Moneni, twaendele ukufuma ku Kenani twamubwesesha indalama twasangile pa mulu wa ŋanu mu mifuko. Bushe cinshi ico twingebila silifa nangu golide mu ŋanda ya basokulu?" 
Genesis44:9 Kanshi nga cakuti umo pali ifwe, fwe babomfi benu, nga asangwa nakwata ulukombo ninshi ali nokufwa. Elyo na ifwe bonse tukaba abasha bakwa shikulu.”" 
Genesis44:10 Kasunga wa iŋanda yakwa Yosefu asosa ati, “Cisuma kacibe ifyo fine mwalanda. Lelo uo ndesanga no lukombo, euleba umusha wandi, bambi bonse tababe na mulandu.”" 
Genesis44:11 Bwangu bwangu cila muntu atuula umufuko wakwe panshi, no kukakula akakulapo." 
Genesis44:12 Elyo kasunga wa ŋanda yakwa Yosefu atampa ukulafwailisha, atampilapo umufuko wa mukalamba pali bonse alekeleshako umufuko wakwa kasuli. Asanga ulukombo mu mufuko wakwa Benjamini." 
Genesis44:13 Pakumona ifi bamunyina balepula insalu shabo. Elyo babike ifipe pali bapunda babo, babwelela na ku musumba." 
Genesis44:14 Ilyo Yuda na bamunyina babwelele ku ŋanda, basangile Yosefu acili mu ŋanda. Awe bonse balambalala panshi pa cinso cakwe." 
Genesis44:15 Yosefu abepusha ati, “Cinshi ici mwacita? Bushe tamwishibe ukuti umuntu uuli nga ine kuti aishiba mukupendula.”" 
Genesis44:16 Yuda ayasuka ati, “Nga finshi twingalanda shikulu? Finshi twingasosapo? Nga kuti twatila tatuli na cilubo shani? Lesa nasokolola icilubo ca babomfi benu. Ifwe bonse nomba tuli basha benu, ifwe bene bonse noyu wine basangileko ulukombo.”" 
Genesis44:17 Lelo Yosefu ayasuka ati, “Awe ico cena ine tekuti ncicite! Umuntu wine uyo uo basangile nakwata ulukombo, ewalaba umusha wandi. Imwe bambi bonse bwelelenimo kuli shinwe umutende.”" 
Genesis44:18 Elyo Yuda aile palama kuli Yosefu amweba ati, “Napapata shikulu kutikeni bwino kufyo umubomfi wenu alalanda. Mwifulilwa mubomfi wenu, nangu imwe mwalinganafye na Farao umwine wine." 
Genesis44:19 Shikulu nimwe mwaipwishe ababomfi benu amuti ‘Bushe mwalikwata shinwe nangu munyinenwe umbi?’ 
Genesis44:20 Elyo ifwe twayaswike atuti, ‘Twalikwata shifwe, nomba mukote, elyo na munyinefwe umbi umwaice umwaume uo shifwe afyele mu bukote. Munyina wa uyu mwaice alifwa nomba ashalapofye eka pali bamunyina abaume afyelwe nabo inda imo. Kabili wishi alimutemwa nganshi.’" 
Genesis44:21 Kabili nimwe mwaebele ababomfi benu amuti, ‘Mukamulete kuli ine pakuti na ine nkese mumona.’" 
Genesis44:22 Elyo ifwe shikulu twamwebele atuti, ‘Uyo mwaice tekuti afume pali bawishi, pantu nga afumapo kuti bawishi bafwa.’" 
Genesis44:23 Lelo mwaebele ababomfi benu amuti, ‘Nga cakuti tamwishile na munyinenwe kasuli ninshi tatwakamonane na imwe nakabili.’" 
Genesis44:24 Ilyo twabwelelemo kuli shifwe, umubomfi wenu, twaile mushimikilako ifyo imwe shikulu mwalandile." 
Genesis44:25 “Kabili shifwe aishile tweba ati, ‘Bwelelenimo muye shitako na tumbi utwakulya.’" 
Genesis44:26 Lelo ifwe twamwebele ukuti, ‘Awe iyoo, tekuti tuyeko, kanofye ninshi nga tuli na munyinefwe kasuli, lyena tuleyako. Pantu tatwakaye monana na ulya muntu kanofye tuli na munyinefwe kasuli.’" 
Genesis44:27 Kabili umubomfi wenu, shifwe atwebele ati, ‘Namwishiba ukuti umukashi wandi amfyalilefye abana abaume babili epela." 
Genesis44:28 Umo tatwaba nankwe aliya. Ine nasosele nati cine cine ciswango ca mpanga ecimulepawile. Ukufuma ilyo line nshatala mumona. 
Genesis44:29 Nga cakuti nao mwamusenda, elyo aponena mu busanso, ninshi nimwe mukalenga nkaya ku calo ca bafwa ne cikonko mu bukote bwandi.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Kanshi nomba nga cakuti nabwelelemo kuli batata umubomfi wenu no mwaice tatuli nankwe, kabili nga cakuti batata bakamona ukuti tatuli na mwaice, ninshi bakafwafye apopene." 
Genesis44:31 Pantu batata no mwaice balikatana nganshi mu bumi bwabo, ninshi ifwe fwe babomfi benu tukalenga shifwe akaye ku calo ca bafwa ne cikonko mu bukote bwakwe." 
Genesis44:32 Ne mubomfi wenu nalaile kuli batata ukuti te cakutwishika nkabwesha umwaice umumi. Nasosele nati, ‘Nga cakuti nshimubweseshe kuli imwe, ninshi nkaba no mulandu kuli imwe tata wandi inshiku shonse isha bumi bwandi.’" 
Genesis44:33 Eico nomba napapata, lekeni ne mubomfi wenu nshale umusha wenu shikulu mu cifulo ca mwaice pakuti wena abwelelemo na bamunyina." 
Genesis44:34 Nga ine kuti nabwekelamo shani kuli batata nga nshili na mwaice? Awe iyoo! Mwikaleka nkamoneko ubulanda bukeshila batata.” 
Genesis45:1 Kanshi Yosefu asukile afilwa ukushipikisha pa cinso ca bantu abalemubombela. Elyo aikatisha ishiwi ati, “Bonse abali muno bafumemo.” Kanshi tamwali nelyo umo na Yosefu ilyo aisokolwele kuli bamunyina." 
Genesis45:2 Kabili alikatishe nganshi pakulila icakuti na bena Egupto balyumfwile uko alelila. Neci cintu casukile caumfwika na kwisano kwa Farao. 
Genesis45:3 Elyo Yosefu aeba bamunyina ati, “Nine Yosefu! Bushe batata bacili abomi?” Lelo bamunyina baikatwa no mwenso pakumumona, bafilwa nokumwasuka." 
Genesis45:4 Elyo Yosefu aeba bamunyina ati, “Palameni kuno.” Awe bamupalama. Elyo asosa ati, “Nine Yosefu munyinenwe uo mwashitishe ku Egupto." 
Genesis45:5 Nomba mwiba na bulanda, kabili mwiifulilwa mwe bene pali ico mwanshitishe bandeta kuno, pantu ni Lesa ewantangishe pakuti mpusushe ubumi bwa bantu." 
Genesis45:6 Nomba imyaka yaba ibili iya cipowe mu calo, kabili kushele imyaka imbi isano iyo kushakabe kulima nelyo ukusombola." 
Genesis45:7 Lelo Lesa antumine ukumutangilila pakumupusushishako ku cipowe abakashala pano isonde, elyo no kupususha ubumi bwenu apakalamba." 
Genesis45:8 Kanshi teimwe mwandetele kuno iyoo, ni Lesa. Lesa alincita cilolo wakupanda Farao amano, mushika wa kwisano lyakwe lyonse na kateeka wa calo conse ica Egupto." 
Genesis45:9 “Kanshi kabiyeni bwangu bwangu kuli batata, muli nokuya beba amuti, ‘Umwana wenu Yosefu aleti, Lesa alincita kateeka wa calo conse ica Egupto. Kanshi mwise kuno ndi, mwikokola." 
Genesis45:10 Mukesa ikala mu mpanga ya Gosheni. Kabili mukabafye mupepi na ine, imwe bene, abana benu na beshikulu benu, impaanga ne mbushi shenu, iŋombe shenu na fyonsefye ifyo mwakwata." 
Genesis45:11 Nine wine nkalamufwaila ifyakulya mu Gosheni pantu kucili na imbi imyaka isano iya cipowe iyili nokwisa. Pantu nga teifyo ninshi imwe na bantu muli nabo ne fitekwa fyenu fyonse mukaponena mu bupina.’ 
Genesis45:12 “Awe mwaimwena mwe bene, na iwe munyinane Benjamini waimwena, ukuti icine cine nine Yosefu ne ulelanda na imwe." 
Genesis45:13 Mukaye shimikila batata umucinshi bampeela muno Egupto, elyo na fyonse ifyo mumwene. Kabili mukendeshe ukuleta batata kuno.”" 
Genesis45:14 Elyo Yosefu akumbatila Benjamini munyina alalila no kulila. Benjamini nao akumbata Yosefu, alalila." 
Genesis45:15 Kabili Yosefu alatomona bamunyina pakubaposha, ninshi alelila nokulila. Panuma ya ifi elyo bamunyina balanda nankwe." 
Genesis45:16 Ilyo ilyashi lyafikile kwisano kwa Farao ukuti bamunyina bakwa Yosefu nabesa, Farao na bacilolo bakwe bonse balisansamwike." 
Genesis45:17 Farao epakweba Yosefu ati, “Webe bamunonko auti, ‘Mucite ifi. Twikeni inama shenu ifipe mubwelelemo ku calo ca Kenani." 
Genesis45:18 Mukaye buula bawiso ne ndupwa shenu, mukabalete kuno. Ine nkesa mupeela impanga yawamisha muno mu Egupto elyo mukaleipakisha ku fisabo ifisuma fya muno calo.’" 
Genesis45:19 Kabili ubakonkomeshe nokuti, ‘Sendeni amaceleta ya muno Egupto pakusendelamo abana benu na bakashi benu. Kabili mukasende shinwe nokwisa kuno." 
Genesis45:20 Mwikasakamana pa fipe fyenu mukasha, pantu fyonse ifyawamisha mu calo conse ica Egupto fikaba fyenu.’”" 
Genesis45:21 Kanshi bamwana Israeli nabo efyo bacitile. Yosefu abapeele amaceleta ngefyo Farao akonkomeshe. Kabili abapeele ne fyakulya pa bulendo. 
Genesis45:22 Yosefu apeele cila muntu icakufwala icipya, lelo Benjamini wena amupeele indalama sha silifa imyanda itatu (300) ne fyakufwala ifipya fisano." 
Genesis45:23 Wishi ena amutumine bapunda ikumi limo abamusendele ifintu ifyawamisha ifya mu calo ca Egupto, elyo na bapunda abakota ikumi abasendele iŋanu, imikate ne fyakulya fimbi ifya pa bulendo." 
Genesis45:24 Elyo Yosefu abaleka ukuti baleya. Cilya balaya abeba ati, “Mwilaumana mu nshila!”" 
Genesis45:25 Kanshi balimine bafuma mu Egupto baisa kuli shibo Yakobo mu calo ca Kenani. 
Genesis45:26 Elyo baeba shibo abati, “Ala Yosefu epo acili umumi! Kabili euteeka ne calo conse ica Egupto.” Yakobo asunguka, afilwa nokusumina ifyo bamweba." 
Genesis45:27 Lelo ilyo bamweba fyonse ifyo Yosefu abebele, kabili amona na maceleta Yosefu atumine ayakumutwala ku Egupto, lyena umutima wakwa shibo Yakobo waikala." 
Genesis45:28 Elyo Israeli asosa ati, “Nashininkisha kanshi! Umwana wandi Yosefu acili umumi. Ndifye nokuya mumona ilyo nshilafwa.”" 
Genesis46:1 Kanshi Israeli alimine asenda na fyonse ifyo akwete. Ilyo afikile ku Beresheba atuula amalambo kuli Lesa wakwa Isaki wishi. 
Genesis46:2 Elyo ubushiku mu cimonwa Lesa alandile kuli Israeli ati, “Yakobo, Yakobo!” Nao ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi.”" 
Genesis46:3 Lesa amweba ati, “Nine Lesa, Lesa wakwa wiso. Witiina ukuya ku Egupto, pantu eko nkakulenga ukabe umushobo ukalamba." 
Genesis46:4 Ine nkaya nobe ku Egupto kabili nine wine nkakubwesesha muli cino calo. Elyo kabili ni Yosefu wine eukakonga pakufwa.” 
Genesis46:5 Elyo Yakobo afumine ku Beresheba. Bamwana Israeli abaume baninika Yakobo na bana babo na bakashi babo mu maceleta Farao atumine kukwisa basenda. 
Genesis46:6 Basendela kumo ne fitekwa fyabo ne fyuma banonkele mu calo ca Kenani. Yakobo epakuya ku Egupto pamo no lupwa lwakwe lonse. 
Genesis46:7 Akukile ku Egupto pamo na bamwane abaume na beshikulu abaume, abana bakwe abanakashi na beshikulu abanakashi, kanshi emukuti ulupwa lwakwe lonsefye." 
Genesis46:8 Aya e mashina ya bena Israeli, Yakobo no lupwa lwakwe, abakukile ku Egupto. Ibeli lyakwa Yakobo ni Rubeni." 
Genesis46:9 Abana abaume abakwa Rubeni, ni Hanoki, Palu, Hesroni na Kami." 
Genesis46:10 Bamwana Simeoni abaume ni Yemueli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Sohari na Shauli uo Simeoni afyele mu mwanakashi umwina Kenani." 
Genesis46:11 Bamwana Levi abaume ni Geshoni, Koati na Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Bamwana Yuda abaume ni Ere, Onani, Shela, Peresi na Sera, (Lelo Ere na Onani bena bafwilile mu calo ca Kenani). Abana abaume bakwa Peresi ni Hesroni na Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Bamwana Isaka abaume, ni Tola, Pua, Yashubu na Shimuroni." 
Genesis46:14 Bamwana Sebuloni abaume ni Seredi, Eloni na Yaleeli." 
Genesis46:15 Aba e bana abaume abo Leya afyele kuli Yakobo ilyo bali mu calo ca Padani Aramu, ukubikapo na Dina umwana umwanakashi. Kanshi bonse pamo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Yakobo na Leya abaume na banakashi bali amakumi yatatu na batatu (33)." 
Genesis46:16 Bamwana Gadi abaume, ni Sefoni, Hagi, Shuni, Esiboni, Eri, Arodi na Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Bamwana Asheri abaume ni Imina, Ishifa, Ishifi na Beriya, elyo nkashi yabo ni Sera. Beriya ali na bana abaume babili, Heberi na Matikieli." 
Genesis46:18 Aba e bana na beshikulu abakwa Yakobo na Silipa. Silipa eulya musha Labani apeele kuli mwane Leya. Bonse pamo bali ikumi limo na mutanda (16). 
Genesis46:19 Yosefu na Benjamini e bana abaume bakwa Rakeli umukashi wakwa Yakobo. 
Genesis46:20 Mu calo ca Egupto, Yosefu afyele abana abaume babili, Manase na Efulemu muli Asenati mwana Potifera shimapepo wa ku Oni." 
Genesis46:21 Bamwana Benjamini abaume, ni Bela, Bekeri, Ashibeli, Gera, Namani, Ehi, Roshi, Mupimu, Hupimu na Adi." 
Genesis46:22 Aba e bana abaume na beshikulupo abakwa Rakeli na Yakobo. Bonse pamo bali ikumi limo na bane (14). 
Genesis46:23 Mwana Dani umwaume, ni Hushimu." 
Genesis46:24 Bamwana Naftali abaume, ni Yaseeli, Guni, Yesa na Shilemu." 
Genesis46:25 Aba e bana abaume na beshikulu abakwa Yakobo na Bilua. Bilua eulya musha Labani apeele kuli mwane Rakeli. Bonse bali pamo cine lubali. 
Genesis46:26 Kanshi aba mu lupwa lwakwa Yakobo, emukuti bamwane na beshikulu bakwe abo aile nabo ku Egupto ukwabula ukupendelako abakashi ba bana bakwe, bali bonse pamo amakumi mutanda na mutanda (66)." 
Genesis46:27 Yosefu afyele abana abaume babili mu Egupto. Kanshi bonse pamo, ba lupwa lwakwa Yakobo abaile ku Egupto, bali amakumi cine lubali (70)." 
Genesis46:28 Nomba Yakobo atangishe Yuda kuli Yosefu pakuti abatangilile mu nshila ya ku Gosheni. Ilyo bafikile mu mpanga ya Gosheni," 
Genesis46:29 Yosefu apekanye iceleta lyakwe, aima kukwisa kumanya wishi Israeli ku Gosheni. Kutifye cilya afika pali wishi, Yosefu akumbatila wishi, alalila no kulila pa nshita ikalamba." 
Genesis46:30 Israeli aeba Yosefu ati, “Awe nomba kuti nafwa, apo naimwena ukuti ucili umumi.”" 
Genesis46:31 Elyo Yosefu aebele bamunyina na ba mu ŋanda yakwa wishi ati, “Ine nalaya kuli Farao nje mweba nati, ‘Bamunyinane na ba mu ŋanda ya batata, abaleikala mu calo ca Kenani, nabesa kuli ine." 
Genesis46:32 Aba bantu ni bakacema balateka ifitekwa. Kanshi beshile ne mpaanga ne mbushi, iŋombe na fyonse fintu bakwata.’" 
Genesis46:33 Ilyo Farao akamwita, nga aipusha ati, ‘Mulimo nshi mubomba?’" 
Genesis46:34 Mukasuke amuti, ‘Ukufumafye ku bwaice ababomfi bobe bateka ifitekwa ngefyo ifikolwe fyabo fyalecita.’ Elyo lyena akamusuminisha ukwikala mu mpanga ya Gosheni. Pantu bakacema bonse balipatwa ku bena Egupto.”" 
Genesis47:1 Kanshi Yosefu aile kuli Farao amweba ati, “Batata na bamunyinane nabesa ukufuma ku calo ca Kenani. Beshile ne mikuni ya mpaanga, imbushi ne ŋombe pamo ne fintu fyabo fyonse. Bali nomba ku Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:2 Elyo Yosefu abuulapo bamunyina basano (5) abatwala kuli Farao. 
Genesis47:3 Farao aipusha bamunyina Yosefu ati, “Mulimo nshi mubomba?” Nabo bayasuka Farao abati, “Ababomfi bobe ni bakacema, pamofye nge fyali ifikolwe fyesu.”" 
Genesis47:4 Kabili bamweba nokuti, “Twishile kukwikala kuno nga beni, pantu mu Kenani muli icipowe icabipisha, na babomfi benu tabakwete kwakucemena ifitekwa. Kanshi twapapata lekeni ababomfi benu bekaleko mu Gosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Farao epakweba Yosefu ati, “Bawiso na bamunonko beshile kuli iwe." 
Genesis47:6 Cino calo ca Egupto calo cobe, kanshi kuti waleka bawiso na bamunonko baikala mu mpanga iyawamishapo. Leka bekale mu Gosheni mwine. Kabili nga nawishiba ukuti palipo bamo abacenjela mukusunga ifitekwa, ubebe balensungilako ifitekwa fyandi.”" 
Genesis47:7 Kabili Yosefu aile buula wishi, amutwala kuli Farao. Elyo Yakobo apaala Farao." 
Genesis47:8 Farao aipusha Yakobo ati, “Bushe uli ne myaka inga?”" 
Genesis47:9 Yakobo ayasuka Farao ati, “Imyaka yandi iyakuseuluka ngo mweni pano isonde ili umwanda umo na makumi yatatu (130), nayo inono kabili iya macushi. Tekuti ilingane ne myaka iyakuseuluka kwa fikolwe fyandi.”" 
Genesis47:10 Elyo Yakobo apaala Farao, afumako, aya nokuya." 
Genesis47:11 Kanshi Yosefu epakulanga wishi na bamunyina apakwikala mu calo ca Egupto. Ukulingana ne fyakonkomeshe Farao, Yosefu abapeela impanga iyawamishepo mu calo ca Egupto, abaputwila mu citungu ca Ramesesi." 
Genesis47:12 Kabili Yosefu alapeela ifyakulya kuli wishi na bamunyina na ba lupwa bonse abakwa wishi ukulingana no bwingi bwa bana bakwete. 
Genesis47:13 Nomba ifyakulya mu calo conse tamwali pantu icipowe calikulishe nganshi. Abantu mu calo ca Egupto na mu calo ca Kenani amaka yalacepelakofye ku mulandu wa cipowe. 
Genesis47:14 Yosefu alelonganika indalama isho abantu ba mu Egupto na ba mu Kenani baleshitamo iŋanu. Kabili aletwala ishi ndalama kwisano kwa Farao. 
Genesis47:15 Ilyo indalama abena Egupto na bena Kenani shapwile, abena Egupto bonse epakwisa kuli Yosefu, bamweba abati, “Tupeeleko ifyakulya. Bushe cinshi twingafwila na iwe ulemonako? Ifwe indalama nashipwa.”" 
Genesis47:16 Yosefu abasuka ati, “Apo indalama shipwile, kanshi akuleteni ifitekwa fyenu, twakulakabushanya ifitekwa fyenu ne fyakulya.”" 
Genesis47:17 Kanshi abantu nabo balaleta ifitekwa fyabo kuli Yosefu, bakabalwe, impaanga, imbushi, iŋombe na bapunda, elyo nao alebapeelelapo ifyakulya. Kanshi uyo mwaka onse wena alebapeela ifyakulya mukukabushanya nabo ne fitekwa fyabo." 
Genesis47:18 Ilyo uyo mwaka wapwile, umwaka wakonkelepo abantu balishile kuli Yosefu, bamweba abati, “Shikulu tekuti tukufise, indalama ifwe shalipwa ne fitekwa fyesu niwe wakwata. Kanshi ifwe shikulu, tatukwete nelyo cimo icishele kanofye ifwe bene na mabala yesu." 
Genesis47:19 Cinshi twingalobela pamo na mabala yesu, na iwe ulemonako? Kanshi tushite na mabala yesu pa fyakulya uletupeela elyo ifwe tukaba abasha bakwa Farao na mabala yesu nao yakaba yakwe. Tupeeleko imbuto pakuti tube abomi twikafwa ku nsala na mabala yesu yelasapilwafye.”" 
Genesis47:20 Kanshi efyo Yosefu ashitile Farao amabala yonse mu calo ca Egupto. Umwina Egupto onse alishitishe amabala yakwe pantu icipowe calibipishe nganshi. Awe casuka icalo conse caba cuma cakwa Farao. 
Genesis47:21 Abantu bena Yosefu abacita abasha, ukutula ku mupaka umo wa Egupto ukufika na ku ubiye." 
Genesis47:22 Amabala ya bashimapepo yena Yosefu tayashitile iyoo, pantu bashimapepo balepoka indalama bali nokupoka kuli Farao. Kanshi emo baleshita ifyakulya balekabila. Eico bashimapepo bena tabashitishe mabala yabo." 
Genesis47:23 Elyo Yosefu aebele abantu ati, “Kanshi lelo nimushita pamo na mabala yenu, eico nomba muli bakwa Farao. Imbuto ishi mubyale mu mabala yenu." 
Genesis47:24 Lelo ukulobolola nga kwaisa, mukabuula umufuko umo pa mifuko isano iya fisabo no kupeela kuli Farao. Lelo ifyo fisabo mukashala nafyo fyenu, fikabe e mbuto shakubyala mu mabala elyo kabili efikaba fyakulya fyenu mwe bene ne ndupwa shenu na bana benu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Abantu bamwasuka abati, “Awe namupususha ubumi bwesu. Shikulu, nga twingasanga uluse pa cinso cenu, ifwe tukabafye abasha bakwa Farao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Kanshi Yosefu epakupanga ifunde ilyabako ukufika na lelo ilyo abena Egupto bali nokulakonka. Ili funde lyakuti umwina Egupto onse ali nokupeela kuli Farao icipande cimo pa fipande fisano fya fisabo fyonse alobolola. Amabala ya bashimapepo yena eyashasangwike amabala yakwa Farao. 
Genesis47:27 Abena Israeli baikele mu Egupto mu mpanga ya Gosheni. Muli iyi mpanga abena Israeli balinonkelemo ifyuma, kabili basanda, bafula nganshi." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo aikele mu calo ca Egupto imyaka ikumi limo na cine lubali (17), kabili ali ne myaka yakufyalwa umwanda umo na makumi yane na cine lubali (147)." 
Genesis47:29 Ilyo inshita ya kufwa kwakwa Israeli yapaleme, aitile mwane Yosefu, amweba ati, “Nga cingakusekesha, pisha ukuboko kobe mwisamba lye tanta lyandi ulape ukuti ukankwatila uluse ne cishinka. Wikanshiika muno Egupto." 
Genesis47:30 Ilyo nkaya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyandi, mukamfumye muno mu Egupto mukaye nshiika ukwashiikwa ifikolwe fyandi.” Yosefu amweba ati, “Nkacita ngefyo mwalanda.”" 
Genesis47:31 Israeli amweba ati, “Kanshi lapa.” Awe Yosefu nao alapa. Elyo Israeli akontamina ku mitwe ya busanshi bwakwe." 
Genesis48:1 Pati papite inshita elyo baishile eba Yosefu abati, “Bawiso balwele.” Elyo Yosefu abuula bamwane babili abaume, Manase na Efulemu, aya nabo." 
Genesis48:2 Cilya baeba Yakobo abati, “Mwano Yosefu aisa kukukumona,” Israeli aikoselesha aikala na pa busanshi." 
Genesis48:3 Elyo Yakobo alaeba Yosefu ati, “Lesa Umwine wa maka yonse alimonekele ku Lusi mu calo ca Kenani, elyo no kumpaala alimpaalile." 
Genesis48:4 Kabili anjebele nokuti, ‘Nkakulenga ukusanda no kufula. Nkakulenga ukuba ibumba lya mishobo iyingi. Kabili nkapeela ici calo ku bana bobe abali nokukukonkapo ukuti cikaleba icalo cabo lyonsefye.’" 
Genesis48:5 Kanshi abana benu abaume babili abo wafyele muno Egupto nshilati njise kuno, nabo nomba bana bandi. Efulemu na Manase bakulaba abana bandi kwati nifi fyaba abana bandi Rubeni na Simeoni." 
Genesis48:6 Lelo abana bambi abo wafyala panuma ya aba, bena bana bobe. Abo bena bakapokela ifyacishilano mu mashina ya bamunyina, Efulemu na Manase." 
Genesis48:7 Pantu naliketwe no bulanda ilyo nalefuma ku calo ca Padani Aramu. Ni pali ubo bulendo elyo Rakeli afwile ninshi tulifye mupepi na ku Efulata. Kanshi namushiikile kulya kwine mumbali ya musebo uwalola ku Efulata, e Betelemu wine.”" 
Genesis48:8 Ilyo Israeli amwene bamwana Yosefu abaume, aipwishe ati, “Nga aba ni bani?”" 
Genesis48:9 Yosefu aeba wishi ati, “Aba bana bandi Lesa ampeela kuno.” Elyo Israeli asosa ati, “Balete kuno uleke mbapaale.”" 
Genesis48:10 Nomba Israeli alefifitilafye ku mulandu wa bukote, alemonafye panono. Kanshi Yosefu aleta bamwane abapalamika kuli wishi. Wishi nao abatomona pakubaposha, kabili abafukatila." 
Genesis48:11 Elyo Israeli aeba Yosefu ati, “Nshalesubila nelyo panono ukumona icinso cobe nakabili, lelo nomba Lesa nalenga ukuti mone na bamwano bene.”" 
Genesis48:12 Elyo Yosefu afumya bamwane mu ceni cakwa Israeli, akontamina panshi." 
Genesis48:13 Kabili Yosefu alibuulile bamwane bonse babili. Efulemu amupisha ku kulyo kwakwe pakuti alungatane no kuboko kwa kuso ukwakwa Israeli. Manase nao amupisha ku kuso kwakwe, pakuti alungatane no kuboko kwa kulyo ukwakwa Israeli. Elyo abapalamika kuli Israeli." 
Genesis48:14 Lelo Israeli apusanya amaboko yakwe. Kanshi epakubika icisansa cakwe ica ku kulyo pa mutwe wakwa Efulemu, nangu ali e mwaice bantu. Elyo icisansa cakwe ica ku kuso cena acibika pa mutwe wakwa Manase nangu Manase ali e beli." 
Genesis48:15 Elyo apaala Yosefu ati, “Lesa uo ifikolwe fyandi Abrahamu na Isaki baletumika, Lesa uwaba kacema wandi mu bumi bwandi bonse ukufika na lelo," 
Genesis48:16 Malaika uwampususha ku fikali fyonse, engapaala aba baice. Ishina lyandi na mashina ya fikolwe fyandi Abrahamu na Isaki yengakonkanyapo ukwishibikwa muli aba baice. Bengasanduluka, bafule nganshi pesonde.”" 
Genesis48:17 Ilyo Yosefu amwene ukuti wishi abikile icisansa cakwe ica ku kulyo pa mutwe wakwa Efulemu, tacamusansamwishe iyoo. Kanshi epakwikata ukuboko kwakwa wishi ukuti akufumye pa mutwe wakwa Efulemu, elyo akubike pa mutwe wakwa Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Yosefu aeba wishi ati, “Iyoo tata, uyu e beli, eo mubike pa mutwe wakwe icisansa cenu ica ku kulyo.”" 
Genesis48:19 Lelo wishi akaana ati, “Ninjishiba mwana wandi, ala ninjishiba. Manase nao wine akaba umushobo, kabili uukulu. Lelo kwena, uwamwaice Efulemu akacindamapo ukucila uwamukalamba. Kabili aba mu lupwa lwakwe bena bakaba imishobo iyingi.”" 
Genesis48:20 Kanshi epakubapaala ubo bwine bushiku ati, “Abena Israeli bakalabomfya ishina lyobe pakupaala abati, ‘Lesa engalenga ube kwati ni Efulemu na Manase.’” Kanshi efyo Israeli abikile Efulemu ukuba umukalamba pali Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Elyo Israeli aebele Yosefu ati, “Mona ine ndi mupepi nokufwa, lelo Lesa akulaba na imwe, kabili akamubweseshamo ku calo ca fikolwe fyenu." 
Genesis48:22 Lelo pafyo bamunonko bapoka, iwe nakulundilapo icalo ca lupili ico napokele ku lupanga lwandi no buta bwandi ku bena Amoli.”" 
Genesis49:1 Elyo Yakobo aitile bamwane abaume, abeba ati, “Palameni kuno pakuti mwebeko ifili nokumufikila mu nshiku ishileisa." 
Genesis49:2 “Mwe bamwana Yakobo, longaneni, mumfwe, kutikeni kuli shinwe Israeli." 
Genesis49:3 “Rubeni, niwe beli lyandi, niwe maka yandi, niwe mwamonekele pakubala amaka yandi. Niwe wacila bonse ukucindama, niwe wacila bonse amaka." 
Genesis49:4 Usunkana nga menshi pali bemba, lelo teiwe ukacindamisha, pantu waile ku busanshi bwakwa wiso, wakowesha no musengele wandi." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeoni na Levi bana ba mano yamo yene, impanga shabo fyanso fya misoka." 
Genesis49:6 Ine tekuti njibike mu mapange yabo. Ine tekuti nsangwe ku kulongana kwabo. Pantu baipeye abantu ku cipyu cabo, balemanike bacilume wa ŋombe umo batemenwe." 
Genesis49:7 Ubukali bwabo nabulapishiwa pantu bwacilamo, ne cipyu cabo pantu ca buluku. Ine nkabapashila mu bantu bakwa Yakobo, nkabasalanganisha mu bena Israeli." 
Genesis49:8 “Yuda, bamunonko bakalakutasha. Abalwani bobe ukalabakama pa mukoshi. Bamunonko bakalakukontamina." 
Genesis49:9 We Yuda, uli mwana wa nkalamo, utila waipaya, wabwelulukako we mwana wandi. Ulalalilila, ulelambalala kwati ni nkalamo ilume, kwati ni nkalamo ikota, nga ni nani engapama ukumusunkamo?" 
Genesis49:10 Yuda tapakabe wakukupoka ubufumu, nelyo inkonto yabufumu ukufuma kuli iwe, mpaka umwine waiko akese, uo imishobo yonse ikalabeela." 
Genesis49:11 Akalakakila umusepela wa punda wakwe ku mwangashi, no mwana wa punda wakwe ku myangashi iyawamisha. Akalasamba ifyakufwala fyakwe mu mwangashi, ne mingila yakwe mu mulopa wa mwangashi." 
Genesis49:12 Amenso yakwe yakakashikapo pa mwangashi, na meno yakwe yakabuutapo pa mukaka." 
Genesis49:13 “Sebuloni akalaikala mu lulamba lwa bemba, kabili akaba icabu icisuma ica mato ayakalamba. Umupaka wa calo cakwe ukafika ku Sidoni." 
Genesis49:14 “Isaka ni punda uwakosa, uubwandatala pakati ka mitumba ibili iya fipe." 
Genesis49:15 Ilyo amona ukuti ni ncende isuma apakutuushisha, ne calo camuwamina, lyena atotobela panshi pakuti bamutwike ifipe fyafina, aba umusha wakubomba umulaasa." 
Genesis49:16 “Dani akapingwila abantu bakwe, kwatifye luko lumo mu bena Israeli." 
Genesis49:17 Dani akaba ni nsoka ya mumbali ya musebo, ni nsoka yabusungu mumbali ya nshila, iyisuma kabalwe mu nkolokoso ukuti no unininepo aponene panshi ubuseneme." 
Genesis49:18 “Ine mpembela ipusukilo lyobe, we Yawe." 
Genesis49:19 “Gadi, ibumba lya bapupu likamusansa, Lelo akabalwisha no kubakonka lunkwa lunkwa." 
Genesis49:20 “Asheri, ifyakulya fyakwe fikaba ifyanona, akalapekanya ifyakulya ifyakuti ne mfumu yalyako." 
Genesis49:21 “Naftali, ni nsebula iyiyendelafye, ifyala utwana utwayemba." 
Genesis49:22 “Yosefu mwangashi uutwalisha, mwangashi uutwalisha uwaba mupepi na kamfukumfuku, ne misambo yauko itabilila na ku cibumba." 
Genesis49:23 Aba mata bamulwishishe bukali bukali bamulashile imifwi mu lupato. 
Genesis49:24 Lelo ubuta bwakwe tabuteletenta, amaboko yakwe yantu yakosa, ayasalapuka, ku maka yakwa Lesa wamaka yonse uwakwa Yakobo, ku maka yakwa Kacema kabili Icilibwe cakwa Israeli." 
Genesis49:25 Pantu ni Lesa wakwa wiso eukwafwako iwe, pantu Umwine wa maka yonse ni Lesa wa maka yonse eukupaala iwe, ne paalo lya ku mulu, ne paalo lya panshi ye tenga, ne paalo lye bele ne fumo." 
Genesis49:26 Amapaalo yakwa wiso yamaka ukucila amapaalo ya mpili shakale na kale, ukucila no bukankala bwa mpili sha pe na pe. Aya mapaalo yonse yengekila pa mutwe wakwa Yosefu, pa mpumi ya uo Lesa aipatwila pali bamunyina." 
Genesis49:27 “Benjamini, mumbulu ukali. Ulucelo asantaula ico ekete, icungulo aleakanya ifyo atapile.”" 
Genesis49:28 Kanshi aba bonse e fikolwe fya nko ikumi limo na shibili (12) isha bena Israeli. Kabili aya e mashiwi shibo Yakobo abebele ilyo alebapaala. Cila muntu apaalilwe ne paalo ilyamulingile. 
Genesis49:29 Elyo Yakobo akonkomeshe bamwane ati, “Ine nomba nalaya ukwaba ifikolwe fyandi. Mukanshiike ukwalala ifikolwe fyandi mu lucengo ulwaba mwibala lyakwa Efuloni umwina Hiti." 
Genesis49:30 Ulu lucengo lwaba mwibala lya Makipela mupepi na ku Mamure, mu calo ca Kenani. Abrahamu ashitile ulu lucengo pamo ne bala line kuli Efuloni umwina Hiti, pakuti akwate incende ya nshinshi." 
Genesis49:31 Eko bashiika Abrahamu no mukashi wakwe Sara, kabili ekwashiikwa Isaki no mukashi wakwe Rebeka. Elyo na ine kulya kwine eko nashiika Leya." 
Genesis49:32 Ibala no lucengo lwabamo fyashitilwe ku bena Hiti.” 
Genesis49:33 Cilya Yakobo apwa ukukonkomesha bamwane, abwesesha amakasa yakwe pa busanshi, aleka no mweo, aya ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe." 
Genesis50:1 Elyo Yosefu akumbatile wishi alelila, amutomona pakuloosha." 
Genesis50:2 Kabili Yosefu akonkomesha bashiŋanga abalemubombela ukuti bomike icitumbi cakwa wishi. Kanshi efyo bashiŋanga baumike icitumbi cakwa Israeli. 
Genesis50:3 Bashiŋanga pakumika icitumbi cakwa Israeli bapwile inshiku ishituntulu amakumi yane (40), pantu e nshiku balepwa pakumika icitumbi. Abena Egupto nabo bapwile inshiku amakumi cine lubali (70) balooshafye Israeli." 
Genesis50:4 Ilyo inshiku shakuloosha Israeli shapwile, Yosefu aebele ababomfi ba kwisano kwa Farao ati, “Nga cingamusekesha, munandileko kuli Farao. Napapata, mumwebe amuti," 
Genesis50:5 ‘Batata banengele ukuti ndape umulapo. Basosele ukuti, “Ine ndi mupepi nokufwa, kanshi ukanshiike mu nindi naimbile ne mwine, mu calo ca Kenani.” Kanshi lekeni nje nkaye shiika batata, elyo nkabwele.’”" 
Genesis50:6 Farao ayasuka ati, “Kanshi kabiye uye shiika bawiso, ngefyo walapile kuli bawiso.”" 
Genesis50:7 Yosefu kanshi alimine nokulaya kukushiika wishi. Ababomfi bonse bakwa Farao, bacilolo ba kwisano na bacilolo bonse aba mu Egupto balimine baya na Yosefu." 
Genesis50:8 Aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yosefu na bamunyina na bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yakobo nabo baile nankwe. Abashele mu Gosheni bana babo, impaanga ne mbushi shabo ne ŋombe shabo." 
Genesis50:9 Abantu ba maceleta na baninine pali bakabalwe nabo bene baile na Yosefu. Kanshi lyali ibumba ilikalamba nganshi. 
Genesis50:10 Ilyo bafikile pa lubansa lwa Atadi ulo balepuminapo iŋanu ulwali mupepi na ku mumana wa Yordani, bateka icililo, baloosha apakalamba no kulila nganshi. Yosefu ateka icililo ca nshiku cine lubali pakuloosha wishi." 
Genesis50:11 Ilyo abena Kenani abaleikala kulya bamona icililo batekele mu lubansa lwa Atadi ulwakupuminapo iŋanu, balasosa abati, “Abena Egupto nabateka icililo icikalamba nganshi.” Kanshi eico bainikile iyi ncende ishina lya Abeli Misraimu." 
Genesis50:12 Kanshi bamwana Yakobo bacitile fyonse ngefyo shibo abakonkomeshe. 
Genesis50:13 Balisendele icitumbi cakwe ku calo ca Kenani. Bacishiika na mu lucengo lwa mwibala lya Makipela mupepi na ku Mamure. E lucengo pamo pene ne bala Abrahamu ashitile kuli Efuloni umwina Hiti pakuti akwate incende ya nshinshi. 
Genesis50:14 Panuma yakushiika wishi, Yosefu alibwelelemo ku Egupto pamo pene na bamunyina na bantu bambi bonse abaile nankwe kukushiika wishi." 
Genesis50:15 Ilyo bamunyina kwa Yosefu bamwene ukuti shibo afwa, balalanda abati, “Cikaba shani nga cakuti Yosefu atupata, alafwaya no kuilandula pa fibi twamucitile?”" 
Genesis50:16 Kanshi bamunyina epakutuma amashiwi kuli Yosefu abati, “Bawiso ilyo bashilafwa, batukonkomeshe ukuti," 
Genesis50:17 mukebe Yosefu amuti, ‘Nakupapata belela bamunonko uluse pa filubo bakulufyenye na pa bubi bacitile kuli iwe.’ Kanshi twapapata belela uluse ababomfi bakwa Lesa wa bawiso ububi bwabo.” Ilyo Yosefu apokelele aya mashiwi, awe alalila no kulila." 
Genesis50:18 Elyo bamunyina baishile kuli Yosefu baiposa panshi, bamweba abati, “Ifwe tuli basha bobe.”" 
Genesis50:19 Lelo Yosefu abeba ati, “Iyoo, mwitiina. Bushe ine kuti naba pa malo yakwa Lesa?" 
Genesis50:20 Kwena imwe mwali na mapange yakuncita icibi, lelo Lesa wena ali na mapange yakucita icisuma ukupususha ubumi bwa bantu abengi ngefi fine cilecitika nomba." 
Genesis50:21 Kanshi mwilatiina nelyo cimo. Nine wine nakulamufwaila ifyakulya imwe na bana benu.” Efyo Yosefu abatekele imitima mukubalandila amashiwi ayasuma. 
Genesis50:22 Yosefu aikele mu Egupto pamo pene na bonse ba lupwa lwakwa wishi. Aikele umumi imyaka umwanda umo ne kumi limo (110). 
Genesis50:23 Yosefu amwene abana bakwa Efulemu na beshikulu bakwa Efulemu bene. Ilyo bamwana Makiri umwana wakwa Manase balefyalwa, Yosefu alebapokelela no kubateka pa molu yakwe." 
Genesis50:24 Kabili Yosefu aebele bamunyina ati, “Ine nomba ndi mupepi nokufwa. Lelo Lesa cine cine akesa mupempula. Elyo akamufumya muli cino calo, akamutwale na ku calo alaile no mulapopo kuli Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo.”" 
Genesis50:25 Kabili Yosefu aebele bamwana Israeli ati, “Lapeni umulapo ukuti cine cine Lesa nga amupempula mukasenda amafupa yandi ukufuma kuno.”" 
Genesis50:26 Kanshi Yosefu afwile ninshi ali ne myaka umwanda umo ne kumi limo (110). Elyo panuma yakumika icitumbi cakwe, bacibikile mu mbokoshi ye libwe mu Egupto mwine." 
Exodus1:1 Aya e mashina ya bamwana Israeli abaume pamo ne ndupwa shabo shonse, abakonkele shibo Yakobo ku calo ca Egupto." 
Exodus1:2 Rubeni, Simeoni, Levi, Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Isaka, Sebuloni, Benjamini," 
Exodus1:4 Dani, Naftali, Gadi na Asheri." 
Exodus1:5 Bonse pamo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Yakobo bali amakumi cine lubali (70). Yosefu mwana Yakobo wena iyo nshita ninshi ali mu Egupto. 
Exodus1:6 Nomba Yosefu na bamunyina bonse na ba muli ilya nkulo bonse balifwile. 
Exodus1:7 Lelo abena Israeli bali no bufyashi, kabili no kufula bafulileko nganshi. Bafulishe icakuti bakumenefye konse mu Egupto, kabili bali abamaka nganshi." 
Exodus1:8 Nomba imfumu imbi iyishaishibe Yosefu, yatampile ukuteeka mu Egupto." 
Exodus1:9 Elyo iyi mfumu yaebele abantu baiko aiti, “Mwamona, aba bantu abena Israeli nabafulisha nganshi, kabili baliba abamaka nganshi ukutucila." 
Exodus1:10 Kanshi natubacenjelele epali balafulilako. Kabili nge nkondo yabuka kuti baisa twalukila, baba pamo na balwani besu, batulwisha, bafuma na mu calo baya.”" 
Exodus1:11 Kanshi elyo basontele abakwangalila abasha. Balebapeela incito ishakosa pakubacusha. Bakuulile imfumu Farao imisumba ya matala Pitomu na Ramesesi. 
Exodus1:12 Lelo nangu babikilepofye ukubacusha nganshi, abena Israeli bena balefulilakofye no kusalangana mu calo conse. Kanshi abena Egupto batampile kulatiina abena Israeli nganshi," 
Exodus1:13 no kulababomfya buluku buluku. 
Exodus1:14 Balengele ubumi bwabo ukubipa nganshi pa mulandu wa milimo ya lucu mukukandila iloba, mukutama amatafwali, ne milimo yonse iyalekana lekana iya mu mpanga. Mu milimo yabo yonse abena Egupto balebabomfya buluku buluku." 
Exodus1:15 Elyo imfumu ya Egupto yaebele banacimbusa babili Abahibulu Shifura na Pua ukuti," 
Exodus1:16 “Ilyo muleyafwilisha banamayo Abahibulu ukupaapa, pa cakupaapilapo cine nga mwamona mwaume mumwipaye, nga mwanakashi mwimwipaya.”" 
Exodus1:17 Lelo aba banacimbusa baletiina Lesa, tabaleipaya abana baume, tabalecita ifyo imfumu ya mu Egupto yabebele." 
Exodus1:18 Elyo imfumu yaitile banacimbusa, yalabepusha aiti, “Cinshi mwalecitila ifi? Cinshi mushaleipaila abana baume?”" 
Exodus1:19 Nabo bayasuka Farao abati, “We mfumu, banamayo Abahibulu tababa nga banamayo abena Egupto. Bena baba abakosa, bapaapa ilyo banacimbusa tabalafikako.”" 
Exodus1:20 Lesa nao epakulenga banacimbusa ukushuka. Abena Israeli bena elyo bacililako ukufula kabili baba abamaka nganshi. 
Exodus1:21 Pa mulandu wakutiina Lesa, nao Lesa alipeele banacimbusa abana." 
Exodus1:22 Elyo Farao akonkomeshe abantu bakwe bonse ukuti, “Muleposa umwana mwaume onse uwafyalwa mu mumana wa Nailo. Lelo abana banakashi bena mwilabepaya iyoo.”" 
Exodus2:1 Umuntu umo uwa mu luko lwakwa Levi aupile umwanakashi wa mu luko lwakwe ulwa bwina Levi. 
Exodus2:2 Uyu mwanakashi alimite, afyala no mwana umwaume. Pakumona ifyo umwana ali uwayemba, nyina amufishile pa myeshi itatu." 
Exodus2:3 Nomba ilyo afililwe ukutwalilila ukufisa umwana, abuulile ulupe lwa matete, ashingwilako amanenekela na mapula. Emo abika umwana, ayabika no lupe mu matete mu lulamba lwa mumana." 
Exodus2:4 Nkashi wa mwana aiminina akatalamukila pakuti amone ifyalamucitikila. 
Exodus2:5 Nomba umwana wakwa Farao umwanakashi aishile ku mumana kukowa. Ababomfi bakwe abakashana balatandala mu lulamba lwa mumana. Awe ati amone ulupe mu matete, atuma umubomfi wakwe umo mukashana ukuya luleta." 
Exodus2:6 Cilya akupukulapo, amonamo umwana umwaume alelila. Uluse lwamwikata, asosa ati, “Uyu mwana, mwana wa muntu umo pa Bahibulu.”" 
Exodus2:7 Elyo nkashi ya ulya mwana aipusha mwana Farao umwanakashi ati, “Bushe nje mufwailako umwanakashi Umuhibulu uwakumonseshako umwana?”" 
Exodus2:8 Nao amwasuka ati, “Ale kabiye.” Awe umukashana aya senda na nyina kwa mwana." 
Exodus2:9 Mwana Farao umwanakashi amweba ati, “Senda uyu mwana uye mukulaŋonseshako, na ine nakulakulipila.” Kanshi umwanakashi epakusenda umwana, aya mukulamonsha." 
Exodus2:10 Panuma ilyo umwana akulileko, umwanakashi amubweseshe kuli mwana Farao umwanakashi. Nao umwana wa mfumu Farao amucitile umwana wakwe. Amwinike ne shina lya Mose, ati, “Pantu namwabwile mu menshi.”" 
Exodus2:11 Ilyo Mose akulile, ubushiku bumo aile ku bantu bakwe Abahibulu. Aya mona ifyo baleculisha mukubombesha. Kabili Mose amona uko umwina Egupto aleuma Umuhibulu munankwe." 
Exodus2:12 Ilyo Mose aceba ceba, amona tapali muntu nelyo umo, aipaya umwina Egupto amufisa na mu musensenga." 
Exodus2:13 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo abwelelako, amona Abahibulu babili abaume balelwa. Elyo aeba uubalile umubiye ati, “Cinshi uleumina Umuhibulu mubiyo?”" 
Exodus2:14 Nao amwasuka ati, “Nga uwakucita kateeka na kaputula wa milandu yesu nani? Bushe ulefwaya ukunjipaya nga filya waipeye umwina Egupto?” Elyo Mose umwenso wamwikata, alatontonkanya nokuti, “Cine cinefye abantu nabeshiba ifyo nacitile.”" 
Exodus2:15 Farao pakumfwa uyu mulandu, alafwaya ukwipaya Mose, lelo Mose afulumuka Farao, aya ikala ku Midiani. Eko aikala panshi mupepi ne cishima ca menshi." 
Exodus2:16 Nomba shimapepo wa ku Midiani ali na bana abanakashi cine lubali, awe baisa kukutapa amenshi no kwisusha amenshi mu milimba yakunweseshamo ifitekwa fyakwa shibo." 
Exodus2:17 Elyo kwaisa na bakacema bamo baisa batamfyapo. Lelo Mose aima abapokololako, apeela ne fitekwa fyabo amenshi." 
Exodus2:18 Ilyo abakashana babwelela kuli shibo Reueli, nao abepusha ati, “Bushe cinshi mwabwelela bwangu lelo?”" 
Exodus2:19 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Umwina Egupto umo ewacitupokololako kuli bakacema. Kabili acitutapilako amenshi no kupeelako ifitekwa fyesu amenshi.”" 
Exodus2:20 Elyo shibo aipusha bamwane abakashana ati, “Ngoyo muntu ali kwi? Cinshi mwamushila? Mwiteni ese alye icakulya.”" 
Exodus2:21 Mose epakusumina ukulaikala noyo muntu, nao uyo muntu amufya umwana wakwe umukashana Sipora." 
Exodus2:22 Sipora afyala no mwana umwaume, nao Mose amwinike ishina lya Geshomu, asosele ati, “Ine ndi mweni muli cino calo ca bene.”" 
Exodus2:23 Mu nshita itali ine iyo emo imfumu ya mu Egupto yafwilile. Lelo abena Israeli bena balelilishika nganshi ukucula mu busha bwabo, balelilila kuli Lesa ukuti abatuule, no kulilishika kwabo pa mulandu wa busha bwabo kwafikile kuli Lesa." 
Exodus2:24 Lesa aumfwile ukulila kwabo, aibukisha ne cipangano ico apangene na Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Kanshi Lesa alolesha abena Israeli, aishiba no bucushi bwabo." 
Exodus3:1 Nomba Mose alecema ifitekwa fyakwa shifyala Yeturo, shimapepo wa ku Midiani. Asenda ifitekwa, acilinganya mu matololo, afika na ku Holebu, ku lupili lwakwa Lesa." 
Exodus3:2 Kulya eko malaika wakwa Yawe amumonekele mu lubingu lwa mulilo ulwalebilima ukufuma mu cimpusa. Mose amona ukuti icimpusa cilebilima lelo tacilepya iyoo. 
Exodus3:3 Elyo atontonkanya ati, “Kampalameko, uleke ndoleshe icakupapusha ici namona, ico icimpusa cishipilile.”" 
Exodus3:4 Ilyo Yawe amona ukuti Mose alapalama kukumona icimpusa, Lesa amwita ukufuma mu cimpusa ati, “Mose, Mose!” Nao ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi.”" 
Exodus3:5 Lesa amweba ati, “Wipalama kuno. Fuula insapato shobe pantu incende wimininepo ni ncende yamushilo.”" 
Exodus3:6 Elyo amweba nokuti, “Nine Lesa wakwa wiso, Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Lesa wakwa Isaki kabili Lesa wakwa Yakobo.” Elyo Mose afimba pa menso pantu aletiina ukulolesha Lesa." 
Exodus3:7 Elyo Yawe asosa ati, “Ninjimwena ne mwine ifyo abantu bandi balecula nganshi mu Egupto. Niŋumfwa no kulila kwabo pa mulandu wa bakangalila wabo, kabili ninjishiba amacushi yabo." 
Exodus3:8 Eico ninjika kukubapususha ku bena Egupto no kubafumya muli ici calo, mbatwale ku calo icafunda, icikalamba, icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci. Abekalamo bena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Amoli, abena Perisi, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Niŋumfwa nomba ukulila kwa bena Israeli, nimona nefyo balebacusha ku bena Egupto." 
Exodus3:10 Eico nomba isa nkutume kuli Farao kukufumya abantu bandi abena Israeli mu calo ca Egupto.” 
Exodus3:11 Elyo Mose ayaswike Lesa ati, “Nga ine nine ani, uwakuti nje kuli Farao kukufumya abena Israeli mu Egupto?”" 
Exodus3:12 Lesa amwasuka ati, “Nkalaba na iwe. Kabili ici cikaba e cishibilo kuli iwe icakuti nine nkutumine. Ilyo ukafumya abantu mu Egupto mukapepela Lesa pali luno lupili.”" 
Exodus3:13 Mose aebele Lesa ati, “Nga naya ku bena Israeli no kubeba ati, ‘Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu nantuma kuli imwe,’ nabo banjipusha abati, ‘Nge shina lyakwe ni nani?’ Bushe nkabasuka shani?”" 
Exodus3:14 Lesa ayasuka Mose ati, “Nine UWABAPO. Ukebe abena Israeli auti, ‘UWABAPO euntumine kuli imwe.’”" 
Exodus3:15 Lesa aeba Mose nakabili ati, “Webe abena Israeli auti, ‘Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu, Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Lesa wakwa Isaki kabili Lesa wakwa Yakobo euntumine kuli imwe.’ Ili e shina lyandi ilya pe na pe ilyo inkulo shonse shikalanjibukishishako." 
Exodus3:16 “Kabiye kalonganike abakalamba ba bena Israeli ubebe auti, ‘Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu, Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo amonekele kuli ine, anjebele nokuti, “Nalisa mupempula namona nefyo abena Egupto bamucita." 
Exodus3:17 Kabili nimpingula ukumufumya mu Egupto umo balemucusha, no kumutwala mu calo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci. Abekalamo bena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Amoli, abena Perisi, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi.” ’" 
Exodus3:18 Abakalamba bakomfwa ifyo ukabeba. Elyo iwe na bakalamba ba bena Israeli mukaye ku mfumu ya Egupto, mukayebe ati, ‘Yawe, Lesa wa Bahibulu, alitukumanya. Eico nomba shi lekeni tuye ulwendo lwa nshiku shitatu mu matololo kukulekela Yawe Lesa wesu amalambo.’" 
Exodus3:19 Lelo kwena ninjishiba kuti, imfumu ya Egupto tayakasumine ukuti muye ukwabula ukupatikishiwa no kuboko kwamaka nganshi." 
Exodus3:20 Nomba nkabomfya ukuboko kwandi ukwamaka nganshi, nkakanda abena Egupto ku fipeshamano fintu nkacita pakati kabo. Lyena panuma imfumu ikamulekamo mukaleya." 
Exodus3:21 “Kabili nkalenga ukuti mukatemwikwe ku bena Egupto, epakuti ilyo mukalaya mwikaya iminwe nkutwa." 
Exodus3:22 Umwanakashi onse umwina Israeli akalombe umwina mupalamano umwina Egupto na onse umwanakashi ekala nankwe mu ŋanda yakwe, ifya silifa na golide ne fyakufwala. Mukafwike abana benu abaume na banakashi. Kanshi efyo mukatapa ifyuma fya bena Egupto.”" 
Exodus4:1 Mose ayaswike ati, “Nga cakuti bakaana ukunsumina nelyo ukumfwa kuli ine, kabili basosa nokuti, ‘Yawe tamoneke kuli iwe?’”" 
Exodus4:2 Yawe amwipusha ati, “Cinshi ico wikete mu minwe yobe?” Nao Mose ayasuka ati, “Ni nkonto.”" 
Exodus4:3 Yawe amweba ati, “Posa inkonto panshi.” Mose aposa inkonto panshi, nayo yasanguka insoka. Mose abutukako." 
Exodus4:4 Elyo Yawe amweba ati, “Tambika ukuboko kobe uikate ku busolo.” Mose atambika ukuboko kwakwe aikata na ku busolo. Insoka nayo kabili yasanguka inkonto mu minwe yakwe." 
Exodus4:5 Elyo Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Ukacite ifi pakuti bakasumine ukuti Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo, Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Lesa wakwa Isaki kabili Lesa wakwa Yakobo alikumonekele.”" 
Exodus4:6 Kabili Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Pisha icisansa mu mwingila obe.” Mose apishamo. Cilya afumyamo icisansa cakwe amona cikumenefye fibashi, cibuutile na tuutu ngo bunga bwa mfula." 
Exodus4:7 Lesa amweba nakabili ati, “Pisha icisansa cobe mu mwingila.” Apisha. Cilya acifumyamo, amona nacipola cilifye bwino ngo mubili wakwe onse." 
Exodus4:8 Yawe asosa ati, “Nga bakaana ukukusumina nangu ukutetekela icisungusho cantanshi, ninshi kuti basumina ici icabubili." 
Exodus4:9 Nga bakaana ukusumina pa mulandu wa ifi fisungusho fibili, kabili bakaana no kumfwa ifyo ulebeba, ninshi ukatape amenshi mu mumana wa Nailo ukayetile panshi pa mushili uwauma. Amenshi yakasanguka umulopa panshi.”" 
Exodus4:10 Elyo Mose aeba Yawe ati, “We Mfumu, ine nshaishiba bwino ukulanda, ukutulafye ku kale nangufye ukutula apo mulelandila na ine. Ine nalifina ululimi kabili ndalubantika pakulanda.”" 
Exodus4:11 Yawe nao amwasuka ati, “Bushe uwapeela umuntu akanwa nani? Nani alenga umuntu ukuti abe nkomamatwi nangu cibulu? Nani amulenga ukuti alemona nangu ukuti abe mpofu? Bushe teine, ne Yawe?" 
Exodus4:12 Kanshi nomba kabiye! Na ine nakulakwafwa ukulanda kabili nakulakweba nefyo uli nokulanda.” 
Exodus4:13 Lelo Mose ayasuka ati, “We Mfumu, napapata tumeniko umbi.”" 
Exodus4:14 Elyo Yawe afulilwa Mose nganshi, amweba ati, “Bushe tapali munonko Aroni umwina Levi? Nalishiba ukuti wena alalanda bwino. Kabili mona aleisa mukukukumanya. Akasansamuka nganshi pakukumona." 
Exodus4:15 Kanshi eo ukalaeba amashiwi ali nokulanda. Nkalamwafwako bonse babili ukulanda, kabili nkalamulanga ne fyakucita." 
Exodus4:16 Aroni eukalakulandilako ku bantu, eukaba kwati e kanwa kobe, elyo iwe ukaba kwati niwe Lesa wakwe." 
Exodus4:17 Nomba senda inkonto iyo wikete mu minwe, eyo ukalacitilako ifisungusho.”" 
Exodus4:18 Kabili Mose alibwelele kuli Yeturo shifyala, amweba ati, “Napapata, lekeni mbwelelemo ku bantu bandi mu Egupto, njemona nga bacili abomi.” Yeturo amweba ati, “Kabiye, wende umutende.”" 
Exodus4:19 Ilintu Mose acili mu Midiani, Yawe amweba ati, “Bwelelamo ku Egupto pantu abo bonse balefwaya ukukwipaya balifwa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Kanshi Mose epakubuula umukashi wakwe na bana bakwe abaume abaninika na pali punda, aya nabo ku Egupto. Kabili asenda ne nkonto yakwa Lesa mu minwe yakwe." 
Exodus4:21 Elyo Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Ukaye cita ifisungusho fyonse nkupeele amaka yakucita pa cinso cakwa Farao nga wabwelelamo ku Egupto. Lelo nkalenga umutima wakwe ukumalala kabili takaleke na bantu ukuti baleya." 
Exodus4:22 Elyo ukebe Farao auti, ‘Yawe nasosa ati, Umwana wandi umwaume Israeli e beli lyandi." 
Exodus4:23 Ninkweba nati, shileka umwana wandi umwaume aleya kukumpepa, nomba naukaana. Eico nomba na ine ndi nokwipaya ibeli lyobe ilyaume.’”" 
Exodus4:24 Yawe afwaile ukwipaya Mose pa ndo apo amukumenye. 
Exodus4:25 Lelo Sipora abuula ilibwe ilyatwa asembulwilako ne nkanda ya ku mpela ya mubili wakwa mwane umwaume, akumya ne nkanda pa makasa yakwe no kweba Mose ati, “Cine cine uli mulume wandi uwa ku mulopa.”" 
Exodus4:26 Elyo Yawe alekamo Mose. Kabili umukashi wakwe amweba no kumweba ati, “Pa mulandu wakusembululwa, uli mulume wandi uwa ku mulopa.”" 
Exodus4:27 Elyo Yawe aeba Aroni ati, “Kabiye uye ukumanye Mose mu matololo.” Nao Aroni aima aya mukumanya pa lupili lwakwa Lesa, amutomona pakumuposha." 
Exodus4:28 Elyo Mose ashimikilako Aroni ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe amutumine kukubeba, ne fisungusho fyonse ifintu amukonkomeshe ukuya cita." 
Exodus4:29 Mose na Aroni epakwima baya longanika abakalamba ba bena Israeli bonse. 
Exodus4:30 Elyo Aroni abashimikila fyonse ifyo Yawe aebele Mose. Kabili Mose acita ne fisungusho fyonse pa cinso ca bantu. 
Exodus4:31 Abantu nabo basumina. Kabili pakumfwa ukuti Yawe nabasakamana no kumona ifyo balecululuka, bonse bakontama balapepa no kupepa."
