Exodus5:1 Panuma ya ifi Mose na Aroni baile kuli Farao bamweba abati, “Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli nasosa ati, ‘Leka abantu bandi baleya pakuti bakaye ncitila inshikunkulu mu matololo.’”" 
Exodus5:2 Farao ayasuka ati, “Nga Yawe ni nani uo ndi nokubeela no kuleka abena Israeli baleya? Nshimwishibe uyu Yawe, elyo nshaleke na bena Israeli ukuti baleya.”" 
Exodus5:3 Nabo bayasuka abati, “Lesa wa Bahibulu alitukumanya. Shi tusuminisheni ukuya ulwendo lwa nshiku shitatu mu matololo kukulekela Yawe, Lesa wesu, ilambo, epali atwipaya ku cikuko nangu ku lupanga.”" 
Exodus5:4 Lelo imfumu ya calo ca Egupto yabeba ati, “Mose na Aroni, cinshi mulefumisha aba bantu ku milimo yabo? Bweleleni ku milimo yenu!”" 
Exodus5:5 Kabili Farao atila, “Moneni abantu mu calo nabafulisha, elyo na imwe mulebalesha ukubomba!”" 
Exodus5:6 Mu bushiku ubo bwine imfumu Farao yakonkomeshe bakangalila ba bena Israeli pamo na bakalamba babo pa milimo aiti," 
Exodus5:7 “Mwilabapeela impimbili shakubomfya pakupanga amatafwali, muleleka baleifwaila abene." 
Exodus5:8 Lelo impendwa ya matafwali iyakutama cila bushiku yena mwicefyako, ibefye ilya ine iyakale. Banaŋani eco balecitila icongo abati, ‘Tulekeni tuye lekela Lesa wesu ilambo.’" 
Exodus5:9 Lekenifye aba bantu imilimo ibakosele, pakuti baleikalilafye ukubomba nganshi. Lyena tabakulakutika ku fyabufi.”" 
Exodus5:10 Elyo bakangalila ba bena Israeli na bakalamba babo pa milimo baya eba abena Israeli abati, “Farao asosa ati, ‘Ine naleka ukumupeela impimbili shakubomfya." 
Exodus5:11 Kabiyeni muye ifwaila impimbili konse uko mwingashisanga, lelo icikongwani cenu cena tacili nakucefeshiwako nakalya.’”" 
Exodus5:12 Kanshi abantu epakusalangana mpanga yonse mu calo ca Egupto mukutolelesha impimbili. 
Exodus5:13 Bakangalila balabapatikisha abati, “Mupwishe icikongwani ca cila bushiku, filya mwalecita ilyo pali impimbili.”" 
Exodus5:14 Bakangalila bakwa Farao balepuma abakalamba ba milimo abena Israeli abo basalile, balebeba abati, “Cinshi ico mailo na lelo mushipwishishishe ukutama impendwa ya matafwali nga filya mwalecita kale?”" 
Exodus5:15 Elyo abakalamba ba milimo abena Israeli baya mukuilishanya kuli Farao abati, “Cinshi fwe babomfi bobe watucitila ifi?" 
Exodus5:16 Ababomfi benu tababapeela impimbili, lelo baletweba ukutama amatafwali! Kabili ababomfi benu baboma no kuboma, lelo ici cilubo ca bantu benu.”" 
Exodus5:17 Farao nao abasuka ati, “Muli banaŋani, e cine cine muli banaŋani! Tamufwaya kubomba e mulandu mulesosela amuti, ‘Leka tuye kukulekela Yawe ilambo.’" 
Exodus5:18 Kanshi nomba bwelelenimo ku milimo yenu! Tabakulamupeela impimbili, lelo mwakulatama impendwa ine ilya bamupimina iya matafwali.”" 
Exodus5:19 Abakalamba ba milimo abena Israeli baishiba ukuti bali mu bwafya pakubeba ati, “Lelo impendwa ya matafwali cila bushiku tayakacefeshiweko nakalya.”" 
Exodus5:20 Pakufumako kuli Farao basanga Mose na Aroni balebalolela. 
Exodus5:21 Elyo abakalamba ba mulimo abena Israeli baeba Mose na Aroni abati, “Yawe engamulolekesha no kumukanda! Pantu nimwe mulengele ukuti Farao na bacilolo bakwe batupate. Nimwe mubikile ulupanga lwakutwipailako mu minwe yabo.”" 
Exodus5:22 Elyo Mose aya kuli Yawe nakabili, asosa ati, “We Yawe, cinshi ulecushisha aba bantu? Bushe ici eco wantumine kuno?" 
Exodus5:23 Ukutulafye apo nailile kuli Farao kukumweba ifyo wantumine, Farao ena acushafye aba bantu. Na iwe tawalubula abantu bobe iyoo!”" 
Exodus6:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Nomba ulemona ifyo ndecita kuli Farao. Pantu ku maka yandifye nkalenga ukuti akabaleke baleya. Pantu ku maka yandifye nkalenga ukuti akabatamfye mu calo cakwe.”" 
Exodus6:2 Kabili Lesa aebele Mose ati, “Nine Yawe." 
Exodus6:3 Nine namonekele kuli Abrahamu, kuli Isaki na kuli Yakobo nga Lesa Umwine wa maka yonse, lelo nshabeshibishe ukuti ishina lyandi nine Yawe." 
Exodus6:4 Elyo kabili napangene nabo icipangano. Nabalaile ukubapeela icalo ca Kenani umo baleikala nga beni. 
Exodus6:5 Elyo kabili niŋumfwa ukuilishanya kwa bena Israeli abo abena Egupto bateeka ubusha, kabili ninjibukisha ne cipangano twapangene nabo." 
Exodus6:6 “Eico kanshi kebe abena Israeli auti, ‘Ine nine Yawe. Ndi nokumulubula ku milimo yabuluku iya bena Egupto kabili nkamufumya na mu busha. Nkamulubula no kuboko kwandi ukwamaka, kabili nkabakanda nganshi." 
Exodus6:7 Nkamucita abantu abandi, na ine nkaba Lesa wenu. Elyo mukeshiba ukuti nine Yawe Lesa wenu uwamulubula ku milimo yabuluku iya bena Egupto." 
Exodus6:8 Nkamutwala na mu calo ico nalapile ukupeela kuli Abrahamu, kuli Isaki na kuli Yakobo. Nkacipeela kuli imwe cikabe icacishilano. Ine nine Yawe.’”" 
Exodus6:9 Mose aisa eba abena Israeli aya mashiwi, lelo balikene ukumumfwa ico bafupwike pa mulandu wakuculisha mu busha." 
Exodus6:10 Elyo Yawe aeba Mose ati," 
Exodus6:11 “Kabiye kebe Farao imfumu ya Egupto ukuti ileke abena Israeli bafume mu calo caiko.” 
Exodus6:12 Mose ayasuka Yawe ati, “Apo abena Israeli balikaana ukuŋumfwa, nga wena Farao kuti aŋumfwa shani, ine ne ushaishiba na kulanda bwino?”" 
Exodus6:13 Elyo Yawe alandile kuli Mose na Aroni pa mulandu wa bena Israeli na Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto, no kubakonkomesha ukufumya abena Israeli mu Egupto." 
Exodus6:14 Ifi e fikolwe fya ndupwa shabo. Abana baume bakwa Rubeni, ibeli lyakwa Israeli, ni aba: Anoki, Palu, Hesroni na Kami. Aba e bakalamba ba ndupwa sha mu luko lwakwa Rubeni." 
Exodus6:15 Abana abaume bakwa Simeoni ni aba: Yemueli, Yamini, Ohadi, Yakini, Sohari na Shauli, umwana wa mu mwanakashi umwina Kenani. Aba e bakalamba ba ndupwa sha mu luko lwakwa Simeoni." 
Exodus6:16 Aya e mashina ya bamwana Levi abaume ukukonka umo bafyalilwe, ni Geshomu, Koati na Merari. Levi aikele pano calo imyaka umwanda umo na makumi yatatu na cine lubali (137)." 
Exodus6:17 Abana baume bakwa Geshomu ukulingana ne ndupwa sha mu luko lwabo, ni Libini na Shimei." 
Exodus6:18 Abana baume bakwa Koati bali ni Amuramu, Isa, Hebuloni na Usieli. Koati aikele pano calo imyaka umwanda umo na makumi yatatu na itatu (133)." 
Exodus6:19 Abana baume bakwa Merari bali ni Mali na Mushi. Aba e bakalamba ba ndupwa sha mu luko lwakwa Levi ukukonka umo bafyalilwe. 
Exodus6:20 Amuramu aupile Yokobedi nasenge, afyelemo Aroni na Mose. Amuramu aikele pano calo imyaka umwanda umo na makumi yatatu na cine lubali (137)" 
Exodus6:21 Abana baume bakwa Isa bali ni Kora, Nefegi na Sikiri." 
Exodus6:22 Abana abaume bakwa Usieli ni Mishaeli, Elisafani na Sitiri." 
Exodus6:23 Aroni aupile Elisheba, mwana Aminadabu nkashi yakwa Nashoni. Afyelemo Nadabu, Abihu, Eleasa na Itama." 
Exodus6:24 Abana baume bakwa Kora bali ni Ashili, Elikana na Abiasafu. Aba e bakalamba ba ndupwa sha mu mukowa wakwa Kora." 
Exodus6:25 Eleasa, mwana Aroni, aupile umwana mwanakashi umo uwakwa Putieli. Afyelemo na Fineasi. Aba e bakalamba ba ndupwa sha mu luko lwakwa Levi, ukukonka umo bafyalilwe." 
Exodus6:26 Ni aba bene Mose na Aroni ebo Yawe aebele ati, “Kafumyeni indupwa shonse ne mikowa yonse iya bena Israeli mu Egupto mu mpuka shabo.”" 
Exodus6:27 Ni Mose na Aroni ebaebele Farao imfumu ya Egupto ukuti ileke abena Israeli bafume mu Egupto. 
Exodus6:28 Ilyo Yawe alandile kuli Mose mu calo ca Egupto," 
Exodus6:29 amwebele ati, “Ine nine Yawe. Webe Farao imfumu ya calo ca Egupto ifintu fyonse ifyo ndekweba.”" 
Exodus6:30 Lelo Mose ayaswike Yawe ati, “Apo ine nshaishiba kulanda bwino, nga kanshi Farao kuti aumfwa shani kuli ine?”" 
Exodus7:1 Yawe nao aeba Mose ati, “Mona ndekucita nga Lesa kuli Farao, munonko Aroni nao ndemucita kasesema obe." 
Exodus7:2 Wakulaeba Aroni fyonse ifyo nakukonkomesha, nao Aroni munonko euli nokweba Farao ukuti aleke abena Israeli bafume mu calo cakwe." 
Exodus7:3 Lelo nkalenga umutima wakwa Farao ukumalala, kabili nangu nkacita ifisungusho ifingi ne finjelengwe ifingi mu Egupto," 
Exodus7:4 takamumfwe nakalya. Lelo nkabika ukuboko kwandi ukwamaka pali Egupto, kabili nkacita ifintu ifikali nganshi pakufumya impuka sha bantu bandi abena Israeli mu Egupto." 
Exodus7:5 Ilyo nkakanda abena Egupto no kufumya abena Israeli mu calo cabo, elyo abena Egupto bakeshiba ukuti ine ndi Yawe.”" 
Exodus7:6 Awe Mose na Aroni baya cita nefyo Yawe abebele. 
Exodus7:7 Ilyo baile kukulanda kuli Farao, Mose ali ne myaka amakumi cine konse konse (80), Aroni nao ali ne myaka amakumi cine konse konse na itatu (83)." 
Exodus7:8 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati," 
Exodus7:9 “Farao nga amweba ati, ‘Citeni icisungusho,’ ukebe Aroni akabuule inkonto no kuiposa panshi pa cinso cakwa Farao, nayo ikasanguka insoka.”" 
Exodus7:10 Kanshi Mose na Aroni baya kuli Farao bacita nefyo Yawe abebele. Aroni aposa inkonto yakwe panshi pa cinso cakwa Farao na bacilolo bakwe, awe nayo yasanguka insoka." 
Exodus7:11 Farao nao aita abantu bakwe abamano na bakabuka, na bamalele nabo bacita ifyo fine." 
Exodus7:12 Cila umo aposa inkonto yakwe panshi, nasho shasanguka insoka. Lelo inkonto yakwa Aroni yaminaula inkonto shabo shonse." 
Exodus7:13 Nomba umutima wakwa Farao walifye uwaumalala, akaana no kumfwa kuli Mose na Aroni, nga filya fine Yawe asosele." 
Exodus7:14 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Umutima wakwa Farao ucili uwaumalala, alekaana nokuti abantu baye." 
Exodus7:15 Ukaye ulucelo kuli Farao ilyo aleya kwifwe. Ukasende ilya nkonto mu minwe yobe, ilya yasangwike insoka, ukalemulolela pa lulamba lwa mumana wa Nailo." 
Exodus7:16 Elyo ukamwebe Farao auti, ‘Yawe, Lesa wa Bahibulu, antumine kukukweba ati, leka abantu bandi baleya pakuti bakaye mpepa mu matololo. Nomba iwe ukufika na nomba walikaana ukumfwa.’" 
Exodus7:17 Ifi efyo Yawe asosele, ‘Ni kuli ici, eko iwe walanjishibila ukuti nine Yawe.’ Mona, pa menshi nalauma iyi nkonto njikete mu minwe, na menshi ya mu mumana wa Nailo yalasanguka umulopa." 
Exodus7:18 Isabi lyalafwa mu mumana wa Nailo, no mumana wakulanunka na bena Egupto bakulafilwa ukuya nwamo amenshi.”" 
Exodus7:19 Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Eba Aroni auti, ‘Buula inkonto yobe, utambalike ukuboko kobe pa menshi yonse ayaba mu Egupto, aya mu mimana, aya mu mifolo, aya mu fishiba na ya mu fishima. Umulopa ukaba konsefye mu calo conse ca Egupto, mu mitondo ya fimuti na mu mitondo ya mabwe.’”" 
Exodus7:20 Mose na Aroni bacita ifyo fine Yawe abebele. Aroni aimisha inkonto yakwe mu mulu, auma na pa menshi ya mu mumana wa Nailo, ninshi Farao na bacilolo bakwe baleloleshako. Awe na menshi yonse yasanguka umulopa." 
Exodus7:21 Isabi lyonse ilya mu mumana wa Nailo lyafwa, na menshi yalanunka nganshi icakuti abena Egupto balafilwa no kunwa amenshi ya mu Nailo. Umulopa wakumanafye mpanga yonse mu Egupto." 
Exodus7:22 Abamalele ba mu Egupto nabo bacita cimo cine ku malele yabo. Umutima wakwa Farao walifye uwaumalala, akaana no kumfwa kuli Mose na Aroni nga filya fine Yawe asosele." 
Exodus7:23 Nomba Farao afumapo abwelela na kwisano kumwakwe, ukwabula ukusakamana nelyo cimo." 
Exodus7:24 Elyo abena Egupto bonse balaimba ifishima mu lulamba lwa mumana umwakuti basange amenshi yakunwa, pantu balifililwe ukunwa amenshi ya mu mumana." 
Exodus7:25 Papitile nshiku cine lubali ukutula apo Yawe ayalwile amenshi ya mu mumana wa Nailo ukuba umulopa. 
Exodus8:1 Elyo Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Kabiye kuli Farao umwebe auti, ‘Yawe asosa ati, leka abantu bandi baleya, pakuti bakaye mpepa." 
Exodus8:2 Nga tawabaleke ukuti baye, ndeleta icinkunka ca fyula, fikawa mu calo cobe conse." 
Exodus8:3 Mu mumana wa Nailo mukesulafye ifyula paa. Kabili fikalafumamo no kuya kwisano lyobe na mu muputule usendamamo, na pa busanshi bobe, na mu mayanda ya bacilolo bobe, na pa bantu bobe, na mu mabuku yakocelamo umukate na mu fyakukasawilamo umufuba." 
Exodus8:4 Fyakulatobaukila pali iwe, pa bantu bobe elyo na pali bacilolo bobe bonse.’”" 
Exodus8:5 Kabili Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Eba Aroni atambalike ukuboko kwakwe ne nkonto yakwe pa mimana, pa mifolo na pa fishiba, uleke ifyula fiwe mu calo ca Egupto.”" 
Exodus8:6 Nao Aroni atambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa menshi ya mu calo ca Egupto, awe ifyula fyafuma fyakumanafye icalo conse." 
Exodus8:7 Lelo abamalele nabo bacitile ifyo fine ku malele yabo, balenga ifyula ukwisa pa calo." 
Exodus8:8 Farao epakwita Mose na Aroni abeba ati, “Pepeni kuli Yawe afumye ifyula pali ine na pa bantu bandi, na ine nalaleka abantu benu baye kukulekela Yawe amalambo.”" 
Exodus8:9 Mose aeba Farao ati, “Cisuma, unjebe inshita ulefwaya ukuti nkakupepeleko iwe, bacilolo bobe na bantu bobe, pakuti ifyula fifume pali imwe na mu mayanda yenu, fikashalefye mu mumana wa Nailo mweka.”" 
Exodus8:10 Farao amwasuka ati, “Mailo.” Mose amweba ati, “Cisuma cikabe ngefyo fine wasosa. Ukeshiba ukuti takwaba uwaba nga Yawe, Lesa wesu." 
Exodus8:11 Ifyula fikataluka kuli iwe, kuli bacilolo bobe, ku bantu bobe na ku mayanda yenu. Fikashalafye mu mumana wa Nailo.”" 
Exodus8:12 Ilyo Mose na Aroni bafuma kuli Farao, Mose alakuuta Yawe ukuti afumyepo ifyula aletele pali Farao." 
Exodus8:13 Yawe acitile ifyo Mose alombele. Ifyula ifyali mu mayanda, mu mansa na mu mpanga fyafwa." 
Exodus8:14 Abena Egupto bafilonganya mu mina, ne calo canunka pipi." 
Exodus8:15 Ilyo Farao amwene ukuti ifyula fyafwa, apemwina, umutima wakwe watwalilila ukumalala, akaana no kumfwa kuli Mose na Aroni nga filya fine Yawe asosele." 
Exodus8:16 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Eba Aroni ukuti atambike inkonto, ome panshi, no lukungu lonse ulwa mu calo ca Egupto lwalasanguka bamuŋwiŋwi.”" 
Exodus8:17 Nabo bacita ifyo fine. Aroni atambalika ukuboko kwakwe ne nkonto yakwe, auma panshi, na bamuŋwiŋwi baisa pa bantu na pa nama. Kanshi ulukungu lonse ulwa pa mushili mu Egupto lwasanguka bamuŋwiŋwi." 
Exodus8:18 Abamalele nabo baesha ukuleta bamuŋwiŋwi ku malele yabo, lelo bafilililwafye. Bamuŋwiŋwi balabuba abantu ne nama." 
Exodus8:19 Abamalele epakweba Farao abati, “Aya yena maka yakwa Lesa!” Lelo umutima wakwa Farao wali uwaumalala, akaana no kumfwa kuli Mose na Aroni nga filya fine Yawe asosele." 
Exodus8:20 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Ukeme lucelocelo ukaye mukulolela Farao ilyo akalaya ku mumana, ukamwebe auti, ‘Yawe asosa ati, leka abantu bandi baleya pakuti bakaye mpepa." 
Exodus8:21 Nga taulekele ukuti abantu bandi baleya, nkakutumina utusembele utwingi utwakububa iwe, bacilolo bobe na bantu bobe, kabili tukengila na mu mayanda yobe. Mu mayanda ya bena Egupto mukesula utusembele na pa mushili ponse apo baba." 
Exodus8:22 Nomba muli ubo bushiku, mu mpanga ya Gosheni umwaikala abantu bandi mwena tamwakabe tusembele. Nkacita ifi pakuti ukeshibe ukuti ine ne Yawe naba muli cino calo." 
Exodus8:23 Nkalekanya pa bantu bandi na bantu bobe. Icisungusho ici cikacitika mailo.’” 
Exodus8:24 Yawe acitile ifyo fine. Kwaishile amabumba ya tusembele utwingi nganshi, twaya ingila mwisano lyakwa Farao na mu mayanda ya bacilolo bakwe. Mu calo conse ca Egupto utusembele twaonawile impanga." 
Exodus8:25 Elyo Farao aitile Mose na Aroni abeba ati, “Kabiyeni mukulekela Lesa wenu amalambo muno mwine mu calo.”" 
Exodus8:26 Mose nao amwasuka ati, “Ico cena tacilungeme pantu inama shintu tulekela Yawe Lesa wesu ilambo, abena Egupto bena balishipata. Kanshi nga bamona tulelekela Lesa wesu ilambo lya nama isho bapata, bushe tabakatwipaye mukutulasa amabwe?" 
Exodus8:27 Tufwilefye ukuya ulwendo lwa nshiku shitatu mu matololo kukutuula Yawe, Lesa wesu, amalambo ukulingana nefyo atukonkomeshe.”" 
Exodus8:28 Farao nao amweba ati, “Ndemuleka muye kukulekela Yawe, Lesa wenu, amalambo ku matololo cikulu tamwile kutali. Nomba mumpapatileko.”" 
Exodus8:29 Mose nao amwasuka ati, “Cisuma nalafuma pano, nalaya papata Yawe ukuti mailo utusembele tukafume pali Farao, na pali bacilolo bakwe na bantu bakwe. Nomba Farao ekesha ukubepa ubufi nakabili, elesha abantu ukuya lekela Yawe amalambo.”" 
Exodus8:30 Mose atifye ashifuma pali Farao, alapapata Yawe." 
Exodus8:31 Nao Yawe aumfwa ukupapata kwakwe, afumya utusembele pali Farao, na pali bacilolo bakwe na pa bantu bakwe. Tapashele akasembele nelyo kamo." 
Exodus8:32 Lelo nalyo line umutima wakwa Farao wali uwaumalala, akaana no kuleka abantu baleya." 
Exodus9:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Kabiye kuli Farao umwebe ukuti ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa Bahibulu, asosa ati, ‘Leka abantu bandi baleya, pakuti baye mpepa." 
Exodus9:2 Nga wabakaanya ukuti baleya kabili watwalilila no kubasunga," 
Exodus9:3 ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kukaleta icinkunka pa fitekwa fyenu, pali bakabalwe, bapunda, ingamila, iŋombe, impaanga ne mbushi." 
Exodus9:4 Lelo Yawe akalekanya pakati ka fitekwa fya bena Israeli na bena Egupto, lyena tapakafwe fitekwa nelyo fimo pa fya bena Israeli.’”" 
Exodus9:5 Yawe napingula inshita, kabili atile, “Ni mailo elyo nkacita ici mu calo.”" 
Exodus9:6 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Yawe acitile ifyo asosele. Ifitekwa fya bena Egupto fyonse fyalifwile lelo ifitekwa fya bena Israeli fyena tapafwile nelyo cimo. 
Exodus9:7 Ilyo Farao atumine abantu kukumona ifyacitike. Nabo bamwebele ukuti tapali inama nangu imo iya mwina Israeli iyifwilepo. Lelo umutima wakwa Farao walifye waumalala, akaana nokuti aleke abantu baleya." 
Exodus9:8 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati, “Kafokotoleni imito mwilungu mwisushe indupifye, elyo Mose aye ulwila mu mwela pa cinso cakwa Farao." 
Exodus9:9 Imito ikaba e lukungu pa calo conse ca Egupto. Kabili icalofye conse imito ikalenga abantu ne fitekwa ukulwala ifipute ifikalasanguka ifilonda fya mafina.” 
Exodus9:10 Kanshi epakubuula imito ukufuma mwilungu, baya iminina pa cinso cakwa Farao. Mose aululwila imito mu mwela. Awe ifipute fyatumbile pa mibili ya bantu ne ya fitekwa, kabili fyasanguka ifilonda fya mafina." 
Exodus9:11 Abamalele bafililwe ukwisa kuli Mose pantu nabo bene ifipute fyalibatumbile nga filya fine fyatumbile bonse abena Egupto. 
Exodus9:12 Lelo Yawe alengele ukumalala umutima wakwa Farao, kabili nga filya fine Yawe asosele, Farao akene ukumfwako kuli Mose na Aroni." 
Exodus9:13 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Mailo ulucelocelo ukaye kuli Farao ukamwebe auti, ‘Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa Bahibulu, asosa ati, leka abantu bandi baleya pakuti baye mpepa." 
Exodus9:14 Pantu ino nshita ndetuma ifikuko ifyabipisha nganshi pali iwe na bacilolo bobe, na pa bantu bobe. Elyo uleishiba nokuti takwaba nelyo umo uwaba nga ine mwisonde lyonsefye." 
Exodus9:15 Kwena nga cakuti ine njimya ukuboko kwandi no kukanda iwe na bantu bobe ku cinkunka, nga mwalilobelelafye kale." 
Exodus9:16 Ni pakukulanga amaka yandi eco nakubikila pa bufumu, kabili nokuti ishina lyandi lishibikwe isonde lyonse." 
Exodus9:17 Ucili uleitutumuna pa bantu bandi, ulebakanya nokuti baleya." 
Exodus9:18 Kanshi mu bushiku bwa mailo pa nshita nga ino ine nkalokesha imfula yacitalawe iya mabwe iyishatala ailoka mu Egupto ukutulafye apo ici calo catendekele ukufika na nomba. 
Exodus9:19 Kanshi ubile imbila iyakutila ifitekwa fyenu fyonse ne fintu fimbi fyonse ifyaba mu mpanga mukafilete mu ncende umwakuuba imfula. Pantu umuntu onse ne nama yonse ifikaba mu mpanga ukwabula ukufileta umwakuuba imfula yacitalawe iya mabwe fikafwa.’” 
Exodus9:20 Bacilolo bakwa Farao, abo abaikatwa no mwenso pa mulandu we shiwi Yawe asosele, bayangufyanya ukuleta abasha babo ne fitekwa fyabo umwakuuba imfula." 
Exodus9:21 Lelo abo abashaposeleko mano kwishiwi Yawe asosele, bashile abasha babo ne fitekwa fyabo mu mpanga." 
Exodus9:22 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Imisha ukuboko kobe mumulu, pakuti imfula yacitalawe iya mabwe ilokeshe mu calo conse ica Egupto. Yalalokela pa bantu, pa fitekwa elyo na pa filimwa fyonse mu mabala ya mu Egupto.”" 
Exodus9:23 Cilya Mose aimisha inkonto yakwe mumulu, Yawe aleta ukupanta ne mfula yacitalawe iya mabwe, ne nkuba yalaponena panshi. Awe Yawe alokeshe imfula ya mabwe mu calo ca Egupto." 
Exodus9:24 Amabwe ya mfula yalapona, ne myele ya nkuba yalabyata. Takwatalile akuloka imfula yabipisha muli uyu musango mu calo conse ica Egupto ukutulafye apo umushobo wabo watendekele ukubako." 
Exodus9:25 Imfula ya mabwe yaonawile ifintu fyonse ifyali mu mpanga mu calo conse ica Egupto, abantu ne nama kumo. Imfula ya mabwe yaonawile ifilimwa mu mabala, yakobaula ne fimuti mu mpanga." 
Exodus9:26 Incendefye imfula ya mabwe ishalokelemo ni mu Gosheni umwaleikala abena Israeli. 
Exodus9:27 Elyo Farao aitile Mose na Aroni aisa beba ati, “Uno muku wena nimbifya, Yawe nalungika, ine na bantu bandi nifwe tubifishe." 
Exodus9:28 Papateni kuli Yawe pantu ukupanta ne mfula ya mabwe fyatucusha pafula. Na ine ndemulekako muleya kabili tamwaikale kabili muno iyoo.” 
Exodus9:29 Mose nao amweba ati, “Nga nafumafye muno musumba, nalaya imya amaboko yandi pakupepa kuli Yawe. Ukupanta kuleleka ne mfula ya mabwe ilepwa, epakuti wishibe ukuti umwine we sonde lyonse ni Yawe." 
Exodus9:30 Lelo ninjishiba ukuti iwe na bacilolo bobe tamulati mukwate akatiina kakwa Yawe Lesa nakalya.” 
Exodus9:31 Imfula yacitalawe iya mabwe yaonawile utumiti twa kolokondwe ne mbuto sha bale, pantu bale alitwele, na kolokondwe nao alibalwile." 
Exodus9:32 Lelo iŋanu na masaka fyena tafyaonaike pantu tafipakula bwangu. 
Exodus9:33 Elyo Mose afumine kuli Farao, aya kunse ya musumba. Ayansa maboko yakwe pakupepa kuli Yawe. Awe ukupanta ne mfula ya mabwe fyaleka, kabili ne mfula yalekelelafye ukuloka pa calo." 
Exodus9:34 Ilyo Farao amona ukuti imfula ya mabwe no kupanta fyaleka, abwekeshapo ukubifya nakabili. Farao na bacilolo bakwe imitima yabo yaumalala." 
Exodus9:35 Awe umutima wakwa Farao waumalala, alesha na bena Israeli ukuti baleya nga filya fine Yawe aebele Mose." 
Exodus10:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Kabiye kuli Farao, pantu ninenga umutima wakwe ne mitima ya bacilolo bakwe ukumalala pakuti ncite ifipeshamano uko bali." 
Exodus10:2 Epakuti ukaleshimikilako abana bobe na beshikulu bobe ifyo nafulwile abena Egupto ilyo nalecita ifipeshamano uko bali, pakuti mwishibe ukuti ine ndi Yawe.”" 
Exodus10:3 Kanshi Mose na Aroni baile kuli Farao bamweba abati, “Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa Bahibulu, asosa ati, ‘Bushe iwe ukaleka lilali ukukanaicefya pali ine? Leka abantu bandi baleya, pakuti baye mpepa." 
Exodus10:4 Nga wabalesha ukuti baleya, mailo nkaleta makanta mu calo cobe." 
Exodus10:5 Makanta akakupafye ponse pa mushili icakuti no mushili tawakalemoneka. Akesa lya fyonse ifyapuswikeko ku mfula ya mabwe, akesa lya ne miti yonse iyilepuka mu mabala." 
Exodus10:6 Akesula mwisano lyobe na mu mayanda ya bacilolo bobe na mu mayanda ya bena Egupto bonse. Ici cena bashinwe ne fikolwe fyenu tabacimonapo apo baishile pesonde lino ukufika na lelo.’” Awe Mose apilibuka alaya asha Farao. 
Exodus10:7 Bacilolo bakwa Farao bamweba abati, “Bushe uyu muntu akaleka lilali ukulatucusha? Shilekafye abantu baleya pakuti baye bapepe Yawe, Lesa wabo. Bushe taumwene ifyo icalo ca Egupto conaike?”" 
Exodus10:8 Elyo babweseshe Mose na Aroni kuli Farao, nao abeba ati, “Kabiyeni kukupepa Yawe, Lesa wenu. Nomba bushe abaleya ni bani?”" 
Exodus10:9 Mose ayasuka ati, “Tuleya na baice na bakote besu, abana besu abaume na banakashi, tulesenda ne mpaanga, imbushi ne ŋombe shesu pantu tuleya kukucitila Yawe inshikunkulu.”" 
Exodus10:10 Farao abatumfya ati, “Yawe abe na imwe, nga cakuti ndemuleka muye na banakashi benu na bana benu! Ninshi cine cine muli na mapange ayabi." 
Exodus10:11 Awe iyoo! Abaumefye beka ebo baye kukupepa Yawe pantu efyo mwalelomba.” Awe batamfya Mose na Aroni ukufuma ku cinso cakwa Farao. 
Exodus10:12 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Tambalikila ukuboko kobe pa calo ca Egupto pakuti makanta ese pa calo. Aleisa lya fyonse ifilepuka mu mabala ne fyapuswike ku mfula ya mabwe.”" 
Exodus10:13 Awe Mose atambalikila inkonto pa calo ca Egupto. Yawe nao aimya umwela ku kabanga walapupa pa calo ca Egupto akasubafye konse no bushikufye bonse. Cilya buleca ulucelo ninshi umwela waleta makanta," 
Exodus10:14 akupafye icalo conse ca Egupto. Kabili makanta asalanganinefye mpanga yonse mu calo. Awe takwatalile akuba makanta uwafula ifi, kabili takwakatale akuba uwafula fi." 
Exodus10:15 Akupile pa mushili ponse pasuka pafiita na fititi. Alya fyonse ifyapuswike ku mfula ya mabwe. Alya fyonse ifyalepuka mu mabala ne fitwalo fya ku miti. Mu calo conse ca Egupto tamwashele ibula nelyo limo ku miti nangu ku fimena panshi fyonse. 
Exodus10:16 Elyo Farao aitile Mose na Aroni bwangu bwangu, abeba ati, “Nimbifya kuli Yawe, Lesa wenu, elyo na kuli imwe bene." 
Exodus10:17 Mbeleleniko uluse uno winefye muku, mumpapatileko na kuli Yawe, Lesa wenu, afumye pali ine ici cinkunka cabipisha.”" 
Exodus10:18 Elyo Mose afuma pali Farao alapapata Yawe. 
Exodus10:19 Yawe nao epakwalula umwela walapupa na maka nganshi ukufuma ku masamba. Awe waulula makanta onse no kumutwala muli Bemba Wakashika. Tamwashele makanta nelyo umo mu calo ca Egupto. 
Exodus10:20 Lelo Yawe alengele umutima wakwa Farao ukumalala, akaana nokuleka abana bakwa Israeli ukuti baleya." 
Exodus10:21 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Imisha ukuboko kobe mu mulu, ne mfifi yalakupa icalo conse ca Egupto, imfifi iyakuti umuntu aipampanta.”" 
Exodus10:22 Mose nao aimisha ukuboko kwakwe mu mulu, awe ne mfifi iyafitisha fititi yakupa ne calo ca Egupto conse pa nshiku shitatu." 
Exodus10:23 Abena Egupto balafilwa ukumona ababiye, balafilwa no kufuma apo bali pa nshiku shitatu. Lelo ku bena Israeli kwena kwali ulubuuto, takwali mfifi iyoo." 
Exodus10:24 Elyo Farao aitile Mose, amweba ati, “Kabiyeni muye mupepe Yawe. Musende na banakashi na bana, lelo impaanga ne mbushi ne ŋombe shena shishale kuno.”" 
Exodus10:25 Lelo Mose nao ayasuka ati, “Uli nokutulekafye tusende inama shakulekela Yawe, Lesa wesu, ilambo ne sha mutuulo wakoca." 
Exodus10:26 Awe tuli nokuya ne fitekwa fyesu fyonse, tapakashale nelyo cimo. Tukabomfyapo fimo pakupepa Yawe, Lesa wesu. Nomba teti twishibe ifyo tukabomfya pakupepa ilyo tushilafika kulya.”" 
Exodus10:27 Yawe alengele umutima wakwa Farao ukumalala, kabili akaana no kubaleka baleya." 
Exodus10:28 Farao aebele Mose ati, “Fuma pano! Kabili ucenjele! Ninkatala nkumona nakabili! Ubushiku nkakumona, ukafwa.”" 
Exodus10:29 Mose nao ayasuka ati, “Ifyo fine wasosa, ine nshakatale moneka ku cinso cobe nakabili.”" 
Exodus11:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Nalaleta icinkunka na cimbi icakulekelesha pali Farao na pa calo ca Egupto. Panuma ya ifyo lyena akaleka mukafume kuno. Ilyo akacita ifyo, akamutamfyamofye bonse." 
Exodus11:2 Kanshi eba abena Israeli, abaume na banakashi bena ukuti balombe ifintu fya silifa ne fya golide ku bena mupalamano babo.”" 
Exodus11:3 Kabili Yawe alengele abena Egupto ukukwatila abena Israeli umucinshi. Mose nao ali umuntu mucindami nganshi mu calo ca Egupto, abantu na bacilolo bakwa Farao balimucindike." 
Exodus11:4 Elyo Mose aebele Farao ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Ubushiku pakati, ndepitana mu calo conse ca Egupto." 
Exodus11:5 Amabeli yonse ayaume mu calo ca Egupto yalefwa. Ukutendekelafye pebeli lyakwa Farao, ilili nokumupyana pa cipuna cabufumu, ukufika na kwibeli lya musha umwanakashi uupela ubunga, na mabeli ya fitekwa yonse yali nokufwa." 
Exodus11:6 Kabili mu calo conse ica Egupto mukaba ukuloosha ukukalamba ukushatala akubamo kabili takwakatale akubamo. 
Exodus11:7 Lelo mu bena Israeli mwena nangufye ni mbwa tayakabosele pa muntu nelyo umo nelyo pa citekwa.’ Elyo mukeshiba ukuti Yawe alalekanya pakati ka bena Egupto na bena Israeli. 
Exodus11:8 Kabili bacilolo bobe bonse bakesa kuli ine no kumfukamina, bakasosa nokuti, ‘Kabiye, iwe na bantu bobe bonse abakukonka.’ Panuma ya ifyo ninshi nkaya.” Awe Mose afuma ne cipyu pali Farao." 
Exodus11:9 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Farao takakumfwe nakalya epakuti nkacite ifisungusho ifingi mu calo ca Egupto.”" 
Exodus11:10 Mose na Aroni bacitile ifisungusho ifi fyonse pa menso yakwa Farao. Lelo Yawe aumike umutima wakwe, nao akaana no kuleka abena Israeli ukuti bafume mu calo cakwe." 
Exodus12:1 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni mu calo ca Egupto ati," 
Exodus12:2 “Uno mweshi ewakulaba kuli imwe uwakubalilapo, umweshi wakutendeka mu mwaka wenu." 
Exodus12:3 Mwebe ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli amuti, pa bushiku ubwalenga ikumi ubwa uno wine mweshi, umwaume onse akafwaile aba mu lupwa lwakwe umwana wa mpaanga umo pali cila ŋanda." 
Exodus12:4 Aba mu ŋanda imo nga bacepa icakuti bafilwa ukupwa umwana wa mpaanga, bali nokwakana no mwina mupalamano, ukulingana ne mpendwa ya bantu ba mu ŋanda yakwe. Muli nokupima impaanga ilefwaikwa ukulingana umo cila umo engaliila." 
Exodus12:5 Inama muli nokusala shili nokuba ishilume isha mwaka umo, ishabula akalema. Muli nokushibuula pa mpaanga nangu pa mbushi." 
Exodus12:6 Mukashisunge mpaka no bushiku ubwalenga ikumi na shine (14) ubwa uno mweshi. Elyo ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse lukashipaye lilya akasuba kaba kukuwa. 
Exodus12:7 Elyo abantu bakabuulepo umulopa umo, bakashinge mumbali elyo na pa mulu wa filu fya pa mwinshi wa mayanda bakalaliilamo." 
Exodus12:8 Mu nshita ya bushiku bwine ubo bakoca inama pa mulilo no kuilila pamo ne mikate iyishatutumuka ne misalu iyalula. 
Exodus12:9 Mwikalya inama iyibishi nangu iyaipikwa lelo mukalyefye yonse iyaocewa, umutwe, imyendo ne fya munda fyonse." 
Exodus12:10 Kabili mwikaleka nelyo cimo cikafike ku lucelo. Ifikashalapo fyonse ukufika ulucelo mukoce. 
Exodus12:11 Kanshi ifi efyo muli nokulya iyi nama namupimpa insalu shenu mushifyantike mu mushipi, namufwala ne ndyato shenu kabili namwikata ne nkonto shenu mu minwe. Mulye mukwangufyanya pantu lipasaka lyakwa Yawe." 
Exodus12:12 Pali bulya bwine ubushiku, nkapita mu calo conse ica Egupto mu nshita ya bushiku no kwipaya amabeli yonse aya bantu ne nama. Kabili nkakanda imilungu yonse iya bena Egupto. Nine Yawe." 
Exodus12:13 Umulopa eukaba icishibilo cenu pa mayanda umo muli. Nkalacilila nga namona umulopa. Imwe icinkunka tacakamonaule ico nkaponesha pa bena Egupto. 
Exodus12:14 “Mukaleibukisha ubu bushiku mu nkulo shenu shonse. Mukalebusefya nge nshikunkulu yakwa Yawe. Ili lifunde lyakubelelela. 
Exodus12:15 Pa nshiku cine lubali mukalelya imikate iyabulamo intutumushi. Pa bushiku bwakubalilapo mukafumye intutumushi yonse mu mayanda yenu. Nga cakuti umo alya icilimo intutumushi mu nshiku ishi cine lubali, wakutamfyafye mu bena Israeli." 
Exodus12:16 Mukakwata ukulongana kwamushilo pa bushiku bwakubalilapo elyo na pa bwalenga cine lubali. Mwikalabombamo umulimo nelyo umo muli ishi nshiku, kanofye ukupekanya icakulya ca muntu onse." 
Exodus12:17 Muli nokulasefya inshikunkulu ya Mikate Ishatutumuka pantu ni pali ubu bushiku nafumishe impuka shenu shonse mu calo ca Egupto. Mukalasefya ubu bushiku mu nkulo shenu shonse, ili lifunde lyakubelelela." 
Exodus12:18 Mu mweshi wakubalilapo, ukufuma icungulo ca bushiku ubwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) ukufika pa cungulo ca bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na bumo (21) cungulo, mukalelya umukate ushabamo intutumushi." 
Exodus12:19 Muli ishi nshiku cine lubali, intutumushi taili nakusangwa mu mayanda yenu. Noyo onse uukalya icintu umuli intutumushi, wakutamfyafye mu lukuta lwa bena Israeli, nangu abe umweni nangu mwana calo." 
Exodus12:20 Mwikalya cintu nangu cimo umuli intutumushi. Konse uko muli, mukalelya umukate umwabula intutumushi.”" 
Exodus12:21 Elyo Mose aitile abakalamba bonse aba mu bena Israeli abeba ati, “Kabiyeni nombaline, muye salila indupwa shenu inama, mwipaye umwana wa mpaanga wa pe Pasaka." 
Exodus12:22 Mubuule utumisambo twa hisopo mutumpike mu mulopa uuli mu lunweno, mushinge pamulu elyo na mumbali ya filu fya pa mwinshi wa ŋanda. Kwikaba nelyo umo uwakufumina panse mpaka ulucelo." 
Exodus12:23 Ilyo Yawe akalapita mu calo conse ica Egupto kukwipaya abena Egupto, akalacilila nga amona umulopa ku filu fya pa mwinshi na pa mulu wa ciibi. Yawe akalesha malaika wa mfwa ukwingila mu ŋanda yenu no kumwipaya." 
Exodus12:24 Mukalebaka ifi fyonse mwebele nge funde lyakubelelela kuli imwe ne ndupwa shenu. 
Exodus12:25 Nga mwafika mu calo Yawe alaya ukumupeela, mukalebaka ifi fyonse mwebele." 
Exodus12:26 Ilyo abana benu bakamwipusha abati, ‘Ngefi fyonse filolele mwi?’" 
Exodus12:27 Mukalebeba mwati, ‘Lilambo lye Pasaka lyakwa Yawe uwacilile amayanda ya bena Israeli mu calo ca Egupto no kupususha abana besu, lelo aipeye abena Egupto.’” Awe abantu bafukama balapepa." 
Exodus12:28 Abena Israeli baya cita ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose na Aroni. 
Exodus12:29 Pakati ka bushiku, Yawe aipeye amabeli yonse mu calo ca Egupto, ukutendekelafye kwibeli lyakwa Farao uwaleikala pa cipuna cabufumu, ukufika na kwibeli lya mufungwa uwali mu cifungo, na mabeli ya fitekwa fyonse aliyepeye." 
Exodus12:30 Farao na bacilolo bakwe bonse na bena Egupto bonse balibukile ubushiku. Awe mwali misowa iyikalamba mu calo ca Egupto, pantu takwali ŋanda nangu imo umushafwile muntu." 
Exodus12:31 Ilyo line ubushiku Farao aita Mose na Aroni abeba ati, “Imeni, fumeni mu bantu bandi imwe na bena Israeli! Kabiyeni mukupepa Yawe nga filya fine mwalombele." 
Exodus12:32 Pamo ngefyo mwasosele, musende impaanga, imbushi ne ŋombe shenu muleya. Elyo na ine mumpaaleko.”" 
Exodus12:33 Abena Egupto balapamfya abena Israeli ukuti bafume mu calo bwangu bwangu abati, “Pantu limbi bonse kuti twafwa.”" 
Exodus12:34 Kanshi abena Israeli babikile umufuba uwabulamo intutumushi mu fyakukashilamo, bafipomba mu nsalu, basenda na pa mabeya yabo." 
Exodus12:35 Kabili abena Israeli bacitile ifyo Mose abebele, balombele ku bena Egupto ifintu fya silifa ne fya golide elyo ne fyakufwala." 
Exodus12:36 Kabili Yawe alengele abena Egupto ukukwatila abena Israeli umucinshi, kabili babapeele ne fintu fyonse ifyo balebalomba. Kanshi efyo abena Israeli batapile ifyuma fya bena Egupto." 
Exodus12:37 Abena Israeli baendele ukufuma ku Ramesesi, ukuya ku Sukoti. Abaume beka beka aba pa makasa bali amakana imyanda mutanda (600,000) ukwabula ukupendelako abanakashi na baice." 
Exodus12:38 Kabili ibumba ilikalamba ilya bantu bambi lyaile nabo pamo ne fitekwa, impaanga, imbushi ne ŋombe." 
Exodus12:39 Bapangile imikate iyishatutumuka ku mufuba untu bafumine nao mu Egupto. Mu mufuba tamwali ntutumushi iyoo, pantu babatamfishefye mu calo ca Egupto, tabakwete na nshita yakupekanya ifyakulya fya pa lwendo nakalya." 
Exodus12:40 Inshita abena Israeli baikele mu calo ca Egupto yali imyaka imyanda ine na makumi yatatu (430). 
Exodus12:41 Pali ubo bwine bushiku bwakupwa kwa myaka imyanda ine na makumi yatatu (430), impuka shonse shakwa Yawe shafumine mu calo ca Egupto." 
Exodus12:42 Pali ubo bushiku Yawe alolele bushiku bonse pakuti abafumye mu Egupto. Kanshi, pali ubu bushiku abena Israeli bali nokulalolamo pakucindika Yawe mu nkulo shabo shonse ishikakonkapo." 
Exodus12:43 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati, “Amafunde yakukonka aye Pasaka inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila ni aya. Umwinafyalo onse tafwile kulyako Ipasaka." 
Exodus12:44 Lelo umusha onse uo washita kuti alyako nga cakuti walimusembulula. 
Exodus12:45 Lelo umweni na uyo waingisha incito, bena tabafwile kulyako iyoo." 
Exodus12:46 Mufwile ukuliilafye inama yonse mu ŋanda imo, tekwesha ukufumisha umupusa wa nama panse. Kabili tekwesha ukutoba ifupa nelyo limo." 
Exodus12:47 Ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse lukalesefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka," 
Exodus12:48 Umwinafyalo onse uwaikala na imwe nga alefwaya ukulyako Ipasaka lyakucindika Yawe, afwile ukusembulula abaume bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwe. Lyena kuti alalyako nga bakaya mu calo. Lelo umwaume onse uushasembululwa wena tali nakulyako." 
Exodus12:49 Umwana calo no mweni mwikala nao bonse bali nokusunga ifunde limo line.” 
Exodus12:50 Abena Israeli bonse bacitile fyonse ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose na Aroni. 
Exodus12:51 Kabili muli bulya bwine bushiku Yawe afumishe abena Israeli bonse mu calo ca Egupto mu mpuka mu mpuka shabo. 
Exodus13:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus13:2 “Usangulule ibeli lyonse ilyaume. Ibeli lyonse ilya mwifumo mu bena Israeli lyandi, libe lya muntu nangu ilya nama.”" 
Exodus13:3 Elyo Mose aebele abantu ati, “Mukaleibukisha buno bushiku ubo mwafuminemo mu calo ca Egupto umo mwali abasha. Pantu Yawe ewamufumishemo ku kuboko kwakwe ukwamaka. Kanshi mwilalyamo icintu conse icabamo intutumushi." 
Exodus13:4 Mu bushiku bwa lelo ubwa mu mweshi Abibu, mwalafuma mu calo ca Egupto." 
Exodus13:5 Ilyo Yawe akamufisha mu calo ca bena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Amoli, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi, icalo alaile ifikolwe fyenu, icalo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci. Mukalesefyamo iyi nshikunkulu muli uno mweshi." 
Exodus13:6 Mwikalalya mikate iyabamo intutumushi pa nshiku cine lubali. Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali epo mukalesefya inshikunkulu yakucindika Yawe. 
Exodus13:7 Mukalelya imikate iyabulamo intutumushi pa nshiku cine lubali, kabili pakati kenu tapafwile kumoneka intutumushi nangufye mu calo cenu conse." 
Exodus13:8 Pali ubo bushiku ukebe umwana obe umwaume auti, ‘Ico ndecitila ifi ni pa mulandu wa fintu Yawe ancitile ilyo nalefuma mu calo ca Egupto.’" 
Exodus13:9 Ukusefya iyi nshikunkulu kukaba kuli imwe kwati cishibilo ca pa kuboko kwenu nangu kwati cakwibukishishako pa mpumi shenu, epakuti amafunde yakwa Yawe yaleba pa tunwa twenu. Pantu Yawe amufumishe mu calo ca Egupto no kuboko kwakwe ukwamaka." 
Exodus13:10 Muli nokusunga ili funde cila mwaka pa nshita iyasontwa.” 
Exodus13:11 “Ilyo Yawe akamufisha mu calo ca bena Kenani, ico alaile no mulapo kuli imwe ne fikolwe fyenu ukuti akamupeela," 
Exodus13:12 mufwile mukaletuula na mabeli yonse kuli Yawe. Kabili amabeli yonse ayalume aya fitekwa fyenu yakwa Yawe. 
Exodus13:13 Pebeli lyonse ilyakwa punda, muli nokupyanikishapo umwana wa mpaanga. Pakulilubula nga tamupyanikishepo umwana wa mpaanga pali punda ninshi mukamufune umukoshi. Mukalelubula abana benu bonse abaume amabeli." 
Exodus13:14 Nomba mu nshiku sha kuntanshi ngo mwana obe umwaume akwipusha umo cilolele, ukamwebe auti, ‘Yawe atufumishe no kuboko kwamaka mu calo ca Egupto umo twali abasha." 
Exodus13:15 Ilyo Farao akaanininefye ukuleka fwe bena Israeli ukuti tuye, Yawe aipeye amabeli yonse mu Egupto, aya bantu naya nama. E mulandu wine ndekela amabeli yonse ayalume ilambo kuli Yawe, lelo ibeli lyonse pa bana bandi abaume ndalilubula.’" 
Exodus13:16 Ukusefya iyi nshikunkulu kukaba kuli imwe kwati cishibilo ca pa kuboko nangu icakukakila pa mpumi shenu. Pantu Yawe ewamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto no kuboko kwakwe ukwamaka.” 
Exodus13:17 Ilyo Farao alekele abena Israeli ukuti baleya, Lesa tabatungulwile mu nshila yakupita mu calo ca Bafilisiti, nangu yena yali iyipi. Pantu Lesa atile, “Nga cakuti kwaba inkondo, abantu kuti bayalula amano, babwelelamo na ku Egupto.”" 
Exodus13:18 Eico Lesa atungulwile abantu mu nshila iyashokela mu matololo ukulola kuli Bemba Wakashika. Abena Israeli bali abaipangasha ku bulwi ilyo bafumine mu calo ca Egupto. 
Exodus13:19 Mose alisendele amafupa yakwa Yosefu. Pantu Yosefu alengele abana bakwa Israeli ukulapa umulapo. Abebele ati, “Lesa cine cinefye akamwafwako. Lyena mukasende amafupa yandi pakufuma kuno.”" 
Exodus13:20 Abena Israeli bafumine ku Sukoti, baya cita inkambi pa Etamu mupepi na kumpela ya matololo." 
Exodus13:21 Mu nshita ya kasuba Yawe alebatangilila mu ntumba ye kumbi pakubalanga inshila. Mu nshita ya bushiku alebatangilila mu lubingu lwa mulilo pakubasanikila pakuti baleenda akasuba no bushiku. 
Exodus13:22 Intumba ye kumbi akasuba nelyo ulubingu lwa mulilo ubushiku, tafyalefuma pa ntanshi ya bantu." 
Exodus14:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus14:2 “Eba abena Israeli ukuti babwelelemo bacite inkambi ukulungatana na Pi Hairoti, pakati ka Migidoli na Bemba Wakashika. Bacite inkambi ukulungatana na Baali Sefoni." 
Exodus14:3 Farao akatontonkanya ukuti abena Israeli balelulumbafye mu calo, pantu amatololo nayabacilikila." 
Exodus14:4 Nkalenga umutima wakwa Farao ukumalala, nao akabasupila. Na ine nkailenga ukucindama pakucimfya Farao ne fita fyakwe. Elyo na bena Egupto bakeshiba ukuti nine Yawe.” Kanshi abena Israeli bacitile umo babebele." 
Exodus14:5 Nomba ilyo baebele imfumu ya calo ca Egupto ukuti abena Israeli nabafyuka, Farao na bacilolo bakwe bayalula amano pa bena Israeli. Kabili balaipushanya abati, “Cinshi ici twacita? Twaleka abena Israeli baya, baleka no kutubombela!”" 
Exodus14:6 Kanshi Farao epakupekanya iceleta lyakwe, asenda ne fita fyakwe." 
Exodus14:7 Asendele amaceleta ayawamisha imyanda mutanda (600) na maceleta yonsefye aya mu Egupto, elyo cila celeta pali icita." 
Exodus14:8 Yawe alenga umutima wakwa Farao ukumalala, nao epakusupila abena Israeli abaleya kupama kupama." 
Exodus14:9 Abena Egupto emukutila bakabalwe bonse abakwa Farao, amaceleta, ifita fyonse fya pali bakabalwe ne fita fya pa makasa basupila abena Israeli. Babasanga apo bacitile inkambi pa lulamba lwa Bemba Wakashika mupepi na Pi Hairoti apalungatana na Baali Sefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Ilyo Farao apaleme, abena Israeli bati baloleshe, bamona abena Egupto balebakonka panuma. Awe, baiketwe no mwenso ukalamba, balakuuta na kuli Yawe." 
Exodus14:11 Balailishanya kuli Mose abati, “Bushe mu Egupto tamwali inindi, e mulandu watuletela mu matololo ukuti emo twise tufwile? Finshi watucitila pakutufumya mu calo ca Egupto!" 
Exodus14:12 Bushe tatwakwebele ilyo twali mu Egupto ukuti utulekefye tulebombela abena Egupto? Ifwe cawamishapo ukubombela abena Egupto ukucila ukufwila muno mu matololo.” 
Exodus14:13 Mose nao ayasuka abantu ati, “Mwitiina! Shipeni, mwalamona uko Yawe alemupususha lelo. Aba bena Egupto mwamona ilelo tamwakatale amubamona nakabili." 
Exodus14:14 Yawe ewalamulwishishako. Imwe mwikalefye.” 
Exodus14:15 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Cinshi ulekuutila kuli ine? Eba abena Israeli ukuti baleya kuntanshi." 
Exodus14:16 Imya inkonto yobe, tambalika ukuboko kobe pali bemba pakuti amenshi yakanike, pakuti abena Israeli bapite muli bemba pa mushili uwauma." 
Exodus14:17 Na ine ndelenga imitima ya bena Egupto ukumalala nabo bengilemo kukubasupila pakuti babakonke panuma. Kabili na ine ndeilenga ukucindama pakucimfya Farao ne fita fyakwe fyonse, amaceleta yakwe ne fita fyakwe ifya pali bakabalwe." 
Exodus14:18 Nga nailanga ukucindama pakucimfya Farao, amaceleta yakwe ne fita fyakwe ifya pali bakabalwe, lyena abena Egupto bakeshiba ukuti nine Yawe.”" 
Exodus14:19 Elyo malaika wakwa Lesa uwaletungulula ifita fya bena Israeli afumine kuntanshi no kuselela kunuma. Kabili ne ntumba ye kumbi nayo yafuma kuntanshi yaselela kunuma," 
Exodus14:20 yaisa ba pakati ka fita fya bena Egupto ne fita fya bena Israeli. Ubushiku bonse yaletele mfifi, lelo ulubali lubiye yaletele ulubuuto. Kanshi ubushiku bonse bwapitilefye ukwabula ukuti ifita fipalamane." 
Exodus14:21 Elyo Mose atambalikile ukuboko kwakwe pali bemba. Yawe alenga umwela wa ku kabanga uwakosa ukupupila pali bemba ubushiku bonse. No mwela waseshapo amenshi, pashala apauma. Awe na menshi yayakanikana." 
Exodus14:22 Kanshi na bena Israeli epakupita muli bemba pa mushili uwauma. Amenshi yali kwati cibumba ku kulyo na ku kuso kwabo. 
Exodus14:23 Abena Egupto pamo na bakabalwe bakwa Farao, amaceleta yakwe ne fita fya pali bakabalwe basupile abena Israeli no kubakonka muli bemba." 
Exodus14:24 Cilya bwalaya kukuca Yawe, mu lubingu lwa mulilo ne ntumba ye kumbi, aloleshe panshi pa fita fya bena Egupto no kufifulunganya." 
Exodus14:25 Yawe alengele imipeto ya maceleta yabo ukukanaenda bwino, balecushiwa pakwenda. Elyo abena Egupto batile, “Natufulumuke abena Israeli! Pantu Yawe eulebalwilako pakulwisha Egupto.”" 
Exodus14:26 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Tambalikila ukuboko kobe pali bemba, pakuti amenshi yabwele yabunshe abena Egupto, amaceleta yabo ne fita fyabo ifya pali bakabalwe.”" 
Exodus14:27 Mose atambalikila ukuboko kwakwe pali bemba. Kabili cilya cabafye ku macaca, awe na menshi yabwelela umo yalepita. Abena Egupto cilya bati bafulumukeko, Yawe nao abaposa mu menshi." 
Exodus14:28 Amenshi yabwela umo yalepita, yabunsha na maceleta ne fita fya pali bakabalwe ne fita fyonse ifyakwa Farao ifyakonkele abena Israeli muli bemba. Awe tapapuswike nangu umo nakalya." 
Exodus14:29 Lelo abena Israeli bena bapitile muli bemba pa mushili uwauma, amenshi yali kwati cibumba ku kulyo na ku kuso kwabo." 
Exodus14:30 Muli ubo bushiku Yawe apuswishe abena Israeli mu minwe ya bena Egupto. Na bena Israeli bamwene ifitumbi fya bena Egupto mu lulamba lwa bemba. 
Exodus14:31 Abena Israeli pakumona ifyo Yawe akwatisha amaka yantu alangile pakucimfya abena Egupto, abantu bakwatile Yawe akatiina, kabili bacetekele Yawe na Mose umubomfi wakwe." 
Exodus15:1 Elyo Mose pamo na bena Israeli baimbile Yawe ulwimbo abati, “Kanyimbile Yawe pantu nacimfya apakalamba. Kabalwe no wendelepo nabebisha muli bemba." 
Exodus15:2 Yawe e maka yandi, kabili e lwimbo lwandi. Kabili nasanguka ipusukilo lyandi. Yawe e Lesa wandi, na ine eo nakulalumbanya, ni Lesa wakwa tata, na ine eo nakulatatakula." 
Exodus15:3 Yawe cita ca bulwi, Yawe e shina lyakwe." 
Exodus15:4 “Yawe naposa muli bemba amaceleta yakwa Farao ne fita fyakwe, Bakangalila ba fita abacenjela nabanwena muli Bemba Wakashika." 
Exodus15:5 Amatenga ayashika nayabebisha. Bebile panshi ya matenga kwati libwe. 
Exodus15:6 “We Yawe ukuboko kobe kwa ku kulyo maka ayakupapisha, We Yawe ukuboko kobe kwa ku kulyo nakushonaula abalwani." 
Exodus15:7 Ku kucindamisha kobe eko ucimfisha abalwani bobe, Watuma icipyu cobe icikali caboca kwati ni mpimbili." 
Exodus15:8 Wafumya umupu mu myona yobe na menshi yatuntumana, amenshi yaiminina kwati cibumba. Amenshi ya panshi yetenga lya bemba yakosa ndi." 
Exodus15:9 Umulwani epakutila, ‘Kambasupile, ndebasanga. Ndeyakanya ne fitapo, no mutima wandi ulefikuta. Ndesomona ulupanga lwandi, ukuboko kwandi kulebonaula.’" 
Exodus15:10 Lelo, we Yawe, ilyo wabaputa umupu obe, awe bemba abebisha. Baponena mu menshi yakali ngo mutofwe." 
Exodus15:11 Nani, we Yawe, uwaba nga iwe pa milungu yonse? Nani uwaba nga iwe ku bucindami bwamushilo, uwakutiina ku fintu ifikankala acita na ku fyakupapa acita?" 
Exodus15:12 Watambalike ukuboko kobe kwa ku kulyo no mushili wabamina. 
Exodus15:13 Ku citemwiko cobe icishipwa watangilila abantu abo walubula. Ku maka yobe ubatungulula ku cifulo cobe icamushilo. 
Exodus15:14 Imitundu ya bantu yaumfwa, yalatutuma ku mwenso, Abafilisiti baikatwa no mwenso ukalamba nganshi." 
Exodus15:15 Imfumu sha bena Edomu shatiina nganshi. Intungulushi sha bena Moabu shalakankafye ku mwenso. Abena Kenani bafwa umutombo ku mwenso. 
Exodus15:16 Baikatwa no mwenso uukalamba no kutiinisha nganshi. Ku maka ya kuboko kobe babafye tondolo nge libwe, mpaka we Yawe abantu bobe bapita, mpaka abantu bobe abo walubula bapita." 
Exodus15:17 Ulebengishamo nokuleka bekale pa lupili lobe, pa ncende we Yawe iyo wacita ukuba icifulo cobe, icifulo camushilo ico we Mfumu wakuula ne minwe yobe." 
Exodus15:18 We Yawe ukateeka imyaka ne myaka pe.” 
Exodus15:19 Abena Israeli bapitile muli bemba pa mushili uwauma. Lelo Yawe abweseshe amenshi no kwibisha bakabalwe bakwa Farao na maceleta ne fita fya pali bakabalwe ilyo baile muli bemba. 
Exodus15:20 Elyo kasesema mwanakashi Miriamu nkashi yakwa Aroni abuula insombo alalisha, na banakashi bonse balamukonka panuma balelisha insombo, balecinda nokucinda." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu asamuna no lwimbo ati, “Imbileni Yawe pantu nacimfya apakalamba. Kabalwe no wendelapo nabebisha muli bemba.”" 
Exodus15:22 Elyo Mose atungulwile abena Israeli ukufuma kuli Bemba Wakashika, baya mu matololo ya Shuri. Baendele mu matololo inshiku shitatu ukwabula ukusanga amenshi." 
Exodus15:23 Ilyo bafikile ku Mara, amenshi ayali kulya yali ayalula. Kanshi bafililwe no kuyanwa. Ici ecalengele palya bapenike ishina lya Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Elyo abantu balailishanya kuli Mose ati, “Bushe nomba tulenwa nshi?”" 
Exodus15:25 Elyo Mose akuutile kuli Yawe, elyo Yawe nao amulanga icimuti cimo. Mose aciposa mu menshi, na menshi yaba ayasuma ayakunwa. Palya pene epo Yawe abapeele icipope na mafunde, kabili no kubesha epo abeseshe." 
Exodus15:26 Abebele ati, “Nga cakuti mwaba ne cumfwila kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe, ine ne Yawe Lesa wenu, nga mwalacita ifyalungama pa cinso cakwe, kabili mwalakonka na mafunde yakwe, no kusunga ifipope fyakwe fyonse, ninshi na ine nshakamuletele malwele yalya naletele abena Egupto, pantu nine Yawe uumundapa.”" 
Exodus15:27 Elyo baile ku Elimu, ukwali utumfukumfuku twa menshi ikumi na tubili (12) no tuncindu amakumi cine lubali (70). Kulya eko bacitile inkambi mupepi na menshi." 
Exodus16:1 Ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli lwafumine ku Elimu lwafika ku matololo ya Shini pa bushiku bwalengele ikumi na shisano ubwa mu mweshi wabubili, ukutula apo bafumine mu Egupto. Amatololo ya Shini yaba pakati ka Elimu na Sinai." 
Exodus16:2 Awe, ulukuta lonse lwa bena Israeli lwalailishanya kuli Mose na Aroni mu matololo." 
Exodus16:3 Lwalabeba ati, “Kanshi Yawe nga atwipailefye mu Egupto. Pantu mwena twaleikala apali inongo sha nama no kulya ifyakulya ifingi apo tulefwaila. Nomba moneni mwatuleta muno mu matololo pakuti ibumba lyonse lifwe ku nsala.”" 
Exodus16:4 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Nakulaponya icakulya ukufuma ku mulu nge mfula. Abantu bali nokulafumina kunse ya nkambi cila bushiku no kulonganya ifyakulya ifilingile ukulya pa bushiku bumo. Ifi efyo ndefwaya ukubesha, pakumona nga bakakonka amafunde yandi." 
Exodus16:5 Pa bushiku bwalenga mutanda pena bakalelonganika ifyakulya fya nshiku shibili.” 
Exodus16:6 Kanshi Mose na Aroni baebele abena Israeli bonse abati, “Icungulo mwalaishiba ukuti ni Yawe ewamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto." 
Exodus16:7 Mailo ulucelo mukamona ubucindami bwakwa Yawe, pantu naumfwa ifyo muleilishanya kuli ena. Nga ifwe tuli bani abakuti mwailishanyako?”" 
Exodus16:8 Kabili Mose abeba nokuti, “Mukeshiba ukuti ni Yawe, nga amupeela inama yakulya icungulo elyo ulucelo akamupeela umukate onse mukafwaya pa mulandu wakuti Yawe naumfwa ukuilishanya kwenu kuli ena. Nga ifwe tuli bani? Ala, tekuli ifwe muleilishanya lelo ni kuli Yawe.”" 
Exodus16:9 Elyo Mose aebele Aroni ati, “Eba ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse utile, ‘Iseni pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pantu naumfwa ifyo muleilishanya.’”" 
Exodus16:10 Cilya Aroni acili alelanda ku lukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse, ulukuta lwalolesha ku matololo, awe apopene lwamona ubucindami bwakwa Yawe mwikumbi." 
Exodus16:11 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus16:12 “Niŋumfwa ifyo abena Israeli baleilishanya. Ubebe auti, ‘Icungulo mulelya inama elyo ulucelo mukalya umukate mukekuta. Elyo mukeshiba ukuti nine ne Yawe Lesa wenu.’”" 
Exodus16:13 Mu cungulo, inkwale shingi shaisa shakumana inkambi yonse, kabili ulucelocelo kwawile umume washinguluka inkambi yonse." 
Exodus16:14 Ilyo umume wakuntika, pa mushili mu matololo pamoneke utuntu utwapapatala utwabuuta tuutu kwati bunga bwa mfula." 
Exodus16:15 Ilyo abena Israeli bamwene ifi, balaipushanya abati, “Nga utu nato ni tunshi? Pantu tatwishibe.” Mose epakubeba ati, “Uyu e mukate Yawe amupeela ukuti mulye." 
Exodus16:16 Ifi efyo Yawe akonkomeshe, ‘Umuntu onse ali nokukungubapo ukulingana no kulya kwakwe. Mulekunguba icipimo ca omeri umo icaisula ica cila muntu mwikala nao mwitenti lyenu.’”" 
Exodus16:17 Awe, abena Israeli balacita ifyo babebele, bamo balakunguba ifingi elyo bambi utunono." 
Exodus16:18 Nomba cilya bapima mu cipimo ca omeri, basanga abacikunguba ifingi tafyaleshalapo, elyo abacikunguba utunono nabo bene tabalebulisha. Umuntu onse alekunguba ukulingana no kulya kwakwe." 
Exodus16:19 Kabili Mose abebele ati, “Peba uwakushako nangu tumo ukufika mailo lucelo.”" 
Exodus16:20 Lelo bamo bakeene ukumfwila Mose. Bashilepo fimo ukufika ulucelo, lelo mwali mititi fyatampile no kulanunka. Kanshi Mose epakubafulilwa." 
Exodus16:21 Cila muntu alekunguba cila lucelo ukulingana no kulya kwakwe, lelo akasuba kaleti nga kakaba fyasunguluka." 
Exodus16:22 Pa bushiku bwalenga mutanda pena balekunguba ifyakulya fya nshiku shibili, cila muntu icipimo ca baomeri babili. Elyo intungulushi sha lukuta lwa bena Israeli shaisa shimikilako Mose uyu mulandu." 
Exodus16:23 Nao Mose asheba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe akonkomeshe ukuti ubushiku bwa mailo bwakutuusha, Lisabata lyamushilo lyakwa Yawe. Kanshi mupange imikate intu mulefwaya ukupanga kabili mwipike nefyo mulefwaya ukwipika. Panuma yakulya musunge fyonse ifileshalapo mpaka mailo.”" 
Exodus16:24 Kanshi nabo bashilepo ifyakulya fimo mpaka ulucelo ngefyo Mose abakonkomeshe, ne cakulya tacalenunka nelyo ukubamo imititi." 
Exodus16:25 Mose epakubeba ati, “Ilelo nifi efyo mulelya pantu Lisabata lyakwa Yawe. Kanshi ilelo tamwasangeko nangu cimo pa mushili." 
Exodus16:26 Mu nshiku mutanda mukalekunguba ifyakulya, lelo pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali pe Sabata takwakaleba nelyo cimo.”" 
Exodus16:27 Nomba pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali abantu bamo bafumine kunse ya nkambi kukukunguba ifyakulya, lelo tabafisangileko iyoo." 
Exodus16:28 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Bushe mukaleka lilali ukukanasunga amafunde yandi nefyo ndemukonkomesha?" 
Exodus16:29 Moneni! Yawe namupeela Isabata, e mulandu wine pa bushiku bwalenga mutanda akulamupeela icakulya ca nshiku shibili. Kanshi pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali umuntu onse ali nokuba apo ali. Kabili takuli nangu umo uwakufuma pamwakwe iyoo.”" 
Exodus16:30 Eico kanshi abantu baletuusha pa bushiku ubwalenga cine lubali. 
Exodus16:31 Abena Israeli bainike cakulya cilya balelya ishina lya maana. Maana ali uwabuuta ngo tuseke twa kolianda, kabili mu kanwa waleumfwika uwalowa kwati tumikate twapapatala uto pakupanga babikamo ubuci." 
Exodus16:32 Mose elyo abeba ati, “Yawe nakonkomesha ati, ‘Mubuule icipimo ca omeri umo uwa maana, musungilemo maana ya bana benu abakalafyalwa kuntanshi, epakuti nabo bakalemona icakulya ico nalemupeela ukuti mulelya mu matololo ilyo namufumishe mu calo ca Egupto.’”" 
Exodus16:33 Kanshi Mose aebele Aroni ati, “Buula umutondo, ubikemo icipimo ca omeri umo wa maana, elyo uuteke na pa cinso cakwa Yawe pakusungila abana benu kuntanshi.”" 
Exodus16:34 Ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose, pakusunga maana Aroni abika umutondo pantanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano." 
Exodus16:35 Abena Israeli balile maana pa myaka amakumi yane (40) mpaka nelyo bafikile mu calo umwali abantu. Balile maana mpaka nelyo bafikile ku mupaka wa calo ca Kenani. 
Exodus16:36 Omeri umo aleingila ikumi limo mu cipimo ca efa. 
Exodus17:1 Ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse lwafumine mu matololo ya Shini. Lwaleti lwafuma pali iyi ncende lwaya kuli imbi ukulingana ngefyo Yawe alelutungulula. Lwacitile inkambi pa Refidimu, nomba palya tapali menshi ayakuti abantu banwe." 
Exodus17:2 Balaumanya Mose abati, “Tupeele amenshi yakunwa.” Mose nao abasuka ati, “Cinshi mulengumanishisha? Cinshi muleesesha Yawe?”" 
Exodus17:3 Nomba abantu baiketwe ne cilaka nganshi kulya, kanshi balailishanya na kuli Mose abati, “Cinshi watufumishe mu Egupto? Bushe ni kukwisa twipaila pamo na bana besu ne fitekwa fyesu ku cilaka?”" 
Exodus17:4 Elyo Mose akuuta kuli Yawe ati, “Bushe ncite shani naba bantu? Aba bantu balantoba amabwe.”" 
Exodus17:5 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Tangilila abantu. Usendepo na bakalamba ba mu bena Israeli bamo, kabili usende mu minwe yobe ne nkonto ilya waumine pa mumana wa Nailo elyo uleya." 
Exodus17:6 Na ine ndeiminina ku ntanshi yobe pa cilibwe ca Holebu. Ume mu cilibwe, na menshi yakuti abantu banwe yalefumamo.” Awe Mose nao acita ifyo fine ilyo abakalamba ba bena Israeli balemonako." 
Exodus17:7 Mose ainike pa ncende palya Masaya na Meriba pantu palya epo abana bakwa Israeli bailishenye, kabili epo baeseshe Yawe ilyo batile, “Bushe Yawe aba na ifwe nangu iyoo?”" 
Exodus17:8 Elyo abena Amaleki baishile ku Refidimu kukulwisha abena Israeli. 
Exodus17:9 Mose aebele Yoshua ati, “Salapo abaume bamo abakuti mukaye nabo kukulwa na bena Amaleki. Na ine mailo nkaya iminina pa lupili ninjikata inkonto yakwa Lesa mu minwe yandi.”" 
Exodus17:10 Kanshi Yoshua nao acitile ifyo Mose amukonkomeshe, alwisha na bena Amaleki. Mose, Aroni na Huri nabo banina pa mulu wa lupili." 
Exodus17:11 Nomba Mose alati nga aimya amaboko yakwe mumulu, abena Israeli balacimfya abena Amaleki. Elyo nga aponya amaboko yakwe, abena Amaleki nabo ninshi balacimfya." 
Exodus17:12 Ilyo amaboko yakwa Mose yanaka, Aroni na Huri babuula ilibwe balibika apo ali, epo aikala. Elyo baimya amaboko yakwe umo lubali lumo umbi lubali lubiye. Kanshi amaboko yakwe yashele ifyo fine mpaka akasuba kasuka kawa." 
Exodus17:13 Kanshi efyo Yoshua acimfishe abena Amaleki ku lupanga. 
Exodus17:14 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati “Lemba ici cacitika mu citabo icipombwa pakuti bakalecibukisha, kabili ushininkishe ukuti Yoshua aumfwako pantu nkalofya abena Amaleki kabili tabakatale abebukishiwa pano isonde.”" 
Exodus17:15 Mose epakukuulapo ubulambo abwita nokuti, “Yawe e luunga lwandi.”" 
Exodus17:16 Pantu atile “Ukuboko kwandi kuli pa luunga lwakwa Yawe. Yawe ewakulalwisha pe abena Amaleki umukalakonkanina inkulo.” 
Exodus18:1 Yeturo shifyala Mose, shimapepo wa ku Midiani, aumfwile ifintu fyonse ifyo Lesa acitile Mose na bena Israeli nefyo Yawe abafumishe mu Egupto." 
Exodus18:2 Panuma, Mose alekele umukashi wakwe Sipora ukubwelelamo kuli wishi Yeturo. Yeturo nao apokelela mwane" 
Exodus18:3 pamo na bana bakwe abaume. Mose ainike umwana wakwe umo ishina lya Geshomu, pantu atile, “Ndi mweni mu calo ca bene.”" 
Exodus18:4 Umbi nao amwinike shina lya Eliese pantu atile, “Lesa wakwa tata ewangafwile no kumpususha ku lupanga lwakwa Farao.”" 
Exodus18:5 Yeturo shifyala Mose aishile kuli Mose pamo na bamwana Mose na muka Mose, abakumenye mu matololo umo acitile nkambi mupepi no lupili lwakwa Lesa." 
Exodus18:6 Yeturo alilaishe amashiwi kuli Mose ati, “Ine Yeturo ne sofyala ndi mu nshila, ndeleta umukashi obe na bamwano bonse babili.”" 
Exodus18:7 Kanshi Mose afuma mukusengela shifyala, amufukamina no kumutomona pakumuposha. Cilya bapwa ukuposhanya baingila na mwitenti." 
Exodus18:8 Mose ashimikila shifyala fyonse ifyo Yawe acitile Farao na bena Egupto pa mulandu wa bena Israeli. Kabili amushimikila na mafya yonse abantu bapitilemo mu nshila elyo nefyo Yawe abapuswishe. 
Exodus18:9 Yeturo asansamwike nganshi pakumfwa ifisuma fyonse fintu Yawe acitile abena Israeli pakubapokololako mu minwe ya bena Egupto. 
Exodus18:10 Yeturo asosa nokuti, “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe uwamupokolwele mu minwe yakwa Farao kabili uwamupokolwele na mu minwe ya bena Egupto!" 
Exodus18:11 Awe nomba naishiba ukuti kanshi Yawe alicila imilungu yonse pantu acitile ici ku balesunga abena Israeli buluku buluku.” 
Exodus18:12 Elyo Yeturo shifyala Mose aleta ifye lambo lyakocela Lesa ne fya malambo yambi ayakulekela Lesa. Aroni nao aisa na bakalamba aba mu bena Israeli kukulya icakulya pamo na shifyala Mose pa cinso cakwa Lesa. 
Exodus18:13 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Mose aikele pa cipuna cakupingwilapo abantu, na bantu baiminine ukumushinguluka ukutula ulucelo mpaka ne cungulo." 
Exodus18:14 Ilyo Yeturo shifyala Mose amona ifyo Mose alebombela abantu, amwipusha ati, “Cinshi ulecitila ifi ku bantu? Mulandu nshi wikalilefye weka ulepingula ilyo abantu bonse aba beminine nabakushinguluka ukutula ulucelo mpaka ne cungulo?”" 
Exodus18:15 Nao Mose ayasuka shifyala ati, “Pantu abantu besa kuli ine kukubepushishako ubufwayo bwakwa Lesa." 
Exodus18:16 Ilyo babikana ifikansa, besa kuli ine, na ine ndabaputwila ifikansa, kabili nenga nokuti beshibe ifipope na mafunde yakwa Lesa.”" 
Exodus18:17 Elyo Yeturo shifyala Mose amwebele ati, “Umusango ulebombelamo tauweme iyoo." 
Exodus18:18 Iwe pamo na bantu abaleisa kuli iwe mwakulanaka nganshi. Uyu mulimo untu wakosa, teti ubombe weka iyoo." 
Exodus18:19 Umfwa nomba kuli ine, nalakupandako amano, na Lesa engalaba na iwe. Iwe ufwile uleimininako abantu pa cinso cakwa Lesa no kubatwalilako imilandu yabo kuli Lesa." 
Exodus18:20 Kabili ulebafunda ifipope na mafunde, no kubalanga ifyo bali nokwikala nefyo bali nokulacita." 
Exodus18:21 Lelo usalepo pa bantu bonse abaume bamo abamano, kabili abakatiina kuli Lesa, abacishinka, abashifwaya na mafisakanwa. Aba ebo upeele umulimo wakutungulula abantu mu makana, mu myanda, mu makumi yasano elyo bambi nabo mu makumi." 
Exodus18:22 Ebo uleke baleputula imilandu ya bantu lyonse, lelo abaisa ne milandu iyakosa balebaleta kuli iwe. Imilandu yonse iyanguka yena abene balepingula. Umulimo obe uyu uwakosa lyena ukangukako ukuubomba pantu bakulakwafwako." 
Exodus18:23 Nga wacita ifi, kabili efyo Lesa akukonkomesha, tawakulanakisha nganshi, elyo na bantu aba bonse bakulabwelelamo kumwabo nabasansamuka.”" 
Exodus18:24 Awe Mose alyumfwile ifyamwebele shifyala Yeturo, no kuficita fyonse ifyo amwebele." 
Exodus18:25 Asalilepo abaume bamo abamano pa bena Israeli bonse no kubacita intungulushi sha bantu, isha pa makana, isha pa myanda, isha pa makumi yasano elyo ne sha pa makumi." 
Exodus18:26 Intungulushi shalaputwila na bantu imilandu yabo. Imilandu iyakosa shalatwala kuli Mose, lelo iyinono yena shalapingula ishine." 
Exodus18:27 Elyo Yeturo ashalikepo shifyala Mose, abwelelamo na ku calo kumwabo." 
Exodus19:1 Mu mweshi walenga itatu apo abena Israeli bafumine ku Egupto, ubushiku bwine ubo bafikile ku matololo ya Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Ilyo bafumine ku Refidimu baingile mu matololo ya Sinai no kucita inkambi mulya mwine apalungatene no lupili lwa Sinai. 
Exodus19:3 Elyo Mose aninine aya kuli Lesa. Yawe uko ali ku lupili nao aita Mose amweba ati, “Ifi efyo uli nokulanda ku ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo, kabili efyo uli nokweba abena Israeli," 
Exodus19:4 ‘Imwe mwe bene mwalimwene ifyo nacitile ku bena Egupto, kabili nefyo namusendele kwati ni pa mapindo yakwa kapumpe no kumuleta uko ndi." 
Exodus19:5 Nomba nga cakuti mwalanakila, mwalasunga ne cipangano candi, ninshi pa mishobo yonse nimwe mukaba abantu bandi abo nacindamika, nangu isonde lyonse lyaba lyandi." 
Exodus19:6 Imwe mukaba uluko lwa bantu abatumika ine nga bashimapepo, kabili umushobo wamushilo kuli inefye.’ Aya e mashiwi ayo uli nokuya eba abana bakwa Israeli.”" 
Exodus19:7 Kanshi Mose abwelelamo alonganya na bakalamba ba bena Israeli, abeba na mashiwi yonse Yawe amukonkomeshe ukusosa." 
Exodus19:8 Elyo abantu bonse bayasuka capamo abati, “Twakulacita fyonse ifyo Yawe atweba.” Nao Mose epakuya fisha ifyo bayaswike kuli Yawe." 
Exodus19:9 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Ndeisa kuli iwe mwikumbi ilyafiita fititi, pakuti abantu bese mukumfwa ilyo ndelanda nobe, pakuti lyonse iwe bakalekucetekela.” Elyo Mose nao aeba Yawe ifyo abantu bayaswike," 
Exodus19:10 Yawe nao amweba ati, “Kabiye ku bantu uye ubasangulule ilelo elyo na mailo. Ubebe bacape ifyakufwala fyabo." 
Exodus19:11 Elyo pa bushiku ubwalenga shitatu bakaiteyanye, pantu pali ubu bushiku epo Yawe akekila pa lupili lwa Sinai pa cinso ca bantu bonse." 
Exodus19:12 Ukacite umwakupelela abantu ukushingulusha ulupili. Ukabebe auti, ‘Mucenjele, mwinina lupili nangufye ukulukumya mwisamba. Umuntu onse uukakumya ku lupili ninshi wakwipayafye." 
Exodus19:13 Uyo muntu ali nokulaswa amabwe nangu ukulaswa imifwi. Umuntu nelyo umo tali nakumwikatamo. Cibe muntu nangu ni nama kwipayafye.’ Kanofye ilyo ipenga lya lusengo lwa sukusuku lyalila ukutantalila lyena abantu kuti banina ulupili.” 
Exodus19:14 Elyo Mose atentemwike ulupili aya no kwali abantu. Wene abasangulula, nabo bacapa ne fyakufwala fyabo." 
Exodus19:15 Kabili Mose abebele ati, “Muiteyanye ku bushiku bwalenga shitatu. Mwikumana no mwanakashi.”" 
Exodus19:16 Ulucelo pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu, kwali ukupanta ne nkuba, ne kumbi ilyafiita fititi lyali pa lupili. Kabili kwali ne ciunda icikalamba ice penga. Abantu bonse abali mu nkambi balatutumafye ku mwenso." 
Exodus19:17 Elyo Mose afumisha abantu kunse ya nkambi kukukumana na Lesa, nabo baya iminina mwisamba lya lupili." 
Exodus19:18 Ulupili lwa Sinai lonse lwakumanafye icushi pantu Yawe epo aikile mu mulilo. Icushi calefutumukako cali kwati ca mwilungu lya mulilo, no lupili lonse lwatenkana nganshi." 
Exodus19:19 Ilyo iciunda ce penga caleya cilekulilakofye, Mose alelanda, nao Lesa alemwasukila mwishiwi lyakupanta." 
Exodus19:20 Awe Yawe aikila pa mulu wa lupili lwa Sinai, aita na Mose pa mulu wa lupili, na Mose epo aya." 
Exodus19:21 Elyo Yawe amweba ati, “Tentemuka ulupili uye usoke abantu beciluka mupaka umwakupelela kukwisa kukuntamba ne Yawe, pantu ninshi abengi baleloba." 
Exodus19:22 Na bashimapepo bene abapalama kuli Yawe baisangulule abene epali Yawe abakanda.” 
Exodus19:23 Mose ayasuka Yawe ati, “Abantu teti banine ulupili lwa Sinai pantu mwalitusokele ukuti tucite umwakupelela abantu ukushinguluka ulupili no kulupatula ukuba ulwamushilo.”" 
Exodus19:24 Yawe amwasuka ati, “Tentemuka ulupili, uye buula Aroni mwise nankwe kuno. Lelo bashimapepo na bantu bena beesha ukwisa kuli Yawe, pantu ninshi alebakanda.”" 
Exodus19:25 Kanshi Mose epakutentemukila ku bantu, abeba nefyo Yawe asosele." 
Exodus20:1 Kabili Lesa asosele amashiwi yonse aya ati," 
Exodus20:2 “Nine Yawe, Lesa obe, uwakufumishe mu calo ca Egupto umo wali umusha." 
Exodus20:3 “Wilaba ne milungu imbi kanofye ine. 
Exodus20:4 “Wilaipangila kalubi, nangu icintu conse icakupashanya icaba mu mulu umutali nangu icaba pano isonde nangu icaba mu menshi pesamba lya calo." 
Exodus20:5 Wilafukamina utulubi nangu ukutupepa. Pantu ine ne Yawe, Lesa obe, ndi Lesa wabufuba. Nkanda abana pa bubifi bwa bashibo ukufika na ku nkulo yalenga butatu ne yalenga bune iya bampata." 
Exodus20:6 Lelo ndalanga icitemwiko icishipwa ku nkulo amakana na makana isha bantu abantemwa, abasunga na mafunde yandi." 
Exodus20:7 “Wilalumbula ishina lyakwa Yawe Lesa obe apafye pantu Yawe takalekepofye uyo onse uulumbula ishina lyakwe apafye. 
Exodus20:8 “Uleibukisha ubushiku bwe Sabata no kubusunga ubwamushilo. 
Exodus20:9 Ulebomba mu nshiku mutanda kabili emo ulebomba imilimo yobe yonse," 
Exodus20:10 lelo ubushiku bwalenga cine lubali bwena Lisabata lyakwa Yawe, Lesa obe. Wilabombamo mulimo uuli onse, we mwine, nelyo bamwano abaume na abanakashi, nelyo ababomfi abaume atemwa abanakashi, nelyo ifitekwa fyobe, nelyo umweni wikala nankwe." 
Exodus20:11 Pantu mu nshiku mutanda emo Yawe apangile umulu ne sonde, bemba na fyonse ifyabamo, lelo atuushishe pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali. Eico Yawe apaalile ubushiku bwe Sabata no kubucita ubwamushilo." 
Exodus20:12 “Ulecindika wiso na noko, pakuti uleikala inshiku ishingi mu calo ico Yawe, Lesa obe, alekupeela." 
Exodus20:13 “Wilaipaya. 
Exodus20:14 “Wilacita bucende. 
Exodus20:15 “Wilaiba. 
Exodus20:16 “Wilapeela bunte bwabufi pa mubiyo. 
Exodus20:17 “Wilakumbwa ŋanda ya mubiyo. Wilakumbwa muka mubiyo, nangu umusha wakwe umwaume nelyo umusha wakwe umwanakashi, nangu iŋombe yakwe nangu punda wakwe, nangu icintufye conse ico mubiyo akwata.”" 
Exodus20:18 Ilyo abantu baumfwile ukupanta, bamona no kubyata kwa nkuba, baumfwa ne ciunda ce penga, kabili bamona no lupili lulefutumuka icushi, balatutumafye ku mwenso. Awe bataluka na ku lupili." 
Exodus20:19 Elyo baeba Mose abati, “Niwe akulanda kuli ifwe, na ifwe twakulaumfwa. Lelo wileka Lesa eo alelanda kuli ifwe pantu ninshi tulefwa.”" 
Exodus20:20 Mose aeba abantu ati, “Mwitiina, Lesa eshilefye kukumwesha pakuti akatiina ka kuli Lesa kabe muli imwe, muleke no kulabifya.”" 
Exodus20:21 Lelo abantu bena tabapaleme iyoo, baimininefye filya fine akatalamukila, elyo Mose eka ewaile mupepi ne kumbi ilyafiita fititi umwali Lesa." 
Exodus20:22 Elyo Yawe alandile kuli Mose ati, “Eba abena Israeli ukuti namuimwena ifyo ine ne Yawe nandile kuli imwe ukufuma ku mulu." 
Exodus20:23 Mwilaipangila imilungu ya silifa nangu imilungu ya golide, iyakulinganya kuli ine." 
Exodus20:24 Munkuulile ubulambo bwe loba apakuti mulekele amalambo yakoca na yakwampana, impaanga ne mbushi shenu ne ŋombe shenu. Pa ncende ponse apo ine nkasonta ukuti epo mulempepela apopene epo nkalaisa kukumupaalila." 
Exodus20:25 Nga mwabomfya amabwe pakunkuulila ubulambo mwilabomfya amabwe ayabaswa, pantu nga mwabomfya icakubashilako ninshi ubulambo bukakowela." 
Exodus20:26 Kabili pakuya ku bulambo mwilanina pa matabo, epali mwamoneka ubwamba.”" 
Exodus21:1 Aya e mafunde yakuti ubebe. 
Exodus21:2 “Nga washita umusha Umuhibulu, afwile ukukubombela imyaka mutanda. Lelo mu mwaka walenga cine lubali ninshi alubuka mu busha apabula ukufutapo nelyo cimo." 
Exodus21:3 Nga cakuti aisa mu busha talaupa, ninshi pakuya akaya eka. Lelo nga ali no mukashi pakwisa ninshi akaya nankwe." 
Exodus21:4 Nga cakuti shikulu wakwe ewamupeele umwanakashi wakuupa, nao amufyalila na bana abaume nangu abanakashi, umwanakashi na bana ninshi bakwa shikulu wakwe. Umwaume akayafye eka." 
Exodus21:5 Lelo umusha nga ewatila, ‘Awe, ine nalitemwa shikulu pamo no mukashi wandi na bana bandi, nshilefwaya kulubuka mu busha,’" 
Exodus21:6 lyena shikulu wakwe akamulete pa cinso cakwa Lesa akamwiminike pa mwinshi nangu lwa pa cilu ca pa mwinshi, elyo akamutule ukutwi ku musumbo. Lyena akaba umusha wakwe mu bumi bwakwe bonse." 
Exodus21:7 “Umuntu nga ashitisha umwana wakwe umwanakashi mu busha, pakulubuka mu busha wena teti alubuke nga filya abasha abaume balubuka." 
Exodus21:8 Nga cakuti tasansamwishe shikulu uwamusalile ukuti abe umukashi wakwe, kuti amuleka alubuke lelo te ku benafyalo pantu namufyenga." 
Exodus21:9 Nga cakuti asalila umwana wakwe umwaume uyu mwanakashi umusha, ninshi ali nokumupeela insambu shakuba ngo mwana wakwe umwanakashi." 
Exodus21:10 Nga cakuti aupilapo umwanakashi na umbi, tafwile kuleka ukulapeela umukashi wantanshi ifyakulya, ifyakufwala ne nsambu sha ku cupo." 
Exodus21:11 Nga cakuti talecita ifi fintu fitatu, umwanakashi kuti alubuka ukwabula ukufuta indalama nangu shimo.”" 
Exodus21:12 “Uyo onse uwauma umuntu no kumwipaya, nao wine ali nokufwa." 
Exodus21:13 Lelo nga tacipanga ukumwipaya, nomba Lesa ewalenga ukuti cicitike, ninshi ali nokufulumukila ku ncende uko ine nkasonta." 
Exodus21:14 Lelo umuntu nga apangila umunankwe no kumwipaya ku mumbo, ninshi mufumyenifye na ku bulambo bwandi no kumwipaya." 
Exodus21:15 “Uyo onse uwauma wishi nangu nyina afwile ukwipaiwa. 
Exodus21:16 “Uyo onse uwaikata no kwiba umuntu, nangu amushitisha nangu ilyo bamwikata bamusanga acili noyu muntu, afwile ukwipaiwa." 
Exodus21:17 “Uyo onse uwalapisha wishi nangu nyina afwile ukwipaiwa. 
Exodus21:18 “Abantu nga baleumana elyo umo atoba umunankwe ilibwe nelyo amuma ikofi nomba tafwile lelo aba wakulalafye pa musengele," 
Exodus21:19 uwamutobele teti apeelwe umulandu nga cakuti uwatobelwe aima alaendaukako ne nkonto panse. Lelo ali nokufuta uwacenenwe pa nshita amonawilile, no kumusakamana mpaka apolelelafye." 
Exodus21:20 “Nga cakuti umuntu auma umusha wakwe umwaume nangu umwanakashi ku nkonto, no kufwa afwa apopene, uyo muntu afwile ukukandwa." 
Exodus21:21 Nomba nga cakuti papita ubushiku bumo nangu shibili umusha tafwile ninshi umwine wa musha tafwile kukandwa, pantu umusha cuma cakwe." 
Exodus21:22 “Nga cakuti abaume abalelwa bapunka umwanakashi uuli pa bukulu ne fumo lyapona, lelo tacenekwe, ninshi ulya amupunkile afwile afuta fyonse ifyo umulume apingula ne cilye nga casuminisha." 
Exodus21:23 Lelo umwanakashi nga nacenekwa lyena ubupingushi ninshi bumi pa bumi," 
Exodus21:24 ilinso pa linso, ilino pa lino, ukuboko pa kuboko, ulukasa pa lukasa," 
Exodus21:25 ukoca pa koca, icilonda pa cilonda, icikwebululwa pa cikwebululwa." 
Exodus21:26 “Nga cakuti umuntu auma umusha wakwe umwaume nangu umwanakashi pa linso nalyo lyatulika, afwile ukuleka umusha abe umuntungwa pakumufuta pa linso lyakwe." 
Exodus21:27 Elyo nga akuula ilino lya musha wakwe umwaume nangu umwanakashi, afwile ukuleka umusha abe umuntungwa pakumufuta pa lino lyakwe.”" 
Exodus21:28 “Nga cakuti iŋombe ilume nga yatunkula umuntu umwaume nangu umwanakashi ku nsengo no kufwa afwa, iyo ŋombe ifwile ukulaswa amabwe mpaka yafwa, kabili teyakulyako inama yaiko. Lelo umwine wa iyo ŋombe ilume tafwile kupeelwa mulandu." 
Exodus21:29 Nomba nga cakuti iyo ŋombe ilatunkula abantu ku nsengo, kabili no mwine wa ŋombe balimusokapo, lelo tasakamana kulaisungila mwitanga, elyo yaipaya umwaume nangu umwanakashi, iyo ŋombe ifwile ukulaswa amabwe mpaka yasuka yafwa, no mwine wa ŋombe wine afwile ukwipaiwa." 
Exodus21:30 Nomba nga cakuti bamweba ukuti kupeela icifuta mulandu pakuti alubule umweo wakwe, lyena afwile ukupeela fyonse ifyo bamupingula." 
Exodus21:31 Ili funde limo line lili nokukonkwa nga cakuti iŋombe yatunkula ku nsengo umulumendo nangu umukashana. 
Exodus21:32 Nga cakuti iŋombe ilume yatunkula ku nsengo umusha umwaume nangu umwanakashi, umwine wa ŋombe afwile ukufuta umwine wa musha indalama sha mashekeli ya silifa amakumi yatatu (30), ne ŋombe ifwile ukulaswa amabwe mpaka yafwa." 
Exodus21:33 “Nga cakuti umuntu asha icilindi icacenama nangu aimba icilindi elyo acisha icacenama, elyo mwawila iŋombe nangu punda," 
Exodus21:34 umwine wa cilindi afwile ukufuta pa citekwa. Afwile ukufuta umwine wa citekwa indalama, elyo nao asende inama iyafwa ibe yakwe." 
Exodus21:35 “Nga cakuti cilume wa ŋombe acena cilume mubiye uwa mwine no kufwa afwa, abene ba isho ŋombe babili bafwile bashitisha iyo ŋombe ipeye iyinankwe no kwakana indalama elyo ne ŋombe iyifwile." 
Exodus21:36 Nomba nga cakuti calishibikwa ukuti iyo ŋombe ilatunkula ku nsengo, lelo umwine tasakamana kulaisungila mwitanga, lyena umwine afwile ukufuta iŋombe pa ŋombe. Elyo iŋombe iyifwile ibe yakwe.”" 
Exodus22:1 “Nga cakuti umuntu aiba iŋombe nangu impaanga, elyo aipaya nangu aishitisha, afwile ukufutilapo iŋombe shisano pa ŋombe imo, ne mpaanga shine pa mpaanga imo." 
Exodus22:2 “Nga cakuti umupupu asangwa aletoba iŋanda elyo uwamusanga amupuma mpaka afwa, uwamwipaya tafwile kupeelwa mulandu wamisoka." 
Exodus22:3 Lelo nga cakuti amwipaya ilyo akasuba katula, lyena akaba wamisoka. “Umupupu afwile ukufuta pafyo ebile. Lelo nga cakuti takwete ifyakufuta, afwile ukushitishiwa pakulipila pafyo aibile." 
Exodus22:4 “Nga cakuti icitekwa ebile casangwa ukuti acili naco icabula ukufwa, nga ni ŋombe nangu punda nangu impaanga, afwile ukufutilapo inama shibili." 
Exodus22:5 “Nga cakuti umuntu alecemena ifitekwa fyakwe mu cilime nangu mwibala lya myangashi, nomba aleka fyafumamo fyaya lya mwibala lya mwine, uyo muntu afwile ukufutilapo ifisabo ifyawamisha pa fya mu cilime cakwe nangu pa fya mwibala lyakwe ilya myangashi." 
Exodus22:6 “Nga cakuti umuntu aoca umulilo nomba waya ulepya mu mpanga, waoca ne ŋanu batutila nangu isho bashilaseepa nangu ibala lyonse, uyo uocele umulilo afwile ukufutilapo fyonse." 
Exodus22:7 “Nga cakuti umuntu apeela umwina mupalamano indalama nangu ifipe kukumusungilako, elyo umupupu aisa fiba mu ŋanda ya muntu apeele ukumusungilako, uyo mupupu nga aishibikwa afwile ukubweseshapo fibili pali cimo." 
Exodus22:8 Umupupu nga tamoneke, umwine wa ŋanda afwile ukuletwa pa cinso cakwa Lesa pakwisa mona nga ewabuulila umunankwe ifipe." 
Exodus22:9 “Abantu nga baleumanina icintu cimo icili nge ŋombe, punda, impaanga, icakufwala nangu icintu conse icaluba, elyo atila ati ici cintu candi, ninshi bonse babili bali nokuleta umulandu wabo pa cinso cakwa Lesa. Uo Lesa akasanga ali no mulandu, afwile ukubwesesha umwina mupalamano fibili pali cila cintu." 
Exodus22:10 “Nga cakuti umuntu apeela umwina mupalamano punda nangu iŋombe nangu impaanga nangu icitekwa cimbi pakuti amusungileko, elyo ico naco cafwa nangu cacenwa nangu bacifyusha ukwabula ukuti umuntu amoneko." 
Exodus22:11 Mukuputula uyu mulandu, uuli ne citekwa ali nokulapa kuli Yawe ukuti taibile munankwe icuma cakwe. Umwine wa citekwa ali nokusumina umulapo, kabili no kufuta takuli nokubako iyoo." 
Exodus22:12 Lelo nga ewaibila umwina mupalamano icitekwa ninshi ali nokumufuta. 
Exodus22:13 Nga cakuti icitekwa caiketwe ku ciswango, uwalecisunga ninshi afwile ukuleta ifisheleko pakushininkisha, nokufuta tafwile kufutilapo pa citekwa bepeye ku ciswango." 
Exodus22:14 “Nga cakuti umuntu ayashima icitekwa ca mwina mupalamano, naco cacenekwa nangu cafwa ilyo umwine waciko taliko, uwayashime afwile ukufutilapo cimbi." 
Exodus22:15 Lelo nga cakuti cacitika ilyo umwine wa citekwa epo ali, ninshi uwayashime tafwile kulipila. Nga cakuti icitekwa cakwe cali cakwashima ninshi indalama alipile pakwashima eshikaba ishakufutilapo." 
Exodus22:16 “Nga cakuti umwaume asembeleka umukashana nacisungu uushilakobekelwa no kusendama nankwe, afwile ukulipila impango elyo no kumuupa." 
Exodus22:17 Lelo nga cakuti wishi wa mukashana akaanininafye ukuti amuupe, lyena uyo muntu afwile ukulipilafye impango balipila pali nacisungu." 
Exodus22:18 “Mwilaleka umwanakashi umuloshi ekale umumi. 
Exodus22:19 “Umuntu onse uwalala ne nama afwile ukwipaiwa. 
Exodus22:20 “Ni Yawe eka eo uli nokulekele lambo. Uyo onse uwaleke lambo ku mulungu uuli onse, ninshi wakupeela kukonaulwafye." 
Exodus22:21 “Mwilacusha umweni nangu ukulamufyengelesha, pantu na imwe mwali abeni mu calo ca Egupto." 
Exodus22:22 Mwilacusha mukamfwilwa nangu umwana wanshiwa onsefye. 
Exodus22:23 Nga cakuti mwalabacusha nabo bakuuta kuli ine, na ine nkomfwa inkuuta shabo." 
Exodus22:24 Kabili nkamufulilwa nganshi no kumwipaya ku lupanga. Abakashi benu bakaba bamukamfwilwa kabili abana benu nabo bakabe abana banshiwa. 
Exodus22:25 “Nga cakuti wakongwesha indalama ku mulanda umo uwa pa bantu bandi, wilacita filya balya abakongwesha indalama bacita. Wilamweba ukulalundapo insonsela." 
Exodus22:26 Nga cakuti wapoka umubiyo icakufimbana pakuti cibe e cikatila umulandu, ufwile ukumubwesesha ilintu akasuba takalati kawe," 
Exodus22:27 pantu e cakufimbana akwatafye. Cinshi cimbi engafimbana pakulala? Ilyo akuuta kuli ine nkomfwa pantu ndi waluse. 
Exodus22:28 “Wilasaalula Lesa, nangu ukulapisha uyo onse uuteeka abantu bobe." 
Exodus22:29 “Mwilashingashinga ukutuulapo iŋanu shenu mwaseepa ishingi, na pa mafuta yenu ya miolifa no mwangashi. “Ufwile ukumpeela amabeli pa bana bobe baume." 
Exodus22:30 Uli nokucita cimo cine ku ŋombe shobe ne mpaanga shobe. Amabeli ayalume yakabe kuli banyina inshiku cine lubali, elyo pa bwalenga cine konse konse mukayapeele kuli ine." 
Exodus22:31 “Muli nokuba abantu abaituula kuli ine. Eico kanshi mwilalya inama ishaipaiwa ne fiswango, muleshiposelafye imbwa.”" 
Exodus23:1 “Wilasabankanya amashiwi yabufi. Wilaafwilisha umuntu mubi pakuba kambone wabufi. 
Exodus23:2 Wilakonkelela cintubwingi mukucita ifyabipa. Nga walapeela bukambone pakulubulula wilapondamika icishinka mukukonkelela icintubwingi. 
Exodus23:3 Wilawililila ku mulanda pakumulubulwisha umulandu wakwe. 
Exodus23:4 “Nga cakuti wasanga iŋombe nangu punda wa mulwani obe nafiluba, ufwile ukufibwesesha ku mwine." 
Exodus23:5 Nga cakuti wamona punda wa muntu uwakupata nawa panshi ku mulandu wakufina kwa cipe cakwe, taufwile kumusha apo pene lelo ufwile ukumwafwako ukumwimya." 
Exodus23:6 “Wilafulunganya bupingushi mukulubulwisha umulanda. 
Exodus23:7 Uletaluka ku bupingushi bwalufyengo. Kabili wilaipaya muntu wakaele nangu umololoke, pantu uucita ifi ine nshakamubelele luse." 
Exodus23:8 Wilapoka mafisakanwa, pantu amafisakanwa yalapofwisha no kulesha ukumona bwino kabili yalabifya ne milandu ya bantu abakaele." 
Exodus23:9 “Wilacusha mweni. Mwalishiba ifyo ubweni bwaba, pantu na imwe mwali abeni mu calo ca Egupto.”" 
Exodus23:10 “Imyaka mutanda ukalelima amabala yobe no kulasombola. 
Exodus23:11 Nomba mu mwaka walenga cine lubali mwena wikalalima ibala lyobe pakuti likalalefye. Epakuti abalanda mu bantu bobe bakalekwatamo ifyakulya, elyo ifikashalamo inama sha mpanga shikalelya. Efyo ukalecita na ku mabala yobe yene aya myangashi ne miolifa." 
Exodus23:12 “Ukalebomba imilimo yobe mu nshiku mutanda, lelo pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali pena ukaletuusha pakuti iŋombe yobe na punda obe fikaletuusha, elyo no musha uwafyalilwa mu ŋanda yobe no mweni bakalebwesha amaka." 
Exodus23:13 “Uleyangwa mukucita fyonse ifyo nkwebele. Wilapepa milungu imbi, kabili wilaleka nangufye amashina yatuko yaleumfwika pa kanwa kobe.”" 
Exodus23:14 “Mu mwaka umo ukalesefyamo inshikunkulu shitatu pakuncindika. 
Exodus23:15 Mukalesefya inshikunkulu ya Mikate Ishatutumuka. Pa nshiku cine lubali mulelya umukate umwabula intutumushi ukulingana nefyo nakukonkomeshe. Mulecita ici pa nshita yasontwa mu mweshi wa Abibu, pantu muli uyu mweshi eo mwafuminemo mu calo ca Egupto. Kabili pekalaba nangu umo uwakumonekela kuli ine iminwe nkutwa." 
Exodus23:16 “Mukalesefya inshikunkulu yakulobolola ne fisabo fyantanshi mwabyele mu mabala yenu. “Mukalecita ne nshikunkulu yakulobolola iya pa kupwa kwa mwaka, ilyo mwafumya ifyakulya mu mabala." 
Exodus23:17 Imiku itatu pa mwaka abaume bonse bakalamonekela pa cinso ca Mfumu Yawe. 
Exodus23:18 “Wilatuula mulopa we lambo kuli ine pamo pene na conse icilimo intutumushi. Kabili wikalaleka mafuta ya nama ishikalatuulwa kuli ine pali ishi nshikunkulu, yashale mpaka ukufika na ku lucelo." 
Exodus23:19 “Ukaleleta ifisabo fyantanshi ifyawamishapo ifya mu mabala yobe ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe, Lesa obe. “Wikalaipikila akana ka mbushi mu mukaka wakwa nyina.”"
