Exodus23:20 “Mona, ine ndetuma malaika uwakukutangilila kuntanshi mu nshila no kulakucingililako, elyo no kuya kufisha ku cifulo cintu napekanya." 
Exodus23:21 Ulemunakila no kucita fyonse ifyo alekweba. Wilamutalamina pantu nine mutumine. Tali nokukubelela uluse nga wamutalamina, pantu ishina lyandi lili muli ena." 
Exodus23:22 Nga walanakila ifyo alesosa, walacita nefyo ine ndesosa, awe lyena ninshi abalwani bobe bakalaba abalwani bandi, na ine wine nkalalwisha na bakakulwisha." 
Exodus23:23 Malaika wandi akulakutangilila kuntanshi, akaya kufisha na mu calo ca bena Amoli, abena Hiti, abena Perisi, abena Kenani, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi kabili nkabalofyafye bonse." 
Exodus23:24 Wilakunkwila imilungu yabo nelyo ukulaipepa, kabili wikakonkelela micitile yabo. Ufwile ukonaula imilungu yabo, kabili ukatobaule na mabwe bemika aya milungu yabo." 
Exodus23:25 Mulepepa Yawe, Lesa wenu, lyena amapaalo yakwe yakaba pa fyakulya fyenu na menshi yenu. Nkatalusha na malwele yonse uko muli." 
Exodus23:26 Mu calo cenu tamwakabe umwanakashi uwakuponye fumo kabili tamwakabe ŋumba iyoo. Nkamulenga ukufikisha inshiku shonse isha bumi bwenu. 
Exodus23:27 “Nkalenga umwenso wakutiina ine ukalekutangilila. Kabili nkalafulunganya abantu abo ukalalwisha. Nkalenga nokuti abalwani bonse balekufulumuka. 
Exodus23:28 Nkatuma amalonda kuntanshi yobe kukufulumuna abena Hifi, abena Kenani na bena Hiti mu nshila yobe." 
Exodus23:29 Lelo te mu mwakafye umo nkabatamfyamo iyoo, epali icalo casanguka amatololo, ne nama sha mpanga shasanduluka shamufulila nganshi." 
Exodus23:30 Nomba nkabafulumunamo panono panono mpaka mukafule icakuti mukapoke icalo conse. 
Exodus23:31 Kabili nkabika umupaka wa calo cobe ukutampila kuli Bemba Wakashika ukufika na kuli bemba wa Bafilisiti, kabili ukufuma ku matololo ukuya shinta ku mumana wa Yufurate. Nkalubwila mu minwe yobe abantu ba muli ici calo kabili ukabafulumunamo." 
Exodus23:32 Wikapangana nabo icipangano nangu kupangana ne milungu yabo. 
Exodus23:33 Wikabaleka bakekale mu calo cobe, epali bakulenga ukubifya kuli ine. Pantu nga walapepa imilungu yabo awe ninshi ukaibika mu citeyo.”" 
Exodus24:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Nina ulupili wise kuli ine pamo na Aroni, Nadabu na Abihu na bakalamba ba bena Israeli amakumi cine lubali, mulempepa akatalamukila." 
Exodus24:2 Lelo Mose eka eo apalame kuli Yawe, bambi bena beisa mupepi, kabili na bantu bene benina nankwe.”" 
Exodus24:3 Ilyo Mose aile eba abantu amashiwi na mafunde yonse ayakwa Yawe, abantu nabo bayasukila capamo bonse abati, “Fyonse ifyo Yawe asosele twakulacita.”" 
Exodus24:4 Mose nao epakulemba fyonse ifyo Yawe asosele. Ubushiku bwakonkelepo abuka lucelocelo akuula ubulambo mwisamba lya lupili, aimikako na mabwe ikumi limo na yabili (12) ukulingana ne nko sha bena Israeli ikumi limo na shibili (12)." 
Exodus24:5 Elyo atuma abalumendo abena Israeli, nabo batuula amalambo yakoca, kabili baipaya ne fiponti fya ŋombe shilume ishakutuula kuli Yawe amalambo yakwampana pamo." 
Exodus24:6 Mose abuula umulopa wa nama awakanya pakati, umo aubika mu nweno elyo uubiye akana ku bulambo." 
Exodus24:7 Kabili abuula icitabo ca cipangano alabelengela abantu. Abantu nabo bayankula abati, “Twakulacita fyonse ifyo Yawe atweba ukulacita, kabili twakulabeela.”" 
Exodus24:8 Elyo Mose nakabili abuula umulopa aukana pa bantu abeba ati, “Uyu e mulopa wa cipangano ico Yawe apangana na imwe ukulingana na mashiwi yonse aya.”" 
Exodus24:9 Mose, Aroni, Nadabu, Abihu na bakalamba ba bena Israeli amakumi cine lubali banina ulupili," 
Exodus24:10 bamona na Lesa wa bena Israeli. Apo anyantile palemoneka kwati pantu pakubatilwe na mabwe ya safile, ayalengama ngo mulu." 
Exodus24:11 Nomba Lesa taonawile ishi ntungulushi sha bena Israeli. Shalimwene Lesa, kabili shaliliile no kunwena pamo." 
Exodus24:12 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Nina ulupili wise kuli ine, eko utale wikale. Nalaisa kupeela amabwe yabili ayapapatala apo nembele amafunde nefyo nkonkomeshe ifyakufunda abantu.”" 
Exodus24:13 Kanshi Mose epakwima na kafwa wakwe Yoshua, kabili Mose aya nina no lupili lwakwa Lesa." 
Exodus24:14 Mose epakweba abakalamba ati, “Shaleni muletulolela pano pene mpaka napo tukabwelela kuli imwe. Muleshala na Aroni na Huri, kanshi onse uwapusana no mubiye afwile ukutwala umulandu kuli bena.”" 
Exodus24:15 Ilyo Mose aninine ulupili, awe ikumbi lyakupa ulupili." 
Exodus24:16 Kabili no bucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaisa ikala pa lupili lwa Sinai. Ikumbi lyakupile ulupili pa nshiku mutanda. Kabili pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali Yawe mukati ke kumbi aita Mose. 
Exodus24:17 Abena Israeli balemona ubucindami bwakwa Yawe kwati mulilo ulepya pa mulu wa lupili. 
Exodus24:18 Mose anina ulupili aingila na mwikumbi. Aikele pa lupili inshiku amakumi yane (40), akasuba no bushiku." 
Exodus25:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus25:2 “Eba abena Israeli bansangwile umusangulo. Umpokele umusangulo ku muntu onse uyo uuli no mutima wakupeela. 
Exodus25:3 Uyu e musangulo ufwile ukumpokela kuli bena: ni golide, silifa no mukuba," 
Exodus25:4 no bushishi ubwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee, ne nsalu ishabuuta ubusaka, amasako ya mbushi," 
Exodus25:5 ne mpapa sha basukusuku ishatumpwa mu muti uwakashika, ne mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, ne mbao sha muti wa akasia," 
Exodus25:6 na mafuta ya miolifa ayakusanika mu cisaniko, ne fya cena cisuma ifyakubika mu mafuta yakusuba na mu bubani ubwanunka ubusaka," 
Exodus25:7 no tumabwe twa onikisi, no tumabwe twamutengo tumbi utwakubilila pa cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi na pali tumba wa pa cifuba." 
Exodus25:8 Kabili bakapange icifulo camushilo pakuti ndeikala nabo. 
Exodus25:9 Mukapange Itenti lyakwa Lesa ne fipe fyaliko ukulingana nefyo nkakulanga.” 
Exodus25:10 Bakapange Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ku cimuti ca akasia. Mubutali ikalepe amakubiti yabili na citika, mubwipi kubiti umo na citika elyo ukuya mumulu namo kubiti umo na citika." 
Exodus25:11 Ukalambatike golide wine wine mukati na kunse ya mbokoshi kabili ukabikeko no mushingo wa golide ukushinguluka. 
Exodus25:12 Ukapange imikobelo ine kuli golide uwalopolwa, kabili ukayengelele na ku mikonso ine iya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, ulubali lumo ibili no lubali lubiye nalo ibili." 
Exodus25:13 Elyo ukabase ifimuti fyakupingilako ku cimuti ca akasia, ukalambatikeko na golide." 
Exodus25:14 Ukapishe ifimuti fyakupingilako mu mikobelo ya ku mbali ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano pakupingilako Imbokoshi. 
Exodus25:15 Ifimuti fyakupingilako fikaleba mu mikobelo ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, mwikalafifumyamo iyoo." 
Exodus25:16 Mu Mbokoshi ukabikemo amabwe yabili ayapapatala apalembwa icipangano nkakupeela. 
Exodus25:17 “Ukapangilepo ne Nkupiko ya golide wine wine, apakufutilwa ifyabubifi. Inkupiko mubutali ikabe amakubiti yabili na citika, elyo mubufumo namo kubiti umo." 
Exodus25:18 Ukafulilepo na bamalaika babili aba golide abetwa bakerubi ku mpela shonse shibili sha nkupiko. 
Exodus25:19 Ukapangilepo kerubi ku mpela imo, elyo na umbi ku mpela ibiye ya Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi. Ukengelele kerubi umo ku mpela imo umbi nao ku mpela ibiye iya Nkupiko pakuti fikabefye cimo." 
Exodus25:20 Bakerubi bakabe na mapindo ayayansa ukulola mumulu ayacinga pa Nkupiko. Bakerubi bakaloshanye amenso, bakalelolesha pa Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi." 
Exodus25:21 Mu Mbokoshi ya Cipangano ukabikemo amabwe ya cipangano yabili ayapapatala ayo nkakupeela, elyo ukakupikepo ne Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi." 
Exodus25:22 Palya pene pa Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi, pakati ka bakerubi babili ababa pa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, epo tukalakumanina nobe, epo nkalakupeelela amafunde yandi yonse ayakweba abena Israeli.”" 
Exodus25:23 “Ukapange itebulo ku cimuti ca akasia. Mubutali likabe amakubiti yabili, mubufumo namo kubiti umo, elyo ukuya mumulu namo kubiti umo na citika." 
Exodus25:24 Ukalambatikeko na golide wine wine kabili ukabikeko no mushingo wa golide ukushinguluka. 
Exodus25:25 Mu mpela ye tebulo ukashingulushemo imbao ishapapatala mubufumo ngo lupi lwa muntu. Ku mbao ukashingulusheko umushingo wa golide. 
Exodus25:26 Kabili ukapange imikobelo ya golide ine, ukakake na ku matungi apabela imikonso ye tebulo." 
Exodus25:27 Imikobelo yakupishamo ifimuti fyakupingilako itebulo ilingile ukubela mupepi ne mbao yapapatala. 
Exodus25:28 Ukabase ifimuti fyakupingilako itebulo ku cimuti ca akasia, kabili ukalambatikeko na golide efyo mukalapingilako itebulo." 
Exodus25:29 Ukapangilepo ne mbale elyo ne misambilo, inkunku ne nweno shakwitulwilako imituulo ya fyakunwa. Ifipe fyonse ifi ukafipange kuli golide wine wine." 
Exodus25:30 Ukalebika imikate yakuba pa cinso candi pali ili tebulo pakuti ikaleba pa cinso candi inshita yonse.” 
Exodus25:31 “Ukapange icakutekapo ifisaniko ica golide wine wine. Icikalilo caciko pamo no mukonso waciko ukafifule ku nondo. Tukapu utwapala amaluba ya alumondi, ifitutu na mabula ye luba line fili nokuba icintu cimo ne cikalilo." 
Exodus25:32 Mu cakutekapo ifisaniko mukafuma imisambo mutanda, ku lubali lumo itatu ku lubali lubiye nako itatu." 
Exodus25:33 Ku musambo umo kuli nokuba tukapu tutatu utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line. Elyo na pa musambo wakonkapo ukacita ifyo fine. Kabili na ku misambo mutanda iya cakutekapo ifisaniko napo ukacite ifyo fine. 
Exodus25:34 Pa cakutekapo ifisaniko pali nokuba tukapu tune utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line. 
Exodus25:35 Kabili ifitutu fye luba limo fili nokuba mwisamba lya misambo ibili iyapakubala, fimbi mwisamba lya misambo ibili iyakonkapo elyo fimbi mwisamba lya misambo ibili iyacitatu ngo mwabela imisambo mutanda iya cakutekapo ifisaniko." 
Exodus25:36 Ifitutu ne misambo fili nokuba icintu cimofye ne cakutekapo ifisaniko ifyo bafula ku nondo ukufuma kuli golide wine wine. 
Exodus25:37 Kabili ukapange ifisaniko cine lubali no kufibika pa cakutekapo ifisaniko pakuti fikalesanikila lwa pantanshi. 
Exodus25:38 Ukapange ifyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto pamo no tubale utwasenama kuli golide wine wine. 
Exodus25:39 Ukabomfye golide wine wine uwe talanta limo pakupanga icakutekapo ifisaniko ne fibombelo fyaciko fyonse. 
Exodus25:40 Kabili mona ukafipange ukulingana nefyo nakulangile pa lupili.” 
Exodus26:1 “Ukapange Itenti lyakwa Lesa ku nsalu ikumi limo ishabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka no bushishi bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee. Kabili pali isho nsalu ukapikwilepo bakerubi ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula. 
Exodus26:2 Insalu shonse shikalingane mubutali na mubwipi. Mubutali shikabe amakubiti amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28) elyo mubwipi namo amakubiti yane. 
Exodus26:3 Ukalundinkanye insalu shisano elyo na shimbi shisano nasho shine ukashilundinkanye. 
Exodus26:4 Ku mpela ya nsalu ubalilepo ukulundinkanya ukabikeko imikobelo yacifufya konse konse mumbali yafiko lwa mubwipi, efyo ukacite na ku mpela ya nsalu shimbi ukalundinkanya." 
Exodus26:5 Ku nsalu wacibalilapo ukulundinkanya ukabikeko imikobelo amakumi yasano (50), elyo na ku ibiye nako ukabikeko amakumi yasano (50), ne mikobelo ya fipande fyonse fibili ibe iyalungatana." 
Exodus26:6 Elyo ukapanga no twakukofyamo twa golide amakumi yasano pakulunda ifyo fipande fibili, epakuti Itenti lyakwa Lesa lyaba icintu cimofye." 
Exodus26:7 “Kabili ukapikule insalu ikumi na imo (11) ku masako ya mbushi ishakufimba kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus26:8 Insalu shonse ikumi na imo (11) shikabe ishalingana mubutali na mubwipi. Mubutali shikabe amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30) elyo mubwipi namo amakubiti yane. 
Exodus26:9 Ukalundinkanye insalu shisano shikabe cimo, elyo na shimbi mutanda nasho shikabe cimo. Ukapete insalu iyakulenga mutanda pabili kuntanshi ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Exodus26:10 Ukabike imikobelo amakumi yasano (50) ku mpela ya nsalu ulundinkenye, efyo ukacite na ku mpela ya nsalu shimbi ulundinkenye." 
Exodus26:11 Kabili ukapange utwakukofyamo utwa mukuba amakumi yasano (50) pakulunda Itenti lyakwa Lesa ukuba icintu cimofye. 
Exodus26:12 Icipande pakati ica nsalu she Tenti ishikalepapo cena ukacikopwele panuma ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus26:13 Kabili insalu she Tenti mu mbali shonse shikapulako kubiti umo, kanshi icipande icikashalako mukacikopwele mu mbali ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa pakulifimba." 
Exodus26:14 Ukapange icakufimba pe Tenti ku mpapa sha basukusuku, ukatumpe na mu muti uwakashikafye. Kabili ukapangilepo icakufimbapo na cimbi ku mpapa ishisuma ishatelela.”" 
Exodus26:15 “Ukapange impanda sha cimuti ca akasia ishakwimikilako Itenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus26:16 Cila lupanda luli nokulepa amakubiti ikumi limo elyo mubufumo namo kubiti umo na citika. 
Exodus26:17 Ku mpela ya cila lupanda ukabaseko utuntu tubili utwakulundinkanishishako ku lupanda lunankwe. Ifi efyo uli nokupanga impanda shonse isha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus26:18 Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa ukapangileko impanda amakumi yabili (20). 
Exodus26:19 Kabili ukapange utwakwimikamo impanda amakumi yane (40) utwa silifa, kuli cila lupanda tubili emukuti kamo kali nokuba pesamba lya kakulundinkanishishako." 
Exodus26:20 Ku lubali lubiye ku kapinda ka ku kuso ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa ukapangileko impanda amakumi yabili (20)," 
Exodus26:21 elyo no twakwimikamo impanda utwa silifa amakumi yane (40), emukuti tubili pesamba lya cila lupanda." 
Exodus26:22 Ku numa ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa lwa ku masamba ukapangileko impanda mutanda," 
Exodus26:23 elyo mu matungi ya kunuma yabili aye Tenti lyakwa Lesa ukapangilemo impanda shibili. 
Exodus26:24 Impanda sha mu matungi aya yabili shikabe shapapikana ukufuma panshi ukufika na pamulu pa mukobelo umo uwakushikasha. Efyo impanda sha mu matungi yonse yabili shikabe. 
Exodus26:25 Kanshi kukaba ne mpanda cine konse konse, no twakushimikamo utwa silifa ikumi na mutanda (16), emukuti tubili pesamba lya cila lupanda." 
Exodus26:26 “Kabili ukapange imyalo ku cimuti ca akasia. Isano ikabe ya ku lubali lumo ku mpanda sha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus26:27 Imyalo imbi isano ikabe ku mpanda sha ku lubali lubiye, elyo na imbi isano ikabe ku mpanda sha ku numa ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa ku masamba lubali." 
Exodus26:28 Umwalo wa pakati ka mpanda uli nokufuma ku lutwe lumo ukufika ku lubiye. 
Exodus26:29 Ku mpanda ukalambatikeko golide, kabili ukapangileko ne mikobelo ya golide iyakwikasha imyalo. Ku myalo nako kwine ukalambatikeko golide." 
Exodus26:30 Ukapange Itenti lyakwa Lesa nga fintu nakulangile pa lupili. 
Exodus26:31 “Ukapange icisalu ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka na ku bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee. Umuntu uwacenjela nganshi akapikwilepo na bakerubi." 
Exodus26:32 Ukakobeke ico cisalu ku mikofyo ya golide ku nceshi sha fimuti fya akasia ifyalambatikwako na golide. Kabili ukashimike mu twakushimikamo utwa silifa tune. 
Exodus26:33 Ukakobeke ico cisalu ku mikofyo, elyo ukabike Mbokoshi ya Cipangano ku numa ya cisalu. Icisalu ecikalekanya Umuputule wamushilo ku Muputule wamushilo icine cine." 
Exodus26:34 Pa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano ukabikepo Inkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi. Iyi Mbokoshi ikabe mu Muputule wamushilo icine cine. 
Exodus26:35 Ukabike itebulo kunse ya cisalu lubali lwa ku kapinda ka kuso ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa, elyo lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ke Tenti ukabikeko icakutekapo ifisaniko ukulungatana ne tebulo." 
Exodus26:36 “Pa mwinshi wakwingililapo mwi Tenti ukapangilepo icisalu ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka na ku bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee ifyapikulwa ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi." 
Exodus26:37 Ukapange ne mikofyo ya ku cisalu iya golide, kabili ukabase ne nceshi shisano isha cimuti ca akasia ukalambatikeko na golide. Ukapange ne fyakwimikamo inceshi shisano ku mukuba uwalopolwa.”" 
Exodus27:1 “Ukapange ubulambo ku cimuti ca akasia. Bukabe ubwalingana mubutali na mubufumo. Bukabe amakubiti yasano mubutali na mubufumo, elyo ukuya mumulu namo amakubiti yatatu." 
Exodus27:2 Ku matungi yane aya bulambo ukabikeko cile tungi ulusengo lumo, lelo insengo no bulambo fikabaswe ku cimuti cimo pakuti fikabe icintu cimofye. Kabili ku bulambo ukalambatikeko no mukuba." 
Exodus27:3 Ukapange ifyakubomfya ku bulambo fyonse ku mukuba. Inongo shakukushilapo imito ya mafuta, bafosholo, inweno, imitunkwilo ne fyakubikapo umulilo." 
Exodus27:4 Ukapangilepo ica mukuba icafipunda ngo lunyungo. Ukapange ne mikobelo ya mukuba ine iyakwikasha ku matungi ya capikulwa. 
Exodus27:5 Kabili ukabike icafipunda ngo lunyungo pesamba lye tabo lya bulambo pakuti cikafike pakati. 
Exodus27:6 Ukabase ifimuti fya akasia ifyakupingilako ubulambo, ukalambatikeko no mukuba." 
Exodus27:7 Ukalepisha ifyo fimuti fyakupingilako mu mikobelo ya ku mbali shibili sha bulambo pakubusenda. 
Exodus27:8 Ukapange ubulambo bwa mbao ubwacenama pamulu nga fintu nakulangile pa lupili.” 
Exodus27:9 “Ukabikeko ulupango ku lubansa lwa kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa. Ulubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo lukabe amakubiti umwanda umo (100) mubutali, kabili ukakupeko insalu ishabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka." 
Exodus27:10 Kukabe ne nceshi amakumi yabili isha mukuba ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba amakumi yabili (20), lelo imikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi fikabe ifya silifa." 
Exodus27:11 Ulubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso nako kwine lukabe amakubiti umwanda umo (100) mubutali, kabili ukakupeko insalu ishabuuta ubusaka. Kukabe ne nceshi sha mukuba ne fyakushimikamo fya mukuba amakumi yabili, lelo imikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi fikabe ifya silifa." 
Exodus27:12 Ulubali lwa ku masamba ya lupango lwa lubansa lukabe amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) mubwipi, kabili ukakupeko insalu ishabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka. Kukabe ne nceshi ikumi limo ne fyakushimikamo ikumi limo." 
Exodus27:13 Lwa ku kabanga ukutulila akasuba ulupango lwa lubansa lukabe amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) mubwipi. 
Exodus27:14 Ku lubali lumo ulwa pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa kukaba ne nsalu yakukupako iyalepa amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15). Kukabe ne nceshi shitatu ne fyakushimikamo nafyo fitatu. 
Exodus27:15 Kabili ku lubali lubiye nako kwine kukabe inceshi shitatu ne fyakushimikamo nafyo fitatu ne nsalu yakukupako ilyalepa amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15). 
Exodus27:16 Pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa ukabikepo icisalu icalepa amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) icabuuta ubusaka icapikulwa ku bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula. Cili nokukobekwa ku nceshi shine, ishaimikwa mu fyakushimikamo fine." 
Exodus27:17 Inceshi sha lupango lwa lubansa shonse shikakwate utufyela twa ku nceshi utwa silifa ne mikobelo ya silifa elyo ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba. 
Exodus27:18 Ulupango lwa lubansa lukabe amakubiti umwanda umo (100) mubutali, mubwipi namo amakubiti amakumi yabili na batatu (23) elyo ukuya mumulu namo amakubiti yasano. Kabili lukabe ne nsalu shakukupako ishabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka elyo ne fyakwimikamo ifya mukuba." 
Exodus27:19 Ifipe fyonse ifyakubomfya mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa ku milimo iyalekana lekana yonse fikabe ifya mukuba, kumo kwine ne mpopo she Tenti ne sha lupango lwa lubansa.”" 
Exodus27:20 “Ukakonkomeshe abena Israeli ukuleta amafuta ya miolifa ayalengama ayakusanika pakuti ifisaniko fikaleyakafye lyonse. 
Exodus27:21 Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakabike ifisaniko mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, fikaleyaka ukufuma icungulo ukufika ulucelo pa cinso candi ne Yawe. Fikaba kunse ya cisalu icikabela pantanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano. Ili lifunde lyakubelelela ku bena Israeli ilyo bali nokubaka mu nkulo shabo shonse ishikakonkapo.”" 
Exodus28:1 “Leka bakuletele munonko Aroni na bana bakwe abaume Nadabu, Abihu, Eleasa na Itama ukufuma mu bena Israeli pakuti balemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo." 
Exodus28:2 Ukabilile munonko Aroni ifyakufwala fyamushilo ifyakumucindamika no kumuyemfya. 
Exodus28:3 Ukebe abacenjela ukubila ifyakufwala bonse abo napeela amano yakubomba uyu mulimo ukuti bakabilile Aroni ifyakufwala pakumutuula pakuti alemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo. 
Exodus28:4 Ifi efyo bakamubilile: tumba wakufwala pa cifuba, icakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi, umwingila, ilaya ilitali ilyapikulwapo busaka busaka, insalu yakupomba ku mutwe elyo ne lamba lya nsalu. Bakabilile Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ifyakufwala ifi ifyamushilo pakuti bakalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo." 
Exodus28:5 Abacenjela muli uyu mulimo bakabomfye ubushishi bwa golide no bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee ne nsalu iyabuuta ubusaka.” 
Exodus28:6 “Bakabile efodi icakufwala pa mulu wa mwingila wakwa shimapepo ku bushishi bwa golide no bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula. 
Exodus28:7 Cikabe ne mikobelo ku mpela shibili iyakupisha pa mabeya pakucikaka. 
Exodus28:8 Umushipi ukabe nga efodi uwapikulwa ubusaka ku bushishi bwa golide no bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka, kabili uwalundinkana kuli efodi." 
Exodus28:9 Ukabuule amabwe ya onikisi yabili, ukafukulepo amashina ya bamwana Yakobo abaume ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
Exodus28:10 Ukayafukule ukulingana nomo bakonkanine mukufyalwa, pa libwe limo ukalembepo amashina mutanda, pa libiye napo mutanda." 
Exodus28:11 Nga filya uwakufukula pa mabwe afukula ifilembo pa cifwatiko efyo na iwe ukafukule, ukalembe amashina ya bamwana Israeli pali ayo mabwe yabili. Elyo ukabikeko amabwe no twapikulwa na waya ya golide." 
Exodus28:12 Elyo ukekashe aya mabwe pa mishipi ya pa mabeya ya cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi, yabe mabwe yakwibukishishako bamwana Israeli. Ifi efyo Aroni akalasenda amashina yabo pa mabeya yakwe pa cinso cakwa Yawe pakuyebukisha." 
Exodus28:13 Kabili ukapange utwapikulwa na waya ya golide," 
Exodus28:14 ne minyololo ibili iya golide wine wine iyakoswa ngo mwando, elyo ukaikashe ku tupapatu twa twapikulwa na waya ya golide.”" 
Exodus28:15 “Ukabile tumba wa pa cifuba uwakwishibilako pakupingula. Umuntu uwacenjela nganshi eo akapikule. Tumba akabe nga efodi uwapikulwa ku bushishi ubwa golide no bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka. 
Exodus28:16 Tumba nga apetwa pakati akalingana ukulepa monse mubutali na mubwipi, akalepe icisansa cimo monse monse." 
Exodus28:17 Ukekashepo utumabwe twamutengo imitande ine. Mu mutande wantanshi muli nokuba akalibwe ka rubi na ka topasi na ka bereli," 
Exodus28:18 Mu mutande wabubili muli nokuba akalibwe ka tokisi na ka safile na ka emeradi. 
Exodus28:19 Mu mutande wabutatu muli nokuba akalibwe ka yasinti na ka agate na ka amefisiti," 
Exodus28:20 na mutande wabune muli nokuba akalibwe ka kirisaliti na ka onikisi na ka yasipeli. Uto tumabwe ukatubikeko no twapikulwa na waya ya golide. 
Exodus28:21 Utumabwe tukabe ikumi na tubili (12). Pali cila kalibwe pakabe ishina lyakwa mwana Israeli limo, pakafukulwe kwati cifwatiko ishina limo ilya pa nko ikumi limo na shibili (12)," 
Exodus28:22 Ukapange utuminyololo twa golide wine wine utwapyatwa ngo mwando utwa kuli tumba wa pa cifuba. 
Exodus28:23 Kabili ukapangileko imikobelo ibili iya golide elyo ukaikashe ku mpela shibili isha tumba wa pa cifuba. 
Exodus28:24 Elyo ukakakile uto tuminyololo twa golide tubili ku mikobelo ya ku mpela sha tumba wa pa cifuba. 
Exodus28:25 Impela shimbi shibili isha tuminyololo ukashikakile ku fyapikulwa na waya ya golide. Kabili ukashikakile lwa pantanshi ku mishipi ibili iya pa mabeya ya cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi. 
Exodus28:26 Elyo ukapange imikobelo ya golide ibili. Ukaikashe na ku mpela shibili ishabela lwa mukati ka tumba mupepi ne cakufwala ca efodi. 
Exodus28:27 Ukapange imikobelo ya golide na imbi ibili. Ukaikashe mwisamba lya mishipi ibili iya pa mabeya iyabela pantanshi ya efodi, mupepi na lwa pamulu apalundinkanina efodi no mushipi wapikulwa bwino." 
Exodus28:28 Ukakakile imikobelo ya tumba wa pa cifuba ku mikobelo ya efodi no mwando wa bushishi ubwacifufya ukulundinkanya na tumba wa pa cifuba, pakuti akalebela lwa pa mulu wa mushipi, pakulenga tumba ukuti elasela pali efodi." 
Exodus28:29 “Ilyo lyonse Aroni akalaingila mu Muputule wamushilo, akalasendela amashina ya bamwana Israeli abaume pa mutima ayalembwa pali tumba uwakwishibilako pakupingula pakuti yakaleibukishiwa lyonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Exodus28:30 Muli tumba wa pa cifuba uwakwishibilako pakupingula ukabikemo Urimu na Tumimu, pakuti fikaleba lwa pa mutima wakwa Aroni ilyo lyonse akalaisa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Kanshi, Aroni akalasenda lyonse pa mutima wakwe ifibombelo ifyakubomfya pakupingula abena Israeli pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Exodus28:31 “Ukabile umwingila wakufwala mukati ka efodi ku nsalu yacifufyafye. 
Exodus28:32 Mu mwingila ukashemo icipunda icakupishamo umutwe. Pa cipunda apakupisha umutwe ukapikulepo ukushinguluka pakulesha umwingila ukulepuka. 
Exodus28:33 Ku mufukilo wa mwingila ukapikwilemo ifitwalo ifyapala amateke ku bushishi bwacifufya no bwakashikila elyo no bwakashika cee. Pakati ka fitwalo ifyapala mateke ukekashepo utunyenjele twa golide. 
Exodus28:34 Ukafikonkanye ukushinguluka umufukilo wa mwingila onse utunyenjele twa golide ne teke ifyo fine. 
Exodus28:35 “Aroni akalefwala umwingila uyu pakubomba umulimo wa bushimapepo. Ukulila kwa tunyenjele kukalaumfwika nga aingila mu Muputule wamushilo pa cinso cakwa Yawe na pakufumamo, pakuti tafwile." 
Exodus28:36 “Ukapange akalilata ka golide wine wine, ukafukulepo ne filembo nga pa cifwatiko ifikatila ‘Uwamushilo kuli Yawe.’" 
Exodus28:37 Ukakakakilile akatambo kacifufya ku nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe. Kakalebela lwa pa mpumi ku nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe. 
Exodus28:38 Kakalebela pa mpumi yakwa Aroni, kabili eukalasenda ifilubo fyonse ifikalaba mu mituulile ya mituulo yamushilo iyili yonse abena Israeli basangulula. Akalilata ka golide kali nokuba lyonse pa mpumi yakwa Aroni pakuti Yawe akalepokelela imituulo bakalatuula." 
Exodus28:39 “Ukapikule ilaya ku bushishi ubwabuuta ubusaka, ne nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe nayo ku bushishi ubwabuuta ubusaka. Ilamba lyena likapikulwe ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi." 
Exodus28:40 “Bamwana Aroni nabo ukababilile imingila, amalamba ne nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe, pakuti bakalemoneka abacindama kabili abayemba." 
Exodus28:41 Ilyo ukapwisha ukufwika munonko Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ifyo fyakufwala, elyo ukabasube amafuta no kubapeela bushimapepo. Ukabasangulule pakuti balemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo." 
Exodus28:42 Kabili ukababilile bakaputula ba mukati aba nsalu ishabuuta abakufuma mu musana ukufika na mu matanta pakuti bekalashala ubwamba. 
Exodus28:43 Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakalefwala bakaputula ilyo lyonse balaingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo nangu ilyo balapalama ku bulambo kukubomba umulimo wa bushimapepo mu Muputule wamushilo, epakuti tabacitile icilubo, nokufwa bafwa. Ili likaba lifunde lyakubelelela kuli Aroni na ba lupwa lwakwe.”" 
Exodus29:1 “Ifi efyo uli nokucita kuli Aroni na bana bakwe abaume pakubasangulula pakuti bakalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo. Ukabuule iciponti na basukusuku babili ababula akalema. 
Exodus29:2 Kabili ku bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ukapangeko imikate iyabulamo intutumushi. Elyo ukapangeko utumikate utwasakanishiwamo na mafuta, no tumikate utwapapatala utwashingwako amafuta, tonse umwabula intutumushi." 
Exodus29:3 Ukaibike mu museke no kuletela pamo ne ciponti na basukusuku babili. 
Exodus29:4 “Elyo ukalete Aroni na bana bakwe abaume pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kubasamba na menshi. 
Exodus29:5 Ukabuule ne fyakufwala, ukafwike Aroni ilaya, umwingila wakufwala mukati ka efodi wine, icakufwala ca efodi, na tumba wa pa cifuba. “Ukamukake mu musana umushipi wa efodi uwapikulwa ubusaka." 
Exodus29:6 Ukamupombe ne nsalu ya ku mutwe, ukakambatikepo na kalilata kamushilo." 
Exodus29:7 Ukabuule amafuta yakumusuba pakuba shimapepo, ukayapongolwele pa mutwe wakwe pakumusuba." 
Exodus29:8 “Ukalete na bana bakwe abaume, nabo ukabafwike imingila." 
Exodus29:9 Kabili ukabafwike amalamba ya mu musana no kubapomba insalu ku mitwe. Bushimapepo bwabo bukaba ukukonkana umwabela ifunde lyakubelelela. Muli uyo musango emo ukapeelela Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bushimapepo. 
Exodus29:10 “Ukalete ne ciponti pa ntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, elyo Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakatambalikila amaboko yabo pa mutwe wa ciponti." 
Exodus29:11 Mukacipaile pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa mwinshi wakwingilila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Exodus29:12 Ukabuule umulopa umo uwa ciponti icilume ukaushinge ku nsengo sha bulambo ku munwe. Umulopa ukashalapo onse ukawitile mwisamba lya bulambo. 
Exodus29:13 Elyo ukabuule amafuta ayaba ku fya munda, fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu, ne mfyo shonse shibili na mafuta ayabako, elyo ukafyoce pa bulambo." 
Exodus29:14 Lelo umunofu wa ciponti icilume, umukupo na fyonse ifili mu cifu na mu mala fyena ukaye fyocela kunse ya nkambi. E mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi." 
Exodus29:15 “Ukabuulepo sukusuku umo, na Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakatambalikepo amaboko yabo pa mutwe wakwe." 
Exodus29:16 Elyo ukamwipaye, ukabuule no mulopa wakwe, ukaukane ku mbali shonse isha bulambo." 
Exodus29:17 Ukaputaule sukusuku fipimfya fipimfya, ukasamfye ne fya munda ne myendo, ukafibike pa fibiye pamo no mutwe." 
Exodus29:18 Elyo ukoce sukusuku onse pa bulambo. Ili e lambo ilyakocela Yawe, ilya cena cisuma icimusekesha, umutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe." 
Exodus29:19 “Ukabuule sukusuku na umbi, Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakatambalikepo amaboko yabo pa mutwe wakwe." 
Exodus29:20 Ukamwipaye, ukabuule no mulopa wakwe umo, ukashinge Aroni na bana bakwe abaume pa tulebelebe twa matwi ya ku kulyo kwabo, pa fikumo fya ku kulyo kwabo, na pa fikondo fikalamba fya ku kulyo. Elyo ukakane umulopa ukashalapo ku mbali shonse isha bulambo." 
Exodus29:21 Elyo ukabuulepo umulopa umo uuli pa bulambo, na mafuta yamo ayakubasuba pakuba bashimapepo, ukakane pali Aroni na pa fyakufwala fyakwe, elyo na pa bana bakwe ne fyakufwala fyabo. Ninshi Aroni na bana bakwe pamo ne fyakufwala fyabo batuulwa kuli Lesa." 
Exodus29:22 “Kabili kuli sukusuku uyu ukabuuleko amafuta, umucila, amafuta ya mu fya munda, fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu, ne mfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako elyo no mwendo wa ku kulyo." 
Exodus29:23 Mu museke wa mikate iyabulamo intutumushi iyili pa cinso cakwa Yawe ukabuulemo umukate umo na kamukate kamo akasakanishiwamo amafuta elyo na kamukate akapapatala. 
Exodus29:24 Ifyakulya fyonse ifyo ukafibike mu minwe yakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume, nabo bakafimishe mumulu ngo mutuulo wakutambika ukuti nafipeelwa kuli Yawe pa cinso cakwe." 
Exodus29:25 Elyo kabili ukafibuule mu minwe, ukafyocele na pa bulambo pa mulu we lambo lyakoca. Ili e lambo lyakocela Yawe lya cena cisuma icimusekesha, umutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe." 
Exodus29:26 “Ukabuule icisao cakwa sukusuku uo ukepaya pakupeela Aroni bushimapepo, ukacimishe mumulu ngo mutuulo wakutambika pa cinso cakwa Yawe, elyo cikabe icakaniko cobe." 
Exodus29:27 Ukasangulule icisao no mwendo ifyakwa sukusuku ifikemishiwa mumulu ngo mutuulo wakutambika pakupeela bushimapepo, ukafituule pantu fyakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume." 
Exodus29:28 Ifi e fipande fili nokuba icakaniko cakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ifyo bali nokulapoka lyonse ku bena Israeli. E bupe ubukalafuma ku bena Israeli pafyo bakalatuula kuli Yawe, ukufuma pa mituulo yabo iyakwampana." 
Exodus29:29 “Aroni nga afwa, ifyakufwala fyakwe ifyamushilo fikapeelwe ku bana bakwe abaume, efyakusubilwamo amafuta no kupeelelwamo bushimapepo." 
Exodus29:30 Umwana uwamupyana pali bushimapepo, akalefwala ifyo ifyakufwala pa nshiku cine lubali pakuya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo mukubomba mu Muputule wamushilo." 
Exodus29:31 “Ukabuule inama ya sukusuku iyakupeelelapo bushimapepo no kuipikila mu cifulo camushilo. 
Exodus29:32 Aroni na bana bakwe bakalile inama ya sukusuku pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pamo no mukate ukaba mu museke. 
Exodus29:33 Bakalye ifyo fintu babomfeshe pakufuta pa bubifi bwabo ilyo balepeelwa amaka ya bushimapepo kabili no kusangululwa. Umuntu umbi nelyo umo tafwile kulyako kuli ifi pantu fyamushilo. 
Exodus29:34 Lelo nga cakuti inama ya sukusuku iyakupeelelapo bushimapepo nangu umukate fyashalapo ukufika ulucelo, mukafyocefye. Tamufwile kufilya, pantu fyamushilo." 
Exodus29:35 “Ukabombe umulimo wakupeela Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bushimapepo ukulingana ngefyo nakukonkomesha. Ukubapeela bushimapepo kukapwe inshiku cine lubali. 
Exodus29:36 Cila bushiku ukaleleka cilume wa ŋombe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi pakufuta pa fyabubifi. Ukasangulule ubulambo ku mutuulo wa pa bubifi pakufuta pa fyabubifi. Kabili ukabusube amafuta pakubutuula. 
Exodus29:37 Pa nshiku cine lubali ukaleleka pa bulambo ilambo lyakufuta pa fyabubifi no kubusangulula. Elyo ubulambo bukaba ubwamushilo nganshi, elyo na conse icakumyako cili nokuba icamushilo.”" 
Exodus29:38 “Ifi efyo uli nokutuula pa bulambo cila bushiku, lyonsefye ukaletuula ilambo lya bana ba mpaanga babili abali no mwaka umo." 
Exodus29:39 Ukaletuula umwana wa mpaanga umo ulucelo elyo umbi nao icungulo. 
Exodus29:40 Pakutuula umwana wa mpaanga uwakubalilapo, ukatuulile pamo ne capekumi cimo ca cipimo ca efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwakasawilwamo amafuta ya miolifa ayalingana na pakati ka citika wa hini umo. Kabili ukatuule icipimo ca pakati ka citika wa hini uwa mwangashi, umutuulo wa fyakunwa." 
Exodus29:41 Ukaletuula ilambo lya mwana wa mpaanga uwabubili icungulo mu musango umo wine ngo lucelo pamo no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. E lambo lyakocela Yawe ilya cena cisuma icimusekesha. 
Exodus29:42 Mu nkulo shenu shonse mukaleleka ili lambo lyakoca inshita yonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Apopene epo ine nkalamukumanya no kulalanda na imwe. 
Exodus29:43 Apo pene kabili epo nkalakumanya abena Israeli, no bucindami bwandi bukalenga icifulo kuba icamushilo." 
Exodus29:44 Nkalenga Itenti Lyakukumaninamo pamo pene no bulambo ukuba ifyamushilo kabili nkalenga Aroni na bana bakwe ukuba abamushilo, pakuti bakalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo." 
Exodus29:45 Elyo nkacita icifulo candi pakati ka bena Israeli kabili nkaba Lesa wabo. 
Exodus29:46 Bakeshiba nokuti nine Yawe, Lesa wabo, uwabafumishe mu calo ca Egupto pakuti nkacite icifulo candi pakati kabo. Nine Yawe, Lesa wabo.”" 
Exodus30:1 “Ukapange ubulambo bwakocelapo ububani ku mbao sha cimuti ca akasia. 
Exodus30:2 Ubulambo bufwile ukuba ubwalingana monse monse mubutali na mubwipi kubiti umo, elyo ukufuma panshi ukufika pamulu bukalepe amakubiti yabili. Insengo sha ku bulambo shikabaswe ku cimuti cimo cine pakuti fikabe icintu cimofye." 
Exodus30:3 Ukalambatikeko pamulu ponse, mumbali monse na ku nsengo sha bulambo golide wine wine. Ukapangileko no mushingo wa golide ukushinguluka." 
Exodus30:4 Ukapangileko ne mikobelo ya golide ibili iyakusendelako. Pesamba lya mushingo ku mbali shibili isha bulambo ishalolenkana, ukekasheko umukobelo umo umo umwakupisha ifimuti fyakupingilako." 
Exodus30:5 Ukabase ifimuti fyakupingilako ku muti wa akasia, ukalambatikeko na golide." 
Exodus30:6 Ukabike ubo bulambo pa ntanshi ya cisalu cakucinga ukuli Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, pa ntanshi ya Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi iyili pa mulu wa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, apo tukalakumanina." 
Exodus30:7 Inshiku shonse ulucelo Aroni afwile akaleoca pa bulambo ububani ubwanunka ubusaka, ilyo aisa mukuwamya ifisaniko." 
Exodus30:8 Kabili afwile akaleoca ububani ubwanunka ubusaka na mu cungulo, ilyo abwela mukusanika ifisaniko. Kanshi ukoca ububani kukalebako lyonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe mu nkulo shenu shonse." 
Exodus30:9 Tekwesha ukocelapo pali buno bulambo ububani ubwaleshiwa nangu ilambo lyakoca nangu umutuulo wa cabunga. Kabili tekwesha ukwitilapo mutuulo onse uwa fyakunwa. 
Exodus30:10 Umuku umo cila mwaka Aroni akalefutila pa nsengo sha bulambo. Uku kufuta pa fyabubifi ukwa cila mwaka kufwile ukucitwa no mulopa wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ku nkulo shonse ishikakonkapo. Ubu bulambo bwamushilo nganshi kuli Yawe.” 
Exodus30:11 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus30:12 “Ilyo ukalapenda abena Israeli pakwishiba impendwa yabo, cila muntu akapeele icifuta mulandu kuli Yawe icakulubwilapo umweo wakwe ilyo apendwa, epakuti bekaponenwa ne cinkunka ilyo ukalabapenda." 
Exodus30:13 Umuntu onse uwapitila ku bapendelwe afwile ukupeela citika wa ndalama ya shekeli iyapimwa ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Shekeli imo yafina amagera amakumi yabili. Citika wa iyi ndalama, mutuulo wa kuli Yawe." 
Exodus30:14 Uyo onse uwapitila ku bapendelwe uuli ne myaka amakumi yabili nangu ukucilapo, ali nokupeela umutuulo kuli Yawe." 
Exodus30:15 Umukankala tali nakupeela ukucisha pa cipimo ca citika wa shekeli, elyo umupina nao tali nakupeela utunono utwabula ukufika pa cipimo, pakupeela umutuulo kuli Yawe uwakufutila imyeo yabo." 
Exodus30:16 Ukapoke isho ndalama ku bena Israeli ishakufuta pa fyabubifi, no kuubomfya ku milimo ya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Isho ndalama shikabe icakwibukisha abena Israeli pa cinso cakwa Yawe, eshakulubwilapo imyeo yabo.”" 
Exodus30:17 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus30:18 “Ukapange umusambilo wa mukuba elyo ne cakutekapo ica mukuba umwakusambila. Ukaciteke pakati ke Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no bulambo, ukabikemo na menshi." 
Exodus30:19 Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bakalesamba muli aya menshi ku maboko na ku makasa. 
Exodus30:20 Bakalesamba aya menshi ilyo lyonse balaingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo nelyo balapalamina ku bulambo kukubomba umulimo wakupeela umutuulo wakoca kuli Yawe, pakuti bekafwa." 
Exodus30:21 Bakalesamba amaboko na makasa pakuti bekafwa. Ili likaba e funde lyakubelelela kuli Aroni na ba lupwa lwakwe ku nkulo shabo shonse ishikakonkapo.” 
Exodus30:22 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus30:23 “Ukabuule ifi ifyakwata akacena kasuma: muri wa menshi uwafina amakilo mutanda (6kg), kinamoni uwanunka ubusaka uwafina amakilo yatatu, na kane uwanunka ubusaka amakilo yatatu (3kg)," 
Exodus30:24 elyo na kasia uwafina amakilo mutanda. Fyonse fikafine ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Elyo kabili na mafuta ya miolifa icipimo ca hini umo. 
Exodus30:25 Kuli ifyo ukapangeko amafuta yamushilo ayakusuba ayasakanishiwa ubusaka no muntu wacenjela ukusakanya ifyanunka ubusaka. Yakaba mafuta ayamushilo ayakusuba. 
Exodus30:26 Elyo mukaleyabomfya mukusuba Itenti Lyakukumaninamo, Imbokoshi ya Cipangano," 
Exodus30:27 itebulo ne fibombelo fyaliko fyonse, icakutekapo ifisaniko pamo pene ne fibombelo fyaciko, ubulambo bwakocelapo ububani," 
Exodus30:28 ubulambo bwakocelapo amalambo pamo pene ne fibombelo fyabuko fyonse, elyo na ku musambilo ne cakutekapo cauko." 
Exodus30:29 Ukafisangulule, nafyo fikaba ifyamushilo nganshi, na conse icafikumyako cikaba icamushilo." 
Exodus30:30 Ukasube Aroni na bana bakwe abaume amafuta no kubasangulula pakuti bakalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo. 
Exodus30:31 Ukebe abena Israeli auti, ‘Aya yakaba amafuta yandi ayamushilo ayakusuba mu nkulo shenu shonse ishikakonkapo." 
Exodus30:32 Tekwesha ukuyetila pa mubili wa muntu kabili tekwesha ukupanga amafuta ayapalako ayasakanishiwamo ne fintu fimo fine mu musango umo wine. Yena mafuta yamushilo, yakaleba ayamushilo na kuli imwe bene." 
Exodus30:33 Onse uyo uukapanga amafuta ayapala nga aya, noyo uukasuba umuntu uushili shimapepo, wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi.’”" 
Exodus30:34 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Buula ifintu ifyanunka ubusaka, ifinyamuti fya sitakite, ifya onika, ifya galibanumu ne cinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icanunka ubusaka, fyonse fikalingane ubwingi." 
Exodus30:35 Ifi efyo ukafisakanye. Ukapangemo ububani nga filya ficita umuntu uwacenjela ukusakanya ifyanunka ubusaka. Mu bubani ukabikemo umucele, bukabe ubwasangululwa kabili ubwamushilo." 
Exodus30:36 Ukabuulepo ububani bumo ukabupele ngo bunga, ukabubike na pa ntanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo umo nkalakukumanya. Ubu bubani bukaba kuli imwe ubwamushilo nganshi." 
Exodus30:37 Tekwesha ukupanga ububani bwenu ubwapalako ubwasakanishiwamo ne fintu fimo fine mu musango umo wine. Bwena mukabucite ububani bwamushilo kuli Yawe. 
Exodus30:38 Onse uyo uukapanga ububani ubwapala nga bulya, pakuti aleumfwa ifyo bwanunkila ubusaka, wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi.”" 
Exodus31:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus31:2 “Mona ninsala Besaleli mwana Uri, umwishikulu wakwa Huri, uwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda." 
Exodus31:3 Nimwisushamo Umupashi wakwa Lesa kabili nimupeela ukucenjela, amano yakwishiba ifyakupanga panga ifya misango yonse." 
Exodus31:4 Akalaelenganya bwino mukupanga ifya golide ne fya silifa ne fya mukuba," 
Exodus31:5 ukuputula amabwe no kuyekasha, ifyakubasa ifimuti, ne fyakupanga panga pakuti bakapange ifya misango yonse." 
Exodus31:6 Kabili ninsonta na Oliabu umwana mwaume wakwa Aisamaki uwa mu luko lwakwa Dani, uwakwafwa Besaleli. Kabili nimpeela ukucenjela ku baishiba ifyakupanga panga pakuti bakapange ifintu fyonse nkukonkomeshe." 
Exodus31:7 Bali nokupanga Itenti Lyakukumaninamo, Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ne Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi elyo ne fipe fyonse fimbi ifya mwi Tenti," 
Exodus31:8 itebulo ne fibombelo fyaliko, icakutekapo ifisaniko ca golide wine wine ne fibombelo fyaciko fyonse, ubulambo bwa bubani," 
Exodus31:9 ubulambo bwakocelapo amalambo yakoca ne fibombelo fyabuko, umusambilo ne cakuutekapo." 
Exodus31:10 Elyo kabili bakapikule ifyakufwala ifyamushilo fyakwa Aroni shimapepo ne fya bana bakwe abaume fintu bakalafwala nga balabomba umulimo wa bushimapepo. 
Exodus31:11 Bakapange na mafuta yakusuba no bubani ubwanunka ubusaka ubwa mu Muputule wamushilo. Ifi fyonse bakafipange ukulingana nomo nakonkomeshe.” 
Exodus31:12 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus31:13 “Ukebe abena Israeli auti, ‘Muli nokubaka Amasabata yandi pantu ici e cishibilo kuli ine na kuli imwe ne nkulo shenu shonse ukuti nine Yawe uumulenga kuti mube abamushilo." 
Exodus31:14 Mulebaka ubushiku bwe Sabata pantu bushiku bwamushilo kuli imwe. Uyo onse uushilicindika, akepaiwe. Uyo onse uukabomba umulimo uuli onse pali ubu bushiku, wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi." 
Exodus31:15 Mukalebomba imilimo mu nshiku mutanda, lelo ubwalenga cine lubali bwena bushiku bwe Sabata ubwakutuushamofye ubwamushilo kuli Yawe. Uyo onse uukabombapo umulimo uuli onse pe Sabata akepaiwe." 
Exodus31:16 Abena Israeli bakalebaka ubushiku bwe Sabata, bakalebusefya mu nkulo shabo shonse ishikakonkapo nge cipangano ca pe." 
Exodus31:17 Ubushiku bwe Sabata bukaba e cishibilo ca pe kuli ine na ku bena Israeli. Pantu mu nshiku mutanda emo Yawe acitile umulu ne sonde, elyo pa bushiku ubwalenga cine lubali epo alekele ukubomba atuusha.’”" 
Exodus31:18 Ilyo Lesa apwile ukulanda na Mose pa lupili lwa Sinai, amupeele amabwe yabili ayapapatala aya cipangano, ayo Lesa alembelepo ku munwe wakwe." 
Exodus32:1 Ilyo abantu bamwene ukuti Mose akokola nganshi pa lupili ukwabula ukubwela, baile longana kuli Aroni balamweba abati, “Ale tupangile imilungu yakuti iletutangilila, pantu tatwishibe icaponena ulya Mose uwatufumishe mu Egupto.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aroni abaswike ati, “Fuuleni amasikiyo aya golide ku bakashi benu, ku bana benu abaume na banakashi, mulete kuli ine.”" 
Exodus32:3 Awe abantu bonse epakufuula ku matwi amasikiyo aya golide, batwala na kuli Aroni." 
Exodus32:4 Aroni nao afibuula afyengulula, apangamo icapala iciponti ca ŋombe. Elyo abantu basosa ati, “Iyi e milungu yobe we Israeli iyakufumishe mu Egupto!”" 
Exodus32:5 Ilyo Aroni amwene ifi, akuulile no bulambo pa ntanshi ya ciponti ca ŋombe ica golide, abila ne mbila ati, “Mailo kukabe inshikunkulu yakucindika Yawe.”" 
Exodus32:6 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo abantu baimine ulucelocelo, balaleka amalambo yakoca, batuula ne mitulo yakwampana. Kabili baikele panshi balalya no kunwa elyo baima balayangala bubi bubi." 
Exodus32:7 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Tentemukila ku bantu bobe wafumishe mu calo ca Egupto pantu nabalubana." 
Exodus32:8 Nabaluka bwangu bwangu ukufuma kufyo nabakonkomeshe, nabaipangila akalubi mu cipasho ca ciponti ca ŋombe. Balekafukamina no kukocela amalambo baleti nokuti, ‘Iyi e milungu yobe we Israeli iyakufumishe mu Egupto.’”" 
Exodus32:9 Yawe kabili aebele Mose ati, “Nimona, aba bantu ni bankosa mitwe." 
Exodus32:10 Kanshi nomba ndekafye, nimbafulilwa nganshi ndebalofya. Elyo iwe nkakucita umushobo ukalamba.”" 
Exodus32:11 Lelo Mose apapete Yawe, Lesa wakwe, ati, “Bushe cinshi we Yawe wafulilwa nganshi abantu bobe abo wafumishe mu calo ca Egupto ku bulamba bobe no kuboko kobe ukwamaka?" 
Exodus32:12 Bushe abena Egupto teti batile, akwete amapange yabi eco abafumishe mu Egupto, pakuti akaye bepaila ku mpili no kubalofya mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse? Ala bwesha umutima, wileta ne cinkunka ico upangile ukucita abantu bobe." 
Exodus32:13 Ibukisha ababomfi bobe Abrahamu, Isaki na Israeli abo walaile no mulapo we mwine auti, ‘Nkalenga aba mu lupwa lobe ukufula nganshi nge ntanda sha mu mulu. Nkapeela na bana benu icalo conse cilya nabalaile, kabili cikaba e calo ca cishilano cabo pe.’”" 
Exodus32:14 Awe Yawe abweseshe umutima, kabili akaana no konaula abantu bakwe ngefyo apangile ukucita." 
Exodus32:15 Mose apilibwike alatentemuka no lupili ninshi nasenda mu minwe yakwe amabwe yabili ayapapatala aya cipangano, apalembelwe amafunde ku mbali shonse shibili, kunuma elyo na kuntanshi." 
Exodus32:16 Ni Lesa ewabashile amabwe ayapapatala, ne filembo ni Lesa ewafilembelepo, afifukwile pa mabwe." 
Exodus32:17 Ilyo Yoshua aumfwa uko abantu balecita icongo, aeba Mose ati, “Ndeumfwa icongo ca lubuli mu nkambi.”" 
Exodus32:18 Mose ayasuka ati, “Ico congo tecakusefya ukucimfya iyoo, nangu icakucimba, congofye cakwimba eco ine ndeumfwa.”" 
Exodus32:19 Nomba ilyo Mose apaleme ku nkambi no kumona iciponti ca ŋombe na balecinda, afulwa nganshi. Awe aposa na mabwe asendele mu minwe, ayatobaula no kutobaula lwa mwisamba lya lupili." 
Exodus32:20 Kabili abuula iciponti ca ŋombe ico bapangile, acoca mu mulilo. Elyo acipela caba ngo lukungu, anyunya pa menshi, anwesha na bena Israeli." 
Exodus32:21 Elyo aipusha Aroni ati, “Bushe cinshi ico abantu bakucitile epakuti uleke bacite ububifi ubwakula ifi?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni nao ayaswike ati, “Ala we mfumu yandi wifulwa. Iwe walishiba ifyo aba bantu baobelwa kukubifya." 
Exodus32:23 Banjebele abati, ‘Tatwishibe icaponena ulya Mose atufumishe mu Egupto. Kanshi tupangile imilungu iyakuti iletutangilila.’" 
Exodus32:24 Eco kanshi nabebele nati, ‘Onse uukwete ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya ifya golide afuule. Awe nabo bampeela, na ine nafiposa mu mulilo elyo mwafuma neci ciponti ca ŋombe.’”" 
Exodus32:25 Mose amwene ukuti abantu nabafulungana, no walekele ukuti bafulungane ni Aroni, kabili na balwani babo balebaseka." 
Exodus32:26 Mose epakuya iminina pa mpongolo ya nkambi, asosa ati, “Bonse abo abali ku lubali lwakwa Yawe nabese kuli ine.” Awe na bena Levi bonse balongana uko ali." 
Exodus32:27 Nao abeba ati, “Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, nasosa ati, ‘Umwaume onse apikile ulupanga, elyo mucilinganye inkambi ukufuma ku lutwe lumo muye fika ku lubiye no kubweluluka cila umo epaye munyina, icibusa cakwe elyo no mwina mupalamano wakwe.’”" 
Exodus32:28 Awe abena Levi nabo bacitile ngefyo Mose abakonkomeshe, na mu bushiku bulya mwafwile abantu ni cikanga amakana yatatu (3,000)." 
Exodus32:29 Elyo Mose asosa ati, “Imwe mu bushiku bwa lelo mwapatwilwa kuli Yawe, pantu namwipaya abana benu abaume na bamunyinenwe abaume kanshi eco Yawe amupaalila ubushiku bwa lelo.”" 
Exodus32:30 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Mose aebele abantu ati, “Namubifya apakalamba nganshi. Nomba ine nalaya nina ulupili kuli Yawe, nalimo kuti naya mufutilako pa kubifya kwenu.”" 
Exodus32:31 Kanshi Mose epakubwelela kuli Yawe amweba ati, “Iyee, aba bantu nababifya apakalamba nganshi. Nabaipangila abene imilungu ya golide." 
Exodus32:32 Lelo nomba napapata, babeleleniko uluse pa bubifi bwabo. Lelo nga teifyo, ninshi ufuute ishina lyandi mu citabo walilemba.”" 
Exodus32:33 Yawe nao ayasuka Mose ati, “Awe, uo ndefuuta mu citabo candi ni uyo onse uumbifishe." 
Exodus32:34 Ale nomba kabiye katungulule abantu ku ncende nakwebele, na malaika wandi alekutungulula. Lelo ilyo inshita yakuti ine nkabakande ikafika, nkabakandilapo pali ubu bubifi bwabo.”" 
Exodus32:35 Elyo Yawe aponeshe icikuko pa bantu pa mulandu wa fintu bacitile ku ciponti ca ŋombe cintu Aroni apangile. 
Exodus33:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Fumeni pali ino ncende iwe pamo na bantu abo wafumishe mu calo ca Egupto. Kabiyeni ku calo ico nalaile no mulapo kuli Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo ukuti nkacipeela ku ba mu lupwa lwenu." 
Exodus33:2 Nkatuma malaika uwakumutangilila elyo nkatamfya abena Kenani, abena Amoli, abena Hiti, abena Perisi, abena Hifi elyo na bena Yebusi." 
Exodus33:3 Kabiyeni ku calo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci. Lelo ine nshaye na imwe, pantu muli bankosa mitwe epali namulofesha mu nshila.”" 
Exodus33:4 Ilyo abantu baumfwile aya mashiwi ayakali, bapumapo imisowa, kabili tapali nangu umo uwafwele nelyo cimo icakumuyemfya." 
Exodus33:5 Pantu Yawe aebele Mose ukweba abena Israeli ati, “Imwe muli bankosa mitwe, nga twaendele na imwe nangufye akashita akanono, ine kuti namulofya. Kanshi nomba fuuleni ifyakumuyemfya fyenu na ine ndepingula ifyakumucita.”" 
Exodus33:6 Kanshi abena Israeli epakufuula ifyakubayemfya fyabo pa lupili lwa Holebu, kabili tababalile abafifwala." 
Exodus33:7 Nomba Mose alefumishe tenti kunse ya nkambi akatalamukila, eko alelimika. Aleita ili tenti “Itenti Lyakukumaninamo.” Uyo onse uulefwaya ukwipusha fimo kuli Yawe, eko aleya kuli ili Itenti Lyakukumaninamo ilyali kunse ya nkambi." 
Exodus33:8 Ilyo lyonse Mose alefuma mwitenti, abantu bonse baleima baiminina pa minshi ya matenti yabo balelolesha Mose mpakafye aingila na mwitenti." 
Exodus33:9 Ilyo Mose aingila mwitenti, intumba ye kumbi yaisa cinga na pa mwinshi we tenti ilyo Yawe alelanda na Mose." 
Exodus33:10 Ilyo lyonse abantu bamona intumba ye kumbi yacinga pa mwinshi we tenti, baleiminina bonse cila umo pa mwinshi we tenti lyakwe no kupepa." 
Exodus33:11 Yawe alelanda na Mose, ninshi nabaloshanya amenso, nga filya umuntu alanda na cibusa wakwe. Ilyo Mose alebwelela ku nkambi, umulumendo Yoshua mwana Nuni kalume wakwe wena aleshala mwitenti." 
Exodus33:12 Mose aebele Yawe ati, “Ulenjeba auti, ‘Tungulula aba bantu,’ lelo tawanjeba uo ukatuma tukaye nankwe. Kabili naulanda ukuti walinjishiba ne shina elyo nokuti ine nalikusekesha." 
Exodus33:13 Kanshi ine nga nalikusekesha, nsambilisha imibeele yobe pakuti nkwishibe no kukusekesha. Wilaba nokuti uyu mushobo wa bantu bobe.”" 
Exodus33:14 Yawe ayasuka ati, “Ukubapo kwandi kwakulaya nobe kabili nakulakupeela ukutuusha.”" 
Exodus33:15 Elyo Mose amweba ati, “Nga cakuti ukubapo kobe takwakulaya na ifwe ninshi witufumya pano." 
Exodus33:16 Bushe umuntu onse kuti aishiba shani ukuti ine nalikusekesha pamo na bantu bobe, kanofye nga cakuti twalaya na iwe? Ukubapo na ifwe kwena kukalalanga ukuti ine na bantu bobe twaliba abaibela ku bantu bambi bonse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse.”" 
Exodus33:17 Yawe nao aebele Mose ati, “Nkacita ico cine cintu iwe unombele ukucita, pantu iwe walinsekesha kabili nalikwishiba ne shina.”" 
Exodus33:18 Elyo Mose epakweba Yawe ati, “Napapata shi wingananga ubucindami bobe.”" 
Exodus33:19 Kabili Yawe amwasuka ati, “Nalaleka ubusuma bwandi bonse bupite pa cinso cobe, kabili ndebila ne shina lyandi pa cinso cobe ukuti nine Yawe. Ine mbelela uluse uo ndefwaya ukubelela uluse, nangulukila uo ndefwaya ukulangulukila.”" 
Exodus33:20 Lelo Yawe amweba ati, “Teti iwe umone icinso candi, pantu takuli uwingamona ine no kuba umumi.”" 
Exodus33:21 Kabili Yawe atila, “Mona, pano ine ndi pali incende mupepi apo wingeminina pa cilibwe." 
Exodus33:22 Ilyo ubucindami bwandi bwalaisa mukupita, ine ndeisa kubika mu lucengo lwa cilibwe, ndeisa kufimba no lupi lwandi mpaka mpitepo." 
Exodus33:23 Elyo ndeisa fumyapo ulupi lwandi, pakuti wise umonekofye inuma yandi. Lelo icinso candi cena tacifwile ukumonwa.”" 
Exodus34:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Basa amabwe yabili ayapapatala ayapala yalya yene ayantanshi, na ine nkalembapo amashiwi yalya yene yali pa mabwe yantanshi yantu watobele." 
Exodus34:2 Ukaipekanye mailo ulucelo, kabili ukanine ulupili lwa Sinai mailo ulucelo, ukese kuli ine palya pene pa mulu wa lupili." 
Exodus34:3 Wikaleka muntu nangu umo akakukonke nangu ukumonekela apali ponse pa lupili. Ne fitekwa fine ifinono ne fikulu fikalaliila mupepi no lupili.” 
Exodus34:4 Kanshi Mose epakubasa amabwe yabili ayapapatala ayali nga yalya yene ayantanshi. Kabili ulucelocelo aya nina no lupili lwa Sinai nga fintu Yawe amukonkomeshe, nasenda na mabwe yabili mu minwe yakwe." 
Exodus34:5 Yawe nao aikile mwikumbi, aisa iminina nankwe apo ali, abila ne shina lyakwe ati nine Yawe." 
Exodus34:6 Kabili Yawe apitile pantanshi yakwa Mose alebilikisha ati, “Nine Yawe, nine Yawe, Lesa uwaluse ne cikuku, uushifulwa bwangu, uwacitemwiko icishipwa, kabili uwacishinka." 
Exodus34:7 Ntwalilila ukulanga icitemwiko icishipwa ku makana na makana ya bantu, no kubabelela uluse pali bucisanguka, bumpulamafunde no bubifi. Lelo nshilekafye bampulamafunde ukwabula ukukandwa, ndakanda abana babo na beshikulu babo ukufika ku nkulo yalenga butatu ne yalenga bune, pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa bashibo.”" 
Exodus34:8 Awe Mose ilyo line afukama akontama panshi, alapepa ati," 
Exodus34:9 “We Mfumu nga cingakusekesha, shileka tuleya nobe. Nangu bali bankosa mitwe, we Mfumu, utubeleleko uluse pa fibi fyesu na pa fyabubifi fyesu, utubuule nge cuma cobe ca cishilano.”" 
Exodus34:10 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Ine napanga icipangano na iwe. Pa menso ya bantu bobe bonse epo ndi nokucitila ifipeshamano ifishatala aficitwa mu mushobo nangu umo uwa pano isonde. Abantu mwikala nabo bonse bakamona imilimo yakutiinya intu ine ne Yawe nkamucitila." 
Exodus34:11 Mulesunga ifyo namukonkomesha mu bushiku bwa lelo. Ine nkamufulumwina abena Amoli, abena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Perisi, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Mukabe abacenjela, mwikalacita icipangano na bakaya ba mu calo muleyamo, pantu bakesa ba iciteyo kuli imwe." 
Exodus34:13 Mukabongolole ifibumbili fya malambo fyabo, mukatobolole na mabwe yabo bacindikisha, mukaputaule ne nceshi sha Ashera, umulungu wabo." 
Exodus34:14 Tecakwesha ukulapepa umulungu umbi, pantu ishina lyakwa Yawe ni Bufuba, ni Lesa wabufuba." 
Exodus34:15 “Mukabe abacenjela, mwikalacita icipangano na bakaya ba mu calo, pantu ilyo bacita bucilende bwa mukutuula amalambo ku milungu yabo kuti bamo bamwitako kabili mwalyako ku malambo yabo." 
Exodus34:16 Kabili ilyo mwabuula abana babo abanakashi no kubofya ku bana benu abaume, elyo abo bana babo abanakashi balacita bucilende bwa mukupepa imilungu yabo, bakalenga na bana benu abaume ukulacita bucilende bwa mukupepa imilungu yabo." 
Exodus34:17 “Mwilapanga imilungu iyaengwa ku cela. 
Exodus34:18 “Mukalesefya inshikunkulu ya Mikate Ishatutumuka. Pa nshiku cine lubali mukalelya umukate umushaba intutumushi ngefyo namukonkomeshe. Mukalecita ici pa nshita yasontwa mu mweshi wa Abibu, pantu ni muli uyu mweshi mwafumine mu calo ca Egupto." 
Exodus34:19 “Conse icabalilapo ukufyalwa kuli nyina candi, pamo pene na mabeli yonse ayalume ya fitekwa fyonse aya ŋombe nangu impaanga." 
Exodus34:20 Ibeli lyakwa punda mukalilubule pakuleka umwana wa mpaanga. Nga tamulilubwile ninshi mukalifune umukoshi. Mukalelubula abana benu bonse abaume amabeli. “Kabili pekalaba muntu nelyo umo uwakumonekela pa cinso candi iminwe nkutwa. 
Exodus34:21 “Ulebomba mu nshiku mutanda shonse, lelo pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali pena ufwile ukutuusha. Nangufye ni mu nshita yakulima nangu ukulobolola ufwile ukutuusha." 
Exodus34:22 “Ukalesefya inshikunkulu ya milungu mukutuula iŋanu shantanshi mwalobolola, ukalesefya ne nshikunkulu yakulonganika ifisabo pa kupwa kwa mwaka." 
Exodus34:23 Imiku itatu cila mwaka abaume benu bonse bafwile ukwisa monekela pa cinso ca Mfumu Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli." 
Exodus34:24 Nkafulumunamo imishobo ku cinso cenu no kukushako icalo cenu. Ilyo mukalaya mukumonekela ku cinso candi ne Yawe Lesa wenu imiku itatu pa mwaka, takwakabe umuntu nangu umo uwakumupokolola icalo cenu." 
Exodus34:25 “Wilantuula mulopa we lambo pamo pene na conse icilimo intutumushi. Kabili wikalaleka icipande ca nama ye lambo ye Pasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, cishale mpaka ukufika na ku lucelo." 
Exodus34:26 “Ukaleleta ifisabo fyantanshi ifyawamishapo ifya mu mabala yobe ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe Lesa obe. “Wikalaipikila akana ka mbushi mu mukaka wakwa nyina.” 
Exodus34:27 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Lemba aya mashiwi pantu ukulingana na ya mashiwi natupanga nobe icipangano pamo na bena Israeli bene.”" 
Exodus34:28 Mose ali kulya pamo na Yawe inshiku amakumi yane (40) akasuba no bushiku, ukwabula ukulya umukate nangu ukunwa amenshi. Kabili alembele pa mabwe ayapapatala amashiwi ya cipangano, amafunde ikumi limo." 
Exodus34:29 Ilyo Mose atentemwike ulupili lwa Sinai, ninshi nasenda amabwe ya cipangano yabili mu minwe yakwe, taishibe ukuti impumi yakwe ilebengeshima pantu acilanda na Lesa." 
Exodus34:30 Aroni na bena Israeli bonse pakumona impumi yakwa Mose ilebengeshima, baiketwe no mwenso bafilwa no kumupalama." 
Exodus34:31 Lelo Mose epakubeta. Kanshi Aroni ne ntungulushi sha mu lukuta epakuya mupalama, nao alalanda nabo." 
Exodus34:32 Panuma abena Israeli bonse baisa mupalamina, elyo abapeela amafunde yonse Yawe amwebele pa lupili lwa Sinai." 
Exodus34:33 Ilyo Mose apwa ukulanda nabo, abuula insalu afimba na pa mpumi yakwe." 
Exodus34:34 Lelo lyonse ilyo Mose aingila mwi Tenti pa cinso cakwa Yawe kukulanda nankwe, lyena alefimbulapo insalu mpaka afumamo. Kabili aleti nga afumamo aleeba ulukuta lwa bena Israeli ifyo bamukonkomeshe." 
Exodus34:35 Abena Israeli nabo balemona impumi yakwe nakabili ilebengeshima. Eco Mose alefimba pa mpumi yakwe mpaka ilyo akaya mukulanda na Yawe. 
Exodus35:1 Mose alongenye ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli pamo, abeba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe amukonkomesha ukulacita." 
Exodus35:2 Mukalebomba imilimo mu nshiku mutanda, lelo ubushiku ubwalenga cine lubali bwena bukaleba ubwamushilo, Isabata lyakwa Yawe ilyakutuushamo. Uyo onse uukabombamo umulimo uuli onse akepaiwe." 
Exodus35:3 Mwikalakosha mulilo konse uko muleikala pa bushiku bwe Sabata.” 
Exodus35:4 Mose aeba ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe akonkomesha." 
Exodus35:5 Ukufuma pafyo mwakwata musangwilepo Yawe umutuulo. Uyo onse uuli no mutima wakupeela kuli Yawe umutuulo kuti aleta golide, silifa no mukuba," 
Exodus35:6 kabili ubushishi ubwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee, insalu ishabuuta ubusaka, amasako ya mbushi," 
Exodus35:7 impapa sha basukusuku ishatumpwa mu muti uwakashika, impapa ishisuma ishatelela, ne mbao sha muti wa akasia," 
Exodus35:8 elyo na mafuta ya miolifa ayakusanika mu cisaniko, ne fya cena cisuma ifyakubika mu mafuta yakusuba na mu bubani ubwanunka ubusaka," 
Exodus35:9 kabili no tumabwe twa onikisi elyo no tumabwe tumbi utwamutengo utwakubilila pa cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi na pakati ka tumba wa pa cifuba.” 
Exodus35:10 “Abo bonse muli imwe abacenjela mukupanga ifintu, bali nokwisa panga ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe akonkomesha." 
Exodus35:11 Bakapange Itenti lyakwa Lesa, itenti line ne cakufimbako, imikofyo, impanda, imyalo, inceshi elyo no twakwimikamo impanda," 
Exodus35:12 kabili Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ne fimuti fyakuipingilako ne Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi ne cisalu cakucingako," 
Exodus35:13 elyo itebulo kumo kwine ne fimuti fyakulipingilako, ifibombelo fyaliko fyonse ne mikate yakuba pa cinso cakwa Lesa," 
Exodus35:14 icakutekapo ifisaniko fyakupeela ulubuuto ne fibombelo fyaciko fyonse, ifisaniko kumo kwine na mafuta ya mu fisaniko," 
Exodus35:15 kabili no bulambo bwakocelapo ububani ne fimuti fyakubupingila, amafuta yakusuba, ububani ubwanunka ubusaka ne cisalu ca pa mwinshi we Tenti lyakwa Lesa," 
Exodus35:16 elyo no bulambo bwakulekelapo amalambo yakoca ne ca mukuba icafipunda ngo lunyungo, pamo ne fimuti fyakubupingilako ne fibombelo fyabuko fyonse, umusambilo wa mukuba ne cakuutekapo," 
Exodus35:17 insalu shakukupa ku lupango lwa lubansa, inceshi no twakushimikamo, elyo ne cisalu ca pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa," 
Exodus35:18 impopo sha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa ne sha ku lupango lwa lubansa ne myando yashiko," 
Exodus35:19 insalu ishapikulwa ubusaka shakwa shimapepo ishakufwala ilyo alebomba mu Muputule wamushilo, shonse pamo ne nsalu shamushilo shakwa Aroni shimapepo ne sha bana bakwe abaume shakubombelamo umulimo wa bushimapepo.”" 
Exodus35:20 Elyo ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse lwafumine apali Mose. 
Exodus35:21 Kabili uyo onse uwaipeelesha, uwali no mutima wakupeela, aletele umutuulo kuli Yawe uwakukuulila Itenti Lyakukumaninamo, ifintu fyakubomfya mu mapepo ne fyakupikwila insalu shamushilo." 
Exodus35:22 Abo bonse abali no mutima wakupeela, abaume na banakashi cimo cine, baletele ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya ifya golide ifyalekana lekana: Imikofyo, amasikiyo, imbalaminwe elyo ne fyakuiyemfya. Umuntu onse kabili afipeele ngo mutuulo wa golide uwa cakutambika kuli Yawe." 
Exodus35:23 Onse uwakwete ubushishi ubwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee, ne nsalu ishabuuta ubusaka, amasako ya mbushi, ne mpapa sha basukusuku ishatumpikwa mu muti uwakashika, ne mpapa ishisuma ishatelela aliletele." 
Exodus35:24 Abo abakwete silifa nangu mukuba baliletele ngo mutuulo wakwa Yawe, kabili nabo bene abakwete imbao sha muti wa akasia ishingabomba ku mulimo uuli onse baliletele." 
Exodus35:25 Abanakashi bonse abacenjela ukupyata ubushishi ku minwe baletele ubushishi bapyatile ubwacifufya, ubwakashikila, ubwakashika cee no bwabuuta ubusaka." 
Exodus35:26 Elyo abanakashi bonse abali no mutima wakubomba kabili abacenjela nganshi bapyatile amasako ya mbushi. 
Exodus35:27 Intungulushi nasho shaletele utumabwe twa onikisi no tumabwe twamutengo tumbi utwakwikasha pali efodi na pali tumba wa pa cifuba. 
Exodus35:28 Kabili shaletele ifya cena icisuma na mafuta ya miolifa yakusanika mu cisaniko no kubika mu mafuta ya kusuba no kubika mu bubani ubwanunka ubusaka. 
Exodus35:29 Abena Israeli, abaume na banakashi, bonse abali no mutima wakupeela baletele kuli Yawe imituulo yakuitemenwa iyakubomfya ku milimo yonse Yawe akonkomeshe ukupitila muli Mose." 
Exodus35:30 Elyo Mose aebele abena Israeli ati, “Moneni, Yawe alisonta Besaleli mwana Uri, mwishikulu Huri uwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda." 
Exodus35:31 Kabili alimwisushamo Umupashi wakwa Lesa, ukucenjela, ukwishiba elyo na mano yakupanga ifya misango yonse." 
Exodus35:32 Akalaelenganya ifyakupanga bwino ifya golide ne fya silifa ne fya mukuba," 
Exodus35:33 elyo ne fyakuputula amabwe no kuyekasha, ifyakubasa ifimuti ne fyakupanga panga ifya misango yonse." 
Exodus35:34 Kabili Yawe alipeela bonse babili Besaleli na Oliabu mwana Aisamaki uwa mu luko lwakwa Dani amano yakufundako bambi. 
Exodus35:35 Yawe alibesushamo amano ayakubomba imilimo iya misango yonse, ayakupanga panga ifintu, na ya belenganya umwakucitila ifintu, na ya bacenjela nganshi mu fyakupikula no bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee, na ya baishiba ifyakupikula ne nsalu ishabuuta ubusaka. Aba bonse e bantu abacenjela mu fyakupanga panga na mukwelenganya umwakucitila ifintu.”" 
Exodus36:1 “Eico Besaleli, Oliabu na bantu abo Yawe apeela amano no kucenjela mukubomba umulimo wakupanga icifulo camushilo, bakabombe uyu mulimo ukulingana ngefyo Yawe akonkomesha.”" 
Exodus36:2 Elyo Mose aitile Besaleli, Oliabu na bantu bonse abacenjela abo Yawe apeele aya mano, abali no mutima wakuipeelesha kukwisa bomba umulimo." 
Exodus36:3 Mose abapeele umutuulo abena Israeli baletele uwakubomfya ku mulimo wakupanga icifulo camushilo. Awe abena Israeli abali no mutima wakupeela bakonkenyepofye ukuleta imituulo yakuitemenwa cila lucelo. 
Exodus36:4 Kanshi balya bantu bonse abacenjela mu fyakupanga panga, abalebomba umulimo wakupanga icifulo camushilo, bashile imilimo yabo" 
Exodus36:5 no kuya kuli Mose bamweba abati, “Ifintu abantu baleleta naficila pa filefwaikwa ku mulimo Yawe akonkomeshe.”" 
Exodus36:6 Elyo Mose akonkomeshe abantu, nabo basalanganya amashiwi mu nkambi yonse abati, “Kwiba umwaume nangu mwanakashi onse uwakupeela ifyamutuulo na fimbi ifyakupangila icifulo camushilo.” Abantu kanshi epakuleka ukulatwalilapo na fimbi," 
Exodus36:7 pantu ifyo bapeele kale fyalicilile pa fyalefwaikwa ku mulimofye onse. 
Exodus36:8 Abantu bonse abacenjeleseshe pali abo abalebomba, bapangile Itenti lyakwa Lesa ku nsalu ikumi ishabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka no bushishi bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee, kabili shapikwilwepo na bakerubi ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula." 
Exodus36:9 Insalu shonse shali ishalingana mubutali na mubwipi. Mubutali shalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28) elyo mubwipi namo amakubiti yane. 
Exodus36:10 Insalu shisano balishilundinkenye, elyo na shimbi shisano bashilundinkanya." 
Exodus36:11 Elyo ku mpela ya nsalu babalilepo ukulundinkanya bapangileko imikobelo yacifufya konse konse mumbali yafiko lwa mubwipi, kabili efyo bacitile na ku mpela ya nsalu shimbi isho balundinkenye." 
Exodus36:12 Ku nsalu babalilepo ukulundinkanya babikileko imikobelo amakumi yasano (50), elyo na ku ibiye nako babikileko imikobelo amakumi yasano (50). Imikobelo ya fipande fyonse fibili yali iyalungatana." 
Exodus36:13 Kabili bapangile no twakukofyamo twa golide amakumi yasano (50), eto babomfeshe pakulundinkanya ifyo fipande fibili, epakuti Itenti lyakwa Lesa libe icintu cimofye." 
Exodus36:14 Bapikwile ne nsalu ikumi na imo (11) ku masako ya mbushi ishakufimba kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus36:15 Insalu shonse ikumi na imo shali ishalingana mubutali na mubwipi. Mubutali shali amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30) elyo mubwipi namo amakubiti yane. 
Exodus36:16 Insalu shisano balundinkanya ukuba cimo, elyo na shimbi mutanda nasho balundinkanya cimo." 
Exodus36:17 Kabili bapangileko imikobelo amakumi yasano (50) kumpela ya nsalu babalilepo ukulundinkanya, elyo bacitile na kumpela ya nsalu shimbi balundinkenye." 
Exodus36:18 Bapangile utwakukofyamo utwa mukuba amakumi yasano (50) utwakulundinkanya ifipande fibili pakuti Itenti libe icintu cimofye. 
Exodus36:19 Kabili bapangile icakufimba pe Tenti ku mpapa sha basukusuku no kushitumpa mu muti uwakashikafye. Kabili bapangilepo icakufimbapo na cimbi ku mpapa ishisuma ishatelela. 
Exodus36:20 Bapangileko impanda sha cimuti ca akasia ishakwimikilako Itenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus36:21 Cila lupanda lwalepele amakubiti ikumi limo, elyo mubufumo namo kubiti umo na citika." 
Exodus36:22 Ku mpela ya cila lupanda babashileko utuntu tubili utwakulundinkanishishako ku lupanda lunankwe. Ifi efyo babashile impanda shonse ishe Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus36:23 Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa babashileko impanda amakumi yabili. 
Exodus36:24 Kabili bapangilemo no twakwimikamo impanda utwa silifa amakumi yane. Kuli cila lupanda tubili, emukuti kamo kali nokuba pesamba lya kakulundinkanishishako." 
Exodus36:25 Ku kapinda ka ku kuso ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa ku lubali lubiye babashileko impanda amakumi yabili (20). 
Exodus36:26 Kabili bapangile no twakwimikamo impanda utwa silifa amakumi yane (40), emukuti tubili pesamba lya cila lupanda." 
Exodus36:27 Kunuma ye Tenti lwa ku masamba babashileko impanda mutanda," 
Exodus36:28 elyo mu matungi ya kunuma yabili ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa namo babashilemo impanda shibili. 
Exodus36:29 Impanda sha mu matungi aya yabili shali ishapapikana ukufuma panshi ukufika na pamulu pa mukobelo uwakushikasha. Impanda sha mu matungi yonse yabili efyo shali. 
Exodus36:30 Kanshi kwali ne mpanda cine konse konse no twakushimikamo utwa silifa ikumi limo na mutanda (16), tubili pesamba lya cila lupanda." 
Exodus36:31 Kabili babashile imyalo ku cimuti ca akasia. Isano yali lubali lumo ku mpanda sha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus36:32 Imyalo imbi isano yali ku lubali lubiye ulwe Tenti lyakwa Lesa, elyo na imbi isano yali ku mpanda sha kunuma ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa lwa ku masamba." 
Exodus36:33 Bapanga umwalo wa pakati uwakucilinganya pa mpanda ukufuma ku lutwe lumo no kufika ku lubiye. 
Exodus36:34 Ku mpanda shonse balambatikeko golide, kabili bapangile ne mikobelo ya golide umwakupisha imyalo, elyo na ku myalo iyine balambatikeko golide." 
Exodus36:35 Bapikwile ne cisalu icakucingako ku bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka. Umuntu uwacenjela ukupikula apikwilemo na bakerubi." 
Exodus36:36 Bacipangile inceshi shine ku cimuti ca akasia kabili balambatikeko na golide. Bapangileko ne mikofyo ya golide, kabili baengele no twakushimikamo utwa silifa tune." 
Exodus36:37 Pa mwinshi wakwingililapo mwi Tenti, apikwililapo icisalu ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka na ku bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee. Umuntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula ewabombele." 
Exodus36:38 Kabili babashile inceshi shisano, bapangileko ne mikofyo. Pa mulu wa nceshi balambatikepo golide elyo na ku tufyela twa ku nceshi. Bapangile ne fyakwimikamo inceshi shisano ifya mukuba." 
Exodus37:1 Besaleli apangile Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ku cimuti ca akasia. Mubutali yali amakubiti yabili na citika, mubufumo kubiti umo na citika elyo ukuya mumulu namo kubiti umo na citika." 
Exodus37:2 Alambatikeko na golide wine wine mukati na kunse, abikileko no mushingo wa golide ukushinguluka." 
Exodus37:3 Apanga imikobelo ine kuli golide uwalopolwa no kuyengelela ku mikonso ine, ulubali lumo ibili no lubali lubiye nalo ibili." 
Exodus37:4 Elyo abashile ifimuti fyakupingilako ku cimuti ca akasia kabili alambatikeko na golide. 
Exodus37:5 Apishishe ifi fimuti mu mikobelo ya ku mbali ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano pakupingilako Imbokoshi. 
Exodus37:6 Apangilepo ne Nkupiko ya golide wine wine apakufutilwa ifyabubifi. Mubutali yali amakubiti yabili na citika, elyo mubufumo namo kubiti umo." 
Exodus37:7 Elyo afulilepo na bakerubi babili aba golide ku mpela shonse isha Nkupiko. 
Exodus37:8 Umo amwengelele ku mpela imo elyo na umbi ku mpela ibiye. Abengelele ku mpela shibili isha Nkupiko pakuti bakerubi babefye cimo ne nkupiko. 
Exodus37:9 Bakerubi bali na mapindo ayayansa ukulola mumulu ayacinga pa Nkupiko. Bakerubi baloshenye amenso, bali kwati balelolesha pa Nkupiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi." 
Exodus37:10 Besaleli kabili apangile itebulo ku cimuti ca akasia. Mubutali lyali amakubiti yabili, mubufumo namo kubiti umo, elyo ukuya mumulu namo kubiti umo na citika." 
Exodus37:11 Elyo alambatikeko na golide wine wine, kabili ashingulwisheko no mushingo wa golide." 
Exodus37:12 Mu mpela ye tebulo ashingulwishemo imbao ishapapatala mubufumo ngo lupi lwa muntu. Ku mbao ashingulwishisheko umushingo wa golide. 
Exodus37:13 Kabili apangile imikobelo ine kuli golide uwalopolwa, ayengelela na ku matungi apabela imikonso ye tebulo." 
Exodus37:14 Imikobelo yakupishamo ifimuti fyakupingilako itebulo yabelele mupepi ne mbao yapapatala. 
Exodus37:15 Abashile ifimuti fyakupingilako itebulo ku cimuti ca akasia, kabili alambatikeko na golide." 
Exodus37:16 Kabili apangile ifipe fyakubomfya kwitebulo, imbale, utubale utwasenama, inkunku ne nweno ifyakwitulwilako imituulo ya fyakunwa. Ifipe fyonse ifi afipangile kuli golide wine wine." 
Exodus37:17 Apangile ne cakutekapo ifisaniko ica golide wine wine. Icikalilo caciko pamo no mukonso waciko afifulilefye ku nondo. Tukapu utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line fili nokuba icintu cimofye ne cikalilo. 
Exodus37:18 Icakutekapo ifisaniko cali ne misambo mutanda, ku lubali lumo itatu ku lubali lubiye nako itatu." 
Exodus37:19 Ku musambo umo kwali tukapu tutatu utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line. Elyo na pa musambo wakonkelepo acita ifyo fine. Kabili na ku misambo mutanda iya cakutekapo ifisaniko napo acitile ifyo fine. 
Exodus37:20 Pa cakutekapo ifisaniko pali tukapu tune utwapala amaluba ya alumondi ayakwata ifitutu na mabula ye luba line. 
Exodus37:21 Kabili ifitutu fye luba limo fyali mwisamba lya misambo ibili iyapakubala, fimbi mwisamba lya misambo ibili iyakonkapo elyo fimbi mwisamba lya misambo ibili iyacitatu ngo mwabele imisambo mutanda iya cakutekapo ifisaniko." 
Exodus37:22 Ifitutu pamo pene ne misambo fyali icintu cimofye ne cakutekapo ifisaniko ifyafulwa ku nondo kuli golide wine wine. 
Exodus37:23 Apangile ifisaniko cine lubali pamo ne fyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto no tubale utwasenama kuli golide wine wine," 
Exodus37:24 Apangile ne cakutekapo ifisaniko ne fibombelo fyaciko fyonse kuli golide wine wine uwe talanta limo. 
Exodus37:25 Apangile ubulambo bwakocapo ububani ku cimuti ca akasia. Bwali ubwalingana monse monse mubutali na mubwipi kubiti umo, elyo ukufuma panshi ukufika pamulu bwali amakubiti yabili. Insengo no bulambo fyabashilwe ku cimuti cimo cine pakuti fibe icintu cimofye." 
Exodus37:26 Alambatikeko golide wine wine pamulu ponse, mumbali monse na ku nsengo sha bulambo. Apangileko no mushingo wa golide ukushinguluka." 
Exodus37:27 Apangileko ne mikobelo ya golide ibili. Pesamba lya mushingo ku mbali shibili sha bulambo ishalolenkene aikesheko imikobelo ibili umwakupisha ifimuti fyakupingilako. 
Exodus37:28 Abashileko ne fimuti fyakupingilako ku cimuti ca akasia, alambatikeko na golide." 
Exodus37:29 Apangile na mafuta yamushilo ayakusuba, no bubani ubwanunka ubusaka, ubwasakanishiwa ubusaka nga ku muntu uwacenjela ukusakanya ifyanunka ubusaka." 
Exodus38:1 Besaleli apangile no bulambo bwa malambo yakoca ku cimuti ca akasia. Bwali ubwalingana mubutali na mubufumo amakubiti yasano, elyo ukuya mumulu namo amakubiti yatatu." 
Exodus38:2 Apangile insengo mu matungi yane ya bulambo, cila lutungi no lusengo, afipanga ku cimuti cimo pakuti insengo no bulambo fikabe icintu cimofye. Kabili ku bulambo alambatikeko no mukuba." 
Exodus38:3 Apangile ne fyakubomfya ku bulambo fyonse ku mukuba: Inongo, bafosholo, inweno, imitunkwilo ne fyakubikapo umulilo." 
Exodus38:4 Kabili apangile ica mukuba icafipunda ngo lunyungo, acibikile pa lubango ulwa pakati ka bulambo ukufuma pamulu." 
Exodus38:5 Apangile ne mikobelo ine ku mukuba uwalopolwa, ayengelele mu matungi yane ya pa cafipunda ngo lunyungo umwakupisha ifimuti fyakupingilako." 
Exodus38:6 Abashile ifyakupingilako ku cimuti ca akasia, alambatikeko no mukuba." 
Exodus38:7 Apishishe ne fimuti fyakupingilako mu mikobelo pakuti fileba mumbali ya bulambo pakubusenda. Apangile ubulambo bwa mbao ubwacenama. 
Exodus38:8 Kabili Besaleli apangile umusambilo ne cakuutekapo ifyakufuma ku milolani ya mukuba iya banakashi balebombela pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Exodus38:9 Kabili apangileko no lubansa ku cipango ce Tenti lyakwa Lesa. Ulubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo lwalepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100). Abikileko ne nsalu shabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka. 
Exodus38:10 Abikileko ne nceshi amakumi yabili (20) isha mukuba ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba amakumi yabili, ne mikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi ifya silifa." 
Exodus38:11 Lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso nako kwine lwalepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100). Kwali ne nceshi amakumi yabili isha mukuba ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba amakumi yabili, ne mikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi ifya silifa." 
Exodus38:12 Lubali ku masamba lwalepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50). Kabili lwakupilweko ne nsalu, kwali ne nceshi ikumi limo ne fyakushimikamo ikumi limo, ne mikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi ifya silifa." 
Exodus38:13 Lwa ku kabanga ukutulila akasuba, nako kwine lwalepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50)." 
Exodus38:14 Ku lubali lumo ulwa ku mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa kwali nceshi shitatu ne fyakushimikamo nafyo fitatu ne nsalu yakupileko iyalepele amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15). 
Exodus38:15 Kabili ku lubali lubiye lwa lupango lwa lubansa pa mwinshi kwali inceshi shitatu ne fyakushimikamo fitatu, ne nsalu yakupileko iyalepele amakubiti ikumi limo na yasano (15)." 
Exodus38:16 Insalu shakupile ku lupango lwa lubansa shonse shali ishabuuta ishapikulwa ubusaka. 
Exodus38:17 Ifyakwimikamo inceshi fyali ifya mukuba. Imikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi twali utwa silifa, elyo pa mulu wa nceshi alambatikepo silifa. Kanshi inceshi shonse isha ku lupango lwa lubansa shali no tufyela twa silifa." 
Exodus38:18 Icisalu ca pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa capangilwe ku bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila, ubwakashika cee ne nsalu yabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka, cintu cabombelwe ku muntu uwacenjela ukupikula. Mubutali calepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) elyo, nge nsalu sha lupango lwa lubansa, cali amakubiti yasano ukulola mumulu." 
Exodus38:19 Cakwete ne nceshi shine ne fyakushimikamo ifya mukuba nafyo fine. Imikofyo no tufyela twa ku nceshi fyali ifya silifa, elyo pa mulu wa nceshi alambatikepo silifa." 
Exodus38:20 Impopo shonse isha kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa pamo pene ne sha ku lubansa lwa ku cipango ukushinguluka shali isha mukuba. 
Exodus38:21 Ifi e fintu fyonse babomfeshe pakupanga Itenti lyakwa Lesa, Itenti ilya cipangano. Mose akonkomeshe abena Levi ukufipenda, no walebangalila ni Itama mwana Aroni shimapapepo." 
Exodus38:22 Besaleli mwana Uri umwishikulu wakwa Huri, uwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda, ewapangile ifintufye fyonse Yawe akonkomeshe Mose ukupanga." 
Exodus38:23 Besaleli ali na Oholiabu mwana Aisamaki uwa mu luko lwakwa Dani uwacenjela mu fyakupanga panga no kwelenganya umwakucitila ifintu, kabili uwacenjela mu fyakupikula no ubushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila, ubwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu yabuuta ubusaka." 
Exodus38:24 Golide onsefye uo babomfeshe mu mulimo wakukuulila icifulo camushilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo, afinine amatalanta amakumi yabili na pabula (29) pamo na mashekeli imyanda cine lubali na makumi yatatu (730). Abantu bapeele uyu golide ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika." 
Exodus38:25 Silifa balonganike ukufuma ku ba lukuta abapendelwe afinine amatalanta umwanda umo (100) na mashekeli ikana limo imyanda cine lubali na makumi cine lubali na yasano (1,775) ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo." 
Exodus38:26 Umuntu apeele indalama beka umo, ekutila citika we shekeli iyapiminwe ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo iyo bonse abo abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo bali nokupeela nga bapendwa. Abaume abapendelwe bali amakana imyanda mutanda na makana yatatu, imyanda isano na makumi yasano (603,550)." 
Exodus38:27 Besaleli abomfeshe silifa uwafina amatalanta umwanda umo (100) pakwenga utwakwimikamo inceshi umwanda umo isha cifulo camushilo ne sha ku cisalu cakucinga. Ku kakwimikamo kamo alebomfya silifa uwafina italanta limo. 
Exodus38:28 Kuli silifa uwashelepo uwafinine amashekeli ikana limo imyanda cine lubali na makumi cine lubali na yasano (1,775) apangileko imikofyo ya ku nceshi, alambatikeko na pa mulu wa nceshi, kabili apangileko no tufyela twa ku nceshi." 
Exodus38:29 Umukuba uwafumine ku mutuulo wa cakutambika wafinine amatalanta amakumi cine lubali (70) na mashekeli amakana yabili ne myanda ine (2,400)." 
Exodus38:30 Abomfeshe umukuba kukupanga utwakwimikamo inceshi sha ku mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no bulambo bwa mukuba, icafipunda ngo lunyungo ica ku bulambo ica mukuba ne fibombelo fya ku bulambo fyonse," 
Exodus38:31 elyo ne fyakwimikamo inceshi sha ku lupango lwa lubansa ne sha pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa ne mpopo sha kwi Itenti lyakwa Lesa shonse ne sha ku lubansa lonse ulwa cipango. 
Exodus39:1 Kabili Besaleli abilile ne fyakufwala ifyapikulwa no bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee ifyakubomfya ilyo balebomba mu Muputule wamushilo. Babilile ne fyakufwala fyamushilo fyakwa Aroni, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus39:2 Apangile efodi icakufwala pa mulu wa mwingila ku bushishi bwa golide, ubwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka." 
Exodus39:3 Bafulile utumalata twa golide utwayangukisha, elyo atusantaula twaba ngo bushishi. Batupikwila kumo no bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee mu nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka ku muntu uwacenjele nganshi ukupikula." 
Exodus39:4 Kuli efodi babilileko ne mikobelo ku mpela shibili iyakupisha pa mabeya pakucikakanya. 
Exodus39:5 Umushipi wali nga efodi uwapikulwa ubusaka ku bushishi bwa golide, ubwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka, kabili baulundinkenye kuli efodi pakuti fibefye ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose."
