Exodus39:6 Babikile ku mabwe ya onikisi utwapikulwa na waya ya golide kabili afukwilepo amashina ya bamwana Israeli abaume, kwati ni filya afukula ifilembo pa cifwatiko." 
Exodus39:7 Elyo aikeshe aya mabwe pa mishipi ya pa mabeya ya efodi pakuti yaleba ayakwibukishishapo bamwana Israeli, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus39:8 Besaleli apikwile na tumba wa pa cifuba ku muntu uwacenjela nganshi ukupikula. Tumba amupikwile nga efodi ku bushishi bwa golide no bwacifufya no bwakashikila no bwakashika cee mu nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka. 
Exodus39:9 Tumba nga apetwa ali uwalingana mubutali na mubwipi, alepele icisansa cimo monse monse." 
Exodus39:10 Kabili baikeshe pali tumba utumabwe twamutengo mu mitande ine. Mu mutande wantanshi babikilemo akalibwe ka rubi na ka topasi na ka bereli. 
Exodus39:11 Mu mutanda wabubili babikilemo akalibwe ka tokisi na ka safile na ka emeradi. 
Exodus39:12 Mu mutande wabutatu abikilemo akalibwe ka yasinti, aka agate na ka amefisiti." 
Exodus39:13 Mu mutande wabune babikilemo akalibwe ka kirisaliti, aka onikisi na ka yasipeli. Uto tumabwe batubikileko no twapikulwa na waya ya golide." 
Exodus39:14 Utumabwe twali ikumi limo na tubili (12). Kabili pali cila kalibwe pali ishina limo ilyakwa mwana Israeli. Cila kalibwe pafukwilwe kwati cifwatiko ishina limo pa nko ikumi limo na shibili (12) isha bena Israeli. 
Exodus39:15 Bapangile no tuminyololo twa golide wine wine utwapyatwa ngo mwando utwa kuli tumba wa pa cifuba. 
Exodus39:16 Bapangile utwapikwilwe na waya ya golide tubili ne mikobelo ya golide ibili, no kwikasha imikobelo ku mpela shibili sha tumba wa pa cifuba." 
Exodus39:17 Elyo bakakilile uto tuminyololo twa golide tubili ku mikobelo ya ku mpela sha tumba. 
Exodus39:18 Impela shibili isha tuminyololo bashikakilile ku mikobelo ibili iya ku twapikwilwe na waya ya golide, kabili bashikakile lwa pantanshi ku mishipi ya pa mabeya iya efodi." 
Exodus39:19 Elyo bapangile imikobelo ya golide ibili, baikeshe na ku mpela shimbi shibili ishabela lwa mukati ka tumba mupepi na efodi." 
Exodus39:20 Kabili bapangile imikobelo ya golide na imbi ibili. Baikeshe mwisamba lya mishipi ya pa mabeya ya efodi lwa pantanshi mupepi na pa mulu wa palundikanina efodi no mushipi wapikulwa bwino. 
Exodus39:21 Bakakile imikobelo ya tumba wa pa cifuba ku mikobelo ya efodi no mwando wa bushishi ubwacifufya pakuti tumba wa pa cifuba alebela pa mulu wa mushipi, talesela pali efodi, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus39:22 Besaleli apangile no mwingila wakufwala mukati ka efodi uo bapikwile ku bushishi bwacifufya bweka bwekafye. 
Exodus39:23 Pa cipunda cakupishishamo umutwe alipikwilepo ukushinguluka pakulesha umwingila ukulepuka. 
Exodus39:24 Mu mufukilo wa mwingila bapikwililemo ifitwalo ifyapala amateke ku bushishi bwacifufya no bwakashikila elyo no bwakashika cee, na ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka." 
Exodus39:25 Kabili bapangile no tunyenjele twa golide wine wine batwikasha na pakati ka fitwalo ifyapala amateke ukushinguluka umufukilo wa mwingila. 
Exodus39:26 Ukushingulukafye umufukilo wa mwingila wakufwala pakubomba umulimo wa bushimapepo balepushanya apa kanyenjele apa icapala amateke ukushinguluka, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus39:27 Kabili bapangile Aroni na bana bakwe abaume imingila ku nsalu ishabuuta ubusaka," 
Exodus39:28 ne nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe, ifisote fya nsalu ishabuuta ubusaka, pamo na bakaputula bamukati ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka." 
Exodus39:29 Ilamba lyapikwilwe ku nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka na ku bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus39:30 Bapangile akalilata ka golide wine wine akamushilo, bafukwilepo ne filembo nga pa cifwatiko ukuti, “Uwamushilo kuli Yawe”" 
Exodus39:31 Elyo bakakakile ku katambo kacifufya no kukekasha ku nsalu yakupomba ku mutwe, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus39:32 Kanshi imilimo yonse iyakupanga Itenti lyakwa Lesa ilyakukumaninamo yalipwile. Abena Israeli bacitilefye fyonse ukulingana ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Exodus39:33 Kabili baletele kuli Mose Itenti lyakwa Lesa, itenti line pamo ne fibombelo fyaliko fyonse, imikofyo yaliko yonse, impanda, imyalo, inceshi no twakwimikamo," 
Exodus39:34 icakufimba pe tenti ica mpapa sha basukusuku ishatumpwa mu muti uwakashika, ne ca mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, elyo ne cisalu ca pa mwinshi," 
Exodus39:35 Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, ifimuti fyakupingilako fyaiko ne Nkupiko yaiko apakufutilwa ifyabubifi," 
Exodus39:36 itebulo ne fibombelo fyaliko fyonse elyo ne mikate yakuba pa cinso cakwa Lesa," 
Exodus39:37 icakutekapo ifisaniko ica golide wine wine ne fisaniko fyaciko, ifibombelo fyaciko fyonse elyo na mafuta yakusanika," 
Exodus39:38 ubulambo bwa golide, amafuta yakusuba, ububani ubwanunka ubusaka elyo ne cisalu ca pa mwinshi we Tenti," 
Exodus39:39 ubulambo bwa mukuba ne cafipunda ngo lunyungo cabuko ica mukuba, ifimuti fyakubupingilako ne fibombelo fyabuko fyonse, umusambilo elyo ne cakuutekapo," 
Exodus39:40 insalu sha ku lupango lwa lubansa, inceshi shaluko ne fyakushimikamo, icisalu ca pa mwinshi wa lupango lwa lubansa, imyando ne mpopo sha ku lupango lwa lubansa, elyo ne fintu fyonse ifyakubomfya mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa, Itenti lyakukumaninamo," 
Exodus39:41 insalu ishapikulwa ubusaka shakufwala pakubomba mu Muputule wamushilo, pamo pene ne nsalu shamushilo ishakwa Aroni shimapepo ne sha bana bakwe abaume, ishakubombelamo umulimo wa bushimapepo." 
Exodus39:42 Abena Israeli balibombele imilimo yonse ukulingana ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Exodus39:43 Elyo Mose alondele imilimo yonse amwene nokuti bacitile fyonse ngefyo umwine Yawe akonkomeshe. Kanshi nao Mose epakubapaala. 
Exodus40:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Exodus40:2 “Ukemike Itenti lyakwa Lesa Ilyakukumaninamo, pa bushiku bwakubalilapo ubwa mweshi wakubalilapo." 
Exodus40:3 Ukabikemo ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano elyo ukacingeko icisalu ku Mbokoshi ya Cipangano. 
Exodus40:4 Ukaletelemo itebulo kabili ukabikepo ne fibombelo fyaliko. Elyo ukaletelemo ne cakutekapo ifisaniko, ukabikepo ne fisaniko." 
Exodus40:5 Ukabikemo no bulambo bwa golide bwakufutumwinapo ububani lwa pantanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano. Ukacinge ne nsalu pa mwinshi we Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus40:6 Ubulambo bwakocelapo amalambo yakoca ukabubike mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Exodus40:7 Umusambilo ukaubike pakati, uku ubulambo bwakocelapo amalambo elyo uku nako Litenti Lyakukumaninamo. Ukabikemo na menshi." 
Exodus40:8 Ukashingulusheko no lupango lwa lubansa, ukakobekepo ne cisalu pa mwinshi." 
Exodus40:9 “Elyo ukabuule amafuta yakusuba, ukasube Itenti lyakwa Lesa na fyonse ifyabamo. Efyo ukantuula Itenti na fyonse ifyabamo, nalyo likaba ilyamushilo." 
Exodus40:10 Kabili ukasube amafuta ku bulambo bwakocelapo amalambo na ku fibombelo fyabuko fyonse. Efyo ukantuula ubulambo nabo bukaba ubwamushilo icine cine. 
Exodus40:11 Ukasube no musambilo ne cakuutekapo no kufintuula. 
Exodus40:12 “Elyo ukalete Aroni na bana bakwe abaume pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo ukabasambe na menshi. 
Exodus40:13 Ukafwike Aroni insalu shamushilo, ukamusube amafuta no kumutuula pakuti akalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo." 
Exodus40:14 Ukalete na bana bakwe abaume, ukabafwike ne mingila." 
Exodus40:15 Nabo bene ukabasube amafuta nga filya wasubile shibo pakuti bakalemombela umulimo wa bushimapepo. Nga basubwa bakaba na bushimapepo bwa pe mu nkulo shabo shonse.” 
Exodus40:16 Awe Mose epakucita fyonse ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. 
Exodus40:17 Pa bushiku bwapakubala mu mweshi wakubalilapo mu mwaka wabubili, baimike Itenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Exodus40:18 Mose aimike Itenti, abika utwakwimikamo, aimika impanda, abikako ne myalo, aimika ne nceshi." 
Exodus40:19 Elyo akupa insalu pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa, kabili pamulu afimbapo ne tenti lyakunse ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus40:20 Abuula na mabwe ya Cipangano yabili ayabika na mu Mbokoshi ya Cipangano. Apishisha ne fimuti fyakupingilako mu mikobelo ya Mbokoshi. Akupikapo ne Nkupiko ya kufutilwapo ifyabubifi. 
Exodus40:21 Elyo aleta ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa, akobeka ne cisalu cakucingako, elyo cacingilila ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus40:22 Kabili Mose abika ne tebulo mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwe Tenti lyakwa Lesa, kunse ya cisalu cakucingako." 
Exodus40:23 Abikapo ne mikate yakuba pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus40:24 Abikile ne cakutekapo ifisaniko mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, ukulungatana ne tebulo lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo kwe Tenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Exodus40:25 Abikapo ne fisaniko pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus40:26 Abika no bulambo bwa golide wine wine mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo lwa pantanshi ya cisalu cakucingako. 
Exodus40:27 Kabili afutumwinapo no bubani ubwanunka ubusaka ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Exodus40:28 Elyo akobeka ne cisalu ca pa mwinshi we Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Exodus40:29 Abika no bulambo bwakocelapo amalambo mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa mupepi no mwinshi wa pe Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Alekelapo ilambo lyakoca, atuulapo no mutuulo wa cabunga, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus40:30 Abika no musambilo pakati, uku ubulambo elyo uku Itenti Lyakukumaninamo. Abikamo na menshi yakusamba." 
Exodus40:31 Umu emo Mose na Aroni na bana bakwa Aroni balesamba iminwe na makasa. 
Exodus40:32 Lyonse pakwingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo na pakupalama ku bulambo baletala basamba, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Exodus40:33 Elyo Mose acitile ulupango lwa lubansa ukushingulusha Itenti lyakwa Lesa no bulambo, kabili pa mwinshi wa lupango abikapo ne cisalu. Kanshi ifi efyo Mose apwishishishe imilimo yonse." 
Exodus40:34 Elyo ikumbi lyakupile Itenti Lyakukumaninamo, no bucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaisula Itenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Exodus40:35 Awe Mose afilwa no kwingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pantu ikumbi lyalikelepo, elyo no bucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaiswile mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Exodus40:36 Abena Israeli mu nyendo shabo shonse, ilyo ikumbi lyalefuma pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa elyo baleima nokulaya." 
Exodus40:37 Nomba ikumbi nga talifuminepo tabaleima no kulaya mpakafye no bushiku likafumapo. 
Exodus40:38 Ikumbi lyakwa Yawe lyaleba pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa mu nshita ya kasuba, elyo mu nshita ya bushiku mwikumbi mwaleba umulilo, na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli bonse baleumona mu nyendo shabo shonse." 
Leviticus1:1 Yawe aitile Mose ukufuma mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, alamupeela ifikomo ati," 
Leviticus1:2 “Sosa ku bena Israeli utile, ‘Umuntu onse ilyo aleleta umutuulo kuli Yawe, nabuulepo ica mu fitekwa fyakwe, iŋombe, impaanga nangu imbushi.’" 
Leviticus1:3 “Ngo mutuulo uli lilambo lyakoca ilya ŋombe, afwile apeela iyilume iyabula akalema. Ali nokuileta pa mpongolo ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, lyena elyo Yawe ali nokupokelela." 
Leviticus1:4 Kabili natambalike ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe we lambo lyakoca, elyo lyena lili nokupokelelwa nge cakufutilwako pa bubifi bwakwe." 
Leviticus1:5 Elyo panuma yakwipaya cilume wa ŋombe pa cinso cakwa Yawe, bashimapepo bamwana Aroni abaume babuule umulopa no kulakana mu mbali shonse isha bulambo ku mpongolo ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Leviticus1:6 Uuletele inama ye lambo lyakoca, afwile ukufunda no kuiputaula mu fipimfya finono finono." 
Leviticus1:7 Bamwana Aroni shimapepo abaume bali nokukosha umulilo pa bulambo no kupekanya inkuni shakukoseshapo. 
Leviticus1:8 Bamwana Aroni abaume bashimapepo bali nokubikapo ifipimfya elyo no mutwe ne fya mafuta pa cininkwa ca mulilo wa nkuni icili pa bulambo. 
Leviticus1:9 Kabili ifya munda fyonse pamo pene na molu afisamfye no kufyocela pamo pa bulambo kuli shimapepo. Nili line ilambo lyakoca, e mutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe, uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Leviticus1:10 “Ngo mutuulo alepeela uli lilambo lyakoca ilyafuma pa mukuni wa mpaanga, nangu ukufuma pa mbushi, ifwile yaba iyilume iyabula akalema." 
Leviticus1:11 Uuletele nama ye lambo afwile aipaila ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka bulambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Bashimapepo bamwana Aroni abaume bali nokukana umulopa waiko mu mbali shonse isha bulambo. 
Leviticus1:12 Ilyo uyu muntu apwisha ukuputaula iyi nama, shimapepo ali nokubika ifipimfya fyonse pa cininkwa ca mulilo wa nkuni icili pa bulambo, kumo kwine no mutwe na mafuta." 
Leviticus1:13 Kabili ifya munda fyonse, pamo pene na molu afisambe na menshi, elyo shimapepo afilonganike pamo no kufyocela pa bulambo. Nili line ilambo lyakoca, e mutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe, uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Leviticus1:14 “Ngo mutuulo alepeela kuli Yawe uli lilambo lyakoca ilya cuni, alingile ukutuula icipele nangu utubondo twa nkunda." 
Leviticus1:15 Shimapepo ali nokucileta ku bulambo, acinyongotola no kucocela pa bulambo. Umulopa waciko auleke ukonkolokele mumbali ya bulambo." 
Leviticus1:16 Uyu shimapepo, nafumye icituka na fyonse ifilimo elyo na masako no kufiposa ku kabanga ka bulambo uko betila imito." 
Leviticus1:17 Kabili ali nokucipansa pakati, tekufumyako amapindo iyoo. Lyena shimapepo ali nokucoca pa mulilo wa bulambo. Ili e lambo lyakoca, e mutuulo wa cakoca, uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe.”" 
Leviticus2:1 “Umuntu nga alefwaya ukuleta umutuulo wa cabunga kuli Yawe, umutuulo wakwe ufwile ukuba ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino. Pa bunga alingile ukwitilapo amafuta, apupilepo ne cinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icanunka ubusaka." 
Leviticus2:2 Kabili atwale ifi fyonse kuli bashimapepo bamwana Aroni abaume. Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuula ulupi lwa bunga bwa ŋanu, na mafuta ne cinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi conse no kufyocela pamo pa bulambo mukuba icibukisho ca mutuulo wa cakoca, uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Leviticus2:3 Umutuulo wa cabunga onse uwashalapo wakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume. Uyu mutuulo, wamushilo nganshi uwakupeela kuli Yawe uwa cakoca." 
Leviticus2:4 “Nga uletuula umutuulo wa cabunga uwaocewa mwibuku, ufwile ukupangila no bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino no kupangako imikate umushaba citutumushi, umwasanshiwafye na mafuta ya miolifa, nangu ukupangako utumikate tunono utwapapatala utwashingwako na mafuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Nga ulepanga umukate wa mutuulo wa cabunga mukubomfya ilata lyakocelapo, ulingile ukupangila ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ishasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa, kabili umushaba icitutumushi." 
Leviticus2:6 Mokaula uyu mukate no kwitilapo amafuta. Uyu e mutuulo wa cabunga. 
Leviticus2:7 Ngo mutuulo wa cabunga upangilwe mu cakupangilamo, ufwile wapangwa no bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino umwasanshiwa na mafuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Uli nokuleta kuli Yawe umutuulo wa cabunga uwapekanishiwa muli uyu musango. Ukese leta kuli shimapepo elyo ena euli nokutwala ku bulambo. 
Leviticus2:9 Shimapepo ali nokubuulapo akaputulwa pa mutuulo wa cabunga ukuba e cibukisho, no kocela pa bulambo ngo mutuulo wa cakoca, uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Leviticus2:10 Umutuulo wa cabunga onse uwashalapo, wakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume. Uyu mutuulo wamushilo nganshi uwaletuulwa kuli Yawe, uwa cakoca." 
Leviticus2:11 “Mu mutuulo wa cabunga onse uo muletuula kuli Yawe, tamufwile kubikamo icitutumushi, pantu tamwakatale amocela icitutumushi no buci mu mutuulo mutuula kuli Yawe uwa cakoca." 
Leviticus2:12 Ifi mulefileta kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa fisabo fyakubalilapo lelo fyena tafili fyakutuula pa bulambo nge cakusekesha ku cena cisuma. 
Leviticus2:13 Mu mutuulo wa cabunga onse, ulebikamo umucele. Tecakwesha ukulaba ukubika uyu mucele wa cipangano cakwa Lesa obe mu mutuulo obe uwa cabunga. Kabili lundapo umucele pa mutuulo obe onse." 
Leviticus2:14 “Nga mutuulo wa fisabo fyakubalilapo kuli Yawe uwa fya nseke, tuuleni inseke ishasokolwa nangu imitwe ya nseke ishaocewa." 
Leviticus2:15 Sansheniko amafuta pamo pene ne cinyamuti icanunka ubusaka ica fulankinisenshi. Uyu e mutuulo wa cabunga. 
Leviticus2:16 Elyo shimapepo ali nokocapo icipande ca cibukisho ica ŋanu icapeleka bwino na mafutamo, elyo no kubikamo icinyamuti conse ica fulankinisenshi nge ca mutuulo kuli Yawe uwa cakoca.”" 
Leviticus3:1 “Umuntu nga alepeela umutuulo wakwampana, elyo atuula icitekwa ca pa mukuni wakwe, nalimo cilume nangu cikota, ico ali nokutuula kuli Yawe cifwile caba icabula akalema." 
Leviticus3:2 Natambalike ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa nama ya mutuulo wakwe nokuipaila pa mwinshi wa mpongolo ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Elyo bamwana Aroni abaume bashimapepo bali nokukana umulopa mu mbali shonse isha bulambo. 
Leviticus3:3 Kabili atuule icipande ce lambo lyakwampana ukuba umutuulo wacakoca kuli Yawe, emukutila amafuta yonse ayalambatila ku fya munda pamo na yonse ayaba munda," 
Leviticus3:4 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu, efyo ali nokukambatwila pamo ne mfyo." 
Leviticus3:5 Bamwana Aroni abaume bali nokocela fyonse ifi pa bulambo, pa mulu we lambo lyakoca ilili pa cininkwa ca mulilo wa nkuni, ngo mutuulo wa cakoca uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Leviticus3:6 “Nga cakuti umuntu atuula impaanga nangu imbushi imo iya mu mukuni wakwe ukuba umutuulo wakwampana kuli Yawe, alingile atuula iyilume nelyo iyikota iyabula akalema." 
Leviticus3:7 Nga atuula umwana wa mpaanga, alingile amupalamika ku cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus3:8 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mutuulo no kuipaila pantanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Elyo bamwana Aroni abaume bakane umulopa wa mwana wa mpaanga mu mbali shonse isha bulambo. 
Leviticus3:9 Ukufuma ku mutuulo uwakwampana, nabuuleko umutuulo wakwa Yawe uwa cakoca. Nabuuleko ica mafuta, ne camucila icishainonena ico baputulako apo calundana ku musana, na mafuta yonse ayalambatila ku fya munda pamo na yonse ayaba munda," 
Leviticus3:10 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu, efyo ali nokukambatwila pamo ne mfyo." 
Leviticus3:11 Shimapepo ali nokoca fyonse pa bulambo nge cakulya ce lambo lyakoca icatuulwa kuli Yawe. 
Leviticus3:12 “Nga cakuti umutuulo wakwe ni mbushi, afwile aleta pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus3:13 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mbushi nokuipaila pantanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Elyo bamwana Aroni abaume bakane umulopa waiko mu mbali shonse isha bulambo. 
Leviticus3:14 Ukufuma ku mutuulo uyu, eko akafumya icakupeela umutuulo ice lambo lyakoca kuli Yawe: amafuta yonse ayalambatila ku fya munda na mafuta yonse ayaba munda," 
Leviticus3:15 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu, efyo ali nokufifumisha pamo ne mfyo." 
Leviticus3:16 “Shimapepo ali nokoca pa bulambo nge cakulya ce lambo lya cakoca icakusekesha ku cena cisuma. Lelo fyonse ifyamafuta, fyakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus3:17 “Ili lifunde ilyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo shonse ishili nokulakonkapo, uko konse mukaba. Mwikalalya amafuta nangu umulopa.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus4:2 “Eba abena Israeli ukuti, ‘Ngo muntu umo abifya mukukanaishiba, acita ifyo Yawe alesha mu mafunde yakwe, mukalekonka ifi." 
Leviticus4:3 “‘Nga ni shimapepo uwasubwa ewacita ubu bubifi no kulenga na bambi abantu balebifya, alingilefye ukuleta iciponti kuli Yawe no kufuta umulandu onse. Alingile ukuleta icabula akalema ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi acita." 
Leviticus4:4 Nalete uyu cilume wa ŋombe ku mpongolo ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa ciponti no kucipaila pa menso yakwa Yawe. 
Leviticus4:5 Elyo shimapepo uwasubwa na mafuta, ali nokusendako umulopa umo uwa cilume wa ŋombe nokutwala mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Leviticus4:6 Natumpike umunwe mu mulopa no kukana imiku cine lubali pa cinso cakwa Yawe kuntanshi ya cisalu icicinga ku cifulo camushilo. 
Leviticus4:7 Elyo shimapepo akashinge umulopa ku nsengo sha bulambo bocelapo ububani ubwanunka ubusaka, ubwaba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Kabili umulopa onse uwashalapo uwakwa cilume wa ŋombe, shimapepo ali nokuwitila mwisamba lya bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca pa mpongolo iye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Leviticus4:8 Ali nokufumya yonse amafuta kuli cilume wa ŋombe ya mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, elyo na mafuta ayatabilila ifya munda, nangufye conse icakambatilako kuli fyene," 
Leviticus4:9 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana, elyo na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu, nafyo fine ali nokufifumisha kumo kwine ne mfyo," 
Leviticus4:10 pamo ngefyo bafumya amafuta ku mutuulo wa ŋombe yaocewa uwakwampana. Elyo shimapepo ali nokufyocela pa mulu wa bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca. 
Leviticus4:11 Nomba umukupo wakwa cilume wa ŋombe ne minofu yakwe, pamo pene no mutwe na molu yene, ifya munda pamo ne cifulu," 
Leviticus4:12 emukutila fyonse ifyashala kuli uyu cilume wa ŋombe, afibuule no kufifumisha kunse ya nkambi, ku cifulo icasangululwa, ico betilako imito no koca mu cininkwa ca mulilo pa mwina wa mito.’" 
Leviticus4:13 “Nga cakuti ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli lwacita icabubifi cimo mukukanaishiba ico Yawe alesha mu mafunde yakwe, nangufye ulukuta talwishibe umo umulandu ulolele, nalyo line mulandu." 
Leviticus4:14 Ilyo ububifi bacitile bwaishibikwa, ulukuta luli nokuletafye iciponti ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Bali nokumuleta kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Leviticus4:15 Abakalamba ba lukuta bali nokutambalika amaboko yabo pa mutwe wakwa cilume wa ŋombe pa cinso cakwa Yawe elyo nokumwipaya. 
Leviticus4:16 Elyo shimapepo uwasubwa ali nokusendapo umulopa umo uwa cilume wa ŋombe mukati ke Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Leviticus4:17 Atumpike umunwe mu mulopa no kukana imiku cine lubali pa cinso cakwa Yawe kuntanshi ya cisalu icicinga ku muputule wamushilo. 
Leviticus4:18 Umulopa umbi aushinge ku nsengo sha bulambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Kabili umulopa uwashalapo ali nokuwitila mwisamba lya bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca pa mpongolo ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Leviticus4:19 Shimapepo, ali nokufumya amafuta yonse kuli cilume wa ŋombe no kuyocela pa bulambo." 
Leviticus4:20 Ifi efyo alingile ukucita kuli cilume wa ŋombe uyu, nga fintu engacita kuli cilume wa ŋombe uwa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokutuulilamo ilambo lyakufuta pa fyabubifi fyabo, nabo bakelelwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Elyo shimapepo ali nokufumisha cilume wa ŋombe kunse ya nkambi no kumoca nga fintu aocele cilume wa ŋombe uwantanshi. Kanshi uyu e mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwe bumba lyonse. 
Leviticus4:22 “Nga ni ntungulushi yabifya mukukanaishiba, yacita ifyo Yawe, Lesa wakwe alesha mu mafunde yakwe, ili no mulandu." 
Leviticus4:23 Eico kanshi ngoyu mulandu acita waishibikwa kuli ena, ali nokuleta umutuulo wa mbushi iyilume iyabula akalema." 
Leviticus4:24 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mbushi no kuipaila pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa ncende ye lambo lyakoca. Uyu e mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Leviticus4:25 Kabili shimapepo ali nokutumpika umunwe wakwe mu mulopa wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, nokushinga ku nsengo sha ku bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca no kwitila umulopa uushele mwisamba lya bulambo." 
Leviticus4:26 Ifi efyo alingile ukucita ukoca amafuta yonse pa bulambo pamo nga fintu engacita ku mafuta ya mutuulo wakwampana. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokutuulilamo umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa iyi ntungulushi, nayo ikelelwa." 
Leviticus4:27 “Nga cakuti umuntu umo umwikalacalo abifya mukukanaishiba no kucita ifyo Yawe alesha mu mafunde yakwe, ali no mulandu." 
Leviticus4:28 Uyu muntu nga aishibishiwa ukuti nabifya, alingile ukuleta umutuulo wa pa bubifi acitile, imbushi iyikota iyabula akalema." 
Leviticus4:29 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi no kwipaila pa ncende iyo bepailapo ilambo lyakoca. 
Leviticus4:30 Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuulapo umulopa ku munwe no kushinga ku nsengo sha bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca, kabili ali nokwitila umulopa ushelepo mwisamba lya bulambo." 
Leviticus4:31 Ali nokufumyako yonse amafuta, pamo ngefyo amafuta yafumishiwa ku mutuulo wakwampana, elyo shimapepo ali nokufyoca pa bulambo ngo mutuulo uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokutuulilamo umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi pa mulandu wa cabubifi cakwe, nao akelelwa." 
Leviticus4:32 “Kabili nga aleta umwana wa mpaanga ukuba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, alingile ukuleta iyikota iyabula akalema." 
Leviticus4:33 Ali nokutambalika ukuboko kwakwe pa mutwe wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, elyo ali nokuipaila pa ncende iyo bepailapo ilambo lyakoca." 
Leviticus4:34 Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuulapo umulopa pa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ku munwe no kushinga ku nsengo sha ku bulambo bwe lambo lyakoca. Umulopa washalapo ali nokuwitila mwisamba lya bulambo. 
Leviticus4:35 Ali nokufumyako yonse amafuta, pamo ngefyo amafuta ya mwana wa mpaanga yafumishiwa ku mutuulo wakwampana, elyo shimapepo ali nokufyocela pa bulambo pamo ne mituulo ya kuli Yawe. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokutuulilamo umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi acitile, ninshi uyu muntu akelelwa.”" 
Leviticus5:1 “Umuntu nga abifya pakukanapeela bukambone ukulingana no mulandu aumfwile, nangu paco amwene, ninshi ali no mulandu kabili ali nokukandwa." 
Leviticus5:2 “Nangu umuntu akumya ku fyakowela, nalimo ni nama ya mpanga iyaifwila, citekwa icaifwila, conse icikulika pa mushili, nangu cibefye teshibe, nao wine ninshi aba uwakowela kabili ali no mulandu." 
Leviticus5:3 “Nangu umuntu akumya ku fyakowela fyabumuntu na kuli conse icingamulenga ukuba uwakowela, nangu cibefye teshibe, lelo nga aisa ishiba, uyu muntu ali nokuba no mulandu." 
Leviticus5:4 “Nangu uyu muntu mukuilekelesha mukulanda, alapa umulapo kukubomba icintu cimo, na pamo icibi nangu icisuma, mu nshilafye yonse iyo mu kuilekelesha kwakwe engalapilamo, nangu cibefye teshibe, muli iyi micitile yena ilyo lyonse aishiba, ali nokuba no mulandu." 
Leviticus5:5 “Ilyo lyonse umuntu acita umulandu umo pali iyi tulumbwile, alingile ukuisosela umwine ububifi acitile." 
Leviticus5:6 Uyu muntu pa bubifi acitile, ali nokuleta kuli Yawe akana ka mpaanga akakota nangufye imbushi ukufuma pa mukuni wakwe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi acitile. Shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi." 
Leviticus5:7 “Nga cakuti umuntu takwete umwana wa mpaanga ali nokuleta utupele tubili nangu utubondo twa nkunda tubili kuli Yawe icifuta mulandu pa bubifi acita. Kamo ka mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi acitile elyo na kambi ke lambo lyakoca. 
Leviticus5:8 Ali nokuleta kuli shimapepo tonse uuli nokututuula, abalilepo kamo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Shimapepo ali nokunyongotolafye umukoshi, ukwabula ukufumyako umutwe." 
Leviticus5:9 Umulopa wa uyu mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, shimapepo ali nokuukana mu mbali ya bulambo, elyo umbi uwashala uli nokupongolwelwa mwisamba lya bulambo. Uyu e mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi." 
Leviticus5:10 Elyo nomba shimapepo ali nokutuula akapele nangu akabondo kashele nge lambo lyakoca ukulingana na mafunde. Shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi, nao akelelwa." 
Leviticus5:11 “Nga cakuti umuntu afilwa ukumona utupele tubili nangu utubondo twa nkunda tubili, ninshi alingile ukuleta icapekumi ca cipimo ca efa umo ica bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Tafwile kusanshako amafuta nangu icinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icanunka ubusaka, pantu uyu mutuulo wa kulapila pa bubifi." 
Leviticus5:12 Alingile nokuleta kuli shimapepo, nao ali nokubuulapofye mu lupi kukuba icipande ca cibukisho, elyo ali nokubocela pa bulambo pamo ne mituulo yakoca iya kuli Yawe. Uyu mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi." 
Leviticus5:13 “Ifi efyo shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi, ninshi uyu muntu akelelwa. Umutuulo uwashalapo, uli nokuba uwakwa shimapepo nga filya ciba pa mutuulo wa cabunga.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus5:15 “Ilyo lyonse umuntu alufyanya acita ne cabubifi mukukanaishiba muli fyonse ifyamushilo ifyakwa Yawe, ali nokuleta kuli Yawe icifuta mulandu pamo nga sukusuku wa pa mukuni wakwe, uushaba na kalema, kabili uwalingana no mutengo wa kufina kwa silifa pa cipimo ca shekeli wa cifulo camushilo. Uyu mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi." 
Leviticus5:16 Uyu muntu ali nokubwekeshapo ifyo ashatuulile kabili alundepo cimo muli cila fisano ukulingana ne cipimo casuminishiwa no kupeela kuli shimapepo. Shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako sukusuku ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi, ninshi uyu muntu akelelwa." 
Leviticus5:17 “Nga cakuti umuntu abifya no kucita ifyo Yawe ashifwaya mu mafunde yakwe, nangufye acitile mukukanaishiba, nalyo line ninshi ali no mulandu kabili ali nokukandwa." 
Leviticus5:18 Ali nokuleta kuli shimapepo sukusuku wa pa mukuni wakwe, uwabula akalema, uwamutengo uwalingango mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokumufutilako pa cilubo acitile mukukanaishiba, ninshi uyu muntu akelelwa." 
Leviticus5:19 “Uyu e mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi pantu uyu muntu aliba no mulandu pakucita icilubo kuli Yawe.” 
Leviticus6:1 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus6:2 “Umuntu nga abifya mukukanaba uwacishinka kuli Yawe kufyo acenjesha umunankwe pa fintu asekesheko nangu ukumusungilako nangu ukumwibila, nangu amubepa." 
Leviticus6:3 Nangu ngo muntu umo atola icintu icilubile nomba akaana ati teutolele, nangu alapa umulapo wabufi, nangu acita ifyabubifi ifyo abantu bengacita," 
Leviticus6:4 nangu abifya muli uyu musango uwa bucenjeshi, alingile ukubwesha ifi fintu aibile nangu asendele mu bucenjeshi nangufye ni filya fine umunankwe asekesheko, na filya fine atolele," 
Leviticus6:5 elyo na conse ico alapilepo umulapo wabufi. Fyonse ifyo asendele alingile ukubwesha no kulundapo cimo pali cila fisano no kubwesesha ku mwine pa bushiku bumo bwine ali nokutuula umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. 
Leviticus6:6 Nge cifuta mulandu alete kuli shimapepo, emukutila kuli Yawe, umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi, ukufuma pa mukuni wakwe, sukusuku uwabula akalema, uwa mutengo uwalinga." 
Leviticus6:7 Na muli iyi nshila, shimapepo ali nokufutilako uyu muntu kuli Yawe ninshi lyena akabelelwa uluse pa fintu fyonse acita ifyalenga abe no mulandu.”" 
Leviticus6:8 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus6:9 “Eba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ifyebo ifi, pakuti efyo balekonka ilyo lyonse baleka ilambo lyakoca. Ilambo lyakoca lili nokubafye pa bulambo ubushiku bonse pa cininkwa ca mulilo mpaka bwaca." 
Leviticus6:10 Elyo Shimapepo ali nokufwala umwingila wa nsalu iyatelela elyo na kaputula wa nsalu iyatelela mukati ka mwingila no kukusa imito ye lambo lyakoca ilipiile ku bulambo no kuibika mu mbali ya bulambo. 
Leviticus6:11 Elyo ali nokufuula ifi fyakufwala no kufwala fimbi pakutwala imito kunse ya nkambi ku ncende iyasangululwa. 
Leviticus6:12 Umulilo wa pa bulambo uli nokulaaka lyonse, taufwile kushima iyoo. Ulucelo lyonse shimapepo ali nokubikapo inkuni no kupekanya ilambo lyakoca pa mulilo no kocapo amafuta ya mutuulo wakwampana." 
Leviticus6:13 Umulilo wena ufwile ukulayaka lyonse pa bulambo, taufwile kushima iyoo." 
Leviticus6:14 “Aya nayo e mafunde yakukonka pakutuula umutuulo wa cabunga. Bamwana Aroni abaume, ebakulaleta uyu mutuulo ku cinso cakwa Yawe kuntanshi ya bulambo." 
Leviticus6:15 Elyo Shimapepo ali nokubuulapo ulupi lwa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino na mafutamo, pamo pene ne cinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icanunka ubusaka conse, pamo pene no kufyocela pamo pa bulambo nge cipande ca cibukisho ica cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Leviticus6:16 Ifyashalapo, Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bali nokulya, lelo bafwile ukulya umwabula intutumushi mu ncende yamushilo. Bafwile ukuliila mu lubansa lwe Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Leviticus6:17 Pakupanga umukate tabafwile ukubikamo intutumushi. Nabapeela ifi ifya pa mituulo yandi iya cakoca cibe cabo. Ifi filyo, ala, fyamushilo nganshi pamo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi elyo no mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi." 
Leviticus6:18 Umwaume onse uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni ali nokulyako. Ici e cipande cakwe pa mutuulo kuli Yawe uwa cakoca icili nokutwalilila ku nkulo shonse. Na conse icili nokukumyako, cili nokuba icamushilo.”" 
Leviticus6:19 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus6:20 “Uyu e mutuulo Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bafwile ukutuula kuli Yawe pa bushiku bwakusubwa. Bali nokulatuula icapekumi cimo ca cipimo ca efa ca bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino pamo ngo mutuulo wa cabunga uo batuula lyonse. Bali nokubwakanya pakati no kutuula bumo ulucelo, na bumbi nabo icungulo." 
Leviticus6:21 Bali nokusankanya ubunga na mafuta pakukandawila no koca pelata lyakocelapo no kutuula ngo mutuulo wa cabunga uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe. 
Leviticus6:22 Umwana mwaume onse uwakwa Aroni uuli nokupyana nga shimapepo uwasubwa, euli nokupekanya uyu mutuulo kuli Yawe lyonsefye. Onsefye umutuulo, wakocela Yawe epela." 
Leviticus6:23 Umutuulo wa cabunga onse uo shimapepo atuula, ulingile ukuocafye umupwilapo. Tecakwesha ukulyako.”" 
Leviticus6:24 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus6:25 “Sosa kuli Aroni pamo na bana bakwe abaume, utile, aya e mafunde yakukonka pakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ukalaipailwa pa ncende apo bepaila ilambo lyakoca kuli Yawe. Ili lilambo lyamushilo nganshi." 
Leviticus6:26 Shimapepo uuli nokutuula uyu mutuulo e ulifye no kulyako. Afwile aliila mu ncende iyamushilo iya mu lubansa lwe Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Leviticus6:27 Na conse icili nokukumya ku munofu waciko cili nokuba icamushilo. Kabili umulopa nga watonena ku cakufwala, ufwile ukucisamfya mu ncende iyamushilo." 
Leviticus6:28 Inongo umwipikilwe iyi nama, ifwile ukutobwa, kanofye nga epikile mu mupika wa mukuba, wena naukuuswe no kusambwa na menshi bwino bwino." 
Leviticus6:29 Umwaume onse uwa muli bashimapepo euli nokulyako uyu mutuulo, wamushilo nganshi." 
Leviticus6:30 Lelo ilyo umulopa wa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi waletwa kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo mukufuta pa bubifi mu Muputule wamushilo, tecakwesha ukulyako. Uyu mutuulo ufwilefye ukocewa.”" 
Leviticus7:1 “Aya e mafunde yakukonka pakutuula umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi, icili icamushilo nganshi." 
Leviticus7:2 Umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi uli nokwipaiwa pa ncende iyo bepailapo ilambo lyakoca. Elyo umulopa wena bali nokuukana mu mbali shonse isha bulambo. 
Leviticus7:3 Yonse amafuta yali nokutuulwa, aya ku mucila na yatabilila ku fya munda," 
Leviticus7:4 imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako mupepi no musana na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu, fyonse fili nokufumishiwa pamo pene ne mfyo." 
Leviticus7:5 Shimapepo ali nokocela fyonse pa bulambo ngo mutuulo wacakoca kuli Yawe. Uyu e mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. 
Leviticus7:6 Umwaume onse uwa muli bashimapepo euli nokulyako uyu mutuulo. Lelo bali nokuuliila mu ncende imo iyamushilo, pantu uyu mutuulo wamushilo nganshi." 
Leviticus7:7 “Ifunde limo line e lyakukonka pa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi elyo no mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Umutuulo washalapo pakubafutilako wakwa shimapepo. 
Leviticus7:8 Umukupo uushele ku nama ye lambo lyakoca ilya uuli onse, uli nokuba wakwa shimapepo wine." 
Leviticus7:9 Umutuulo onse uwa cabunga uo baoca mwibuku nangu basalula pali pani, nangu baocela pelata lyakocelapo, fyonse fyakwa shimapepo uulebomba ku bulambo." 
Leviticus7:10 Kabili umutuulo wa cabunga onse uwasakaniwamo na mafuta, nangu wauma, fyonse fya bana baume bakwa Aroni cila umo ukulingana ngo munankwe.”" 
Leviticus7:11 “Aya e mafunde yakukonka pakutuula umutuulo wakwampana uo umuntu onse ali nokutuula kuli Yawe. 
Leviticus7:12 “Umuntu nga atuula umutuulo wakulanga ukutotela, afwile atuulila capamo ne mituulo yakutotela iya mikate umwabula intutumushi lelo utwashingwako na mafuta, kabili ne mikate iyapapatala umwakandawilwa na mafuta, kabili ne mikate iyapangwa no bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino umwasanshiwafye na mafuta." 
Leviticus7:13 Ukukonka pa mutuulo wakwampana uwakutotela, ali nokulundapo umutuulo wa mikate iyatutumuka." 
Leviticus7:14 Ali nokutuulapo cila umo ngo musangulo kuli Yawe. Uyu musangulo wakwa shimapepo uukana umulopa wa mituulo yakwampana ku bulambo. 
Leviticus7:15 Inama ya mutuulo wakwampana kabili iyakutotela, ifwile ukuliwa mu bushiku bwine ubo ipeelelwepo ngo mutuulo we lambo. Tafwile kushako nelyo kamo mpaka ukufika ulucelo." 
Leviticus7:16 “Nga cakuti umutuulo we lambo lya muntu wa cilayo nangu wakuitemenwafye, ninshi uyo mutuulo we lambo ufwile ukuliwafye ubo bwine bushiku wapeelelwapo. Lelo nga cakuti pashala fimo, kuti fyaliwa ubushiku bwakonkapo." 
Leviticus7:17 Umunofu wa nama nga washalako ku mutuulo mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu, wakocafye." 
Leviticus7:18 Nga cakuti uyu mutuulo wakwampana waliwa mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu, umutuulo wa muntu uyu teti Yawe aupokelele. Elyo tawakapendelwe ukuba ku mulingo wakwe, lelo untu wakowela, no muntu uukalyako akakandwa." 
Leviticus7:19 “Umunofu wa nama onse uwakumya ku cintu icakowela, tewakwesha ukulya, wena wakocafye. Lelo inama imbi umuntu onse uwasangululwa wena kuti alyako iyo inama." 
Leviticus7:20 Nga cakuti umuntu uushasangululwa alyako ku nama ya mutuulo wakwampana uwakwa Yawe, uyo muntu wakutamfyafye mu mushobo wa bantu bakwe." 
Leviticus7:21 Kabili umuntu onse uwakumya ku cintu icili conse icakowela ica muntu nangu inama iyakowela nangufye icintu icili conse icakowela, nomba aisa lyako inama ya mutuulo wakwampana uwakwa Yawe, ninshi uyu muntu wakutamfyafye mu mushobo wa bantu bakwe.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus7:23 “Eba abena Israeli utile, ‘Imwe mwilalya conse ica mafuta ya nama ya ŋombe, impaanga nangufye ya mbushi." 
Leviticus7:24 Kabili tecakwesha ukulya mafuta ya nama yonsefye iyaifwila, nangufye iyaikatwa ku finama fya mpanga, lelo kuti yabomfeshiwa ku milimo imbi." 
Leviticus7:25 Umuntu onse uwalya amafuta ya nama iyo batuulile kuli Yawe iya cakoca, wakutamfyafye mu mushobo wa bantu bakwe." 
Leviticus7:26 Konsefye uko mukekala, tecakwesha ukulalya umulopa wa cuni icili conse nangufye uwa nama iyili yonse." 
Leviticus7:27 Umuntu onse uwalya umulopa, uyu wena wakutamfyafye mu mushobo wa bantu bakwe.’”" 
Leviticus7:28 Kabili Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus7:29 “Eba abena Israeli utile, ‘Uyo onse uuletuula umutuulo wakwampana kuli Yawe, alingile ukuleta iciputulwa ca nama ye lambo kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus7:30 Alingile ukuiletelafye umwine uyu mutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe. Ali nokuleta ifyamafuta pamo ne cisao elyo atambike icisao kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika. 
Leviticus7:31 Shimapepo ali nokoca amafuta pa bulambo, lelo icisao cena cakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume." 
Leviticus7:32 Ku mutuulo we lambo lyakwampana, umwendo wa ku kulyo uli nokupeelwa kuli shimapepo ngo musangulo." 
Leviticus7:33 Mwana Aroni umwaume uwatuula umulopa na mafuta nge fya mutuulo wakwampana, afwile apeelwa umwendo wa ku kulyo nge cipande cakwe." 
Leviticus7:34 Ukufuma ku mutuulo wakwampana wa bena Israeli, nabuulako inama ya cisao icitambikwe, no mwendo uupeelwe no kufipeela kuli Aroni shimapepo na bana baume bakwe nge fipande fyabo ifya nshiku shonse ukufuma ku mutuulo wa bena Israeli.’" 
Leviticus7:35 “Ici cili cipande ca mutuulo wa cakoca icipeelwa kuli Yawe ico Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bapeelwe mu bushiku bapalamikwemo mukutumika Yawe nga bashimapepo. 
Leviticus7:36 Pa bushiku basubilwe, Yawe akonkomeshe ukuti abena Israeli babapeele ifi nge fipande fyabo ukulingana nomo inkulo sha bantu ba mu Israeli shili nokukonkanina.”" 
Leviticus7:37 Kanshi aya, e mafunde yakukonka ilyo ilambo lyakoca liletuulwa, na pa mutuulo wa cabunga, na pa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, na pa mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi, na pa mutuulo wa pakusubwa bushimapepo elyo na pa mutuulo wakwampana." 
Leviticus7:38 Yawe ewapeele Mose aya mafunde pa lupili lwa Sinai, pa bushiku akonkomeshe abena Israeli ukulatuula umutuulo kuli Yawe mu matololo ya Sinai." 
Leviticus8:1 Yawe asosele kuli Mose ati," 
Leviticus8:2 “Leta Aroni na bana bakwe abaume, ifyakufwala fya bashimapepo, amafuta yakusuba, iciponti ica mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, basukusuku babili elyo no museke umo uwa mikate iyishatutumuka." 
Leviticus8:3 Kabili ulonganike ulukuta lonse pa mwinshi wa mpongolo kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.” 
Leviticus8:4 Awe Mose acitilafye umo Yawe amukonkomeshe, ne bumba lya bantu balongene pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo," 
Leviticus8:5 Mose alaeba ulukuta ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe ankonkomeshe ukucita.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Elyo Mose apalamika Aroni na bana bakwe abaume kuntanshi no kubasamba na menshi. 
Leviticus8:7 Mose afwika Aroni ilaya, amukaka ilamba mu musana. Amufwika umwingila, elyo amufwika ne cakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi, acikakila mu musana no mushipi uwapikulwa busaka busaka." 
Leviticus8:8 Amufwika na tumba pa cifuba, abikamo no tumabwe, Urimu na Tumimu." 
Leviticus8:9 Akaka ne nsalu ku mutwe wakwa Aroni, akakilapo na kalilata ka golide wine wine akamushilo pamo ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe." 
Leviticus8:10 Elyo Mose abuula amafuta yakusuba no kusuba Itenti lyakwa Lesa ne fipe fyonse ifyalimo pakuti fibe ifyamushilo. 
Leviticus8:11 Kabili akana amafuta yamo ku bulambo imiku cine lubali, asuba amafuta ku bulambo pamo pene na ku fibombelo fyonse na ku musambilo neco bakatekapo, epakulenga fibe fyamushilo." 
Leviticus8:12 Epakubuula amafuta yakusuba no kwitulwila pa mutwe wakwa Aroni no kumusuba pakuti abe uwamushilo. 
Leviticus8:13 Elyo Mose apalamike bamwana Aroni abaume, abafwika imingila, abakaka na malamba mu misana, abapomba insalu ku mitwe, pamo ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe." 
Leviticus8:14 Kabili Mose aleta iciponti ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi. Elyo Aroni na bana bakwe abaume batambalika amaboko yabo pa mutwe wa ciponti ca ŋombe. 
Leviticus8:15 Elyo Mose nao aipaya iciponti ca ŋombe, abuulapo no mulopa elyo atumpa umunwe wakwe mu mulopa, aushinga na ku nsengo sha pa bulambo pa kusangulula ubulambo. Umulopa washala aupongolwela mwisamba lya bulambo. Ifi efyo Mose asangulwile ubulambo pakufutilako pa bubifi." 
Leviticus8:16 Mose kabili abuula amafuta yonse ayatabilila ifya munda na fyonse ifyalambatila ku libu lya ciponti, ne mfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako, no kufyocela pamo pa bulambo." 
Leviticus8:17 Abuula fyonse ifyashala, impapa, iminofu ne fya mu mala fine, aya fyocela kunse ya nkambi, pamo ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe." 
Leviticus8:18 Kabili apalamika sukusuku uwe lambo lya cakoca, nao Aroni na bana abaume batambalikilapo amaboko pa mutwe wakwa sukusuku." 
Leviticus8:19 Nao Mose epakwipaya uyu sukusuku no kukana umulopa mu mbali shonse isha bulambo. 
Leviticus8:20 Aputaula inama fipimfya fipimfya, no koca umutwe, ifipimfya fyonse pamo na mafuta." 
Leviticus8:21 Asamfya ifya munda ne myendo na menshi no kocela sukusuku onse pa bulambo nge lambo lyakoca, ilya cena cisuma icakusekesha ngo mutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe, pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Leviticus8:22 Elyo kabili Mose abuula sukusuku wacibili, uyu wena ali mutuulo wa pakusubwa, na Aroni na bana bakwe abaume batambalikilapo amaboko yabo pa mutwe." 
Leviticus8:23 Mose nao aipaya uyu sukusuku no kubuula umulopa umo, aushinga ku kalebelebe ka kutwi kwa ku kulyo kwakwa Aroni na ku cikumo ca ku kulyo, elyo na ku cikondo icikalamba ica lukasa lwa ku kulyo." 
Leviticus8:24 Mose elyo apalamika abana baume bakwa Aroni, nabo bene abashinga umulopa ku tulebelebe twa matwi yabo aya ku kulyo, ku fikumo fyabo ifya ku kulyo na ku fikondo fikalamba ifya ku kulyo kwa makasa yabo. Kabili akana no mulopa uwashelepo mu mbali shonse isha bulambo." 
Leviticus8:25 Abuula amafuta no mucila uwanona, elyo na mafuta yonsefye aya fya munda, fyonse ifyatabilila ku libu, imfyo shonse shibili na mafuta yabako elyo no mwendo wa ku kulyo." 
Leviticus8:26 Ukufuma mu museke uwa mikate iyishatutumuka, uwali ku cinso cakwa Yawe, abuulamo umukate umo na kamukate kamo akasakanishiwamo amafuta elyo na kamukate akapapatala, afibika pa mafuta kabili pa mwendo wa ku kulyo uwakwa sukusuku." 
Leviticus8:27 Mose abuula fyonse ifi, abika mu minwe yakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume nabo bakafimishe mumulu ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus8:28 Elyo Mose afipoka ukufuma ku maboko yabo no kufyocela fyonse pa bulambo pa mulu we lambo lyakoca ngo mutuulo wa cakoca kuli Yawe, umutuulo uwakusubwa uwa cena cisuma icimusekesha." 
Leviticus8:29 Elyo kabili Mose abuula inama ya cisao, icipande cakwe kuli sukusuku, kabili aimisha mumulu ngo mutuulo wakutambika pa cinso cakwa Yawe pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Leviticus8:30 Elyo kabili Mose abuula amafuta yakusuba no mulopa umo ukufuma pa bulambo, afikana pali Aroni ne fyakufwala fyakwe elyo na pa bana bakwe abaume na ku fyakufwala fyabo. Kanshi efyo Aroni ashishiwe pamo ne fyakufwala fyakwe na bana bakwe abaume ne fyakufwala fyabo." 
Leviticus8:31 Mose kabili epakweba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ukuti, “Ipikileni inama pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kuiliilafye palya pene ne mikate ukufuma mu museke wa mituulo iyipeelwa pakusubwa bushimapepo, pamo ngefyo nakonkomesha ukuti, ‘Aroni na bana bakwe abaume, efyo bafwile ukulya.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Elyo inama no mukate ifyashalapo moce. 
Leviticus8:33 Mwilafuma, pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pa nshiku cine lubali mpakafye inshiku sha kusubwa shenu shikapwe pantu ukusubwa kwenu kukapwa inshiku cine lubali." 
Leviticus8:34 Icacitwa lelo, ni Yawe akonkomeshe pakumufutilako pa bubifi." 
Leviticus8:35 Mufwilefye ukwikala pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, akasuba no bushiku pa nshiku cine lubali, no kukonka ifyo Yawe afwaya lyena tamwakafwe, pantu ifi efyo bankonkomeshe.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Awe Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bacitile fintu fyonse ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Leviticus9:1 Nomba pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse, Mose aita Aroni na bana bakwe abaume elyo na bakalamba ba bena Israeli." 
Leviticus9:2 Mose asosa kuli Aroni ati, “Buula iciponti nge lambo lya pa bubifi bobe elyo na sukusuku nge lambo lyobe lyakoca, fyonse ifyabula akalema, no kutuula kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus9:3 Elyo eba abena Israeli auti, ‘Buulenipo sawe umo ukuba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, iciponti ca ŋombe no mwana wa mpaanga fyonse ifyakumanya umwaka umo umo ifyabula akalema fibe ifye lambo lyakoca." 
Leviticus9:4 Kabili buulenipo cilume wa ŋombe na sukusuku ngo mutuulo wakwampana uwe lambo kuli Yawe, pamo no mutuulo wa cabunga uwasanshiwamo na mafuta. Pantu ilelo line, Yawe alemoneka kuli imwe.’”" 
Leviticus9:5 Elyo baleta ifintu fyonse ifyo Mose akonkomeshe kuntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, no lukuta lonse lwapalama lwaiminina na ku cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus9:6 Mose alabeba ati, “Ici eco Yawe ankonkomeshe ukuti mulecita, pakuti mumone ubucindami bwakwa Yawe.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Kabili Mose aeba Aroni ati, “Palama ku bulambo no kuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bobe, pamo ne lambo lyakoca, pakuti ufute pa bubifi bobe nobwa bantu. Uleke ilambo lya pa bantu no kubafutilako ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Awe Aroni apalama ku bulambo, aipaya ne ciponti ca ŋombe kukuba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwakwe." 
Leviticus9:9 Abana bakwe abaume epakumuletela umulopa, nao atumpikamo umunwe wakwe, ashinga na ku nsengo sha bulambo. Onse umulopa washala, awitila mwisamba lya bulambo." 
Leviticus9:10 Pa bulambo aocelapo na mafuta, imfyo shonse shibili na fyonse ifyatabilila ku libu. Fyonse ifi fyafumine pa mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Leviticus9:11 Lelo inama yonse kumo kwine ne mpapa, fyena aya fyocela kunse ya nkambi." 
Leviticus9:12 Elyo kabili Aroni aipaya ne nama ya mutuulo we lambo lyakoca. Abana bakwe abaume bamutambika umulopa, nao aukanawila ku mbali shonse isha bulambo." 
Leviticus9:13 Kabili batambika kuli ena icipimfya cimo cimo ice lambo lyakoca, ukubikapo ne camutwe no kufyocela fyonse pamo pa bulambo." 
Leviticus9:14 Awe asamfya fyonse ifya munda ne myendo no kufyocela pa mulu we lambo lyakoca pa bulambo. 
Leviticus9:15 Aroni nomba aleta umutuulo wali nokuba uwa pa bantu. Abuula imbushi ukuba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwa bantu, aipaya, aituula ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi nga filya fine acicita pakubala." 
Leviticus9:16 Kabili aleta inama ye lambo lyakoca no kutuula ukulingana ne nshila yakulilekelamo. 
Leviticus9:17 Aletele kabili umutuulo wa cabunga, abuulapo ulupi lumo pa fya mutuulo wine, aocela pa bulambo ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila lucelo." 
Leviticus9:18 Aipaya na cilume wa ŋombe elyo na sukusuku, atuulila na bantu ngo mutuulo wakwampana. Abana bakwe abaume bamupeela umulopa, nao aukanawila mu mbali shonse isha bulambo." 
Leviticus9:19 Aroni abuula amafuta yakwa cilume wa ŋombe na sukusuku, imicila iyanona, ne fya mafuta ayalambatila ku fya munda ne mfyo shonse na fyonse ifyalambatila ku mabu." 
Leviticus9:20 Ifi fyonse afibika pa mulu wa cisao elyo Aroni aocela amafuta pa bulambo. 
Leviticus9:21 Elyo Aroni atambika icisao no mwendo wa ku kulyo kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika kuli Yawe, ngefyo Mose akonkomeshe." 
Leviticus9:22 Elyo nomba Aroni atambalika amaboko yakwe pa bantu no kubapaala. Panuma ya kutuula umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, ilambo lya cakoca elyo no mutuulo wakwampana, aikila na panshi." 
Leviticus9:23 Elyo Mose na Aroni nomba baya ingila na mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Cilya bafumamo, bapaala abantu, no bucindami bwakwa Yawe bwamoneka ku bantu bonsefye." 
Leviticus9:24 Awe apopene, kwafuma no mulilo ku cinso cakwa Yawe waoca ilambo pamo pene na mafuta ayali pa bulambo. Abantu bonse pakumona ifi, balapunda ne nsansa, bawa bonse panshi ubukupeme." 
Leviticus10:1 Bamwana Aroni abaume Nadabu na Abihu babuula cila muntu icifukilisho cakwe, babikamo umulilo, basanshamo no bubani, baya tuula umulilo uushasuminishiwa kuli Yawe ukupusana nefyo abakonkomeshe." 
Leviticus10:2 Awe apopene, kwafuma no mulilo ku cinso cakwa Yawe waboca, bafwila na palya penefye pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus10:3 Mose epakweba Aroni ati, “Umu emo Yawe aloseshe ilyo atile, ‘Muli abo abampalama, nkailanga uwamushilo, pa cinso ca bantu bonse nkaba nokucindikwa.’” Aroni aikalafye tondolo." 
Leviticus10:4 Elyo Mose aita Mishaeli na Elisafani, abana baume bakwa Usieli nalume wakwa Aroni no kubeba ati, “Iseni kuno sendeni imibili ya bafyala benu, muitwale kunse ya nkambi, ukutaluka ku ntanshi ya cifulo camushilo.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Nabo baisa no kusenda iyi mibili ya bafwa, ninshi icili mu mingila, baitwala na panse ya nkambi, pamo ngefyo Mose abebele." 
Leviticus10:6 Kabili Mose aeba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume, Eleasa na Itama ati, “Tecakwesha ukulekelesha imishishi yenu mukukanasakula, kabili tecakwesha ukulepaula ifyakufwala fyenu. Nga efyo mwacita, ninshi muli nokufwa, na Yawe alefulilwa ulukuta lonse. Lelo indupwa shenu shonse ne ŋanda yonse ya bena Israeli, ebali nokuloosha abo Yawe ocele ku mulilo atumine." 
Leviticus10:7 Imwe tecakwesha ukufuma pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, epali mwafwa, pantu amafuta yakusuba ayakwa Yawe mwasubwa mucili nayo.” Awe nabo bakonkafye ifyo Mose abeba." 
Leviticus10:8 Kabili Yawe aeba Aroni ati," 
Leviticus10:9 “Iwe na bana bobe abaume tecakwesha ukunwa umwangashi nangufye conse icikola lyonse ilyo mwaingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, nga mwacita ifyo mukafwa. Ici e cipope camuyayaya icili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo." 
Leviticus10:10 Mufwile no kulalekanya ku fintu fyamushilo elyo ne fishili fyamushilo, pakati ka fintu ifishasangululwa elyo ne fyasangululwa." 
Leviticus10:11 Kabili mufwile ukufunda abena Israeli amafundefye yonse ayo ine ne Yawe napeele ukupitila muli Mose.” 
Leviticus10:12 Mose aeba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume abashalapo, Eleasa na Itama, ati, “Buuleni umutuulo wa cabunga uwashalapo ku mutuulo wakwa Yawe uwa cakoca, mupekanye umwabula intutumushi no kuuliila pa mbali ya bulambo, pantu wena wamushilo nganshi." 
Leviticus10:13 Muuliilefye mu ncende yamushilo pantu iwe na bana bobe abaume, e ciputulwa mwapeelwa ku fya mutuulo wakwa Yawe uwa cakoca. Ifi efyo Yawe ankonkomesha." 
Leviticus10:14 Nomba iwe, abana bobe abaume na bana bobe abanakashi, kuti mwalyakofye icisao icitambikwe no mwendo ku fyamutuulo. Muleliilafye mu ncende iyasangululwa. Nafipeelwa kuli iwe na bana bobe bonse nge ciputulwa ca mutuulo wakwampana wa bena Israeli." 
Leviticus10:15 Umwendo uwacituulwa ne cisao icacitambikwa, fifwile ukuletwa pamo na mafuta ya mutuulo wacakoca fitambikwe kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika. Ici cili nokulacitika lyonse kukuba icakaniko cobe pamo na bana bobe, pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Elyo kabili Mose aipusha palwa mbushi ya mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, awe asanga ukuti nabayoca kale. Epakufulilwa Eleasa na Itama, abana baume bakwa Aroni abashelepo, elyo aipusha ati," 
Leviticus10:17 “Bushe cinshi mushililile umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi mu cifulo camushilo? Ala uyu mutuulo wamushilo nganshi. Wapeelwe kuli imwe ukusendelako imilandu ya lukuta lwa bena Israeli ukubafutilako pa cinso cakwa Yawe. 
Leviticus10:18 Apo umulopa wa ili lambo tautwelwe mukati ka cifulo camushilo, nga mwaciliilafye iyi mbushi mu cifulo camushilo, pamo ngefyo nakonkomesha.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Lelo Aroni ayasuka Mose ati, “Wamona ilelo line abantu bacilekela Yawe umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwabo elyo ne lambo lyakoca, kabili ifi fine efintu fincitikile ine. Nomba ine ndya umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ilelo, bushe Yawe nga acitemwa?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Ilyo Mose aumfwa ifi, camuwamina." 
Leviticus11:1 Yawe aeba Mose na Aroni ati," 
Leviticus11:2 “Soseni ku bena Israeli mutile, ‘Pa nama shonse ishikala ku mulundu, isho mwingalya nishi." 
Leviticus11:3 Mulelya inama ishapwililika ukupanduka ifibondo, elyo ishibukula ifyakulya.’" 
Leviticus11:4 “Kuli inama shimo ishibukula nangu ishapanduka ifibondo isho mushilingile ukulalya. Ingamila nangu ibukula ifyakulya tayaba na fibondo ifyapanduka. Iyi yena, tayasangululwa kuli imwe, teti mulye." 
Leviticus11:5 Imbi inama iyibukula ifyakulya, ni pati nao wine tapanduka ifibondo. Nayo teyakulya pantu intu yakowela." 
Leviticus11:6 Kalulu nangu abukula ifyakulya tapanduka ifibondo, nao wine alikowela." 
Leviticus11:7 Inkumba nangu yaba ne fibondo ifyapanduka, teyakulya intu yakowela pantu taibukula." 
Leviticus11:8 Tamufwile ukulya ishi nama nangufye ukukumya ku fitumbi fyashiko, shena shintu shakowela." 
Leviticus11:9 “Pali fyonse ifikala mu menshi muli babemba ne mimana kuti mwalaya fyonse ifyakwata utulebelebe na mamba. 
Leviticus11:10 Lelo conse icishili na tulebelebe nangu amamba ica mu menshi mu mimana nangu muli bemba, nangufye cintu conse icisenya icamweo muli fyonse ifya mu menshi, fyena ifi talukeniko." 
Leviticus11:11 Kanshi apo mwakulataluka kuli ifi fintu, tecakwesha ukulyako umunofu wafiko, ne fitumbi fyafiko muletalukako." 
Leviticus11:12 Icintu conse icisangwa mu menshi icamweo icishakwata tulebelebe na mamba cena mufwile ukutalukako. 
Leviticus11:13 “Kabili ifi e fyuni mufwile ukutalukako no kukanalya. Ifyakutalukako nifi: kapumpe, ikubi likalamba ne kubi ilyafiita," 
Leviticus11:14 akapata makanga na bapungwa abali bonse 
Leviticus11:15 na bamwankole ba misango yonse," 
Leviticus11:16 imbuni, akambasa, isela ne nkoshi sha misango yonse," 
Leviticus11:17 akapululu kanono, inondo, icipululu," 
Leviticus11:18 swelelele, intitimushi, ikubi lyabuuta," 
Leviticus11:19 icipansankola, inkoba isha misango misango na pupute elyo na kasusu." 
Leviticus11:20 “Kabili ifishishi fyonse ifipupuka no kwendela ku molu yane, fyena imwe muletalukako." 
Leviticus11:21 Kwena eko fili fimo ifyakwata amapindo ifyendela ku molu yonse yane ifyo mwingalya. Ifi fyena fyalikwata amolu ya mpingu ayakutolokelako pa mushili. 
Leviticus11:22 Muli ifi, ifyo mwakulalya mu misango yonse ni makanta, inyense na kapuma ne nshonkonono." 
Leviticus11:23 Lelo utushishi tonse utwakwata na molu yane, imwe muletalukako." 
Leviticus11:24 “Eico na imwe mukaikowesha kuli ifi nga mwalaikatako. Uyo onse ukakumya ku fyafwa fyonse, nao akaba uwakowela ukufika ne cungulo." 
Leviticus11:25 Kabili uyo onse uukasenda icafwa, afwile asamba insalu shakwe, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela ukufika ne nshita ya cungulo." 
Leviticus11:26 “Kabili inama shonse ishapanduka ifibondo ukwabula ukupwililika, nangu ishishibukula fyakulya, shintu shakowela kuli imwe. Eico uyo onse uwaikatakofye kuli yonse iyafwa, nao akaba uwakowela." 
Leviticus11:27 Muli ishi nama shonse ishendela ku molu yane, isho ishendela ku fisansa, shena shintu shakowela kuli imwe. Eico uyo onse uwaikatakofye ku fitumbi akakowela ukufika ne nshita ya cungulo." 
Leviticus11:28 Kabili uyo onse uwasenda ifitumbi fyashiko, afwile asamba insalu shakwe, nao akakowela ukufika ne nshita ya cungulo. Fyonse nafyo fine fintu fyakowela kuli imwe." 
Leviticus11:29 “Ku nama shonse ishenda pa mushili, isho ishakowela kuli imwe nishi: Imfuko, impuku, ne mbulo shonse mu misango yashiko," 
Leviticus11:30 kolokombwa, insamba, mulinso, lufwinyemba." 
Leviticus11:31 Kuli ifi fyonse ifikulika pa mushili, fyena fintu fyakowela. Uyo onse uwaikatako ku citumbi caciko, ali nokuba uwakowela ukufika ne nshita ya cungulo." 
Leviticus11:32 Ilyo lyonse cimo pali ifi fyafwa caponena pa cintu cimo, ico umusango cibombelamo cibe cintu capangwa ku cikutulo, ku cimuti, insalu, ku mukupo, ico cipe mucibike mu menshi, ici cipe cintu cakowela ukufikafye ne nshita ya cungulo, elyo cilesangululwa." 
Leviticus11:33 Lelo cimo pali ifi nga caponena ku cipe ce bumba, ninshi fyonse ifilimo nafyo fine fyakowela, ici cipe ce bumba cakutobafye." 
Leviticus11:34 Icakulya conse icikwete amenshi ayafumine muli ico cipe ce bumba, naco cine cintu cakowela. Ne cakunwa cine icafumamo, naco cintu cakowela." 
Leviticus11:35 Ponsefye apo ifitumbi fyaponena napo pene ninshi pakowela, pabe ni pebuku, na pamo ni pa nongo yakwipikapo. Fifwile ukufitoba fyonse, pantu fyasanguka ifyakowela, kabili nomba fyaba ifyakowela kuli imwe." 
Leviticus11:36 Lelo kwena akamfukumfuku ka menshi nangu icishima ca menshi, fyena fintu fyasangululwa. Nomba uyo onse uwaikata ku fitumbi wena ninshi akowela." 
Leviticus11:37 Nga cakuti icitumbi caponena pa mbuto shakubyala, shena shileshala ishasangululwa." 
Leviticus11:38 Lelo nalyo line nga cakutila namwitilapo amenshi pa mbuto, elyo paponena icitumbi nalyo line kuli imwe, shintu shakowela." 
Leviticus11:39 “Inama imo pasho mulya nga yaifwila, uyo onse uwaikatako ku citumbi caiko wena ninshi akowela mpaka ukufika ne cungulo." 
Leviticus11:40 Na uyo onse uwalyakofye ku nama iyaifwila, afwile asamba insalu shakwe kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka inshita ya cungulo. Na uyo onse uwasenda icitumbi afwile ukusamba insalu shakwe, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka ne cungulo." 
Leviticus11:41 “Icintu conse icisenya pa mushili cena cakutalukako, tecakwesha ukulyako." 
Leviticus11:42 Mwilalya ne cintu conse icikulika, nangufye cikulikila pefumo nangu icenda na molu yane nangu icakwatafye amolu ayengi, fyena fyakutalukako." 
Leviticus11:43 Mwilaikowesha mwe bene kuli ifi fintu. Mwiilenga ukuba abakowela mwe bene kuli ifi fintu, nangu fyena ukumukowesha." 
Leviticus11:44 Ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu. Eico kanshi isangululeni no kuba abamushilo, pantu ine ndi wamushilo. Kabili mwilaikowesha mwe bene ku cikulika conse pa mushili." 
Leviticus11:45 Ine nine Yawe uwamufumya imwe mu Egupto no kuba Lesa wenu. Eico kanshi beni abamushilo pantu ine ndi wamushilo. 
Leviticus11:46 “Kanshi aya e mafunde yakukonka palwa nama, ifyuni ne fintu fyonse ifyabumi ifikala mu menshi ne fintu fyonse ifikulika pa mushili." 
Leviticus11:47 Mulelekanya pa fintu ifyakowela ne fishili fyakowela, pa fintu ifyabumi ifyo muli nokulalya nefyo mushifwile ukulya.”" 
Leviticus12:1 Yawe aeba Mose ati," 
Leviticus12:2 “Sosa ku bena Israeli auti, ‘Umwanakashi nga aba pa bukulu no kupapa umwana umwaume, ninshi aba uwakowela pa nshikufye cine lubali, nga filya fine ciba nga aba kumpepo." 
Leviticus12:3 Na pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse, umwana ali nokusembululwa." 
Leviticus12:4 Elyo umwanakashi ali nokupembela pa nshiku amakumi yatatu na shitatu (33), pakuti asangululwe no mulopa wakwe uwamishiwe. Talingile ukwikata ku cintu nelyo cimo icili icamushilo, nangufye kwingila mu cifulo camushilo mpakafye inshiku shakusangululwa shapwa." 
Leviticus12:5 Lelo nga cakuti apapa umwana umwanakashi, lyena cili nokusendafye imilungu ibili umwanakashi alifye uwakowela, nga filya fine aba nga ali kumpepo. Elyo ali nokupembela pa nshiku amakumi mutanda na mutanda (66), pakuti asangululwe no mulopa wakwe uwamishiwe.’" 
Leviticus12:6 “Inshiku shakwe ishakusanguluka nga shapwa isho apapilepo umwana umwaume nangu umwanakashi, alingile ukuleta kuli shimapepo pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo umwana wa mpaanga uwa mwaka umo nge lambo lya cakoca, ukubikapo na kabondo ka nkunda nangu icipele ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi." 
Leviticus12:7 Shimapepo ali nokumutuulilako kuli Yawe pakumufutilako, elyo lyena ali nokuba uwasanguluka kukufumishiwa kwa mulopa. Aya e mafunde ya pa mwanakashi onse uwapapa umwana umwaume nangu umwanakashi." 
Leviticus12:8 “Nga cakuti umwanakashi uyu takwete umwana wa mpaanga, ninshi afwile ukuletafye utubondo twa nkunda tubili, nangu utwana twa fipele tubili, kamo ke lambo lya cakoca, kambi nako ka mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokutuulilamo ilambo lyakufuta pa fyamukowesha, nao lyena akasangululwa.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Yawe aeba Mose na Aroni ati," 
Leviticus13:2 “Umuntu umo nga alafimba, nangu akwata utupumba twalamufuluma pa mubili, nangu pa nkanda yakwe palasebeka ifiletwala ku fibashi ifyambukila, afwile aletwa kuli shimapepo Aroni nangufye kuli umo uwa mu bana bakwe abaume, uuli ni shimapepo." 
Leviticus13:3 Shimapepo ali nokupima icilonda bwino bwino kuli uyu muntu. Nga asanga no kumona ukuti amapipi ayali pa cilonda nayabuuta, ne cilonda nacipitilila mu nkanda, ninshi bulwele bwankanda ubwambukila. Shimapepo nga apwa ukupima bwino bwino uyu muntu, ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela." 
Leviticus13:4 Nga cakuti pa nkanda apalesebeka pabuuta nomba icilonda tacipitilile mu nkanda, na mapipi nayo ayalipo tayalwike ayabuuta, shimapepo ali nokutalusha uyu muntu umulwele ku babiye pa nshikufye cine lubali." 
Leviticus13:5 Shimapepo kabili panuma ya nshiku cine lubali, ali nokumupima bwino bwino. Nga asanga ukuti ifilonda fya uyu muntu filifye umo fyabela, kabili tafilundulukile mu nkanda yakwe, ali nokumusunga ifi fine pa nshiku na shimbi cine lubali." 
Leviticus13:6 Elyo kabili panuma ya nshiku na shimbi cine lubali, shimapepo ali nokumupima uyu muntu. Lelo nga asanga nalyo line ubulwele tabulundulwike nabucepa, lyena shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti alifye bwino, takowela, tupumbafye twamufulwime. Uyu muntu afwile asamba ifyakufwala fyakwe, ninshi asangululwa." 
Leviticus13:7 Nomba panuma yakwa shimapepo ilyo amweba ati nasangululwa, utupumba twafulwime twalalunduluka, afwile kabili aya kuli shimapepo." 
Leviticus13:8 Shimapepo ali nokumupima bwino bwino nakabili. Nga cakuti asanga ubulwele nabulunduluka mu nkanda, shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela. Ubulwele bwakwe bulambukila." 
Leviticus13:9 “Ngo muntu umo alwala ubulwele ubwambukila ubwankanda, ali nokutwalwa kuli shimapepo." 
Leviticus13:10 Shimapepo nao ali nokumupima bwino bwino. Nga asanga ukuti pa nkanda apafimbile napabuuta elyo na mapipi nayo nayabuuta, no kumona ukuti pali icilonda apafimbile," 
Leviticus13:11 awe ubu bulwele bwankanda ubushiputuka, na shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela. Kabili talingile no kumusunga eka pa nshiku shakulolela iyoo, pantu ninshi wena alikowela nakale." 
Leviticus13:12 “Nga cakuti ubulwele bwakumana umubili onse, ukutendekela ku makasa ukufika na ku mutwe, shimapepo ali nokuya no kumuceceta nakabili." 
Leviticus13:13 Nga asanga ukuti cine cine ubulwele nabukumana umubili onse, ninshi shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nasanguluka apo ubulwele tabuli bwa lwambu. Pa mulandu wakuti inkanda ya mubili wakwe onse nayaluka iyabuuta, kanshi nomba uyu muntu untu asanguluka." 
Leviticus13:14 Nomba ilyo lyonse icilonda icipya capuka pa mubili wakwe, uyu muntu aba uwakowela." 
Leviticus13:15 Kabili ilyo lyonse shimapepo amona ici cilonda icipya icamupuka, ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela. Pantu icilonda akwata camukowesha, kabili bulwele ubwambukila." 
Leviticus13:16 Lelo ici cilonda icibishi nga cayaluka icabuuta, uyu muntu afwile aya kuli shimapepo kabili." 
Leviticus13:17 Elyo shimapepo ali nokumuceceta bwino bwino. Nga amona icilonda cine cine cili icabuutuluka, shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nasanguluka. Tali nomba uwakowela iyoo." 
Leviticus13:18 “Nga cakuti umuntu umo icipute capuka pa mubili wakwe no kupola capola," 
Leviticus13:19 elyo apo pene apali icipute pafimba, no kubuutuluka pabuutuluka, nangu pakashikila no kubuuta paba no tupumba, uyu muntu ali nokuya kuli shimapepo." 
Leviticus13:20 Shimapepo nao ali nokumuceceta. Nga asanga ukuti ubulwele bwalingila kale mu mubili no bupipi nabubuutuluka, shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela. Ubulwele ubwa lwambu ubo akwete bufuminefye pantu pali icipute." 
Leviticus13:21 Lelo nga cakuti ilyo shimapepo amuceceta, asanga tapali ubupipi ubwabuuta, kabili icilonda tacili icakashika lelo naceluka, lyena shimapepo ali nokumusunga eka mu cifulo pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Leviticus13:22 Nomba nga cakuti ubulwele bwalalundulukilakofye, lyena shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela. Ubulwele bwakwe bwa lwambu." 
Leviticus13:23 Icilonda nga tacilundulwike no kukumana monse monse mu mubili, awe ninshi cibalafye ca cipute, na shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nasanguluka." 
Leviticus13:24 “Nga cakuti umuntu umo apya umulilo, elyo apo apya pakashikila no kubuutulukila, nangu pabuutuluka no kutukuma," 
Leviticus13:25 shimapepo ali nokuceceta uyu muntu. Nga asanga ukuti amapipi yalipo nayabuuta, kabili napatobonkela, lyena ninshi bulwele ubwambukila ebufumine apo acipya. Shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela. Ubulwele akwete bwankanda ubwambukila." 
Leviticus13:26 Nomba amapipi ayalipo nga tayali ayabuuta no kutobonkela nako tapatobonkele ne cilonda naco naceluka, lyena shimapepo ali nokusunga uyu muntu eka mu cifulo pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Leviticus13:27 Panuma ya nshiku cine lubali, shimapepo ali nokuceceta uyu muntu. Nga amona ukuti ubulwele bwakwe bulesalangana mu mubili onse, shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela. Ubulwele bwakwe ubu ubwankanda, bwa lwambu." 
Leviticus13:28 Lelo, kwena icilonda nga cilifye umo cabela, no bulwele tabulundulwike lelo cabako bwino, kabili apacipya tapafimbile, lyena shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nasanguluka. Ico akwete, cibalafye ca cilonda icakupya ku mulilo." 
Leviticus13:29 “Nga cakuti umwaume nangu umwanakashi ali ne cilonda mu mutwe, nangu ku kalefulefu," 
Leviticus13:30 shimapepo ali nokuceceta ici cilonda. Nga camoneka ukuti apo apali ici cilonda napatobonkela, elyo no bupipi nabo buli ubwa mutuntula kabili ubwaswaluluka, shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela. Ici ciseseya, kabili ca bulwele ubwambukila ubwa ku mutwe na ku kalefulefu." 
Leviticus13:31 Lelo shimapepo ali nokuceceta ici cilonda, nga amona ifyo tacitobonkele no bupipi bwafiita tacikwete, lyena shimapepo ali nokubika uyu mulwele eka pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Leviticus13:32 Na pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali nga bwafika, shimapepo kabili ali nokuceceta ici cilonda. Nga ici ciseseya tacilundulwike no bupipi nabo tabusangwike ubwa mutuntula no kutobonkela nga tacitobonkele," 
Leviticus13:33 uyu mulwele ninshi bali nokumubeya umushishifye onse ukushinguluka icilonda ukushafye pa cilonda peka. Elyo shimapepo ali nokusunga uyu mulwele eka pa nshiku na shimbi cine lubali. 
Leviticus13:34 Kabili ishi nshiku nga shapwa, ali nokuceceta no kumona bwino bwino ici cilonda ifyo cili. Nga tacilundulwike no kutobonkela, lyena shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu mulwele nasanguluka. Kabili alingile nokusamba insalu shakwe no kusangululwa ninshi asanguluka." 
Leviticus13:35 Nomba nga cakuti icilonda calunduluka ilyo naebwa kale ati, nasangululwa," 
Leviticus13:36 ninshi shimapepo ali nokumuceceta nakabili. Icilonda nga cakuti calilundulukako, shimapepo tali nakubika amano kukumona imishishi ya mutuntula. Uyu muntu alikowelafye." 
Leviticus13:37 Nga cakuti nalimo shimapepo amona ifyo icilonda tacilundulwike cilifye umo cabela, elyo no mushishi uwafiita naumenapo, ninshi icilonda nacipola. Nao wine umulwele ninshi asanguluka, elyo shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti nomba uyu muntu nasanguluka." 
Leviticus13:38 “Ngo mwaume napamo umwanakashi akwata ubulwele bwa cisongo pa mubili wakwe," 
Leviticus13:39 shimapepo alingile ukumuceceta bwino bwino. Nga amona ukuti ifibala fili eyefilyako mukubuutulukila, ubu bulwele ninshi tabulaba na busanso, tupumbafye etulemutumba pa mubili. Uyu muntu, untu wasangululwa." 
Leviticus13:40 “Ngo muntu umushishi wapwa ukunukuka ukushinguluka umutwe wakwe, ashala ne pala, ninshi untu wasangululwa." 
Leviticus13:41 Nga cakuti umushishi waseseka lwa ku mpumi eko ili ipala lyabelafye, nalyo line ninshi untu wasangululwa." 
Leviticus13:42 Lelo nga cakuti uyu umuntu pepala palemoneka icilonda icakashikila no kubuutuluka nangu ni pa mpumi pene, awe ninshi ali no bulwele ubwa lwambu ubwa fibashi." 
Leviticus13:43 Shimapepo ali nokumuceceta uyu muntu. Kabili nga amona ukuti icilonda icifimbile mu mutwe wakwe nangu pa mpumi cili icakashikila no kubuutuluka nga ca bulwele bwambukila ubwankanda," 
Leviticus13:44 uyu muntu mulwele, kabili untu wakowela. Shimapepo ali nokusosa ukuti uyu muntu nakowela, pantu mu mutwe wakwe muli ifilonda." 
Leviticus13:45 “Umuntu uulwele ubu bulwele ubwambukila wena ali nokufwalafye insalu ishalepauka. Imishishi yakwe mu mutwe taili nakusakulwa, ali nokufimba pa kanwa no kulapunda ati, ‘Uushasangululwa! Uushasangululwa!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Uyu muntu ali nokuba uushasangululwa mpakafye apo ubulwele bwakwe bukapolela. Kabili ali nokwikalafye ku nse ya nkambi.” 
Leviticus13:47 “Nga cakuti insalu isho umulwele afwala shili ishakowela no kufufuma, nangu shibe sha butonge, nangu shibe ishatelela," 
Leviticus13:48 yonse insalu iyapikulwa nangu ibe iyabilwa no kutelela bwino nangufye ya butonge, yonse impapa iyanyukwa bwino, nangufye icili conse icapangilwa ne mpapa," 
Leviticus13:49 nga cakuti icisemba mu fyakufwala, nangufye ni mpapa, nangufye icapikulwa, nangufye icabilwa bwino no kutelela, nangufye conse icapangilwa ne mpapa, icili icakatapa katapa nangu ukukashikila, ala ninshi ubulwele ubu bwankanda, bulingile ukulanga shimapepo." 
Leviticus13:50 Shimapepo ali nokuceceta no kumona ifyo cifufwime no kucifumya pa fibiye ukucibika ceka pa nshiku cine lubali. 
Leviticus13:51 Ubushiku bwa cine lubali nga bwafika, ali nokuciceceta, nga amona ukuti ukufufuma kucili kuletwalilila ku fyakufwala, nangu ku capikulwa no kubilwa bwino, icampapa, nangufye icibomfeshiwa mu nshila shimbi, awe ici cintu cena bonaushi bwa kufufuma kwa bulwele bwambukila. Ici cipe cena cintu cakowela." 
Leviticus13:52 Kanshi shimapepo afwile ukucocafye ici cakufwala, nangufye conse icapikulwa no kubilwa bwino, conse ica butonge icatelela, ica mpapa yanyukwa bwino, lelo caba icakowela pa mulandu wakufufuma, cena cifwilefye ukocewa." 
Leviticus13:53 “Nomba nga cakuti shimapepo aceceta ici cintu, asanga ukufufuma takupitilile ku fyakufwala, nangu ku cilifye conse icapikulwa no kubilwa nangu ni mpapa iyanyukwa," 
Leviticus13:54 shimapepo ali nokupeela icipope cakuti ici cintu icakowela cifwile ukucapwa no kucisunga ceka pa nshiku cine lubali. 
Leviticus13:55 Elyo panuma ya nshiku cine lubali, ali nokuciceceta. Nga asanga ukuti ukufufuma takwalwike mu mimonekele, nelyo tacipitilile mukufufuma, nalyo line cicili icakowela. Coceni no mulilo, nangufye ulubali lumo elufufwime nelyo cisempe ku lubali lubiye." 
Leviticus13:56 Lelo nga ilyo shimapepo aceceta ici cintu, asanga ukuti ukufufuma takutwalilile panuma yakusamba ici cipe, lyena ali nokulepulapo ici citatilo pa cakufwala cakwe, nangu ni pa mpapa yanyukwa nangufye ni pa cintu conse icapikulwa no kubilwa bwino." 
Leviticus13:57 Nomba nga cakuti ukufufuma kwa cakufwala kwayamba nakabili, nangu ni ku fyapikulwa bwino no kubilwa, nangu cipe ca mpapa iyanyukwa, elyo nafyo fine fyatampa ukutwalilila ukufufuma, awe fyonse fyakocafye mu mulilo." 
Leviticus13:58 Icakufwala, insalu shapikulwa ne shabilwa bwino nangufye cipe ca mpapa iyanyukwa, ico bacapile no kufufuma nakupwa, nakabili fifwile ukubwekeshapo ukuficapa, lyena ninshi fyasangululwa.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Kanshi aya e mafunde yakukonka pa mulandu wa fyakufwala nga fyalafufuma. Nangufye cibe cakufwala capikulwa na masako, nangu insalu iyatelela bwino bwino nga nafikwata ifisemba fyakufufuma nangu ku cipe conse icapangilwa ne mpapa iyanyukwa, fibe fintu fyasangululwa nangufye ifyakowela." 
Leviticus14:1 Yawe aeba Mose ati," 
Leviticus14:2 “Aya e mafunde yakukonka umulwele walwala amalwele yankanda ayambukila ilyo lyonse aleleka umutuulo wakusangululwa kuli shimapepo. 
Leviticus14:3 Eico, shimapepo ali nokuya kunse ya nkambi ukuli uyu mulwele no kumuceceta bwino bwino. Nga cakuti amona ukuti napolafye bwino bwino ku bulwele bwankanda ubwambukila," 
Leviticus14:4 shimapepo ali nokukonkomesha umulwele uyu ukupeela ifyuni fibili ifyamweo ifishakowela, icimuti icalepesha ica keda na kasalu akaba no bushishi ubwakashikila, elyo no tumisambo twa hisopo. Ifi fyonse efyo umulwele afwile atuula pakuti asangululwe." 
Leviticus14:5 Elyo shimapepo ali nokukonkomesha uyu uwikete ifyuni ukuti epaile cimo pa mbale ye bumba umuli amenshi ayasuma. 
Leviticus14:6 Ali nokusenda ici coni icituntulu icishelepo, icimuti icalepesha ica keda, akasalu akakashikila no tumisambo twa hisopo no kufitumpika mu mulopa wa coni bacipaila pa menshi ayasuma." 
Leviticus14:7 Elyo shimapepo akane umulopa pa muntu uyu uulesangululwa imiku cine lubali no kusosa ukuti uyu muntu nasangululwa ku bulwele bwankanda ubwambukila. Shimapepo epakuleka icuni icituntulu ukuti cileya mu mpanga. 
Leviticus14:8 Umuntu uulesangululwa ali nokusamba ifyakufwala fyakwe, ali nokubeya umushishi no kowa, lyena ninshi asangululwa. Na panuma yakucita ifi fyonse, lyena ninshi kuti abwelela mu nkambi, lelo tali nakwingila mwi tenti lyakwe mpaka pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Leviticus14:9 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali, uyu muntu ali nokubeya umushishi nakabili. Umushishifye onse ku mutwe, umwefu, inkopyo ku menso shonse, elyo no bupipi umubilifye onse ali nokufibeya. Kabili ali nokucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse, lyena ninshi aba uwasangululwa." 
Leviticus14:10 “Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse, uyu muntu uwasangululwa ali nokuleta utwana twa mpaanga tubili utulume na kakota kamo aka mwaka umo utushaba na kalema. Afwile abikapo ne fyapekumi fitatu fya cipimo ca efa umo ifya bunga ubwapeleka bwino bwino ubwa ŋanu kabili ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta, ukuba umutuulo wa cabunga. Aya mafuta yafwile yaisula umusukupala umo." 
Leviticus14:11 Shimapepo uusangile uyu muntu ukuti nasangululwa, ali nokutwala uyu muntu ne mituulo yakwe no kufituula kuli Yawe pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Leviticus14:12 Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuulapo akana ka mpaanga kamo akalume aka mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Ali nokubikapo no musukupala umo uwa mafuta, elyo no kuya fituula kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika." 
Leviticus14:13 Shimapepo ali nokwipaila akana ka mpaanga pa ncende iyamushilo apo bepaila inama sha mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ne lambo lyakoca. Umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi cimo nge fyaba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, ifi fyonse fyakwa shimapepo. Kabili fintu ifyamushilo nganshi." 
Leviticus14:14 Shimapepo ali nokubuulapo umulopa umo uwa kana ka mpaanga akali nokutuulwa ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi, ali nokushinga uyu muntu uuli nokusangululwa ku kalebelebe ka ku kutwi kwa ku kulyo. Kabili umbi nao aushinge ku cikumo cakwe ica ku kuboko kwa kulyo, elyo na ku cikondo cikalamba ica ku lukasa lwakwe ulwa ku kulyo." 
Leviticus14:15 Kabili shimapepo ali nokubuulamo amafuta mu musukupala no kwitulwila pa lupi lwakwe ulwa ku kuboko kwa ku kuso. 
Leviticus14:16 Elyo shimapepo atumpike umunwe wakwe uwa ku kulyo uyu wakonkapo icikumo mu mafuta ayali pa lupi. Umulopa uli ku munwe, aukane imiku cine lubali pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus14:17 Kabili ali nokubuulapo amafuta yamo pa yashele pa lupi lwakwe no kuyashinga ku kalebelebe ka ku kutwi kwa ku kulyo ukwa uyu muntu uulesangululwa. Yambi amafuta ali nokuyashinga ku cikumo ca kuboko kwa ku kulyo, elyo na ku cikondo cikalamba ca lukasa lwa ku kulyo. Aya mafuta afwile ukubika pa mulu wa mulopa wa mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi." 
Leviticus14:18 Amafuta yonse ayashala pa lupi lwakwa shimapepo, yali nokubikwa pa mutwe wa muntu uulesangululwa. Ici ecilenga ukuwikishanya pakati ka muntu uulesangululwa na Yawe." 
Leviticus14:19 “Elyo kabili shimapepo ali nokuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Uyu mutuulo wakwimininako umuntu uyu uwakowela pakuti abe uwasangululwa ku fyamukowesha. Na panuma ya ifi, shimapepo ali nokwipaya inama ye lambo lyakoca," 
Leviticus14:20 no kuyatuula pa bulambo, pamo pene no mutuulo wa cabunga, kukulenga uyu mulwele abe uwasangululwa." 
Leviticus14:21 “Nga cakuti uyu muntu mulanda, takwete ifi fyonse, ninshi alifye nokuleta akana ka mpaanga kamo akalume ngo mutuulo wakutambika pakufuta pa fyabubifi, eko ali nokutuula ilambo ilikankala kuli Yawe. Kabili uyu muntu, ali nokubikapo icapekumi cimo ca cipimo ca efa icabunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, kabili ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta no kutuula uyu mutuulo wa cabunga pamo no musukupala umo uwa mafuta," 
Leviticus14:22 no twana twa fipele tubili nangu utubondo twa nkunda tubili ifyo engakwatapo, kamo ka mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, elyo kambi nako ke lambo lyakoca." 
Leviticus14:23 “Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse uyu muntu alingile aleta ifi fyonse kuli shimapepo kukumusangulwilako pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo ku cinso cakwa Yawe. 
Leviticus14:24 Shimapepo ali nokubuula umwana wa mpaanga wa mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi, pamo pene no musukupala wa mafuta, nokufimisha mumulu ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus14:25 Shimapepo ali nokwipaya akana ka mpaanga akakutuula umutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi no kubuulako umulopa umo no kuushinga ku kalebelebe ka ku kutwi kwa kulyo ukwa muntu uuli nokusangululwa. Kabili nao aushinge ku cikumo ca kuboko kwa ku kulyo elyo na ku cikondo cikalamba ca lukasa lwa ku kulyo. 
Leviticus14:26 Elyo kabili abike amafuta mu lupi lwakwe ulwa ku kuso," 
Leviticus14:27 elyo mukubomfya umunwe wakonkapo icikumo uwa ku kulyo, atumpike umunwe mu mafuta no kukana imiku cine lubali pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus14:28 Amafuta yamo ayali mu lupi ali nokusuba umo mwine acisuba pakubala umulopa uwa mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi, ku kalebelebe ka ku kutwi kwa ku kulyo ku muntu uulesangululwa, na ku cikumo ca ku kuboko kwa ku kulyo, elyo na ku cikondo cikalamba ca lukasa lwa ku kulyo." 
Leviticus14:29 Amafuta yonse ayashala mu lupi, shimapepo ali nokuyabika pa mutwe wa muntu uulesangululwa pakumufutilako kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus14:30 Elyo nomba shimapepo ali nokutuulapo akana kamo ka cipele, nangu akabondo ka nkunda, ngeto akwetepofye." 
Leviticus14:31 Elyo ukulingana napo akwatile, kamo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, elyo kambi nako nge lambo lyakoca, pamo pene no mutuulo wa cabunga. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokufutilako uulesangululwa pa cinso cakwa Yawe.”" 
Leviticus14:32 Kanshi aya e mafunde yakukonka ku muntu onse uwalwala ubulwele ubwambukila ubwankanda, nga takwete mutuulo wakuti bamusangulwilepo." 
Leviticus14:33 Yawe aeba Mose na Aroni ati," 
Leviticus14:34 “Ilyo mukengila mu calo ca Kenani, ico ine nalamupeela ukuba icuma cenu, kabili nga nabika ukufufuma ukulunduluka mu mayanda yenu," 
Leviticus14:35 umwine wa ŋanda iyi ali nokweba shimapepo ukuti, ‘Ine nimona ifilemoneka kwati kufufuma mu ŋanda yandi.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Shimapepo ilyo talati aye kukumona ifyo iyi ŋanda ifufwime, ali nokukonkomesha ukuti bafumyemo ifipe ifili ifyafufuma muli iyi ŋanda, epali bafilumbula ukuba ifyakowela nga bafileka umo mwine. Eico na panuma ya ifi, shimapepo ali nokuya kuli iyi ŋanda nokumona ifyo ili." 
Leviticus14:37 Ali nokumona bwino ifyo icibumba cifufwime. Nga amona icibumba cili icakatapa katapa nangu icakashikila umo citobonkele ukucila ifyo icibumba cili nokuba kunse," 
Leviticus14:38 ninshi shimapepo ali nokufumina panse ya ŋanda, no kusha aisala ilya ŋanda pa nshiku cine lubali."
