Leviticus14:39 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali, shimapepo ali nokubwelelamo no kuya mona bwino bwino ifili iyi ŋanda. Nga amona ukufufuma nakulunduluka ku cibumba konse," 
Leviticus14:40 ali nokubakonkomesha ukufumya amabwe yonse ayafufwime no kuyaposa kunse ya musumba uko baposa ifyakowela fyonse. 
Leviticus14:41 Afwile ukumona ukuti icibumba conse ica mukati ka ŋanda capalwa, na fyonse ifimaloba ifyo bapalile, bafwile ukuya fiposa ku ncende uko baposako ifyakowela kunse ya musumba." 
Leviticus14:42 Elyo bali nokubuula amabwe yambi no kuyapyanikishapo elintu bashingule cipya cipya icibumba. 
Leviticus14:43 “Nga cakuti ukufufuma takupwile muli iyi ŋanda panuma yakufumyako amabwe no kupala kwa cibumba elyo no kushingwililako iloba limbi," 
Leviticus14:44 shimapepo ali nokuya mona elyo nga cakuti ukufufuma nakulunduluka mu ŋanda, ninshi kufufuma kwabonaushi. Iyi ŋanda naikowela." 
Leviticus14:45 Iyi ŋanda ili nokuba yakubongololafye yonse, elyo amabwe yaiko, imbao elyo ne loba lyonse bamashileko iyi ŋanda bali nokufifumisha kunse ya musumba, no kuya fiposa ku ncende iyakowela." 
Leviticus14:46 Kanshi umuntu onse uwaingila muli iyi ŋanda ilyo icili iyaisalwa, ali nokukowela mpakafye inshita ya cungulo." 
Leviticus14:47 Kabili no muntu onse uwasendamamo nangufye ukulilamo ifyakulya, afwile ukuya capa ifyakufwala fyakwe." 
Leviticus14:48 “Lelo nga cakuti shimapepo ayamona iyi ŋanda ukuti ilifye bwino, ukufufuma takutwalilile panuma yakuishingula cipya cipya, ali nokusosa ukuti iyi ŋanda naisangululwa, pantu ukufufuma nakupwa." 
Leviticus14:49 Pakusangulula iyi ŋanda shimapepo ali nokubuula ifyuni fibili, icimuti icalepesha ica keda, akasalu akakashikila elyo no tumisambo twa hisopo." 
Leviticus14:50 Shimapepo ali nokwipaila icuni cimo pa nongo ye bumba umuli amenshi ayalengama. 
Leviticus14:51 Elyo ali nokubuula ulukuni lwa keda, utumisambo twa hisopo, ubushishi bwakashika ce elyo ne cuni icili no mweo no kufitumpika mu mulopa wa cuni bacipaya na mu menshi ayalengama elyo nokukana ku ŋanda imiku cine lubali." 
Leviticus14:52 Shimapepo ali nokusangulula iŋanda ku mulopa wa cuni, amenshi ayalengama, icuni icamweo, ulukuni lwa keda, utumisambo twa hisopo elyo no bushishi bwakashika ce." 
Leviticus14:53 Panuma ya ifi fyonse shimapepo nomba ali nokuleka icuni icili icituntulu cileya mu mpanga. Na muli uyu musango, emo shimapepo ali nokufutilako iyi ŋanda, nayo ninshi yasangululwa.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Kanshi aya e mafunde yakukonka palwa malwele ya nkanda ayambukila, ifiseseya," 
Leviticus14:55 ukufufuma kwa nsalu nangu iŋanda," 
Leviticus14:56 nangu ukulafimba, ifipumba pa mubili, nangu ukusebeka pa nkanda," 
Leviticus14:57 pakulangilila ukuti icintu calisangululwa nangu cintu cakowela. Aya e mafunde palwa malwele ya nkanda ayambukila elyo no kufufuma. 
Leviticus15:1 Yawe aeba Mose na Aroni ati," 
Leviticus15:2 “Ebeni abena Israeli no kutila kuli bena, ‘Umwaume onse nga ku mubili wakwe kulepompa, ninshi ukupompa kwakwe kuntu kwakowela." 
Leviticus15:3 Umubili wakwe nangufye utwalilile ukupompa, nangufye wacilika nalyo line ninshi untu wakowela. Ifi efyo ukupompa kwa mubili wakwe kuli nokumulenga ukuba uwakowela.’" 
Leviticus15:4 “Ubusanshi bonse ubo uyu muntu uulepompa asendamapo, nabo bwine buli nokuba ubwakowela, ne cipuna conse ico ekalapo naco cine cintu cakowela." 
Leviticus15:5 Umuntu onse uwaikata ku busanshi bwakwe afwile acapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:6 Kabili uyo onse uwaikala apo uyu muntu uulepompa acikala, nao wine afwile acapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:7 “Umuntu onse uwaikata kuli uyu muntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa, afwile acapa ifyakufyala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:8 Nalimo nga cakuti umuntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa asaka umuntu umo amate, uyu muntu asakile amate nga ali uwasangululwa, ninshi uyu muntu aba uwakowela. Afwilefye ukucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpakafye icungulo." 
Leviticus15:9 “Icintu conse ico uyu muntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa aikalapo pa lwendo naco cine ninshi cakowela. 
Leviticus15:10 Kabili uyo onse uwaikata kuli ico uyu muntu acikalapo, aba uwakowela mpaka icungulo. Elyo noyo onse uwasenda icintu conse ico acikalapo, afwile acapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:11 “Uyo onse uo umuntu umubili wakwe ulepompa, nga aikata umuntu ukwabula ukusamba ku minwe yakwe na menshi, afwile ukucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:12 “Inongo ye bumba iyaikatwako no muntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa, ifwile ukutobwa. Kabili icipe conse icapangilwa ne cimuti, cifwile ukucisamba bwino bwino." 
Leviticus15:13 “Nga cakuti uyu muntu uo umubili wakwe ulepompa apola, ali nokulolela pa nshiku cine lubali, epakusangululwa ku bulwele bwakwe. Lyena ali nokusamba ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi ayalepita, ninshi aba uwasangululwa." 
Leviticus15:14 Na pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse, afwile abuula utupele tubili nangu utubondo twa nkunda no kwisa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, no kufipeela kuli shimapepo." 
Leviticus15:15 Shimapepo nao ali nokufituula ilambo, icuni cimo ukuba umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, cimbi naco ce lambo lyakoca. Iyi e nshila shimapepo ali nokufutilako uyu muntu kuli Yawe pa mulandu wa kupompa kwa mubili wakwe." 
Leviticus15:16 “Umuntu onse umwaume nga apemena panshi, afwile acapafye fyonse ifyakufwala na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:17 Eico kanshi, icintu consefye ica nsalu nangu ica mpapa ico uyu muntu apemenepo, cifwile ukucapwa na menshi, kabili cili icakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:18 Kabili nga cakuti umwaume nga asendama no mwanakashi, kabili apema no kupema, bonse babili bafwile ukusamba na menshi. Aba bantu ninshi baba abakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:19 “Umwanakashi nga aba kumpepo, ukukowela kwakwe kuli nokuba inshiku cine lubali, kabili noyo onse uwamwikatamo ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:20 “Icintu conse ico uyu mwanakashi alalapo ilyo acili kumpepo naco cine ninshi cakowela, kabili na conse icintu ico aikalapo, naco cine ninshi cakowela." 
Leviticus15:21 Eico kanshi, uyo onse uwaikata ku busanshi bwakwe, acape ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:22 Noyo onse uwaikata ku cintu ico ekelepo, afwile acapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:23 Nangu cibefye busanshi nelyo icintu conse ico ekelepo, ilyo lyonse umbi umuntu aikatako, ninshi akowela mpakafye icungulo." 
Leviticus15:24 “Eico kanshi, umwaume onse nga asendama nankwe ilyo acili kumpepo, nao wine ninshi aba uwakowela pa nshiku cine lubali. Ubusanshi bonse ubo asendamapo ninshi bwakowela." 
Leviticus15:25 “Umwanakashi nga alapompa pa nshiku ishingi pa nshita ashili kumpepo nangu ukupompa kwakwe kwapitilila ilyo aba kumpepo, ali nokuba uwakowela lintu atwalilila ukupompa, nga filya fine ciba lyonse ilyo aba kumpepo." 
Leviticus15:26 Ubusanshi bonse asendamapo ilyo ukupompa kwatwalilila, ninshi buntu bwakowela nga filya fine ubusanshi bwakwe buba ilyo ali kumpepo. Na conse icintu aikalapo, ninshi cakowela nga filya fine ciba ilyo ali kumpepo." 
Leviticus15:27 Umuntu onse uwaikata kuli ifi fintu, nao wine ninshi akowela. Afwile ukusamba ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo." 
Leviticus15:28 “Ilyo uyu mwanakashi asanguluka, ukupompa kwapwa, ali nokulolela pa nshiku cine lubali. Panuma ya ifyo uyu mwanakashi ninshi aba uwasangululwa." 
Leviticus15:29 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse, uyu mwanakashi ali nokubuula utupele tubili nangu utubondo twa nkunda tubili no kutwala kuli shimapepo pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Leviticus15:30 Shimapepo nao ali nokutuulapo kamo, ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, kambi nako nge lambo lya cakoca. Na muli uyu musango emo shimapepo ali nokufutilako uyu mwanakashi kuli Yawe pa mulandu wa kukowela kwakwe palwa kupompa." 
Leviticus15:31 “Kanshi muli nokutalusha abena Israeli ku fintu ifingabalenga ukuba abakowela, epakuti tabafwilile mu kukowela kwabo pakukowesha Itenti lyandi ilyaba pakati kabo.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Aya e mafunde yakukonka ku mwaume uo umubili wakwe ulepompa, onse uwakowela pakupemena panshi," 
Leviticus15:33 ku mwanakashi uuli kumpepo, umwaume nangu umwanakashi uo umubili wakwe ulepompa na ku mwaume uwasendama no mwanakashi uwakowela." 
Leviticus16:1 Yawe aebele Mose panuma ya mfwa ya bana baume bakwa Aroni ilyo bapalamine ku cinso cakwa Yawe ati," 
Leviticus16:2 “Eba munonko Aroni ukuti elaisa mu muputule wamushilo icine cine pa nshita iyo umwine alefwailapo ukwishila kunuma ya cisalu cacingako pa ntanshi ya Nkupiko apakufutilwapo ifyabubi iyaba pa mulu wa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, limbi kuti afwa. Pantu ine nakulamonekela mwikumbi pa mulu wa Nkupiko ya Mbokoshi apakufutilwapo ifyabubifi." 
Leviticus16:3 “Ifi efyo Aroni afwile ukulaingila mu cifulo camushilo. Ali nokuleta iciponti ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi elyo na sukusuku nge lambo lya cakoca. 
Leviticus16:4 Ali nokufwala umwingila wamushilo uwatelela na kaputula wa nsalu iyatelela mukati. Ali nokukaka ilamba lya nsalu iyatelela mu musana no kupomba insalu iyatelela ku mutwe. Fyonse ifi ifyakufwala, fyamushilo. Eico intanshi talafwala, alingile ukowa umubili onse na menshi." 
Leviticus16:5 Kabili ku lukuta lwa bena Israeli kuli nokufuma imbushi ishilume shibili isha mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, elyo na sukusuku umo we lambo lya cakoca." 
Leviticus16:6 “Aroni nao ali nokutuula cilume wa ŋombe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, pakuifutila umwine na ba ŋanda yakwe." 
Leviticus16:7 Eico kanshi, ali nokubuula imbushi shibili no kutuula kuli Yawe pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Leviticus16:8 Elyo apendule no kumona ifyo ishi mbushi shibili shili nokwakanishiwa. Ukupendula kumo kube kwakwa Yawe elyo kumbi nako kuli Asaseli. 
Leviticus16:9 Aroni ali nokuleta imbushi iyo ukupendula kwawila kuli Yawe no kuileka ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Leviticus16:10 Lelo imbushi iyo ukupendula kwawila kuli Asaseli, yena ali nokuileta iyituntulu ku cinso cakwa Yawe, mukufutilako pa fyabubifi no kuitamfisha mu matololo kuli Asaseli." 
Leviticus16:11 “Aroni ali nokuleka cilume wa ŋombe umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwakwe mukuifutila kuli Yawe umwine pamo pene na ba ŋanda yakwe. Kabili ali nokwipaya uyu cilume wa ŋombe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Leviticus16:12 Ali nokubuula icifukilisho icaisulapo amalasha ya mulilo ukufuma pa bulambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe no bubani indupi shibili no kutwala kunuma ya cisalu icacingako umuputule wamushilo icine cine. 
Leviticus16:13 Ali nokubika ububani pa mulilo ukuba icakusekesha Yawe. Elyo nomba icushi ca bubani cili nokufisa Inkupiko apakufutilwapo ifyabubifi iyili pa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, epakuti tafwile." 
Leviticus16:14 Aroni ali nokutumpika umunwe wakwe mu mulopa wakwa cilume wa ŋombe no kuukana pa Nkupiko ya Mbokoshi apakufutilwapo ifyabubifi. Elyo na umbi ali nokuukana imiku cine lubali pantanshi ya Nkupiko apakufutilwapo ifyabubifi. 
Leviticus16:15 “Elyo lyena Aroni ali nokwipaya imbushi ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi bwa bantu no kutwala umulopa waiko kunuma ya cisalu icicingako Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, kabili umulopa wine uyu ali nokuubomfya filya fine acibomfya umulopa wakwa cilume wa ŋombe. Ali nokuukana ku Nkupiko ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano elyo na kuntanshi kwine." 
Leviticus16:16 Kanshi na mu nshila iyi, emo ali nokufutilako icifulo camushilo icine cine pa mulandu wa kukowela na bucisanguka bwa bena Israeli mu musango onse uo babifishamo. Aroni ali nokucita cimo cine na kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo ilyaba pakati ka nkambi yabo ilyo bakowela." 
Leviticus16:17 Takuli muntu nelyo umo uwakuba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pa nshita Aroni aingilamo mukufuta mu cifulo camushilo, kanofye ilyo afumamo panuma yakuifutilako umwine eka elyo na ba ŋanda yakwe pamo pene no lukuta lonse lwa bena Israeli." 
Leviticus16:18 “Kabili ali nokufuma no kuya ku bulambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe no mulopa umo uwakwa cilume wa ŋombe na umo uwa mbushi no kuushinga ku nsengo shonse isha bulambo pakubusangulula. 
Leviticus16:19 Elyo atumpike umunwe mu mulopa no kukana ku bulambo imiku cine lubali ukuti busangululwe ukufuma ku kukowela kwa bena Israeli bonse. 
Leviticus16:20 “Ilyo Aroni apwisha ukufutilako Umuputule wamushilo icine cine, Itenti Lyakukumaninamo pamo pene no bulambo, ali nokuleta nomba imbushi iyituntulu." 
Leviticus16:21 Aroni ali nokutambalikilapo amaboko yakwe pa mutwe wa mbushi iyituntulu no kulumbula ifibi fyonse na bucisanguka bwa bena Israeli, ububifi bwabo bonse, no kufitulika fyonse pa mutwe wa mbushi. Elyo nomba panuma ya ifi fyonse, ali nokubuula iyi mbushi nokuitamfisha mu matololo ku muntu umo uwasontwa ukubomba uyu mulimo." 
Leviticus16:22 Imbushi ine iyi eili nokusenda ububifi bonse mu ncende umushaba bantu, na uyu muntu uwasalwa ukusenda iyi mbushi ali nokuileka ukuya mu matololo." 
Leviticus16:23 “Elyo Aroni ali nokuya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kufuula ifyakufwala fya bushimapepo, ifyo acifwala pakwingila mu Muputule wamushilo icine cine, no kufisha mulya mwine mwi Tenti." 
Leviticus16:24 Aroni ali nokowa umubili onse na menshi mu ncende yamushilo elyo nokufwala ifyakufwala fyakwe. Nga apwisha ukufwala, ali nokuya panse mukuleka ilambo lyakoca ilyakwefye umwine ne lambo lyakoca ilya bantu bonse, mukuifutilako umwine elyo na bantu bonse." 
Leviticus16:25 Kabili ali nokoca aya mafuta pa bulambo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi. 
Leviticus16:26 “Uyu muntu uwasendele imbushi no kuya ileka ileya kuli Asaseli, ali nokucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi. Elyo nomba kuti aingila mu nkambi." 
Leviticus16:27 Cilume wa ŋombe pamo pene ne mbushi ifyalekelwe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, no mulopa wafiko watwalwa mu Muputule wamushilo icine cine nga ifyakuifutilako kuli Yawe, fifwile ukufifumisha kunse ya nkambi. Imikupo yafiko, iminofu ne fya mu mala fyonse fili nokocewa." 
Leviticus16:28 Umuntu uwaoca ifi fyonse afwile ukucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi. Elyo nomba panuma kuti aingila mu nkambi.” 
Leviticus16:29 Kabili Yawe akonkomesha ukuti, “Ili e funde mufwile mulekonka lyonsefye. Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo mu mweshi walenga cine lubali, mufwile ukuikanya no kukanabombamo imilimo yonse, imwe mwe bene, umwikalacalo nangu umweni uo mwikala nankwe." 
Leviticus16:30 Pantu pa bushiku bwine ubu, ebo muli nokufutilwako kuli Yawe pa bubifi bwenu pakuti musangululwe. Muli iyi nshila muli nokuba abasangululwa ku cinso cakwa Yawe, ukufuma ku bubifi bwenu bonse." 
Leviticus16:31 Ubu bushiku bwe Sabata ubwakutuusha no kuikanya, bwakuishishamo mwe bene. Ici e cipope camuyayaya ico mufwile ukulakonka." 
Leviticus16:32 Shimapepo uwasubwa kabili uwalashikwa kukuba shimapepo, uwapeelwa na maka ayakuba pa malo yakwa wishi, eulifye nokufutilako abantu bonse kuli Yawe. Ali nokufwala ifyakufwala fya bushimapepo," 
Leviticus16:33 no kufutilako icifulo camushilo, Itenti Lyakukumaninamo, pamo pene no bulambo, na bashimapepo bonse, elyo na bantu bonse aba lukuta." 
Leviticus16:34 “Ili lili nokuba e funde ilyamuyayaya kuli imwe, ilyakufutilako umuku umo mu mwaka pa bubifi bonsefye ubwa bena Israeli.” Kabili ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose, efyo acitile." 
Leviticus17:1 Yawe atile kuli Mose," 
Leviticus17:2 “Eba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume na bonse abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena, ‘Ifi efyo Yawe akonkomeshe ifyakutila," 
Leviticus17:3 onse umwina Israeli uwaipaya iŋombe nangu impaanga nangu imbushi, mu nkambi nangu kunse ya nkambi," 
Leviticus17:4 ukwabula ukuti ailete pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kupeela ngo mutuulo kuli Yawe, pantanshi ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa, uyo muntu ninshi ali no mulandu wakusumya umulopa. Nasumya umulopa, eico ena uyu wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi." 
Leviticus17:5 Ifi emukutila abena Israeli baleke ukuleta inama isho bepaile kumbi ukuba ishe lambo, lelo baleleta inama she lambo lyakwa Yawe pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo kuli shimapepo no kwisa fituula nge lambo lya mutuulo wakwampana." 
Leviticus17:6 Shimapepo nao ali nokukana umulopa ku bulambo bwakwa Yawe, pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, no koca amafuta ukuba umutuulo wa cena icisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Leviticus17:7 Ifi ni pakuti tabafwile kabili ukutuula imituulo imbi iya malambo ku tulubi twa mbushi uto baicitileko bucilende pakutukonka. Ili e funde lyamuyayaya kuli bena na ku nkulo shonse ishili nokukonkapo.’ 
Leviticus17:8 “Sosa kuli bene auti, ‘Uyo onse umwina Israeli nangufye mwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe, nga atuula ilambo lyakoca, nangu ilambo limbifye," 
Leviticus17:9 nomba nga taletele ifi ku mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kutuula ili lambo kuli Yawe, uyo muntu wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi.’" 
Leviticus17:10 “Uyo onse umwina Israeli nangufye mwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe uulya umulopa onse, Yawe ali nokumupeela umulandu pakulya umulopa kabili ena wakutamfyafye mwibumba lya bantu bakwe." 
Leviticus17:11 Pantu ubumi bwa cibumbwa conse bwaba mu mulopa, kabili eico ngupeelela kuli imwe ukuba icakumufutilako pa bulambo. Ala mulopa eufutilako ubumi bwa muntu." 
Leviticus17:12 Eico ndeeba abena Israeli ukuti, ‘Takuli umuntu nelyo umo uufwile ukulya umulopa, nangu umwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe.’" 
Leviticus17:13 “Umwina Israeli onse, nangufye mwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe, uwaipaya inama nangufye icuni ico abantu balya, afwile asumisha umulopa panshi no kushiikapo ne loba." 
Leviticus17:14 Pantu ubumi bwa cintu conse icamweo bwaba mu mulopa. Uyu wine e mulandu naebela abana ba Israeli ukuti, ‘Tamufwile ukulya umulopa wa camweo conse, pantu ubumi bwa cintu conse bwaba mu mulopa.’ Eico na onse uwalya umulopa, wakutamfyafye mwibumba lya bantu bakwe." 
Leviticus17:15 “Uyo onse umwikalacalo nangufye mwinafyalo uwalya inama iyaifwila, nangu iyaikatwa ku fiswango, afwile acapa insalu shakwe no kowa umubili onse na menshi, kabili ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka icungulo, elyo ninshi engaba uwasangululwa." 
Leviticus17:16 Nga cakuti tacapile ifyakufwala fyakwe elyo no kowa umubili onse, awe ali nokupeelwa umulandu.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus18:2 “Eba abana ba Israeli nokutila kuli bena, ‘Nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus18:3 Imwe nomba mwilacita nga filya ficita abena Egupto kulya mwaikele, kabili tecakwesha ukulacita ifintu nga filya bacita mu calo ca Kenani uko ndemutwala. Mwilakonka imicitile yabo." 
Leviticus18:4 Mufwilefye ukulabeela amafunde yandi no kucita ifyo mfwaya. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu. 
Leviticus18:5 Mulebaka ifyo ine mfwaya na mafunde yandi yonse, pantu umuntu uubeela aya mafunde, ni ku mafunde akekalila umumi. Nine Yawe.’" 
Leviticus18:6 “Umuntu onse talingile ukusendama no wa mu lupwa lwakwe nelyo umo. Nine Yawe. 
Leviticus18:7 “Tecakwesha ukusebanya wiso mukusendama na noko. Uyu wena ni noko. Wiyesha ukusendama nankwe. 
Leviticus18:8 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na bambi bamukawiso, ninshi wasebanya bawiso." 
Leviticus18:9 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na nkashi yobe fumamfume, nangufye mwana wa bawiso nangu mwana wa banoko nangu afyalilwe mu ŋanda ine iyo nangu kumbi." 
Leviticus18:10 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mwishikulu obe umwana wa mwana obe umwaume, nangufye mwishikulu obe umwana wa mwana obe umwanakashi. Ici cikaleta umusebanya kuli iwe." 
Leviticus18:11 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mwana umwanakashi wa bamukawiso, pantu nao wine ni nkashi yobe." 
Leviticus18:12 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na banokosenge ba nkashi ya bawiso. Uyu wena ni munyina bawiso uwacine cine. 
Leviticus18:13 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na bamunyina ba banoko. Aba bena nabo e bamunyina ba banoko icine cine. 
Leviticus18:14 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na bamuka bamunyina wa bawiso. Ala aba bena nabo, ni banoko." 
Leviticus18:15 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na nokofyala, umukashi wa mwana obe umwaume. Ala uyu wena mukashi wa mwana obe umwaume, tecakwesha ukusendama nankwe." 
Leviticus18:16 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mukashi wakwa munonko bukwe bobe. Ici cikaleta umusebanya kuli munonko. 
Leviticus18:17 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mwanakashi pamo no mwana wakwe. Kabili tecakwesha ukusendama no mwana umwanakashi uwafyalwa ku mwana wakwe umwaume, nangufye umwana mwanakashi uwafyalwa muli uyu wine mwane. Aba bena bonse lupwa ulwacine cine ulwa mupepi nankwe." 
Leviticus18:18 “Tecakwesha ukubuula munyina wa mukashi obe, bukwe bobe, ukuba umukashi umbi no kusendama nankwe ilyo umukashi obe acili umumi." 
Leviticus18:19 “Tecakwesha ukusendama no mwanakashi ilyo acili uwakowela pa nshita ilyo ali kumpepo. 
Leviticus18:20 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na muka mubiyo umwina mupalamano, no kuikowesha na ena." 
Leviticus18:21 “Tecakwesha ukubuula abana benu ukuti ebo muletuulilapo umulungu Moleki ilambo, pantu tamufwile kusebanya ishina lyakwa Lesa wenu. Ine nine Yawe." 
Leviticus18:22 “Tecakwesha ukulasendama no mwaume mubiyo ngefyo mwingasendama no mwanakashi. Ici camakankamike. 
Leviticus18:23 “Tecakwesha umuntu onse umwaume ukusendama ne nama no kuikowesha umwine kuco acita. E cimo cine no mwanakashi onse tafwile kusendama ne nama, camusebanya nganshi." 
Leviticus18:24 “Tecakwesha ukuikowesha mu nshila sha misango iyi. Pantu iyi ine e misango iyakoweseshe imishobo ya bantu bonse, abo ndetamfya ku cinso cenu." 
Leviticus18:25 Kanshi ne calo casangwike icakowela, eico nacikandile pa mulandu wa bubifi bwaciko. Kabili ici calengele nokuti ne calo cine cibakaane no kubatamfya." 
Leviticus18:26 Nomba imwe mufwile mulebaka amafunde yandi ne fipope fyandi. Tamufwile kucita ifyamakankamike, imwe bonse abafyalilwa mu calo pamo pene na beni abo mwaikala nabo." 
Leviticus18:27 Ifi fintu fyonse fyacitilwe na bantu abaikele mu calo ici ilyo imwe tamulaisamo. Ici calo elyo cakowelele. 
Leviticus18:28 Eico na imwe nga mwakowesha ici calo, na imwe bene cikamukaana ngefyo cakeene imishobo iyaikelemo." 
Leviticus18:29 “Umuntu onse uwacitapo cimo pali ifi ifyamakankamike, uyu muntu wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi." 
Leviticus18:30 Eico kanshi imwe mufwilefye ukucita ifyo ine mfwaya. Tecakwesha ukukonkelela intambi ishamuselu ishalekonkwa ilyo tamulaisa. Kabili tecakwesha ukuikowesha mwe bene kuli ifi. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.” 
Leviticus19:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus19:2 “Eba ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli ukutila kuli bena, ‘Muleisunga mukuba abamushilo, pantu ine, ne Yawe Lesa wenu, ndi wamushilo.’" 
Leviticus19:3 “Onsefye uwa muli imwe afwile ukulacindika nyina pamo na wishi, kabili afwile ukulabaka ne nshiku shandi ishe Sabata. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus19:4 “Tecakwesha nangu panono ukufuma ku cinso candi no kuya mukupepa utulubi utwaengwa ne fyela, imilungu mwaipangila mwe bene. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus19:5 “Ilyo mwalatuula umutuulo we lambo lyakwampana kuli Yawe, mulingile ukutuula mu musango namukonkomeshe ukutuulilamo ilambo lyakwampana, pakuti ilambo lyenu libe ilyapokelelwa." 
Leviticus19:6 Ubushiku bwine ilambo lyatuulilwapo elyo mufwile ukulya, nangu mu bushiku bwakonkapo. Ilambo lyonse ilyashalapo ukufika pa bushiku bwakulenga shitatu, lifwilefye ukocewa." 
Leviticus19:7 Lelo nga cakuti mwalyako kamo pali ubu bwine bushiku bwacitatu, awe ninshi ili lambo lyaba ilyakowela, no kupokelelwa teti lipokelelwe." 
Leviticus19:8 Eico uyo onse uwalyako, ali nokuba no mulandu wakusaalula icamushilo icituulilwe kuli Yawe. Uyu muntu wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi." 
Leviticus19:9 “Ilyo lyonse mwalasombola ifilyo mu mabala yenu, tecakwesha ukusombola ukufika na mu mpela ya mabala yenu, nangufye ukusolosota tonse mu busomboshi bwenu." 
Leviticus19:10 Tecakwesha ukuya mwibala lya myangashi umuku wacibili mukutola no kusaba ifitwalo fya myangashi ifyashele. Ifi fyonse filekeleni abalanda pamo na benafyalo. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu. 
Leviticus19:11 “Mwilaiba. “Mwilabepa bufi. “Mwilacenjeshanya. 
Leviticus19:12 “Mwilalapa mwishina lyandi umulapo wabufi no kusebanya ishina lyakwa Lesa wenu. Nine Yawe. 
Leviticus19:13 “Wilaliila umunobe pa mutwe nangu ukumwibila. “Wilasunga malipilo ya muntu uwakubombela ukushinta na ku bushiku bwakonkapo. 
Leviticus19:14 “Wilalapisha nkomamatwi, nangu ukubika icakuipununako kuntanshi ya mpofu, lelo ube uwakatiina kuli Lesa obe. Nine Yawe." 
Leviticus19:15 “Wilaba na lufyengo mu bupingushi. Wilawililila ku lubali lwa mulanda nangufye ukutiina umukankala no kumusekesha, lelo ubupingushi bobe ku mubiyo bube ubwalinga." 
Leviticus19:16 “Wilaamba munobe mukusabankanya ifyabufi. Kabili tecakwesha ukucita icintu cimo icakuleta ubusanso ku bumi bwa mubiyo. Nine Yawe. 
Leviticus19:17 “Wilakwatila munonko impatila mu mutima obe. Ulingilefye ukukalipila munonko ukwabula ukupita mumbali, pakuti bonse tamuwilile mu kubifya kumo kwine." 
Leviticus19:18 “Wilalandula pa cintu conse icabipa, nangufye ukutwalilila ulupato mu mutima obe ku bantu bobe bonsefye. Lelo uletemwa umubiyo ngefyo waitemwa we mwine. Nine Yawe." 
Leviticus19:19 “Mulebaka amafunde yandi. “Mwilalenga ifitekwa fibili ifya misango iyapusana kutamfyanya. “Tecakwesha ukubyala imbuto sha misango ibili mwibala limo. “Tecakwesha ukufwala insalu yapikulwa no bushishi bwa misango ibili. 
Leviticus19:20 “Nga cakuti umwaume umo asendama no mwanakashi uucili umusha, uo balaya ku mwaume umbi, lelo uyu mukashana talati alubulwe nangu ukuba umuntungwa, balingile ukupeelwa umulandu no kukandwa. Lelo nangu cibe ifi, tabalingile ukupingulwa ukufwa iyoo, pantu uyu mukashana umusha talaba umuntungwa." 
Leviticus19:21 Lelo umwaume afwile ukuleta sukusuku pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi kuli Yawe. 
Leviticus19:22 Elyo shimapepo ali nokubuula sukusuku wa mutuulo wakufutila pa fyabubifi nokufutilako uyu muntu pafyo acita kuli Yawe. Elyo no bubifi bwakwe bukelelwa. 
Leviticus19:23 “Ilyo mukengila mu calo ca Kenani no kulimba umuti uuli onse uwa fitwalo, mukamone ukuti ifitwalo fyauko fintu fyabindwa kuli imwe. Pa myaka itatu fikaba ifyabindwa. Tamulingile ukulyako iyoo." 
Leviticus19:24 Mu mwaka walenga bune, fyonse ifitwalo fili nokuba ifyamushilo, ifya mutuulo wakutashishako Yawe." 
Leviticus19:25 Lelo mu mwaka walenga busano, lyena na imwe muli nokulyako ifitwalo. Na muli uyu musango ubusomboshi bwenu buli nokufulilako. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus19:26 “Tecakwesha ukulya inama iyicilimo no mulopa. Tecakwesha ukulabuka nangufye ukulowa. 
Leviticus19:27 “Tecakwesha ukubeya mu mbali ya mutwe, nangufye ukuputulako ku mpela ya myefu yenu." 
Leviticus19:28 “Tecakwesha ukulatetaula imibili yenu umuntu nga afwa, nangu ukuikomaula inembo pa mubili. Nine Yawe." 
Leviticus19:29 “Tecakwesha ukusebanya abana benu abanakashi mukubacita bacilende, pantu nga mwacita ifyo icalo cikesulamo bacilende beka beka no bubifi." 
Leviticus19:30 “Mulingile ukulasunga no kucindika inshiku shandi she Sabata. Mulecindika ne cifulo candi icamushilo. Nine Yawe. 
Leviticus19:31 “Tecakwesha ukuya kuli bakabuka nangu ababomba ne mipashi. Nga efyo mwalacita, ninshi muli nokuba abakowela. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus19:32 “Mufwile lyonse ukuicefya apali abakalamba. Langeni umucinshi ku bamucilile no kukwatila Lesa wenu akatiina. Nine Yawe. 
Leviticus19:33 “Ilyo lyonse muleikala no mweni mu calo cenu, tecakwesha ukubasunga ubuluku." 
Leviticus19:34 Umweni uo muleikala nankwe aleba ngo wafyalilwa mu calo mumwenu. Mulemutemwa ngefyo mwaitemwa, pantu na imwe bene mwali abeni mu calo ca Egupto. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Mwilacita bucenjeshi ilyo mulepimina abanenu ifintu mu ntamfu, mukufina na mu bwingi." 
Leviticus19:36 Bomfyeni ifipimo fyacine cine ne fyakupiminako ifyacishinka. Efa uwacishinka na hini uwacishinka. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu, uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto." 
Leviticus19:37 Bakeni amafunde yandi yonse ne fipope fyandi fyonse, no kufikonka. Nine Yawe.”" 
Leviticus20:1 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus20:2 “Eba abena Israeli utile, ‘Umwina Israeli onse nangufye umwinafyalo onse uwikala mu Israeli uwatuula umwana wakwe ku mulungu Moleki, afwile ukwipaiwa. Ibumba lya bantu lili nokumutobaula amabwe." 
Leviticus20:3 Nkafutatila uyu muntu, kabili nkamutamfya na pebumba lya bantu bakwe. Pakutuula umwana wakwe ku mulungu Moleki, asebanya icifulo candi ne shina lyandi ilyamushilo." 
Leviticus20:4 Nga cakuti ibumba lya bantu lyasuula umulandu uo uyu muntu acita pakutuula umwana wakwe kuli Moleki no kufilwa ukuti bamwipaye," 
Leviticus20:5 ine nkamufutatila pamo no lupwa lwakwe, elyo nkamutamfya pebumba lya bantu bakwe bonse, pamo pene na bonse abakonkelela bucilende bwakupepa kuli Moleki.’" 
Leviticus20:6 “Nkafutatila uyo onse uukangalukila no kuya kuli bakabuka nangu ababomba ne mipashi, no kucita nabo bucilende bwakukonka ifyo bacita, kabili ndi nokumutamfya pebumba lya bantu bakwe." 
Leviticus20:7 Muleba abasanguluka no kuba abamushilo, pantu nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus20:8 Mulebaka amafunde yandi no kuyakonka. Nine Yawe ne umulenga ukuba abamushilo. 
Leviticus20:9 “Nga cakuti umuntu alapisha wishi nangufye ni nyina, wena uyo afwile ukwipaiwa. Pa mulandu wakuti nalapisha wishi nangu nyina, umulopa wakwe ukaba pa mutwe wakwe." 
Leviticus20:10 “Kabili umuntu umwaume nga acita ubucende na muka mwine, nangu muka mwina mupalamano, bonse aba bacilende bafwile ukwipaiwa." 
Leviticus20:11 “Umwaume onse uwasendama na muka wishi, ninshi asebanya wishi. Eico bonse umwaume no mwanakashi wine, bafwile ukwipaiwa. Umulopa wabo ukaba pa mitwe yabo." 
Leviticus20:12 “Umwaume onse uwasendama na nafyala, umukashi wa mwana wakwe, bonse babili bafwile ukwipaiwa. Pantu icintu bacita, lishiku. Umulopa wabo ukaba pa mitwe yabo." 
Leviticus20:13 “Kabili umwaume nga asendama no mwaume mubiye, ifyo balala no mwanakashi, bonse babili ninshi bacita icamuselu. Eico bonse bafwile ukwipaiwa. Umulopa wabo ukaba pa mitwe yabo." 
Leviticus20:14 “Umwaume nga aupa umwanakashi kabili aupa na nyinafyala kumo, ninshi ici acita cabubifi. Bonse umwaume elyo na banakashi bene bafwile ukocewa mu mulilo, epakuti ubu bubifi bwikatwalilila pakati kenu." 
Leviticus20:15 “Umwaume onse uwasendama ne citekwa, afwilefye ukwipaiwa. Kabili ici citekwa cifwile naco ukucipaya." 
Leviticus20:16 “Umwanakashi onse nga apalama ku citekwa conse kukusendama naco, ipayeni umwanakashi pamo pene ne citekwa. Umulopa uli nokuba pa mutwe wa muntu ne citekwa cine." 
Leviticus20:17 “Nga cakuti umwaume aupa nkashi yakwe, umwana wakwa wishi nangu uwakwa nyina, kabili asendama nankwe, awe ici cena camusebanya. Aba bantu bonse bafwilefye ukubatamfya ku cinso ca bantu babo. Noyu mwaume ninshi asebanya inkashi yakwe kabili apeelwa umulandu." 
Leviticus20:18 “Umwaume onse nga cakuti asendama no mwanakashi uuli kumpepo, uyu mwaume ninshi afimbula pa ntulo ya mulopa wakwe, umwanakashi nao ninshi naifimbulapo. Aba bonse babili bakutamfyafye mu bantu babo." 
Leviticus20:19 “Tecakwesha ukusendama na bamunyina banoko nangufye ni banokosenge, pantu ici kuti casebanya uwa mu lupwa. Eico bonse babili bali nokupeelwa umulandu." 
Leviticus20:20 “Umwaume onse uwasendama na muka nalume, ninshi asebanya nalume. Bonse bali nokupeelwa umulandu. Aba bena bakafwafye ukwabula umwana." 
Leviticus20:21 “Kabili umwaume onse uwaupa muka munyina acita icakowela, asebanya munyina. Aba bena tabakakwate bana." 
Leviticus20:22 “Mulebaka amafunde yandi yonse ne fipope fyandi fyonse no kufikonka, epakuti icalo ico ndemutwalamo ciikaya mutamfya." 
Leviticus20:23 Tecakwesha ukukonkelela intambi ne mikalile ya mitundu ndetamfya muli ici calo muli nokuyamo, pantu aba bantu balecita ifi fintu balimfisha ku mukoshi." 
Leviticus20:24 “Lelo ine namwebele ukuti, ‘Muli nokubuula icalo cabo. Nkacipeela kuli imwe kukuba icuma cenu, icalo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci.’ Nine Yawe Lesa wenu, elyo nine namupatula ukufuma ku mitundu imbi." 
Leviticus20:25 “Eico kanshi mufwile ukulalekanya inama ishasangululwa ne shakowela, kabili ne fyuni ifyasangululwa ne fyakowela. Tecakwesha ukuikowesha ku nama yonse, nangu icuni, nangufye icintu conse icisenya pa mushili, emukutila fyonse ifyo napatula ukuti fintu ifishasangululwa kuli imwe." 
Leviticus20:26 Mufwile ukuba abamushilo kuli ine pantu ine ne Yawe ndi wamushilo, kabili nalimupatula ukufuma ku mitundu imbi pakuti mubefye abantu bandi." 
Leviticus20:27 “Umwaume onse nangu umwanakashi onse uubuka nangu uubomba ne mipashi afwile ukwipaiwa. Mulingile ukubatobafye amabwe. No mulopa wabo uli nokuba pa mitwe yabo.” 
Leviticus21:1 Yawe atile kuli Mose, “Eba bashimapepo, abana baume bakwa Aroni, no kutila kuli bena, ‘Shimapepo tafwile ukuikowesha umwine eka pakupalama ku citumbi ca muntu wakwe uwafwa." 
Leviticus21:2 Kanofye nga wa mu lupwa, pamo nga nyina, wishi, umwana wakwe umwaume nangu umwanakashi, ndumenankwe" 
Leviticus21:3 nangu nkashi yakwe uo bafyalwa nankwe kabili uushatala opwapo uo asunga, kuli aba wena kuti aikowesha." 
Leviticus21:4 Tafwile ukuikowesha umwine pakuya ku cililo ca ba mu lupwa lwa uko aupila pantu kuti aba uwakowela.’ 
Leviticus21:5 “Bashimapepo bonse tabafwile kubeya imishishi ya mu mitwe yabo, nelyo ukubeya umwefu ukushinguluka akanwa, nelyo ukuitetaula umubili onse." 
Leviticus21:6 Bafwile ukuba abamushilo kuli Lesa wabo kabili tabafwile kusebanya ishina lyakwa Lesa wabo iyoo. Pantu batuula umutuulo wacakoca kuli Yawe, icakulya cakwa Lesa wabo, eico bafwile baba abamushilo." 
Leviticus21:7 “Bashimapepo tabalingile ukuupa abanakashi abakoweshiwa muli bucilende nangu abanakashi abo balekapo, pantu bashimapepo bamushilo kuli Lesa wabo." 
Leviticus21:8 Bamoneni ukuti bamushilo, pantu ebatuula icakulya cakwa Lesa wenu. Eico bamoneni abamushilo pantu nine Yawe ne umulenga ukuba abamushilo pantu ndi wamushilo." 
Leviticus21:9 “Mwana shimapepo umwanakashi nga cakuti ailenga ukukanaba uwamushilo mukuba cilende, ninshi asebanya wishi. Uyu mwana wena, afwilefye ukocewa mu mulilo." 
Leviticus21:10 “Shimapepo mukalamba umo pali bamunyina, uwasubwa pakwitilwa amafuta pa mutwe, kabili uwatambalikilwapo amaboko pakuti alefwala ifyakufwala fya bushimapepo, tafwile kuleka umushishi mu mutwe wakwe ukwabula ukusakula, nangufye ukulepaula ifyakufwala fyakwe pakulanga ukuti ali ne cililo." 
Leviticus21:11 Tafwile ukufika apali umuntu wafwa. Tafwile ukuikowesha umwine iyoo, nangu cibefye ni wishi nangu nyina ebafwile." 
Leviticus21:12 Kabili tafwile nakufuma mu cifulo camushilo cakwa Lesa wakwe nangu ukucikowesha, pantu uyu shimapepo untu watuulwa ku mulimo wakwa Lesa wakwe mukusubwa amafuta. Nine Yawe." 
Leviticus21:13 “Shimapepo mukalamba afwile ukuupa umwanakashi uushatala asendamapo no mwaume. 
Leviticus21:14 Kabili tafwile kuupa mukamfwilwa, nangu uwalekwapo ku mwaume umbi, nangufye umwanakashi uwaikowesha muli bucilende, lelo ali nokubafye uushakuma ku mwaume, uwa mu bantu bakwe." 
Leviticus21:15 Lyena takakoweshe abana bakwe mu bantu bakwe. Nine Yawe, ne ulenga ukuti abe uwamushilo.”" 
Leviticus21:16 Kabili Yawe atile kuli Mose," 
Leviticus21:17 “Eba Aroni no kutila, ‘Umukonkanina inkulo, tapali umuntu nelyo umo nga cakuti aba na kalema uwakupalama mukutuula icakulya cakwa Lesa wakwe." 
Leviticus21:18 Tapali nelyo umo uwakwisa mupepi uwakwata akalema: Impofu, icilema, uwaonaika pa menso nangu uwalemana mu nshila iyili yonse," 
Leviticus21:19 uwalemana ulukasa nangu ukuboko," 
Leviticus21:20 uwaŋongo nangu intuse, uwalemana ilinso, uwafilonda fifuma amenshi nangu mutungwi." 
Leviticus21:21 Tapali uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni uuli na kalema uwakupalama no kutuula umutuulo wa cakoca kuli ine ne Yawe. Ali na kalema, eico tafwile ukupalama kuli Lesa wakwe no kupeela umutuulo wa cakulya cakwa Lesa wakwe." 
Leviticus21:22 Lelo kuti alya icakulya icamushilo nganshi icakwa Lesa wakwe pamo pene ne camushilofye. 
Leviticus21:23 Pa mulandu wakuti wena muntu wakalema, tafwile ukupalama ku cisalu icacingako nangu ku bulambo pantu kuti asaalula icifulo camushilo. Nine Yawe ne ulenga ukuti babe abamushilo.’”" 
Leviticus21:24 Awe Mose epakweba Aroni ifi fyonse pamo na bana bakwe abaume na bena Israeli bonse. 
Leviticus22:1 Yawe atile kuli Mose," 
Leviticus22:2 “Eba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ukuti balesunga no mucinshi imituulo yonse iyamushilo iyo abena Israeli bantuula ne Yawe ukuti tabasebenye ishina lyandi ilyamushilo. Nine Yawe. 
Leviticus22:3 Bebe auti, ‘Mu nkulo ishili nokukonkapo, umuntu onse uwa mu lupwa lwenu nga tali uwasangululwa elyo aisa palama mupepi ne mituulo yamushilo iyo abena Israeli batuula kuli Yawe, uyu muntu wakutamfyafye ku cinso candi. Nine Yawe.’" 
Leviticus22:4 “Umuntu onse uwa mu luko lwakwa Aroni nga alilwala ubulwele bwankanda ubwambukila, nangu uupompa, uyu wena tafwile ukulya ifilyo fya mutuulo wamushilo, mpakafye ilyo asangululwa. Kabili akaba uwakowela nga aikata ku cikoweshiwe ne citumbi nangu ku mwaume onse upemene panshi." 
Leviticus22:5 Akaba uwakowela nga akumya ku cikulika panshi conse, nangufye akumya ku muntu onse uwingamulenga ukuba uwakowela, mu musango onse uo icamukowesha cingabelamo." 
Leviticus22:6 Umuntu uwakumyako kuli ifi, ali nokuba uwakowela mpaka inshita ya cungulo. Tafwile kulyako mutuulo wamushilo mpaka asamba umubili onse na menshi." 
Leviticus22:7 Ilyo akasuba kawa, uyu muntu ninshi asangululwa. Na panuma yakusangululwa lyena ali ne nsambu yakulyako umutuulo wa fyakulya fyamushilo, pantu nomba fyaba fyakulya fyakwe." 
Leviticus22:8 Tafwile kulya icaifwila, nelyo inama iyaipaiwa ne finama fibiye ifya mpanga. Nga acita ifyo ninshi aikowesha umwine pa mulandu wakulyako. Nine Yawe." 
Leviticus22:9 “Bashimapepo bonse bali nokucita ifyo nabakonkomesha epakuti bekaba mu milandu no kufwila mu cifulo camushilo pa mulandu wakusuula amafunde yandi. Nine Yawe uubalenga ukuba abamushilo. 
Leviticus22:10 “Umuntu onse uushili wa mu lupwa lwa bushimapepo tali nakulyako umutuulo wamushilo. Nangufye mweni wine uwakwa shimapepo no mubomfifye wakwe wine tali nakulyako. 
Leviticus22:11 Lelo shimapepo nga cakuti ashita umusha no lupiya lwakwefye, nangu nga cakuti mu ŋanda mumwakwe emo umusha afyalilwa, uyu musha wena kuti alyako ifyakulya fyakwe." 
Leviticus22:12 Umwana umwanakashi uwakwa shimapepo nga aupwa ku mwaume uushili shimapepo, tali nakulyako ku musangulo wamushilo onse." 
Leviticus22:13 Lelo uyu mwana umwanakashi wakwa shimapepo nga aba mukamfwilwa, nangu nga bamulekafye nomba takwete bana, elyo abwelela kuli wishi mukwikala nga lilya ali umusepela, awe lyena kuti ayamba ukulyako ifilyo fyakwa wishi. Lelo umuntu uushasuminishiwa kulyako uyu mutuulo wa fyakulya fyamushilo, wena tafwile ukulyako." 
Leviticus22:14 “Umuntu uuli onse nga cakuti alya icakulya ca mutuulo icamushilo mukukanaishiba, afwile ukubwesesha shimapepo uyo mutuulo wamushilo alile. Kabili ali nokulundapo icacisano pa cintu conse ico alile." 
Leviticus22:15 Bashimapepo tabafwile ukusaalula imituulo yamushilo iyo abena Israeli batuula kuli Yawe 
Leviticus22:16 pakusuminisha abantu ukulalya kuli iyi mituulo yamushilo, no kulenga ukuti bakwatilapo imilandu iyo bali nokufutilapo. Nine Yawe, ne ulenga ukuti babe abamushilo.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Kabili Yawe atile kuli Mose," 
Leviticus22:18 “Eba Aroni na bana bakwe abaume na bena Israeli bonse utile kuli bena, ‘Nga cakuti umo uwa pali imwe, abe umwina Israeli nangu umweni uo mwikala nankwe mu calo ca Israeli, nga apeela icabupe ce lambo lyakoca kuli Yawe, ilambo lyakufikilisha umulapo nangu ilyakuitemenwafye umwine," 
Leviticus22:19 afwile ukupeela inama iyilume iyabula akalema ukufuma pa mukuni wakwe uwa ŋombe, impaanga nangu imbushi pakuti fipokelelwe mukumwimininako." 
Leviticus22:20 Tecakwesha ukuleta conse icili na kalema, pantu tacakapokelelwe mukumwimininako." 
Leviticus22:21 Ilyo lyonse umuntu aleta ice lambo lyakwe ukufuma pa mukuni wa ŋombe nangu impaanga kukuba umutuulo wakwampana kuli Yawe, kukufikilisha umulapo nangu umutuulo wakuitemenwa, ninshi inama ya mutuulo we lambo ifwile ukuba iyabula akalema akali konse pakuti ipokelelwe." 
Leviticus22:22 Tecakwesha ukutuula inama ye lambo iyishimona, iyacenwa nangu iyafunika, yonse iyakwata ifipumba, iya filonda ifyatukila nangu ifilesuma. Tecakwesha ukubika ishi nama pa bulambo nge lambo lya cakoca kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus22:23 Nalimo kuti mwatuula inama ye lambo lyakuitemenwa iŋombe nangu impaanga iyatusa, atemwa iyalemana mu musango uli onse lelo talili nakupokelelwa nge cakufikilishapo umulapo." 
Leviticus22:24 Tecakwesha ukutuula kuli Yawe inama ilume iyo intoyo shakwebululwa, ishatinaulwa, ishalepulwa nangu ukuputulwa. Tamufwile ukucita ifi mu calo cenu." 
Leviticus22:25 Kabili tamufwile kulapoka inama sha musango uyu ukufuma ku benafyalo no kushituula ngo mutuulo wa fyakulya kuli Lesa wenu. Tafyakapokelelwe mukumwimininako pantu fyalibamo no bulema.’” 
Leviticus22:26 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus22:27 “Ilyo lyonse iŋombe, impaanga, nangu imbushi yafyalwa, ifwile ukuba na nyina pa nshiku cine lubali. Elyo ukufuma pa bushiku bwa cine konse konse no kuya kuntanshi, awe lyena naisuminishiwa ukuba umutuulo we lambo lya cakoca kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus22:28 Tecakwesha ukwipaya iŋombe atemwa impaanga no twana twashiko mu bushiku bumo bwine. 
Leviticus22:29 “Ilyo lyonse muletuula umutuulo wakutotela kuli Yawe, utuuleni mu nshila yakuti ukapokelelwe mukumwimininako." 
Leviticus22:30 Ufwile ukuliwa pa bushiku bwine ubo mwautuula. Tewakushako nangu kamo mpaka ulucelo. Nine Yawe. 
Leviticus22:31 “Mulebaka amafunde yandi nokuyakonka. Nine Yawe. 
Leviticus22:32 Tecakwesha ukusebanya ishina lyandi ilyamushilo. Mfwile ukwishibikwa kuli imwe mwe bena Israeli ukuti ine ndi wamushilo. Nine Yawe, ne ulenga ukuti mube abamushilo," 
Leviticus22:33 kabili uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto no kuba Lesa wenu. Nine Yawe.” 
Leviticus23:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus23:2 “Eba abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena, ‘Ishi ni nshikunkulu shakwa Yawe ishasontwa mukulongana kwamushilo.’ Neshi nshiku shaba ifi:" 
Leviticus23:3 “Kwabafye inshiku mutanda isho mwingabombamo imilimo, lelo ubushiku bwalenga cine lubali bwena bushiku bwe Sabata ubwakutuusha, ubushiku bwa kulongana kwamushilo. Tamufwile kubombamo umulimo nelyo umo. Konsefye uko mwaikala, bushiku bwe Sabata kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus23:4 “Ishi ni nshikunkulu ishasontwa ishakwa Yawe, isha kulongana kwamushilo, isho mulingile ukulabila pa nshita ishasontwa." 
Leviticus23:5 “Ipasaka lyakwa Yawe, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, litendeka cilya akasuba kawa pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14), mu mweshi wantanshi." 
Leviticus23:6 Lelo mu bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15), mu mweshi wine uyo, e bushiku bwakutendekelapo inshikunkulu yakwa Yawe iya mikate iyishatutumuka. Eico mu nshiku cine lubali mufwile ukulalya imikate iyishatutumuka." 
Leviticus23:7 Pa bushiku bwantanshi mukakwata ukulongana kwamushilo, kabili mwikalabombapo imilimo ya cila bushiku." 
Leviticus23:8 Mu nshiku cine lubali mukaletuula umutuulo we lambo lya cakoca no mulilo kuli Yawe. Na pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali mukakwata ukulongana kwamushilo, kabili mwikalabombapo imilimo ya cila bushiku.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Yawe aebelele Mose ati," 
Leviticus23:10 “Eba abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena, ‘Ilyo mukengila mu calo ico ine ndi nokumupeela, no kwamba ukulobolola iŋanu, mukalete kuli shimapepo umwanshi wa ŋanu mukabalilapo ukulobolola." 
Leviticus23:11 Shimapepo ali nokutambika uyu mwanshi kuli Yawe pakuti upokelelwe mukumwimininako. Shimapepo ali nokuutambika pa bushiku ilyo Isabata lyapita. 
Leviticus23:12 Pa bushiku bwakutuula umwanshi, mufwile ukutuula nge lambo lyakoca kuli Yawe umwana wa mpaanga uwa mwaka umo uwabula akalema." 
Leviticus23:13 Mufwile ukuutuula pamo pene no mutuulo wa cabunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwa twapekumi tubili twa ku cipimo ca efa, kabili ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa, umutuulo we lambo lya cakoca ica cena cisuma icakusekesha Yawe. Kabili umutuulo wa cakunwa ufwile ukuba icipimo ca pakati ka citika wa hini wa mwangashi." 
Leviticus23:14 Tecakwesha ukulya umukate uuli onse, nangufye iŋanu ishasalulwa nangu ishipya, mpaka pali bulya bwine bushiku mukaleta uyu mutuulo kuli Lesa wenu. Ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo, uko konse mukekala.’”" 
Leviticus23:15 Yawe akonkenyepo nokuti, “Kabili ukufuma pa bushiku bwe Sabata nga bwapita, ubushiku mwaletele no kutuula umwanshi wa ŋanu ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika, mufwile ukupenda imilungu ituntulu cine lubali." 
Leviticus23:16 Kabili mukapende inshiku amakumi yasano (50) ukufika pa bushiku bukakonkapo panuma ye Sabata lyalenga cine lubali, elyo nomba mulete umutuulo wa cabunga bupya kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus23:17 Ukufumafye konse uko mukekala, cila muntu alingile ukuleta imikate ibili iyapangilwa no bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwapangilwa ku twapekumi tubili utwa ku cipimo ca efa, kabili umwaba intutumushi. Uyu e mutuulo wakutambika uwa fisabo fyantanshi kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus23:18 Ukulunda pa mikate, muli nokutuula impaanga ishilume cine lubali ishili no mwaka umo ishabula ubulema, ne ciponti na basukusuku babili. Ifi fyonse fili nokuba umutuulo we lambo lyakoca kuli Yawe, pamo pene no mutuulo wabo uwa cabunga no mutuulo wa fyakunwa, umutuulo wa cakoca uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Leviticus23:19 Kabili muli nokutuula sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, no twana twa mpaanga tubili utwa mwaka umo ngo mutuulo wakwampana." 
Leviticus23:20 Shimapepo ali nokutambika utwana twa mpaanga tubili kuli Yawe, pamo pene no mukate wa fitwalo fyantanshi, ngo mutuulo wakutambika. Ifi fyonse mutuulo wamushilo kuli Yawe uwakwa shimapepo." 
Leviticus23:21 Pali bulya bwine bushiku muli nokubilisha ukulongana kwamushilo kabili takuli nakubombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku. Ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo, uko konse mwikala." 
Leviticus23:22 “Ilyo lyonse mwalasombola ifilyo mu mabala yenu, tecakwesha ukusombola ukufika na mu mpela ya mabala yenu, nangufye ukusolosota tonse mu busomboshi bwenu. Mukaleshamo ifyakuba ifisabo fya balanda na benafyalo. Nine Yawe, Lesa wenu.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus23:24 “Eba abena Israeli utile, ‘Pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi walenga cine lubali, mufwile ukulatuushamo no kukwatamo ukulongana kwamushilo, na mapenga yali nokulalila pakusefya." 
Leviticus23:25 Tecakwesha ukulabombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku, kanofye ukutuula ilambo lya cakoca kuli Yawe.’”" 
Leviticus23:26 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus23:27 “Ubushiku bwalenga ikumi limo mu mweshi walenga cine lubali, e bushiku bwakufuta pa fyabubifi. Mulingile ukukwata ukulongana kwamushilo no kuikanya. Mutuule ilambo lya cakoca kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus23:28 Tecakwesha ukubomba umulimo nelyo umo pali ubu bushiku, pantu ubu bushiku bwakufuta pa fyabubifi, ilyo bamufutilako kuli Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus23:29 Umuntu onse uushikanya umwine pa bushiku ubu, wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi." 
Leviticus23:30 Ndi nokonaula umuntu onse uwa mu bantu bakwe uyo uwabomba umulimo pali ubu bushiku. 
Leviticus23:31 Tamulingile kubombapo umulimo nangufye panono. Ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo, uko konse mukekala." 
Leviticus23:32 Ubu bukaba bushiku bwenu bwakutuusha bwe Sabata, kabili mufwile no kuikanya mwe bene. Cili nokubafye ukufuma icungulo pa bushiku bwalenga pabula ubwa mweshi wine uyu ukufika na ku cungulo icili nokukonkapo, mufwile ukubaka ili Sabata lyenu.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus23:34 “Eba abena Israeli utile, ‘Pa bushiku bwe kumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi wa cine lubali ninshi inshikunkulu ya Nsakwe kuli Yawe yatampa kabili ili nokupwisha inshiku cine lubali." 
Leviticus23:35 Ubushiku bwakutampilapo, bushiku bwa kulongana kwamushilo. Muli ubu bushiku tecakwesha ukulabombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku." 
Leviticus23:36 Pa nshiku cine lubali mukaletuula kuli Yawe ilambo lya cakoca. Kabili pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse mukalekwata ukulongana kwamushilo no kutuula kuli Yawe ilambo lya cakoca. Uku kuli nokuba ekulongana kwa kwisalila. Tecakwesha ukubombapo umulimo wa cila bushiku nangu umo.’ 
Leviticus23:37 “Kanshi ishi e nshikunkulu isho Yawe asonta, isho mulingile ukubila ngo kulongana kwamushilo. Pakulongana muleleta kuli Yawe imituulo yakoca, amalambo ya cakoca, imituulo ya cabunga, amalambo ne fyakunwa nge mituulo iyifwaikwa cila bushiku." 
Leviticus23:38 Iyi mituulo yonse, yakulundafye pa mituulo ituulwa kuli Yawe pa nshiku sha Masabata, kabili ukulunda pa fyabupe fyenu, na pali conse ico mwalaya pamo pene no mutuulo wakuitemenwa uo mutuula kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus23:39 “Eico ukwamba pa bushiku bwe kumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi wa cine lubali, panuma yakusombola ifilyo mu mabala, mulesefya iyi nshikunkulu yakwa Yawe pa nshiku cine lubali. Ubushiku bwakubalilapo, bushiku bwakutuusha, kabili ubushiku bwa cine konse konse nabo bwine bushiku bwakutuushamo." 
Leviticus23:40 Pa bushiku bwine bwakubalilapo, mukalesaba ifitwalo ifyawamisha ukufuma ku fimiti. Mukaleteta utuncindu, amabula ya miti iyafumba ne misambo ya miti ya ku mumana, no kulasansamuka pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Leviticus23:41 Mukalesefya ici nge nshikunkulu kuli Yawe pa nshiku cine lubali cila mwaka. Ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo. Eico mulesefya mu mweshi wa cine lubali. 
Leviticus23:42 Kabili muli nokulaikala mu nsakwe pa nshiku cine lubali. Abena Israeli bonse bali nokwikala mu nsakwe," 
Leviticus23:43 epakuti abana benu abakamukonkapo bakeshibe ukuti nine nalengele abena Israeli ukwikala mu nsakwe, ilyo nabafumishe mu calo ca Egupto. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Kanshi efyo Mose aebele abena Israeli pa nshikunkulu shasontwa ishakwa Yawe. 
Leviticus24:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus24:2 “Konkomesha abena Israeli pakuti baleleta amafuta kuli iwe ayo bengulula ku miolifa ayalengama, pakuleka ulubuuto lwa fisaniko lutwalilile ukulayaka." 
Leviticus24:3 Kunse ya cisalu cakucinga ku Mbokoshi ya Cipangano mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, Aroni akalamona ukuti ifisaniko fili nokutwalilila ukwaka ifyo fine pa cinso cakwa Yawe ukufuma icungulo mpakafye ulucelo. Ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilili nokukonkwa umukakonkanina inkulo shenu." 
Leviticus24:4 Ifi fisaniko ifyaba pa cakutekapo ica golide wine wine pa cinso cakwa Yawe, fifwile ukusungwa bwino no kulayaka pe mukutwalilila.”" 
Leviticus24:5 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Buula ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino no kupangako imikate ikumi limo na ibili. Cila mukate ulebomfya utwapekumi tubili ku cipimo ca efa utwa bunga." 
Leviticus24:6 Iyi mikate mukalebika mu mitande ibili pamulu we tebulo ilyapangilwa na golide wine wine pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Cila mutande muleba imikate mutanda. 
Leviticus24:7 Pa mutande onse ulebikapo icinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icisuma icine cine, nge ciputulwa ca cibukisho cakwimininako umukate, kabili kukuba umutuulo wakutuula kuli Yawe uwa cakoca." 
Leviticus24:8 Uyu mukate Aroni ali nokuubika pa cinso cakwa Yawe lyonsefye cila bushiku bwe Sabata, mukwimininako abena Israeli nge cipangano camuyayaya." 
Leviticus24:9 Ifi fyonse fili nokuba ifyakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume lyonsefye, kabili bali nokufilila mu ncende iyamushilo. Cili nokuba ifi pantu fyamushilo nganshi pa fyakaniko fyonse ifyo bapeelwa pa mituulo iyituulwa kuli Yawe iya fyakoca.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Nomba kwali umwaume, nyina ali umwina Israeli, wishi nao ali umwina Egupto. Afumine mu ŋanda yakwe pakati ka bana ba Israeli no kuya mukulwa no mwina Israeli mukati ka nkambi." 
Leviticus24:11 Elyo uyu mwana wa mwanakashi umwina Israeli asaalwile Yawe icine cine ilyo atukile ishina lyakwe. Awe abantu bamutwele kuli Mose. Ishina lyakwa nyina ni Shelomiti, umwana mwanakashi wakwa Dibili uwa mu luko lwakwa Dani." 
Leviticus24:12 Elyo bamubikile mukulindwa mpaka bakomfwe ifyo Yawe akabeba ukucita. 
Leviticus24:13 Yawe aeba Mose ati," 
Leviticus24:14 “Fumyeni uyo muntu wamusaalula kunse ya nkambi. Kabili lekeni onse uumfwileko ku musaalula atambike amaboko yakwe pa mutwe wakwe no kuleka nomba ulukuta lonse lumutobe amabwe. 
Leviticus24:15 Elyo webe na bena Israeli utile, ‘Umuntu onse uwatuka Lesa wakwe, alifye nokupeelwa umulandu." 
Leviticus24:16 Umuntu onse uwasaalula ishina lyakwa Yawe afwilefye ukwipaiwa. Ulukuta lonse luli nokumulasa amabwe. Nelyo abefye umweni nangufye umwina Israeli, ali nokufwa nga cakuti asaalula ishina lyakwa Yawe.’" 
Leviticus24:17 “Umuntu uuli onse nga cakuti aipaya umuntu munankwe, nao wine bafwile ukumwipaya." 
Leviticus24:18 Uyo onse uwaipaya icitekwa ca munankwe, afwile ukupyanikishapo cimbi. Umweo pa mweo." 
Leviticus24:19 “Umuntu uuli onse nga cakuti acena umunankwe, ifyo fine acita ku munankwe efyo nao afwile bamucitila." 
Leviticus24:20 Nga akontwele umunankwe ifupa, nao wine bali nokumukontola ifupa, nga linso nao wine ninshi linso line, nga lino nao wine ninshi lino line. Ifyo fine umusango acenenamo umunankwe, efyo nao wine bali nokumucena." 
Leviticus24:21 Umuntu onse uwaipaya icitekwa ca mwine, afwilefye ukupyanikishapo cimbi, lelo uyo onse uwaipaya umuntu munankwe wena nao bafwile ukumwipaya." 
Leviticus24:22 Ala mufwilefye ukukwata ifunde limo line, umweni wa mu calo no mwina Israeli wine. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Eico Mose aebele abena Israeli ifi, nabo basenda uyu muntu uwamusaalula kunse ya nkambi no kumutobaula amabwe. Abena Israeli bacitile ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Leviticus25:1 Yawe alandile kuli Mose pa lupili lwa Sinai ati," 
Leviticus25:2 “Eba abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena, ‘Ilyo mukengila mu calo ico ndepeela kuli imwe, icalo conse cifwile ukutuusha mukusunga Isabata lyakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus25:3 Pa myaka mutanda mulebyala imbuto mu mabala yenu. Kabili pa myaka mutanda ine, mufwile ukutungwila ifimuti fya myangashi mu mabala yenu no kusombola ifisabo fyenu." 
Leviticus25:4 Lelo mu mwaka walenga cine lubali, icalo cifwile ukukwata ukutuusha umwaka onse uwe Sabata, nge Sabata lyakwa Yawe. Tecakwesha ukubyala amabala yenu, nangufye ukutungwila ifimuti fya myangashi yenu." 
Leviticus25:5 Tecakwesha no kusombola icintu nelyo cimo icikaimenenafye icine, nangu ukulobolola imyangashi iyo mushatungwilile. Pantu ukaba mwaka wakutuusha kwa mpanga." 
Leviticus25:6 Conse icaimenena mu mabala yenu mu mwaka wakutuusha uwe Sabata, ecikaba icilyo cenu bonse, ababomfi benu abaume na babomfi benu abanakashi, na ku babomfi bamalipilo, pamo pene na ku mweni uo mwikala nankwe." 
Leviticus25:7 Kabili na ku fitekwa fyenu fine pamo pene na ku nama sha mu mpanga yenu, conse icikafuma muli iyi mpanga ecikaba icakulya cenu.’”" 
Leviticus25:8 Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Ukalependa Amasabata cine lubali aya myaka, emukutila imyaka cine lubali imiku cine lubali, epakuti amasabata cine lubali yakalingane ne myaka amakumi yane na pabula (49)." 
Leviticus25:9 Lyena ubushiku bwalenga ikumi mu mweshi walenga cine lubali, mukalishe ipenga, likomfwike konse konse. Pa bushiku ubu ubwakufuta pa fyabubifi, mukalishe ipenga mpangafye yonse mu calo cenu." 
Leviticus25:10 Mukaleshisha umwaka walenga amakumi yasano no kulashimikila icebo cakulubuka mu calofye conse ku bekashi abekalamo. Uyu uli nokuba e mwaka wakusefya kuli imwe. Onsefye umuntu ali nokubwelelamo ku mpanga ya fikolwe fyakwe kabili na ku lupwa lwakwe. 
Leviticus25:11 Umwaka walenga amakumi yasano kuli imwe wakusefya. Muli uyu mwaka tecakwesha ukubyalamo nangu ukusombola fyonse ifilyo ifyaimenena ifine, nangu ukusaba ku myangashi mushatungwilile." 
Leviticus25:12 Pantu umwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya, mwaka wamushilo kuli imwe. Mufwile ukulyafye ifisabo ifili nokufuma mu mabala." 
Leviticus25:13 “Muli uyu mwaka wakusefya, umuntu onsefye ali nokubwelelamo ku mpanga ya fikolwe fyakwe." 
Leviticus25:14 “Nga cakutila washita impanga ku mwikalacalo munobe, nangu washitisha kuli ena, tecakwesha ukufyengana." 
Leviticus25:15 Uli nokushita iyi mpanga ku mubiyo pakumona imyaka yapitapo ilyo umwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya wapitile. Kabili ali nokushitisha iyi mpanga pakumona imyaka iyashalako iyakulobololamo ifisabo mu mabala. 
Leviticus25:16 Nga cakuti imyaka yashalako ingi, ufwile lyena walundako umutengo. Kabili nge myaka yashalako inono, ufwile nalyo line ukucefyako umutengo, pantu icintu ico uyu muntu alekushitisha te mpanga iyoo, lelo fisabo ifyo akakushamo pa myaka yashalako." 
Leviticus25:17 Tecakwesha ukulafyengana, lelo mulekwata akatiina kuli Lesa wenu. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus25:18 “Mulingile ukukonka amafunde yandi no kusakamana ukubeela ifipope fyandi fyonse, lyena elyo mukekala umutelelwe mu calo." 
Leviticus25:19 No mushili wabamo ukalatwala ifitwalo fisuma, mukalalya no kwikuta kabili mukalaikala umutelelwe mu calo." 
Leviticus25:20 “Limo kuti mwaipusha, ‘Nga tukalalya nshi muli uyu mwaka walenga cine lubali, nga cakutila tatubyele mbuto nangu ukulobolola ifisabo?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Ine, ne Yawe, nkapaala icalo ici pa myaka mutanda pakuti cikakwate ifilyo ifingi pa myaka itatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Ilyo mukalabyala ifisabo mu mwaka walenga cine konse konse, mukalalya ifyo mwasombwele mu mwaka walenga mutanda, mpakafye ilyo mukakwata ukulobolola mu mwaka walenga pabula.”" 
Leviticus25:23 Kabili Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Tecakwesha ukushitisha impanga ukuba iya umbi pe, pantu iyi mpanga yandi, imwe mulifye abeni abasuminishiwa ukwikalamofye." 
Leviticus25:24 Impanga yonse iyo mwapeelwa nge cikwatwa, mufwile ukupekanya ifyakulubula iyi mpanga." 
Leviticus25:25 Nga cakuti umwina Israeli munenu umo aba umulanda elyo ashitishako impanga yakwe, uwa mu lupwa uupaleme afwile aisa lubula iyi mpanga." 
Leviticus25:26 Nga cakuti nalimo takwetepo nelyo umo uwakumwafwilisha mukulubula iyi mpanga, lelo umwine eka nga aisa ba ne cuma icakuti ailubwilamo," 
Leviticus25:27 ali nokupenda imyaka iyo impanga yali nokushala mu minwe ya washitile. Kabili ali nokulipila indalama ukulingana ne myaka iyashala ku mwaka wakusefya. Awe lyena uyu uwali e mwine wa mpanga kale, kuti abwelela mu mpanga yakwe." 
Leviticus25:28 Lelo nga cakuti, takwete ifyuma fyakulubwilamo impanga iyi, awe ili nokubafye mu minwe ya uyu wine muntu uwaishitile mpaka umwaka walenga amakumi yasano wakusefya ukafike. Impanga ili nokubwelela ku mwine mu mwakafye wakusefya, elyo uyu muntu uwashitishe akabwelela mu mpanga yakwe." 
Leviticus25:29 “Nga cakuti umuntu ashitisha iŋanda iyaba mwilinga lya musumba, ali nokukwata insambu yakuilubula umwaka umo uutuntulu nga wapwa ukufuma apo aishitishishe. Mu nshita ilya ine, lyena kuti alubula iyi ŋanda." 
Leviticus25:30 Nomba nga cakuti talubwile iyi ŋanda, ilyo uyu mwaka utuntulu taulapita, iyi ŋanda iyaba mwilinga lya musumba ili nokuba nomba iyakwa kashita no lupwa lwakwe umukakonkanina inkulo, ninshi capwa. Tali nakuibwesesha ku mwine nangufye umwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya ukafike." 
Leviticus25:31 Lelo amayanda aya mu mishi ukushashinguluka amalinga, yena yali nokulolekeshiwapo nga yaba mu mpangafye ya calo. Yonse aya mayanda yali nokulubulwa. Yonse aya mayanda kuti yalubulwa, kuti yabwelela ku bene mu mwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya." 
Leviticus25:32 Lelo abena Levi nabakwata insambu shakulubula amayanda yabo mu misumba yabo yonse iyo bapeelwa. 
Leviticus25:33 Eico kanshi icuma ca mwina Levi cena calisuminishiwa ukucilubula, emukutila iŋanda iyashitishiwa mu musumba uuli onse untu bapeelwa ili nokubweseshiwa mu mwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya, pantu amayanda ayaba mu misumba ya bena Levi fyuma fyabo ifyaba pakati ka bana ba Israeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Lelo incende shakucemenamo ifitekwa ishashinguluka imisumba yabo tashifwile kushitishiwa, pantu shena fyuma fyabo ifya pe na pe.”" 
Leviticus25:35 “Nga cakuti umwina Israeli munenu umo aba umulanda kabili afilwa ukuisunga umwine pakati kenu, mwafweniko ngefyo mwafwilisha umwinafyalo uwikala pakati kenu, pakuti nao atwalilile ukwikala pakati kenu." 
Leviticus25:36 Tecakwesha ukupoka ukufuma kuli ena nsonsela iyili yonse, lelo mube na katiina ka kuli Lesa pakuti uyu mwikalacalo munenu atwalilile ukwikala pakati kenu." 
Leviticus25:37 Tecakwesha ukumukongwesha indalama pakuti akalundepo kansonsela ilyo akabwesha, nangufye ukumushitisha ifyakulya pakuti mumwenepo akantu kamo." 
Leviticus25:38 Nine Yawe Lesa wenu, uwamufumya mu calo ca Egupto no kumupeela impanga ya calo ca Kenani nokuti mbe Lesa wenu.”" 
Leviticus25:39 “Nga cakuti umo pa bekalacalo banenu aba umulanda pakati kenu, kabili aishitisha umwine kuli imwe, tecakwesha ukumuleka ukubomba ngo musha." 
Leviticus25:40 Mufwilefye ukumubomfya ngo mubomfi wa malipilo, nangu filya mubomfya umweni uo mwikala nankwe. Ali nokulamubombela mpakafye mu mwaka walenga amakumi yasano (50) uwakusefya." 
Leviticus25:41 Lyena uyu muntu pamo na bana bakwe ali nokulekelwako no kubwelelamo ku ba lupwa ku mpanga sha bashibo. 
Leviticus25:42 Pantu abena Israeli babomfi bandi, abo nafumishe mu calo ca Egupto, tabafwile kushitishiwa nga basha iyoo." 
Leviticus25:43 Tecakwesha ukulabasunga buluku buluku, lelo mube na katiina kuli Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus25:44 “Abasha benu abaume na banakashi abo mwingakwata, kuti bafuma ku mishobo iyo iyamushinguluka iyishaishiba Lesa. Uko eko mwingashita abasha abaume na abanakashi." 
Leviticus25:45 Kabili kuti mwashita abasha bamo ukufuma mu benafyalo abo mwikala nabo, pamo na ba mu lupwa lwabo abafyalilwa mu calo cenu. Aba bene ebengaba ifyuma fyenu." 
Leviticus25:46 Kabili kuti mwabashila na ku bana benu nge fyuma fyacishilano no kubacita abasha mpaka ne mfwa yabo. Lelo tamufwile kusunga buluku buluku abena Israeli banenu. 
Leviticus25:47 “Umwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe nga aisa ba umukankala, elyo umo umwina Israeli munenu aisa ba umulanda no kuishitisha ku mwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe, nangufye kuli lupwa lwa aba benafyalo," 
Leviticus25:48 uyu muntu ali ne nsambu yakuilubula umwine panuma yakuishitisha umwine. Na umo uwa muli bamunyina kuti amulubula," 
Leviticus25:49 nangu ni nalume, umufyala wakwe nangufye onse lupwa lwakwe uwa mu mukowa wakwe kuti amulubula. Nga cakuti umwine akwata ifyakuilubwilapo, afwile ailubula umwine." 
Leviticus25:50 Umwine no wamushitile bakapende imyaka ukufuma apo aishitishe ukufika ku mwaka walenga amakumi yasano (50) uwakusefyamo. Umutengo wakulubwilwamo uli nokulingana na malipilo ya mubomfi uwacibalo, ukukonka ne myaka ine iyo." 
Leviticus25:51 Nga cakuti imyaka yashalako yafula, uyu muntu afwilefye ukulipila ifyuma ukulingana ne myaka yashalako pakuti alubulwe." 
Leviticus25:52 Lelo nga cakuti imyaka yashalako inono apo mwaka wakusefya taulafika, alifye nokulinganya umutengo wakuilubula ne myaka yashalako." 
Leviticus25:53 Alingile ukusungwa ngo mubomfi wamalipilo cila mwaka. Mushininkishe ukuti shikulu wakwe talemusunga buluku buluku. 
Leviticus25:54 Nangu cingati uyu muntu talubwike muli ishi nshila shonse, wena pamo na bana bakwe bafwilefye ukulekelwako mu mwaka wakusefya nga wafika," 
Leviticus25:55 pantu abena Israeli babomfi bandi. Bena, babomfi bandi abo nafumishe ku calo ca Egupto. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.”" 
Leviticus26:1 “Tecakwesha ukulapanga utulubi, nangu ukwimika icintu conse ukuba icimpashanya, nangu ukusangula ilibwe ukuba ilyamushilo. Kabili tecakwesha ukwimika ilibwe ilyabaswa bwino mu calo cenu no kulifukamina mukulipepa. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Leviticus26:2 “Mulebaka Amasabata yandi, kabili mulecindika icifulo candi icamushilo. Nine Yawe." 
Leviticus26:3 “Nga mwalakonka amafunde yandi no kulabeela ifipope fyandi," 
Leviticus26:4 ine nkalamutumina imfula pa nshita iyalinga no kuleka umushili ukakwate ifisabo fisuma ne miti ikaletwala ifisabo ifisuma. 
Leviticus26:5 Ukusokola kwenu ukwa ŋanu kuli nokutwalilila mpaka inshita yakusombola umwangashi, nako ukusombola kwa mwanganshi kuli nokutwalilila mpaka ilyo mukatampa ukubyala amabala yenu. Elyo mukalalya icilyo conse mukalafwaya ukulya, no kwikala umutelelwe mu calo cenu." 
Leviticus26:6 “Ine, ne Yawe nkaleka mukaleikala umutende mu calo cenu, kabili mukalasendama utulo ukwabula ico mukalatiina. Ine nkafumya shonse inama ishabipa mu calo cenu, kabili tamwakatale amuba ubulwi." 
Leviticus26:7 Imwe mukalafulumuna abalwani benu, kabili mukalabepaya no kubacimfya." 
Leviticus26:8 Basano muli imwe bakafulumuna abali umwanda umo (100). Abali umwanda umo (100) bakafulumuna abali imyanda ikumi limo (1,000). Elyo abalwani benu mukalabepaya no kubacimfya." 
Leviticus26:9 “Ine nkamutulanyako ku balwani benu no kumulenga ukuti mukasandane no kufula mu mpendwa. Kabili ine nkabaka icipangano candi na imwe. 
Leviticus26:10 Mukalalya ifilyo mwatutile umwaka wapita ilyo mukalafitutulula mu matala yenu no kusha incende ya busomboshi ubupya. 
Leviticus26:11 Elyo nkabika ne cifulo candi pakati kenu, kabili nshakamutendwe nakalya." 
Leviticus26:12 Lyonse nkalaba na imwe no kuba Lesa wenu, na imwe mukaba abantu bandi." 
Leviticus26:13 Nine Yawe Lesa wenu uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto pakuti mwiba abasha nakabili ku bena Egupto. Nine naputawile ifikakilo fya makoli ya busha bwenu no kulenga ukuti muleyendelafye. 
Leviticus26:14 “Nomba nga cakuti mwakaana ukumbeela no kukonka amafunde yandi yonse aya namukonkomesha," 
Leviticus26:15 elyo nga cakuti mwakaana no kunakila amafunde yandi, mwasuula ne fyebo pamo ne fipope fyandi no konaula icipangano candi," 
Leviticus26:16 lyena ine nkacita ifi kuli imwe. Nkamuponesha amasakamika ayakumupulikisha, amalwele ayabipisha, impepo iyakumupofwisha amenso no kumulenga ukondoloka mpaka imfwa. Fyonse ifyo mukalabyala mu mushili mukalaicushafye, pantu abalwani benu ebakafilya." 
Leviticus26:17 Nkamwalukila pakuti abalwani benu bakamucimfye. Abamupata ebakalamuteeka. Kabili mukalaibutukilafye nangu tapali nelyo umo uulemubutusha. 
Leviticus26:18 “Nga cakuti na panuma yakucita ifi fyonse tamunakile, lyena ndi nokumukanda pa bubifi bwenu pa miku ukucila cine lubali." 
Leviticus26:19 Ine, ne Yawe nkamupwisha icilumba. Kabili nkalenga umulu ukuba kwati cela, no mushili nao ukukosa ngo mukuba kukuuma." 
Leviticus26:20 Amaka mukalabomfya mu milimo yenu yakaba yakuicushafye, pantu umushili wenu tawakatale aumesha ifisabo fyauko, nangufye ifimiti fya mu mpanga tafyakatwale." 
Leviticus26:21 “Nalyo line imwe nga mwatwalililafye ukutalama no kukanaumfwa, ndi nokulundapo na fimbi ifikuko imiku cine lubali ukucilapo ukulingana no bubifi bwenu." 
Leviticus26:22 Nkatuma ifiswango fya mpanga ukumwimina, ifili nokwisa ipaya abana benu elyo nokonaula ifitekwa fyenu. Fili nokulenga ukuti mukacepe mu mpendwa icakuti ne misebo yenu tamwakabe bakupitamo." 
Leviticus26:23 “Nalyo line ifi fyonse nga tafimwalulwile, lelo mwatwalililafye mukuntalamina," 
Leviticus26:24 na ine wine nomba ndi nokumutalamina, nkamwalukila no kumukanda pa bubifi bwenu imiku cine lubali ukucilapo." 
Leviticus26:25 Kabili nkaleta pali imwe ulupanga ulwacilandushi pa mulandu wakonaula icipangano candi. Elyo nga mukalabutukila mu misumba yenu kukupusuka, namo mwine nkamutumina ifikuko no kumuposa mu minwe ya balwani." 
Leviticus26:26 Ilyo ndi nokucefyako impendwa ya mikate mulya, banamayo ikumi limo bakabomfya ibuku limo pakupanga umukate. Bakalamupimina umukate wakupoka pakuti nga mwalya tamwikwite." 
Leviticus26:27 “Nalyo line ine nga nacita ifi fyonse tamuŋumfwile, lelo mwatwalililafye ukuntalamina," 
Leviticus26:28 lyena nkamutalamina kabili nkamukanda pa bubifi bwenu pa miku cine lubali ukucilapo. 
Leviticus26:29 Mukaba ne cipowe icikalamba icakuti mukalelya imibili ya bana benu abaume ne mibili ya bana benu abanakashi. 
Leviticus26:30 Ndi nokonaula incende shenu ishakupepelamo isho mwacindamika no kubongolola ifibumbili fya malambo fyenu ifyakufutumwinapo ububani. Nkatulika ifitumbi fyenu pa mulu wa tulubi twenu utushipema, kabili nkamusuula." 
Leviticus26:31 Nkalenga imisumba yenu ukuba ifibolya no konaula ififulo fyenu ifyamushilo, kabili nshakatale mpokelela icena canunka ubusaka ica mituulo yenu." 
Leviticus26:32 Nkonaula icalo cenu, icakuti abalwani benu abakesa ikalamo bakalepapafye." 
Leviticus26:33 Ine nkamulenga ukusalanganina mu mishobo iyalekana lekana. Kabili nkaleta pali imwe ulupanga no kumulimuna bonse. Icalo cenu cikonaulwa, ne misumba yenu yonse ili nokusangulwa ifibolya." 
Leviticus26:34 Elyo lyena icalo cikashala cilesekela mu Masabata imyaka yonse mu nshita cikashala icatalalilwa, ilyo na imwe mukaba mu calo ca balwani benu. Ili elyo icalo cikekala no kubaka Amasabata yaciko." 
Leviticus26:35 Pantu pa nshita yonse ilyo icalo cikatalalilwa, cikatuusha mu Masabata mu musango tacatalile acituusha ilyo mwaikelemo." 
Leviticus26:36 “Bonse abakashalapo aba muli imwe, nkabalenga ukuba no mwenso mu mitima yabo ilyo bali mu calo ca balwani babo, icakuti nga baumfwafye umwela waponya ibula ku cimuti, balaibutukilafye. Bali nokubutuka kwati bantu bapusuka ku lupanga. Kabili bali nokulaiwilafye nangu tapali muntu nelyo umo uulebatamfya." 
Leviticus26:37 Bakalainyantaulafye no kuipununa kwati balefulumuka ku lupanga, nangu tapali uulebabutusha. Eico pali iyi nshita mukafilwa no kulwisha abalwani benu." 
Leviticus26:38 Ala kwena, mukalobelelafye pakati ka mishobo. Mu calo ca balwani benu emo mukalobelela, no kushiikwa." 
Leviticus26:39 Pali imwe abakapusunsukako mu calo ca balwani benu bakaloba pa mulandu wa bubifi bwabo na pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa bashibo. 
Leviticus26:40 “Lelo nga cakuti bakayebelela no kupapata pa bubifi bwabo, na pa bubifi bwa bashibo ubo bacitile ubwa kunsangukila no kuntalamina," 
Leviticus26:41 icalengele na ine mbatalamine no kubatuma mu calo ca balwani babo, nga cakuti bayalula imitima yabo no kubwelulukila kuli ine no kufuta pa bubifi bwabo," 
Leviticus26:42 awe na ine lyena nkebukisha icipangano candi ico nacitile kuli Yakobo, Isaki na Abrahamu. Kabili ndi nokwibukisha ne calo cenu cine." 
Leviticus26:43 Icalo cena cili nokushala pakuti cikasekele Amasabata pantu cikaba amatololo. Bali nokukandwa pa mulandu wakusangukila amafunde yandi ne Yawe, pamo pene no kusuula ifipope fyandi." 
Leviticus26:44 Lelo nangu cibe ifyo fine, ilyo aba bantu bacili mu calo ca balwani babo nshakabalekeleshe iyoo, nangufye ukubonaula umupwilapo, ninshi naonaula icipangano candi ico napangene nabo. Nine Yawe Lesa wabo." 
Leviticus26:45 Kabili pa mulandu wabo wine, ndi nokwibukisha ne cipangano nacitile kuli bashibo, abo nafumishe mu calo ca Egupto pa cinso ca mishobo, pakuti mbe Lesa wabo. Nine Yawe.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Kanshi aya e mafunde, ifipope kabili ne fikomo ifyo Yawe abikile pakati kakwe na bena Israeli ukupitila muli Mose ku lupili lwa Sinai." 
Leviticus27:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Leviticus27:2 “Eba abena Israeli nokutila kuli bena, ‘Nga cakuti umuntu alaya icilayo icaibela icakutuula abantu babiye kuli Yawe, mukupeela icintu cimo ico umutengo waciko ulingene nowo bengashitilapo umuntu." 
Leviticus27:3 Umwaume uuli pakati ka myaka amakumi yabili (20) nokufika pa myaka amakumi mutanda (60), indalama shili nokuba amashekeli amakumi yasano (50) sha silifa ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo." 
Leviticus27:4 Lelo nga cakuti mwanakashi, umutengo wakwe wena kumulinganyafye ne ndalama amashekeli amakumi yatatu (30)." 
Leviticus27:5 Nga cakuti umuntu ali pakati ka myaka isano no kufika pa myaka amakumi yabili (20), umwaume umutengo wakwe ni ndalama amashekeli amakumi yabili (20), elyo umwanakashi nao ni pa ndalama amashekeli ikumi limo (10)." 
Leviticus27:6 Kabili nga cakuti mwana mwaume uwa mweshi umo ukufika pa myaka isano, umutengo wakwe ni ndalama amashekeli yasano ya silifa. Kabili umutengo wa mwanakashi nao ni ndalama amashekeli yatatu ya silifa." 
Leviticus27:7 Elyo nga muntu uuli pakati ka myaka amakumi mutanda no kucilapo, umutengo wa mwaume onse ni ndalama amashekeli ikumi limo na yasano (15). Lelo nga mwanakashi wena, ni ndalama amashekeli ikumi limo.’" 
Leviticus27:8 “Nga cakuti umuntu uwalaya icilayo mulanda nganshi kabili teti alipile icipendo capimwa, afwile ukutwala umuntu alaile kuli shimapepo uuli nokubika umutengo wakupeela, ukulingana nefyo umuntu uwalaya icilayo engapeela." 
Leviticus27:9 “Nga cakuti uyu muntu alaya ukupeela icitekwa ca nama icingasuminishiwa ngo mutuulo kuli Yawe, iyi inama iyapeelwa kuli Yawe ninshi yaba iyamushilo." 
Leviticus27:10 Tafwile kukabusha no kutwalilamo inama imbi iyoo, nangu kukabulamo imbi iyibi no kumupeela iyisuma nangu iyisuma no kupeelelamo iyibi. Nga acita ifyo, ninshi inama shonse shibili shaba shamushilo." 
Leviticus27:11 Kabili ico alaya nga cintu icakowela icishingapokelelwa ngo mutuulo kuli Yawe, iyo nama ifwile ukutwalwa kuli shimapepo." 
Leviticus27:12 Shimapepo nao euli nokupima iyi nama nga isuma nangu ibi. Umutengo onse shimapepo engapingula, uyo wine euli nokushitilwapo iyi nama." 
Leviticus27:13 Lelo nga cakuti umwine uwatuula alefwaya ukulubula iyi nama, alingile ukulundapo na kansonsela ka ndalama imo muli cila shisano pa mutengo bali nokushitishishapo inama." 
Leviticus27:14 “Umuntu nga apeela iŋanda yakwe kuli Yawe ukuba iyamushilo, shimapepo euli nokupima iyi ŋanda nga isuma nangu ibi. Umutengo onse shimapepo ali nokubika, euyo winefye." 
Leviticus27:15 Lelo nga cakuti umuntu uupeele iyi ŋanda alefwaya ukubwesha, alingile ukulundapo kansonsela ka ndalama imo muli cila shisano pa mutengo bali nokushitishishapo iyi ŋanda, lyena kuti yabwelela kuli ena." 
Leviticus27:16 “Umuntu nga apeelako iciputulwa cimo ica mpanga ya lupwa lwakwe kuli Yawe, umutengo wa iyi mpanga uli nokulingana ne mbuto sha bale shingabyalwamo, emukutila indalama amashekeli amakumi yasano isha silifa pali homeri imo pa mbuto sha bale." 
Leviticus27:17 Nga cakuti apeela kuli Yawe mu mwaka wakusefya, umutengo wa ili ibala uo bapingula uli nokuba ifyo fine ukwabula ukuutelusha." 
Leviticus27:18 Lelo nga cakuti apeela ibala lyakwe kuli Yawe panuma ya mwaka wakusefya, lyena shimapepo ali nokupingula umutengo ukulingana ne myaka yashalako mpaka umwaka wakusefya ukafike, kabili ali nokucefyako umutengo." 
Leviticus27:19 Lelo umuntu uwapeele ibala nga alefwaya ukulibwesha, alingile ukulundapo kansonsela ka ndalama imo muli cila shisano pa mutengo bali nokushitishishapo ibala, elyo nomba ili ibala lili nokubwelela kuli ena." 
Leviticus27:20 Uyu muntu nga cakuti takwete icakulubwilako ili ibala, nangufye ashitisha ku muntu umbi, ili ibala talyakatale alilubulwa alibwesha no kuba ibala lyakwe ninshi capwa." 
Leviticus27:21 Eico ili ibala ilyo likalubulwa mu mwaka wakusefya nga wafika, lili nokuba ilyamushilo. Likaba libala lyakwa Yawe, kabili likapeelwa na kuli bashimapepo nge cuma cabo." 
Leviticus27:22 “Nga cakuti umuntu apeela ibala kuli Yawe ilyo ashita, ilishili ibala lya ciputulwa ca mpanga ya lupwa," 
Leviticus27:23 shimapepo ali nokupingula umutengo ukulingana ne myaka yashalako kukusefya umwaka walenga amakumi yasano. Kabili umuntu uuleshita ali nokuleta indalama shonse pali ubu bwine bushiku, nge cintu cimo icamushilo kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus27:24 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yasano uwakusefya, ibala lili nokubwelela ku mwine uwashitishe, uwali umwine wa mpanga pakubala." 
Leviticus27:25 “Imitengo yonse ilingile ukuba nge mitengo ya mashekeli ya mu cifulo camushilo, amagera amakumi yabili (20) kuli shekeli imo." 
Leviticus27:26 “Takuli umuntu nangu umo uufwile ukupeela amabeli ya fitekwa fya nama, pantu ifi fyena fyakwa Yawe. Nangu fingaba ukuti ni ŋombe nangufye impaanga, fyonse fyakwa Yawe." 
Leviticus27:27 Lelo nga citekwa icakowela, cena umwine kuti acibwesha pa mutengo uwasuminishiwa no kulundapo indalama imo muli cila shisano. Lelo nga takwete impiya shakulubwila, lyena cili nokushitishiwa pa mutengo uwasuminishiwa." 
Leviticus27:28 “Takuli icintu nelyo cimo pafyo umuntu akwata nangu ico apeela kuli Yawe kukucilofya icingashitishiwa nangu ukulubulwa, cibefye nangu muntu wine, nangu inama, nangu impanga ya lupwa. Conse icapeelwa kukonaulwa, cena camushilo nganshi kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus27:29 Takuli umuntu nelyo umo uyo uwapeelwa kukonaulwa uwingalubulwa, lelo afwile ukwipaiwafye." 
Leviticus27:30 “Icapekumi conse ica mu busomboshi bonse, nalimo ni mbuto ishikafuma mu mabala yenu, nangu ifisabo fya ku miti, fyena fyonse mutuulo kuli Yawe. Kabili fyamushilo kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus27:31 Nga cakuti umuntu alubula icintu conse icapekumi, ali nokulundapo kansonsela ka ndalama imo muli cila shisano ukulingana no mutengo bali nokushitishishapo." 
Leviticus27:32 Kabili icapekumi conse pa mukuni wa ŋombe no wa mpaanga, inama yonse iyalenga ikumi limo, iyo iyapita mwisamba lya nkonto ku mucemi, ili nokuba iyamushilo kuli Yawe." 
Leviticus27:33 Umwine wa fitekwa talingile kupatulula ifitekwa pakuti asalepo icisuma ukufuma pa fishili bwino elyo apyanikishepo iyisuma. Nga cakuti apyanikishapo cimbi, fyonse ifi ifitekwa tafili nakulubulwa, nomba fyonse fyaba ifyamushilo kuli Yawe.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Ifi fyonse e fipope ifyo Yawe apeele Mose ku lupili lwa Sinai, pakuti efyo abena Israeli bakalekonka." 
Numbers1:1 Pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi wabubili, mu mwaka wacibili apo abena Israeli bafumine mu calo ca Egupto, Yawe aebele Mose mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo mu matololo ya Sinai ati," 
Numbers1:2 “Penda ulukuta lonse lwa bena Israeli mu mikowa na mu ndupwa shabo. Mulembe amashina ya baume bonse, umo umo," 
Numbers1:3 abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abengalinga ukulwa inkondo. Iwe na Aroni uli nokubapendela mu mpuka mu mpuka bonse abaume abena Israeli." 
Numbers1:4 Kuli cila luko mukabuuleko umwaume umo umukalamba wa lupwa lwakwe uwakumwafwako. 
Numbers1:5 Na mashina ya baume abakumwafwilishako ni aya. Ku luko lwakwa Rubeni, ni Elisuri mwana Shedeuri." 
Numbers1:6 Ku luko lwakwa Simeoni, ni Shelumieli umwana wakwa Sulishadai." 
Numbers1:7 Ku luko lwakwa Yuda, ni Nashoni mwana Aminadabu." 
Numbers1:8 Ku luko lwakwa Isaka, ni Netaneli mwana Suali." 
Numbers1:9 Ku luko lwakwa Sebuloni, ni Eliabu mwana Eloni." 
Numbers1:10 Ku bana bakwa Yosefu ni aba. Ku luko lwakwa Efulemu, ni Elishama mwana Amiudi. Ku luko lwakwa Manase, ni Gamalieli mwana Pedasuri." 
Numbers1:11 Ku luko lwakwa Benjamini, ni Abidani mwana Gideoni." 
Numbers1:12 Ku luko lwakwa Dani, Aiesa mwana Amishadai." 
Numbers1:13 Ku luko lwakwa Asheri, ni Pagieli mwana Okirani." 
Numbers1:14 Ku luko lwakwa Gadi, ni Eliasafu mwana Deueli." 
Numbers1:15 Ku luko lwakwa Naftali, ni Aila mwana Enani.”" 
Numbers1:16 Aba e baume basalilwe ukufuma ku lukuta, ebali intungulushi sha mikowa ya fikolwe. Ebali abakalamba ba ndupwa sha fikolwe fya bena Israeli." 
Numbers1:17 Mose na Aroni babuulile amashina ya aba bantu basontelwe," 
Numbers1:18 elyo balonganya ulukuta lwa bena Israeli bonse pamo, pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi wabubili. Kabili balemba na bantu bonse mu mikowa na mu ndupwa shabo. Balembele na mashina ya baume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) no kucilapo," 
Numbers1:19 pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. Kanshi efyo Mose apendele abantu mu matololo ya Sinai. 
Numbers1:20 Ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Rubeni, ibeli lyakwa Yakobo, abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:21 Mu luko lwakwa Rubeni, bali amakana amakumi yane na mutanda ne myanda isano (46,500)." 
Numbers1:22 Mu luko lwakwa Simeoni, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:23 Mu luko lwakwa Simeoni, bali amakana amakumi yasano na pabula ne myanda itatu (59,300)." 
Numbers1:24 Mu luko lwakwa Gadi, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:25 Mu luko lwakwa Gadi, bali amakana amakumi yane na yasano ne myanda mutanda na makumi yasano (45,650)." 
Numbers1:26 Mu luko lwakwa Yuda, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:27 Mu luko lwakwa Yuda, bali amakana amakumi cine lubali na yane ne myanda mutanda (74,600)."
