Numbers1:28 Mu luko lwakwa Isaka, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:29 Mu luko lwakwa Isaka, bali amakana amakumi yasano na yane ne myanda ine (54,400)." 
Numbers1:30 Mu luko lwakwa Sebuloni, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:31 Mu luko lwakwa Sebuloni, bali amakana amakumi yasano na cine lubali ne myanda ine (57,400)." 
Numbers1:32 Ku bana bakwa Yosefu ni aba. Mu luko lwakwa Efulemu, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:33 Mu luko lwakwa Efulemu, bali amakana amakumi yane ne myanda isano (40,500)." 
Numbers1:34 Mu luko lwakwa Manase, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:35 Mu luko lwakwa Manase, bali amakana amakumi yatatu na yabili ne myanda ibili (32,200)." 
Numbers1:36 Mu luko lwakwa Benjamini, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:37 Mu luko lwakwa Benjamini, bali amakana amakumi yatatu na yasano ne myanda ine (35,400)." 
Numbers1:38 Mu luko lwakwa Dani, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:39 Mu luko lwakwa Dani, bali amakana amakumi mutanda na yabili ne myanda cine lubali (62,700)." 
Numbers1:40 Mu luko lwakwa Asheri, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:41 Mu luko lwakwa Asheri, bali amakana amakumi yane na limo ne myanda isano (41,500)." 
Numbers1:42 Mu luko lwakwa Naftali, bapendele abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo, babalemba amashina umo umo ukulingana ne mikowa ne ndupwa shabo." 
Numbers1:43 Mu luko lwakwa Naftali, bali amakana amakumi yasano na yatatu ne myanda ine (53,400)." 
Numbers1:44 Kanshi efyo bali abaume Mose na Aroni balembele. Babombele pamo ne ntungulushi sha bena Israeli ikumi limo na babili (12) ishaiminineko indupwa shashiko. 
Numbers1:45 Abena Israeli bonse pamo abaume abalembelwe mu ndupwa, abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abalingile ukulwa inkondo," 
Numbers1:46 bonse pamo bali amakana imyanda mutanda na itatu ne myanda isano na makumi yasano (603,550)." 
Numbers1:47 Nomba aba mu luko lwa bena Levi tabapendelwe pamo ne nko shimbi iyoo. 
Numbers1:48 Pantu Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers1:49 “Wikapendelako uluko lwakwa Levi nangu ukusansha ku mpendwa ya nko shimbi isha bena Israeli. 
Numbers1:50 Lelo, abena Levi bena ubapeele umulimo wakusunga Itenti lya cipangano, kumo kwine ne fibombelo ne fipe fyonse ifyabamo. Bali nokulalisenda pamo ne fibombelo fyaliko no kulalisunga, kabili bakalacita ne nkambi shabo ukushinguluka Itenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Numbers1:51 Ilyo lyonse mwasesha inkambi, abena Levi ebakalapangulula Itenti lyakwa Lesa, kabili ebakalalimika ilyo mwaya cita inkambi kumbi. Uyo onse uushili mwina Levi uwapalamina kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa wena akepaiwefye." 
Numbers1:52 Abena Israeli bakemike amatenti yabo mu mpuka mu mpuka, no muntu onse ali nokuba mwibumba lya mpuka ya luko lwakwe, apali uluunga lwakwe." 
Numbers1:53 Lelo abena Levi bena bali nokwimika amatenti yabo ukushinguluka Itenti lya cipangano, pakuti balelicingilila kabili pakuti ubukali tabuponene pa lukuta lwa bena Israeli. Abena Levi ebali no mulimo wakusunga Itenti lya cipangano pa bena Israeli.”" 
Numbers1:54 Kanshi abena Israeli bacitile fyonse ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Numbers2:1 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati," 
Numbers2:2 “Abena Israeli bali nokulaimika amatenti yabo ukushinguluka Itenti Lyakukumaninamo pa nkambi, lelo bafwile ukutalushako amatenti yabo. Umuntu onse akabe mwibumba lya mpuka ya luko lwakwe akabike icishibilo ca luunga lwa luko pe tenti lyakwe." 
Numbers2:3 “Ku kabanga kulya kutulila akasuba, kukaba iciputulwa ca nkambi cakwa Yuda no luunga lwabo. Cikaba mu mpuka mu mpuka sha mikowa yabo. Intungulushi ya bena Yuda ni Nashoni mwana Aminadabu." 
Numbers2:4 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi cine lubali na yane ne myanda mutanda (74,600)." 
Numbers2:5 “Uluko lwakwa Isaka elukabakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Isaka ni Netaneli mwana Suari. 
Numbers2:6 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yasano na yane ne myanda ine (54,400)." 
Numbers2:7 “Uluko lwakwa Sebuloni elukakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Sebuloni ni Eliabu mwana Eloni. 
Numbers2:8 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yasano na cine lubali ne myanda ine (57,400)." 
Numbers2:9 Abaume bonse abapendelwe mu ciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Yuda, mu mpuka mu mpuka, bali amakana umwanda umo na makumi cine konse konse na mutanda ne myanda ine (186,400). Aba bantu ebafwile ukuba pantanshi nga bafuma pa nkambi balipo." 
Numbers2:10 “Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo lubali kukaba iciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Rubeni no luunga lwabo. Cikaba mu mpuka mu mpuka sha mikowa yabo. Intungulushi ya bena Rubeni ni Elisuri mwana Shedeuri. 
Numbers2:11 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yane na mutanda ne myanda isano (46,500)." 
Numbers2:12 “Uluko lwakwa Simeoni elukabakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Simeoni ni Shelumieli mwana Surishadai. 
Numbers2:13 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yasano na pabula ne myanda itatu (59,300)." 
Numbers2:14 “Uluko lwakwa Gadi elukakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Gadi ni Eliasafu mwana Reueli 
Numbers2:15 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yane na yasano ne myanda mutanda na makumi yasano (45,650)." 
Numbers2:16 Abaume bonse abapendelwe mu ciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Rubeni, mu mpuka mu mpuka, bali amakana umwanda umo na makumi yasano na limo ne myanda ine na makumi yasano (151,450). Aba ebali nokukonka pa bantanshi nga bafuma pa nkambi balipo." 
Numbers2:17 “Elyo abena Levi pakusenda Itenti Lyakukumaninamo bali nokulaendela pakati, kuntanshi kube amabumba yabili na kunuma nako kube amabumba yabili. Mulya mwine bakonkanina ukwikala mu nkambi, emo na pakwenda bali nokukonkanina. Impuka yonse ili nokuba pa ncende apali uluunga." 
Numbers2:18 “Ku masamba ekukaba iciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Efulemu no luunga lwabo. Cikaba mu mpuka mu mpuka sha mikowa yabo. Intungulushi ya bena Efulemu ni Elishama mwana Amiudi. 
Numbers2:19 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yane ne myanda isano (40,500)." 
Numbers2:20 “Uluko lwakwa Manase elukabakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Manase ni Gamalieli mwana Pedasuri. 
Numbers2:21 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yatatu na yabili ne myanda ibili (32,200)." 
Numbers2:22 “Uluko lwakwa Benjamini elukakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Benjamini ni Abidani mwana Gideoni. 
Numbers2:23 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yatatu na yasano ne myanda ine (35,400)." 
Numbers2:24 Abaume bonse abapendelwe mu ciputuluwa ca nkambi icakwa Efulemu, mu mpuka mu mpuka, bali amakana umwanda umo na cine konse konse no mwanda umo (108,100). Aba bantu ebafwile ukuba abacitatu nga bafuma pa nkambi balipo." 
Numbers2:25 “Ku kapinda ka ku kuso lubali ekukaba iciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Dani no luunga lwabo. Cikaba mu mpuka mu mpuka sha mikowa yabo. Intungulushi ya bena Dani ni Ahieseri mwana Amishadai. 
Numbers2:26 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi mutanda na yabili ne myanda cine lubali (62,700)." 
Numbers2:27 “Uluko lwakwa Asheri elukabakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Asheri ni Pagieli mwana Okirani. 
Numbers2:28 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yane na limo ne myanda isano (41,500)." 
Numbers2:29 “Uluko lwakwa Naftali nao elukakonkapo. Intungulushi ya bena Naftali ni Aira mwana Enani. 
Numbers2:30 Impendwa ye bumba lyakwe, bantu amakana amakumi yasano na yatatu ne myanda ine (53,400)." 
Numbers2:31 Abaume bonse abapendelwe mu ciputulwa ca nkambi icakwa Dani, mu mpuka mu mpuka, bali amakana umwanda umo na makumi yasano na cine lubali ne myanda mutanda (157,600). Aba bantu ebali nokulaba abakulalekeleshako nga bafuma pa nkambi mu mikowa yabo pa ncende apali uluunga lwabo.”" 
Numbers2:32 Aba e bena Israeli bonse abapendelwe mu ndupwa shabo. Bonse aba bali mu fiputulwa fya nkambi mu mpuka mu mpuka kabili ne mpendwa yabo yali amakana imyanda mutanda na yatatu ne myanda isano na makumi yasano (603,550)." 
Numbers2:33 Nga filya fine Yawe akonkomeshe Mose, abena Levi bena tabapendelwe pamo na bena Israeli bambi." 
Numbers2:34 Kanshi abena Israeli bacitile fyonse ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. Baikele mu nkambi mu mpuka mu mpuka. Kabili na pakufuma pa nkambi cila muntu aleba mu mukowa wakwe ukulingana no lupwa lwakwe. 
Numbers3:1 Ifi efyali ulupwa lwakwa Aroni na Mose pa nshita Yawe alandile na Mose pa lupili lwa Sinai. 
Numbers3:2 Bamwana Aroni abaume bali Nadabu, e beli, Abihu, Eleasa na Itama." 
Numbers3:3 Aya e mashina ya bamwana Aroni, ebasubilwe amafuta no kupeelwa bushimapepo." 
Numbers3:4 Lelo Nadabu na Abihu bafwilile pa cinso cakwa Yawe mu matololo ya Sinai, ilyo batuulile Yawe umulilo ushasuminishiwe. Tabakwete abana baume, kanshi Eleasa na Itama ebalebomba umulimo wa bushimapepo ilyo shibo Aroni ali talafwa." 
Numbers3:5 Yawe aebele Mose, ati," 
Numbers3:6 “Palamika aba luko lwa bena Levi no kubapeela kuli Aroni shimapepo, balemwafwako imilimo." 
Numbers3:7 Bafwile ukulaafwa Aroni imilimo ya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo pamo ne milimo ya lukuta lonse mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Numbers3:8 Bali nokulasunga ifipe fyonse ifya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, kabili no kulabombelako na bena Israeli bonsefye imilimo bali nokubomba mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Numbers3:9 Ukalubwile abena Levi kuli Aroni na bana bakwe abaume. Bena e bena Israeli bapeelwafye onse kuli ena. 
Numbers3:10 Usonte Aroni na bana bakwe abaume kukubomba imilimo ya bushimapepo. Umuntu umbifye nga apalama ku milimo iyi wena akepaiwe.” 
Numbers3:11 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose, ati," 
Numbers3:12 “Pa bena Israeli nimbuulapo abena Levi kukuba abandifye pa malo ye beli lyonse ilyaume ilyafyalwa mu bena Israeli. Bena aba baleba bandifye. 
Numbers3:13 Pantu abana abaume bonse amabeli ala bandi. Ilyo naipeye amabeli yonse aya mu calo ca Egupto, elyo naipatwilile kuli ne mwine ibeli lyonse ilya mu Israeli, ilya muntu ne lya citekwa, yonse yandi. Ine nine Yawe.”" 
Numbers3:14 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose mu matololo ya Sinai, ati," 
Numbers3:15 “Penda abena Levi mu ndupwa na mu mpuka shabo. Penda abaume bonse ukutampila pa bali no mweshi umo no ukucilapo.” 
Numbers3:16 Mose nao aya bapenda ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe amukonkomeshe. 
Numbers3:17 Levi ali na bana abaume batatu, Geshoni, Koati na Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Geshoni ali na bana abaume babili, ni Libini na Shimei." 
Numbers3:19 Koati ali na bana abaume bane, ni Amuramu, Ishali, Hebuloni na Usieli." 
Numbers3:20 Merari ali na bana abaume babili, ni Mali na Mushi. Ishi e ndupwa sha bena Levi umwabelele amayanda ya bashibo." 
Numbers3:21 Mu lupwa lwakwa Geshoni emwatuntuka abena Libini na bena Shimei. Ishi e ndupwa shakwa Geshoni. 
Numbers3:22 Impendwa yonse pamo iya baume abapendelwe, ukutampila pa bali no mweshi umo nangu ukucilapo, yali amakana cine lubali ne myanda isano (7,500)." 
Numbers3:23 Indupwa shakwa Geshoni shali nokwikalila ku masamba kunuma ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Numbers3:24 Intungulushi ya bena Geshoni ni Eliasafu mwana Laeli. 
Numbers3:25 Imilimo abena Geshoni balebomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo: Kusunga Itenti lyakwa Lesa, icisalu cakukupa mukati ne cakunse, icakucinga pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo," 
Numbers3:26 ifisalu fyakucingilila ulubansa ulwashinguluka Itenti lyakwa Lesa no bulambo, icisalu cakucinga pa mwinshi wa lubansa, imyando elyo na fyonse ifyakumine kuli iyi milimo." 
Numbers3:27 Mu lupwa lwakwa Koati emwatuntuka abena Amuramu, abena Isirahiya, abena Hebuloni na bena Usieli. Ishi e ndupwa shakwa Koati." 
Numbers3:28 Impendwa yonse pamo iya baume abena Koati abalebomba umulimo wakusunga icifulo camushilo, abapendelwe ukutampila pa bali no mweshi umo no kucilapo, yali amakana cine konse konse ne myanda mutanda (8,600)." 
Numbers3:29 Indupwa shakwa Koati shali nokwikala ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ake Tenti lyakwa Lesa. 
Numbers3:30 Intungulushi ya bena Koati ni Elisafani, mwana Usieli." 
Numbers3:31 Imilimo abena Koati balebomba, kusunga Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, itebulo, icakutekapo ifisaniko, ifibumbili fya malambo, ifipe bashimapepo balebomfya mu cifulo camushilo, icisalu na fyonse ifyakumine ku milimo balebomba." 
Numbers3:32 Eleasa mwana shimapepo Aroni ewali intungulushi nkalamba ya bena Levi. Ewasontelwe uwakwangalila abalebomba umulimo wakusunga icifulo camushilo. 
Numbers3:33 Mu lupwa lwakwa Merari emwatuntuka abena Mali na bena Mushi. Ishi eshali ndupwa sha bena Merari. 
Numbers3:34 Impendwa yonse pamo iya baume, abapendelwe ukutampila pa bali no mweshi umo nangu ukucilapo, yali amakana mutanda ne myanda ibili (6,200)." 
Numbers3:35 Indupwa sha bena Merari eshali nokwikalila ku kapinda ka ku kuso ake Tenti lyakwa Lesa, na Surieli mwana Abihaili ewali ntungulushi ya ishi ndupwa." 
Numbers3:36 Ishi e ndupwa shasontelwe ukusunga impanda she Tenti lyakwa Lesa, imyalo, inceshi no twakushimpamo impanda, elyo ne fyakubomfya fyonse ne milimo yonse iyakumine ku mibomfeshe ya ifi fipe," 
Numbers3:37 ukusunga inceshi sha cakucinga ulubansa lwe Tenti, ifyakukwikamo impanda, impopo ne myando." 
Numbers3:38 Mose na Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bena mu nkambi bali nokulaikalila lwa ku kabanga ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa, pa ntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo ku kabanga lubali. Ebali nokubomba umulimo wakusunga icifulo camushilo, ukubombelako abena Israeli. Umuntu umbi uwapalama ku cifulo camushilo akepaiwe." 
Numbers3:39 Impendwa yonse pamo iya bena Levi abaume abapendelwe ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose na Aroni ukubapendela mu ndupwa, abaume bonse ukutampila pa bali no mweshi umo nangu ukucilapo, yali amakana amakumi yabili (22,000)." 
Numbers3:40 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose, ati, “Penda amabeli ya bena Israeli bonse abaume, ukutampila pa bali no mweshi umo no kucilapo, kabili ulembe na mashina yabo." 
Numbers3:41 Na pa malo ya bana baume bonse abena Israeli amabeli ubikepo abena Levi ukuba abandi. Kabili naibuulila ifitekwa fya bena Levi pa malo ya mabeli yonse ya fitekwa ifya bena Israeli. Nine Yawe!” 
Numbers3:42 Awe Mose epakupenda amabeli abaume bonse ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. 
Numbers3:43 Impendwa yonse pamo iya baume amabeli abali no mweshi umo nangu ukucilapo, bali amakana amakumi yabili na yabili, imyanda ibili na makumi cine lubali na batatu (22,273)." 
Numbers3:44 Kabili Yawe aeba Mose ati," 
Numbers3:45 “Nomba bika abena Levi pa malo ya mabeli yonse abaume abena Israeli, na pa mabeli ya fitekwa fya bena Israeli ubikepo ifya bena Levi. Ine, nine Yawe." 
Numbers3:46 Apo kanshi abana abaume amabeli ya bena Israeli bacilako abena Levi imyanda ibili na makumi cine lubali na batatu (273), iwe Mose ulingile pakubalubula" 
Numbers3:47 ukuleka impiya amashekeli yasano pali cila umo ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo icafina amagera amakumi yabili. 
Numbers3:48 Kabili isho mpiya shakulubula abo bena Israeli abapulilepo upeele Aroni na bana bakwe abaume.” 
Numbers3:49 Mose nao apokele impiya kuli balya bapulile pa mpendwa yalubwilwe na bena Levi. 
Numbers3:50 Apokele impiya isha mashekeli ikana limo ne myanda itatu na makumi mutanda na shisano (1,365) ukufuma ku mabeli ya bena Israeli, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo." 
Numbers3:51 Neshi mpiya shakulubwila amabeli ashipeela kuli Aroni na bana bakwe abaume, ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Numbers4:1 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni, ati," 
Numbers4:2 “Pendeni abena Koati aba mu luko lwakwa Levi, mubapendele mu ndupwa na mu mayanda yabo." 
Numbers4:3 Mupende abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50), abesa mukubombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers4:4 Umulimo wa bena Koati mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo wakusunga ifintu ifyamushilo nganshi. 
Numbers4:5 “Ilyo mwalasela pa nkambi, Aroni na bana bakwe abaume baleingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kukobola icisalu icacingako Imbokoshi ya Cipangano. Balefimba Imbokoshi ya Cipangano icisalu cine ici." 
Numbers4:6 Elyo kabili bafwile ukufimbapo ne cakufimbapo na cimbi ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, ne nsalu yacifufya pamulu, elyo babikeko ne fimuti fyakupingilako." 
Numbers4:7 “Petebulo lya mikate yakuba pa cinso candi, baleansapo insalu iyacifufya, elyo babikepo imbale, inweno shakubikamo ububani ne nweno sha mituulo ne mitondo ya mituulo ya fyakunwa. Imikate yakubapo inshita yonse petebulo yena taifwile ukubulwapo." 
Numbers4:8 Pali ifi balefimbapo insalu iyakashika pamulu, elyo kabili balefimbapo ne cakufimbapo na cimbi ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, elyo babikeko ne fimuti fyakupingilako." 
Numbers4:9 “Balebuula insalu yacifufya, balefimba pa cakutekapo ifisaniko, kumo kwine ne fisaniko, ifyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto ne mbale sha mito. Kabili na pali fyonse ifisungilwamo amafuta yakusanikila." 
Numbers4:10 Elyo balepomba icakutekapo ifisaniko pamo pene ne fibombelo fyonse mu cakufimbapo ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, elyo babike na pa mitembo yakusendelapo." 
Numbers4:11 “Pa bulambo bwa golide balefimbapo insalu yacifufya, balefimbapo ne cakufimbapo na cimbi ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, elyo babikeko ne fimuti fyakupingilako." 
Numbers4:12 Balebuula ne fipe fyonse ifyo babomfya mu cifulo camushilo, no kufipomba mu nsalu yacifufya. Kabili balefimbako ne cakufimbapo na cimbi ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, babike na pa mitembo yakusendelapo." 
Numbers4:13 Bali nokukusa imito pa bulambo bwa mukuba no kwansapo insalu iyakashikila. 
Numbers4:14 Nga bayanshikapo, elyo babikapo ifipe fyonse ifyo babomfya ku bulambo, ifyakubikapo umulilo ne mitunkwilo na bafosholo ne misambilo. Elyo bali nokufimbapo ne cakufimbapo ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, elyo babikeko ne fimuti fyakupingilako." 
Numbers4:15 Ilyo Aroni na bana bakwe abaume bapwisha umulimo wakukupilisha bwino icifulo camushilo pamo pene ne fipe fya mu cifulo camushilo, ninshi na bonse mwaipekanya ukukuuka pa nkambi, elyo abena Koati bali nokwisa fisenda. Lelo nabo bene tabafwile kwikata ku fipe fyamushilo, epali bafwa. Awe abena Koati ebakulasenda ifya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers4:16 “Eleasa mwana Aroni shimapepo, ewakulamona pa mafuta ya mu fisaniko, ububani ubwanunka ubusaka, imituulo ya fyabunga na mafuta yakusuba. Ewakulamona pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa pamo ne filimo, icifulo camushilo pamo pene ne fibombelo fyamushilo ifisangwamo.”" 
Numbers4:17 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni, ati," 
Numbers4:18 “Mwikaleka aba mu ndupwa shakwa Koati ukuti bakalobe ukufuma ku bena Levi. 
Numbers4:19 Kanshi pakuti aba bantu tabafwile ilyo bapalama ku fipe fyamushilo, lelo bakekala abamweo, ifi efyo muli nokubacitila. Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ebakulatangila pakwingila mu cifulo camushilo nokulangilila cila muntu umulimo ali nokubomba neco ali nokusenda." 
Numbers4:20 Lelo aba mu ndupwa shakwa Koati tabafwile kwingila mu cifulo camushilo kukumona uko bashimapepo balelonga ifipe fyamushilo, nangu pa nshitafye inono, pantu kuti bafwa.”" 
Numbers4:21 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers4:22 “Penda abena Geshoni aba mu luko lwakwa Levi, ubapendele mu ndupwa na mu mayanda yabo." 
Numbers4:23 Upende abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50), abalingile ukulabombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers4:24 Iyi e milimo abena Geshoni bakalabomba pamo no kulasenda ifipe. 
Numbers4:25 Ebakalasenda ifisalu fyakucinga kwi Itenti lyakwa Lesa, Itenti Lyakukumaninamo ne cakufimbako icamukati ne cakufimbapo cakunse ica mpapa ishisuma ishatelela, pamo pene ne fyakufimba pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers4:26 Ebakalasenda ne fisalu fyakucinga ulubansa lwa kwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa no bulambo, icisalu cakucinga pa mwinshi wakwingililapo mu lubansa, imyando na fyonse ifibombelo ifyakubomfyafye muli iyi milimo. Abena Geshoni ebali nokubomba fyonse ifilefwaikwa kuli ifi fintu." 
Numbers4:27 Imilimo bakalabomba yonse, cibe yakusenda ifipe nangu yakubombafye, Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ebo bakalebakonkomesha. Uli nokubalanga fyonse ifyo bali nokusenda." 
Numbers4:28 Iyi e milimo bakalabomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo aba mu ndupwa shakwa Geshoni. Itama mwana shimapepo Aroni ewakulabangalila mu milimo yabo.” 
Numbers4:29 Yawe aebele Mose, ati, “Penda abena Merari, ubapendele mu ndupwa na mu mayanda yabo." 
Numbers4:30 Upende abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50), abalingile ukulabombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers4:31 Abena Merari ebakalabomba umulimo wakusenda impanda shakwimikila Itenti Lyakukumaninamo ne myalo, inceshi no twakwimikamo impanda shakwimikila Itenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Numbers4:32 Kabili ebakalasenda ne nceshi shakucinga ulubansa, ifyakwimikamo inceshi, impopo ne myando ne fipe fyakubomfya kuli uyu mulimo. Cila mwaume mumupeelele kabela ifipe ali nokusenda." 
Numbers4:33 Iyi e milimo indupwa sha bena Merari shili nokulabomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Itama mwana shimapepo Aroni ewakulabangalila mu milimo yabo.” 
Numbers4:34 Kanshi Mose na Aroni ne ntungulushi sha lukuta lwa bena Israeli epakupenda abena Koati, mu ndupwa na mu mayanda yabo." 
Numbers4:35 Abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50), abalingile ukulabombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo," 
Numbers4:36 impendwa yabo mu ndupwa mu ndupwa shabo yali amakana yabili ne myanda cine lubali na makumi yasano (2,750)." 
Numbers4:37 Kanshi iyi eyali e mpendwa ya bantu ba mu ndupwa sha bena Koati bonse, ababomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, abo Mose na Aroni bapendele ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Numbers4:38 Abena Geshoni nabo bapendelwe mu ndupwa na mu mayanda yabo. 
Numbers4:39 Abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50), abalingile ukulabombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo," 
Numbers4:40 impendwa mu ndupwa mu ndupwa shabo yali amakana yabili ne myanda mutanda na amakumi yatatu (2,630)." 
Numbers4:41 Kanshi iyi eyali e mpendwa ya bantu bonse aba mu ndupwa sha bena Geshoni, abalebomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, abo Mose na Aroni bapendele ngefyo Yawe abakonkomeshe." 
Numbers4:42 Abena Merari nabo bapendelwe mu ndupwa na mu mayanda yabo. 
Numbers4:43 Abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50), abalingile ukulabombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo," 
Numbers4:44 impendwa yabo mu ndupwa mu ndupwa shabo yali amakana yatatu ne myanda ibili (3,200)." 
Numbers4:45 Kanshi iyi eyali e mpendwa ya bantu bonse aba mu ndupwa sha bena Merari, abo Mose na Aroni bapendele ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Numbers4:46 Kanshi Mose na Aroni ne ntungulushi sha bena Israeli bapendele bonsefye abena Levi, mu ndupwa na mu mayanda yabo." 
Numbers4:47 Abaume bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ukufika na ku makumi yasano (50), abalingile ukulabombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kusenda ifipe," 
Numbers4:48 impendwa yabo yali amakana cine konse konse ne myanda isano na makumi cine konse konse (8,580)." 
Numbers4:49 Ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose, umuntu onse alipeelwe umulimo wakubomba ne cipe icakusenda. Awe bonse balipendelwe ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Numbers5:1 Yawe aebele Mose ukuti," 
Numbers5:2 “Konkomesha abena Israeli ukulatamfya umuntu onse mu nkambi uwalwala ubulwele bonse ubwambukila pa nkanda, nangu uo umubili wakwe upompa amafina mu musangofye onse, nangu umuntu onse uwakowela mukukumya ku citumbi ca muntu." 
Numbers5:3 Muletamfya aba bantu bonse abakowela abaume na banakashi mu nkambi, epakuti belakowesha nkambi yabo, umo ine njikala pakati kenu.”" 
Numbers5:4 Abena Israeli balyumfwilile no kutamfya bonse abakowela ukufuma pa nkambi. Bacitilefye umo mwine Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Numbers5:5 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers5:6 “Eba abena Israeli ukuti, umwaume nangu umwanakashi onse nga abifya ku mubiye mu nshila iyili yonse pakukanaba uwacine kuli ine ne Yawe, ala ninshi aba no mulandu kuli ine." 
Numbers5:7 Uyu muntu afwile ukuyebelela no kufuta pa bubifi acitile. Afwile kabili alundepo cimo ica pali fisano pali ifyo alefuta ifyakupeela umuntu abifishe. 
Numbers5:8 Lelo uyo muntu babifishe nga cakuti afwa elyo takwete ba lupwa bakufutako, ninshi umuntu uwabifya ali nokufuta kuli Yawe, ali nokupeela icakufuta kuli shimapepo, pamo pene na sukusuku uwakuleka ilambo lyakufuta pa fibi fyakwe." 
Numbers5:9 Onse umutuulo wamushilo untu abena Israeli baleta kuli shimapepo wakulaba wakwe. 
Numbers5:10 Ifyabupe fyamushilo fyonse ifyo umuntu atuula fyakwe, nomba ifyo apeela shimapepo fyena fyakwa shimapepo.”" 
Numbers5:11 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers5:12 “Landa ku bena Israeli no kubeba ukuti ngo mwanakashi apondokela umulume wakwe no kukanaba uwacishinka," 
Numbers5:13 alala no mwaume umbi mu bumfisolo, kabili ifyo acita tafishibikwe ku mulume, no kukowela kwakwe takwishibikwe ico kushali bakambone abamusangilishe," 
Numbers5:14 nga cakuti umwaume aikatwa no bufuba, alatunganya no mukashi, elyo kabili caba icacine nangu limbi tecacine tabembuka," 
Numbers5:15 kanshi umwaume uyo ali nokutwala umukashi wakwe kuli shimapepo. Pakuya kuli shimapepo, ali nokusenda ubunga bwa mutuulo bwa bale icapekumi cimo ca ku cipimo ca efa, ubwa pa mulandu wa mukashi. Lelo tafwile ukwitilapo amafuta nangu ukubikapo icinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icanunka ubusaka pa bunga, pantu mutuulo wa cabunga uwa mulandu wa bufuba kabili mutuulo wa cabunga uwa cibukisho pakuti icishinka cishibikwe." 
Numbers5:16 “Shimapepo nao ali nokubuula uyu mwanakashi no kumwiminika pa cinso cakwa Yawe. 
Numbers5:17 Elyo shimapepo akabuule amenshi yamushilo no kuyabika mu mutondo we bumba, kabili akabikemo no lukungu lwa mukati ke Tenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Numbers5:18 Ilyo shimapepo aiminika umwanakashi pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ali nokukakula umushishi wa uyo mwanakashi, no kubika ubunga bwa mutuulo bwa cibukisho mu minwe ekate, ekutila umutuulo wa cabunga wa pa bufuba. Shimapepo nao ninshi naikata ulunweno lwa menshi ayakantuka ayaleta ukulapishiwa." 
Numbers5:19 Elyo shimapepo akalenga umwanakashi ukulapa nokutila kuli ena, ‘Iwe nga cakuti tawapondweke no mwaume umbi talala nobe, nga tawabembwike no kuikowesha ilyo waliba no mulume obe, aya menshi ayakantuka ayaleta ukulapishiwa tayakuletele ubwafya nangu bumo." 
Numbers5:20 Lelo, nga walipondoka walala no mwaume umbi no kuikowesha ilyo waliba no mulume obe," 
Numbers5:21 Yawe nalenge abantu bonse bakulapishe no kukuseluka. Nalenge icisa cabufyashi cobe cisalwe ne fumo lyobe lifimbe. 
Numbers5:22 Amenshi aya ayaleta ukulapishiwa nayengile mu mubili obe, ne fumo lyobe lifimbe ne cisa cabufyashi cobe cisalwe.’ Umwanakashi nao pakwasuka atile, ‘Ameni, cibe ifyo fine.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Elyo shimapepo afwile ukulemba ishi ntipu mu citabo icipombwa, kabili akasambile amalembo alembele mu menshi ayakantuka." 
Numbers5:24 Shimapepo akapeela umwanakashi amenshi yakantuka ayaleta ukulapishiwa, nayo yakamuletele ukukalipwa munda nganshi." 
Numbers5:25 Shimapepo ali nokupoka ubunga ku mwanakashi ubwa mutuulo wa bufuba, abutambike kuli Yawe no kubuleta ku bulambo." 
Numbers5:26 Elyo abuulepo ulupi lumo ulwa bunga ngo mutuulo wacibukisho no kubocela pa bulambo, panuma ya ifi aleke umwanakashi anwe amenshi." 
Numbers5:27 Nga cakuti aliikowesha no kukanaba uwacishinka nga anwa amenshi ayaleta ukulapishiwa, lyena yakamulenga ukukalipwa nganshi, ifumo lyakwe likafimba ne cisa cakwe cikesalika. Uyu mwanakashi akaba uwalapishiwa mu bantu bakwe." 
Numbers5:28 Nomba nga cakuti uyu mwanakashi wakaele, no kuikowesha taikowesha, amenshi tayali nakumucita nangu kamo, cikalangwa ukuti wakaele, akafyala na bana." 
Numbers5:29 “Kanshi ili e funde lya pa bufuba, ngo mwanakashi uwaupwa abembuka no kuikowesha ilyo aba no mulume," 
Numbers5:30 nangu umwaume alatunganya umukashi wakwe no kuba no bufuba. Umwanakashi ali nokwimikwa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, na shimapepo ali nokucita kuli ena fyonse ukulingana ne funde ili line." 
Numbers5:31 Umwaume tali nakukwata mulandu nangu panono, nomba umwanakashi nga euli no mulandu wa bubifi, ena alingile ukukandwa pa bubifi bwakwe.”" 
Numbers6:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers6:2 “Landa ku bena Israeli no kubeba ukuti, umwaume nangu umwanakashi onse nga apanga icilayo icakuipatwila kuli Yawe ngo Munasiliti," 
Numbers6:3 afwile ukuleka ukunwa ubwalwa bwa mwangashi ne cakunwa conse icikola. Elanwa icakunwa nangu cimo icakantuka icakamwa ku myangashi nangu icikola ca fintu fimbi. Tafwile kunwa icakunwa ca fitwalo fya myangashi nangu kulya imyangashi iyauma nangu iyishauma. 
Numbers6:4 Apofye acili Munasiliti, talingile kulya icili conse icafuma ku mwangashi, inseke nangufye ifipapa." 
Numbers6:5 “Uyu muntu pa nshiku shonsefye isha cilayo cakwe icakuipatula, tafwile ukubeya ku mutwe, umushishi nangu imyefu. Afwile ukuba wamushilo mpaka inshiku alaile ishakuipatwila kuli Yawe shapwa. Alingile ukuleka umushishi ne myefu yakwe yalakulafye." 
Numbers6:6 Inshita yonse iyo aipatwila kuli Yawe tali nakupalama ku citumbi ca muntu. 
Numbers6:7 Nangufye cakwa wishi nangu nyina, nangu indume yakwe nangu inkashi yakwe nga ebafwile, tafwile kuikowesha pa mulandu wabo. Pantu icishibilo cakumwishibilako ukuti aliipatwila kuli Lesa caba pa mutwe wakwe." 
Numbers6:8 Yonse inshita iyo ailubwila kuli Yawe aba uwamushilo. 
Numbers6:9 “Kabili nga cakuti umuntu afwa imfwa yakupumikishafye pa menso ya Munasiliti, ninshi umushishi alubwila kuli Yawe wakowela. Alingile ukubeya umushishi ne myefu pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali bwa kusangulula kwakwe." 
Numbers6:10 Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse ali nokuleta utubondo twa nkunda tubili nangu utupele tubili kuli shimapepo pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Numbers6:11 Shimapepo nao ali nokuleka kamo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi, elyo kambi nako ilambo lyakoca pakufuta pa fyabubifi fyakwe, pantu alikowela pakuba apali icitumbi ca muntu. Pali bulya bushiku bwine, ali nokusangulula umushishi wakwe nakabili." 
Numbers6:12 Afwile ailubwila umwine kuli Yawe inshita yonse ilya aipatula, kabili afwile ukuleta na kana ka mpaanga akalume aka mwaka umo aka mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Inshiku aipatwile kale tashakabe nelyo cimo pantu aisa kowela panuma yakuipatula." 
Numbers6:13 “Nomba ili e funde lyakukonka Umunasiliti inshita yakwe iyakuipatwila nga yapwa. Bafwile ukumuleta pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Numbers6:14 Palya epo ali nokupeelela imituulo yakwe iyi kuli Yawe: Akana ka mpaanga akalume aka mwaka umo akabula akalema akakuleka ilambo lyakoca, akana ka mpaanga akakota aka mwaka umo akabula ubulema aka mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, elyo na sukusuku umo uwabula ubulema uwakutuula umutuulo wakwampana pamo." 
Numbers6:15 Alundepo umutuulo wa cabunga no wa cakunwa, umuseke umo uwa mikate yabulamo intutumushi, no tumikate twapangwa ku bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa, elyo no tumikate twapapatala utwasubwako amafuta ya miolifa, pamo no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa cakunwa." 
Numbers6:16 “Shimapepo ali nokutuula fyonse ifi pa cinso cakwa Yawe kabili atuulile umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi ne lambo lyakoca. 
Numbers6:17 Ali nokutuula umutuulo wakwampana pamo no kutuula ilambo lya sukusuku kuli Yawe, umuseke umo uwa mikate iyabula intutumushi, umutuulo wa cabunga no wa cakunwa." 
Numbers6:18 Elyo pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo Umunasiliti abeye imishishi apatwilile kuli Yawe no kuiposa mu mulilo apalepya umutuulo wakwampana pamo. 
Numbers6:19 “Umunasiliti nga apwisha ukubeya umushishi wakuipatwilapo, shimapepo ali nokubuula ukuboko kwakwa sukusuku uwaipikwa, elyo na mu museke namo abuulemo umukate umo uwatikama na kamukate kamo akapapatala, fyonse umwabula intutumushi, no kupeela Umunasiliti pakuti eo ekate." 
Numbers6:20 Shimapepo ali nokutambika ifi fyonse kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wa cakutambika. Fyena fyamushilo ifyo shimapepofye eka ewingasendako pamo ne cisao icatambikwa ne tanta ilituulilwe. Panuma ya ifi, Umunasiliti kuti anwa umwangashi." 
Numbers6:21 “Kanshi ili e funde lya Munasiliti uwalaya icilayo kuli Yawe ukulingana no kupatulwa kwakwe, ukucilapo pafyo umwine engaitemenwa ukupeela. Afwile ukufikilisha ifyo alaile ukulingana ne funde lya bunasaliti.”" 
Numbers6:22 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers6:23 “Webe Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ukuti, aya e mashiwi balebomfya pakupaala abena Israeli, baletila," 
Numbers6:24 “Yawe alemupaala no kumubaka. 
Numbers6:25 Yawe alenge icinso cakwe cimusanikile, kabili amukwatile ne cikuuku." 
Numbers6:26 Yawe namulange icinso cakwe kabili amupeele no mutende. 
Numbers6:27 “Ifi efyo bakalalumbula ishina lyandi, ilyo balepaala abena Israeli, na ine kabili nkabapaala.”" 
Numbers7:1 Pa bushiku Mose apwile ukwimika Itenti lyakwa Lesa, alisuba amafuta no kulilubwila kuli Yawe pamo ne fipe fyonse ifyabamo. Mose kabili asubile no bulambo pamo ne fibombelo fyabuko fyonse no kufilubwila kuli Yawe." 
Numbers7:2 Elyo abakalamba ba nko sha bena Israeli, intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo pamo nabo abaleangalila bonse abapendelwe, batuulile umutuulo." 
Numbers7:3 Baletele nge mituulo yabo pa cinso cakwa Yawe amaceleta mutanda ayafimbwa pamo ne ŋombe ikumi limo na shibili (12) ishilume. Intungulushi shibili shibili shaletele iceleta limo limo, elyo shaleta ne ŋombe imo imo. Ishi ŋombe shatuulilwe lwapantanshi ye Tenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Numbers7:4 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers7:5 “Pokelela ifyo batuula fyonse, pakuti balefibomfya mu mulimo wa mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Fipeele ku bena Levi balefibomfya ukulingana no mulimo cila umo ali nokubomba.”" 
Numbers7:6 Kanshi Mose epakubuula iŋombe na maceleta afipeela na ku bena Levi. 
Numbers7:7 Abena Geshoni abapeele iŋombe shine na maceleta yabili, ukulingana ne fyalefwaikwa mu milimo yabo." 
Numbers7:8 Abena Merari abapeele amaceleta yane ne ŋombe cine konse konse, ukulingana ne fyalefwaikwa mu milimo yabo. Uwalebangalila bonse ni Itama mwana Aroni shimapepo." 
Numbers7:9 Lelo Mose tapeeleko abena Koati nangu kamo pa maceleta ne ŋombe, pantu bena ebalesenda ifipe fyamushilo pa mabeya ngo mulimo wabo." 
Numbers7:10 Ilyo ubulambo bwasubilwe amafuta elyo intungulushi shatwala umutuulo pantanshi yabuko pakubulubwila kuli Yawe. 
Numbers7:11 Yawe epakweba Mose ati, “Cila bushiku intungulushi imo ileleta umutuulo uwakulubwilapo kuli Yawe ubulambo.”" 
Numbers7:12 Uwaishile tuula umutuulo pa bushiku bwantanshi ni Nashoni mwana Aminadabu uwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda. 
Numbers7:13 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo umo uwa silifa uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:14 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina tumashekeli ikumi limo iyaisulamo ububani. 
Numbers7:15 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:16 Atuulile na sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi," 
Numbers7:17 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Nashoni, umwana umwaume wakwa Aminadabu." 
Numbers7:18 Pa bushiku bwacibili uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Netaneli mwana Suari, intungulushi ya luko lwakwa Isaka." 
Numbers7:19 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo umo wa silifa uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:20 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:21 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:22 Atuulile na sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:23 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Netaneli mwana Suari." 
Numbers7:24 Pa bushiku bwacitatu uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Eliabu mwana Eloni, intungulushi ya luko lwakwa Sebuloni." 
Numbers7:25 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo umo uwa silifa wafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:26 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:27 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:28 Atuulile na sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:29 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Eliabu mwana Eloni." 
Numbers7:30 Pa bushiku bwacine uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Elisuri mwana Shedeuri intungulushi ya luko lwakwa Rubeni. 
Numbers7:31 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika no musambilo umo wa silifa uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:32 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:33 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:34 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:35 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Elisuri mwana Shedeuri." 
Numbers7:36 Pa bushiku bwacisano uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Shelumieli mwana Surishadai uwa mu luko lwakwa Simeoni. 
Numbers7:37 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo umo uwa silifa uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:38 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:39 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:40 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:41 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Shelumieli mwana Surishadai." 
Numbers7:42 Pa bushiku bwa mutanda uwaishile leta umutuulo ni Eliasafu mwana Deweli, intungulushi ya luko lwakwa Gadi." 
Numbers7:43 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo umo uwa silifa uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:44 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:45 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:46 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:47 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Eliasafu mwana Deweli." 
Numbers7:48 Pa bushiku bwa cine lubali uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Elishama mwana Amiudi intungulushi ya mu luko lwakwa Efulemu. 
Numbers7:49 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo wa silifa umo uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:50 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:51 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:52 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:53 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Elishama mwana Amiudi." 
Numbers7:54 Pa bushiku bwa cine konse konse uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Gamalieli mwana Pedasuri intungulushi ya mu luko lwakwa Manase. 
Numbers7:55 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo wa silifa umo uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:56 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:57 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:58 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:59 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Gamalieli mwana Pedasuri." 
Numbers7:60 Pa bushiku bwa pabula uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Abidani mwana Gideoni intungulushi ya luko lwakwa Benjamini. 
Numbers7:61 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo wa silifa umo uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:62 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:63 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:64 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:65 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Abidani mwana Gideoni." 
Numbers7:66 Pa bushiku bwe kumi limo uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Ahieseri mwana Amishadai intungulushi ya mu luko lwakwa Dani. 
Numbers7:67 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo wa silifa umo uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:68 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:69 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo na sukusuku umo, na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:70 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:71 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Ahieseri mwana Amishadai." 
Numbers7:72 Pa bushiku bwe kumi limo na bumo (11) uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Pagieli mwana Okirani intungulushi ya mu luko lwakwa Asheri. 
Numbers7:73 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo wa silifa umo uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:74 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide iyafina amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo, iyaisulamo ububani." 
Numbers7:75 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:76 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:77 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Pagieli mwana Okirani." 
Numbers7:78 Kabili pa bushiku bwe kumi limo na shibili (12) uwaishile tuula umutuulo ni Ahira mwana Enani intungulushi ya mu luko lwakwa Naftali. 
Numbers7:79 Umutuulo atuulile ni mbale ya silifa iyafina kilo umo na citika, no musambilo wa silifa umo uwafina ukucila citika wa kilo, ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Fyonse fibili fyaleba ifyaisulamo ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ngo mutuulo wa cabunga." 
Numbers7:80 Elyo atuulile ne mbale imo iya golide tumashekeli ikumi limo iyaisulamo ububani. 
Numbers7:81 Atuulile ne ciponti cimo, sukusuku umo na kana ka mpaanga kamo akalume akalifye no mwaka umo, ifyakuleka ilambo lyakoca." 
Numbers7:82 Atuulile sawe umo uwakuleka umutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. 
Numbers7:83 Kabili pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana, atuulile iŋombe shibili ishilume, basukusuku basano, basawe basano no twana twa mpaanga utulume tusano utuli no mwaka umo. Kanshi uyu ewali umutuulo wakwa Ahira mwana Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Iyi e mituulo intu intungulushi sha bena Israeli shatuulile pakulubwila Yawe ubulambo, ilyo babusubile amafuta. Batuulile imbale sha silifa ikumi limo na shibili (12), imisambilo ya silifa ikumi limo na ibili (12) ne mbale sha golide nasho ikumi limo na shibili (12)." 
Numbers7:85 Cila mbale ya silifa yafinine kilo umo na citika, elyo cila musambilo wafinine ukucila citika wa kilo. Fyonse pamo ifya silifa fyafinine amakilo amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28), ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo." 
Numbers7:86 Cila mbale ya golide iyaisula ububani yafinine amagramu umwanda umo ne kumi limo ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo. Imbale shonse ikumi limo na shibili isha golide shafinine ukucila panono pali kilo umo. 
Numbers7:87 Impendwa ya nama she lambo lyakoca yali ifiponti fya ŋombe ishilume ikumi limo na fibili (12), basukusuku ikumi limo na babili (12), utwana twa mpaanga utwa mwakafye umo umo utulume ikumi limo na tubili (12) pamo pene ne fyamituulo fya cabunga. Basawe ikumi limo na babili (12) bali ba mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi." 
Numbers7:88 Impendwa ya nama shakoca ilambo lyakwampana yonse yali amakumi yabili na shine (24) aya bacilume wa ŋombe, basukusuku bali amakumi mutanda (60), basawe amakumi mutanda (60), utwana twa mpaanga ishilume isha mwaka umo umo nato twali amakumi mutanda (60). Iyi yali e mituulo yakulubwila ubulambo kuli Yawe panuma babusubile amafuta." 
Numbers7:89 Ilyo Mose aingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo kukulanda na Yawe, aleumfwa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lilelanda kuli ena ukufuma pa mulu wa Nkupiko ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano apakufutilapo ifyabubifi, pakati ka bakerubi babili." 
Numbers8:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers8:2 “Landa na Aroni, umwebe auti, nga wateka ifisaniko cine lubali, ulefiteka apakuti ulubuuto lulesanikila kuntanshi ya cakutekapo ifisaniko.”" 
Numbers8:3 Aroni nao efyo acitile. Atekele ifisaniko apakuti filesanikila pantanshi ya cakutekapo ifisaniko ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Numbers8:4 Ifi efyo icakutekapo ifisaniko capangilwe. Capangilwe na golide iyo bafulila ku nondo, ukufumafye pamulu apafulilwe amaluba no kufika na panshi. Icakutekapo ifisaniko capangilwe ukulingana nefyo Yawe alangile Mose." 
Numbers8:5 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers8:6 “Buula abena Levi no kubapatula ku bena Israeli bonse, ubasangulule no kubasangulula." 
Numbers8:7 Ucite ifi pakubasangulula. Ubasanse amenshi yakubasangulwila, bali nokubeya umubili onse elyo bacape ne fyakufwala fyabo, lyena ninshi baisangulula." 
Numbers8:8 Babuule iciponti cimo, pamo no mutuulo wa cabunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwasanshiwamo amafuta. Elyo babuule ne ciponti cabubili icakutuula umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi." 
Numbers8:9 Ukeminike abena Levi pa ntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo no kulonganika ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli bonse. 
Numbers8:10 Ukalete abena Levi pa cinso cakwa Yawe, kabili na bena Israeli bakatambalikepo amaboko yabo pa mitwe yabo." 
Numbers8:11 Aroni akalubwile abena Levi kuli ine ne Yawe ngo mutuulo wakutambika untu abena Israeli bantuula. Epakuti balebomba imilimo yakwa Yawe. 
Numbers8:12 Abena Levi nga batambalika amaboko pa mitwe ya bacilume wa ŋombe babili, umo ali nokutuulwa kuli Yawe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi, elyo umbi nao nge lambo lyakoca ilyakufuta pa fyabubifi fya bena Levi." 
Numbers8:13 “Leka abena Levi beminine pantanshi yakwa Aroni na bana bakwe abaume no kubatuula ngo mutuulo wakutambika kuli Yawe. 
Numbers8:14 Ifi efyo ukapatula abena Levi ukufuma ku bena Israeli bambi, na bena Levi bakaba bandi." 
Numbers8:15 Nga wapwisha ukusangulula abena Levi no kubatuula ngo mutuulo wakutambika, elyo bakaleisa mukubomba umulimo wabo mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers8:16 Bena mu bena Israeli ebafwile ukupeelwa onse kuli ine. Nalibacita abandi pa malo ya mabeli ya bana abaume aba mwanakashi onse umwina Israeli. 
Numbers8:17 Ibeli lyonse ilyaume mu Israeli, umuntu nangu inama, lyandi. Ilyo naipeye amabeli yonse mu Egupto, nalibapatwila kuli ne mwine." 
Numbers8:18 Lelo nalibuula abena Levi pa malo ya bana abaume bonse amabeli ya bena Israeli. 
Numbers8:19 Pali bonse abena Israeli napeela abena Levi kuli Aroni na bana bakwe abaume ngo bupe, pakuti balebombela abena Israeli umulimo wa mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. Kabili ebo balebafutilako pa filubo, pakutila icinkunka tacibaponene nga bapalama mupepi ne cifulo camushilo.”" 
Numbers8:20 Mose, Aroni no lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli bonse nabo bacitile abena Levi ngefyo Mose bamukonkomeshe kuli Yawe." 
Numbers8:21 Abena Levi nabo baisangulula, bacapa ne fyakufwala fyabo. Elyo Aroni abatuula ngo mutuulo wakutambika ku cinso cakwa Yawe. Kabili abafutilako na pa filubo pakuti basangululwe." 
Numbers8:22 Panuma ya ifi, abena Levi baingila mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo mukubomba imilimo yabo. Abalebangalila ni Aroni na bana bakwe abaume. Ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose, efyo bacitile abena Levi." 
Numbers8:23 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers8:24 “Ifi efyo cili nokuba ku bena Levi. Abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25) no kucilapo ebali nokulabombela mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Numbers8:25 Lelo bakalaleka ukubomba imilimo ya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo nga bafisha imyaka amakumi yasano (50). 
Numbers8:26 Nga baleka, kuti baleafwako abena Levi banabo ukulabomba imilimo ya mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, lelo tabafwile ukubomba iyi milimo, bena kwafwakofye. Kanshi ifi efyo wakulaakanya abena Levi imilimo.”" 
Numbers9:1 Mu matololo ya Sinai mu mweshi wakubalilapo, mu mwaka walenga bubili apo abena Israeli bafumine mu calo ca Egupto, Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers9:2 “Uleke abena Israeli basefye Ipasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, pa nshita yapimwa," 
Numbers9:3 Mukasefye pa nshita iyalinga pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) mu mweshi wine uyu, ukutendekafye lilya akasuba kawa. Mukakonke amafunde ne fipope fya pa nshikunkulu ye Pasaka.”" 
Numbers9:4 Kanshi Mose epakweba abantu ukuti basefye inshikunkulu ye Pasaka. 
Numbers9:5 Abena Israeli epakusefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka mu matololo ya Sinai lilya akasuba kawa, pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine mu mweshi wakubalilapo. Abena Israeli bacitilefye fyonse ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Numbers9:6 Lelo abaume bamo tabasefesheko Ipasaka pali ubo bushiku pantu bali abakowela ico bakumishe ku citumbi ca muntu. Kanshi abo bantu epakuya kuli Mose na Aroni pa bushiku bwine bulya 
Numbers9:7 no kumweba abati, “Ifwe tuli abakowela pantu natukumya ku citumbi ca muntu, nomba bushe cinshi batulesesha ukutuula umutuulo kuli Yawe pamo na bena Israeli banensu pa nshita yapimwa?”" 
Numbers9:8 Mose abasuka ati, “Pembeleni muleke ŋumfwe ifyo Yawe alalanda pali imwe.”" 
Numbers9:9 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers9:10 “Eba abena Israeli ati, umo pali imwe nangu pa bana benu nga aikowesha ico akumishe ku citumbi ca muntu, nangu ico ali kumbi pa bulendo, kuti nalyo line basefya inshikunkulu yakwa Yawe iye Pasaka." 
Numbers9:11 Mu mweshi wabubili emo bafwile ukusefya pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) cilya akasuba kawa. Bali nokulya umwana wa mpaanga, kumo ne mikate ishatutumuka ne misalu iyalula." 
Numbers9:12 Beshapo nelyo kamo akakuti kafika ku ulucelo, nangu ukutoba amafupa ya nama tabafwile kutoba iyoo. Ilyo balesefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka bakonke amafunde yonsefye." 
Numbers9:13 Nomba umuntu nga ali uwasanguluka, kabili tali pa bulendo, lelo akaanafye ukusefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka, uyo muntu wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi, pantu akaana ukutuula umutuulo kuli Yawe pa nshita yapimwa. Uyo muntu ailetelelafye umwine ku bubifi bwakwe." 
Numbers9:14 Ngo mwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe nao alefwaya ukusefyako inshikunkulu yakwa Yawe iye Pasaka, nasefyeko, lelo akonke amafunde ne fipope fya nshikunkulu yonsefye. Amafunde yakukonka mukakwate yamo yene ku muntu onse, nangu abe umwinafyalo nangu umukaya.”" 
Numbers9:15 Ubushiku Itenti lyakwa Lesa ilya Cipangano lyapwile ukwimikwa, ikumbi lyaishile likupa. Ukufuma icungulo ukufika ulucelo, ikumbi lyakupile Itenti lyalemoneka ngo mulilo." 
Numbers9:16 Efyo kanshi catwalilile ukuba, akasuba ikumbi lyalelikupa elyo bushiku lyalemoneka ngo mulilo." 
Numbers9:17 Lyonsefye ilyo ikumbi lyaima pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa, abena Israeli nabo balefuma pali ilya nkambi, kabili apo ikumbi lyaiminina, nabo epo bacita inkambi." 
Numbers9:18 Abena Israeli balekuuka pa nkambi ilyo Yawe abeba ukukuuka, kabili ilyo abeba ukucita inkambi balecita. Tabalefuma pa nkambi ikumbi nga nalikupa Itenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Numbers9:19 Ikumbi nga lyaikala pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa pa nshita itali, abena Israeli nabo baleikalafye pali iyo nkambi mukunakila ifyo Yawe abakonkomeshe." 
Numbers9:20 Limo limo ikumbi lyaleikala pamulu we Tenti lyakwa Lesa inshiku ishinonofye. Yawe nga abakonkomesha ukuti bacite inkambi ninshi kucita, elyo kabili nga atila bafume pa nkambi ninshi kufumapo." 
Numbers9:21 Inshita shimo ikumbi lyaleikalafye ukufuma icungulo ukufika ulucelo, kabili ilyo lyaima mu lucelo nabo baleima ukufuma pali iyo nkambi. Cibe bushiku nangu akasuba, inshita yonse ikumbi lyaima nabo ninshi kwima." 
Numbers9:22 Ikumbi nga lyaikala pamulu we Tenti lyakwa Lesa inshiku shibili, nangu umweshi umo, nangu umwaka umo na bena Israeli nabo ninshi baleikala apo pene pa nkambi ukwabula ukuselapo. Nomba nge kumbi lyaima, nabo ninshi kufumapo." 
Numbers9:23 Balenakila ifyo Yawe abeba ukupitila muli Mose. Yawe nga abakonkomesha ukuti bacite inkambi ninshi kucita, elyo kabili nga Yawe abakonkomesha ukufuma pa nkambi ninshi kufumapo." 
Numbers10:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers10:2 “Panga amapenga yabili aya silifa ayo bafulila ku nondo ayakwitilako ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli pamo no kubeshibishako pakufuma pa nkambi. 
Numbers10:3 Nga balisha amapenga yonse yabili, ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse ninshi kwisa longana pantanshi yobe pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers10:4 Nga limofye elyalila, ninshi intungulushi, abakalamba ba nko sha bena Israeli, eshili nokulongana pantanshi yobe." 
Numbers10:5 Likalati ipenga nga lyalila, ninshi inko shacitile inkambi ku kabanga kwima ukufuma pa nkambi." 
Numbers10:6 Ilyo kabili ipenga lyabubili lyalila inko shacitile inkambi shabela ku kapinda ka ku kulyo nasho shili nokufuma pa nkambi. Kanshi ukulisha kwe penga kukaba e cishibilo cakufuma pa nkambi. 
Numbers10:7 Pakwita abantu bonse pamo mulelisha amapenga, lelo likalalila umusowa umo wine." 
Numbers10:8 Bamwana Aroni abaume, bashimapepo, ebafwile ukulisha amapenga. Ili e funde muli nokukonka umukakonkanina inkulo shenu shonse." 
Numbers10:9 Ilyo mwalalwa inkondo no mulwani wenu uukalamucusha mu calo cenu, mukaleikatisha ukulisha amapenga, na Yawe Lesa wenu akamwibukisha no kumupususha ku balwani benu." 
Numbers10:10 Kabili mukalelisha amapenga na pa nshita shenu ishakusansamuka, pa nshikunkulu ishasontwa, na pa nshikunkulu yakutampa umweshi upya. Mukalelisha amapenga pakuleka amalambo yakoca na pakupeela umutuulo wakwampana. Ifi fikaba ifyakumwibukishako kuli Yawe Lesa wenu. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili (20), mu mweshi wabubili, mu mwaka walenga bubili, ikumbi lyalimine ukufuma pe Tenti lyakwa Lesa ilya Cipangano." 
Numbers10:12 Abena Israeli nabo epakwima ukufuma pa nkambi ya mu matololo ya Sinai, balati bafuma apa baya pambi mpaka ikumbi lyaiminina mu matololo ya Parani." 
Numbers10:13 Baimine no kuya umuku wakubalilapo ukulingana nefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Numbers10:14 Aba mu ciputulwa ca nkambi yakwa Yuda ebabalilepo ukwima no luunga lwabo, baleba mu mpuka mu mpuka. Uwalebatungulula ni Nashoni mwana Aminadabu." 
Numbers10:15 Netaneli mwana Sua, nao ewaletungulula impuka ya luko lwakwa Isaka," 
Numbers10:16 kabili Eliabu mwana Eloni, nao aletungulula impuka ya luko lwakwa Sebuloni." 
Numbers10:17 Elyo bapangulula Itenti lyakwa Lesa, abena Geshoni na bena Merari abalelisenda nabo baima." 
Numbers10:18 Abalekonkapo ukwima ba mu ciputulwa ca nkambi yakwa Rubeni no luunga lwabo, mu mpuka mu mpuka. Uwalebatungulula ni Elisuli mwana Shedeuri." 
Numbers10:19 Shelumieli mwana Sulishadai, ewaletungulula impuka ya luko lwakwa Simeoni," 
Numbers10:20 kabili Eliasafu mwana Deweli, nao ewaletungulula impuka ya luko lwakwa Gadi." 
Numbers10:21 Elyo abena Koati baima, basenda ifyamushilo. Itenti lyakwa Lesa bali nokusanga naliimikwa kale libe tabalafika." 
Numbers10:22 Abalekonkapo ukwima ba mu ciputulwa ca nkambi yakwa Efulemu no luunga lwabo, mu mpuka mu mpuka. Uwalebatungulula ni Elishama mwana Amiudi." 
Numbers10:23 Gamalieli mwana Pedasuri, ewaletungulula impuka ya luko lwakwa Manase," 
Numbers10:24 kabili Abidani mwana Gideoni, nao alatungulula impuka ya luko lwakwa Benjamini." 
Numbers10:25 Na pakulekelesha abaleshalila kunumafye ya bonse, ba mu ciputulwa ca nkambi yakwa Dani no luunga lwabo, nabo baima mu mpuka mu mpuka. Uwalebatungulula ni Aiesa mwana Amishadai." 
Numbers10:26 Pafieli mwana Okirani, ewaletungulula impuka ya luko lwakwa Asheri," 
Numbers10:27 kabili Aila mwana Enani, nao aletungulula impuka ya luko lwakwa Naftali." 
Numbers10:28 Kanshi ifi efyo impuka sha bena Israeli shalekonkana pakwenda nga shafuma pa nkambi. 
Numbers10:29 Elyo Mose aebele Hobabu mwana Reueli umwina Midiani shifyala wakwa Mose ati, “Ifwe nomba twalaima ukuya ku ncende iyo Yawe atile, ‘Nkaipeela kuli imwe.’ Natuleya bonse na ifwe tukaya kucitila ubusuma, pantu Yawe alaya Israeli ifintu ifisuma.”" 
Numbers10:30 Hobabu nao ayaswike ati, “Awe, ine nshakonke, nalabwelelamofye ku calo candi, kabili ku bantu bandi.”" 
Numbers10:31 Lelo Mose nao atile, “Napapata wiya utushe iyoo. Niwe wishibe apo twingacita inkambi mu matololo, kabili iwe kuti waba amenso yesu." 
Numbers10:32 Nga cakuti iwe twaya nobe, ninshi ifwe tukaya kwakanyako ifisuma fyonse ifyo Yawe akatupeela.”" 
Numbers10:33 Kanshi elyo baimine ukufuma pa lupili lwakwa Yawe, baendele inshiku shitatu. Muli ishi nshiku, Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe lyonse eyaleba pantanshi, pakufwaya incende iyo bengacitapo inkambi." 
Numbers10:34 Ikumbi lyakwa Yawe lyali pa mulu wabo mu nshita ya kasuba ilyo baimine ukufuma pa nkambi. 
Numbers10:35 Ilyo lyonse Imbokoshi ya Cipangano yaleima Mose alesosa ati, “Ima, we Yawe! Abalwani bobe bengapasangana, na bakupata leka bafulumuke ku cinso cobe.”" 
Numbers10:36 Kabili lyonsefye ilyo baletula Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, Mose alesosa ati, “Bwela, we Yawe ku mintapendwa ya makana yakwa Israeli.”" 
Numbers11:1 Kabili abantu bailishenye kuli Yawe mu matwi yakwe pa mulandu wa kucula kwabo. Nao Yawe pakumfwa, afulwa nganshi. Elyo umulilo ukufuma kuli Yawe wapile pali bena no koca imbali shimo isha ku mpela ya nkambi." 
Numbers11:2 Elyo abantu balila mutuule kuli Mose. Nao Mose apepa kuli Yawe, awe no mulilo washima." 
Numbers11:3 Eco ilya ncende baitile Tabera, pantu umulilo wafumine kuli Yawe no kuboca." 
Numbers11:4 Nomba abenafyalo abali mu bena Israeli balafwaisha ifyakulya fimbi. Abena Israeli nabo nakabili balalila abati, “Yangu ukwakumona inama shakulya!" 
Numbers11:5 Twaibukisha isabi twalelya ilishili lyakushita, kabili ne fibimbi, amameloni, amaliki, kanyense na galiki ifyo twalelya." 
Numbers11:6 Nomba ifwe kwalifita na ku mukoshi, tatumona nangu cimo kanofye maana inshiku shonse!”" 
Numbers11:7 Maana ali nge nseke sha kolianda, kabili alemoneka nge cinyamuti." 
Numbers11:8 Abantu baleya mukukusa, elyo bapela nangu ukutwa mwibende. Balemwipika mu nongo no kupangako imikate. Mukulya, aleumfwika ngo mukate bapangile ku mafuta ya miolifa." 
Numbers11:9 Ilyo umume wawila pa nkambi ubushiku, elyo maana nao alepona." 
Numbers11:10 Mose aumfwile uko abantu balelila, cila lupwa pa mwinshi we tenti lyabo. Yawe abafulilwa nganshi, na Mose asakamana apakalamba." 
Numbers11:11 Aipusha Yawe ati, “Bushe cinshi waletela ubu bwafya pa mubomfi obe? Bushe cinshi ncitile icishikusekeshe, pakuti untwike icisendo icakula ifi ica bantu bonse aba?" 
Numbers11:12 Bushe nine naimite aba bantu bonse? Bushe nine nabafyele? Nga kanshi cinshi ico ulenjebela ukuti ndebasenda mu maboko yandi, nga filya umuleshi asenda akanya, ku calo ico walaile ifikolwe fyabo no mulapo?" 
Numbers11:13 Bushe ni kwi ningafumya inama shakulisha abantu bonse aba? Balelilila kuli ine abati, ‘Tupeele inama tulye!’" 
Numbers11:14 Ine nekafye teti mbasende abantu bonse aba, icisendo cafinisha kuli ine!" 
Numbers11:15 Ifi nga efyo ukalancita, ninshi unjipayefye nombaline. Nga waŋumfwilako uluse, uleke mfwefye, pakuti nipita mu bubi ubwakuti bungonaule.”" 
Numbers11:16 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Nonganikila abakalamba ba bena Israeli amakumi cine lubali (70), abo waishiba ukuti e ntungulushi sha bantu kabili babomfi babo. Ubalete kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo eko bese beminine pamo nobe." 
Numbers11:17 Ine ndeika kukulanda na iwe kulya, kabili ndeisa buulapo amaka yamo aya Mupashi uo nabika pali iwe no kuyabika na pali bena. Ebakulakwafwako ukusenda icisendo ca bantu abo uli nabo, epakuti wilasenda ici cisendo weka." 
Numbers11:18 Kebe abantu auti, muisangulule mwe bene pakuipekanya ku bushiku bwa mailo ilyo mukalya inama. Yawe alyumfwile ilyo mwalilile amuti, ‘Yangu nani aletupeela inama yakulya! Twali bwino mu Egupto!’ Nomba Yawe alamupeela inama iyakuti mulye." 
Numbers11:19 Tamwakalyefye pa bushiku bumo, nangu pa nshiku shibili nangu shisano, nangu pa nshiku ikumi, nangu pa nshiku amakumi yabili," 
Numbers11:20 lelo umweshi umo uutuntulu, mpakafye inama shikalefumina na mu myona yenu, kabili shikamutendushe. Pantu imwe namusuula Yawe uwikala na imwe, kabili mwailishenye pa cinso cakwe amuti, ‘Bushe cinshi twafumine ku Egupto?’”" 
Numbers11:21 Mose nao aebele Yawe ati, “Pano ndi pakati ka bantu amakana imyanda mutanda (600,000) abaleenda pa makasa, elyo na iwe watila uli nokubapeela inama shakulyafye umweshi umo uutuntulu!" 
Numbers11:22 Bushe kuti baipaya iŋombe, imbushi ne mpaanga ishingabakumana bonse aba? Bushe nga babepaila isabi lyonse lya muli bemba kuti lyabakumana bonse aba?”" 
Numbers11:23 Yawe ayaswike Mose ati, “Bushe ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwalipipisha? Nomba uli nokumona ico nalanda nga cili nokuba icishinka kuli iwe!”" 
Numbers11:24 Elyo Mose afumine no kuya eba abantu ifyo Yawe amwebele. Akolonganya ne ntungulushi amakumi cine lubali (70), no kubemika ukushinguluka Itenti." 
Numbers11:25 Kanshi Yawe nao aikila mwikumbi no kulanda na Mose, abuula no Mupashi uwali pali Mose, aubika na pa ntungulushi amakumi cine lubali (70). Ilyo Umupashi waikala pali shena, shalasesema, lelo tashatalile ashisesema nakabili." 
Numbers11:26 Lelo kwashele abaume babili mu nkambi, amashina yabo ni Elidadi na Medadi. Nabo bene bali pa mpendwa ya ntungulushi, nomba bena tabaile kwi Tenti. Nomba mulya mwine mu nkambi nabo Umupashi waishile pali bena, no kulasesema balasesema." 
Numbers11:27 Umulumendo umo aile ulubilo kukweba Mose ati, “Elidadi na Medadi balesesema mu nkambi.”" 
Numbers11:28 Elyo Yoshua mwana Nuni, kafwilisha wakwa Mose mu milimo ukufumafye mu bulumendo bwakwe, alanda no kusosa ati, “Mose, we mfumu yandi, baleshefye!”" 
Numbers11:29 Nao Mose amwasuka ati, “Bushe iwe uli no bufuba palwa ine? Ala kuti natemwa bonse abantu bakwa Yawe baba bakasesema nga Yawe kuti abika Umupashi wakwe pali bena!”" 
Numbers11:30 Kanshi Mose ne ntungulushi sha bena Israeli epakubwelelamo ku nkambi. 
Numbers11:31 Elyo Yawe atumine umwela ukufuma pali bemba, wasenda inkwale ukushileta ku nkambi. Shashinguluka inkambi konse konse ukufika napo umuntu engenda ubushiku bumo uku noku, kabili ukuya mu mulu ukufuma pa mushili mita umo." 
Numbers11:32 Kanshi akasuba konse no bushiku bonse kabili no bushiku bwakonkelepo abantu baile baleikatafye inkwale. Takwali uwafililwe ukulonganika inkwale ukufika pa cipimo ca bahomeri ikumi limo. Elyo bashikanika na mu mbali ya nkambi. 
Numbers11:33 Ilyo inama shali tashilapwa isho balelya, Yawe alibafulilwe abatumina icikuko icibi nganshi." 
Numbers11:34 Nabo epakwinika ilya ncende ishina ukuti ni pa Kibroti Hatafa, pantu palya pene epo bashiikile abantu abalefwa ku cikasha." 
Numbers11:35 Ukufuma ku Kibroti Hatafa abena Israeli baile cita inkambi ku Haseloti eko baikala. 
Numbers12:1 Miriamu na Aroni baleisosha pali Mose pa mulandu wakuupa umwanakashi umwina Kushi, pantu ca cine aupile umwina Kushi." 
Numbers12:2 Balalanda abati, “Bushe Yawe alandila muli Mose ekafye? Bushe talandila na muli ifwe bene?” Kabili Yawe nao aumfwa ifyo balelanda." 
Numbers12:3 Nomba Mose ali umuntu uwafuuka nganshi ukucila abantu bonse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse. 
Numbers12:4 Apopene Yawe aebele Mose, Aroni na Miriamu ati, “Imwe bonse batatu iseni kunse kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo.” Elyo bonse batatu baya." 
Numbers12:5 Elyo Yawe epakwikila mu ntumba ye kumbi pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, epo aiminina no kwita Aroni na Miriamu. Ilyo bonse babili baile lwa pantanshi," 
Numbers12:6 Yawe alabeba ati, “Nomba, umfweni amashiwi yandi! Nga kasesema wakwa Yawe ali pakati kenu, ndaisokolola kuli ena mu fimonwa, ndalanda nankwe mu filoto." 
Numbers12:7 Nomba caibela ku mubomfi wandi Mose, wena wacishinka mu ŋanda yandi yonse." 
Numbers12:8 Eico wena pakulanda nankwe tulamonana, tulanda apabuuta tuutu kabili te mu mapinda. Ena alimona ne cata candi ine ne Yawe! Nomba imwe cinshi mushatiinine ukuisosha pa mubomfi wandi Mose?”" 
Numbers12:9 Yawe epakubafulilwa nganshi, kabili afumapo." 
Numbers12:10 Ilyo ikumbi lyafuma pa mulu we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, Miriamu apo aiminine alwala ifibashi, abuutapo na tuutu ngo bunga bwa mfula. Aroni ati aloleshe Miriamu, amumona ne fibashi." 
Numbers12:11 Aroni aeba Mose ati, “We mfumu yandi, napapata, witukanda pantu natubifya mu bupuba bwesu." 
Numbers12:12 Wileka abe nga kapopo kafyalwa mwifumo lyakwa nyina no mubili uwaliwa lubali.” 
Numbers12:13 Elyo Mose epakulilila kuli Yawe ati, “We Lesa, napapata muposhe!”" 
Numbers12:14 Yawe ayaswike ati, “Nga cakuti wishi amufwishile amate pa menso, bushe Miriamu nga tasebene inshiku cine lubali? Kanshi mwisalileni kunse ya nkambi pa nshiku cine lubali, na panuma elyo bakamubweshe.”" 
Numbers12:15 Elyo Miriamu baya mwisalila kunse ya nkambi pa nshiku cine lubali, na bena Israeli tabafumine pa nkambi mpaka Miriamu bamubwesha." 
Numbers12:16 Panuma ya ifyo, elyo bafuma ku Haseloti, bayacita inkambi mu matololo ya Parani." 
Numbers13:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers13:2 “Salamo intungulushi imo imo ukufuma muli cila cikolwe ca luko, kabili ushitume nge nengu shiye lengula icalo ca Kenani, ico ndi nokupeela ku bena Israeli.”" 
Numbers13:3 Mose acita ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe, atuma intungulushi ukufuma ku matololo ya ku Parani. Bonsefye bali ni ntungulushi sha bena Israeli." 
Numbers13:4 Amashina yashiko ni aya. Shamua mwana Sakuri, uwa mu luko lwakwa Rubeni." 
Numbers13:5 Shafati mwana Hori, uwa mu luko lwakwa Simeoni." 
Numbers13:6 Kalebu mwana Yefune, uwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda." 
Numbers13:7 Igali mwana Yosefu, uwa mu luko lwakwa Isaka." 
Numbers13:8 Hoshea mwana Nuni, uwa mu luko lwakwa Efulemu." 
Numbers13:9 Paliti mwana Rafu, uwa mu luko lwakwa Benjamini." 
Numbers13:10 Gadieli mwana Sodi, uwa mu luko lwakwa Sebuloni." 
Numbers13:11 Gadi mwana Susi, uwa mu luko lwakwa Yosefu, e luko lwakwa Manase wine." 
Numbers13:12 Amieli mwana Gemali, uwa mu luko lwakwa Dani." 
Numbers13:13 Seturi mwana Mikaeli, uwa mu luko lwakwa Asheri." 
Numbers13:14 Nabi mwana Fofisi, uwa mu luko lwakwa Naftali." 
Numbers13:15 Geueli mwana Maki, uwa mu luko lwakwa Gadi." 
Numbers13:16 Aya e mashina ya bantu Mose atumine kukulengula icalo ca Kenani. Mose elyo ainika Hoshea mwana Nuni, ishina lya Yoshua." 
Numbers13:17 Pakubatuma kukulengula icalo ca Kenani, Mose abebele ati, “Muye mwingilile ku matololo ya Negebu, elyo muye na mu calo ca mpili." 
Numbers13:18 Muye mona ifyo icalo caba, na bantu bekalamo nga balikosa nangu tabakosa, nga balifula nangu tabafula." 
Numbers13:19 Bushe calo ca musango nshi baikalamo? Cisuma nangu cibi? Misumba ya musango shani baikalamo? Bushe, misumba ya malinga nangu iyoo?" 
Numbers13:20 Ngo mushili waba shani? Untu wafunda nangu iyoo? Nge miti, emo yaba nangu iyoo? Muyeshipafye, na pakubwela mukaleteko ne fisabo fimo ifikula muli cilya calo.” Cali pa nshita ifisabo fyantanshi ifya myangashi fitendekelapo ukufiluka." 
Numbers13:21 Aba bantu baile no kulengula icalo ukutendekalafye ku matololo ya Sini no kuya shintafye na ku Rehobu, mupepi na ku Lebo Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Baingilile ku matololo ya Negebu elyo baisa na ku musumba wa Hebuloni, uko Ahimani, Sheshai na Talimai aba mu lupwa lwakwa Anaki baleikala. Umusumba wa Hebuloni wakuulilwe imyaka cine lubali ninshi umusumba wa Soani uwa mu calo ca Egupto taulakulwa." 
Numbers13:23 Ilyo bafikile mwishika lya Eshikoli, eko bateta umusambo wa cisansangu ca myangashi icafina nganshi. Abantu babili ebacipinga pakucisenda ku mutembo. Basendako na mateke na makunyu." 
Numbers13:24 Ico cine calenga nokuti iyi ncende bainike ne shina lye shika lya Eshikoli, pantu eko abena Israeli batetele icisansangu cilya ica myangashi." 
Numbers13:25 Ilyo papwile inshiku amakumi yane (40), inengu shabweluluka kukulengula icalo." 
Numbers13:26 Elyo baisa kuli Mose na Aroni, na ku lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli ku Kadeshi mu matololo ya Parani nokubashimikila ifyo bamwene. Babalanga ne fisabo baleteleko ukufuma kuli cilya calo." 
Numbers13:27 Bashimikila Mose abati, “Twaile lengula icalo ico watutumineko, kabili cine cine mufumfumuka umukaka no buci, nefi e fisabo fyaciko." 
Numbers13:28 Lelo abantu bekalamo, bena bamaka nganshi ne misumba yabo nayo ikalamba icine cine kabili ya malinga ayakosa. Kabili twamweneko na ba mu lupwa lwakwa Anaki." 
Numbers13:29 Abena Amaleki ebekala mu Negebu, elyo abena Hiti, abena Yebusi na bena Amoli bekala mu calo ca mpili. Kabili abena Kenani bena bekalila mu lulamba lwa bemba na ku lulamba lwa mumana wa Yordani.”" 
Numbers13:30 Kalebu atalalike abantu pa cinso cakwa Mose, “Tufwile ukuya poka cilya calo no kwikalamo pantu natukwata amaka yakuya cimfya.”" 
Numbers13:31 Lelo abantu abaile na Kalebu batile, “Ifwe tatukwete maka yakuya lwisha balya bantu. Abantu abekala muli cilya calo bamaka ukutucila.”" 
Numbers13:32 Elyo basalanganya ilyashi lyabufi ku bena Israeli pa mulandu wa calo cintu baile lengula. Batile, “Icalo twaile lengula, calo iconaula abantu bekalamo. Abantu bonse abo twamwene muli ici calo, bantu abalunduka nganshi." 
Numbers13:33 Kabili twalimweneko na Banefilimu (Abana bakwa Anaki e bamo aba mu mutundu wa Banefilimu). Ifwe twalemonekafye kwati fipaso mu menso yesu, nabo bene efyo baletumona.”" 
Numbers14:1 Ulukuta lonsefye ulwa bena Israeli lwapuminemo imisowa, lwalilile ubushiku bonse." 
Numbers14:2 Bonsefye abena Israeli balailishanya kuli Mose na Aroni, abati, “Nga caliweme atufwila mu calo ca Egupto, nangu ukufwila muno mwine mu matololo!" 
Numbers14:3 Cinshi ico Yawe aletutwalila muli cilya calo kukufwilafye mu nkondo? Abakashi besu na bana bakabekata bunkole. Bushe teti ciwame ukuti ifwe twabwelelamo ku Egupto?” 
Numbers14:4 Kabili balasoshanya abati, “Natusale intungulushi tubwelelemo na ku Egupto!”" 
Numbers14:5 Elyo Mose na Aroni bawile ubukupeme pa cinso ca lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli ulwalongene. 
Numbers14:6 Elyo Yoshua mwana Nuni na Kalebu mwana Yefune abali pa baile kukulengula icalo, balepaula ifyakufwala fyabo," 
Numbers14:7 baeba no lukuta lonsefye ulwa bena Israeli abati, “Icalo twapitilemo kukulengula cisuma nganshi." 
Numbers14:8 Yawe nga asansamukila muli ifwe, akatutwala muli cilya calo no kucipeela kuli ifwe, icalo umufumfumuka umukaka no buci." 
Numbers14:9 Nomba, mwisangukila Yawe. Kabili mwitiina balya bantu bekalamo pantu bena tukabaminafye. Icakubacingilila nacifuma pali bena, lelo Yawe ali na ifwe. Eico mwibatiina iyoo.”" 
Numbers14:10 Lelo ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse lwalelanda pakubatoba amabwe. Elyo apopenefye abena Israeli bonse bamona ubucindami bwakwa Yawe pamulu we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Numbers14:11 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Bushe aba bantu bakaleka lilali ukunsuula? Bushe ni lilali bakaleka ukukanancetekela, nangu nabacitile ifipeshamano ifingi?" 
Numbers14:12 Ine nkabaponesha icikuko no kubaposafye, lelo iwe nkakucita umushobo ukalamba, kabili uwamaka nganshi ukubacila.”" 
Numbers14:13 Lelo Mose asosele kuli Yawe ati, “Nomba abena Egupto bali nokumfwa pali ici! Pantu ni ku maka yobe wafumishe aba bantu kuli bena!" 
Numbers14:14 Kabili bakebako abekala muli ici calo pali ici. Balya bantu balyumfwa kale ukuti iwe we Yawe waba naba bantu, ulamoneka ku cinso cabo, ne kumbi lyobe liba pa mulu wabo. Ulabatangilila mu ntumba ye kumbi akasuba, elyo ubushiku ubatangilila mu ntumba ya mulilo." 
Numbers14:15 Nomba nga waipaya aba bantu bonse pa nshita imo, imitundu yonse iyaumfwa ululumbi lobe ikatila," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Yawe nafilwa ukufisha abantu mu calo abalaile no mulapo ukubapeela, eco abepaila mu matololo.’" 
Numbers14:17 Kanshi nomba shilanga amaka yobe ukulingana ngefyo wasosele ilyo watile," 
Numbers14:18 Yawe tafulwa bwangu, kabili alikwatisha icitemwiko icishipwa. Abelela uluse pa bubifi na bucisanguka. Lelo tafilwa ukukanda abamilandu, akanda abana pa bubifi bwa bashibo ukufikafye na ku nkulo yalenga butatu elyo ne yalenga bune." 
Numbers14:19 Kanshi ukulingana ne citemwiko icishipwa wakwatisha, belelako aba bantu uluse pa bubifi bwabo. Nga filya fine wababelela uluse ukutula apo bafumina ku Egupto ukufika na nomba.”" 
Numbers14:20 Yawe epakwasuka ati, “Ine nababelela uluse ngefyo walomba." 
Numbers14:21 Nomba, mu cine cine napalifye ne Mumi, no bucindami bwandi ne Yawe ubwakumana icalo conse," 
Numbers14:22 pali aba bantu tapali nelyo umo uwamona ubucindami bwandi ne fipeshamano nacitile mu Egupto na mu matololo, lelo tabambeela kabili banjesha imiku ikumi limo," 
Numbers14:23 tapali nelyo umo uukamona icalo nalaile no mulapo kuli bashibo. Onse uwansuula takacimone iyoo. 
Numbers14:24 Kanofye umubomfi wandi Kalebu, uwaba no mutima uwaibela kabili alambeela no mutima onse. Ine nkamufisha mu calo aile lengula, na ba mu lupwa lwakwe bali nokubuula cilya calo cikabe icacishilano." 
Numbers14:25 Nomba apo abena Amaleki na bena Kenani ebekala mu mawanga, mukabwelulukeko mailo no kulola ku matololo, mukalungame mu nshila yalola kuli Bemba Wakashika.”" 
Numbers14:26 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati," 
Numbers14:27 “Bushe ulu lukuta lubi lukaleka lilali ukuilishanya palwa ine? Ine niŋumfwa ifintu abena Israeli baleilishanyapo! 
Numbers14:28 Kanshi mubebe amuti, ‘mu cine cine, napalifye ine ne Mumi, efyasosa Yawe, ndemucitilafye fyonse ukulingana ngefyo ŋumfwile musosele." 
Numbers14:29 Bonsefye imwe mwe bali ne myaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili (20) no kucilapo mwe bapendelwe, kabili mwe bailishenye pali ine, mukafwila muli yano matololo." 
Numbers14:30 Tapakabe nangu umo pali imwe uukengila mu calo ico naimishepo ukuboko pakulapa ukumupeela kanofye Kalebu mwana Yefune na Yoshua mwana Nuni. 
Numbers14:31 Abana benu abo mwatila bali nokusendwa ifitapwa, ebo ine nkafisha mukuipakisha muli ici calo ico imwe mwasuula." 
Numbers14:32 Lelo imwe mukafwila mu matololo. 
Numbers14:33 Abana benu bakaba bakacema mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane (40). Bakulaculila pa mulandu wa bucintomfwa bwenu, mpaka no wakulekelesha muli imwe akafwile mu matololo." 
Numbers14:34 Pa myaka amakumi yane (40), cila mwaka ukulingana ne nshiku amakumi yane (40) isho mwapwile pakulengula icalo, mwakulacula pa mulandu wa bubifi bwenu, kabili elyo mukeshiba ifyo ukunsangukila kwaba.’" 
Numbers14:35 Nine Yawe nasosa, kabili mu cine cinefye efyo ndi nokucita kuli mwe lukuta lubi ulwaikatana pamo mukuilishanya pali ine. Bonsefye bakafwila muno mwine mu matololo, eikaba e mpela yabo.”" 
Numbers14:36 Abantu abo Mose atumine kukulengula icalo, ababwelele no kulenga ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli ukulaisosha kuli Yawe pakusalanganya ilyashi ukuti icalo cibi," 
Numbers14:37 pa bufi bwabo balifwile ku cikuko pa cinso cakwa Yawe. 
Numbers14:38 Pa baile kukulengula icalo ikumi limo na babili (12), abapuswikekofye ni Yoshua mwana Nuni na Kalebu mwana Yefune." 
Numbers14:39 Ilyo Mose aebele abena Israeli bonse aya mashiwi, balilile icibi nganshi." 
Numbers14:40 Kacelocelo ubushiku bwakonkelepo, baimine ukulola ku calo ca mpili. Basosa abati, “Cisuma natubifya! Kanshi natuleyafye ku cifulo Yawe atulaya.”" 
Numbers14:41 Mose nao epakubeba ati, “Nga cinshi ico mulekaanina ukubeela Yawe? Muli nokufilwa!" 
Numbers14:42 Mwiya nako pantu Yawe tali na imwe iyoo. Abalwani benu balemucimfya. 
Numbers14:43 Pantu abena Amaleki na bena Kenani baleya mulwisha no kumucimfya ku lupanga ico mwalisangukila Yawe. Apo Yawe tali na imwe, muleya fwa ku lupanga.”" 
Numbers14:44 Nomba bena babikilepofye ukuya ku calo ca mpili, lelo Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe yashele mu nkambi pamo na Mose." 
Numbers14:45 Elyo abena Amaleki na bena Kenani abaleikala muli cilya calo ca mpili, babekilila no kubasansa, babapumaula no kubatentemusha ulupili ukufikafye na ku Homa." 
Numbers15:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers15:2 “Landa ku bena Israeli, ubebe auti, nga mwaingila mu calo ndi nokumupeela pakuti emo mukaleikala," 
Numbers15:3 mukaletuula Yawe amalambo yakoca ukufuma pa ŋombe nangu pa mukuni, ukuba icena cisuma icakusekesha Yawe, nangu umutuulo wakoca nangu amalambo ya pa mulandu wa filayo nangu aya bupe bwakuitemenwa, nangu imituulo ya pa nshikunkulu shenu." 
Numbers15:4 Elyo uyo onse uwatuula umutuulo kuli Yawe, ali nokubikapo umutuulo wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino icapekumi cimo ca ku cipimo ca efa, ubwasanshiwamo ne cipimo ca pakati ka citika wa hini wa mafuta ya miolifa." 
Numbers15:5 Atuule ne cipimo ca pakati ka citika wa hini wa mwangashi ngo mutuulo wa cakunwa ukulunda pa mutuulo na pelambo lyakoca ilya cila mwana wa mpaanga.
