Numbers15:6 Pali sukusuku umo muli nokutuula umutuulo wa cabunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino utwapekumi tubili twa ku cipimo ca efa, ifyasanshiwamo ne cipimo mupepi na citika wa hini wa mafuta ya miolifa." 
Numbers15:7 Atuule no mwangashi icipimo mupepi na citika wa hini ngo mutuulo wa cakunwa. Fituulwe ukuba icena cisuma icakusansamusha Yawe. 
Numbers15:8 Nga mwapekanya iŋombe ilume ngo mutuulo wa cakoca nangu ilambo, pa mulandu wa mulapo nangu mutuulo wakwampana kuli Yawe," 
Numbers15:9 pa ŋombe muli nokulundapo umutuulo wa cabunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino utwapekumi tutatu twa ku cipimo ca efa, ubwasanshiwamo ne cipimo ca citika wa hini wa mafuta ya miolifa." 
Numbers15:10 Kabili ali nokuleta umutuulo wa cakunwa icipimo ca citika wa hini wa mwangashi pakuba umutuulo wakoca pa mulilo kukuba icena cisuma icakusansamusha Yawe. 
Numbers15:11 Kanshi uyu e musango wakupekanishishamo cila iŋombe, sukusuku na kana ka mpaanga nangu aka mbushi." 
Numbers15:12 Inama shakutuula ilambo nangu shingafula shani, mukalecita ifyo fine kuli cila imo." 
Numbers15:13 Onsefye umukaya umwina Israeli ali nokucita ifi fintu pakuleta umutuulo wakoca pa mulilo, kukuba icena cisuma icakusansamusha Yawe." 
Numbers15:14 Pa mulandu wa nkulo shikesa, ilyo umwinafyalo nangu uuli onse uwikala na imwe atuula umutuulo wakoca pa mulilo, uwakuba icena cisuma icakusansamusha Yawe, nao wine afwilefye ukucita cimo cine ifyo na imwe mucita." 
Numbers15:15 Mwe bena Israeli, pamo pene na benafyalo abo mwikala nabo, ili lifunde lyamuyayaya ilyo mukalakonka mu nkulo shikakonkapo. Imwe na benafyalo, mukabafye cimo cine pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Numbers15:16 Amafunde ne fipope fikaba fimo fine kuli imwe na ku benafyalo abo mwikala nabo.” 
Numbers15:17 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers15:18 “Landa ku bena Israeli no kubeba auti, nga mwaingila mu calo ico ndi nokumutwalamo," 
Numbers15:19 kabili nga mwalalya icakulya ca muli ici calo, mukalefumyapo fimo ifyamutuulo kuli Yawe." 
Numbers15:20 Ku bunga bwenu ubwantanshi mukalepangako umukate no kuutuula nga filya fine mutuula umutuulo wa pa kupwa kwa kusokola iŋanu. 
Numbers15:21 Mu nkulo shenu shonse ishikakonkapo, mukaletuula umutuulo kuli Yawe ku mukate mukabalilapo ukupanga." 
Numbers15:22 “Nomba nga mwafilwa mukukanaishiba ukusunga ifi fipope fyonse fintu Yawe apeela Mose," 
Numbers15:23 icipope conse ico Yawe apeele Mose ukufuma pa bushiku Yawe abapeele ukupita na mu nkulo shonse ishikakonkapo," 
Numbers15:24 nga mwacita mukukanaishiba, no lukuta lonse talwishibe, lyena ninshi ulukuta lonse luli nokutuula iciponti ngo mutuulo wakoca uwakuba icena cisuma icakusekesha Yawe. Kabili mubikepo ne fifwaikwa pa mutuulo wa cabunga no wa cakunwa, elyo na sawe uwa mutuulo wa pa fyabubifi." 
Numbers15:25 Shimapepo ali nokufutilako ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli pa bubifi bwabo pakuti lubelelwe uluse, pantu ulukuta talwabifishe ku mufulo iyoo. Kabili batuula kuli Yawe umutuulo wakoca no wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi fyabo." 
Numbers15:26 Ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli pamo na benafyalo abekala nabo bakabelelwa uluse, pantu bonsefye balibifishe ukwabula ukwishiba." 
Numbers15:27 “Lelo ngo muntufye umo ewabifishe mukukanaishiba, ali nokutuula akabushi akakota aka mwaka umo, ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi." 
Numbers15:28 Shimapepo ali nokufutilako uyo muntu pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pakuti abelelwe uluse pa fyabubifi fyakwe acitile mukukanaishiba. Kanshi nga bamufutilako, lyena ali nokubelelwa uluse." 
Numbers15:29 Ili line funde limo line e lyakukonka umuntufye onse uwabifya mukukanaishiba, abe mwina Israeli umukaya nangu mwinafyalo uo mwikala nankwe." 
Numbers15:30 “Nomba onse uwabifya ku mufulo, abe mukaya nangu mwinafyalo, ninshi asaalula Yawe. Uyu muntu wakutamfyafye mu bantu bandi." 
Numbers15:31 Pantu asuula ishiwi lyakwa Yawe kabili apula amafunde ku mufulofye, uyo muntu cine cine mutamfyenifye, pantu ububi bwakwe buli pali ena.”" 
Numbers15:32 Ilyo abena Israeli bacili mu matololo, basangile umuntu umo aleteba inkuni pa bushiku bwe Sabata." 
Numbers15:33 Na bamusangile aleteba inkuni bamutwala kuli Mose, Aroni na ku lukuta lonse." 
Numbers15:34 Elyo bamusunga mukulolela ukupingulwa pantu tabaishibe icakumucita. 
Numbers15:35 Elyo Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Uyu muntu wakwipayafye. Ulukuta lonse lumutobaule amabwe kunse ya nkambi.”" 
Numbers15:36 Kanshi ulukuta lwamufumisha kunse ya nkambi no kumutobaula amabwe afwa nokufwa, pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Numbers15:37 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers15:38 “Landa ku bena Israeli utile, ‘Ku fisempe fya nsalu shenu mulebililako insenkebele, kabili ku lusenkebele lumo lumo mulebikako umwando wacifufya, efyo mukalecita na mu nkulo shenu shonse ishikakonkapo." 
Numbers15:39 Ilyo mukalamona insenkebele, shikalamwibukishako amafunde yakwa Yawe pakutila mukaleyakonka. Kabili epakuti mwikalakonkelela ulunkumbwa lwa ku mitima yenu nolwa menso yenu." 
Numbers15:40 Elyo mukalaibukisha no kulakonka amafunde yandi yonse, kabili mukalabafye abamushilo kuli Lesa wenu." 
Numbers15:41 Nine Yawe Lesa wenu, uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto kukuba Lesa wenu. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu.’”" 
Numbers16:1 Kora mwana Isa, mwana Koati, mwana Levi, pamo na Datani na Abiramu bamwana Eliabu na Oni mwana Peleti, abantu ba mu luko lwa bena Rubeni, batalama," 
Numbers16:2 elyo baimina Mose. Baima pamo ne ntungulushi imyanda ibili na makumi yasano (250) isha bena Israeli, ishaishibikwa ku lukuta, ishasontelwe ukulasangwa ku cilye." 
Numbers16:3 Elyo balongana ibumba pali Mose na Aroni babakaanya abati, “Nomba mwacilamo! Ulukuta lonse lwamushilo, na onse uulimo, na Yawe ali pakati kabo. Nga cinshi ico muisansabalikila pebumba lya bantu bakwa Yawe?”" 
Numbers16:4 Ilyo Mose aumfwile ifi, awa panshi ubukupeme." 
Numbers16:5 Elyo aeba Kora ne bumba lyonse ali nalyo ati, “Yawe mailo ulucelo akatulanga umuntu wakwe, kabili uwamushilo. Akalenga nokuti uyo muntu apalame mupepi na ena. Umuntu akasala eo akapalamika kuli ena" 
Numbers16:6 Iwe Kora ne bumba lya bantu bobe mukacite ifi. Mukabuule ififukilisho," 
Numbers16:7 na mailo ulucelo mukalapwilemo umulilo, mukabikemo ububani pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Umuntu uo Yawe akasala, eukaba uwamushilo. Imwe, mwe bena Levi namucilamo!”" 
Numbers16:8 Mose kabili aebele Kora ati, “Nomba umfweni mwe bena Levi!" 
Numbers16:9 Bushe kanshi tamwasekelamo ico Lesa wakwa Israeli amupatula ku lukuta lwa bena Israeli, pakuti mupalame uko ali mukubomba umulimo wakwa Yawe mwi tenti lyakwe, kabili no kwiminina ku lukuta no kutumika pakati kabo?" 
Numbers16:10 Lesa alimupalamika uko ali, iwe pamo na bena Levi banobe. Nomba kabili mulefwaya mupokolole na bushimapepo bwine!" 
Numbers16:11 Pantu ni Yawe eo mwalonganina pamo iwe ne bumba lyobe mukuilishanyapo. Bushe Aroni nani uo mufwile ukuilishanyapo?” 
Numbers16:12 Elyo Mose aitile Datani na Abiramu, bamwana Eliabu. Lelo nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe tatwaiseko iyoo!" 
Numbers16:13 Bushe tawasekelamo pakutufumya mu Egupto mu calo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci, pakuti twise tufwile muno mu matololo? Kabili na nomba uleumya no bukalamba pali ifwe?" 
Numbers16:14 Kabili tawatutwala mu calo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci nangu ukutupeela ifishilano fya filime na mabala ya myangashi. Bushe ulefwaya ukufimba aba bantu pa menso. Ifwe tatwaiseko iyoo!” 
Numbers16:15 Awe Mose afulwa nganshi, elyo aeba Yawe ati, “Wipokelela mutuulo wabo. Ine nshapokololapo nangufye ni punda ku muntu nelyo umo, kabili nshabifyapo muntu nelyo umo.”" 
Numbers16:16 Mose aebele Kora ati, “Iwe ne bumba lyobe lyonse, mukamonekela ku cinso cakwa Yawe mailo, iwe wine, ibumba lyobe elyo na Aroni." 
Numbers16:17 Cila umo umo akasende icifukilisho cakwe no kubikamo ububani, fyonse fikabe imyanda ibili na makumi yasano (250) no kuleta pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Iwe wine na Aroni mukailetele icifukilisho cila muntu.”" 
Numbers16:18 Kanshi bonse umo umo epakubuula icifukilisho cakwe, alapwilamo no mulilo, abikamo no bubani. Epakwiminina pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo na Mose pamo na Aroni." 
Numbers16:19 Ilyo Kora alongana no lukuta lonse mukukaanya Mose na Aroni pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwamonekela ulukuta lonse." 
Numbers16:20 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati," 
Numbers16:21 “Talukeni ku lukuta ulu, pakuti mbalofye nombaline.”" 
Numbers16:22 Lelo Mose na Aroni bena epakuwa ubukupeme balapapata abati, “We Lesa, Lesa wa mipashi ya bantu bonse, bushe kuti wafulilwa ulukuta lwa bantu bonse, umo nga ewabifya?”" 
Numbers16:23 Kabili Yawe aeba Mose ati," 
Numbers16:24 “Eba ulukuta lutaluke ku matenti yakwa Kora, Datani na Abiramu.”" 
Numbers16:25 Elyo Mose aimine aya kuli Datani na Abiramu, ne ntungulushi sha bena Israeli shamukonka." 
Numbers16:26 Elyo asoka ulukuta ati, “Talukeni ku matenti ya aba bantu ababi! Kabili mwikumya na ku cipe cabo nelyo cimo. Epali mwaisa sendelwa pamo pa mulandu wa bubi bwabo.”" 
Numbers16:27 Awe ibumba epakutaluka ku matenti yakwa Kora, Datani na Abiramu. Datani na Abiramu epakufumina panse baiminina pa mwinshi wa matenti yabo, pamo na bakashi na bana babo no twaice." 
Numbers16:28 Elyo Mose atila, “Muli ici emo mwalaishibila ukuti Yawe ewantuma kukubomba ifintu fyonse ifi, kabili mwishibe ukuti te ku mano yandi mombela iyoo." 
Numbers16:29 Nga cakuti aba bantu bafwafye imfwa Lesa, ngefyo abantu bonse bafwa, awe ninshi Yawe tewantuma nakalya." 
Numbers16:30 Lelo nga cakuti Yawe acita icintu cimo icipya icishatala acicitikapo, no mushili walepuka no kubamina pamo pene ne fintu fyabo fyonse, kabili baya abomi ku calo ca bafwa, ninshi muli nokwishiba ukuti aba bantu nabasuula Yawe.”" 
Numbers16:31 Ilyo apwile ukusosa fyonse ifi, umushili apo baiminine walepuka," 
Numbers16:32 kabili wacenama no kubamina pamo pene ne ndupwa shabo, bonse abantu bakwa Kora ne fipe fyonse." 
Numbers16:33 Baile abomi ku calo ca bafwa, pamo pene ne fipe fyabo fyonse. Umushili wabelikisha, baloba no kufuma pebumba." 
Numbers16:34 Abena Israeli pakumfwa inkuuta shabo, bonse abali mumbali, bafulumuka no kupunda balepunda abati, “Naifwe bene umushili kuti watumina!”" 
Numbers16:35 Kabili umulilo wafumine kuli Yawe no koca abaume imyanda ibili na makumi yasano (250) abaletuula ububani. 
Numbers16:36 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers16:37 “Eba Eleasa mwana Aroni shimapepo ukuti afumye ififukilisho mu mito ya bantu abapile, apose imifito ukutali, pantu ififukilisho fyamushilo," 
Numbers16:38 ififukilisho fya bantu abafwilile pa bubifi bwabo. Kanshi ufule ififukilisho ku nondo fipapatale ngo tumalata, mufimbe pa bulambo pantu fyacituulwa pa cinso cakwa Yawe kanshi fyamushilo. Ici cibe e cishibilo ca bena Israeli.”" 
Numbers16:39 Kanshi shimapepo Eleasa epakubuula filya fifukilisho fyaletele abantu abapile, bafulamo utumalata, bafimba na pa bulambo," 
Numbers16:40 ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe ukupitila muli Mose. Kanshi ici cakwibukishako abena Israeli ukuti uushili shimapepo, kabili uushili uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni, tali nakupalama no kocela Yawe ububani, epali afwa nga filya fyafwile Kora na bantu bakwe bonse." 
Numbers16:41 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli lwailishenye kuli Mose na Aroni aluti, “Abantu bakwa Yawe nimwe mwabepeye.”" 
Numbers16:42 Nomba ilyo ulukuta lwalongana mukukaanya Mose na Aroni, bena bapilibukila kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, apopenefye bamona ikumbi lyakupapo no bucindami bwakwa Yawe bwamoneka." 
Numbers16:43 Elyo Mose na Aroni baya kuntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Numbers16:44 Kabili Yawe aeba Mose ati," 
Numbers16:45 “Talukeni kuli ulu lukuta, pakuti mbalofye nombaline!” Kabili Mose na Aroni bawa panshi ubukupeme." 
Numbers16:46 Elyo Mose aebele Aroni ati, “Buula icifukilisho cobe, ulapwilemo no mulilo wa pa bulambo, ubikemo no bubani. Endesha, uye ne cifukilisho ku lukuta, kabafutileko pa fya bubifi bwabo! Yawe nafulwa nganshi ne cikuko nacitendeka.”" 
Numbers16:47 Kanshi Aroni nao acita nefyo Mose amwebele, abutukila mukati ke bumba lya bantu ninshi icikuko nacitendeka kale mu bantu. Lelo Aroni apekenye icifukilisho no bubanimo, abafutilako pa bubifi bwabo." 
Numbers16:48 Kabili aiminine pakati ka bantu abashele abomi elyo na bafwile, ne cikuko ilyo linefye capwa no kupwa." 
Numbers16:49 Nomba abantu bafwile ku cikuko bali amakana ikumi limo na yane ne myanda cine lubali (14,700), ukulunda ku mpendwa ya bafwile pa mulandu wa kutalama kwakwa Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Elyo Aroni abwelela kuli Mose pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, pantu icikuko calipwile." 
Numbers17:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers17:2 “Landa ku bena Israeli, bakuletele inkonto ikumi limo na shibili, imo imo ukufuma ku ntungulushi ya luko lwa cila cikolwe. Ulembe ishina lya muntu pa mulu wa nkonto yakwe." 
Numbers17:3 Pa nkonto ya bena Levi ulembepo ishina lyakwa Aroni. Pantu kufwile ukuba inkonto imo iya ntungulushi ya luko lwa cila cikolwe. 
Numbers17:4 Isho nkonto ulingile ukushibika mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, pantanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, palya nkumana na iwe." 
Numbers17:5 Kabili inkonto ya muntu nkasala, ikalemuka. Elyo nkapwisha ukuilishanya kwa bena Israeli pali iwe.”" 
Numbers17:6 Awe Mose alandile na bena Israeli. Intungulushi shabo shamuletela inkonto ikumi limo na shibili, imo imo ukulingana ne nko sha fikolwe fyabo, iyakwa Aroni nayo epo yali." 
Numbers17:7 Mose nao epakubika inkonto shonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe mwi Tenti lya cipangano. 
Numbers17:8 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Mose aingile mwi Tenti lya cipangano, elyo amona inkonto yakwa Aroni iya ŋanda ya bena Levi nailemuka. Tekulemuka kwekafye, lelo no kufumya ululembelya no kubalula, naitwala ne fitwalo fya alimonde." 
Numbers17:9 Kanshi Mose epakubuula inkonto shonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ashifumisha panse ku bena Israeli. Nabo bashimona, elyo cila muntu epakubuulapo inkonto yakwe." 
Numbers17:10 Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Bwekeshamo inkonto yakwa Aroni pantanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano, pakuti ibe cibukisho ca basanguka. Elyo neci cikapwisha ukuisosha kwabo pali ine pakuti no kufwa bekafwa.”" 
Numbers17:11 Awe Mose nao acita ifyo fine ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. 
Numbers17:12 Elyo abena Israeli baebele Mose abati, “Tuli nokufwa! Twaloba, natulobelelafye bonse!" 
Numbers17:13 Nga cakuti umuntu umo apalama kwi Tenti lyakwa Yawe, ali nokufwa. Bushe bonse tuli nokufwa?”" 
Numbers18:1 Yawe aebele Aroni ati, “Iwe, abana bobe abaume na ba mu lupwa lwakwa wiso, mukaba no mulandu nga mwafulunganya fimo mu cifulo camushilo. Iwe pamo na bamwano abaume mweka mukaba no mulandu nga mwafulunganyapo fimo muli bushimapepo." 
Numbers18:2 Ulete abena Levi banobe ukufuma mu luko lwa cikolwe cobe ukuba na iwe, pakuti balekwafwilishako ilyo iwe na bamwano muletumika pantanshi ye Tenti lya cipangano." 
Numbers18:3 Bali nokukutumika, kabili bali nokubomba imilimo yonse iya mwi Tenti lya cipangano. Lelo tabali nakupalama ku fipe ifyaba mu cifulo camushilo, nangu ku bulambo. Nga bacita ifyo, ninshi bonse iwe na bena mukafwa." 
Numbers18:4 Bakulabomba na imwe, kabili bali nokulasunga Itenti Lyakukumaninamo no kubomba imilimo yonse iye Tenti. Kabili umuntu nangu umo talingile kupalama mupepi napo muli." 
Numbers18:5 Muli nokubaka icifulo camushilo pamo no bulambo, epakuti nikafulilwa abena Israeli nakabili." 
Numbers18:6 Nine winefye nasala aba mu lupwa lwa bena Levi banobe ukufuma pa bena Israeli nge cabupe kuli iwe. Kabili nabalubwila kuli Yawe, pakuti balebomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers18:7 Lelo iwe pamo na bana bobe abaume, nimwe mwakulabomba imilimo yonse iyabushimapepo iya ku bulambo na mukati ka cisalu cakucingako. Ala nine nakupeela umulimo wa bushimapepo ngo bupe. Umuntu umbi uwaisa no kupalama ku cifulo camushilo afwilefye ukwipaiwa.”" 
Numbers18:8 Yawe aebele Aroni ati, “Nine wine nakupeela insambu shakumona pa fyamutuulo upeelwa kuli ine. Imituulo yamushilo yonse abena Israeli bantuula nakupeela pamo na bana bobe abaume ukuba e ciputulwa cenu ico bakulamwakanyako lyonse." 
Numbers18:9 Pa mituulo yamushilo icine cine iyo mushocele pa mulilo, imwe mwakulakwatapo iciputulwa. Pa fyabupe fyonse ifyo bandetela ngo mutuulo wamushilo icine cine, cibe imituulo ya cabunga, nangu imituulo yakwelelwa pa bubifi, nangu imituulo yakufuta pa fyabubifi, fyena ifi fyobe pamo na bana bobe abaume." 
Numbers18:10 Mulelya ifi fintu nge fyamushilo icine cine. Kabili baumefye balingile ukulyako. Mufwile ukufimona nge fyamushilo. 
Numbers18:11 “Fimbi nafyo pa fyabupe ne mituulo nakupeela nifi. Icilifye conse icapatulwapo pa mutuulo wakutambika uwa bena Israeli, napeela ici ku bana bobe abaume na banakashi, nge ciputulwa cenu ica lyonse. Umuntu onse uwa mu ŋanda yobe nga ali uwasangululwa, kuti alyako." 
Numbers18:12 “Ine nakupeela amafuta ya miolifa ayawamisha no mwangashi uwawamisha ne ŋanu, ifisabo fyabo fyantanshi ifyo bapeela kuli Yawe." 
Numbers18:13 Fyonsefye ifisabo fyantanshi ifyo batuula Yawe fili nokuba fyobe. Umuntu onse uwa mu ŋanda yobe nga ali uwasangululwa, kuti alyako." 
Numbers18:14 “Ifintufye fyonse ifyo balubwilile Yawe mu calo ca Israeli fyobe. 
Numbers18:15 “Abana amabeli ne nama amabeli, ifyo batuula Yawe, fyobe. Lelo ukalubule ibeli lya mwana umwaume nelyo inama ishilume ishakowela." 
Numbers18:16 Abana bakulalubulwa ilyo baba no mweshifye umo pa mutengo wapimwa, indalama amashekeli yasano aya silifa ukulingana ne cipimo ca mu cifulo camushilo icafina amagera amakumi yabili." 
Numbers18:17 Lelo amabeli ya ŋombe, impaanga nangu imbushi, shena teshakwesha kulubula, pantu shamushilo. Wakulakana umulopa washiko ku bulambo. Kabili amafuta yashiko wakulaocela pa bulambo, ngo mutuulo wa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Numbers18:18 Iminofu yashiko yena yobe pamo nge cisao ca mutuulo wakutambika no mwendo wa ku kulyo. 
Numbers18:19 “Ifyashalako ku mituulo yamushilo yonse iyo abena Israeli bakalatuula ine ne Yawe, napeela kuli iwe pamo na bana bobe abaume na banakashi, nge cakumwakanyako lyonse. Kanshi ici e cipangano ca pe ica mucele pa cinso cakwa Yawe kuli iwe na ku bana bobe abakakonkapo.”" 
Numbers18:20 Yawe aebele Aroni ati, “Iwe tawakakwatemo cacishilano mu calo cabo. Nangufye icakaniko tawakalekwatako pakati kabo. Pantu ine wine, nine cakaniko cobe ne cacishilano cobe pakati ka bena Israeli.”" 
Numbers18:21 “Ine napeela ku bena Levi ifintu fyonse ifyapekumi ifya mu Israeli nge fyacishilano fyabo ukuba amalipilo pa milimo babomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo. 
Numbers18:22 Ukufumafye nombaline, abena Israeli tabafwile kulapalama mupepi na kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, epali baiposa mu bwafya bwa bubifi no kufwa." 
Numbers18:23 Abena Levi ebakulabomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo kabili ebakulaba no mulandu pali conse icalubanamo. Ili e funde lya pe umukakonkanina inkulo. Tabakaikwatile fyacishilano mu Israeli iyoo. 
Numbers18:24 Lelo, ine napeela abena Levi nge cacishilano ifyapekumi ifyo abena Israeli batuula kuli Yawe. E mulandu wine nalandila pali bena nati, ‘Tabali nakukwata icacishilano mu Israeli.’ ”" 
Numbers18:25 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers18:26 “Landa ku bena Levi ubebe auti, ilyo mwapokelela icekumi ukufuma ku bena Israeli ico namupeela nge cacishilano, mufwile ukubuulapo icapekumi no kutuula kuli Yawe." 
Numbers18:27 Umutuulo wenu uli nokubafye nga filya shibulimi atuula iŋanu shipya bafumya pa lubansa batwila, nangu umwangashi upya untu bafumya mu cikamino." 
Numbers18:28 Kanshi muli uyu wine musango emo na imwe mwakulatuulilamo kuli Yawe, ukufuma pa capekumi conse ico mwakulapoka ku bena Israeli. Ukufumya pa fya capekumi, mufwile ukupeela Yawe iciputulwa cakwe kuli Aroni Shimapepo." 
Numbers18:29 Ifyabupe fyonse bamupeela, mufumyepo iciputulwa icawamisha kabili icamushilo icine cine ukuba icakwa Yawe." 
Numbers18:30 Kabili eba abena Levi auti, ilyo lyonse mwapeela iciputulwa icawamisha, ninshi cikamoneka nge cafuma pa lubansa batwila, nangu ku cikamino ca mwangashi." 
Numbers18:31 Iwe na ba ŋanda yobe kuti mwalya ifyashalapo konse uko muli, pantu e fya malipilo yenu pa mulimo mubomba mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers18:32 Tamwakabe no mulandu nga mwatuula iciputulwa iciwamishepo. Epakuti mwikasaalula mituulo yamushilo iya bena Israeli, kabili tamwakafwe iyoo.”" 
Numbers19:1 Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati," 
Numbers19:2 “Ici ecilefwaikwa mwifunde ilyo Yawe akonkomesha. Ebeni abena Israeli ukuleta umusepela wa ŋombe iyikota uwakashika uwabula akalema nangu akabi kabili uushatala ausendapo ikoli. 
Numbers19:3 Mupeele kuli Eleasa shimapepo. Ufumishiwe kunse ya nkambi no kuipaya pa menso yakwe. 
Numbers19:4 Elyo Eleasa shimapepo atumpike umunwe mu mulopa wauko, aukane imiku cine lubali ya kuntanshi ye Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers19:5 Ilyo Eleasa shimapepo alemonako, boce uyo musepela wa ŋombe kumo kwine ne mpapa no munofu no mulopa ne fya mu mala." 
Numbers19:6 Shimapepo abuule ulusansu lwa cimuti icalepesha ica keda no tumisambo twa hisopo ne nsalu iyakashika cee, elyo afipose apalepya umusepela wa ŋombe." 
Numbers19:7 Panuma ya ifyo, shimapepo acape ifyakufwala fyakwe, elyo nokowa na pa mubili wakwe na menshi. Lyena elyo ali nokubwelela ku nkambi. Lelo ali nokuba uwakowela ukufikafye ne cungulo." 
Numbers19:8 Uyo muntu uuleoca umusepela wa ŋombe nao ali nokucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe, elyo no kowa pa mubili na menshi, kabili nao wine ali nokuba uwakowela ukufikafye ne cungulo." 
Numbers19:9 Kabili umuntu uwasangululwa akuse imito ya musepela wa ŋombe, no kuya ibika mu ncende iyasanguluka kunse ya nkambi. Eko yakulasungilwa, pakuti ulukuta lwa bena Israeli luleibika mu menshi yakubomfya pakusangulula ifintu. Ici e cakusangulwilako ububifi." 
Numbers19:10 No muntu uwakusa imito ya musepela wa ŋombe, ali nokucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe, kabili nao wine ali uwakowela ukufikafye ne cungulo. Ili likaba lifunde lyamuyayaya kuli bonse abena Israeli na benafyalo abo bakalaikala nabo.”" 
Numbers19:11 “Uyo onse uwakumya ku citumbi ca muntu uuli onse, akaba uwakowela pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Numbers19:12 Afwile ukuisangulula na menshi pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu no bwalenga cine lubali. Elyo akaba uwasangululwa. Lelo nga taisangulwile pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu no bwalenga cine lubali, akabafye uwakowela." 
Numbers19:13 Uyo onse uwakumya ku citumbi ca muntu uuli onse, nomba afilwa ukuisangulula, ninshi uyo muntu wakutamfyafye mu bena Israeli pantu akowesha Itenti lyakwa Yawe. Ashala uwakowela pantu tabamusansa amenshi yalya ayakumusangulula. Kanshi ukukowela kwakwe kucili pa mubili wakwe." 
Numbers19:14 “Ili e funde lili nokukonkwa umuntu nga afwila mwi tenti. Uyo onse uwaingila mwi tenti na onse uuli mwi tenti, ali nokuba uwakowela pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Numbers19:15 Kabili icipe conse icili apabula icakukupikapo, ninshi naco cine cili nokuba icakowela." 
Numbers19:16 Onse uuli kunse uwakumya ku muntu baipaila ku lupanga, nangu uwafwafye ku mfwa Lesa, nangu kuli onse uwakumya kwifupa lya muntu, nangu uluputa lwa muntu, akaba uwakowela pa nshiku cine lubali." 
Numbers19:17 Ku muntu uwakowela, babuulepo imito ya ulya musepela wa ŋombe uwakashika bacoca pakufuta pa fyabubifi babike mu nongo elyo betilepo amenshi ayasuma." 
Numbers19:18 Elyo umuntu uwasangululwa abuule utumisambo twa hisopo, atumpike mu menshi no kusansa kwi tenti na ku fipe fyonse, na bantu bonse abalimo. Kabili afwile ukusansa no wakumishe kwifupa lya muntu, nangu ku muntu baipeyefye, nangu ku wafwile imfwa Lesa nangu ku luputa lwa muntu." 
Numbers19:19 Umuntu wasanguluka euli nokusansa uwakowela amenshi pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu na pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali. Kanshi pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali bwine amusangulula. Elyo umuntu uulesangululwa afwile ukucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe no kowa mu menshi. Na mu cungulo cine ico ninshi asangululwa. 
Numbers19:20 “Lelo umuntu wakowela nga akaana ukuisangulula, uyo muntu wakutamfyafye mwibumba, pantu akowesha icifulo camushilo cakwa Yawe. Apo menshi yakumusangulula tayasanshilwe pa mubili wakwe, ninshi ashala uwakowela." 
Numbers19:21 Ili e funde lyabo ilyamuyayaya. Umuntu uulesansa amenshi yakusangululwa, nao wine afwile ukucapa ifyakufwala fyakwe. Elyo na onse uwaikata muli ayo menshi yakusangulula, ali nokuba uwakowela ukufikafye ne cungulo." 
Numbers19:22 Icintu conse ico uwakowela aikatako, ninshi naco cakowela. Kabili na onse uwakumyako akowela ukufikafye ne cungulo.”" 
Numbers20:1 Ulukuta lonse lwa bena Israeli lwafikile mu matololo ya Sini mu mweshi wantanshi, bakuula ne nkambi pa Kadeshi epo baikala. Kulya kwine ekwafwila na Miriamu no kushiikwa eko ashiikwa." 
Numbers20:2 Nomba kulya kuntu takwali menshi yakunwa. Elyo ulukuta lwalongana mukuilishanya pali Mose na Aroni. 
Numbers20:3 Awe balaumanya Mose abati, “Kanshi nga caliwemepo ukufwila pamo na bamunyinefwe abafwile pa cinso cakwa Yawe!" 
Numbers20:4 Bushe cinshi mwaletele ibumba lya bantu bakwa Yawe muno mu matololo, ukuti emo ifwe pamo ne fitekwa fyesu twise tufwile?" 
Numbers20:5 Bushe cinshi mwatufumisha mu calo ca Egupto no kutuleta muli ino ncende iyabipisha ifi? Muno tamwaba ŋanu na makunyu ne fitwalo fya myangashi na mateke. Kabili na menshi yakunwa nayo tamuli!” 
Numbers20:6 Elyo Mose na Aroni epakufuma pebumba baya pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, bawa panshi ubukupeme, elyo ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwamonekela kuli bena." 
Numbers20:7 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers20:8 “Buula inkonto, iwe na munonko Aroni mulonganike no lukuta lonse pamo. Pa menso yabo ulande ku cilibwe cilya, naco calafumfumuna amenshi. Walafumya amenshi mu cilibwe pakuti ulukuta lunwe pamo ne fitekwa fyabo.”" 
Numbers20:9 Kanshi Mose epakubuula inkonto iyali pa cinso cakwa Yawe ngefyo amukonkomeshe. 
Numbers20:10 Mose na Aroni balonganike ibumba pantanshi ya cilibwe, elyo Mose abeba ati, “Umfweni imwe mwe bacisanguka! Bushe tumufumishe amenshi mu cilibwe ici?”" 
Numbers20:11 Elyo Mose aimya inkonto mu mulu no kuma pa cilibwe imiku ibili. Amenshi yafumfumuka, no lukuta lwalanwa pamo ne fitekwa fyabo." 
Numbers20:12 Nomba Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni ati, “Pantu tamwacincetekela ukufikapo no kuncindika ngo wamushilo pa cinso ca bena Israeli, imwe tamwakengishe ibumba ili mu calo ico nabalaya ukubapeela.”" 
Numbers20:13 Aya e menshi ya ku Meriba, ku ncende kulya abena Israeli bailishenye pa cinso cakwa Yawe, kulya nao ailangile ukuti wamushilo pakati kabo." 
Numbers20:14 Mose atumine inkombe ku mfumu ya bena Edomu, ukufuma ku Kadeshi, ukuya sosa ati, “Ifi efyo munonko Israeli asosa. Aleti mwalishibafye bwino amacushi yonse ayo twapitamo." 
Numbers20:15 Ifikolwe fyesu fyaile ku Egupto uko twaikele imyaka iyingi. Abena Egupto balecusha ifikolwe fyesu, nefwe bene baletucusha." 
Numbers20:16 Ilyo na ifwe twakuutile kuli Yawe, nao alyumfwile inkuuta shesu, no kututumina malaika uwakutufumya mu Egupto. Nomba tuli pano pa Kadeshi, umusumba waba mu mupaka wa calo cobe." 
Numbers20:17 Twapapata tusuminisheni tupitekofye mu calo cenu. Ifwe tatwakapite mu filime, nangu mu mabala ya ŋanu, nangu ukunwa amenshi mu cishima icili conse. Tukakonkafye umusebo wa mfumu, ukwabula ukupasukila lwa ku kulyo nangufye lwa ku kuso mpaka tukafume mu calo cenu.”" 
Numbers20:18 Elyo Edomu abasuka ati, “Tamuli nakupita muno iyoo! Nga mwaesha ukupitamo, ifwe tukema ne fita no kwisa mulwisha ku lupanga.”" 
Numbers20:19 Kabili abena Israeli bayaswike abati, “Ala mukwai ifwe tukakonkafye umusebo ukalamba, elyo ifwe nangu ifitekwa fyesu nga fyanwa amenshi yenu mu fishima, ifwe bene ala ninshi tukalipila. Ico tulelombakofye kupita mu calo cenu pa makasa, te cimbi iyoo.”" 
Numbers20:20 Kabili bayasuka abati, “Tamuli nakupita muno iyoo!” Kanshi Edomu epakubemina ne bumba lya fita ilikalamba kabili ifyamaka nganshi." 
Numbers20:21 Ico Edomu akaanya ukusuminisha Israeli ukupita mu calo cakwe, Israeli ayalulukako ukufuma kuli bena." 
Numbers20:22 Ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonsefye lwalifumine mu musumba wa Kadeshi no kuya ku lupili lwa Hori. 
Numbers20:23 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose na Aroni pa lupili lwa Hori, mupepi no mupaka wa Edomu, ati," 
Numbers20:24 “Aroni ali nokuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Takengile mu calo napeela abena Israeli, apo bonse imwe babili mwasangukile icebo candi ku menshi ya Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Kanshi senda Aroni no mwana wakwe Eleasa, muye nabo pa mulu wa lupili lwa Hori." 
Numbers20:26 Uye fuula Aroni ifyakufwala fya bushimapepo no kufifwika ku mwana wakwe umwaume Eleasa, pantu Aroni ali nokuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Kabili akafwila kulya kwine.”" 
Numbers20:27 Mose nao acita ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. Baya na pa mulu wa lupili lwa Hori, ninshi no lukuta lonse lulemonako." 
Numbers20:28 Awe Mose afuula Aroni ifyakufwala fya bushimapepo, afwika no mwana wakwe umwaume Eleasa. Palya pene pa mulu wa lupili epo Aroni afwila no kufwila. Elyo Mose na Eleasa batentemuka ulupili bafumako." 
Numbers20:29 Ilyo ulukuta lonse lwateseshe ukuti Aroni nafwa, iŋanda yonse iya bena Israeli yamulooseshe pa nshiku amakumi yatatu (30)." 
Numbers21:1 Ilyo imfumu ya bena Kenani iya ku Aradi, iyaleikala mu matololo ya Negebu, yaumfwile ukuti abena Israeli baleisa mu musebo walola ku Atarimu, yaya balwisha, yaikatapo na bamo bunkole." 
Numbers21:2 Elyo abena Israeli balaile kuli Yawe abati, “Nga wapeela aba bantu mu minwe yesu, na ifwe tukapeela imisumba yabo kukonaulwa.”" 
Numbers21:3 Yawe abomfwa, abapeela na bena Kenani mu minwe yabo. Nabo abena Israeli balofeshe abena Kenani no konaula imisumba yabo. Eico icifulo ici cainikwa ne shina lya Homa." 
Numbers21:4 Abena Israeli bafumine ku lupili lwa Hori, balaya inshila yaya kuli Bemba Wakashika pakuti balambe icalo ca Edomu. Nomba abantu basuka batendwa," 
Numbers21:5 balaisosha kuli Lesa na Mose abati, “Cinshi mwatufumisha mu Egupto, pakuti twise tufwile mu matololo? Tamwaba mukate! Tamwaba na menshi yene! Kabili tatulefwaya ici cakulya cabuwelewele!”" 
Numbers21:6 Elyo Yawe abatumina insoka shabusungu, nasho shabasumaula, na bena Israeli abengi bafwa." 
Numbers21:7 Elyo abantu baisa kuli Mose balamweba abati, “Twalibifishe ilyo twailishenye kuli Yawe na kuli iwe. Kanshi iwe papata kuli Yawe pakuti afumye insoka kuli ifwe.” Mose nao epakupapatilako abantu kuli Yawe." 
Numbers21:8 Elyo Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Panga insoka ya mukuba no kuibika pa cimuti, pakuti onse uwasumwa nga aloleshapo aba no bumi.”" 
Numbers21:9 Kanshi Mose epakupanga insoka ya mukuba, aibika na pa cimuti. Kanshi nomba ilyo insoka yasuma umuntu, nao alolesha pa nsoka ya mukuba, aba umumi." 
Numbers21:10 Abena Israeli bakonkenyepo ulwendo, baya cita inkambi ku Oboti." 
Numbers21:11 Ilintu bafuma ku Oboti, baya cita inkambi mu Iye Abarimu, mu matololo yalolenkana na Moabu lwa ku kabanga." 
Numbers21:12 Ukufuma palya baya cita inkambi mwishika lya Seredi. 
Numbers21:13 Ilyo bafumapo, kabili bayacita inkambi lubali lwa kwishilya lya Alinoni, mu matololo yabela mu mupaka wa calo ca bena Amoli. Alinoni e mupaka wa Moabu, waba pakati ka Moabu ne calo ca bena Amoli." 
Numbers21:14 E mulandu wine icitabo ca Nkondo shakwa Yawe catila, “Wahebu uwa mu Sufa, kabili mu mikonko ya mu Alinoni," 
Numbers21:15 na mu mikonko ya mimana, iyalola ku musumba wa Ari, ukulola na ku mupaka wa Moabu.”" 
Numbers21:16 Kabili ukufuma apo balitwalilile basuka bafika na ku Bere, pa cishima apo Yawe aebele Mose ukuti, “Longanika abantu pamo, nalabapeela amenshi.”" 
Numbers21:17 Elyo abena Israeli baimbile ulwimbo ulu abati, “Fukauka amenshi, we cishima! Imbeni ulwimbo palwa cishima." 
Numbers21:18 Icishima icaimbwa na bashamfumu, ico bacilolo ba bantu baimba. Caimbwa ku nkonto yabufumu ne mitambu benda nayo.” Elyo bafuma mu matololo baya ku Matana." 
Numbers21:19 Ukufuma ku Matana baya ku Nalieli, kabili ukufuma ku Nalieli baya na ku Bamoti." 
Numbers21:20 Kabili ilyo bafuma ku Bamoti baya kwishika lya Moabu, uko ulupili lwa Pisiga lwalolenkana na matololo." 
Numbers21:21 Abena Israeli batumine inkombe ku mfumu Sihoni iya bena Amoli abati," 
Numbers21:22 “Twapapata tusuminisheni tupitekofye mu calo cenu. Tatwakapasukile nangu kumo, kabili tatwakapite mu filime, nangu mu mabala ya ŋanu, nangu ukunwa amenshi mu cishima icili conse. Tukakonkafye umusebo wa mfumu, mpaka tukafume mu calo cenu.”" 
Numbers21:23 Lelo Sihoni akaana ukusuminisha abena Israeli ukupita mu calo cakwe. Alonganya ifita fyakwe fyonse, aya na mu matololo kukulwisha abena Israeli. Ilyo afika ku Yahasi, alwisha na bena Israeli." 
Numbers21:24 Lelo abena Israeli bamulwisha ku lupanga no kumupokolola icalo ukutendekela ku mumana wa Alinoni ukufikafye na ku Yaboku, ukupelelafye na ku mupaka wa calo ca bena Amoni, pantu umupaka wa calo ca bena Amoni wali uwacingililwako." 
Numbers21:25 Abena Israeli bapoka imisumba yonse iya bena Amoli, kumo kwine na Heshiboni ne mishi yonse iya mumbali, no kwikala emo balaikala." 
Numbers21:26 Heshiboni wali musumba wa mfumu Sihoni iya bena Amoli, iyalwishishe imfumu ya bena Moabu no kupoka icalo caiko conse ukufika na ku Alinoni." 
Numbers21:27 E mulandu wine iŋomba shimbila ashiti, “Iseni ku Heshiboni, lekeni akuulwe cipya cipya. Lekeni umusumba wakwa Sihoni ube nga filya wali kale." 
Numbers21:28 Umulilo wafuma mu Heshiboni, ulubingu lwafuma mu musumba wa Sihoni. Fyaonaula Ari mu calo ca Moabu, fyaonaula abekashi ba pa mulu wa mpili sha Alinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Owe, akalanda kuli Moabu! Mwaloba, mwe bena Kemoshi! Napeela abana abaume ukuba imbutushi, na bana abanakashi ukuba muli bunkole, ku mfumu Sihoni iya bena Amoli." 
Numbers21:30 Nomba twapoka ubufumu bwabo, Heshiboni aonaulwa ukuya fika na ku Diboni. Natubapwisha ukufikafye na ku Nofa, mpaka na ku Medeba.”" 
Numbers21:31 Kanshi abena Israeli baikele mu calo ca bena Amoli. 
Numbers21:32 Panuma elyo Mose atumine inengu ku Yaseri. Abena Israeli bapokolwele imishi ya mumbali, no kufulumunamo abena Amoli abaleikalamo." 
Numbers21:33 Elyo kabili abena Israeli bayaluluka, balaya no musebo walola ku Bashani. Kanshi Ogi imfumu ya ku Bashani ne fita fyaiko fyonse, yaya kukubakumanya mukubalwisha ku Edurei." 
Numbers21:34 Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Wimutiina Ogi. Pantu nimupeela mu minwe yobe, kumo kwine ne fita fyakwe fyonse pamo ne calo cakwe cine. Umucite filya wacitile Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli, uwaleteeka mu Heshiboni.”" 
Numbers21:35 Abena Israeli baipaya Ogi na bana bakwe abaume, ne fita fyakwe fyonse. Takwapuswike nangu umo. Elyo bapoka ne calo cakwe." 
Numbers22:1 Elyo abena Israeli bakonkenyepo ulwendo lwabo baya ku mawanga ya ku Moabu, bacitako inkambi ukukonka ululamba lwa mumana wa Yordani, ukulolenkana na Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Nomba Balaki mwana Sipori amona ifyo abena Israeli bacitile abena Amoli. 
Numbers22:3 Abena Moabu baikatwa no mwenso ukalamba pantu abena Israeli balifulishe. Kanshi abena Moabu balatiina abena Israeli nganshi. 
Numbers22:4 Abena Moabu baeba intungulushi sha bena Midiani abati, “Uyu cinkupiti wa bantu, alaonaula ifintu fyonse ifyo twakwata, nga filya iŋombe ilume ifulaula icani mu mpanga.” Kanshi Balaki mwana Sipori uwali mfumu ya bena Moabu pa nshita ilya," 
Numbers22:5 atuma inkombe shakuya ita Balamu mwana Beori uwaleikala mu Peto, mupepi no mumana wa Yufurate, uko Balamu afyalilwe. Balaki ati, “Umutundu wa bantu nawisa ukufuma ku Egupto, ukumene mpanga yonse pano calo lino kabili bekele mupepi na ine." 
Numbers22:6 Nomba isa undapishisheko aba bantu pantu nabancila amaka. Lyena nalimo ine kuti nabacimfya no kubafulumuna mu calo. Pantu ine nalishiba ukuti abantu abo iwe wapaala ninshi bapaalwa, nabo iwe walapisha ninshi balapishiwa.”" 
Numbers22:7 Intungulushi sha bena Moabu na bena Midiani shaima, shaya nashisenda ne fyakulipila pakubuka. Ilyo shafika kuli Balamu, shamweba ifyo Balaki asosele." 
Numbers22:8 Nao Balamu asheba ati, “Sendameni kuno, elyo mailo nkamweba ifyo Yawe alenjeba.” Kanshi intungulushi sha bena Moabu epakwikala na Balamu." 
Numbers22:9 Lesa aishile kuli Balamu no kumwipusha ati, “Bushe aba bantu uli nabo ni bani?”" 
Numbers22:10 Nao ayasuka Lesa ati, “Balaki mwana Sipori, imfumu ya ku Moabu euntumine amashiwi yakuti," 
Numbers22:11 ‘Umutundu wa bantu nawisa ukufuma ku Egupto, bakumene mpanga yonse pano calo. Nomba isa ubandapishisheko. Lyena nalimo ine kuti nabacimfya, nabafulumuna na mu calo cesu.’”" 
Numbers22:12 Lelo Lesa aeba Balamu ati, “Iwe wiesha kuya nabo. Kabili tecakwesha ukutipwila abo bantu pantu balipaalwa.”" 
Numbers22:13 Ulucelo lwakonkapo Balamu ashibuka, aya eba intungulushi shakwa Balaki ati, “Bwekelenimo ku calo cenu, pantu Yawe nandesha ukuti tuleya bonse.”" 
Numbers22:14 Kanshi intungulushi sha bena Moabu epakubwelelamo, shaya eba Balaki ashiti, “Balamu nakaana ukwisa na ifwe.”" 
Numbers22:15 Elyo Balaki atuma na shimbi intungulushi ishingi nganshi, kabili ishicindami ukucila ishantanshi." 
Numbers22:16 Shaya kuli Balamu, shamweba ashiti, “Ifi efyo Balaki mwana Sipori asosa aleti, wileka nangu cimo cikuleshe ukwisa kuli ine." 
Numbers22:17 Pantu nkakulambula ifikankala, kabili nkacita ne fintu fyonse ukanjeba. Napapata isa undapishisheko aba bantu.”" 
Numbers22:18 Lelo Balamu abasuka ati, “Nangufye Balaki engampeela isano lyakwe ilyaisulamo silifa na golide, teti ncite icintu nelyo cimo, icikulu nangu icinono, ukucila pafyo Yawe Lesa wandi ankonkomesha." 
Numbers22:19 Nomba na imwe bene sendameni ngefyo abanenu bacitile, pakuti ŋumfwilepo fimbi ifyo Yawe alenjeba.”" 
Numbers22:20 Bulya bushiku bwine, Yawe aishile kuli Balamu amweba ati, “Apo aba bantu beshile mukukwita, ima kabiye nabo, lelo ulecitafye ifyo nakweba.”" 
Numbers22:21 Ulucelo Balamu anina punda wakwe, akonka ne ntungulushi sha bena Moabu." 
Numbers22:22 Lelo Lesa alifulilwe nganshi ico akonkele. Na malaika wakwa Yawe aisa iminina mu musebo pakuti amuleshe ukupita. Balamu aninine pali punda wakwe, na babomfi bakwe babili nabamushindika." 
Numbers22:23 Cilyafye punda amona malaika wakwa Yawe eminine mu musebo, ninshi naikata ulupanga mu minwe, afuma mu musebo no kuya mu mpanga. Balamu ena alauma punda pakuti abwelele pa musebo." 
Numbers22:24 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe aya iminina apo inshila yacepele, pakati ka mabala ya myangashi ayali na malinga ya mabwe konse konse." 
Numbers22:25 Ilyo punda amona malaika wakwa Yawe, aikusa kwilinga, afyenenkesha no lukasa lwakwa Balamu kwilinga. Balamu nao abwekeshapo ukuma punda." 
Numbers22:26 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe aselela pantanshi apacepeshe, apashali ne ncende ya kwalukilapo ku kulyo nangu ku kuso." 
Numbers22:27 Ilyo punda amona malaika wakwa Yawe, alala panshi mwisamba lyakwa Balamu. Nao Balamu afulwa nganshi, alafupaula punda ne nkonto yakwe." 
Numbers22:28 Kanshi Yawe epakwisula akanwa kakwa punda, nao asosa kuli Balamu ati, “Bushe cinshi ico ine nkucitile pakuti ungume ifi imiku itatu?”" 
Numbers22:29 Balamu epakwasuka punda ati, “Pantu iwe ulentumfya! Nkwata ulupanga mu minwe yandi nga nakwipaya nombalinefye.”" 
Numbers22:30 Punda aeba Balamu ati, “Ine bushe nshili punda obe, uo iwe uninapo ukushinta na lelo? Bushe naliba mu musango wakucitapo ifi nacita kuli iwe?” Nao atile, “Iyoo.”" 
Numbers22:31 Elyo Yawe ashibula Balamu amenso no kuleka amone. Elyo amona malaika wakwa Yawe naiminina mu musebo no lupanga mu minwe. Balamu akontama, awa na panshi ubukupeme." 
Numbers22:32 Malaika wakwa Yawe aipusha Balamu ati, “Bushe cinshi ico waumina ifi punda obe imiku itatu? Ine nine naisa kuno kukukulesha ukuya, pantu inshila yobe tailungeme pa cinso candi." 
Numbers22:33 Punda ena acimona, ayaluluka mukutiina ine imiku yonse iyi itatu. Akaana kwaluluka, ine cine cine nga ninkwipaya, punda wena nga nashala.”" 
Numbers22:34 Balamu aeba malaika wakwa Yawe ati, “Ine nimbifya. Nshacishiba ukuti nimwe mwiminine mu musebo pakundesha ukuya. Nomba imwe nga tamulefwaya ukuti njeko, nalabwelelamofye.”" 
Numbers22:35 Malaika wakwa Yawe aeba Balamu ati, “Akuya na bantu, nomba wikasosa kantu nelyo kamo, kanofye ico nakweba ukusosa.” Awe Balamu epakuya ne ntungulushi shakwa Balaki isho amutumine." 
Numbers22:36 Ilyo Balaki aumfwile ukuti Balamu ali mu nshila, aima amukonkela ku musumba wa bena Moabu, uwabela mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Alinoni, pa mpela ya mupaka wa calo cakwe." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki aeba Balamu ati, “Bushe nshatumine amashiwi ayakukwita pakuti wise bwangu? Cinshi tawaishile uko ndi? Bushe cine cine teti nkulambule?”" 
Numbers22:38 Balamu amwasuka ati, “Ala kwena nomba ninjisa. Bushe kuti nalandafye icili conse? Ine nakulalandafye ifyo Lesa anjeba ukulanda.”" 
Numbers22:39 Elyo Balamu na Balaki baima baya ku musumba wa Kiriati Husoti. 
Numbers22:40 Kanshi eko Balaki alekela amalambo ya ŋombe ne mpaanga, apeelako na Balamu ne ntungulushi isho ali nasho." 
Numbers22:41 Bwaisaca ulucelo Balaki alisendele Balamu ku Bamoti Baali, uko amwene bamo abena Israeli." 
Numbers23:1 Elyo Balamu asosele ati, “Nkuulileni ifibumbili fya malambo pano cine lubali no kupekanya iŋombe ishilume cine lubali, na basukusuku nabo cine lubali.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balaki acita ifyo Balamu amwebele, elyo bonse babili baleka ilambo lya ŋombe imo imo na sukusuku umo umo pali cila bulambo." 
Numbers23:3 Elyo Balamu aeba Balaki ati, “Iminina pano pene mupepi no mutuulo obe uwe lambo lyakoca, ine nalabala mfumepo. Limbi Yawe alefwaya ukunkumanya. Fyonse ifyo aleya njeba ndeisa kwebako.” Kanshi Balamu epakuya pa lupili apashali nelyo kamo." 
Numbers23:4 Lesa akumana na Balamu, elyo Balamu amweba ati, “Nimpekanya ifibumbili fya malambo cine lubali, na pali cila bulambo nintuulapo ilambo lya ŋombe imo na sukusuku umo.”" 
Numbers23:5 Yawe afunda Balamu amashiwi yakuti aye alande, elyo amweba nokuti, “Bwelelamo kuli Balaki pakuti uye mweba aya mashiwi.”" 
Numbers23:6 Balamu abwelela kuli Balaki, amusanga naiminina mupepi no mutuulo wakwe uwe lambo lyakoca ne ntungulushi sha bena Moabu shonse." 
Numbers23:7 Balamu epakutampa ukusesema ati, “Balaki imfumu ya bena Moabu eyandeta ukufuma ku Aramu, icalo caba ku mpili sha ku kabanga. Atile ‘Isa undapishisheko Yakobo, isa unduulileko abena Israeli.’" 
Numbers23:8 Nga ine kuti nalapisha shani abo Lesa ashalapisha? Nga ine kuti naluula shani abo Yawe ashaluula? 
Numbers23:9 Pa mulu wa mpili apatali ndebamona, ukufuma apasansama ndebalolesha. Namona abantu abekala beka, abashiimona ukuba nga bantu bambi." 
Numbers23:10 Nani engapenda ulukungu lwakwa Yakobo? Nangu nani engapenda iciputulwa calenga fine ica bena Israeli? Lekafye mfwe imfwa ya wakaele, pakuti impela yandi ibe nga bena.”" 
Numbers23:11 Elyo Balaki aeba Balamu ati, “Cinshi iwe wancitila ine? Ico nkwitile kwisa lapisha abalwani bandi, lelo iwe taucitile nangu cimo. Ico wacitafye kubapaala epela!”" 
Numbers23:12 Balamu ayasuka ati, “Ine ndi nokulandafye ifyo Yawe anjeba ukulanda.”" 
Numbers23:13 Kanshi Balaki atile kuli Balamu, “Twende bonse ku ncende imbi uko walaya bamwena. Kanshi walamonafye abanono te bonse iyoo. Kulya kwine eko uleya bandapishishako.”" 
Numbers23:14 Amusenda kwibala lya Sofimu, pa mulu wa lupili lwa Pisiga. Akuulapo ne fibumbili fya malambo cine lubali, elyo pali cila bulambo atuulapo cilume wa ŋombe umo na sukusuku umo." 
Numbers23:15 Kabili Balamu aeba Balaki ati, “Imininina pano pene mupepi no mutuulo obe uwe lambo lyakoca, ilyo naya mukumonana na Yawe palya.”" 
Numbers23:16 Yawe bakumene na Balamu, amufunda amashiwi ayakuti aye alande, elyo amweba nokuti, “Bwelelamo kuli Balaki pakuti uye mweba aya mashiwi.”" 
Numbers23:17 Balamu abwelelemo, asanga Balaki ninshi eminine mupepi no mutuulo wakwe uwe lambo lyakoca ne ntungulushi sha bena Moabu. Balaki aipusha Balamu ati, “Finshi Yawe acilanda?”" 
Numbers23:18 Elyo Balamu alanda ubusesemo bwakwe, “Balaki, ima kabili umfwa kuno, umfwa ifyo ndelanda, iwe mwana Sipo." 
Numbers23:19 Lesa te muntu uwakuti abepe, nangu ena taba ngo mwana wa muntu, uwakuti apilibule ifyo apangile. Bushe alalanda kabili afilwa ukubomba? Bushe alalaya kabili afilwa ukufikilisha?" 
Numbers23:20 Ine nimpokelela icebo cakupaala. Lesa napaala, kanshi ine teti njalule." 
Numbers23:21 Tamwenemo ishamo muli Yakobo, kabili tasangilemo ububi mu bena Israeli. Yawe Lesa wabo alaba nabo. Eo balumbanya ukuti e Mfumu yabo." 
Numbers23:22 Lesa ewabafumya mu calo ca Egupto. Baba na maka nge mboo. 
Numbers23:23 Takuli bwanga bwakulowa Yakobo, nangu ukupendula pa mulandu wa bena Israeli. Nomba bakalasosa pali Yakobo na Israeli abati, ‘Moneni ifyo Lesa acita!’" 
Numbers23:24 Aba bantu bema nge nkalamo ikota, Bafukukila nge nkalamo ilume, iyishifwaya kutuusha kanofye yalepaula inama ikete, no kunwa umulopa wayo ipeye.”" 
Numbers23:25 Elyo Balaki aebele Balamu ati, “Cisuma wibalapisha, nangu ukubapaala iyoo!”" 
Numbers23:26 Balamu nao ayasuka ati, “Bushe nshakwebele ukuti ine ndi nokucitafye ifyo Yawe asosa?”" 
Numbers23:27 Elyo Balaki aebele Balamu ati, “Isa, leka nkutwale ku ncende imbi. Nalimo kwena calasansamusha Lesa pakuti akusuminishe ukundapishishako abena Israeli ukufuma kuli ilya ncende.”" 
Numbers23:28 Elyo Balaki asenda Balamu amutwala pa mulu wa lupili lwa Peori, ukulungatanafye ne ciswebebe." 
Numbers23:29 Balamu aeba Balaki ati, “Nkuulilako ifibumbili fya malambo cine lubali pano pene, mpekanishishako ne ŋombe ishilume cine lubali na basukusuku nabo cine lubali.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balaki nao acitila umo mwine Balamu asosele. Atuula ilambo lya ŋombe ilume imo na sukusuku umo pali cila bulambo. 
Numbers24:1 Nomba ilyo Balamu amwene ukuti nacisekesha Yawe ukuti apaale Israeli, taile kukufwaya ukubuka nga fintu acitile intanshi. Lelo alungamafye ku ciswebebe." 
Numbers24:2 Balamu ainuna amenso no kumona abena Israeli uko bacitile inkambi shabo mu luko mu luko. Elyo Umupashi wakwa Lesa waisa pali ena. 
Numbers24:3 Kabili alanda ubusesemo bwakwe ati, “Ubusesemo bwakwa Balamu mwana Beori, ubusesemo bwa muntu uwatwa amenso," 
Numbers24:4 Ubusesemo bwa muntu uumfwa amashiwi yakwa Lesa, uumona icimonwa ukufuma ku Wamaka yonse, uuwa ubukupeme, kabili uo amenso yakwe yaba ayaisuka." 
Numbers24:5 Yangu ifyo amatenti yobe yawama we Yakobo, nomo wikala ifyo mwawama we Israeli." 
Numbers24:6 Fyaba nga mashika ayatantalila, nga mabala yatantama mu lulamba lwa mumana, nga amatembusha ayo Yawe alimba, atemwa nge fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ifyalimbwa mu mbali ya mumana." 
Numbers24:7 Amenshi yakapongoloka ukufuma mu mbeketi shabo. Ne mbuto shabo tashakabulwe menshi. Kabili imfumu yabo ikacindama ukucila Agagi. Kabili ubufumu bwabo bukasansabalikwa. 
Numbers24:8 Lesa ewabafumya mu calo ca Egupto. Bakwata amaka nge mboo. Balepaula imishobo ilwani no kutobaula amafupa yabo. Balasaula abalwani babo ku mifwi. 
Numbers24:9 Uyu mutundu waba nge nkalamo ilume iyitambala no kulala, kabili nge nkalamo ikota, nani uwingaubusha? Babe abapaalwa abo abakupaala, kabili abakulapisha nabo balapishiwe!”" 
Numbers24:10 Elyo Balaki afulilwe Balamu. Aumanya indupi, aeba Balamu ati, “Nakwitile ukwisa lapisha abalwani bandi, lelo iwe ulebapaalafye uyu e muku walenga butatu." 
Numbers24:11 Nombalinefye akuya kumobe! Ine natile nkakulambula bwino, lelo Yawe ewakutanisha icilambu.”" 
Numbers24:12 Balamu ayasuka Balaki ati, “Bushe nshaebele inkombe watumine nati," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Nangufye Balaki engampeela isano lyakwe ilyaisulamo silifa na golide, ine teti ncite icintu nelyo cimo palwandi, icisuma nelyo icibi, icakucila peshiwi lyakwa Yawe. Ine mfwile ukulandafye ifyo Yawe alanda.’”" 
Numbers24:14 “Nomba nalabwelelamo ku bantu bandi, lelo isa, leka nkusokeko ifyo abena Israeli bali nokucita abantu bobe mu nshiku ishileisa.”" 
Numbers24:15 Elyo Balamu alanda ubusesemo bwakwe ati, “Ubusesemo bwakwa Balamu mwana Beori, ubusesemo bwa muntu uwatwa amenso," 
Numbers24:16 ubusesemo bwa muntu uumfwa amashiwi yakwa Lesa, uwapeelwa amano ukufuma kuli Lesa Mukulu, uwamona icimonwa cafuma ku Wamaka yonse, uuwa ubukupeme, kabili uo amenso yaba ayaisuka." 
Numbers24:17 Ndemumona, lelo te nomba, ndemulolesha, lelo te mupepi. Ulutanda lukafuma muli Yakobo. Inkonto yabufumu ikema muli Israeli. Akonaula intungulushi sha bena Moabu. Akatoba no tupanga twa bana baume bakwa Seti." 
Numbers24:18 Edomu akacimfiwa, no mulwani wakwe Seiri akacimfiwa, lelo Israeli akakwatilapo amaka." 
Numbers24:19 Kateka akafuma muli Yakobo no konaula abakashalapo mu misumba.” 
Numbers24:20 Kabili Balamu amona Amaleki, elyo alanda ubusesemo bwakwe ati, “Amaleki ewali uwantanshi pakati ka mishobo yonse, lelo pakulekelesha akaloba.”" 
Numbers24:21 Elyo Balamu amona abena Keni no kulanda ubusesemo bwakwe ati, “Isano lyobe lintu lyacingililwa, icisansala cobe cabikwa mwilibwe." 
Numbers24:22 Lelo mwe bena Keni muli nokonaulwa ilyo Ashuri akamusenda bunkole.” 
Numbers24:23 Kabili akonkanyapo ukulanda ubusesemo bwakwe ati, “Iye, nga nani engaba umumi nga Lesa acita ifi?" 
Numbers24:24 Amato yakafuma ku lulamba lwa Kitimu, yakacimfya Ashuri na Eberi, lelo nabo bene bakaloba.”" 
Numbers24:25 Balamu aima abwelelamo na kumwakwe, na Balaki nao aya no kuya." 
Numbers25:1 Ilyo abena Israeli baikele mu Shitimu, abaume bamo batendeke ukulacita ubulalelale na banakashi abena Moabu," 
Numbers25:2 abaleita abaume ku malambo ayo baletuula imilungu yabo. Abantu balelyako ifyelambo, balepepako ne milungu." 
Numbers25:3 Kanshi abena Israeli nabo epakuwila mukupepa Baali wa ku Peori. Yawe epakufulilwa Israeli. 
Numbers25:4 Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Buula intungulushi shonse isha aba bantu, ushipaye pa lwalala pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pakuti icipyu icikali icakwa Yawe cifume pa bena Israeli.”" 
Numbers25:5 Mose aeba abapingushi ba mu Israeli ati, “Umupingushi onse ali nokwipaya abo bonse abaume bakwe abailundanya mukupepa Baali wa ku Peori.”" 
Numbers25:6 Elyo umwina Israeli umwaume aishile no mwanakashi umwina Midiani ku lupwa lwakwe, ninshi Mose no lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli balelila pa mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Numbers25:7 Ilyo Fineasi umwana umwaume wakwa Eleasa umwana umwaume uwakwa Aroni shimapepo amona ifi, ena afuma pa lukuta, abuula ifumo mu minwe yakwe," 
Numbers25:8 akonka no mwina Israeli mwi tenti. Abapulinkanya ifumo bonse babili, lyapula mu mwaume umwina Israeli lyalasa no mwanakashi. Awe apopene ne cikuko caleka no kuleka icaleipaya abena Israeli." 
Numbers25:9 Lelo abafwile ku cikuko bali amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000)." 
Numbers25:10 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers25:11 “Fineasi umwana mwaume wakwa Eleasa umwana mwaume wakwa Aroni shimapepo, atalusha ubukali bwandi pa bena Israeli. Pantu napamfiwa nga ne mwine wine pakuncindika pa kati kabo, epakuti mu kupamfiwa kwandi nibalofya." 
Numbers25:12 Eico kanshi mwebeni ukuti ine nalapangana nankwe icipangano camutende. 
Numbers25:13 Umwine pamo na ba mu lupwa lwakwe abakamukonkapo, bakakwata icipangano cakuba bashimapepo ba pe na pe, pantu alipamfiwe ukucindika Lesa wakwe, kabili ewafutila abena Israeli pa bubifi bwabo.”" 
Numbers25:14 Ishina lya mwina Israeli baipeye pamo no mwanakashi umwina Midiani, ni Simuri mwana Salu, intungulushi ya mu lupwa lwakwa Simeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Kabili no mwanakashi umwina Midiani untu bakomene nao ali ni Kosibi mwana Suli, uwali intungulushi imo mu lupwa lwa bena Midiani." 
Numbers25:16 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers25:17 “Lwisheni abena Midiani nga balwani benu no kubepaya. 
Numbers25:18 Pantu nabo bamucitile nga balwani benu pakumubepa pa fyali kuno ku Peori, pa mulandu wakwa nkashi yabo Kosibi, umwana umwanakashi wa ntungulushi ya bena Midiani, uo baipeye ilyo kwali icikuko kuno ku Peori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Panuma ya cikuko Yawe aebele Mose na Eleasa umwana mwaume wakwa Aroni shimapepo ati," 
Numbers26:2 “Pendeni ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lonse mu ndupwa shabo. Bonse abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, abengalinga ukuba ifita mu Israeli.”" 
Numbers26:3 Kanshi Mose na Eleasa shimapepo balanda nabo mu mawanga ya Moabu mupepi na Yordani, apalungatana na Yeriko, abati," 
Numbers26:4 “Pendeni abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili nangu ukucilapo, pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.” Aba e bena Israeli abafumine ku Egupto." 
Numbers26:5 Aba mu luko lwakwa Rubeni, ibeli lyakwa Israeli, mwali aba. Muli Hanoki mwali abena Hanoki. Muli Palu mwali abena Palu." 
Numbers26:6 Muli Hesroni mwali abena Hesroni. Muli Kami mwali abena Kami. 
Numbers26:7 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Rubeni, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yane na yatatu ne myanda cine lubali na makumi yatatu (43,730)." 
Numbers26:8 Mwana Palu umwaume ali ni Eliabu. 
Numbers26:9 Bamwana Eliabu bali ni Nemueli, Datani na Abiramu. Aba bene Datani na Abiramu ebali intungulushi sha lukuta abasangukile Mose na Aroni, bawila na kuli Kora ne bumba lyakwe lilya lyasangukile Yawe." 
Numbers26:10 Umushili waliceneme no kubamina pamo pene na Kora, na bambi abalemukonka bene bafwile ilyo umulilo waipeye abantu imyanda ibili na makumi yasano (250). Kabili aba bantu bali cilangililo cakubasoka." 
Numbers26:11 Lelo bamwana Kora tabafwile bonse iyoo. 
Numbers26:12 Aba mu luko lwakwa Simeoni, mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Nemueli mwali abena Nemueli. Muli Yamini mwali abena Yamini. Muli Yakini mwali abena Yakini." 
Numbers26:13 Muli Sera mwali abena Sera. Muli Shauli mwali abena Shauli. 
Numbers26:14 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Simeoni, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yabili na yabili ne myanda ibili (22,200)." 
Numbers26:15 Aba mu luko lwakwa Gadi, mu ndupwa bali nifi. Muli Sefoni mwali abena Sefoni. Muli Hagi mwali abena Hagi. Muli Shuni mwali abena Shuni." 
Numbers26:16 Muli Osini mwali abena Osini. Muli Eli mwali abena Eli. 
Numbers26:17 Muli Arodi mwali abena Arodi. Muli Areli mwali abena Areli. 
Numbers26:18 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Gadi, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yane ne myanda isano (40,500)." 
Numbers26:19 Ere na Onani bali abana abaume abakwa Yuda, lelo bafwilile mu calo ca Kenani." 
Numbers26:20 Aba mu luko lwakwa Yuda mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Shela mwali abena Shela. Muli Peresi mwali abena Peresi. Muli Sera mwali abena Sera. 
Numbers26:21 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa Peresi bali nifi. Muli Hesroni mwali abena Hesroni. Muli Hamuli mwali abena Hamuli. 
Numbers26:22 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Yuda, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi cine lubali na mutanda ne myanda isano (76,500)." 
Numbers26:23 Aba mu luko lwakwa Isaka, mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Tola mwali abena Tola. Muli Pua mwali abena Pua." 
Numbers26:24 Muli Yashubu mwali abena Yashubu. Muli Shimuroni mwali abena Shimuroni. 
Numbers26:25 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Isaka, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi mutanda na yane ne myanda itatu (64,300)." 
Numbers26:26 Aba mu luko lwakwa Sebuloni, mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Seredi mwali abena Seredi. Muli Eloni mwali abena Eloni. Muli Yaleeli mwali abena Yaleeli." 
Numbers26:27 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Sebuloni, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi mutanda ne myanda isano (60,500)." 
Numbers26:28 Abana bakwa Yosefu, mu ndupwa shabo bali ni Manase na Efulemu." 
Numbers26:29 Aba mu luko lwakwa Manase mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Makiri mwali abena Makiri. (Makiri e wishi wakwa Gileadi). Muli Gileadi mwali abena Gileadi. 
Numbers26:30 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa Gileadi bali nifi. Muli Ieseri mwali abena Ieseri. Muli Heleki mwali abena Heleki. 
Numbers26:31 Muli Asirieli mwali abena Asirieli. Muli Shekemu mwali abena Shekemu. 
Numbers26:32 Muli Shemida mwali abena Shemida. Muli Heferi mwali abena Heferi. 
Numbers26:33 (Selofeadi mwana Heferi takwete abana abaume, akwetefye abana abanakashi, amashina yabo ni Mala, Noa, Hogila, Milika na Tirisa)." 
Numbers26:34 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Manase, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yasano na yabili ne myanda cine lubali (52,700)." 
Numbers26:35 Aba mu luko lwakwa Efulemu mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Shutela mwali abena Shutela. Muli Bekeri mwali abena Bekeri. Muli Tahani mwali abena Tahani. 
Numbers26:36 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa Shutela bali nifi. Muli Erani mwali abena Erani. 
Numbers26:37 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Efulemu, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yatatu na yabili ne myanda isano (32,500). Aba e ba mu lupwa lwakwa Yosefu mu mikowa yabo." 
Numbers26:38 Aba mu luko lwakwa Benjamini, mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Bela mwali abena Bela. Muli Ashibeli mwali abena Ashibeli. Muli Ailamu mwali abena Ailamu." 
Numbers26:39 Muli Shufamu mwali abena Shufamu. Muli Hufamu mwali abena Hufamu. 
Numbers26:40 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa Bela, ukupitila muli Adi na Namani bali nifi. Muli Adi mwali abena Adi. Muli Namani mwali abena Namani." 
Numbers26:41 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Benjamini, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yane na yasano ne myanda mutanda (45,600)." 
Numbers26:42 Aba mu luko lwakwa Dani, mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Shuhamu mwali abena Shuhamu. Ishi e ndupwa shakwa Dani." 
Numbers26:43 Bonse bali abena Shuhamu, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi mutanda na yane ne myanda ine (64,400)." 
Numbers26:44 Aba mu luko lwakwa Asheri, mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Imuna mwali abena Imuna. Muli Ishifi mwali abena Ishifi. Muli Beriya mwali abena Beriya." 
Numbers26:45 Kabili ukupitila mu ndupwa shakwa Beriya bali nifi. Muli Heberi mwali abena Heberi. Muli Malikieli mwali abena Malikieli. 
Numbers26:46 Asheri alikwete umwana umwanakashi, ishina lyakwe ni Sera." 
Numbers26:47 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Asheri, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yasano na yatatu ne myanda ine (53,400)." 
Numbers26:48 Aba mu luko lwakwa Naftali mu ndupwa shabo bali nifi. Muli Yaseeli mwali abena Yaseeli. Muli Guni mwali abena Guni. 
Numbers26:49 Muli Yeseri mwali abena Yeseri. Muli Shilemu mwali abena Shilemu. 
Numbers26:50 Aba e ba mu luko lwakwa Naftali, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yane na yasano ne myanda ine (45,400)." 
Numbers26:51 Kanshi impendwa ya baume bonse pamo abena Israeli yali amakana imyanda mutanda na limo ne myanda cine lubali na makumi yatatu (601,730)." 
Numbers26:52 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers26:53 “Ukakanye icalo kuli bonse ukulinganafye ne mpendwa ya mashina, pakuti cikabe icuma cabo icacishilano." 
Numbers26:54 Ku luko lukalamba, ubapeele icalo icikulu. Kabili na ku luko lunono, ubapeele icalo icinono. Cila luko luli nokupoka icalo ukulingana ne mpendwa ya balembwa." 
Numbers26:55 Uli nokushininkisha ukuti pakupeela icalo mupendule. Bali nokupeelwa icalo cabo ukulingana na mashina aya nko sha fikolwe fyabo. 
Numbers26:56 Cila calo bali nokupendula pakucakanya pakati ka mpendwa ikalamba ne inono.” 
Numbers26:57 Abena Levi, abapendelwe mu ndupwa shabo ni aba. Muli Geshoni mwali abena Geshoni. Muli Koati mwali abena Koati. Muli Merai mwali abena Merai." 
Numbers26:58 Indupwa sha bena Levi shimbi nishi, abena Libini, abena Hebuloni, abena Mali, abena Mushi na bena Kora. (Koati ali ni wishi wakwa Amuramu)" 
Numbers26:59 Ishina lyakwa muka Amuramu ni Yokebedi, uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Levi, uwafyalilwe mu luko lwa bena Levi mu Egupto. Yokebedi kuli Amuramu afyeleko abana abaume bali ni Aroni na Mose, elyo na nkashi yabo Miriamu." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni ali na bana abaume bane, ni Nadabu, Abihu, Eleasa na Itama." 
Numbers26:61 Lelo Nadabu na Abihu balifwile ilyo batuulile Yawe umulilo uushili wamushilo. 
Numbers26:62 Abena Levi bonse abaume abali no mweshi umo nangu ukucilapo, abapendelwe bali amakana amakumi yabili na yatatu (23,000). Aba bena tabapendelwe pamo na bambi abena Israeli, pantu mu calo tabakwetemo ciputulwa pakuti cingaba e cuma cabo ica cishilano." 
Numbers26:63 Kanshi ishi e nko shonse ishapendelwe na Mose na Eleasa shimapepo, ilyo bapendele abena Israeli mu mawanga ya ku Moabu, mwishilya lya Yordani, ukulungatana na Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Pa bena Israeli abo Mose na Aroni shimapepo bapendele mu matololo ya Sinai, tapashele nangu umo mwibumba ili." 
Numbers26:65 Pantu Yawe alyebele balya bena Israeli ukuti bonse bakafwila mu matololo kabili takwali nangu umo uwashele, kanofye Kalebu mwana Yefune na Yoshua mwana Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Abana abanakashi bakwa Selofeadi umwana mwaume wakwa Eferi, umwana mwaume wakwa Gileadi, umwana mwaume wakwa Makiri, umwana mwaume wakwa Manase, bali ba mu mikowa yakwa Manase umwana mwaume wakwa Yosefu. Amashina ya bana abanakashi bali ni Mala, Noa, Hogila, Milika na Tirisa." 
Numbers27:2 Baya iminina pantanshi yakwa Mose, Eleasa shimapepo na ku ntungulushi na ku lukuta lonse ku mwinshi we Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, basosa nokuti," 
Numbers27:3 “Batata bafwilile mu matololo, tabashilepo abana abaume nakalya. Tabali mwibumba lyakwa Kora lilya lyasangukile Yawe, lelo bafwililefye pa mulandu wa bubifi bacitile abene beka." 
Numbers27:4 Bushe ico batata tabakwetepo abana abaume, eco ishina lingalobela mu lupwa lwabo? Tupeniko na ifwe icuma ukufuma pafyo mwapeela bamunyina batata.”" 
Numbers27:5 Mose ena epakutwala umulandu wabo kuli Yawe," 
Numbers27:6 elyo Yawe asosa kuli Mose ati," 
Numbers27:7 “Ifilesosa bamwana Selofeadi abanakashi fyacine. Ufwile ukushininkisha ukuti wabapeela icuma nge ca cishilano cabo, ngefi fine wapeela bamunyina kwa shibo. Kabili nabo ubapeele icuma ica cishilano cakwa shibo." 
Numbers27:8 Kabili landa ku bena Israeli ukuti, ‘Umuntu umo nga afwa takwetepo umwana umwaume, umwana wakwe umwanakashi kuti abuula icuma ca cishilano cakwe." 
Numbers27:9 Nga takwete umwana umwanakashi, ninshi peeleni icuma ca cishilano kuli bamunyina abaume." 
Numbers27:10 Nga takwete bamunyina abaume, ninshi peeleni icuma ca cishilano kuli bamunyina abaume abakwa wishi." 
Numbers27:11 Nga wishi nao takwete bamunyina abaume, peeleni icuma ca cishilano kuli umo uwa mu lupwa, mu mukowa umo wine, nge cuma cakwe. Ili e funde lya bena Israeli ne cipope icakulakonkwa, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose.’”" 
Numbers27:12 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Kabiye pa mulu wa lupili lwa Abarimu, umone icalo ico mpeele abena Israeli." 
Numbers27:13 Panuma yakucimona, na iwe wine uli nokuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyobe pamo nga munonko Aroni." 
Numbers27:14 Pantu ilyo ulukuta lwansangukile pa menshi mu matololo ya Sini, imwe bonse babili mwakene ukubeela ifyo namukonkomeshe ngo wamushilo pa menso yabo.” (Aya yali menshi ya ku Meriba Kadeshi mu matololo ya ku Sini)." 
Numbers27:15 Mose aebele Yawe ati," 
Numbers27:16 “Kanshi Yawe, Lesa wa mipashi ya bantu bonse, asonte umuntu pa lukuta ulu," 
Numbers27:17 alebatangilila pakuya na pakubweluluka, umo uwakuti alebatungulula pakuya no kubabwesha, pakuti ulukuta lwa bantu bakwa Yawe lwiba nge mpaanga ishabula kacema.”" 
Numbers27:18 Elyo Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Buula Yoshua umwana mwaume uwakwa Nuni, umuntu uwabamo Umupashi, umutambalikilepo ukuboko kobe." 
Numbers27:19 Elyo uye mwiminika pantanshi yakwa Eleasa shimapepo no lukuta lonse, elyo umupeelele imilimo yobe pa menso yabo." 
Numbers27:20 Umupeele amaka yobe yamo pakuti ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli lulemubeela. 
Numbers27:21 Kabili akalaiminina ku cinso cakwa Eleasa shimapepo, uuli no kwipusha ifya bupingushi mukubomfya Urimu pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Mu kukonkomesha kwakwe, ena no lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli bali nokufuma, kabili mu kukonkomesha kwakwe bakabweluluka.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mose nao acita ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. Abuula Yoshua amwimika pantanshi yakwa Eleasa shimapepo no lukuta lonse. 
Numbers27:23 Elyo amutambalikilapo amaboko yakwe no kumupeela imilimo yakwe pamo ngefyo Yawe aebele Mose. 
Numbers28:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers28:2 “Peela icebo ici ku bena Israeli kabili ulande kuli bena auti, mulemona ukuti pa nshita yasontwa yonse mulentuula imituulo ya fyakulya fyakoca, iya cena cisuma icinsekesha." 
Numbers28:3 Ulande kuli bena utile, uyu e mutuulo wa cakoca muli nokutuula kuli Yawe, utwana twa mpaanga tubili utwa mwaka umo umo, utwabula akalema, nge lambo lyakoca cila bushiku." 
Numbers28:4 Mulepekanya akana ka mpaanga kamo ulucelo, kambi nako icungulo," 
Numbers28:5 pamo pene ne capekumi cimo ca ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo ne cipimo ca pakati ka citika wa hini umo ukufuma ku cikamino ca miolifa." 
Numbers28:6 Ili e lambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku, ilyatendekele pa lupili lwa Sinai, ngo mutuulo wacakoca uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Numbers28:7 Umutuulo wakulundapo uwa fyakunwa, cipimo ca pakati ka citika wa hini umo uwa fyakunwa ifyakantuka pali cila kana ka mpaanga. Muleitila umutuulo wa cakunwa kuli Yawe mu cifulo camushilo." 
Numbers28:8 Mulepekanya akana ka mpaanga akabiye mu nshita ya cungulo, no kucita umusango umo wine ngo lucelo, pamo no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. Uyu mutuulo we lambo lyakoca uwa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Numbers28:9 “Pa bushiku bwe Sabata, tuuleni utwana twa mpaanga tubili utuli no mwaka umo umo utwabula akalema, no bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino utwapekumi tubili twa ku cipimo ca efa ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta aya miolifa, no mutuulo wa fyakunwa." 
Numbers28:10 Ili e lambo lyakoca ilya pali cila Sabata, ukulunda pelambo lya cila bushiku, pamo no mutuulo wa fyakunwa." 
Numbers28:11 “Pa bushiku bonse ubwakutampa umweshi mukaletuula Yawe ilambo lyakoca ilya fiponti fya ŋombe ifilume fibili, sukusuku umo no twana twa mpaanga utulume cine lubali utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers28:12 Pali cila cilume wa ŋombe mukalentuulilapo utwapekumi tutatu twa ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa. Pali sukusuku ifipimo fibili pekumi ifya efa wa bunga ubwapeleka bwino, ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa." 
Numbers28:13 Pali cila kana ka mpaanga muli nokutuula icipimo pekumi ica efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa. Ifi fya malambo yakoca, umutuulo wa cena icisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Numbers28:14 Pali cila cilume wa ŋombe onse pafwile ukuba umutuulo wa fyakunwa, imisukupala ibili iya mwangashi. Pali sukusuku umusukupala umo uwa mwangashi. Pali cila kana ka mpaanga konse, citika wa musukupala umo uwa mwangashi. Uyu e mutuulo we lambo lyakoca cila mweshi, uuli nokucitwa cila mweshi upya mu mwaka onse." 
Numbers28:15 Elyo pelambo lyakoca ilya nshiku shonse pamo no mutuulo wa fyakunwa, mulelundapo sawe ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi kuli Yawe." 
Numbers28:16 “Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) mu mweshi wantanshi, pali nokulaba inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, Ipasaka lyakwa Yawe." 
Numbers28:17 Kabili pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi wine uyu, kuli nokulaba inshikunkulu. Pa nshiku cine lubali mulelyafye imikate iyishatutumuka." 
Numbers28:18 Pa bushiku bwakubalilapo mulekwata ukulongana kwamushilo, kabili tebwakwesha kubombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku." 
Numbers28:19 Muli nokutuula Yawe ilambo lyakoca ilya fiponti fya ŋombe ifilume fibili, sukusuku umo no twana twa mpaanga utulume cine lubali utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers28:20 Pali cila cilume wa ŋombe onse pekanyenipo utwapekumi tutatu utwa ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ifyasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa. Pali sukusuku pekanyenipo utwapekumi tubili utwa ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga. 
Numbers28:21 Kabili pali cila kana ka mpaanga pa twana twa mpaanga cine lubali, pekanyenipo icapekumi cimo ica efa wa bunga." 
Numbers28:22 Kabili mulundepo na sawe umo uwe lambo lya pa fyabubifi pakumufutilako. 
Numbers28:23 Mwakulapekanya ifi ukulunda pa mutuulo we lambo lyakoca uwa cila lucelo. 
Numbers28:24 Muli iyi nshila pa nshiku cine lubali mulepekanya icakulya ca mutuulo wakoca cila bushiku, umutuulo wa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe. Mulecita ifi pakulunda pa mutuulo wakoca no wa fyakunwa uwa lyonse." 
Numbers28:25 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali kuleba ukulongana kwamushilo, kabili tebwakwesha kubombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku." 
Numbers28:26 “Pa bushiku bwa fisabo fyantanshi ilyo muletuula kuli Yawe umutuulo wa cabunga ubupya pa nshikunkulu ya milungu, kuleba ukulongana kwamushilo, kabili tekwesha kubombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku." 
Numbers28:27 Muletuula ilambo lyakoca ilya fiponti fya ŋombe ifilume fibili, sukusuku umo no twana twa mpaanga utulume cine lubali utwa mwaka umo umo ngo mutuulo wa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe." 
Numbers28:28 Pali cila cilume wa ŋombe paleba umutuulo wa cabunga utwapekumi tutatu utwa ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa. Pali sukusuku paleba utwapekumi tubili twa ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga ubwapeleka bwino. 
Numbers28:29 Elyo pali cila kana ka mpanga pa twana twa mpaanga cine lubali, capekumi cimo ica efa wa bunga." 
Numbers28:30 Kabili mulundepo sawe umo uwakumufutilapo. 
Numbers28:31 Mulepekanya ifi fyonse pamo no mutuulo wa fyakunwa, mukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku, no mutuulo wa cabunga. Mushininkishe bwino ukuti inama shonse tashikwete akalema.”" 
Numbers29:1 Pa bushiku bwantanshi mu mweshi walenga cine lubali kuleba ukulongana kwamushilo, kabili tekwesha kubombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku. Bushiku bwenu ubwakulishamo amapenga." 
Numbers29:2 Ngo mutuulo wa cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe, pekanyeni ilambo lyakoca ilya ciponti ca ŋombe cimo icilume, sukusuku umo no twana twa mpaanga utulume cine lubali utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers29:3 Pa ŋombe ilume, pekanishishenipo utwapekumi tutatu twa ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa. Pali sukusuku paleba utwapekumi tubili twakuli efa wa bunga." 
Numbers29:4 Elyo pali cila kana ka mpanga pa twana twa mpaanga cine lubali, cipimo cimo pekumi ica efa wa bunga." 
Numbers29:5 Mulundepo na sawe umo uwakumufutilapo. 
Numbers29:6 Ifi fyonse fyakulundapofye pa malambo yakoca aya cila mweshi naya cila bushiku pamo no mutuulo wa cabunga no mutuulo wa fyakunwa ngefyo fyatantikwa. Ifi fyonse, mituulo yakoca iyakuletela Yawe iya cena cisuma icimusekesha." 
Numbers29:7 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo mu mweshi walenga cine lubali kuleba ukulongana kwamushilo. Mufwile ukuikaanya, mwilabombamo imilimo." 
Numbers29:8 Kabili muli nokutuula ilambo lyakoca ilya cena icisuma icisekesha Yawe, iciponti cimo, sukusuku umo no twana twa mpaanga utulume cine lubali utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers29:9 Pa ŋombe ilume, pekanishishenipo utwapekumi tutatu utwa ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa. Pali sukusuku paleba utwapekumi tubili twa kuli efa wa bunga." 
Numbers29:10 Elyo pali cila kana ka mpanga pa twana twa mpaanga cine lubali, cipimo cimo pekumi ica efa wa bunga." 
Numbers29:11 Mubikepo na sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi, ukulunda pa mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi, ilambo lyakoca ilyacila bushiku pamo pene no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa." 
Numbers29:12 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi walenga cine lubali, kukaleba ukulongana kwamushilo, kabili mwikabombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku. Mulesefya inshikunkulu pa nshiku cine lubali pakucindika Yawe." 
Numbers29:13 Muli nokutuula Yawe ilambo lyakoca ilya cena icisuma icakumusekesha. Ilambo lya fiponti fya ŋombe ifilume ikumi limo na fitatu (13), basukusuku babili no twana twa mpaanga utulume ikumi limo na tune (14) utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers29:14 Pali cila ŋombe ilume pa ŋombe ishilume ikumi limo na shitatu (13) mupekanishishepo utwapekumi tutatu twa ku cipimo ca efa wa bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino ubwasanshiwamo na mafuta ya miolifa. Pali basukusuku babili, mupekanishishepo cila umo utwapekumi tubili twa kuli efa wa bunga." 
Numbers29:15 Elyo pali cila kana ka mpaanga, pa twana twa mpaanga ikumi limo na tune (14), mupekanishishepo icipe cimo pekumi ica efa wa bunga." 
Numbers29:16 Mubikepo na sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi, ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilyacila bushiku pamo pene no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa." 
Numbers29:17 Pa bushiku bwalenga shibili, mupekanye ifiponti fya ŋombe ifilume ikumi limo na fibili (12), basukusuku babili no twana twa mpaanga utulume ikumi limo na tune (14) utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula ubulema." 
Numbers29:18 Pa ŋombe ishilume, basukusuku no twana twa mpaanga mupekanishishepo imituulo ya cabunga ne ya fyakunwa ukulingana ne mpendwa yapimwa." 
Numbers29:19 Mubikepo na sawe ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku pamo pene no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. 
Numbers29:20 Pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu, mupekanye iŋombe ishilume ikumi limo na imo (11), basukusuku babili no twana twa mpaanga utulume ikumi limo na tune (14) utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers29:21 Pa ŋombe ishilume, basukusuku no twana twa mpaanga mupekanishishepo imituulo ya cabunga ne ya fyakunwa ukulingana ne mpendwa yapimwa." 
Numbers29:22 Mubikepo na sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. 
Numbers29:23 Pa bushiku bwalenga shine, muli nokutuula iŋombe ishilume ikumi limo, basukusuku babili no twana twa mpaanga utulume ikumi limo na tune (14) utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers29:24 Pa ŋombe ishilume, basukusuku no twana twa mpaanga mupekanishishepo imituulo ya cabunga ne ya fyakunwa ukulingana ne mpendwa yapimwa." 
Numbers29:25 Mubikepo na sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. 
Numbers29:26 Pa bushiku bwalenga shisano, mupekanye iŋombe ishilume pabula, basukusuku babili no twana twa mpaanga utulume ikumi limo na tune (14) utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers29:27 Pa ŋombe ishilume, basukusuku no twana twa mpaanga mupekanishishepo umutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa ukulingana ne mpendwa yapimwa." 
Numbers29:28 Mubikepo na sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. 
Numbers29:29 Pa bushiku bwalenga mutanda mupekanye ŋombe ishilume cine konse konse, basukusuku babili no twana twa mpaanga utulume ikumi limo na tune (14) utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers29:30 Pa ŋombe ishilume, basukusuku no twana twa mpaanga mupekanishishepo umutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa ukulingana ne mpendwa yapimwa." 
Numbers29:31 Mubikepo na sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. 
Numbers29:32 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali, mupekanye iŋombe ishilume cine lubali, basukusuku babili no twana twa mpaanga utulume ikumi limo na tune (14) utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula akalema." 
Numbers29:33 Pa ŋombe ishilume, basukusuku no twana twa mpaanga mupekanishishepo umutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa ukulingana ne mpendwa yapimwa." 
Numbers29:34 Mubikepo na sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. 
Numbers29:35 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse kuleba ukulongana kwamushilo mulelongana mukupepa, kabili mwikabombamo imilimo ya cila bushiku." 
Numbers29:36 Muli nokutuula ilambo lyakoca lya cena cisuma icisekesha Yawe, ilya ŋombe ilume imo, sukusuku umo no twana twa mpaanga utulume cine lubali utwa mwaka umo umo, fyonse ifyabula ubulema." 
Numbers29:37 Pa ŋombe iyilume, sukusuku no twana twa mpaanga mupekanishishepo umutuulo wa cabunga ne fyakunwa ukulingana ne mpendwa yapimwa." 
Numbers29:38 Mubikepo na sawe umo ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi ukulunda pelambo lyakoca ilya cila bushiku no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. 
Numbers29:39 Mukulunda pa filayo mwalaya ne mituulo yakuitemenwafye, mulepekanishisha Yawe fyonse ifi pa nshikunkulu shasontwa, ilyo muletuula amalambo yakoca, imituulo ya cabunga ne ya fyakunwa ne yakwampana." 
Numbers29:40 Kanshi Mose aebele abena Israeli ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. 
Numbers30:1 Mose aebele intungulushi sha nko sha bena Israeli ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe akonkomeshe." 
Numbers30:2 Ilyo umuntu alaya icilayo kuli Yawe nangu alapa ukucita cimo, tali nakufutuka ishiwi lyakwe, lelo conse ico alaile na kanwa kakwe, alingilefye ukucita." 
Numbers30:3 “Umukashana nga alaya kuli Yawe, nangu alapa ukucita icintu cimo, ilyo acili aleikala mu ŋanda yakwa wishi," 
Numbers30:4 na wishi aumfwa ico alaile nangu ico alapile ukucita, nomba wishi tamwebele nangu cimo, ninshi fyonse ifilayo nangu umulapo ube wa musango shani, ali nokufikilisha." 
Numbers30:5 Lelo wishi ilyo aumfwa nga amukaanya, ninshi ifilayo fyonse alaile ne fintu fyonse alapile ukucita, tali nakuficita iyoo. Yawe akamubelela uluse ico wishi eumukenye." 
Numbers30:6 Nga cakuti aupwa panuma ya kulaya icilayo nangu alapa ukwabula ukuti atale atontonkanye bwino," 
Numbers30:7 kabili elyo umulume wakwe aumfwako, lelo tasosele nangu cimo, ninshi ifilayo fyonse alaile nangu ifyo alapile ukucita, ali nokufikilisha." 
Numbers30:8 Nomba umulume ilyo aumfwa amulesha no kumulesha, ninshi akaanya icilayo ico alaile nangu umulapo alapile ukwabula ukutontonkanya bwino, na Yawe akamubelela uluse." 
Numbers30:9 “Mukamfwilwa, nangu umwanakashi uo wiba aleka, nga alaya icilayo nangu alapa, ena alingilefye ukusunga umulapo alapa." 
Numbers30:10 “Nga cakuti umwanakashi uwaupwa, alaya icilayo nangu alapa ukucita icintu cimo," 
Numbers30:11 kabili umulume aumfwako lelo tasosele nangu cimo kabili tamuleseshe, ninshi ifilayo fyonse alaile nangu ifyo alapile ukucita, ali nokufikilisha." 
Numbers30:12 Nomba umulume nga ewamukaanya lintu aumfwa umulapo nangu ifilayo fyakwe, ninshi tapali icikakonkwa. Pantu umulume wakwe ewamukaanya, kabili Yawe ali nokumubelelako uluse." 
Numbers30:13 Umulume wakwe nakwata amaka yakusuminisha nangu ayakukaanya umulapo atemwa icilayo cakuikaanya. 
Numbers30:14 Lelo ngo mulume wakwe nga aumfwa umulapo, nga talandile nangu cimo ku mukashi wakwe ukufuma pa bushiku aumfwa, ninshi umulume wakwe nasuminisha icilayo atemwa umulapo, pantu talandilepo nangu kamo pa bushiku aumfwile." 
Numbers30:15 Nomba nga cakuti umulume aisa kaana ilyo ubushiku aumfwililepo umulapo bwalipita, ninshi umulume eukaba no mulandu wa mukashi wakwe.”" 
Numbers30:16 Aya e mafunde Yawe apeele kuli Mose, pa mulandu wa mulume no mukashi kabili na pa mulandu wakwa wishi no mwana umukashana uwikala mu ŋanda yakwa wishi." 
Numbers31:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers31:2 “Citila abena Israeli icilandushi pa bena Midiani. Panuma ya ifi elyo uli nokuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyobe.” 
Numbers31:3 Elyo Mose aebele abantu ati, “Peeleni ifita fimo ifyanso tuleya ku nkondo kukulwisha abena Midiani, tuye cita icilandushi cakwa Yawe pali bena." 
Numbers31:4 Cila luko lwa bena Israeli musalemo abakuya ku nkondo ikana limo limo (1,000).”" 
Numbers31:5 Kanshi abena Israeli epakusala abantu abakuya ku nkondo, ikana limo limo ukufuma kuli cila luko, bonse pamo bali amakana ikumi limo na yabili (12,000)." 
Numbers31:6 Elyo Mose abatuma ku nkondo, ikana limo limo ukufuma kuli cila luko pamo na Fineasi umwana mwaume wakwa Eleasa shimapepo, aya nasenda ne fipe fya cifulo camushilo na mapenga ayakulisha pakubeshibisha." 
Numbers31:7 Baimina abena Midiani ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose, baipaya na baume bonsefye." 
Numbers31:8 Kabili baipaila kumo ne mfumu shisano isha bena Midiani, Efi, Rekemu, Suri, Huri na Reba. Kabili baipaya Balamu umwana mwaume wakwa Beori ku lupanga." 
Numbers31:9 Abena Israeli basenda na banakashi abena Midiani muli bunkole na bana babo. Basenda ifyakutapa fyonse, iŋombe, imikuni ya mpaanga ne mbushi, ne fyuma." 
Numbers31:10 Baoca imisumba yonse iya bena Midiani kumo kwine ne nkambi baleikalamo shonse. 
Numbers31:11 Elyo basenda ifitapwa fyonse nefyo baonawile, pamo pene na bantu ne nama." 
Numbers31:12 Elyo batwala bankole, ifyo baikete nefyo batapile, kuli Mose na Eleasa shimapepo no lukuta lwa bena Israeli pa nkambi yabo, mu mawanga ya Moabu mupepi na Yordani ukulungatana na Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Mose, Eleasa shimapepo ne ntungulushi sha lukuta shonse bafumine kunse ya nkambi kukukumanya ifita." 
Numbers31:14 Mose afulilwa bakangalila ba fita, abakalamba ba fita amakana na bakalamba ba fita imyanda ababwelele ku nkondo." 
Numbers31:15 Abepusha ati, “Bushe namuleka bonse abanakashi ukuba abomi?" 
Numbers31:16 Banakashi bene ebakonkelele ifyo Balamu asosele, kabili ebalengele nokuti abena Israeli basangukile Yawe ku fyacitike ku Peori, pakuti kube ne cikuko pa lukuta lwa bantu bakwa Yawe." 
Numbers31:17 Kanshi nomba ipayeni bonse abana abaume. Kabili mwipaye umwanakashi onse uwasendemapo no mwaume," 
Numbers31:18 lelo muishilepofye abakashana abashatala abasendamapo na baume. 
Numbers31:19 Bonse imwe mwe baipeyepo umuntu, nangu ukukumyakofye ku citumbi ca muntu uo bepeye, mwikalefye kunse ya nkambi pa nshiku cine lubali. Pa bushiku bwacitatu no bwa cine lubali muli nokuisangulula mwe bene pamo na bankole benu." 
Numbers31:20 Muli nokusangulula ifyakufwala fyonse, ne fyapangwa ku mpapa fine fyonse, amasako ya mbushi nangu ifyapangwa ku cimuti.”" 
Numbers31:21 Elyo Eleasa shimapepo aeba ifita ifyaile ku nkondo ati, “Ifi efifwaikwa mu mafunde ayo Yawe apeele Mose."
