Numbers31:22 Golide, silifa, umukuba, icela, icikopo, mutofwe," 
Numbers31:23 na conse icishingapya mu mulilo, muli nokufipisha mu mulilo, elyo fili nokusangululwa kukukowela. Lelo nafyo fine fili nokuposwa mu menshi yakusangulula. Elyo ifintu fyonse ifingapya mu mulilo muli nokufipisha mu menshi yalya yene." 
Numbers31:24 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali, mukacape ifyakufwala fyenu, lyena mukasangululwa. Elyo nomba mukabwelela mu nkambi.”" 
Numbers31:25 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers31:26 “Iwe na Eleasa shimapepo ne ntungulushi sha ndupwa sha lukuta, muli nokupenda abantu bonse ne nama ishatapilwe." 
Numbers31:27 Akanyeni ifitapwa ku fita fyaile ku nkondo, elyo ifyashala mupeele ulukuta." 
Numbers31:28 Ukufuma ku fita fyalwile inkondo, mupatwileko Yawe umutuulo icintu cimo pa fintu imyanda isano, cibe ni pa bantu, iŋombe, bapunda, impaanga nangu imbushi." 
Numbers31:29 Mubuuleko ku cakaniko ca fita no kupeela Eleasa shimapepo, ukuba ciputulwa cakwa Yawe." 
Numbers31:30 Ukufuma ku cakaniko ca lukuta lwa bena Israeli, salenipo cimo pa fintu amakumi yasano, cibe ni pa bantu, iŋombe, bapunda, impaanga, imbushi nangu inama shimbi. Mupeele abena Levi, ababombela mwi Tenti lyakwa Yawe.”" 
Numbers31:31 Kanshi Mose na Eleasa shimapepo epakucitila umo Yawe akonkomeseshe Mose. 
Numbers31:32 Ifyashele ukufuma ku fitapwa ifyo ifita fyaile ku nkondo fyasendele, fyali impaanga amakana imyanda mutanda, na makana amakumi cine lubali na yasano (675,000)," 
Numbers31:33 iŋombe shali amakana amakumi cine lubali na yabili (72,000)," 
Numbers31:34 bapunda bali amakana amakumi mutanda ne kana limo (61,000)," 
Numbers31:35 elyo abanakashi abashatalile abasendamapo no mwaume nabo bali amakana amakumi yatatu na yabili (32,000)." 
Numbers31:36 Citika wa ciputulwa catapilwe ico bapeele ifita fyaile ku nkondo, cali impaanga amakana imyanda itatu na makana amakumi yatatu na cine lubali ne myanda isano (337,500)." 
Numbers31:37 Ishakutuula Yawe shali impaanga imyanda mutanda na makumi cine lubali na shisano (675). 
Numbers31:38 Ifita bafipeele iŋombe amakana amakumi yatatu na makanapo mutanda (36,000). Ishakutuula Yawe babuulilepo iŋombe amakumi cine lubali na shibili (72)." 
Numbers31:39 Ifita bafipeele bapunda amakana amakumi yatatu ne myanda isano (30,500). Abakutuula Yawe babuulilepo bapunda amakumi mutanda na umo (61)." 
Numbers31:40 Ifita bafipeele abantu amakana ikumi na mutanda (16,000). Abakutuula Yawe babuulilepo abantu amakumi yatatu na babili (32)." 
Numbers31:41 Mose epakupeela Eleasa shimapepo umutuulo wakwa Yawe ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. 
Numbers31:42 Citika wa bena Israeli, uo Mose abapatwililepo ukufuma pa fita fyaile ku nkondo," 
Numbers31:43 citika wa fyapeelwe ku lukuta ali impaanga amakana imyanda itatu na makumi yatatu na cine lubali ne myanda isano (337,500)," 
Numbers31:44 iŋombe shali amakana amakumi yatatu na makana mutanda (36,000)," 
Numbers31:45 bapunda bali amakana amakumi yatatu ne myanda isano (30,500)," 
Numbers31:46 elyo abantu bali amakana ikumi na mutanda (16,000)." 
Numbers31:47 Ukufuma pali citika wa fyapeelwe ku lukuta lwa bena Israeli, Mose abuulapo umuntu umo pali cila makumi yasano aya bantu na pa nama napo imo, ngefyo Yawe amukonkomeshe, elyo apeela ku bena Levi, abalebombela mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa." 
Numbers31:48 Elyo abakalamba abali pakati ka fita fya nkondo, abakalamba ba fita amakana na bakalamba ba fita imyanda, baile kuli Mose," 
Numbers31:49 balamweba abati, “Fwe babomfi bobe natupenda ifita twaletungulula tapali nangu umo uulubile." 
Numbers31:50 Kanshi natuleta kuli Yawe umutuulo wa tuntu twa golide uto cila umo anonkele, amakosa, insambo, imbalaminwe na masikiyo, mukuifutilako pa fya bubifi bwesu pa cinso cakwa Yawe.”" 
Numbers31:51 Mose na Eleasa shimapepo bapoka kuli bena golide na conse icabashilwe. 
Numbers31:52 Golide onse ukufuma ku bakalamba ba fita amakana na bakalamba ba fita imyanda uo Mose na Eleasa shimapepo batuulile kuli Yawe, afinine amashekeli amakana ikumi limo na mutanda ne myanda cine lubali na makumi yasano (16,750)." 
Numbers31:53 Cila cita caliibuulilepo icitapwa caciko. 
Numbers31:54 Kanshi Mose na Eleasa shimapepo bapoka golide ku bakalamba ba fita amakana na bakalamba ba fita imyanda batwala mwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, kukuba icibukisho ca bena Israeli pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Numbers32:1 Abena Rubeni na bena Gadi, abakwete iŋombe ne mpaanga ishingi, bamwene ifyalo fya ku Yaseri na Gileadi ukuti fisuma nganshi ukutekelamo ifitekwa." 
Numbers32:2 Elyo baya kuli Mose na Eleasa shimapepo ne ntungulushi sha lukuta, babeba abati," 
Numbers32:3 “Ataroti, Diboni, Yaseri, Nimura, Heshiboni, Eleale, Sebamu, Nebo na Beoni," 
Numbers32:4 icalo ico Yawe apokolwele pa cinso ca lukuta lwa bena Israeli nacilinga ukutekelamo ifitekwa, na babomfi benu nabakwata ifitekwa.”" 
Numbers32:5 Batile, “Nga cakuti mwatulangulukilako, lekeni cino calo cipeelwe ku babomfi benu pakuti cibe icuma cesu. Mwituleka twabuke Yordani.”" 
Numbers32:6 Mose atile ku bena Gadi na bena Rubeni, “Bushe mulefwaya ukushala no kwikala kuno ilyo abanenu baleya ku nkondo?" 
Numbers32:7 Bushe cinshi ico muletompwela imitima ya bena Israeli pakuti beya mu calo Yawe abapeela? 
Numbers32:8 Ifi fine efyo na bashinwe bacitile, ilyo nabatumine ukufuma ku Kadeshi Banea kukuya lengula icalo." 
Numbers32:9 Panuma yakuya fika kwishika lya Eshikoli no kumona icalo, babwelele no kutompola imitima ya bena Israeli mukukanaingila mu calo Yawe abapeele." 
Numbers32:10 Yawe alifulilwe nganshi, ubo bushiku alapa noyu mulapo ati," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Pantu aba bantu tabankonkele ne mitima yabo yonse, tapali nangu umo umwaume uuli ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo, uwafumine mu Egupto, uukamona icalo nalaile mukulapa ukupeela Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo." 
Numbers32:12 Tapali nangu umo kanofye Kalebu mwana Yefune umwina Kenasi na Yoshua mwana Nuni, pantu bena balikonkele Yawe ne mitima yabo yonse.’" 
Numbers32:13 Yawe afulilwe abena Israeli, abalenga no kululumba mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane, mpakafye inkulo ya balya bonse abacitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwe yasuka yapwa." 
Numbers32:14 Kabili moneni, mwe luko lubifi, mwaibika pa fifulo fya bashinwe, no kulenga Yawe alundepo ukufulilwa Israeli." 
Numbers32:15 Nga cakuti mwataluka ukumfwila Yawe, nakabili line akabalekako aba bantu bonse mu matolo, kabili nimwe mukalenga ukuti bonaike.”" 
Numbers32:16 Elyo bapalamine kuli ena abati, “Tulefwaya tukuule amacinka ya fitekwa fyesu, ne misumba ya banakashi besu na bana." 
Numbers32:17 Lelo tuli abaipekanya mukuipangasha fwe bene no kuba pantanshi ya bena Israeli, mpakafye tukabafishe mu cifulo cabo. Lelo pali ino nshita abanakashi besu na bana nababale bekale mu misumba ya malinga, pakubacingililako ku bekashi ba calo." 
Numbers32:18 Tatwakabwelele ku mayanda yesu, mpakafye umwina Israeli onse akapokelele ica cishilano cakwe." 
Numbers32:19 Ifwe tatwakapokeko icacishilano pamo nabo mwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani, pantu ifwe ica cishilano cesu caba kuno bushilya ku kabanga ka Yordani.”" 
Numbers32:20 Elyo Mose atile kuli bena, “Kuti mwabwelelamofye nga cakuti mwacita ici. Mwaipangasha mwe bene pa cinso cakwa Yawe ukuya ku bulwi," 
Numbers32:21 kabili nga abaipangasha bonse mwaya abuka Yordani pa cinso cakwa Yawe, mpaka akafulumunemo abalwani bakwe" 
Numbers32:22 no kucimfya cilya calo pa cinso cakwe, lyena kuti mwabwelelamo no kuba abakaele kuli Yawe na ku bena Israeli. Kabili ici calo cikaba cuma cenu pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Numbers32:23 Lelo nga mwafilwa ukucita ico mwalaya, ninshi mwabifya kuli Yawe. Elyo muli nokushininkisha ukuti ububifi bwenu buli nokuba pali imwe." 
Numbers32:24 Kuuleni imisumba ya banakashi benu na bana, na macinka ya fitekwa, lelo mucite ico mulaile!”" 
Numbers32:25 Abena Gadi na bena Rubeni batile kuli Mose, “Ifwe fwe babomfi bobe tuli nokucita ifyo wakonkomesha we mfumu yesu." 
Numbers32:26 Abana besu na bakashi, imikuni yesu ya mpaanga ne imbushi ne ŋombe, fikashala mu misumba ya Gileadi." 
Numbers32:27 Lelo ababomfi benu, umwaume onsefye uipangeshe ku bulwi, ali no kwabuka mukulwisha pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pamo ngefyo wasosa we mfumu yesu.”" 
Numbers32:28 Elyo Mose apeele ifipope pali bena kuli Eleasa shimapepo na Yoshua mwana Nuni ne ntungulushi sha ndupwa sha nko sha bena Israeli. 
Numbers32:29 Atile kuli bena, “Nga cakuti abena Gadi na bena Rubeni, umwaume onsefye uuipangeshe ku bulwi, ayabuka Yordani na imwe pa cinso cakwa Yawe, lyena ilyo mwapoka icalo, nemwe muli nokubapeela icalo ca Gileadi nge cuma cabo." 
Numbers32:30 Lelo nga tababwike mumana nabaipangasha na imwe pamo, bafwilefye ukukwatako icitungu mu calo ca Kenani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Abena Gadi na bena Rubeni bayaswike abati, “Ababomfi benu bali nokucita ifyo Yawe alandile." 
Numbers32:32 Tuli nokwabuka umumana ukuya mu calo ca Kenani pa cinso cakwa Yawe natuipangasha, lelo icuma ca cishilano cesu cikaba nici kuno kwishilya lya Yordani.”" 
Numbers32:33 Elyo Mose apeele ku bena Gadi, abena Rubeni na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase mwana Yosefu icalo cakwa Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli, ne calo cakwa Ogi imfumu ya bena Bashani. Icalo conse kumo kwine ne misumba yabamo, ne citungu ca mpanga yonse iyabashingulwike." 
Numbers32:34 Abena Gadi bakuulile Diboni, Ataroti, Aroeli," 
Numbers32:35 Atiroti Shofani, Yaseri, Yogebea," 
Numbers32:36 Beti Nimura na Beti Harani, nge misumba yakuulililwako amalinga no kukuula amacinka ya fitekwa fyabo." 
Numbers32:37 Abena Rubeni nakabili bakuula Heshiboni, Eleale na Kiriataimu," 
Numbers32:38 pamo pene na Nebo, Baali Meoni (aya mashina baliyalwile) na Sibuma. Imisumba imbi bakuulile baliinike amashina." 
Numbers32:39 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa Makiri mwana Manase baile ku Gileadi, bapoka icalo no kufulumunamo abena Amoli abaleikalamo." 
Numbers32:40 Elyo Mose apeela Gileadi ku bena Makiri, aba mu lupwa lwakwa Manase, kabili eko balaikala." 
Numbers32:41 Yairi uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Manase apokolola imishi yabo no kulaita ati Hafoti Yairi," 
Numbers32:42 Kabili Noba nao apokolola Kenati ne mishi yali mumbali, no kulaita ati Noba, pamo nga fintu balemwita." 
Numbers33:1 Ifi efyo ukukonkana kwa lwendo lwa bena Israeli kwali ilyo bafumine mu Egupto impuka ne mpuka mukutungululwa na Mose elyo na Aroni. 
Numbers33:2 Mukukonkomeshiwa na Yawe, Mose alelemba ififulo baletuushamo mu lwendo lwabo. Kanshi ulwendo lwabo ukukonkana nomo baletuusha lwali ngefi." 
Numbers33:3 Abena Israeli bafumine mu Ramesesi pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi wantanshi, pa bushiku bwakonka pe Pasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila. Bafumine ne cilumba ilyo abena Egupto balemonako," 
Numbers33:4 ninshi bena baleshiika amabeli yabo yonse ayo Yawe aipeye pakati kabo. Pantu Yawe ninshi naleta ubupingushi pa milungu yabo. 
Numbers33:5 Abena Israeli bafuma mu musumba wa Ramesesi no kuya cita inkambi ku Sukoti. 
Numbers33:6 Ilyo bafuma pa Sukoti, bacita inkambi ku Etamu, pa mpela ya matololo." 
Numbers33:7 Ilyo bafuma ku Etamu, bayalulukila ku Pi Hairoti ku kabanga ka Baali Sefoni, no kucita inkambi mupepi na Migidoli." 
Numbers33:8 Bafuma ku Pi Hairoti bapita muli Bemba Wakashika baya mu matololo. Kabili ilyo baendele inshiku shitatu mu matololo ya Etamu, bacita inkambi pa Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Ilyo bafuma ku Mara no kuya ku Elimu, uko ukwali utumfukumfuku ikumi limo na tubili (12) ne miti ya tuncindu amakumi cine lubali (70), kabili eko bacita inkambi." 
Numbers33:10 Ilyo bafuma ku Elimu, bacita inkambi mupepi na Bemba Wakashika." 
Numbers33:11 Ilyo bafuma kuli Bemba Wakashika, baya cita inkambi mu matololo ya Shini." 
Numbers33:12 Ilyo bafuma ku matololo ya Shini, bacita inkambi ku Dofuka." 
Numbers33:13 Ilyo bafuma ku Dofuka, bacita inkambi ku Alushi." 
Numbers33:14 Ilyo bafuma ku Alushi, bacita inkambi ku Refidimu, ukushali menshi yakunwa abantu." 
Numbers33:15 Ilyo bafuma ku Refidimu, bacita inkambi mu matololo ya Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Ilyo bafuma ku matololo ya Sinai, baya cita inkambi ku Kibroti Hatafa." 
Numbers33:17 Ilyo bafuma ku Kibroti Hatafa, baya cita inkambi ku Haseloti." 
Numbers33:18 Ilyo bafuma ku Haseloti, baya cita inkambi ku Ritima." 
Numbers33:19 Ilyo bafuma ku Ritima, baya cita inkambi ku Rimoni Peresi." 
Numbers33:20 Ilyo bafuma ku Rimoni Peresi, baya cita inkambi ku Libina." 
Numbers33:21 Ilyo bafuma ku Libina, baya cita inkambi ku Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Ilyo bafuma ku Risa, baya cita inkambi ku Keelata." 
Numbers33:23 Ilyo bafuma ku Keelata, bacita inkambi ku lupili lwa Shefa." 
Numbers33:24 Ilyo bafuma ku lupili lwa Shefa, baya cita inkambi ku Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Ilyo bafuma ku Harada, baya cita inkambi ku Makeloti." 
Numbers33:26 Ilyo bafuma ku Makeloti, baya cita inkambi ku Tahati." 
Numbers33:27 Ilyo bafuma ku Tahati, baya cita inkambi ku Tera." 
Numbers33:28 Ilyo bafuma ku Tera, baya cita inkambi ku Mitika." 
Numbers33:29 Ilyo bafuma ku Mitika, baya cita inkambi ku Hashimona." 
Numbers33:30 Ilyo bafuma ku Hashimona, baya cita inkambi ku Moseroti." 
Numbers33:31 Ilyo bafuma ku Moseroti, baya cita inkambi ku bena Yaakani." 
Numbers33:32 Ilyo bafuma ku bena Yaakani, bacita inkambi ku Hagidigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Ilyo bafuma ku Hagidigadi, bacita inkambi ku Yotibata." 
Numbers33:34 Ilyo bafuma ku Yotibata, bacita inkambi ku Aburona." 
Numbers33:35 Ilyo bafuma ku Aburona, bacita inkambi ku Esioni Geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Ilyo bafuma ku Esioni Geberi, bacita inkambi ku Kadeshi, mu matololo ya Sini." 
Numbers33:37 Ilyo bafuma ku Kadeshi, bacita inkambi ku lupili lwa Holi mu mupaka wa calo ca Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Yawe akonkomeshe Aroni shimapepo ukuya pa mulu wa lupili lwa Holi, epo aile fwila pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi walenga isano, mu mwaka walenga amakumi yane apo abena Israeli bafumine ku Egupto." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni ali ne myaka umwanda umo na makumi yabili na itatu (123), ilyo afwile pa lupili lwa Holi." 
Numbers33:40 Imfumu ya ku Aradi, iya bena Kenani iyaleikala ku matololo ya Negebu, yaumfwa ukuti abena Israeli baleisa." 
Numbers33:41 Ilyo bafuma ku lupili lwa Holi, bacita inkambi ku Salimona." 
Numbers33:42 Ilyo bafuma ku Salimona, bacita inkambi ku Punoni." 
Numbers33:43 Ilyo bafuma ku Punoni, bacita inkambi ku Oboti." 
Numbers33:44 Ilyo bafuma ku Oboti, bacita inkambi ku Iye Habarimu mu mupaka wa Moabu." 
Numbers33:45 Ilyo bafuma ku Iye Habarimu, bacita inkambi ku Diboni Gadi." 
Numbers33:46 Ilyo bafuma ku Diboni Gadi, bacita inkambi ku Alimoni Dibilataimu." 
Numbers33:47 Ilyo bafuma ku Alimoi Dibilataimu, bacita inkambi mu mpili sha Habarimu mupepi na Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Ilyo bafuma ku mpili sha Habarimu, bacita inkambi mu mawanga ya Moabu mupepi no mumana wa Yordani, ukulungatana no musumba wa Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Kulya kwine mu mawanga ya Moabu bacita inkambi mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Yordani ukufuma ku Beti Yeshimoti ukufika na ku Abeli Shitimu. 
Numbers33:50 Mu mawanga ya Moabu mu lulamba lwa Yordani, ukulungatana no musumba wa Yeriko, Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers33:51 “Landa ku bena Israeli utile kuli bena, ‘Nga mwayabuka umumana wa Yordani, mwaya mu Kenani," 
Numbers33:52 mufwile ukufulumunamo bonse abekalamo ku cinso cenu. Kabili monaule utulubi utwabaswa no twabumbwa, elyo mubongolole ne ncende shonse shakupepelamo isho bacindika." 
Numbers33:53 Pokeni icalo, muleikalamo pantu nimupeela icalo ukuba cenu." 
Numbers33:54 Pakwakana icalo mukalependula ukulingana ne nko shenu. Uluko ulukalamba mukalupeele impanga iyikalamba, no luko ulunono mukalupeele impanga inono. Conse icasuminishiwa pakupendula cikaba e cipande ca mpanga yabo. Yakaneni ukulingana ne nko sha fikolwe fyenu." 
Numbers33:55 Lelo nga mwafilwa ukufulumunamo bonse abekalamo mu calo, abo mukashamo bakaba fyakumusonkola mu menso yenu, kabili nge myunga mu mbafu shenu. Bakalamucusha mu calo umo mukekala." 
Numbers33:56 Elyo nomba na ine nkamucitila ifyo napanga ukubacitila.’” 
Numbers34:1 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers34:2 “Konkomesha abena Israeli utile kuli bena, ilyo mukengila mu Kenani, icalo mwalapeelwa nge ca cishilano, imipaka ikaba nifi." 
Numbers34:3 Ukufuma ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, umupaka ukalundako na matololo ya Sini, ukukonkafye umwapakanina icalo ca Edomu. Ku kabanga, umupaka wa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ukutendekela ukufuma ku mpela ya Bemba Wamucele," 
Numbers34:4 ukwabukila ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ka mupokapoka wa Sikopioni, ukuya ku Sini no kuya fika ku kapinda ka kulyo ka Kadeshi Banea. Elyo ukalola ku Hasa Ada, no kuya fika ku Asimoni," 
Numbers34:5 uko ukabweluluka, mukukuminkanya akamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto no kupelela kuli Bemba." 
Numbers34:6 “Mupaka wenu uwa ku masamba uli nokuba lulamba lwa Bemba Mukalamba. Uyu e mupaka wenu ku masamba. 
Numbers34:7 “Ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwenu umupaka ukakonka ukufuma kuli Bemba Mukalamba, ukufika ku lupili lwa Hori," 
Numbers34:8 kabili ukufuma ku lupili lwa Hori mpaka ku Lebo Hamati. Elyo umupaka uli nokutwalilila ukufika na ku Sedadi," 
Numbers34:9 na ku Sifuroni, no kuya pwila ku Hasa Enani. Uyu e mupaka wenu ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Numbers34:10 “Ku kabanga umupaka ukakonka ukufuma ku Hasa Enani, ukufika ku Shefamu." 
Numbers34:11 Umupaka uli nokutentemuka ukufuma ku Shefamu mpaka ku Ribula, ku kabanga ka Aini no kutwalilila no mutentemuko ku kabanga ka bemba wa Kinereti." 
Numbers34:12 Elyo umupaka uli nokutentemukila ku mumana wa Yordani no kupelela kuli Bemba Wamucele. Iyi eili nokuba impanga yenu, ne mipaka ya calo konse konse.”" 
Numbers34:13 Mose akonkomeshe abena Israeli ati, “Penduleni pakwakana ici calo nge ca cishilano. Yawe nalanda ukucipeela ku nko pabula na citika," 
Numbers34:14 pantu indupwa sha luko lwakwa Rubeni no luko lwakwa Gadi no luko citika ulwakwa Manase, nabapoka ica cishilano cabo." 
Numbers34:15 Ishi nko shibili na citika nashipoka ica cishilano cabo lwa ku kabanga ukutulila akasuba ku Yordani na Yeriko.” 
Numbers34:16 Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers34:17 “Aya e mashina ya baume bali nokwakanya icalo nge ca cishilano, Eleasa shimapepo na Yoshua umwana mwaume wakwa Nuni." 
Numbers34:18 Elyo sontapo intungulushi imo muli cila luko iyakwafwilisha ukwakanya icalo. 
Numbers34:19 Aya e mashina yabo, Kalebu umwana mwaume wakwa Yefune, uwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda." 
Numbers34:20 Shemueli umwana mwaume wakwa Amiudi, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Simeoni." 
Numbers34:21 Elidadi umwana mwaume wakwa Kisiloni, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Benjamini." 
Numbers34:22 Buki umwana mwaume wakwa Yogili, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Dani." 
Numbers34:23 Hanieli Amieli umwana mwaume wakwa Efodi, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Manase umwana mwaume wakwa Yosefu." 
Numbers34:24 Kemueli umwana mwaume wakwa Shipitani, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Efulemu umwana mwaume wakwa Yosefu." 
Numbers34:25 Elisafani umwana mwaume wakwa Panaki, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Sebuloni." 
Numbers34:26 Palitieli umwana mwaume wakwa Asani, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Isaka." 
Numbers34:27 Ahiudi umwana mwaume wakwa Shelomi, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Asheri." 
Numbers34:28 Pedaheli umwana mwaume wakwa Amiudi, intungulushi ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Naftali.”" 
Numbers34:29 Aba e baume Yawe akonkomeshe ukwakanya icalo ca cishilano ku bena Israeli mu calo ca Kenani. 
Numbers35:1 Mu mawanga ya Moabu, mupepi no mumana wa Yordani ukulungatana na Yeriko, Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers35:2 “Konkomesha abena Israeli ukupeelako abena Levi imisumba iyakwikalamo mu ca cishilano bali nokupeelwa. Kabili muli nokubapeela ne fitungu fyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo ukushinguluka imisumba. 
Numbers35:3 Elyo bakakwata imisumba iyakwikalamo, pamo ne fitungu bakalacemenamo iŋombe, impaanga ne fitekwa fyabo fimbi." 
Numbers35:4 Ifitungu fyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo, ifyashinguluka imisumba iyo mulepeela abena Levi, fili nokutendekelafye kunse ye linga, monse monsefye fili nokulepa bamita imyanda ine na makumi yasano (450)." 
Numbers35:5 Kunse ya musumba, mukapime bamita imyanda pabula (900) lubali ku kabanga, bamita imyanda pabula (900) lubali ku kulyo, bamita imyanda pabula (900) lubali ku masamba, bamita imyanda pabula (900) lubali ku kuso, ukubika umusumba pakati. Bakakwata ici citungu ngo mwakucemena ifitekwa fya muli iyi misumba." 
Numbers35:6 “Imisumba mutanda muli nokupeela abena Levi ikaba misumba yakufisamamo nga cakuti umuntu aipaya umuntu mubiye. Kabili mukalundepo ne misumba imbi amakumi yane na ibili (42). 
Numbers35:7 Yonse pamo iyo muli nokupeela abena Levi ili nokuba amakumi yane na cine konse konse (48), kumo kwine ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa." 
Numbers35:8 Imisumba iyo muli nokupeela abena Levi, ukufuma ku mpanga ya calo ca bena Israeli, ili nokulinganafye no bukulu bwa citungu ico cila luko lukwete. Pokeniko imisumba iyingi ku nko ishikwete ikulu, lelo abakwete inono, muli nokufumyako inono.”" 
Numbers35:9 Kabili Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Numbers35:10 “Landa ku bena Israeli utile kuli bena. Ilyo mukabuka umumana wa Yordani no kuya mu calo ca Kenani," 
Numbers35:11 mukasale imisumba imo, imisumba umwakufisama umuntu nga aipaya umuntu mubiye ukushili ku mufulo, eko afulumukila." 
Numbers35:12 Shikaba ni ncende shakufisamamo ukufuma ku wacilandushi, pakuti umuntu uuli no mulandu wakwipaya umuntu mubiye bemwipaya kano batala bamulubulwisha pa cinso ca lukuta." 
Numbers35:13 Iyi misumba mutanda iyikapeelwa, ikaba misumba yenu iyakufisamamo," 
Numbers35:14 Mukapeele imisumba itatu kwishilya lya Yordani, elyo imbi itatu ikabe mu calo ca Kenani nge misumba yakufisamamo." 
Numbers35:15 Iyi misumba mutanda ikaba ni ncende shakufisamamo abena Israeli, abenafyalo na bantu bambi mwikala nabo pakuti umuntu, uwaipaya umubiye ukushili ku mufulo, kuti abutukila kulya kwine." 
Numbers35:16 “Nomba, nga cakuti umuntu akoma umubiye ne cela pakuti afwe, ni ntalamisoka. Ntalamisoka afwile ukupingwilwa ukwipaiwa." 
Numbers35:17 Nangu nga cakuti umuntu ali ne libwe mu minwe yakwe ilingepaya umuntu, ilyo atoba umuntu afwa, ninshi ni ntalamisoka. Ntalamisoka afwile ukwipaiwa." 
Numbers35:18 Nangu nga cakuti umuntu ali ne cimuti mu minwe yakwe icingepaya umuntu, ilyo abola umuntu afwa, ninshi ni ntalamisoka. Ntalamisoka afwile ukwipaiwa." 
Numbers35:19 Kalandula wa mulopa euli nokwipaya ntalamisoka. Nga amukumanya ali nokumwipaya. 
Numbers35:20 “Nga cakuti umuntu umo alipata umubiye, elyo amusunka nangu amusukushila icintu cimo ku mufulo pakuti afwe," 
Numbers35:21 nangu amuma ikofi mu lupato pakuti afwe, ulya muntu ali no kwipaiwa pantu ni ntalamisoka. Kalandula wa mulopa ali nokwipaya ntalamisoka ilyo akamukumanya." 
Numbers35:22 “Lelo nga cakuti ukwabula ulupato umuntu asunka umubiye mukupumikisha, nangu amusukushila icintu cimo," 
Numbers35:23 nangu tamumwene, nga amulasa ilibwe ilingamwipaya no kufwa afwa, nomba ico tali mulwani wakwe, kabili tafwaile kumucena," 
Numbers35:24 ulukuta lufwile ukupingula umulandu pakati kakwe na kalandula wa mulopa ukukonka na mafunde aya. 
Numbers35:25 Ulukuta luli nokucingilila uwapeelwa umulandu wakwipaya umubiye kuli kalandula wa mulopa, no kumubweseshamo ku musumba wakufisamamo uko abutukile. Afwilefye ukwikalilila uko kwine mpaka shimapepo mukalamba alipo uwasubwa amafuta yamushilo akafwe." 
Numbers35:26 Lelo uuli no mulandu nga afuma mu mipaka ya musumba abutukileko," 
Numbers35:27 elyo na kalandula wa mulopa amukumanya kunse ya musumba, kalandula wa mulopa kuti amwipaya, apabula ukukwata umulandu wakwipaya umuntu." 
Numbers35:28 Uwamulandu afwile ukwikala mu musumba afisamamo, mpakafye napo shimapepo mukalamba akafwila, lyena kuti abwelelamo ku mpanga yakwe." 
Numbers35:29 Aya e mafunde yenu ne fipope ifyo mwakulakonka umukakonkanina inkulo, konsefye uko mukalaikala." 
Numbers35:30 “Umuntu onse uwaipaya mubiye, ali nokwipaiwa nge ntalamisoka bakambone nga bamushinina. Lelo kambone nga alifye umo, tabali na kumwipaya iyoo." 
Numbers35:31 Tecakwesha ukusumina ukupoka icakulubwilapo ntalamisoka uulingile ukufwa. Uyu ena mu cinefye afwile ukwipaiwa. 
Numbers35:32 Tecakwesha kusumina ukupoka icakulubwilapo onse uwafulumukila mu musumba wakufisamamo, pakuti asuminishiwe ukubwelelamo ku mpanga yakwe no kuya ikala ilyo shimapepo mukalamba uulipo talati afwe." 
Numbers35:33 Tecakwesha kukowesha icalo muleikalamo. Ukusumya umulopa kulakowesha icalo, no kufutilako pa bubifi teti ficitike pali ici calo apo umulopa usumine, kanofye pa mulopa wa muntu uwasumishe umulopa." 
Numbers35:34 Tecakwesha kukowesha calo umo mwikala, kabili emo na ine njikala. Pantu ine ne Yawe, njikala pakati ka bena Israeli.”" 
Numbers36:1 Abakalamba ba lupwa lwa mu mikowa yakwa Gileadi, umwana mwaume wakwa Makiri, umwana mwaume wakwa Manase, abafumine mu luko lwakwa Yosefu, baile no kulanda kuli Mose ne ntungulushi na bakalamba ba ndupwa sha bena Israeli." 
Numbers36:2 Batile, “Ilyo Yawe akonkomeshe imfumu yandi ukupeela icalo nge cuma ca cishilano ku bena Israeli mukupendula, amukonkomeshe ukupeela icuma ca cishilano cakwa munyinefwe Selofeadi ku bana bakwe abanakashi." 
Numbers36:3 Nomba nga cakuti baupwa ku baume ba mu nko sha bena Israeli shimbi, lyena ninshi ifyuma fyabo fyafuma mu fyuma fya cishilano fya fikolwe fyesu no kusanshiwa ku fyuma fya luko bakopilwako. Emukutila icuma ca cishilano icapeelwe kuli ifwe cili nokupokwa." 
Numbers36:4 Ilyo umwaka wakusefya ku bena Israeli ukafika, ifyuma fya cishilano fikalundwa ku fyuma fya nko bakopilwako, kabili ninshi capokwa ukufuma ku luko lwa fikolwe fyesu.”" 
Numbers36:5 Kanshi ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe amukonkomeshe, Mose nao apeela ici cipope ku bena Israeli. Atila, “Ifyo aba ndupwa sha luko lwakwa Yosefu balanda filifye bwino." 
Numbers36:6 Ifi efyo Yawe akonkomesha pa mulandu wa bana banakashi abakwa Selofeadi, bafwile ukuupwa ku muntu onse uo batemenwe, cikulufye wa mu mukowa wa luko lwakwa shibo." 
Numbers36:7 Ifyuma fya cishilano mu bena Israeli, tafili nakufuma mu luko ulu no kuya mu luko lubiye, pantu umwina Israeli onse ali nokusunga impanga ya luko lwakwe iyo apeelwa ukufuma ku fikolwe fyakwe." 
Numbers36:8 Umwana umwanakashi onse uwapeelwa impanga mu luko lonse ulwa bena Israeli, afwile ukuupwa ku wa mu mukowa wa luko lwakwa wishi, pakuti bonse abena Israeli bakakwateko icuma ca cishilano ca bashibo." 
Numbers36:9 Takuli icuma ca cishilano icikafuma ku luko ulu no kuya kuli lumbi iyoo. Pantu cila luko lwa bena Israeli lwakulaikwatilafye impanga bapeelwa ukuba iya cishilano.” 
Numbers36:10 Kanshi abana banakashi bakwa Selofeadi epakucita ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Numbers36:11 Abana banakashi bakwa Selofeadi, Mala, Tirisa, Hogila, Milika na Noa, baupile abafyala babo aba ku lubali lwa bashibo." 
Numbers36:12 Baupilwa mu luko lwa ndupwa shakwa Manase umwana mwaume wakwa Yosefu, ne fyuma fyabo ifyacishilano fyaikalafye mu luko lwakwa shibo no mutundu wakwe." 
Numbers36:13 Aya e mafunde ne fipope Yawe apeele Mose ku bena Israeli mu mawanga ya Moabu ku Yordani ukulungatana na Yeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Aya e mashiwi Mose aebele abena Israeli bonse, ilyo bali mu matololo mu Araba ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani. Bali mwiwanga lya Yordani mupepi na Sufu, pakati ka Parani na Tofeli, Labani, Haseloti na Disahabu." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Ubulendo ukufuma ku Holebu no kuya ku Kadeshi Banea ukupita umusebo wa ku lupili lwa Seiri, lwendo lwa nshiku ikumi limo na bumo (11)." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi uwalenga ikumi limo na umo (11), mu mwaka walenga amakumi yane (40) elyo Mose aebele abena Israeli fyonse ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe pali bena." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Apa ninshi ni panuma yakucimfya imfumu Sihoni iya bena Amoli, iyaleteeka mu Heshiboni. Kabili pa Edilei acimfishepo Ogi, imfumu ya calo ca Bashani iyaleteeka mu Ashitaroti." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani mu calo ca Moabu eko Mose atendekele ukulondolola amafunde. Alasosa ati," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “Yawe Lesa wesu atwebele pa lupili lwa Holebu ati, ‘Namwikalisha nganshi pali ulu lupili." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Kulululeni inkambi. Akuyeni mulungame mu calo ca bena Amoli, na mu ncende shonse isha bena mupalamano babo mu Araba, na mu mpili, na ku kapinda ka ku kuso, mu matololo ya Negebu, na mu lulamba lwa bemba, ukufika na mu calo ca bena Kenani na ku Lebanoni, ukufikafye na ku mumana uukalamba uwa Yufurate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Moneni, nimupeela ici calo. Akuyeni mucipoke, pantu e calo Yawe alapile ukuti ali nokupeela ifikolwe fyenu Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo, na ku ba mu ndupwa shabo abakakonkapo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:9 “Na pa nshita ilya namwebele nati, ‘Cangafya ukulamutungulula nekafye." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Yawe Lesa wenu, namusandulula icakuti ilelo mufulile nge ntanda sha mu mulu." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu, amuleke musanduluke imiku ikana limo (1,000), kabili amupaale ngomo alaile!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Nomba bushe kwena kuti nasenda shani amafya yenu ne fisendo fyenu, elyo no kupusana kwenu, ine nekafye?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Kanshi saleni ukufuma mu nko shenu shonse lumo lumo abantu bamo abacenjela, abacindikwa, kabili abamano, pakuti ebo ncite bacilolo benu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Na imwe mwanjaswike amuti, ‘Ico walanda ukucita, ala cintu icisuma nganshi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Kanshi na ine epakubuula intungulushi sha nko shenu ishamano kabili ishacindikwa, esho nasonta ukulamutungulula. Shimo shalatungulula abantu amakana, shimbi abantu mu myanda, shimbi abantu mu makumi yasano, shimbi nasho abantu mu makumi. Elyo nasonta na bacilolo bambi abakumona pa nko shenu shonse lumo lumo." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Napali ilya nshita, ine natile ku ntungulushi shenu, ‘Muleumfwa imilandu ilecitika pakati ka bamunyinenwe, elyo mulepingula bwino no mulinganya. Nangufye umulandu uli pakati ka bena Israeli beka beka nangufye ni pakati ka mwina Israeli no mwinafyalo." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Tecakwesha kuba na mucishacinani pakupingula umulandu. Bonse mulebalinganya nangu abe shani. Tekwesha kutiina muntu nelyo umo, pantu ubupingushi bwaba na Lesa. Muleleta umulandu onsefye uwamwansha kuli ine, naisa umfwa umo ulolele.’" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Kabili na pa nshita ilya, nalimwebele fyonse ifyo mwali nokulacita." 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Nomba ngefyo Yawe Lesa wesu atukonkomeshe, twafumine ku Holebu no kuya ukulungatana ne calo ca mpili ica bena Amoli, mu matololo ayakalamba kabili ayakutiina icibi no kuya fika na ku Kadeshi Banea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Elyo natile kuli imwe, ‘Nomba mwafika mu calo ca mpili ica bena Amoli, ico Yawe Lesa wesu aletupeela." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Moneni, Yawe Lesa wenu namupeela ici calo. Kabiyeni, mucipoke nga fintu Yawe Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu amukonkomeshe. Mwitiina nangu ukutompoka.’" 
Deuteronomy1:22 “Elyo imwe bonse mwaishile kuli ine no kusosa amuti, ‘Leka tutale tutume inengu, pakuti bakese twebako amashiwi palwa nshila iyingalinga ukupitamo, na palwa misumba ilimo, iyo tuli nokuyamo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ine nacimwene ukuti naciwama, eico kanshi na ine nasalile abantu ikumi limo na babili (12) ukufuma kuli cila luko lwenu umuntu umo." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Nabo epakuya ku calo ca mpili, kabili baya fika na kwishika lya Eshikoli no kulengula." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Elyo basendako ne fisabo fya muli cilya calo batuletelako, baisa tweba nokuti, ‘Icalo ico Yawe Lesa wesu aletupeela, cintu cafunda nganshi.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Lelo imwe tamwalefwaya ukuya muli cilya calo, mwasangukile ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu amukonkomeshe." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Mwaleisosha mu matenti yenu amuti, ‘Yawe alitupatafye, ico atufumishishe mu Egupto ni kukwisa tuposa mu minwe ya bena Amoli, pakuti batulofye." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Bushe ni kwi twingaya? Awe ifwe natwikatwa no mwenso. Bamunyinefwe nabatufuupula imitima, batile, “Abantu abekala muli cilya calo, bamaka kabili batali ukutucila. Bena bekala mu misumba iyikalamba iyakuulwa na malinga ayafika na mu mulu. Twamweneko na bena Anaki, ifipokapoka fya bantu.” ’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Nomba ine namwebele nati, ‘Mwibatiina, kabili mwitutuma." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Yawe Lesa wenu ewakulamutungulula, kabili ewakulamulwilako, nga filya fine mwaimwenene na menso yenu ifyo acitile mu calo ca Egupto." 
Deuteronomy1:31 Kabili nga filya fine mwayimwenene mu matololo ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu amusendele, nga filya wishi asenda umwana wakwe umwaume, mu nshilafye yonse mwaendelemo, mpaka ukwisa fika na pali cino cifulo.’" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Nomba nangu cali ifyo, nalyo line imwe tamwatetekele Yawe Lesa wenu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 uwalemutangilila pa bulendo bwenu, mu nshita ya bushiku mu ntumba ya mulilo, elyo akasuba nalyo mwikumbi, pakuti amufwaile icifulo apakucita inkambi no kumulanga umwakuya." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Ilyo Yawe aumfwile ukuilishanya kwenu, nao alifulilwe. Epakulapa ati," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Tapali nangu umo pali aba bantu ba nkulo ibi uukengila mu calo icisuma ico nalaile ifikolwe fyenu. 
Deuteronomy1:36 Kanofye Kalebu mwana Yefune, ena eukengilamo. Nkamupeela pamo na ba mu lupwa lwakwe icalo ico aile lengula, pantu alikonka Yawe no mutima wakwe onse.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Pa mulandu wa imwe, Yawe alinkalipile na ine wine no kutila, ‘Na iwe wine Mose tawakengilemo muli cilya calo." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Lelo kafwa obe, Yoshua mwana Nuni, ena eukengilamo. Mukoseleshe, pantu eukatungulula abena Israeli kukupoka icalo." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Kabili abana benu abanono, abashilaishiba ifibi ne fisuma, abo mwatile bakabasenda bunkole, ebakengila mu calo, ebo nkapeela icalo no kucipoka ebakacipoka." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Nomba imwe alulukeni no kubwelelela mu matololo, konkeni umusebo walola kuli Bemba Wakashika.’" 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Elyo imwe mwanjaswike amuti, ‘Natubifya kuli Yawe. Tuli nokuyafye ku bulwi, ngefyo Yawe Lesa wesu atukonkomeshe.’ Kanshi onse uwa muli imwe aipangeshe ne fyanso fyakwe nokuya ku bulwi, mwaleti cintu cayanguka ukunina mu calo ca mpili." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Nomba Yawe epakunjeba ati, ‘Bebe beyanina kukulwa, pantu ine nshabe na imwe. Baleya mucimfya ku balwani benu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ine nalimwebele ifyo Yawe anjebele, lelo imwe mwalikene ukumfwa. Mwatalamine ifunde lyakwa Yawe. Na ku cilumba cenu mwaya ingila na mu calo ca mpili." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Elyo abekalacalo ca mu Amoli bamwishilila nge nshimu, no kumukunkunika, kabili bamupumaula ukumufumya ku Seiri mpaka ku Homa." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Kanshi na imwe mwabwelele no kulilila kuli Yawe, lelo taumfwile kulila kwenu, nangufye ukukutika kuli imwe iyoo." 
Deuteronomy1:46 “Eico kanshi, ecalengele ukuti mwikale ku Kadeshi Banea inshiku ishingi, pa nshita iyitali mwaikele kulya.”" 
Deuteronomy2:1 Kabili Mose atile, “Kanshi na ifwe twalyalulwike no kulakonkafye umusebo wa mu matololo walola kuli Bemba Wakashika, ngefyo Yawe anjebele. Pa nshita iyitali twalelulumbafye mu calo ca mpili ica Seiri." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Elyo Yawe anjebele ati," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Namukokola ukululumba mu calo ca mpili, nomba alukileni ku kapinda ka ku kuso.’" 
Deuteronomy2:4 Yawe anjeba ukukonkomesha abantu ukuti, ‘Mwalapita mu calo ca bamunyinenwe aba mu lupwa lwakwa Esau, abaikala mu calo ca Seiri. Bali nokumutiina, lelo mube abacenjela nganshi." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Tecakwesha kubalwisha, pantu ine nshakamupeele calo cabo, nangu pakunyantafye ulukasa. Pantu icalo ca mpili sha Seiri napeela kuli Esau ukuti cibe cakwe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Ifyakulya na menshi fyena mukaleshita ne ndalama sha silifa.’ 
Deuteronomy2:7 Yawe Lesa wenu alimupaala muli fyonse ifyo mwabomba. Yawe alamusakamana ilyo mululumba mu matololo ayashaikulila nganshi. Pa myaka amakumi yane (40) iyi, Yawe Lesa wenu aba na imwe, elyo mulakwata na fyonse ifyo mukabila." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Kanshi na ifwe epakuya, twasha na bamunyinefwe aba mu lupwa lwakwa Esau, abaleikala mu Seiri. Twalola ukufuma mu musebo walola ku Araba, uwafuma ku Elati na Esioni Geberi, twalola mu matololo ya mu musebo wa Moabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati, ‘Tecakwesha kulwisha abena Moabu nangu ukubacusha, pantu ine nshakamupeele calo cabo. Pantu umusumba wa Ari napeela ku ba mu lupwa lwakwa Loti.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Abena Emi ebaleikala kulya. Bali fipokapoka kabili abengi. Elyo bali abatali nga bena Anaki. 
Deuteronomy2:11 Nga bena Anaki nabo bene baleitwa abena Refaimu, nomba abena Moabu baleita abena Anaki ati bena Emi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Abena Hori kale ebaleikala mu calo ca Seiri, nomba aba mu lupwa lwakwa Esau babatamfyamo. Babalofya ukufuma pa cinso cabo, balaikala namo nga filya fine abena Israeli bafulumwine abalwani babo mu calo Yawe abapeele.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Elyo Yawe atile, ‘Nomba imeni no kwabuka ishika lya Seredi.’ Elyo twayabuka ishika nga fintu Yawe atukonkomeshe." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Na panuma ya myaka amakumi yatatu na cine konse konse (38) ukutuula apo twaimine ku Kadeshi Banea ukushinta napo twayabukile ishika lya Seredi, ninshi ne nkulo yamalamba ya baume bonse ababulwi balipwa ukufwa pa nkambi nga mulya mwine Yawe alapile." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwali pali bena mpaka abalofyafye bonse mu nkambi. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Nomba ilyo amalamba ya bantu babulwi yapwile ukufwa," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Yawe epakunjeba ati," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Ilelo mulepita mu citungu ca Moabu ku Ari. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Ilyo mukapalama ku bena Amoni, tecakwesha ukubalwisha nangu ukubacusha, pantu ine nshakamupeele icalo cabo, ici calo nacipeela ku ba mu lupwa lwakwa Loti.’" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Ici calo naco caishibikwe ukuti ca bena Refaimu, pantu ebaleikalamo kale, lelo abena Amoni balebeta abati bena Samusumimu." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Bali abengi nganshi, abamaka kabili abatali nga bena Anaki. Nomba Yawe alibalofeshe ukufuma pa cinso ca bena Amoni, nabo babafulumuna mu calo ebalaikalamo." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Efyo Yawe acitile na bena Edomu aba mu lupwa lwakwa Esau, abaleikala mu Seiri, ilyo alofeshe abena Holi ukufuma pa cinso cabo. Nabo abena Edomu bafulumuna abena Holi mu calo, ebalaikalamo ukufika na lelo." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Elyo palwa bena Afimu abaleikala mu mishi ukufikafye na ku Gaza, abena Kafito abafumine ku Kafito, ebabalofeshe baikala na mu calo cabo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 ‘Nomba imeni, mwabuke no mukonko wa Alinoni. Moneni, nimbika mu maboko yenu Sihoni umwina Amoli, imfumu ya mu Heshiboni, pamo pene ne calo cakwe. Muwililileni, mutampeko ukupoka icalo." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Ukutampa lelo ndelenga imishobo yonse pano calo ilemutiina no kumukwatila umwenso. Bonse bakulaitutuminafye no kulilishika ilyo baumfwa ululumbi lwenu.’ 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Ukufuma mu matololo ya Kedemoti, natumine inkombe ku mfumu Sihoni iya ku Heshiboni ishakuya mweba palwa cibote ukuti," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Leka tupitemo mu calo cobe, twakulakonkafye inshila, tatwakapatukile ku kulyo nelyo ku kuso." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Muletushitishafye ifilyo twakulalya na menshi twakulanwa pa mutengo wa silifa. Lekafye tupite mu calo cobe pa makasa," 
Deuteronomy2:29 pamo ngefyo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Esau abekala mu calo ca Seiri na bena Moabu abekala mu calo ca Ari, batusuminishe ukupita mu fyalo fyabo mpakafye twayabuka umumana wa Yordani, ukuya mu calo ico Yawe Lesa wesu ali nokutupeela.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Nomba imfumu Sihoni iya ku Heshiboni atukaanya ukupitamo mu calo cakwe. Pantu Yawe Lesa wenu amukoseshe amano no kumutalamika umutima, pakuti amupose mu minwe yenu ngefi fine acita na nomba." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Elyo Yawe epakunjeba ati, ‘Mona, nintendeka ukukulubwila Sihoni pamo ne calo cakwe. Kanshi nomba tendekeni ukupoka icalo cibe cenu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Ilyo Sihoni ne fita fyakwe fyonse baishile kukutulwisha mupepi no musumba wa Yahasi," 
Deuteronomy2:33 Yawe Lesa wesu amuposele mu minwe yesu. Twamucimfya, pamo na bamwane ne fita fyakwe fyonse." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Pali iyo nshita, twapoka imisumba yakwe yonse no kuipeela kukonaulwa, twaipaulula na bantu abalimo, abaume, abanakashi na baice. Takwali wapuswike nakalya." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Kanofye ifitekwa ne fitapwa fya mu misumba iyo twapokele, efyo twaibuulile nokusenda fwe bene." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Yawe Lesa wesu ewalengele tupoke imisumba yonse ukutampila ku Aroeli ukukonka no mukonko wa Alinoni. Ukufuma ku musumba wa mukonko ukushinta na ku Gileadi, takwali musumba nangu umo uwatwanshishe." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Lelo ku calo ca bena Amoni kwena tamwapalemeko, nangu ku lulamba lwa mumana wa Yaboku, nangufye imisumba iyaba mu calo ca mpili nangu kumbi konse uko Yawe Lesa wesu atukonkomeshe ukukanafikako.”" 
Deuteronomy3:1 Kabili Mose atile, “Kabili twalyalulwike, twakonka no musebo walola ku Bashani. Kanshi imfumu Ogi iya ku Bashani ne fita fyaiko fyonse, baisa mukutulwisha ilyo batukumenye ku Edelei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Yawe epakunjeba ati, ‘Wimutiina, pantu nimupeela mu minwe yobe, kumo kwine ne fita fyakwe fyonse, pamo ne calo cakwe cine. Umucite filya wacitile Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli uwaleteeka mu Heshiboni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Kanshi Yawe Lesa wesu nao epakutupeela Ogi imfumu ya ku Bashani ne fita fyakwe fine fyonse. Twabepaya bonsefye, ukwabula ukushapo nangu umo uwakupusuka." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Pa nshita ilya twapokele ne misumba yakwe yonsefye. Takwashele musumba nelyo umo uo tushapokele pa misumba amakumi mutanda (60) ne citungu conse ica Agobu ico imfumu Ogi iya mu Bashani yaleteeka. 
Deuteronomy3:5 Yonse iyi misumba yali na malinga ayatali ne mpongolo ne mipilikisho yakwisalilako, kabili kwali ne mishi imbi iyingi iyishakwete malinga." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Elyo na ifwe epakupeela imisumba yonse kukonaulwa, nga filya twacitile Sihoni imfumu ya Heshiboni. Twaonaula imisumba yonse no kwipaya abantu balimo abaume, abanakashi na baice." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Lelo ifitekwa ne fitapwa ukufuma mu misumba yabo fyena twalifisendele fwe bene. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Kanshi pa nshita ilya efyo twapokele ifyalo fya shamfumu ishi shibili isha bena Amoli lubali lwa ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani, ukutendeka ku mukonko wa Alinoni ukushinta na ku lupili lwa Hemoni.”" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Abena Sidoni beta ulupili lwa Hemoni ukuti lupili lwa Sirioni, abena Amoli nabo balwita ukuti lupili lwa Seni.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 “Twapoka ne misumba yonse iya mu calo cabatama, na Gileadi yonse, Bashani onse no kuya fikafye ku Saleka na ku Edelei, imisumba ya mu calo cakwa Ogi mu Bashani.”" 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ogi eka, imfumu ya Bashani, ewashelepo pa bena Refaimu. Ne mbokoshi ya citumbi cakwe yali iye libwe, na mubwipi yali bamita babili, elyo mubutali bamita bane na citika. Ukushinta na lelo epo icili mu musumba wa bena Amoni mu Laba.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Pa calo twapokele pa nshita ilya, napeele ku bena Rubeni na bena Gadi icitungu ukutendekela mu musumba wa Aroeli ku kapinda ka ku kuso mupepi no mukonko wa Alinoni, no kulundako iciputulwa ca calo ca mpili ica Gileadi, kumo kwine ne misumba yaciko." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Citika wa luko lwakwa Manase naupeele icitungu icasheleko ku calo ca Gileadi, nabikapo ne calo conse icakwa Ogi imfumu ya Bashani.” (Icalo conse ica Agobu mu Bashani caishibikwe ukuti e calo ca bena Refaimu." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Yaili, uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Manase, apokele icalo conse ica Agobu, ukuya fika na mu mupaka wa bena Geshuri no wa bena Maaka. Ici calo conse cainikwe ishina lyakwe, ukufika na lelo citwa Hafoti Yairi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Kabili napeele Gileadi kuli Makiri. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Lelo napeele ku bena Rubeni na bena Gadi icitungu ukutendekela ku Gileadi ukuya shinta na ku mukonko wa Alinoni, umupaka wabela pakati ka mukonko, elyo no kufika ku mumana wa Yaboku, uwapakanya na bena Amoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Ku masamba umupaka wali mumana wa Yordani mu Araba, ukufuma ku Kinereti ukufika kuli bemba wa Araba, bemba wa Mucele, ukuya shintafye mwisamba lya lupili lwa Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Elyo pa nshita ine ilya namukonkomeshe nati, ‘Yawe Lesa wenu namupeela ici calo ukuti cibe cenu. Nomba abaume bonse amalamba nabaipangashe ifyanso fyabulwi, babukile kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani, batangilile bamunyinenwe bambi abena Israeli." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Kanofye abakashi benu na bana benu ebali nokushala mu misumba namupeela pamo ne fitekwa fyenu, (ninjishiba namukwata ifitekwa ifingi)," 
Deuteronomy3:20 mpakafye Yawe akapeele na bamunyinenwe ukutuusha pamo nga imwe. Bakaikwatile nabo icalo ico Yawe Lesa wenu akabapeela kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani. Lyena elyo mukabwelela cila umo ku citungu cakwe ico namupeela.’ 
Deuteronomy3:21 “Elyo pa nshita ilya nakonkomeshe Yoshua nati, ‘Nauimwena na menso yobe we mwine fyonse ifyo Yawe Lesa obe acitile kuli shilya mfumu shibili. Yawe akalacita cimo cine ku shamfumu shonse isha uko muleya." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Tecakwesha kushitiina, pantu Yawe Lesa obe e ukalakulwishishako.’" 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Kabili pali ilya nshita napapete Yawe nati," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘We Mfumu Yawe, walitampa ukulanga umubomfi obe ubulamba bobe na maka ya kuboko kobe. Bushe mulungu nshi umbi mu mulu na pano isonde uwingacita ifyabulamba ifyo iwe ucita?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Leka njabuke umumana nje moneko icalo cisuma icili kwishilya lya Yordani, icalo cisuma ica mpili na Lebanoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Pa mulandu wa imwe Yawe alimfulilwe, kabili tewakumfwa ifyo nalelanda, ati nokuti, ‘Walanda fyafula. Kabili wibwekeshapo kulanda pali uyu umulandu!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Kabiye pa mulu wa lupili lwa Pisiga, ulolekeshe ku kapinda ka ku kuso, na ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, ku kabanga na ku masamba. Ulolekeshe bwino ifyo uleya mona, pantu iwe tawayabuke mumana wa Yordani." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kanshi upeele Yoshua imilimo, umukoseleshe no kumucincisha, pantu euli nokutungulula aba bantu pakwabuka, kabili eukalenga nokuti bakapoke cilya calo, ico iwe walatamba.’" 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Kanshi ifwe epakwikala mwishika mupepi no musumba wa Beti Peori.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 Elyo Mose alaeba abantu ati, “Nomba mwe bena Israeli, umfwikisheni ifipope na mafunde ndemufunda. Mulekonka fyonse pakuti mukaleyenda abomi, mukengile, mukapoke ne calo ico Yawe, Lesa wa bashinwe ali mukumupeela." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Pafyo ine ndemukonkomesha, tecakwesha kulundapo nelyo ukufumyapo fimo. Lelo mulesunga amafunde yakwa Yawe Lesa wenu ayo ndemupeela." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Mwalimwene na menso yenu mwe bene ifyo Yawe acitile pa Baali Peori. Yawe Lesa wenu alilofeshe bonse abapepeleko umulungu Baali wa ku Peori. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Nomba mwe bapetamine Yawe Lesa wenu mucili abomi ukufika na lelo. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Moneni, nimufunda ifipope na mafunde ngefyo umwine Yawe Lesa wandi ankonkomeshe. Pakuti mukaleyakonka mu calo ico mwalaingilamo pakuti mucipoke." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Mukaleyasunga bwino bwino, pakuti aba mishobo ya benafyalo bakalemona ukuti imwe muli bamano kabili abacumfwila. Abakomfwako fyonse ifi, bakalatila, ‘Cine cine uyu mushobo ukalamba wamano kabili uwacumfwila!’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Bushe mushobo nshi na umbi, nangu wingakula shani, uwaba ne milungu mupepi ngefi ifwe Yawe Lesa wesu atupalama ilyo tumwita?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Kabili mushobo nshi na umbi, nangu wingakula shani, uwakwata ifipope na mafunde ayalungama ngaya namupeela ilelo?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Kanshi mulecenjela no kuisunga bwino pakuti mwikalaba ifintu mwamona na menso yenu nangu ukuleka fifume mu mitima ilyo muli abomi pano calo. Mukasambilisheko abana benu na bana babo abakakonkapo. 
Deuteronomy4:10 Ibukisheni ubushiku mwaiminine pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu ku Holebu, lilya anjebele ati, ‘Longanika abantu pa cinso candi pakuti bomfwe amashiwi yandi, basambilile ukunkwatila akatiina ilyo bacili abomi pano calo no kusambilishako abana babo.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Na imwe mwalipaleme, mwaiminina mwisamba lya lupili ulwalebilima umulilo uwalefika na ku mulu, ulu lupili lwakupilwe ne ntumba ya cushi icafiita fititi." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Kanshi Yawe epakulanda kuli imwe ukufuma mu mulilo. Mwaumfwile uko alelanda amashiwi, lelo tamwamumwene mu musango uuli onse. Mwaumfwilefye ishiwi epela." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Alimwebele icipangano ico mwapangene nankwe, ifi e fyebo ikumi ifyo amukonkomeshe ukulakonka, kabili afilemba na pa mabwe ayapapatala yabili." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Kabili Yawe ankonkomeshe pali ilya nshita ukuti mfunde ifipope na mafunde muli nokulakonka mu calo ico mwalapoka nga mwayabuka Yordani.” 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Ubushiku Yawe alandile na imwe ukufuma mu mulilo pa lupili lwa Holebu, tamwamumwene mu musango uuli onse. Kanshi cenjeleni, muleisunga bwino" 
Deuteronomy4:16 pakuti tamuilufyenye no kuipangila akalubi, icimpashanya ca musango onse, cibe icapala umwaume nangu umwanakashi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 nangu icapala inama yonse pano calo, nangu icuni icipupuka mu lwelele," 
Deuteronomy4:18 nangu icibumbwa icikulika panshi, nangu isabi lya mu menshi." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Kabili nga mwapunamina mu mulu, mwamona akasuba, umweshi ne ntanda, ifitafye fyonse ifyaba mu mulu, mwilatunkwa ukufifukamina nangu ukupepa ifintu ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu ayakanya abantu ba mishobo yonse iyaba pano calo." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Lelo imwe ni Yawe ewamubuulile no kumufumya mwilungu lya mulilo, mu Egupto, pakuti mube abantu bakwe ngefi fine mwaba ukushinta na lelo." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Nomba ni pa mulandu wenu Yawe amfulilwe, alapa nokuti nshakabukeko umumana wa Yordani no kwingila muli cilya calo cisuma Yawe Lesa wenu alemupeela nge cacishilano cenu." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ine ndefwila muli cino calo, nshakabuke mumana wa Yordani. Lelo imwe muli mukwabuka, mukaya poka na cilya calo cisuma." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Kanshi muleisunga, mwikalaba ne cipangano cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu, ico apangana na imwe. Tecakwesha kuipangila akalubi mu cipasho icili conse Yawe Lesa wenu amulesha." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Pantu Yawe Lesa wenu, mulilo uoca fyonse, kabili ni Lesa uwabufuba." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Panuma yakukwata abana na beshikulu, mwakokola muli cilya calo, nga cakuti mwailufyanya no kupanga akalubi akali konse, ukucita icabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu no kulenga akalipe," 
Deuteronomy4:26 naita umulu ne calo nga bakambone pali imwe mu bushiku bwe lelo ukuti mukalobe bwangu ukufuma mu calo ico muleyabukila umumana wa Yordani mukuya cipoka. Tamwakekalemo inshita iyitali lelo mukalobelelafye. 
Deuteronomy4:27 Yawe akamusalanganishisha mu bantu bambi, elyo pali imwe pakashalafye impendwa inono mu mishobo Yawe akamutwalamo." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Kulya kwine mukalapepa imilungu iyo abantu bapanga ku fimuti na ku mabwe, iyishimona, nangu ukumfwa nangu ukulya, nangu ukununsha." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Lelo kulya kwine nga eko mwatendekela ukufwaya Yawe Lesa wenu ne mitima yenu ne myeo yenu yonse, lyena mukamusanga." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ilyo mukaba mu macushi na fyonse ifi nga fyamufikila, elyo pakulekelesha mukabwelela kuli Yawe Lesa wenu no kumupetamina." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Pantu Yawe Lesa wenu ena ni Lesa waluse. Takamulekeleshe nangu ukumulofya nangu ukulaba icipangano ico apangene ne fikolwe fyenu no mulapo. 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Nomba ipusheni pa nshiku shakale ilyo tamulabako, ukufuma pa bushiku ilyo Lesa abumbile umuntu pano isonde, ipusheni ukufuma ku mpela ya mulu ukufika na ku mpela ibiye. Bushe kwalitala akucitika icintu nangu cimo icacindama ifi? Bushe kwatala akumfwika icintu ca uyu musango?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Bushe bantu nshi abaumfwa ishiwi lya mulungu uko ulelanda ukufuma mu mulilo, nga filya imwe mwaumfwile, nomba mucili abomi?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Bushe kwalitala akuba mulungu uwaeshako ukuibuulila umushobo umo ukufuma mu mushobo umbi ku fyakwesha, ku fishibilo fyakupapa ne fipeshamano, ku nkondo, ku kuboko kwabulamba no kuboko ukwatambalala nangu ne fyakutiinya ifikalamba nge fintu fyonse ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu acitile pa menso yenu mu Egupto?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Mwalangilwe ifi fyonse pakuti mwishibe ukuti Yawe e Lesa ekafye, takwaba na umbi iyoo." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Alekele nokuti mumfwe ishiwi lyakwe ukutula ku mulu, epakuti amufunde. Pano isonde napo amulekele ukuti mumone umulilo wakwe, kabili mwaumfwile amashiwi yakwe ukufuma mu mulilo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Pa mulandu wakutemwa ifikolwe fyenu no kusala indupwa shabo ishakonkelepo, amufumishe mu Egupto mukuba na imwe na ku maka yakwe ayakalamba." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Kabili pakumutemwa atamfishe imishobo iyikalamba iyamaka ukumucila, pakuti amwingishe mu calo cabo no kumupeela nge cacishilano ngefi fine cili nomba." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Eico mucishibe ilelo, mucibike na mu mitima yenu icakuti Yawe e Lesa ekafye uwa mu mulu na pano isonde, takwaba na umbi iyoo." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Mulesunga ifipope na mafunde yonse ayo namupeela lelo pakuti cikamuwamine imwe na bana benu, elyo mukatwalilila ukwikala pe mu calo Yawe Lesa wenu ali mukumupeela pakuti cibe cenu pe.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Kanshi Mose asontele imisumba itatu ku kabanga ka Yordani," 
Deuteronomy4:42 iyakubutukilako nga cakuti umuntu aipaya umuntu mubiye ukushili ku mufulo. Kuti abutukila ku musumba wa musango uyu, pakupususha umweo wakwe." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Abena Rubeni babapeela umusumba wa Beseri, uwaba mu matololo yabatama, abena Gadi babapeela umusumba wa Ramoti uwa mu Gileadi, elyo abena Manase babapeela umusumba wa Golani uwaba mu Bashani." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Aya e mafunde Mose apeele abana bakwa Israeli. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Abapeele amafunde, ifipope ne fyebo, ilyo abana bakwa Israeli bafumine ku Egupto," 
Deuteronomy4:46 ninshi bacili ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani, mwishika lyalungatana no musumba wa Beti Peori, mu calo ca mfumu Sihoni, iyaleteeka abena Amoli mu Heshiboni. Mose na bana bakwa Israeli balimucimfishe ilyo bafumine ku Egupto." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Bapokele icalo cakwe ne calo cakwa Ogi imfumu ya Bashani. Ishi mfumu shibili isha bena Amoli shaleikala lwa ku kabanga ka Yordani. 
Deuteronomy4:48 Bapokele icalo ukufuma mu musumba wa Aroeli, uwaba mu lulamba lwa mukonko wa Alinoni, ukufika na ku lupili lwa Sirioni, (ulu e lupili lwa Hemoni)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ukubikapofye ne citungu ca Araba ku kabanga ka Yordani, ukushinta na kuli bemba wa Araba, mwisamba lya lupili lwa Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mose aitile abena Israeli bonse, elyo asosa ati, “We Israeli umfwa ifipope na mafunde nalakweba ayo walaumfwa ilelo, uyeshibe kabili uleyasunga." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Yawe Lesa wesu apangene na ifwe icipangano pa lupili lwa Holebu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Te fikolwe fyeka Yawe apangene nabo icipangano, lelo na ifwe bene, na bonse fwe bacili abomi ilelo." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Yawe alandile na imwe pa lupili, ukufuma mu mulilo, ninshi namuloshanya amenso." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Pali ilya nshita naiminine pakati, uku ni Yawe na imwe lubali lumbi, pakuti ndemweba ifilelanda Yawe. Pantu imwe tamwaile pa mulu wa lupili ico mwaletiina umulilo. “Kabili Yawe atile," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Nine Yawe Lesa wenu, uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto umo mwali abasha." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “‘Wilaba ne milungu imbi kanofye ine. 
Deuteronomy5:8 “‘Wilaipangila kalubi nangu icintu conse icakupashanya icaba mu mulu umutali, nangu icaba pano isonde, nangu icaba mu menshi pesamba lya calo." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Wilafukamina utulubi nangu ukutupepa. Pantu ine ne Yawe Lesa obe, ndi Lesa wabufuba, nkanda abana pa bubifi bwa bashibo ukufika na ku nkulo yalenga butatu ne yalenga bune iya bampata." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Lelo ndalanga icitemwiko icishipwa ku nkulo amakana na makana isha bantu abantemwa, abasunga na mafunde yandi." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “‘Wilalumbula ishina lyakwa Yawe Lesa obe apafye, pantu Yawe takalekepofye uyo onse uulumbula ishina lyakwe apafye." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “‘Ulebaka ubushiku bwe Sabata no kubusunga ubwamushilo, ngefyo Yawe Lesa obe akukonkomeshe." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ulebomba mu nshiku mutanda kabili emo ulebomba imilimo yobe yonse," 
Deuteronomy5:14 lelo ubushiku bwalenga cine lubali bwena Lisabata lyakwa Yawe Lesa obe. Wilabombamo mulimo uuli onse, we mwine, nelyo bamwano abaume na banakashi, nelyo ababomfi abaume atemwa na banakashi, nelyo iŋombe nangu kabalwe nangufye icitekwa icili conse, nelyo abenafyalo wikala nabo, pakuti umubomfi umwaume no mwanakashi batushe pamo nga iwe wine." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Uleibukisha ukuti wali umusha mu Egupto, kabili nokuti Yawe Lesa obe ewakufumishemo ku kuboko kwabulamba no kuboko ukwatambalala. E mulandu Yawe Lesa obe akukonkomeshe ukubaka ubushiku bwe Sabata." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “‘Ulecindika wiso na noko, ngefyo Yawe Lesa obe akukonkomeshe. Lyena ukekala inshiku ishingi kabili cikakuwamina mu calo Yawe Lesa obe alakupeela." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “‘Wilaipaya. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “‘Wilacita bucende. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “‘Wilaiba. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “‘Wilapeela bunte bwabufi pa mubiyo. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “‘Wilakumbwa muka mubiyo. Wilakumbwa ŋanda ya mubiyo, nangu impanga yakwe, nangu umusha wakwe umwaume nelyo umwanakashi, nangu iŋombe yakwe, nangu punda wakwe, nangufye icili conse ico akwata.’" 
Deuteronomy5:22 “Aya e mafunde Yawe abilile ne shiwi likalamba kwibumba lyonse palya pa lupili ukufuma mu mulilo, mwikumbi na mu mfifi iyafiita fititi. Apeele aya mafunde ukwabula ukulandapo na yambi. Elyo alemba na mafunde pa mabwe ayapapatala yabili no kumpeela." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Ilyo ulupili lwalebilima umulilo ne shiwi lyaleumfwika ukufuma mu mfifi, intungulushi shenu na bakalamba ba nko shenu baishile kuli ine." 
Deuteronomy5:24 Kabili mwanjebele amuti, ‘Yawe Lesa wesu natulanga ifwe ubucindami no kupulama kwakwe, kabili natuyumfwila ishiwi lyakwe ililefuma mu mulilo! Ilelo twaimwena ukuti umuntu kanshi kuti aba umumi nangu Lesa alanda nankwe." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Nga nomba cinshi twalafwila? Uyu mulilo ushaikulila uletulofya, kabili nga cakuti twatwalilila ukumfwa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe Lesa wesu tulefwa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Bushe kwatala akuba umuntunse uwaumfwapo uko Lesa umumi alelanda ukufuma mu mulilo, nga ifwe, kabili ashala umumi?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Kabiye mupepi uye umfwikishe fyonse ifyo Yawe Lesa wesu alelanda. Elyo wise utwebe fyonse ifyo Yawe Lesa wesu aleya kweba. Kabili na ifwe tuleisa umfwa no kukonka twakulakonka.’ 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Yawe alimumfwile ilyo mwalandile kuli ine, elyo anjeba ati, ‘Niŋumfwa ifyo abantu balandile kuli iwe. Fyonse fintu balandile nabalungika." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Iyee, nga kuti cawama bakwata imitima yakuntiina no kubaka amafunde yandi inshiku shonse pakuti cikabawamine pamo na bana babo bene pe na pe!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Kabiye, uye beba babwelele ku matenti yabo." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Nomba iwe, shala kuno na ine, pakuti nkupeele amafunde yonse, amalango ne fipope ifyakuya bafunda, pakuti bakalefikonka mu calo ico nkabapeela ukupoka.’" 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Kanshi cenjeleni mukucita ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu amukonkomesha. Tecakwesha ukupilibukila ku kulyo nangu ku kuso. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Muleendela mu nshila shonse isho Yawe Lesa wenu amukonkomeshe pakuti mukabe abomi, cikamuwamine, mukekale ne nshiku ishingi mu calo ico mukaya poka.”" 
Deuteronomy6:1 Kabili Mose atile, “Aya e mafunde, amalango ne fipope ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu ankonkomeshe ukumufunda, ukuti mukaleyabaka mu calo ico mwalaswa mwabukilemo mwishilya lya Yordani pakucipoka." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Ndemufunda pakuti imwe pamo na bana benu na bana babo mukaleba na katiina kuli Yawe Lesa wenu, mukubaka ifipope na mafunde ayo namupeela pakuti mukekale ne nsansa inshita iyitali." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Umfwa we Israeli, kabili ucenjele ukubeela pakuti cikuwamine kabili epakuti mukasande nganshi mu calo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci. Nga mulya mwine Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu amulaile." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Umfwa we Israeli! Yawe Lesa wesu, e Yawe ekafye." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Uletemwa Yawe Lesa obe no mutima obe onse, no mweo obe onse, na maka yobe yonse." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Aya mafunde nakupeela lelo uleyabaka. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Uleyafunda na ku bana bobe. Muleyakomailapo ilyo mwikele pamyenu, kabili nelyo muleenda pa musebo, na pakusendama, kabili na lintu mwabuka mu tulo." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Muleyakakila pakuyafwala pa mpumi shenu na pa maboko yenu, pantu e cishibilo cakumwibukishako." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Mukayalembe na pa filu fya minshi ya mayanda yenu, na pa mpongolo shenu." 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Kabili Yawe Lesa wenu akamufisha mu calo alaile ifikolwe fyenu Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo, ukuti akamupeela imwe icalo ca misumba ikalamba, kabili iyikankala, iyo imwe mushakuula." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Akamupeela amayanda ayaisulamo ifintu ifisuma fyonse ifyo imwe mushabikamo, ifishima ifyo imwe mushaimba, amabala ya myangashi na ya miolifa ayalimwa ayo imwe mushalimba. Nomba ilyo mukalalya nokwikuta mwaikuta," 
Deuteronomy6:12 cenjeleni, tecakwesha ukulaba Yawe, uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto umo mwali abasha." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Muleba na katiina kuli Yawe Lesa wenu, eo mulebombela ekafye, kabili mukalelapafye mwishina lyakwe epela." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Mwikalakonka milungu imbi, iya bantu bambi abakaba mumbali." 
Deuteronomy6:15 Pantu Yawe Lesa wenu, uo mwaba nankwe ni Lesa wabufuba, no bukali bwakwe bukamwishila ngo mulilo, kabili akamulofya mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse." 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Mwilaesha Yawe Lesa wenu nga filya mwacitile ku Masa. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Mumone ukuti mwabaka amafunde, ifyebo ne fipope ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu amupeela." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Mulecita ifisuma kabili ifyalungama pa menso yakwa Yawe, pakuti lyena cikamuwamine. Elyo mukengile no kuya poka icalo icisuma ico Yawe alapile ku fikolwe fyenu," 
Deuteronomy6:19 mukufulumunamo abalwani pa cinso cenu nga mulya mwine Yawe asosele. 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Mu nshiku sha kuntanshi umwana obe nga akwipusha ati, ‘Bushe calola mwi ici Yawe Lesa wesu amukonkomeshe ukulakonka amafunde, ifyebo ne fipope fyakwe?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Kuti mwamweba ati, ‘Ifwe twali abasha bakwa Farao mu Egupto, nomba Yawe atufumishe mu Egupto ku kuboko kwakwe ukwabulamba." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Twalimwene na menso yesu uko Yawe alecita ifipeshamano ne finjelengwe ifikalamba kabili ifyabipisha pa bena Egupto na Farao kumo na ba ŋanda yakwe yonse. 
Deuteronomy6:23 Lelo atufumyako no kutuleta kuno, atupeela na cino calo alaile no mulapo ku fikolwe fyesu." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Yawe alitukonkomeshe ukulabeela ifipope ifi fyonse, no kukwatila Yawe Lesa wesu akatiina pakuti cikatuwamine lyonse, tuleenda abomi, ngefi fine cili ilelo." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Kabili nga twalabeela amafunde aya pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wesu ngefyo atukonkomesha, cikaba e bololoke bwesu.’”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 Kabili Mose atile, “Ilyo Yawe Lesa wenu akamutwala mu calo ico mukengilamo kukucipoka, akatamfyamo imishobo ya bantu iyingi. Akatamfyamo imishobo cine lubali iyikalamba kabili iyamaka ukumucila imwe, abena Hiti, abena Girigashi, abena Amoli, abena Kenani, abena Perisi, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Kabili nga Yawe Lesa wenu abaposa mu minwe yenu no kubacimfya mwabacimfya, mukapeela bonsefye kukonaulwa. Tecakwesha kupangana nabo bucibusa, kabili takuli kubabelela luse." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Mwikalaupana nabo. Mwikalaleka abana benu abanakashi bakaleupilwako, nangu abana benu abaume bakaleupilako." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Pantu bakafumya abana benu mukulankonka no kuya mukutumika imilungu imbi. Ninshi ubukali bwakwa Yawe bukamwimina no kumulofya bwangu. 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ifi efyo muli nokubacita. Mukabongolole ifibumbili fya malambo fyabo, mukatobolole na mabwe yabo bacindikisha, mukaputaule ne nceshi sha Ashera umulungu wabo, elyo mukoce no tulubi twabo mu mulilo." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Pantu imwe muli bantu bamushilo abakwa Yawe Lesa wenu. Yawe Lesa wenu, alimupatula ku bantu bonse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse, nimwefye aisalila ukuba abantu bakwe abo acindamika." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Yawe tamutemenwe no kumusala pantu mwacilile abantu ba mu mishobo imbi ku bwingi, lelo nimwe mwacepeshepo pa mishobo ya bantu yonse." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Lelo nico Yawe alimutemwa, alisunga no mulapo alaile ku fikolwe fyenu, ecalenga ukuti amupusushe ku kuboko kwa bulamba bwakwe, amulubule mu calo ca busha, amufumye na mu minwe yakwa Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Kanshi mwishibe ukuti Yawe Lesa wenu, e Lesa eka, uwacishinka, alasunga icipangano no kulanga icitemwiko icishipwa ku bantu abamutemwa, abakonka na mafunde yakwe, ukufikafye na ku nkulo ikana limo." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Nomba “abamupata akabalambula ukuloba pa cinso cabo. Takakokole ukubalambula pa cinso cabo bonse abamupata. 
Deuteronomy7:11 “Kanshi mulebaka amafunde, amalango ne fipope ifyo namupeela ilelo.”" 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Nga mwaumfwila aya mafunde kabili nokuyasunga bwino bwino, lyena Yawe Lesa wenu akalasunga icipangano no kulanga icitemwiko icishipwa kuli imwe ngefyo alaile ifikolwe fyenu." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Akamutemwa no kumupaala, kabili akalenga mukasande. Akalapaala na bana mukafyala, ne fisabo fya mu mushili wenu, iŋanu shenu, umwangashi upya na mafuta ya miolifa, iŋombe, impaanga ne fitekwa fyonse mu calo ico alaile ifikolwe fyenu ukuti akamupeela." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Mukapaalwa ukucila abantu bonse. Tapakabe umwaume nangu umwanakashi uushakakwate ubufyashi, nangufye ifitekwa fyenu ifishakakwate abana." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Yawe akatalusha ubulwele bonse uko muli. Takaleke amalwele ayabipisha yakamwishile nga yalya mwamwene ku Egupto, lelo yena eyo akaletela abalwani benu bonse." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Mufwile ukulofya abantu bonsefye abo Yawe Lesa wenu aposa mu minwe yenu. Mwikalabakwatila luse, mwikalapepa milungu yabo pantu cikaba citeyo kuli imwe." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Limbi kuti mwasosa amuti, ‘Iyi mishobo naitucila amaka ifwe. Nga kuti twabatamfya shani mu calo?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Lelo tecakwesha kubatiina, mwibukishe bwino ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu acitile Farao na bantu bakwe bonse mu Egupto." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Mwaimwenene na menso yenu amacushi ayakalamba, ifishibilo fyakupapa, ifipeshamano, ukuboko kwakwe ukwabulamba no kuboko kwakwe ukwatambala uko Yawe Lesa wenu abomfeshe pakumufumya mu Egupto. Yawe Lesa wenu akacita cimo cine ku bantu bonse abo mutiina nomba." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Kabili Yawe Lesa wenu akatuma amalonda pakati kabo, mpakafye na bakashalapo abakaya mukubelama bakalobe." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Mwikalabatiina aba bantu, pantu Yawe Lesa wenu, uwaba na imwe, ena mukulu kabili ni Lesa wakutiina." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Yawe Lesa wenu akalatamfya iyi mishobo pa ntanshi yenu panono panono. Tamwakasuminishiwe ukulofya bonse pa mukufye umo, pantu nga mwacita ifyo, ifinama fya mpanga fikasanda no kulamucusha." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Nomba Yawe Lesa wenu akabaposa uko muli, akabafulunganya amano mpakafye bakalobe." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Akaposa ne mfumu shabo mu minwe yenu, na imwe mukalofya amashina yabo pa calo. Takwakabe nelyo umo uwakumucimfya, mukabalofyafye bonse." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Mukaleoca ifimpashanya fya milungu yabo mu mulilo. Mwikalakumbwa silifa nangu golide uo bakambatikako. Tecakwesha kuusenda. Nga mwacita ico, ninshi mwaibika mu citeyo. Pantu Yawe Lesa wenu alifipata." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Kabili mwikengisha icintu icapatwa mu mayanda yenu, pantu imwe pamo nga cena mukapatulwa kukonaulwa. Kanshi na imwe bene muli nokucipatafye pantu capatwilwa kukonaulwa.”" 
Deuteronomy8:1 Kabili Mose atile, “Mulecenjela pakukonka amafunde yonse ndemupeela ilelo pakuti muleenda abomi, mulesanda, mukengile no kupoka icalo ico Yawe alaile no mulapo ku fikolwe fyenu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Muleibukisha ifintu Yawe Lesa wenu amutungulwile pa lwendo ulutali mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane (40) pakuti amunashe, amweshe, eshibe ifili mu mitima yenu no kumona nga kuti mwabaka amafunde yakwe." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Alimunashishe, amuleka ukuti mumfwe insala elyo kabili amupeela na maana, icakulya ico imwe ne fikolwe fyenu mushaishibe, pakuti amulange ukuti te cakulya ceka cilenga umuntu aleenda umumi, lelo lishiwi lyonse ilifuma ku kanwa kakwa Yawe." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Pa myaka iyi amakumi yane (40) ifyakufwala fyenu tafyalesapuka, na makasa yenu nayo tayalefimba nakalya." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Mwishibe kanshi mu mitima yenu ukuti, Yawe Lesa wenu alamufunda nga filya umuntu afunda umwana wakwe umwaume." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Mulebaka amafunde yakwa Yawe Lesa wenu, mulekonka mu nshila shakwe no kulamucindika." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Pantu Yawe Lesa wenu alemwingisha mu calo icisuma umwaba imimana, ifishiba fya menshi no tumfukumfuku twa menshi ayapita mu mawanga na mu mpili." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Icalo umwaba iŋanu, bale, imyangashi, imikunyu, amateke, amafuta ya miolifa no buci." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Icalo umushakatale amubula icakulya kabili umo mushakakabile kantu nelyo kamo. Icalo umo amabwe yaba aya fyela kabili na mu mpili kuti mwaimbamo umukuba. 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ilyo mukalalya no kulaikuta, mukalepaala Yawe Lesa wenu na matotelo pa mulandu wa busuma bwa calo ico amupeela." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Mulecenjela epali mwalaba Yawe Lesa wenu, mwafilwa ukulakonka amafunde, ifyebo ne fipope ifyo namupeela ilelo." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Pantu limbi ilyo mwalya no kwikuta, mwakuula na mayanda ayasuma, mwaikala na bwino," 
Deuteronomy8:13 kabili ilyo imikuni ya ŋombe ne mbushi ne mpaanga shenu shafulisha, silifa na golide wenu yafulilako, elyo na fyonse ifyo mwakwata fyafulilako," 
Deuteronomy8:14 lyena imitima yenu ikaba ne cilumba, mukalaba kuli Yawe Lesa wenu uwamufumishe mu calo ca Egupto umo mwali abasha." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Ewamutungulwile muli yalya matololo ayakalamba kabili ayakutiina, cilya calo ca cilaka umushali amenshi, umwali nsoka shabusungu na bakaliŋongo. Emo amufumishe amenshi mu cilibwe icakosa." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Amupeele maana mu matololo pakuti mulye, icakulya ico ifikolwe fyenu fishaishibe. Pakumunasha no kumwesha, alefwaya ukuti pakulekelesha cikamuwamine." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Limbi kuti mwasosa ati, ‘Amaka yandi no bulamba bwa kuboko kwandi efyandetela ubu bukankala.’" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Nomba muleibukisha Yawe Lesa wenu, pantu ewamupeela amaka ayakumona ubukankala. Ico acitila ifyo ni pakuti abe uwacishinka palwa cipangano apangene ne fikolwe fyenu, ngefyo cili ilelo." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Nga cakuti mwalaba Yawe Lesa wenu, mwakonka ne milungu imbi, mwalaipepa no kuifukamina, ndemusokako ine lelo ukuti cine cine muli nokuloba." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Nga mwakaana ukubeela Yawe Lesa wenu, na imwe bene mukalobafye nge mishobo imbi ilya Yawe alofeshe mu menso yenu.”" 
Deuteronomy9:1 Kabili Mose atile, “Nomba umfwa we Israeli, uli mupepi no kwabuka umumana wa Yordani no kuya poka icalo umwikala imishobo iyikalamba, kabili iyamaka ukucila iwe, iyaba ne misumba ikalamba na malinga ayatali ayalola na mumulu." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Abantu babamo batali kabili abamaka, abena Anaki! Mwalibeshiba no kumfwa ifyo casoswa ukuti, ‘Nga nani engalwisha abena Anaki?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Kanshi mwishibe ilelo ukuti Yawe Lesa wenu eumutangilila ngo mulilo wabonaushi. Akabacimfya no kubalofya, na imwe mukabatamfya no kubalofya mukwangufyanya, ngefyo Yawe amulaile." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Ilyo Yawe Lesa wenu atamfyamo aba bantu pa ntanshi yenu, mwikalasosa ati, ‘Yawe atuleta kuno kukwisa poka cino calo, pa mulandu wa bulungami bwesu.’ Awe, ni pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa iyi mishobo, eco Yawe akabatamfisha." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Te pa mulandu wa bulungami bwenu nangu bucishinka bwenu eco mwalapokela icalo, lelo Yawe Lesa wenu akatamfyamo iyi mishobo pa ntanshi yenu pa mulandu wa bubifi bwabo pakufikilisha icilayo ico alaile ifikolwe fyenu Abrahamu, Isaki, na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Kanshi mwishibe nomba ukuti, te pa mulandu wakuba abalungami eco Yawe Lesa wenu alemupeelela icalo icisuma ukucipoka, pantu na imwe bene muli nkosamitwe." 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Muleibukisha no kukanalaba ifyo mwalengele Yawe Lesa wenu akalipe mu matololo. Ukutulafye pa bushiku mwafumine mu Egupto mpaka nelyo mwafikile pano, mwabafye abatalamina Yawe." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Na ku Holebu mwalengele Yawe akalipe nganshi kwempefye no kumulofya. 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ilyo naile pa mulu wa lupili kukupoka amabwe ayapapatala apalembelwe icipangano ico Yawe apangene na imwe, naikelepo inshiku amakumi yane (40), akasuba no bushiku, nshalelya nangu kamo nangu ukunwa amenshi." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Yawe epakumpeela amabwe ayapapatala yabili apalembele ukuboko kwakwa Lesa. Pa mabwe ayapapatala palembelwe ifyebo fyonse ifyo Yawe abilile kuli imwe ukufuma mu mulilo pa bushiku mwalongene ku lupili. 
Deuteronomy9:11 Panuma ya nshiku amakumi yane (40), akasuba no bushiku, Yawe epakumpeela amabwe ayapapatala yabili apalembelwe icipangano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati, ‘Endesha ukubwelelamo nombalinefye, pantu abantu bobe abo wafumishe mu Egupto nabalubana. Tabakokwele kupatuka mufyo nabakonkomesha, nabaipangila akalubi ka cela.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Kabili Yawe epakunjeba ati, ‘Nimona ukuti aba bantu ni bankosa mitwe icine cine!" 
Deuteronomy9:14 Ndekafye mbalofye pakuti mfuute ne shina lyabo pano calo. Elyo iwe nkakulenga ukaba umushobo uwamaka kabili uukalamba ukubacila.’ 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Kanshi na ine epakupilibuka natentemuka ulupili, ninsenda na mabwe ayapapatala yabili aya cipangano mu minwe yandi, ilyo ninshi ulupili lulebilimafye umulilo." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ilyo naloleshe, namwene ukuti namubifya kuli Yawe Lesa wenu. Mwaipangile icilubi ca ciponti ca ŋombe ica golide. Tamwakokwele kupula mwifunde ilyo Yawe amukonkomeshe." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Na ine epakubuula amabwe ayapapatala yabili ayali mu minwe yandi nayaposa, nayatobaula no kutobaula na pa cinso cenu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Elyo kabili nawa ubukupeme pa cinso cakwa Yawe, nshalelya cakulya nangu ukunwa amenshi. Napwile inshiku amakumi yane (40), akasuba no bushiku. Ico nacitile ifyo ni pa mulandu wabubifi mwacita pakucita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kulenga akalipe." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ine natiinine ubukali ne cipyu cakwa Yawe, pantu alikalipe nganshi, kwempefye no kumulofya. Lelo nakabili Yawe aliŋumfwile." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Kabili Yawe alifulilwe Aroni nganshi kwempefye no kumulofya, lelo pa nshita ine ilya nao wine nalimupapatileko." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Kanshi na ine epakubuula icabubifi cenu, iciponti mwaipangile, nacoca mu mulilo. Elyo nacishonaula cabafye ulukungu, nayaposa no lukungu mu kamana kalefuma pa mulu wa lupili." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Kabili mwalengele Yawe akalipe ilyo mwali ku Tabera, na ku Masa, na ku Kibroti Hatafa." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Kabili na ku Kadeshi Banea ilyo Yawe amutumine amwebele ati, ‘Kabiyeni muye poka icalo namupeela.’ Nako kwine mwalitalamine ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu amukonkomeshe. Tamwamucetekele nangu ukumubeela." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Mulatalamina Yawe ukufumafye apo namwishibila. 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Kanshi nalele ubukupeme pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa nshiku amakumi yane (40), akasuba no bushiku, pantu Yawe atile ali nokumulofya." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ine nalepapata Yawe nati, ‘We Mfumu Yawe, napapata wilofya abantu bobe abacishilano abo walubula no kubafumya mu calo ca Egupto ku maka yobe no kuboko kobe ukwabulamba." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ibukisha ababomfi bobe, Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo. Wilolesha pali bucintomfwa bwa aba bantu na ku bubi bwabo na kufyo babifishe." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Epali abena Egupto balasosa abati, “Pantu Yawe alifilwa ukubatwala mu calo abalaile, kabili alibapata, eco abasendele mu matololo pakuti abepaye.”" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Lelo aba bantu bena, bobe abacishilano abo wafumya mu calo ca Egupto ku maka yobe ayakalamba no kuboko kobe ukwatambalala.’”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Na pa nshita ilya Yawe anjebele ati, ‘Pekanya amabwe ayapapatala yabili nga yalya ayapakubala, elyo wise kuli ine pa mulu wa lupili. Kabili upange ne mbokoshi iya fimuti." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Nkalemba pa mabwe amashiwi nga yalya nalembele pa mabwe yapakubala ayo watobele. Elyo ukayabike na mu mbokoshi.’ 
Deuteronomy10:3 Kanshi na ine epakupanga imbokoshi ya mbao ya cimuti ca akasia, napekanya na mabwe ayapapatala yabili nga yalya ayapakubala. Nanina no lupili na mabwe ayapapatala yabili mu minwe yandi." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Kanshi Yawe epakulemba pali yalya mabwe amashiwi yamo yene nga yakubalilapo, e fyebo ikumi limo ifyo amupeele ilyo alebila kuli imwe ukufuma mu mulilo, bulya bushiku mwalongene ku lupili. Elyo Yawe ayapeela kuli ine." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Kabili na ine epakwaluluka, natentemuka no lupili no kubika na mabwe ayapapatala mu mbokoshi intu napangile. Umo yacili na nomba, ngefyo Yawe ankonkomeshe.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Abena Israeli balifumine ku fishima fya bena Yaakani, baya na ku Mosera. Kulya kwine eko Aroni aya fwila, no kushiika eko bamushiikile. Umwana wakwe Eleasa ewamupyene pali bushimapepo." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Ukufuma kulya baya ku Gudigoda, kabili batwalilila no kuya ku Yotibata, icalo icabamo utumana utwingi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Pa nshita ilya Yawe aipatwilile aba mu luko lwa bena Levi ukulasenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe no kulabomba nga bashimapepo pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kulapaala amapaalo mwishina lyakwe. Ukufika na lelo ebabomba uyu mulimo. 
Deuteronomy10:9 E mulandu wine abena Levi bashapeelelweko icakaniko nangu icishilano pakati ka bamunyina. Yawe e cishilano cabo, ngefyo Yawe Lesa wenu abebele.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Kanshi napwile inshiku amakumi yane (40) pa lupili, akasuba no bushiku, nga filya nacitile pakubala, nalyo line Yawe aliŋumfwile. Tacali bufwayo bwakwe ukumulofya." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati, ‘Kabiye, kabili ubatungulule mu nshila, pakuti bakengile no kupoka icalo ico nalaile ifikolwe fyabo ukubapeela.’”" 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Kanshi nomba we Israeli, cinshi Yawe Lesa obe afwaya ulecita? Ala, kuba na katiina kuli Yawe Lesa obe, ukwenda mu nshila shakwe, ukumutemwa, ukutumika Yawe Lesa obe no mutima obe onse no mweo obe onse," 
Deuteronomy10:13 no kubaka amafunde ne fipope fyakwa Yawe ifyo ndekweba ilelo nga cikakuwamine. 
Deuteronomy10:14 Nangu umulu pamo pene ne myulu ya mumulu, isonde na fyonse ifyabamo, fyonsefye fyakwa Yawe Lesa obe." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Nomba Yawe abikile umutima pa fikolwe fyenu no kufitemwa, epakumusala imwe mwe ba mu ndupwa shabo, ukucila aba mishobo imbi ngefyo cili ukushinta ilelo." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Kanshi imwe mulebeela Yawe, kabili mwilaba bankosa mitwe." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Pantu Yawe, Lesa wenu, ni Lesa wa milungu kabili ni Mfumu ya shamfumu, Lesa Mukulu, uwamaka, uwakukwatila akatiina, taba na mucishacinani, kabili tapoka mafisakanwa." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Acita umulinganya kuli bakashiwa na bamukamfwilwa, alitemwa na beni, eubapeela ifyakulya ne fyakufwala." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Kabili na imwe bene mulingile ukutemwa abeni, pantu na imwe mwali abeni mu Egupto." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Muleba na katiina kuli Yawe Lesa wenu, kabili eo muletumika. Mulekonena kuli ena no kulapa mulelapila mwishina lyakwe." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Mulemulumbanya, ni Lesa wenu, uwamucitile ifintu ifikalamba, ifipapwa fyakutiinya ifyo mwaimwenene na menso yenu." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Ifikolwe fyenu ifyaile ku Egupto fyalifye amakumi cine lubali (70) fyonse pamo. Nomba Yawe Lesa wenu namusandulula, mulifye nge ntanda sha mu mulu ku bwingi.”" 
Deuteronomy11:1 Kabili Mose atile, “Muletemwa Yawe Lesa wenu, mulekonka ifyo afwaya, amafunde, ifipope ne fyebo fyakwe." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Mwibukishe ilelo ukuti te bana benu bamwene no kwishiba ukusambilisha kwakwa Yawe Lesa wenu, ubucindami bwakwe, ukuboko kwakwe ukwabulamba no kuboko kwakwe ukwatambalala," 
Deuteronomy11:3 ne fisungusho acitile, na fyonse ifyo acitile mukati ka calo ca Egupto, kuli Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto na ku calo cakwe conse." 
Deuteronomy11:4 Mwibukishe ifyo Yawe acitile ifita fya bena Egupto, kumo kwine na bakabalwe babo na maceleta yabo, ifyo banwenene muli Bemba Wakashika ilyo bamusupile panuma, nefyo Yawe abalofya mpaka na lelo." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Te bana benu bamwene ifyo Yawe amucitile mu matololo ilyo tamulati mwise pali ino ncende. 
Deuteronomy11:6 Mwibukishe ifyo acitile kuli Datani na Abiramu, abana abaume bakwa Eliabu, uwa luko lwakwa Rubeni, ilyo umushili waceneme no kubamina kumo kwine ne ndupwa shabo, amatenti yabo na fyonse ifyo bakwete mu menso ya bena Israeli." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Lelo menso yenu yaimwenene ifintu fyonse ifyakupapa ifyo Yawe acita.” 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Mulekonka amafunde yonse ayo nalamupeela ilelo, pakuti mukabe na maka ayakupoka icalo ico mwalaswa mwingilemo ilyo mwalayabuka Yordani." 
Deuteronomy11:9 Kabili epakuti mukaye ikala inshita iyitali mu calo ico Yawe alaile ukupeela ifikolwe fyenu pamo na ba mu ndupwa shabo, icalo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Icalo mwalayabukilamo no kucipoka, tacili nge calo ca Egupto ico mwafumako, uko mwalebyala imbuto no kushitapilila nganshi kwati ni mwibala lya musalu." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Nomba icalo mwalayabukilamo no kucipoka calo ca mpili na mawanga, umuloka imfula ukufuma mu mulu." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Calo ico Yawe Lesa wenu asunga. Amenso yakwa Yawe Lesa wenu lyonse epo yalolesha ukufuma ku kutampa kwa mwaka mpaka na ku mpela. 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Kanshi imwe nga mukalakonka amafunde bwino bwino ayo namupeela ilelo, ayakutemwa Yawe Lesa wenu no kulamubombela ne mitima yenu yonse ne myeo yenu yonse," 
Deuteronomy11:14 lyena ninshi nkalamutumina imfula mu calo cenu ilyo ilekabilwa, pa mibundo na mu mainsa, pakuti mukalesombola iŋanu, umwangashi upya, na mafuta ya miolifa." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Nkamesha ifyani mu mabala ifyakuti iŋombe shenu shikalelya, kabili na imwe mukalalya no kwikuta." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Muleba abacenjela epali mwasangukila Yawe no kulapepa imilungu imbi no kulaifukamina.
