Deuteronomy30:16 Pantu ilelo namukonkomesha ukutemwa Yawe Lesa wenu, ukulaenda mu nshila shakwe kabili no kulasunga amafunde yakwe, amalango yakwe ne fipope fyakwe. Lyena mukaba no bumi, kabili mukasanduluka, na Yawe Lesa wenu akamupaala mu calo mwalaingilamo no kucipoka." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Lelo nga cakuti imitima yenu yatalama, mwakaana no kulabeela, kabili nga cakuti mwalakonkelela ukulafukamina no kupepa imilungu imbi," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ine ndemweba ilelo ukuti cine cine mukaloba. Tamwakakokolemo muli cilya calo mwalaabukila Yordani ukwingilamo no kucipoka. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ilelo naita umulu ne calo ukuba bakambone bandi pali imwe ukuti nabika pa cinso cenu ubumi ne mfwa, amapaalo no kulapisha. Nomba salenipo ubumi pakuti imwe na bana benu mukabe abomi." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Muletemwa Yawe Lesa wenu, muleumfwa kwishiwi lyakwe kabili eo mulekonenamo. Pantu Yawe e bumi bwenu, kabili akamupeela ukwikala imyaka iyingi mu calo ico alaile ifikolwe fyenu, Abrahamu, Isaki, na Yakobo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Elyo Mose aile landa ku bena Israeli bonse amashiwi aya ati," 
Deuteronomy31:2 “Ine nomba ndi ne myaka umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120) kabili nshikwete maka yakumutungulula. Yawe nanjeba ukuti, ‘Tawakabuke mumana wa Yordani.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Yawe Lesa wenu umwine eukamutangilila pakwabuka. Akalofya iyi mishobo ili ku ntanshi yenu, kabili mukapoka ne calo cabo. Yoshua nao eukamutangilila ukwabuka ngefyo Yawe asosele." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Kabili Yawe akabacita ngefyo acitile kuli Sihoni na Ogi, imfumu sha bena Amoli, abo alofeshe pamo ne calo cabo." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Yawe akabaposa mu minwe yenu, elyo muli nokubacita ngefyo namukonkomeshe." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Mukose kabili mushipe. Mwitiina nangu ukukwata umwenso pa mulandu wabo, pantu Yawe Lesa wenu akulaba na imwe, takamushe nangu ukumulekelesha.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Elyo Mose aita Yoshua pa cinso ca bena Israeli bonse alamweba ati, “Kosa kabili ushipe, pantu ufwile ukuya na aba bantu mu calo ico Yawe alapile ku fikolwe fyabo ukubapeela. Kabili ufwile ukucakanya pakati kabo nge cacishilano cabo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Yawe umwine ewakulakutangilila, kabili akulaba nobe. Takakushe nangu ukukulekelesha. Tecakwesha kutiina kabili tecakwesha kunenuka iyoo.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Kanshi Mose epakulemba aya mafunde kabili ayapeela kuli bashimapepo, bamwana Levi abaume, abalesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe, elyo na ku bakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Elyo Mose abakonkomesha ati, “Pa mpela ya cila mwaka walenga cine lubali, mu mwaka wakusuula ku nkongole, pa nshikunkulu ya Nsakwe," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ilyo abena Israeli bonse baisa mukumonekela ku cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu, pa ncende iyo akasala, mukalebelenga aya mafunde pa cinso cabo ilyo balekutika." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Mukalekolonganika abantu, abaume, abanakashi na bana, pamo na benafyalo abekala mu misumba yenu, pakuti bakaleumfwa no kusambilila ukukwatila Yawe Lesa wenu akatiina, kabili bakalekonka bwino na mashiwi yonse aya mafunde aya." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Abana babo abashaishiba aya mafunde bafwile baleyomfwako pakuti basambilile ukulatiina Yawe Lesa wenu pa nshitafye yonse mukalaikala mu calo ico mwalayabukila Yordani mukucipoka.” 
Deuteronomy31:14 Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Mona shapalama inshiku shobe ishakufwa, ita Yoshua, mwise kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo, uko ndi nokumupeelela imilimo.” Kanshi Mose na Yoshua epakuya iminina kwi Tenti Lyakukumaninamo." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Elyo Yawe nao epakumonekela pe Tenti mu ntumba ye kumbi, elyo intumba ye kumbi yaiminine lwa pa mwinshi we Tenti." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Elyo Yawe aebele Mose ati, “Iwe uli nokuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyobe. Lelo aba bantu tabakakokole balampondokela mukuikowesha muli bucilende bwakupepa imilungu ya benafyalo iya mu calo balaingilamo. Bali nokumpondokela nokonaula icipangano ico twapangene nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Pali ubo bushiku ine nkabafulilwa no kubasuulako. Nkafisa icinso candi uko bali, elyo bakaloba. Ifinkunka ifingi fikabaponena, na mafya ayengi yakabeshila, kabili pa bushiku bulya bakepusha abati, ‘Bushe ifi finkunka tafitufikile pa mulandu wakuti Lesa natusenguka?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Mu cinefye nkafisa icinso candi pali bulya bushiku pa mulandu wa kubifya kwabo ukwakupilibukila ku milungu imbi. 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Nomba ilembeleni ulu lwimbo mwe bene. Kabili iwe Mose, ulusambilishe na ku bena Israeli elyo balwimbe no kulwimba pakuti lukabe e lukambone lwandi pali bena." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ilyo nkabatwala mu calo umufumfumuka umukaka no buci, icalo nalaile no mulapo ku fikolwe fyabo, kabili ilyo balya baikuta no kwina baina, bakapilibukilila ku milungu imbi no kuipepa, bakankaana, bakonaula ne cipangano candi." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Kabili ilyo ifinkunka na mafya fikabeshila, ulu lwimbo lukabashinina, pantu aba mu ndupwa shabo tabakalulabe. Neli line nshilati mbengishe mu calo nabalaile no mulapo ukubapeela, ninjishiba ifintu baletontonkanya ukucita.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Kanshi Mose ubo bwine bushiku epakulemba ulu lwimbo no kulusambilisha ku bena Israeli. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Yawe akonkomesha Yoshua mwana Nuni ati, “Iwe shipa, kabili ukose pantu niwe ukatungulula abana bakwa Israeli mu calo nabalaile no mulapo, kabili ine wine nkalaba na iwe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Panuma Mose apwile ukulemba amashiwi mu citabo ca mafunde aya, ukufuma kukwamba mpaka na kumpela," 
Deuteronomy31:25 akonkomeshe abena Levi abalesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe ati," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Sendeni ici citabo ca mafunde, muye cibika lubali lwa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu. Palya pene epo cikalaikala nga cikambone icakumushinina." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Pantu nalishiba bucisanguka na bunkosamitwe bwenu. Nga cakuti kuti mwasangukila Yawe ilyo ncili umumi kabili pamo na imwe, palibufi nga nafwa!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Longanikeni pa cinso candi abakalamba bonse aba nko shenu na bacilolo bonse, pakuti nande aya mashiwi ninshi balekutika elyo njite umulu ne calo fibe efyakubashinina." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Pantu ninjishiba ukuti pa numa ya mfwa yandi namwishiba bwino ifyo mukailufyanya kabili no kufuma kufyo namukonkomesha. Mu nshiku ishikesa, ifinkunka fikamuponena pantu mukacita ifyabipa pa menso yakwa Yawe no kumulenga akalipe pa mulandu wa ifyo iminwe yenu yapanga.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Elyo Mose asosele amashiwi ya lwimbo ulu ukufuma pakwamba mpaka pa mpela, ninshi ibumba lyonse ilya bena Israeli lilekutika." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Umfweni mwe myulu, na ine nalalanda, umfwa we calo, amashiwi ya mu kanwa kandi." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Lekeni ukufunda kwandi kuloke nge mfula, na mashiwi yandi yalewa ngo mume, ngo kumima kwa mfula pa mulemfwe, nge mfula iyingi ileloka pa lulembelya." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ine nkalasabankanya ishina lyakwa Yawe. Mulelondolola ubulumbwa bwa bucindami bwakwa Lesa wesu! 
Deuteronomy32:4 Ena e cilibwe, ne milimo yakwe yaba iyapwililika, kabili ne nshila shakwe shintu shalungama. Lesa wacishinka uushicita cilubo, mololoke kabili wamulinganya." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Bena bacitile ifyalubana ku nsoni shabo, tabali nomba bana bakwe, lelo bantu baulungana kabili inkulo yabucenjeshi." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Bushe uyu e musango mwingatashishamo Yawe, mwe fipumbu kabili mwe mpelwamano sha bantu? Bushe te Shinwe, Kabumba wenu, uwamupanga no kumubumba?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Ibukisheni inshiku shakale ishapita, tontonkanyeni pa nkulo shapita kale, ipusheni bashinwe nabo balamweba, abakalamba benu, nabo balemulondolwela." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Ilyo Lesa Mukulu apeele imishobo ifyacishilano fyabo, ilyo apatulwile abantu bonse, ewapakenye imipaka ku bantu ukulingana ne mpendwa ya bana baume bakwa Lesa." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Pantu icakaniko cakwa Yawe bantu bakwe, Yakobo e cishilano cakwe." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Mu calo ca matololo emo asangile Yakobo, mu ciswebebe kabili umwakungulika ku cimwela ca lukungu. Amucingilila no kumusunga. Alamusunga nge imboni ya linso lyakwe," 
Deuteronomy32:11 kwati ni kapumpe uulesunga icisansala cakwe no kulelemba pali bamwane, ayansa amapindo yakwe pakubaanka kabili abasenda pa mapindo yakwe." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Yawe ekafye ewamutungulwile, takwali mulungu wa benafyalo uwali nankwe." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Alenga Yakobo ukunina pa ncende ishasansuka pa calo, no kumulisha ifisabo fya mu mabala. Amulisha no buci bwa mu mabwe, na mafuta ku miolifa ya mu nsakalabwe," 
Deuteronomy32:14 no mukaka uwatikama no wasongoloka uwalefuma ku fitekwa, imbushi ne mpaanga ishaina, na basukusuku abasalwa aba ku Bashani, pamo ne mitwe ya ŋanu ishisuma. Wanwene no mwangashi uwabila." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Yeshuruni aliinine, elyo alaitutumuna, ilyo aleikuta ifyakulya, atuluka no kutelela. Asangukile Lesa uwamubumbile no kusuule Cilibwe, Umupusushi wakwe." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Balengele Yawe ukuba no bufuba pa mulandu wa milungu yabo iya benafyalo, kabili balimukalifye pa mulandu wa tulubi twabo utushaibipila." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Baletuula amalambo ku mipashi iyakowela, iyishali imilungu, imilungu bashatalile abeshiba, imilungu iyalifye iyipya, imilungu ifikolwe fyenu fishatalile afitiina." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Mwasuulile Icilibwe, icali Shinwe. Mwalabile Lesa intulo ya bumi bwenu." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Ilyo Yawe amwene ifi, abakaana, pantu balimukalifye umutima abana bakwe abaume na banakashi." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Epakusosa ati, “Nkafisa icinso candi uko bali, elyo nkamona impela yabo ifyo ikaba. Pantu ni nkulo iyaulungana, abana ababula icishinka." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Banengele ukuba no bufuba pa mulandu wa cishili umulungu, kabili bankalifye ku tulubi twabo utwaciwelewele. Nkalenga ukuti bakabe no mufimbila ku bantu abashaba mushobo wine wine, Nkalenga ukuti bakafulwe ku mushobo wa fiwelewele fya bantu." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Pantu umulilo naukoshiwa ku bukali bwandi, uwaka ukufika na ku calo ca bafwa, Ukonaula icalo no busomboshi bwaciko, kabili ukoca napo impili shaiminina." 
Deuteronomy32:23 “Nkatulika ifinkunka pali bena, kabili nkapwisha imifwi yandi pali bena." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Nkabaletela icipowe icakubapwa icinkunka cakubonaula ne cikuko icikali. Nkabaletela ameno ya fiswango, no busungu bwa nsoka ishikulaika mu lukungu." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Panse ulupanga lukalenga ukufwilwa abana, mu mayanda mukalaletesha umwenso. Abalumendo na bakashana bakafwa, utwa ku mabele na bakote abaume bakafwila kumo." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ine natile nkabapasa, pakuti bekalaibukishiwa ku bantu," 
Deuteronomy32:27 Lelo natiinine ukusonsomba kwa balwani, epali umulwani afilwa ukumfwa, elyo asosa ati, ‘Ukuboko kwesu nakucimfya. Yawe teucitile ifi, iyoo!’ ”" 
Deuteronomy32:28 Umushobo uyu tawakwata mano, Tamwaba kwiluka muli bena." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Nga cakutilafye bali bamano kabili kuti baishiba umo cilolele ici no kwiluka pafyo impela yabo ingaba! 
Deuteronomy32:30 Bushe umuntu umo kuti afulumuna shani abantu ikana limo (1,000), nangu abantu babili kuti babutusha shani abantu abali amakana ikumi (10,000)? Kanofye ninshi Icilibwe cabo nacibashitisha, kanofye ninshi Yawe nabasuulako." 
Deuteronomy32:31 Pantu ilibwe lyabo talyaba nge Cilibwe cesu, apo na balwani besu balisumina." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Umwangashi wabo ufuma ku mwangashi wa ku Sodoma, kabili ufuma mu mabala ya mu Gomora. Ifitwalo fyaiko fyaisulamo ubusungu, kabili ifisansangu fyaiko fintu fyalula." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Umwangashi wabo busungu bwa nsoka, ubusungu ubukali ubwa bangoshe." 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Bushe nshabika ifi mu butala, kabili no kufimashilila mu cipao?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Ne mwine wacilandushi nine, kabili nkabakanda. Inshita ikafika ilyo amakasa yabo yakashelela, ubushiku bwabo ubwa finkunka nabupalama, kabili ne shamo lileisa ulubilo pali bena.”" 
Deuteronomy32:36 Yawe akapokolola abantu bakwe, kabili akakwatila ababomfi bakwe uluse ilyo akamona ukuti nomba amaka yabo nayapwa, kabili tapali nangu umo uushelepo, umusha nangu umuntungwa." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Elyo Yawe akatila, “Nomba imilungu yabo ili kwi, iyi balebutukilako nge cilibwe cakubacingililako?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Imilungu ili kwi iyalelya amafuta ya malambo yabo, kabili iyalenwa umwangashi wa mutuulo wa fyakunwa? Lekeni eyo ime imwafweko! Lekeni eyo imucingilile!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 “Moneni nomba ukuti ine wine nine Lesa. Takwaba umulungu umbi ukucila pali ine. Ndepaya kabili ndabusha ku bafwa, ndacena kabili ndaposha, kabili takwaba nangu umo uwingapokolola ukufuma mu minwe yandi." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Naimya ukuboko kwandi mu mulu no kusosa ukuti, apofye ine ndi Lesa Umumi wape," 
Deuteronomy32:41 ilyo nanona ulupanga lwandi ulwabeka, kabili no kuboko kwandi kwalwikata pakupingula, nkacita icilandushi pa balwani bandi, nkakanda na balya abampata." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Nkalenga imifwi yandi ikaletona imilopa, ilyo ulupanga lwandi lulesantaula iminofu, umulopa wa baipaiwa no wa bankole, imitwe ya ntungulushi sha balwani.”" 
Deuteronomy32:43 Sansamukeni, mwe mishobo pamo na bantu bakwe. Pantu akalandula umulopa wa babomfi bakwe. Ali nokucita icilandushi pa balwani bakwe, elyo akafutileko icalo na bantu bakwe." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mose baishile na Yoshua mwana Nuni no kulanda amashiwi yonse aya ulu lwimbo ninshi abantu baleumfwa. 
Deuteronomy32:45 Ilyo Mose apwile ukusosa amashiwi yonse aya ku bena Israeli bonse," 
Deuteronomy32:46 atile kuli bena, “Mulebika mu mitima amashiwi yonse ayo nasosa mu cine ilelo, pakuti mulekonkomesha abana benu ukulabeela bwino amashiwi yonse aya mafunde aya." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Te mashiwi yafyefye kuli imwe, e bumi bwenu. Muli yena emo mukekala inshiku ishingi mu calo mwalayabukila Yordani mukucipoka.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Pa bushiku bumo bwine Yawe aebele Mose ati," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Nina ulupili lwa Nebo, ulwa mu mpili sha Abarimu, mu calo ca Moabu, ukulungatana no musumba wa Yeriko, utambe icalo ca Kenani, ico ine nalapeela abena Israeli ukuba icuma cabo." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Pali lulya lwine lupili walanina epo uleya fwila no kuya lala ukwalala abantu bobe, nga filya fine munonko Aroni afwilile pa lupili lwa Hori no kuya lala ukwalala abantu bakwe." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Pantu imwe bonse babili tamwancetekele pa cinso ca bena Israeli pa cishima ca ku Meriba Kadeshi mu matololo ya Sini, kabili pantu tamwalangile ukuti ndi wamushilo pa cinso ca bena Israeli." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Eico ulemonakofye cilya calo akatalamukila, tawakengilemo mu calo ndepeela abena Israeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ili e paalo Mose umuntu wakwa Lesa apaalile abana bakwa Israeli ilyo talafwa. 
Deuteronomy33:2 Atile, “Yawe afumine ku lupili lwa Sinai, kabili asanikile pali bena ukufuma ku Seiri, abengeshime ukufuma pa lupili lwa Parani. Aishile na bamushilo amakana na makana, ukufuma ku kapinda ka kulyo, ku mukunkuluko wa lupili lwakwe." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Cine cine niwe we watemwa abantu, abamushilo bonse baba mu kuboko kobe. Pa nkasa shobe epo bonse bafukama, kabili ni kuli iwe eko bapoka amafunde," 
Deuteronomy33:4 amafunde ayo Mose atupeela, icuma ce bumba lyakwa Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Ewali Imfumu mu Yeshuruni, ilyo intungulushi sha bantu shalongene, pamo pene ne nko sha bena Israeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:6 “Lekeni Rubeni abe umumi kabili efwa, nangu abantu bakwe abaume babe abanono.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Kabili ifi efyo alandile pali Yuda, “Umfwa, we Yawe inkuuta shakwa Yuda, mubweseshe ku bantu bakwe. Ni ku maboko yakwe eko aicingilila. Ube kafwa wakwe ku balwani bakwe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Palwakwa Levi atile, “Utumabwe twa Tumimu na Urimu tuntu twa muntu uwakupetamina we Lesa. Walimweseshe ku Masa, walimumenye pa menshi ya ku Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Palwakwa wishi na nyina atile, ‘Ine nshabakwatila mucinshi.’ Akeene bamunyina, kabili asuulile abana bakwe, lelo asungile ishiwi lyobe, no kubaka icipangano cobe." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Eufunda ifipope fyobe kuli Yakobo na mafunde yobe kuli Israeli. Eukufutumwina no bubani pa cinso cobe kabili eukulekela amalambo yakoca pa bulambo bobe. 
Deuteronomy33:11 We Yawe, paala ukucenjela kwakwe konse, kabili usekele mu milimo ya maboko yakwe. Ushonaule imisana ya balwani bakwe abamwimina. Sansa ifipondo fyakwe mpakafye fiikema nakabili.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Palwakwa Benjamini atile, “Lekeni umutemwikwa wakwa Yawe atusheko mu bucingo bwakwe, pantu Yawe eumucingililako inshiku shonse, kabili uyo Yawe atemwa alamusunsa pa mabeya yakwe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Palwakwa Yosefu atile, “Yawe apaala icalo cakwe ku mume uusuma ukufuma ku mulu, na ku menshi ayaba pesamba," 
Deuteronomy33:14 ku fyawamisha ifileta akasuba ne fimena cila mweshi," 
Deuteronomy33:15 ku fisabo ifyawamisha ifya mu mpili shakale, kabili no bwingi bwa fisabo fya mu tupili twape," 
Deuteronomy33:16 ku fyabupe ifyawamisha ifya mu calo na fyonse ifyaisulamo, kabili no kutemwikwa kwa kuli uyo uwikele mu cimpusa icalebilima umulilo. Lekeni fyonse ifi fibe pa mutwe wakwa Yosefu, uwapatilwe pali bamunyina." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Mu bucindami ali kwati libeli lya cilume wa ŋombe, insengo shakwe shaba nge nsengo sha mboo. Esho apunkilako imishobo, neyo ine iyabafye ku mpela ye sonde. Bena e makana imintapendwa yakwa Efulemu. Bena makana yakwa Manase.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Palwakwa Sebuloni atile, “Ulesansamuka, Sebuloni mu nyendo shobe na iwe Isaka mu matenti yobe." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Bakalaita abantu ku mpili, uko bakalalekela amalambo ya bulungami, bakalalya ifingi ifya muli bemba, na mu fyuma fyafisama mu musensenga.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Palwakwa Gadi atile, “Alipaalwa uwakusha icalo cakwa Gadi! Gadi ekala kulya nge nkalamo, iyilesantaula ukuboko nangu umutwe." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Ena aisalilepo icalo cawamisha, bamusungile iciputulwa ca ntungulushi. Ilyo abakalamba ba bantu balongene, acitile ififwaya Yawe, acita no bupingushi bwakwa Yawe pali Israeli.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Palwakwa Dani atile, “Dani ena mwana wa nkalamo, uufwampuka ukufuma mu calo ca Bashani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Palwakwa Naftali atile, “Ukutemwa kwakwa Yawe kwalifulisha pali Naftali, kabili aisulamofye amapaalo yakwe, icishilano cakwe cikatampila ku kapinda ka kulyo ukuya shinta kuli bemba.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Palwakwa Asheri atile, “Asheri e wapaalwa nganshi ukucila pa bana bonse, naletemwikwa kuli bamunyina, nalesamba amakasa yakwe mu mafuta." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Ifyakukakila impongolo fikaba fya fyela no mukuba, elyo na maka yobe yakalingana ne nshiku shobe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Takwaba nangu umo uwaba nga Lesa wa ku Yeshuruni, uwenda mu lwelele pakumwafwa elyo na mu makumbi mu bucindami bwakwe." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Lesa wa pe na pe e cubo cobe, kabili na mwisamba lyobe e muli amaboko ya pe na pe. Akalafulumuna umulwani obe pa cinso cobe, akasosa ati, ‘Mulofyeni!’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Kanshi Israeli akaikalila umutelelwe umwine ekafye. Akamfukumfuku kakwa Yakobo kalicingililwa mu calo ca ŋanu no mwangashi upya, uko imyulu ilosha umume." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Walishuka iwe we Israeli! Nani uwaba nga iwe, abantu abo Yawe apususha? Ena e nkwela yobe kabili e kafwa obe, ena e lupanga lobe ulwalulumbi. Abalwani bobe bakalacimba kuli iwe, kabili ukanyantaula incende bapepelamo isho bacindika.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Elyo Mose aninine ulupili lwa Nebo ukufuma ku mawanga ya Moabu ukufikafye na pa mulu wa lupili lwa Pisiga, ukulungatana no musumba wa Yeriko. Kulya kwine eko Yawe amulangile icalo conse, ukutendekela ku Gileadi no kufika ku Dani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 icalo conse icakwa Naftali, ne fitungu fyakwa Efulemu na Manase, icalo conse icakwa Yuda ukuya fikafye na kuli bemba wa ku masamba," 
Deuteronomy34:3 ku matololo ya Negebu ne citungu conse ukufuma kwishika lya Yeriko, umusumba wa Tuncindu, no kufika ku Sowa." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Elyo Yawe aeba Mose ati, “Ici e calo nalaile no mulapo kuli Abrahamu, Isaki, na Yakobo ilyo natile nkacipeela ku ndupwa shabo. Nkulengele ukuti iwe ucimonekofye na menso yobe, lelo tawakaabukilemo no kwingilamo.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Kanshi Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe, epakufwila mulya mu Moabu, nge shiwi Yawe asosele." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Yawe nao amushiika mu Moabu, mwishika ukulungatana na Beti Peori. Lelo ukushinta na nomba tapaba uwaishiba apabela uluputa lwakwe." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mose ali ne myaka umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120) ilyo afwile, lelo amenso yakwe tayanakwike nangu amaka yakwe ukupwa." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Abena Israeli bamulooseshe mu mawanga ya Moabu inshiku amakumi yatatu (30), mpakafye inshita yakuloosha no kulila yapwa." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Nomba Yoshua mwana Nuni aisushiwa no Mupashi wamano, pantu Mose alimutambalikilepo amaboko. Kanshi abena Israeli epakulaumfwila Yoshua, kabili nao alecitafye ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Ukufuma lilya line, takwatala akuba kasesema nangu umo mu Israeli uwaba nga Mose uo Yawe aishibe no kuloleshanya nankwe amenso." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Kabili takwatala akuba uwacitile ifipeshamano ne finjelengwe nga filya Yawe atumine Mose ukuti aye acite mu Egupto, kuli Farao na kuli bacilolo bakwe, kabili na ku calo cakwe consefye." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Kabili takwaba kasesema nangu umo uwatala acita ifintu ifyamaka kabili ifyakutiinya nga filya Mose alecita pa cinso ca bena Israeli bonse. 
Joshua1:1 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Mose, umubomfi wakwa Yawe, Yawe aebele Yoshua umwana mwaume wakwa Nuni, kafwa wakwa Mose, ati," 
Joshua1:2 “Umubomfi wandi Mose nafwa. Eico kanshi nomba ima, iwe na bantu aba bonse, ipekanyeni mwabuke umumana wa Yordani no kuya mu calo ico nalapeela abena Israeli." 
Joshua1:3 Ndi nokumupeela icifulo conse apo mukanyanta amakasa yenu, pamo ngefyo nalaile Mose." 
Joshua1:4 Icalo cenu cikatampila ukufuma ku matololo ukufika na ku Lebanoni, kabili ukufuma ku mumana ukalamba uwa Yufurate, ne calo conse ca bena Hiti, mpaka no kufika kuli bemba mukalamba uwabela ku kapinda ka ku masamba." 
Joshua1:5 Takuli nangu umo uukaba na maka yakukulwisha, mu nshiku shonse isha mweo obe. Pamo nga filya fine naleba na Mose, efyo nakulaba na iwe. Nshakatale nkusha weka nangufye panono, lelo nkalaba na iwe lyonsefye." 
Joshua1:6 Ube uwakosa kabili uwashipa, pantu uli nokutungulula aba bantu kukukwata icalo ico nalapile kuli bashibo kukubapeela." 
Joshua1:7 Eico, kosafye kabili ushipe nganshi, ulekonka no kubeela bwino bwino amafunde yonse ayo umubomfi wandi Mose akukonkomeshe. Tecakwesha ukubwelela inuma, nangufye ukwalukila ku kulyo nangu ku kuso, epakuti ukaleshuka muli fyonse ifyo ukalacita konse uko waya." 
Joshua1:8 Tecakwesha ukulaba icitabo ca Mafunde ukuti cikalefuma pa kanwa kobe. Lelo ukaletontonkanyapo akasuba no bushiku, epakuti ulekonka bwino fyonse ifyalembwamo. Elyo lyena ukashuka mufyo ukalabomba no kufikilisha bwino mu milimo ukalabomba." 
Joshua1:9 Bushe nshikukonkomeshe? Iwe ukosefye kabili ube uwashipa? Tecakwesha ukuba no mwenso. Kabili tecakwesha ukubwelela inuma, pantu Yawe Lesa obe akulaba na iwe konse uko wakulaya.”" 
Joshua1:10 Elyo Yoshua apeele icipope kuli bacilolo ba bantu ati," 
Joshua1:11 “Pitaneni monse mu nkambi no kweba abantu bonse ukuti, ‘Mupekanye ifyakulya, pantu kwashalafye inshiku shitatu ninshi mwayabuka umumana wa Yordani no kuya poka icalo ico Yawe Lesa wenu amupeela ukuba icalo cenu.’”" 
Joshua1:12 Lelo ku bena Rubeni na bena Gadi kabili na citika wa luko lwa bena Manase, Yoshua atile," 
Joshua1:13 “Ibukisheni amashiwi ayo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe amukonkomeshe ayakuti, ‘Yawe Lesa wenu, nimwe akapeela iyi mpanga no kutuusha emo mukalatuusha.’" 
Joshua1:14 Abakashi benu, abana benu ne fitekwa fyonse fili nokushala mu mpanga iyo Mose apeele kuli imwe iya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka mumana wa Yordani. Lelo kuli imwe bonse mwe babulwi abaume, mwe baipangasha ifyanso fyakulwilako, nimwe mufwile ukubalilapo ukwabuka umumana, ilyo bamunyinenwe tabalati babuke. Nimwe mufwile ukubafwilishako," 
Joshua1:15 mpakafye nabo bene Yawe akabapeele ukutuusha, ngefyo acita kuli imwe. Nabo bene bakapoke icalo ico Yawe Lesa wenu ali nokubapeela. Elyo panuma ya ifyo, muli nokubwelelamo no kuya ikala mu calo cenu, ico Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe amupeele lwa ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani, ukufumina akasuba.”" 
Joshua1:16 Nabo bayasuka Yoshua abati, “Conse ico watukonkomesha ukucita, twakulacita, kabili konse uko watutuma ukuya twakulaya." 
Joshua1:17 Twakulakubeela pamo ngefyo twalebeela Mose. Cikulufye, Yawe Lesa obe aleba na iwe nga filya fine aleba na Mose." 
Joshua1:18 Kabili umuntu onse uwatalamina amashiwi yobe elyo nokukanabeela ifyo wakonkomesha, ali nokwipaiwa. Iwe, kosafye kabili ushipe!”" 
Joshua2:1 Kabili Yoshua umwana mwaume wakwa Nuni atumine mu bumfisolo inengu shibili ukufuma mu Shitimu no kusheba ati, “Kabiyeni, mumone icalo, makamaka ku musumba wa Yeriko.” Nabo baliile no kuya fikilila pa ŋanda ya mwanakashi umo uwali cilende ishina lyakwe Rahabu, epo balaikala." 
Joshua2:2 Imfumu ya mu musumba wa Yeriko baliyebele abati, “Mona! Abantu bamo abena Israeli nabesa kuno mu bushiku mukwisa lengula cino calo.”" 
Joshua2:3 Elyo imfumu ya mu Yeriko yatuma amashiwi kuli Rahabu ayakutila, “Fumisha panse abaume beshile kumobe abaleikala mu ŋanda yobe, pantu abo bantu baisa kuno mukulengula icalo cesu conse!”" 
Joshua2:4 Lelo uyu mwanakashi abuulile aba bantu babili no kubafisa. Elyo atile, “Ee, abaume aba baishile kuli ine, nomba ine nshaishibe uko bafumine." 
Joshua2:5 Elyo lilya paya palefitulukila, mupepi ne nshita yakwisalilapo umwinshi wa mpongolo, aba bantu elyo baile. Eico nshishibe ne nshila beleko. Kanshi angufyanyeni bwangu mubakonke, limbi kuti mwabasanga.”" 
Joshua2:6 Kanshi ninshi uyu mwanakashi abafishile pa mutenge mwisamba lya mwina wa bukonge uo alongele palya pa mutenge. 
Joshua2:7 Kanshi abaume abo imfumu yatumine epakukonka inengu mu musebo uwalola ku cabu ca mumana wa Yordani. Elyo cilyafye abakukonka inengu bafuma, baisala na pa mwinshi wa mpongolo." 
Joshua2:8 Ilyo inengu tashilati shisendame, Rahabu aya apo bali pa mutenge wa ŋanda," 
Joshua2:9 no kubeba ati, “Ine nalishiba ukuti Yawe alimupeela icalo ici, kabili tulemutiina nganshi. Eico na bonse abekashi ba muli cino calo baleitutuminafye ku mwenso pa mulandu wenu." 
Joshua2:10 Twalyumfwa ifyo Yawe akamishe amenshi muli Bemba Wakashika, ilyo mwafumine mu calo ca Egupto. Twalyumfwa nefyo mwacitile kuli Sihoni pamo na Ogi, imfumu shibili isha bena Amoli, kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani, abo imwe mwapeele kukonaulwa mukubalofya nakalya nakalya." 
Joshua2:11 Eico ilyo twaumfwile ifi, awe ne mitima yesu yalifumine, kabili pali ifwe tapali nelyo umo uwashele uwashipa. Pantu Yawe, Lesa wenu, e Lesa mu mulu na pano isonde ponse." 
Joshua2:12 Eico kanshi, ndemupapata ukuti mulaye kuli ine muli Yawe ukuti muli nokulanga uluse ku ba lupwa lwandi, pamo ngefyo na ine nangile uluse kuli imwe. Mpeeleni icishibilo cacine cine," 
Joshua2:13 icakuti muli nokupususha imyeo ya batata, bamayo, bandume yandi pamo na bankashi nandi. Kabili mukapususha ne ndupwa shesu shonse, no kupususha imyeo yesu ku mfwa!”" 
Joshua2:14 Inengu epakumwasuka ati, “Iwe nga wafwa, na ifwe bene kufwa.” Kabili shatile, “Icikulu tausokolwele umulandu twaisa mukucita, ifwe tuli nokwisa kusunga ilya nshita ilyo Yawe akatupeela icalo cino.”" 
Joshua2:15 Elyo Rahabu afumishe inengu ku ntambo pa windo, pantu iŋanda yakwe iyo aleikalamo yasuntinkene ne cibumba ce linga lya musumba." 
Joshua2:16 Abeba nokuti, “Lungamenifye ku mpili epakuti aba bantu balemufwaya bemusanga. Muye fisama kulya kwine pa nshiku shitatu mpaka aba bantu bakabwele, elyo lyena kuti mwakonkanyapo ubulendo.”" 
Joshua2:17 Elyo inengu shaeba Rahabu ashiti, “Uyu mulapo watwebele ukulaya tukafikilishafye nga cakuti," 
Joshua2:18 ilyo tukafika mu calo cino ukakake uyu mwando wakashika watwishisheko pa windo, kabili elyo ukalete bawiso na banoko, bandume yobe na balupwa bobe bonse bakese muno ŋanda yobe." 
Joshua2:19 Elyo cikaba ukuti umuntu umo nga afumina panse ya ŋanda yobe no kuya mu musebo, umulopa wakwe uli nokuba pa mutwe wakwe umwine. Tawakabe mulandu wesu nakalya. Lelo kuli uyo onse uuli mu ŋanda yobe pamo na iwe, umulopa wakwe uli nokuba pa mitwe yesu nga cakuti kwaba abamwipaya." 
Joshua2:20 Lelo nga cakuti wasokolola icintu twaishila kuno, ninshi lyena twalubuka ku mulapo watulenga ukuti tulape.”" 
Joshua2:21 Rahabu asumina ati, “Ee, nacibe ifyo fine mwasosa.” Elyo abalekele no kuya baya. Kabili asha akaka no mwando wakashika pa windo." 
Joshua2:22 Ilyo baile balungeme ku mpili, eko baya ikala inshiku shitatu, mpakafye abantu abalebafwaya babwelelamo ilyo banakile ukubafwaya monse mu misebo ukwabula ukubamona." 
Joshua2:23 Elyo ishi inengu shibili shatentemwike ulupili no kwabuka umumana ukubwelelamo kuli Yoshua mwana Nuni no kumweba fyonse ifyabacitikile. 
Joshua2:24 Shamwebele ashiti, “Icine cine Yawe napeela icalo conse mu maboko yesu, pantu abantu ba mu calo ici, baleitutuminafye pa mulandu wakutiina ifwe.”" 
Joshua3:1 Awe ulucelocelo Yoshua na bena Israeli bonse bafumine mu Shitimu no kulungama ku Yordani, uko baile cita inkambi ilyo tabalayabuka umumana wa Yordani." 
Joshua3:2 Panuma ya nshiku shitatu, abakalamba ba fita bapitana mu nkambi monse," 
Joshua3:3 balaeba abantu ifyebo abati, “Ilyo lyonse mwamona bashimapepo abena Levi nabasenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe Lesa wenu, mufwile na imwe bonse mukeme no kukonka." 
Joshua3:4 Ili lyena elyo mukeshiba inshila muli nokuyamo, pantu tamwatala amwishiba iyi inshila kale. Lelo mu kwenda kwenu mufwile ukubelako apatali ukulingana ne ntamfu ikana limo pakufika apabelele Imbokoshi ya Cipangano. Tecakwesha ukuba mupepi ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano.”" 
Joshua3:5 Elyo Yoshua aebele abantu ukutila, “Isangululeni mwe bene, pantu mailo Yawe ali nokucita ifipeshamano pakati kenu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Kabili Yoshua aebele bashimapepo ukuti, “Sendeni Imbokoshi ya Cipangano no kutangilila abantu kuntanshi.” Ifi fine efyo bacitile, basendele Imbokoshi ya Cipangano no kutangilila abantu kuntanshi." 
Joshua3:7 Elyo Yawe aeba Yoshua ati, “Ilelo line ine ndetampa ukukucindamika pa cinso ca bena Israeli bonse, pakuti beshibe ukuti ine nakulaba na iwe lyonse ngefyo naleba na Mose." 
Joshua3:8 Ukonkomeshe bashimapepo abalesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ukuti, ‘Ilyo mwalafika mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Yordani muye iminina mu menshi ya mumbali ya mumana.’”" 
Joshua3:9 Kabili Yoshua aeba abena Israeli ati, “Iseni kuno mukwisa umfwa amashiwi yakwa Yawe Lesa wenu." 
Joshua3:10 Kabili ifi efyo mwalaishibilako ukuti Lesa wamweo ali pakati kenu, kabili kuntanshi yenu ali nokutalusha abena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Hifi, abena Perisi, abena Girigashi, abena Amoli na bena Yebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Moneni ukuti Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ca Mfumu ye sonde lyonse ili nokubalilapo ukwabuka umumana wa Yordani. 
Joshua3:12 Eico kanshi, saleni abaume ikumi limo na babili ukufuma muli cila luko." 
Joshua3:13 Kabili ilyo linefye bashimapepo bakusenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe, Imfumu ye sonde lyonse, balanyanta inkasa shabo mu mumana wa Yordani, na menshi ayatentemukila ukwasuluka ukufuma ku mulundu yaleleka ukwenda no kupanga umwina kwati lupili.”" 
Joshua3:14 Kanshi ilyo abantu bapangulwile amatenti yabo no kuya kukwabuka umumana wa Yordani, ninshi bashimapepo abasenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano nabatangilila abantu." 
Joshua3:15 Nomba iyi yali ni nshita umumana wisula no kupoosa amenshi, mu nshiku shakulobolola. Elyo cilya abakusenda Imbokoshi bafika ku Yordani, banyanta na mu menshi mu mbali ya mumana," 
Joshua3:16 amenshi yonse ayalefuma ku mulundu, ku mulu wa mumana, yalekele ukupita. Awe yatulumanafye umwina ukulolafye ukutali ku musumba uo beta Adamu, uwali mupepi na Saretani, yapatulukana na yaleya kwisamba lya Bemba Wamucele, bemba wa Araba. Kanshi abantu bayabukile apalungatene no musumba wa Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Bashimapepo abalesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe, baiminina apauma ndi pakati ka mumana wa Yordani, ilyo abena Israeli balepitafye mpaka umushobo onsefye wapwa ukwabuka apauma." 
Joshua4:1 Ilyo umushobo onse wapwile ukwabuka umumana wa Yordani, Yawe asosele kuli Yoshua ati," 
Joshua4:2 “Sala abaume ikumi limo na babili. Muli cila luko usalemo umuntu umo. 
Joshua4:3 Elyo ubakonkomeshe auti, ‘Kabiyeni pakati ka mumana wa Yordani, palya pene peminine bashimapepo. Cila umo aye abuulepo ilibwe limo. Musende muye nayo ku nsakwe uko muleya sendama.’”" 
Joshua4:4 Elyo Yoshua aitile abantu abaume ikumi limo na babili abo asalile ukufuma muli cila luko lwa bena Israeli," 
Joshua4:5 alabeba ati, “Kabiyeni ku ntanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe Lesa wenu, pakati ka mumana wa Yordani. Elyo cila muntu abuule ilibwe no kusenda pa kubeya kwakwe, ukulingana ne mpendwa ya nko sha bena Israeli." 
Joshua4:6 Aya mabwe yakaba icishibilo pakati kenu. Eico ilyo abana benu bakalamwipusha abati, ‘Nga aya mabwe yanshi?’" 
Joshua4:7 Mukalabasuka amuti, ‘Amenshi ya mumana wa Yordani yalipatulwilwe pa mulandu wa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe. Ilyo yayabwike umumana wa Yordani, amenshi yalekele ukupita, mwabafye umwauma.’ Eico kanshi, aya mabwe yaba ya cibukisho ku bena Israeli pe na pe.”" 
Joshua4:8 Kanshi abena Israeli epakucita ifyo Yoshua abakonkomeshe. Bailebuula amabwe ikumi limo na yabili pakati ka mumana wa Yordani, ukulingana ne mpendwa ya nko sha bena Israeli, pamo ngefyo Yawe aebele Yoshua. Nabo epakuyasenda baya nayo ku nkambi, no kuya yabika panshi." 
Joshua4:9 Elyo Yoshua kabili aimike amabwe na yambi ikumi limo na yabili pakati ka mumana wa Yordani, palya penefye apo bashimapepo abasendele Imbokoshi ya Cipangano baiminine. Aya mabwe na lelo linefye epo yaba." 
Joshua4:10 Nomba bashimapepo bena abalesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano bashele nabeminina palya pene pakati ka mumana wa Yordani, mpakafye fyonse ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Yoshua abantu baficita, mu nshila iyo Mose akonkomeseshemo Yoshua. Awe abantu bayangufyanya pakwabuka umumana." 
Joshua4:11 Ilyo abantu bonse bapwile ukwabuka umumana, Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe pamo pene na bashimapepo, nabo bayabuka baisa tangilila na bantu." 
Joshua4:12 Abaume abena Rubeni, abena Gadi na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase nabo bayabuka ninshi abena Israeli tabalayabuka, elyo bena ninshi nabaipangasha ne fyanso fya bulwi, ukulingana nefyo Mose abebele." 
Joshua4:13 Abayabwike umumana bali amakana amakumi yane (40,000) ninshi nabasenda ne fyanso fya bulwi pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Balungeme ku mawanga ya musumba wa Yeriko ku bulwi." 
Joshua4:14 Pali ubu bwine bushiku, Yawe asumbwile Yoshua pa cinso ca bena Israeli bonse. Kabili apeelwe umucinshi nganshi mu nshiku shonse isha mweo wakwe, pamofye ngefyo bacindike Mose." 
Joshua4:15 Kabili Yawe aebele Yoshua ati," 
Joshua4:16 “Konkomesha bashimapepo abasenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano ukufuma mu mumana wa Yordani.” 
Joshua4:17 Nao Yoshua akonkomeshe bashimapepo ati, “Fumenimo mu mumana wa Yordani.”" 
Joshua4:18 Elyo bashimapepo bafuma mu mumana nabasenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe. Tapapitile ne nshita, batilefye bashifumya inkasa shabo mu mumana wa Yordani, amenshi yayamba no kulapita umo yalepita, no mumana wapoosa no kupoosa ngefyo wali nakale." 
Joshua4:19 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo ubwa mweshi wakubalilapo elyo abantu bafumine pa mumana wa Yordani no kuya cita inkambi ku Giligali ku mupaka ku kabanga ka Yeriko. 
Joshua4:20 Kabili amabwe yalya ikumi limo na yabili yantu bafumishe ku mumana wa Yordani, Yoshua ayemike ku Giligali." 
Joshua4:21 Elyo aebele abena Israeli ati, “Umuya inshiku ilyo abana benu bakalaipusha bashibo abati ‘Nga aya mabwe yanshi?’" 
Joshua4:22 Mukalabasuka amuti, ‘Abena Israeli bayabwike umumana wa Yordani apauma.’" 
Joshua4:23 Pantu Yawe Lesa wenu akamishe amenshi yonse mu mumana wa Yordani kuntanshi yenu, mpakafye mwayabuka, nga filya fine acitile kuli Bemba Wakashika ilyo akamishe amenshi pantanshi yesu, mpakafye bonse twayabuka." 
Joshua4:24 Ala Yawe acitile ifi pakulenga abantu bonse aba pano isonde beshibe ukuti ukuboko kwakwe kwamaka nganshi, elyo na imwe bene muleba abakatiina lyonsefye kuli Yawe Lesa wenu.”" 
Joshua5:1 Nomba caishile ba ukuti ishamfumu shonse isha bena Amoli ishaleikala lwa ku masamba ya mumana wa Yordani, ne shamfumu shonse isha bena Kenani ishabela mu lulamba lwa bemba, shaumfwile ukuti Yawe alikamishe umumana wa Yordani pantanshi ya bena Israeli, mpakafye ifwe bonse twayabuka. Na pakumfwa ifyo, awe imitima yashiko yatompoka, kabili tashali na maka yakushipa mukuya lwisha abena Israeli." 
Joshua5:2 Pali ilya inshita Yawe aebele Yoshua ati, “Panga imyele ya mabwe no kusembulula abena Israeli abashasembululwa.”" 
Joshua5:3 Awe Yoshua acitile ifyo aebelwe no kupanga imyele ya mabwe, kabili asembulwile abena Israeli ku Gibeati Haaraloti." 
Joshua5:4 Umulandu walengele Yoshua ukubasembulula wali wakuti, bonse abo abafumine mu calo ca Egupto, bonse abaume abengalwa inkondo, bafwilile mu nshila mu matololo panuma yakufuma mu Egupto." 
Joshua5:5 Pantu abafumine mu Egupto bonse, abaume balisembulwilwe. Lelo abantu bonse abaume abafyalilwe mu nshila mu matololo bena bali tabalasembululwa." 
Joshua5:6 Eico abena Israeli baleendauka mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane mpakafye bonse abaume abengalwa inkondo bafwila mu matololo, panuma yakusangukila Yawe. Ni kuli aba Yawe alapile no kubeba ukuti tabakatale abamona icalo cabulayo ico alaile ukupeela kuli bashibo, icalo icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci." 
Joshua5:7 Eico Yoshua apyanikishepo abana babo mu fifulo fyabo. Aba bene abana babo ebo Yoshua asembulwile. Ico abasembulwilile, nico ilyo bali mu matololo bali tabalasembululwa." 
Joshua5:8 Panuma yakupwa ukusembulula abali nokusembululwa bonse, baikele palya pene pa nkambi mpakafye ifilonda fyapola." 
Joshua5:9 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati, “Ilelo line nimfumya pali imwe umusebanya mwafuma nao mu calo ca Egupto.” Eico ilya ncende itilwa Giligali ukufika na lelo." 
Joshua5:10 Ilyo abena Israeli baikele ku Giligali mu mawanga ya ku Yeriko basefeshe inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila iye Pasaka, pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) mu nshita ya cungulo." 
Joshua5:11 Elyo pali ubo bwine bushiku ubwakonkelepo epo balile ifisabo fimo ifya mu calo cilya, pamo ngo mukate uushatutumuka elyo ne fyakusalula." 
Joshua5:12 Ukutulafye ilyo line balile ifilyo fya mu calo ici, elyo na maana yalekele ukupona. Kabili maana tayabalile aipona ku bena Israeli, lelo pa mwaka onse balelyakofye ifyakulya fya mu calo ici ica Kenani." 
Joshua5:13 Ilyo Yoshua ali mupepi na Yeriko, ainwine amenso no kumona umuntu naiminina ku ntanshi yakwe naikata ulupanga mu minwe yakwe. Yoshua nao epakumulungama aya mwipusha ati, “Bushe iwe uli muntu wesu, nangu uli wa ku balwani besu?”" 
Joshua5:14 Nao ayasuka ati, “Iyoo, lelo ine naisa ngo mukalamba wa fita fyakwa Yawe.” Elyo Yoshua awa panshi ubukupeme no mucinshi uukalamba, no kumwipusha ati, “Bushe mashiwi nshi Imfumu ikwete ku mubomfi waiko?”" 
Joshua5:15 Nao umukalamba wa fita fyakwa Yawe amweba ati, “Fuula insapato shobe, pantu icifulo wimininepo camushilo.” Na Yoshua acitile ifyo aebelwe." 
Joshua6:1 Nomba umusumba wa Yeriko wali uwaisalwa nganshi pa mulandu wakutiina abena Israeli. Takwali muntu nelyo umo uwakufumamo, kabili takwali muntu nelyo umo uwakwingilamo." 
Joshua6:2 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati, “Mona, ine nimpeela Yeriko mu maboko yobe, elyo ne mfumu ine pamo pene ne mpalume sha baume ba bulwi bonse." 
Joshua6:3 Kanshi iwe ne fita fyankondo fyonse mwakulaenda ukushinguluka umusumba umuku umo. Mukacite ifi pa nshiku mutanda. 
Joshua6:4 Mulingile ukuba na bashimapepo cine lubali bakatangilile Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, balelisha amapenga ya nsengo sha basukusuku. Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali mukashinguluke umusumba imiku cine lubali, ninshi bashimapepo balelisha amapenga." 
Joshua6:5 Ilyo bakaputa mu lusengo lwakwa sukusuku, nga mwaumfwa no kutwalilila kwa ciunda ca kulisha kwa mapenga, elyo lyena abantu bonse bakapundishe apakalamba. Apopenefye ne linga lya musumba likaiwilafye iline, na bantu bonse bakeme apalungatene na cila muntu no kwingila mu musumba.”" 
Joshua6:6 Kanshi Yoshua mwana Nuni epakwita bashimapepo no kubeba ati, “Sendeni Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe, kabili bashimapepo cine lubali batangile ku ntanshi ya Mbokoshi yakwa Yawe balelisha na mapenga.”" 
Joshua6:7 Elyo kabili aeba abantu ati, “Akwendeni! Muleshinguluka umusumba, ifita fyankondo fibe pa ntanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe.”" 
Joshua6:8 Cilyafye Yoshua apwisha ukulanda ku bantu, bashimapepo cine lubali abasendele amapenga ya nsengo sha basukusuku pa cinso cakwa Yawe batangila, balelisha na mapenga yabo, elyo pakonka na basendele Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe." 
Joshua6:9 Ifita fyankondo fyena efyali pa ntanshi ya bashimapepo abalelisha amapenga elyo abalinshi nabo ebaleshalila balekonka panuma ya balesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, ninshi bashimapepo batwalililefye ukulisha amapenga." 
Joshua6:10 Lelo Yoshua akonkomesha abantu ati, “Tecakwesha ukupunda ishiwi lya bulwi, tecakwesha ukwimya amashiwi yenu, tecakwesha ukusosa ishiwi nelyo limo mpakafye pa bushiku ilyo nkamweba ukupunda, elyo lyena mukapunda!”" 
Joshua6:11 Kanshi Yoshua epakuleka bashimapepo basenda Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe bashinguluka nayo umusumba umuku umo. Elyo babwelela ku nkambi eko basendama. 
Joshua6:12 Yoshua abuuka ulucelo, elyo na bashimapepo nabo basenda Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe." 
Joshua6:13 Bashimapepo cine lubali aba mapenga ya nsengo sha basukusuku ebaletangilila Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe, mukwenda kwabo balelisha na mapenga. Elintu ninshi ifita fyankondo nafyo fili kuntanshi, elyo abalinshi nabo ebaleshalila balekonka panuma ya balesenda Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe, ninshi batwalililefye ukulisha amapenga." 
Joshua6:14 Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga shibili baile baleenda ukushinguluka umusumba umuku umo no kubwelela ku nkambi. Bacitile ifi pa nshiku mutanda. 
Joshua6:15 Nomba pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali, baima lucelocelo no kwenda ukushinguluka umusumba imiku cine lubali mu musango umo wine. Nomba ni ubu bwine bushiku bweka bashingulwike umusumba imiku cine lubali." 
Joshua6:16 Pa muku walenga cine lubali bashimapepo balisha amapenga, na Yoshua aeba abantu ati, “Pundeni, pantu Yawe namupeela umusumba." 
Joshua6:17 Nomba umusumba na fyonse ifilimo fili nokupeelwa kuli Yawe ukuti fyonaulwe. Kanofye Rahabu cilende, pamo nabo ekala nabo mu ŋanda yakwe eukaba no mweo. Pantu afishile inengu isho twatumine." 
Joshua6:18 Eico kanshi imwe muisunge bwino ku fintu ifyapeelwa kukonaulwa, epakuti tamuiletelele no konaulwa pakuibuulilapo icintu conse mwe bene. Pantu limbi kuti mwalenga inkambi ya bena Israeli ukonaika, kabili nokuleta ubusanso ku nkambi." 
Joshua6:19 Lelo silifa na golide yonse ne fipe ifya mukuba ne fya fyela fyena fyamushilo kuli Yawe, kabili fifwile ukufibika mu cipao cakwa Yawe.”" 
Joshua6:20 Kanshi abantu epakuwelesha, elyo bashimapepo nabo balisha amapenga. Nomba lilya iciunda ca mapenga caumfwika, abantu epakuwelesha apakalamba ne cibumba ce linga lya musumba capona panshi. Kanshi umuntu uuli onse aninine apalungatene nankwe no kwingila mu musumba mpaka baupoka." 
Joshua6:21 Bapeela kuli Yawe umusumba onse kukuonaula, baonaula ku lupanga fyonse ifyali mu musumba, abaume na banakashi, abakalamba na baice, iŋombe, impaanga pamo na bakabalwe." 
Joshua6:22 Kabili Yoshua aebele abaume babili abali inengu sha calo ici ati, “Kabiyeni mu ŋanda yakwa cilende no kuya mufumyamo pamo pene na bantu bakwe, ukulingana no mulapo mwacitile kuli ena.”" 
Joshua6:23 Awe aba balumendo inengu baingile mu ŋanda no kufumya Rahabu, wishi na nyina, bandume yakwe elyo na bonse abo ali nabo. Bonsefye babasenda no kuya babika mu cifulo cimbi, kunse ya nkambi sha bena Israeli." 
Joshua6:24 Elyo baoca no musumba onsefye, pamo pene na fyonse ifyalimo. Bapuswishekofye silifa, golide ne fipe ifya mukuba ne fya fyela, fyena bafibika mu cipao ca mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Joshua6:25 Lelo Rahabu uwali cilende elyo na ba mu ŋanda yakwa wishi na bonse abo ali nabo Yoshua tafyonawile. Eico ukushinta na pa bushiku bwe lelo, abantu bakwa Rahabu baikala mu calo ca bena Israeli pa mulandu wakuti ewafishile inengu batumine ku Yeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Pa nshita ilya Yoshua alanda umulapo wakuti, “Abe uwalapishiwa pa cinso cakwa Yawe umuntu onse uukesha ukukuula uyu musumba wa Yeriko. “Onsefye uukemba umufula wakukuulapo nakabili, akafwilwa umwana wakwe umwaume ibeli. Kabili pakubikako impongolo, akafwilwa umwana wakwe umwaume uwakulekelesha.”" 
Joshua6:27 Kanshi lyonsefye Yawe ali na Yoshua, elyo no lulumbi lwakwe lwakumene icalo conse." 
Joshua7:1 Lelo abena Israeli bakene ukumfwa ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe ifyakukanasenda icintu nelyo cimo ukufuma mu musumba pa fintu ifyapeelwa kukonaulwa. Nomba Akani umwana mwaume wakwa Kami, umwishikulu wakwa Sabidi, nao uwali mwana Sera uwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda, ena ewabuulilepo ifintu fimo pa fyapeelwa ukonaulwa. Ecalengele ukuti Yawe afulilwe abena Israeli." 
Joshua7:2 Nomba Yoshua epakutuma abaume bamo ukufuma ku Yeriko no kuya ku Ai, iyaba mupepi na Beti Afeni iyaba ku kabanga ka Betele, no kubeba ukuti, “Kamoneni icalo pamo nge nengu.” Kanshi nabo baliile no kuya mona icalo ici nge nengu mu Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Ilyo inengu shabwelelemo kuli Yoshua shamwebele ashiti, “Wileka abantu bonse baye mukulwisha abena Ai, iyoo, lelo tumenikofye abaume amakana yabili (2,000) nangu yatatu (3,000) abakuya lwisha abena Ai. Kabili mwicusha bantu bonse ukuyako, pantu kulifye abantu abanono mu musumba.”" 
Joshua7:4 Kanshi epakutumako abaume amakana yatatu (3,000). Lelo baile bafulumuna ku bena Ai." 
Joshua7:5 Kabili abena Ai baipeyepo na bantu ukulingana na makumi yatatu na mutanda (36). Babatamfishe ukufumafye pa mpongolo ya musumba no kuya bafisha ku fimabwe fya ku mapili, uku kwine eko baile bakomawila pa nshila yakutentemuka. Awe ne mitima ya bena Israeli yatompweke no kutalala tondolo nga menshi." 
Joshua7:6 Elyo Yoshua alepwile ifyakufwala fyakwe, kabili awile panshi ubukupeme ku cinso ca Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe ukushinta ne nshita ya cungulo. Ena pamo na bacilolo ba bena Israeli nabo bacitile cimo cine. Bena ninshi nabaikuba no lukungu mu mitwe yabo." 
Joshua7:7 Elintu Yoshua atile, “Iye, we Mfumu Lesa, cinshi ico wayabushishe aba bantu umumana wa Yordani no kutuleta ku minwe ya bena Amoli mukutulofya? Iye, ala nga fwe bene catulingile ukwikala kulya kwine lubali lwa mumana wa Yordani!" 
Joshua7:8 Owe, we Mfumu yandi, nga kanshi cinshi ine ningasosa, pantu nomba abena Israeli nababafulumuna ku balwani babo?" 
Joshua7:9 Abena Kenani na bantu bambi aba mu calo ilyo bakomfwa uyu mulandu, nabo bene bakatwimina no kutulofya. Kabili ne shina lyesu lili nokufumishiwa pano isonde. Bushe nomba we Mfumu ukacitapo shani pa mulandu wa bucindami bwe shina lyobe?”" 
Joshua7:10 Yawe nao atile, “Iminina! Cinshi ico ulalile ubukupeme?" 
Joshua7:11 Israeli nabifya no kupula mu cipangano ico nabakonkomeshe ukusunga. Nababuulapo ifintu fimo pa fyapeelwa kukonaulwa, nabafiiba, nababepa no bufi kabili bafifisa na mu fipe fyabo." 
Joshua7:12 Uyu e mulandu ulengele ukuti abena Israeli babacimfye ku balwani babo, eco bakulafutatila abalwani babo no kubutuka pantu nabailetelela ukuti bonaulwe. Na ine nomba nshakatale mba na imwe nakabili iyoo, kanofye mukonaule ifintu fyonse mucili nafyo ifyo namwebele ukonaula." 
Joshua7:13 Ima kabiye usangulule abantu no kubeba ukuti, ‘Isangululeni mwe bene mukuipekanya pa fya bushiku bwa mailo,’ pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli ukuti, ‘Mukati kenu imwe mwe bena Israeli muli ifintu fimo ifyapeelwa kukonaulwa. Muli nokufilwa ukulwa na balwani benu nga cakuti tamonawile ifi fintu no kufifumya pakati kenu.’" 
Joshua7:14 Eico ulucelo mukaleisa cila luko kuli ine. Uluko ulo Yawe akasonta, lukaleisa cila lupwa kuntanshi. No lupwa ulo Yawe akasonta lukaleisa cila ŋanda. Elyo cila ŋanda iyo Yawe akasonta ikaleisa kuntanshi umuntu no muntu." 
Joshua7:15 Nomba uyo onse uwaikatwa ne fintu ifyapeelwa kukonaulwa, ali nokocewafye mu mulilo pamo pene ne fintu fyonse ifyo akwata. Pantu uyu muntu alyonaula icipangano cakwa Yawe, kabili alicita icamusebanya mu Israeli.”" 
Joshua7:16 Ulucelo lwakonkelepo, Yoshua aeba abena Israeli ukulaisa kuntanshi uluko no luko. Awe uluko lwakwa Yuda elwasontelwe ukwisa kuntanshi." 
Joshua7:17 Elyo indupwa shakwa Yuda eshaishile kuntanshi no lupwa lwakwa Sera elwasontelwe. Elyo ulupwa lwakwa Sera elwalaisa cila ŋanda, na Sabidi elwasontelwe." 
Joshua7:18 Kabili Yoshua apalamike aba mu ŋanda yakwe kuntanshi umuntu no muntu, elyo Akani umwana mwaume wakwa Kami, nao mwana Sabidi, nao uwali umwana wakwa Sera uwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda, ewasalilwe." 
Joshua7:19 Elintu Yoshua aeba Akani ati, “We mwana wandi, nakulomba ulepeela umucinshi kuli Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, kabili ulemulumba. Eico kanshi, njeba ifyo wacitile. Tecakwesha ukumfisa akantu nelyo kamo.”" 
Joshua7:20 Nao Akani ayaswike ati, “Ee icine cine, nine nabifishe kuli Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli. Nefyo nacitile nifi." 
Joshua7:21 Ilyo namwene mu fyakutapa umwingila usuma uwa ku Shina ne ndalama sha silifa amashekeli imyanda ibili elyo ne cipimfya ca golide icafina ukucilako citika wa kilo, elyo nafikumbilwe no kubuula. Fyonse ifi fintu, nafifishile mwi tenti lyandi, emo nafishiika panshi, pamo pene na silifa ewaba panshi ya fibiye.”" 
Joshua7:22 Awe Yoshua epakutumako inkombe nabo bailefye ulubilo kwi tenti. Elyo cine cine umwingila usuma, pamo pene na silifa panshi, fyafishilwe mwi tenti lyakwe." 
Joshua7:23 Basendele fyonse ifyali mwi tenti, bafileta na kuli Yoshua na bena Israeli bonse, elyo no kufilangisha pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Joshua7:24 Awe Yoshua na bena Israeli bonse, babuulile Akani, umwana mwaume wakwa Sera, silifa, umwingila, ifipimfya fya golide, abana bakwe abaume na banakashi, iŋombe shakwe, bapunda, pamo pene ne mpaanga, itenti lyakwe elyo ne fintu fyonse akwete bafisenda kwishika lya Ako." 
Joshua7:25 Elyo Yoshua aebele Akani ati, “Kanshi cinshi ico iwe uletele ubusanso ubushaibipila pali ifwe? Yawe nao nomba alakuletela ubusanso ilelo linefye.” Elyo bonse abena Israeli bamutobele amabwe. Kabili panuma yakubatobaula amabwe, baboca na mu mulilo." 
Joshua7:26 Elyo pali Akani batulikapo no mwina wa mabwe uukalamba, uyo uucilipo na pa bushiku bwa lelo bwine. Panuma ya ifi, Yawe aleka no bukali. E mulandu wine betila palya pantu ukuti “ishika lya Ako ” ukufika na ku nshita ine ino." 
Joshua8:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati, “Tecakwesha ukuba no mwenso kabili tecakwesha ukunenuka. Buulafye ifita fyonse no kuya bonse ku musumba wa Ai. Pantu ine, ne Yawe nimpeela mu maboko yobe imfumu ya mu musumba wa Ai, abantu bakwe, umusumba pamo pene ne calo cakwe conse." 
Joshua8:2 Ifyo uli nokucita ku musumba wa Ai ne mfumu yauko ni filya fine wacitile ku musumba wa Yeriko ne mfumu yauko. Lelo uno muku, kuti mwasenda fyonse ifintu mukatapa pamo ne fitekwa ukuti fikabe fyenu. Bika ifita fyakulalilila kunuma ya musumba.”" 
Joshua8:3 Kanshi Yoshua pamo pene ne fita epakwima, balungama na ku Ai ku bulwi. Yoshua asalilepo impalume sha fita ishaswangana amakana amakumi yatatu (30,000) no kubatuma pakati ka bushiku." 
Joshua8:4 Elyo abakonkomesha ati, “Umfweni bwino bwino. Muye ibelamina ku numa ya musumba pakuti muupoke. Tecakwesha ukutaluka ku musumba. Kabili imwe bonse mufwile ukuba abaiteyanya." 
Joshua8:5 Ine pamo na bonse abo tuli nabo twakulapalamina ku musumba. Nomba ilyo abalwani bakesa tufumina, pamo ngefyo bacitile intanshi, ifwe tuli nokubafulumuka." 
Joshua8:6 Nabo bali nokutukonka mpakafye tukasuke atubatalusha ukufuma ku musumba. Elyo bena bakatila, ‘Batubutuka, nga filya fine bacitile intanshi.’ Eico ilyo tukafulumuka," 
Joshua8:7 elintu nomba na imwe mukeme apo mukabelama no kupoka umusumba. Na Yawe Lesa wenu ali nokuupeela mu maboko yenu. 
Joshua8:8 Ilyo mukapoka umusumba, mukaoce. Mufwilefye ukucita ukulingana ne cebo cakwa Yawe. Nefi fine efyo mukacite pantu nine nkonkomeshe.”" 
Joshua8:9 Kanshi Yoshua epakubatuma baya ku ncende yakubelaminapo mukupembela iyali pakati ka Betele na Ai, lwa ku masamba ya Ai. Lelo Yoshua ali na bantu pa nkambi ubushiku bulya bwine." 
Joshua8:10 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, Yoshua abuuka kacelocelo alonganika na bantu. Elyo pakuya ku Ai, umwine na bacilolo ba bena Israeli ebatangila pantanshi." 
Joshua8:11 Fyonse ifita ifyali pamo na Yoshua fyaya fileenda kabili fyafikile mupepi no musumba no kupitila kuntanshi yauko. Elyo fyacitile ne nkambi ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka musumba wa Ai, apali no mupokapoka pakati kabo elyo no musumba." 
Joshua8:12 Elyo Yoshua abuulapo ifita ni cikanga na makana yasano (5,000) abafisa pakati ka Betele na Ai, ku masamba ya musumba." 
Joshua8:13 Elyo abantu bacitile inkambi yabo ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka musumba, abafiseme nabo bali ku masamba yauko. Ninshi balifye abaipekanya nganshi. Yoshua mu bushiku bulya ashele alinda mu mupokapoka." 
Joshua8:14 Ilyo imfumu ya mu musumba wa Ai yaumfwile ifi, yena pamo na bantu bonse aba mu musumba basakatuka lucelocelo no kwima mukukumanya abena Israeli kukulwa, pa cifulo icalungatene na matololo ya Araba pantanshi ye wanga. Nomba imfumu ya mu musumba tayaishibe ukuti ifita fimo nafiibelamina ku numa ya musumba." 
Joshua8:15 Elyo Yoshua na bena Israeli bonse bacita kwati bafulumuka, na balwani babo babakonka panuma. Nabo bafulumukila ku nshila ya ku matololo." 
Joshua8:16 Abekala musumba bonse bakutene no kukunkunika abena Israeli no kubatamfishafye ukutali ukufuma ku musumba wa Ai. Kanshi ilyo balebutusha Yoshua na bantu bakwe, kanshi ninshi ekutaluka baletaluka ku musumba." 
Joshua8:17 Mu misumba Ai na Betele tamwashele umwaume nelyo umo uushafumine mukukunkunika abena Israeli. Umusumba wa Ai, washelefye uwaisuka ilyo bonse bakunkunike abena Israeli." 
Joshua8:18 Elyo Yawe aeba Yoshua ati, “Sonta ifumo ilili mu minwe yobe ku musumba wa Ai, pantu nalaupeela mu minwe yobe.” Awe nao Yoshua epakucita ifyo Yawe amwebele." 
Joshua8:19 Bwangu bwangu cilyafye aimya ukuboko, ifita ifyafiseme fyaima napo fyafiseme no kubutukila mu musumba. Fyaingila no kuupoka elyo mukwangufyanya fyaoca no koca." 
Joshua8:20 Abena Ai bati baloleshe kunuma, bamona umusumba ulefutumuka icushi. Awe abena Ai ukwakubutukila kwabula, pantu abena Israeli abo balebutusha ukuya ku matololo nabo bayaluluka mukukumanya abalwani babo." 
Joshua8:21 Ilyo Yoshua na bantu bonse bamwene ukuti abanabo abafiseme nabapoka umusumba, kabili no musumba ulefutumuka icushi, epakubweluluka baisa ipaya abena Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Kabili ifita fimo pa fyafiseme ifyali mu musumba, fyafumine no kuya lwisha abena Ai pakuti bababike pakati ka bena Israeli, bambi uku, bambi nabo uku. Awe abena Israeli bakomawile abena Ai bonse, takwashele nelyo umo." 
Joshua8:23 Lelo kwashelefye imfumu yabo iyo baikete no kuitwala kuli Yoshua. 
Joshua8:24 Ilyo abena Israeli bapwishishe ukwipaya abena Ai abali mu mapanga na mu matololo umo babutukile, no kumona ukuti tapali nelyo umo uwashele, elyo abena Israeli bonse babwelele ku musumba wa Ai no kuya pwililisha abashelemo." 
Joshua8:25 Abantu bonse abaume na banakashi abafwile mu musumba wa Ai bali bonse pamo amakana ikumi limo na yabili (12,000)." 
Joshua8:26 Pantu Yoshua nao aikatililefye ifumo mu kuboko kwakwe, umo mwinefye asontele ku musumba wa Ai, mpaka apeela abantu bonse abaleikala mu Ai kukonaulwa." 
Joshua8:27 Lelo abena Israeli balisendele iŋombe ne fyapeelwe ukutapwa muli ulya musumba ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe akonkomeshe Yoshua. 
Joshua8:28 Kanshi Yoshua epakoca umusumba wa Ai no kuucita umwina wa citantala camuyayaya, icifulo icabafye ceka ifyo fine ukufika no bwa lelo line." 
Joshua8:29 Kabili Yoshua akulika imfumu ya Ai ku cimuti, no kumusha eko amushile mpakafye ku nshita ya cungulo. Ilyo akasuba kawa, Yoshua aeba abantu ukukulukula icitumbi ku cimuti no kuciposa panshi pa mwinshi wakwingilila mu musumba. Batulikapo no mwina wa mabwe uukalamba, uucilipo na mu bushiku bwa lelo line." 
Joshua8:30 Kabili nomba Yoshua akuulile pa mulu wa lupili lwa Ebali ubulambo bwakwa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli," 
Joshua8:31 pamo ngefyo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe akonkomeshe abena Israeli. Akuulile ukulingana nefyo calembwa mu citabo ca Mafunde yakwa Mose ukuti, “Icibumba ca bulambo cifwile ukukuulilwa na mabwe ayashakomaulwamo ne cela, yalingile yabafye ayatuntulu.” Apa epo baletuulila umutuulo we lambo lya cakoca kuli Yawe kabili no mutuulo we lambo lyakwampana." 
Joshua8:32 Elyo kabili Yoshua, pa cinso ca bena Israeli, ayambwilile pa mabwe amafunde yantu Mose alembele." 
Joshua8:33 Abena Israeli bonse, abeni pamo pene na bakaya, abakalamba babo, bacilolo elyo na bakaputula wa milandu babo, baiminine ku mbali shonse isha Mbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe, baloseshe amenso kuli bashimapepo abena Levi abalesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe. Citika wa bamo baiminine pantanshi ya lupili lwa Gerisimu, bambi nabo pantanshi ya lupili lwa Ebali ngefyo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe akonkomeshe kale ukucita pakupaala abena Israeli." 
Joshua8:34 Na pa numa ya ifi fyonse, Yoshua abelengele yonse amashiwi ya Mafunde, amashiwi ya mapaalo elyo na mashiwi ya kulapisha ngefyo calembwa mu citabo ca Mafunde." 
Joshua8:35 Kwena takwashele ishiwi mu mashiwi yonse ayo Mose akonkomeshe yantu Yoshua tabelengele ku lukuta lwa bena Israeli, ukusanshakofye na banamayo na bana bonse, elyo na ku beni abaleikala pakati kabo." 
Joshua9:1 Nomba ilyo imfumu shonse ishaleikala kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani, ne shaleikala mu calo ca mpili ne shaleikala mwisamba elyo na mu lulamba lwa Bemba Mukulu no kushintafye na ku Lebanoni shaumfwile ifi, shonse shaikatene pamo. Ishi shamfumu sha bena Hiti, abena Amoli, abena Kenani, abena Perisi, abena Hifi elyo na bena Yebusi" 
Joshua9:2 shali no mutima umo mukulwisha Yoshua na bena Israeli. 
Joshua9:3 Lelo ilyo abena Gibeoni baumfwile ifyo Yoshua acitile ku Yeriko na ku Ai," 
Joshua9:4 bacita ubucenjeshi. Baya kuli Yoshua nga batuminwe, balonga pali bapunda babo imifuko ikote iya fyakulya, elyo ne nyambi sha myangashi ishalepauka kabili ne milundo yakubilabila." 
Joshua9:5 Bafwele ifisamu elyo ne ndyato ishafikamba fikamba ku makasa yabo. Umukate onse untu basendele wali uwakosa, kabili uwamokaulwa." 
Joshua9:6 Elyo baya kuli Yoshua ku nkambi ya ku Giligali, balamweba pamo na bena Israeli abati, “Ifwe tufumine ku calo ca kutali. Kanshi panga icipangano na ifwe.”" 
Joshua9:7 Elyo abena Israeli batile ku bena Hifi ati, “Limbi imwe mwikalafye mupepi na ifwe, nga kanshi kuti twacita shani icipangano na imwe?”" 
Joshua9:8 Nabo baeba Yoshua abati, “Ala ifwe tuli babomfi bobefye.” Nomba Yoshua nao abepusha ati “Bushe nimwe bani kabili ni kwi mufumine?”" 
Joshua9:9 Nabo bayaswike abati, “Mukwai ababomfi benu bafumine ku calo ca kutali nganshi pa mulandu wakumfwa ululumbi lwakwa Yawe, Lesa wenu. Twalyumfwa na pali fyonse ifyo acitile mu calo ca Egupto." 
Joshua9:10 Kabili na fyonse fintu acitile ku mfumu shibili isha bena Amoli abekala kwishilya lya Yordani, kuli Sihoni imfumu ya bena Heshiboni na kuli Ogi imfumu ya bena Bashani, uwaleikala mu Ashitaloti." 
Joshua9:11 Kanshi eico abakalamba besu elyo na bonse abekala mu calo cesu batile kuli ifwe, ‘Musende ifyakulya fya pa bulendo bwenu no kuya kumanya abanensu, kabili mukayetila kuli bena, “Ifwe tuli babomfi benu. Eico tupange icipangano pakati kesu.” ’" 
Joshua9:12 Uyu mukate wesu wali uwakaba ilyo twalelonga ku mushi pa bushiku twaleisa kuno kuli imwe. Nomba pali ino inshita, shi moneni ifyo umine, kabili uli uwaonaika." 
Joshua9:13 Kabili ilyo twabikile imyangashi no kwisusha ishi inyambi, awe shalifye ishipya, nomba shi moneni ifyo inyambi shilepawike. Kabili ifyakufwala fyesu nafyo pamo ne ndyato shine, nafilepauka pa mulandu wa bulendo ukulepesha.”" 
Joshua9:14 Abena Israeli epakuibuulilapo ifilyo abene ukwabula ukwipusha ukulanda kwakwa Yawe. 
Joshua9:15 Yoshua epakucita icipangano camutende na ba bantu abena Gibeoni no kulaikala nabo pamo, kabili abakalamba be bumba lya bantu bonse babikapo no mulapo." 
Joshua9:16 Cilya papitafye inshiku shitatu apo bapangile icipangano na bena Gibeoni, awe mukwai abena Israeli baumfwa ifyo kanshi aba bantu bena mupalamanofye, bekala mupepifye nabo." 
Joshua9:17 Elyo abena Israeli epakwima, baenda inshiku shitatu, bafika na ku misumba yabo iya Gibeoni, Kefira, Beroti na Kiriati Yarimu." 
Joshua9:18 Lelo abena Israeli tababalwishishe iyoo, pantu abakalamba ba lukuta balibikilepo umulapo kuli Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli. Elintu ulukuta lwayambile ukuilishanya ku bakalamba babo." 
Joshua9:19 Elyo abakalamba nabo babasuka ukuti, “Twalipangana nabo, kabili no kulapa kuli Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli, eico kanshi tatufwile ukubekatamo pali ino nshita." 
Joshua9:20 Ifi efyo tuli nokucita pali kano kashita kuli bena, tuli nokubalekafye baleikala, pakuti ubukali bwakwa Lesa bwikaba pali ifwe bonse mukonaula umulapo twalapile kuli bena.”" 
Joshua9:21 Kabili abakalamba balundilepo no kubeba ati, “Ala nabekalefye, lelo ebakulatebela ibumba lya bantu inkuni elyo nokulatapila abantu bonse amenshi.” Kanshi abantu bonse epakusuminisha ifyo abakalamba babebele." 
Joshua9:22 Elyo Yoshua atumine abakuya ita abena Gibeoni, nao aisa beba ati, “Bushe cinshi mwatubepele nokutila, ‘Twikala ukutali nganshi ukutaluka kuno,’ ilyo imwe mwikalafye mupepi na ifwe?" 
Joshua9:23 Ala nomba imwe mwalapishiwa. Tamwakatale amuleka ukuba abasha abakulatapa amenshi no kulateba inkuni mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wandi.” 
Joshua9:24 Abena Gibeoni nabo bayasuka Yoshua abati, “Ababomfi benu balyumfwilefye bwino bwino ifyo Yawe, Lesa wenu, akonkomeshe umubomfi wakwe Mose ukuti akamupeela icalo conse no kwipaya bonse abekashi ba muli ici calo ilyo talamufishamo. Eico na ifwe twatiinine ukwisa fwa, e mulandu wine twacitile ifi fyonse." 
Joshua9:25 Eco nomba ifwe, tulifye mu maboko yenu. Tucitileni ico conse mwamona ukuti cisuma, kabili icalungama ku cinso cenu.”" 
Joshua9:26 Kanshi Yoshua nao epakubapususha ku bena Israeli, no kubepaya tababepeye." 
Joshua9:27 Ukufumafye pali bulya bwine bushiku Yoshua apeele abena Gibeoni umulimo wakutebela abena Israeli inkuni, elyo nokulabatapila amenshi. Kabili abebele nokulateba inkuni sha pa bulambo no kulatapa amenshi pa cifulo ico bali nokusonta icakwa Yawe. Ifi fine efyo baba na mu bushiku bwa lelo line." 
Joshua10:1 Nomba Adoni Sedeki imfumu ya mu Yerusalemu yaumfwile ukuti Yoshua napoka umusumba wa Ai no kuonaula, elyo naipaya ne mfumu yauko pamo ngefyo acitile ku musumba wa Yeriko ne mfumu yauko. Nomba omfwile ukuti abantu ba mu musumba wa Gibeoni nabapanga icipangano ca kwikala umutende na bena Israeli, kabili nokuti bakulaikala mu calo cabo." 
Joshua10:2 Elyo natiina apakalamba pali ici cicitike, pantu Gibeoni wali umusumba uukalamba, kabili uukankala. Uyu musumba walifye kwati ni umo pa misumba umwaleikala imfumu. Kabili walicilile pa musumba wa Ai ku bukulu, na bantu bauko bonse bali abaume babulwi icine cine." 
Joshua10:3 Eico Adoni Sedeki imfumu ya mu Yerusalemu yatumine inkombe ku mfumu shibiye, Hoamu imfumu ya mu Hebuloni, Piramu imfumu ya mu Yamuti, Yafiya imfumu ya mu Lakishi elyo na kuli Debi imfumu ya mu Egiloni." 
Joshua10:4 Abebele ati, “Mwe, ala iseni kuno mungafweko ukulwisha Gibeoni. Pantu baliya panga umutende na Yoshua pamo na bena Israeli.”" 
Joshua10:5 Awe imfumu shisano isha bena Amoli, pamo pene ne mfumu sha mu Yerusalemu, Hebuloni, Yamuti, Lakishi elyo na Egiloni basankanya ifita fyabulwi. Baimina pamo bonse ne fita fyabulwi fyabo no kuya shinguluka umusumba wa bena Gibeoni no kubalwisha." 
Joshua10:6 Awe abena Gibeoni batumine amashiwi kuli Yoshua kuntu ali ku nkambi ya ku Giligali abati, “Mukwai, mwitulekelesha ifwe fwe babomfi benu! Isenifye bwangu mutwafwilisheko nokutupususha pantu imfumu shonse isha bena Amoli ishaikala ku calo ca mpili bonse bali pamo ne fita fyabulwi nabatwimina!”" 
Joshua10:7 Awe Yoshua epakwima ku Giligali pamo pene ne fita fyabulwi, alundapo ne fita ifyacenjela nganshi kukulwa." 
Joshua10:8 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati, “Tecakwesha ukubatiina. Ine, nimbapeela mu maboko yobe. Takuli nelyo umo uuleya kwansha.”" 
Joshua10:9 Panuma yakwenda ubushiku bonse ukufuma ku Giligali, Yoshua alibapumikishe." 
Joshua10:10 Elyo Yawe nao abafulungenye amano ku cinso ca bena Israeli, alenga babacimfya no kubepaya ku Gibeoni. Abena Israeli batamfishe abalwani babo ukulungama umusebo walola ku Beti Horoni no kubakomaula nganshi inshila yonse ukuya fikafye na ku Aseka na ku Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Ilyo balefulumuka abena Israeli, pakutentemukila mu musebo uwafuma ku Beti Horoni ukuya ku Aseka, Yawe abaletele imfula yacitalawe, iya mabwe ayakulu ukufuma ku mulu, yaipaya abengi nganshi ukucila nabo baipeye ku bulwi bwa ku lupanga lwa bena Israeli." 
Joshua10:12 Mu bushiku bwine bulya Yawe apeele abena Amoli mu maboko ya bena Israeli, Yoshua asosele kuli Yawe pa cinso ca bena Israeli ati, “We kasuba, imininafye apo pene pa Gibeoni! Nobe we mweshi imininafye apo pene peshika lya Aiyaloni.”" 
Joshua10:13 Ne cacine akasuba kaimininafye, no mweshi nao waleka ukulasela, mpaka umushobo wa bena Israeli wacimfya abalwani babo. Bushe ifi tefyo calembwa na mu citabo cakwa Yasha? Akasuba kalekele ukwenda pakati ka mutwe, kaimininafye mu nshita ya kasuba yonse." 
Joshua10:14 Ukufumafye ku kale takwatalile akuba ubushiku ngobu ubo Yawe aumfwilile umuntu, nangufye ukubako inshita imbi ukutula pali iyi nshita. Nico pali ubu bushiku Yawe alelwilako abena Israeli." 
Joshua10:15 Elyo Yoshua pamo na bena Israeli bonse babwelelamo ku nkambi ku Giligali. 
Joshua10:16 Nomba imfumu ishi shisano shabutwike no kuya fisama mu ninga ya ku Makeda. 
Joshua10:17 Lelo ilyo baebele Yoshua ukuti imfumu ishi shisano nabashisanga uko shibeleme mu ninga ya ku Makeda," 
Joshua10:18 nao atile, “Cilikeni ifimabwe ifikulu pa mwinshi wa ninga no kubikapo abantu abakulonda." 
Joshua10:19 Lelo imwe mwileka ukusupila abalwani benu, mulingilefye ukubasansa mukupitila kunuma ya misumba yabo. Mwileka baleingila mu misumba yabo pantu Yawe Lesa wenu nabapeela mu maboko yenu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Eico Yoshua na bena Israeli ilyo bakomawile abalwani babo mupepi no kubapwisha. Bamo bamo ebashele baile fika ku misumba yabo," 
Joshua10:21 ne fita fyonse fyabwelele kuli Yoshua ku nkambi ya ku Makeda umutende. Takwali umuntu nelyo umo uwasoselepo ishiwi ilibi pa bena Israeli. 
Joshua10:22 Panuma ya ifi elyo Yoshua atile, “Kesuleni umwinshi wa ninga no kufumya shilya mfumu shisano no kushileta kuli ine.”" 
Joshua10:23 Awe nabo bafumishe imfumu shisano ukufuma mu ninga, imfumu sha bena Yerusalemu, Hebuloni, Yamuti, Lakishi elyo na Egiloni." 
Joshua10:24 Ilyo bafishishe ishi mfumu kuli Yoshua, nao aitile bonse abana baume ba bena Israeli nokutila ku bakalamba ba fita abo ali nabo, “Iseni kuno pakuti mwise munyante amakasa yenu pa mikoshi ya ishi mfumu.” Nabo baile kuntanshi no kuya nyanta amakasa yabo pa mikoshi yabo." 
Joshua10:25 Kabili Yoshua abebele ati, “Tecakwesha ukuba no mwenso, kabili mwinenuka. Mubefye abashipa kabili abakosa. Pantu ifi fine efyo Yawe ali nokucitila bonse abalwani benu.”" 
Joshua10:26 Elyo Yoshua akomaula ishi mfumu, ashipaya no kushikulikila ku fimuti fisano no kubasha ifyo fine balepelela ku fimuti mpakafye ne nshita ya cungulo." 
Joshua10:27 Cilya akasuba kawa, Yoshua aeba abantu ukubasamuna ku fimuti no kuya baposa mu ninga umo baile fisama. Pa mwinshi wa ninga bacilikapo ifimabwe ifikulu, ifyo ificilipo no bwa lelo." 
Joshua10:28 Pa bushiku ubo bwine, Yoshua apokele Makeda no kwikata imfumu ya uyu musumba no kumwipaya ku lupanga. Apwishishisha ukonaula umusumba onse na bantu bonse abaleikalamo. Tamwali uwashelemo. Acitile imfumu ya ku Makeda ngefyo acitile ku mfumu ya musumba wa Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Kabili panuma ya ifi fyonse, Yoshua pamo na bena Israeli bonse baimine ukufuma ku musumba wa Makeda no kuya ku musumba wa Libina mukuya balwisha." 
Joshua10:30 Kabili Yawe apeela uyu musumba pamo ne mfumu yauko mu maboko ya bena Israeli. Kabili Yoshua aonawile umusumba no kwipaya abaleikalamo bonse ku lupanga. Tamwali uwashelemo nangu umo. Acitile kuli iyi imfumu ya musumba wa Libina pamo ngefyo acitile ku mfumu ya musumba wa Yeriko. 
Joshua10:31 Yoshua nakabili pamo na bena Israeli bonse bafuma mu musumba wa Libina no kuya ku musumba wa Lakishi. Baya ushinguluka no kuulwisha. 
Joshua10:32 Kabili Yawe abalwishishako no kupeela uyu musumba mu maboko ya bena Israeli, elyo baupoka pa bushiku bwalenga shibili. Aonaula umusumba, aipaya na baleikalamo bonse ku lupanga pamo ngefyo acitile na ku musumba wa Libina." 
Joshua10:33 Elintu Holamu imfumu ya musumba wa Gesa aisa mukutulanyako umusumba wa Lakishi lelo Yoshua alimucimfishe pamo pene ne fita fyakwe. Tapashele nelyo umo. 
Joshua10:34 Yoshua nakabili pamo na bena Israeli bonse bafuma mu musumba wa Lakishi no kuya ku musumba wa Egiloni, baya ushinguluka no kuulwisha." 
Joshua10:35 Bapokele uyu musumba pali ubu bwine bushiku, baipaya ku lupanga bonse abaleikalamo. Yoshua apeele bonse kukonaulwa pamo ngefyo acitile ku musumba wa Lakishi." 
Joshua10:36 Yoshua nakabili pamo na bena Israeli bonse bafuma ku Egiloni baya ku Hebuloni no kuya lwisha uyu musumba. 
Joshua10:37 Awe nao wine baliupokele no kwipaya abantu bonse ku lupanga, pamo pene ne mfumu yabo, na baleikala mu mishi ya mupepi bonse balifwile. Tamwali uwashelemo nangu umo. Califye kwati ni filya fine cacitike ku Egiloni, umusumba onsefye walyonawilwe pamo pene na baleikalamo bonse." 
Joshua10:38 Yoshua nakabili pamo na bena Israeli bonse balungama no kuya lwisha umusumba wa Debi. 
Joshua10:39 Bapoka uyu musumba pamo ne mfumu yauko ne mishi yauko, no kwipaya bonse abantu abalimo ku lupanga. Tamwali uwashelemo nangu umo. Bacitile kuli uyu musumba wa Debi ne mfumu yauko, pamo ngefyo bacitile ku musumba wa Libina ne mfumu yauko elyo na ku musumba wa Hebuloni." 
Joshua10:40 Kanshi efyo Yoshua acimfishe icalo conse, ukulundako ne calo cabelele ku mpili, ku matololo ya Negebu, ku masamba ya tupili, na ku calo cabela mu mutentemuko wa lupili, ukubikapofye ne mfumu shabo shonse. Tamwali uwashelemo nangu umo, lelo aonawile umuntu onsefye uupeema. Bonse balyonawilwe pamo ngefyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, akonkomeshe." 
Joshua10:41 Yoshua abacimfishe ukufuma ku Kadeshi Banea ukufikafye na ku Gasa. Kabili ukufuma ku calo conse ica Gosheni ukufikafye na ku Gibeoni. 
Joshua10:42 Yoshua acimfishe shonse imfumu no kupoka ifyalo fyashiko pa nshita imo ine. Pantu Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, ewalwilileko abena Israeli." 
Joshua10:43 Elyo Yoshua na bena Israeli bonse babwelela na ku nkambi ya ku Giligali. 
Joshua11:1 Nomba ilyo Yabini imfumu ya musumba wa Hasoli aumfwile ifyacitike, atumine inkombe kuli Yobabu imfumu ya ku Madoni, ku mfumu ya ku Shimuroni, elyo na ku mfumu ya ku Akishafu." 
Joshua11:2 Kabili atumine inkombe ku mfumu sha ku kapinda ka ku kuso, abali mu fyalo fya mpili, ku sha mu calo ca Araba ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ka Kinereti, ku sha mu calo ca mwishika, kabili na ku sha mu lulamba lwa Nafoti Dori ku masamba." 
Joshua11:3 Elyo kabili atumine inkombe ku bena Kenani ba ku kabanga na ba ku masamba, ku bena Amoli, ku bena Hiti, ku bena Perisi elyo na ku bena Yebusi aba mu calo ca ku mpili, kabili na ku bena Hifi, mwisamba lya Hemoni mu calo ca Misipa." 
Joshua11:4 Imfumu shonse shaishile ne mpuka ya fita fyashiko, kabili na bakabalwe impendwa iyikulu nganshi, pamo na maceleta. Kabili ubwingi bwa fita fya nkondo bwali kwati musensenga wa ku lulamba lwa bemba." 
Joshua11:5 Shonse ishi mfumu shasankenye pamo ifita fyabo no kucita inkambi imo pa menshi ya Meromu pakuti balwishe bwino abena Israeli. 
Joshua11:6 Elyo Yawe aeba Yoshua ati, “Tecakwesha ukubatiina, pantu mailo pa nshita nga ino ine ndi nokupeela bonse abalwani bobe mu minwe ya bena Israeli, ninshi balifye ifitumbi. Bakabalwe babo ukabalemanike no koca amaceleta yabo.”" 
Joshua11:7 Awe Yoshua ne fita fyonse bafika uko bali nokubapumikisha mu bulwi pa menshi ya Meromu. 
Joshua11:8 Na Yawe nao abapeela mu maboko ya bena Israeli. Nabo bacimfya no kubabutusha bonse ku nshila yaya ku Sidoni Mukulu, na ku Misirefoti Maimu elyo na kwishika lya Misipa ku kabanga, mpakafye babapwisha. Takwali uwashelepo nangu umo." 
Joshua11:9 Na Yoshua acitile ngefyo Yawe amwebele. Alemanika bakabalwe babo, elyo aoca na maceleta yabo yonse." 
Joshua11:10 Pa nshita ilya ine, Yoshua abwelulwike no kupoka Hasoli no kwipaya imfumu yauko ku lupanga. Pantu uyu Hasoli ewali musumba uukalamba untu yonse imisumba yashintilemo." 
Joshua11:11 Onsefye umuntu uwali muli uyu musumba, balimwipeye ku lupanga. Apeela bonsefye kukonaulwa, tamwali uwashelemo uwamweo nangu umo. Kabili aoca no musumba wa Hasoli wine." 
Joshua11:12 Yoshua acimfya no kupoka yonse imisumba ne mfumu yashiko, kabili aipaya bonse ku lupanga. Aonaulafye bonse ukulingana nefyo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe akonkomeshe." 
Joshua11:13 Nangu cali ifi, abena Israeli tabaocele umusumba nelyo umo uo bakuulile pa milundu ye loba lyabo, kanofye umusumba wa Hasoli, eo Yoshua aocele." 
Joshua11:14 Abena Israeli balisendele abene fyonse ifyo batapile, pamo ne fitekwa fya muli iyi misumba, lelo abantu bonsefye bena balibepeye ku lupanga mpaka bonse bapwililika. Tapali nangu umo uwashelepo uwamweo." 
Joshua11:15 Pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe umubomfi wakwe Mose, efyo Mose nao akonkomeshe Yoshua kabili nao efyo acitile. Tashilepo nangu kamo akabula ukubombwa pali fyonse ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Joshua11:16 Kanshi Yoshua epakupokafye icalo conse cilya. Icalo ca mpili, amatololo yonse aya Negebu, impangafye yonse iya calo ca Gosheni, icalo cabela pesamba, icalo ca Araba, icalo ca mpili sha bena Israeli ne mpanga ya mwishika." 
Joshua11:17 Kabili alipokele ne calo conse ukufuma ku lupili lwa Halaki, ulwanina ukulola ku sili, na ku Bali Gadi mwishika lya Lebanoni mwisamba lya lupili lwa Hemoni. Yoshua aikete imfumu shonse ashikomaula no kushipaya." 
Joshua11:18 Yoshua alwishishe ishi mfumu pa nshita iyitali. 
Joshua11:19 Takwali umusumba nelyo umo uwacitile icipangano ca cibote na bena Israeli, kanofye abena Hifi abaleikala mu Gibeoni. Imisumba imbi yonse baipokele mu bulwi." 
Joshua11:20 Pantu ni Yawe umwine ewabakoseshe imitima pakulwisha abena Israeli pakuti bonaulwe no kwipaiwa, no kuloba balobelele ukwabula uluse pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Joshua11:21 Kabili mu nshita ilya ine, Yoshua aile no kulofya abena Anakimu abaleikala mu calo ca mpili na ba mu Hebuloni, na ba mu Debi na mu Anabu, na bonse aba mu calo ca mpili conse ica bena Yuda, kabili no kufuma ku calo conse ica mpili sha bena Israeli. Yoshua apeele bonsefye kukonaulwa abantu pamo pene ne misumba yabo yonse." 
Joshua11:22 Takwali umwina Anakimu uwasheleko mu calo ca bena Israeli, kanofye mu Gasa na mu Gati elyo na mu Ashidodi emwashelefye bamo bamo." 
Joshua11:23 Kanshi Yoshua epakupoka icalo conse, ukulingana nefyo Yawe aebele Mose ukucita. Elyo acipeela ku bena Israeli ukuba icuma cabo umwabela impuka shabo cila luko. Awe ne calo conse catuushishe ku bulwi, caikalafye tondolo." 
Joshua12:1 Kanshi ishi e mfumu sha mu calo isho abena Israeli bacimfishe, kabili isho icalo cabo bapokele icabela kwishilya lya Yordani, ukufumafye ku mukonko wa Alinoni no kufika ku lupili lwa Hemoni, ukulundako ne ncende yonse iyabela lwa ku kabanga ka Araba." 
Joshua12:2 Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli, uwaleteeka mu Heshiboni, ateekele ukufuma ku lulamba lwa mumana wa Aroeli ukufika ku mukonko wa Alinoni, kabili ukufuma pakati nankati ka mukonko ukufikafye na ku mumana wa Yaboku, uwapakana na bena Amoni. Kabili alundilepo ukufika pakati nankati ka calo ca Gileadi." 
Joshua12:3 Kabili ateekele no lubali lwa ku kabanga ka Araba ukufika kuli bemba wa Kinereti lwa ku kabanga elyo no kufika kuli bemba wa Araba wine, Bemba Wamucele no kushinta na ku Beti Yeshimoti no kulungamafye ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, mwisamba lya mutentemuko wa Pisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Na umbi uwasheleko ni Ogi, imfumu ya mu musumba wa Bashani, e umo uwa mu bena Refaimu uwaleteeka mu Ashitaroti elyo na mu Edelei." 
Joshua12:5 Ewaleteeka no lupili lwine lwa Hemoni, Saleka, elyo na mu Bashani monse, mpakafye na ku mupaka wa bena Geshuri na Maakati, elyo no kufika pakati ka calo ca Gileadi no kuya fika ku mupaka wa Sihoni, imfumu ya bena Heshiboni." 
Joshua12:6 Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe pamo na bena Israeli ebacimfishe isho mfumu. Kabili Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe apeele ne calo cabo ku bena Rubeni, ku bena Gadi na kuli citika wa luko lwa bena Manase, baba e bene." 
Joshua12:7 Kanshi ishi e mfumu isho Yoshua na bena Israeli bacimfishe ishaleikala kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani ukufuma ku musumba wa Baali Gadi kwishika lya Lebanoni ukufika ku lupili lwa Halaki, ulwaiminina ukufika ku Seiri. Ifyalo fyabo ifyo Yoshua apeele abena Israeli, ukulingana na cila luko umo babelele, nifi:" 
Joshua12:8 Icalo ca mpili, icalo ca mwishika, icalo ca Araba, icalo ca mu mutentemuko wa mpili, icalo ca mu matololo elyo neca Negebu, ifyalo fya bena Hiti, abena Amoli, abena Kenani, abena Perisi, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi." 
Joshua12:9 Imfumu ya mu Yeriko imo, imfumu ya mu Ai mupepi na Betele imo." 
Joshua12:10 Imfumu ya mu Yerusalemu imo, imfumu ya mu Hebuloni imo." 
Joshua12:11 Imfumu ya mu Yamuti imo, imfumu ya mu Lakishi imo." 
Joshua12:12 Imfumu ya ku Egiloni imo, imfumu ya ku Gesa imo." 
Joshua12:13 Imfumu ya ku Debi imo, imfumu ya ku Geda imo." 
Joshua12:14 Imfumu ya ku Homa imo, imfumu ya ku Aradi imo." 
Joshua12:15 Imfumu ya ku Libina imo, imfumu ya ku Adulamu imo." 
Joshua12:16 Imfumu ya ku Makeda imo, imfumu ya ku Betele imo." 
Joshua12:17 Imfumu ya ku Tapua imo, imfumu ya ku Heferi imo." 
Joshua12:18 Imfumu ya ku Afeki imo, imfumu ya ku Lasharoni imo." 
Joshua12:19 Imfumu ya ku Madoni imo, imfumu ya ku Hasoli imo." 
Joshua12:20 Imfumu ya ku Shimuroni Meroni imo, imfumu ya ku Akishafu imo." 
Joshua12:21 Imfumu ya ku Tanaki imo, imfumu ya ku Megido imo." 
Joshua12:22 Imfumu ya ku Kadeshi imo, imfumu ya ku Yokineamu mu Kameli imo." 
Joshua12:23 Imfumu ya ku Dori mu Nafoti Dori imo, imfumu ya ku Goyimu mu Giligali imo." 
Joshua12:24 Imfumu ya ku Tirisa imo. Shonse pamo shali amakumi yatatu na imo (31). 
Joshua13:1 Ilyo Yoshua akotele nganshi, akwata imyaka iyingi, Yawe amwebele ati, “Naukota ne myaka naifula, kabili nakushala incende ya calo iyikulu nganshi, iyo ishilapokwa." 
Joshua13:2 Iyi e ncende iyisheleko: Yonsefye impanga ya bena Filisiti elyo na bena Geshuri," 
Joshua13:3 itulilefye ku mumana wa Shihori ku kabanga ka calo ca Egupto ukuya fika na ku mupaka wa Ekironi ku kapinda ka ku kuso, icalo ico baletila ca bena Kenani. Intungulushi isha Bafilisiti ishaleteeka ici calo shali shisano. Imo yaleteeka mu Gasa, imbi mu Ashidodi, imbi mu Ashikeloni, imbi mu Gati elyo imbi mu Ekironi. Imbi ncende iyisheleko ni mpanga ya bena Afi," 
Joshua13:4 iya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, na yonse impanga ya bena Kenani, elyo na Meara icalo ca bena Sidoni no kufikafye ku Afeki, ku mupaka wa bena Amoli." 
Joshua13:5 Elyo incende yonse iya bena Gebali, na yonse mpanga ya bena Lebanoni ukuyafye lwa ku kabanga ukufuma ku Baali Gadi mwisamba lya lupili lwa Hemoni ukuyafye mpaka ku Lebo Hamati." 
Joshua13:6 Bonse abekala mu calo ca mpili ukufumafye ku Lebanoni ukufika ku Misilefoti Maimu, bonsefye abena Sidoni, Ine wine ne mwine nkabafulumuna ukufuma pa ntanshi ya bena Israeli. Umone ukuti ici calo cayakanishiwa bwino ku bena Israeli nge cacishilano, pamo ngefyo nakwebele ukucita." 
Joshua13:7 Eico nomba cakanye ku nko pabula kukuba icakaniko ca cishilano cashiko, elyo na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase nalo ulupeeleko.”" 
Joshua13:8 Elyo umbi citika wa luko lwakwa Manase, abena Rubeni na bena Gadi bapeelwe iciputulwa cimbi kwishilya lya Yordani ku kabanga ngefyo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe abapeele kukuba icakaniko ca cishilano cabo." 
Joshua13:9 Abashilile icalo ukufuma ku Aroeli icaba mu lulamba lwa mukonko wa Alinoni, no musumba pakati nankati ka mukonko no kubikako, ne calo conse icabatama ica Medeba no kuya shinta na ku Diboni." 
Joshua13:10 Kabili abashilile ne misumba yonse iyo Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli, uwali imfumu ya mu Heshiboni ukuya fikafye na ku mupaka wa bena Amoni." 
Joshua13:11 Elyo kuli ici cine calo, kwalundilwe na Gileadi ne calo ca bena Geshuri na bena Maakati, bonse aba ku lupili lwa Hemoni, ne calo ca Bashani ukushinta na ku Saleka." 
Joshua13:12 Kwalundilweko icalo conse ica mfumu Ogi ku Bashani, uwaleteeka mu Ashitaroti na mu Edelei, kabili ewashelepofye ku bena Refaimu. Pantu Mose alibacimfishe bonse no kupoka icalo cabo." 
Joshua13:13 Lelo abena Israeli tabafulumwinemo abena Geshuri na bena Maakati, bena batwalililafye ukulaikala pamo na bena Israeli ukufika no bushiku bwa lelo." 
Joshua13:14 Kanofye uluko lwakwa Levi lwena Mose talupeeleko icakaniko ca cishilano ca calo. Pantu abena Levi bena imituulo ye lambo iyakoca iyo baletuula kuli Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, yena eyali icakaniko cacishilano cabo, pamo ngefyo Lesa abalaile."
