Joshua13:15 Ifi efyo Mose ayakenye icalo ku luko lwakwa Rubeni, umwabelele imikowa yabo:" 
Joshua13:16 Icalo cafumine ku Aroeli iyabela mu lulamba lwa mukonko wa Alinoni, no musumba pakati nankati ka mukonko no kubikako ne calo conse icabatama ica Medeba," 
Joshua13:17 ukufika ku Heshiboni ne misumba yonse iyaciko iyaba apabatama, ukusanshako Diboni, Bamoti Baali, Beti Baali Meoni," 
Joshua13:18 Yahasi, Kedemoti, Mefati," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriataimu, Sibuma, Sereti Shaha pa lupili lwa mwishika," 
Joshua13:20 Beti Peori, imitentemuko ya Pisiga, na Beti Yeshimoti." 
Joshua13:21 Ekutila misumba yonse iyaba apabatama, elyo ne calo conse cakwa Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli, uwali imfumu mu Heshiboni, ulya Mose acimfishe pamo pene na bashamfumu ba bena Midiani, Efi, Rekemu, Suri, Huri na Reba, na bashamfumu banono abaleikala muli cilya calo." 
Joshua13:22 Ukusansha kubo baipeye mu bulwi ku bena Israeli, pali Balamu umwana mwaume wakwa Beori, uwali ŋanga iyalebuka." 
Joshua13:23 Umumana wa Yordani ewali e mupaka wa calo ca bena Rubeni. Imisumba pamo ne mishi yabo eyali e cishilano ca bena Rubeni, mu ndupwa shabo umo babelele." 
Joshua13:24 Ifi efyo Mose ayakenye icalo ku luko lwakwa Gadi, umwabelele indupwa shabo:" 
Joshua13:25 Icalo ca Yaseri, ne misumba yonse iya mu Gileadi, elyo na citika wa calo ca bena Amoni ukufikafye na ku Aroeli iyabeela mupepi na ku Raba." 
Joshua13:26 Kabili ukufuma ku Heshiboni ukufikafye na ku Ramati Misipa na Betonimu. Elyo kabili ukufuma ku Manaimu ukufikafye na ku mupaka wa calo ca Debi. 
Joshua13:27 Elyo na mwishika Beti Haramu, Beti Nimura, Sukoti na Safoni elyo ne calo icasheleko ica Sihoni imfumu mu Heshiboni, umumana wa Yordani ewali umupaka wa calo consefye ukufika na ku mpela ya bemba wa Kinereti uwali kwishilya." 
Joshua13:28 Kanshi ici calo kumo kwine ne misumba ne mishi yaciko, efyali cakaniko ca cishilano ca bena Gadi, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua13:29 Ifi efyo Mose ayakenye icalo kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase, nabo ecali icakaniko ca citika wa bana bakwa Manase umwabelele indupwa shabo:" 
Joshua13:30 Icalo catendekelefye ukufuma ku Manaimu ukubikako icitungu conse ica Bashani ne calo conse icakwa Ogi imfumu ya ku Bashani, ne misumba iyakwa Yairi mu Bashani mwine amakumi mutanda," 
Joshua13:31 elyo citika wa calo ca Gileadi, Ashitaroti elyo na Edelei, imisumba yakwa Ogi imfumu ya mu Bashani. Ici e calo capeelwe kuli bamwana Makiri, uwali umwana mwaume wakwa Manase. Capeelwe kuli citika wa bamwana Makiri, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua13:32 Ifi e fyalo ifyo Mose ayakenye ukuba icishilano ilyo ali mu mawanga ya Moabu, kwishilya lya Yordani, ku kabanga ka Yeriko." 
Joshua13:33 Lelo uluko lwa bena Levi, Mose talupeeleko icakaniko ca cishilano nakalya, pantu Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, ena e cishilano cabo, pamo ngefyo Lesa umwine abalaile." 
Joshua14:1 Nomba ishi e ncende ishapeelwe ku bena Israeli nge cakaniko ca cishilano cabo mu calo ca Kenani, ico Eleasa shimapepo, Yoshua umwana mwaume wakwa Nuni ne ntungulushi sha ndupwa sha nko sha bena Israeli bayakenye." 
Joshua14:2 Ifyakaniko fya cishilano cabo fyapeelwe ukulingana no kupendula ku nko pabula elyo na citika wa luko lumo, pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose." 
Joshua14:3 Inko shibili na citika wa luko lumo, Mose abapeele icakaniko ca cishilano icalo icabela kwishilya lya Yordani, lelo abena Levi bena tabakenyeko ici cakaniko ca cishilano ca calo pakati kabo." 
Joshua14:4 Pantu abana bakwa Yosefu abaume bali inko shibili, ulwakwa Manase no lwakwa Efulemu. Abena Levi tabapokeleko icakaniko ca mpanga, kanofye imisumba yakwikalamo ne fitungu fyakucemenamo imikuni ya ŋombe, imbushi ne mpaanga shabo." 
Joshua14:5 Kanshi abena Israeli epakwakana icalo ukulingana nomo Yawe akonkomeshe Mose. 
Joshua14:6 Nomba abantu aba mu luko lwakwa Yuda baile kuli Yoshua ku Giligali, elyo Kalebu mwana Yefune umwina Kenasi atile kuli ena, “Nawishiba ifyo Yawe aebele Mose umuntu wakwa Lesa ku Kadeshi Banea pa mulandu obe elyo na ine." 
Joshua14:7 Ine nali ne myaka amakumi yane iyakufyalwa lintu Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe antumine ukufuma ku Kadeshi Banea mukufwailisha no kulengula icalo. Elyo na ine ilyo nabwelulwikeko, namuletele akasebo ukulingana nefyo naile sanga." 
Joshua14:8 Nomba bamunyinane abo naile nabo, banenwine abantu nokulenga baba no mwenso. Lelo ine nakonkelefye no mutima onse ifyo Yawe Lesa wandi anjebele ukucita." 
Joshua14:9 Eico kanshi pali bulya bushiku bwine, Mose alapile umulapo kuli ine ati, ‘Icalo ico waile nyantamo amakasa yobe cili nokuba icakaniko ca cishilano cobe pamo pene na bana bobe pe na pe. Pantu walikonka no mutima obe onse ifyo Yawe Lesa wandi afwaya.’" 
Joshua14:10 Eico nomba, pamo ngefyo wamona, Yawe ansunga ukuba uwamweo pa myaka amakumi yane na isano (45) ukufuma inshita Yawe asosele ifi kuli Mose. Cali lintu abena Israeli baleendauka mu matololo. Eico mona ine ilelo ndi ne myaka amakumi cine konse konse na isano (85)!" 
Joshua14:11 Na lelo line ine ncili uwamaka nga filya fine nali mu bushiku Mose antuminemo. Na ndakai line ncili na maka yakuya ku bulwi no kubwela, ngefyo nali pali ilya inshita." 
Joshua14:12 Eico kanshi nomba mpeela ici calo ca ku mpili ico Yawe andaile pa bushiku bulya. Pantu walyumfwile we mwine pali ilya inshita ukuti abena Anaki eko bacili, kabili imisumba yabo ikalamba nganshi, iya malinga. Ndecetekela Yawe alengafwa, mbafulumunemo, pamo ngefyo asosele.”" 
Joshua14:13 Awe Yoshua epakupaala Kalebu umwana mwaume wakwa Yefune no kupeela icalo ca Hebuloni ukuba icakaniko ca cishilano cakwe. 
Joshua14:14 Eico icalo ca Hebuloni ukushinta na pali lelo ecaba icishilano cakwa Kalebu, umwana mwaume wakwa Yefune, umwina Kenasi, pa mulandu wakuti akonkele amashiwi yakwa Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli no mutima onse." 
Joshua14:15 Ishina lyakale ilya Hebuloni ni Kiriati Ariba, pantu Ariba ali umuntu uwacindamisha pakati ka bena Anakimu. Kabili mu calo ubulwi bwalipwile, mwabafye tondolo." 
Joshua15:1 Icitungu icapendwilwe capeelwe ku ba mu luko lwakwa Yuda, umwabelele ndupwa shabo, caile shintafye na ku mupaka wa Edomu na ku matololo ya Sini mupepi pepifye na kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Joshua15:2 Uyu mupaka wabo uwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, watampile ukufuma pa mpela ya Bemba Wamucele, ukutampa petenga lya bemba uwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Joshua15:3 Waile abukila ku kapinda ka ku kulyo pa mupaka wa Akilabimu ukutwalilila ukufika na ku Sini. Kabili wayafye na ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ka Kadeshi Banea. Elyo uyu mupaka wapitilila Hesroni ukwisa ku Adali no kushokela ku Kaka. 
Joshua15:4 Kabili waile na ku Asimoni no kusuntinkana na kamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto, ukuya pelela kuli bemba. Uyu ewali e mupaka wabo uwabelele ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Joshua15:5 Ku kabanga nako umupaka ni Bemba Wamucele, ukuya fikafye napo umumana wa Yordani wawila muli bemba. Elyo umupaka wa ku kapinda ka ku kuso nao wayambile ukufuma pa musoso wa bemba pa mawilo ya mumana wa Yordani." 
Joshua15:6 Uyu mupaka nao walipitilile mpakafye na ku Beti Hogula no kufika ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka Beti Araba ku Cilibwe cakwa Boani mwana Rubeni. 
Joshua15:7 Kabili umupaka waya ku Debi ukufuma kwishika lya Ako no kushokela ku kapinda ka ku kuso ku Giligali, uwalungatana no mupokapoka wa Adumimu uwabela ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ka mukonko. Kabili umupaka wapitilila ukuya ku tumfukumfuku twa menshi twa Eni Shemeshi ukuya pelela pa Eni Rogeli" 
Joshua15:8 Elyo kabili umupaka wanina ukufuma mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu ukukonka ku kapinda ka ku kulyo mwisamba lya lupili lwa musumba wa Yebusi, emukutila Yerusalemu. Ukufuma kulya, umupaka waisa ninika pa mulu wa lupili lwa ku masamba ya mupokapoka wa Hinomu, ku mpela ye shika lya Refaimu, lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Joshua15:9 Elyo kabili ukufuma pa mulu wa lupili, umupaka washokela ku kamfukumfuku ka menshi ya Nefutoa, ukwisa fumina ku misumba ya lupili lwa Efuloni no kupitilila ukuya ku Bala, emukutila ku Kiriati Yarimu." 
Joshua15:10 Kabili ukufuma ku Bala, washokela ku masamba ku lupili lwa Seiri, elyo no kulambata mu mbali ya lupili lwa Yelimu, emukutila Kesaloni, ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kutwalilila ukuya ku Beti Shemeshi, ukwabukila ku Timuna." 
Joshua15:11 Umupaka kabili waya ku mutentemuko wa lupili lwa Ekironi ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kwalukila ku Shikeroni no kucilinganya ulupili lwa Bala no kuya fika ku Yabineli. Uyu mupaka wapelele muli bemba. 
Joshua15:12 Umupaka wa ku masamba wali lulamba lwa Bemba Mukulu wine. Iyi e mipaka iyashingulwike abantu bakwa Yuda ukulingana ne ndupwa shabo. 
Joshua15:13 Ukulingana nefyo Yawe akonkomeshe Yoshua, icipande cimo ica calo cakwa Yuda calipeelwe kuli Kalebu umwana mwaume wakwa Yefune. Amupeele Kiriati Ariba, emukutila Hebuloni. Ariba ali ni wishi wakwa Anaki." 
Joshua15:14 Kabili Kalebu afulumwine ukufuma ku Hebuloni bamwana Anaki batatu: Sheshai, Aimani elyo na Talimai." 
Joshua15:15 Kabili aimine no kuya lwisha abantu abaleikala mu Debi, kale uyu musumba waleitwa Kiriati Sefe." 
Joshua15:16 Elyo Kalebu atile “Nkapeela umwana wandi umwanakashi Akisa kukuba umukashi ku mwaume onse uukalwisha no kupoka umusumba wa Kiriati Sefe.” 
Joshua15:17 Awe Otinieli umwana mwaume wakwa Kenasi, munyina wakwa Kalebu wine, ewapokele uyu musumba. Nao Kalebu epakumupeela umwana wakwe umwanakashi Akisa ukuba umukashi wakwe." 
Joshua15:18 Ubushiku ilyo Akisa akuukile, Otinieli amupamfya ukulombako wishi incende yakulimamo. Awe ilyo aikilafye pali punda, Kalebu wishi amwipusha ati, “Bushe cinshi ulefwaya nkucitile?”" 
Joshua15:19 Nao mwane ayasuka ati, “Tata ndefwaya mumpeeleko icilambu cimo icikankala. Apo ni mu matololo ya Negebu mwampeela impanga, mpeeleniko no tumfukumfuku twa menshi.” Nao wishi Kalebu epakumupeela utumfukumfuku twa pa mulu wa lupili elyo no twa mwishika." 
Joshua15:20 Kanshi ici e cakaniko ca cishilano ca ba nko sha bena Yuda, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua15:21 Imisumba iyabelele ku kapinda ka ku kulyo iya bena Yuda mu calo ca Negebu lwa ku mupaka wa Edomu yali niyi: Kabiseli, Eda, Yaguri," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dinona, Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Kadeshi, Hasoli, Itinani," 
Joshua15:24 Sifu, Telemu, Bealoti," 
Joshua15:25 Hasoli Hadata, Kerioti Hesroni, emukutila Hasoli," 
Joshua15:26 Amami, Shema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Hazali Gada, Heshiboni, Betipeleti," 
Joshua15:28 Hasa Shuali, Beresheba, Bisiotiya" 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Imu, Esemu," 
Joshua15:30 Elitoladi, Kesili, Homa," 
Joshua15:31 Sikilagi, Madimana, Sansana," 
Joshua15:32 Labaoti, Shilihimu, Aini, pamo na Rimoni, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali amakumi yabili na pabula (29)." 
Joshua15:33 Imisumba yabela lwa pesamba lya mpili nayo yali niyi: Eshitaoli, Sola, Ashina," 
Joshua15:34 Sanoa, Eni Ganimu, Tapua, Enamu," 
Joshua15:35 Yamuti, Adulamu, Sokoyo, Aseka," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraimu, Aditaimu, Gedera pamo pene na Gederotaimu, yonse imisumba pamo pene ne mishi yabo yali ikumi limo na ine." 
Joshua15:37 Imisumba na imbi ni Senani, Hadashah, Migidoli Gadi," 
Joshua15:38 Dileani, Misipa, Yokiteli," 
Joshua15:39 Lakishi, Bosikati, Egiloni," 
Joshua15:40 Kaboni, Lamamu, Kitilishi," 
Joshua15:41 Gedaloti, Beti Dagoni, Nama, elyo na Makeda, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali ikumi limo na mutanda (16)." 
Joshua15:42 Imisumba na imbi ni Libina, Eta, Ashani," 
Joshua15:43 Ifuta, Ashina, Nesibi," 
Joshua15:44 Keila Akisibi na Malesha, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali pabula." 
Joshua15:45 Na imbi misumba ni Ekironi, amaboma ne mishi yauko," 
Joshua15:46 ukufuma ku masamba ya Ekironi, ukulola kuli bemba na yonse incende ya Ashidodi, ukulundako ne mishi yauko." 
Joshua15:47 Imisumba na imbi ni Ashidodi, amaboma ne mishi yauko, Gasa, amaboma ne mishi yauko ukuya fikafye na ku kamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto no kukonka ululamba lwa Bemba Mukulu." 
Joshua15:48 Mu calo ca mpili namo mwali imisumba na imbi: Shami, Yati, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kiriati Sana, emukutila Debi," 
Joshua15:50 Anabi, Eshitemo, Animu," 
Joshua15:51 Gosheni, Holoni na Gilo, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali ikumi limo na umo (11)." 
Joshua15:52 Kabili mwali na Alabu, Duma, Eshani," 
Joshua15:53 Yanimu, Beti Tapua, Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 Humita, Kiriati Ariba, emukutila Hebuloni, na Siori, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali pabula." 
Joshua15:55 Kabili mwali na Maoni, Kameli, Sifu, Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 Yesireli, Yokideamu, Sanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Kaini, Gibea na Timuna, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali ikumi limo." 
Joshua15:58 Na imbi imisumba yali ni Halihuli, Beti Suli, Gedori," 
Joshua15:59 Malati, Beti Anoti na Elitekoni, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali mutanda." 
Joshua15:60 Umusumba wa Kiriati Bali, uo batila, Kiriati Yelimu na Raba, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali ibili." 
Joshua15:61 Mu matololo namo mwali imisumba na imbi, Beti Araba, Midini, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibushani, Umusumba wa mucele, na Eni Gedi, yonse imisumba ne mishi yabo yali mutanda." 
Joshua15:63 Nomba abena Yuda balifililwe ukutamfya abena Yebusi, abaleikala mu Yerusalemu. Eico ukufika no bushiku bwa lelo, abena Yebusi bacili baleikala na bena Yuda mu Yerusalemu mwine." 
Joshua16:1 Umupaka wa citungu capeelwe ku bana bakwa Yosefu wayambile ku mumana wa Yordani ku Yeriko, lwa ku kabanga ku menshi ya Yeriko, no kuninika ukufuma kulya ukupita mu matololo ukuya ku calo ca mpili sha Betele." 
Joshua16:2 Uyu mupaka watwalilile ukufuma ku Betele, emukutila Lusi, ukwabukila ku calo ca bena Aki mu Ataloti." 
Joshua16:3 Kabili watentemukile lwa ku masamba ku mupaka wa calo ca bena Yafuleti no kuya fikafye na ku mupaka wa mwishika lya Beti Haloni no kushinta ku Gesa, wayapelela na muli bemba." 
Joshua16:4 Kanshi ici e calo Manase na Efulemu bamwana Yosefu bapokelele ukuba icakaniko ca cishilano cabo. 
Joshua16:5 Kanshi ici ecali icalo ca bamwana Efulemu, umwabelele indupwa shabo. Umupaka wa cakaniko ca cishilano cabo watendekele ku Ataloti Ada ku kabanga ukuya pa mulu wa Beti Oloni," 
Joshua16:6 no kupitilila ukuya fika kuli bemba. Kabili ukufuma ku Mikimetati lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kushokela ku kabanga walungama ku Tanati Shilo, ukupita lubali ku Yanoa lwa ku kabanga." 
Joshua16:7 Elyo kabili watentemukile ukufuma ku Yanoa ukuya ku Ataloti na ku Nala, mpaka ukufika ku Yeriko no kwisa tuntukila ku Yordani." 
Joshua16:8 Ukufuma ku Tapua, umupaka waile ku masamba ku mumana wa Kana no kuya shinta kuli bemba. Ici e cakaniko ca cishilano ica luko lwa bana bakwa Efulemu, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua16:9 Elyo kabili kwalundilwe ne misumba yonsefye ne mishi yabo iyali mu mbali iyapatwililwe ku bena Efulemu mukati ka cakaniko ca cishilano ca bena Manase. 
Joshua16:10 Na muli ici calo tabatamfishemo abena Kenani abaleikala mu Gesa. Na mu bushiku bwe lelo bwine abena Kenani bekalafye pakati ka bena Efulemu, lelo baba mukubomba umulaasa." 
Joshua17:1 Kabili ici ecali icitungu icapeelwe ku luko lwakwa Manase, nge beli lyakwa Yosefu, kuli Makiri nao uwali ibeli lyakwa Manase kabili cikolwe ca bena Gileadi. Bapeelwe icalo ca Gileadi ne ca Bashani pa mulandu wakuti abena Makiri bali fita fyabulwi nganshi." 
Joshua17:2 Kanshi abana abaume bambi abakwa Manase nabo bapeelwe impanga umwabela indupwa shabo: Abana bakwa Abiesa, na bakwa Heleki, na bakwa Asirieli, na bakwa Shekemu, na bakwa Heferi pamo pene na bakwa Shemida. Aba e bana baume bakwa Manase mwana Yosefu ukulingana ne ndupwa shabo." 
Joshua17:3 Nomba Selofeadi umwana mwaume wakwa Heferi mwana Gileadi, mwana Makiri, nao uwali umwana mwaume wakwa Manase, wena takwetepo abana abaume lelo alifye na bana abanakashi beka beka. Aba bana abanakashi amashina yabo yali ni Mala, Nao, Hogila, Milika elyo na Tisa." 
Joshua17:4 Awe bonse baile kuli shimapepo Eleasa na Yoshua mwana Nuni elyo na ku ntungulushi no kuyatila, “Yawe alikonkomeshe Mose ukutupeelako icakaniko ca cishilano pamo na bandume shesu.” Eico Yoshua nao alibapeele icakaniko ca cishilano ukulinganafye na bandume shabo muli wishi umo, ukulingana ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe." 
Joshua17:5 Kanshi abena Manase bapeelwe ifiputulwa ikumi limo ifya calo ukwabula ukubikako icalo ca Gileadi ne ca Bashani ifyabela kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani. 
Joshua17:6 Pantu bamwana Manase abanakashi aba mu luko lwakwe balipeelweko icakaniko ca cishilano pamo ne ndume shabo. Eico kanshi icalo ca Gileadi icasheleko naco cali ca bana bambi abasheleko abakwa Manase. 
Joshua17:7 Icalo cakwa Manase catampile ukufuma ku Asheri no kuya fika ku Mikimetati icali ku kabanga ka Shekemu. Umupaka walalenye ukufuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso ukuya kuminkanyako na bekashi ba mu Eni Tapua. 
Joshua17:8 Manase akwete icalo ca Tapua, lelo umusumba wine uwa Tapua mu mupaka wakwa Manase wali wa bena Efulemu." 
Joshua17:9 Elyo kabili umupaka watwalilile ukulola ku kapinda ka kulyo ku mumana wa Kana. Uku nako kwaliko imisumba iya bena Efulemu iyashintene ne misumba ya bena Manase, lelo umupaka wa bena Manase wakonkele ku kapinda ka ku kuso aka mumana no kuya pelela kuli bemba." 
Joshua17:10 Ku kapinda ka ku kulyo kwali icalo cakwa Efulemu, ku kapinda ka ku kuso nako kwali icalo cakwa Manase. Icalo cakwa Manase cashintilefye na muli bemba no kuba e mupaka pakati ka Asheri ku kapinda ka ku kuso elyo ku kabanga nako ni Isaka." 
Joshua17:11 Mu calo cakwa Isaka na Asheri, Manase namo alikwetemo Beti Shani ne mishi yauko, Ibuleamu ne mishi yauko, abantu abaleikala mu Dori ne mishi yauko. Elyo akwete na bantu baleikala mu Eni Dori na mu mishi yauko, na baleikala mu Tana na mu mishi yauko, na ba mu Megido na mu tumishi twauko elyo no walenga itatu ni Nafoti." 
Joshua17:12 Lelo abena Manase balifililwe ukupoka iyi misumba, pantu abena Kenani bakoselepofye ukulaikala muli cilya calo." 
Joshua17:13 Eico, ilyo abena Israeli bakosele nganshi, babikile abena Kenani kukubomba umulimo wa mulaasa. Nalyo line tababatamfishe nangu panono." 
Joshua17:14 Elyo ulupwa lwakwa Yosefu baebele Yoshua abati, “Bushe cinshi watupeelela iciputulwa cimofye ica cakaniko ca cishilano panuma yakupendula? Ifwe tuli bengi nganshi kabili Yawe alitupaala.”" 
Joshua17:15 Nao Yoshua epakubasuka ati, “Imwe nga cakuti muli bengi nganshi, ne calo cakwa Efulemu ica mu mpili naco nacicepesha kukwikalamo, imwe mufwilefye ukuya mu mutengo no kwamba ukuwamya mwe bene apakwikala mu calo ca bena Perisi na bena Refaimu.”" 
Joshua17:16 Elyo ulupwa lwakwa Yosefu nalo lwayaswike aluti, “Awe mukwai, icalo ca mpili ifwe teti citukumane, kabili abantu bonse abena Kenani abekala mu cinika bonse balikwata amaceleta ya fyela bonse abekala mu Beti Shani na mu mishi yauko mumbali, elyo na bonse abaikala mwishika lya Yesireli.”" 
Joshua17:17 Elyo Yoshua aebele aba ŋanda yakwa Yosefu ukufika ku ba ŋanda yakwa Efulemu na Manase ati, “Icine cine imwe muli bengi nganshi kabili aba maka nganshi. Tamwakakwatefye iciputulwa icapendwilwe cimo iyoo," 
Joshua17:18 lelo icalo ica mpili naco cili nokuba cenu. Nangu cabamo imiti nomba ciwamyenifye, cili nokuba icakaniko ca cishilano cenu, ukufika na ku mipaka yakutali, cikaba cenu nangufye abena Kenani bengakwata amaceleta ya fyela no kuba abakosa. Kuti mwabatamfyamo.”" 
Joshua18:1 Kabili ulukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli lwalongene ku Shilo no kwimika Itenti lyakukumaninamo kulya kwine, pantu icalo cali mu maboko yabo." 
Joshua18:2 Kuli ilya ncende kwashele aba nko cine lubali isha bena Israeli abashali tabalapeelwako icakaniko ca cishilano cabo. 
Joshua18:3 Eico Yoshua atile ku bena Israeli, “Bushe mukafika lilali mukupembela ilyo mukatampa ukupoka icalo ico Yawe, Lesa wa bashinwe, amupeela?" 
Joshua18:4 Kanshi saleni ukufuma muli cila luko abantu batatu, pakuti mbatume bakaye pitana mu calo conse mukuya lemba ifyo caba nefyo bali nokucakana. Elyo nomba bali nokubwelela kuli ine." 
Joshua18:5 Mulingile ukwakanya icalo mu fiputulwa cine lubali. Icalo cakwa Yuda cili nokushala filya fine ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, elyo aba ŋanda yakwa Yosefu nabo bakaba mu calo cabo icabela ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Joshua18:6 Panuma yakulemba bwino bwino iyi mipaka cine lubali ya ici calo, mukalete kuli ine elyo na ine nkamupendwilako pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wesu." 
Joshua18:7 Pantu abena Levi bena tabakapeelweko iciputulwa ca muli ici calo cenu, pa mulandu wakuti bena icakaniko ca cishilano cabo, ca bushimapepo bwakubombela Yawe. Kabili Gadi, Rubeni, elyo na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase bena balipokelela kale icakaniko ca cishilano cabo ku lubali lwa ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani. Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe ewabapeele ici calo.”" 
Joshua18:8 Awe abaume baya mukulengula icalo ico Yoshua abebele ukuyako ati, “Kabiyeni no kuya pitana mu calo elyo no kulemba ifyo muli nokuya sanga muli ici calo. Elyo mukabwele kuli ine. Kabili ine nkalamupendwilako kuno kwine ku Shilo pa cinso cakwa Yawe.”" 
Joshua18:9 Nabo abantu epakwima no kulapitana mu calo conse. Kabili balembele mu citabo fyonse ifyo basangile mu musumba no musumba, mu fiputulwa cine lubali. Babwelelemo na kuli Yoshua ku nkambi ku Shilo" 
Joshua18:10 Yoshua nao epakubapendwilako mu Shilo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Elyo ayakenye ne calo ku bena Israeli ukulingana nomo inko shabo shabelele. 
Joshua18:11 Icitungu icakubalilapo icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Benjamini, umwabelele indupwa shabo. Icalo babapeele cali pakati ka nko sha Bayuda ne shakwa Yosefu." 
Joshua18:12 Ku kapinda ka ku kuso umupaka watampila ku mumana wa Yordani, wapitilila ukuya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ku mutentemuko wa Yeriko no kulola ku masamba ku calo ca mpili, kabili waisa tuntukila ku matololo ya Beti Afeni." 
Joshua18:13 Ukufuma uku, umupaka wayabukila ku kapinda ka ku kulyo no kutentemukila ku Lusi, emukutila Betele, no kuya lwa panshi ku Ataloti Ada elyo na ku lupili lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo mwishika lya Beti Horoni." 
Joshua18:14 Ukufuma pa lupili ulwalungatana na Beti Horoni lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, umupaka washokele ku kapinda ka ku kuso lwa ku masamba no kutuntukila ku Kiriati Bali, emukutila Kiriati Yarimu, umusumba wa bana bakwa Yuda. Kanshi e lubali lwa ku masamba." 
Joshua18:15 Lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, umupaka watampile pa mpela ya Kiriati Yarimu, ukuya ku masamba. Kabili umupaka waisa tuntukila ku kamfukumfuku ka menshi ya Nefutoa." 
Joshua18:16 Umupaka kabili waikila ku mutentemuko wa lupili ukulungatana no mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu, ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwishilya lye shika lya Refaimu. Kabili watwalilile ukuya panshi ya mupokapoka wa Hinomu, ukukonkafye umutentemuko wa musumba wa Yebusi no kuya shinta ku Eni Rogeli." 
Joshua18:17 Walola ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kuya ku Eni Shemeshi, watuntukila ku Geliloti iyalungatana no mupokapoka wa Adumimu no kupitilila ukuya ku Cilibwe cakwa Boani, mwana Rubeni." 
Joshua18:18 Kabili walambata Beti Araba ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kutentemukila panshi ku Araba. 
Joshua18:19 Elyo kabili umupaka walolele ku mutentemuko wa ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwa Beti Hogila no kutuntukila kuli Bemba Wamucele ku kapinda ka ku kuso, pa mawilo ya mumana wa Yordani ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Uyu ewali umupaka wa calo cabo uwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Joshua18:20 Umumana wa Yordani nao ewali e mupaka lubali lwa ku kabanga. Iyi e mipaka ya luko lwakwa Benjamini umwabela indupwa shabo ukulingana no mwapelele imipaka ukushinguluka. 
Joshua18:21 Nomba imisumba ya luko lwakwa Benjamini umwabelele ndupwa shabo yali ni Yeriko, Beti Hogila, Emeki Kesis," 
Joshua18:22 Beti Araba, Semaraimu, Betele," 
Joshua18:23 Afimu, Pala, Ofala," 
Joshua18:24 Kefa Amoni, Ofini na Geba. Imisumba yali ikumi limo na ibili ne mishi yaiko." 
Joshua18:25 Kabili Gibeoni, Rama, Beloti," 
Joshua18:26 Misipa, Kefila, Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 Rekemu, Ilipeli, Tala," 
Joshua18:28 Sela, Aelefa, no musumba wa Yebusi, emukutila Yerusalemu, Gibea na Kiriati. Imisumba yali ikumi limo na ine, elyo ne mishi yaiko. Ici ecali icakaniko ca cishilano ca bamwana Benjamini ne mikowa yabo." 
Joshua19:1 Icitungu cabubili icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Simeoni, umwabelele indupwa shabo. Icalo ca cakaniko ca cishilano cabo cali pakati ka calo ca bamwana Yuda." 
Joshua19:2 Casanshisheko na Beresheba, nangu Sheba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Hasa Shuali, Bala, Esemu," 
Joshua19:4 Elitoladi, Betihuri, Homa," 
Joshua19:5 Sikilagi, Beti Makaboti, Hasa Susa," 
Joshua19:6 Beti Labaoti na Shaluheni. Imisumba yali ikumi limo na itatu (13) pamo ne mishi yaiko. 
Joshua19:7 Imisumba na imbi ni Aini, Rimoni, Eta na Ashani. Imisumba yali ine, pamo ne mishi yaiko." 
Joshua19:8 Elyo imishi yonsefye iyashinguluka iyi misumba ukufikafye na ku Baalati Bele na Rama mu Negebu. Kanshi ici e cakaniko ca cishilano ca luko lwakwa Simeoni umwabelele indupwa shabo. 
Joshua19:9 Icalo ca cakaniko ca cishilano ca bamwana Simeoni caputwilwe ukufuma ku calo ca bana bakwa Yuda, pantu icalo ca bana bakwa Yuda calicilile kufyo bali nokukwata. Eico abana bakwa Simeoni bapeelwe icakaniko cabo mulya mwine mukati ka calo cakwa Yuda." 
Joshua19:10 Icitungu cabutatu icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Sebuloni, umwabelele indupwa shabo. Umupaka wa cakaniko ca cishilano cabo waile fikafye na ku Salidi." 
Joshua19:11 Ukuya lwa ku masamba, umupaka wailefika ku Malala wayaikata Dabesheti no kupalamina mupepi no mumana wa Yokineamu." 
Joshua19:12 Waishile yalukila na ku kabanga, ukufuma ku Salidi uko akasuba katulila ukuya fika ku calo ca Kisiloti Tabo no kupitilila ukuya ku Dabelati ukufikafye na ku Yafiya." 
Joshua19:13 Kabili watwalilile ukuya ku kabanga, mpakafye na ku Gati Heferi ku Eti Kasini, uyu mupaka watuntukile Palimoni no kwalukila ku Nea." 
Joshua19:14 Kulya nako umupaka washokela ku kapinda ka ku kuso ku Hanatoni, wapelela na kwishilya lya Ifitaeli." 
Joshua19:15 Imisumba iyalundilweko ni Katati, Nahalali, Shimuroni, Idala elyo na Betelemu. Kwali ne misumba ikumi limo na ibili pamo ne mishi yaiko." 
Joshua19:16 Iyi misumba ne mishi yaiko eyali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca bana bakwa Sebuloni, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua19:17 Icitungu cabune icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Isaka umwabelele indupwa shabo. 
Joshua19:18 Icalo cabo cafikile ku Yesireli elyo no kulundapo na imbi misumba yabikilweko ni Kesuloti, Shunemu," 
Joshua19:19 Afalaimu, Shioni, Anahalati," 
Joshua19:20 Rabiti, Kishioni, Ebesi," 
Joshua19:21 Remeti, Eni Ganimu, Eni Hada na Beti Pasesi." 
Joshua19:22 Umupaka wapitile ku Tabo, Shahasuma na Beti Shemeshi no kuya pelela ku mumana wa Yordani. Muli ici calo mwali imisumba ikumi limo na mutanda (16) pamo ne mishi yaiko." 
Joshua19:23 Neyi misumba pamo ne mishi yaiko efyali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca luko lwakwa Isaka, umwabela indupwa shabo." 
Joshua19:24 Icitungu cabusano icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Asheri, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua19:25 Icalo cabo calundilweko ne misumba na imbi: Helikati, Hali, Beteni, Akishafu," 
Joshua19:26 Alameleki, Amadi elyo na Mishali. Ku masamba umupaka wafikile ku Kameli na mu mumana wa Shioli Libinati." 
Joshua19:27 Kabili umupaka washokele ku kabanga ku Beti Dagoni, waya fika ku Sebuloni na kwishika lya Ifitaeli no kulungama ku kapinda ka ku kuso ukulungatana na Beti Emeki na Neyele, ukupitilila pa Kabuli iyabela ku kuso." 
Joshua19:28 Umupaka wapitilile no kuya ku Ebuloni, Rehobi, Hamoni elyo na Kana no kuya shintafye na ku Sidoni Mukulu." 
Joshua19:29 Kabili uyu mupaka wabwelulukile ku Rama no kuya ku musumba we linga lya Turi no kushokela ku Hosa, waya tuntukila kuli bemba. Mu mupaka mwali na Mahalebu, Akisibi," 
Joshua19:30 Uma, Afeki na Rehobi. Imisumba yali amakumi yabili na ibili (22) pamo ne mishi yaiko." 
Joshua19:31 Iyi misumba ne mishi yaiko eyali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca luko lwakwa Asheri, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua19:32 Icitungu ca mutanda icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Naftali, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua19:33 Umupaka wa calo cabo wafumine ku Helefi na pa cimuti icikulu nganshi ica oki icali mu Sananimu, wapita mu Adami Nekebi na Yabineli ukufika ku Lakumu no kuya shinta ku mumana wa Yordani." 
Joshua19:34 Umupaka walungeme ku masamba ukupita mu Asinoti Tabo no kutuntukila ku Hukoki. Waisa lambata Sebuloni ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, Asheri nao ku masamba, waisa pelela pa Yuda lwa ku mumana wa Yordani wabela ku kabanga." 
Joshua19:35 Elyo imisumba ya malinga nayo yali ni Sidimu, Seli, Hamati, Rakati, Kinereti," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Haso," 
Joshua19:37 Kedeshi, Edilei, Eni Haso," 
Joshua19:38 Iloni, Migidali Eli, Horemu, Beti Anati elyo na Beti Shemeshi. Imisumba yali ikumi limo na pabula (29) pamo ne mishi yaiko." 
Joshua19:39 Iyi misumba ne mishi yaiko yali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca luko lwakwa Naftali, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua19:40 Icitungu calenga cine lubali icapendwilwe capeelwe ku luko lwakwa Dani, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua19:41 Icalo ca cakaniko ca cishilano cabo calundilweko ne misumba na imbi: Sora, Eshitaoli, Ili Shemeshi," 
Joshua19:42 Shalabini, Aiyaloni, Yefila," 
Joshua19:43 Eloni, Timuna Ekironi," 
Joshua19:44 Eliteke, Kibetoni, Baalati," 
Joshua19:45 Yehudi, Bene Beraki, Gati Rimoni," 
Joshua19:46 Me Yakoni na Rakoni, ne ncende yonse iyalungatene na Yopa." 
Joshua19:47 Nomba abena Dani balishombweke pakupoka icalo cabo, eico baile lwisha Leshemu baipaya na bantu abalimo, no kwikala emo balaikala. Baikele muli uyu musumba no kwalula ishina lya uyu musumba bawinika na Dani, nge shina lya kwibukishishapo Dani icikolwe cabo." 
Joshua19:48 Iyi e misumba ne mishi yaiko iyali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca luko lwakwa Dani, umwabelele indupwa shabo." 
Joshua19:49 Ilyo bapwile ukwakanya icalo mufitungu mufitungu, abena Israeli bapeele Yoshua mwana Nuni icakaniko ca cishilano pakati kabo," 
Joshua19:50 pamo ngefyo Yawe abakonkomeshe ukucita. Bamupeele umusumba uo umwine aipwishe. Noyu musumba wali ni Timunati Sera, mu calo ca mpili ca bena Efulemu, emo akuulile umusumba alaikalamo." 
Joshua19:51 Kanshi ifi e fyalo ifyo Eleasa shimapepo, Yoshua mwana Nuni ne ntungulushi sha ndupwa sha nko sha bena Israeli bayakenye ifitungu mu Shilo, panuma yakupendula pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa mwinshi we Tenti lyakukumaninamo. Kabili apa pene epapwilile ukwakanya icalo ici." 
Joshua20:1 Elyo Yawe aebele Yoshua ati," 
Joshua20:2 “Eba abena Israeli ukuti basale imisumba yakufisamamo pamo ngefyo namukonkomeshe ukupitila muli Mose. 
Joshua20:3 Emukutila umuntu onse uwaipaya umuntu munankwe mukukanaishiba nangu mukupumbilafye, eko ali nokufulumukila kukupusuka ku bantu abalefwaya icilandushi ca mulopa." 
Joshua20:4 Ilyo uyu muntu afulumukila kuli umo uwa muli iyi misumba, alingile aya iminina pa mpongolo ya musumba no kutuula umulandu onse kuli bacilolo ba musumba. Elyo lyena bali nokumusuminisha ukwingila mu musumba wabo no kumupeela icifulo apo ali nokulaikala nabo." 
Joshua20:5 Lelo uwacilandushi ca mulopa nga amusupila nalyo line bacilolo tabafwile kumulekelamo, pantu aipeye umwina mupalamano wakwe mukukanaishiba, kabili tapali lupato pakati kabo iyoo." 
Joshua20:6 Uyu muntu ali nokwikala mu musumba mpaka ilyo icintubwingi cikamupingula. Nga cakuti asangwa uwakaele, afwile ukwikalafye muli ulya musumba mpaka ukufika ku mfwa yakwa shimapepo mukalamba uukabapo pali ilya nshita. Panuma lyena uyu muntu uwaipaya umunankwe ali nokubwelelamo ku musumba wa kumwabo, uko afulumwike.”" 
Joshua20:7 Kanshi epakusonta umusumba wa Kedeshi mu Galile mu calo ca mpili cakwa Naftali, Shekemu mu calo ca mpili cakwa Efulemu, na Kiriati Ariba emukutila Hebuloni mu calo ca mpili cakwa Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Lubali lwa ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani apalungatana na Yeriko basonteleko umusumba wa Besa uwaba mu matololo mu calo cabatama uwa mu luko lwakwa Rubeni, Ramoti mu Gileadi mu luko lwakwa Gadi, na Golani mu Bashani mu luko lwakwa Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Kanshi umuntu onse umwina Israeli nangufye umwinafyalo uo baleikala pamo nabo, uwaipaya umuntu mukukanaishiba, afwile afulumukila kuli iyi ine misumba yasontwa pakuti bemwipaya ku bantu abalefwaya ukulandula pa muntu wabo uo aipeye, kabili akwate ne nshita yakwiminina kukupingulwa ne cintubwingi." 
Joshua21:1 Elyo intungulushi sha ndupwa shakwa Levi shaile kuli shimapepo Eleasa, Yoshua mwana Nuni na ku ntungulushi sha ndupwa sha nko sha bena Israeli." 
Joshua21:2 Baya ku Shilo mu Kenani no kutila kuli bena, “Yawe akonkomeshe ukupitila muli Mose ukuti, ‘Muli nokutupeelako imisumba yakwikalamo, umuli ifitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyesu, nge cakaniko ca cishilano cesu.’”" 
Joshua21:3 Kanshi abena Israeli epakupeelako abena Levi imisumba elyo ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa ukufuma mu fyakaniko fyabo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe. 
Joshua21:4 Icantanshi bacitile, bapendwile pakwishiba ifitungu bali nokupeela abena Koati, umwabelele indupwa shabo. Abena Levi abali balupwa bakwa Aroni shimapepo bapeelwe icitungu ca misumba ikumi limo na itatu, ukufumya ku nko shakwa Yuda, Simeoni na Benjamini." 
Joshua21:5 Lelo bonse aba lupwa lwakwa Koati abasheleko, bena bapeelwe ifitungu fya misumba ikumi limo, ukufumya ku mikowa ya nko shakwa Efulemu, Dani elyo na kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase." 
Joshua21:6 Aba lupwa lwakwa Geshoni nabo bapeelwe ifitungu fya misumba ikumi limo na itatu, ukufumya ku mikowa ya nko shakwa Isaka, Asheri, Naftali, elyo na kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase mu Bashani." 
Joshua21:7 Ku ba lupwa lwakwa Melali nabo, umwabelele indupwa shabo, bapeelwe imisumba ikumi limo na ibili ukufumya ku nko shakwa Rubeni, Gadi na Sebuloni." 
Joshua21:8 Kanshi ifi efyo abena Israeli bapeele ifitungu fya misumba ku bena Levi pamo pene ne fitungu fyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo, ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe ukupitila muli Mose." 
Joshua21:9 Ukufumafye ku nko shakwa Yuda na Simeoni bapeele ifitungu fya misumba iyi mu mashina. 
Joshua21:10 Iyi misumba yapeelwe ku ba lupwa lwakwa Aroni, abafumine ku mikowa yakwa Koati uwa mu bena Levi, pantu ukupendula kwantanshi ebo kwawilile." 
Joshua21:11 Babapeele Kiriati Ariba, emukutila Hebuloni, pamo ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo mu calo ca mpili icakwa Yuda. Ariba ali e wishi wakwa Anaki." 
Joshua21:12 Lelo amabala ne mishi iyashingulwike umusumba, fyena fyapeelwe kuli Kalebu mwana Yefune ukuti cibe icuma cakwe." 
Joshua21:13 Eico kanshi aba lupwa lwakwa shimapepo Aroni nabo bapeelwe Hebuloni umusumba wakufisamamo ku muntu uo batila naipaya umubiye, pamo na Libina," 
Joshua21:14 Yatiri, Eshitemoa," 
Joshua21:15 Holoni, Debi," 
Joshua21:16 Aini, Yuta elyo na Beti Shemeshi, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Imisumba yali pabula ukufumya kuli ishi nko shibili." 
Joshua21:17 Ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Benjamini nako babapeeleko Gibeoni, Geba," 
Joshua21:18 Anatoti elyo na Alimoni, ukusanshako ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ine." 
Joshua21:19 Kanshi imisumba yonse iya bashimapepo, aba lupwa lwakwa Aroni, yali ikumi limo na itatu, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo." 
Joshua21:20 Kabili imikowa iyasheleko iyakwa Koati iya bena Levi yapeelwe ifitungu fya misumba fyapendwilwe ukufuma ku ncende ya luko lwakwa Efulemu. 
Joshua21:21 Mu calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu, bapeelwemo umusumba wa Shekemu, umusumba wakufisamamo ku muntu uo batila naipaya umubiye, elyo na Gesa," 
Joshua21:22 Kibisaimu na Beti Horoni, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ine." 
Joshua21:23 Kabili ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Dani bapeelwe Eliteke, Gibetoni," 
Joshua21:24 Aiyaloni na Gati Rimoni pamo ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ine. 
Joshua21:25 Ukufuma kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase bapeelwe Tanaki na Gati Rimoni, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ibili." 
Joshua21:26 Kanshi yonse imisumba iyi ikumi limo ne fitungu fyonse ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo yalipeelwe ku mikowa iyasheleko iyakwa Koati. 
Joshua21:27 Kabili imikowa ya bena Levi abakwa Geshoni nabo bapeelwe ukufuma kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase, Golani mu Bashani, umusumba wakufisamamo ku muntu uo batila naipaya umubiye, na Beshitera, pamo pene ne fitungu fyonse ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ibili." 
Joshua21:28 Ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Isaka nako bapeelweko Kishoni, Dabelati," 
Joshua21:29 Yamuti na Eni Ganimu, pamo pene ne fitungu fyonse ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ine." 
Joshua21:30 Ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Asheri nako bapeelweko Mishali, Abidoni," 
Joshua21:31 Helikati na Rehobi, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ine." 
Joshua21:32 Ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Naftali nako bapeelweko Kedeshi wa ku Galile, umusumba wakufisamamo ku muntu uo batila naipaya umubiye, Hamoti Dori elyo na Katani, pamo pene ne fitungu fyonse ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali itatu." 
Joshua21:33 Kanshi imisumba yonse iya mikowa yakwa Geshoni yali ikumi limo na itatu, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo." 
Joshua21:34 Kabili imikowa ya bena Melali iyasheleko ku bena Levi nayo yapeelwe ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Sebuloni imisumba ya Yokineamu, Kata," 
Joshua21:35 Dimuna elyo Naalali, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ine." 
Joshua21:36 Ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Rubeni, nako bapeelweko imisumba ya Besa, Yahasi," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoti na Mefati, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali ine." 
Joshua21:38 Ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Gadi, nako bapeelweko Ramoti mu Gileadi, umusumba wakufisamamo ku muntu uo batila naipaya umubiye, Manaimu," 
Joshua21:39 Heshiboni na Yaseri, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo. Iyi misumba yali yonse pamo ine." 
Joshua21:40 Yonse imisumba iyapeelwe ku mikowa yakwa Melali abasheleko ku bena Levi yali imisumba ikumi limo na ibili. 
Joshua21:41 Eico kanshi, imisumba ya bena Levi iyali mu calo ca bena Israeli yali yonse pamo amakumi yane na cine konse konse (48), pamo pene ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo." 
Joshua21:42 Cila musumba waliikwatile incende iyashinguluka iyakucemenamo ifitekwa. Kanshi ifi fine efyo cali ku misumba iyi yonse. 
Joshua21:43 Efyo Yawe apeele icalo conse ku bena Israeli, ico alapile ukupeela kuli bashibo, kabili nabo balibuulile ici calo no kulaikalamo." 
Joshua21:44 Kabili Yawe alekele ukuti baletuusha mu nshilafye shonse, pamo ngefyo alapile kuli bashibo. Takwatalile akuba umuntu nangu umo uwa mu balwani babo uwakubemina, pantu Yawe alipeele bonse abalwani babo mu minwe yabo." 
Joshua21:45 Pa fintu fyonse ifisuma ifyo Yawe alaile aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli tapashele nangu cimo icishafikilishiwe. Fyonse fyalifikilishiwe. 
Joshua22:1 Elyo Yoshua aitile abena Rubeni, abena Gadi elyo na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase," 
Joshua22:2 no kubeba ati, “Imwe namubomba bwino fyonse ifyo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe amukonkomeshe, kabili mwalinakila ine muli fyonse ifyo namukonkomeshe ukucita." 
Joshua22:3 Pa nshita iyitali nganshi, ukufika na pa kalelo line, tamwatala amulekelesha bamunyinenwe, lelo imwe mwalebombafye imilimo Yawe, Lesa wenu, apeele kuli imwe." 
Joshua22:4 Nomba Yawe, Lesa wenu, napeela bamunyinenwe ukutuusha pamo ngefyo alaile. Eico nomba bweleleni kumwenu mu calo ico Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe amupeele kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani." 
Joshua22:5 Lelo mube abakusunga ifipope na mafunde Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe amupeele. Muletemwa Yawe Lesa wenu no kwenda mu nshila yakwe lyonse, no kulabeela ifipope fyakwe no kwikatisha ukumubombela no mutima wenu onse no mweo wenu onse.”" 
Joshua22:6 Elyo Yoshua abapaalile no kubeba ukuti baleya, awe nabo baile na kumwabo." 
Joshua22:7 Kabili kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase, Mose apeele icalo cabo mu Bashani, elyo kuli citika ubiye Yoshua apeele icalo icabela ku masamba ya mumana wa Yordani muli bamunyina. Ilyo Yoshua abebele ukuti baleya, alibapaalile" 
Joshua22:8 nokutila kuli bena, “Imwe bwelelenimo kumwenu ne fyuma ifingi nganshi, ifitekwa fya mikuni ya ŋombe, silifa, golide, umukuba, ifyela ifyamutengo elyo ne mitumba ya nsalu iyingi nganshi, elyo mwakanyeko bamunyinenwe ifintu fyonse ifyo mwatapile ku balwani benu.”" 
Joshua22:9 Awe abena Rubeni, abena Gadi elyo na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase bashile abena Israeli banabo ku Shilo mu calo ca Kenani no kubwelelamo ku Gileadi, ku calo cabo ico banonkele ukulingana nefyo Yawe akonkomeshe ukupitila muli Mose." 
Joshua22:10 Ilyo bafikile ku Geliloti mupepi no mumana wa Yordani mu calo ca Kenani, abena Rubeni, abena Gadi na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase bakuulile ubulambo ubukulu nganshi mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Yordani." 
Joshua22:11 Nomba ilyo abena Israeli baumfwile ukuti, abena Rubeni, abena Gadi na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase nabakuula ubulambo mu mupaka wa calo ca Kenani ku Gililoti mupepi no mumana wa Yordani, ku lubali lwa bena Israeli banabo," 
Joshua22:12 lyonse ibumba lya bena Israeli lyalongene ku Shilo pakuti baye mukubalwisha. 
Joshua22:13 Elintu abena Israeli batumine Fineasi mwana Eleasa, shimapepo, ku calo ca Gileadi ku bena Rubeni, ku bena Gadi elyo na kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase." 
Joshua22:14 Batumine pamo ne ntungulushi ikumi limo, intungulushi imo imo ukufuma mu ba nko sha bena Israeli." 
Joshua22:15 Awe ilyo baile ku Gileadi ku bena Rubeni, ku bena Gadi elyo na kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase, batile kuli bena," 
Joshua22:16 “Lonse ulukuta lwakwa Yawe nalututuma mukumweba ukuti, ‘Bushe imwe, ubu busangu bwakusangukila Lesa wakwa Israeli bwalola mwi? Bushe kuti mwabwelela shani kunuma ukufuma kuli Yawe no kuikuulila mwe bene ubulambo bwakusangukila Lesa ilelo?" 
Joshua22:17 Bushe ububifi twabifishe ku Peori ubo tatulaisangululako ukufika no bwa lelo, tebukulu? Nelyo kwaliponene icikuko pa lukuta lwakwa Yawe," 
Joshua22:18 bushe na imwe ilelo muletaluka kukukonka Yawe? Nga mwasangukila Yawe ilelo, mailo ubukali bwakwe buli nokuba pa lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli." 
Joshua22:19 Nga cakutila icalo mwakwata cintu cakowela, isenifye tuleikala nenu bonse pamo mu calo umwaba Itenti lyakwa Yawe. Lelo tamufwile ukusangukila Yawe nangu nifwe bene, mukuikuulila ubulambo, ukucila pa bulambo bwakwa Yawe, Lesa wesu." 
Joshua22:20 Ilyo Akani mwana Sera akeene ukubeela icipope cakwa Yawe, acitile ifishifwaya Yawe ilyo aibile ifyapeelwe kukonaulwa, bushe ubukali bwakwa Yawe tabwaishilefye pa lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli? Talifye eka uwafwile pa bubifi bwakwe iyoo.’”" 
Joshua22:21 Elyo abena Rubeni, abena Gadi na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase bayaswike no kweba intungulushi sha nko shakwa Israeli abati," 
Joshua22:22 “Uwamakafye, Lesa, Yawe! Uwamakafye, Lesa, Yawe! Alishiba! Kabili na Israeli wine lekeni eshibe! Nga cakutifye twacitile ifi mukusangukila Yawe, nangu mukukanabeela Yawe, awe mwishapofye nangu umo, tulofyeni bonse ilelo line." 
Joshua22:23 Nga cakutila twaikuulila ubu bulambo mukufuma ku cinso cakwa Yawe no kulatuula umutuulo wa cakoca nangu mituulo ya cabunga, nangu umutuulo wakwampana, nangu umutuulo wamutende, natukande." 
Joshua22:24 Iyo, ifwe twakuulile ubulambo mukutiina ukuti bushiku bumo indupwa shenu bali nokwipusha indupwa shesu ukuti, ‘Bushe lubali nshi mwakweteko kuli Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli?" 
Joshua22:25 Yawe apanga umumana wa Yordani, ukuba umupaka pakati kesu elyo na imwe, imwe mwe bena Rubeni na bena Gadi! Ala imwe tamukwete icakaniko muli Yawe.’ Eico indupwa shenu imwe kuti shaisa lenga indupwa shesu ukuleka ukukwata akatiina kuli Yawe." 
Joshua22:26 Kanshi ici cine, ecalengele twasosele ukuti, ‘Natuipekanye, natukuule ubulambo.’ Ubu bulambo tabwali bwafye lambo lya cakoca, nangu amalambo yambi iyoo." 
Joshua22:27 Lelo ku lubali lumbi kuti twatila, ici cili nokuba e kambone wa pakati kesu na imwe, elyo ne nkulo ishili nokulatukonkapo. Nokuti ifwe tuli nokulapepafye Yawe mwi Tenti lyakwe na malambo ya cakoca, amalambo yambi elyo no mutuulo wakwampana. Elyo lyena kuntanshi indupwa shenu tashakabe ishakusosa ku ndupwa shesu ukuti, ‘Imwe tamukwete icakaniko kuli Yawe.’" 
Joshua22:28 Eico twatile, ‘Nga cakuti baisa sosa ifi kuli ifwe, nangufye ku ndupwa shesu ishikatukonkapo, tuli nokubasuka ukutila, “Moneni ici cikulwa ca bulambo bwakwa Yawe, ico bashifwe bakuulile, teca mutuulo wa cakoca nangu amalambo, lelo nga cikambone pakati kesu elyo na imwe.” ’" 
Joshua22:29 Cakutali nganshi ukufuma kuli ifwe ukusangukila Yawe no kubwelela inuma mu bushiku bwa lelo mukukuula ubulambo bwa malambo ya cakoca, imituulo ya cabunga elyo na malambo yambi, ukucila pa bulambo bwakwa Yawe Lesa wesu, ubwaba mu cifulo camushilo mwi Tenti lyakwe.”" 
Joshua22:30 Nomba ilyo Fineasi shimapepo na bacilolo ba lukuta lwa bena Israeli abali e ntungulushi mu mikowa ya bena Israeli baumfwile ifyo abena Rubeni, abena Gadi elyo na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase basosele, awe balitemenwe." 
Joshua22:31 Kabili Fineasi mwana Eleasa, shimapepo, atile ku bena Rubeni, ku bena Gadi na ku bena Manase, “Ilelo twaishiba ukuti Yawe ali pakati kesu, pantu imwe tamwasangukila Yawe mu micitile yenu. Moneni nomba namupususha abena Israeli ku bukali bwakwa Yawe.”" 
Joshua22:32 Elyo Fineasi mwana Eleasa shimapepo pamo ne ntungulushi babwelele ku Kenani ukufuma uko baile kukumona abena Rubeni na bena Gadi ku Gileadi no kuya fisha akasebo ku bena Israeli. 
Joshua22:33 Awe balitemenwe nganshi pakumfwa aka akasebo, kabili batashishe Lesa. Takwali kulandapo nakabili pa mulandu wa kubalwisha no kupoka icalo ico abena Rubeni na bena Gadi baleikalamo." 
Joshua22:34 Elyo abena Rubeni na bena Gadi bapeele ishina lya bulambo bakuulile abati, “Ni Bukambone pakati kesu ukuti Yawe e Lesa wine.”" 
Joshua23:1 Palipitile inshita iyitali apo Yawe apeelele abena Israeli ukutuusha ukufuma ku balwani babo bonse ababashingulwike. Yoshua pali iyi nshita ninshi nakota, ne myaka yalisenselele nganshi." 
Joshua23:2 Elyo Yoshua alonganike abena Israeli bonse, abakalamba pamo ne ntungulushi shabo, bakapingula wa milandu babo elyo na bashimucindikwa, no kubeba ati, “Ine ninkota kabili ninsenselela nganshi mu myaka." 
Joshua23:3 Imwe mwe bene mwaliimwena na menso yenu ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe, Lesa wenu, acita ku mishobo iyi yonse pa mulandu wenu. Ala ni Yawe, Lesa wenu, e walemulwilako." 
Joshua23:4 Ibukisheni ukuti nimwakanya ifyalo ifi ifisheleko nge cakaniko ca cishilano ca nko shenu, pamo ne mishobo yonse intu nacimfishe ukufumafye ku mumana wa Yordani ukufika kuli Bemba Mukulu uwabela ukuwila akasuba." 
Joshua23:5 Ala Yawe, Lesa wenu umwine ali nokubafulumuna ukufuma kuli imwe. Lesa ali nokubatalusha ku cinso cenu, epakuti mukapoke icalo cabo, pamo ngefyo Yawe Lesa wenu amulaile." 
Joshua23:6 Kanshi mube abakosa nganshi. Mube abasakamana nganshi ukubeela fyonse ifyalembwa mu citabo ca mafunde yakwa Mose, ukwabula ukwalukila lubali lwa ku kulyo nangu lwa ku kuso." 
Joshua23:7 Tecakwesha ukulaampana neyi mishobo iyo mwashala nayo pakati kenu. Tecakwesha nangufye panono ukulalumbula amashina ya milungu yabo, nangufye ilyo mulelapa. Tamufwile ukulaibombela, nangufye ukulaifukamina." 
Joshua23:8 Lelo mufwilefye ukushangila kuli Yawe Lesa wenu, pamo ngefyo mwaba na nombaline." 
Joshua23:9 Pantu Yawe alifulumuna ku ntanshi yenu imishobo iyikalamba nganshi kabili iyamaka, ukufika nobwa lelo takwatala akuba nelyo umo uwamwansha." 
Joshua23:10 Umo pali imwe kuti alwisha abalwani ikana limo, pantu Yawe Lesa wenu eumulwishishako, pamo ngefyo alaile." 
Joshua23:11 Eico kanshi mufwilefye ukusakamana nganshi ukutemwa Yawe Lesa wenu. 
Joshua23:12 Lelo nga mwayalukila kumbi no kwampana na aba bantu abashala kuli iyi mishobo, nangu ukulaupana nabo," 
Joshua23:13 awe mulingile ukwishiba bwino ukuti Yawe, Lesa wenu, takatale afulumuna iyi mishobo kuntanshi yenu. Na mukukanacita ifyo, iyi mishobo ili nokuba inkose kabili ifiteyo fyenu, amembya yakumulopawilako mu numa shenu, kabili imyunga ya mu menso yenu, mpakafye mukasuke mukalobe ukufuma muli ici calo icisuma, ico Yawe Lesa wenu amupeela." 
Joshua23:14 “Nomba ine ndi mupepi no kuya mu nshila iyiyamo aba pano isonde bonse. Imwe namwishiba bwino mu mitima yenu kabili na mu bumi bwenu ukuti tapali nangufye cimo pa fintu ifisuma fyalaile Yawe, Lesa wenu, ifyo apeele kuli imwe icishafikilishiwa. Ubulayo bonsefye bwalifikilishiwe. Tapaba nangu cimo icafilikwa." 
Joshua23:15 Pamo ngefyo ifisuma fyonse Yawe Lesa wenu alaile fyaba ifyacine, efyo Yawe ali nokuleta pali imwe ububifi ubo amusokeleko, mpaka mukalobe bonse ukufuma muli ici calo icisuma apeela kuli imwe." 
Joshua23:16 Naco nga mwaonaula icipangano cakwa Yawe, Lesa wenu, ico amukonkomeshe ukusunga, no kuya mukubombela imilungu imbi no kulaifukamina, lyena ubukali bwakwa Yawe buli nokumoca, kabili mukalobafye bwangu bwangu ukufuma mu calo ici icisuma ico amupeela.”" 
Joshua24:1 Elyo Yoshua alongenye inko shonse isha bena Israeli ku Shekemu. Aitile abakalamba, intungulushi, bakapingula ba mulandu elyo na bacilolo ba bena Israeli no kwisa ituula abene ku cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Joshua24:2 Awe Yoshua aeba abantu bonse ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, asosa ati, ‘Ukufumafye kale na kale, ifikolwe fyenu, ukubikakofye na Tera wishi wakwa Abrahamu na Naho, baikele kwishilya lya mumana wa Yufurate, kabili fyalepepa imilungu imbi." 
Joshua24:3 Lelo ine nabuulile shinwe Abrahamu, namufumya kwishilya lya mumana wa Yufurate no kumutungulula monse mu calo ca Kenani no kumupeela ulupwa ulwingi. Namupeela no mwana Isaki," 
Joshua24:4 na Isaki nao namupeele abana bakwe Yakobo na Esau. Kabili napeele Esau icalo ca mpili ica Seiri, lelo Yakobo wena na bana baume bakwe baile ku calo ca Egupto." 
Joshua24:5 Elyo natumine Mose na Aroni no kucusha abena Egupto ku finkunka ifyo nacitile mulya, na panuma nalimufumishemo." 
Joshua24:6 Ilyo nafumishe ifikolwe fyenu mu Egupto, mwaishile kuli bemba. Abena Egupto basupile abafyashi benu na maceleta yabo, pamo na bali pali bakabalwe no kuya bafisha kuli Bemba Wakashika." 
Joshua24:7 Nabo bakuutile kuli Yawe pakuti abafwe, Yawe abikile imfifi pakati kenu elyo na bena Egupto. Elyo aletele amenshi pali bene no kubebisha. Kabili imwe mwaliimwenene na menso yenu ifyo nacitile ku bena Egupto. Na imwe mwaikele mu matololo pa nshita ikalamba." 
Joshua24:8 “‘Ine namuletele ku calo ca bena Amoli abaikele ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani. Bena balemulwisha, lelo ine nabapeele mu maboko yenu. Nalibonawile pakubapeela kuli imwe, elyo na imwe mwabuula ifyuma pamo ne calo cabo." 
Joshua24:9 Ilyo Balaki mwana Sipo, imfumu ya mu calo ca Moabu, atendeke ukulaiteyanya palwa kulwisha abena Israeli, atumine amashiwi kuli Balamu mwana Beori pakuti ese amulapishe." 
Joshua24:10 Lelo ine nshaumfwile kuli Balamu, nao epakumupaala, na ine namupokolola na ku maboko yakwe." 
Joshua24:11 Elyo mwayabwike umumana wa Yordani no kufika ku Yeriko. Abekashi ba mu musumba wa Yeriko balimulwishishe, pamo nge fyacitile abena Amoli, abena Perisi, abena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Girigashi, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi, lelo nalyo line nabapeele mu maboko yenu." 
Joshua24:12 Nine natumine amalonda kukumutangilila, ayafulumwine imfumu shibili isha bena Amoli. Tamwailwishishe mwe bene ku lupanga lwenu nangu buta." 
Joshua24:13 Eico ine, nalimupeele icalo ico mushaculile pamo pene ne misumba iyo mushaikuulile. Kabili emo mwikala no kulalya ifisabo fya myangashi, ne fya miolifa, ifyo mushalimbile.’”" 
Joshua24:14 “Eico nomba beeleni Yawe akatiina no kumubombela umupwilapo na muli bucishinka bwenu. Fumyeni amano ku milungu, iyo ifikolwe fyenu fyalepepa ilyo fyali kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani na mu Egupto mwine. Imwe mwambe ukulabombela Yawe." 
Joshua24:15 Lelo ngo kubombela Yawe camoneka ukukosa kuli imwe, kanshi saleni mwe bene buno bwine ubushiku untu muli nokulabombela, nampo nga milungu ya fikolwe fyenu iyo fyabombele ilyo fyali kwishilya lya mumana wa Yordani nangu imilungu ya bena Amoli, abo nomba imwe muleikala mu calo cabo. Lelo ine na ba mu ŋanda yandi, tulifye nokulabombela Yawe.”" 
Joshua24:16 Elyo abantu nabo bayaswike abati, “Awe, ifyo tefyo! Tatwakatale atusuula Yawe no kubombela imilungu imbi, nakalya!" 
Joshua24:17 Pantu ni Yawe Lesa wesu umwine ewatufumishe pamo ne fikolwe fyesu mu calo ca Egupto, mu calo ca busha, kabili ewacitile ne fishibilo ifikulu nganshi ifyo twaimwenene na menso yesu. Ni Yawe ewaletucingilila pa lwendo lwesu lonse na mu mishobo yonse intu twalepitamo mu lwendo lwesu." 
Joshua24:18 Kabili Yawe afulumwine yonse imishobo kuntanshi yesu, ukusanshakofye na bena Amoli, abali abene ba calo. Eico na ifwe bene tulifye nokulabombela Yawe, pantu ena e Lesa wesu.”" 
Joshua24:19 Elyo Yoshua aeba abantu ati, “Imwe mukafilwa ukubombela Yawe, pantu ena ni Lesa wamushilo. Ni Lesa wabufuba. Wena takamubelele uluse nga mwamusangukila no kulacita ububifi." 
Joshua24:20 Kanshi imwe nga mwasuula kuli Yawe no kwamba ukubombela imilungu imbi, Yawe ali nokumubwesesha ifinkunka kabili eikaba e mpela yenu, nangu kunuma uku ali umusuma kuli imwe.”" 
Joshua24:21 Nomba abantu nabo epakweba Yoshua abati, “Awe! Ifwe twakulabombelafye Yawe.”" 
Joshua24:22 Elyo Yoshua nao atile, “Nimwe mwe bene mwaibela bukambone ukuti namusala ukulabombela Yawe.” Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ee tuli bakambone fwe bene.”" 
Joshua24:23 Elyo Yoshua abeba ati, “Kanshi nomba poseni ukutali imilungu imbi iyo mwaba nayo no kwimya imitima yenu kuli Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli.”" 
Joshua24:24 Nabo abantu batile kuli Yoshua, “Ifwe tuli nokulabombelafye Yawe, Lesa wesu, kabili twakulamubeela.”" 
Joshua24:25 Na pa bushiku bwine bulya Yoshua acitile icipangano na bantu, kabili kulya kwine ku Shekemu apeele kuli bena ifipope elyo na mafunde." 
Joshua24:26 Elyo Yoshua alembele aya mashiwi mu citabo ca mafunde yakwa Lesa. Epakubuula icilibwe icikulu nganshi acimika mwisamba lya cimuti ca oki, mupepi ne cifulo camushilo icakwa Yawe." 
Joshua24:27 Elyo Yoshua aebele abantu bonse ati, “Moneni! Ili ilibwe lili nokuba e kambone pakati kesu. Pantu ili libwe, nalyumfwa amashiwi yonsefye ayo Yawe asosele kuli ifwe. Lili nokuba likambone pakati kenu pakuti tamufumine kuli Lesa wenu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Elyo Yoshua aeba abantu ukuya, cila muntu ku calo cakwe icacishilano." 
Joshua24:29 Panuma ya ifi fintu, Yoshua mwana Nuni, umubomfi wakwa Yawe, alifwile ilyo ali ne myaka umwanda umo ne kumi limo." 
Joshua24:30 Elyo bamushiikile na mu calo cakwe icacishilano, ku Timunati Sera mu calo ca mpili shakwa Efulemu, ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka lupili lwa Gashi." 
Joshua24:31 Abena Israeli babombele Yawe mu nshiku shonse ishakwa Yoshua, ne nshiku shonse isho intungulushi ishashele panuma ya mfwa yakwe shaikele pa calo, kabili ishaishibe bwino ifyo Yawe acitile abena Israeli." 
Joshua24:32 Nomba amafupa yakwa Yosefu, ayo abena Israeli bafumishe ku Egupto, bayashiikile ku Shekemu mu mpanga iyo Yakobo ashitile ukulingana ne ndalama umwanda umo isha silifa, ukufuma kuli bamwana Hamori, wishi wakwa Shekemu. Ici nomba cali e cakaniko ca cishilano ca lupwa lwakwa Yosefu." 
Joshua24:33 Kabili Eleasa mwana Aroni nao alifwile no kuya mushiika ku Gibea, ku musumba uwapeelwe ku mwana wakwe Fineasi, mu calo ca mpili cakwa Efulemu." 
Judges1:1 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Yoshua, abena Israeli baipwishe Yawe abati, “Bushe ni bani abali nokubalilapo ukuya lwisha abena Kenani.”" 
Judges1:2 Elyo Yawe ayaswike ati, “Bena Yuda ebalabalilapo. Pantu Ine nimpeela icalo mu maboko yabo.”" 
Judges1:3 Elyo abena Yuda baeba abena Simeoni bamunyinabo abati, “Natuleya bonse mu calo twapeelwa no kuya lwisha abena Kenani. Elyo panuma na ifwe tukamwafwako ukuya lwisha mu calo cenu ico mwapeelwa.” Awe abena Simeoni epakuya nabo." 
Judges1:4 Ilyo abena Yuda baile mukulwa, Yawe apeele mu minwe yabo abena Kenani na bena Perisi, kabili baipeye abantu ukulingana ne mpendwa amakana ikumi limo (10,000) ku Beseki." 
Judges1:5 Ni uku kwine ku Beseki eko basangile imfumu Adoni Beseki nao bamulwisha, elyo bacimfya na bena Kenani na bena Perisi." 
Judges1:6 Lelo Adoni Beseki wena alifulumwike, nomba balimukonkele no kuya mwikata, elyo bamuputaula ifikumo pamo pene ne fikondo." 
Judges1:7 Elyo Adoni Beseki atile, “Bakateeka amakumi cine lubali (70), abaali ne fikumo fyabo elyo ne fikondo fyabo ifikulu ifyaputulwako, ebaletola ifyakulya mwisamba lye tebulo lyandi. Nomba cakupapa pafyo Lesa nao ancita, pantu abwesesha kuli ine ifyo nacitile kuli bena.” Awe balimusendele no kumutwala ku Yerusalemu, no kufwa eko aile fwila." 
Judges1:8 Kabili abena Yuda balwishishe umusumba wa Yerusalemu no kuupoka. Baipeye abantu ku lupanga, basha baoca no musumba." 
Judges1:9 Panuma ya ifyo, abena Yuda baile kabili mukulwisha abena Kenani abaleikala mu calo ca mpili, ku matololo ya Negebu na bali mwishika lya mpili." 
Judges1:10 Kabili batwalilile mu bulwi bwabo ku bena Kenani abaleikala mu musumba wa Hebuloni, uyu musumba kale waleitwa ati, “Kiriati Aba,” no kucimfya imfumu Sheshai na bantu baiko, imfumu Aimani na bantu baiko elyo ne mfumu Talimai na bantu baiko." 
Judges1:11 Ukufuma kulya, batwalilile mukulwisha abekashi ba mu Debi, uyu musumba kale waleitwa ukuti, “Kiriati Sefe.”" 
Judges1:12 Elyo Kalebu atile, “Ine ndi nokupeela umuntu onse uuli nokucimfya Kiriati Sefe ukuti eo akope umwana wandi umwanakashi Akisa.”" 
Judges1:13 Awe Otinieli mwana Kenasi, umwaice wakwa Kalebu, ewacimfishe. Elyo na Kalebu abuulile umwana wakwe umwanakashi Akisa no kumupeela aba umukashi wakwe." 
Judges1:14 Ilyo Akisa akuukile ku mulume wakwe, Otinieli aile mupamfya ukuti aye alombeko ibala kuli Kalebu wishi. Cilya Akisa aikila pali punda, wishi Kalebu amwipusha ati, “Bushe cinshi ulefwaya nkucitile?”" 
Judges1:15 Nao ayaswike ati, “Tata ndefwaya mumpeeleko icilambu cimo icikankala. Apo ni mu matololo ya Negebu mwampeela impanga, mpeeleniko no tumfukumfuku twa menshi.” Elintu Kalebu wishi amupeeleko utumfukumfuku twa pa mulu wa lupili elyo no twa mwishika lya lupili." 
Judges1:16 Balupwa bakwa shifyala wakwa Mose, umwina Keni, bafumine mu musumba wa Tuncindu pamo na bantu bakwa Yuda no kuya ikala na bantu ba mu matololo yakwa Yuda aya mu Negebu mupepi na Aradi." 
Judges1:17 Elyo abena Yuda na bena Simeoni bamunyinabo baile bonse no kuya sansa abena Kenani abaleikala mu Sefati, baonaula no musumba onsefye. Elyo bainike noyu musumba abati ni Homa." 
Judges1:18 Abena Yuda kabili bapokolwele ne misumba itatu, Gasa, Ashikeloni elyo na Ekironi, ukubikapo ne fyalo fya cila musumba." 
Judges1:19 Awe Yawe alyafwilishe abena Yuda kabili balicimfishe no kupokolola icalo ca ku mpili. Lelo balifililwe ukufulumuna abantu abaikala mu mawanga pa mulandu wa maceleta ayo bakwete yali aya fyela. 
Judges1:20 Pamo ngefyo Mose alaile, Hebuloni yapeelwe kuli Kalebu, elyo nao afulumunamo bamwana Anaki batatu." 
Judges1:21 Abena Benjamini balifililwe ukutamfya abena Yebusi abaleikala mu Yerusalemu, eico ukufika na lelo line abena Yebusi bacili baleikala pamo na bena Benjamini." 
Judges1:22 Nomba aba ŋanda yakwa Yosefu baile sansa umusumba wa Betele, kabili Yawe alibafwilisheko." 
Judges1:23 Aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yosefu batumine inengu ku Betele, uyu musumba kale waleitwa ukuti Lusi." 
Judges1:24 Ilyo inengu shamwene umuntu umo alefuma mu musumba, shamweba ashiti, “Tulangeko ifyo twingengila mu musumba, elyo na ifwe tuli nokulanga uluse kuli iwe.”" 
Judges1:25 Nao epakubalangilila bwino ifyakwingila. Elyo baipeye abantu bonse mu musumba ku lupanga, no kushamofye uyu wine muntu pamo no lupwa lwakwe lonse." 
Judges1:26 Awe uyu muntu aile na ku calo ca bena Hiti, uko aile kuula umusumba no kuwinika ati ni Lusi. Kabili ifi fine efyo ucili uleitwa na lelo line." 
Judges1:27 Kabili abena Manase balifililwe ukufulumuna abena Beti Shani, nangu abena Tanaki, nangu abena Dori, nangu abena Ibileamu nangu abena Megido, pamo pene ne mishi iyabashingulwike. Pantu abena Kenani bakoselepofye ukulaikala muli cilya calo." 
Judges1:28 Lelo ilyo abena Israeli bakosele, batitikishe abena Kenani ukulabomba imilimo ya mulaasa, lelo ukubatamfya tababatamfishe iyoo." 
Judges1:29 Nangufye abena Kenani abaleikala mu musumba wa Gesa, abena Efulemu tababafulumwinemo muli uyu musumba, lelo batwalililefye ukwikala nabo." 
Judges1:30 Nangu na bena Sebuloni bene tabafulumwine abena Kenani abaleikala mu Kitiloni, nangu mu Naaloli, abo abashele pakati kabo, lelo babapeelefye umulimo wakubomba umulaasa." 
Judges1:31 Abena Asheri nabo tabafulumwinemo abaleikala mu Ako, nangu aba mu Sidoni, nangu mu Alabu, nangu mu Akisibu, nangu mu Eliba, nangu mu Afeki kabili nangu mu Reobu." 
Judges1:32 Na pa mulandu wa ici abena Asheri baikele pamo na bena Kenani, abali abakaya ba calo." 
Judges1:33 Abena Naftali nabo bene tabafulumwine abo bonse abaleikala mu Beti Shemeshi nangu mu Beti Anati, lelo baikele pamo na bena Kenani abali abakaya ba calo. Nomba bonse abaleikala mu Beti Shemeshi na mu Beti Anati, bena babapatikishe ukulabomba umulaasa kuli bena." 
Judges1:34 Kabili abena Amoli batamfishe abena Dani ku calo ca mpili no kubalesha ukulaisa ku mawanga. 
Judges1:35 Awe abena Amoli bena bakonkenyepofye ukulaikala mu fyalo fya mpili ifya Heresi, Aiyaloni na Shalibimu. Lelo ilyo aba ŋanda yakwa Yosefu baishile kwatisha amaka, babapatikisha no kulabomba umulaasa kuli bena." 
Judges1:36 Umupaka wa bena Amoli watulile pa mupokapoka wa Akarabimu, ukuya fika ku Sela elyo no kucilapo." 
Judges2:1 Nomba malaika wakwa Yawe afumine ku Giligali aya ku Bokimu no kuya landa ati, “Ine, nine namufumishe mu calo ca Egupto no kumuleta ku calo ico nalaile ukupeela kuli bashinwe. Kabili natile, ‘Nshakatale mfumyapo icipangano candi ico napangene nenu." 
Judges2:2 Kabili na imwe bene, tecakwesha ukucita icipangano na bantu ba muli ici calo. Mukabongolole ifibumbili fya malambo fyabo.’ Lelo imwe mwalifilwa ukubaka amafunde yandi. Nomba moneni ico mwacita!" 
Judges2:3 Eico nomba namweba ukuti, ‘Ine nshakafulumune iyi mitundu ku ntanshi yenu. Iyi mitundu ikaba imyunga iyikalamulasa mu mbalifye shonse, kabili imilungu yabo nayo eikaba iciteyo kuli imwe.’”" 
Judges2:4 Ilyo malaika wakwa Yawe apwile ukulanda ifi fyonse ku bena Israeli bonse, awe abantu baikatishe amashiwi balalila." 
Judges2:5 Kabili bainike apa pa cifulo ati, “Bokimu”. Kabili apa pene epo batuulile kuli Yawe amalambo." 
Judges2:6 Panuma ilyo Yoshua asalangenye abantu, abena Israeli bonse baile mukubuula impanga shabo ishapeelwe ukuba icakaniko ca cishilano cabo." 
Judges2:7 Awe abantu babombele Yawe mu nshiku sha bumi bwakwa Yoshua, na mu nshiku sha bakalamba abatwalilile ukubomba panuma ya mfwa yakwe. Pantu aba bakalamba bena baliimwenene na menso yabo ifintu fyonse ifikalamba nganshi ifyo Yawe acitile ku bena Israeli." 
Judges2:8 Yoshua mwana Nuni, umubomfi wakwa Yawe, afwile ilyo ali ne myaka umwanda umo elyo ne kumi limo (110)." 
Judges2:9 Kabili bamushiikile mu calo cakwe icacishilano ku Timinati Heresi, mu calo ca mpili shakwa Efulemu, ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka lupili lwa Gashi." 
Judges2:10 Ilyo aba nkulo ilya bonse bapwile ukufwa, baya no kwalala ifikolwe fyabo, imbi inkulo iyakonkelepo yena tayaishibe Yawe nangu ifyo acitiile abena Israeli." 
Judges2:11 Elyo abena Israeli bayambile ukulacita ifyabubifi ku cinso cakwa Yawe no kwamba ukulabombela imilungu ba Baali. 
Judges2:12 Basuulile Yawe, Lesa wa bashibo, uwabafumishe mu calo ca Egupto. Batendeka no kulakonkelela imilungu imbi iyo abantu abaleikala mumbali balepepa. Abena Israeli balengele Yawe ukukalipa." 
Judges2:13 Bacitile imisuula kuli Yawe no kwamba ukubombela imilungu ba Baali elyo ne milungu iyanakashi ba Ashitaroti. 
Judges2:14 Eico Yawe afulilwe abena Israeli icalengele nokuti abapeele mu minwe ya balwani babo, ababatapile ifyuma fyabo. Kabili Yawe abaposele na mu minwe ya balwani babo mu nshilafye shonse, balafilwa no kulabacimfya." 
Judges2:15 Eico ilyo lyonse baya ku bulwi, ukuboko kwakwa Yawe takwalebacingililako nakalya pakuti bengaba abakucimfya, ukulingana nga filya fine Yawe abasokele no kulapa kuli bena. Kanshi abena Israeli bali mu bulanda ubukulu nganshi." 
Judges2:16 Elintu Yawe abemishe abapingushi, abayambile ukubapokololako ukufuma mu maboko ya baletapa ifyuma fyabo." 
Judges2:17 Lelo nalyo line, balifililwe ukumfwa ku bapingushi babo, bena batwalililefye ukulacita bucilende bwabo ku milungu imbi no kulaipepa. Bena bafumine bwangu bwangu ku mbela ya fikolwe fyabo ifyalekonka amafunde yakwa Yawe. Balifililwe no kukonka mu mbela yafiko." 
Judges2:18 Pantu ilyo lyonsefye Yawe aimishe abapingushi mukubafwa, ena aleba na ulya umupingushi. Kabili Yawe alebapususha ukufuma mu maboko ya balwani babo, ilyo lyonse umupingushi ali umumi pano calo. Pantu Yawe alebalangulukilako ilyo lyonse bali no bulanda kuli abo abalebacusha no kubatitikisha." 
Judges2:19 Nomba icalecitika, umupingushi uwalebatungulula nga afwa, abantu balebwelela ku misango iyabipisha ukucila na pa misango bashibo bacitileko iyakukonka imilungu imbi imbi, mukuibombela no kuipepa. Balefilililwafye ukuleka imicitile ya bubifi bwabo nangu imibeele imbi iyakumalala." 
Judges2:20 Eico kanshi ubukali bwakwa Yawe bwacilileko nganshi ku bena Israeli kabili asosa no kutila, “Pantu aba bantu nabafilwa ukubaka icipangano ico nacitile kuli bashibo kabili nabaleka ukumfwa kuli ine," 
Judges2:21 ine nshakatale mfulumuna ku ntanshi yabo umushobo nangufye umo untu Yoshua ashile ilyo talafwa. 
Judges2:22 Ine ndi nokubomfya aba bantu kukwesha abena Israeli no kumona nga cakutila bali nokukonka inshila yakwa Yawe no kwendamo ngefyo bashibo bacitile.” 
Judges2:23 Eico Yawe nao alekele neyi mishobo ikale. Tabatamfishemo pali ilya ine nshita mukubapeela mu maboko yakwa Yoshua iyoo. 
Judges3:1 Iyi e mishobo Yawe ashile iyakweseshako bonse abena Israeli abo abashabalile abalwako inkondo mu calo ca Kenani. 
Judges3:2 Yawe acitile ifi pakusambilisha indupwa sha bena Israeli ishishaishibe ifyakulwa inkondo. 
Judges3:3 Neyi imishobo yali ni bakateeka basano bonse aba bena Filisiti, bonse abena Kenani, abena Sidoni na bena Hifi abaleikala ku mpili sha ku Lebanoni ukufuma ku lupili lwa Baali Hemoni ukufika ku Lebo Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Aba bonse babashile mukwesha abena Israeli pakumona nga cakuti kuti banakila ifipope fyakwa Yawe ifyo akonkomeshe kuli bashibo, ukupitila muli Mose." 
Judges3:5 Kanshi abena Israeli baleikala pakati ka bena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Amoli, abena Perisi, abena Hifi elyo na bena Yebusi." 
Judges3:6 Baleupa abana banakashi ba iyi mitundu kabili no kuufya abana babo abanakashi ku bana abaume ba iyi mitundu, kabili balapepa ne milungu yabo." 
Judges3:7 Abena Israeli bacitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kulaba kuli Yawe Lesa wabo, no kulabombela utulubi tu Baali na tu Ashera." 
Judges3:8 Ecalengele ubukali bwakwa Yawe ukwisa pa bena Israeli, icakuti abaposa na mu maboko yakwa Kushani Rishataimu imfumu ya mu Aramu Naraimu, uko bateekelwe ubusha pa myaka cine konse konse." 
Judges3:9 Lelo ilyo abena Israeli balilile kuli Yawe, nao abemishe uwakubalubula, Otinieli, mwana Kenasi umwaice wakwa Kalebu, uyo uwabalubwile." 
Judges3:10 Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile pali ena elyo nao atendeka no kulapingula pa bena Israeli. Aile na ku nkondo, kabili Yawe apeele Kushani Rishataimu imfumu ya mu Aramu mu maboko yakwa Otinieli, uyo uwamucimfishe." 
Judges3:11 Kanshi icalo conse caikele mu cibote pa myaka amakumi yane mpaka ilyo Otinieli mwana Kenasi afwile. 
Judges3:12 Kabili abena Israeli balibwekeshepo ukucita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, na pa mulandu wa ifi fintu bacitile, Yawe abapeele mu maboko ya mfumu Egiloni, uwa mu Moabu." 
Judges3:13 Egiloni bauminkene pamo na bena Amoli elyo na bena Amaleki, baya lwisha no kucimfya abena Israeli, kabili bapokolwele no musumba wa Tuncindu." 
Judges3:14 Abena Israeli bateekelwe ubusha ku mfumu Egiloni iya mu Moabu pa myaka ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18). 
Judges3:15 Lelo ilyo abena Israeli balilile kuli Yawe, nao abemishe uwakubalubula, Ehudi, uyo uwalebomfya ukuboko kwa ku kuso, mwana Gera umwina Benjamini. Uyu wine eo abena Israeli batumine ukubatwalila umusonko ku mfumu ya bena Moabu." 
Judges3:16 Nomba Ehudi alifulile ulupanga ulwatwa konse konse, ulwalepa mupepi na citika wa mita umo, alukakila ku lutungu lwakwe kwitanta lya ku kulyo mukati ka fyakufwala." 
Judges3:17 Awe atwele umusonko kuli Egiloni imfumu ya mu Moabu. Iyi mfumu yali iyaina nganshi. 
Judges3:18 Cilya Ehudi apwisha ukutuula umusonko, aeba abantu abasendele uyu musonko ukubwelelamo." 
Judges3:19 Nomba ena abweluluka ilyo bafikafye ku tulubi twa mabwe mupepi na ku Giligali, nokwisa eba imfumu Egiloni ati, “Ine ndi ne lyashi lyankaama ilyakulanda nobe we Mfumu.” Nayo imfumu epakweba abantu aiti, “Lekeni icongo.” Awe na babomfi ba kwisano bonse abali nankwe, bafuma baya." 
Judges3:20 Elyo Ehudi aya umo imfumu yaikele yeka mu muputule wa pamulu uwakupupwamo umwela, nokutila, “Ine ndi ne lyashi ilifumine kuli Lesa ukuti nkwebe.” Kanshi imfumu epakwima na pa cipuna yaikele." 
Judges3:21 Elyo Ehudi abuulila ulupanga ku kuboko kwakwe ukwa kuso ukufuma mu lutungu lwe tanta lya ku kulyo, no kulasa imfumu mu lufumo." 
Judges3:22 Icitubo ca lupanga naco cine caliingile pamo ne cilimi. Amafuta yacilikapo, kabili Ehudi tasomwene ulupanga. Ubusali nabo bwafumina na kunse." 
Judges3:23 Kanshi Ehudi epakufumina kunuma ya ŋanda, ninshi nasha naisala no kufunga ifiibi fyonse ifya pa muputule wa pamulu." 
Judges3:24 Panuma ninshi naya, ababomfi ba mfumu baisa sanga ifiibi fya muputule wa pamulu nafikomwa. Nabo batile, “Imfumu ifwile ili mu cimbusu ileyafwilisha.”" 
Judges3:25 Kanshi epakwikala balapembela pa nshitafye iyitali mpaka cabapesha amano. Lelo ilyo bamwene ukuti teswileko ku ciibi ca muputule, babuulile imfungulo no kwisulako iciibi. Awe bamwene imfumu yabo naiwa panshi, naifwa." 
Judges3:26 Ehudi afyukile ninshi bena bacili balepembela, aya acila na pa tulubi twa mabwe, afyukila na ku Seira." 
Judges3:27 Na lintu afikile kulya, aya lisha ipenga mu calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu, kabili abena Israeli baile pamo nankwe ukufuma mu calo ici ica mpili. Ehudi ewali e ntungulushi pakati kabo." 
Judges3:28 Elyo abeba ati, “Nkonkeni, pantu Yawe napeela abena Moabu, abalwani benu, mu maboko yenu.” Eico nabo balimukonkele, no kuyapokolola ifyabu fya mumana wa Yordani ifyalebomfya abena Moabu. Tabalesuminisha umuntu nelyo umo ukwabuka nakalya." 
Judges3:29 Pali iyo ine nshita baipeye ifita fyabulamba, ifyamaka fyeka fyeka, ifya bena Moabu ukulingana na makana ikumi limo (10,000), tapashele nelyo umo uwakufyuka." 
Judges3:30 Pali bulya bwine bushiku abena Israeli bacimfishe abena Moabu bonse. Kabili ukutula pali ilya nshita, icalo caikele mu cibote imyaka amakumi cine konse konse (80)." 
Judges3:31 Panuma yakwa Ehudi pakonkele Shamuga mwana Anati, uyo uwaipeye abena Filisiti imyanda mutanda (600). Abepeye ku musokofyo wakusokwelako iŋombe pakuti shileendesha. Nao wine alipuswisheko abena Israeli." 
Judges4:1 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Ehudi, abena Israeli nakabili balibwekeshepo ukucita ifyabipa ifyo Yawe ashalefwaya pa cinso cakwe." 
Judges4:2 Eico kanshi Yawe nao abapeele mu maboko yakwa Yabini, imfumu ya bena Kenani, uwaleteeka ku Hasoli. Kabili umukalamba wa fita ali ni Sisera, uwaleikala mu Harosheti Ha Goimu." 
Judges4:3 Pa mulandu wakuti alikwete amaceleta ya fyela imyanda pabula (900), no kucusha alecusha abena Israeli nganshi pa myaka amakumi yabili (20), nabo balilile kuli Yawe pakuti abafwe." 
Judges4:4 Debora, kasesema mwanakashi, muka Lapidoti ewalepingula abena Israeli pa nshita ilya." 
Judges4:5 Wena aleikala mwisamba lya kancindu kakwa Debora pakati ka Rama na Betele mu Calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu. Kabili abena Israeli baleya kuli ena kukupingulwa. 
Judges4:6 Ubushiku bumo atumine abakuya ita Baraki mwana Abinoamu, ukufuma ku Kedeshi mu Naftali, no kumweba ati, “Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, nakukonkomesha iwe ukuti, ‘Kabiye, usende abaume amakana ikumi limo (10,000), abena Naftali na bena Sebuloni, ubatungulule ku lupili lwa Tabo." 
Judges4:7 Ine ndi nokulenga Sisera umukalamba wa fita fya bena Yabini pamo na maceleta elyo ne fita fyakwe ukukwimina ku mumana wa Kishoni, lelo ndi nokufipeela mu maboko yobe.’”" 
Judges4:8 Elyo Baraki atile kuli ena, “Cisuma nga cakuti twaya na iwe, na ine lyena ndi nokuya. Lelo nga cakuti wakaana ukuya ninshi na ine wine nshakayeko.”" 
Judges4:9 Elyo Debora nao amwasuka ati, “Cisuma, ine tuli nokuya bonse. Nomba wishibe ukuti umucinshi wa bulendo ubu tauli nokuba obe, pantu Yawe ali nokupeela Sisera mu maboko ya mwanakashi.” Awe Debora na Baraki baima baya ku Kedeshi." 
Judges4:10 Elyo Baraki aitile abena Sebuloni elyo na bena Naftali ifita amakana ikumi limo (10,000) ukwisa ku Kadeshi. Kabili na Debora wine ali nankwe." 
Judges4:11 Nomba elyo Heberi umwina Keni apatwike ukufuma ku babiye abena Keni, aba lupwa lwa bena Hobabu shifyala kwa Mose, aimike Itenti lyakwe mu cimuti icikulu nganshi ica oki ku Sananimu mupepi na ku Kedeshi." 
Judges4:12 Ilyo baebele Sisera ukuti Baraki mwana Abinoamu ali ku lupili lwa Tabo," 
Judges4:13 Sisera nao epakulonganika pamo amaceleta yakwe imyanda pabula (900) aya fyela, elyo na bantu bonse ukufuma ku Harosheti Ha Goimu ukufika ku mumana wa Kishoni." 
Judges4:14 Elyo Debora aebele Baraki ati, “Kabiye! Pantu ni mu bushiku bwa lelo Yawe apeele Sisera mu maboko yobe. Kabili mona Yawe nakutangilila.” Awe Baraki atentemwike ulupili lwa Tabo, ne fita amakana ikumi limo (10,000) nabamukonka panuma." 
Judges4:15 Kutifye cilya Baraki apalama, Yawe acimfya Sisera na maceleta yakwe yonse pamo ne fita fyakwe fyonse ku lupanga. Awe Sisera epakusha iceleta lyakwe no kufulumuka ulubilo panshi." 
Judges4:16 Baraki asupile amaceleta ne fita mpakafye na ku Harosheti Ha Goimu. Ifita fyakwa Sisera fyonse fyalifwile ku lupanga, tapashele nangu umo." 
Judges4:17 Sisera ena afulumukile ulubilo panshi kwitenti lyakwa Yaeli, muka Heberi umwina Keni, pantu pali ukumfwana pakati kakwa Yabini imfumu ya mu musumba wa Haso elyo no mukowa wakwa Heberi umwina Keni." 
Judges4:18 Awe Yaeli afumine panse mukukumanya Sisera no kumweba ati, “Iseni, we mfumu yandi, iseni muno mukati ke tenti. Witiina nelyo cimo.” Awe nao aingile mwitenti, amufimbilisha ne cisalu." 
Judges4:19 Elyo Sisera atile, “Nafwa ku cilaka, napapata mpeelako amenshi.” Nao aiswile inyambi umwali umukaka, awe amupeela anwa, kabili amufimbilikisha ne cisalu." 
Judges4:20 Elyo amweba ukuti, “Iminina pa mwinshi we tenti. Nga cakuti umo aisa kwipusha ati, ‘Bushe tamuli muntu muno?’ Utile, ‘iyoo.’”" 
Judges4:21 Lelo Yaeli, muka Heberi abuulile ulupopo lumo ulwe tenti ne nondo, no kuya alebendelela panono kuli Sisera, ninshi nalala mu tulo pantu alinakile. Awe amupopela ulupopo pa nsense ya kutwi nalo lwapulinkanya lwashimpa na panshi, no kufwa afwa." 
Judges4:22 Cilya Baraki apalama ninshi eshile alesupila Sisera, Yaeli afumina panse mukuya mukumanya. Elyo atile, “Iseni, pakuti mulange umuntu uo imwe mulefwaya.” Nao epakwingila nankwe mwitenti, asanga Sisera nalala panshi nafwa, no lupopo nalushimpa pa nsense ya kutwi." 
Judges4:23 Na pali bulya bwine bushiku Lesa alengele Yabini imfumu ya bena Kenani ukucimba ku bena Israeli. 
Judges4:24 Elyo abena Israeli baile balekoselakofye mukulwisha Yabini, imfumu ya bena Kenani, mpakafye bamwipaya." 
Judges5:1 Na pali bulya bwine bushiku Debora pamo na Baraki mwana Abinoamu baimbile ulwimbo ulu ulwakuti," 
Judges5:2 “Paaleni Yawe na matotelo! Pantu intungulushi nashitungulula Israeli, kabili abantu mukuitemenwa nabaipeelesha abene beka." 
Judges5:3 Umfweni ifi, imwe mwe shamfumu! Kutikeni, imwe mwe bakateeka! Ine ni kuli Yawe eko ndeimbila. Ine ndi nokulumbanya Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli." 
Judges5:4 “Mwe Yawe, ilyo mwafumine ku Seiri, lintu mwaendele ukufuma ku calo ca Edomu, isonde lyalitenkene, imyulu yaisuka, elyo amakumbi nayo yaloka imfula." 
Judges5:5 Impili shalisunkene pa cinso cakwa Yawe, umwine wa Sinai, no kutenta pa cinso cakwa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli." 
Judges5:6 “Mu nshiku shakwa Shamuga mwana Anati, mu nshiku shakwa Yaeli, imisebo yalibumine, na balendo balashokoloka mu tushila twa mumbali." 
Judges5:7 Ukwikala mu mishi kwalipwile, kwalipwile mu Israeli, mpaka ukwisa kwakwa Debora, ilyo aishile nga nyina wakwa Israeli." 
Judges5:8 Ilyo basalile imilungu iyipya, elyo kwali ubulwi ku mpongolo ya musumba. Kabili takwali nelyo umo uwakwete inkwela nangu lifumo pakati ka bantu amakana amakumi yane (40,000) mu Israeli." 
Judges5:9 Umutima wandi naupilibukila ku bakalamba ba fita fya mu Israeli, abaipeeleshe abene pakati ka bantu. Paaleni Yawe na matotelo!" 
Judges5:10 “Imbeni imwe mwe bendela pali bapunda ababuuta, mwe bekala pa matanda ya bakankala, elyo na imwe mwe benda mu misebo panshi." 
Judges5:11 Kutikeni ku bemba ne nsansa ku mbali ya fishima fya menshi. Pantu eko bena balondolola ifyo Yawe aba kacimfya, ukucimfya kwa bekalamushi ba mu Israeli. “Elyo na bantu bakwa Yawe batentemukila ku mpongolo." 
Judges5:12 ‘Buka, buka, iwe Debora! Buka, buka, amba ukwimba ulwimbo! Baraki ima, utwale bankole bobe, iwe we mwana wakwa Abinoamu.’" 
Judges5:13 “Elyo abantu abasheleko batentemukile ku bacindami, abantu bakwa Yawe baishile kuli ine pamo nge mpalume shabulwi." 
Judges5:14 Bafumine muli Efulemu, abo intuntuko yabo yali muli Amaleki. Munonko Benjamini nao ali na bantu bobe. Ukufuma kuli Makiri ekwafumine bakangalila ba fita, na bakalamba ba fita nabo bafumine kuli Sebuloni." 
Judges5:15 Intungulushi sha bena Isaka ebali pamo na Debora. Ee, ifyali Isaka efyali na Baraki, balemubutushisha ukulola kwishika. “Pakati ka nko shakwa Rubeni epo abantu balepandanina amano." 
Judges5:16 Bushe mulandu nshi wikalile mu macinka, kukumfwa ku minsoli abacemi balishisha ifitekwa fyabo? Mukati ka mpuka sha bena Rubeni emwali ukulapandana amano nganshi." 
Judges5:17 Gileadi aikele kwishilya lya Yordani. Kabili Dani, bushe mulandu nshi ekalile mu mato? Asheri nao ashele naikala mu lulamba lwa mumana, kabili pa fyabu fyabo epo ekele." 
Judges5:18 Abantu bakwa Sebuloni tabatiinine mfwa, pamo nga bena Naftali, abali pa mulundu apasansama." 
Judges5:19 “Imfumu shalishile, shatantama ku bulwi. Lyena imfumu sha bena Kenani shalwa, bali pa bulwi ku Tanaki ku mumana wa Megido, lelo tabatapileko silifa nelyo umo." 
Judges5:20 Ukufuma mu mulu intanda nasho shalalwisha, ukufuma umo shipita shalwile na Sisera." 
Judges5:21 Umukuku wa mumana wa Kishoni walibasendele, uyu mumana wakale nakale, umumana wa Kishoni. We mutima wandi shipafye no kukosa!" 
Judges5:22 Elyo inshindo sha bakabalwe shanyantaula umushili, baya balebutuka pakuya ku babulamba babo." 
Judges5:23 “Malaika wakwa Yawe asosa ati, ‘Lapisheni Merosi, lapisheni pa maka abantu abekalamo, pa mulandu wakufilwa ukwafwilisha Yawe, ukwafwilishako Yawe mukulwisha ifita fyamaka.’" 
Judges5:24 “Abe uwapaalwa ukucila mu banakashi bonse, Yaeli muka Heberi umwina Keni, abe uwapaalwa ukucila abanakashi bonse abekala mu matenti." 
Judges5:25 Sisera alombele amenshi yakunwa, nomba ena amupeela umukaka, amupeele umukaka uwatikama mu lukombo ulusuma ulunwenako bashimucindikwa." 
Judges5:26 Atambika ukuboko kwakwe ukwa kuso pakwikata ulupopo lwe tenti, no kuboko kwakwe ukwa ku kulyo aikatilako inondo ya mubomfi. Apampamina Sisera, amutobaula umutwe, amupulinkanya na pa nsense ya kutwi." 
Judges5:27 Pa makasa yakwa Yaeli epo abotelele, awile no kulambalala. Pa makasa yakwa Yaeli epo abotelele, apo abotelele palya pene awile, epo afwilile." 
Judges5:28 “Nyina wakwa Sisera alengele pa nsolokoto, kunuma ya fipunda fyaliko, no kupunda ati, ‘Bushe cinshi iceleta lyakwe lyakokwela ukwisa? Bushe cinshi amaceleta ya bakabalwe yacelelwa ifi?’" 
Judges5:29 Abacenjeleshepo pa bakashana bakwe nabo bamwasuka ati, cacine aleilandilafye umwine, aleti," 
Judges5:30 ‘Bushe tabasangile no kulaakanya ifyakutapa? Umukashana umo umo nangu babili babili ku mwaume umo. Kabili bacili balesalila Sisera insalu shisuma ishabalala, icitambala icapikulwa bwino ica mu mukoshi wakwe ukufuma pa fyakutapa.’" 
Judges5:31 “Eico kanshi shilengeni bonse abalwani benu balobelele, mwe Yawe! Lelo shilengeni bonse abamutemwa babe nga kasuba akalefuma mu maka yakako.” Elyo na mu calo mwali icibote pa myaka amakumi yane (40)." 
Judges6:1 Nakabili abena Israeli balibwekeshepo ukucita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, icalengele nokuti abapeele mu maboko ya bena Midiani pa myaka cine lubali." 
Judges6:2 Pantu abena Midiani bali na maka nganshi ayakucusha abena Israeli. Na pa mulandu wa ici abena Israeli balipekenye incende ishakuya belamako ishali mu mpili, mu mimba na mu ncengo." 
Judges6:3 Ilyo lyonse abena Israeli babyala imbuto mu mabala yabo, abena Midiani, abena Amaleki na bantu bambi abaleikala lwa ku kabanga baleisa mukubasansa no kubapokolola icalo."
