Judges6:4 Balekuula inkambi shabo mulya mwine no kubonawila ifilime fyabo fyonse mpakafye na ku Gasa. Kabili takwaleba icitekwa nelyo cimo ico balesha ica bena Israeli, cibe ni mpaanga, nangu iŋombe, nangu ni bapunda." 
Judges6:5 Pantu abene baleisa ne fitekwa fyabo na matenti yabo, kwati ni makanta ku bwingi. Kabili cali icayafya nganshi ukwishiba impendwa ya bantu pamo ne ngamila shabo, pantu baleisa mu calo mukuconaula." 
Judges6:6 Kanshi abena Midiani efyo baposele abena Israeli mu bulanda ubukalamba, elyo nabo balilile kuli Yawe pakuti abafwe." 
Judges6:7 Ilyo abena Israeli balilile kuli Yawe pakucushiwa na bena Midiani," 
Judges6:8 Yawe nao alibatumine kasesema, uyo uwatile, “Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli asosa, atila, ‘Nine namufumishe mu calo ca Egupto umo mwali abasha." 
Judges6:9 Nine namupokolwele ukufuma ku maka ya bena Egupto, na ku maboko ya bonse abalemucusha. Nine nabafulumwine ku ntanshi yenu, no kumupeela icalo cabo.’" 
Judges6:10 Nalimwebele nati, ‘Ine nine Yawe, Lesa wenu, tecakwesha ukulapepa imilungu ya bena Amoli, abo mwaikala mu calo cabo. Lelo tamwaumfwile kufyo namwebele.’”" 
Judges6:11 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe aisa ikala mwisamba lya cimuti ca oki icali ku Ofira, no wali umwine wa ici cimuti ali ni Yoashi umwina Abiesa. Iyi nshita ninshi Gideoni umwana wakwe alesokola iŋanu mu ncende bakamina imyangashi pakuti apususheko iŋanu shimo ku bena Midiani." 
Judges6:12 Ilyo malaika wakwa Yawe amonekele kuli Gideoni, amwebele ati, “Yawe ali na iwe, we mpalume yabulamba.”" 
Judges6:13 Elyo Gideoni ayaswike ati, “Nomba kanabesa, nga cakuti Yawe ali na ifwe, mulandu nshi ifi fyonse filecitikila kuli ifwe? Bushe fili kwi ifipeshamano fyakwe fyonse ifyo bashifwe batushimikile, ilyo batile, ‘Bushe te Yawe atufumishe mu calo ca ku Egupto?’ Lelo nomba Yawe natulekelesha no kutubika mu maboko ya bena Midiani.”" 
Judges6:14 Elyo Yawe apilibukile kuli ena no kutila, “Ima kabiye mu maka ukwete, no kuya pususha abena Israeli ukufuma mu maboko ya bena Midiani. Bushe teine ndekutuma?”" 
Judges6:15 Elyo nao Gideoni aipwishe ati, “Nomba kanabesa, ine kuti napususha shani abena Israeli? Ine umukowa wandi eushakwatisha amaka mu bena Manase, kabili ine, nine winefye wakulekelesha mu lupwa lwandi.”" 
Judges6:16 Yawe amweba ati, “Ine, ndi nokuba na iwe, kabili uli nokucimfya abena Midiani kwati nalimo alifye umuntu umo.”" 
Judges6:17 Gideoni ayaswike ati, “Nga cakuti ninsanga ububile mu menso yenu, ncitileniko icishibilo icakulanga ukuti icine cine nimwe mulelanda kuli ine." 
Judges6:18 Napapata, mwifuma pano mpaka mbwele no kuleta umutuulo wandi, uwakuti ntuule ku cinso cenu.” Nao Yawe atile, “Cisuma, ine nalapembela mpaka ubweluluke.”" 
Judges6:19 Awe Gideoni aingile mu ŋanda, apekenya akana ka mbushi kabili abuula no bunga bwa ŋanu ubwa cipimo ca efa emo apanga umukate ushatutumuka. Abika inama mu cipe, no muto waiko nao mu lunweno, atwala fyonse no kuya tuula kuli ena mwisamba lya cimuti ca oki." 
Judges6:20 Elyo Malaika wakwa Lesa aebele Gideoni ati, “Twala inama pamo no mukate uushatutumuka, ufibike pa mulu wa cilibwe, elyo witilepo no muto.” Nao Gideoni acitile ifyo bamwebele." 
Judges6:21 Elyo Malaika wakwa Yawe abuulile inkonto iyo akwete mu minwe yakwe, aishimpa pa nama elyo na pa mukate uushatutumuka. Awe apopenefye umulilo wafuma na mu cilibwe, waoca inama ne mikate. Kabili na malaika wakwa Yawe aongoloka no kuluba aluba." 
Judges6:22 Elyo Gideoni ailwike ukuti aciba ni malaika wakwa Yawe, nao atile, “Yangu mwe Mfumu Yawe! Ine, nimona Malaika wakwa Yawe impumi ne mpumi!”" 
Judges6:23 Lelo Yawe nao atile kuli ena, “Umutende ube na iwe! Tecakwesha ukuba no mwenso. Iwe tauli nakufwa iyoo.”" 
Judges6:24 Awe Gideoni akuulile Yawe ubulambo pali ilya ncende no kulabwita ati, “Yawe wamutende.” Ubu ubulambo epo bucili ukufikafye na ku bushiku bwa lelo mu musumba wa Ofira uwa bena Abiesa." 
Judges6:25 Muli bulya bwine bushiku, Yawe atile kuli ena, “Buulapo cilume wa ŋombe uwabubili pa mukuni wakwa wiso, uulifye ne myaka cine lubali. Kabili uye bongolola no bulambo bulya wiso alepepelapo Baali. Uye uputaule no luceshi ulwa mulungu Ashera ulwabela pa mbali ya bulambo." 
Judges6:26 Elyo iwe nomba ukakuulepo ubulambo bwakwa Yawe Lesa obe ubusuma pa mulu wa ciputu pene. Ulingile ukubomfya inkuni sha luceshi ukaputaula ulwa mulungu Ashera mukutuula ilambo lyakwa cilume wa ŋombe uwacibili nge lambo lyakoca.” 
Judges6:27 Elyo Gideoni abuulile ababomfi bakwe ikumi limo, no kubomba ifyo Yawe amwebele. Nomba pa mulandu wakutiina aba mu lupwa lwakwe, elyo na bekashi ba mu musumba, abombele uyu mulimo ubushiku, ukucila mu kasuba." 
Judges6:28 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo mu nshita ya lucelo, ilyo abekala musumba babuukile, bamonafye ubulambo bwakwa Baali nabubongoloka! Kabili no luceshi ulwali mumbali nalo naluputaulwa, na cilume wa ŋombe uwacibili natuulwa ilambo pa bulambo ubwakuulilwe ubupya!" 
Judges6:29 Awe cila umo aipusha umunankwe ati, “Bushe ni nani uucitile ici cintu?” Na panuma yakufwailisha ifishinka fyonse, baumfwa ukuti ni Gideoni mwana Yoashi eucitile ici cintu." 
Judges6:30 Elintu abantu bonse aba mu musumba baile kuli Yoashi abati, “Fumya mwano. Ifwe tulemwipaya pantu naonaula ubulambo bwakwa Baali, aputaula no luceshi lwakwa Ashera ulwaimikwe kumbali.”" 
Judges6:31 Elyo nao Yoashi epakwasuka abamushingulwike ati, “Bushe nimwe muli nokulandilako Baali? Kabili bushe nimwe muli nokumulubulwilako? Uyo onse uulefwaya ukulandilako Baali ali nokwipaiwafye ilyo tabulaca na kuca! Nga cakuti Baali ni lesa, mumuleke umwine aipokolole pantu bulambo bwakwe bubongolweke.”" 
Judges6:32 Elyo Gideoni pali bulya bwinefye bushiku bayambile ukulamwita ati ni Yerubibaali, emukutila, “Lekeni Baali aipokolole umwine,” pantu naonaula ubulambo bwakwa Baali." 
Judges6:33 Elyo nomba bonse abena Midiani, abena Amaleki elyo na bekashi ba ku kabanga balongene pamo, no kwabuka umumana wa Yordani, bacita nkambi shabo mwishika lya Yesireli." 
Judges6:34 Awe Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile pali Gideoni, nao alisha ipenga pakwita abena Abiesa pakuti bamukonke." 
Judges6:35 Atumine ne nkombe ku bena Manase iyakubeta pakuti nabo bamukonke ku bulwi. Kabili aita na bena Asheri, abena Sebuloni na bena Naftali, pakuti nabo bese mukwafwilisha ukulwisha abalwani." 
Judges6:36 Elyo Gideoni atile kuli Lesa, “Pakuti mone ukuti uli nokupususha Israeli ukupitila mu maboko yandi pamo ngefyo walaile, mona," 
Judges6:37 ine nalayansa impapa iyanyukwa pa lubansa lwakutwilapo. Nga cakuti ulucelo umume wabafye pa mpapa peka, elyo ulubansa lonse lwaba ulwauma, awe lyena ndi nokwishiba ukuti uli nokupususha Israeli ukupitila mu maboko yandi pamo ngefyo we mwine usosele.”" 
Judges6:38 Kanshi ifi fine, efyo cali. Ubushiku bwakonkelepo ulucelocelo Gideoni abuuka, atampile ukulakama impapa, no kulakamina umume mu nsupa nayo yaisula." 
Judges6:39 Elyo Gideoni atile kuli Lesa, “Wimfulilwa. Lekafye nkwipusheko nakabili. Nsuminisha mbwekeshepo njeshe ukwanshika impapa iyanyukwa pa lubansa. Iyi yena inshita, uleke pa mpapa iyanyukwa peka epo pabe apauma, lelo pa lubansa epo pakumane umume weka weka.”" 
Judges6:40 Awe Lesa nao, efyo acitile. Pa mpapa iyanyukwa peka epali apauma. Ulubansa lonsefye lwakumene umume weka weka." 
Judges7:1 Lucelocelo Yerubibaali (emukutila Gideoni) ne fita fyakwe fyonse baile cita inkambi yabo pa kamfukumfuku kakwa Harodi. Elyo inkambi ya bena Midiani nayo yali ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwabo, mwishika mupepi no lupili lwa More." 
Judges7:2 Elyo Yawe aebele Gideoni ati, “Iwe uli ne fita ifingi nganshi, kabili tecalalenga ukuti mpeele abena Midiani mu maboko yabo. Pantu abena Israeli kuti bashala baleitakisha kuli ine ati maka yabo eyalengele bapusuke." 
Judges7:3 Eico bila imbila ku fita fyonse utile, ‘Umuntu onse uuli no mwenso no kututuma nabwelelemo ku ŋanda, afumeko kuno ku lupili lwa Gileadi.’” Awe ifita amakana amakumi yabili na yabili (22,000) babwelelemo kumyabo. Abashelepo nabo bali amakana ikumi limo (10,000)." 
Judges7:4 Kabili Yawe atile kuli Gideoni, “Awe na nombaline ifita ficili nafifulisha nganshi. Batwalefye ku menshi, eko nalaya kupatulwilako bamo. Nga cakuti natila, ‘Uyu ena afwile aya na iwe,’ uli nokuya nankwe. Lelo nga natila, ‘Uyu ena tafwile kuya na iwe, tauli nokuya nankwe.’”" 
Judges7:5 Awe Gideoni atwele ifita ku menshi. Elyo Yawe atile kuli ena, “Upatulule abantu abo bonse abalekabawila amenshi ku lulimi lwabo kwati ni mbwa ubabike ku lubali lumo, elyo abantu abo abalefukama panshi ilyo bakulanwa amenshi nabo ubabike ku lubali lumbi.”" 
Judges7:6 Abantu ukulingana ne myanda itatu (300) ebaletapwila amenshi ku lupi lwabo pakunwa. Lelo bonse abashala bafukeme panshi na makufi pakunwa amenshi. 
Judges7:7 Elyo Yawe atile kuli Gideoni, “Ku bantu imyanda itatu (300) abacilakabawila amenshi pakunwa eko ndi nokumupusushishako, no kupeela Midiani mu maboko yenu. Leka bonse abashala babwelelemo, cila muntu ku cifulo cakwe.”" 
Judges7:8 Gideoni abweseshemo bonse abashele abena Israeli ku matenti yabo, lelo asungilepofye ifita imyanda itatu (300) abo bene Yawe asalile. Bena bapoka ne filyo pamo na mapenga yashile abanabo. Nomba ninshi inkambi ya bena Midiani yalifye pesamba lyakwe mwishika." 
Judges7:9 Mu nshita ine ilya iya bushiku, Yawe atile kuli Gideoni, “Ima, kabiye kasanse inkambi yabo, pantu ninjipeela mu maboko yobe." 
Judges7:10 Lelo nga cakuti uletiina ukusansa, kabiye ku nkambi no mubomfi obe Pura," 
Judges7:11 pantu panuma yakuya umfwa ifyo balelanda, lyena uleya koseleshiwa no kusansa inkambi.” Elyo ena na Pura umubomfi wakwe baile apasangwa abalinshi ba nkambi." 
Judges7:12 Abena Midiani, abena Amaleki na bonse abekashi ba ku kabanga balongene mwishika nabakupa kwati ni makanta. Ne ngamila shabo teshakupenda ku bwingi, shafulile ngo munsensenga wa mu lulamba lwa bemba." 
Judges7:13 Ilyo Gideoni afikile, asangile umuntu umo aleeba umunankwe ifyo alotele, no kutila, “Ine nacilota umukate wa bale uwabulungana uleisa ulekunkulukila mu nkambi ya bena Midiani. Uyu mukate waciya punka mwitenti na maka nganshi icakuti ne tenti lyawa lyapilibuka no kubongoloka.”" 
Judges7:14 Elyo umunankwe ayasuka ati, “Ici te cimbi iyoo ukucila pa lupanga lwakwa Gideoni mwana Yoashi, umwina Israeli. Lesa napeela abena Midiani ne nkambi yonse mu maboko yakwe.”" 
Judges7:15 Ilyo Gideoni aumfwile ici ciloto no musango umunankwe acilondolwelelemo, awile panshi ubukupeme no kupepa Yawe. Awe abwelele na ku nkambi ya bena Israeli no kubilisha ati, “Imeni! Ala Yawe napeela abena Midiani mu maboko yenu.”" 
Judges7:16 Kabili ayakenye abantu imyanda itatu (300) mu mpuka shitatu. Elyo apeele amapenga mu maboko yacila umo ne mitondo umwabula amenshi elyo mukati ka mitondo emwali ifisaniko. 
Judges7:17 Kabili atile kuli bena, “Moneni kuli ine. Mulenkonka mufyo ndecita efyo na imwe mulecita. Ilyo nafika ku mpela ya nkambi mufwile ukucita ifyo finefye nakulacita." 
Judges7:18 Ilyo ine pamo na bonse abo tuli nabo twalisha amapenga yesu, elyo na imwe bonse ukushinguluka inkambi, mulishe amapenga yenu no kubilikisha amuti, ‘Fyakwa Yawe kabili fyakwa Gideoni.’”" 
Judges7:19 Awe Gideoni na bantu bakwe umwanda umo (100) abo ali nabo, bafikile ku mpela ya nkambi ku kwambafye kwa bushiku pakati, panuma ya balinshi ukupokeshanya pakulinda inkambi. Elyo balishishe amapenga yabo nokutobaula imitondo iyali mu minwe yabo." 
Judges7:20 Kabili ilyo linefye aba mu mpuka shitatu balilishishe amapenga yabo no kutobaula imitondo. Baikete ifisaniko mu minwe yabo iya ku kuso elyo amapenga yakulisha mu maboko ya ku kulyo, no kubilikisha abati, “Ulupanga lwakwa Yawe no lupanga lwakwa Gideoni!”" 
Judges7:21 Kabili cila umo aiminine pa ncende apo ali, ukushinguluka inkambi yonse. Na bena Midiani bayamba ukufulumuka no kuya balelila ninshi balebutuka." 
Judges7:22 Kabili ilyo balishishe amapenga imyanda itatu (300), Yawe alengele abantu mu nkambi yonse ukwalukila cila umo umo no kulakomana ku mpanga shabo. Neci calengele ifita ukufulumukila ku Beti Shita, ukulola ku Serera, ukufika na ku mupaka wa Abeli Mehola mupepi na Tabati." 
Judges7:23 Kabili abena Israeli mu nko shonse baitilwe ukufuma ku bena Naftali, abena Asheri, elyo na bonse abena Manase balongene pamo no kukunkunika abena Midiani." 
Judges7:24 Gideoni epakutuma inkombe monse mu calo ca mpili ica bena Efulemu, no kutila, “Iseni, tentemukeni twise tulwishe abena Midiani no kubacilikila ku menshi yonse aya Yordani ilyo tabalafikako, ukushinta ku Beti Bara.” Awe bonse abantu abena Efulemu balishile, kabili batebelele incende yonse iya mumana wa Yordani, ukufikafye na ku Beti Bara." 
Judges7:25 Kabili baiketepo ne ntungulushi sha fita shibili isha bena Midiani, Orebu elyo na Seebu. Baipaile Orebu pa cilibwe cakwa Orebu, elyo Seebu nao bamwipaile pa cifulo bakamina umwangashi, icakwa Seebu. Awe basupile abena Midiani kabili baletele ne mitwe yakwa Orebu na Seebu kuli Gideoni uwali kwishilya lya Yordani." 
Judges8:1 Elyo abena Efulemu baipwishe Gideoni abati, “Bushe cinshi watucitila ifi? Mulandu nshi ushatwitileko ilyo mwaile mukulwisha abena Midiani?” Awe balimwebawile icabipisha." 
Judges8:2 Nao Gideoni alibaswike ati, “Nga ine ico ncitile ni cinshi icakupalanya kufyo imwe mwacita? Bushe ukutolelesha kwa myangashi yakwa Efulemu takuwemepo ukucila ubusomboshi bonse ubwa myangashi yakwa Abiesa?" 
Judges8:3 Ala ni Lesa ewamupeele Orebu na Seebu, intungulushi sha fita isha bena Midiani, mu maboko yenu. Bushe ine, cinshi ningacita mukupalanya kufyo imwe mwacitile?” Awe pakumfwa aya mashiwi, babwesha imitima." 
Judges8:4 Gideoni na bantu bakwe imyanda itatu (300), nelyo banakile batwalilile ukukunkunika abalwani babo, mpaka bafika ku mumana wa Yordani no kwabuka." 
Judges8:5 Elyo atile ku bantu ba mu musumba wa Sukoti, “Mpeeleleniko ifita fyandi imikate, pantu nabanakisha ku nsala, elyo ncili ndekunkunika Seba na Salimuna, imfumu sha ku Midiani.”" 
Judges8:6 Nomba bacilolo ba mu musumba wa Sukoti batile, “Bushe Seba na Salimuna naubekata kale bali mu minwe yobe pakuti ifwe tupeele imikate ku fita fyobe fya nkondo?”" 
Judges8:7 Elyo Gideoni ayaswike ati, “Cisuma, nomba ilyo Yawe akapeela Seba na Salimuna mu maboko yandi, ine ndi nokwisa cenaula imibili yenu na membya ya myunga ya mu matololo na kuli nkololo.”" 
Judges8:8 Awe alifuminepo aile ku Penieli, kabili nako kwine aile landa cimo cine, lelo nabo bene bayaswike ngefyo abantu ba ku Sukoti bayaswike." 
Judges8:9 Eico kanshi asosele ku bena Penieli ati, “Ilyo nkabweluluka panuma yakucimfya, nkesa bongolola ulu lupungu lwenu no kuluwisha panshi.”" 
Judges8:10 Nomba Seba na Salimuna bali mu Kakori pamo ne fita fya nkondo ukulingana na makana ikumi na yasano (15,000), bonse pamo abashele ku fita fyafumine ku bantu ba ku kabanga. Kanshi ifita fyonse ifyafwile ku lupanga fyali amakana umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120,000)." 
Judges8:11 Awe Gideoni aile alekonka inshila iyalambata amatololo, ku kabanga ka Noba na Yogibea ukwaleikala abantu abaleikala mu matenti, elyo kulya kwine ayasansa ifita mukubapulikishafye." 
Judges8:12 Ishi mfumu shibili Seba na Salimuna isha ku Midiani shalifulumwike, nomba alibakonkele no kuyabekata, ne fita fyabo fyasalangana fyayafye nsale nsale." 
Judges8:13 Ilyo ubulwi bwapwile, Gideoni mwana Yoashi abwelele ukufuma ku bulwi ukupitilila ku mupokapoka wa Heresi." 
Judges8:14 Mu nshila aikete umulumendo umwina Sukoti no kumwipusha, elyo umulumendo alembele panshi amashina amakumi cine lubali na cine lubali (77) aya bakalamba na bacilolo ba musumba wa Sukoti." 
Judges8:15 Elyo Gideoni aile ku bena Sukoti no kutila, “Moneni Seba na Salimuna aba, abo mwansuliilepo no kutila, ‘Bushe Seba na Salimuna naubekata kale, bali mu minwe yobe pakuti ifwe tupeele imikate ku fita fyobe ifitembwike?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Elyo abuulile abakalamba ba mu musumba wa Sukoti no kuboma ifikoti ku membya ya myunga ya mu matololo na kuli nkololo. 
Judges8:17 Elyo abongolwele ulupungu lwa Penieli no kwipaya bonse abaume ba mu musumba. 
Judges8:18 Kabili Gideoni aipwishe Seba na Salimuna ati, “Bushe abantu mwaipeye ku Tabo bali ba musango shani?” Nabo bayaswike abati, “Balifye nga iwe wine ukupalana, cila umo bonsefye balemoneka ngo mwana wa mfumu.”" 
Judges8:19 Elyo Gideoni abaswike no kutila, “Abo bali ni bamunyinane, abo twafyelwe nabo inda imo. Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, nalimo amubaleka amukanabepaya, na ine wine nga nshimwipeye.”" 
Judges8:20 Elintu apilibukile ku mwana wakwe ibeli, Yeta, no kutila, “Bepaye.” Nomba Yeta pa mulandu wakuti ali umwaice afilwa ukusomona ulupanga lwakwe, kabili ali no mwenso." 
Judges8:21 Elyo Seba na Salimuna batile, “Isafye, utwipaye we mwine. Pantu ifyaba umwaume, efyo na maka yakwe yaba.” Awe Gideoni aimine no kubepaya kabili abuulile ne fyakubayemfya ifyo bakobeke mu mikoshi ya ngamila shabo." 
Judges8:22 Na panuma ya ifi fyonse ifyacitike, abena Israeli batile kuli Gideoni, “Ututeeke niwe, no mwana obe pamo pene no mwishikulu obe, pantu niwe utupuswishe ifwe ku maboko ya bena Midiani.”" 
Judges8:23 Lelo Gideoni abaswike ati, “Ine teti ndemuteeka imwe iyoo, nangufye mwana wandi wine takamuteeke iyoo, lelo Yawe umwine eukalamuteeka.”" 
Judges8:24 Kabili atile, “Ine ndipofye ne cintu cimo ico ndelomba kuli imwe, icakuti umuntu no muntu ampeeleko icisamiko ca ku matwi ica golide, ukufuma pafyo mwatapa.” Ulu elwali ulutambi lwa bena Ishimaeli ulwakufwala amasikiyo aya golide." 
Judges8:25 Awe nabo balyaswike batile, “Mu cinefye twalakupeela.” Elyo bayanshika icisalu epo cila umo aleposa amasikiyo yakwe ayo afumishe pafyo batapile." 
Judges8:26 Kabili ukufina kwa aya masikiyo aya golide Gideoni alombele kwafikile amashekeli ikana limo ne myanda cine lubali (1,700) ukwabula ukupendelako ifyakuyemfya, ifisamo fyakufwala ku mukoshi ne nsalu ishakashikila ishalefwala imfumu sha mu Midiani nangu iminyololo iyo balefwika ingamila shabo mu mukoshi." 
Judges8:27 Awe Gideoni afibuulile, apangile icakufwala ca bushimapepo ica efodi no kucibika mu musumba wa Ofira, umusumba wakwe. Elyo bonse abena Israeli eko bakumukile no kulacipepa, bafumya na mano yabo kuli Yawe. Kabili ici cintu ecaishileba iciteyo kuli Gideoni pamo na ba mu ŋanda yakwe." 
Judges8:28 Kanshi ifi efyo abena Midiani babacimfishe ku bena Israeli, kabili tabatalile abasalapuka nakabili. Eico kanshi mu bumi bwakwa Gideoni icalo caikele mu cibote pa myaka amakumi yane." 
Judges8:29 Panuma ya ifi Yerubibaali mwana Yoashi abwelelemo ku mushi kumwabo kukwikala. 
Judges8:30 Gideoni akwete abana abaume amakumi cine lubali (70), abana bakwefye pantu aupile abanakashi abengi." 
Judges8:31 Mu mukashi uo ashaupile mu bwinga, uwaleikala ku Shekemu, namo alikwetemo umwana mwaume, uo ainike ishina lya Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Awe Gideoni mwana Yoashi afwile pa myaka isuma nganshi iya mu bukote bwakwe. Kabili ashiikilwe mu nindi yakwa wishi Yoashi mu musumba wa Ofira uwa bena Abiesi. 
Judges8:33 Awe tapapitile inshita apo Gideoni afwilile, abena Israeli kabili babwekeshepo ukulacita bucilende mukukonka imbela sha milungu ba Baali, icakuti bacita na Baali Beriti ukuba umulungu wabo." 
Judges8:34 Balilabile ukwibukisha Yawe, Lesa wabo, uyo uwabapuswishe ukufuma mu maboko ya balwani babo bonse mu mbali shonse." 
Judges8:35 Kabili bafililwe no kulanga ukutasha ku lupwa lwakwa Yerubibaali, emukutila Gideoni, pa fintu ifisuma fyonse ifyo acitile abena Israeli." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleki mwana Yerubibaali aile kuli ba lupwa lwakwa nyina ku Shekemu, no kuya beba pamo na ba mu mukowa wakwa nyina bonse ati," 
Judges9:2 “Shisoseni nokuti bomfwe abekashi bonse aba mu Shekemu mutile, ‘Bushe cinshi cawamapo kuli imwe ukuleka bonse bamwana Yerubibaali amakumi cine lubali (70) balemuteeka, nangu ukuteekwafye ku muntu umo?’ Ibukisheni, ine ndi wa mu mubili wenu, kabili umulopa wenu.”" 
Judges9:3 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa nyina epakulanda amashiwi yonse no kumfwika ku ntungulushi sha mu Shekemu icakuti na bonse imitima yabo yapilibukila kuli ena, balanda no kutila, “Ni munyinefwe.”" 
Judges9:4 Awe bamupeele indalama ukulingana na mashekeli amakumi cine lubali (70) isha silifa ukufuma mwitempele lyakwa Baali Beliti. Neshi ndalama Abimeleki ashibomfeshe mukukunkumba abantu abawelewele kabili abaonaika abasumine ukulamukonka. 
Judges9:5 Elyo aile ku mushi kuli wishi Yerubibaali ku Ofira no kuya ipaya bamunyina amakumi cine lubali (70) pelibwe limo line. Lelo Yotamu, kasuli wakwa Yerubibaali, ewapuswike pantu aile fisama." 
Judges9:6 Elyo intungulushi shonse isha mu Shekemu na mu Beti Milo shalongene pa mbali ya cimuti ca oki pa luceshi lwa mu Shekemu kukuya sonta Abimeleki ukuba imfumu yabo. 
Judges9:7 Ilyo Yotamu bamwebele pali uyu mulandu aninine pa mulu wa lupili lwa Gerisimu no kubilikisha ne shiwi ilikalamba ati, “Umfweni kuli ine, mwe bekashi ba mu Shekemu pakuti Lesa nao engomfwa kuli imwe." 
Judges9:8 “Ubushiku bumo imiti yaile kukuya sonta imfumu yaiko. Elyo yaebele umuti wa miolifa aiti, ‘Tulefwaya ube imfumu yesu.’" 
Judges9:9 “Nao umuolifa watile, ‘Bushe ine kuti naleka ukupanga amafuta yandi ayo bonse abantu ne milungu bancindikilako, pa mulandu wakubafye imfumu ya fimiti?’" 
Judges9:10 “Icakonkelepo imiti yaebele umukunyu aiti, ‘Isa pakuti ube imfumu yesu.’" 
Judges9:11 “Nao umukunyu watile, ‘Bushe ine kuti naleka ukutwala ifitwalo ifisuma, kabili ifyalowa no kuba imfumu ya fimiti finandi?’" 
Judges9:12 “Elyo imiti yatile ku mwangashi, ‘Isa pakuti ube imfumu yesu.’" 
Judges9:13 “Nao umwangashi watile, ‘Bushe ine kuti nasha umulimo wandi uwakupanga umwangashi uusekesha yonse imilungu elyo na bantu, no kuya ba imfumu ya fimiti finandi?’" 
Judges9:14 “Elyo pakulekelesha imiti yonse yatile ku cimuti ca myunga, ‘Isa pakuti ube imfumu yesu.’" 
Judges9:15 “Naco icimuti ca myunga cayaswike imiti imbi aciti, ‘Nga cine cine mulefwaya ine mbe imfumu yenu, iseni mwikale mu cintelelwe candi. Lelo nga mwakaana, umulilo walafuma mu cimuti ca myunga no kwisa oca ifimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ifyaba mu Lebanoni.’" 
Judges9:16 “Nomba nga cakuti ni mu cishinka kabili mu bufumacumi mwasontele Abimeleki ukuba imfumu, no kucita icalungama kuli Yerubibaali no lupwa lwakwe, no kumucitila icilingene nefyo abombele," 
Judges9:17 tontonkanyeni ifyo tata amulwishishe. Apeele umweo wakwe kukumupususha ukufuma ku maboko ya bena Midiani. 
Judges9:18 Nomba imwe ilelo namusangukila ulupwa lwakwa tata, mwamwipaila abana bakwe abaume amakumi cine lubali (70) pa cilibwe cimo cine, no kusonta Abimeleki, umwana uwafyalwa mu mukashana umusha, no kuba imfumu pa bena Shekemu, pantufye ni munyinenwe." 
Judges9:19 Kanshi ifyo mwacita ilelo nga fyacishinka kabili mu bufumacumi kuli Yerubibaali no lupwa lwakwe, ninshi Abimeleki abe ni nsansa shenu, kabili aleba uwakumusansamusha na imwe bene pamo." 
Judges9:20 Lelo nga teifyo, lekeni umulilo ufume kuli Abimeleki no kwisa moca, mwe bena Shekemu na Beti Milo, kabili no koca Abimeleki wine.”" 
Judges9:21 Elyo Yotamu afulumwike, afyukila ku Bere. Aile ikala kulya kwine pakutiina munyina Abimeleki." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleki ateekele Israeli pa myaka itatu. 
Judges9:23 Lesa atumine umupashi ubifi pakati kakwa Abimeleki ne ntungulushi sha mu Shekemu, uwalengele ukuti shisangukile Abimeleki." 
Judges9:24 Lesa acitile ifi pakuti akande Abimeleki pa lufyengo acitile pamo na bena Shekemu abamwafwile ukwipaya bamwana Yerubaali amakumi cine lubali (70). Epakuti umulopa wabo ulandulwe pali munyinabo na bena Shekemu. 
Judges9:25 Pa mulandu wa fyacitike, intungulushi sha mu Shekemu shatumine abaume pa mulu wa lupili no kufisamina Abimeleki elyo balapokolola abantu ifintu fyonse balesenda. Kabili aya mashiwi yonse baleyafisha kuli Abimeleki." 
Judges9:26 Nomba ilyo Gali mwana Ebedi pamo na bamunyina bakuukile ku Shekemu, intungulushi sha mu Shekemu shalimucetekele nganshi." 
Judges9:27 Nomba Gali na bamunyina baile mu mabala yabo no kuyaswamo ifitwalo fya myangashi, bakama no kukama, elyo bacita umutebeto mwitempele lya mulungu wabo. Baletipwila Abimeleki ilyo bacili balelya no kunwa." 
Judges9:28 Elyo Gali mwana Ebedi atile, “Bushe Abimeleki ni nani, kabili fwe bena Shekemu tuli ba nani abakuti ifwe tulemubombela? Bushe uyu te mwana Yerubibaali, elyo Sebuli teo e cilolo wakwe? Nomba twingalabombela abaume bakwa Hamo, wishi wakwa Shekemu, lelo mulandu nshi twingalabombela Abimeleki?" 
Judges9:29 Nga cakutifye aba bantu bapeelwe mu maboko yandi, awe Abimeleki nga nalimufumyapo. Kuti naebafye Abimeleki nati, ‘Longanika fyonse ifita fyobe, wise kuno tulwe!’”" 
Judges9:30 Awe ilyo Sebuli kateeka wa musumba aumfwile ifyasosele Gali mwana Ebedi, alifulilwe nganshi." 
Judges9:31 Mukuicingililako atumine inkombe kuli Abimeleki ku Aruma no kutila, “Gali mwana Ebedi na bamunyina nabesa kuno ku Shekemu, uko bambile ukutunka abena musumba ukukusangukila." 
Judges9:32 Eico kanshi, iwe na bantu bobe mwime ubushiku no kuya babelamina ku mabala." 
Judges9:33 Elyo ulucelocelo pa kutula kwa kasuba, mukeme no kushinguluka umusumba. Ilyo Gali pamo ne fita fyakwe bakema ukwisa mukumulwisha, awe ukacite conse ico amaboko yobe yali nokubacitila.”" 
Judges9:34 Kanshi nao Abimeleki pamo ne fita fyakwe fyonse epakwima ubushiku no kushinguluka umusumba, babelamina Shekemu mu mpuka shine." 
Judges9:35 Ilyo Gali mwana Ebedi afumine no kuya iminina pa mwinshi wa mpongolo ya musumba, Abimeleki ne fita fyakwe basokolweke pa cifulo apo bafiseme." 
Judges9:36 Cilyafye Gali ati abamone, atile kuli Sebuli, “Mona, abantu balya baletentemuka ukufuma pa mulu wa mpili.” Nao Sebuli amwaswike no kutila, “Iwe wapumbilafye, te bantu iyoo, lelo finshingwa fya mpili efilemoneka nga bantu.”" 
Judges9:37 Kabili Gali abwekeshepo ukulanda ati, “Mona, abantu balya baletentemuka ukufuma pa mupokapoka wa mpili. Kabili impuka imbi ilefuma ku lubali lwa nshila yafuma ku cimuti ca bakabuka.”" 
Judges9:38 Elyo Sebuli atile kuli ena, “Ngo kuitakisha kobe kuli kwi? Bushe teiwe watile Abimeleki ni nani uwakuti ifwe tulemubombela? Bushe ifi te fita wasuulile? Eico kabiye nomba uye ubalwishe.”" 
Judges9:39 Kanshi Gali epakwimya intungulushi sha mu Shekemu no kulwisha Abimeleki. 
Judges9:40 Lelo Gali alifulumwike, na Abimeleki alimukonkele. Kabili abantu abengi balibepeye ilyo tabalafika na ku mwinshi wa mpongolo." 
Judges9:41 Elyo Abimeleki abwelelemo ku Aruma no kwikala kulya kwine. Sebuli nao atamfya Gali na bamunyina ukufuma mu Shekemu. 
Judges9:42 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo abekashi ba mu musumba wa Shekemu balifumine baya mu mabala, elyo akasebo kaile fika kuli Abimeleki," 
Judges9:43 nao Abimeleki aimya ifita fyakwe, afyakanya mu mpuka shitatu, no kuya fisama mu mabala. Ilyo amwene abantu baleisa ukufuma mu musumba, alibemine no kubepaya." 
Judges9:44 Nomba Abimeleki ne mpuka imo babutuka bwangu bwangu baya ikala pa mwinshi wa mpongolo, elyo impuka shimbi shibili shaimina abali mu mabala shabasansa no kubepaya bonse." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki wena akasuba konsefye, aikalile ukulwisha abekashi ba mu musumba mpaka abacimfya no kubepaya bonse. Elyo abongolwele umusumba no kukubapo umucele." 
Judges9:46 Ilyo abekashi ba ku lupungu lwa Shekemu baumfwile icacitike, bonse baile mu muputule wa panshi we tempele lyakwa Eli Beriti." 
Judges9:47 Lintu Abimeleki aumfwile ukuti eko belelongana," 
Judges9:48 ena pamo ne fita fyakwe baile ku lupili lwa Salimoni. Abuulile isembe no kutetelako imisambo ya fimiti, iyo asendele pa kubeya kwakwe. Aebele ne fita fyakwe ati, “Yangufyanyeni, citeni ifyo ine nacita!”" 
Judges9:49 Cila muntu pa fita fyakwe atetele imisambo ya fimiti, no kumukonka. Babikile umwina onse uwa fimuti pa mwinshi wa muputule we tempele no kukoshapo umulilo ilyo abantu bacili mukati. Kanshi abantu bonse abali muli ulu lupungu lwa Shekemu, abali ikana limo (1,000) abaume na banakashi, bonse bafwilile mulya mwine." 
Judges9:50 Icakonkelepo, Abimeleki aile ku musumba wa Tebeshi no kuushinguluka mpaaka aupoka." 
Judges9:51 Nomba mukati ka musumba mwali ulupungu ulwakosa, uko abantu bonse abaume na banakashi elyo ne ntungulushi sha mu musumba bafulumukile. Baisala pa mwinshi no kunina pa mulu wa lupungu." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki ilyo aile ku lupungu, atendeke ukulwisha, mpaka afika pa mwinshi wa lupungu pakuti oce no mulilo." 
Judges9:53 Nomba umwanakashi umo amuponesha umwana wa mpelo pa mutwe no kumutobaula akapanga ka mutwe. 
Judges9:54 Bwangu bwangufye aitile uwalesenda ifyanso fyakwe, nokumweba ati, “Somona ulupanga lobe umpwililishe, epakuti bekasosa abati, ‘Mwanakashi ewamwipeye.’” Elyo kasenda wa fyanso fyakwe amupulinkenye ulupanga, no kufwa afwa." 
Judges9:55 Abena Israeli pakumona ukuti Abimeleki afwa, bonse balibwelelemo kumyabo." 
Judges9:56 Kanshi ifi efyo Lesa alandwile pa bubi ubo Abimeleki acitile kuli wishi, pakwipaya bamunyina amakumi cine lubali (70)." 
Judges9:57 Kabili Lesa abweseshe ububi bonse ubwa bena Shekemu pa mitwe yabo. Icitipu cakwa Yotamu mwana Yerubibaali caishile pali bena. 
Judges10:1 Panuma yakwa Abimeleki kwaimine Tola mwana Pua, uwali nao mwana Dodo umwina Isaka, mukupususha abena Israeli. Aikele mu Shamiri, mu calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu." 
Judges10:2 Atungulwile abena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yabili na itatu, no kufwa afwa. Kabili ashiikilwe ku Shamiri kwine." 
Judges10:3 Elyo pakonkele Yairi umwina Gileadi, nao atungulwile abena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yabili." 
Judges10:4 Yairi ali na bana amakumi yatatu (30) abaleendela pali bapunda amakumi yatatu (30). Aba bana baleyangalila imisumba amakumi yatatu (30) mu Gileadi, iyo mu nshiku sha lelo bayeta ati Hafoti Yairi." 
Judges10:5 Ilyo Yairi afwile ashiikilwe mu Kamoni. 
Judges10:6 Kabinge abena Israeli babwekeshepo ukubifya ku cinso cakwa Yawe. Batendeke ukulabombela imilungu ba Baali na ba Ashitoreti, elyo ne milungu ya bena Aramu, imilungu ya bena Sidoni, imilungu ya bena Moabu, imilungu ya bena Amoni elyo ne milungu ya Bafilisiti. Kanshi efyo balabile kuli Yawe, baleka no kumupepa," 
Judges10:7 Ici calengele Yawe ukufulilwa abena Israeli icakuti abaposa na mu maboko ya Bafilisiti pamo na bena Amoni. 
Judges10:8 Muli ulya mwaka balipeye no kucusha nganshi abana bakwa Israeli. Pa myaka ikumi limo na cine konse konse balicushishe abena Israeli abaleikalila ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani, mu calo ca bena Amoli icaba mu Gileadi." 
Judges10:9 Abena Amoni nabo bayabwike umumana wa Yordani kukulwisha abena Yuda, na bena Benjamini, pamo na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Efulemu. Awe ubulanda bwalikulile nganshi ku bena Israeli." 
Judges10:10 Elyo abena Israeli balilile kuli Yawe abati, “Ifwe natubifya nganshi pakusuula Lesa wesu no kulabombela imilungu ba Baali.”" 
Judges10:11 Nao Yawe aebele abena Israeli ati, “Bushe teine namulubwile ukufuma mu maboko ya bena Egupto, abena Amoli, abena Amoni na Bafilisiti?" 
Judges10:12 Elyo abena Sidoni, abena Amaleki elyo na bena Maoni nabo balimutitikishe. Nalyo line mwalilile kuli ine pakuti mwafweko no kumulubula ukufuma mu maboko yabo." 
Judges10:13 Nomba imwe namunsuula no kulabombela imilungu imbi eico kanshi na ine nshakatale mupususha nakabili. 
Judges10:14 Kabiyenifye mukulilila ku milungu iyo mwe bene mwasala. Iyo ine eyo nomba muleke ilemupususha mu mafya yonse mwakulakwata.” 
Judges10:15 Elyo abena Israeli batile, “Ifwe natulufyanya. Tucitilenifye conse ico mwamona ukuti eciweme, nomba twapapata tupusushenikofye pali nomba.”" 
Judges10:16 Elyo bafumishe amano ku milungu ya benafyalo pakati kabo no kwamba ukulapepa Yawe, icakuti nao abomfwila ubulanda ifyo balecula." 
Judges10:17 Kabili abena Amoni balikutene ku bulwi no kucita inkambi mu Gileadi, elyo abena Israeli nabo balilongene pamo no kucita inkambi pa Misipa." 
Judges10:18 Intungulushi sha bantu abena Gileadi batile kuli cila umo “Uyo onse uuleya tampilapo ukulwisha abena Amoni euli nokuba umutwe wa bonse abekashi ba mu Gileadi.” 
Judges11:1 Nomba kwali umushilika uwapambana nganshi, ishina lyakwe ni Yefuta umwina Gileadi. Wishi ali ni Gileadi. Kabili nyina ali ni cilende." 
Judges11:2 Muka Gileadi nao alikwete abana abaume. Ilyo bakulile, balitamfishe Yefuta no kumweba abati, “Iwe tawakabuuleko icakaniko ca cishilano mu lupwa lwesu pantu iwe wafyalwa mu mwanakashi umbi.”" 
Judges11:3 Yefuta epakufulumuka ukufuma kuli bamunyina no kuya ikala mu calo ca Tobi. Kulya kwine aile ikala eko alonganike abantu abengi ifiwelewele abo ayambile ukubomba nabo mukutapa icuma. 
Judges11:4 Ilyo papitile inshita, abena Amoni balwile na bena Israeli." 
Judges11:5 Ilyo abena Amoni baimine ukulwisha abena Israeli, abakalamba ba mu Gileadi baile mukubuula Yefuta ukufuma ku calo ca Tobi." 
Judges11:6 Baya mweba ukuti, “Isa, natuleya pakuti ukaye ba umukalamba wa fita, epakuti tukalwishe abena Amoni bwino bwino.”" 
Judges11:7 Elyo nao Yefuta atile kuli bena, “Bushe teimwe mwampatile no kuntamfya mu ŋanda yakwa tata? Nga cinshi ico mwishile kuli ine nomba, ilyo mwakwata ubwafya?”" 
Judges11:8 Nabo bacilolo batile kuli ena, “Uyu wine e mulandu twishile kuli iwe nomba. Ala natuleya bonse kukulwisha abena Amoni, pantu nomba iwe niwe uleya ba intungulushi pakati kesu fwe bekashi ba mu Gileadi.”" 
Judges11:9 Yefuta epakweba abakalamba ba bena Gileadi ati, “Nga cakuti imwe mwansenda kukulwisha abena Amoni, na Yawe abapeela mu maboko yandi, bushe cacine nine nkaba intungulushi pakati kenu?”" 
Judges11:10 Bacilolo nabo batile, “Ala Yawe e kambone wesu. Ifwe cine cinefye tuli nokucita ifyo fine wasosa.”" 
Judges11:11 Elyo nomba Yefuta aile na bakalamba ba bena Gileadi. Kabili abekalamushi bamucitile ukuba intungulushi yabo, no kuba mukalamba wa fita pakati kabo. Kabili Yefuta abwekeshepo ukusosa amashiwi yonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ilyo ali mu Misipa." 
Judges11:12 Elyo Yefuta atumine inkombe ku mfumu ya bena Amoni mukuya ipusha ukuti, “Bushe cinshi ulefwaya kuli ifwe pakuti iwe usanse icalo cesu?”" 
Judges11:13 Nayo imfumu ya bena Amoni yayaswike inkombe shakwa Yefuta, aiti, “Ilyo abena Israeli bafumine mu Egupto balipokolwele icalo candi, ukufumafye ku Alinoni ukufika na ku Yaboku ukuya shinta na ku mumana wa Yordani. Nomba ndetila, ubweshe ifyalo ifi mu mutende.”" 
Judges11:14 Kabili Yefuta abwekeshepo ukutuma inkombe ku mfumu ya bena Amoni 
Judges11:15 no kuyeba ati, “Ifi efyo Yefuta asosa ati, ala abena Israeli tabapokelepo icalo ca Moabu iyoo, nangufye calo ca bena Amoni." 
Judges11:16 Ilyo abena Israeli bafumine mu Egupto, baile pita ku matololo ya kuli Bemba Wakashika, baya fika na ku Kadeshi." 
Judges11:17 Elyo batumine inkombe ku mfumu ya bena Edomu no kutila, ‘Tulelomba ulusa lwakupita mu calo cobe,’ lelo imfumu ya bena Edomu yalibakenye. Kabili baile ku mfumu ya bena Moabu, nayo yine yalibakenye. Eico abena Israeli epakulaikalafye ku Kadeshi." 
Judges11:18 “Icakonkelepo, abena Israeli baimine ukupita mu matololo no kulambata icalo ca Edomu na Moabu, ukupitila lubali lwa ku kabanga ka calo ca Moabu, no kucita inkambi kwishilya lya Alinoni. Abena Israeli tabaingile mu mpanga ya bena Moabu, pantu umumana wa Alinoni ewali e mupaka." 
Judges11:19 Elyo abena Israeli batumine inkombe ku mfumu Sihoni iya bena Amoli uwaleteeka ku Heshiboni no kutila kuli ena, ‘Tulelomba ulusa lwakupita mu calo cobe, no kuya ku cifulo cesu.’" 
Judges11:20 Sihoni ena tamwenemo icishinka mu bena Israeli mukubaleka bapite mu mpanga yabo. Kanshi ena epakulonganika abantu bakwe bonse no kuya cita inkambi ku Yahasi, kukulwisha abena Israeli." 
Judges11:21 Elyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, apeele Sihoni pamo na bantu bakwe bonse mu maboko ya bena Israeli no kuleka babacimfye. Awe abena Israeli bapokele conse icalo ca bena Amoli abaikele muli ilya mpanga." 
Judges11:22 Kanshi efyo abena Israeli bapokele no kwikala mu calo conse ica bena Amoli ukufuma ku Alinoni no kufika na ku Yaboku, kabili ukufuma ku matololo no kufika na ku Yordani." 
Judges11:23 “Apo nomba Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, nafulumuna abena Amoli ku ntanshi ya bantu bakwe abena Israeli bushe ni nsambu nshi iwe ukwete iyakucipokolola?" 
Judges11:24 Bushe tekuti upokolole ico umulungu wenu Kemoshi wapeela ukuba icikwatwa kuli imwe? Ngefyo na ifwe, bushe te nsambu shesu ukupoka conse ico Yawe Lesa wesu atupokolwela?" 
Judges11:25 Bushe iwe waliwamapo ukucila Balaki mwana Sipo imfumu ya bena Moabu? Bushe ena alibalile aumanapo na bena Israeli, nangu ukulwa nabo?" 
Judges11:26 Napapita imyaka imyanda itatu (300) apo abena Israeli baikalila mu Heshiboni na mu Aroe na mu mishi iya bashinguluka, elyo ne misumba yonse iya mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Alinoni. Bushe cinshi mushabapokele iyi mpanga lilya line?" 
Judges11:27 Ine nshamulufyanyapo icintu nelyo cimo, lelo iwe wine niwe ulendufyanya mukulenga ukulwa na ine. Ala lekafye Yawe, umupingushi, eo apingule icakucita mu bushiku bwa lelo pakati ka bena Israeli elyo na bena Amoni.”" 
Judges11:28 Lelo imfumu ya bena Amoni yakaana ukuposako amano ku mashiwi Yefuta amutumine. 
Judges11:29 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile pali Yefuta. Apitana monse mu bena Gileadi na bena Manase, apitana na mu Misipa ya ku Gileadi mpaka ukufika na ku bena Amoni." 
Judges11:30 Kabili Yefuta acitile umulapo kuli Yawe ati, “Nga cakutifye wampeela mu maboko yandi abena Amoni," 
Judges11:31 conse icikafuma mu ŋanda yandi no kwisa mukunkumanya ilyo nkabwela, ninshi nincimfya abena Amoni, cikaba cakwa Yawe. Kabili ine nkacituula nge lambo lya cakoca kuli Yawe.”" 
Judges11:32 Elyo Yefuta ayabukile mukulwisha abena Amoni, na Yawe abapeele mu maboko yakwe." 
Judges11:33 Abacimfishe ku maka ayakalamba no kubapokolola imisumba amakumi yabili ukufuma ku Aroe ukufikafye na ku Miniti mpaka na ku Abeli Kalamini. Abena Israeli balyanshishe abena Amoni, no kubacefya nganshi." 
Judges11:34 Elyo Yefuta abwelelamo kumwakwe ku Misipa, ne cacitike cakuti umwana wakwe umukashana ewafumine mukumusengela, alecinda nokulisha insombo! Ali e mwanafye wakwe. Takwetepo umwana umukashana nangu umwaume umbi." 
Judges11:35 Bwangu bwangufye ilyo amumwene, alepawile ifyakufwala fyakwe atampa no kulila ati, “Iye! We mwana wandi umukashana ee! Iwe wanenga ukuba no bulanda, kabili niwe cibe ifi! Ine nalilapa na kanwa kandi kuli Yawe nakabili teti ndapuluke amashiwi nalapilepo nakalya!”" 
Judges11:36 Umwana nao alyaswike wishi no kutila, “Tata wandi ee, iwe walilapa kuli Yawe. Ala citafye icintu conse ico walaya, pantu nomba moneni ukuti ni Yawe eukulandwilileko ku balwani benu, abena Amoni.”" 
Judges11:37 Kabili aebele wishi ati, “Nsuminisheniko icintu cimo nalalomba,” elyo atile, “Taleni ndekeni nje ndeendauka mu mpili pa myeshifye ibili no kulila pamo na banandi pantu ine nshakatale ngupwapo.”" 
Judges11:38 Awe wishi atile, “Cisuma kuti waya.” Kabili amulekele aya pa myeshi ibili. Kanshi umukashana na banankwe baile ku mpili no kulila pantu takatale opwapo." 
Judges11:39 Panuma ya myeshi ibili abwelele kuli wishi, kabili wishi acitile ifintu alapile kuli Yawe. Awe umukashana afwilefye ukwabula ukuupwapo. Kanshi apa pene epafuma no lutambi lwa bena Israeli ulwakuti," 
Judges11:40 cila mwaka abana abakashana bafwile ukuya mu mpanga inshiku shine mukulila umwana mwanakashi wakwa Yefuta umwina Gileadi. 
Judges12:1 Kabili abena Efulemu balongenye ifita fyabo, bayabukile na ku Safoni, no kuya eba Yefuta abati, “Nga kanshi cinshi wailile mukulwisha abena Amoni ukwabula ukuti utwiteko pakuti tuye bonse? Nomba ifwe twalakocela iŋanda pamo pene nobe.”" 
Judges12:2 Elyo Yefuta atile kuli bena, “Ine pamo na bantu bandi twali no mulimo ukalamba nganshi uwakukankabula na bena Amoni. Kabili ilintu namwitile na imwe tamwaishile mpusushako ku maboko yabo." 
Judges12:3 Eico ilyo namwene ukuti imwe mwakaana ukungafwa, nshasakamene umweo wandi lelo nayabukile kukulwisha abena Amoni. Kabili Yawe nao ampeela amaka yakubacimfya. Kanshi nomba cinshi ico mwaishila ilelo mukuti mundwishe?”" 
Judges12:4 Elyo Yefuta nao alonganike abena Gileadi mukulwisha abena Efulemu. Elyo abena Gileadi bacimfishe abanabo pantu abena Efulemu batile, “Imwe mwe bena Gileadi mwafyukilefye mukati ka bena Efulemu na bena Manase.”" 
Judges12:5 Abena Gileadi epakuya pokolola ifyabu fya mumana wa Yordani ifyakwabukilapo pakuya ku bena Efulemu. Kabili uyo onse uwapusuka wa mu bena Efulemu nga atila, “Ndefwaya ukwabuka.” Nabo abena Gileadi bali nokumwipusha ukuti, “Bushe iwe uli mwina Efulemu?” Elyo nao nga cakuti ayasuka atila, “Awe,”" 
Judges12:6 elyo bali nokutila, “Cisuma sosa utile, ‘Shiboleti.’” Elyo nga asosa atila, “Siboleti,” pa mulandu wakukanalumbula bwino ili ishiwi, bali nokumwikata no kumwipaila palya pene pa fyabu fya mumana wa Yordani. Kanshi abantu ukulingana ne mpendwa amakana amakumi yane na yabili (42,000) aya bena Efulemu ebafwile pa nshita ilya inefye." 
Judges12:7 Yefuta ali mupingushi wa bena Israeli pa myaka mutanda. Elyo Yefuta uwali umwina Gileadi afwile, bamushiika na mu musumba wa Misipa mu Gileadi." 
Judges12:8 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Yefuta, Ibisani umwina Betelemu ewakonkelepo ukutungulula abena Israeli." 
Judges12:9 Akwete abana abaume amakumi yatatu (30), elyo na bana abanakashi amakumi yatatu (30) nabo bene. Aufishe abana bakwe abanakashi ku baume abashali ba mu mukowa wakwe. Abana bakwe abaume nabo abafwaile abakashana abashali ba mu mukowa wakwe amakumi yatatu (30) ebo baupile. Awe nao Ibisani atungulwile abena Israeli pa myaka cine lubali." 
Judges12:10 Ibisani ilyo afwile, ashiikilwe mu Betelemu." 
Judges12:11 Kabili uwamukonkelepo ni Eloni umwina Sebuloni, ewali mupingushi wa bena Israeli pa myaka ikumi limo (10)." 
Judges12:12 Elyo Eloni afwile, ashiikilwe mu musumba wa Aiyaloni mu calo cakwa Sebuloni." 
Judges12:13 Kabili uwamukonkelepo ni Abidoni mwana Hileli, ukufuma ku Piratoni, ewatungulwile Israeli." 
Judges12:14 Abidoni ali na bana amakumi yane (40) abaume, kabili abeshikulu nabo bali amakumi yatatu (30). Aba bonse baleendela pali bapunda amakumi cine lubali (70). Nao atungulwile abena Israeli pa myaka cine konse konse." 
Judges12:15 Ilyo nao Abidoni mwana Hileli umwina Piratoni afwile, ashiikilwe ku Piratoni mu calo cakwa Efulemu mu mpili sha calo ca bena Amaleki." 
Judges13:1 Kabinge abena Israeli babwekeshepo ukubifya ku cinso cakwa Yawe, na Yawe epakubapeela mu maboko ya Bafilisiti pa myaka amakumi yane (40)." 
Judges13:2 Mu Sora mwali umuntu umo uwe shina lya Manoa, uwa mu luko lwa bena Dani. Manoa alyupile umwanakashi uwali iŋumba. Takwetepo mwana nelyo umo." 
Judges13:3 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe amonekele ku mwanakashi no kumweba ati, “Nangu iwe waba iŋumba kabili tawatala aukwatapo umwana, nomba uli nokwimita no kukwata umwana umwaume." 
Judges13:4 Eico nomba mona ukuti wilanwa umwangashi nangufye icikola conse. Kabili tecakwesha ukulya icakowela," 
Judges13:5 pantu iwe nomba uli nokwimita kabili ukafyala umwana umwaume. Tecakwesha ukumubeya ku mutwe wakwe, pantu uyu mwana akaba Munasiliti, emukutila uwapatulwa na Lesa ukufuma ku kufyalwa kwakwe. Kabili akatendeka ukufumya abena Israeli mu maboko ya Bafilisiti.”" 
Judges13:6 Elyo umwanakashi epakuya ku mulume wakwe no kuya mweba ati, “Umuntu umo uwakwa Lesa acisa kuli ine, elyo acilamoneka kwati ni malaika wakwa Lesa, uwakutiina nganshi. Ine nshacimwipusha uko acifuma kabili nao tacinjeba ne shina lyakwe." 
Judges13:7 Nomba acinjeba ukuti, ‘Iwe uli nokwimita kabili ukafyala umwana umwaume. Eico nomba tecakwesha ukunwa umwangashi, nangu ukunwa icikola icili conse. Pantu uyu mulumendo akaba Umunasiliti wakwa Lesa ukufumafye ku kufyalwa kwakwe ukufika na ku bushiku bwa mfwa yakwe.’”" 
Judges13:8 Elyo Manoa apepele kuli Yawe no kutila, “Napapata mwe Yawe, ine ndemulomba ukuti lekeni umuntu wakwa Lesa untu mwatumine kuli ifwe ese atufunde ifyo tuli nokucita pakusunga uyu mwana ali nokufyalwa.”" 
Judges13:9 Lesa nao alyumfwile ukupapata kwakwa Manoa. Kabili na malaika wakwa Lesa alishile ku mwanakashi ilyo acili ku mabala. Manoa umulume wakwe ninshi talipo. 
Judges13:10 Awe umwanakashi bwangu bwangufye abutwike no kuya eba umulume no kutila, “Ala ulya muntu amonekele kuli ine pali bulya bushiku naisa!”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa nao alimine no kukonka umukashi. Ilyo afikile kuli uyu muntu, atile kuli ena, “Bushe niwe waishile landa no mukashi wandi?” Nao atile, “Ee nine wine.”" 
Judges13:12 Elyo Manoa atile kuli ena, “Nomba ilyo amashiwi yobe yakesa fikilishiwa, cikaba shani ku musango no bumi bwa uyu mwana, kabili ni finshi akalacita?”" 
Judges13:13 Elyo Malaika wakwa Yawe atile, “Conse ico naebele umukashi obe, eco afwilefye ukulacita." 
Judges13:14 Tafwile ukulalya icintu conse icili nokufuma ku myangashi, nangufye ukunwa umwangashi uulifye onse, nangu icikola conse nangu conse icakowela. Afwilefye ukulacita fyonse ifyo namukonkomeshe.”" 
Judges13:15 Elyo Manoa atile kuli malaika wakwa Yawe, “Ifwe kuti twatemwa ukuti utale ulolele mpaka tukupekanishishe akana ka mbushi.”" 
Judges13:16 Nao malaika wakwa Yawe atile, “Ala nangufye imwe mwanteka, ine tekuti ndye icakulya cenu. Lelo nga mulefwaya ukupekanya umutuulo wa cakoca, utuuleni kuli Yawe.” Pantu Manoa ena taishibe ukuti ulya ali ni malaika wakwa Yawe." 
Judges13:17 Elyo Manoa aipwishe malaika wakwa Yawe ati, “Bushe ishina lyobe niwe nani? Pantu tulefwaya ilyo ishiwi lyobe likafikilishiwa tukakucindike.”" 
Judges13:18 Malaika wakwa Yawe nao atile, “Bushe mulandu nshi uleipushisha ishina lyandi? Ala lishina ilyankaama.”" 
Judges13:19 Elyo Manoa abuulile akabushi, pamo pene no mutuulo wa fyabunga, kabili apeele ilambo kuli Yawe mukufyocela pa mulu we libwe. Kabili Yawe nao acitile icipeshamano ninshi Manoa no mukashi wakwe balemona." 
Judges13:20 Awe kutifye cilya ulubingu lwa mulilo lwalafuma pa bulambo no kulaya mumulu, malaika wakwa Yawe nao aninine mu lubingu lwa mulilo ukuya mumulu. Na pakumona ici, Manoa no mukashi wakwe bawile ubukupeme, bafisha ne mpumi shabo panshi." 
Judges13:21 Awe ukufuma palya penefye malaika wakwa Yawe tabalile amonekela kuli Manoa no mukashi wakwe. Elyo Manoa ashininkishe ukuti kanshi ni malaika wakwa Yawe. 
Judges13:22 Elyo Manoa atile ku mukashi wakwe, “Ifwe tuli nokufwa, pantu natumona Lesa.”" 
Judges13:23 Elintu umukashi wakwe atile, “Nga cakuti Yawe alefwaya ukutwipaya, awe nga tapokelele ilambo lyakoca no mutuulo wa cabunga ukufuma ku maboko yesu, kabili nga tatulangile ifintu fyonse ifi nangu ukutweba ifi fyonse batwebele.”" 
Judges13:24 Awe asukile umwanakashi apapa umwana umwaume, kabili amwinike ishina lya Samsoni. Umwana alakula, na Yawe amupaala." 
Judges13:25 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe watampile ukumucincisha ilyo acili aleikala mu Mane Dani pakati ka Sora na Eshitaoli. 
Judges14:1 Inshita imo Samsoni aile ku Timuna no kumona kulya kwine umukashana Umufilisiti. 
Judges14:2 Ilyo abwelulwikeko, atile kuli wishi na nyina, “Ine ninja mona umukashana Umufilisiti mu Timuna. Eico nomba, kamubuuleni pantu eo ndefwaya ukuba umukashi wandi.”" 
Judges14:3 Wishi na nyina batile, “Bushe mu lupwa lobe nangu pakati ka bantu bobe tapengaba umwanakashi uo wingopa? Cinshi ico wingaila ku Bafilisiti abashasembululwa eko waya fwaila umwanakashi wakuupa?” Lelo Samsoni atile kuli wishi, “Kamubuuleni pantu uyu wine eo ntemenwe ne mwine.”" 
Judges14:4 Abafyashi bakwe bena tabaishibe ukuti ifi fyonse fyali bupekanyo ukufuma kuli Yawe, uwalefwaya inshila imo iyakulwishishamo Abafilisiti. Pantu pali ilya nshita ebaleteeka abena Israeli." 
Judges14:5 Elyo Samsoni pamo na wishi na nyina bonse pamo baile ku Timuna. Ilyo bafikile mupepi na ku mabala ya myangashi ya Timuna, ilyo linefye umusepela wa nkalamo wamubulumina." 
Judges14:6 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile na maka pali Samsoni, icakuti alepawile inkalamo tupimfya tupimfya ku mabokofye, kwati ni filya engalepaula akana ka mbushi. Lelo taebeleko wishi nangu nyina ico acitile." 
Judges14:7 Awe Samsoni alitentemwike no kuya landa no mwanakashi, no kumutemwa." 
Judges14:8 Ilyo papitilepo inshiku shimo shimo, alibweleleko no kuya upa umukashana. Ilyo aile shoka mukumona icitumbi ca ilya nkalamo, asangile ukuti mu citumbi muli umwina wa nshimu no buci!" 
Judges14:9 Atapwilemo ubuci abika pa lupi no kuya alelya. Ilyo abwelele kuli wishi na nyina, alibapeeleko bumo, kabili nabo baliliile. Lelo tabebele ukuti afumishe mu citumbi ca nkalamo." 
Judges14:10 Elyo wishi kwa Samsoni aile mukumona umwanakashi. Kabili Samsoni acitile amatebeto kulya kwine, pamo ngo lutambi ulo abalumendo abaleupa balecita." 
Judges14:11 Ilyo Samsoni aile monekela kulya, balimupeele abanankwe amakumi yatatu (30) abakwikala nankwe." 
Judges14:12 Elyo Samsoni abebele ati, “Lekeni mwebeko ubwile. Nga cakuti kuti mwanjeba ifyo cilepilibula mu nshikufye cine lubali isha mutebeto, ine nkamupeela insalu isha kolokondwe amakumi yatatu (30) ne nsalu shakufwala pa nshikunkulu nasho amakumi yatatu (30)." 
Judges14:13 Lelo nga cakuti tamunjebele ifyo cilepilibula, nimwefye nomba mufwile ukumpeela insalu sha kolokondwe amakumi yatatu (30) elyo ne nsalu shakufwala pa nshikunkulu nasho amakumi yatatu (30).” Elyo nabo batile, “Ale nomba twebe ubwile bobe tumfwe!”" 
Judges14:14 Samsoni nao atile, “Mu cintu icilya ifibiye, mulafuma icakulya. Kabili mu cintu icamaka, kulafuma icalowa.” Awe baeseshe ukupituluka muli ubu bwile pa nshiku shitatu, bafilwa ukwishiba ifyo calepilibula." 
Judges14:15 Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga shine, batile kuli muka Samsoni, “We shisembeleka umulume obe pakuti atulondolweleko ifyo ubu bwile bulepilibula. Nga wakaana, tuli nokukoca pamo pene no lupwa lwakwa wiso, mukafwa. Bushe mwatwitile kuno mukwisa twibila?”" 
Judges14:16 Elyo muka Samsoni akobwela umukoshi wakwe ku mulume no kulalila, no kutila, “Iwe kanshi walimpata! Iwe kanshi tawantemwa mu cine cine. Iwe walyeba abantu bandi ukwilula ubwile lelo ine tawanjeba ubwasuko.” Nao Samsoni atile, “Apo ine nshalondolwelako batata nangu bamayo, kanshi cinshi ico ine ningalondolwela ubu ubwile kuli iwe?”" 
Judges14:17 Awe umukashi nao abikilepofye ukulamulilila pa nshiku cine lubali isha mutebeto. Elintu pali ubu bwine bushiku bwakulenga cine lubali elyo amulondolwelele umo ubwile bwalolele, pantu alimupatikishe nganshi. Kabili nao elyo aile londolwela abantu bakwe umo ubwile bwalolele." 
Judges14:18 Ilyo akasuba kali takalawa pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali bwine, abekashi ba mu musumba batile kuli Samsoni, “Bushe cinshi icalowesha ukucila ubuci? Bushe cinshi icamaka nganshi ukucila inkalamo?” Samsoni nao atile, “Imwe amubula kulimina ku musepela wa ŋombe yandi, awe nga tamulondolwele ubu ubwile bwandi.”" 
Judges14:19 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile na maka pali Samsoni. Awe aile na ku Ashikeloni, aya ipayako abantu amakumi yatatu (30) no kupokololako ifyuma fyabo. Abuulile ne fyakufwala fyabo no kutwalila balya bantu abailwile ubwile bwakwe. Kabili ninshi acili nafulwa nganshi, abwelele na ku ŋanda yakwa wishi." 
Judges14:20 Kabili umukashi wakwa Samsoni bamupeele na ku mubiye cibusa uwamupalamine pa bwinga bwakwe. 
Judges15:1 Panuma ya ifi fyonse ifyacitike, pa nshita yakusombola iŋanu, Samsoni abuulile akana ka mbushi no kuya mukutandalila umukashi wakwe. Elyo atile, “Kanje ingila ku muputule wa mukashi wandi.” Lelo shifyala amukanya ukuya ingilamo." 
Judges15:2 Shifyala atile, “Ine naishibe ukuti naumukaana umukashana, ecalengele no kutila ine mupeele ku mubiyo. Bushe umwaice wakwe tacilapo ukuwama? Bushe cinshi teti eo ubuule abe umukashi obe?”" 
Judges15:3 Elyo Samsoni atile kuli ena, “Ino nshita pa cilandushi conse ico nkacita ku Bafilisiti nshakakwate umulandu.”" 
Judges15:4 Kanshi Samsoni epakuya mu mpanga no kuya ikata bamumbwe imyanda itatu (300), no kubakaka imicila babili babili. Kabili abikile icisaniko pakati ka micila iyo akakile ibili ibili." 
Judges15:5 Ilyo ayashishe ifisaniko no kuleka bamumbwe baleya mu mabala ya ŋanu ya Bafilisiti, aocele imyanshi bakakile iya ŋanu yonse iyaiminine, pamo pene na mabala ya myangashi, ne fimiti fya miolifa, fyonse fyapilile kumo." 
Judges15:6 Elyo Abafilisiti batile, “Bushe nani umuntu uucitile ica musango uyu?” Elyo babeba ukuti, “Ni Samsoni shifyala wa mwina Timuna, pantu asangile umukashi wakwe balimupeela ku munankwe.” Elyo Abafilisiti baile no kocelela umwanakashi pamo pene na wishi, no kufwa bafwa." 
Judges15:7 Elyo Samsoni epakubeba ati, “Apo imwe mwacita ica musango uyu, ine nalapa nshakaleke mpakafye nkalandule kuli imwe.”" 
Judges15:8 Awe alibasanshile bukali bukali no kwipaya abengi. Elyo atentemukile mwishika lya lupili no kuya ikala mu lucengo lwa cilibwe ca Etamu. 
Judges15:9 Elyo Abafilisiti baile cita inkambi mu calo ca bena Yuda, no kuya sansa abena Leyi." 
Judges15:10 Elyo abaume ba mu Yuda batile, “Bushe cinshi ico mwaishila mukutulwisha?” Nabo batile, “Ifwe twishile mukwikata Samsoni no kumukaka, pakuti tumucitile ifyo nao atucitile.”" 
Judges15:11 Elyo abaume abena Yuda amakana yatatu (300) baile no kutentemukila ku lucengo lwa cilibwe ca Etamu, no kuya eba Samsoni abati, “Bushe iwe emukuti na nomba taulaishiba ukuti Abafilisiti ebatuteeka? Bushe finshi iwe ucitile ifi kuli ifwe?” Samsoni atile, “Ine nacitile kuli bena ifyo bacitile kuli ine.”" 
Judges15:12 Nabo batile kuli ena, “Ifwe twishile kuno pakuti tukukake elyo tukupeele mu maboko ya Bafilisiti.” Elyo Samsoni nao atile, “Lapeni kuli ine ukuti temwe mulenjipaya mwe bene.”" 
Judges15:13 Nabo batile, “Iyoo, ifwe tulekukakafye no kukupeela mu maboko yabo. Ifwe tatwakwipaye.” Elyo bakakile Samsoni ne myando ibili iyipya, no kumufumya na mu lucengo mu cilibwe." 
Judges15:14 Cilya bafika ku Leyi, Abafilisiti baishile ne nsansa mukukumanya Samsoni. Elintu Umupashi wakwa Yawe waishile na maka pali Samsoni. Awe ne myando iyali ku maboko yakwe yali kwati bushishi bwa kolokondwe ubwapya ku mulilo. Kabili na fyonse ifikakilo fyaliponene ifine fyeka ukufuma ku maboko yakwe." 
Judges15:15 Samsoni epakubuula icifupa ca meno icakwa punda icibishi, eco abomfya ukwipailako abantu abali ikana limo (1,000)." 
Judges15:16 Elyo Samsoni asosa ati, “Ku cilifupa cakwa punda eko natulumanikila imina ya bantu. Ku cilifupa cakwa punda eko njipaile abantu ikana limo (1,000).”" 
Judges15:17 Ilyo Samsoni apwile ukusosa ifi, aposele icilifupa cakwa punda ukutali. Kabili neci cifulo cainikwe ishina lya Ramati Leyi." 
Judges15:18 Elyo Samsoni aiketwe ne cilaka nganshi, alilila na kuli Yawe no kutila, “We Mfumu niwe ulengele umubomfi obe ukucimfya apakalamba. Bushe ine nomba mfwefye ku cilaka, no kulenga mponene mu maboko ya bantu abashasembululwa?”" 
Judges15:19 Kanshi Lesa nao epakulepula incende imo apafonkele mu Leyi, na menshi yafuma. Kabili ilyo Samsoni anwene, amaka yalibwelele muli ena, no kupuputuka. Ecalengele aka kamfukumfuku ukwinikwa ishina lya Eni Hakore, kabili ukufikafye na kuli nomba, emo kaba mu Leyi mwine." 
Judges15:20 Kanshi Samsoni ali mupingushi wa bena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yabili (20), mu nshiku sha Bafilisiti." 
Judges16:1 Mu bushiku bumo Samsoni alile ku Gasa, uko aile mona umwanakashi umo cilende. Alimukonkele no kuya sendama nankwe." 
Judges16:2 Ilyo abekashi ba mu Gasa babebele ukuti, “Samsoni ali kuno! Elyo bashingulwike incende, no kumulalilila mukumupembela ubushiku bonse pa mpongolo ya musumba. Takwali nelyo umo uwaselele mu nshita ya bushiku, bonse batilefye, ‘Ku maca elyo tuli nokumwipya.’ ”" 
Judges16:3 Lelo Samsoni asendeme ukufikafye inshita ya bushiku pakati. Elintu aishile ima no kwikata ifiibi fya ku mpongolo pamo pene ne nceshi shibili, no kufinukula fyonse kumo ne mipilikisho. Afisenda pa mabeya yakwe no kufitwala pa mulu wa lupili ulwalungatana na Hebuloni." 
Judges16:4 Ilyo papitile inshita, Samsoni batemwanene no mwanakashi umo uwaleikala mwishika lya Soreki, ishina lyakwe ali ni Delila." 
Judges16:5 Elyo bakateeka ba Bafilisiti baile kuli ena nokutila, “Umone nga kuti wamusembeleka, akakulange inkaama ya maka yakwe nefyo twingamwansha pakuti twamukaka no kumupwisha. Elyo na ifwe cila muntu ali nokukupeela indalama amashekeli ikana limo no mwanda umo (1,100) isha silifa.”" 
Judges16:6 Awe nao Delila atile kuli Samsoni, “Shinjebako icalenga ukuti ukwate amaka ayakula ifi, kabili nefyo bengakukaka no kukucimfya.”" 
Judges16:7 Elyo Samsoni atile kuli Delila, “Nga cakuti umuntu uuli onsefye ankaka ne nshinga ishibishi cine lubali, ishishilauma, awe lyena kuti amaka yapwa nabafye ngo muntu uuli onse.”" 
Judges16:8 Elyo bakateeka ba Bafilisiti baletele inshinga ishibishi cine lubali kabili ishishauma kuli Delila, nao esho abomfya ukumukakilako," 
Judges16:9 ilyo ninshi Delila ali na baume bamo ababeleme mu muputule wa mukati ka mu ŋanda. Elyo atile kuli Samsoni, “Ala, Abafilisiti bakwishila!” Awe Samsoni aputwile inshinga kwati bushishi ubwakumya ku mulilo. Eico inkaama ya maka yakwe tayaishibikwe." 
Judges16:10 Elyo Delila atile kuli Samsoni, “Iwe kanshi untumfyafye no kumbepafye. Shi nomba njebafye ifyo bengakukaka.”" 
Judges16:11 Samsoni atile, “Nga cakuti umuntu uuli onsefye ankaka bwino bwino ku myando iyipya iyishabala aibomfiwapo, awe lyena ine kuti nanaka no kuba ngo muntu uuli onse.”" 
Judges16:12 Awe Delila abuulile imyando iyipya no kumukakilako. Ninshi Delila ali na baume bamo abafiseme mu muputule wa mukati ka ŋanda. Elyo atile kuli Samsoni, “Ala Abafilisiti bakwishila!” Awe Samsoni aputwile imyando ukufuma ku maboko yakwe kwati bushishifye." 
Judges16:13 Elyo Delila atile kuli Samsoni, “Bushe na nomba ucili ulembepafye no kuntumfya? Ala, ine ndefwayafye unjebe ifyo bengakukaka.” Nao alyaswike no kutila, “Nga cakuti walukamo ifikuti mu mushishi wa mu mutwe wandi imiku cine lubali, no kufikosha elyo wafikakila ku lupopo, awe lyena ine kuti nanaka no kuba ngo muntu uulifye onse.”" 
Judges16:14 Nomba ilyo acili mu tulo, Delila abuulile ifikuti apikwile mu mutwe wakwe, afipikanya nge sumbu no kufikasha elyo afipopela na ku lupopo. Elyo Delila atile kuli Samsoni, “Ala, Abafilisiti bakwishila!” Awe nao abukile mu tulo no kunukula akalupopo, no mushishi waishalilafye kwati tawapikwilwe." 
Judges16:15 Elyo Delila atile kuli ena, “Nga kanshi kuti watila shani ukuti ‘walintemwa!’ ilyo umutima obe tawaba kuli ine? Uyu waba e muku walenga itatu uo umbepa no kumfisa ukunjeba inkaama yobe, uko wafumya amaka yakula ifi.”" 
Judges16:16 Awe Delila mu kupatikisha kwakwe akonkenyepofye ubushiku no bushiku ukulaipusha Samsoni, mpaka icifukushi caishile kuli Samsoni, alafwaisha no kufwa." 
Judges16:17 Na pakulekelesha Samsoni mu cifukushi asukile asokolwela Delila inkaama yonsefye. Samsoni atile, “Ine mu mutwe wandi tamwatala amupita icibeyo apo nafyalilwa. Pantu ine ndi Munasiliti uwapatulwa wakwa Lesa ukufuma ku kufyalwa kwandi. Nga cakuti mu mutwe wandi mwapita icibeyo, lyena amaka yandi kuti yapwa. Kabili kuti nabafye uwanaka ngo muntu uuli onse.”" 
Judges16:18 Ilyo Delila amwene ukuti nomba namweba inkaama yonse, atumine amashiwi kuli bakateeka ba Bafilisiti no kutila, “Ala iseni nakabili, pantu Samsoni nomba nanjeba inkaama yonse.” Elyo nabo bakateeka ba Bafilisiti babwelulwike nabasenda ne ndalama sha silifa mu maboko yabo." 
Judges16:19 Elyo Delila alengele Samsoni asendama mu tulo pa makufi yakwe. Aitapo umwaume umo no kumweba ukuti abeye Samsoni umushishi untu apikwile cine lubali, na maka yakwe yayamba ukucepa. Elyo atendeka no kumucusha mpaka amaka yakwe yapwa." 
Judges16:20 Elyo Delila atile kuli Samsoni, “Ala Abafilisiti bakwishila!” Abukile mu tulo no kutontonkanya ukuti, “Na lelo line ndeya nga filya fine ciba kale no kuipukumunafye ukwabula ubwafya.” Lelo taishibe ukuti Yawe namusha." 
Judges16:21 Kabili Abafilisiti balimwikete no kumutonkola amenso, elyo bamutwala na ku Gasa. Baya bomfya iminyololo ya mukuba kukumukakilako, no kumubika kukulashingulusha icilibwe cakupelelako mu cifungo." 
Judges16:22 Lelo umushishi wa mu mutwe wakwe watendeke ukulamena, panuma ya kumubeya." 
Judges16:23 Nomba bakateeka ba Bafilisiti balongene mukutuula ilambo ilikankala ku mulungu wabo Dagoni elyo nokuti basangalale, pantu balandile ukuti, “Umulungu wesu nautupeela Samsoni, umulwani wesu, mu maboko yesu.”" 
Judges16:24 Nomba ilyo abantu bamwene Samsoni, batendeke ukutasha umulungu wabo no kutila, “Umulungu wesu nautupeela umulwani wesu mu maboko yesu, umuntu umo uwaonaula icalo cesu no kufusha imfwa mu kwipaulula kwa bantu besu.”" 
Judges16:25 Ilyo imitima yabo ninshi icili ne nsansa ishingi nganshi, batampile ukupunda abati, “Kaleteni Samsoni ese atusansamusheko.” Awe nabo baitile Samsoni ukufuma mu cifungo no kwisa mukwangala ku ntanshi yabo. Kabili bamwiminike pakati ka nceshi." 
Judges16:26 Elyo Samsoni aebele umubomfi uwamwikete pa kuboko kwakwe ati, “Ntwala pa ncende apabela inceshi ishaikasha itempele, pakuti eko nshintilile.”" 
Judges16:27 Nomba mwitempele mwali cinkupiti wa bantu, abaume na banakashi. Bakateeka bonse ba Bafilisiti nabo emo bali, elyo pa mutenge we tempele pali abantu ukulingana amakana yatatu (3,000), abaume na banakashi abaletamba kufyo Samsoni aleyangala." 
Judges16:28 Elyo Samsoni apepele kuli Yawe no kutila, “Mwe Mfumu Yawe, njibukisheniko. Mwe Lesa napapata nkoseleshenikofye uno wine muku. Kabili nengeni ukuti nandule ku Bafilisiti pa menso yandi yabili aya bantonkola.”" 
Judges16:29 Elyo Samsoni apalamine ku nceshi shibili isha pakati ishaikeshe ili tempele. Aikete ukuboko kwa kulyo kuli lumo elyo no kuboko kwa kuso kuli lumbi kabili ashintililako na maka ayakalamba nganshi. 
Judges16:30 Atile, “Lekeni nomba mfwile pamo na Bafilisiti!” Elyo asunkile na maka nganshi, ne tempele lyabongolokele pali bakateeka na bantu bonse abali mukati. Eico abafwilile pamo nankwe balifulishe ukucila abo aipeye ilyo ali umumi." 
Judges16:31 Awe bamunyina pamo no lupwa lonse ulwakwa wishi baile kukusenda icitumbi cakwe. Baciletele no kucishiika pakati ka musumba wa Sola na Eshitaoli mu nindi yakwa wishi Manoa. Samsoni atungulwile abena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yabili. 
Judges17:1 Nomba kwali umuntu umo uwe shina lya Mika, uwaleikala mu calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu." 
Judges17:2 Kabili atile kuli nyina, “Pa mulandu wa ndalama ikana limo no mwanda umo (1,100) isha silifa isho bakwibile, kabili isho naumfwile ukuti walelapisha, ngefyo na ine wine nayumfwilile ne mwine, ala ine isho ndalama sha silifa, ndi nasho. Nine wine nasendele.” Elyo nyina atile, “Ipaalo lyakwa Yawe libe pali iwe, mwana wandi.”" 
Judges17:3 Ilyo abweseshe ishi indalama amashekeli ikana limo no mwanda umo (1,100) isha silifa kuli nyina, nao atile, “Ine ndelaya mu cine no kutambika indalama shandi isha silifa kuli Yawe pa mulandu wa mwana wandi, pakuti apangemo icimpashanya icakubasa ne caengwa. Kabili ine ndi nokucibwesesha kuli imwe.”" 
Judges17:4 Eico kanshi, ilyo abweseshemo ishi ndalama sha silifa kuli nyina, nao nyina abuulilepo indalama amashekeli ya silifa imyanda ibili (200), no kushipeela kuli Kafula wa fyela fya silifa, nao panuma yakwengulula, apangamo icimpashanya icabaswa ne caengwa no kufibika mu ŋanda yakwa Mika." 
Judges17:5 Nomba uyu wine muntu Mika alikwete ne ŋanda yakupepelamo utulubi. Kabili alipangile icakufwala ca bushimapepo ica efodi no tulubi twakupendwilako pa ŋanda, elyo abuula no mwana wakwe umwaume umo amucita ukuba shimapepo." 
Judges17:6 Pantu mu nshiku shilya, abena Israeli tabakwete imfumu. Kanshi umuntu onse umwine aleicitilafye icili conse ico amona ukuti nacimulinga." 
Judges17:7 Kwali no mulumendo uwafumine ku Betelemu mu calo cakwa Yuda, kabili ali wa mu luko wakwa Yuda. Uyu ali mwina Levi, umweni uwaleikala kulya." 
Judges17:8 Uyu muntu ashile icifulo cakwe mu Betelemu mu calo ca Yuda no kuya alefwaya fwaya icifulo cimbi icakwikalapo. Ilyo acili pa lwendo, atulile pa ŋanda yakwa Mika mu calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu." 
Judges17:9 Awe Mika atile kuli ena, “Bushe iwe wafuma kwi?” Nao atile, “Ine ndi mwina Levi wa ku Betelemu, mu calo cakwa Yuda. Kabili ine njishile mukufwaya icifulo apakuti ndeikala.”" 
Judges17:10 Elyo Mika atile kuli ena, “Twakulaikala bonse no kuba tata wandi kabili shimapepo wandi. Ndi nokulakupeela indalama amashekeli ya silifa ikumi limo pa mwaka. Nkalakufwika no kukuliisha.”" 
Judges17:11 Awe nao umwina Levi alisumine ukwikala nankwe. Kabili uyu mulumendo asangwikefye kwati ni umo uwa pa bana bakwe abaume. 
Judges17:12 Elyo Mika asontele uyu umwina Levi ukuba shimapepo wakwe, no kulaikala nankwe mu ŋanda mumwakwe" 
Judges17:13 Kabili Mika atile, “Nomba ine naishiba ukutila Yawe ali nokumpaala, apo nakwata uyu umwina Levi ukuba shimapepo wandi.”" 
Judges18:1 Mu nshiku shilya abena Israeli tabakwete imfumu. Kabili mu nshiku shilya uluko lwa bena Dani lwalefwaya fwaya icifulo icingaba icabofye icakulaikalamo. Pantu bena tabali tabalapeelwa icifulo ca cakaniko ca cishilano pakati ka nko sha bena Israeli. 
Judges18:2 Eico abena Dani batumine abantu basano abakalabana ukufuma pa mpendwa ya bantu babo ku Sora na ku Eshitaoli mukaya lengula icalo no kucifwailisha. Babebele ukuti, “Kabiyeni, kafwailisheni ici icalo!” Awe nabo baingilile ku calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu no kufika ku ŋanda yakwa Mika, eko basendeme." 
Judges18:3 Ninshi bali mupepi ne ŋanda yakwa Mika, baumfwile ishiwi lya mulumendo ukuti lya mwina Levi. Awe bashokele kuntu ali nokumwipusha abati, “Nga nani uwakuleta kuno? Kabili cinshi ico ulecita kuli cino cifulo? Mulimo nshi waishila kuno?”" 
Judges18:4 Nao atile kuli bena, “Mika alincitila ifingi, ndi mubomfi wakwe uwa malipilo, kabili ndi shimapepo wakwe.”" 
Judges18:5 Nabo batile kuli ena, “Twapapata twipushisheko kuli Lesa twishibe nga cakuti ulwendo lwesu luli nokuba ulweshuko.”" 
Judges18:6 Shimapepo nao atile, “Cisuma mwende umutende. Ulwendo lwenu luli ulwasuminishiwa kuli Yawe.”" 
Judges18:7 Elyo aba bantu basano baimine no kuya ku Laishi, no kuya sanga ukuti abantu baleikalafye mu mutelelwe, nga aba mu musumba wa Sidoni, abashitungwa kabi, abacingililwa bwino kabili abashalekabila icintu nangu cimo pano calo. Balitalwike ku bena Sidoni, kabili tabaleampana nangu umo." 
Judges18:8 Kabili ilyo aba bantu basano babwelelemo ku Sora na ku Eshitaoli, bamunyinabo batile kuli bena, “Bushe mwasangile shani ifyo ifintu fili?”" 
Judges18:9 Nabo batile, “Iseni pakuti tukaye balwisha! Pantu natumona ukuti icalo cisuma nganshi. Bushe mwalaikalafye tamwacitepo nelyo cimo? Ala mwikokola ukuti tuye mukupokolola cilya icalo." 
Judges18:10 Kabili ilyo mukafika kulya, mukaya sanga abantu abashili bamutunganya. Icalo naco cikulu ico Lesa apeele mu maboko yenu. Mu calo umushaba ukukabila kantu nelyo kamo.”" 
Judges18:11 Elyo abaume imyanda mutanda (600) aba mu luko lwakwa Dani, abaipangeshe ne fyanso fya bulwi, bafumine ku Sora na ku Eshitaoli no kuya ku bulwi." 
Judges18:12 Ilyo bacili mu nshila bacitile inkambi pa Kiriati Yarimu mu calo cakwa Yuda. Uyu wine e mulandu ici cifulo icabela ku masamba ya Kiriati Yarimu bacitila Mane Dani ukufika no bushiku bwa lelo line. 
Judges18:13 Kabili ukufuma kulya, batwalilile no kuya ku calo ca mpili cakwa Efulemu no kufika ku ŋanda yakwa Mika." 
Judges18:14 Elyo balya bantu basano abaile mukulengula icalo ca Laishi batile kuli bamunyina, “Bushe imwe mwalishiba ukuti pali aya mayanda palibapo imo umwaba icakufwala ca bushimapepo ca efodi, utulubi twakupendwilako pa ŋanda, icimpashanya icabaswa ne cimpashanya icaengwa? Eico nomba tontonkanyenipo ico mwalacita.”" 
Judges18:15 Kanshi nabo epakwaluluka palya pene, no kuya ku ŋanda ya mulumendo umwina Levi ku cifulo cakwa Mika no kuya muposhapo." 
Judges18:16 Ninshi abaume imyanda mutanda (600) abaipangeshe ku bulwi nabo beminine pa mwinshi wa mpongolo. 
Judges18:17 Balya abaume basano abaile lengula icalo baingile mu ŋanda no kusenda icimpashanya icabaswa ne cakufwala ca bushimapepo ca efodi, utulubi twakupendwilako pa ŋanda ne cimpashanya icaengwa, ninshi shimapepo na bantu imyanda mutanda (600) abaipangeshe ne fyabulwi beminine pa mwinshi wa mpongolo." 
Judges18:18 Ilyo aba bantu baingile mu ŋanda mwa Mika no kubuulamo icimpashanya icabaswa ne cakufwala ca bushimapepo ca efodi, utulubi twakupendwilako pa ŋanda ne cimpashanya icaengwa, elyo shimapepo atile kuli bena, “Bushe ni finshi imwe mulecita?”" 
Judges18:19 Nabo batile, “Iwe talalafye tondolo! Tecakwesha ukusosa ishiwi nelyo limo. Tuleyafye bonse, no kuba tata kabili shimapepo wesu. Bushe te cisuma ukuti ulebombela uluko no lupwa lwa mu bena Israeli nga shimapepo, ukucila ukulabombela iŋanda ya muntu umo?”" 
Judges18:20 Awe shimapepo nao alitemenwe nganshi. Abuulile icakufwala ca bushimapepo ca efodi, utulubi twakupendwilako pa ŋanda elyo ne cimpashanya icabaswa no kukonka aba bantu abena Dani." 
Judges18:21 Elyo bayalulwike, no kutendeka ukuya. Batangisha abaice, ifitekwa ne fyuma fyabo pa ntanshi yabo." 
Judges18:22 Kutifye cilya baendako panono ukufuma pa ŋanda yakwa Mika, abaume abaleikala mupepi ne ŋanda yakwa Mika balongene pamo no kusupila abena Dani." 
Judges18:23 Elyo babilikisha abena Dani, nabo bapilibuka no kutila kuli Mika, “Bushe cinshi calenga ukuti mwise no mulongo wa bantu abafula ifi?”" 
Judges18:24 Mika nao atile, “Imwe namusenda imilungu iyo ne mwine naipangila, kabili namunsendela na shimapepo wandi, nomba ine ndeshala na cinshi? Nga kuti mwalaipusha shani ukuti, ‘Cinshi ico mwaishila no mulongo wa bantu abafula ifi?’”" 
Judges18:25 Elyo abena Dani batile kuli ena, “Iwe wilatalikana na ifwe, pantu limbi abantu nga bafulwa bwangu kuti bakulwisha, icakuti iwe no lupwa lobe kuti mwalufya ne myeo yenu.”" 
Judges18:26 Awe abena Dani bakonkenyepo ulwendo lwabo. Kabili ilyo Mika abamwene ukuti nabakwatisha amaka ukumucila, ayalulwikeko no kubwelelamo kumwakwe." 
Judges18:27 Ilyo abena Dani basendele ifyo Mika apangile, pamo pene na shimapepo, baile ku Laishi ku bulwi ku bantu baikele umutende, kabili abashaletunganya nelyo cimo, no kuya basansa no kubepaya ku lupanga, babocela no musumba wabo." 
Judges18:28 Takwali umuntu nelyo umo uwakubatulako, pantu baleikala ukutali nganshi ukufuma ku Sidoni, kabili tabakwete na cumfwano na bantu ba ku Aramu. Umusumba wabo wali mwishika ilya ku Beti Rehobu. Abena Dani bakuulile umusumba cipya cipya, no kwikala emo balaikala." 
Judges18:29 Uyu musumba bawinike Dani, ishina lya cikolwe cabo uwafyelwe kuli Israeli, nangu uyu umusumba kale waleitwa Laishi." 
Judges18:30 Awe abena Dani baimike ne cilubi icabaswa pakuti balecipepa. Elyo babuulile Yonatani mwana Geshomu, uwali mwana Mose pamo na bana bakwe abaume ukuba bashimapepo pakati ka luko lwa bena Dani ukufika na pa nshita babasendele muli bunkole." 
Judges18:31 Kanshi batwalilile ukulabomfya utulubi uto Mika abashilile inshitafye yonse ilyo iŋanda yakwa Lesa yali mu Shilo. 
Judges19:1 Mu nshiku shilya, abena Israeli tabakwete imfumu. Nomba eko ali umwina Levi umo uwaikele mu calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu ukutali nganshi, abuulile umwanakashi umwina Betelemu mu calo cakwa Yuda, ukuba umukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga." 
Judges19:2 Lelo uyu mukashana tali uwacetekelwa ku mulume wakwe iyoo. Ashile umulume wakwe no kubwelelamo kuli wishi ku Betelemu ku calo cakwa Yuda, no kuya ikala kulya imyeshi ine." 
Judges19:3 Elyo umulume wakwe amukonkela kukumupapata pakuti engabweluluka. Ilyo aileko, ali no mubomfi wakwe na bapunda babili. Ilyo amumona, uyu mukashana amutwala mu ŋanda yakwa wishi. Kabili ilyo wishi amumona, amupokelela ne nsansa nganshi." 
Judges19:4 Elyo shifyala, wishi wa mukashana, amupapatila ukuti ekale. Kanshi nao epakwikala nabo inshiku shitatu, balalya elyo no kunwa, kabili alaikala na kulya kwine." 
Judges19:5 Pa bushiku bwalenga shine, bonse babuukile lucelocelo elyo umwina Levi atendeka no kuipekanya pakuti aleya. Lelo wishi wa mukashana aeba shifyala ati, “Awe ubale ulye pakuti nga wakwata amaka, elyo lyena walaya.”" 
Judges19:6 Kanshi bonse babili epakwikala balalya no kunwena pamo. Na panuma wishi wa mukashana atile, “Nakupapata ukuti wiya, lelo usendame pakuti usansamuke we mwine.”" 
Judges19:7 Kanshi ilyo uyu muntu aipekanya ukuti eme aleya, shifyala kabili amunakilisha, nao abwela no kusendama." 
Judges19:8 Ulucelocelo ubushiku bwalenga shisano, ilyo atile nomba kandeya, wishi wa mukashana nakabili amweba ati, “Awe ubale ulye. Kabili upembele akasuba kalukeko!” Kabili bonse babili baikala balalya nokunwena pamo." 
Judges19:9 Kabili ilyo uyu muntu no mukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga, no mubomfi wakwe, bati beme no kuya, kabili wishi wa mukashana abeba ati, “Nomba shimona akasuba kalaba ku cungulo, sendamenifye kuno kwine. Pantu nakawa kale akasuba elyo no bushiku buno nabupita. Ikalafye no kusangalala. Ulucelocelo mailo kuti waima no kuba pa lwendo lobe ulwakuya kumwenu.”" 
Judges19:10 Lelo tasumine ukusendama nakabili, aiminefye ukulungama ku Yebusi, emukutila ku Yerusalemu, pamo na bapunda ba fipe babili, no mukashi wakwe." 
Judges19:11 Ilyo bafika mupepi no musumba wa Yebusi ilyo akasuba kaba kukuwa, umubomfi atile kuli shikulu wakwe, “Natupasuke tulole kulya ku musumba wa bena Yebusi, eko tusendame.”" 
Judges19:12 Lelo shikulu wakwe akaana ati, “Iyoo. Tekuti tuye mu musumba umbi umbifye, uo abantu babamo te bena Israeli. Twalayafye mpaka ukuya fika ku Gibea.”" 
Judges19:13 Elyo amweba nokuti, “Kosafye pakuti tweshe ukuya fika ku Gibea nangu ku Rama, no kuya sendama mu cifulo cimo kulya kwine.”" 
Judges19:14 Kanshi epakutwalililafye no lwendo lwabo, mpaka na kasuba kashima ilyo bapalama mupepi no musumba wa Gibea mu calo cakwa Benjamini." 
Judges19:15 Kulya eko baiminine no kusendama. Baile no kuya ikala mu lubansa ulwabelele pakati ka musumba, lelo takwali umuntu nelyo umo uwabasendele kukuya sendama ku ŋanda kumwakwe." 
Judges19:16 Mu cungulo cine cilya, umuntu umo umukote alefuma ku milimo ya mu mabala. Afumine ku calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu, nomba aleikala mu musumba wa Gibea. Emukutila abekashi ba muli ici cifulo bali bena Benjamini." 
Judges19:17 Ilyo amwene abalendo pakati ka lubansa lwa musumba aile no kuya bepusha ati, “Bushe imwe, muleya kwi? Kabili ni kwisa mufumine?”" 
Judges19:18 Nao umulendo ayasuka ati, “Ifwe tuli pa bulendo ukufuma ku Betelemu wa mu calo ca Yuda, tuleya ukutali ku calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu, eko twikala kabili eko nafumine na pakuya ku Betelemu mu calo ca bena Yuda. Nomba tuli pa lwendo lwakubwelelamo kumwesu lelo takuli umuntu nelyo umo uutusendeleko kukuya sendama kumwakwe." 
Judges19:19 Natukwatafye fyonse, impimbili ne fyakulya fya bapunda besu, no mukate no mwangashi, ifya ifwe fwe bene fwe babomfi benu, ine, umukashana no mulumendo untu tuli nankwe. Takuli icintu nelyo cimo, ico tulekabila.”" 
Judges19:20 Elyo umuntu umukote atile, “Umutende ube na imwe, mwapokelelwa ku ŋanda yandi, kabili ndemupeela fyonse ifyo mulekabila. Nombafye, tecakwesha ukusendama pakati ka lubansa lwa musumba.”" 
Judges19:21 Elyo abasenda mu ŋanda yakwe no kuliisha bapunda babo. Kabili panuma yakusamba amakasa yabo, balya elyo no kunwa." 
Judges19:22 Ilyo bacilifye balesansamuka, ifiwelewele fimo ifya baume fyafumine mu musumba no kushinguluka iŋanda. Bayambile ukulapumaula ku ciibi, no kulabilikisha ku mukote uwali umwine wa ŋanda no kutila, “Fumya uyo umwaume uwishile mumobe pakuti tulale nankwe.”" 
Judges19:23 Awe umukote asukile afumina panse, no kubeba ukuti, “Iyoo, mwe bacibusa bandi, tecakwesha ukucita ici cintu icabipa ifyo. Pantu uyu muntu mulendo wandi, te cisuma ukucita icamusebanya!" 
Judges19:24 Moneni, ine ninkwata umwana wandi umukashana nacisungu, elyo no mukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga, ebo lekeni mupeele pakuti mucite mwe bene fintu mulefwaya, lelo kuli uyu mwaume tecakwesha ukucitako icintu icamusebanya!”" 
Judges19:25 Lelo ifi fibantu ifyaume fyalikene ukumfwa kuli uyu umukote. Elyo uyu umwina Levi abuulile umukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga no kumufumisha panse kuli bena, nabo basendeme nankwe kumaka no kumwangasha ubushiku bonse, mpaka bwaca ku macaca elyo bamulekele ukuya." 
Judges19:26 Ilyo bwacele ulucelo uyu mwanakashi elyo abwelele ku ŋanda ukwali shikulu wakwe, no kuya wa pa mwinshi wa ŋanda no kulala palya pene mpakafye ilyo akasuba kabalike." 
Judges19:27 Ilyo shikulu wakwe abukile ulucelo, no kwisulako iciibi pakuti atampeko kulaya ulwendo lwakwe, amwene umukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga nalala, nawa mu mwinshi wa ŋanda natambalika na maboko yakwe mu mwinshi." 
Judges19:28 Elyo amweba ukuti, “Ima, natuleya!” Lelo takwali bwasuko. Elyo amubikile pali punda wakwe, aima no kuya fika kumwakwe." 
Judges19:29 Ilyo bafikile kumwabo abuulile umwele no kuputaula umukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga mu fipimfya fipimfya ukulingana ikumi limo na fibili (12), no kufituma mu ncende shonse isha bena Israeli." 
Judges19:30 Lelo abantu bonse abamweneko batile, “Awe icintu ca musango uyu tacabala acimoneka nangu ukucitika, nelyofye lintu abena Israeli bafumine mu calo ca Egupto. Tontonkanyeni! Pandishanyeni amano pali ici cintu pakuti twishibe ifyakucita.”" 
Judges20:1 Elyo abena Israeli bonse baimine ukufuma kuli Dani ukufikafye na ku Beresheba, kabili ukulundakofye ne calo ca Gileadi. Baishile pamo ngo muntu umo no kulongana pa cinso cakwa Yawe ku Misipa." 
Judges20:2 Intungulushi shonse isha bantu aba nko sha bena Israeli, nasho epo shali pali ici cilonganino ca bantu bakwa Lesa. Kabili ifita ifyaipangeshe impanga fyali amakana imyanda ine (400,000)." 
Judges20:3 Awe abena Benjamini baumfwile ukuti abena Israeli nabaya ku Misipa. Elyo abena Israeli batile ku mwina Levi, “Twebeni ifyo ubu bubifi bwacitike.”" 
Judges20:4 Umwina Levi umulume wa mwanakashi baipeye, atile, “Ine no mukashi wandi uo nshaupile mu bwinga twaishile ku Gibea mu calo ca Benjamini twati eko tuye sendama." 
Judges20:5 Na mu nshita ya bushiku, abaume ba mu Gibea balinjimine no kushinguluka iŋanda nafikililemo, mukufwaya ukunjipaya. Elyo babuulile umwanakashi wandi no kusendama nankwe kumaka no kumwangashafye bushiku bonse mpaka no kufwa afwa." 
Judges20:6 Ine nalisendele uyu mwanakashi wandi, no kumuputaula mu fipimfya fipimfya, no kufituma kuli cila ncende shonse isha cakaniko ca cishilano ca bena Israeli, pantu aba bantu bacitile ishiku kabili icamusebanya ku bena Israeli." 
Judges20:7 Eico nomba, imwe bonse mwe bena Israeli, muletipo shani, kabili pinguleni pano pene ifyakucita.”" 
Judges20:8 Awe abantu bonse baimine capamo nga bana aba ŋanda imo no kutila, “Tapabe nangu umo uwa pali ifwe uuleya kwitenti lyakwe. Kabili tapabe nangu umo uwa pali ifwe uuli nokubwelelamo ku ŋanda kumwakwe." 
Judges20:9 Nomba ifi efyo tuli nokucita ku bena Gibea, ifwe tuli nokuya ku bulwi pamo ngefyo ulubuko lwatulangilila." 
Judges20:10 Tuli nokubuulapo abantu ikumi limo ukufuma pali cila mwanda umo (100) uwa nko sha bena Israeli. Elyo umwanda umo (100) ukufuma pekana limo (1,000). Kabili ikana limo (1,000) ukufuma pa makana ikumi limo (10,000) abakulaleta ifyakulya ku fita fya nkondo. Kanshi ilyo ifita fikafika ku Gibea mu calo ca Benjamini, fikaya landula ukulingana no musebanya bacitile ku bena Israeli.”" 
Judges20:11 Eico bonse abaume abena Israeli balongene pamo nga ba ŋanda imo, balifye pa cintu cimo icakuya lwisha uyu musumba." 
Judges20:12 Elyo aba nko sha bena Israeli batumine abantu mu calo conse ica mutundu wakwa Benjamini no kutila, “Ngobu bubifi bwa musango nshi ubucitike pakati kenu?" 
Judges20:13 Eico nomba tupeeleni ifyo ifiwelewele fya bantu ifya bena Gibea, pakuti tubepaye no kufumya ububifi mukati ka bena Israeli.” Lelo abena Benjamini tebakumfwa ku babwananyina banabo abena Israeli iyoo." 
Judges20:14 Nabo abena Benjamini balonganike abantu pamo ukufuma mu misumba yabo yonse, no kwisa ku Gibea mukulwisha abena Israeli." 
Judges20:15 Pali ubu bwine bushiku, abena Benjamini balongenye ifita ifyaishiba ukulwa ku lupanga amakana amakumi yabili na mutanda (26,000) ukufuma mu misumba yabo. Neyi mpendwa yakukanapendelako abena Gibea." 
Judges20:16 Pali ifi fine ifita fyonse pali imyanda cine lubali (700) abaume abasalilwe, abo abalebomfya amaboko yabo aya ku kuso. Cila muntu aletifye nga apima umushishi umo ku mutwe wa muntu ne lekeni, talepusa nakalya." 
Judges20:17 Abena Israeli, ukufumyako abena Benjamini, nabo bali amakana imyanda ine (400,000) ifita fyacenjelesha kukulwa ku lupanga, bonsefye bali abaume babulwi." 
Judges20:18 Elyo abena Israeli baile ku Betele kukuya ipusha kuli Lesa abati, “Bushe ni nani uwa pali ifwe uuleba uwantanshi kukuya lwa na bena Benjamini?” Nao Yawe atile, “Abena Yuda ebalabalilapo ukuya”." 
Judges20:19 Awe ulucelo abena Israeli balimine no kuya cita inkambi mupepi no musumba wa Gibea. 
Judges20:20 Elyo abena Israeli baile kukulwisha abena Benjamini no kutantika ifita fyabo ifyabulwi ukulungatana no musumba wa Gibea. 
Judges20:21 Awe ifita fya bena Benjamini nafyo fyafumine mu musumba wa Gibea no kusansa abena Israeli no kwipaya ifita amakana amakumi yabili na yabili (22,000) pali bulya bushiku."
