Judges20:22 Lelo abena Israeli baikoselesha umuntu no muntu. Kabili babwekeshepo ukutantika ifita fyabulwi umo fyatanteme pakabala ntanshi pa bushiku bayambile ukulwa. 
Judges20:23 Elyo abena Israeli baile no kuya lila pa cinso cakwa Yawe mpakafye icungulo. Kabili baipwishe Yawe no kutila, “Bushe nakabili kuti twaya ku bulwi kukulwisha abena Benjamini, bamunyinefwe?” Nao Yawe atile, “Kabiyeni mubalwishe.”" 
Judges20:24 Kabili abena Israeli bafikile mupepi na bena Benjamini mu bushiku bwalenga shibili. 
Judges20:25 Abena Benjamini nabo baishile ukufuma ku Gibea pa bushiku bwalenga shibili kukubakumanya, baipeyepo na bambi abena Israeli ukulingana amakana ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18,000), abo abaipangeshe bonse ne mpanga." 
Judges20:26 Abena Israeli bonse baile ku Betele, kabili kulya kwine baile mukulila pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Pali bulya bwine bushiku tabalile nelyo kamo mpakafye icungulo. Batuulile kuli Yawe amalambo ya cakoca, elyo no mutuulo wakwampana." 
Judges20:27 Kabili abena Israeli baipwishe Yawe pantu mu nshiku shilya Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Lesa eko yali. 
Judges20:28 Pantu mu nshiku shilya Fineasi mwana Eleasa, nao mwana Aroni, ewaletungulula amapepo pa ntanshi ya mbokoshi, elyo atile, “Bushe nakabili tuleya ku bulwi na bena Benjamini bamunyinefwe nangu twiyako?” Nao Yawe atile, “Kabiyeni, pantu mailo lyena nkabapeela mu maboko yenu.”" 
Judges20:29 Elyo abena Israeli babelamike ifita fyabulwi ukushinguluka umusumba wa Gibea. 
Judges20:30 Awe pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu abena Israeli baile sansa abena Benjamini nabatantika ifita fyabulwi ukulungatana no musumba wa Gibea pamo ngefyo bacitile pakutendeka. 
Judges20:31 Ilyo nabo abena Benjamini bafumine mukuya bakumanya, babatwele ukutali, ukubatalusha ku musumba. Nga filya cali ku nshita sha kunuma, bayambile ukulaipaulula abena Israeli mu misebo, umbi uwalola ku Betele elyo umbi ku Gibea. Bambi abena Israeli babepaile mu mpanga ukufika pa mpendwa ya makumi yatatu (30)." 
Judges20:32 Abena Benjamini batampile ukutontonkanya ukuti, “Kwena twabacimfya ngefyo twacitile intanshi.” Lelo abena Israeli baletila, “Natufulumuke no kubatwala ukutali ku misebo ukufuma ku musumba.”" 
Judges20:33 Bonse abena Israeli bafumine pa cifulo cakulwilapo no kuya tantama ku Bali-Tama. Elyo abena Israeli ababelamine abanabo basokoloka lubali lwa ku masamba ya Gibea. 
Judges20:34 Elyo ifita ifyasalilwe amakana ikumi limo (10,000) pa bena Israeli fyasanshile icabipisha abena Benjamini ku Gibea. Awe ubu bulwi bwalibipishe nganshi, icakuti na bena Benjamini bene tabaishibe nokuti icinkunka calabaponena." 
Judges20:35 Awe Yawe acimfishe abena Benjamini pa cinso ca bena Israeli. Kabili pali bulya bwine bushiku, abena Israeli baipeye abena Benjamini ukufika na ku mpendwa ya makana amakumi yabili na yasano no mwanda umo (25,100). Bonse bali babulwi bwa mpanga." 
Judges20:36 Elyo abena Benjamini epakumona ukuti nabacimfiwa. Nabo abena Israeli epakufuntukako ku bena Benjamini pantu balishibe bwino ukuti nabakwata ifita fyabulwi ifyabeleme mupepi no musumba wa Gibea. 
Judges20:37 Ifita ifyabeleme nafyo fyapumikishe ukwingila mu musumba wa Gibea, no kuushinguluka. Fyaipaya na bantu bonse ku lupanga." 
Judges20:38 Abena Israeli ababulwi balyumfwene ne fita ifyabeleme ukuti, bali nokufutumuna ikumbi ilikalamba nganshi ilya fyushi ukufuma mu musumba," 
Judges20:39 elyo nomba ifita fyabulwi ifya bena Israeli fili nokupilibuka no kwamba ukulwa. Na pali iyi nshita ninshi abena Benjamini balyambileko ukulaipaulula abena Israeli ukufikafye na pa bantu amakumi yatatu (30). Pantu batontonkenye ukuti, “Ifwe tuli nokubacimfya ngefyo twabacimfishe ku bulwi bwantanshi.”" 
Judges20:40 Lelo ilyo intumba ya cushi yatampile ukwimina mu mulu ukufuma mu musumba, abena Benjamini bapilibwike, kabili bamwene ne cushi cikumenefye umusumba onse, cilefutumukila mu mulu." 
Judges20:41 Elyo nomba nabo abena Israeli bayalulwike mukusansa abalwani babo. Kabili abena Benjamini calibapeseshe amano, pantu baishibe ukuti nomba icinkunka nacibafikila." 
Judges20:42 Kanshi ici ecalengele bafulumuke ku cinso ca bena Israeli no kulungama ku matololo. Lelo nalyo line ubulwi tabwapwile iyoo, pantu abena Israeli abalefuma ku misumba balekumanya abena Benjamini no kubepaya." 
Judges20:43 Bashingulwike abena Benjamini no kubabutusha ulubilo no kubasangila apalungatene no musumba wa Gibea, lwa ku kabanga epo babakomawilile." 
Judges20:44 Kanshi ifita fyacenjele icine cine ifya bena Benjamini ifyo baipeye fyali amakana ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18,000)." 
Judges20:45 Awe nelyo bayalulukile lwa ku matololo mu kufulumuka kwabo pakuti baye fisama ku cilibwe ca Limoni, nalyo line abena Israeli baipeyepo abantu amakana yasano (5,000), abo baleipaila mu misebo. Kabili batwalililefye ukukonka abena Benjamini mpaka na ku Gidomu. Kabili bakonkeshepo ukwipaya na bambi amakana yabili (2,000)." 
Judges20:46 Kabili pali bulya bwine bushiku amakana amakumi yabili na yasano (25,000) aya fita fya bena Benjamini ifyacenjela nganshi ku bulwi bwa mpanga efyo baipeye mu bulwi." 
Judges20:47 Nomba abaume imyanda mutanda (600) ebabwelulwike no kufulumukila mu matololo ku cilibwe ca Rimoni, uko baile ikala imyeshi ine." 
Judges20:48 Elyo abena Israeli babwelulukile abena Benjamini no kwipaya bonse abantu ba mu misumba ukubomfya impanga. Kabili takwashele citekwa nelyo cimo, nangufye akantu konse ako basangile balikonawile. Imishi yonse umo balepita, baleyoca no mulilo." 
Judges21:1 Ilyo abena Israeli balongene ku Misipa, balilapile ukuti, “Takwakabe umuntu nelyo umo, uwa muli ifwe, uuli nokuufya umwana umwanakashi ku mwaume umwina Benjamini.”" 
Judges21:2 Elyo abantu baya ku Betele, eko baya ikala akasuba konse pa cinso cakwa Lesa mpaka icungulo. Basanswile amashiwi yabo no kulilishika ukukalamba." 
Judges21:3 Batile, “Mwe Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, bushe cinshi cabela ifi icakuti ilelo pabe uluko lumo ulushilipo ku bena Israeli?”" 
Judges21:4 Ulucelo pa bushiku bwakonkelepo, abantu bakuulile ubulambo, no kutuula umutuulo we lambo lyakoca no wakwampana." 
Judges21:5 Elyo abena Israeli bayambile ukwipushanya abati, “Bushe ni bani abashishile kukulongana pa ba mu nko sha bena Israeli ku cilonganino icili ku cinso cakwa Yawe?” Pantu balilapile umulapo icine cine ukuti uyo onse ushakese kukulongana pa cinso cakwa Yawe ku Misipa, afwilefye ukwipaiwa." 
Judges21:6 Eico nomba abena Israeli balangulukile bamunyinabo aba mu luko lwa bena Benjamini. Elyo batile, “Awe ilelo linefye uluko lumo ulwa bena Israeli naluputulwako." 
Judges21:7 Bushe twalacita shani pakusanga abanakashi abakuti bakoope kuli aba abashalapo? Apo ifwe twalilapa umulapo kuli Yawe uwakuti tatwakapeele abana abakashana besu kukuupwa ku bena Benjamini.” 
Judges21:8 Kabili bayambile ukwipushanya abati, “Bushe palipo umuntu umo ukufuma mu nko sha bena Israeli uushishileko kuli ici cilonganino ku cinso cakwa Yawe ku Misipa?” Elyo basangile ukuti ku ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi emushali umuntu nelyo umo uwaishile ku nkambi kukulongana." 
Judges21:9 Pantu ilyo bapendele abantu, basangile ukuti tapali umuntu nelyo umo uwa mu bekashi ba bena Yabeshi Gileadi uwalipo." 
Judges21:10 Eico kanshi icilonganino catumine ifita amakana ikumi limo na yabili (12,000), abaswangana nganshi, no kubeba ati, “Kabiyeni ku bena Yabeshi Gileadi no kubepaya ku lupanga, ukubikakofye na banakashi pamo pene na bana bonse." 
Judges21:11 Ifi efyo mulingile muye mucite. Muye peela umwaume onse kukonaulwa pamo no mwanakashi onse uushili nacisungu.” 
Judges21:12 Elyo baile sanga pa bekashi ba mu Yabeshi Gileadi abanakashi banacisungu imyanda ine (400) abashatala abalalapo no mwaume. Awe babasendele ku nkambi ku Shilo mu calo ca Kenani. 
Judges21:13 Elyo icilonganino catumine amashiwi yakulenga icibote pakati ka bena Benjamini abali ku cilibwe ca Rimoni. 
Judges21:14 Kanshi abena Benjamini nabo epakubweluluka pa nshita ine ilya elyo baisa bapeela abanakashi abashelepo ilyo baipeye abantu ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi. Lelo aba abanakashi tabakumanine kuli bonse iyoo. 
Judges21:15 Awe abantu balangulukile abena Benjamini apakalamba, pantu Yawe asha icipunda icikalamba mu nko sha bena Israeli." 
Judges21:16 Elyo abakalamba ba cilonganino batile, “Calaba shani pakuti tufwaile abanakashi bakuupa ku bena Benjamini abashelepo, pantu abanakashi bonse mu bena Benjamini balipwa?”" 
Judges21:17 Kabili batile, “Abena Benjamini abashalapo bafwile bakwata impyani pakuti uluko lwabo lwikalobelela mu bena Israeli." 
Judges21:18 Lelo ifwe tatwingapeela abana besu abanakashi mukuupwa kuli bena, apo ifwe fwe bena Israeli twalicita umulapo uwakuti, ‘Abe uwalapishiwa umuntu onse uuli nokupeela umwanakashi wakuupa ku bena Benjamini.’" 
Judges21:19 Nomba moneni, kuli nokuba inshikunkulu yakwa Yawe ku Shilo, ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka Betele, kabili ku kabanga ka musebo wafuma ku Betele ukuya ku Shekemu, na ku masamba ya Lebona.”" 
Judges21:20 Kabili bakonkenyepo ukweba abena Benjamini abati, “Kabiyeni no kuya fisama mu mabala ya myangashi," 
Judges21:21 no kulolela. Kabili ilyo abakashana ba bena Shilo baisa no kwamba ukucinda, elyo nomba na imwe mukasokoloke mu mabala ya myangashi, elyo cila umo akaikatilepo umwanakashi wakuupa pa bakashana ba bena Shilo no kuya ku calo ca bena Benjamini." 
Judges21:22 Lelo ilyo bashibo nangu bandume shabo bakesa mukulailishanya kuli ifwe, tuli nokubebafye ukuti, ‘Ala tubelelenikofye uluse kabili musuminishe, pantu tatwabasendele abanakashi bakuupa ilyo twali ku bulwi. Kabili imwe mulifye abakaele pantu teimwe mwe bene mwabapeele abana benu abakashana.’”" 
Judges21:23 Kanshi nabo abena Benjamini bacitile umo mwine baebelwe. Ilyofye abakashana bayambile ukucinda, cila umo aiketepo umo no kumusenda mukuba umukashi wakwe. Elyo babwelele na ku cifulo ca cishilano cabo no kukuula imisumba no kwikala emo balaikala." 
Judges21:24 Na pa nshita ilya ine, abena Israeli basalanganine na mu fifulo fyabo, cila luko no mukowa wabo baile ku fifulo fya cishilano cabo." 
Judges21:25 Kabili pa nshita ilya, abena Israeli tabakwete imfumu. Eico cila muntu alecitafye icamuwamina mu menso yakwe." 
Ruth1:1 Muli shilya nshiku abapingushi bateekele icalo ca Israeli, mu calo mwali icipowe. Eico umuntu umo afumine ku Betelemu mu calo cakwa Yuda, pamo no mukashi wakwe na bana babili abaume, baile mukulebela mu calo ca Moabu." 
Ruth1:2 Ishina lya uyu muntu ni Elimeleki, ne shina lya mukashi wakwe ni Naomi, elyo amashina ya bana bakwe babili abaume bali ni Maloni na Kilioni. Bali abena Efulati ukufuma ku Betelemu, mu calo cakwa Yuda. Kabili baile ku Moabu no kwikala kulya kwine." 
Ruth1:3 Nomba Elimeleki, umulume wakwa Naomi, aisa fwa no kusha umukashi wakwe na bana babili abaume." 
Ruth1:4 Aba bana baume baupile abanakashi abena Moabu. Umwanakashi umo ishina lyakwe ni Opa no mubiye nao ali ni Ruti. Panuma yakwikala kulya pa myaka nalimo ikumi limo," 
Ruth1:5 bonse babili Maloni na Kilioni wine nabo balifwile. Eico kanshi, Naomi ashelefye ukwabula abana bakwe abaume pamo pene no mulume wakwe." 
Ruth1:6 Ilyo Naomi aumfwile ku Moabu ukuti Yawe naisa kukwafwilisha abantu bakwe mukubapeela ifyakulya, Naomi alipekenye ukubwelelamo kumwakwe ukufuma ku Moabu pamo na banafyala bakwe bonse babili." 
Ruth1:7 Kanshi ena pamo na banafyala bonse babili epakutendeka ubulendo bwakufuma ku cifulo kulya baleikala no kwamba ukubwelelamo, balungama umusebo walola ku calo cakwa Yuda." 
Ruth1:8 Elyo Naomi atile kuli banafyala bonse babili, “Mwe, ala bwelelenimo, cila umo aleya uko afuma ku mushi wakwa nyina. Kabili Yawe akamukwatile uluse, pamo ngefyo na imwe mwakwatile uluse abayashi abali abena mwenu pamo pene na ine." 
Ruth1:9 Kabili Yawe engamwafwako pakuti mukasange ubwikalo ubusuma, cila umo mu ŋanda ya mulume wakwe umbi.” Elyo Naomi abatomona pakubashalikapo, nabo bayambile ukulila nganshi." 
Ruth1:10 Elyo nabo baeba nafyala abati, “Awe ifwe tulebwelelafye na iwe ku bantu bobe.”" 
Ruth1:11 Lelo Naomi abasuka ati, “Awe bakashana, mwe bana bandi, bwelelenimofye ku mushi, nga cinshi ico mulefwaila ukunkonkela? Bushe ine nkatala nkwatapo na bambi abana abaume, abo abengesa ba abalume benu?" 
Ruth1:12 Bwelelenimofye ku mushi mwe bakashana bana bandi. Ine nomba ninkota uwakukwata na umbi umulume. Nangufye cingaba cakuti naba no mulume no kuba na bana abaume," 
Ruth1:13 bushe kuti mwapembela mpaka nabo bakakule elyo bakese muupa? Bushe mukekala ifyo fine ukwabula ukuupwa? Awe iyoo bakashana, mwe bana bandi. Ici cintu nacafya nganshi kuli ine ukucila kuli imwe. Pantu ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kuli pali ine nakundetela ubucushi.”" 
Ruth1:14 Kabili nabo babwekeshapofye ukulalila. Elyo Opa ena atomona nafyala abwelelamo na kumwabo, lelo Ruti wena alambatilafye kuli nyinafyala." 
Ruth1:15 Elyo Naomi atile kuli Ruti, “Mona cufi mubiyo abwelelamo ku bantu bakwe na ku milungu yakwe. Awe na iwe wine kabiyefye nankwe.”" 
Ruth1:16 Ruti nao atile, “Mwimpapata pakuti mushe mweka nangu ukubwelelamo ukufuma kuli imwe. Ala konse uko muleya, eko na ine ndeya. Kabili uko mukekala, eko na ine nkekala. Abantu benu, ebakaba abantu bandi. Kabili Lesa wenu eukaba e Lesa wandi." 
Ruth1:17 Uko imwe mukafwila, eko na ine nkafwila, kabili uko kwine eko bakanshiika. Ine Yawe akancitile icibi icili conse nga cakutifye imfwa teikalekanya imwe na ine.”" 
Ruth1:18 Naomi ilyo amona ukuti Ruti ali uwashangila mukuya nankwe, alekele ukulamupapata ukubwelelamo." 
Ruth1:19 Eico bonse babili batendeke ukuya, mpaka no kuya fika ku Betelemu. Ilyo bafikile mu Betelemu, umusumba onse wakaba na see pa mulandu wabo. Elintu abanakashi ba mu musumba balaipushanya abati, “Bushe uyu kuti aba e Naomi?”" 
Ruth1:20 Naomi nao alebeba ati, “Mwilanjita Naomi, mulenjita Mara, pantu Umwine wa maka yonse nanenga ukuba uwabulanda mu mweo wandi." 
Ruth1:21 Ine nafumine kuno umukankala, nomba Yawe ambweseshe ukwabula nangu cimo. Nga ni cinshi ico mulenjitila ati Naomi, apo Yawe nanshinina, kabili Umwine wa maka yonse nambika na mu macushi.”" 
Ruth1:22 Kanshi ifi efyo Naomi abwelelemo ukufuma ku Moabu, ali na nafyala wakwe Ruti umwina Moabu. Bafikile na mu Betelemu pa nshita yakwamba ukulobolola imbuto sha bale." 
Ruth2:1 Nomba Naomi alipo na umo uwa mu lupwa lwa mulume uwa mu mukowa wakwa Elimeleki, uwali umukankala nganshi, ishina lyakwe ali ni Boasi." 
Ruth2:2 Elyo Ruti umwina Moabu atile kuli Naomi, “Shilekeni njeko ku mabala no kutolatolako imisonso ya bale iyo umuntu umo aleshamo ilyo alesombola, nga cakuti aya nsuminisha.” Nao Naomi atile kuli ena, “Ee kabiye mwana wandi.”" 
Ruth2:3 Awe Ruti aliile no kwamba ukusotasota imbuto mu mabala mukukonka panuma ya balesombola. Elyo cabafye nkuma aisanga alebomba mwibala lyakwa Boasi. Boasi ali wa mu mukowa wakwa Elimeleki. 
Ruth2:4 Kabili ilyo linefye, elyo Boasi afikile ukufuma ku Betelemu no kuposha bonse abasomboshi no kutila, “Yawe abe na imwe.” Nabo bayaswike ati, “Yawe akupaale.”" 
Ruth2:5 Elyo Boasi aipwishe umubomfi wakwe uwaleyangalila abasomboshi ati, “Bushe uyu mukashana wakwani?”" 
Ruth2:6 Kangalila wa basomboshi nao atile, “Uyu mukashana, mwina Moabu uwabwelele ukufuma ku calo ca Moabu pamo na Naomi." 
Ruth2:7 Ena acisa lomba ati, ‘Napapata lekeni nsotasotemo imisonso ya bale iyileshala no kukaka imyanshi, ndekonka umulesombola abasomboshi benu.’ Kanshi ukufumafye ulucelo ilyo aciya mwibala, acibafye alebomba ukufika na nombaline, elyo acituushakofye pa nshita inono mu cintelelelwe.”" 
Ruth2:8 Elyo Boasi atile kuli Ruti, “We mwana wandi umwanakashi, umfwa kuli ine. Tecakwesha ukuya mukusotasota mwibala limbi kabili wiya kumbi ukufuma pano. Lelo wikalefye pano pene na bakashana bandi." 
Ruth2:9 Uposeko amano no kwishiba ibala ilyo balesombolamo, elyo na iwe ulekonka abakashana panuma yabo. Ine ninjeba abaume ukuti tabalingile ukukwikatamo. Kabili ilyo lyonse waumfwa icilaka, ufwile ukuya nwa amenshi ukufuma mu mitondo iyo abaume batapile.”" 
Ruth2:10 Ruti ilyo aumfwile aya mashiwi, awa ubukupeme no kushimpa impumi yakwe panshi. Elyo atile, “Bushe cinshi ico ine nasangila ukusekelelwa pa cinso cenu elyo no kunsakamana inefye ne mwinafyalo?”" 
Ruth2:11 Boasi atile, “Ine, nabanjebafye fyonse ifyo wacita kuli nokofyala ukutulafye apo umulume obe afwila. Ifyo washile abafyashi bobe bawiso na banoko, nefyo washa ne calo cobe umo wafyalilwe no kwisa mukwikala na bantu abo ushaishibe kale." 
Ruth2:12 Yawe engakulambwilapo pali fyonse ifyo wacita. Kabili Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli akakupeelelepo icilambu icituntulu, uyo wishile mukuuba mu mapindo yakwe.”" 
Ruth2:13 Elyo Ruti asosele ati, “Lekeni nkonkanyepo ukusanga ukusekelelwa pa cinso cenu mwe mfumu yandi, pantu mwampeela icikoselesho no kulanda ifisuma kuli ine ne mubomfi wenu, nangu ine nshilingene na babomfi benu abanakashi nelyo umo.”" 
Ruth2:14 Awe pa nshita yakulya Boasi atile kuli Ruti, “Palama mupepi, wise ulyeko umukate, uutumpikeko na mu mwangashi uwasasamina.” Elyo Ruti aikele mupepi na basomboshi, na Boasi amupeelako imbuto ishasalulwa. Ruti nao alilafye apo alefwaila no kushapo shimo." 
Ruth2:15 Ilyo Ruti aimine ukuya mukusotasota imbuto mwibala, Boasi apeele ifipope ku baume bakwe ukutila, “Nangufye mwamona ukuti alesotasota na mu myanshi mwine, tecakwesha ukumulenga insoni iyoo." 
Ruth2:16 Kabili mulesomonamo imbuto shimo mu myanshi no kushisha pakuti ilyo aleisa alesotasota, aleshibuula, kabili tecakwesha ukumukalipila iyoo.”" 
Ruth2:17 Eico kanshi, Ruti alesotasota mwibala casuka caba icungulo. Ilyo apumine fyonse ifyo alesotasota ifya mbuto sha bale, afumishemo ifyafika ku cipimo ca efa umo." 
Ruth2:18 Alisendele no kubwelelamo ku musumba, alanga na nyinafyala ifyo alesotasota. Elyo Ruti nao afumishe icakulya icashelepo ilyo aikwite, apeela na nyinafyala." 
Ruth2:19 Nao nyinafyala atile kuli wene, “Waciba ulesotasota kwi? Kabili ni kuli ani wacibombela? Abe uwapaalwa umuntu uyo uukulangulukileko!” Awe Ruti nao aebele nyinafyala umuntu ne cifulo kuntu aile bombela. Atile, “Ishina lya muntu naciya bombelako ilelo ni Boasi.”" 
Ruth2:20 Naomi atile kuli nafyala, “Abe uwapaalwa kuli Yawe! Pantu Yawe taleka ukulanga uluse ku bamweo na ku bafwa.” Kabili akonkeshepo no kutila, “Uyo muntu ni lupwa lwesu. E umo uwa pali bandubulwila besu.”" 
Ruth2:21 Elyo Ruti umwina Moabu atile, “Ulya muntu acinjeba nokutila, ‘Wikaleka ukubomba pamo na babomfi bandi mpakafye bakapwishe ukusombola imbuto shandi shonse.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 Nao Naomi atile kuli Ruti nafyala, “Ee cisuma iwe we mwana wandi ukuti ulebomba na bakashana bakwa Boasi, pantu mwibala lya muntu umbi kuti bakusanshilamo.”" 
Ruth2:23 Awe Ruti epakulaba mupepi na babomfi abakashana bakwa Boasi mukusombola imbuto, mpakafye imbuto sha bale ne ŋanu fyapwa ukusombolwa. Kabili pali iyi nshita yonse, aleikala na nafyala wakwe Naomi." 
Ruth3:1 Ubushiku bumo Naomi nafyala wakwa Ruti amwebele ati, “We mwana wandi umwanakashi, bushe tekuti nkufwaile iŋanda yobe iyakuti ukaikalile ne nsansa we mwine?" 
Ruth3:2 Nomba mona Boasi untu walebomba na bakashana bakwe bushe te muntu wesu? Ilelo icungulo akulasokola imbuto sha bale pa cipulilo ca pa lubansa lwakwe. 
Ruth3:3 Eico kanshi, usambe bwino bwino no kusuba amafuta ya cena cisuma kabili ufwale ne fyakufwala fyobe ifisuma nganshi. Elyo uye no kutententemukila ku cipulilo ca pa lubansa lwakwe. Nomba wileka eshibe ati uli kulya, mpakafye ilyo alepwisha ukulya no kunwa." 
Ruth3:4 Ilyo aleya sendama, umone bwino icifulo uko alesendama. Elyo nomba uye no kumufimbula ku ntabalilo eko usendame. Awe nao euleya kweba ifyakucita.”" 
Ruth3:5 Ruti atile, “Nalaya ncite fyonse ifyo mwanjeba.”" 
Ruth3:6 Awe Ruti aile ku cipulilo cakwa Boasi ica bale no kucita fyonse ifyo nyinafyala amwebele. 
Ruth3:7 Ilyo Boasi apwile ukulya no kunwa, no mutima wakwe wasansamuka, aima aya mukusendama apali akatalamukila ku mpela ya mwina wa mbuto sha bale. Elyo Ruti nao ayako alebendela, aya mufimbula ku ntambalilo eko asendama." 
Ruth3:8 Nomba pakati ka bushiku Boasi acilimuka no kupilibuka, elyo apulikilwafye umwanakashi nasendama ku ntambalilo yakwe!" 
Ruth3:9 Elyo Boasi atile, “Bushe niwe nani?” Nao atile, “Nine Ruti umubomfi wenu, mfimbeniko icisempe ca nsalu yenu apo imwe muli bandubulwila.”" 
Ruth3:10 Nao Boasi atile, “Yawe akupaale, we mwana wandi umwanakashi. Ukupetama kobe kwakula nganshi ukucila uko walangile intanshi. Pantu tawakonkelela abalumendo, nangu abakankala nangu abapina." 
Ruth3:11 Kanshi nomba mwana wandi witiina. Ine nkakucitilafye conse ico uli nokunjeba. Ala bonse abena musumba banandi balishibafye bwino ukuti uli mwanakashi wacishinka. 
Ruth3:12 Kwena nangu cacine cine ukuti ndi wa mu lupwa lobe, eko ali umbi ndubulwila uupaleme nganshi ku lupwa ukucila ine." 
Ruth3:13 Lelo ikala kuno kwine muno cungulo mpaka ulucelo, nga cakuti ulya muntu uukwete insambu alefwaya kuti akulubula, ninshi cikawama. Nomba nga cakuti akaana ukukulubula, lyena ninshi mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, nine wine nkakulubula. Sendama kuno kwine mpaka ulucelo.”" 
Ruth3:14 Elyo Boasi aebele Ruti ukusendama ku ntambalilo yakwe mpaka ulucelo. Lelo abuukile bwangu ukwabula umuntu nangu umo ukwishiba, pantu Boasi atile, “Wileka cikeshibikwe ukuti umwanakashi aliisa ku cipulilo ca lubansa lwandi.”" 
Ruth3:15 Kabili Boasi amweba ati, “Leta kuno insalu iyo ufwele no kuifungulula.” Ilyo afungulula, amwitililamo imbuto sha bale ukulingana ne miseke mutanda, no kumutwika. Awe Ruti abwelelemo ku musumba." 
Ruth3:16 Ilyo Ruti afikile kuli nyinafyala, Naomi amwipusha ati, “Nge fintu fyaenda shani uko wile we mwana wandi?” Nao epakumweba fyonse ifyo Boasi amucitile." 
Ruth3:17 Elyo Ruti alundapo nokuti, “Acimpeela iyi miseke mutanda iya mbuto sha bale, no kunjeba ati, ‘Awe tekuti ubwelelemo kuli banokofyala iminwe nkutwa.’”" 
Ruth3:18 Elyo Naomi atile, “Tekafye umutima we mukashana, we mwana wandi, pakuti wishibe ifyalacitika, pantu tatuushe nangu panono, mpaka uyu mulandu upwe lelo linefye.”" 
Ruth4:1 Mu nshita ilya ine, Boasi aile ku mpongolo ya musumba no kwikala kulya kwine. Elyo tapapitile ne nshita, ndubulwila Boasi asosele nao aisa ninshi alifye mukupita. Boasi amwita ati, “Isa kuno we munandi, ikala apa.” Nao aile ikala." 
Ruth4:2 Kabili Boasi aitile abakalamba ikumi limo aba mu musumba no kutila, “Ikaleni pano,” awe nabo baikala." 
Ruth4:3 Elyo aeba ndubulwila uwali ne nsambu ati, “Naomi nabweluluka ukufuma ku Moabu, kabili alefwaya ukushitisha ibala lyakwa munyinefwe Elimeleki." 
Ruth4:4 Ine ntontonkenye ukuti cawama ukukwishibisha pali uyu mulandu. Kabili nga cakuti ulefwaya ukushita ushitile pa menso ya bantu aba bekele pano elyo na ya bakalamba ba bantu bandi. Nga ulefwaya ukulilubula, ulilubule. Lelo nga taulefwaya, kuti wanjeba pakuti njishibe. Pantu tapali nelyo umo ukucila iwe uuli ne nsambu shantanshi ishakulubula ibala ili, kano iwe, elyo ine ndi uwacibili kuli iwe emo twatantamina.” Nao atile, “Awe ine wine, nalalilubula.”" 
Ruth4:5 Elyo Boasi asosele ati, “Mu bushiku ukashite impanga iyi ukufuma kuli Naomi, ukashite na Ruti wine ulya namfwilwa umwina Moabu, pakuti ishina lya muyashi likaloba pa cifulo cacishilano cakwe.”" 
Ruth4:6 Ilyo ndubulwila uwali ne nsambu aumfwile ifi, atile, “Awe ine nafilwa ukulilubula, pantu limbi kuti naonaula ifyacishilano fyandi. Kanshi iwe wine lilubulefye. Ine nafilwa tekuti ndilubule.”" 
Ruth4:7 Nomba uyu ewali musango wakale mu bena Israeli uwakuti, pakushininkisha ifilecitika, umuntu nga alefwaya ukulubula icintu nangu ukukaushanya icipe cimo, umo ali nokufuula indyato no kupeela umunankwe. Uyu e umusango baleshininkishishamo umulandu pa cinso ca bakambone mu Israeli." 
Ruth4:8 Eico ilyo ndubulwila atile kuli Boasi, “Niwe wine shita.” Kanshi ewafuulile ne ndyato no kumupeela." 
Ruth4:9 Elyo Boasi epakusabankanya amashiwi ku bakalamba na ku bantu bonse ukutila, “Ilelo imwe bonse nimwe bakambone abamonako ukuti ine nashita ukufuma kuli Naomi conse icuma cakwa Elimeleki, Kilioni na Maloni." 
Ruth4:10 Kabili ninshitila kumo na Ruti umwina Moabu, mukamfwilwa wakwa Maloni, ukuba umukashi wandi pakuti ishina lyawafwa likabelele pa ncende ya cishilano cakwe. Neci ni pa mulandu wakuti ishina lyakwe likalobelela pakati ka lupwa nangu ukulisesha mu fyalembwa mu filembelo ifyaba ku musumba. Ecalenga, ilelo imwe bonse muli bakambone!”." 
Ruth4:11 Elyo abakalamba na bantu bonse abali pa mpongolo batile, “Ee ifwe tuli bakambone. Nacibefye ukuti Yawe akalenge umwanakashi uwalaisa mu ŋanda yobe akabe nga Rakeli na Lea abo babili abakulile iŋanda yakwa Israeli. Ala nauleba uwabulamba mu Efulata no kuba uwalumbuka mu Betelemu." 
Ruth4:12 Kabili ukupitila mu bana abo Yawe ali nokukupeela muli uyu mukashana, shibengaba nga ba mu ŋanda yakwa Peresi, balya Tama afyele kuli Yuda.”" 
Ruth4:13 Awe Boasi epakubuula Ruti no kuba umukashi wakwe. Na panuma yakuupana, Yawe alengele Ruti ukwimita no kukwata umwana umwaume." 
Ruth4:14 Elyo abanakashi batile kuli Naomi, “Napaalwe na matotelo kuli Yawe uyo mu bushiku bwa lelo takushilefye ukwabula ndubulwila. Kabili ne shina lyakwe likabe ilyalumbuka konsefye mu calo ca Israeli." 
Ruth4:15 Uyu mwana ali nokuba katalalika obe, kabili uwakukulela mu bukote bobe. Pantu nokofyala uwakutemwisha, kabili umusuma kuli iwe ukucila abana baume cine lubali, eukufyalile uyu mwana.”" 
Ruth4:16 Elyo Naomi abuulile umwana, amupakatila no kulamulela pakuti abe umwana wakwe." 
Ruth4:17 Elyo abanakashi abena mupalamano bakwe batile, “Naomi nakwata umwana umwaume.” Epakumwinika ishina lya Obedi, uyo uwaishile ba wishi wakwa Yese, elyo nao aisa fyala Davidi." 
Ruth4:18 Kanshi, ifi efyo ulupwa lwakwa Peresi lwatantama. Peresi ali ni wishi wakwa Hesroni." 
Ruth4:19 Hesroni nao ali ni wishi wakwa Ramu. Ramu nao ali ni wishi wakwa Aminadabu. 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu ali ni wishi wakwa Nashoni, Nashoni nao ali ni wishi wakwa Salimoni." 
Ruth4:21 Salimoni ali ni wishi wakwa Boasi, Boasi nao ali ni wishi wakwa Obedi." 
Ruth4:22 Obedi ali ni wishi wakwa Yese, kabili Yese nao ali ni wishi wakwa Davidi." 
1Samuel1:1 Nomba kwali umuntu umo umwina Sufu uwafumine ku musumba wa Ramataimu Sofimu mu calo ca mpili cakwa Efulemu, uwe shina lya Elikana umwana wakwa Yerohamu, umwana wakwa Eliyu, mwana Tohu, umwana wakwa Sufu, umwina Efulemu." 
1Samuel1:2 Uyu Elikana ali na bakashi babili. Umukashi umo ishina lyakwe ni Hana, elyo umbi nao ali ni Penina. Penina wena alikwete abana lelo Hana wena takwete umwana nangu umo." 
1Samuel1:3 Nomba cila mwaka, uyu muntu Elikana aleya ukufuma ku musumba wakwe kukupepa no kutuula ilambo kuli Yawe umwine wa fita ku Shilo, uko bamwana Eli babili Hofini na Fineasi ebali bashimapepo bakwa Yawe." 
1Samuel1:4 Ilyo lyonse ubushiku bwakupelelapo ilambo bwafika, Elikana alepeela imipusa ya nama ku mukashi wakwe Penina na ku bana bonse abaume na banakashi." 
1Samuel1:5 Lelo Hana ena alemupeela imipusa ibili pantu alimutemenwe nganshi, nangu Yawe amwisalile ubufyashi." 
1Samuel1:6 Pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alimwisalile ubufyashi, umukashi mubiye alemusonsomba no kumukalifya umutima nganshi." 
1Samuel1:7 Ifi efyo alecita cila mwaka. Ilyo lyonse Hana aleya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe kukupepa, umukashi mubiye Penina alemukalifya umutima mpakafye alalila icakuti afilwa no kulya." 
1Samuel1:8 Elikana umulume wakwe atile kuli ena, “Hana bushe cinshi ico ulelila? Kabili bushe cinshi ico ukanine ukulalya? Bushe cinshi ico wikalile ubulanda? Bushe ine nshakuwamina ukucila abana baume ikumi limo?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Ubushiku bumo ilyo bapwile ukulya no kunwa mu Shilo, Hana alimine no kuya ituula ku cinso cakwa Yawe. Nomba Eli wena nga shimapepo, aleikala mu cipuna ca bushimapepo mupepi no luceshi lwapa mwinshi we tempele lyakwa Yawe." 
1Samuel1:10 Hana mu kushikitika kwa mutima wakwe, alilile nganshi no kupepa kuli Yawe." 
1Samuel1:11 Kabili acitile umulapo nokutila, “We Yawe umwine wa fita, nga cakuti walolesha pa bulanda bwa mubomfi obe no kunjibukisha, kabili ukwabula ukulaba umubomfi obe, wamupeelako umwana umwaume, elyo na ine nkamupeela kuli iwe we Yawe mu nshiku shonse isha mweo wakwe. Kabili mu mutwe wakwe takabeyemo nangu limo.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Ilyo Hana atwalilile ukupepa kuli Yawe, shimapepo Eli alelolekesha ku kanwa kakwe." 
1Samuel1:13 Hana ninshi nao alepepafye mu mutima wakwe. Kanshi imilomo yakwe eyaletentafye, lelo ishiwi lyena talyaleumfwika. Ecalengele Eli atontonkanye ukuti Hana nakolwa." 
1Samuel1:14 Eico Eli epakumweba ati, “Bushe uli nokwikalilila muli bucakolwa ukufika lilali? Shileka ukukolwa kwa mwangashi obe kupwe.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Lelo Hana nao amwasuka ati, “Awe tefyo cili, we mfumu yandi, ine ndi mwanakashi uwaisulamo amafya ayengi nganshi mu mutima wandi. Awe ine nshinwene mwangashi nangufye ubwalwa. Ine nacilalondololafye ifili mu mweo wandi kuli Yawe." 
1Samuel1:16 Mwintunganya ine ne mubomfi wenu ukuba umwanakashi iciwelewele. Ine nacilapepa kuli Yawe pa mulandu wa masakamika ayakalamba nkwete elyo no kushikitika kwa mutima wandi.” 
1Samuel1:17 Eli nao atile, “Kabiye wende umutende, kabili na Lesa wakwa Israeli engakupeela conse ico wipwishe kuli ena.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Hana nao ayasuka ati, “Shilekeni umubomfi wenu asange ububile mu menso yenu.” Elyo Hana aile kumwakwe aya lya no kunwa, ne mpumi yakwe yayaluka yabafye iyansansa." 
1Samuel1:19 Mu lucelo lwakonkelepo, Elikana no lupwa lwakwe babuuka, no kupepa kuli Yawe, elyo babwelelamo na kumwabo ku Rama. Awe Elikana akumene no mukashi wakwe Hana, asuka Yawe amwibukisha." 
1Samuel1:20 Eico mu kuya kwa nshiku Hana alimite no kukwata umwana umwaume. Uyu mwana Hana amwinike ishina lya Samwele, pantu atile, “Namulombele kuli Yawe.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Kanshi lyonse uyu muntu Elikana no lupwa lwakwe lonse baleya kukutuula ilambo lya pa mwaka kuli Yawe no kufikilisha umulapo wakwe alapile. 
1Samuel1:22 Lelo Hana wena taileko. Atile ku mulume wakwe, “Panuma ngo mwana asumuka, ine elyo nkamutwala no kumutuula kuli Yawe. Kabili kulya kwine eko akekalilila lyonse.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Elyo Elikana umulume wakwe atile, “Cisuma cita conse ico uletontonkanya ukuti eciweme. Wikale kuno kwine mpaka ilyo ukasumuna umwana. Kabili Yawe nakabe uwakufikilisha ishiwi lyakwe.” Awe umwanakashi epakushala no kulaonsha umwana mpakafye napo asumukile." 
1Samuel1:24 Ilyo umwana asumwike, aile nankwe ninshi acili akanya. Asenda ne ŋombe iyilume iya myaka itatu, ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwa cipimo ca efa umo ne nyambi ya myangashi, elyo amutwala na ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe ku Shilo." 
1Samuel1:25 Elyo baipaya cilume wa ŋombe, bapalamika no mwana kuli shimapepo Eli." 
1Samuel1:26 Elyo Hana atile kuli Eli, “We mfumu yandi, icine cine apo uli umumi, ine, nine mwanakashi waiminine pano lubali na iwe no kupepa kuli Yawe." 
1Samuel1:27 Ine napepele no kulomba uyu mwana, elyo Yawe nao nampeela ico namulombele." 
1Samuel1:28 Eico kanshi na ine nomba namupeela kuli Yawe. Mu bumi bwakwe bonse ubwa pano calo namupeela kuli Yawe.” Elyo kulya kwine apepa na kuli Yawe. 
1Samuel2:1 Elyo Hana apepele kuli Yawe ati, “Umutima wandi wayangila muli Yawe, amaka yandi yacindamikilwa muli Lesa wandi. Calenga nokuti akanwa kandi kaitakishe pa balwani bandi, pantu nasansamukila mwipusukilo lyenu." 
1Samuel2:2 “Takwaba uwamushilo nelyo umo, uwaba nga Yawe, takwaba nelyo umo uwacila imwe. Takwaba icilibwe icakosa icaba nga Lesa wesu." 
1Samuel2:3 Tecakwesha nakabili ukulanda ifyakuitakisha, nangu ukuleka akanwa kobe ukulanda ifyacilandelande. Pantu Yawe ni Lesa uwaishiba fyonse, kabili wena eupituluka muli fyonse ificitwa." 
1Samuel2:4 “Amata ya bamaka nayakontaika, lelo abashaba na maka bena balepeelwa amaka." 
1Samuel2:5 Abo abalelya no kwikuta, ebatendeke ukubombela ifyakulya, lelo abali ne nsala bena nabaleka ukumfwa insala. Umwanakashi uwali iŋumba, aba na bana cine lubali, lelo umwanakashi uwali na bana abaume abengi, ashalafye ukwabula nangu umo." 
1Samuel2:6 “Yawe eulenga ukufwa, kabili eulenga ukuba no mweo, eupingula abakuya ku calo ca bafwa elyo no kubusha abafwa." 
1Samuel2:7 Yawe eulenga ubupina, kabili eupeela ubunonshi, eucefya elyo no kupuulamika." 
1Samuel2:8 Ewimya abapina ukubafumya mu mito. Ewimya umulanda ukufuma mu lukungu, no kulenga ukuti bekale pamo ne shamfumu, no kubaleka ukwikala pa fipuna fyabukankala. Pantu imifula ye sonde lyonse yakwa Yawe, kabili apa pene epo aimika ne calo conse." 
1Samuel2:9 “Yawe ali nokubaka abamushilo bakwe, lelo abawelewele bena bakaposwa mu mfifi. Pantu te ku bulamba bwa muntu umwine engabela uwakucimfya." 
1Samuel2:10 Bonse abapinkana na Yawe bena bakonaulwa. Akabatumina iciunda cakubulukuta ukufuma mu mulu. Yawe akapingula abantu bonse aba pano isonde. Eukapeela imfumu amaka yakwe, kabili akasumbula amaka ya wasubwa wakwe.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Elyo Elikana abwelelamo kumwabo ku Rama, lelo akalumendo ka Samwele kena kashala mukubombela Yawe, kaleyafwilishako Eli shimapepo." 
1Samuel2:12 Nomba abana baume bakwa Eli bali ifiwelewele, bena tabasakamene ukwishiba Yawe," 
1Samuel2:13 nangu ukwishiba imilimo ya bashimapepo iyo bali nokubomba pakati ka bantu. Nomba cali lutambi lwa bashimapepo ulwakuti inshita yonse ilyo umuntu aletuula ilambo, ninshi nabepika inama ilepya, umubomfi wakwa shimapepo ali nokusenda umutunkwilo wa mpanda shitatu mu minwe yakwe." 
1Samuel2:14 Uyu mubomfi ali nokulasa muli conse ico bepikemo inama, cibe ni mu nongo, muli pani, mu mupika nangu mu kalongo. Kanshi conse ico umutunkwilo walasa ninshi shimapepo alesenda. Ifi efyo balecita kuli onse umwina Israeli uwaleisa ku Shilo." 
1Samuel2:15 Kabili balecita ifi ukuti ilyo tabalaoca amafuta, umubomfi wakwa shimapepo ali nokwisa no kusosa ku muntu uuleleka ilambo ati, “Peelapo shimapepo inama yakoca, pantu tasumine ukupoka inama iyaipikwa ukufuma kuli iwe kanofye iyibishi.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Lelo uyu muntu nga atila kuli ena, “Shileka batale boce amafuta, elyo lyena walasendapo conse ico ulefwaya.” Lelo umubomfi wena kwasuka ati, “Iyoo, mpeelafye nombaline, pantu nga wakaana ukumpeela ninshi nalapokelafye ku maka.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Kanshi ububifi bwa bana baume bakwa Eli bwali ubukalamba nganshi pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Pantu tabapeele umucinshi kuli conse icaletuulwa kuli Yawe. 
1Samuel2:18 Umulumendo Samwele alefwala insalu isha kolokondwe pakubomba imilimo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. 
1Samuel2:19 Elyo cila mwaka nyina nao alemubilila umwingila unono, no kumutwalila ilyo baleya na balume kukutuula ilambo lya pa mwaka." 
1Samuel2:20 Awe Eli alepaala Elikana no mukashi wakwe mu mashiwi ayakuti, “Shi, Yawe engakupeela abana muli uyu mwanakashi, abengaba abakukonka pali uyu alombele mwipepo, kabili untu aisa peela kuli Yawe.” Elyo na panuma ya ifi balebwelelamo kumwabo." 
1Samuel2:21 Awe Yawe akwatile Hana icikuuku, nao aimita no kufyala abana abaume batatu, na banakashi nabo babili. No mulumendo Samwele atwalililafye ukulakula pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
1Samuel2:22 Nomba Eli alikotele nganshi, elyo aumfwa fyonse ifyo abana bakwe abaume balecita ku bena Israeli bonse. Kabili aumfwa nefyo balesendama na banakashi abalebomba pa mwinshi we tenti lyakukumaninamo." 
1Samuel2:23 Eli epakweba abana bakwe ati, “Bushe cinshi ico mulecitila ifintu fyonse ifi ndeumfwa? Ine ndeumfwa ukufuma ku bantu bonse pa mulandu wa ubu buwelewele bwenu mucita." 
1Samuel2:24 Iyoo, mwe bana bandi abaume, kwena te cintu icisuma icili muli aka kasebo ako ndeumfwa, akasalangene monse mu bantu bakwa Yawe." 
1Samuel2:25 Ala nga cakuti umuntu abembukila umuntu munankwe, umbi kuti amupapatilako kuli Yawe. Lelo nga cakuti umuntu abembukila Yawe, nani engamupapatilako?” Awe abana bakwe abaume, nangu cali ifi, tabaumfwile ku kukalipilwa kwakwa wishi pantu bwali bufwayo bwakwa Yawe ukuti bakepaiwe." 
1Samuel2:26 Kabili umulumendo Samwele, alitwalilile ukulakula mu cimo no kulatemwikwa kuli Yawe pamo pene na ku bantu." 
1Samuel2:27 Nomba umuntu wakwa Lesa umo aishile kuli Eli no kumweba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Bushe ine nshaisokolwele bwino bwinofye ne mwine ku ba ŋanda yakwa wiso ilyo bali mu busha bwakwa Farao mu calo ca Egupto?" 
1Samuel2:28 Nine nasalile wiso ukufuma pa nko shonse isha bena Israeli ukuti abe shimapepo wandi, uwakubomba pa bulambo bwandi, no kulafutumuna ububani bwa cena cisuma, elyo no kulafwala icakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi pa cinso candi. Kabili napeele ku ba ŋanda yakwa wiso fyonse ifyo bacitile ifya mituulo iyakoca, iyo abena Israeli batuulile." 
1Samuel2:29 Bushe cinshi ushulukila ifye lambo fyandi ne fya mutuulo wandi ifyo nakonkomesha abantu ukulantuula ku cifulo candi? Bushe mulandu nshi wacindikila abana bobe abaume ukucila ine mukulalya ifisuma pakuti muleina mwe bene mweka, pakusala ifipande balefwaya ifya mutuulo we lambo ukufuma pafyo abantu bandi abena Israeli batuula?’" 
1Samuel2:30 Eico kanshi Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli, asosa ati, ‘Ine nakulaile nati, iŋanda yobe, ne ŋanda yakwa wiso, nimwe muli nokulantumika umuyayaya.’ Nomba Yawe alandile ukuti, ‘Cibefye ukutali kuli ine, pantu nshakacicite! Kuli abo bonse abancindika, na ine ebo nkacindika. Lelo kuli abo bonse abansuula, bali nokusaalulwa.’" 
1Samuel2:31 “Mona, inshita ileisa ilyo ine ndi nokuputula amaka yobe pamo pene na maka ya ŋanda yakwa wiso, pakuti kwikalaba umuntu umwaume nelyo umo mu lupwa lwenu uwakufika ku bukote." 
1Samuel2:32 Mukucucutika ukalalolesha no lunkumbwa mu menso yobe pa kushuka konse uko ndi nokupeela abena Israeli. Elyo na mu lupwa lobe tamwakatale amuba umuntu umwaume uwakufika ku bukote. 
1Samuel2:33 No muntu obe onse uo nshakaleshe ukufika ku bulambo bwandi, wena akashala pakulenga amenso yakwe yanakuke no kuleka umutima wakwe wikatwe no bulanda. Kabili na bonse aba mu lupwa lobe bali nokufwila ku lupanga." 
1Samuel2:34 Kabili ici ecikaba icishibilo kuli iwe icili nokuponena abana bobe babili abaume, Hofini na Fineasi, bonse babili bali nokufwa mu bushiku bumo bwinefye." 
1Samuel2:35 Ine ne mwine nkaifwaila shimapepo uwacishinka, uyo ukalabomba ukulingana nefyo umutima wandi na mano yandi fifwaya. Ine nkalenga aba mu ŋanda yakwe ukwiminina, kabili inshiku shonse akalatumika uwasubwa wandi." 
1Samuel2:36 Elyo umuntu onse uukashalako mu lupwa lobe akesa mufukamina no kumulomba indalama sha silifa nangu umukate elyo no kulanda ati, ‘Shi napapata mpeeleniko umulimo wa bushimapepo pakuti na ine ndekwatako akapande ka mukate akakulya.’”" 
1Samuel3:1 Kanshi Eli shimapepo ewatendeke ukulangilila Samwele imilimo yakubombela Yawe. Na mu nshiku shilya, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe talyasekele. Kabili takwali ne fimonwa ifingi iyoo." 
1Samuel3:2 Nomba ubushiku bumo Eli, uyo amenso yakwe yaile yalenakuka icakuti tekuti amone bwino bwino, alilambaleleko mu cifulo cakwe muntu aletuushisha lyonse." 
1Samuel3:3 Awe ne cisaniko cakwa Lesa cali tacilaleka ukwaka, ninshi Samwele nao nalambalala mwi tempele lyakwa Yawe, umwali Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa." 
1Samuel3:4 Elyo Yawe aitile ati, “Samwele! Samwele!” Nao ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Awe nao abutwike no kuya kuli Eli nokutila, “Epo ndi. Mwacilanjita.” Lelo Eli nao amwasuka ati, “Awe teine nacilakwita. Bwelelamo, kabiye uye ulale.” Awe abwelelamo no kuya lala." 
1Samuel3:6 Kabili Yawe abwekeshapo ukwita ati, “Samwele!” Kabili aima no kuya kuli Eli nokutila, “Epo ndi. Mwacilanjita.” Lelo Eli nao amwasuka ati, “We mwana wandi, teine ndekwita. Kabiye bwelelamo no kuya lala.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Nomba Samwele ena aali talaishiba Yawe, elyo ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe lyali talilasokolwelwa kuli ena." 
1Samuel3:8 Kabili Yawe abwekeshepo ukwita Samwele umuku walenga itatu. Nao aima no kuya kuli Eli ayatila, “Epo ndi. Mwacilanjita.” Elyo Eli ailwike ukuti ni Yawe euleita umulumendo." 
1Samuel3:9 Eico Eli aebele Samwele ati, “Bwekelamo kabiye ulale, nomba nga cakuti waumfwa bakwita, usose auti, ‘Soseni mwe Yawe, pantu umubomfi wenu aleumfwa.’” Samwele epakuya lala nakabili mu cifulo cakwe." 
1Samuel3:10 Elyo Yawe aishile no kwiminina pantu ali, alamwita nga filya fine cali intanshi, nokutila, “Samwele! Samwele!” Nao Samwele ayasuka ati, “Soseni pantu umubomfi wenu aleumfwa.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Elyo Yawe aeba Samwele ati, “Mona, ine ndi nokucita icintu cimo ku bena Israeli icikalenga na matwi ya uyo onse uukomfwako yakawele." 
1Samuel3:12 Napali bulya ubushiku epo ine nkafikilisha fyonse ifyo nalandile pa ba ŋanda yakwa Eli no lupwa lwakwe, ukufuma apo yatendekele ukufika na ku mpela." 
1Samuel3:13 Pantu nalimwebele nati, ine nomba nalafikilishapo ukupingula aba mu ŋanda yakwe umupwilapo. Pantu ena alishibe ububifi bwa bana bakwe abaume ubo balecita ubwakusaalula Lesa, nokuti abakalipile iyoo." 
1Samuel3:14 Eico nalilapile palwa ŋanda yakwa Eli ukuti ububifi bwa ŋanda yakwa Eli tabwakabale abufutilwapo kwilambo nangu umutuulo mpaka umuyayaya.” 
1Samuel3:15 Samwele epakulala palya pene mpaka ulucelo, elyo aisa isulako ifiibi fya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Nomba alitiinine ukwebako Eli icimonwa amwene." 
1Samuel3:16 Nomba Eli amwita no kumweba ati, “Samwele we mwana wandi.” Nao ayasuka ati, “Epo ndi.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Elyo Eli amwipusha ati, “Bushe finshi bacikweba? Tecakwesha ukumfisa nelyo kamo, pantu nga wafisa conse ico akwebele, Lesa alekucitapo cimo, nelyofye cingabipisha kuti cakucitikila.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Elyo Samwele nao amushimikilafye fyonse ukwabula ukufisapo nelyo kamo kuli wena. Nao Eli epakusosa ati, “Ala ni Yawe, nacite conse ico umwine amwene ukuti nacilungama.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Awe Yawe ali na Samwele mu kukula kwakwe, kabili talekele amashiwi yakwe ukonaika iyoo." 
1Samuel3:20 Ecalengele ukufumafye ku calo cakwa Dani ukufika na ku Beresheba, bonse abena Israeli baishibe ukuti Samwele ni kasesema wakwa Yawe uwacishinka." 
1Samuel3:21 Kabili Yawe alitwalilile ukulamonekela ku Shilo. Elyo kulya kwine eko Yawe aisokolwele umwine eka kuli Samwele ukupitila mu mashiwi yakwe. 
1Samuel4:1 Kabili amashiwi yakwa Samwele yaumfwike kuli bonse abena Israeli. Muli shilya nshiku abena Israeli baile kukulwisha Abafilisiti. Abena Israeli bacitile inkambi pa Ebenesa, elyo nabo Abafilisiti pa Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Abafilisiti batantike ifita fyabo kukukumanya abena Israeli. Ilyo batendeke ukulwa, abena Israeli balibacimfishe ku Bafilisiti, abaipeye abantu ukulingana na makana yane (4,000) apo pene pa cibansa ca bulwi." 
1Samuel4:3 Ilyo ifita fyabwelelamo ku nkambi, bacilolo ba bena Israeli batile, “Bushe cinshi ico Yawe alekela Abafilisiti ukuti batucimfye pa bushiku bwa lelo? Natuye buula Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe ku Shilo pakuti tuleendafye nayo, elyo iletupusushako ukufuma na ku maboko ya balwani besu.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Abantu epekutuma abaume ku Shilo mukuya buula Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe umwine wa fita, uyo waikala pakati ka bakerubi. Kabili bamwana Eli shimapepo bonse babili, Hofini na Fineasi, nabo bene eko bali pamo ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Lesa." 
1Samuel4:5 Ilyo bafishishe Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe mu nkambi, abena Israeli bonse baliweleshe ukuwelesha ukukalamba icakuti no mushili watenta." 
1Samuel4:6 Pakumfwa ukuwelesha kwa congo icikalamba nganshi, Abafilisiti batile, “Bushe kuwelesha kwa musango nshi uko mu nkambi ya Bahibulu?” Ilyo baishibe ukuti Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe naisa mu nkambi," 
1Samuel4:7 Abafilisiti baikatwa umwenso, balanda nokuti, “Umulungu nawisa mu nkambi,” kabili balanda nokuti, “Awe nomba twaba mu bwafya, pantu icintu ca musango uyu tacabala acicitika!" 
1Samuel4:8 Akalanda kuli ifwe! Bushe nani akatupokololako ukufuma ku maboko ya iyi milungu iyamaka yonse? Eiyi ine milungu yakomawile abena Egupto ku fikuko ifyalekana lekana mu matololo. 
1Samuel4:9 Eico kanshi kosenifye mwe Bafilisiti! Mube abaume, epali mwaba abasha ku bahibulu, pamo ngefyo baba abasha kuli imwe. Mubefye abaume, no kulwisha!”" 
1Samuel4:10 Kanshi Abafilisiti balilwishishe no kucimfya abena Israeli, icakuti cila muntu afulumukila kumwakwe. Awe ukwipaiwa kwali ukukalamba nganshi. Abena Israeli balofeshe imyeo ukulingana na makana amakumi yatatu (30,000) aya fita ifyaleenda pa makasa." 
1Samuel4:11 Awe bapokolola ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa. Kabili bonse babili abana baume bakwa Eli, Hofini na Fineasi, nababepaya." 
1Samuel4:12 Pa bushiku bumo bwine umwina Benjamini umo afulumwike ukufuma kuntu balelwila, no kuya ku Shilo, ninshi ifyakufwala fyakwe nafilepauka no lukungu ku mutwe onse." 
1Samuel4:13 Ilyo afikilefye, amona Eli naikala pa cipuna cakwe mumbali ya musebo, alekutika, pantu umutima wakwe waletutuma pa mulandu wa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa. Eico ilyofye uyu muntu afikile mu musumba no kushimika ifyacitike, abantu bonse mu musumba basowesha mukulila imisowa." 
1Samuel4:14 Ilyo Eli nao aumfwa ukupunda kwa misowa, aipusha abantu ati, “Nga ici icongo cakula ifi camusango nshi?” Elyo uyu muntu nao mukwangufyanya aya shimikila Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Pali iyi nshita Eli ali ne myaka amakumi pabula na cine konse konse (98). Kabili na menso yakwe ninshi nayanaka, yalefilwa no kulamona." 
1Samuel4:16 Uyu muntu epakweba Eli ati, “Ala ine, nombaline nafuma ku bulwi. Mfulumwikeko ilelo linefye.” Nao Eli amwipusha ati, “Nga finshi ficitikeko uku kuntu we mwana wandi?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Umuntu uwaletele ilyashi nao atile, “Abena Israeli nabafulumuka ukufuma ku Bafilisiti. Kabili ifita ifingi nafifwa ifya bena Israeli. Elyo bonse babili abana bobe abaume Hofini na Fineasi nabo bene na babepaya. Kabili Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa nayo ine nabapokolola.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Awe ilyofye alumbula palwa Mbokoshi yakwa Lesa, Eli apona pa cipuna cakwe ubuseneme, lubali lwa ku mpongolo. Umukoshi wakwe wafunika, no kufwa afwa. Pantu kwena ali mwaume umukote kabili uwafina. Atungulwile abena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yane (40)." 
1Samuel4:19 Elyo muka Fineasi, nafyala wakwa Eli, ali pabukulu elyo ne nshita yakupapa nayo yali mupepi. Ilyo aumfwile ilyashi lyakuti Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Lesa nabapokolola, elyo nokuti bashifyala elyo no mulume wakwe nabo bonse nabafwa, awe alikomenwe ne fumo no kufyala umwana, pantu ubukali bwa kukomwa kwe fumo bwalicililemo." 
1Samuel4:20 Elyo na pa nshita yakufwa, umwanakashi uwalemusunga atile, “Witiina, naupapa umwana umwaume.” Lelo wena tayaswike, nangufye ukuposako amano." 
1Samuel4:21 Ainike umwana ishina lya Ikabodi, ilyalola mukutila, “Ubucindami bwa bena Israeli nabupwa,” pantu Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa naipokololwa, elyo na pa mulandu wa mfwa yakwa shifyala no mulume wakwe." 
1Samuel4:22 Uyu mwanakashi muka Fineasi atile, “Ubucindami nabupwa ku bena Israeli, pantu Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa naipokololwa.”" 
1Samuel5:1 Ilyo Abafilisiti bapokele Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa, baifumishe ku Ebenesa no kuitwala ku Ashidodi." 
1Samuel5:2 Elyo basendele Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa no kuitwala mu ŋanda balepepelamo umulungu wabo Dagoni, no kuya ibika ku lubali lwakwa Dagoni." 
1Samuel5:3 Ilyo abena Ashidodi babukile ulucelo mu bushiku bwakonkelepo, basanga Dagoni nawa panshi ubukupeme ku ntanshi ya Mbokoshi yakwa Yawe. Awe baimishe Dagoni no kumubika pa cifulo cakwe." 
1Samuel5:4 Lelo ilyo babukile ulucelo ubushiku bwakonkelepo, kabili nalyo basanga Dagoni nawa panshi ubukupeme ku ntanshi ya Mbokoshi yakwa Yawe. Kabili umutwe wakwe na maboko nafiputukako, filele na pa mwinshi kushelefye icitimbatimba ceka." 
1Samuel5:5 Uyu e mulandu wine na pa bushiku bwa lelo, caba ukuti nangufye ni bashimapepo bakwa Dagoni, nangu bonse abengila mu ŋanda ya mapepo yakwa Dagoni ku Ashidodi, bashinyantila pa mwinshi wakwa Dagoni." 
1Samuel5:6 Awe ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwatitikishe nganshi abantu ba mu Ashidodi, na bonse abali mu pepi nabo. Kabili abalengele ukuti babe no mwenso ukalamba nganshi, no kubalwalika ifipute." 
1Samuel5:7 Ilyo abena Ashidodi bamwene ifyalebacitikila, batile, “Imbokoshi ya mulungu wa bena Israeli tailingile kwikala kuno na ifwe, pantu ukuboko kwauko nakufinisha pali ifwe kabili na pali Dagoni umulungu wesu.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Ecalengele ukuti balonganike bonse bakateeka ba Bafilisiti no kubepusha ukutila, “Bushe ifwe nomba tuli nokucita shani neyi Mbokoshi ya mulungu wa bena Israeli?” Nabo batile, “Lekeni Imbokoshi ya mulungu wa bena Israeli tuitwale ku Gati.” Kanshi epakutwala Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa wa bena Israeli ku Gati." 
1Samuel5:9 Lelo panuma ya kutwala iyi Mbokoshi ku Gati, ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwaimiine uyu musumba, abantu bonse baiketwe no mwenso ukalamba. Yawe alwalike abantu bonse mu musumba, abaice na bakalamba, bonse bakumenefye ifipute." 
1Samuel5:10 Kabili babuula Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa wa bena Israeli baitwala ku Ekironi. Ilyofye Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa yaingile mu Ekironi, abantu ba mu musumba wa Ekironi balaipundilafye abene abati, “Cinshi batuletela Imbokoshi ya mulungu wa bena Israeli kukwisa twipaya pamo na bantu besu?”" 
1Samuel5:11 Eico balonganike bonse bakateeka ba Bafilisiti no kubeba ukuti, “Bweseshenimo Imbokoshi ya mulungu wa bena Israeli. Muibweseshe ku cifulo caiko, epali limbi kuti yatwipaya pamo na bantu besu.” Balandile ifi pantu imfwa yatiinishe abantu bonse mu musumba. Kabili ukuboko kwakwa Lesa kwatitikishe abantu nganshi." 
1Samuel5:12 Abapuswike ku mfwa bena balwele ifipute, icakuti no kupunda kwa bantu aba mu musumba kwasukile kwaumfwika na ku mulu." 
1Samuel6:1 Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe yali mu calo ca Bafilisiti imyeshi cine lubali. 
1Samuel6:2 Abafilisiti baita bashimapepo na bakabuka babo no kutila kuli bena, “Twalacita shani ku Mbokoshi yakwa Yawe? Twebeni ifyo twinga ibweseshamo ku ncende yaiko.”" 
1Samuel6:3 Nabo bayasuka abati, “Nga cakuti mwabweseshamo Imbokoshi ya mulungu wa bena Israeli, mwikaibweseshamo umwabula nelyo cimo, lelo mu nshilafye yonse mukabikemo no mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Lyena muli nokupola elyo nokulubuka kabili muli nokwishiba neco ukuboko kwakwe takwafumine pali imwe.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Abafilisiti baipusha abati, “Bushe mutuulo nshi uwakufuta pa fyabubifi tuli nokutuma kuli ena?” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Ifimpashanya ifyapala ifipute ifya golide fisano ne fimpashanya ifyapala bakwindi ifya golide fisano, ukulingana ne mpendwa sha bakateeka ba Bafilisiti, pantu icikuko cimo cine icili pali imwe bonse ecili na pa ntungulushi shenu." 
1Samuel6:5 Kanshi eico pangeni ifyapala ifipute ne fyapala bakwindi ifileonaula icalo, efyo mucindikilepo umulungu wa bena Israeli. Nalimo kuti afumya ukuboko kwakwe pali imwe, pa milungu yenu elyo na pa calo cenu." 
1Samuel6:6 Bushe cinshi mwalafwaila ukukosha imitima yenu nga filya abena Egupto pamo na Farao bacitile? Panuma yakubaletela ubucushi, bushe telyo balekele abena Israeli ukufuma nokuti baleya?" 
1Samuel6:7 Nomba kanshi pekanyeni iceleta ilipya, iŋombe shibili ishileonsha kabili isho bashatala abakakapo amakoli. Ishi iŋombe mushikakile kwiceleta, no kubweseshamo utwana kwitanga no kutwisalila." 
1Samuel6:8 Mubuule Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe no kuibika pa mulu we celeta kabili mu fyakusendelamo fya mumbali mubikemo ifipe ifya golide mule mutumina ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi. Elyo mulitume no kuleka lileya. 
1Samuel6:9 Lelo mulelimona ilyo lileya. Nomba nga cakuti lyalaya ku calo caliko, ukulungama ku Beti Shemeshi, ninshi Yawe ewaleta ici cinkunka icikalamba pali ifwe. Lelo nga cakuti talilungemeko, elyo tuli nokwishiba ukuti te kuboko kwakwe kwatuletele ici, lelo catuponenefye epela.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Awe nabo bacita ifyo fine babebele. Babuula iŋombe shibili no kushikakila kwiceleta elyo bayaisalila no twana twashiko mwitanga. 
1Samuel6:11 Babika ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe pa mulu we celeta, elyo mu fyakusendelamo ifya mumbali babikamo ifya golide ifyapala bakwindi ne fya golide ifyapala ifipute." 
1Samuel6:12 Iŋombe shalungamafye ku Beti Shemeshi, ukukonkafye umusebo umo wine shile shilelila pakwenda, ukwabula ukupasukila ku kulyo nangu ku kuso. Intungulushi sha Bafilisiti shaya nashikonka panuma mpakafye na ku mupaka wa ku Beti Shemeshi." 
1Samuel6:13 Nomba abantu ba mu Beti Shemeshi baleseepa iŋanu shabo mwishika. Cilya bati benuke bamona Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, awe epakutemwa nganshi pakuya ipokelela." 
1Samuel6:14 Iceleta lyaisa na mwibala lyakwa Yoshua umwina Beti Shemeshi no kwiminina ku mbali ya cilibwe icikalamba. Abantu balepaula inkuni ukufuma kwiceleta no kutuula iŋombe shine kuli Yawe nge lambo lyakoca. 
1Samuel6:15 Elyo abena Levi baisha Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe, pamo ne fyakusendelamo ifyali mumbali umwali ifintu ifya golide, no kufibika pa mulu wa cilibwe icikalamba. Pa bushiku ubu epo abantu ba mu Beti Shemeshi batuulile umutuulo wakoca no kuleka amalambo kuli Yawe." 
1Samuel6:16 Ilyo intungulushi shisano isha Bafilisiti shamwene ifi fyonse, pa bushiku bwine bulya shabwelelamo na ku Ekironi." 
1Samuel6:17 Aba e bagolide abapala ifipute abo Abafilisiti batumine ngo mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi kuli Yawe. Umo kuli Ashidodi, Gasa, Eshikeloni, Gati elyo na Ekironi." 
1Samuel6:18 Kabili impendwa ya golide iyapala bakwindi, ili nokuba ukulingana ne mpendwa ya misumba ya Bafilisiti iya ntungulushi shisano iyamalinga pamo pene ne mishi yabo iya mu calo iyishacingililwa. Icilibwe cikalamba ico babikilepo Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe, e kambone mu bushiku bwa lelo mwibala lyakwa Yoshua umwina Beti Shemeshi." 
1Samuel6:19 Lelo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Yekonia bena tabasekelele capamo na bena Beti Shemeshi, ilyo kwali ukupokelela Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe. Kanshi Yawe epakwipayapo abantu abali amakumi cine lubali (70) pa mulandu wakulengela mu Mbokoshi ya Cipangano. Abantu epakuloosha apakalamba nganshi pa bwingi bwa bantu Yawe aipeye." 
1Samuel6:20 Elyo abaume abena Beti Shemeshi baipusha abati, “Nani wingeminina ku cinso cakwa Yawe, uyu mulungu uwamushilo? Ni kuli nani Imbokoshi ya Cipangano yalaya pakuti tumufumye pano?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Elyo batuma inkombe ku bantu ba ku Kiriati Yarimu nokutila, “Abafilisiti nababwesha Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe. Iseni, mwise musende Imbokoshi muitwale ku ncende kumwenu.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Elyo abaume ba ku Kiriati Yarimu baishile no kusenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe, baleta ku ŋanda yakwa Abinadabu iyabelele pa lupili. Kabili bacita umwana wakwe umwaume Eleasa abe uwapatulwa pakuti alelinda Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe." 
1Samuel7:2 Palipitile inshita iyitali ukulingana ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) yonse pamo, apo Imbokoshi ya Cipangano yaikalile ku Kiriati Yarimu, icalengele na bena Israeli bonse ukulaloosha no kufwaisha ukulakonka Yawe." 
1Samuel7:3 Elyo Samwele epakusosa ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli yonse ati, “Nga cakuti mulebwelela kuli Yawe ne mitima yenu yonse, italusheni ku milungu ya benafyalo na ku ba Ashitoreti, no kuipeelesha mwe bene kuli Yawe no kulamubombela ekafye, lyena nao akamupususha ku minwe ya Bafilisiti.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Kanshi abena Israeli epakutaluka ku milungu ba Baali na ba Ashitoreti, no kwamba ukulabombela Yawe eka." 
1Samuel7:5 Elyo Samwele atile, “Longaneni mwe bena Israeli bonse ku Misipa pakuti ine mupapatileko kuli Yawe.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Kanshi abantu bonse epakulongana ku Misipa, batapa na menshi no kwitila panshi ku cinso cakwa Yawe. Na pa bushiku ubo, bafunga ukulya balanda nokuti, “Natubifya kuli Yawe.” Kabili Samwele ewali umupingushi wa bena Israeli ku Misipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Kabili ilyo Abafilisiti baumfwile ukuti abena Israeli nabalongana ku Misipa, bacilolo ba Bafilisiti balimine no kuya kukubalwisha. Lelo ilyo abena Israeli baumfwile, batiinine nganshi Abafilisiti." 
1Samuel7:8 Elyo abena Israeli baebele Samwele abati, “Wileka ukutupapatila kuli Yawe Lesa wesu, pakuti atupusushe ukufuma ku kuboko kwa Bafilisiti.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Elyo Samwele abuula akana ka mpaanga akashilasumuka no kukatuula nge lambo lyakoca kuli Yawe. Alilile kuli Yawe, mukupapatilako abena Israeli, elyo Yawe nao amwasuka." 
1Samuel7:10 Mu nshita ine ilya Samwele acili aletuula ilambo lyakoca kuli Yawe, Abafilisiti bapalama kukulwisha abena Israeli. Lelo pali bulya bushiku, Yawe abulukuta nge mfula kwishiwi ilikalamba no kubafulunganya icakuti bafulumuka ukufuma ku cinso ca bena Israeli." 
1Samuel7:11 Abena Israeli epakufuma mu Misipa no kukunkunika Abafilisiti, baya balebakomaula nshila yonse mpakafye ku mutentemuko wa Beti-Kari." 
1Samuel7:12 Elyo Samwele abuula ilibwe, alibika pakati ka Misipa na Yeshana, alinika ne shina lya Ebenesa, elyo atile, “Ukufika na pano Yawe ewatwafwile.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Kanshi Abafilisiti epakucimba, kabili tababwekeshepo ukufwaya ukupokolola icalo ca bena Israeli nakabili. Elyo na pa nshita ya bumi bwakwa Samwele, ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwalifye ukwafina pa Bafilisiti." 
1Samuel7:14 Ne misumba Abafilisiti bapokolwele ku bena Israeli ukufuma ku Ekironi ukufika ku Gati, yalibweshiwe. Abena Israeli bapokolola ne ncende shabo ishapalamineko ukufuma ku maka ya Bafilisiti. Elyo kwaba umutende pakati ka bena Israeli na bena Amoli." 
1Samuel7:15 Samwele atwalilile ngo mupingushi pakati ka bena Israeli mu nshiku shonse isha bumi bwakwe. 
1Samuel7:16 Cila mwaka aleenda ukufuma ku Betele, Giligali na ku Misipa, mukupingula abena Israeli mu ncende shonse ishi." 
1Samuel7:17 Aleti nga apwisha elyo alebwelelamo ku Rama ukwali iŋanda yakwe, kabili nako kwine alepingula abena Israeli. Elyo akuula no bulambo bwakwa Yawe kulya kwine." 
1Samuel8:1 Ilyo Samwele akotele, asontele abana bakwe abaume ukuba abapingushi ba bena Israeli." 
1Samuel8:2 Umwana wakwe ibeli ishina lyakwe ali ni Yoeli, kabili ishina lya cikonkebeli ali ni Abiya, ebali abapingushi ku Beresheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Lelo abana bakwe bafilwa ukulakonka ukwenda mu nshila shakwe, bayalukila mu nshila shakufwaisha indalama no kulasumina amafisakanwa no kupingwila imilandu mu bubifi." 
1Samuel8:4 Elyo bonse abakalamba ba bena Israeli balongana pamo no kwisa kuli Samwele ku Rama. 
1Samuel8:5 Cilya bamusanga, bamweba abati, “Mona, iwe naukota, elyo abana bobe abaume tabalekonka mu nshila shobe, kanshi tusontele imfumu iyakuti iletutungulula pamo ngefyo imishobo yonse yacita.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Nomba ilyo batile, “Tupeeleni imfumu iyakututungulula,” Samwele tatemenwe. Elyo Samwele apepa kuli Yawe." 
1Samuel8:7 Yawe nao amweba ati, “Umfwila ku fintu abantu bonse balekweba, pantu teiwe basuulile, nine basuulile nge mfumu yabo." 
1Samuel8:8 Ifi fine efyo bacita na kuli ine, ukufuma pa bushiku nabafumishe mu calo ca Egupto ukufika mu bushiku bwa lelo, ifyakunsangukila no kulatumikila imilungu imbi, kanshi ifi fine eifi balecita na kuli iwe wine." 
1Samuel8:9 Nomba iwe bomfwilefye, lelo ubasoke na maka, no kubebukisha ifyo imfumu iyo balefwaya ikalacita pali bena.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Samwele nao epakulondolwela abantu abaishile mukumwipusha palwa kukwata imfumu amashiwi yonse ayakwa Yawe. 
1Samuel8:11 Abeba ati, “Ifi efyo imfumu iyili nokumuteeka ili nokulacita. Ili nokulasenda abana benu abaume no kubapeela imilimo yakubomba ku maceleta yaiko, na pali bakabalwe, elyo bambi bakalabutuka pa ntanshi ya maceleta yaiko." 
1Samuel8:12 Bamo akabalenga ukuba intungulushi sha pa fita amakana (1,000), elyo na pa fita amakumi yasano (50). Bambi nabo ukulima umushili no kusombola ifisabo fyaiko, kabili bambi nabo ukupanga ifyanso fya nkondo, no kupanga ifibombelo fya maceleta yaiko." 
1Samuel8:13 Ali nokusenda abana benu abanakashi ukuba bakenga wa mafuta yanunka ubusaka, abakwipika, elyo na bakupanga imikate." 
1Samuel8:14 Ali nokumupoka amabala yenu ayasuma, amabala ya myangashi elyo na ya miolifa ayawamisha, no kufipeela ku babomfi bakwe." 
1Samuel8:15 Ali nokubuulapo cimo pa capekumi cenu pa fisabo na pa fya myangashi no kupeela kuli bacilolo elyo na babomfi bakwe. 
1Samuel8:16 Ababomfi benu abaume na banakashi, iŋombe shenu ishawamisha na bapunda, akafibuula fikaba fibombelo fyakwe." 
1Samuel8:17 Ali nokubuulapo cimo pa capekumi ca fitekwa fyenu, elyo imwe mwe bene muli nokuba abasha bakwe." 
1Samuel8:18 Ilyo bulya bushiku bukafika, mukakabila Yawe ukumupususha ukufuma kuli iyi mfumu muisalile mwe bene, lelo Yawe nao takamwasuke muli bulya bushiku.”" 
1Samuel8:19 Lelo abantu bakaanininafye ukumfwa kwishiwi lyakwa Samwele, nokutila, “Iyoo! Ifwe tulefwayafye imfumu iyakututeeka," 
1Samuel8:20 pakuti na ifwe tukabe nge mishobo imbi. Tulefwaya na ifwe tukwate mfumu yakututungulula kabili nokututangilila pakufuma ilyo tulelwa ubulwi.” 
1Samuel8:21 Ilyo Samwele aumfwa fyonse ifyo abantu basosele, aya fisosa nakabili kuli Yawe." 
1Samuel8:22 Yawe nao ayasuka ati, “Umfwila amashiwi yabo no kubapeela imfumu.” Elyo Samwele aeba abaume abena Israeli ukubwelelamo ku cifulo cila umo afumako." 
1Samuel9:1 Mu bena Benjamini mwali umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Kishi umwana mwaume wakwa Abieli, umwana mwaume wakwa Serori, umwana mwaume wakwa Bekorati, umwana mwaume wakwa Afia umwina Benjamini umukankala nganshi." 
1Samuel9:2 Alikwete umwana umwaume uwe shina lya Saulo, umulumendo uwayemba bwino. Mu bena Israeli tamwali uwalingene nankwe ukuwama. Kabili tamwali nelyo umo uwalepele ukumucila, bonse balepelafye pa mabeya yakwe." 
1Samuel9:3 Nomba bapunda bakwa Kishi wishi wakwa Saulo balilubile. Elyo Kishi aeba umwana wakwe Saulo ati, “Senda umubomfi umo, muye nankwe no kuya mukufwaya bapunda.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Kanshi nabo epakulalanya icalo ca mpili ica bena Efulemu elyo apulinkanya na mu calo ca Shalisha, no kubasanga iyoo. Kabili apulinkanya na mu calo ca Shalimu noko kwine tabaliko. Elyo atwalilila ukufwaya, alalanya icalo ca bena Benjamini, nako kwine tabaliko." 
1Samuel9:5 Ilyo bafikile ku Sufi, Saulo aeba umubomfi uo bali nankwe ati, “Tuleya tubwelelemo, pantu batata kuti baleka ukutontonkanya pali bapunda no kwamba ukusakamana pali ifwe.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Elyo umubomfi amwasuka ati, “Moneni muli uno musumba mwaliba umuntu wakwa Lesa uwacindikwa nganshi, kabili conse ico asosa cilaba cacishinka. Kanshi natuleyako nomba, nalimo kuti atwebako inshila twingayamo.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Elyo Saulo ayaswike umubomfi wakwe ati, “Nga cakuti twayako ni cinshi ico tuleya peela uyu muntu? Pantu ifilyo nafipwa mu mifuko yesu. Tatukwete icabupe icakutwala ku muntu wakwa Lesa. Bushe cinshi tukwetepo?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Umubomfi abwekeshapo ukwasuka Saulo nakabili ati, “Moneni ine ninkwatapo akandalama kamo aka silifa, efyo ndeya peela ku muntu wakwa Lesa pakuti aye tulanga bwino inshila tuli nokuyamo.”" 
1Samuel9:9 Mu nshita shakale mu Israeli umuntu nga aya kukwipusha fimo kuli Lesa, alesosa ati, “Iseni, tuleya kuli kamona.” Pantu ino nshita uwitwa kasesema, kale aleitwa ukuti ni kamona." 
1Samuel9:10 Saulo atile ku mubomfi wakwe, “Cawama walanda bwino, isa tuleya.” Epakwima baya na ku musumba ukwali umuntu wakwa Lesa." 
1Samuel9:11 Ilyo baleninika ulupili pakuya ku musumba, bakumanya abakashana bamo abaleisa mukutapa amenshi, elyo babepusha abati, “Bushe kamona eko ali?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Nabo bayasuka abati, “Ee uyo ali ku ntanshi yenu. Angufyanyeni nombaline pantu lelo line elyo eshile muno musumba wesu. Kabili e bushiku abantu baletuula amalambo pa ncende iyakupepelapo." 
1Samuel9:13 Nga mwaingilafye mu musumba, mulemusanga ilyo talaya pamulu pa ncende yakupepelapo kukulya. Abantu tekuti batampe ukulya ilyo talafika. Pantu euli nokupaala ifya malambo, elyo abo bonse abetilwe bali nokwamba ukulya. Kabiyeni nineni pamulu nombaline, pa nshita ino kuti mwamusanga.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Elyo baile ku musumba, kabili ilyo baleingila mu musumba bamwene Samwele nao ali mu nshila aleisa kuli bena, aleya ku ncende yakupepelapo." 
1Samuel9:15 Nomba mu bushiku bwa kunuma ilyo Saulo talaisa, Yawe alisokolwele ici kuli Samwele ati," 
1Samuel9:16 “Mailo pa nshita nga ino ine, nkakutumina umwaume umo ukufuma ku calo cakwa Benjamini. Ukamusube amafuta yakuba kateeka wa pa bantu bandi abena Israeli. Akapususha abantu bandi ukufuma ku kuboko kwa Bafilisiti, pantu nimona ukucula kwabo, no kulilishika kwabo nakufika kuli ine.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Ilyo Samwele amwene Saulo, Yawe atile kuli wena, “Uyu e muntu nakwebele ukuti euli nokuba kateeka wa bantu bandi.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Elyo Saulo apalamina kuli Samwele mukati ka mpongolo nokutila, “Shi napapata, nangeniko uko iŋanda yakwa kamona yabela?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Elyo Samwele ayasuka Saulo ati, “Nine wine kamona. Tangila unine ku ncende yakupepelapo, pantu niwe ilelo tulelila pamo na ine. Elyo ulucelo nkaleka ukaleya kabili nkakweba fyonse ifili mu mutima obe." 
1Samuel9:20 Lelo pa mulandu wa bapunda balya baluba pali ishi nshiku shitatu shapita, wiposako mano yobe, bonsefye nabamoneka. Kabili ni kuli nani ukukabila konse ukwa bena Israeli kuli nokuya, nga cakuti tekuli iwe na ku ba ŋanda ya bashinwe?”" 
1Samuel9:21 Saulo ayasuka ati, “Bushe ine nshili umwina Benjamini, uwa mu luko ulwacepesha mu bena Israeli? Kabili no lupwa lwandi elwacepesha pa ndupwa shonse isha nko sha bena Benjamini. Nga cinshi wasosela icintu ici kuli ine?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Elyo Samwele asenda Saulo no mubomfi wakwe mu ŋanda ya maliila, abateeka kuntashi ya balalikwe abali mu mpendwa nalimo amakumi yatatu (30)." 
1Samuel9:23 Samwele atile ku waleipika, “Leta icipande ca nama nacikupeela, ico nacitila ucibike ceka.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Uwaleipika nao abuula umwendo na fyonse ifyaliko no kufipalamika ku ntanshi yakwa Saulo. Elyo Samwele atile, “Ifi efyo bacikubikila, lya, pantu fyapeelwa pa nshita iyasontwa pakuti ulile pamo na bashimucindikwa.” Elyo Saulo alile pamo na Samwele pali bulya bushiku." 
1Samuel9:25 Ilyo babwelele ukufuma ku ncende yakupepelapo ukwisa ku musumba, Samwele alanshenye na Saulo pa mulu wa ŋanda yakwe epo bamupekanishisha na pakusendama." 
1Samuel9:26 Bonse babuka lucelocelo, elyo Samwele aitile Saulo uwali pa mutenge ati, “Ima uipekanye pakuti nkuleke uleya.” Ilyo Saulo aipekanya ena na Samwele bafumina panse bonse." 
1Samuel9:27 Cilyafye bafika lwa ku mpela ya musumba, Samwele aeba Saulo ati, “Eba umubomfi obe atangile ku ntanshi yesu. Elyo nga atangila, iwe ubale ushaleko pano pene panono, pakuti nkwebe ishiwi ukufuma kuli Lesa.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Elyo Samwele abuulile umusukupala wa mafuta no kwitila pa mutwe wakwa Saulo elyo amutomona, amweba nokuti, “Ala niwe Yawe asubile ukuba intungulushi pakati ka bantu bakwe abena Israeli. Niwe uli nokuteeka abantu bakwa Yawe no kubapususha ku kuboko kwa balwani babo ababashinguluka. Icishibilo cakwishibilako ukuti ni Yawe eukusontele ukuba intungulushi ya bacishilano bakwe nici." 
1Samuel10:2 Ilyo walaya ukufuma kuli ine ilelo, uleya kumanya abantu babili abaume mupepi na pa nshinshi yakwa Rebeka, ku Selisa mu calo ca bena Benjamini. Baleyatila kuli iwe, ‘Bapunda waile mukufwaya nabamoneka. Eico nomba bawiso nabaleka ukutontonkanya pali bapunda, nomba basakamene pa mulandu wa iwe wine. Batendeke no kwipusha ati, bushe cinshi ndi nokucita pa mulandu wa mwana wandi?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Elyo uli nokutwalilila ukuya ukufuma palya mpaka ukafike ku cimuti icikalamba ica oki ica Tabo. Abantu batatu abaume abalenina mukuya tuula amalambo kuli Lesa ku Betele ebali nokukukumanya palya pene. Umo ninshi nasenda utwana twa mbushi tutatu, umbi nao imikate itatu, elyo umbi nao inyambi ya mwangashi." 
1Samuel10:4 Bali nokuya kuposha no kukupeela imikate ibili iyo uli nokupokelela ukufuma kuli bena. 
1Samuel10:5 “Elyo panuma ya ifyo, uleya fika ku lupili lwakwa Lesa uko Abafilisiti babika inkambi ya fita. Nga walapalamina ku musumba, uli nokukumanya umulongo wa bakasesema baletentemuka ku ncende yakupepelapo ninshi balelisha insango, insombo, imitolilo na maseese ku ntanshi yabo, ninshi bonse balesesema." 
1Samuel10:6 Umupashi wakwa Yawe uli nokwisa pali iwe mu maka elyo na iwe uleisa yamba ukulasesema pamo nabo. Kabili uli nokusanguka umuntu umbi. 
1Samuel10:7 Elyo ifi fishibilo nga fyaba pali iwe, lyena ucite conse ico iminwe yobe ili nokubomba, pantu Lesa ali na iwe." 
1Samuel10:8 Kabili wambeko utangile ukuya ku Giligali, na ine nkesa kusanga kulya kwine kukutuula umutuulo wakoca no wakwampana. Lelo ulingile ukulolela pa nshiku cine lubali mpaka nkese no kukweba ifyo uli nokucita.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Ilyo Saulo apilibwike ukufuma kuli Samwele, Lesa apilibwile umutima wakwa Saulo, no kuleka ifi fishibilo fyonse fifikilishiwe pali bulya bushiku." 
1Samuel10:10 Ilyo bafikile pa Gibea, bakasesema umulongo balimukumenye, no mupashi wakwa Lesa waishile na maka pali wena nao ayamba no kusesema nga bena." 
1Samuel10:11 Ilyo bonse abo ali nabo kale abamwishibe bamwene alesesema pamo na bakasesema, baipushanya abati, “Bushe ni cinshi icacitika kuli mwana Kishi? Bushe Saulo nao ni umo pali bakasesema?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Elyo umuntu umo uwaleikala kulya ayankula ati, “Nga kanshi shibo ni nani?” Eico cayalwike ipinda icakusosa ati, “Bushe Saulo nao ali pakati ka bakasesema?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Ilyo Saulo alekele ukusesema aile fika ku ncende yakupepelapo. 
1Samuel10:14 Nomba nalume wakwa Saulo alimwipwishe pamo no mubomfi wakwe ati, “Bushe ni kwi waciba?” Nao atile, “Kukufwaya bapunda. Nomba ilyo twacifilwa ukubamona twaciya kwa Samwele.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Nalume kwa Saulo atile, “Njebako ifyo Samwele acisosa kuli iwe.”" 
1Samuel10:16 Saulo atile, “Cacine bapunda nabamoneka.” Lelo taebele nalume ifyo Samwele asosele pa mulandu wa fyabufumu." 
1Samuel10:17 Panuma ya ifi Samwele alonganike abena Israeli kuli Yawe ku Misipa," 
1Samuel10:18 elyo atile kuli bena, “Ifi efyo Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli asosa. Nine nafumishe Israeli mu Egupto, kabili nine namupokolwele ukufuma ku maka ya bena Egupto pamo no kumupokolola kuli bashamfumu bonse abalemucusha." 
1Samuel10:19 Nomba imwe ilelo mwakaana Lesa wenu, uumupususha mu macushi yenu yonse elyo na mu masakamika yenu yonse. Kabili mwalanda nokuti, ‘Iyoo, ifwe tupeelefye imfumu iyakututeeka.’ Eico kanshi nomba iseni mumonekele ku cinso cakwa Yawe, umo mwabela mu nko ne mikowa yenu.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Elyo Samwele apalamike aba nko sha bena Israeli mupepi, na ba luko lwa bena Benjamini ebasalilwe mukubomfya ukupendula." 
1Samuel10:21 Elyo apalamika kuntanshi aba luko lwa bena Benjamini, mu ndupwa shabo, elyo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Matiri ebasalilwe mukubomfya ukupendula. Pakulekelesha Saulo mwana Kishi ewasalilwe. Lelo ilyo balemufwaya tabamusangile." 
1Samuel10:22 Ecalengele bepushe kuli Yawe nakabili abati, “Bushe uyu muntu naisako kuno?” Elyo Yawe nao abasuka ati, “Ee, nomba nafisama mu fipe.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Elyo babutuka no kuya musenda. Nomba ilyo aiminine pakati ka bantu, alepele ukucila bonse ukufuma pa mabeya mpaka ku mutwe." 
1Samuel10:24 Samwele atile ku bantu bonse, “Bushe mwamumona umuntu uo Yawe asalile? Tapali uuli kwati ena pakati ka bantu bonse.” Elyo abantu baweleshe abati, “Imfumu naibe no bumi pe!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Samwele alondolwele abantu insambu elyo ne milimo yaba pa bufumu. Epakulemba fyonse mu citabo no kubika pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Elyo Samwele asalanganya abantu, cila muntu ukuya kumwakwe." 
1Samuel10:26 Saulo nao aile kumwakwe ku Gibea, na bantu ababulamba abo Lesa anashishe ku mitima bamushindika." 
1Samuel10:27 Lelo bamo bantalamisoka batile, “Bushe kuti uyu atupususha shani?” Balimusushishe nganshi kabili tabamupeeleko nangu fyabupe. Lelo Saulo atalelefye tondolo." 
1Samuel11:1 Panuma ya mweshi umo, Nahashi umwina Amoni aishile no kwisa pokolola Yabeshi Gileadi. Elyo abantu bonse aba mu Yabeshi batile kuli ena, “Cita icipangano na ifwe, elyo na ifwe twakulakubombela.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Lelo Nahashi umwina Amoni ayaswike ati, “Ine kuti napanga icipangano na imwe nga twasuminishanya ukuti ine nkatonkole cila umo ilinso lya ku kulyo pakuti nkalete umusebanya pali Israeli onse.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Abakalamba ba mu Yabeshi epakumweba abati, “Tupeeleko inshiku cine lubali pakuti tutume inkombe ku bena Israeli bonse, elyo nga cakuti takuli nangu umo uwakwisa tupususha, lyena tuli nokucimba kuli iwe.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Ilyo inkombe shaishile ku Gibea umushi wakwa Saulo no kutula umulandu onse ku bantu, bonse batendeke ukulila imisowa iyikalamba." 
1Samuel11:5 Califye ilyo Saulo alebwela ukufuma ku mabala, ninshi nakonka iŋombe shakulima panuma, elyo aipwishe ati, “Bushe cinshi cilubene ku bantu? Ni cinshi ico balelila?” Abantu epakumulondolwela ifyo abaume ba ku Yabeshi basosele." 
1Samuel11:6 Ilyo Saulo aumfwile amashiwi yabo, umupashi wakwa Lesa waishile pali ena na maka, icakuti aikatwa no bukali." 
1Samuel11:7 Abuulile iŋombe shibili ishakuliminako ashiputaula mu fipimfya, no kutumina bonse abena Israeli mu ncende shonse. Atuma inkombe ishakuyalanda ukuti, “Ifi efyo cili nokucitika ku ŋombe iyilima iya muntufye onse uushakonke Saulo na Samwele.” Elyo umwenso wakwa Yawe waishile pa bantu bonse, nabo baima capamo ngo muntu umo." 
1Samuel11:8 Ilyo Saulo abalongenye abantu ku Beseki, abaume ba mu Israeli bali amakana imyanda itatu (300,000) elyo na baume bakwa Yuda amakana yatatu (30,000)." 
1Samuel11:9 Baebele inkombe ishaishile abati, “Kabiyeni kasoseni ku baume ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi amuti, ‘Mailo ilyofye akasuba kakabalikisha, ninshi mwalubulwa.’” Ilyo inkombe shaile no kuyatula ilyashi ili ku baume ba ku Yabeshi, nabo balisaminwe." 
1Samuel11:10 Kanshi abaleikala ku Yabeshi epakweba abena Amoni ati, “Mailo tuli nokucimba kuli imwe elyo na imwe kuti mwatucitilafye conse icingaba icisuma kuli imwe.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Saulo ayakanya abaume bakwe mu fipani fitatu. Elyo ulucelo ku macaca baingilile abena Amoni mu nkambi yabo no kubakomaula mpaka ukufika na pa nshita akasuba kabalikishe. Kabili bonse abapusunswikeko balisalangene icakuti nangufye babili tabashele pamo iyoo. 
1Samuel11:12 Abantu epakwipusha Samwele abati, “Nga ni bani abaipwishe ati, ‘Bushe Saulo ewingateeka ifwe? Baleteni kuli ifwe pakuti tubepaye.’”" 
1Samuel11:13 Lelo Saulo atile, “Takwabe nangu umo uuli nokwipaiwa mu bushiku bwa lelo, pantu ubushiku bwa lelo Yawe napususha Israeli.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Elyo Samwele aeba abantu ati, “Iseni, natuleya ku Giligali kabili kulya kwine eko tuleya lumbula cipya cipya ifyabufumu.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Kanshi abantu bonse epakuya ku Giligali no kuya bilisha Saulo nge mfumu pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Kulya kwine eko baile tuula imutuulo yakwampana pa cinso cakwa Yawe, elyo Saulo na bena Israeli bonse basansamuka nganshi." 
1Samuel12:1 Elyo Samwele aebele abena Israeli bonse ati, “Ine nalyumfwa fyonse ifyo mwasosa kuli ine kabili nalimupeela ne mfumu iyakumuteeka." 
1Samuel12:2 Moneni, ala nomba ni mfumu eyakulamutungulula. Pantu nomba ine ninkota kabili ndi ne mfwi, lelo abana bandi abaume bena muli nabo. Ine nali intungulushi yenu ukufuma ku bulumendo bwandi ukufika na ku bushiku bwa lelo." 
1Samuel12:3 Ine naiminina pano, nshinineni pa cinso cakwa Yawe elyo na ku wasubwa wakwe. Bushe nani nasendelapo iŋombe iyilima? Ni punda wakwa nani ine nasendapo? Ninani uo nacenjeshapo? Nani uo nafyengelepo? Bushe ni ku minwe yakwa nani nafumishe amafisakanwa pakulenga amenso yandi yashibate? Nga cakuti nalicitapo cimo pali ifi, ine ndi nokumubwesesha.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Nabo abantu bayaswike abati, “Tawatala autucenjesha nangu ukutufyenga. Kabili tawatala aupoka akantu ku minwe ya muntu nangu umo.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Samwele atile kuli bena, “Yawe e kambone pali imwe kabili no musubwa wakwe wine ni kambone mu bushiku bwa lelo ukuti tamusangilepo akantu nangu kamo mu minwe yandi.” Nabo batile, “Ni kambone.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Elyo Samwele atile ku bantu, “Yawe e kambone uwasalile Mose na Aroni kabili afumya ne fikolwe fyenu mu calo ca ku Egupto." 
1Samuel12:7 Eico nomba palameni bonse pakuti mwebe ifishinka pa cinso cakwa Yawe pali fyonse ifya bulungami bwakwa Yawe, ifyo amucitila pamo na bashinwe." 
1Samuel12:8 “Ilyo Yakobo aingile mu Egupto, na bena Egupto bayamba ukubacusha, ifikolwe fyenu fyalilile kuli Yawe ukuti abafwe. Elyo Yawe epakutuma Mose na Aroni abafumishe ifikolwe fyenu muli cilya calo, no kubaleta ukuti baleikala mu cifulo cino." 
1Samuel12:9 Lelo bena balaba kuli Yawe Lesa wabo, nao epakubashitisha mu minwe yakwa Sisera umukalamba wa fita fya mfumu Yabini uwa ku Hasoli, elyo na mu minwe ya Bafilisiti, kabili na mu minwe ya mfumu ya ku Moabu ababalwishishe." 
1Samuel12:10 Elyo balilile kuli Yawe nokutila, ‘Natubifya pantu natusangukila Yawe no kulabombela imilungu ba Baali na ba Ashitoreti. Lelo nomba, tupokololeniko ku minwe ya balwani besu, elyo na ifwe twakulamubombela.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Elyo Yawe atumine Yerubibaali, Baraki, Yefuta na Samwele abamupokolwele ukufuma mu minwe ya balwani benu mu ncendefye shonse, pakuti mwikale umutende." 
1Samuel12:12 “Lelo imwe ilyo mwamwene Nahashi imfumu ya bena Amoni aisa mukumusansa, mwatile kuli ine, ‘Iyoo ifwe tulefwaya imfumu iyakuti iletuteeka,’ nangu pali ilya nshita Yawe Lesa wenu ewali mfumu yenu." 
1Samuel12:13 Nomba moneni, imfumu iyi iyo mwasalile, iyo mwe bene mwalombele. Eico Yawe naimika imfumu pali imwe." 
1Samuel12:14 Eico nomba nga cakuti muli nokuba na katiina kuli Yawe, mulemubombela no kumubeela elyo no kukanasangukila amafunde yakwe. Kabili nga cakuti imwe bonse pamo pene ne mfumu yakulamuteeka mwakulakonka Yawe Lesa wenu, ninshi cili nokumuwamina!" 
1Samuel12:15 Lelo nga cakuti mwakaana ukubeela ishiwi lyakwa Yawe, kabili mwasangukila na mafunde yakwa Yawe, lyena ninshi ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kuli nokuba pali imwe elyo na pa mfumu yenu ngefyo cali pali bashinwe." 
1Samuel12:16 “Eico nomba, iminineni ifyo fine no kumona icintu icikalamba ico Yawe alacita mu menso yenu!" 
1Samuel12:17 Bushe ino te nshita yakusombola iŋanu? Ine nalalomba kuli Yawe alete ukubulukuta ne mfula. Kabili muli nokushininkisha no kwishiba ukuti cintu icibi mwacita ku cinso cakwa Yawe icakwipusha ukumupeela imfumu.” 
1Samuel12:18 Elyo Samwele alombele kuli Yawe, na pa bushiku bwine bulya Yawe atumine ukubulukuta ne mfula, icakuti abantu bonse baiketwe no mwenso uukalamba uwa kuli Yawe na Samwele." 
1Samuel12:19 Elyo abantu bonse batile kuli Samwele, “Pepeleniko fwe babomfi benu kuli Yawe Lesa wenu pakuti twifwa, pantu natulundapo pa bubifi bumbi bonse twacita, ububifi bwakwipusha ukutupeela imfumu.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samwele nao atile kuli bena, “Mwitiina. Imwe mwalicita ububifi bonse ubu, nomba mwileka ukukonka Yawe, lelo mulemutumika ne mitima yenu yonse." 
1Samuel12:21 Mwiyalukila ukukonka ifyaciwelewele ifilubi ifishingamwafwa. Tafibomba busuma nakalya, nangu ukumupususha teti fimupusushe, pantu fyaciwelewele." 
1Samuel12:22 Pa mulandu we shina lyakwe ilicindami, Yawe takalekeleshe abantu bakwe, pantu Yawe alitemenwe ukumucita abantu bakwe." 
1Samuel12:23 Elyo palwa ine, nshingatemwa nangu panono icakuti nkabe uwakubifya kuli Yawe mukufilwa ukumupepelako. Kabili ndi nokumufunda inshila isuma kabili iyalungama." 
1Samuel12:24 Lelo imwe mukwatilefye Yawe akatiina no kulamubombela mu cishinka ne mitima yenu yonse. Mufwile ukuba abakwibukisha ifintu ifikankala ifyo amucitila. 
1Samuel12:25 Nomba nga cakuti mwakonkanyapo ukulabifya, bonse imwe pamo ne mfumu yenu mukaloba.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Saulo ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ilyo bamusontele pa bufumu, kabili ateekele abena Israeli pa myaka amakumi yane na ibili (42)." 
1Samuel13:2 Saulo asalile abaume amakana yatatu (3,000) ukufuma mu Israeli. Amakana yabili (2,000) yali nankwe ku Mikimashi na mu calo ca mpili sha Betele, elyo ikana limo (1,000) lyali na Yonatani ku Gibea wa mu Benjamini. Abantu bonse abashelepo ababweseshamo ku ncende sha kumwabo uko bafumine." 
1Samuel13:3 Yonatani acimfishe impuka ya Bafilisiti abali pa nkambi ya ku Geba, na Bafilisiti bonse baumfwako icacitike. Elyo Saulo alishishe ipenga mu calo conse nokutila, “Lekeni Abahibulu bomfwe!”" 
1Samuel13:4 Kanshi bonse abena Israeli balyumfwile amashiwi yonse ayakuti Saulo nasansa inkambi ya Bafilisiti elyo nomba Israeli asangwike umulwani wa Bafilisiti. Kabili abantu balongene mukuba pamo na Saulo ku Giligali. 
1Samuel13:5 Abafilisiti nabo balongana pamo pakulwisha abena Israeli, bali na maceleta amakana amakumi yatatu (30,000) na aba pali bakabalwe amakana mutanda (6,000) elyo ne fita ifingi kwati munsensenga wa kuli bemba. Baile no kuya cita inkambi ku Mikimashi, ku kabanga ka Beti Afeni." 
1Samuel13:6 Ilyo abaume abena Israeli bamwene ukuti bakwata ubwafya ubushaibipila, kabili nokuti ifita fyabo fyacilikilwa, bafisama mu ncengo na mu filindi, mu mateshi, mu mabwe elyo na mu mendo ya mabwe." 
1Samuel13:7 Bamo Abahibulu balyabwike umumana wa Yordani ukuya mu calo ca Gadi na Gileadi. Saulo ashele ku Giligali ne mpuka shonse isha fita isho ali nasho shilekankafye ku mwenso. 
1Samuel13:8 Apembele pa nshiku cine lubali, ukulingana ne nshita Samwele apimine. Lelo Samwele taishileko ku Giligali! Abantu bakwa Saulo batampile no kusalangana." 
1Samuel13:9 Eico Saulo atile, “Leteni kuli ine ilambo lyakoca elyo ne mituulo yakwampana.” Elyo Saulo atuulile ilambo lyakoca." 
1Samuel13:10 Kanshi cilya apwafye ukupeela ilambo lyakoca, na Samwele afika, kabili Saulo aile mukumusengela no kumuposha." 
1Samuel13:11 Samwele aipusha ati, “Bushe cinshi wacita?” Saulo ayasuka ati, “Ilyo nacimona ukuti abantu balasalangana kabili nokuti tawishile pa nshita wapimine, elyo Abafilisiti nabo balelongana ku Mikimashi,"
