1Samuel28:5 Ilyo Saulo amona impuka ya Bafilisiti, atiina. Umwenso waikete umutima wakwe, alatutuma nganshi." 
1Samuel28:6 Saulo epakwipusha Yawe, lelo Yawe akaana ukumwasuka mu filoto nangu muli Urimu nangu muli bakasesema." 
1Samuel28:7 Elyo Saulo atile ku babomfi bakwe, “Mfwaileniko umwanakashi umo uwaishiba ukubuka pakuti eko nje mukwipusha.” Elyo batila, “Moneni, eko aba umo umwanakashi ku Eni Dori uubuka.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Kanshi Saulo epakuifulunganya afwala insalu shimbi. Elyo ubushiku, wena na bantu babili baima baya na ku mwanakashi. Saulo amweba ati, “Njipushishako ku mipashi, elyo undetelepo umuntu uo nalakweba ishina.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Lelo umwanakashi atile kuli ena, “Icine cine walishibafye bwino ifyo Saulo acita. Uyu muntu alitamfya bonse bakabuka na babomba ne mipashi mu calo cakwe. Nga cinshi uletele iciteyo pa bumi bwandi icingandetela imfwa?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Saulo epakulapa kuli ena muli Yawe ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, iwe tawakapeelelwepo umulandu pali ici cintu.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Elyo umwanakashi aipusha ati, “Bushe ni nani uo ndekwimisha ku bafwa?” Nao atile “Ndefwaya Samwele.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Ilyo umwanakashi amwene Samwele, alilile umusowa uukalamba nokutila kuli Saulo, “Bushe cinshi umbepele? Ilyo niwe Saulo!”" 
1Samuel28:13 Elyo imfumu yatile ku mwanakashi, “Witiina. Bushe cinshi wamona?” Umwanakashi ati, “Namona umulungu ulefuma mu mushili.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Asosa ku mwanakashi ati, “Bushe ulemoneka shani?” Nao atile, “Ulemoneka kwati mwaume umukote uufwele umwingila alefumina pamulu.” Nomba Saulo elyo aishiba ukuti ni Samwele, elyo akontamina panshi amupakata." 
1Samuel28:15 Samwele epakutila kuli Saulo, “Bushe mulandu nshi wamfulunganishisha ukutuusha pakumbusha?” Saulo atile, “Ine ndi ne sakamika ilikalamba. Abafilisiti bali pa bulwi na ine, kabili Lesa nao naleka ukunjasuka nangu kupitila muli bakasesema nangu ni mu filoto. E mulandu wine njishile kuli iwe pakuti unjebeko ifyo ningacita.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samwele nao atile, “Nomba mulandu nshi uleipushisha ine, ilyo Yawe nakufutatila nasanguka no mulwani obe?" 
1Samuel28:17 Yawe ena nabomba ifyo asobele ukupitila muli ine. Yawe napokolola ubufumu mu maboko yobe no kubupeela kuli umo umwina mupalamano obe, kuli Davidi." 
1Samuel28:18 Pa mulandu wakukanabeela ifyo Yawe akwebele, elyo wakaana nokucita icifukushi cabukali bwakwe pali Amaleki, Yawe nacita ici kuli iwe mu bushiku bwa lelo." 
1Samuel28:19 Yawe ali nokupeela bonse abena Israeli pamo na iwe mu maboko ya Bafilisiti. Kabili mailo iwe pamo na bana bobe muli nokuba pamo na ine. Yawe kabili ali nokupeela ifita fya bena Israeli ku Bafilisiti.” 
1Samuel28:20 Awe bwangu bwangu Saulo awa panshi atambalala ku mwenso ukalamba, pa mulandu wa mashiwi Samwele amwebele. Amaka yapwa kuli Saulo, pantu akasuba konse talile elyo no bushiku bwine." 
1Samuel28:21 Ilyo umwanakashi aishile kuli Saulo no kumona ifyo ali uwacushiwa nganshi, amweba ati, “Mona, umubomfi obe umwanakashi nakubeela. Nshacisakamana kufwa iyoo, nati awe kancitefye ifyo unjebele." 
1Samuel28:22 Nomba napapata umfwa ku mubomfi obe no kuleka nkupeelekofye utwakulya tumo, pakuti ulye no kukwata amaka uko uleya mu nshila yobe.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Nao alikene ati, “Nshalye.” Lelo ababomfi bakwe no mwanakashi bamupatikisha, elyo asumina ifyo balemweba. Awe aima panshi no kwikala pa busanshi." 
1Samuel28:24 Umwanakashi ali ne ciponti icaina pa ŋanda pamwakwe, aya bwangu bwangu acipaya. Asenda no bunga ubwakandawilwa no kupangako umukate uushitutumuka." 
1Samuel28:25 Elyo apalamika kuli Saulo pamo na babomfi bakwe, nabo balya. Bulya bwine bushiku baima no kuya." 
1Samuel29:1 Abafilisiti balongenye ifita fyonse ku Afeki, elyo abena Israeli nabo bacitile inkambi pa kamfukumfuku ka mu Yesireli." 
1Samuel29:2 Ilyo bakateeka wa Bafilisiti baleenda mu milongo, mu mpuka mu myanda elyo mu makana na makana, Davidi na bantu bakwe baleenda mu milongo panuma bali na Akishi." 
1Samuel29:3 Elyo abakalamba ba fita ba Bafilisiti baipusha abati, “Nga aba, Abahibulu banshi?” Akishi ayasuka ati, “Bushe uyu te Davidi, uwali umubomfi wakwa Saulo imfumu ya bena Israeli? Aikala na ine no mwaka umo naupwa, elyo ukufuma ubushiku ashile Saulo ukushinta na nomba, ine nshasangamo ububi nangu bumo muli Davidi.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Lelo abakalamba ba Bafilisiti bakalipa nokutila, “Bweseshamo uyu muntu ku ncende wamupeele. Tafwile kutukonka ku bulwi, limbi kuti atupilibukila ilyo tucili tulelwa. Bushe kuti atemwikwa shani kuli shikulu wakwe, te lintufye amutwalila imitwe ya bantu besu aba?" 
1Samuel29:5 Bushe teuyu wine Davidi bemba na mu lwimbo ilyo balecinda ulwakuti, ‘Saulo aipaya abalwani bakwe amakana na makana, elyo Davidi ena aipaya amakana amakumi na makumi.’”" 
1Samuel29:6 Kanshi Akishi epakwita Davidi nokutila kuli wena, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, uli muntu wacishinka kabili ine kuti natemwa ukubomba na iwe mu bulwi. Pantu ukufumafye pa bushiku waishile ukufika na nomba, ine nshasangamo ububi muli iwe Davidi, lelo bakateeka bena tabakusuminishe." 
1Samuel29:7 Kanshi nomba bwelelamo kabili wende umutende. Tecakwesha ukucita icintu nelyo cimo icishingasekesha bakateeka ba Bafilisiti!” 
1Samuel29:8 Davidi atile, “Nomba bushe cinshi ncitile? Cinshi teti njile nokulwisha abalwani bakwa shikulu, imfumu yandi?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi ayasuka Davidi ati, “Kuli ine walibafye uwakunsekesha mu menso yandi kwati ni malaika wakwa Lesa. Nomba ifita fikalamba fya Bafilisiti efitile, ‘Tafwile ukuya na ifwe ku bulwi.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Eico mailo mukeme bwangu bwangu pamo na babomfi bakwa sokulu abaisa na iwe, mukabwelelemo ku ncende namupeela ukwikalamo. Mukacelele lilyafye kwalabuuta”" 
1Samuel29:11 Kanshi Davidi na bantu bakwe baimine lucelocelo babwelelamo ku calo ca Bafilisiti. Abafilisiti nabo baimine baya ku Yesireli. 
1Samuel30:1 Davidi na bantu bakwe bafikile ku Sikilagi mu bushiku bwalenga shitatu. Nomba ninshi abena Amaleki nabesa sansa mu matololo ya Negebu elyo na mu Sikilagi. Basansa Sikilagi elyo baoca no musumba. 
1Samuel30:2 Kabili basenda na bankole abanakashi na bonse abali mu mushi, bonse abaice na bakote. Tabaipeyepo nangu umo, lelo babasendafye ilyo baleya uko balungeme." 
1Samuel30:3 Ilyo Davidi na bantu bakwe baishile ku Sikilagi basanga umusumba naocewa ku mulilo. Elyo abakashi babo, abana babo abaume elyo na bakashana bonse nababasenda muli bunkole." 
1Samuel30:4 Kanshi Davidi na bantu bakwe balalooshafye apakalamba mpaka na maka yakuloosha yapwa. 
1Samuel30:5 Na bakashi bonse babili abakwa Davidi balibasendele muli bunkole, Ainoamu wa ku Yesireli elyo na Abigaili, mukamfwilwa uwali muka Nabali wa ku Kameli." 
1Samuel30:6 Davidi aumfwile ubulanda nganshi pantu abantu balalanda pakumulasaula amabwe. Cila muntu ali uwakalipwa pa mulandu wa bana babo abaume elyo na bakashana. Lelo Davidi asangile amaka muli Yawe Lesa wakwe. 
1Samuel30:7 Elyo Davidi aebele Abiyata shimapepo mwana Aimeleki ati, “Shindetelako icakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila efodi.” Abiyata nao amuletela." 
1Samuel30:8 Kabili Davidi aipusha Yawe ati, “Bushe nkonke mukufwaya aba abatapile ifyuma? Bushe ndebasanga?” Yawe amweba ati, “Bakonke uye bafwaya. Icine cine ulebasanga nokuya lubula abantu bonse.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Davidi elyo na bantu imyanda mutanda ali nabo bafikile ku kamana ka Beso, pa ncende apo baishile shapo bamo." 
1Samuel30:10 Pantu imyanda ibili (200) iya bantu balinakile sana bafilwa no kwabuka umumana. Lelo Davidi na bantu imyanda ine (400) batwalilila ukuya balebafwaya. 
1Samuel30:11 Awe basanga umwina Egupto umo mwibala bamuleta kuli Davidi. Bamupeelako amenshi yakunwa ne fyakulya. 
1Samuel30:12 Bamupeelako akacipande ka mukate wa mukunyu uwakamwa, elyo ne mikate ibili iya fisansangu fya myangashi iyauma. Awe alya elyo akwata amaka, pantu talilepo kantu nelyo kamo nangufye kunwa amenshi pa nshiku shitatu, akasuba no bushiku." 
1Samuel30:13 Elyo Davidi atampa ukumwipusha ati, “Bushe uli muntu wakwa nani? Kabili ni kwi wafuma?” Nao atile, “Ine ndi mwina Egupto, umusha wa mwina Amaleki. Shikulu nao alinsha pantu nali umulwele pa nshiku shitatu ishapita." 
1Samuel30:14 Twasanshile aba mu matololo ya Negebu wa ku Kereti elyo ne calo ca bena Yuda na Negebu wakwa Kalebu. Elyo twasha twaoca na Sikilagi.” 
1Samuel30:15 Davidi amwipusha ati, “Bushe kuti wantungulula ku mpuka iyo iyaishile sansa?” Ayasuka ati, “Icikulu ulape kuli ine pa cinso cakwa Lesa ukuti tauli nakunjipaya nangu ukumpeela mu maboko yakwa shikulu elyo lyena nalakutwala uko bali.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Elyo atungulula Davidi uko baile. Ilyo bafikile, basangile basalangenefye mpanga yonse, balelya, balenwa nokusansamuka pa mulandu wa bwingi bwa fitapwa bafumishe mu calo ca Bafilisiti elyo ne calo cakwa Yuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Davidi abalwishishe ukufuma ulucelo mpaka ukufika na ku cungulo ca bushiku bwakonkelepo. Kanshi tapali nelyo umo pali bena uwafulumwike kanofye abalumendo imyanda ine (400) abaninine pa ngamila no kufulumuka. 
1Samuel30:18 Davidi apokolwele icintu conse ico abena Amaleki basendele, ukulundapofye na bakashi bakwe bonse babili." 
1Samuel30:19 Tapali icintu nelyo cimo icabulilepo, icinono nangu icikalamba, umulumendo nangu umukashana, icitapwa nangu icintufye conse pafyo basendele. Davidi abweseshefye fyonse." 
1Samuel30:20 Davidi apokolwele ifitekwa ne ŋombe shonse isho batangishe ukucema pantanshi ya fitekwa fibiye, elyo balelanda nokuti, “Ifi e fitapwa fyakwa Davidi.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Elyo Davidi afikile pa bantu imyanda ibili (200) abanakile nganshi mukumukonka, abo ashile kunuma ku kamana ka Beso. Nabo bafumine kukumukumanya pamo na bantu ali nabo. Ilyo Davidi na bantu bakwe bapalama, abaposha." 
1Samuel30:22 Lelo abantu imbifi kabili abawelewele bonse abo bali nabo kabili abakonkele Davidi batila, “Pantu tatwaile pamo nabo, ifwe tatwabakenyeko ifitapwa twile sanga. Lelo umwaume onse kuti asenda umukashi elyo na bana bakwe, no kuya aleya.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Elyo Davidi ayasuka ati, “Awe, mwe bamunyinane mwicita ifyo pali ifi fintu Yawe atupeele. Yawe alitucingilila no kupeela mu maboko yesu abalwani aba abaishile tusansa." 
1Samuel30:24 Nga kanshi, ni bani bengamusuminisha kufyo mwasosa pali ifi? Pantu icakaniko ca bantu bashele balelinda ifipe efyo ne cakaniko ca baile ku bulwi cili nokuba cimo cinefye. Bonse bali nokwakanafye cimo cine.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Kanshi Davidi acitile ici ukuba ifunde ne cebo ku bena Israeli, ukufumafye pali bulya bwine ubushiku ukufika na pali lelo." 
1Samuel30:26 Ilyo Davidi afikile mu Sikilagi, atumine ifitapwa fimo ku bakalamba ba bena Yuda, abali abanankwe asosa nokuti, “Ubu e bupe kuli imwe ubo nafumya pa fitapwa fya balwani bakwa Yawe.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Awe afituma na ku bali ku Betele, Ramoti wa mu Negebu, elyo na ku bena Yatiri." 
1Samuel30:28 Kabili atuma na ku Aroeli, Sifimoti, Eshitemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 elyo na ku Rakali. Kabili atuma na kuli bonse abaleikala mu misumba ya bena Yerameli na ku bena Keni. 
1Samuel30:30 Atuma na ku bali mu Homa, Borashani, na ku Ataki," 
1Samuel30:31 elyo na ku Hebuloni. Kabili atuma na kuli bonse abali mu fifulo fimbi uko Davidi na bantu bakwe baendawike. 
1Samuel31:1 Nomba ilyo Abafilisiti balwile na bena Israeli, abena Israeli balifulumwike. Elyo na bengi babepaile pa lupili lwa Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:2 Abafilisiti bakonkele Saulo pamo na bana bakwe abaume pa maka nganshi. Kabili baipaya abana bakwe Yonatani, Abinadabu na Malikishua." 
1Samuel31:3 Awe ubulwi bwabipisha nganshi pali Saulo. Elyo abamata basuka bamusanga no kumucena bubi bubi. 
1Samuel31:4 Elyo Saulo aeba kasenda wa fyanso fyakwe ati, “Somona ulupanga lobe umpwishishishe, epali aba bantu abashasembululwa ebo bese banjipaye babikepo no kunseka.” Lelo kasenda wa fyanso aba no mwenso, akaana ukumucita ifyo aebelwe. Kanshi Saulo epakubuula ulupanga lwakwe no kuwilapo." 
1Samuel31:5 Ilyo kasenda wa fyanso fyakwe amona ukuti Saulo afwa, nao epakuwila pa lupanga lwakwe no kufwila pamo nankwe." 
1Samuel31:6 Kanshi Saulo, abana bakwe abaume batatu, kasenda wa fyanso fyakwe elyo na bantu bakwe bonse bafwilile pamo muli bulya bwine ubushiku." 
1Samuel31:7 Ilyo abena Israeli abali ku lubali lumbi ulwe shika na bonse abalungatene na Yordani bamona ukuti ifita fya bena Israeli fyafulumuka, nokuti Saulo na bana bakwe abaume nabafwa, awe nabo basha imisumba yabo no kufulumuka. Elyo na Bafilisiti baishile no kwamba ukulaikala muli iyi imisumba." 
1Samuel31:8 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, ilyo Abafilisiti baishile kukutapa ifintu ku bafwile, elyo basanga Saulo na bana bakwe batatu abaume nabafwa pa lupili lwa Giliboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Baputula umutwe wakwa Saulo no kumufuula ifyanso fyakwe elyo batuma intumi mu calo conse ica Bafilisiti mukubila imbila mu matempele ya tulubi twabo, elyo na ku bantu bonse." 
1Samuel31:10 Babika ifyanso fyakwe mwitempele lyakwa Ashitoreti, elyo bapampamina icitumbi cakwe ku cibumba ca Beti Shani." 
1Samuel31:11 Nomba ilyo abantu ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi baumfwile ifyo Abafilisiti bacitile kuli Saulo," 
1Samuel31:12 abantu babo bonse ababulamba balimine no kwenda ubushiku bonse ukuya ku Beti Shani. Basenda ifitumbi fyonse ifyakwa Saulo elyo ne fya bana bakwe abaume ukufuma ku cibumba ca Beti Shani no kuya ku Yabeshi, eko baya fyocela." 
1Samuel31:13 Elyo basendele amafupa yabo no kuya yashiika mwisamba lya cimuti ca Tamarisiki ku Yabeshi. Kabili bafungile ukulya pa nshiku cine lubali. 
2Samuel1:1 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Saulo, Davidi abwelele ukufuma uko aile lwisha no kucimfya abena Amaleki no kuya ikala mu Sikilagi inshiku shibili." 
2Samuel1:2 Ubushiku bwalenga shitatu, umuntu umo aisa ukufuma ku nkambi yakwa Saulo, ninshi ne nsalu shakwe nashilepauka no lukungu luli ku mutwe wakwe. Ilyo afika pali Davidi, alambalala panshi mukupeela umucinshi." 
2Samuel1:3 Elyo Davidi amwipusha ati, “Bushe ni kwisa wafuma?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Ine nafyukafye ukufuma ku nkambi ya bena Israeli.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Davidi amwipusha ati, “Cinshi cicitike? Njeba.” Nao ayasuka ati, “Abashilika abengi nabafulumuka ukufuma ku bulwi, elyo kabili abengi nabo nabafwa, na Saulo no mwana wakwe Yonatani nabo nabafwa.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Elyo Davidi atile ku mulumendo uwamuletele ilyashi, “Bushe iwe wishibe shani ukuti Saulo elyo no mwana wakwe Yonatani nabafwa?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Umulumendo ayasuka ati, “Ine naciba pa mulu wa lupili lwa Giliboa elyo namona Saulo ninshi ifumo nalimulasa elyo aba maceleta na benda pali bakabalwe balepalamina apo ali." 
2Samuel1:7 Ilyo acipilibuka amona, elyo acinjita. Na ine nacasuka nati, ‘Ndi pano mukwai.’" 
2Samuel1:8 Elyo anjipusha ati, ‘Bushe niwe ani?’ Na ine nayasuka nati, ‘Ndi mwina Amaleki.’" 
2Samuel1:9 Epakunjeba ati, ‘Isa pano ndi, wise unjipaye! Ine ndifye mu mfwa, nelyo ncili umumi.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Kanshi efyo naciya palama pali ena no kumwipaya, pantu nacishiba ukuti filya aciwa, teti abuuke no kuba no mweo. Elyo nabuula icisote icali ku mutwe wakwe, ne kosa ilyali ku kuboko no kufileta kuno kwine kuli shikulu wandi.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Awe Davidi na bantu bakwe bonse abo ali nabo babuula ifyakufwala fyabo no kulepaula. 
2Samuel1:12 Baloosha no kulila elyo bafunga ukulya mpaka icungulo, pali Saulo na Yonatani umwana wakwe, pa fita fyakwa Yawe elyo na pa ŋanda yakwa Israeli pantu bafwile ku lupanga." 
2Samuel1:13 Elyo Davidi aipusha umulumendo uwamuletele ilyashi ati, “Bushe ni kwi ufumine?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Ine ndi mwana wa mwinafyalo umwina Amaleki.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Elyo Davidi amwipusha ati, “Bushe mulandu nshi tawacikwatila umwenso wakwimya ukuboko kobe mukonaula umusubwa wakwa Yawe?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Elyo Davidi aita umo pa bantu bakwe nokutila, “Kabiye, umukome!” Kanshi epakumukoma, mpaka afwa." 
2Samuel1:16 Elyo Davidi amweba ati, “Umulopa obe, ube pa mutwe obe. Pantu akanwa kobe ekakushinine ilyo usosele auti, ‘Ine nine njipeye umusubwa wakwa Yawe.’”" 
2Samuel1:17 Elyo Davidi aimbile ulwimbo lwa cililo pali Saulo no mwana wakwe Yonatani. 
2Samuel1:18 Kabili akonkomeshe abena Yuda ukuti bafwile ukusambilisha ulu lwimbo lwakufwa ku buta, ngefyo calembwa mu citabo cakwa Yasha ukuti," 
2Samuel1:19 “Ubucindami bobe we Israeli bwaipailwa pa mpili shobe. Iye impalume ifyo shafwa! 
2Samuel1:20 Tecakwesha ukucilandapo mu Gati, nangu ukubilisha mu misebo ya mu Ashikeloni, pantu abana banakashi ba Bafilisiti kuti basamwa, elyo na bana abanakashi ba bashasembululwa kuti basansamuka." 
2Samuel1:21 “Imwe mwe mpili sha Giliboa, shi umume nangu imfula fikatala afiloka pali imwe, nangufye ni mu mabala umufuma umutuulo wa cabunga. Pantu kulya eko inkwela ya mpalume yakoweshiwe, inkwela yakwa Saulo tayakalesubwa amafuta nakabili." 
2Samuel1:22 Ukufuma ku mulopa wa abo baipeye, na ku mafuta ya mpalume, ubuta bwakwa Yonatani tabwabwelele, nangu ulupanga lwakwa Saulo ukubwelako ibusha." 
2Samuel1:23 “Saulo na Yonatani abatemwikwa kabili abantu abasuma, mu bumi bwabo elyo na pa kufwa kwabo tabapatukene. Bali abayanguka pakwima ukucila kapumpe, no kukwata amaka ukucila inkalamo." 
2Samuel1:24 “Imwe mwe bana banakashi bakwa Israeli loosheni Saulo, uwamufwikile insalu ishakashika cee ne shatelela bwino, uwabikile ifyabengeshima fya golide pa mingila yenu." 
2Samuel1:25 “Yangu ifyo impalume shafwila mu bulwi ee! Yonatani alala uwafwa pa mulu wa mpili shenu. 
2Samuel1:26 Ndi no bulanda pa mulandu wa iwe Yonatani we munyinane. Wali umusuma nganshi kuli ine. Icitemwiko cobe kuli ine cali icawamisha, ukucila na pa citemwiko ca banakashi." 
2Samuel1:27 “Yangu ifyo impalume shafwa ee! Ne fyanso fyabulwi nafiloba.” 
2Samuel2:1 Nomba panuma ya ifi Davidi aipwishe Yawe ati, “Bushe kuti nayako ku musumba umo uwaba mu Yuda?” Yawe nao atile, “Kabiye.” Elyo Davidi ati, “Bushe ni kwi ndi nokuya?” Nao Yawe atile, “Kabiye ku Hebuloni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Kanshi Davidi epakusenda abakashi bakwe bonse babili, Ainoamu umwina Yesireli elyo na Abigaili, mukamfwilwa wakwa Nabali umwina Kameli." 
2Samuel2:3 Elyo Davidi na bantu ali nabo, cila umo no lupwa lwakwe, baima no kuya ikala mu misumba ya ku Hebuloni." 
2Samuel2:4 Elyo abantu bakwa Yuda baya ku Hebuloni, no kuya suba Davidi ukuba imfumu ya ba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda. Nomba panuma ya nshita ilyo Davidi bamweba ukuti abashiikile Saulo bantu ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi," 
2Samuel2:5 atumine inkombe ku bantu ba ku Yabeshi Gileadi no kubeba ati, “Yawe amupaale pa luse mwalangile kuli Saulo imfumu yenu pakumushiika." 
2Samuel2:6 Nacibe ukuti Yawe amulange icitemwiko icishipwa na bucishinka bwakwe, na ine wine ndi nokucita cimo cine kuli imwe pa mulandu wafyo mwacitile." 
2Samuel2:7 Kanshi nomba beni abakosa kabili abashipa apo Saulo imfumu yenu alifwa. Kabili iŋanda yakwa Yuda nainsuba ukuba imfumu pali bena.” 
2Samuel2:8 Lelo Abune mwana Neri, umukalamba wa fita fyakwa Saulo ena asendele Ishi Bosheti mwana Saulo no kumutwala ku Manaimu." 
2Samuel2:9 Aya cita Ishi Bosheti ukuba imfumu pa bena Gileadi, Ashuri na Yesireli kabili na pa bena Efulemu, Benjamini elyo na bonse abena Israeli." 
2Samuel2:10 Ishi Bosheti mwana Saulo ali ne myaka amakumi yane (40) ilyo aishile ba imfumu ya bena Israeli kabili ateekelepofye imyaka ibili. Nomba aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda bena bakonkele Davidi. 
2Samuel2:11 Inshita iyo Davidi aikele pa bufumu mu Hebuloni pa ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda yakumene imyaka cine lubali na citika. 
2Samuel2:12 Nomba Abune mwana Neri na babomfi bakwa Ishi Bosheti mwana Saulo bafuma ku Manaimu no kuya ku Gibeoni. 
2Samuel2:13 Elyo Yoabu mwana Seruiya na babomfi bakwa Davidi nabo bafuma no kuya bakumanya pa cishiba ca Gibeoni. Akabungwe kamo kaikala bushilya bumo ubwa cishiba, elyo akabungwe kambi nako lubali lubiye." 
2Samuel2:14 Elyo Abune atile kuli Yoabu, “Shi natubuulepo abalumendo bamo tuleke balwe pa ntanshi yesu.” Yoabu nao asumina ati, “Cisuma, nabacite ifyo fine.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Kanshi abalumendo epakwima no kubapenda. Abakwa Benjamini na Ishi Bosheti bali ikumi limo na babili (12), elyo na babomfi bakwa Davidi bali nabo bene ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
2Samuel2:16 Cila umo aikata umulwani wakwe mu mutwe no kulasa ulupanga mu lubafu lwa mubiye no kuwa panshi bonse bafwa. Kanshi eco palya pa cifulo ca mu Gibeoni petilwa Helikati Hasulimu. 
2Samuel2:17 Ubulwi pa bushiku bulya bwali ubwabipisha. Abune na bantu bakwe abena Israeli babacimfya ku bantu bakwa Davidi. 
2Samuel2:18 Nomba abana batatu abakwa Seruiya eko bali Yoabu, Abishai na Asaeli. Nomba uyu Asaeli amolu yali ayayanguka nge nama ya mu mpanga." 
2Samuel2:19 Asaeli epakukunkunika Abune, amutamfishe ukwabula ukwalukila nangufye ni ku kulyo nangu ku kuso." 
2Samuel2:20 Elyo Abune alolesha kunuma nokutila kuli ena, “Bushe niwe Asaeli?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Nine wine.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Elyo Abune amweba ati, “Pilibukila ku kulyo nangu ku kuso kobe, eko wikateko umulumendo umo no kumupoka ifyanso fyakwe.” Lelo Asaeli akaana ukuleka ukumubutusha." 
2Samuel2:22 Kabili Abune asoka Asaeli ati, “Leka ukumbutusha! Mulandu nshi ningakwipaila? Bushe kuti namoneka shani ku menso yakwa munonko Yoabu?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Nalyo line Asaeli akaanininafye ukuleka ukumukonka. Kanshi Abune epakulasa coco we fumo lyakwe cimfutyanuma mwifumo lyakwa Asaeli, lyafumina napanuma. Awe awa na panshi no kufwa. Kanshi umuntu onse uwafika apawilile Asaeli, talepitilila aleiminina." 
2Samuel2:24 Lelo Yoabu na Abishai bena bakonkanyapofye ukukunkunika Abune. Kabili akasuba ilyo kalaba mukuwa, bafika ku lupili lwa Ama kuntanshi ya Gia mu nshila ya ku matololo ya Gibeoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Elyo abantu bakwa Benjamini balongana kunuma yakwa Abune bapanga akabungwe no kuya iminina abene pa mulu wa lupili. 
2Samuel2:26 Abune abilikisha kuli Yoabu ati, “Bushe cine cine ulupanga lwakulakomaulafye lyonse? Bushe tawishibe ukuti ici cintu cikaba icabipa pakulekelesha? Bushe cikafika ku nshita nshi ilyo ukeba abantu bobe ukuleka ukukunkunika bamunyinabo?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Yoabu ayasuka ati, “Mu cishinka cakwa Lesa wamweo, aubula ukulanda, abantu nga bacitwalililafye ukukunkunika bamunyinabo ukufika na ku lucelo.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Elyo Yoabu alisha ipenga, na bonse abantu baiminina shika. Baleka ukukunkunika abena Israeli, no bulwi bwine bwapwa." 
2Samuel2:29 Abune na bantu bakwe baenda bushiku bonse nokulalanya Araba, baya abuka no mumana wa Yordani, ukupula mu Bitironi yonse elyo baya ku Manaimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Elyo Yoabu abwelulwike kukukunkunika Abune, no kulonganika abantu bakwe bonse. Panuma yakulonganika abantu, elyo asanga ukuti abantu ikumi limo na pabula (19) tabalipo ukwabula ukupendelako Asaeli." 
2Samuel2:31 Lelo abantu bakwa Davidi ninshi nabepayapo imyanda itatu elyo na makumi mutanda (360) abena Benjamini abali na Abune. 
2Samuel2:32 Basenda icitumbi cakwa Asaeli no kuya mushiika mu nshinshi yakwa wishi ku Betelemu. Elyo Yoabu na bantu bakwe baenda nabatantama bushiku bonse nokuya fika ku Hebuloni ilyo bwaca. 
2Samuel3:1 Ubulwi bwalitantalile pakati ka ŋanda yakwa Saulo ne yakwa Davidi. Davidi wena alekoselakofye nganshi, ilyo iŋanda yakwa Saulo yena yaile ilepwafye amaka." 
2Samuel3:2 Davidi atendeke ukukwata abana abaume ilyo ali ku Hebuloni, ne beli lyali ni Amunoni, nyina ali ni Ainoamu umwina Yesireli." 
2Samuel3:3 Uwali uwacibili ni Kileabu nyina ali ni Abigaili mukamfwilwa wakwa Nabali umwina Kameli. Uwabutatu ni Abusalomu, nyina ali ni Maka umwana mwanakashi wakwa Talimai imfumu ya ku Geshuri." 
2Samuel3:4 Umwana uwakulenga bune ni Adoniya nyina ali ni Hagiti. Uwalenga busano, ni Shefatiya, nyina ali ni Abitali." 
2Samuel3:5 Elyo uwalenga mutanda ni Itilemu, nyina ali ni Egila muka Davidi. Aba e bana bafyalilwe mu Hebuloni abakwa Davidi." 
2Samuel3:6 Mu nshita ya bulwi pakati ka ŋanda yakwa Saulo ne ŋanda yakwa Davidi, Abune akonkenyepo ukuba uwamaka mu ŋanda yakwa Saulo." 
2Samuel3:7 Nomba Saulo ali no mukashi uo ashaupile mu bwinga, ishina lyakwe ni Risipa umwana umwanakashi wakwa Aia. Elyo Ishi Bosheti aeba Abune ati, “Bushe cinshi ico wasendamina no mukashi wakwa tata ulya ashaupile mu bwinga?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Awe Abune afulwa nganshi pafyo Ishi Bosheti amwebele, elyo amwasuka ati, “Bushe ine ndi mutwe wa mbwa wa ku lubali lwakwa Yuda? Ukufika pa bushiku bwa lelo, ine naliba uwanakila iŋanda yakwa wiso Saulo, ulupwa lwakwe elyo na ku banankwe. Nshakulubwila na mu minwe yakwa Davidi. Lelo iwe wampela umulandu pali uyu umwanakashi!" 
2Samuel3:9 Shi Lesa nacitepo cimo pali Abune, nangu cibefye icibi, nga cakuti nshicitile Davidi ifyo Yawe alapile ukumucitila." 
2Samuel3:10 Alapile ukusesha ubufumu ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Saulo, no kushimpa icipuna cabufumu icakwa Davidi pali Israeli na Yuda, ukufumafye ku Dani ukufika na kuli Beresheba.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Ishi Bosheti afilwa ukuti alandeko amashiwi na yambi kuli Abune, pantu alemutiina." 
2Samuel3:12 Elyo Abune atuma inkombe kuli Davidi ati, “Bushe umwine calo nani? Cita icipangano na ine, elyo nkakwafwa ukuleta Israeli yonse kuli iwe.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Nao Davidi atila, “Cisuma, ndi nokucita icipangano na iwe. Lelo kuli icintu cimo ndefwaya kuli iwe. Tecakwesha ukwisa ku cinso candi, lelo icantanshi kano ukalete Mikali umwana umwanakashi wakwa Saulo ilyo ukesa mukumona.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Elyo Davidi atuma inkombe kuli Ishi Bosheti, mwana Saulo ati, “Mpeeleni umukashi wandi Mikali, uo nakobekele ne mwine pa mutengo wa mwanda umo (100) uwankanda sha pa mpela ya mibili ya Bafilisiti.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Kanshi Ishi Bosheti epakutuma abakuya mupokolola ukufuma ku mulume wakwe Paliteli mwana Laishi. 
2Samuel3:16 Lelo umulume wakwe akonkele panuma alelila nshila yonse mpaka ku Bahurimu. Elyo Abune atila kuli ena, “Bwelelamo ku mushi!” Kanshi nao epakubwelelamo." 
2Samuel3:17 Elyo Abune aebele abakalamba ba mu Israeli nokutila, “Mu nshita yonse iyapita mwalefwaya ukubuula Davidi ukuba imfumu yenu." 
2Samuel3:18 Eico nomba citeni ici cintu! Pantu Yawe ewalaile Davidi ukutila, ‘Ni muli Davidi umubomfi wandi ndi nokulubwila abantu bandi abena Israeli ukufuma mu maboko ya Bafilisiti, elyo na mu maboko ya bonse abalwani babo.’”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abune umwine aebako na bena Benjamini kabili aya na ku Hebuloni kukwebako Davidi fyonse ifyo abena Israeli ne ŋanda yonse iyakwa Benjamini balefwaya ukucita. 
2Samuel3:20 Elyo Abune uwakwete abantu amakumi yabili (20) afikile kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni, Davidi amupekanishisha umutebeto pamo na bantu bakwe." 
2Samuel3:21 Elyo Abune atila kuli Davidi, “Shileka nje bwangu no kulonganika abena Israeli bonse kuli shikulu imfumu yandi, pakuti bengacita icipangano na iwe kabili pakuti nomba niwe ukabe niwe mfumu pali bonse abo umutima obe utemenwe.” Kanshi Davidi epakulekako Abune ukuti aleya, nao aile umutende." 
2Samuel3:22 Tapapitile nshita, abantu bakwa Davidi abaile na Yoabu babwela ukufuma kukutapa ifyuma, kabili baishile ne fitapwa ifingi. Lelo Abune wena ninshi tali na Davidi mu Hebuloni pantu ninshi alimulekeleko, no kuya aile umutende." 
2Samuel3:23 Ilyo Yoabu ne fita fyonse ali nafyo bafika, bamweba ati Abune mwana Neri acisa ku mfumu elyo imfumu nayo yamulekako ukuya kabili aciyafye umutende." 
2Samuel3:24 Kanshi Yoabu epakuya ku mfumu nokutila, “Bushe cinshi ucitile? Mona, Abune acisa kuli iwe, ngeco wacimulekelako pakuti aye cinshi?" 
2Samuel3:25 Walimwishiba Abune mwana Neri, ukuti acisa mukukubepa no kumona imyendele yobe, kabili nokufwailisha muli fyonse ulebomba.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Ilyo Yoabu afumine kuli Davidi, atumine inkombe panuma yakwa Abune mukuya mubwesha ukufuma ku cishima ca Sira. Lelo Davidi taishibepo nangu cimo." 
2Samuel3:27 Nomba ilyo Abune abwelele ku Hebuloni, Yoabu amusenda pambali ya mpongolo, kwati alefwaya ukulanda nankwe mu nkaama. Kanshi kulya kwine Yoabu epakumulasa mwifumo, no kufwa afwa pakulandula umulopa wakwa munyina Asaeli." 
2Samuel3:28 Panuma ilyo Davidi aumfwile pali ici, asosa ati, “Ine pamo no bufumu bwandi tuli bakaele umuyayaya pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa mulandu wa mulopa wakwa Abune mwana Neri." 
2Samuel3:29 Shi umulopa wakwe wingapongolokela pa mutwe wakwa Yoabu na pali bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa wishi! Shi mu ŋanda yakwa Yoabu mwikalabula muntu ushikwete ifilonda ififumwa mafina nangu ifibashi, uwendela ku nkonto, abakukomwa ku lupanga nangu uwabula ifilyo.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Yoabu na munyina Abishai baipeye Abune pa mulandu wakuti nao aipeye Asaeli munyinabo mu bulwi bwa ku Gibeoni. 
2Samuel3:31 Elyo Davidi aebele Yoabu na bantu bonse abo ali nabo ati, “Lepauleni ifyakufwala fyenu no kufwala insalu shabulanda no kuloosha pa mfwa yakwa Abune.” Imfumu Davidi nayo ninshi ilekonka panuma ya citumbi." 
2Samuel3:32 Abune bamushiikile mu Hebuloni, ne mfumu yalilile umusowa uukalamba pa nshinshi yakwa Abune, pamo pene na bantu bonse nabo balilile nganshi." 
2Samuel3:33 Imfumu epakwimba ulwimbo lwa malilo pali Abune ulwakuti, “Cinshi Abune afwila ngo muntu umuwelewele?" 
2Samuel3:34 Amaboko yobe tayakakilwe, nangu amakasa yobe ukuba mu minyololo. Wawile nga filya umuntu awa pa cinso ca bantu ababifi.” Elyo na bantu bonse babwekeshapo ukumuloosha." 
2Samuel3:35 Elyo abantu bonse baishile nokupapata Davidi pakuti alye icakulya ilyo akasuba kaciliko. Nomba Davidi nao epakulapa ati, “Shi Lesa nancitepo cimo, cibe nangufye icintu icabipisha nga cakuti nalya umukate nangu icintufye conse ilyo akasuba takalawa!”" 
2Samuel3:36 Awe abantu bonse baishiba no kutemwa icine cine ngefyo conse ico imfumu yacitile calibasekeshe. 
2Samuel3:37 Kanshi pali bulya bushiku abantu bonse, pamo na bena Israeli bonse baishibe ukuti imfumu yena tayakwetemo ulubali mukwipaya Abune mwana Neri." 
2Samuel3:38 Elyo imfumu yaebele abantu baiko ati, “Bushe tamwishibe ukuti umwana wa mfumu kabili umukalamba wa bena Israeli eufwile ilelo?" 
2Samuel3:39 Ilelo nshikwete amaka, nangu ndi imfumu iyasubwa, pantu aba bantu, abana baume bakwa Seruiya, bantu bakosa nganshi ukuncila. Shi Yawe engabwesesha ububi ku uucita ububi ukulingana ne micitile yakwe iyabubifi!”" 
2Samuel4:1 Ilyo Ishi Bosheti mwana Saulo aumfwile ukuti Abune nafwa mu Hebuloni, anenuka, na bena Israeli bonse pamo basakamikwa." 
2Samuel4:2 Nomba uyu umwana wakwa Saulo umwaume ali na bantu babili abali intungulushi sha mpuka ishalesansa. Umo ni Baanaya umbi nao ni Rekabu. Bonse aba, bali bamwana Rimoni umwina Beroti ukufuma mu luko lwakwa Benjamini, pantu Beroti nao apendelwa ku ciputulwa cakwa Benjamini." 
2Samuel4:3 Pantu abantu ba mu Beroti bafulumukile ku Gitaimu no kuya ikala kulya kwine nga beni ukufika na mu bushiku bwa lelo. 
2Samuel4:4 Nomba Yonatani mwana Saulo ali no mwana umwaume uwalemene amolu yonse. Ali ne myaka isano ilyo ilyashi lyakufwa kwakwa Saulo na Yonatani lyaishile ukufuma ku Yesireli. Umuleshi wakwe amusendele no kufulumuka, nomba lintu ali mukufulumuka, umwana apona elyo aba icilema. Ishina lyakwe ali ni Mefibosheti." 
2Samuel4:5 Nomba Rekabu na Baanaya bamwana Rimoni umwina Beroti, baimine no kuya ku ŋanda yakwa Ishi Bosheti, baya fika kulya ilyo akasuba kaba pakati ka mutwe, ninshi nalala aletuusha mu nshita ya kasuba." 
2Samuel4:6 Baile mukati nankati ka ŋanda kwati nalimo balefwaya ukubula iŋanu shimo, elyo bamulasa mu lufumo afwa. Elyo Rekabu na ndume nankwe Baanaya baongoloka baya no kuya." 
2Samuel4:7 Nomba ilyo baingile mu ŋanda, basangile nalala pa musengele mu muputule wakwe, epakumulasa bamwipaya, bamuputulako no mutwe. Basenda umutwe baenda bushiku bonse mu nshila ya bena Araba." 
2Samuel4:8 Awe bafisha umutwe wakwa Ishi Bosheti kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni nokutila ku mfumu, “Moneni umutwe wa mulwani wenu Ishi Bosheti mwana Saulo, uwafwaile ubumi bwenu. Muli buno bushiku Yawe nalandwilako imfumu kateeka wandi kuli Saulo elyo na bana bakwe.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Elyo Davidi epakwasuka Rekabu na ndume nankwe Baanaya bamwana Rimoni umwina Beroti ati, “Awe Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe wamweo uwampuswishe mu mafya ayengi," 
2Samuel4:10 ilyo umuntu umo anjebele ukuti, ‘Saulo nafwa,’ ninshi wena aletontonkanya ukuti aletele imbila isuma, nalimwikete nokumwipaila mu Sikilagi. Ici cali e cilambu namupeele pa mbila yakwe!" 
2Samuel4:11 Pali bufi ilyo ababifi ba bantu nga imwe baipaya umuntu uwakaele mu ŋanda yakwe kabili pa musengele wakwe, bushe nomba tekuti nombe umulopa wakwe ukufuma mu maboko yenu elyo no kumonaula ukufuma pano isonde?”" 
2Samuel4:12 Elyo Davidi apeela icipope ku bantu bakwe, nabo babepaya. Babaputaula amaboko yabo na molu elyo batanika imibili yabo pa cishiba ca mu Hebuloni. Lelo umutwe wakwa Ishi Bosheti wena baya ushiika mu nshinshi yakwa Abune ku Hebuloni." 
2Samuel5:1 Elyo inko shonse isha bena Israeli shaishile kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni no kumweba ati, “Ifwe tuli munofu obe kabili umulopa obe." 
2Samuel5:2 Mu nshita shapita, ilyo Saulo ali imfumu pali ifwe, iwe niwe waletungulula Israeli mu bulwi bwabo. Kabili Yawe atile kuli iwe, ‘Iwe uli nokucema abantu bandi abena Israeli, kabili ukaba kateeka wabo.’”" 
2Samuel5:3 Elyo abakalamba ba bena Israeli bonse baishile kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni, imfumu nayo epakucita icipangano nabo ku Hebuloni pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Elyo basuba Davidi amafuta yakuba imfumu ya bena Israeli." 
2Samuel5:4 Davidi ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) ilyo aishile pa bufumu, no kuteeka ateekelepo imyaka amakumi yane (40)." 
2Samuel5:5 Mu Hebuloni ateekele icalo ca Yuda imyaka cine lubali na citika. Elyo mu Yerusalemu ateekele Israeli pamo na Yuda pa myaka amakumi yatatu na itatu (33). 
2Samuel5:6 Elyo imfumu Davidi na bantu baiko baile ku Yerusalemu kukulwisha abena Yebusi, abaleikala muli ici calo. Abena Yebusi baebele Davidi ati, “Iwe muno tawaingilemo. Pantufye impofu nangu abalemana amolu ebalekutamfya.” Bena baletontonkanya ukuti, “Davidi tekuti engilemo.”" 
2Samuel5:7 Lelo Davidi apokolwele ilinga lya Sioni, nomba uwitwa umusumba wakwa Davidi." 
2Samuel5:8 Pali bulya bushiku, Davidi atile, “Uyo onse uuli nokucimfya abena Yebusi, afwile ukubomfya umufolo umupita amenshi pakufika kuli abo abalemana ne mpofu ababa abalwani bakwa Davidi.” E mulandu wine basosela abati, “Impofu na balemana tabali na kwingila kwisano lya mfumu.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Awe Davidi epakuya ikala mukati ke linga nokulaita umusumba ukuti wakwa Davidi. Akuulamo umusumba ukushinguluka, ukufuma ku fibumbili ifyakwikasha ilinga ukufika na mukati." 
2Samuel5:10 Kabili amaka yakwa Davidi yaleya yalecililakofye, pantu Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita aleba nankwe." 
2Samuel5:11 Nomba Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi yatumine inkombe kuli Davidi, nabasenda imilando ya fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda, bakabasa wa mbao elyo na bakasona wa mabwe mukukuulila Davidi isano." 
2Samuel5:12 Elyo nao Davidi aishiba nokuti Yawe namusuminisha ukuba imfumu pa bena Israeli kabili nasansabalika ubufumu bwakwe pa mulandu wa bantu bakwe abena Israeli. 
2Samuel5:13 Panuma, ilyo afumine mu Hebuloni no kwisa ku Yerusalemu, Davidi aupilepo na bambi bakashi basano, kabili alundapo na bakashi abo ashaupile mu bwinga. Kabili afyalilapo abana abaume na banakashi na bambi." 
2Samuel5:14 Aya e mashina ya bana abo afyele kulya: Shamua, Shobabu, Natani, Solomoni," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibihali, Elishua, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishama, Eliada elyo na Elifeleti." 
2Samuel5:17 Ilyo Abafilisiti baumfwile ukuti nabasuba Davidi ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli, baima na maka nganshi ukuya balemufwaya. Lelo Davidi ilyo aumfwa ukuti balemufwaya, aya ingila kwilinga." 
2Samuel5:18 Nomba Abafilisiti baisa no kusalanganina mwishika lya Refaimu. 
2Samuel5:19 Elyo Davidi epakwipusha Yawe ati, “Bushe kuti naya no kulwisha Abafilisiti? Bushe ulebapeela mu maboko yandi?” Elyo Yawe amwasuka ati, “Kabiyefye pantu icine cine ndepeela Abafilisiti mu maboko yobe.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Kanshi Davidi epakuya ku Baali Perasimu no kuya bacimfya kulya kwine. Asosa nokuti, “Ngefyo amenshi yapongoloka, Yawe napongolokela pa balwani bandi pa cinso candi.” Kanshi eco betila icifulo cilya ukuti Baali Perasimu." 
2Samuel5:21 Awe Abafilisiti basha no tulubi twabo kulya kwine, elyo Davidi na bantu bakwe batusenda." 
2Samuel5:22 Kabili Abafilisiti babwekeshapo ukwisa tantama mwishika lya Refaimu. 
2Samuel5:23 Kanshi Davidi epakwipusha Yawe, nao ayasuka ati, “Wibalungama pakunina pamulu, lelo ushinguluke ku numa yabo no kubasanshila ku ntanshi ya fimuti fya basamu." 
2Samuel5:24 Eico bwangu bwangu nga waumfwa inshindo pa mulu wa fimuti fya basamu, wangufyanye pantu ninshi ni Yawe ewile pantanshi yobe kukulwisha ifita fya Bafilisiti.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Davidi nao epakucita ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe. Davidi aipeye Abafilisiti inshila yonse ukufuma ku Gibeoni ukufikafye na ku Gesa. 
2Samuel6:1 Kabili Davidi alonganike pamo ifita ifyasalilwe ukufuma mu bena Israeli amakana amakumi yatatu (30,000)." 
2Samuel6:2 Elyo Davidi na bantu bonse abasalilwe baima ukufuma ku Baala wa mu calo cakwa Yuda kukuya buula ukufuma kulya Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa, iyo beta peshina lyakwa Yawe umwine wa fita, uwaikala apasansama pakati ka bakerubi ababa pa mulu wa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano." 
2Samuel6:3 Babika Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa peceleta ilipya pakupekanya ukuifumya mu ŋanda yakwa Abinadabu iyali pa mulu wa lupili. Usa na Ahio abana baume bakwa Abinadabu ebaletungulula ili celeta. 
2Samuel6:4 Bafumisha iceleta panse ukufuma mu ŋanda yakwa Abinadabu iyali pa mulu wa lupili ninshi Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa ili pamulu. Elyo Ahio ewaletangila ku ntanshi ye celeta. 
2Samuel6:5 Davidi ne ŋanda yonse iya bena Israeli ninshi bena balesefya na maka yabo yonse pa cinso cakwa Yawe, baleimba inyimbo, balelisha amaseese, insango, insombo, ifisekese elyo ne miwaya." 
2Samuel6:6 Ilyo bafikile ku lubansa batwilapo iŋanu ulwakwa Nakoni, Usa atambalika ukuboko no kwikatilila Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Lesa, pantu iŋombe shapene ukuwa." 
2Samuel6:7 Awe Yawe afulilwa nganshi Usa, pa mulandu wa milimo acitile iyakutambika ukuboko aikata ku Mbokoshi yakwa Lesa. Kanshi Lesa nao epakumwipaya palya pene pa mbali ya Mbokoshi." 
2Samuel6:8 Elyo Davidi nao afulwa pa mulandu wa cipyu cakwa Yawe pali Usa. Kanshi ukufika na mu bushiku bwa lelo cilya cifulo eco citilwa Peresi Usa. 
2Samuel6:9 Davidi muli bulya bushiku atiinine Yawe nokutila, “Bushe kuti Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe yaisa shani kuli ine?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Davidi tasuminisha ukuti Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe ifike kuli ena mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Lelo aitwalafye ku ŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu umwina Gati. 
2Samuel6:11 Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe yashele mu ŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu umwina Gati pa myeshi itatu. Awe Yawe nao epakumupaala pamo na ba ŋanda yakwe bonse. 
2Samuel6:12 Nomba imfumu Davidi yaumfwile ukuti, “Yawe napaala aba mu ŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu na fyonse ifyo akwata pa mulandu wa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa.” Kanshi Davidi epakuya senda Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu, atwala mu musumba wakwa Davidi no kusekelela." 
2Samuel6:13 Kanshi epakutila ati lyonse ilyo abakusenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe nga batampula intampulo mutanda, Davidi aipaya cilume wa ŋombe elyo ne ciponti ca ŋombe icaina ifye lambo lyakwa Yawe." 
2Samuel6:14 Davidi ninshi afwele icakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi, alecinda pa cinso cakwa Yawe na maka yakwe yonse." 
2Samuel6:15 Kanshi Davidi na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli yonse, pakuleta Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe, balepunda no kulisha amapenga." 
2Samuel6:16 Nomba ilyo baleingisha Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe mu musumba wakwa Davidi, Mikali umwana mwanakashi wakwa Saulo ninshi alelengela pa nsolokoto. Nomba ilyo amona imfumu Davidi ilecilauka no kucinda pa cinso cakwa Yawe, awe amususha mu mutima wakwe." 
2Samuel6:17 Ifi efyo baletele Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe no kuibika mu cifulo mukati ke tenti lintu Davidi aimike umwakwisa ifikilisha. Elyo Davidi acitile amalambo ya cakoca ne mituulo yakwampana pa cinso cakwa Yawe. 
2Samuel6:18 Elyo panuma yakupwisha ukutuula amalambo ya cakoca ne mituulo yakwampana, Davidi apaala abantu mwishina lyakwa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
2Samuel6:19 Elyo apeela umukate umo umo, icimamantwa ca tuncindu cimo cimo elyo ne cimamantwa ca myangashi cimo cimo kuli cila muntu mwibumba lyonse ilya bena Israeli, bonse abaume na banakashi. Elyo abantu bonse epakubwelelamo cila umo kumwabo." 
2Samuel6:20 Nomba ilyo Davidi abwelele kukupaala aba mu ŋanda yakwe, Mikali umwana umwanakashi wakwa Saulo aisa fuma kukumukumanya nokutila, “Yangu ifyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yaicindamika ilelo, yaifuula iyine pa cinso ca basha banakashi aba babomfi bakwe kwatifye ni umo uwa mu bawelewele engacita!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Davidi atile kuli Mikali, “Ni pa cinso cakwa Yawe uwansala, ambika na pa cifulo apali wiso, elyo na pali bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwe no kumpeela ubufumu pa bantu bakwa Yawe abena Israeli epo nacilacindila." 
2Samuel6:22 Ndi nokubafye uwaicefya nganshi ukucila pali fino ndi. Kabili ndi nokuba uwasuulwa nganshi mu menso yandi ne mwine. Lelo kuli aba banakashi abasha ulandilepo, ine ndi nokucindikwa kuli bena.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikali nao umwana umwanakashi wakwa Saulo takwetepo abana ukufika na pa bushiku bwa mfwa yakwe. 
2Samuel7:1 Panuma ya ifi, imfumu yaikele bwino mwisano lyaiko kabili Yawe amulengele ukutuusha ku balwani bakwe bonse aba mushingulwike." 
2Samuel7:2 Elyo Davidi atile kuli Natani kasesema, “Nomba mona, ine njikele mwisano lya fimuti fya keda, ilyo Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa yena ilifye mukati ke tenti.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Elyo Natani atile ku mfumu, “Conse ico uli naco mu mano kacitafye, pantu Yawe ali na iwe.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Lelo bulya bwine bushiku, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli Natani, nokumweba ati," 
2Samuel7:5 “Kabiye kebe umubomfi wandi Davidi, utile, ‘Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, bushe niwe uli nokunkuulila iŋanda iyakwikalamo?" 
2Samuel7:6 Ine nshatala njikala mu ŋanda ukutula pa bushiku nafumishe abena Israeli mu Egupto ukushinta pa bushiku bwa lelo. Ine naikalilafye ukwendauka, ukufuma pali ici cifulo no kuya pa cifulo cimbi mwitenti nge cakwikalamo." 
2Samuel7:7 Monse umo nyendauka pamo na bena Israeli bonse, bushe nalitala nsosa kuli kateeka nangu umo uo nakonkomesha ukucema abantu bandi abena Israeli ukuti, bushe ico mushankuulila iŋanda ya fimuti fya keda cinshi?’”" 
2Samuel7:8 “Eico nomba, eba umubomfi wandi Davidi utile, ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, ‘Nakusendele ukufuma mu mpanga ya mulemfwe, na mukukonka umukuni wa mpaanga kukwisa ba kateeka pa bantu bandi abena Israeli." 
2Samuel7:9 Lyonse mbafye na iwe konse uko wapitila, kabili nalipwisha abalwani bonse pa cinso cobe. Nomba ndi nokulenga ishina lyobe ukuba ilyalulumbi, kwati mashina ya bantu abacindami aba mwisonde." 
2Samuel7:10 Kabili nkapekanya incende iya bantu bandi abena Israeli, iyakuti emo nkababike pakuti bakaikwatile icifulo cabo umo bashakalebasunkanya. Abantu imbifi tabakatale ababacusha nakabili, ngefyo balecita kukutendeka." 
2Samuel7:11 Cili nokuba ukufumafye pa nshita nasontele abapingushi pakati ka bantu bandi abena Israeli. Kabili ndi nokulenga ukakwate ukutuusha ukufuma ku balwani bobe bonse. Kabili Yawe nasosa kuli iwe ati, Yawe umwine ali nokukukuulila iŋanda." 
2Samuel7:12 Ilyo inshiku shobe shikapwa kabili waya lala ukwalala ne fikolwe fyobe, ine ndi nokubuula umwana obe ukuba impyani yobe. Na ine nkakosha ubufumu bwakwe." 
2Samuel7:13 Uyu wine euli nokukuula iŋanda iye shina lyandi, kabili ndi nokukosha icipuna ca bufumu bwakwe pe na pe." 
2Samuel7:14 Ine nkaba wishi, elyo na ena akaba umwana wandi. Ilyo lyonse acita icilubo, ine ndi nokumukanda ne nkonto ya bantu bandi, mukumupuma ne mpumo shipuma abantu." 
2Samuel7:15 Lelo icitemwiko candi cena tacakatale acifuma pali ena, pamo ngefyo nacifumishe pali Saulo, uo nafumishe pa cinso cobe." 
2Samuel7:16 Iŋanda yobe elyo no bufumu fili nokubelelela pe na pe pa cinso candi. Icipuna cabufumu cobe cili nokukoshiwa pe na pe.’” 
2Samuel7:17 Awe Natani epakuya sosa amashiwi aya yonse kuli Davidi no kumulondolwela ubusokololo bonse. 
2Samuel7:18 Elyo imfumu Davidi yaingile mukati no kwikala ku cinso cakwa Yawe, yasosa aiti, “Bushe ine nine ani, we Mfumu Yawe, kabili ulupwa lwandi luli cintu nshi pakuti undete apalepa fino?" 
2Samuel7:19 Kabili kwati ifi fyacepa mu kumona kobe we Mfumu Yawe, walanda na pa mulandu wa mikalile ya kuntanshi iya ŋanda ya mubomfi obe. Bushe iyi e mibeele ubombelamo ku muntu uuli onse, we Mfumu Yawe?" 
2Samuel7:20 “Bushe finshi fimbi ificilile apa Davidi engasosa kuli iwe? Pantu umubomfi obe walimwishiba, we Mfumu Yawe." 
2Samuel7:21 Pa mulandu we shiwi lyobe elyo ukulingana no bufwayo bobe, naucita icintu ici icikankala no kulenga cishibikwe na ku mubomfi obe." 
2Samuel7:22 “Kwena uli mukulu we Mfumu Yawe! Takuli umbi uwalingana na iwe. Kabili takuli Lesa umbi lelo kanofye iwe, pamo ngefyo twayumfwila fwe bene na matwi yesu." 
2Samuel7:23 Kabili ni bani ababa nga bantu bobe abena Israeli pano isonde? Bushe kwaliba umushobo na umbi uo Lesa wabo aile lubula nga bantu abakwe umwine, no kucindamika ishina lyakwe? Bushe kwaliba bambi abo Lesa wabo alecitila ifipeshamano ifikulu elyo ne fyakutiinya mukutamfya imishobo pamo ne milungu yabo ku cinso ca bantu bobe, abo walubula ukufuma ku Egupto?" 
2Samuel7:24 Pantu naushimpa abantu bobe abena Israeli nga bantu bobefye pe na pe. Kabili niwe Yawe waisa ba Lesa wabo. 
2Samuel7:25 “Nomba kabili, we Yawe Lesa, ubake pe na pe icilayo ico walaya palwa mubomfi obe pamo ne ŋanda yakwe. Ucite ukulingana no kulaya kobe," 
2Samuel7:26 pakuti ishina lyobe licindamishe pe na pe. Elyo abantu bakatila, ‘Yawe umwine wa fita ni Lesa wa bena Israeli!’ Kabili iŋanda ya mubomfi obe Davidi ili nokubelelela pa cinso cobe." 
2Samuel7:27 “We Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wa bena Israeli, wasokolola ifi ku mubomfi obe mukutila, ‘Ine nkakukuulila iŋanda.’ Kanshi umubomfi obe nao nasanga ukushipa pakupepa kuli iwe ili ipepo." 
2Samuel7:28 We Mfumu Yawe, iwe uli Lesa! Amashiwi yobe yacishinka. Kabili naulaya umubomfi obe ifintu ifisuma." 
2Samuel7:29 Nomba ube uwasekela mukupaala iŋanda ya mubomfi obe, pakuti itwalilile pe na pe pa cinso cobe. Pantu niwe we Mfumu Yawe ulandile, elyo ne paalo lyobe pa ŋanda ya mubomfi obe ili nokuba iyapaalwa pe na pe.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Nomba panuma ya ifi fyonse, Davidi aishile cimfya Abafilisiti no kubanasha. Elyo apokolola na Metegi Ama ukufuma mu maboko ya Bafilisiti." 
2Samuel8:2 Kabili Davidi acimfya na bena Moabu. Abalalika panshi mu milongo, elyo alabapima na ku mwando. Abali mu mitande ibili abapingula ukwipaiwa. Elyo abo bonse abali mu mutande wacitatu basuminishiwa ukuba abomi. Kanshi abena Moabu epakusanguka ababomfi bakwa Davidi no kwamba ukulaleta umutuulo." 
2Samuel8:3 Kabili Davidi alwishishe no kucimfya Hadadesa mwana Reobu imfumu ya ku Soba, ilyo aile kukubweshapo ubufumu bwakwe mu ncende iyakonka umumana wa Yufurate." 
2Samuel8:4 Davidi amupokolola amaceleta yakwe ikana limo (1,000), bakensha ba maceleta amakana cine lubali (7,000), elyo ifita fya pa makasa nafyo amakana amakumi yabili (20,000). Kabili Davidi alemanika bakabalwe ba maceleta bonse, ashapofye umwanda umo (100)." 
2Samuel8:5 Ilyo abena Aramu ba ku Damasiko baishile kukwafwilisha Hadadesa imfumu ya ku Soba, Davidi aipeyepo abashilika babo amakana amakumi yabili na yabili (22,000)." 
2Samuel8:6 Davidi epakubika utwamba twa bashilika bakwe mu calo ca bena Aramu wa ku Damasiko. Elyo abena Aramu nabo baba ababomfi bakwa Davidi, bayamba no kulasonka umusonko. Yawe alengele Davidi ukucimfya konse uko aya." 
2Samuel8:7 Davidi apokolwele inkwela sha golide isha bakangalila ba fita bakwa Hadadesa no kushileta ku Yerusalemu. 
2Samuel8:8 Ukufuma ku Beta na Berotai, imisumba iyali iyakwa Hadadesa, imfumu Davidi yapokeleko umukuba uwingi nganshi." 
2Samuel8:9 Kabili ilyo imfumu Toi iya ku Hamati yaumfwile ukuti Davidi nacimfya ifita fyonse ifyakwa Hadadesa," 
2Samuel8:10 yatuma umwana wakwe Yoramu ku mfumu Davidi mukumuposha no kumutasha pa kucimfya kwakwe mu bulwi na Hadadesa, pantu inshita ishingi alelwa na Toi. Yoramu amuletela ifipe umwali silifa, golide elyo no mukuba." 
2Samuel8:11 Elyo imfumu Davidi afituulile kuli Yawe, pamo ngefyo acitile kuli silifa na golide yafumine ku mishobo yonse intu acimfishe." 
2Samuel8:12 Yafumine ku bena Edomu na bena Moabu, ku bena Amoni na ku Bafilisiti elyo na ku bena Amaleki. Kabili atuulile ne fitapwa afumishe kuli Hadadesa umwana wakwa Reobu, imfumu ya Soba." 
2Samuel8:13 Kanshi Davidi epakuba uwaishibikwa nganshi panuma yakubwela ukufuma kukulwisha abena Edomu amakana ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18,000) mwi Shika Lyamucele." 
2Samuel8:14 Awe Davidi abikile utwamba twa bashilika mu ncende ishalekana lekana mu Edomu monse. Elyo na bonse abena Edomu baba ababomfi bakwa Davidi. Yawe alengele Davidi ukucimfya konse uko aya. 
2Samuel8:15 Davidi ateekele icalo ca bena Israeli conse mu mulinganya. Alecita ubupingushi ubwacishinka ku bantu bakwe bonse. 
2Samuel8:16 Yoabu umwana wakwa Seruiya ali e mukalamba wa fita. Yehoshafati umwana wakwa Ailudi ewali kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo. 
2Samuel8:17 Sadoki umwana wakwa Aitubu elyo na Aimeleki umwana wakwa Abiyata ebali bashimapepo. Seraya nao ali ni kalemba wa milandu. 
2Samuel8:18 Benaya umwana wakwa Yehoiyada ali e ntungulushi ya bena Kereti elyo na bena Peleti. Elyo bamwana Davidi nabo bali ni bampandamano ba mfumu. 
2Samuel9:1 Elyo Davidi aipwishe ati, “Bushe pacili na nomba uusheleko uwa mu ŋanda yakwa Saulo, uo ningalangilako uluse pa mulandu wakwa Yonatani?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Nomba kwaliko umubomfi umo uwa mu ŋanda yakwa Saulo, ishina lyakwe ni Siba. Awe epakuya mwita ukuti amonane ne mfumu Davidi. Elyo imfumu yatila kuli ena, “Bushe eiwe Siba?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Nine, umubomfi wenu.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Kabili imfumu yaipwishe ati, “Bushe nakabili kuti kwaba uusheleko uwa mu ŋanda yakwa Saulo, uo ningalangilako uluse lwakwa Lesa?” Elyo Siba ayasuka imfumu ati, “Kuciliko umo umwana wakwa Yonatani, uwalemana amakasa yonse.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Imfumu aiti, “Nga ali kwi?” Siba ayasuka ati, “Ali ku ŋanda yakwa Makiri umwana wakwa Amieli mu Lo Deba.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Kanshi imfumu Davidi epakutuma abakumubuula ukufuma mu ŋanda yakwa Makiri umwana wakwa Amieli. 
2Samuel9:6 Ilyo Mefibosheti umwana wakwa Yonatani, mwana Saulo, aishile kuli Davidi, akontama pakumuposha no mucinshi. Elyo Davidi atila, “Bushe eiwe Mefibosheti!” Nao ayasuka ati, “Nine mubomfi wenu.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Elyo Davidi amweba ati, “Witiina! Pantu mu cine cine ine ndekubelela uluse pa mulandu wakwa wiso Yonatani. Ine ndi nokukubwesesha impanga yonse iyali iyakwa sokulu Saulo, kabili inshiku shonse wakulalya petebulo lyandi.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Elyo Mefibosheti akontama amupeela umucinshi nokusosa ati, “Bushe ne mubomfi wenu nine ani, pakuti musakamane imbwa iyafwa nga ine?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Elyo imfumu yaitile Siba, umubomfi wakwa Saulo no kusosa kuli ena ati, “Ine nimpeela conse icali cakwa sokulu na ku ba lupwa lwakwe ku mwishikulu wakwe." 
2Samuel9:10 Kanshi iwe pamo na bana bobe abaume elyo na babomfi bobe mwakulamulimina no kumuletela ifisabo pakuti umwishikulu wakwa sokulu elabulwa icakulya. Nomba Mefibosheti ena, inshiku shonse akulalya petebulo lyandi.” Nomba Siba ali na bana baume ikumi limo na basano (15), elyo na babomfi amakumi yabili (20)." 
2Samuel9:11 Elyo Siba epakwasuka imfumu ati, “Umubomfi wenu ali nokulacita conse ico shikulu imfumu yandi yakonkomesha.” Kanshi Mefibosheti epakulalya petebulo lyakwa Davidi, kwatifye ni umo uwa mu bana ba mfumu." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibosheti alikwetepo umwana umwaume umwaice uwe shina lya Mika. Elyo bonse abaleikala ku ŋanda kwa Siba balifye ababomfi bakwa Mefibosheti. 
2Samuel9:13 Kabili Mefibosheti aikele mu Yerusalemu, pantu lyonse ena alelya petebulo lya mfumu. Elyo ali uwalemana amakasa yonse yabili." 
2Samuel10:1 Ilyo ifi fyonse fyapitile, imfumu ya bena Amoni yafwa, elyo umwana waiko Hanuni apyana wishi pa bufumu." 
2Samuel10:2 Elyo Davidi atontonkanya ati, “Kanange uluse kuli Hanuni umwana wakwa Nahashi pamo ngefyo wishi na ena alangile uluse kuli ine.” Kanshi Davidi epakutuma inkombe kuli Hanuni kukulanga icililishi cakuloosha wishi. Ilyo abantu bakwa Davidi bafikile mu calo ca bena Amoni," 
2Samuel10:3 bacilolo ba bena Amoni basosa kuli Hanuni abati, “Bushe muletontonkanya ukuti Davidi alecindika wiso mukutuma abantu bakwe kuli imwe mukulanga icililishi cakuloosha? Bushe Davidi tabatuminefye mukulengula umusumba no kufwailisha bwino pakuti bakese tulwisha no kuupoka?”" 
2Samuel10:4 Kanshi Hanuni epakwikata abantu bakwa Davidi, ababeya lubali citika wa myefu, aputula na malaya yabo pakati pa matako no kubabweseshamo." 
2Samuel10:5 Ilyo Davidi bamwebele pa fyacitike, atumine inkombe shakuya bakumanya, pantu abantu bakwa Davidi balilengelwe insoni nganshi. Imfumu epakusosa aiti, “Ikalenifye ku Yeriko mpaka imyefu yenu ikakule elyo mukabwele.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Ilyo abena Amoni bamona ukuti nabaleta ulupato pakati kabo na Davidi, bayashima ifita fya pa nkasa amakana amakumi yabili (20,000) ku bena Aramu ukufuma ku Beti Rehobu na ku Soba, elyo ne mfumu ya ku Maaka na bantu ikana limo (1,000), elyo nakabili na bantu amakana ikumi limo na yabili (12,000) ukufuma ku Tobi." 
2Samuel10:7 Ilyo Davidi aumfwa ifi, Davidi atumako Yoabu ne fita fyonse ifya baume babulwi ababulamba." 
2Samuel10:8 Abena Amoni nabo epakufuma mu nkambi no kutantama mu mpuka shakulwilamo pa mpongolo ya musumba wabo. Lelo abena Aramu ba ku Soba na ku Rehobu na bantu ba ku Tobi elyo na Maaka, bena balifye abene beka mu mpanga pa lwalala." 
2Samuel10:9 Ilyo Yoabu amona ukuti kuli imilongo yabulwi kuntanshi elyo na ku numa yakwe, asalapo fimo ifita ifyacenjela nganshi mu Israeli no kufitantamika ukulungamana na bena Aramu." 
2Samuel10:10 Ifita fimbi ifyashala apeela mu maboko yakwa munyina Abishai kukufyangalila. Kabili afitantika ukulungamana na bena Amoni. 
2Samuel10:11 Elyo Yoabu asosa ati, “Nga cakuti abena Aramu bancila amaka, awe lyena uli nokwisafye mukumpokololako. Lelo nga cakuti abena Amoni bakucila amaka, elyo ndi nokwisa mukukupokololako." 
2Samuel10:12 Natube abakosa kabili abashangila pakuti tulwileko na maka abantu besu pamo ne misumba yakwa Lesa wesu. Shi Yawe nacitepo icilewama mu menso yakwe.” 
2Samuel10:13 Kanshi Yoabu na bashilika ali nabo bafuma mukulwisha abena Aramu, awe nabo bafulumuka ukufuma pantanshi yabo." 
2Samuel10:14 Cilya abena Amoni bamona ukuti abena Aramu balafulumuka, nabo bene bafulumuka pa cinso cakwa Abishai, kabili baya ingila na mu musumba. Kanshi Yoabu epakubwela ukufuma kukulwisha abena Amoni, baisa na ku Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel10:15 Panuma ilyo abena Aramu bamwene ukuti babacimfya ku bena Israeli, balonganika ifita nakabili." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadadesa aita abena Aramu abaleta ukufuma kwishilya lya mumana wa Yufurate. Baya ku Helamu, na Shobaki umukalamba wa fita fyakwa Hadadesa ewalebatungulula." 
2Samuel10:17 Ilyo Davidi bamwebele pali ici, alongenye abena Israeli bonse, bayabuka Yordani no kuya ku Helamu. Abena Aramu batantamika imilongo ya fita fyabo mukukumanya Davidi mu bulwi, bayamba no kumulwisha." 
2Samuel10:18 Lelo abena Aramu bafulumuka pantanshi ya bena Israeli. Kabili Davidi nao epakwipaya abali pa maceleta yabo imyanda cine lubali (700) elyo ifita fyabo ifya pa makasa amakana amakumi yane (40,000). Kabili bacena Shobaki umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo, nao afwila na palya pene." 
2Samuel10:19 Ilyo imfumu shonse ishali ishinono kuli Hadadesa shamona ukuti nabacimfiwa ku bena Israeli, bapanga umutende na bena Israeli mukuba ababomfi babo. Eico abena Aramu baletiina ukulayafwako abena Amoni nakabili." 
2Samuel11:1 Kabili pakwaluka kwa mwaka pa nshita ilya imfumu shifuma ukuya ku nkondo, Davidi atumine Yoabu pamo na bacilolo bakwe elyo ne fita fyonse ifya bena Israeli. Nabo baya ipaulula abena Amoni no kupokolola umusumba onse uwa Raba. Lelo Davidi wena ninshi nashala mu Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Icungulo cimo Davidi aima pa busanshi bwakwe no kwamba ukwendauka pa mutenge wa ŋanda ye sano. Lintu acili pa mutenge, alolesha panshi amona umwanakashi aleowa. Uyu mwanakashi ali umusuma nganshi." 
2Samuel11:3 Elyo Davidi atuma uwakwipusha pali uyu mwanakashi. Umwaume asosa ati, “Bushe uyu, te Batisheba, umwana umwanakashi wakwa Eliamu kabili umukashi wakwa Uria umwina Hiti?”" 
2Samuel11:4 Elyo Davidi atuma abakuya mubuula. Awe nao aisa kuli Davidi no kulala nankwe. Pali iyi nshita ninshi Batisheba ali uwasanguluka ku kukowela kwakwe. Elyo abwelela kumwakwe. 
2Samuel11:5 Umwanakashi uyu, aimita elyo atuma amashiwi kuli Davidi atila, “Ine ninjimita.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Davidi kanshi epakutuma amashiwi kuli Yoabu ati, “Ntumina Uria umwina Hiti.” Nao Yoabu atuma Uria kuli Davidi." 
2Samuel11:7 Ilyo Uria afikile kuli Davidi, amwipusha umutende wakwa Yoabu ifyo uli, ifyo ifita fili elyo nefyo inkondo ileenda." 
2Samuel11:8 Elyo Davidi aeba Uria ati, “Kabiye, tentemukila ku ŋanda yobe no kusamba amakasa yobe.” Awe Uria afuma mwisano aya. Kabili imfumu yamukonkesha icabupe ukufuma kwisano kwine." 
2Samuel11:9 Lelo Uria taile kumwakwe ngefyo bamwebele, asendeme pa mwinshi wa mpongolo pamo pene na bonse ababomfi bakwa shikulu wakwe." 
2Samuel11:10 Ilyo Davidi aumfwa ukuti Uria taciya ku ŋanda, amwipusha ati, “Bushe taufumine pa lwendo ulutali? Cinshi ico tawailile ku ŋanda?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uria atile kuli Davidi, “Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, abena Israeli elyo na bena Yuda bonse bekala mu matenti. Kabili shikulu Yoabu elyo na babomfi bakwa shikulu nabo bacita inkambi mu mpanga, pa lwalala. Nga ine kuti naya shani ku ŋanda yandi kukulya, kukunwa elyo no kulala no mukashi wandi? Icine cine apo iwe uli no bumi, teti ncite icintu ica musango ngoyu!”" 
2Samuel11:12 Elyo Davidi atila kuli ena, “Cisuma ikala pano pene ubushiku bwa lelofye, mailo nkakuleka ukubwelelamo.” Kanshi Uria epakushala mu Yerusalemu pali bulya bushiku elyo nobwakonkelepo." 
2Samuel11:13 Elyo Davidi aita Uria kukulya no kunwa nankwe, amulenga no kukolwa. Lelo mu cungulo Uria aya mukusendama pa butanda bwakwe pamo na babomfi bakwa shikulu wakwe. Kumwakwe ku ŋanda kwena taileko iyoo." 
2Samuel11:14 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo ulucelo, Davidi alemba inkalata kuli Yoabu no kupeela Uria ukusenda." 
2Samuel11:15 Muli kalata alemba atila, “Bika Uria apo ubulwi bulumishe mu mulongo wantanshi. Elyo mubwelele kunuma yakwe pakuti bamukome no kufwa.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Kanshi cilya Yoabu aba pakushinguluka uyu musumba, alishibe apali ifita ifyakosa nganshi mukucingilila uyu musumba, epo abika Uria." 
2Samuel11:17 Ilyo abantu ba mu musumba bafuma mukulwisha Yoabu, bamo abaume bakwa Davidi abali ifita fyakwe baipaiwa pamo pene na Uria umwina Hiti nao afwila kumo." 
2Samuel11:18 Elyo Yoabu atumine kuli Davidi amashiwi yonse aya pa mulandu wa bulwi. 
2Samuel11:19 Akonkomesha kapaso ati, “Ilyo uleya pwisha ukusosa imilandu yonse iyi iya bulwi ku mfumu," 
2Samuel11:20 limbi aya mashiwi kuti yaimya ubukali ku mfumu, kabili kuti yakwipusha aiti, ‘Nga mulandu nshi mwapalamineko ku musumba kukulwa? Bushe tamwaishibe ukuti aba pa cibumba kuti bamilasa imifwi?" 
2Samuel11:21 Nga uwaipaye Abimeleki mwana Yerubesheti nani? Bushe te mwanakashi amulashile impelo ye libwe ukufuma pelinga pakuti afwe mu Tebeshi? Mulandu nshi mwaikalile mupepi ne linga?’ Nga cakuti yakwipusha pali ici, elyo utile kuli yena, ‘No mubomfi wenu Uria umwina Hiti nao nafwa.’”" 
2Samuel11:22 Awe inkombe yalile, elyo ilyo yafika, yaeba Davidi amashiwi yonse bamutumine ukusosa." 
2Samuel11:23 Inkombe yaeba Davidi aiti, “Abantu balitucila amaka no kwisa mukutulwisha pa lwalala. Lelo kwena twali bafulumuna mpakafye na ku mwinshi wakwingilila pa mpongolo ya musumba." 
2Samuel11:24 Elyo abali na mata balashile ababomfi benu ne mifwi ukufuma pa cibumba no kwipayapo bamo abantu ba mfumu. Nakabili no mubomfi wenu Uria umwina Hiti nao nafwa.” 
2Samuel11:25 Elyo Davidi aeba inkombe ati, “Eba Yoabu utile, ‘Ici, ciikusakamika, ulupanga lwena lwipaya uyu elyo noyu wine. Ikatishafye ukulwisha umusumba no kuonaula. Umwebe Yoabu ifi pakumukoselesha.’”" 
2Samuel11:26 Ilyo muka Uria aumfwile ukuti umulume wakwe nafwa, alaloosha umulume wakwe." 
2Samuel11:27 Na panuma ya nshita yakuloosha, Davidi atuma abakuya leta muka Uria ku ŋanda kumwakwe. Awe nao aisa ba umukashi wakwe. Kabili amufyalila umwana umwaume. Lelo ici cintu Davidi acitile tacasekeshe Yawe." 
2Samuel12:1 Elyo Yawe atuma Natani kuli Davidi. Ilyo afika kuli ena, amweba ati, “Kwali abantu babili mu musumba umo, umo umukankala elyo umbi nao umupina." 
2Samuel12:2 Umukankala alikwete iŋombe ne mpaanga ishingi. 
2Samuel12:3 Lelo umupina takwetefye nangu cimo kanofye akakota ka mpaanga ako ashitile. Alekakusha bwino no kukulila pamo nankwe elyo na bana bakwe. Kalepeelwako ifilyo fimo fine, ukunwena ku lukombo lumo lwine nankwe elyo kabili kalelala mu maboko yakwe. Awe kalifye kwati mwana umwanakashi kuli ena." 
2Samuel12:4 “Nomba kwaishile umulendo ku mukankala lelo umukankala afilwa ukubuulapo imo impaanga nangu iŋombe iyakuti apekanishishepo umulendo uwamufikilile. Mu nshita yakubuula impaanga yakwe, asenda akapaanga ka mupina no kupekanya icakulya ca mweni uwamufikile.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Elyo Davidi aikatwa no bukali kuli uyu muntu, no kweba Natani ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, umuntu uyu uucitile ici wena alingilefye ukufwa!" 
2Samuel12:6 Afwilefye ukubweseshapo impaanga shine pa kapaanga akakota kamo pa mulandu wa ici acitile, pantu no luse takwete.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Elyo Natani atile kuli Davidi, “Uyu muntu niwe! Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli asosa ati, ‘Nine nakusuba ukuba imfumu pa bena Israeli, kabili nine nakupokolola ukufuma mu minwe yakwa Saulo." 
2Samuel12:8 Nine napeela iŋanda yakwa sokulu kuli iwe pamo pene na bakashi bakwa sokulu mu maboko yobe. Nine nakupeele iŋanda yakwa Israeli ne yakwa Yuda. Kanshi nga cakuti ifi fyonse naficepesha, nga nalikupeelelapo na fimbi." 
2Samuel12:9 Bushe cinshi wasuulile ishiwi lyakwa Yawe nokucita icabubifi pa cinso cakwe? Iwe walipaya Uria umwina Hiti no kusenda umukashi wakwe, aba umukashi obe. Wamwipaya ku lupanga lwa bena Amoni." 
2Samuel12:10 Nomba ecalenga ulupanga talwakatale alufuma mu ŋanda mumobe pantu walinsuula no kusenda muka Uria umwina Hiti mukuba umukashi obe?’ 
2Samuel12:11 “Ifi efyo Yawe asosele, ‘Ukufuma mu ŋanda yobe mwinefye, ine ndi nokukuletela icimfulunganya. Mu mensofye yobe ine nkabuula abakashi bobe no kubapeela ku mubiyo uo waishiba nganshi, nao akalala nabo pakabalika." 
2Samuel12:12 Iwe wacitile mu bumfisolo, lelo Ine nkacita pakabalika kabili pa cinso ca bena Israeli bonse.’”" 
2Samuel12:13 Elyo Davidi aeba Natani ati, “Ine nincita ububifi kuli Yawe.” Nao Natani amwasuka ati, “Yawe nakubelela uluse pa bubifi bobe. Tauli nakufwa iyoo." 
2Samuel12:14 Nomba pa mulandu wakuti naucita ici, naulenga abalwani bakwa Yawe bamupontele, umwana uo wafyala ali nokufwa.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Panuma ilyo Natani aile kumwakwe, Yawe aumine no kulwalika umwana mwaume untu muka Uria afyele kuli Davidi." 
2Samuel12:16 Davidi nao epakupapata kuli Lesa pa mulandu wa mwana. Afungile ukulya no kuya mu ŋanda yakwe, alambalala panshi inshiku ishingi." 
2Samuel12:17 Elyo abakalamba ba mwisano lyakwe baisa iminina mu mbali yakwe pakuti bamwimye panshi, awe akanininafye. Akaana no kulya pamo nabo icakulya." 
2Samuel12:18 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali, umwana afwa. Elyo ababomfi bakwa Davidi baba no mwenso uwakumweba ukuti umwana nafwa, pantu batontonkenye abati, “Lintu umwana acili umumi, twalelanda na Davidi, lelo taletumfwa iyoo. Nomba kuti twamweba shani ati umwana nafwa? Awe limbi kuti acitapo icabipa.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Davidi amona ukuti ababomfi bakwe baletotoshanya elyo ailuka ukuti umwana nafwa. Aipusha ati, “Bushe umwana nafwa?” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Ee, nafwa.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Awe Davidi aima ukufuma panshi. Panuma yakowa, asuba na mafuta no kufwala ifyakufwala fimbi, aya ingila na mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe mukupepa. Cilya afuma aipusha ababomfi bakwe ukumupeelako icakulya nao alya." 
2Samuel12:21 Ababomfi bakwe epakumwipusha abati, “Nga cinshi ulecitila umusango uyu? Ilyo umwana acili umumi, walifungile ukulya, kabili waleloosha. Lelo nomba ilyo umwana afwa, waima no kulya!”" 
2Samuel12:22 Davidi ayasuka ati, “Ilyo umwana ali umumi, nalefunga ukulya no kuloosha. Ine naletontonkanya nati, ‘Bushe nani eshibe? Yawe nalimo kuti ambelela uluse no kuleka umwana abe umumi.’" 
2Samuel12:23 Lelo nomba apo nafwa, cinshi ningafungila ukulya? Bushe kuti namubwesha nakabili. Ine nkaya kuli ena, lelo ena takabwelele kuli ine iyoo.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Elyo Davidi alakoselesha umukashi wakwe Batisheba, kabili aya kuli ena no kulala nankwe. Awe nao afyala umwana umwaume, bamwinika ishina lya Solomoni. Yawe amutemwa nganshi." 
2Samuel12:25 Pantu Yawe amutemwa nganshi, atuma ishiwi ukupitila muli Natani kasesema mukumwinika ishina lya Yedidiya." 
2Samuel12:26 Kabili Yoabu ali pa bulwi ku Raba umusumba ukalamba ku bena Amoni no kupokolola uyu musumba wa mfumu. 
2Samuel12:27 Elyo Yoabu atuma inkombe kuli Davidi nokutila, “Ine nindwisha Raba ne fishima fya menshi nimpokolola." 
2Samuel12:28 Nomba longanikeni impuka ya fita fyonse no kwisa shinguluka, umusumba no kuupoka. Pantu ine nga naupoka kuti nawinika ishina lyandi”." 
2Samuel12:29 Elyo Davidi alonganika impuka ya fita fyonse no kuya ku Raba kukulwisha no kupokolola umusumba. 
2Samuel12:30 Abuula ne cisote cabufumu ukufuma ku mutwe wa mfumu yabo. Ukufina kwaciko kwali italanta lya golide limo, kabili mukati mwali no tumabwe utwauma umutengo. Baisa cibika pa mutwe wakwa Davidi. Kabili abuula ifitapwa ifingi nganshi ukufuma mu musumba." 
2Samuel12:31 Elyo afumya abantu abali mu musumba, abatwala kukubomba imilimo yakubomfya ifyakuputwilako imbao, bancinde elyo na masembe. Kabili abapeela imilimo yakutama matafwali. Ifi efyo acitile na ku misumba yonse iya bena Amoni. Elyo Davidi ne fita fyakwe fyonse babwelelamo ku Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel13:1 Ilyo ifi fyonse fyapitile, Amunoni mwana Davidi alitemenwe Tama uwali umusuma nganshi. Ali ni nkashi yakwa Abusalomu umwana wakwa Davidi." 
2Samuel13:2 Awe Amunoni tepakucululuka mu mutima, icakuti camufisha na mukulwala pa mulandu wakwa nkashi yakwe Tama. Pa mulandu wakuti Tama ali ni nacisungu, calikosele kuli Amunoni ukuti acite ico alefwaya kuli Tama." 
2Samuel13:3 Nomba Amunoni alikwetepo umunankwe ishina lyakwe ni Yonadabu umwana wakwa Shimeya, munyina wakwa Davidi. Yonadabu ali umucenjeshi nganshi." 
2Samuel13:4 Awe aipusha Amunoni ati, “Bushe mulandu nshi iwe, we mwana wa mfumu, ulemonekela uwabulanda cila lucelo? Bushe teti unjebeko?” Amunoni atile kuli ena, “Ine nalitemwa Tama, inkashi yakwa munyinane Abusalomu.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Elyo Yonadabu amweba ati, “Kabiye ku busanshi bobe usendame kwati naulwala. Ilyo bawiso baleisa kukukumona, ubebe ati, ‘Ndefwaya nkashi yandi Tama ese apekanye icakulya pa cinso candi ilyo ndemonako, pakuti ese andisheko ukufuma mu minwe yakwe.’”" 
2Samuel13:6 Awe Amunoni aya lambalala pa musengele apashanya kwati mulwele. Ilyo imfumu yaisa mukumumona, Amunoni asosa ku mfumu ati, “Kuti natemwa nkashi yandi Tama aisa mpangilako utumikate utwawamisha pa cinso candi pakuti ndye ku filefuma ku minwe yakwe.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Elyo Davidi atumine ishiwi kuli Tama kwisano ati, “Kabiye ku ŋanda yakwa ndume yobe Amunoni uye mupekanishako ifyakulya fimo.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Awe Tama epakuya ku ŋanda yakwa ndume yakwe Amunoni, uko asendeme. Abuula umufuba umo, aukasawila, apangamo umukate ninshi Amunoni alemonako, elyo afumbika." 
2Samuel13:9 Epakubuula pani afumyapo umukate nokupeela Amunoni ukuti alye, nao akaana ukulya. Elyo asosa ati, “Fumya abantu bonse kuno.” Abantu bonse epakufumamo bamusha baya." 
2Samuel13:10 Elyo Amunoni aeba Tama ati, “Ndetela ifyakulya kuno ku muputule wandi uwakusendamako pakuti undisheko ne minwe yobe.” Tama nao abuula umukate acipekanya no kutwala kuli ndume yakwe Amunoni ku muputule wakwe uwakusendamako." 
2Samuel13:11 Lelo ilyo atwala kuli ena ukuti alye, Amunoni amufukukila nokutila, “Isa tulale na iwe, we nkashi yandi.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Nao Tama atila kuli Amunoni, “Tecakwesha we ndume yandi! Wimpatikisha. Pantu ica musango uyu tacatala acicitika mu bena Israeli! Wicita ici cintu icabipa." 
2Samuel13:13 Nomba ine, ni kwi nkatwala uyu musebanya wandi? Na iwe, uli nokubafye iciwelewele ca muntu mu bena Israeli. Nakupapata landafye ku mfumu pantu tekuti ikaanye ine ukupwa kuli iwe.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Lelo Amunoni akaana ukumfwa kuli Tama, nomba ico icakuti ali na maka ukumucila, asuka amunasha, asendama nankwe kumupatikisha." 
2Samuel13:15 Elyo Amunoni apata Tama nganshi, kabili impatila yakwe kuli Tama yacilile pafyo amutemenwe. Amunoni aeba Tama ati, “Ima, no kufuma uleya!”" 
2Samuel13:16 Tama nao akaana, nokutila kuli ena, “Iyoo nshaye! Ala ukuntamfya calabipishapo nganshi ukucila nefyo ucitile kale kuli ine.” Lelo Amunoni wena akaanininafye ukumfwa kuli Tama." 
2Samuel13:17 Amunoni epakwita umubomfi wakwe nokumweba ati, “Shifumya uyu mwanakashi muno elyo wisalisheko ku ciibi panuma nga afuma.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Awe umubomfi wakwe amufumya elyo aisalako ne ciibi panuma ilyo Tama afuma. Tama afwele umwingila wa maboko ayatali uwamutengo, pantu efyakufwala abana ba mfumu abanakashi banacisungu balefwala." 
2Samuel13:19 Tama epakuisuba imito mu mutwe no kulepula insalu ya mwingila wakwe afwele. Abika na maboko pa mutwe wakwe, aya aleloosha apakalamba ilyo aleya." 
2Samuel13:20 Elyo ndume yakwe Abusalomu asosele kuli Tama ati, “Bushe ni Amunoni ndume yobe ewakubifya? Nomba talala we nkashi yandi. Ala ni ndume yobe. Tecakwesha ukubika ici cintu ku mutima.” Elyo Tama aikala na mu ŋanda yakwa ndume yakwe Abusalomu, umweo uwa nkumbabulili." 
2Samuel13:21 Ilyo imfumu yaumfwile fyonse ifi, yalifulilwe nganshi. Nomba imfumu yalifililwe ukumucita icintu nelyo cimo pantu uyu ewali umwana wakwe ibeli, elyo alimutemenwe nganshi." 
2Samuel13:22 Lelo Abusalomu tatalile alanda ishiwi nangu limo kuli Amunoni, ilibi nangu ilisuma, pantu alimupatile pakupatikisha ukusendama na nkashi yakwe." 
2Samuel13:23 Panuma ya myaka ibili, ilyo bakabeya ba mpaanga shakwa Abusalomu bali ku Baali Hasori mupepi no mupaka wa ku Efulemu, Abusalomu aitile bonse abana ba mfumu abaume." 
2Samuel13:24 Abusalomu epakuya ku mfumu nokutila, “Umubomfi obe aisa na bakabeya ba mpaanga. Bushe imfumu na bacilolo baiko kuti batemwa ukwisa sangwako?”" 
2Samuel13:25 Imfumu yamwasuka aiti, “Iyoo mwana wandi. Ifwe bonse tekuti tuyeko, epali twakucushafye.” Awe Abusalomu aesha ukupatikisha imfumu, nalyo line yakaana ukuyako lelo yamupeelafye ipaalo." 
2Samuel13:26 Elyo Abusalomu atile, “Nga cakuti teifyo, napapata kanshi lekeni tuleyafye na munyinane Amunoni.” Nayo imfumu epakumwipusha aiti, “Bushe mulandu nshi ulefwaila ukuya nankwe?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Nomba mu mupatikisha wakwa Abusalomu, imfumu epakuleka Amunoni pamo na bana ba mfumu abaume bonse ukuya nankwe." 
2Samuel13:28 Elyo Abusalomu apeela icipope ku babomfi bakwe ati, “Umfweni! Ilyo mwalaisa mona Amunoni asansamuka panuma yakunwa umwangashi, na ine naisa mweba ati, ‘Ipayeni Amunoni,’ mwitiina, mumwipayefye. Bushe teine mpeele ici cipope? Mubefye abakosa kabili abashipa.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Eico kanshi ababomfi bakwa Abusalomu bacitile ifyo Abusalomu abakonkomeshe ukucita kuli Amunoni. Elyo abana ba mfumu abaume bonse baima, banina cila muntu pali punda wakwe no kufulumuka." 
2Samuel13:30 Ilyo bacili mu nshila baleya, kwafika akasebo kuli Davidi akakutila, “Abusalomu naipaya bonse abana ba mfumu abaume, tapali nangu umo pali bena uushelepo.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Awe imfumu yaima apo yaikele no kulepaula ifyakufwala fyaiko no kulambalala panshi. Kabili bonse ababomfi baiko abaiminine pantu yali, nabo balepaula ifyakufwala fyabo." 
2Samuel13:32 Lelo Yonadabu mwana Shimeya, munyina wakwa Davidi asosa ati, “Mwe shikulu mwitila amuti ni bonse abana ba mfumu bepeye iyoo, ni Amunoni eufwilefye. Ifi fyalimoneke kuli Abusalomu ukuti eyali amapange yakwe nakale, ukutulafye pa bushiku Amunoni alele na nkashi yakwe Tama kumaka." 
2Samuel13:33 Mwe shikulu wandi, cimusakamika ku kasebo kakutila abana ba mfumu abaume nabafwa. Ni Amunoni ekafye eufwile.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Ninshi pali iyi nshita Abusalomu nafulumuka. Nomba umulinshi umo uwaiminine ainuna amenso lwa pamulu elyo amona abantu abengi bali mu musebo, lwa ku masamba yakwe baleisa mu mbali ya lupili. Elyo umulinshi aya eba imfumu ukutila, “Ine namona abantu ku ntunga ya ku Horonaimu, mu mbali ya lupili.”" 
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabu nao asosa ku mfumu ati, “Moneni abana ba mfumu abaume aba pano, neci cacitikafye pamo ngefyo umubomfi wenu asosele.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Ilyofye apwa ukulanda, awe abana ba mfumu abaume baingila, balalila imisowa mukwikatisha. Imfumu nayo pamo na babomfi baiko, balaloosha apakalamba." 
2Samuel13:37 Lelo Abusalomu afulumwike no kuya kuli Talimai mwana Amihudi, imfumu ya Geshuri. Lelo imfumu Davidi yena yalalooshafye umwana waiko inshiku shonse." 
2Samuel13:38 Panuma yakufulumuka kwakwa Abusalomu aile ikala ku Geshuri pa myaka itatu. 
2Samuel13:39 Kabili umupashi wa mfumu Davidi walefuluka ukuya kuli Abusalomu, pantu balimukoselesheko pa mulandu wa mfwa yakwa Amunoni." 
2Samuel14:1 Nomba Yoabu umwana wakwa Seruiya alishibe ukuti mu mutima wa mfumu muli ukufuluka Abusalomu. 
2Samuel14:2 Kanshi Yoabu epakutumapo umuntu umo ku Tekoa no kuya letako umwanakashi uwamano ukufuma kulya kwine, amweba ati, “Umoneke kwati uli ne cililo. Ufwale ifyakufwala fya malilo, kabili tecakwesha ukubomfya amafuta yakukuyemfya iyoo. Umonekefye kwati mwanakashi uupwile inshiku ishingi mu bulanda bwakuloosha uwafwa." 
2Samuel14:3 Elyo nomba uye ku mfumu no kuya landa aya mashiwi.” Elyo Yoabu epakumweba amashiwi yakuya landa. 
2Samuel14:4 Ilyo umwanakashi uwafumine ku Tekoa aile ku mfumu, alambalala panshi ubukupeme, ashimpa ne mpumi yakwe panshi mukupeela umucinshi nokusosa ati, “Ngafweni, mwe mfumu!”" 
2Samuel14:5 Elyo imfumu yamwipusha aiti, “Bushe cinshi cilekucusha?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Ine icine cine ndi mukamfwilwa. Umulume wandi alifwa." 
2Samuel14:6 Ine ne mubomfi wenu nali na bana baume babili nomba ilyo bali mu mpanga balelwa no wakubalamununa tapali. Umo akomene umunankwe no kumwipaya. 
2Samuel14:7 Nomba ulupwa lonse lwaimina umubomfi wenu, nokutila, ‘Tufumisheni uwaipeye munyina, pakuti na ifwe tumwipaye pa bumi bwakwa munyina uo aipaya. Nangu calaba ukuti tulofye mpyani yakwe pamo pene.’ Nomba nga bacita ifi, bakashimya umusolilo wandi uwashala, no kulenga ishina lya mulume wandi pamo na bana nangu abakukonkapo bonse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse bakalobelele.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Elyo imfumu yatile ku mwanakashi, “Kabiye ku ŋanda yobe na ine nalapeela amafunde aya pa mulandu obe.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Lelo umwanakashi uwafumine ku Tekoa nao atila kuli ena, “Mwe shikulu imfumu yandi, shi lekenifye umulandu ube pali ine wine pamo no lupwa lwakwa tata. Kabili shi lekeni imfumu pamo ne cipuna caiko ibe iyakaele.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Elyo imfumu nayo yayaswike aiti, “Nga cakuti kwaba umuntu uwakwisa sosa icintiinya kuli iwe, umulete kuli ine, pantu takabwekeshepo ukukucusha.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Elyo umwanakashi asosa ati, “Kanshi shi lekeni imfumu ibukishe Yawe, Lesa waiko, ukuti acingilile kalandula wa mulopa ukufuma ku bonaushi na bumbi, pakuti umwana wandi eonaulwa.” Imfumu nayo yasosa aiti, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, takuli umushishi nangufye umo uwa ku mutwe wa mwana obe uukaponena panshi.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Elyo umwanakashi asosa ati, “Shilekeni umubomfi wenu asosepo ishiwi limo kuli shikulu imfumu yandi.” Imfumu nayo yayasuka aiti, “Landa.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Umwanakashi atile, “Bushe cinshi nomba imfumu yacitile icilubo camusango ifi pa bantu bakwa Lesa? Pantu pakupingula muli iyi nshila, imfumu yaipeela icilubo iyine, pakukanabwesha umwana waiko, uko abutukile?" 
2Samuel14:14 Pantu tuli benakufwa, twapala nga menshi ayetikila panshi ayashingalonganikwa pamo nakabili. Lelo Lesa tasenda ubumi, ena alafwaya inshila yakubweseshamo umuntu uo batamfya ukuti etaluka kuli ena." 
2Samuel14:15 “Kanshi nomba ninjisa kuli imwe mwe shikulu imfumu yandi ukuti nsose ici, pantu abantu nabanenga ukutiina. Kanshi umubomfi wenu epakutontonkanya ati, ‘Kankaye landafye ku mfumu, nalimo kuti yamona ifyo ingacita pafyo umubomfi waiko alomba." 
2Samuel14:16 Pantu imfumu yalaumfwa, no kulubula umubomfi waiko ukufuma ku maboko ya muntu uulefwaya ukonaula bonse ine elyo no mwana wandi umwaume ku cuma cacishilano Lesa atupeela.’" 
2Samuel14:17 “Eico nomba umubomfi wenu atontonkenye ukuti, ‘Ishiwi lyakwa shikulu imfumu yandi lilendetela ukutuusha.’ Pantu shikulu imfumu yandi aba kwati ni malaika wakwa Lesa mukwishiba ifisuma ne fyabipa. Shi Yawe Lesa wenu abe na imwe.”" 
2Samuel14:18 Elyo imfumu yatile ku mwanakashi, “Tecakwesha ukufisa nangu kamo ukufuma kufyo nalakwipusha.” Umwanakashi nao ayasuka ati, “Lekeni shikulu imfumu yandi ilande.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Elyo imfumu yaipusha aiti, “Bushe te Yoabu waibikamo muli ifi fyonse?” Umwanakashi ayasuka ati, “Icine cinefye napo imwe muli abomi mwe shikulu imfumu yandi, takwingaba nangu umo uwingapilibukila ku kulyo nangufye ni ku kuso, ukufuma ku cintu conse ico shikulu imfumu yandi ilesosa. Ee cacine, mubomfi wenu Yoabu uwanjebele ukuti ncite ifi. Kabili ewabikile na mashiwi yonse aya mu kanwa ka mubomfi wenu." 
2Samuel14:20 Umubomfi wenu Yoabu ewacitile ifi pakuti umulandu ubele mu musango umbi. Shikulu wandi alikwata amano kwati ni malaika wakwa Lesa. Aleshiba conse icilecitika mu calo conse.” 
2Samuel14:21 Elyo imfumu yatila kuli Yoabu, “Cisuma, nalacita ico walanda. Kabiye, kabweshe umulumendo Abusalomu.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Yoabu alambalala panshi ubukupeme panshi mukupeela umucinshi, elyo apaala imfumu. Yoabu epakutila, “Ilelo umubomfi wenu aishiba ukuti asangwa uwatemwikwa ku menso yenu, mwe shikulu imfumu yandi pantu imfumu yacita ico umubomfi waiko alombele.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Elyo Yoabu aile ku Geshuri nokuya buula Abusalomu ukumubwesesha ku Yerusalemu. 
2Samuel14:24 Lelo imfumu yasosa aiti, “Afwile ukuyafye ku ŋanda kumwakwe. Tafwile ukumoneka ku cinso candi iyoo.” Kanshi Abusalomu epakuya ku ŋanda kumwakwe. Kabili tamwenepo icinso ca mfumu nakalya." 
2Samuel14:25 Kanshi mu calo conse ica bena Israeli, tamwali umuntu uo balelumbanya pakuyemba pamo nga Abusalomu. Ukufumafye pa mulu wa mutwe wakwe ukufika na ku katende ka lukasa lwakwe, takwali kalema nelyo kamo muli ena." 
2Samuel14:26 Inshita yonse ilyo amona ukuti umushishi wa ku mutwe wakwe wafulisha, aleya mukuubeya. Aleupimisha, kabili ukufina kwauko kwaleba amashekeli pa cipimo ca mfumu imyanda ibili (200)." 
2Samuel14:27 Abusalomu afyele abana batatu elyo no mwanakashi umo. Ishina lya mwana umwanakashi ali ni Tama. Tama ali umusuma nganshi mukumoneka. 
2Samuel14:28 Abusalomu aikele imyaka ibili mu Yerusalemu ukwabula ukumonanapo ne mfumu. 
2Samuel14:29 Elyo Abusalomu aita Yoabu pakuti engamutuma ku mfumu. Lelo Yoabu akaana ubwite bwakuya kuli ena. Kabili epakutumako intumi na imbi iyacibili, nalyo line akaana ku bwite." 
2Samuel14:30 Elyo asosa ku babomfi bakwe ati, “Moneni, ibala lyakwa Yoabu lyasuntinkana ne bala lyandi, elyo alilimamo na bale mulya mwine. Kabiyeni no kulyoca ku mulilo.” Kanshi ababomfi bakwa Abusalomu epakuya oca ibala ku mulilo." 
2Samuel14:31 Elyo Yoabu aima aya ku ŋanda yakwa Abusalomu nokutila kuli ena, “Mulandu nshi ababomfi baocela ibala lyandi ku mulilo?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abusalomu ayasuka ati, “Mona nalituma ishiwi kuli iwe nati isa kuno pakuti ningesa kutuma ku mfumu, kukwipusha ukuti, ‘Bushe mulandu nshi nafumina ku Geshuri? Nga caliwemefye ne mwine nga cakuti na nomba njikala kulya kwine!’ Elyo nomba, ine ndefwaya ukumonana ne mfumu kanshi nga cakuti nasangwa no mulandu uli onse, lekenifye injipaye.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Kanshi Yoabu epakuya ku mfumu no kuyeba ici. Elyo imfumu yaita Abusalomu, nao aingila, akontamina panshi mukupeela umucinshi pakuiposha. Imfumu nayo yatomona Abusalomu pakumuposha." 
2Samuel15:1 Ilyo ifi fyonse fyapitile, Abusalomu aipekanishishe umwine iceleta, bakabalwe elyo na bantu amakumi yasano (50) abakutangila pa ntanshi yakwe." 
2Samuel15:2 Abusalomu aleima ulucelo no kwiminina pa mbali ya musebo uwaya ku mpongolo. Ilyo lyonse umuntu aisa na kasebo akakutwala ku mfumu kukupingulwa, Abusalomu amwita no kumwipusha ati, “Bushe ni ku musumba nshi ufumine?” Nao ali nokwasuka ati, “Umubomfi wenu afumine mu luko lumo lwa nko sha bena Israeli.”" 
2Samuel15:3 Elyo Abusalomu ali nokusosa kuli ena ati, “Mona, umulandu obe ulifye bwino kabili uwatambalala, lelo tapali nangu umo pa bemininako imfumu uwingakumfwa.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Abusalomu alundapo nokutila, “Nga cakuti nine bacitile umupingushi mu calo, umuntu onse uwamulandu nangu uwakuilishanya kuti aisa kuli ine, na ine kuti namona ukuti apingulwa mu mulinganya.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Elyo kabili umuntu onse ilyo aya kuli ena ukuti amukontamine pakumuposha, Abusalomu ena aletambikafye ukuboko kwakwe no kumwikata, elyo amutomona."
