2Samuel15:6 Abusalomu efyo alecita ku bena Israeli bonse, abaleya ku mfumu kukufwaya ubwafwilisho bwa bupingushi bwamulinganya. Ifi efyo Abusalomu alesembeleka imitima ya baume ba bena Israeli." 
2Samuel15:7 Nomba pa mpela ya myaka ine, Abusalomu atile ku mfumu, “Shilekeni nje ku Hebuloni no kuya fikilisha icilayo nacitile kuli Yawe." 
2Samuel15:8 Ilyo umubomfi wenu aleikala ku Geshuri mu Aramu, acitile icilayo cakutila, ‘Nga cakuti Yawe ambweseshamo ku Yerusalemu, ndi nokulapepela Yawe mu Hebuloni.’”" 
2Samuel15:9 Elyo imfumu yamweba ati, “Kabiye umutende.” Kanshi Abusalomu epakuya na ku Hebuloni." 
2Samuel15:10 Elyo Abusalomu mu nkaama atuma inkombe monse mu nko sha bena Israeli mukusosa ati, “Ilyo lyonse muli nokumfwa ukulila kwa mapenga, elyo mukalebilisha amuti, ‘Abusalomu ali ni mfumu mu Hebuloni.’”" 
2Samuel15:11 Kanshi abantu imyanda ibili (200) ebashindike Abusalomu ukufuma ku Yerusalemu. Aba bonse ebalalikwe nga bashimucindikwa. Kabili bena bali abakaele abashaishibe nangufye kamo pali uyu mulandu. 
2Samuel15:12 Ilyo Abusalomu acili aletuula amalambo, atuma uwakwita Aitofeli umwina Giloni, cilolo wakwa Davidi, ukufuma ku Gilo umusumba wakwe. Kabili ukwikatana pamo kwakosa nganshi, na balekonka Abusalomu balafulilakofye." 
2Samuel15:13 Kabili kwaishile umo uwakweba Davidi ukuti, “Imitima ya bena Israeli nayalukila kuli Abusalomu.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Elyo Davidi aeba ababomfi bakwe abo ali nabo mu Yerusalemu ati, “Iseni! Tufulumukefye, pantu takuli nangu umo uuli nokupusuka ukufuma kuli Abusalomu. Nombalinefye tufwile ukuya, epali ayangufyanya ukulwisha no kucimfya elyo atonaula, aonaula no musumba ku lupanga.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Elyo bacilolo ba mfumu bamwasuka abati, “Ababomfi benu bali abaipekanya ukucitafye conse ico shikulu imfumu yesu isalile.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Awe imfumu epakufuma na baŋanda bonse bamukonka. Lelo ashakofye abakashi bakwe abo asaupile mu bwinga ikumi limo kukusunga isano lya mfumu. 
2Samuel15:17 Kanshi imfumu epakufuma na bantu bonse bamukonka. Elyo baya iminina pa ŋanda yakulekelesha. 
2Samuel15:18 Abantu bonse baleenda balemupita mumbali, ninshi bali pamo bonse na bena Kereti, abena Peleti, elyo na bonse imyanda mutanda (600) iya bena Gati abamushindike ukufuma ku Gati baleenda ukupita pa cinso ca mfumu." 
2Samuel15:19 Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli Itai umwina Gati aiti, “Bushe cinshi ico na iwe walatukonkela? Bwelelamo uye ikala ne mfumu Abusalomu. Ala iwe uli mwinafyalo, uli mweni uwafuma ku calo ca kumwenu." 
2Samuel15:20 Iwe ni mailo waishilefye. Elyo ilelo wati tube abakwendauka bonse, ilyo ine nshishibe uko ndi nokuya? Bwelelamo, elyo usende na bamunonko. Shi uluse ne cishinka fileba na iwe.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Elyo Itai ayasuka imfumu ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, kabili apofye shikulu wandi imfumu yandi yabumi, uko konsefye shikulu imfumu yandi ili nokuba cibe ni mu bumi nangu ni mfwa, eko no mubomfi wenu ali nokuba.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Elyo Davidi aeba Itai ati, “Cisuma tuleya, tangila.” Awe Itai umwina Gati epakuya pamo na bantu bakwe bonse ne ndupwa shintu ali nasho." 
2Samuel15:23 Abantu bonse mu calo bapumunapo imisowa ikalamba balalila ilyo balepita. Awe imfumu nayo epakwabuka umukonko wa Kidironi, elyo abantu bonse bena balepitililafye ukulungama ku matololo." 
2Samuel15:24 Abiyata epo ali pamo na Sadoki, na bonse abena Levi abalesenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Lesa. Elyo babika Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa panshi na Abiyata atuulapo na malambo mpakafye abantu bonse bapwa ukufuma mu musumba." 
2Samuel15:25 Elyo imfumu yaeba Sadoki aiti, “Bwesesha Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa mu musumba. Nga cakuti nasanga uluse ku cinso cakwa Yawe, ali nokumbwesha no kunenga kabili ukuimona pamo ne cifulo cakwe icakwikalamo." 
2Samuel15:26 Lelo nga cakuti atila, ‘Ine nshisekelele muli iwe,’ awe lyena ine ndifye uwaipekanya ukuti acite conse kuli ine ico atemenwe.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Imfumu nayo epakusosa kuli Sadoki shimapepo aiti, “Bushe iwe, teiwe kamona iyoo? Bwelelamo umutende ku musumba, no mwana obe umwaume Aimasi elyo na Yonatani mwana Abiyata. Iwe na Abiyata sendeni abana benu babili abaume." 
2Samuel15:28 Ndi nokuya mukulolela mu mawanga ya mu matololo mpaka ishiwi likafume kuli imwe mukanjebe.” 
2Samuel15:29 Kanshi Sadoki na Abiyata epakusenda Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa no kuibwesesha ku Yerusalemu. Kabili eko baikala no kwikala. 
2Samuel15:30 Lelo Davidi atwalilila ukunina ulupili lwa Miolifa. Ilyo alenina ulupili ninshi aleya alelila nokulila. Ku mutwe wakwe kwalifimbilwe kabili aleendafye ukwabula indyato ku makasa. Bonse abantu abo ali nabo, ku mitwe yabo kwalifimbilwe. Elyo nabo bene ilyo balenina ulupili baile balelila." 
2Samuel15:31 Nomba Davidi bamweba ukuti, “Aitofeli nao ali pamo na bekatene na Abusalomu.” Elyo Davidi apepa ati, “We Yawe, bwesheni Aitofeli ku mano yaciwelewele.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Ilyo Davidi afikile pa mulu wa lupili, apo abantu balepepela Lesa, Hushai umwina Aki epo ali kukumusengela, ninshi nalepula umukansu wakwe, na ku mutwe wakwe kuli ulukungu." 
2Samuel15:33 Davidi asosa kuli ena ati, “Nga cakuti waile na ine, uli nokubafye icisendo kuli ine." 
2Samuel15:34 Lelo nga cakuti wabwelelamo ku musumba no kusosa kuli Abusalomu auti, ‘Ine ndi nokuba umubomfi wenu, mwe mfumu. Ine nali umubomfi wakwa wiso mu nshita yapita, lelo nomba ndi nokuba umubomfi wenu.’ Elyo lyena kuti mwangafwilisha kukufulunganya bumpandamano bwakwa Aitofeli." 
2Samuel15:35 Bushe bashimapepo Sadoki na Abiyata tabakabe na iwe kulya? Ulebeba conse ico uli nokumfwa mwisano lya mfumu. 
2Samuel15:36 Abana babo abaume babili, Aimasi mwana Sadoki na Yonatani mwana Abiyata nabo bali kulya kwine pamo nabo. Ulebatuma kuli ine, na conse ico umfwile.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Kanshi Hushai umunankwe wakwa Davidi, afika ku Yerusalemu ilyofye Abusalomu aleingila mu musumba." 
2Samuel16:1 Ilyo Davidi acilile panono pa mulu wa lupili apo balepepela, akumanya Siba, kangalila wakwa Mefibosheti alepembela ukumukumanya, ali na bapunda nakakilapo ne fyakwikalapo. Kabili pali ne mipusa ya mikate imyanda ibili (200), ifisansangu fya myangashi umwanda umo (100) elyo ne nyambi ya mwangashi imo." 
2Samuel16:2 Elyo imfumu yaipusha Siba aiti, “Bushe cinshi waletela ifi?” Siba nao ayasuka ati, “Bapunda aba, ba mu ŋanda ya mfumu abakuninapo. Elyo umukate ne fisabo fyakulya fya bashilika. No mwangashi wakunwa abanakuka mu matololo.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Elyo imfumu yaipusha aiti, “Ngo mwishikulu wakwa sokulu ali kwi?” Siba epakumwasuka ati, “Ala ekala mu Yerusalemu, pantu atontonkanya ukuti ubushiku bwa lelo iŋanda yakwa Israeli ili nokumubwesesha ubufumu bwakwa shikulu wakwe.”" 
2Samuel16:4 Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli Siba aiti, “Ala fyonse ifyo Mefibosheti akwata nomba fyobe.” Siba nao asosa ati, “Mwe shikulu imfumu yandi, ine ndi panshi no kuicefya. Shi lekeni nsange ukutemwikwa ku cinso cenu.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Ilyo imfumu Davidi yafikile ku Bahurimu, umuntu umo uwa mu mukowa umo wine no lupwa lwakwa Saulo, ishina lyakwe ni Shimei mwana Gera, aishile alelapisha ninshi aleisa." 
2Samuel16:6 Shimei aleposela Davidi pamo na bacilolo ba mfumu bonse amabwe, nangu ifita fyonse na bakumulinda balifye ku mbali shonse, ku kulyo na ku kuso." 
2Samuel16:7 Ilyo Shimei alelapisha alesosa ati, “Fuma muno, fuma muno we ntalamisoka we, we cinangwa camuntu!" 
2Samuel16:8 Yawe nakulandula pa mulopa onse wasumya mu ŋanda yakwa Saulo, mu cifulo cakwe umo wateeka. Yawe nao napeela ubufumu ku mwana obe Abusalomu. Kabili mona, wailetelela pantu uli ntalamisoka!”" 
2Samuel16:9 Elyo Abishai mwana Seruiya atile ku mfumu, “Bushe mulandu nshi iyi mbwa iyafwa ilelapishisha shikulu imfumu yandi? Shileka njeko no kumuputulako umutwe wakwe.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Lelo imfumu yasosa aiti, “Bushe imwe na ine cinshi tuli naco cimo mu mano, imwe mwe bana baume bakwa Seruiya? Nga cakuti aletipwila pantu Yawe eumwebele ati, ‘Lapisha Davidi,’ tapali uwingamulesha ukutila, ‘Cinshi ulecitila ifi?’”" 
2Samuel16:11 Elyo Davidi atile kuli Abishai na bacilolo bakwe bonse, “Umwana, umwaume wa munofu wandifye, eulefwaya ukunjipaya. Nomba palibufi kuti caba shani kuli uyu umwina Benjamini! Mulekeni umwine. Lekeni alelapisha, pantu ni Yawe eumwebele ukucita ifi." 
2Samuel16:12 Nalimo kuti Yawe alolesha pa bulanda bwandi no kunambwilapo ubusuma pakulapishiwa ndepokelela ilelo.” 
2Samuel16:13 Awe Davidi na bantu bakwe bakonkanyapo ukulaya mu musebo, ninshi Shimei nao aleya, alekonka ulupili mumbali, nabalungatana na Davidi, aleya alelapisha, alemuposela na mabwe elyo no kumufukwila ulukungu." 
2Samuel16:14 Imfumu na bantu yali nabo bonse bafika pa cifulo cakulalapo ninshi nabanaka nganshi. Kabili apa epo atuushishe. 
2Samuel16:15 Nomba Abusalomu na bantu bakwe bonse aba mu Israeli baile ku Yerusalemu, elyo Aitofeli nao ali pamo nankwe." 
2Samuel16:16 Elyo Hushai umwina Aki, umubiye wakwa Davidi, aya kuli Abusalomu nokutila kuli ena, “Shi ubumi nabutwalilile we mfumu!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Elyo Abusalomu aipusha Hushai ati, “Bushe kanshi ici e citemwiko ulanga ku mubiyo? Cinshi ico ushaila pamo no munobe?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai asosa kuli Abusalomu ati, “Iyoo, umuntu uusalilwe na Yawe, na bantu aba elyo na bonse abena Israeli, eo ine ninshi nkaba uwakwe. Uyu wine eo nkashala pamo nankwe." 
2Samuel16:19 Elyo kabili, bushe ni ani uo ndi nokubombela? Bushe teti mombele umwana? Ifyo, nabombele wiso efyo ndi nokulakubombela na iwe wine.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Elyo Abusalomu atile kuli Aitofeli, “Tupandeko amano yobe. Bushe tuli nokucita shani?”" 
2Samuel16:21 Aitofeli ayasuka ati, “Usendame na bakashi abo ashaupile mu bwinga bonse abakwa wiso, abo asha mukulinda isano. Elyo lyena Israeli yonse ikomfwa ukutila cine cine nausebanya wiso. Ici cikalenga iwe na bonse abakukonka ukuba abamaka nganshi.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Kanshi abantu epakwanshika itenti lyakwa Abusalomu pa mulu wa mutenge. Elyo nao Abusalomu alalala na bakashi abashaupilwe mu bwinga abakwa wishi mu menso ya bena Israeli bonse. 
2Samuel16:23 Nomba mu nshiku shilya bumpandamano Aitofeli apeele bwali kwati muntu umo uuleipusha kuli Lesa. Ifi efyo bonse Davidi na Abusalomu balemona fyonse ifya bumpandamano bwakwa Aitofeli. 
2Samuel17:1 Elyo Aitofeli atile kuli Abusalomu, “Ine ndi nokusala abantu amakana ikumi na yabili (12,000), no kuya ilelo line ubushiku mukukunkunika Davidi." 
2Samuel17:2 Ndeya mulwisha ilyo acili uwatompoka no kunaka. Kabili ndeya mutiinya. Elyo abantu bakwe nabo bali nokufulumuka. Elyo ndi nokukoma imfumu yekafye," 
2Samuel17:3 kabili nkabwesesha na bantu bonse kuli iwe. Imfwa ya muntu uo ufwaya ikalenga ukubwela kwa bonse. Abantu bonse bakaba umutende.” 
2Samuel17:4 Ubupekanyo ubu bwaba busuma kuli Abusalomu pamo na bakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli. 
2Samuel17:5 Lelo Abusalomu asosele ati, “Shi iteni na Hushai mwana Aki, pakuti twise umfwa nao ifyo engasosapo.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Ilyo Hushai aisa kuli ena, Abusalomu atila, “Ni Aitofeli eutupandile aya mano. Bushe kuti twacita ifi asosele? Nga teifyo, twebeko amatontonkanyo yobe.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Nao Hushai epakwasuka Abusalomu ati, “Bumpandamano bwakwa Aitofeli uno muku tebusuma.”" 
2Samuel17:8 Kabili atila, “Bawiso walibeshiba, pamo na bantu babo, ukuti babulwi kabili bakutiina nganshi kwatifye cinama ca mu mpanga cibea ico bafyushisha utwana. Elyo na cimbi cakutila, wiso untu wasalapuka nganshi ku bulwi. Ena tasendame apalelala ifita fyakwe." 
2Samuel17:9 Moneni na nombaline wena nafisama mu lucengo nangu ku ncende imbi. Nga cakuti Davidi na bantu bakwe ebabalilapo ukusansa ifita fyobe, uyo onse uwaumfwa pali ici, kuti asosa atila, ‘Ifita fyakwa Abusalomu nabafipaulula.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Ici cikalenga ukuti ne cita conse icashipa nganshi, icaba no mutima kwati mutima wa nkalamo, awe cili nokusunguluka ku mwenso. Pantu Israeli yonse yalishiba ukuti wiso wa bulwi, kabili bonse abo aba nabo bantu abashipa." 
2Samuel17:11 Kanshi ine ndekupanda amano yakutila, ‘Leka Israeli yonse ukufuma ku Dani ukufika ku Beresheba, abafulisha ngo musensenga wa ku lulamba lwa bemba, bakalongane kuli iwe. Na iwe wine we mwine niwe ukabe katungulula wabo mu bulwi.’" 
2Samuel17:12 Nomba ilyo tukamusansa konse uko akasangwa, elyo tuli nokumuwililila ngefyo umume uwa pa mushili. Nangu ni ena, nangufye ni onse uwa mu bantu bakwe uukashala umumi, bonse bakepaiwa." 
2Samuel17:13 Nga cakuti abutukila mu musumba umo, elyo Israeli yonse ikaleta imyando ku musumba ulya, tukaukulila ku mukonko, mpaka tapakashale nangufye kalibwe akacepesha.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abusalomu na bantu bonse abena Israeli epakusosa abati, “Bumpandamano bwakwa Hushai umwina Aki, bwawamapo ukucila ubwakwa Aitofeli.” Pantu Yawe napanga ukufulunganya bumpandamano bwakwa Aitofeli mukuleta icinkunka pali Abusalomu." 
2Samuel17:15 Elyo Hushai aebele Sadoki na Abiyata bashimapepo ati, “Aitofeli e mpandamano wakwa Abusalomu na bakalamba ba mu Israeli kukucita cakuti elyo na cakuti, lelo ine nimbapandako amano ayakucita ifyaibela." 
2Samuel17:16 Eico nombalinefye tuma ishiwi no kweba Davidi auti, ‘Wisendama mu fyabu fya mu matololo, lelo wabukile kwishilya ukwabula ukufilwa.’ Pantu limbi imfumu na bantu bonse ili nabo baleisa ipaiwa.”" 
2Samuel17:17 Nomba Yonatani na Aimasi baleikala ku Eni Rogeli. Awe umubomfi umukashana eko aleya no kubeba, kabili nabo baleya no kweba imfumu Davidi, pantu cali icayafya nganshi ukumonekela uko baleingila mu musumba." 
2Samuel17:18 Lelo akalumendo kamo kena kabamona no kweba Abusalomu. Kanshi bonse babili baima bwangu no kuya ku ŋanda ya umo mulumendo mu Bahurimu. Uyu muntu alikwete icishima mu lubansa lwa ŋanda yakwe, emo baingila." 
2Samuel17:19 Awe umukashi epakubuula icakukupika pa cishima, akupikapo, ayanikapo ne mbuto. Kanshi tapali nelyo umo uwaishibe pali ici." 
2Samuel17:20 Ilyo abantu bakwa Abusalomu baisa pa ŋanda ya uyu mwanakashi, baipusha abati, “Bushe bali kwi Aimasi na Yonatani?” Umwanakashi nao abasuka ati, “Nababuka umulonga.” Awe nabo abantu bafwayafwaya, lelo tabasangilepo nangu umo nakalya, kanshi epakubwelelamo ku Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Panuma ya aba bantu ilyo baya, Aimasi na Yonatani bafuma mu cishima no kuya eba imfumu Davidi abati, “Ima bwangu wabuke umumana. Pantu ifi efyo Aitofeli apandile amano pali iwe.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Kanshi Davidi na bantu bonse abalemukonka baima no kwabuka umumana wa Yordani. Elyo na pakuca ulucelo, takwashele nelyo umo uushayabwike umumana wa Yordani." 
2Samuel17:23 Nomba Aitofeli ilyo amona ukuti tabakonkele ifyo abapandile amano, akaka icikakilo pali punda wakwe no kwima ukuya ku ŋanda yakwe, ku musumba wakwe. Apekanya bwino iŋanda yakwe elyo aikulika afwa, na bantu bamushiika mu nshinshi yakwa wishi." 
2Samuel17:24 Davidi aile ku Mahanaimu, ilyo Abusalomu ayabwike umumana wa Yordani pamo pene na bena Israeli bonse." 
2Samuel17:25 Elyo Abusalomu abikile Amasa ukuba umukalamba wa fita mu cifulo cakwa Yoabu. Amasa ali mwana wa muntu umo uo baleita ishina lya Yete umwina Israeli. Yete aupile Abigaili, umwana umwanakashi wakwa Nahashi, inkashi yakwa Seruiya nyina wakwa Yoabu." 
2Samuel17:26 Abena Israeli na Abusalomu bacita inkambi mu calo ca bena Gileadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Ilyo Davidi aishile ku Mahanaimu, Shobi umwana wakwa Nahashi wa ku Raba wa bena Amoni, kabili Maki umwana wakwa Amieli wa ku Lo Deba, na Basilai umwina Gileadi wa ku Rogelimu," 
2Samuel17:28 baleta ifyakusendamapo, ifyakufimbana, imbale ne nongo. Kabili baleta iŋanu, bale, ubunga, imbuto ishasalulwa, cilemba, elyo ne landa." 
2Samuel17:29 Baletele ubuci, umukaka uwasasamina, impaanga elyo no mukaka uwatikama ukufuma ku mukaka wa ŋombe kuli Davidi na bantu bakwe pakuti balye. Pantu batile, “Abantu bali ne nsala, nabanaka kabili bali ne cilaka mu matololo.”" 
2Samuel18:1 Elyo Davidi alonganike abantu ali nabo, no kusontapo abakalamba ba pa makana (1,000) elyo na bakalamba ba pa myanda (100)." 
2Samuel18:2 Awe Davidi epakwakanya impuka sha fita patatu. Impuka imo abika mu minwe yakwa Yoabu, impuka imbi mu minwe yakwa Abishai munyina wakwa Yoabu umwana wakwa Seruiya, elyo imbi nayo mu minwe yakwa Itai umwina Gati. Elyo imfumu yaeba ifita aiti, “Icine cinefye na ine wine, tuleya bonse pamo.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Lelo abantu batile, “Tecakwesha ukuti iwe we mfumu uye. Pantu nga cakuti ifwe twatitikishiwa, twafulumuka, tabakatusakamane ifwe iyoo. Nangufye nalimo citika wa pali ifwe afwa, nalyo line tabakatusakamane. Pantu iwe we mfumu naucila pali ifwe nangu tube amakana ikumi limo (10,000). Iwe cawama ukuti ube mu musumba pakuti uletutuminako ubwafwilisho.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Elyo imfumu nayo yayasuka aiti, “Ine ndifye nokucita conse icamoneka icisuma kuli imwe.” Awe imfumu epakwiminina pa mbali ya mpongolo ilyo abantu bonse balefuma mu mpuka mu mpuka sha myanda elyo na mu makana." 
2Samuel18:5 Elyo imfumu yakonkomesha Yoabu, Abishai na Itai aiti, “Pa mulandu wa ine, namulomba munsungileko umulumendo Abusalomu.” Elyo ne mpuka shonse shalyumfwile ifyo imfumu yakonkomeshe pa mulandu wakwa Abusalomu kuli cila mukalamba wa fita." 
2Samuel18:6 Kabili ifita fyakwa Davidi fyaile mu mpanga mukulwisha abena Israeli. Elyo ubulwi bwabelele mu mutengo wa Efulemu. 
2Samuel18:7 Abena Israeli babacimfya ku bantu bakwa Davidi. Kabili kwali impendwa iyikulu nganshi iya bantu abo baipeye ukulingana na bantu amakana amakumi yabili (20,000)." 
2Samuel18:8 Ubulwi bwasalangenefye mu calo conse. Elyo umutengo nao waipeye abantu abengi ukucila na bafwile ku lupanga. 
2Samuel18:9 Awe cabafye nkuma, Abusalomu ninshi nanina pa mfalashi, yayapita mwisamba lya misambo ya cimuti cikulu ica oki, umutwe wakwa Abusalomu wakofya mu cimuti. Elyo ashala alepelelafye mu lwelele, ninshi imfalashi anininepo yena ileyafye." 
2Samuel18:10 Ilyo umuntu umo amona ici, aeba Yoabu ati, “Nimona Abusalomu alepelela mu cimuti ca oki.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Yoabu nao asosa ku muntu uumwebele ifi ati, “Watila shani! Wacimumona? Cinshi ico ushacimukomawila palya pene, aponena na panshi? Lyena nga nakupeela indalama amashekeli ya silifa ikumi limo no mushipi wa mpalume.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Nao umuntu ayasuka Yoabu ati, “Nangufye wingampeela indalama amashekeli ikana limo (1,000) no kuyapima na mu lupi lwandi, awe ine teti njimye ukuboko kwandi no kwipaya umwana wa mfumu. Pantu bonse ala twacilayumfwila ilyo imfumu yacilakonkomesha iwe na Abishai na Itai ati, ‘Munsungileko bwino umulumendo Abusalomu.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Kanshi ine ncita icabipa mu bumi bwandi no kumwipaya, pantu takwaba icintu nelyo cimo icifiswa ku mfumu, na iwe wine nga nauntaluka.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Elyo Yoabu atila, “Ine nshikwete nshita yakonawila kuli iwe ngefi.” Abuula amafumo yatatu mu minwe yakwe no kuyalasa pa cifuba cakwa Abusalomu ilyo ninshi acili umumi ku cimuti ca oki." 
2Samuel18:15 Elyo bakasenda wa fyanso fyakwa Yoabu bashinguluka Abusalomu, bamulasa no kumwipaya." 
2Samuel18:16 Elyo Yoabu epakulisha ipenga, ne fita fyaleka ukukunkunika abena Israeli pakuleshiwa na Yoabu." 
2Samuel18:17 Epakubuula Abusalomu, bamuposa mu cilindi icikalamba mu mutengo, no kutulikapo umwina ukulu uwa mabwe. Mu nshita iyi ninshi abena Israeli nabafulumuka cila umo ku ŋanda yakwe." 
2Samuel18:18 Ilyo Abusalomu acili umumi, aliimikile umwine ilibwe lya cibukisho cakwe mu mukonko wa mfumu. Pantu atontonkenye ukuti, “Ine nshakwatapo umwana umwaume uwakulenga ishina lyandi ukwibukishiwa.” Ainike ici cibukisho ce libwe ishina lyakwe, ukushinta na lelo line bacita Icibukisho cakwa Abusalomu." 
2Samuel18:19 Elyo Aimasi mwana Sadoki atile, “Shilekeni mbutukileko no kutwala ilyashi ku mfumu ukuti Yawe nakulubula ukufuma mu minwe ya balwani bobe.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Lelo Yoabu amweba ati, “Telelo uli nokutwala ilyashi ku mfumu. Uli nalimo ukutwala ili lyashi inshita imbi, lelo teti ucite ifi mu bushiku bwa lelo iyoo, pantu umwana wa mfumu nafwa.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Elyo Yoabu aeba umo umwina Kushi ati, “Kabiye kebe imfumu ifyo wamona.” Umwina Kushi nao epakukontamina panshi pakupeela umucinshi kuli Yoabu elyo abutuka." 
2Samuel18:22 Aimasi umwana wakwa Sadoki atile kuli Yoabu, “Nangu cibe shani, napapata ndekafye na ine nkonke ulubilo pa numa ya mwina Kushi.” Lelo Yoabu ayasuka ati, “Mwana wandi cinshi ico na iwe ulefwaila ukukonkela? Iwe taukwete ilyashi nangu limo ilingapeelelwapo icilambu kuli iwe.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Nao Aimasi atile, “Nangu cibe shani, ndebutuka nkonke.” Kanshi Yoabu epakumweba ati, “Butuka.” Elyo Aimasi akonka ulubilo mu mbali ya nshila ye wanga no kucilawila umwina Kushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Davidi acili ekele pakati ka mpongolo shibili, umulinshi anina pa mulu wa mutenge wa mpongolo pa cibumba. Ilyo ainuna amenso, amona umuntu umwaume alebutuka eka." 
2Samuel18:25 Umulinshi apunda ku mfumu no kuyeba pali ici. Elyo imfumu yatila, “Nga cakuti alifye eka afwile ali ne lyashi ilisuma.” Nao umuntu esafye no kupalamina." 
2Samuel18:26 Kabili umulinshi amona umuntu na umbi alebutuka, elyo aita umulinshi wa pa mpongolo ati, “Mona umuntu na umbi alebutuka eka!” Elyo imfumu yatile, “Nao wine afwile aleletafye ilyashi ilisuma.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Elyo umulinshi atila, “Namona ine kwati muntu wantanshi ukubutuka kwakwe kupalile Aimasi mwana Sadoki.” Imfumu yatila, “Muntu umusuma uuli ne lyashi lisuma.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Awe Aimasi akuuta ku mfumu nokutila, “Fyonse filifye bwino!” Pakuposha imfumu akontamina panshi nokutila, “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa wenu pakulubula abantu abaimishe amaboko yabo kuli shikulu imfumu yandi.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Elyo imfumu yaipwishe aiti, “Bushe umulumendo Abusalomu ali umutende?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Namwene icimfulunganya icikalamba mu nshitafye ilyo Yoabu ali nokuntuma ne mubomfi wenu. Elyo na ine ne mubomfi wenu, kwena nshishibe ifyo cali.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Nayo imfumu yamweba aiti, “Iminina kumbali no kulolela pano pene.”" 
2Samuel18:31 Kabili nao umwina Kushi afika no kusosa ati, “Mwe shikulu imfumu yandi, umfweni ilyashi ilisuma! Yawe namulubula imwe ilelo ukufuma kuli bonse abamwimine.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Elyo imfumu yaipusha umwina Kushi aiti, “Bushe umulumendo Abusalomu ali umutende?” Umwina Kushi nao ayasuka ati, “Shi abalwani bakwa shikulu imfumu yandi, na bonse abakwimina kukucita ububi bengaba ngo mulumendo uyu.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Awe capapwishe imfumu. Yaile pa muputule wa pamulu ukupitila ku mwinshi wa mpongolo no kulalila. Ilyo yaile, yatile, “Iye we mwana wandi Abusalomu! Mwana wandi Abusalomu! Cawama nga cakuti nine mfwile ukucila iwe. Iwe Abusalomu, umwana wandi, umwana wandi!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Elyo Yoabu aishile umfwa ukuti, “Imfumu ilelilafye no kuloosha Abusalomu.”" 
2Samuel19:2 Kabili ukucimfya kwa fita fyonse pali bulya bushiku kwasangwike ukuloosha ku bantu bonse, pantu ifita fyonse fyaumfwa ukuti pa bushiku bulya imfumu ilelilishika pa mwana waiko." 
2Samuel19:3 Awe abantu basokelele mu musumba pali bulya bushiku kwati ni filya abantu basokelela ne nsoni nga bafuma ku bulwi. 
2Samuel19:4 Imfumu yafimbile ku menso no kulila umusowa uukalamba ileti, “We mwana wandi Abusalomu! We Abusalomu, mwana wandi!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Awe Yoabu aingila mu ŋanda umwali mfumu nokutila, “Ilelo walenga abantu bobe bonse insoni abapuswishe ubumi bobe ne myeo ya bana bobe abaume elyo na bakashi bobe pamo na bakashi bobe abo washaupile mu bwinga." 
2Samuel19:6 Pantu iwe watemwa abakupata elyo wapata abakutemwa. Ilelo walanga apabuuta ukuti abakalamba ba fita na bantu babo tabali cintu kuli iwe. Ine namona ukuti iwe nga wacisansamuka ilelo, Abusalomu eo aba umumi na ifwe bonse atufwa." 
2Samuel19:7 Nomba kabiye, fuma no kuya koselesha abantu bobe. Ine nalapa napalifye Yawe ukuti iwe nga taufumine nokuya, takwabe umuntu nangu umo uuleshala na iwe pakuti buce. Ici cili nokukubipila nganshi ukucila na pa mashamo yakuponena ukufuma ku bulumendo bobe ukufika na nomba.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Kanshi imfumu epakwima no kwikala pa cipuna caiko pa mpongolo. Ilyo baeba abantu ukuti, “Imfumu ikele pa mpongolo,” awe bonse baisa longana ku cinso caiko. Pa nshita imo ine, abena Israeli ninshi nabafulumukila cila umo ku ŋanda yakwe." 
2Samuel19:9 Mu ncendefye monse umwali inko sha bena Israeli, abantu bonse balaumana abene beka, balasosa abati, “Imfumu eyatulubwile mu maboko ya balwani besu. Kabili eyatupuswishe ukufuma mu maboko ya Bafilisiti. Lelo nomba moneni, naifulumuka mu calo pa mulandu wakwa Abusalomu." 
2Samuel19:10 Nomba Abusalomu, uo twasuba ukututeeka, nao nafwa mu bulwi. Nomba cinshi mushilelandilapo palwa kubwesha imfumu?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Imfumu Davidi epakutuma ishiwi kuli Sadoki na Abiyata bashimapepo ati, “Landeni ku bakalamba ba bena Yuda mutile, ‘Bushe mulandu nshi imwe mwabela abakushalikisha kukubwesha imfumu kwisano lyaiko? Pantu conse icasoswa calyumfwika na ku mfumu uko ikala." 
2Samuel19:12 Imwe nimwe bamunyinane, umunofu wandifye kabili umulopa wandi. Kanshi ico mwingabela abakushalikisha mukubwesesha imfumu kwisano cinshi?’" 
2Samuel19:13 Kabili sosa kuli Amasa auti, ‘Bushe iwe tauli munofu wandifye kabili umulopa wandi? Shi Lesa mukulu nancitile conse ico engafwaya, nangufye ici cililepo, nga cakuti ukufuma pali nomba ukuya kuntanshi, nga cakuti tauli nokuba umukalamba wa fita fyandi mu cifulo cakwa Yoabu.’”" 
2Samuel19:14 Awe Amasa epakwalula imitima ya bantu bonse abena Yuda kwatifye mutima wa muntu umo. Elyo batuma ne shiwi ku mfumu abati, “Bweleni, imwe na bantu benu bonse.”" 
2Samuel19:15 Elyo imfumu nayo yabwelela no kuya lwa ku Yordani. Abena Yuda nabo bonse eko baya mukukonkela imfumu ku Giligali no kuileta ku Yordani. 
2Samuel19:16 Shimei umwana wakwa Gera, umwina Benjamini uwa mu Bahurimu, ewayangufyanya ukutentemukila pamo na bantu bakwa Yuda kukukumanya imfumu Davidi!" 
2Samuel19:17 Kabili ali na bena Benjamini ikana limo (1,000). Siba nao epo ali nga kangalila wa ŋanda yakwa Saulo, abana bakwe abaume ikumi limo na basano (15) elyo na babomfi amakumi yabili (20). Awe bayangufyanya ukuya ku Yordani, ilyo imfumu tailafikako." 
2Samuel19:18 Elyo bonse bayabuka kukwabusha abana ba mfumu elyo no kubomba fyonse ifyo yalekabila. Ilyo Shimei umwana wakwa Gera ayabwike Yordani awile panshi ku cinso ca mfumu," 
2Samuel19:19 nokutila kuli ena, “Shi mwe shikulu wandi mwimpeela mulandu. Mwiibukisha ifyo umubomfi wenu acitile pa bushiku shikulu imfumu yandi yafumine mu Yerusalemu. Shi imfumu nga ingacifumya mu mutima waiko." 
2Samuel19:20 Pantu ine ngo mubomfi wenu nalishiba ukuti nalibifya, lelo mu bushiku bwa lelo, ine ninjileta kuno ngo wakubalilapo pali bonse aba ŋanda yakwa Yosefu ukwisa no kukumanya shikulu imfumu yandi.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Elyo Abishai umwana wakwa Seruiya atile, “Bushe Shimei talingile ukwipaiwa pali ici? Alilapishe umusubwa wakwa Yawe.”" 
2Samuel19:22 Elyo Davidi nao ayaswike ati, “Bushe imwe na ine, cinshi tuli naco cimo mu mano icakuti imwe mwe bana baume bakwa Seruiya mu bushiku bwe lelo musanguke abalwani bandi? Bushe mu bushiku bwe lelo ebo bengepayamo umuntu mu Israeli? Bushe ine muleti nshishibe ukuti ilelo nine imfumu ya bena Israeli?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Kanshi imfumu epakutila kuli Shimei, “Tauli nakufwa.” Ne mfumu epakumulaya mu mulapo." 
2Samuel19:24 Mefibosheti, umwishikulu wakwa Saulo nao alishile mukwisa kumanya imfumu. Talesunga bwino amakasa yakwe nangufye ukubeya umwefu, talecapa ifyakufwala ukufuma ubushiku imfumu yaile no kufika ubushiku yabwelele mu cibote." 
2Samuel19:25 Ilyo afikile ukufuma ku Yerusalemu ukukonkela imfumu, imfumu yamwipusha aiti, “Bushe cinshi calengele ukuti ukaane ukunkonka, Mefibosheti?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Nao ayasuka ati, “Mwe shikulu imfumu yandi, apo ine ne mubomfi wenu ndi cilema, natile ndi nokuikakila icikakilo pali punda elyo ndi nokuninapo, nkaye pamo ne mfumu. Lelo Siba umubomfi wandi ewambepele ati ali nokucita." 
2Samuel19:27 Kabili nabepesha no mubomfi wenu kuli shikulu imfumu yandi. Shikulu imfumu yandi aba kwati ni malaika wakwa Lesa, kanshi citeni icalamuwamina mu menso yenu." 
2Samuel19:28 Pantu ulupwa lwakwa tata lonse lwalingilefye ukuti shikulu imfumu yandi ilwipaye. Lelo mwapeele umubomfi wenu incende pali abo abalya petebulo lyenu. Bushe ni nsambu nshi ndi nasho ishakupapata ku mfumu nakabili?” 
2Samuel19:29 Elyo imfumu yatila kuli ena, “Cinshi ico ulesosa nakabili? Ine napingula ukuti iwe na Siba muli nokwakana impanga.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Nao Mefibosheti atile ku mfumu, “Shilekeni abuulefye fyonse, apo imfumu nomba naifika kwisano umutende.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Basilai umwina Gileadi, nao alitentemwike ukufuma ku Rogelimu mukwabusha imfumu umumana wa Yordani elyo no kuilangilila inshila ukufuma palya." 
2Samuel19:32 Nomba Basilai ali mukote nganshi, ali ne myaka amakumi cine konse konse (80). Ewalepeelako imfumu ifyakulya, ilyo yaleikala mu Mahanaimu, pantu ali muntu umukankala nganshi." 
2Samuel19:33 Elyo imfumu epakweba Basilai aiti, “Isa twabuke bonse no kuya ikala bonse mu Yerusalemu. Kabili nakulakupeela fyonse ifyo ulekabila.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Lelo Basilai nao ayasuka imfumu ati, “Bushe imyaka yandi ishele iyakwikala umumi ni inga pakuti ningaya ku Yerusalemu pamo ne mfumu?" 
2Samuel19:35 Ine nomba ndi ne myaka cine konse konse (80). Bushe ine kuti naishiba ukulekanya pakati kakuti ici cisuma nangu ukuti ici naco cibi? Bushe umubomfi obe kuti asonda icilyo ico ndyako neco nwako? Bushe na nombaline ncili ndeumfwa amashiwi ya bakemba abaume nangu abanakashi? Cinshi umubomfi wenu engabela icakufinya shikulu imfumu yandi? 
2Samuel19:36 Umubomfi wenu alifye nokwabuka ne mfumu umumana wa Yordani intamfu iyinono. Nomba mulandu nshi imfumu inganambwila no kumpeela icilambu muli uyu musango? 
2Samuel19:37 Shi umubomfi wenu lekeni abwelelemofye, pakuti nkafwilefye mu musumba wandi mupepi ukuli inshinshi yakwa tata na mayo. Lelo shi moneni umubomfi wenu Kimuamu, eo mulekeni abuke umumana pamo na shikulu imfumu yandi. Kanshi mumucitile conse icingawama mu menso yenu.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Elyo imfumu yatile, “Kimuamu ali nokwabuka pamo na ine, elyo na ine, ndi nokumucitila conse icingakusekesha ku cinso cobe. Kabili na conse ico utemenwe ukuti ndi nokukucitila lyena nkacita.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Kanshi abantu epakwabuka no mumana wa Yordani, elyo imfumu nayo yayabuka. Imfumu epakutomona Basilai no kumupaala. Elyo Basilai abwelelamo kumwakwe ku ŋanda." 
2Samuel19:40 Ilyo imfumu yayabukila ku Giligali, Kimuamu ayabwike nankwe pamo. Impuka shonse ishakwa Yuda elyo na citika wa mpuka shonse isha bena Israeli bayafwilishe bonse mukwabusha imfumu umumana." 
2Samuel19:41 Kabili moneni bwangu bwangu abantu bonse abena Israeli baleisa ku mfumu no kulasosa kuli yena abati, “Bushe mulandu nshi bamunyinefwe abena Yuda basendela imfumu no lupwa no kubabusha umumana wa Yordani pamo pene na bantu bakwe bonse?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Elyo abantu bonse abena Yuda bayasuka abena Israeli abati, “Tucitile ici pantu imfumu muntu uupalamine na ifwe nganshi. Nomba ico mwingafulwa cinshi? Bushe ifwe tulya icili conse icifuma ku mfumu? Bushe natusendapo icintu nangu cimo ukuba icesu?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Elyo abena Israeli bayasuka abena Yuda abati, “Ifwe natukwata icakaniko ukulingana ne kumi limo mu mfumu. Kabili na cimbi nici, ifwe natukwatapo insambu ishingi pali Davidi ukucila isho imwe mukwete. Kanshi cinshi ico mwatusuulila? Bushe teifwe twali abantanshi abakulanda palwa kubwela kwakwa Davidi imfumu?” Lelo abena Yuda bayasuka bukali bukali ukucila abena Israeli." 
2Samuel20:1 Elyo kwali intalamisoka yamuntu, ishina lyakwe ni Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri, umwina Benjamini. Alilishishe ipenga no kulapunda ati, “Ifwe tatuli na cakaniko muli Davidi, tatukwetemo ne cishilano muli mwana Yese! Mwe bena Israeli bonse kabiyeni cila umo kumwakwe!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Kanshi bonse abena Israeli epakusha Davidi nokulakonka Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri. Lelo abena Yuda bena mu cishinka bashala ne mfumu yabo, ukufuma ku Yordani mpaka ku Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel20:3 Ilyo Davidi abwelele kwisano lyakwe mu Yerusalemu, abuula abakashi balya abo ashaupile mu bwinga ikumi, abo ashile mukusunga isano, ababika mu ŋanda yakubalindilamo. Alabapeela fyonse ifyo balekabila, lelo talekumana nabo iyoo. Basungilwe bucitente mpaka ubushiku bwa mfwa yabo. Baikele kwati ni bamukamfwilwa." 
2Samuel20:4 Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli Amasa ati, “Njitila abena Yuda bonse bese kuli ine mu nshiku shitatu, na iwe wine ulingile ukuba kuno kwine.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Lelo ilyo Amasa aya mukwita Yuda, akokola ukucila pa nshita imfumu yamupimine." 
2Samuel20:6 Elyo Davidi atila kuli Abishai, “Nomba Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri ali uwabonaushi ububi kuli ifwe, ukucila ububi bwakwa Abusalomu. Iwe buula abantu bakwa sokulu no kumukonka lunkwa lunkwa, epali asanga imisumba ya malinga no kupusukilamo ukufuma kuli ifwe.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Kanshi abantu bakwa Yoabu, abena Kereti, abena Peleti elyo na shonse impalume shabulamba, shafuma shaya ukulingana no kukonkomeshiwa kwakwa Abishai. Awe bafuma mu Yerusalemu mukukonka lunkwa lunkwa Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:8 Ilyo bacili pa cilibwe icikalamba icaba mu Gibeoni, Amasa aisa mukubakonkela. Yoabu afwele tumba yakwe iyabulwi, napikila mu musana ulupanga, ulwali mu citubo. Ilyo apalaminako, ulupanga lwasolomoka ukufuma mu citubo lwawa panshi." 
2Samuel20:9 Elyo Yoabu asosa kuli Amasa ati, “Bushe we munyinane, uli shani?” Nao Yoabu aikata Amasa ku mwefu ku kuboko kwa ku kulyo kukumutomona." 
2Samuel20:10 Nomba Amasa tamwene ukuti Yoabu ali no lupanga mu minwe yakwe. Yoabu epakumulasa mwifumo, na mala yapongolokela panshi. Kabili tabwekeshepo ukumulasa nakabili, Amasa afwa no kufwa. Elyo Yoabu na Abishai munyina, epakukonka lunkwa lunkwa Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:11 Awe umo uwa mu bantu bakwa Yoabu aiminina pambali ya citumbi cakwa Amasa nokusosa ati, “Uyo onse uwatemwa Yoabu, kabili uuli uwakwa Davidi, nakonke Yoabu!”" 
2Samuel20:12 Ninshi icitumbi cakwa Amasa cilefuntaukafye mu mulopa waciko mukati ka musebo. Uyu muntu amona nokuti fyonse ifita fyaimiminafye palya pene. Ilyo amona ukuti onse umuntu naiminina, epakusesha icitumbi ukucifumya mu musebo, amulalika mu mpanga, amufimba ne cakufwala." 
2Samuel20:13 Na panuma ilyo Amasa aseshiwa mu musebo, abantu bonse batwalilila pamo na Yoabu ukukonka lunkwa lunkwa Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri." 
2Samuel20:14 Uyu Sheba ninshi napita kale mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli ukufika na ku Abeli Beti Maka no kupitilila ukuya ku mpanga yonse iya bena Beri, bonse epakulongana no kumukonka." 
2Samuel20:15 Bonse abantu pamo na Yoabu bashinguluka umusumba wa Abeli Beti Maka umwali Sheba. Batulumanika imina ya fisoso fya maloba ukufika ku musumba, ukulinganafye ne linga lyabelele kunse, elyo batampa ukubolaula icibumba pakuti baciwishe." 
2Samuel20:16 Umwanakashi wamano uwali mu musumba alabilikisha ati, “Umfweni! Umfweni! Shi ebeni Yoabu ese kuno pakuti njise nande nankwe.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Nao aya kuli ena elyo amwipusha ati, “Bushe iwe niwe Yoabu?” Nao atila, “Nine wine.” Umwanakashi ati, “Umfwa kufyo umubomfi obe alesosa.” Nao Yoabu ayasuka ati, “Ndeumfwa.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Awe umwanakashi atwalilila mukusosa ati, “Mu nshiku shakale abantu balesosa abati, ‘nga ulefwaya ubwasuko busuma kabiye ku Abeli, elyo ukapwisha umulandu.’" 
2Samuel20:19 Ifwe tuli aba mutende kabili aba cishinka mu Israeli. Imwe mulefwayafye ukonaula umusumba uuli e nyina mu Israeli. Cinshi ico mulefwaila ukumina icuma ca cishilano cakwa Yawe?” 
2Samuel20:20 Yoabu nao epakwasuka ati, “Awe nacitaluke kuli ine icakumina nangu ukonaula umusumba!" 
2Samuel20:21 Uyo teo e mulandu iyoo. Umuntu uwe shina lya Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri ukufuma ku calo ca mpili ica Efulemu, eubifishe ku mfumu Davidi. Mpeni uyu wine umuntu eka, na ine nalafumako ku musumba.” Elyo umwanakashi ayasuka Yoabu ati, “Umutwe wakwe twalauposa kuli imwe pa mulu wa cibumba.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Elyo umwanakashi aya ku bantu bonse no kubalondolwela amano yakwe. Nabo epakuputula umutwe wakwa Sheba umwana wakwa Bikiri no kuuposela kuli Yoabu. Kanshi nao epakulisha ipenga, na bantu bakwe basalangana ukufuma mu musumba, cila muntu abwelelamo ku ŋanda kumwakwe. Yoabu nao abwelelamo ku mfumu mu Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel20:23 Yoabu ali e mukalamba wa fita fyonse ifya bena Israeli. Benaya umwana wakwa Yehoiyada ali nao e mukalamba pa bena Kereti na bena Peleti. 
2Samuel20:24 Adoramu nao ali kangalila wa bamulaasa. Yehoshafati umwana wakwa Ailudi nao ali ni kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo. 
2Samuel20:25 Shefa ali ni kalemba wa milandu. Sadoki na Abiyata bali ni bashimapepo. 
2Samuel20:26 Elyo Ira umwina Yairi nao ali shimapepo wakwa Davidi. 
2Samuel21:1 Mu nshiku sha kuteeka kwakwa Davidi, kwali icipowe pa myaka itatu, calebako cila mwaka. Kanshi Davidi epakwipusha Yawe. Nao Yawe amwasuka ati, “Saulo no lupwa lwakwe bacili no mulandu wakusumya umulopa, pantu balipaya abena Gibeoni.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Awe imfumu epakwita abena Gibeoni no kulanda nabo. Nomba abena Gibeoni tabali ba mu bena Israeli iyoo, lelo bena bali bena Amoli abasheleko, abo abena Israeli balapilepo umulapo ukuti bena bakabasha. Lelo Saulo mukutemwisha abena Israeli na bena Yuda, eco alefwaila ukwipaya abena Gibeoni." 
2Samuel21:3 Davidi epakwipusha abena Gibeoni ati, “Bushe ico mulefwaya ukuti mucitile cinshi? Kabili nalacita shani pakuti ningawamya pa bubifi mukuleka mukapaale icuma ca cishilano cakwa Yawe?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Abena Gibeoni nabo bamwasuka abati, “Ifwe tatwakwata nsambu shakwipusha silifa nangu golide ukufuma kuli Saulo nangu ku lupwa lwakwe. Kabili tecansambu kuli ifwe ukubuula umo umwina Israeli no kumwipaya.” Davidi akonkeshapo ukubepusha nakabili ati, “Cinshi ico mulefwaya ine ukumucitila?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Nabo kabili bayasuka imfumu ati, “Pamo ngo muntu uwatonawile kabili uwapangile no kutulofya pakuti twibako nangu ukukwatamo incende mu calo ca bena Israeli," 
2Samuel21:6 shi tulubwilenifye abana abaume bakwe cine lubali tukabepaye no kubatwala pa lwalala mukubakulikila pa cinso cakwa Yawe ku Gibea icifulo cakwa Saulo uo Yawe asalile.” Nayo imfumu epakusumina aiti, “Cisuma ndi nokubalubwila kuli imwe.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Lelo imfumu yalangulukila Mefibosheti umwana wakwa Yonatani mwana Saulo pa mulandu wa mulapo bacitile pa cinso cakwa Yawe, uwali pakati kakwa Davidi elyo na Yonatani umwana wakwa Saulo." 
2Samuel21:8 Lelo imfumu epakubuula Amoni, Mefibosheti, abana abaume babili abakwa Risipa umwana mwanakashi wakwa Aia, abo afyele kuli Saulo, pamo pene na bana abaume basano abo Merabi umwana umwanakashi wakwa Saulo afyele kuli Adirieli umwana wakwa Basilai umwina Meholati." 
2Samuel21:9 Aba bonse imfumu Davidi yabalubwila na mu maboko ya bena Gibeoni, nabo babepaya no kubatwala pa lwalala epo babakulikila pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Bonsefye cine lubali bafwilefye pamo. Baipaiwa mu nshiku shantanshi isha bulobololo bwa fisabo, pakutendeka ubulobololo bwa bale." 
2Samuel21:10 Risipa umwana umwanakashi wakwa Aia abuula insalu shabulanda no kuyanshikila icakwikalapo pa mwalala. Ukufuma pa kwamba kwa kusombola mpaka imfula yaloboka ukufuma ku mulu yalokela na pa fitumbi, Risipa talekele ifyuni fya mu lwelele fiwepo akasuba nangufye finama fya mpanga mu bushiku." 
2Samuel21:11 Baebele Davidi ifyo Risipa umwana wakwa Aia acitile, uwali umukashi wakwa Saulo uo ashaupile mu bwinga." 
2Samuel21:12 Ilyo Davidi aumfwileko, aimine aya senda amafupa yakwa Saulo pamo no mwana wakwe Yonatani ukuyafumya ku bakalamba abekalacalo ba mu Yabeshi Gileadi. Aba ebayafyushishe mu bumfisolo ukufuma mu lubansa lwa cintubwingi ulwa Beti Shani, uko Abafilisiti babakulikile, panuma yakwipaya Saulo pa Giliboa." 
2Samuel21:13 Davidi epakuleta amafupa yakwa Saulo no mwana wakwe Yonatani ukuyafumya kulya, na mafupa ya bantu balya abo baipeye mukukulikwa pa lwalala, bayalonganya pamo." 
2Samuel21:14 Bashiikile amafupa yakwa Saulo na yakwa Yonatani umwana wakwe mu nshinshi yakwa Kishi, wishi wakwa Saulo ku Sela mu calo cakwa Benjamini. Kabili bacitile fyonse ifyo imfumu ya bakonkomeshe. Elyo na panuma ya ifyo, Lesa epakwasuka amapepo, alangulukila ne calo." 
2Samuel21:15 Kabili kwali ubulwi pakati ka Bafilisiti na bena Israeli. Davidi atentemwike na bantu bakwe kukulwisha Abafilisiti. Davidi alinakile nganshi pali ubu bulwi. 
2Samuel21:16 Elyo Ishibi Benobu, umo uwa pa lupwa lwakwa Rafa, uo ifumo lya mukuba lyakwe lyafinine amashekeli imyanda itatu (300) kabili uwaipangeshe no lupanga ulupya, atile, “Ndi nokwipaya Davidi.”" 
2Samuel21:17 Lelo Abishai mwana Seruiya epakwisa kuli Davidi kukumupususha. Awe alasapo Umufilisiti uyo, amwipaya. Elyo abantu bakwa Davidi balapa pa cinso cakwe abati, “Tecakwesha nakabili ukuya na ifwe ku bulwi, epakuti icisaniko ca bena Israeli cikashima.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Nomba umuyila inshiku, ubulwi na bumbi bwabako na Bafilisiti, ku Gobu. Muli ubu bulwi Sibekai umwina Hushati aipeye Safa, uwali uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Rafa." 
2Samuel21:19 Nakabili kwali ubulwi na Bafilisiti ku Gobu, Elianani umwana wakwa Yaare Oregimu umwina Betelehemu nao aipeye Goliati umwina Gati, uwali ne fumo lya musako kwati mulando wakupikwilapo insalu." 
2Samuel21:20 Nakabili ku bulwi na bumbi ubwacitike ku cifulo ca Gati, kwaliko icimuntu icalunduka nganshi. Cali ne minwe mutanda kuli cila cisansa, kabili cali ne fikondo mutanda kuli cila lukasa, fyonse pamo fyali amakumi yabili na fine (24). Nao wine ali uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Rafa." 
2Samuel21:21 Kanshi ilyo ena asebenye abena Israeli, Yonatani mwana Shimeya, munyina Davidi alimwipeye." 
2Samuel21:22 Aba bonse bane bali ba mu lupwa lwakwa Rafa mu Gati, kabili bonse bafwile ku minwe yakwa Davidi na bantu bakwe." 
2Samuel22:1 Davidi aimbile amashiwi ya muli ulu lwimbo kuli Yawe, ilyo Yawe amupokolwele ku balwani bakwe bonse na ku kuboko kwakwa Saulo. Davidi atile," 
2Samuel22:2 “Yawe e cilibwe candi, ilinga lyandi kabili kapokolola wandi." 
2Samuel22:3 Lesa wandi e cilibwe candi, umo ine nguba, ni nkwela yandi kabili e lusengo lwe pusukilo lyandi. Ena e maka yandi, icubo candi, kabili ipusukilo lyandi ukufuma ku bantu abalufyengo, abo mumpusushako." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndekuuta kuli Yawe uwalinga ukulumbanya, lyena napususka na ku balwani bandi." 
2Samuel22:5 “Pantu amatamba ya mfwa yalinshingulwike, ne mikuku yabonaushi yalintiinishe." 
2Samuel22:6 Imyando ya ku calo ca bafwa yalimpombele. Elyo ne fiteyo fya mfwa fyali pa ntanshi yandi. 
2Samuel22:7 Mu kupelelwa kwandi nalilile kuli Yawe, kuli Lesa wandi eko nalilile. Ukufuma mwi Tempele emo aumfwilile ishiwi lyandi. Umusowa wandi waumfwika na mu matwi yakwe." 
2Samuel22:8 “Isonde lyalitenkene no kusunkana, imifula ya myulu yasunkana. Fyalitenkene pantu alikalipe." 
2Samuel22:9 Mu myona yakwe mwafumine icushi. Mu kanwa kakwe mwafumine umulilo uoca, na kuli ena kwafuma umusolilo." 
2Samuel22:10 Afumine ku mulu no kwisa ikila pano panshi, imfifi ikulu nganshi yali panshi ya makasa yakwe." 
2Samuel22:11 Kabili aninine na pali kerubi no kupupuka. Amonekele ninshi ali pa mapindo ya mwela. 
2Samuel22:12 Alengele imfifi ukumushinguluka monse monse, na makumbi ayatikama kwati kutulumana kwa menshi." 
2Samuel22:13 Ukufuma mu lubuuto lwa pa ntanshi yakwe, amafito yayamba ukwaka umulilo." 
2Samuel22:14 Yawe abulukuta nge mfula mu mulu, ne shiwi lya Wapulamo lyaumfwika." 
2Samuel22:15 Aposa imifwi no kusalanganya abalwani, aponya ukubyata kwa nkuba no kubafulunganya." 
2Samuel22:16 Kabili panshi ya bemba palamoneka, elyo ne mifula ye sonde yashala pa mbilibili, pa mulandu wa kukalipa kwakwa Yawe, na ku maka ya kupema kwa mu myona yakwe." 
2Samuel22:17 “Elyo atambalike ukuboko kwakwe ukufuma mu mulu, anjikata no kunsenda. Angabwile ukufuma mu menshi ayengi." 
2Samuel22:18 Ampokolwele ku balwani bandi abamaka, ku bampata kabili abancila amaka nganshi." 
2Samuel22:19 Banjimine mu bushiku bwa cinkunka candi, lelo Yawe ali e shintililo lyandi." 
2Samuel22:20 Amfumishemo no kumbika apapabuka, andubula no kundubula pa mulandu wakuti alintemwa ine." 
2Samuel22:21 “Yawe nancitila ukulingana no bulungami bwandi. Ukulingana na bukaele bwa maboko yandi, Yawe nanambula." 
2Samuel22:22 Pantu ine ndacita ififwaya Yawe, kabili nshabala nsangukila Lesa wandi." 
2Samuel22:23 Nshafumako ku mafunde yakwe yonse ayaba ku ntanshi yandi, kabili ku fipope fyakwe nshatalukako." 
2Samuel22:24 Kanshi ine ndi uwabula akalema ku cinso cakwa Yawe, naliitalusha ne mwine ku bubifi." 
2Samuel22:25 Eico Yawe nanambula ukulingana no bulungami bwandi. Kabili ukulingana no bukaele ubo amona muli ine pa cinso cakwe. 
2Samuel22:26 “Ku wacishinka, na iwe we mwine ulailanga uwacishinka. Kabili ku bakaele, na iwe we mwine ulailanga uwakaele." 
2Samuel22:27 Kuli abo abapwililika, na iwe we mwine ulailanga ukuba uwapwililika. Lelo kuli abo abapondama, na iwe we mwine ulailanga uwacenjela." 
2Samuel22:28 Iwe upususha abaicefya, lelo amenso yobe yalola pa bacilumba pakuti ubanashe." 
2Samuel22:29 Mu cinefye ala niwe cisaniko candi, we Yawe. Kabili Lesa wandi ewalula imfifi yandi ukuba ulubuuto." 
2Samuel22:30 Ku maka yobe kuti nasansa impuka ya mulalo, kabili nga cakuti ndi na Lesa, kuti nawisha ilinga." 
2Samuel22:31 Lelo Lesa ena, inshila yakwe yalilungama, ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe lyacishinka. Ena ni nkwela kuli bonse abafisama muli ena." 
2Samuel22:32 “Nga Lesa umbi nani, uwingacila pali Yawe? Kabili uwakosa nge cilibwe nani, ukucila pali Lesa wesu?" 
2Samuel22:33 Ala ni Lesa eumpangasha amaka, kabili eulenga inshila yandi ukuwama." 
2Samuel22:34 Eulenga makasa yandi ukuba nga makasa ya nsebula, eungafwa ukwiminina apasansama pa mpili." 
2Samuel22:35 Alasambilisha ne minwe yandi ku bulwi, no kukosha amaboko yandi pakukana ubuta bwa mukuba." 
2Samuel22:36 Kabili walimpeela inkwela ye pusukilo. Elyo ukwafwilisha kobe kuli ine ekwalenga ukuti njishibikwe. 
2Samuel22:37 Kabili walikusha inshila umwakupita intampulo shandi, na makasa yandi tayashetuka." 
2Samuel22:38 Nakunkunike abalwani bandi no kubonaula, kabili nshapilibukile kunuma mpaka nabapwisha." 
2Samuel22:39 Napwishishefye bonse umupwilapo, icakuti bafilwa ukwima, bawa na pa nkasa shandi." 
2Samuel22:40 Pantu walimpangeshe amaka yakulwilako, walenga na balwani bandi ukukontama pa nkasa shandi." 
2Samuel22:41 Walengele na balwani bandi bamfutatile inuma shabo pakufulumuka, kabili abampata bena nabonaula." 
2Samuel22:42 Bafwaile uwakubafwa, lelo takwali nangu umo uwakubapususha. Balilile kuli Yawe, nao teti abasuke nakalya." 
2Samuel22:43 Nalibonawile baba ngo lukungu lwa panshi. Kabili nabanyantaula no kubakandawila baba kwati matipa ya mu musebo. 
2Samuel22:44 “Walimpuswishe ukufuma ku bantu bandi abansangukila. Wansungilile kwati nine mukalamba wa mishobo. Abantu abo nshaishiba, ebalemombela." 
2Samuel22:45 Abenafyalo baisa mukumpakata. Ilyo lyonse baumfwa cimo kuli ine, banakila." 
2Samuel22:46 Bena bonse baba abatompoka imitima, besa baletutuma ukufuma mu malinga yabo." 
2Samuel22:47 “Nakalebalika kuli Yawe! Napaalwe na matotelo Icilibwe candi! Asumbulwe Lesa Icilibwe ce pusukilo lyandi! 
2Samuel22:48 E Lesa uunandwilako, uulenga imishobo ukuba pa nkasa shandi." 
2Samuel22:49 Kabili uumpususha ku balwani bandi. We Yawe nimwe unsumbula mu mulu ukucila abalwani bandi. Wandubula ukufuma ku balwani bandi abafimfulunganya. 
2Samuel22:50 “Eico kanshi ine ndifye nokulalumbanya iwe we Yawe pakati ka mishobo ya benafyalo. Ine ndifye no kulakwimbila ishamalumbo ishe shina lyobe. 
2Samuel22:51 Ulalenga imfumu yobe ukucimfya, kabili ulalanga uluse ulushipwa ku wasubwa obe, kuli Davidi pamo na ku bufyashi bwakwe pe na pe.”" 
2Samuel23:1 Aya e mashiwi yakulekelesha ayakwa Davidi. “Ubusesemo bwakwa Davidi mwana Yese, ubusesemo bwa muntu uwasansabalikwa no Wapulamo. Umuntu umusubwa wakwa Lesa wakwa Yakobo, kabili kemba wa nyimbo sha bena Israeli." 
2Samuel23:2 “Umupashi wakwa Yawe ulandila muli ine. Kabili amashiwi yakwe yabafye pa lulimi lwandi. 
2Samuel23:3 Lesa wakwa Israeli nalanda, Icilibwe cakwa Israeli casosa kuli ine aciti, ‘Umuntu uuteeka abantu mukulungika, kabili uuteeka mukatiina kakwa Lesa," 
2Samuel23:4 aba kwati lubuuto lwa kacelo, kwati ilyo akasuba katula ukushili na makumbi, icilenga umulemfwe ukubengeshima pesonde.’" 
2Samuel23:5 “Bushe iŋanda yandi tayaba ifi kuli Lesa? Pantu alipangana na ine icipangano ca pe na pe? Alicilondolola bwino muli fyonse kabili icakosa. Bushe takalete ipusukilo lyandi no kucita conse ico mfwaya? 
2Samuel23:6 Lelo abantu babifi bena baba nge myunga ya mu matololo iyakuposafye, iyishingakuswa ne minwe." 
2Samuel23:7 Elyo umuntu onse pakuikatako, afwile ukubomfya icela nangu umusako we fumo, lyena kuti ayocela apo pene ibelele.”" 
2Samuel23:8 Aya e mashina ya mpalume shabulwi shakwa Davidi: Yoshebu Basebeti umwina Takemoni, umukalamba wa baume bene bene batatu. Aimishe ifumo lyakwe mukulwisha abantu imyanda cine konse konse (800), abo aipeye pa muku umofye." 
2Samuel23:9 Kabili uwamukonkelepo pali bumpalume ali ni Eleasa umwana umwaume wakwa Dodo umwina Ahoyi. Pamo nga umo uwali pa mpalume shitatu, ali na Davidi ilyo baile sonsomba Abafilisiti uko balongene ku bulwi ku Pasi Damimu. Elyo abena Israeli bafulumuka." 
2Samuel23:10 Awe Eleasa wena ashipa, alaipaya na Bafilisiti mpakafye amaboko yakwe yanakuka, ne minwe yalambatila ku lupanga. Nao Yawe alenga nokuti bacimfye apakalamba pa bushiku bulya. Awe ne fita fyonse fyabwelela na kuli Eleasa, kukubuulako ifitapwa ku bafwa." 
2Samuel23:11 Uwakonka pali Eleasa ni Shamaya umwana mwaume wakwa Age umwina Harari. Ilyo Abafilisiti balongene pamo mu mpuka shabo pa cifulo cimo apali ibala lye landa, abena Israeli balifulumwikepo." 
2Samuel23:12 Lelo Shamaya wena ashipa, aiminina na pakati ke bala. Alicingilila, elyo aipaya Abafilisiti. Awe Yawe nao alengele ukuti bacimfye apakalamba." 
2Samuel23:13 Elyo batatu pa ntungulushi amakumi yatatu (30), batentemwike baisa kuli Davidi ku lucengo lwa Adulamu, mu nshiku shabulobololo, ninshi impuka ya Bafilisiti nabacita inkambi mwishika lya Refaimu." 
2Samuel23:14 Pa nshita ilya Davidi ali mwilinga, elyo akamba ka bashilika ba Bafilisiti nako kaleikala mu Betelemu." 
2Samuel23:15 Awe Davidi nao alefwaisha amenshi elyo asosa ati, “Yangu ifyo ningatemwa nga cakuti umo andetelako amenshi yakunwa ukufuma mu cishima ca mupepi ne mpongolo ya ku Betelehemu.”" 
2Samuel23:16 Awe impalume shitatu shaima, shalalanya pakati ka mipaka ya Bafilisiti, shatapa na menshi ukufuma mu cishima caba mupepi ne mpongolo ya Betelehemu no kusenda ukutwala kuli Davidi. Lelo Davidi akaana ukunwa amenshi. Mu cifulo cakunwa Davidi ayetila kukuyatuula ku cinso cakwa Yawe." 
2Samuel23:17 Atile ati, “Yawe nampusushe, nacibe ukutali ici cintu! Bushe uku tekunwa umulopa wa bantu abaile nabashitika ubumi bwabo abene kukufwa?” Kanshi Davidi akaana ukunwa. Efyo ishi mpalume shitatu shacitile." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishai munyina wakwa Yoabu umwana mwaume wakwa Seruiya ewali umukalamba pali ishi mpalume shitatu. Ena ewaimishe ifumo lyakwe alasaula abalwani imyanda itatu (300) no kubepaya. Elyo aisa ba ne shina ilyalumbuka nga aba bene batatu. 
2Samuel23:19 Bushe ena tewalumbwike nganshi ukucila pali batatu? Icakuti aisa ba no mukalamba wabo, nangu cali ukuti tapendelwe pakati kabo." 
2Samuel23:20 Benaya umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoiyada, umwina Kabiseli, ali ni mpalume yapilikita kukulwa, umuntu uwacitile ifintu ifingi ifyabulamba. Aipeye abantu abapambana abena Moabu. Elyo kabili atentemukila mu cilindi ninshi kuli na menshi makasa, no kwipayamo inkalamo." 
2Samuel23:21 Kabili aipaya no mwina Egupto uwalunduka nganshi. Nangu umwina Egupto akwete ifumo mu minwe yakwe, Benaya nao aile kuli ena ne nkontofye. Amusompola ifumo mu minwe, amwipaila na kwifumo lyakwe line." 
2Samuel23:22 Efintu ifyo Banaya umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoiyada acitile. Uyu nao wine ishina lyakwe lyali ilyaishibikwa kwati ni mpalume shitatu isha bantu. 
2Samuel23:23 Ali uwacindikwa nganshi ukucila pali onse uwa pa makumi yatatu (30), nomba tapendelwe pali balya batatu. Elyo Davidi epakumucita ukuba kangalila wa bakalinda wakwe." 
2Samuel23:24 Impalume shimbi isha mu ba makumi yatatu (30) ni aba: Asaeli munyina wakwa Yoabu, Elianani umwana mwaume wakwa Dodo umwina Betelemu," 
2Samuel23:25 Shamaya umwina Harodi, Elika umwina Harodi" 
2Samuel23:26 Helesi umwina Paliti, Ira umwana mwaume wakwa Ikeshi umwina Tekoa," 
2Samuel23:27 Abiesa umwina Anatoti, Mebunayi umwina Hushati," 
2Samuel23:28 Salimoni umwina Ahoyi, Maharayi umwina Netofa," 
2Samuel23:29 Helebu umwana mwaume wakwa Baanaya umwina Netofa, Itai umwana mwaume wakwa Ribai umwina Gibea wa ku Benjamini," 
2Samuel23:30 Benaya umwina Piratoni, Hidayi wa ku tumimana twa ku Gashi," 
2Samuel23:31 Abi Aliboni umwina Aribati, Asimafeti umwina Baharumi," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba umwina Shaaliboni abana baume bakwa Yesheni," 
2Samuel23:33 Yonatani umwana mwaume wakwa Shamaya umwina Harari, Ahiamu umwana mwaume wakwa Sharari umwina Harari," 
2Samuel23:34 Elifeleti umwana mwaume wakwa Ahasibai umwina Maakati, Eliamu umwana mwaume wakwa Aitofeli umwina Gilo," 
2Samuel23:35 Hesiro umwina Kameli, Palai umwina Aliba," 
2Samuel23:36 Igali umwana mwaume wakwa Natani umwina Soba, umwana mwaume wakwa Hagiri," 
2Samuel23:37 Seleki umwina Amoni, Naharai umwina Beroti, kasenda wa fyanso fyakwa Yoabu umwana mwaume wakwa Seruiya," 
2Samuel23:38 Ira umwina Itira, Garebu umwina Itira" 
2Samuel23:39 elyo na Uria umwina Hiti. Bonse pamo bali amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37). 
2Samuel24:1 Kabili ubukali bwakwa Yawe bwabwekeshepo ukwisa pa bena Israeli. Awe aluminisha Davidi pakuti abaletelele, amweba ati, “Ima kabiye uye penda abena Israeli elyo na bena Yuda.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Elyo Davidi epakweba Yoabu ne ntungulushi sha fita fyali nankwe ati, “Ima kabiyeni piteni mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli ukufuma ku Dani ukufika ku Beresheba no kupenda abantu pakuti njishibe bali banga.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Lelo Yoabo nao ayasuka imfumu ati, “Shi Yawe Lesa obe engafushishako impuka, ukuti shibe imiku umwanda umo (100). Kabili epakulenga na menso yakwa shikulu imfumu yamone ici. Nomba cinshi shikulu imfumu yandi ilefwaila ukucitila ici cintu?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Awe imfumu yapatikisha Yoabu ne ntungulushi sha fita, baima baya mukupenda abantu bonse aba mitundu ya bena Israeli." 
2Samuel24:5 Panuma yakwabuka umumana wa Yordani, bacita inkambi mupepi na Aroeli, ku musumba uwabela ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, uwabela pakati ka mukonko, elyo bayapita ku Gadi no kutwalilila ukuya ku Yaseri." 
2Samuel24:6 Elyo baya ku Gileadi na ku calo ca Talitimu Hodishi, na ku Dani Yani no kushingulukila na ku Sidoni." 
2Samuel24:7 Kabili baile ukulungama ku musumba we linga wa Turi elyo na kuli yonse imisumba ya bena Hifi na bena Kenani. Mukulekelesha elyo baile ku Beresheba mu matololo ya Negebu mu calo ca bena Yuda. 
2Samuel24:8 Cilya bapwa ukupitana mu calo conse pa myeshi pabula ne nshiku amakumi yabili (20) babwelelamo ku Yerusalemu. 
2Samuel24:9 Yoabu nao apeela ku mfumu impendwa ya bantu abo bapendele. Mu bena Israeli ababulamba bali amakana imyanda cine konse konse (800,000), abena Yuda nabo bali amakana imyanda isano (500,000) abengabomfya ulupanga." 
2Samuel24:10 Davidi aumfwile umutima wakunta panuma yakupenda abantu ababulamba. Elyo asosa kuli Yawe ati, “Ine nimbifya apakalamba paco ncitile. Nomba we Yawe, nakupapata, fumya umulandu uyu pa mubomfi obe, pantu ico ncitile cabuwelewele.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Ilyo Davidi ashibwike mu lucelo lwakonkelepo, kwafuma ishiwi kuli Yawe ukweba Gadi kasesema, kamona wakwa Davidi aliti," 
2Samuel24:12 “Kabiye kebe Davidi auti, ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Nalakupeela ifya kusalapo fitatu. Salapo cimo ico ulefwaya, ico mfwile ukucita kuli iwe.’”" 
2Samuel24:13 Kanshi nao Gadi epakuya kuli Davidi no kumweba ati, “Bushe ulefwaya pa myaka itatu kukese icipowe mu calo? Nangu pa myeshi itatu ukalefulumukafye abalwani bobe ilyo bakukonka lunkwa lunkwa? Nangu ukuti icikuko pa nshiku shitatu cikese onaula icalo cobe? Kanshi nomba tontonkanya, unjebe icakuya eba uuntumine.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Elyo Davidi ayasuka Gadi ati, “Awe kwena ndi uwacucutika nganshi. Shi katuibikefye mu minwe yakwa Yawe, pantu uluse lwakwe lukalamba nganshi. Lelo mwileka mponene mu minwe ya bantunse.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Kanshi Yawe epakutuma icikuko pa bena Israeli, ukufuma pali lulya lucelo ukushinta na pakupwa kwa nshita iyapiminwe. Abantu abafwile ukufuma ku Dani ukufika na ku Beresheba bali amakana amakumi cine lubali (70,000)." 
2Samuel24:16 Lelo ilyo malaika atambalike ukuboko pa Yerusalemu kukuonaula, Yawe nao epakulangulukila abantu pa mulandu wa macushi. Aeba malaika uwaleipaya abantu ati, “Capwa! Bwesha ukuboko kobe.” Ninshi malaika wakwa Yawe ali pa lubansa lwakutwilapo ulwakwa Arauna umwina Yebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Ilyo Davidi amona malaika uwaleipaya abantu, asosa kuli Yawe ati, “Ala ne wabifishe nine no kulufyanya. Lelo aba ni mpaangafye. Ni finshi bacitile? Uleke ukuboko kobe kube pali ine no lupwa lwandi.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Pa bushiku bwine ubu, Gadi aile kuli Davidi nokutila kuli ena, “Ima kabiye mukukuulila Yawe ubulambo pa lubansa lwakutwilapo ulwakwa Arauna umwina Yebusi.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Davidi nao epakuya, pamo ngefyo Yawe akonkomeshe ukupitila muli Gadi." 
2Samuel24:20 Ilyo Arauna alolesha no kumona imfumu na bantu baiko baleisa kuli ena, afumina panse no kukontama pa cinso ca mfumu, ashimpa ne mpumi panshi." 
2Samuel24:21 Elyo Arauna asosa ati, “Mulandu nshi shikulu imfumu yaishila ku mubomfi wenu?” Davidi nao ayasuka ati, “Naisa kukushita ulubansa lobe ulwakutwilapo, apakuti tukuulile Yawe ubulambo, pakuti icikuko cipwe ku bantu.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Awe Arauna ayasuka Davidi ati, “Shi, shikulu imfumu yandi naibuule icaisekesha no kutuula kuli Yawe. Moneni iŋombe ishilume ishi, ishakutuula ilambo lya cakoca. Kabili moneni imilando yakutwilako elyo na makoli ya ŋombe aya, e nkuni." 
2Samuel24:23 Moneni fyonse ifi, mwe mfumu, Arauna apeela kuli imwe.” Elyo kabili asosa ati “Shi Yawe Lesa obe engapokelela ilambo lyobe.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Lelo imfumu yayasuka Arauna aiti, “Iyoo ine ndefwayafye ukushita. Ine nshilefwaya ukutuula ku mfumu Lesa wandi amalambo yakoca ayo nshishitile iyoo.” Kanshi Davidi epakushita ulubansa lwakutwilapo. Ashita ne ŋombe ishilume no kulipila indalama amashekeli amakumi yasano (50) aya silifa pali fyonse." 
2Samuel24:25 Davidi akuulile Yawe ubulambo kulya no kutuula amalambo ya cakoca na yakwampana. Elyo Yawe aumfwile amapepo mwipunda lya calo, ne cikuko pa bena Israeli capwa." 
1Kings1:1 Imfumu Davidi yakota no kuba ne myaka iyingi icakuti yalakaana no kumfwa icikabilila nangu baifimba ifyakufimbana. 
1Kings1:2 Eico ababomfi baiko batila kuli ena, “Natufwaye umukashana uushatala opwa uwakuti aleikala nankwe, alebomba umulimo wa kusunga imfumu. Ena akulasendama kumbali pakuti imfumu ileumfwako icikabilila.”" 
1Kings1:3 Elyo bafwailisha mu calo conse ica Israeli mpaka basanga umukashana umusuma nganshi uwe shina lya Abishagi, umwina Shunemu, eo basenda no kuleta ku mfumu." 
1Kings1:4 Uyu mukashana ali umusuma nganshi kanshi ewayambile ukulabomba umulimo wakusunga imfumu, lelo imfumu tayamwishibe mu nshila ya cupo." 
1Kings1:5 Nomba Adoniya, uyo nyina ali ni Hagiti, aima no kulanda ati, “Nine nalaba imfumu.” Epakuiteyanishisha amaceleta na bakabalwe elyo na bantu abaume amakumi yasano (50) abakutangila pa ntanshi yakwe." 
1Kings1:6 Lelo wishi tatalile amwipusha ukuti, “Nga kanshi cinshi ulecitila ifi?” Ali umwana uwayemba nganshi elyo ewakonkelepo Abusalomu mukufyalwa." 
1Kings1:7 Adoniya ayambile ukumfwana na Yoabu mwana Seruiya elyo na shimapepo ishina lyakwe ni Abiyata. Aba ebamupeele icikoselesho. 
1Kings1:8 Lelo shimapepo uwe shina lya Sadoki, Benaya mwana Yehoiyada, kasesema uwe shina lya Natani, Shimei elyo na Rei pamo pene ne mpalume shabulwi sha imfumu Davidi, bena tabamukonkele Adoniya." 
1Kings1:9 Elintu Adoniya atuula ilambo lya mpaanga, iŋombe elyo ne fiponti ifyaina pa cilibwe ca Soheleti mupepi na ku Eni Rogeli. Aitako na bamunyina bonse abana ba mfumu abaume, na baume bonse aba mu calo ca Yuda ababomfi ba kwisano." 
1Kings1:10 Nomba Natani kasesema, Benaya, impalume shabulwi ishakulinda imfumu elyo na munyina Solomoni bena tabetileko." 
1Kings1:11 Elyo Natani aipwishe Batisheba no kumweba ati, “Bushe tawishibe iwe ukuti Adoniya, mwana Hagiti, naibika pa bufumu ukwabula ukuti imfumu Davidi ishibe?" 
1Kings1:12 Eico nomba leka nkupandeko amano pakuti upusushe umweo obe elyo no mweo wa mwana obe Solomoni. 
1Kings1:13 Kabiye ku mfumu Davidi uye wipushe auti, ‘Kanabesa we mfumu yandi bushe tekuli ine ne musha obe walapile auti, umwana obe Solomoni eukapyana pa bufumu kabili eukekala pa cipuna candi? Nga kanshi Adoniya aba shani imfumu?’" 
1Kings1:14 Na ine nalaisa lingafye lilya line ucili ulelanda ne mfumu elyo nyingile nokwisa suminisha fyonse ifyo ulelanda.” 
1Kings1:15 Nao Batisheba epakwingila mu muputule umwali imfumu umo umukashana Abishagi alesungila imfumu. Pali iyi nshita ninshi yalikota nganshi. 
1Kings1:16 Ilyo aingila Batisheba afukama no kutota ku mfumu. Elyo imfumu yamwipusha aiti, “Cinshi ico ulefwaya?”" 
1Kings1:17 Nao ayasuka ati, “We mfumu yandi, niwe walapile kuli Yawe Lesa obe ukuti, ‘Solomoni umwana wandi eukapyana pa bufumu kabili eukekala pa cipuna candi.’" 
1Kings1:18 Nomba moneni, Adoniya euli pa bufumu ilyo iwe we mfumu tawishibepo nelyo cimo." 
1Kings1:19 Adoniya natuula ne lambo lya ŋombe ishingi, ne fiponti ifingi ifyaina elyo ne mpaanga ishingi. Na ku mitebeto naitako abana ba mfumu bonse abaume, shimapepo Abiyata, Yoabu umukalamba wa fita, lelo tetilekofye umwana obe Solomoni." 
1Kings1:20 Kanabesa we mfumu yandi, icalo conse ica Israeli ciposele amenso pali iwe pakuti cishibe uuli nokupyana pa bufumu." 
1Kings1:21 Pantu, ilyo shikulu we mfumu yandi ukaya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyobe, ine no mwana wandi Solomoni bakatucita ngo tupondo.”" 
1Kings1:22 Ilyo Batisheba acili alelondolwela imfumu amashiwi, kasesema Natani nao afika mwisano." 
1Kings1:23 Elyo ababomfi baeba imfumu abati, “Natani kasesema aisa.” Natani aingila umwali imfumu elyo atota ninshi nakontamike cinso." 
1Kings1:24 Natani elyo asosa ati, “Kanabesa we mfumu yandi, bushe niwe upeele cipope cakuti Adoniya eo apyane pa bufumu, kabili eo akabe no wakwikala pa cipuna cobe?" 
1Kings1:25 Lelo line acima no kuya tuula ilambo lya ŋombe ishingi, ifiponti ifyaina elyo ne mpaanga. Naitako na bana ba mfumu abaume bonse, abakalamba ba fita fya nkondo elyo na shimapepo Abiyata. Na ino ine nshita ndelanda elyo balelya no kunwa pamo pene nankwe, balelanda na mashiwi yakuti, ‘Ube no mweo wamuyayaya we mfumu Adoniya.’" 
1Kings1:26 Lelo ine ne musha wenu, Sadoki shimapepo, Benaya mwana Yehoiyada elyo no mubomfi obe Solomoni bena tapali uo betileko kuli uyu umutebeto." 
1Kings1:27 Bushe ici cintu niwe kanabesa we mfumu ucitile ukwabula ukwishibisha ababomfi bobe umuntu uuli nokwikala pa cipuna cobe we mfumu?” 
1Kings1:28 Elyo imfumu Davidi yatila, “Njitileniko Batisheba.” Nao aisa nokwisa ingila umwali imfumu aiminina pa cinso caiko." 
1Kings1:29 Elyo imfumu yalanda amashiwi yamulapo aiti, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe umumi, uwampususha no kumfumya mu mafya yonse," 
1Kings1:30 ine pa bushiku bwa lelo nalafikilishapo ifyo nakulaile mwishina lyakwa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli ukuti, ‘Solomoni umwana obe euli nokumpyana pa bufumu kabili euli nokwisa ikala na pa cipuna cino cine.’”" 
1Kings1:31 Awe Batisheba akontamika icinso cakwe panshi, afukama na pa cinso ca mfumu alanda nokuti, “Ube no mweo wamuyayaya kanabesa we mfumu Davidi.”" 
1Kings1:32 Elyo imfumu Davidi yatila, “Njitileniko Sadoki shimapepo, Natani kasesema elyo na Benaya mwana Yehoiyada.” Ilyo baingila apali imfumu, elyo yabeba aiti," 
1Kings1:33 “Buuleni ababomfi bandi bonse, muye nabo mubike no mwana wandi Solomoni pali punda wandi mumutwale ku Gihoni." 
1Kings1:34 Kulya eko Sadoki shimapepo na Natani kasesema baye musuba ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli. Muye lisha ne penga no kupunda amuti, ‘Abe no mweo wamuyayaya imfumu Solomoni.’" 
1Kings1:35 Na pakwisa mwise nankwe pakuti eo ese ekale pa cipuna candi no kwamba ukuteeka. Nimusonta ukuti abe mfumu ya calo ca Israeli elyo na Yuda.” 
1Kings1:36 Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ayasuka imfumu ati, “Ameni! Lekeni Yawe, Lesa wakwa kanabesa imfumu yandi, asuminishe icacitwa." 
1Kings1:37 Ngefyo Yawe ali na kanabesa imfumu yandi efyo abe na kuli Solomoni, no kulenga icipuna cakwe cikwatishe amaka ukucila na pa cipuna cakwa kanabesa imfumu Davidi.”" 
1Kings1:38 Awe Sadoki shimapepo, Natani kasesema, Benaya mwana Yehoiyada, abena Kereti na bena Peleti baima baya bika Solomoni pali punda wa mfumu Davidi bamushindika na ku Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Sadoki shimapepo epakubuula amafuta ayali mu lusengo ukufuma mwitenti lyakwa Lesa no kusuba Solomoni. Elyo baisa lisha ne penga na bantu bonse baisa punda abati, “Abe no mweo uwamuyayaya imfumu Solomoni.”" 
1Kings1:40 Elyo na bantu bonse baima bayamba no kumukonka, balelisha imitolilo no kusekelela ukukalamba icalengele nokuti umushili usunkane pa mulandu wa ciunda." 
1Kings1:41 Cilyafye baba mukupwa ukulya, Adoniya na bantu bonse abo aitile ku mutebeto baumfwa ificitike. Nomba Yoabu pakumfwa iciunda ce penga epakwipusha ati, “Bushe icongo conse icileumfwika mukati ka musumba cilolele mwi?”" 
1Kings1:42 Lintu Yoabu talapwisha no kulanda, Yonatani mwana Abiyata shimapepo afika apo bali. Adoniya amupokelela amweba ati, “Ingila, pantu umuntu umucindami nga iwe afwile aleta amashiwi ayasuma nganshi.”" 
1Kings1:43 Yonatani ayasuka ati, “Awe iyoo! Icilipo kutila kanabesa imfumu Davidi isontele Solomoni ukuba imfumu." 
1Kings1:44 Imfumu itumine pamo nankwe Sadoki shimapepo, Natani kasesema, Benaya mwana Yehoiyada, abena Kereti elyo na bena Peleti, ebaciya nankwe, nabamuninika na pali punda wa mfumu." 
1Kings1:45 Elyo Sadoki shimapepo na Natani kasesema nabaya musuba ukuba imfumu ku Gihoni. Ukufuma uko euko beshile baleyaula utupundu, na bantu bonse mu musumba nabaponenamo. Kanshi e ico congo muleumfwa." 
1Kings1:46 Ne cikulishepo nomba cakuti Solomoni naya ikala na pa cipuna cabufumu. 
1Kings1:47 Elyo na bacilolo bonse aba kwisano nabesa mukutasha kanabesa imfumu Davidi abati, ‘Cawama Lesa obe alenga ne cipuna cakwa Solomoni cikwatishe amaka ukucila icipuna cobe.’ Nayo imfumu yakontamika icinso ninshi ili pa musengele yatampa ukupepa." 
1Kings1:48 Akonkanyapo no kupepa ati, ‘Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, uwasuminisha ukuti amenso yandi yamone uwakwikala pa cipuna candi ilelo.’”" 
1Kings1:49 Pakumfwa ifi fyonse abantu bonse abo Adoniya aitile baikatwa no mwenso, na bonse epakwima basalangana." 
1Kings1:50 Lelo Adoniya pa mulandu wakutiina Solomoni, aima ayakonena ku nsengo sha ku bulambo." 
1Kings1:51 Elyo Solomoni baisa mweba abati, “Munonko alekutiina pakuba imfumu. Ena nabutuka ele konena na ku nsengo shabulambo eko ekele. Alandile nokutila, ‘Ndefwaya imfumu Solomoni ilape kuli ine ukuti tayanjipaye ku lupanga.’”" 
1Kings1:52 Solomoni epakwasuka ati, “Nga cakuti ali nokuilanga ukuba umuntu wine wine, takwakafume umushishi nangu umo ku mutwe wakwe ukuponena panshi, lelo nga cakuti ububifi bwasangwa muli ena ninshi lyena ali nokufwa.”" 
1Kings1:53 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yatumine abantu, nabo baya musenda bamuleta ukufuma ku bulambo. Adoniya epakwisa ku mfumu Solomoni aisa kontamika umutwe no kutota. Nao Solomoni epakumweba ati, “Kabiye kumobe.”" 
1Kings2:1 Ilyo Davidi apalamine ku nshita yakufwa aitile umwana wakwe Solomoni no kumweba amashiwi aya ati," 
1Kings2:2 “Ine nomba napalamina ukuya ku nshila iyilolako ifikolwe fyonse. Eico ndefwaya ube umuntu uwakosa kabili umwaume uwashipa. 
1Kings2:3 Ufwile ukuba umuntu uwakucita ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe Lesa obe afwaya. Uleenda mu nshila shakwe no kubaka amafunde yakwe ne fyebo fyakwe ne fipope fyakwe, na fyonse ifyo amafunde yafwaya ngefyo calembwa mu mafunde yakwa Mose. Ici cikalenga ukuti ukalepaalwa muli fyonse ifyo ulecita na konse uko uleya." 
1Kings2:4 Kabili ni pakuti Yawe akabe uwakufikilisha ubulayo bwakwe kuli ine, ukulingana nefyo alandile ukuti, ‘Abana bobe nga batekanya mu bwikashi bwabo, na pa cinso candi bakaleenda abapetama ne mitima yabo elyo na mano yabo yonse, ninshi tawakatale aubulisha umwana mwaume uwakwikala pa bufumu mu Israeli.’" 
1Kings2:5 “Nomba iwe walishiba bwino ifintu ifyo Yoabu mwana Seruiya acitile kuli ine ilyo aipeye abakalamba ba fita fya nkondo ifya bena Israeli babili, Abune mwana Neri na Amasa mwana Yete. Alibepeye no kusumya umulopa wabo pa nshita ya mutende kwati ni nshita ya nkondo. Abuulile no mulopa wabo ashinga ku mushipi uo afwele mu musana elyo na ku ndyato shali ku makasa yakwe." 
1Kings2:6 Eico ukamucitile umwabela amano yobe, icikulufye wikaleka akaifwile imfwa yamutende." 
1Kings2:7 “Lelo ukalange uluse kuli bamwana Basilai uwa ku Gileadi, no kubalenga ukuti bakalelyafye nobe petebulo lyobe. Bena balingafwile pali ilya nshita nafulumwike kuli munonko Abusalomu." 
1Kings2:8 “Eico ibukisha Shimei mwana Gera umwina Benjamini uwa ku Baharumi ulya uwantukile insele ishingi nganshi bulya bushiku naile ku Manaimu ukuti epo acili. Ilyo aishile mukunkumanya pa mumana wa Yordani, ine nalilapile kuli ena peshina lyakwa Yawe ukuti tali nakufwa ku lupanga." 
1Kings2:9 Lelo nomba wimulinga ukuba uwakaele. Iwe uli muntu uwamano nganshi eico uli nokwishiba ifya kumucitila. Ukamonefye ukuti akengile mu calo ca bafwa ku mfwa yakusuuma umulopa.” 
1Kings2:10 Elyo Davidi afwile no kuya lala ukwalola ifikolwe fyakwe, ashiikilwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi." 
1Kings2:11 Ateekele icalo ca Israeli pa myaka amakumi yane (40). Imyaka cine lubali yali mu Hebuloni elyo imyaka amakumi yatatu na itatu (33) ateekele mu Yerusalemu. 
1Kings2:12 Efyo Solomoni abuulile amalo yakwa wishi Davidi no buteeko bwakwe bwakwata amaka nganshi. 
1Kings2:13 Nomba Adoniya, umwana wakwa Hagiti, alimine aya kuli Batisheba, nyina wakwa Solomoni. Elyo Batisheba amwipusha ati, “Bushe waisa mu mutende?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Ee ni mu mutende.”" 
1Kings2:14 Elyo amweba ati, “Ninkwatako utumashiwi utwakulanda na iwe.” Batisheba ayasuka ati, “Landa.”" 
1Kings2:15 Asosa ati, “Ukulingana ngefyo waishiba, nine nali nokuba imfumu ya bena Israeli, na bonse balesubilafye ukuti nine ndi nokuba imfumu yabo. Nomba ifintu fyapilibuka, no bufumu nomba bwile kuli munyinane pantu Yawe eumusalile." 
1Kings2:16 Lelo ine ninkwatakofye icintu cimo ico ndelomba ukufuma kuli iwe, wintana iyoo.” Batisheba amweba ati, “Lomba.”" 
1Kings2:17 Nao akonkanyapo ati, “Napapata kanombeleko ku mfumu Solomoni, pantu iwe takukaanine, ukuti ampeele Abishagi umwina Shunemu ukuba umukashi wandi.”" 
1Kings2:18 Batisheba nao ayasuka ati, “Cisuma, nalaya nkulandileko ku mfumu.”" 
1Kings2:19 Batisheba nao aya na ku mfumu Solomoni mukuya landilako Adoniya. Ilyo afika, imfumu yaima pa cipuna yaisa mukumanya, yakontamiko mutwe elyo yaya ikala pa cipuna. Elyo yaeba na bakuleta icipuna apakwisa ikala nyina, baciteka na ku kuboko kwa kulyo kwa cipuna ca mfumu." 
1Kings2:20 Batisheba nyina alanda ati, “Kuli icintu cimo ico ndefwaya ukulomba kuli iwe, wintana iyoo.” Imfumu yayasuka aiti, “Lombeni mayo ine nshakaane.”" 
1Kings2:21 Elyo Batisheba nyina ati, “Suminisha ukuti Abishagi umwina Shunemu opwe kuli munonko Adoniya.”" 
1Kings2:22 Imfumu Solomoni yayasuka nyina aiti, “Nga cinshi waipushisha Abishagi umwina Shunemu ukuti opwe kuli Adoniya? Ici cena calangafye ukuti no bufumu bwine kuti wamulombela apofye mukalamba wandi elyo kabili na Abiyata shimapepo, na Yoabu mwana Seruiya bawila kuli ena.”" 
1Kings2:23 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yalapa peshina lyakwa Yawe ati, “Lesa ancitile icili conse nangufye icakuleta ishamo nga cakuti Adoniya taleke umweo pa mashiwi asosa." 
1Kings2:24 Eico mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe umumi uwambika bwino pa cipuna cakwa tata Davidi kabili ampeela ne ŋanda ngefyo alaile, lelo line Adoniya alafwa.”" 
1Kings2:25 Apopene imfumu Solomoni yapeela ne cipope kuli Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ukuya ipaya Adoniya, nao aya mwipaya." 
1Kings2:26 Elyo imfumu yaebele Abiyata shimapepo ukuti, “Bwelelamo kumwenu ku Anatoti. Iwe ulingile ukufwa, lelo nshakwipaye pali ino nshita pantu walibombele umulimo wakusenda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iya Mfumu Yawe pa cinso cakwa tata Davidi no kupita nankwe pamo mu macushi.”" 
1Kings2:27 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yafumya Abiyata pa milimo ya bushimapepo bwakwa Yawe mukufikilisha amashiwi yakwa Yawe ayasoselwe ku Shilo palwa ŋanda yakwa Eli. 
1Kings2:28 Ilyo amashiwi ya fyacitike yafika kuli Yaobu, pakuba uwasuminishe Adoniya nangu tasuminisheko ifyakwa Abusalomu, ena epakubutukila mwi Tenti lyakwa Yawe no kuya konena ku nsengo sha bulambo." 
1Kings2:29 Baisa eba imfumu Solomoni ukuti Yoabu nabutukila mwi Tenti lyakwa Yawe emo ekele kumbali ya bulambo. Elyo imfumu Solomoni yapeela icipope kuli Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ukuti, “Kabiye uye umwipaye.”" 
1Kings2:30 Benaya epakuya, aya ingila mwi Tenti lyakwa Yawe no kweba Yoabu ati, “Imfumu itile, ‘Fumina panse.’” Yoabu nao ayasuka ati, “Awe ine nshafume, ndefwilafye muno mwine.” Benaya epakuya eba imfumu Solomoni amashiwi yasosele Yoabu." 
1Kings2:31 Elyo imfumu yapeela Benaya icipope cakuti, “Iwe kacite ifyo asosele. Kamukome, umwipaye no kumushiika, pakuti ufumye pali ine na pa ŋanda yakwa tata umulandu wa mulopa wakaele ulya Yoabu asumishe apabula umulandu." 
1Kings2:32 Yawe euli nokumukanda pa mulopa asumishe pantu, ukwabula ukuti tata Davidi eshibe, aimine no kusansa abantu babili no kubepaya ku lupanga. Aba babili, ni Abune mwana Neri uwali umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo fya bena Israeli, na Amasa mwana Yete umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo fya bena Yuda. Aba bali abantu abacishinka ukucila pali ena." 
1Kings2:33 No mulandu wa mulopa wa pali aba bantu uli nokutulumana pa mutwe wakwa Yoabu na ba mu lupwa lwakwe pe na pe. Lelo pali Davidi na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, pa ba ŋanda yakwe na pa cipuna cakwe, pena palebafye umutende wakwa Yawe pe na pe.”" 
1Kings2:34 Elyo Benaya mwana Yehoiyada aile no kuya koma Yoabu no kumwipaya, no kuya mushiika mu mpanga iyakwe iyali mu matololo." 
1Kings2:35 Imfumu yabika Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ukuba umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo pa malo yakwa Yoabu elyo yabika na Abiyata ukuba shimapepo pa cifulo cakwa Sadoki. 
1Kings2:36 Elyo imfumu yaita Shimei no kumweba ukuti, “Kuule iŋanda mu Yerusalemu nokuti uleikala mu musumba mwine wikatala aufumamo no kuya ku ncende kumbi." 
1Kings2:37 Pantu ilyo lyonse ukafuma mu musumba no kwabuka umukonko wa Kidironi, wishibefye ukuti ukafwa no mulandu wa mulopa ukaba pa mutwe obe.”" 
1Kings2:38 Shimei ayasuke imfumu ati, “Kanabesa, cabafye bwino. Umusha wenu ali nokucita ifyo imfumu kanabesa yalanda.” Na Shimei aikele mu Yerusalemu pa nshita iyitali." 
1Kings2:39 Cilya papitafye imyaka itatu, abasha babili abakwa Shimei babutuka no kuya kuli Akishi mwana Maaka, imfumu ya ku Gati. Awe bashimikila Shimei ukuti, “Abasha bobe nababutuka, bele ku Gati.”" 
1Kings2:40 Pakumfwa ifi apekanya kabalwe wakwe anina aya na kuli Akishi ku Gati mukufwaya abasha bakwe. Shimei aimine aya, mpaka aya senda abasha bakwe ukufuma ku Gati." 
1Kings2:41 Ilyo Solomoni bamweba ukuti Shimei nafuma mu Yerusalemu no kuya ku Gati elyo no kubwela," 
1Kings2:42 imfumu epakutuma abakuya ita Shimei no kumweba ati, “Bushe iwe nshakulengele ukulapa kuli Yawe elyo no kusosa ukuti, ‘Pa bushiku ubuli bonse ukafuma muno no kuya kumbi ukeshibefye ati uli nokufwa?’ Napali ilya nshita iwe wayaswike ukuti ifyo nalanda fyabafye bwino, ‘Ndi no kubeela.’" 
1Kings2:43 Nga kanshi cinshi wafililwa ukusunga umulapo obe kuli Yawe elyo no kukanabeela icipope nakupeele?” 
1Kings2:44 Imfumu yakonkanyapo ukweba Shimei aiti, “Iwe nawishiba na mu mutima obe ifilubo fyonse ifyo wacitile kuli tata Davidi. Eico nomba Yawe alakukanda pa bubi bobe." 
1Kings2:45 Imfumu Solomoni ili no kwikala iyapaalwa, ne cipuna cakwa Davidi icabufumu cili no kwikalilila pa cinso cakwa Yawe umuyayaya.”" 
1Kings2:46 Imfumu epakupeela icipope kuli Benaya umwana umwaume wakwa Yehoiyada nao afuma aya koma Shimei no kumwipaya. No bufumu bwaikala na maka mu minwe yakwa Solomoni. 
1Kings3:1 Solomoni ayambile ukumfwana na Farao imfumu ya mu calo ca Egupto icakuti aupa no mwana wakwe. Amuleta ukulaikala mu musumba wakwa Davidi mpaka ilyo apwile ukukuula isano lyakwe, iŋanda yakwa Yawe, elyo ne linga lyacingilila umusumba wa Yerusalemu." 
1Kings3:2 Lelo abantu bena pali ilya nshita balepeelela amalambo mu ncende shakupepelapo isho balecindika, pantu iŋanda yali tailakuulwa iya peshina lyakwa Yawe." 
1Kings3:3 Solomoni alangile ukutemwa Yawe ukupitila mukwendela mu fipope fyakwa wishi Davidi, nomba nao wine aletuulila amalambo no koca ububani mu ncende shakupepelapo." 
1Kings3:4 Imfumu elyo yaima no kuya ku Gibeoni mukutuula amalambo, pantu eyali incende yakupepelapo iyikalamba nganshi iyakutuulilako amalambo, kanshi eko Solomoni aile tuula amalambo ya cakoca ikana limo (1,000) pa bulambo." 
1Kings3:5 Ni ku Gibeoni eko Yawe amonekele kuli Solomoni mu ciloto pa nshita ya bushiku no kumweba ati, “Lomba icintu conse ico ulefwaya ukuti nkupeele.”" 
1Kings3:6 Solomoni ayasuka ati, “Walilanga uluse ulukalamba nganshi ku mubomfi obe Davidi, tata wandi, ukulingana nefyo aendele pa cinso cobe mu cishinka, mu bulungami elyo na mu bololoke bwa mutima. Nakabili ucili uletwalilila ukulanga ulu luse ulukalamba kuli ena pantu naumupeela umwana uwakupyana pa cipuna cakwe ukufika na pali lelo." 
1Kings3:7 Apo iwe we Yawe Lesa wandi, naulenga ine ne mubomfi obe ukuba imfumu mu cifulo cakwa tata Davidi, nomba ine ncilifye umwana umunono elyo nshishibe ne fyakufikilishapo ukubomba bwino imilimo." 
1Kings3:8 Ine ne mubomfi obe ndi pano pakati ka bantu abo waisalila, abantu abengi abakufilwa no kupenda." 
1Kings3:9 Eico ine nalomba ukuti umpeeleko ne mubomfi obe umutima uwamano pakuti ndeteeka bwino kabili ndeiluka ukulekanya ububi no busuma. Pantu nani uwingabomba umulimo wakutungulula aba bantu bobe abashaicindamina?” 
1Kings3:10 Ici casekeshe Yawe icakuti Solomoni alomba amano. 
1Kings3:11 Na Lesa atile kuli ena, “Apo walomba amano, taulombele icuma nangu umweo wa pe nangu ukulomba ukuti wipaye abalwani bobe, lelo umutima uwamano yakupingula pa butungulushi," 
1Kings3:12 na ine nalakucitila ukulingana nefyo ulombele. Nalakupeela umutima uwamano no kwiluka ifyo umuntu nelyo umo tatala akwatako elyo kabili takwakabe uukakwatako. 
1Kings3:13 Na ine nomba nalakulundilapo nefyo ushacilomba. Nalakupeela icuma no kucindama icakuti mu nshiku sha bumi bobe takwakabe imfumu iyikalingana nobe. 
1Kings3:14 Kabili nga cakuti walaenda mu nshila shandi no kubaka ifipope fyandi na mafunde yandi ngefyo Davidi wiso acitile, nkalenga ukekale inshiku ishingi pano isonde.”" 
1Kings3:15 Elyo Solomoni abuuka, aishiba nokuti aciba alelota. Awe abwelela ku Yerusalemu aya iminina na ku cinso ca Mbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe, eko aya tuulila ne lambo lyakoca ne lyakwampana pamo. Elyo atebeta ababomfi bakwe." 
1Kings3:16 Elyo kwaishile bacilende babili baisa iminina ku cinso ca mfumu. 
1Kings3:17 Umo asosa ati, “Kanabesa, uyu umwanakashi pamo na ine wine twikala mu ŋanda imo. Nalifyele umwana ninshi acili aleikala na ine." 
1Kings3:18 Panumafye ya nshiku shitatu ukutula apo umwana wandi afyalilwe, uyu mwanakashi nao akwata umwana. Twalifye fweka babili, tamwali umuntu umbi mu ŋanda." 
1Kings3:19 Pa nshita ya bushiku umwana wa uyu mwanakashi acifwa pantu acimwilikisha. 
1Kings3:20 Elyo aisa ima pakati ka bushiku no kwisa senda umwana wandi apo ine nacilala ne musha wenu. Acibuula umwana wandi amulalika pa cifuba cakwe no kubuula umwana wakwe uwafwa amulalika pa cifuba candi. 
1Kings3:21 Ilyo nacibuka ulucelo ukuti ŋonshe umwana, nacisanga ukuti nafwa. Nomba ilyo nacimulolekesha bwino ku lubuuto lwa kacelo, nacisanga ukuti te mwana wandi ulya nafyele.”" 
1Kings3:22 Umwanakashi umbi nao ayasuka ati, “Awe, umwana wandi ine ni uyu umutuntulu, teuyu uwafwa.” Lelo umwanakashi wapakutampa akomailapofye ati, “Ala iyoo, ine uyu uwafwa te mwana wandi, umwana wandi ni uyu umutuntulu.” Ilyo line bayamba no kuumana pa cinso ca mfumu." 
1Kings3:23 Imfumu yasosa aiti, “Cila umo alelanda ukuti, ‘Uyu ufwile te mwana wandi, ine umwana wandi mutuntulu.’”" 
1Kings3:24 Elyo imfumu yalanda aiti, “Ndeteleni ulupanga.” Awe baleta ulupanga ku mfumu." 
1Kings3:25 Nayo imfumu epakupeela icipope aiti, “Buuleni umwana umutuntulu mu muputule pakati, mubuule ciputulwa cimo mupeele umo elyo ne ciputulwa cimbi mupeele ku munankwe.”" 
1Kings3:26 Nyina afyele umwana uyo uwali umutuntulu aumfwila umwana wakwe uluse epakulanda ku mfumu ati, “Napapata kanabesa mwiipaya umwana, mubuulenifye mumupeele kuli uyu.” Lelo uyu mwanakashi umbi ena asosafye ati, “Takuli uwakusenda uyu mwana, nabamuputulefye pakati.”" 
1Kings3:27 Elyo imfumu yapingula ukuti, “Peeleni umwana uyo umutuntulu kuli uyo mwanakashi wantanshi pantu e nyina, mwimwipaya iyoo.”"
