1Kings3:28 Ilyo Israeli yonse yaumfwile ubupingushi bwa mfumu, bapeela imfumu umucinshi pantu bamwene bonse ukuti ilebomfya amano ukufuma kuli Lesa mukupingula imilandu." 
1Kings4:1 Kanshi imfumu Solomoni yateekele icalo conse ica Israeli. 
1Kings4:2 Na aba ebali bacilolo bakalamba: Asariya umwana umwaume wakwa Sadoki ewali shimapepo. 
1Kings4:3 Eliolefu na Ahiya bamwana Shisha ebali bakalemba ba milandu. Yehoshafati mwana Ailudi ewali kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo. 
1Kings4:4 Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ewali umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo. Sadoki na Abiyata ebali bashimapepo. 
1Kings4:5 Asariya mwana Natani ewali umukalamba wa bacilolo balesunga imisumba. Sabudi mwana Natani nga shimapepo kabili nga cibusa wa mfumu. 
1Kings4:6 Aisha nga kangalila mukalamba uwa kwisano. Adoniramu mwana Abuda nga kangalila wa bamulaasa 
1Kings4:7 Solomoni alikwete na bantu ikumi limo na babili (12) abo asontele ukuba abalashi bafitungu mu calo conse ica Israeli kukubomba umulimo wakuleta ifyakulya fya mfumu ne fya kwisano. Cila umo ali nokuleta ukufuma ku citungu cakwe ifyakulya ifya mweshi umo cila mwaka. 
1Kings4:8 Na aya e mashina yabo: Beni Huri ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu 
1Kings4:9 Beni Dekeli ewali umulashi wa misumba ya Makasi, Shalibimu, Beti Shemeshi na ku Eloni Beti Hanani." 
1Kings4:10 Beni Hesedi ewali umulashi wa misumba ya Aruboti, Sokoyo elyo ne citungu conse ica ku Heferi cali cakwe." 
1Kings4:11 Beni Abinadabu ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Nafoti Dori. Uyu wine ewaupile Tafati mwana Solomoni. 
1Kings4:12 Baana mwana Ailudi, ewali umulashi wa misumba ya Tanaki, ku Megido na ku ncende yonse iya ku Beti Shani mupepi na ku Saretani pesamba lya Yesireli, ukufumafye ku Beti Shani ukushinta ku Abeli Mehola no kucilinganya mpaka ku Yokimeamu." 
1Kings4:13 Beni Geberi ewali umulashi wa musumba wa Ramoti Gileadi, e ncende shonse ishaleikalamo Yairi mwana Manase mu Gileadi yali yakwe, no musumba wa Agobu uwaba mu Bashani pamo pene ne misumba imbi amakumi mutanda (60) iyashingulwikeko amalinga ne fisalilo fya pa mpongolo ifya mukuba." 
1Kings4:14 Ainadabu mwana Ido ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Manaimu. 
1Kings4:15 Aimasi ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Naftali, kabili ewaupile Basemati mwana Solomoni." 
1Kings4:16 Baana mwana Hushai ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Asheri elyo na ku Aloti. 
1Kings4:17 Yehoshafati mwana Palua ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Isaka. 
1Kings4:18 Shimei mwana Ela ewali umulashi wa ku calo ca Benjamini. 
1Kings4:19 Geberi mwana Uri ewali umulashi wa calo ca ku Gileadi icaleteeka Sihoni imfumu ya bena Amoli elyo ne calo cakwa Ogi imfumu ya ku Bashani. Geberi ewalifye umulashi eka muli uyu musumba. 
1Kings4:20 Abena Yuda na bena Israeli basandana bafula baba kwati musensenga wa pali bemba. Balalya no kunwa elyo no kusansamuka nganshi. 
1Kings4:21 Kabili Solomoni aba kateeka pa shamfumu shonse sha fyalo ukufuma ku mumana wa Yufurate ukushintafye na ku calo ca Bafilisiti kabili mpaka ku mupaka wa calo ca bena Egupto. Ifyalo fyonse ifi fyalasonka kuli Solomoni, na bantu baba bakwe mu nshiku shonse isha bumi bwakwe pano calo." 
1Kings4:22 Ifyaletuulwa cila bushiku ku mfumu Solomoni fyali amatepe umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150) aya bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino elyo na matepe ya ŋanu nayo imyanda itatu (300). 
1Kings4:23 Baletuula iŋombe ishaina ikumi limo, iŋombe ishilya umulemfwe amakumi yabili (20), impaanga ne mbushi umwanda umo (100) pamo pene ne nsebula, basele, bacisongo ne fyuni ifyaina." 
1Kings4:24 Pantu ateekele ishamfumu shonse ishali kwisamba lya mumana wa Yufurate ukufuma ku Tifisa ukushinta ku Gasa kabili aikele umutende ne fyalo fyonse ifya mumbali. 
1Kings4:25 Mu nshiku shonse isha bumi bwakwa Solomoni, abena Yuda na bena Israeli baikele umutende ukufumafye ku Dani ukufika ku Beresheba, na cila muntu alikwete ibala lya myangashi ne mikunyu." 
1Kings4:26 Solomoni akwete amacinka amakana amakumi yane (40,000) umwaleikala bakabalwe abakutinta amaceleta elyo na makana ikumi limo na yabili (12,000) bakabalwe bakuninapo abantu." 
1Kings4:27 Bacilolo ba mu misumba, cila umo mu mweshi wakwe aleleta ifyakulya ku mfumu Solomoni pamo ne fya bantu bonse abali kwisano. Kabili balashininkisha no kumona ukuti takuli nangu fimo ifibulileko." 
1Kings4:28 Baleleta ku ncende ya fitekwa cila muntu icipimo cakwe ica bale elyo ne cani icakuliisha bakabalwe bonse. 
1Kings4:29 Lesa apeela Solomoni amano, no kwiluka ukukalamba nganshi. Amupeela no kwishiba ukwacipeshamano ukwafula ngo musensenga wa muli bemba." 
1Kings4:30 Ukufula kwa mano yakwa Solomoni kwacila pa mano yakwete abaume ba ku kabanga no kucila na pa mano yonse aya bena Egupto. 
1Kings4:31 Akwatisha amano ukucila umuntu onse ukucila na pali Etani umwina Esra, ukucilafye na pali Hemani, Kalikoli na Dada bamwana Maoli. Kabili ululumbi lwakwe lwasalangana na mu nko shonse ishali mumbali." 
1Kings4:32 Solomoni ashikile amapinda ayafikile pa makana yatatu (3,000) ne nyimbo nasho ikana limo na shisano (1,005)." 
1Kings4:33 Alondolola na palwa fimuti ukutulafye pa cimuti icalepesha ica keda wa ku Lebanoni ukufika na ku tumisambo twa hisopo tulya utumena mu fibumba. Asambilisha na pa mulandu wa nama, ifyuni, ifikulika elyo na pesabi." 
1Kings4:34 Bashibantu ukufuma mu nko shonse balaisa mukumfwa ku mano yakwa Solomoni, abaletumwa ne shamfumu shonse isho ishaumfwile pa mano yakwa Solomoni." 
1Kings5:1 Ilyo Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi yaumfwa ukuti Solomoni nasubwa ukuti eo apyane pa bufumu bwakwa wishi Davidi, atumako bacilolo bakwe kuli Solomoni pa mulandu wakuti Hiramu ali ni cibusa wakwa Davidi." 
1Kings5:2 Solomoni nao abweseshamo amashiwi aya kuli Hiramu ati," 
1Kings5:3 “Iwe nawishiba ukuti pa mulandu wa nkondo shalwile tata Davidi ukufuma ku mbali shonse, tata asuka afilwa ukuti akuulile Yawe Lesa wakwe iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyakwe, mpakafye Yawe amulenga ukucimfya abalwani bakwe." 
1Kings5:4 Lelo Yawe Lesa wandi nampeela umutende ukufuma ku mbali shonse, takuli na balwani nangu ifinkunka." 
1Kings5:5 Eico nomba ndefwaya ukuti nkuulile Yawe Lesa wandi iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyakwe ukulinganafye ngefyo umwine Yawe aebele tata Davidi ilyo atile, ‘Umwana obe uo ndi nokupyanika pa cipuna cobe euli nokukuula iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyandi.’" 
1Kings5:6 “Eico iwe konkomesha abantu ukuti baye ntemenako ifimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda wa ku Lebanoni. Ndi nokutuma abantu abakwisa bomba na bantu bobe elyo kabili ndi nokulipila abantu bobe amalipilo yonse ayo uli nokupingula. Nawishiba ukuti ifwe tatwakwata abantu abacenjela ukuputula ifimuti nga bena Sidoni.” 
1Kings5:7 Ilyo Hiramu aumfwa amashiwi yakwa Solomoni, yamusekesha nganshi alanda no kuti, “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe pa bushiku bwa lelo, pantu apeela Davidi umwana uwamano uwakuteeka pali ici calo icacindama.”" 
1Kings5:8 Hiramu epakutuma amashiwi aya kuli Solomoni ukuti, “Nimpokelela amashiwi untumine na ine nalabomba ukulingana nefyo ulefwaya ukukuletela ifimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda elyo ne milando ya fimuti fya paini." 
1Kings5:9 Abantu bandi ebakulakulula imilando ukufuma ku Lebanoni ukutwala kuli bemba, elyo no kulafiponesha pa menshi pakuti fileisa fileelela mpaka ukufika ku ncende ukasonta. Kuli iyo ncende eko nkalafipatulula pakuti ukalesenda. Kabili na iwe ukapeele iŋanda yandi ifyakulya ukulingana nefyo nkakweba.”" 
1Kings5:10 Muli iyi nshila Hiramu akonkenyepo ukupeela Solomoni imilando yonse iyalefwaikwa iya fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ne fimuti fya paini. 
1Kings5:11 Solomoni nao alapeela Hiramu imingolo ya ŋanu iyafinine amakilo imintapendwa ibili (2,000,000 kg) pakuleka aliishe aba mu ŋanda yakwe, elyo ne mingolo ya miolifa balita amakana imyanda ine na makumi yane (44,000). Ifi efyo Solomoni alepeela Hiramu cila mwaka." 
1Kings5:12 Yawe epakupeela Solomoni amano ukulingana nefyo amulaile. Paba no kumfwana ukwamutende pakati kakwa Solomoni na Hiramu icakuti bapangana ne cipangano. 
1Kings5:13 Imfumu Solomoni yalemba na bantu abakubomba umulaasa amakana amakumi yatatu (30,000) ukufuma mu calo conse ica Israeli." 
1Kings5:14 Imfumu yalabatuma ku Lebanoni mu mabumba ya bantu amakana ikumi limo (10,000) cila mweshi pakuti umweshi utuntulu umo baikala ku Lebanoni elyo imyeshi ibili baikala pa mushi. Adoniramu bamupeela ukuba mushika wa bamulaasa." 
1Kings5:15 Imfumu Solomoni yali na bakasenda wa fipe amakana amakumi cine lubali (70,000) elyo na bantu amakana amakumi cine konse konse (80,000) abakusona amabwe mu mpili." 
1Kings5:16 Elyo akwata na bantu bambi amakana yatatu ne myanda itatu (3,300) abali bakangalila abakutungulula imilimo ya bantu." 
1Kings5:17 Imfumu yapeela icipope icakushula amabwe ayakulu ukufuma ku mpili elyo ayabaswa ubusaka ayakukuulila mu mufula wa ŋanda. 
1Kings5:18 Ababomfi bakwa Solomoni na bakwa Hiramu elyo na baume ba ku Gebali ebaleputaula imbao no kupekanya amabwe yakukuulile iŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
1Kings6:1 Mu mwaka walenga imyanda ine na makumi cine konse konse (480) ukufuma apo abena Israeli bafumine mu Egupto, uyu wine e mwaka wakulenga bune ukutula apo Solomoni atendekele ukuteeka icalo ca Israeli, umweshi wabubili, emukutila umweshi washinde, Solomoni atendeka ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
1Kings6:2 Iŋanda iyo imfumu Solomoni yakuulile Yawe yalepele icipimo amakubiti amakumi mutanda (60) mubutali, mubwipi amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) elyo amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30) ukulola mumulu." 
1Kings6:3 Umuputule wakwingililapo mu ŋanda walepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) mukucilinganya, elyo mubwipi amakubiti ikumi limo ukufuma pa mwinshi we Tempele." 
1Kings6:4 Pa mawindo ya mu ŋanda apangilapo ifyakwikashapo ifyapikulwa. 
1Kings6:5 Ashintilishe ku cibumba ce Tempele icikuulwa cimbi icakwete utumiputule utunono utwa mumbali. 
1Kings6:6 Umuputule wa panshi mukucilinganya walepele icipimo amakubiti yasano, uwapakati wali amakubiti mutanda elyo uwa pa mulu wali amakubiti cine lubali. Ukushinguluka kunse ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe alicefeshe icibumba pakuti takuli icintu icingashimpwa mu cibumba ca ŋanda." 
1Kings6:7 Pakukuula ŋanda yakwa Yawe balebomfya amabwe ayabashilwa libela kuntu yalefuma, kabili takwali nangu ni nondo, nangu lisembe nangu conse icibombelo ca cela icakumfwika pa ŋanda pa nshita yakukuula." 
1Kings6:8 Umwinshi wakwingilila mu muputule wa panshi uwabelele ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, pali amatabo yakunininapo ukuya pa muputule wapakati, na yambi ukufuma pali uyu muputule ukuya fika pa walenga butatu." 
1Kings6:9 Efyo akuulile iŋanda yakwa Yawe no kulipwishishisha. Abomfya imilando ne mbao sha cimuti icalepesha ica keda pakupalika umutenge. 
1Kings6:10 Kabili akuula no tumiputule utunono ukushingulusha iŋanda. Ubutali bwacila kamo ukulola mumulu kali amakubiti yasano. Imilando ya fimuti fya keda eyaletusuntinkanya ku ŋanda. 
1Kings6:11 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli Solomoni aliti," 
1Kings6:12 “Pali iyi ŋanda ulekuula, nga cakuti uli nokukonka ifipope fyandi, no kucita amafunde yandi elyo no kusunga ifyebo fyandi no kufibaka, ndi nokufikilishapo ubulayo nalaile kuli wiso Davidi." 
1Kings6:13 Kabili ndi nokwikala pakati ka bana bakwa Israeli elyo nshakabapose aba bantu bandi abena Israeli.” 
1Kings6:14 Efyo Solomoni akuulile iŋanda yakwa Yawe no kuipwisha. 
1Kings6:15 Apopele mukati ka cibumba imbao sha cimuti icalepesha ica keda ukufuma panshi ya mu ŋanda no kufika mu mutenge, elyo akupa imbao shimbi isha paini panshi mukati ka ŋanda." 
1Kings6:16 Apaatulako umuputule umbi lwa mukati kunuma ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe uwalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili. Aimika imbao sha cimuti icalepesha ica keda mukati ka uyu umuputule ukufuma panshi mpaka mu mutenge. Uyu ewali Umuputule wamushilo icine cine. 
1Kings6:17 Incende ya kuntanshi ka uyu muputule yalepele amakubiti amakumi yane ubutali. 
1Kings6:18 Mukati ka ŋanda mwali imbao sha cimuti ca keda ishabaswapo inkombo na maluba ayabalula. Incende yonse yalifye imbao sha fimuti fya keda, tapali apalemoneka ilibwe." 
1Kings6:19 Apekanya bwino Umuputule uwamushilo icine cine mukati ka ŋanda umwakubika Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe. 
1Kings6:20 Umuputule uwamushilo cine cine mukati wali amakubiti amakumi yabili mubutali, mukucilinganya amakubiti amakumi yabili no kulola mu mulu amakubiti amakumi yabili. Mukati monse ashingulamo golide wine wine kabili ashingula na ku bulambo bwa fimuti fya keda." 
1Kings6:21 Solomoni ashingula golide wine wine ku fibumba fyonse ifya mukati ka ŋanda, elyo atantika no tuminyololo twa golide kuntanshi yonse iya Muputule wamushilo uo ashingwilemo golide." 
1Kings6:22 Elyo mukati monse ashingulamo golide, pakuti iŋanda yonse ibe iyawama. Ashingula golide na ku bulambo bonse ubwa mu Muputule wamushilo icine cine." 
1Kings6:23 Mukati ka Muputule wamushilo icine cine apangilamo bakerubi babili ku cimuti ca miolifa abalepele amakubiti ikumi limo ukulola mumulu. 
1Kings6:24 Ipindo limo kuli Kerubi wantanshi lyalepele amakubiti yasano ne pindo libiye nalyo amakubiti yasano, emukutila amakubiti ikumi limo ukufuma pa mpela ye pindo limo ukufika kwipindo libiye." 
1Kings6:25 Kerubi wacibili nao alepa amakubiti ikumi limo pantu bonse babili bakerubi bali abapalana mu cipimo na mu nshiki. 
1Kings6:26 Kerubi umo alepele amakubiti ikumi limo ukulola mu mulu, kabili ifi fine efyali na Kerubi mubiye." 
1Kings6:27 Ateka bakerubi bonse babili mukati ka Muputule wamukati ka ŋanda, elyo atambalika na mapindo yabo pakuti ipindo lya umo lileshimpa mu cibumba nelya mubiye ku cibumba cibiye. Elyo amapindo yambi yasuntikana pakati ka Muputule." 
1Kings6:28 Kuli bakerubi ashingulako golide. 
1Kings6:29 Ku fibumba fyonse ifya mukati na kunse abashilako ifilengwa fya bakerubi, utuncindu na maluba ayabalula." 
1Kings6:30 Elyo panshi ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe na panshi lwa kunse ya ŋanda napo ashingulapo golide. 
1Kings6:31 Pa mwinshi wakwingilila mu Muputule wamushilo icine cine apangilapo ifiibi ifya mbao sha cimuti ca miolifa ne fimuti fya maingwe fisano. 
1Kings6:32 Kabili pa fiibi fibili ifya mbao sha miolifa akambatikapo bakerubi ababaswa, utuncindu elyo na maluba ayabalula, kabili ashinga golide kuli bakerubi na ku tuncindu." 
1Kings6:33 Mu nshila imo ine apanga amaingwe aya mbali shine aya ku fimuti fya miolifa pa mwinshi wa mu muputule ukalamba. 
1Kings6:34 Apanga ifiibi fibili ifya mbao sha ku fimuti fya paini cila cimo cali mu fipande fibili ifyapapikana nga baisula. 
1Kings6:35 Abashilapo bakerubi, utuncindu elyo na maluba ayabalula elyo ashingulako golide iyaengululwa bwino." 
1Kings6:36 Kabili akuula ulubansa lwa mukati mu mitande itatu ku mabwe ayabaswa bwino no mutande umo ku milando iyasukulwa iya cimuti icalepesha ica keda. 
1Kings6:37 Umufula wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe wapangilwe mu mwaka walenga bune mu mweshi wabubili ekutila umweshi washinde. 
1Kings6:38 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na umo (11) mu mweshi wa lusuba lunono emukutila umweshi walenga cine konse konse, emo bapwishishe ukukuula iŋanda muli fyonse ukulingana nefyo yapekanishiwe. Apwilepo imyaka cine lubali pakuti apwishe ukukuula." 
1Kings7:1 Solomoni aposelepo imyaka ikumi limo na itatu (13) pakuti apwishe ukukuula isano lyakwe. 
1Kings7:2 Elyo akuulile isano ilyaitilwe “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni,” mubutali yalepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100), mubwipi amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) elyo ukulola mumulu amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30). Elyo imitande ine iya nceshi sha fimuti fya keda eyatungilile imyalo ya mutenge." 
1Kings7:3 Umutenge wapangilwe ne mbao sha fimuti fya keda ishaikele pa mulu wa milando iyashintilile pa cibumba iyali amakumi yane na isano (45), iyaleikala ikumi limo na isano (15) mu mutande." 
1Kings7:4 Amawindo yaiko yabikilwe mumulu mu mitande itatu, kuli cila cibumba ayaloshanya." 
1Kings7:5 Iminshi yonse yakwete inceshi isha matungi yane. Eyabikilwe yatatu yatatu ku ntanshi ya ŋanda kabili yaleloleshanya. 
1Kings7:6 Elyo akuula no muputule wa nceshi sheka sheka mubutali uwalepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) elyo mubwipi wali amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30). Kuntanshi abikako ulukungu ulwafimbwa no mutenge uwatungililwa ne nceshi. 
1Kings7:7 Akuulile umuputule umwakwikala icipuna ca mfumu, apo ali nokwikala pakupingula imilandu. Akambatikamo imbao sha fimuti fya keda ukufuma panshi ukufika mu mutenge." 
1Kings7:8 Iŋanda ye sano iyakwe yali kunuma ya iyi ŋanda iyalimo icipuna cakwe, kabili yakulilwe mu musangofye umo. Solomoni akuula isano limbi ilya musango umo wine umwakwikala mwana Farao ulya aupile." 
1Kings7:9 Aya yonse amayanda, ukufuma mu mufula ukufika mu mutenge yapangilwe na mabwe ayalingana mukuputaula ukufumafye kunse ukufika mu lubansa, kabili yali ayakuswa bwino mukati na kunse." 
1Kings7:10 Mu mufula wayako mwapangilwe na mabwe ayakulu kabili ayasuma ayalepele amakubiti ikumi limo, yambi amakubiti cine konse konse." 
1Kings7:11 Pamulu napo pali amabwe ayapekanishiwa bwino, ayalingana mukuputaula elyo ne milando ya fimuti fya keda." 
1Kings7:12 Ku lubansa lukalamba bashingulwisheko icibumba ica mitande itatu iya mabwe ayabaswa bwino elyo no mutande umo uwa milando iyasukulwa iya fimuti fya keda, filya fine bapangile umuputule wa mukati uwa ŋanda yakwa Yawe pamo pene no lubansa." 
1Kings7:13 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yatumine abakuya ita Hiramu umwina Turi elyo yaisa mupokelela. 
1Kings7:14 Uyo nyina ali ni namfwilwa uwa mu luko lwakwa Naftali elyo wishi ali mwina Turi kafula wa mukuba. Hiramu ali umuntu uwaishibishe imilimo kabili uwacenjela nganshi mu milimo yonse iya pa mukuba. Aishile ku mfumu Solomoni no kwisa bomba bwino imilimo yonse iyo apeelwe. 
1Kings7:15 Aengele inceshi shibili isha mukuba, cila luceshi lwalepele amakubiti ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) ukulola mu mulu elyo amakubiti ikumi limo na yabili ukushinguluka." 
1Kings7:16 Kabili apanga ne mitwe ibili ku mukuba uwayengululwa iyakubika pa mulu wa nceshi. Cila mutwe wali amakubiti yasano ukulola mumulu. 
1Kings7:17 Apanga ne minyololo iyapikulwa nge citabataba aipomba ku mitwe iyali pa mulu wa nceshi. Cila mutwe wakwete iminyololo cine lubali. 
1Kings7:18 Apanga amateke mu mitande ibili ukushinguluka icapikulwa cimo cimo ifyakuwaminisha imitwe iyali pa mulu wa nceshi. Acita cimo cine kuli cila mutwe. 
1Kings7:19 Imitwe iyali pa mulu wa nceshi sha mu lukungu yali kwati maluba ayalepa amakubiti yane. 
1Kings7:20 Pa mitwe yonse iyali pa nceshi pa ncende yapangilwe kwati ni nongo mupepi ne fyapikulwa epali amateke mu mitande ukushinguluka. 
1Kings7:21 Ashimpile inceshi pa lukungu lwe Tempele. Uluceshi lwali ku kapinda ka ku kulyo alwinike ishina lya Yakini elyo lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso alwinike ishina lya Boasi. 
1Kings7:22 Imitwe pamulu yali mu musango wa maluba. Efyo imilimo ya pa nceshi yapwile. 
1Kings7:23 Apangile icishiba icaengululwa ku fyela, icashinguluka, icalepele amakubiti ikumi limo ukufuma mu mushingo umo ukufika ku unankwe elyo calepele ukucilako amakubiti yasano ukulola mu mulu. Pakucipima mukushinguluka pamulu kano babomfya umwando uulepele amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30)." 
1Kings7:24 Pesamba lyaciko ashingulushapo inkombo ikumi limo kuli cila cipimo kubiti. Inkombo shatantikwa mu mitande ibili iyo bengelela lintu balepanga icishiba. 
1Kings7:25 Icishiba caikele pali bacilume ba ŋombe ikumi limo na babili (12). Batatu baloleshe ku kapinda ka ku kuso, bambi batatu ku masamba, bambi batatu ku kapinda ka ku kulyo elyo na bambi batatu ku kabanga. Pa mulu wa ŋombe epaikala icishiba ne numa shashiko shakumanina pakati." 
1Kings7:26 Ukutikama kwaciko kwali ngo lupi lumo, no mulomo waciko wapala umulomo wa lukombo, uwapala iluba ilyabalula. Mu cishiba mwalaba amenshi ayakumana balita amakana amakumi yane na yane (44,000)." 
1Kings7:27 Apangile impanda isha mukuba ikumi limo ishakusesha. Cila lupanda lwalepele amakubiti yane, yane mubwipi, elyo kubiti umo na citika ukulola mumulu." 
1Kings7:28 Ifi efyo impanda shapangilwe, shakwete imbao sha mumbali apakwikala ishalola mumulu." 
1Kings7:29 Pali ishi mbao, pakati ka shalolele mumulu, pali inkalamo, iŋombe ishilume elyo na bakerubi. Elyo pa nceshi shonse ishalolele mumulu na pesamba lya nkalamo ne ŋombe apangilapo ifyanyongana." 
1Kings7:30 Cila lupanda lwakwata imipeto ya mukuba ine ne misomali ya mukuba elyo cila lupanda lwakwata ne cakusambilamo icaikele pa fyakucifikilila fine ifyaengwa. 
1Kings7:31 Ku lubali lwa mukati lwa cakutekapo paba icipunda icashinguluka ukufika apalepele kubiti umo mukushika. Ici icipunda cali icashinguluka elyo ne cakutekapo calepele mupepi na kubiti umo na citika. Ukushinguluka mu mbali ya cipunda mwali ifyabaswa. Amolu ya cakutekapo yali ayapapatala monse monse, tayali ayashinguluka." 
1Kings7:32 Imipeto yonse ine yali mwisamba lya molu, ne misomali ya ku mipeto yakakilwa ku molu. Ubutali bwakufuma ku mupeto umo ukufika ku unankwe paba kubiti umo na citika." 
1Kings7:33 Imipeto yapangwa kwati mipeto ye celeta. Imisomali, ifingolongolo, amashipoko elyo na maabu fyonse fyali fya mukuba uwalopolwa." 
1Kings7:34 Icakutekapo conse cakwete ifyakwikatilako fine, cila cimo caikalila lubali nacikambatila ku cakutekapo." 
1Kings7:35 Pa mulu wa cakutekapo pali umushingo uwashinguluka uwali citika wa kubiti ukulola mumulu. Ifyakutungilila elyo ne mikonso fyakakilwa pa mulu pa cakutekapo. 
1Kings7:36 Abasa bakerubi, inkalamo elyo no tuncindu pa mulu wa cakwikatilako elyo na pa mulu wa mikonso ponse apaba incende apangilapo ifyanyongana." 
1Kings7:37 Ifi efyo apanga ifyakutekapo ikumi limo. Fyonse fyataminwe mu fikombola fimo fine elyo fyaba ifyapalana mu bukulu na mu musango. 
1Kings7:38 Apangile ifyakusambilamo ikumi limo ifya mukuba. Cila musambilo walesunga amenshi ayali balita imyanda cine konse konse na makumi cine konse konse (880). Cila musambilo walepele amakubiti yane, na cila musambilo walikwete icakutekapo" 
1Kings7:39 Abika ifyakutekapo fisano ku kapinda ka ku kulyo aka ŋanda yakwa Yawe kabili fisano ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Abika icishiba ku lubali lwa ku kulyo lwa ku kabanga ka ŋanda. 
1Kings7:40 Kabili apanga ne misambilo, bafosholo ne fyakusanshilako amenshi. Hiramu nao abomba no kupwisha imilimo yonse yamupeele imfumu Solomoni iya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe:" 
1Kings7:41 Inceshi shibili, Imitwe ibili iyapala inweno pa mulu wa nceshi, iminyololo ibili iyapikulwa nge citabataba iyakuwaminisha imitwe ibili iyapala inweno iya pa mulu wa nceshi," 
1Kings7:42 Amateke imyanda ine (400) aya ku minyololo ibili iyapikulwa, cila capikulwa imilongo ibili iya mateke iyakuwaminisha imitwe iyapala inweno pa mulu wa nceshi," 
1Kings7:43 Ifyakutekapo ikumi ne misambilo nayo ikumi," 
1Kings7:44 Icishiba na bacilume ba ŋombe ikumi limo na babili (12) pesamba lyaciko. 
1Kings7:45 Inongo, bafosholo elyo ne fya kwitililako amenshi. Ifi fipe fyonse ifyo Hiramu apangile imfumu Solomoni ifyakubika mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe fyapangilwe ku mukuba uwawamishiwa bwino." 
1Kings7:46 Ifi fyonse imfumu yafyengulwile kwibumba lya mwiwanga lya Yordani pakati ka Sukoti na Saretani. 
1Kings7:47 Solomoni ashile ifi fipe ukwabula ukuti afipime pa mulandu wa bwingi bwafiko. Eico no kufina kwa mukuba takwaishibikwe. 
1Kings7:48 Solomoni apangile ne fipe fyonse ifyakubomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe: Ubulambo bwa golide, Itebulo lya golide apakwikala imikate ya ku cinso cakwa Yawe," 
1Kings7:49 Ifyakutekapo ifisaniko ifya golide iyaengwa bwino (fisano fyali ku kulyo kabili fimbi fisano ku kuso kuntanshi ya Muputule wamushilo icine cine), Amaluba ya golide, ifisaniko elyo ne fyakumanikilako," 
1Kings7:50 Ifisambilo ifya golide wine wine, Ifyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto, Ifyakusanshilako amenshi, imbale sha bubani ne fipande fyakulapwilapo umulilo, Utwa golide utwakushimpamo ifiseko fya fiibi fya muputule wa mukati ne fya ku Muputule wamushilo icine cine, elyo kabili na ku fiibi fya ku muputule ukalamba uwa mwi Tempele." 
1Kings7:51 Ilyo imilimo yonse imfumu Solomoni abombele pakukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe yapwile, aisa ingishamo ne cuma conse ico wishi Davidi atuulile. Aletelamo silifa, golide elyo ne fibombelo fyonse no kwisa fibika fyonse mu matala ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
1Kings8:1 Elyo imfumu Solomoni yaitile kwisano ku Yerusalemu abakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli, intungulushi sha nko shonse elyo na bakalamba ba ndupwa sha bena Israeli ukuti baye senda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe ukufuma ku Sioni, umusumba wakwa Davidi." 
1Kings8:2 Abaume bonse abena Israeli baisa longana pamo ku mfumu Solomoni pa nshita ya nshikunkulu mu mweshi uwalenga cine lubali ekutila umweshi wa Etanimu. 
1Kings8:3 Ilyo abakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli bafikile, elyo bashimapepo baimishe Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe" 
1Kings8:4 no kuleta Imbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe, Itenti lyakukumaninamo ne fipe fyonse ifyamushilo ifyali mukati. Bashimapepo na bena Levi ebasendele." 
1Kings8:5 Imfumu Solomoni no lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli abalongene kulya ali, batangila pa ntanshi ya Mbokoshi no kutuula impaanga ne ŋombe ishingi isho bashingebukisha nangu ukupenda." 
1Kings8:6 Bashimapepo epakuleta Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe pa cifulo caiko mu Muputule wa mukati ka ŋanda uwamushilo icine cine no kuiteeka mwisamba lya mapindo ya bakerubi. 
1Kings8:7 Amapindo ya bakerubi yayanshile pa mulu wa Mbokoshi icakuti yafimbilikisha kumo ne fimuti fyakupingilako fyaiko. 
1Kings8:8 Ifi fimuti fyali ifitali icalengele nokuti impela yafiko ilemoneka ku bali mu Muputule wamushilo, lwa kuntanshi ya Muputule wamushilo icine cine, nomba tashalemoneka ku bali kumbi iyoo. Kabili eko fyaba ukufika na nomba." 
1Kings8:9 Tamwali cintu cimbi mu Mbokoshi kanofye amabwe ayapapatala yabili ayo Mose abikilemo pa ncende ya ku Holebu palya Yawe apangile icipangano na bena Israeli ukutula apo bafumine mu Egupto. 
1Kings8:10 Ilyo bashimapepo bafumine mu Muputule wamushilo elyo ikumbi lyaishile isula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
1Kings8:11 Na pa mulandu we kumbi ili bashimapepo bafilwa no kubomba imilimo yabo pantu ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaisula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
1Kings8:12 Elyo Solomoni atila, “Yawe alilanda ukuti akulaikala mwikumbi ilyafiita." 
1Kings8:13 Ine ninkukuulila iŋanda iyacindama, incende iyakuti iwe uleikalamo pe na pe.”" 
1Kings8:14 Ninshi ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lucili nalwiminina palya pene, imfumu yapilubuka no kulupaala." 
1Kings8:15 Elyo yalanda aiti, “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, uyo ku maka ya kuboko kwakwe afikilisha ubulayo alaile kwishiwi lyakwe kuli Davidi, tata. Pantu atile," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Ukufumafye pa bushiku nafumishe abantu bandi abena Israeli ukufuma mu calo ca ku Egupto, nshatala nsalapo umusumba nangu umo uwa nko sha bena Israeli umwakukuula iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyandi, lelo nalisala Davidi ukuteeka abantu bandi abena Israeli.’" 
1Kings8:17 Cali pa mutima wakwa tata Davidi ukukuula iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyakwa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli." 
1Kings8:18 Nomba Yawe atile kuli tata Davidi, ‘Pa mulandu wakuti cali mu mutima obe ukuti ukuule iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyandi, na iwe wacitile icawama pakuba neci mu mutima obe." 
1Kings8:19 Nomba teiwe uli nokukuula iŋanda, lelo umwana obe umwaume uwakuifyalila uwa mulopa obe, kabili umubili obe, euli nokukuula iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyandi.’" 
1Kings8:20 “Yawe nafikilisha ubulayo alaile. Nine napyana Davidi tata kabili nine naikala na pa cipuna ca bufumu bwa bena Israeli, ngefyo Yawe alaile. Kabili ninkuula Iŋanda umwakwikala ishina lyakwa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli." 
1Kings8:21 Nimpekanya ne ncende ya Mbokoshi iyabamo icipangano Yawe apangene ne fikolwe fyesu ilyo abafumishe mu Egupto.” 
1Kings8:22 Elyo Solomoni aiminine ku cinso ca bulambo bwakwa Yawe kuntanshi ukwalongene abena Israeli, asumbwila amaboko mu mulu, nokutila," 
1Kings8:23 “Iwe Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli, takwaba umbi Lesa uwaba nga iwe mu mulu nangu pano isamba lya calo uusunga icipangano cobe icacitemwiko na babomfi bobe abo abekalilila mu nshila shobe ne mitima yacishinka." 
1Kings8:24 Naufikilisha ubulayo walaile umubomfi obe Davidi tata. Ku kanwa kobe eko walaile elyo ku kuboko kobe wafikilishapo nga fino fine caba ilelo. 
1Kings8:25 “Lelo iwe Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli, sungila umubomfi obe tata Davidi ifyo wamulaile ilyo wasosele auti, ‘Tawakatale aufilwa ukukwata umwana uwakwisa ikala pa cinso candi pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli ubwaba ku cinso candi. Ifi fikacitika nga cakuti abana bobe abaume bapetama muli fyonse ifyo bakulacita ngefyo iwe wacitile.’" 
1Kings8:26 Eico nomba, we Lesa wakwa Israeli, leka ishiwi walaile umubomfi obe Davidi tata lifikilishiwe." 
1Kings8:27 “Nomba bushe Lesa kuti aikala pano calo? Apofye imyulu nangufye imyulu ya pamulu teti imukumane, bushe iyi ŋanda nkuulile eingamukumana?" 
1Kings8:28 Lelo kutika kwipepo lya mubomfi obe na ku kupapata kwakwe ukwakubelelwa uluse, we Yawe Lesa wandi. Kutika ku nkuuta na kwipepo mubomfi obe alepepa ku cinso cobe muli buno bushiku." 
1Kings8:29 Shileka amenso yobe yesukile no kulalolesha pali iyi ŋanda ubushiku na kasuba, pali ino ncende walanda ukuti, ‘Epo ishina lyandi likaba,’ pakuti uleumfwa amapepo ya musha obe aya pali ino ncende." 
1Kings8:30 Umfwa ukupapata kwa mubomfi obe nokwa bantu bobe abena Israeli ilyo bapepa pali ino ncende. Shi wingalaumfwa ukufuma ku mulu uko waikala kabili ilyo waumfwa ulebelela uluse. 
1Kings8:31 “Umuntu nga abifya umwina mupalamano wakwe kabili alefwaikwa ukwisa lapa, elyo aisa lapa umulapo pa ntanshi ya bulambo muli iyi ŋanda," 
1Kings8:32 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kucita icilefwaikwa. Ulepingula pakati ka babomfi bobe no kupeela umulandu ku ulubile, no kuleta pa mutwe wakwe ububi acitile. Ulefumya uwakaele mu mulandu, no kubalambula pali bucishinka bwabo." 
1Kings8:33 Ilyo abantu bobe abena Israeli babacimfya ku balwani babo pa mulandu wa bubifi bwabo kuli we Yawe, kabili babwela no kulumbula ishina lyobe, bapepa no kupapata kuli iwe muli ino ŋanda," 
1Kings8:34 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kubelela abantu bobe abena Israeli uluse pa fyabubifi fyabo. Kabili ukababweshe na ku calo wapeele ifikolwe fyabo. 
1Kings8:35 “Ilyo imyulu yaisalika ne mfula yaleka ukuloka pantu abantu bacita ifyabubifi kuli iwe, nabo baisa pali ino ncende mukupepa no kulumbula ishina lyobe no kupilibuka ukufuma ku fibi fyabo lintu wabakanda," 
1Kings8:36 elyo uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kubelela ababomfi bobe abena Israeli uluse pa fyabubifi fyabo. Elyo ukabafunde ne mbela isuma iyakwikalilamo, no kutuma imfula pa calo wapeele abantu bobe ukuba icuma cacishilano." 
1Kings8:37 “Ilyo icipowe nangu icikuko caisa pa calo, nangu ukukunkutana kwa mabula nangu ukufufuma, makanta nangu ifipaso, nangu abalwani babashinguluka mu musumba uuli onse, ifinkunka ifili fyonse nangu ubulwele nga bwaisa," 
1Kings8:38 kabili ilyo abantu bobe abena Israeli bapepa no kupapata, na cila umo nashininwa mu mutima wakwe, kabili atambalika na maboko yakwe kuli ino ŋanda," 
1Kings8:39 elyo ukaleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu, incende waikalako. Ulebomba umulimo wakubelela uluse no kucitila cila umo umwabela imibeele yakwe, apo iwe walishiba umutima wakwe, pantu niwe weka waishiba imitima ya bantu bonse." 
1Kings8:40 Ulecita ifi pakuti balekutiina ne nshita yonse iya bumi bwabo mu calo wapeele ifikolwe fyesu. 
1Kings8:41 “Na pa mulandu wa mweni uushili mu bantu bobe abena Israeli, lelo afuma ku calo ca kutali pa mulandu wa kucindama kwe shina lyobe," 
1Kings8:42 pantu abantu bali nokumfwa ubukulu bwe shina lyobe na maka ya kuboko kobe nefyo kwatambalala. Ilyo aba bantu baisa pali ino ŋanda mukupepa," 
1Kings8:43 nalyo line uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu, incende waikalako, no kucita conse ico umwinafyalo alomba, pakuti abantu bonse aba pano isonde bakeshibe ishina lyobe no kukutiina, nge ficita abantu bobe abena Israeli kabili bakeshibe nokuti ino ŋanda nkuulile mwikala ishina lyobe." 
1Kings8:44 “Ilyo abantu bobe baya ku nkondo mukulwisha abalwani babo, mu musango onse uo wabatuminamo, elyo bapepa kuli Yawe pali uno musumba wasala na pa ŋanda nkuulile umwakwikala ishina lyobe," 
1Kings8:45 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu amapepo yabo no kupapata kwabo elyo no kubapeela ukucimfya. 
1Kings8:46 “Abantu nga bakubifya, pantu takwaba umuntu nangu umo uushibifya, na iwe wabafulilwa no kubapeela mu minwe ya balwani babo, nabo babasenda bunkole ku calo cabo, kube ukutali nelyo mupepi," 
1Kings8:47 kabili nga cakuti bapilibula imitima ilyo bali muli cilya calo muli bunkole, elyo balapila no kupapata kuli iwe ninshi bacili mu calo babasendamo bunkole no kutila, ‘Natucita ububifi, natulufyanya, natucita icabipa,’" 
1Kings8:48 elyo bapilibukila kuli iwe ne mitima yabo yonse ne myeo yabo mu calo ca balwani ababasenda bunkole, kabili bapepa kuli iwe pali cino calo wapeele ifikolwe fyabo pali uno musumba wasala na pa ŋanda iyi nkuulile umwakwikala ishina lyobe," 
1Kings8:49 elyo uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu incende waikalako, uleumfwa amapepo no kupapata kwabo no kubafwa." 
1Kings8:50 Kabili ulebelela abantu bobe uluse abacitile ifyabubifi kuli iwe, ulebabelela uluse pali bumpulamafunde bonse ubo bacitile kuli iwe, no kulenga abalwani babo babakwatila uluse," 
1Kings8:51 pantu bantu bobe kabili abacishilano cobe, abo wafumishe mu calo ca Egupto umwali nga mwilungu lya mulilo." 
1Kings8:52 “Uleke amenso yobe yesuke ku kupapata kwa babomfi bobe na ku kupapata kwa bantu bobe abena Israeli, no kulabomfwa inshita yonse bakuuta kuli iwe." 
1Kings8:53 Pantu walibapatula ukufuma mu nko shonse isha pano isonde kukuba abacishilano cobe ngefyo wakonkomeshe ukupitila mu mubomfi obe Mose ilyo iwe we Mfumu Yawe, wafumishe ifikolwe fyesu ukufuma mu Egupto.”" 
1Kings8:54 Ilyo Solomoni apwile ukupepa no kulomba kuli Yawe, elyo aiminina kuntanshi ya bulambo bwakwa Yawe pa ncende pene aciba afukeme ninshi nasumbula amaboko yakwe ku mulu." 
1Kings8:55 Aiminina no kupaala ibumba lyonse ilya bena Israeli mwishiwi ilikalamba no kutila," 
1Kings8:56 “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, uupele ukutuusha ku bantu bakwe abena Israeli ukulingana nefyo alaile. Tapaba ishiwi nangu limo ilyafilwa ukufikilishiwapo pa fisuma fya bulayo bonse ubo apeele ukupitila mu mubomfi wakwe Mose." 
1Kings8:57 Yawe Lesa wesu abe na ifwe ngefyo ali ne fikolwe fyesu, kabili ekatusha nangu ukutuposa." 
1Kings8:58 Alenge imitima yesu ukupilibukila uko ali, no kulaenda mu nshila shakwe shonse, no kulasunga ifyebo fyakwe, ifipope elyo na mafunde wapeele ifikolwe fyesu." 
1Kings8:59 Kabili na mashiwi yonse ndelanda, ayo nabomfya pakupepa kuli Yawe, yapalame kuli Yawe Lesa wesu akasuba no bushiku pakuti afikilishepo inshila ya mubomfi wakwe no kufikilisha iya bantu bakwe abena Israeli iyo iya cila bushiku," 
1Kings8:60 pakuti na bantu bonse aba pano isonde beshibe ukuti Yawe ni Lesa kabili takwaba na umbi. 
1Kings8:61 Lelo imitima yenu ifwile ukuba iyacishinka kuli Yawe Lesa wesu, mukulaikala mu fipope fyakwe no kubeela amafunde yakwe nga fino cili nomba.”" 
1Kings8:62 Elyo imfumu na bena Israeli bonse abalipo batuulile amalambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. 
1Kings8:63 Solomoni atuula amalambo yakwampana kuli Yawe, iŋombe amakana amakumi yabili na makana yabili (22,000) elyo impaanga ne mbushi amakana umwanda umo na makana amakumi yabili (120,000). Ifi efyo imfumu na bena Israeli bonse balubwile iyo iŋanda kuli Yawe." 
1Kings8:64 Pa bushiku bwine bulya, imfumu yasangulula incende ya pakati ka lubansa ulwali ku ntanshi ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe, epo atuulila amalambo yakoca, umutuulo wa cabunga na mafuta ya mituulo yakwampana, pantu ubulambo bwa mukuba ubwakwa Yawe bwali ubunono ubwakutuulilapo amalambo yakoca, imituulo ya cabunga na mafuta ya mituulo yakwampana." 
1Kings8:65 Kanshi Solomoni na bena Israeli bonse ali nabo pali ilya nshita epakusefya inshikunkulu. Abantu bali abengi abafumine ukutendekela ku Lebo Hamati ukufika na ku kamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto. Basefeshe iyi nshikunkulu pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wesu pa nshiku cine lubali ukulundapo na shimbi cine lubali, shonse pamo ikumi limo na shine (14)." 
1Kings8:66 Pa bushiku bwakonkelepo asalanganya abantu bonse. Abantu nabo batasha imfumu, babwelela ku mayanda yabo abasansamuka no kusekelela mu mitima pa fisuma fyonse Yawe acitile umubomfi wakwe Davidi na bantu bakwe Abena Israeli." 
1Kings9:1 Ilyo imfumu Solomoni yapwile ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe ne sano lyaiko, kabili yasekela na muli fyonse ifyo yakabile ukucita," 
1Kings9:2 Yawe amonekele kuli Solomoni umuku wacibili, mu musango amonekelemo ku Gibeoni." 
1Kings9:3 Yawe atile kuli ena, “Niŋumfwa ipepo no kupapata upeele kuli ine, ninsangulula iyi ŋanda ukuulile no kubikamo ishina lyandi umuyayaya. Amenso yandi no mutima wandi fyakulabamo lyonse." 
1Kings9:4 Nomba iwe, nga cakuti walaenda pa cinso candi no mutima uwacishinka kabili uwatambalala, ngefyo wiso Davidi acitile, no kucita fyonse ifyo nakukonkomesha kabili no kubaka ifipope na mafunde yandi," 
1Kings9:5 ninshi nkalenga icipuna ca bufumu bobe pali Israeli ukubapo umuyayaya ngefyo nalaile Davidi wiso ilyo natile, ‘Tawakabulwe ukukwata umwaume uwakuba pa cipuna ca bufumu bwakwa Israeli.’" 
1Kings9:6 “Lelo iwe nangu abana bobe nga mwafuma ku cinso candi kabili mwakaana ukubaka amafunde ne fipope nkupeele, kabili mukambe ukulabombela imilungu imbi no kulaipepa," 
1Kings9:7 ninshi nkatamfya abena Israeli ukufuma mu calo mbapeele kabili nkakaana ne ŋanda ine ino iyo nasangulula umwakuba ishina lyandi. Israeli akabakofye mu lushimi kabili icintu icakuseka abantu bonse. 
1Kings9:8 Kabili nangu iŋanda ino nshita ilemoneka iyapulama, bonse abakalapitapo bakasunguka no kulaipusha abati, ‘Bushe cinshi calenga Yawe ukucita icintu ca musango uyu kuli cino calo na kuli iyi ŋanda?’" 
1Kings9:9 Abantu bakalaasuka abati, ‘Ni pa mulandu wakusuula imfumu Lesa wabo, uyo uwafumishe ifikolwe fyabo mu Egupto, no kwalukila ku milungu imbi eyo balapepa no kuitumika, ecalenga Yawe aletela ifinkunka fyonse ifi pali bena.’”" 
1Kings9:10 Panuma ya myaka amakumi yabili (20), inshita iyo Solomoni akuulilemo ifikulwa ifi fibili, iŋanda yakwa Yawe ne ŋanda ye sano," 
1Kings9:11 imfumu Solomoni yapeela Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi imisumba amakumi yabili (20) mu calo ca Galile pa mulimo Hiramu abombele uwakumupeela imbao sha fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda, imilando ya paini elyo na golide afwaile." 
1Kings9:12 Nomba ilyo Hiramu aile ukufuma ku Turi mukuya mona imisumba Solomoni amupeele, ayakaana ukusekelamo." 
1Kings9:13 Elyo atila kuli Solomoni, “Nga misumba ya musango nshi iyi umpeele we munyinane?” Elyo ainika cilya calo ati, “calo ca Kabuli,” ishina ilyo beta ukushinta na lelo." 
1Kings9:14 Lelo Hiramu ninshi alituma kale ku mfumu amatalanta ya golide umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120). 
1Kings9:15 Ifi efyo cali pa bamulaasa abo imfumu Solomoni yalembele pakukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe, iŋanda yakwe iye sano, ifibumbili fyakwikasha ifikulwa, ilinga lya mu Yerusalemu na Hasoli, Megido na Gesa." 
1Kings9:16 Farao imfumu ya ku Egupto yalisanshile no kupoka umusumba wa Gesa no kuoca. Aipaya na bena Kenani abaikalamo elyo aupeela na kuli mwane muka Solomoni nge cabupe ca pa bwinga. 
1Kings9:17 Elyo Solomoni akuula cipya cipya umusumba wa Gesa. Akuula na Beti Horoni wa pesamba," 
1Kings9:18 Baalati na Tadimo wa mu matololo ya mukati ka calo, pamo pene" 
1Kings9:19 ne misumba yakututilamo ifipe, imisumba ya maceleta ne ya bakabalwe, elyo na conse ico akabile ukukuula mu Yerusalemu, mu Lebanoni na mu ncende shonse umo ateekele." 
1Kings9:20 Kwaliko abantu bambi abashele mu calo abo abashali abena Israeli pamo nga bena Amoli, abena Hiti, abena Perisi, abena Hifi na abena Yebusi." 
1Kings9:21 Aba bali ba mu ndupwa shabo abashele mu calo abo abena Israeli bafilwa ukupeela kukonaulwa. Kanshi Solomoni epakubabuula abacita abasha bamulaasa ngefyo caba ukufika na pa bushiku bwa lelo. 
1Kings9:22 Lelo Solomoni tacitilepo umwina Israeli nangu umo ukuba umusha. Bena abacitafye abashilika ba nkondo, ababomfi babuteko, abatumishi bakwe, abakutungulula abashilika na bakalamba ba fita fya maceleta na bakabalwe." 
1Kings9:23 Ebaba bacilolo bakalamba abakumona pa milimo yakwa Solomoni. Bonse bali bacilolo imyanda isano na makumi yasano (550) abakwangalila abaume abalebomba imilimo. 
1Kings9:24 Panuma mwana Farao akukile ukufuma ku musumba wakwa Davidi ukwisa kwisano Solomoni amukuulile kulya, alundileko ifibumbili fyakwikasha ifikulwa." 
1Kings9:25 Imiku itatu cila mwaka Solomoni aletuula amalambo yakoca ne mituulo yakwampana pa bulambo akuulile Yawe, no koca ububani pa cinso cakwe. Pa nshita imo ine elyo afikilisha ne fyalefwaikwa ukucita mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
1Kings9:26 Imfumu Solomoni akuulile amato ayakalamba pa Esioni Geberi iyaba mupepi na Elati iya mu calo ca Edomu pa lulamba lwa Bemba Wakashika. 
1Kings9:27 Elyo Hiramu atuma abantu bakwe abamato abaishiba bemba ukubombela pamo na bantu bakwa Solomoni. 
1Kings9:28 Baya na mato ku Ofiri no kuya senda golide amatalanta imyanda ine na makumi yabili (420) baleta ku mfumu Solomoni. 
1Kings10:1 Ilyo namfumu wa ku Sheba aumfwile ululumbi pali Solomoni ifyo acindamike ishina lyakwa Yawe, aishile mukumwesha ku mepusho ayayafya." 
1Kings10:2 Aisa fika mu Yerusalemu no mulongo ukalamba uwa babomfi ne ngamila ishasendele ifya cena cisuma, golide uwingi nganshi no tumabwe utwa mutengo uukalamba. Afika kuli Solomoni no kulandishanya nankwe fyonse ifyali mu mano yakwe." 
1Kings10:3 Solomoni nao ayasuka amepusho yakwe yonse, tapali ico afililwe ukulondolwela uyu namfumu." 
1Kings10:4 Ilyo namfumu wa ku Sheba amona amano yakwa Solomoni elyo ne sano akuulile," 
1Kings10:5 ifyakulya ifyali petubulo lyakulilapo, imikalile ya bacilolo bakwe, imitumikile ya babomfi ne fyakufwala fyabo, bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu elyo no mutuulo wakoca atuulile pa ŋanda yakwa Yawe, ena calimupapwishe nganshi." 
1Kings10:6 Elyo atile ku mfumu, “Akasebo naumfwile ilyo ncili mu calo candi pafyo wabomba elyo na pa mano yobe kanshi fyacine." 
1Kings10:7 Lelo nshasumine ifi fintu fyonse mpaka ili naisa imwena na menso yandi. Mu cine ifyo naumfwile tafipaleme na pali citika wa fintu ukwete. Iwe, ku mano na ku cuma wakwata, walicila pa lulumbi naumfwile." 
1Kings10:8 Yangu ifyo bashuka abaume bobe! Yangu ifyo bashuka bacilolo bobe abeminina ku cinso cobe cila nshita no kumfwa ku mano yobe. 
1Kings10:9 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa obe, uwasekela muli iwe no kukubika pa cipuna ca bufumu bwa bena Israeli. Pa mulandu wa kutemwa kwa pe na pe uko Yawe akwatila abena Israeli, akulenga ukuba imfumu pakuti uleputula imilandu mu bulungami.”" 
1Kings10:10 Elyo apeele imfumu amatalanta ya golide umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120), ifya cena cisuma, no tumabwe twa mutengo uukalamba. Kabili takwatalile akuletwa ifya cena cisuma ku mfumu Solomoni ifyakulingana ne fyaletele namfumu wa ku Sheba." 
1Kings10:11 Amato yakwa Hiramu eyaletele golide ukufuma ku Ofiri, kabili kulya kwine eko yaleta ne miti iya aligumi elyo no tumabwe utwa mutengo uukalamba." 
1Kings10:12 Imfumu yabomfya imiti iyalukula ukupangamo inceshi shakwikasha iŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne ŋanda ye sano, elyo no kupangilamo amaseese ne nsango ifya bakemba. Iyi miti iyakosa iya mikula tayatala aimoneka nangu ukuletwa ukushinta na pa bushiku bwa lelo." 
1Kings10:13 Imfumu Solomoni apeele namfumu wa ku Sheba conse ico afwaile kabili ico alombele, ukulunda pafyo umwine amupeelefye ukufuma pa bunonshi bwa kwisano. Elyo namfumu abwelelemo ku calo kumwakwe pamo na babomfi bakwe." 
1Kings10:14 Ukufina kwa golide Solomoni alepoka cila mwaka kwali amatalanta imyanda mutanda na makumi mutanda na mutanda (666)," 
1Kings10:15 ukwabula ukupendelako iyalefuma ku musonko wa bamakwebo yakalamba na bashitisha ifipe elyo no kufuma ku mfumu shonse isha ku Arabia elyo na ku balashi ba mu calo. 
1Kings10:16 Imfumu Solomoni apangile inkwela ishikulu imyanda ibili (200) kuli golide uwakufula. Cila nkwela mwalebomba golide uwafina amakilo yatatu na citika (3.5kg). 
1Kings10:17 Kabili apanga inkwela na shimbi ishinono imyanda itatu (300) kuli golide uwafulwa. Na muli cila nkwela mwalebomba golide uwafina mupepi na makilo yabili. Imfumu yasungila inkwela mwisano ilyaleitwa “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni.” 
1Kings10:18 Elyo imfumu yapangile icipuna icikulu ica meno ya nsofu kabili yalambatikako golide umusuma. 
1Kings10:19 Icipuna cakwete amatabo mutanda, elyo kunuma yaciko cali icashinguluka pamulu. Mu mbali yaciko mwaba apakushintilisha amaboko uku noku, ne nkalamo shibili ishaiminina ku mbali ya fyakushintilishapo amaboko." 
1Kings10:20 Inkalamo shimbi ikumi limo na shibili (12) shaiminina mu matabo mutanda, imo pa mpela ya cile tabo. Takwaba icipuna ca ifi icatala acipangwa mu bufumu ubuli bonse." 
1Kings10:21 Ifipe fyonse ifyakunwenamo ifya mfumu Solomoni fyali ifya golide, kabili ifipe fyonse ifya mu ŋanda ye sano iyaleitwa “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni” fyali fya golide wine wine. Tamwali icapangilwe kuli silifa pantu silifa tayali iyacindama mu nshiku shakwa Solomoni." 
1Kings10:22 Imfumu yakwete amato aya ku Tashishi ayengi pali bemba ayali pamo na yakwa Hiramu. Umuku umo panuma ya myaka itatu yalebwela nayasenda golide, silifa, ameno ya nsofu, bakolwe bakalamba elyo na bapikoko." 
1Kings10:23 Imfumu Solomoni yalicilile imfumu shonse isha pano isonde mu bunonshi na mu mano. 
1Kings10:24 Aba pano isonde bonse balafwaya ukumonana na Solomoni pakuti bomfweko amano Lesa abikile mu mutima wakwe. 
1Kings10:25 Cila mwaka, umuntu onse uwaisa aleta ifipe fya silifa na golide, imingila, ifyanso fya nkondo, ifinyamuti ifyanunka ubusaka muri pamo na fimbi ifya cena icisuma, bakabalwe ne mfalashi." 
1Kings10:26 Solomoni alonganika amaceleta na bakabalwe. Akwete amaceleta ikana limo ne myanda ine (1,400) elyo na bakabalwe amakana ikumi limo na yabili (12,000) afibika mu misumba ya maceleta elyo fimbi aba nafyo mu Yerusalemu." 
1Kings10:27 Imfumu yalenga silifa ukufula mu Yerusalemu nga mabwe, ne fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ubwingi kwati mikunyu ya mwisamba lya mpili." 
1Kings10:28 Bakabalwe bakwa Solomoni babashitile mu calo ca ku Egupto na ku Kuwe. Bashimakwebo ba mfumu ebaleshita ukufuma ku Kuwe. 
1Kings10:29 Bashitile iceleta ukufuma ku Egupto pa ndalama imyanda mutanda (600) isha mashekeli ya silifa elyo kabalwe umo pa ndalama amashekeli umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150). Bashimakwebo bakwa Solomoni nabo baleshitisha ku shamfumu shonse isha bena Hiti na bena Aramu. 
1Kings11:1 Lelo Imfumu Solomoni yalitemenwe abanakashi na bambi ukucila pali mwana Farao. Alyupilepo na banakashi ba ku Moabu, aba ku Amoni, abena Edomu, abena Sidoni na bena Hiti." 
1Kings11:2 Bali ba ku mitundu iyo Yawe aebele abena Israeli ukuti, “Tamufwile ukulaupana nabo, pantu bakapilibula imitima yenu ukwamba ukulakonka imilungu yabo.” Lelo Solomoni akonenafye mukubatemwa." 
1Kings11:3 Akwata abakashi imyanda cine lubali (700) aba ku bufumu elyo na bakashi bakwe abo ashaupile mu bwinga nabo imyanda itatu (300). Na bakashi bakwe bayalula umutima wakwe. 
1Kings11:4 Ilyo Solomoni akota, abakashi bakwe balenga umutima wakwe ukupilibukila ku milungu imbi, no mutima wakwe waleka ukuba uwacishinka kuli Yawe Lesa wakwe, ngefyo umutima wakwa wishi Davidi wali." 
1Kings11:5 Alakonka Ashitoreti umulungu uwanakashi wa bena Sidoni, na Moleki umulungu uwakowela uwa bena Amoni." 
1Kings11:6 Solomoni asuka acita ifyabipa mu menso yakwa Yawe, aleka ukulakonka Yawe umupwilapo ngefyo Davidi wishi acitile." 
1Kings11:7 Pa lupili ku kabanga ka musumba wa Yerusalemu, Solomoni akuula incende yakupepelapo akalubi ka Kemoshi umulungu uwakowela uwa bena Moabu. Acita cimo cine kabili akuulila akalubi ka Moleki, umulungu uwakowela uwa bena Amoni." 
1Kings11:8 Ifyo fine efyo acitila ne milungu ya bakashi bakwe bonse abafumine kumbi. Balafukilisha ububani no kulatuula amalambo ku milungu yabo. 
1Kings11:9 Yawe afulilwe Solomoni pafyo umutima wakwe wafumine kuli Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli uwamonekele kuli ena imiku ibili. 
1Kings11:10 Nangu Solomoni bamuleseshe kuli Lesa ukukonka imilungu imbi, Solomoni tasungile amafunde yakwa Yawe." 
1Kings11:11 Eico Yawe aebele Solomoni ati, “Apo iyi e mbela yobe kabili wafilwa no kubaka icipangano candi ne fipope fyandi ifyo nakukonkomeshe, nalasesha ubufumu ukufuma kuli iwe no kubupeela kuli umo pa babomfi bobe." 
1Kings11:12 Lelo, pa mulandu wakwa Davidi wiso, nshakacite ici mu nshita ya bumi bobe. Ndi no kwisa sesha ubufumu ukufuma ku mwana obe." 
1Kings11:13 Nalyo line nshakaseshe ubufumu bonse ukufuma kuli ena. Ndi nokumupeelako uluko lumo pa mulandu wakwa Davidi umubomfi wandi na pa mulandu wa Yerusalemu umusumba uo nasala.” 
1Kings11:14 Elyo Yawe aimisha Solomoni umulwani Hadadi umwina Edomu, ukufuma ku bufumu bwa bena Edomu." 
1Kings11:15 Kunuma ilyo Davidi alelwisha abena Edomu, Yoabu umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo ilyo aile mukushiika abafwa, aile ipaya abaume bonse mu Edomu." 
1Kings11:16 Yoabu na bonse abena Israeli baile ikala kulya pa myeshi mutanda mpaka balofyafye bonse abaume ba mu Edomu. 
1Kings11:17 Nomba Hadadi ninshi acilifye akalumendo abutukile ku Egupto pamo na bacilolo bamo aba mu Edomu ababomfi bakwa wishi. 
1Kings11:18 Pakubutuka, bafumine ku Midiani baya ku Parani. Lilya basendako abantu ku Parani baya ku Egupto kuli Farao imfumu ya ku Egupto. Farao amupeela iŋanda ne ncende elyo amupeela ne fyakulya." 
1Kings11:19 Farao atemwa nganshi Hadadi icakuti amupeela na mulamu wakwe, nkashi nankwe wakwa namfumu Tapenesi ukuba umukashi wakwe." 
1Kings11:20 Kuli nkashi nankwe yakwa Tapenesi, Hadadi afyalako umwana umwaume amwinika ishina lya Genubati. Tapenesi akushishe uyu mwana kwisano, eko alakulila pamo na bamwana Farao." 
1Kings11:21 Lintu acili mu Egupto, Hadadi aumfwile ukuti Davidi nafwa no kuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, kabili aumfwa nokuti Yoabu umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo nao nafwa. Elyo Hadadi aebele Farao ati, “Leka ndeya pakuti mbwelelemo ku calo ca kumwesu.”" 
1Kings11:22 Farao amwasuka ati, “Finshi ifyo uculila ifyalenga ukuti ufwaye ukubwelela ku calo kumwenu?” Hadadi ati, “Tapaba, lelo leka ndeya.”" 
1Kings11:23 Kabili Lesa aimishe Solomoni na umbi umulwani, Resoni mwana Eliada uwabutwike ukufuma kuli shikulu wakwe Hadadesa imfumu ya ku Soba." 
1Kings11:24 Alonganika impuka ya bantu abakumukonka ababulwi elyo aba ne ntungulushi ya bacisanguka. Pali ilya nshita Davidi aleonaula abashilika bakwa Soba, bacisanguka baile ku Damasika eko baya ikala. Babika na Resoni ukuba imfumu yabo." 
1Kings11:25 Resoni ali umulwani wa bena Israeli pa nshita yonse iya bumi bwakwa Solomoni, alunda na ku bubi bonse Hadadi alecita. Kanshi Resoni ateekele mu Aramu kabili ali cipondo ca bena Israeli." 
1Kings11:26 Yeroboamu nao, mwana Nebati, apondokele imfumu. Ali umo pali bacilolo bakwa Solomoni. Ali umwina Efulemu uwa ku Sereda, kabili nyina ali ni namfwilwa ishina lyakwe Serua." 
1Kings11:27 Umfweni icalengele ukuti apondokele imfumu. Solomoni alikuulile ifibumbili fyakwikasha ifikulwa no kucilika umupokapoka mu cibumba ca musumba wakwa Davidi wishi. 
1Kings11:28 Nomba Yeroboamu aba umwaume uwamaka, kabili ilyo Solomoni amona ifyo uyu mulumendo alebomba imilimo yakwe bwino, amubika ukuba umukalamba wa babomfi bamulaasa ku ŋanda yakwa Yosefu." 
1Kings11:29 Pa nshita ine ilya Yeroboamu aima ubulendo ukuya ku Yerusalemu, elyo pa nshila akumanya Ahiya kasesema wa ku Shilo, nafwala umwingila upya. Bonse babili babafye beka mu mpanga," 
1Kings11:30 na Ahiya abuula umwingila upya afwele no kuulepaula mu tupimfya ikumi limo na tubili (12). 
1Kings11:31 Elyo asosa kuli Yeroboamu ati, “Buulapo utupimfya ikumi limo tube tobe, pantu ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli alanda ukuti, ‘Mona, nalaputula ubufumu ukufuma mu maboko yakwa Solomoni no kukupeelako inko ikumi limo." 
1Kings11:32 Lelo pa mulandu wa mubomfi wandi Davidi, na pa mulandu wa musumba wa Yerusalemu uo nasala ukufuma mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli, ali nokushalapo no luko lumo." 
1Kings11:33 Nalacita ifi pa mulandu wakuti nabansha no kwamba ukupepa Ashitoreti umulungu wa bena Sidoni, Kemoshi umulungu wa bena Moabu elyo na Moleki umulungu wa bena Amoni. Kabili bafilwa no kwenda mu nshila shandi nangu ukucita ifintu ifyalungama pa cinso candi, nangu ukubaka ifipope fyandi na mafunde yandi ngefyo Davidi wishi wakwa Solomoni acitile." 
1Kings11:34 “‘Nomba nshafumye ubufumu bonse mu maboko yakwa Solomoni. Nalimubika ukuba imfumu mu nshiku shonse isha mweo wakwe pa mulandu wa mubomfi wandi Davidi, uo nasalile elyo kabili uwabakile ifikomo na mafunde yandi." 
1Kings11:35 Ndi nokufumya ubufumu ukufuma mu minwe ya mwana wakwe no kukupeelapo inko ikumi limo. 
1Kings11:36 Nkapeela uluko lumo ku mwana wakwe pakuti umubomfi wandi inshita yonse akakwate icisaniko pa cinso candi mu Yerusalemu, mu musumba umo nasalile ukubika ishina lyandi." 
1Kings11:37 Lelo palwa iwe, nkakubuula kabili uli nokuba imfumu pali Israeli yonse." 
1Kings11:38 Iwe nga wacita fyonse ifyo nakukonkomesha, no kwenda mu nshila shandi no kucita ifyalungama mu menso yandi mukubaka ifipope na mafunde yandi ngefyo Davidi umubomfi wandi acitile, ninshi ndi nokuba nobe. Nkakukuulila ubufumu ubwamaka, kwati ni bulya nakuulile Davidi, no kupeela icalo ca Israeli kuli iwe." 
1Kings11:39 Nkapetamika aba mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi pa mulandu uyu, nomba te nshiku shonse.’”" 
1Kings11:40 Solomoni afwaile ukwipaya Yeroboamu, nomba nao abutukila ku Egupto kuli Shishaki imfumu eko aya ikala mpaka ilyo Solomoni afwile." 
1Kings11:41 Palwa milandu imbi iya bufumu bwakwa Solomoni, fyonse ifyo acitile na mano akwete, bushe tafyalembwa fyonse mu citabo ca milandu yakwa Solomoni?" 
1Kings11:42 Solomoni aikele mu Yerusalemu no kuteeka icalo conse ica Israeli pa myaka amakumi yane (40). 
1Kings11:43 Ilyo afwile, bamushiikile ku ncende ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi wishi. Kabili Reoboamu umwana wakwe umwaume ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
1Kings12:1 Reoboamu aile ku Shekemu pantu abena Israeli bonse eko baile mukuya mubika pa bufumu. 
1Kings12:2 Ilyo Yeroboamu mwana Nebati aumfwa ifi ninshi acili mu Egupto, mu calo abutukilemo ilyo afulumwike ukufuma kuli Solomoni. Pakumfwa lyena epakubwela ukufuma ku Egupto." 
1Kings12:3 Abena Israeli baita Yeroboamu, elyo ena na bena Israeli bonse baya kuli Reoboamu bamweba abati," 
1Kings12:4 “Wiso alilumike nganshi ikoli pali ifwe. Nomba iwe utwangushisheko imibombele yacibe ne koli ilyafina wiso abikile pali ifwe, na ifwe twalaba abakukubombela.”" 
1Kings12:5 Reoboamu abasuka ati, “Taleni kabiyeni, panuma ya nshiku shitatu elyo mukabwele kuli ine.” Na bantu bafumapo baya." 
1Kings12:6 Elyo imfumu Reoboamu alandishanya na bakalamba abalebomba na wishi Solomoni ilyo alipo. Abepusha ati, “Bushe mano nshi mwalampandako ayakwisa asukilamo aba bantu?”" 
1Kings12:7 Bamwasuka abati, “Nga cakuti ilelo walaicita umubomfi wa aba bantu no kubabombela no kulabasuka bwino, nabo bali nokuba ababomfi bobe lyonse.”" 
1Kings12:8 Lelo Reoboamu akaana amano yamupandileko abakalamba, elyo aya ipusha amano ukufuma ku baice banankwe abo akulile nabo kabili abalemubombela." 
1Kings12:9 Abepusha ati, “Imwe kuti mwatipo shani? Aba bantu kuti twabasuka shani abatile kuli ine ati, ‘Unashe ikoli wiso abikile pali ifwe.’”" 
1Kings12:10 Na balumendo abo akulile pamo nankwe bamwasuka abati, “Eba aba bantu basosele kuli iwe ati, ‘Wiso abikile ikoli lyafina pali ifwe, nomba iwe utwangushisheko ikoli,’ ubebe bonse auti, ‘Umunwe wandi unono untu waina ukucila umusana wa batata." 
1Kings12:11 Tata abikile pali imwe ikoli ilyafina, lelo ine nalalundapo ukufina. Tata alemuma ku fikoti, nomba ine nakulamumina kuli bakaliŋongo.’”" 
1Kings12:12 Panuma ya nshiku shitatu Yeroboamu na bantu bonse baisa kuli Reoboamu, ngefyo imfumu yasosele ati, “Mukabwele kuli ine panuma ya nshiku shitatu.”" 
1Kings12:13 Imfumu yayasuka abantu bukali bukali, yakaana na mano abakalamba baipandileko," 
1Kings12:14 yakonka amano yafumine ku balumendo baiko no kulanda aiti, “Tata abikile pali imwe ikoli lyafina, ine ndi nokucishapo. Tata alemumina ku fikoti, ine nakulamumina kuli bakaliŋongo.”" 
1Kings12:15 Imfumu yafilwa ukumfwa ku bantu pantu ukucitika kwa ifi fyonse kwafumine kuli Yawe, pakufikilisha ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyalandilwe kuli Yeroboamu mwana Nebati ukupitila muli Ahiya umwina Shiloni." 
1Kings12:16 Ilyo abena Israeli bamona ukuti imfumu yakaana ukubomfwa, bayasuka imfumu abati, “Cakaniko nshi twakwata muli Davidi, cipande nshi muli mwana Yese? Bwekeleni ku matenti yenu, mwe bena Israeli. Nobe Davidi, ulesakamana iŋanda yobe we mwine!” Kanshi abena Israeli epakubwekela ku mayanda yabo." 
1Kings12:17 Lelo ku bena Israeli abaikele mu misumba ya mu Yuda, Reoboamu ewali mfumu." 
1Kings12:18 Imfumu Reoboamu yatumine Adoniramu, uwali umukalamba pa milimo ya mulaasa, nomba abena Israeli baisa mupola amabwe mpaka afwa. Imfumu Reoboamu yena yaendesha ukunina mwiceleta no kufyukila ku Yerusalemu." 
1Kings12:19 Kanshi efyo abena Israeli baba abasangukila iŋanda yakwa Davidi ukufika ne lelo. 
1Kings12:20 Ilyo abena Israeli baumfwile ukuti Yeroboamu nabwela, elyo bamwitile uko balongene, baisa mubika ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli. Uluko lwakwa Yuda elwashelefye ku bufumu bwa ŋanda yakwa Davidi." 
1Kings12:21 Ilyo Reoboamu afikile mu Yerusalemu, alonganike aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda bonse na ba mu luko lwakwa Benjamini abaume babulwi amakana umwanda umo na makana amakumi cine konse konse (180,000) ukuti balwe na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli, pakuti bapokolole no kubwesesha ubufumu kuli Reoboamu mwana Solomoni." 
1Kings12:22 Nomba kwaisa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe kuli Shemaiya umuntu wakwa Lesa ilyakuti," 
1Kings12:23 “Landa kuli Reoboamu mwana Solomoni imfumu ya mu Yuda, ku ŋanda yonse iyakwa Yuda na Benjamini na ku bantufye bonse." 
1Kings12:24 Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, ‘Mwiya mukulwisha bamunyinenwe, abena Israeli. Kabiyeni ku mayanda yenu cila umo onse pantu nine ncitile ifi.’” Nabo baumfwila ishiwi lyakwa Yawe babwelelamo ku mayanda yabo ngefyo Yawe apeele icipope." 
1Kings12:25 Elyo Yeroboamu akuulile ilinga ilyakosa nganshi ku Shekemu mu mpili sha ku Efulemu eko aikala. Kulya eko afumine pakuya kuula Penieli. 
1Kings12:26 Yeroboamu atontonkanya mu mano yakwe ati, “Ubufumu kuti bwasuka bwabwelela mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi," 
1Kings12:27 nga cakuti aba bantu batwalilila ukulaya mukutuula amalambo ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe mu Yerusalemu. Kabili bakatampa ukunakila shikulwibo Reoboamu imfumu ya bena Yuda. Bali nokunjipaya bakabwelele na ku mfumu Reoboamu.” 
1Kings12:28 Panuma ilyo atontonkanyapo, imfumu yapangile ifiponti fibili ifya golide. Yaeba na bantu aiti, “Mulimo uukalamba nganshi uwakuti lyonse muleyafye ku Yerusalemu. Iyi e milungu yenu mwe bena Israeli iyamufumishe mu calo ca ku Egupto.”" 
1Kings12:29 Umulungu umo aubika mu Betele elyo na ubiye mu Dani. 
1Kings12:30 Kabili ici acitile caba icabubifi. Abantu balayafye ukufika na ku Dani mukupepa umulungu uwaliko. 
1Kings12:31 Yeroboamu akuula amayanda yakupepelamo apasansama, asontelamo na bashimapepo ukufuma mu bantu abalekana lekana, abo abashali na bena Lefi." 
1Kings12:32 Abika inshikunkulu pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi walenga cine konse konse ukulingana ne nshikunkulu yaleba ku Yuda elyo atuula na malambo ya pa bulambo. Acite ifi mu Betele, ukutuula ku mulungu uo apangile. Kabili pa Betele asontelapo bashimapepo pa mayanda ya mapepo akuulile." 
1Kings12:33 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) mu mweshi walenga cine konse konse, umweshi uo umwine aisalilefye, atuulile amalambo pa bulambo akuulile pa Betele. Efyo abikile inshikunkulu ya bena Israeli kabili anina na ku bulambo mukuya tuula imituulo." 
1Kings13:1 Lintu Yeroboamu aiminine ku bulambo mukutuula umutuulo, umuntu wakwa Lesa uwafumine ku Yuda aishile ku Betele peshiwi lyakwa Yawe." 
1Kings13:2 Na peshiwi lyakwa Yawe asesema pali ubu bulambo ati, “We bulambo, we bulambo, umfwa ifyo Yawe alanda, ‘Kuli nokufyalwa umwana umwaume mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi, uo bakalaita Yosaya. Pali iwe epo ali nokwipaila bashimapepo aba ncende shakupepelamo imilungu abesa mukutuula imituulo pano, na mafupa ya bantu yali nokupiila pali iwe.’”" 
1Kings13:3 Pa bushiku bwine ubu, umuntu wakwa Lesa apeele icishibilo, “Ici e cishibilo Yawe alapeela. Ubulambo bwalabongoloka ne mito ilipo yalaitika.”" 
1Kings13:4 Ilyo imfumu Yeroboamu aumfwa ifyo umuntu wakwa Lesa aseseme pa bulambo ubu ku Betele, afumya ukuboko ku bulambo nokutila, “Mwikateni.” Nomba ukuboko asonteleko uyu muntu kwatunkana icakuti afilwa no kukubwesha." 
1Kings13:5 Elyo ubulambo nabo bwabongoloka ne mito yaitika ukulingana ne cishibilo capeele umuntu wakwa Lesa mukukonke shiwi lyakwa Yawe. 
1Kings13:6 Elyo imfumu yatila ku muntu wakwa Lesa, “Mpapatilako kuli Yawe Lesa obe no kumpepelako pakuti ukuboko kwandi kufunguluke.” Kanshi umuntu wakwa Lesa epakupapata kuli Yawe, no kuboko kwa mfumu kwafunguluka no kubafye ifyo kwaba na kale." 
1Kings13:7 Imfumu yaeba umuntu wakwa Lesa aiti, “Tuleya ku ŋanda kumwandi uye lyako ifyakulya, na ine njekupeelako ne cabupe.”" 
1Kings13:8 Lelo umuntu wakwa Lesa ayasuka imfumu ati, “Nangufye cingaba ukuti ulempeela icalo cobe pakati, teti nje na iwe nangu ukulya umukate no kunwa amenshi kuno." 
1Kings13:9 Pantu Yawe alinkonkomeshe kwishiwi lyakwe ati, ‘Taufwile ukulya umukate nangu ukunwa amenshi nangufye ukubwelela inshila wapitilemo.’”" 
1Kings13:10 Kanshi epakupita inshila imbi, akaana ukubwelela mu nshila apitile pakwisa ku Betele." 
1Kings13:11 Nomba kwali kasesema uwakale uwaleikala ku Betele, uyo abana bakwe baishile londolwela fyonse ifyo umuntu wakwa Lesa acitile pali bulya bushiku. Elyo baeba wishi ifyo uyu muntu aebele imfumu." 
1Kings13:12 Wishi abepusha ati, “Ni nshila nshi elemo?” Kabili abana bakwe epakumulangilila inshila umo umuntu wakwa Lesa uwafumine ku Yuda elemo." 
1Kings13:13 Ena aeba abana bakwe ati, “Mpekanishisheniko kabalwe.” Kabili ilyo bapwisha ukupekanya kabalwe, aisa ninapo." 
1Kings13:14 Elyo akonka ukwaile umuntu wakwa Lesa, mpaka aya musanga naikala mwisamba lya cimuti ca oki. Elyo amwipusha ati, “Bushe niwe muntu wakwa Lesa uwafumine ku Yuda?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Nine.”" 
1Kings13:15 Elyo kasesema amweba ati, “Tuleya ku ŋanda uye lyako icakulya.”" 
1Kings13:16 Umuntu wakwa Lesa ayasuka ati, “Teti mbwelele kunuma ukukonka iwe, nangu ukulya umukate nangu ukunwa amenshi muli ino ncende." 
1Kings13:17 Yawe alinkonkomesha kwishiwi lyakwe ukukanalyako umukate, nangu ukunwa amenshi, nangu ukubwelela mu nshila naishilemo.”" 
1Kings13:18 Kasesema wakale ayasuka ati, “Na ine wine ndi kasesema nga iwe. Ni malaika eunjebele kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe ati, ‘Kamubweseshe, ku ŋanda yobe pakuti ese alye umukate no kunwa amenshi.’” Ninshi kanshi alemubepafye." 
1Kings13:19 Kanshi umuntu wakwa Lesa epakubwelela nankwe aya lya no kunwa mu ŋanda yakwe. 
1Kings13:20 Lilya bacili nabekala petebulo, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli kasesema wakale uwamulengele ukubwela." 
1Kings13:21 Abilikisha ku muntu wakwa Lesa uwafumine ku Yuda ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Pa mulandu wakuti wasuula ishiwi lyakwa Yawe kabili wafilwa ukubaka ishiwi ilyo Yawe Lesa obe akukonkomeshe," 
1Kings13:22 lelo wabwelela kunuma no kwisa lya umukate no kunwa amenshi muli ino ncende umo akwebele ukukanalyamo umukate nangu ukunwamo amenshi, kanshi nomba umubili obe tawakashiikwe ukwashiikwa ifikolwe fyobe.’”" 
1Kings13:23 Ilyo umuntu wakwa Lesa apwishishe ukulya no kunwa, kasesema uwamubweseshe amupekanishisha kabalwe wakwe." 
1Kings13:24 Lilya acili mukuya, inkalamo yamukumanya pa musebo no kumwipaya. Yaposa no mubili wakwe pa musebo. Elyo kabalwe aiminina ku lubali lumbi ulwa citumbi ne nkalamo nayo ulubali lumbi." 
1Kings13:25 Abantu abalepita basanga icitumbi nacilala mu musebo ne nkalamo naiminina mumbali, elyo baya eba aba mu musumba umwaleikala kasesema wakale." 
1Kings13:26 Ilyo kasesema uwamubweseshe pa lwendo lwakwe aumfwile, alandile ati, “Ni ulya umuntu wakwa Lesa uwafililwe ukubeela ishiwi lyakwa Yawe. Yawe eumupeele ku nkalamo iyacimwikata no kumwipaya ngefyo icebo cakwa Yawe casokele.”" 
1Kings13:27 Kasesema aeba abana bakwe ati, “Mpekanishisheni kabalwe,” nabo efyo bacita." 
1Kings13:28 Elyo aima aya sanga icitumbi nacitambalala pa musebo ne nkalamo naimininina pa mbali. Inkalamo tayalile icitumbi nangu ukwikata kabalwe. 
1Kings13:29 Elyo kasesema aimya icitumbi ca muntu wakwa Lesa abika na pali kabalwe, acileta na ku musumba wakwe kukwisa muloosha no kumushiika." 
1Kings13:30 Aya lalika icitumbi mu nshinshi yakwe elyo bamuloosha no kulanda ati, “Iye we munyinefwe.”" 
1Kings13:31 Panuma ya kumushiika elyo aeba abana bakwe ati, “Ine nga nafwa, mukanshiike mu cilindi ici cine twashiikamo umuntu wakwa Lesa. Mukabike amafupa yandi pa mbali ya mafupa yakwe." 
1Kings13:32 Pantu imbila abilile kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe pa mulandu wa bulambo mu Betele na pa mayanda yonse ya ku ncende shakupepelapo imilungu isha mishi ya mu Samaria ili nokufikilishiwa.” 
1Kings13:33 Lelo na panumafye ya fyonse ifi, Yeroboamu tafumine ku nshila shakwe ishabubifi, lelo nakabili abwekeshapo ukusonta bashimapepo ku ncende shakupepelapo imilungu ukufuma ku bantu abalekana lekana. Onsefye uwafwaya ukuba shimapepo amusuminisha, amupeela ne ncende yakupepelapo." 
1Kings13:34 Ici ecali icabubifi ico iŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu yacitile, icalengele no bufumu ukuwa elyo no konaika mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse." 
1Kings14:1 Pa nshita ine ilya, Abiya mwana Yeroboamu alilwele," 
1Kings14:2 na Yeroboamu aeba umukashi wakwe ati, “Kabiye, uilufyanye pakuti bekwishiba ukuti niwe muka Yeroboamu. Elyo uye ku Shilo. Ahiya kasesema eko ali, ulya uwanjebele ukuti ndi nokuba imfumu ya aba bantu." 
1Kings14:3 Usende mikate ikumi limo, umukate uwanaka bwino no lukunku lwa buci elyo uye kuli ena. Alaya kweba ifili nokucitika ku mwana.”" 
1Kings14:4 Eico muka Yeroboamu acita ifyo mulume amwebele aya ku ŋanda yakwa Ahiya ku Shilo. Nomba Ahiya alilekele ukumona pa mulandu wakukota. 
1Kings14:5 Lelo Yawe alyebele Ahiya ukuti, “Muka Yeroboamu ali mukwisa kukwipusha palwa mwana wakwe umulwele. Eico nga afika, wise umwasuke ifi nefi. Ilyo alefika aleisa icita kwati muntu umbi.”" 
1Kings14:6 Kanshi ilyofye Ahiya aumfwa inshindo pa mwinshi atila, “Ingila muka Yeroboamu. Cinshi ico uleilufyanishisha. Nintumwa ukuleta amashiwi ayabi kuli iwe." 
1Kings14:7 Kabiye, kebe Yeroboamu ukuti ifi efyo Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli alanda, ‘Nakwimishe ukufuma mu bantufye no kwisa kubika pa bufumu bwa bantu bandi abena Israeli." 
1Kings14:8 Napatwile ubufumu ukufuma kuba mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi, napeela kuli iwe. Nomba naufilwa ukuba ngo mubomfi wandi Davidi, uwabakile amafunde yandi no kuyakonka no mutima wakwe, na lyonse ukulacita ifyalungama mu menso yandi." 
1Kings14:9 Naucita icabipa ukucila pali bonse abakutangilile. Nauyipangila imilungu yobe we mwine, ifimpashanya ifyaengululwa, naunkalifya umutima no kumposa ku numa yobe." 
1Kings14:10 “‘Pa mulandu wa ici, nalaponya icinkunka pa ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu. Ndi no kuputula ukufuma kuli Yeroboamu umwaume onse uwakulekelesha mu Israeli, umusha nangu uwakaele. Ndi nokoca iŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu, ngefyo boca amafi, mpaka yalokota." 
1Kings14:11 Imbwa shikalya bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu abakafwila mu musumba, elyo ifyuni fya mu lwelele nafyo fikalya abakafwila mu mpanga.’ Yawe efyo alanda." 
1Kings14:12 “Nomba iwe bwelelamo kumobe. Ilyo walaya ingila mu musumba umwana alaya fwa. 
1Kings14:13 Abena Israeli bonse bali nokumuloosha kabili no kumushiika. Ena e umofye paba mu ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu uo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli asangilemo ubusuma." 
1Kings14:14 “Yawe umwine ali nokufwailapo imfumu imbi pa bena Israeli iyo iyili no kwisa onaula iŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu. Buno bwine e bushiku, nga cinshi? Ee ni nombalinefye." 
1Kings14:15 Kabili Yawe ali nokupunganya abena Israeli ukuba kwati litete lilepungana mu mulonga wa menshi. Ali nokushimpula Israeli ukufuma muli cilya calo icisuma ico apeele ifikolwe fyabo, no kubasalanganishisha kwishilya lya mumana, pantu nabakalifya Yawe umutima pakupanga inceshi sha mulungu Ashera." 
1Kings14:16 Kabili ali nokubasha pa mulandu wa pa bubifi ubo Yeroboamu acitile no kulenga abena Israeli nabo ukubifya.” 
1Kings14:17 Elyo muka Yeroboamu aimine afuma no kuya ku Tirisa. Lilya line afikafye pa lubansa lwa ŋanda, no mwana afwa." 
1Kings14:18 Bamushiika elyo na bena Israeli bonse bamuloosha nge shiwi Yawe asosele ukupitila mu mubomfi wakwe Ahiya. 
1Kings14:19 Imilimo imbi iyo Yeroboamu acitile mu nshiku shakwe ishabufumu, ubulwi alwile, ifyo ateekele, fyonse fyalilembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli." 
1Kings14:20 Ali imfumu pa myaka amakumi yabili na ibili (22) elyo afwa ayalala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. No mwana wakwe Nadabu ewamupyene ukuba imfumu. 
1Kings14:21 Reoboamu mwana Solomoni ali imfumu mu Yuda. Ali ne myaka amakumi yane na umo (41) ilyo aishile ba imfumu. Kabili aikele pa bufumu imyaka ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) mu Yerusalemu, umusumba uo Yawe asalile ukufuma mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli umwakwikala ishina lyakwe. Ishina lyakwa nyina ni Nama, umwina Amoni." 
1Kings14:22 Abena Yuda bacitile icabipa mu menso yakwa Yawe. Ukucila na pa fyabubifi ifikolwe fyabo fyacitile. 
1Kings14:23 Baikuulila ne ncende shakupepelamo imilungu yabo, baimika amabwe ne nceshi sha mulungu Ashera pa mulu wa mpili shonse ishitali na pesamba lya cimuti conse icafumba." 
1Kings14:24 Mwaba na bacilende ba ku mfuba abaume mu calo. Abantu bonse baiposa mukucita ifyamakankamike ifyalecita abantu abo Yawe atamfishe ku cinso ca bena Israeli. 
1Kings14:25 Mu mwaka walenga isano iya bufumu bwakwa Reoboamu, Shishaki imfumu ya ku Egupto yasansa umusumba wa Yerusalemu." 
1Kings14:26 Asenda icuma conse icali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ne cuma ca mu ŋanda ye sano. Asendafye fyonse, asendela kumo ne nkwela sha golide isho Solomoni apangile." 
1Kings14:27 Kanshi imfumu Reoboamu epakupanga shimbi inkwela isha mukuba ishakupyanikishapo, yashipeela na ku bakalamba ba bashilika abalelonda pa mpongolo ya kwisano." 
1Kings14:28 Ilyo lyonse imfumu yaya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe, abashilika baya nabafwala, elyo pakubwela bashibwesesha mu muputule wakushisungilamo." 
1Kings14:29 Palwa fintu fimbi ifyakwa Reoboamu, ifyo acitile pa bufumu, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
1Kings14:30 Paali ukulwishanya ukwatwalilila pakati kakwa Reoboamu na Yeroboamu. 
1Kings14:31 Kabili Reoboamu ilyo afwa aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, aya shiikwa pamo nabo mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Nyina ishina lyakwe ni Nama umwina Amoni. Elyo Abiya umwana wakwe amupyana pa bufumu." 
1Kings15:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwa bufumu bwakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, Abiya ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Yuda." 
1Kings15:2 Kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka itatu. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Maaka mwana Abishalomu. 
1Kings15:3 Acitile ifyabubifi fyonse ifyo wishi acitileko. Umutima wakwe tawaipeele kuli Yawe Lesa wakwe ngefyo umutima wa cikolwe cakwe Davidi wali. 
1Kings15:4 Lelo pa mulandu we shina lyakwa Davidi, Yawe Lesa wakwe amupeela ulubuuto mu Yerusalemu pakwimya mwane ukumupyana elyo no kulenga umusumba wa Yerusalemu ukukosa." 
1Kings15:5 Pantu Davidi alicitile icisuma pa cinso cakwa Yawe elyo no kubaka amafunde yakwa Yawe inshiku shonse isha mweo wakwe ngefyo bamukonkomeshe, kanofye pa mulandu wakwa Uria umwina Hiti." 
1Kings15:6 Paleba ukulwa pakati kakwa Abiya na Yeroboamu mu nshiku shonse isha mweo wakwa Abiya. 
1Kings15:7 Palwa fintu fimbi ifyakwa Abiya ifyo acitile pa bufumu, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda? Paleba ukulwa pakati kakwa Abiya na Yeroboamu." 
1Kings15:8 Elyo Abiya afwa, aya lala no kwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, baya mushiika mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Elyo Asa umwana wakwe amupyana pa bufumu." 
1Kings15:9 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili (20) uwa bufumu bwakwa Yeroboamu imfumu ya bena Israeli, Asa ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Yuda," 
1Kings15:10 kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu imyaka amakumi yane na umo (41). Nakulu ishina lyakwe ali ni Maaka mwana Abishalomu. 
1Kings15:11 Asa acitile ifintu ifyalungama pa menso yakwa Yawe, ngefyo Davidi wishi acitile." 
1Kings15:12 Atamfya mu calo bonse bacilende ba ku mfuba abaume, aonaula no tulubi tonse ifikolwe fyakwe fyapangile." 
1Kings15:13 Afumya Maaka nakulu pa cifulo cakwe ica bunyina wakwa namfumu, pantu alipangile icamuselu ca luceshi lwa mulungu uwanakashi Ashera ku cimuti. Asa atema icimuti panshi aya cocela na mu mukonko wa Kidironi." 
1Kings15:14 Nangu tafumishe incende shakupepelako isho balecindika, umutima wakwa Asa wali uwaituula nganshi kuli Yawe mu bumi bwakwe bonse." 
1Kings15:15 Aletele mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe silifa, golide ne fipe fyonse ifyo ena na wishi batuulile." 
1Kings15:16 Asa balelwa inkondo na Baasha imfumu ya ku bena Israeli mu nshita yonse iya bufumu bwabo. 
1Kings15:17 Baasha imfumu ya bena Israeli yaima mukulwisha Yuda kabili ashingulusha ilinga kuli Rama pakulesha ukuti kwiba nangu umo uwakufuma nangu ukwingila mu calo cakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda. 
1Kings15:18 Asa elyo abuula silifa na golide onse uwashele mu cipao ca mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ne ya kwisano, afibika mu minwe ya babomfi bakwe abatuma na kuli Beni Hadadi mwana Taburimoni, umwana wakwa Hesioni imfumu ya ku Aramu, uwaleteeka mu Damasiko." 
1Kings15:19 Ayeba ati, “Leka pabe icipangano pakati ka iwe na ine, nga filya cali kuli batata na kuli bawiso. Mona, ine nakutumina ifyabupe silifa na golide. Nomba pangulula icipangano wapangana na Baasha imfumu ya ku Israeli pakuti antaluke.”" 
1Kings15:20 Beni Hadadi asumine amashiwi ya mfumu Asa elyo atuma na bakalamba ba fita fya nkondo ukuya sansa imisumba ya mu Israeli. Acimfya imisumba ya Iyoni, Dani, Abeli Beti Maaka na ku calo ca ku Kinereti konse ukulundapo ne calo ca Naftali." 
1Kings15:21 Ilyo Baasha aumfwa ifi, aleka ukukuula ilinga ku Rama elyo abwelela ku Tirisa." 
1Kings15:22 Elyo Imfumu Asa yapeela icipope kuli bonse abena Yuda, takwashele nangu umo. Elyo bayamba ukutunta ukufuma ku Rama amabwe ne mbao isho Baasha alebomfya kulya. Ifi efyo imfumu Asa abomfya ukukuulila Geba wa ku Benjamini elyo na Misipa." 
1Kings15:23 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Asa, na pali fyonse ifyo abombele, fyonse ifyo acitile elyo ne misumba akuulile, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha mu Yuda? Mu nshiku shakwe ishabukote, amakasa yakwe yalishile kwata ubulwele." 
1Kings15:24 Elyo Asa afwa no kuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, eko ashiikwa mu musumba wakwa Davidi wishi. Kabili Yehoshafati umwana wakwe umwaume ewamupyana pa bufumu." 
1Kings15:25 Nadabu mwana Yeroboamu ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa mu Israeli mu mwaka wabubili uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda, kabili ateekele icalo ca bena Israeli pa myaka ibili." 
1Kings15:26 Acitile ifibi pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ena akonkelelafye mu fyabubifi ifyalecitako wishi ifyo aposelemo na bena Israeli ukucita." 
1Kings15:27 Baasha mwana Ahiya uwa mu luko lwakwa Isaka amwimina no kuya mwipaya ku Gibetoni, umusumba wa Bafilisiti, ninshi Nadabu na bena Israeli bonse bali pakuupoka." 
1Kings15:28 Baasha aipeye Nadabu mu mwaka wabutatu uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda, amupyana na pa bufumu." 
1Kings15:29 Ilyo atampafye ukuteeka, aipaya aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu bonse. Tashilepo nangu umo uwamweo pa bakwa Yeroboamu, lelo alofyafye bonse pakukonka ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyapeelwe ukupitila mu mubomfi wakwe Ahiya umwina Shiloni." 
1Kings15:30 Ifi fyacitike pa mulandu wa fyabubifi Yeroboamu acitile, no kuwikishamo abena Israeli ukuficita kabili alenga nokuti Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli akalipe." 
1Kings15:31 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Nadabu, elyo na fyonse ifyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
1Kings15:32 Paleba ukulwa pakati kakwa Asa na Baasha imfumu ya bena Israeli mu nshita yonse iya bufumu bwabo. 
1Kings15:33 Mu mwaka wabutatu uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda, Baasha ewatendeke ukuteeka icalo conse ica Israeli mu Tirisa, kabili aikele pa bufumu imyaka amakumi yabili na ine (24)." 
1Kings15:34 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, akonkafye mu nshila yakwa Yeroboamu na mu fyabubifi fyakwe ifyo aposelemo na bena Israeli ukuficita." 
1Kings16:1 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yehu mwana Hanani palwakwa Baasha. 
1Kings16:2 “Nakwimishe ukufuma ku lukungu no kukubika pa butungulushi bwa bantu bandi abena Israeli. Lelo iwe waenda mu nshila shakwa Yeroboamu no kulenga abantu bandi abena Israeli ukubifya, kabili walenga nokuti nkalipe pa bubifi bwabo." 
1Kings16:3 Eico naba mupepi no kulofya Baasha pamo na ba mu ŋanda yakwe, kabili ndi nokulenga iŋanda yobe ukuba nge yakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati." 
1Kings16:4 Imbwa shikalya bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa Baasha abakafwila mu musumba, elyo ne fyuni fya mu lwelele nafyo fikalya abakafwila mu mpanga.”" 
1Kings16:5 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Baasha, ifyo acitile nefyo abombele, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
1Kings16:6 Baasha ilyo afwile alele ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, kabili ashiikilwe ku Tirisa. Elyo Elaya umwana wakwe ewamupyana pa bufumu." 
1Kings16:7 Ne calengele ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ukwisa ukupitila muli kasesema Yehu mwana Hanani kuli Baasha na ba mu ŋanda yakwe, ni pa mulandu wa fyabubifi acitile pa cinso cakwa Yawe, no kumulenga ukuti akalipe pa fintu acitile, no kusanguka kwati ni ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu, na pa mulandu wakuyonaula." 
1Kings16:8 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na mutanda (26) uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda, Elaya mwana Baasha ewatendeke ukuteeka mu calo ca bena Israeli. Kabili aikele pa bufumu imyaka ibili mu Tirisa." 
1Kings16:9 Simuri, umo pali bacilolo bakwe, uwaleyangalila icipani cimo ica maceleta amukwatila amapange ayabi. Elaya ninshi ali ku Tirisa pali iyi nshita alekolwa ubwalwa mu ŋanda yakwa Alusa, uwali umukalamba wa kwisano ku Tirisa." 
1Kings16:10 Simuri aisa ingilafye, akoma Elaya no kumwipaya mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27) uwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda. Elyo amupyana na pa bufumu." 
1Kings16:11 Cilya ayamba ukuteeka, kabili aikala na pa cipuna cabufumu, aipayafye bonse aba mu ŋanda yakwa Baasha. Tashilemo umwaume nangu umo, nangu uwa mu lupwa nangu icibusa." 
1Kings16:12 Efyo Simuri alofeshe ulupwa lonse ulwa ŋanda yakwa Baasha umwasoselwe ishiwi lyakwa Yawe palwakwa Baasha ukupitila muli kasesema Yehu," 
1Kings16:13 pa mulandu wa fyabubifi Baasha no mwana wakwe Elaya bacitile. Kabili balenga na bena Israeli ukubifya, icalengele nokuti Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli akalipe pa mulandu wakupepa utulubi." 
1Kings16:14 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Elaya, nefyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
1Kings16:15 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27) uwakwa Asa ukuba imfumu ya bena Yuda, Simuri ateekele ku Tirisa inshiku cine lubali. Abashilika bacitile nkambi mupepi na Gibetoni, umusumba wa Bafilisiti." 
1Kings16:16 Ilyo abena Israeli abali pa nkambi baumfwa ukuti Simuri aliimina imfumu no kuyipaya, basala Omuri, umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo, ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli ubushiku bulya bwine ninshi bacili pa nkambi." 
1Kings16:17 Elyo Omuri na bena Israeli abali nankwe bafuma ku Gibetoni no kuya shinguluka umusumba wa Tirisa. 
1Kings16:18 Ilyo Simuri amona ukuti umusumba wapokwa, aya ingila mu muputule we sano, asonteka umulilo ayocela mukati no kufwa emo afwila." 
1Kings16:19 Ici cacitike pa mulandu wa fyabubifi acitile, ukubifya pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kulaenda mu nshila shakwa Yeroboamu, na mu fyabubifi acitile no kulenga abena Israeli ukubifya." 
1Kings16:20 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Simuri, na bucisanguka acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
1Kings16:21 Elyo abantu ba mu Israeli bapatukene pabili, abantu bamo bawilile kuli Tibuni mwana Ginati ukuti abe mfumu, kabili bambi nabo bawila kuli Omuri." 
1Kings16:22 Nomba abakwa Omuri bakwatishapo amaka ukucila abakwa Tibuni mwana Ginati. Efyo Tibuni afwile na Omuri aba imfumu. 
1Kings16:23 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na umo (31) uwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda, Omuri ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa mu Israeli. Ateekelemo imyaka ikumi limo na ibili (12), kabili pa myaka mutanda aikele mu Tirisa." 
1Kings16:24 Ashita ulupili lwa Samaria kuli Shemeri pa matalanta ya silifa yabili, epo akuula umusumba pa mulu wa lupili no kuwita Samaria, pantu Shemeri elyali ishina lya mwine wa lupili." 
1Kings16:25 Nomba Omuri acita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe kabili abifya ukucila na pali bonse abamutangilile.
