1Kings16:26 Alaendafye mu nshila shonse ishakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati na mu fyabubifi fyakwe, ifyo aposelemo na Israeli ukuficita, icalengele ukusonsomba Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, ukuti akalipe pa mulandu wa tulubi twabo." 
1Kings16:27 Pa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Omuri, ifyo acitile elyo ne fya bulamba bwakwe, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
1Kings16:28 Omuri ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe kabili ashiikilwe mu Samaria. Elyo Ahabu umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu. 
1Kings16:29 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu (30) uwa bufumu bwakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda, Ahabu mwana Omuri ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa mu Israeli, kabili ateekele icalo ca Israeli mu musumba wa Samaria pa myaka amakumi yabili na ibili (22)." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabu mwana Omuri ena acilapo ukubifya pa cinso cakwa Yawe ukucila pali bonse abamutangilile. 
1Kings16:31 Ena tamwenemo no bubi mukucitako ifyabubifi fyacitile Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, kabili alundapo ukuupa Yesebele umwana mwanakashi wakwa Etibaali imfumu ya bena Sidoni, no kulatumika Baali no kumupepa." 
1Kings16:32 Aimika ubulambo bwakwa Baali mwitempele lyakwa Baali ilyo akuulile mu Samaria. 
1Kings16:33 Ahabu aimika uluceshi lwa mulungu Ashera no kucitafye ifintu ifyakusonsomba Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, ukuti akalipe ukucila na pafyo imfumu shonse ishamutangilile isha mu Israeli shacitile." 
1Kings16:34 Mu nshiku shakwa Ahabu, Hieli uwa ku Betele akuula cipya cipya umusumba wa Yeriko. Ena pakupanga umufula alekelapo umweo wa mwana wakwe umwaume Abiramu, kabili pakukuula impongolo alekelapo umweo wakwa kasuli wakwe Segubu, ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyasosele Yoshua mwana Nuni." 
1Kings17:1 Nomba Eliya umwina Tishibe uwafumine ku Tishibe mu calo ca Gileadi aebele Ahabu ati, “Napali Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli uwamweo uyo mombela, takwakatale akube mfula no mume mu myaka ileisa kanofye peshiwi lyandi.”" 
1Kings17:2 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli Eliya aliti," 
1Kings17:3 “Fuma kuno, kabiye ku kabanga uye ubelame mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Keriti uwaba ku kabanga ka Yordani." 
1Kings17:4 Wakulanwa amenshi mu mumana elyo ninkonkomesha bamwankole ukulakupeela ifyakulya uko kwine.” 
1Kings17:5 Eliya acita ifyo Yawe amwebele. Aya ku mumana wa Keriti, ku kabanga ka Yordani eko aya ikala." 
1Kings17:6 Bamwankole balamuletela umukate ne nama ulucelo, kabili umukate ne nama mu nshita ya cungulo elyo alanwa amenshi ukufuma mu mumana." 
1Kings17:7 Ilyo papite nshita umumana wakama pa mulandu wakuti tamwali imfula mu calo. 
1Kings17:8 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli Eliya aliti," 
1Kings17:9 “ Ima nombaline kabiye ku Sarepati iya ba ku Sidoni eko uye wikale. Ninkonkomesha namfwilwa wa kuli ilya ncende ukuya kupeelako ifyakulya.” 
1Kings17:10 Kanshi Eliya epakuya ku Sarepati. Ilyo afika pa mpongolo ya musumba, aya sanga namfwilwa aleteba inkuni. Elyo amwita no kumweba ati, “Mpeelako amenshi mu lukombo ayakuti nwe?”" 
1Kings17:11 Cilya aima ukuya mukubuula amenshi, kabili amubilikisha ati, “Napapata undeteleko na kamukate.”" 
1Kings17:12 Namfwilwa ayasuka ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Lesa obe uwamweo, ine nshikwete umukate nangu umo. Nkwetefye utubunga utunono mu mpakwilo no tumafuta utunono mu musukupala. Ndeteba inkuni, ntwale ku ŋanda ishakuya ipikila utwakuti ine no mwana wandi umwaume tulye, elyo tufwe.”" 
1Kings17:13 Eliya amweba ati, “Witiina iyoo. Kabiye ku ŋanda no kuya cita ifyo walanda. Nomba icantanshi upange akamukate akanono aka ine ukufuma pali uto twine ukwete no kuleta kuli ine, elyo upange iya iwe no mwana obe umwaume." 
1Kings17:14 Pantu ifi efyo Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli asosa ati, ‘Ubunga tabwakapwe mu mpakwilo elyo na mafuta tayali nakupwa mu musukupala obe ukushintafye na pa bushiku Yawe akalokesha imfula muno calo.’”" 
1Kings17:15 Namfwilwa aya no kuya cita ifyo Eliya amwebele. Kanshi cila bushiku kwalaba ifyakulya fyakwa Eliya, ifyakwa namfwilwa na ba mu ŋanda yakwe." 
1Kings17:16 Kabili ubunga tabwatalile abupwa mu mpakwilo, elyo na mafuta tayatalile ayapwa mu musukupala ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyasosele Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Panuma ya nshita iyitali, umwana umwaume wa mwine ŋanda alwala. Ubulwele bwakoselako, na pakulekelesha umwana afwa." 
1Kings17:18 Elyo umwine ŋanda aeba Eliya ati, “Finshi wamfulilwa, we muntu wakwa Lesa? Bushe wacisa mukuncinkula pa fyabubifi fyandi eco waipaila umwana?”" 
1Kings17:19 Eliya amweba ati, “Mpeela umwana obe,” Amubuula ukufuma mu minwe yakwe, amusenda ku muputule wa pamulu umo aleikala, elyo amulalika pa musengele wakwe." 
1Kings17:20 Elyo alomba kuli Yawe ati, “We Yawe, Lesa wandi, bushe niwe uletele ubu busanso pali uyu namfwilwa ndeikalako, pakulenga umwana wakwe ukufwa?”" 
1Kings17:21 Elyo Eliya alambalala pa citumbi ca mwana imiku itatu, nakabili alomba kuli Yawe ati, “We Yawe, Lesa wandi, suminisha umweo wa uyu mwana ubwelelemo muli ena.”" 
1Kings17:22 Yawe aumfwa ukulila kwakwa Eliya, no mweo wa mwana wabwelela muli ena, aba umutuntulu," 
1Kings17:23 Eliya aimya umwana amusenda, batentemukila mu muputule wa panshi. Amupeela kuli nyina elyo atila, “Mona umwana obe mutuntulu.”" 
1Kings17:24 Elyo umwanakashi aeba Eliya ati, “Nomba naishiba ukuti uli muntu wakwa Lesa, kabili nokuti ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilifuma mu kanwa kobe lyacishinka.”" 
1Kings18:1 Panuma ya nshita iyitali, mu mwaka walenga itatu, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Eliya no kumweba ati, “Kabiye uye monekela kuli Ahabu, kabili ndi nokutuma imfula pa calo.”" 
1Kings18:2 Kanshi Eliya epakuya monekela kuli Ahabu. Lelo mu Samaria mwali icipowe icabipa nganshi. 
1Kings18:3 Kanshi Ahabu nao epakwita Obadia uwaleyangalila abalebomba kwisano. Uyu Obadia ali umuntu uwacisumino icikulu muli Yawe. 
1Kings18:4 Lintu Yesebele acili aleipaya bakasesema bakwa Yawe, Obadia alifyushishepo bakasesema umwanda umo (100) no kuya bafisa mu ncengo shibili, cila lucengo mwali bakasesema amakumi yasano (50), elyo no kubapeela ifyakulya na menshi yakunwa." 
1Kings18:5 Ahabu alyebele Obadia ukuti, “Pitana mukati ka calo monse, umone ukuliko imilonga nangu inika ukwakuti tusangeko icani icakulya bakabalwe na bapunda pakuti twiipaya inama nangu imo.”" 
1Kings18:6 Kanshi epakwakana incende shakuya mukufwailishako, Ahabu aya ku ncende imo na Obadia ku ncende ibiye." 
1Kings18:7 Ilyo Obadia acili mukuya, Eliya amukumanya. Obadia amwishiba, akontamina panshi no kumweba ati, “Bushe cine niwe shikulu Eliya?”" 
1Kings18:8 Eliya amwasuka ati, “Ee, kabiye kebe sokulu auti, ‘Eliya ali kuno.’”" 
1Kings18:9 Obadia amweba ati, “Nga cinshi ico nakulufyanya icakuti utume ine ne musha obe kuli Ahabu ukuti aye njipaya?" 
1Kings18:10 Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Lesa obe uwamweo, tapaba icalo nangu ubufumu uko shikulu tatuma umuntu uwakukufwaya. Kabili konse uko icalo nangu ubufumu balanda ukuti tawafikako, alebalenga ukulapa ukuti tabakusangile." 
1Kings18:11 Nomba, iwe ulenjeba ukuti nje kuli shikulu nokuya mweba ati, ‘Eliya ali kuno.’" 
1Kings18:12 Ine nshaishibe noko Umupashi wakwa Yawe ulekusenda nga nakusha. Nga cakuti naya eba Ahabu elyo ese asange taulipo ninshi alenjipaya. Lelo ine ne mubomfi obe ukutulafye ku bwaice bwandi lyonse mpepa Yawe. 
1Kings18:13 Bushe shikulu, tawaumfwa ifyo nacitile ilyo Yesebele aleipaya bakasesema bakwa Yawe? Ine nafishile bakasesema bakwa Yawe umwanda umo (100) mu ncengo shibili, muli cila lucengo balimo amakumi yasano (50), kabili no kubapeela ifyakulya elyo na menshi yakunwa." 
1Kings18:14 Elyo nomba unjebe ukuya kuli shikulu nje mwebe ati, ‘Eliya ali kuno!’ Ena aleya njipayafye.”" 
1Kings18:15 Eliya asosa ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, umwine wa fita, uo ntumika, nalaya monekele kuli Ahabu ilelo.”" 
1Kings18:16 Awe Obadia aile kumanya Ahabu no kumweba, na Ahabu nao aimine no kuya kumanya Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Ilyo amona Eliya amweba ati, “Bushe niwe, we ucusha Israeli?”" 
1Kings18:18 Eliya ayasuka ati, “Nshacitapo nangu cimo icakucusha Israeli. Lelo iwe ne ŋanda yakwa wiso nimwe mwalenga. Mwalifutuka ku mafunde yakwa Yawe no kukonka aya milungu ba Baali." 
1Kings18:19 Nomba longanika abantu bonse aba mu Israeli twise tukumane nabo pa lupili lwa Kameli. Kabili ulete na bakasesema bonse imyanda ine na makumi yasano (450) abakwa Baali, elyo na bakasesema bonse imyanda ine (400) aba mulungu Ashera abaliila petebulo limo pamo na Yesebele.”" 
1Kings18:20 Elyo Ahabu atuma imbila mu calo conse ica Israeli no kulonganika bakasesema bonse pa lupili lwa Kameli. 
1Kings18:21 Eliya aiminina ku cinso ca bantu no kubeba ati, “Bushe ni lilali mukekalilila abatangalikwa no bupingushi bubili? Nga cakuti Yawe e lesa, eo mukonke, lelo nga cakuti Baali e lesa, eo mukonke.” Lelo abantu batalala tondolo." 
1Kings18:22 Elyo Eliya abeba ati, “Ninefye neka pali bakasesema bakwa Yawe uushele, lelo Baali ali na bakasesema imyanda ine na makumi yasano (450)." 
1Kings18:23 Tufwaileniko bacilume wa ŋombe babili. Kabili bakasesema bakwa Baali baisalilepo iyo balefwaya, baiputaule mu fipimfya fipimfya bafibike na pa mulu wa nkuni, lelo besontekapo umulilo. Na ine ndebuule iŋombe ishele njibike pa mwina wa nkuni lelo nshasontekepo umulilo." 
1Kings18:24 Elyo imwe mukuute peshina lya mulungu wenu, na ine ndeisa kuuta peshina lyakwa Yawe. Elyo umulungu uuleisa asuka ku mulilo, e Lesa.” Na abantu bonse batila, “Ico cena wasosa cawama.”" 
1Kings18:25 Eliya aeba bakasesema bakwa Baali ati, “Salenipo iŋombe imo mubalilepo ukupekanya, apo imwe muli abengi nganshi. Mukuute na peshina lya mulungu wenu, lelo mwisonteka umulilo pa nkuni.”" 
1Kings18:26 Kanshi epakubuula iŋombe iyo basalile no kupekenya. Elyo bakuuta peshina lyakwa Baali ukufuma ulucelo ukufika akasuba pakati ka mutwe, balekuuta ati, “We Baali twasuke.” Nomba takwali ubwasuko, nangufye umo uwakwasuka. Elyo balacinda ukushinguluko ubulambo bapangile." 
1Kings18:27 Lilya akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe Eliya ayamba ukubaseka ati, “Pundisheni, kabili ni ku mulungu. Nalimo ucili uletontonkanya, nalimo naupasuka, nalimo uli ne fiupamfishe, nalimo uli pa lwendo, nalimo uli mu tulo ulefwaikwa ukuubusha.”" 
1Kings18:28 Epakupunda ishiwi likalamba, baitetaula pa mibili ne mpanga na mafumo umwabelele ulutambi lwabo mpaka umulopa wasuuma." 
1Kings18:29 Ilyo akasuba kapita pakati ka mutwe, nabo bakonkanyapofye amapepo yakusabaila mpaka inshita yakutuula ilambo lya cungulo, nomba takwali ubwasuko, nangu umo uwayaswike, nangu ukumfwa." 
1Kings18:30 Elyo Eliya aeba abantu bonse ati, “Palameni kuli ine.” Bonse baisa uko ali, elyo awaminisha ubulambo bwakwa Yawe ubwali ubwabongoloka." 
1Kings18:31 Eliya abuula amabwe ikumi limo na yabili (12), cila libwe limo lyaimininako uluko lumo ukulingana na bana bakwa Yakobo, kuli uyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile no kulanda ati, “Ishina lyobe likaba ni Israeli.”" 
1Kings18:32 Kuli aya yene mabwe akuulilako ubulambo mwishina lyakwa Yawe. Aimbako ne cilindi ukushinguluka icikulu ico bengabikamo imbuto ukucila petepe limo. 
1Kings18:33 Ateba ne nkuni, aputaula na cilume wa ŋombe mu fipimfya fipimfya no kubika pa mulu wa nkuni. Elyo abeba ati, “Isusheni amenshi mu mitondo ine, mwitile pa bulambo elyo na pa nkuni.”" 
1Kings18:34 Kabili abeba ati, “Bwekeshenipo.” Nabo babwekeshapo. Kabili abeba ati, “Bwekeshenipo umuku wacitatu.” Nabo babwekeshapo umuku wacitatu." 
1Kings18:35 Amenshi yakonkoloka mu mbali shonse isha bulambo no kwisula mu cilindi icashingulwikeko. 
1Kings18:36 Pa nshita yakutuula ilambo, Eliya kasesema aisa iminina pantanshi no kupepa ati, “We Yawe, Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, Isaki na Israeli, lekeni cishibikwe ilelo ukuti niwe Lesa wakwa Israeli, kabili ukuti ine ndi mubomfi obe, kabili ncita ifintu fyonse ifi ukukonka ishiwi lyobe." 
1Kings18:37 Unjasuke we Yawe, unjasuke, pakuti abantu aba beshibe ukuti we Yawe niwe Lesa, kabili nokuti walabwesha imitima yabo kuli iwe we mwine.”" 
1Kings18:38 Elyo Yawe atuma umulilo wakwe no koca ilambo, inkuni, amabwe elyo no mushili no kumika amenshi mu cilindi." 
1Kings18:39 Ilyo abantu bamona ifi, bawa panshi ubukupeme no kulila abati, “Yawe ni Lesa, Yawe ni Lesa.”" 
1Kings18:40 Elyo Eliya apeela icipope ati, “Ikateni bonse bakasesema bakwa Baali. Mwileka nangu umo abutuke.” Epakubekata bonse kabili Eliya abasenda no kubaleta kwishika lya Kishoni eko abepaila." 
1Kings18:41 Kabili Eliya aeba Ahabu ati, “Kabiye uye ulye no kunwa, pantu naumfwa iciunda ca mfula iyingi nganshi.”" 
1Kings18:42 Kanshi Ahabu epakuya mukulya na mukunwa, lelo Eliya ena anina pa mulu wa lupili lwa Kameli, akontamina panshi ya mushili abika umutwe pakati ka makufi." 
1Kings18:43 Aeba umubomfi wakwe ati, “Kabiye uye uloleshe kuli bemba.” Umubomfi aya nokuya lolesha, elyo asosa ati, “Takuli nangu cimo kulya.” Pa miku cine lubali Eliya alemwebafye ati, “Bwelelamo”" 
1Kings18:44 Pa muku walenga cine lubali umubomfi alanda ati, “Namona akalikumbi akanono akali kwati cisansa ca kuboko kwa muntu kaleima ukufuma muli bemba” Elyo Eliya atila, “Ima kebe Ahabu auti pekanye celeta lyobe wendeshe ukuya lintu imfula tailakucilikila.”" 
1Kings18:45 Pa nshita ine ilya, umulu wafiita fititi ku makumbi, icikuku naco caima, ne mfula iyingi nganshi yalaloka, elyo Ahabu anina iceleta aya ku Yesireli." 
1Kings18:46 Amaka yakwa Yawe yaisa pali Eliya, akakilila umwingila mu mushipi elyo abutukisha ukucilila Ahabu pakuya ku Yesireli." 
1Kings19:1 Nomba Ahabu aya eba Yesebele fyonse ifyo Eliya acitile nefyo aipeye bakasesema bonse ku lupanga. 
1Kings19:2 Kanshi Yesebele epakutuma amashiwi kuli Eliya ati, “Imilungu ikancitile icili conse, nangu cikabipa shani, nga cakuti mailo pa nshita nga ino ine nshicitile cimo cine umweo obe ukuba nga umo pali abo wipeye.”" 
1Kings19:3 Eliya aumfwa umwenso, abutuka ukutiina ukufwa. Ilyo afika ku Beresheba mu Yuda, eko asha umubomfi wakwe," 
1Kings19:4 nomba ena aya mu matololo pa lwendo lwa bushiku bumo. Afika apali icimuti, aikala mwisamba apepa nokuti cawama afwe. Alanda nokuti, “Nacula pafula we Yawe. Njipayafye, pantu ine nshacila ifikolwe fyandi ubusuma.”" 
1Kings19:5 Elyo alala mwisamba lya cimuti, apona na mu tulo. Pa nshita ine ilya malaika amwikata no kumweba ati, “Buka ulye.”" 
1Kings19:6 Lilya aceba ceba, elyo amona umukate lwa ku mitwe uwapangilwe pa mabwe ayakaba, elyo no lukombo lwa menshi. Alya elyo anwa na menshi, abwela alala nakabili." 
1Kings19:7 Malaika wakwa Yawe abwela umuku wacibili aisa mwikata elyo amweba ati, “Ima, ulye pantu ulwendo ulu nalukukosela.”" 
1Kings19:8 Elyo aima, alya no kunwa. Cilya ifyakulya fyamupa amaka, aima ubulendo ubwakwendapo inshiku amakumi yane (40) akasuba no bushiku mpaka aya fika ku Holebu, ulupili lwakwa Lesa." 
1Kings19:9 Aya ingila mu lucengo emo asendama. Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ena no kutila, “Finshi ulecita kuno, Eliya?”" 
1Kings19:10 Ayasuka ati, “Naliba uwapimpa mukubombela Yawe, Lesa umwine wa fita. Abena Israeli balikaana icipangano cobe, balitobaula ifibumbili fya malambo fyobe, no kwipaya bakasesema bobe bonse ku lupanga. Ninefye neka nshele elyo kabili na ine wine balefwaya ukunjipaya.”" 
1Kings19:11 Yawe amweba ati, “Kabiye uye wiminine pa lupili pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pantu Yawe alefwaya ukupita.” Elyo icimwela icikulu capupa no kulepula ulupili pakati pa cinso cakwa Yawe, lelo Yawe talimo mu mwela. Panuma ya cimwela, kwaisa icinkukuma, lelo Yawe talimo mu cinkukuma." 
1Kings19:12 Panuma ya cinkukuma kwaisa umulilo, lelo Yawe talimo mu mulilo. Panuma ya mulilo elyo kwaisa ishiwi ilyakutotosha." 
1Kings19:13 Ilyo Eliya aumfwa ishiwi, afimba umwingila pa menso, afumina panse aiminina pa mwinshi wa lucengo. Elyo ishiwi lyamweba ati, “Finshi ulecita pano Eliya?”" 
1Kings19:14 Ayasuka ati, “Naliba uwapimpa mukubombela Yawe, Lesa umwine wa fita. Abena Israeli balikaana icipangano cobe, balitobaula ne fibumbili fya malambo fyobe, no kwipaya bakasesema bobe bonse ku lupanga. Ninefye neka nshele, elyo kabili na ine wine balefwaya ukunjipaya.”" 
1Kings19:15 Yawe amweba ati, “Bwekelamo uye mu nshila wafumininemo, uye ku matololo ya ku Damasiko. Nga wafika kulya, uye suba Hasaeli ukuba imfumu ya bena Aramu." 
1Kings19:16 Kabili uye suba Yehu umwana umwaume wakwa Nimushi, ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli. Kabili usube na Elisha umwana umwaume wakwa Shafati ukufuma ku Abeli Mehola ukukupyana pali bukasesema." 
1Kings19:17 Yehu ali nokwipaya umuntu onse uukapusumuka ku lupanga lwakwa Hasaeli, na Elisha ali nokwipaya umuntu onse uukapusumuka ku lupanga lwakwa Yehu." 
1Kings19:18 Lelo ninsungapo abantu amakana cine lubali (7,000) mu Israeli abo amakufi yabo tayatala ayafukamina Baali, kabili abo imilomo yabo tayatala aimutomona.”" 
1Kings19:19 Elyo Eliya afumine kulya, aya sanga na Elisha umwana mwaume wakwa Shafati. Ali mwibala, balelima ne ŋombe ikumi limo na shibili (12), umwine alelima na shibili ishalekelesheko. Eliya amupalamina amuposela umwingila wakwe wamukupa." 
1Kings19:20 Elisha elyo asha iŋombe shakwe akonka Eliya. Elisha alanda ati, “Ndeka nje nshalikepo batata na bamayo elyo njise nkukonke.” Eliya amweba ati, “Bwelelamo, nga ine finshi ncitile kuli iwe.”" 
1Kings19:21 Elisha epakufumako no kubwelako. Aya buula ne ŋombe shakwe ishabulimi aipaya. Abuula ifibombelo fyakulimina efyo akoseshako umulilo, aipikilapo inama apeela na bantu bakwe, no kulya balya. Elyo aimine akonka Eliya, aba umubomfi wakwe." 
1Kings20:1 Nomba Beni Hadadi imfumu ya bena Aramu alonganike ifita fyakwe fyonse. Afwaya ne mfumu ishakumwafwa amakumi yatatu na shibili (32) ishali na bakabalwe na maceleta, efyo aile no kuya shinguluka no kusansa Samaria." 
1Kings20:2 Atuma inkombe mu musumba ku mfumu Ahabu iya bena Israeli ati, “Ifi efyo Beni Hadadi alanda ukuti," 
1Kings20:3 ‘Silifa na golide yobe nomba yandi elyo na bakashi bobe bonse na bana abasuma bandi.’” 
1Kings20:4 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yayasuka ati, “Nacibe ifyo fine usosele we mfumu. Ine wine, na fyonse ifyo nkwete fyaba fyobe.”" 
1Kings20:5 Inkombe shaya bwela nakabili no kusosa ashiti, “Ifi efyo Beni Hadadi alanda ati, ‘Nacituma amashiwi yakufwaya silifa na golide, abakashi bobe na bana bobe." 
1Kings20:6 Lelo mailo, inshita nga ino ine, nkatuma bacilolo bandi ukwisa sokota mu ŋanda yobe iye sano na mayanda ya bacilolo bobe. Bali nokwisa pokolola fyonse ifyacindama no kusenda.’”" 
1Kings20:7 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yaita abakalamba bonse aba mu calo no kubeba aiti, “Shimoneni uyu muntu ifyo alefwaya ifyongo. Ilyo acituma amashiwi yakumpoka abakashi na bana bandi, silifa na golide, nshacimukaanina.”" 
1Kings20:8 Abakalamba na bantu bonse bayasuka ati, “Wisumina nangu ukumfwila ifyo alefwaya.”" 
1Kings20:9 Elyo aeba inkombe shakwa Beni Hadadi ati, “Kebeni imfumu kanabesa amuti, ‘Umusha wenu naipeelesha ukucita fyonse ifyo wacibalilapo ukufwaya, nomba ici ica muku wabubili cena nafilwa.’” Inkombe shabwekelamo no kuya eba Beni Hadadi." 
1Kings20:10 Elyo Beni Hadadi atuma amashiwi na yambi kuli Ahabu ati, “Ala imilungu incitile icili conse nangufye cintu icabubi ubuli bonse, nga cakuti mukashala ulukungu mu Samaria ulwakupeela abantu ndi nabo cila muntu ulupi lumo.”" 
1Kings20:11 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yayasuka aiti, “Kamwebeni ukuti, ‘Umuntu uwafwala inkwela talingene no wafuula.’”" 
1Kings20:12 Beni Hadadi aumfwa amashiwi aya pa nshita ena ne mfumu ali nasho balenwa mu matenti yabo, elyo aeba abashilika bonse ati, “Ipekanyeni ukuya sansa.” Nabo bonse baya ipekanya ukusansa umusumba." 
1Kings20:13 Nomba pa nshita ine ilya kwaishile kasesema kuli Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli no kwisa landa ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Bushe namumona uyu mulongo uukalamba uwa bashilika? Nalaupeela mu minwe yobe ilelo, kabili uli nokwishiba ukuti nine Yawe.’”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabu aipusha ati, “Nga abalacita ifi ni bani?” Kasesema ayasuka ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, ‘Balumendo ba balashi bafitungu aba mu calo ebalacita ifi.’” Ahabu kabili aipusha ati, “Nga baleyamba ulubuli ni bani?” Kasesema ayasuka ati, “Nimwe bene.”" 
1Kings20:15 Ahabu epakwita abalumendo ba balashi bafitungu abaume imyanda ibili na makumi yatatu na babili (232). Elyo alonganika na bena Israeli bonse amakana cine lubali (7,000)." 
1Kings20:16 Bafuma ninshi akasuba kali pakati ka mutwe ilyo Beni Hadadi ne mfumu shimbi amakumi yatatu na babili (32) abalemutungilila bacili mu matenti balenwa. 
1Kings20:17 Abalumendo ba balashi bafitungu ebabalilapo ukufuma. Nomba Beni Hadadi alitumine inengu, elyo shabwela no kumweba ati, “Abantu abaume nabafuma mu Samaria bali mukwisa.”" 
1Kings20:18 Ena asosa ati, “Nga baishila umutende, mubekate abatuntulu. Nangu nga baishila ukulwa inkondo, nalyo line mubekate abatuntulu.”" 
1Kings20:19 Abalumendo ba balashi bafitungu babalilapo ukufuma mu musumba, na bashilika bakonka panuma," 
1Kings20:20 elyo cila umo alakoma umulwani wakwe. Pa mulandu wa ici abena Aramu babutuka, babakunkunika ku bena Israeli. Lelo Beni Hadadi imfumu ya bena Aramu yapusumuka yanina pali kabalwe pamo na bashilika ba pali bakabalwe." 
1Kings20:21 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yakonkanyapo ukufuma no kuya cimfya abamaceleta na ba pali bakabalwe, no kwipaya abalwani abengi abena Aramu." 
1Kings20:22 Panuma yakulwa, kasesema aisa ku mfumu ya bena Israeli no kusosa ati, “Ukoshe icifulo cobe elyo kabili utontonkanye bwino ifyo ufwile ukucita pantu uyu mwaka imfumu ya bena Aramu ili nokwisa kusansa kabili.”" 
1Kings20:23 Pali ilya ine nshita, bacilolo ba mfumu ya bena Aramu bapanda imfumu amano abati, “Imilungu ya balya bantu milungu ya mu mpili, eco bakwatile amaka ukutucila. Lelo nga twabalwisha mu mawanga, lyena tuli nokukwatapo amaka ukubacila." 
1Kings20:24 Kanshi iwe ucite ici, fumya imfumu shonse mukucincisha ifita no kupyanikishapo abakalamba ba fita." 
1Kings20:25 Ukemye ifita fya nkondo nga filya fine fyalobele, ifyakuti kabalwe na kabalwe elyo iceleta peceleta, pakuti tukaye lwisha abena Israeli mu mawanga. Lyena cacine tuli nokubacila amaka.” Awe abasuminisha no kucita ukulingana na fyonse." 
1Kings20:26 Mu mwaka wakonkelepo Beni Hadadi alonganike abena Aramu, no kunina aya ku Afeki mukulwisha abena Israeli." 
1Kings20:27 Abena Israeli nabo balongana, bapeelwa ne fyakulya elyo baima ukuya bakumanya. Abena Israeli bacita inkambi shibili ukulungatana nabo, epo baikala kwati tumabumba twa mbushi ninshi abena Aramu beswilefye mpanga yonse." 
1Kings20:28 Umuntu wakwa Lesa aisa no kwisa eba imfumu ya bena Israeli ati, “ifi efyo Yawe alanda ukuti, ‘Pantu abena Aramu baletontonkanya ukuti Yawe e mulungu wa mpili, lelo te mulungu wa mawanga, nalapeela umulongo wa bashilika bonse aba mu minwe yenu, pakuti na imwe mwishibe ukuti nine Yawe.’”" 
1Kings20:29 Pa nshiku cine lubali baikele nabalungatana, elyo na pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali bakumana mukulwa. Abena Israeli baipaya abena Aramu amakana umwanda umo (100,000) uwa fita fya pa makasa mu bushiku bumo." 
1Kings20:30 Abashelepo bapusumuka baya ku musumba wa Afeki, nako ilinga lyaya wila pa bantu amakana amakumi yabili na makana cine lubali (27,000). Elyo Beni Hadadi abutukila mu kati ka musumba abelama mu muputule wa mu kati." 
1Kings20:31 Bacilolo bakwe bamweba abati, “Mona, natumfwa ukuti imfumu ya ŋanda yakwa Israeli yaluse. Leka tuye ku mfumu ya bena Israeli natufwala insalu shabulanda mu misana yesu, no kupomba imyando ku mitwe yesu. Nalimo kusuka yakwelela.”" 
1Kings20:32 Bafwala insalu shabulanda mu misana yabo no kupomba intambo ku mitwe yabo, baya ku mfumu ya bena Israeli no kuya yeba ati, “Umusha obe Beni Hadadi atile, ‘Napapata mwinjipaya.’” Imfumu yaasuka aiti, “Bushe acili umutuntulu? Ni munyinane.”" 
1Kings20:33 Abantu batontonkanya ukuti ici cena caba lishuko, bayangufyanya no kubuula amashiwi yakwe abati, “Ca cine Beni Hadadi ni munonko.” Imfumu yatila, “Kabiyeni kamuleteni.” Ilyo Beni Hadadi asokoloka, Ahabu amuninika mwiceleta lyakwe emo amusendela." 
1Kings20:34 Beni Hadadi apeela ubulayo ati, “Ndi nokubwesha imisumba yonse tata apokolwele kuli wiso. Kabili kuti wakuula amayanda yobe aya makwebo mu Damasiko nga filya tata acitile mu Samaria.” Ahabu asosa ati, “Pali uku kusuminishanya, nalakulekako.” Elyo basuminishanya, amulekako aya." 
1Kings20:35 Ukulingana nefyo Yawe akonkomeshe, umwana umo umwaume uwa bakasesema aebele umunankwe ati, “Nkoma ku lupanga lobe.” Lelo umunankwe akaana." 
1Kings20:36 Elyo kasesema alanda ati, “Pantu wafilwa ukumfwila Yawe, ilyofye walafuma pano inkalamo yalaya kwipaya.” Kabili cilya umuntu afumapofye aya, inkalamo yamusanga no kumwipaya." 
1Kings20:37 Kabili kasesema asanga umuntu umbi elyo amweba ati, “Napapata nkoma” elyo umuntu amukoma no kumucena." 
1Kings20:38 Elyo kasesema aya iminina mu mbali ya musebo alalolela imfumu. Aifungushanya, akaka ne citambala ku mutwe cakopokela pa menso." 
1Kings20:39 Cilya imfumu yalapita, kasesema abilikisha imfumu ati, “Umubomfi obe aciya ingila mu kati ka bulwi, umushilika umo acileta umulwani uwiketwe, elyo anjeba ati, ‘Sunga uyu muntu, nga aluba, cili nokuba umweo obe pa mweo wakwe, nangu ufwile ukufuta italanta limo ilya silifa.’" 
1Kings20:40 Ilyo umubomfi obe acipamfiwa kuli ifi na kuli filya, uyu muntu aongoloka aluba.” Imfumu ya bena Israeli yasosa aiti, “Ubo bwine e bupingushi bobe, waipingula we mwine.”" 
1Kings20:41 Elyo kasesema bwangu bwangu afimbula icisalu pa menso, ne mfumu ya bena Israeli yamwishiba ukuti ni umo pali bakasesema." 
1Kings20:42 Aeba imfumu ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe asosa, ‘Naukakula no kuleka umuntu uo nalefwaya ukuti afwe. Eico calaba ukuti umweo obe pa mweo wakwe, abantu bobe pa bantu bakwe.’”" 
1Kings20:43 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yafumapo, yaya kwisano ku Samaria iyafitwa ku mutima kabili iyafulwa." 
1Kings21:1 Panuma ya nshita iyitali kwacitike umulandu uwakumine kwibala lyakwa Naboti umwina Yesireli. Ili bala lyali mu Yesireli, mupepi ne sano lyakwa Ahabu, imfumu ya bena Samaria." 
1Kings21:2 Ahabu aeba Naboti ati, “Nimpe bala lyobe pakuti ndelimamo umusalu, pantu ili bala nalipalama kwisano lyandi. Mukukabushanya, na ine ndi nokukupeelelapo ibala ilisuma, nangu nga ulefwaya nkulipile icuma conse ico ulepingula.”" 
1Kings21:3 Lelo Naboti ayasuka ati, “Yawe aleshe ukuti nkupeele icacishilano ca fikolwe fyandi.”" 
1Kings21:4 Elyo Ahabu aya ku ŋanda, nafitwa ku mutima kabili uwafulwa pantu Naboti umwina Yesireli acimweba ati, “Nshakupeele icacishilano ca fikolwe fyandi.” Alala pa musengele wakwe aletontonkanya, afilwa nokulya." 
1Kings21:5 Umukashi wakwe Yesebele aingila amwipusha ati, “Cinshi wafitilwa ku mutima icakuti wafilwa no kulya?”" 
1Kings21:6 Ayasuka umukashi ati, “Nico naceba Naboti umwina Yesireli nati, ‘Nshitisha ibala lyobe, nangu nga ulefwaya nkupeelelepo ibala limbi pali lyena.’ Lelo acasuka ati, ‘Nshakupeele ibala lyandi.’”" 
1Kings21:7 Yesebele umukashi wakwe asosa ati, “Bushe ifi efyo ufwile ukucita nge mfumu ya bena Israeli? Ima ulye. Sansamuka pantu ine ndekupokela ibala lyakwa Naboti umwina Yesireli.”" 
1Kings21:8 Yesebele alemba inkalata mwishina lyakwa Ahabu, aumapo inshimbi ya mfumu no kushituma ku bakalamba na basambashi abaleikala nankwe mu musumba wakwa Naboti." 
1Kings21:9 Muli ishi nkalata alembamo ukutila, “Pekanyeni ubushiku bwakufunga, elyo muteke Naboti pa cipuna icacindama pakati ka bantu." 
1Kings21:10 Lelo muteke abaume babili ifinangwa fya bantu pa menso yakwe abakuti bamubepeshe abati natuka Lesa kabili natuka ne mfumu. Elyo mumusende no kuya mutobaula amabwe afwe.” 
1Kings21:11 Elyo abakalamba na basambashi abaikele mu musumba wakwa Naboti bacita ifyo Yesebele abebele mu nkalata abalembele. 
1Kings21:12 Bapekanya ubushiku bwakufunga baisa teka Naboti pa ncende iyicindami pakati ka bantu. 
1Kings21:13 Elyo ifinangwa fibili fyaisa ikala kuntanshi yakwe fyalabepesha Naboti pa cinso ca bantu filetila, “Naboti natuka Lesa pamo ne mfumu.” Epa kumwimya bamusenda kunse ya musumba bamupolaula amabwe afwa." 
1Kings21:14 Elyo batuma amashiwi kuli Yesebele abati, “Naboti nabamupola amabwe nafwa.”" 
1Kings21:15 Yesebele panuma yakumfwa ukuti Naboti nabamupola amabwe nafwa, aeba Ahabu ati, “Ima uye poka ibala Naboti umwina Yesireli akene ukukushitisha. Pantu Naboti tali mumi, nafwa.”" 
1Kings21:16 Ilyo Ahabu aumfwa ukuti Naboti nafwa, aima aya pokolola ibala lyakwa Naboti." 
1Kings21:17 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Eliya umwina Tishibe aliti," 
1Kings21:18 “Kabiye uye eba Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli uuteeka mu Samaria. Pali ino nshita ali mwibala lyakwa Naboti ilyo endele ukuya pokolola. 
1Kings21:19 Umwebe auti, ‘Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, bushe tawipeye umuntu no kumupokolola icipe cakwe?’ Elyo umwebe auti, ‘Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, pa ncende apo imbwa shacimyanga umulopa wakwa Naboti epo imbwa shili nokumyanga umulopa obe na iwe wine, ee, umulopa uobe.’”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahabu aeba Eliya ati, “Kanshi wansanga we mulwani wandi?” Eliya ayasuka ati, “Ee nakusanga, pantu nauipeelesha mukucita ifibi pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
1Kings21:21 Nalaleta icinkunka pali iwe. Nalalofya uluko lobe elyo nalaonaula mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu umwaume onse uwakulekelesha uwa bena Israeli umusha nangu umuntungwa. 
1Kings21:22 Nalalenga iŋanda yobe ukuba nge yakwa Yeroboamu umwana umwaume wakwa Nebati kabili nge yakwa Baasha umwana mwaume wakwa Ahiya, pantu naunsonsomba ukuti nkalipe kabili walenga na bena Israeli ukucita ububifi." 
1Kings21:23 “Elyo pa mulandu wakwa Yesebele, Yawe asosa ati, ‘Imbwa shili nokulya Yesebele mukati ke linga lya ku Yesireli.’" 
1Kings21:24 “Imbwa shili nokulya bonse abakwa Ahabu abakafwila mu musumba ne fyuni ifipupuka fikalya bonse abakafwila mu mpanga.” 
1Kings21:25 Tapatalile apaba umuntu uwapala Ahabu ukuiposaika mukucita ububifi pa cinso cakwa Yawe, kabili uwalesembeleka Ahabu no kumutunka ni Yesebele umukashi wakwe." 
1Kings21:26 Ahabu alikwete umulandu pa fintu acitile ifyakwamba ukupepa utulubi tumbi, kwati bena Amoli abo Yawe atamfishe pantanshi ya bena Israeli." 
1Kings21:27 Ilyo Ahabu aumfwa amashiwi aya, alepula ifyakufwala fyakwe, afwala insalu shabulanda elyo afunga. Alala nafwala insalu shabulanda kabili aima no kwenda bulanda bulanda." 
1Kings21:28 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Eliya umwina Tishibe aliti," 
1Kings21:29 “Bushe naumona ifyo Ahabu aicefeshe pa cinso candi? Pa mulandu wakuti aicefya, nshalete icinkunka mu nshiku shakwe, lelo ndi nokucileta pa ŋanda yakwe mu nshiku sha mwana wakwe umwaume.”" 
1Kings22:1 Pa myaka itatu tapatalile apaba inkondo pakati ka bena Aramu na bena Israeli. 
1Kings22:2 Lelo mu mwaka walenga itatu Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda yaima yaya mukupempula imfumu ya bena Israeli. 
1Kings22:3 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yalyebele bacilolo baiko aiti, “Bushe tamwaishiba ukuti Ramoti Gileadi yesu? Nomba ifwe tatwacitapo nangu cimo icakulenga tupoke iyi ncende ukufuma ku mfumu ya bena Aramu.”" 
1Kings22:4 Elyo aipusha Yehoshafati ati, “Bushe teti ungafweko ukuya lwisha Ramoti Gileadi?” Yehoshafati ayasuka imfumu ya bena Israeli ati, “Ine ndifye cimo cine na iwe. Abantu bandi, bantu bobe, na bakabalwe bandi ni bakabalwe bobe,”" 
1Kings22:5 lelo Yehoshafati kabili alanda ku mfumu ya bena Israeli ati, “Utale wipushe kuli Yawe.”" 
1Kings22:6 Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yalonganika bakasesema bonse abaume abali imyanda amakumi yane (400) no kubepusha ati, “Bushe kuti naya lwisha Ramoti Gileadi nangu ndeke?” Nabo bayasuka imfumu abati, “Kabiye, pantu Yawe ali nokucipeela mu minwe yobe.”" 
1Kings22:7 Lelo Yehoshafati epakwipusha ati, “Bushe pano tapali kasesema wakwa Yawe uwakuti twipusheko?”" 
1Kings22:8 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yayasuka Yehoshafati aiti, “Kwena kuciliko umuntu na umbi uwakuti atwipushisheko kuli Yawe, nomba nalimupata pantu tatala asesema icisuma nangu cimo palwa ine, kanofye ifibi. Uyu muntu ni Mikaiya mwana Imula.” Yehoshafati ayasuka ati, “Imfumu taifwile kulanda ifyo.”" 
1Kings22:9 Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yaita umo pali bacilolo baiko no kumweba ati, “Kalete Mikaiya mwana Imula nombaline.”" 
1Kings22:10 Imfumu ya bena Israeli na Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda baikele pa fipuna fyabo ifyabufumu pa lubansa lwakutwilapo mupepi ne mpongolo yakwingililapo mu Samaria, ninshi nabafwala ifyakufwala fyabufumu kabili na bonse bakasesema balesesema pa cinso ca shamfumu." 
1Kings22:11 Nomba Sedekia umwana umwaume wakwa Kenana alipangile insengo sha fyela elyo asosa ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ukuti, ‘Kuli ishi nsengo eko uli nokupunkila abena Aramu mpaka ukabonaule.’”" 
1Kings22:12 Bakasesema bonse bambi balesesema cimo cine abati, “Usanse Ramoti Gileadi kabili uli nokuucimfya, pantu Yawe ali nokucipeela mu minwe ya mfumu.”" 
1Kings22:13 Inkombe batumine kuli Mikaiya yamweba ati, “Mona, abanobe bonse nabasesema ukuti imfumu ili nokucimfya. Kanshi na iwe ulekefye amashiwi yobe yabe nga yabo, kabili ulande ifisuma.”" 
1Kings22:14 Lelo Mikaiya asosa ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, ine nalamwebafye ifyo Yawe alenjeba.”" 
1Kings22:15 Ilyo afika, imfumu yamwipusha aiti, “Mikaiya bushe kuti twaya lwisha Ramoti Gileadi nangu ndeke?” Amwasuka ati, “Kalwishe no kuya cimfya, pantu Yawe ali nokucipeela mu minwe yobe.”" 
1Kings22:16 Imfumu yamweba aiti, “Bushe miku inga nkakulenga ukulapa ukuti wilanjeba ifintu fimbi kanofye icine mwishina lyakwa Yawe?”" 
1Kings22:17 Elyo Mikaiya ayasuka ati, “Namona abena Israeli nabasalangana bonse mu mpili nge mpaanga ishabula kacema, na Yawe atila, ‘Aba bantu tabakwata shikulu wabo. Eico lekeni cila muntu abwelele ku ŋanda mu cibote.’”" 
1Kings22:18 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yaeba Yehoshafati aiti, “Bushe nshacikweba nati tasesema ifisuma nangu fimo palwa ine kanofye ifibi fyeka?”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaiya akonkanyapo ati, “Eico umfwa kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe. Nimona Yawe ekele pa cipuna cabufumu ne fita fyonse ifya mu mulu nafiminina ukushinguluka ku lubali lwa ku kulyo no lwa ku kuso." 
1Kings22:20 Kabili Yawe alanda ati, ‘Ninani alaya tunka Ahabu mukuya lwisha Ramoti Gileadi pakuti kulya ekwakuti aye afwile?’ Pakwasuka uyu alanda ici, umbi nao alanda ici." 
1Kings22:21 “Elyo pakulekelesha, umupashi waisa iminina pantanshi yakwa Yawe walanda auti, ‘Nalaya mutunka.’" 
1Kings22:22 “Yawe aipusha ati, ‘Ni mu nshila nshi?’ “Nao wayasuka auti, ‘Nalaya no kuya ba umupashi wabufi mu tunwa twa bakasesema bakwe bonse.’ “Yawe asosa ati, ‘Walaya munasha mukumutunka, kabiye uye ubombe.’" 
1Kings22:23 “Nomba mona, Yawe nabika umupashi wakubepa ubufi mu tunwa twa bonse aba bakasesema bobe. Yawe napingula icinkunka pali iwe.”" 
1Kings22:24 Elyo Sedekiya umwana mwaume wakwa Kenana aima aya toba Mikaiya ulupi pa menso. Amwipusha ati, “Ni nshila nshi umupashi wakufuma kuli Yawe wilemo ilyo wacifuma kuli ine ukwisa landa kuli iwe?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaiya amwasuka ati, “Uli nokushininkisha pa bushiku ukaya belama mu muputule wamukati.”" 
1Kings22:26 Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yapeela icipope aiti, “Sendeni Mikaiya mumutwale kuli Amoni, kateeka wa musumba, na kuli Yoashi umwana wa mfumu." 
1Kings22:27 Muye mweba ati, ‘Ifi efyo imfumu yasosa aiti, bikeni uyu muntu mu cifungo kabili tecakwesha ukumupeela icintu nangu cimo, kanofye umukate na menshi mpaka ilyo nkabwela umutende.’”" 
1Kings22:28 Mikaiya alanda ati, “Nga cakuti uli nokubwela umutende, ninshi Yawe talandile ukupita muli ine.” Alundapo nokuti, “Mwe bantu bonse, mumfwe amashiwi aya nalanda.”" 
1Kings22:29 Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli na Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda epakuya ku Ramoti Gileadi. 
1Kings22:30 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yaeba Yehoshafati aiti, “Ine nalaifungushanya pakwingila mu bulwi, lelo iwe ufwale ifyakufwala fyabufumu.” Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yaifungushanya pakwingila mu bulwi." 
1Kings22:31 Nomba imfumu ya bena Aramu yalipeele icipope ku bakalamba ba bashilika ba maceleta amakumi yatatu na babili (32) ukutila, “Imwe mwilwisha umuntu umbi, abe umunono nangu umucindami, kanofye imfumu ya bena Israeli.”" 
1Kings22:32 Ilyo abakalamba ba maceleta bamona Yehoshafati, batila, “Cacine uyu wine e mfumu ya bena Israeli.” Epakumwalukila ukuti bamusanse, lelo ilyo Yehoshafati apunda," 
1Kings22:33 abakalamba ba bashilika ba maceleta bamona ukuti te mfumu ya bena Israeli, elyo baleka ukumukunkunika." 
1Kings22:34 Nomba umo abuula ubuta aposa umufwi icilaselase, waya lasa imfumu ya bena Israeli pakati ka filundilo fya cakucinga icifuba cakwe. Imfumu yaeba uwaleensha iceleta aiti, “Alushe celeta umfumye mukulwa, nabancena.”" 
1Kings22:35 Akasuba konse inkondo yakoselakofye ninshi imfumu ikelefye mwiceleta, naishintilila kwiceleta mukati yalosha amenso ukwali abena Aramu. Umulopa walefuma pa cilonda cakwe walasumina panshi ya mwiceleta, mpaka mu nshita ya cungulo yafwa no kufwa." 
1Kings22:36 Ilyo akasuba kaya mukuwa, imbila yapita mu bashilika bonse ukuti, “Umuntu onse abwelele ku musumba wakwe, umuntu onse ku calo cakwe.”" 
1Kings22:37 Kanshi imfumu ilyo yafwile, baletele icitumbi ku Samaria, eko baisa shiika." 
1Kings22:38 Baya samfya iceleta pa cishiba mu Samaria (apalesamba bacilende) elyo imbwa shaisa mukumyanga umulopa wakwe ukulingana nefyo ishiwi lyakwa Lesa lyasosele. 
1Kings22:39 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya bufumu bwakwa Ahabu, na fyonse ifyo acitile, isano akuulile, ne misumba acingileko amalinga, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya mfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
1Kings22:40 Ahabu aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Na Ahasia umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu. 
1Kings22:41 Yehoshafati umwana mwaume wakwa Asa aishile ba imfumu ya bena Yuda mu mwaka walenga ine ilyo Ahabu ali imfumu ya bena Israeli. 
1Kings22:42 Yehoshafati ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu na isano (35) ilyo apyene pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu musumba wa Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Asuba umwana umwanakashi wakwa Shili" 
1Kings22:43 Muli fyonse alaendafye mu nshila shakwa wishi Asa, kabili tatalile afumamo. Acitile ifintu ifyalungama pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Nomba incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika taonawile, na mulya mwine emo na bantu bakonkenyepo ukulatuula amalambo no kocelamo ububani." 
1Kings22:44 Kabili Yehoshafati aikele umutende ne mfumu ya bena Israeli. 
1Kings22:45 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoshafati, ifintu fyonse ifyo abombele ne nkondo alwile, bushe tafyalembwa mwibuku lya milandu ya mfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
1Kings22:46 Alifumishe mu calo bacilende ba ku mfuba abaume bonse, nabashele panuma yakuteeka kwakwa wishi Asa." 
1Kings22:47 Mu Edomu tamwali imfumu, inkonkani eyateekele." 
1Kings22:48 Nomba Yehoshafati alipangile amato ya makwebo ayengi nganshi ayakuya ku Ofiri mukusenda golide. Nomba yafilwa ukwenda pa menshi, yaonaikila pa Esioni Geberi." 
1Kings22:49 Pali ilya ine nshita Ahasia umwana mwaume wakwa Ahabu aeba Yehoshafati ati, “Leka abantu bandi baye pamo na bantu bobe mu mato,” nomba Yehoshafati akaana." 
1Kings22:50 Elyo Yehoshafati afwa ayalala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, baya mushiika mu musumba wakwa Davidi wishi elyo Yehoramu umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana." 
1Kings22:51 Ahasia umwana umwaume wakwa Ahabu aishile ba imfumu ya bena Israeli mu Samaria mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) ilyo Yehoshafati ali imfumu ya bena Yuda. Kabili ateekele icalo ca Israeli pa myaka ibili. 
1Kings22:52 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pantu akonkele mu nshila shakwa wishi na nyina, elyo na mu nshila shakwa Yeroboamu umwana umwaume wakwa Nebati, uwaposele na Israeli mukucita ububifi." 
1Kings22:53 Aletumika no kupepa Baali kabili asonsomba Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, ukukalipa ngefyo wishi acitile." 
2Kings1:1 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Ahabu, abena Moabu basangukile abena Israeli." 
2Kings1:2 Nomba Ahasia aliponene pa ncende yakutuushishamo iyali pa mutenge wa ŋanda ya kwisano, iyali mu Samaria, no kuicena nganshi. Elyo atuma inkombe nokusheba ati, “Kabiyeni muye buka kuli Baali Sebubu, umulungu wa ku Ekironi, pakuti mwishibe nga ndi nokupola kuli ifi naicena.”" 
2Kings1:3 Lelo malaika wakwa Yawe aeba Eliya umwina Tishibe ati, “Ima uye kumanya inkombe sha mfumu ya ku Samaria. Uye bepusha auti, ‘Bushe tamwaba Lesa mu Israeli pakuti muye mukubuka kuli Baali Sebubu, umulungu wa ku Ekironi?’" 
2Kings1:4 Kanshi ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, ‘Iwe tauli no kwima pa musengele ulelepo, ulifye no kufwa.’” Eliya aima aya no kuya." 
2Kings1:5 Ilyo inkombe shabwelele ku mfumu, yalibepwishe aiti, “Cinshi ico mwabwelela?”" 
2Kings1:6 Bayasuka abati, “Umuntu aciisa tukumanya no kutweba ati, ‘Bwelelenimo ku mfumu imutumine, muye yeba amuti, ifi efyo Yawe alanda ifyakuti, bushe tamwaba Lesa mu Israeli eco watumina abakuya buka kuli Baali Sebubu, umulungu wa ku Ekironi? Eico tawaime pa musengele ulelepo. Ulifye nokufwa!’”" 
2Kings1:7 Imfumu yabepusha aiti, “Bushe aciba muntu wa musango nshi uyo uwaciisa mukumanya no kumweba aya mashiwi?”" 
2Kings1:8 Bayasuka abati, “Aciba muntu umwaume nafwala ne cakufwala icamasako. Afwele no mushipi wa mpapa mu musana wakwe.” Imfumu aiti, “Ni Eliya umwina Tishibe.”" 
2Kings1:9 Elyo imfumu yatuma umukalamba wa bashilika pamo na bashilika bakwe amakumi yasano (50). Umukalamba wa bashilika aya fika kuli Eliya, amusanga naikala pa mulu wa lupili no kumweba ati, “We muntu wakwa Lesa, imfumu ilekwita ika!”" 
2Kings1:10 Lelo Eliya ayasuka umukalamba wa bashilika ati, “Nga cakuti ndi muntu wakwa Lesa, umulilo naufume ku mulu no koca iwe pamo na bashilika bobe amakumi yasano (50).” Elyo umulilo waponene ukufuma ku mulu no koca umukalamba wa bashilika pamo na bashilika bonse." 
2Kings1:11 Pa numa ya ifi, imfumu yatuma nakabili umukalamba wa bashilika na bashilika bakwe amakumi yasano (50) kuli Eliya. Umukalamba wa bashilika amweba ati, “We muntu wakwa Lesa umfwa ifyo imfumu yasosa ukutila, ika nombalinefye.”" 
2Kings1:12 Eliya ayasuka ati, “Nga cakuti ndi muntu wakwa Lesa, umulilo naufume ku mulu no koca iwe pamo na bashilika uli nabo amakumi yasano (50).” Elyo umulilo wapona ukufuma ku mulu no koca umukalamba wa bashilika pamo na bashilika ali nabo amakumi yasano (50)." 
2Kings1:13 Imfumu pa muku walenga butatu, yatuma umukalamba wa bashilika na bashilika amakumi yasano (50). Uyu mukalamba wa bashilika uwalenga butatu ena ilyo afika afukama pa cinso cakwa Eliya no kupapata ati, “We muntu wakwa Lesa, napapata umfwila uluse umweo wandi ne myeo ya bantu aba amakumi yasano (50) ababomfi bobe." 
2Kings1:14 Mona, umulilo naufuma ku mulu no koca abakalamba babili aba bashilika abacintangilila ukwisa kuno pamo na bashilika baciba nabo. Nomba umfwila uluse umweo wandi.”" 
2Kings1:15 Elyo Malaika wakwa Yawe aeba Eliya ati, “Kabiyeni nankwe, wimutiina iyoo.” Kanshi Eliya epakwima aya nankwe ku mfumu." 
2Kings1:16 Aya eba imfumu ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ifyakutila, ‘Bushe tamwaba Lesa mu Israeli pakuti wambe ukubuka nga filya wacituma inkombe shakuya mukubuka kuli Baali Sebubu umulungu wa ku Ekironi? Pa mulandu wakucita ici, tauli nakufuma mu musengele ulelepo. Ala ulifye no kufwa!’”" 
2Kings1:17 Elyo afwa, ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyo Eliya asosele. Pa mulandu wakuti Ahasia takwete umwana mwaume, Yoramu munyina ewamupyene pa bufumu mu mwaka walenga bubili uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoramu umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda." 
2Kings1:18 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Ahasia, elyo nefyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
2Kings2:1 Ilyo inshita yafikile mupepi iyakuti Yawe asende Eliya ku mulu muli kankungwe, Eliya na Elisha bali pa lwendo lwakufuma ku Giligali." 
2Kings2:2 Elyo Eliya aeba Elisha ati, “Ikala pano pantu Yawe nantuma ku Betele.” Lelo Elisha ayasuka ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, ngefyo na iwe wine uli uwamweo, nshakushe iyoo.” Kanshi epakuya bonse ku Betele." 
2Kings2:3 Impuka ya bakasesema ba ku Betele baishile ukwali Elisha bamwipusha ati, “Bushe nawishiba ukuti Yawe ilelo alesenda sokulu ukufuma kuli iwe?” Elisha ayasuka ati, “Ee ninjishiba, lelo lekeni ukulandapo.”" 
2Kings2:4 Elyo Eliya aeba Elisha ati, “Ikala pano Elisha pantu ine Yawe nantuma ku Yeriko.” Nao ayasuka ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, ngefyo na iwe wine uli uwamweo, nshakushe iyoo.” Kanshi epakuya bonse ku Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Impuka ya bakasesema ba mu Yeriko baya ukwali Elisha bamwipusha abati, “Bushe nawishiba ukuti Yawe ilelo alesenda sokulu ukufuma kuli iwe?” Elisha ayasuka ati, “Ee ninjishiba, lelo lekeni ukulandapo.”" 
2Kings2:6 Elyo Eliya amweba ati, “Ikala pano pantu Yawe nantuma ku Yordani.” Nao ayasuka ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, ngefyo na iwe wine uli uwamweo, nshakushe iyoo.” Kanshi bonse babili bakonkanyapo ukuya." 
2Kings2:7 Impuka ya bakasesema amakumi yasano (50) bakonka baya iminina akatalamukila ukulolesha ku ncende ukwaiminine Eliya na Elisha pa lulamba lwa mumana wa Yordani. 
2Kings2:8 Eliya epakubuula umwingila wakwe aupomba elyo auma pa menshi. Amenshi yayakanika pakati yatulumana uku noku elyo bonse babili bayabuka pa mushili uwauma. 
2Kings2:9 Ilyo bayabuka, Eliya aeba Elisha ati, “Njeba, bushe finshi ulefwaya nkucitile pa nshita tabalansenda ukufuma kuli iwe.” Elisha ayasuka ati, “Napapata nsuminisha pakuti mpyane ifipande fibili ifya mupashi obe.”" 
2Kings2:10 Eliya amweba ati, “Walomba icintu icayansha, lelo nga cakuti uleisa monako ilyo balensenda ukufuma kuli iwe, cileisa ba ifyo fine ulombele, nga teifyo lyena iyoo.”" 
2Kings2:11 Lilya bacili mukuya balelanda ilyashi, mukupumikisha kwaisa iceleta lya mulilo ilyo bakabalwe abamulilo baletinta no kwisa bapatulula, na Eliya asendwa mu mulu muli kankungwe." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha pakumonako apunda ati, “Tata wandi, tata wandi ee! Amaceleta ya mu Israeli na ba pali bakabalwe.” Ukufumapo Elisha tatalile amumona nakabili. Elyo abuula ifyakufwala fyakwe afilepula pakati." 
2Kings2:13 Abuula umwingila Eliya aponeshe asenda abwelelamo uko afumine, aya iminina pa lulamba lwa Yordani." 
2Kings2:14 Elyo abuula umwingila uwaponene kuli Eliya auma pa menshi. Aipusha nokuti, “Bushe nomba ali kwi Yawe, Lesa wakwa Eliya?” Elyo auma pa menshi, yayakanika pakati, yambi yaba ku kulyo yambi ku kuso epo ayabukila." 
2Kings2:15 Impuka ya bakasesema abafumine ku Yeriko abaletamba ifilecitika basosa abati, “Umupashi wakwa Eliya waikala pali Elisha.” Elyo baya mukumukumanya kabili bakontamika imitwe yabo pa cinso cakwe." 
2Kings2:16 Bamweba ukuti, “Mona, ifwe fwe babomfi bobe natukwata abaume abamaka amakumi yasano (50). Leka baye balefwaya sokulu. Pantu limbi kuti Umupashi wakwa Yawe wacimusenda nauya musha ku ncende ya ku mpili nangu mwishika.” Elisha abasuka ati, “Iyoo, mwibatuma.”" 
2Kings2:17 Lelo bena bamupatikisha nganshi, icakutila aumfwa ne nsoni ukuti akaane. Nao abeba ati, “Batumeni.” Elyo batuma abaume amakumi yasano (50), abaile pwa inshiku shitatu balefwayafye, lelo bafilwa ukumusanga." 
2Kings2:18 Ilyo babwelele kuli Elisha ninshi ekala mu Yeriko, abeba ukuti, “Bushe nshamuleseshe ukuya?”" 
2Kings2:19 Abaume ba mu musumba baebele Elisha abati, “Moneni mwe shikulu, uno musumba wakuulwa apasuma, ngefyo mulemona lelo amenshi yaba ayabi no mushili taukwata ifyakulya.”" 
2Kings2:20 Abeba ati, “Leteni imbale ipya, elyo mubikemo no mucele.” Nabo bamuletela." 
2Kings2:21 Elyo aima aya ku mulonga, abuula no mucele aposamo, alanda nokuti, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, ‘Nimposha aya menshi. Tayakatale ayaleta imfwa nangu ukulenga umushili ukukanakwata ifyakulya.’”" 
2Kings2:22 Na menshi yabafye ayasuma ukufika na kuli buno bushiku, ukulingana ne shiwi Elisha asosele." 
2Kings2:23 Ukufuma kulya Elisha aile ku Betele. Lilya acili mukuya mu musebo, abana bacilumendo baisa ukufuma mu musumba bayamba ukumuwela abati, “Kabiye ube cilipala, kabiye ube cilipala.”" 
2Kings2:24 Elyo apilibuka abalolesha no kulanda icitipu pali bena mwishina lyakwa Yawe. Elyo ifiswango fibili fibea fyafuma mu mpanga no kwipayapo abana amakumi yane na babili (42). 
2Kings2:25 Kabili aima aya ku lupili lwa Kameli elyo ukufuma kulya abwelela na ku Samaria. 
2Kings3:1 Yoramu umwana mwaume wakwa Ahabu, ayambile ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa mu Israeli, mu musumba wa Samaria, mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) ilyo Yehoshafati ali imfumu ya bena Yuda. Kabili ateekelemo imyaka ikumi limo na ibili (12)." 
2Kings3:2 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, lelo tacali nge fyacitile wishi na nyina. Ena alibongolwele uluceshi lwa mabwe ulwamapepo ulwakwa Baali ulo wishi akuulile." 
2Kings3:3 Nomba alitwalilile mu fyabubifi ifyo Yeroboamu umwana mwaume uwakwa Nebati aletelele na bena Israeli ukubifyako. Tapilibwike ukufumako. 
2Kings3:4 Nomba Mesha imfumu ya bena Moabu alikwete umwine umulimo alebomba uwakuteeka impaanga, kabili aletuula ku mfumu ya bena Israeli utwana twa mpaanga amakana umwanda umo (100,000), na masako ya basukusuku amakana umwanda umo (100,000)." 
2Kings3:5 Lelo panuma ya mfwa yakwa Ahabu, imfumu ya ku Moabu yasangukila imfumu ya bena Israeli." 
2Kings3:6 Kanshi pali ilya nshita imfumu Yoramu yaima ukufuma ku Samaria no kulonganika abashilika ba mu Israeli bonse. 
2Kings3:7 Atuma na mashiwi aya kuli Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda ati, “Imfumu ya ku Moabu nainsangukila. Bushe kuti wanshindika kukuya lwisha abena Moabu?” Yehoshafati ayasuka ati, “Nalakushindika, pantu ine cimo cine na iwe. Abantu bandi cimo na bantu bobe, elyo bakabalwe bandi cimo na bakabalwe bobe.”" 
2Kings3:8 Kabili aipusha nokuti, “Bushe tukabomfya nshila nshi pakuya balwisha?” Yoramu ayasuka ati, “Ukupitila mu matololo ya ku Edomu.”" 
2Kings3:9 Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli yaima pamo ne mfumu ya bena Yuda elyo ne ya bena Edomu. Panuma yakwenda inshiku cine lubali ulwendo lwakushinguluka, amenshi yakunwa abashilika pamo ne nama bakwete fyapwa." 
2Kings3:10 Imfumu ya bena Israeli epakuilishanya aiti, “Cinshi, bushe Yawe alonganikila fwe mfumu shitatu pamo, icakuti nomba ese atupeelefye mu minwe ya bena Moabu?”" 
2Kings3:11 Lelo Yehoshafati epakwipusha ati, “Bushe takuli kuno kasesema wakwa Yawe pakuti eo atwipushisheko kuli Yawe.” Cilolo umo uwa mfumu ya bena Israeli ayasuka ati, “Epo ali Elisha umwana mwaume wakwa Shafati, uwaleitila amenshi pa minwe yakwa Eliya.”" 
2Kings3:12 Yehoshafati asosa ati, “Ulya wine euli ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe.” Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli na Yehoshafati ne mfumu ya bena Edomu epakuya kuli ena." 
2Kings3:13 Elisha aeba imfumu ya bena Israeli ati, “Bushe ni finshi twingabombela pamo iwe na ine? Kabiye kuli bakasesema bakwa wiso na bakasesema bakwa noko.” Lelo imfumu ya bena Israeli yayasuka aiti, “Iyoo, pantu ifwe bonse imfumu shitatu ni Yawe atulonganike ukuti atupeele mu minwe yakwa Moabu.”" 
2Kings3:14 Elisha asosa ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe umwine wa fita uwamweo, uyo ine ntumika, mbula ukuba no mucinshi kuli Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda, nga nshikusakamene nangu ukukulolesha." 
2Kings3:15 Nomba ndeteleniko kalisha we seese.” Cilya kalisha we seese alelisha, ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwaisa pali Elisha." 
2Kings3:16 Elyo alanda ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ifyakuti, ‘Imbeni ifishima ifingi muli lino ishika.’" 
2Kings3:17 Pantu ifi efyo Yawe asosa ukuti, ‘Tamwamone umwela nangu imfula, lelo amenshi yalaisula mu mpanga yonse iya mwishika, kabili imwe, iŋombe shenu elyo ne fitekwa fyenu fimbi eyo muli nokunwa.’" 
2Kings3:18 Ici, cintu cayanguka nganshi pa cinso cakwa Yawe, kabili ali nokupeela Moabu kuli imwe." 
2Kings3:19 Muli nokupokolola imisumba yonse iya malinga pamo ne mishi iyikalamba. Muli nokutema umuti onse uusuma, ukucilika intulo shonse isha mimana, elyo no konaula ibala lyonse ilisuma ku mabwe.”" 
2Kings3:20 Ulucelo lwakonkelepo, ukulingana ne nshita yakutuulilapo ilambo, bamona amenshi yatelemuka ukufuma ku lubali lwa ku Edomu. Kabili impanga yonse yaisulamo amenshi." 
2Kings3:21 Nomba bonse abena Moabu ilyo baumfwile ukuti ishamfumu nashima ukwisa mukubalwisha, baimishe umwaume onse, umwaice nangu umukote uwingalwa ulubuli, baisa mwimika ku mupaka." 
2Kings3:22 Ilyo babuuka ulucelo, basanga akasuba nakasanika pa menshi. Ku lubali lwa bena Moabu amenshi yalemoneka ayakashika kwati mulopa." 
2Kings3:23 Elyo basosa abati, “Mulopa ulya, ni shilya imfumu shifwile nashilwa no kwipayana. Mwe bena Moabu twendeni mukutapa icuma.”" 
2Kings3:24 Lelo ilyo abena Moabu baisa fika pa nkambi ya bena Israeli, abena Israeli babemina no kubalwisha mpaka bafulumuka. Kabili abena Israeli bakumana mpanga yonse no kwipaya abena Moabu." 
2Kings3:25 Baonaula imisumba, na cila muntu aposapo ilibwe pebala ilisuma mpaka lyafimbwa. Bacilika utumfukumfuku twa menshi no kutemaula imiti iyisuma yonse. Kanofye Kiri Hareseti eo bashilekofye na mabwe yonse umo yaikalila. Nomba abaume abali na malekeni baushinguluka no kuusansa nao wine." 
2Kings3:26 Ilyo imfumu ya ku Moabu yamona ukuti ulubuli lwaikosela, yaima yasenda abaume abalwila ku lupanga imyanda cine lubali (700) ukwesha ukupatikisha ukuti ifike ku mfumu ya ku Edomu, nomba yafilwa." 
2Kings3:27 Elyo yabuula umwana wakwe ibeli umwaume, uwali nokuipyana pa bufumu, yamutuula ilambo pelinga lya musumba. Abena Moabu epakufulilwa abena Israeli icine cine, baima babwelela na ku calo cabo." 
2Kings4:1 Umukashi wa mwaume umo ukufuma mu mpuka ya bakasesema aliliile kuli Elisha ati, “Umwina mwandi uwali umubomfi obe alifwa, elyo walishiba ukuti ali na katiina kuli Yawe. Lelo uo akongweleko ali mukwisa senda abana abaume babili ukuti bakabe abasha bakwe.”" 
2Kings4:2 Elisha amwasuka ati, “Nalakwafa shani? Njeba, ni finshi ukwete mu ŋanda yobe?” Umwanakashi asosa ati, “Umusha wenu takwete icintu nangu cimo, kanofye utumafuta utunono.”" 
2Kings4:3 Elisha amweba ati, “Endauka wipushe abena mupalamano bonse washimeko imisukupala umushili fintu. Wiyashima utunono." 
2Kings4:4 Elyo wingile mu ŋanda, muisalile iwe pamo na bana bobe abaume mukati ka ŋanda. Wambe ukulaminsulwila amafuta mu misukupala yonse, elyo umo nga waisula wauseshapo waubika lubali.”" 
2Kings4:5 Umwanakashi afumapo aya ingila mu ŋanda aisalako ne ciibi, ena na bana bakwe abaume. Baleta imisukupala kuli ena, nao ayamba ukwitilamo amafuta." 
2Kings4:6 Ilyo imisukupala yonse yaisula, umwanakashi aeba umwana wakwe umwaume ati, “Ndetelako na umbi umusukupala.” Lelo ayasuka ati, “Tapali umusukupala nangu umo uushelepo.” Elyo amafuta yaleka ukupongoloka." 
2Kings4:7 Umwanakashi aima aya eba umuntu wakwa Lesa, nao amweba ati, “Kabiye uye ushitishe amafuta elyo uye lipila inkongole. Iwe na bana bobe abaume mwakulaliila pa yaleshalapo.”" 
2Kings4:8 Ubushiku bumo Elisha aile ku Shunemu, uko ailesanga umwanakashi umucindami nganshi, uyo uwamulombele ukuti ekale pakuti alyeko icakulya. Kanshi alatifye nshita yonse ilyo apita mupepi, ashokelapo mukulya." 
2Kings4:9 Elyo umwanakashi aeba umwina mwakwe ati, “Ninjishiba ukuti uyu muntu uwisa mukutupempula lyonse muntu uwashila uwakwa Lesa." 
2Kings4:10 Natupange umuputule uunono pa mulu wa ŋanda. Tubikemo no musengele apakulala, ne tebulo, umupando elyo ne lampi ifyakuti alebomfya. Pakuti emo aleikala nshita yonse ilyo atupempula.”" 
2Kings4:11 Ubushiku bumo ilyo Elisha aishile, aile ingila mu muputule wakwe no kulambalala panshi mulya mwine." 
2Kings4:12 Elyo aeba umubomfi wakwe Gehasi ati, “Ita umwanakashi umwina Shunemu.” Elyo amwita, nao aisa iminina pa cinso cakwe." 
2Kings4:13 Elisha aeba umubomfi ati, “Mwebe uyu mwanakashi auti, ‘Nautuculila nganshi. Nomba ni finshi twingakucitilako? Bushe kuti twakulandilako ku mfumu nangu ku mukalamba wa fita fyankondo?’” Umwanakashi ayasuka ati, “Ine nalikwata fyonse kabili njikala na bantu bandi.”" 
2Kings4:14 Elisha aipusha ati, “Bushe ni finshi twingamucitila?” Gehasi ayasuka ati, “Ala takwata umwana mwaume elyo no mulume wakwe mukote.”" 
2Kings4:15 Elyo Elisha asosa ati, “Mwite umwanakashi.” Amwita, nao aisa iminina mu mwinshi." 
2Kings4:16 Elisha amweba ati, “Pa nshita nga ino ine iya uyu mwaka uleisa, uli nokulela umwana mwaume mu maboko yobe.” Umwanakashi akaana ati, “Iyoo we shikulu, wibepa umusha obe we muntu wakwa Lesa.”" 
2Kings4:17 Lelo umwanakashi aisa kwata ifumo, na mu mwaka wakonkelepo pa nshita nga ilya ine aisa kwata umwana mwaume ukulingana nefyo Elisha amwebele." 
2Kings4:18 Umwana cilya akula, elyo ubushiku bumo aya kuli wishi, ninshi ali ku baleseepa." 
2Kings4:19 Aeba wishi ati, “Nafwa umutwe, nafwa umutwe ee.” Wishi aeba umubomfi ati, “Mutwale kuli nyina.”" 
2Kings4:20 Panuma yakumwimya, umubomfi amusenda amutwala kuli nyina. Uyu mwana aya ikalafye pa molu yakwa nyina mpaka akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe, no mwana afwa." 
2Kings4:21 Umwanakashi aya ingila mu muputule wa pamulu no kuya bika umwana uwafwa pa musengele wa muntu wakwa Lesa, afumamo aisalako ne ciibi." 
2Kings4:22 Umwanakashi aita umulume wakwe amweba ati, “Ntumineniko umubomfi umo elyo na kabalwe pakuti nje ku muntu wakwa Lesa bwangu bwangu no kubwelako.”" 
2Kings4:23 Umulume aipusha ati, “Ngeco walailako ubushiku bwa lelo cinshi? Apo buno tebushiku bwa mweshi upya nangu ubwe Sabata.” Umwanakashi amwasuka ati, “Wisakamana”" 
2Kings4:24 Anina pali kabalwe elyo aeba no mubomfi wakwe ati, “Tangila tecakwesha ukunasha ukwenda pa mulandu wa ine kano nakweba.”" 
2Kings4:25 Epakwima mpaka aisa fika ku muntu wakwa Lesa ku lupili lwa Kameli. Ilyo amumona akatalamukila, umuntu wakwa Lesa aeba umubomfi wakwe Gehasi ati, “Mona, umwanakashi wa ku Shunemu uyo aisa." 
2Kings4:26 Butuka kamukonkele umukumanye no kumwipusha auti, ‘Bushe ulifye bwino? Ngo mulume obe ali bwino? Ngo mwana obe ali bwino?’” Umwanakashi ayasuka ati, “Fyonse filifye bwino.”" 
2Kings4:27 Lelo ilyo afika apali umuntu wakwa Lesa pa mulu wa lupili, aya mwikata ku makasa. Gehasi aisa ukuti ese amusunke, lelo umuntu wakwa Lesa asosa ati, “Muleke abe. Uyu mwanakashi nakwata ubucushi sana, lelo Yawe namfisa uyu mulandu nakaana no kunjeba ifyo cili.”" 
2Kings4:28 Umwanakashi asosa ati, “Bushe nine shikulu nakulombele umwana mwaume? Bushe nshakwebele ukuti winkubulafye umutima?”" 
2Kings4:29 Elisha aeba Gehasi ati, “Kaka umushipi pa mwingila, buula inkonto yandi usende mu minwe yobe wambefye ulubilo. Nga wakumanya uuli onse, tecakwesha ukumuposha, nangufye umuntu nga akuposha, wimwasuka. Uye lalika inkonto pa mulu wa mwana.”" 
2Kings4:30 Nomba nyina kwa mwana asosa ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, ngefyo na iwe wine uli uwamweo, nshakushe iyoo.” Nao epakwima akonka umwanakashi." 
2Kings4:31 Gehasi ena ninshi nabatangilila aya lalika inkonto pa mwaice, lelo takwali ishiwi nangu icishibilo cabumi. Elyo Gehasi ena abwelelamo ukuya konkela Elisha no kuya mweba ati, “Umwaice tabuukile.”" 
2Kings4:32 Ilyo Elisha afika ku ŋanda, asanga umwaice uwafwa nabamulalika na pa musengele wakwe." 
2Kings4:33 Aingila mu ŋanda aisalako iciibi, asha abo babili aishile nabo, elyo apepa kuli Yawe." 
2Kings4:34 Elyo anina pa musengele no kulambalala pa mulu wa mwaice. Ashintilisha akanwa kakwe pa kanwa ka mwaice, amenso yakwe pa ya mwaice, na maboko yakwe pa ya mwaice. Lilya alambalelepo, umubili wa mwaice wayamba ukukabilila." 
2Kings4:35 Elisha aimapo pa musengele ayamba ukwendauka mukati ka muputule elyo abwelela pa musengele no kulambalala pa mwaice nakabili. Umwaice atesemuna imiku cine lubali, aisula na menso alalolesha." 
2Kings4:36 Elisha aita Gehasi amweba ati, “Ita umwanakashi umwina Shunemu.” Nao aya mwita. Ilyo aisa, amweba ati, “Senda umwana obe.”" 
2Kings4:37 Umwanakashi aingila, afukama pa nkasa shakwe akontamika umutwe panshi. Elyo abuula umwana wakwe umwaume amusenda." 
2Kings4:38 Ilyo Elisha abwelela ku Giligali asanga ukuti kwali icipowe kuli ilya ncende. Elyo pa nshita acili alelanshanya ne mpuka ya bakasesema, aeba umubomfi wakwe ati, “Tekapo inongo iyo iyikalamba wipikilepo abantu aba icakulya.”" 
2Kings4:39 Umo pali bena afuma aya mu mpanga, aya mukusaba umusalu. Elyo asanga umwangashi wa mpanga, asabako ifitwalo fyauko aupomba na mu mwingila wakwe. Ilyo abwela, aisa putawila mu nongo ya fyaipikwe, nangu cali cakuti tapali uwaishibe ifi fintu." 
2Kings4:40 Icakulya caisa pekanishiwa no kupeelwa ku bantu, nomba cilya bayamba ukulya, balila abati, “Iwe we muntu wakwa Lesa, muli imfwa mu nongo.” Na bantu bafilwa ukulya." 
2Kings4:41 Elisha asosa ati, “Leteni ubunga.” Abika ubunga mu nongo alanda nokuti, “Peela abantu uleke balye.” Elyo takwali nangu cimo icakulola ku bubi." 
2Kings4:42 Umwaume umo aishile ukufuma ku Baali Shalisha, nasenda imikate ya bale amakumi yabili (20) ukuletela umuntu wakwa Lesa iyapangilwa ku fisabo fyantanshi, pamo pene ne mitwe ya nseke shipya. Elisha amweba ati, “Peela abantu balye.”" 
2Kings4:43 Umubomfi wakwe aipusha ati, “Bushe iyi ine mikate kuti naipeela shani ku bantu umwanda umo (100)?” Lelo Elisha ayasuka ati, “Peelafye abantu balye. Pantu ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Balelya kabili paleba ne fyakushalapo.’”" 
2Kings4:44 Afipeela kuli bena, nabo balya, kabili bashapo nokusha ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe asosele." 
2Kings5:1 Nomba Namani ewali umukalamba wa fita fyankondo fya mfumu ya bena Aramu. Ali umuntu uwacindama mu menso yakwa shikulu wakwe elyo no kutemwikwa pantu kupitila muli ena Yawe apeele abena Aramu ukucimfya abalwani babo. Ali umushilika uwacenjela nganshi, nomba alilwele ifibashi." 
2Kings5:2 Nomba abena Aramu ilyo baile mukusansa, ku calo ca bena Israeli baiketeko akamukashana kamo ukuba umusha wakubombela muka Namani." 
2Kings5:3 Elyo umukashana aeba nakulu ati, “Nga cakuti cingawama shikulu amona kasesema uwaba mu Samaria, kuti aisa posha ubu bulwele bwa fibashi.”" 
2Kings5:4 Namani epakuya ku mfumu no kuya sosa ifyo umukashana wa ku Israeli alandile. 
2Kings5:5 Imfumu ya ku Aramu yayasuka aiti, “Mu nshila iyili yonse kabiye, nalatuma kalata ku mfumu ya ku Israeli.” Kanshi Namani epakuya, asenda amatalanta ya silifa ikumi limo, indalama sha golide amashekeli amakana mutanda (6,000) ne fyakufwala ifisuma ikumi." 
2Kings5:6 Kalata asendele ku mfumu ya ku Israeli yalembelwe ukuti, “Pali iyi nkalata epo natumina umubomfi wandi Namani kuli iwe ukuti umuposhe ubulwele bwa fibashi.”" 
2Kings5:7 Panumafye yakubelenga kalata, imfumu ya ku Israeli yalepula insalu shabufumu no kusosa aiti, “Bushe ndi Lesa? Bushe kuti naipaya kabili napeela ubumi? Cinshi ena antumina umuntu ukuti njise muposha ifibashi? Moneni ifyo alefwaya ukwamba ukuumana na ine!”" 
2Kings5:8 Ilyo Elisha umuntu wakwa Lesa aumfwa ukuti imfumu ya bena Israeli nailepula ifyakufwala, aitumina amashiwi yakuti, “Cinshi ico walepwila ifyakufwala? Leka uyo muntu ese kuli ine, ena alaisa ishiba ukuti mwaliba kasesema mu Israeli.”" 
2Kings5:9 Kanshi Namani epakusenda bakabalwe bakwe na maceleta, aya iminina pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Elisha atuma inkombe yakuya mweba ati, “Kabiye usambe imiku cine lubali mu mumana wa Yordani, no mubili obe walabwelela ifyo wali kale elyo walasanguluka nakabili.”" 
2Kings5:11 Nomba Namani afulwa, afumapo icipyu, alanda ati, “Ine nacilatontonkanya ukuti alafuma ese kuli ine elyo eminine no kukuuta peshina lyakwa Yawe Lesa wakwe, atambike no kuboko kwakwe apali ubulwele no kumposha ku bulwele bwa fibashi." 
2Kings5:12 Bushe Abana na Fapa te mimana iyaba mu Damasiko iyawama ukucila amenshi yonse aya mu Israeli? Bushe tekuti nsambe muli iyi mimana no kusangululwa?” Kanshi epakupilibuka afumapo ne cipyu, aya." 
2Kings5:13 Ababomfi bakwa Namani baya kuli ena no kumweba ati, “Mwe tata, nga cakuti kasesema akweba ukucita icintu icikulu, bushe tekuti ucicitefye? Pali bufi apo akwebafye ati, ‘Kabiye usambe mu mumana, walasanguluka?’”" 
2Kings5:14 Elyo aima ayasamba imiku cine lubali mu mumana wa Yordani, ukulingana ne shiwi umuntu wakwa Lesa acimweba, no mubili wakwe wabwelela ifyo wali kale, no kusanguka kwati wa kamwana akanono." 
2Kings5:15 Elyo Namani pamo na babomfi bakwe babwelela ku muntu wakwa Lesa. Aiminina pa cinso cakwe alanda no kuti, “Nomba naishiba ukuti takwaba Lesa muli lino isonde lyonse kanofye mu Israeli. Nakupapata sumina icabupe ukufuma ku musha obe.”" 
2Kings5:16 Kasesema ayasuka ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe umumi, uo ntumika, nshapoke icintu nangu cimo.” Kabili Namani aesha ukumupatikisha, lelo akaana." 
2Kings5:17 Namani asosa ati, “Nga wakaana, kanshi nsuminisha ukuti ine ne mubomfi obe bampeele umushili uwingi uwakuti imfalashi shibili shisende, pantu umubomfi obe takatale atuula amalambo yakoca ku mulungu uuli onse kanofye kuli Yawe." 
2Kings5:18 Nomba Yawe engalabelela umubomfi obe uluse pa cintu cimo. Neci cintu cakutila ilyo nashindika shikulu pakuya mukupepa mwitempele lya mulungu wakwe Rimoni, ninshi ena nashintilila pa kuboko kwandi, nga akontama elyo na ine nakontama, ndelomba ukuti Yawe engabelela umubomfi obe uluse pali ici.”" 
2Kings5:19 Elisha amweba ati, “Kabiye uleenda umutende.” Lelo panuma ilyo Namani aenda intamfu iyalingafye," 
2Kings5:20 Gehasi, umubomfi wakwa Elisha umuntu wakwa Lesa ashala atontonkanya umwine ati, “Shikulu alekelesha Namani uyu umwina Aramu ukubwelelamo ne fintu acileta ukwabula ukupoka. Nomba kwena ine, mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, nalamukonka ulubilo nje mpokeko fimo kuli ena.”" 
2Kings5:21 Kanshi Gehasi epakukonka Namani. Ilyo Namani amumona eshile alebutukila uko ali, aikila ukufuma mwiceleta amukonkela. Amwipusha ati, “Bushe kwaba ifyalubana?”" 
2Kings5:22 Gehasi ayasuka ati, “Takuli icilubene. Ni shikulu ewantuma ukwisa sosa ati, ‘Abalumendo babili ukufuma mu mpuka ya bakasesema ebaisa kuli ine ukufuma mu calo ca mpili ca ku Efulemu. Napapata bapeko italanta lya silifa limo elyo ne misango ibili iya fyakufwala.’”" 
2Kings5:23 Namani ayasuka ati, “Cilifye bwino, buula amatalanta ya silifa aya yabili.” Akoselesha Gehasi ukuti ekaana elyo akaka na matalanta ya silifa yabili mu mifuko ibili, pamo ne misango ibili iya fyakufwala. Aipeela na ku babomfi bakwe babili, nabo basenda nabatangila pantanshi yakwa Gehasi." 
2Kings5:24 Ilyo Gehasi afika ku lupili, apoka ifipe ukufuma ku babomfi aya bika mu ŋanda. Aeba na babomfi ukuya, nabo baya." 
2Kings5:25 Elyo aingila mu ŋanda no kuya iminina pa cinso cakwa shikulu wakwe Elisha. Elisha amwipusha ati, “Ni kwisa waciba iwe Gehasi?” Gehasi ayasuka ati, “Umubomfi obe tele nangu kumo.”" 
2Kings5:26 Lelo Elisha amweba ati, “Bushe umupashi wandi tawaciba na iwe ilyo ulya muntu acifuma mwiceleta ukwisa kukonkela? Bushe ino ni nshita yakupoka indalama, nangu ukupoka ifyakufwala, nangu amabala ya miolifa, nangu amabala ya myangashi, nangu impaanga, nangu iŋombe nangu ababomfi abaume na babomfi abanakashi?" 
2Kings5:27 Ifibashi fyakwa Namani fili nokulambatila kuli iwe na ku bana aba mu ŋanda yobe lyonsefye.” Elyo Gehasi afuma pa cinso cakwa Elisha ninshi nalwala ifibashi, abuutile tuutu kwati bunga bwa mfula." 
2Kings6:1 Impuka ya bakasesema yaebele Elisha aiti, “Mona incende ilya twikalamo, naicepa kuli ifwe." 
2Kings6:2 Natuleya ku mumana wa Yordani, ukwakuti cila umo aye temako icimuti icakukuulile iŋanda iyakuti tuleikalamo.” Elisha abeba ati, “Kabiyeni.”" 
2Kings6:3 Umo pali bena asosa ati, “Bushe teti utemwe ukwisa pamo na babomfi bobe?” Elisha ati, “Nalakonka.”" 
2Kings6:4 Aima aya nabo. Baya fika ku mumana wa Yordani, batampa no kutema ifimuti." 
2Kings6:5 Lilya umo aletema icimuti, isembe lyasokoka lyaponena na mu menshi. Elyo akuuta ati, “Iye mwe mfumu yandi, lisembe lyakwashima.”" 
2Kings6:6 Umuntu wakwa Lesa aipusha ati, “Liponene pesa?” Ilyo amulanga incende, Elisha akontola akamuti aposa pa ncende ine, ne sembe lyaibuka lyalaelela." 
2Kings6:7 Amweba ati, “Limye.” Elyo umuntu atambika ukuboko kwakwe alibuula." 
2Kings6:8 Nomba imfumu ya bena Aramu yalelwisha abena Israeli. Panuma yakulandishanya na bacilolo ba fita, yalanda ati, “Nalacita inkambi pali ilya ncende na pali ilya.”" 
2Kings6:9 Umuntu wakwa Lesa atuma amashiwi ku mfumu ya bena Israeli ati, “Ucenjele nganshi pakupita kuli ilya ncende pantu abena Aramu epo balekwikalila.”" 
2Kings6:10 Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli epakutumako abakulengula ilya ncende yalandile umuntu wakwa Lesa. Elyo cila nshita Elisha alasoka imfumu pakuti ibe iyaipekanya muli shilya ncende. 
2Kings6:11 Imfumu ya ku Aramu yafulwa nganshi ifyalacitika. Yaita na bacilolo no kubepusha aiti, “Bushe tamwanjebe uyo umo pakati kesu uwawila ku mfumu ya bena Israeli?”" 
2Kings6:12 Umo pali bacilolo ayasuka ati, “Tapali nangu umo pali ifwe kanabesa we mfumu, lelo ni Elisha kasesema uwa bena Israeli eweba imfumu ya bena Israeli amashiwi yalya iwe ulandila mu muputule obe wakukati.”" 
2Kings6:13 Imfumu yakonkomesha bacilolo aiti, “Kabiyeni mufwailishe uko ali pakuti ntumeko abakuya mwikata.” Baya bwesha amashiwi ukuti, “Ali ku Dotani.”" 
2Kings6:14 Elyo atuma bakabalwe na maceleta ne mpuka ya bashilika iyamaka. Baya ubushiku no kuya shinguluka umusumba onse. 
2Kings6:15 Ilyo uwaletumika umuntu wakwa Lesa ashibuka ulucelo lwakonkelepo, afumina panse, elyo asanga abashilika na bakabalwe na maceleta nabashinguluka umusumba. Elyo aipusha ati, “Iye mwe shikulu, bushe twalacita shani?”" 
2Kings6:16 Kasesema ayasuka ati, “Witiina, pantu abali na ifwe nabacila pabo bali nabo.”" 
2Kings6:17 Elyo Elisha apepa ati, “We Yawe, isula amenso ya uyu muntu pakuti amone.” Elyo Yawe aisula amenso ya mubomfi, nao alolesha amona impili ishaisulamo bakabalwe na maceleta aya mulilo nayashinguluka Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Cilya abalwani balapalamina uko ali, Elisha apepa kuli Yawe ati, “Shi wingesala amenso ya aba bantu baleke ukumona.” Nao Yawe aisala amenso yabo baleka ukumona ngefyo Elisha alombele." 
2Kings6:19 Elisha abeba ati, “Inshila ino teyo, no musumba uno teo. Twendeni munkonke, nalamutwala ku muntu mulefwaya.” Elyo abaleta ku Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Panuma yakwingila mu musumba, Elisha alanda ati, “We Yawe, shi wingesula amenso ya aba bantu pakuti bambe ukumona.” Elyo Yawe abesula amenso bayamba ukumona. Elyo baishiba nokuti bali mu Samaria." 
2Kings6:21 Ilyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yabamona, yaipusha Elisha aiti, “Bushe mbepaye mwe tata? Bushe mbepaye?”" 
2Kings6:22 Elisha ayasuka ati, “Wibepaya, bushe kuti waipaya abantu abo wikete kale ku lupanga lobe na ku mufwi? Bapeeleko icakulya ubapeko na menshi pakuti balye no kunwa pakuti babwelelemo kuli shikulwibo.”" 
2Kings6:23 Elyo abapekanishisha ifyakulya ifingi, na panuma yakupwisha ukulya no kunwa abeba no kuya, nabo babwelela kuli shikulwibo. Ne mpuka sha bashilika ba mu Aramu shaleka ukwisa mukulwisha abena Israeli mu calo cabo." 
2Kings6:24 Elyo papitile inshita, Beni Hadadi imfumu ya bena Aramu yalonganika ifita fyonse no kwima fyaya shinguluka umusumba wa Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Mwapona insala iyikalamba mu musumba, pantu ukushingulukwa kwaposele inshita iyitali icakutila umutwe wakwa kabalwe walashitwa indalama amashekeli amakumi cine konse konse aya silifa, no lukombo lumo ulwa matotoli ya nkunda indalama amashekeli yasano aya silifa." 
2Kings6:26 Lilya imfumu ya bena Israeli ilepita lwapa cibumba ce linga lya musumba, umwanakashi umo amulilila ati, “Ngafweniko, kanabesa mwe mfumu.”" 
2Kings6:27 Imfumu yayasuka ati, “Nga Yawe akaana ukukwafwa, kuti ine nafumya kwi ifyakukwafwako? Bushe ni ku fili pa lubansa lwakutwilapo? Nangu ifili apakukamina umwangashi?”" 
2Kings6:28 Elyo amwipusha ati, “Bwafya nshi ukwete?” Umwanakashi ayasuka imfumu ati, “Uyu, umwanakashi munandi apa, anjebele ati, ‘Leta umwana obe umwaume eo tulye ilelo, elyo mailo tukalye umwana wandi.’" 
2Kings6:29 Kanshi efyo twaipike umwana wandi no kumulya. Ubushiku bwakonkelepo namweba nati, ‘Leta umwana obe pakuti tumulye,’ nomba ena nafisa umwana wakwe.”" 
2Kings6:30 Ilyo imfumu yaumfwa amashiwi ya mwanakashi, yalepula insalu shabufumu. Cilya aleenda mumbali ye linga, abantu bamona ukuti mukati afwele insalu shabulanda pa mubili wakwe." 
2Kings6:31 Elyo asosa ati, “Lekeni Lesa akancite ine icili conse mu bukali bwaciko, nga cakuti umutwe wakwa Elisha umwana mwaume wakwa Shafati uleba pa mabeya yakwe muli buno bushiku.”" 
2Kings6:32 Nomba Elisha ninshi naikala mu ŋanda yakwe, na bakalamba ninshi nabekala nankwe. Imfumu yatangisha inkombe, nomba lintu inkombe tailafika, Elisha aeba abakalamba ati, “Bushe tamulemona uko ici cipondo catuma umuntu kukwisa mputulako umutwe? Moneni, nge nkombe yaisa, mwisaleko iciibi kabili mwikatishe pakuti cimwisalile. Bushe isho te nshindo shakwa shikulu wakwe shimukonkele panuma?”" 
2Kings6:33 Lintu acili alelanda nabo, inkombe yafika apo ali. Elyo imfumu yasosa aiti, “Ici cinkunka ca cipowe cafuma kuli Yawe. Cinshi ico nakulalolela kuli Yawe nakabili?”" 
2Kings7:1 Lelo Elisha asosele ati, “Umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Yawe. Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ifyakuti, ‘Inshitafye nga ino ine mailo, icipimo cabunga bwa mukate bukalashitikwa pa ndalama shekeli umo, ne fipimo fibili ifya bale nafyo pa ndalama shekeli umo pa mpongolo ya mu Samaria.’”" 
2Kings7:2 Cilolo uyo imfumu yashintililepo ukuboko aeba umuntu wakwa Lesa ati, “Mona, nangufye Yawe engesulako iminshi ya ku mulu, bushe ico ulelanda kuti cacitika?” Elisha amwasuka ati, “Uli nokuimwena na menso yobe, lelo tauli nakulyako nangu cimo.”" 
2Kings7:3 Nomba kwali abantu abaume bane abakwete ifibashi pa mpongolo yakwingilila mu musumba. Balandishanya abati, “Cinshi ico twakulaikalila pano mpaka ukufwa?" 
2Kings7:4 Nga twati, ‘Natuleya mu musumba,’ icipowe emo cili, ninshi tuli nokufwa. Kabili nga twati, ‘Natwikale muno’ namo mwine tuli nokufwa. Kanshi ifwe natuleyafye ku nkambi ya bena Aramu no kuya cimba. Nga batulekako, tatwafwe. Nga batwipaya ninshi kufwafye.”" 
2Kings7:5 Cilya akasuba kawa, baima baya na ku nkambi ya bena Aramu. Ilyo bafika ku mpela ya nkambi, basanga ukuti takuli umuntu nangu umo." 
2Kings7:6 Ici cacitike pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alilengele abena Aramu ukumfwa iciunda ca maceleta na bakabalwe elyo no mulongo uukalamba uwa fita, icalengele nokuti balande cila umo ku mubiye abati, “Moneni, imfumu ya bena Israeli nailomba imfumu sha bena Hiti na bena Egupto ukwisa tulwisha.”" 
2Kings7:7 Kanshi epakwima no kubutuka mu nshita ya cungulo icakuti basha amatenti pamo na bakabalwe elyo na bapunda. Bashe inkambi umo yabela, bafulumuka pakupusushako ubumi bwabo." 
2Kings7:8 Abaume bafibashi bafika pa mpela ya nkambi, baingila na mwitenti limo. Balya no kunwa ifyo basangilemo, basendamo silifa, golide ne fyakufwala elyo baya fifisa. Babwela baisa ingilila mwitenti limbi, namo basendamo ifintu, nafyo baya fisa." 
2Kings7:9 Elyo balandishanya abati, “Ifi tulecita tefisuma iyoo. Buno bushiku bwa lyashi ilisuma nganshi nomba nifwefye fweka tulisungilile. Nga cakuti twaikala mpaka bwaisaca bali nokutukanda. Natuleyafye nombaline mukwishibisha aba kwisano.”" 
2Kings7:10 Kanshi epakuya bilikisha kuli bakalinda wa mpongolo ya musumba abati, “Twaciya ku nkambi ya bena Aramu elyo twasanga ukuti tamushele umuntu nelyo umo, nangu ciunda ca muntu kanofye bakabalwe na bapunda abakakilwe elyo na matenti yashelefye umo yabela.”" 
2Kings7:11 Bakalinda wa mpongolo basalanganya amashiwi, kabili mukwangufyanya yafika na kwisano." 
2Kings7:12 Imfumu yabuuka ubushiku no kweba bacilolo aiti, “Nalamweba ico abena Aramu bacitile ifyo. Nabeshiba ukuti ifwe tuli ne cipowe, kanshi bafuminepofye pa nkambi nabaya belama mu mpanga, pantu batontonkenye ukuti cacine tuleisa fuma mu musumba pakuti bese batwikate abatuntulu elyo baye ingilamo.”" 
2Kings7:13 Cilolo umo ayasuka ati, “Salenipo abaume bamo basendepo bakabalwe basano pa bashelepo mu musumba. Apo aba abashelepo bali nokuculafye mu musango umo wine ngo wa bantu bonse abaloba kale, eico natubatume baye shininkisha ificitike.”" 
2Kings7:14 Kanshi epakusala amaceleta yabili na bakabalwe bayako, ne mfumu yabatuma kukukonka ifita fya bena Aramu. Yakonkomesha bakensha wa maceleta ukuti, “Kabiyeni muye fwailisha ificitike.”" 
2Kings7:15 Nabo bakonka ukuya shinta na ku mumana wa Yordani, kabili basanga ukuti umusebo onse nabaponaishamo ifyakufwala ne fipe ifyo abena Aramu baleposa pakubutuka. Kanshi inkombe epakubwela no kwisa eba imfumu." 
2Kings7:16 Elyo abantu bonse baima baya tapa ifipe mu nkambi ya bena Aramu. Kanshi icipimo ca bunga bwa mikate calashitwa pa ndalama shekeli umo, ne fipimo fibili ifya bale nafyo pa ndalama shekeli umo, ngefyo shiwi lyakwa Yawe lyalandile." 
2Kings7:17 Nomba imfumu yabikile cilolo ulya yashintilishe pa kuboko kwakwe ukuba umukalamba wa pa mpongolo. Elyo abantu pakupita baisa munyantaula mpaka afwa, ukulingana nefyo umuntu wakwa Lesa asobele ilyo imfumu yaile ku ŋanda kumwakwe." 
2Kings7:18 Na mu cine, cacitike umo umuntu wakwa Lesa aebele imfumu ati, “Mailo pa nshita nga ino ine, icipimo ca bunga bwa mikate bukalashitikwa pa ndalama shekeli umo, ne fipimo fibili ifya bale nafyo pa ndalama shekeli umo pa mpongolo ya mu Samaria.”" 
2Kings7:19 Cilolo aebele umuntu wakwa Lesa ati, “Mona, nangufye Yawe engesulako iminshi yonse iya ku mulu, bushe iwe ico walanda kuti cacitika?” Umuntu wakwa Lesa ayaswike ati, “Uli nokuimwena na menso yobe, lelo tauli nakulyako nangu cimo.”" 
2Kings7:20 Kabili ifi fine efyacitike kuli ena, pantu abantu bamunyantawilile pa mwinshi wa mpongolo, epo afwila." 
2Kings8:1 Nomba Elisha alyebele umwanakashi ulya apepele umwana ukubuuka ku bafwa ati, “Fuma muno, kabiye no lupwa lobe no kuya ikala konse uko wingafwaya pa kashita akalinga, pantu Yawe alatuma icipowe muli cino calo icili nokupwa imyaka cine lubali.”" 
2Kings8:2 Umwanakashi acitile ukulingana nefyo umuntu wakwa Lesa amwebele. Ena no lupwa lwakwe bafuma baya ikala mu calo ca Bafilisiti pa myaka cine lubali. 
2Kings8:3 Panuma ya myaka cine lubali abwelele ukufuma ku calo ca Bafilisiti elyo aya ku mfumu no kwipusha pakuti bamubweseshe iŋanda ne bala lyakwe. 
2Kings8:4 Nomba imfumu yalelanda kuli Gehasi, umubomfi wa muntu wakwa Lesa, kabili yalemweba aiti, “Njeba palwa fintu fyonse ifikulu ifyo Elisha acita.”" 
2Kings8:5 Ilyo Gehasi acili alelondolwela imfumu ifyo Elisha abushishe umuntu ukufuma ku bafwa, umwanakashi umwine wa mwana ulya Elisha abushishe ukufuma ku bafwa afika mukulomba ku mfumu ukumubweshesha iŋanda ne bala lyakwe. Gehasi asosa ati, “Umwanakashi wine ni uyu kanabesa we mfumu yandi. Noyu e mwana wakwe Elisha abushishe ukufuma ku bafwa.”" 
2Kings8:6 Imfumu yaipusha umwanakashi pali ifi, nao alondolola. Elyo aeba cilolo umo ukuti amone pa mulandu wakwe, amweba nokuti, “Ushininkishe ukuti bamubwesesha ifipe fyakwe fyonse ukubikapo ne cuma icafuma mwibala lyakwe ukufumafye pa bushiku afumine muno calo ukushinta na nomba.”" 
2Kings8:7 Elisha aile ku Damasiko, kabili pa nshita ilya Beni Hadadi imfumu ya ku Aramu ali umulwele. Ilyo baeba imfumu ukuti, “Umuntu wakwa Lesa naenda ukwisa fika kuno,”" 
2Kings8:8 imfumu epakweba Hasaeli aiti, “Senda icabupe, uye ukumanye umuntu wakwa Lesa. Uleke ena akwipushisheko kuli Yawe amashiwi yakuti, ‘Bushe ine ndi nokupola ukufuma kuli ubu bulwele?’”" 
2Kings8:9 Hasaeli aima aya mukukumanya Elisha, nasenda mu minwe yakwe nge cabupe ifipe ifyakusenda ingamila amakumi yane (40) ifintu ifikankala fyonse ifya mu Damasiko. Aingila no kuya iminina pa cinso cakwa Elisha no kusosa ati, “Umwana obe Beni Hadadi imfumu ya ku Aramu nantuma ukwisa ipusha ukuti, ‘Bushe ine ndi nokupola ukufuma kuli ubu bulwele?’”" 
2Kings8:10 Elisha ayasuka ati, “Kabiye kamwebe utile, ‘Cacine uli nokupola.’ Lelo Yawe nansokolwela ukuti ena ali nokufwa.”" 
2Kings8:11 Elyo Elisha atontafye amenso pamo pene ne mpumi yakwe yakashika mpakafye Hasaeli aumfwa insoni. Elyo umuntu wakwa Lesa atampa ukulila. 
2Kings8:12 Hasaeli aipusha ati, “Cinshi ico we shikulu watampila ukulila?” Amwasuka ati, “Pantu ninjishiba ububi bonse uli nokucita ku bena Israeli. Uli nokoca incende shonse ishacingililwa, ukepaya abalumendo bonse ku lupanga, ukafwantaula utunya twabo pa mushili kabili ukatumbula amafumo ya banakashi abali pabukulu.”" 
2Kings8:13 Hasaeli asosa ati, “Nga ine ne mubomfi obe, ne mbwafye, kuti nacita shani icintu cakula mu musango uyo?” Elisha ayasuka ati, “Yawe nananga ukuti uli nokuba imfumu ya bena Aramu.”" 
2Kings8:14 Elyo Hasaeli afuma pali Elisha abwelela kuli shikulu wakwe. Ilyo Beni Hadadi aipusha ati, “Finshi Elisha akwebele?” Hasaeli ayasuka ati, “Acinjeba ukuti mu cacine uli nokupola.”" 
2Kings8:15 Lelo ubushiku bwakonkelepo abuula icisalu icatikama, acibomfya mu menshi noku cifimba pa menso ya mfumu, aititila mpaka yafwa. Elyo amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings8:16 Mu mwaka walenga isano uwakwa Yoramu umwana mwaume wakwa Ahabu ilyo ali imfumu ya bena Israeli, Yehoshafati nao ewali imfumu ya Bena Yuda. Elyo Yehoramu umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoshafati ewamupyene pa bufumu bwa bena Yuda." 
2Kings8:17 Ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu na ibili (32) ilyo aishileba imfumu, kabili aikele pa bufumu imyaka cine konse konse mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings8:18 Aendele mu nshila shaleendamo imfumu shonse isha bena Israeli ngefyo aba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu bacitile, pantu na mu kuupa kwakwe aupile umwana wakwa Ahabu. Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe."
