2Kings8:19 Lelo Yawe tafwaile ukonaula abena Yuda pa mulandu wa mubomfi wakwe Davidi. Yawe alilaile ukumusungila icengelo pamo na bana bakwe umushinsanshiku. 
2Kings8:20 Mu nshita shakwa Yehoramu, abena Edomu basangukile ubufumu bwa bena Yuda no kuikwatila imfumu yabo abene." 
2Kings8:21 Kanshi Yehoramu epakuya kuli Sairi asenda na maceleta yonse. Abena Edomu bamushinguluka pamo ne fita fikalamba ifya maceleta, nomba mu nshita ya bushiku Yehoramu aima ailwishisha inshila yakupusukilamo lelo abashilika bakwe bena babutuka babwelela kumwabo." 
2Kings8:22 Ukushinta ne lelo abena Edomu baikala abasangukila abena Yuda. Abena Libina nabo bapondweke pa nshita imo ine. 
2Kings8:23 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoramu, na fyonse ifyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings8:24 Yehoramu asuka afwa no kuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Bamushiika pamo nabo mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Kabili Ahasia umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu. 
2Kings8:25 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12) uwakwa Yoramu umwana wakwa Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli, Ahasia umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoramu imfumu ya bena Yuda ewatendeke ukuteeka." 
2Kings8:26 Ahasia ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na ibili (22) ilyo ayambile ukuteeka pa bufumu. Kabili ateekele pa bufumu umwaka umo mu musumba wa Yerusalemu. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Ataliya, umwanakashi umwishikulu wakwa Omuri imfumu ya mu Israeli." 
2Kings8:27 Akonkelele imicitile ya ba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu no kucita ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe ngefyo aba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu bacitile, pantu ali ni shifyala wakwa Ahabu." 
2Kings8:28 Ahasia aya ku nkondo pamo na Yoramu umwana mwaume wakwa Ahabu mukulwisha Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu ku Ramoti Gileadi. Abena Aramu bacena Yoramu. 
2Kings8:29 Kanshi imfumu Yoramu epakubwelela ku Yesireli mukundapwa ifilonda abena Aramu bamucenene ku Ramoti lintu balelwa na Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu. Elyo Ahasia umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoramu imfumu ya ku Yuda aya ku Yesireli mukupempula Yoramu mwana Ahabu, pantu ninshi ali uwacenwa." 
2Kings9:1 Kasesema Elisha aitile umuntu umo ukufuma pa mpuka ya bakasesema nokumweba ati, “Kaka umushipi pa cakufwala, usende umusukupala wa mafuta uye ku Ramoti Gileadi." 
2Kings9:2 Ilyo uleya fika kulya uye ufwaye ukuli Yehu, mwana umwaume wakwa Yehoshafati, mwana Nimushi. Uye kuli ena, uye umufumye pa banankwe uye mwingisha mu muputule wa mukati." 
2Kings9:3 “Elyo uye ubuule umusukupala uminsulwile amafuta pa mutwe wakwe elyo ulande auti, ‘Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, nakusuba ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli.’ Elyo wisuleko iciibi ufume nokubutuka, wishingashinga.”" 
2Kings9:4 Kanshi umulumendo kasesema epakuya ku Ramoti Gileadi. 
2Kings9:5 Ilyo afika, asanga abashilika nabekala pamo. Asosa ati, “Ninkwata amashiwi aya pali iwe we mukalamba wa fita fya nkondo.” Yehu aipusha ati, “Ninani pali ifwe?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Yobe iwe we mukalamba wa fita.”" 
2Kings9:6 Yehu aima aya ingila mu ŋanda. Elyo kasesema aminsulwila amafuta pa mutwe wakwa Yehu, alanda nokuti, “Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, asosa ati, ‘Nakusuba ukuba imfumu pa bantu bakwa Yawe abena Israeli." 
2Kings9:7 Uli nokulofya iŋanda yakwa Ahabu sokulu, pakuti nkalandule pa umulopa wa babomfi bandi bakasesema na pa mulopa wa babomfi bonse abakwa Yawe abo Yesebele aipeye." 
2Kings9:8 Iŋanda yonse iyakwa Ahabu ili nokuloba. Ndi nokuputula ukufumya kuli Ahabu umwana mwaume onse uwalekeleshako mu bena Israeli, umusha nangu umuntungwa." 
2Kings9:9 Ndi nokulenga iŋanda yakwa Ahabu ukuba nge ŋanda yakwa Yeroboamu umwana mwaume wakwa Nebati, kabili nge yakwa Baasha umwana mwaume wakwa Ahiya." 
2Kings9:10 Nomba Yesebele ena, imbwa eshili nokumulya mu ncende ilya iya mu Yesireli, kabili takwakabe no wakumushiika.’” Elyo aisulako iciibi abutuka no lubilo." 
2Kings9:11 Ilyo Yehu afuma abwelela kuli bacilolo banankwe aba fita, umo pali bena aipusha ati, “Bushe ifintu fili bwino? Cinshi lilye shilu lyacilafwaya kuli iwe?” Yehu ayasuka ati, “Iwe walimwishiba umuntu ulya no musango wa fintu alanda.”" 
2Kings9:12 Bonse bayasuka abati, “Ubo bufi, iwe twebefye icishinka.” Yehu epakubeba ati, “Acinjeba ukuti, ‘Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ifyakuti nakusuba ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli.’”" 
2Kings9:13 Ukwabula ukuposa inshita, babula imingila yabo bayansa pa makasa yakwe pa matabo pene. Elyo balisha ipenga bapunda nokuti, “Yehu e mfumu.”" 
2Kings9:14 Kanshi Yehu umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoshafati, umwishikulu wakwa Nimushi, alipangila Yoramu. Nomba Yoramu na bena Israeli bonse ninshi balecingilila Ramoti Gileadi kuli Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu," 
2Kings9:15 lelo imfumu Yoramu yalibwelele ku Yesireli kukundapwa ifilonda abena Aramu bamucenene mu nkondo balelwa na Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu. Yehu asosa ati, “Ifi ngefyo uleumfwa, wileka umuntu nangu umo afulumuke mu musumba ukuya sosa ifi fintu ku Yesireli.”" 
2Kings9:16 Elyo anina mwiceleta lyakwe aya ku Yesireli pantu Yoramu eko aikele aletensha ifilonda, elyo na Ahasia imfumu ya bena Yuda eko aile mukumumona." 
2Kings9:17 Ilyo malonda uwali pamulu we linga lya mu Yesireli amona ifita fyakwa Yehu fileisa, akuuta aiti, “Namona ifita fileisa.” Yoramu apeela icipope ati, “Tumeniko umushilika wa pali kabalwe, mumutume aye abakumanye pa nshila no kubepusha ati, ‘Bushe mwaisa mu cibote?’”" 
2Kings9:18 Umushilika wa pali kabalwe epakuya kumanya Yehu, amweba ati, “Ifi efyo imfumu yalanda ukuti, ‘Bushe waisa mu cibote?’” Yehu ayasuka ati, “Bushe mulandu obe nga cakuti takuli mutende? Ingila kunuma ya mu mulongo wandi.” Kanshi malonda alanda ku mfumu ukuti, “Inkombe naiya fika nomba tailebweluluka.”" 
2Kings9:19 Elyo imfumu yatuma umuntu wacibili uwa pali kabalwe. Nao aya bakumanya, abeba ati, “Imfumu yasosa aiti, ‘Bushe waisa mu cibote?’” Yehu ayasuka ati, “Bushe mulandu obe nga cakuti takuli mutende? Ingila kunuma ya mu mulongo wandi.”" 
2Kings9:20 Nakabili malonda asosa ati, “Inkombe naiya fika, nomba tailebweluluka nayo ine. Imyendele ili kwati yakwa Yehu mwana Nimushi pantu aleenda kwati lishilu.”" 
2Kings9:21 Yoramu apeela icipope ati, “Pekanyeni iceleta lyandi.” Elyo panuma yakupekanya, Yoramu imfumu ya mu Israeli elyo na Ahasia imfumu ya bena Yuda banina mu maceleta bafuma cila umo mwiceleta lyakwe, baya mukukumanya Yehu. Baya mukumanya pa ncende apali ibala lyakwa Naboti umwina Yesireli." 
2Kings9:22 Ilyo Yoramu amona Yehu amwipusha ati, “Bushe waisa mu cibote Yehu?” Yehu ayasuka ati, “Kuti kwaba shani umutende ilyo kucili ubulalelale, no buloshi bwakwa noko Yesebele bucili buletwalililafye!”" 
2Kings9:23 Yoramu epakupilibuka abutuka, abilikisha kuli Ahasia ati, “Uyo ni cisanguka, iwe Ahasia.”" 
2Kings9:24 Elyo Yehu abuula ubuta no kulasa umufwi pakati ka mabeya yakwa Yoramu. Umufwi waya lasa mu mutima, aponena na panshi mwiceleta lyakwe." 
2Kings9:25 Yehu aeba Bidika, cilolo wakwe uwe celeta ati, “Mwimye uye umupose mwibala lilya ilyali lyakwa Naboti umwina Yesireli. Wibukishe ifyo iwe na ine twaleensha amaceleta panuma yakwa Ahabu wishi ilyo Yawe apeele ubusesemo ubu palwa ena." 
2Kings9:26 Yawe alanda ukuti, ‘Ubushiku bwafumineko ubwa mailo, namwene umulopa wakwa Naboti no mulopa wa bana bakwe abaume. Eico na ine nkamona ukuti nkaulandwila pali lino line ibala.’ Eico nomba mwimye uye umupose pali ilya ine ncende ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe.”" 
2Kings9:27 Ilyo Ahasia imfumu ya bena Yuda amona ifyacitika, abutuka akonka umusebo waya ku Beti Hagani. Yehu amukunkunika, alepunda ati, “Mwipayeni nao wine.” Bamucena mukati ke celeta lyakwe ninshi ali mukuya ku Suri mupepi na ku Ibileamu, lelo abutukila ku Megido eko aya fwila." 
2Kings9:28 Ababomfi bakwe bamusendela mwiceleta ku Yerusalemu no kuya mushiika pamo ne fikolwe fyakwe mu nshinshi yakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi. 
2Kings9:29 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na umo (11) uwa bufumu bwakwa Yoramu mwana Ahabu, elyo Ahasia atendeka ukuba imfumu ya bena Yuda." 
2Kings9:30 Elyo Yehu aile ku Yesireli. Ilyo Yesebele aumfwa palwa ifi, apenta pa menso yakwe, awamya imishishi yakwe, elyo afumya umutwe pa windo." 
2Kings9:31 Lilya Yehu aingila pa mpongolo, uyu mwanakashi aipusha ati, “Bushe waisa mu cibote, Simuri we wakomene sokulu?”" 
2Kings9:32 Yehu ainwina umutwe ku windo elyo abilikisha ati, “Bushe uuli ku lubali lwandi ni nani?” Elyo bamutungwi babili nangu batatu bamulolesha." 
2Kings9:33 Elyo asosa ati, “Muposeni panshi.” Nabo bamuposa panshi, no mulopa wakwe wasabukila ku cibumba na kuli bakabalwe lintu balemunyantaula panshi." 
2Kings9:34 Yehu aingila mu ŋanda alya no kunwa anwa. Elyo asosa ati, “Sungeni uyo mwanakashi watipwa, elyo no kumushiika pantu ali mwana wa mfumu.”" 
2Kings9:35 Lelo ilyo baile kukumushiika, basanga tapali icitumbi. Pashelefye icipanga, amakasa elyo ne minwe." 
2Kings9:36 Babwelelamo mukuya eba Yehu, nao atila, “Ili lishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyo alandile mu mubomfi wakwe Eliya umwina Tishibe ilyakuti pa mushili wa ncende ya ku Yesireli epo imbwa shikalila umubili wakwa Yesebele." 
2Kings9:37 Umubili wakwa Yesebele ukaba kwati ni citindi pa mushili wa ncende ya mu Yesireli, pakuti pekaba nelyo umo uwakumwishiba ukuti, ‘Uyu ni Yesebele.’”" 
2Kings10:1 Mu Samaria mwali abana abaume bakwa Ahabu amakumi cine lubali (70). Kanshi Yehu epakulemba amakalata nokuyatuma ku Samaria kuli bacilolo ba mu Yesireli, ku bakalamba na ku balesunga abana bakwa Ahabu. Mu nkalata atile," 
2Kings10:2 “Apo abana bakwa shikulu wenu muli nabo, elyo na imwe namukwata na maceleta na bakabalwe, no musumba wenu untu wacingililwa ne linga elyo ne fyanso," 
2Kings10:3 eico salenipo uwawama kabili uwalinga pali bamwana shikulu wenu eo mubike pa cipuna cakwa wishi, elyo mulecingililako na ba ŋanda yakwa shikulu wenu.”" 
2Kings10:4 Nomba bonse batiina nokulanda abati, “Nga cakuti imfumu shibili shafilwa ukumulwisha, nga ifwe kuti twamulwisha shani?”" 
2Kings10:5 Elyo kangalila wa kwisano, no mulashi wa musumba, pamo pene na bakalamba na balesunga abana batuma amashiwi kuli Yehu ayakuti, “Ifwe tuli babomfi bobe kabili tuli nokucita icintu conse ico watweba. Tatwakasale nangu umo ukuba imfumu. Citafye conse ico uli nokumona ukuti cisuma.”" 
2Kings10:6 Elyo Yehu abalembela kalata wabubili alandamo amashiwi ayakuti, “Nga cakuti muli ku lubali lwandi elyo kabili muli abaipekanya ukuŋumfwila, mwipaye nokundetela imitwe ya bana abaume abakwa shikulu wenu kuno ku Yesireli nga ino ine nshita mailo.” Nomba abana ba mfumu bonse amakumi cine lubali (70) bali ku bakankala ba mu musumba ebalebasunga." 
2Kings10:7 Ilyo inkalata yaisa, aba abantu basenda abana ba mfumu bonse amakumi cine lubali (70) babepaya. Babaputulako imitwe baibika na mu miseke no kutuma kuli Yehu ku Yesireli." 
2Kings10:8 Ilyo inkombe shafika kuli Yehu, baya mweba ati, “Nabaleta imitwe ya bana ba mfumu.” Elyo Yehu ayasuka ati, “Katulikeni imiina ibili iya iyi mitwe pa mwinshi wa mpongolo mpaka mailo ulucelo.”" 
2Kings10:9 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo Yehu aisa fuma. Aiminina pa cinso ca bantu bonse no kubeba ati, “Imwe muli bakaele. Nine nafimbile shikulu nokumwipaya, nomba ni bani baipeye bonse aba?" 
2Kings10:10 Eico ishibeni ukuti tapakabe ishiwi lyakwa Yawe nangu limo ilyalandwa pa ŋanda yakwa Ahabu ili shakafikilishiwe. Yawe nacita ifyo alaile ukupitila mu mubomfi wakwe Eliya.” 
2Kings10:11 Kanshi Yehu epakwipaya bonse mu Yesireli abashelemo aba mu ŋanda yakwa Ahabu, pamo pene na bonse abacindami bakwe, bacibusa bakwe elyo na bashimapepo. Kabili tashilepo uwamweo nangu umo." 
2Kings10:12 Yehu afuma alola lwa ku Samaria. Ilyo ali mu nshila pa Beti Ekedi wa bakacema," 
2Kings10:13 akumanya aba lupwa lwakwa Ahasia imfumu ya bena Yuda nokubepusha ati, “Nga imwe nimwe bani?” Nabo bayasuka abati, “Nifwe ba lupwa lwakwa Ahasia kabili twishile mukuposha ulupwa lwa mfumu elyo no lwakwa nyina wakwa namfumu.”" 
2Kings10:14 Apeela icipope ati, “Bekateni abatuntulu!” Elyo babasenda abatuntulu baya bepaila ku lulamba lwa cishima ca ku Beti Ekedi. Bonse pamo bali amakumi yane na babili (42). Tashilepo nangu umo." 
2Kings10:15 Panuma yakufuma kulya, akumanya Yehonadabu umwana mwaume wakwa Rekabu, uwali mu lwendo lwakwisa mukumanya. Yehu amuposha elyo amweba ati, “Bushe uli ku lubali lwandi, ngefyo ine ndi na iwe?” Yehonadabu ayasuka ati, “Ndi na iwe.” Yehu amweba ati, “Tambika ukuboko kobe.” Cilya atambika, Yehu amwikata amuninika mwiceleta." 
2Kings10:16 Yehu amweba ati, “Tuleya bonse, pakuti uye mona ukucincila kwandi mukubombela Yawe.” Kanshi epakumusenda mwiceleta lyakwe." 
2Kings10:17 Ilyo Yehu afika mu Samaria, aipayafye bonse abashele aba mu lupwa lwakwa Ahabu. Abalofya ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyalandilwe muli Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Elyo Yehu alonganya abantu bonse no kubeba ati, “Ahabu aletumika Baali panono, nomba Yehu ali nokumutumika apakalamba." 
2Kings10:19 Eico nomba, iteni bonse bakasesema bakwa Baali, ababomfi bakwe bonse pamo na bashimapepo bakwe bonse. Mumone ukuti tapashele nangu umo, pantu ndefwaya ukutuula ilambo ilikalamba nganshi kuli Baali. Onse uyo uwafilwa ukwisako takekale no mweo.” Lelo Yehu alelanda ifi mu bucenjeshi pakuti epaye ababomfi bakwa Baali." 
2Kings10:20 Yehu alanda ati, “Longanikeni abantu pakupeela umucinshi kuli Baali.” Nabo bacita ifyo fine." 
2Kings10:21 Elyo atuma amashiwi mu calo conse ica bena Israeli, na babomfi bonse abakwa Baali baisa. Takwali uwashele. Bonse baingila balongana mwitempele lyakwa Baali mpakafye lyaisula ukufuma ku mpela ukufika ku mpela ibiye." 
2Kings10:22 Elyo Yehu aeba kasunga wa fyakufwala ati, “Leta imingila ya aba bonse ababomfi bakwa Baali.” Nao afumya imingila abaletela." 
2Kings10:23 Elyo Yehu na Yehonadabu mwana Rekabu baingila mwitempele lyakwa Baali. Yehu aeba ababomfi bakwa Baali ati, “Lolekesheni, mumone ukuti tamuli babomfi bakwa Yawe pakati kenu, kanofye ababomfi bakwa Baali.”" 
2Kings10:24 Kanshi efyo baingila mukutuula amalambo elyo na ya cakoca. Nomba Yehu ninshi naimika abaume amakumi cine konse konse (80) panse ye tempele no kubeba ati, “Nga cakuti umo pali imwe aleka umuntu pali aba abutuka, ali nokulekelapo umweo wakwe.”" 
2Kings10:25 Panumafye ilyo Yehu apwisha ukutuula umutuulo wa cakoca, apeele icipope kuli bakalinda na bamushika ati, “Ingileni mubepaye, mwileka nangu umo abutuuke.” Nabo baingila no kubakomaula ku lupanga. Bakalinda na bamushika balaposa ifitumbi panse elyo baya ingila na mu ncende yacindama iye tempele lyakwa Baali." 
2Kings10:26 Bafumisha panse uluceshi lwa mabwe ulo balepepelapo Baali no kulonaula. 
2Kings10:27 Babongolola no bulambo bwakwa Baali no kutobolola itempele lyakwa Baali na bantu epo basangula icimbusu ukushinta ne lelo. 
2Kings10:28 Kanshi Yehu epakonaula amapepo yakwa Baali mu Israeli. 
2Kings10:29 Lelo nao wine tafumine ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, kufyo aletelele na bena Israeli ukucitako, ifyakupepa utulubi emukuti ifiponti fya golide babikile ku Betele na ku Dani." 
2Kings10:30 Yawe aeba Yehu ati, “Pantu wawamya mukucita icisuma pa cinso candi kabili wacitila iŋanda yakwa Ahabu fyonse ifyo nalefwaya ukucita mu mano yandi, aba mu ŋanda yobe bali nokulaikala pa cipuna cabufumu ukufikafye na ku nkulo yalenga shine.”" 
2Kings10:31 Lelo Yehu tasakamene ukulabeela ifyebo fyakwa Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli no mutima wakwe onse. Alifililwe ukufuma ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu ifyo aleteleleko abena Israeli ukucitako. 
2Kings10:32 Muli shilya nshiku Yawe ayamba ukucefya ubukulu bwa calo ca bena Israeli. Hasaeli acimfya abena Israeli monsefye mu calo cabo," 
2Kings10:33 ku kabanga ku mumana wa Yordani, mu mpanga yonse iya ku Gileadi (incende ya bena Gadi, Rubeni elyo ne yakwa Manase), ukufuma ku Aroeli lubali lwa ku mukonko wa Alinoni ukucilinganya mu Gileadi mpaka ku Bashani." 
2Kings10:34 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehu, fyonse ifyo acitile na fyonse ifyo abombele, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
2Kings10:35 Yehu ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, bamushiika mu Samaria. Na Yehoahasi umwana wakwe ewamupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings10:36 Inshita Yehu ateekele pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli mu Samaria yakumene imyaka amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28). 
2Kings11:1 Ilyo Ataliya nyina kwa Ahasia amwene ukuti umwana wakwe afwa, atendeke ukwipaya ulupwa lwa mfumu lonse." 
2Kings11:2 Nomba Yehosheba, umwana mwanakashi wa mfumu Yehoramu, uwali nkashi yakwa Ahasia, abuula Yoashi umwana mwaume wakwa Ahasia elyo amwiba ukufuma pa bana ba mfumu abo bali nokuti bepaye. Aya mubika pamo no walemulela mu muputule wakusendamamo pakumufisa kuli Ataliya. Kanshi efyo ashele ukwabula ukwipaiwa." 
2Kings11:3 Aikelefye uwafiswa pamo no walemusunga mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe pa myaka mutanda ilyo Ataliya ateekele icalo. 
2Kings11:4 Mu mwaka walenga cine lubali Yehoiyada aitile intungulushi sha cila fita umwanda umo (100), ishaletungulula abena Kari pamo ne ntungulushi sha bakalinda bonse babaleta mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Apanga icipangano nabo nokubeba ukulapa mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Elyo abalanga umwana wa mfumu." 
2Kings11:5 Abakonkomesha nokuti, “Ifi efyo muli nokucita mwe bonse mwe bali mu fipani fitatu ifikaba pa ncito pa bushiku bwa pe Sabata. Icipani cabumo cikaba kwisano mukulonda." 
2Kings11:6 Icipani cimbi icacibili cikaba pa mpongolo ya Suri, ne cipani cimbi icabutatu pa mpongolo iyaba panuma ya bakalinda abo abapeeleshanya inshita pakulinda iŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings11:7 Elyo na imwe mwe ba mu fipani fimbi fibili ifishibomba pe Sabata muli nokubombela imfumu mukulinda iŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
2Kings11:8 Mwikale abashinguluka imfumu, cila muntu ne fyanso fyakwe mu minwe yakwe. Onse umuntu uwapalama apo mutantamine mufwile ukumwipaya. Muleba mupepi nganshi ne mfumu konsefye uko yaya.”" 
2Kings11:9 Abakalamba ba fita umwanda umo (100) bacita fyonse ifyo Yehoiyada shimapepo akonkomeshe. Cila umo asenda abantu bakwe bonse abali nokubomba pa bushiku bwe Sabata elyo na bonse abashali nokubomba pa bushiku bwe Sabata nokwisa kuli Yehoiada shimapepo. 
2Kings11:10 Elyo shimapepo apeela abakalamba ba fita amafumo ne nkwela ifyali fya mfumu Davidi kabili ifyalesungwa mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
2Kings11:11 Bakalinda, cila umo ne fyanso mu minwe yakwe, baikala ukushinguluka imfumu mupepi nobulambo mu ŋanda ukufuma ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ukufika ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings11:12 Yehoiada elyo afumya umwana wa mfumu, amufwika icisote cabufumu, amupeela ne citabo ca mafunde ya calo no kumubika pa bufumu. Bamusuba na mafuta yakumupeela ubufumu. Awe abantu bonse balatota no kupunda abati, “Kalebalika kanabesa we mfumu.”" 
2Kings11:13 Ilyo Ataliya aumfwa icongo capangile bakalinda elyo na bantu bonse, aima aya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe umwalongene abantu." 
2Kings11:14 Alolesha elyo amona imfumu naiminina mupepi no luceshi ukulingana nefyo ulutambi lwali. Bacilolo na bakalisha wa mapenga nabo bali mu mbali ya mfumu, na bantu bonse abekalacalo baleyanga no kulisha amapenga. Elyo Ataliya alepula insalu shakwe apunda nokuti, “Bucisanguka, bucisanguka!”" 
2Kings11:15 Yehoiyada shimapepo apeela icipope ku bakalamba ba fita umwanda umo (100) abalemona pa bashilika ati, “Muleteni mumwimike pakati ka milongo ya bashilika kabili mwipaye onse uulemukonka.” Pantu shimapepo acilanda ukuti, “Mwimwipaila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.”" 
2Kings11:16 Nabo epakumwikata, cilyafye afika pa ncende apo bakabalwe bengilila mu lubansa lwa mwisano epo bamwipaila." 
2Kings11:17 Yehoiyada elyo apanga icipangano pakati kakwa Yawe ne mfumu elyo na bantu ukuti abantu bali nokuba abantu bakwa Yawe. Kabili apanga na cimbi icipangano ica pakati ka mfumu na bantu. 
2Kings11:18 Abantu bonse aba mu calo baya ku ŋanda ya mulungu Baali no kuya ibongolola. Batobaula ne fibumbili fya malambo no tulubi mu tupimfya tupimfya no kwipaya Matani, shimapepo wakwa Baali, kuntanshi ya fibumbili fya malambo. Elyo Yehoiada shimapepo atuma bakalinda ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings11:19 Asenda abakalamba ba fita umwanda umo (100), abena Kari, bakalinda na bantu bonse abekala mu calo elyo bafumya imfumu mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe baya ingila na mwisano, baingilila ku mpongolo ya bakalinda. Elyo imfumu yaya ikala pa cipuna cabufumu," 
2Kings11:20 na bantu bonse abekalacalo basekela. Kabili na mu musumba mwaba icibote, pantu Ataliya bamwipaile ku lupanga pesano." 
2Kings11:21 Yoashi ali ne myaka cine lubali ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu. 
2Kings12:1 Mu mwaka walenga cine lubali uwakwa Yehu, elyo Yoashi atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu musumba wa Yerusalemu imyaka amakumi yane (40). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Sibia. Uyu mwanakashi afumine ku Beresheba." 
2Kings12:2 Yoashi acitile ifintu ifyawama pa cinso cakwa Yawe pa myaka yonse iyo Yehoiyada shimapepo alemutungulula. 
2Kings12:3 Lelo incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika tashaonawilwe. Abantu batwalililefye ukutuula amalambo no koca ububani muli shilya shine ncende. 
2Kings12:4 Yoashi aeba bashimapepo ati, “Longanikeni indalama shonse isho besa mukutuula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, indalama isho cila muntu apingwilwa ukutuula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, elyo nesho abantu baituulilafye abene." 
2Kings12:5 Lekeni shimapepo uuli onse apoke indalama ukufuma kuli cila kasunga wandalama, elyo no kuleka shibombe umulimo wakuwamisha iŋanda apali ponse apalefwaikwa ukuwamya.”" 
2Kings12:6 Lelo ukufikafye na mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na itatu (23) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Yoashi, bashimapepo bali bacili tabalawamya ifyaonaike mu ŋanda." 
2Kings12:7 Eico imfumu Yoashi epakwita Yehoiyada shimapepo elyo na bashimapepo bambi nokubepusha ati, “Nga cinshi ico mushiwamisha ifyaonaika fyonse mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe? Lekeni ukupoka indalama ukufuma kuli bakasunga wandalama, lelo shonse ishileisa mushitwale mukuwamisha iŋanda.”" 
2Kings12:8 Bashimapepo basumina ukuleka ukupoka indalama ukufuma ku bantu, elyo kabili bena tebali nokuwamya iyo ŋanda." 
2Kings12:9 Yehoiyada shimapepo epakufwaya imbokoshi elyo atula icipunda pa nkupiko yaiko. Aibika pambali ya bulambo lubali ku kulyo kwa muntu uwaingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Bashimapepo abalelinda pa mwinshi ebalebika mu mbokoshi indalama shonse isho baleleta mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
2Kings12:10 Ilyo lyonse bamona ukuti mwaba indalama ishingi mu mbokoshi, lyena kalemba wa kwisano elyo na shimapepo mukalamba bali nokwisa penda indalama shonse ishituulilwe mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo nokushilonga mu mifuko." 
2Kings12:11 Ilyo bapima no kulemba indalama shituulilwe, elyo bashipeela ku bantu abaume abasalilwe ukwangalila imilimo ya ŋanda. Nabo bashibomfya mukulipila bakabasa wa mbao na bakukuula abalebomba pakuwamya iŋanda yakwa Yawe," 
2Kings12:12 elyo na ku babomfya amabwe pakukuula na kuli bakabasa wa mabwe. Balashitamo imbao na mabwe ayabaswa ayakuwamisha iŋanda yakwa Yawe. Balipila ne ndalama shonse ishalefwaikwa mu milimo yakuwamya iŋanda. 
2Kings12:13 Lelo indalama shonse ishaleisa tashabombele mukupangilamo imbale, ifyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto, inweno, amapenga nangu ifipe fimbi ifya golide nangu silifa ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings12:14 Shalelipilwa ku babomfi abaleshibomfya mukuwamisha mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
2Kings12:15 Kabili takwali ukusakamana ukwishiba nga cakuti abalepoka indalama balelipila ababomfi, pantu bena bali bacishinka nganshi mu mibombele yabo." 
2Kings12:16 Indalama shakufuma ku mutuulo wakufuta pa fyabubifi no wakwelelwa pa bubifi shena tabashitwele mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, pantu shali sha bashimapepo." 
2Kings12:17 Pa nshita ilya ine Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu aima aya sansa icifulo ca Gati nokucipoka, kabili aipekanya nokuya mukusansa Yerusalemu." 
2Kings12:18 Nomba Yoashi imfumu ya bena Yuda epakubuula fyonse ifyamushilo ifyatuulilwe ne fikolwe fyakwe, Yehoshafati, Yehoramu na Ahasia imfumu sha bena Yuda, elyo ne fyabupe fyonse ifyo atuulile elyo na golide yonse iyo asangile mu cipao ca ŋanda yakwa Yawe neca kwisano, atumina Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu nao epakufuma na mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings12:19 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yoashi, elyo na fyonse ifyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings12:20 Bacilolo bakwa Yoashi bamupingila, bamwimina mpaka bamwipaya. Baisa mwipaila ku Beti Milo ninshi ali mukuya ku Sila." 
2Kings12:21 Bacilolo abamwipeye ni Yosabada umwana mwaume wakwa Shimeati na Yehosabadi umwana mwaume wakwa Shoma. Ilyo afwile baya mushiika na ku fikolwe fyakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Elyo Amasiya umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu. 
2Kings13:1 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na itatu (23) uwa buteko bwakwa Yoashi umwana wakwa Ahasia imfumu ya bena Yuda, Yehoahasi umwana wakwa Yehu ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli mu Samaria. Kabili ateekele pa myaka ikumi limo na cine lubali (17)." 
2Kings13:2 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe mukukonka inshila ya fya bubifi bwakwa Yeroboamu umwana mwaume wakwa Nebati, mufyo aletelele na bena Israeli ukuti bacite ifyabubifi. Ena alifililwe nokuti afumemo mu fyabubifi." 
2Kings13:3 Kanshi Yawe epakufulilwa abena Israeli icakuti ukwabula no kuposa inshita, abaposa mu minwe yakwa Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu na Beni Hadadi umwana wakwa Hasaeli." 
2Kings13:4 Elyo Yehoahasi apapata kuli Yawe, nao Yawe amumfwa, pantu alimwene ubuluku ubo imfumu ya bena Aramu yalecushishamo abena Israeli." 
2Kings13:5 Yawe epakupekanya uwakulubula abena Israeli, elyo balubuka ukufuma ku maka yakwa Aramu. Na bena Israeli bayamba ukwikala mu mayanda yabo ngefyo baikele kale." 
2Kings13:6 Lelo tabafumine kukucita ububifi ubo Yeroboamu aletelele abena Israeli ukucita icakuti nabo efyo bashala balecita. Kabili no luceshi lwa mulungu Ashera lwashelefye nalwiminina mu Samaria. 
2Kings13:7 Takwashele ifita ifingi ifyakwa Yehoahasi, kwashelefye abashilika ba pali bakabalwe amakumi yasano (50), amaceleta ikumi limo, na bashilika ba pa makasa amakana ikumi limo (10,000). Pantu imfumu ya bena Aramu yalyonawile bonse no kubalenga babe kwati lukungu lwa pa nshita yakutwa." 
2Kings13:8 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoahasi, ifintu fyonse ifyo acitile nefyo abombele, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
2Kings13:9 Yehoahasi ilyo afwile, aya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, bamushiika mu musumba wa Samaria. Elyo Yehoashi umwana mwaume ewamupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings13:10 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37) uwakwa Yoashi imfumu ya bena Yuda, Yehoashi umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoahasi ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli mu Samaria, kabili ateekele imyaka ikumi limo na mutanda (16)." 
2Kings13:11 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Kabili talekele ifyabubifi fyonse ifyo Yeroboamu umwana mwaume wakwa Nebati acitile, ifyo aletelele abena Israeli ukucitako. Kabili atwalilifye no kulaendamo." 
2Kings13:12 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoashi, na fyonse ifyo acitile nefyo abombele, ukulundapo ne nkondo alwile na Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
2Kings13:13 Yehoashi ilyo afwile aya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, na Yeroboamu amupyana pa bufumu. Yehoashi ashiikilwe mu Samaria pamo ne mfumu sha bena Israeli." 
2Kings13:14 Nomba Elisha alilwele ubulwele ubo ubwaishile fika na kukumwipaya. Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli alileko mukuya mupempula, elyo alila ifilamba apunda ati, “Tata wandi, tata wandi ee, Amaceleta ya mu Israeli na ba pali bakabalwe.”" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha asosa ati, “Fwayeni ubuta ne mifwi.” Nao acita ifyo fine." 
2Kings13:16 Aeba imfumu ya bena Israeli ati, “Buula ubuta mu maboko yobe.” Ilyo abuula mu maboko yakwe, Elisha abika amaboko yakwe pa maboko ya mfumu." 
2Kings13:17 Asosa ati, “Isule windo lya ku kabanga,” nayo imfumu yaisula. Elisha aeba imfumu ati, “Lasa umufwi,” nayo yalasa. Elisha elyo alanda ukuti, “Uyu mufwi wakucimfya kwakwa Yawe, umufwi wakucimfya abena Aramu. Uuli nokulofya abena Aramu umupwilapo pa Apeki.”" 
2Kings13:18 Kabili alanda ati, “Buula imifwi ulase panshi.” Imfumu yabuula imifwi nokulasa panshi imiku itatu elyo yaleka." 
2Kings13:19 Umuntu wakwa Lesa epakufulilwa imfumu no kuyeba ati, “Aulasa pa mushili imiku isano nangu imiku mutanda, nga waliba uwakucimfya abena Aramu no kubalofya. Nomba uli nokubacimfyafye imiku itatu.”" 
2Kings13:20 Awe Elisha afwa, nokumushiika bamushiika. Nomba abena Moabu baleisa mukusansa icalo cila mwaka." 
2Kings13:21 Pa nshita imo ninshi abena Israeli baleshiika umuntu, nomba mukupumikisha ekwisa mona ibumba lya balesansa. Kanshi epakuposa icitumbi mu nindi yakwa Elisha. Nomba icitumbi caya kumya ku mafupa yakwe, noyu umuntu abuuka ukufuma ku bafwa aima aiminina na makasa yakwe." 
2Kings13:22 Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu yaikalilafye ukucusha abena Israeli pa nshita ya bufumu bwakwa Yehoahasi. 
2Kings13:23 Lelo ukusenamina kwakwa Yawe kwali pali bena kabili alibakwatile uluse no kulanga ukubasakamana nganshi pa mulandu wa cipangano cakwa Abrahamu, Isaki na Yakobo. Ukushinta na pa bushiku bwalelo tafwaya ukubonaula nangu ukubafumya ku cinso cakwe." 
2Kings13:24 Hasaeli imfumu ya bena Aramu afwa, elyo umwana mwaume wakwe Beni Hadadi amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings13:25 Elyo Yehoashi umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoahasi apokolola imisumba ukufuma kuli Beni Hadadi mwana wakwa Hasaeli, iyo apokele mukulwa ukufuma kuli wishi Yehoahasi. Pa miku itatu Yehoashi amucimfishe epo apokele ne misumba ya bena Israeli." 
2Kings14:1 Mu mwaka walenga ibili uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Yoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli, elyo Amasiya umwana mwaume wakwa Yoashi uwa ku Yuda, atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu." 
2Kings14:2 Ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yabili na pabula (29). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Yehoadini umwina Yerusalemu." 
2Kings14:3 Acitile ifyawama pa cinso cakwa Yawe, nomba tacali ngefyo icikolwe cakwe Davidi acitile. Ena muli fyonse alakonkafye mu mbela yakwa wishi Yoashi." 
2Kings14:4 Lelo incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika shena taonawile. Abantu bakonkenyepofye ukutuula amalambo nokoca ububani muli shilya shine ncende. 
2Kings14:5 Panuma yakumona ukuti ubufumu bwakosa mu minwe yakwe, aipaya bacilolo bonse abaipeye imfumu wishi." 
2Kings14:6 Lelo taipeye abana ba bantu abaipeye wishi, ukulingana ne fyalembwa mu citabo ca mafunde yakwa Mose umo Yawe akonkomeshe ati, “Bashibo tabali nokufwila pa milandu iyacita abana babo. Na bana nabo bene tabali nakufwila pa milandu iyacitwa na bashibo. Lelo cila muntu ali nokufwila pa fyabubifi fyakwe.”" 
2Kings14:7 Ni ena uwacimfishe abena Edomu amakana ikumi limo (10,000) mwi Shika Lyamucele no kupoka Sela mu bulwi. Acinika ne shina lya Yokiteli, ishina ilyo baciita ukushinta ne lelo." 
2Kings14:8 Elyo Amasiya atuma inkombe kuli Yehoashi umwana mwaume wakwa Yehoahasi, mwana Yehu, imfumu ya bena Israeli na mashiwi yakuti, “Wise twise tulwe!”" 
2Kings14:9 Nomba Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli yabwesha amashiwi kuli Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda aiti, “Icimpusa ica myunga ica mu Lebanoni catumine amashiwi ku cimuti icalepesha ica keda wa mu Lebanoni aciti, ‘Peela umwana obe umwanakashi pakuti bopane no mwana wandi umwaume!’ Elyo icinama ca mu mpanga ica mu Lebanoni caisa nyantaula umunga." 
2Kings14:10 Iwe panuma yakucimfya abena Edomu, nawamba ukuyumfwa. Sekelela mukucimfya kobe, nomba ikalafye kumobe. Nga cinshi ulefwaila ifyongo no kufwaya ukuti uyonaule elyo nokonaula abena Yuda?”" 
2Kings14:11 Lelo Amasiya akaana ukumfwa, icalengele ukuti Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli amusanse. Ena na Amasiya balwilile ku Beti Shemeshi mu calo ca Yuda." 
2Kings14:12 Abena Yuda babapuma ku bena Israeli na cila muntu abutukila ku ŋanda kumwakwe. 
2Kings14:13 Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli yaikata Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda, umwana mwaume wakwa Yoashi uwali mwana Ahasia, pa Beti Shemeshi amutwala na ku Yerusalemu. Kulya Yehoashi aya bongolola ilinga lya musumba, ukufumafye pa mpongolo yakwa Efulemu ukufika ku mpongolo ya pa cinshoko incende iyalepele amakubiti imyanda ine (400)." 
2Kings14:14 Asenda golide yonse na silifa ne fipe fyonse ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ne fyuma fyonse ifya kwisano. Asendako na bantu bacikatilo, abwelela na ku Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoashi, ifyo acitile ne milimo abombele, ukulundapo no bulwi alwile na Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
2Kings14:16 Yehoashi ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, bamushiika mu Samaria ku ncende ya mfumu sha mu Israeli. Elyo Yeroboamu umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings14:17 Amasiya mwana Yoashi imfumu ya bena Yuda yaikele imyaka ikumi limo na isano (15) panuma ya mfwa yakwa Yehoashi mwana Yehoahasi imfumu ya bena Israeli. 
2Kings14:18 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Amasiya, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shafumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings14:19 Abantu bamupangila mu Yerusalemu, elyo abutukila ku Lakishi, lelo batuma abantu abaile musanga no kumwipaya." 
2Kings14:20 Icitumbi cena balicibweseshe pali bakabalwe, baisa cishiika mu Yerusalemu pamo ne fikolwe fyakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi." 
2Kings14:21 Elyo abantu bonse aba mu Yuda babuula Asariya, uwalifye ne myaka yakufyalwa ikumi limo na mutanda (16) eo babika pa bufumu apyana wishi Amasiya." 
2Kings14:22 Ena ewakuulile umusumba wa Elati cipya cipya no kuubwesesha ku bena Yuda panuma ya mfwa yakwa Amasiya, ilyo aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe." 
2Kings14:23 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na isano (15) uwakwa Amasiya mwana Yoashi imfumu ya bena Yuda, Yeroboamu mwana Yehoashi imfumu ya bena Israeli ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu mu Samaria, kabili ateekele imyaka amakumi yane na umo (41) pa bufumu." 
2Kings14:24 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, talekele imisango iyabipa iyo imfumu Yeroboamu mwana Nebati alecita no kuletelela abena Israeli nabo ukubifya." 
2Kings14:25 Yeroboamu ewabwekeshepo imipaka ya calo ca Israeli, ukufuma ku Lebo Hamati ukufika kuli bemba wa Araba, ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, ilyasoselwe ukupitila mu mubomfi wakwe Yona mwana Amitai, kasesema ukufuma ku Gati Hefa." 
2Kings14:26 Yawe namona ubucushi bulecula umuntu onse mu Israeli, abe umuntungwa nangu umusha elyo takuli no wakubafwa." 
2Kings14:27 Lelo Yawe talefwaya ukulofya ishina lya bena Israeli ukufuma pano isonde, abapususha ukupitila mu kuboko kwakwa Yeroboamu mwana Yehoashi." 
2Kings14:28 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yeroboamu, fyonse ifyo acitile, ne milimo yonse iya bulwi iyo abombele, ukulundapo nefyo alubwile imisumba ya bena Israeli, Damasiko na Hamati, iyali yakwa Yaudi, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
2Kings14:29 Yeroboamu ilyo afwile, aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe imfumu sha bena Israeli. Elyo Sakaria umwana wakwe amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings15:1 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27) uwakwa Yeroboamu imfumu ya bena Israeli, Asariya umwana mwaume wakwa Amasiya imfumu ya bena Yuda ewatendeke ukuteeka abena Yuda." 
2Kings15:2 Ali ne myaka ikumi limo na mutanda (16) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yasano na ibili (52). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Yekolia umwina Yerusalemu." 
2Kings15:3 Acitile ifyalungama pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ngefyo wishi Amasiya acitile." 
2Kings15:4 Nomba incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika shena tashonawile iyoo. Abantu bakonkenyepofye ukoca amalambo no bubani mulya mwine. 
2Kings15:5 Yawe epakulwalika imfumu ifibashi mpaka no bushiku yafwile. Kabili yaleikalafye yeka mu ŋanda yaiko. Yotamu umwana wakwe ewalateeka abantu ba mu calo. 
2Kings15:6 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Asariya, na fyonse ifyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings15:7 Asariya ilyo afwile, aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, kabili bamushiikile mupepi nabo mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Elyo Yotamu umwana wakwe amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings15:8 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na cine konse konse (38) uwakwa Asariya imfumu ya bena Yuda, Sakaria umwana mwaume wakwa Yeroboamu ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli." 
2Kings15:9 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ngefyo wishi acitile. Talekele imisango yabipa iyo imfumu Yeroboamu mwana Nebati alecita no kuletelela abena Israeli ukubifyako." 
2Kings15:10 Shalumu umwana mwaume wakwa Yabeshi apangila Sakaria. Amusansa pa cinso ca bantu no kumwipaya elyo amupyana na pa bufumu. 
2Kings15:11 Ifintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Sakaria fyalilembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli. 
2Kings15:12 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyalandilwe kuli Yehu lyafikilishiwe ilyakuti, “Aba mu lupwa lobe ebakekala pa cipuna ca bufumu bwa bena Israeli ukufika ku nkulo yalenga shine.”" 
2Kings15:13 Shalumu umwana mwaume wakwa Yabeshi atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na pabula (39) uwakwa Usia imfumu ya bena Yuda. Kabili ateekele mu Samaria umweshi umo. 
2Kings15:14 Elyo Menahemu mwana Gadi afuma ku Tirisa aya ku Samaria. Aya sansa Shalumu mwana Yabeshi mu Samaria, amwipaya. Elyo amupyana na pa bufumu." 
2Kings15:15 Ifintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Shalumu, nefyo asangukile Sakaria, fyonse fyalilembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli." 
2Kings15:16 Pa nshita ine ilya, Menahemu afuma mu Tirisa aya sansa ku Tifisa pamo no muntu onse mu musumba elyo ne mipaka yauko, pa mulandu wakuti bakeene ukumwiswila impongolo. Aonaula Tifisa elyo atumbula na banakashi bonse abali pabukulu." 
2Kings15:17 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na pabula (39) uwakwa Asariya imfumu ya bena Yuda, Menahemu mwana Gadi ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu mu Israeli, kabili ateekele imyaka ikumi limo mu Samaria." 
2Kings15:18 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Pa nshita yakwe yonse iya pa bufumu tapilibwike ukufuma ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati ifyo aletelele na bena Israeli ukubifyako. 
2Kings15:19 Puli imfumu ya ku Asiria aisa sansa icalo ca bena Israeli. Elyo Menahemu epakumupeela amatalanta ya silifa ikana limo (1,000) pakuti amwafwilisheko ukukosha ubufumu bwakwe." 
2Kings15:20 Menahemu indalama apeele Puli afumishe ku bena Israeli. Cila mukankala asonkele silifa indalama amashekeli amakumi yasano iyakupeela imfumu ya ku Asiria. Puli epakubwelelamo kumwakwe. 
2Kings15:21 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Menahemu, elyo na fyonse ifyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
2Kings15:22 Menahemu ilyo afwile, aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Elyo Pekaya umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings15:23 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na isano (50) uwakwa Asaria imfumu ya bena Yuda, Pekaya umwana mwaume wakwa Menahemu ewatampile ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli mu Samaria, kabili ateekele pa myaka ibili." 
2Kings15:24 Pekaya acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Tapilibwike ukufuma ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati ifyo aletelele na bena Israeli ukubifyako. 
2Kings15:25 Peka uwali umukalamba wa bacilolo wakwe, umwana mwaume wakwa Remaliya, epakwimina imfumu. Asenda abantu abaume amakumi yasano (50) abena Gileadi, aya ipaya Pekaya pamo pene na Agobu elyo na Arie mu lukungu lwa kwisano mu Samaria. Panuma Peka aipaya Pekaya elyo amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings15:26 Ifintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Pekaya, na fyonse ifyo acitile, fyalilembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli." 
2Kings15:27 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yasano na ibili (52) iyakwa Asaria imfumu ya bena Yuda, Peka umwana mwaume wakwa Remaliya ewatampile ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli mu Samaria, kabili ateekele pa myaka amakumi yabili (20)." 
2Kings15:28 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Tapilibwike ukufuma ku fyabubifi fyakwa Yeroboamu mwana Nebati ifyo aletelele na bena Israeli ukubifyako. 
2Kings15:29 Mu nshita yakwa Peka imfumu ya bena Israeli, Tigilati Pilese imfumu ya bena Asiria yaisa pokolola imisumba ya ku Iyoni, Abeli-Beti-Maka, Yanoa, Kedeshi na Hasoli. Apoka Gileadi na Galile, ukulundapo ne mpanga yonse iya ku Naftali elyo atamfisha na bantu ku Asiria." 
2Kings15:30 Elyo Hoshea umwana mwaume wakwa Elaya apangila Peka mwana Remaliya. Amusansa no kumwipaya. Elyo amupyana pa bufumu mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili (20) uwakwa Yotamu mwana Usia. 
2Kings15:31 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Peka, nefyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli?" 
2Kings15:32 Mu mwaka walenga ibili uwakwa Peka mwana Remaliya imfumu ya bena Israeli, Yotamu umwana mwaume wakwa Usia mfumu ya bena Yuda ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu." 
2Kings15:33 Ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu imyaka ikumi limo na mutanda (16). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Yelusha umwana umwanakashi wakwa Sadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Acitile ifisuma pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ngefyo wishi Usia acitile." 
2Kings15:35 Lelo incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika taonawile. Abantu batwalililefye ukutuula amalambo nokoca ububani mulya mwine. Yotamu akuula cipya cipya impongolo ya pamulu iya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
2Kings15:36 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yotamu, nefyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings15:37 Mu nshiku shilya Yawe ayamba ukutuma Resini imfumu ya bena Aramu na Peka mwana Remaliya ukucusha Yuda. 
2Kings15:38 Yotamu ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe no kumushiika bamushiikile pamo pene nabo mu musumba wakwa Davidi wishi. Elyo Ahasi umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu. 
2Kings16:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) uwakwa Peka umwana mwaume uwakwa Remaliya, Ahasi mwana Yotamu imfumu ya bena Yuda ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu." 
2Kings16:2 Ahasi ali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu imyaka ikumi limo na mutanda (16). Tali nga Davidi wishi, wena tacitile ifyawama pa cinso cakwa Yawe Lesa wakwe." 
2Kings16:3 Alepashanya imyendele ya mfumu sha bena Israeli. Abuula no mwana wakwe umo umwaume amupisha mu mulilo no kumupeela ilambo mukukonkelela imisango yabipisha iyalecita imishobo imbi ilya Yawe afulumwine pa cinso ca bena Israeli. 
2Kings16:4 Aletuula amalambo no koca ububani mu ncende shakupepelamo imilungu pa mulu wa mpili elyo na pesamba lya cimuti icafumba conse. 
2Kings16:5 Elyo Resini imfumu ya bena Aramu na Peka mwana Remaliya imfumu ya bena Israeli baima ukuya lwisha umusumba wa Yerusalemu, lelo bafilwa ukumucimfya Ahasi." 
2Kings16:6 Pa nshita ine ilya, Resini imfumu ya bena Edomu yapokolola Elati yabwesesha ku bena Edomu panuma yakutamfyamo abaume abena Yuda. Abena Edomu epakukukila mu Elati kabili emo baikala ukushinta ne lelo." 
2Kings16:7 Ahasi epakutuma inkombe ukuya eba Tigilati Pilese imfumu ya bena Asiria ati, “Ndi mubomfi obe kabili umwana obe. Isa umpokololeko ukufuma mu minwe ya mfumu ya bena Aramu elyo na mu minwe ya mfumu ya bena Israeli abansanshile.”" 
2Kings16:8 Elyo Ahasi abuula silifa na golide iyali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ne yali ku ŋanda ye sano atumina imfumu ya ku Asiria nge cabupe. 
2Kings16:9 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yamumfwila, yaya sansa no musumba wa Damasiko no kuupoka. Yatamfisha abekalamushi bonse ku Kiri elyo yaipaya Resini." 
2Kings16:10 Elyo imfumu Ahasi yaile ku Damasiko mukuya kumanya Tigilati Pilese imfumu ya ku Asiria, yaya mona ubulambo ifyo bwali mu Damasiko elyo yatuma amashiwi kuli Uria shimapepo aya pa fipimo fya bulambo ne filangililo fyabuko pakukuula." 
2Kings16:11 Kanshi Uria shimapepo epakukuula ubulambo ukulingana ne filangililo fyabuko ifyo imfumu Ahasi yatumine ukufuma ku Damasiko, elyo nokupwisha ukukuula ilintu imfumu Ahasi tailabweluluka." 
2Kings16:12 Ilyo imfumu yabwela ukufuma ku Damasiko no kwisa mona ubulambo, yapalama mupepi elyo yapeelelapo ilambo." 
2Kings16:13 Yatuulilapo ilambo lyakoca elyo no mutuulo wa cabunga, aitilapo no mutuulo wa cakunwa, elyo akana no mulopa wa mutuulo wakwampana pa bulambo." 
2Kings16:14 Afumya ku ntanshi ya ŋanda ubulambo bwa mukuba ubwali pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ukufuma pakati ka bulambo bupya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, elyo abubika ku lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka bulambo bupya." 
2Kings16:15 Elyo imfumu Ahasi yapeela ifi fipope kuli Uria shimapepo ukuti, “Pali ubu bulambo ubukulu ubupya, epakutuulila ilambo lyakoca ilya lucelo, no mutuulo wa cabunga uwa cungulo, ilambo lyakoca ilya mfumu elyo no mutuulo wa cabunga, ne lambo lyakoca ilya bantu bonse abekalacalo, no mutuulo wa cabunga pamo pene no wa cakunwa. Ulekana pa bulambo umulopa onse uwa kwilambo lyakoca na malambo yambi. Lelo ndi no kubomfya ubulambo bwa mukuba kukulabukilapo.”" 
2Kings16:16 Kabili Uria shimapepo acita fyonse umo imfumu Ahasi yamukonkomeseshe. 
2Kings16:17 Imfumu Ahasi yapangulula imbao sha mumbali elyo yafumyapo ne mbale shakusambilamo ukufuma pa mpanda shakusesha. Afumya icakusambilamo ca mukuba ukufuma pa ŋombe sha mukuba ishacikoseshe, no kuya bika pa libwe." 
2Kings16:18 Afumya insaka ye Sabata iyo bakuulile mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, elyo afumya incende ya panse ya ŋanda iyapangilwe apakwingilila imfumu, pa mulandu wakusekesha imfumu ya ku Asiria." 
2Kings16:19 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Ahasi, nefyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya mfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings16:20 Ahasi ilyo afwile, aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, bamushiika pamo pene nabo mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Na Hesekia umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings17:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12) uwakwa Ahasi imfumu ya bena Yuda, Hoshea mwana Elaya ewatampile ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli mu Samaria, kabili ateekele pa myaka pabula." 
2Kings17:2 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, lelo tali nge mfumu sha bena Israeli ishamutangilile." 
2Kings17:3 Shalimaneseri imfumu ya bena Asiria yaisa mukulwisha Hoshea, nao acimba kuli Shalimaneseri, alasonka no musonko wa cila mwaka." 
2Kings17:4 Nomba imfumu ya ku Asiria yasangile ukuti Hoshea ali ncenjeshi, pantu alitumine inkombe kuli So imfumu ya ku Egupto, kabili aleka no kusonka umusonko ku mfumu ya bena Asiria ngefyo alecita cila mwaka. Kanshi Shalimaneseri epakumwikata amubika na mu cifungo." 
2Kings17:5 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yaishile sansa icalo conse, yafikafye na ku Samaria no kuushinguluka pa myaka itatu." 
2Kings17:6 Mu mwaka walenga pabula uwakwa Hoshea, imfumu ya ku Asiria yapoka umusumba wa Samaria, yatamfyamo na bena Israeli baya na ku Asiria. Aya bapeela ukwikala mu Hala, mu Gosani mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Habori na mu misumba inono iya ku Medesi." 
2Kings17:7 Fyonse ifi fyacitike pa mulandu wakuti abena Israeli bacitile ifyabubifi kuli Yawe Lesa wabo, uwabafumishe ku Egupto mu minwe yakwa Farao imfumu ya bena Egupto. Bakwete umulandu wakupepa imilungu imbi," 
2Kings17:8 elyo nokukonka imbela sha mishobo Yawe atamfishe pa ntanshi yabo, pamo pene ne mbela isho imfumu sha bena Israeli shabalangile." 
2Kings17:9 Abena Israeli balacita mu bumfisolo ifishali fyacishinka kuli Yawe Lesa wabo. Ukutula pa lupungu lwa balinshi ukufika ku musumba we linga, bakuula incende ishakupepelamo mu misumba yabo." 
2Kings17:10 Bakuula inceshi sha mabwe ishakupepelapo ne nceshi sha mulungu Ashera pa mulu wa mpili ishitali na mwisamba lya cimuti icafumba. 
2Kings17:11 Pali cila ncende yakupepelapo epo balaocela ububani ngefyo imishobo ilya Yawe atamfishe pantanshi yabo yalecita. Bacitile ifintu ifibi ifyakuti fyalenga na Yawe ukukalipa. 
2Kings17:12 Balapepa utulubi, nangu Yawe abebele ati, “Mwikatala amucita ica musango uyu.”" 
2Kings17:13 Yawe alisokele abena Israeli na bena Yuda ukupitila muli bakasesema na bakamona ukuti, “Pilibukeni no kufuma mu nshila shibi. Mulebaka amafunde yandi ne fipope fyandi, ukulingana na mafunde yonse ayo nakonkomeshe ifikolwe fyenu ukulabeela kabili ayo napeele kuli imwe ukupitila mu babomfi bandi bakasesema.”" 
2Kings17:14 Nomba bafilwa ukumfwa elyo batalamika imitima nge fikolwe fyabo, abashacetekele Yawe Lesa wabo." 
2Kings17:15 Bakaana ifipope fyakwe ne cipangano apangene ne fikolwe fyabo, elyo nokubasoka abasokele. Balakonkelela ifilubi ifyabuwelewele icakuti nabo bene baba abawelewele. Balapalanyafye imishobo iyabashingulwike nangu Yawe abakonkomeshe ati, “Mwilacita ifyo bena bacita.” Nomba bena batwalililafye ukulacita ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe abaleseshe ukucita." 
2Kings17:16 Basuula mafunde yonse ayakwa Yawe Lesa wabo, elyo baipangila ifilubi fibili ifyalengwa mu cipasho ca fiponti fya ŋombe elyo no luceshi lwa mulungu Asher. Balapepa ne fita fyonse fya mu mulu no kushinshimuna umulungu Baali." 
2Kings17:17 Balapisha abana babo abaume na banakashi mu mulilo. Balabuka no kupanda ubwanga elyo no kuiposaika mukubifya pa cinso cakwa Yawe, bamulenga no kukalipa." 
2Kings17:18 Kanshi Yawe epakufulilwa abena Israeli apakalamba, abafumya na ku cinso cakwe. Uluko lwa bena Yuda elwashelefye." 
2Kings17:19 Elyo na bena Yuda bene balifililwe ukubaka amafunde yakwa Yawe Lesa wabo. Balakonkelela imisango iyo abena Israeli batendeke. 
2Kings17:20 Ecalengele Yawe akaane umutundu wa bena Israeli onse, abacusha no kubapeela mu minwe ya bantalamisoka mpaka abafumya pa cinso cakwe." 
2Kings17:21 Ilyo apatula abena Israeli ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Davidi, bena babuulile Yeroboamu mwana Nebati bamucita imfumu. Yeroboamu ena epakutunka abena Israeli ukufuma kukukonka Yawe no kubalenga ukuti babifye nganshi." 
2Kings17:22 Abena Israeli batwalililafye mu fyabubifi fyonse ifyo Yeroboamu acitile icakuti bafilwa no kulekako," 
2Kings17:23 mpakafye Yawe afika na pakubafumya pa cinso cakwe, nga filya fine asokele ukupitila mu babomfi bakwe bonse bakasesema. Eico abena Israeli babafumishe mu calo cabo no kuya muli bunkole mu calo ca Asiria, eko baikala ukushinta ne lelo." 
2Kings17:24 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yaleta abantu ukufuma ku Babiloni, ku Kuta, ku Afa, ku Hamati na ku Sefafaimu no kubateka mu mishi iya mu Samaria ukupyana abena Israeli, basuka bapokolola Samaria baikala na mu mishi." 
2Kings17:25 Ilyo batampile ukwikala mulya mwine tabalepepa Yawe, eco atumine inkalamo pakati kabo nasho shaipayapo abantu bamo bamo." 
2Kings17:26 Elyo baeba imfumu ya ku Asiria ukuti, “Abantu watwele nokuya bateka mu mishi ya mu Samaria tabaishiba ifyo umulungu wa muli cilya calo ufwaya. Nautuma inkalamo pakati kabo ishambile ukubepaya, pantu abantu tabaishiba ifyo umulungu wa muli cilya calo ufwaya.”" 
2Kings17:27 Elyo imfumu ya ku Asiria yapeela icebo ukuti, “Buulenipo shimapepo umo pali balya mwasendele bunkole ukufuma ku Samaria abwelelemo mukuya ikala kulya elyo akaye funda abantu ifyo umulungu wa muli cilya calo wafwaya.”" 
2Kings17:28 Kanshi umo shimapepo uwafumine ku Samaria muli bunkole aisa mukwikala mu Betele, alabafunda ifyakupepa Yawe." 
2Kings17:29 Lelo cila mushobo waicitila imilungu wauko mu misumba baikelemo no kuubika mu mayanda yakupepelamo ayo abantu ba mu Samaria bakuulile mu ncende ishasansama. 
2Kings17:30 Abaume ba ku Babiloni bapanga umulungu wa Sukoti Benoti, abaume ba ku Kuta bapanga uwa Negali, elyo na baume ba ku Hamati bapanga uwa Ashima." 
2Kings17:31 Abena Afi bapanga umulungu wa Nibihasi na Tataki, elyo abena Sefafaimu bena balaoca abana babo mu mulilo nga malambo kuli Adarameleki na Anameleki, imilungu ya bena Sefafaimu." 
2Kings17:32 Balapepa Yawe, nomba basonta abantu babo icisontesonte abakulabomba nga bashimapepo mu mayanda yakupepelamo pa ncende isho bacindika." 
2Kings17:33 Lelo ilyo bayambile ukupepa Yawe, nomba mu misango imbi balebombela imilungu yabo ukulingana ne ntambi sha mishobo iyo babafumishemo." 
2Kings17:34 Ukufika na pa bushiku bwa lelo bacili batwalililafye mu micitile yakale. Tabapepa Yawe nangu ukumfwila ifipope elyo ne fikomo, amafunde elyo ne fyebo ifyo Yawe apeela aba mu lupwa lwakwa Yakobo abo ainika abena Israeli." 
2Kings17:35 Ilyo Yawe apangile icipangano na bena Israeli, alibakonkomeshe ati, “Mwilapepa imilungu imbi nangu ukutucindika, ukutubombela nangu ukulatutuulila amalambo." 
2Kings17:36 Lelo Yawe uwamufumishe mu Egupto ku maka ayengi no kuboko ukwatambalala ena ekafye eo mulepepa. Kuli ena eko muletuula amalambo elyo no kumucindika. 
2Kings17:37 Mufwile ukuba abatekanya lyonse no kubaka ifipope, ifikomo, amafunde ne fyebo ifyo amulembela. Mwilapepa imilungu imbi." 
2Kings17:38 Mwikalaba icipangano napangile na imwe, kabili mwilapepa imilungu imbi." 
2Kings17:39 Lelo mulepepafye Yawe Lesa wenu, pantu ni ena euli nokumupokolola ukufuma mu minwe ya balwani benu.”" 
2Kings17:40 Nabo bakaana ukumfwa, batwalililafye mu micitile yabo iyakale." 
2Kings17:41 Nelyo aba bantu balepepa Yawe, lelo balitwalilile mukulabombela imilungu yabo. Ukufika na pa bushiku bwa lelo, abana babo na beshikulu babo balitwalililafye ukucita ifyo ifikolwe fyabo fyalecita." 
2Kings18:1 Mu mwaka walenga itatu uwakwa Hoshea umwana mwaume wakwa Elaya imfumu ya bena Israeli, Hesekia mwana Ahasi imfumu ya bena Yuda ewatendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu." 
2Kings18:2 Ali ne myaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu. Kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yabili na pabula (29). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Abiya umwana umwanakashi wakwa Sakaria. 
2Kings18:3 Acitile ifyalungama pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ukulingana nefyo wishi Davidi acitile." 
2Kings18:4 Aonaula incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika, abongolola inceshi sha mabwe balepepelapo elyo atema no luceshi lwa mulungu Asher. Atobaula ne nsoka ya mukuba intu Mose apangile. Pantu ukushinta pali ilya nshita abena Israeli balecifukilisha no bubani. Balecita ishina lya Nebushitani pakucicindika." 
2Kings18:5 Hesekia acetekele Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli. Pa mfumu shonse isha bena Yuda ishabalilepo, pali ena nangu ishakonkelepo, tapalifye nangu imo iyalingene nankwe." 
2Kings18:6 Hesekia alebeela Yawe, tatalile amusangukila nakalya. Ena alesunga amafunde yonse ayo Yawe apeele Mose." 
2Kings18:7 Na Yawe aleba nankwe, kabili aleba uwapaalwa mu cintu conse ico alecita. Asangukila imfumu ya ku Asiria, akaana nokuti aleibombela." 
2Kings18:8 Ukutampa pa lupungu lwa bakalinda ukufika ku musumba we linga, acimfya Abafilisiti ukuya fikafye ku Gasa ne calo conse." 
2Kings18:9 Mu mwaka walenga bune uwakwa Hesekia, uyo uwali uwakulenga cine lubali kuli Hoshea mwana Elaya imfumu ya bena Israeli, Shalimaneseri imfumu ya bena Asiria yaima no kusansa umusumba wa Samaria no kuushinguluka." 
2Kings18:10 Panuma ya myaka itatu abena Asiria baupoka. Kanshi Samaria baipokele mu mwaka walenga mutanda uwakwa Hesekia, uyo uwali umwaka walenga pabula kuli Hoshea imfumu ya bena Israeli." 
2Kings18:11 Imfumu ya bena Asiria epakutamfisha abena Israeli ku Asiria no kuya bapeela ukwikala ku Hala, ku Gosani mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Habori elyo na mu misumba iyinono iya bena Media." 
2Kings18:12 Ifi fyacitike pa mulandu wakuti bakeene ukumfwila Yawe Lesa wabo, lelo baonawile icipangano na fyonse ifyo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe abakonkomeshe. Balikeene ukumfwa amafunde nangu ukuyakonka." 
2Kings18:13 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ine (14) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Hesekia, Senakeribu imfumu ya bena Asiria yasansa imisumba ya malinga yonse iya mu calo ca Yuda, no kuicimfya yaicimfya." 
2Kings18:14 Kanshi Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda epakutuma amashiwi ku mfumu ya bena Asiria iyali ku Lakishi aiti, “Ine nindufyanya. Fuma kuli ine ubwelelemo, elyo ine nalalipila conse ico walafwaya kuli ine.” Imfumu ya ku Asiria yafwaya amatalanta ya silifa imyanda itatu (300) na ya golide amakumi yatatu (30)." 
2Kings18:15 Kanshi Hesekia epakumupeela silifa yonse iyali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne yali mu ŋanda ya kwisano. 
2Kings18:16 Pali iyi nshita Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda asapulula golide yonse iyo ashingwilile ku fiibi na ku maingwe ya mwi Tempele lyakwa Yawe no kupeela imfumu ya ku Asiria. 
2Kings18:17 Imfumu ya ku Asiria yatuma umukalamba wa fita fyonse ifya nkondo, umukalamba wa bacilolo na Rabushake umukalamba wa mpuka ikalamba iya fita pamo ne bumba likalamba ilya fita fya nkondo, ukufuma ku Lakishi ukuya ku mfumu Hesekia ku Yerusalemu. Baisa fika mu Yerusalemu elyo baiminina mupepi no mulonga wa cishiba ca pamulu, icaba pa musebo wakuya kwi Bala lyakwa Kasamba ukwalebombela abantu abalecapa insalu." 
2Kings18:18 Ilyo baita imfumu, uwaishile fuma ni Eliakimu umwana mwaume wakwa Hilikiya uwali mushika wa kwisano, na Shebina kalemba mukalamba wa kwisano elyo na Yoa umwana mwaume wakwa Asafu kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo, baya mukukumanya abaishile." 
2Kings18:19 Uyu Rabushake asosa ati, “Eba Hesekia ukuti, ifi efyo imfumu nkalamba, imfumu ya bena Asiria yasosa ukuti, “‘Bushe ni pali cinshi ushintilishe icicetekelo cobe?" 
2Kings18:20 Bushe iwe uletontonkanya ukuti ukulandaukafye amashiwi yeka yeka auti e mano nangu maka yakulwa inkondo, mwa? Bushe nani uyo wine washintililamo pakuti iwe unsangukile?" 
2Kings18:21 Mona, iwe ushintilile pali Egupto, uwaba nge nkoto ye tete iyalepauka iyakuti lilya umuntu ashintililako, yamucena mu minwe. Ifi efyo Farao imfumu ya bena Egupto aba. Kabili efyo acita na kuli bonse abashintilila kuli ena." 
2Kings18:22 Kabili nga wasosa kuli ine auti, “Ifwe tucetekele pali Yawe Lesa wesu,” bushe teuyo incende shakwe mu tupili ishakupepelamo elyo ne fibumbili fyakwe ifya malambo imfumu Hesekia aonawile? Elyo yaeba abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu aiti, “Muli nokulapepelafye pali ubu bulambo bwa mu Yerusalemu?”" 
2Kings18:23 “‘Kanshi isa nomba upangane na shikulu, imfumu ya ku Asiria. Ndi nokukupeela bakabalwe amakana yabili (2,000) nga wakwata abantu abakumanina abakuninapo!" 
2Kings18:24 Kuti wafulumuna shani cilolo umo uwacepesha pali bacilolo bakwa shikulu, ilyo washintilila pa bena Egupto ku maceleta na bashilika ba pali bakabalwe?" 
2Kings18:25 Kabili bushe ine muleti njishile mukonaula ino ncende ukwabula ishiwi ukufuma kuli Yawe? Yawe umwine eunjebele ukwimina cino calo no kuconaula.’” 
2Kings18:26 Elyo Eliakimu mwana Hilikiya, Shebina na Yoa baeba uyu Rabushake abati, “Twapapata, landa kuli ifwe fwe babomfi bobe mu cilimi ca Ciaramaiki pantu tulomfwa. Wilanda kuli ifwe mu Cihibulu pantu balya bonse abali pelinga ni kuno balekutika.”" 
2Kings18:27 Lelo uyu Rabushake ayasuka ati, “Bushe imwe kumo kwine ne mfumu yenu muleti nimwefye mweka imfumu yandi intumineko pakwisa landa iyi milandu yonse, batini? Ala iyoo, ine ndeeba balya bantu bali pelinga, abo pamo na imwe muli nokulya amafi yenu no kunwa imisu yenu.”" 
2Kings18:28 Elyo uyu Rabushake aiminina aololoka no kubilikisha mu Cihibulu ati, “Umfweni ishiwi lya mfumu nkalamba, imfumu ya ku Asiria!" 
2Kings18:29 Ifi efyo imfumu yasosa aiti, ‘Imwe mwileka Hesekia amubepe. Teti amupokolole ukufuma mu kuboko kwandi." 
2Kings18:30 Mwileka Hesekia amusembeleke ukutetekela muli Yawe nga alanda ukuti, “Yawe aletupokolola, uno musumba tawapeelwe mu minwe ya mfumu ya ku Asiria.” ’" 
2Kings18:31 “Mwimumfwila Hesekia. Ifi efyo imfumu ya ku Asiria yasosa ifyakuti, ‘Lekeni tumfwane mu mutende, mwise mucimbefye kuli ine. Awe ninshi, na cila umo pali imwe ali nokulya kwibala lyakwe lya myangashi ne mikunyu, no kunwa amenshi ukufuma mu cishima cakwe," 
2Kings18:32 mpaka nkese mubuula no kumutwala mu calo icabafye nge calo cenu, icalo ica ŋanu no mwangashi upya. Icalo ica mikate na mabala ya myangashi. Icalo ica miti ya miolifa ne ca buci. Saleni umweo ukucila imfwa!’ “Mwiumfwila Hesekia, pantu alemulufyanya nga asosa ati, ‘Yawe aletupokolola!’" 
2Kings18:33 Bushe kwalibako umulungu wa mushobo uuli onse uwapokololako icalo cauko ukufuma ku kuboko kwa mfumu ya bena Asiria? 
2Kings18:34 Nge milungu ya ku Hamati na ku Apadi ili kwi? Nge milungu ya ku Sefafaimu, ku Hena na ku Ifa ili kwi? Bushe yalipokolola Samaria ukufuma mu kuboko kwandi?" 
2Kings18:35 Bushe mulungu nshi pa milungu ya fyalo ifi fyonse walitala aupusushako icalo cauko kuli ine? Nga nomba imwe cinshi ico muleelenganishisha ukuti Yawe akapusushako Yerusalemu ku kuboko kwandi?” 
2Kings18:36 Lelo abantu baikalafye tondolo ukwabula ukuti bamwasuke, pantu imfumu yalikonkomeshe bonse aiti, “Mwimwasuka.”" 
2Kings18:37 Elyo Eliakimu mwana Hilikiya uwali mushika wa kwisano, Shebina kalemba mukalamba wa kwisano na Yoa mwana Asafu kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo, baya kuli Hesekia nabalepula insalu shabo, no kumulondolwela ifyo uyu Rabushake aciba alelanda." 
2Kings19:1 Ilyo imfumu Hesekia yaumfwile ifi, yalepwile ifyakufwala fyaiko, yafwala insalu shabulanda elyo yaya ingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings19:2 Kabili yabuula Eliakimu mushika wa kwisano, na Shebina kalemba mukalamba wa kwisano, na bakalamba ba bashimapepo, yabatuma na kuli kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi, ninshi bonse nabafwala insalu shabulanda." 
2Kings19:2 Kabili yabuula Eliakimu mushika wa kwisano, na Shebina kalemba mukalamba wa kwisano, na bakalamba ba bashimapepo, yabatuma na kuli kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi, ninshi bonse nabafwala insalu shabulanda." 
2Kings19:3 Bamweba ati, “Ifi efyo Hesekia alanda ifyakuti, ‘Buno bushiku, bushiku bwakuculamo, bushiku bwakushobolwamo no bwakumfwamo insoni. Ifwe tulifye ngo mwanakashi uushikwete maka yakupapa ilyo inshita yakupapilapo imufikile." 
2Kings19:4 Limbi kuti caba ukuti Yawe Lesa obe naumfwa amashiwi yonse aya uyu Rabushake uo shikulu wakwe imfumu ya ku Asiria itumine kukutuka Lesa uwamweo. Elyo na pakuti Yawe Lesa obe akalipe pa mashiwi aya omfwile. Eico pepelako abashele abacili abomi.’” 
2Kings19:5 Ilyo bacilolo ba mfumu Hesekia bafika kuli Esaya," 
2Kings19:6 nao Esaya ababweseshamo ati, “Kebeni shikulwinwe ukuti ifi efyo Yawe alanda ifyakuti, ‘Wikwata umwenso pafyo umfwile, palwa mashiwi yakuntuka ayo ababomfi ba mfumu ya bena Asiria bakwebele." 
2Kings19:7 Umfwa, ine ndebika umupashi muli yena uulelenga ukuti yumfwepo fimo ifyamaŋwiŋwi, ifyalalenga nokuti ibwelelemo ku calo caiko, no kuleka eko nkaleka bakaye mwipaila ku lupanga.’”" 
2Kings19:8 Ilyo uyu Rabushake aumfwa ukuti imfumu yabo naifuma ku Lakishi, abwelelamo no kuya sanga imfumu ilelwa no musumba wa ku Libina." 
2Kings19:9 Nomba Senakerubi apokelela amashiwi ayakuti Tiraka imfumu ya bena Kushi naifuma mukwisa mulwisha. Kanshi epakutuma nakabili inkombe kuli Hesekia na mashiwi yakuti," 
2Kings19:10 “Mwebe Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda ukuti, ‘Wileka umulungu washintililamo ukubepe nga watila Yerusalemu tayapeelwe mu minwe ya mfumu ya bena Asiria.’" 
2Kings19:11 Mu cacine walyumfwa ifyo imfumu sha ku Asiria shacita ku fyalo fyonse, ukonaulafye fyonse. Elyo bushe iwe niwe walapusuka?" 
2Kings19:12 Nge milungu ya mishobo iyo iyaonawilwe ku fikolwe fyandi bushe yalibapokolweleko? Imilungu ya Gosani, Harani, Resefu na bantu ba ku Edeni abali mu Teli Asari." 
2Kings19:13 “Ili kwi imfumu ya ku Hamati, imfumu ya ku Apadi, imfumu ya ku musumba wa Sefafaimu nangu uwa ku Hena nangu Ifa?”" 
2Kings19:14 Hesekia apokele kalata ukufuma ku nkombe nokubelenga. Elyo aya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe, abuula na kalata, yafungulula, yabika na pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
2Kings19:15 Elyo Hesekia apepa kuli Yawe ati, “We Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, we waikala pakati ka bakerubi. Iwe weka niwe Lesa pa bufumu bonse ubwa pano calo. Niwe wabumbile umulu ne calo." 
2Kings19:16 Teya ukutwi, we Yawe, kabili umfwa. Isula amenso yobe, we Yawe, no kumona. Umfwa ku mashiwi Senakeribu atumine ayakutuka Lesa uwamweo." 
2Kings19:17 “Cacine we Yawe ukuti imfumu sha bena Asiria shalyonaula imishobo yonse iyi ne fyalo fyaiko. 
2Kings19:18 Shaliposa imilungu yabo mu mulilo no kuonaula. Nangu cali ukuti tafyali milungu, lelo fyalifye ifya fimiti na mabwe fintu fyapangwa ne minwe ya bantu." 
2Kings19:19 Nomba we Yawe, Lesa wesu, twapapata, tupokololeko ukufuma mu minwe yakwe, pakuti ne shamfumu shonse pano calo shishibe ukuti iwefye weka we Yawe, niwe Lesa.”" 
2Kings19:20 Elyo Esaya mwana Amosi atuma amashiwi kuli Hesekia ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli asosa ukuti, ‘Niŋumfwa ipepo lyobe pa mulandu wakwa Senakeribu imfumu ya bena Asiria.’" 
2Kings19:20 Elyo Esaya mwana Amosi atuma amashiwi kuli Hesekia ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli asosa ukuti, ‘Niŋumfwa ipepo lyobe pa mulandu wakwa Senakeribu imfumu ya bena Asiria.’" 
2Kings19:21 Ili e shiwi Yawe alandile pali ena ilyakuti, “‘Nacisungu mwana Sioni akususha no kukutumfya. Umwana mwanakashi wa Yerusalemu apukunya umutwe panuma yobe." 
2Kings19:22 Ninani uo watukile no kupontela? Nani uo waotokele no kutulumwina amenso? Cine ni ku Wamushilo wakwa Israeli. 
2Kings19:23 Ukupitila mu nkombe shobe emo utukile Imfumu insele shingi. Kabili usosele auti, “Ku maceleta yandi ayashaifulila eko ninine pa mulu wa mpili na pa mulu wa mpili sha Lebanoni. Nintema imiti iyalepesha iya keda ne miti iyawamisha iya paini. Nafika na ku mpela ya ncende ishitali na ku mitengo iyawamisha." 
2Kings19:24 Ninyimba ifishima mu fyalo fya kutali, no kunwa amenshi kulya kwine. Ninkamya imimana yonse iya mu Egupto, ku fitende fya makasa yandi.”" 
2Kings19:25 “‘Bushe tawaumfwa ukuti nacipekenye ukufuma kale? Mu nshiku shakale emo napekenye ifi, na ine wine ndecifikilisha na pali nomba, pakuti ulelenga imisumba ya malinga ukuba ifitantala fya mabwe." 
2Kings19:26 Abantu babo amaka nayapwamo, nabafupuka no kulengwa insoni. Basanguka nge filimwa fya mu mabala, ngo mulemfwe uuteku, kwati cani icilemena pa mutenge, fintu ifyuma ku kasuba lintu tafilakula." 
2Kings19:27 “‘Lelo nalishiba uko wikala, naishiba ukwisa kobe, no kufuma kobe, ala iwe ulaitutumuna pali ine." 
2Kings19:28 Apo iwe waliitutumuna pali ine, no musaalula obe naufika ku matwi yandi, nalabika ubulobo mu myona yobe, elyo no mukobelo wandi mu kanwa kobe. Kabili nalalenga ubwelelemo inshila waishilemo.’" 
2Kings19:29 “Ici ecikaba icishibilo cobe, we Hesekia. Uno mwaka uli nokulya ifyaimenenafye, kabili umwaka wakonkapo ifikatwalako. Lelo mu mwaka walenga itatu ukabyale no kusombola, ukabyale imyangashi no kulya ifisabo fyaiko." 
2Kings19:30 Kabili abakashalapo mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda, bakengishe imishila panshi nokwisa twala ifisabo pamulu." 
2Kings19:31 Pantu mu Yerusalemu emukafuma abantu abakashalamo abomi, na pa lupili lwa Sioni pakafuma abakapusuka. Ukupimpa kwakwa Yawe umwine wa fita ekukacita ici." 
2Kings19:32 “Eico ifi efyo Yawe alanda palwa mfumu ya ku Asiria. “‘Tayakengilemo muli uno musumba nangu ukulasamo umufwi muno. Tayakapalame naikata inkwela ku musumba, nangu ukutulamikako imiina ya maloba pakuushinga." 
2Kings19:33 Inshila yaishilemo eyo ikabwelelamo. Muli uno musumba mwena tayaingilemo nakalya.’ Efyalanda Yawe. 
2Kings19:34 ‘Ndecingilila uno musumba no kuupususha, pa mulandu wandi na pa mulandu wa cilayo ico ine nalaile umubomfi wandi Davidi.’”" 
2Kings19:35 Awe, malaika wakwa Yawe aya na mu nkambi ya fita fya bena Asiria, aipayamo ifita amakana umwanda umo na makana amakumi cine konse konse na yasano (185,000). Kutifye ulucelo cilya bwaca, awe abantu bamonafye ifitumbi fya bantu filelefye ntangali ntangali." 
2Kings19:36 Kanshi Senakeribu imfumu ya bena Asiria epakufuma mu nkambi nokubwelelamo. Abwelela ku Ninife eko aya ikala. 
2Kings19:37 Ubushiku bumo ninshi alepepa mwitempele lya mulungu wakwe Nisroki, abana bakwe abaume, Adarameleki na Sharesa, bamukoma ku lupanga, elyo babutukila ku calo ca ku Aralati. Elyo Esahadoni umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Kings20:1 Mu nshiku shine shilya, Hesekia alwala ubulwele ubwafwaile ukumwipaya. Kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi aya kuli ena amweba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, ‘Ubangililile uipekanye bwino pantu ulefwa, tauli nakupola.’”" 
2Kings20:1 Mu nshiku shine shilya, Hesekia alwala ubulwele ubwafwaile ukumwipaya. Kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi aya kuli ena amweba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, ‘Ubangililile uipekanye bwino pantu ulefwa, tauli nakupola.’”" 
2Kings20:2 Hesekia nao epakupilibukila ku cibumba, alapapata kuli Yawe ati," 
2Kings20:3 “Nakulomba we Yawe, ibukisha ifyo nyenda pa cinso cobe mu cishinka na mu bololoke bwa mutima no kucita ifyawama pa cinso cobe.” Elyo kabili Hesekia alalila nganshi, tepakulila mwe." 
2Kings20:4 Lintu Esaya talati afume mu lubansa lwa mukati, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli ena aliti," 
2Kings20:5 “Bwelela kuli Hesekia intungulushi ya bantu bandi, no kuya mweba ukuti Yawe aletila ati, ‘Ine ne Yawe Lesa wa cikolwe cobe Davidi, niŋumfwa ukupapata kobe, kabili nimona ne filamba fyobe. Cisuma, ine nalakuposha. Pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu ukutula nomba, uli nokuya na ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings20:6 Nalalunda imyaka ikumi limo na isano (15) ku bumi bobe. Kabili ine nkalakupokololako, no kupokololako uno musumba, ku kuboko kwa mfumu ya calo ca Asiria. Nkacingilila na uno wine umusumba pa mulandu wandi na pa mulandu wa cilayo ico ine nalaile umubomfi wandi Davidi.’”" 
2Kings20:7 Elyo Esaya asosa ati, “Pekanya icimamantwa ca makunyu.” Nabo bacita ifyo fine elyo bashinga pa cipute nao apola." 
2Kings20:8 Hesekia alitalile aipusha Esaya ati, “Bushe ni cinshi icakwishibilako ukuti Yawe alemposha kabili ndi nokukwata amaka yakwenda no kuya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu ukufuma nomba?”" 
2Kings20:9 Esaya ayasuka ati, “Ici e cishibilo cakwa Yawe kuli iwe icakuti Yawe ali nokufikilisha ifyo alaya ukuti, ‘Bushe cintu cayanguka icinshingwa ukulola kuntanshi intampulo ikumi, nangu ukushalila kunuma intampulo ikumi?’”" 
2Kings20:10 Hesekia asosa ati, “Cintu icayanguka icinshingwa ukulola kuntanshi intampulo ikumi, nomba leka cilole kunuma intampulo ikumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Elyo kasesema Esaya apepa kuli Yawe. Elyo nao Yawe alenga icinshingwa ukulola kunuma intampulo ikumi umusango cacitikilemo pa matabo yakwa Ahasi. 
2Kings20:12 Pali ilya nshita Merodaki Baladani umwana mwaume wakwa Baladani imfumu ya ku Babiloni yatumine Hesekia amakalata elyo ne cabupe, pantu alyumfwile ukulwala kwakwe." 
2Kings20:13 Hesekia ilyo apokelela ishi nkombe, ashilangilila fyonse ifyali mu matala yakwe, silifa, golide ne fyanunka ubusuka, amafuta ayasuma, iŋanda ya fyanso fyakwe elyo na fyonse ifyali mu ŋanda yakutulilamo ifyuma. Mwisano lyakwe na mu calo cakwe conse tamwashele nelyo kamo ako Hesekia ashalangile inkombe." 
2Kings20:14 Elyo Esaya kasesema aya ku mfumu Hesekia no kumwipusha ati, “Ni finshi balya bantu bacisosa, kabili ni kwisa bafumine?” Hesekia ayasuka ati, “Bafumine ukutali ku calo ca ku Babiloni.”" 
2Kings20:15 Kasesema aipusha ati, “Ni finshi bacimona mu ŋanda yobe iya mwisano?” Hesekia ayasuka ati, “Nabamona fyonse ifya mwisano lyandi. Tapashele nangu cimo pa cuma natutila mu matala ico nshibalangile.”" 
2Kings20:16 Elyo Esaya aeba Hesekia ati, “Umfwa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe." 
2Kings20:17 Inshita ileisa ilyo ifintu fyonse mu ŋanda yobe iye sano, na fyonse ifyo ifikolwe fyenu fyatutile ukushinta ilelo fili nokusendwa ku Babiloni. Ala takwakashale nangu kamo, efyasosa Yawe." 
2Kings20:18 Kabili na pa ba mu lupwa lobe, aba mubili no mulopa obe, abo waifyalila we mwine, bakasendapo bamo no kuya bacita bamutungwi abakubombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni kwisano lyaiko.”" 
2Kings20:19 Hesekia ayasuka ati, “Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyo walanda lisuma.” Pantu atontonkenye ati, “Bushe emukuti takwakatale akuba umutende no kucingililwa mu nshita ya bumi bwandi?”" 
2Kings20:20 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Hesekia, fyonse ifyo abombele, kabili ifyo apangile icishiba nefyo aimbile umufolo wakuleta amenshi mu musumba, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings20:21 Hesekia ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Elyo Manase umwana wakwe amupyana pa bufumu. 
2Kings21:1 Manase ali ne myaka ikumi limo na ibili (12) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Yuda, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu imyaka amakumi yasano na isano (55). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Hefisiba." 
2Kings21:2 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, akonkelele imicitile yabipa iyalecita imishobo Yawe atamfishe ku cinso ca bena Israeli." 
2Kings21:3 Akuula cipya cipya incende shakupepelamo isho Hesekia wishi aonawile. Apangila Baali ifibumbili fya malambo elyo abasa no luceshi lwa mulungu Asher, ngefyo Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli yacitile. Alacindika ifita fyonse ifya mu mulu, no kufipepa." 
2Kings21:4 Akuula ifibumbili fya malambo mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe umo Yawe asosele ati, “Mu Yerusalemu emukaba ishina lyandi.”" 
2Kings21:5 Mu mansa shonse shibili isha mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, akuulila ifita fyonse ifya mu mulu ifibumbili fya malambo." 
2Kings21:6 Atuula ilambo lyakupisha umwana wakwe umwaume mu mulilo, alacita ubuloshi, ayamba nokulabuka, no kubomba ne mipashi ya bafwa elyo ne ngulu. Acita ububifi ubwingi pa cinso cakwa Yawe icakuti amukalifya umutima." 
2Kings21:7 Abuula uluceshi ulwa mulungu Ashera, abika mu ŋanda umo Yawe aebelepo Davidi no mwana wakwe Solomoni ukuti, “Muli ino ŋanda na muno mu Yerusalemu, incende iyo nsalile ukufuma mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli, emukaba ishina lyandi umuyayaya." 
2Kings21:8 Nshakaleke nakabili ukuti amakasa ya bena Israeli yakaleendauka ukufuma mu calo napeele ifikolwe fyabo, nga cakuti batekanya mukucita ifintu fyonse ifyo mbakonkomeshe elyo nokubaka amafunde yonse ayo umubomfi wandi Mose abapeele.”" 
2Kings21:9 Lelo abantu tabaumfwile. Manase alibafulungenye, icakuti bacita ububifi ubwingi ukucila na pa mishobo Yawe afulumwine pa ntanshi ya bena Israeli." 
2Kings21:10 Yawe epakulanda ukupitila mu babomfi bakwe bakasesema ati," 
2Kings21:11 “Manase imfumu ya bena Yuda nacita ifyamakankamike. Nacita ububifi ubwakucila na pa bena Amoli abamutangilile, no kuposa Yuda mukubifya pa mulandu wa tulubi twakwe." 
2Kings21:12 Kanshi ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli asosa ati, ‘Ndi nokuleta icinkunka pali Yerusalemu na Yuda icakuti amatwi ya onse ayakomfwa yakawelesha." 
2Kings21:13 Ndi nokupima Yerusalemu ku mwando napimineko Samaria, ne cakupiminako nabomfeshe pa ŋanda yakwa Ahabu. Nkasamba Yerusalemu filya basamba imbale no kuikupika baikupika." 
2Kings21:14 Nkaposa abantu bandi abakashalapo no kubapeela mu minwe ya balwani babo. Bakabasansa no kutapa ifyuma fyabo fyonse," 
2Kings21:15 pantu nabacita ifyabipa pa cinso candi no kunenga ukukalipa, ukufumafye pa bushiku ifikolwe fyabo fyafumine mu Egupto ukushinta ne lelo.’”" 
2Kings21:16 Na cimbi cakuti Manase alisumya umulopa wakaele uwingi uwakwisula mu Yerusalemu ukufuma ku mpela ukufika na ku mpela imbi, ukwabula ukubikako ifyabubifi ifyo atweleko abena Yuda ukucitako, ukubalenga ukubifya nganshi pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
2Kings21:17 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Manase, na fyonse ifyo acitile, ukulundapo ne fyabubifi acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings21:18 Manase ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe kabili bamushiikile mwibala lye sano lyakwe ilyakwa Usa. Elyo umwana wakwe Amoni amupyana pa bufumu. 
2Kings21:19 Amoni ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na ibili (22) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka ibili. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Meshulemeti umwana umwanakashi wakwa Harusi. Afumine ku Yotiba." 
2Kings21:20 Amoni acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ngefyo wishi Manase acitile." 
2Kings21:21 Aendele mu nshila shonse ishakwa wishi, no kulapepa utulubi tonse uto wishi alepepa nokutucindika." 
2Kings21:22 Asangukila Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyakwe, elyo afilwa no kwenda mu nshila shakwa Yawe." 
2Kings21:23 Bacilolo bakwa Amoni bamupangila, baya mwipaila mu ŋanda ye sano lyakwe." 
2Kings21:24 Elyo abekalacalo epakwipaya bonse abaimine nokwipaya imfumu Amoni. Elyo babuula umwana wakwe Yosaya eo bapyanikisha pa bufumu. 
2Kings21:25 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Amoni nefyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings21:26 Bamushiikile mu nshinshi yakwe ya mwibala lyakwa Usa. Elyo Yosaya umwana wakwe amupyana pa bufumu. 
2Kings22:1 Yosaya ali ne myaka cine konse konse ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yatatu na umo (31). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Yedida umwana umwanakashi wakwa Adaia. Ali umwina Bosikati." 
2Kings22:2 Yosaya acitile ifyawama pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kwendela mu nshila shonse ishakwa wishi Davidi ukwabula ukulayalukila ku kulyo nangu ku kuso. 
2Kings22:3 Mu mwaka walenga ukumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwa pa bufumu, Yosaya atumine Shafani kalemba wa milandu uwali mwana Asaliya, nao umwana wakwa Meshulamu ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe na mashiwi yakuti," 
2Kings22:4 “Kabiye kuli Hilikiya shimapepo mukalamba no kuya mweba ukuti alonganike indalama shonse isho abantu baleta ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe, shilya bakalinda wa pa mwinshi bapoka ukufuma ku bantu." 
2Kings22:5 Muye mumwebe apeele ishi indalama ku bantu abangalila umulimo wakuwamisha Yawe iŋanda. Kabili muye mona nokuti aba bantu nabo balipila ababomfi abawamya iŋanda yakwa Yawe," 
2Kings22:6 ekutila ku bapala imbao, abakuula elyo na bakasona wa mabwe. Kabili mumone ukuti bashita imbao elyo na mabwe ayabaswa aya kuwamisha iŋanda." 
2Kings22:7 Lelo tacilefwaikwa ukubepusha pafyo babomfeshe indalama pantu balikwata icishinka mu mibombele yabo.” 
2Kings22:8 Hilikiya shimapepo mukalamba aeba Shafani uwali kalemba ati, “Ninsanga icitabo ca mafunde mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.” Acipeela kuli Shafani pakuti abelenge." 
2Kings22:9 Elyo Shafani uwali kalemba aya ku mfumu no kuya eba imfumu ati, “Bacilolo bobe nabaya folesha indalama ishaciba mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, bacishiila ababomfi elyo na bakangalila wa milimo ya pa ŋanda.”" 
2Kings22:10 Elyo Shafani uwali kalemba aeba imfumu ati, “Hilikiya shimapepo nampeela icitabo.” Elyo abelengela imfumu ifyali mu citabo." 
2Kings22:11 Ilyo imfumu yaumfwa amashiwi ya mu citabo ca mafunde, yalepaula ifyakufwala fyaiko." 
2Kings22:12 Imfumu epakupeela ifipope ifi kuli Hilikiya shimapepo, Ahikamu mwana Shafani, Akibo mwana Mikaiya, Shafani uwali kalemba elyo na Asaiya uwali mushika wa mfumu aiti," 
2Kings22:13 “Kabiyeni mwishina lyandi nelya bantu nelya Yuda yonse, muye twipushishako pali aya mashiwi yalembwa muli ici citabo basangile. Pantu ubukali bwakwa Yawe nabukulisha nganshi pali ifwe pa mulandu wakuti ifikolwe fyesu fyalifilwa ukubeela amashiwi ya muli ici icitabo. Balifilwa ukucita ifintu fyonse bwino umo fyalembelwe palwa ifwe.”" 
2Kings22:14 Hilikiya shimapepo, Ahikamu, Akibo, Shafani elyo na Asaiya baya mukuya landishanya na kasesema mwanakashi Hulida, uwali umukashi wakwa Shalumu mwana Tikifa, uwali umwana wakwa Harasi, kasunga wa fyakufwala. Uyu mwanakashi aleikala mu Yerusalemu, mu ciputulwa cabubili." 
2Kings22:15 Kasesema mwanakashi abeba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli asosa ati, kebeni uyu muntu amutumine kuli ine amuti," 
2Kings22:16 Yawe alanda ati, ‘Nalaleta icinkunka pali ino incende na pa bantu baiko, ukulingana na pa fyalembwa mu citabo ico imfumu ya bena Yuda ibelengele." 
2Kings22:17 Pa mulandu wakuti balinsangukila no kocela ububani imilungu imbi elyo no kunenga ukuti nkalipe pa mulandu wa tulubi uto bapanga ne minwe yabo, ubukali bwandi buli nokuba pali ino ncende kabili tabuli nakutalalikwa.’" 
2Kings22:18 Kebeni imfumu ya bena Yuda iyacimutuma ukwisa ipusha kuli Yawe ukuti, ‘Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli asosa pa mulandu wa mashiwi umfwile ukuti," 
2Kings22:19 pantu umutima obe naulanguluka elyo no kuicefya pa cinso cakwa Yawe ilyo wacumfwa ifyo Yawe acilanda palwa ino ncende na bantu baiko, ukuti bali nokulapishiwa elyo nokuposwa, nomba iwe walepula ifyakufwala fyobe no kulila pa cinso candi. Eico na ine ninkumfwa, efyo Yawe asosa." 
2Kings22:20 Kanshi iwe ndi nokukutwala ukwalala ifikolwe fyobe, kabili bali nokukushiika mu cibote. Amenso yobe tayali nakumonako ifinkunka fyonse ndi nokuleta pali ino ncende.’” Nabo epakubwelela kuli Yosaya, baya mweba na mashiwi yene aya." 
2Kings23:1 Elyo imfumu Yosaya yaitile abakalamba bonse aba mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu. 
2Kings23:2 Aya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe pamo na bena Yuda abaume, na bantu ba mu Yerusalemu, bashimapepo na bakasesema na bantufye bonse ukufuma ku twaice ukufika ku bakulu. Elyo Yosaya abelengela abantu pakuti bomfwe amashiwi yonse aya mu citabo ca cipangano ico basangile mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings23:3 Imfumu Yosaya yaiminina mupepi no luceshi elyo yabukulusha icipangano pa cinso cakwa Yawe, icakulaenda mu nshila shakwa Yawe no kubaka amalango yakwe ne fipope fyakwe na mafunde yakwe no mutima waiko onse elyo no mweo waiko onse, mukufikilisha amashiwi ya cipangano ayalembwa muli ici citabo. Elyo na bantu bonse epakulaya ukuti bakulasunga icipangano."
