2Kings23:4 Imfumu yapeela icipope kuli Hilikiya shimapepo mukalamba, na bashimapepo abamukonkelepo na bakalinda wa pa mwinshi ukuti bafumye mwi Tempele lyakwa Yawe ifipe fyonse ifyo balebomfya mukupepa imilungu Baali na Ashera elyo na mukupepa ifita fyonse fya mu mulu. Afyocela kunse ya Yerusalemu mu mabala ayaba mu mukonko wa Kidironi, asenda ne mito ku Betele." 
2Kings23:5 Atamfya bashimapepo babufi abo imfumu sha bena Yuda shasontele ukulaoca ububani pa ncende shakupepelapo isha mu misumba ya mu Yuda na kuli shonse ishashinguluka Yerusalemu. Bonse abalefukilisha ububani kuli Baali, ku kasuba, ku mweshi, na ku ntanda ne fita fyonse fya mumulu." 
2Kings23:6 Afumya uluceshi lwa mulungu Ashera mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, alusenda kunse ya musumba ku mukonko wa Kidironi eko aya locela. Eko alushonaula mpaka lwasanguka imito, elyo asenda aya isansa pa nshinshi sha bantu abafwile." 
2Kings23:7 Atobaula na mayanda ya bacilende ba ku mfuba abaume ayali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, umo abanakashi balepikwila insalu sha mulungu Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 Yosaya abwesha bashimapepo bonse ukufuma mu misumba ya mu Yuda elyo aonaula incende shonse balepepelamo, ukufuma ku Geba ukufika ku Beresheba uko bashimapepo balefukilisha ububani. Abongolola ne ncende shakupepelamo isha pa mpongolo, ishi ncende shali pa mwinshi wa mpongolo yakwa Yoshua uwali umulashi wa musumba iyali ku kapinda ka ku kuso ka mpongolo ya mu musumba." 
2Kings23:9 Nangu cali ukuti aba bashimapepo ba ishi ncende shakupepelamo, tabalebombako imilimo ya ku bulambo bwakwa Yawe mu Yerusalemu, lelo balelyako umukate uushatutumuka pamo na bashimapepo banabo." 
2Kings23:10 Aonaula ne ncende ya Tofeti iyali mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu, pakuti pelaba nangu umo uwakuibomfya ukulekela kuli Moleki umwana wakwe umwaume nangu umwana wakwe umwanakashi nge lambo lyakoca." 
2Kings23:11 Afumya pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe bakabalwe abo imfumu sha bena Yuda shatuulile ku kasuba. Aba bakabalwe bali mu lukungu ulwali mupepi no muputule wakwa cilolo ishina lyakwe ni Natani Meleki. Yosaya aoca na maceleta ayo balebomfya pakupepa akasuba. 
2Kings23:12 Abongolola ifibumbili fya malambo imfumu sha bena Yuda shakuulile pa mutenge mupepi no muputule wa pamulu uwakwa Ahasi, elyo ne fibumbili fya malambo Manase akuulile mu mansa shibili isha ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Afumyapo apo fyali, no kufitobaula mu tupimfya utunono no kuposa ubufungau mu mukonko wa Kidironi." 
2Kings23:13 Imfumu yatobaula incende shakupepelamo isho balecindika ishali ku kabanga ka Yerusalemu lwa ku masamba ya Lupili lwa Bonaushi isho Solomoni imfumu ya bena Israeli yakuulile Ashitoreti, umulungu uwanakashi wa bena Sidoni, Kemoshi umulungu wa bena Moabu, elyo na Meleki umulungu uwamuselu uwa bena Amoni." 
2Kings23:14 Yosaya atobaula inceshi sha mabwe balepepelapo, atemaula ne nceshi sha mulungu Ashera, elyo abikapo na mafupa ya bantu abafwa pali shilya ncende." 
2Kings23:15 Kabili aonaula no bulambo bwa ku Betele, ne ncende yakupepelamo iyapangile Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, uwaletelele abena Israeli ukucita ifyabubifi. Abongolola bulya bwine ubulambo ne ncende yakupepelamo iyo balecindika. Aocapo umulilo no kushonaula fyonse ukuba ulukungu, elyo aoca no luceshi lwakwa Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Yosaya acebuka elyo amona inshinshi ishali pa ncende ya lupili. Aya buulamo amafupa aisa yocela pa bulambo pakuti abukoweshe, ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyalandilwe no muntu wakwa Lesa uwasobele fyonse ifi." 
2Kings23:17 Imfumu yaipusha aiti, “Nga lilya ilibwe lya pa nshinshi namona lya finshi?” Abantu ba mu musumba bayasuka abati, “Lilangilila uluputa lwa muntu wakwa Lesa uwafumine ku Yuda uwaishile sesema pali ifi fine ulecita palwa bulambo bwa ku Betele.”" 
2Kings23:18 Imfumu yabeba ati, “Lekeni abe, mwiikatako, mwileka nangu umo ekate ku mafupa yakwe.” Kanshi epakuleka amafupa yakwe pamo na yakwa kasesema uwafumine ku Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Nga filya fine acitile ku Betele, Yosaya aonaula kabili akowesha na mayanda yonse aya mu ncende shakupepelamo isho imfumu sha mu Israeli shakuulile mu misumba ya mu Samaria ishalengele nokuti Yawe afulwe." 
2Kings23:20 Yosaya aya ipaila pa fibumbili fya malambo bashimapepo bonse aba mu ncende shonse ishakupepelamo, aocelapo na mafupa ya bantu. Elyo abwelelamo ku Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Imfumu epakupeela ici cipope ku bantu bonse icakuti, “Sefyeni Ipasaka, inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila, pakucindika Yawe Lesa wenu, ngefyo calembwa mu Citabo ca Cipangano.”" 
2Kings23:22 Takwatalile akuba ukusefya inshikunkulu ye Pasaka ngeyi ukufumafye mu nshiku abapingushi batungulwile icalo ca Israeli ukufika mu nshita sha mfumu sha bena Israeli ne mfumu sha bena Yuda. 
2Kings23:23 Lelo mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwakwa Yosaya, iyi nshikunkulu baisefeshe mukucindika Yawe mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:24 Yosaya akonkanyapo ukufumya imilimo ya mipashi ya bafwa no kubuka. Afumyamo ne milungu iyo balependwilako pa mayanda, utulubi elyo na fyonse ifyamakankamike balebomfya mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu. Ifi fyacitilwe pakufikilisha ififwaikwa mu mafunde ayalembwa mu citabo cilya Hilikiya shimapepo asangile mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings23:25 Ukufumafye lintu talabapo nangu ilyo afuminepo, takwatalile akuba imfumu iyali nga ena mukubwelela kuli Yawe ngefyo acitile no mutima wakwe onse, no mweo wakwe onse, elyo na maka yakwe yonse umwabela amafunde yonse ayakwa Mose." 
2Kings23:26 Lelo nangu cali ifi, Yawe tabweseshe ubukali bwa mutima wakwe, ubo afulilwe abena Yuda pa mulandu wafyo Manase acitile ifyakulenga Yawe akalipe." 
2Kings23:27 Kanshi Yawe epakusosa ati, “Ndi nokufumya abena Yuda pa cinso candi ngefyo nafumishe abena Israeli, kabili ndi nokukaana Yerusalemu, umusumba uo nasalile, elyo neyi ine ŋanda apo nalandile ukuti, ‘e cifulo apakaba ishina lyandi umuyayaya.’”" 
2Kings23:28 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yosaya, elyo na fyonse ifyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Ilyo Yosaya acili ali mfumu, Farao Neko imfumu ya ku Egupto yaile ku mumana wa Yufurate kukuya afwa imfumu ya ku Asiria ukulwa inkondo. Yosaya aima mukuya mulwisha, nomba ilyo Neko amukumanya ku Megido, amwipaya." 
2Kings23:30 Ababomfi bakwa Yosaya ebasenda icitumbi cakwe mwiceleta ukufuma ku Megido ukuleta ku Yerusalemu no kwisa mushiika mu nshinshi yakwe. Elyo abantu ba mu calo babuula Yehoahasi, umwana wakwa Yosaya, bamusuba amafuta no kumupyanika pa bufumu pa cifulo cakwa wishi." 
2Kings23:31 Yehoahasi ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na itatu (23) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myeshifye itatu. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Hamutali umwana umwanakashi wakwa Yeremia. Afumine ku Libina." 
2Kings23:32 Yehoahasi acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe filya fine fyonse fyacitile fikolwe fyakwe. 
2Kings23:33 Farao Neko amukaka mu minyololo pa Ribula mu calo ca ku Hamati pakuti eba uwakuteeka mu Yerusalemu. Elyo apinda na bena Yuda umusonko uwa matalanta ya silifa umwanda umo (100) ne talanta lya golide limo. 
2Kings23:34 Farao Neko abuula Eliakimu mwana Yosaya eo abika pa bufumu pa cifulo cakwa wishi Yosaya, elyo ayalula ne shina lyakwa Eliakimu ukuba ni Yehoyakimu. Lelo abuula Yehoahasi amusenda ku Egupto, kabili kulya kwine eko aya fwila no kufwila." 
2Kings23:35 Yehoyakimu alepeela Farao Neko indalama sha silifa na golide apindile. Kanshi epakusonkesha icalo conse indalama pakuti akumanishe ukucita ifyo bamupindile. Alesonkesha pakuti silifa na golide fifume ku bantu ba mu calo ukulingana nomo apekanishishe. 
2Kings23:36 Yehoyakimu ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu pa myaka ikumi limo na umo (11). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Sebida umwana umwanakashi wakwa Pedaiya. Afumine ku Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Kabili Yehoyakimu acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe filya fine fyonse fyacitile fikolwe fyakwe. 
2Kings24:1 Mu nshita ya bufumu bwakwa Yehoyakimu, Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni yaingile mukulwisha icalo. Acicimfya, ne mfumu Yehoyakimu yalamubombela pa myaka itatu. Lelo aisa pilibula umutima no kusangukila Nebukadinesa." 
2Kings24:2 Yawe epakutuma ifita fya bena Kaludea, abena Aramu, abena Moabu na bena Amoni mukumulwisha. Abatumine mukonaula Yuda mukukonka ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyasoselwe na babomfi bakwe bakasesema." 
2Kings24:3 Mu cishinka, ifi fintu fyacitikile abena Yuda ukulingana nefyo Yawe akonkomeshe, palwa kubafumya pa cinso cakwe, pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyakwa Manase na pali fyonse ifyo acitile." 
2Kings24:4 Pali ifi alundilepo no mulandu wakusumya umulopa wakaele, pantu aiswishe umusumba wa Yerusalemu no mulopa wakaele, icalengele nokuti Yawe talefwaya no kumubelela uluse." 
2Kings24:5 Nomba palwa fintu fimbi ifya pambufumu bwakwa Yehoyakimu elyo na fyonse ifyo acitile, bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Yuda?" 
2Kings24:6 Yehoyakimu ilyo afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. Elyo umwana wakwe umwaume Yehoiyakini ewamupyana pa bufumu. 
2Kings24:7 Imfumu ya mu Egupto tayatalile aifuma nakabili mu calo caiko mukuya lwisha, pantu imfumu ya ku Babiloni yalimupokele icalo ukufumafye ku kamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto ukufika ku mumana wa Yufurate." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoiyakini ali ne myaka ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele pa myeshifye itatu mu musumba wa Yerusalemu. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Nehushita umwana umwanakashi wakwa Elinatani uwafumine ku Yerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Yehoiyakini acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe ngefyo wishi acitile. 
2Kings24:10 Pali ilya ine nshita, bacilolo bakwa Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni baima mukuya lwisha Yerusalemu nokuya ushinguluka." 
2Kings24:11 Elyo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni umwine aisa ku musumba ninshi bacilolo bakwe nabaushinguluka. 
2Kings24:12 Kanshi Yehoiyakini imfumu ya bena Yuda, nyina, ababomfi bakwe, abacindami bakwe elyo na bacilolo bakwe bonse epakucimba kuli Nebukadinesa. Mu mwaka walenga cine konse konse uwa mfumu ya ku Babiloni, Nebukadinesa asenda Yehoiyakini ukuba umufungwa." 
2Kings24:13 Ngefyo Yawe asosele, Nebukadinesa asenda icuma conse ica mwi Tempele lyakwa Yawe elyo neca kwisano, kabili asenda ne fipe fya golide ifyo Solomoni imfumu ya bena Israeli apangile ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings24:14 Asenda muli bunkole abantu bonse aba mu Yerusalemu, bacilolo bonse pamo ne fita fya nkondo, bakabasa elyo na bakafula wa fyela. Bonse pamo bakumene amakana ikumi limo (10,000). Kwashelefye abantu abalanda beka beka epela." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadinesa asenda Yehoiyakini muli bunkole ku Babiloni pamo na nyina wa mfumu, abakashi ba mfumu, bacilolo bakwe elyo na bacindami ba mu calo. Awe abafumya mu Yerusalemu no kubasenda bunkole ku Babiloni." 
2Kings24:16 Imfumu ya ku Babiloni yabuula ifita fya nkondo ifyakosa amakana cine lubali (7,000) afituma ku Babiloni pamo na bakabasa na bakafula wa fyela nabo ikana limo (1,000)." 
2Kings24:17 Abuula Matania, nalume wakwa Yehoiyakini eo abika pa bufumu pa cifulo cakwa Yehoiyakini. Ayalula ne shina lyakwe ati ni Sedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Sedekia ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na umo (21) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele pa myaka ikumi limo na umo (11) mu Yerusalemu. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Hamutali umwana wakwa Yeremia uwafumine ku Libina." 
2Kings24:19 Sedekia acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ngefyo imfumu Yehoyakimu yacitile." 
2Kings24:20 Ni pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alifulilwe, ecalengele fyonse ifi ficitike kuli Yerusalemu na kuli Yuda, na pakulekelesha abafumya pa cinso cakwe. Nomba Sedekia alisangukile imfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:1 Kanshi mu mwaka walenga pabula uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Sedekia, pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi mu mweshi walenga ikumi, Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni yaima mukuya lwisha Yerusalemu ne fita fyakwe fyonse. Akuula inkambi kunse ya musumba elyo ashingulusha imina ya maloba na fimbi fyakubomfya pakwikata umusumba." 
2Kings25:2 Ifita fyashingulwike umusumba ukufika pa mwaka we kumi limo na umo (11) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Sedekia. 
2Kings25:3 Pa bushiku bwalenga pabula mu mweshi walenga bune, insala mu musumba yakulisha icakuti abantu balafilwa no kumona icakulya." 
2Kings25:4 Amalinga ya ku musumba epakulabongololwa. Pakumona ifi, imfumu Sedekia na bashilika bonse aba mu musumba bena bafulumuka ubushiku, ninshi na bena Kaludea nabashinguluka umusumba. Bakonka inshila iyalola kwibala lya mfumu, bapitila pa mpongolo iyaba pakati ka fibumba fibili, balola na ku Araba." 
2Kings25:5 Nomba ifita fya bena Kaludea fyakunkunika imfumu Sedekia, mpaka fyamwikatila mu mawanga ya Yeriko, na bashilika bakwe bonse ninshi baya basalangana ukufuma kuli ena." 
2Kings25:6 Fyati fikate imfumu, awe fyaitwala na kuli Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni ilyo ninshi wena ali ku mushi wa Ribula, uko kwine eko na Nebukadinesa aputwila Sedekia umulandu." 
2Kings25:7 Baipaya abana abaume bakwa Sedekia pa cinso cakwe. Elyo ena bamutonkola amenso, bamukaka mu minyololo ya mukuba elyo bamusenda ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:8 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali mu mweshi walenga isano, mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na pabula (19) apo Nebukadinesa atampile ukuteeka ubufumu mu Babiloni, elintu Nebusaradani aingile mu musumba wa Yerusalemu. Uyu Nebusaradani ali ni shicilye wa mfumu, kabili ewali mushika mukalamba uwa bakalinda ba mfumu." 
2Kings25:9 Kanshi Nebusaradani epakoca iŋanda yakwa Yawe, aoca na mayanda ya kwisano, aocela kumo na mayanda yonse ayacindami ya mu Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:10 Ifita fyonse ifya bena Kaludea ifyali no mukalamba wa bakalinda ba mfumu batobaula na malinga ayashingulwike umusumba wa Yerusalemu. 
2Kings25:11 Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda wa mfumu asenda muli bunkole abantu bonse abashele mu musumba, pamo pene na bantu abafyukile ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni. Asendela kumo na bantu abacenjela ku fyakutukuta tukuta." 
2Kings25:12 Lelo uyu mukalamba wa bakalinda ashako abekalacalo bamo abalanda nganshi abakuti balesunga imyangashi elyo no kulalima amabala. 
2Kings25:13 Abena Kaludea batobaula inceshi sha mukuba, ne fyakuteekapo ifyashinguluka elyo ne cakusambilamo ca mukuba ifyali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, basenda no mukuba ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:14 Kabili basenda imipika, bafosholo, ifyakukushilamo imito, ifyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto, imbale elyo na fyonse ifipe fya mukuba ifyo balebomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Kings25:15 Umukalamba wa bakalinda wa mfumu asendafye fyonse ifyapangilwe na golide na silifa, emukuti ne fifukilisho ne mbale umwalesumina umulopa we lambo." 
2Kings25:16 Asenda umukuba wa ku nceshi shibili, icakusambilamo, ne fyakutekapo ifyashinguluka ifyo Solomoni apangile ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, fyena fyalicililemo ukufina kanshi balifililwe no kufipima." 
2Kings25:17 Cila luceshi lwalepele lumo lumo amakubiti ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18). Umutwe wa mukuba umo uwali pa mulu wa luceshi wali amakubiti yatatu ukulola mumulu, elyo ukushinguluka cila luceshi balengeleko amaluba ayasuma ayapala amateke aya mukuba. Uluceshi lwacibili nalo lwine lwali ulwapalana ku lubiye." 
2Kings25:18 Kabili Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda asenda Seraya shimapepo mukalamba, Sefania shimapepo wamukonkelepo na bakalinda wa pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe batatu ukuba abafungwa." 
2Kings25:19 Ku bashelepo mu musumba, asenda uwaletungulula ifita elyo na bampandamano basano aba kwisano. Asenda na kalemba uwali cilolo mukalamba wa bashilika ba nkondo uwalesunga imilandu ya bulwi elyo na bambi abaume amakumi mutanda (60) abasangilwe mu musumba." 
2Kings25:20 Awe Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda abatwala bonse ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni, iyali mu mushi wa Ribula." 
2Kings25:21 Kulya kwine ku Ribula, mu calo ca ku Hamati, eko imfumu yabepaila. Kanshi efyo abena Yuda baile muli bunkole, ukutali ne calo cabo." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni yasonta Gedalia umwana wakwa Ahikamu, mwana Shafyani ukuba umulashi wa bantu bashele mu Yuda abo bashasendeleko muli bunkole ku Babiloni." 
2Kings25:23 Ilyo bacilolo wa fita pamo na bantu babo baumfwa ukuti imfumu ya ku Babiloni naisonta Gedalia ukuba umulashi, baima baisa kuli Gedalia ku Misipa. Abaishile bali ni Ishimaeli mwana Netaniya, Yohanani mwana Karea, Seraya mwana Tanihumeti umwina Netofa, Yasaniya umwana wa mwina Makati elyo na bantu babo bonse." 
2Kings25:24 Gedalia alapa umulapo wakubalaya, bena pamo na bantu babo. Abeba nokuti, “Mwitiina bacilolo ba bena Kaludea, lelo iseni mwikale muno calo. Mulebombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni, ninshi na fyonse fili nokubafye bwino kuli imwe.”" 
2Kings25:25 Nomba mu mweshi walenga cine lubali, Ishimaeli umwana wakwa Netaniya, mwana Elishama uwali uwa ku bufumu aisa na bantu ikumi limo no kwisa ipaya Gedalia na baume abena Yuda elyo na bena Kaludea abali nankwe ku Misipa." 
2Kings25:26 Pali iyi nshita, abantu bonse ukufuma pa wacepesha ukufika na ku wacindamisha pamo pene na bacilolo wa bashilika babutukila ku Egupto pa mulandu wakutiina abena Kaludea." 
2Kings25:27 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37) apo basendele Yehoiyakini imfumu ya bena Yuda muli bunkole, pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27) mu mweshi we kumi limo na ibili (12), emo imfumu Efili Merodaki atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Babiloni. Abelela Yehoiyakini uluse, amufumya na mu cifungo." 
2Kings25:28 Efili Melodaki alemutentemba, alimupeele ne cipuna icacindamisha pa fipuna fya shamfumu shimbi shonse ishali pamo na Yehoiyakini muli bunkole mu Babiloni." 
2Kings25:29 Kanshi Yehoiyakini epakufula ifyakufwala fya mu cifungo, elyo na mu nshiku shonse isha bumi bwakwe lyonse alalya kwisano lya mfumu." 
2Kings25:30 Kabili imfumu Efili Melodaki yalemupeela ifintu fyonse ifyo alekabila cila bushiku pa nshiku shonse ishashele ku bumi bwakwe. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu, Seti, Enoshi," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenani, Mahalaleli, Yarede," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoki, Metusela, Lameki, Noa." 
1Chronicles1:4 Abana bakwa Noa ni Shemu, Hamu na Yafeti." 
1Chronicles1:5 Bamwana Yafeti abaume bali Gomeri, Magogi, Madai, Yafani, Tubali, Mesheki na Tirasi." 
1Chronicles1:6 Abana baume bakwa Gomeri ni Ashikenasi, Rifati na Togalima." 
1Chronicles1:7 Abana baume bakwa Yafani ni Elisha, Tashishi, abena Kitimu elyo na bena Rodanimu." 
1Chronicles1:8 Abana baume bakwa Hamu ni Kushi, Misraimu, Puti elyo na Kenani." 
1Chronicles1:9 Abana baume bakwa Kushi bali ni Seba, Hafila, Sabuta, Rama elyo na Sabuteka. Abana bakwa Rama bali ni Sheba elyo na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi ewali wishi wakwa Nimurodi. Aisa ba ipaka lyantanshi pano isonde. 
1Chronicles1:11 Misraimu ewali wishi wa bena Ludi, abena Anamu, abena Lehabu elyo na bena Nafutu," 
1Chronicles1:12 abena Patulusi, abena Kaselu, ukwatuntuka Abafilisiti, elyo na bena Kafuto." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kenani ewali wishi wakwa Sidoni ibeli lyakwe elyo na bena Hiti," 
1Chronicles1:14 abena Yebusi, abena Amoli, abena Girigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 abena Hifi, abena Aki, abena Sini," 
1Chronicles1:16 abena Afadi, abena Semari elyo na bena Hamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Abana bakwa Shemu ni Elamu, Ashuri, Afakisadi, Ludi elyo na Aramu. Abana bakwa Aramu ni Usi, Huli, Geteri elyo na Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Afakisadi ewali wishi wakwa Shela, elyo Shela nao ewali wishi wakwa Eberi." 
1Chronicles1:19 Elyo kuli Eberi kwafyelwe abana babili, umo ishina lyakwe ni Pelegi, pantu ni mu nshiku shakwe emo isonde lyayakanikwe. Elyo ne shina lyakwa munyina ali ni Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani ewali wishi wakwa Alimodadi, Shelefi, Hasarimafeti elyo na Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoramu, Usali, Dikila," 
1Chronicles1:22 Obali, Abimaeli, Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiri, Hafila elyo na Yobabu. Bonse aba bali abana bakwa Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:24 Shemu, Afakisadi, Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eberi, Pelegi, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serugi, Naho, Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 elyo na Abramu (uwitwa Abrahamu). 
1Chronicles1:28 Abana bakwa Abrahamu ni Isaki elyo na Ishimaeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Aba ebali e ba mu lupwa lwabo: Nebaiyoti ewali ibeli lyakwa Ishimaeli, elyo na Keda, Adibeli, Mibisamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishima, Duma, Masa, Hadadi, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yetu, Nafishi elyo na Kedema. Aba ebali abana bakwa Ishimaeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abana abafyelwe kuli Ketura, umukashi uushaupilwe mu bwinga uwakwa Abrahamu, ni Simurani, Yokishani, Medani, Midiani, Ishibaki elyo na Shua. Abana bakwa Yokishani ni Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Abana bakwa Midiani ni Efah, Eferi, Hanoki, Abida elyo na Eluda. Bonse aba bali ba mu lupwa lwakwa Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahamu ewali wishi wakwa Isaki. Abana bakwa Isaki ni Esau elyo na Israeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Abana abaume bakwa Esau ni Elifasi, Reueli, Yeushi, Yalamu elyo na Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elyo abana bakwa Elifasi bali ni Temani, Oma, Sefo, Gatamu, elyo na Kenasi. Muli Timuna afyelemo Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Abana bakwa Reueli ni Nahati, Sera, Shamaya elyo na Misa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Abana bakwa Seiri ni Lotani, Shobali, Sibeoni, Ane, Dishoni, Eseri, elyo na Dishani." 
1Chronicles1:39 Abana bakwa Lotani ni Hori na Homamu. Timuna ali ni nkashi yakwa Lotani. 
1Chronicles1:40 Abana bakwa Shobali ni Alifani, Manaati, Ebali, Shefo, elyo na Onamu. Abana bakwa Sibeoni ni Aia elyo na Ane." 
1Chronicles1:41 Umwana wakwa Ane ni Dishoni. Abana bakwa Dishoni ni Hemudani, Eshibani, Itirani elyo na Kerani." 
1Chronicles1:42 Abana baume bakwa Eseri ni Biluani, Safani elyo na Akani. Abana bakwa Dishani ni Usi elyo na Arani." 
1Chronicles1:43 Kabili ishi e mfumu ishateekelepo mu calo ca Edomu lintu mu Israeli tamulati mube imfumu nangu imo. Bela mwana Beori, uwainike umusumba wakwe ati ni Dinaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Panuma ilyo Bela afwile, Yobabu mwana Sera uwafumine ku Bosira ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ilyo Yobabu afwile, Hushamu uwafumine ku calo ca bena Temani ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
1Chronicles1:46 Ilyo Hushamu afwile, Hadadi mwana Bedadi uwacimfishe abena Midiani mu calo ca Moabu ewamupyene pa bufumu. Ainike umusumba wakwe ishina lya Afiti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Ilyo Hadadi afwile, Samula uwafumine ku Masireka ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
1Chronicles1:48 Ilyo Samula afwile, Shauli uwafumine ku Rehoboti umusumba uwali pa mumana ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ilyo Shauli afwile, Bali Hanani mwana Akibo ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
1Chronicles1:50 Ilyo Bali Hanani afwile, Hadadi ewamupyene pa bufumu. Ainike umusumba wakwe ishina lya Pai kabili ishina lya mukashi wakwe ali ni Metabeli umwana wakwa Matiredi, kabili umwishikulu wakwa Mesabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi nao alifwile. Kanshi Imfumu sha mu Edomu shali ni Timuna, Alifa Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 Olibama, Elaya, Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenasi, Temani, Mibisa," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magidieli elyo na Iramu. Ishi eshali imfumu sha mu Edomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Aba ebali abana bakwa Israeli: Rubeni, Simeoni, Levi, Yuda, Isaka, Sebuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dani, Yosefu, Benjamini, Naftali, Gadi elyo na Asheri." 
1Chronicles2:3 Abana bakwa Yuda ni Ere, Onani elyo na Shela. Aba abana batatu afyele mu mukashi umwina Kenani, umwana mwanakashi wakwa Shua. Ere, uwali ibeli lyakwa Yuda ali umubi pa cinso cakwa Yawe, kanshi Yawe epakumwipaya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Elyo Tama nafyala wakwa Yuda, ewafyele Peresi na Sera. Bonse abana bakwa Yuda bali basano." 
1Chronicles2:5 Abana bakwa Peresi ni Hesroni elyo na Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Abana bakwa Sera ni Simuri, Etani, Hemani, Kalikoli elyo na Dada. Kanshi bonse pamo bali basano." 
1Chronicles2:7 Abana bakwa Kami ni Aka, uwaletele ubwafya pa bena Israeli pakufulunganya icipope icakukanasenda ifyapeelwe mukonaulwa." 
1Chronicles2:8 Umwana wakwa Etani ni Asaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Kabili abana abafyelwe kuli Hesroni ni Yerameli, Ramu na Kalebu." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu ewali wishi wakwa Aminadabu, elyo na Aminadabu nao afyele Nashoni intungulushi ya bana bakwa Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashoni ewali wishi wakwa Salima, nao Salima afyele Boasi," 
1Chronicles2:12 nao Boasi afyele Obedi. Obedi nao ewali wishi wakwa Yese. 
1Chronicles2:13 Yese nao afyele Eliabu ibeli lyakwe, elyo uwacibili ni Abinadabu, uwacitatu ni Shimeya." 
1Chronicles2:14 Elyo umwana walenga bane ni Netaneli. Uwacisano ni Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 uwalenga mutanda ni Osemu elyo walenga cine lubali ni Davidi. 
1Chronicles2:16 Bankashi yabo bali ni Seruiya elyo na Abigaili. Abana bakwa Seruiya ni Abishai, Yoabu elyo na Asaeli." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaili afyele Amasa elyo wishi ali ni Yete umwina Ishimaeli. 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mwana Hesroni akwete abana muli Asuba umukashi wakwe elyo na muli Yerioti. Nomba aba ebali abana bakwe: Yesheri, Shobabu na Adoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ilyo Asuba afwile, Kalebu aupile Efulati no kufyalamo Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri afyele Uri, elyo Uri nao afyele wishi wakwa Besaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Panuma, Hesroni alele no mwana mwanakashi wakwa Makiri wishi wakwa Gileadi, untu aupile ilyo ali ne myaka amakumi mutanda (60) iyakufyalwa. Afyelemo na Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu afyele Yairi, uwali ne mishi amakumi yabili na itatu (23) mu calo ca Gileadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Lelo Geshuri na Aramu bapokolola Hafoti Yairi elyo na Kenati ne ncende shonse ishashinguluka umwali imishi amakumi mutanda (60). Aba bonse bali ba mu lupwa lwakwa Makiri wishi wakwa Gileadi. 
1Chronicles2:24 Panuma ya mfwa yakwa Hesroni ku Kalebu Efulata, Abiya umukashi wakwa Hesroni afyala umwana ishina lyakwe ni Ashuri, nao afyele Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Abana bakwa Yerameli ibeli lyakwa Hesroni bali ni Ramu uwali ibeli, Buna, Oreni, Osemu, elyo na Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerameli alyupile umukashi na umbi ishina lyakwe ni Atara. Uyu ewali nyina wakwa Onamu. 
1Chronicles2:27 Abana bakwa Ramu ibeli lyakwa Yerameli ni Masi, Yamini elyo na Ekeri." 
1Chronicles2:28 Abana bakwa Onamu nabo ni Shamai, elyo na Yada. Abana bakwa Shamai nabo ni Nadabu elyo na Abishuri." 
1Chronicles2:29 Ishina lyakwa muka Abishuri ni Abihaili, afyele Ahibani elyo na Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Abana bakwa Nadabu ni Seledi elyo na Apaimu. Seledi afwile ukwabula ukufyalapo abana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Umwana wakwa Apaimu ni Ishi, elyo umwana wakwa Ishi ni Sheshani uwali wishi wakwa Ahilai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Abana bakwa Yada, munyina wakwa Shamai ni Yeteri elyo na Yonatani. Yeteri afwile ukwabula ukufyalapo abana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Abana bakwa Yonatani ni Peleti elyo na Sasa. Aba bali bana bakwa Yerameli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshani takwetepo abana abaume kanofye abana abanakashi beka. Sheshani ali no mubomfi wakwe umwina Egupto ishina lyakwe ni Yariya. 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshani aufishe umwana wakwe umwanakashi ku mubomfi wakwe Yariya eko afyala umwana Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai afyele wishi wakwa Sabadi. 
1Chronicles2:37 Sabadi afyele Efula, elyo nao Efula afyele Obedi." 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi afyele Yehu, elyo nao ewafyele Asaria." 
1Chronicles2:39 Asaria afyele Helesi, elyo nao Helesi afyele Eleasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa afyele Sismai elyo nao Sismai afyele Shalumu. 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalumu afyele Yekamia elyo nao Yekamia ewafyele Elishama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Ulupwa lwakwa Kalebu, munyina wakwa Yerameli ni Mesha ibeli lyakwe, uwali wishi wakwa Sifu, elyo no mwana wakwe Maresha uwali wishi wakwa Hebuloni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Abana bakwa Hebuloni ni Kora, Tapua, Rekemu elyo na Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema afyele Rahamu, elyo nao Rahamu afyele Yorokeamu. Elyo nao Rekemu afyele Shamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Umwana wakwa Shemai ni Maoni elyo nao Maoni afyala Beti Suri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Efah, umukashi uushaupilwe mu bwinga uwakwa Kalebu, afyele Harani, Mosa elyo na Gasesi. Elyo Harani nao alikwete umwana uwe shina lya Gasesi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Abana bakwa Yadai bali ni Regemu, Yotamu, Geshani, Peleti, Efah elyo na Shafu." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maka, umukashi uushaupilwe mu bwinga uwakwa Kalebu, ewali nyina wakwa Sheberi elyo na Tirana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Kabili ewafyele na Shafu wishi wakwa Madimana elyo na Shefa uwali wishi wakwa Makibena elyo na Gibeya. Umwana umwanakashi wakwa Kalebu ali ni Akisa. 
1Chronicles2:50 Aba ebali aba mu lupwa lwakwa Kalebu. Abana bakwa Huri ibeli lyakwa Efulata ni Shabali wishi wakwa Kiriati Yarimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 Salima wishi wakwa Betelehemu, elyo na Harefu wishi wakwa Beti Gada." 
1Chronicles2:52 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa Shobali wishi wakwa Kiriati Yarimu nabo ni Haroe, na citika wa bena Manahati." 
1Chronicles2:53 Elyo na ba mu mukowa wakwa Kiriati Yarimu bali ni aba: abena Itira, abena Puti, abena Shumati elyo na bena Mishira. Kuli aba ekwafumine indupwa sha bena Sorati elyo na bena Eshitaoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Indupwa shakwa Salima shali ni Betelehemu, abena Netofati, abena Atoti Beti Yoabu, citika wa bena Manahati, abena Sorati." 
1Chronicles2:55 Elyo ne mikowa ya bakalemba abaikele ku Yabesi bali ni aba: abena Tirati, abena Shimeati elyo na bena Sukati. Aba e bena Keni abafumine muli Hamati wishi wa ba ŋanda yakwa Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Nomba aba e bana baume bakwa Davidi abafyelwe kuli ena mu Hebuloni. Ibeli lyakwe ali ni Amunoni muli Ainoamu umwina Yesireli, uwacibili ni Daniele muli Abigaili umwina Kameli." 
1Chronicles3:1 Nomba aba e bana baume bakwa Davidi abafyelwe kuli ena mu Hebuloni. Ibeli lyakwe ali ni Amunoni muli Ainoamu umwina Yesireli, uwacibili ni Daniele muli Abigaili umwina Kameli." 
1Chronicles3:2 Uwacitatu ni Abusalomu muli Maka umwana mwanakashi wakwa Talimai, imfumu ya ku Geshuri. Uwacine ni Adoniya muli Hagiti." 
1Chronicles3:3 Uwacisano, ni Shefatiya muli Abitali. Elyo uwalenga mutanda, ni Itilemu mu mukashi wakwe Egila." 
1Chronicles3:4 Aba bonse mutanda bafyelwe kuli Davidi mu Hebuloni ninshi ali pa bufumu imyaka cine lubali ne myeshi mutanda. Kabili ali pa bufumu mu Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yatatu na itatu (33). 
1Chronicles3:5 Kabili aba ebana abafyelwe kuli ena mu Yerusalemu: Shamua, Shobabu, Natani elyo na Solomoni. Abana aba bane ba muli Batisheba umwana mwanakashi wakwa Amieli." 
1Chronicles3:6 Elyo kabili na Ibihali, Elishua, Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishama, Eliada elyo na Elifeleti, bonse pamo bali pabula." 
1Chronicles3:9 Bonse aba bali bana bakwa Davidi, ukwabula ukupendelako abana ba mu bakashi bakwe abo ashaupile mu bwinga. Elyo na Tama ewali nkashi yabo." 
1Chronicles3:10 Umwana wakwa Solomoni ali ni Reoboamu. Abiya nao ewali umwana wakwa Reoboamu. Asa nao ewali umwana wakwa Abiya. Yehoshafati nao ewali umwana wakwa Asa. 
1Chronicles3:11 Yehoramu nao ewali umwana wakwa Yehoshafati. Ahasia nao ewali umwana wakwa Yehoramu. Yoashi nao ewali umwana wakwa Ahasia. 
1Chronicles3:12 Amasiya nao ewali mwana wakwa Yoashi. Asaria nao ewali umwana wakwa Amasiya. Yotamu nao ewali umwana wakwa Asaria. 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahasi nao ewali umwana wakwa Yotamu. Hesekia nao ewali umwana wakwa Ahasi. Manase nao ewali umwana wakwa Hesekia. 
1Chronicles3:14 Amoni nao ewali umwana wakwa Manase. Yosaya nao ewali umwana wakwa Amoni. 
1Chronicles3:15 Abana bakwa Yosaya nabo ni Yohanani ewali ibeli, Yehoyakimu ewali uwacibili, Sedekia ewali uwacitatu, Shalumu ewali uwacine." 
1Chronicles3:16 Impyani shakwa Yehoyakimu bali ni Yekoniya umwana wakwe, elyo na Sedekia umwana wakwe." 
1Chronicles3:17 Balupwa bakwa Yehoiyakini uwali muli bunkole bali ni Shealitieli umwana wakwe," 
1Chronicles3:18 elyo Malikiromu, Pedaiya, Shenasa, Yekamia, Hoshama na Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Abana bakwa Pedaiya bali ni Serubabeli elyo na Shimei. Abana bakwa Serubabeli bali ni Meshulamu elyo na Hanania. Shelomiti ni nkashi yabo. 
1Chronicles3:20 Kabili kwali na bambi basano Hashuba, Oheli, Berekiya, Hasadiya elyo na Yushabu Hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Balupwa bakwa Hanania bali ni Peletiya na Yeshaiya. Yeshaiya afyele Refaiya nao afyele Arinani, nao afyele Obadiya elyo nao afyele Shekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Balupwa bakwe Shekaniya bali ni Shemaiya na bana bakwe Hatushi, Igali, Bariya, Neariya elyo na Shepati. Bonse pamo bali mutanda." 
1Chronicles3:23 Abana bakwa Neariya bali ni Elioenai, Hisikiya elyo na Asirikamu. Bonse pamo bali batatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Abana bakwa Elioenai bali ni Hodafiya, Eliashibu, Pelaiya, Akuba, Yohanani, Delaiya elyo na Anani. Bonse pamo bali cine lubali." 
1Chronicles4:1 Abana bakwa Yuda bali ni Peresi, Hesroni, Kami, Huri, elyo na Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaiya umwana wakwa Shobali ewafyele Yahati, elyo Yahati nao ewafyele Ahumai na Lahadi. Aba ebali ba mu mikowa ya bena Sorati." 
1Chronicles4:3 Aba ebali abana bakwa Etamu: Yesireli, Ishima na Idibashi. Elyo ishina lyakwa nkashi yabo ali ni Haseleponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueli e wishi wakwa Gedori, elyo nao Eseri e wishi wakwa Husha. Aba ebali aba mu lupwa lwakwa Huri, ibeli lyakwa Efulata wishi wakwa Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuri uwali wishi wakwa Tekoa akwete abakashi babili, Hela elyo na Nara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Nara amufyalile Ahusamu, Heferi, Temeni elyo na Hahashitari, ebali balupwa bakwa Nara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Abana bakwa Hela nabo ni Sereti, Soha, Etinani," 
1Chronicles4:8 na Kosi uwali wishi wakwa Anubu na Hasobeba elyo na ba mu mukowa wakwa Aheli mwana Harumu. 
1Chronicles4:9 Nomba Yabesi ali uwacindikwa nganshi ukucila bamunyina. Nyina amwinike ishina lya Yabesi ati, “Namufyalile mu bucushi.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Elyo Yabesi alilile kuli Lesa wakwa Israeli ati, “Iye ukupaala nga wampaala no kukusha icalo candi. Uleke no kuboko kobe kukaleba na ine, no kungafwa ukufuma ku bubi, pakuti mpusuke ukufuma ku bukali!” Kanshi Lesa nao epakumupeela ico alombele." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kalebu, munyina Shuha afyele Meiri, elyo ewafyele Eshitoni." 
1Chronicles4:12 Elyo Eshitoni nao ewafyele Betirafa, Pasea, na Tehina wishi wakwa Iri Nahashi. Aba ebali abaume bakwa Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Abana bakwa Kenasi ni Otinieli na Seraya. Abana bakwa Otinieli nabo ni Hatati elyo na Meonotai. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai ewafyele Ofura. Seraya ewafyele Yoabu uwali wishi wakwa Harashimu, pantu bali abantu abacenjela mukupanga ifyakupanga panga." 
1Chronicles4:15 Abana bakwa Kalebu mwana Yefune ni Iru, Elaya, elyo na Namu. Elyo umwana wakwa Elaya nao ali ni Kenasi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Abana bakwa Yehaleleli ni Sifu, Sifa, Tiria elyo na Asareli." 
1Chronicles4:17 Abana bakwa Esira ni Yete, Meredi, Eferi elyo na Yaloni. Kabili umukashi umo uwakwa Meredi ewafyele Miriamu, Shamai elyo na Ishiba wishi wakwa Estemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Aba ebali abana bakwa Bitia umwana mwanakashi wakwa Farao untu Meredi aupile. Umukashi wakwe umwina Yuda afyele Yeredi wishi wakwa Gedori, Heberi wishi wakwa Soko elyo na Yekutieli wishi wakwa Samoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Abana ba mukashi wakwa Hodia, nkashi yakwa Nahamu, bali e bawishi wakwa Keila umwina Gami elyo na Eshitemoa umwina Makati." 
1Chronicles4:20 Abana bakwa Shimoni ni Amunoni, Rina, Beni Hanani elyo na Tiloni. Elyo abana bakwa Ishi ni Soheti elyo na Beni Soheti." 
1Chronicles4:21 Abana bakwa Shela mwana Yuda ni Ere wishi wakwa Leka, Lada wishi wakwa Maresha elyo ne ndupwa sha ba mu ŋanda ya bakapikula wa nsalu ishatelela aba ku Beti Ashibea," 
1Chronicles4:22 elyo Yokimu, na baume ba ku Koseba, na mu Yoashi, na mu Sarafu ebateekele mu Moabu na mu Yashubi Lehemu. Iyi milandu yakale nganshi." 
1Chronicles4:23 Aba ebalebomba imilimo yakubumba na bonse abaikele ku Netaimu elyo na ku Gedera. Kulya eko baikele mukubomba imilimo ya mfumu. 
1Chronicles4:24 Bamwana Simeoni abaume ni Nemueli, Yamini, Yaribu, Sera na Shauli." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shalumu ewali umwana wakwa Shauli, nao afyele Mibisamu elyo nao afyele Mishima." 
1Chronicles4:26 Kabili abana bakwa Mishima ni Hamueli, Sakuri elyo na Shimei bonse bali abaume." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei akwete abana abaume ikumi limo na mutanda (16) elyo na bana abanakashi nabo bali mutanda. Lelo bamunyina bena tabakwete abana abengi, ne ndupwa shabo tapali nelyo lumo ulwasandulwike nga bena Yuda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Baikele ku Beresheba, ku Molada, ku Hasa Shuali," 
1Chronicles4:29 ku Bilua, ku Esemu, ku Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 ku Betueli, ku Homa, ku Sikilagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 ku Beti Makaboti, ku Hasa Susimu, ku Beti Biri elyo na ku Sharaimu. Iyi eyali imisumba yabo ukwisa fika na pa kuteeka kwakwa Davidi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Elyo imishi yabo yali ni Etamu, Aini, Rimoni, Tokeni na Ashani, yali isano." 
1Chronicles4:33 Imishi yonse iyashingulwike iyi misumba yafikilefye na ku Baalati. Umu, emo baleikala. Kabili balilembele umwakonkanina ukufyalwa kwabo." 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobabu, Yamuleki, Yosha mwana Amasiya," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yoeli, Yehu mwana Yoshibia, nao mwana Seraya, nao mwana Asieli," 
1Chronicles4:36 kabili Elioenai, Yakoba, Yeshohaiya, Asaiya, Adieli, Yesimieli, Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 elyo na Sisa umwana wakwa Shifi, nao umwana wakwa Aloni, nao umwana wakwa Yedaiya, nao umwana wakwa Shimuri nao umwana wakwa Shemaiya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Aba abalumbwilwe mu mashina ebali ntungulushi mu ndupwa shabo. Kabili aba mu ŋanda yakwa wishi balisandene nganshi. 
1Chronicles4:39 Elyo baile kuntanshi ku bwingililo bwe shika lya Gedori, ku kabanga ke shika mukufwaya incende yakulishishamo ifitekwa fyabo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Eko baile sanga umulemfwe uwalelema elyo ne ncende iyikalamba iyamutende kabili iyabula icongo. Pantu bamo abena Hami eko kale baikele. 
1Chronicles4:41 Aba abalumbwilwe mu mashina baishile mu nshiku shakwa Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda. Elyo baisa sansa na bena Hami mu matenti yabo pamo na bena Meuni abali kulya, no kupeela bonsefye kukonaulwa, ngefyo caba ukufika na lelo. Kanshi epakwikala mu ncende yabo, pantu mwali umulemfwe wakulisha ifitekwa fyabo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Nomba ibumba limo ilya bana bakwa Simeoni imyanda isano (500) baile ku mpili sha Seiri, batungulwilwe na Pelatiya, Nearia, Refaiya elyo na Usieli bamwana Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Kabili bacimfishe abena Amaleki bonse abashele pali aba ababutwike. Kabili kulya kwine eko baikala ukufika na lelo. 
1Chronicles5:1 Aba e bana bakwa Rubeni ibeli lyakwa Israeli. Icine cine ewali ibeli, lelo pa mulandu wakukowesha umusengele wakwa wishi, insambu shakwe ishabubeli shapeelwe ku bana abaume bakwa Yosefu mwana Israeli, ecalenga Rubeni ukukana pendelwa mu cifyalilwa cakwe icabubeli." 
1Chronicles5:2 Elyo nangu Yuda akwatishepo amaka pali bamunyina, icakuti na kateeka afumine muli ena, lelo insambu shabubeli shapeelwe kuli Yosefu." 
1Chronicles5:3 Abana bakwa Rubeni ibeli lyakwa Israeli ni Hanoki, Pelu, Hesroni na Kami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Abana bakwa Yoeli ni Shemaiya, umwana wakwe. Gogi nao ewali umwana wakwa Shemaiya. Shimei nao ewali umwana wakwa Gogi." 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika nao ewali umwana wakwa Shimei. Reaiya nao ewali umwana wakwa Mika. Baali nao ewali umwana wakwa Reaiya. 
1Chronicles5:6 Elyo Bera e mwana wakwa Baali untu Tigilati Pilese imfumu ya ku Asiria asendele muli bunkole. Bera ewali intungulushi ya bena Rubeni. 
1Chronicles5:7 Bamunyina mu ndupwa shabo, abatantikwe umo bakonkanina mukufyalwa ni Yeli uwali intungulushi, Sakaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 elyo Bela mwana Asasi nao uwali umwana wakwa Shema, nao uwali umwana wakwa Yoeli. Baikele mu ncende iyali ukufuma ku Aroeli ukushinta ku Nebo elyo na ku Baali Meoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Lwa ku kabanga baikele mu calo conse mpaka ku mpela ya matololo ayaya fika ku mumana wa Yufurate, pantu ifitekwa fyabo fyalisandile nganshi mu Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Nomba mu nshiku sha bufumu bwakwa Saulo baimishe inkondo na bena Hagiri, abo bacimfishe ku minwe yabo. Elyo baikala mu matenti yabo no mwaleikala abena Hagiri ukushingulukafye icitungu conse ica ku kabanga ka ku Gileadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Abena Gadi ebaikele mupepi nabo mu Bashani ukushintafye na ku Saleka. 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoeli ewali ntungulushi, Shafamu ewamukonkelepo elyo pakonka Yanai na Shafati mu Bashani." 
1Chronicles5:13 Kabili bamunyinabo aba mu ndupwa shabo ni Mikaeli, Meshulamu, Sheba, Yorai, Yakani, Sia elyo na Eberi. Bonse pamo bali cine lubali." 
1Chronicles5:14 Aba ebali abana bakwa Abihaili umwana wakwa Huri, nao umwana wakwa Yaroya, uwali umwana wakwa Gileadi, nao uwali umwana wakwa Yeshishai, nao uwali umwana wakwa Yado, nao uwali umwana wakwa Busi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi umwana wakwa Abudiele, umwana wakwa Guni, ewali intungulushi ya lupwa lwakwe." 
1Chronicles5:16 Abena Gadi baikele mu Gileadi, mu Bashani na mu mishi iyali mumbali na mu ncende shonse ishakucemenamo ifitekwa isha Sharoni ukuya fikafye na ku mipaka yabo." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bonse aba balilembelwe ukulingana nomo bakonkanine mu kufyalwa kwabo, mu nshiku sha bufumu bwakwa Yotamu imfumu ya bena Yuda, na Yeroboamu imfumu ya bena Israeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Abana bakwe Rubeni, abena Gadi elyo na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase mwali abaume ababulamba amakana amakumi yane na yane ne myanda cine lubali na makumi mutanda (44,760) abacenjela ku nkondo, abengasenda inkwela no lupanga, abengabomfya ubuta kabili abasambilishiwa ukulwa." 
1Chronicles5:19 Babushishe inkondo na bena Hagiri, Yetu, Nafishi elyo na bena Nadabu." 
1Chronicles5:20 Lesa alibafwile mukulwisha Hagiri na bonse abalemwafwa, abapeele mu minwe yabo pantu balilile kuli Lesa mu nshita yabulwi. Ayaswike amapepo yabo pantu balicetekele muli ena." 
1Chronicles5:21 Bapokolwele ifitekwa fya bena Hagiri: Ingamila shabo amakana amakumi yasano (50,000), impaanga shabo amakana imyanda ibili na makumi yasano (250,000), elyo na bapunda babo amakana yabili (2,000). Kabili basenda na bantu amakana umwanda umo (100,000) muli bunkole." 
1Chronicles5:22 Elyo na bashala abengi balifwile, pantu ubulwi bwali bwakwa Lesa. Kabili baikele mu calo cabo mpaka baisa sendwa muli bunkole." 
1Chronicles5:23 Abantu citika wa luko lwakwa Manase bali abengi kabili baikele mu calo ukufuma ku Bashani ukufika ku Baali Hemoni, emukutila ku Seni nangu ulupili lwa Hemoni." 
1Chronicles5:24 Aba ebali intungulushi sha ndupwa sha bashibo: Efa, Ishi, Elieli, Asirieli, Yeremia, Hodafia elyo na Yadieli. Bali abacenjela mukulwa, abalumbuka, kabili intungulushi sha ndupwa sha bashibo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Lelo tabali bacishinka kuli Lesa wa bashibo, kabili baipeele kukucita bucilende bwakupepa imilungu ya bantu abali kale muli ici calo abo Lesa aonawile pa cinso cabo" 
1Chronicles5:26 Eico Lesa wa bena Israeli aimishe umutima wakwa Puli, imfumu ya bena Asiria emukutila Tigilati Pilese imfumu ya bena Asiria. Nao ewasendele abena Rubeni, abena Gadi na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase muli bunkole. Abasendele ku Hala, Habori, Hara elyo na ku mumana wa Gosani, uko baikala ukufika na pali lelo." 
1Chronicles6:1 Abana bakwa Levi bali ni Geshoni, Koati elyo na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Abana bakwa Koati ni Amuramu, Isa, Hebuloni elyo na Usieli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Abana bakwa Amuramu ni Aroni, Mose elyo na Miriamu. Elyo abana bakwa Aroni ni Nadabu, Abihu, Eleasa elyo na Itama." 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleasa afyele Fineasi, elyo Fineasi nao afyala Abishua." 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua afyele Buki, elyo Buki nao afyele Usi." 
1Chronicles6:6 Usi afyele Serahia, elyo Serahia nao afyala Meraioti," 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraioti afyele Amaria, elyo Amaria nao afyala Ahitubi," 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubi afyele Sadoki, elyo Sadoki afyala Aimasi." 
1Chronicles6:9 Aimasi afyele Asariya, elyo Asariya nao afyala Yohanani." 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanani afyele Asariya uyu wine ewali shimapepo mwi Tempele Solomoni akuulile mu Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles6:11 Asariya afyele Amaria, Amaria afyele Aitubi," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubi afyele Sadoki, elyo Sadoki nao afyala Shalumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalumu afyele Hilikiya, elyo Hilikiya nao afyala Asariya." 
1Chronicles6:14 Asariya afyele Seraya, elyo Seraya nao afyala Yehosadaki." 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehosadaki nao asendelwe muli bunkole ilyo Yawe alekele abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu basendwa muli bunkole ku kuboko kwakwa Nebukadinesa. 
1Chronicles6:16 Abana bakwa Levi bali ni Geshoni, Koati na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Aya e mashina ya bana bakwa Geshoni: Libini na Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Abana bakwa Koati bali ni Amuramu, Isari, Hebuloni na Usieli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Abana bakwa Merari bali ni Mali na Mushi. Kanshi ishi e ndupwa sha bena Levi ukulingana no mwakonkanina bashibo. 
1Chronicles6:20 Geshoni afyele Libini, Libini nao afyele Yehati elyo Yehati nao afyala Sima." 
1Chronicles6:21 Sima nao afyala Yoa, Yoa nao afyala Ido, Ido nao afyala Sera, Sera nao afyala Yeateraiya." 
1Chronicles6:22 Koati afyele Aminadabu, Aminadabu nao afyala Kora, Kora nao afyala Asiri," 
1Chronicles6:23 Asiri afyala Elikana, Elikana nao afyala Ebiyasafu, nao afyala Asiri." 
1Chronicles6:24 Asiri afyala Tahati, Tahati nao afyala Urieli, Urieli nao afyala Usia, Usia nao afyala Shauli." 
1Chronicles6:25 Abana bakwa Elikana ni Amasai na Ahimoti. 
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimoti afyala Elikana, Elikana nao afyala Sofai, Sofai nao afyala Nahati." 
1Chronicles6:27 Nahati afyala Eliabu, Eliabu nao afyala Yerohamu, Yerohamu nao afyala Elikana elyo Elikana nao afyala Samwele." 
1Chronicles6:28 Samwele afyele Yoeli, uwali ibeli lyakwe, na Abiya uwali uwacibili." 
1Chronicles6:29 Abana abaume bakwa Merari ni Maili, uwafyele Libini, Libini afyele Shimei, Shimei nao afyala Usa." 
1Chronicles6:30 Usa afyala Shimea, Shimea nao afyala Haggia, elyo nao afyala Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Aba e baume Davidi asalile ukulatungulula inyimbo mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, umo baletele imbokoshi ya Cipangano ukwisa tuushamo." 
1Chronicles6:32 Balebomba umulimo wakwimba inyimbo mu cifulo cakwikalamo ice Tenti lyakwa Lesa ilyakukumaninamo, mpaka Solomoni ilyo akuulile iŋanda yakwa Yawe mu Yerusalemu. Balebomba imilimo yabo ukulingana na mafunde yapeelwe kuli bena." 
1Chronicles6:33 Aba e baume babombele pamo na bana babo. Ukufuma ku bena Koati bali ni aba: Hemani, kemba wa nyimbo, umwana wakwa Yoeli, nao uwali umwana wakwa Samwele," 
1Chronicles6:34 nao uwali umwana wakwa Elikana, mwana Yerohami, nao uwali umwana wakwa Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 nao uwali umwana wakwa Sufu, nao uwali umwana wakwa Elikana, nao uwali umwana wakwa Mahati, nao uwali umwana wakwa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 nao uwali umwana wakwa Elikana, nao uwali umwana wakwa Yoeli, mwana Asariya, nao uwali umwana wakwa Sefania," 
1Chronicles6:37 nao ewali umwana wakwa Tahati, mwana Asiri, nao ewali umwana wakwa Ebiasafu, mwana Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 nao uwali umwana wakwa Isa, umwana wakwa Koati, nao ewali umwana wakwa Levi, mwana Israeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Elyo Asafu ewaleiminina ku kuboko kwakwa Hemani munyina. Asafu ewali umwana wakwa Berekiya, mwana Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 nao umwana wakwa Mikaeli, umwana wakwa Baseiya, mwana Milikiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 umwana wakwa Etini, mwana Sera, nao ewali umwana wakwa Adaiya," 
1Chronicles6:42 umwana wakwa Etani, uwali umwana wakwa Sima, mwana Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 uwali umwana wakwa Yahati, umwana wakwa Geshoni, nao uwali umwana wakwa Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Elyo na bamunyina abana bakwa Merari abali ku kuboko kwa ku kuso, bali ni Etani umwana wakwa Kisi, mwana Abudi, nao uwali umwana wakwa Maluki," 
1Chronicles6:45 nao umwana wakwa Hashabia, mwana Amasiya, nao uwali umwana wakwa Hilikiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 mwana Amusi, nao uwali umwana wakwa Bani, mwana Shemeri," 
1Chronicles6:47 nao ewali mwana wakwa Maili, mwana Mushi, uwali umwana wakwa Merari, mwana Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Elyo bamunyinabo abena Levi balisontelwe ukubomba imilimo imbi iyalekana lekana iya mwi Tenti lyakwa Lesa, ekutila mu ŋanda yakwe." 
1Chronicles6:49 Lelo Aroni na bana bakwe bena ebaletuula imituulo pa bulambo bwakocelapo amalambo elyo na pa bulambo bwakocelapo ububani, mu milimo yonse iyalecitika mu muputule wamushilo icine cine, no kufutilako abena Israeli pa fyabubifi ukulingana na fyonse ifyo Mose umubomfi wakwa Lesa akonkomeshe." 
1Chronicles6:50 Aba e bana bakwa Aroni: Eleasa ewali umwana wakwe, Fineasi nao ewali umwana wakwa Eliese, Abishua nao ewali umwana wakwa Fineasi." 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki nao ewali umwana wakwa Abishua, na Usi ewali umwana wakwa Buki. Serahiya ewali umwana wakwa Usi." 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraioti nao ewali umwana wakwa Serahiya, Amaria nao ewali umwana wakwa Meraioti, Ahitubi nao ewali umwana wakwa Amaria." 
1Chronicles6:53 Sadoki nao ewali umwana wakwa Ahitubi elyo na Aimasi nao ewali umwana wakwa Sadoki. 
1Chronicles6:54 Ishi e ncende baleikalamo, ukulingana ne mipaka ya fifulo fyabo ifyapeelwe ku bana bakwa Aroni aba mu lupwa lwakwa Koati, pantu ebo icipendwilo cantanshi cawilile." 
1Chronicles6:55 Babapeele Hebuloni mu calo cakwa Yuda pamo ne fitungu ifyashingulukako ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa. 
1Chronicles6:56 Lelo amabala ne mishi iyashingulwike umusumba fyena fyapeelwe kuli Kalebu umwana wakwa Yefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Elyo ku bana bakwa Aroni bena bapeelwe umusumba wakufisamamo Hebuloni elyo ne misumba ya ku Libuna, Yatiri, Eshitemoa," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hileni, Debi," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashani, Yuta elyo na Beti Shemeshi, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa." 
1Chronicles6:60 Kabili ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Benjamini bapeelwe imisumba ya Gibeoni, Geba, Alemeti elyo na Anatoti pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa. Imisumba iyi iyapeelwe kuli ba lupwa lwakwa Koati yali yonse pamo ikumi limo na itatu (13)." 
1Chronicles6:61 Abashele aba mu lupwa lwa mutundu wakwa Koati bapeelwe imisumba ikumi limo iyapendelwe ukufuma kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase. 
1Chronicles6:62 Kabili ku bana bakwa Geshoni, ku ndupwa shabo shonse, bapeelwe imisumba ikumi limo na itatu (13) ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Isaka, Asheri elyo na Naftali, no kufuma ku luko lwakwa Manase mu Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Ku bana bakwa Merari, ku ndupwa shabo shonse, bapeelwe imisumba ikumi limo na ibili (12) ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Rubeni, Gadi elyo na Sebuloni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Kanshi abena Israeli efyo bapeele abena Levi imisumba pamo ne fitungu ifyashingulukako ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa. 
1Chronicles6:65 Elyo ukufuma ku nko shakwa Yuda, Simeoni elyo na Benjamini babapeele imisumba ukupitila mukupendula yonse iyilumbwilwe amashina yaiko." 
1Chronicles6:66 Bamo aba mu lupwa lwa bana bakwa Koati bapeelwe imisumba ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Efulemu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Kabili bapeelweko umusumba umo uwakufisamamo uwa Shekemu, mu calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu, elyo Gesa," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokimeamu, Beti Horoni," 
1Chronicles6:69 Aiyaloni elyo na Gati Rimoni pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa. 
1Chronicles6:70 Kabili ukufuma kuli citika wa luko lwakwa Manase, abena Israeli bapeele imisumba ya Aneri elyo na Bileamu pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa ku bashelepo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Koati." 
1Chronicles6:71 Abana bakwa Geshoni bapeelwe Golani mu Bashani ukufuma mu lupwa citika wa luko lwakwa Manase elyo na Ashitaloti, pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa." 
1Chronicles6:72 Elyo ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Isaka bapeelwe Kedeshi, Daberati," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramoti elyo na Anemu pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa. 
1Chronicles6:74 Ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Asheri bapokele Mashali, Abudoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukoki elyo na Reboni pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa. 
1Chronicles6:76 Elyo ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Naftali bapeelwe Kadeshi mu Galile, Hamoni elyo na Kiriataimu pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa." 
1Chronicles6:77 Ku basheleko abena Levi, bamwana Merari, bapeelelwe ukufuma ku citungu cakwa Sebuloni, Yokunimu na Kata, Rimono na Tabo pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa." 
1Chronicles6:78 Elyo ku lubali lumbi ulwa mumana wa Yordani, kwishilya ukufuma ku Yeriko, ku kabanga ka mumana wa Yordani, bapeelwe ukufuma ku luko lwa bena Rubeni imisumba Besa wa mu matololo, Yasa," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemoti na Mefati pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa. 
1Chronicles6:80 Elyo ukufuma ku luko lwakwa Gadi bapeelwe Ramoti ya mu Gileadi, Mahanaimu," 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshiboni elyo na Yaseri pamo pene ne fitungu ifyaiko ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa. 
1Chronicles7:1 Abana bakwa Isaka bali ni Tola, Pua, Yashubu na Shimuroni bonse pamo bali bane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Abana bakwa Tola ni Usi, Rafaiya, Yerieli, Yamai, Yibusamu na Shemueli abali ntungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo. Mu nshita ya bufumu bwakwa Davidi, aba mu lupwa lwakwa Tola abaume babulamba abapendelwe ukuba abakulwa inkondo bali amakana amakumi yabili na yabili ne myanda mutanda (22,600) ukulingana no butantiko bwa kufyalwa kwabo." 
1Chronicles7:3 Umwana wakwa Usi ali ni Israiya. Elyo abana bakwa Israiya ni Mikaeli, Obadiya, Yoeli na Ishiya. Aba bonse basano bali ni ntungulushi." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ukulingana no mwapendelwe aba mu mayanda ya bashibo abakwete abaume ababulamba bali amakana amakumi yatatu na mutanda (36,000) abaipekanya ukulwa inkondo, pantu balikwete abakashi abengi elyo na bana abengi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Abaume babulamba abengalwa inkondo aba mu ndupwa sha mikowa yakwa Isaka abapendelwe ukulingana no butantiko bwa kufyalwa kwabo bali amakana cine konse konse na makana cine lubali (87,000) bonse pamo." 
1Chronicles7:6 Abana batatu abakwa Benjamini bali ni Bela, Beka na Yediyaeli." 
1Chronicles7:7 Abana bakwa Bela ni Esiboni, Usi, Usieli, Yerimoti na Iri, bonse pamo bali basano. Bali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo kabili bali amakana amakumi yabili na yabili elyo amakumi yatatu na bane (22,034) bonse abakulwa inkondo." 
1Chronicles7:8 Abana bakwa Beka bali ni Semira, Yoashi, Eliese, Eliyoenai, Omuri, Yerimoti, Abiya, Anatoti na Alemeti. Bonse aba bali abana bakwa Beka." 
1Chronicles7:9 Pa bapendelwe pali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo elyo na baume babulamba amakana amakumi yabili ne myanda ibili (20,200) abengalwa inkondo." 
1Chronicles7:10 Umwana wakwa Yediyaeli ali ni Biluani. Elyo abana bakwa Biluani ni Yeushi, Benjamini, Ehudi, Kenani, Setani, Tashishi na Ahishahari." 
1Chronicles7:11 Aba bonse bana bakwa Yediyaeli bali ni ntungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo. Bali impendwa amakana ikumi limo na cine lubali ne myanda ibili (17,200) abaume ababulamba abengaya mukulwa inkondo." 
1Chronicles7:12 Abena Shupimu na bena Hupimu bali abana bakwa Iri, elyo abena Hushimu bali abana bakwa Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Abana bakwa Naftali bali ni Yasieli, Guni, Yesa na Shilemu, abo bonse ba mu lupwa lwakwa Bilua." 
1Chronicles7:14 Aba mu ndupwa shakwa Manase, mu mukashi wakwe uo ashaupile mu bwinga umwina Aramu, afyelemo Asirieli elyo na Makiri wishi wakwa Gileadi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri aupile umwanakashi ukufuma ku bena Hupi na bena Shupi. Ishina lyakwa Makiri ni Maaka. Umwana wakwa Makiri uwacibili ni Selofeadi, uwakwetefye abana abanakashi beka beka." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka umukashi wakwa Makiri afyele umwana amwinike ishina lya Pereshi. Ndume yakwe balemwita ishina lya Shereshi elyo na bana bakwe ni Ulamu na Rakemu. 
1Chronicles7:17 Umwana wakwa Ulamu ali ni Bedani. Aba e ba lupwa lwakwa Gileadi umwana wakwa Makiri, nao umwana wakwa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Nkashi yakwe Hamoleketi afyele Ishihodi, Abiesa na Maila." 
1Chronicles7:19 Elyo abana bakwa Shemida bali ni Ahiyani, Shekemu, Likihi elyo na Aniamu." 
1Chronicles7:20 Aba mu lupwa lwakwa Efulemu ni aba. Shutela afyele Beredi, nao Tahati ewali umwana wakwe, nao Eleada ewali umwana wakwe," 
1Chronicles7:21 nao Sabadi ewali umwana wakwe, nao Shutela ewali umwana wakwe. Elyo Eseri na Eleadi abana bakwa Efulemu balibepeye ku baume bafyalilwe mu Gati ilyo baile fwaya ukutapa ifitekwa fyabo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Shibo Efulemu alibalooseshe pa nshiku ishingi elyo bamunyina baishile mukumutalalikako. 
1Chronicles7:23 Kabili ilyo bakumene no mukashi wakwe, alimite no kufyala umwana. Elyo amwinika ne shina lya Beria pantu mwacitika ububi mu ba mu ŋanda yakwe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ishina lya mwana wakwe umwanakashi ali ni Shera, uwakuulile Beti Horoni ya pamulu elyo ne ya pesamba ukulundapo na Useni Shera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Kabili Rafa ewali umwana wakwe, na Reshefi nao ewali umwana wakwe, Tela nao ewali umwana wakwe, Tahani nao ewali umwana wakwe," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladani nao ewali umwana wakwe, Amihudi nao ewali umwana wakwe, Elishama nao ewali umwana wakwe," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nuni nao ewali umwana wakwe elyo Yoshua nao ewali umwana wakwe. 
1Chronicles7:28 Impanga shabo ne ncende shakwikalamo kwalundile Betele ne mishi iyashingulwike, ku kabanga ni Narani, ku masamba nako ni Gesa ne mishi iyashingulwike, Shekemu ne mishi yauko, ukuyafye mpaka na ku Aya ne mishi yauko." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ukukonka imipaka ya bana bakwa Manase kwali imisumba ya ku Beti Shani, Tanaki, Megido na Dori pamo ne mishi yauko. Umu emwaleikala abana bakwa Yosefu, mwana Israeli." 
1Chronicles7:30 Abana bakwa Asheri bali ni Imuna, Ishifa, Ishifi elyo na Beria, elyo nkashi yabo ishina lyakwe ni Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Abana bakwa Beria ni Heberi na Malikieli uwali wishi wakwa Bisaiti. 
1Chronicles7:32 Elyo Heberi afyele Yafuleti, Shoma na Hotamu elyo na nkashi yabo Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Abana bakwa Yafuleti bali ni Pasaki, Bimali na Ashifati, aba ebali abana bakwa Yafuleti." 
1Chronicles7:34 Abana bakwa munyina Shoma bali ni Ahi, Roga, Hubi na Aramu." 
1Chronicles7:35 Elyo abana bakwa munyina Helemu bali ni Sofa, Imuna, Sheleshi na Amali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Abana bakwa Sofa bali ni Sua, Hanefa, Shuali, Beri, Imura," 
1Chronicles7:37 Besa, Hodi, Shama, Shilisha, Itirani na Bera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Abana bakwa Yete ni Yefune, Pisipa na Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Abana bakwa Ula bali ni Ara, Hanieli na Risia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Aba bonse bali bana bakwa Asheri, intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo abaume abasalwa, impalume shabulwi kabili intungulushi ishacine. Abaume abengalwa inkondo, abapendelwe ukulingana no butantiko bwa kufyalwa kwabo bali amakana amakumi yabili na mutanda (26,000)." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamini afyele Bela uwali ibeli lyakwe, Ashibeli ewali uwacibili, Ahara nao ewacitatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noha uwabune elyo Rafa uwacisano. 
1Chronicles8:3 Abana bakwa Bela bali ni Adda, Gera, Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishua, Namani, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shefufani na Huramu." 
1Chronicles8:6 Aba ebali abana bakwa Ehudi abali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo abaleikala mu Geba elyo babatamfisha ku Manahati. 
1Chronicles8:7 Amashina yabo ni Namani, Ahiya na Gera uwabatamfishe. Kabili ewafyele Usa na Ahiudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Kabili Sharaimu ashele afyala abana mu Moabu panuma yakutamfya abakashi bakwe Hushimu na Bara. 
1Chronicles8:9 Mu mukashi wakwe Hodeshi, afyelemo Yobabu, Sibia, Mesha, Malikamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yeushi, Sakiya na Mima. Aba ebali abana bakwe abaume, intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo." 
1Chronicles8:11 Muli Hushimu afyelemo Abitubi na Elipalu. 
1Chronicles8:12 Abana bakwa Elipalu bali ni Eberi, Mishimu, Shemedi uwakuulile Ono na Lodi ne mishi yashingulwike mumbali," 
1Chronicles8:13 elyo Beria na Shema abali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo abaleikala mu Aiyaloni kabili ebatamfishemo abaleikala mu Gati. 
1Chronicles8:14 Ahio, Sheshaki, Yeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 Sebadiya, Aradi, Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaeli, Ishipa na Yoha e bana bakwa Beria." 
1Chronicles8:17 Abana abali bakwa Elipalu ni Sebadia, Meshulamu, Hisiki, Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishimerai, Isilia na Yobabu." 
1Chronicles8:19 Abana bakwa Shimei bali ni Yakimu, Sikiri, Sabudi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Siletai, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaiya, Beraiya na Shimurati." 
1Chronicles8:22 Abana bakwa Shashaki bali ni Ishipani, Eberi, Elieli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abudoni, Sikiri, Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hamania, Elamu, Antotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ipideya na Penueli. 
1Chronicles8:26 Abana bakwa Yerohamu bali ni Shemusherai, Shehariya, Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yareshiya, Eliya na Sikiri." 
1Chronicles8:28 Aba bonse ebali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo mu nkulo shabo. Kabili baikele mu Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles8:29 Wishi wakwa Gibeoni aikele mu Gibeoni. Ishina lya mukashi wakwe ali ni Maaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Elyo umwana wakwe ibeli ali ni Abudoni, elyo Suri, Kishi, Baali, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedori, Ahiyo, Sekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikiloti uwafyele Shimea. Nabo bene baikele mupepi na bamunyinabo mu Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neri ewafyele Kishi, Kishi nao afyala Saulo. Elyo Saulo nao e wishi wakwa Yonatani, Malikishua, Abinadabu na Eshi Baali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Umwana wakwa Yonatani ali ni Meribu Baali nao ewafyele Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Abana bakwa Mika ni Pitoni, Meleki, Tarea na Ahasi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Kabili Ahasi afyele Yehoada, Yehoada nao ewafyele Alemeti, Asimafeti na Simuri. Elyo Simuri nao ewafyele Mosa." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosa ewafyele Binea, Binea nao ewafyele Rafaya elyo Rafaya nao ewafyele Eleasa, na Eleasa ewafyele Aseli." 
1Chronicles8:38 Aseli akwete abana mutanda, na mashina yabo ni aya: Asirikamu, Bokeru, Ishimaeli, Sheariya, Obadia na Hanani. Aba bonse bali ni bamwana Aseli." 
1Chronicles8:39 Kabili abana bakwa Esheki munyina bali ni Ulamu ibeli lyakwe, Yeushi uwacibili elyo Elifeleti nao ewacitatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Abana bakwa Ulamu bali abantu impalume shabulamba mukulwa inkondo, abacenjela mukubomfya amata. Balikwete abana na beshikulu abengi, bonse pamo bali umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150). Bonse aba bali ba mu ndupwa shakwa Benjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Abena Israeli bonse batantikwe ukulingana no mwakonkanine icifyalilwa cabo, pamo ngefyo calembwa mu fitabo fya shamfumu sha bena Israeli. Abena Yuda babasendele muli bunkole ku Babiloni pa mulandu wakukanaba ne cishinka." 
1Chronicles9:2 Nomba abantanshi ukubwelela mu fifulo fyabo na mu misumba yabo bali bamo aba mu bena Israeli, bashimapepo, abena Levi na babomfi ba mwi Tempele." 
1Chronicles9:3 Bamo abafumine ku bena Yuda, abena Benjamini, abena Efulemu na bena Manase abaishile ikala mu Yerusalemu bali ni aba:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai mwana Amihudi, nao mwana Omuri, nao mwana Imuri, nao mwana Bani, uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Peresi mwana Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Mu bena Shiloni bali ni Asaiya ibeli lyakwe elyo na bana bakwe. 
1Chronicles9:6 Mu bana bakwa Sera ni Yeueli. Mu bana bakwa Sera ni Yeueli. Kanshi aba mu luko lwakwa Yuda bonse pamo bafikile imyanda mutanda na makumi pabula (690). 
1Chronicles9:7 Mu bana bakwa Benjamini ni Salu mwana Meshulamu, mwana Hodafiya, mwana Hasenuya." 
1Chronicles9:8 Ibineya mwana Yerohamu, Elaya mwana Usi, mwana Mikiri, elyo na Meshulamu mwana Shefatiya, umwana wakwa Reueli mwana Ibiniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Kabili bamunyinabo abena Benjamini bapendelwe ukulingana ne nkulo ya kufyalwa kwabo, bali imyanda pabula, amakumi yasano na mutanda (956). Bonse aba ebali intungulushi sha mu mayanda ya bashibo." 
1Chronicles9:10 Muli bashimapepo bali ni Yedaiya, Yehoiyabu na Yakini." 
1Chronicles9:11 Asaria mwana Hilikiya mwana Meshulamu, nao mwana Sadoki, umwana wakwa Meraiyoti, umwana wakwa Aitubi, cilolo uwali mukalamba mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
1Chronicles9:12 Adaiya mwana Yerohamu, umwana wakwa Pashuri, mwana Malikiya elyo na Masai mwana Adieli, umwana wakwa Yasera, mwana Meshulamu, umwana wakwa Meshilemiti mwana Imeri." 
1Chronicles9:13 Bashimapepo abali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo, bali ikana limo, imyanda cine lubali na makumi mutanda (1,760). Bali abaume icine cine, abacishinka mukubomba imilimo mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
1Chronicles9:14 Mu bena Levi bali ni aba. Shemaiya mwana Hashubi, umwana wakwa Asirikamu, nao umwana wakwa Hashabiya umwina Merari." 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakibaka, Hereshi, Galali na Matanya mwana Mika, umwana wakwa Sikiri mwana Asafu." 
1Chronicles9:16 Obadia umwana wakwa Shemaiya, umwana wakwa Galali, umwana wakwa Yedutuni, na Berekiya mwana Asa, umwana wakwa Elikana uwaikele mu mishi ya bena Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Bakalinda wa pa mpongolo bali ni Shalumu, Akubu, Talimoni elyo na bamunyinabo. Shalumu ewali umukalamba wa bakalinda wa pa mpongolo," 
1Chronicles9:18 uyo ukufika na pali nomba eminina pa mpongolo ya kwisano iyabela ku kabanga. Aba ebali bakalinda wa mpongolo ku nkambi iya bena Levi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalumu mwana Kore, umwana wakwa Ebiyasafu, umwana wakwa Kora na bakasunga wa mpongolo babiye abafumine mu lupwa lwakwe ulwa bena Kora, ebali ne ncito yakulonda apakwingilila mwi Tenti lyakwa Yawe, ngefyo ifikolwe fyabo efyalelonda kale pa mwinshi wa kwi Tenti lyakwa Yawe" 
1Chronicles9:20 Mu nshita shakale, Fineasi mwana Eleasa ewali umukalamba wa bakalinda wa pa mpongolo, kabili Yawe ali nankwe." 
1Chronicles9:21 Sakaria mwana Meshelemiya ewali kalinda wa pa mwinshi wakwingilila mwi Tenti lyakukumaninamo. 
1Chronicles9:22 Bonse pamo abasalilwe ukuba bakalinda wa pa mpongolo bali imyanda ibili ikumi limo na babili (212). Balembelwe ukulingana ne nkulo ya kufyalwa kwabo mu mishi yabo. Bakalinda wa mpongolo basontelwe ukuba mu fifulo fyacishinka kuli Davidi na Samwele kamona. 
1Chronicles9:23 Bena pamo na bana babo ebaba ne milimo yakulonda pa mpongolo sha mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, iŋanda iyitwa Itenti lyakwa Yawe." 
1Chronicles9:24 Bakalinda wa pa mpongolo baleiminina mu ncende shine, ku kabanga, ku masamba, ku kapinda ka ku kuso elyo na ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
1Chronicles9:25 Kabili bamunyinabo abaikele mu mishi balaisa mu nshita mu nshita mukukomboshanya imilimo pa nshiku cine lubali. 
1Chronicles9:26 Lelo intungulushi sha bakalinda wa pa mpongolo, abali abena Levi, bena bapeelwe imilimo yakubaka imiputule na matala ya cuma aya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
1Chronicles9:27 Kabili baleikala ubushiku bonse balelonda iŋanda yakwa Lesa, pantu ebalifye ne nsambu shakulonda, ne nsambu shakwisulako cila lucelo." 
1Chronicles9:28 Bamo aba muli bena ebali no mulimo wakusunga ifipe ifyakubomfya mu nshita ya mapepo mwi Tempele. Ebakufipenda lintu bafileta na pakufibweseshamo. 
1Chronicles9:29 Bambi nabo bapeelwe mulimo wakusunga ifipe elyo na fimbi fyonse ifya mu cifulo camushilo, pamo pene no bunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino no mwangashi, na mafuta, ububani ne fyanunka ubusaka." 
1Chronicles9:30 Lelo ni bashimapepofye bamo ebakwete insambu shakusakanya ifyanunka ubusaka. 
1Chronicles9:31 Umwina Levi umo ishina lyakwe Matitiya uwali beli lyakwa Shalumu umwina Kora, ewapeelwe umulimo wakupanga umukate wa mutuulo." 
1Chronicles9:32 Bamunyina bamo aba mu bena Koati ebapeelwe umulimo wakupekanya imikate yakutantama petebulo cila Sabata. 
1Chronicles9:33 Abali bakemba, abakalamba ba ndupwa sha bena Levi, bena baleikala mu miputule ya mwi Tempele kabili balibaleseshe no kubomba imilimo imbi pantu bena bali nokubomba milimo yabo akasuba no bushiku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Bonse aba bali abakalamba ba ndupwa sha bena Levi, intungulushi ukulingana ne nkulo ya kufyalwa kwabo, elyo baikele mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeli wishi wakwa Gibeoni aikele mu Gibeoni. Ishina lya mukashi wakwe ali ni Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 elyo umwana wakwe ibeli ali ni Abudoni. Pakonka Suri, Kishi, Baali, Neri, Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedori, Ahio, Sakaria elyo na Mikiloti." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikiloti ewali wishi wakwa Shimeamu. Nabo bene baikele mupepi na bamunyinabo mu Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neri ewali wishi wakwa Kishi, Kishi nao wishi wakwa Saulo, elyo Saulo nao wishi wakwa Yonatani, Malikishua, Abinadabu na Eshi Baali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Umwana wakwa Yonatani ali ni Meribu Baali, uwali wishi wakwa Mika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Abana bakwa Mika bali ni Pitoni, Meleki, Tarea elyo na Ahasi." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahasi ewafyele Yada, nao Yada afyele Alemeti, Asimafeti na Simuri. Simuri ewali wishi wakwa Mosa." 
1Chronicles9:43 Nao Mosa aba wishi wakwa Binea, nao afyala Refaiya, nao afyala Eleasa elyo nao afyala Aseli." 
1Chronicles9:44 Aseli akwete abana mutanda, na mashina yabo yali ni Asirikamu, Bokeru, Ishimaeli, Sheariya, Obadiya na Hanani. Aba ebali abana bakwa Aseli." 
1Chronicles10:1 Nomba Abafilisiti basansa abena Israeli, na bena Israeli babutuka ukufuma ku cinso ca Bafilisiti elyo na bengi babepaila pa lupili lwa Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilisiti bakonka nganshi mukubutusha Saulo na bana bakwe mpaka baipaya Yonatani, Abinadabu elyo na Malikishua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ulubuli lwabipisha ukushinguluka Saulo. Elyo abaleposa imifwi bamusanga, bamucena." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saulo epakweba uwalesenda ifyanso fyakwe ati, “Somona ulupanga lobe umpwishishishe, pantu aba bantu abashasembululwa kuti baisa mukuncusha.” Lelo uwalesenda ifyanso fyakwe aumfwa umwenso, akaana ukumucita ifyo aebelwe. Kanshi Saulo epakubuula ulupanga lwakwe epo awila aitungako." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ilyo uwalesenda ifyanso fyakwe amona ukuti Saulo afwa, nao abuula ulupanga lwakwe epo awila aitungako afwa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Kanshi Saulo na bana bakwe batatu efyo bafwile, pamo na ba mu ŋanda yakwe bonse." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ilyo abena Israeli abali mwishika bamona ukuti abashilika babutuka elyo Saulo na bana bakwe bafwa, awe nabo basha imishi yabo babutuka. Elyo Abafilisiti emo baisa ikala." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo, ilyo Abafilisiti baishile mukutapa ifintu ku bafwile, baisa sanga Saulo na bana bakwe nabafwa pa lupili lwa Giliboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Bamufuula elyo bamuputulako umutwe, basenda pamo ne fyanso fyakwe, elyo batuma bakabilo mu calo conse ica Bafilisiti mukuma imbila ku tulubi twabo na ku bantu bonse." 
1Chronicles10:10 Babika ifyanso fyakwe mwitempele lya milungu yabo, elyo baya kobeka umutwe wakwe mwitempele lya mulungu wabo Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Ilyo abekalacalo ba mu Yabeshi Gileadi baumfwa fyonse ifyo Abafilisiti bacita kuli Saulo," 
1Chronicles10:12 abaume babo bonse ababulamba baima, baya senda ifitumbi fyakwa Saulo na bana bakwe, bafileta ku Yabeshi. Elyo bashiika amafupa yabo mwisamba lya cimuti cikalamba ica oki mu Yabeshi, bafunga ukulya pa nshiku cine lubali." 
1Chronicles10:13 Saulo afwile pa mulandu wakukanaba ne cishinka kuli Yawe. Alifililwe ukubaka ishiwi lyakwa Yawe elyo asukile afika na mukuya ipusha imipashi ukuti imutungulule. 
1Chronicles10:14 Afililwe ukwipusha Yawe, kanshi Yawe nao epakumwipaya. Elyo asesesha no bufumu kuli Davidi mwana Yese." 
1Chronicles11:1 Elyo abena Israeli balongene bonse pamo kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni no kutila, “Ifwe tuli munofu obe kabili umulopa obe." 
1Chronicles11:2 Ku nshita iyapita, nelyofye Saulo acili mfumu, niwe watungulwile Israeli mu nshita shabulwi. Kabili Yawe Lesa obe asosele kuli iwe ati, ‘Uli nokucema abantu bandi abena Israeli, kabili ukaba kateeka wabo.’”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Ilyo abakalamba bonse aba bena Israeli baisa ku Hebuloni, elyo Davidi apanga nabo icipangano ku Hebuloni pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Elyo basubile Davidi amafuta yakuba imfumu ya bena Israeli, ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyasoselwe muli Samwele." 
1Chronicles11:4 Davidi na bena Israeli bonse baimine no kuya ku Yerusalemu, uko batila Yebusi. Abena Yebusi ebaleikala kulya." 
1Chronicles11:5 Abekashi ba mu Yebusi balanda kuli Davidi abati, “Tawaingilemo muno.” Lelo Davidi apokolola ilinga lya Sioni, nomba uwitwa umusumba wakwa Davidi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Davidi alandile ukuti, “Uyo onse uuletangila mukulwisha abena Yebusi euli nokuba umukalamba wa fita fya nkondo.” Yoabu mwana Seruiya uwabalilepo, efyo apeelwe no kuba umukalamba wa fita." 
1Chronicles11:7 Awe Davidi epakuya ikala mukati ke linga, kabili ni pali ici lyainikilwe ishina umusumba wakwa Davidi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Kabili Davidi akuulamo umusumba ukushinguluka, ukufuma ku fibumbili fyakwikasha ifikulwa ukushinta ku cibumba cashingulwike. Elyo ninshi Yoabu alepwishishisha incende yashele iya musumba." 
1Chronicles11:9 Kabili amaka yakwa Davidi yaleya yalecililakofye, pantu Yawe umwine wa fita ali nankwe." 
1Chronicles11:10 Aba ebali abakalamba ba mpalume shabulwi shakwa Davidi abo akwete. Aba bene pamo na bena Israeli bonse abapeele icikoseleshi icikalamba ku bufumu bwakwe, no kulenga ubufumu bukumane mu calo conse nge shiwi Yawe alaile." 
1Chronicles11:11 Kanshi impalume shabulwi shakwa Davidi ni ishi: Yashobeamu umwana wa mwina Hakimoni, ewali umukalamba uwalemona pa baletungulula abashilika, ewaimishe ifumo lyakwe mukulwisha abantu imyanda itatu (300), abo aipeye pa muku umofye." 
1Chronicles11:12 Uwamukonkelepo ni Eleasa umwana wakwa Dodo, umwina Ahoyi umo pa mpalume shabulwi shitatu." 
1Chronicles11:13 Ali pamo na Davidi pa Pasi Damimu ilyo Abafilisiti balongene mukulwa. Pa ncende apali ibala umwaiswile bale epo abashilika bafulumwike ukufuma ku Bafilisiti. 
1Chronicles11:14 Lelo baya iminina mukati ke bala, balicingilila elyo baipaya na Bafilisiti, kabili Yawe abapeele ukucimfya ukukalamba." 
1Chronicles11:15 Batatu pa ba makumi yatatu (30) abaletungulula abashilika, batentemwike baisa ku cilibwe kuli Davidi ku lucengo lwa Adulamu. Elyo ibumba lya Bafilisiti lyalongene mwishika lya Refaimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Pali ilya nshita Davidi ali mwilinga elyo akamba ka bashilika ba Bafilisiti kali mu Betelemu. 
1Chronicles11:17 Davidi alefwaisha amenshi elyo alanda ati, “Iye, nga kuti umo andetelako amenshi yakunwa ukufuma ku cishima icaba mupepi ne mpongolo ya ku Betelemu!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Kanshi balya batatu epakupula mu mipaka ya Bafilisiti, no kuya tapa amenshi ukufuma mu cishima icali pa mpongolo ya ku Betelemu, baleta na kuli Davidi. Lelo ena akaana ukuti anwe aya menshi. Mu cifulo cakunwa Davidi ayetila ukuba umutuulo pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
1Chronicles11:19 Elyo asosa ati, “Lesa akaanye ukuti ine ncite ici cintu. Bushe kuti nanwa umulopa wa aba bantu uo bacishitikilapo ubumi bwabo?” Pantu bacishitika ubumi bwabo pakuya yaleta. Kanshi Davidi epakukana ukunwa. Ifi efyabombele ishi mpalume shabulwi shitatu." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai munyina kwa Yoabu ewali umukalamba pali ishi shitatu. Ewaimishe ifumo lyakwe pa balwani imyanda itatu (300), abepaya. Elyo aisa ba ne shina ilyalumbuka nga aba bene batatu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Apeelwe umucinshi imiku ibili ukucila pali aba batatu kabili aisa ba umukalamba wabo, nangu cali ukuti tapendelwe pakati kabo." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya umwana wakwa Yehoiyada umwina Kabiseli ali umwaume wine wine mukulwa, uwabombele ifintu ifingi nganshi. Aipeye amalamba ya baume babili abena Moabu. Kabili aya ingila mu cilindi, ninshi kuli na menshi makasa, aipayamo inkalamo." 
1Chronicles11:23 Elyo aipaya no mwina Egupto uwalepele bamita babili na citika. Nangu umwina Egupto akwete ifumo mu minwe yakwe ilyali nge cimuti cakupikwilako insalu, Benaya amulungeme ne nkonto, apokolola ifumo ukufuma mu minwe ya mwina Egupto no kumwipaila kwifumo lyakwe line." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ifi efyabombele Benaya mwana Yehoiyada. Nao wine ali no lulumbi nge mpalume shabulwi shitatu. 
1Chronicles11:25 Apeelwe umucinshi uukalamba nganshi ukucila na pa baume bene bene amakumi yatatu (30) abaletungulula abashilika, lelo tapendelwe pali shilya shitatu. Awe Davidi epakumubika ukuba kangalila wa bakumulinda." 
1Chronicles11:26 Impalume shabulwi shali ni ishi. Asaeli munyina wakwa Yoabu, Elianani umwana mwaume wakwa Dodo uwa ku Betelemu," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamoti umwina Harori, Helesi umwina Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira umwana mwaume wakwa Ikeshi uwa ku Tekoa, Abiesa uwa ku Anatoti," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai umwina Hushati, Ilai umwina Ahoyi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharayi umwina Netofa, Heledi umwana mwaume wakwa Baanaya umwina Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai umwana mwaume wakwa Ribai uwa ku Gibea muli Benjamini. Benaya umwina Piratoni," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai uwa ku tumimana twa Gaashi, Abieli umwina Aribati," 
1Chronicles11:33 Asimafeti umwina Baharumi, Eliaba umwina Shaaliboni," 
1Chronicles11:34 abana baume bakwa Hashemu umwina Gisoni, Yonatani umwana mwaume wakwa Shage umwina Harari," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiamu umwana mwaume wakwa Sakari umwina Harari, Elifalu umwana mwaume wakwa Uri," 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefa umwina Makerati, Ahiya umwina Peloni," 
1Chronicles11:37 Hesiro umwina Kameli, Naarai mwana Esibai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yoeli munyina wakwa Natani, Mibiya umwana mwaume wakwa Hagiri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Seleki umwina Amoni, Naharai umwina Beroti, uwalesenda ifyanso fya bulwi ifyakwa Yoabu umwina Seruiya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira umwina Itira, Garebu umwina Itira," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria umwina Hiti, Sabadi mwana Ahilai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina mwana Shisa umwina Rubeni uwali umukalamba wa bena Rubeni elyo na ba makumi yatatu (30) abo ali nabo," 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanani mwana Maaka, Yoshafati umwina Mitini," 
1Chronicles11:44 Usia umwina Ashiterati, Shama elyo na Yeli bamwana Hotamu umwina Aroeli," 
1Chronicles11:45 Yedieli mwana Shimuri, munyina Yoha umwina Tisi," 
1Chronicles11:46 Elieli umwina Mahafi, Yeribai na Yoshafia bamwana Elinamu, na Itima umwina Moabu," 
1Chronicles11:47 Elieli, Obedi elyo na Yasieli umwina Mesoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Aba e baume abaishile kuli Davidi ku Sikilagi, ilyo aile belama ukufuma ku cinso cakwa Saulo mwana Kishi. Bali pebumba lya bashilika abamaka abamwafwileko mu nkondo." 
1Chronicles12:2 Bakwete amata kabili bali abacenjela ukuposa imifwi nangu ukulasa amabwe ku kuboko kwa ku kulyo nangu ku kuso. Bali bamunyina wakwa Saulo ukufuma ku ba mu nko shakwa Benjamini. 
1Chronicles12:3 Uwali umukalamba ni Ahiesa elyo pakonka Yoashi, bamwana Shema umwina Gibeati, elyo Yesieli na Peleti abana bakwa Asimafeti, Beraka na Yehu abena Anatoti." 
1Chronicles12:4 Elyo ni Ishimaiya umwina Gibeoni, umwaume uwabulamba pakati ka ba makumi yatatu (30), kabili uwali ntungulushi pa ba makumi yatatu (30), Yeremia, Yahasieli, Yohanani, Yosabadi umwina Gederati," 
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai, Yerimoti, Bealiya, Shemariya elyo na Shefatiya umwina Harufi," 
1Chronicles12:6 Elikana, Ishiya, Asareli, Yoesa elyo na Yashobeamu umwina Kora," 
1Chronicles12:7 elyo Yoeli na Sebadia abana bakwa Yerohamu uwa ku Gedori. 
1Chronicles12:8 Bamo abena Gadi bapatukila kuli Davidi pa ncende ye linga iyo aikelepo mu matololo. Bali abashilika abacenjela, abaiteyanya kukulwa kabili abacenjela ukubomfya inkwela ne fumo. Impumi shabo shali nge sha nkalamo elyo ku lubilo bali nge nama sha mu mpili." 
1Chronicles12:9 Eseri ewali umukalamba, Obadiya ewakonkelepo mu bukalamba, Eliabu ewali uwacitatu." 
1Chronicles12:10 Mishimana ewali uwabune, Yeremia ewabusano," 
1Chronicles12:11 Atai ewalenga mutanda, Elieli ewalenga cine lubali," 
1Chronicles12:12 Yohanani ewalenga cine konse konse, Elisabadi ewalenga pabula," 
1Chronicles12:13 Yeremia ewalenga ikumi limo na Makibanai ewalenga ikumi limo na umo (11). 
1Chronicles12:14 Aba abena Gadi bali abakalamba ba fita fya nkondo. Uwacepeshe alingene na bantu umwanda umo (100), no wakulishepo alingene na bantu ikana limo (1,000)." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ni aba bene ebayabwike umumana wa Yordani mu mweshi wakutendeka, ninshi nawisula mu ncende shonse ishauko no kuya fulumunamo abantu bonse abaleikala mu mawanga, ku kabanga elyo na ku masamba." 
1Chronicles12:16 Bambi abena Benjamini na baume bambi ukufuma ku Yuda nabo baisa kuli Davidi pa ncende yakwe iye linga. 
1Chronicles12:17 Davidi afuma aya mukubakumanya no kuya beba ati, “Nga cakuti mwishile kuli ine mu mutende, mukwisa ngafwa, ine ndi uwaiteyanya ukuti tupuminkane nenu. Lelo nga cakuti mwishile mukumposa mu minwe ya balwani bandi ilyo iminwe yandi ili iyakaele ku fyabulwi, cibe ukuti Lesa wa bashifwe amone no kumupingula.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Elyo umupashi waisa pali Amasai, uwali umukalamba pa ba makumi yatatu (30), elyo walanda auti, “Tuli bobe we Davidi, tuli na iwe we mwana wakwa Yese! Ukucimfya ukwamaka kube na iwe, kabili ukucimfya kube kuli abo abali nokukwafwa, pantu Lesa obe ali nokukwafwa.” Kanshi Davidi epakubapokelela ababika no kuba intungulushi sha fita fyakwe." 
1Chronicles12:19 Abaume bamo aba muli Manase bapatukile kuli Davidi ilyo aile na Bafilisiti mukulwisha Saulo. Lelo ena na bantu bakwe tabayafwile Abafilisiti, pantu panuma yakulandishanya bakateeka ba Bafilisiti balimutamfishe. Balandile ukuti, “Tukashitisha imitwe yesu nga cakuti apatukila kuli Saulo shikulu wakwe.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Ilyo Davidi aile ku Sikilagi, kwaliko abaume bakwa Manase abapilibukile kuli ena, naba bonse ni aba: Adina, Yosabadi, Yediaeli, Mikaeli, Yosabadi, Elihu na Siletai abali intungulushi sha makana ya bena Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Bayafwile Davidi ukulwisha abalesansa, pantu bonsefye bali abacenjela mukulwa, kabili bali abakalamba mu bashilika." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ubushiku no bushiku abaume baleisa mukwafwa Davidi mpakafye akwata abashilika abengi, kwati bashilika bakwa Lesa." 
1Chronicles12:23 Iyi eyali e mpendwa ya baume ababulwi kabili abaishile kuli Davidi ku Hebuloni mukwisa mwafwako ukufumya ubufumu kuli Saulo ukwisa kuli ena, ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe asosele." 
1Chronicles12:24 Abana abakwa Yuda abakusenda inkwela elyo na mafumo bali amakana mutanda ne myanda cine konse konse (6,800)."
