1Chronicles12:25 Abana abakwa Simeoni, abamaka, impalume bali amakana cine lubali no mwanda umo (7,100)." 
1Chronicles12:26 Abaume aba muli Levi bali amakana yane ne myanda mutanda (4,600)." 
1Chronicles12:27 Kabili Yehoiyada, intungulushi ya ba mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni ali na baume amakana yatatu ne myanda cine lubali, (3,700)." 
1Chronicles12:28 Elyo Sadoki umulumendo, umushilika wacenjela, ali na bacilolo ukufuma mu ba mu lupwa lwakwa wishi, amakumi yabili na babili (22)." 
1Chronicles12:29 Abaume aba muli Benjamini aba mu lupwa lwakwa Saulo, abashele abamupetamina ukufikafye na pali ilya ine inshita, bali amakana yatatu (3,000)." 
1Chronicles12:30 Abaume abena Efulemu abacenjela ukulwa, kabili abaishibikwa nganshi mu mikowa yabo, bali amakana amakumi yabili ne myanda cine konse konse (20,800)." 
1Chronicles12:31 Abaume abali citika wa luko lwa bena Manase, abalumbwilwe amashina kukwisa bika Davidi pa bufumu bali amakana ikumi na cine konse konse (18,000)." 
1Chronicles12:32 Abaume aba muli Isaka abaishibe inshita no kwishiba ifyo abena Israeli bafwile ukucita, bali imyanda ibili (200) abakalamba pamo na ba mu ndupwa shabo abo balelinda." 
1Chronicles12:33 Abaume aba muli Sebuloni, abashilika abaishiba kabili abaiteyanya ukulwa inkondo mukubomfya ifyanso ifili fyonse abakwafwa Davidi ne mitima yabo yonse, bali amakana amakumi yasano (50,000)." 
1Chronicles12:34 Abaume aba muli Naftali bali bacilolo ikana limo (1,000), pamo na baume amakana amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37,000), abakusenda inkwela na mafumo." 
1Chronicles12:35 Abaume aba muli Dani abali abaiteyanya ku nkondo, bali amakana amakumi yabili na cine konse konse ne myanda mutanda (28,600)." 
1Chronicles12:36 Abaume aba muli Asheri abashilika abaishiba kabili abaiteyanya ukulwa inkondo, bali amakana amakumi yane (40,000)." 
1Chronicles12:37 Elyo ukufuma ku kabanga ku Yordani, abaume aba muli Rubeni, Gadi, elyo na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase, abaipekenye no musango onse uwa fyanso fyakulwilako, bali amakana umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120,000)." 
1Chronicles12:38 Bonse aba, bali baume ba nkondo abaipeeleshe ukubomba mu fifulo fya milimo. Ebaishile ku Hebuloni abapambana nganshi mukwisa bika Davidi pa bufumu bwa mu Israeli. Elyo na bonse abena Israeli balifye no mutima umo uwakubika Davidi pa bufumu." 
1Chronicles12:39 Aba baume bali kulya inshiku shitatu pamo na Davidi, balelya no kunwa, pantu indupwa shabo shalibapekanishisheko ifyakulya." 
1Chronicles12:40 Kabili abena mupalamano babo, abakufuma ku ncende shakutali pamo nga ku Isaka, Sebuloni elyo na ku Naftali, baletele ifyakulya pali bakabalwe, bapunda, ingamila ne ŋombe. Baletele ifyakulya ifingi, ubunga bwa ŋanu, amakunyu, umusangulo wa myangashi, amafuta, iŋombe elyo ne mpaanga pantu kwali ukusekelela ukukalamba nganshi mu Israeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 Davidi alandishenye na bacilolo bakwe na bakalamba ba pa fita amakana (1,000) na ba pa fita imyanda (100) elyo ne ntungulushi iyili yonse." 
1Chronicles13:2 Elyo Davidi aeba abena Israeli bonse abo alongenye ati, “Nga cakuti calolamo kuli imwe, elyo nga cakuti cili ubufwayo bwakwa Yawe Lesa wesu, natutume ishiwi kuli bamunyinefwe bonse abali ukutali na mu ncende ishasalangana mu calo conse ica Israeli, na kuli bashimapepo na bena Levi abo bali nabo mu mishi yabo ne fitungu ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa fyabo, bakese longana na ifwe." 
1Chronicles13:3 Elyo tuye bwesha ne Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa wesu kuno tuli pantu tatwaleipushapo mu nshiku sha bufumu bwakwa Saulo.” 
1Chronicles13:4 Awe abantu bonse basumina ukucita ifi, pantu calisekeshe abantu bonse." 
1Chronicles13:5 Kanshi Davidi epakulonganika abena Israeli bonse, ukufuma ku mumana wa Shihori mu Egupto ukufika ku Lebo Hamati, kukuya senda Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa ukufuma ku Kiriati Yarimu." 
1Chronicles13:6 Davidi na bena Israeli bonse baya ku Baala uwaba mu Yuda ku Kiriati Yarimu mukuya senda Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa iyitwa peshina lyakwa Yawe uwaikala pa kati ka bakerubi. 
1Chronicles13:7 Basenda Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Abinadabu peceleta ilipya, ninshi Usa na Ahio baletungulula." 
1Chronicles13:8 Davidi na bena Israeli bonse balasefya na maka yabo yonse pa cinso cakwa Lesa, baleimba inyimbo balelisha amaseese, insango, insombo, imiwaya na mapenga." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ilyo bafika pa lubansa lwakutwilapo ulwa ku Kidoni, Usa atambika ukuboko kukubika bwino Imbokoshi, pantu iŋombe shapene ukuwa." 
1Chronicles13:10 Lelo Yawe afulilwa nganshi Usa, amwipaya, pantu atambike ukuboko kwakwe ku Mbokoshi ya Cipangano. Afwila na palya pene pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
1Chronicles13:11 Elyo Davidi nao afulwa pa mulandu wa cipyu cakwa Yawe pali Usa. Kabili ukufika na pali buno bushiku ilya ncende itwa ukuti ni Peresi Usa. 
1Chronicles13:12 Davidi atiinine Lesa pali bulya bushiku, aipusha ati, “Bushe kuti naleta shani Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa kumwandi?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Davidi afilwa ukusenda Imbokoshi ukuisunga mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Lelo asenda aya sha ku ŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu umwina Gati. 
1Chronicles13:14 Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa yashele ku lupwa lwakwa Obedi Edomu pa myeshi itatu mu ŋanda yakwe. Elyo Yawe apaalile iŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu ne fintu fyonse ifyo akwete. 
1Chronicles14:1 Nomba Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi yatumine inkombe kuli Davidi, pamo ne fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda na bakusona mabwe elyo na bakabasa wa mbao abakwisa kuula isano lyakwe." 
1Chronicles14:2 Kabili Davidi aishiba nokuti Yawe namwimika ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli, kabili nokutila ubufumu bwakwe nabusumbulwa nganshi pa mulandu wa bantu baiko abena Israeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Mu Yerusalemu Davidi aupile abakashi na bambi. Akwata na bambi abana abaume na banakashi. 
1Chronicles14:4 Aya e mashina ya bana bakwe abafyelwe kuli ena mu Yerusalemu: Shamua, Shobabu, Natani, Solomoni," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibihali, Elishua, Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefegi, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Beeliyada elyo na Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ilyo Abafilisiti baumfwile ukuti Davidi nasubwa ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli, baimine bonse mu maka ukuya balefwaya Davidi. Lelo Davidi alyumfwile pali ifi, nao aima kukuya bakumanya." 
1Chronicles14:9 Nomba Abafilisiti balishile no kusansa ishika lya Refaimu. 
1Chronicles14:10 Elyo Davidi aipusha Lesa ati, “Bushe kuti nanina no kuya sansa Abafilisiti? Bushe kuti wabapeela mu minwe yandi?” Yawe amwasuka ati, “Kabiye, ndi nokubapeela mu minwe yobe.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Kanshi Davidi na bantu bakwe epakwima baya ku Bali Perasimu, na Davidi eko aya bacimfisha. Elyo Davidi asosa nokuti, “Ngefyo amenshi yapongoloka, Lesa napongolokela pa balwani bandi ukupitila mu kuboko kwandi.” Kanshi epakwita ilya ncende ati Baali Perasimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilisiti baposele imilungu yabo kulya kwine, na Davidi apeele icipope cakuti bayoce mu mulilo." 
1Chronicles14:13 Kabili Abafilisiti babwekeshepo ukusansa aba mu mukonko. 
1Chronicles14:14 Elyo Davidi epakwipusha Lesa, kabili na Lesa amwasuka ati, “Wibalungama pakunina pamulu, lelo ubashinguluke elyo ubasanse ku ntanshi ya fimuti fya basamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ilyofye uleumfwa iciunda ca nshindo pa mulu wa fimuti fya basamu, elyo uli nokuya mukulwa, pantu Lesa naima mukukutangilila, mukusansa ifita fya nkondo ifya Bafilisiti.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Kanshi Davidi epakucita ifyo Lesa amukonkomeshe, kabili aipeye ifita fya nkondo ifya Bafilisiti, inshila yonse ukufuma ku Gibeoni ukufika ku Gesa." 
1Chronicles14:17 Kanshi ululumbi lwakwa Davidi epakusalangana mpanga yonse, na Yawe alenga imishobo yonse ukulamutiina." 
1Chronicles15:1 Panuma Davidi apwile ukukuula ifikulwa fyakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Kabili apekenye ne ncende yakwikalamo Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa, no kushimpa Itenti lyaiko." 
1Chronicles15:2 Elyo Davidi asosa ati, “Takuli nangu umbi, lelo kanofye abena Levi ebakusenda Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa, pantu ebo asala ukusenda Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe elyo no kubomba pa cinso cakwe umuyayaya.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Davidi alonganika abena Israeli bonse mu Yerusalemu mukuya senda Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe ukuleta ku ncende uko ifwile ukwikala. 
1Chronicles15:4 Elyo Davidi alonganika pamo aba mu ndupwa shakwa Aroni, elyo na bena Levi." 
1Chronicles15:5 Ukufuma ku ba mu ndupwa shakwa Koati ni Urieli uwali intungulushi ya bamunyina abali umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120). 
1Chronicles15:6 Ukufuma ku ba mu ndupwa shakwa Merari ni Asaiya uwali intungulushi ya bamunyina abali imyanda ibili na makumi yabili (220). 
1Chronicles15:7 Ukufuma ku ba mu ndupwa shakwa Geshoni ni Yoeli uwali intungulushi ya bamunyina abali umwanda umo na makumi yatatu (130). 
1Chronicles15:8 Ukufuma ku ba mu ndupwa shakwa Elisafani ni Shemaiya uwali intungulushi ya bamunyina abali imyanda ibili (200). 
1Chronicles15:9 Ukufuma ku ba mu ndupwa shakwa Hebuloni bali ni Elieli uwali intungulushi ya bamunyina abali amakumi cine konse konse (80). 
1Chronicles15:10 Ukufuma kuba mu ndupwa shakwa Usieli ni Aminadabu uwali intungulushi ya bamunyina umwanda umo, ikumi limo na babili (112)." 
1Chronicles15:11 Elyo Davidi aita Sadoki na Abiyata nga bashimapepo elyo Urieli, Asaiya, Yoeli, Shemaiya, Elieli na Aminadabu nga bena Levi." 
1Chronicles15:12 Abeba ati, “Nimwe ntungulushi sha ndupwa sha bena Levi, eico imwe na bamunyinenwe abena Levi muisangulule mwe bene elyo muye leta Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, ku ncende iyo mpekanishishe iyi Mbokoshi." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ici cali ifi pantu imwe mwe bena Levi tamwaile buula Imbokoshi pa muku wantanshi icalengele nokuti Yawe Lesa wesu emye ubukali pali ifwe. Tatwaipwishe kuli ena ifyo twali nokucita mu nshila iyatunguluka.” 
1Chronicles15:14 Kanshi bashimapepo na bena Levi epakuisangulula pakuti babe abakuya leta Imbokoshi yakwa Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Elyo abena Levi baya senda Imbokoshi yakwa Lesa, babikile ifimuti fyakupingilako pa mabeya yabo, ngefyo Mose abakonkomeshe ukulingana ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe." 
1Chronicles15:16 Davidi aeba intungulushi sha bena Levi ukusonta bamunyinabo abakwimba inyimbo ishakusekelela, ishakwimbila pamo ne nsango, amaseese elyo ne miwaya." 
1Chronicles15:17 Kanshi abena Levi epakusonta Hemani mwana Yoeli, kabili ukufuma pali bamunyina basonta Asafu mwana Berekiya, elyo ukufuma muli bamunyinabo abena Merari ni Etani mwana Kushaiya." 
1Chronicles15:18 Elyo abo bali nabo ni bamunyinabo ababakonkelepo mu fifulo: Sakaria, Yaasieli, Shemiramoti, Yehieli, Uni, Eliabu, Benaya, Maaseya, Matitiya, Elifelehu, Mikineya, Obedi Edom elyo na Yeyeli bakalinda wa mpongolo." 
1Chronicles15:19 Abakwimba inyimbo, Hemani, Asafu na Etoni, ebali abakulisha imiwaya ya mukuba." 
1Chronicles15:20 Sakaria, Asieli, Shemiramoti, Yehieli, Unni, Eliabu, Maaseya elyo na Benaya ebali abakulisha insango ukulingana na Alamoti." 
1Chronicles15:21 Matitiya, Elifelehu, Mikineiya, Obedi, Edomu, Yeli elyo na Asasiya ebali abakulisha amaseese ukutangilila ukulingana na Sheminiti." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya umukalamba wa bena Levi ewaletungulula pakwimba. Iyi eyali imilimo yakwe pantu ali uwaishibisha nganshi. 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiya na Elikana ebalelinda pa mwinshi wa muputule umwali Imbokoshi ya Cipangano. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebaniya, Yoshafate, Netaneli, Amasai, Sakaria, Benaya na Eliese bashimapepo ebakulisha amapenga pa cinso ca Mbokoshi yakwa Lesa. Obedi Edomu na Yehiya nabo bene ebalelinda umwinshi wakwingilila ku Mbokoshi." 
1Chronicles15:25 Kanshi Davidi na bakalamba ba mu Israeli, elyo na bakalamba ba fita ikana limo (1,000) baya no kuya leta Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe, ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Obedi Edomu abasansamuka." 
1Chronicles15:26 Pantu Lesa alyafwile abena Levi abasendele Mbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe, batuulile iŋombe ishilume cine lubali elyo na basukusuku cine lubali." 
1Chronicles15:27 Nomba Davidi afwele umwingila wa nsalu ishapikulwa ubusaka, ngefyo cali ku bena Levi abasendele Imbokoshi elyo na bakwimba, na Kenaniya uwaletungulula bakemba wa nyimbo. Kabili Davidi afwele icakufwala ca pa mulu wa mwingila ica efodi." 
1Chronicles15:28 Kanshi abena Israeli bonse epakuleta Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe no tupundu ne ciunda ca ku cipuuta ca nsengo sha basukusuku na ku mapenga elyo no kulisha imiwaya, amaseese ne nsango." 
1Chronicles15:29 Cilya Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe yaba pakwingila mu musumba wakwa Davidi, Mika umwana umwanakashi wakwa Saulo ninshi eminine pa nsolokoto epo aletambila. Ilyo amwene uko imfumu Davidi ilecinda no kusefya, ena amususha mu mutima wakwe." 
1Chronicles16:1 Awe baletele Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa, baisa ibika mukati ke tenti lyakwa Lesa lintu Davidi aimike umwakwisa ifikilisha. Elyo batuula amalambo ya cakoca ne mituulo yakwampana pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
1Chronicles16:2 Panuma yakupwisha ukutuula amalambo ya cakoca ne mituulo yakwampana, Davidi epakupaala abantu mwishina lyakwa Yawe." 
1Chronicles16:3 Elyo apeela abena Israeli bonse umwaume no mwanakashi umukate umo umo, icimamantwa ca tuncindu cimo cimo elyo ne cimamantwa ca myangashi cimo cimo." 
1Chronicles16:4 Davidi asonta bamo abena Levi ukubomba pa cinso ca Mbokoshi yakwa Yawe umulimo wakulombelako, ukutotela elyo no kulumbanya Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ewali intungulushi, uwacibili ni Sakaria, pakonka Yoeli, Shemiramoti, Yehieli, Matitiya, Eliabu, Benaya, Obedi Edomu elyo na Yeli. Ebali abakulisha amaseese ne nsango, Asafu ewali uwakulisha imiwaya." 
1Chronicles16:6 Elyo Benaya na Yahasieli bashimapepo ebali abakulisha amapenga inshita ne nshita pa ntanshi ya Mbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Lesa. 
1Chronicles16:7 Pa bushiku bwine bulya Davidi abalilepo ukupeela Asafu na bamunyina ulu lwimbo ulwakutotela kuli Yawe ulwakuti: 
1Chronicles16:8 “Akutoteleni Yawe! Mulekuuta peshina lyakwe. Muleshimikilako ne mishobo ya benafyalo ifyo acita. 
1Chronicles16:9 Mulemwimbila, muleimba isha malumbo, mulelanda pa fintu ifyakupapa ifyo acita." 
1Chronicles16:10 Mulesekelela mwishina lyakwe ilyamushilo. Muleleka imitima ya bafwaya Yawe ilesansamuka. 
1Chronicles16:11 Mulelolesha kuli Yawe na ku maka yakwe, mulefwaya icinso cakwe inshiku shonse." 
1Chronicles16:12 Muleibukisha ifipeshamano ifyo acita, mwilalaba ifinjelengwe no bupingushi bwakwe ubo alanda." 
1Chronicles16:13 Mwe bufyashi bwakwa Israeli umubomfi wakwa Yawe, imwe bamwana Yakobo, mwebo aisalilafye." 
1Chronicles16:14 “Ena ni Yawe, e Lesa wesu. Ubupingushi bwakwe bwaba pano isonde ponse." 
1Chronicles16:15 Alebukisha icipangano cakwe umuyayaya, icebo ico akonkomesha ku nkulo ikana limo (1,000)." 
1Chronicles16:16 E cipangano ico apangene na Abrahamu, umulapo alapile kuli Isaki." 
1Chronicles16:17 Acifikilishepo kuli Yakobo ukuba icipope, ukuti cikabe icakubelelela pe kuli Israeli mukutila," 
1Chronicles16:18 ‘Kuli iwe ine nkapeela icalo ca Kenani, ecikaba icuma cobe icabupyani.’" 
1Chronicles16:19 “Ilyo mwali abampendwa iyinono, mu cine cinefye abanono nganshi, kabili abeni muli ici calo." 
1Chronicles16:20 Abaleendauka ukufuma ku mushobo umo ukuya ku mushobo ubiye kabili ukufuma ku bufumu bumo na ku bufumu bubiye. 
1Chronicles16:21 Nomba Yawe tasuminishe nangu umo ukuti alebacusha, pakubacingilila alekalipila bashamfumu." 
1Chronicles16:22 Atile, ‘Kwiba uwakwikata mu basubwa bandi abo nasala, kwiba uwakucusha bakasesema bandi.’" 
1Chronicles16:23 “Imbileni Yawe mweba pano isonde bonse, mulebila ukupususha kwakwe akasuba na kasuba." 
1Chronicles16:24 Mulesabankanya ubucindami bwakwe mu mishobo yonse, muleshimikilako abantu bonse ificitwa fyakwe ifyamaka." 
1Chronicles16:25 Pantu Yawe alipulamisha kabili ewalinga ukulumbanya, ewakukwatila akatiina ukucila imilungu yonse." 
1Chronicles16:26 Pantu imilungu yonse iya mishobo tulubifye, lelo Yawe ewabumba imyulu." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ubucindami no bupulami fyaba pa cinso cakwe. Amaka no kusekelela efyaba mu cifulo cakwe. 
1Chronicles16:28 Mulelondolola ubulumbwa bwa bulamba bwakwa Yawe mwe ndupwa sha mishobo, mulelondolola ubulumbwa bwa bucindami bwakwa Yawe na maka yakwe." 
1Chronicles16:29 Mulelondolola ubulumbwa ubwalinga ishina lyakwa Yawe, muleleta no mutuulo pakwisa pa cinso cakwe. Mulepepa Yawe mu bucindami bwamushilo wakwe." 
1Chronicles16:30 Muletutuma pa cinso cakwe bonse mwe ba pano isonde. Isonde lyonse lyalishimpwa bwino, talingaseshiwa." 
1Chronicles16:31 Lekeni imyulu isansamuke ne sonde lisekelele, lekeni balande ku mishobo ya benafyalo ukuti, ‘Yawe euteeka.’" 
1Chronicles16:32 Lekeni bemba afumye iciunda pamo na fyonse ifya bamo, lekeni impanga yange pamo na fyonse ifya bamo." 
1Chronicles16:33 Elyo ifimuti fya mu mutengo fili nokwimba ne nsansa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pantu aisa mukupingula aba pano isonde." 
1Chronicles16:34 “Muletotela Yawe, pantu ena musuma, ne citemwiko cakwe camuyayaya." 
1Chronicles16:35 Kuteni amuti, ‘Tupususheko we Lesa umupusushi wesu. Tulonganike no kutufumya mu benafyalo, pakuti tupeele ukutotela ishina lyobe ilyamushilo, pakuti tukulumbanye mukutotela.’" 
1Chronicles16:36 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, ukufuma ku muyayaya ukufika na ku muyayaya!” Elyo abantu bonse batile, “Ameni! ” Kabili, “Shi nalumbanishiwe Yawe.”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Davidi epakusha Asafu na bamunyina pa cinso ca Mbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe pakubomba imilimo yabo inshita yonse ukulingana ne fyalefwaikwa cila bushiku. 
1Chronicles16:38 Kabili asha Obedi Edomu na bamunyina amakumi mutanda na cine konse konse (68) abakubomba nabo. Obedi Edomu mwana Yedutuni elyo na Hosa ebali abakulinda pa mpongolo. 
1Chronicles16:39 David asha Sadoki shimapepo na bashimapepo banankwe pa cinso ce Tenti lyakwa Yawe ilyali pa ncende yakupepelamo iyo balecindika mu Gibeoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 mukulatuula amalambo yakoca kuli Yawe pa bulambo bwakocelapo pa nshita yonse, akacelo elyo ne cungulo, ukulingana ne fyalembwa fyonse mu mafunde yakwa Yawe ayo apeele abena Israeli." 
1Chronicles16:41 Abali nabo ni Hemani na Yedutuni elyo na bashala bonse abo abasalilwe elyo no kusontwa mu mashina yabo ukulapeela ukutotela kuli Yawe, “Pantu ukutemwa kwakwe kwamuyayaya.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani na Yedutuni ebali no mulimo wakulisha amapenga, imiwaya na fimbi ifya nyimbo shakwa Lesa. Abana bakwa Yedutuni ebalelinda pa mpongolo." 
1Chronicles16:43 Elyo abantu bonse basalangene, cila muntu alungama kumwakwe. Elyo Davidi abwelelamo kumwakwe mukuya paala ulupwa lwakwe." 
1Chronicles17:1 Nomba ilyo Davidi aikele bwino mwisano lyakwe, aeba Natani kasesema ati, “Mona ine ninjikala mwisano lya fimuti fya keda, nomba Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe ili mwitenti.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani ayaswike Davidi ati, “Conse ico uli naco mu mano cita, pantu Lesa ali na iwe.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Bulya bwine ubushiku ishiwi lyakwa Lesa lyaisa kuli Natani aliti," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Kabiye webe umubomfi wandi Davidi auti, ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Teiwe uli nokunkuulila iŋanda iyakwikalamo.’" 
1Chronicles17:5 Ine nshatala njikala mu ŋanda ukutula pa bushiku nafumishe abena Israeli mu Egupto ukushinta ilelo. Ine nyendafye ukufuma pa ncende imo ukuya pa ncende imbi, ukufuma pa nsakwe imo ukuya pa ibiye." 
1Chronicles17:6 Monsefye umo nyendauka na bena Israeli bonse, bushe nalitala njebapo abapingushi ba bena Israeli abo nakonkomesha ukucema abantu bandi nati, ‘Cinshi ico mushankuulila iŋanda ya fimuti fya keda?’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Eico nomba, eba umubomfi wandi Davidi utile, ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, ‘Nakusendele ukufuma mu mpanga ya mulemfwe, na mukukonka umukuni wa mpaanga, kukwisa ba kateeka pa bantu bandi abena Israeli." 
1Chronicles17:8 Lyonse mbafye na iwe konse uko wapitila, kabili nalipwisha abalwani bonse pa cinso cobe. Nomba ndi nokulenga ishina lyobe ukuba ilyalulumbi, kwati mashina ya bantu abacindami aba mwisonde." 
1Chronicles17:9 Kabili nkapekanya incende iya bantu bandi abena Israeli, iyakuti emo nkababike pakuti bakaikwatile icifulo cabo umo bashakalebasunkanya. Abantu imbifi tabakatale ababacusha nakabili, ngefyo balecita kukutendeka," 
1Chronicles17:10 ukutulafye apo nasontele abapingushi ukuba intungulushi pa bantu bandi abena Israeli. Kabili nkacimfya na balwani bobe. “‘Elyo na ine ne Yawe ndi nokukukuulila iŋanda. 
1Chronicles17:11 Inshiku shobe nga shapwa elyo ukaye ukwalala ifikolwe fyobe, nkemya aba mu bufyashi bobe ukukupyana, umo uwa pa bana bobe, kabili nkakosha ubufumu bwakwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ena euli nokunkuulila iŋanda, kabili ndi nokukosha icipuna ca bufumu bwakwe umuyayaya." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ine nkaba wishi, elyo na ena akaba umwana wandi. Kabili nshakatale mfumya ukutemwa kwandi pali ena, nga filya nafumishe ukutemwa kwandi pali ulya wapyana." 
1Chronicles17:14 Nkamwimika pa milimo ya mu ŋanda yandi ne ya bufumu bwandi umuyayaya, ne cipuna ca bufumu bwakwe cikashimpwa umuyayaya.’”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Awe Natani epakuya sosa amashiwi aya yonse kuli Davidi no kumulondolwela ubusokololo bonse. 
1Chronicles17:16 Elyo imfumu Davidi yaingile mukati no kwikala ku cinso cakwa Yawe, yasosa aiti, “Bushe ine nine ani, we Yawe Lesa, kabili ulupwa lwandi luli cintu nshi pakuti undete apalepa fino?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Kabili kwati ifi fyacepa mu kumona kobe we Lesa, walanda na pa mulandu wa mikalile ya kuntanshi iya ŋanda ya mubomfi obe. Umwene kwati ndi umo umwaume uwacindama nganshi, we Yawe Lesa." 
1Chronicles17:18 “Bushe finshi fimbi ificilile apa Davidi engasosa kuli iwe? Pantu walishiba umubomfi obe. 
1Chronicles17:19 We Yawe, pa mulandu wa mubomfi obe, elyo ukulingana no bufwayo bobe, wancitila ici cintu icakulisha ifi, no kulenga ubulayo bobe bwishibikwe." 
1Chronicles17:20 Takwaba umbi uwaba nga iwe we Yawe, kabili takwaba Lesa umbi, kanofye iwe, ngefyo twayumfwila na matwi yesu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Kabili ni bani ababa nga bantu bobe abena Israeli pano isonde? Bushe kwaliba umushobo na umbi uo Lesa wabo aimine ukuya ilubwila nga bantu abakwe umwine, no kucindamika ishina lyobe? Bushe kwaliba bambi abo Lesa wabo alecitila ifipeshamano ifikulu elyo ne fyakutiinya mukutamfya imishobo ku cinso ca bantu bobe, abo walubula ukufuma ku Egupto?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Walengele abantu bobe abena Israeli ukuba abantu bobe umuyayaya, kabili iwe, we Yawe waisa ba Lesa wabo." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Elyo nomba we Yawe ubake pe na pe icilayo ico walaya palwa mubomfi obe pamo ne ŋanda yakwe. Cita ukulingana no kulaya kobe 
1Chronicles17:24 pakuti fibelelele, elyo ne shina lyobe likabe ilyacindama umuyayaya. Elyo abantu bakatila, ‘Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wa mu Israeli, e Lesa wa bena Israeli!’ Kabili iŋanda ya mubomfi obe Davidi ili nokubelelela pa cinso cobe." 
1Chronicles17:25 “Iwe, we Lesa wandi, nausokolola ku mubomfi obe ukuti uli nokumukuulila iŋanda. Eico umubomfi obe asangila ukushipa pakupepa kuli iwe." 
1Chronicles17:26 We Yawe, icine cine uli Lesa, walilaya ifintu ifi ifisuma ku mubomfi obe." 
1Chronicles17:27 Nomba nacikusekesha ukupaala iŋanda ya mubomfi obe, pakuti ikabe iyakubelelela pa cinso cobe. Pantu iwe we Yawe naupaala, eico ili nokuba iyapaalwa umuyayaya.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Nomba panuma ya ifi fintu, Davidi alwishishe Abafilisiti no kubacimfya elyo apoka umusumba wa Gati ne mishi yonse iyaushingulwike ukufuma mu maboko ya Bafilisiti." 
1Chronicles18:2 Elyo Davidi acimfya abena Moabu, balamunakila, bayamba no kulasonka umusonko." 
1Chronicles18:3 Kabili Davidi acimfya Hadadesa imfumu ya ku Soba, ukuya fikafye na ku Hamati, ilyo aile kukupoka icalo ukufika ku lulamba lwa mumana wa Yufurate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Davidi apokolola amaceleta yakwa Hadadesa ikana limo (1,000), bakensha ba maceleta amakana cine lubali (7,000), elyo ifita fya pa makasa nafyo amakana amakumi yabili (20,000). Kabili Davidi alemanika bakabalwe ba maceleta bonse, ashapofye umwanda umo (100)." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ilyo abena Aramu aba ku Damasiko baishile mukwafwako Hadadesa imfumu ya ku Soba, Davidi aipayapo abashilika babo amakana amakumi yabili na makana yabili (22,000)." 
1Chronicles18:6 Abika utwamba twa bashilika mu calo ca bena Aramu mu Damasiko. Elyo abena Aramu bacimba kuli Davidi, bayamba no kulasonka umusonko. Yawe apeele Davidi ukucimfya konse uko aile." 
1Chronicles18:7 Davidi apokolwele inkwela sha golide ishalesenda bakangalila ba fita bakwa Hadadesa no kushileta ku Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles18:8 Ukufuma ku Teba na ku Kuni, imisumba iyali iyakwa Hadadesa, Davidi asendako umukuba uwingi nganshi, uo Solomoni aishile bomfya pakupanga icakusambilamo ica mukuba, elyo inceshi ne fipe ifyalekana lekana ifya mukuba." 
1Chronicles18:9 Ilyo Tou imfumu ya ku Hamati aumfwile ukuti Davidi nacimfya ifita fya nkondo fyonse ifyakwa Hadadesa imfumu ya ku Soba," 
1Chronicles18:10 atuma umwana wakwe Hadoramu ku mfumu Davidi kukuya muposha no kumutasha pakulwisha Hadadesa no kumucimfya. Pantu kunuma Hadadesa lyonse ewalelwa na Tou. Hadoramu aletele ifyabupe ifingi ifya golide, silifa ne fya mukuba." 
1Chronicles18:11 Imfumu Davidi yatuulile ifipe fyonse ifi kuli Yawe, ngefyo acitile kuli silifa na golide iyo apokolwele ukufuma ku mishobo iyi iya bena Edomu, abena Moabu, abena Amoni, Abafilisiti elyo na bena Amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai umwana wakwa Seruiya aipaya abena Edomu amakana ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18,000) mwi Shika Lyamucele." 
1Chronicles18:13 Elyo abika no twamba twa bashilika mu calo ca bena Edomu, elyo na bonse abena Edomu bacimba kuli Davidi. Kabili Yawe alengele Davidi ukulacimfya konse uko aile." 
1Chronicles18:14 Davidi ateekele icalo ca bena Israeli conse mu mulinganya. Alecita ubupingushi ubwacishinka ku bantu bakwe bonse. 
1Chronicles18:15 Yoabu mwana Seruiya ewali umukalamba wa fita. Elyo Yehoshafati umwana wakwa Ailudi ali kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo. 
1Chronicles18:16 Sadoki mwana Ahitubi na Aimeleki mwana Abiyata bali bashimapepo. Shafisha nao ali kalemba wa milandu. 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya mwana Yehoiyada ewali intungulushi ya bena Kereti na bena Peleti. Elyo abana bakwa Davidi nabo ebali bacilolo ba mfumu. 
1Chronicles19:1 Panuma ya nshita iyi, Nahashi imfumu ya bena Amoni alifwile elyo umwana wakwe ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
1Chronicles19:2 Davidi atontonkanya ati, “Kanange uluse kuli Hanuni umwana wakwa Nahashi, pantu wishi alilangile uluse kuli ine.” Kanshi Davidi epakutuma inkombe kuli Hanuni kukulanga icililishi cakuloosha wishi. Ilyo inkombe shakwa Davidi shafikile kuli Hanuni mu calo ca bena Amoni mukuyaloosha," 
1Chronicles19:3 bacilolo ba bena Amoni basosa kuli Hanuni abati, “Bushe muletontonkanya ukuti Davidi alecindika wiso mukutuma abantu bakwe kuli imwe mukulanga icililishi cakuloosha? Bushe aba bantu bakwe tabeshilefye mukulengula na mukufwailisha icalo kukuconaula?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Kanshi Hanuni epakwikata abantu bakwa Davidi, ababeya, aputula na malaya yabo pakati pa matako no kubabweseshamo." 
1Chronicles19:5 Ilyo umuntu umo aishile eba Davidi pa fyacitike kuli aba bantu, atuma inkombe shakuya bakumanya, pantu balibasebenye nganshi. Imfumu epakusosa aiti, “Ikalenifye ku Yeriko mpaka imyefu yenu ikamene, elyo mukabwele.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Ilyo abena Amoni bailwike ukuti naba lufyanya kuli Davidi, Hanani na bena Amoni batuma indalama amatalanta ikana limo (1,000) isha silifa ishakwashimina amaceleta elyo na bakensha wa maceleta ukufuma kuli Aramu Naharaimu, Aramu Maaka elyo na Soba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Bayashima amaceleta amakana amakumi yatatu na yabili (32,000) na bakensha wayako, pamo pene ne mfumu ya ku Maaka na bashilika baiko, baisa cita inkambi mupepi na ku Medeba. Elyo abena Amoni nabo bafuma mu mishi yabo balongana no kwisa mukulwa." 
1Chronicles19:8 Ilyo Davidi aumfwa ifi, Davidi atumako Yoabu ne fita fyonse ifya baume babulwi ababulamba." 
1Chronicles19:9 Elyo abena Amoni bafuma baisa tantama mu mpuka shakulwilamo pa mpongolo yakwingilila mu musumba wabo, ninshi imfumu ishaishile shilifye sheka mu mpanga pa lwalala." 
1Chronicles19:10 Cilya Yoabu amona ukuti kuli imilongo yabulwi kuntanshi elyo na ku numa yakwe, asalapo fimo ifita ifyacenjela nganshi mu Israeli no kufitantamika ukulungamana na bena Aramu." 
1Chronicles19:11 Ifita fimbi ifyashala apeela mu maboko yakwa munyina Abishai kukufyangalila. Kabili afitantika ukulungamana na bena Amoni. 
1Chronicles19:12 Elyo Yoabu asosa ati, “Nga cakuti abena Aramu bancila amaka, awe lyena uli nokwisafye mukumpokololako. Lelo nga cakuti abena Amoni bakucila amaka, elyo ndi nokwisa mukukupokololako." 
1Chronicles19:13 Natube abakosa kabili abashangila pakuti tulwileko na maka abantu besu pamo ne misumba yakwa Lesa wesu. Shi Yawe nacitepo icilewama mu menso yakwe.” 
1Chronicles19:14 Kanshi Yoabu na bashilika ali nabo bafuma mukulwisha abena Aramu, awe nabo bafulumuka ukufuma pantanshi yabo." 
1Chronicles19:15 Cilya abena Amoni bamona ukuti abena Aramu balafulumuka, nabo bene bafulumuka pa cinso cakwa Abishai munyina kabili baya ingila na mu musumba. Kanshi Yoabu epakubwelelamo ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Panuma cilya abena Aramu bamona ukuti babacimfya ku bena Israeli, batuma inkombe shaya ita abena Aramu bonse abali kwishilya lya mumana. Elyo Shofaki umukalamba wa fita fyakwa Hadadesa ewalebatungulula." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ilyo Davidi bamweba pali ifi, alonganika abena Israeli bonse bayabuka no mumana wa Yordani. Abapalamina elyo abatantika mu milongo ya bulwi kuntanshi yabo. Davidi atantamika abashilika bakwe kukukumanya abena Aramu mu bulwi, bayamba no kubalwisha." 
1Chronicles19:18 Lelo abena Aramu bafulumuka pantanshi ya bena Israeli. Kabili Davidi nao epakwipaya abali pa maceleta yabo amakana cine lubali (7,000), na bashilika ba pa makasa amakana amakumi yane (40,000). Elyo aipaya na Shofaki umukalamba wa bashilika." 
1Chronicles19:19 Ilyo ababomfi bakwa Hadadesa bamona ukuti babacimfya ku bena Israeli, bapanga umutende na Davidi bayamba no kumubombela. Kanshi abena Aramu tabafwaile ukwafwa abena Amoni nakabili." 
1Chronicles20:1 Kabili pakwaluka kwa mwaka pa nshita ilya mfumu shifuma ukuya ku nkondo, Yoabu elyo afumishe ifita aya kukonaula icalo ca bena Amoni. Kabili aile ku Raba no kuya cipokolola. Lelo Davidi ena, ashele mu Yerusalemu. Elyo Yoabu aya sansa Raba no kuonaula." 
1Chronicles20:2 Davidi abuula ne cisote cabufumu ukufuma ku mutwe wa mfumu yabo. Ukufina kwaciko kwali italanta lya golide limo, kabili mukati mwali no tumabwe utwauma umutengo. Baisa cibika pa mutwe wakwa Davidi. Kabili abuula ifitapwa ifingi nganshi ukufuma mu musumba." 
1Chronicles20:3 Elyo afumya abantu abali mu musumba, abatwala kukubomba imilimo yakubomfya ifyakuputwilako imbao, bancinde elyo na masembe. Kanshi Davidi acitile ifi fine na ku misumba yonse iya bena Amoni. Elyo Davidi ne fita fyakwe fyonse babwelela ku Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Nomba umuyila inshiku, paimine inkondo na Abafilisiti ku musumba wabo ku Gesa. Napali ilya ine nshita Sibekai umwina Hushati aipaya Sipai, umo uwali mu lupwa lwakwa Refa, icalengele na Abafilisiti ukucimba." 
1Chronicles20:5 Mukulwa inkondo na imbi na Abafilisiti, Elianani mwana Yairi aipaya Lami munyina kwa Goliati umwina Gati, uwakwete ifumo ilyali no musako kwati mulando wa bapikula insalu." 
1Chronicles20:6 Nakabili ku bulwi na bumbi ubwacitike ku cifulo ca Gati, kwaliko icimuntu icalunduka nganshi. Cali ne minwe mutanda kuli cila cisansa, kabili cali ne fikondo mutanda kuli cila lukasa, fyonse pamo fyali amakumi yabili na fine (24). Nao wine ali uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Rafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Kanshi ilyo ena asebenye abena Israeli, Yonatani mwana Shimea, munyina kwa Davidi ewamwipeye." 
1Chronicles20:8 Aba ebali aba mu lupwa lwakwa Rafa mu Gati, kabili bonse bafwile ku minwe yakwa Davidi na ku minwe ya bantu bakwe." 
1Chronicles21:1 Nomba Satana aimine abena Israeli no kutunka Davidi ukuti apende abena Israeli. 
1Chronicles21:2 Kanshi Davidi epakweba Yoabu na bakalamba ba fita fyankondo ati, “Kabiyeni, kapendeni abena Israeli ukufuma ku Beresheba ukufika ku Dani. Mwise munjebe pakuti njise njishibe ifyo bali.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Elyo Yoabu ayasuka imfumu ati, “Nacibe ukuti Yawe asandulule ubwingi bwa bashilika imiku umwanda umo (100) ukucila ifyo bali. Lelo, mwe shikulu imfumu yandi, bushe bonse aba te babomfi ba mfumu? Cinshi kanshi calenga ukuti shikulu acite icintu ca musango uyu? Mulandu nshi uwalenga alete umulandu pali Israeli?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Lelo icebo ca mfumu capula pa cebo cakwa Yoabu. Kanshi Yoabu epakwima no kupitana mu calo conse ica Israeli no kubwelulukila ku Yerusalemu. 
1Chronicles21:5 Elyo Yoabu aisa sosa impendwa ya bashilika kuli Davidi. Mu calo conse ica Israeli mwali umuntapendwa umo na makana umwanda umo (1,100,000) abaume abengabomfya ulupanga pakulwa, ukulundapo na bambi amakana imyanda ine na makumi cine lubali (470,000) abali mu Yuda." 
1Chronicles21:6 Lelo Yoabu tasanshisheko abena Levi na bena Benjamini pakupenda, pa mulandu wakuti ifunde lyapeele imfumu talyali lyakusekesha Yoabu." 
1Chronicles21:7 Ili line ifunde lyali ilyabubifi pa cinso cakwa Lesa, nao epakukanda Israeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Elyo Davidi asosa kuli Lesa ati, “Ine nimbifya apakalamba paco ncitile. Nomba kanshi, nakupapata, fumya umulandu uyu pa mubomfi obe, pantu nincita icintu icabulamo amano nganshi.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Yawe aeba Gadi kamona wakwa Davidi ati," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Kabiye kebe Davidi auti, ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Nalakupeela ifya kusalapo fitatu. Salapo cimo ico ulefwaya, ico mfwile ukucita kuli iwe.’”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Kanshi Gadi epakuya kuli Davidi no kumweba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Isalile we mwine," 
1Chronicles21:12 napamo imyaka itatu iya cipowe, nangu imyeshi itatu iyakonaulwa ku balwani bobe ilyo ulupanga lwabo lukakusanga, nangu inshiku shitatu ku lupanga lwakwa Yawe, nangu inshiku isha cikuko mu calo, ilyo malaika wakwa Yawe alepitamo mukonaula incende shonse isha mu Israeli. Nomba iwe tontonkanya ifyo ndeya eba uuntumine.’”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Elyo Davidi ayasuka Gadi ati, “Awe kwena ndi uwacucutika nganshi. Kanshi ndekenifye mponene mu minwe yakwa Yawe, pantu uluse lwakwe lukalamba nganshi. Lelo mwileka mponene mu minwe ya bantunse.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Kanshi Yawe epakutuma icikuko pa bena Israeli na bantu abaume amakana cine lubali (70,000) bafwa." 
1Chronicles21:15 Elyo Lesa atuma malaika mukonaula Yerusalemu. Ilyo malaika aleonaula, Yawe amonako no kumfwa bulanda pa mulandu wa cikuko, elyo aeba malaika uwaleonaula ati, “Capwa! Bwesha ukuboko kobe.” Malaika wakwa Yawe ninshi eminine pa lubansa lwakutwilapo ulwakwa Arauna umwina Yebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Davidi ainwina amenso mu mulu elyo amona malaika wakwa Yawe naiminina pakati ka mulu ne sonde, ninshi napambula ulupanga mu minwe yakwe pa musumba wa Yerusalemu. Elyo Davidi na bakalamba bafwala insalu shabulanda bawa panshi ubukupeme." 
1Chronicles21:17 Davidi nao asosa kuli Lesa ati, “Bushe teine wapeele ifunde lyakupenda abaume babulwi? Ninefye ncitile icabubifi no kulufyanya. Aba bonse bena ni mpaangafye. Ni finshi bacitile? We Yawe Lesa wandi, uleke ukuboko kobe kuponene pali ine na ba ŋanda yandi, lelo wileka ici cibe pa bantu bobe.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe apeele Gadi icipope cakweba Davidi ukwima no kuya kuula ubulambo bwakwa Yawe pa lubansa lwakutwilapo ulwakwa Arauna umwina Yebusi. 
1Chronicles21:19 Kanshi Davidi epakuya mukumfwila ishiwi ilyo Gadi asosele mwishina lyakwa Yawe. 
1Chronicles21:20 Ilyo Arauna acili aletwa iŋanu, ati apilibuke amona malaika. Na bana bakwe abaume abo ali nabo bafumapo baya belama." 
1Chronicles21:21 Lintu Davidi apalama, elyo Arauna alolesha no kumumona, afuma apo aletwila no kuya kontama pa cinso cakwa Davidi, ashimpa ne mpumi panshi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Elyo Davidi aeba Arauna ati, “Mpeela ulo lubansa lobe ulwakutwilapo pakuti nkuulepo ubulambo bwakwa Yawe, pakuti icikuko icili pa bantu cipwe. Nshitisha pa mutengo uutuntulu.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Lelo Arauna aeba Davidi ati, “Buulafye we mwine, leka shikulu imfumu yandi icite icili conse icalaiwamina ku menso yaiko. Moneni, nalapeela iŋombe ishe lambo lyakoca, imilando yakutwilako eyo ibe inkuni elyo ne ŋanu sha mutuulo wa cabunga. Awe nalapeela fyonse.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Lelo imfumu Davidi yayasuka Arauna aiti, “Iyo, ine ndefwayafye ukulipila umutengo uutuntulu. Pantu nshilefwaya ukutwalila Yawe ifintu fyobe, nangu ukutuula ilambo lyakoca ilyo nshiposelepo nangu cimo.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Kanshi Davidi epakulipila Arauna indalama amashekeli imyanda mutanda (600) isha golide pali ilya ncende. 
1Chronicles21:26 Palya pene epo Davidi akuula ubulambo bwakwa Yawe, atuula na malambo yakoca na malambo yakwampana. Elyo Davidi apepa na kuli Yawe, na Yawe amwasuka, no mulilo wafuma ku mulu ukwisa pa bulambo bwa mutuulo wakoca." 
1Chronicles21:27 Elyo Yawe aeba malaika, nao abweseshe ulupanga mu citubo." 
1Chronicles21:28 Pa nshita ine ilya, ilyo Davidi amona ukuti Yawe amwasuka pa lubansa lwakutwilapo lwakwa Arauna umwina Yebusi, awe atuulilapo na malambo." 
1Chronicles21:29 Itenti lyakwa Yawe, lilya Mose apangile mu matololo, elyo no bulambo bwakocelapo pali ilya nshita fyali pa ncende yakupepelapo iyo balecindika ku Gibeoni." 
1Chronicles21:30 Lelo Davidi alifililwe ukuya pantanshi ye Tenti kukwipusha kuli Lesa, pantu atiinine ulupanga lwakwa malaika wakwa Yawe." 
1Chronicles22:1 Elyo Davidi atile, “Iŋanda yakwa Yawe Lesa ili nokuba pano, pamo no bulambo bwakocela ubwa bena Israeli.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Kanshi Davidi epakupeela icipope cakulonganika abenafyalo bonse abaleikala mu Israeli. Elyo pakati kabo asontapo abakutoba amabwe pakuti balepekanya amabwe ayabaswa bwino ayakukuulila Iŋanda yakwa Lesa. 
1Chronicles22:3 Elyo Davidi apekanya ifyela ifingi ifyakupangamo imisomali iyakupangilako ifiibi fya pa mpongolo ne fyakwikatanya ifimiti, pamo no mukuba uushingapimwa." 
1Chronicles22:4 Kabili apekanya na imbi imilando ya fimuti fya keda imintapendwa, pantu abena Sidoni na bena Turi baliletele impendwa iyingi nganshi iya milando kuli Davidi." 
1Chronicles22:5 Davidi asosa ati, “Umwana wandi Solomoni mwaice kabili muteku, elyo ne ŋanda ali nokukuula iyakwa Yawe ili nokuba iyacindama mu menso ya mishobo yonse. Eico nalapekanya ifyakubomfya.” Kanshi Davidi epakupekanya ifintu ifingi ilyo talafwa." 
1Chronicles22:6 Elyo aita umwana wakwe Solomoni no kumupeela umulimo wakukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli. 
1Chronicles22:7 Davidi aeba Solomoni ati, “We mwana wandi, ine cali pa mutima wandi ukukuula iŋanda iye shina lyakwa Yawe Lesa wandi." 
1Chronicles22:8 Lelo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti, ‘Walisumya umulopa uwingi no kulwa inkondo ishingi. Tauli nakukuula iŋanda iye shina lyandi, pantu walisumya umulopa uwingi pano isonde mu menso yandi." 
1Chronicles22:9 Lelo uli nokukwata umwana uukaba umuntu uwamutende. Kabili nkamulenga ukutuusha ukufuma ku balwani bakwe mu ncende shonse. Ishina lyakwe likaba ni Solomoni pantu nkapeela umutende kuli Israeli ne cibote mu nshita ya bufumu bwakwe. 
1Chronicles22:10 Ni ena, euli nokukuula iŋanda ye shina lyandi. Ali nokuba umwana wandi, na ine ndi nokuba wishi. Kabili ndi nokwimika ubufumu bwakwe pa bena Israeli umuyayaya.’" 
1Chronicles22:11 “Eico we mwana wandi, shi Yawe engalaba na iwe. Kabili ukashuke pakuti ukakuule iŋanda yakwa Yawe Lesa obe, pamo ngefyo asosele pali iwe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Shi Yawe engakupeela amano no kwiluka, ilyo akakubika pa cipuna ca bena Israeli, pakuti ukabe uwakusunga amafunde yakwa Yawe Lesa obe." 
1Chronicles22:13 Elyo uli nokukwata ishuko, nga cakuti watekanya mukubaka ifipope na mafunde ifyo Yawe apeele Mose ifya bena Israeli. Ube uwashuka kabili uwashipa. Wikwata mwenso nangu ukunenuka." 
1Chronicles22:14 “Nimomba no mukoosha nganshi pakupekanya ifyakukuulila iŋanda yakwa Yawe amatalanta amakana umwanda umo (100,000) uwa golide, na matalanta umuntapendwa umo uwa silifa (1,000,000), imipili ya mukuba ne fyela ukufina kwafiko ukushingapimwa, elyo imilando na mabwe. Na iwe kuti walundapo." 
1Chronicles22:15 Naukwata ababomfi abengi bakabasa wa mabwe, abaishiba ukukuula ku mabwe na baishiba kubasa imbao. Elyo naukwata na bantu bambi abaishiba imilimo abashingapendwa, abacenjela mu milimo iyalekana lekana" 
1Chronicles22:16 iya muli golide, silifa, umukuba ne fyela. Eico ima, tampako ukubomba Yawe nao aleba na iwe.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Elyo Davidi apeele cipope ku bakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli ukwafwa umwana wakwe Solomoni. 
1Chronicles22:18 Abeba ati, “Bushe Yawe Lesa wenu tali na imwe? Kabili bushe tamupeele ukutuusha ku mbali shonse? Pantu nabuula abekalacalo bonse nampeela, elyo ne calo nacipeelwa mu minwe yakwa Yawe na ku bantu bakwe." 
1Chronicles22:19 Nomba bikeni umutima wenu na mano yenu mukufwaya Yawe Lesa wenu, pakuti mukalete Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe elyo ne fipe fyamushilo ifyakwa Lesa mu ŋanda iyili nokukuulwa mwishina lyakwa Yawe.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Ilyo Davidi akotele pa myaka iyingi, abuulile umwana wakwe Solomoni eo abika pa bufumu bwa mu Israeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Kabili alonganika pamo intungulushi shonse isha mu Israeli, bashimapepo elyo na bena Levi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Abena Levi abali ne myaka amakumi yatatu (30) nangu ukucilapo, ebapendelwe. Elyo impendwa ya baume yali amakana amakumi yatatu na cine konse konse (38,000)." 
1Chronicles23:4 Davidi asosa ati, “Pali aba, impendwa iyili amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000), ebakulamona pa milimo ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Elyo bambi nabo amakana mutanda (6,000) ni bacilolo na bapingushi." 
1Chronicles23:5 Impendwa amakana yane (4,000) ni bakalinda wa mpongolo. Elyo impendwa imbi iya makana yane (4,000) bali nokulabomfya ifilimba mpekenye pakulumbanya Yawe.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Kabili Davidi alekanya abena Levi mu mabumba ukulingana na bana bakwa Levi, Geshoni, Koati na Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Mu bena Geshoni mwali Ladani na Shimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Bamwana Ladani bali ni Yehieli ewali ibeli, elyo Setamu na Yoeli, bonse bali batatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Bamwana Shimei bali ni Shelomoti, Hasieli na Harani, bonse pamo bali batatu. Aba ebali intungulushi sha ndupwa shakwa Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Elyo bamwana Shimei bali ni Yahati, Sisa, Yeushi elyo na Beriya. Aba bane ebali abana abaume bakwa Shimei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahati ewali uwantanshi, elyo Sisa aba uwacibili. Lelo Yeushi na Beriya tabakwete abana abaume abengi. Ecalengele ukuti bapendelwe pamo nga bana ba lupwa lumo lwine." 
1Chronicles23:12 Abana bakwa Koati bali ni Amuramu, Isa, Hebuloni na Usieli, bonse pamo bali bane." 
1Chronicles23:13 Abana bakwa Amuramu bali ni Aroni na Mose. Elyo Aroni na ba mu lupwa lwakwe bapatulwilwe kukulabomba ifintu fyamushilo nganshi, ukulaoca ububani pa cinso cakwa Yawe, ukulatumika, elyo nokulapaala amapaalo mwishina lyakwe umuyayaya." 
1Chronicles23:14 Abana bakwa Mose, umuntu wakwa Lesa, bapendelwe ukuba icipande cimo ica luko lwa bena Levi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Abana bakwa Mose bali ni Geshomu na Eliese. 
1Chronicles23:16 Pa bana bakwa Geshomu ni Shubaeli ewali uwantanshi. 
1Chronicles23:17 Pa bana bakwa Eliese ni Rehabia ewali uwantanshi. Kabili Eliesi takwete abana bambi abaume, lelo abana abaume bakwa Rehabia bali abengi." 
1Chronicles23:18 Pa bana bakwa Isa ni Shelomiti ewantanshi. 
1Chronicles23:19 Pa bana bakwa Hebuloni ni Yeriya ewantanshi, pakonka Amaria, uwabutatu ni Yahasieli, elyo uwalenga bune ni Yekameamu." 
1Chronicles23:20 Pa bana bakwa Usieli ni Mika ewali uwantanshi elyo uwabubili Ishiya. 
1Chronicles23:21 Abana bakwa Merari bali ni Mali na Mushi. Abana bakwa Mali bali ni Eleasa na Kishi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleasa afwilefye ukwabula ukukwata abana abaume lelo akwetefye abana abanakashi. Bamwana Kishi ebabopile. 
1Chronicles23:23 Abana bakwa Mushi bali ni Mali, Ederi na Yerimoti, bonse pamo bali batatu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Aba e bana bakwa Levi umo bafyalilwe mu mayanda ya bashibo, abali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo, pamo ngefyo balependwa cila umo umo ukulingana ne mpendwa ya mashina yabo, abo ababombele imilimo iya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, ukufuma pa myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo." 
1Chronicles23:25 Pantu Davidi atile “Apo Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli napeela ukutuusha ku bantu bakwe nokuti naisa mukwikala mu Yerusalemu umuyayaya," 
1Chronicles23:26 kanshi abena Levi nomba takuli ukulasenda Itenti lyakwa Lesa nangu ifipe fyonse ifibomba mwi Tenti ili.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Ukulingana na mashiwi yakulekelesha ayakwa Davidi, abena Levi babapendele ukufuma pa bali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukucilapo." 
1Chronicles23:28 Imilimo ya bena Levi yali yakwafwa abana bakwa Aroni mu milimo ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, ukuba abakumona pa milimo ya mu mansa, mu miputule ya mumbali, ukusangulula ifipe fyonse ifyamushilo, no kubomba imilimo imbi iyalekana lekana iya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
1Chronicles23:29 Ebapeelwe ukumona pa mikate iyalebikwa petebulo, ubunga bwa mutuulo wa cabunga, utumikate utwapapatala utwabulamo intutumushi, pa milimo iyakupanga no kusakaanya, elyo ne fipimo fyonse ifyakupenda no kupiminako mu musango onse." 
1Chronicles23:30 Ebali nokulaima cila lucelo mukutotela no kulumbanya Yawe. Ifi fine efyo bali nokwisa bwekeshapo inshita ya cungulo," 
1Chronicles23:31 kabili nelyo lyonse kwaba ukoca amalambo yakupeela kuli Yawe pa masabata, pakutampa umweshi elyo na pa nshikunkulu shonse ishasalwa. Bali nokulabomba pa cinso cakwa Yawe inshita yonse iyapeelwe ukulingana ne mpendwa iyasontwa." 
1Chronicles23:32 Kanshi ifi efyo abena Levi balebomba imilimo yabo iya mwi Tenti lyakukumaninamo, mu cifulo camushilo nelyo bali mu minwe ya bamunyinabo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni, mu milimo ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
1Chronicles24:1 Iyi eyali imipaka ya bana bakwa Aroni. Abana bakwa Aroni bali ni Nadabu, Abihu, Eleasa na Itama." 
1Chronicles24:2 Lelo Nadabu na Abihu bafwile lintu shibo talafwa, elyo tabakwete abana abaume. Kanshi Eleasa na Itama ebalebomba imilimo ya bushimapepo." 
1Chronicles24:3 Elyo Sadoki uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Eleasa na Ahimeleki uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Itama ebayafwilishe Davidi ukubabika mu mpuka mu mpuka mukubomba imilimo bapeelwe. 
1Chronicles24:4 Impendwa iyikalamba iya ntungulushi yasangilwe mu ba mu lupwa lwakwa Eleasa ukucila mu ba mu lupwa lwakwa Itama. Eico bafumya intungulushi ikumi limo na mutanda (16) isha mayanda ya bashibo mu lupwa lwakwa Eleasari, elyo impendwa cine konse konse intungulushi sha mu mayanda ya bashibo mu lupwa lwakwa Itama." 
1Chronicles24:5 Babakenye mukubapendula pantu palipo bacilolo ba mu cifulo camushilo na bacilolo bakwa Lesa pakati ka ba mu lupwa lwakwa Eleasa na ba mu lupwa lwakwa Itama. 
1Chronicles24:6 Kalemba uwe shina lya Shemaiya mwana Netaneli umwina Levi, ewalembele amashina yabo pa menso ya mfumu elyo na bacilolo abali ni Sadoki shimapepo, Ahimeleki mwana Abiyata elyo ne ntungulushi sha mu mayanda ya bashimapepo na ya bena Levi. Babalemba mukutantika aba mu ŋanda imo ukufuma muli Eleasa elyo na ba mu ŋanda imo ukufuma muli Itama." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ukupendula kwantanshi kwaponene pali Yehoyaribu, ukwacibili pali Yedaiya," 
1Chronicles24:8 ukwacitatu pali Harimu, ukwacine pali Seorimu," 
1Chronicles24:9 ukwacisano pali Malikiya, ukwalenga mutanda pali Miyaminu," 
1Chronicles24:10 ukwalenga cine lubali pali Hakosi, ukwalenga cine konse konse pali Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 ukwalenga pabula pali Yeshua, ukwalenga ikumi limo pali Shekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 ukwalenga ikumi limo na umo (11) pali Eliashibu, ukwalenga ikumi limo na ibili (12) pali Yakimu," 
1Chronicles24:13 ukwalenga ikumi limo na itatu (13) pali Hupa, ukwalenga ikumi limo na ine (14) pali Yeshebeabu," 
1Chronicles24:14 ukwalenga ikumi limo na isano (15) pali Biliga, ukwalenga ikumi limo na mutanda (16) pali Imeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 ukwalenga ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) pali Hesili, ukwalenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) pali Hapisesi," 
1Chronicles24:16 ukwalenga ikumi limo na pabula (19) pali Petahiya, ukwalenga amakumi yabili pali Yehesikeli," 
1Chronicles24:17 ukwalenga amakumi yabili na umo (21) pali Yakini, ukwalenga amakumi yabili na ibili (22) pali Gamuli," 
1Chronicles24:18 ukwalenga amakumi yabili na itatu (23) pali Delaiya, ukwalenga amakumi yabili na ine (24) pali Maasiya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Ifi efyatantikwe ukukonkana kwabo mukubomba ilyo baleingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, umwabelele ifipope ifya bashilile shibo Aroni, ngefyo Lesa wa bena Israeli amukonkomeshe." 
1Chronicles24:20 Pa bashele aba mu lupwa lwakwa Levi bafumine mu bana bakwa Amuramu, Shubaeli, na ba muli Shubaeli ni Yedeiya." 
1Chronicles24:21 Ukufuma mu bana bakwa Rehabiya, Ishiya ewali uwantanshi." 
1Chronicles24:22 Ukufuma mu ba mu bena Isa ni Shelomoti, ukufuma mu bana bakwa Shelomoti ni Yahati." 
1Chronicles24:23 Abana bakwa Hebuloni, uwantanshi ni Yeria, Amaria ewakonkelepo, Yahasieli ewali uwabutatu elyo Yekameamu nao ewali uwacine." 
1Chronicles24:24 Mwana Usieli ali ni Mika, muli bamwana Mika ali ni Shamiri." 
1Chronicles24:25 Munyina kwa Mika ali ni Ishiya, ukufuma mu bana bakwa Ishiya ali ni Sakaria." 
1Chronicles24:26 Abana bakwa Merari bali ni Mali na Mushi. Umwana wakwa Yaasia ali ni Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Abana bakwa Merari ukufuma muli Yaasia, bali ni Beno, Shohamu, Sakuri na Ibiri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Ukufuma muli Mali, ni Eleasa uushakwetepo abana abaume." 
1Chronicles24:29 Ukufuma muli Kishi, mwana Kishi ali ni Yerahimeli." 
1Chronicles24:30 Elyo abana bakwa Mushi bali ni Mali, Eda na Yerimoti. Aba ebali abana bakwa Levi umwabelele amayanda ya bashibo." 
1Chronicles24:31 Aba nabo bene bacitile ukupendula, filya fine bamunyinabo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni bacitile pa cinso ca mfumu Davidi na Sadoki, Aimeleki elyo ne ntungulushi sha mayanda ya bashimapepo na bena Levi. Abana baume ba mukalamba bacitile cimo cine na bana bakwa munyina, umwaice wakwe." 
1Chronicles25:1 Davidi pamo na bakalamba ba fita fya nkondo, bapatwilepo abana bamo abakwa Asafu, Hemani na Yedutuni ku milimo yakusesema ukubomfya amaseese, insango ne miwaya. Ifi efyali ubutantiko bwa bantu abaume abali nokulabomba iyi milimo." 
1Chronicles25:2 Ukufuma mu bana bakwa Asafu bali ni Sakuri, Yosefu, Netania na Asarela. Uwalemona pa mibombele ya bana bakwa Asafu ali ni Asafu wine, uwalesesema ukulingana no butungulushi bwa mfumu ine." 
1Chronicles25:3 Ukufuma ku bana bakwa Yedutuni, bali ni Gedalia, Seri, Yeshaiya, Shimei, Hashabia na Matitiya. Bonse pamo bali mutanda, no walemona pa milimo yabo ni shibo Yedutuni, uwalesesema alebomfya iseese pakutotela no kulumbanya Yawe." 
1Chronicles25:4 Ukufuma mu bana bakwa Hemani bali ni Bukia, Mataniya, Usieli, Shubaeli na Yerimoti, Hanania, Hanani, Eliata, Gidati, Romami Eseri, Yoshibekasha, Maloti, Hoti elyo na Mahasioti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Bonse aba bali bana bakwa Hemani kamona wa mfumu ukulingana ne cebo cakwa Lesa ico alaile kukwimya Hemani. Pantu Lesa apeele Hemani abana abaume ikumi limo na bane (14), elyo abanakashi batatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Bonse abaume aba bali mu maboko ya bashibo pakwimba inyimbo sha mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, mukubomfya imiwaya, insango na maseese, pa milimo iya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Asafu, Yedutuni na Hemani bena baleumfwila imfumu." 
1Chronicles25:7 Pamo pene ne ndupwa shabo, bonse abasambilishiwe no kusalapulwa mukwimba inyimbo shakwa Yawe, bali impendwa imyanda ibili na makumi cine konse konse na cine konse konse (288)." 
1Chronicles25:8 Bacitile ukupendula nge cakumwenako kuli onse imilimo yakwe, umukalamba, umwaice, kafundisha elyo no musambi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Ukupendula kwantanshi ukwali kwakwa Asafu kwaponena pali Yosefu. Elyo ukwacibili pali Gedalia pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)" 
1Chronicles25:10 Ukwacitatu pali Sakuri, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:11 Ukwacine pali Isiri, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:12 Ukwacisano pali Netania, pa bana bakwe abaume na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:13 Ukwalenga mutanda pali Bukia, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:14 Ukwalenga cine lubali pali Yesarela, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:15 Ukwalenga cine konse konse pali Yeshaiya, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:16 Ukwalenga pabula pali Mataniya, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:17 Ukwalenga ikumi limo pali Shimei, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:18 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na umo (11) pali Asareli, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:19 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na ibili (12) pali Hashabia, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:20 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na itatu (13) pali Shubaeli, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:21 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na ine (14) pali Matitiya, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:22 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na isano (15) pali Yerimoti, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:23 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na mutanda (16) pali Hanania, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:24 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) pali Yoshibekasha, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:25 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) pali Hanani, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:26 Ukwalenga ikumi limo na pabula (19) pali Maloti, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:27 Ukwalenga amakumi yabili (20) pali Eliata, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:28 Ukwalenga amakumi yabili na umo (21) pali Hotiri, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:29 Ukwalenga amakumi yabili na ibili (22) pali Gidaliti, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:30 Ukwalenga amakumi yabili na itatu (23) pali Mahasioti, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles25:31 Ukwalenga amakumi yabili na ine (24) pali Romamiti Eseri, pa bana bakwe na ba mu lupwa lwakwe, bali ikumi limo na babili (12)." 
1Chronicles26:1 Ifi efyali mpuka sha bakalinda wa pa mpongolo. Ukufuma ku bena Kora ni Meshelemia umwana wakwa Kore uwa pa bana bakwa Asafu. 
1Chronicles26:2 Kabili Meshelemia alikwete abana. Uwantanshi ali ni Sakaria, uwacibili ni Yediaeli, uwalenga batatu ni Sebadiya, uwalenga bane ni Yatinieli," 
1Chronicles26:3 uwalenga basano ni Elamu, uwalenga mutanda ni Yehohanani, no walenga cine lubali ali ni Eliehoenai." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obedi Edomu nao alikwete abana. Uwantanshi ali ni Shemaiya, uwacibili ni Yehosabadi, uwalenga batatu ni Yoa, uwalenga bane ni Saka, uwalenga basano ali ni Netaneli," 
1Chronicles26:5 uwalenga mutanda ni Amieli, uwalenga cine lubali ni Isaka, no walenga cine konse konse ni Peuletai, pantu Lesa alimupaalile." 
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaiya umwana wakwe nao alikwete abana abaume abali intungulushi ya mu ŋanda yakwa shibo pantu bali impalume ishakosa. 
1Chronicles26:7 Bamwana Shemaiya amashina yabo ni Otini, Refaeli, Obedi na Elisabadi, na bamunyina Elihu na Semakiya nabo bene bali impalume ishakosa." 
1Chronicles26:8 Bonse aba bafumine mu lupwa lwakwa Obedi Edomu. Bena na bana babo pamo bali impalume ishakosa kabili na maka ayakubomba imilimo. Bonse pamo mu lupwa lwakwa Obedi Edomu bali amakumi mutanda na babili (62). 
1Chronicles26:9 Meshelemia ali na bana abaume na bamunyina ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18), abantu abakosa." 
1Chronicles26:10 Kabili Hosa, umwina Merari, alikwete abana. Shimuri ewantanshi nangu cali ukuti tewali ibeli," 
1Chronicles26:11 lelo wishi ewamubikilepo ukuba uwantanshi. No wacibili ni Hilikiya, uwalenga batatu ni Tabalia no walenga bane ali ni Sakaria. Abana na bamunyina wakwa Hosa bali ikumi limo na batatu (13) bonse pamo." 
1Chronicles26:12 Ishi mpuka sha bakalinda wa pa mpongolo, ukupitila mu ntungulushi shabo, shali ne milimo yakubomba mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, filya fine cali kuli bamunyinabo." 
1Chronicles26:13 Balebomfya ukupendula pali cila mpongolo, umwakonkanine indupwa sha bashibo." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ukupendula kwa pa mpongolo ya ku kabanga kwaponene pali Shelemiya. Elyo bacita ukupendula pa mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso nako kwaponena pa mwana wakwe Sakaria, umuntu uwacenjela mukupanda amano." 
1Chronicles26:15 Ukupendula kwa pa mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo kwaponena pali Obedi Edomu, elyo ukupendula kwa pa ŋanda iya butala kwaponena pa bana bakwe." 
1Chronicles26:16 Ukupendula kwa pa mpongolo ya ku masamba ne mpongolo ya pa Sheleketi iyabelele pa musebo wa pamulu, kwaponena pali Shupimu na Hosa. Bakalinda balelinda apalungatene." 
1Chronicles26:17 Cila bushiku kwaleba abena Levi mutanda pa mpongolo ya ku kabanga, bambi nabo cila bushiku pa mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso, bambi bane nabo pa mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo elyo pa ŋanda ya butala paleba bakalinda babili pa nshita imo." 
1Chronicles26:18 Elyo ukuya ku masamba kwali bane abalelinda pa musebo, bambi nabo babili pa mpongolo pene." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ifi efyali mpuka sha bakalinda wa pa mpongolo abafumine mu ndupwa shakwa Kora na Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Abena Levi banabo bambi ebali ne milimo yakusunga icipao ca mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa elyo no kusunga icipao ca fipe abantu baletuula. 
1Chronicles26:21 Abana bakwa Ladani, bali ni nkonkani shakwe mu bena Geshoni, kabili ebali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo mu lupwa lwakwa Ladani umwina Geshoni. Umo ali ni Yehieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Bamwana Yehieli bali ni Setamu na munyina Yoeli. Ebali abakumona pa milimo ya bakusunga icipao ca mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
1Chronicles26:23 Abafumine mu bena Amuramu, abena Isa, abena Hebuloni elyo na bena Usieli bali ni aba." 
1Chronicles26:24 Shubaeli umwana wakwa Geshomu, mwana Mose, ewali cilolo mukalamba wa bakusunga icipao." 
1Chronicles26:25 Abali bamunyina ukupitila muli Eliese, uwafyele Rehabia, nao uwafyele Yeshaiya wishi wakwa Yoramu nao wishi wakwa Sikiri nao wishi wakwa Shelomiti." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomiti na bamunyina ebali ne milimo yakusunga ifintu ifyaletuula imfumu Davidi ne ntungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo ishali e bakalamba ba pa fita amakana (1,000) na bakalamba ba pa fita imyanda (100) elyo na bakalamba bambi aba fita." 
1Chronicles26:27 Fimo pa fitapwa ifyapokelwe mu nkondo nafyo bafituulile ku mulimo wakuwamisha iŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
1Chronicles26:28 Kabili na fyonse ifyo Samwele uwali kamona atuulile, ne fyatuulile Saulo mwana Kishi, Abune mwana Neri na Yoabu mwana Seruiya elyo na fyonsefye ifyatuulilwe, fyapeelwe mukusungwa mu maboko yakwe Shelomiti na bamunyina." 
1Chronicles26:29 Ukufuma ku bena Isa ni Kenaiya na bana bakwe ebapeelwe imilimo iya kunse ya ŋanda yakwa Lesa, bena bali ni bacilolo elyo na bapingushi ba pali Israeli." 
1Chronicles26:30 Ukufuma ku bena Hebuloni ni Hashabiya na bamunyina ikana limo ne myanda cine lubali (1,700), abantu abakosa, ebalebomba imilimo yonse iyakwa Yawe. Kabili ebakutumika imfumu mu Israeli kwisamba lya mumana wa Yordani." 
1Chronicles26:31 Palwa bena Hebuloni, Yeria ewali intungulushi umo batantamine ukulingana ne cifyalilwa ca bashibo. Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yane (40) uwakwa Davidi pa bufumu, bafwailishe mu ndupwa sha bena Hebuloni elyo basangamo impalume ishakosa ku Yaseri wa mu Gileadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Yeria akwete bamunyina amakana yabili ne myanda cine lubali (2,700), abali abaume abakosa kabili abali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo. Imfumu Davidi yabapeele ukulatungulula abena Rubeni, abena Gadi na citika wa luko lwakwa Manase pa milimo yakwa Lesa elyo na pa fya milandu ya mfumu." 
1Chronicles27:1 Iyi e mpendwa ya bena Israeli, intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo, abakalamba ba pa fita amakana (1,000), na bakalamba ba pa fita imyanda (100) na bacilolo babo abaletumika imfumu mu milimo yonse iyakumine impuka sha bashilika, abaleba pa ncito cila mweshi mu mwakafye onse. Cila mpuka yali na bantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000)." 
1Chronicles27:2 Uwantanshi ukwangalila mpuka mu mweshi wakwamba ali ni Yashobeamu mwana Sabudieli. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000), mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:3 Ali wa mu bana bakwa Peresi, kabili umukalamba pali bacilolo ba bashilika mu mweshi wakutampa." 
1Chronicles27:4 Uwacibili uwakwangalila impuka mu mweshi walenga ibili, ali ni Dodai umwina Ahoyi. Uwali ntungulushi ya mpuka yakwe ali ni Mikiloti. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:5 Uwacitatu umukalamba aleyangalila aba mu mweshi walenga itatu ali ni Benaya mwana Yehoiyada shimapepo. Ewali intungulushi kabili mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:6 Uyu e Benaya uwali impalume ine ine mwibumba lya makumi yatatu (30) kabili ewali intungulushi ya ili ibumba. Umwana wakwe Amisabadi ewaleyangalila ili bumba. 
1Chronicles27:7 Uwalenga bane umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga ine, ali ni Asaeli munyina wakwa Yoabu. Umwana wakwe Sebadiya ewamupyene. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:8 Uwacisano umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga isano, ali ni Shamuhuti umwina Isira. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:9 Uwalenga mutanda, umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga mutanda, ali ni Ira mwana Ikeshi umwina Tekoa. Mwali abantu abaume amakana yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:10 Uwalenga cine lubali umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga cine lubali, ali ni Helesi umwina Peloni, uwa mu bana bakwa Efulemu. Mwali abantu abaume amakana yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:11 Uwalenga cine konse konse umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga cine konse konse, ali ni Sibekai umwina Hushati uwa mu bena Sera. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:12 Uwalenga pabula umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga pabula, ali ni Abiesa umwina Anatoti, uwa mu bena Benjamini. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:13 Uwalenga ikumi limo umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo, ali ni Maharai umwina Netofati uwa mu bena Sera. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:14 Uwalenga ikumi limo na umo (11) umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo na umo (11) ali ni Benaya umwina Piratoni uwa mu bena Efulemu. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:15 Uwalenga ikumi limo na babili (12) umukalamba aleyangalila abashilika mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12) ali ni Helidai umwina Netofati, ukufuma mu lupwa lwakwa Otinieli. Mwali abantu abaume amakana amakumi yabili na yane (24,000) mu mpuka yakwe." 
1Chronicles27:16 Abaletungulula inko sha bena Israeli bali ifi. Pa luko lwa bena Rubeni ali ni Eliese, mwana Sikiri. Pa luko lwa bena Simeoni, ni Shefatiya mwana Maaka." 
1Chronicles27:17 Pa luko lwa bena Levi, ni Hashabiya mwana Kemueli. Pa mutundu wakwa Aroni ni Sadoki." 
1Chronicles27:18 Pa luko lwakwa Yuda, ni Elihu munyina Davidi. Pa luko lwakwa Isaka, ni Omiri mwana Mikaeli." 
1Chronicles27:19 Pa luko lwakwa Sebuloni, ni Ishimaiya mwana Obadiya. Pa luko lwakwa Naftali, ni Yerimoti mwana Asirieli." 
1Chronicles27:20 Pa luko lwakwa Efulemu, ni Hoshea mwana Asasiya. Pali citika wa luko lwakwa Manase ni Yoeli mwana Pedaiya." 
1Chronicles27:21 Pali citika imbi iya luko lwakwa Manase mu Gileadi, ni Ido mwana Sakaria. Pa luko lwakwa Benjamini, ni Yasieli mwana Abune." 
1Chronicles27:22 Pa luko lwakwa Dani, ni Asareli mwana Yerohamu. Aba ebali intungulushi aba nko sha bena Israeli." 
1Chronicles27:23 Davidi tapendeleko abaume abali ne myaka amakumi yabili (20) nangu ukwisa panshi, pantu Yawe alaile ukulenga abena Israeli ukusanda kwati ni ntanda sha mu mulu." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yoabu mwana Seruiya ewatendeke ukupenda abaume lelo afilwa ukupwisha pantu ubukali bwakwa Yawe bwaishile pa bena Israeli pa mulandu wa uku kupenda. Kabili uku kupenda takwalembelwe mwibuku lya milandu ya bufumu bwakwa Davidi. 
1Chronicles27:25 Asimafeti mwana Adieli ewaleangalila pa fyuma baletutila ifya mfumu. Elyo Yonatani mwana Usia, ewaleangalila pa mayanda ya matala ayali mu maboma, mu misumba, mu mishi, elyo no mwali mpungu shakulondelapo ishashingulwike." 
1Chronicles27:26 Esiri mwana Kelubi ewaleangalila pa babomfi abalelima amabala. 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimei umwina Rama ewaleangalila pa milimo ya mu mabala ya myangashi. Sabudi umwina Shifamu ewaleangalila pa busomboshi bwa mu mabala ya myangashi no kusunga umwangashi baletutila. 
1Chronicles27:28 Baali Hanani umwina Gederi ewaleangalila pa fimiti fya miolifa ne mikunyu iyali mwisamba lya lupili lwa ku masamba. Elyo Yoashi nao ewaleangalila pa milimo yakusunga amafuta. 
1Chronicles27:29 Shitirai umwina Sharoni ewaleangalila pa fitekwa ifyalelya umulemfwe wa mu Sharoni. Shafati, mwana Adilai, ewaleangalila pa fitekwa ifyalelya umulemfwe mu mawanga." 
1Chronicles27:30 Obili umwina Ishimaeli ewaleangalila pa ngamila. Yedeya umwina Meronoti ewaleangalila pali bapunda. 
1Chronicles27:31 Yasisi umwina Hagiri ewaleangalila pa mikuni. Aba bonse ebali bacilolo bakwangalila pa fipe fya mfumu Davidi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatani, nalume wakwa Davidi, ewali mpandamano. Ali umuntu uwakwete ukwishiba kabili ali ni kalemba. Yehieli mwana Makimoni ewaleangalila pa bana ba mfumu." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli ewali mpandamano wa mfumu. Hushai umwina Aki ewali cibusa wa mfumu. 
1Chronicles27:34 Uwaishile pyana Ahitofeli ni Yehoiyada mwana Benaya, elyo pakonka Abiyata. Yoabu ewali umukalamba wa bashilika ba mfumu." 
1Chronicles28:1 Davidi aitile bacilolo bonse aba mu Israeli mukulongana ku Yerusalemu. Bacilolo ba nko, abakalamba ba mpuka ya bantu abalebombela imfumu, abakalamba ba pa fita amakana (1,000), abakalamba ba pa fita imyanda (100), bacilolo abalemona pa fipe, elyo na balemona pa fitekwa fya mfumu pamo na bana bakwe, bacilolo ba kwisano, impalume shabulwi elyo na bonse abacenjela mukulwa inkondo." 
1Chronicles28:2 Elyo imfumu Davidi yaimine yalanda aiti, “Umfweni kuli ine, mwe bamunyinane kabili abantu bandi. Ine cali pa mutima wandi ukukuula iŋanda iyakwikalamo Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe, iyakubomba nga pakunyanta amakasa yakwa Lesa wesu, kabili nalipekanya ukuti nkuule." 
1Chronicles28:3 Lelo Lesa atile kuli ine, ‘Teiwe uli nokukuula iŋanda apakuba ishina lyandi, pantu uli muntu wabulwi kabili uwasumyapo umulopa.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 “Nomba Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, ewansalile ukufuma mu lupwa lwandi lonse ukuba imfumu ya bena Israeli umuyayaya. Alisalile Yuda ukuba intungulushi, elyo mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda asala ulupwa lwandi. Elyo ukufuma pa bana bonse abakwa tata, calimusekeshe ukumbika pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli." 
1Chronicles28:5 Yawe alimpeela abana abengi, kabili pa bana bandi bonse asalapo umwana wandi Solomoni ukuti akabe uwakwikala pa cipuna ca bufumu bwakwa Yawe ubwa bena Israeli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Alandile kuli ine ati, ‘Umwana obe Solomoni euli nokunkuulila iŋanda elyo ne mansa shandi, pantu nimusala ukuba umwana wandi, na ine ndi nokuba wishi." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ndi nokwimika ubufumu bwakwe umuyayaya, nga cakuti aikatisha ukulakonka amafunde yandi ne fipope fyandi, ngefyo cili pali ino nshita.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 “Kanshi nomba pa cinso ca bena Israeli bonse, na ku lukuta lwakwa Yawe, na pa cinso cakwa Lesa wesu, mulecenjela pakukonka bwino amafunde yonse ayakwa Yawe Lesa wenu pakuti mukabe abakukwata icalo ici icisuma no kulenga cikabe icakushiilako abana benu nge cikwatwa ca pe na pe." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Kabili iwe, we mwana wandi Solomoni, ishiba Lesa wakwa wiso, ulemubombela no mutima obe onse uwacishinka, elyo na mano yakuitemenwa. Pantu Yawe alafwailisha ifya muli cila mutima no kwishibisha akantu konse akali kunuma ya matontonkanyo. Nga cakuti wamufwaya, uli nokumusanga. Lelo nga cakuti wamutaluka, ali nokukukaana umuyayaya." 
1Chronicles28:10 Nomba tontonkanya, pantu Yawe niwe asalile ukumukuulila iŋanda yakwe iyamushilo. Ube uwashipa, no kubomba.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Elyo Davidi apeela umwana wakwe Solomoni ifipepala ifyalelangilila ifyo engakuula Umuputule wa pa mwinshi we Tempele, amayanda, amatala, imiputule ya pamulu elyo ne miputule ya mukati no muputule wa cifulo ca kufutilwapo ifyabubifi." 
1Chronicles28:12 Amupeela ifipepala apali ukulangilila fyonse ifyo atontonkanya mu mano yakwe pakukuula imansa sha ŋanda yakwa Yawe, ne miputule iyashingulwike, na pa matala ya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa, elyo na pa matala ya fyamushilo ifyaletuulwa." 
1Chronicles28:13 Amukonkomesha na pa musango wa mabumba ya bashimapepo na bena Levi elyo na pa milimo yonse iyakubomba mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, pamo pene ne fibombelo fyonse ifyakubomfya." 
1Chronicles28:14 Amupeela golide icipimo ukulingana no wakubomba pakupangamo ifipe fyonse ifya golide, ifyakubomfya mu milimo iyalekana lekana. Kabili na silifa icipimo, ukulingana no wakupangilamo ifipe fyonse ifya silifa ifyakubomfya mu milimo iyalekana lekana." 
1Chronicles28:15 Amupeela icipimo ca golide uwakupangilamo icakutekapo ifisaniko, ne fisaniko fyafiko ifya golide, cila cimo icakutekapo pamo ne cisaniko caciko, kabili ne cipimo ca silifa uwakupangilamo icakutekapo ifisaniko, ne fisaniko fyafiko ifya silifa, ukulingana ne milimo yakwete cila cakutekapo." 
1Chronicles28:16 Amupeela icipimo ca golide uwalinga ukupangilako itebulo lyakutekapo imikate. Kabili amupeele ne cipimo ca silifa uwakupangilako amatebulo yakutekapo ifipe fya silifa. 
1Chronicles28:17 Amupeela icipimo ca golide wine wine, uwakupangila amafoloko, imbale shakusambilamo ne ya nkombo. Amupeela icipimo ca golide wakupangila imbale imo imo, ne cipimo ca silifa wakupangila imbale imo imo." 
1Chronicles28:18 Amupeele ne cipimo ca golide uwasungululwa uwakupangila ubulambo bwakocelapo ububani. Kabili amupeela ne cipepala icalelangilila iceleta, emukutila bakerubi wa golide abafungulwile amapindo yabo no kufimba pa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Yawe." 
1Chronicles28:19 Davidi asosa ati, “Fyonse ifi fyalembwa ukufuma ku kuboko kwakwa Yawe kuli ine, kabili alimpeela ukwiluka muli fyonse ifishinka fya mibombele.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Kabili Davidi aeba umwana wakwe Solomoni ati, “Ube uwakosa kabili uwashipa no kubomba uyu mulimo. Wikwata umwenso nangu ukufupuka pantu Yawe Lesa, Lesa wandi, ali na iwe. Takafilwepo nangu cimo mu mweo obe nangu ukukuposa, mpakafye imilimo yakubomba iya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ikapwe." 
1Chronicles28:21 Amabumba ya bashimapepo na bena Levi yalifye ayaipekanya ukubomba imilimo yonse iya pa ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Kabili umuntu onse uwacenjela mu milimo iyalekana lekana ali nokukwafwa ukubomba. Elyo ne ntungulushi pamo na bantu bonse bali nokumfwila fyonse ifyo wakulabeba.” 
1Chronicles29:1 Elyo imfumu Davidi yaebele ibumba lya bantu bonse aiti, “Umwana wandi Solomoni, uo Lesa umwine asalile, mwaice kabili uushilaishiba ifingi. Elyo umulimo uyu ukalamba, pantu Itempele ili telya muntu, lelo lyakwa Yawe Lesa." 
1Chronicles29:2 Nimomba na maka yandi yonse ukupekanya ifyakukuulila iŋanda yakwa Lesa, golide uwakubomfya mu milimo ya golide, silifa uwakubomfya ku milimo ya silifa, umukuba uwakubomfya ku milimo ya fya mukuba, ifyela ifyakubomfya ku milimo ya fyela, elyo ne fimuti ifyakubomfya ku milimo ya fimuti, pamo pene no tumabwe twakutantikila utwa onikisi na tumbi utwamutengo, utumabwe twa mabala ayalekana lekana, elyo ne misango yonse iya mabwe ayakulungilwa bwino aya marbo, kabili fyonse fyapekanishiwa ifingi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Kabili ine pa mulandu wakutemwa iŋanda yakwa Lesa wandi, napeela nomba ubunonshi bwandi ubwa golide na silifa ku milimo ya ŋanda yakwa Lesa wandi, ukucila pa mulu wa fintu fyonse ifyo napeela ku mulimo wa iyi ŋanda yamushilo." 
1Chronicles29:4 Emukuti, amatalanta amakana yatatu (3,000) aya golide wa ku Ofiri, elyo na matalanta amakana cine lubali (7,000) aya silifa uwasungululwa bwino, uwakukambatika ku fibumba fya ŋanda." 
1Chronicles29:5 Nimpekanya golide pa milimo ya golide, elyo silifa nayo pa milimo ya silifa, elyo pa milimo yonse iyili nokubombwa na bantu abacenjela mukupanga ifyakupanga panga. Nomba nani uuipeeleshe umwine ukupeela ilelo kuli Yawe?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Elyo intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo, abakalamba ba nko sha bena Israeli, abakalamba ba pa fita amakana (1,000), abakalamba ba pa fita imyanda (100), elyo na bacilolo abalemona pa milimo ya mfumu baliipeele mukuitemenwa." 
1Chronicles29:7 Bapeele ku mulimo wa ŋanda yakwa Lesa amatalanta amakana yasano (5,000) elyo na madariki amakana ikumi limo (10,000) aya golide,, amatalanta amakana ikumi limo (10,000) aya silifa, amatalanta amakana ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18,000) aya mukuba elyo na matalanta amakana umwanda umo (100,000) aya cela." 
1Chronicles29:8 Onse uwakwete utumabwe twamutengo apeela ku cipao ca ŋanda yakwa Yawe no kufisha mu minwe yakwa Yehieli umwina Geshoni. 
1Chronicles29:9 Icintubwingi calisansamwike pa musango wa fintu intungulushi shabo shasekelele ukupeela kwakuitemenwa ne mitima yabo kuli Yawe. Kabili imfumu Davidi nayo yalisansamwike nganshi. 
1Chronicles29:10 Davidi alumbanya Yawe pa cinso cabalongene bonse alanda ati, “Ulumbanishiwe we Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli shifwe wesu, umuyayaya no muyayaya." 
1Chronicles29:11 Pantu fyonse fyobe we Yawe, ubukulu na maka, ubukata no bucindami, elyo no bukankala. Pantu fyonse ifyaba mu mulu elyo na pano isonde, fyobe. Iwe we Yawe niwe mwine wa bufumu kabili walisumbulwa ngo mutwe wa pali fyonse." 
1Chronicles29:12 Ubukankala no mucinshi fifuma kuli iwe! Elyo niwe wateeka ifintu fyonse. Ubulamba na maka fyaba mu minwe yobe, niwe wimya no kupeela amaka kuli bonse." 
1Chronicles29:13 Nomba twakupeela amalumbo we Lesa wesu, mukulumbanya ishina lyobe ilyabucindami." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Lelo ine nine ani, kabili abantu bandi ni bani, pakuti tupeele apakalamba umutuulo muli uyu musango? Ifintu fyonse fifuma kuli iwe, elyo na ifwe tupeelefye ififuma ku minwe yobe." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ifwe tuli balebeshi kabili abeni pa cinso cobe, ngefyo bashifwe bali. Inshiku shesu pano calo shaba nge cinshingwa icishakwata isubilo." 
1Chronicles29:16 Kabili ifintu fyonse ifyo twatuula, ifyakukuulila iyi ŋanda apakuba ishina lyobe ilyamushilo, fyafuma ku minwe yobe, kabili fyonsefye fyobe." 
1Chronicles29:17 We Lesa wandi nalishiba ukuti ulafwailisha ifyaba mu mutima kabili walitemwa ubololoke, na mu bololoke ubwa mutima wandi emo mpeelele ifi fintu fyonse. Elyo ine pakuba no mutima uwasekelela kabili uwacishinka napeela mukuitemenwa icibwesha. Nomba ndi ne nsansa pakumona abantu bobe, abatuulile kukuitemenwa kuli iwe abene." 
1Chronicles29:18 We Yawe, Lesa wa bashifwe Abrahamu, Isaki na Israeli, sunga pe na pe uku kukabila mu mitima ya bantu bobe, no kutungulula imitima yabo uko uli." 
1Chronicles29:19 Kabili upeele ku mwana wandi Solomoni umutima uwacishinka pakuti alebaka amafunde yobe ne fipope fyobe mukubomba fyonse ifyo ufwaya, elyo na fyonse ifyakulenga akakuule Itempele ilyo ine mpekanishishe ifi ifibombelo.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Elyo Davidi aeba abantu bonse abalongene ati, “Nomba paaleni Yawe Lesa wenu na matotelo.” Kanshi bonse epakulapaala Yawe, Lesa wa bashibo, na matotelo. Bonse bakontamika imitwe yabo panshi no kupeela umucinshi kuli Yawe na ku mfumu." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo abena Israeli balekele Yawe amalambo na malambo yakoca. Balekele iŋombe ishilume ikana limo (1,000), basukusuku ikana limo (1,000), utwana twa mpaanga utwaume ikana limo (1,000), pamo ne mituulo ya fyakunwa, elyo na malambo ayengi ukulingana na bena Israeli." 
1Chronicles29:22 Kanshi pali bulya bushiku balya no kunwa ne nsansa ishingi pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Elyo babuula Solomoni mwana Davidi bamubika pa bufumu umuku wacibili, no kumusuba ukuba imfumu pa cinso cakwa Yawe, elyo Sadoki nao ukuba shimapepo." 
1Chronicles29:23 Elyo Solomoni aya ikala pa cipuna cabufumu ico Yawe amusontelepo kukuteeka pa malo yakwa wishi Davidi. Atendeka no kushuka mufyo alecita elyo na bena Israeli bonse balamubeela. 
1Chronicles29:24 Bacilolo bonse, impalume shonse, pamo pene na bana baume bonse aba mfumu Davidi, baipeele ukulanakila imfumu Solomoni." 
1Chronicles29:25 Kanshi Yawe nao acindamika Solomoni apakalamba nganshi pa cinso ca bena Israeli bonse, amupeela no bufumu ubwalulumbi, ubushatalile abukwata imfumu nelyo imo mu Israeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Davidi mwana Yese ateekele Israeli yonse ilyo ali pa bufumu. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ateekele pa bufumu mu calo ca Israeli pa myaka amakumi yane (40). Imyaka cine lubali ateekele mu Hebuloni, elyo pa myaka amakumi yatatu na itatu (33) ateekele mu Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Afwile ninshi ali ne myaka isuma nganshi iyabukote bwe shuko, ubwa nshiku ishingi, ifyuma ifingi elyo no mucinshi uwingi. Solomoni umwana wakwe epakupyana pa cifulo cakwe icabufumu mukuteeka icalo." 
1Chronicles29:29 Lelo palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Davidi, ukufuma ilyo atendeke ukuteeka ukufika na ku mpela, fyonse fyalilembwa mu citabo camilandu cakwa kamona Samwele, mu citabo camilandu cakwa Natani kasesema, elyo na mu citabo camilandu cakwa Gadi uwali kamona." 
1Chronicles29:30 Mu fitabo fine ifi emwaba ne fishinka fyonse ifya pa bufumu bwakwe, amaka akwete, ifintu fyonse ifyamucitikile, ifyacitikile Israeli lintu ali pa bufumu, elyo ne fyacitike ku shamfumu sha mu fyalo fimbi." 
2Chronicles1:1 Solomoni mwana Davidi aikele bwino bwino pa bufumu bwakwe, pantu Yawe Lesa wakwe ali nankwe elyo no kumulenga ukucindama nganshi." 
2Chronicles1:2 Elyo Solomoni alanda ku bena Israeli bonse ku bakalamba ba pa fita amakana (1,000), na ku bakalamba ba pa fita imyanda (100), kuli bashicilye elyo na ku ntungulushi shonse isha mu Israeli, na ku bakalamba ba mayanda ya bashibo." 
2Chronicles1:3 Elyo Solomoni na bantu bonse abalongene baya pa ncende yakupepelapo iyo balecindika ku Gibeoni, pantu kulya kwine ekwali Itenti Lyakukumaninamo ilyakwa Lesa lilya Mose umubomfi wakwa Lesa apangile mu matololo." 
2Chronicles1:4 Nomba Davidi panuma yakupekanya Itenti mu Yerusalemu, alile senda Imbokoshi ya Cipangano iyakwa Lesa ukufuma ku Kiriati Yarimu, aleta ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles1:5 Lelo ubulambo bwa mukuba ubwapangile Besaleli mwana Uri, nao uwali mwana Huri, bwena bwali ku Gibeoni kuntanshi ye Tenti lyakwa Yawe. Kanshi Solomoni na bantu alongene nabo epakuya pepela kulya kwine." 
2Chronicles1:6 Solomoni anina aya fika apali ubulambo bwa mukuba ubwali pa cinso cakwa Yawe mwi Tenti lyakukumaninamo epo atuulila amalambo yakoca ikana limo (1,000)." 
2Chronicles1:7 Mu nshita ya bushiku bwine bulya Lesa amonekela kuli Solomoni elyo amweba ati, “Lomba icintu conse ico wingafwaya ukuti nkupeele.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Solomoni ayaswike Lesa ati, “Walilanga uluse ulukalamba nganshi kuli tata Davidi, elyo na ine naunenga ukuba imfumu pa cipuna cakwa tata." 
2Chronicles1:9 Eico we Yawe Lesa leka ubufwayo bobe kuli tata Davidi bufikilishiwe, pantu naunenga ukuba imfumu pa bantu abafula ngo lukungu lwa pano isonde." 
2Chronicles1:10 Nomba umpeeleko amano no kwishiba, pakuti ntungulule aba bantu. Nga nani uwingabomba umulimo wakutungulula abantu bobe aba abacindami?”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Lesa aeba Solomoni ati, “Pa mulandu wakukabila ici mu mutima obe, kabili icakuti taulombele icuma, ubunonshi nangu ubucindami nangu ukwipaya abalwani bobe, kabili taulombele ubumi bwakwikalila pe, lelo walomba amano no kwishiba pakutungulula abantu bandi pali abo nkusontele ukuba imfumu," 
2Chronicles1:12 eico nalakupeela amano elyo no kwishiba. Kabili ndi nokukupeela ubunonshi, icuma elyo no mucinshi ifyo imfumu ishakutangilile shishatalile ashikwata nangu ishikakonkapo tashakatale ashikwata.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Elyo Solomoni afuma ku ncende yakupepelapo ku Gibeoni ukwali Itenti lyakukumaninamo, aya ku Yerusalemu. Elyo ayamba no kuteeka abena Israeli."
