2Chronicles1:14 Solomoni alonganika amaceleta na bakabalwe. Akwete amaceleta ikana limo ne myanda ine (1,400) elyo na bakabalwe amakana ikumi limo na yabili (12,000) ifyo asungile mu misumba ya maceleta elyo fimbi aba nafyo mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Imfumu yalenga silifa na golide ukufula nga mabwe mu Yerusalemu. Kabili yalenga ifimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ukufula nge mikunyu ya mwisamba lya mpili. 
2Chronicles1:16 Bakabalwe bakwa Solomoni babashitile ku calo ca Egupto na ku Kuwe. Bashimakwebo ba mfumu ebabashitile ukufuma ku Kuwe. 
2Chronicles1:17 Umutengo we celeta limo ukufuma ku Egupto wali indalama amashekeli ya silifa imyanda mutanda (600) elyo kabalwe umo pa mashekeli ya silifa umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150). Bashimakwebo bakwa Solomoni nabo baleshitisha ku shamfumu shonse isha bena Hiti na bena Aramu. 
2Chronicles2:1 Solomoni ayambile ukukuula Itempele ilye shina lyakwa Yawe elyo ne sano lyakwe. 
2Chronicles2:2 Apekenye abantu amakana amakumi cine lubali (70,000) abakusenda ifipe, elyo na bantu amakana amakumi cine konse konse (80,000) abakutoba amabwe mu mpili, elyo na bantu amakana yatatu ne myanda mutanda (3,600) nga bakangalila wa babomfi." 
2Chronicles2:3 Elyo Solomoni atuma amashiwi kuli Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi ayakuti, “Ntuminako imilando ya cimuti icalepesha ica keda filya fine wacitile kuli tata Davidi ilyo wamutumine ifimuti fyakukuulila isano aleikalamo." 
2Chronicles2:4 Nomba nalayamba ukukuula iŋanda ye shina lyakwa Yawe Lesa wandi elyo no kuipeela kuli ena ngo mwakulaocela ububani ubwanunka bwino pa cinso cakwe, ukulatantikamo imikate lyonse elyo no kupeelelamo amalambo yakoca cila lucelo ne cungulo, pa Masabata na pa kutendeka kwa myeshi elyo na pa nshikunkulu ishasontwa ishakwa Yawe Lesa wesu. Ili lifunde lya pe ku bena Israeli." 
2Chronicles2:5 “Iŋanda nalakuula ili nokuba iyicindami, pantu Lesa wesu alicindama ukucila imilungu imbi." 
2Chronicles2:6 Lelo nani engalinga ukukuulila Lesa iŋanda? Apofye imyulu nangufye imyulu ya pamulu teti imukumane. Bushe ine nine ani uwakukuulila Lesa iŋanda, kanshi kanofye incende umwakocela amalambo pa cinso cakwe?" 
2Chronicles2:7 “Eico ntuminako umuntu uwacenjela ukubomba mu fya golide na silifa, umukuba ne fyela, ubushishi ubwakashikila, ubwakashikisha elyo no bwacifufya, kabili uwaishiba ukulenga pa fyela, uwakwisa mukubombela mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu pamo na babomfi bandi abacenjela abo tata Davidi apekenye." 
2Chronicles2:8 Kabili ntuminako imilando ya fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda, iya paini ne ya aligumi ukufuma ku Lebanoni, pantu nalishiba ukuti abantu bobe abaume balicenjela mukutema imilando uko. Abantu bandi bakulabomba na bantu bobe" 
2Chronicles2:9 kukupekanya imiti iyingi, pantu iŋanda ndekuula ifwile ukuba iyikalamba kabili iyalulumbi." 
2Chronicles2:10 Ndi nokupeela ababomfi bobe abakaputula ifimuti amalipilo ya iŋanu ishasokolwa amakilo amakana yane ne myanda ine (4,400), bale iyafina amakilo amakana yane ne myanda ine (4,400), imyangashi amalita amakana imyanda ine na makumi yane (440,000) elyo na mafuta ya miolifa amalita amakana imyanda ine na makumi yane (440,000).”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Hiramu imfumu ya ku Turi yayasuka Solomoni mu nkalata aiti, “Pantu Yawe alitemwa abantu bakwe, eco akubikile pa bufumu.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Hiramu alundapo amashiwi yakuti, “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli uwabumbile umulu ne sonde. Apeela imfumu Davidi umwana uwamano, uwapeelwa ukwishiba elyo no kwiluka, euli nokukuula Itempele lyakwa Yawe elyo no kuikuulila iŋanda yakwe iye sano." 
2Chronicles2:13 “Nalatuma Huramu Abi kuli iwe, umuntu uwacenjela nganshi." 
2Chronicles2:14 Nyina wa uyu muntu afumine ku Dani elyo wishi afumine ku Turi. Alikanshiwe ukubomba mu fya golide na silifa, umukuba ne fyela, ukubasa amabwe no kulepula imbao, ukubomba mu nsalu ishakashikila, ishacifufya ne shakashikisha. Alishiba bwino imilimo yakulenga ifintu fyonse kabili kuti alenga icintu conse engasontelwa. Akulabomba na bacenjela bobe elyo na ba mfumu yandi Davidi wiso." 
2Chronicles2:15 “Lekeni nomba imfumu yandi itumine ababomfi baiko iŋanu, bale, amafuta ya miolifa elyo no mwangashi yalaile." 
2Chronicles2:16 Na ifwe tuli nokutema imilando yonse iyo ulefwaya ukufuma ku Lebanoni. Elyo pakuileta ku Yopa tukaikakanya ikese ileelela pa mulu wa menshi ya pali bemba, elyo na iwe ukese isenda ukutwala ku Yerusalemu.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Solomoni epakupenda abenafyalo bonse abali mu Israeli, ukutula apo wishi Davidi apendele abenafyalo, asanga impendwa bali amakana umwanda umo na makumi yasano na yatatu, ne myanda mutanda (153,600)." 
2Chronicles2:18 Asalapo abantu amakana amakumi cine lubali (70,000) ukuba abakutunta ifipe, bambi amakana amakumi cine konse konse (80,000) ukuba abakutoba amabwe mu mpili elyo bambi amakana yatatu ne myanda mutanda (3,600) ababika ukuba bakangalila pali bena pakuti abantu balebomba imilimo." 
2Chronicles3:1 Elyo Solomoni atendeka ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe mu Yerusalemu pa lupili lwa Moriya, palya Lesa amonekele wishi Davidi. Cali ni pa lubansa lwakutwilapo ulwakwa Arauna umwina Yebusi, incende iyo Davidi apekenye." 
2Chronicles3:2 Pa bushiku bwalenga shibili mu mweshi walenga ibili mu mwaka walenga bune uwa pa bufumu, epo atendeke ukukuula." 
2Chronicles3:3 Umufula Solomoni apangile uwakukuulapo iŋanda yakwa Lesa wali amakubiti amakumi mutanda (60) mubutali elyo na makubiti amakumi yabili (20) mubwipi, ukubomfya icipimo cakale." 
2Chronicles3:4 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi wa ŋanda walepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) ukucilinganya mubwipi, elyo amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) ukulola mumulu. Akupa mukati golide wine wine." 
2Chronicles3:5 Atantika imbao sha fimuti fya paini mu muputule ukalamba, ashingulako na golide iyawamishiwa bwino. Alengapo no tuncindu ne minyololo iyapikana." 
2Chronicles3:6 Ayanshika mu ŋanda utumabwe utwayemba. Kabili abomfya na golide wa ku Pafaimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Ashingula golide ku myalo ya mu mutenge, ku nceshi, ku fibumba elyo na ku fiibi fya mu ŋanda, abasa na bakerubi pa fibumba." 
2Chronicles3:8 Akuula Umuputule uwamushilo icine cine. Ubutali bwauko ukucilinganya iŋanda walepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) elyo na makubiti amakumi yabili mubwipi (20). Ashingula mukati monse na golide uwawamishiwa bwino uwa matalanta imyanda mutanda (600)," 
2Chronicles3:9 insunga sha golide shafinine ukucila citika wa kilo. Kabili ashingula golide mu ncende sha pamulu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Mu muputule wamushilo icine cine apangilamo bakerubi babili, ashingulako na golide." 
2Chronicles3:11 Amapindo ya bakerubi yalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20). Ipindo limo lyalepele amakubiti yasano kabili lyashinta mu cibumba ca ŋanda, elyo ipindo libiye nalyo lyalepele amakubiti yasano, lyena lyasuntinkana ne pindo lyakwa kerubi umbi." 
2Chronicles3:12 Kabili mu musango umo wine ipindo limo ilyakwa kerubi wabubili lyalepele amakubiti yasano elyo lyashinta ku cibumba cibiye ica ŋanda, ne pindo libiye nalyo lyalepele amakubiti yasano nalyo lyasuntinkana ne pindo lyakwa kerubi wantanshi." 
2Chronicles3:13 Ubutali bwa mapindo ya bakerubi ninshi nayasuntinkana yalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20). Bapangilwe nabeminina pa makasa yabo baloseshe amenso ku muputule ukalamba. 
2Chronicles3:14 Apanga icisalu icakucingako ku bushishi bwacifufya, ubwakashikila no bwakashika cee elyo ne nsalu iyabuuta iyapikulwa ubusaka, iyo bapikwilepo bakerubi." 
2Chronicles3:15 Apanga inceshi shibili kuntanshi ya ŋanda isho shonse ishalepele amakubiti amakumi yatatu na yasano (35), na cila luceshi lwali no mutwe pamulu uwali amakubiti yasano." 
2Chronicles3:16 Apanga ne minyololo ya citabataba no kubika pa mulu wa fyaimikwa. Apanga na mateke umwanda umo (100), akambatika ku minyololo." 
2Chronicles3:17 Aimika inceshi pantanshi ye Tempele, lumo ku kapinda ka ku kulyo lumo nalo ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Ulwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo alwinika Yakini elyo ulwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso alwinika Boasi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Kabili apangile ubulambo bwa mukuba ubwali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) mubutali na makubiti amakumi yabili (20) mubwipi, elyo na makubiti ikumi limo ukuya mu mulu." 
2Chronicles4:2 Apanga icishiba icaengululwa ku fyela, icashinguluka, icali amakubiti ikumi limo ukufuma pa mpela ukufika pa mpela elyo amakubiti yasano ukuya mu mulu. Intambo iyalepa amakubiti amakumi yatatu (30) eyalebomba ukupiminako mukucishinguluka pamulu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Pesamba apangilepo ifinama ifyapala bacilume ba ŋombe ukucishinguluka. Fyali ikumi limo pali kubiti umo. Apanga bacilume ba ŋombe ashitantika mu milongo ibili nashikambatila ku cishiba. 
2Chronicles4:4 Icishiba caikala pa mulu wa bacilume ba ŋombe ikumi limo na babili (12). Batatu balolesha ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, batatu ku kapinda ka ku kuso, batatu ku kabanga elyo shitatu ku masamba. Icishiba catekwa pa mulu wa ŋombe, ne numa shashiko shakumanina pakati." 
2Chronicles4:5 Umutika waciko waba nge cisansa ca lupi, no mulomo waciko waba ngo mulomo wa lukombo nangu uwe luba. Icishiba calesunga amenshi ayali balita amakana amakumi mutanda na mutanda (66,000)." 
2Chronicles4:6 Apanga imbale shakusambilamo ikumi limo, elyo abika shisano ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ne shibiye shisano ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Muli ishi mbale emwakusamfya ifyakubomfya pakutuula amalambo yakoca, lelo mu cishiba mwakusambafye bashimapepo beka." 
2Chronicles4:7 Apanga ifyakutekapo ifisaniko ikumi limo ifya golide ukulingana nomo fyapekanishiwe, elyo afibika mwi Tempele. Abika fisano ku kapinda ka ku kuso elyo fimbi fisano ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
2Chronicles4:8 Kabili apanga amatebulo ikumi ayabika mwi Tempele. Abika yasano ku kapinda ka ku kuso elyo na yasano ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Kabili apanga inweno umwanda umo (100) isha golide ishakusanshilako. 
2Chronicles4:9 Apanga ulubansa lwa bashimapepo. Elyo apanga icibansa icikalamba elyo ne fiibi fya ici cibansa kabili ashingulako no mukuba ku fiibi. 
2Chronicles4:10 Abika icishiba lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso ukulemenena lwa ku kabanga. 
2Chronicles4:11 Kabili apanga amalongo elyo na bafosholo elyo ne nweno shakusanshilako. Kanshi Huramu epakupwisha imilimo yonse iyo abombele imfumu Solomoni iya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa: 
2Chronicles4:12 Inceshi shibili, imitwe ibili iyapala inweno iya pa mulu wa nceshi, iminyololo ibili iyapikulwa nge citabataba iyakuwaminisha imitwe ibili iyapala inweno iya pa mulu wa nceshi," 
2Chronicles4:13 amateke imyanda ine (400) aya ku minyololo ibili, cila capikulwa kwali imitande ibili iya mateke iyakuwaminisha imitwe iyapala inweno pa mulu wa nceshi," 
2Chronicles4:14 Ifyakutekapo ne misambilo nayo," 
2Chronicles4:15 icishiba na bacilume ba ŋombe ikumi limo na babili (12) pesamba lyaciko," 
2Chronicles4:16 Imipika, bafosholo, imitunkulo ne fipe fyonse ifyaba ngefi. Ifipe fyonse ifyo Huramu Abi apangile imfumu Solomoni ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe fyali fya mukuba uwawamishiwa bwino." 
2Chronicles4:17 Imfumu yaengulwile uyu mukuba mwibumba lya mwiwanga lya mu Yordani pakati ka Sukoti na Saretani. 
2Chronicles4:18 Ifi fyonse fintu Solomoni apangile fyali ifingi nganshi icakuti no kufina kwa mukuba teti kwishibikwe. 
2Chronicles4:19 Kabili Solomoni apangile ifipe fyonse ifyakubomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa: ubulambo bwa golide, amatebulo ayakutekapo imikate iya ku cinso cakwa Lesa," 
2Chronicles4:20 ifyakutekapo ifisaniko ifya golide wine wine ne fisaniko fyafiko ifyakwaka pantanshi ya muputule wamushilo ngefyo catantikwe," 
2Chronicles4:21 amaluba ya golide, ifisaniko ne fyakumanikilako, fyonse fyali fya golide wine wine," 
2Chronicles4:22 utwakushimisha umulilo, inweno shakusanshilako, imbale elyo ne fyabubani, fyonse fyali fya golide wine wine, elyo ne fiibi ifya mwi Tempele, ifiibi ifya ku muputule wamushilo icine cine elyo ne fiibi fya mu muputule ukalamba, fyonse fyali fya golide." 
2Chronicles5:1 Ilyo imilimo yonse iyo Solomoni abombele mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe yapwile, aletelamo ifintu fyonse ifyo wishi Davidi apekenye no kupatula. Aletelamo silifa, golide elyo na fyonse ifyakucindamika mukati. Aisa fibika na mu matala ya ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
2Chronicles5:2 Elyo Solomoni aita abakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli, intungulushi sha nko shonse elyo na bakalamba ba ndupwa sha bena Israeli ukuya ku Yerusalemu pakuti balete Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe ukufuma ku Sioni, umusumba wakwa Davidi." 
2Chronicles5:3 Kabili abaume bonse aba mu Israeli baisa longana pamo ku mfumu pa nshita ya nshikunkulu mu mweshi walenga cine lubali. 
2Chronicles5:4 Ilyo abakalamba bonse aba mu Israeli bafika, abena Levi epakwimya Imbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe basenda," 
2Chronicles5:5 elyo baleta Imbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe, Itenti lyakukumaninamo elyo ne fyamushilo fyonse ifyabamo. Bashimapepo abena Levi ebasenda fyonse." 
2Chronicles5:6 Elyo imfumu Solomoni no lukuta lonse ulwa bena Israeli, abalongene kulya ali, batangila pa ntanshi ya Mbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe, batuula impaanga ne ŋombe ishingi ishakuti teti shishibikwe nangu ukushipenda." 
2Chronicles5:7 Elyo bashimapepo baleta Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe pa cifulo caiko icamushilo mukati ka ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Muputule wamushilo icine cine. Baiteka mwisamba lya mapindo ya bakerubi. 
2Chronicles5:8 Bakerubi bayanshika amapindo pa mulu wa ncende apali Imbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe, yafimba ne mbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe pamo ne fimuti fyakupingilako." 
2Chronicles5:9 Ifi fimuti fyali ifitali icalengele nokuti impela yafiko ilemoneka ku bali mu Muputule wamushilo, kuntanshi ya muputule Wamushilo icine cine, lelo impela tashalemoneka ku bali kumbi iyoo. Kabili na lelo cilifye filya fine." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mu Mbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe tamwali ifintu fimbi, kanofye amabwe ayapapatala yabili yalya Mose abikilemo ku Holebu, kulya Yawe apangile icipangano na bena Israeli ilyo bafumine ku Egupto." 
2Chronicles5:11 Elyo bashimapepo bafuma mu muputule wamushilo. Bashimapepo bonse abali kulya baliisangulwile, takwali na kusakamana iciputulwa babombelamo." 
2Chronicles5:12 Bonse abena Levi abali bakemba wa nyimbo Asafu, Hemani, Yedutuni, abana babo na ba ndupwa shabo baiminina ku kabanga ka bulambo, nabafwala ifyakufwala ifyabusaka, balelisha imiwaya, amaseese ne nsango. Bali na bashimapepo umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120) abalelisha amapenga." 
2Chronicles5:13 Bakalisha wa mapenga na bakemba baleimbila capamo ne shiwi limo mukupeela amalumbo no kutotela kuli Yawe. Ukukonkelesha mu mapenga ne miwaya ne filimba fimbi balesansula amashiwi ayakulumbanya Yawe abati, “Pantu ena musuma! Ukutemwa kwakwe kwamuyayaya.” Elyo Itempele, iŋanda yakwa Yawe, lyaisulamo ikumbi," 
2Chronicles5:14 na bashimapepo bafilwa ukubomba imilimo yabo pa mulandu we kumbi pantu mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa mwaisula ubucindami bwakwa Yawe. 
2Chronicles6:1 Elyo Solomoni asosa ati, “Yawe alilanda ukuti akulaikala mwikumbi ilyafiita." 
2Chronicles6:2 Ine ninkukuulila Iŋanda iyacindama, incende yobe iyakwikalililamo umuyayaya.”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Ninshi ulukuta lwa bena Israeli lucili nalwiminina palya pene, imfumu yapilibuka yabapaala." 
2Chronicles6:4 Elyo yalanda aiti, “Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli, uwasosele ne shiwi lyakwe kuli tata Davidi, elyo kabili ku kuboko kwakwe afikilishapo ubulayo alaile." 
2Chronicles6:5 Pantu atile, ‘Ukufuma ubushiku nafumishe abantu bandi mu Egupto, nshasalapo umusumba nangu umo uwa nko sha bena Israeli umwakukuula iŋanda umwakuba ishina lyandi. Kabili nshasala umuntu nangu umo uwakuti abe intungulushi pa bantu bandi abena Israeli." 
2Chronicles6:6 Lelo nomba ninsala Yerusalemu ukuba umusumba umwakuba ishina lyandi, kabili ninsala Davidi ukuba imfumu iyakuteeka abantu bandi abena Israeli.’" 
2Chronicles6:7 “Cali mu mutima wakwa tata Davidi wandi ukukuula iŋanda umwakuba ishina lyakwa Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli. 
2Chronicles6:8 Lelo Yawe aebele tata Davidi ati, ‘Pantu cali mu mutima obe ukukuula iŋanda umwakuba ishina lyandi, caliweme ukuti ici cibe mu mutima obe." 
2Chronicles6:9 Nomba teiwe uli nokukuula iŋanda umwakuba ishina lyandi, lelo umwana obe umwaume uo ukafyala eukankulila iŋanda umwakuba ishina lyandi.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Yawe alisunga ubulayo apangile. Ine nimpyana tata Davidi kabili nomba nine njikele pa cipuna cabufumu ica bena Israeli, ngefyo Yawe alaile. Kabili ninkuula iŋanda umwakuba ishina lyakwa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli." 
2Chronicles6:11 Muli iyi ŋanda emo mbikile Imbokoshi ya cipangano cakwa Yawe, umuli icipangano cakwa Yawe ico apangana na bena Israeli.”" 
2Chronicles6:12 Elyo Solomoni aiminina ku ntanshi ya bulambo bwakwa Yawe pa cinso ca lukuta lwa bantu bonse abena Israeli elyo atambalika amaboko yakwe. 
2Chronicles6:13 Nomba, Solomoni alipangile icibumbili ica mukuba icali amakubiti yasano mubutali, amakubiti yasano mubwipi elyo na makubiti yatatu ukuya pa mulu, elyo acibikile pakati ka lubansa lwakunse. Aiminina pa mulu wa cibumbili elyo afukama pantanshi ye bumba lya bena Israeli elyo asumbwila amaboko ku mulu." 
2Chronicles6:14 Alanda ukuti, “We Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli, takwaba Lesa umbi uwaba nga iwe mu mulu nangu pano isonde. Iwe we usunga icipangano cobe icacitemwiko na babomfi bobe abo abekalilila mu nshila shobe ne mitima yacishinka ukutemwa." 
2Chronicles6:15 Walisunga ubulayo bobe ku mubomfi obe tata Davidi ifyo wamulaile na kanwa kobe kabili wafifikilishapo ku kuboko kobe, fino fine caba buno bushiku." 
2Chronicles6:16 “Nomba we Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, sungila umubomfi obe tata Davidi ifyo wamulaile ilyo wasosele auti, ‘Tawakatale aufilwa ukukwata umwana uwakwisa ikala pa cinso candi pa bufumu bwa bena Israeli. Ifi fikacitika nga cakutifye abana bobe abaume baisunga muli fyonse ifyo balecita no kwenda pa cinso candi umwabela amafunde yandi ngefyo iwe wacitile.’" 
2Chronicles6:17 Eico nomba we Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, leka ishiwi lyobe ilyo walaile umubomfi obe Davidi lifikilishiwe." 
2Chronicles6:18 “Bushe nomba Lesa kuti aikala pano isonde na bantunse? Apofye imyulu nangufye imyulu ya pamulu teti imukumane, bushe iyi ŋanda nkuulile eingamukumana?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Lelo kutika kwipepo lya mubomfi obe na ku kupapata kwakwe ukwakubelelwa uluse, we Yawe Lesa wandi. Kutika ku nkuuta na kwipepo umubomfi obe alepepa pa cinso cobe." 
2Chronicles6:20 Shileka amenso yobe yesukile pali iyi ŋanda akasuba no bushiku pantu ni ncende apo watile epakuba ishina lyobe, wingakutika kwipepo ilyo umubomfi obe alepepela pali ino ncende." 
2Chronicles6:21 Wingomfwa ku kupapata kwa mubomfi obe nokwa bantu bobe abena Israeli inshita yonse ilyo baisa mukupepa pali ino ncende. Shi wingalaumfwa ukufuma ku mulu, icifulo waikalako, kabili ilyo waumfwa ulebelela uluse." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Ilyo umuntu abifya umwina mupalamano wakwe kabili alefwaikwa ukwisa lapa, elyo aisa lapa umulapo pa ntanshi ya bulambo muli iyi ŋanda," 
2Chronicles6:23 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kwasuka. Ulepingula pakati ka babomfi bobe no kukanda imbifi mukubwesesha pa mutwe wakwe fyonse ifyo acita. Ulefumya uwakaele mu mulandu, no kubalambula pali bucishinka bwabo." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Nga cakuti abantu bobe abena Israeli babacimfya ku balwani pa mulandu wakucita ifibi kuli iwe, elyo babwela no kulumbula ishina lyobe, bapepa no kupapata pa cinso cobe muli ino ŋanda," 
2Chronicles6:25 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu. Ulebelela abantu bobe abena Israeli uluse pa fyabubifi fyabo, elyo no kubabwesesha ku calo wabapeele pamo ne fikolwe fyabo." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Ilyo imyulu yaisalika elyo ne mfula yaleka ukuloka pa mulandu wakuti abantu bacita ifyabubifi kuli iwe, elyo baisa pali ino ncende bapepa no kulumbula ishina lyobe elyo bapilibuka ku fyabubifi fyabo pantu wabakanda," 
2Chronicles6:27 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kubelela ababomfi bobe uluse pa fyabubifi fya bantu bobe abena Israeli. Ukabafunde ne mbela isuma iyakwikalilamo, elyo watuma ne mfula pa calo ico wapeela abantu bobe ukuba icuma cacishilano." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Ilyo icipowe nangu icikuko caisa mu calo, nangu ukukunkutana kwa mabula nangu ukufufuma, makanta nangu ifipaso, nangu abalwani babashinguluka mu musumba uuli onse, icinkunka nangu ubulwele ubuli bonse ubwaisa," 
2Chronicles6:29 kabili nga bantu bobe abena Israeli bapepa nangu bapapata, na cila muntu aishiba ukushikitika no bukali bwakwe elyo atambalika amaboko yakwe ninshi yasontele kuli ino ŋanda," 
2Chronicles6:30 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu, icifulo waikalako. Ulebabelelako uluse no kucitila umuntu onse umwabela imicitile yakwe, apo niwe waishiba umutima wakwe. Pantu niwefye weka uwaishiba imitima ya bantu." 
2Chronicles6:31 Kabili cikalenga ukuti bakalekutiina no kwamba ukulaenda mu nshila shobe inshita shonse, bakulaikala mu calo wapeele ifikolwe fyesu." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Na pa mulandu wa mweni uushili mu bantu bobe abena Israeli, lelo afuma ku calo ca kutali pa mulandu wa kucindama kwe shina lyobe, ne minwe yobe iyabulamba no kuboko kobe ukwatambalala, ilyo aisa pepela pali ino ŋanda," 
2Chronicles6:33 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu, icifulo waikalako. Ulecitila uyo umwinafyalo fyonse ifyo aipusha kuli iwe, pakuti abantu bonse aba pano isonde bakeshibe ishina lyobe no kulakutiina ngefyo ucita ku bantu bobe abena Israeli elyo nokwishiba ukuti ino ŋanda nkuulile iwe emwaba ishina lyobe." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Ilyo abantu bobe baya ku nkondo mukulwisha abalwani babo ku ncende konse uko wabatuma, elyo bapepa kuli iwe muli uno musumba usalile kabili muli ino ŋanda nkuulile umwakuba ishina lyobe," 
2Chronicles6:35 lyena uleumfwa ukufuma ku mulu amapepo yabo no kupapata kwabo elyo no kubapeela ukucimfya. 
2Chronicles6:36 Nga babifya kuli iwe, pantu takwaba nangu umo uushibifya, elyo na iwe wabafulilwa, kabili wabapeela na mu minwe ya balwani babo, elyo babasenda muli bunkole ku calo icakutali nangu icamupepi." 
2Chronicles6:37 Lelo nga cakuti baalula imitima yabo mu calo babasendako bunkole, no kuya lapila no kupapata kuli iwe ilyo bacili mulya mwine mu calo ca bunkole, bakailandile na mashiwi ayakuti," 
2Chronicles6:38 ‘Twalibifya, kabili twalilufyanya no kuilenga aba mulandu.’ Lyena nga balapila ne mitima yabo ne myeo yabo yonse ilyo bacili muli bunkole kuli cilya cine calo babasendeleko bunkole, nga bapepa balosha na menso yabo ku calo wapeela ifikolwe fyabo, ku musumba uo wasala, ku ŋanda iyi nkuulile umwakuba ishina lyobe," 
2Chronicles6:39 lyena uleumfwa amapepo yabo no kupapata kwabo ukufuma ku mulu icifulo waikalako, no kubafwilishako. Kabili ulebelela abantu bobe uluse abakubifya." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Nomba we Lesa wandi, leka amenso yobe yesuke na matwi yobe yomfwe ku mapepo ayapeelwa muli ino ncende." 
2Chronicles6:41 Nomba ima we Yawe Lesa, kabili wise ku cifulo cobe icakutuushishamo, iwe ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyili cishibilo ca bulamba bobe. Uleke bashimapepo bobe we Yawe Lesa bafwikwe ipusukilo, leka abamushilo bobe basansamuke mu busuma bobe." 
2Chronicles6:42 We Yawe Lesa wikaana uwasubwa obe. Ibukisha ubukulu bwa kutemwa kobe ukushipwa ubo walaile umubomfi obe Davidi.” 
2Chronicles7:1 Nomba ilyo Solomoni apwile ukupepa, umulilo waponene ukufuma ku mulu, waisa oca ilambo lyakoca na malambo yonse, elyo no bucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaisula mwi Tempele lyonse." 
2Chronicles7:2 Bashimapepo bafilwa no kwingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe pa mulandu wakuti ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaisula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
2Chronicles7:3 Ilyo abana bakwa Israeli bonse bamona uko umulilo ulefuma ku mulu elyo no bucindami bwakwa Yawe buli pa mulu we Tempele, bafukama apakubatilwa amabwe, bakontamika imitwe panshi, elyo bapepa kabili bapeela no kutotela kuli Yawe, balasosa abati, “Pantu ena musuma! Ukutemwa kwakwe kwamuyayaya.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Elyo imfumu na bantu bonse batuula amalambo pa cinso cakwa Yawe. 
2Chronicles7:5 Imfumu Solomoni yatuula ilambo ilya ŋombe amakana amakumi yabili na yabili (22,000) elyo impaanga ne mbushi amakana umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120,000). Kanshi imfumu pamo na bantu bonse epakulubwila iŋanda kuli Yawe." 
2Chronicles7:6 Bashimapepo bonse baya iminina pa ncende shabo, na bena Levi nabo bacita cimo cine, nabekata ifilimba fyakwa Yawe ifyo imfumu Davidi yapangile ifyakulisha pakulumbanya Yawe. Efyo babomfeshe ilyo Davidi apeela amatotelo no kusosa ukuti, “Ukutemwa kwakwe kwamuyayaya.” Ku lubali lumbi ukushali abena Levi, bashimapepo balalisha amapenga ninshi abena Israeli bonse nabeminina." 
2Chronicles7:7 Kabili Solomoni alubwila kuli Lesa incende ya pakati iya lubansa iyali ku ntanshi ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe na palya epo atuulile amalambo yakoca elyo na mafuta ya mutuulo wakwampana. Neci acitile pa mulandu wakuti ubulambo bwa mukuba apangile bwalicepele ukubikapo amalambo yakoca, imituulo ya cabunga elyo ne fipande fya mafuta." 
2Chronicles7:8 Kanshi Solomoni pali ilya nshita epakucita inshikunkulu iya nshiku cine lubali ninshi ulukuta ulukalamba ulwa bena Israeli lonse luli nankwe, abantu bafumine ku Lebo Hamati ukuya shinta ku kamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto." 
2Chronicles7:9 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse balongana bonse pamo, pantu pakulubwila kuli Lesa ubulambo basefeshe inshiku cine lubali elyo ne nshikunkulu nayo inshiku na shimbi cine lubali." 
2Chronicles7:10 Pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shitatu (23) mu mweshi walenga cine lubali epo abweseshemo abantu ku mayanda yabo. Babwelelamo abasansamuka no kusekelela mu mitima yabo pa fintu fyonse ifisuma Yawe acitile Davidi na Solomoni elyo na bantu bakwe abena Israeli. 
2Chronicles7:11 Kanshi Solomoni efyo apwile ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne sano lyakwe, kabili afikilishapo no kucita fyonse ifyo alefwaya ukubomba mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo na kwisano lyakwe." 
2Chronicles7:12 Elyo Yawe amonekela kuli ena mu nshita ya bushiku no kumweba ati, “Niŋumfwa ipepo lyobe kabili ninsala incende ino ukuba iyandi apakuntuulila amalambo." 
2Chronicles7:13 Inshita shimo nakulaisala umulu icakuti ne mfula yakaana ukuloka, nangu naeba makanta ukwisa lya ifilyo fyenu, nangu natuma icikuko mu bantu bandi." 
2Chronicles7:14 Lelo nga cakuti mwe bantu bandi, abetwa peshina lyandi mwaicefya, elyo mwapepa no kufwaya icinso candi, no kufuma ku fibi fyenu, elyo ndi nokumfwa ukufuma ku mulu no kwisa mubelela uluse no kuposha icalo cenu." 
2Chronicles7:15 Nomba amenso yandi yakulaikala ayaisuka na matwi yandi yakulakutika ku mapepo ayakulapeelwa pali ino ncende. 
2Chronicles7:16 Ninsala no kusangulula ino iŋanda pakuti ishina lyandi likabelelele pano inshita yonse. Amenso yandi no mutima wandi fyakulaba pano lyonsefye. 
2Chronicles7:17 “Kabili iwe, nga cakuti wakulaenda pa cinso candi ngefyo wiso Davidi aendele, elyo no kucita fyonse ifyo ndekukonkomesha, no kubaka ifipope na mafunde yandi," 
2Chronicles7:18 nkalenga icipuna cobe icabufumu ukubelelela, ngefyo napangile icipangano na wiso Davidi ilyo nasosele ati, ‘Tawakafilwe ukukwata umwaume uwakuteeka pa bena Israeli.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 Lelo nga cakuti wafutuka no kusuula ifipope na mafunde nkupeele, ukeme ukaye mukubombela imilungu imbi no kuipepa," 
2Chronicles7:20 lyena nkanukula Israeli ukufuma mu calo candi ici mbapeele, kabili nkakaana ne iŋanda ine iyi nsangulwile umwakuba ishina lyandi. Nkaikaana ikafume na pa cinso candi, ikashalafye lyashi ilyakulandapo abantu na bantu kabili icintu icakuseka abantu bonse." 
2Chronicles7:21 Kabili nangu iŋanda ino ili iyapulama ifi, bonse abakalapitapo bakalapapafye nokulasosa abati, ‘Cinshi ico Yawe acitila icintu ca musango uyu kuli cino calo na ku ŋanda iyi?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Abantu bakalaasuka abati, ‘Ni pa mulandu wakusuula Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo uwabafumishe mu Egupto, no kupilibukila ku milungu imbi ukulaipepa no kuitumika, eco aletela ifinkunka fyonse ifi pali bena.’”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Panuma ya myaka amakumi yabili (22), inshita iyo Solomoni akuulilemo iŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne sano lyakwe," 
2Chronicles8:2 atendeke ukukuula imisumba iyo Hiramu amupeele, elyo apeela na bena Israeli ukwikalamo." 
2Chronicles8:3 Solomoni epakuya lwisha umusumba wa Hamati Soba no kuupoka. 
2Chronicles8:4 Kabili akuula Tadimo mu matololo elyo ne misumba iya matala iyo akuulile mu Hamati. 
2Chronicles8:5 Akuula cipya cipya Beti Horoni wa pamulu elyo na Beti Horoni wa pesamba nge misumba iyacingililwa na malinga. Kwaba ne fibumba ne mipilikisho yakwisalilako. 
2Chronicles8:6 Kabili akuula umusumba wa Baalati, ne misumba umwali amatala. Akuula ne misumba umwali ifita na maceleta ayo akwete na bakabalwe bakwe. Elyo Solomoni akuula na fyonse ifyo atemenwe ukukuula mu Yerusalemu, mu Lebanoni na mu ncende shonse umo aleteeka." 
2Chronicles8:7 Kwaliko abantu bambi abashele mu calo abo abashali abena Israeli pamo nga bena Hiti, abena Amoni, abena Perisi, abena Hifi na bena Yebusi." 
2Chronicles8:8 Aba bali abana ba mishobo iyo abena Israeli bafililwe ukulofya. Kanshi Solomoni epakubabuula abacita abasha bamulaasa ngefyo caba ukufika na pa bushiku bwa lelo. 
2Chronicles8:9 Lelo Solomoni tapangilepo abena Israeli ukuba abasha abakubomba imilimo yakwe, bena balifye ifita fya bulwi, abakalamba bakutungulula bakangalila ba fita, abakalamba bakutungulula amaceleta na bamushiika bakutungulula abakwensha amaceleta." 
2Chronicles8:10 Aba ebali bacilolo bakalamba abakwa Solomoni imfumu, bonse pamo bali imyanda ibili na makumi yasano (250) abakwangalila abanabo." 
2Chronicles8:11 Elyo Solomoni ayakuusha mwana Farao ukufuma ku musumba wakwa Davidi, amuleta kwisano amukuulile. Pantu atile, “Umukashi wandi tafwile kwikala mwisano lyakwa Davidi imfumu ya bena Israeli pa mulandu wakuti incende apeshile Imbokoshi ya Cipangano cakwa Yawe yamushilo.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Elyo Solomoni atuula amalambo yakoca kuli Yawe pa bulambo akuulile Yawe pantanshi ya muputule uwakwingililamo. 
2Chronicles8:13 Atuula ukulakonka ififwaikwa cila bushiku umwabela amafunde yakwa Mose palwa Masabata, imyeshi iyipya elyo ne nshikunkulu shitatu isha cila mwaka, ekutila inshikunkulu ya mukate ushatutumuka, inshikunkulu ya milungu ne nshikunkulu ya nsakwe." 
2Chronicles8:14 Umwabela ifipope fyapeele wishi Davidi emo Solomoni apeelele imilimo kuli bashimapepo, elyo na ku bena Levi abali nokutungulula mukulumbanya no kwafwilisha bashimapepo mu milimo ya cila bushiku. Asonta na bakalinda wa mpongolo mu mpuka shabo ukulingana ne mpongolo, pantu ifi efyo Davidi umuntu wakwa Lesa akonkomeshe." 
2Chronicles8:15 Tabatalile abafuma kufyo imfumu yakonkomeshe bashimapepo nangu abena Levi mu cintu conse na pa mulandu onse uwakusunga icuma. 
2Chronicles8:16 Kanshi imilimo yonse iyakwa Solomoni yalibombeke, ukutula apo umufula wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe wayambile mpaka no kupwisha. Kanshi iŋanda yakwa Yawe efyo yapwile." 
2Chronicles8:17 Kabili Solomoni aya ku Esioni Geberi na ku Elati ku lulamba lwa bemba mu calo ca Edomu. 
2Chronicles8:18 Elyo Hiramu amutumina amato ayaleensha abantu bakwe, abaishibe icimana bwino. Kanshi aba pamo na bantu bakwa Solomoni epakuya ku Ofiri no kuya letako golide amatalanta imyanda ine na makumi yasano (450) no kupeela ku mfumu Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:1 Ilyo namfumu wa ku Sheba aumfwile ululumbi lwa pali Solomoni, aishile ku Yerusalemu kukwisa mwesha mu mepusho ayakosa nganshi. Afika no mulongo ukalamba uwa babomfi ne ngamila ishasendele ifya cena cisuma, golide uwingi nganshi elyo no tumabwe utwauma umutengo. Ilyo afika kuli Solomoni atendeka ukulanda nankwe pa fintu fyonse ifyali mu mano yakwe." 
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoni nao ayasukafye amepusho yakwe yonse. Tapali icamucushishe pakumulondolwela. 
2Chronicles9:3 Ilyo namfumu wa ku Sheba amwene amano yali muli Solomoni, pamo pene ne sano lintu akuulile," 
2Chronicles9:4 icakulya icali petebulo lyakwe, ifyo bacilolo bakwe baikele, imitumikile ya babomfi elyo nefyo bafwele, bakatumika ba lukombo lwa mfumu mu fyakufwala fyabo elyo na malambo yakoca ayo apeele pa ŋanda yakwa Yawe, ena camupesha amano." 
2Chronicles9:5 Elyo aeba imfumu Solomoni ati, “Akasebo naumfwile ilyo ncili mu calo candi pafyo wabomba elyo na pa mano yobe kanshi fyacine." 
2Chronicles9:6 Lelo nshasumine ifyo balelanda mpakafye naisa imwena na menso yandi. Kabili mona ifyo balondolwele kuli ine tafyafikile na pali citika wa bwingi bwa mano yobe. Iwe walicila pa lulumbi naumfwile. 
2Chronicles9:7 “Yangu ifyo bashuka abaume bobe! Yangu ifyo bashuka bacilolo bobe, abeminina pantanshi yobe cila nshita mukumfwa amano yobe." 
2Chronicles9:8 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa obe, uwasekela muli iwe elyo akubika na pa cipuna cakwe ukuba imfumu iyakulabombela Yawe Lesa obe. Elyo pa mulandu wafyo Lesa atemwa abena Israeli no bufwayo bwakwe ubwakubasunga pe, eco akubikile ukuba imfumu pali bena, pakubaputwila imilandu yabo bwino kabili mu bulungami.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Elyo apeela imfumu amatalanta umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120) aya golide, ifya cena cisuma ifingi nganshi elyo no tumabwe utwauma umutengo. Takwatala akuba ifya cena cisuma ifingalingana nefyo namfumu wa ku Sheba apeele imfumu Solomoni." 
2Chronicles9:10 Abantu bakwa Hiramu elyo na bantu bakwa Solomoni ebasendele golide ukufuma ku Ofiri. Kabili ebaletele ne milando ya cimuti ca aligumi elyo no tumabwe utwauma umutengo. 
2Chronicles9:11 Imfumu yabomfya imilando ya aligumi pakupanga amatabo ya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe na ku ŋanda ye sano. Kabili afibomfya mukupangilako amaseese ne nsango ifya bakemba wa nyimbo. Kabili takwatalile akuba ifyaba ngefi mu calo ca bena Yuda. 
2Chronicles9:12 Imfumu Solomoni epakupeela namfumu wa ku Sheba fyonse ifyo afwaile kabili ifyo alombele. Kanshi ena epakumupeela ifintu ifingi ukucila na pafyo aletele. Elyo namfumu wa ku Sheba pamo na babomfi bakwe baima babwelelamo ku calo kumwabo. 
2Chronicles9:13 Golide yonse iyo Solomoni alepoka cila mwaka yalefika amatalanta imyanda mutanda na makumi mutanda na mutanda (666)," 
2Chronicles9:14 ukukanalundapo uwa mu misonko uwalesonka bakashitisha elyo na bamakwebo. Kabili imfumu shonse isha ku Arabia elyo na balashi ba mu calo balaleta golide na silifa kuli Solomoni. 
2Chronicles9:15 Elyo imfumu Solomoni apanga inkwela imyanda ibili (200) ishikalamba kuli golide uwakufula. Cila nkwela afulilako golide uwafina amakilo yatatu na citika. 
2Chronicles9:16 Kabili apanga inkwela ishinono imyanda itatu (300) kuli golide uwakufula. Pali cila nkwela afulilapo golide uwafina kilo umo na citika. Imfumu epakuya bika ishi nkwela mu muputule wa mwisano uo baleita ukuti “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni.” 
2Chronicles9:17 Kabili imfumu yapanga icipuna ca lulumbi ku meno ya nsofu elyo yalambatikako golide wine wine. 
2Chronicles9:18 Ici icipuna cakwete amatabo mutanda elyo cakwete ne cakunyantapo ica golide. Ku mbali shonse isha cipuna kwali ifyakutuushapo amaboko, ne nkalamo naiminina kuli cila lubali." 
2Chronicles9:19 Inkalamo shimbi ikumi limo na shibili (12) shaiminina pa matabo yonse mutanda, pali cila mpela ye tabo paiminina imo. Kabili takwatalile akupangwa icipuna ngeci mu bufumu ubuli bonse." 
2Chronicles9:20 Ifipe fyonse ifyakunwenamo ifya mfumu Solomoni fyali ifya golide elyo ne fipe fyonse ifya mu ŋanda ye sano iyo baleita ukuti “Umutengo wa ku Lebanoni” fyali fya golide wine wine. Tamwali icapangilwe kuli silifa pantu silifa tayali iyacindama mu nshiku shakwa Solomoni. 
2Chronicles9:21 Imfumu yakwete amato aya ku Tashishi ayengi umwalebomba abantu bakwa Hiramu. Umuku umo pa myaka itatu aya mato yalebwela nayasenda golide, silifa, ameno ya nsofu, bakolwe bakalamba elyo na bapikoko." 
2Chronicles9:22 Imfumu Solomoni yacilile imfumu shonse isha pano isonde ubunonshi na mano. 
2Chronicles9:23 Kabili shonse imfumu sha pano isonde shalefwaisha ukumonana na Solomoni kukumfwako amano Lesa abikile mu mutima wakwe. 
2Chronicles9:24 Panuma ya cila mwaka, onse uwaisako aleleta icabupe. Bamo baleleta ifipe ifya silifa, golide, imingila, ifyanso fya bulwi, ifinyamuti ifyanunka ubusaka muri pamo na fimbi ifya cena cisuma, bakabalwe elyo ne mfalashi." 
2Chronicles9:25 Solomoni akwete utuyanda amakana yane (4,000) utwakwikalamo bakabalwe na maceleta, elyo akwete bakabalwe amakana ikumi limo na babili (12,000) abo abikile mu misumba ya maceleta elyo bambi ali nabo mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles9:26 Kabili ewali kateeka pa shafumu shonse ukufuma ku mumana wa Yufurate ukufika ku calo ca Bafilisiti ukuya na ku mupaka wa bena Egupto. 
2Chronicles9:27 Imfumu yalengele ubwingi bwa silifa ukufula mu Yerusalemu kwati mabwe elyo ne fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ukufula kwati fimuti fya mwisamba lya mpili ifya mikunyu. 
2Chronicles9:28 Bakabalwe bakwa Solomoni babashitile ukufuma ku Egupto elyo no kufuma mu fyalo fimbi. 
2Chronicles9:29 Lelo pa milandu imbi iya pa bufumu bwakwa Solomoni ukufumafye pa kutendeka mpaka na ku mpela, bushe tafyalembwa mu mashiwi yakwa Natani kasesema, mu busesemo bwakwa Ahiya umwina Shiloni elyo na mu fimonwa fyakwa Ido uwamwene palwakwa Yeroboamu umwana wakwa Nebati?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Solomoni aikele mu Yerusalemu no kuteeka icalo conse ica Israeli pa myaka amakumi yane (40). 
2Chronicles9:31 Ilyo afwile, bamushiikile ku ncende ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi wishi. Elyo umwana wakwe umwaume Reoboamu ewamupyene pa bufumu." 
2Chronicles10:1 Kabili Reoboamu aile ku Shekemu, pantu kulya eko abena Israeli bonse baile pakuya mubika pa bufumu." 
2Chronicles10:2 Ilyo Yeroboamu mwana Nebati aumfwa ifi ninshi acili mu Egupto, mu calo abutukilemo ilyo afulumwike ukufuma kuli Solomoni. Pakumfwa lyena epakubwela ukufuma ku Egupto." 
2Chronicles10:3 Abena Israeli epakwita Yeroboamu no kuya nankwe kuli Reoboamu no kumweba abati," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Wiso abikile ikoli ilyafina pali ifwe, nomba iwe utwangushisheko imibombele yacibe ne koli ilyafina wiso abikile pali ifwe, elyo na ifwe twakulakubombela.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Reoboamu abasuka ati, “Mukabwele panuma ya nshiku shitatu.” Abantu bonse babwelelamo." 
2Chronicles10:6 Elyo imfumu Reoboamu alandishanya na bakalamba ababombele kuli wishi Solomoni mu nshiku sha bumi bwakwe. Abepusha ati, “Bushe mano nshi mwalampandako ayakwisa asukilamo aba bantu?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Nabo bamwasuka abati, “Nga cakuti wakulaba no luse kuli aba bantu elyo no kubasekesha kabili ubapeele ubwasuko ubusuma, lyena inshita yonse bali nokuba ababomfi bobe.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Lelo Reoboamu akaana amano abakalamba bamupandileko elyo aya ipusha amano ukufuma ku baice banankwe abo akulile nabo pamo kabili abalemubombela. 
2Chronicles10:9 Abepusha ati, “Bushe muletipo shani? Bushe aba bantu kuti twabasuka finshi abalelanda kuli ine abati, ‘Wangusheko ikoli wiso abikile pali ifwe?’”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Abalumendo abo akulile nabo pamo bamwasuka abati, “Abo bantu abakwebele ukuti, ‘Wiso abikile ikoli ilyafina pali ifwe, lelo iwe utwangushisheko ikoli,’ ubebe ukuti, ‘Umunwe wandi uunono untu waina ukucila umusana wa batata." 
2Chronicles10:11 Tata abikile pali imwe ikoli ilyafina, lelo ine ndi nokucishapo. Tata alemuma ku fikoti, nomba ine nakulamumina kuli bakaliŋongo.’”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Panuma ya nshiku shitatu Yeroboamu pamo na bantu bonse baisa kuli Reoboamu, ngefyo imfumu yabebele aiti, “Mukabwele kuli ine panuma ya nshiku shitatu.”" 
2Chronicles10:13 Imfumu yabasuka bukali bukali, yakaana na mano yamupandile abakalamba." 
2Chronicles10:14 Abasuka ukulingana na mano abalumendo bamupandile. Pakubasuka abeba ati, “Tata abikile ikoli ilyafina pali imwe, lelo ine ndi nokucishapo. Tata alemuma ku fikoti, lelo ine nakulamumina kuli bakaliŋongo.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Kanshi imfumu yakaana ukumfwila abantu pantu ukucitika kwa ifi fyonse kwafumine kuli Yawe, pakufikilisha ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyalandilwe kuli Yeroboamu mwana Nebati ukupitila muli Ahiya umwina Shiloni." 
2Chronicles10:16 Ilyofye abena Israeli bamona ukuti imfumu yakaana ukuti ibomfwile, bonse bayasuka imfumu abati, “Bushe cakaniko nshi tukwete muli Davidi, bushe ciputulwa nshi mu mwana wakwa Yese? Bweleleni ku matenti yenu mwe bena Israeli, na iwe we Davidi sakamana iŋanda yobe.” Kanshi abena Israeli bonse epakubwelelamo kumyabo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Lelo ku bena Israeli abaleikala mu misumba ya mu Yuda, bena bashala baleteekwa na Reoboamu." 
2Chronicles10:18 Elyo imfumu Reoboamu yatuma Adoniramu uwali umukalamba pa milimo ya mulaasa, lelo abena Israeli bamupola amabwe mpaka afwa. Nomba imfumu Reoboamu yena yaendesha ukunina mwiceleta, yafulumukila na ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Kanshi ifi efyo abena Israeli baba abasangukila iŋanda yakwa Davidi ukufika na ku bushiku bwa lelo. 
2Chronicles11:1 Ilyo Reoboamu afikile mu Yerusalemu, alonganike aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda na Benjamini abaume ababulwi amakana umwanda umo na makana amakumi cine konse konse (180,000) ukuti balwishe abena Israeli pakuti bapokolole ubufumu bubwelele kuli Reoboamu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Lelo kwaisa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe kuli Shemaiya umuntu wakwa Lesa ilyakuti," 
2Chronicles11:3 “Kebe Reoboamu mwana Solomoni imfumu ya bena Yuda elyo na ku bena Israeli bonse abekala mu Yuda na muli Benjamini auti," 
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Ifi efyo Yawe asosa, wiima ukuya lwisha bamunonko. Bwelelenimo cila muntu ku ŋanda yakwe, pantu uucitile ifi nine.’” Kanshi bonse epakumfwila amashiwi yakwa Yawe bapilibuka ukufuma mukuya lwisha Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Reoboamu aikele mu Yerusalemu kabili akuulile imisumba ya malinga mu Yuda. 
2Chronicles11:6 Akuulile ku Betelemu, ku Etamu, ku Tekoa" 
2Chronicles11:7 ku Beti Suri, ku Soko, ku Adulamu," 
2Chronicles11:8 ku Gati, ku Maresha, ku Sifi," 
2Chronicles11:9 ku Adoraimu, ku Lakishi, ku Aseka," 
2Chronicles11:10 ku Sora, ku Aiyaloni elyo na ku Hebuloni. Iyi eyali imisumba iyacingililwa mu Yuda na mu Benjamini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Aicingilila na malinga ayakosa, abikamo na bakalamba ba bashilika, abikamo ne fyakulya, amafuta ya miolifa elyo no mwangashi." 
2Chronicles11:12 Abikamo amafumo ne nkwela mu misumba yonse elyo aikosha nganshi. Kanshi epakuti Yuda na Benjamini fibe fyakwe. 
2Chronicles11:13 Bashimapepo na bena Levi aba mu misumba yonse iya mu Israeli bawila kuli ena. 
2Chronicles11:14 Abena Levi basha ne fitungu fyabo ifyakucemenamo ifitekwa pamo ne fyuma fyabo, baisa ku Yuda elyo na ku Yerusalemu. Bacitile ifi pa mulandu wakuti Yeroboamu elyo na bana bakwe balibafumishepo pali bushimapepo bwakwa Yawe." 
2Chronicles11:15 Kabili abika bashimapepo bakwe mu ncende shakupepelamo isho bacindika elyo na pa tulubi twa mbushi no tulubi twa twana twa ŋombe uto apangile. 
2Chronicles11:16 Na bantu aba mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli abapeele imitima yabo mukufwaya icinso cakwa Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, bakonka abena Levi ku Yerusalemu mukuya tuula amalambo kuli Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Baya koselesha ubufumu bwakwa Yuda no kwafwa Reoboamu umwana wakwa Solomoni pa myaka itatu, baleendela mu mibeele yakwa Davidi na Solomoni pali iyi nshita." 
2Chronicles11:18 Reoboamu aupile Mahalati uwali umwana mwanakashi wakwa Yerimoti mwana Davidi. Nyina kwa Mahalati ni Abihaili uwali umwana mwanakashi wakwa Eliabu mwana Yese. 
2Chronicles11:19 Mahalati afyelemo abana abaume Yeushi, Shemariya elyo na Sahamu." 
2Chronicles11:20 Kabili Reoboamu aupilepo Maaka, umwana mwanakashi wakwa Abusalomu. Muli uyu afyalamo Abiya, Atai, Sisa elyo na Shelomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Elyo Reoboamu atemwishapo Maaka mwana Abusalomu ukucila pa bakashi bakwe bonse na pa bakashi bakwe abashaupilwe mu bwinga. Akwete abakashi bonse pamo ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) elyo na bakashi bakwe abashaupilwe mu bwinga amakumi mutanda (60). Akwete abana abaume amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28) elyo abana abanakashi amakumi mutanda (60). 
2Chronicles11:22 Reoboamu asonta Abiya umwana mwaume wakwa Maaka ukuba umukalamba pali bamunyina pakuti akamupeele ubufumu. 
2Chronicles11:23 Acitile ifintu ifyamano, kabili asalangenye bambi abana bakwe abaume mu misumba yonse iya mu Yuda na mu bena Benjamini elyo na mu misumba yonse iya malinga. Abapeela ne fyakulya ifingi, abafwaila na bakashi abengi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Panuma ilyo ubufumu bwakwa Reoboamu bwakosele elyo akwata na maka ayengi, ena na bena Israeli bonse abo ali nabo basangukila amafunde yakwa Yawe." 
2Chronicles12:2 Pa mulandu wa bena Israeli ukukanaba ne cishinka kuli Yawe, Shishaki imfumu ya ku Egupto yaisa sansa umusumba wa Yerusalemu mu mwaka walenga isano uwakwa Reoboamu uwakuba pa bufumu." 
2Chronicles12:3 Ali na maceleta ikana limo ne myanda ibili (1,200) elyo na bashilika ba pali bakabalwe amakana amakumi mutanda (60,000). Abantu abo ali nabo ukufuma mu Egupto bali imintapendwa, pali aba ku Libya, aba ku Suki elyo na ba ku Kushi." 
2Chronicles12:4 Apoka imisumba iyali na malinga iya mu Yuda kabili aisa fikafye mupepi na Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles12:5 Elyo kasesema Shemaiya aisa kuli Reoboamu na ku ntungulushi sha bena Yuda abalongene mu Yerusalemu ilyo batiininine Shishaki, abeba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Imwe namunsangukila, na ine nomba nalamulekelako mu minwe yakwa Shishaki.’”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Intungulushi sha bena Israeli elyo ne mfumu ine baicefya basosa nokuti, “Yawe nalungika.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Ilyo Yawe amona ukuti abantu bakwe baicefya, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli Shemaiya aliti, “Apo aba bantu baicefya, ine nshabonaule, lelo nalabalubula mukwangufyanyafye. Nshaponye ubukali bwandi pali Yerusalemu ukupitila muli Shishaki." 
2Chronicles12:8 Lelo nangu cibe ifi, balaba abasha bakwe, pakuti beshibe ubupusano ubwaba pakutumika ine no bwaba pakutumika ishamfumu sha mu fyalo fimbi.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Ilyo Shishaki imfumu ya ku Egupto yasanshile Yerusalemu, yasendele icipao conse ica mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne cuma ca mwisano. Yasenda fyonsefye pamo pene ne nkwela sha golide isho Solomoni apangile." 
2Chronicles12:10 Kanshi imfumu Reoboamu epakupanga inkwela shimbi isha mukuba ishakupyanikishapo, elyo ashipeela ku bakalamba ba bakalinda abali pa ncito yakulinda pa mwinshi wa kwisano." 
2Chronicles12:11 Inshita yonse ilyo imfumu yaya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe, bakalinda baya nankwe nabasenda inkwela, elyo panuma bashibwesha ku muputule wa bakalinda." 
2Chronicles12:12 Pa mulandu wakuti Reoboamu aicefya umwine, ubukali bwakwa Yawe bwafumako kuli ena, na Yawe tamonawile. Ne cacine, mwalisangilwe ubusuma mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles12:13 Imfumu Reoboamu yakosha bwino ukuteeka kwaiko mu Yerusalemu, yatwalilila no kuba imfumu. Yali ne myaka amakumi yane na umo (41) ilyo yaishile pa bufumu. Yateekele pa myaka ikumi limo na cine lubali (17) mu Yerusalemu, umusumba uo Yawe asalile ukufuma mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli umwakuba ishina lyakwe. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Naama, umwina Amoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Acitile ububi pa mulandu wakuti tabikile umutima wakwe kukufwaya Yawe. 
2Chronicles12:15 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Reoboamu, ukufumafye pa kutendeka ukufikafye na ku mpela, bushe tafyalembwa mu mashiwi yakwa Shemaiya kasesema elyo na mu yakwa Ido kamona ayo ayalondolola pa nkulo? Palikonkenye ukuba ulubuli pakati kakwa Reoboamu elyo na Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles12:16 Reoboamu aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe kabili bamushiikile mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Elyo Abiya umwana wakwe ewamupyene pa bufumu. 
2Chronicles13:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) uwakwa Yeroboamu ukuba pa bufumu, Abiya ewaishile ba imfumu ya bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Kabili ateekele pa myaka itatu mu Yerusalemu. Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Maaka, umwana mwanakashi wakwa Urieli uwa ku Gibea. Pali ubulwi pakati kakwa Abiya na Yeroboamu." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya aingila mu bulwi na bashilika amakana imyanda ine (400,000) iya baume abaishiba ukulwa, elyo Yeroboamu ena aingilamo mu nkondo na bashilika amakana imyanda cine konse konse (800,000) iya baishiba ukulwa." 
2Chronicles13:4 Elyo Abiya aiminina pa lupili lwa Semaraimu, mu calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu, asosa ati, “Iwe Yeroboamu pamo na bena Israeli bonse kutikeni kuli ine." 
2Chronicles13:5 Bushe tamwaishiba ukuti Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli apeela ubufumu bwa bena Israeli kuli Davidi na bana bakwe abaume mu cipangano ca pe ica mucele? 
2Chronicles13:6 Nomba Yeroboamu mwana Nebati, uwalifye umubomfi wakwa Solomoni mwana Davidi, ewaima no kusangukila shikulu wakwe." 
2Chronicles13:7 Lelo abantu bamo abacabecabe kabili abawelewele bawila kuli ena ilyo acili umwaice uwabula kampingu, bamutunka ukukaanina Reoboamu ninshi takwete na maka yakubakaanina." 
2Chronicles13:8 “Ukufika na nomba mucili mulefwaya ukutalamina ubufumu bwakwa Yawe ubo abika mu maboko ya ba mu lupwa lwakwa Davidi. Cacine muli umulongo uukalamba nganshi uwa bashilika elyo kabili muli no tulubi utwa golide uto Yeroboamu apanga ukuba imilungu yenu. 
2Chronicles13:9 Lelo bushe tamwatamfyamo bashimapepo bakwa Yawe, abana baume bakwa Aroni na bena Levi, elyo no kuipangila bashimapepo abenu ngefyo abantu aba mu fyalo fimbi bacita? Mucita onse uwaisa ne ciponti ca ŋombe icilume na basukusuku cine lubali mukutuula kuli bashimapepo, mulamupeela bushimapepo bwa ishili imilungu." 
2Chronicles13:10 Lelo ifwe, Yawe e Lesa wesu, kabili tatwamusangukila. Bashimapepo ababombela Yawe bana abaume abakwa Aroni, elyo na bena Levi ebabatumika." 
2Chronicles13:11 Cila kacelo ne cungulo balatuula amalambo yakoca elyo no bubani bwa cena cisuma kuli Yawe. Balatantika imikate petebulo ilyasanguluka no kusanika ifisaniko ifyaba pa cakutekapo ifisaniko ica golide cila cungulo. Ifwe tukonka ubufwayo bwakwa Yawe Lesa wesu lelo imwe mwalimusangukila. 
2Chronicles13:12 Lesa ali na ifwe kabili e ntungulushi yesu. Bashimapepo bakwe abali na mapenga yabo ebalapunda umusowa wakuti tumulwishe. Mwe baume ba mu Israeli, mwiima mukulwisha Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu pantu tamwashuke.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Lelo Yeroboamu ali ninshi natuma abashilika bamo ku numa yabo abakubabelamina pakuti abasanshile kunuma lintu ena alemonekela ku ntanshi ya bena Yuda. 
2Chronicles13:14 Nomba abena Yuda bapilibuka bamona nokuti abalwani bali kunuma elyo na kuntanshi. Elyo bakuuta kuli Yawe. Bashimapepo balisha na mapenga yabo," 
2Chronicles13:15 na baume abena Yuda bapunda umusowa wa bulwi. Cilya umusowa wa bulwi waumfwika, Lesa akanda Yeroboamu elyo na bena Israeli bonse pa ntanshi yakwa Abiya na bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Abena Israeli bafulumuka ukufuma kuli Yuda, lelo Lesa abapeela mu minwe yabo." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya na bantu bakwe baonaula nganshi abalwani babo, icakuti baipaya impendwa ya bena Israeli abacenjela kukulwa amakana imyanda isano (500,000)." 
2Chronicles13:18 Ifi efyo abena Israeli babacimfishe pali ilya nshita, na bena Yuda bacimfishe pa mulandu wakuti basubile muli Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiya akonka Yeroboamu panuma no kuya mupoka imisumba ya Betele, Yeshana elyo na Efuloni pamo pene ne mishi iyashingulwike mumbali." 
2Chronicles13:20 Yeroboamu tatalile abwekeshapo ukukwata amaka mu nshiku shakwa Abiya. Kabili Yawe amukanda, nao afwa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Lelo Abiya ena alundapo ukukosa. Aupa abakashi ikumi limo na bane (14), akwata na bana abaume amakumi yabili na babili (22) elyo abana abanakashi ikumi limo na mutanda (16)." 
2Chronicles13:22 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Abiya, ifyo acitile elyo nefyo asosele, fyalilembwa mu mashiwi yalondolwele kasesema Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Kanshi Abiya epakuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, kabili bamushiikile mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Asa umwana wakwe umwaume ewamupyene pa bufumu elyo na mu nshiku shakwe icalo caikele mu cibote pa myaka ikumi limo (10)." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa acitile ifintu ifisuma kabili ifyalungama mu menso yakwa Yawe Lesa wakwe. 
2Chronicles14:3 Elyo mu nshiku shakwe afumya ifibumbili fya malambo fya milungu ya benafyalo, ne ncende shakupepelamo isho bacindika, atobaula inceshi sha mabwe balepepelapo elyo atema ne nceshi sha mulungu Asher." 
2Chronicles14:4 Akonkomeshe abena Yuda ukufwaya icinso cakwa Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo, no kubaka amafunde ne fipope fyakwe." 
2Chronicles14:5 Afumyamo incende shakupepelamo isho bacindika elyo ne fibumbili fya malambo ifyakufutumwinapo ububani mu misumba yonse iya mu Yuda, elyo ne calo conse cakwata icibote mu nshiku shakwe." 
2Chronicles14:6 Akuula imisumba iyacingililwako amalinga mu Yuda pa mulandu wakuti mu calo mwali icibote. Takwali nangu umo uwaishile mukumulwisha mu myaka yakwe iya pa bufumu pantu Yawe alimupeele ukutuusha. 
2Chronicles14:7 Asa aebele abena Yuda ati, “Natukuule imisumba iyi, kabili tukuulilileko ne fibumba, tukuule ne mpungu ne mpongolo ishabapo inshimbi. Icalo cicili mu minwe yesu, pantu natusanga Yawe, Lesa wesu. Na panuma yakumusanga ena natupeela ukutuusha ku mbali shonse.” Kanshi efyo bakuulile no kupaalwa nganshi." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa akwete abashilika amakana imyanda itatu (300,000) abaume abafumine mu Yuda abaishiba ukubomfya inkwela ishikulu elyo na mafumo, kabili na bambi amakana imyanda ibili na makumi cine konse konse (280,000) ukufuma mu bena Benjamini abaishibe ukubomfya inkwela ishinono elyo ne mifwi. Bonse aba bali baume abashipa abacenjela nganshi kukulwa." 
2Chronicles14:9 Inshita imo, Sera umwina Kushi aisa ima no kusansa icalo, ninshi ali no mulongo wa bashilika uukalamba elyo na maceleta imyanda itatu (300). Elyo aisa palama, afika ku Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Kanshi Asa epakwima ukuya mukumanya, na cila ibumba lyaikala mu cifulo caliko icakulwilamo mwishika lya Sefata mupepi na Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Elyo Asa akuuta kuli Yawe Lesa wakwe no kusosa ati, “We Yawe takwaba umbi uwaba nga iwe uwingafwa abashakwata amaka ukulwisha abamaka. Utwafweko we Yawe Lesa wesu. Niwe twashintililako kabili ni mwishina lyobe tulelwishisha cinkupiti wa bashilika uyu. We Yawe niwe Lesa wesu. Wileka umuntufye eo acimfye iwe.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Yawe epakucimfya abena Kushi pa cinso cakwa Asa elyo na pa cinso ca bena Yuda. Abena Kushi bafulumuka ulubilo. 
2Chronicles14:13 Elyo Asa na bashilika bakwe babakunkunika ukuya bafisha ku Gerari. Baipaya umulongo uukalamba nganshi uwa bena Kushi icakuti bafilwa no kushansha. Baonawilwe ku maka yakwa Yawe na bashilika bakwe. Abaume ba mu Yuda basenda ifitapwa ifingi nganshi. 
2Chronicles14:14 Baonaula imishi yonse iyashingulwike Gerari pantu umwenso wakutiina Yawe wafikile pali bena. Batapa fyonse ifyali mu mishi yonse iyi, pantu mwali ubunonshi ubwingi." 
2Chronicles14:15 Kabili basanshile ne nkambi sha bakacema elyo basenda imikuni ya mpaanga, imbushi ne ngamila. Elyo babwelela ku Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Umupashi wakwa Lesa waishile pali Asariya umwana wakwa Odedi. 
2Chronicles15:2 Elyo aima aya mukukumanya Asa, aya mweba ati, “Umfwa kuli ine iwe Asa, abena Yuda bonse elyo na bena Benjamini. Yawe ali na imwe lintu na imwe muli nankwe. Nga cakuti mwamufwaya, muli nokumusanga. Lelo nga mwamusuula, nao ali nokumusuula." 
2Chronicles15:3 Elyo pa nshita iyitali nganshi abena Israeli baikele ukwabula Lesa wacine, ukwabula shimapepo uwakubafunda kabili ababula amafunde." 
2Chronicles15:4 Nomba ilyo baumfwile ubulanda, balipilibwike no kubwelela kuli Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli, no kumufwaya mpaka bamusanga." 
2Chronicles15:5 Muli shilya nshiku tacali icayanguka ukwendauka apo ulefwaila, pa mulandu wakuti abekalacalo bonse bali mu mafya ayakosa nganshi." 
2Chronicles15:6 Kwaleba ukuti umushobo umo waima mukonaula umushobo unankwe, no musumba nao waima mukonaula umusumba unankwe. Neci cacitike pa mulandu wakuti Lesa alebacusha ku macushi aya misango misango." 
2Chronicles15:7 Lelo imwe mube abakosa kabili mwibwelela numa, pantu imilimo yenu ili nokulambulwa.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Ilyo Asa aumfwile aya mashiwi ya kusesema kwakwa Asariya mwana Odedi uwali kasesema, lyena akwata amaka. Abomba umulimo wakufumya utulubi utwamuselu ukufuma mu calo conse ica bena Yuda ne ca bena Benjamini elyo na mu misumba iyo apokolwele mu mpili sha Efulemu. Alungisha no bulambo bwakwa Yawe ubwali pa ntanshi ya lubansa lwa ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
2Chronicles15:9 Elyo alonganika abantu bonse aba mu Yuda, abena Benjamini elyo na bantu ba ku Efulemu, Manase na Simeoni abaishile ikala nabo, pantu abantu abengi balishile ukufuma ku Israeli ilyo bamwene ukuti Yawe Lesa wakwe ali nankwe." 
2Chronicles15:10 Balongana mu Yerusalemu mu mweshi wabutatu mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na isano (15) uwakwa Asa ukuba pa bufumu. 
2Chronicles15:11 Pa nshita ine ilya batuula amalambo kuli Yawe aya ŋombe imyanda cine lubali (700), elyo impaanga pamo ne mbushi amakana cine lubali (7,000) ukufuma pa fitapwa ifyo babwelele nafyo." 
2Chronicles15:12 Kabili bapangana ne cipangano icakufwaya Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo, ne mitima yabo yonse ne myeo yabo yonse" 
2Chronicles15:13 Elyo abo abafilwa ukufwaya Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, bena kubepaya, abe muntu umwaice nangu umukalamba, umwaume nangu umwanakashi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Bapanga umulapo kuli Yawe mu mashiwi ayakalamba ninshi balepunda, balelisha amapenga no kupuuta insengo." 
2Chronicles15:15 Abena Yuda bonse balisekelele pali uyu mulapo pantu baucitile ne mitima yabo yonse. Bafwaile Lesa ninshi nabatemwa kabili balimusangile. Kanshi Yawe nao epakubapeela ukutuusha ku mbali shonse. 
2Chronicles15:16 Kabili imfumu Asa yafumya Maaka uwali nakulu pa cifulo cakwe ica bunyina wakwa namfumu pa mulandu wakuti alipangile icamuselu ca luceshi lwa mulungu uwanakashi Ashera ku cimuti. Asa atema ici cimuti, aciputaula acocela na mu mukonko wa Kidironi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Lelo nangu afililwe ukufumya incende shakupepelako isho balecindika mu Israeli, umutima wakwa Asa wali uwaipeelesha nganshi kuli Yawe mu nshiku sha bumi bwakwe bonse." 
2Chronicles15:18 Aletele mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa silifa na golide ne fipe fyonse ifyo ena na wishi batuulile. 
2Chronicles15:19 Takwatalile akuba inkondo mpaka ukufika mu mwaka uwalenga amakumi yatatu na isano (35) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Asa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na mutanda uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Asa, Baasha imfumu ya bena Israeli yaimya ulubuli na bena Yuda elyo yashingulusha ilinga ku musumba wa Rama pakulesha ukuti kwiba nangu umo uwakufuma nangu uwakwingila mu calo cakwa Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Elyo Asa abuula silifa na golide ukufuma mu cipao ca mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe elyo ne ya mu ŋanda yakwe iye sano, afituma kuli Beni Hadadi imfumu ya ku Aramu, uwaleteeka mu Damasiko." 
2Chronicles16:3 Amweba ati, “Leka pabe icipangano pakati ka iwe na ine, nga filya caliko pakati ka batata elyo na bawiso. Mona, nakutumina silifa na golide. Eico pangulula icipangano ca pakati ka iwe na Baasha imfumu ya ku Israeli pakuti afume mu calo candi.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Beni Hadadi asuminisha ifyasosa imfumu Asa elyo atuma abakalamba ba bashilika bakwe mu misumba ya bena Israeli. Baya cimfya imisumba ya Iyoni, Dani, Abeli Maimu elyo ne misumba yonse iya matala iyakwa Naftali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Ilyo Baasha aumfwa ifi, aleka ukukuula Rama no kuleka ifyo alecita." 
2Chronicles16:6 Elyo imfumu Asa aleta abaume bonse aba mu Yuda ukwisa senda amabwe yonse elyo ne mbao ukufuma ku Rama isho Baasha alebomfya. Kuli ifi fipe Asa afibomfya ukukuulilako imisumba ya Geba na Misipa. 
2Chronicles16:7 Pa nshita ine ilya, Hanani kamona aisa kuli Asa imfumu ya bena Yuda elyo amweba ati, “Pa mulandu wakuti wacicetekela mu mfumu ya bena Aramu ukwabula ukuti ucetekele muli Yawe, Lesa obe, ecalenga ukuti abashilika ba mfumu ya ku Aramu bapusuke ukufuma mu minwe yobe." 
2Chronicles16:8 Bushe Abena Kushi na bena Libya tabaali impuka ya bashilika abengi nganshi ninshi nabakwata amaceleta na bashilika ba pali bakabalwe? Nomba ilyo wakuutile peshina lyakwa Yawe, alibapeele mu minwe yobe." 
2Chronicles16:9 Pantu amenso yakwa Yawe yalalolekesha mukati ke sonde lyonse no kukoselesha bonse abo imitima ili iyaipeelesha kuli ena. Iwe ucitile icintu icabulamo amano, eico nomba ukufuma lelo walatendeka ukulalwa inkondo.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Asa epakufulilwa kamona pa mulandu wa aya mashiwi. Kanshi afulwa nganshi icakuti amuposa na mu cifungo. Kabili pa nshita imo ine atendeka ukucusha bamo abantu bakwe. 
2Chronicles16:11 Ifintu ifyacitike mu nshita ya bufumu bwakwa Asa ukufuma ku kutendeka ukufika ku mpela fyalembwa mu citabo ca shamfumu sha bena Yuda na bena Israeli. 
2Chronicles16:12 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na pabula (39) uwa pa bufumu, Asa alwala ubulwele mu makasa yakwe. Nangu cali cakuti ubulwele bwali ubukali, lelo na mukulwala kwakwe talombele ubwafwilisho ukufuma kuli Yawe, kanofye kuli bashiŋanga." 
2Chronicles16:13 Elyo mu mwaka walenga amakumi yane na umo (41) uwa pa bufumu bwakwe emo Asa afwile no kuya lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe. 
2Chronicles16:14 Baya mushiika na mu cilindi ico umwine afukwile mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Bamulalika pa musengele uo babikilepo ifya cena cisuma elyo na mafuta ya cena icisuma ayalekana lekana. Elyo bakosha no mulilo uwingi nganshi uwakumucindikilapo. 
2Chronicles17:1 Umwana wakwe Yehoshafati umwaume ewamupyene pa bufumu elyo akosha na maka yakwe pa bena Israeli. 
2Chronicles17:2 Abika abashilika ba nkondo mu misumba yonse iya malinga iya mu Yuda elyo abika ne nkambi sha bashilika mu Yuda elyo na mu misumba yakwa Efulemu ilya Asa wishi apokolwele. 
2Chronicles17:3 Yawe ali na Yehoshafati, pantu mu myaka yakwe iyakwambilapo aendele bwino mu nshila shaleendamo wishi Davidi. Talefwaya icinso ca milungu ba Baali," 
2Chronicles17:4 lelo ena afwaile Lesa wakwa wishi no kukonka amafunde yakwe ukucila imicitile yakwete abena Israeli. 
2Chronicles17:5 Yawe akosha ubufumu ubwali mu minwe yakwe. Elyo abena Yuda batendeka ukuleta ifyabupe kuli Yehoshafati, icakuti akwata icuma icingi nganshi elyo no mucinshi." 
2Chronicles17:6 Umutima wakwe waipeeleshe ku nshila shakwa Yawe, kabili afumyamo incende shonse ishakupepelamo isho bacindika elyo atema ne nceshi sha mulungu Ashera ukufuma mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles17:7 Mu mwaka walenga itatu uwa pa bufumu bwakwe, atuma bacilolo bakwe Beni Haili, Obadia, Sakaria, Netaneli elyo na Mikaiya mukuya balesambilisha mu misumba ya mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles17:8 Pakati kabo pali na bamo abena Levi aba, Shemaiya, Netaniya, Sebadiya, Asaeli, Shemiramoti, Yehonatani, Adoniya, Tobiya, Tobadoniya elyo na bashimapepo Elishama na Yehoramu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Balasambilisha mu Yuda monse ninshi nabasenda icitabo ca mafunde yakwa Yawe. Baendawike mu misumba yonse iya mu Yuda, balesambilisha abantu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Umwenso wakutiina Yawe waikete ishamfumu shonse ishashingulwike icalo ca Yuda, icakuti takwali uwakucita ulubuli na Yehoshafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Bamo Abafilisiti baletela Yehoshafati ifyabupe elyo na silifa ngo mutuulo. Elyo Abaarabu bamuletela ifitekwa, basukusuku amakana cine lubali ne myanda cine lubali (7,700) elyo na basawe nabo amakana cine lubali ne myanda cine lubali (7,700)." 
2Chronicles17:12 Yehoshafati alekoselakofye asuka akwatisha amaka. Akuula imisumba ya malinga ne ya matala mu Yuda," 
2Chronicles17:13 elyo akwata ne fipe ifingi nganshi ifyo asunga mu misumba ya mu Yuda. Kabili asunga mu Yerusalemu abashilika abaishiba nganshi ukulwa. 
2Chronicles17:14 Kabili ifi efyali ukupendwa kwabo umwabela indupwa shabo, Ukufuma mu Yuda, abakalamba ba fita ikana limo (1,000). Adina umukalamba wa fita ali na bashilika amakana imyanda itatu (300,000) abaishiba ukulwa." 
2Chronicles17:15 Uwakonkapo ni Yehohanani umukalamba wa fita ali na bashilika amakana imyanda ibili na makumi cine konse konse (280,000)." 
2Chronicles17:16 Uwakonkapo ni Amasiya mwana Sikiri uwaipeeleshefye umwine ku mulimo wakwa Yawe, ali na bashilika amakana imyanda ibili (200,000)." 
2Chronicles17:17 Ukufuma muli Benjamini ni aba: Eliada umushilika uwamaka, ali na bashilika amakana imyanda ibili (200,000) abalwila ku mata ne nkwela." 
2Chronicles17:18 Uwakonkapo ni Yehosabadi, ali na bashilika amakana umwanda umo na makumi cine konse konse (180,000) abacenjela ukulwa inkondo." 
2Chronicles17:19 Aba e bashilika abalelinda imfumu, ukwabula ukupenda abo yatekele mu misumba ya malinga mu calo conse ica bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles18:1 Nomba Yehoshafati alikwete icuma icingi nganshi elyo no bucindami, kabili aliilundinkenye na kuli Ahabu mu cupo." 
2Chronicles18:2 Panuma ya myaka inono alimine aya aletandalila Ahabu ku Samaria. Ahabu aipaila Yehoshafati na bantu ali nabo impaanga ne ŋombe ishingi, elyo amulomba ukuti akaye sansa Ramoti Gileadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli yaipusha Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda aiti, “Bushe kuti wanshindika mukulwisha Ramoti Gileadi?” Yehoshafati ayasuka ati, “Ine, cimo na iwe, elyo na bantu bandi cimofye na bantu bobe, eico tuli nokukwafwa ukulwa.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Lelo Yehoshafati aeba imfumu ya bena Israeli ati, “Nomba icantanshi utale wipushe Yawe.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli epakwita bakasesema bonse abaume imyanda ine (400) no kubepusha ati, “Bushe kuti twaya mukulwa ulubuli na Ramoti Gileadi nangu tuleke?” Bamwasuka ati, “Kabiye, pantu Lesa ali nokupeela aba bantu mu minwe ya mfumu.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Nomba Yehoshafati aipusha ati, “Bushe pano tapali kasesema wakwa Yawe uwakuti twipusheko?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yayasuka Yehoshafati ati, “Kwena kuciliko umuntu na umbi uwakuti atwipushisheko kuli Yawe, nomba nalimupata pantu tatala asesema icisuma nangu cimo palwa ine, kanofye ifibi. Uyu muntu ni Mikaiya mwana Imula.” Yehoshafati ayasuka ati, “Imfumu taifwile kulanda ifyo.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli epakwita cilolo waiko umo yamweba ati, “Kalete Mikaiya mwana Imula nombaline.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Imfumu ya bena Israeli na Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda baikele pa fipuna fyabo ifyabufumu pa lubansa lwakutwilapo mupepi ne mpongolo yakwingililapo mu Samaria, ninshi nabafwala ifyakufwala fyabufumu kabili na bonse bakasesema balesesema pa cinso ca shamfumu." 
2Chronicles18:10 Nomba Sedekiya mwana Kenana alipangile insengo sha fyela elyo asosa ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ukuti, ‘Kuli ishi nsengo eko uli nokupunkila abena Aramu mpaka ukabonaule.’”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Bakasesema bambi bonse balesesema cimo cine abati, “Usanse Ramoti Gileadi kabili uli nokuucimfya, pantu Yawe ali nokucipeela mu minwe ya mfumu.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Inkombe iyaile kukwita Mikaiya yamweba ati, “Mona iwe ulifye weka, bambi bonse bakasesema balekomailafye pakuti imfumu ili nokucimfya. Na iwe ulekefye amashiwi yobe yabe nga yabo, kabili ulande ifisuma.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Lelo Mikaiya pakwasuka asosa ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo, ine ndi nokumweba ifyo Lesa alenjeba.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Cilya afika ku mfumu, nayo yamwipusha ati, “Mikaiya, bushe kuti twaya mukulwisha Ramoti Gileadi nangu tulekefye?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Kasanse, uli nokucimfya, pantu bali nokupeelwa mu minwe yobe.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Imfumu epakumweba ati, “Bushe miku inga nkakulenga ukulapa ukuti wilanjeba ifintu fimbi kanofye icine mwishina lyakwa Yawe?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Elyo Mikaiya ayasuka ati, “Namona abena Israeli bonse nabasalangana bonse mu mpili nge mpaanga ishabula kacema, kabili Yawe asosa ati, ‘Aba bantu tabakwata shikulwibo. Lekeni cila umo abwelele ku ŋanda yakwe umutende.’”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yaeba Yehoshafati ati, “Bushe nshacikweba ati uyu muntu tasesema nangu fimo ifisuma palwa ine, kanofye ifibi?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaiya akonkanyapo ukusosa ati, “Eico umfwa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe. Ine nacimona Yawe naikala pa cipuna cakwe ne fita fya ku mulu nafiminina ku kulyo kwakwe na ku kuso kwakwe." 
2Chronicles18:19 Kabili Yawe asosa ati, ‘Nani uwalatunka Ahabu imfumu ya bena Israeli ukuya lwisha Ramoti Gileadi nokuti aye mukufwa?’ Pakwasuka uyu alanda ici, umbi nao alanda ici." 
2Chronicles18:20 “Mukulekelesha wasuka waima umupashi waiminina pa cinso cakwa Yawe elyo wasosa auti, ‘Nalaya mutunka.’ “Yawe aipusha umupashi ati, ‘Walaya bomfya nshila nshi?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 “Umupashi wayasuka auti, ‘Nalaya no kuya ba umupashi wabufi mu tunwa twa bakasesema bakwe bonse.’ “Yawe aeba umupashi ati, ‘Walaya munasha mukumutunka, kabiye uye ubombe.’" 
2Chronicles18:22 Nomba kanshi Yawe nabika umupashi wakubepa ubufi mu tunwa twa bakasesema bobe aba. Yawe napingula icinkunka pali iwe.” 
2Chronicles18:23 Elyo Sedekiya mwana Kenana aima no kuya toba Mikaiya ulupi pa menso. Amwipusha ati, “Ni nshila nshi umupashi wakufuma kuli Yawe wilemo ilyo wacifuma kuli ine ukwisa landa kuli iwe?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaiya ayasuka ati, “Ukeshiba pa bushiku ukafulumuka ukuya mukubelama mu muputule wamukati.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yakonkomesha ati, “Buuleni Mikaiya no kumubwesesha kuli Amoni kateka wa musumba elyo na kuli Yoashi umwana wa mfumu," 
2Chronicles18:26 kabili ubebe nokuti, ifi efyo imfumu yasosa aiti, ‘Bikeni uyu muntu mu cifungo elyo tecakwesha ukumupeela nangu cimo kanofye umukate na menshi mpaka ilyo nkabwela umutende.’”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaiya epakusosa ati, “Nga cakuti uli nokubwela umutende, ninshi Yawe talandile ukupitila muli ine.” Alundapo nokuti, “Mwe bantu bonse, mumfwe amashiwi aya nalanda!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli na Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda epakwima baya ku Ramoti Gileadi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Imfumu ya bena Israeli yaeba Yehoshafati ati, “Ine nalaifungushanya pakwingila mu nkondo, lelo iwe ufwale ifyakufwala fyabufumu.” Kanshi imfumu ya bena Israeli epakuifungushanya, yaya na mukulwa." 
2Chronicles18:30 Nomba imfumu ya ku Aramu yalipeele icipope ku bakalamba ba fita fya maceleta ati, “Mwilwisha umuntu umbi umunono nangu mukalamba kanofye imfumu ya bena Israeli.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Ilyo abakalamba ba maceleta bamona Yehoshafati, basosa abati, “Ala uyu e mfumu ya bena Israeli.” Kanshi epakupilibuka ukuti bamusanse. Nomba Yehoshafati apunda, na Yawe amwafwa. Lesa abatalusha ukufuma kuli ena," 
2Chronicles18:32 pantu ilyo abakalamba ba maceleta bamona ukuti teyo imfumu ya bena Israeli, baleka ukumutamfya." 
2Chronicles18:33 Lelo umuntu umo abuula ubuta aposa umufwi icilaselase, waya lasa imfumu ya bena Israeli pakati ka filundilo fya cakucinga icifuba cakwe. Elyo imfumu yaeba kensha we celeta ati, “Alusha iceleta no kumfumya mu bulwi pantu nabancena.”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Inkondo yatwalililafye akasuba konse, elyo imfumu ya bena Israeli yaikalafye mwiceleta, yashintilila kwiceleta mukati yalosha amenso ukwali abena Aramu ukufika icungulo. Elyo cilya kawa yaleka no mweo." 
2Chronicles19:1 Ilyo Yehoshafati imfumu ya mu Yuda abwelelamo umutende kwisano lyakwe ku Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles19:2 Yehu kamona mwana Hanani aya mukumukumanya elyo aeba imfumu ati, “Cinshi walayafwila imbifi elyo watemwa nabapata Yawe? Pa mulandu wa ifi ucitile, ubukali bwakwa Yawe buli pali iwe." 
2Chronicles19:3 Lelo ifintu ifisuma ficilipo muli iwe, pantu walifumya mu calo inceshi sha mulungu Ashera elyo no kubika umutima obe kukufwaya Lesa.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Yehoshafati aikele mu Yerusalemu, kabili abwekeshapo ukuya ku bantu nakabili ukufuma ku Beresheba ukufika ku calo ca mpili icakwa Efulemu no kubwesesha bonse kuli Yawe, Lesa wa bashibo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Asonta abapingushi mu calo, muli cila musumba uwe linga uwaba mu Yuda." 
2Chronicles19:6 Elyo abeba nokuti, “Muleteka umutima pafyo mulecita, pantu tamwakulapingwila umuntu lelo mwakulapingwila Yawe, uyo uwakulaba na imwe lyonse ilyo mwapingula." 
2Chronicles19:7 Eico nomba lekeni akatiina kakwa Yawe kabe pali imwe. Muleteka umutima pakupingula, pantu kuli Yawe Lesa wesu takwaba lufyengo nangu akapatulula, nangu amafisakanwa.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Mu musumba wa Yerusalemu namo, Yehoshafati asontelemo abena Levi bamo bashimapepo elyo ne ntungulushi sha ndupwa sha bena Israeli ukulatungulula amafunde yakwa Yawe no kulapingula imilandu. Nabo baleikala mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles19:9 Abakonkomesha nokuti, “Mufwile ukubomba ne cishinka elyo ne mitima yenu yonse no kukwata akatiina kuli Yawe." 
2Chronicles19:10 Mu mulandu onse uwaisa kuli imwe ukufuma ku bekalacalo banenu abekala mu misumba, ibe milandu yakusumya umulopa, nangu ifyo Yawe akonkomeshe, amalango, ifipope nangu amafunde, mufwile ukubasoka ukuti tabafwile ukubifya kuli Yawe pantu ubukali bwakwe kuti bwaisa pali imwe na pali bamunyinenwe. Nga mwalacita ifi tamwakakwate umulandu." 
2Chronicles19:11 “Amaria shimapepo mukalamba ewakulamutungulula pa milandu yonse iya pali Yawe elyo Sebadiya mwana Ishimaeli umulashi wa luko lwakwa Yuda nao ewakulamutungulula pa milandu yonse iya pa bufumu. Elyo abena Levi ebali nokuba bacilolo pali imwe. Mulebomba abakosa, kabili Yawe abe na bonse abakulabomba bwino.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Panuma ya ifi, Abena Moabu na bena Amoni pamo na bamo abena Meuni baishile mukulwisha Yehoshafati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Elyo abantu bamo baisa kuli Yehoshafati bamweba abati, “Kwaisa umulongo wa bashilika uukalamba mukukulwisha ukufuma ku Edomu kwishilya lya bemba. Nefi fita nafifika mu Hasasoni Tama.” Emukutila Eni Gedi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Yehoshafati aumfwa umwenso, apilibukila kukufwaya icinso cakwa Yawe, elyo abila ne mbila yakuleka ukulya mu calo conse ica Yuda." 
2Chronicles20:4 Abekalacalo bonse aba mu Yuda epakulongana mukufwaya ubwafwilisho ukufuma kuli Yawe. Mu cine bafumine mu misumba yonse iya mu Yuda mukumufwaya. 
2Chronicles20:5 Elyo Yehoshafati aiminina pakati ke bumba lya bena Yuda elyo na ba mu Yerusalemu pa ŋanda yakwa Yawe ku ntanshi ya lubansa ulupya," 
2Chronicles20:6 no kulanda ati, “We Yawe, Lesa wa bashifwe, bushe teiwe Lesa uwaba mu mulu? Niwe uteeka pa shamfumu sha nko shonse. Amaka no bulamba fyaba mu minwe yobe elyo takwaba no wingakwansha." 
2Chronicles20:7 Iye we Lesa wesu, bushe teiwe watamfishe abantu abaleikala muli cino calo pa mulandu wa bantu bobe abena Israeli, elyo wacipeela kuli bamwana Abrahamu cibusa obe pakuti cibe icalo cabo pe na pe?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Emo baikala muli ici calo elyo kabili balikuulila ishina lyobe icifulo camushilo, no kulanda abati," 
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Nga cakuti ishamo lyatuponena, atemwa inkondo, icikuko nangu icipowe, tukesa iminina pa cinso cobe pa ntanshi ya ŋanda ino umwaba ishina lyobe no kulilila kuli iwe mu kucula kwesu, elyo na iwe uli nokutumfwa no kutupususha!’" 
2Chronicles20:10 “Mona we Yawe abena Amoni, abena Moabu elyo na ba ku mpili sha ku Seiri, balya waleseshe abena Israeli ukubapoka ifyalo fyabo lintu bafumine mu Egupto, nefyo abena Israeli bafumineko baleka ukubalofya." 
2Chronicles20:11 Nomba umone bena ukutasha kwabo ifyo bemine mukwisa tutamfya ukufuma mu calo ico watupeela ukuba icacishilano. 
2Chronicles20:12 We Lesa wesu, bushe tawabapingule? Pantu ifwe tatukwete amaka ayakuti tulwishisheko uyu mulongo uukalamba uwa bashilika abeshile mukutusansa. Tatwishibe ifyakucita, lelo amenso yesu ifwe yalifye pali iwe.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Abaume bonse aba mu Yuda, pamo na bakashi babo, abana babo elyo no twana utunono, baimininafye pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
2Chronicles20:14 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waisa pali Yahasieli mwana Sakaria, umwana wakwa Benaya mwana Yeli, mwana Matania, umwina Levi kabili uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Asafu, lintu acili eminine pebumba." 
2Chronicles20:15 Asosa ati, “We mfumu Yehoshafati elyo na bonse mwe bekala mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu, umfweni kuno! Ifi efyo Yawe alanda kuli imwe ukuti, ‘Mwitiina nangu ukutompoka pa mulandu wa uyu mulongo uukalamba uwa bashilika. Pantu ulu lubuli telwenu lelo lubuli lwakwa Lesa." 
2Chronicles20:16 Mailo mukeme mukuya balwisha. Bakesa baleninika umulundu mu nshila yapitila ku Sisi, elyo imwe muli nokuya basanga lwa pa mpela ya mupokapoka wa mu matololo ya Yerueli." 
2Chronicles20:17 Tamufwile ukulwa muli ulu ulubuli. Mukaye imininafye mu ncende shenu. Mukemininefye elyo mukamone ukulubula uko Yawe amukwatila mwe bena Yuda elyo na ba mu Yerusalemu. Mwikwata umwenso, nangu ukutompoka. Mukemefye no kuya bakumanya mailo, elyo Yawe akaba na imwe.’”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Yehoshafati epakukontamika umutwe, ashiba ne mpumi yakwe panshi, elyo na bantu bonse abena Yuda na ba mu Yerusalemu bakunkwila Yawe no kumupepa." 
2Chronicles20:19 Kabili abena Levi bamo abena Koati elyo na bena Kora baiminina no kulumbanya Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, mwishiwi ilikalamba nganshi." 
2Chronicles20:20 Lucelocelo ubushiku bwakonkelepo baima balungama ku matololo ya ku Tekoa. Cilya baima, Yehoshafati aiminina no kusosa ati, “Umfweni kuli ine, mwe bena Yuda na bantu ba mu Yerusalemu. Mukwate icicetekelo muli Yawe Lesa wenu nao ali nokumukosha. Mukwate icicetekelo muli bakasesema bakwe elyo muli nokucimfya.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Panuma yakulanshanya na bantu, imfumu Yehoshafati yasonta abakuya baleimba pa ntanshi ya bashilika, ukwimbila Yawe no kumulumbanya mu nsalu ishamushilo baletila, “Toteleni Yawe pantu ukutemwa kwakwe kwa pe na pe.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Ilyo batendeka ukwimba no kulumbanya, Yawe abika abakulalilila abena Amoni, Abena Moabu elyo na ba ku lupili lwa ku Seiri abaingilile mukulwisha abena Yuda." 
2Chronicles20:23 Abashilika ba bena Amoni elyo na ba bena Moabu baimina abashilika ba ku lupili lwa ku Seiri, baonaulafye bonse. Panuma yakupwisha ukubepaya, epakwamba ukulwa abene, no kwipayana." 
2Chronicles20:24 Ilyo abashilika ba mu Yuda bafika pa ncende apo amatololo yalemoneka no kulolesha ukwali abalwani babo elyo bamonafye ifitumbi ifya bantu nafilambalala panshi. Tapali nelyo umo uwapuswike. 
2Chronicles20:25 Kanshi Yehoshafati na bantu bakwe epakuya mukusenda ifitapwa ku balwani babo, kabili baya sangamo ifipe ifingi nganshi, ifyakufwala elyo ne fintu ifyalekana lekana ifyamutengo ifyo ku bwingi fyacilile na pafyo bengakwanisha ukusenda. Pa mulandu wa bwingi bwa fipe casendele inshiku shitatu pakufisenda." 
2Chronicles20:26 Pa bushiku bwalenga shine baya longana mwishika lya ku Beraka, eko baya mukulumbanya Lesa. Ni pa mulandu wa ici betila ishika ili ukuti ni Beraka ukufika na nomba." 
2Chronicles20:27 Elyo bonse abaume ba mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu babwelela ku Yerusalemu ne nsansa ishingi, ne mfumu Yehoshafati naitangila pantanshi pantu Yawe alibalengele ukusansamuka pakucimfya abalwani babo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Cilya baingila mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, bonse balungamafye ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe, balelisha amaseese, insango na mapenga." 
2Chronicles20:29 Ishamfumu shonse ishashingulwike shatendeka ukutiina Lesa ilyo baumfwa ifyo Yawe akandile abalwani ba bena Israeli. 
2Chronicles20:30 Kanshi no bufumu bwakwa Yehoshafati bwakwata icibote pa mulandu wakuti Lesa amupeela ukutuusha ku mbali shonse. 
2Chronicles20:31 Yehoshafati ali ne myaka amakumi yatatu na isano (35) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka. Aba imfumu ya calo ca bena Yuda kabili ateekele icalo mu musumba wa Yerusalemu pa myaka amakumi yabili na isano (25). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Asuba, umwana mwanakashi wakwa Shili." 
2Chronicles20:32 Yehoshafati aendele mu nshila shakwa wishi Asa, kabili tatalile afumamo. Acitile ifintu ifyalungama pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
2Chronicles20:33 Lelo incende shakupepelamo isho bacindika shena alifililwe ukushonaula, elyo na bantu baali tabalapeela imitima yabo kuli Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo." 
2Chronicles20:34 Nomba ifintu ifyacitike pa nshita ya bufumu bwakwa Yehoshafati, ukufuma pa kutendeka ukufika pakulekelesha, fyonse fyalilembwa mu citabo camilandu icakwa Yehu mwana Hanani, ifyo ifyalembwa na mu citabo ca shamfumu sha bena Israeli." 
2Chronicles20:35 Panuma ya ifi, Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Yuda yasuminishanya na Ahasia imfumu ya bena Israeli, uwali umuntu umubifi." 
2Chronicles20:36 Aumfwana nankwe ukuti bapange amato ayakalamba ayakubombelamo ifyamakwebo. Aya mato yapangilwe pa ncende iyo baleita ati Esioni Geberi. 
2Chronicles20:37 Elyo Eliese mwana Dodafau uwa ku Maresha asesema amashiwi aya pali Yehoshafati ayakuti, “Pantu iwe wasuminishanya na Ahasia pafyo mulefwaya ukucita, Yawe alaonaula ifyo fine fintu mupangile.” Kanshi ifimato epakonaika, takwali nokufyensha pa menshi ku fyamakwebo." 
2Chronicles21:1 Ilyo Yehoshafati afwile aile lala ukwalala ifikolwe fyakwe, bamushiikile uko bashika ifikolwe fyakwe mu musumba wakwa Davidi. Elyo Yehoramu umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Chronicles21:2 Yehoramu alikwete bamunyina, abana bakwa Yehoshafati, na mashina yabo yali ni Asariya, Yehieli, Sakaria, Asariahu, Mikaeli elyo na Shefatiya. Bonse aba bali bana bakwa Yehoshafati imfumu ya bena Israeli." 
2Chronicles21:3 Shibo alibapeele ifyabupe ifingi ifya silifa, golide elyo ne fipe fimbi ifyalekana lekana ifyamutengo. Alundilepo ne misumba iya malinga iya mu Yuda lelo ubufumu bwena apeele Yehoramu pantu ewali ibeli." 
2Chronicles21:4 Lelo panuma yakwikala bwino pa bufumu, Yehoramu aimishe ulupanga no kwipaya bamunyina abaume bonse elyo na shimo shimo intungulushi sha bena Israeli." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yehoramu akwete imyaka amakumi yatatu na ibili (32) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili aikele pa bufumu mu Yerusalemu imyaka cine konse konse."
