2Chronicles36:8 Palwa fintu fimbi ifya pa bufumu bwakwa Yehoyakimu, ne fintu ifyamakankamike ifyo acitile, fyonse fyalilembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya shamfumu sha bena Israeli na bena Yuda. Elyo umwana wakwe Yehoiyakini amupyana pa bufumu." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoiyakini akwete imyaka yakufyalwa ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili aikele pa bufumu imyeshifye itatu mu Yerusalemu ne nshiku ikumi limo. Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
2Chronicles36:10 Ilyo umwaka wayalwike, imfumu Nebukadinesa yatuma abakumuleta ku Babiloni pamo ne fipe ifyacindama ukufuma mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Elyo abuula Sedekiya uwali munyina wakwa Yehoiyakini ukuba imfumu ya bena Yuda na ba mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Sedekia ali ne myaka yakufyalwa amakumi yabili na umo (21) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili aikele pa bufumu imyaka ikumi limo na umo (11) mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:12 Acitile ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, Lesa wakwe, kabili afililwe no kuicefya kuli Yeremia kasesema, uwalandile icebo cakwa Yawe kuli ena." 
2Chronicles36:13 Kabili asangukila imfumu Nebukadinesa uwamusontele pa bufumu no kumulenga ukulapa mwishina lyakwa Lesa. Elyo akosha umutima no kutalama icakuti afilwa no kubwelela kuli Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Kabili abakalamba bonse aba bashimapepo na bantu bene bacishamo ukuba ababula icishinka, mukukonka imicitile iyabipisha iya mishobo ya benafyalo elyo no kukowesha ŋanda yakwa Yawe iyali iyashishiwa mu Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyabo, akonkanyapofye ukubatumina amashiwi ayalelanda inkombe shakwe, pantu alikwatile abantu elyo ne ncende yakwe uluse." 
2Chronicles36:16 Lelo baletumfya inkombe shakwa Lesa, ukususha amashiwi yakwe no kuseka bakasesema bakwe mpaka Yawe afulilwa abantu bakwe, ukufulwa ukushili kwakubwesha umutima." 
2Chronicles36:17 Lesa epakubemisha imfumu ya bena Kaludea uwaishile ipaya abalumendo bonse ku lupanga abali mu cifulo camushilo, kabili tashilepo nangu umo umulumendo nangu umukashana, umwaume umukalamba nangu umukote. Lesa apeelefye bonse mu minwe yakwa Nebukadinesa." 
2Chronicles36:18 Asenda ifipe fyonse ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa ku Babiloni, ifikulu ne finono. Elyo asenda ne cuma conse ica mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe pamo ne cuma ca mfumu na bacilolo bakwe." 
2Chronicles36:19 Baoca Iŋanda yakwa Lesa, babongolola ne linga lya ku musumba wa Yerusalemu. Baoca na mayanda yonse aye sano elyo no konaula icipe conse ica mulimo uukankala." 
2Chronicles36:20 Elyo asenda abantu bonse muli bunkole ku Babiloni abapuswike kukubepaya, baya ba ababomfi kuli ena na ku bana bakwe mpakafye lintu ubufumu bwa bena Pesia bwatendeke." 
2Chronicles36:21 Ici cali mukufikilisha ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyalandilwe na kasesema Yeremia ilyakuti icalo cali nokubaka Amasabata yaciko mu nshita yonse iyakonaulwa mpaka imyaka yonse amakumi cine lubali (70) ikakumane. 
2Chronicles36:22 Cali mu mwaka wakutendeka uwakuba pa bufumu bwakwa Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia, pakufikilisha ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyasosele kasesema Yeremia, Yawe aimishe umutima wakwa Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia ukuma imbila mu bufumu bwakwe no kuilemba ati," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Ifi efyo Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia yasosa, ‘Yawe, Lesa uwaba mu mulu nampeela ifyalo fya shamfumu fyonse ifya pano isonde kabili nine asontele ukumukuulila iŋanda mu Yerusalemu iyaba mu Yuda. Na bonse abakwa Yawe pali imwe mwe bali pano, kuti mwabwelela ku Yuda mukuya bomba uyu mulimo, na Yawe Lesa wenu abe na imwe.’ ”" 
Ezra1:1 Cali mu mwaka wakutendeka uwakuba pa bufumu bwakwa Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia, pakufikilisha ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyasosele kasesema Yeremia, Yawe aimishe umutima wakwa Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia ukuma imbila mu bufumu bwakwe no kuilemba ati," 
Ezra1:2 “Ifi efyo Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia yasosa, ‘Yawe, Lesa uwaba mu mulu nampeela ifyalo fya shamfumu fyonse ifya pano isonde kabili nine asontele ukumukuulila iŋanda mu Yerusalemu iyaba mu Yuda." 
Ezra1:3 Na bonse abakwa Yawe pali imwe mwe bali pano, kuti mwabwelela ku Yerusalemu mu calo ca Yuda no kuya kuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli. Uyu e Lesa bapepa mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:4 Umuntu onse Umuyuda uwapusuka muli bunkole ku Babiloni, pa ncende ponse apo aikala, abantu abaikala nankwe bafwile ukumupeelako silifa, golide, ifyuma ne fitekwa. Bamupeele kumo ne fyakutuula mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa iya mu Yerusalemu kukuitemenwafye umwine.’ ”" 
Ezra1:5 Elyo abakalamba aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda na Benjamini, bashimapepo na bena Levi, na bonse abo Lesa akuntile ku mutima, baipekenye mukuya kuula cipya cipya iŋanda yakwa Yawe ilya mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:6 Abena mupalamano babo balibafwileko pakubapeelako ifintu fimo ifyakubomfya ifili nga silifa, golide, ifyuma, ifitekwa ne fyabupe ifikankala pamo na fyonse ifyakutuula kukuitemenwafye." 
Ezra1:7 Elyo imfumu Sairasi abwesha ifipe fya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, ifyo Nebukadinesa asendele ukufuma ku Yerusalemu no kufibika mu ŋanda yakupepelamo imilungu yakwe." 
Ezra1:8 Kanshi Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia epakufipeela kuli kasunga wa fyuma Mitiredati, nao afipendela Sheshibasa cilolo wa Bayuda." 
Ezra1:9 Iyi e mpendwa yafiko: Imbale sha golide shali amakumi yatatu (30), imbale sha silifa shali ikana limo (1,000), imbale ishinono isha silifa shali amakumi yabili na pabula (29)," 
Ezra1:10 inweno isha golide shali amakumi yatatu (30), inweno isha silifa shali imyanda ine ne kumi limo (410), elyo ifipe fimbi fyali ikana limo (1,000)" 
Ezra1:11 Ifipe fyonse pamo ifya golide na silifa fyali amakana yasano ne myanda ine (5,400), ifi fyonse e fintu Sheshibasa atwele ku Yerusalemu pamo na bantu bali nabo muli bunkole ku Babiloni." 
Ezra2:1 Aba e bantu ba mu citungu ababwelele mu calo cabo, ukufuma ku Babiloni uko Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni abasendele muli bunkole. Kanshi babwelele ku Yerusalemu pamo pene na ku Yuda, na cila muntu aya ku mushi kumwakwe." 
Ezra2:2 Aba ebaishile na Serubabeli, Yeshua, Nehemia, Seraya, Reelaya, Modekai, Bilishani, Misipari, Bigifai, Reumu na Baanaya. Impendwa ya bana abaume abena Israeli abafumine muli bunkole niyi:" 
Ezra2:3 Abana bakwa Paroshi bali amakana yabili umwanda umo na makumi cine lubali na babili (2,172)" 
Ezra2:4 bamwana Shefatiya bali imyanda itatu amakumi cine lubali na babili (372) 
Ezra2:5 abana bakwa Ara, imyanda cine lubali na makumi cine lubali na basano (775)" 
Ezra2:6 abana bakwa Pehati Moabu, abeshikulu bakwa Yeshua na Yoabu, bali amakana yabili ne myanda cine konse konse ne kumi limo na babili (2,812)" 
Ezra2:7 abana bakwa Elamu bali ikana limo imyanda ibili na makumi yasano na bane (1,254)" 
Ezra2:8 abana bakwa Satu amakana pabula amakumi yane na basano (945) 
Ezra2:9 abana bakwa Sakai bali imyanda cine lubali na makumi mutanda (760) 
Ezra2:10 abana bakwa Bani bali imyanda mutanda amakumi yane na babili (642) 
Ezra2:11 abana bakwa Bebai imyanda mutanda na makumi yabili na batatu (623) 
Ezra2:12 abana bakwa Asigadi ikana limo imyanda ibili amakumi yabili na babili (1,222)" 
Ezra2:13 abana bakwa Adonikamu bali imyanda mutanda, amakumi mutanda na mutanda (666)" 
Ezra2:14 abana bakwa Bigifai bali amakana yabili na makumi yasano na mutanda (2,056)" 
Ezra2:15 abana bakwa Adini bali imyanda ine na makumi yasano na bane (454) 
Ezra2:16 abana bakwa Ateri abeshikulu bakwa Hesekia bali amakumi pabula na cine konse konse (98) 
Ezra2:17 abana bakwa Besai bali imyanda itatu na makumi yabili na batatu (323) 
Ezra2:18 abana bakwa Yora bali umwanda umo, ikumi limo na babili (112)" 
Ezra2:19 abana bakwa Hashumu bali imyanda ibili na makumi yabili na batatu (223) 
Ezra2:20 abana bakwa Giba bali amakumi pabula na basano (95) 
Ezra2:21 abena Betelemu abaume bali umwanda umo amakumi yabili na batatu (123) 
Ezra2:22 abena Netofa abaume bali amakumi yasano na mutanda (56) 
Ezra2:23 abena Anatoti abaume bali umwanda umo na makumi yabili na cine konse konse (128) 
Ezra2:24 abena Asimafeti abaume bali amakumi yane na babili (42) 
Ezra2:25 abena Kiriati Yarimu, Kefira na Beroti abaume imyanda cine lubali, amakumi yane na batatu (743)" 
Ezra2:26 abena Rama na Geba abaume imyanda mutanda na makumi yabili na umo (621) 
Ezra2:27 abena Mikimasi abaume bali umwanda umo na makumi yabili na babili (122) 
Ezra2:28 abena Betele na Ai abaume bali imyanda ibili na makumi yabili na batatu (223) 
Ezra2:29 abena Nebo abaume bali amakumi yasano na babili (52) 
Ezra2:30 abena Magibishi abaume bali umwanda umo na makumi yasano na mutanda (156) 
Ezra2:31 abena Elamu abaume bambi bali ikana limo imyanda ibili na makumi yasano na bane (1,254)" 
Ezra2:32 abena Harimu abaume bali imyanda itatu na makumi yabili (320) 
Ezra2:33 abena Lodi, Hadidi, na Ono bali imyanda cine lubali na makumi yabili na basano (725)" 
Ezra2:34 abena Yeriko abaume bali imyanda itatu na makumi yane na basano (345) 
Ezra2:35 abena Sena bali amakana yatatu ne myanda mutanda na makumi yatatu (3,630)" 
Ezra2:36 Abali bashimapepo ni aba: Abana baume bakwa Yedaiya, aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yeshua, bali imyanda pabula na makumi cine lubali na batatu (973)" 
Ezra2:37 abana baume bakwa Imeri bali ikana limo na makumi yasano na babili (1,052)" 
Ezra2:38 abana baume bakwa Pashuri, bali ikana limo ne myanda ibili na makumi yane na cine lubali (1,247)" 
Ezra2:39 abana baume bakwa Harimu bali ikana limo ne kumi limo na cine lubali (1,017)" 
Ezra2:40 Abena Levi ni aba: Abana baume bakwa Yeshua na Kadimieli, abeshikulu bakwa Hodafiya, bali amakumi cine lubali na bane (74)." 
Ezra2:41 Elyo bakemba abana bakwa Asafu bali umwanda umo na makumi yabili na cine konse konse (128). 
Ezra2:42 Bakalinda ba mpongolo nabo, bamwana Shalumu abana bakwa Ateri, abana bakwa Talimoni, abana bakwa Akubu, abana bakwa Hatita, abana bakwa Shobai, bonse pamo bali umwanda umo na makumi yatatu na pabula (139)" 
Ezra2:43 Ababomfi be Tempele ni aba: Abana baume bakwa Siha, abana baume bakwa Hasufa, abana baume bakwa Tabaoti," 
Ezra2:44 abana baume bakwa Kerosi, abana baume bakwa Siaha, abana baume bakwa Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 abana baume bakwa Lebanaya, abana baume bakwa Hagaba, abana baume bakwa Akubu," 
Ezra2:46 abana baume bakwa Hagabu, abana baume bakwa Shalimai, abana baume bakwa Hanani," 
Ezra2:47 abana baume bakwa Gideli, abana baume bakwa Gahari, abana baume bakwa Reaya," 
Ezra2:48 abana baume bakwa Resini, abana baume bakwa Nekoda, abana baume bakwa Gasamu," 
Ezra2:49 abana baume bakwa Usa, abana baume bakwa Pasea, abana baume bakwa Besai," 
Ezra2:50 abana baume bakwa Asina, abana baume bakwa Meunimu, abana baume bakwa Nefisimu," 
Ezra2:51 abana baume bakwa Bakibuku, abana baume bakwa Hakufa, abana baume bakwa Hahuri," 
Ezra2:52 abana baume bakwa Basiluti, abana baume bakwa Meida, abana baume bakwa Hasha," 
Ezra2:53 abana baume bakwa Bakosi, abana baume bakwa Sisera, abana baume bakwa Temaya," 
Ezra2:54 abana baume bakwa Nesiya na bana baume bakwa Hatifa. 
Ezra2:55 Abana baume ba babomfi bakwa Solomoni ni aba: Abana baume bakwa Sotai, abana baume bakwa Hasofereti, abana baume bakwa Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 abana baume bakwa Yala, abana baume bakwa Dakoni, abana baume bakwa Giddeli," 
Ezra2:57 abana baume bakwa Shefatiya, abana baume bakwa Hatili, abana baume bakwa Pokereti Hasebaimu na bana baume bakwa Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Ababomfi be Tempele na bana baume ba babomfi bakwa Solomoni bonse pamo bali imyanda itatu na makumi pabula na babili (392). 
Ezra2:59 Kabili aba, ebaninine ukufuma ku Tele Mela elyo na ku Tele Hasha, Kerubi, Adoni na ku Imeri, lelo calibanshishe ukulumbula uko amayanda ya bashibo yali, nangufye uko yatantikwe, nangu ukutilafye bena bali abena Israeli." 
Ezra2:60 Abana bakwa Delaiya, abana bakwa Tobia, abana bakwa Nekoda, bali imyanda mutanda amakumi yasano na babili (652)." 
Ezra2:61 Nomba kuli bashimapepo ni aba: Abana baume bakwa Hobaya, abana baume bakwa Hakosi elyo na bana baume bakwa Basilai uwabuulile umukashi wakwe ukufuma ku lupwa lwakwa Basilai umwina Gileadi no kwinikwako ishina limo line." 
Ezra2:62 Aba ebo bafwailishe amashina ya fikolwe fyabo mu fitabo lelo tabafimwene, kanshi epakubafumya pa mulongo wa bashimapepo no kubapendela pa bashasangululwa." 
Ezra2:63 Umulashi wa calo apeele icebo icakuti takuli kulya icakulya camushilo mpakafye bakakwate shimapepo uukapendula ukubomfya Urimu na Tumimu. 
Ezra2:64 Abana bonse ababwelele ukufuma mu busha bali amakana amakumi yane na yabili ne myanda itatu na makumi mutanda (42,360)." 
Ezra2:65 Babwela pamo na babomfi abaume na banakashi abali amakana cine lubali ne myanda itatu na makumi yatatu na cine lubali (7,337), aba bena bali na bakemba abaume na banakashi imyanda ibili (200)." 
Ezra2:66 Bakabalwe babo bali imyanda cine lubali na makumi yatatu na mutanda (736). Imisepela ya bapunda bakwete imyanda ibili amakumi yane na basano (245)," 
Ezra2:67 ingamila shabo nasho shali imyanda ine amakumi yatatu na shisano (435), elyo bapunda bali amakana mutanda imyanda cine lubali na makumi yabili (6,720)." 
Ezra2:68 Ilyo abali mu busha ku Babiloni bafika ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa iyali mu Yerusalemu, abakalamba ba ndupwa bamo batuula ifyabupe ifyakuitemenwa ifyakwafwilishako ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Lesa apo yakuulilwe kale." 
Ezra2:69 Ukulingana na maka bakwete, bapeele indalama drakimasi amakana amakumi mutanda ne ikana limo (61,000) isha golide ne ndalama minasi amakana yasano (5,000) isha silifa, kabili ne fyakufwala ifya bashimapepo nafyo umwanda umo (100)." 
Ezra2:70 Bashimapepo, abena Levi, bakemba, bakalinda wa mpongolo na babomfi be Tempele baikele mu misumba yabo, na bena Israeli abashala nabo mu misumba yabo." 
Ezra3:1 Ilyo umweshi walenga cine lubali wafikile, ninshi abena Israeli bonse balikala mu mishi yabo, elyo bonse balongene nga bana ba ŋanda imo ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra3:2 Elyo Yeshua umwana mwaume uwakwa Yosadaki na bamunyina bashimapepo, na Serubabeli umwana mwaume wakwa Shealitieli na bamunyina, epakukuulila Lesa wa bena Israeli ubulambo bwakocelapo amalambo, ukulingana nefyo calembwa mu mafunde yakwa Mose umuntu wakwa Lesa." 
Ezra3:3 Bakuula ubulambo pa mufula wa pa ncende iyakale nelyo baletiina abantu abaleikala kuli ilya incende, elyo batampa ukulatulilapo Yawe amalambo yakoca ulucelo ne cungulo." 
Ezra3:4 Balasefya ne nshikunkulu ya Nsakwe ukulingana nefyo calembwa. Cila bushiku baletuula amalambo yakoca ukukonka ne mpendwa iya fyalefwaikwa cila bushiku. 
Ezra3:5 Kabili balikonkenyepo ukuleka amalambo yakoca. Balundapo na ya mweshi upya, na ya nshikunkulu shimbi ishakupepelamo Yawe elyo ne mituulo cila muntu ali nokutuula kuli Yawe kukuitemenwafye." 
Ezra3:6 Ubushiku bwakutampa umweshi uwalenga cine lubali batampile ukutuula kuli Yawe amalambo yakoca nelyo bali tabalapwa ukwimba umufula wakukuulilapo Itempele lyakwa Yawe. 
Ezra3:7 Elyo bapeela indalama ku bakasona wa mabwe na bakabasa wa mbao. Bapeela ifyakulya ne fyakunwa na mafuta ya miolifa ku bena Sidoni na bena Turi. Bacitile ifi fyonse pakuti batwale imilando ya fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda pali bemba ukufuma ku Lebanoni ukutwala ku Yopa ukulingana ne nsambu bapeelwe kuli Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia. 
Ezra3:8 Mu mweshi wabubili uwa mu mwaka wabubili apo babwelele ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Yerusalemu, Serubabeli umwana wakwa Shealitieli, elyo na Yeshua umwana wakwa Yosadaki batampako ukubomba pamo na bamunyinabo bonse bashimapepo na bena Levi abo bafumine nabo mu busha no kubwelelamo ku Yerusalemu. Kanshi basala abena Levi ukwambila pa myaka amakumi yabili (20) no kucilapo pakuti bangalile umulimo wakukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Ezra3:9 Elyo Yeshua na bana bakwe pamo na bamunyina baikatana na Kadimieli na bamwane abaume abana bakwa Yuda pakwangalila umulimo wa mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa, pamo na bana baume abakwa Henadadi na bana baume ba bena Levi na bamunyinabo." 
Ezra3:10 Ilyo bakakuula bapwisha ukwimba umufula we Tempele lyakwa Yawe, bashimapepo baisa nabafwala ne fyakufwala fyabo, nabasenda na mapenga. Abena Levi bamwana Asafi nabo baisa nabasenda ne miwaya, baya ikala pa ncende yabo balalumbanya Yawe ukulingana nefyo Davidi imfumu ya bena Israeli asosele." 
Ezra3:11 Elyo baimba bonse capamo mukutasha no kutotela Yawe abati, “Ena musuma, ne citemwiko cakwe icishipwa cakubelelela ku bena Israeli.” Abantu bonse epakupunda apakalamba pakulumbanya Yawe pantu bapwisha ukwimba umufula wakukuulilapo iŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Ezra3:12 Lelo bashimapepo abengi na bena Levi na bakalemba ba ndupwa, abakote abamwenepo iŋanda yakwa Yawe iyapakubala balila imisowa ikulu nganshi pakumona umufula wa iŋanda uko waimbwa, nomba abengi balepunda ne nsansa." 
Ezra3:13 Kanshi abantu balifililwe ukupusanya iciunda cansansa ne camisowa, pantu abantu balepundisha nganshi ne congo caumfwika ukutali." 
Ezra4:1 Ilyo abalwani ba bena Yuda na Benjamini baumfwile ukuti abantu abali mu busha nabatampa ukukuulila Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli, Itempele," 
Ezra4:2 baya kuli Serubabeli na bakalamba ba ndupwa sha bashibo, babeba abati, “Lekeni tukuule bonse Itempele pantu na ifwe bene tupepa Lesa wenu ngefyo mucita. Elyo tulamutuula na malambo ukutampafye pa nshita yakwa Esahadoni imfumu ya ku Asiria uwatuletele kuno.”" 
Ezra4:3 Nomba Serubabeli, Yeshua na bambi abakalamba ba ndupwa sha bena Israeli bayasuka abati, “Ifwe tatulefwaya ukuti tukuule nenu iŋanda yakwa Lesa. Tukakuulila Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, Itempele fwe bene ukulingana nefyo Sairasi imfumu ya ku Pesia atukonkomeshe.”" 
Ezra4:4 Elyo abekalacalo batampile ukunenuna abena Yuda no kubatiinya pakuti baleke ukukuula. 
Ezra4:5 Elyo bapeela bashicilye amafisakanwa abakubemininako pakuti bafupule imilimo na mapange ya bena Yuda. Kabili batwalililafye ukulacita ifi pa nshita yonse yakwa Sairasi mfumu ya ku Pesia, mpakafye ne nshita Dariusi aishile ba imfumu ya ku Pesia." 
Ezra4:6 Mu nshiku shakwa Asuelusi, ku kwambafye kwa bufumu bwakwe, balemba kalata wakupeela imilandu ku bekashi ba mu calo ca Yuda na Yerusalemu." 
Ezra4:7 Kabili mu nshiku shakwa Atakisesi, Bishilamu na Mitiredata na Tabeli na banankwe bonse balembela Atakisesi imfumu ya ku Pesia uyu kalata, alembelwe mu filembo fya lulimi lwa Aramaiki, na pakubelenga balemubelenga mu Ciaramaiki." 
Ezra4:8 Reumu umukalamba wa bashilika na Shimushai kalemba balemba kalata walupato pali Yerusalemu ku mfumu Atakisesi mu musango uyu. 
Ezra4:9 “Ukufuma kuli Reumu umukalamba wa bashilika na Shimushai kalemba na banabo bambi, bakapingula wa milandu, abalashi, bacilolo, abakalamba, abena Ereki, aba ku Babiloni, abena Susa emukutila abena Elamu," 
Ezra4:10 ne mishobo yonse iyo umuntu umo uwacindama kabili uwalulumbi Osinapa, atamfishe elyo baisa ikala mu Samaria na mu calo conse icabela kwishilya lya mumana wa Yufurate.”" 
Ezra4:11 Ifi efyali kalata batumine, “Ku mfumu Atakisesi ukufuma ku babomfi bobe abantu ba mu calo ca kwishilya lya mumana, icantanshi twatuma ukuposha." 
Ezra4:12 Tulefwaya ukwishibishako imfumu ukuti Abayuda abali uko kale, abo pali nomba abaisa kuno mwesu ku Yerusalemu nabambako ukukuula cipya cipya ulya umusumba wabusangu kabili uwabubifi. Balekuula ifibumba no kuwamya imifula." 
Ezra4:13 Kabili nacilinga ukwishibisha imfumu ukuti umusumba nga wakuulwa nakabili, ne fibumba nga fyapwa, aba bantu tabakalepeela umutuulo nangu ukusonka imisonko iya misebo, nangu iya fipe ifilefuma ku ncende shimbi. Ici cikonaula icipao ca bashamfumu." 
Ezra4:14 Apo kwisano ekufuma imilile yesu, kabili teti tutemwe ukumona umusebanya ku mfumu, ecalenga ukuti tutume uyu kalata no kwishibisha imfumu." 
Ezra4:15 Mufwailishe ifyalembwa mu fitabo fya fikolwe, mwalasanga ukuti uyu musumba usangu, kabili wabonaushi ku mfumu na ku fitungu fimbi, elyo ni ncende iyabwafya ukufumafye nakale. Ecalenga nokuti baonaule." 
Ezra4:16 Tulefwaya ukuti imfumu ishibe ukutila umusumba nga wakuulwa cipya cipya ne fibumba fyakuulwa, ninshi amaka yobe ayakuteeka cilya citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana wa Yufurate yapwa.”" 
Ezra4:17 Elyo imfumu yatuma ubwasuko, aiti: “Kuli Reumu umukalamba wa bashilika, Shimushai kalemba na banabo bambi bonse abaleikala mu Samaria na bonse aba mu citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana. “Icantanshi namuposha bonse." 
Ezra4:18 Kalata mwantumine baliipilibwila mu lulimi lwesu no kumbelengela balimbelengela. 
Ezra4:19 Nalipeela icipope icakuti bafwailishe bwino palwa uyu mulandu, elyo natusanga nokuti abantu ba muli uyu musumba ukufumafye na kale baleimina no kutalamina imfumu. Uyu musango wabusangu ne micitile ibi fyalitwalilila ukucitwa muli uyu umusumba." 
Ezra4:20 Elyo kabili kwaliko imfumu ishamaka ishaleteeka mu Yerusalemu, ukufikafye na kwishilya lya mumana baleshipeela imituulo no kulasonka imisonko ya misebo nangu iya fipe ifilefuma ku ncende shimbi." 
Ezra4:21 Kanshi nomba mupeele icipope kuli abo bantu icakuti baleke ukubomba, pakutila umusumba wikuulwa nakabili mpakafye nkapingule." 
Ezra4:22 Mucenjele mwifilwa ukucita ifi namweba pali uyu mulandu. Cinshi twingalekela ukuti ubonaushi bwabipa ifi bulecusha imfumu mukutwalilila.” 
Ezra4:23 Panumafye yakubelenga kalata uwafumine ku mfumu Atakisesi, Reumu na Shimushai kalemba na banabo bambi bwangu bwangu baya ku Yerusalemu ku Bayuda no kubalesha ku maka ukukuula." 
Ezra4:24 Efyo baleseshe umulimo wakukuulila Lesa iŋanda mu Yerusalemu mpakafye mu mwaka wabubili uwa buteeko bwakwa Dariusi imfumu ya ku Pesia. 
Ezra5:1 Elyo bakasesema babili, Hagai na Sakaria umwana wakwa Ido, basesemena Abayuda abali mu calo ca Yuda na mu Yerusalemu mwishina lyakwa Lesa wa bena Israeli uwalebasunga." 
Ezra5:2 Kanshi Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli na Yeshua mwana Yosadaki baima no kwamba ukukuula iŋanda yakwa Lesa iyali mu Yerusalemu. Na bakasesema bonse babili bali nabo, balabafwilishako." 
Ezra5:3 Pali ilya nshita, Tatenai umulashi wa cilya citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana na Sheta Bosenai na banabo bambi baya uko balekuula no kubeba ati, “Nani amupeela insambu shakukuula nakabili iyi iŋanda pakuti mupwishishishe umulimo wakukuula?”" 
Ezra5:4 Bakonkanyapo no kwipusha amashina ya bantu abalekuula. 
Ezra5:5 Lelo amenso yakwa Lesa yali pa bakalamba ba Bayuda. Kanshi tababaleseshe ukukuula, balelolela ukuti imfumu ikaasuke kalata batumine." 
Ezra5:6 Ifi efyali umusango wa kalata Tatenai umulashi wa citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana, Sheta Bosenai na banankwe batumine ku mfumu Dariusi." 
Ezra5:7 Batumine amashiwi ku mfumu, umwalembelwe ifyakuti, “Kuli Dariusi mfumu, intanshi mutende." 
Ezra5:8 Tulefwaya ukwishibisha imfumu ukuti twaliya ku citungu ca Bayuda, ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa mukulu. Twasangile abantu balekuula na mabwe ayakulu nganshi. Balebika ne mbao pa fibumba balekuula. Balebomba uyu mulimo bwino bwino kabili ucili uletwalilila." 
Ezra5:9 Kwena twalipwishe abakalamba no kubeba ukuti, ‘Nani amupeele insambu shakukuula nakabili ino ŋanda no kupwishishisha ici cikulwa?’" 
Ezra5:10 Twalibepwishe na mashina pakuti tulembe amashina ya bantu abalebatungulula no kukwishibisha. 
Ezra5:11 Lelo batwaswike abati, ‘Tuli babomfi bakwa Lesa wa ku mulu na pesonde line. Tulekuula cipya cipya ino iŋanda iyo imfumu nkalamba iya bena Israeli yakuulile no kupwisha kalefye." 
Ezra5:12 Nomba pa mulandu wakuti abafyashi besu balikalifya Lesa wa ku mulu umutima, ecalengele nao abapeele mu minwe yakwa Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni umwina Kaludea. Ewaonawile ino ŋanda no kusenda abantu mu busha ku Babiloni." 
Ezra5:13 Kwena mu mwaka wakubalilapo uwakwa Sairasi mfumu ya ku Babiloni, imfumu Sairasi apeele icebo icakukuula cipya cipya ino iŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
Ezra5:14 Elyo afumishe ne fipe ifya golide na silifa ifyali mwi sano lya ku Babiloni, ifya ŋanda yakwa Lesa fintu Nebukadinesa afumishe mwi Tempele lya ku Yerusalemu, ifi e fipe imfumu Sairasi apeele umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Sheshibasa, uo asontele ukuba umulashi wa citungu." 
Ezra5:15 Amwebele ukuti, “Senda ifi fintu uye fibika mwi Tempele lya ku Yerusalemu elyo lekeni ne ŋanda yakwa Lesa ikuulwe cipya cipya pa ncende yabelelepo.”" 
Ezra5:16 Kanshi uyu Sheshibasa epakwisa imba umufula wa ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Yerusalemu. Ukufuma ilya ine nshita mpaka na nomba iyi ŋanda icili ilekuulwa lelo tailati ipwe.’ 
Ezra5:17 Nga cakuti casansamusha imfumu, nabafwailishe mu fishilano fya mfumu ifyaba ku Babiloni, bamone nga cakuti ni Sairasi imfumu ewafumishe ici cebo cakukuula cipya cipya iŋanda yakwa Lesa ku Yerusalemu. Elyo mutwebe nefyo imfumu ilepingula pali uyu mulandu.”" 
Ezra6:1 Elyo imfumu Dariusi apeele icipope icakufwaya fwaya ifitabo umwalembwa imilandu ifyo basungile mu ŋanda ya fishilano ku Babiloni. 
Ezra6:2 Kanshi basangile icitabo icipombwa mu musumba wa Ekabatana uwali mu citungu ca Media, ne fyalembelwepo nifi." 
Ezra6:3 “Amashiwi yakwibukisha: Mu mwaka wakubalilapo uwa bufumu bwakwe, Sairasi imfumu apeele icipope palwa ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Yerusalemu ukuti, ‘Lekeni iyi ŋanda ikuulwe cipya cipya palya pene pa ncende yali kale, ibe kabili iyakulekelamo amalambo yakoca no kutuulapo imituulo. Mu butali bwakuya pamulu ifwile yaba amakubiti amakumi mutanda (60) mukabafu namo amakubiti amakumi mutanda (60)." 
Ezra6:4 Bakabike ne mitika itatu iya mabwe ayakalamba no mutika wa mbao umo pamulu. Elyo indalama balingile ukubomfya mu mulimo uyu shifwile ukufuma ku cipao ca mfumu. 
Ezra6:5 Kanshi ne fipe fya golide na silifa ifya ŋanda yakwa Lesa ifyo Nebukadinesa afumishe mwi Tempele lya ku Yerusalemu, no kutwala ku Babiloni, fifwile fyabwelela pa ncende yafiko mwi Tempele lya ku Yerusalemu. Fifwile fyabikwa mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa.’" 
Ezra6:6 “Kanshi nomba, iwe Tatenai, umulashi wa citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana, na Sheta Bosenai na banenu bonse abalashi ba mu fitungu fya kwishilya lya mumana, talukeni kuli iyi ŋanda." 
Ezra6:7 Mwiibikamo mu mulimo wakukuulila Lesa iŋanda. Mulekele umulashi wa Bayuda na bakalamba ba Bayuda ebo bakuule cipya cipya iyi ŋanda yakwa Lesa palya pene pa ncende yabelelepo. 
Ezra6:8 Kabili namupeela icipope pafyo mufwile ukucita ku bakalamba ba Bayuda abalekuula cipya cipya iŋanda yakwa Lesa. Indalama shonse muli nokupeela aba bantu abalekuula, mufumye ku cipao ca misonko ilya ifuma ku citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana pakuti umulimo uyu upwe ukwabula ukuposa inshita." 
Ezra6:9 Na fyonse ifyo balekabila ifili nga ifiponti fya ŋombe, basukusuku no twana twa mpaanga ifyakocela Lesa wa ku mulu ilambo, ne ŋanu, umucele, umwangashi na mafuta ukulingana nefyo bashimapepo ba mu Yerusalemu babomfya, bafwile ukupeelwa cila bushiku ukwabula ukufilwa." 
Ezra6:10 Ifi ni pakutila balelekela Lesa wa ku mulu ilambo ilyakumusekesha. Elyo balepepelako ne mfumu pamo na bana baiko. 
Ezra6:11 Kabili napeela icipope ukuti umuntu onse uwakaana ukukonka ici cebo, bafwile basomona umwalo wa ku ŋanda yakwe bakamwimye elyo no ukumusomekako. Pa mulandu wine uyu, iŋanda yakwe ifwile ukubongololwa no kushala umwina wa citantala." 
Ezra6:12 Lesa uwalenga ishina lyakwe likale kulya kwine engafumya pa cifulo imfumu no muntu onse uukafwaya ukupilibula ici nangu ukonaula iyi ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Yerusalemu. Ine ne Dariusi napeela icipope ici, kabili mucikonke bwino bwino.”" 
Ezra6:13 Elyo Tatenai umulashi wa citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana, na Sheta Bosenai na babomfi banabo bakonka icipope ca mfumu Dariusi bwino bwino kabili mukwangufyanya, ukulingana nefyo imfumu Dariusi yabebele." 
Ezra6:14 Kanshi abakalamba ba Bayuda bakonkanyapo ukukuula bwino bwino ukupitila mufyo kasesema Hagai na Sakaria umwana mwaume wakwa Ido baseseme. Bapwisha ukukuula ukulingana nefyo Lesa wa bena Israeli abakonkomeshe, no kulingana ne cipope cakwa Sairasi, Dariusi na Atakisesi imfumu sha bena Pesia." 
Ezra6:15 Iyi ŋanda yapwile pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu mu mweshi wa Adari mu mwaka walenga mutanda uwa buteko bwakwa Dariusi. 
Ezra6:16 Elyo kabili abena Israeli, bashimapepo, abena Levi na bonse ababwelele ukufuma muli bunkole, basefya inshikunkulu yakutuula iyi ŋanda yakwa Lesa ne nsansa." 
Ezra6:17 Pakutuula iyi ŋanda kuli Lesa, bapeela ŋombe ishilume umwanda umo (100), basukusuku imyanda ibili (200), utwana twa mpaanga utulume imyanda ine (400). Umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi bwa bena Israeli bonse wali basawe ikumi limo na babili (12) ukulingana ne mpendwa ya nko sha bena Israeli." 
Ezra6:18 Elyo basonta bashimapepo ukulingana na mabumba yabo. Abena Levi nabo ukulingana nefyo batantama mukutumika Lesa mu Yerusalemu, ngefyo calembwa mu citabo cakwa Mose." 
Ezra6:19 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na bune (14) ubwa mu mweshi wapakubala, abafumine muli bunkole ku Babiloni basefya Ipasaka inshikunkulu ya Cakucilila." 
Ezra6:20 Bashimapepo bonse na bena Levi bonse baisangulula no kubafye abakaele bonse. Baipaya abana ba mpaanga be lambo lye Pasaka ilyakupapatilako abantu bonse ababwelele ukufuma muli bunkole, no kupapatilako bashimapepo banabo pamo pene na bene." 
Ezra6:21 Abena Israeli bonse abafumine muli bunkole balile umwana wa mpaanga pamo pene na bantufye bonse abaipatwile kukukanakonka intambi ishikowesha isha bantu ba mu calo pakuti bambe ukupepa Yawe Lesa wa bena Israeli. 
Ezra6:22 Basefeshe ne nsansa inshikunkulu ya Mukate uushatutumuka pa nshiku cine lubali, pantu Yawe alibasansamwishe no kulenga ukuti umutima wa mfumu ya ku Asiria upilibuke pakuti ibafweko mu mulimo wakukuula iŋanda yakwa Lesa, Lesa wa bena Israeli." 
Ezra7:1 Panuma ya ifi fyonse, mu buteeko bwakwa Atakisesi imfumu ya ku Pesia, kwaishile umuntu umo Esra mwana Seraya, mwana Asariya, mwana Hilikiya," 
Ezra7:2 mwana Shalumu, mwana Sadoki, mwana Aitubu" 
Ezra7:3 mwana Amariya, mwana Asariya, mwana Meraiyoti," 
Ezra7:4 mwana Serahiya, mwana Usi, mwana Buki," 
Ezra7:5 mwana Abishua, mwana Fineasi, mwana Eleasa, mwana Aroni shimapepo mukalamba." 
Ezra7:6 Uyu Esra aishile ukufuma ku Babiloni. Ali kalemba uwacenjela nganshi mu mafunde yakwa Mose ayo Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli abapeele. Elyo imfumu yalimupeele fyonse ifyo alombele pantu ukuboko kwakwa Yawe Lesa wakwe kwali pali ena. 
Ezra7:7 Kanshi abena Israeli bamo na bashimapepo bamo, abena Levi, bakemba, bakalinda ba mpongolo na babomfi ba mwi Tempele, baima ukuya ku Yerusalemu mu mwaka walenga cine lubali uwa buteko bwa mfumu Atakisesi." 
Ezra7:8 Esra afikile mu Yerusalemu mu mweshi walenga busano mu mwaka walenga cine lubali uwakuteeka pa bufumu. 
Ezra7:9 Atampile ubulendo bwakwe ubwakufuma ku Babiloni pa bushiku bwa kutampa kwa mweshi wakubalilapo. Elyo afika ku Yerusalemu pa bushiku bwa kutampa kwa mweshi uwalenga busano, pantu uluse lwakwa Lesa lwali pali ena." 
Ezra7:10 Pantu Esra abikile umutima wakwe pakusambilila amafunde yakwa Yawe, ukulayakonka elyo no kufunda aya yene amafunde ne fipope ku bena Israeli." 
Ezra7:11 Ifi efyali kalata imfumu Atakisesi apeele kuli Esra shimapepo, uwali ni kalemba kabili umuntu uwasambilila nganshi mu mafunde yakwa Yawe elyo na mu fipope fyonse ifyo apeele abena Israeli." 
Ezra7:12 “Atakisesi, imfumu ya shamfumu, kuli Esra shimapepo, kalemba wa mafunde yakwa Lesa wa mumulu, umutende ube nobe." 
Ezra7:13 Ine nomba napeela icipope icakuti umuntu onse umwina Israeli pamo pene na bashimapepo benu na bena Levi ababa mu calo candi ukuti abo abalefwaya ukuya ku Yerusalemu, kuti baya nobe." 
Ezra7:14 Pantu nautumwa ku mfumu pamo na bacilolo baiko cine lubali mukwipusha palwa Yuda na Yerusalemu ukulingana na mafunde yakwa Lesa wenu ayaba mu minwe yobe. 
Ezra7:15 Elyo uli nokutwala silifa na golide, uo imfumu na bacilolo bakwe batuulafye mukuitemenwa kuli Lesa wa bena Israeli uo icifulo cakwe caba mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:16 Ukasende na silifa na golide mukufumya ku citungu ca ku Babiloni, pamo ne fyabupe abantu na bashimapepo batuula Lesa kukuitemenwafye pa mulandu wa fya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wabo iyaba mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:17 Ukabomfye bwino bwino indalama ishi, mukushitamo iŋombe ishilume, basukusuku na bana ba mpaanga, pamo no mutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa. Ifi efyo ukatuule pa bulambo bwa mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wenu iyaba mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:18 “Elyo silifa na golide ifikashalapo kuti wabomfya mu musango iwe na Bayuda banobe mukamona ukuti naulingana no bufwayo bwakwa Lesa wenu. 
Ezra7:19 Elyo ifipe fyonse filya wapeelwa ukulabomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa, ufitwale fyonse kulya kwine kuli Lesa wa ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:20 Nga kulekabilwa na fimbi ifyakubomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa obe kuti washita. Ukabomfye indalama sha mu cipao ca kwisano. 
Ezra7:21 “Ine ne mfumu Atakisesi napeela icipope kuli bakasunga ba cipao aba kwishilya lya mumana icakuti, ‘Mupekanye bwino no kupeela Esra, shimapepo na kalemba wa mafunde yakwa Lesa wa mu mulu, fyonse ifyo alemulomba." 
Ezra7:22 Alingile ukupeelwa ukulingana ne cipimo ca makilo amakana yatatu ne myanda ine (3,400 kg) aya silifa, amakilo amakana ikumi limo (10,000 kg) aya ŋanu, balita wa mwangashi amakana yabili ne myanda ibili (2,200), balita wa mafuta ya miolifa amakana yabili ne myanda ibili (2,200) no mucele ukulingana ne cipimo akafwaya." 
Ezra7:23 Fyonse ifyo Lesa wa mumulu apingula palwa ŋanda yakwa Lesa wa mumulu mulemona ukuti nafikonkwa bwino bwino pakuti ubukali bwakwe bwikaponena pa mfumu na bana bakwe. 
Ezra7:24 Kabili mufwile ukwishiba ukuti tamwakwata amaka yakupatikisha bashimapepo bonse, abena Levi, bakemba, bakasunga wa mpongolo, ababomfi ba kwi Tempele nangu umubomfi onse uwa mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa ukupeela imitulo ku mulashi nangu ukusonka imisonko ya pa misebo nangu iya pa fipe.’" 
Ezra7:25 “Na iwe Esra ukulingana na mano yakwa Lesa obe ayo akupeela, ukasale bakalubulwisha na bakaputula wa milandu pakuti balepingula abantu ba kwishilya lya mumana no mulinganya. Ukasale pa baishiba amafunde yakwa Lesa, elyo abashaishiba bena ukabafunde." 
Ezra7:26 Uyo onse ukakaana ukukonka amafunde yakwa Lesa obe nangu aya mfumu, bamupingule ukwipaiwa, nangufye ukumutamfya mu calo, ukumupoka ifipe nangufye ukumukaka mu cifungo.”" 
Ezra7:27 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa wa fikolwe fyesu, uunashishe umutima wa mfumu Atakisesi pakuti apeele umucinshi ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe mu Yerusalemu mu musango uyu." 
Ezra7:28 Na ine, Lesa nananga icikuku no luse pa cinso ca mfumu na bampandamano wakwe elyo na bacilolo ba mfumu ababulamba. Kanshi ndi uwakosa pantu ukuboko kwakwa Yawe Lesa wandi kuli pali ine. Ninonganika intungulushi ukufuma mu bena Israeli abakunshindika." 
Ezra8:1 Aba e bakalamba ba ndupwa abo twafumine nabo ku Babiloni ilyo imfumu Atakisesi aleteeka cilya calo, umo bakonkanine ngefi:" 
Ezra8:2 Ku bana bakwa Fineasi, Geshoni. Ku bana bakwa Itama, Daniele. Ku bana bakwa Davidi, Hatushi." 
Ezra8:2 Ku bana bakwa Fineasi, Geshoni. Ku bana bakwa Itama, Daniele. Ku bana bakwa Davidi, Hatushi." 
Ezra8:3 Ku bana bakwa Shekaniya. Ku bana bakwa Paroshi, Sakaria uo balembele pamo na baume umwanda umo na makumi yasano (150)" 
Ezra8:4 Ku bana bakwa Pahati Moabu, Eliehoenai umwana wakwa Serahia pamo na baume imyanda ibili (200)." 
Ezra8:5 Ku bana bakwa Satu, Shekaniya umwana wakwa Yahasieli pamo na baume imyanda itatu (300)." 
Ezra8:6 Ku bana bakwa Adini, Ebedi umwana wakwa Yonatani pamo na baume amakumi yasano (50)." 
Ezra8:7 Ku bana bakwa Elamu, Yeshaya umwana wakwa Ataliya pamo na baume amakumi cine lubali (70)." 
Ezra8:8 Ku bana bakwa Shefatiya, Sebadiya mwana Mikaeli pamo na baume amakumi cine konse konse (80)." 
Ezra8:9 Ku bana bakwa Yoabu, Obadiya umwana wakwa Yehieli pamo na baume imyanda ibili ne kumi limo na cine konse konse (218)." 
Ezra8:10 Ku bana bakwa Bani, Shelomiti umwana wakwa Yosifia pamo na baume umwanda umo na makumi mutanda (160)." 
Ezra8:11 Ku bana bakwa Bebai, Sakaria umwana wakwa Bebai pamo na baume amakumi yabili na cine konse konse (28)." 
Ezra8:12 Ku bana bakwa Asigadi, Yohanani umwana wakwa Hakatani pamo na baume umwanda umo ne kumi limo (110)." 
Ezra8:13 Ku bana bakwa Adonikamu, abakulekelesha, amashina yabo ni aya. Elifeleti, Yeuli na Shemaiya na baume amakumi mutanda (60)." 
Ezra8:14 Ku bana bakwa Bigifai, Utai na Saku pamo na baume amakumi cine lubali (70)." 
Ezra8:15 Ine ne Esra nalongenye ibumba lyonse ilya bantu mupepi no mumana utwala amenshi ku Ahafa uko twaikele inshiku shitatu. Ilyo nalolekeshe, namwene ukuti mwibumba mwali bashimapepo nomba tamwali aba mu lupwa lwa bena Levi." 
Ezra8:16 Kanshi epakwita intungulushi, Eliese, Arieli, Shemaiya, Elinatani, Yaribu, Elinatani, Natani, Sakaria na Meshulamu, elyo na Yoaribu na Elinatani abantu abamano." 
Ezra8:17 Nabatuma kuli Ido uwali intungulushi ya ku ncende ya Kasifiya. Nabeba ne fyakuya sosa kuli Ido na bandume nankwe, ababomfi be Tempele aba ku ncende ya Kasifiya ukuti batutumineko abantu bakwisa bomba mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu." 
Ezra8:18 Ku luse lwakwa Lesa ulu atukwatila, batupeele umuntu uwamano nganshi umwana wakwa Maili, mwana Levi, umwishikulu wakwa Israeli, ishina lyakwe ni Sherebiya, na bamwane na ndume nankwe bonse pamo bali ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18)." 
Ezra8:19 Batumine na Hashabiya na Yeshaya bamwana Merari na bandume nankwe na bana babo, abaume abali amakumi yabili (20)." 
Ezra8:20 Baishile na babomfi be Tempele imyanda ibili na makumi yabili (220) abo Davidi na bacilolo bakwe basontele ukwafwako abena Levi. Aba bonse balibalembele na mashina. 
Ezra8:21 Kulya kwine ku mumana wa Ahafa ine ne Esra napeela icebo icakufunga icakulya pakuicefya kuli Lesa wesu na pakuilombela ifwe fwe bene, abana besu pamo ne fyuma fyesu pakuti tukwate ubulendo ubusuma." 
Ezra8:22 Ala nali ne nsoni shakulomba ku mfumu ibumba lya bashilika ne fita fya pali bakabalwe abakutupokololako ku balwani pa lwendo lwesu, pantu twalyebele imfumu ukuti, “Ukuboko kwakwa Lesa wesu kulapaala bonse abamufwaya, lelo amaka ya cipyu cakwe yaponena pa bamusangukila.”" 
Ezra8:23 Kanshi twalifungile no kulomba Lesa pali uyu mulandu. Lesa nao alyumfwile ipepo lyesu. 
Ezra8:24 Elyo nasala intungulushi sha bashimapepo ikumi limo na babili (12), Sherebiya, Hashabiya, na bamunyinabo abaume ikumi limo." 
Ezra8:25 Nabapimine silifa na golide ne fyakubomfya no mutuulo ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu uo imfumu, bacilolo bakwe, ababomfi bakwe abakalamba, na bena Israeli bonse abalipo batuulile." 
Ezra8:26 Elyo napima silifa no kubapeela amatalanta imyanda mutanda na makumi yasano (650), ne fipe ifya silifa ifyalingana na matalanta umwanda umo (100), elyo golide nao amatalanta umwanda umo (100)," 
Ezra8:27 imbale nasho isha golide amakumi yabili (20) ifyafinine ukulingana ne ndalama dariki isha golide ikana limo (1,000), ne fipe fibili ifikankala ifya mukuba ifyo bashingako ifyalemoneka kwati ni golide." 
Ezra8:28 Elyo nabeba ukuti, “Muli bamushilo kuli Yawe ne fipe fine fili ifyamushilo. Uyu silifa na golide wine twatuula mukuitemenwa kuli Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu." 
Ezra8:29 Nomba fisungeni bwino bwino mpakafye mukafipimine pa menso ya bashimapepo bacindami, abena Levi na bakalamba ba ndupwa sha bena Israeli ku Yerusalemu mu miputule ya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe.”" 
Ezra8:30 Kanshi bashimapepo na bena Levi epakubuula silifa, golide, ne fipe fyamushilo bafipima pakuti bakafitwale ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezra8:31 Kanshi pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shibili (12) ubwa mu mweshi wakubalilapo, twafuma ku mumana wa Ahafa no kuya ku Yerusalemu. Lesa ali na ifwe, alitupuswishe ku balwani na ku fipondo pakutila fitwimina lintu tuli mu nshila." 
Ezra8:32 Twafikile ku Yerusalemu, eko twatuushishe pa nshiku shitatu." 
Ezra8:33 Pa bushiku bwalenga shine, mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu mwine emo twapima silifa, golide ne fipe fyamushilo. Bafipima no kufipeela kuli shimapepo Meremoti mwana Uria, ninshi bali na Eleasa mwana Fineasi, kabili na bamwana Levi, Yosabada mwana Yeshua na Noadia mwana Binui." 
Ezra8:34 Fyonse balifipendele no kupima ifyo fyafinine, no kulemba fyonse." 
Ezra8:35 Pali iyi nshita bonse ababwelele mu busha ku Babiloni, batuula Lesa wa bena Israeli ilambo lyakoca. Batuula iŋombe ishilume ikumi limo na shibili (12) ukulingana ne mitundu ya bena Israeli, elyo na basukusuku amakumi pabula na mutanda (96), abana ba mpaanga nabo amakumi cine lubali na cine lubali (77), no mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi basawe ikumi limo na babili (12). Ifi fyonse fyali lilambo lyakoca kuli Lesa." 
Ezra8:36 Kabili batuma ifyebo fya mfumu kuli bacilolo wa mfumu na ku balashi ba ku citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana, nabo epakwafwilisha abantu ne ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
Ezra9:1 Panuma ya ifi fyonse intungulushi shaisa kuli ine no kunjeba ashiti, “Abena Israeli pamo na bashimapepo na bena Levi tabaipatula ukufuma ku bekalacalo ne fyamusebanya fyabo, ukufuma ku bena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Perisi, abena Yebusi, abena Amoni, abena Moabu, abena Egupto elyo na bena Amoli." 
Ezra9:2 Pantu balyupile abana babo no kubofya ku bana babo. Kanshi umushobo uwasangululwa bausankanya no wa bekalacalo. Muli ubu butalami, bacilolo ne ntungulushi ebacililemo.”" 
Ezra9:3 Ilyo naumfwile ifi nalepaula ifyakufwala fyandi, umwingila ne laya ilitali ilyapikulwa ubusaka, nanukulako umushishi ne myefu, naikala bulanda bulanda." 
Ezra9:4 Elyo bonse abali na katiina ku mashiwi yakwa Lesa wa bena Israeli, pa mulandu wa butalami bwa bantu ababwelele ukufuma ku busha, baisa nshinguluka ninshi ninjikala mu bulanda mpakafye inshita ye lambo lya cungulo." 
Ezra9:5 Kanshi pa nshita ye lambo lya cungulo naima ukufuma mukufunga ukulya ne fyakufwala fyandi ifyalepauka, nafukama, natambika na maboko yandi kuli Yawe Lesa wandi," 
Ezra9:6 no kutila, “We Lesa wandi ndi ne nsoni, shili na pa menso yandi icakuti nimfilwa ukwinuna icinso kuli iwe we Lesa wandi, pa mulandu wakuti ububifi bwesu nabufika apatali ukucila imitwe yesu. Elyo ububi bwesu nabo nabukula ukufikafye na mu mulu." 
Ezra9:7 Ukufumafye ku nshita ya fikolwe fyesu ukushinta na pa bushiku bwa lelo, twaba mu bubifi ubukalamba. Kabili pa mulandu wa bubifi bwesu, ifwe pamo ne mfumu shesu na bashimapepo besu twalipeelwa ku minwe ya mfumu sha calo, ku lupanga, mu busha, ku bonaushi na ku nsoni ngefi fine cili lelo." 
Ezra9:8 “Lelo nomba pa kashita akanono, Yawe Lesa wesu nalanga uluse lwakwe pakutushilako abantu bamo, no kutupeelako incende iyamutende mu cifulo cakwe icamushilo, kabili nabutusha pa finso fyesu no kulenga tupuputulwe nelyo tucili mu busha panono." 
Ezra9:9 Pantu twali abasha, nomba Lesa tatulekelesha mu busha bwesu. Atulanga icitemwiko icakubelelela pa cinso ca mfumu sha ku Pesia, atupeela ubumi ubupya pakuti tukuule iŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu, no kuwamya ifyaonaike, no kutupeela ilinga lyakutucingilila mu Yudeya na ku Yerusalemu." 
Ezra9:10 “Nomba we Lesa wesu, cinshi twingalanda pali ici? Pantu natusuula amafunde yobe," 
Ezra9:11 ayo watupeele ukupitila mu babomfi bobe bakasesema ifyakutila, ‘Icalo muleingilamo no kucipoka calikowela ku fyabunani fya bantu bekalamo, ne misango iyamuselu yaisula muli ici calo ukufuma ku mpela ukushinta na ku mpela." 
Ezra9:12 Kanshi wileka abana bobe bopwe ku bana babo, nangu abana babo bopwe ku bana benu. Tecakwesha kupangana bucibusa na bantu aba pa nshita iyili yonse, epakuti mukabe na maka, no kulya ifilyo ifisuma ifya mu calo, nokucishiila abana benu pakuti bakacipyaninine umuyayaya.’" 
Ezra9:13 Kanshi fyonse ifyatuponene fyatucitikile pa mulandu wa ficitwa fyesu ifibi no bubifi bwesu ubukalamba, lelo twamona ukuti iwe we Lesa wesu tawatukandile ukufikapo ukulingana no bubi bwesu, walengele ukuti fwe bamo tushalepo ngefi fine." 
Ezra9:14 Nomba, bushe kuti twaonaula amafunde yobe nakabili pa mulandu wakuupana na bantu abacita ifyabipisha ifi? Bushe teti utufulilwe mpakafye no kutulofya ukwabula ukushalapo nangu umo uwakupusuka?" 
Ezra9:15 We Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli uli mololoke pantu ifwe fwe balashi natupusuka ngefi tuli lelo. Kanshi mona, ifwe tuli pa cinso cobe no kubifya kwesu, eco tapali nangu umo uwingapama ukwiminina pa cinso cobe.”" 
Ezra10:1 Ilyo Esra alepepa, no kulomba ubwelelo pa fyabubifi bacitile, ninshi no kulila alelila kabili alala na panshi pantanshi ya ŋanda yakwa Lesa, ibumba ilikalamba ilya baume, abanakashi na baice aba mu Israeli bamushinguluka. Abantu nabo balila nganshi." 
Ezra10:2 Elyo Shekaniya umwana wakwa Yehieli, uwali umo pa bana bakwa Elamu, aeba Esra ati, “Twalyonaula icisumino muli Lesa wesu pakuupa abanakashi abeni abekalacalo. Nomba kuli isubilo ku bena Israeli nangu cibe ifi." 
Ezra10:3 Kanshi nomba natupange icipangano na Lesa wesu pakutamfya bonse aba bakashi besu na bana babo ukulingana nefyo imfumu yandi na bantu abatiina ifyebo fyakwa Lesa batusokeleko. Natucite ifi ukulingana na Mafunde. 
Ezra10:4 Ima kanshi pantu mulimo obe, na ifwe twakulakwafwako. Shipa, no kubomba ubombe.”" 
Ezra10:5 Elyo Esra aima, aeba ne ntungulushi sha bashimapepo na bena Levi na bena Israeli bonse ukulapa umulapo ukuti bakacitila ngomo mwine balandile. Kanshi balilapile." 
Ezra10:6 Elyo Esra afuma pantanshi ya ŋanda yakwa Lesa no kuya ku muputule wakwa Yehoanani mwana Eliashibu, eko asendeme bulya bushiku. Talile nangu cimo nangufye ukunwa amenshi pantu aleloosha pa mulandu wa busangu bwa bantu ababwelele mu busha." 
Ezra10:7 Kanshi bauma imbila mu calo conse ca bena Yuda na Yerusalemu ukuti bonse ababwelele mu busha balongane ku Yerusalemu. 
Ezra10:8 No muntu onse ushakese mu nshiku shitatu, ukulingana nefyo intungulushi na bakalamba bapingwile, kumupoka ifyuma fyakwe fyonse, elyo no kumufumya mu lukuta lwa babwelele mu busha." 
Ezra10:9 Kanshi bonse abantu, abena Yuda na Benjamini, balongana ku Yerusalemu mu nshiku shitatu. Cali mu mweshi walenga pabula, pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili (20) ubwa muli uyu wine mweshi. Elyo abantu bonse baikala mu lubansa pa ntanshi ya ŋanda yakwa Lesa, baletutuma pa mulandu wa fyacitike elyo ne mfula iyaliko." 
Ezra10:10 Shimapepo Esra aima abeba ati, “Mwalipondweke, mwaupa na banakashi abenafyalo, kanshi mwalunda pa milandu ya bena Israeli." 
Ezra10:11 Kanshi nomba lapeni kuli Yawe, Lesa wa fikolwe fyenu, no kucita ubufwayo bwakwe. Mupatukeko ukufuma ku bantu abenafyalo no kulekana na bakashi benu abenafyalo.”" 
Ezra10:12 Elyo ulukuta lonse ulwalongene lwayasuka ne shiwi ilikalamba aluti, “Nacibe ifyo fine, tuli nokucita ifyo usosele." 
Ezra10:13 Nomba abantu nabafula elyo na mainsa nayakosa nganshi, teti twiminine panse. Kabili umulimo uyu te wa bushiku bumo atemwa shibili pantu twalilufyanya apakalamba nganshi mu mulandu uyu." 
Ezra10:14 Lekeni intungulushi shesu shiminineko ulukuta. Lekeni mu misumba yesu yonse abaupa abanakashi abenafyalo bakese pa nshita yapimwa. Bakese na bakalamba na bapingushi aba cila musumba mpaka ubukali ubwakwa Lesa pali uyu mulandu bukafume apo tuli.” 
Ezra10:15 Kwalifye Yonatani mwana Asaeli na Yaseya mwana Tikifa ebakeene uyu mulandu, elyo Meshulamu na Shabetai umwina Levi babatungilila." 
Ezra10:16 Elyo abafumine mu busha bacita ifyo fine. Esra shimapepo asala abaume abakalamba ba ndupwa ukulingana ne ndupwa shabo, cila lupwa mwishina lyabo. Pa bushiku bwakutampa ubwa mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo, bonse baikala panshi pakulolekesha pali uyu mulandu." 
Ezra10:17 Elyo ubushiku bwakutampa kwa mweshi wakubalilapo ninshi tabulati bupite bapwisha ukulanda na baume abaupile abanakashi abenafyalo. 
Ezra10:18 Kanshi pasangilwe abana ba bashimapepo bamo abaupile abanakashi abenafyalo, Maaseya, Eliese, Yaribu na Gedalia. Aba ni bamo pa bana bakwa Yeshua umwana wakwa Yosadaki na bandume nankwe." 
Ezra10:19 Balaya no kuleka abakashi babo no kuleka ilambo lyakufutila pa filubo fyabo, sukusuku ukufuma pa nama batekele." 
Ezra10:20 Pa bana bakwa Imeri, ni Hanani na Sebadiya." 
Ezra10:21 Pa bana bakwa Harimu, ni Maaseya, Eliya, Shemai, Yehieli na Usia." 
Ezra10:22 Pa bana bakwa Pashuri, ni Elionai, Maaseya, Ishimaeli, Netaneli, Yosabadi na Elasa" 
Ezra10:23 Pa bana ba bena Levi, ni Yosabadi, Shimei, Kelaya (emukutila Kelita), Petaiya, Yuda na Eliese." 
Ezra10:24 Pali bakemba, ni Eliashibu. Pali bakalinda wa mpongolo, ni Shalumu, Telemu na Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Pa bena Israeli na bambi, ni aba. Pali bamwana Paroshi, ni Ramiya, Isiya, Malikiya, Miyamini, Eleasa Hashabiya na Benaya." 
Ezra10:26 Pa bana bakwa Elamu, ni Matania, Sakaria, Yehieli, Abudi, Yeremoti na Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Pa bana bakwa Satu, ni Elionai, Eliashibu, Matania, Yeremoti, Sabadi na Asisa." 
Ezra10:28 Pa bana bakwa Bebai, ni Yehoanani, Hanania, Sabai na Atilai." 
Ezra10:29 Pa bana bakwa Bani, ni Meshulamu, Maluku, Adaia, Yashubu, Sheali na Yeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Pa bana bakwa Pahati Moabu, ni Adena, Kela, Benaya, Maaseya, Matania, Besaleli, Binui na Manase." 
Ezra10:31 Elyo pali bamwana Harimu, ni Eliese, Ishiya, Malikiya, Shemaiya, Shimeoni," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamini, Maluku na Shemariya." 
Ezra10:33 Pa bana bakwa Hashumu, ni Matenai, Matata, Sabadi, Elifeleti, Yeremai, Manase na Shimei." 
Ezra10:34 Pa bana bakwa Bani, ni Maadai, Amuramu, Ueli," 
Ezra10:35 Benaya, Bedeiya, Kelui," 
Ezra10:36 Faniya, Meremoti, Eliashibu," 
Ezra10:37 Matania, Matenai, na Yasu," 
Ezra10:38 Pa bana bakwa Binui, ni Bani, Shimei," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemiya, Natani, Adaia," 
Ezra10:40 Makinadebai, Shashai, Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 Asareli, Shelemiya, Shemariya," 
Ezra10:42 Shalumu, Amaria, na Yosefu." 
Ezra10:43 Pa bana bakwa Nebo, ni Yeli, Matitiya, Sabadi, Sebina, Yadai, Yoeli na Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Aba bonse ebaupile abanakashi abenafyalo, kabili balibatamfishe pamo na bana babo." 
Nehemiah1:1 Aya e mashiwi yakwa Nehemia, mwana Hakaliya. Nomba cali mu mwaka uwalenga amakumi yabili (20) uwa mfumu Atakisesi, mu mweshi wa Kisilefu, ilyo nali mu musumba wa Susa." 
Nehemiah1:2 Hanani umo uwa muli bamunyinane, alishile ukufuma ku calo ca Yuda, bali na bantu bamo. Elyo nabepwishe pa mulandu wa Bayuda abashele no kupusuka kuli bunkole, kabili na pa musumba wa Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Elyo nabo balyaswike no kutila, “Abalubwike muli bunkole, abashele muli ici calo, bali no bulanda ubukalamba no kwikatwa insoni nganshi. Icibumba ca Yerusalemu naco cine calibongoloka no kuponena panshi. Kabili ne mpongolo nasho, shalipya.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Ilyo naumfwile aya mashiwi, awe naikala na panshi no kulilafye. Nalooseshe nganshi pa nshiku ishingi. Nafungile ukulya, no kupepa kuli Lesa wa mu mulu." 
Nehemiah1:5 Elyo nasosele nati, “Ndepepa kuli iwe we Yawe Lesa uwa ku mulu, we Lesa mukulu kabili uwakutiina, we ufikilisha icipangano cobe ne citemwiko icishipwa kuli bonse abakutemwa kabili abasunga na mafunde yobe." 
Nehemiah1:6 Shi wingateya ukutwi kobe no kwisula amenso yobe pakuti umfwe ipepo lyandi ne mubomfi obe. Ine, akasuba no bushiku, ndepapatila ababomfi bobe abena Israeli. Ndeyebelela pa fyabubifi fyonse ifyo ifwe fwe bena Israeli twabifya kuli iwe, ifyo na ine wine pamo na ba mu ŋanda yandi twabifyako." 
Nehemiah1:7 Twabombele ifintu mu bunasha bwalufyengo kuli iwe. Tatwakonkele nangufye panono amalango ne fipope nangu amafunde ifyo wapeele ku mubomfi obe Mose. 
Nehemiah1:8 “Nomba ibukisha amashiwi ayo waebele umubomfi obe Mose, ayakuti, ‘Nga cakuti mwansangukila, ndi nokumusalanganishisha mu mishobo ya benafyalo." 
Nehemiah1:9 Lelo nga cakuti mwabwelulukila kuli ine, no kubeela amafunde yandi, elyo nangufye cingaba cakuti abantu benu ababa muli bunkole baba ukutali, ine ndi nokubalonganika no kubafumya kulya no kubaleta ku cifulo icasalwa ukwikalamo ishina lyandi.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 “Nomba aba e babomfi bobe, kabili abantu bobe abo wapususha na maka yobefye ayakosesha na ku kuboko kobe ukwamaka." 
Nehemiah1:11 We Mfumu yandi, shileka ukutwi kobe kukutike kwipepo lya mubomfi obe, na ku mapepo ya babomfi bobe abatemwa ukucindika ishina lyobe. Shi napapata leka umubomfi obe abe uwashuka. Leka uyu muntu amusekelele.” Pantu ine nali katumika wa lukombo lwa mfumu." 
Nehemiah2:1 Kabili cali mu mweshi wa Nisani mu mwaka walenga amakumi yabili (20) iya bufumu bwakwa Atakisesi, ilyo bamuletele umwangashi, ine naubuula no kupeela ku mfumu. Nomba ine nshatalile moneka bulanda bulanda pa cinso caiko." 
Nehemiah2:2 Eico imfumu yatile kuli ine, “Bushe mulandu nshi impumi yobe ibelele no bulanda, ilyo taulwele? Ici tacili bulanda bwacimbi, lelo bulanda bwa ku mutima.” Kanshi elyo naiketwe no mwenso uukalamba," 
Nehemiah2:3 lelo naeba imfumu nati, “Shi imfumu naibe no bumi umuyayaya! Ngakuti nakaana shani ukuba no bulanda pa menso, apo umusumba uwabamo inshinshi sha fikolwe fyandi waba icibolya, ne mpongolo shauko shalyonaika ku mulilo.”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Imfumu yalanda kuli ine aiti, “Nga ico ulefwaya cinshi?” Elyo na ine epakukuuta kuli Lesa wa mumulu," 
Nehemiah2:5 kabili nalanda na ku mfumu nati, “Nga cakuti casekesha imfumu kabili nga cakuti umubomfi wenu asanga ukusekelelwa ku cinso cenu, shi lekenifye nje ku Yuda ku musumba wa nshinshi sha fikolwe fyandi, pakuti nkaye kuula cipya cipya.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Elyo imfumu yasosa kuli ine, ninshi na namfumu ekele ku lubali lwaiko, aiti, “Bushe ulwendo lobe lukakokola shani? Kabili bushe ukabwela lilali?” Kanshi calisekeshe imfumu ukuntuma. Elyo na ine napekenye inshita iyalinga." 
Nehemiah2:7 Elyo na ine natile ku mfumu, “Nga cakuti casekesha imfumu, kuti bampeelako amakalata natwala ku balashi ba citungu ca kwishilya lya mumana, epakuti bansuminisha ukupitamo umutende, mpaka nkafike ku Yuda." 
Nehemiah2:8 Kabili ukuti bampeelako na imbi kalata iyakutwala kuli Asafu kasunga wa mutengo wa mfumu, pakuti aya mpeelako imiti yakupangila imyalo ya pa mwinshi wa mpongolo ya kwi Tempele, iye linga lya ku musumba elyo ne ya ŋanda iyo nkekalamo.” Elyo imfumu yalimpeele ukulingana nefyo nalombele pantu ukuboko kusuma ukwakwa Lesa kwali pali ine." 
Nehemiah2:9 Elyo naile ku balashi ba mu citungu ca mwishilya lya mumana, nabapeela amakalata ya mfumu. Pa nshita yakwima imfumu yampeela abakalamba ba bashilika na bashilika ba pali bakabalwe." 
Nehemiah2:10 Ilyo Sanibalati umwina Horoni elyo na Tobia nga cilolo umwina Amoni bati bomfwe umulandu, bafulwa nganshi pakumfwa ukuti umuntu umo naisa mukwafwilisha abana bakwa Israeli." 
Nehemiah2:11 Ilyo nafikile mu Yerusalemu, naikalamo ne nshiku shitatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Elyo naima ubushiku na bamo abantu abanonofye. Nshaebeleko umuntu nelyo umo ifyo Lesa wandi abikile mu mutima wandi ifyakucitila Yerusalemu. Kabili nshakwete icitekwa cakuninapo cimbi ukucila pali kabalwe wandi uo naleninapo. 
Nehemiah2:13 Kabili mu nshita ya bushiku napitile mu Mpongolo ya ku mukonko pa mwinshi ku Cishima ca Cisoka elyo na ku Mpongolo ya Fisoso. Natandalile ifibumba fya Yerusalemu ifyawile panshi ne mpongolo shafiko ishaonawilwe ku mulilo. 
Nehemiah2:14 Elyo naile na ku Mpongolo ya Kamfukumfuku na ku Cishiba ca Mfumu. Awe nshasangile inshila iyingapitapo kabalwe nanininepo. 
Nehemiah2:15 Kanshi mu nshita ine iya bushiku naile ndeenda mu mukonko no kulengula bwino ifyo ilinga lyali. Elyo na panuma ya ifi nalibwelulwike no kwingila kabili pa Mpongolo ya ku mukonko. 
Nehemiah2:16 Kwena bacilolo nabo bene tabaishibe uko naile nangu ifyo nacitile. Pantu nshali nshilaeba Abayuda, bashimapepo, bashimucindikwa, bacilolo elyo na bambi bonse abali nokubombako uyu mulimo." 
Nehemiah2:17 Elyo natile kuli bena, “Bushe namumona ubulanda tuli nabo? Mwamona Yerusalemu ishele icibolya elyo impongolo nasho shalipya ku mulilo. Aleni natukuule ilinga lya Yerusalemu cipya cipya, pakuti twisebana nakabili.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Kabili nabebele na pa luse lwakwa Lesa wandi ulwangafwilisheko elyo na pa mashiwi ya mfumu yantu yanjebele. Elyo nabo batile, “Natwime tutendeke ukukuula.” Elyo bonse bakosha na maboko yabo kuli uyu mulimo usuma." 
Nehemiah2:19 Lelo ilyo Sanibalati umwina Horoni, Tobia umwina Amoni nga cilolo, na Geshemu Umuarabu baumfwile ici cintu, batuseka no kutusuusha nganshi nokutila, “Nga ici cintu mwacita cinshi? Bushe mulesangukila imfumu?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Elyo na ine nabaswike nati, “Lesa wa mu mulu umwine ali nokutupeela ishuko. Eico kanshi na ifwe fwe babomfi bakwe tuleima no kukuula. Lelo imwe tamuli na nsambu nangu icacishilano nangu icacibukisho mu Yerusalemu.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Elyo shimapepo mukalamba Eliashibu na bamunyina abali bashimapepo baima bakuula Impongolo ya Mpaanga, baisangulula no kubika ifiibi mu ncende fyali nokubamo. Bakuulile ilinga ukufikafye na ku Lupungu lwa mwanda umo (100), elyo balisangulula no kulisangulula. Awe bakonkenyepo ukukuula mpaka na ku Lupungu lwa Hananeli." 
Nehemiah3:2 Abapalamene nabo pakukuula bali bena Yeriko, elyo pakonka Sakuri mwana Imuri." 
Nehemiah3:3 Impongolo Yesabi yakuulilwe na bamwana Hasena. Babikile imyalo pa ncende yaiko, baikasha ifiibi mu ncende yafiko elyo babika ne fyakukakilako ne mipilikisho." 
Nehemiah3:4 Meremoti mwana Uria nao uwali mwana Hakosi awemye iciputulwa cakonkelepo. Elyo no wamukonkelepo ali ni Meshulamu mwana Berekia, nao uwali umwana mwaume wakwa Meshasabeli, nao akonkelemofye alewamya. Elyo na umbi uwamukonkelepo ali ni Sadoki mwana Baana, nao wine alewamyafye ilinga umushaweme." 
Nehemiah3:5 Iciputulwa cakonkelepo cabombelwe na baume abafumine ku Tekoa. Nomba abakalamba babo bena bakaana ukubomba no kubeela umulimo wa ntungulushi shabo. 
Nehemiah3:6 Yehoada umwana mwaume wakwa Paseya elyo na Meshulamu umwana mwaume wakwa Besodeya, ebabombele umulimo wakuwamya Impongolo ya Yeshana. Babikile imyalo pa ncende yaiko, baikasha ifiibi mu ncende yafiko elyo babika ne fyakukakilako ne mipilikisho." 
Nehemiah3:7 Elyo ababakonkelepo kukuwamya ilinga bali ni Melatiya umwina Gibeoni, Yadoni umwina Meronoti, abaume ba ku Gibeoni na ku Misipa, abantu abateekelwe no mulashi wa citungu ca mwishilya lya mumana." 
Nehemiah3:8 Elyo uwabakonkelepo ukuwamya ilinga ni Usieli umwana mwaume wakwa Harhaya umo uwa pa balefula golide, ewakuulileko nao ilinga. Uwamukonkelepo ni Hananiya uwalepanga amafuta ayanunka ubusaka. Ebakuulile Yerusalemu ukufika na pa ncende apakulishe umutika wa cibumba." 
Nehemiah3:9 Elyo nakabili uwakonkelepo kukuwamya ilinga ni Refaiya umwana mwaume wakwa Huri, uwali intungulushi ya citika wa citungu ca Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah3:10 Kabili uwabakonkelepo ni Yedaya umwana wakwa Harumafu uwawemye ilinga ilyali ku ntanshi ya ŋanda yakwe. Kabili uo bapalamene nankwe kukuwamya ilinga ni Hatushi, umwana mwaume wakwa Hashabiniya." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malikiya umwana wakwa Harimu elyo na Hashubu umwana mwaume wakwa Pahati Moabu nao awemye ulubali lunankwe, pamo pene no Lupungu lwa Malungu." 
Nehemiah3:12 Elyo kabili uwamukonkelepo ni Shalumu umwana mwaume wakwa Halohesha, intungulushi iya citika wa citungu ca Yerusalemu. Umwine pamo na bana bakwe abanakashi ebamwafwileko ukuwamya ilinga." 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuni pamo na bekashi ba mu Sanoya nabo bayafwilishe ukuwamya Impongolo ya ku mukonko. Baliikuulile elyo baikasha ifiibi mu ncende yafiko elyo babika ne fyakukakilako ne mipilikisho. Elyo bakuula ne cibumba icalepa amakubiti ikana limo (1,000), ukufika na ku Mpongolo ya Fisoso." 
Nehemiah3:14 Malichiya umwana mwaume wakwa Rekabu, intungulushi ya citungu ca Beti Hakeremu, ewawemye Impongolo ya Fisoso. Aliikuulile bwino elyo aikasha ifiibi mu ncende yafiko abika ne fyakukakilako ne mipilikisho." 
Nehemiah3:15 Shalumu umwana mwaume wakwa Koli Oose, intungulushi ya citika wa citungu ca Misipa, ewabombele mukuwamya umwinshi wa pa Mpongolo ya Kamfumfuku ka menshi. Akuula no kufimbapo, elyo aikasha ifiibi mu ncende yafiko, abika ne fyakukakilako ne mipilikisho. Kabili aliwemye no kukuula icibumba ca cishiba ca Shela icali mwibala lya mfumu, ukufikafye na ku matabo ayakutentemukapo ukufuma ku musumba wakwa Davidi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Uwamukonkele ni Nehemia umwana mwaume wakwa Asibuku, intungulushi ya citika wa citungu ca Beti Suri. Atampile ukuwamya ififulo ukufikafye na kuntanshi ya nshinshi shakwa Davidi, uko baimbile icishiba, elyo no kufika na ku Ŋanda ya Mpalume." 
Nehemiah3:17 Elyo abamukonkelepo bena Levi, ebawemye ilinga. Baletungululwa na Rehumu, umwana mwaume wakwa Bani. Elyo uwamukonkelepo ni Hashabiya, intungulushi ya citika wa citungu ca Keila. Nao awemye fyonse ukulingana ne fyaonaike mu citungu cakwe." 
Nehemiah3:18 Pali ena pakonkele ababwananyina, abatungulwilwe na Bafayi umwana mwaume wakwa Henadadi, intungulushi ya citika wa citungu ca Keila icasheleko." 
Nehemiah3:19 Pakonkele na umbi pali ena, noyu ni Eseri umwana mwaume wakwa Yeshua, intungulushi ya mu Misipa. Uyu nao ewawemye cipya cipya icipande icabela kuntanshi ya lupili lwakuya fika ku ŋanda ya fyanso ulwabela ku cifutu ce linga." 
Nehemiah3:20 Balaki umwana mwaume wakwa Sabayi mu kucenjela kwakwe nao aliwemye incende imbi iyakufuma pa cifutu ukufika ukwakwingilila mu ŋanda yakwa Eliashibu shimapepo mukalamba. 
Nehemiah3:21 Kabili uwakonkelepo ni Meremoti umwana mwaume wakwa Uriya uwali umwana mwaume wakwa Hakosi. Uyu nao ewawemye ifyaonaike ku ncende imbi ukufuma ku mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Eliashibu ukufikafye na ku mpela ya ŋanda ine iyakwa Eliashibu. 
Nehemiah3:22 Abakonkelepo ukuwamya iyi ncende ni bashimapepo, abo abafumine mu ncende iyashingulwike Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah3:23 Elyo kabili abakonkelepo ni Benjamini na Hashubu. Nabo babombele uyu mulimo wakuwamya iyi ncende apalungatene na mayanda yabo. Kabili uwakonkelepo ali Asaria umwana mwaume wakwa Maaseya, umwana mwaume wakwa Ananiya. Nao abombele umulimo wakuwamya mupepi na pa ŋanda yakwe." 
Nehemiah3:24 Kabili panuma yakwe, Benuyi umwana mwaume wakwa Henadadi nao awemye incende imbi, ukufuma ku ŋanda yakwa Asaria ukupita ku cifutu ukushinta ku cinshoko." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palali umwana mwaume wakwa Usayi, nao awemye incende iyalungatana ku cifutu no lupungu, ukufuma ku ŋanda ya mfumu iya pamulu, iyali ulubansa lwa cifungo. Elyo kabili uwakonkelepo ni Pedaiya umwana mwaume wakwa Paroshi," 
Nehemiah3:26 elyo na babomfi be Tempele abaleikala pa mulu wa lupili lwa Ofeli. Aba nabo bonse babombele umulimo wakuwamya ilinga ukufika na ku Mpongolo ya Menshi, ukulungama lwa ku kabanga elyo na lwa ku lupungu lwafuma icofi." 
Nehemiah3:27 Kabili abakonkelepo, bena Tekoa. Aba bantu nabo babombele umulimo wakuwamya ulubali lubiye, ulwakufuma ku lupungu lwafuma icofi icikalamba ukuya fikafye na kwilinga lya Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Pa mulu wa Mpongolo ya Bakabalwe, bashimapepo napo pene baliwemyepo. Cila shimapepo alewamya apalungatana ne ŋanda yakwe." 
Nehemiah3:29 Elyo panuma yabo, Sadoki umwana mwaume wakwa Imeri, ena nao awemye ilinga ukulungatana ne ŋanda yakwe. Elyo uwakonkelepo ali ni Shemaiya umwana mwaume wakwa Shekaniya kasunga wa ku Mpongolo ya ku Kabanga uko alewamya." 
Nehemiah3:30 Panuma yakwe pakonkele Hananiya umwana mwaume wakwa Shelemiya, elyo na Hanuni umwana mwaume uwalenga mutanda mu ŋanda yakwa Salafu, nabo bawemye ku lubali lumbi. Mupepi nabo pakonkele Meshulamu mwana Berekia uwawemye apalungatene ne ŋanda yakwe." 
Nehemiah3:31 Elyo no wamukonkelepo ni Malikiya, umo pali bakafula wa golide, ewabombele umulimo wakuwamya ilinga ukuya fikafye na ku ŋanda ukwaleikala ababomfi be Tempele pamo na bashimakwebo, apalungatene ne Mpongolo ya Hamifakadi, ukufika na ku muputule wa pamulu uwabela pa cifutu." 
Nehemiah3:32 Elyo kabili, pakati ka muputule wa pamulu uwabela pa cifutu, ukuya fikafye na pa Mwinshi wa Mpaanga, bakafula ba golide elyo na bamakwebo ebawemye mukukuula." 
Nehemiah4:1 Ilyo Sanibalati aumfwile ukuti tulekuula ilinga, akalipa no kufulwa icine cine. Kabili alatumfya na Bayuda." 
Nehemiah4:2 Elyo asosa pa cinso ca banankwe na ku bashilika ba bena Samaria ati, “Cinshi aba Bayuda ababula amaka balecita? Bushe bakakuula cipya cipya ilinga? Bushe bakalatuula amalambo? Bushe bakacipwisha mu bushiku bumo? Bushe balesubila ukubwesesha amaka mu mabwe ayaocewa mu mulilo ayo bashula mu mina ya fitantala?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Elyo Tobia umwina Amoni, uwali nankwe, atile, “Ala ici balekuula, nangufye ni mumbwe aninapo, awe mukwai kuti cabongoloka, nangufye bakuulile na mabwe cafyefye!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Umfwa we Lesa wesu ifyo batusuula. Ubabweseshe insele shabo pa mitwe yabo abene. Kabili bapeeleni ukuba icitapwa ku calo ca bunkole! 
Nehemiah4:5 Tecakwesha ukufimba pa mampulu yabo. Kabili tecakwesha ukufuuta ifyabubifi fyabo ifyo bacita, pantu nabatuka abalebomba imilimo yakukuula." 
Nehemiah4:6 Kanshi twakuula ilinga mpaka twalifishafye na pakati ka butali bwaliko, pantu abantu abalebomba mukukuula bali abaikatana imitima mu mulimo wakukuula." 
Nehemiah4:7 Lelo Sanibalati, Tobia, Abaarabu, abena Amoni, elyo na bena Ashidodi ilyo baumfwile ukuti amalinga ya Yerusalemu yele yalecilikwa kabili ne fipata nafyo file filecilikwa, neci cabalengele ukufulwa nganshi." 
Nehemiah4:8 Elyo bonse baikatene pamo ukuti bese mukulwisha abena Yerusalemu no kulenga kube ifimfulunganya. 
Nehemiah4:9 Eico ifwe twapepele kuli Lesa wesu, no kubika bamalonda ba kasuba no bushiku abakubacinsha." 
Nehemiah4:10 Elyo abena Yuda batile, “Amaka ya basenda ifintu nayapwa, elyo ifibungulubwe nafyo fyalifulisha. Nga kuti twakuula shani ili linga?”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Kabili abalwani besu batile, “Intanshi ilyo tabalati beshibe nangu ukutumona, ifwe tuli nokuba kulya kwine pamo pene nabo. Elyo tuli nokubepaya, no mulimo uli nokufubalila.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Kanshi ifi efyo cali ilyo Abayuda bamo abaleikala mupepi nabo baishile no kutweba ukulingana ne miku ikumi limo pali ici nokutila, “Ala konsefye uko mukapilibukila, bali nokutusansa.”" 
Nehemiah4:13 Elyo na ine nalashike abantu bamo umo ilinga talilapwa, umushali nangu cimo. Kabili nababikile mu ndupwa mu ndupwa ninshi bali ne fyanso fya mafumo, impanga na mata." 
Nehemiah4:14 Elyo naloleshe no kumona ifintu ifi, elyo naima no kweba abalashi, intungulushi elyo na kuli bambi abantu abaliko no kutila, “Mwikwata umwenso kuli bena. Ibukishenifye Yawe uuli impalume, elyo ewabafye uwakutiinya. Kabili mube abakulwishishako na bamunonko, abana abaume na bana abanakashi, abakashi benu elyo na mayanda yenu yene.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Ilyo abalwani besu baumfwile ukuti natwishiba amapange yabo, nokuti Lesa nafulunganya amapange yabo, lyena na ifwe bonse twalibwelele mukukuula ilinga, cila umo ku mulimo wakwe." 
Nehemiah4:16 Ifi efyo cali ukufumafye ilya ine nshita, abantu bandi abali citika babombele kukukuula ilinga, elyo bambi nabo abali citika babuulile amafumo, inkwela, amata elyo ne fyakucinga umubili. Kabili ne ntungulushi nasho shaiminine kunuma ya Bayuda bonse," 
Nehemiah4:17 abo abalekuula ilinga. Elyo na bonse abalepalamika ifibombelo fyakukulila, balebomfya ukuboko kumo elyo ukuboko kumbi nako baikatilako ifyanso." 
Nehemiah4:18 Elyo cila kakuula onse alifwele ulupanga lwakwe mu musana ilyo alekuula. Lelo umuntu uwalelisha ipenga ena ali mupepi na ine. 
Nehemiah4:19 Elyo ine nalaeba na basambashi babo, intungulushi shabo elyo na bantu bonse nati, “Umulimo naukosa nganshi kabili naukula nganshi, elyo ifwe tuli abatalukana nganshi ukufuma ku muntu no muntu munankwe ukukonka ilinga." 
Nehemiah4:20 Uko konse mwaumfwa iciunda ce penga, longaneni na ifwe kulya kwine. Lesa wesu ali nokutulwilako.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Kanshi twalitwalilile ukubomba uyu mulimo na bantufye abanono, abalifye citika ninshi nabekata na mafumo, ukutulafye ulucelo mpaka ilyo intanda shalatula." 
Nehemiah4:22 Kabili pa nshita imo ine, nasosele ku bantu natila, “Shi cila muntu pamo no mubomfi wakwe, basendame mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, pakuti babe abalinshi besu ubushiku. Kabili akasuba, kuti baisa mukutubombelako imilimo, ubushiku nabo baletulindako.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Kabili nangufye nine wine, nangu ni bamunyinane, nangufye abantu bandi abankonka mukumombela, nangu ni bamalonda bandi bene tatwalefula ifyakufwala pakusendama. Kabili cila muntu aleba ne canso cakwe mu minwe yakwe. Kanofye ilyo cila muntu aleowa, elyo alefuula." 
Nehemiah5:1 Nomba abaume na bakashi babo batampile ukuilishanya apakalamba, pa mulandu wa bamunyinabo Abayuda." 
Nehemiah5:2 Bamo pebumba nabo basosa abati, “Ifwe, abana besu abaume na bana besu abanakashi tuli bengi nganshi. Kanshi lekenifye tusendepo ifyakulya, epakuti tube abomi nga twalalya.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Kabili na bambi eko bali abatile, “Ifwe tuli na mabala yesu, amabala ya myangashi pamo na mayanda yesu ifyo tulepeela nge cikatilo pakukabulamo ifyakulya ifyakutupususha ku cipowe nga caisa.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Elyo kabili kwali abantu bamo abatile, “Ifwe pakulipila umusonko ku mfumu, uwa pa filime fyesu na pa mabala yesu aya myangashi twashimafye indalama." 
Nehemiah5:5 Lelo nangula twabafye cimo cine na bamunyinefwe, elyo umulopa nao umo wine no wa bamunyinefwe, elyo abana besu nabo bawama kwatifye bana babo, mu cine cine ifwe tulepatikisha abana besu abaume na banakashi kukuba abasha. Kabili bamo abana besu abanakashi nabasendwa na mu busha. Ala tatukwetepo na maka ayakuti twingabapususha nakalya. Pantu abantu bambi ebaba na mabala yesu aya myangashi pamo ne mpanga shesu.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Ilyo ine naumfwile ukulilishika kwabo, elyo na mashiwi yonse, nalifulilwe icibi." 
Nehemiah5:7 Panuma yakutontonkanyapo nganshi mu mutima, awe nakalipila abasambashi elyo na bakateeka. Nabeba nati, “Onse uwa muli imwe alalundapo kansosela pakupoka ifyo mupeela bamunyinenwe.” Kanshi elyo naitile icilye ca bantu icikalamba icakubalubulwisha." 
Nehemiah5:8 Elyo natile kuli bena, “Bamunyinefwe Abayuda abashitishiwe ku mitundu ya bantu Abenafyalo, twalibalubula ukulingana na maka yesu. Nomba bushe nimwe mwalashitisha bamunyinenwe pakuti tukese balubula nakabili?” Elyo nabo balifye tondolo, tabamwene na cakusosapo." 
Nehemiah5:9 Kabili natile, “Ico mulecita te cintu icisuma iyoo. Bushe tamulefwaya ukwenda mu katiina kakwa Lesa, pakuti Abenafyalo, abalwani besu, betuseka?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Ala na ine wine pamo na babwananyina banandi pamo na babomfi bandi bene, tulabakongweshako ulupiya pamo ne ŋanu. Nomba lekeni ukulundapo kansosela." 
Nehemiah5:11 Mubabweseshe bwangu incende shabo umo balimina, amabala ya myangashi, amabala ya miolifa no mwaba amayanda yabo. Mubabweseshe na filya mwabapingwile ukulundapo pa misha yonse iya pa ndalama, iya pa ŋanu, iya pa mwangashi elyo na pa mafuta.”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Intungulushi nasho epakulanda ashiti, “Tuli nokubwesha, kabili ifwe tatwakafwayeko akantu nelyo kamo akakulundapo kuli bena. Ifwe tuli nokubombafye ifyo mwasosa.” Elyo naitile bashimapepo pakuti abasambashi ne ntungulushi balape ukucita ukulingana no mwabelele icebo ici." 
Nehemiah5:13 Elyo nakunta ne cisempe ca mwingila wandi no kutila, “Ifi efyo Lesa akunte umuntu onse uushabake ishiwi ili. Shi Lesa namutamfye mu ŋanda yakwe na mu fyuma fyakwe fyonse! Ifi efyo akuntwe kabili eshala na kantu!” Elyo ibumba lyonse lyayasuka aliti, “Ameni! ” Elyo balumbanya na Yawe. Abantu nabo epakucita ukulingana ne cilayo ici." 
Nehemiah5:14 Ine nali umulashi wabo mu calo ca Yuda ukutampafye mu mwaka uwakulenga amakumi yabili (20) iya bufumu bwakwa Atakisesi, ukufika na mu mwaka uwalenga amakumi yatatu na ibili (32). Pa myaka yonse iyi, imyaka ikumi limo na ibili (12), ine nangufye ni bamunyinane bonse tatwatala atulyapo ifilyo fya bulashi." 
Nehemiah5:15 Lelo ku balashi babalilepo, abantangilile, bena balecusha abantu. Balepoka ku bantu umukate no mwangashi, mukulundapo ku ndalama amashekeli amakumi yane (40) aya silifa ayo balebasonkesha. Kabili na babomfi ba balashi nabo balecusha abantu. Nomba ine nshalecitako ifi, pantu naletiina Lesa." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ine mu nshita yakukonkelela ukubomba ifyo nshifwile kubomba, naiposele ne mwine kukuwamya ilinga ili. Bonse abantu bandi balelonganafye palya pene mukubomba umulimo. Eico kanshi, bonsefye ababomfi bandi tabashitilepo impanga nangu imo iyoo." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kabili abantu ukulingana no mwanda umo na makumi yasano (150), Abayuda elyo na bacilolo, twalelya pamo nabo petebulo lyandi, kabili efyo cali na kuli bonse abaleisa kuli ifwe ukufuma ku mishobo iyatushingulwike." 
Nehemiah5:18 Kanshi cila bushiku balempekanishisha cilume wa ŋombe umo elyo ne mpaanga mutanda ishalondoloka bwino. Kabili inkoko nasho ishisuma shalepekanishiwa cila bushiku. Elyo ukulingana ne nshiku ikumi limo, nalyo line kwaleba ukupekanya kwa myangashi iyalekana lekana. Nelyo cali ifi, ine nshatalile mfwaya ifilyo fya bulashi pantu aba bantu balecula ku mulimo uwakosa." 
Nehemiah5:19 Mwe Lesa wandi, munjibukishe no kumpaala ne mwana wenu pali conse ico nacita kuli aba bantu." 
Nehemiah6:1 Nomba cali ukuti ilyo Sanibalati, Tobia, Geshomu Umuarabu, elyo na balwani besu bambi, baumfwile ukuti ninkuulako ilinga, elyo tapali napashele akapunda, nelyo nali nshilabika ifiibi mu minshi yakwingilila nangu ukufuminapo," 
Nehemiah6:2 elyo Sanibalati na Geshomu nabo bantumina na mashiwi abati, “Isa bwangu tukumane bonse mu mushi umo uwabela mu nika ya Ono.” Lelo bena, baletontonkanya ukuncita ububi." 
Nehemiah6:3 Kanshi na ine epakubatumina inkombe nokutila, “Ine kuno ndi pa mulimo uukalamba nganshi, kanshi ine tekuti njise uko, iyoo. Cinshi ico umulimo wingafubalishiwa ilyo ine nafumako nokwisa uko muli?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Lelo bena bakonkanyapo ukuntumina aya mashiwi pa miku ine, elyo na ine nalebasukafye mu musango umo wine." 
Nehemiah6:5 Elyo Sanibalati atumine umubomfi wakwe kuli ine kwati fintu acitile pakutampa. Amutumine pa muku uwalenga isano ne nkalata iyabula ukwisalwa mu maboko yakwe. 
Nehemiah6:6 Elyo mu nkalata mwalembelwe ifyakuti, “Mu mishobo ya benafyalo namusalangana akasebo, na Geshomu wine asosele ukuti, ‘Ici cacine,’ ukuti iwe na Bayuda mulepanga ukusanguka, eco kanshi mwakuulila ilinga cipya cipya. Kabili ukulingana ne shiwi ili, niwe ukaba imfumu." 
Nehemiah6:7 Elyo kabili wasonta na bakasesema abakubila pali iwe mu Yerusalemu abati, ‘Abayuda baba ne mfumu.’ Nomba aya mashiwi yali nokubwelela ku mfumu. Eico kanshi isafye, tumfwane bonse.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Kanshi ine nalimutumine amashiwi ukutila, “Takuli ifintu ifili ngefi ulesosa ifilecitika. Ifi fyonse ulefyelenganyafye mu mutima obe.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Pantu bonse balefwaya ukuti tube no mwenso uwakutila, “Amaboko yabo yakanakuka kukubomba imilimo, tabakatale abaipwisha.” Na ine epakupepa nati, “Nomba mwe Lesa kosheni amaboko yandi.”" 
Nehemiah6:10 Ubushiku bumo naile ku ŋanda yakwa Shemaiya umwana mwaume wakwa Delaya, umwana mwaume wakwa Mehetabelo, uwaisalilwe mu ŋanda. Anjeba nokutila, “Shi natuleya tukumane pamo mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa, iyili mwi Tempele, elyo twisaleko ne fiibi fya mwi Tempele mwine, pantu baleisa kwipaya. Icine cine ubushiku baleisa mukukwipaya.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Lelo na ine natile, “Bushe umuntu uwaba nga ine kuti abutuka? Nangu bushe umo uuli nga ine kuti aya mwi Tempele pakuti apusushe ubumi bwakwe? Awe tekuti njemo iyoo!”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Kwena nalishiba ukuti te Lesa amutumine ukulanda ifi, lelo ukuti ni Tobia pamo na Sanibalati ebamupeele amafisakanwa no kumutuma ukwisa nsembeleka." 
Nehemiah6:13 Ico bamutumine ni pakuti ese antiinye mbe no mwenso, elyo mbifye pakucita ici, elyo panuma bakese mpeela ishina ilibi no kunsebanya." 
Nehemiah6:14 “We Lesa wandi ibukisha Tobia pamo na Sanibalati, ukulingana neyi imilimo yabo. Ibukisha na ulya kasesema mwanakashi Noadia elyo na bakasesema bambi abalefwaya ukulantiinya.”" 
Nehemiah6:15 Kanshi ilinga lyapwile ukulikuula mu nshiku amakumi yasano na shibili (52), pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shisano (25) ubwa mweshi wa Eluli." 
Nehemiah6:16 Ilyo abalwani besu bonse baumfwile ifi, imishobo yonse iyashingulwike yali no mwenso. Kabili baisuulile nganshi abene, ico balishibe ukuti umulimo onse uwabombelwe wacitike ku maka yakwa Lesa epela." 
Nehemiah6:17 Kabili mu nshiku shilya abasambashi ba bena Yuda batumine amakalata ayengi kuli Tobia. Elyo amakalata yambi nayo yalefuma kuli Tobia no kuya kuli bena. 
Nehemiah6:18 Pantu abengi mu calo ca Yuda balilayene nankwe, pantu ali ni shifyala wakwa Shekaniya umwana mwaume wakwa Ara. Kabili umwana wakwe umwaume Yehohanani aupile umwana mwanakashi wakwa Meshulamu umwana mwaume wakwa Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Kabili baleta utusebo twakwe utusuma kuli ine, elyo no kumweba amashiwi nalelanda. Elyo Tobia nao aletuma no tusebo twacintiinya kuli ine." 
Nehemiah7:1 Nomba ilyo ilinga lyapwile ukukuulwa, elyo nabikamo ne fiibi bwino bwino mu ncende shafiko, nasonta na bakalinda wa mpongolo, bakemba, elyo abena Levi nabo basontwa ku mulimo wabo." 
Nehemiah7:2 Elyo ine nasontele munyinane Hanani ukuba kangalila wa Yerusalemu, pamo na Hananiya uwali kangalila wa bashilika ba kwisano, pantu ali uwacishinka no kuba uwakutiina Lesa ukucila abantu bambi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Elyo nalandile kuli bena nati, “Mwilaisula impongolo sha mu Yerusalemu, kano ilyo akasuba katampa ukukaba. Kabili pa nshita bakalinda wa mpongolo bacili nabeminina pakulonda, bafwile ukulaisalako ifiibi no kupilikishako. Elyo musontemo na bekashi bamo aba mu Yerusalemu ukuba bakalinda, bamo pa ncende ishasontwa elyo bambi nabo pa ntanshi ya mayanda yabo.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Nomba umusumba wali uwapabuka kabili uukalamba nganshi. Lelo abantu balimo abanono, kabili na mayanda yene yali tayalakuulwa." 
Nehemiah7:5 Kanshi Lesa wandi acibika mu mutima wandi ukuti nonganye abasambashi, bacilolo elyo na bekalacalo mukubalembesha ukulingana ne ndupwa shabo. Awe nasanga ne citabo ico balembelemo ababalilepo ukubwela ukulingana ne ndupwa shabo. Ifi efyo nasangile ifyalembelwemo." 
Nehemiah7:6 Aba, e bantu abaikele mu citungu ca calo abaishile ukufuma muli bunkole, abantu abo imfumu Nebukadinesa iya mu Babiloni asendele. Babwelele ku Yerusalemu pamo pene na ku Yuda, cila muntu abwelele ku mushi kumwakwe." 
Nehemiah7:7 Bonse baishile pamo na Serubabeli na Yeshua, Nehemia, Asariya, Ramiya, Nahamani, Modekai, Bilishani, Misipereti, Bigifai, Nehumu elyo na Baanaya. Uku ekutantikwa kwa mpendwa ya baume aba mu lupwa lwa bena Israeli." 
Nehemiah7:8 Abana ba lupwa lwakwa Paroshi bali amakana yabili no mwanda umo na makumi cine lubali na babili (2,172)." 
Nehemiah7:9 Abana bakwa Shefatiya nabo bali imyanda itatu na makumi cine lubali na babili (372). 
Nehemiah7:10 Ulupwa lwakwa Ara nabo bali imyanda mutanda na makumi yasano na babili (652). 
Nehemiah7:11 Abana bakwa Pahati Moabu, abali abana bakwa Yeshua na Yoabu, bali amakana yabili ne myanda cine konse konse, ne kumi limo na cine konse konse (2,818)." 
Nehemiah7:12 Abana bakwa Elamu bali ikana limo ne myanda ibili na makumi yasano na bane (1,254)." 
Nehemiah7:13 Abana bakwa Satu bali imyanda cine konse konse na makumi yane na basano (845). 
Nehemiah7:14 Abana bakwa Sakayi bali imyanda cine lubali na makumi mutanda (760). 
Nehemiah7:15 Abana bakwa Binuyi bali imyanda mutanda na makumi yane na cine konse konse (648) 
Nehemiah7:16 Abana bakwa Bebai bali imyanda mutanda na makumi yabili na cine konse konse (628). 
Nehemiah7:17 Abana bakwa Asigadi bali amakana yabili ne myanda itatu na makumi yabili na babili (2,322)." 
Nehemiah7:18 Abana bakwa Adonikamu bali imyanda mutanda na makumi mutanda na cine lubali (667). 
Nehemiah7:19 Abana bakwa Bigifai bali amakana yabili na makumi mutanda na cine lubali (2,067)." 
Nehemiah7:20 Abana bakwa Adini bali imyanda mutanda na makumi yasano na basano (655). 
Nehemiah7:21 Abana bakwa Ateri, muli Hesekia, bali amakumi pabula na cine konse konse (98)." 
Nehemiah7:22 Abana bakwa Hashumu bali imyanda itatu na makumi yabili na cine konse konse (328). 
Nehemiah7:23 Abana bakwa Besai bali imyanda itatu na makumi yabili na bane (324). 
Nehemiah7:24 Abana bakwa Harifu bali umwanda umo ne kumi limo na babili (112). 
Nehemiah7:25 Abana bakwa Gibeoni bali amakumi pabula na basano (95). 
Nehemiah7:26 Abaume abaleikala mu Betelemu elyo na Netofa bali umwanda umo na makumi cine konse konse na cine konse konse (188). 
Nehemiah7:27 Abaume abaleikala mu Anatoti bali umwanda umo na makumi yabili na cine konse konse (128). 
Nehemiah7:28 Elyo nabo abena Beti Asimafeti nabo bali amakumi yane na babili (42). 
Nehemiah7:29 Abaume aba ku Kiriati Yarimu, Kefira na Beroti bali imyanda cine lubali na makumi yane na batatu (743)." 
Nehemiah7:30 Abaume ba ku Rama na bena Geba nabo bali imyanda mutanda na makumi yabili na umo (621). 
Nehemiah7:31 Elyo abaume ba ku Mikimasi nabo bali umwanda umo na makumi yabili na babili (122). 
Nehemiah7:32 Abaume abali ku Betele na bali ku Ai bali umwanda umo na makumi yabili na batatu (123). 
Nehemiah7:33 Abaume aba ku Nebo kumbi nabo abaume bali amakumi yasano na babili (52). 
Nehemiah7:34 Elyo abaume ba ku Elamu kumbi nabo bali ikana limo ne myanda ibili na makumi yasano na bane (1,254)." 
Nehemiah7:35 Abana abaume ba ku Harimu bali imyanda itatu na makumi yabili (320). 
Nehemiah7:36 Abana abaume ba ku Yeriko bali amakumi yatatu na makumi yane na basano (345). 
Nehemiah7:37 Abena Lodi, Hadidi na Ono bali nabo imyanda cine lubali na makumi yabili na umo (721)." 
Nehemiah7:38 Elyo abena Sena nabo bali amakana yatatu ne myanda pabula na makumi yatatu (3,930)." 
Nehemiah7:39 Bashimapepo bali ni aba: Abali bamwana Yedaiya, uwali wa mu ŋanda yakwa Yeshua, bali imyanda pabula na makumi cine lubali na batatu (973)." 
Nehemiah7:40 Abana baume bakwa Imeri bali ikana limo na makumi yasano na babili (1,052)."
