Nehemiah7:41 Bamwana Pashuri nabo bali ikana limo ne myanda ibili na makumi yane na cine lubali (1,247)." 
Nehemiah7:42 Bamwana Harimu nabo bali ikana limo ne kumi limo na cine lubali (1,017)." 
Nehemiah7:43 Abena Levi nabo abali abana baume bakwa Yeshua, abali mu lupwa lwakwa Kadimieli abafyelwe ukupitila mu bana baume bakwa Hodafiya, bonse bali amakumi cine lubali na bane (74)." 
Nehemiah7:44 Bakemba nabo abali abana baume bakwa Asafu bali umwanda umo na makumi yane na cine konse konse (148). 
Nehemiah7:45 Bakalinda wa mpongolo abali abana bakwa Shalumu, bamwana Ateri, bamwana Talimoni, bamwana Akubu, bamwana Hatita, bamwana Shobai, bonse bali umwanda umo na makumi yatatu na cine konse konse (138)." 
Nehemiah7:46 Indupwa sha babomfi be Tempele shali ni aba: Abana baume bakwa Siha, abana baume bakwa Hasufa, elyo na bana baume bakwa Tabaoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 abana baume bakwa Kerosi, abana baume bakwa Siya elyo na bana baume bakwa Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 abana baume bakwa Lebana, abana baume bakwa Hagaba elyo na bana baume bakwa Salimayi," 
Nehemiah7:49 abana baume bakwa Hanani, abana baume bakwa Gideli, elyo na bana baume bakwa Gahari," 
Nehemiah7:50 abana baume bakwa Reayia, abana baume bakwa Resini, elyo na bana baume bakwa Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 abana baume bakwa Gasamu, abana baume bakwa Usa, elyo na bana baume bakwa Pasea," 
Nehemiah7:52 abana baume bakwa Besayi, abana baume bakwa Meunimu, elyo na bana baume bakwa Nefishusimu," 
Nehemiah7:53 abana baume bakwa Bakibuku, abana baume bakwa Hakufa elyo na bana baume bakwa Hahuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 abana baume bakwa Basiluti, abana baume bakwa Meida elyo na bana baume bakwa Hasha," 
Nehemiah7:55 abana baume bakwa Bakosi, abana baume bakwa Sisera, elyo na bana baume bakwa Temaya," 
Nehemiah7:56 abana baume bakwa Nesiya, elyo na bana abaume bakwa Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Abana baume ba babomfi bakwa Solomoni bali ni aba: Abana baume bakwa Sotai, abana baume bakwa Sofereti elyo na bana baume bakwa Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 abana baume bakwa Yala, abana baume bakwa Dakoni elyo na bana baume bakwa Gideli," 
Nehemiah7:59 abana baume bakwa Shefatiya, abana baume bakwa Hatili, abana baume bakwa Pokereti Hasebaimu elyo na bana baume bakwa Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Elyo bonse ababomfi be Tempele pamo na bana baume ba babomfi bakwa Solomoni, bonse pamo bali imyanda itatu na makumi pabula na babili (392)." 
Nehemiah7:61 Kabili aba, ebaninine ukufuma ku Tele Mela elyo na ku Tele Hasha, Kerubi, Adoni na ku Imeri, lelo calibanshishe ukulumbula uko amayanda ya bashibo yali, nangufye uko yatantikwe, nangu ukutilafye bena bali abena Israeli." 
Nehemiah7:62 Abana baume bakwa Delaiya, abana baume bakwa Tobia, abana baume bakwa Nekoda bali imyanda mutanda na makumi yane na babili (642)." 
Nehemiah7:63 Nomba kuli bashimapepo ni aba: Abana baume bakwa Hobaya, abana baume bakwa Hakosi elyo na bana baume bakwa Basilai uwabuulile umukashi wakwe ukufuma ku lupwa lwakwa Basilai umwina Gileadi no kwinikwako ishina limo line." 
Nehemiah7:64 Aba ebo bafwailishe amashina ya fikolwe fyabo mu fitabo lelo tabafimwene, kanshi epakubafumya pa mulongo wa bashimapepo no kubapendela pa bashasangululwa." 
Nehemiah7:65 Elyo umulashi wa ici calo nao apeele icebo icakuti takuli kulya icakulya camushilo mpakafye bakakwate shimapepo uukapendula ukubomfya Urimu na Tumimu. 
Nehemiah7:66 Kanshi ulukuta lonse ulwabwelele ukufuma kuli bunkole lwali pamo amakana amakumi yane na yabili ne myanda itatu na makumi mutanda (42,360)." 
Nehemiah7:67 Kabili ababomfi babo abaume na banakashi bambi bali amakana cine lubali ne myanda itatu na makumi yatatu na cine lubali (7,337). Balikwete na bakwimba inyimbo, abaume elyo na banakashi, abali imyanda ibili na makumi yane na yasano (245)." 
Nehemiah7:68 Imfalashi shabo shali imyanda cine lubali na makumi yatatu na mutanda (736). Elyo bakabalwe babo bali imyanda ibili na makumi yane na basano (245). 
Nehemiah7:69 Ingamila nasho shali imyanda ine na makumi yatatu na shisano (435). Bapunda nabo amakana mutanda ne myanda cine lubali na makumi yabili (6,720)." 
Nehemiah7:70 Elyo abakalamba bamo aba ndupwa batuulile ne fyabupe ifyakwafwilisha muli uyu mulimo. Umulashi wa calo ici, apeele ku mulimo wa cipao, indalama drakimasi ikana limo (1,000) isha golide, inweno nasho amakumi yasano (50) ne fyakufwala bashimapepo nafyo imyanda isano na makumi yatatu (530)." 
Nehemiah7:71 Bamo abakalamba ba mu ndupwa balepeela indalama drakimasi amakana amakumi yabili (20,000) isha golide, kabili indalama minasi amakana yabili ne myanda ibili (2,200) isha silifa." 
Nehemiah7:72 Elyo bambi abantu abashala baletele indalama drakimasi amakana amakumi yabili (20,000) isha golide pamo ne ndalama minasi amakana yabili (2,000) isha silifa. Kabili pali ne fyakufwala ifya bashimapepo nafyo amakumi mutanda na cine lubali (67)." 
Nehemiah7:73 Kanshi nomba bashimapepo, abena Levi, bakalinda wa mpongolo she Tempele, bakemba, ababomfi be Tempele, bambi bamo bamo elyo na bena Israeli bonse baikele mu misumba yabo ine. Ilyo umweshi wa cine lubali wafikile, ninshi abana bakwa Israeli nabekala bwino mu mishi yabo," 
Nehemiah8:1 abantu epakulongana pamo kwatifye muntu umo pa lwalala ku ntanshi ya Mpongolo ya Menshi. Elyo baeba Esra uwali ni kalemba ukuleta Icitabo ca mafunde yakwa Mose ico Lesa akonkomeshe ku bena Israeli. 
Nehemiah8:2 Eico kanshi pa bushikufye ubwantanshi mu mweshi wakulenga cine lubali, shimapepo Esra aletele Icitabo ca mafunde uko abantu balongene abaume na banakashi elyo na onsefye uwingomfwa no kwiluka." 
Nehemiah8:3 Awe atampa no kubabelengela icitabo ca mafunde palya pene pa lwalala ku ntanshi ya Mpongolo ya Menshi, ninshi atampile ulucelo ukufikafye na kasuba pakati ka mutwe. Elyo abantu nabo abaume na banakashi, na bonse abengomfwa no kwiluka, bekelefye balekutika ku citabo ca mafunde." 
Nehemiah8:4 Kanshi Esra kalemba uyu, ninshi eminine pa cintamba ca fimuti icakuulilwe umulimo wine uyu. Elyo abaiminine lwa ku kuboko kwakwe ukwa kulyo ni Matitiya, Shema, Anaiya, Uria, Hilikiya elyo na Maaseya. Elyo kabili na bambi abaiminine ku kuboko kwakwe ukwa ku kuso bali ni Pedaiya, Mishaeli, Malikiya, Hashumu, Hashibadana, Sakaria elyo na Meshulamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Elyo Esra aisula icitabo pa menso ya cintubwingi conse, pantu apo aiminine pali apasansuka ukucila umuntu onse. Cilya aisula icitabo, bonse abantu baiminina." 
Nehemiah8:6 Elyo Esra atotele Yawe, Lesa Mukulu, na bantu bonse baimisha amaboko yabo mu mulu, bayasuka abati, “Ameni! Ameni!” Kabili bainama no kupepa kuli Yawe, ninshi ifinso fyabo fikontamine panshi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Kanshi abena Levi, ekutila Yeshua, Bani, Sherebiya, Yamini, Akubu, Shabetayi, Hodiya, Maseiya, Kelita, Asariya, Yosabadi, Hanani na Pelaiya, baleafwailisha ukulondolwela abantu amafunde, ninshi abantu nabo bemininefye mu ncende shabo." 
Nehemiah8:8 Kanshi ilyo balebelenga ukufuma mu citabo ca mafunde yakwa Lesa no kucilondolola bwino bwino, elyo bacipilibwile bwino bwino mukwafwa abantu ukuti bomfwe bwino umo cilolele mukucibelenga." 
Nehemiah8:9 Kabili Nehemia, uwali mulashi, Esra shimapepo kabili kalemba, elyo na bena Levi abafundile abantu, batile ku bantu bonse, “Buno bushiku bwamushilo kuli Yawe, Lesa wenu. Tecakwesha ukulalooshamo nangufye ukulilishikamo.” Pantu abantu bonse balelila ilyo bakutika ku mashiwi ya mafunde." 
Nehemiah8:10 Elyo Nehemia abeba nokuti, “Kabiyeni uko mulefwaya muye mulye ifisuma no kunwa ifyalowa elyo muye mupeko na bonse abo abashikwete ifyapekanishiwa libela. Pantu ubu bushiku buntu bwapaalwa ku mfumu. Tecakwesha ukuilishanya, pantu insansa shakwa Yawe e maka yenu.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Elyo abena Levi pakutalalika abantu bonse batile, “Talaleni imwe bonse pantu ubushiku buno bwamushilo, mwilalangulukamo.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Elyo nomba abantu bonse baya mukulya no kunwa, batuminako na banabo fimo fimo no kusansamuka apakalamba, pantu balyumfwile umwalolele imilandu babashimikileko." 
Nehemiah8:13 Nomba mu bushiku bwalenga shibili ubwa mweshi, abakalamba ba ndupwa shonse, pamo pene na bashimapepo elyo na bena Levi, bonse balongana kuli kalemba Esra. Ico balonganine pamo, ni mukumfwikisha bwino amashiwi ya mafunde." 
Nehemiah8:14 Awe basanga mu mafunde ayapeelwe kuli Mose, mwalilembwa ukuti, “Abena Israeli bali nokulaikala mu nsakwe pa nshikunkulu ya mu mweshi walenga cine lubali.”" 
Nehemiah8:15 Elyo bali nokuma imbila mu misumba yabo yonse elyo na mu Yerusalemu iyakuti, “Kabiyeni ku mpili elyo muye letako imisambo ya fimuti fya miolifa, imisambo ya miolifa ya mpanga, imiti ya muetulo, imisambo ya tuncindu elyo ne misambo ya fimuti ifya mabula yambi. Ifi fimuti fyakusakilamo insakwe pamo ngefyo calembwa.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Kanshi abantu epakuyako, bayasenda ifya mabula no kusakila insakwe cila umo pa mulu wa mutenge wa ŋanda yakwe, mu mansa sha mayanda yabo, na mu mansa sha ŋanda yakwa Lesa, na mu lubansa lwa ku Mpongolo ya Menshi, elyo na mu lubansa lwa ku Mpongolo yakwa Efulemu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Kanshi emukutila bonse abantu ababwelele ukufuma muli bunkole basakile insakwe no kwikalamo. Kabili bali abasansamuka pantu tacabalile acicitikapo ukufuma ku nshiku shakwa Yoshua mwana Nuni. Awe umuntu onsefye ali ne nsansa ishikalamba nganshi. 
Nehemiah8:18 Kabili cila bushiku, ukufuma pa bushiku bwantanshi ukufikafye na pa bushiku bwakulekelesha, Esra alebelenga icitabo ca mafunde yakwa Lesa. Elyo balesefya uyu mutebeto wa nsakwe pa nshiku cine lubali, elyo no bwalenga cine konse konse bacitile icilye camushilo, ukulingana nefyo calembwa." 
Nehemiah9:1 Nomba pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shine (24), ubwa uyu wine umweshi, abena Israeli bakumene pamo no kufunga ukulya, bafwele ne nsalu shabulanda, elyo kabili bali no lukungu pa mitwe yabo" 
Nehemiah9:2 Elyo bonse abena Israeli baipatwile ku benafyalo bonse. Elyo baiminine no kuyebelela ku fyabubifi fyabo fyonse, nefyo bashibo babifishe." 
Nehemiah9:3 Kanshi baiminine mu fifulo fyabo no kubelenga mu citabo ca mafunde yakwa Yawe Lesa wabo pa nsa shitatu isha kasuba. Kabili pa nsa shimbi shitatu isha kasuba elyo baleisosela amashiwi yakuyebelela. Bawile ubukupeme pa cinso cakwa Yawe, Lesa wabo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Elyo Yeshua, Bani, Kadimieli, Shebaniya, Buni, Sherebia, Bani elyo na Kenani, bonse ninshi beminine pa matabo ya bena Levi, balebilikisha ne shiwi ilikalamba kuli Yawe, Lesa wabo." 
Nehemiah9:5 Kabili abali abena Levi, Yeshua, Kadimieli, Bani, Hashabineya, Sherebia, Hodiya, Shebaniya elyo na Petaya batile, “Imeni no kupaala Yawe Lesa wenu na matotelo, uwabako ukufuma umuyayaya no kuya umuyayaya! “Nalicindikwe ishina lyobe we Lesa, kabili libe ilyalumbuka nganshi, ukucila pa malumbo no kutatakula konse." 
Nehemiah9:6 Iwe wekafye niwe Yawe. Niwe wabumbile umulu pamo pene ne myulu ya mumulu pamo ne fita fyonse ifya mu mulu. Niwe wabumbile isonde na fyonse ifyabapo, na babemba bonse na fyonse ifyabamo. Niwe upeela umweo ku cintu conse. Ne fita fya mu mulu filakukontamina pakukupepa." 
Nehemiah9:7 We Yawe, niwe Lesa, niwe wasalile Abramu. Wamufumishe na mu musumba wa Uri wa bena Kaludea, wamupeela ne shina lyakutila niwe Abrahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Kabili wasangile umutima wakwe wakupetamina. Elyo wapangene nankwe icipangano icakupeela ku bana bakwe icalo ca bena Kenani, abena Hiti, abena Amoni, abena Perisi, abena Yebusi elyo na bena Girigashi. Iwe ulasunga no kufikilisha ifilayo fyobe ifyacishinka pantu uli mulungami." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Walimwene ifyo ifikolwe fyesu fyaculile mu Egupto. Kabili walyumfwile nefyo balelilishika kuli Bemba Wakashika. 
Nehemiah9:10 Walangile ifishinka mu fisungusho ne fipeshamano ifyo wacitile kuli Farao, ifyacitike na ku babomfi bakwe bonse elyo na ku muntufye onse wa mu calo cakwe. Pantu walishibafye bwino ulukakala babacitile. Elyo wacitile ululumbi kwishina lyobe ulo ulwabelelela ukufika na nombaline." 
Nehemiah9:11 Kabili iwe we mwine, wayakenye bemba pantanshi yabo. Baenda apaumine ndi, elyo na babakonkele bonse abalwani babo wabaposele petenga lya menshi, nge libwe mu menshi ayamaka." 
Nehemiah9:12 Walebatungulula mu ntumba ye kumbi mu kasuba, na mu nshita ya bushiku walebatungulula mu lubingu lwa mulilo pakubasanikila pakuti baleenda bwino mu nshila umo bali nokupita." 
Nehemiah9:13 “Waikile kabili pa lupili lwa Sinai no kulanda pamo nabo, ilyo wafumine ku mulu wabapeele ifyakubatungulula ifyacishinka nganshi pamo na mafunde yacine cine. Wabapeele kabili ifipope pamo na malango yasuma." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wabalengele ukwishiba Isabata lyobe ilyamushilo. Kabili wabakonkomeshe no kulabaka amalango pamo pene na mafunde ne fipope, ukupitila mu minwe ya mubomfi obe Mose." 
Nehemiah9:15 Pakutuusha insala yabo, walebapeela umukate uwafuma ku mulu. Kabili wabapeele na menshi ayafumine mu cilibwe pakuti banwe ilyo bali ne cilaka. Wabebele no kuya mukati ka calo no kucipoka, pantu walilapile ukucipeela kuli bena." 
Nehemiah9:16 “Nomba bena pamo na bashifwe ifikolwe fyesu bacita icilumba, baumalala, bakaana no kubeela amafunde yobe." 
Nehemiah9:17 Bakeene ukumfwa, balaba na ku fisungusho ifyo wacitile pakubapokolola. Lelo bena bakosha imitima yabo, mu busangu bwabo basala ne ntungulushi lintu bapangile ukubwelelamo ku Egupto ku busha bwabo. Nomba iwe waliba Lesa uubelela uluse icine cine, uwacikuuku kabili uwamutembo, uushifulwa bwangu lelo uwacitemwiko icingi. Eico tawabaposele," 
Nehemiah9:18 nangu abene baiengele iciponti ca ŋombe, elyo balanda nokutila, ‘Ici, e mulungu wenu uwamuninika ukufuma ku Egupto.’ Elyo kabili bacitile ne fintu ifyamusaalula nganshi." 
Nehemiah9:19 Mulya mu matololo tawabalekeleshe nakalya, pantu uluse lobe we Lesa lukalamba. Mu kasuba intumba ye kumbi tayafililwe ukubatungulula mu lwendo lwabo, elyo na mu bushiku intumba ya mulilo tayafililwe ukubalika mu nshila bali nokupitamo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Kabili wabapeele Umupashi obe uusuma nganshi, uwakubasambilisha ifyo bafwile ukuba. Elyo kabili, tawakeenye ifyo wali nokubapeela pamo nga maana ukuti balelya, elyo na menshi yene ayakunwa, walibapeele ayakupwisha icilaka." 
Nehemiah9:21 Wabasakamene ilyo bali mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane. Takwali akantu ako baleculako. Insalu shabo shonse tashasapwike nakalya, elyo amakasa yabo nayo yene tayafimbile nakalya." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Wabapeele ishamfumu elyo ne mishobo. Kabili wabapatulwile ukuti bekale mu fitungu mu fitungu. Bapoka ne calo cakwa Sihoni imfumu ya ku Heshiboni elyo ne calo ca mfumu Ogi uwa ku Bashani. 
Nehemiah9:23 Kabili wafushishe abana babo abaume kwati ni ntanda sha mu mulu. Kabili wabatwele na mu calo walaile kuli bashibo, ukwingilamo no kucipoka." 
Nehemiah9:24 Kanshi nabo abana babo baliingile no kupoka icalo. Kabili walengele na bekashi ba mu calo abena Kenani ukuba ne cumfwila. Wabapeele mu maboko yabo, abantu bonse pamo penefye ne shamfumu shabo shonse, pakuti bacite conse pamo icali mu mano yabo kuli bena." 
Nehemiah9:25 Bapokele imisumba ya malinga pamo pene ne mpanga iyafunda nganshi. Kabili bapokele na mayanda ayaisulamo ifyuma fyonse. Bapoka ne fishima ifyaimbwa kabela, amabala ya myangashi, aya miolifa elyo ne miti ya fyakulya iyingi nganshi. Awe balelya no kwikuta, no kwina baina pakuipakisha ku fisuma fyobe ifyo wapeele." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Nomba nangu cali ifi, tabakunakile, bali ni bacisanguka kuli iwe. Bakaana nokubeela amafunde yobe. Baipaya na bakasesema abalebasokako pakuti babwelele kuli iwe. Elyo kabili bacita no musaalula uukalamba nganshi." 
Nehemiah9:27 Ici calengele ubapose mu maboko ya balwani babo, nabo babacusha nganshi. Kabili pa mulandu wa bucushi ubu, bakuuta no musowa uukalamba kuli iwe. Ilyo wabomfwile kulya ku mulu, ku luse lobe ulushaikulila wabapeele abakubafwako, abakubapusushako ku minwe ya balwani babo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Cilyafye balaikala umutelelwe, babwekeshapo ukulabifya. Awe na iwe wabalekela na mu maboko ya balwani babo pakuti bacushiwe. Elyo kabili nabo bakuuta. Ilyo bakuutile, walyumfwile ukufuma ku mulu. Elyo kabili pa nshitafye ishingi walebafwa ukulingana no lusefye lobe we mwine." 
Nehemiah9:29 “Kabili ilyo wabasokele ukuti babwelele ku mafunde yobe, nomba bali abafilumba, bakaana no kumfwa ifyebo fyobe ifyo umuntu uufikonka engasangamo ubumi. Lelo bena batikinya amapeya yabo kukukanaumfwa kufyo wabebele, bakosha ne mikoshi, bakaana." 
Nehemiah9:30 Pa myaka iyingi walibatekela umutima, kabili ku Mupashi obe walebasoka ukupitila muli bakasesema bobe. Lelo tababakutike no kumfwa. Eico nomba wabapeele mu minwe ya bantu abalekana lekana mu fyalo." 
Nehemiah9:31 Lelo mu cikuku cobe icikulu tawabalekeleshe nangu ukubalofya, pantu uli Lesa uwaluse lonse kabili uwacikuuku." 
Nehemiah9:32 “Eico nomba, we Lesa wesu, we wa maka yonse, waliba umukulu kabili uwakutiina, we ufikilisha icipangano cobe ne citemwiko icishipwa. Shi wisuula ubu bucushi ubo tucili nabo ifwe fwe bana bobe bonse, imfumu shesu, intungulushi shesu, bashimapepo besu, bakasesema besu, ifikolwe fyesu elyo na bantu besu bonse, ubucushi ubo twaculako ukutampa pa nshita ya shamfumu sha bena Asiria mpaka ukufika na ku bushiku bwa lelo." 
Nehemiah9:33 Kabili we mfumu iwe waliba umulungami pali conse icaisa pali ifwe, pantu ifyo ucita fyacishinka. Lelo fwe bene nifwe tucita ifyamusebanya." 
Nehemiah9:34 Nangufye ni bashamfumu besu nangu ni ntungulushi shesu, bashimapepo besu, pamo ne fikolwe fyesu, bonse bakene ukukonka amafunde yobe. Tabasakamene ifipope fyobe no kusoka kobe uko wacitile." 
Nehemiah9:35 Ilyo bali mu bufumu bwa ku calo cabo tabakupyungile, nelyo bali ne fisuma ifingi ifyo wabapeele mu calo icikulu ica mushili uwafunda. Tabapilibwike na ku micitile yabubifi nakalya." 
Nehemiah9:36 “Nomba mona ifwe na lelo tuli basha pantu balitucimfya. Mu calo cino icapeelwe ku fikolwe fyesu ukusekelelamo ku fisabo na ku fisuma ifyabamo, mona ifwe tuli abasha." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ifisabo fyaciko fiwaminafye bashamfumu abo watupeela ukulatuteeka pa mulandu wa bubifi bwesu. Elyo kabili bacita ifyo batemenwe pa mibili yesu na pa fitekwa fyesu. Awe kwena ifwe twaikalilafye ubucushi bweka. 
Nehemiah9:38 “Kanshi pa mulandu wa ifi fintu, ifwe twalacita icipangano icacishinka no kucilemba bwino bwino. Elyo intungulushi shesu, abena Levi pamo na bashimapepo besu bali nokucikomenena bwino bwino pakufwatikapo bonse.”" 
Nehemiah10:1 Nomba aba e bantu abafwatikepo inshimbi elyo no kulembapo amashina yabo, Umulashi Nehemia mwana Hakalia, elyo na Sedekia," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraya, Asaria na Yeremia," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pashehuri, Amariya na Malikiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatushi, Shebania na Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harimu, Meremoti na Obadia," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniele, Ginetoni na Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniele, Ginetoni na Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:7 Meshulamu, Abiya na Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:8 Masia, Biligai elyo na Shemaiya. Bonse aba ebali bashimapepo." 
Nehemiah10:9 Elyo ku bena Levi nabo ni Yeshua mwana Asania, elyo na Binui uwa mu lupwa lwa bena Henadadi, Kadimieli," 
Nehemiah10:10 elyo na bamunyinabo: Shebania, Hodia, Kelita, Pelaia na Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rehobi na Hashabia," 
Nehemiah10:12 Sakuri, Sherebia na Shebania," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia, Bani elyo na Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Kabili intungulushi sha bantu nasho shali ni Paroshi, Pahati Moabu, Elamu, Satu na Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Asigadi, na Bebayi," 
Nehemiah10:16 Adoniya, Bigifai na Adini," 
Nehemiah10:17 Ateri, Hesekia na Asuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia, Hashumu, na Basayi," 
Nehemiah10:19 Harifu, Anatoti na Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magipyashi, Meshulamu na Hesiri," 
Nehemiah10:21 Meshesabeli, Sadoki na Yadua," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatiya, Hanani na Anania," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosheya, Hananiya na Hashuba," 
Nehemiah10:24 Haloheshi, Piliha na Shobeki," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehumu, Hashabana na Maaseya," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahiya, Hanani na Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluki, Harimu elyo na Baanaya." 
Nehemiah10:28 Elyo pali na bantu bambi pamo nga bashimapepo, abena Levi, bakalinda wa mpongolo, bakemba, ababomfi be Tempele, na bonsefye abatalwike ku benafyalo pakukonka amafunde yakwa Yawe. Kabili bali pamo pene na bakashi babo pamo na bana babo abaume na banakashi bene. Bonsefye abali ne myaka yakucenjela no kwiluka ifintu abene." 
Nehemiah10:29 Bauminkana pamo na bamunyinabo, abasambashi babo, ilyo balelaya pakuitipwila, na mukulapa ukukonka amafunde yakwa Lesa ayo apeele ku kanwa kakwa Mose umubomfi wakwa Lesa. Twasuminishanya capamo ukubeela bwino amafunde, ifipope na malango yonse ayakwa Yawe, Imfumu yesu." 
Nehemiah10:30 Twalapa ukukanaufya abana besu abanakashi ku bana ba benafyalo abatushinguluka, nangu ukufwaya abana babo ukuupwa ku bana besu abaume." 
Nehemiah10:31 Nga cakuti abantu mu calo baleta ifyakushitisha nangufye ifyakulya ifya misango misango, tatwakatale atushitako nga cakuti baleta pa bushiku bwe Sabata, nangufye ni pa bushiku bwamushilo bumbi. Eico kanshi lyonsefye ilyo umwaka wa cine lubali wafika, tuli nokuleka umushili ukubafye elyo no kufuuta ifyamisha fyonse." 
Nehemiah10:32 Kabili twaipeela ne fyebo ifyakuti cila mwaka twakulapeela ulupiya lumo ulwakwafwa mukubomba imilimo ya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu. 
Nehemiah10:33 Twasumina ukupeela ifyakubomba ku mukate wakutuula, imituulo ya cabunga iya pe na pe, ilambo lya cakoca, imituulo ya pa Masabata, iya pa mweshi uupya, iyakubomfya pa nshikunkulu, kabili ku fyabupe ifyamushilo elyo na ku mituulo ya pa fyabubifi iyakufutila abena Israeli, elyo na pa fya milimo yonse iya pa ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Ifwe nga bashimapepo, abena Levi, elyo na bantu bonse natucita icipendwilo cakwishiba ifyo aba muli cila lupwa bali nokupeela inkuni ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu pa nshita iyasontwa mu mwaka no mwaka. Ishi ni nkuni shakukosha pa bulambo bwakwa Yawe, Lesa wesu, pamo ngefyo calembwa mu mafunde." 
Nehemiah10:35 Kabili twalaile ukulaleta ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe iŋanu shakubalilapo mukulobolola, pamo ne fitwalo fyakubalilapo ukupya fyonse." 
Nehemiah10:36 Pamo ngefyo mu cine cinefye calembwa mu mafunde, twakulaleta amabeli ya bana besu pamo na mabeli ya ŋombe shesu, amabeli ya mbushi na ya mpaanga shesu no kufitwala ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu no kupeela kuli bashimapepo ababomba kulya kwine." 
Nehemiah10:37 Kabili tukatwalila bashimapepo mu miputule ya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu ifyawamisha mu fintu tupeela mu fitwalo fya muti onse, mu mwangashi upya na mu mafuta. Tukatwalila abena Levi icapekumi conse pafyo umushili ukabwesha. Pantu abena Levi ebapitamo abene mu misumba yonse iya bulimi bwesu mukupoka icapekumi." 
Nehemiah10:38 Elyo shimapepo, umwana wakwa Aroni, akaya na bena Levi pakupoka icapekumi. Kabili abena Levi bakafumyapo ku fyapekumi icipande cimo pekumi limo no kutwala ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu ku miputule yamukati, emukutila mu butala." 
Nehemiah10:39 Pantu abena Israeli na bena Levi bali nokulaleta ifya mutuulo wa nseke, uwa mwangashi upya no wa mafuta. Ifi fyonse fikaletwa ku miputule bafisungilako, nakabili uko bashimapepo na bakalinda ba ku mpongolo pamo na bakemba bekala. Kabili tatwakalekeleshe iŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu nakalya." 
Nehemiah11:1 Nomba ilyo intungulushi sha bantu shaile ikala mu Yerusalemu, elyo abantu bonse bacitile ukubapendwilafye pakuti basale umo mu lupwa pa bali ikumi uwakwikala mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, icifulo camushilo. Lelo bonse abashala ukulingana ne mpendwa ya pabula bali nokutwalilila ukwikala mu misumba yabo iyo balefwaya." 
Nehemiah11:2 Abantu nabo batashishe nganshi aba bonse abaume abaile ikala mu musumba wa Yerusalemu mukuitemenwa. 
Nehemiah11:3 Ishi e ntungulushi sha mu fitungu fya calo ishaikala mu Yerusalemu na mu misumba ya bena Yuda. Nomba bamo abena Israeli, bashimapepo, abena Levi, ababomfi be tempele pamo na bana ba babomfi bakwa Solomoni baleikala mu misumba ya mu Yuda. Onse mu mpanga yakwe." 
Nehemiah11:4 Lelo abantu bambi abafumine mu lupwa lwakwa Yuda na Benjamini, bena baleikala mu Yerusalemu. Aba ebali ku luko lwakwa Yuda: Ataya mwana Usia, umwana mwaume wakwa Sakaria, umwana mwaume wakwa Amaria, umwana mwaume wakwa Shefatiya, umwana mwaume wakwa Mahalale, umwana wakwa Peresi." 
Nehemiah11:5 Kabili na umbi ni Maaseya umwana mwaume wakwa Baruki, umwana mwaume wakwa Koli Hose, umwana mwaume wakwa Hasaiya, umwana mwaume wakwa Adaiya, umwana mwaume wakwa Yoyaribu, umwana mwaume wakwa Sakaria, umwana mwaume uwa mwina Shiloni." 
Nehemiah11:6 Eico bonse abana baume abakwa Peresi abaikele mu Yerusalemu bali imyanda ine na makumi mutanda na cine konse konse (468). 
Nehemiah11:7 Elyo nakabili, aba ebali mu luko lwakwa Benjamini: Salu umwana mwaume wakwa Meshulamu, umwana mwaume wakwa Yoedi, umwana mwaume wakwa Pedaiya, umwana mwaume wakwa Kolaya, umwana mwaume wakwa Maaseya, umwana mwaume wakwa Itieli uwali e mwana mwaume wakwa Yeshaiya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Elyo panuma yakwe ni Gabayi na Salayi elyo bonse pamo bafikile pa myanda pabula na makumi yabili na cine konse konse (928). 
Nehemiah11:9 Elyo Yoeli umwana mwaume wakwa Sikiri ewalebangalila. Elyo Yuda nao, mwana Hasenuya ewali uwacibili mu musumba." 
Nehemiah11:10 Nga twaisa kuli bashimapepo: Ni Yedaiya umwana mwaume wakwa Yoyaribu, Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya umwana mwaume wakwa Hilikiya, umwana mwaume wakwa Meshulamu, umwana mwaume wakwa Sadoki, umwana mwaume wakwa Merayoti, umwana mwaume wakwa Ahitubi uwali e ntungulushi ya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
Nehemiah11:12 Ababwananyina bambi ababombeleko imilimo kwi Tempele bali imyanda cine konse konse na makumi yabili na babili (822). Kabili kwali na Adaiya umwana mwaume wakwa Yerohamu, umwana mwaume wakwa Pelaliya, umwana mwaume wakwa Amusi, umwana mwaume wakwa Sakaria, umwana mwaume wakwa Pashuri uwali e mwana mwaume wakwa Malikiya." 
Nehemiah11:13 Ena pamo na bamunyina abali intungulushi sha mayanda ya bashibo bali imyanda ibili na makumi yane na babili (242). Elyo kwali Amashayi umwana mwaume wakwa Asareli, umwana mwaume wakwa Ahisayi, umwana mwaume wakwa Meshilemoti uwali e mwana mwaume wakwa Imeri." 
Nehemiah11:14 Ababwananyina bakwe, amalamba yabo, bali umwanda umo na makumi yabili na cine konse konse (128). Kabili intungulushi yabo yali ni Sabudieli umwana mwaume wakwa Hagedolimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Mu lupwa lwa bena Levi: Shemaiya umwana mwaume wakwa Ashrikamu, umwana mwaume uwakwa Hashabiya, umwana mwaume uwakwa Buni." 
Nehemiah11:16 Kabili Shabetai na Yosabadi bali ntungulushi shibili sha bena Levi ishalesakamana imilimo ya kunse ya ŋanda yakwa Lesa. 
Nehemiah11:17 Elyo kabili na Matania umwana mwaume wakwa Mika, umwana mwaume wakwa Sabidi, umwana mwaume wakwa Asafu uwaletungulula umulimo wa nyimbo shakutasha mu mapepo. Na Bakibukiya uwali uwacibili pali bandume nankwe, na Abuda umwana mwaume wakwa Shamua, umwana mwaume wakwa Galale uwali e mwana mwaume uwakwa Yedutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abena Levi abali mu musumba bonse pamo bali imyanda ibili amakumi cine konse konse na bane (284). 
Nehemiah11:19 Aba e bakalinda wa mpongolo: Akubu, Talimoni na bandume nabo abalelonda pa mpongolo bali umwanda umo na makumi cine lubali na babili (172)." 
Nehemiah11:20 Elyo abena Israeli, bashimapepo na bena Levi bambi abasheleko, baikele mu misumba yonse iya calo ca Yuda, cila muntu ku mpanga ya fikolwe fyakwe." 
Nehemiah11:21 Ababomfi be Tempele baikele mu Ofeli na mu Siha, kabili Gishipa ewalebatungulula." 
Nehemiah11:22 Uwaletungulula abena Levi bonse mu Yerusalemu ni Usi umwana mwaume uwakwa Bani, umwana mwaume wakwa Hashabiya, umwana mwaume wakwa Matania uwali e mwana mwaume wakwa Mika. Usi ali ni umo mu ba lupwa lwakwa Asafu, abaletungulula bakemba ababomba mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
Nehemiah11:23 Kwali icebo icafumine ku mfumu pali bakemba icakubapeela ifyo babapimine ifyalekabilwa cila bushiku. 
Nehemiah11:24 Elyo Petaya umwana mwaume wakwa Meshesabeli, uwali umo mu ba lupwa lwakwa Sera, mu luko lwakwa Yuda, aleafwilisha imfumu mu milandu yonse iya bantu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Kanshi palwa mishi na mabala yaiko, bamo Abayuda baikele mu Kiriati Aba mu mishi yali mumbali, mu Diboni ne mishi yauko elyo na mu Yekabiseli ne mishi yauko," 
Nehemiah11:26 na mu Yeshua, na mu Molada, na mu Beti Peleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 mu Hasari Shuali, mu Beresheba ne mishi yauko," 
Nehemiah11:28 mu Sikilagi, mu Mekona ne mishi yauko," 
Nehemiah11:29 mu Eni Rimoni, mu Sora, mu Yamuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 mu Sanoa na mu Adulamu ne mishi yaiko, mu Lakishi na mabala yalimo, no musumba wa Aseka ne mishi yauko. Kanshi baikele mu ncende ukufuma ku Beresheba ukufika mu mupokapoka wa Hinomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Abantu bakwa Benjamini abafumine ku Geba baikele mu Mikimashi, Aiya, Betele ne mishi yaiko," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anatoti, Nobu, Anania." 
Nehemiah11:33 Hasoli, Rama, Gitaimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadidi, Seboimu, Nebalati," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lodi na Ono, mwishika umwaleikala abantu abacenjela mu fyakupanga panga." 
Nehemiah11:36 Impuka shimo isha bena Levi mu Yuda shaikele ku Benjamini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Aba e bashimapepo na bena Levi ababwelele na Serubabeli umwana mwaume uwakwa Shealitieli, na Yeshua: Seraya, Yeremia, Esra," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluku, Hatushi," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekaniya, Reumu, Meremoti," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginetoi, Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamini, Maadiya, Biliga" 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaiya, Yoaribu, Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amoki, Hilikiya, Yedaya. Aba ebali bashimapepo bakalamba pali bashimapepo bonse na bamunyinabo mu nshita yakwa Yeshua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Abena Levi nabo ni Yeshua, Binui, Kadimieli, Sherebiya, Yuda na Matania uwali umukalamba wa bakatungulula wa nyimbo shakutasha pamo na bamunyinabo." 
Nehemiah12:9 Elyo Bakibukiya na Uni na bamunyinabo bena baleiminina nabaloleshanya amenso nabo ilyo baleimba. 
Nehemiah12:10 Kanshi Yeshua afyele Yoiakimu, Yoiakimu afyele Eliashibu, Eliashibu afyele Yoiyada." 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoiyada e wishi wakwa Yonatani nao e wishi wakwa Yadua. 
Nehemiah12:12 Mu nshiku shakwa Yoiakimu bashimapepo abali abakalamba ba ndupwa sha bashimapepo ni aba: Meraya uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Seraya. Hanania uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Yeremia," 
Nehemiah12:13 Meshulamu uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Esra, Yehoanani uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Amaria," 
Nehemiah12:14 Yonatani uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Maluku, Yosefu uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Shekaniya," 
Nehemiah12:15 Adena uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Harimu, Helikai uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Merayoti," 
Nehemiah12:16 Sakaria uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Ido, Meshulamu uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Ginetoni," 
Nehemiah12:17 Sikiri uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Abiya, Pilitai uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Minamini na Moadiya," 
Nehemiah12:18 Shamua uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Biliga, Yehonatani uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Shemaiya," 
Nehemiah12:19 Matenai uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Yoiaribu, Usi uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:20 Kalai uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Salai, Eberi uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Amoki," 
Nehemiah12:21 Hashabiya uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Hilikiya, Netaneli uwa mu lupwa lwakwa Yedaya." 
Nehemiah12:22 Mu nshiku shakwa Eliashibu, Yoiyada, Yoanani na Yadua amashina ya bakalamba mu ŋanda sha fikolwe fyabo yalilembwa, pamo pene na ya bakalamba ba bashimapepo, mpakafye na mu buteeko bwakwa Dariusi umwina Pesia." 
Nehemiah12:23 Elyo abena Levi bena, abakalamba mu mayanda ya fikolwe fyabo balilembelwe mu citabo camilandu ukushintafye na pa nshiku shakwa Yoanani umwana mwaume wakwa Eliashibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Intungulushi sha bena Levi shali ni Hashabiya, Sherebiya na Yeshua umwana mwaume uwakwa Kadimieli, na bamunyinabo nabo baleiminina nabaloleshanya nabo pakwimba inyimbo sha malumbo no kutasha, ukulingana na mafunde yakwa Davidi umuntu wakwa Lesa. Amabumba yaleimba yabili pa nshita imo, nabaloleshanya baleankulana." 
Nehemiah12:25 Elyo kwali na balelinda amayanda yakusungilamo ifipe, bakalinda wa mpongolo. Amashina yabo ni aya: Matania, Bakibukiya, Obadia, Meshulamu, Talimoni na Akubu." 
Nehemiah12:26 Ifi fyacitike mu nshiku shakwa Yoiakimu umwana mwaume wakwa Yeshua umwishikulu wakwa Yosadaki, na mu nshiku sha mulashi Nehemia na shimapepo kabili kalemba Esra." 
Nehemiah12:27 Kanshi ilyo nshita yafikile iyakuti batuule ilinga lya musumba wa mu Yerusalemu kuli Lesa, bafwaile abena Levi abali mu ncende shimbi no kubaleta ku Yerusalemu pakuti basefye ne nsansa, no kutasha konse mu nyimbo, imiwaya, amaseese ne nsango pakutuula ilinga." 
Nehemiah12:28 Elyo bakemba balongana pamo ukufuma mu ncende iyashingulwike Yerusalemu ne mishi ya bena Netofa. 
Nehemiah12:29 Bambi bafumine ku Beti Giligali na ku ncende ya ku Geba na Asimafeti pantu bakemba bakuulile imishi yabo ukushinguluka Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah12:30 Elyo bashimapepo na bena Levi baisangulula abene, basangulula na bantu, basangulula impongolo pamo ne linga." 
Nehemiah12:31 Kanshi naeba intungulushi sha bena Yuda ukunina pa mulu we linga. Nasonta na mabumba ya bakemba yabili ayakulu ukuti yengile mu milongo ibili, limo ibumba lyaile ku kapinda ka ku kulyo kwe linga ku Mpongolo ya Fisoso." 
Nehemiah12:32 Lilya bapita elyo pakonka Hoshaya ali na citika wa ntungulushi sha bena Yuda," 
Nehemiah12:33 pamo na Asariya, Esra, Meshulamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yuda, Benjamini, Shemaiya na Yeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 na bana ba bashimapepo bamo bamo baisa na mapenga, ni Sakaria umwana mwaume wakwa Yonatani, umwana mwaume wakwa Shemaiya, umwana mwaume wakwa Mataniya, umwana mwaume wakwa Mikaiya, umwana mwaume wakwa Sakuri uwali umwana wakwa Asafu." 
Nehemiah12:36 Ba lupwa lwakwe bali ni Shemaiya, Asareli, Milalai, Gilalai, Mai, Netaneli, Yuda na Hanani abalelisha inyimbo pa filimba umo Davidi umuntu wakwa Lesa apekanishishe. Elyo Esra kalemba alibatangilile." 
Nehemiah12:37 Cilya bafika pa Mpongolo ya Kamfukumfuku, banina amatabo ayalola ku musumba wakwa Davidi ukucila isano lyakwa Davidi, elyo balungama ku cibumba ca Mpongolo ya Menshi lubali lwa ku kabanga ka musumba." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ibumba limbi ilya bakemba lyalungama ku masamba. Na ine nalikonka panuma pamulu we linga, twali ne bumba lya bantu citika. Twaenda ukupita pa Lupungu lwa Malungu, ukulola kwilinga ilyamutika," 
Nehemiah12:39 pa mulu wa Mpongolo yakwa Efulemu, ne Mpongolo yakwa Yeshana, Impongolo ye Sabi, na pa Lupungu lwa Hananeli, Ulupungu lwa Mwanda umo (100) ukushinta na ku Mpongolo ya Mpaanga. Twasuka twafika na ku Mpongolo yakwa Malonda." 
Nehemiah12:40 Elyo amabumba ya bakemba yabili ayakulumbanya Lesa yaiminina pa ncende shabo mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Na ine wine pamo na citika wa ntungulushi twali nasho twaimina," 
Nehemiah12:41 twali pamo na bashimapepo abali na mapenga. Amashina yabo ni aya: Eliakimu, Maaseya, Miniamini, Mikaya, Elioenai, Sakaria na Hanania abali na mapenga," 
Nehemiah12:42 elyo pamo na Maaseya, Shemaiya, Eleasa, Usi, Yehoanani, Malikiya, Elamu, na Eseri. Bakemba baletungululwa na Yesiraya." 
Nehemiah12:43 Kanshi pali ubo bushiku batuula Lesa amalumbo ayengi nganshi no kusansamuka. Balisansamwike pantu Lesa ewabapeele ishi nsansa ishishaifulila. Banamayo pamo pene na bana balisansamwike. Ne ciunda ca nsansa ishali mu Yerusalemu caumfwikike ukutali nganshi. 
Nehemiah12:44 Pa nshita ine ilya basonta abantu bashifwe abakwangalila amatala umo balesungila umutuulo wa ŋanda yakwa Lesa, ukulundapofye no mutuulo wa cekumi pamo ne fisabo fyakubalilapo. Aba bantu ebalelonganika ifyamutuulo ukufuma mu mabala ayashingulwike imisumba no kufibika mu matala, ukulingana ne fipimo fyakukonka amafunde palwa kupeela kuli bashimapepo na ku bena Levi, pantu abena Yuda balisekelemo mu milimo ya batumishi iyo bashimapepo na bena Levi balebomba." 
Nehemiah12:45 Balebomba umulimo wakutumika Lesa no kusangulula. Bakemba na bakalinda wa mpongolo nabo bene efyo balecita ukulingana nefyo Davidi no mwana wakwe Solomoni babakonkomeshe. 
Nehemiah12:46 Na kale line mu nshiku shakwa Davidi na Asafu kwali ntungulushi sha bakemba ne nyimbo shakulumbanya no kutatakula Lesa. 
Nehemiah12:47 Kabili na mu nshiku shakwa Serubabeli na Nehemia, abena Israeli bonse baletuula ifyapimwa kuli bakemba na bakalinda wa mpongolo. Kabili balipatwileko umutuulo umo uwali wa bena Levi bambi, elyo na bena Levi bapatwilapo aba mu lupwa lwakwa Aroni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Pa bushiku ubo epo babelengele icitabo cakwa Mose pa lwalala mu matwi ya bantu. Bafikile apo calembwa ukuti tecakwesha ukusankana no mwina Amoni nangu umwina Moabu mu lukuta lwakwa Lesa," 
Nehemiah13:2 pantu aba bantu tabapokelele abana bakwa Israeli no kubapeela ifyakulya na menshi lelo balipile Balamu pakuti abatipwile. Nomba Lesa ena ayalula icitipu ukuba ipaalo. 
Nehemiah13:3 Ilyo abantu baumfwile ili funde, bafumya abenafyalo bonse mwibumba lya bena Israeli." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ilyo ifi tafilati ficitike, Eliashibu shimapepo aleangalila imiputule balesungilamo ifintu mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Eliashibu ali wa mu lupwa lwakwa Tobia," 
Nehemiah13:5 kanshi apekanishishe Tobia umuputule uukalamba nganshi uo pakubala balebomfya ukubikamo umutuulo wa cabunga, icinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icanunka ubusaka, ne fipe fya mwi Tempele pamo pene ne cekumi icabunga, umwangashi upya na mafuta baletuula ukwafwilisha abena Levi, bakemba, bakalinda wa mpongolo, pamo nefyo batuula kuli bashimapepo." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ukuba kwena ilyo ifi fyonse fyalecitika nshali mu Yerusalemu iyoo, pantu mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na ibili (32) uwa bufumu bwakwa Atakisesi imfumu ya ku Babiloni nalibwelelemo ku mfumu ku Babiloni kwine. Lelo panuma ya nshita nalilombele insambu ku mfumu nabwelulukila ku Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah13:7 Elyo naishile umfwa icilubo Eliashibu acitile pakupeela Tobia umuputule mu lubansa lwa ŋanda yakwa Lesa. 
Nehemiah13:8 Nalifulilwe nganshi no kuposa panse ifipe fyakwa Tobia fyonse ifyali mu muputule. 
Nehemiah13:9 Elyo napeela icebo icakuti imiputule yonse isangululwe, no kubwekeshamo ifipe balebomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa, pamo pene ne mituulo ya cabunga ne cinyamuti ca fulankinisenshi icanunka ubusaka." 
Nehemiah13:10 Kabili nalimwene nokuti icipande capekumi bali nokulapeela abena Levi, tabalebapeela, elyo nokuti abena Levi na bakemba abali no mulimo wakutumika mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa balileka ukubomba, babwelela na mukubomba mu mabala yabo." 
Nehemiah13:11 Kanshi nakalipila intungulushi no kubepusha ukuti, “Cinshi iŋanda yakwa Lesa yabela iyalekeleshiwa?” Elyo nabalonganike pamo no kubabwekesha mu fifulo balipo nakale." 
Nehemiah13:12 Abena Yuda bonse epakuleta umutuulo wa cekumi uwabunga, umwangashi upya na mafuta mu miputule." 
Nehemiah13:13 Napeele Shelemiya shimapepo, Sadoki kalemba no mwina Levi uo baleita Pedaya umulimo uwakusunga imiputule yakusungilamo ifintu. Elyo Hanani umwana mwaume uwakwa Sakuri, umwishikulu wakwa Matania, namucita kafwa wabo, pantu aba bantu bali abacishinka. Elyo kabili wali mulimo wabo ukwakanya ifintu kuli bamunyina." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ulenjibukisha we Lesa wandi pali ici, wileka ifyo mombele mu bufumacumi palwa ŋanda yakwa Lesa wandi ne mipepele yakwe fyonaike." 
Nehemiah13:15 Muli shilya nshiku namwene abaume aba mu calo ca Bayuda balenyanta icakukaminamo umwangashi pa bushiku bwe Sabata. Kabili nabalonga iŋanu pali bakabalwe pamo no mwangashi ne fitwalo fya myangashi, imikunyu na fimbipo baleleta fyonse ifi mu Yerusalemu pe Sabata. Kanshi nabakalipila pakulashitisha ifyakulya pali ubu bushiku." 
Nehemiah13:16 Kabili abaume abafumine ku Turi abaleikala mu Yerusalemu nabo baleleta isabi ne fintu fimbi ifyamakwebo no kushitisha mu Yerusalemu ku bantu ba mu calo ca Yuda pa bushiku bwe Sabata. 
Nehemiah13:17 Elyo naebaula na basambashi ba mu calo ca Yuda natila, “Cinshi mulecitila icabipisha ifi, mwakowesha ubushiku bwe Sabata." 
Nehemiah13:18 Bushe bashinwe tabacitile ica musango umo wine pakuti Lesa alete amafya pali ifwe no musumba? Kabili imwe mulelundako pakukowesha Isabata pakuti ubukali buponene Israeli.” 
Nehemiah13:19 Kanshi elyo payambile ukufiita, icungulo, pa mpongolo sha Yerusalemu ilyo Isabata talilati lifike, napeela icebo icakuti ifiibi fyonse fisalwe, kabili takuli kufiisula mpakafye panuma ye Sabata. Elyo nabika ababomfi bandi pa mpongolo pakuti ifipe nangu fimo fiingila mu Yerusalemu pe Sabata." 
Nehemiah13:20 Limo limo bashimakwebo na bakashitisha ba fyakulya ifyalekana lekana balesendama kunse ya Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah13:21 Lelo nalibasokele nati, “Cinshi mulesendamina mupepi ne linga ubushiku? Nga mwabwekeshapo nakabili nkamulopola.” Ukufuma palya pene tabatalile abesa pe Sabata." 
Nehemiah13:22 Elyo napeela abena Levi icebo icakuti baisangulule kabili baye mukulonda impongolo epakushininkisha ukuti Isabata lilesungwa muli bukaele. Ulenjibukisha pali ici we Lesa wandi, unange uluse lobe ukulingana ne citemwiko cobe icishaikulila." 
Nehemiah13:23 Kabili mu nshiku shine isho namwene ukuti Abayuda baupile banamayo ukufuma ku bena Ashidodi, abena Amoni na bena Moabu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Na bana bafyelwe muli ifi fyupo, citika balelanda icitundu ca bena Ashidodi, nangu ululimi lwa bantufye bambi. Tabaishibe no kulanda ululimi lwa Ciyuda nakalya." 
Nehemiah13:25 Kanshi nabakalipila no kubatipwila. Nasuka naumapo nabamo no kubanukula umushishi. Nabeba nokuti bafwile balapa umulapo mwishina lyakwa Lesa ukuti, “Imwe tamwakatale amuufya abana benu abakashana ku bana ba muli iyi mitundu, nangu ukusuminisha abana benu abaume, nangu imwe bene, ukuupa abakashana ba mishobo imbi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Bushe te fyupo fya musango uyu efyalengele ukuti Solomoni mfumu ya bena Israeli acite icabubifi? Mu fyalo fyonse takwali imfumu iyali nga ena. Ali uwatemwikwa kuli Lesa, kabili Lesa amucitile imfumu ya calo ca Israeli conse. Nomba pa mulandu wa banamayo abafumine ku mishobo imbi ecalengele ukuti acite icabubifi." 
Nehemiah13:27 Nshilefwaya ukumfwa ukuti na imwe mwaibika mu misango iyi iyabipisha, nokutila mulesangukila Lesa wesu pakuupa banamayo abafuma ku mishobo imbi.”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Umo pa bana bakwa Yehoiyada, umwishikulu wakwa Eliashibu shimapepo mukalamba, ali ni shifyala wakwa Sanibalati umwina Holo, nalimutamfishe ukufuma kuli ine." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ibukisha aba bantu, we Lesa wandi, pantu balikowesha bushimapepo ne cipangano ca bushimapepo neca bwina Levi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Kanshi efyo nasangulwile bashimapepo na bena Levi kuli fyonse ifyafuma ku benafyalo, no kubapeela incito shabo, cila muntu no mulimo wakwe." 
Nehemiah13:31 Nateyanya nokuti pa nshita ishapimwa baleleta umutuulo wa nkuni ne fitwalo fyakubalilapo. Ulenjibukisha pakumpeela ishuko, we Lesa wandi." 
Esther1:1 Ifi fintu fyacitike mu nshiku shakwa Asuelusi, uwateekele mu fitungu umwanda umo na makumi yabili na cine lubali (127) ukutula ku India ukufika ku Kushi." 
Esther1:2 Mu nshiku shilya imfumu Asuelusi ali pa cipuna cabufumu mu musumba wa Susa. 
Esther1:3 Elyo mu mwaka walenga butatu uwa buteko bwakwe acitila bamushika na babomfi bakwe bonse imitebeto. Abakalamba ba fita fyakwe ifya ku Pesia na Media, elyo na bacilolo na bakankala aba mu fitungu eko bali." 
Esther1:4 Kanshi alangisha ifyuma fya bufumu bwakwe ubwa lulumbi, ubucindami no bukata ubwa bufumu bwakwe, pa nshiku ukulingana umwanda umo na makumi cine konse konse (180)." 
Esther1:5 Panuma ya ishi inshiku, imfumu yacitila abantu bonse abali mu musumba ukalamba uwa Susa umutebeto uwa nshiku cine lubali, abakankala na balanda bene. Imitebeto iyi bapekanishishe mu lubansa ulwali mwibala lye sano lya mfumu." 
Esther1:6 Kwaliko ne nsalu ishabuuta ne shacifufya isho bacingileko ishaleselela. Bashikulikile ku tumyando twa nsalu ishatelela isha kolokondwe wabuuta no wakashikila, bakofya ku tumipeto twa silifa uto bakakile ku fyaimikwa ifya mabwe ayakulungilwa bwino aya marbo. Ifyakukuwamapo ifya golide na silifa fyena bafyanshile mu lukungu ulwateleshiwa no tumabwe utusuma nganshi, utwakashika porfuli, no twa marbo, no twa magariti no tumabwe tumbi utwauma umutengo." 
Esther1:7 Ifyakunwa fyena balefinwena mu tumakapu utwa golide, utwa misango iyalekana lekana, no mwangashi uwa kwisano walifulile kabili baliupeele ku bantufye bonse ukulingana no kufwaya kwa mfumu." 
Esther1:8 Ukulingana ne fyakonkomeshe imfumu, abalalikwe bonse balipeelwe insambu ishakunwa ifyo batemenwe, pantu imfumu yaebele ababomfi ba kwisano ukupeela abantu fyonse ifyo cila muntu alefwaya ukunwa." 
Esther1:9 Namfumu Fashiti nao apekanishisha banamayo imitebeto mwisano lya mfumu Asuelusi. 
Esther1:10 Pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali ico imfumu yasansamuka pa mulandu wa mwangashi yalenwa, yaeba Meumani, Bisita, Habona, Bigita, Abagita, Seta na Kakasi, bamutungwi cine lubali abaletumika pa cinso ca mfumu Asuelusi," 
Esther1:11 ukuya buula namfumu Fashiti pakuti ese nafwala icisote ca bunamfumu no kwisa ilanga ku bantu ifyo ayemba pantu ali umusuma nganshi. 
Esther1:12 Nomba namfumu ena akaana amashiwi imfumu yatumine bamutungwi ukuya mweba. Pali ici, imfumu yafulilwe icibi, yalabilimafye ku cipyu." 
Esther1:13 Elyo imfumu yalanda na bampandamano waiko, pantu cali musango baleputwilamo imilandu ukwitako abacenjela mukuputula imilandu." 
Esther1:14 Abo imfumu yaishibishe nganshi ni aba: Kashena, Sheta, Adimata, Tashishi, Meresi, Marisena na Memukani, bacilolo cine lubali abafumine ku Pesia na Media abo imfumu yalemona libili libili, abaleikala pa fipuna ifya pantanshi ifyabufumu." 
Esther1:15 Yasosa aiti, “Ukulingana ne funde, finshi twingacita pali ifi namfumu Fashiti akaana ukubeela amashiwi imfumu Asuelusi amutumine ukupitila muli bamutungwi?”" 
Esther1:16 Elyo Memukani, pa cinso ca mfumu na bacilolo, ayasuka ati, “Uyu namfumu Fashiti talufyenye ku mfumu yeka iyoo, lelo nalufyanya na kuli bacilolo bene na ku bantufye bonse abekala mu fitungu fyonse ifya mfumu Asuelusi." 
Esther1:17 Pantu ificitile namfumu ilyo fyaishibikwa kuli banamayo bonse, kuti baleka ukumfwila abalume babo. Balasosa ukuti, ‘Apo imfumu Asuelusi alipeele icebo icakwita namfumu Fashiti ukwisa pa cinso caiko, lelo alikene.’" 
Esther1:18 Lelo line banamayo ba ku Pesia na Media abomfwile imibeele yakwa namfumu, balaeba bacilolo ba mfumu cimo cine. Kanshi imisuula ne cipyu fikatwalilila." 
Esther1:19 Nga kuti casansamusha imfumu, kaileke balembe icebo mu mafunde ya bena Pesia na Media pakuti bekacalula ukuti, ‘Fashiti takatale amoneka nakabili pa cinso ca mfumu Asuelusi. Lekeni mfumu ipeele bunamfumu ku muntu uumucilile ubusuma.’" 
Esther1:20 Pakuti ilyo ici cebo ca mfumu cikeshibikwa mu calo cakwe conse icishaikulila, banamayo bonse bakalacindika abalume babo abakankala na balanda bene.”" 
Esther1:21 Ili funde lyasekesha imfumu na bacilolo. Imfumu yacita ngomo mwine Memukani aipandileko amano. 
Esther1:22 Atuma amakalata ku fitungu fyonse ifya bufumu bwakwe ukulingana no lulimi ulwaba muli cila citungu ukutila umwaume onse e mukalamba wa mu ŋanda yakwe. 
Esther2:1 Panuma ya ifi fyonse, elyo icipyu ca mfumu Asuelusi capwa, aibukisha Fashiti paco acitile nefyo bamupingwile." 
Esther2:2 Elyo ababomfi ba mfumu abaleitumika basosa abati, “Fwaileni imfumu abakashana banacisungu abasuma." 
Esther2:3 Imfumu isale bacilolo mu fitungu fyonse ifya calo cakwe abakulonganika abakashana banacisungu no kubaleta ku ŋanda ya banakashi ba mfumu iyaba mu musumba wa Susa. Aba bakashana bakalasungwa na Hegai mutungwi umubomfi wa kwisano uwaleyangalila abanakashi ba mfumu. Babapeele na mafuta na tumbi utwakuti bamoneka bwino. 
Esther2:4 Pali aba bakashana, uukasekesha imfumu eukapyana namfumu Fashiti.” Ici casansamwishe imfumu, no kucita efyo yacitile." 
Esther2:5 Kanshi mu musumba wa Susa mwali Umuyuda umo ishina lyakwe ni Modekai umwana wakwa Yairi, umwana wakwa Shimei, umwana wakwa Kishi, umwina Benjamini," 
Esther2:6 uwali pa basha basendele ukufuma ku Yerusalemu pamo na Yekoniya imfumu ya ku Yuda uo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni asendele. 
Esther2:7 Modekai alesunga Hadasa, umufyala wakwe, pantu takwete wishi na nyina. Umukashana uwaishibikwa ne shina Esta, alikwete icata icisuma nganshi kabili uwaemba, ne cinso cakwe icisuma. Ilyo wishi na nyina bafwile, Modekai amubuula alamusunga ngo mwana wakwe." 
Esther2:8 Kanshi ilyo babilishe imbila ne cebo ca mfumu, abakashana abengi babalonganika mu musumba wa Susa, balasungwa na Hegai. Esta nao balimusendele kwisano lya mfumu no kumubika mu minwe yakwa Hegai, uwaleangalila abaleikala ku ŋanda ya banakashi ba mfumu." 
Esther2:9 Esta awamina Hegai, nao amutemwa. Ecalengele ukuti mukwangufyanya amupeela ifyakumuyemfya ne fyakulya ali nokupoka. Kabili amupeela na bakashana abatumishi cine lubali abo asalile ukufuma mwisano lya mfumu, atwala Esta na bakashana bakwe ku muputule uusuma mu ŋanda ya banakashi ba mfumu," 
Esther2:10 Esta tasokolwele abantu bakwe nangu ulupwa lwakwe pantu Modekai alimukonkomeshe ukukanasokolola. 
Esther2:11 Cila bushiku Modekai aleendauka mupepi no lubansa lwa ŋanda ya banakashi ba mfumu pakuti eshibe ifilecitika kuli Esta. 
Esther2:12 Kanshi inshita yasuka yafika iyakuti cila mukashana aye ku mfumu Asuelusi. Ici cacitike panuma ya mweshi ikumi limo na ibili (12) ukulingana ne cebo ca banamayo. Imyeshi yakuipekanya yali ngefi: Imyeshi mutanda abakashana balesuba amafuta aya cinyamuti icanunka ubusaka muri, elyo imyeshi imbi mutanda mafuta yambi ayacena icisuma na fimbi ifyo banamayo balebomfya pakuiwamya." 
Esther2:13 Ilyo umukashana aleya ku mfumu ukufuma mu ŋanda ya banakashi ba mfumu, bali nokumupeela fyonse ifyo alefwaya ukusenda pakuya kwisano lya mfumu." 
Esther2:14 Afwile ukwingila icungulo elyo akacelo afuma aya mu ŋanda iyabubili iyo balesungilamo abanakashi ba mfumu. Uwalesunga iyi ŋanda ni Sha Ashigasi, mutungwi uwaleangalila abakashi ba mfumu abashaupilwe mu bwinga. Umukashana teti abwelele ku mfumu nakabili kanofye imfumu nga yamutemwa lyena kuti yamwita mwishina." 
Esther2:15 Elyo cafikile Esta umwana umwanakashi wakwa Abihaili nalume wakwa Modekai, uwalemusunga ngo mwana wakwefye, ukuya ku mfumu. Esta talombele nangu cimo kanofye ifyo Hegai mutungwi wa mfumu, uwaleangalila banamayo amwebele. Kanshi Esta aletemwikwa kuli bonse abalemumona." 
Esther2:16 Kanshi ilyo batwele Esta ku mfumu Asuelusi mwisano lyakwe mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo, umweshi wa Tebeti mu mwaka walenga cine lubali uwa bufumu bwakwe," 
Esther2:17 imfumu yatemenwe Esta ukucila bonse abanakashi bambi. Amona ukusekelelwa no luse ku mfumu ukucila banacisungu bambi bonse. Kanshi yamufwika icisote cabunamfumu ku mutwe, yamucita namfumu pa malo yakwa Fashiti." 
Esther2:18 Elyo imfumu yacitile bacilolo na babomfi bakwe imitebeto iyikalamba. Kwena yali mitebeto yakwa Esta. Apeela ku fitungu fya calo cakwe ubushiku bwakutuusha no kupeela ifyabupe ukulingana nefyo imfumu ingapeela. 
Esther2:19 Kanshi ilyo balonganike abakashana kabili umuku wabubili, Modekai ena aikele pa mpongolo ya mfumu." 
Esther2:20 Esta tasokolwele ulupwa lwakwe nangu abantu bakwe ukulingana nefyo bamukonkomeshe kuli Modekai. Esta abeela Modekai ngefyo alemubeela ilyo alemusunga. 
Esther2:21 Mu nshiku shilya lilya Modekai aleikala pa mpongolo ya mfumu, Bigitani na Tereshi bamutungwi babili ba mfumu abalonda pa mpongolo bafulilwa imfumu, bafwaya nokwipaya imfumu Asuelusi." 
Esther2:22 Kanshi Modekai aumfwa uyu mulandu. Kabili aeba namfumu Esta. Esta nao aeba imfumu mwishina lyakwa Modekai. 
Esther2:23 Elyo bafwailisha pali uyu mulandu, basanga nokuti cishinka. Aba baume bonse babili babakulika ku fimuti. Nefi fyonse fyalilembelwe mu citabo camilandu pa cinso ca mfumu." 
Esther3:1 Panuma ya ifi fintu imfumu Asuelusi asumbula Hamani umwina Agagi, umwana wakwa Hamedata, amupeela umulimo wakwangalila bamushika banankwe bonse." 
Esther3:2 Kanshi bonse ababomfi ba mfumu abali pa mpongolo bali nokupeela Hamani umucinshi pakumwinamina, pantu e cebo imfumu yapeele. Nomba Modekai ena alikene ukulamwinamina nangu ukumupeela uyu mucinshi." 
Esther3:3 Elyo ababomfi ba mfumu abali pa mpongolo baeba Modekai ati. “Bushe cinshi ushikonkele icebo ca mfumu?” 
Esther3:4 Efyo balamweba cila bushiku nomba ena taleumfwa, alebasuka ukuti Muyuda. Basuka baeba Hamani pakuti bamone ukuti amashiwi yakwa Modekai nga yacishinka." 
Esther3:5 Ilyo Hamani amona ukuti Modekai talemwinamina nangu ukumupeela umucinshi, alifulilwe nganshi." 
Esther3:6 Nomba talefwaya ukwipaya Modekai eka iyoo. Panuma yakumweba abantu bakwa Modekai, Hamani apanga ukwipaya Abayuda bonsefye mu calo conse cakwa Asuelusi." 
Esther3:7 Mu mweshi wakubalilapo uwitwa Nisani, mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12) uwa bufumu bwakwa Asuelusi, bependula ukubomfya Puri pa cinso cakwa Hamani pakufwailisha ukwishiba ubushiku no mweshi. Kanshi cawila pa mweshi walenga ikumi limo na ibili, umweshi batila Ada." 
Esther3:8 Elyo Hamani aeba imfumu Asuelusi ati. “Kuliko abantu bamo abaipatulula abasalanganina mu bantu bobe aba mu fitungu fyonse fya bufumu bobe. Balipusana ku bantu bambi ku ntambi shabo, kabili tabakonka amafunde ya mfumu. Kanshi tacilingile ukuti imfumu isumine ukwikala na bantu ba musango uyu." 
Esther3:9 Ngakuti casansamusha imfumu, kaipange icebo icakulofya aba bantu, na ine nkapeela indalama amatalanta amakana ikumi limo (10,000) aya silifa mu minwe ya bantu abasunga icipao ca mfumu pakuti bakayabike mu cipao ca mfumu.”" 
Esther3:10 Elyo imfumu yafuule imbalaminwe yakufwatikilako no kupeela Hamani umwina Agagi umwana wakwa Hamedata, umulwani wa Bayuda." 
Esther3:11 Kabili imfumu yaeba Hamani aiti. “Indalama shalipeelwa kuli iwe pamo pene na bantu bene, kanshi ucitile umo ulefwaila.”" 
Esther3:12 Kanshi imfumu yaita bakalemba baiko pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) mu mweshi wakubalilapo ukuti balembe icebo ukulingana na fyonse ifyo Hamani alandile. Ici cebo calembelwe ku nkonkani sha mfumu shonse na balashi aba cila citungu mu calo, na ku bakalamba ba bantu bonse. Balembele ukulingana ne filembo fya cila citungu no lulimi lwa cila mutundu. Ici cebo calembelwe mwishina lya mfumu Asuelusi, pafwatikwe ne nshimbi ya mbalaminwe yakwe." 
Esther3:13 Batumine bakapaso ku fitungu fyonse ifya calo ca mfumu no kubapeela amakalata apali icebo icakonaula, ukwipaya no kulofya Abayuda bonse, abalumendo na bakalamba, banamayo na bana, ukwabula ukushapo nangu umo, no kupoka ifyuma fyabo. Ici cali nokucitika pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) ubwa mweshi walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12), umweshi batila Ada." 
Esther3:14 Icikope ca uyu kalata cali nokubilikishiwa mu fitungu fya calo fyonse nge cebo pakuti abantu bonse bakaipekanye pali ubu bushiku. 
Esther3:15 Bakapaso bwangu bwangu bakonka icipope ca mfumu, neci cebo caishibikwa mu musumba wa Susa. Elyo imfumu na Hamani bena baikele panshi balanwa no kunwa, lelo mu musumba wa Susa mwaba icimfulunganya." 
Esther4:1 Ilyo Modekai aumfwile ifyacitike fyonse, alepula insalu shakwe, afwala insalu shabulanda, aisuba ne mito. Elyo aingila mukati ka musumba no kulila umusowa ukalamba uwacililishi." 
Esther4:2 Aya fika na ku mpongolo ya mfumu. Nomba takwali umuntu nangu umo uwasuminishiwe ukwingila pa mpongolo ya mfumu nafwala insalu shabulanda. 
Esther4:3 Kanshi mu citungu conse ica calo umwafikile icipope ne cebo ca mfumu, mwali imisowa ikalamba nganshi mu Bayuda, ukufunga ukulya, ukulila no kuloosha. Elyo Abayuda abengi bafwele insalu shabulanda no kuisuba imito." 
Esther4:4 Elyo ababomfi bakwa Esta abanakashi na bamutungwi wakwe bamushimikile ifyalecitika, awe namfumu aikatwa no bulanda ubukalamba. Atumina Modekai ifyakufwala pakuti afuule insalu shabulanda, nomba ena alikene." 
Esther4:5 Elyo Esta aita Hataki, umo pali bamutungwi ba mfumu uo basalile ukumutumika, amweba ukuya kuli Modekai pakwisa mweba ifyalecitika ne calengele ukuti filecitika." 
Esther4:6 Hataki aya kuli Modekai mu lubansa lwa musumba pantanshi ya mpongolo ya mfumu. 
Esther4:7 Elyo Modekai amweba fyonse ifyamucitikile, amweba ne cipendo ca ndalama umo cabelele ico Hamani alaile ukulipila ku cipao ca mfumu pakuti onaule Abayuda." 
Esther4:8 Modekai kabili amupeela ne cikope ca cebo, icalembelwe no kusalangana mu Susa icakulofya Abayuda, pakuti aye langa Esta no kumulondolwela, no kumweba ukuti aye ku mfumu mukufwailisha ubwafwilisho, apapatileko abantu bakwe ku mfumu." 
Esther4:9 Elyo Hataki aya kuli Esta no kumweba ifyo Modekai amwebele. 
Esther4:10 Panuma yakulanda, Esta amweba ukubwelela kuli Modekai no kumweba ukuti," 
Esther4:11 “Ababomfi ba mfumu bonse na bantu bakwe mu fitungu fya calo cakwe fyonse balishiba ukuti umwaume nelyo umwanakashi uwaingila mu lubansa lwamukati kukumona imfumu ukwabula ukuti imwite, pabafye ifunde limo kumwipaya. Kanofye imfumu yatambika inkonto ya golide kuli ena, lyena kuti apusuka. Na ine wine nomba papita inshiku amakumi yatatu (30) apo imfumu yanjitile ukuya uko ili.”" 
Esther4:12 Elyo baebele Modekai ifyo Esta asosele. 
Esther4:13 Pakwasuka Esta, Modekai atile ati. “Witontonkanya ukuti ifi uli mwisano ukapusuka ku cikaponena Abayuda bambi." 
Esther4:14 Pantu iwe nga waikalafye tondolo pali ino nshita, ukupusuka no kulubuka kwa Bayuda kulefuma ku ncende imbi, lelo iwe no lupwa lwa bawiso mukaloba. Kuti twaishiba shani limbi eco wabelele namfumu pakuti wafwilishe pa nshita iyaba ngeyi?”" 
Esther4:15 Mukwasuka Modekai, Esta amweba ati," 
Esther4:16 “Kabiye ulonganike Abayuda bonse abekala mu Susa no kubeba ukuti bakamfungileko pa nshiku shitatu akasuba no bushiku ukwabula ukulya no kunwa amenshi. Na ine wine na babomfi bandi banamayo tukafunga nga imwe. Panuma yakufunga elyo nkaya ku mfumu, nangu line nkatoba icebo. Nga kufwa, kankafwe!”" 
Esther4:17 Elyo Modekai aya cita fyonse ifyo Esta amwebele. 
Esther5:1 Pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu Esta afwala insalu shakwe ishabunamfumu, aya iminina mu lubansa lwamukati ke sano lya mfumu pantanshi ya muputule wa mfumu. Imfumu nayo ninshi naikala pa cipuna cabufumu mukati ke sano ukulungatana ne mpongolo ye sano." 
Esther5:2 Ilyo imfumu yamwene Esta naiminina mu lubansa, yatemwa pakumumona. Imfumu epakutambika inkonto ya golide iyali mu minwe yaiko kuli ena. Elyo Esta apalamina aikata pa mulu wa nkonto." 
Esther5:3 Imfumu yamwipusha aiti, “Ninshi namfumu Esta? Cinshi ulefwaya? Ndekupeela conse ico ulefwaya nangufye ukukwakanya ubufumu bwandi pakati!”" 
Esther5:4 Elyo Esta asosa ati, “Nga cakuti casansamusha imfumu, lekeni imfumu na Hamani bese ilelo ku mitebeto iyo napekanishisha imfumu.”" 
Esther5:5 Imfumu nayo epakusosa aiti, “Iteni Hamani bwangu bwangu pakuti tucite ifyo Esta alefwaya.” Kanshi imfumu na Hamani baisa na ku mitebeto Esta apekenye." 
Esther5:6 Ilyo bacili balenwa umwangashi panuma ya matebeto, imfumu yaipusha Esta aiti, “Bushe cinshi ulefwaya. Ala ulepeelwa. Cinshi ulelomba? Nangufye ukufika kukwakanya ubufumu bwandi pakati cilefikilishiwa!”" 
Esther5:7 Elyo Esta ayasuka ati. “Ifyo ndefwaya nefyo ndelomba nifi. 
Esther5:8 Nga ninsanga uluse pa cinso ca mfumu elyo nga cakuti casansamusha imfumu ukumpeela ico ndelomba no kufikilisha ico mfwaya, baleke ukuti imfumu na Hamani bakese nakabili mailo ku mitebeto nkabapekanishisha, lyena nkacita ifyo imfumu isosele.”" 
Esther5:9 Ilyo Hamani afumine ku malila, alisaminwe ne nsansa ishingi mu mutima. Lelo ilyo amwene Modekai mu mpongolo ya mfumu, nokuti taimine nangu ukumutiina, ici ecalengele ukuti Hamani afulwe nganshi." 
Esther5:10 Lelo kwena ashipikisha aya na ku ŋanda kumwakwe. Elyo atuma abakwita abanankwe no mukashi wakwe Sereshi. 
Esther5:11 Elyo Hamani atampa ukubashimikila ubwingi bwa fyuma fyakwe, ne mpendwa ya bana bakwe abaume, na pafyo imfumu yamucindike pakumupeela ififulo ifikalamba, no kumusonta ukuba umukalamba wa bacilolo na babomfi ba mfumu." 
Esther5:12 Alundapo nokuti, “Eico cine na namfumu Esta wine taitileko umuntu nangu umo ku mitebeto apekenye kanofye ine pamo ne mfumu. Na mailo line nkayako kabili pamo ne mfumu." 
Esther5:13 Lelo ifi fyonse tafilepilibula akantu nangu kamo kuli ine nga cakuti ndemona Modekai Umuyuda naikala pa mpongolo ya mfumu.” 
Esther5:14 Elyo umukashi wakwe Sereshi na banankwe bamweba abati, “Fwayeni abakupanga ifimuti fyakukulikilapo abantu icilepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50). Elyo ulucelo ukebe imfumu ikakulikilepo Modekai. Elyo ukaye pamo ne mfumu ku mitebeto ninshi nausansamuka.” Kanshi Hamani atemwa pali aya mano bamupandileko, apanga ne fimuti fyakukulikilapo abantu ba milandu." 
Esther6:1 Muli ubo bushiku imfumu Asuelusi alifililwe ukusendama utulo. Kanshi epakweba abakumuletela icitabo camilandu, umo balemba ifikankala ifyacitika mu bufumu bwakwe, pakuti babelengele imfumu." 
Esther6:2 Awe basanga apo balembele ifyo Modekai asokolwele batungwi ba mfumu babili, Bigitani na Tereshi abalelonda pa mwinshi, abalefwaya ukwipaya imfumu Asuelusi." 
Esther6:3 Elyo imfumu yaipusha aiti, “Uyu wine Modekai, bupulami nshi kabili bucindami nshi apokelapo pali ici?” Ababomfi ba mfumu bayasuka abati, “Tapaba nangu cimo ico bamucitila.”" 
Esther6:4 Imfumu nayo aiti, “Ngo uli mu lubansa lwe sano lya mfumu nani?” Ilyo linefye Hamani ninshi elyo aingila mu lubansa lwa kunse ye sano lya mfumu, alefwaya ukulanda ne mfumu pakukulikila Modekai ku cimuti ico amupekanishishe." 
Esther6:5 Ababomfi ba mfumu bayasuka abati, “Moneni Hamani naiminina mu lubansa.” Imfumu nayo aiti. “Lekeni engile.”" 
Esther6:6 Kanshi Hamani aingila, elyo imfumu yamwipusha ukuti, “Kuliko umuntu umo ndefwaya ukucindika, bushe kuti namucitila nshi?” Elyo Hamani mu mutima wakwe aleti, “Nani uo imfumu ingacindika ukucila pali ine?”" 
Esther6:7 Hamani epakweba imfumu ati, “Uyo muntu imfumu ilefwaya ukucindika," 
Esther6:8 leteni ifyakufwala fyabufumu ifyo imfumu yafwalapo na kabalwe imfumu yaninapo, na ku mutwe wakwe kube ingala yabufumu." 
Esther6:9 Elyo buulenipo umo pa balashi ba mfumu abacindamisha nganshi eo mupeele insalu na kabalwe. Uyu mulashi afwike uyu muntu imfumu ilefwaya ukucindika, umuteke na pali kabalwe no kumutandasha mu lubansa lonse ulwa musumba, no kubilikisha kuli bonse pa cinso cakwe ukuti, ‘Moneni ifi efyo imfumu icitila umuntu uo ilefwaya ukucindamika.’”" 
Esther6:10 Elyo imfumu yaeba Hamani aiti. “Endesha, buula ifyakufwala na kabalwe, ngefyo usosele, efyo ucitile Modekai Umuyuda ulya ekala pa mpongolo ya mfumu. Wishapo ne cimo pafyo ulandile.”" 
Esther6:11 Hamani epakuya buula ifyakufwala na kabalwe, afwika Modekai, amuteka na pali kabalwe, amutandasha na mu lubansa lwa musumba no kubilikisha kuli bonse pa cinso cakwe ati, “Moneni ifi efyo imfumu icitila umuntu uo ilefwaya ukucindamika.”" 
Esther6:12 Elyo Modekai abwelela ku mpongolo ya mfumu lelo Hamani bwangu bwangu aya ku ŋanda kumwakwe, aleloosha kabili nafimba na ku mutwe." 
Esther6:13 Elyo Hamani ashimikila umukashi wakwe Sereshi na banankwe bonse fyonsefye ifyamucitikile. Bampandamano wakwe na bakashi bakwe epakumweba abati. “Nga ni Modekai ulya ufwaya ukuwisha, elyo nga Muyuda, ninshi tawakamucimfye. Icine cine ukawa pa cinso cakwe.”" 
Esther6:14 Bacili balelanda nankwe, bamutungwi ba mfumu bafika mukwangufyanya batwala Hamani ku mitebeto iyo Esta apekenye." 
Esther7:1 Kanshi imfumu na Hamani baingila mu malila na namfumu Esta. 
Esther7:2 Pali ubu bushiku bwacibili, elyo balenwa umwangashi panuma ya malila, imfumu yaipusha Esta nakabili aiti, “Bushe cinshi ulelomba iwe namfumu Esta? Ndekupeela. Cinshi ulefwaya? Nangufye ukufika kukwakanya ubufumu bwandi pakati, cilefikilishiwa!”" 
Esther7:3 Elyo namfumu Esta ayasuka ati, “Nga cakuti ninsanga uluse, we mfumu, elyo kabili nga cakuti kuti casansamusha imfumu, kankwate ubumi ifyo ndefwaya, pamo na bantu bandi efyo ndelomba." 
Esther7:4 Pantu balitushitisha ine na bantu bandi pakuti batonaule, ukutwipaya no kutulofya. Abatushitishafye nga basha, abaume na banakashi, nga kuti nasunga icibote candi, pantu ukucula kwa musango uyu takwalinga ukuti twingacusha imfumu no mulandu wesu.”" 
Esther7:5 Elyo mfumu Asuelusi aipusha namfumu Esta ati, “Nani uyo wine, elyo ali kwi uulefwaya ukucita ifi?”" 
Esther7:6 Esta epakwasuka ati, “Umulwani ne cipondo ni uyu Hamani, uwabipisha!” Kanshi Hamani umwenso uukalamba wamwikata pa cinso ca mfumu na namfumu." 
Esther7:7 Elyo imfumu yaleka ukunwa umwangashi, yaima mu cifukushi yaya ingila na mwibala lya kwisano. Hamani ena ashala alepapata namfumu Esta pa bumi bwakwe pantu alimwene ubukali bwa mfumu ubwali nokumuponena." 
Esther7:8 Ilyo imfumu yabwelele ukufuma mwibala lye sano, yafika mu muputule wa mitebeto, yasanga Hamani nawila pa ncende apaikele Esta. Imfumu epakusosa aiti, “Bushe tacene namfumu mu menso yandi, kabili mu ŋanda yandi?” Ilyo ishiwi lyafuminefye pa kanwa ka mfumu, bafimba Hamani pa menso." 
Esther7:9 Elyo Habona umo pali bamutungwi abaletumika imfumu asosa ati, “Nakuba pa ŋanda yakwa Hamani paliko icimuti ico Hamani apekanishishe ukukulalikapo Modekai uyo amashiwi yakwe yakupuswishe, we mfumu. Ici cimuti cilepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50).”" 
Esther7:10 Imfumu epakusosa ati, “Mukulikileni pali ico cine.” Kanshi bakulika Hamani pa cimuti apekenye ukwipailapo Modekai. Elyo ubukali bwa mfumu bwapwile." 
Esther8:1 Ubushiku bulya imfumu Asuelusi yapeela namfumu Esta iŋanda yakwa Hamani umulwani wa Bayuda. Elyo Modekai aisa ku mfumu pantu Esta aliyebele ukuti muntu wakwe. 
Esther8:2 Kabili imfumu yafula imbalaminwe yakufwatikilako iyo yapokolwele kuli Hamani yapeela na Modekai. Esta nao apeela Modekai amaka pa ŋanda yakwa Hamani. 
Esther8:3 Elyo Esta abwekeshapo ukulanda ne mfumu. Awa pa nkasa shakwe alelila no kumupapata pakuti ekonka amapange ayabi yakwa Hamani umwina Agagi ayo apangile Abayuda. 
Esther8:4 Ilyo imfumu yalangile Esta inkonto ya golide," 
Esther8:5 Esta epakwima aya iminina na pali mfumu. Elyo asosa ati, “Nga cakuti casansamusha imfumu kabili nga ninsanga uluse pa cinso ca mfumu, nga cakuti ici cintu camoneka ukulungama ku mfumu elyo kabili nga cakuti ndi musuma pa cinso ca mfumu, imfumu nailembe icebo icakonaula amakalata Hamani umwina Agagi, umwana wakwa Hamedata, alembele ayakonaula Abayuda mu fitungu fyonse ifya calo ca mfumu." 
Esther8:6 Bushe ine kuti natemwa shani ukumona icinkunka icileishila abantu bandi? Bushe kuti nashipikisha shani ukumona ubonaushi bwa ba lupwa lwandi?” 
Esther8:7 Elyo imfumu Asuelusi aeba namfumu Esta na Modekai Umuyuda ati, “Moneni, napeela Esta iŋanda yakwa Hamani, kabili bakulikile Hamani pa cimuti pantu alefwaya ukwipaya Abayuda." 
Esther8:8 Nomba kuti mwalembelako Abayuda mu musango mulefwailamo mwishina lya mfumu. Mufwatikepo ne nshimbi ya mbalaminwe ya mfumu, pantu icebo cilembelwe mwishina lya mfumu nacumwapo ne nshimbi ya mbalaminwe ya mfumu, teti cipilibulwe.”" 
Esther8:9 Pali ilya ine nshita bakalemba ba mfumu balibetile, cali mu mweshi wabutatu, umweshi uo baleti Sifani, pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shitatu (23). Kanshi icebo epakulembwa ukulingana nefyo Modekai abebele palwa Bayuda, no kutuma bacituma ku nkonkani sha mfumu shonse, na balashi aba cila citungu ca calo ca mfumu na bakalamba ba bantu ukufuma ku India ukufika na ku Kushi. Ifitungu fyali umwanda umo na makumi yabili na cine lubali (127). Ici cebo calembelwe ukulingana ne filembo fya cila citungu no lulimi lwa cila mutundu. Kabili calembelwe na ku Bayuda ukulingana ne filembo fyabo no lulimi lwabo." 
Esther8:10 Alembele kalata mwishina lya mfumu Asuelusi no kufwatikapo inshimbi ya mbalaminwe yakwe. Elyo atuma amakalata aya ne nkombe shalubilo ishaninine pali bakabalwe abalubilo nganshi abafyelwe kuli bakabalwe abasalwa abo imfumu yalebomfya. 
Esther8:11 Mu makalata aya mwalembelwe ukuti Abayuda aba muli cila musumba nabapeelwa insambu ishakuti balongane no kucingilila ubumi bwabo, ukonaula, ukwipaya no kulofya abantu bonse nangu icitungu conse abaipekanya ku nkondo abengesa balwisha, pamo penefye na baice na banamayo, no kutapa ifyuma fyabo." 
Esther8:12 Ifi fifwile ukucitika pa bushiku bumofye mu fitungu fyonse ifya calo ca mfumu Asuelusi, ubushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) ubwa mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12), umweshi batila Ada." 
Esther8:13 Icikope ca fyalembelwe cali nokupeelwa nge cebo mu fitungu fya calo fyonse, elyo cili nokubilwa ku bantu bonse pakuti Abayuda baipekanye pakwisa ipokololako ku balwani babo ilyo ubo bushiku bukafika." 
Esther8:14 Kanshi inkombe shanina na pali bakabalwe balubilo abo imfumu yalebomfya, shaima bwangu bwangu ukulingana nefyo mfumu yabakonkomeshe. Kanshi efyo icebo capeelwe mu musumba wa Susa." 
Esther8:15 Awe Modekai afuma pa cinso ca mfumu ninshi nafwala ne fyakufwala fyabufumu ifyacifufya ne fyabuuta, ne cisote cabufumu ica golide, no mwingila wapikulwa ubusaka uwakashikila, elyo umusumba wa Susa wapunda no kusansamuka." 
Esther8:16 Pantu kwaba ubuseko, ukwanga, insansa no bucindami ku Bayuda." 
Esther8:17 Elyo kabili mu fitungu fya calo fyonse ne misumba yonse, ukwafikile icebo ca mfumu no bupingushi bwaiko, kwali nsansa no kwanga imitebeto no kutuusha mu Bayuda. Kanshi na bantu abengi aba mu calo cilya baicita ukuba Abayuda ico umwenso wakutiina Abayuda wabekata." 
Esther9:1 Kanshi mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12), umweshi batila Ada, pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) ubwa uyu wine mweshi, icebo ne cipope ca mfumu fyali nokucitikilapo. Ubushiku bwine ubo ebo abalwani ba Bayuda balesubila ukubacimfya, nomba fyayaluka. Bayuda ebacimfishe ababapatile." 
Esther9:2 Abayuda mu misumba yonse na mu fitungu fyonse ifya calo ca mfumu Asuelusi balongana mukwipaya abo abalefwaya ukubalofya. Kanshi tapali nangu umo uwakubalwisha pantu umwenso wakubatiina waliketefye abantu bonse. 
Esther9:3 Bonsefye abalashi ba mfumu aba mu fitungu fya calo, inkonkani sha mfumu, bakateeka na babomfi ba mfumu bayafwilisha Abayuda pantu umwenso wakutiina Modekai walibekete." 
Esther9:4 Pantu Modekai ali na maka ayengi mu ŋanda ya mfumu, no lulumbi lwakwe lwalikumene mu calo conse, pantu amaka Modekai akwete yalekulilakofye." 
Esther9:5 Kanshi Abayuda bakoma bonse abalwani babo ku lupanga, ukubepaya no kubonaula no kucita abalwani babo mu musango balefwailamo." 
Esther9:6 Mu musumba wa Susa wekafye Abayuda baipeye no konaula abantu abaume imyanda isano (500). 
Esther9:7 Kabili baipaya na Pashandata na Dalufoni na Asipata," 
Esther9:8 na Porata, na Adalia, na Aridata," 
Esther9:9 na Pamashita na Arisai na Aridai na Faisata," 
Esther9:10 abana ikumi limo abakwa Hamani mwana Hamedata, umulwani wa Bayuda. Lelo ifyuma fyabo fyena tabafitapile iyoo." 
Esther9:11 Pa bushiku bwine ubo baya shimikilako imfumu impendwa ya bantu baipeye mu musumba wa Susa. 
Esther9:12 Elyo imfumu yaeba namfumu Esta aiti, “Mu musumba wa Susa, Abayuda bepeye no konaula abaume imyanda isano (500) elyo na bana bakwa Hamani ikumi limo. Nga kanshi mu fitungu fimbi fya calo ca mfumu finshi bacitilemo? Finshi fimbi ifyo ulelomba? Filepeelwa kuli iwe. Cinshi ulefwaya? Cilefikilishiwa.”" 
Esther9:13 Elyo Esta ayasuka ati, “Nga cakuti cakusekesha we mfumu, leka Abayuda aba muno Susa basuminishiwe ukucita nakabili mailo ifyo bacitile ukulingana ne cebo ca bushiku bwa lelo. Lekeni bamwana Hamani ikumi babakulikile pa fimuti.”" 
Esther9:14 Kanshi imfumu epakupeela icebo icakucita ifyo fine. Ne funde lyapeelwa mu musumba wa Susa, na bana ikumi limo abakwa Hamani babakulika." 
Esther9:15 Abayuda abali mu Susa balongana nakabili pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) ubwa mu mweshi wa Ada, baipaya abaume imyanda itatu (300) lelo tabasampile ifyuma." 
Esther9:16 Elyo Abayuda bambi balongana mu fitungu fya calo ca mfumu, baicingilila no kuipokololako ku balwani babo, no kwipaya ababapatile amakana amakumi cine lubali na yasano (75,000) nomba tabasampile ifyuma fyabo." 
Esther9:17 Ubu bwali bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) ubwa mu mweshi wa Ada. Elyo pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) balituushishe no kubucita ubwakusefya ne nsansa. 
Esther9:18 Abayuda bali mu Susa bena balongene pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shitatu (13) no bwalenga ikumi limo na bune (14), elyo nomba ubwalenga ikumi limo na busano (15) batuusha no kubucita ubwakusefya ne nsansa." 
Esther9:19 E mulandu walenga ukuti Abayuda, balya bekala mu ncende sha mu mushi, balecindika ubushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na shine (14) ubwa mu mweshi wa Ada. Ubu bushiku buba bwakusansamukamo, ukusefya no kutuusha, bushiku bwakupeelana ubupe bwa fyakulya." 
Esther9:20 Modekai alembele ifintu fyonse no kutuma amakalata ku Bayuda bonse mu fitungu fyonse fya calo ca mfumu Asuelusi ifyakutali ne fyamupepi. 
Esther9:21 Mu makalata aya abakonkomeshe ukucindika ubushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na bune (14) ubwa mu mweshi wa Ada elyo no bwalenga ikumi limo na shisano (15) cila mwaka. 
Esther9:22 Pantu e bushiku Abayuda balubwikemo ku balwani babo, kabili e mweshi ubulanda bwabo bwayalwikemo insansa, no kuloosha kwabo kwayalwike ubushiku bwakutuusha. Ishi nshiku shifwile shaba shakusansamukamo no kusefya. Ni nshiku shakupeelanamo ubupe bwa fyakulya ne shakupeelamo abalanda ifyabupe." 
Esther9:23 Kanshi Abayuda basuminisha ifyalembele Modekai, bayamba no kufikonka." 
Esther9:24 Hamani umwina Agagi umwana wakwa Hamedata, umulwani wa Bayuda ewali na mapange yakulofya Abayuda no kubuula Puri pakupendula pakuti abonaule no kubalofya." 
Esther9:25 Nomba ilyo imfumu yaumfwile ifi ukufuma kuli Esta, yalipingwile no kulemba ukuti amapange yakwe ayabi ayo akwatile Abayuda yamwalukile, ena na bana bakwe babakulike no kubakulikila ku fimuti." 
Esther9:26 E mulandu wine bainikile inshiku ati Purimu ukufumya kwishiwi lya puri. Kabili ni pa mulandu wa fyonse ifyalembelwe muli iyi kalata nefyo bamwene ne fyabaponene," 
Esther9:27 Abayuda baipangile no kukonka ulutambi pamo na bana babo na bantu bonsefye ukucindika cila mwaka apabula ukufilwa ishi nshiku shibili umo mwine calembelwa na pa nshita iyasalwa cila mwaka. 
Esther9:28 Ishi nshiku shibili bafwile bashicindika no kushikonka mu nkulo shonse, mu ndupwa shonse na mu fitungu fyonse ifya calo, na mu misumba monse. Elyo ishi nshiku sha Purimu tabafwile baleka ukushisefya ku Muyuda onse nelyo ukuleka ukushibukisha mu bana ba mu lupwa lwabo." 
Esther9:29 Elyo namfumu Esta, umwana wakwa Abihaili, na Modekai Umuyuda balemba inkalata yabubili no kubikapo amaka nganshi ukushininkisha palwa nshikunkulu ya Purimu." 
Esther9:30 Aya makalata yatuminwe ku Bayuda bonse aba mu fitungu fyonse umwanda umo amakumi yabili na cine lubali (127) ifya calo ca mfumu Asuelusi mu mashiwi yacibote no kubateeka imitima. 
Esther9:31 Amashiwi yali mu makalata yabakonkomesha ukuti bakalesefya inshiku sha Purimu pa nshita iyasontwa pamo ngefyo namfumu Esta na Modekai Umuyuda babebele ukucita pamo na bana babo mukukonka ulutambi lwakufunga ukulya no kuloosha. 
Esther9:32 Icebo capeele Esta ecalengele ukuti ukusefya Purimu kube ulutambi elyo no kulembwa mu citabo. 
Esther10:1 Imfumu Asuelusi apatikisha abantu ba mu calo conse na mu lulamba lwa bemba ukusonka umusonko. 
Esther10:2 Kanshi ificitwa fyakwe fyonse ifyabulamba na maka acitile, ne lyashi lyonse pafyo Modekai bamucindike no kumupeela icifulo ku mfumu Asuelusi, fyonse fyalilembwa mu citabo ca milandu ya mfumu sha ku Media na Pesia." 
Esther10:3 Modekai Umuyuda ewakonkelepo ukucindama pa mfumu Asuelusi. Kabili ali na maka pa Bayuda, uwacindama no kutemwikwa ku bantu bakwe pantu acitile ifyakuwamina abantu bakwe no kulomba ifyakuwamina umushobo wakwe onse." 
Job1:1 Kwaliko umuntu umo ishina lyakwe ni Yobo. Aleikala mu calo ico beta Usi. Uyu muntu ali uwakaele, umololoke kabili uutiina Lesa, talefwaya ukucita ifyabipa." 
Job1:2 Afyele abana abaume cine lubali na bana abanakashi nabo batatu. 
Job1:3 Akwete impaanga amakana cine lubali (7,000), ingamila amakana yatatu (3,000), iŋombe shakulima imyanda isano (500), na bapunda abakota imyanda isano (500). Kabili alikwete ababomfi abengi nganshi. Uyu muntu alicilile abantu bonse aba ku kabanga ubukankala." 
Job1:4 Abana bakwa Yobo abaume babeleshe ukucita imitebeto cila muntu kumwakwe no kwitako abanankwe, kabili balelekanina. Elyo baleitako na bankashi yabo balya batatu mu kulya no kunwa nabo pamo." 
Job1:5 Kanshi cali ifi, inshiku shakusefya nga shapwa Yobo alebeta no kubasangulula. Elyo kacelocelo alebuuka aya mukutuula ilambo lyakoca ukulingana ne mpendwa ya bana bakwe bonse. Pantu aletontonkanya ukuti, “Limbi kuti abana bandi babifya no kupontela Lesa mu mitima yabo.” Efyo alecita lyonse." 
Job1:6 Kanshi kwali ubushiku bumo ilyo abana baume bakwa Lesa aba ku mulu baile longana pa cinso cakwa Yawe, Satana nao ali nabo." 
Job1:7 Elyo Yawe aipusha Satana ati, “Wafuma kwisa?” Satana nao ayasuka Yawe ati, “Nacilaendaukafye nafuma uku naya uku, nacilalulumbafye mu calo.”" 
Job1:8 Yawe akonkanyapo ati, “Bushe wacimumona umubomfi wandi Yobo ifyo aba? Tapaba pa calo uwalingana nankwe, muntu uwakaele, umololoke kabili uutiina Lesa no kutaluka kukucita ifyabipa.”" 
Job1:9 Satana epakwasuka Yawe ati, “Bushe Yobo atiina tiinafye Lesa apabula nangu cimo?" 
Job1:10 Teico walimucingilila pamo ne ŋanda yakwe na fyonse ifyo akwata mu mbalifye shonse. Walipaala ne milimo yakwe, na fyonse ifyo akwata filefulilako mu mpendwa pa calo." 
Job1:11 Nomba fungulula ukuboko kobe no kwikata pa fyuma fyakwe fyonse, alekulapisha pa menso yobe.”" 
Job1:12 Elyo Yawe aeba Satana ati. “Cisuma kanshi nabika fyonse ifyo akwata mu minwe yobe, nomba umwine ena wimwikatamo.” Satana epakufuma pa cinso cakwa Yawe, aya no kuya." 
Job1:13 Ubushiku bumo cilya abana bakwa Yobo abaume na banakashi balelya no kunwa umwangashi mu ŋanda ya mukalamba wabo umwaume," 
Job1:14 inkombe yafika kuli Yobo yamweba aiti, “Twacilalima ne ŋombe, bapunda nabo baciba balelya pambali mupepi," 
Job1:15 elyo abena Saba bacisa fukukila ifitekwa, bafisenda no kufisenda fyonse. Nabepaya na babomfi bobe ku lulimi lwa lupanga. Ninefye neka mpuswike mukwisa kushimikila ificitike.”" 
Job1:16 Acili alelanda ifi, no kupwisha talapwisha, inkombe imbi nayo yafika yasosa aiti, “Inkuba yakwa Lesa ukufuma ku mulu naipona no koca impaanga na babomfi no kubepaya. Ninefye neka mpuswike mukwisa kushimikilako ificitike.”" 
Job1:17 Acili alelanda ifi, na imbi inkombe yafika aiti, “Abena Kaludea bapangile amabumba yatatu no kufukukila ingamila no kushisenda shonse, baipaya na babomfi ku lulimi lwa lupanga. Ninefye neka mpuswike mukwisa kushimikilako ificitike.”" 
Job1:18 Acili alelanda na imbi inkombe yafika aiti, “Abana bobe abaume na banakashi bacilalya no kunwa umwangashi mu ŋanda ya mukalamba wabo umwaume." 
Job1:19 Elyo mu kashita akanonofye kwacima umwela uukalamba ukufuma mu matololo no kwisa uma amatungi yane aya ŋanda no kubongolokela pa baice, no kufwa nabafwa. Ninefye neka mpuswike mukwisa kushimikilako ificitike.”" 
Job1:20 Elyo Yobo aiminina, alepula umwingila wakwe, abeya no mushishi ku mutwe, awa panshi no kupepa ati," 
Job1:21 “Naishile ubwamba ukufuma munda muli mayo, kabili nkabwelelamo ubwamba uko nafumine. Yawe alipeele kabili Yawe napoka, nalipaalwe na matotelo ishina lyakwa Yawe.”" 
Job1:22 Muli ifi fyonse Yobo tabifishe, tasosele nangu cimo icakupontela Lesa." 
Job2:1 Nakabili kwali ubushiku bumo ilyo abana bakwa Lesa abaume aba ku mulu baile longana pa cinso cakwa Yawe. Satana nao epakwisa monekela ku cinso cakwa Yawe. 
Job2:2 Kabili Yawe aipusha Satana ati, “Wafuma kwisa?” Satana ayasuka Yawe ati, “Nacilaendaukafye nafuma uku naya uku, nacilalulumbafye mu calo.”" 
Job2:3 Yawe amwipusha ati, “Bushe wamona umubomfi wandi Yobo ifyo aba? Tapaba pa calo uwalingana nankwe, muntu uwakaele, umololoke kabili uutiina Lesa no kutaluka kukucita ifyabipa. Taumwene ukuti nashipikisha, nasunga ubufumacumi bwakwe, nangu line wampatikishe ukuti monaule apabula umulandu.”" 
Job2:4 Elyo Satana ayasuka Yawe ati, “Bakabushanya inkanda ne nkanda. Umuntu kuti asumina ukuposa fyonse ifyo akwata pakupususha ubumi bwakwe." 
Job2:5 Nomba fungulula ukuboko kobe no kwikata kwifupa no munofu wakwe. Akakulapisha pa cinso cobe.” 
Job2:6 Yawe epakweba Satana ati, “Cisuma kanshi nimupeela mu minwe yobe, lelo wiesha kwikata ku mweo wakwe.”" 
Job2:7 Kanshi Satana epakufuma pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kuya lwalika Yobo ifilonda ifyabipisha nganshi umubili onse, ukufuma ku tukondo ukufika na ku mutwe." 
Job2:8 Yobo epakubuula iciinga eco alafopolweko ifilonda, aikala na mu mito." 
Job2:9 Elyo umukashi wakwe aisa mweba ati, “Bushe na nomba ucili uletwalilila mukusunga ubufumacumi bobe? Mutuke Lesa no kufwa ufwe, cipwe!”" 
Job2:10 Lelo Yobo ayasuka umukashi wakwe ati, “Walanda ifyo umwanakashi onse uushakwata amano engalanda, bushe nga tulapokelela ifisuma kuli Yawe tekuti tupokelele ne fyakutucusha fine?” Muli ifi fyonse Yobo tabifishepo nangu cimo mu kulanda kwakwe." 
Job2:11 Kanshi elyo bacibusa bakwa Yobo batatu baumfwile amacushi yonse ayamuponene, baya mukumupempula cila muntu ukufuma kumwakwe. Amashina yabo ni aya: Elifasi umwina Temani, na Biludadi umwina Shuha, na Sofari umwina Namati. Baumfwana bonse pamo ukwisa mukoselesha no kumutalalika umutima." 
Job2:12 Bacili akatalamukila bamumona, nomba bafilwa ukumwishiba. Awe bafilwa ukushipikisha, basansula amashiwi yabo balaloosha mu misowa iyikalamba, balepula ne mingila yabo baikuba no lukungu pa mitwe yabo."
