Job2:13 Baikala nankwe panshi ukulingana ne nshiku cine lubali, akasuba no bushiku, ukwabula ukumusoshamo ishiwi nelyo limo, pantu balimwene ukuti ukucula kwakwe kwalikulishe nganshi." 
Job3:1 Panuma ya ifi, Yobo ayasamwine akanwa kakwe no kulapisha ubushiku afyelwemo." 
Job3:2 Elyo Yobo atile," 
Job3:3 “Akasuba nafyelwemo kakalobelele pamo no bushiku batile umwana umwaume nafyalwa. 
Job3:4 Kalya kasuba nakakaluke imfifi, Lesa wa ku mulu elakebukisha kabili kekasanikilwa na lubuuto." 
Job3:5 Lekeni imfifi ikalamba ne cinshingwa ca mfwa, na makumbi fikupe ubu bushiku. Lekeni imfifi ya ubu bushiku iletiinya abantu." 
Job3:6 Ala ubu bushiku bukupwe ne mfifi, elyo bufutwe pa nshiku shaba mu mwaka, bufume na pa mpendwa ya nshiku shaba mu mweshi." 
Job3:7 Ee, lekeni mwiba nangu cimo muli ubu bushiku, mwifuma no tupundu nangu ishiwi lya nsansa." 
Job3:8 Lekeni abo abatipwila inshiku batipwile ubu bushiku, abaishiba ukubimbula cishimweshimwe ci Lefiatani." 
Job3:9 Lekeni intanda sha ku macaca isha bulya bushiku shishime. Lekeni bulolele ulubuuto, no kulumona nakalya, kabili bwimona no kusama kwa mibengelele ya ku macaca." 
Job3:10 Pantu tabwanjisalile mwifumo lyakwa mayo pakufisa amacushi ku menso yandi. 
Job3:11 Cinshi nshafwililefye pakufyalwa, nelyo panumafye ya kufuma munda muli mayo ndeka umweo?" 
Job3:12 Cinshi kwabelele amakufi ayakumpokelela, na mabele ayakuŋonsha?" 
Job3:13 Ne mwine fino nga ninambalala nga ndi mu mutelelwe, nga nindala utulo, nga ndi mukutuusha," 
Job3:14 pamo ne shamfumu na bacilolo ba mu calo, abaikuulile ifintu ifyakubebukishako ifili nomba ifyaonaika." 
Job3:15 Nga nindala utulo pamo pene na bana ba mfumu abakwete golide, abaiswishe amayanda yabo na silifa." 
Job3:16 Nelyo cinshi bashamposelefye nga kapopo, nangu akanya akafwa ukwabula no kumonapo ulubuuto lwa kasuba." 
Job3:17 Kulya uko ababi baleka ukubilimuka, na banaka basanga ukutuusha." 
Job3:18 Uko abafungwa bekala pamo mu cibote, tabomfwa ne shiwi lyakwa kangalila wabo." 
Job3:19 Abalanda na bakankala baba pamo, abasha balilubuka kuli bashikulu wabo." 
Job3:20 “Mulandu nshi ulubuuto lupeelelwa ku muntu uuli mu bulanda, no bumi ku muntu uo umutima uleshikitika ku macushi?" 
Job3:21 Abo abafwaisha ukufwa, lelo imfwa nayo taimoneka, balaifwaisha ukufwa ukucila na pafyo bengafwaya ifyuma ifyafiswa." 
Job3:22 Bena balasamwa nganshi, no kusansamuka ilyo bafika ku manda." 
Job3:23 Cinshi bengasanikila umuntu ulubuuto uushilemona inshila, uo Lesa aisalilila?" 
Job3:24 Ukushinshimukila ekwisa nge cakulya candi, ukulilishika kwandi kupongoloka nga menshi." 
Job3:25 Pantu icintu naletiina nganshi ecamponena, elyo icalentiinya ecanjishila." 
Job3:26 Ine nshimona mutende, nangu umutelelwe, nshakwata ukutuusha, macushifye yeka yeka eyamfikila.”" 
Job4:1 Elifasi umwina Temani ayasuka ati," 
Job4:2 “Umuntu nga akwebako ishiwi limo, bushe tacakukalipe? Nomba kwena nani ashingalandapo pa ca musango uyu?" 
Job4:3 Mona walifunda abantu abengi, walikoselesha na batompoka amaboko." 
Job4:4 Amashiwi yobe yatungilila nabo abalelubantika, walengele nokuti amakufi ayanaka yakose." 
Job4:5 Nomba na iwe cakufikila, wafilwa ukushipikisha, cakukuma, wanenuka." 
Job4:6 Bushe akatiina kobe aka kuli Yawe temwaba ukutetekela kobe? Elyo ne mikalile iya bololoke bobe temo emwaba isubilo lyobe? 
Job4:7 “Tala tontonkanya. Bushe walimonapo umuntu umo uwaololoka umutima aloba? Nangu umuntu uwakaele aonaika? 
Job4:8 Ine ifyo namonapo nifi. Umuntu uulima ifyabupondamishi no kutandamo ubucushi, ifi fine efintu asombola." 
Job4:9 Ku mupu wakwa Lesa balaloba, na ku mwela wa bukali bwakwe alabonaula." 
Job4:10 Ukubuluma kwa nkalamo no musowa wa nkalamo iyikali nganshi, na meno ya twana twa nkalamo, nafyonaika." 
Job4:11 Inkalamo iyamaka nganshi naifwa pantu taikwete ifyakulya, no twana twa nkalamo iyikota natusalangana." 
Job4:12 “Nomba kwalishile kulesokelela icebo kuli ine, ukutwi kwandi kwapokelele ishiwi balentotosha." 
Job4:13 Cali mu nshita ifiloto fipoka amano, ilyo utulo utwingi twikata umuntu." 
Job4:14 Kanshi naliketwe no mwenso uukalamba nalatutumafye, ecalengele nokuti amafupa yandi yalesokona." 
Job4:15 Umupashi waisa leluka ku menso yandi, awe no bupipi bwa pa mubili wandi bwaiminina." 
Job4:16 Umupashi waiminina shika, lelo ine nafilwa ukwishiba icata calimo. Kwena naumfwile cimo naciminina pa ntanshi yandi. Patalala na tondolo, elyo naumfwa ishiwi." 
Job4:17 ‘Bushe umwinakufwa kuti aba umololoke pa cinso cakwa Lesa? Bushe umuntunse kuti aba uwakaele pa Wamubumba? 
Job4:18 Nga cakuti na mu babomfi bakwe bene tapaba abo atetekela, na muli bamalaika bakwe bene alisangamo icilubo," 
Job4:19 nga palibufi abantu ababumbwa ukufuma ku lukungu, abekala mu mayanda ya maloba, abo bashonaula nga kashishi." 
Job4:20 Akacelo epo bali, icungulo baonaika, balobelela ukwabula no wakubikako amano." 
Job4:21 Na fyonse ifyo bakwata fyaonaikila pamo nabo, bena bafwa ukwabula amano.’”" 
Job5:1 “Kuuta we Yobo, bushe pali uulekwasuka mwa? Nani uwamushilo uo uleyalukilako?" 
Job5:2 Pantu icipyu cipaya umuntu imbulwamano, ulunkumbwa nalo lwipaya umuntu uushacenjela." 
Job5:3 Nalimonapo umuntu imbulwamano uuleikala bwino, bwangu bwangu naisa mutipwila ne mikalile yakwe yaonaika." 
Job5:4 Abana bakwe bashala insansalila ukwabula ubucingo, babepaila mu mpongolo, elyo tapali nangu umo uwakubapokololako." 
Job5:5 Abantu abansala ebakalya ifisabo fyakwe, bafisobolola no kufifumya mu myunga, abalwinso ebakumbwa ifyuma fyakwe." 
Job5:6 Pantu ubucushi tabufuma ku lukungu iyoo, nangu ubwafya ukumena pa mushili." 
Job5:7 Lelo umuntunse ena nga afyalwa asanga ubucushi, nga filya fine insase shisamina mu mulu." 
Job5:8 “Nga nine kuti nabutukila kuli Lesa. Lesa eo ningatula umulandu wandi. 
Job5:9 Pantu Lesa eucita ifipapwa ifyo tushingeshiba, ifisungusho ifyo tushingapenda." 
Job5:10 Eulosha imfula pa calo, eusansa na menshi pa mabala." 
Job5:11 Eusansabalika abalanda, nabo abali mu cililishi abasumbwila ukuli ubucingo." 
Job5:12 Alonaula na mapange ya ncenjeshi, pakuti ifyo shilefwaya ukucita fiikwata ubuyo." 
Job5:13 Abuula abamano no kubekatila mu bucenjeshi bwabo, na bumpandamano bwa baba no bucenjeshi bulafulungana." 
Job5:14 Akasuba bena baponenwa ne mfifi, lilya akasuba kali pakati ka mutwe bapulumpunta kwati bushiku." 
Job5:15 Lelo ena apususha abalanda ku lupanga, ku milandile na ku minwe ya bamaka." 
Job5:16 Kanshi Lesa alalenga abalanda ukuti bakwate isubilo nakabili, abalufyengo bena abaputula umulomo." 
Job5:17 “Alishuka uo Lesa akalipila, kanshi iwe Yobo wilasuula ukusalapula kwa Mwine wa maka yonse." 
Job5:18 Pantu Lesa alacena ifilonda, kabili afikakila ne cisansa ominako eco ondapilako." 
Job5:19 Akakupususha ku mafya ayali mutanda na ku bwafya ubwalenga cine lubali bwine tawakatale auculapo. 
Job5:20 Mu nshita ya cipowe akakupususha ku mfwa, na pa nshita ya nkondo akakucingilila ku maka ya lupanga." 
Job5:21 Lesa akakupokololako ku bukali bwa lwambo lwa lulimi, tawakatiine ubonaushi ilyo bukesa." 
Job5:22 Pa nshita ya bonaushi ne cipowe, iwe ukalaseka, tawakatiine ne fiswango fya mu mpanga." 
Job5:23 Ukacita icipangano camutende na mabwe ya mu cilime cobe, ne finama fya mpanga fikaba mu cibote na iwe." 
Job5:24 Ukeshiba nokuti itenti lyobe lili umutelelwe, ukapempula icinka lyobe no kupenda ifitekwa fyobe, tawakalufyepo nelyo cimo." 
Job5:25 Elyo ukeshiba nokuti abana ba bufyashi bobe bakaba abengi nganshi, na bana bobe abo wafyala bakafula nge cani ca mu calo." 
Job5:26 Ukaya mu nindi ninshi naukota nganshi ne mfwi tutu ku mutwe, ngo mwanshi wa ŋanu uo batutila pa nshita ya kulobolola." 
Job5:27 “Wamona ifi fyonse twalifipitulukamo pa nshita itali no kumona ukuti fyacishinka, eco ufiposeko amano, ufikonke, ukeshiba we mwine ukuti fyakukuwamina.”" 
Job6:1 Elyo Yobo ayasuka ati," 
Job6:2 “Iyee nga cakuti ubulanda bwandi bwapimwa, na macushi yandi yonse yapimwa pa cipimo!" 
Job6:3 Ala kuti fyafinapo ukucila umusensenga wa mu lulamba lwa bemba, eco na mu mashiwi yandi mubelele ukususwa." 
Job6:4 Pantu ine nalilaswa ne mifwi ya Mwine wa maka yonse, no mupashi wandi ulenwa ubulembe bwa iyi mifwi, ifyo Lesa atiinishako ala ine nafintengamina." 
Job6:5 Bushe punda wa mpanga alalila nga alelya icani, nge ŋombe nayo taitalalafye tondolo ilyo ilelya umulemfwe?" 
Job6:6 Nga kanshi nani engalya ifyakulya ifyatalala tondolo umwabula umucele? Bushe mwalibamo umulyo mu cipande cabuuta ice lini? 
Job6:7 Ine nshikwete nsala yakulya ifyakulya fya musango uyu. Nafimfitika ku mukoshi. 
Job6:8 “Iye, nga kuti nakwata ico ndelomba, Lesa nao nga kuti ampeela ifyo ndekabila." 
Job6:9 Nangu nga kuti casekesha Lesa ukunjipaya, nga kuti afungulula ukuboko kwakwe ampwishishishafye." 
Job6:10 Ici ecingalenga ukuti mpemwineko, nangu line ningaba mu bucushi ubwabipisha, nico nshakaana ifyalanda Uwamushilo." 
Job6:11 Bushe ine ncili na maka yakushipikisha ukwikala pano calo? Buyo nshi ndelolela pakuti nteke umutima? 
Job6:12 Bushe amaka yandi kuti yalingana na mabwe ukukosa, nangu umunofu wandi waba ngo mukuba?" 
Job6:13 Mu cishinkafye amaka muli ine nayapwafye yonse ayakuti njafwilishe, pantu na mano yene ine nayampela." 
Job6:14 “Umuntu uuli uwafupuka pa mulandu wakucula eukabila ukukoseleshiwa na banankwe, epakuti talekele ukukwata akatiina ka ku Mwine wa maka yonse." 
Job6:15 Nomba imwe mwe bamunyinane namumbepa, mumbepele ngo mukuku wa menshi ya mu kamana mainsa." 
Job6:16 Aya menshi yaba ayafundauka pantu yafuma ku menshi makasa ayalesunguluka mwaisula no bufumi bwa bunga bwa mfula. 
Job6:17 Lelo mu nshita ya lusuba yalakama, no kupwa yapwa ku mulandu wa cipuki." 
Job6:18 Abalendo abenda mu milongo ya ngamila balafuma mu nshila, baya mukufwaya aya amenshi basuka baluba no kufwila mu matololo." 
Job6:19 Abalendo abenda mu milongo ya ngamila ukufuma ku Tema balayafwaya, na bamakwebo abafuma ku Sheba balasubila ukuyasanga." 
Job6:20 Nomba ukucetekela kwabo kuba kwakuicushafye, pantu batila nga bafikako basanga yalyuma." 
Job6:21 Efyo nemwe bene muli kuli ine, nga mwamona ubucushi bwandi mwatiina." 
Job6:22 Bushe nalitala mulomba icabupe, nangu ukumfutilako icinasha mulandu pa fyuma fyenu?" 
Job6:23 Atemwa, ukutila mpususheniko ku minwe ya balwani bandi, ndubuleniko ku kuboko kwa bancusha?" 
Job6:24 “Mfundeniko, ndebafye tondolo, lengeni njishibe ifilubo nacita." 
Job6:25 Amashiwi ya mu bufumacumi yalakalifya, lelo imwe ifi mulenjebaula, bushe kuti cangafwa?" 
Job6:26 Bushe mulefwaya tuletalikana pa mashiwi ayafye, no kuleka amashiwi ya muntu uwapelelwa yoluluke ngo mwela?" 
Job6:27 Imwe kuti mwapendwila pa mwana wanshiwa, no kushitisha umunenu." 
Job6:28 “Aleni nomba pilibukeni no kundolesha mundoleshe, bushe ine kuti nabepa ubufi pa cinso cenu?" 
Job6:29 Tontonkanyenipo nakabili. Ine nshilefwaya ulufyengo nakabili, tontonkanyenipo nakabili pantu muletwishika ubufumacumi bwandi." 
Job6:30 Bushe kwena muli ubufi mufyo ndelanda ine, nangu mucili muletontonkanya ukuti ine teti nsobolole ifibi ne fisuma?”" 
Job7:1 “Bushe ubumi bwa muntu pano isonde tabwaba bwakubomba imilimo iyakosa, ne nshiku shakwe tashaba nge sha muntu uwalembwa incito yacibe?" 
Job7:2 Kwati musha uulefwaya icintelelwe, ngo wa ncito uulelolela ukufola." 
Job7:3 Elyo na ine balimpimina imyeshi umushaba icakumwenamo, elyo ne nshiku shakucucutikamofye nga bwaila nasho nalipeelwa." 
Job7:4 Nga nasendama nati, ‘Yangu pakuti buce mbuuke!’ Ubushiku tepakulepa, kulapilibuka pilibukafye mpaka ku macaca." 
Job7:5 Mu mubili wandi namo mwiswile imititi ne nkuku. Inkanda yandi naikosa, nga yalepuka mulefuma na mafina." 
Job7:6 Inshiku shandi shilepita ulubilo ukucila na pa kakupikwilako insalu, shilepwa bwangu ukwabula no kumpeela isubilo." 
Job7:7 “Ibukisha we Lesa ukuti ubumi bwandi bwabafye ngo mupu, ine nshakamone nsansa nakabili." 
Job7:8 Ilinso ililendolesha nomba, talyakamone nakabili, amenso yobe yakamfwaya fwaya lelo nshakabepo ninshi ninja." 
Job7:9 Nga filya fine ikumbi lisalangana no kupita, efyo no muntu uuya ku calo ca bafwa apita ukwabula ukumoneka nakabili." 
Job7:10 Takatale abwelela ku ŋanda yakwe, ne cifulo cakwe cine cikamulabako." 
Job7:11 “Eico ine nshatalale tondolo iyoo, mfwile ukulanda pantu ndecula mu mupashi wandi, ndeilishanya pantu ndecululuka mu mweo wandi." 
Job7:12 Bushe nine bemba nangu shimweshimwe wa muli bemba pakuti mulenonda? 
Job7:13 Nga nalala pa musengele wandi nati, ‘Nalatuushako, no tulo twalantalalikako, mpemwineko ku macushi yandi.’" 
Job7:14 Elyo nomba iwe wandetela ifiloto ifyakuntiinya, ne fimonwa ifyakunsantamuna mu tulo," 
Job7:15 icakuti kuti natemwapo ukupwilila ku tulo no kufwa, ukucila ukulacula ifi muli uyu mubili." 
Job7:16 Ine napata ubumi bwandi, nshifwaya ukwikalilila pano calo, lekenifye mbe pantu inshiku shandi tashakwata ubupilibulo." 
Job7:17 “Ngo muntu wanshi uwakuti ulemucindamika, no kumubikishako amano," 
Job7:18 uwakuti ulemupempula cila kacelo, elyo no kumweshafye cila nshita?" 
Job7:19 Bushe tekuti utale ufumyeko amenso kuli ine, no kundeka ne mwine pakuti na ine naminako amate pa kashitafye kanono?" 
Job7:20 Nga nalibifya, finshi nacita kuli iwe we umona imitima ya bantu? Cinshi wansalile ukuba icakweseshapo fimo? Cinshi nasangukila icisendo kuli iwe?" 
Job7:21 Cinshi teti umbeleleko uluse pa fyabupulumushi fyandi, no kufumyapo ifyabubifi fyandi? Pantu nombalinefye ndi nokuya lala mu manda, ukamfwaya nomba nshakabepo.”" 
Job8:1 Elyo Biludadi umwina Shuha nao alandapo ati," 
Job8:2 “Bushe iwe Yobo, ukafisha lilali ukulalanda ifi, pa mashiwi yamo yene ayaba ngo mwela uulepupilisha?" 
Job8:3 Bushe Lesa kuti akaana ukucita umulinganya? Bushe Umwine wa maka yonse kuti afulunganya ifyalungama? 
Job8:4 Ilyo abana bobe babifishe kuli ena, nao alibapingwile ukulingana no bubi bwabo." 
Job8:5 Kanshi iwe pilibukila kuli Lesa, no kupapata ku Mwine wa maka yonse." 
Job8:6 Nga uli wakaele kabili umololoke, cacine Lesa alakulangulukila no kukubwesesha fyonse muli bukaele bobe." 
Job8:7 Nangu imikalile yobe iya kunuma ishali iyafikapo nganshi, kuntanshi ikawama ukucilapo." 
Job8:8 “Ipusha inkulo ishatangila, ufwailishe nefyo ifikolwe fyobe fyapitamo." 
Job8:9 Pantu ifwe fwe bana ba nomba tatwaishiba nangu cimo, pantu ubumi bwesu pano isonde bupitafye nge cinshingwa." 
Job8:10 Bushe teti ifikolwe fyamano fikufundeko no kukweba? Bushe teti basose ifyaba mu mitima yabo? 
Job8:11 “Bushe ifibale kuti fyamena apashili matipa? Bushe amatete kuti yamena apashili menshi? 
Job8:12 Amenshi nga yakama, amatete nelyo tayalapakula ninshi kuma, yalomapo bwangu pa fyani fimbi." 
Job8:13 Efyo impela yaba na kuli abo abalaba Lesa, ne cisubilo cabo efyo cipwa ku wasuula Lesa." 
Job8:14 Ico acetekelamo cintu icishakosa, cimo no kusubikila mwisumbu lyakwa tandabube." 
Job8:15 Umuntu wa musango uyu nga ashintilila kwisumbu lyakwa tandabube, teti limucingilile nakalya. Umuntu nga akoneneko, bushe kuti lyakaana ukuputuka?" 
Job8:16 Umubi akula nge cilimwa icimena bwangu mu kasuba, icisalanganya ne misambo mwibala lyonse." 
Job8:17 Imishila yaciko yapeka mu mwina wa mabwe, no kukonena ku mabwe yene." 
Job8:18 Lelo nga mwanukula ici cilimwa, abantu teti beshibe napo camenene." 
Job8:19 Efyo ubumi bwa cilimwa bupwa, mu mushili umo cali mwaisa mena na fimbi." 
Job8:20 “Iwe Yobo wishibe ukuti Lesa talekelesha abololoke, nelyo ukwafwilisha abacita ifibi." 
Job8:21 Lesa akalenga ukuti akanwa kobe kakesulemo inseko, no kwaula utupundu utwansansa." 
Job8:22 Ala Lesa akalenga abalwani bobe ukwikatwa insoni, na matenti ya bantu ababi tayakabepo nakalya.”" 
Job9:1 Elyo Yobo ayasuka ati," 
Job9:2 “Ee cine cine ninjishiba ukuti efyo caba, nomba umuntunse umwinakufwa kuti aba shani umololoke pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Job9:3 Nangu umuntu engapanga ukutalikana na Lesa, teti asukepo nangu limo pa mepusho ikana limo (1,000) ayo bengamwipusha." 
Job9:4 Alikwatisha amano, kabili alikwatisha na maka ayengi, nani engamutalamina no kuba no mutende?" 
Job9:5 Lesa alasesha impili ukwabula nokuti ishine shishibe, elyo nga afulwa alashipasa no kushipasa." 
Job9:6 Lesa alaleta icinkukuma no kusunkanya icalo, no kulenga ukuti apo caikala panshi patutume." 
Job9:7 Ena kuti aeba akasuba ukukanatula, no kufimba pa lubuuto lwa ntanda." 
Job9:8 Umwinefye eka ewayanshile umulu, no kunyanta pa matamba ya pali bemba." 
Job9:9 Ni Lesa ewasamika intanda mu mulu, ishili ngo lutanda lwa Bea mukalamba, no lutanda lwa Olioni, no lwa Pileiyadesi ne shalongana pamo ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Job9:10 Kuti twafilwa ukutasha ubukulu bwa fintu ifyo Lesa acita, ifipeshamano ifyo acita teti tukumemo ukupenda." 
Job9:11 Moneni nga apita apo ndi, teti mumone, nga ampitilila awe teti njishibe nelyo apitile." 
Job9:12 Nga aisa mukusenda ico alefwaya, nani engamulesha? Nani engapama ukumwipusha ati, ‘Bushe cinshi ulecitila ifi?’" 
Job9:13 Lesa tabwesha umutima nga afulwa, na baleafwana na Rahabu ala balatutuma pa nkasa shakwe." 
Job9:14 “Nomba ine kuti namwasuka shani? Bushe kuti nafumya kwisa amashiwi yakutalikana na Lesa? 
Job9:15 Nangufye ningaba uwakaele teti mwasuke, ine kumupapatafye pantu e mupingushi wandi." 
Job9:16 Nangufye ningamwita nao nokwisa aisa, nshishininkishe nga kuti aumfwa na kwishiwi lyandi." 
Job9:17 Pantu alantobaula kwati ni mfula ya mabwe ilendoka, ukufusha ifilonda fyandi ukwabula umulandu." 
Job9:18 Teti aleke nokuti mpemwineko, lelo aisusha ubumi bwandi na macushi." 
Job9:19 Nga nati nande pa maka, owe ala alikwatisha amaka! Nga nati nande pa mulinganya, nani engapama ukumwita mu cilye?" 
Job9:20 Nelyo ningatontonkanya ukuti ndi wakaele, akanwa kandi kene ekengampeela umulandu. Nga natila nalipwililika, kuti kanshinina ukuti ndi mubi." 
Job9:21 “Kwena kuti natila ndi wakaele, lelo ico tacimpamfishe, no bumi bwandi bwine nshibusakamene." 
Job9:22 Ala eco nsosele nati, ‘Cimo cinefye, ena onaula abakaele na babi bene.’" 
Job9:23 Ubwembya nga bwaleta imfwa yakupumikisha, ena aseka ukulakalaka ukwisa pa wakaele." 
Job9:24 Icalo nga caponena mu minwe ya bantu ababi, ena afimba bakapingula wa milandu pa menso. Nga teucita ifi, nga kanshi nani umbi uwingacita ici?" 
Job9:25 “Inshiku shandi shilepita bwangu ukucila na pa balebutuka ulubilo, shilepupuka, nshimonamo no busuma." 
Job9:26 Shileuluka kwati bwato bulya bapikula ku matete, nangu nga kapumpe ulya afokele kukuya fuba icakuti alye." 
Job9:27 Nga natontonkanya nati, ‘Limbi kandekefye ukuilishanya, nkwate ne nsansa pa menso no kumwentula ndemwentula.’" 
Job9:28 Nomba nga naibukisha amacushi yandi, umwenso wanjikata, pantu nalishiba ukuti tamwakandeke ngo wabula mulandu." 
Job9:29 Apo ndi wa milandu, cinshi ningalaicushisha?" 
Job9:30 Nangu ningasamba bwino mu menshi ya bunga bwa mfula, nafikina ne minwe yandi mu menshi ya fishikisa," 
Job9:31 iwe kuti wantumpika mu matipa, ne fyakufwala fyandi kuti fyakantana." 
Job9:32 Pantu Lesa te muntu nga ine uwakuti tulepashanya nankwe, uwakuti tuletwalishanya nankwe mu cilye." 
Job9:33 Nga cakuti kwali uwakukalulula pali ifwe babili, uwingakwata amaka yakutwikatamo ifwe bonse," 
Job9:34 uwingasesha icisendo cakwa Lesa icaba pali ine, no kuleka ukutiinya kwakwe kwimpeela mwenso." 
Job9:35 Lyena kuti nalanda ukwabula ukumutiina, nomba ifi tefyo cili kuli ine, kanshi teti nande.”" 
Job10:1 “Apo ine nintendwa ukuba umumi, nakulailishanyafye. Nakulalanda ukufuma panshi ya bukali ubuli mu mweo wandi." 
Job10:2 Ndeeba Lesa nati, wimpeela umulandu, njebafye umulandu ulencitila ifi." 
Job10:3 Bushe cisuma ukuncusha, no kususha uo wapangile ku minwe yobe, elyo no kusekelela amapange ya bantu ababi?" 
Job10:4 Bushe wakwata amenso ya bantu? Bushe umona ngefi abantunse bamona? 
Job10:5 Bushe inshiku shobe shilapwa ngefi isha bantu shipwa, nangu bushe imyaka yobe yaba ngefyo iya bantu yaba," 
Job10:6 pakuti ulefwaya fwaya ukumona ifyabupulumushi fyandi, no kufwailisha ububifi bwandi?" 
Job10:7 Nelyo walishiba ukuti ine nshili mubifi, kabili walishiba ukuti takuli nangu umo uwingamfyombotola mu minwe yobe." 
Job10:8 “Iminwe yobe eyamumbile no kumpanga bwino bwino, kabili niwe unjalukile no kungonaula." 
Job10:9 Ibukisha we Lesa ukuti wampangile ukufuma kwiloba, bushe kuti watemwa ukumbwesesha ku lukungu nakabili?" 
Job10:10 Bushe tewe wampongolwele ngo mukaka, no kulenga ntikame ngo mukaka uwakamantana?" 
Job10:11 Niwe wamfwikile iminofu, wafimbapo ne nkanda, wapikwile amafupa pamo ne mishipashipa mu mubili wandi." 
Job10:12 Epakumpeela umweo, wananga ne citemwiko cobe icishiputuka, wabikapo no kulasunga umutima wandi ku luse lobe." 
Job10:13 “Nomba ifi fintu walififisa mu mutima obe, naishiba nomba ukutila ifi fine efyo walefwaya." 
Job10:14 Nga nabifya kuti wamona, kabili teti umbeleleko no uluse ku fyabupulumushi fyandi." 
Job10:15 Nga nalibifya ishamo limponene, nga ndi wakaele, nalyo line teti njinune nangu mutwe, ndeumfwafye insoni no kulanguluka pa bucushi bwandi." 
Job10:16 Pantu njinuna umutwe no kuisansabalika nga wanunga nge nkalamo, nakabili nga naubwekeshapo ukucita ifyakumpesha amano." 
Job10:17 Waletelapo bakambone abakunshinina na bambi, ne cipyu wankwatila naco nga nacikulilako, na macushi ayo wantumina yanjishila nga matamba ayalekonkana." 
Job10:18 “Bushe cinshi walengele ukuti mfyalwe? Kanshi nga nafwilefye ilyo linso lya muntu talilamona," 
Job10:19 nga nabafye ngo muntu uushatalile abapo, mfyalwa akapopo ukufuma mwifumo no kuya ku nshinshi." 
Job10:20 Bushe inshiku sha bumi bwandi tashishelefye ishinono? Shi lekeni ukulolesha pali ine no kundeka nsansamukekofye panono," 
Job10:21 ilyo nshilaya ku cifulo uko nshakabwele, ku calo ca mfifi ica cinshingwa ca mfwa," 
Job10:22 ku calo ca mfifi iyafiita fititi, ukwaba icinshingwa ca mfwa ne cimfulumfulu, uko ulubuuto lwaba nge mfifi iyafiitisha.”" 
Job11:1 Elyo Sofari umwina Namati alandapo ati," 
Job11:2 “Bushe kuti twakaana shani ukwasukako ku mashiwi yafula ifi? Bushe ukufusha ifyakusosa ekulungika mwa? 
Job11:3 Bushe uletontonkanya ukuti ukulanda kobe we Yobo ekwingatulesha ukusosapo mwa? Ilyo uletumfya abantu uleti teti tukukaanye bati? 
Job11:4 Pantu iwe ulesosa ukuti, ‘Ine nkonka amafunde ayacine cine, ndi wakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa.’" 
Job11:5 Nomba nga cakuti Lesa nao alanda, ayasamuna akanwa kakwe pakukwasuka." 
Job11:6 Elyo nga kuti akweba inkaama sha mano yakwe, pantu amano yene yene yakwata imbali shibili, lyena ishiba ukuti Lesa alilekelelapo na fimo pafyo wabifya." 
Job11:7 “Bushe iwe kuti wapikulula ubwile bwakwa Lesa mwa, nangu ukwishiba apapela amano ya Mwine wa maka yonse?" 
Job11:8 Amano yakwe yasansama ukucila imyulu, finshi wingacita? Amano yakwe yalishika ukucila icalo ca bafwa, finshi wingeshiba?" 
Job11:9 Icipimo cayako calicila icalo ku bukulu, cacila na pali bemba uwapabuka." 
Job11:10 Lesa nga aima, aisa alonganika abantu no kubesalila na mu cifungo, pakubalubulwisha nani engamulesha?" 
Job11:11 Pantu Lesa ena alishiba abantu abashaba na cishinka, elyo nga amona ifibi bushe muleti kuti asuulakofye mwa?" 
Job11:12 Lelo umuntu uushakwata amano akelukafye, ilyo umwana wakwa punda wa mu mpanga afyalwa ngo muntu." 
Job11:13 “Yobo shi wingalungamika umutima obe, imya amaboko yobe kuli Lesa no kupepa." 
Job11:14 Leka ukucita ifyabipa, fumya ne fyalufyengo mu matenti yobe." 
Job11:15 Ninshi lyena kuti wainuna amenso yobe ukwabula insoni, kuti waiminina uwashangila ukwabula no mwenso." 
Job11:16 Lyena ninshi ukalabako ku macushi yobe, no kulayebukishafye nga filya wibukisha mulamba uupitile kale." 
Job11:17 Elyo imikalile yobe ikabalika kwati kubalika kwa kasuba ilyo kali pakati ka mutwe. Ne mfifi ya bushiku ikaba ngo kubuuta kwa pa macaca. 
Job11:18 Ukakwata icicetekelo pantu ukaba ne subilo, ukaba uwacingililwa kabili ukekala umutelelwe." 
Job11:19 Elyo nga wasendama, uletuusha, takwakabe icakukupumfyanya. Abantu abengi bakalafwaya ukuti ubafweko." 
Job11:20 Lelo amenso ya babifya yakafilwa ukumona, kabili tabakamone ukwakubutukila, bena ico bakalalolelafye kufwa.”" 
Job12:1 Elyo Yobo nao ayasuka ati," 
Job12:2 “Kwena muli bantu bamano, nomba ilyo mukafwa ninshi na mano yene yakaloba." 
Job12:3 Ala kwena na ine wine ndi wamano nga imwe bene. Teti muncile nelyo panono, bushe nani uushaishiba ifyo fyonse mulelanda?" 
Job12:4 “Ine ninsanguka uwakusekwa ku banandi. Nangu nakuutile kuli Lesa nao alinjaswike, nomba balanseka nangula ndi mololoke kabili uwabula umulandu." 
Job12:5 Abashikwete ubwafya batontonkanya ukuti uwashama ali nokusuulwa, no uletalansuka ali nokuwa." 
Job12:6 Pa matenti ya bapupu epali umutende, nabo abakalifya Lesa umutima ebali bwino, abo abacetekela mu maka yabo, e mulungu wabo." 
Job12:7 “Nomba ipusheni inama, shilemufundako, ne fyuni fya mu lwelele, filemweba." 
Job12:8 Nangu ipusheni ifimena pa mushili, filemufundako, ne sabi lya muli bemba, lyalamweba." 
Job12:9 Pali ifi fyonse nani uushaishiba ukuti, ukuboko kwakwa Yawe ekwabomba ifi?" 
Job12:10 Ubumi bwa fintu fyonse ifipema bwaba mu minwe yakwa Lesa, pamo penefye no mupu uo abantu bapema." 
Job12:11 Bushe te kutwi kusobolola amashiwi, elyo te kanwa kasonda ifyakulya?" 
Job12:12 Abakote ebasangwa na mano, ubwingi bwa nshiku nabo bulalenga umuntu akwata amano yakwishiba no kwiluka." 
Job12:13 “Nomba Lesa ewaba na mano na maka kabili eupandako abantu amano, no kubafundako pakuti beluke." 
Job12:14 Ico abongolola tapali nangu umo uwingacikuula nakabili, ico akaka tapali uwingacikakula." 
Job12:15 Nga alesha imfula ukuloka ninshi kwaba icilala, kabili nga alokesha imfula iyingi, icalo ninshi kubundwa." 
Job12:16 Lesa ewakwata amaka na mano, bonse ababepwa elyo na babepa ubufi, bantu bakwe." 
Job12:17 Apoka bampandamano amano, no kulenga bakaputula wa milandu ukuba ifipuba." 
Job12:18 Eupoka bashamfumu ubufumu bwabo, no kubalenga ukukakwa imyando mu musana." 
Job12:19 Eupoka bashimapepo tonse uto bakwata, afumya na babulamba pa fipuna fyabo." 
Job12:20 Alakomeka na mashiwi ya bacenjela mukulanda. Apoka na bakote amano yakwishiba ifibi ne fisuma. 
Job12:21 Alenga bakateeka ukusuulwa, eulenga nokuti amaka ya babulamba yapwe." 
Job12:22 Eusokolola ifyafisama mu mfifi ikalamba, no kuleka ifya mu mfifi ikalamba fise apabuuta." 
Job12:23 Eupalamika imishobo ya bantu, kabili no kuyonaula. Alasandulula imishobo ya bantu, kabili aisalanganya." 
Job12:24 Afulunganya amano ya ntungulushi ishaba pano isonde, shalalulumbafye mu matololo, shaluba ne nshila." 
Job12:25 Shilepulumpunta mu mfifi ukwabula ulubuuto, no kulatalansuka nga bakolelwe ubwalwa.”" 
Job13:1 “Ala moneni, fyonse ifi ilinso lyandi lyalifimonapo, na matwi yandi yalifyumfwapo, no kufishiba nalifishiba." 
Job13:2 Ifintu mwaishiba na ine nalifishiba, tekuti muncile nangu panono." 
Job13:3 Lelo ine ndefwaya ukulanda no Mwine wa maka yonse, Lesa eo ndefwaya ukulubulula nankwe." 
Job13:4 Pantu imwe mulebepekesha ukulanda icishinka kanshi muli babufi, mwaba nga bashiŋanga abashaishiba nangu cimo." 
Job13:5 Shi talalenifye tondolo, pantu ecingabafye icamano ukucita." 
Job13:6 Umfweni kanshi kufyo nalatantika umulandu wandi, kutikeni ifyo nalalubulula na kanwa kandi." 
Job13:7 “Bushe cinshi mulebepela ubufi mwishina lyakwa Lesa? No kumusoselako nomba mu fyabufi? 
Job13:8 Bushe mulefwaya ukuwila ku lubali lwakwe? Bushe kuti mwalubulwilako Lesa umulandu? 
Job13:9 Bushe imwe muleti kuti camuwamina nga amuceceta ifyo ubumi bwenu bwaba? Nangu bushe kuti mwamubepa ngefyo umuntu abepa umubiye? 
Job13:10 Ala Lesa akamukalipila, nga cakuti mulawila ulubali lumo mu bumfisolo." 
Job13:11 Bushe ubucindami bwakwa Lesa tabumutiinya, na katiina kakwa Lesa takamwishila?" 
Job13:12 Amapinda yenu ala mapinda ya mito, na mu nsoselo shenu ishakuipokololako ala namo mulifye iloba." 
Job13:13 “Talaleni lekeni na ine nkwate inshita iyakuilandila, ne calacitika kacicitike." 
Job13:14 Nshikene, nomba bushe mulandu nshi ndebikila umweo wandi mu bwafya pakulanda? Ine ndi uwaipekanya ukulofya umweo wandi." 
Job13:15 Lesa nga alefwaya ukunjipaya kuti anjipaya, nomba ine nkaipokololako palwa myendele yandi pa cinso cakwe." 
Job13:16 Ici ecikampususha pantu nalishiba ukuti, uwamulandu kuti afilwa ukwiminina pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Job13:17 Mumfwe bwino bwino amashiwi yandi, kutikeni kufyo ndesosa." 
Job13:18 Moneni ninjipekanya nganshi ukulubulula umulandu wandi, pantu ninjishiba ukuti bakansanga ndi wakaele." 
Job13:19 Nani engampeela umulandu, naese pakuti ntalalefye tondolo no kufwa mfwe." 
Job13:20 “Nomba ndelomba ifintu fibili, lyena nshafisame ku cinso cobe." 
Job13:21 Fumya ukuboko kobe pali ine, kabili wileka umwenso wakutiina ubukali bobe umpwishe amaka." 
Job13:22 Elyo lyena nga wanjita ndeisa, nangu leka nsosefye, na iwe unjasuke." 
Job13:23 Bushe ifyabupulumushi ne fyabubifi nacita fyaba finga? Unange ifyo nalufyanya nefyo nabifya. 
Job13:24 Cinshi wafishila icinso cobe kuli ine, no kumbika pa balwani bobe?" 
Job13:25 Bushe kuti watiinya ibuula ilileululuka mu mwela, nangu ukukunkunika icani icauma?" 
Job13:26 Wampingula buluku buluku, wankalipila na pa fyabupulumushi fya ku bwaice bwandi." 
Job13:27 Wabika amolu yandi mwikoli, ulengula na monse umo ndepita, ulapima na monse umo amakasa yandi yanyanta." 
Job13:28 Efyo no bumi bwa muntu bonaikafye nge cintu icilebola, atemwa insalu iyaliiwa ku cipelebesha ca bushiku.”" 
Job14:1 “Umuntu onse uwafyalwa ku mwanakashi, ekalafye inshita inono pa calo, elyo ifyafulishamo, macushi." 
Job14:2 Atila abalula nge luba kabili abonsa, apita nge cinshingwa icishikalilila." 
Job14:3 Bushe kuti watontomesha amenso yobe pa muntu uwaba ifi? Kabili eo waita no kumuleta ku bupingushi kuli iwe? 
Job14:4 Nani engafumya icasanguluka ku cakowela? Tapali nangu umo. 
Job14:5 Apo inshiku sha muntu shalipendwa, ne mpendwa ya myeshi yakwe yalishibikwa kuli iwe. Apo niwe upimina umuntu apakupelela, kanshi teti acile apo wamupimina." 
Job14:6 Fumyapo amenso pa muntu uleke aikalile, apwishishishe ubushiku bwakwe nga filya uwancito acita." 
Job14:7 “Umuti wena walikwata isubilo, nangula bengautema kuti wapuka nakabili, no kukonkanyapo ukukwata imisambo." 
Job14:8 Imishila yauko nangu ingakota shani, ne cishiki caumina mu mushili," 
Job14:9 kuti walemuka nga waumfwa umutonshi, no kupuuka imisambo iyiteku." 
Job14:10 Nomba umuntu nga afwa, ninshi afwililila no kumushiika bamushiika. Umuntu nga aleka umweo, aba kwi?" 
Job14:11 Nga filya fine amenshi ya muli bemba yakama no kucepa, na ya mu mumana yakama no mumana wauma," 
Job14:12 abantu balafwa nokwima tabema, tababuka nakalya mpakafye umulu ukapite, tabakatale ababushiwa mu tulo." 
Job14:13 “Iyee, kanshi nga wamfishilefye ku calo ca bafwa, pakuti eko wambelamika mpakafye ubukali bobe bwapwa, no kumpekanishisha inshita ukanjibukishamo nakabili." 
Job14:14 Umuntu nga afwa, bushe kuti aba umumi nakabili? Nangu ningabomba imilimo yandi pa nshita itali, nshakatendwe, nakulalolelafye mpakafye amacushi yandi yakapwe." 
Job14:15 Lyena nga wanjita nkasuka, elyo ukafwaya ukumona icibumbwa wapangile ku minwe yobe." 
Job14:16 Lyena kuti walalengula imyendele yandi yonse, lelo wikalolesha pa bubi bwandi." 
Job14:17 Ne fyabubifi fyandi ukafisalila mu cola, no kufimba pa fyabupulumushi fyandi fyonse." 
Job14:18 “Nomba nga filya fine ulupili lusholomoka lwasuka lwabongoloka, ne cilibwe caseshiwa caselela kumbi," 
Job14:19 filya fine amenshi yakuusa amabwe, na mulamba asenda umushili, efyo na iwe we Lesa onaula isubilo lya muntu." 
Job14:20 Pakulekelesha umuntu wamucimfya, apita no kuya aya, wamwalula na mu mimonekele, wamulofya afumapo aya." 
Job14:21 Abana bakwe abaume nga bashala bacindikwa, teti eshibe, nangu nga basebana teti amoneko." 
Job14:22 Ena omfwafye ubukali mu mubili wakwe, no kuilooshafye umwine.”" 
Job15:1 Elyo Elifasi umwina Temani ayaswike ati," 
Job15:2 “Bushe umuntu wamano kuti ayasukako ku mashiwi ayabuwelewele, nelyo ukwikuta umwela uwakaba uwa ku kabanga?" 
Job15:3 Bushe kuti afwaya ukulanda amashiwi ayacabecabe, ne milandile iyishingacita nangu cimo?" 
Job15:4 Cinshi iwe Yobo wafumisha akatiina ka kuli Lesa mu mano yobe, waonaula na matontonkanyo ayasuma pali Lesa?" 
Job15:5 Ububi bwaba mu mutima obe ebwalenga ukuti akanwa kobe kalande ifi, nokuti utoole ululimi lwabucenjeshi." 
Job15:6 Akanwa kobe ekakushinina, teine iyoo. Imilomo yobe nayo eyakupeela imilandu." 
Job15:7 “Bushe niwe wabalilepo ukufyalwa pa bantu bonse mwa? Bushe waliko ilyo impili tashilati shibeko? 
Job15:8 Bushe ulomfwako ubupingushi bwa mu cilye cakwa Lesa? Niwe wakwata amano wekafye mwa? 
Job15:9 Finshi waishiba ifyo ifwe tushaishiba? Finshi waumfwa ifyo ifwe tushaumfwa? 
Job15:10 Pali baifwe pali abakalamba abamfwi, abali ne myaka iyingi, abakote ukucila na pali bawiso." 
Job15:11 Bushe wasuula ukutalalika kwakwa Lesa, nangu ishiwi lintu akutepelesha mutende mutende mu kutwi?" 
Job15:12 Cinshi umutima obe ukoseele ifi? Mona ifyo walalukumya amenso," 
Job15:13 icakuti no mutima obe wafulilwa Lesa, waleka na kanwa kobe kasosa amashiwi ya musango uyu." 
Job15:14 Bushe muntu nshi uwingaba uwakaele? Nani uwafyalwa ku mwanakashi uwingaba umololoke? 
Job15:15 Lesa nga tacetekela abamushilo bakwe, elyo ne myulu ine nga tayaba iyapwililika pa cinso cakwe nakalya," 
Job15:16 palibufi umuntunse uwabipisha, uwakowela, uunwa ububi kwati menshi!" 
Job15:17 “Nga wakutika kuli ine nalakweba, nalakulondolwela ifyo ine naimwena," 
Job15:18 ifishilano ifya bamano, ifyo ifikolwe fyabo fyabashilile." 
Job15:19 Abo beka ebapeelwe icalo ico abenafyalo bashalepitamo. 
Job15:20 Ubumi bwa muntu umubi bwaba bwakucula inshiku shonse, nga filya fine caba ku muntu umuluku, mpakafye apo imyaka yakwe yapiminwa." 
Job15:21 Iciunda cakutiinya caumfwika mu matwi ya mubi, lilya linefye ifintu fyaba bwino mu bumi bwakwe elyo ifipondo fyaisa musansa." 
Job15:22 Tasubila ukuti akafumamo mu mfifi, icikamucitikila kutila ulupanga lukamukoma." 
Job15:23 Akalulumba mpanga yonse mukufwaya ifyakulya, no kutila, ‘Ifyakulya fili kwi?’ Alishininkisha ukuti ubwafya buli mupepi." 
Job15:24 Ubulanda no bucushi nafimwishila, fyamucimfya nge mfumu iyiteyenye ukuya kukulwa." 
Job15:25 Pantu emishe ukuboko kwakwe kukulwisha Lesa, apamine ukusangukila Umwine wa maka yonse." 
Job15:26 Napama ukulwisha Lesa, naifimba ne nkwela yakwe iyatikama." 
Job15:27 Pantu ali uwaina na masaya yaletenta, na matanta ayafininwa kukwina." 
Job15:28 “Akekala mu fibolya fya misumba, na mu fipompa mu mayanda ayabongoloka, ayali nokusanguka umwina wa fitantala." 
Job15:29 Takatale aba umukankala, ne fyuma fyakwe tafyakakokole nangu ukusalangana mu calo." 
Job15:30 Takatale afuma mu mfifi, akaba ngo muti uo umulilo waumika imishila, no mupu uwakufuma mu kanwa kakwa Lesa ukamusenda." 
Job15:31 Elaibepa pakucetekela mu fyafye, pantu takamwenemo amalipilo nakalya." 
Job15:32 Ifi efikamucitikila mu bumi bwakwe, akooma ngo lusansu ulushakapuke nakabili." 
Job15:33 Akaba ngo mwangashi uulelukusha ifipompo, nangu umuolifa uulelukusha amabula yauko." 
Job15:34 Pantu uluko ulushisumina Lesa talusanduluka, ne tenti lya upoka amafisakanwa lilapya ku mulilo." 
Job15:35 Bakemita ububi, no kufyala ishamo, na mafumo yabo yapekanya ubucenjeshi.”" 
Job16:1 Elyo Yobo ayasuka ati," 
Job16:2 “Nalyumfwa ifintu ifingi ifya musango uyu, nimwe bakatalalika abawelewele bonsefye." 
Job16:3 Bushe mukaleka lilali ukulanda amashiwi yenu ayaba ngo mwela weka weka? Kanshi amaka yakutwalilila ukulanda ifi muyafumya kwi? 
Job16:4 Pantu na ine wine kuti nalanda amashiwi yamo yene, nga cakuti imwe mwali mwipunda lyandi. Kuti nalanda amashiwi ayengi ayakumwimina, ndekunta no mutwe wandi apo muli." 
Job16:5 Kuti nalanda amashiwi yakumukoselesha, na mashiwi ya pa kanwa kandi kuti yamuletela icitalaliko." 
Job16:6 “Nomba nga nalanda, ubucushi bwandi tabutalele iyoo, nga natalala tondolo, cimo cinefye ubucushi tabulepwa iyoo." 
Job16:7 Cine cine we Lesa naungonaula, naulofya no lupwa lwandi lonse." 
Job16:8 Elyo kabili naunkaka, cili kwati e cikambone cakunshinina, imfundabuteshi shandi nashinjimina no kupeela ubunte pa cinso candi." 
Job16:9 Lesa alencusha mu cipyu cakwe, nandepaula, alesumanya na meno yakwe pali ine, na balwani bandi bantontelefye amenso yabo pali ine." 
Job16:10 Nabanjasamwina utunwa twabo pakungwela, balenguma na mapi mu masaya. Nabekatana pakunjimina." 
Job16:11 Lesa namposa mu minwe ya bantu ababifi, nambika mu minwe ya bantu ababi." 
Job16:12 Ne mwine naleikalafye bwino, aisa nsansaula, Lesa ankama pa mukoshi no kumputaula tupimfya tupimfya, kabili ninefye alungeme." 
Job16:13 Nandasaula imifwi ukufuma mu tupinda tonse. Ukwabula no luse, napulinkanya imfyo shandi. Naitila ne ndusha yandi panshi." 
Job16:14 Nandasaula imiku ne miku, nalulunkana palwa ine kwati cita ca nkondo." 
Job16:15 Ninsuka nimbila ne nsalu shabulanda, esho ndefwala, no kushiba impumi mu lukungu." 
Job16:16 Amenso yandi nayasuka nayakashika na cee kukulila ifilamba, ne fikumbi fya menso yandi nafifimba, fifitilepo na fititi." 
Job16:17 Nangu line mu minwe yandi tamwaba lufyengo, elyo ne pepo lyandi lyacishinka." 
Job16:18 “We calo wishiika umulopa wandi, ne nkuuta shandi shikatala ashileka ukumfwika." 
Job16:19 Na nombaline kambone wandi aba mu mulu, no wakunandilako aba mwa Lesa." 
Job16:20 Kebela wandi e cibusa wandi, ilyo amenso yandi yaletibinta ifilamba kuli Lesa." 
Job16:21 Kebela eusoseleko umuntu kuli Lesa, nga filya umuntunse asoselako cibusa wakwe." 
Job16:22 “Kushelefye imyaka inono, ninshi natoola inshila iyakuya uko bashibwela.”" 
Job17:1 “Umupashi wandi naonaika, inshiku shandi ishakwikala pano calo nashicepa. Inindi umwakunshiika ilendolela." 
Job17:2 Cine cine abakuntumfya nabanshinguluka, na menso yandi nayamona ubunkalwe bwabo." 
Job17:3 “Ngafwako we Lesa no kumpeela ico ufwaya pantu takuli nangu umo uwingangafwa? 
Job17:4 Pantu naubomika imitima teti beshibe, kanshi tawakabalenge ukusumbulwa." 
Job17:5 Uwabepa umunankwe pakumwenamo ubunonshi, nao amenso ya bana bakwe yakanaka mukulolela." 
Job17:6 “Lesa nansangula ngo mulumbe ku bantu, umuntu uo abantu basaka amate pa menso." 
Job17:7 Amenso yandi nayanaka ku mulandu wa macushi, no mubili wandi uli kwati cinshingwa." 
Job17:8 Ici, cakupapa ku bololoke, no wakaele aimina abantu abashaishiba Lesa." 
Job17:9 Kabili abalungami bena nabatwalilila mu nshila shabo, na bakaele baleikoseleshafye." 
Job17:10 “Nomba imwe konkanyenipo, bwekeshenipo bonsefye, lelo kwena nshamonepo uwamano." 
Job17:11 Inshiku shandi nashipita, amapange yandi nayonaika, pamo penefye nefyo umutima wandi ufwaya ukucita." 
Job17:12 Bapilibula ubushiku ukuba akasuba. Ulubuuto balandapo talukokola, bwangu bwangu imfifi yaisa." 
Job17:13 Bushe ine isubilo lyandi nga kwikala ku calo ca bafwa, no kwanshika umusengele wandi mu mfifi," 
Job17:14 nga naeba inindi ukuti, ‘E tata,’ naeba ne mititi nati, ‘E mayo,’ nangu, ‘E nkashi yandi,’" 
Job17:15 ninshi icisubilo candi cili kwi? Nani engamona ukuti naba ne cakulolela? 
Job17:16 Bushe nkaya nafyo ku calo ca bafwa, nangu nkabwelelamo nafyo ku lukungu?”" 
Job18:1 Elyo Biludadi umwina Shuha ayasuka ati," 
Job18:2 “Bushe iwe Yobo uleleka lilali amashiwi yakusabaila? Shikatala uleke na ifwe tulandepo. 
Job18:3 Cinshi uletumwena nge nama? Cinshi uletumwena nga bantu ababulwa amano mu menso yobe? 
Job18:4 Nelyo uleilepula we mwine ku cipyu cobe, bushe icalo kuti casunkana pa mulandu obe, nangu amabwe ukufuma pa ncende yaikalapo?" 
Job18:5 “Ala cishinka ulubuuto lwa muntu umubi lulashima, no lubingu lwa mulilo wakwe lulaleka ukubilima." 
Job18:6 Ulubuuto mwi tenti lyakwe lulashima, ne cisaniko cine icimusanikila cilashima." 
Job18:7 Uwaleenda ne ntampulo ishamaka kale nomba aleongolokafye, ubucenjeshi bwakwe bwamuponya pa musao." 
Job18:8 Pantu amakasa yakwe umwine eyamutwala mukwikatwa mwisumbu, no kulenga ukuti anyante mu busafu bwe sumbu." 
Job18:9 Iciteyo camwikatila ku citende cakwe, icitembo calamufyenta." 
Job18:10 Intambo iyakumwikata ifishilwe mu mushili, no bucinga bwimbilwe mu nshila apitamo." 
Job18:11 Ifyakumutiinya fyalimutengamina konse konse, no kumukonka pa katende ka lukasa konse uko aleya." 
Job18:12 Ubonaushi bulemulolela, ne cinkunka caiteyanya ukumwikata nga awa." 
Job18:13 Ubulwele bulalya inkanda yakwe, solwesolwe wa mfwa alelya ifilundwa fyakwe." 
Job18:14 Nabamukululula ukumufumya mwitenti lyakwe ilyo acetekelamo, no kumutintila ku mfumu ya fintiinya." 
Job18:15 Mwitenti lyakwe tamwakashale icintu nelyo cimo, no kukuba bakakubamo amaluti." 
Job18:16 Imishila yakwe panshi nayuma, ne misambo yakwe nayuma ku mulu." 
Job18:17 Tabakamwibukishe pano isonde, ne shina lyakwe likaloba mu calo." 
Job18:18 Bakamufumya mu lubuuto no kumuposa mu mfifi, no kumufumya pano isonde." 
Job18:19 Takashe umwana nangufye icinshikulula mu luko lwakwe, takwakabe na kashimike." 
Job18:20 Abantu ba ku masamba bakasunguka pakumona ishamo lya uyu muntu, abantu ba ku kabanga bena bakekatwa no mwenso." 
Job18:21 Ee, ili eshamo iliponena pa ŋanda ya muntu umubifi, ici, e cifulo ca muntu uushaishiba Lesa.”" 
Job19:1 Elyo Yobo nao ayasuka no kutila," 
Job19:2 “Bushe mukaleka lilali ukuncusha, no kunjebaula mu milandile yenu?" 
Job19:3 Namuntukaula imiku ikumi, teti mumfweko ne nsoni pafyo muncita?" 
Job19:4 Nga cakuti ine nalilufyanya, imwe camusakamikila nshi? Pantu cilubo candi." 
Job19:5 Nga cakuti imwe mwalaitutumuna pali ine, no kubomfya ubucushi bwandi nge cakunshinina," 
Job19:6 mwishibe ukuti ni Lesa ewanjilikisha. Ewampombela mwisumbu lyakwe. 
Job19:7 “Ine nangufye nailishanya pa bunkalwe bancita, awe tapaba uwakunjasuka. Nangufye nafwaya ukulubulula, tapaba wakumputwila umulandu mu mulinganya." 
Job19:8 Lesa alinjisalila inshila, kanshi teti mone na pakupita. Abika mfifi mu nshila shandi." 
Job19:9 Alimpokolola ubucindami bwandi, amfula ne cilongwe ku mutwe wandi." 
Job19:10 Nangonaula mu mbalifye shonse, tapali ico ndi, nashula isubilo lyandi nga filya ashula umuti." 
Job19:11 Alinjimisha ubukali bwakwe, ancita ngo mulwani wakwe." 
Job19:12 Ifita fyakwe ifyamaka nafimpalamina, nafiipekanya kukunsansa, nafishinguluka itenti lyandi." 
Job19:13 “Lesa alintalusha kuli bamunyinane, na bonsefye abanjishiba nabanseeluka." 
Job19:14 Balupwa lwandi nabantaluka, na bacibusa wandi nabandekelesha." 
Job19:15 Abeni nalepokelela na babomfi bandi abakashana balemona ine ngo mweni, nsangwike umwinafyalo mu menso yabo." 
Job19:16 Nga naita umubomfi wandi, tewakunjasuka nakalya, nangufye mpapate shani." 
Job19:17 Ku mukashi wandi nako umupu wandi ulenunka pipi, na kuli bamunyinane kwine ndenunka umukusa." 
Job19:18 No twaice twine natunsuula, nga twamona ine tulentumfya." 
Job19:19 Abanandi bonse nabampata, na batemwikwa bandi nabo nabanjalukila." 
Job19:20 Niŋonda, nshelefye amafupa yeka yeka, nshalilefye ku mutwe, mpuswikefye kwempe!" 
Job19:21 “Nangulukeniko mwe bacibusa wandi, shi nangulukeniko pantu ukuboko kwakwa Lesa nakuntitikisha." 
Job19:22 Cinshi mulencushisha ifi ngefyo Lesa alencusha? Bushe tamwakanake ukucusha umubili wandi? 
Job19:23 “Iyee, nga kuti yalembwa amashiwi yandi! Ala, kuti natemwa yalembwa mu citabo." 
Job19:24 Yalembwa ku cilembelo ca cela na ku mutofwe, yabaswa na pa cilibwe pakuti yabelelela." 
Job19:25 Nomba ine, naishiba ukuti ndubulwila wandi aba umumi, na pakulekelesha akesa iminina pano calo." 
Job19:26 Nangu panuma inkanda yandi yaonaika kuli ubu bulwele, nkatamba Lesa no mubili wandi." 
Job19:27 Ine eo nkamona na menso yandi aya, teumbi iyoo, nine wine. Ala umutima wandi eo ulekabila pa maka." 
Job19:28 “Nga mwalanda amuti, ‘Twalamucusha nganshi, natufwaye inshila yakumupeelelamo umulandu!’" 
Job19:29 Mufwile ukutiina ulupanga mwe bene, pantu icipyu cakwa Lesa ecilenga ukuti amulimune ku lupanga, elyo no kwishiba mukeshiba ukuti ubupingushi eko bwaba.”" 
Job20:1 Elyo Sofari umwina Namati ayasuka ati," 
Job20:2 “Ifyo walanda Yobo fyankalifya umutima, ecalenga nokuti nkwasuke bwangu bwangu. Nafilwa ukuteka umutima." 
Job20:3 Amashiwi naumfwa yamusaalula yamponya na pa musao, no mutima wandi wanjeba ifyakwasuka." 
Job20:4 “Bushe tawaishiba ifyo caba ukufumafye na kale, ukutulafye pa nshita umuntu bamubikile pano calo," 
Job20:5 ukuti umucinshi wa muntu umubifi tautwalilila, ne nsansa sha muntu uushitiina Lesa shibakofye pa kashita akanono?" 
Job20:6 Nangu ubukankala bwakwe bwinganina bwafika na mu mulu, no mutwe wakwe ulekumya na mu makumbi," 
Job20:7 ala nakalya wakuposafye, aposwafye ngo busali bwakwe. Abamumwenepo bakalatilafye, ‘Aba kwi?’" 
Job20:8 Akapita nge ciloto, takamoneke, akongoloka nge cimonwa ca bushiku." 
Job20:9 Ilinso ilyalemumona talyakatale alimumona nakabili, ne cifulo cakwe tacakatale acimumona nakalya." 
Job20:10 Abana bakwe ebakalomba uluse ku balanda, kabili iminwe yakwe ikabwesha ifyuma fyakwe." 
Job20:11 Amafupa yakwe ayaisulamo amaka ya bulumendo, yakashiikwa nankwe pamo mu lukungu." 
Job20:12 “Nangu ububi bwalowa mu kanwa kakwe, nangu engabufisa panshi ya lulimi lwakwe," 
Job20:13 nangu tafwaya no kubufwisa, abufubatilafye mu kanwa kakwe," 
Job20:14 ifilyo mu cifu cakwe nafisasa, fyasanguka ubusungu bwa ngoshe mu mala yakwe." 
Job20:15 Akaluka ifyuma acibawile, Lesa akamuletela umuselu no kumulusha." 
Job20:16 Akonka ubusungu bwa ngoshe, no lulimi lwa nsoka lukamwipaya." 
Job20:17 Takatale alolesha pa mimana, ne milonga iyifumfumukamo ubuci ne shiba ilyatikama." 
Job20:18 Akabwesha conse ico anonkele no kuculila, takaliilepo na pa bukumu bwa milimo yakwe." 
Job20:19 Pantu atitikisha abalanda no kulenga ukuti babe abapina, apokolola iŋanda iyo ashakuulile." 
Job20:20 “Ulunkumbwa lwakwe ulubi talupwa iyoo, ne fyuma atutila tafyakamusansamushe." 
Job20:21 Tashapo utwakulya nelyo tumo, e mulandu wine no bukankala bwakwe bushikokwela." 
Job20:22 Pa nshita akwatisha ifyuma ifingi, elyo ubupina bukamwikata, no bulanda ubukalamba bukamuponena." 
Job20:23 Ilyo aisusha ulufumo lwakwe no kwikuta, elyo Lesa akamufokela ne cipyu icikalamba, no kumuponesha ubukali lilya line alelya." 
Job20:24 Nangu engabutuka icanso ca cela, umufwi wa mukuba wamupulinkanya." 
Job20:25 Umufwi uwamulasa ulapulila panuma, no lulimi lwauko ulwabengeshima lwatula ne ndusha, no mwenso uukalamba wamwikata, alasokonafye." 
Job20:26 Imfifi ikulu ilelolela ukukupa ifyuma fyakwe, no mulilo uo bashilaputapo ukamupwisha, no konaula ifikashalamo mwitenti lyakwe." 
Job20:27 Imyulu ikasokolola ububi bwakwe, ne calo naco cikamwimina." 
Job20:28 Ilyeshi likasenda fyonse ifyaba mu ŋanda yakwe, likafisenda pa bushiku bwa cipyu cakwa Lesa." 
Job20:29 Ifi efyaba ishamo Lesa aletela umuntu umubifi, ecakupyaninina cintu Lesa amupekanishisha.”" 
Job21:1 Elyo Yobo nao ayasuka ati. 
Job21:2 “Kutikeni bwino bwino ku mashiwi yandi, elyo mwalantalalika umutima." 
Job21:3 Ntekeleni no mutima nande, nga nalanda elyo mwalanseka." 
Job21:4 Bushe ine ni ku muntunse ndeilishanya? Cinshi ningatalalilafye tondolo? 
Job21:5 Ndolesheni mu menso ifyo ndi, sungukeni, mwikate iminwe yenu pa kanwa." 
Job21:6 Nga natontonkanya pali ici icamponena, ndomfwa umwenso no mubili wandi ulatutuma." 
Job21:7 Cinshi ababi bakokwela pa calo? Mulandu nshi bafikila ku bukote no kukwata amaka ayengi? 
Job21:8 Ababi bena abana babo bakulila pa cinso cabo, balamona noko abeshikulu babo balekula." 
Job21:9 Amayanda yabo yekala mu cibote, no bwembya bwakwa Lesa tabubafopaula." 
Job21:10 Iŋombe shabo ishilume shalikwata amaka yabufyashi, ne ŋombe shabo ishikota tashipulumuna amafumo yashiko nakalya." 
Job21:11 Abana babo abaice baifuminafye no kulayangililafye mu lubansa nge mpaanga, no twana twabo tulatolaukafye nge mpombo." 
Job21:12 Balemba inyimbo no kulisha insombo na maseese, balasamwa mukumfwa uko imitolilo ilelila." 
Job21:13 Inshiku shabo pa calo shabafye ishansansa, nga bafwa baya mu calo ca bafwa umutelelwe." 
Job21:14 Aba bantu beba Lesa abati, ‘Tutaluke tatulefwaya ukwishiba inshila shobe." 
Job21:15 Ngo Mwine wa maka yonse finshi ali pakuti tulemutumika, finshi twingamwenamo mukumupepa?’" 
Job21:16 Bena batila ishuko lyaba mu minwe yabo, lelo ine teti ndosheko amano kuli bumpandamano bwa babifi." 
Job21:17 “Bushe mulamona ilingi uko icisaniko ca babifi cishima? Miku inga ifibi fibacitikila? Bushe icipyu cakwa Lesa nao cilabaletelako ishamo? 
Job21:18 Bushe miku inga mwamona ababifi baleululwa mu mwela nge mpimbili, nangu miku inga mwamona ababifi baleululwa kuli kankungwe nge misungu?" 
Job21:19 Imwe mulesosa ati, ‘Lesa alakanda abana pa mulandu wa kubifya kwa bashibo.’ Awe, lekenifye Lesa akande umubifi wine, pakuti umubifi umwine eshibe." 
Job21:20 Lekeni umwine aimwene na menso yakwe uko Lesa alemukanda, pakuti omfwikishe ubukali bwa Mwine wa maka yonse." 
Job21:21 Bushe umubifi, inshiku shakwe nga shapwa, afika pa kufwa, ni finshi engasakamanako ku lupwa ashile mu ŋanda yakwe?" 
Job21:22 “Bushe umuntunse kuti apanda Lesa amano, pantu Lesa umwine eupingula na balya bonse aba mu mulu?" 
Job21:23 Limo umuntu afwafye ilyo acili na maka ayengi, ninshi no kwikala ekalafye bwino kabili uwamutende." 
Job21:24 Ninshi acilifye no mubili uwamaka, no bufyompo bucili mu mafupa yakwe." 
Job21:25 Umbi nao afwa ne cililishi mu mutima, na mu bumi bwakwe tatalile amonapo insansa nakalya." 
Job21:26 Lelo nangu cibe ifyo, bonse bafwila mu nshila imo ine, no kushiikwa mu nshila imo ine, ne mititi yabengilamo." 
Job21:27 “Nomba ine ninjishiba ifili mu mano yenu, na mapange ayabi yonse ayo munkwatile." 
Job21:28 Imwe mulesosa amuti, ‘Bushe ili kwi iŋanda ya mukankala, nga matenti yali kwi mulya mwaleikala umubifi?’" 
Job21:29 Bushe imwe emukuti tamwatala amwipushapo abalendo, bushe tamukutika ku lyashi bashimika?" 
Job21:30 Ala umubifi alasungwa ukufika na ku bushiku bwakukandwa, kabili apokololwa nelyo ubukali bwakwa Lesa bwaisa." 
Job21:31 Lelo kwena takuba umuntu nelyo umo uuya mukusosha umubifi, no kumukalipila pa myendele yakwe, kabili takuba no wakuti amulandule." 
Job21:32 Ilyo bamusenda kukumushiika, abantu bemininafye ukutamba apo balemushiika." 
Job21:33 No mushili wa mwishika ulomfwika bwino kuli ena, ninshi na bantu bonse nabamukonka panuma, no mulongo wa bantu bambi abengi naumutangilila." 
Job21:34 Nga imwe kuti mwantalalikako shani ku mashiwi yenu ayabulamo amano? Pantu mu kwasuka kwenu mulifye ubufi bweka.” 
Job22:1 Elyo Elifasi umwina Temani ayasuka Yobo ati," 
Job22:2 “ Bushe umuntunse busuma nshi engakwata kuli Lesa? Bushe nangu umuntu uwamano cisuma nshi engacitila Lesa? 
Job22:3 Nga fisuma nshi Umwine wa maka yonse engasanga mu kulungamika kobe? Nangu finshi enganonkamo mu mbela yobe nga yaba iyakaele? 
Job22:4 “Bushe uletontonkanya ukuti ni pa mulandu wakuti walimukwatila akatiina, ecilengele ukuti Lesa alekulubulwisha no kukukalipila?" 
Job22:5 Bushe te pa mulandu wa bubifi bobe, na pa mulandu wa fibi fyobe ifishifwaya kupwa?" 
Job22:6 Iwe walefuula bamunonko ifyakufwala bashala ubwamba, ifyo wabapokele nge fikatilo apabula umulandu." 
Job22:7 Abalekwata icilaka iwe walebatana amenshi, na balekwata insala iwe walebatana ifyakulya," 
Job22:8 nangu wali umuntu umukankala uwakwete ne mpanga, apo we mucindami waleikala." 
Job22:9 Waleleka bamukamfwilwa ukubwelelamo ukwabula nangu cimo, no kukwata ubuluku ku bana banshiwa." 
Job22:10 E mulandu ulengele ifiteyo fikushinguluke, no mwenso uwakupumikisha naukusakamika." 
Job22:11 Ecilengele ukuti pa menso yobe pafiite fititi, ne tenga lya menshi nalikufimba pa menso." 
Job22:12 “Bushe Lesa taikala apatali nganshi mu mulu? Alolesha pa ntanda ishaba mwisamba, nangu nasho shine shabela apatali nganshi." 
Job22:13 Nomba iwe utila, ‘Ni finshi Lesa engeshiba? Bushe apusha amenso mu mfifi pakupingula?" 
Job22:14 Amakumbi ayatikama yalimufimba, eco tatumwena, ena endaukafye mu ncende ya mu mulu.’" 
Job22:15 Bushe iwe ulefwaya ukusunga imibeele yakale, ilya yaleendamo abantu babi." 
Job22:16 Basendelwe ninshi inshita yabo tailafika, ne lyeshi lyabunsha icifulo cabo." 
Job22:17 Balya bantu babi baebele Lesa abati, ‘Tutaluke, nga finshi wingatucita nangu wingaba Umwine wa maka yonse?’" 
Job22:18 Lelo nangu cali ifi, ni Lesa ewaiswishe ifisuma mu mayanda yabo, icakuti kuti nafilwa no kutesha kufyo ababi batontonkanya." 
Job22:19 “Abalungami balasansamuka pakumona uko balya abantu babi balebakanda, na bantu bakaele balewela baleti," 
Job22:20 ‘Ala cacine abalwani besu nabonaika, no mulilo naoca ifyuma fyabo.’" 
Job22:21 “Eico iwe nakilafye kuli Lesa, ukwate umutende, pakuti Lesa akupaale." 
Job22:22 Usekelele amafunde ayo alekupeela, ulesunga na mashiwi yakwe yonse mu mutima obe." 
Job22:23 Nga wabwelela ku Mwine wa maka yonse nauicefya, no kuleka ifyabipa fyonse ifyo iwe ucita mumobe," 
Job22:24 kabili nga wasuula golide obe kwati lukungu, no kuya posa golide obe uwine wine uwa ku Ofiri mu mabwe ya mu mumana," 
Job22:25 awe lyena Umwine wa maka yonse eukaba golide yobe, eukaba icuma cobe ica silifa ico watemwisha." 
Job22:26 Kabili Umwine wa maka yonse eukaba insansa shobe, nobe ukalalosha amenso yobe kuli Lesa." 
Job22:27 Lyena ukalati nga wamupepa, nao akumfwa, na iwe ukalafikilisha ne filayo ifyo walaile ukuti ukalaficita." 
Job22:28 Ukalakwata ishuko pa milimo yonse iyo ukalabomba, no lubuuto lukalakusanikila mu nshila." 
Job22:29 Pa bantu abaponena mu mafya, utila, ‘Bafwilishe!’ Pantu abaicefya bena Lesa alabapususha." 
Job22:30 Lesa kuti apususha nangu uushili wakaele, kuti apusuka pa mulandu wa kusanguluka kwa minwe yobe.”" 
Job23:1 Elyo Yobo nao epakwasuka ati," 
Job23:2 “Ala na lelo line ncilifye uwailishanya apakalamba, pantu Lesa acili nantitikisha ilyo ndeteta." 
Job23:3 Nga cakutifye ine njishiba ukwakuti ningamusanga, pakuti nafika napo ekala." 
Job23:4 Ala nga kuti naya ilubulwila, nga kuti akanwa kandi kaya ilandila ifingi ifyakuipokololako." 
Job23:5 Kuti naya yumfwila ifyo Lesa umwine enganjasuka, no kubika amano kufyo enganjeba." 
Job23:6 Bushe kuti Lesa aya bomfya amaka yakwe pakuncincintila? Awe iyoo, kuti aŋumfwa." 
Job23:7 Kuti amona ati, ‘Uyu muntu wacishinka ndelubulwisha,’ kanshi uyu wine kapingula wandi kuti andekako pe na pe." 
Job23:8 “Ntila nga naya ku kabanga Lesa tabako, nga naya ku masamba nako kwine tabako." 
Job23:9 Conse nga naya ndemufwaila ku kapinda ka ku kuso, nshimusanga, nangu nalola ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, nako kwine tamonekako." 
Job23:10 Lelo kwena, Lesa alishiba imyendele yandi yonse, nga cakuti ampisha mu mulilo, awe kwena kuti nafumamofye nga golide wine wine." 
Job23:11 Amakasa yandi yendafye mwishinda lyakwe, na makasa yandi tayatala ayaselamo." 
Job23:12 Ine ndasunga pe amafunde ayo anjeba, kabili ndabaka mu mutima wandi amashiwi ya kanwa kakwe ukucila pa cakulya ca nshiku shonse." 
Job23:13 “Lelo Lesa nga apingula ukucita icintu icili conse, bushe nani uwingamulesha? Ico umutima wakwe wafwaya eco umwine acita." 
Job23:14 Nalishiba ukuti Lesa akancitila ifyo umwine apekanya ukucita, umwabela amapange yakwe ayafulisha." 
Job23:15 Ni pali ici ntiinina ukuya iminina ku cinso cakwe, pantu nga napituluka muli fyonse ifi, ndamukwatila umwenso." 
Job23:16 Ni Lesa eulenga umutima wandi ukufunshika, Umwine wa maka yonse eunenga ukukwata umwenso." 
Job23:17 Lelo imfifi taimpeseshe amano iyoo, nangu cili ukuti imfifi ikalamba naimfimba pa menso.”" 
Job24:1 “Nga cinshi Umwine wa maka yonse ashapimina inshita yakupingwilapo, neco abamupetamina bashimwena inshiku shakwe cinshi?" 
Job24:2 Ababi balasesha impopo sha mipaka, baleba ifitekwa baya bika pamo ne fitekwa fyabo." 
Job24:3 Balasenda bapunda wa bakashiwa, no kubuula iŋombe ilume iyakwa mukamfwilwa yabe cikatilo." 
Job24:4 Mu nshila balatamfulamo abapina, na balanda ba mu calo balafisama bonse." 
Job24:5 Abapina balafumina mu mpanga kwati ni bapunda ba mpanga abaikala mu matololo, pakuya balefwaila abana babo ifyakulya mu fiswebebe." 
Job24:6 Baya mukulaseepa ifyakulya mu mabala, no kulasabila ababifi ifitwalo fya myangashi." 
Job24:7 Ubushiku aba balanda basendamafye ubwamba, tabakwata ne fyakufimbana mu mpepo." 
Job24:8 Imfula ya mu mpili ilabaloka, bakumbatila icilibwe pa mulandu wakubulwa umwakuuba." 
Job24:9 “Abantu babi bapokolola utwana twanshiwa ukufuma kwibele, babuula na kanya ka mulanda ukuba icikatilo." 
Job24:10 Balenga abalanda ukwenda ubwamba ukwabula ifyakufwala, kabili balasenda imyanshi ya ŋanu ninshi bali ne nsala." 
Job24:11 Abalanda ebengela bambi amafuta ya miolifa no kulabakamina umwangashi, nomba tabapeelwako, bendafye ne cilaka." 
Job24:12 Mu musumba muleumfwika ukuteta kwa bantu abalefwa, ne cikolomo ca bacenenwe abalekuuta abakubafwa, lelo Lesa tomfwako ku nkuuta shabo." 
Job24:13 “Eko bali abantu babi bambi abashifwaya ulubuuto, abashifwaya ukwishiba ne nshila yaluko, balafilwa no kwikala mu nshila shaluko." 
Job24:14 Icipondo cima ubushiku, ukuya ipaya umulanda no mupina. Umupupu nao endauka bushiku bonse ukuya mukwiba." 
Job24:15 Ilinso lya wabulalelale lilolela pali muntungulya, elyo lileti, ‘Takuli uulemona.’ Afimbana na pa menso pakuti bambi bemwishiba." 
Job24:16 Aba bantu bashifwaya ulubuuto, akasuba balafisama. Ubushiku elyo batula mu mayanda no kwibamo ifintu." 
Job24:17 Imfifi e cibusa wabo, kwati kasuba kuli bena, kabili ne mfifi iyafiitisha bena tabaikwatila umwenso." 
Job24:18 “Lelo abantu babi balasendwa ne lyeshi lya menshi, icakaniko cabo muno calo calilapishiwa, takuba nangu bamo abaya mu mabala yabo aya myangashi." 
Job24:19 Nga filya icikabilila ne cilala cikamya ubunga bwa mfula, efyo ne calo ca bafwa cipoka abantu abacita ububifi." 
Job24:20 Nyina uwamufyala asuka alabako, imititi nayo yamulya mpaka alobelela. Takuba bantu abebukisha ababifi, baonaikafye nge cimuti icawa." 
Job24:21 Pantu abantu babi balacusha iŋumba ishishakwata abana, kabili tabalangulukilako nangu bamukamfwilwa nakalya." 
Job24:22 Lelo Lesa ku bulamba bwakwe alonaula abamaka, nangu bengeminina, lelo tabashininkisha ukuti baba no mweo." 
Job24:23 Limo Lesa alaleka abantu babi baikalafye umutende, lelo amenso yakwe yalolekesha pa mibeele yabo." 
Job24:24 Ababi balacindama pa kashita akanono, kabili pa nshita inono babonsa nge cani, babonsa nge misonso ya male no kulonganikwa, no kuputaulwa nge mitwe ya ŋanu." 
Job24:25 Bushe kwena nga cakuti teifyo fine, ni nani enganshinina ukuti ndebepafye, nangu ukulanga ukuti ifyo nsosa fintu fyafyefye?”" 
Job25:1 Elyo Biludadi umwina Shuha nao alandilepo ati," 
Job25:2 “Ubufumu no bucindami fyakwa Lesa, eulenga ukuti mu mulu umo ekala mube icibote." 
Job25:3 Nani uwingapenda ifita fyakwa Lesa ifimubombela? Nani uo ulubuuto lwakwa Lesa lushisanikila? 
Job25:4 Bushe umuntunse kuti aba shani uwalungama pa cinso cakwa Lesa, kuti asanguluka shani uwafyalwa ku mwanakashi?" 
Job25:5 Ngefyo no mweshi wine taubalikisha, ne ntanda shine tashibengeshima pa cinso cakwe," 
Job25:6 nga palibufi umuntunse uwabafye umutiti, umwana wa muntu uwabafye akamwambo!”" 
Job26:1 Elyo Yobo ayasuka ati," 
Job26:2 “Yangu iwe ifyo wampokololako ine ne wabula amaka, ifyo wakosha ukuboko kwandi ukwanaka." 
Job26:3 Cine cine iwe walishiba ukufunda impelwamano iyaba nga ine, walishiba ukupanda umuntu amano ayene yene!" 
Job26:4 Nomba aya mashiwi yobe yalefunda ani, kabili mupashi wakwa nani uulelanda muli iwe?" 
Job26:5 “Imilungulwa iyaba mu calo ca bafwa ilatutuma, panshi ya menshi pamo ne fyabamo fyonse." 
Job26:6 Icalo ca bafwa caba ubwamba ku mulola wakwa Lesa, takwaba ne cifimbo ku baloba." 
Job26:7 Ayansa mu lwelele umulu wa ku kapinda ka kuso akobeka ne sonde pa mbilibili. 
Job26:8 Alibika amenshi mu makumbi yakwe ayatikama, alisunga amenshi pakuti ukufina kwayako takutulile amakumbi." 
Job26:9 Afimba pa mweshi ilyo wabulungana, akupapo ikumbi lyakwe." 
Job26:10 Lesa alishingulusha icishilwa pa menshi, palya palekanina ulubuuto ne mfifi." 
Job26:11 Apaikala umulu palasunkana, palasokona ku mwenso ilyo Lesa apakalipila." 
Job26:12 Amaka yakwa Lesa eyatalalika bemba, na ku mano yakwe aipeye Rahabu." 
Job26:13 Umupu wakwa Lesa ewalengele ukuti umulu uwame, ukuboko kwakwe ekwapulinkenye icisoka ilyo calefulumuka." 
Job26:14 Nomba ifi fyonse fya ku nse ya micitile yakwe, tumfwafye ukutepelesha kwakwe. Lelo icibulukutu ca maka yakwe nani engacitesha?”" 
Job27:1 Elyo Yobo akonkanyapo ukulanda ati," 
Job27:2 “Ine nalapa mu cishinka cakwa Lesa umumi, uwakaana ukunjebelapo, kabili Umwine wa maka yonse uwalenga ukuti ine nsashile." 
Job27:3 Apo ine ncili ndepema, no mupu wakwa Lesa ucili ulefuma mu myona yandi," 
Job27:4 nakaana ndai ukuti akanwa kandi takakatale akalanda ifyabubifi, no lulimi lwandi talwakatale alubepa ubufi." 
Job27:5 Nshasumine nangu pamo ukuti imwe mulelungika mu kulanda kwenu, ukushintafye napo nkafwila nshakaleke ubufumacumi bwandi." 
Job27:6 Ndi nokwikatilila kuli bukaele bwandi, nshakalekeko iyoo, pantu mu mutima wandi tamwaba icakunenga insoni pa mikalile yandi." 
Job27:7 “Lekeni umulwani wandi abe ngo mubifi, no ulwisha umweo wandi abe ngo walufyengo." 
Job27:8 Ngo muntu ushaishiba Lesa, alolela finshi ilyo akafumishiwapo, ilyo Lesa akamupoka ubumi bwakwe?" 
Job27:9 Bushe Lesa kuti aumfwa ku kulila kwakwe, ilyo uyu muntu asanswa?" 
Job27:10 Bushe kuti alasansamukila Umwine wa maka yonse? Bushe kuti alilila kuli Lesa inshita yonse? 
Job27:11 Ndi nokumufunda pafyo amaka yakwa Lesa yaba, kabili nshamufise pa nshila sha Mwine wa maka yonse." 
Job27:12 Mwe bene nga mwaliimwena, nga cinshi ico mulesabailila?”" 
Job27:13 “Ifi efyo Lesa ali nokucita ku bantu ababifi, icakaniko ico umuntu mubi akapeelwa ukufuma ku Mwine wa maka yonse." 
Job27:14 Abana bakwe nangu bafule shani, bonse bakalafwafye mu nkondo, na ba nkulo yakwe bonse bakalaculafye ku nsala." 
Job27:15 Abakashalapo bakafwa ku cikuko, na banamfwilwa babo tabakamone pakubaloosesha." 
Job27:16 Umubi nangu atulumanike icuma ngo musensenga, elyo atulumanike ne mina ya fyakufwala," 
Job27:17 lelo fyonse ifyo atulumanika abalungami ebakesa mukufifwala, na bantu bakaele ebakesa akana icuma cakwe ica silifa." 
Job27:18 Umubi alaikuulila amayanda kwati ni tunakantebele, kwati ni nsaka ya ulelonda." 
Job27:19 Ubushiku pakusendama ninshi ali umukankala, lelo takonkanyapo. Cilyafye aisa shibuka, asanga tapali nelyo cimo." 
Job27:20 Ifinkunka filamupumikisha nga filya ilyeshi licita, na mu nshita ya bushiku kankungwe amuulula." 
Job27:21 Umwela wa ku kabanga nao ulamukumpula, nao ninshi e miile, ulamutalusha ku cifulo cakwe." 
Job27:22 Umwela ulamuposa na maka ukwabula uluse, nangu esheko ukufulumuka." 
Job27:23 Lelo pa nshita alefulumuka, kankungwe amuseka, alamukonka na maka pakuti amonaule.”" 
Job28:1 “Eko yaba imikoti umo abantu bemba silifa, ne ncende uko basungulwila golide." 
Job28:2 Ifyela fipangwa ukufuma ku mushili, no mukuba usungululwa ukufuma ku mabwe." 
Job28:3 Abantu balasanika pakupwisha imfifi, balembisha nganshi ifilindi, pakusanga amabwe ayabela apafitisha." 
Job28:4 Bemba amendo mu ncende ishishabamo abantu, mu ncende ishishendamo amakasa ya bantu, bakobekwa ku myando pakwingilamo." 
Job28:5 Ni mu mushili emumena ifyakulya, kabili ni lwa panshi epo no mushili walulwa ku mulilo." 
Job28:6 Tusafile, utumabwe utwauma umutengo, tusangwa mu mabwe ya mu mushili, na mu lukungu lwauko emwaba no tubufungau twa golide." 
Job28:7 “Kapumpe teshiba inshila yakwingilila pa mikoti, na menso ya lukoshi tayatala ayaimona." 
Job28:8 Ifiswango ifikangasa tafyendamo, ne nkalamo tayatala ainyantamo." 
Job28:9 Nomba abantu bena balatoba amabwe ayakosa nganshi, balapenuna na mabwe apo impili shaikala." 
Job28:10 Abantu bena balatulinkanya amendo mu fimabwe, no kufwayamo amabwe yamutengo." 
Job28:11 Bena balacilika intulo sha mimana, no kuleta pa mbilibili ifyafisamamo." 
Job28:12 “Nomba amano, bushe ni kwisa uko yatula? Ni kwisa uko tuli nokulapoka amano yakwiluka?" 
Job28:13 Takulaba umuntu uwaishiba ubucindami bwa mano, kabili umuntu teti ayasange mu calo ca bomi." 
Job28:14 Umuyenge usosa auti, ‘Awe temuli ine amano yaba,’ bemba nao wine asosa ati, ‘Na ine wine temuli ine yaba.’" 
Job28:15 Amano tayashitwa na golide uwalopololwa, teti bayashite no mwina wa silifa." 
Job28:16 Ukucindama kwa mano kwalicila pa mutengo wa golide uwine wine uwa ku Ofiri, kwalicila na pa mutengo wa tumabwe twa onikisi na safile." 
Job28:17 Ukucindama kwa mano kwalicila ukucindama kwa golide na kilistali, na pa kucindama kwa fisamo fya golide uwalopololwa." 
Job28:18 Utumabwe utwa kolali na yasipeli, twena tetwakwesha no kulumbula, ukucindama kwa mano kwalicila no bulungu ubwauma mutengo." 
Job28:19 Kwalicila ukucindama kwa tumabwe utwa topasi wa ku Kushi, na golide wine wine teti ashite amano." 
Job28:20 “Nomba amano bushe ni kwi yatula? Noko wingasanga ukwiluka ni kwi? 
Job28:21 Yalibelama ku menso ya fyabumi fyonse, yafisama na ku fyuni fya mu mulu." 
Job28:22 Ukuloba ne mfwa kuti fyatila, ‘Ifwe twalyumfwakofye ululumbi lwayako.’" 
Job28:23 “Ni Lesa fye eka ewaishiba inshila iyalola ukwaba amano, kabili ewaishiba ne cifulo cayako." 
Job28:24 Pantu ena alamona noko isonde lyashinta, ena alolesha na fyonse ifyaba pesamba lya mulu." 
Job28:25 Ilyo apimine umwela amaka, no kupimina babemba imipaka," 
Job28:26 ilyo apimine imfula apakulokela, no kulangilila inkuba inshila yakupitamo," 
Job28:27 elyo amwene amano no kuyalondolola, ayapitulukamo no kuyashimpa." 
Job28:28 Lesa epakweba umuntu ati, ‘Ukuba na katiina kuli Lesa ekukwata amano, no kutaluka ku fyabipa ekucenjela.’”" 
Job29:1 Kabili Yobo abwekeshapo ukulanda ati," 
Job29:2 “Yangu ifyo nafuluka imyeshi yakale, muli shilya nshiku ilyo Lesa alensunga bwino." 
Job29:3 Yangu ifyo caweme ilyo cisaniko cakwe calesanika pa mutwe wandi, ilyo ku lubuuto lwakwe nalepitila umwafiita." 
Job29:4 Yangu ifyo kale nalesansamuka mu nshiku sha bulumendo bwandi, ilyo Lesa ali cibusa wandi alepaala itenti lyandi." 
Job29:5 Kale Umwine wa maka yonse twaleenda nankwe, na bana bandi balenshinguluka." 
Job29:6 Kale amakasa yandi yaleowa mwishiba ilyatikama, ne milonga ya mafuta ya miolifa yalefuma mu mabwe." 
Job29:7 “Kale naleya ku mpongolo ya musumba, no kuteka icipuna candi pa lubansa." 
Job29:8 Kale abalumendo baletifye cilya bamona, awe bamfumina mu nshila, na bakote bene baleiminina pakunanga umucinshi." 
Job29:9 Bacilolo baleleka ukulanda, babika ne minwe pa tunwa twabo." 
Job29:10 Na bakateeka nabo baleikala tondolo nga epo ndi, ne ndimi shabo shalalambatila mu tunwa twabo." 
Job29:11 Kale bonse abaleumfwa ukucindama kwandi baletasha, na bonse abalemona bantemwa." 
Job29:12 Pantu nalepususha umulanda uwalekuuta, naleyafwa bakashiwa abashaba no wakubafwa." 
Job29:13 Umuntu uuli pakufwa, nine alesha apaala, kabili nalesansamusha umutima wa bamukamfwilwa." 
Job29:14 Ubulungami naleenda nabo kwati cakufwala ca ku mubili, naleenda no mulinganya kwati lilaya ne cisote mfwele." 
Job29:15 Nali ilinso lya mpofu, kabili ulukasa lwa balemana." 
Job29:16 Nali wishi wa balekabila, na beni nine nalebalubulwilako." 
Job29:17 Kale naletobaula insekete sha bantu balufyengo, nalepokolola nefyo basuminemo ameno." 
Job29:18 “Ine kale naletifye, ‘Awe nkafwa no mucinshi wandi, ne nshiku shandi shikafula ngo musensenga.’" 
Job29:19 Kale nali ngo muti uwashinta imishila yaiko pa menshi, uo amabula yauko yakunga umume." 
Job29:20 Kale naleti ubucindami bwandi tabwakapwe, no buta bwa mu minwe yandi tabwakatompoke." 
Job29:21 “Nga ndelanda, abantu baleikala tondolo, balenengamina no kutesha ifyo ndebeba." 
Job29:22 Nelyo naleka ukulanda, tapaleba na umbi uwakulandapo, pantu amashiwi yandi yaleponena pali bena mu mutende." 
Job29:23 Bonse balendolela filya balolela imfula, balencindila kwati balecindila imfula ya pakuloboka." 
Job29:24 Ilyo nabasekela, tabalesumina ukuti cacine, nelyo nabalanga impumi yaluse baletemwa." 
Job29:25 Nine nalepingula abantu no kubeba ifyakucita, kwati ni mfumu iyili pakati ka fita fyaiko. Nalebafwa ngo muntu uwafwilisha abaleloosha.”" 
Job30:1 “Nomba balenseka, abaice abo nacila ubukalamba, abantu abo nasuulile bashibo nati, ‘Tabalingile ukuba pamo ne mbwa ishakusunga impaanga shandi.’" 
Job30:2 Amaka ya mu maboko yabo tayalemombela nangu cimo, pantu mu maboko yabo mwalipomponteka." 
Job30:3 Bashelefye imipalapata ku mulandu wa bupina ne cipowe, balesheta imishila ya mu mpanga ne nsongwa sha mu fibolya ubushiku." 
Job30:4 Baleya mu mpanga mukusaba amabula ya mu mpanga, basukile balalya utumpolyo." 
Job30:5 Abanabo balebatamfisha ukutali, no kulabawela kwati ni mpupu." 
Job30:6 Baleikala mu ncena sha mikonko, mu ncengo na mu milale ya fimabwe ifikalamba." 
Job30:7 Epakulapundila mu fimpusa kwati ni mpunda, no kulasunsumana muli nkololo." 
Job30:8 Abantu abalifye ifiwelewele, pantu na banabo balebatamfya mu calo cabo." 
Job30:9 “Kabili ni aba bene ebanseka mu nyimbo, ebansangwile nomba icakulalandapo." 
Job30:10 Balimpata kabili balantaluka, tabatiina nomba no kunsakila amate pa menso." 
Job30:11 Ico bamwene ukuti Lesa nomba nandimuna, awe nabo nomba elyo banjimine bukali bukali." 
Job30:12 Uluko lwabo lwanjimina ku kulyo, basunkilisha amakasa yandi, bapalama uko ndi pakuti bandofye." 
Job30:13 Nabancilikila inshila konse konse pakuti nikwata ukwakubutukila, balefwaya ukungonaula ukwabula no wakubalesha." 
Job30:14 Baisa ingila nga pa cipunda ce linga icamokoka, baleisa mukupita mu fitantala no kuwililila ine." 
Job30:15 Ifyakutiina fyanjishila, ukucindama kwandi kwasendwa nga ku mwela, ne cisubilo candi icakupusuka capita nge kumbi." 
Job30:16 “Ine nomba ndi mupepi ne mfwa, inshiku shabulanda nashinsanga." 
Job30:17 Nga bwaila ndeumfwa mu mafupa mulekokota, ne filekolokota tafilenakako nakalya." 
Job30:18 Cili kwati Lesa nankama mu mukoshi we laya lyandi, no kunyongotola umukoshi waliko." 
Job30:19 Cili kwati Lesa amfubwile mu matipa, nsangwike kwati lukungu ne mito." 
Job30:20 Nalilila kuli iwe we Lesa mukulu, nomba taulenjasuka, naiminina pa cinso cobe, wandoleshafye." 
Job30:21 Naunjalukila bunkalwe bunkalwe, no kuncusha nganshi ku kuboko kobe ukwamaka." 
Job30:22 Naunjimya no kumposa mu mwela, nomba ndeshingulukafye muli kankungwe." 
Job30:23 Ninjishiba ukuti alentwalafye ukwakuti nje mfwile, kulya kwine uko bonse ino nshita abali abamweo bakaya sangwako." 
Job30:24 “Lelo bushe uuli mu bucushi tatambika ukuboko kwakwe? Bushe mukupelelwa kwakwe takuuta mutuule? 
Job30:25 Bushe kale ine nshalelililako abantu abalecula, bushe umutima wandi tawalecula ilyo namona umulanda?" 
Job30:26 Ilyo nasubila ishuko, ninshi paleisa ububi. Ilyo nasubila ulubuuto ninshi imfifi yamponena." 
Job30:27 Mu mala yandi mulepota ukwabula ukuleka, cila bushiku cilecililakofye ku bukali." 
Job30:28 Inkanda yandi naifita lelo te kasuba kalengele iyoo, nga naiminina mu cilonganino ntendekafye ukulila." 
Job30:29 Bamumbwe ebasangwike bamunyinane, ne fipululu efisangwike ifinandi." 
Job30:30 Inkanda yandi yalwike iyafiita kabili ilesunika no kuponena panshi, na mafupa yandi nayakaba ku bulwele." 
Job30:31 Eico peseese lyandi ndelishapofye inyimbo sha ndoosha, na mutolilo wandi atununafye imisowa.”" 
Job31:1 “Ine nalipangana na menso yandi, ukukana kumbwa umukashana." 
Job31:2 Nomba kwena bushe fintu nshi ifyo Lesa uwa mu mulu alambula abantu? Ni finshi ifyo Umwine wa maka yonse abikila abantu? 
Job31:3 Bushe tasungila abalufyengo ishamo, abantu babi nabo ifinkunka?" 
Job31:4 Bushe Lesa tamona imyendele yandi, no kupenda intampulo shandi shonse?" 
Job31:5 “Nalapa ine ukuti nshatala mbepa bufi, kabili nokuti nshatala ncenjesha abantu." 
Job31:6 Lekeni Lesa ampime pa cipimo icishibepa, pakuti ashininkishe ukuti ndi wakaele." 
Job31:7 Nga cakuti amakasa yandi yatala yafuma mu nshila, no mutima wandi watungululwa na menso yandi, nangu iminwe yandi yaba iyakowela," 
Job31:8 lyena lekeni bambi ebo balye icuma candi, nefyo nalima fine bafinukule." 
Job31:9 “Nga cakuti ine nalitala nkumbwa umwanakashi, nangu ukuya ndebendela pa mwinshi wa munandi," 
Job31:10 lyena ninshi umukashi wandi naye mukutebeta bambi, kaye mukulasendama no mwaume umbi." 
Job31:11 Pantu nga nalicita ububi ubwabipisha, calinga ukupeelelwapo umulandu." 
Job31:12 Caba ngo mulilo uwoca mpaka waonaula, uwingoca na fyonse ifyo ine nakwata." 
Job31:13 “Ine nga nalifyengele ababomfi bandi abaume nangu abanakashi, lintu baleilishanya palwa ine," 
Job31:14 ninshi kuti nacita shani ilyo Lesa akema? Ni finshi ifyo nkasuka ilyo Lesa anjipusha? 
Job31:15 Lesa ewamumbile, na babomfi bandi ni Lesa ewababumbile, ni Lesa fye umo wine ewatubumbile munda muli banyinefwe." 
Job31:16 “Ine nshatala nkaana ukwafwa abalanda mufyo bakabila, kabili nshatala ndekelesha bamukamfwilwa." 
Job31:17 Ine nshatala ndya umukate neka, ukwabula ukuti abana banshiwa nabo balyeko." 
Job31:18 Pantu ukufuma ku bwaice bwandi ndela abalanda ngo mufyashi, no kutungulula banamfwilwa ukutulafye apo nafyalilwa." 
Job31:19 Ilyo nalemona umuntu uushikwete icakufwala, nangu umuntu uulekabila icakufimbana," 
Job31:20 ine nalemupeelako icakufwala icisuma icapikulwa ku masako ya mpaanga shandi. Na onse uo napeela, alentotela no mutima wakwe onse." 
Job31:21 Nga cakuti nalimishe amaboko yandi pa bana banshiwa, ico njishibe ukuti ndecimfya mukulubulula," 
Job31:22 ninshi ukuboko kwandi kupapukile pa kubeya, kususulweko palya pene kwaikatila ku mubili." 
Job31:23 Umwenso wanjikata pantu ubukali bwakwa Lesa kuti bwanjishila, kabili pa mulandu wakutiina ubucindami bwakwa Lesa, teti ncite ifi fintu." 
Job31:24 “Nga cakuti natetekela muli golide, no kweba golide wine wine nati, ‘Iwe niwe bucingo bwandi.’" 
Job31:25 Nga cakuti nacita icilumba pa mulandu wa cuma candi icafulisha, no kuitakisha pa cuma ico iminwe yandi yanonka." 
Job31:26 Nga cakuti namona ubucindami bwa kasuba ilyo kabalika, no kumona ukuyemba kwa mweshi uupita mu mulu." 
Job31:27 Bushe ifi efyakukubula umutima wandi, pakuti ndefipakata mu bumfisolo?" 
Job31:28 Ifi fyonse kuti fyaba ububifi ubukalamba ubwakupingwilwapo, pantu ninshi nakaana Lesa uwa mu mulu." 
Job31:29 “Nga cakuti ndasansamuka pakumona ifyo abalwani bandi basheme, nangu ukusekelela pakumona ifyo basanshilwe," 
Job31:30 awe ine nshatala ndeka ululimi lwandi ukuti lulebifya, nshatala nduleka ukulatipwila abantu, nangu ukufwaya ukuti bafwe." 
Job31:31 Nga cakuti abantu ba mwitenti lyandi tabatala abasosa abati, ‘Takwaba umuntu nelyo umo uo Yobo tapeelako akamunani akasuma.’" 
Job31:32 Takwatala akuba umweni uwasendama panse, pantu umwinshi wa ŋanda yandi wabafye uwacenama ku balendo." 
Job31:33 Nga cakuti ndafisa abantu bumpulamafunde bwandi nge ficita bambi, pakusunga ububifi mu mutima wandi," 
Job31:34 pa mulandu wakutiina icintubwingi, no mwenso wakutiinwa ukusuulwa ku ndupwa, eco natalalile tondolo no kufilwa ukufumina panse." 
Job31:35 Iye bushe nani uwingansoselako pakuti Lesa aŋumfwe, pantu ine nomba nalanda fyafula. Umwine wa maka yonse eo cashalila ukuti nomba anjasuke, leteni umulwani wandi alembe pe pepala amashiwi ya kumpeelelapo umulandu." 
Job31:36 Ilyo ipepala kuti nalibika pa kubeya kwandi, kuti nalifwala nge cisote ca pa bufumu." 
Job31:37 Ndi nokuya londolola kuli ena pa myendele yandi yonse, nkaya ngo musambashi mukumukumanya." 
Job31:38 “Nga cakuti impanga yandi yalandubulwisha, na menshi ya mu mifolo kuti yaba nge filamba," 
Job31:39 nangu nga cakuti ndya ifisabo fyabamo ukwabula ukulipila ababomfi, nangu ukufyenga imitima ya bantu," 
Job31:40 ninshi lyena lekeni imyunga eyo yamenemo mu cifulo ca ŋanu, muleke ne ndao esho shimene mu cifulo ca bale.” Apa epapela amashiwi yakwa Yobo." 
Job32:1 Kanshi abantu aba batatu epakuleka ukulanda na Yobo, ico Yobo alishininkishe bukaele bwakwe mu kumona kwakwe." 
Job32:2 Elyo Elihu mwana Barakeli, umwina Busi, uwa mu mukowa wakwa Ramu afulilwe Yobo nganshi. Afulilwe Yobo pa mulandu wakuilungamika ukucila Lesa." 
Job32:3 Afulilwe na bacibusa bakwe bonse batatu, ico bashakwete ifyakumwasuka lelo nabamuseka." 
Job32:4 Ilyo balelanda, Elihu aikele tondolo, pantu abalelanda bantu abakalamba." 
Job32:5 Nomba ilyo amwene ukuti aba bantu batatu tabakwete icakwasuka, icipyu camwikata." 
Job32:6 Kanshi Elihu, mwana Barakeli epakusosa ati, “Ine ncili umulumendo, imwe muli bakalamba, eco nkutumanine no kutiina ukumweba ifyo naishiba." 
Job32:7 Ine mu mutima wandi nacilatontonkanya ati, ‘Ebo batale balande pakuti ubwingi bwa myaka bulange amano.’" 
Job32:8 Nomba ine nalishiba ukuti umupu uwaba mu muntu, no mupashi uo Umwine wa maka yonse abikamo efilenga umuntu ukwiluka." 
Job32:9 Ala ubukote tabulenga ukuti umuntu abe na mano, no bwingi bwa myaka tabulenga umuntu ukupingula bwino." 
Job32:10 Kanshi nomba na imwe kutikeniko na kuli ine, na ine nomba kamwebe ifyo naishiba." 
Job32:11 “Moneni, naciba ndelolela ilyo mwaciba mulelanda, nacilakutika kufyo mwacilalandishanya, elyo nefyo mwacilasala amashiwi ayakusosa." 
Job32:12 Nacilakutumaninamo nganshi mufyo mulesosa, lelo pali baimwe tapaciba nelyo umo uushinine Yobo. Tapali no waswike amashiwi yakwe." 
Job32:13 Eico mwilaibepa amuti, ‘Ifwe twalikwata amano.’ Lesa umwine euli nokwasuka Yobo teimwe iyoo." 
Job32:14 Pantu Yobo tasosele amashiwi ayakupinkana na ine, kanshi na ine nshamwaswike ngefyo imwe mwingamwasuka." 
Job32:15 “Ala aba bantu nacibasungusha, tabakwete ne fyakwasuka, tabakwetepo fimbi ifyakulanda." 
Job32:16 Bushe na nomba kuti nalolela apo nabaleka ukulanda, apo bekelefye ukwabula no kwasuka?" 
Job32:17 Kanshi nomba nine nalalandapo, nine nalakweba ifyo ine naishiba." 
Job32:18 Pantu ndi ne fingi ifyakulanda, no kupamfiwa nimpamfiwa ukufisosa." 
Job32:19 Munda yandi muli kwati muli umwangashi upya, uushikwete apakupemena, uwingalepula ne cakubikamo cauko." 
Job32:20 Na pakuti mpeme kanofye ntale nande, nalalanda elyo no kwasuka njasuke." 
Job32:21 Ine nshacite mucishacinani ku muntu nelyo umo, kabili nshasembeleke nangu umo." 
Job32:22 Ine nshaishiba no kusembeleka nakalya, epali Kabumba wandi ansenda bwangu.”" 
Job33:1 “Kanshi nomba iwe Yobo, umfwa kufyo ine nalakweba. Ukutike bwino ku mashiwi yandi." 
Job33:2 Mona, ine nomba natampa ukulanda, no lulimi lwandi elwalafumya amashiwi ya mu kanwa." 
Job33:3 Mu mutima wandi mwalafuma insoso ishaololoka, akanwa kandi kalalanda ifyacishinka fyeka." 
Job33:4 Pantu Umupashi wakwa Lesa ewabumba ine, umupu wa Mwine wa maka yonse ewampeela ubumi." 
Job33:5 Nga wafwaya ukunjasuka, wasuke, ubefye uwaipekanya pali fyonse ifyo ulefwaya ukulandapo." 
Job33:6 Ine nshili Lesa, ndi muntu munobefye, iwe na ine twabumbilwe bonse kwiloba." 
Job33:7 Peba nangu cimo icakulenga ukuti untiine, ine nshakutitikishe nakalya." 
Job33:8 “Lelo ine ninjumfwila fyonse ifyo ulandile, ŋumfwile ulandile amashiwi ayakuti," 
Job33:9 ‘Ndi wakaele uwabula ububifi, nshacitapo akabi nangu kamo, no mulandu nshakwata." 
Job33:10 Nomba Lesa alafwailishafye icakumpeelelapo umulandu, kabili alemona ine kwati ndi mulwani wakwe." 
Job33:11 Abikile amakasa yandi mwikoli, no kulengula konse uko ndeya.’" 
Job33:12 “Eico nakweba ukuti pakusosa ifi nauluba, pantu Lesa alicila pa bantu." 
Job33:13 Nga cinshi ico uleebawila Lesa, pa mulandu wakuti takwaswike?" 
Job33:14 Pantu Lesa alalanda mu musango umo, nakabili mu musango umbi, nomba abantu tabasakamana." 
Job33:15 Kuti alandila mu ciloto na mu fimonwa mu nshita ya bushiku, ilyo umuntu acili napona mu tulo utwingi, ninshi nalala mu musengele wakwe." 
Job33:16 Limbi kuti amutotoshafye, elyo amutiinya pakumusoka," 
Job33:17 pakwalula umuntu ukufuma ku fyabipa, no kumupwisha icilumba." 
Job33:18 Pakuti apusushe umweo wakwe ku nindi, no kupususha ubumi bwakwe ukufuma ku kuloba." 
Job33:19 “Limbi Lesa alakalipila umuntu ilyo alecula ku bulwele, ilyo ubukali bulesosota mu molu yakwe." 
Job33:20 Ilyo umutima wakwe taulefwaya kulya, icakuti apata ne cakulya atemwisha." 
Job33:21 Ilyo umubili wakwe waonda umupwilapo, na mafupa yakwe ayafiseme yashala pa mbilibili." 
Job33:22 Ilyo ubumi bwakwe bwapalama ku nindi, no mweo wakwe ku cifulo ca bafwa." 
Job33:23 “Lelo nga cakuti malaika ali mupepi, umo pa bali ikana limo (1,000) uwingamupapatilako, no kwisa eba umuntu ifintu ifingamuwamina." 
Job33:24 Uwakumulangulukila no kumweba ati, ‘Mwimuleka uyu mulwele aye ku nindi, pantu ninsanga icakulubwilako ubumi bwakwe.’" 
Job33:25 Lyena ninshi kuti umubili wakwe wapuputulwa, abafye ngo mwaice, abwelela ku bulumendo bwakwe." 
Job33:26 Lyena kuti apepa Lesa ico amukwatila uluse, kuti amonekela pa cinso cakwe ne nsansa. Lesa amuposha, abwelela na ku cifulo cakwe icabololoke." 
Job33:27 Lyena kuti aisa pa bantu nokusosa ati, ‘Nalibifishe kabili nalilufyenye, nomba Lesa tankalipile ukulingana no bubi bwandi." 
Job33:28 Alubula umweo wandi ukufuma mukuya ku nindi, ndi nokwikala uwasansamukila ulubuuto.’" 
Job33:29 “Ifi fyonse efyo Lesa acitila umuntu, pa miku ibili nangufye itatu," 
Job33:30 pakuti apusushe umweo wakwe ku nindi, no kuleka icisaniko cabumi cimusanike."
