Job33:31 “Eico iwe Yobo, bika amano kuli ine uŋumfwe bwino, wikale tondolo pakuti nkwebe." 
Job33:32 Nga naukwata ifyakulanda unjasuke, pantu ine kuti natemwa ukukulungamikila umulandu obe." 
Job33:33 Nga taukwete fyakwasukapo, kanshi kutika kufyo ine ndesosa, wikalefye tondolo pakuti nkupandeko amano.”" 
Job34:1 Kabili Elihu akonkanyapo ukulanda ati," 
Job34:2 “Kutikeni ku mashiwi yandi mwe bantu bamano, umfweni kuli ine imwe mwe bacenjela." 
Job34:3 Ala amatwi eyapima ifilelandwa, nga filya fine akanwa komfwa bwino ifyakulya." 
Job34:4 Natufwailishe bonse capamo icilungeme, twishibe bonse ne cintu icisuma." 
Job34:5 Yobo alesosa ati, ‘Ine ndi wakaele, lelo Lesa nampoka insambu shandi." 
Job34:6 Nangu nshamonapo icibi ico nacita, Lesa ena alintunga ukuti ndi wabufi. Nangu ndi wakaele, umufwi wakwe walindasa icilonda icishipola.’" 
Job34:7 Bushe kwalibapo umuntu uwaba nga Yobo, uusosa ifyamusaalula nga ukunwa amenshi?" 
Job34:8 Aenda na bacita ifibi, no kwampana pamo ne fipondo." 
Job34:9 Bushe tasosele ati, ‘Umuntu uufwaya ukusansamusha Lesa aicushafye?’" 
Job34:10 “Kanshi nkutikeni nganshi imwe mwe bantu bamano. Lesa alitaluka nganshi ku bubi, kabili Umwine wa maka yonse tafyenga muntu." 
Job34:11 Alambula umuntu ukulingana ne milimo yakwe, cila muntu amucitila ukulingana ne myendele yakwe." 
Job34:12 Awe tacingacitika icakuti Lesa kuti alufyanya, Umwine wa maka yonse tapondamikila umuntu umulandu." 
Job34:13 Takwatala akuba na umbi uyo uwalashika Lesa pano isonde, uwamupeela ukwangalila fyonse ifyaba pano calo ponse." 
Job34:14 Nga cakuti Lesa afumyapo umupashi wakwe pano isonde, afumyapo no mupu wakwe," 
Job34:15 ala ifintu fyonse ifipema kuti fyafwafye pa muku umo, na bantu kuti babwelela kwiloba." 
Job34:16 “Kanshi iwe Yobo nga uli wamano kutika, umfwa amashiwi ayo ine nalanda." 
Job34:17 Bushe uwapata umulinganya kuti ateeka? Bushe Umwine wamulinganya, kabili Umwine wa maka yonse, eo iwe Yobo wingapama ukupeela umulandu?" 
Job34:18 Bushe te uwingeba bashamfumu ukuti, ‘Muli bafye,’ no kukalipila abasambashi ati, ‘Muli babifi?’" 
Job34:19 Bushe te uushakwatila intungulushi umucishacinani, uushakwata akapatulula pakati ka balanda na bakankala? Pantu bonse fibumbwa fya minwe yakwe." 
Job34:20 Akashita akali konse kuti bafwa nangu ni pakati ka bushiku, abantu basungukafye ninshi capwa. Kabili tafilwa ukwipaya abamaka." 
Job34:21 “Pantu Lesa alalengula imyendele ya muntu, amona ne ntampulo shakwe shonse." 
Job34:22 Takwaba ukwafisama, nangu ukwashika, uko uucita ifibi engafisama." 
Job34:23 Pantu Lesa talefwaya ukuceceta umuntu nakabili, pakuti aye kuli Lesa mukulubulula." 
Job34:24 Alofya abacindami apabula ukwipusha umulandu, kabili apyanikishapo bambi." 
Job34:25 Pantu Lesa alishiba ifibi fyonse ifyo bacita, eco abakuntila panshi ubushiku mpaka baonaika." 
Job34:26 Abakandila pa bubi bwabo, no kubaposa mu minyololo pa menso ya bantu." 
Job34:27 Pantu bena balimukene, no kusuula inshila shakwe shonse." 
Job34:28 Ebalengele inkuuta sha balanda ukumfwika kuli Lesa, asuka Lesa aumfwa uko abalecula balelila." 
Job34:29 Bushe Lesa nga atalala tondolo, ni nani engamwebaula? Nga afisa icinso cakwe, ni nani engamumona? Lelo e mwine wamaka pa muntu na pa calo icili conse," 
Job34:30 eulesha umubi ukuba kateeka, no kupususha abantu ku fiteyo fyakwe." 
Job34:31 “Nomba umuntu nga aeba Lesa ati, ‘Nimbifya lelo naleka, nshakabwekeshepo." 
Job34:32 Unsambilishe ifyo nafilwa ukwishiba. Nga cakuti nalibifya, nshakabwekeshepo nakabili.’" 
Job34:33 Bushe iwe, emukuti ulefwaya Lesa akucitile ifintu umo ulefwaila, ilyo iwe naukaana ukulapila? Kanshi nomba sosa ico we mwine wasalapo, ine nshakusalile iyoo. Ale utwebeko icili mu mano yobe." 
Job34:34 “Abantu bonse abamano na bonse abasalapuka, abalekutika kuti basumina abati," 
Job34:35 ‘Cacine Yobo alanda ukwabula amano, alanda amashiwi yakusabailafye.’" 
Job34:36 Kanshi mwesheni Yobo apakalamba, pantu imyasukile yakwe ni ilya iya bantu ababi." 
Job34:37 Pantu ena ku fyabubifi fyakwe alundilepo na bucisanguka, aletwishika umulinganya apo tuli, no kufusha amashiwi ayakusaalula Lesa.”" 
Job35:1 Kabili Elihu akonkanyapo ukulanda ati," 
Job35:2 “Bushe iwe Yobo, emukuti ulemona ukuti naciwama ici ulelanda icakuti, ‘Ine ndi wakaele pa cinso cakwa Lesa?’" 
Job35:3 Kabili uleipusha auti, ‘Ni cinshi mwenamo, cangafwilisha shani mukukanabifya?’" 
Job35:4 Kanshi ine nalakwasuka, pamo pene na bacibusa bobe." 
Job35:5 “Inwina amenso ku mulu umone, umone no butali apabelele amakumbi ya ku mulu." 
Job35:6 Nga wacita ububifi, ninshi bubi nshi wacita kuli Lesa? Nangu wafusha bumpulamafunde bobe, bushe kuti wamulenga ukucula?" 
Job35:7 Nangu nga wawamya, bushe fisuma nshi wamupeela? Fisuma nshi Lesa engapokelela kuli iwe?" 
Job35:8 Ukubifya kobe kuletelela umuntu nga iwe wine, no kuwamya kobe kuwaminafye umwana wa muntu." 
Job35:9 “Pa mulandu wa cisendo cakutitikishiwa abantu balailishanya, balapunda pakuti bambi bese babatuuleko ku bamaka." 
Job35:10 Lelo tapaba uutontonkanya no kwipusha ati, ‘Bushe Lesa uwamumbile ali kwi, uupeela inyimbo shansansa ubushiku?’" 
Job35:11 Ni Lesa ewalenga ukuti tucenjele ukucila inama sha mu mpanga, no kuba na mano ukucila ifyuni fya mu mulu." 
Job35:12 Nelyo abantu bakuuta mutuule, nomba ena tabasuka, pa mulandu wa cilumba ca babi." 
Job35:13 Cine cine Lesa tomfwako ku kukuuta kwa aba bantu, kabili Umwine wa maka yonse teti asakamaneko." 
Job35:14 Pali bufi bushe Lesa kuti akumfwa nga wasosa auti, ‘Awe ine nalifilwa ukumona Lesa! Umulandu wandi uli pa cinso cakwe.’ Eico iwe nomba ulelolelafye." 
Job35:15 Kabili ulesosa auti, ‘Nangu Lesa afulwa, takanda abantu. Aba ngo ushasakamana ilyo abantu bamusangukila.’" 
Job35:16 Kanshi Yobo asosafye amashiwi yacilandelande, afusha ifyakulanda pantu takwata mano.”" 
Job36:1 Elihu akonkanyapo ukusosa ati," 
Job36:2 “Ntekelafye umutima, uleke nkulondolwele, pantu ine ncili ne fyakuti nsoseleko Lesa." 
Job36:3 Amano yandi ine yafuma ukutali, nalishiba ifyakusoselako kabumba wandi pantu alalungika." 
Job36:4 Pantu icine cine ifyo ine ndesosa te fyabufi iyoo, ico ne ulekweba ndi muntu uwamano nganshi." 
Job36:5 “Mona ni Lesa e wamaka lelo tasuusha umuntu nangu umo, ewakwatisha amaka ayengi ayakumfwa." 
Job36:6 Taleka abantu babi baleikalilila, alaputwila abalanda imilandu bwino." 
Job36:7 Lesa tafumya amenso yakwe pa bantu abaololoka imitima, lelo abateka pa cipuna pamo ne shamfumu no kubacindamika umuyayaya." 
Job36:8 Asuka abakaka mu minyololo, no kubekata ku myando ya macushi." 
Job36:9 Epakubalanga fyonse ifyo balecita, no kubeba bumpulamafunde bwabo ubo balecita ku cilumba cabo." 
Job36:10 Epakubakomona amatwi pakuti bomfwishe ifyo Lesa alebasoka, nefyo bali nokuleka imisango yabo iyabipa." 
Job36:11 Nga cakuti baumfwa no kwamba ukumubombela, lyena kuti inshiku shabo shalapwa mwishuko, ne myaka yabo kuti yalapwa umutelelwe." 
Job36:12 Lelo nga bakaana ukumfwa, ninshi bakaloba ku lupanga, kabili bali nokufwa ukwabula amano." 
Job36:13 “Lelo abaumalala imitima, bekala abafulwa, balakaana no kumupapata nga abakaka." 
Job36:14 Bafwa ilyo bacili imisepela, pakati ka bacilende ba mu mfuba abaume." 
Job36:15 Apususha abalanda mu nshita shabo ishabulanda, no kubesula amenso yabo mu nshita shamacushi." 
Job36:16 Nobe wine afwaya ukukupususha mu bulanda bobe, ukwisa mu ncende umushaba umutitikisha, umwaba ifyapekanishiwa ifyanona petebulo lyobe." 
Job36:17 “Lelo iwe nawisulamo ubupingushi bwa babifi, ubupingushi no mulinganya fili muli iwe." 
Job36:18 Kanshi nomba ulecenjela, epali ubwingi bwa fyuma bwakukubula, na mafisakanwa ayengi nayo kuti yakuletelela." 
Job36:19 Bushe icuma cobe, nangu ukutulukusha kwa maka yobe, kuti fyakwafwa no kukupokololako ku macushi?" 
Job36:20 Wilafuluka inshita ya bushiku, ilyo abantu bengonaulwa mu ncende shabo." 
Job36:21 Ulecenjela wiyalukila kukucita ifyabipa, pantu iwe wasalapo ukucita ifyabipa ukucila ukucula." 
Job36:22 “Tontonkanya ifyo Lesa aba umucindami pa mulandu wa maka yakwe. Ni kafundisha nshi uwingalingana nankwe? 
Job36:23 Nani uwingamulangilila ifyakucita? Nangu nani uwingapama ukumweba ati, ‘Apa walufyanya?’ ”" 
Job36:24 “Ibukishafye ukulumbanya Lesa pa milimo yakwe, nga filya fine abantu bamutatakula mu nyimbo." 
Job36:25 Abantu bonse balatamba ifyo Lesa acita, nomba bonse bafitambilafye apatali." 
Job36:26 Icacine Lesa alikulisha, icakuti twalifilwa no kumwishiba, ne myaka yakwe nayo taipendwa." 
Job36:27 “Ni Lesa eubuula amenshi muli bemba, kabili euyasangula amatoni ya mfula." 
Job36:28 Imfula nayo epakulafumfumuka ukufuma mu makumbi, no kulalokela pa bantu." 
Job36:29 Takwaba nelyo umo uwaishiba ifyo Lesa atandanya amakumbi mu lwelele, nangu icilenga ukuti inkuba ilepanta?" 
Job36:30 Ulemona ifyo umwele wa nkuba umushinguluka, nefyo afimba fubefube pa mulu wa bemba." 
Job36:31 Ifi fyonse efyo Lesa abomfya pakupingula abantu, na pakubafushisha ifyakulya." 
Job36:32 Afumbata umwele wa nkuba mu minwe yakwe, apima na pakuti iponene." 
Job36:33 Icibulukutu cisobela ukwisa kwa mfula, ne ŋombe shileshiba ukwisa kwaiko.”" 
Job37:1 “Ecalenga ukuti umutima wandi ututume, no kukubauka mu cifuba candi." 
Job37:2 Kutikeni imwe bonse. Umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Lesa ifyo lilepanta, umfweni ifyo icibulumo cilefuma mu kanwa kakwe." 
Job37:3 Alebyashisha umwele wa nkuba pano pesamba lya mulu, nao umwele ulefika na mu mpela shonse pano pesonde." 
Job37:4 Pakonkapo icibulumo ce shiwi lyakwe, abulukuta ne shiwi lya bucindami bwakwe, kabili talesha iyo imfula ukubyata, ilyo ishiwi lyakwe lyaumfwika." 
Job37:5 Cine cine Lesa alatusungusha pafyo acita ifikulu, kabili ifintu abomba fyakutupeshafye mano." 
Job37:6 Ifyo eba ubunga bwa mfula ati, ‘Ponena pa mushili.’ Nangu ifyo eba imfula ati, ‘Fumfumukila panshi.’" 
Job37:7 Ninshi ne milimo ya bantu yatala yalala, epakuti abantu bonse bashininkishe ukuti Lesa aliba pa milimo." 
Job37:8 Ninshi lyena ne nama sha mpanga shabwelelamo uko shikala, no kwamba ukulauba umo shilala." 
Job37:9 Kankungwe afuma kumwakwe ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, no mwela wa ku kapinda ka ku kuso waleta impepo." 
Job37:10 Umupu wakwa Lesa ulapanga amenshi makasa, walenga na pa mulu wa menshi ponse ukutikama." 
Job37:11 Lesa ewisusha amenshi mu makumbi, amakumbi nayo yayamba ukubyata umwele wa nkuba." 
Job37:12 Lesa umwine ewensha amakumbi na pa nshita sha mu mwaka alayatungulula umwakwalukila, amakumbi yalanakila ifyebo fyakwa Lesa pano isonde ponse." 
Job37:13 Ico Lesa aletela amakumbi ne mfula pano calo, ni pakuti akalipile abantu ba pano calo, na pakuti abalange ukutemwa kwakwe." 
Job37:14 “Umfwa bwino aya mashiwi iwe Yobo, wikalefye tondolo, kabili utontonkanye ne fisungusho fyakwa Lesa." 
Job37:15 Bushe iwe Yobo, walishiba ifyo Lesa asesha ifi fintu, bushe iwe walishiba ifyo amakumbi yakwe yabyasha umwele wa nkuba?" 
Job37:16 Bushe iwe walishiba icilenga amakumbi ukulaenda mu lwelele, ala naco cine mulimo wakupapa, uutulanga ifyo amano yakwa Lesa yaba ayapwililika." 
Job37:17 Wamona ifyo ifyakufwala ifi ufwele fikabile ku cipuki, ilyo umwela wa ku kapinda ka ku kuso utalalika icalo." 
Job37:18 Bushe iwe kuti wayafwako Lesa ukufungulula umutenge wa mulu, pakuti ulemoneka nge cilolani icaengwa ku cela?" 
Job37:19 “Bushe iwe ulefwaya tulande shani pali Lesa? Pantu nomba ifwe amano yapela, ne fyakulandapo fimbi tapali." 
Job37:20 Ine nshaebe Lesa nati, ‘Leka nine ndelanda,’ awe, pantu limbi kuti angonaula." 
Job37:21 Takuli muntu nangu umo uwingalolesha pa kasuba akabengeshima mu mulu, panuma ilyo umwela waseshapo amakumbi." 
Job37:22 Na ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwaisuka kwabuuta, icakuti Lesa aikala mu bucindami bwakutiina." 
Job37:23 Ifwe teti tufike apaikala Umwine wa maka yonse, alitucila amaka no mulinganya, ena alalungika nganshi, kabili taba na lufyengo." 
Job37:24 Ecilenga nokuti abantu balemukwatila akatiina, kabili e mulandu wine ulenga ukuti alesuula abantu bonse abaitunga amano.”" 
Job38:1 Elyo Yawe ayasuka Yobo, ukufuma mu cimwela ati," 
Job38:2 “Bushe iwe niwe nani we ulefulunganya ifyo ine napingula, elyo no kulasosa amashiwi ayabula amano?" 
Job38:3 Eico kakisha umushipi mu musana nge mpalume ya bulwi, pantu nalakwipusha, nomba ndefwaya unjasuke." 
Job38:4 “Bushe wali kwi ilyo nashimpile umufula wa pano isonde, unjebe nga walishiba." 
Job38:5 Bushe iwe walishiba uwapimine ubukulu bwa pano pesonde? Icine cine walishiba, nangu uwatantikepo umwando wakupiminako?" 
Job38:6 Nga nipi apo inceshi she sonde shashimpwa? Nani abikile ilibwe ilyakulikasha pa kulitungilila? 
Job38:7 Ilyo intanda sha pa macaca shaleimba ne nsansa, na bana baume bakwa Lesa bonse balelumbanisha capamo." 
Job38:8 “Nani uwaisalile amenshi ya muli bemba, ilyo bemba apomweke ukufuma mu cifulo cakwe ngo wafuma mwifumo?" 
Job38:9 Ilyo nabuulile fubefube no kukupa pali bemba, no kuleka amakumbi ayafiita ukuti yabeko." 
Job38:10 Nine napimine bemba apakupelela, nabikako ifiibi elyo ne fyakwisalilako." 
Job38:11 No kumweba nati, ‘Apa epo wakulapelela, amatamba yobe yelapulapo. Epo icilumba ca matamba yobe cikaputukila.’" 
Job38:12 “Bushe mu bumi bobe, walitala aukonkomesha ukuti buce ulucelo, elyo no kupimina amacaca inshita?" 
Job38:13 Bushe walitala awebapo ulucelo ukuti lwikatilile impela she sonde, pakuti shikuntemo ababi?" 
Job38:14 Ulubuuto lwa pa macaca lulalenga impili ne mikonko ukwaluka, pakuti filemoneka nge nsalu ya mikonimikoni." 
Job38:15 Ulubuuto lwapa macaca lulashibatika abantu babi, lulabalesha no kucita ifyamisoka." 
Job38:16 “Bushe iwe walitala aufika apatula amenshi ya muli bemba? Bushe walitala awenda panshi ye tenga lya muli bemba? 
Job38:17 Bushe kwalitala akubako umo uwakulanga apabela impongolo sha mfwa? Bushe walitala aumona abalinda impongolo shafiita ukwikala abafwa? 
Job38:18 Bushe walishiba apafika ubukulu bwe sonde lyonse? Unjebe nga cakuti walishiba ifi fyonse. 
Job38:19 “Bushe iwe walishibako uko ulubuuto lwaikalila, nangu incende uko imfifi itula?" 
Job38:20 Bushe kuti watungulula ulubuuto ne mfifi, no kufilanga apo fili nokupelela, elyo no kufibweseshamo uko fikala?" 
Job38:21 Ee, nga cakuti walishiba ifi fyonse, ninshi cacine wabumbilwe pamo nafyo, ninshi uli muntu wakale nganshi!" 
Job38:22 “Bushe iwe walifikako uko natulika ubunga bwa mfula, nangu uko ine natutila amabwe ya mfula?" 
Job38:23 Ifi fintu ne mwine ndafisunga pakuti filebomba pa nshita ya bucushi, pa nshita ya ntulubundi, na pa nshita ya nkondo." 
Job38:24 Bushe iwe walishiba uko akasuba katula, nangu uko umwela wa ku kabanga utula pakuti ulepupa pa calo?" 
Job38:25 Nani uwaimbile icikonkwa umwakupita mulamba wa mfula uwa mukuku, nangu nani uwapekenye inshila umwakupita umwele wa nkuba?" 
Job38:26 Nani alenga imfula ukuloka mu fifulo umushaba bantu, nangu mu matololo umushikala bantu?" 
Job38:27 Nani uutapilila amatololo, nangu nani alenga icani ukumena mulya umwauma ndi?" 
Job38:28 “Bushe imfula yalikwata wishi? Nangu nani uufyala amatoni ya mume? 
Job38:29 Nyina wa menshi yalya ayatalalisha nani? Nangu nani nyina wa mume ulya uufuma mu mulu? 
Job38:30 Ni nani uulenga amenshi ukukosa nge libwe, no kulatikamika amatenga pamulu?" 
Job38:31 “Bushe niwe wakakanya iminyololo iyakaka intanda sha Pileiyadesi, nangu ukukakula imyando iyakakanya intanda sha Olioni?" 
Job38:32 Bushe niwe wingalenga mulanga ukumoneka pa nshita yakwe, no kutungulula ulutanda lwa Bea pamo na tumwane?" 
Job38:33 Bushe iwe walishiba icalenga ukuti ifya mu mulu fileenda? Bushe umusango fyendelamo kuti wafipingula, pakuti ne calo cilekonka?" 
Job38:34 “Bushe iwe ishiwi lyobe kuti lyafika ku makumbi, no kulenga amenshi ayabamo yakufimbe?" 
Job38:35 Bushe iwe niwe wingeba umwele wa nkuba ukubyata, icakuti nao wasumina ukubyata?" 
Job38:36 Bushe nani uupanda ulwita mfula amano ayakusobela ukuti imfula yalaisa? Nangu nani upanda mukolwe amano yakusobela ukuti bwaca? 
Job38:37 Nani uwakwata amano yakulonganya amakumbi, nangu ukuyasulika pakuti yetile amenshi?" 
Job38:38 Mpaka ulukungu lwa pa mushili lwakambantana, ne fibulungwa fyamamantika." 
Job38:39 “Bushe iwe niwe wikatila inkalamo inama shakulya? Nangu bushe niwe utuusha utwana twashiko insala," 
Job38:40 lilya tubwatalala mu mimba yatuko, nangu lilya tulalilila mu mateshi?" 
Job38:41 Nani uupekanisha mwankole ifyakulya, ilyo tumwane tulila kuli Lesa, no kutongomona imikoshi yatuko pa mulandu wa nsala?”" 
Job39:1 “Bushe iwe walishiba ilyo ifibushi mabwe fifyala? Bushe walitala autamba uko inama ya mpanga ilefyala abana? 
Job39:2 Bushe ulapenda imyeshi iyo inama sha mpanga shikwatilapo utwana, nangu inshita iyo tufyalilwapo?" 
Job39:3 Bushe walimona ifyo shikontama pakukwata utwana, icakuti no bukali bwa bufyashi bwapwa?" 
Job39:4 Utwana twashiko tutila nga twakula twakwata amaka mulya mu matololo, ilyo twasha banyinabo, tatubwelela uko bali." 
Job39:5 “Nani uulenga ukuti punda wa mpanga aleyendela? Nani uwamufumya mu minyololo? 
Job39:6 Nine ne mwine nalenga ukuti aleikala mu matololo, nine namupeela impanga umwakuti aleikala." 
Job39:7 Punda wa mpanga apata icibi icongo ca mu mushi, wena takwata uwakuti alemucusha nangu ukumubomfya." 
Job39:8 Wena apitanafye mu mpili emwaba ifyakulya, no kufwayamo ifyakulya ifiteku ifya misango yonse." 
Job39:9 “Bushe iwe imboo kuti yasumina ukukubombela? Nangu ukusendama ubushiku pa mulimba obe? 
Job39:10 Bushe iwe kuti wabula umwando no kukaka imboo mu mukoshi, pakuti ikulimineko amabala?" 
Job39:11 Bushe kuti wasubila mu maka yakwata imboo, nangu waileka ukuti ikubombele umulimo uwakosa?" 
Job39:12 Bushe kuti watontonkanya auti, ilebwelela kuli ine, mukuleta iŋanu pa lubansa lwakutwilapo?" 
Job39:13 “Amapindo ya mbuni yalangufyanya nganshi pakupampaila, lelo imbuni yalifilwa ukupupuka nga filya fipupuka kabaso." 
Job39:14 Itila nga yabikila amani pa mushili yayasha nefyo fine, yalekelafye umushili ukuti eo ukayakafye." 
Job39:15 Imbuni yena yalaba nokuti ulukasa lwa muntu kuti lwanyantapo, nangu iciswango conse ukuyatoba." 
Job39:16 Yena icita ubunkalwe ku twana twaiko, kwati teine yatuko, kabili tayasakamana nangu yacula apafye." 
Job39:17 Icalenga, mulandu wakuti Lesa tapeelako imbuni amano, aitana no kucenjela konse." 
Job39:18 Nomba nga yati kambutuke, isuusha kabalwe pamo no muntu uuninepo." 
Job39:19 “Bushe niwe walenga kabalwe ukuba uwalubilo? Bushe niwe wamufwika umwansa pa mukoshi? 
Job39:20 Bushe niwe walenga ukuti aletolauka amabaka nga makanta, no kulenga ukuti alelila ishiwi ilyakutiinya abantu?" 
Job39:21 Kabalwe alafola nga ali mu nika no kulalishamo inshindo, kabili ukuli inkondo alabutukilako mu maka yakwe yonse." 
Job39:22 Alaseka umwenso, kabili tapaba ico atiina, elyo tashintukila nangu bamulungika ulupanga." 
Job39:23 Pa mbali yakwa kabalwe pali mufuko wa mifwi, pamo ne fumo ilyabengeshima, elyo no lupanga." 
Job39:24 Kabalwe alapwa imilundu uwabula ukutuushako, nangu nge penga lyalila, alainyantawila, tekala tondolo." 
Job39:25 Lyonse ilyo ipenga lyalila, atila, ‘Eya!’ Ninshi anunsha no bwema bwa nkondo uko ibelele, pamo ne nkuuta sha bakalamba ba fita." 
Job39:26 “Bushe iwe Yobo, niwe upanda pungwa amano yakulela, ilyo umwine ansa amapindo pakulungama ku kapinda ka ku kuso?" 
Job39:27 Bushe niwe weba kapumpe ukuti apupukile mu mulu apatali, no kuyapanga icisansala cakwe pa mulu wa lupili?" 
Job39:28 Ubushiku asendama pa mulu wa mabwe ayatali, pa kantongolilo apashinganina muntu." 
Job39:29 Palya pene epo wena alengwila akatalamukila, conse icakuti ekate pakuti alye." 
Job39:30 Aliisha utwana twakwe ifya mulopa, na ponse apo amona icitumbi ninshi aleyapo.”" 
Job40:1 Yawe epakweba Yobo ati," 
Job40:2 “Bushe iwe we ulepashanya no Mwine wa maka yonse, kuti wamulanga ifyakucita? We uleebaula Lesa, njasuka.”" 
Job40:3 Elyo Yobo ayasuka Yawe ati," 
Job40:4 “Tapali ifyo ndi ine uwakuti ningamwasuka, ecalenga nokuti nkupike ulupi pa kanwa kandi," 
Job40:5 Ine ninanda umuku umo, kabili nafilwa ukwasuka. Nacibwekeshapo, lelo nshalande nakabili iyoo.”" 
Job40:6 Elyo Yawe asosha Yobo ukufuma mu cimwela ati," 
Job40:7 “Eico kakisha umushipi mu musana nge mpalume ya bulwi, pantu nalakwipusha, nomba unjasuke." 
Job40:8 “Bushe emukuti ulefwaya ukusuusha ubupingushi bwandi? Bushe iwe, niwe ulepeela ine umulandu elyo iwe waimona uwacishinka?" 
Job40:9 Bushe na iwe, wakwata amaka nga yakwa Lesa? Bushe ishiwi lyobe kuti lyapanta nge lyakwa Lesa?" 
Job40:10 Nga efyo caba, kanshi uifwike ubukankala no bucindami, uifwike no bufumu elyo no mucinshi." 
Job40:11 Uilange nefyo wakalipa, ulenge no muntu onse uwacilumba ukutotobala." 
Job40:12 Ushuluke no muntu onse uwacilumba, upase na ponse apeminine abantu babi." 
Job40:13 Ubashiike bonse mu lukungu, ushiike impumi shabo mu nindi." 
Job40:14 Nga wacita ifi, lyena ninshi nalakusuminisha, ukuti kanshi ukuboko kobe ukwamaka kuti kwakupususha." 
Job40:15 “Tala, tamba bemoti, ine naibumba nga filya nabumba iwe, lelo yena ilya icani nga filya iŋombe ilya." 
Job40:16 Kabili ubale umone ifyo yaba na maka mu musana, no kuba ne mishipa iyakosa mu mutete waiko." 
Job40:17 Umucila waiko watonkomana nge cimuti ca keda, no bushipa mu molu yaiko, buntu bwapikana." 
Job40:18 Amafupa mu mungololo waiko yaba kwati ni mpanda sha mukuba, ne myendo yaiko yakosa nge fyela ifyo abantu bafula." 
Job40:19 “Bemoti yalicindama pa fibumbwa fyonse ifyakwa Lesa, eco ine ne waibumba, ninefye neka ningaitiinya." 
Job40:20 Impili eshiiletela icakulya ne nama shimbi shonse eko shangala. 
Job40:21 Bemoti isendama mu macinda, kabili ibelama mu matete ya mwisense lya mumana." 
Job40:22 Yatemwa ukuuba mu cintelelwe ca mpupunga sha macinda, ne mishingu ya mu menshi nayo ilashicingililako." 
Job40:23 Nangufye yaibila panshi ya menshi, awe yena taitunsha mutima, nangufye amenshi yapabuka aya mu mumana Yordani, awe yena taitiina nakalya." 
Job40:24 Nani engekata bemoti nga ilelolesha? Nani uwingaikolokofya icinkobwe mu mona waiko?” 
Job41:1 “Bushe iwe kuti waloba cishimweshimwe ci Lefiatani ku bulobo? Bushe kuti wakaka ululimi lwaciko ku mwando? 
Job41:2 Bushe kuti wapisha umwando mu mona waciko, nangu ukupulinkanya icinkobwe mu nsekete shaciko?" 
Job41:3 Bushe kuti cishimweshimwe cakupapata iwe, nangu ukukusembeleka kwishiwi ilyamutembo?" 
Job41:4 Bushe kuti waumfwana naco pakuti cilekubombela, ukushinta na pa kufwa kwaciko?" 
Job41:5 Bushe kuti walacangasha nga akoni kalya umuntu ateeka, pakuti kalesekesha abakashana bobe?" 
Job41:6 Bushe abamakwebo kuti bapangana palwa kushitisha cishimweshimwe, nangu bushe kuti baciputaula mu fipimfya pakushitisha?" 
Job41:7 Bushe kuti watulaula umubili waciko ku meela aya mabanga? Nangu bushe kuti wacilasa ubwela mu mutwe? 
Job41:8 Nga cakuti waesha ukucikumanya, elyo uli nokumona ifyo uli nokucula, icakuti tawakatale aubwekeshapo." 
Job41:9 Ukulwisha ukucikata ninshi uleibepafye, pantu ifyo cimonekafye, efingakutiinya." 
Job41:10 Takwaba uwingakwata amaka yakucibala, nga kanshi nani uwingalwishanya na ine?" 
Job41:11 Nga nani uwingesa ilishanya ukuti nalimukwatila imisha pakuti imulipile? Pantu ifintu fyonse fyandi pano pesamba lya mulu. 
Job41:12 “Ine nshingafilwa ukukweba palwa myendo yakwe, apo amaka yakwe yapelela, no musango abumbilwamo." 
Job41:13 Nani uwingafunda umukupo wakwe, kabili nani engacipalama ninshi akwetefye inshinga?" 
Job41:14 Nani uwingacasamuna akanwa, pantu ameno yaciko tepakutwa." 
Job41:15 Panuma yaciko patantama imitande ya nkwela, ishakambantana shonse bwino." 
Job41:16 Shalikambantana icakuti no mwela teti upite pakati kashiko. 
Job41:17 Shalikambatana mu musango uwakuti tashingapatululwa. 
Job41:18 Cena nga catesemuna palabyata insase, na menso yaciko yakashika nge myengelele ya kasuba akaletula." 
Job41:19 Mu kanwa kaciko mufuma ulubingu lwa mulilo, ninshi ne nsase shilesabuka." 
Job41:20 Mu myona yaciko mufutumuka icushi, kwati ni cilya cifuka mu mpoto iyili pa mulilo." 
Job41:21 Umupu waciko ulasha amalasha, na mu kanwa kaciko mulefuma umulilo." 
Job41:22 Mu mukoshi waciko emwaba amaka, na bantu bonse abacikumyamo balacitiina." 
Job41:23 Umutika wa munofu waciko walikambantana, walikambatila na ku mubili, wakosa ndii." 
Job41:24 Umutima waciko wakosa nge libwe, wakosa ndii kwati libwe lyakupelelapo." 
Job41:25 Ilyo caibuka, abamaka bonse baitutuminafye, bonse balekatwa umwenso ilyo cafupula umucila waciko pa menshi." 
Job41:26 Ulupanga nangu lwacikoma, tapaba ifyo lucicita, nangufye lifumo, nangu icibingu nangu umufwi." 
Job41:27 Cena cimona icela kwati cani, no kumona umukuba kwati cimuti icabola." 
Job41:28 Imifwi teti icifulumune, no kucilasa amabwe kwati muleciposela ulukungu." 
Job41:29 Nga wacibola icibombolo, cena cumfwa kwati litete wacikumya, nangu wacilasa icibingu, cena cisekafye." 
Job41:30 Pa lufumo lwaciko paba amaŋongwa ayatwa ngo mwele, nga capita mu matipa mushala utushila nga tulya cipanga icakutandilako." 
Job41:31 Cena cilabilausha amenshi petenga, kwati menshi yalebilauka mu nongo iyili pa mulilo." 
Job41:32 Mu menshi umo cipita mulashala ikuba ilyabengeshima, mpaka ikuba lyabuuta tuutu kwati ni mfwi." 
Job41:33 Pano isonde tapaba icibumbwa nangu cimo icalingana naco, cena cabafye icibumbwa cimo icishitiina kantu." 
Job41:34 Kabili cena calisuula nganshi ifibumbwa fimbi fyonse, elyo cena cekafye ecaba imfumu iyateeka fyonse ifyacilumba.”" 
Job42:1 Elyo Yobo ayasuka Yawe ati," 
Job42:2 “Ine nalishiba ukuti niwe we mwine uwingacita icili conse, kabili takuli nangu umo uwinga fulunganya amapange yobe." 
Job42:3 Nawipusha ukuti ni nani uyo uwingacila mu bupingushi bwandi ukwabula amano? Eico pa mulandu wakulanda amashiwi ayakusabaila, nasukile nalanda pa fintu ifyo ine nshaishibe, pa fintu ifyakupapa, kabili ifyampeseshe amano." 
Job42:4 “Wacinjeba ati, ‘Ikala tondolo, pakuti nkwebe, no kukwipusha elyo unjasuke.’" 
Job42:5 Kale nakwishibe mukukumfwa kuli bambi, lelo nomba amenso yandi yakumona." 
Job42:6 Eico nabwesha amashiwi yandi yonse ayo nalanda, naikuba ulukungu ne mito pakulanga ukuti nalapila.”" 
Job42:7 Panuma ilyo Yawe apwisha ukweba Yobo aya mashiwi, elyo aeba Elifasi umwina Temani ati, “Ine ninkufulilwa nganshi iwe pamo na babiyo bene babili, pantu tamwacilalanda ifyacishinka pali ine nga filya umubomfi wandi Yobo acilalanda." 
Job42:8 Kanshi imwe kabuuleni bacilume ba ŋombe cine lubali, na basukusuku nabo cine lubali, muye nabo ku mubomfi wandi Yobo, muye boca pakutuula ilambo lyakuipapatilako mwe bene. Elyo muli iyi ine nshila, no mubomfi wandi Yobo alaya mupapatilako pantu ena ndeisa umfwa ipepo lyakwe, elyo nsuuleko ku cilubo cenu icakukanalanda bwino nga filya Yobo acilanda.”" 
Job42:9 Elyo Elifasi umwina Temani, na Biludadi umwina Shuha, na Sofari umwina Namati bayacita ifyo Yawe abebele, na Yawe asumina ne pepo lyapepele Yobo." 
Job42:10 Ilyo Yobo apwile ukupepelako bacibusa bakwe, elyo Yawe abweseshe Yobo ifyuma nakabili, icakuti lyena fyacilapo imiku ibili pa fyuma akwete pakutendeka." 
Job42:11 Bamunyina bonse na bankashi yakwe bonse abakwa Yobo, pamo na bacibusa bakwe bonse abakale epakwisa mukumona Yobo, no kwisa mukuipakisha nankwe mu ŋanda mumwakwe. Balamulangulukila no kumutalalika umutima pa macushi yonse ayo Yawe amuletele. Bonse umo umo basha bamupeelako indalama ne mbalaminwe ya golide." 
Job42:12 Yawe epakupaala imikalile yakwa Yobo ukucila na pafyo aikele kale. Yobo akwata impaanga amakana ikumi na yane (14,000), ingamila amakana mutanda (6,000), iŋombe ishilume ishakulima na pulao ikana limo (1,000), na bapunda abakota ikana limo (1,000)." 
Job42:13 Akwata abana abaume cine lubali elyo na bana abanakashi batatu. 
Job42:14 Umwana wakwe umwanakashi uwapakubala amwinika ishina lya Yemima, uwabubili amwinika ishina lya Kesia no walenga butatu amwinika ishina lya Kereni Hapuki." 
Job42:15 Mu calo conse tamwali abanakashi abali abasuma nga bamwana Yobo. Shibo nao alibaakenyeko ifyuma pamo pene na bandume shabo ifyo ali nokubashila pa kufwa kwakwe. 
Job42:16 Ilyo amacushi yakwe yapwile, Yobo aikele pano calo imyaka umwanda umo na makumi yane (140). Amwene abana bakwe na beshikulu bakwe ukushinta na ku nkulo yalenga bune." 
Job42:17 Asukile Yobo afwa ninshi ali umukote uwa nshiku ishingi. 
Psalms1:1 Alishuka umuntu uushendela mu mano ayapanda ababifi, kabili takonkelela imisango ya babipa, kabili tekala pamo na bamiponto." 
Psalms1:2 Lelo ena asansamukila mu mafunde yakwa Yawe, kabili yena eyo atontonkanyapo akasuba no bushiku." 
Psalms1:3 Aba ngo muti uwalimbwa mu lulamba lwa mumana, uutwala ifitwalo fyauko pa nshita iyalinga, na mabula yauko tayabonsa nakalya, kabili ena alishuka muli fyonse ifyo acita." 
Psalms1:4 Lelo abantu ababifi tefyo baba, bena baba nge misungu iyululwa ku mwela." 
Psalms1:5 Eico, abantu ababifi bakapeelwa umulandu kuli Yawe, kabili tabakekale pamo na bololoke." 
Psalms1:6 Pantu Yawe alatungulula imyendele ya bantu abololoke, lelo imyendele ya bantu ababifi ikabalofya." 
Psalms2:1 Bushe mulandu nshi imishobo ya bantu ipondokela? Bushe cinshi abenafyalo bakwatila amapange ayabuwelewele? 
Psalms2:2 Ishamfumu sha pano isonde shileipekanya ku bulwi, na bakateeka nabo nabalongana pamo, balepangila Imfumu no wasubwa wakwe." 
Psalms2:3 Balelanda no kuti, “Natuputaule iminyololo yabo, kabili natukaane na mafunde yabo.”" 
Psalms2:4 Uyo uwaikala pa cipuna cabufumu ku mulu ena abaseka, Yawe asuka abasenteka." 
Psalms2:5 Elyo abasosha mwishiwi lyabukali, no kubatiinya mu cipyu, ati," 
Psalms2:6 “Ine ninsonta imfumu yandi pa Sioni, ulupili lwandi ulwamushilo.”" 
Psalms2:7 Ine ndi nokulondolola icipope cakwa Yawe, ico asosele kuli ine ati, “Iwe uli mwana wandi, ilelo naba wiso." 
Psalms2:8 Ulombe kuli ine, na ine ndekupeela imishobo ya benafyalo ibe ubupyani bobe, ne sonde lyonse apo lyapela likaba icacishilano cobe." 
Psalms2:9 Ukalabateeka ku nkonto ya cela, ukabatobaula mu tupimfya tupimfya nge nongo.”" 
Psalms2:10 Eico shilimukeni mwe shamfumu, cenjeleni imwe mwe bakateeka ba pano isonde." 
Psalms2:11 Mulebombela Yawe na katiina, mu mwenso no kututuma." 
Psalms2:12 Mulemucindika na katiina, pantu nga cakuti akalipa kuti amulofya, ico icipyu cakwe cilabilimuka bwangu bwangu. Balishuka bonse abafisama muli ena." 
Psalms3:1 We Yawe, ifyo bafula abalwani bandi, nabafula mu mpendwa abalenjimina." 
Psalms3:2 Nabafula abampingila ukuti, “Lesa takamupokololeko nakalya.”" 
Psalms3:3 Lelo iwe uli nkwela iyakuncingilila, we Yawe, ulancindamika no kunenga ukwinuna umutwe," 
Psalms3:4 Kuli Yawe eko ndilila mutuule, nao alanjasuka ukufuma pa lupili ulwamushilo." 
Psalms3:5 Ndalambalala no kulala mu tulo, kabili ndabuuka pantu Yawe alansunga." 
Psalms3:6 Tekuti ntiine abalwani imyandamishila, abanjimina mu mbali shonse." 
Psalms3:7 Ima we Yawe! Mpokolola we Lesa wandi! Uma pa nsekete sha balwani bandi, no kukula ameno ya babifi." 
Psalms3:8 Ukulubulwa kufuma kuli Yawe. Uleke amapaalo yobe yabe pa bantu bobe. 
Psalms4:1 Ilyo ine ndekuuta mutuule, ulenjasuka we Lesa wandi umulungami, untuuleko ukufuma mu kucucutika kwandi, umbeleleko uluse no kukutika kwipepo lyandi." 
Psalms4:2 Mwe bantu, bushe ni lilali mukaleka ukusaalula ubucindami bwandi? Mukaleka lilali ukutemwa ifyabuwelewele no kufwaya ifyabufi?" 
Psalms4:3 Ishibeni ukuti Yawe aliipatwila abamupetamina, ine Yawe alaŋumfwa ilyo nakuuta kuli ena." 
Psalms4:4 Nga cakuti mwafulwa, mwilaleka ukufulwa kwenu kumutwale kukubifya, na lintu muli mu busanshi bwenu mufitontonkanyepo mukati ka mitima yenu, no kwikala tondolo." 
Psalms4:5 Tuuleni amalambo ayalungama, no kutetekela muli Yawe." 
Psalms4:6 Abengi balepusha abati, “Bushe nani engatulanga icintu icisuma, pakuti icinso cobe cibalikile pali ifwe we Yawe?”" 
Psalms4:7 Walipeela umutima wandi ubuseko ubwacila, ala bwalicila pa nsansa sha balya abakwatisha iŋanu no mwangashi upya." 
Psalms4:8 Nakulalambalala no kulala umutende, pantu niwe weka we Yawe uunsunga mu mutelelwe." 
Psalms5:1 Kutika kwipepo lyandi we Yawe, umfwa ukupemashika kwandi." 
Psalms5:2 Umfwa uko ndelila we Mfumu yandi kabili we Lesa wandi, pantu ni kuli iwe ndepepa." 
Psalms5:3 Cila lucelo ulomfwa ishiwi lyandi we Yawe, ilyakulomba elyo no kwikala pakulolela ubwasuko." 
Psalms5:4 Tawaba Lesa uwikala aletamba ifyabipa, ababifi tekuti basangwe mu ceni cobe." 
Psalms5:5 Abamataki tekuti beminine ku cinso cobe, pantu walipata bonse abacita ifyabipa." 
Psalms5:6 Ulonaula bonse ababepa ubufi. Yawe alipata abasumya umulopa ne ncenjeshi. 
Psalms5:7 Lelo pa mulandu wa luse lobe ulukalamba, ine nkengila mu ŋanda yobe. Nkakontamika icinso candi mwi Tempele lyobe ilyamushilo, pa mulandu wa kukukwatila akatiina." 
Psalms5:8 Ntungulula we Yawe mu kulungama kobe, pantu ine naba na balwani. Ubike inshila yobe iyatambalala pa ntanshi yandi." 
Psalms5:9 Pantu akanwa kabo takalanda fyacishinka, na mu mitima yabo mwaisulamo ubonaushi. Imikolomino yabo ni nindi ishacenama, indimi shabo shilandafye ifyakusembeleka." 
Psalms5:10 Ubapeele umulandu we Lesa, uleke amapange yabo yabawishe. Ubatamfye pantu balikwatisha ulufyengo, kabili bantu abakusangukila." 
Psalms5:11 Lelo leka bonse abafisama muli iwe babe no buseko, kabili leka balekwimbila pe na pe. Fusha ubucingo bobe pali bena, pakuti abatemwa ishina lyobe basekelele." 
Psalms5:12 Pantu we Yawe ulapaala abololoke, no kubacingilila ku luse lobe nge nkwela." 
Psalms6:1 We Yawe ala windubulwisha mu cipyu nelyo kunjalulwila mu bukali. 
Psalms6:2 Umbelelefye uluse, we Yawe ico ine nshakosa. Umposhe we Yawe, pantu amafupa yandi yalekalipwa." 
Psalms6:3 Umutima wandi naushupikwa. Bushe ndeba ifi ukufika ku nshita nshi? 
Psalms6:4 We Yawe pilibukila kuli ine no kumpokolola. Mpususha pa mulandu wa kutemwa kobe ukushipwa. 
Psalms6:5 Takwaba umuntu uukwibukisha panuma ya mfwa, Bushe ni nani engakulumbanya ilyo ali ku calo ca bafwa?" 
Psalms6:6 Ine nimfunshika kukuteta ubushiku bonse, ifilamba filabomfya no musengele wandi, pamo ne cakusailapo candi." 
Psalms6:7 Amenso yandi nayanaka ku bulanda ndefilwa no kulolesha, abalwani bandi ebalenga ifi." 
Psalms6:8 Ntalukeni imwe bonse mwe bacita ifyabipa, pantu Yawe naumfwa ukulila kwandi." 
Psalms6:9 Yawe naumfwa inkuuta yandi, alapokelela ukupepa kwandi." 
Psalms6:10 Abalwani bandi bonse bakekatwa insoni, Bali nokubwelelamo aba nsoni ishingi." 
Psalms7:1 We Yawe Lesa wandi, ni muli iwe mfisama, mpususha no kumpokolola kuli bonse abansupila." 
Psalms7:2 Epali bandepaula nge nkalamo, no kunkulanya ukwabula no wakumpokololako." 
Psalms7:3 We Yawe Lesa wandi, ine nga cakuti nalilufyanya, icakuti nakwata no mulandu," 
Psalms7:4 nga cakuti nalibifya ku muntu munandi uwakaele, nangu ukwibila umulwani wandi apabula umulandu," 
Psalms7:5 leka umulwani uyu ansupile, ansange anyantaule, no kunsha icitumbi mu lukungu." 
Psalms7:6 We Yawe ima mu bukali bobe, wiminine mu cipyu pa balwani bandi, buuka we Lesa wandi, we upingula mu bulungami." 
Psalms7:7 Leka imitundu ya bantu bonse balongane ukukushinguluka, pakuti uteeke pali bena, we waba ku mulu." 
Psalms7:8 Lekeni Yawe apingule imitundu ya bantu, umpingule we Yawe umwabela ubololoke bwandi, na pa mulandu wa kupetama kwandi." 
Psalms7:9 Pwisha ubunkalwe bwa bantu ababifi, lelo ucingilile umololoke, we Lesa wamulinganya, we upima amano no mutima." 
Psalms7:10 Ubucingo bwandi ni Lesa Uwapulamo, uupususha abaololoka imitima." 
Psalms7:11 Lesa ni kapingula uwalungama, ni Lesa uulanga ubukali bwakwe cila bushiku." 
Psalms7:12 Nga cakuti umuntu tapilibwike, alanona ulupanga lwakwe, no kulema ubuta kukulasa." 
Psalms7:13 Apekanya ifyanso fyakwe ifyakwipailako, pamo ne mifwi ya mulilo." 
Psalms7:14 Umuntu uwaisulamo ububifi mwifumo lyakwe, nga aimita ifyongo akafyala ishamo." 
Psalms7:15 Umuntu uwimba ubucinga, eukawilamo umwine." 
Psalms7:16 Ifyongo fintu aleta, fikamwalukila, kabili ulukakala lwakwe lulamuletelela." 
Psalms7:17 Nakulatotela Yawe pa mulandu wa bulungami bwakwe, no kulumbanya ishina lyakwa Yawe Uwapulamo." 
Psalms8:1 We Yawe, we mfumu yesu, ifyo bwakula ubucindami bwe shina lyobe pano isonde ponse! Walipulamika ubukata bobe ukucila na pa myulu ine." 
Psalms8:2 Ku tunwa twa twaice no twa kwibele, eko waipekanishisha amalumbo yene yene, pa mulandu wakucimfya abalwani bobe, pamo na bantu bonse abakutalamina." 
Psalms8:3 Ntila nga nalolesha imyulu iyo wapanga ne minwe yobe, umweshi ne ntanda ifyo wabikamo." 
Psalms8:4 Ntila ngo muntunse wanshi uwakuti ulemutontonkanyapo? Umwana wa muntu nao wanshi uwakuti ulesakamana? 
Psalms8:5 Lelo walimulenga ukuti abe uwacepapo panono pali Lesa, walimufwika icisote cabufumu icamucinshi no bucindami." 
Psalms8:6 Walimupeela amaka ayakuteeka ifintu fyonse ifyo wabumba, walilenga na fyonse ukulamukunkwila," 
Psalms8:7 pa mpaanga ne ŋombe shonse, elyo na pa nama shonse isha mu mpanga," 
Psalms8:8 pa fyuni fya mu lwelele na pesabi ilyaba muli bemba, na pa fibumbwa fimbi fyonse ifyenda muli bemba." 
Psalms8:9 We Yawe, we mfumu yesu, ifyo bwakula ubucindami bwe shina lyobe pano isonde ponse!" 
Psalms9:1 Nakulakulumbanya we Yawe no mutima wandi onse, nakulalanda na pa ficitwa fyobe fyonse ifyakupapa." 
Psalms9:2 Nakulasangalala pamo no kusekelela muli iwe, nakulaimba isha malumbo kwishina lyobe, we Wapulamo." 
Psalms9:3 Ilyo abalwani bandi bafulumuka, baya baleipununa no konaika pa cinso cobe." 
Psalms9:4 Wampingula no kunsanga uwakaele, we kapingula wamulinganya uwaikala pa cipuna." 
Psalms9:5 Wakalipila imishobo no konaula ababifi, walofya na mashina yabo pe na pe." 
Psalms9:6 Abalwani bena nabalala nabalobelela, imisumba yabo nayonaika, tapakabe no wakubebukisha nakalya." 
Psalms9:7 Lelo icipuna cakwa Yawe ca pe na pe, acishimpika kukupingwilako abantu." 
Psalms9:8 Akapingula abantu bonse mu bulungami, no kubateeka no mulinganya." 
Psalms9:9 Muli Yawe emwakufisama abantu abacucutika, umwakufisama mu nshita yonse iya macushi." 
Psalms9:10 Abantu abaishiba ishina lyobe balakucetekela, pantu we Yawe tawatala aulekelesha abo abakufwaya." 
Psalms9:11 Imbeni isha malumbo kuli Yawe uuteeka mu Sioni, mubilikishe na ku bantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo ifyo acita." 
Psalms9:12 Ico ena uulandula pakusumya umulopa talaba abalecula, kabili talaba inkuuta yabo," 
Psalms9:13 Unangulukileko ine we Yawe, umone nefyo abampata balencusha. Niwefye unjimya no kumpokolola ukufuma ku mfwa," 
Psalms9:14 pakuti nkalumbule amalumbo yobe ku mwana mwanakashi Sioni, elyo nkasekelela ukupususha kobe." 
Psalms9:15 Imishobo naiponena mu cilindi ico abene baimbile, na makasa yabo nayekatwa mu citeyo ico abene bateya." 
Psalms9:16 Yawe nailangisha pafyo acitile ubupingushi, naikata ababi bonse pa fintu bacita ku minwe yabo." 
Psalms9:17 Ababifi babwelela ku calo ca bafwa, pamo ne mishobo yonse iyilaba Lesa." 
Psalms9:18 Lelo abalanda tabakalabwe, ne subilo lya bantu abacucutika talyakapwe." 
Psalms9:19 Ima, we Yawe, wileka ukuti umuntufye eo acimfye. Pingula imishobo ya bantu bonse we mwine." 
Psalms9:20 We Yawe leka abantu bakukwatile akatiina, pakuti beshibe ukuti bena bantufye." 
Psalms10:1 We Yawe, bushe mulandu nshi wiminina akatalamukila? Bushe cinshi ufisamina pa nshita ya macushi yesu?" 
Psalms10:2 Mu mataki emo umubifi acushisha abalanda, balekatwa mu fiteyo ifyo abateya." 
Psalms10:3 Umubifi alaitakisha pa fya lunkumbwa lwakwe Uwakaso alatuka no kupontela Yawe. 
Psalms10:4 Mu cilumba cakwe, umubifi tafwaya Yawe, mu kutontonkanya kwakwe konse atila, “Takwaba Lesa.”" 
Psalms10:5 Enda uwashuka lyonse mu micitile yakwe, tasakamana no bupingushi bobe ubwacindama na bonse abamulwisha alibasuula." 
Psalms10:6 Mu mutima atila, “Takwaba icankutiinya, na mu nshita yonse iyabumi nshakakwatepo ubwafya.”" 
Psalms10:7 Mu kanwa kakwe mufumafye intipu, ubufi pamo ne fyakutiinya, ubwafya no bubifi efifuma panshi ya lulimi lwakwe." 
Psalms10:8 Alabelama mu mbali ya nshila sha mu mishi, kukulalilila mukwipaya abantu abakaele, alolela ukwikata abashama." 
Psalms10:9 Abelama pamo nga filya inkalamo ifisama, afisama pakuti ekate umulanda. Nga aikata mulanda, amukulila na mwisumbu lyakwe." 
Psalms10:10 Alateyamina no kubotelela panshi pakufwailisha, no mulanda awila mu minwe yakwe." 
Psalms10:11 Mu mano yakwe, umubifi atila, “Yawe alilaba, nalimo alifimba pa menso yakwe, kabili tekuti amone.”" 
Psalms10:12 Ala ima we Yawe, imya ukuboko we Lesa wandi, wilaba abalanda." 
Psalms10:13 Cinshi umubifi akwatila imisuula kuli Lesa, no kulatontonkanya mu mutima ati, “Takandubulwishe?”" 
Psalms10:14 Lelo we Yawe, ulamona amafya pamo no kulilishika, ulatontonkanyapo pakufibika mu minwe yobe. Abalanda balilila kuli iwe, niwe kafwa wa bana banshiwa." 
Psalms10:15 Funa ukuboko kwa mubifi no kwa ushumfwa. Kalipa pa bubi bwakwe ubwafisama mpaka bukapwe. 
Psalms10:16 Yawe ni mfumu pe na pe, imishobo ikaloba ukufuma mu calo cakwe." 
Psalms10:17 We Yawe ulomfwa ukupapata kwa bantu abacucutika, ulabakoselesha no kukutika ku kulila kwabo." 
Psalms10:18 Ulacita umulinganya kuli bakashiwa na ku balecululuka pakuti aba pano isonde baleke ukuleta icintiinya. 
Psalms11:1 Ni muli Yawe emo mfisama, bushe kuti mwanjeba shani amuti, “Pupuka nge cuni uye ku lupili lobe.”" 
Psalms11:2 Pantu ababifi nabalema amata yabo, no kwandika imifwi ilyo pafiitile, pakuti balase abantu abaololoka mu mitima yabo." 
Psalms11:3 Nga cakuti umufula waonaika, ngo mololoke ni cinshi engacita?" 
Psalms11:4 Yawe aba mwi Tempele lyakwe ilyamushilo, ali pa cipuna cakwe icaba mu mulu. Yawe alamona bonse abana ba bantu, no kuceceta fyonse ifyo bacita." 
Psalms11:5 Yawe alapima abantu abololoke, lelo umweo wakwe alipata ababifi na batemwa ulufyengo." 
Psalms11:6 Pa bantu ababifi akalokeshapo umulilo uwakabisha nganshi ne fyanunka nga maluti, no kubaletela umwela wa lubingu uwakubacusha." 
Psalms11:7 Pantu Yawe mulungami, atemwa abacita umulinganya, na bololoke bakamona cinso cakwe." 
Psalms12:1 Ungafweko ine we Yawe, pantu abamupetamina nomba tapali, na bantu abacishinka nabapwa ukuloba bonse." 
Psalms12:2 Abashala bonse babufi kuli umo no munankwe, baba no bwilikandimi no kubepana." 
Psalms12:3 We Yawe wingafumyapo abantu babwilikandimi, no kubapwisha amataki yabo." 
Psalms12:4 Bena batila, “Twakulalandila umo tulefwaila, takuli uwakutulesha.”" 
Psalms12:5 “Pa mulandu wa kucucutika kwa banaka no kuteta kwa balecula, nalaima,” efyo Yawe nao asosa. “Ndi nokwisa bapokololako ku balebatitikisha.”" 
Psalms12:6 Amashiwi Yawe alaya, mashiwi yacishinka. Yaba pamo nga silifa uwalopolwa imiku cine lubali mu mulilo." 
Psalms12:7 We Yawe wingatucingililako, no kutupokolola ku bantu ba musango uyu lyonse." 
Psalms12:8 Pantu ababifi baleendaukafye mpanga yonse, no bubifi ebo abantu bacindikisha." 
Psalms13:1 Bushe kufika ku nshita nshi we Yawe uli nokundaba, kabili kufika lilali uli nokufisa icinso cobe kuli ine?" 
Psalms13:2 Bushe kufika lilali umutima wandi wakulacula ku matontonkanyo, kabili no kulaikala uwabulanda akasubafye konse? Bushe kufika lilali umulwani wandi akulancimfya?" 
Psalms13:3 We Yawe, Lesa wandi, unangulukileko no kunjasuka, mpuputula lintu nshilaponena mu tulo twa mfwa," 
Psalms13:4 Epali na balwani bandi bayamba ukusosa abati “Natumucimfya.” Bakasekela pakumona ukuwa kwandi. 
Psalms13:5 Lelo ine nacetekela mu kutemwa kobe ukushipwa, no mutima wandi ulecankilwa mwipusukilo lyobe." 
Psalms13:6 Nkalaimba kuli Yawe, pa mulandu wa fisuma ifyo ancitila." 
Psalms14:1 Impelwamano mu mutima itila, “Takwaba Lesa.” Aba bantu balyonaika, kabili bacita ifintu ifyamusebanya, kabili tapaba nelyo umo uucita ifisuma." 
Psalms14:2 Ukufuma ku mulu, Yawe alolesha pa bana ba bantu, pakumona nga palipo umo uwamano, uufwaya Lesa." 
Psalms14:3 Abantu bonse balifutatila Lesa, bonse balifye abaonaika. Tapali nelyo umo uucita ubusuma, nakalya nangufye umo." 
Psalms14:4 Bushe abacita ifibi, emukuti mano bashakwata? Bantu abashaishiba no kupepa kuli Yawe, kabili bonaula abantu bandi kwati ni filya umuntu alya umukate." 
Psalms14:5 Bakulaikatwa no mwenso uukalamba pantu Lesa aba pakati ka bololoke. 
Psalms14:6 Mwe babifi nimwe mufulunganya amapange ya bapina, lelo bena bafisama muli Yawe." 
Psalms14:7 Iyee, kuti cawama ukupusuka kwa bena Israeli nga kwafuma mu Sioni! Ilyo Yawe akabwesesha abantu bakwe kumwabo, elyo Yakobo akaleanga, na Israeli akalesansamuka." 
Psalms15:1 Iye we Yawe, bushe ni nani uo calinga ukusangwa mwi Tenti lyobe, nelyo ukulaikala pa lupili lobe ulwamushilo?" 
Psalms15:2 Umuntu uwenda uwakaele, uucita ifyalungama, uulanda icishinka ica pa mutima wakwe." 
Psalms15:3 Umuntu uo ululimi lwakwe talubepa bufi, uushicita ububi ku mubiye, nangu ukuleta umusebanya pa mwina mupalamano." 
Psalms15:4 Mu menso yakwe alisuula imbela ya bantu babi, lelo acindika bonse abakwata akatiina kuli Yawe, afikilisha conse ico alaya nangu cimushile ubwafya." 
Psalms15:5 Ena, abamukongola tabapinda nelyo kubalundishapo, kabili tapoka mafisakanwa pakufyenga abakaele. Umuntu uufikilisha ifi fyonse, takatenkanishiwe." 
Psalms16:1 Unsungilile we Lesa wandi, pantu ni muli iwe mfisama." 
Psalms16:2 Ndalanda kuli Yawe nati, “Niwefye Imfumu yandi, nshamonako umbi uwingampaala ukucila pali iwe.”" 
Psalms16:3 Yangu ifyo bacindama abamushilo abali mu calo, balanenga ukucankwa." 
Psalms16:4 Lelo ishamo likafulilako kuli abo abakonkelela imilungu imbi, ine tekuti ntulekele umulopa we lambo, nshakatale numbula no tumashina twatuko mu kanwa kandi." 
Psalms16:5 We Yawe niwe cuma candi, kabili ulukombo lwandi, kabili niwe we usunga umutende wandi." 
Psalms16:6 Umupaka wandi ushinta mu fifulo fyansansa, ne cuma napeelwa cintu cacindama nganshi." 
Psalms16:7 Nakulapaala Yawe na matotelo pakumpanda amano, na pa nshita ya bushiku alanenga ukwiluka." 
Psalms16:8 Inshita shonse ntangisha Yawe pa ntanshi yandi, pantu lyonse aba mu pepi no kuboko kwandi ukwa ku kulyo, takuli icingantelentensha." 
Psalms16:9 Eico umutima wandi uli ne nsansa, no lulimi luleyanga, no mubili wandi wikele mu mutelelwe." 
Psalms16:10 Pantu we Yawe tawakaleke umweo wandi ukushala mu calo ca bafwa, Tawakaleke nokuti Uwamushilo obe akabole." 
Psalms16:11 Walinangilila inshila iyitwala ku mweo, no kuba ne nsansa ishishaifulila pa cinso cobe, no kusansamuka ukwa pe na pe ku kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo." 
Psalms17:1 Shi wingomfwa ku kupapata kwandi ukwalungama we Yawe, ukutike kwipepo lyandi ilyabula ubucenjeshi!" 
Psalms17:2 Niwe ushininkisha umulandu wandi no kuncitila umulinganya, pantu amenso yobe yamona ifyacishinka." 
Psalms17:3 Nelyo wingalengula umutima wandi no kumpempula mu nshita ya bushiku, nangufye winganjesha lelo tawasangemo nangu cimo. Nalilaya ukuti akanwa kandi kelalanda ifibi." 
Psalms17:4 Umwabela ificita abantu bambi, ndaitalusha ku misango ya bantu abalukakala, ukulingana na amashiwi yobe." 
Psalms17:5 Ine nalikonka mu nshila yobe, na makasa yandi tayashelela." 
Psalms17:6 Ndakuuta kuli we Lesa wandi, pantu ulaŋumfwa no kwasuka, ukutike no kumfwa kwipepo lyandi." 
Psalms17:7 Langa ukutemwa kobe ukwapesha amano, we upususha ku maka ya kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo, wapususha abo abafisama muli iwe ukufuma ku balwani babo." 
Psalms17:8 Unsunge nge mboni ya linso lyobe, umfise mu cinshingwa ca mapindo yobe." 
Psalms17:9 Unsunge ukufuma ku babifi abanjimina, pamo na balwani bandi abanshinguluka." 
Psalms17:10 Aba bantu imitima yabo ilafilwa ukukwata uluse ne milomo yabo ilanda mataki mataki. 
Psalms17:11 Nabanjimina no kunshinguluka, ninshi nabatulumuna na menso, kukufwaya ukumfutula panshi." 
Psalms17:12 Bali nge nkalamo iyileiteyanya pakwikata icintu, kwati musepela wa nkalamo uubelamine cimo." 
Psalms17:13 Ala bemine we Yawe, ubalwishe no kubafulumuna. Ubomfye ulupanga lobe kukumpokolola ku babifi." 
Psalms17:14 We Yawe ku maka ya kuboko kobe mpususha kuli aba bantu, abantu aba mu calo abasakamanafye ifya pano isonde. Uleke bekute ku fintu ifyo wababikila, uleke na bana babo nabo bafikwateko ifingi ukucilapo, elyo nabo bakashileko na bana babo." 
Psalms17:15 Lelo ine mu bololoke nkamona icinso cobe, ne lintu nkashibuka nkasekelela pakumona icata cobe." 
Psalms18:1 Nalikutemwa we Yawe we maka yandi. 
Psalms18:2 Yawe e cilibwe candi, e ilinga lyandi kabili e kapokolola wandi, Lesa wandi e cilibwe candi, muli ena emo mfisama, e nkwela yandi, e lusengo lwe pusukilo lyandi, kabili e shintililo lyandi." 
Psalms18:3 Ndekuuta kuli Yawe uwalinga ukulumbanya, lyena napusuka na ku balwani bandi." 
Psalms18:4 Imyando ya mfwa yalinshingulwike, amatamba yabonaushi yalintiinishe." 
Psalms18:5 Imyando ya ku calo ca bafwa yalimpombele, ifiteyo fya mfwa fyali pa ntanshi yandi." 
Psalms18:6 Mu kupelelwa kwandi nakuutile kuli Yawe, kuli Lesa wandi nalilile ukuti antuuleko. Elyo aumfwa ishiwi lyandi ukufuma mwi Tempele lyakwe akutika na kufyo nalelila." 
Psalms18:7 Pano isonde palisunkene no kutenta, ne mifula ya mpili shonse yasunkana. Kwaba ne cinkukuma pa mulandu wakuti alifulilwe." 
Psalms18:8 Mu myona yakwe mwafumine icushi, umulilo uoca wafuma mu kanwa kakwe, na kuli ena kwafuma umusolilo." 
Psalms18:9 Elyo aikile ukufuma ku mulu aisa pano panshi, imfifi ikulu nganshi yali panshi ya makasa yakwe." 
Psalms18:10 Aninine pali kerubi no kupupuka, alelemba pa mulu ninshi ali pa mapindo ya mwela." 
Psalms18:11 Alengele imfifi ukuba icifimbo cakwe, na makumbi ayafitulukila nayamushinguluka." 
Psalms18:12 Mu lubuuto ulwali pa ntanshi yakwe mwafutumuka amakumbi, kwaloka imfula yacitalawe ne misolilo." 
Psalms18:13 Yawe abulukuta ukufuma ku mulu, ne shiwi lya Wapulamo lyaumfwika." 
Psalms18:14 Aposele imifwi yakwe no kusalanganya abalwani bakwe, aponya no kubyata kwa nkuba, abafulumuna." 
Psalms18:15 Elyo panshi ya bemba palamoneka, ne mifula ye sonde yashala pa mbilibili, lintu walanda mu bukali bobe, we Yawe, na maka ya kupema kobe yaumfwika." 
Psalms18:16 Elyo atambalike ukuboko kwakwe ukufuma mu mulu, anjikata no kunsenda. Angabwile ukufuma mu menshi ayengi." 
Psalms18:17 Ampokolwele ku balwani bandi abamaka, ku bampata kabili abancila amaka nganshi." 
Psalms18:18 Banjimine mu bushiku bwa cinkunka candi, lelo Yawe ali e shintililo lyandi." 
Psalms18:19 Amfumishemo no kumbika apapabuka, andubula no kundubula pa mulandu wakuti alintemwa ine." 
Psalms18:20 Yawe ancitile ukulingana no bololoke bwandi. Ukulingana na bukaele bwa maboko yandi, Yawe nanambula." 
Psalms18:21 Pantu ine ndacita ififwaya Yawe, nshabala nsangukilapo Lesa wandi." 
Psalms18:22 Nshafumako ku mafunde yakwe yonse ayaba ku ntanshi yandi, nshalufyapo nangu cimo ica mu fipope fyakwe." 
Psalms18:23 Ndi uwabula akalema ku cinso cakwa Yawe, naliitalusha ne mwine ku bubifi." 
Psalms18:24 Eico, Yawe alinambula pa mulandu wa bololoke bwandi, kabili alinambula ukulingana nefyo naikala uwakaele pa cinso cakwe." 
Psalms18:25 Ku bacishinka, we mfumu ulailanga uwacishinka, na ku bakaele ulailanga uwakaele." 
Psalms18:26 Kuli abo abapwililika, ulailanga ukuba uwapwililika, lelo ku ba misango ibi, ulailanga uwacenjela." 
Psalms18:27 Ulapususha abantu abaicefya, lelo ulanasha abacilumba." 
Psalms18:28 We Yawe niwe usanika icengelo candi, Lesa wandi uupilibula imfifi ukuba ulubuuto." 
Psalms18:29 Ku maka yobe kuti nasansa impuka ya mulalo, kabili nga cakuti ndi na Lesa, kuti nawisha ilinga." 
Psalms18:30 Lelo Lesa ena, inshila yakwe yalilungama, ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe lyacishinka, Ena ni nkwela kuli bonse abafisama muli ena." 
Psalms18:31 Nga Lesa umbi ni nani ukucila pali Yawe, nge Cilibwe ni ani ukucila pali Lesa wesu?" 
Psalms18:32 Ni Lesa eumpangasha amaka, no kulungamika inshila yandi." 
Psalms18:33 Eulenga makasa yandi ukuba nga makasa ya nsebula, eungafwa ukwiminina apasansama pa mpili." 
Psalms18:34 Eusambilisha iminwe yandi kukulwa inkondo, no kukosha amaboko yandi pakukana ubuta bwa mukuba." 
Psalms18:35 Walimpeela inkwela ye pusukilo lyobe, ukuboko kwenu ukwa kulyo ekuntungilila, nakwata ubucindami pa mulandu wakungafwa." 
Psalms18:36 Walikusha inshila umwakupita intampulo shandi, na makasa yandi tayashetuka." 
Psalms18:37 Nasupile abalwani bandi mpaka nabasanga, nshabweleleko mpaka nasha nabonaula." 
Psalms18:38 Nabakomaula mpaka bafilwa ukwima, bonse bashala nabalala panshi ya makasa yandi." 
Psalms18:39 Pantu walimpangeshe amaka yakulwilako, walenga na balwani bandi ukukontama pa nkasa shandi." 
Psalms18:40 Niwe walengele abalwani bandi bamfutatile inuma shabo pakufulumuka, kabili abampata bena nabonaula." 
Psalms18:41 Ilintu abalwani bandi balilile ubwafwilisho, takwali nangu umo uwakubapususha, nelyo balilile kuli Yawe, tayaswike." 
Psalms18:42 Nalebonaula ngo lukungu lwa mu mwela, no kubanyantaula nge loba lya mu misebo." 
Psalms18:43 Walimpususha ku mitundu ya bantu imbi, walinenga ukuba kateeka wa mishobo, na bantu abo nshaishibe balantumika." 
Psalms18:44 Na benafyalo balanakila pakumfwa ishiwi lyandi, aba kutali bayamba no kubutukila kuli ine." 
Psalms18:45 Bena bonse baba abatompoka imitima, besa baletutuma ukufuma mu malinga yabo." 
Psalms18:46 Nakalebalika kuli Yawe! Napaalwe na matotelo icilibwe candi, kabili asumbulwe Lesa Ipusukilo lyandi!" 
Psalms18:47 E Lesa uunandwilako, no kuncimfishako imishobo ya bantu bambi." 
Psalms18:48 Eumpususha ku balwani bandi, no kunsumbula ukucila pa balufyengo, no kumpokolola ku bantu babuluku." 
Psalms18:49 Eico, nkakulumbanya pakati ka mishobo we Yawe, nkalakwimbila ishamalumbo ishe shina lyobe." 
Psalms18:50 Niwe ulenga imfumu yobe ukucimfya, ulalanga uluse ulushipwa ku wasubwa obe, kuli Davidi pamo na ku bufyashi bwakwe pe na pe." 
Psalms19:1 Imyulu ilanga ubucindami bwakwa Yawe, ukwandalala kwa lwelele kulanga imilimo yakwe." 
Psalms19:2 Cila kasuba kalikwata ifyo kalanda, na cila bushiku busokolola amano." 
Psalms19:3 Tafilanda, nangu ukusosa, ne shiwi lya ifi fintu talyumfwika iyoo." 
Psalms19:4 Lelo iciunda cafiko cilasalangana pano calo ponse, ne mbila yafiko ilafika ukwapelela isonde. Ni mu mulu emo abikila akasuba icakwikalamo." 
Psalms19:5 Emo kafuma kwati ni shibwinga uulefuma mumwakwe, kwati ni mpalume iyilepekanya ukubutuka ulubilo." 
Psalms19:6 Katula ku mpela ya mulu, no kuya ku mpela ibiye, takwaba icishumfwa icikabilila cakako." 
Psalms19:7 Amafunde yakwa Yawe yantu yapwililika, kabili yalatalalika umutima wa muntu. Ifisambilisho fyakwa Yawe fyakucetekela, kabili filapeela amano ku bantu abashayakwata." 
Psalms19:8 Amalango yakwa Yawe yantu yalungama, yalapeela insansa ku mutima. Ifyo Yawe akonkomesha filasanikila, filalenga amenso ukumona." 
Psalms19:9 Ukukwatila Yawe akatiina kwaliwama, kabili kulabelelela. Ifya bupingushi fyakwa Yawe fyacishinka, fyonse apo fyapela fyalilungama." 
Psalms19:10 Fyaliwama ukucila golide uwalopololwa bwino, ukucilafye na pali golide wine wine. Fyalilowa ukucila na pa kulowa kwa buci, ukucila no luto ulutona ku cipepe ca buci." 
Psalms19:11 Efinsoka ine ne mubomfi wakwa Yawe, na mukuyakonka mwaliba ipaalo." 
Psalms19:12 Bushe nani engeluka umo ifibi fyakwe fyalola? Njelelako pa fyabubifi fyandi fyonse ifyo nshingeshiba. 
Psalms19:13 Yawe ulengafwako ne mubomfi obe, pakuti nilalufyanya ku mufulo. Wileka ububifi bunteeke ubusha pakuti ndeba uwakaele, uwabula ifyabubifi ifikalamba." 
Psalms19:14 Leka amashiwi yandi na matontonkanyo yandi yasekelelwe pa cinso cobe, we Yawe, we Cilibwe candi kabili Kalubula wandi." 
Psalms20:1 Yawe alekwasuka ilintu wafika mu nshita sha mafya, ishina lyakwa Lesa wakwa Yakobo lilekucingilila." 
Psalms20:2 Engakutumina ubwafwilisho ukufuma ku cifulo camushilo, no kukukoselesha ukufuma mu Sioni." 
Psalms20:3 Engebukisha yonse amalambo yobe, pamo no kupokelela imituulo yobe iya cakoca." 
Psalms20:4 Engakupeela icakukabila ca pa mutima obe, no kufikilisha amapange yobe yonse." 
Psalms20:5 Tukapunda ubuseko ilintu ukacimfya, no kwimya uluunga lwesu mwishina lyakwa Lesa wesu. Yawe engakupeela ifyo ulomba fyonse." 
Psalms20:6 Nomba naishiba ukuti Yawe alapususha uwasubwa wakwe, alamwasuka ninshi ali mu mulu umwashila mwakwe, ukupitila mu maka ya kuboko kwakwe ukwa ku kulyo." 
Psalms20:7 Abantu bamo bacetekela mu maceleta, na bambi muli bakabalwe, lelo ifwe twacetekelafye mwishina lyakwa Yawe, Lesa wesu." 
Psalms20:8 Bakatalansuka no kuwa panshi, lelo ifwe tukeminina kabili abashipa." 
Psalms20:9 We Yawe upusushe imfumu, kabili uletwasuka ilyo twakuuta!" 
Psalms21:1 We Yawe, ni mu maka yobe imfumu isansamukila na mu kwafwilisha kobe ikalila iyasansamuka." 
Psalms21:2 Waliipeela ico umutima waiko wafwaile, kabili tawamutana conse ico alomba na kanwa kakwe." 
Psalms21:3 Walimupokelela na mapaalo ayakalamba nganshi, no kumufwika icisote cabufumu ica golide uwalopololwa." 
Psalms21:4 Akulomba ubumi na iwe wamupeela, ubumi bwa nshiku ishatantalila pe na pe." 
Psalms21:5 Pa mulandu wa kucimfya uko wapeele alicindama, alipulama no kuba umukankala nganshi." 
Psalms21:6 Cine cine walimupeela amapaalo ayamuyayaya, no kumulenga ukusangalala ico waba nankwe." 
Psalms21:7 Pantu imfumu yatetekela muli Yawe, na pa mulandu wa citemwiko icishipwa ica Wapulamo taitelentenshiwa." 
Psalms21:8 Ukuboko kobe kukasanga abalwani bobe bonse, kabili ukuboko kobe ukwa kulyo kukekata bonse abakupata." 
Psalms21:9 Ilyo ukamoneka, ukabacita nge cininkwa ca mulilo. Yawe akabalofya ku cipyu cakwe, no mulilo wakwe ukabalofya." 
Psalms21:10 Ukalofya ubufyashi bwabo pano isonde, ukapwishishisha no luko lwa bana babo mu bantu." 
Psalms21:11 Nelyo baelenganya ifibi pali iwe, nangu bakwata amapange ayabi, lelo bakafilwa." 
Psalms21:12 Pantu ukabafulumuna, no kubalasa imifwi pa menso." 
Psalms21:13 Ube uwasumbulwa we Yawe mu maka yobe, twakulakwimbila inyimbo shakulumba ubulamba bobe." 
Psalms22:1 We Lesa wandi, we Lesa wandi, bushe cinshi wandekelesesha? Cinshi watalukila kukungafwa, nangu kufyo ndelilishika?" 
Psalms22:2 We Lesa wandi nakuuta mu nshita yonse iya kasuba ukwabula ukunjasuka, na mu nshita ya bushiku, ndefilwa ukusanga utulo." 
Psalms22:3 Lelo iwe uli Wamushilo, uwacindamikwa ku malumbo ya bena Israeli." 
Psalms22:4 Ifikolwe fyesu fyatetekele muli iwe, fyalikutetekele kabili walefipususha." 
Psalms22:5 Niwe fyalelililako na iwe wafipususha, na lintu fyalekutetekela tafyalelengwa insoni." 
Psalms22:6 Nomba ine ndi mwambo nshili muntu, nalisuulwa kabili ndashobaulwa na bantu bonse." 
Psalms22:7 Bonse abalemona balanseka, balansenteka no kukunta imitwe yabo." 
Psalms22:8 Balantumfya abati, “Asubila muli Yawe, lekeni eo amupokololeko pantu alimutemwa.”" 
Psalms22:9 Lelo niwe wamfumishe mwifumo muli mayo, no kunenga ukukutetekela na pa nshita naleonka kwibele lyakwa mayo." 
Psalms22:10 Ukufuma ku kufyalwa kwandi niwefye nashintamo umutima, ukutula ku kufyalwa kwandi niwefye Lesa wandi." 
Psalms22:11 Wintaluka ico ubwafya buli mupepi, elyo takuli uwakungafwa umbi." 
Psalms22:12 Abalwani bandi nabanshinguluka, kwati ni bacilume wa ŋombe aba ku Bashani." 
Psalms22:13 Nabasamuna no tunwa nge nkalamo, ishilebuluma kukusantaula." 
Psalms22:14 Ndepongololwa nga menshi, amafupa yandi yalefyutuka mu mfyufyu, no mutima uli nge pula ililesunguluka mu nda yandi." 
Psalms22:15 Akanwa kandi kauma nge ciinga, no lulimi lwandi nalukakatila ku ncendwa, kabili bandalike mu lukungu pamo ngo muntu uufwile." 
Psalms22:16 Imbwa nashinshinguluka, ibumba lya fipondo fya bantu nalishinguluka, nafilasaula iminwe yandi na makasa yandi." 
Psalms22:17 Kuti napenda amafupa yandi yonse ayashele pa mbilibili, abalwani balendolekesha no kulaceceta." 
Psalms22:18 Bayakana insalu shandi, pa mwingila wandi pena bapendwilapo." 
Psalms22:19 Nomba we Yawe wintaluka, we Mpalume yandi ungafweko." 
Psalms22:20 Mpokolola ku balefwaya ukunjipaya, pususha umweo wandi ku maka ya mbwa." 
Psalms22:21 Mpokololako ukufuma ku kanwa ka nkalamo, no kumpususha ukufuma ku nsengo sha mboo! Waŋumfwa no kunjasuka," 
Psalms22:22 eico na ine nakulashimikila bamunyinane peshina lyobe, kabili nakulakulumbanya mu lukuta." 
Psalms22:23 Nakulatila, akulumbanyeni Yawe mwe bamutiina, mulemucindika mwe lupwa lonse ulwakwa Yakobo muleba na katiina mwe ba mu lupwa lwa bena Israeli bonse." 
Psalms22:24 Pantu talekelesha umulanda uulecula, nangufye ukumusuulako iyoo. Tafisa icinso cakwe kuli ena, lelo alomfwa ku nkuuta yakulomba ubwafwilisho." 
Psalms22:25 Ni kuli iwe ekufuma ukulumbanya kwandi ukwa mu lukuta lukalamba, na pa cinso ca bantu bonse abakutiina epo nkafikilisha ifilayo fyandi." 
Psalms22:26 Abalanda bakalya bakekuta, abafwaya Yawe bakulamulumbanya, muleke imitima yenu ikalilile pe na pe." 
Psalms22:27 Abantu bonse aba pano isonde bakebukisha no kwalukila kuli Yawe, ne mishobo ya bantu yonse ikamupepa." 
Psalms22:28 Pantu Yawe e mwine wabufumu, kabili euteeka imishobo ya benafyalo." 
Psalms22:29 Aba fyuma fya pano isonde bakailemena no kumupepa, na babwelela kwiloba bali nokumufukamina, pamo pene nabafilwa ukuikalila abomi." 
Psalms22:30 Abantu ba nko sha kuntanshi bakalamubombela, na ba mu nkulo shakuntanshi shonse bakabashimikila ubunte bwa pa Mfumu." 
Psalms22:31 Bakalashimika pa mulandu wa bulungami bwakwe, kuli bonse abo abashilati bafyalwe, pantu ifi fyonse efyo Imfumu yacita." 
Psalms23:1 Yawe e kacema wandi, ine nshikabila kantu nelyo kamo." 
Psalms23:2 Mu nika ya mulemfwe emo anenga ukutuusha, kabili antungulula ku menshi ayatalala tondolo," 
Psalms23:3 Alambwesesha umweo, alantungulula mu nshila iyalungama, pa mulandu we shina lyakwe." 
Psalms23:4 Nangu ningapita mu mukonko wa mfwa umwafiita fititi, tekuti ntiine pantu uba na ine. Inkonto yobe no mutambu obe filanteeka umutima." 
Psalms23:5 Ulantebeta pa cinso ca balwani bandi, ulansuba na mafuta ku mutwe, ne cikombe candi caisula pa." 
Psalms23:6 Cine cine ubusuma bweka no luse fyakulankonka mu nshiku shonse isha bumi bwandi, na mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe emo nkekalilila pe na pe." 
Psalms24:1 Isonde lyonse na fyonse ifya bamo fyakwa Yawe, e mwine we sonde lyonse na bantu abaikalapo." 
Psalms24:2 Pantu ewalishimpa pa mulu wa pali babemba, ewacita ne mifula yaciko mu menshi ya muli babemba." 
Psalms24:3 Nani uwalinga ukunina ulupili lwakwa Yawe? Bushe nani uwingeminina mu ncende yakwe iyamushilo? 
Psalms24:4 Ala kanofye muntu uwa minwe iyabula umulandu no mutima uwakaele, uushatemwa ukubepa ubufi, kabili uushilapa ubufi." 
Psalms24:5 Ena eukapaalwa no kusekelelwa kuli Yawe, eo Lesa umupusushi wakwe akashininkisha." 
Psalms24:6 Abantu ba uyu musango ebafwaya Yawe, ebafwaya ukuba pa cinso cakwa Lesa wakwa Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Isukeni mwe mpongolo isukisheni, isukeni mwe fipata fyakale, muleke Imfumu yalulumbi ingile." 
Psalms24:8 Ngeyo Mfumu iyalulumbi nani? Ala ni Yawe uwamaka kabili uwabulamba, Yawe uucimfya inkondo." 
Psalms24:9 Isukisheni mwe mpongolo, isukeni mwe fipata fyakale, muleke Imfumu iyalulumbi ingile." 
Psalms24:10 Ngeyo Mfumu iyalulumbi nani? Ni Yawe umwine wa fita, e Mfumu iyalulumbi." 
Psalms25:1 We mfumu Yawe ni kuli iwe nalosha umutima. 
Psalms25:2 Niwe nacetekela we Lesa wandi. Wileka nengwe insoni, nelyo ukuleka abalwani bandi ukuncimfya." 
Psalms25:3 Cinefye bonse abasubila muli iwe tauleka balengwe nsoni, lelo uleka abakutalamina ebo balengwe nsoni." 
Psalms25:4 We Yawe ulemfunda inshila shobe, unange ifyo ufwaya." 
Psalms25:5 Ulentungulula no kunsambilisha icishinka cobe, pantu niwe Lesa Umupusushi wandi, kabili niwe subilo lyandi akasuba konse." 
Psalms25:6 Ibukisha we Yawe ubwingi bwa luse lobe ne cikuku cobe, pantu ifi fyabako ukufuma ku kale." 
Psalms25:7 Wilaibukisha ifyabubifi fyandi ifya mu bulumendo, pamo na bucintomfwa bwandi, lelo unjibukishe umwabela ukutemwa kobe ukushipwa, pantu uli musuma, we Yawe." 
Psalms25:8 Yawe musuma kabili alilungama, eico afundisha na babifi inshila iyisuma iyakwendamo." 
Psalms25:9 Alatungulula abaicefya mu fyalungama no kubafundisha ifyo afwaya. 
Psalms25:10 Inshila shonse ishakwa Yawe shaluse ne cishinka ku basunga icipangano ne fipope fyakwe. 
Psalms25:11 Pa mulandu we shina lyobe we Yawe, njelela ku fya bubifi bwandi nelyo fyabipisha muno." 
Psalms25:12 Bushe nani umuntu uutiina Yawe? Ena akalangwa inshila iyo afwile ukwendamo. 
Psalms25:13 Akalaikala uwashuka, na bana bakwe bakapyana icalo." 
Psalms25:14 Yawe alasokolola inkaama ku bantu abamutiina. Alasokolola icipangano cakwe kuli bena. 
Psalms25:15 Amenso yandi lyonse ntonta kuli Yawe, pantu ewingampokolola ku balwani." 
Psalms25:16 Pilibukila kuli ine no kunangulukilako, pantu naikala inkumbabulili kabili ndi mulanda." 
Psalms25:17 Amacushi ya ku mutima wandi nayafulisha, mpokololako ukufuma ku fyakushikitika fyandi." 
Psalms25:18 Mona ubulanda bwandi na fintu ndecululuka, mbelelako uluse pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyandi fyonse." 
Psalms25:19 Mona abalwani bandi fintu bafulisha, kabili bampata ukucilamo." 
Psalms25:20 Cingilila umweo wandi no kumpokolola, wileka nengwe nsoni, pantu mfisama muli iwe." 
Psalms25:21 Leka bukaele pamo no bulungami fincingilile, ico isubilo lyandi lyaba muli iwe." 
Psalms25:22 Pususha Israeli, we Yawe, ukufuma ku macushi yakwe yonse." 
Psalms26:1 Ushininkishe umulandu wandi we Yawe, pantu naikala umweo wakaele, natetekela muli Yawe ukwabula ukutelententa." 
Psalms26:2 Unengule no kunjesha we Yawe, ufwailishe mu mutima pamo na mu matontonkanyo yandi." 
Psalms26:3 Icitemwiko icishipwa caba pali ine lyonse, na ine naba uwacishinka kuli iwe." 
Psalms26:4 Nshikala pamo na bantu incenjeshi, kabili nshicita mapange pamo na babumbi munda." 
Psalms26:5 Nshumfwana na babifi, nelyo kwikala pamo na bancitatubi." 
Psalms26:6 Ndesamba iminwe yandi ne wakaele. Ndeshinguluka ubulambo bobe we Yawe," 
Psalms26:7 no kulapunda pakwimba ulwimbo lwakutotela, pakulondolola ificitwa fyobe ifyakupapa." 
Psalms26:8 Nalitemwa iŋanda yobe iyakwikalamo we Yawe, incende umwaba ubucindami bobe." 
Psalms26:9 Wilofya umweo wandi pamo na babifi, wilofya ubumi bwandi pamo na bantu abatemwa ukusumya umulopa," 
Psalms26:10 abo mu minwe yabo mwaba imilimo iyibi, abo no kwa kulyo kwabo kwaisulamo amafisakanwa." 
Psalms26:11 Lelo ine njikala umweo wakaele, undubuleko no kumbela inkumbu." 
Psalms26:12 Amakasa yandi yeminina umwatambalala, nakulakupaala we Yawe na matotelo mu lukuta lukalamba." 
Psalms27:1 Yawe e lubuuto lwandi, kabili Ipusukilo lyandi, bushe nani ningatiina? Yawe ekwakushina umweo wandi, nani ningakwatilako umwenso?" 
Psalms27:2 Ilintu ababifi banjimina pakuti bonaule umubili wandi, ilyo abalwani ne fipondo bonse banjiminina, bakatalansuka no kuwa." 
Psalms27:3 Nelyo ifita finganjimina ne fyanso, umutima wandi tekuti utiine. Nangu inkondo ingema, nakulabafye uwatetekela." 
Psalms27:4 Icintu cimofye ico nalomba kuli Yawe, kabili ico nakulatwalilila ukulomba cakutila, ndeikalilila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, inshiku shonse isha mweo wandi. Ndefwaya ukulalolesha ubusuma bwakwe, no kupandwa mano ya mwi Tempele." 
Psalms27:5 Pantu mu nshita yakucula eukansunga mu ŋanda yakwe, akamfisa mu cintelelwe ce Tenti lyakwe, no kunsansabalika pa libwe ilyacindama." 
Psalms27:6 Nomba umutwe wandi wasumbuka, ukucila pa balwani bandi abanshinguluka. Nakulaimba ne nsansa pakutuula ilambo mwi Tenti lyakwe, nakulaimba inyimbo ishakulumbanya Yawe." 
Psalms27:7 Umfwa inkuuta ye shiwi lyandi we Yawe, unangulukileko no kunjasuka." 
Psalms27:8 Umutima wandi watila, “Fwaya icinso cakwe.” Icinso cobe we Yawe eco ndefwaya." 
Psalms27:9 Wifisa icinso cobe kuli ine, winkaana ne mubomfi obe ilyo ucili no bukali, we wangafwa pe. Wintamfya nangu ukunsuula, we Lesa, Umupusushi wandi." 
Psalms27:10 Nangu tata na mayo bengandekelesha, we Yawe tekuti undekeleshe." 
Psalms27:11 Umfunde inshila shobe we Yawe, untungulule mu nshila ishalungama pa mulandu wa balwani bandi." 
Psalms27:12 Wilamposa ku balwani bandi kukunjimina, ico baba no bufi pamo no kumpangila." 
Psalms27:13 Icintu cimo nasumina cakuti nkamona ubusuma bwakwa Yawe mu calo ca bamweo. 
Psalms27:14 Lolela pali Yawe, shipa kabili tekanya. Ee ulelolelafye pali Yawe." 
Psalms28:1 Kuli iwe, eko nalilila we Yawe, wikaana ukunjasuka, we Cilibwe candi. Pantu nga cakuti taunjaswike, ndeba pamo ngabo abaleya ku nindi." 
Psalms28:2 Umfwe ishiwi lyandi ilyakupapata, ilyo nakuuta ukuti untuuleko, ilyo nasumbwila amaboko mu mulu, ukuyalosha ku muputule obe uwamushilo icine cine." 
Psalms28:3 Winsendela mu cipyu pamo na babifi, mwibumba limo na bacita ifyabipa, abalanda pa mutende ku banabo, kanshi mu mitima yabo muli ubulwani." 
Psalms28:4 Landula pali bena pa mulandu wa ficitwa fyabo, pa micitile yabo iyabubifi, balimune pafyo iminwe yabo yacita, ubalipile pafyo babomba." 
Psalms28:5 Pa mulandu wakuti tabacindika Yawe pa milimo intu acita, nefyo iminwe yakwe yabomba, akabapasa no kubalofya umupwilapo." 
Psalms28:6 Yawe napaalwe na matotelo, ico naumfwa ukupapata kwandi." 
Psalms28:7 Yawe e maka yandi kabili inkwela yandi, umutima wandi wacetekela muli ena no kupokelela ubwafwilisho. Umutima wandi ulatasha, kabili nakulamutotela mu lwimbo." 
Psalms28:8 Yawe e maka ya bantu bakwe, ecakushinamo ice pusukilo ku wasubwa wakwe." 
Psalms28:9 Pususha abantu bobe no kupaala ubupyani bobe, ube kacema wabo no kulabatungulula pe na pe." 
Psalms29:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe mwe fita fyakwe ifya ku mulu, mulelondolola ubulumbwa bwa bucindami na maka yakwa Yawe." 
Psalms29:2 Mulelondolola ubulumbwa bwa bucindami ubwalinga ishina lyakwa Yawe, pepeni Yawe mu busuma bwakwe ubwamushilo." 
Psalms29:3 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyumfwika pali bemba, Lesa wa bucindami nabulukuta, Yawe nabulukuta pali bemba umukalamba." 
Psalms29:4 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyamaka, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe emwaisula ubucindami." 
Psalms29:5 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lilafunaula ifimuti fya keda, Yawe eusantaula ifimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda ku Lebanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Alenga impili sha ku Lebanoni ukutolauka nge fiponti fya ŋombe, no lupili lwa Sirioni nga kana ka mboo." 
Psalms29:7 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe elilenga umwela wa nkuba ukubyata. 
Psalms29:8 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe elisunkanya amatololo, Yawe asunkanya amatololo ya Kadeshi." 
Psalms29:9 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe elilepaula ifimuti ifyakosa ifya oki, no kusha impanga ukwabula imiti, elilenga abantu mwi Tempele lyakwe ukulapundisha abati, “Ululumbi!”" 
Psalms29:10 Yawe ali pa cipuna pa nshita ya lyeshi, alikala pa cipuna cabufumu pe na pe." 
Psalms29:11 Yawe apeele amaka ku bantu bakwe, no kupeela abantu bakwe ipaalo ilyamutende." 
Psalms30:1 Nakutasha we Yawe pantu naumpususha, taulekele abalwani bandi ukuitutubula pali ine." 
Psalms30:2 Ni kuli iwe nalepapata pakuti ungafwe we Yawe, we Lesa wandi, mpaka waisa wamposha." 
Psalms30:3 We Yawe wabwesha umweo wandi ukufuma ku calo ca bafwa, wapususha umweo wandi ukufuma mu bakuya mu nindi." 
Psalms30:4 Akwimbileni Yawe inyimbo shakutasha, mwe bamushilo bakwe, no kulatotela ishina lyakwe ilyamushilo." 
Psalms30:5 Pantu ubukali bwakwe tabuya patali, lelo uluse lwakwe lwamuyayaya. Mu nshita ya bushiku kuti walila ifilamba lelo insansa shisa ulucelo." 
Psalms30:6 Lelo ine, ilintu naikele umutende natile, “Nshakatelentenshiwe iyoo.”" 
Psalms30:7 Nomba we Yawe ilintu wansungile bwino, walengele fyonse ukungwamina, lelo ilintu wamfutatile, nalilengelwe ukusakamana." 
Psalms30:8 Na ine efyo nakubilikishe we Yawe, no kulomba uluse lobe." 
Psalms30:9 Bushe busuma nshi bwingaba mu kufwa kwandi, nga naingila mu nindi? Bushe kuti iloba lyakulumbanya, nangu ukulumbula ifya bucishinka bobe?" 
Psalms30:10 Umfwa no kumbelelako uluse we Yawe, we Yawe ube kafwa wandi." 
Psalms30:11 Ukuloosha kwandi naukwalula insansa, naumfula insalu shabulanda, wamfwika insalu shakucindilamo," 
Psalms30:12 pakuti umutima wandi utwalilile ukukulumbanya ukwabula ukwikala tondolo, we Yawe, we Lesa wandi, niwefye nakulatotela pe na pe." 
Psalms31:1 Muli iwe we Yawe emo nafisama, wileka nengwe nsoni, umpokololeko mu bulungami bobe." 
Psalms31:2 Teya amatwi yobe kuli ine, wendeshe ukumpusushako! Ube kuli ine icilibwe cakuubamo, uncingilile pakuti mpusuke." 
Psalms31:3 Apo uli cilibwe candi kabili ilinga lyandi, pa mulandu we shina lyobe, untungulule no kuntangilila." 
Psalms31:4 Umfumye mu citeyo cintu banteya, ico ni muli iwe nafisamamo." 
Psalms31:5 Nalubwila umweo wandi mu minwe yobe, pantu naundubula we Yawe, Lesa uwacishinka." 
Psalms31:6 Ine nalipata abapepa utulubi utwafye, lelo ine natetekela muli Yawe." 
Psalms31:7 Nakulasekela pamo no kusangalala mu kutemwa kobe ukushipwa, pantu walimona ukucucutika kwandi, walishiba no kucushiwa kwa mutima wandi." 
Psalms31:8 Tawamposa ku balwani bandi, lelo wanenga ukuti amakasa yandi yeminine apapabuka." 
Psalms31:9 Wingambelelako uluse we Yawe ico ndi mu macushi, amenso yandi nayanaka ku bulanda, no mweo wandi pamo no mubili wandi nafinaka ku cililishi." 
Psalms31:10 Ubumi naikala bwa macushi, imyaka yandi nayo naincepela pa mulandu wakulila. Amaka nayapwa pa mulandu wa bubifi bwandi, na mafupa nayo nayapomponteka." 
Psalms31:11 Abalwani bandi bonse tepakunsuula, na bena mupalamano bandi tepakunshobola, na banandi bene nabo tepakutiina, baleti nga bamona ndeenda mu musebo, awe babutuka." 
Psalms31:12 Na bantu balitendeka ukundaba, nga fintu balaba uwafwa, naba nge nongo iyatobeka." 
Psalms31:13 Ndomfwa uko abantu batotoshanya ulufyengo palwa ine, konse konse balentiinya, ilyo bapangana palwa ine, ilyo bomfwana pakufwaya ukunjipaya." 
Psalms31:14 Nomba ine nacetekela muli we Yawe, ine ntilafye, “Niwe Lesa wandi.”" 
Psalms31:15 Inshita sha mweo wandi shaba mu minwe yobe, umpusushe ku balwani na ku bantu abancusha." 
Psalms31:16 Undoleshe luse luse ne mubomfi obe, no kumpususha mu luse lobe ulushipwa." 
Psalms31:17 Pa mulandu wakuti nakuuta mutuule kuli iwe, we Yawe wileka nengwe nsoni. Leka ababifi ebo bekatwe nsoni, baye ku calo ca bafwa umutalalila." 
Psalms31:18 Talalika utunwa twabo utwabufi, pantu balapontela abantu abololoke, mu miya pamo ne cilumba cabo." 
Psalms31:19 Bwalikulisha ubusuma bobe buntu wabikila abakutiina, ubo upeela pa cinso ca bantu kuli abo abafisama muli iwe." 
Psalms31:20 Ulabafisa mu cifulo cobe ku bantu ababapangila, ulabafisa mu bwikalo bobe, kukubapokolola ku bantu abakubashinina." 
Psalms31:21 Yawe apaalwe na matotelo, pantu anangile ukutemwa ukwawamisha, ilintu abalwani banshingile." 
Psalms31:22 Pa mulandu wa mwenso nasosele nati, “Nalimo Yawe nandabako,” lelo walyumfwile ukupapata kwandi lintu nakuutile mutuule." 
Psalms31:23 Temweni Yawe bonse mwe bamushilo bakwe, Yawe alaleka bonse abacishinka ukuba no mweo, lelo abacilumba alabakanda ukufikapo." 
Psalms31:24 Koseni no kushipa, bonse mwe bakwata isubilo muli Yawe." 
Psalms32:1 Alishuka umuntu uo Lesa abelela uluse pafyo alufyanya, uo Lesa afumisha ifyabubifi fyakwe." 
Psalms32:2 Alishuka umuntu uo ifyabubifi fyakwe Yawe tafibukisha, kabili mu mutima wakwe tamwaba bufi." 
Psalms32:3 Ilintu nafililwe ukuyebelela ifibi fyandi, umubili wandi walipomponteke, pa mulandu wa kuteta akasuba konse." 
Psalms32:4 Akasuba no bushiku nali uwatitikishiwa na maka ya kuboko kobe. Amaka yandi yalipwile, nga fintu ulupimbili luuma ku cikabilila ca mu lusuba." 
Psalms32:5 Elyo nayebelele bumpulamafunde bwandi kuli iwe, nshafishile ububifi bwandi, natile, “Kanjebelele ifyabupulumushi fyandi kuli Yawe,” na iwe walimbelelako uluse ku fibi fyandi fyonse." 
Psalms32:6 Eico, leka bonse abakupetamina bakupepe ilintu wingasangwa, pantu nelyo ilyeshi lingesa tekuti libasunkanye." 
Psalms32:7 Niwe mfisamamo ico ulancingilila ku mafya, no kuleka inyimbo shakupususha shinshinguluke." 
Psalms32:8 Ndi nokukulondolwela elyo no kukufunda inshila yakwendamo, ndi nokukupandako amano kabili amenso yandi yakulalolesha pali iwe." 
Psalms32:9 Wiba nga kabalwe nangu punda ifishaba na mano, lelo kanofye ukutungululwa ku mikobelo ne nshinga." 
Psalms32:10 Ababifi balaponenwa na macushi ayengi nganshi, lelo abatetekela Yawe bashingulukwa no kutemwa kwakwe ukushifilwa." 
Psalms32:11 Mwe bololoke sangalaleni muli Yawe, musansamuke mwe balungama imitima." 
Psalms33:1 Sangalaleni muli Yawe imwe bonse mwe bololoke, calilinga abololoke ukumulumbanya." 
Psalms33:2 Akulisheni iseese pakutotela Yawe, mulelisha insango iya nsale ikumi pakumwimbila." 
Psalms33:3 Mwimbileni ulwimbo ulupya, akulisheni insango ubusaka, kabili muleaula no tupundu." 
Psalms33:4 Pantu ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyacishinka, fyonse ifyo acita fyalilungama." 
Psalms33:5 Yawe atemwa ubulungami no mulinganya, kabili ukutemwa kwakwe ukushifilwa kwakumana isonde lyonse." 
Psalms33:6 Ni kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe eko apangile imyulu ku mupu wa ku kanwa kakwe eko apangile fyonse ifyabamo. 
Psalms33:7 Ewalongenye amenshi ya muli bemba kwati yali mu musukupala, ewacita na matenga umwakwikala amenshi." 
Psalms33:8 Kwateni akatiina kuli Yawe, mwe bantu ba pano isonde bonse, na bantu bonse abaikalamo baleitutuminafye." 
Psalms33:9 Pantu ni panuma ye shiwi lyakwe elyo fyaishilebako, kabili ni panuma ya kukonkomesha kwakwe elintu fyamoneke." 
Psalms33:10 Yawe eonaula amapange ya bantu, eupasa ifyo abantu bapanga ukucita." 
Psalms33:11 Lelo amapange yakwa Yawe yalabelelela pe na pe, ifyo atontonkanya filafika ku nkulo shonse." 
Psalms33:12 Walishuka umushobo uo Yawe e Lesa wabo, abantu abo aisalile kukuba impyani shakwe." 
Psalms33:13 Ukufuma ku mulu Yawe alolesha pesonde, kukumona umuntu onse." 
Psalms33:14 Ukufuma kwisano lyakwe alolesha pali bonse abekala pa calo. 
Psalms33:15 Eupanga imitima yakwa cila muntu, no kulolekesha fyonse ifyo bacita." 
Psalms33:16 Takwaba imfumu iyipusukila mu bukulu bwa mulalo yakwata, kabili takwaba umushilika uupusukila mu bulamba bwakwe." 
Psalms33:17 Kabalwe tewakucetekelamo pakuti upusuke, amaka yakwe yonse tayengacita nangu cimo." 
Psalms33:18 Lelo amenso yakwa Yawe yaba pa bantu abamukwatila akatiina, abo abakwata isubilo mu kutemwa kwakwe ukushifilwa." 
Psalms33:19 Eubapokolola ukufuma ku mfwa, pamo no kubasunga umutende mu nshita ya cipowe." 
Psalms33:20 Ifwe tulelolela Yawe, ico ni kafwa wesu kabili inkwela yesu." 
Psalms33:21 Muli ena imitima yesu ilasangalala, pantu twatetekela mwishina lyakwe ilyamushilo." 
Psalms33:22 Uleke ukutemwa kobe ukushifilwa kube pali ifwe, we Yawe, ukulingana nefyo twasubila muli iwe." 
Psalms34:1 Ine nakulapaala Yawe na matotelo inshita shonse, nshakaleke ukulamulumbanya." 
Psalms34:2 Umutima wandi wakulalumbanya Yawe, na bacucutika bomfwe, bakwate no kusekelela." 
Psalms34:3 Lumbanyeni Yawe pamo na ine, natusansabike ishina lyakwe bonse pamo." 
Psalms34:4 Nalilombele ubwafwilisho ukufuma kuli Yawe, nao anjasuka. Ampokolola na kuli fyonse ifyalentiinya." 
Psalms34:5 Bonse abamulolesha balaba ne nsansa pa menso yabo, tabalengwe nsoni kabili nakalya." 
Psalms34:6 Umulanda wine uyu alila, na Yawe amumfwa, no kumupususha mu mafya yakwe yonse." 
Psalms34:7 Malaika alekala nashinguluka abantu abakwatila Yawe akatiina, kabili alabapokolola." 
Psalms34:8 Sondeni no kuimwena mwe bene ukuti Yawe musuma, alishuka muntu uufisama muli ena." 
Psalms34:9 Muleba na katiina kuli Yawe mwe bamushilo bakwe, pantu abakwatila Yawe akatiina tababulisha akantu nangu kamo." 
Psalms34:10 Ne nkalamo shilanaka no kubulwa icakulya mu nshiku shimo, lelo abapetamina Yawe tababulwa icisuma nangu cimo." 
Psalms34:11 Ala iseni kuno mwe bana, umfweni kuli ine, mufundeko pa mulandu wakukwatila Yawe akatiina." 
Psalms34:12 Nani pa kati kenu uufwaya umweo, no kukabila ukwikala pesonde inshiku ishingi?" 
Psalms34:13 Asunge ululimi lwakwe ukufuma ku bubifi, ne milomo yakwe kukubepa ubufi." 
Psalms34:14 Taluka ku bubifi no kucita icisuma, cita umutende no kuusupila." 
Psalms34:15 Amenso yakwa Yawe yaba pa bololoke, kabili amatwi yakwe yalakutika ku mapepo yabo." 
Psalms34:16 Lelo alafutatila abacita ububifi, no kubacita kwati tababapo pesonde." 
Psalms34:17 Yawe alomfwa inkuuta ya bololoke, no kubapokolola ku mafya yabo yonse." 
Psalms34:18 Yawe alapalamina abafunshika imitima, kabili alapususha abafunshika imipashi." 
Psalms34:19 Fingi ifyo uwalungama engaculako, lelo muli fyonse Yawe alamupususha." 
Psalms34:20 Alamusungila na mafupa, tekuti pafunike nelyo limo." 
Psalms34:21 Ububifi bulepaisha umuntu umubifi, abalwani ba bololoke bakasekwa." 
Psalms34:22 Yawe alubula imyeo ya babomfi bakwe, tapali umuntu nangu umo uufisama muli Yawe uyo uukasekwa." 
Psalms35:1 We Yawe niwe imina abantu abo abanjimina, ndwishishako abantu abo abalendwisha." 
Psalms35:2 Isa ne nkwela pamo ne fyanso, wise untuuleko." 
Psalms35:3 Unone ifumo no mufwi kukulasa abalensupila, unenge ukumfwa ishiwi lyobe ilileti, “Nine pusukilo lyobe.”" 
Psalms35:4 Leka abafwaya ukulofya umweo wandi balengwe nsoni, na bonse abapanga ubonaushi pali ine ubakunkunike no kubafulunganya." 
Psalms35:5 Babe nge misungu iyileululwa ku mwela, na malaika wakwa Yawe abafulumune." 
Psalms35:6 Leka inshila yabo ibe mu mfifi no kutelela, kube na malaika wakwa Yawe kukubasupila." 
Psalms35:7 Pa mulandu wakuti bateya ne muntu wakaele ifiteyo apabula umulandu, banyimbila no bucinga apabula umulandu,"
