Psalms35:8 leka ubonaushi bubafikile mukupumikisha, ne sumbu banteele libalukile, uleke ebo baponenemo pakuti ebo bonaike." 
Psalms35:9 Elyo umweo wandi ukasangalala muli Yawe, no kubekelwa mwipusukilo lyakwe." 
Psalms35:10 Ubunte bwandi bonse bwakulapunda ati, “Nani umbi uwaba nga iwe, we Yawe, ulapokolola ababusu ukufuma ku babacila amaka, na bapina na balanda ulabapokololako ku babebila.”" 
Psalms35:11 Inte ishalufyengo nashinjimina, shilanjipusha pa mulandu wa fintu ifyo nshaishiba." 
Psalms35:12 Balambwesesha ifibi pa fisuma mbacitila, no kusha umweo wandi uwabulanda." 
Psalms35:13 Lelo bena nga balwala, ndasakamana no kufwala insalu shabulanda, ndaipeelesha na kukubapepelako no kufunga ukulya. Nomba amapepo yandi tayayaswikwe," 
Psalms35:14 eico ndakokola na mukuloosha, kwati ni cibusa nelyo munyinane eufwile, ndaloosha no bulanda kwati ni bamayo bafwile." 
Psalms35:15 Lelo ilyo nawa bena batemwa, bashinguluka, balampumya no kumpumaula." 
Psalms35:16 Balancusha ukupitila mukuncita nge ciwelewele, ninshi nabasuma ne cishipa." 
Psalms35:17 Kufika ku nshita nshi we Yawe ukalabatambafye? Pokololako umweo wandi kuli ishi ncitatubi, pokolola ubumi bwandi ubwawamisha kuli ishi nkalamo sha bantu." 
Psalms35:18 Elyo nkalakutotela mu lukuta lukalamba, kabili nkalakulumbanya na pebumba lya bantu." 
Psalms35:19 Wileka abalwani bandi ababufi baleanga pali ine pa mulandu wa kucimba kwandi, nangu wileka abampata apabula umulandu balenshuluka ico ndi mu bulanda." 
Psalms35:20 Tabasosa ifyamutende kanofye ukulanda amashiwi ayakutumfya, ku bantu abekala mu mutelelwe." 
Psalms35:21 Pakutumfya batila, “Eyo! Ala ifwe tulamona ifyo ucita!”" 
Psalms35:22 Ifi fyonse ulafimona we Yawe, wintaluka kabili wisuulakofye we mfumu." 
Psalms35:23 Buuka, we Mfumu yandi ima undwileko, we Lesa wandi mpokololako." 
Psalms35:24 We Yawe, we Lesa wandi umpokololeko, we mulungami wileka abalwani bandi ukucankilwa pali ine." 
Psalms35:25 Wileka baletila, “Eya cawama, efyo twalefwaya.” Wileka baletwanga abati, “Nomba twamucimfya.”" 
Psalms35:26 Uleke bonse abacankwa nga naba mukucula balengwe nsoni, uleke bonse abaitutumuna pali ine balengwe nsoni no kusebana." 
Psalms35:27 Uleke bonse abatemwa ukuti nungamikwe, baule utupundu pe, batile, “Yawe ewalinga ukulumbanya, pantu abekelwa mu kushuka kwa mubomfi wakwe.”" 
Psalms35:28 Akanwa kandi kakulalanda pa bulungami bobe, no kulakulumbanya inshita shonse." 
Psalms36:1 Ububi bulasesemena umubifi mu mutima wakwe, umwenso wakutiina Lesa tawaba pa cinso cakwe." 
Psalms36:2 Pantu umubifi alaimona ukuti alicila abantu bonse, ena amona kwati Yawe tekuti eshibe ububifi bwakwe, no kumulimwinapo." 
Psalms36:3 Amashiwi ya ku kanwa kakwe yabubifi no bucenjeshi, alileka ukucita ifyamano nelyo ifisuma." 
Psalms36:4 Na lintu ali pa musengele apanga ukucita ifintu ifyabipa, no kufwaya inshila iyishili yamutende, taikanyako ukucita ifintu ifibi." 
Psalms36:5 Uluse lobe ulushipwa we Yawe lwafika na ku mulu, ne cishinka cobe cafika na mu makumbi." 
Psalms36:6 Ubulungami bobe bwaba nge mpili ishikalamba, no mulinganya obe washika pamo nge tenga lya bemba. We Yawe ulasunga abantu pamo pene ne nama." 
Psalms36:7 Ifyo kwawama ukutemwa kobe ukushipwa we Lesa, abantu bonse bafisama mu cintelelwe ca mapindo yobe." 
Psalms36:8 Balya ifyanona mu ŋanda yobe ubanwesha mu mumana wa nsansa shobe. 
Psalms36:9 Pantu intulo yabumi yaba kuli iwe, ni mu lubuuto lobe tumwena ulubuuto." 
Psalms36:10 Ukonkanyepo ukutemwa kobe kuli abo abakwishiba, no bulungami bobe ku baololoka imitima." 
Psalms36:11 Wileka abantu abacilumba ukulanjimina, nelyo ababifi ukulansupila." 
Psalms36:12 Mona ifyo incitatubi shiwile shili panshi, epo shilele, nashifilwa ukwima." 
Psalms37:1 Wilafimbila ababifi, nelyo ukulapashanya na bantu abalufyanya." 
Psalms37:2 Pantu bakabonsa nge cani, kabili bakafwa nga mabula ayateku." 
Psalms37:3 Uletetekela Yawe no kucita ifisuma, pakuti ukekale mu calo no kusungwa bwino." 
Psalms37:4 Ulebekelwa muli Yawe, nao akakupeela ifyo umutima obe ukabila." 
Psalms37:5 Uipeeleshe kuli Yawe, ukupitila mukumutetekela, nao akabomba." 
Psalms37:6 Akalenga ubololoke bobe bulebalika ngo lubuuto lwa ku macaca, umulinganya mu micitile yobe ukabalika ngo lubuuto lwa kasuba akali pakati ka mutwe." 
Psalms37:7 Tekanya utalale tondolo pa cinso cakwa Yawe no kushikatala pakumulolela. Wilafimbila umuntu nga ashuka mu nshila yakwe, nelyo umuntu nga afikilisha ububifi bwakwe." 
Psalms37:8 Taluka ubukali, no kufutatila icipyu, wilacita umufimbila pantu citwala ku bubifi." 
Psalms37:9 Ababifi bakatamfiwa, lelo abakwata isubilo muli Yawe bakapyana icalo." 
Psalms37:10 Kwashalafye inshita iyinono ninshi ababifi baloba, nelyo mwakabila ukuti mubamone tabakasangwe." 
Psalms37:11 Lelo abafuuka bakapyana icalo, no kwikala mu mutelelwe uwine wine." 
Psalms37:12 Ababifi balikwata amapange ayabi pa bololoke, na pakubemina balasumanya na meno." 
Psalms37:13 Lelo Yawe alaseka umubifi ico alishiba ukuti, ubushiku bwakwe buli nokwisa." 
Psalms37:14 Ababifi balasomona ulupanga elyo no kutinta ubuta, kukuwisha umulanda no mubusu, kukwipaya abantu abaololoka." 
Psalms37:15 Lelo impanga shabo shikalasa imitima yabo ine, na mata yabo yakafunaulwa." 
Psalms37:16 Utuntu utunono uto umololoke akwata, twawamapo ukucila ifintu ifingi ifyo ababifi abengi bakwata." 
Psalms37:17 Pantu amaka ya babifi yakonaulwa, lelo Yawe akalenga abololoke ukutwalilila." 
Psalms37:18 Yawe alishiba inshiku sha bakaele, kabili ubupyani bwabo bukabelelela." 
Psalms37:19 Na mu nshita ya finkunka tabakateletenshiwe, na mu nshita ya cipowe bena bakakwate fingi." 
Psalms37:20 Lelo ababifi bakaloba, abalwani bakwa Yawe bakalukuta nga mabula mu cilime, bakaloba pamo nge cushi." 
Psalms37:21 Ababifi nga bakongola tababwesha, lelo abololoke bapeela ne nkumbu ukwabula ukuleka." 
Psalms37:22 Abantu abo Yawe apaala bakapyana icalo, lelo abo atipa bakatamfiwa." 
Psalms37:23 Nga cakuti Yawe atemwa imibeele ya muntu, alamulenga ukwiminina ndi mu nshila yakwe." 
Psalms37:24 Nelyo engatelententa tekuti awe, pantu Yawe alemutungilila." 
Psalms37:25 Nali umwaice nomba ninkula, nshatala monapo umololoke ukulekeleshiwa, nelyo abana bakwe ukupula icakulya." 
Psalms37:26 Abololoke baba ne nkumbu no kupeela lyonse, na bana babo bekala abashuka." 
Psalms37:27 Taluka ku bubifi no kucita icisuma, elyo ukekala mu calo pe na pe." 
Psalms37:28 Pantu Yawe atemwa umulinganya, kabili takalekeleshe abacishinka bakwe." 
Psalms37:29 Abololoke bakapyana icalo, no kwikalililamo pe na pe." 
Psalms37:30 Akanwa ka mololoke kasosa ifyamano, no lulimi lwakwe lulanda ifyamulinganya." 
Psalms37:31 Ena, alabaka amafunde yakwa Lesa wakwe, ne ntampulo shakwe tashingapumbamo." 
Psalms37:32 Umubifi alabeleleka umuntu umusuma, kukufwaya umwakumwipaila." 
Psalms37:33 Lelo Yawe talekelesha umuntu umusuma mu minwe yabo, nelyo ukumuleka ukusekwa mu nshita yakupingulwa." 
Psalms37:34 Lolela pali Yawe no kubaka inshila yakwe, akakusumbula kukupyana icalo, ukamona noko ababifi bakafumishiwamo." 
Psalms37:35 Nalimonapo muntu umubifi uwabula uluse alecusha abantu, pamo nge cimuti ca keda mu mushili waciko." 
Psalms37:36 Lelo ilyo napitileko tabamoneke, umone nalibafwaile, nomba nshabamwene." 
Psalms37:37 Upituluke mu wakaele no kwibukisha umulungami, pantu kwalibako ubwikalo bwakutwalilila ku muntu wamutelelwe." 
Psalms37:38 Lelo ababifi bonse bakonaulwa, ubwikalo bwa mubifi bukaputulwa." 
Psalms37:39 Ipusukilo lya bololoke lifuma kuli Yawe pantu e bucingo bwabo mu nshita ya mafya. 
Psalms37:40 Yawe alabafwilisha no kubalubula, abalubula ukufuma ku babifi no kubapususha, ico bafisama muli ena." 
Psalms38:1 We Yawe wilankalipila ilyo ufulilwe, nelyo kunkanda ilyo uli ne cipyu." 
Psalms38:2 Pantu imifwi yobe naindasaula, no kuboko kobe nakuntitikisha." 
Psalms38:3 Tamuli umutende mu mubili wandi, pa mulandu wa bukali bobe. Na maka tamuli mu mafupa yandi, pa mulandu wa kubifya kwandi." 
Psalms38:4 Ifibi fyandi filentotobesha, ku mulandu wa kufina kwafiko." 
Psalms38:5 Pa mulandu wa bupuba bwandi, ifilonda fyandi nafibola kabili filenunka." 
Psalms38:6 Ninkontama ndekongosa, na maka nayapwa, ngo muntu uleloosha akasuba konse." 
Psalms38:7 Inuma yandi yonse iletapata ku bukali, no mutende tamuli mu mubili wandi." 
Psalms38:8 Umubili wandi naufunshika, ndefilwa ne fyakucita, umutima ulifye uwasakamana icakuti ndetusailafye." 
Psalms38:9 We Yawe ifyo mfwaya walifishiba, kabili uleumfwa no kuteta kwandi." 
Psalms38:10 Umutima wandi ulekubauka, na maka nshikwete, na pa menso napafiita fititi." 
Psalms38:11 Pa mulandu wa filonda fyandi bacibusa na bena mupalamano tabalempalama, no lupwa lwandi naluntaluka." 
Psalms38:12 Abafwaya ukunjipaya balinteya ifiteyo, na bafwaya ukuncena balampangila, nine bekalila akasuba konse." 
Psalms38:13 Lelo naba kwati ni nkomamatwi uwakuti teti omfwe, pamo nga cibulu uyo uushingasosa." 
Psalms38:14 Ndi pamo ngo muntu uushumfwa, kabili tekuti asose." 
Psalms38:15 Lelo ine ndolela pali we Yawe, kabili niwefye we Yawe Lesa wandi uli nokunjasuka." 
Psalms38:16 Pantu natile, “Wileka abalwani bandi balentumfya, nelyo ukuitakisha pa mulandu wakushelela kwandi.”" 
Psalms38:17 Ico ndi mupepi no kuwa, kabili ubukali bwa mubili bucili na ine." 
Psalms38:18 Pantu ndeyebelela pa bubifi bwandi, nincushiwa ku mulandu wa fyabubifi fyandi." 
Psalms38:19 Abantu abamfyenga apabula umulandu bengi, abampatafye apashili mulandu." 
Psalms38:20 Abantu abancitila ububi apabula umulandu, balampeela umulandu nelyo ndecita icisuma." 
Psalms38:21 We Yawe windekelesha, we Lesa wandi wintaluka." 
Psalms38:22 Ala wendeshe ukungafwa, we Yawe, we Mupusushi wandi!" 
Psalms39:1 Ine natile, “Nakulasunga imibeele yandi, no kusunga ululimi lwandi ku bubifi. Nalabika inkobelo pa kanwa kandi, mu nshita ndi mu cinso ca babifi.”" 
Psalms39:2 Lelo ilintu nali tondolo, kabili mukutekanya ukwabula ukusosa icisuma nelyo cimo, ukukalipwa kwa mutima muli ine kwalekulilako." 
Psalms39:3 Umutima wandi watendeka ukucushiwa, ilintu ncili ndetontonkanya, umutima wakalipa, elyo naisula akanwa nasosa nati," 
Psalms39:4 “We Yawe leka njishibe impela ya mweo wandi, ne nshiku ishishele ku kupwa kwa mweo wandi, njishibe nefyo ubumi bwandi bucepele." 
Psalms39:5 Nawipifya inshita yandi iyakwikala pano isonde, pa cinso cobe ubumi bwandi bulifye ubwipi, kuli iwe umweo wa muntu waba ngo mupu." 
Psalms39:6 Umuntu abafye pamo nge cinshingwa, na fyonse fyo acita fyafye, alaitulikila ifyuma ukwabula ukwishiba uukafilya." 
Psalms39:7 “Nga nomba we mfumu ni cinshi ndelolela, apo isubilo lyandi niwe?" 
Psalms39:8 Mpususha ku mampulu yandi yonse, wileka mbe uwakusebana ku bantu abapumbu." 
Psalms39:9 Nalaikala tondolo ukwabula ukusosa, pantu niwe wacita ici." 
Psalms39:10 Witwalilila kunkanda, pantu nalafwa ku mpumo sha kuboko kobe." 
Psalms39:11 Ulebaula no kukanda umuntu, pa mulandu wa kubifya kwakwe. Ulonaula na fyonse ifisekesha umubifi, kuli iwe umuntu aba ngo mupu." 
Psalms39:12 “Kutika ku nkuuta yandi iyabwafwilisho we Yawe, wikomeka matwi yobe ku kulila kwandi. Ico ine ndifye umulendo uulepita, umwenifye nga filya ifikolwe fyandi fyali." 
Psalms39:13 Uleke ukundolesha no bukali, pakuti mpemwineko ilintu nshilafwa.”" 
Psalms40:1 Nalitekele umutima ukulolela pali Yawe, nao asuka aumfwa uko ndelila." 
Psalms40:2 Anjabwile ukufuma mu cilindi icitali nganshi ukufuma mu lutikiti na matipa, elyo anjimika pa mulu wa cilibwe, akosha na makasa yandi." 
Psalms40:3 Amfundile no lwimbo ulupya ulwakutasha Lesa wesu. Abantu abengi pakumona ici cintu, bakatendeka ukukwatila Yawe akatiina, kabili bakamutetekela." 
Psalms40:4 Alishuka umuntu uutetekela muli Yawe, uushibika mano ku bantu abacilumba, abalukila mukupepa imilungu yabufi." 
Psalms40:5 Ala fyalifulisha we Yawe, Lesa wandi, ifintu ifyakupapa ifyo watucitila. Walipekanya ne nshila ishingi ishakutwafwilamo, nani engafilumbula? Ine ndafwaya ukufishimika no kufilanda, nomba fyalifulisha ukufilondolola." 
Psalms40:6 Amalambo ne mituulo taufifwaya, lelo wampeela amatwi ayakumfwilako. Amalambo yakoca nangu amalambo ya pa fyabubifi tayakusansamusha nakalya." 
Psalms40:7 Na ine epakutila, “Mona naisa, ngefyo calembwa palwa ine mu malembo ukuti," 
Psalms40:8 ukucita ubufwayo bobe ecaba mu mweo wandi we Lesa wandi, ico amafunde yobe yaba mu mutima wandi.”" 
Psalms40:9 Nga fintu waishiba we Yawe, ndalumbula ubulungami bobe mu lukuta lukalamba, nshitalala tondolo." 
Psalms40:10 Nshifisa ubwafwilisho bobe ubwakupususha mu mutima wandi. Ndalondolola pa mulandu wa cishinka cobe pamo no kupususha kobe. Nshifisa ukutemwa kobe ukushifilwa ne cine cobe ku lukuta lukalamba we Yawe. 
Psalms40:11 Wileka ukumbelela uluse we Yawe, leka ukutemwa kobe pamo ne cishinka cobe filencingilila." 
Psalms40:12 Imintapendwa ya mafya nayanshinguluka, ububifi bwandi nabufula icakuti ndefilwa no kulolesha. Bwafulisha ukucila imishishi ya ku mutwe wandi, ecakuti no mutima nautompoka." 
Psalms40:13 Napapata, we Yawe, umpokololeko, wise bwangu mukungafwa, we Yawe!" 
Psalms40:14 Uleke bonse abafwaya ukonaula umweo wandi balengwe nsoni. Uleke bafulumuke no kubwelelamo abasebana, bonse abafwaisha ukuti ngonaike." 
Psalms40:15 Uleke bonse abanseka ukuti, “Eya, Eya!” bapeshiwe amano no kututubala." 
Psalms40:16 Lelo leka bonse abakufwaya basangalale no kusekelela muli iwe, kabili bonse abatemwa ipusukilo lyobe inshita yonse baletila, “Yawe asumbulwe!”" 
Psalms40:17 Ine ndi mulanda kabili umupina, lekeni imfumu inangulukeko. Niwe kafwa wandi kabili kapokolola wandi, we Lesa wandi wikokola." 
Psalms41:1 Alishuka umuntu uusakamana abalanda na babusu, ico nao bakamwafwa kuli Yawe mu nshita ya mafya." 
Psalms41:2 Yawe akamucingilila no kumusunga, akamupaala mu calo, kabili takamupose ku balwani bakwe." 
Psalms41:3 Yawe alamukoselesha ninshi ali pa musengele nalwala, no kuposha alamuposha ku malwele yakwe." 
Psalms41:4 Lelo ine natile, “We Yawe umbeleleko uluse, umposhe ico ninkubifya.”" 
Psalms41:5 Abalwani bandi balanyamba abati, “Bushe uyu muntu akafwa lilali pakuti tumulabeko?”" 
Psalms41:6 Abesa mukumpempula baba ne mitima ibili, umo wakufwailisha apafikile ubulwele, umbi wakuya baleananyafye ubulwele bwandi." 
Psalms41:7 Abampata bekalilafye ukutepeleshanya, no kukabila ukuti ifibi fincitikile." 
Psalms41:8 Bena batontonkanya ukuti balimulowa, takapole nakalya palya pa musengele alele, takemepo iyoo." 
Psalms41:9 Na cibusa wandi uo nacetekele, umuntu uo tulyafye nankwe icipe cimo, nao alinsangukila." 
Psalms41:10 Lelo iwe umbelele uluse we Yawe no kunjimya pakuti ncimfye abalwani. 
Psalms41:11 Na kuli ici eko ndi nokwishibila ifyo wantemwa, pantu umulwani tancimfishe." 
Psalms41:12 Ulangafwa pantu ine ndi wakaele, ulansunga pa cinso cobe pe na pe." 
Psalms41:13 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, ukufuma ku muyayaya no kufika ku muyayaya, Ameni kabili ameni." 
Psalms42:1 Nga filya fine insebula ifuluka ukunwa amenshi, efyo no mweo wandi ufuluka iwe we Lesa wandi." 
Psalms42:2 Umutima wandi ufuluka Lesa, Lesa uwamweo. Bushe ni lilali nkamba ukutamba icinso cobe?" 
Psalms42:3 Ifilamba fyandi e cakulya candi akasuba no bushiku, abantu nabo balenjipusha akasuba konse abati, “Bushe Lesa obe aba kwi?”" 
Psalms42:4 Umutima wandi ulasunguluka ilyo naibukisha ifyo naletungulula ibumba lya bantu pakuya ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Tuleyaula no tupundu ne nsansa, no kulumbanya pakusefya inshikunkulu." 
Psalms42:5 Bushe mulandu nshi ine nkungumanine? Cinshi nsakamanine fi? Kandetetekelafye muli Lesa, pantu ndi nokutwalilila ukumulumbanya, Mupusushi wandi kabili Lesa wandi." 
Psalms42:6 Umutima wandi nautotobala, eico nakulakwibukisha ukufuma muno mpanga ya Yordani, mupepi ne misansama ya mpili sha Hemoni na Misari." 
Psalms42:7 Amatenga ya babemba yalekuminkana, ne fipoma fyobe we Yawe filepoma, Amatamba yobe yonse na mabimbi yobe yalempunka." 
Psalms42:8 Yawe alenanga ukutemwa kwakwe akasuba, kabili ulwimbo lwakwe lube na ine ubushiku, mpepe kuli Lesa wa mweo wandi." 
Psalms42:9 Elyo naipusha Lesa icilibwe candi nati, “Bushe mulandu nshi undabileko? Cinshi nalaendela uwakungumana, pa mulandu wa bunkalwe bwa balwani bandi?”" 
Psalms42:10 Umusana wandi nauputuka ilintu abalwani bandi balentumfya abati, “Bushe Lesa obe ali kwi?”" 
Psalms42:11 Bushe mulandu nshi ine nkungumanine? Cinshi nsakamanine fi? Kandetetekelafye muli Lesa, pantu ndi nokutwalilila ukumulumbanya, Mupusushi wandi kabili Lesa wandi." 
Psalms43:1 Nungamika no kumpokololako we Lesa wandi, no kundubulwilako ku bantu abashakusakamana, mpokololako ku bantu incenjeshi kabili ababifi." 
Psalms43:2 Niwe Lesa ubucingo bwandi, bushe mulandu nshi wandekelesesha? Cinshi ico ningalaendela uwakungumana, pa mulandu wa bunkalwe bwa balwani bandi?" 
Psalms43:3 Ntumina ulubuuto lobe ne cine pakuti fintungulule, findete ku lupili lobe ulwamushilo, ku ncende ya bwikalo bobe." 
Psalms43:4 Elyo nkafika ku bulambo bwakwa Lesa, Lesa uwaba ubuseko bwandi kabili insansa shandi. Nkalakulumbanya ne seese lyandi, we Lesa, we Lesa wandi." 
Psalms43:5 Bushe mulandu nshi ine nkungumanine? Cinshi nsakamanine fi? Kandetetekelafye muli Lesa, pantu ndi nokutwalilila ukumulumbanya, Mupusushi wandi kabili Lesa wandi." 
Psalms44:1 We Lesa, ifwe twalyumfwile na matwi yesu, twalyumfwile ifyalandile ifikolwe fyesu, pa mulandu wa fintu ifikulu ifyo wacitile mu nshiku shabo, ifyo wacitile kale." 
Psalms44:2 Ifyo ku kuboko kobe watamfishe imishobo ya benafyalo, lelo wapyanikishapo bashifwe. Abantu bambi bena wabakanda, no kuleka abantu bobe ukulaikalilila." 
Psalms44:3 Te ku lupanga lwabo nelyo ku maka balecimfisha iyoo, nangu ukucimfya ne minwe yabo, lelo ni ku kuboko kobe ukwa kulyo, ukuboko kobe no lubuuto lwa cinso cobe ico walibatemenwe." 
Psalms44:4 Niwe we mfumu yandi kabili Lesa wandi, uwalenga Yakobo ukulacimfya." 
Psalms44:5 Ni mu maka yobe emo tucimfisha abalwani besu, na mwishina lyobe emo tubanyantawila." 
Psalms44:6 Nshicetekela mu buta bwandi, nelyo mu lupanga lwandi ukuti lumpusushe." 
Psalms44:7 Lelo niwe utupeela ukucimfya, no kulenga abalwani besu insoni." 
Psalms44:8 Ni muli Lesa tuitakishisha akasuba konse, kabili twakulalumbanya ishina lyobe pe na pe." 
Psalms44:9 Pali nomba nautulekelesha baletucimfya, nauleka ukuba pakati ka fita fyesu." 
Psalms44:10 Nauleka twalatiina abalwani besu, nabo balatupokolola ne fitapwa." 
Psalms44:11 Ulekele baletwipaya pamo nge mpaanga, no kutusalanganisha mu fyalo fya bantu bambi bambi." 
Psalms44:12 Nautushitisha fwe bantu bobe, pa mutengo uwabula ukukubweseshapo nelyo cimo." 
Psalms44:13 Nauleka abena mupalamano baletuwela, abatushinguluka baletutumfya no kutusebanya." 
Psalms44:14 Nauleka imishobo ya benafyalo ukutusuula, abantu nomba bakuntafye imitwe." 
Psalms44:15 Akasuba konse nyenda uwasebana, umuntu uwansoni ishingi pa menso," 
Psalms44:16 pa mulandu wa banjebaula no kuntuka, na pakumona impatila ne cilandushi." 
Psalms44:17 Ifi fyonse filetuponena nelyo tatwakulabako, nangu konaula icipangano cobe." 
Psalms44:18 Ifwe imitima yesu tayakusangukila, kabili tatwatalamina amafunde yobe iyoo." 
Psalms44:19 Lelo walituposelekesha mu matololo, mu mfifi iyafiitisha umwaikala ifiswango." 
Psalms44:20 Nga cakuti atuleka ukwibukisha ishina lyakwa Lesa wesu, no kutendeka ukulapepa umulungu wa benafyalo," 
Psalms44:21 bushe kuti wafilwa ukwishiba fyonse ifi? Pantu walishiba fyonse ifya mu mitima ya bantu. 
Psalms44:22 Lelo ni pa mulandu obe epo ifwe batwipaila akasuba konse. Batucita nge mpaanga isho baletwala kukwipaya. 
Psalms44:23 We Yawe buuka, bushe cinshi walalila utulo? Ale wime, wikatukaana pe na pe!" 
Psalms44:24 Bushe mulandu nshi wafishila icinso cobe? Wilaba ku macushi yesu no bulanda bwesu. 
Psalms44:25 Nabatufwanta natuwa panshi, tulambalelefye panshi mu lukungu." 
Psalms44:26 Ima utwafweko, tupususheko ico ukutemwa kobe takufilwa!" 
Psalms45:1 Umutima wandi nausansamuka pa mulandu wa mashiwi ayasuma, ayali mu lwimbo lwandi ulwakulumbanya kateeka, ululimi lwandi luli nge cakulembelako kalemba." 
Psalms45:2 Waliwamisha ukucila pa baume bonse, kabili ubusuma bwalitikila pa milomo yobe, na Lesa alikupaala pe na pe." 
Psalms45:3 Pikila ulupanga lobe mu musana we mpalume yabulamba, ufwale ukucindama kobe no kupulama." 
Psalms45:4 Mu bucindami bobe ima kacimfye, kukulwila icishinka, ukuicefya no bulungami, amaka ya kuboko kobe yacita ifisungusho." 
Psalms45:5 Imifwi yobe yalitwa, ilapulinkanya mu mitima ya balwani bobe, ne mishobo ilacimba." 
Psalms45:6 Icipuna cobe icabufumu, we Lesa, cabelelela pe na pe, ne nkonto ya bufumu bobe ni nkonto yamulinganya." 
Psalms45:7 Walitemwa ifintu ifyalungama, wapata ifyabipa, e mulandu Lesa, Lesa obe, akusalila pa babiyo bonse, no kukusuba amafuta yansansa." 
Psalms45:8 Insalu shobe shilanunkila icena icisuma ica finyamuti ifyanunka ubusaka ifya muri na matembusha na kasia, na mwisano umwasamikwa ameno ya nsofu balakusansamusha pakulisha ifilimba." 
Psalms45:9 Pa banakashi abasangwa mwisano lyobe palibapo abana ba mfumu, kabili lubali ku kulyo kwa cipuna cabufumu cobe ekwiminina namfumu umusano wa mfumu uufwala ifisamo ifyaemba ifya golide uwine wine uwa ku Ofiri." 
Psalms45:10 Umfwa kuno we mwana mwanakashi, fumya amano ku lupwa lobe na ku bantu bobe." 
Psalms45:11 Ne mfumu ikatemwisha ukuwama kobe, eico uleinakila pantu e sokulu." 
Psalms45:12 Umwana mwanakashi wa Turi akulaleta imituulo, na bakankala bakulakusansamusha pakuti ulebasoselako." 
Psalms45:13 Umu mwine mwisano mwaba umwana wa mfumu nabwinga aipekanishisha, nao ni mbeeka iyine ine, ilaya lyakwe lyapikulwa no bushishi bwa golide." 
Psalms45:14 Nafwala ifyapikulwa ifyabeeka, balemutwala ku mfumu, na banacisungu babiye balemukonka balemushindika." 
Psalms45:15 Baleya baleenda ne nsansa pamo ne nshindishi, baingila na mwisano lya mfumu." 
Psalms45:16 We mfumu ukakwata abana abaume abengi, bakalapyana ififulo fya fikolwe fyobe, ukabalaasa pa bufumu ubwakuteeka icalo conse." 
Psalms45:17 Ca cine, ulwimbo lwandi lukakulenga ukulumbuka ku nkulo shonse, na bantu bonse bakalakulumbanya pe na pe." 
Psalms46:1 Lesa ewakufisamamo kabili e maka yesu, alatwafwa lyonse ilintu tuba mu mafya." 
Psalms46:2 Kanshi nelyo isonde lingasunkana, nangu impili shingakunkulukila mu matenga ya bemba, tekuti tutiine." 
Psalms46:3 Nangufye bemba engalulunkana, ne mpili shingatenta shani, tekuti tutiine." 
Psalms46:4 Eko waba umumana uusansamusha umusumba wakwa Lesa, umwamushilo umo Uwapulamo ekala." 
Psalms46:5 Lesa ewaikala mukati ka musumba, takauleke ukonaika, pantu alaupokololako ku macaca." 
Psalms46:6 Imishobo ya bantu ileipundilafye, ne shamfumu nasho shileikankilafye. Lesa nga abuluma, isonde lilasunguluka." 
Psalms46:7 Ifwe twaba na Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Yakobo uo ifwe tufisamamo." 
Psalms46:8 Iseni mumone imilimo yakwa Yawe, tambeni ubonaushi aletele pesonde." 
Psalms46:9 Eulesha inkondo pesonde ponse, eukontaula amata no kufunaula amafumo, kabili eoca ne nkwela mu mulilo." 
Psalms46:10 Aletila “Tekanyeni mutalale tondolo mwishibe ukuti nine Lesa, ndi nokucindikwa mu mishobo ya bantu, ndi nokucindikwa pesonde ponse.”" 
Psalms46:11 Ifwe twaba na Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Yakobo uo ifwe tufisamamo." 
Psalms47:1 Toteni amapi mwe bantu ba mishobo yonse, sansuleni amashiwi pakwimbila Lesa." 
Psalms47:2 Mulekwatila Yawe Mukulu akatiina, e mfumu nkalamba iyiteeka isonde lyonse." 
Psalms47:3 Ewatucimfishako imishobo ya benafyalo, abantu abo twanyantilila." 
Psalms47:4 Ewatusalilako ne calo cabupyani bwesu, icakusekelela cakwa Yakobo uo atemenwe." 
Psalms47:5 Lesa alenina pakuya ikala pa cipuna cakwe icabufumu, baleawila Yawe utupundu no kumulishisha amapenga." 
Psalms47:6 Imbileni Lesa isha malumbo, mwimbileni amalumbo! Imbileni Imfumu yesu, mwimbileni!" 
Psalms47:7 Lesa euteeka pesonde lyonse, mwimbileni masikili wakumulumbanya." 
Psalms47:8 Lesa euteeka imishobo ya benafyalo, Lesa aikala pa cipuna cakwe icamushilo." 
Psalms47:9 Elyo baisa longana bakateeka ba mishobo ya benafyalo, pamo nga bantu bakwa Lesa wakwa Abrahamu, pantu ishamfumu shonse pano isonde shakwa Lesa, uwacilisha ukupulama." 
Psalms48:1 Yawe mukulu kabili ewalinga ukulumbanya, mu musumba wakwa Lesa wesu, pa lupili lwakwe ulwamushilo." 
Psalms48:2 Ulupili lwaba ulwayemba mu kusansama kwaluko, luleta insansa pesonde lyonse. Ngo kulepesha kwa lupili lwa Safoni efyaba ulupili lwa Sioni, umusumba wa mfumu nkalamba." 
Psalms48:3 Lesa nailanga mukati ka musumba wakwe, ukuti eo abantu bakwe balebutukilako." 
Psalms48:4 Ilintu ishamfumu shaishile mukwampana pamo, shalongene no kwisa ku musumba." 
Psalms48:5 Cilyafye bamona, batulumuka, baikatwa umwenso no kubutuka." 
Psalms48:6 Shaiketwe umwenso no kutendeka ukushikitika, pamo ngo mwanakashi uuli pakupapa." 
Psalms48:7 Wabonaula kwati mato ya ku Tashishi ayaleonaulwa ku cimwela ca ku kabanga. 
Psalms48:8 Ifi fintu twalifyumfwa nomba twaimwena, mu musumba wakwa Yawe umwine wa fita, mu musumba wakwa Lesa wesu, umusumba uo Lesa akosesha pe na pe." 
Psalms48:9 Ni mwi Tempele lyobe we Lesa emo tutontonkanya, pa mulandu wa kutemwa kobe ukushifilwa." 
Psalms48:10 Pamo nge fyaba ishina lyobe we Lesa, ululumbi lobe lwalikumana na ku mpela ye sonde lyonse. Ukuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo kwaisulamo ubulungami." 
Psalms48:11 Leka bantu ba mu Sioni baleanga, imipingwile yobe yaba iyabulungami, leka imishi ya mu Yuda ilecankwa." 
Psalms48:12 Shingulukeni umusumba wa Sioni, no kupenda impungu ishabamo." 
Psalms48:13 Mucecete amalinga yauko, muloleshe bwino ifikuulwa ifyabamo. Epakuti mukafilondolola bwino ifikuulwa ifyabamo, epakuti mukalefilondolola bwino na ku nkulo shikakonkapo, amuti," 
Psalms48:14 “Uyu Lesa e Lesa shifwe wa pe na pe, eukalatutungulula umuyayaya.”" 
Psalms49:1 Umfweni kuno imwe bonse, kutikeni mwe ba pano isonde bonse." 
Psalms49:2 Mwe bacindama na imwe mwe bantufye, mwe bakankala pamo na mwe balanda." 
Psalms49:3 Akanwa kandi kakalanda amashiwi ayamano na matontonkanyo ya ku mutima wandi yakapeela ukwiluka. 
Psalms49:4 Ndeteyamika ukutwi kwandi kwipinda, ndeilwila umulumbe wandi mwiseese." 
Psalms49:5 Bushe mulandu nshi ningakwatila umwenso pa nshita ya busanso, ilintu ulufyengo lwa balwani lwanshinga." 
Psalms49:6 Aba bantu bena babika amano ku fyuma, baitakishafye pa mulandu wa bukankala bwabo." 
Psalms49:7 Takwaba umuntu uwingalubula munyina, ico tekuti asange icakumufutila kuli Yawe." 
Psalms49:8 Umutengo wakuilubwilapo ubumi walikosa, ne cifuta mulandu tacikumanina nakalya" 
Psalms49:9 icingalenga umuntu ukuti ekalilile pano isonde, akaane nokuya ku nindi." 
Psalms49:10 Umuntu alamona ukuti na bamano nabo balafwa, pamo pene nga filya fine ifipumbu ne fipuba fifwa, ni pakufwa epo ne fyuma fishala ku bantu bambi." 
Psalms49:11 Inindi shabo eshisanguka amayanda yabo pe na pe, emo bakalaikalila umwakonkanina inkulo shabo, nelyo bainika ifyalo amashina yabo." 
Psalms49:12 Ubucindami bwa muntu tekuti bumuleshe ukufwa, imifwile ya muntu onse cimo cine ne ya nama." 
Psalms49:13 Umfweni ifiponena abantu abaitetekela abene, ifyo bapelelwa ababika mano mu fyuma fyabo." 
Psalms49:14 Ala bena icakaniko cabo kufwa nge mpaanga, imfwa ikaba e kacema wabo. Ilintu bwaca, abalungami ebakabateeka, no kuyemba kwabo kukabolela ku mbo, Bakaba ku calo ca bafwa ukutali na mayanda yabo ayacindami." 
Psalms49:15 Lelo ine Lesa akampususha ku calo ca bafwa, ee, cine cine akampokelela uko aba." 
Psalms49:16 Wilasakamana ilyo umuntu anonka ifyuma ifingi nganshi, elyo no bucindami bwa ŋanda yakwe bwalundwako." 
Psalms49:17 Pantu takafisende nakalya ilintu inshita yakufwa ikafika, nelyo ifyuma tafyakamukonke ku nindi nakalya." 
Psalms49:18 Nangufye umuntu engaliila mu calo shani, no kulumbanishiwa pa mulandu wa kushuka kwakwe," 
Psalms49:19 akaya ukwaya inkulo ya fikolwe fyakwe ukushimoneka ulubuuto, no kuya ikala kulya ukwaba imfifi." 
Psalms49:20 Umuntu umukankala uusuula ukupandwa amano, aba cimo cinefye ne nama ishonaika." 
Psalms50:1 Umwine wa maka yonse Yawe Lesa alelanda mukubilikisha kwisonde lyonse, ukufuma ilyo akasuba katula mpaka uko kawila." 
Psalms50:2 Lesa alebengeshima ukufuma mu Sioni, umusumba uwawama nganshi." 
Psalms50:3 Lesa wesu aleisa, kabili tatalale tondolo iyoo. Umulilo uukali naumutangilila, ne cimwela icamaka nacimushinguluka." 
Psalms50:4 Aita bonse aba mu mulu na pano isonde, pakupingula abantu bakwe." 
Psalms50:5 Aleti, “Nonganikileni abantu bandi bonse, abo napangene nabo icipangano ice lambo.”" 
Psalms50:6 Umulu uleimininako ubulungami bwakwe, ico ni Lesa eupingula." 
Psalms50:7 “Mwe bantu bandi umfweni ifyo ndelanda, mwe bena Israeli nine ndemushinina, ine ndi Lesa, Lesa wenu." 
Psalms50:8 Nshilemwebaula pa mulandu wa mituulo yenu, nelyo pa mulandu wa malambo yakoca ayo muntuula lyonse." 
Psalms50:9 Ala ine nshikabila bacilume ba ŋombe, abafuma mu matanga yenu, nelyo basawe abafuma pa mikuni yenu." 
Psalms50:10 Pantu inama shampanga shonse shandi, pamo ne fitekwa amakana na makana ifyaba mu mpili nafyo fyandi." 
Psalms50:11 Ifyuni fyonse pamo ne fipeema fyonse nalifishiba, ne fikulika pa mushili, fyandi." 
Psalms50:12 “Nga cakuti insala yansuma tekuti mwebe, pantu isonde pamo na fyonse ifintu ifyabamo fyandi." 
Psalms50:13 Bushe ine ndalya iminofu ya bacilume ba ŋombe, nelyo ukunwa umulopa wa mbushi?" 
Psalms50:14 Tuulila Lesa ilambo lyakumutotela, no kufikilisha ifilayo ifyo walaya Uwapulamo." 
Psalms50:15 Kabili mulendilila mu nshita ya mafya, na ine nakulamupokolola pakuti na imwe mulencindika.”" 
Psalms50:16 Lelo ku babifi Lesa aletila, “Bushe cinshi mulelandila pa mulandu wa mafunde yandi, kabili cinshi mulelandila palwa cipangano candi?" 
Psalms50:17 Tamufwaya ukusalapulwa, nelyo ukukonka amashiwi yandi." 
Psalms50:18 Imwe mutila nga cakuti mwamona umupupu, ninshi mwamusangula umunenu, kabili abacende ebo mwenda nabo." 
Psalms50:19 Utunwa twenu tulandafye ifyabipa, kabili pakubepa ubufi tamumfwa na nsoni." 
Psalms50:20 Mwaikalilafye ukwamba bamunyinenwe, no kubabepesha imilandu pakuti basebane." 
Psalms50:21 Pali fyonse ifyo mwacita naikele tondolo, na imwe mwatontonkenye ukuti ine naba nga imwe! Nomba ndemukalipila, kabili ndemwebelapo pa lwalala." 
Psalms50:22 “Eico mwe balaba kuli Lesa cenjeleni epali namusantaula, no wakumupokololako tekuti kube nakalya." 
Psalms50:23 Umuntu uuntotela mukutuula ilambo lyakutasha alancindika, kabili uwenda mu nshila iyalungama, ndi nokumulanga ipusukilo lyakwa Lesa.”" 
Psalms51:1 Umbeleleko uluse we Lesa, umwabela ubwingi bwa luse lobe. Ukulingana ne cikuku ico wakwatisha, ufuute bumpulamafunde bwandi." 
Psalms51:2 Unsambe bwino bwino ukufuma ku fyabupulumushi fyandi fyonse, kabili unsangulule ku fyabubifi fyandi." 
Psalms51:3 Pantu bumpulamafunde bwandi ine nalibwishiba, ne fyabubifi fyandi ndafibukisha lyonsefye." 
Psalms51:4 Ni kuli iwefye weka nabifyako, no kucita ifintu ifyabipa pa cinso cobe. Ilyo ulanda, bonse balamona ukuti ulalungika, kabili taulufyanya mu kupingula kobe." 
Psalms51:5 Cine cine ine ni mu bubifi emo nafyalilwe, na lyonse nabafye umubifi ukutula apo naimitilwe kuli mayo." 
Psalms51:6 Apo ufwaya umutima wabupete, eico nsambilisha amano yakwishiba mukati ka mutima wandi." 
Psalms51:7 Ufuute ifibi fyandi ku tumisambo twa hisopo, uleke mbefye uwapwililika kuli bukaele, unsambe uleke mbeke ngo bunga bwa mfula." 
Psalms51:8 Leka ŋumfwe ukusekelela ne nsansa, pakuti nangu wanshonaula no kumfunaula, lelo ulenge amafupa yandi ukuba ne nsansa nakabili." 
Psalms51:9 Utalushe icinso cobe ku fibi fyandi, upase ubulungani bwandi bonse." 
Psalms51:10 Umbikemo umutima uwakaele we Lesa, ubukulushe no mupashi wandi pakuti ube uwashipa." 
Psalms51:11 Wintamfya pa cinso cobe, kabili wimpokolola Umupashi obe uwamushilo." 
Psalms51:12 Umbweseshe insansa sha kupususha kobe, umpeele no mutima uusekelela mukumfwila." 
Psalms51:13 Lyena elyo nakulafunda bampulamafunde umwakwishila kuli iwe, na babifi bakulabwelela kuli iwe." 
Psalms51:14 Umpusushe ku milandu ya mulopa we Lesa, we Lesa uumpususha, na ine nakulalumbilisha ubulungami bobe." 
Psalms51:15 Isula imilomo yandi we Yawe, epakuti na ine ndekulumbanya." 
Psalms51:16 Ine kuti natuula ilambo, lelo ifi tefyo ufwaya, na malambo yakoca nayo yene tayakutemuna iyoo." 
Psalms51:17 Lelo umutima uwabupete e lambo lyakwa Lesa, pantu umutima uwaicefya mukulapila, we Lesa tawakausuule." 
Psalms51:18 Cita ifisuma kuli Sioni mu nshita ya kutemwa kobe, ukuule na malinga ya Yerusalemu." 
Psalms51:19 Elyo ukasekelela amalambo ayalungama, amalambo yakoca ayakukusansamusha, elyo na bacilume ba ŋombe bakulapeelwa pa bulambo bobe." 
Psalms52:1 Bushe cinshi ico uitakishisha pa bubi, we mwaume impalume? Bushe ni cinshi ico uitakishisha akasuba konse iwe we wasebana mu menso yakwa Lesa?" 
Psalms52:2 Ululimi lobe lupangafye ubonaushi, lwaba ngo lwembe ulwatwa, iwe we ubomfya ubucenjeshi." 
Psalms52:3 Watemwa ububifi ukucila ubusuma, no kulanda ifyabufi ukucila icishinka." 
Psalms52:4 Watemwa ukulanda amashiwi ayakucena abantu, we wa lulimi lwabucenjeshi." 
Psalms52:5 Ee Lesa akakutentemuna umuyayaya, ali nokukukusanga akakwimye akakufumye na mwitenti lyobe, ali nokukushulumuna akakufumye na mu calo ca bamweo." 
Psalms52:6 Abacita ubololoke pakumona ici cintu bakalatiina, bakalamuseka no kusosa abati," 
Psalms52:7 “Moneni, ulya muntu uwakene ukulashina kuli Lesa, ena aposelefye amano yakwe ku cuma cakwe icali icingi, akosha no bwikashi bwakwe mukonaula bambi.”" 
Psalms52:8 Lelo ine nabafye ngo muti wa muolifa, uukulila mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa. No mweo wandi watetekela pe mu kutemwa kwakwa Lesa ukushipwa." 
Psalms52:9 Nakulakutotela umuyayaya pali fyonse ifyo wacita, nakulasumbula ishina lyobe ilishaiwamina, nakulakulumbanya pa cinso ca bakupetamina." 
Psalms53:1 Impelwamano mu mutima itila, “Takwaba Lesa”. Aba bantu balyonaika, kabili bacita ifintu ifyamusebanya, kabili tapaba nelyo umo uucita ifisuma." 
Psalms53:2 Ukufuma ku mulu, Lesa alolesha pa bana ba bantu, pakumona nga palipo umo uwamano, uufwaya Lesa." 
Psalms53:3 Abantu bonse balifutatila Lesa, bonse balifye abaonaika. Tapali nelyo umo uucita ubusuma, nakalya nangufye umo." 
Psalms53:4 Bushe abacita ifibi, emukuti mano bashakwata? Abonaula abantu bandi kwati ni filya umuntu alya umukate, abashaishiba no kupepa kuli Lesa." 
Psalms53:5 Moneni nomba ifyo baleikatwa umwenso apashili icakubatiinya, pantu Lesa alisalanganya amafupa ya balwani bakwe baikatwa ne insoni, pantu Lesa alibapasa." 
Psalms53:6 Iye, nga cakuti ukulubuka kwa bena Israeli nga kwafuma mu Sioni! Ilyo Lesa akabwesesha abantu bakwe kumwabo, elyo Yakobo akaleanga, na Israeli akasansamuka." 
Psalms54:1 Umpusushe kwishina lyobe, we Lesa, umpokololeko mu maka yobe." 
Psalms54:2 Umfwa kwipepo lyandi, we Lesa, kutika kufyo ine ndelanda." 
Psalms54:3 Abantu bambi bambifye nabanjimina, abantu abankalwe balefwaya ukunjipaya, abantu abashasakamana Lesa." 
Psalms54:4 Ala cine cine Lesa e kafwa wandi, Imfumu eisunga umweo wandi." 
Psalms54:5 Uleke ububi bubwelele abalwani bandi, mu cishinka cobe ubonaule." 
Psalms54:6 Ine nakulakutuula ilambo ilyakuitemenwa, nakulatotela ishina lyobe we Yawe pantu lyaliwama." 
Psalms54:7 Pantu naumpususha ku macushi yandi yonse, kabili nimona na menso yandi uko abalwani bandi balecimba." 
Psalms55:1 Kutika kwipepo lyandi, we Lesa, wisuulako kufyo ine ndepapata." 
Psalms55:2 Uŋumfwe no kunjasuka, pantu nafifula ifilencusha mu mutima elyo nafinasha." 
Psalms55:3 Ine amano nayapela palwa cintiinya ca balwani bandi, na pa mulandu wa mucushisha wa bantu babi, pantu ebandetela amacushi, kabili mu bukali balimpata." 
Psalms55:4 Umutima wandi uleshikitika, no kufwa kulentiinya nganshi." 
Psalms55:5 Ine ndetiina no kututuma ndetutuma, elyo no mwenso naunjikata." 
Psalms55:6 Eico ndetila, “Aciba cakuti nalikwata amapindo nge nkunda, nga kuti napupuka pakuti naya tuusha." 
Psalms55:7 Ngakuti nafulumukila ukutali, ukwakuti naya ikalafye mu matololo." 
Psalms55:8 Ngakuti naendesha ukuya ukwakutuushisha, pakuti napusuka ukufuma ku cikuku ne mfula iya cimwela.”" 
Psalms55:9 Ubonaule, we Yawe, ufulunganye no lulimi lwabo, pantu ine ndemona ubulwi ne mpasase mu musumba." 
Psalms55:10 Akasuba no bushiku baleendaukafye pa mulu wa malinga, na mu musumba mulifye ubupondo ne ntulubundi." 
Psalms55:11 Ubonaushi bulifye mpanga yonse mu musumba, mu misebo yauko monse mulifye ukutiinya no bufi." 
Psalms55:12 Aciba cakuti mulwani eulencusha, kuti nashipikisha, nangu aciba cakuti ni umo uo twapusana nankwe euleisumbula pali ine, lyena nga njile belamafye ukufuma kuli ena." 
Psalms55:13 Nomba niwe we muntu munandi, we mubile munandi, kabili cibusa wandi." 
Psalms55:14 Twaleumfwana nobe, no kwangalila pamo, no kwendela pamo pakuya ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
Psalms55:15 Uleke imfwa ibapumikishe abalwani bandi no kubasenda, batelemukile abatuntulu mu calo ca bafwa, pantu ububifi nabusanga apakwikala pakati kabo." 
Psalms55:16 Lelo ine ni kuli Lesa eko ndelilila, kabili ni Yawe euli nokumpususha." 
Psalms55:17 Ndilishika no kuteta uko ali, ulucelo, akasuba ne cungulo, nao alomfwa ishiwi lyandi." 
Psalms55:18 Akulapokolola umweo wandi mu mutende ukufuma ku bulwi ubo ndwisha, pantu abandwisha balifula." 
Psalms55:19 Lesa uwaikala pa cipuna cabufumu umuyayaya, akalaumfwa no kubacimfya, abantu abashifwaya ukupilibuka, pantu tababa na katiina kuli Lesa." 
Psalms55:20 Cibusa wandi emine bacibusa bakwe, afulungenye ne cipangano akwete nabo." 
Psalms55:21 Mu kanwa kakwe alande ifisuma nga mafuta, lelo mu mutima wakwe mwaisulamo ubulwi. Amashiwi yakwe yatelela kwati mafuta, nomba yatwa ngo lupanga ulwasomonwa." 
Psalms55:22 Tuula ifisendo fyobe kuli Yawe, nao akulakubaka, ena taleka umuntu umololoke ukuti bamucimfye iyoo." 
Psalms55:23 Nomba ababifi bena, we Lesa ukabaposa mu cilindi cakubonawilamo, abamisoka ne ncenjeshi bakafwa lintu tabalafika na pakati ka nshiku shabo, lelo ine, ndi nokucetekelafye muli iwe." 
Psalms56:1 Umbelele uluse we Lesa wandi, pantu abantu nabansupila icibi, akasuba konse balencushafye no kundwisha." 
Psalms56:2 Abo twapusana nabo balensupila akasuba konse, pantu balifula abandwisha ne cilumba cabo." 
Psalms56:3 Ilyo umwenso wanjikata, niwefye weka nakulacetekela." 
Psalms56:4 Muli Lesa umwine we shiwi ilyo numbanya, emo nacetekela, kabili teti ntiine. Nga ni cinshi ico umuntu engancita?" 
Psalms56:5 Akasuba konse bafulunganya ifyo nanda, lyonse batontonkanyafye palwa kumfyenga." 
Psalms56:6 Balongana elyo bambelamina, no kulonda konse uko ndeya, balefwaishafye banjipaye." 
Psalms56:7 Pali buncitatubi bwabo balimune we Lesa, mu bukali ulimune imishobo ya bantu." 
Psalms56:8 Ulembe ukulila kwandi, bika ifilamba fyandi mu nyambi. Bushe tafyalembwa mu citabo cobe?" 
Psalms56:9 Abalwani bandi bakafulumuka mu bushiku nkalilila kuli iwe, pantu ico ine naishiba cakuti, “Lesa aba na ine.”" 
Psalms56:10 Muli Lesa, umwine we shiwi ilyo numbanya, muli Yawe, umwine we shiwi ilyo numbanya," 
Psalms56:11 muli Lesa emo nakwata icitetekelo kabili teti ntiine, nga ni cinshi ico umuntu engancita?" 
Psalms56:12 We Lesa nalakupeela fyonse ifyo nalaile, nalatuula ne lambo lyandi ilyakutotela." 
Psalms56:13 Pantu naupokolola umweo wandi ukufuma ku mfwa, na makasa yandi ukufuma kukuwa, pakuti mbe uwakwenda pa cinso cakwa Lesa, mu lubuuto ulusanika abamweo." 
Psalms57:1 Umbelele uluse we Lesa wandi, umbelele uluse pantu ine naisa mukushina uko uli. Mu cintelelwe ca mapindo yobe emo nakulauba, mpaka napo icinkunka cikapwila." 
Psalms57:2 Ndalilila kuli Lesa Mukulu, kuli Lesa uufikilisha ubufwayo bwakwe pali ine." 
Psalms57:3 Euntumina ipusukilo ukufuma ku mulu no kumpususha, no kukalipila bonse abansupila. Lesa eutuma icitemwiko cakwe icishipwa ne cishinka cakwe." 
Psalms57:4 Ine ndi pakati ka nkalamo, ndala pakati ka fiswango ifyakalipisha nganshi, abantu abo ameno yabo yaba kwati mifwi na mafumo, ne ndimi shabo shatwa ngo lupanga." 
Psalms57:5 Ube uwasumbulwa ukucila na pa myulu we Lesa, no bucindami bobe bukumane isonde lyonse." 
Psalms57:6 Abalwani bandi nabanteya isumbu ilyakuti njikatwemo, no mweo wandi wacululuka. Baimba ubucinga ku ntanshi yandi, lelo abene ebawililemo." 
Psalms57:7 We Lesa umutima wandi ulifye uwashipa, ee ucilifye uwashipa, ine nakulakwimbila inyimbo sha malumbo." 
Psalms57:8 Buuka we mutima wandi! Buuka we seese, na iwe we nsango! Ine nalashibusha amacaca." 
Psalms57:9 Nakulakulumbanya mu mishobo ya bantu, we Mfumu, ine nakulaimba palwa iwe pakati ka benafyalo." 
Psalms57:10 Pantu icitemwiko cobe cikulu nganshi cafika na mu myulu, ne cishinka cobe cafika na mu makumbi." 
Psalms57:11 Ube uwasumbulwa ukucila na pa myulu we Lesa, no bucindami bobe bukumane isonde lyonse." 
Psalms58:1 Bushe imwe bakateeka imipingwile yenu intu yalolamo? Bushe mulapingula abantu mu musango uwalungama? 
Psalms58:2 Nakalya imwe mu mitima yenu mutontonkanya palwa kucita ifyabipa, mucitila ulufyengo ku minwe yenu pesonde." 
Psalms58:3 Abantu babi ububifi bwabo butendekela mwifumo, babepafye ubufi ukutula pa kufyalwa kwabo." 
Psalms58:4 Bakwata ubusungu ngo bwa nsoka, baba kwati ni mpini iyakoma amatwi," 
Psalms58:5 iyishumfwa ishiwi lya muntu uwacenjela ukwita, nangu engacenjela shani." 
Psalms58:6 We Lesa, ukontaule ameno mu tunwa twabo, utobaule ne ncendwa sha ishi nkalamo, we Yawe." 
Psalms58:7 Leka bapite nga menshi filya yakunkuluka, nga basumbula ubuta uleke imifwi ibe iyafupa." 
Psalms58:8 Uleke babe nge nkola iyenguluka pakwenda, uleke babe nga kapopo akashimona kasuba." 
Psalms58:9 Lintu inongo shenu tashilaumfwa icikabilila ca mulilo wa myunga, ibe ibishi nangu iyauma, ababifi bena bakasendwa nga kankungwe." 
Psalms58:10 Abololoke bakatemwa nganshi pakumona uko ababifi balekandwa, bena bakalasamba amakasa mu mulopa wa babifi." 
Psalms58:11 Elyo abantu bakalasosa abati, “Ala cine cine abololoke bakalambulwa, cine cine Lesa eko aba uupingula isonde lyonse.”" 
Psalms59:1 Mpokololako ku balwani bandi we Lesa, uncingilile ku balenjimina." 
Psalms59:2 Mpokololako kuli aba bantu bacita ifyabubifi, untuleko kuli aba bantu basumya umulopa." 
Psalms59:3 Umone ifyo balalilila umweo wandi, abantu abankalwe nabantengamina, te pa mulandu wakuti ine nimbifya nangu ukucita icabipa we Yawe." 
Psalms59:4 Apabula umulandu mbacitile beminefye ukwisa mukunsansa. Wime wise untuleko, ulolekeshe na pa bufwayo bwandi." 
Psalms59:5 Iye we Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, Lesa wa bena Israeli, ala ima pakuti ukande imishobo yonse! Wibabelelako no luse aba bacisanguka wa bantu." 
Psalms59:6 Bena babwela icungulo, no kupemekesa nge mbwa ilyo baleendauka mu musumba." 
Psalms59:7 Nga wakutika ku fifuma mu tunwa twabo, amashiwi ya mu tunwa twabo yatwa ngo lupanga, bena benda balelanda ati, “Ngo wingatumfwa nani?”" 
Psalms59:8 Lelo we Yawe ubasekafye, no kusenteka imishobo ya bantu bonse." 
Psalms59:9 Niwe maka yandi, ala niwe ndoleshako, we Lesa wandi niwe cubo candi." 
Psalms59:10 We Lesa wandi, we wantemwisha walantangilila, walalenga nokuti moneko uko abalwani bandi balecimba." 
Psalms59:11 We Yawe, we nkwela yesu, wibepaya bwangu abantu aba, epali abantu bandi balabako, basalanganye ku maka yobe elyo ubalofye." 
Psalms59:12 Pa mulandu wakuti ifyabipa fyaba pa tunwa twabo, no kulanda ifyabipa e lyashi lyabo, eico leka icilumba cabo cibalye. Kabili na pa mulandu wa fitipu elyo no bufi ubo babepa," 
Psalms59:13 ubonaule ku cipyu cobe, ubalenge balobelele. Lyena abantu bonse bakeshiba ukuti we Lesa niwe uteeka Yakobo, bakeshiba ukufika na ku mpela shonse isha pano isonde." 
Psalms59:14 Bena babwela icungulo, ninshi balepemekesa nge mbwa, ilyo baleendauka mu musumba." 
Psalms59:15 Bekalilafye ukululumba mukufwaya ifyakulya, no kulailishanya nga fyacepa." 
Psalms59:16 Lelo ine nakulalumbanya amaka yobe, ulucelo lonse ine nakulapongomoka pakwimba palwa citemwiko cobe icishipwa. Iwe uli cubo candi, uli ibutukilo lyandi mu nshiku sha kupelelwa kwandi." 
Psalms59:17 Nakulakulumbanya, we bulamba bwandi, pantu we Lesa uli cubo candi, we Lesa we wantemwisha." 
Psalms60:1 We Lesa, nautuposa naupasaula umo twashintilile, walitufulilwa, nomba tubweseshe uko uli." 
Psalms60:2 Nautelentensha icalo, no kucilepula caisuka, ushiike mu milale yaciko, pantu cili mupepi no kumokoka." 
Psalms60:3 Naulenga abantu bobe ukulaculisha nganshi, nautunwensha umwangashi uukali, tuletalansukafye." 
Psalms60:4 Naulanga icishibilo ku bantu bobe abakutiina, pakuti bafulumuke imifwi ya balwani babo." 
Psalms60:5 Tupususheko no kutwafwa ku maka ya kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo, pakuti abantu bobe abo watemwisha balubulwe." 
Psalms60:6 Lesa nalanda mu cifulo cakwe icamushilo ati, “Ilyo nkacimfya nkakanya Shekemu, no kwakanya ishika lya Sukoti." 
Psalms60:7 Gileadi ena wandi, na Manase nao wine wandi, Efulemu e cimpompo cakufwala ku mutwe wandi, Yuda e nkonto yandi iya pa bufumu." 
Psalms60:8 Moabu ena e musambilo wandi, pali Edomu epo nakulaposa indyato shandi, na pa calo ca Filisiti epo mpundila mukucimfya.”" 
Psalms60:9 Nga nani akantwala mu musumba we linga? Nga uukantungulula ku Edomu nani? 
Psalms60:10 Bushe teiwe we Lesa walituposa? Waleka no kulaenda ne fita fyesu! 
Psalms60:11 Shi wingatwafwilishako ukulwisha abalwani, pantu amaka yabuntunse tapaba ifyo yaba!" 
Psalms60:12 Lesa nga aba ku lubali lwesu ninshi tulecimfya, kabili akanyantaula na balwani besu." 
Psalms61:1 Kutika ku kulila kwandi, we Lesa umfwa kwipepo lyandi." 
Psalms61:2 Ndelilila kuli iwe ukufuma ku mpela ya pano isonde, ine umutima wandi naunaka, untwale pa cilibwe icalepa ukuncila." 
Psalms61:3 Pantu niwe ine nshintililako, niwe ulupungu lwandi ulwamaka uluncingilila ku balwani." 
Psalms61:4 Uleke ndeikalilila mwi Tenti lyobe pe na pe, leka ndeuba mu mapindo yobe." 
Psalms61:5 Pantu ulomfwa ifilayo fyandi we Lesa, wampeelako icikwatwa cilya upeela abatiina ishina lyobe." 
Psalms61:6 Ulundileko imfumu ya calo imyaka iyingi, uleke imfumu ikokole." 
Psalms61:7 Uleke ileteeka umuyayaya pa cinso cobe we Lesa, uleisunga ku citemwiko cobe icishipwa pamo ne cishinka cobe." 
Psalms61:8 Eico ine nakulaimba inyimbo shakulumbanya ishina lyobe pe, pakuti na ine inshiku shonse nkalafikilisha ifilayo ifyo nakulaile." 
Psalms62:1 Umweo wandi utuushisha muli Lesa eka, pantu ekufuma ipusukilo lyandi." 
Psalms62:2 Ekafye e cilibwe candi, kabili ipusukilo lyandi, e linga lyandi, kabili teti ntelentenshiwe nangu panono." 
Psalms62:3 Bushe iwe ukaposa inshita shinga ishakucenenapo umuntu, pakuti bonse imwe mumupose panshi, pakumuwisha nge cibumba icatundama, elyo ne cibumba icisokona?" 
Psalms62:4 Bena bafwailishafye inshila shakumufumya pa bukankala bwakwe, no kutemwishafye ukulabepa ubufi. Mu tunwa twabo balelanda amashiwi ya mapaalo, lelo mu mitima yabo ninshi balelapisha." 
Psalms62:5 Sanga ukutuusha muli Lesa eka we mweo wandi, pantu isubilo lyandi litula kuli ena." 
Psalms62:6 Ena ekafye e cilibwe candi, kabili e pusukilo lyandi, e linga lyandi kabili teti ntelentenshiwe." 
Psalms62:7 Ipusukilo lyandi no mucinshi wandi fyaba muli Lesa, Lesa e cilibwe candi icamaka ukwakubutukila." 
Psalms62:8 Mwe bantu, ala lyonsefye mulecetekela Lesa, mulemwishibisha ifili mu mitima yenu, pantu eo tubutukilako." 
Psalms62:9 Abantu yaweyawe baba ngo mupu, abakankala nabo baba ngo bufi. Nga cakuti bonse mwabapima pesekelo tababa nangu cimo, bonse bayanguka ngo mupu." 
Psalms62:10 Mwicetekela mu fyabukakashi, mwilacankilwa fyuma fyabupupu, nangu ifyuma fyenu nga fyafulisha, imwe mwilafibikishako umutima." 
Psalms62:11 Kwaba icintu cimo ico Lesa akomailapo, ifintu fibili ifyo naumfwa ifyakutila, niwe Lesa uwamaka yonse," 
Psalms62:12 ne cakuti iwe we Mfumu uli wa citemwiko icishipwa. Cinefye niwe ulambula umuntu ukulingana nefyo acita. 
Psalms63:1 We Lesa, ala niwe Lesa wandi, ine ndekufwaya, umutima wandi ulekufuluka, no mweo wandi ulekukabila, kwati mushili uwauma ndi umushaba amenshi." 
Psalms63:2 Ine nalikumona mu cifulo cobe icamushilo, natamba amaka yobe no bucindami bobe." 
Psalms63:3 Pantu icitemwiko cobe icishifilwa caliwama ukucila ubumi, eco na kanwa kandi kakulakulumbanya." 
Psalms63:4 Nakulakulumbanya ilyo ncili umumi, na mwishina lyobe nkalaimya amaboko yandi." 
Psalms63:5 Umutima wandi ukalaipakisha, ngefyo ucita ku fyakulya ifyanona, nkalaimba ne nyimbo ishakukulumbanya." 
Psalms63:6 Ilyo ndala pa musengele wandi ine ndakwibukisha, no kutontonkanya pali iwe ubushiku bonse." 
Psalms63:7 Pantu niwe ungafwa lyonsefye, mu mapindo yobe emo ine nyimbila inyimbo shansansa." 
Psalms63:8 Umweo wandi wakonena muli iwe, no kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo ekuntungilila pakumpususha." 
Psalms63:9 Lelo abafwaya ukulofya umweo wandi bakabalofya, bena bakatelemukila mu calo ca bafwa." 
Psalms63:10 Bakafwila ku lupanga, ne mimbulu ikalya ifitumbi fyabo." 
Psalms63:11 Lelo imfumu ikasansamukila muli Lesa, na bonse abalapa mwishina lwakwa Lesa bakamulumbanya, pantu utunwa twa babepa ubufi tukacilikwa." 
Psalms64:1 Wingomfwa ishiwi lyandi ilyakulilishika, we Lesa, upokolole no mweo wandi ku balwani abalentiinya," 
Psalms64:2 Umfise ukufuma kuli bantalamisoka, aba mapange ya mu bumfisolo, kwibumba lya congo ilya bacita ifyabipa." 
Psalms64:3 Abanona indimi shabo ngo lupanga, na mashiwi yabo ayakali bayafwinta nge mifwi." 
Psalms64:4 Balabelama pakulasa uwakaele, bapumikisha pakumulasa, ababula no mwenso." 
Psalms64:5 Balakoseleshanya ilyo bapanga ukucita icabipa, balomfwana ukwakuya teya ifiteyo fyabo, balanda nokuti, “Takuli uuletumona.”" 
Psalms64:6 Ilyo balepangana ukucita ifyabipa batila, “Eya mwandi twatontonkanya ifisuma.” Cine cine munda na mu mutima wa muntu mwaba ubucenjeshi." 
Psalms64:7 Lelo Lesa akalasa umufwi pali bena, no kubalasa ukwabula ukubasoka." 
Psalms64:8 Akabalofya pa mulandu wafyo balanda, na bonse abakamonako bakakunta imitwe." 
Psalms64:9 Elyo na bantu bonse bakatiina, bakashimika ifyo Lesa acita, no kulatontonkanya palwa micitile yakwe." 
Psalms64:10 Lekeni umuntu onse umololoke asekelele muli Yawe, no kubutukila uko ali! Lekeni na bonse abalungama imitima bamulumbanye." 
Psalms65:1 Calilinga abantu balekulumbanya mu Sioni, we Lesa, emo balefikilisha na fyonse ifyo bakulaya." 
Psalms65:2 Pantu ulomfwa amapepo, abantu bonse bakulaisa kuli iwe." 
Psalms65:3 Ilyo ifibi fyatwanshishe walitubelele uluse pali bumpulamafunde bwesu bonse. 
Psalms65:4 Balishuka abo wasala no kubapalamika kuli iwe, pakuti babe abakwikala mwisano lyobe. Twakulaipakisha ifintu fyonse ifisuma ifya mu ŋanda yobe, mukati ke Tempele lyobe ilyamushilo." 
Psalms65:5 Ulatwasuka mu bulungami ukupitila mu fisungusho, we Lesa we pusukilo lyesu, Abantu bonse aba pano pesonde, na bonse ababa kwishilya lya bemba, batetekela muli iwe." 
Psalms65:6 Niwe waimike impili ku maka yobe, pantu waliipangasha na maka yobe ayakalamba." 
Psalms65:7 Niwe utalalika icilulumo ca bemba, no kushulumuka kwa mabimbi, ne congo conse ica mishobo." 
Psalms65:8 Icakuti aba pano isonde abekala ukutali baikatwa umwenso pa mulandu wa bukulu bwa fintu ucita, pantu ukufuma ukwatula akasuba ukufika uko akasuba kawila, ifyo ucita filenga abantu ukwaula utupundu." 
Psalms65:9 Niwe upempula icalo no kuciletela imfula, ulenga ukuti cileba icikankala mu misango yonse. Imimana yakwa Lesa yalisula amenshi pakuti abantu balekwatisha iŋanu, pantu efyo wafipekanya." 
Psalms65:10 Amabala ayalimwa niwe uyaletela imfula iyingi, no kulenga ifilimwa filetapililwa. Niwe unasha umushili ku mfula ya bufumi, no kulenga ifilimwa fyonse filekula." 
Psalms65:11 Ifisabo filafuma ukulingana nefyo upeela cila mwaka, nomo upitile monse mufumfumuka ifintu ifingi." 
Psalms65:12 Umulemfwe ulafulisha mu matololo, ne mpili shilasekelela." 
Psalms65:13 Umwakucemena monse mwisula impaanga, na mwishika mukumana ifisabo fyeka fyeka, abantu nabo epakusansamuka no kwaula utupundu." 
Psalms66:1 Auleni utupundu, mwe bantu bonse!" 
Psalms66:2 Imbileni ubucindami bwe shina lyakwe, amalumbo yakwe yamulenge ukucindama." 
Psalms66:3 Ebeni Lesa amuti, “Ificitwa fyobe fyacipeshamano! Amaka yobe yakalamba nganshi, pakuti abalwani bobe balekusembeleka." 
Psalms66:4 Aba pano isonde bonse niwe bapakata, niwe bembila inyimbo shakulumbanya, balumbanya ishina lyobe.”" 
Psalms66:5 Iseni mumone ifyo Lesa acita, uwalinga ukutiina pa milimo abombela abantu." 
Psalms66:6 Asangwile bemba ukuba umushili uwauma, ifikolwe fyesu epakwabuka umumana apauma ku makasa, eico lekeni tuleyanga ne nsansa." 
Psalms66:7 Euteeka pe ku maka yakwe, amenso yakwe eyasopa imishobo yonse. Mwileka abasangu balaitutubula apo ali." 
Psalms66:8 Akulumbanyeni Lesa wesu, imwe mwe bantu bonse, lekeni inyimbo shakumulumbanya shumfwike." 
Psalms66:9 Ewatusunga abomi, no kulenga ukuti ifwe twiwa." 
Psalms66:10 Pantu ifwe walitwesha, we Lesa, walitwengulula filya bengulula silifa." 
Psalms66:11 Niwe watuleta mu cifungo, no kutwilikisha ifyafina mu numa." 
Psalms66:12 Niwe walekele abalwani besu baletunyantaula, ifwe twalipita mu mulilo na mu lyeshi, lelo walituleta ku cifulo ica fintu ifingi." 
Psalms66:13 Ndeleta ku ŋanda yobe amalambo ayakoca, no kufikilisha ifyo nakulaya," 
Psalms66:14 ifilayo imilomo yandi yalaile na kanwa kandi kalandile, ilyo ine nali mu bucushi." 
Psalms66:15 Nkakulekela amalambo ya nama ishaina, no mutuulo wa basukusuku, no kulatuula ilambo lya bacilume ba ŋombe na basawe." 
Psalms66:16 Mwe bakwatila Lesa akatiina, iseni mumfwe bonse, pakuti mwebeko ifyo Lesa acitila umweo wandi." 
Psalms66:17 Nalilile kuli Lesa na kanwa kandi, no kumulumba no lulimi lwandi." 
Psalms66:18 Umutima wandi ausaminwa ububi, Yawe nga taŋumfwile iyoo." 
Psalms66:19 Lelo Lesa ine aliŋumfwile icine cine, akutika na kwipepo lyandi." 
Psalms66:20 Lesa apaalwe na matotelo pantu tasuulile ipepo lyandi, nangu ukuleka elankwatila icitemwiko cakwe icishipwa." 
Psalms67:1 Utubeleleko uluse kabili utupaale, we Lesa, utulange insansa sha cinso cobe." 
Psalms67:2 Pakuti abantu bonse aba pano isonde baleishiba inshila shobe, ne pusukilo lyobe lishibikwe pakati ka mishobo yonse." 
Psalms67:3 Ala leka abantu balekulumba, we Lesa, leka abantu bonse balekulumbanya." 
Psalms67:4 Leka imishobo ilesansamuka, no kulaimba inyimbo shansansa, pantu uteeka abantu no mulinganya, ulatungulula ne mishobo ya bantu bonse pano isonde." 
Psalms67:5 Ala leka abantu balekulumba, we Lesa, leka abantu bonse balekulumbanya." 
Psalms67:6 Elyo no mushili ukamesha ifisabo fyauko, pantu Lesa, Lesa wesu alatupaala." 
Psalms67:7 Akatupaala Lesa wesu, epakuti isonde lyonse uko lyapela balemukwatila akatiina." 
Psalms68:1 Lekeni Lesa eme no kulenga abalwani bakwe basalangane, no kuleka abamupata bafulumuke." 
Psalms68:2 Nga filya fine icushi cisalangana ku mwela, efyo nabo bene ubasalanganye, nga filya fine ipula lisunguluka ku mulilo, efyo na babifi bene balobelele pa cinso cakwa Lesa." 
Psalms68:3 Lelo abololoke bena balesansamuka pa cinso cakwa Lesa, uleke balesekelela no kwanga." 
Psalms68:4 Imbileni Lesa inyimbo shakulumbanya ishina lyakwe, lumbanyeni uwendela pa makumbi, ishina lyakwe ni Yawe, akwangeni pa cinso cakwe." 
Psalms68:5 Lesa e wishi wa bakashiwa, kafwa wa bamukamfwilwa, e Lesa uwaikala mu cifulo cakwe icamushilo." 
Psalms68:6 Eulanga abo balekelesha apakwikala, eukakula abafungwa no kubatwala ukwakuikalila, lelo abasangu bena bekala mu mpanga iyakabisha." 
Psalms68:7 We Lesa ilyo watungulwile abantu bobe, ilyo waendele nabo mu matololo," 
Psalms68:8 icalo calitentele no mulu walosha imfula, pa cinso cobe, we Lesa, we kateeka wa Sinai pa cinso cobe we Lesa, we Lesa wakwa Israeli." 
Psalms68:9 Niwe Lesa uwalokeshe imfula iyingi, wakosha na bantu bobe ilyo banakwike." 
Psalms68:10 Na bantu bobe emo baikele, mu busuma bobe emo wayafwilishe abalanda we Lesa." 
Psalms68:11 Yawe abilikishe ishiwi, na banakashi abengi baile balelisabankanya abati," 
Psalms68:12 “Ala bashamfumu abengi ne fita fyabo nababutuka, na mu nsakwe abanakashi bena baleakana ifitapwa." 
Psalms68:13 Ilyo mwe baume mwaletuusha mu fibumba fya macinka, kwali amapindo ya nkunda ayakupwa na silifa, na masako yayako yabengeshima nga golide.”" 
Psalms68:14 Ilyo Lesa wa maka yonse apasangenye shamfumu mu calo, cali kwati ubunga bwa mfula ubwaponena pa lupili lwa Salimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Ulupili lwa Bashani, bushe nalo lupili lwakwa Lesa? Ulupili lwa Bashani, bushe nalo lwa cilumba?" 
Psalms68:16 Mwe mpili sha cilumba cinshi ico muleshulukila ulupili apo Lesa asalile ulwakuteekapo, ulo Lesa akekalililapo umuyayaya." 
Psalms68:17 Yawe afumine ku Sinai na maceleta imyandamishila, ali na maceleta amakana na makana, aisa mukwikala mu cifulo camushilo." 
Psalms68:18 Ilyo aninine pamulu apasansama ninshi nasenda na bankole abengi imilongo, alepokelela ne fyabupe ku bantu na ku basangu bene, apo pene epo Yawe Lesa akulaikalilila." 
Psalms68:19 Napaalwe na matotelo Lesa uututulako ifyafina, Lesa uutupususha." 
Psalms68:20 Lesa wesu ni Lesa uutupususha, ku Mfumu Yawe ekwaba umwakupusukila ukufuma ku mfwa." 
Psalms68:21 Cine cine Lesa akatobaula imitwe ya balwani bakwe, abantu ababikapofye ukulacita ifyabipa." 
Psalms68:22 Yawe asosa ati, “Ine nkababweshako ukufuma ku Bashani, nkababweshako ukufuma ku matenga ya bemba," 
Psalms68:23 pakuti imwe mukalepita mu mulopa wa balwani benu, ne mbwa shenu shikalemyanga umulopa wabo apo shilefwaila.”" 
Psalms68:24 We Lesa ala bonse balamonako uko balesefya pakukushindika pakukwingisha mu cifulo cobe icamushilo, we Lesa wandi, we Mfumu yandi." 
Psalms68:25 Abakwimba bali pantanshi, abakulisha ifilimba nabakonkapo, pakati napo abakashana balelisha insombo." 
Psalms68:26 Paaleni Lesa na matotelo, mwe lukuta ulukalamba, imbileni Yawe, mwe batuntuka muli Israeli." 
Psalms68:27 Epo bali aba luko ulunono ulwa bena Benjamini ebalebatungulula, elyo pakonka na bacilolo ba bena Yuda mu milongo yabo, na bacilolo ba bena Sebuloni na ba bena Naftali." 
Psalms68:28 Ulange amaka yobe we Lesa, we Lesa langa ubulamba bobe, bulya wabomfeshe pakutulubula kale." 
Psalms68:29 Pa mulandu we Tempele lyobe ilyaba mu Yerusalemu, emo bashamfumu bakulakuletela ifyabupe." 
Psalms68:30 Ukalipile filya fiswango fya mu matete, ukalipile ne mishobo ya benafyalo abenda ibumba nga bacilume wa ŋombe abali ne fiponti, bakasuke abakunakila bonse no kulatula silifa yabo. Salanganya imishobo ya benafyalo iyatemwa ukulwa inkondo." 
Psalms68:31 Inkombe shikafuma ku Egupto, abena Kushi bakaipeela kuli Lesa." 
Psalms68:32 Imbileni Lesa inyimbo mwe shamfumu sha pano isonde, imbeni inyimbo shakulumbanya Imfumu." 
Psalms68:33 Kuli ena uwenda pa mulu wa myulu, iyakale na kale, umfweni kufyo asansula ishiwi ilyamaka." 
Psalms68:34 Mulelondolola ubulumbwa bwa bulamba bwakwa Lesa, ewateeka abena Israeli, na maka yakwe yabela mu mulu." 
Psalms68:35 Walicindama we Lesa mu cifulo cobe icamushilo, Lesa wa bena Israeli, eupeela amaka no bulamba ku bantu bakwe. Lesa apaalwe na matotelo!" 
Psalms69:1 Umpususheko we Lesa, pantu amenshi ine nayafika mu mukoshi." 
Psalms69:2 Naya ndeibila mu lutikiti ulwashika nganshi, na pakunyanta apakosele tapali. Mponene pa menshi ya petenga, na matamba yali mupepi no kunjibisha." 
Psalms69:3 Ninaka ku mulandu wakukuuta, na ku mukoshi nakuma, na menso yandi nayanaka kukulolela Lesa wandi." 
Psalms69:4 Abampata apabula umulandu bafula ukucila pa mushishi wandi uwa ku mutwe. Abalwani bandi ababufi abancusha bantu bakosa, balampatikisha ukubabwesesha ifyo nshaiba." 
Psalms69:5 Niwe waishiba ukutumpa kwandi, we Lesa, ne fyabipa fyandi fyonse walifishiba." 
Psalms69:6 Wileka abakutetekela balengwe insoni pa mulandu wa ine, we Yawe, Lesa umwine wa fita. Wileka abakufwaya bomfwe insoni pa mulandu wa ine, we Lesa wa bena Israeli." 
Psalms69:7 Pantu ni pali iwe epo bansuulila, nalikwata ne nsoni." 
Psalms69:8 Ine nabafye ngo mweni kuli bamunyinane, naba ngo mwinafyalo kuli bamwana mayo." 
Psalms69:9 Icitemwiko cakutemwisha isano lyobe we Lesa ecikanjipaya, umusaalula uwa bakusaalula uponena pali ine." 
Psalms69:10 Ilyo ndila no kuleka ukulya, bena ninshi caba kabepesho akakunsuulilapo." 
Psalms69:11 Ilyo ine nafwala insalu shabulanda, bena ninshi kwamba ukuntumfya." 
Psalms69:12 Abekala pa mpongolo nine bekalila ukwamba, na bacakolwa nine bemba mu nyimbo shabo." 
Psalms69:13 Lelo ine ndepepa kuli iwe we Yawe mu nshita iyalinga umo wingalanga uluse lobe. Pa bukulu bwa citemwiko cobe we Lesa, ulenjasuka umwabela icishinka ce pusukilo lyobe." 
Psalms69:14 Ntulako ku lutikiti, wileka ntotobale no kwibila. Mpokololako ku balwani bandi, na kwitenga lya menshi ayashika." 
Psalms69:15 Wileka amenshi yacitalawe yanjibishe, wileka njibile petenga lya menshi, nangu ukushiikwa mu nindi." 
Psalms69:16 Unjasuke we Yawe, pantu waba ne citemwiko cisuma icishipwa, pilibukila uko ndi pantu walikwatisha uluse." 
Psalms69:17 Wifisa icinso cobe kuli ne mubomfi obe, pantu ine ndi mu bucushi ubukalamba nganshi, unjasuke bwangu." 
Psalms69:18 Umpalamine no kumpusushako, undubuleko ku balwani bandi." 
Psalms69:19 Iwe walishiba ifyo ine nasuulwa, nefyo nasebana no kusaalulwa, na balwani bandi bonse ulabamona." 
Psalms69:20 Insele ine shalindepula umutima, no wakungafwa ine nshakwata. Ine nalekabila ukumona uwakuŋumfwilako ubulanda, lelo tepakumoneka nangu umo, nangu wakuntalalikako, nomba nakalya." 
Psalms69:21 Bambikila ifyabwanga mu fyakulya, banwensha no mwangashi uwakantuka." 
Psalms69:22 Leka amalila yabo yakabonaule, ne fyamalila fyabo fisanguke ifiteyo." 
Psalms69:23 Leka pa menso yabo pafiite fititi pakuti belamona, ne numa shabo shibe ishaongama pe na pe." 
Psalms69:24 Upongolwele pali bena ubukali bobe, uleke ne cipyu cobe ciponene pali bena." 
Psalms69:25 Uleke apo bekala pabe ni pa cibolya, peshala nangu umo uwakwikala mu matenti yabo." 
Psalms69:26 Pantu bena bapimpilafye ukulacusha abo wafulula kale, no kukalifya ifilaso fya abo wacena kale." 
Psalms69:27 Ubakande umukonkanina ububi bwabo, kabili wikwatilapo nangu umo uluse." 
Psalms69:28 Uleke na mashina yabo yafuutwe mu citabo cabumi, yekasangwa mulya mwalembwa amashina ya bololoke." 
Psalms69:29 Lelo ine ndi mulanda kabili ndecula, uleke ipusukilo lyobe limpokololeko we Lesa." 
Psalms69:30 Ine nakulalumbanya ishina lyakwa Lesa mu lwimbo, nakulalumbilisha ubulamba bwakwe pakumutotela." 
Psalms69:31 Pantu ici cena kuti casekesha Yawe, ukucila na pa ŋombe iyamaka, ukucilafye na pali cilume wa ŋombe uwa nsengo na mabondo." 
Psalms69:32 Lekeni abalanda baimwene no kusansamuka, na mwe bafwaya Lesa, lekeni imitima yenu ipuputulwe!" 
Psalms69:33 Pantu Yawe alomfwa ukulila kwa balanda, kabili tasuusha abantu bakwe abali muli bunkole." 
Psalms69:34 Lekeni umulu ne sonde fyonse fimulumbanye, pamo na babemba elyo na fyonse ifyaikalamo." 
Psalms69:35 Pantu Lesa akapususha Sioni, no kukuula cipya cipya imisumba ya mu Yuda. Elyo na bantu bakwe bakapoka icalo no kwikalamo," 
Psalms69:36 na bana ba babomfi bakwe ebakapyanamo, na bonse abatemwa ishina lyakwe ebakekalamo." 
Psalms70:1 We Lesa, wise bwangu umpokololeko, wendeshe ukwisa ngafwa we Yawe!" 
Psalms70:2 Uleke bonse abafwaya ukunjipaya basebane na mano yabo yabapele. Na bonse abafwaisha ukuti ngonaike, ubabweseshemo abasebana." 
Psalms70:3 Uleke abatila, “Eya, eya!” babwelelemo ne nsoni nashibekata." 
Psalms70:4 Uleke bonse abakufwaya basekelele no kusansamuka, na bonse abatemwa ipusukilo lyobe balesosa pe ati, “Lesa asumbulwe!”" 
Psalms70:5 Lelo ine ndi mulanda kabili umupina, shi wingesa bwangu we Lesa! Niwe kafwa wandi, kabili kapokolola wandi, we Yawe ala wikokola." 
Psalms71:1 Ine nafisama muli iwe, we Yawe, wileka nengwe insoni." 
Psalms71:2 Mu bulungami bobe undubule no kumpokolola, teya amatwi yobe kuli ine elyo umpusushe." 
Psalms71:3 Ube kuli ine icilibwe cakuubamo ukwakubutukila lyonse. Niwe wakonkomesha ukumpususha, pantu niwe cilibwe candi ne linga lyandi." 
Psalms71:4 Mpokololako we Lesa wandi ukufuma ku minwe ya bantu babifi, ukufuma mu lupato lwa bankalwe ababipisha." 
Psalms71:5 Ine, niwe natetekela we Mfumu, we Yawe niwe nasuminamo ukufuma ku bwaice bwandi." 
Psalms71:6 Ine niwe nashintamo umutima ukutulafye apo nafyalilwa, niwe wasuminishe ukufyalwa kwandi ukufuma munda muli mayo, ine niwe nakulalumbanya pe na pe." 
Psalms71:7 Abantu abengi balapapa nga bamona, lelo ine niwe nafisamamo we wabulamba bwine bwine." 
Psalms71:8 Akanwa kandi keswilemofye amalumbo, no kulumbilisha ubucindami bobe akasuba konse." 
Psalms71:9 Wikantamfula ilyo ine nkakota, nangu ukundekelesha ilyo amaka yakapwa." 
Psalms71:10 Abalwani bandi lyonse balenyamba, abo abafwaya ukunjipaya nabo balapandishanya amano." 
Psalms71:11 Bena batila, “Ala Lesa namulekelesha, natumusupile uleke tumwikate, pantu takuli nelyo umo uwakumupokolola.”" 
Psalms71:12 Wiba kutali we Lesa, we Lesa wandi, endesha mukwisa ntuula." 
Psalms71:13 Uleke abampata balengwe nsoni kabili ubonaule, leka abafwaya ukucita ifibi pali ine basuulwe kabili basebane." 
Psalms71:14 Lelo ine lyonsefye niwe nakulacetekela, kabili ndi nokucililako ukukulumbanya." 
Psalms71:15 Ine nakulalanda palwa bulungami bobe, nakulalanda pa kupususha kobe akasuba konse, nangu ine nshafikapo ukwishiba ubwingi bwa fyonse." 
Psalms71:16 Ndeisa mukulumbanya ifyo wacita we Mfumu Yawe, ndelumbanya imilimo ya bulungami bobe bweka." 
Psalms71:17 Niwe wamfundisha ukufuma ku bwaice bwandi, we Lesa, na nombaline ncili ndelanda pa milimo yobe iyakupapa." 
Psalms71:18 Wikandekelesha we Lesa ilyo nkakota no kukwata imfwi, mpaka nkalumbilishe ubulamba bobe ku nkulo na imbi, na maka yobe ku bakesa kuntanshi." 
Psalms71:19 Ubulungami bobe na maka yobe fyafika na ku mulu, we Lesa, we wacita ifisungusho. Ni nani uwingaba nga iwe, we Lesa?" 
Psalms71:20 Nelyo walenga ukuti ine njishibe amasakamiko na macushi ayengi, niwe uli nokumpuputula nakabili, niwe kabili ukanenga ukuba uwamweo ukufuma ku milomo ya cilindi." 
Psalms71:21 Niwe uli nokuncindamika, kabili niwe uli nokuntalalikako." 
Psalms71:22 Ine nakulakulumbila peseese pa cishinka cobe we Lesa wandi. Pa nsango yandi epo nakulakwimbila inyimbo, we Wamushilo uwa mu Israeli." 
Psalms71:23 Akanwa kandi kakulaaula akapundu ilyo nakulakwimbila amalumbo, pakukulumba ine neo wapususha." 
Psalms71:24 Akasuba konse ine nakulalanda pa fyabulungami ifyo wabomba, pantu bonse abalefwaya ukunjipaya walibalenga insoni no kubafulunganya." 
Psalms72:1 Wingapeela imfumu amano ayakupingula nga iwe, we Lesa, no bulungami bobe ku mwana wa mfumu." 
Psalms72:2 Pakuti akalepingula abantu bobe mu bulungami, no kupingula abalanda mu mulinganya." 
Psalms72:3 Impili shikaleta ubukankala ku bantu, no tupili tukaleta ifisabo ifyabulungami." 
Psalms72:4 Akalapokololako abalanda pakati ka bantu, no kupususha abana ba balanda, elyo nokukanda abalebacusha." 
Psalms72:5 Akabelelela pa nshita yonse ilyo akasuba no mweshi fikabako, umwakonkanina inkulo." 
Psalms72:6 Uleke imfumu ilecita nga filya imfula iloka mu mabala, ngo kumima kwa mfula iyilelokela pa mushili." 
Psalms72:7 Mu nshiku shakwe uleke abalungami bakashuke, ne cibote cikabepo inshita yonse, ukushinta apo umweshi ukalekela ukubapo." 
Psalms72:8 Imfumu ikateeka ukufuma kuli bemba umo ukufika kuli bemba munankwe, ukufuma ku mumana ukuya fika no kwapela isonde." 
Psalms72:9 Ne mitundu ya bantu abaikala mu matololo bakulafukamina apo ili, na balwani baiko bakulamyanga ulukungu." 
Psalms72:10 Imfumu sha mu calo ca Tashishi, ne sha mu fyalo fya ku lulamba lwa bemba, shakulaleta umutuulo kuli yena. Imfumu sha mu calo Sheba na Seba, shakulaleta ifyabupe kuli yena." 
Psalms72:11 Imfumu shonse shakulaifukamina, na bantu ba mishobo yonse bakulaibombela." 
Psalms72:12 Pantu imfumu eikalapokolola abalanda abakuuta mutuule, kumo kwine na bapina abashakwata bakubasunga." 
Psalms72:13 Imbulwamaka na balanda yakulabakwatila uluse, no kulayafwilishako abantu abakabila ukupusuka ku mfwa." 
Psalms72:14 Yakulabapokololako ku babulwi na bamucusha, pantu umulopa wabo waba uwacindama pa cinso caiko." 
Psalms72:15 Imfumu ya mu calo naileenda umutende! Na bantu baleituula golide wa ku Sheba! Kabili abantu baleipepelafye inshita shonse, ne paalo lyakwa Lesa lileba pali yena pe." 
Psalms72:16 Lekeni mu calo caiko muleba ifyakulya, ne fisabo filekupa na mu mpili shine. Ifisabo filelelema nge fya mu Lebanoni, mu misumba namo abantu bafulishemo, bapake nge cani ca mu mpanga." 
Psalms72:17 Lekeni ishina lyaiko libeko pe na pe, no lulumbi lwaiko lubelelele nga kasuba. Abantu ba mishobo yonse bakapaalilwa muli yena, na bantu bonse bakalaiita ati uwapaalwa." 
Psalms72:18 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, ena ekafye eucita ifintu ifyakupapusha." 
Psalms72:19 Ishina lyakwe ilyacindama lipaalwe na matotelo pe, no bucindami bwakwe bukumane isonde lyonse, Ameni kabili ameni." 
Psalms72:20 Pano epapwila amapepo yakwa Davidi mwana Yese. 
Psalms73:1 Cine cine, Lesa musuma ku bena Israeli, ku bantu ababa ne mitima iyakaele." 
Psalms73:2 Lelo ine nalifye mupepi no kuwa, amakasa yandi yapene ukushelemuka." 
Psalms73:3 Ine nalekumbwa abafikansa, pakumona ukuti ababifi ebali abakankala." 
Psalms73:4 Bena tabakwata icibacusha, imibili yabo yabumi, kabili iyamaka." 
Psalms73:5 Tabacula nga filya ficula abantu bambi nakalya, tabakwata ne fyakubasakamika, nga filya abantu bambi bakwatako." 
Psalms73:6 Eico kanshi bena bafwala icilumba ngo bulungu bwa mu mukoshi, ne fyongofye bena e laya bafwala." 
Psalms73:7 Mu mitima yabo iyabipisha emufuma ifyabubifi, ifyakutontonkanya fya mu mitima yabo ifibi tafyakwata impela." 
Psalms73:8 Bena balatumfya abanabo no kusosa ifibi, baba ne filumba, ne mitima yakucusha abantu bambi." 
Psalms73:9 Pa tunwa twabo balanda ifyakupontela umulu, kabili indimi shabo shilanda ifyakubepaika aba pano isonde." 
Psalms73:10 Cilenga na bantu babo ukwalukila uko bali, no kwamba ukusumina ifyo balebeba." 
Psalms73:11 Bena basosa abati, “Bushe Lesa kuti aishiba shani?” “Bushe Lesa Mukulu kuti aba uwakwishiba?”" 
Psalms73:12 Ifi efyaba abantu babifi, tabasakamana nelyo cimo, bena lyonse bakabilafye ukunonka." 
Psalms73:13 Mu cine ine njicushafye pakusunga umutima wandi uwasanguluka, kabili naicushafye pakulasamba iminwe yandi mukwenda uwakaele" 
Psalms73:14 Ndi muntu uucula akasuba konse, kabili umuntu uusalapulwa cila kacelo." 
Psalms73:15 Ntila nati, “Kanande ngomo balya balandila,” nga nalyalukile abana bobe." 
Psalms73:16 Eico ine naeseshe na maka ukuti njishibe umo cilolele, nomba cali icayafya kuli ine." 
Psalms73:17 Mpaka ilyo naingile mu cifulo camushilo icakwa Lesa, elyo naishiba bwino impela yabo." 
Psalms73:18 Cine cine umwatelela emo wababika, niwe ubakunkisha pakuya mukuloba." 
Psalms73:19 Yangu bapumikishiwa pakuloba, umwensofye wabo eubonaula." 
Psalms73:20 We Yawe ala bapwa, nge ciloto filya cipwa ilyo umuntu abuuka, efyo ukasuula na ku cimpashanya cabo." 
Psalms73:21 Ilyo umutima wandi waiketwe ubulanda, no mupashi wandi walicushiwe nganshi," 
Psalms73:22 nayalwike uwabula amano kabili uushaishiba, na pa cinso cobe nalifye nge nama ya mpanga." 
Psalms73:23 Lelo lyonsefye niwe tuba nobe, kabili lyonse niwe unjikatililako no kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo." 
Psalms73:24 Amano yobe eyantungulula, na pakulekelesha ukampokelela mu bucindami bobe." 
Psalms73:25 Nga ni nani umbi nakwata mu mulu ukucila pali iwe? Na pano isonde tapaba uo ningafwaya ukucila pali iwe. 
Psalms73:26 Umubili wandi no mutima wandi kuti fyatompoka, lelo we Lesa wandi niwe maka ya mutima wandi, kabili icakaniko candi ica pe na pe." 
Psalms73:27 Bonse abakukaana bali nokuloba, ulalofya bonse abakaana icishinka cobe." 
Psalms73:28 Lelo ine nalitemwa ukupalamina kuli Lesa, nalicita ukuti we Mfumu Yawe niwe ube icubo candi, pakuti cinenge no kulanda pa ficitwa fyobe fyonse." 
Psalms74:1 Bushe cinshi calenga ukuti utukaanininefye umuyayaya, we Lesa? Bushe cinshi calenga ubukali bobe ukulashulumukila pa mulongo wa mpaanga sha mukuni obe?" 
Psalms74:2 Ibukisha ulukuta lobe, ulo we mwine waisalile kalefye, abantu abo walubwile pakuti baleba umukowa wa cishilano cobe, ibukisha no lupili lwa Sioni ulo waleikalapo." 
Psalms74:3 Wende wise uimwene ubonaushi bwa lyonse, ifyo abalwani besu baonaula ifintu fyonse mu cifulo cobe icamushilo." 
Psalms74:4 Abalwani balebuluma mu cifulo camushilo umo watukumanishe, babika ne fishibilo fya maka yabo nga ifyakubela." 
Psalms74:5 Balemonekafye nga bantu abemishe amasembe ayakuwishishako iteshi lya fimuti. 
Psalms74:6 Balaonaula imbao sha ku fibumba, ukubomfya amasembe ne nondo." 
Psalms74:7 Icifulo cobe icamushilo naboca ku mulilo ukufikafye na panshi no kukowesha incende apakwikala Ishina lyobe. 
Psalms74:8 Mu mitima yabo balesosa nokuti, “Tuli nokulofyafye bonse,” naboca ne fifulo fyonse ifyakupepelamo Lesa mu calo conse." 
Psalms74:9 Nomba takwaba ne fishibilo fyacipeshamano, takuli bakasesema abashele, kabili tapali nelyo umo uwaishiba ici cintu uko cikapelela." 
Psalms74:10 Bushe ni lilali abalwani bakaleka umusebanya kuli iwe we Lesa? Bushe bakulapontelafye ishina lyobe pe? 
Psalms74:11 Cinshi ico wakaanina ukuti utupokololeko na maka ya kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo. Fumya no kuboko kobe pa cifuba cobe elyo ubonaule bonse. 
Psalms74:12 Lelo we Lesa mukulu niwe mfumu yandi ukufumafye na kale, niwe uleta ipusukilo pano pesonde." 
Psalms74:13 Ni ku bulamba bobefye wayakanishishe bemba pakati, no konaula imitwe ya balwani ku menshi ya muli bemba." 
Psalms74:14 Niwe waonawile umutwe wa cishimweshimwe ci Lefiatani, wapeela ne citumbi ukuba icakulya ku fibumbwa fya mu matololo." 
Psalms74:15 Niwe walengele utumfukumfuku ukwisuka twalapisha imilonga, niwe wakamishe imimana iyikalamba iyishikama lyonse." 
Psalms74:16 Niwe walenga ukuti kuleba akasuba no bushiku, niwe wabika akasuba no mweshi mu ncende shafiko." 
Psalms74:17 Niwe wapakanya imipaka yonse iya pano isonde, niwe uletapo ulusuba na mainsa." 
Psalms74:18 Lelo kwena uleibukisha imiponto ya balwani bobe we Yawe, nefyo abapumbu ba bantu basaalula ishina lyobe." 
Psalms74:19 Wiposa mweo wa uo watemwa ku fiswango, wilalaba ne myeo ya balanda bobe pe." 
Psalms74:20 Ibukisha icipangano ico wapangene na ifwe, pantu ubulwi buli mu ncende shonse ishabamo imisango yabipa." 
Psalms74:21 Wileka abantu abo balecusha babwelelemo ne nsoni, uleke abapina na balanda balelumbanya ishina lyobe." 
Psalms74:22 Ima we Lesa wise uilandile we mwine, wibukishe nokuti abapumbu ebakusaalula lyonse." 
Psalms74:23 Ibukisha ifyo abalwani bobe baleotauka, icongo ca bamwansakabinga cilecililakofye." 
Psalms75:1 Twakutotela we Lesa, twakutotela, tulekulumbilisha peshina lyobe ilyaba mupepi, tuleshimika ne fintu fyakupapa ifyo wacita." 
Psalms75:2 Lesa alanda ati, “Pa nshita iyo ine nkapima, epo ine nkapingwilapo no mulinganya." 
Psalms75:3 Ilyo icalo nabekalamo bonse fyatenkana, nine nkacikatilila ku maka yandi." 
Psalms75:4 Abafilumba ine ndabeba ukuti, ‘Mwilaitakisha,’ ababi nabo ndabeba ukuti, ‘Muleke amataki." 
Psalms75:5 Mwicita ifyamataki ku wa mu mulu, muleke no kulalanda ifyakumupontela.’”" 
Psalms75:6 Pantu ukusumbulwa takufuma ku kabanga nangu ku masamba, kabili takufuma ku matololo nangu ku mpili kwisa," 
Psalms75:7 lelo ni Lesa eupingula, eucindamika bamo no kucefya bambi." 
Psalms75:8 Yawe ali no lukombo mu minwe ulwaisulamo umwangashi uwakantuka, kabili uwalula nganshi. Ilyo alupongolola, na babi bonse pano calo bali nokunwamo, bafipilile na mashi." 
Psalms75:9 Lelo ine nshakatale ndeka ukulumbanya Lesa wakwa Yakobo, nkalamwimbila inyimbo shakumulumbanya." 
Psalms75:10 Ine nkaputula insengo sha babifi bonse, lelo insengo sha bololoke shikasumbulwa." 
Psalms76:1 Lesa alishibikwa nganshi mu calo ca Yuda, kabili ishina lyakwe lyalilumbuka nganshi mu calo ca Israeli." 
Psalms76:2 Itenti lyakwe lyaba mu Salemu, no kwikala ekala mu lupili lwa Sioni." 
Psalms76:3 Palya pene epo afunawile imifwi iyalebengeshima, ne nkwela, ne mpanga pamo pene ne fyanso fimbi ifyabulwi." 
Psalms76:4 Yangu ifyo wacindamisha we Lesa, ukucila pa mpili ishaisulamo inama." 
Psalms76:5 Abashilika babo abaswangana, balibapoka ifitapwa fyabo, nomba balalafye utulo twa mfwa, kabili tapashala nangu umo uwakubomfya ifyanso fyakwe." 
Psalms76:6 Ilyo wakalipe we Lesa wakwa Yakobo, bakabalwe babo pamo na baninapo elyo bafwile." 
Psalms76:7 Niwe weka uwakutiinisha. Bushe nani engashanshako nga wakalipa? 
Psalms76:8 Wapingwile ukufuma ku mulu, ne calo catutuma catalala na tondolo," 
Psalms76:9 ilyo waiminine kukuputula umulandu, we Lesa, pakupusushako abo bacusha pano isonde." 
Psalms76:10 Cine cine icipyu cobe pa bantu ecilenga ukuti balekulumbanya, abapusuka ku bukali bobe balasungwa." 
Psalms76:11 Pangeni ifilayo kuli Yawe Lesa wenu no kufifikilisha, lekeni ifyalo fyonse ifina mupalamano filete ifyabupe kuli Umo uwalinga ukutiinwa." 
Psalms76:12 Pantu ena alacefya bakateeka bafilumba, alatiinwa ku shamfumu sha pano isonde." 
Psalms77:1 Ndilila kuli Lesa ukuti angafwe, ndalila ifilamba pakuti omfwe." 
Psalms77:2 Ilyo nali mu bwafya nafwaile Imfumu, ubushiku bonsefye ine naimishe amaboko yandi ukwabula ukunaka, lelo umutima wandi wena wafililwe ukutalala." 
Psalms77:3 Umutima wandi watusaile ilyo nakwibukishe we Lesa, naleisosha mu mutima, no kwamba ukutompoka." 
Psalms77:4 Walengele amenso yandi ukwikala yalelolesha, nali uwasakamana nganshi icakuti nafilwa no kulanda." 
Psalms77:5 Natontonkanya pa nshiku shakale, no kwibukisha imyaka ya kunuma." 
Psalms77:6 Ndebukisha ulwimbo naleimba ubushiku, ninshi umutima wandi uleisosha no kwipusha nati," 
Psalms77:7 “Bushe Yawe ali nokundekeleshafye fino fine umuyayaya? Bushe takabwekeshepo ukumbelela uluse? 
Psalms77:8 Bushe emukuti naleka ukulantemwa umuyayaya? Bushe ifyo alaile nafileka umwabela inshita shonse? 
Psalms77:9 Bushe Lesa naleka ukuba ne cikuku? Bushe ubukali ebumulesha ukukanakwata uluse?” 
Psalms77:10 Elyo natontonkanya nati, “Ili lyena nalailishanya ukuti, ukuboko kwakwa Lesa Mukulu nakunakuka.”" 
Psalms77:11 Ine nakulaibukisha ifyakupapa fyonse ifyo wacita we Yawe, nakulaibukisha ne fipeshamano fyonse ifyakale." 
Psalms77:12 Nakulatontonkanya pali fyonse ifyo wacita, no kupituluka mu milimo yobe yonse." 
Psalms77:13 Inshila shobe shamushilo, we Lesa, takwaba Lesa na umbi uwacindama nga iwe." 
Psalms77:14 Niwe Lesa uucita ifipeshamano, uwalanga abantu ubulamba bobe." 
Psalms77:15 Ku kuboko kobe ukwamaka eko walubwile abantu bobe, abana bakwa Yakobo na bamwana Yosefu." 
Psalms77:16 Amenshi yalitiinine ilyo yakumwene we Lesa, na mu matenga panshi mwalatenta." 
Psalms77:17 Amakumbi yafumfumwine imfula, ne nkuba yalapanta, ne myele ya nkuba yalabyatafye monse monse." 
Psalms77:18 Inkuba yalapanta no kumfwika ninshi kuli icimwela, no kubyata kwa mwele wa nkuba kwasanika pesonde ponse, ne calo casunkana no kulatenta." 
Psalms77:19 Walyendele muli bemba, wayabuka bemba mukalamba uwashika nganshi, ne nkasa umo walenyanta teshakumoneka nakalya." 
Psalms77:20 Ee, walitungulwile abantu bobe ngo mukuni wa mpaanga, ukupitila mu butungulushi bwakwa Mose na Aroni." 
Psalms78:1 Mwe bantu bandi kutikeni ku mafundisho yandi, muteye amatwi kufyo ndelanda." 
Psalms78:2 Ine nakulalandila mu milumbe, no kumwebako ubwile bwayako ubwa fintu fyafiswa ifyakale." 
Psalms78:3 Palwa fintu ifyo fwe bene twaishiba, nefyo twayumfwilile, nefyo ifikolwe fyesu fyatushimikilako." 
Psalms78:4 Tatwakulafisa ifi fintu ku bana iyoo. Tuli nokwebako inkulo ikakonkapo palwa bulamba bwakwa Lesa, palwa micitile yakwe iyamaka, na palwa fintu ifyakupapusha ifyo acita." 
Psalms78:5 Ewapeele Yakobo amafunde, na kuli Israeli ifipope. Ewakonkomeshe ifikolwe fyesu, ukulafunda abana babo amafunde yakwe." 
Psalms78:6 Pakuti abakulakonkapo nabo bafishiba, abana abakafyalwa ku ntanshi yabo, elyo nabo bakalefunda abana babo." 
Psalms78:7 Epakuti bakaletetekela Lesa, bekalalaba nefyo acita, lelo bakalenakila na mafunde yakwe." 
Psalms78:8 Nokuti bekaba nga bashibo, abalesangukila Lesa no kumutalamina, inkulo ya bantu abashatekele imitima, ne myeo yabo tayali na cishinka kuli Lesa." 
Psalms78:9 Abena Efulemu nelyo baipangeshe amata ne mifwi, balifulumwike pa bushiku bwa bulwi." 
Psalms78:10 Tabasungile icipangano cakwa Lesa, bakeene no kunakila amafunde yakwe." 
Psalms78:11 Balilabile na fyonse ifyo acita, balaba ne fipeshamano fyonse abalangile." 
Psalms78:12 Lesa alicitile ifipeshamano pa cinso ca fikolwe fyabo, mu calo ca Egupto, mu mpanga ya Soani." 
Psalms78:13 Alyakenye bemba pakati epo abapisha, aimike amenshi nge fibumba." 
Psalms78:14 Mu nshita sha kasuba alebatungulwila kwikumbi, elyo mu nshita ya bushiku bonse alebatungulwila ku ntumba ya mulilo." 
Psalms78:15 Alepawile ifimabwe ifyasansuka mu matololo, no kubapeela amenshi yakunwa ayengi ngaya muli bemba."
