Psalms78:16 Alilengele umulonga wa menshi ukufuma ku cilibwe, alenga na menshi ukulapita nge mimana." 
Psalms78:17 Lelo bena babikilepofye ukulabifya kuli ena, no kulasangukila Lesa Mukulu mu matololo." 
Psalms78:18 Basukile bayamba ukulaesha Lesa, pakumulomba icakulya ico balekumbwa." 
Psalms78:19 Bayamba no kuilishanya palwakwa Lesa abati, “Bushe Lesa kuti atupeela icakulya muno mu matololo?" 
Psalms78:20 Ee cine cine Lesa alyumine pa cilibwe, na menshi yalafumfumuka, yapanga no mulonga wa menshi. Lelo bushe no umukate kuti atupeela, atupeela ne nama ifwe fwe bantu bakwe?”" 
Psalms78:21 Kanshi Yawe nao epakufulwa nganshi pakumfwa imilandile yabo, aletela na Yakobo ulubingu lwa mulilo, alabilimafye ku cipyu icakufulilwa Israeli." 
Psalms78:22 Pantu bena tabasumine Lesa, tabaletetekela nokuti Lesa alikwata amaka yakubapususha." 
Psalms78:23 Lelo Lesa akonkomesha amakumbi ya mu lwelele, aisula ne fiibi fya mu mulu." 
Psalms78:24 Epakubafumfumwina maana wakulya, ne ŋanu sha mu mulu abapeela." 
Psalms78:25 Kanshi abantu nabo epakulya umukate wa bamalaika, Lesa abapeele ifyakulya ifingi ifyakuti baikuta." 
Psalms78:26 Elyo aimya umwela ku kabanga nao walapupa, na ku maka yakwe aleta no mwela wa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Psalms78:27 Nao wabaletela umunani wa nama uwingi kwati lukungu ku bwingi, ifyuni ifipupuka fyafula ngo musensenga wa kuli bemba." 
Psalms78:28 Alenga fyaisa kupa mpanga yonse pa nsakwe shabo, ukushinguluka amatenti yabo." 
Psalms78:29 Abantu nabo epakulalya ukucilapo, pantu Lesa alibapeele fyonse ifyo balekumbwa." 
Psalms78:30 Nomba pa nshita bacili balelya, ninshi no kwikuta tabalaikuta ifyakulya balekumbwa," 
Psalms78:31 Ubukali bwakwa Lesa bwali bemine, aipayapo abantu bamo ababulamba, no kuwisha abalumendo ba bena Israeli." 
Psalms78:32 Nangu kwena Lesa alebacitila fyonse ifi, batwalililafye ukulabifya, nangu alecita ne fipeshamano, bena tabasumine nakalya." 
Psalms78:33 Kanshi nao epakupwisha inshiku sha bumi bwabo mukuculafye, ne myaka yabo mukusamikwa." 
Psalms78:34 Ilyo aipeyepo bamo, elyo babwelele uko ali, icakuti balapila bayamba no kumupepa." 
Psalms78:35 Elyo baibukisha ukuti ni Lesa e cilibwe cabo, nokuti kanshi Lesa Mukulu e Mulubushi wabo." 
Psalms78:36 Lelo utunwa twabo twaiswilemo amashiwi yakusembeleka, ne milandile yabo yonse yalimofye ubufi." 
Psalms78:37 Tabalemupetamina nakalya, tabalesunga ne cipangano ico bapangene nankwe." 
Psalms78:38 Lelo Lesa ena alebelelako uluse abantu bakwe, alefuuta ububi bwabo, kabili tabalofeshe iyoo. Imiku iyingi alefumyapo ukufulwa, no kubwesha umutima." 
Psalms78:39 Ena aleibukisha ukuti balya bantufye, babafye ngo mupu uuya no kubwela iyoo." 
Psalms78:40 Pa mikufye iyingi balesangukila Lesa mu matololo, no kulamucusha mulya mwine." 
Psalms78:41 Libili libili balesonsomba Lesa, no kulenga Uwamushilo wakwa Israeli afulwe." 
Psalms78:42 Abantu balilabile ubulamba bwakwe ubushaikulila, balabile ne nshita intu abalubulwilepo ku balwani babo." 
Psalms78:43 Balabile ne finjelengwe ifyamaka ne fipeshamano acitile, ilyo bali mu citungu ca Soani icaba mu Egupto." 
Psalms78:44 Amenshi mu mimana yabo ayasangwile umulopa, pakuti abena Egupto belanwamo amenshi mu tumana twabo." 
Psalms78:45 Abatumina no tushembele, nato twalabasumaula, abatumina ne fyula, nafyo fyabonaula." 
Psalms78:46 Atuma amapantankola kukulya ifisabo fyabo, na makanta kukonaula amabala yabo." 
Psalms78:47 Aonaula ne myangashi yabo ku mfula yacitalawe, ne mikunyu yabo yapya ku mpepo." 
Psalms78:48 Aipaya ne fitekwa fyabo ku mfula yacitalawe iya mabwe, ne mikuni yabo ku nkuba." 
Psalms78:49 Apongolwela pali bena icifukushi ca bukali bwakwe, icipyu, ukufulwa elyo na macushi, abaletela na bamalaika wabonaushi" 
Psalms78:50 Apekenye apakwenda ubukali bwakwe, aleka no kubalangulukilako, abapeela na ku mfwa." 
Psalms78:51 Aipeye na bana babo abaume amabeli, aba mu ndupwa shonse isha mu Egupto, abana babo abafyalilwe mu nsakwe shakwa Hamu, ninshi bacili na maka ya bulumendo." 
Psalms78:52 Lelo Lesa epakwimya abantu bakwe ngo mukuni wa mpaanga, alashitungulula pakushipisha mu matololo." 
Psalms78:53 Abasenda bwino bwino, bakaana no kukwata umwenso, lelo abalwani babo bena baibila muli bemba." 
Psalms78:54 Asuka abafisha mu calo cakwe icamushilo, icalo ca mpili ico umwine acimfishe." 
Psalms78:55 Atamfyamo abaleikalamo ilyo abantu bakwe baleyamo, ayakanya ne nko sha bena Israeli icalo nge cishilano cabo, aleka nokuti baleikala mu mayanda yabo." 
Psalms78:56 Nomba bakaana ukunakila Lesa, bapondokela Lesa Mukulu, bafilwa no kusunga amafunde yakwe." 
Psalms78:57 Bamusangukila baleka no kumupetamina, nga filya fine ifikolwe fyabo fyacitile, baba ngo buta ubushaololoka." 
Psalms78:58 Bamukalifya umutima palwa ncende ishakupepelamo isho bacindika, no kumulenga ukuba no bufuba pa mulandu wa tulubi twabo." 
Psalms78:59 Ilyo Lesa aumfwile afulwa nganshi, asuka aluula abena Israeli." 
Psalms78:60 Afuma na mwi Tenti lyakwe ilyali ku Shilo, ilyo aleikalamo pakati ka bantu." 
Psalms78:61 Aleka abalwani baisa tapa Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, apalemonekela amaka yakwe no bucindami bwakwe." 
Psalms78:62 Epakufulilwa abantu bakwe nganshi, aleka na balwani babo baisa ipaya aba cishilano cakwe." 
Psalms78:63 Abalumendo babo bafwa ku mulilo na bakuupa abakashana babula. 
Psalms78:64 Bashimapepo babo babepaya ku lupanga, icakuti bamukamfwilwa babo bafilwa ukuloosha." 
Psalms78:65 Elyo Yawe aima ngo wafuma mu tulo, filya umuntu ema uunwene umwangashi." 
Psalms78:66 Apuma na balwani nabo babwelelamo, no kucimba balala bacimba, ne nsoni shabekata ishamuyayaya." 
Psalms78:67 Lyena, asuula insakwe sha bamwana Yosefu, akaana no kusala uluko lwakwa Efulemu." 
Psalms78:68 Lelo asalapo uluko lwakwa Yuda, no lupili lwa Sioni ulo atemenwe nganshi." 
Psalms78:69 Epo aya kuula ne ŋanda yakwe iyamushilo, elyo nayo aikuula iyitali ukuyafye na mu mulu, aikosha nge sonde pakuti ikabe iyakubelelela." 
Psalms78:70 Elyo asala umubomfi wakwe Davidi, ukuya mufumya pa mulimo wakucema impaanga." 
Psalms78:71 Amufumya kukucema utwana twa mpaanga, mpaka aba ni kacema wa bantu bakwe Yakobo, amucita imfumu ya Israeli icishilano cakwe." 
Psalms78:72 Nao Davidi epakubika umutima wacishinka pakucema abantu, no kulabatungululafye bwino na maboko yamucetekanya." 
Psalms79:1 We Lesa, ala abenafyalo nabasansa icalo ca bantu bobe, nabakowesha ne Tempele lyobe ilyamushilo, nababongolola no musumba wa Yerusalemu." 
Psalms79:2 Bapeele ifitumbi fya bantu bobe ku fyuni pakuti filelya, bafipeela na ku finama fya mu mpanga nafyo filelya." 
Psalms79:3 Nabasumya umulopa wa bantu nga menshi ukushinguluka Yerusalemu, tapashele nangu umo uwakushiika ifitumbi fya banankwe." 
Psalms79:4 Natuba abasebana ku bena mupalamano besu, baletuseka no kutuwela." 
Psalms79:5 Bushe kufika lilali we Yawe? Uli nokwikala uwafulwa inshita yonse? Bushe kufika lilali ubufuba bobe bwakulabilima ngo mulilo ku bukali? 
Psalms79:6 Shifulilwa abantu ba mishobo abashikupepa, elyo ne shamfumu ishishiita peshina lyobe," 
Psalms79:7 pantu nabepaulula Yakobo, nabonaula ne calo cakwe." 
Psalms79:8 Witubika pakukandwa pa bubifi bwa fikolwe fyesu, ifwe twalombafye ukuti, “Utubelele uluse, mukwangufyanya utukumanye, pantu ifwe amano nayapela.”" 
Psalms79:9 Sotwafweko we Lesa, we Mupusushi wesu, pakuti ishina lyobe licindamikwe, utupokololeko no kulatwelela ububifi bwesu, pa mulandu we shina lyobe." 
Psalms79:10 Nga cinshi imishobo ingalasosela aiti “Nga Lesa wabo ali kwi?” Kanshi leka tumoneko uko ulekanda imishobo, pa mulandu wakwipaulula ababomfi bobe." 
Psalms79:11 Uleke ukulila kwa bafungwa kumfwike kuli iwe, ku bulamba bobe upokolole abo bapingula ukwipaya." 
Psalms79:12 We Yawe umusaalula onse uo abena mupalamano besu bakucitila, leka ubabwelele mu ceni cabo imiku cine lubali." 
Psalms79:13 Elyo ifwe fwe bantu bobe, fwe mukuni wa bucemi bobe, twakulakutotela pe na pe, ukufuma ku nkulo ukufika ku nkulo ibiye twakulalondolola amalumbo yobe." 
Psalms80:1 We mucemi wa bena Israeli wingatumfwa, we utungulula Yosefu ngo mukuni wa mpaanga, we waikala pakati ka bakerubi." 
Psalms80:2 Uisokolole ku nko sha bena Efulemu, abena Benjamini na bena Manase, ulange ubulamba bobe no kwisa tupokololako." 
Psalms80:3 Utubwekeshe mufyo twali we Yawe, lenga icinso cobe ciloleshe luse luse pali ifwe pakuti tupusuke." 
Psalms80:4 We Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, bushe uli nokufika lilali ukwikala uwakalipa nelyo abantu bobe balekupepa?" 
Psalms80:5 Amacushi e cakulya ico wabapeela ukulalya, ulukombo umwaba ifilamba elo wabapeela ukulanwamo." 
Psalms80:6 Kabili walenga na bena mupalamano besu baleumanina icalo cesu, na balwani besu baletuseka." 
Psalms80:7 Utubweseshe mufyo twali we Lesa umwine wa fita, lenga icinso cobe ciloleshe luse luse pali ifwe pakuti tupusuke." 
Psalms80:8 Niwe walimbwile umwangashi mu Egupto, waisa tamfya abantu ba mishobo mu calo cabo, emo waisa ulimba." 
Psalms80:9 Walautungwila pakuti ulekula bwino, ne mishila yauko yaya bwino panshi, elyo wakumana icalo conse." 
Psalms80:10 Icintelelwe ca mwangashi calakupa pa mulu wa mpili, wakupa ne misambo ya fimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda." 
Psalms80:11 Imisambo yauko yayandalala ukufika kuli Bemba, no kuya fikafye ku Mumana." 
Psalms80:12 Nga kanshi cinshi ico wabongolwela ifibumba fya mwangashi, tepapa nomba bonse abalepitapo baleibako ifitwalo?" 
Psalms80:13 Na bakapoli ba mu mpanga baleonaula ne nama sha mu mabala shileulyako. 
Psalms80:14 We Lesa umwine wa fita ala ubwelele kuli ifwe, ukufuma uko waba ku mulu, lolesha pano tuli panshi, lolesha pali uyu mwangashi," 
Psalms80:15 uyo uo we mwine walimbile no kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo, umusambo uyo waikushisha we mwine." 
Psalms80:16 Nabatema umwangashi obe, baoca na mu mulilo. Wakalipila abantu bobe, no kuloba nabaloba." 
Psalms80:17 Uleke ukuboko kobe kube pa muntu wa ku kulyo kobe, pa mwana wa muntu uo washimpa we mwine." 
Psalms80:18 Ifwe tatwakatale atukusangukila nakabili iyoo, tupuputulefye na ifwe tuli nokwita peshina lyobe." 
Psalms80:19 Utubwekeshe mufyo twali we Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, lenga icinso cobe ciloleshe luse luse pali ifwe pakuti tupusuke." 
Psalms81:1 Imbeni ne nsansa kuli Lesa uwaba amaka yesu, imbileni Lesa wakwa Yakobo inyimbo no kupundisha!" 
Psalms81:2 Samuneni ulwimbo, mulelisha ne nsombo, akulisheni bwino amaseese ne nsango." 
Psalms81:3 Lisheni ipenga pa kutampa kwa mweshi, na palya wabulungana, na pa bushiku bwa nshikunkulu yesu." 
Psalms81:4 Pantu e funde lya muno calo ca Israeli, e cipope cakwa Lesa wakwa Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Eco akonkomeshe nge cebo kuli Yosefu, ilyo aile lwisha icalo ca Egupto, kulya twaile umfwa ululimi tushateseshe." 
Psalms81:6 Alesosa ati, “Ala nine namutulileko ifisendo fyenu ifyafina pa mabeya yenu, namwafwako no kuteka imiseke panshi pakuti mube abantungwa." 
Psalms81:7 Mwalikuutile ilyo mwalecula, na ine naisa mupususha, mwikumbi ilyalepanta emo ine namwasukile, namweseshe pa menshi ya ku Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 “Umfweni mwe bantu bandi, lekeni musoke, mwe bena Israeli, nga mwingomfwa kuli ine." 
Psalms81:9 Mwilaba ne milungu imbi, nangu ukulapepa imilungu ya benafyalo." 
Psalms81:10 Ine nine Yawe, Lesa wenu neka, nine namufumishe mu calo ca Egupto, eico muleasamunafye akanwa, nine nakulamulisha." 
Psalms81:11 “Nomba abantu bandi bena balikaana ifyo mbeba, abena Israeli balikaana ukulambeela." 
Psalms81:12 Kanshi eico ine nimbalekako pakuti bashale abaumalala ifyo fine, baleicitila ifintu umo abene balefwaila." 
Psalms81:13 “Iye ala abantu bandi abalaŋumfwa, na bena Israeli abalambeela," 
Psalms81:14 lyena nga kuti nacimfya abalwani babo bwangu, no kunasha bonse ababacusha." 
Psalms81:15 Elyo abapata Yawe, nga nabesa cimba, no kukandwa kwabo nga kwamuyayaya." 
Psalms81:16 Lelo abantu bandi bena nga kuti ine nabalisha ubunga bwa ŋanu ubwapeleka bwino, no kulabekusha ubuci bwa mu mabwe." 
Psalms82:1 Lesa euteeka icilye ca lukuta ulukalamba, apingula pakati ka milungu ati," 
Psalms82:2 “Bushe imwe mukaleka lilali ukulapondamika imilandu pakupingula, no kupokolola ababifi?”" 
Psalms82:3 Mulepokololako abalanda na bakashiwa, muleba no mulinganya ku bacushi na ku babusu." 
Psalms82:4 Mulepokololako abalanda na bacushi, mulebapusushako ku maboko ya babifi." 
Psalms82:5 “Tabaishiba nangu cimo kabili tabailuka nakalya, benda mu mfifi, ne mifula ye sonde lyonse naitelentenshiwa." 
Psalms82:6 “Limo nalimwebele nati, ala imwe muli milungu, bonse muli bana bakwa Lesa Mukulu." 
Psalms82:7 Lelo mukafwa nga bantufye, mukawafye pamo nge mfumu shimbi.”" 
Psalms82:8 Ima we Lesa upingule isonde, pantu imishobo yonse cishilano cobe." 
Psalms83:1 Witalala tondolo we Lesa, wikutumanafye we Lesa, nangu wiikala shilili." 
Psalms83:2 Pantu mona abalwani bobe ifyo balulunkene, nefyo abakupata batongomwene imikoshi." 
Psalms83:3 Balepangana ifyakucita abantu bobe mu bucenjeshi, balepangila abantu abo usunga baleti," 
Psalms83:4 “Iseni tulofye umushobo wabo, pakuti ishina lya bwina Israeli kwikaba uwakulibukisha.”" 
Psalms83:5 Bapangana no mutima umo, nabapangana ukwisa kulwisha." 
Psalms83:6 E bena Edomu, na bena Ishimaeli, abena Moabu na bena Haga," 
Psalms83:7 pamo pene na bena Gebali, abena Amoni, abena Amaleki, Abafilisiti na bena Turi." 
Psalms83:8 Na bena Asria bene nabampana nabo, pakukosha uluko lwakwa Loti." 
Psalms83:9 Ubacite ifyo wacitile abena Midiani, ifyo wacitile kuli Sisera na Yabini pa mumana wa mukuku uwa Kishone." 
Psalms83:10 Abalobele pa Eni Dori, abasangwike ifisoso fya pa mushili." 
Psalms83:11 Ucitile abakalamba babo ukuba nga Orebu na Seebu, ne ntungulushi shabo nga Seba na Salimuna." 
Psalms83:12 Abatile abati, “Natupoke icalo cakwa Lesa ica mulemfwe wakucemenamo cibe cesu.”" 
Psalms83:13 Ubolule nga kankungwe we Lesa wandi, babe nge misungu iyasendwa no mwela." 
Psalms83:14 Filya umulilo oca umutengo, no lubingu pa mulu wa mpili," 
Psalms83:15 efyo ubakunkunike kuli kankungwe, kabili ubapeshe ku cimwela." 
Psalms83:16 Uleke insoni shibawe pa menso, pakuti bafwaye ishina lyobe we Yawe." 
Psalms83:17 Uleke babe ne nsoni pe no mwenso uukalamba, bakafwe imfwa iya musebanya." 
Psalms83:18 Uleke beshibe ukuti niwe weka uwitwa ishina lya Yawe, ukuti niwe Lesa Mukulu ponse pano pesonde." 
Psalms84:1 Yangu icifulo cobe ubusuma, we Yawe umwine wa fita!" 
Psalms84:2 Umweo wandi ulefuluka, kabili naucushiwa kukufuluka isano lyobe we Yawe. Umutima wandi no mubili wandi fyalilila kuli Lesa wamweo." 
Psalms84:3 Uluseba nalupanga iŋanda, akamimbi nako kakula icisansala, umwakulasungila abana, pa ncende iyaba mupepi ne fibumbili fyobe ifya malambo, we Yawe umwine wa fita, we mfumu yandi, we Lesa wandi." 
Psalms84:4 Balishuka abekala mu ŋanda yobe, abakulumbanya inshita shonse." 
Psalms84:5 Balishuka abantu abo amaka yabo yaba muli iwe, abapanga ubulendo bwakwisa nina ulupili lwa Sioni pakupepa." 
Psalms84:6 Ilyo bena bapita mu mukonko wa ku Baka, ilya ncende balaisangula iya tumfukumfuku twa menshi, ne mfula ya mu lusuba lunono ilapangamo ifishiba." 
Psalms84:7 Amaka yabo yalacililako, mpaka cila umo asuke amonekele mu Sioni pa cinso cobe we Lesa." 
Psalms84:8 Umfwe ipepo lyandi we Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, kutika kuli ine we Lesa wakwa Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Uloleshe pa nkwela yesu, we Lesa, posa amenso yakwafwa pa musubwa obe." 
Psalms84:10 Ubushiku bumo bwawamishapo mwisano lyobe, ukucila pa nshiku imyandamishila mu ncende imbi. Kuti natemwa naba umulinshi wa pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Lesa wandi, ukucila ukwikala mu matenti ya babifi." 
Psalms84:11 Pantu Yawe Lesa e kasuba ne nkwela, Yawe alapeela ipaalo no bucindami. Ena tatana cisuma nangu cimo kuli abo abenda mu bololoke." 
Psalms84:12 We Yawe umwine wa fita, alishuka umuntu uutetekela muli iwe." 
Psalms85:1 Walipaala icalo cobe we Yawe, wabwesesha Yakobo ishuko lyakwe." 
Psalms85:2 Abantu bobe naubabelelako uluse kufyo babifya, naufimba na pa bubifi bwabo bonse." 
Psalms85:3 Nauleka no kulabakalipila, ne cipyu cobe icikali nacipwa." 
Psalms85:4 Utubwekeshe kufyo twali, we Lesa Umupusushi wesu, unasheko ne cipyu cobe ico watukwatile." 
Psalms85:5 Bushe wakulatufulilwafye pe? Bushe wakulalundapofye ukufulwa umwakulakonkanina inkulo? 
Psalms85:6 Bushe ekuti tawakabwekeshepo ukutupuputula, pakuti fwe bantu bobe tulesansamukila muli iwe?" 
Psalms85:7 Tulange icitemwiko cobe icishipwa we Yawe, utupususheko no kutupususha." 
Psalms85:8 Ine ndekutika kufyo Lesa Yawe alelanda, palwa kutuletela icibote ifwe fwe bantu bakwe, nomba cikulu fwe bamushilo bakwe tatubwelele ku fyabuwelewele." 
Psalms85:9 Icine cine ipusukilo lyakwe lyalipalamina abamutiina, elyo no bucindami bwakwe bwakulamoneka mu calo." 
Psalms85:10 Icitemwiko icishipwa ne cishinka nafisuntinkana, bukaele ne cibote nafiitomona." 
Psalms85:11 Icishinka nacimena pano isonde, no bulungami bwa mumulu bulaloleshapo." 
Psalms85:12 Ifintu ifisuma efyo Yawe aletupeela, ne calo cesu cakulamesha ifisabo fya busomboshi." 
Psalms85:13 Ubulungami ebwakulatangilila Yawe pantanshi, no kupekanya umwakunyanta inkasa shakwe." 
Psalms86:1 Unkutike we Lesa kabili unjasuke, pantu ine ndi mulanda kabili ndi mubusu." 
Psalms86:2 Ubake umweo wandi pantu naliipeelesha kuli iwe, umpusushe ne mubomfi obe, we Lesa wandi, pantu natetekela muli iwe." 
Psalms86:3 Umbeleleko uluse we Mfumu, pantu nkuuta kuli iwe akasuba konse." 
Psalms86:4 Nsansamushako ine ne mubomfi obe we Mfumu, pantu ni kuli iwe eko ndosha umweo wandi." 
Psalms86:5 Uli wamutembo, kabili ulabelela uluse we Mfumu, walikwatisha icitemwiko icishipwa kuli bonse abakuuta kuli iwe." 
Psalms86:6 Kutika kwipepo lyandi we Yawe, umfwa inkumbu mu kupapata kwandi." 
Psalms86:7 Pa bushiku nkacula nkalilila kuli iwe, pantu iwe ukanjasuka." 
Psalms86:8 We Yawe ala takwaba Lesa umbi uwaba nga iwe, awe takwaba nangu umo uwingacita ifyo ucita." 
Psalms86:9 Imishobo yonse iyo wabumba yakulaisa mukupepa pa cinso cobe we Mfumu, bakaleta ululumbi kwishina lyobe." 
Psalms86:10 Pantu uli wabulamba, Lesa uucita ifipapwa, kabili wekafye niwe Lesa." 
Psalms86:11 We Yawe umfunde inshila yobe elyo nkalaenda mu cine cobe, uloshe umutima wandi kuli iwe, pakuti mbe na katiina kwishina lyobe." 
Psalms86:12 Ine nakulakulumbanya no mutima wandi onse we Mfumu Lesa wandi, no kulacindika ishina lyobe pe na pe." 
Psalms86:13 Pantu ukutemwa kobe kuli ine kukalamba nganshi, ine walimpususha mu calo ca bafwa umwashika nganshi." 
Psalms86:14 Nashinjimina inkakashi sha bantu we Lesa, ibumba lya bantu ababula uluse lilefwaya ubumi bwandi, bantu abashakucindika." 
Psalms86:15 Lelo iwe we Mfumu uli Lesa waluse ne cikuku, uushifulwa bwangu, kabili uwafulamo icitemwiko icishipwa ne cishinka." 
Psalms86:16 Walukile kuli ine no kumbelela uluse, unkoshe ne mubomfi obe ku maka yobe, mpusushako ne mwana wa mubomfi obe umwanakashi." 
Psalms86:17 Nangilila icakumwenako ca busuma bobe we Yawe, uleke abalwani bandi bamoneko, ne nsoni shibekate, pantu niwefye ungafwa no kuntalalika." 
Psalms87:1 Atantika umufula wakwe pa lupili lwakwe ulwamushilo. 
Psalms87:2 Yawe alitemwisha impongolo sha Sioni, ukucila ififulo fimbi ifyakwa Yakobo." 
Psalms87:3 Ifintu ifyalulumbi fyalilandwa pali iwe, we musumba wakwa Lesa, ukuti," 
Psalms87:4 “Ilyo ine nkalatantika abantu ba mishobo abampetamina, ine nkalundapo abena Rahabu, na bena Babiloni, pamo pene na Bafilisiti, abena Turi na bena Kushi kabili bakalila abati, ‘Uyu nao afyalilwe mu Sioni.’”" 
Psalms87:5 Mu cine pali Sioni bakalalandapo ukuti, “Uyu elyo na ulya ewabafyala, na Lesa umupulami ewamushimpa pa ncende yakwe.”" 
Psalms87:6 Yawe akalemba amashina ya aba bantu mu citabo akatila, “Uyu nao afyalilwe mu Sioni.”" 
Psalms87:7 Ilyo bakapanga inyimbo bakalaimba abati, “Utumfukumfuku twandi tonse twaba muli iwe.”" 
Psalms88:1 We Yawe, Lesa umupusushi wandi, ala niwe ndelililako akasuba no bushiku." 
Psalms88:2 Leka ipepo lyandi lifike uko uli, kutika na kufyo ine ndelila." 
Psalms88:3 Pantu umutima wandi wiswilemo amacushi, icakuti no mweo wandi ulifye ku milomo ya cilindi." 
Psalms88:4 Ine bampendele pali balya bonse abali mupepi na ku nindi, na maka ine nshikwete nakalya." 
Psalms88:5 Ndi uwapatwilwa ku bafwa, ndifye kwati bantu abo baipaya, abalala mu nindi shabo, abo ushibukishako nakabili, abo waleka ukupokololako." 
Psalms88:6 Naumposa panshi ya nindi, apafiita fititi kabili apatali nganshi." 
Psalms88:7 Ubukali bobe nabuntitikisha, na matamba yobe nayanjibisha." 
Psalms88:8 Naulenga ifibusa fyandi ukutaluka ukufuma kuli ine, ninsanguka icamuselu kuli bena, ninjisalilwa, nafilwa no kwakufulumukila," 
Psalms88:9 na menso yandi nayanaka kukucula. Cila bushiku ine ndilila kuli we Yawe, ndemisha na maboko mu mulu." 
Psalms88:10 Bushe ulacitila abafwa ifisungusho? Bushe nabo balema mukwisa mukukulumbanya? 
Psalms88:11 Bushe mu nindi balalandapo pa citemwiko cobe? Nangu ukulanda palwa cishinka cobe mu bonaushi? 
Psalms88:12 Bushe ifipeshamano fyobe filamoneka umwafiita? Nangu ubololoke bobe mu calo ca balabikwako? 
Psalms88:13 Lelo ni kuli iwe we Yawe ndilila pakuti ungafwe, ni kuli iwe weka mpepa cila lucelo." 
Psalms88:14 Bushe nga cinshi ico ine wankaanina we Yawe, no kufisa icinso cobe kuli ine?" 
Psalms88:15 Naba uwacula ukufuma ku bwaice bwandi, ukupalama na ku mfwa, nalishipikisha mu fyakuntiinya fyobe, kabili ndi no mwenso." 
Psalms88:16 Ubukali bobe nabumponena, ne fyakuntiinya nafinenga ukonaika." 
Psalms88:17 Akasuba konse filashinguluka nge lyeshi, filetula monse monse pakushinguluka." 
Psalms88:18 Niwe ulengele abatemwikwa ne fibusa fyandi ukuntaluka, ne mfifi nomba eisangwike umunandi." 
Psalms89:1 Nakulalumbanya ubukulu bwa citemwiko cobe icishipwa, we Yawe, ku kanwa kandi nkalenga bucishinka bobe ukwishibikwa umwakulakonkanina inkulo." 
Psalms89:2 Ine nkalanda palwa citemwiko cobe icashimpwa pe na pe, nokuti icishinka cobe naco cabafye shika ngo mulu wine." 
Psalms89:3 Pantu walisosele auti, “Ine nalipangana icipangano no wasalwa wandi, nalilapa ku mubomfi wandi Davidi nati," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Bamwane ebakalatwalilila ukuba pa bufumu umuyayaya, ine nkalakosha pe ubufumu bobe ku nkulo shonse.’”" 
Psalms89:5 Mu mulu balakulumbanya palwa fipapwa fyobe, we Yawe, na bamushilo mu kulongana kwabo balakulumbanya pa cishinka cobe." 
Psalms89:6 Nga nani pa ba mu mulu uwingalinganishiwa kuli Yawe? Bushe nani pa ba mu mulu uwingapalana na Yawe? 
Psalms89:7 Pebumba lya bamushilo, Lesa balimukwatila akatiina, bonse abamushinguluka uko aba balamutiina." 
Psalms89:8 We Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, ni nani uwaba nga iwe? Uli wamaka, ne cishinka cobe calikushinguluka." 
Psalms89:9 Niwe unasha ukutulumana kwa menshi ya pali bemba, niwe utalalika amatamba ayashulumuka." 
Psalms89:10 Niwe waonawile Rahabu, kwati untu uwafwile, wapasa na balwani bobe ku kuboko kobe ukwamaka." 
Psalms89:11 Umulu wena obe ne calo cine naco cobe, niwe wabumba icalo ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo." 
Psalms89:12 Niwe wapanga akapinda ka ku kuso na ka ku kulyo, ulupili lwa Tabo nolwa Hemoni filembila ishina lyobe ne nsansa." 
Psalms89:13 Yangu ifyo ukuboko kobe kwaba na maka, ifyo ukwa ku kulyo kwaba ukwakosa kabili ukwasumbuka." 
Psalms89:14 Ubulungami no mulinganya e mufula wa cipuna ca bufumu bobe, icitemwiko icishipwa ne cishinka efikutangilila." 
Psalms89:15 Balishuka abantu abakwawila utupundu, abenda pa cinso cobe mu lubuuto lobe we Yawe." 
Psalms89:16 Bena bakulasansamuka akasuba konse mwishina lyobe, no kulasangalala mu bulungami bobe." 
Psalms89:17 Pantu niwe bucindami bwabo kabili amaka yabo, na mwipaalo lyobe emutumpwilwa ulusengo lwesu." 
Psalms89:18 Icine cine inkwela yesu yaba na iwe we Yawe, imfumu yesu yaba no Wamushilo wakwa Israeli." 
Psalms89:19 Pa nshita imo walandile mu fimonwa ku bantu bobe abacishinka wasosa auti, “Ine nimfwika uwabulwi amaka, ninsansabalikapo umwaume umo umwaice uo ine nsalile pakati ka bantu." 
Psalms89:20 Ninsanga umubomfi wandi Davidi, nimusuba na mafuta yamushilo." 
Psalms89:21 Ukuboko kwandi ukwamaka ekukamulenga ukubomba, cine cine ukuboko kwandi kwakulamukosha." 
Psalms89:22 Takuli mulwani akalamusonkesha umusonko, na babi bonse tabakamutitikishe nakalya." 
Psalms89:23 Nkonaula abalwani bakwe pa menso yakwe, no kwipaya bonse abamupata." 
Psalms89:24 Bucishinka bwandi ne citemwiko candi fikalaba nankwe, kabili ukupitila mwishina lyandi ulusengo lwakwe lukasumbulwa." 
Psalms89:25 Nine nkabika ubufumu bwakwe ukufika kuli bemba, no kuboko kwakwe ukwa ku kulyo pa menshi ya mu mimana." 
Psalms89:26 Ena akulanjita ati, ‘Niwe tata, kabili niwe Lesa wandi, we Cilibwe candi kabili Umupusushi wandi.’" 
Psalms89:27 Euli nokuba ibeli lyandi, kabili euli nokuba umukalamba pa shamfumu isha pano isonde." 
Psalms89:28 Nakulamukwatila icitemwiko pe, ne cipangano candi nankwe tacakapwe." 
Psalms89:29 Bamwane ebakulatwalilila ukuba pa bufumu pe, ne cipuna ca bufumu bwakwe umwabela inshiku sha mulu." 
Psalms89:30 “Lelo bamwane nga batalamina amafunde yandi, bakaana no kulakonka amalango yandi." 
Psalms89:31 Nga cakuti baonaula ifipope fyandi, baleka no kulakonka ifyebo ifyo nabakonkomeshe," 
Psalms89:32 awe ninshi lyena ine nakulaboma ku nkonto palwa bubi bwabo. Nkalabakapa amembya pa fyabupulumushi fyabo. 
Psalms89:33 Lelo nshakafumye ukutemwa kwandi pali ena, nangu ukuleka ukulasunga icilayo ico namulaya mu cishinka candi." 
Psalms89:34 Ine nshakonaule icipangano candi nankwe, nangu ukubwesha amashiwi ayo ine nalanda." 
Psalms89:35 Nalilala nalilapa ine ne wamushilo ukuti, teti mbepe ubufi ine kuli Davidi." 
Psalms89:36 Ubufyashi bwakwe buli nokutwalilila inshita yonse, ne cipuna cakwe icabufumu cakulaba nga kasuba ku cinso candi." 
Psalms89:37 Cikabelelela pe ngo mweshi, nga kambone uwacishinka mu lwelele.”" 
Psalms89:38 Lelo iwe naumufumyako amano no kumusuula, naufulilwa umusubwa obe nganshi." 
Psalms89:39 Naonaula icipangano wapangene no mubomfi obe, waposa ne cisote cakwe icabufumu mu lukungu." 
Psalms89:40 Nuwisha ifibumba fyonse, nuonaula na malinga yakwe, fishele ifyabongoloka." 
Psalms89:41 Bonse abalepitapo baleiba ifyuma fyakwe, abena mupalamano nabo balemuwelafye." 
Psalms89:42 Niwe upeela abalwani bakwe amaka, no kulenga ukuti bena balesansamuka." 
Psalms89:43 Niwe ulengele ulupanga lwakwe ukufupa, waleka no kulamwafwako mu nkondo." 
Psalms89:44 Niwe ufumishepo ubucindami bwakwe, wapenuna ne cipuna cakwe icabufumu." 
Psalms89:45 Naulenga nokuti inshiku sha bulumendo bwakwe shipipe, icakuti nasebana nganshi." 
Psalms89:46 Bushe kufika lilali we Yawe uli nokwikala uwabelama inshita yonse? Bushe kufika lilali ubukali bwakulayaka ngo lubingu lwa mulilo? 
Psalms89:47 Ibukisha ukuti ubumi bwandi tabwatantalila we Yawe, wibukishe nokuti bonse abo wabumba, bantu abali nokufwa." 
Psalms89:48 Bushe nani engabelelela uwingakaana ukufwa, nangu umuntu kuti aipususha ku maka ya calo ca bafwa?" 
Psalms89:49 Bushe icitemwiko icikulu icantanshi nomba cili kwi we Mfumu? Ngefyo walaile no kulapa mu cishinka kuli Davidi fili kwi? 
Psalms89:50 Ibukisha ifyo balensausha ne mubomfi obe we Mfumu, nefyo ine nashipikisha mu mutima wandi pa musaalula wa mishobo yonse." 
Psalms89:51 Abalwani ala tepakunsausha we Yawe, konse uko naya awe tepakunsausha." 
Psalms89:52 Yawe apaalwe na matotelo pe na pe. Ameni kabili ameni. 
Psalms90:1 Apo inkulo shabelako we Yawe, ni muli iwe twaikalila." 
Psalms90:2 Ilyo impili tashilabumbwa, ne sonde lyonse talilabako, ukufumafye pe na pe niwefye Lesa." 
Psalms90:3 Ulabwesesha abantu ku lukungu, walanda nokuti, “Bwelelenimo ku lukungu imwe mwe bana ba bantu.”" 
Psalms90:4 Pantu imyaka ikana limo (1,000) mu menso yobe yabafye ngo bushiku bumo ubupitile, nga filya inshita yakulonda ipita mu bushiku." 
Psalms90:5 Ulakululula abantu mu nda ya tulo twa mfwa, babafye ngo mulemfwe wa cani uulemena ulucelo," 
Psalms90:6 uwakuti akacelo cilya wamena no kululumuka, icungulo ninshi wabonsa no kuma wauma." 
Psalms90:7 Nefwe efyo ubukali bobe butucita, ne cipyu cobe cilatutiinya nganshi." 
Psalms90:8 Kuli iwe ifibi fyesu fyaba pa lwalala, ne fyabubifi fya mu bumfisolo fyesu fyabafye pa mbilibili." 
Psalms90:9 Inshita ya bumi bwesu ulaipifya pa mulandu wa cipyu cobe, ubumi bwesu bulukafye ngo kwisha icefu." 
Psalms90:10 Inshita ya bumi bwesu ibafye imyaka amakumi cine lubali (70), abamaka ebafika ku myaka amakumi cine konse konse (80), lelo imyaka yonse apo yapela ituletelafye amasakamiko na macushi, no kupita bwangu, mpaka twafwa." 
Psalms90:11 Bushe nani engeshiba apapelela ubukali bwa cipyu cobe, nangu apapelela amaka yobe aya kutiinya kobe?" 
Psalms90:12 Eico uletufundako pakuti twaishiba bwino ubwipi bwa nshiku shesu, no kulenga tulekwata imitima yamano." 
Psalms90:13 We Yawe uleshikatalako. Bushe ici kuti capelela kwisa? Ulebelelako ababomfi bobe uluse. 
Psalms90:14 Utulenge ukusekelela ukutemwa kobe ukushipwa cila lucelo, epakuti tuleanga no kulasansamuka inshiku shonse." 
Psalms90:15 Uleke inshiku shesu ishakusansamukamo shilingane nesho twaculilemo, shilingane na pa bwingi bwa myaka iyo twaculilemo." 
Psalms90:16 Leka ababomfi bobe bamone ifyo ulebabombela, na bana babo nabo bamone ifyo wacindama." 
Psalms90:17 Uleke uluse lobe we Yawe lwise pali ifwe, upaale ne milimo ya minwe yesu, ee, cacine upaale imilimo ya minwe yesu." 
Psalms91:1 Uyo onse uwikala mu nsakwe yakwa Lesa mukulu akatuusha mu cintelelwe ca Mwine wa maka yonse. 
Psalms91:2 Nkalalanda palwakwa Yawe nati, “Eo ngubamo kabili e linga lyandi, muli Lesa wandi emo nacetekela.”" 
Psalms91:3 Ala ali nokukupususha ku busanso bonse ubo ushenekele, na ku finkunka fyonse ifyabipisha." 
Psalms91:4 Akulakukupa amasako ya mapindo yakwe, kabili no kuuba emo wakulauba, icishinka cakwe ecikaba inkwela yobe iyakukucingililako." 
Psalms91:5 Tawakulatiina nangu cimo mu nshita ya bushiku, nangu imifwi balefwinta mu nshita ya kasuba," 
Psalms91:6 nangu icikuko icipita ubushiku, nangu icinkunka icisa akasuba pakati." 
Psalms91:7 Nangu bambi ikana limo (1,000) bawile uku noku, nangu bambi ikana limo (1,000) bawile ku kulyo kobe, iwe tapakabe icakukukumyamo." 
Psalms91:8 Uli nokulamonafye na menso yobe, uko ababi balekandwa." 
Psalms91:9 Nga wacita Yawe ukuba ilinga lyobe, ninshi muli Lesa Mukulu emo wakulauba," 
Psalms91:10 kanshi teti kube nelyo cimo icakukuponena, ne cinkunka teti cipalame kwitenti lyobe." 
Psalms91:11 Pantu ena akakonkomesha bamalaika bakwe ukulakubaka, no kulakusunga konse uko uleya." 
Psalms91:12 Bakalakusendela mu minwe yabo, pakuti tauipunwine ulukasa ku libwe." 
Psalms91:13 Ukalanyanta pa nkalamo na pali ngoshe, no kulanyanta pali mukutu na pa cisoka." 
Psalms91:14 Lesa aleti, “Ine nakulamupusushako pantu antemwa, no kumupokololako apo acindika ishina lyandi." 
Psalms91:15 Ilyo alilila kuli ine nakulamwasuka, na pa nshita akwata amacushi nakulaba nao. Nakulamupokololako no kumucindamika." 
Psalms91:16 Ine ndi nokumwikusha pakutantalisha ne nshiku shakwe ishakwikala pano calo, kabili cine cine nkamulanga ne pusukilo lyandi.”" 
Psalms92:1 Ala cintu icisuma ukulumba Yawe, no kulumbanya ishina lyobe we Lesa Mukulu." 
Psalms92:2 Ukulatatakula icitemwiko cobe icishipwa cila lucelo, no bushiku bonse ukulatotela icishinka cobe." 
Psalms92:3 Ukulakulumbila mu nsango yabushipa ikumi limo, na mu ciunda ce seese." 
Psalms92:4 Pantu ine tepakusansamuka ku ficitwa fyobe we Yawe, ni pa mulandu wa fintu wacita eco ndeimbila ne nsansa." 
Psalms92:5 Yangu ifintu ubukulu ifyo wacita we Yawe, ala teti umuntu afikepo ukwishiba ifyo we mwine utontonkanya." 
Psalms92:6 Umuntu icipuba tapaba ico aishiba, no muntu icipumbu afilwa ukwiluka." 
Psalms92:7 Icakuti nangu abantu babi bengafula nge cani, na bacintomfwa nangu bengashuka shani, ala nakalyafye bonse bakalobelelafye umuyayaya." 
Psalms92:8 Lelo we Yawe walisumbulwa umuyayaya. 
Psalms92:9 Pantu cine cine we Yawe abalwani bobe bakaloba, na bacintomfwa bonse ukabapasa." 
Psalms92:10 Walitumpula ulusengo lwandi ngo mulume wa mboo, wansuba na mafuta ayasuma." 
Psalms92:11 Amenso yandi nayamona ukucimba kwa balwani bandi, na matwi yandi nayomfwa ifyo abalwani bandi ababifi balecimfishiwa." 
Psalms92:12 Abalungami bena bakulalelema ngo tuncindu, bakulakula nge miti iyalepesha iya keda ku Lebanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Bena baba nge miti iyalimbwa mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, iyilelema mu mansa she sano lyakwa Lesa wesu." 
Psalms92:14 Baba nge miti iyitwala ifitwalo na pa nshita yabukote, no kubafye iyalelema kabili iya katapa katapa." 
Psalms92:15 Epakulanga ukuti Yawe alikwata umulinganya. Ine ntila, “E cilibwe candi kabili muli ena tamwaba akabi.”" 
Psalms93:1 Yawe euteeka ninshi nafwala ne fyabucindami, Yawe afwala ubucindami no kukwatisha ubulamba. Isonde lyonse lyakosa ndi, talitenkana nakalya." 
Psalms93:2 Ubufumu bobe bwatendeke ukufuma ku kale nganshi, kabili ilyo kushilati kube kantu ninshi eko waba." 
Psalms93:3 Amenshi ya muli bemba yayamba ukwima we Yawe, amenshi ya muli bemba yaumfwika ishiwi lyayako, amenshi ya muli bemba yaimya icilulumo cayako." 
Psalms93:4 Nomba walikwatisha amaka, ukucila pa cilulumo ca pali bemba, ukucila na pa matamba yene aya pali bemba we Yawe." 
Psalms93:5 Ifipope fyobe fyacishinka nganshi, Bumushilo bobe ebwawamya iŋanda yobe umushinsanshiku we Yawe." 
Psalms94:1 We Yawe, niwe Lesa uulandula, we Lesa, langisha icilandushi cobe." 
Psalms94:2 Ima, we kapingula wa bantu bonse, upeshe abamiya kabili ubalinganye pa micitile yabo." 
Psalms94:3 Bushe ababifi uko bakapela ni kwi we Yawe? Bushe ukwanga kwa bantu babifi kukapela kwi? 
Psalms94:4 Balabwabwata no kulanda amashiwi ayabi, balaituntumba bonse ababifi." 
Psalms94:5 We Yawe bacilamo ukunyantilila abantu bobe, tepakucusha abantu aba bupyani bobe." 
Psalms94:6 Bepaya bamukamfwilwa na beni, babikapo no kwipaya bakashiwa." 
Psalms94:7 Bena balanda ati, “Yawe tatumona nakalya, Lesa wakwa Yakobo teshiba nelyo cimo.”" 
Psalms94:8 Cenjeleni imwe mwe bantu abashakwata mano, mwe batumpa, bushe ni lilali mukeluka?" 
Psalms94:9 Bushe kuti uwapangile ukutwi ewafilwa ukumfwa? Bushe kuti uwapangile ilinso ewafilwa ukumona? 
Psalms94:10 Bushe uukalipila imishobo teti akande? Bushe kafundisha wa bantu bonse eushingakwata amano? 
Psalms94:11 Yawe ewishiba ifitontonkanya abantu, no kwishiba aishiba ukuti fyabuwelewele." 
Psalms94:12 Alishuka umuntu uo usalapula we Yawe, uo usambilisha amafunde yobe." 
Psalms94:13 Ekumulenga aleikala tondolo mu nshita shakucula, ukushintafye napo bakembila umuntu umubifi inindi." 
Psalms94:14 Yawe tekuti alekeleshe abantu bakwe, tekuti alekeleshe abantu ba bupyani bakwe." 
Psalms94:15 Ubupingushi bukakonka pa micitile iyabulungami, na bantu abololoka imitima bonse bakabukonka." 
Psalms94:16 Nga nani uwingangafwa pakumpokako ku babifi? Nani uwingangafwa mukuncingililako ku bacita ububifi? 
Psalms94:17 Abula Yawe ukungafwilishako, ine nga ni kale naya ku calo ca bafwa." 
Psalms94:18 Ilyo nasosele nati, “Iye nalapona,” icitemwiko cobe icishifilwa we Yawe ecantungilile." 
Psalms94:19 Ilyo amasakamiko yafulisha muli ine, icitalaliko cobe cilandetela insansa mu mutima." 
Psalms94:20 Bushe icipuna ca bufumfutungu kuti caampana na iwe, icipuna ca mafunde yakutitikisha abantu?" 
Psalms94:21 Balekatana pakupingula abakaele, no kulapingula abashili na mulandu ukufwa." 
Psalms94:22 Lelo Yawe ewaisa ba ilinga lyandi, kabili Lesa wandi e cilibwe candi uo ngubamo." 
Psalms94:23 Akabakanda pa fibi fyonse ifyo bacita, akabalofya pa mulandu wa bubifi bwabo. Yawe Lesa wesu akabalofya." 
Psalms95:1 Iseni tulumbanye Yawe, tumwimbile ne nsansa, tumwawile utupundu, icilibwe ce pusukilo lyesu." 
Psalms95:2 Natwise tumutotele pa cinso cakwe, tumwimbile ne nsansa inyimbo sha malumbo." 
Psalms95:3 Pantu Yawe e Lesa mukulu wine, e Mfumu nkalamba iyacila pa milungu yonse." 
Psalms95:4 E mwine uwapanga imikonko ya pano isonde, ne mpili ishalepesha shonse shakwe." 
Psalms95:5 E mwine uwapanga bemba, no mushili uwauma wine ewabumbile." 
Psalms95:6 Iseni tuicefye no kumupepa, natufukamine Yawe, pantu ewatubumba." 
Psalms95:7 Pantu e Lesa wesu, na ifwe tuli bantu ba bucemi bwakwe, tuli mukuni wa fitekwa fyakwe ifyo umwine acema. Nga cakuti ilelo line mwaumfwa ishiwi lyakwe," 
Psalms95:8 mwilatalamika imitima yenu nga filya mwacitile ku Meriba, nga filya mwacitile pali bulya bushiku mu matololo ku Masa." 
Psalms95:9 Kulya ifikolwe fyenu fyalenjesha no kunsonsomba, nangu fyaleimwena ifyo nalecita." 
Psalms95:10 Pa myaka amakumi yane (40) ilya nkulo tepakunselausha ku mukoshi, nasuka nalanda ukuti, “Awe aba bantu tababika mitima yabo pakuŋumfwila, tabaishiba ne nshila shandi.”" 
Psalms95:11 Elyo ine nafulwa, no kulapa nati, “Napalifye ine, pali imwe tapakabe nangu umo uwakwingila mu ncende yandi iyakutuushamo.”" 
Psalms96:1 Imbileni Yawe ulwimbo ulupya, mweba pano isonde bonse mwimbile Yawe." 
Psalms96:2 Muleimbila Yawe, kabili mulelumbanya ishina lyakwe, mulebila ukupususha kwakwe akasuba na kasuba." 
Psalms96:3 Mulesabankanya ubucindami bwakwe mu mishobo yonse, muleshimikilako abantu bonse ificitwa fyakwe ifyamaka." 
Psalms96:4 Pantu Yawe alipulamisha kabili ewalinga ukulumbanya, ewakukwatila akatiina ukucila imilungu yonse." 
Psalms96:5 Pantu imilungu yonse iya mishobo tulubifye, lelo Yawe ewabumba imyulu." 
Psalms96:6 Ubucindami no bupulami fyaba pa cinso cakwe, ubulamba no lulumbi fyaba mu cifulo cakwe icamushilo." 
Psalms96:7 Mulelondolola ubulumbwa bwa bulamba bwakwa Yawe mwe ndupwa sha mishobo, mulelondolola ubulumbwa bwa bucindami bwakwa Yawe na maka yakwe." 
Psalms96:8 Mulelondolola ubulumbwa ubwalinga ishina lyakwa Yawe, muleleta no mutuulo pakwingila mwisano lyakwe." 
Psalms96:9 Mulepepa Yawe mu bucindami bwa mushilo wakwe, muletutuma pa cinso cakwe bonse mwe ba pano isonde." 
Psalms96:10 Landeni pakati ka mishobo ati, “Yawe euteeka.” Ewashimpa bwino isonde lyonse, talingaseshiwa, elyo kabili akapingula abantu bonse mu bulungami." 
Psalms96:11 Lekeni imyulu isansamuke, ne sonde lisekelele, bemba nao alepoma, pamo pene ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo." 
Psalms96:12 Lekeni mu mpanga mube ukwanga, pamo ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo, pakuti ifimuti fyonse ifya mu mutengo fileimba ne nsansa." 
Psalms96:13 Nabaleimba ku ntanshi yakwa Yawe, pantu naisa, eshile mukupingula aba pano isonde. Ali nokupingula aba pano isonde mu bulungami, no kucita icishinka ku bamishobo bonse." 
Psalms97:1 Yawe euteeka, lekeni aba pano isonde basansamuke, lekeni ne fyalo ifingi ifyakutali ifya ku lulamba lwa bemba fisekelele." 
Psalms97:2 Amakumbi ne mfifi iyikalamba fyalimushinguluka, umulinganya ne cishinka e mufula wa bufumu bwakwe." 
Psalms97:3 Umulilo eutangilila uko aleya, uya uleoca abalwani bakwe aba mu mbali shonse." 
Psalms97:4 Ukubyata kwa mfula ekusanika isonde lyonse, na ba pano isonde nga bamona balatutuma." 
Psalms97:5 Impili shisunguluka nge pula pa menso yakwa Yawe, pa cinso ca Mfumu ye sonde lyonse." 
Psalms97:6 Imyulu ilalangilila ubulungami bwakwe, na bantu ba mishobo yonse bamona no lulumbi lwakwe." 
Psalms97:7 Bonse abapepa ifimpashanya fya milungu balalengwa insoni, pamo na bonse abaitakisha mu tulubi. Mwe milungu yonse mulemupepa." 
Psalms97:8 Sioni naumfwako kabili aleanga, ne mishi ya mu Yuda naisekelela, pa mulandu wa bupingushi bobe we Yawe." 
Psalms97:9 Pantu we Yawe, niwe Lesa mukulu uwacila fyonse ifya pano isonde, walicila apakalamba pa milungu yonse." 
Psalms97:10 Lekeni bonse abatemwa Yawe bapate ifyabipa, pantu alasunga imyeo ya bantu bakwe abacishinka, no kubapokolola ku maboko ya babifi." 
Psalms97:11 Ulubuuto lulasanikila pa balungama, na batambalala imitima bakwata insansa." 
Psalms97:12 Imwe mwe bololoke mulesansamukila muli Yawe, kabili mulelumbanya ishina lyakwe ilyamushilo." 
Psalms98:1 Imbileni Yawe ulwimbo ulupya pantu alicita ifyakupapusha. Ku maka yakwe no kuboko kwakwe ukwamushilo eko abombela ipusukilo. 
Psalms98:2 Yawe nalanga apabuuta ipusukilo lyakwe ukwishibikwa, no kusokolola ubulungami bwakwe ku mishobo." 
Psalms98:3 Alibukisha icitemwiko cakwe ne cishinka cakwe kuba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ne mpela she sonde lyonse nashimona ukupususha kwakwa Lesa wesu." 
Psalms98:4 Akwawileni Yawe mwe sonde lyonse, mulepongomoka no kwaula utupundu pakwimba inyimbo." 
Psalms98:5 Akulisheni iseese pakwimbila Yawe inyimbo, mulelisha bwino iseese ne ciunda ca nyimbo." 
Psalms98:6 Akulisheni amapenga no kupuuta mu nsengo, muleanga no kwaula utupundu pa cinso cakwa Yawe Imfumu." 
Psalms98:7 Lekeni bemba alepoma pamo na fyonse ifyabamo, elyo ne sonde ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo." 
Psalms98:8 Imimana yonse yambe ukutota, ne mpili shonse shimbile pamo ne nsansa." 
Psalms98:9 Lekeni bembe pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pantu naisa mukupingula isonde. Ali nokupingula aba pano isonde mu bulungami, no kucita umulinganya ku bamishobo bonse." 
Psalms99:1 Yawe euteeka, lekeni imishobo itutume, ena aikala pakati ka bakerubi, lekeni isonde lisunkane." 
Psalms99:2 Yawe mukulu mu Sioni, alicindamisha ukucila pa mishobo yonse." 
Psalms99:3 Lekeni balelumbanya ishina lyobe ilikulu pantu lyalipulama. Ee ena wamushilo. 
Psalms99:4 Imfumu eyamaka, kabili eyatemwa umulinganya. Washimpa umulinganya, muli Yakobo emo wacita ifyacishinka no bulungami." 
Psalms99:5 Akulumbanyeni Yawe Lesa wesu, mulemukunkwila pa cipuna ca makasa yakwe, pantu ena wamushilo." 
Psalms99:6 Mose na Aroni bali ni bashimapepo bakwa Lesa, Samwele nao, e muntu uwali pa bantu abaleita peshina lyakwe. Balekuuta kuli Yawe nao abasuka." 
Psalms99:7 Alelanda nabo ninshi ali mu ntumba ye kumbi, nabo balenakila amafunde no kusunga ifipope fyakwe abapeele." 
Psalms99:8 We Yawe, Lesa wesu, waleasuka abantu bobe, niwe walebalanga ukuti uli Lesa uubelela abantu uluse, nangu walebakanda pa fibi fyabo." 
Psalms99:9 Akulumbanyeni Yawe Lesa wesu, mulepepela pa lupili lwakwe ulwamushilo, pantu Yawe Lesa wesu wamushilo." 
Psalms100:1 Imbileni Yawe mulemwawila utupundu pano isonde lyonse 
Psalms100:2 Bombeleni Yawe ne nsansa, iseni pa cinso cakwe ne nyimbo shansansa." 
Psalms100:3 Ishibeni ukuti Yawe e Lesa. Ewatubumba, na ifwe tuli bakwe, tuli bantu bakwe kabili nifwe mpaanga sha bucemi bwakwe." 
Psalms100:4 Ingileni mu mpongolo she sano lyakwe no kutotela, mulemulumbanya pakwingila mu mansa shakwe, mulemutotela no kulumbanya ishina lyakwe." 
Psalms100:5 Pantu Yawe musuma, ne citemwiko cakwe camuyayaya. Icishinka cakwe citwalililafye umwakonkanina inkulo." 
Psalms101:1 Nkalaimba palwa citemwiko icishifilwa no mulinganya. Kuli iwe we Yawe nakulaimba isha malumbo. 
Psalms101:2 Nkacenjela pakuti nkaleenda mu nshila yabukaele, nga ni lilali ukesa kuli ine? Nkalaenda mu ŋanda yandi no mutima uwabula icilubo." 
Psalms101:3 Ine nshakatale ndolekesha pa fyabipa. Ine nalipata ificita abantu abashili bacishinka, nshifiposako amano nakalya." 
Psalms101:4 Abantu ba mitima iyapondama bafwile babe ukutali, na ine nshalesangwa mu cintu icabipa nelyo cimo." 
Psalms101:5 Uyo onse uwamba umunankwe mu bumfisolo, ine nkamutalalika. Noyo uulolesha misuula misuula no mutima wa cilumba, ine tewakwikala nankwe." 
Psalms101:6 Ndalolesha amenso yandi pa bacishinka ba muli cino calo, pakuti tuleikala nabo." 
Psalms101:7 Umuntu uucita ubucenjeshi, tewakwikala mumwandi iyoo. Nelyo umuntu uwabufi, teti akokole pa cinso candi." 
Psalms101:8 Inshiku shonse ine nkalakanda ababi bonse muli cino calo, no kutamfyamo ababi bonse mu musumba wakwa Yawe." 
Psalms102:1 We Yawe wingomfwa ipepo lyandi, umfwe noko ndekuuta mutuule!" 
Psalms102:2 Wilafisa icinso cobe kuli ine ilyo ndi mu bucushi! Uleteya ukutwi kobe kuli ine, wendeshe ukungasuka ilyo ndekuuta." 
Psalms102:3 Pantu inshiku shandi shipwa nge cushi, na mafupa yandi yapya nge cishishi ca mulilo." 
Psalms102:4 Ine no mutima nauma, ndi nge cani icauma. Ndelaba nokulya icakulya candi." 
Psalms102:5 Ine tepakutetateta nganshi, eico nshelefye imisakalala." 
Psalms102:6 Ine ndifye nge cuni ca mu matololo, kwati cipululu ca mu cibolya." 
Psalms102:7 Ine nshimona tulo, nabafye nge cuni icili ceka pa mutenge." 
Psalms102:8 Abalwani bandi balansenteka akasuba konse, abalentasha kale nomba basangwile ishina lyandi nge citipu." 
Psalms102:9 Imito eyasanguka icakulya candi ngo mukate, ifyakunwa fyandi nsakanya ne filamba," 
Psalms102:10 pa mulandu wa cipyu cobe no bukali bobe, pantu wambuula no kumposelekesha." 
Psalms102:11 Inshiku shandi shili nge cinshingwa ca cungulo. Ndebonsafye nge cani. 
Psalms102:12 Lelo we Yawe niwe uteeka pe, ne nkulo shonse shilakwibukisha." 
Psalms102:13 Uli nokwima no kubelelako Sioni uluse, pantu inshita naifika iyakumubelela uluse, inshita iyasontwa naifika." 
Psalms102:14 Pantu ababomfi bobe balitemwa amabwe ya mu Sioni, nangula kwena bamubongolola, ifitantala fyakwe filabaletela ubulanda." 
Psalms102:15 Abantu ba mishobo bakaba na katiina ke shina lyakwa Yawe, na bashamfumu bonse aba pano isonde bakatiina amaka yakwe." 
Psalms102:16 Pantu Yawe akakuula Sioni cipya cipya, kabili akamoneka mu bucindami bwakwe." 
Psalms102:17 Akasuka ipepo lya bantu ababusu, takasuule ne mipapatile yabo." 
Psalms102:18 Lekeni ifi fintu filembwe ku nkulo ishikakonkapo, pakuti abashilafyalwa bakalelumbanya Yawe." 
Psalms102:19 Ukufuma mu cifulo cakwe icamushilo Yawe alolesha, ukufuma mu mulu alolekesha pano isonde," 
Psalms102:20 kukumfwa ifyo abafungwa baleteta, no kulubula abapingulwa ukufwa." 
Psalms102:21 Kanshi abantu bakalalumba ishina lyakwa Yawe mu Sioni, no kulamulumbanya mu Yerusalemu," 
Psalms102:22 ilyo abantu ba mishobo yonse bakalongana pamo ne shamfumu kukupepa Yawe. 
Psalms102:23 Yawe, mu bwikashi bwa mweo wandi ancitile akafwanda, aipifya ne nshiku sha bumi bwandi." 
Psalms102:24 Elyo nasosa natila, “We Lesa wandi, winsenda pakati ka bumi bwandi, pantu wabakofye mu nkulo shonse.”" 
Psalms102:25 Pakutendeka niwe wabumbile icalo, na maboko yobe yene eyapanga imyulu." 
Psalms102:26 Fyena fikaloba, lelo iwe ukabelelela pe, fyena fikasapuka nge cakufwala. Ukafifuula nge fyakufwala, nafyo ninshi e milobele." 
Psalms102:27 Lelo iwe lyonse wabafye umo wabela, kabili ne myaka yobe tayakapwe nakalya." 
Psalms102:28 Abana ba babomfi bobe bakekala mu ceni cobe, no bufyashi bwabo bukapampamikwa pa cinso cobe." 
Psalms103:1 We mutima wandi paala Yawe na matotelo, na fyonse ifya mu mweo wandi filumbanye ishina lyakwe ilyamushilo." 
Psalms103:2 We mutima wandi paala Yawe na matotelo, kabili wilalaba ifyo akukwatila icikuku." 
Psalms103:3 Eukubelelako uluse kuli fyonse ubifya, eukuposha na ku malwele yobe yonse." 
Psalms103:4 Eukubwesha ku milomo ya nindi, eukukwatila icikuku ne citemwiko." 
Psalms103:5 Eukupeela ifintu ifisuma mu mikalile yobe, epakuti ubwaice bobe bupuputulwe ngo bwakwa kapumpe." 
Psalms103:6 Yawe eucita umulinganya no mucetekanya kuli bonse abafyengwa. 
Psalms103:7 Alangile inshila shakwe kuli Mose, ne micitile yakwe ku bena Israeli." 
Psalms103:8 Yawe waluse kabili wacikuku, tafulwa bwangu kabili wa citemwiko icishipwa." 
Psalms103:9 Ena tebaula pe iyoo, ne cipyu cakwe tacibelelela nakalya." 
Psalms103:10 Kabili pakutulimuna talinganya pamo ngefyo tumubifya, nangu ukulinganya pa fyabupulumushi fyesu." 
Psalms103:11 Nga filya fine umulu wasansama ukutaluka kwisonde, efyo ne citemwiko cakwe cakula pali abo abamukwatila akatiina." 
Psalms103:12 Nga filya fine akabanga katalukana na masamba, efyo nao atalusha ifibi fyesu kuli ifwe." 
Psalms103:13 Nga filya fine shibo akwatila bamwane inkumbu, efyo na Yawe akwatila abo abamukwatila akatiina." 
Psalms103:14 Pantu alishiba ifyo twabumbwa, alebukisha ukuti ifwe tuli lukungufye." 
Psalms103:15 Pantu ubumi bwa muntu bwaba nge cani, abalula nge luba lya mu mpanga." 
Psalms103:16 Ilyo umwela waisa pupapo, ninshi emyululukile, e miile, ne ncende lyaikelepo tayakalibukishe." 
Psalms103:17 Lelo icitemwiko cakwa Yawe ico akwatila abamutiina cena camuyayaya, no bololoke bwakwe tabupwa umukonkanina inkulo shonse isha bana ba bantu." 
Psalms103:18 Abo e bantu abasunga icipangano cakwe, kabili abebukisha ukukonka bwino bwino amafunde yakwe." 
Psalms103:19 Yawe ewateeka mu mulu, kabili no bufumu bwakwe ebwateeka aba pano isonde bonse." 
Psalms103:20 Mulepaala Yawe na matotelo imwe mwe bamalaika bakwe, mwe mpalume shabulamba ishibeela ifyebo fyakwe, mwe bomfwa ifyo asosa!" 
Psalms103:21 Mulepaala Yawe na matotelo imwe mwe fita fyakwe fya mu mulu, imwe mwe babomfi bakwe abacita ifyo afwaya!" 
Psalms103:22 Mulepaala Yawe na matotelo imwe mwe fibumbwa fyakwe, mu ncende shonse umo ateeka. Ee, we mutima wandi paala Yawe na matotelo!" 
Psalms104:1 We mutima wandi paala Yawe na matotelo. Yangu we Yawe Lesa wandi ifyo wacindama, kabili ifyo wapulama no bulamba!" 
Psalms104:2 We mwine ulaifimba ulubuuto nge cakufwala, walifungulula umulu nge tenti." 
Psalms104:3 Na pa menshi ya mu mulu epo wakuula umusumba obe, amakumbi eyo wacita iceleta lyobe, na pa mapindo ya mwela epo wendela." 
Psalms104:4 Imyela eyo wacita ukuba inkombe yobe, ne mingu sha mulilo ukuba ababomfi bobe." 
Psalms104:5 Walikasha isonde pa mufula waliko, icakuti teti litenkane iyoo." 
Psalms104:6 Walikupa isonde kuli bemba nge cakufwala, na menshi yafika na pa mulu wa mpili." 
Psalms104:7 Lelo ilyo wakalipe, amenshi yalibwelelemo, ilyo yaumfwile icibulukutu ce shiwi lyobe nayo yaile ulubilo." 
Psalms104:8 Yatentemwike mpili, yaya yalakonka imikonko, yalola noko wayateyanishishe." 
Psalms104:9 Waliyacitila umupaka uyo yashili nokuciluka, kanshi tayakatale ayabunsha icalo nakabili." 
Psalms104:10 Wapanga no tumfukumfuku twa menshi, tulepongoloka mu mipokapoka ya mpili." 
Psalms104:11 Ne nama sha mpanga emo shinwa amenshi, na bapunda ba mpanga batalalika ku mikoshi." 
Psalms104:12 Ku miti ya mu lulamba lwa mimana eko ifyuni fipikwila ifisansala, na ku misambo eko fililila." 
Psalms104:13 Ulatuma ne mfula iyifuma ku mulu pakulokelela mu mpili, ne calo cilasekelela ku fisabo fya mulimo obe." 
Psalms104:14 Ulamesha umulemfwe uwakuti iŋombe shilelya, ne filimwa ifyakuti umuntu alelima, epakuti alemona ifyakulya ukufuma ku mushili." 
Psalms104:15 Ulaleta no mwangashi uwakusansamusha umutima wa muntu, na mafuta ya miolifa ayakuyemfya umubili, kabili no mukate uwakubapeela amaka." 
Psalms104:16 Imiti yakwa Yawe ilalokelelwa bwino ku mfula, e miti iyalepesha iya keda ku Lebanoni iyo umwine alimba." 
Psalms104:17 Emo ifyuni fipikwila ifisansala fyafiko, na mu miti ya paini emo bakabaso basanga ubwikashi." 
Psalms104:18 Ifibushi mabwe fikala mu mpili ishitali, bapati nabo bekala mu milale ya mabwe." 
Psalms104:19 Umweshi nao wafwilisha abantu pakuti baleishiba ukwaluka kwa nshita, elyo na kasuba nako kalishiba inshita yakuwilapo." 
Psalms104:20 Ne mfifi niwe uileta, no kwila ninshi bwaila, kabili ne nama sha mpanga shonse nasho epakusokoloka." 
Psalms104:21 Inkalamo nasho shilabuluma pakwikata inama, shifwaya icakulya kuli iwe we Lesa." 
Psalms104:22 Akasuba nga katula ninshi shabwelelamo mu mateshi yashiko, emo shayalala." 
Psalms104:23 Kanshi abantu nabo elyo bafuma, baya ku milimo yabo mpakafye na ku cungulo." 
Psalms104:24 Yangu we Yawe, ifintu ubwingi ifyo wabumbile! Ni mu mano emo wafibumbile. Ee, na mwisonde mwaisulafye ifibumbwa fyobe fyeka fyeka." 
Psalms104:25 Kwaba na bemba umukalamba uwapabukisha, umwaba ifibumbwa ifishingapendwa, ifipema ifingi ifikulu ne finono." 
Psalms104:26 Na mato emo yapitana ukuya no kubwela, na cishimweshimwe ci Lefiatani ico iwe wabumbile ukwangalamo." 
Psalms104:27 Ifi fyonse niwe filoleshako pakuti ufipeele ifyakulya pa nshita iyalinga. 
Psalms104:28 Ilyo ufipeela ifyakulya, nafyo filalonganika. Ilyo ufungulula amaboko, filapokelela ifintu fisuma." 
Psalms104:29 Nga wafifutatila, filakwata no mwenso, Nga wafipoka umweo, fyaleka no kupema, nafyo filafwa fyabwelela na ku lukungu." 
Psalms104:30 Nga watuma no Mupashi obe, awe ninshi filabumbwa, ulalenga kanshi ne sonde ukulengwa cipya cipya." 
Psalms104:31 Uleke ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bulebelelela pe! Yawe nalesekela mufyo abomba! 
Psalms104:32 Ena atila nga alolesha pesonde, lilaitentelafye, ilyo akumya impili ninshi nasho shilafutumuna icushi." 
Psalms104:33 Nakulaimbila Yawe ukushinta napo ine nkafwila, ine nakulaimba ishamalumbo kuli Lesa wandi ilyo ncili no mweo." 
Psalms104:34 Uleke amatontonkanyo yandi yabe ayakumusekesha, pantu ine nsekelela muli Yawe." 
Psalms104:35 Uleke imbifi shilobelele shonse pano isonde, elyo na babifi peshalafye nelyo umo. We mutima wandi paala Yawe na matotelo! Akulumbanya Yawe!" 
Psalms105:1 Akutoteleni Yawe! Mulekuuta peshina lyakwe. Muleshimikilako ne mishobo ya benafyalo ifyo acita. 
Psalms105:2 Mulemwimbila, muleimba isha malumbo, mulelanda pa fintu ifyakupapa ifyo acita." 
Psalms105:3 Mulesekelela mwishina lyakwe ilyamushilo. Muleleka imitima ya bafwaya Yawe ilesansamuka. 
Psalms105:4 Mulelolesha kuli Yawe na ku maka yakwe, mulefwaya icinso cakwe inshiku shonse." 
Psalms105:5 Muleibukisha ifipeshamano ifyo acita, mwilalaba ifinjelengwe no bupingushi bwakwe ubo alanda." 
Psalms105:6 Mwe bufyashi bwakwa Abrahamu umubomfi wakwa Yawe, imwe bamwana Yakobo, mwebo aisalilafye." 
Psalms105:7 Ena ni Yawe, e Lesa wesu. Ubupingushi bwakwe bwaba pano isonde ponse." 
Psalms105:8 Alebukisha icipangano cakwe umuyayaya, icebo ico akonkomesha ku nkulo ikana limo (1,000)," 
Psalms105:9 E cipangano ico apangene na Abrahamu, umulapo alapile kuli Isaki,." 
Psalms105:10 Acifikilishepo kuli Yakobo ukuba icipope, ukuti cikabe icakubelelela pe kuli Israeli, mukutila," 
Psalms105:11 “Kuli iwe ine nkapeela icalo ca Kenani, ecikaba icuma cobe icabupyani.”" 
Psalms105:12 Ilyo aba bantu balifye abampendwa iyinono, abanono icine cine kabili abeni muli ici calo," 
Psalms105:13 Abaleendauka ukufuma ku mushobo umo ukuya ku mushobo ubiye kabili ukufuma ku bufumu bumo na ku bufumu bubiye. 
Psalms105:14 Nomba Yawe tasuminishe nangu umo ukuti alebacusha, pakubacingilila alekalipila bashamfumu." 
Psalms105:15 Atile, “Kwiba uwakwikata mu basubwa bandi abo nasala, kwiba uwakucusha bakasesema bandi.”" 
Psalms105:16 Yawe atumine icipowe mu calo, kabili aonawile ifyakulya fyonse." 
Psalms105:17 Kabili alitangisheko umuntu umo ni Yosefu, uo bashitishe ngo musha." 
Psalms105:18 Amolu yakwe yalifye filonda filonda ku minyololo iyo bamukakileko, bamukakile ne koli lya cela mu mukoshi." 
Psalms105:19 Yasuka ne nshita asobele kale yafika, mpaka no kusobela kwakwa Yawe kwafikilishiwa." 
Psalms105:20 Elyo imfumu ya mu Egupto yatuma abakuya mukakula, uyu wine e kateeka wa mishobo uwamukakwile." 
Psalms105:21 Yamucita umukalamba pa ba kwisano lyaiko, no kuba kangalila wa cuma caiko conse." 
Psalms105:22 Yosefu alefundako na bana bakwa Farao umo alefwaila, kabili no kupandako abakalamba ba kwisano amano yene yene." 
Psalms105:23 Elyo Israeli aile ku Egupto, Yakobo aikele ngo mulebeshi mu calo ca Hamu." 
Psalms105:24 Yawe epakubafusha nganshi, no kubalenga ukuba abengi ukucila abalwani babo." 
Psalms105:25 Ecalengele na bena Egupto bapate abantu bakwe, kabili no kupangila ababomfi bakwe." 
Psalms105:26 Kanshi epakutuma umubomfi wakwe Mose, na Aroni uo asalile umwine." 
Psalms105:27 Bacitile ifipeshamano mu Egupto mwine, ne finjelengwe mu calo ca Hamu." 
Psalms105:28 Yawe atuma imfifi mu calo, namo mwafiitafye fititi, Lelo abena Egupto bena bakaanininafye ukubeela amashiwi yakwe." 
Psalms105:29 Amenshi ya mu mimana yabo ayasangula umulopa, ici calengele ne sabi ukufwa." 
Psalms105:30 Mu calo cabo conse mwaisulamo ifyula, ifyaile fikafye na ku masanshi ya bakateeka wabo." 
Psalms105:31 Ilyo Yawe alandile, awe no tushembele utwingi twaisa, na balunshi abengi nganshi bakumana icalo conse." 
Psalms105:32 Imfula yayaluka ukuba iyacitalawe iya mabwe, ne myele ya nkuba yapanta mu calo conse." 
Psalms105:33 Aonaula ne myangashi ne mikunyu yabo, awisha ne miti mu calo cabo." 
Psalms105:34 Ilyo Yawe alandile, awe na makanta alakata, na fipalala imintapendwa." 
Psalms105:35 Fyalya ifintu fyonse ifyamenene mu calo cabo, pamo ne fisabo fyonse ifya mu mushili." 
Psalms105:36 Elyo Yawe aipaya amabeli mu calo ca Egupto, abana babo abo bafyele ninshi bacili na maka ya bulumendo." 
Psalms105:37 Epakufumyamo abena Israeli, nabo basenda silifa na golide, kabili tapali nangu umo pakati kabo uwakushingashinga." 
Psalms105:38 Abena Egupto bena tepakutemwa pakumona uko abena Israeli baleya, pantu balebatiina nganshi." 
Psalms105:39 Yawe epakwansa ne kumbi pakubakupa, ne ntumba ya mulilo iyakubasanikila ubushiku." 
Psalms105:40 Ilyo bamulombele icakulya, nao alibapeele inkwale, kabili alibapeele umukate ukufuma ku mulu uwakuti baleikuta." 
Psalms105:41 Alepwile icilibwe, mwafumfumuka amenshi, nayo yalepita mu matololo kwati mumana." 
Psalms105:42 Pantu alibukishe icilayo cakwe icamushilo, ico alaile Abrahamu umubomfi wakwe." 
Psalms105:43 Kanshi ifi efyo Yawe afumishe abantu bakwe abaile balesekelela. Abantu bakwe abo asalile umwine baile baleanga no tupundu baleyaula. 
Psalms105:44 Aile bapeela ne fyalo fya ba mishobo imbi, aleka bapoka ne fyalo bashaculilepo." 
Psalms105:45 Epakuti balenakila amafunde yakwe, balesunga ne fipope fyakwe. Akulumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms106:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Muletotela Yawe, pantu ena musuma, ne citemwiko cakwe camuyayaya." 
Psalms106:2 Nani engalanda pa fintu ifyakupapa ifyo Yawe acita, nangu nani engamulumbanya ukufikapo?" 
Psalms106:3 Balishuka abantu ababaka umulinganya, abacita ifisuma inshiku shonse." 
Psalms106:4 We Yawe, ukanjibukisheko ilyo ukakumbusukako abantu bobe. Na ine wine ukangafweko ilyo ukapususha abobe." 
Psalms106:5 Epakuti na ine nkasansamukile mu bukankala bwa basalwa bobe, epakuti na ine nkasekelele capamo no mushobo obe, kabili no kukupeela amalumbo capamo na bantu ba bupyani bobe." 
Psalms106:6 Ifwe twalibifya nga filya fine ne fikolwe fyesu fyabifishe, twalilufyenye kabili twalicita ifyabubifi." 
Psalms106:7 Bashifwe ilyo bali mu Egupto tabaposeleko amano ku fipeshamano fyobe. Ilingi line balelaba icikuku cobe icishaikulila, kabili balikusangukile ku lulamba lwa Bemba Wakashika." 
Psalms106:8 Lelo ena alibapuswishe pa mulandu we shina lyakwe, epakuti ubulamba bwa maka yakwe bwishibikwe." 
Psalms106:9 Aebawile Bemba Wakashika nao auma, no kukama akama. Ayabwishe na bantu bakwe apauma ndii nga mu matololo." 
Psalms106:10 Abapuswishe ku babapatile, ku maboko ya balwani babo eko abapokolweleko." 
Psalms106:11 Amenshi yaibishe abalwani babo, tapapuswike nangu umo nakalya." 
Psalms106:12 Elintu abantu basumine ifilayo fyakwa Yawe, kabili balamwimbila ne nyimbo shakumulumbanya." 
Psalms106:13 Nomba tapapitile ne nshita balaba kabili nefyo abacitile, bakaana ukulolela ukupandwa amano kuli ena." 
Psalms106:14 Mu matololo baikatwa no lunkumbwa, no kwesha baesha Lesa muli cilya ciswebebe." 
Psalms106:15 Kanshi epakubapeela ifyo balekabila, nomba abatumine icikuko icabipisha nganshi." 
Psalms106:16 Mu matololo bena bafimbila Mose, na Aroni uwapatwilwe kukubombela Yawe." 
Psalms106:17 Elyo umushili walepwike wamina Datani, washika na Abilamu na bantu bakwe." 
Psalms106:18 No mulilo nao waimina abalebomfwila, waoca na balya babifi." 
Psalms106:19 Pa lupili lwa Holebu bapanga icilubi ca ciponti ca ŋombe, no kupepa eco balapepa ico cintu ca celafye." 
Psalms106:20 Bakabwishe ubucindami bwakwa Yawe, babutwala mukulacindikilako icimpashanya ca cilume wa ŋombe icilya icani." 
Psalms106:21 Balaba na kuli Lesa uwabapuswishe, uyo uwacitile ifintu ifyakupapa mu Egupto," 
Psalms106:22 ne fipeshamano acitile mu calo ca Hamu, ne fintu ifyakupapa ifyo acitile mu lulamba lwa Bemba Wakashika." 
Psalms106:23 Kanshi Yawe epakupanga ukubalofya. Akubula Mose umusalwa wakwe ukubemininako, no kubweshako cipyu mu mutima, nga alibalofeshe." 
Psalms106:24 Kwena bena balisuulile icalo cisuma, pantu tabatetekele ubulayo abalaile." 
Psalms106:25 Baikalilefye ukulailishanya mu matenti yabo, bakaana no kulaumfwila Yawe." 
Psalms106:26 Kanshi nao epakwimya ukuboko no kulapa kuli bena ukuti, “Imwe bonse nkalenga ukuti mukafwile muno mu matololo." 
Psalms106:27 Ine nkasalanganya aba nko shenu mu benafyalo, no kuleka bakaye fwila mwanabene.”" 
Psalms106:28 Baliikulike kwikoli lyakwa Baali uwa ku Peo, balyako na malambo ayo baletuula imilungu iyafwa." 
Psalms106:29 Awe basuka babalamuna Yawe nao afulwa palwa micitile yabo iyibi, abantu epakuponenwa ne cikuko icabipisha." 
Psalms106:30 Lelo Fineasi aisa ima, akanda abalufyenye, awe ne cikuko efyo capwile." 
Psalms106:31 Na pali ici alengelwe ukuba umololoke, ukushintafye no mwakulakonkanina inkulo yamuyayaya." 
Psalms106:32 Kabili ku lulamba lwa menshi ya Meriba balikalifye Yawe, basuka baletelela na Mose pa mulandu wa cilubo cabo." 
Psalms106:33 Pantu basangukile Umupashi wakwa Lesa, ici ecalengele nokuti Mose alandefye icilande lande ifyo ashali nakulanda." 
Psalms106:34 Balikene ukulofya aba mishobo, ngefyo Yawe abakonkomeshe ukucita." 
Psalms106:35 Lelo bena balaampana na benafyalo, elyo balakonka ne ntambi shabo." 
Psalms106:36 Balapepa no tulubi twabo, nato epakubaletelela." 
Psalms106:37 Basukile balaipaya na bana babo abaume na banakashi, balabatuula amalambo ku mipashi yakowela." 
Psalms106:38 Basumishe umulopa wa bakaele, abana babo abaume na banakashi, ebo balepeela ilambo ku tulubi twa mu Kenani, kabili casuka ne calo cakowela pa mulandu wa mulopa wabo." 
Psalms106:39 Imicitile yabo yalengele babe abakowela, pa mulandu wa micitile yabo basangwike impulumushi." 
Psalms106:40 Kanshi Yawe epakufulilwa abantu bakwe, apata na bantu ba bupyani bwakwe." 
Psalms106:41 Epakubapeela mu minwe ya benafyalo, abalwani babo bene nomba ebalabateeka." 
Psalms106:42 Abalwani babo balabateekafye buluku buluku, kabili babalenga ukunakilafye ubuteko bwabo." 
Psalms106:43 Imikufye iyingi Yawe alebalubula, lelo bena babikilepofye ukutalama, basuka baobelelwafye kukubifya." 
Psalms106:44 Lelo nangu caleba ifyo, Yawe alesakamana ku macushi yabo ilyo aleumfwa ku nkuuta shabo." 
Psalms106:45 Ni pa mulandu wabo epo aibukishishe icipangano cakwe, no kubalangulukila umwabela ubukulu bwa citemwiko cakwe icishipwa." 
Psalms106:46 Alelenga na bonse abalebasenda bunkole, balebalangulukilako." 
Psalms106:47 Tupususheko, we Yawe we Lesa wesu, tukolonganye no kutufumya mu mishobo ya benafyalo, epakuti tuletotela ishina lyobe ilyamushilo, kabili tuletakishisha mu lulumbi lobe." 
Psalms106:48 Napaalwe na matotelo Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli ukufuma ku muyayaya ukushinta ku muyayaya. Lekeni bantu bonse nabo batile, “Ameni! ” Akulumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms107:1 Peeleni ukutasha kuli Yawe pantu ena musuma, icitemwiko cakwe camuyayaya." 
Psalms107:2 Lekeni abo Yawe alubula balelanda aya mashiwi, abo alubula ukufuma ku balwani abalebacusha," 
Psalms107:3 abo abwesha ukufuma mu fyalo, ukufuma ku kabanga na ku masamba, na bafuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso na ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Psalms107:4 Bamo balelulumbafye mu matololo umushali nshila, tabasangile inshila iyakuya ku musumba uko bengekala." 
Psalms107:5 Baculile nganshi ku nsala ne cilaka, na mano yakupusukilamo yasukile yapwa." 
Psalms107:6 Kanshi epakupunda mutuule kuli Yawe mu macushi yabo, nao epakubapokololako ku mafya yabo." 
Psalms107:7 Epakubatungulula mu nshila iyalungama ku musumba ukwakuya ikala. 
Psalms107:8 Ee, balekeni baletotela Yawe pa citemwiko cakwe icishipwa, na pa fintu ifyakupapa ifyo acitila abantu bakwe." 
Psalms107:9 Pantu eupwisha ne cilaka ca bantu, no kulisha abali ne nsala ifyakulya ifisuma." 
Psalms107:10 Bamo balikele umwafiita fititi elyo na mu malangulushi, kabili bali mu macushi ayene yene, abafungwa ne minyololo ya fyela." 
Psalms107:11 Pantu balitalamine amashiwi yakwa Lesa, kabili balisuulile amano ayo Lesa Mukulu alebebako." 
Psalms107:12 Ecalengele abapose mukubomba imilimo yacibe nganshi, nangu bawe batalansuke takwaleba nangu umo uwakubemyako." 
Psalms107:13 Kanshi epakupunda mutuule kuli Yawe mu macushi yabo, nao epakubapusushako ku mafya yabo." 
Psalms107:14 Yawe epakubafumya mu mfifi na mu malangulushi, elyo aputaula ne minyololo yabo." 
Psalms107:15 Balekeni baletotela Yawe pa citemwiko cakwe icishipwa, na pa fintu ifyakupapa ifyo acitila abantu bakwe." 
Psalms107:16 Pantu alapankula impongolo sha mukuba, no kuputaula imipilikisho yashiko ya fyela." 
Psalms107:17 Bamo basangwike ifiwelewele pa mulandu wa bucisanguka bwabo, kanshi epakuculisha pa mulandu wa fyakubifya fyabo." 
Psalms107:18 Casuka ne cakulya cine calabaselaula ku mikoshi, kanshi epakubafye mupepi ne milomo ya cilindi." 
Psalms107:19 Kanshi epakukuuta mutuule kuli Yawe mu macushi yabo, nao epakubapusushako ku mafya yabo." 
Psalms107:20 Atuma ishiwi, no kubondapa lyabondapa, abafumya na ku milomo ya cilindi." 
Psalms107:21 Ee, balekeni baletotela Yawe pa citemwiko cakwe icishipwa, na pa fintu ifyakupapa ifyo acitila abantu bakwe." 
Psalms107:22 Balekeni balemutuulila amalambo yakutotela, kabili no kulalanda pa milimo yakwe mu nyimbo shansansa." 
Psalms107:23 Bamo baleenda ne fimato pali bemba, ifyo balebombelamo imilimo ya makwebo pali babemba abakalamba." 
Psalms107:24 Balemona ne milimo Yawe abomba, ne fintu fyakupapa ifyaba muli bemba." 
Psalms107:25 Ena atila nga alanda, awe ninshi ne cimwela calapupa, caimya na matamba pali bemba." 
Psalms107:26 Ne fimato nafyo epakulaimina mu mulu no kulaiteneka pa menshi, abantu basuka bakwata no mwenso, na mano yapela." 
Psalms107:27 Baletalansukafye no kulapungaila kwati bantu bakolelwe ubwalwa, ne fyakucita ninshi fyabula." 
Psalms107:28 Kanshi epakukuuta mutuule kuli Yawe mu macushi yabo, nao epakubafumyako ku mafya yabo." 
Psalms107:29 Mukatepentepe atalalika ne cimwela, na matamba ya pali bemba yatalalafye tondolo." 
Psalms107:30 Nabo tepakusansamuka ico bemba atalala tondolo, nao epakubatungulula kuntu baleya ku cabu." 
Psalms107:31 Ee, balekeni baletotela Yawe pa citemwiko cakwe icishipwa, na pa fintu ifyakupapa ifyo acitila abantu bakwe." 
Psalms107:32 Balekeni balemulumbilisha mu lukuta lwa cintubwingi, no kulalumbanishisha mu cilye ca bakalamba." 
Psalms107:33 Ayalwile imimana ukubafye amatololo, no kukamya utumfukumfuku twa menshi." 
Psalms107:34 Eusangula ne calo caumfwika ukuba ica cicele, pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa bantu abekalamo." 
Psalms107:35 Eusangula amatololo ukuba ifishiba fya menshi, ne mpanga iyauma ndi ukubako utumfukumfuku twa menshi." 
Psalms107:36 Kulya eko atwele abantu abali ne nsala pakuti eko baleikala, nabo epakukuulako no musumba uwakuti emo baleikala." 
Psalms107:37 Batandile ne mbuto mu mabala, elyo balimbamo ne myangashi, awe balasombolamo ne fisabo ifingi nganshi." 
Psalms107:38 Ena nao abapaala nabo balasanduluka nganshi, kabili asandulula ne fitekwa fyabo fine." 
Psalms107:39 Kanshi impendwa yabo yalicepeleko, kabili balipwile amaka, pa mulandu wakutitikishiwa no bucushi pamo no bulanda." 
Psalms107:40 Alangile ukuti tasekele mu ntungulushi shabo, aleka nokuti baye balepupushikafye mu matololo umushaba nshila." 
Psalms107:41 Lelo abapina bena abapusushako mu bulanda bwabo, asandulula ne ndupwa shabo nge mikuni ya mpaanga." 
Psalms107:42 Abantu abololoke pakumona ifi bena balasansamuka, lelo ababifi bonse bekalafye tondolo." 
Psalms107:43 Ala mwe bamano, muletontonkanya pali ifi fintu, kabili muletontonkanya pa citemwiko icishaikulila nganshi icakwa Yawe." 
Psalms108:1 We Lesa umutima wandi ulifye uwashipa, ine nakulakwimbila inyimbo sha malumbo no mutima wandi onse." 
Psalms108:2 Ima we seese, na iwe we nsango, ine nalashibusha amacaca." 
Psalms108:3 We Yawe, ine nakulakulumbanya pakati ka mishobo ya bantu, ine nakulaimba palwa iwe pakati ka benafyalo." 
Psalms108:4 Pantu icitemwiko cobe cikulu nganshi ukucila ne myulu, kabili icishinka cobe cafika na mu makumbi." 
Psalms108:5 Ube uwasumbulwa ukucila na pa myulu, we Lesa, no bucindami bobe bukumane isonde lyonse!" 
Psalms108:6 Tupususheko no kutwafwa ku maka ya kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo, epakuti abantu bobe abo watemwisha balubulwe." 
Psalms108:7 Lesa nalanda mu cifulo cakwe icamushilo ati, “Ilyo nkacimfya nkakanya Shekemu, no kwakanya ishika lya Sukoti." 
Psalms108:8 Gileadi ena wandi, na Manase nao wine wandi, Efulemu e cimpompo candi, Yuda nao wine e nkonto yandi iyabufumu." 
Psalms108:9 Moabu ena e musambilo wandi, pali Edomu epo nakulaposa indyato shandi, na pa calo ca Filisiti epo nkapundila ishiwi lyakucimfya.”" 
Psalms108:10 Nga nani akantwala mu musumba we linga? Nga uukantungulula ku Edomu nani? 
Psalms108:11 Bushe teiwe we Lesa watuposa? Waleka no kulaenda ne fita fyesu! 
Psalms108:12 Shi wingatwafwilishako ukulwisha abalwani, pantu amaka yabuntunse ala yafyefye!" 
Psalms108:13 Lesa nga aba ku lubali lwesu ninshi tulecimfya, kabili akanyantaula na balwani besu." 
Psalms109:1 We Lesa, weo ine numbanya, witalalafye tondolo." 
Psalms109:2 Pantu ababifi na bantu incenjeshi balelanda pali ine, balembepesha ne fyakumbepesha no tunwa twabo." 
Psalms109:3 Balelanda ifintu ifyalupato pali ine, balendwisha ne ushili na mulandu." 
Psalms109:4 Bena balenjimina nelyo ine kwena nabatemwa, lelo ndi muntu uupepa nganshi." 
Psalms109:5 Ine kuti nga nabacitila ifisuma, bena bancitila ifyabipa. Nga nati kambatemwe bena ninshi kumpata." 
Psalms109:6 Saleni umuntu imbifi eo amulubulwishe, muleke no mulwani eminine ku kuboko kwakwe ukwa ku kulyo." 
Psalms109:7 Lekeni bamusange no mulandu ilyo alelubulula, na pa mipapatile pene apeelelwepo imilandu." 
Psalms109:8 Kuti calinga inshiku shakwe ishakwikala pano calo shicepeleko, na pa mulimo wakwe papyanine umbi aletungulula." 
Psalms109:9 Kuti cawama abana bakwe ukushala bakashiwa, no mukashi wakwe abe mukamfwilwa." 
Psalms109:10 Kuti calinga bamwane baleseulukafye mukulapula, nokuti babatamfye na mu fipompa fyabo ifya mayanda." 
Psalms109:11 Kuti cawama uwamukongweshako ese amupoke ifyuma fyakwe fyonsefye, na bantu bambi bambifye ebo bese bamutape fyonse ifyo acucutikila." 
Psalms109:12 Kuti cawama pebafye nangu umo uwakumulangulukilako, kabili pebafye nangu umo uwakukumbusukako bakashiwa bakwe." 
Psalms109:13 Kuti cawama aba mu luko lwakwe bakalobelelefye bonse nakalya nakalya, na mashina yabo yekeshibikwa na mu nkulo iyikakonkapo." 
Psalms109:14 Kuti cawama we Yawe, uleibukisha ifyabupulumushi fya fikolwe fyakwe, kabili ne fyabubifi fyakwa nyina fikatala afifutwa." 
Psalms109:15 Kuti cawama we Yawe, uleibukisha ifibi fyabo lyonsefye, epakuti na pano isonde bekalabebukishapo." 
Psalms109:16 Pantu ena taletontonkanyapo ukucitila abantu bambi uluse, ena alecusha umupina na babusu, na bafunshika imitima mpaka bafwa." 
Psalms109:17 Ena alitemenwe ukulatipwila bambi, kanshi nao intipu kashimulye. Tasangilemo insansa mukupaala, kanshi nao peba nelyo umo uwakumupaala." 
Psalms109:18 Ena afwale intipu nge cakufwala cakwe, intipu shakwe shali munda mumwakwe nga menshi, shamwingilile mu mafupa nga mafuta." 
Psalms109:19 Lekeni shimukupilile nge nsalu afwala, kabili shimufyentefye ngo mushipi wa mu musana umuyayaya." 
Psalms109:20 Kanshi ifi efyo we Yawe ulimune abalwani bandi, abalanda ifyabipa pali ine." 
Psalms109:21 Lelo we Mfumu Yawe, pa mulandu we shina lyobefye untuuleko, mpokololako pa mulandu wa busuma bwa citemwiko cobe icishipwa." 
Psalms109:22 Pantu ine ndi mupina kabili nshikwete nangu kamo, no mutima wandi naupakaswa mukati kandi." 
Psalms109:23 Ine ndefumapo nge cinshingwa ilyo akasuba kawa, ndetafulukafye nga makanta." 
Psalms109:24 Amakufi yandi nayapomponteka pa mulandu wakufunga ukulya, no mubili wandi ushelefye imisakalala." 
Psalms109:25 Ine nsangwikefye uwakuwelwa ku bampata, abantu baleti nga bamona uko ndepita, awe bena balakuntafye imitwe." 
Psalms109:26 We Yawe, we Lesa wandi, ala mpusushako ukulingana ne citemwiko cobe icishipwa." 
Psalms109:27 Uleke beshibe ukuti kuboko kobe, we Yawe, ekwacita ici." 
Psalms109:28 Ilyo bena balendapisha, lelo iwe ulempaalafye! Ilyo banjiminina, uleke balengwe nsoni, uleke ine ne mubomfi ndesansamuka." 
Psalms109:29 Uleke abalwani bandi basebane, ne nsoni shibakupe nge cakufwala." 
Psalms109:30 Na kanwa kandi nakulakutotela we Yawe, nakulakulumbanishisha na mu lukuta." 
Psalms109:31 Pantu wiminina kukupokololako umulanda, ukupususha umweo wakwe ku bamupingwila ukufwa." 
Psalms110:1 Yawe aebele imfumu yandi ati, “Ikala ku kuboko kwandi ukwa ku kulyo, mpaka abalwani bobe nkabacite apakunyanta amakasa yobe.”" 
Psalms110:2 Mu Sioni emo Yawe akalundulwila amaka yobe ayabufumu, epakuti ukaleteeka pakati ka balwani bobe." 
Psalms110:3 Abashilika bobe bakalaipeelesha mukukubeela pa bushiku bwa nkondo. Ubupulami bwa bufumu wabupeelwefye ku macaca, pa bushiku bwine ubo wafyelwemo. Abalumendo bobe bakesa kuli iwe ngo mume." 
Psalms110:4 Yawe alilapa umulapo uo takalapuluke atila, “Iwe uli shimapepo wa pe na pe, muli bushimapepo bwakwa Melikisedeki.”" 
Psalms110:5 Imfumu ili lwa ku kulyo kobe, ubushiku bwa kukalipa kwaiko ikashonaula bashamfumu bonse." 
Psalms110:6 Ikapingula imishobo ya benafyalo, ikasha ne fitumbi fyabo ntangali ntangali, ikashonaula ne shamfumu sha pano isonde ponse." 
Psalms110:7 Imfumu ikanwa amenshi mu kamana akabela mu nshila, eico ikabwesha amaka no kusansula icinso ne nsansa." 
Psalms111:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Ine nakulatotela Yawe no mutima wandi onse, umulongana abantu abaololoka imitima, mu lukuta mwine." 
Psalms111:2 Ificitwa fyakwa Yawe fikulu nganshi, balafitontonkanyapo bonse abafitemwa." 
Psalms111:3 Fyonse ifyo ena acita awe fintu fyacindama kabili fyabulamba, kabili ubulungami bwakwe bwa pe na pe." 
Psalms111:4 Ena alenga lyonse tuleibukisha ifipapwa fyakwe. Yawe alikwatisha icikuku no luse. 
Psalms111:5 Eupekanishisha icakulya bonse abamukwatila akatiina, kabili alebukisha icipangano umuyayaya." 
Psalms111:6 Ena alilanga abantu bakwe ifyo amaka yakwe yaba, pakubapeela ifyalo fya mishobo imbi." 
Psalms111:7 Imilimo ya maboko yakwe yacishinka kabili yamulinganya, amafunde yakwe yonse ala yalinga ukucetekela." 
Psalms111:8 Yakubelelela pe na pe, pantu yapangilwe ayalungama kabili ayacishinka." 
Psalms111:9 Ena apeele ukulubuka ku bantu bakwe, alipangana nabo icipangano icakubelelela, ishina lyakwe lyamushilo kabili elilenga na katiina." 
Psalms111:10 Ukukwatila Yawe akatiina, e ntendekelo ya mano, Na bonse abakonka amafunde yakwe balikwata amano ayakumfwikisha bwino ifintu. Ena alelumbanishiwa umushinsanshiku." 
Psalms112:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Alishuka umuntu uwaba na katiina kuli Yawe, uumfwa insansa mukubeela amafunde yakwe." 
Psalms112:2 Abana bakwe bakulaba impalume mu calo, ne nkulo ya balungami ikaba iyapaalwa." 
Psalms112:3 Icuma no bukankala fikaba mu ŋanda yakwe, kabili no bololoke bwakwe bwa pe na pe." 
Psalms112:4 Nangu ni mu mfifi ulubuuto lulasanikila umololoke, pantu ena wacikuku no luse kabili umuntu umulungami." 
Psalms112:5 Alishuka umuntu uwakwata umutima uwakupeela, kabili uukongwesha ukwabula ukulundishapo insonsela, uushaba no bucenjeshi muli fyonse ifyo acita." 
Psalms112:6 Pantu ena takabale atelentenshiwa nakalya, umuntu umololoke takabale alabikwako umuyayaya." 
Psalms112:7 Ena tatiina kubililwa imbila ibi, pantu alishipa mu mutima, atetekelafye muli Yawe." 
Psalms112:8 Umutima wakwe walicingililwa, tatiina kantu nakalya, mukulekelesha akamonako uko abalwani bakwe bakacimba." 
Psalms112:9 Alisalanganya konse konse ifyakupeela abapina, kabili no bololoke bwakwe bwa pe na pe. Akakwatisha na maka kabili akalacindikwa." 
Psalms112:10 Umuntu umubifi nga amona ifi awe tepakufulwa, akalasenkanya ameno, no kuloba akalobelelafye, no kukabila kwa mubifi takwakacite kantu nakalya." 
Psalms113:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Mwe babomfi bakwa Yawe akumulumbanyeni, akulumbanyeni ishina lyakwa Yawe!" 
Psalms113:2 Lekeni ishina lyakwa Yawe lipaalwe na matotelo ukutampa lelo ukufika na ku muyayaya. 
Psalms113:3 Ukutendekafye pa kutula kwa kasuba ukufika napo kawila, ishina lyakwa Yawe elyo nalilecindikwa." 
Psalms113:4 Yawe alisumbulwa ukucila pa bantu ba mishobo yonse pano isonde, no bucindami bwakwe bwalicila imyulu!" 
Psalms113:5 Bushe nani uwingalingana na Yawe, Lesa wesu, uwaikala mu myulu umwasansama?" 
Psalms113:6 Ena alenama pakulolesha, apabela ulwelele ne sonde." 
Psalms113:7 Ena ewimya umulanda mu lukungu, kabili no kwimya umupina pa mwina wa fisoso." 
Psalms113:8 Epakuti baleikala pamo ne ntungulushi, nasho intungulushi sha bantu babo." 
Psalms113:9 Ena ewacindamika iŋumba pa ŋanda yaiko, ukuba iyasansamuka nga nyina wa bana. Lumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms114:1 Ilyo Israeli afumine mu Egupto, emukuti ilyo aba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo bafumine pakati ka balesosa ululimi lumbi," 
Psalms114:2 elyo Yuda asangwile icifulo cakwa Lesa icamushilo, na Israeli asangwike icalo aleteeka umwine." 
Psalms114:3 Ilyo bemba amwene, alifulumwike, no mumana wa Yordani nao wabwelela kunuma." 
Psalms114:4 Impili nasho shaletolauka amabaka nga basukusuku, no tupili nato twalacina ngo tupaanga." 
Psalms114:5 Cinshi ico iwe we bemba wafulumukile? Nobe we Yordani, cinshi ico wabwelele kunuma?" 
Psalms114:6 Nemwe mwe mpili, cinshi ico mwaletolaukila nga basukusuku? Nemwe mwe tupili, cinshi ico mwalecinina ngo tupaanga?" 
Psalms114:7 We sonde tutuma pa cinso ca Mfumu, tutuma pa cinso cakwa Lesa wakwa Yakobo." 
Psalms114:8 Enafye ewasangwile icilibwe ukuba icishiba ca menshi, ne libwe ilyakosa ndi ukuba utumfukumfuku twa menshi." 
Psalms115:1 Tekuli ifwe, we Yawe, ala tekuli ifwe, lelo ishina lyobe elyo licindikwe, pa mulandu wa citemwiko cobe icishipwa na bucishinka bobe." 
Psalms115:2 Nga cinshi ico imishobo ingalaipushisha aiti, “Bushe Lesa wabo aba kwi?”" 
Psalms115:3 Ala ifwe Lesa wesu aba mu mulu, alacita na fyonse ifyo atemenwe umwine." 
Psalms115:4 Lelo bena utulubi twabo filubi ifya silifa ne fya golide, fintufye ifyapangwa na maboko ya bantu." 
Psalms115:5 Utunwa twena fyalikwata lelo tafilanda nakalya, amenso nayo fyalikwata, lelo ukumona tafimona nakalya." 
Psalms115:6 Amatwi nayo fyalikwata, lelo tafyumfwa nakalya, ne myona fyalikwata, lelo ukununsha tafinunsha nakalya." 
Psalms115:7 Iminwe fyalikwata, lelo tafipampanta nakalya, na molu fyalikwata, lelo ukwenda tafyenda nakalya, nangufye iciunda ce shiwi lyafiko tacumfwika nakalya." 
Psalms115:8 Bonse abafipanga nabo bakaba nga fyena, kabili efyo cikaba ku baficetekelamo." 
Psalms115:9 Imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli, tetekeleni Yawe, pantu eumwafwako kabili e nkwela iyamucingililako." 
Psalms115:10 Imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Aroni, tetekeleni Yawe, pantu eumwafwako kabili e nkwela iyakumucingililako." 
Psalms115:11 Imwe mwe bamukwatila akatiina, tetekeleni Yawe, pantu eumwafwako kabili e nkwela iyakumucingililako." 
Psalms115:12 Yawe alatwibukisha, kabili ifwe akatupaala. Ena akapaala na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli, akapaala na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Aroni." 
Psalms115:13 Ena akapaala bonse abakwatila Yawe akatiina, abalanda na bakankala cimo cinefye." 
Psalms115:14 Yawe engamupeelesha ubufyashi, bonse pamo pene imwe na bana benu." 
Psalms115:15 Yawe engalamupaala imwe, uwabumba umulu ne sonde." 
Psalms115:16 Yawe eka e mwine wa myulu, isonde lyena alipeela ku bantu." 
Psalms115:17 Ala abafwa tabalumbanya Yawe iyoo, balilala baliya ku calo ukwatalala tondolo." 
Psalms115:18 Lelo nifwe fwe batuntulu nifwe tulepaala Yawe na matotelo, ukutampa lelo, ukufika na ku muyayaya. Lumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms116:1 Ine nalitemwa Yawe pantu alyumfwile kwishiwi lyandi, alyumfwile no kupapata kwandi." 
Psalms116:2 Pantu aliteele amatwi yakwe kuli ine, ine nkalakuuta mutuule inshita shonse isha mweo wandi." 
Psalms116:3 Imyando ya mfwa yalimpombele, na macushi ya calo ca bafwa yalinkupile, ubulanda na macushi nafyo fyalincimfishe." 
Psalms116:4 Kanshi epakwita peshina lyakwa Yawe nati, “We Yawe mpusushako napapata!”" 
Psalms116:5 Yawe aliba ne cikuuku kabili mulungami. Lesa wesu ena alifulisha uluse nganshi. 
Psalms116:6 Yawe apokololako abaicefya mu mutima, ilyo nali mu bucushi nganshi ena ewampuswishe." 
Psalms116:7 Awe nomba pemwinako nakabili we mweo wandi, pantu Yawe alincitila ifisuma." 
Psalms116:8 Pantu we Yawe, naupusushako umweo wandi ukufuma ku mfwa, naunkumuna ifilamba ku menso yandi, naulesha na makasa yandi ukuipununa." 
Psalms116:9 Epakuti ndeenda pa cinso cakwa Yawe mu calo ca bomi. 
Psalms116:10 Ine nalisumine, ecalengele nasosele nati, “Awe ine nalicushiwa apakalambafye.”" 
Psalms116:11 Kabili ilyo ine amano yapelele nalisosele natilefye, “Abantu bonse awe babufi.”" 
Psalms116:12 Bushe finshi ningabwesesha kuli Yawe pa fisuma fyonse ifyo ancitila ine? 
Psalms116:13 Ndebuula ulukombo lwe pusukilo, no kulilila peshina lyakwa Yawe." 
Psalms116:14 Ine nkafikilisha ifilayo fyandi kuli Yawe, pa cinso ca bantu bakwe bonse." 
Psalms116:15 Imfwa ya bamushilo bakwa Yawe yalicindama pa cinso cakwe. 
Psalms116:16 We Yawe, ala cine cine ine ndi mubomfi obe, ine ndi mubomfi obe, umwana wa mubomfi obe umwanakashi, walimpususha ku minyololo yandi."
