Psalms116:17 Ine nkatuula ilambo ilyakukutotela, kabili nketa peshina lyobe we Yawe." 
Psalms116:18 Ine nkafikilisha ifilayo fyandi kuli Yawe, pa cinso ca bantu bakwe bonse," 
Psalms116:19 mu mansa sha ŋanda yakwa Yawe, mukati ka iwe Yerusalemu. Lumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms117:1 Akulumbeni Yawe mwe mishobo yonse! Mutasheni mwe bantu bonse! 
Psalms117:2 Pantu icitemwiko cakwe ico atukwatila cikalamba nganshi, ne cishinka cakwa Yawe naco camuyayaya. Lumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms118:1 Akutoteleni Yawe, pantu musuma, ne citemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe!" 
Psalms118:2 Lekeni abena Israeli baletila, “Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe.”" 
Psalms118:3 Lekeni aba mu ŋanda yakwa Aroni baletila, “Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe.”" 
Psalms118:4 Lekeni na bantu abakwatila Yawe akatiina baletila, “Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ilyo ine nali mu macushi nakuutile mutuule kuli Yawe, nao aŋumfwa andubulako." 
Psalms118:6 Yawe aba na ine, ine nshakatiine kantu nakalya. Nga cinshi ico umuntu engancita?" 
Psalms118:7 Yawe aba na ine, ena eungafwilishako, nkalatamba abalwani bandi uko balecimba." 
Psalms118:8 Caliwama ukufisama muli Yawe, ukucila ukucetekela mu muntu," 
Psalms118:9 Caliwama ukufisama muli Yawe, ukucila ukucetekela mu ntungulushi." 
Psalms118:10 Imishobo yonse yalinshingile, lelo kwishina lyakwa Yawe, ine nalibalofeshe!" 
Psalms118:11 No kunshinguluka yanshingulwike konse konse, lelo kwishina lyakwa Yawe, ine nalibalofeshe." 
Psalms118:12 Yanshingulwikefye kwati ni nshimu, lelo yalebilima ngo mulilo uleoca insansu no kushima bwangu, kwishina lyakwa Yawe, ine nalibalofeshe!" 
Psalms118:13 Abalwani bansunkile na maka kabili nali mupepi no kuwa, lelo Yawe ena alingafwilisheko." 
Psalms118:14 Ala Yawe e maka yandi kabili e lwimbo lwandi, kabili asanguka e pusukilo lyandi." 
Psalms118:15 Umfweni utupundu twansansa no twakucimfya uto tuleumfwika mu matenti ya bololoke, baleti, “Ukuboko kwa kulyo kwakwa Yawe ekwacitile ifi fintu ifyabulamba!" 
Psalms118:16 Ukuboko kwa ku kulyo ukwakwa Yawe nakusumbulwa mu mulu. Ukuboko kwa ku kulyo kwakwa Yawe ekwacitile ifi fintu ifyabulamba!” 
Psalms118:17 Ine nshafwe, lelo ndi umumi, kabili epakuti ndeshimika ifyacita Yawe." 
Psalms118:18 Nangu Yawe ankandile nganshi, lelo talekele ukuti mfwe nakalya." 
Psalms118:19 Njiswileniko impongolo shabololoke, muleke nyingile pakuti mpeele amatotelo kuli Yawe." 
Psalms118:20 Iyi e mpongolo yakwa Yawe, iyakwingililapofye abololoke beka!" 
Psalms118:21 Ine nkakupeela amatotelo, pantu ine walinjaswike. Kabili wasanguka ipusukilo lyandi." 
Psalms118:22 Ilibwe ilyo bakakuula basuulile, kabili elyaisa ba ilyakwikasha petungi." 
Psalms118:23 Yawe ewacita ifi, kabili cakupapa kuli fwe baleimwena." 
Psalms118:24 Buno e bushiku ubo Yawe apanga, kanshi natuleyangamo ne nsansa." 
Psalms118:25 Wingatupusushako we Yawe twapapata! We Yawe, twapapata leka tulekwata ishuko!" 
Psalms118:26 Abe uwapaalwa uyu waisa uo Yawe atuma. Ukufuma mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe emo tulemupaalila! 
Psalms118:27 Yawe e Lesa, ewalenga ukuti ulubuuto lwakwe lulebalikila pali ifwe. Ikateni imisambo mu minwe mutampe ukusefya, pakwenda mu milongo mulefika ku nsengo sha bulambo." 
Psalms118:28 Niwe Lesa wandi, kabili nakulakutotela, niwe Lesa wandi, kabili nakulakutatakula." 
Psalms118:29 Akutoteleni Yawe, pantu musuma, ne citemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe!" 
Psalms119:1 Balishuka abantu ababa abakaele mu micitile yabo, abakonka amafunde yakwa Yawe." 
Psalms119:2 Balishuka abasunga ifyebo fyakwe, kabili abamufwaya ne mitima yabo yonse." 
Psalms119:3 Balishuka abashilufyanya nelyo cimo, bantu abenda mu nshila shakwe." 
Psalms119:4 Walitupeela amafunde yobe, pakuti tuleyakonkafye lyonse bwino." 
Psalms119:5 Awe, kuti cawama imibeele yandi nga kuti yaba iyacishinka, mukukonka amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:6 Kanshi nga cakuti nalasakamana amafunde yobe yonse, lyena tekuti nengwe insoni nakalya." 
Psalms119:7 Nakulakulumbanya no mutima uwatambalala, ilyo ine ndesambilila amafunde yobe ayalungama." 
Psalms119:8 Ine nakulabeela ifipope fyobe, ala wikatala aundekelesha iyoo!" 
Psalms119:9 Bushe umulumendo kuti aisunga shani uwakaele? Ala ni mukubaka ishiwi lyobe. 
Psalms119:10 Ine ndakufwaisha no mutima wandi onse, wileka ndefuma ku mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:11 Ine amafunde yobe ndayasunga mu mutima wandi, epakuti nilabifya kuli iwe." 
Psalms119:12 Ulumbanishiwe we Yawe, unsambilishe ne fipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:13 Ne milomo yandi nakulashimika, palwa mafunde ayafuma ku kanwa kobe." 
Psalms119:14 Ine ndasansamuka ilyo nkonka amafunde yobe, nga filya umuntu asansamukila mu fyuma ifingi nganshi." 
Psalms119:15 Ine nakulatontonkanya pa malango yobe, kabili nakulayaposako na mano." 
Psalms119:16 Ifipope fyobe filansansamusha, ine nshakulalaba ishiwi lyobe iyoo." 
Psalms119:17 Ulencitila ifintu ifisuma ne mubomfi obe, ekuti ndeikala umumi no kulabeela ishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:18 Isula amenso yandi pakuti ndemona ifyakupapa, ifyaba mu mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:19 Pano calo ine ndi mulebeshi, wilamfisa amafunde yobe!" 
Psalms119:20 Umweo wandi ulepwilila kukufuluka amafunde yobe inshita yonse. 
Psalms119:21 Ulakalipila abamiya, ala bena balitipwa, abashikonka amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:22 Mpusushako ku musebanya no kusuulwa, pantu ine ndasunga ifyebo fyobe." 
Psalms119:23 Nangufye bakateeka bengantekela icilye no kumpingula, ine ne mubomfi obe nshakaleke ukulatontonkanya pa mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:24 Ifyebo fyobe efyansansamusha, kabili efyampandako amano." 
Psalms119:25 Ndi mupepi no kubwelela kwiloba, sunga umweo wandi umwabela ishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:26 Ine nalikwebele palwa myendele yandi, na iwe walinjasuka, unsambilishe amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:27 Leka ine ngumfwikishe ubufundisho bwa fipope fyobe, kanshi na ine nkalatontonkanya pa ficitwa fyobe ifyakupapa." 
Psalms119:28 Umupashi wandi naunakuka pa mulandu wabulanda, nkosha ukulingana ne ishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:29 Wileka ndekonkelela inshila shabucenjeshi, ulebafye ne cikuuku kuli ine ukupitila mu mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:30 Ine nalisala inshila yacishinka, ifipope fyobe efyo nabikapofye umutima wandi." 
Psalms119:31 Ine nakonenafye ku fyebo fyobe we Yawe, kanshi wileka ine nengwe insoni." 
Psalms119:32 Ine nakulabutukila mu nshila ya mafunde yobe, pantu ulanenga ukuba umuntungwa." 
Psalms119:33 We Yawe, unsambilishe ukukonka ifipope fyobe, na ine nakulafinakila inshiku shonse isha mweo wandi." 
Psalms119:34 Unenge ukwiluka no kuleka ndesunga amafunde yobe, elyo nakulayabeela no mutima wandi onse." 
Psalms119:35 Ulenangililako mu nshila ya fisambilisho fyobe, pantu ine efyansansamusha." 
Psalms119:36 Leka ine ndefwaisha ukubeela ifyebo fyobe, ukucila ukufwaya ukunonka ifyuma fyabucenjeshi." 
Psalms119:37 Fumya amenso yandi ku fintu ifyabuwelewele, ncingilila umwabela amashiwi yobe." 
Psalms119:38 Fikilisha amalayo yobe walaile umubomfi obe, epakuti balekutiina." 
Psalms119:39 Mpusushako ku musebanya uo ntiina, pantu amafunde yobe yasuma." 
Psalms119:40 Awe ine ndefulukafye ukulanakila ifipope fyobe, cingilila ubumi bwandi umwabela ubulungami bobe." 
Psalms119:41 We Yawe, leka ukutemwa kobe ukwapwililika kwise kuli ine, ne pusukilo lyobe ngomo walaile." 
Psalms119:42 Lyena nkamona ifyakwasuka abansenteka, pantu ine nacetekelafye ishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:43 Wifumya mu kanwa kandi ishiwi ilyacishinka pantu ine nasubilafye mu mafunde yobe. 
Psalms119:44 Ine lyonse nakulabeela amalango yobe inshiku shonse pe na pe! 
Psalms119:45 Kabili ine nakulaenda mu buntungwa, pantu nalifwailisha ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:46 Ine nkalanda pa fisambilisho fyobe pa cinso ca shamfumu, kabili nshakomfwe ne nsoni." 
Psalms119:47 Ukubeela amafunde yobe ine kulansansamusha, pantu naliyatemwisha." 
Psalms119:48 Ndesumbwila amaboko yandi ku mafunde yobe, ayo natemwa, kabili nakulatontonkanya pa fipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:49 We Yawe ibukisha icilayo ico wandaile ine ne mubomfi obe, pantu emo wampeelela isubilo." 
Psalms119:50 Icintekako umutima mu macushi nici icakuti, icilayo cobe ecicingilila ubumi bwandi." 
Psalms119:51 Abamufimbila ine tepakuntumfya ukwabula uluse, lelo ine awe nshinenuka no kufuma ku mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:52 Ine ntila nga naibukisha amafunde yobe ayakale nakale, awe nsangamo icitalaliko, we Yawe." 
Psalms119:53 Icipyu ine cilanjikata nganshi, ilyo mona ababi balesuula amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:54 Konsefye uko ine nja mukwikala, ifipope fyobe e fisemo fya lwimbo lwandi." 
Psalms119:55 We Yawe, ubushiku bonse ndebukisha ishina lyobe, kabili na mafunde yobe nkayasunga." 
Psalms119:56 Uyu e muteto wandi ncita, ine ndabeela amalango yobe." 
Psalms119:57 We Yawe, niwefye cakaniko candi, ine nindaya ukubeela amashiwi yobe." 
Psalms119:58 Ine ndefwaisha icinso cobe no mutima wandi onse, ube ne cikuku kuli ine ngefyo walaile." 
Psalms119:59 Ilyo ine ntontonkanya pa mibeele yandi, ecalenga ine njalukile ku fisambilisho fyobe." 
Psalms119:60 Ndeendesha kabili ine nshaposa inshita, mukubaka amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:61 Nangufye abalwani bampombe mu ntambo, awe ine nshakalabeko ku mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:62 Pa kati ka bushiku ine ndeema, pakuti nkutotele palwa bulungami bwa fipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:63 Ine ndi cibusa wa bantu bonse abakukwatila akatiina, na bonse abakonka amalango yobe." 
Psalms119:64 Isonde lyonse lyaisulamo icitemwiko cobe icishipwa, we Yawe, unsambilishe ifipope fyobe!" 
Psalms119:65 Ncitila icisuma ne mubomfi obe umwabela ishiwi lyobe, we Yawe." 
Psalms119:66 Unsambilisheko amano no bupingushi ubusuma, pantu ine amafunde yobe eyo nasuminamo." 
Psalms119:67 Lintu nshilapita mukucula nalelubantika, lelo nomba ndasunga ishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:68 Kwena uli musuma, nefyo ucita ala fisuma, eico nsambilisha ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:69 Nangu abacilumba balembepesha ubufi, ine ndasunga amalango yobe no mutima wandi onse." 
Psalms119:70 Mu mitima yabo tamwaba nkumbu no kulangulukila, lelo ine nsansamukila mu mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:71 Califye bwino pakuti ine ncule ku macushi, pantu eyalengele ukuti ine njishibe ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:72 Amafunde ya ku kanwa kobe, ala yaliwamisha kuli ine, ukucila pa makana ya ndalama sha silifa na golide." 
Psalms119:73 Iminwe yobe eyamumbile no kulenga mbe fino ndi, umpeeleko amano ayakwishiba amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:74 Leka abakukwatila akatiina balesansamuka pakumona ine, pantu ine nabika isubilo lyandi mwishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:75 We Yawe, ala ine nalishiba ukuti amafunde yobe yalilungama, kabili na muli bucishinka bobe emo wampishishe mu macushi." 
Psalms119:76 Leka icitemwiko cobe icishipwa cilentalalikako umutima, ngomo wandaile ine ne mubomfi obe." 
Psalms119:77 Leka inkumbu shobe shibe pali ine pakuti mbe umumi, pantu amafunde yobe ine eyo nsansamukilamo." 
Psalms119:78 Leka abacilumba balengwe insoni, pantu bena bancitila ifyabipa apabula umulandu, lelo ine awe nakulatontonkanyafye pa mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:79 Leka abakukwatila akatiina baleisa kuli ine, abo abantu abaishiba ifisambilisho fyobe." 
Psalms119:80 Leka umutima wandi ulenakila fipope fyobe, epakuti ine insoni shikanjikata." 
Psalms119:81 Umupashi wandi ulecucutika pantu mfuluka ipusukilo lyobe, lelo nabika isubilo lyandi mwishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:82 Amenso yandi ine nayanaka kukulolela ifyo wandaile, ndakuuta nati, “Nga ni lilali ukantalalikako umutima?”" 
Psalms119:83 Nelyo ine naba kwati ni nyambi iyili mu cushi, lelo ine nshakalabe ku fipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:84 Bushe ne mubomfi obe nkalolela ukufika lilali? Bushe abancusha ni lilali ukabakanda? 
Psalms119:85 Abacilumba balanyimbila amacinga ine, tabakonka amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:86 Amafunde yobe yonse yacishinka, ngafwakofye, pantu abantu balencushafye apabula umulandu!" 
Psalms119:87 Balifye mu pepi no kundofya ukumfumya pano calo, lelo ine nshalaba ku fipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:88 Ulecingilila ubumi bwandi ukulingana no kutemwa kobe ukushipwa, na ine nakulasunga ifyebo fya mu kanwa kobe." 
Psalms119:89 We Yawe, ishiwi lyobe lya pe na pe, lyalibelelela pe na mu mulu." 
Psalms119:90 Icishinka cobe calibelelela umwakonkanina inkulo. Niwe washimpa isonde kabili talisunkana nakalya. 
Psalms119:91 Ukushinta na lelo, yonse amafunde epo yaba, pantu fyonse fyabelako pa mulandu obe." 
Psalms119:92 Amafunde yobe ayakaana kulansansamusha, ine nga nalifwile kulwa kucula kwandi." 
Psalms119:93 Ine nshakatale ndaba ifipope fyobe, pantu fyena efyalenga ukuti mbe umumi." 
Psalms119:94 Mpusushako pantu ine ndi obe, ine nalifwaya ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:95 Ababifi nabandalilila, balefwayafye ukundofya, lelo ine nakulabikafye ifisambilisho fyobe mu mutima wandi." 
Psalms119:96 Ine nalishiba ukuti ku fintufye fyonse ifyapwililika kwaliba impela, lelo amafunde yobe we Yawe tayaba na mpela." 
Psalms119:97 Yangu ifyo natemwa amafunde yobe! Ine ndayatontonkanyapo akasuba konse. 
Psalms119:98 Amafunde yobe eyampeela amano ukucila abalwani bandi, pantu yaba kuli ine umuyayaya." 
Psalms119:99 Ine ndi uwamucetekanya ukucila pali bakafundisha bandi bonse, pantu ine ndatontonkanya pa fisambilisho fyobe." 
Psalms119:100 Ine nalikwatisha amano ukucila na pa bakalamba, pantu ine ndabeela amalango yobe." 
Psalms119:101 Ine nalifumya amakasa mu nshila shabipa, pakuti ndebeela ishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:102 Ine ku fipope fyobe nshapatukako iyo, pantu niwe we mwine wamfunda." 
Psalms119:103 Yangu, ifyo amashiwi yobe yalowa! Ee, mu kanwa kandi yalowa ukucila no buci!" 
Psalms119:104 Ku malango yobe eko mpandwa amano, eico ine nalipatile inshila shabipa shonse." 
Psalms119:105 Ishiwi lyobe ni nyali ku makasa yandi, kabili lubuuto ulusanikilako inshila yandi." 
Psalms119:106 Ine nalilaile, nalundapo no mulapo natile, ine nakulakonkafye amafunde yobe ayabulungami." 
Psalms119:107 We Yawe, ala ine ndacula nganshi, cingilila ubumi bwandi ukulingana ne shiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:108 We Yawe pokelela amalumbo ya ku kanwa kandi ayakuitemenwa, elyo unsambilishe na mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:109 Nangu line imfwa yaba mupepi na ine lyonsefye, lelo kwifunde lyobe kwena nshilabako." 
Psalms119:110 Abantu ababifi balanteya ifiteyo, lelo ine nshatala mpatuka ukufuma ku malango yobe." 
Psalms119:111 Ifipope fyobe e cuma candi ica pe na pe, efisansamusha umutima wandi." 
Psalms119:112 Ee, nalosha umutima wandi mukulasunga ifipope fyobe, ukushintafye napo nkafwila." 
Psalms119:113 Ine nalipata abantu ba mitima ibili, lelo natemwafye amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:114 Niwe mfisamamo, kabili niwe nkwela yandi, ine nsubilafye mwishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:115 Ntalukeni imwe mwe babifi ba bantu, pakuti mbe uwakusunga amafunde yakwa Lesa wandi!" 
Psalms119:116 Ntungilila nga mulya mwine walaile pakuti ndeenda umumi, wileka isubilo lyandi lisebane." 
Psalms119:117 Unjikatishefye lyena nalapusuka, lyonsefye ninshi nkalacindika ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:118 Bonse abashibeela ifipope fyobe ulabatamfula, pantu ubucenjeshi bwabo bwafyefye." 
Psalms119:119 Ababifi pano isonde bonsefye ulabakululula nge fisoso, eco ine natemenwa ifisambilisho fyobe." 
Psalms119:120 Awe, umubili wandi ulatutuma pakukubela akatiina, ine ndatiina ifyabupingushi fyobe." 
Psalms119:121 Ine nalicita ifyalungama, kabili ifisuma, kanshi wimposa kuli bamwansakabinga." 
Psalms119:122 Umone ukuti wansunga ne mubomfi obe, wileka abacilumba balencusha." 
Psalms119:123 Amenso yandi ine nayanaka kukulolela ipusukilo lyobe, no kulolela ukuti icilayo cobe icalungama cikafikilishiwe." 
Psalms119:124 Ne mubomfi obe ncitila ukulingana ne citemwiko cobe, kabili nsambilisha ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:125 Ine ndi mubomfi obe, unenge ukwiluka, pakuti ndeumfwikisha ifisambilisho fyobe." 
Psalms119:126 We Yawe, ala nomba e nshita yakucitapo cimo, pantu amafunde yobe nabonaula." 
Psalms119:127 Pantu ine nalitemwisha amafunde yobe ukucila golide, ukucila na pali golide uwawamisha nganshi." 
Psalms119:128 Kabili na pa mulandu wakuti nalimona ukuti amalango yobe yonse yasuma, ine nalipata inshila iyabipa." 
Psalms119:129 Ifipope fyobe ala fyaliwama, eico ine ndafibeela." 
Psalms119:130 Imilondolwele ya mashiwi yobe ilansanikila, ilenga na bampelwamano ukwiluka." 
Psalms119:131 Ine ndesula akanwa kandi no kupemekesha, pantu ndefuluka amafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:132 Pilibukila kuli ine no kunangulukilako, nga filya fine ucita ku bantu abatemwa ishina lyobe." 
Psalms119:133 Untungulule umwakwenda ukulingana ne shiwi lyobe, wileka icabubifi eco cilentungulula ine." 
Psalms119:134 Ndubula ine ku bantu balukakala, epakuti ine ndebeela amalango yobe." 
Psalms119:135 Lenga icinso cobe cisanikile pali ne mubomfi obe, no kunsambilisha ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:136 Ifilamba filakonkoloka mu menso yandi, pa mulandu wakuti amafunde yobe tayalebelwa nakalya." 
Psalms119:137 We Yawe uli mulungami, na mafunde yobe nayo yalilungama." 
Psalms119:138 Ifipope ifyo wapanga fyalilungama, kabili fyacishinka nganshi." 
Psalms119:139 Umukoosha wandi eulendya, pantu abalwani bandi balisuula amashiwi yobe." 
Psalms119:140 Ala ifilayo fyobe fyalisangwa ukuti cine cine fyacishinka nganshi, no mubomfi obe alifitemwa." 
Psalms119:141 Nangu ndi munono kabili uwasuulwa, ine nshilaba ku fipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:142 Ubulungami bobe bwa pe na pe, na malango yobe yacishinka." 
Psalms119:143 Amacushi na masakamika nayamponena, lelo amafunde yobe eyansansamusha." 
Psalms119:144 Ifisambilisho fyobe fyena fyaba inshiku shonse ifyalungama, mpeela ukwiluka pakuti njikale umumi." 
Psalms119:145 We Yawe, ala ine nkuuta uko uli no mutima wandi onse, ala njasuka ine, na ine nakulabeela ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:146 Ine niwefye ndekuuta umpususheko, na ine nakulabeela amalango yobe." 
Psalms119:147 Ine mbuka ku macaca, no kulalomba ubwafwilisho, ine nabikafye isubilo mu mashiwi yobe." 
Psalms119:148 Ine ndolafye ubushiku bonse ukwabula utulo, pakuti ndepituluka mu filayo fyobe." 
Psalms119:149 Kutika kwishiwi lyandi ukulingana ne citemwiko cobe icishifilwa, cingilila ubumi bwandi we Yawe ukulingana no mulinganya obe." 
Psalms119:150 Abo bantu abapanga ifyabipa nabapalamina, lelo balifye ukutali na malango yobe," 
Psalms119:151 Nomba uli mupepi, we Yawe, na mafunde yobe yonse yacishinka." 
Psalms119:152 Ine nalishiba ukufuma ku kale ukuti ifisambilisho fyobe wafishimpa ifyakubelelela pe. 
Psalms119:153 We Yawe, lolekesha pa macushi yandi no kumpokololako, pantu ine ku mafunde yobe yena nshalabako." 
Psalms119:154 Ndubulwilako kabili umpususheko, cingilila ubumi bwandi ukulingana no bulayo bobe." 
Psalms119:155 Ipusukilo lyena lyabafye ukutali na babifi, pantu bena tabasakamana kufwaya ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:156 We Yawe, inkumbu shobe shalikulisha nganshi, cingilila ubumi bwandi ukulingana na mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:157 Abalwani abancusha balifulisha, lelo ine nshafuma ku fisambilisho fyobe." 
Psalms119:158 Ntila nga nalolesha pali bampulamafunde awe cilankalipa, pantu bena tababeela ishiwi lyobe." 
Psalms119:159 Mona ifyo ine natemwa amalango yobe we Yawe, cingilila ubumi bwandi ukulingana ne citemwiko cobe icishifilwa." 
Psalms119:160 Yonsefye amashiwi yobe yacishinka, yonse amafunde yobe yalilungama kabili yakubelelela pe na pe." 
Psalms119:161 Bakateeka balancushafye apabula umulandu, lelo umutima wandi ulatutuma pa mulandu wa mashiwi yobe." 
Psalms119:162 Ine tepakusansamuka palwa cilayo cobe, kwati muntu uwashukila icuma icingi nganshi." 
Psalms119:163 Ubufi ine nalibupata kabili nshibufwaya nakalya, lelo ine natemwafye amalango yobe." 
Psalms119:164 Ine ndakulumbanya imiku cine lubali pa bushiku bumo, pa mulandu wa mafunde yobe ayalungama." 
Psalms119:165 Abatemwisha amafunde yobe balikwatisha umutende, kanshi takuli nelyo cimo icakubafulunganya." 
Psalms119:166 Ine ndolela ipusukilo lyobe we Yawe, kabili ndakonka na mafunde yobe." 
Psalms119:167 Ine ndabeela ifipope fyobe, pantu nalifitemwisha icine cine." 
Psalms119:168 Ine ndabeela ifipope fyobe elyo ne fisambilisho fyobe, pantu fyonse ifyo ncita walifishiba." 
Psalms119:169 We Yawe uleke inkuuta yandi ilefika kuli iwe, uleke ine ndeiluka ukulingana ne shiwi lyobe!" 
Psalms119:170 Uleke ukupapata kwandi kwise uko uli, mpusushako ukulingana ne cilayo cobe." 
Psalms119:171 Uleke imilomo yandi ikulumbanye icine cine, pantu ulansambilisha ifipope fyobe." 
Psalms119:172 Uleke ululimi lwandi lukwimbile ishiwi lyobe, pantu amafunde yobe yonsefye yalilungama." 
Psalms119:173 Uleke ukuboko kobe kwangufyanye ukungafwa, pantu ine nalisalapo amalango yobe." 
Psalms119:174 We Yawe ine ndolela ipusukilo lyobe, kabili ne fisambilisho fyobe efinsansamusha." 
Psalms119:175 Uleke ine mbe umumi pakuti ndekulumbanya, kabili ne fipope fyobe filenkoseleshako." 
Psalms119:176 Ee, ine ndubantika nge mpaanga iyaluba, kanshi umfwaye ne mubomfi obe, pantu ine ku mafunde yobe nshalabako." 
Psalms120:1 Ine ndilila kuli Yawe mu macushi yandi, nao kabili alanjasuka." 
Psalms120:2 We Yawe mpusushako ine ku babufi, elyo na ku ba lulimi lwabucenjeshi!" 
Psalms120:3 Bushe Lesa akamucita shani imwe? Nga imwe ncenjeshi takamulimune ukucilapo? 
Psalms120:4 Ala ni ku mifwi iya bashilika iyatwa eyo akamulimwinako, na ku musolilo wa mafito!" 
Psalms120:5 Nalishama ine pakwikala mu Mesheki, no kwikala mu matenti ya mu Keda." 
Psalms120:6 Awe, ine ninkokola nganshi ukwikala na bantu abapata icibote." 
Psalms120:7 Ine ndi muntu uwatemwa icibote, lelo ilyo nalanda, bena bafwayafye ukwimya ulubuli." 
Psalms121:1 Ine ndeinwina amenso yandi ku mpili, nga ni kwi uko ningasanga uwakungafwa?" 
Psalms121:2 Ine ubwafwilisho bwandi bufumafye kuli Yawe, uwabumba umulu ne sonde." 
Psalms121:3 Ena takaleke amakasa yobe ukushelela, uusunga iwe tashipula iyoo." 
Psalms121:4 Cine cinefye, uusunga Israeli tashipula nangu ukulala utulo nakalya." 
Psalms121:5 Yawe eukusunga iwe, Yawe e cintelelwe cobe lwa ku kulyo kobe." 
Psalms121:6 Akasuba takakakucite icibi ilyo kabalike, nangu umweshi wine mu nshita ya bushiku." 
Psalms121:7 Yawe akulakubaka ku fibi fyonse, akulakusunga umutende." 
Psalms121:8 Yawe akulakubaka ilyo wakulafuma, ne lintu wakulaingila, lyonse ukutampa nomba ukuya umuyayaya." 
Psalms122:1 Ine nalisekelele ilyo banjebele bati, “Natuleya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe!”" 
Psalms122:2 Amakasa yesu nayanyanta pa mpongolo shobe we Yerusalemu. 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalemu wakuulwa ngo musumba, uwaba uwatitikana pamofye." 
Psalms122:4 Kanshi eko inko shiya, inko shakwa Yawe, kukwisa lumbanya ishina lyakwa Yawe, nga mulya mwine apeelele icipope ku bena Israeli." 
Psalms122:5 Mulya mwine emwaba ifipuna fyakuputwilamo imilandu, ifipuna fya ba mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi." 
Psalms122:6 Pepeleniko Yerusalemu pakuti mube icibote, mutile, “Leka abatemwa iwe babe abacingililwa!" 
Psalms122:7 Namuleba icibote mukati ka malinga yobe, mube ubucingo mu fikuulwa fyobe ifikankala.”" 
Psalms122:8 Pa mulandufye wa bamunyinane na bacibusa bandi ine ndeti, “Icibote cibe mukati kobe!”" 
Psalms122:9 Pa mulandu wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe Lesa wesu, ine ndekufwailako ishuko lyobe." 
Psalms123:1 Awe ine njinwina amenso kuli iwe, we waikala mu mulu pa cipuna cobe icabufumu." 
Psalms123:2 Mona, nga filya ababomfi abaume batonta amenso pa minwe ya bashikulwibo, nangu filya umubomfi umwanakashi atonta amenso pa minwe yakwa nakulu, efyo na menso yesu yalolesha kuli we Yawe, Lesa wesu, mpaka watubelelako uluse." 
Psalms123:3 Utubeleleko uluse we Yawe, utubeleleko uluse, pantu ifwe natushipikisha nganshi ukusuulwa." 
Psalms123:4 Ifwe natushipikisha nganshi mukushobolwa ku bacilumba, no kusuulwa nganshi ku bamiya." 
Psalms124:1 “Nga Yawe abula kuba ku lubali lwesu,” aleni, asuka iwe we Israeli utile," 
Psalms124:2 “Yawe abula kuba ku lubali lwesu ilyo abalwani besu batwimine," 
Psalms124:3 ilyo ubukali bwabo bwacililemo nganshi, ala nga batucibawilefye abatuntulu." 
Psalms124:4 Ne lyeshi nalyo nga lyalitwibishe, no mukuku autubunsha," 
Psalms124:5 na matamba ayamaka nganshi nga yalitusendele.” 
Psalms124:6 Natupaale Yawe na matotelo, uushalekele ukuti abalwani besu batutakanye ku meno yabo." 
Psalms124:7 Ifwe twalipusuka nge cuni icasotoka ku citeyo. Umwando waliputwike nefwe epakupusuka. 
Psalms124:8 Ee, ukwafwilishiwa kwesu kwaba mwishina lyakwa Yawe, uwabumba umulu ne sonde." 
Psalms125:1 Abatetekela muli Yawe baba ngo lupili lwa Sioni, ulushili lwakusunkana lelo lukabako umuyayaya." 
Psalms125:2 Nga filya fine impili shashinguluka Yerusalemu, efyo na Yawe ashinguluka abantu bakwe, lyonse ukutampa lelo no kuya umuyayaya." 
Psalms125:3 Inkonto ya bufumu bwa bantu ababi tayakatale aiteeka icalo icapeelwa ku bololoke, pantu nga caba ifyo, abololoke kuti balabifya." 
Psalms125:4 We Yawe, cita ifisuma kuli abo abacita ifisuma, abantu abo abamitima iyaololoka." 
Psalms125:5 Lelo abantu abakonka imisango yabo iyabipa, bena Yawe akabakandila pamo na bacita ifyabipa. Umutende ube pali Israeli!" 
Psalms126:1 Ilyo Yawe abweseshe ubukankala mu Sioni, awe twalifye nga bantu abali mu ciloto." 
Psalms126:2 Elyo mu tunwa twesu mwaisula inseko, na pa ndimi shesu paisula inyimbo shansansa. Elyo abenafyalo balalandapo abati, “Ee, cine cine Yawe nabacitila ifintu ifyakupapa nganshi.”" 
Psalms126:3 Cine cine Yawe natucitila ifyakupapa nganshi, kabili ecalenga tusansamuke." 
Psalms126:4 We Yawe, ubweshe ubukankala bwesu, nga filya fine ubwesha amenshi mu mumana wa mu matololo ya Negebu!" 
Psalms126:5 Abatanda mu filamba, bakalobolola ne nyimbo shansansa." 
Psalms126:6 Abaya balelila ifilamba ilyo basendele imbuto mu cipe, ebesa pakubwela baleimba inyimbo shansansa, nabasenda ne myanshi ya fisabo fyabo." 
Psalms127:1 Nga te Yawe alekuula iŋanda, ninshi bakakuula baleicushafye. Nga te Yawe alelinda umusumba, awe ninshi bamalonda baleicushafye." 
Psalms127:2 Ala kuicushafye ukubuka ulucelocelo, no kucelwa pakusendama no kulabombesha nganshi pakumona icakulya. Ala ni Yawe eupeela utulo kuli abo atemwisha." 
Psalms127:3 Abana abaume, bupe bwacishilano ukufuma kuli Yawe, e fisabo fya mwifumo ififuma kuli ena." 
Psalms127:4 Nge mifwi iyili mu minwe ya mpalume efyaba abana abaume abo umuntu afyalila mu bulumendo bwakwe. 
Psalms127:5 Alishuka umuntu uwakwata imifwi iyingi iya uyu musango! Ena tewakutala ekatwa na nsoni pa mpongolo, ilyo alelanda na balwani bakwe." 
Psalms128:1 Balishuka bonse ababa na katiina kuli Yawe, abenda mu nshila shakwe." 
Psalms128:2 Wakulalya ifisabo fya milimo ubomba, amapaalo no bukankala fikaba fyobe." 
Psalms128:3 Umukashi obe akalaba ngo mwangashi uwatwalisha mu ŋanda yobe, abana bobe abaume bakashinguluka itebulo lyobe nge misambo iyapuuka iya miolifa." 
Psalms128:4 Ee, ifi efipaalwa umuntu uwaba na katiina kuli Yawe." 
Psalms128:5 Leka Yawe akupaale ukufuma ku Sioni, inshiku shonse isha bumi bobe, ukasuke aumona Yerusalemu no bukankala bwauko," 
Psalms128:6 kabili ukasuke ausangwako na ku beshikulu bobe. Umutende ube pali Israeli. 
Psalms129:1 “Ukufumafye ku bulumendo bwandi aba bantu tepakuncusha nganshi.” Aleni, asuka iwe we Israeli utile," 
Psalms129:2 “Ukufumafye ku bulumendo bwandi aba bantu tepakuncusha, lelo ukuncimfya kwena balifilwa!" 
Psalms129:3 Bashibulimi balisantaula inuma yandi, kwati mikolwa iyitali mwibala ililelimwa.”" 
Psalms129:4 Lelo Yawe mulungami icine cine, ena alindubulako ku myando ya bubifi bwabo." 
Psalms129:5 Uleke bonse abapata Sioni balengwe insoni, babwelelemo kunuma." 
Psalms129:6 Uleke babe nge cani pa mutenge, iciyuminafye ilyo cishilakula," 
Psalms129:7 icani ico kaseepa teti acibuule mu minwe yakwe, nangu ukukakamo umwanshi nakalya." 
Psalms129:8 Uleke abalepitapo besosa nokuti, “Ipaalo lyakwa Yawe libe nemwe, ifwe twamupaala mwishina lyakwa Yawe.”" 
Psalms130:1 We Yawe, ukufuma panshi ya mutima wandi niwefye ndelililako." 
Psalms130:2 We Yawe umfwa inkuuta yandi, uleke amatwi yobe yomfwe ishiwi lyandi ne mipapatile yandi, pakuti umbeleleko uluse." 
Psalms130:3 We Yawe aukana kulasuula ku fibi fyesu, we Mfumu, bushe nga nani engapusuka?" 
Psalms130:4 Lelo ni kuli iwe ekufuma ubwelelo pa fibi fyesu pakuti tulekukwatila akatiina. 
Psalms130:5 Ala ine ni Yawe eo ndolela, no mutima wandi eo ulolelapo, kabili na mwishiwi lyakwe emo nakwatila isubilo." 
Psalms130:6 Umutima wandi ulolelafye Yawe, ukucila filya bamalonda balolela ukuti buce, icine cine ukucila filya bamalonda balolela ukuti buce." 
Psalms130:7 We Israeli, bika isubilo muli Yawe, pantu muli Yawe emwaba icitemwiko camuyayaya, kabili muli enafye eka emwaba ukulubulwa kwine kwine." 
Psalms130:8 Ena ekafye eukalubula abena Israeli ku fyabubifi fyabo fyonse. 
Psalms131:1 We Yawe, mu mutima wandi tamuli icilumba, mu kulolesha kwandi tamuli akameko. Nshisakamikwa ku fintu ifikalamba, nangu ku fintu ifyakumpapusha nganshi." 
Psalms131:2 Lelo ine naliteka umutima, kabili watalala tondolo, nga filya umwana uwasumuka kuli nyina aba, efyo no mutima wandi walitalala tondolo, ngo mwana uwasumuka." 
Psalms131:3 Ee, we Israeli ulebika isubilo muli Yawe, ukutampa lelo, ukufikafye no muyayaya." 
Psalms132:1 We Yawe, ibukisha Davidi, no bucushi bonse buntu apitilemo." 
Psalms132:2 Alapile umulapo kuli Yawe, kabili abikapo no kulaya ku Mpalume yakwa Yakobo ati," 
Psalms132:3 “Ine nshakengile mu ŋanda yandi, nangu ukusendama pa busanshi bwandi." 
Psalms132:4 Ine nshakalale amenso yandi yamone utulo, nangufye ukushipula nshakashipule nakalya," 
Psalms132:5 kanofye ine nkatale nkafwaile Yawe icifulo, icakwikalamo Impalume yakwa Yakobo.”" 
Psalms132:6 Ala, twaumfwile mu Efrata uko balelumbula Imbokoshi ya Cipangano, nefwe epakuya isanga mu mabala ya Yari." 
Psalms132:7 Aleni natuleya ku ncende yakwe iyakwikalamo, natuleya tuye kunkula pa cipuna ca makasa yakwe." 
Psalms132:8 Ima, we Yawe, nokwisa ku cifulo cobe icakutuushishamo, iwe pamo ne Mbokoshi ya Cipangano iyili cishibilo ca bulamba bobe." 
Psalms132:9 Uleke bashimapepo bobe bafwale ubulungami, uleke na bamushilo bobe bembe ne nsansa." 
Psalms132:10 Pa mulandufye wakwa Davidi umubomfi obe, wikaana umusubwa obe." 
Psalms132:11 Yawe alapile umulapo kuli Davidi, umulapo uwacishinka uo takalapuluke, atile, “Umo pa ba mu lupwa lobe eo nkapyanika pa cipuna cobe icabufumu." 
Psalms132:12 Nga cakuti abana bobe abaume basunga icipangano candi, kabili na mafunde nalebasambilisha, lyena na bana babo ebakalapyana pa cipuna cobe icabufumu pe na pe.”" 
Psalms132:13 Pantu Yawe alisalapo Sioni, eo atemwa ukuba icifulo cakwe icakwikalapo." 
Psalms132:14 Atile ati, “Pano pene epakaba icifulo candi icakutuushapo pe na pe, pano epo nakulaikala pa cipuna cabufumu pantu epo ntemenwe" 
Psalms132:15 Ine nkalapaala Sioni, nkalamupeelesha fyonse ifyo alekabila, na balanda bakwe ine nkabekusha ne cakulya." 
Psalms132:16 Ine nkafwika bashimapepo bakwe ne pusukilo, na bamushilo bakwe bakalaimba lyonse ulwimbo ne nsansa." 
Psalms132:17 “Pano pene epo ine nkalenga umwana umo uwakwa Davidi akabe mfumu, epo ine nkamuteka nge cisaniko umusubwa wandi pakuti eo akaleteeka." 
Psalms132:18 Abalwani bakwe nkabalenga insoni, lelo ena pa mutwe wakwe pakaba icilongwe icabengeshima.”" 
Psalms133:1 Yangu ifyo cawama kabili cilasansamusha, ilyo ababwananyina baikala pamo mukwikatana." 
Psalms133:2 Ciba kwati mafuta ayacindama nganshi, ayapongolwelwa pa mutwe elyo yalekonkolokela na ku mwefu, yalekonkolokela na ku mwefu wakwa Aroni no kufika na ku mukoshi wa mwingila wakwe!" 
Psalms133:3 Ciba kwati mume wa Hemoni uulewa pa lupili lwa Sioni! Pantu epo Yawe apeelela ipaalo, no bumi bwamuyayaya." 
Psalms134:1 Aleni lumbanyeni Yawe imwe bonse mwe babomfi bakwa Yawe, imwe mwe babomba mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe mu nshita ya bushiku." 
Psalms134:2 Imyeni amaboko yenu mwisano lyakwe, nakabili lumbanyeni Yawe." 
Psalms134:3 Muleke Yawe uwabumba umulu ne sonde, amupaale ukufuma mu Sioni." 
Psalms135:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Akulumbanyeni ishina lyakwa Yawe, ala akumulumbeni imwe mwe babomfi bakwa Yawe." 
Psalms135:2 Imwe mwe babomba mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, mu mansa ya ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu." 
Psalms135:3 Akulumbeni Yawe pantu Yawe musuma, akwimbeni inyimbo shakulumbanya ishina lyakwe, pantu ukucita ici kusuma nganshi." 
Psalms135:4 Pantu Yawe ewasala Yakobo ukuba uwakwe, Israeli amucita ukuba icikwata cakwe." 
Psalms135:5 Ine nalishiba ukuti Yawe mukalamba nganshi, nokuti Imfumu yesu ewacila pa milungu yonse." 
Psalms135:6 Yawe ena acitafye fyonse ifyo alefwaya, mu myulu na pano isonde, muli babemba na mu matenga yonse apo yapela." 
Psalms135:7 Eulenga amakumbi ukwima ukufuma ukwapelela isonde, eutuma imyele ya nkuba pamo ne mfula, no kuleta umwela ukuufumya mu matala yakwe." 
Psalms135:8 Mu Egupto ni Yawe ewalofeshe amabeli yonse, amabeli aya bantu na ya fitekwa." 
Psalms135:9 We Egupto ni pa cinso cobe acitile ifipeshamano ne finjelengwe, pakukanda Farao na bacilolo bakwe bonse." 
Psalms135:10 Ewalofeshe imishobo ya mu fyalo ifingi, no kwipaya bashamfumu ababulamba nganshi." 
Psalms135:11 Kwali Sihoni, imfumu ya bena Amoli, na Ogi, imfumu ya Bashani, pamofye ne shamfumu shonse isha mu Kenani." 
Psalms135:12 Kabili ewapeele icalo cabo nge cuma cabupyani, nge cabupyani ku bantu bakwe abena Israeli." 
Psalms135:13 Ne shina lyobe, we Yawe, ala lyakubelelela pe, no lulumbi lobe, we Yawe, lukafika na ku nkulo shonse." 
Psalms135:14 Pantu Yawe akapokololako abantu bakwe, kabili akakwata ne nkumbu ku babomfi bakwe." 
Psalms135:15 Utulubi twa benafyalo, ala twena twabafye utwa silifa na golide, bantufye ebatupanga ku minwe yabo." 
Psalms135:16 Utunwa twena twalikwata lelo tatulanda nakalyafye, amenso nayo twalikwata, nomba ukumona nakalyafye." 
Psalms135:17 Amatwi nayo twalikwata, lelo tatumfwa iyoo, na mu tunwa twatuko tamufuma mupu nakalya." 
Psalms135:18 Abantu abatupanga nabo bakaba nga twena, kabili efyo cikaba ku batucetekela pantu bakalinganafye nato!" 
Psalms135:19 Imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ala akupaaleni Yawe na matotelo, imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Aroni akupaaleni Yawe na matotelo!" 
Psalms135:20 Imwe mwe bena Levi, akupaaleni Yawe na matotelo, imwe mwe bakwatila Yawe akatiina, akupaaleni Yawe na matotelo!" 
Psalms135:21 Akupaaleni Yawe na matotelo ukufuma mu Sioni, uyo uwaikala mu Yerusalemu. Akulumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms136:1 Toteleni Yawe pantu ena musuma. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:2 Toteleni Lesa uwacila imilungu yonse. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:3 Toteleni mfumu iyacila ishamfumu shonse. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:4 Kuli ena ekafye uucita ifyakupapusha. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:5 Ena ku mano yakwe ewapanga imyulu. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:6 Ewashimpa isonde pali bemba. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:7 Ewabumba ifisanika ifikulu nganshi. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:8 Akasuba kalesanika pa nshita ya kasuba. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:9 Umweshi ne ntanda filesanika ubushiku. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:10 Ena ewaipeye amabeli ya mu Egupto. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:11 Ewafumishemo na bena Israeli mu Egupto. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:12 Ku maka yakwe no kuboko kwakwe ukwafunguluka. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:13 Ewalekenye Bemba Wakashika pakati. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:14 Uwayabwishe na bena Israeli pakati kauko. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:15 No kubunsha Farao ne fita fyakwe muli Bemba Wakashika. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:16 Kuli ena uwatungulwile abantu bakwe mu matololo. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:17 Ewaipeye ne shamfumu ishabulamba. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:18 No kwipaya ishamfumu ishalulumbi nganshi. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:19 Aipeye Sihoni, imfumu ya bena Amoli. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe." 
Psalms136:20 Na Ogi imfumu ya Bashani. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:21 Ewapeele ne calo cabo nge cuma cacishilano. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:22 Icacishilano ku mubomfi wakwe Israeli. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:23 Kuli ena uwaletwibukishako mu nshita ya macushi. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:24 Atupuswishe ku balwani besu. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:25 Eupeela ne fyakulya ku fibumbwa fyonse. Icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe. 
Psalms136:26 Muletotela Lesa uwa mu mulu, pantu icitemwiko cakwe ca pe na pe!" 
Psalms137:1 Ku mimana ya Babiloni eko ifwe twaikele no kulila, ilyo twaibukishe Sioni." 
Psalms137:2 Ku mishingu yali palya pene, epo twakobeke na maseese yesu." 
Psalms137:3 Kulya eko abatwikete bunkole batwipwishe ukubembilako inyimbo, abaletutitikisha batupatikisha ukwimba inyimbo shansansa. Batile abati, “Aleni twimbileniko ulwimbo lumo ulwa ku Sioni!”" 
Psalms137:4 Nga ifwe kuti twaimba shani inyimbo shakwa Yawe, mu calo ca bene?" 
Psalms137:5 Ala nga cakuti ine nalaba kuli iwe we Yerusalemu, ukuboko kwandi ukwa ku kulyo kulabe ukwanguka kwakulisha." 
Psalms137:6 Ululimi lwandi uleke lukakatile mu kanwa kandi, nga cakuti ine naleka ukukwibukishako, nga cakuti ine naleka ukulatontonkanya pali Yerusalemu ukuba insansa shandi ishikalamba." 
Psalms137:7 We Yawe, shiibukisha ifyacitile abena Edomu, pali bulya bushiku Yerusalemu apokelwe. Batile nokuti, “Aleni cibongololeni! Cibongololeni ukufikafye na pa mufula waciko!”" 
Psalms137:8 We Mwana mwanakashi wa Babiloni, we wapeelwa kukonaulwafye! Alishuka umuntu uukakulandula pa fintu watucita!" 
Psalms137:9 Ee, alishuka umuntu uukabula tumwano utunya, no kutufwanta pa mabwe." 
Psalms138:1 We Yawe, nakulakulumbanya no mutima wandi onse, pa cinso ca milungu, nkakulumbanya." 
Psalms138:2 Ndekontamika icinso ukulosha kwi Tempele lyobe ilyamushilo, no kulumbanya ishina lyobe, pa mulandu wa citemwiko cobe icishipwa ne cishinka cobe. Pantu walicindamika ishina lyobe ne shiwi lyobe ukucila pali fyonse." 
Psalms138:3 Ilyo ine nakuutile mutuule, iwe walingaswike, walinkoseleshe no kundumika wandumika." 
Psalms138:4 We Yawe uleke ishamfumu sha pano isonde shilekulumbanya shonse, ilyo shaumfwa amashiwi ayafuma ku kanwa kobe." 
Psalms138:5 Uleke shileimba pa mulandu wa nshila shakwa Yawe, pantu ululumbi lwakwa Yawe lukalamba nganshi." 
Psalms138:6 Nangu Yawe aba ku mulu ukutali, ena alasakamana abalanda, lelo abacilumba, ena abeshibilafye ukutali." 
Psalms138:7 Nangu ine nyenda mukati ka mafya, niwefye unsunga umumi. Niwe ucilima abalwani bandi abamfulilwa, ku maka ya kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo, no kumpokololako no bulamba bobe." 
Psalms138:8 Ee, Yawe akafikilisha ubufwayo bwakwe pali ine, icitemwiko cobe, we Yawe, ala ca pe na pe. Wileka kubomba imilimo iya maboko yobe." 
Psalms139:1 We Yawe, walimfwailisha kabili walinjishiba." 
Psalms139:2 Uleshiba ilyo njikala nelyo njima, uleshiba amatontonkanyo nangu waba ukutali." 
Psalms139:3 Ilyo ine nyenda nelyo nsendama, uleshiba, walishiba inshila shandi shonsefye." 
Psalms139:4 Ilyo ine nshilati nande, ninshi we Yawe nawishiba fyonse." 
Psalms139:5 Iwe walincingilila kuntanshi na kunuma, walifimba no kuboko kobe pali ine." 
Psalms139:6 Umusango uo wanjishibilamo wakupapa, walimpesha amano, walisansuka, tekuti mfikepo." 
Psalms139:7 Bushe ni kwi uko ine ningaya pakufulumuka Umupashi obe? Bushe ni kwi uko ningafulumukila ku cinso cobe? 
Psalms139:8 Nga nati kanje ku mulu, ninshi eko uli. Nga nati kanje lala ku calo ca bafwa, nako kwine ninshi eko uli." 
Psalms139:9 Nga nati kampupuke ku macaca, nangu natila nje ikala kwishilya lya bemba," 
Psalms139:10 ala nako kwine niwe wingantungululako, no kuboko kobe ukwa ku kulyo eko winganjikatilako." 
Psalms139:11 Ine nga nasosa ati, “Cine cine imfifi yalamfisako, no lubuuto lusanguke imfifi ukunshinguluka.”" 
Psalms139:12 Awe ne mfifi ine tayafiite kuli iwe nakalya, no bushiku bubalikafye nga kasuba, ne mfifi yaba ngo lubuuto kuli iwe." 
Psalms139:13 Niwe wabumba ifilundwa fyandi ifyamukati, niwe wampangile munda muli mayo" 
Psalms139:14 Ine nakulakulumbanya pantu walimumba mu musango uwakupapusha kabili mu nshila yakutiina. Fyonse ifyo ubomba ala fyakupapa, ici cena nalishiba bwino bwinofye." 
Psalms139:15 Amafupa yandi tayafiseme kuli iwe, ilyo nalepangwa mu bumfisolo, ilyo nalepekanishiwa mu nda muli mayo." 
Psalms139:16 Amenso yobe yalimwene ilyo nshilapangwa. Inshiku shonse isho wampimina shalilembelwe mu citabo cobe, ilyo tashilati shibeko." 
Psalms139:17 Yangu ifyo yawamisha amatontonkanyo yobe palwa ine, we Lesa, kabili teyakupenda na kupenda iyoo!" 
Psalms139:18 Nga nati kanja pende, ala yalifulisha ukucila umusensenga. Ilyo ine nabuka, nalyo line mbafye na iwe." 
Psalms139:19 Nga cakutifye kuti waipaya ababifi, we Yawe! Talukeni kuli ine mwe bepaya abantu!" 
Psalms139:20 Bena balanda ifyamusaalula pali iwe, abalwani bobe balumbula ishina lyobe apafye." 
Psalms139:21 Bushe we Yawe, ine nshapata abakupata? Bushe kabili nshasuulisha abo abakwimina?" 
Psalms139:22 Ine nalibapata umupwilapo, mbamonafye nga balwani bandi." 
Psalms139:23 We Yawe, nengula, wishibe ifyaba umutima wandi, unjeshe no kwishiba ifyo ntontonkanyapo." 
Psalms139:24 Umone nga muli ine mwaliba akabi nelyo kamo, elyo untungululefye mu nshila iyitwala ku mweo wape." 
Psalms140:1 We Yawe mpusushako ku bantu babi, ncingililako ku bantu balukakala." 
Psalms140:2 Bena lyonsefye bapanga ukucita ifyabipa mu mitima yabo, kabili bansongelekanya ubulwi kasuba konse" 
Psalms140:3 Banona indimi shabo nge nsoka, ubusungu bwa mafwafwa bwaba pa milomo yabo." 
Psalms140:4 We Yawe ulencingililako ukufuma ku maboko ya babifi, ulempokololako ku bantu balukakala abapanga ukungwisha." 
Psalms140:5 Abantu bacilumba ine balinteya iciteyo, balinteya isumbu umo ine mpita, baliteya ifyakunjikatilako mu nshila." 
Psalms140:6 We Yawe, ine ndetila, “Niwefye Lesa wandi.” We Yawe umfwa ku kukupapata kwandi." 
Psalms140:7 We Mfumu Yawe, umulubushi wandi uwamaka, niwe ucingililako umutwe wandi mu bushiku bwa bulwi." 
Psalms140:8 We Yawe, wisuminisha ubufwayo bwa babifi ukuti bucitike, wileka amapange yabo yafikilishiwe, pantu kuti balayumfwa." 
Psalms140:9 Leka imitwe ya banshinguluka ikupwe na mafya ayafuma pa tunwa twabo. 
Psalms140:10 Uleke umusolilo ubaponene, leka baposwe mu mulilo, baposwe mu filindi umuli ulutikiti pakuti bekafumamo nakalya." 
Psalms140:11 Wileka ababufi baleikala muli cino calo, uleke icinkunka eco cilye abantu balukakala." 
Psalms140:12 Ine nalishiba ukuti Yawe alasoselako abalanda abafyengwa, no kulandilako ababusu." 
Psalms140:13 Ee, cine cine abalungami bakulalumbanya ishina lyobe, na baololoka imitima bakekala pa cinso cobe." 
Psalms141:1 We Yawe niwe ndekuutako mutuule, endesha ukwisa kuli ine! Umfwa kwishiwi lyandi ilyo ndekuuta kuli iwe." 
Psalms141:2 Uleka ipepo lyandi lise uko uli nge cushi ca bubani, no kwimya kwa maboko yandi kube nge lambo lya cungulo." 
Psalms141:3 We Yawe, ulesunga akanwa kandi, ulelinda no lulimi lwandi." 
Psalms141:4 Wileka umutima wandi ulelola ku fyabipa, nangu ukuiposa mu micitile iyabipa. Wileka ndebifya pamo na bantu abacita ifibi, nangu ukulya ku malila yabo." 
Psalms141:5 Umuntu mololoke angumemo pakuncenjeshako, leka ankalipile, ekusuba amafuta ku mutwe wandi, na ine nshakaane. Lelo ine ipepo lyandi kulwisha imicitile ya babifi inshita yonse." 
Psalms141:6 Bakateeka babo bakabafwinta mu mikonko, elyo ababifi bakasumina ukuti amashiwi yandi yali yacishinka." 
Psalms141:7 Elyo bakasosa abati, “Nga filya shibulimi alepula umushili pakulima, efyo na mafupa yesu yasalangene pa kanwa ka calo ca bafwa.”" 
Psalms141:8 Lelo ine ni pali iwe we mfumu Yawe natonta amenso yandi, ni muli iwefye ine mfisama, wilekelesha umweo wandi." 
Psalms141:9 Ulensunga ku fiteyo ifyo banteya, na ku fyakunjikatilako ifyo abantu ababi banteya." 
Psalms141:10 Leka ababifi ebo bekatwe mu masumbu yabo abene, ilyo ine ndeipitilafye bwino bwino." 
Psalms142:1 Ine ndekuuta ne shiwi ilikalamba kuli Yawe, ndesansula ishiwi lyandi mukupapata kuli Yawe." 
Psalms142:2 Na pa cinso cakwe epo ndeilishanishisha, eo ndelondolwela amacushi yandi yonse." 
Psalms142:3 Ilyo umupashi wandi waba no mwenso, niwe wishiba inshila ndi nokwendamo. Mu nshila umo mpita, abalwani bandi baliteyamo icakunjikatilako." 
Psalms142:4 Lolesha lwa ku kulyo kwandi umone, takuli na wakunsakamanako, nshikwete umwakufisama, nelyofye umo uwakusakamana ubumi bwandi nakalya." 
Psalms142:5 Ndekuuta kuli we Yawe nati, “Niwe cubo candi, icakaniko candi mu calo ca bomi.”" 
Psalms142:6 Umfwa ifyo ine ndekuuta, pantu nimpelelwa apakalamba. Mpokololako ku balwani abalenkunkunika pantu ine nabancila amaka." 
Psalms142:7 Undubuleko ukufuma mu cifungo, uleke na ine ndelumbanya ishina lyobe. Elyo abalungami bakanshinguluka, pa mulandu wa busuma bobe kuli ine." 
Psalms143:1 We Yawe umfwa ipepo lyandi, kutika ku kupapata kwandi. Unjasuke mu cishinka cobe na mu bulungami bobe." 
Psalms143:2 Windubulwisha ine ne mubomfi obe, pantu takwaba nangu umo umololoke pa cinso cobe." 
Psalms143:3 Umulwani tepakuncusha, antitikisha na panshi, nambika no mwafiita fititi kwati untu afwa kale." 
Psalms143:4 Kanshi umupashi wandi naubulwa amaka, no mutima wandi nautondobala." 
Psalms143:5 Ine ndebukisha inshiku shakale, ndatontonkanya pali fyonse ifyo wacita, na fyonse ifyo wabomba ndapitulukamo." 
Psalms143:6 Ine ni kuli iwe eko naimisha amaboko yandi, umweo wandi ulakufuluka nga filya umushili uwalatauka ufuluka imfula." 
Psalms143:7 We Yawe endesha ukunjasuka, pantu ine amano nayapela! Wifisa icinso cobe kuli ine, epali naba nga baya ku nindi." 
Psalms143:8 Uleke ulucelo lulenjibukishako icitemwiko cobe icishipwa, pantu nacetekela muli iwe. Unange inshila iyakuti ine ndekonkamo, pantu kuli iwe eko nalosha umweo wandi." 
Psalms143:9 We Yawe, mpusushako ku balwani bandi, pantu mfisama muli iwe." 
Psalms143:10 Umfundeko ukulacita ifyo iwe ufwaya, pantu uli Lesa wandi, Uleke Umupashi obe uusuma ulentungulule mu nshila iyatambalala." 
Psalms143:11 We Yawe, pa mulandu we shina lyobe pususha ubumi bwandi, mu bulungami bobe mpokololako ku macushi yandi." 
Psalms143:12 Ee, ulofye abalwani bandi mu citemwiko cobe icishipwa, onaula abalwani bandi bonse, pantu ine ndi mubomfi obe." 
Psalms144:1 Kampaale na matotelo Yawe icilibwe candi, ena eusambilisha amaboko yandi ukulwa inkondo, ne minwe yandi mu bulwi." 
Psalms144:2 Ni Lesa ewantemwa kabili e linga lyandi, e shintililo lyandi kabili e kapokolola wandi, e nkwela yandi, na muli ena emo nguba, eulenga abantu ba mishobo balecimba kuli ine." 
Psalms144:3 We Yawe, ngo muntunse nao wanshi uwakuti uletontonkanyapo? Umwana wa muntu wanshi uwakuti ulesakamana?" 
Psalms144:4 Umuntu abafye ngo mupu, ne nshiku shakwe pano isonde shipitafye nge cinshingwa." 
Psalms144:5 We Yawe, ulekanye imyulu yobe, wikile pano panshi! Kumya pa mpili, uleke palefuka icushi!" 
Psalms144:6 Tuma imyele ya nkuba, usalanganye na balwani, posa imifwi yobe, ubapasanganye." 
Psalms144:7 Tambika ukuboko kobe ukufuma mu mulu, ntulanyako no kumpusushako ukufuma ku menshi yamaka nganshi, na ku maboko ya benafyalo." 
Psalms144:8 Abo utunwa twabo twaisulamo ifyabufi, kabili no kuboko kwabo ukwa ku kulyo kucitafye ubucenjeshi." 
Psalms144:9 Ine nkalakwimbila ulwimbo lupya, we Lesa, pakukwimbila ine nakulalisha insango iya nsale ikumi." 
Psalms144:10 Niwe uulenga bashamfumu ukucimfya, we wapuswishe umubomfi obe Davidi ku lupanga lwa mfwa." 
Psalms144:11 Ntulanyako no kumpusushako ukufuma ku maboko ya benafyalo, abo utunwa twabo twaisulamofye ifyabufi kabili no kuboko kwabo ukwa ku kulyo kucitafye ubucenjeshi." 
Psalms144:12 Kanshi lyena abana besu abaume mu bwaice bwabo balekula nge miti iyamaka, na bana besu abanakashi baleba nge nceshi ishabaswa bwino ishakuyemfya isano." 
Psalms144:13 Amatala yesu yakesule paa ifilyo fya misango misango, impaanga shesu nasho shisande amakana na makana mu mpanga shesu." 
Psalms144:14 Iŋombe shesu uleke shibe ishamaka pakusenda ifyafina, Wileka nelyo umo atobe amalinga, kwiba ukusendwa bunkole, nangu imisowa yamalangulushi mu misebo yesu." 
Psalms144:15 Balipaalwa abantu abashukila fyonse ifi, balipaalwa abantu abo Lesa wabo e Yawe!" 
Psalms145:1 Nakulakulumbanya, we Lesa wandi, we mfumu, ine nakulasumbula ishina lyobe pe na pe." 
Psalms145:2 Cila bushiku ine nkalakutatakula, kabili nkalalumbanyafye ishina lyobe pe na pe." 
Psalms145:3 Yawe mukulu kabili ewalinga ukulumbanya nganshi, ubukulu bwakwe tabwingapimwa." 
Psalms145:4 Inkulo imo ikalatasha ifintu ifyo wacita ku nkulo inankwe, shikalalumbilisha ificitwa fyobe ifyabulamba." 
Psalms145:5 Abantu bakalalanda pa lulumbi lwa bucindami bwa bufumu bobe, na ine nkalatontonkanya pa ficitwa fyobe ifyakupapa." 
Psalms145:6 Abantu bakalalanda palwa maka aya milimo yobe iyaba iyakutiina, na ine nakulalumbilisha pa fintu ifyakupapusha ifyo iwe wacita." 
Psalms145:7 Abantu bakasefya pa busuma bobe ubushaikulila, kabili bakalaimba ne nsansa palwa bulungami bobe." 
Psalms145:8 Yawe aba ne cikuku kabili aba no luse, tafulwa bwangu, kabili afulisha icitemwiko icishipwa." 
Psalms145:9 Yawe musuma kuli bonse, alikwatisha uluse pa fintu fyonse ifyo abumba." 
Psalms145:10 Fyonse ifyo wabumba, we Yawe, ala fikalakulumbanya, na bantu bobe abamushilo bakalakutasha!" 
Psalms145:11 Bakalalanda pa bucindami bwa bufumu bobe, no kulanda palwa bulamba bobe." 
Psalms145:12 Epakuti abantu bonse baleishiba ificitwa fyobe ifyabulamba, no bukata bwa bufumu bobe ubwacindama." 
Psalms145:13 Ubufumu bobe bwa pe na pe, no buteko bobe bwakubelelela pe ku nkulo shonse. [Yawe wacishinka mu mashiwi yakwe yonse, kabili waluse mu milimo yakwe yonse.]" 
Psalms145:14 Yawe alatungilila bonse abawa, kabili emya bonse abatitikishiwa." 
Psalms145:15 Amenso ya bonse yaloleshafye kuli iwe, nobe ulabapeela ifyakulya pa nshita iyalinga." 
Psalms145:16 Ulafungulula iminwe yobe, no kwikusha fyonse ifipema ifyo fikabila." 
Psalms145:17 Yawe mulungami mu nshila shakwe shonse, kabili aba ne citemwiko kuli fyonse ifyo abumba." 
Psalms145:18 Yawe alapalama kuli bonse abakuuta mutuule, kuli bonse abamukuuta mu cishinka." 
Psalms145:19 Bonse ababa na katiina kuli ena, alabapeela ifyo balekabila, alomfwa inkuuta yabo, no kubapususha." 
Psalms145:20 Bonse abatemwa Yawe bena alabasunga, lelo ababifi bena akabalofya bonse." 
Psalms145:21 Akanwa kandi kakalanda palwa kulumbanya Yawe. Elyo ne fibumbwa fyonse kafilelumbanya ishina lyakwe ilyamushilo pe na pe. 
Psalms146:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! We mutima wandi, akulumbanya Yawe!" 
Psalms146:2 Ine nakulalumbanya Yawe inshiku shonse isha mweo wandi, pa nshita ndi pano calo, nakulaimbila Lesa wandi amalumbo." 
Psalms146:3 Mwilacetekela muli bakateeka, mu bantufye abashaba na maka yakumupususha." 
Psalms146:4 Batila nga bafwa babwelela kwiloba, na pali ubo bwine bushiku ninshi nefyo balepekanya ukucita fyapwa." 
Psalms146:5 Alishuka umuntu uo Lesa wakwa Yakobo atulanyako, uo isubilo lyakwe lyaba muli Yawe, Lesa wakwe." 
Psalms146:6 Lesa uyu ewabumba umulu ne sonde, bemba na fyonse ifyabamo. Yawe uusunga bucishinka bwakwe umuyayaya," 
Psalms146:7 kabili apeela abatitikishiwa umulinganya, no kupeela icakulya ku bansala, Yawe eukakula abafungwa," 
Psalms146:8 Yawe eupeela impofu amenso. Yawe ewimya bonse abatitikishiwa, Yawe alitemwa abololoke." 
Psalms146:9 Yawe eusunga abenafyalo, kabili eusunga abana banshiwa na bamukamfwilwa. Lelo ababifi bena alafulunganya amapange yabo." 
Psalms146:10 Yawe euteeka pe na pe, Lesa obe we Sioni, mu nkulo shonse! Akulumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms147:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Ala caliwama ukulaimbila Lesa wesu inyimbo shakumulumbanya, cilasansamusha, no kulinga calilinga ukulamulumbanya!" 
Psalms147:2 Yawe eukuula Yerusalemu, eukolonganya na bena Israeli abali muli bunkole." 
Psalms147:3 Alaposha abafunshika imitima, alabakakila ne filonda fyabo." 
Psalms147:4 Ewaishiba ne mpendwa ya ntanda, ewashinika shonse na mashina yashiko lumo lumo." 
Psalms147:5 Imfumu yesu ikulu kabili yamaka nganshi, ukwishiba kwakwe takwakwata impela." 
Psalms147:6 Yawe ewimya bonse abaicefya, lelo ababi bena alabaposa panshi." 
Psalms147:7 Akwimbileni Yawe inyimbo shakutasha, akulishisheni Lesa wesu inyimbo pa maseese." 
Psalms147:8 Eubunganika amakumbi mu mulu, eulokesha ne mfula pa calo, no kumesha icani mu mpili." 
Psalms147:9 Eupeela iŋombe icakulya, kabili eulisha tumwankole icakulya ilyo twamulilila." 
Psalms147:10 Amaka yakwa kabalwe tayamusekesha, kabili ena tacankilwa mu molu ya muntu." 
Psalms147:11 Lelo Yawe asansamukafye mu bamukwatila akatiina, ababika isubilo lyabo mu citemwiko cakwe icishipwa." 
Psalms147:12 Uletasha Yawe, we Yerusalemu! Ulelumbanya Lesa obe iwe Sioni!" 
Psalms147:13 Pantu ewikasha imipilikisho ya mpongolo shobe, eupaala na bana bobe abekalamo." 
Psalms147:14 Eulenga nokuti mu mipaka ya calo cobe muleba icibote, eukupeelesha ne ŋanu ishisuma." 
Psalms147:15 Eupeela ne cipope cakwe pano isonde, ne shiwi lyakwe lilasalangana bwangu bwangu." 
Psalms147:16 Eulokesha ubunga bwa mfula nga masako ya mpaanga, no kulenga umume ukusalangana nge mito." 
Psalms147:17 Eulukusha na mabwe ya mfula nge nsakalabwe, takuli nangu umo uwingashipikisha kuli iyi mpepo." 
Psalms147:18 Nga alandafye ishiwi, apopene fyasunguluka, atuma no mwela wakwe uwakaba, awe ninshi na menshi yalapita." 
Psalms147:19 Ewasokolola ishiwi lyakwe kuli Yakobo, no kwishibisha amafunde ne fipope fyakwe ku bena Israeli." 
Psalms147:20 Awe, tatala aucitilapo umushobo umbi ici, tabaishiba na mafunde yakwe nakalya. Akulumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms148:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Lumbanyeni Yawe ukufuma mu mulu, mulumbanyeni umo mu mulu umwasansama." 
Psalms148:2 Mulumbanyeni imwe mwe bamalaika bakwe bonse, mulumbanyeni mwe fita fyakwe fyonse ifya mu mulu." 
Psalms148:3 Mulumbanyeni mwe kasuba no mweshi, mulumbanyeni mwe ntanda shonse ishabeka!" 
Psalms148:4 Mulumbanyeni, mwe myulu iyasansama, na imwe mwe menshi ayaba pa mulu wa makumbi!" 
Psalms148:5 Lekeni ifintu fyonse filelumbanya ishina lyakwa Yawe, pantu ewasosele ishiwi na fyonse epakubumbwa." 
Psalms148:6 Ewafibika mu fifulo umo fyaikala umuyayaya, apeela ne cipope icishakatale acipilibulwa." 
Psalms148:7 Lumbanyeni Yawe pano isonde ponse, mwe bashimweshimwe ba muli bemba na mu matenga." 
Psalms148:8 We nkuba, nobe we mfula ya mabwe, we bunga bwa mfula na fubefube, na iwe we cimwela camaka we ubeela Yawe, mulumbanyeni!" 
Psalms148:9 Mwe mpili na imwe mwe tupili, mwe miti ya fitwalo, na imwe mwe miti iyalepesha iya keda," 
Psalms148:10 mwe nama shonse isha mu mpanga na mwe fitekwa, imwe mwe fikulika panshi na mwe fyuni, lumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms148:11 Ishamfumu sha pano isonde, ne mishobo yonse, mwe ntungulushi na bakateeka ba pano isonde," 
Psalms148:12 mwe balumendo na mwe bakashana, mwe bakote, na imwe mwe baice bene, lumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms148:13 Bonsefye nabalelumbanya ishina lyakwa Yawe, pantu ishina lyakwe lyeka elyacindamisha pali yonse. No bucindami bwakwe bwalicila isonde ne myulu ine kumo!" 
Psalms148:14 Alimisha abantu bakwe imfumu iyamaka, pakuti abamushilo bakwe babe ne cakutakishishamo, abena Israeli, abantu abo atemwisha. Akulumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Psalms149:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Imbileni Yawe ulwimbo lupya, mulumbanyeni mu lukuta lwa bamupetamina." 
Psalms149:2 Uleke abena Israeli basekelele muli Kabumba wabo, uleke na ba mu Sioni bangile Imfumu yabo." 
Psalms149:3 Nabalecinda pakulumbanya ishina lyakwe, balelisha insombo na maseese." 
Psalms149:4 Pantu Yawe alacankilwa abantu bakwe, abaicefya alabafwika ingala ye pusukilo." 
Psalms149:5 Uleke abapetamina Lesa basekelele mu bucindami bwakwe, baleaula no tupundu pa masanshi yabo." 
Psalms149:6 Uleke amalumbo yakwa Lesa yafume mu tunwa twabo, na mu minwe yabo bekate impanga ishatwa konse konse." 
Psalms149:7 Eshakulandwilako imishobo ya bantu, no kukandilako abantu," 
Psalms149:8 no kukaka ishamfumu shabo iminyololo, na bakankala babo mu makusu ya fyela." 
Psalms149:9 Ekufikilisha ubupingushi ubwalembwa pali aba bantu. Uku ekucindamikwa kwa bapetamina Lesa bonse. Akulumbanyeni Yawe! 
Psalms150:1 Lumbanyeni Yawe! Lumbanyeni Yawe mu cifulo cakwe icamushilo, lumbanyeni Lesa mu mulu mwisano lyakwe." 
Psalms150:2 Mumulumbanye pa mulandu wa fintu acita ifyabulamba, mumulumbanye pantu alipulamisha." 
Psalms150:3 Mumulumbanye no kulisha amapenga, mumulumbanye no kulisha amaseese ne nsango!" 
Psalms150:4 Mumulumbanye no kulisha insombo no kucinda, mumulumbanye no kulisha ifilimba na bamutolilo!" 
Psalms150:5 Mumulumbanye no kulisha imiwaya, mumulumbanye ne miwaya iyalilisha!" 
Psalms150:6 Ee, cine cine ifibumbwa fyonse ifipema nafilumbanye Yawe! Akulumbanyeni Yawe!" 
Proverbs1:1 Amapinda yakwa Solomoni mwana Davidi, imfumu ya bena Israeli." 
Proverbs1:2 Aya e mapinda yakulenga ukwishiba no kusalapulwa pakuti muletesha ne nsoselo sha mano yene yene. 
Proverbs1:3 Epakuti yamufundako ukuba na mano mu mikalile, no kulacita ifyalungama, ukuba abamulinganya kabili ababula umucishacinani." 
Proverbs1:4 Imbulwamano kuti yashisalapula, na baice bene kuti yabapeela amano, no kubalenga baleiluka mu fintu." 
Proverbs1:5 Lekeni aya mapinda abantu abamano bakutikeko, kabili kuti yabalundilapo amano na yambi payo basambilila, lekeni abacenjela nabo, ukucenjela kwabo kucililepo." 
Proverbs1:6 Epakuti baletola amano mu mapinda na mu nsoselo, mu milandu na mu tunyonga ndimi twa bamano." 
Proverbs1:7 Ukukwatila Yawe akatiina e ntendekelo ya mano, lelo ifipuba fyena filasuula amano, kabili tafifwaya kufundwa iyoo." 
Proverbs1:8 Umfwa we mwana wandi kufyo bawiso balekufunda, kabili wisuulako kufyo banoko balekusambilisha." 
Proverbs1:9 Pantu ifyo balekufunda fikaba nge ngala ku mutwe obe, kabili ngo munyololo uwakuyemfya umukoshi obe." 
Proverbs1:10 We mwana wandi, abacita ifyabubifi nga bakutunka, iwe wilasumina," 
Proverbs1:11 Nangu bakweba abati, “Ala isa kuno, tulalililepo umuntu umo, uleke tumwipaye uwabula umulandu." 
Proverbs1:12 Ilyo bacili abomi, elyo tubacibaule kwati ni nindi, kabili abatuntulufye nga filya baleya ku calo ca bafwa." 
Proverbs1:13 Ee, tukakwata ifyuma ifyacindama, na mayanda yesu yakesula paa ifyo tuletapa." 
Proverbs1:14 Ale isa tuleenda bonse, twakulayakana nobe ifyo tuleiba.”" 
Proverbs1:15 We mwana wandi, wilaenda pamo na bantu ba musango uyu, wilakonkelela inshila shabo." 
Proverbs1:16 Pantu amakasa yabo yabutukila mu fyabubifi, bena tabaposa nshita pakwipaya umo." 
Proverbs1:17 Kuicushafye ukuteya ifyuni ulukose pa nshita nafyo filemonako! 
Proverbs1:18 Bena balalilila ukuilofya abene, no kupekanya ifyakuipailakofye." 
Proverbs1:19 Pefye abapupu bafwila pa bupupu bwabo, efyo ciba kuli bonse abaikalilafye ukwiba." 
Proverbs1:20 Amano yalebilikisha mu misebo ngo mwanakashi, nayasansule ne shiwi lyayako mu mansa." 
Proverbs1:21 Uyo alebilikisha pa mpongolo ya musumba, na monse mu finshoko umulongana abantu aleti," 
Proverbs1:22 “Mwe mbulwamano imwe! Bushe ukukanaishiba kwenu kukapwa lilali? Na bapumya bushe ni lilali bakaleka ukusansamukila mukupumya? Nangu ifipuba fikaleka lilali ukupata amano? 
Proverbs1:23 Kwena amulaumfwa kufyo ine nalemukalipila, nga nalimupongolwela ifyaba mu mutima wandi, no kumulenga ukwiluka mu matontonkanyo yandi." 
Proverbs1:24 Nomba imwe mulakaana ukwisa ilyo ine mwita, kabili tapali nelyo umo uwaposeleko amano ilyo ine nafungulwile ukuboko." 
Proverbs1:25 Pantu mwasuulile nefyo ine namusokele, na kufyo mwebaula tamusakamanako." 
Proverbs1:26 Kanshi na ine nkasekakofye ilyo mukaponenwa ne finkunka, nkalamuwela ilyo amashamo yakamwansha," 
Proverbs1:27 ilyo amashamo yalamwishila nge cimwela, ilyo ifinkunka fyakulamwishila nga kankungwe, ilyo amacushi na masakamiko fikalamwishila." 
Proverbs1:28 “Elyo bakankuuta lelo na ine awe nshakasuke, bakamfwailisha lelo tabakamone iyoo." 
Proverbs1:29 Pantu bena bapata amano, kabili tabasalile ukukwatila Yawe akatiina." 
Proverbs1:30 Pantu tabafwaya kumfwa kufyo ine mbasokako, balasuula na kufyo mbakalipila." 
Proverbs1:31 Kanshi bakalalya ifitwalo fya mibeele yabo, no kwikuta amapange yabo abene." 
Proverbs1:32 Pantu ukulubantika kwa mbulwamano kukabaletela imfwa, amasange ya fipuba yakabalofya bonse." 
Proverbs1:33 Lelo uyo onse uumfwa kuli ine akekala umutelelwe, kabili akekala ku matwi tondolo, ukwabula ne cakutiina.”" 
Proverbs2:1 We mwana wandi, nga wapokelela amashiwi yandi, walabaka na mafunde yandi mukati ka mutima obe," 
Proverbs2:2 kabili nga walateya amatwi yobe ku fyamano, no kulafyumfwikisha no mutima obe," 
Proverbs2:3 kabili nga walomba ukwiluka, walilila no kulaumfwikisha," 
Proverbs2:4 kabili ulefwaishafye amano nga filya fine ufwaisha silifa, atemwa nga filya fine ufwaisha icuma icafisama," 
Proverbs2:5 elyo ninshi ukeshiba umo ukukwatila Yawe akatiina kwalola, kabili ukafikapo na pa mano yakwishiba Lesa." 
Proverbs2:6 Pantu uupeela amano ni Yawe, kabili mu kanwa kakwe emufuma amano yakwishiba no kwiluka." 
Proverbs2:7 Ukucimfya kwa bololoke kwaba muli ena, e nkwela yabo abenda mu cishinka." 
Proverbs2:8 Pantu eulinda inshila sha balungami, kabili eucingilila umupita abantu bakwe abamushilo." 
Proverbs2:9 Elyo ukeshiba ubulungami no mulinganya, pamo ne fintu ifyabula umucishacinani, ukeshiba ne nshila isuma yonse." 
Proverbs2:10 Pantu amano yakaba mu mutima obe, kabili no kwishiba kukalasansamusha umweo obe." 
Proverbs2:11 Ukucenjela ekukakucingilila, kabili no kumfwa kukakusunga." 
Proverbs2:12 Amano yakakupusushako ukufuma mu nshila sha babifi, no kukutaluka ku bantu ba milandile ibi," 
Proverbs2:13 abaleka imikalile iyaololoka pakuti baleenda mu nshila ya mfifi. 
Proverbs2:14 Bena balasansamuka mukucita ifyabipa, no kusamwa mu kuulungana kubi." 
Proverbs2:15 Ee, ni ncenjeshi sha bantu, kabili inshila shabo nisho ushingacetekela nakalya." 
Proverbs2:16 Amano yakakupususha ku mpulumushi ya mwanakashi, muka mwine umbi umbi uwingakulansha amashiwi yakusembeleka," 
Proverbs2:17 uwasangukila mulume wa ku bukashana bwakwe, kabili uulaba ne filayo alaile pa menso yakwa Lesa." 
Proverbs2:18 Pantu iŋanda yakwe itwala ku mfwa, ne nshila shakwe shilosha ku milungulwa ya bafwa." 
Proverbs2:19 Pa baume abaya kuli ena tapabwela nelyo umo nakalya, tabashisanga nakabili nshila ishitwala ku bumi." 
Proverbs2:20 Kanshi iwe uleendela mu nshila sha bantu abasuma, kabili ulesunga imibeele ya balungami." 
Proverbs2:21 Pantu abantu abololoke ebakalaikala muli cino calo, kabili abakaele ebakekalililamo." 
Proverbs2:22 Lelo ababi ba bantu tabakasangwemo muli ci calo, kabili abashaba na cishinka bakabanukulamo." 
Proverbs3:1 We mwana wandi, wilalaba ifyo nkufunda, lelo mu mutima obe ulesunga amafunde yandi." 
Proverbs3:2 Pantu amafunde yandi yakakulenga ukuti ukakokole pano calo, ukaba ne myaka iyingi, no kwikala umutende." 
Proverbs3:3 Icitemwiko icishifilwa ne cishinka tefyakulekako iyoo, Ufikakile mu mukoshi obe, ufilembe na mu mutima obe." 
Proverbs3:4 Lyena ukamona ukusekelelwa, kabili uwe shina ilisuma pa menso yakwa Lesa na ya bantu." 
Proverbs3:5 Uletetekela muli Yawe no mutima obe onse, kabili wilaesha kulacetekela amano yobe iyoo." 
Proverbs3:6 Na lyonsefye mu nshila yobe uleibukisha Yawe, nao akalakulanga ifyakucita." 
Proverbs3:7 Wilaitunga ukuba uwamano, iwe uletiina Yawe, uletaluka na ku fyabipa." 
Proverbs3:8 Nga walacita ifi, awe ninshi ukakwata ubumi busuma, kabili na mafupa yobe yakapembuka." 
Proverbs3:9 Cindika Yawe mu fyuma fyobe, no kulamutuulapo ifisabo fyantanshi fyobe fyonse." 
Proverbs3:10 Elyo ninshi amatala yobe yakulaisula paa no kupala, ne nsupa shobe shikalaisula paa no mwangashi upya." 
Proverbs3:11 We mwana wandi, wilasuula ukukalipila kwakwa Yawe, kabili wilanenuka ilyo akwebaula." 
Proverbs3:12 Pantu Yawe alakalipila abo ena atemwa, nga filya fine umufyashi alakalipila mwane uo abekelwamo." 
Proverbs3:13 Alishuka umuntu uwasanga amano, umuntu uwailuka mu fintu." 
Proverbs3:14 Pantu amano yalicila pa bunonshi bwa silifa, kabili yalapeela ifyacindama ukucila golide," 
Proverbs3:15 Amano yaliluma umutengo ukucila tumabwe twa rubi, tapaba pafyo umuntu engakabila ifingalingana na mano." 
Proverbs3:16 Amano yalalenga umuntu ukukota bwino, kabili yamulenga abe umukankala no kucindama acindame." 
Proverbs3:17 Amano yalaletela umuntu insansa mu mikalile yakwe, yamulenga no kwikala mu mutende." 
Proverbs3:18 Amano muti wabumi kuli abo abayekatilila, kabili balishuka abayakonenamo." 
Proverbs3:19 Ni Yawe ewapanga isonde ku manofye, no kwikasha imyulu ku kucenjela kwakwe." 
Proverbs3:20 Ku mano yakwe alengele amatenga yalekane, nokuti amakumbi yaleloka fubefube." 
Proverbs3:21 We mwana wandi, sunga umutima pa mano yasuma na pakwiluka, wileka fifume ku cinso cobe." 
Proverbs3:22 Fyena fikaba bumi kuli iwe, kabili icakuyemfya mu mukoshi obe." 
Proverbs3:23 Lyena ukenda mu nshila yobe ukwabula icakutiina, kabili tawakaipunune ku lukasa lobe iyoo." 
Proverbs3:24 Ilyo waya kukusendama tawakaletiina kantu nelyo kamo, kabili ukalaisendaminafye ubushiku bonse." 
Proverbs3:25 Wilakwata umwenso wa masanso ayapumikishafye, nangu ifinkukuma ifipaya ababi." 
Proverbs3:26 Pantu isubilo lyobe likaba muli Yawe, kabili akasunga na makasa yobe ku fiteyo." 
Proverbs3:27 Wilakaana kupeela icisuma ku balekabila, ukulingana na papelele amaka yobe." 
Proverbs3:28 Nga ulingilefye ukwafwako umubiyo ilyo line, iwe wimweba auti, “Awe, tala bwelelamo nkesa kupeela mailo,” ilintu ninshi naukwata apopene." 
Proverbs3:29 Wilapangila ukucitapo cimo icibi ku mwina mupalamano obe, uwaikala na iwe mukukutetekela." 
Proverbs3:30 Wilaumanya umuntu uushikwete umulandu nelyo umo, uushakucita kabi nelyo kamo." 
Proverbs3:31 Wilafimbila umuntu wabuluku, nangu ukupashanya imicitile yakwe iyili yonse iyoo." 
Proverbs3:32 Pantu Yawe apata uubifya ku mufulo, lelo abalungami bena e bacibusa bakwe." 
Proverbs3:33 Intipu shakwa Yawe shaba pa ŋanda ya mubi, lelo apaala icifulo ca mololoke." 
Proverbs3:34 Abantu abamisuula alabasuula, lelo abaicefya bena alabakwatila icikuuku." 
Proverbs3:35 Abamano balacindikwa, lelo ifipumbu fya bantu fyena fikekatwa ne nsoni." 
Proverbs4:1 Mwe bana bandi muleumfwa ifyo ine ne shinwe ndemufunda, mulebikako umutima lyena mwakulaishiba ifintu." 
Proverbs4:2 Ifyo ndemufunda ala fisuma, eico mwilafisuula iyoo." 
Proverbs4:3 Ilyo nali umwana munono mu ŋanda ya batata, ninshi ncilifye umuteku, kabili umwanafye eka kuli bamayo," 
Proverbs4:4 batata balemfunda abati, “Uleibukisha ifyo ine ndesosa no mutima obe onse, ulekonka ifyo ndekukonkomesha lyena wakulaenda umumi lyonse." 
Proverbs4:5 Tola amano, no kwiluka, wilalaba ifyo ndesosa, kabili wilafisuula iyoo." 
Proverbs4:6 Wilasangukila amano, pantu eyakakusunga, Uleyatemwa, nayo yakulakwensha umutende." 
Proverbs4:7 Amano ala cikankala, eico kwata amano, nangufye uposelepo ifyuma fyobe fyonse wakwata, te mulandu iyoo." 
Proverbs4:8 Uletemwa amano, nayo yakakupalamika, uleyabika mu mutima, nayo yakakuletela ubucindami." 
Proverbs4:9 Yakakupeela icakuyemfya ica ku mutwe obe, no kukupeela imyala yobe iyabufumu.”" 
Proverbs4:10 We mwana wandi, umfwa kuno ulesekelela ifyo ndesosa, elyo ukakokola pano calo." 
Proverbs4:11 Ine nakulanga inshila yamano, no kukutungulula mu nshila shabulungami." 
Proverbs4:12 Nga walaenda na mano, takwakabe cakukucilikila inshila, tawakaipunune iyoo, ukalabutukafye ulubilo." 
Proverbs4:13 Lyonse uleibukisha amafunde yandi, wilayasuula, uleyabaka bwino, pantu e bumi bobe." 
Proverbs4:14 Iwe wilaingila umwenda ababifi, nangu ukwenda mu misango ya bantu abacita ifyabipa." 
Proverbs4:15 Talukamo, wilaendamo nangu panono, ufumemo, na we mwine wende pa nshila yobe iyaibelako." 
Proverbs4:16 Pantu abantu babi pakumona utulo kanofye batala bacitapo icibi cimo, bena tabamona tulo nga tabalapunwisha bambi." 
Proverbs4:17 Bena balya umukate wabubifi, no kunwa umwangashi wacimfulunganya." 
Proverbs4:18 Imisango ikonka abalungami yena yaba ngo lubuuto lwa pa macaca, kuya lulecililakofye mpaka akasuba kasansama." 
Proverbs4:19 Nomba inshila ya babifi yaba nge mfifi ya bushiku, tabeshiba ne cilenga ukuti baipunune." 
Proverbs4:20 We mwana wandi uleumfwa ifyo ine ndesosa, uleposako amano ku mashiwi yandi." 
Proverbs4:21 Wileka yafume ku cinso cobe, uleyasunga mu mutima obe." 
Proverbs4:22 Pantu ku bantu bonse abayasunga yakalenga babe no bumi ubusuma, baleikala umutende." 
Proverbs4:23 Pali fyonsefye, ulesunga umutima obe, pantu emwaba akamfukumfuku kabumi." 
Proverbs4:24 Wilaesha nelyo limo ukulalanda icintu icishili cacine cine, wilalanda ifyabufi nangu ifyabucenjeshi." 
Proverbs4:25 Uleloleshafye kuntanshi, uletonta amenso apo ulungemefye epela." 
Proverbs4:26 Uleshininkisha ifyo ulecita, ninshi lyena nefyo wakulacita fyakulalungama." 
Proverbs4:27 Wilaalukila ku kuso nangu ku kulyo. Taluka ku fibi. 
Proverbs5:1 We mwana wandi bika umutima ku mano ndekupandako, teya ukutwi kufyo ndekweba." 
Proverbs5:2 Epakuti uleishiba umwakwenda bwino, nefyo wakulalanda fyakulalanga ukuti iwe uli na mano." 
Proverbs5:3 Pantu imilomo ya mwanakashi cilende, ala yalowa ngo buci, ne milandile yakwe intu yatelela ukucila amafuta." 
Proverbs5:4 Nomba pakulekelesha yalula nga malulu, kabili yatwa ngo lupanga ulwatwila konse konse." 
Proverbs5:5 Amakasa yakwe yakakutwala ku mfwa, ne ntampulo shakwe shalola no kutwala ku calo ca bafwa." 
Proverbs5:6 Ena tatontonkanya pa nshila iyilosha ku bumi, inshila endamo icende ende shintu shalubantika, lelo tasakamana nakalya," 
Proverbs5:7 Nomba kanshi, mwe bana bandi kutikeni kuli ine, mwisuula ku mashiwi ndelanda." 
Proverbs5:8 Umwanakashi wa uyu musango wakutalukakofye, tecakwesha kunyanta pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwe iyoo." 
Proverbs5:9 Epali wapeela umucinshi obe kuli bambi, ne myaka yobe ku bankalwe." 
Proverbs5:10 Epali na bantu bambi bambifye kuti baliila fyuma fyobe, kabili nefyo wacululukila fyanonkesha aba mu ŋanda imbi imbi." 
Proverbs5:11 Kabinge na pa mpela ya bumi bobe walaŋonta, ninshi walyonda washalafye imisakalala." 
Proverbs5:12 Elyo ukatila ati, “Mulandu nshi nshaleumfwila kufyo balenjalulula? Cinshi ico no mutima wandi tawatemenwe ukusalapulwa?" 
Proverbs5:13 Nakeene no kubeela bakafundisha bandi, nangu ukuteya ukutwi ku balensambilisha." 
Proverbs5:14 Kwashele panono ukuiletela ububi no bonaushi mukati ka kulongana kwa lukuta.” 
Proverbs5:15 Ulenwa amenshi ya mu cishima cobe we mwine, amenshi ayafukauka mukati ka cishima cobe." 
Proverbs5:16 Wileka insonsa shobe shifukaukile pa mbilibili, utumilonga tobe wileka tusalanganine pa lwalala, iyoo." 
Proverbs5:17 Leka fibe fyobe we mwinefye weka, tafili fya beni pamo na iwe iyoo." 
Proverbs5:18 Leka akamfukumfuku kobe kabe akapaalwa, na iwe wine ulesansamukafye pamo no mukashi obe uo waupile ucili umulumendo." 
Proverbs5:19 Ulya mwanakashi alepa umukoshi nge nkoba, no kuyemba nge mpombo. Leka na mabele yakwe yalekusekesha lyonse, ne citemwiko cakwe cilekusansamusha lyonse." 
Proverbs5:20 We mwana wandi, nga cinshi ulefwaila ukusansamuka kobe kube ku mwanakashi cilende? Nga cinshi ico wingalatonesha amabele ya mwanakashi muka mwine?" 
Proverbs5:21 Pantu Yawe alishibafye bwino imyendele ya muntu, kabili eulonda no muntu monse umo alola." 
Proverbs5:22 Ifibi ificita umuntu mubi ala fiteyo Umwine ekatwa ne myando ya fyabubifi fyakwe. 
Proverbs5:23 No kufwa kwine eco akafwila pa mulandu wakufilwa ukulaikanya, ukutumpa kwakwe ekukamutwala mu nindi." 
Proverbs6:1 We mwana wandi, nga walaya ukufutilako umubiyo imisha, nga mwaumana akapi ukumwimininako ku misha," 
Proverbs6:2 nga waibika mu bwafya pa mashiwi walandile, no kwikatwa mu citeyo ca fyebo fya kanwa kobe we mwine," 
Proverbs6:3 kanshi pakuipokako ucite ici we mwana wandi. Apo nauiposa mu minwe yakwe we mwine, endeshafye kabiye uye umupapate akwelele." 
Proverbs6:4 Wileka amenso yobe yamone utulo, nangu umone ukutuusha." 
Proverbs6:5 Ipusushekofye nge mpombo iyilefuma mwisumbu, atemwa nge cuni icileisotola ku lukose." 
Proverbs6:6 Lolesha ku kanyelele we muntu umunaŋani iwe, umone imibeele yakako." 
Proverbs6:7 Kena takakwata intungulushi, nangu kangalila nangufye kateeka." 
Proverbs6:8 Nomba ulusuba lonsefye kalonganya icakulya cakako no kututila, elyo no kukolonganya icakulya cakako mu nshita yakuseepa." 
Proverbs6:9 Nomba we munaŋani wa muntu iwe, ni nshita nshi ukalalapo utulo? Ni nshita nshi ukabukilapo mu tulo tobe?" 
Proverbs6:10 Ena atilafye, “Awe nkantale ntubilishekofye panono, kantale nsendamekofye panono, kantale njikumbate amaboko panono no kutuusha.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Elyo ubupina bukakwishila ngo mupupu, elintu no kubulwa kukakuwililila nge cipondo icili ne canso." 
Proverbs6:12 Umuntu umuwelewele kabili umubi, eulya alesalanganya ubufi." 
Proverbs6:13 Pakubepa alashinisha ku menso, asholokota ulukasa lwakwe, no kulembula ku minwe yakwe." 
Proverbs6:14 Ena elenganya ububi no bucenjeshi mu mutima wakwe, lyonse asongelekanyafye ulubuli mpanga yonse." 
Proverbs6:15 Eico icinkunka cikesa mupumikishafye bwangu bwangu, eukonaulwa ukwabula icakumupokako." 
Proverbs6:16 Kwaba ifintu mutanda ifyo Yawe apata, ifintu cine lubali ifimuselausha ku mukoshi:" 
Proverbs6:17 Amenso yacilumba, no kubepa ubufi, elyo no kusumya umulopa wakaele," 
Proverbs6:18 umutima uupanga ifyabipa, na makasa ayangufyanya ukutwala ku bubi," 
Proverbs6:19 na kambone uulanda ifyabufi, no muntu uutanda ulubuli muli bamunyina." 
Proverbs6:20 We mwana wandi, ulesunga amafunde ya bawiso, kabili wilasuula ifyo banoko balekufunda iyoo." 
Proverbs6:21 Pefye ulesunga amafunde yonse mu mutima obe, no kuyakobeka mu mukoshi obe." 
Proverbs6:22 Yakulakutungulula ilyo wakulaenda, yakulakusunga ilyo uli mu tulo, kabili yakulakupandako amano pa nshita ya kasuba." 
Proverbs6:23 Pantu aya mafunde ni nyali, no kufunda lubuuto, kabili ukukulanga apo waluba ni nshila ya ku mweo." 
Proverbs6:24 Eyakukupususha ku mpulumushi ya mwanakashi, muka mwine uwaba no lulimi ulusembeleka umwaume." 
Proverbs6:25 Iwe wilakumbwa ubusuma bwakwe mu mutima obe, nangufye akufwebulwile shani amenso." 
Proverbs6:26 Pantu cilende ena kuti wamusembelekela pa mukate umofye, lelo umwanakashi muka mwine awe ena kuti akupindilapo ifingi." 
Proverbs6:27 Bushe umuntu kuti afukatila umulilo mu ceni cakwe, ukwabula ukumocela ifyakufwala?" 
Proverbs6:28 Bushe umuntu kuti anyanta pa musolilo, ukwabula ukupya mu makasa?" 
Proverbs6:29 Ala e cimo cinefye ukusendama na muka mwine, efintu noyo muntu ali nokuculilapo." 
Proverbs6:30 Abantu tabasusha mpupu nga cakuti aiba pa mulandu wakuti ali ne nsala. 
Proverbs6:31 Nomba kwena nga aikatwa, paco ebile ali nokulipililapo imiku cine lubali, emukutila ali nokufutilapo fyonsefye ifyo akwata." 
Proverbs6:32 Nomba umuntu uucita ubucende ena mano ashikwata, ena uwacita ifi, mwine eka ailofyafye." 
Proverbs6:33 Alakutwa, alapumwa, no kukwata insoni lyonse." 
Proverbs6:34 Pantu umulume wakwe elyo ailanga ifyo afubila umukashi wakwe, kabili takwata no luse nga atila kanandule." 
Proverbs6:35 Tekuti asumine ukumufutilapo, nangufye ifyakumutemuna fingafula teti fimunashe." 
Proverbs7:1 We mwana wandi ulesunga amashiwi yandi, elyo ulebaka na mafunde yandi mu mutima yobe." 
Proverbs7:2 Ulebaka ifyo ndekufunda pakuti uleenda umumi, no kusunga ifyo ndekweba nge mboni ya linso lyobe." 
Proverbs7:3 Uleyekata mu minwe yobe, no kuyalemba petamina lya mutima obe." 
Proverbs7:4 Uleeba mano auti, “Niwe nkashi yandi,” no mucetekanya uleita nga kacele obe." 
Proverbs7:5 Efyakulakutalusha kuli cilende umwanakashi, na ku waupwa muka mwine uulanda amashiwi yakusembeleka." 
Proverbs7:6 Ubushiku bumo pa nsolokoto ya ŋanda yandi, ine nalelengela pa fipunda." 
Proverbs7:7 Awe namona pa bantu abo inshiku shishilati shifunde, nalolesha pakati ka balumendo, nomba namonapo umo uushakwata amano." 
Proverbs7:8 Ena aleenda mu musebo mupepi ne cinshoko, ali mu nshila iyalungatana na pa ŋanda ya uyu mwanakashi." 
Proverbs7:9 Cali icungulo pali muntungulya, ninshi no kufiita paya palefiita." 
Proverbs7:10 Elyo uyu mwanakashi aisa kumanya noyu mulumendo, nafwala ne nsalu shabucilende, elyo mu mutima wakwe mwalifye ubucenjeshi." 
Proverbs7:11 Uyu mwanakashi ala untu akamuka, ne nsoni nakalya, lyonsefye tekala pamwakwe." 
Proverbs7:12 Limbi kuti aiminina pa musebo, limbi mu lubansa, kabili mu cinshokofye monse, ala tewakupuswamo, ninshi alelolela." 
Proverbs7:13 Awe umwanakashi afukatila no mulumendo, ati nokuti kuuku. Elyo amutomona amutonta na menso ati nokuti," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ine ninkwata umutuulo wakwampana pamo kumwandi, ilelo nimfikilisha ifilayo fyandi." 
Proverbs7:15 Eico njishile ndekufwaya nacipamfiwa ukukusanga, nomba naumoneka." 
Proverbs7:16 Pa busanshi bwandi ninyanshikapo insalu ishisuma, ishikankala ishatula ku Egupto." 
Proverbs7:17 Nimpupilapo ne cinyamuti icanunka busaka muri, no tubunga utwanunka bwino utwa matembusha no twa sinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Ala twende, tuleya! Tuye yangala mpaka ulucelo! Cileyawama nganshi ilyo tuleya kumbatana mu citemwiko." 
Proverbs7:19 Pantu umulume wandi talipo iyoo, aliya pa bulendo ubutali." 
Proverbs7:20 Alisenda ne cikwama ca ndalama ishingi, akabwelafye umweshi nga wakosa ilyo walakangana na kasuba.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Na mashiwi yakumubembeleka amutunka, ku longolo lwa milomo yakwe amunasha." 
Proverbs7:22 Apopene alakonka no mwanakashi, kwati ni ŋombe iyo baletwala kukwipaya, kwati ni nsebula iyiketwe ku mwando," 
Proverbs7:23 mpaka umufwi wapulinkana mu libu. Kwati cuni icilesenselela ku lukose, ukwabula ukwishiba ukuti cileitwalafye kukufwa." 
Proverbs7:24 Nomba kanshi mwe bana bandi umfweni kuli ine, kutikeni ku mashiwi nalamweba ine." 
Proverbs7:25 Imwe mwileka imitima yenu ipilibukile ku misango ya uyu mwanakashi, nangu ukulubantika pakukonkelela inshila shakwe." 
Proverbs7:26 Pantu abaume bengi abo aonaula, nabo aipaisha nabo bengi, ala teti nkumemo ukupenda." 
Proverbs7:27 Pantu iŋanda yakwe e nshila iyitwala ku calo ca bafwa, e nshila yakusupula iyitentemushisha abantu ku mfwa." 
Proverbs8:1 Mwe, bushe tamuleumfwa uko amano yalebilikisha ngo mwanakashi? Kwiluka bushe talesansula ishiwi lyakwe?" 
Proverbs8:2 Mano eminine pa mulu wa kalupili, mupepi no musebo, eminine pa masansa ya nshila." 
Proverbs8:3 Eminine lubali lwa pa mpongolo iyo bengililapo mu musumba, pa mwinshi epantu alebilikisha aleti," 
Proverbs8:4 “Kuli imwe bonse mwe bantu ala nimwe ndeita, ine ndebilikisha ku bantu bonsefye." 
Proverbs8:5 Mwe mbulwamano sha bantu imwe, ala salapukeni, mwe fipuba fya bantu, ala toleni amano." 
Proverbs8:6 Umfweni kuno pantu ine ndemwebako ifintu ifisuma, fyonse ifyo ine nalamwebako ala fintu fyalolamo." 
Proverbs8:7 Pantu ifyo akanwa kandi kasosa fyacishinka, pantu imilomo yandi yapata ububifi." 
Proverbs8:8 Fyonsefye ifyo ine nanda fyalilungama, ine awe nshilanda ifishalolamo nangu ifyabufi iyoo." 
Proverbs8:9 Ku muntu uwiluka alamona ukuti fyonse ifyo nanda fyaba pa bwelu, ku muntu uwamano fyonse filalolamo." 
Proverbs8:10 Mulesalapo amafunde yandi ukucila silifa, no bwishibilo bwandi ukucila golide." 
Proverbs8:11 Pantu mano alicila pa tumabwe utwamutengo utwa rubi, tapali nelyo cimo ico mwingafwaya icingalingana nankwe ku busuma." 
Proverbs8:12 “Ine nine mano, nine cibinda wakwilula ifintu, nine njishibisha abantu ifintu, no kubapandako amano yene yene." 
Proverbs8:13 Ukuba na katiina kuli Yawe, ekupata ifyabipa, ine nalipata icilumba ne miya, nalipata imisango iyibi, nalipata no kulanda ifyabufi." 
Proverbs8:14 Ne upandako amano nine, kabili nine mpeela ukwiluka no kwishiba ifyakucita, nine mwine wamucetekanya no bulamba." 
Proverbs8:15 Nine nenga ishamfumu shileteeka ifyalo, nine nenga intungulushi shilepanga amafunde ayalungama." 
Proverbs8:16 Nine nenga bakateeka bonse baleteeka ifyalo, bacilolo bonse abatungulula pano calo nine wine mbapulamika." 
Proverbs8:17 Ine ne mano nalitemwa abantemwa, na bantu abamfwaya ala ebansanga." 
Proverbs8:18 Ifyuma no bucindami nine nakwata, ubukankala bwine bwine ne shuko nine nafikwata." 
Proverbs8:19 Ifyo ine mpeela ala fyalicila pali golide wine wine uwawamishiwa bwino, fyalicila na pali silifa wine wine ku busuma." 
Proverbs8:20 Ine njikala imikalile yabololoke, nkonka imisango iyalungama." 
Proverbs8:21 Abantemwa ine ndabapeela ifyuma, na matala yabo ine ndesushamo ifyuma paa." 
Proverbs8:22 “Yawe ewalengele mbeko mu kutendeka kwa milimo yakwe, ilyo talati atampeko imilimo yakwe iyakale." 
Proverbs8:23 Ukutulafye ku kale na kale ine ninshi nalisansabikwa, ukutulafye pa kutendeka ilyo kushilati kube ne calo cine." 
Proverbs8:24 Ine nafyelwe ilyo kushilati kube na bemba, ilyo kushilati kube ne ntulo sha mimana shine." 
Proverbs8:25 Ine nafyelwe ilyo kushilati kube ne mpili, ilyo no tupili twine tushilati tubeko," 
Proverbs8:26 ilyo na Lesa ashilati abumbe icalo ne mpanga shine ishabamo, ilyo ashilati abumbe nangufye tulukungu twapakubala utwe loba." 
Proverbs8:27 Ine epo nali ilyo Lesa aandalike umulu, ilyo acitile icitengulusha pa mulu wa bemba."
