Proverbs8:28 Ilyo aandalike amakumbi mu lwelele, nelyo apongwele ne ntulo sha bemba." 
Proverbs8:29 Ne lintu apimine amenshi ya muli bemba imipaka, umwakuti yalepelela, ine ne mano epo nali, nelyo apimine apakwikashisha isonde." 
Proverbs8:30 Ala epo nali mupepifye nankwe, ine ne cibinda wa milimo, nine nalemusansamusha apo shicela, pefye naleanga ne nsansa apo ali." 
Proverbs8:31 Naleanga ne nsansa pa calo cakwe, insansa shandi ine ala kuba pamo na bantunse.”" 
Proverbs8:32 “Kanshi nomba mwe bana bandi umfweni kuno. Balipaalwa abo abakonka inshila shandi. 
Proverbs8:33 Mulekonka amafunde yandi no kuba na mano, mwilayasuula iyoo." 
Proverbs8:34 Alishuka umuntu uumfwa kuli ine, uwikala inshiku shonse pa mpongolo shandi, uulolela pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yandi." 
Proverbs8:35 Pantu uwansanga ala ninshi asanga ubumi, kabili untu atemwikwa no kutemwikwa kuli Yawe." 
Proverbs8:36 Lelo umuntu uwafilwa ukunsanga, ala ena ailetelelafye umwine, na bonse abampata ine, ala batemwa imfwa.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Amano yaliikuulila iŋanda yayako ngo mwanakashi uwaimikamo ne nceshi cine lubali. 
Proverbs9:2 Naipaya ne nama, nateyanya no mwangashi, napekanya na pakucitila imitebeto." 
Proverbs9:3 Natuma ababomfi bakwe abanakashi balebilikisha, nabeminina na pa ncende iyasansamisha mu musumba baleti," 
Proverbs9:4 “Lekeni imbulwamano shise kuno.” Alesosa ku babula amano ati," 
Proverbs9:5 “Iseni mulye umukate wandi, munwe no mwangashi mpekenye." 
Proverbs9:6 Fumeni mu nshila shenu ishakukanaishiba, lyena ninshi imwe mwakulaikala abomi, muleenda na mu nshila sha mano.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Nga wakalipila uupumya ninshi kutukwa ulefwaya. Nga waebaula umuntu mubi, ninshi wailetelelafye." 
Proverbs9:8 Tecakwesha ukukalipila uupumya, ena akakupatilapo. Nomba nga wakalipila umuntu uwamano, ena akakutemenwapo." 
Proverbs9:9 Funda uwamano, na mano yakwe yalafulilako, sambilisha umuntu umololoke nao alelundapo ukwishiba." 
Proverbs9:10 Ukukwatila Yawe akatiina e ntendekelo ya mano, kabili ukwishiba Uwamushilo ekwishiba kwine kwine." 
Proverbs9:11 Pantu ni muli ine emo shikafulilako inshiku shenu, no kulundilwako imyaka iyingi iyakwikala pano calo." 
Proverbs9:12 Nga wakwata amano ninshi na mano yobe yakakulambula, nomba nga ulapumya, lyena ninshi uleiletela ubwafya we mwine." 
Proverbs9:13 Umwanakashi icipuba alikalauka, akwata amasange, taishiba kantu." 
Proverbs9:14 Ekala pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwe, pa cipuna icasansama mu musumba," 
Proverbs9:15 elyo aleita abalepitapo, abalungemefye mu nshila shabo aleti," 
Proverbs9:16 “Lekeni imbulwamano shise kuno.” Aleeba ne cipuba ati," 
Proverbs9:17 “Amenshi yakwiba ala eyasuma. Ne cakulya balila mu bumfisolo ala ecakwatisha umulyo.” 
Proverbs9:18 Lelo tabeshiba nokuti abaya ku ŋanda yakwe baitwalafye ku mfwa, nokuti abengila mumwakwe balifye mu nshila ishilosha ku mikonko ya mu calo ca bafwa." 
Proverbs10:1 Amapinda yakwa Solomoni. Umwana wamano asansamusha wishi, lelo icipuba ca mwana cena cisakamika nyina." 
Proverbs10:2 Ifyuma banonkela mukucita ulufyengo tafiwamina nelyo cimo, lelo imicitile iyalungama ilapususha umuntu ku mfwa." 
Proverbs10:3 Yawe taleka umololoke alecula ne nsala, lelo aleka umubi abulwe ico alekabila." 
Proverbs10:4 Ubunaŋani ala tabulisha kasuma iyoo, lelo ubukankala bwaba mukubombesha." 
Proverbs10:5 Uututila ifilyo pa nshita iyalinga e mwana wamano, lelo alisebana umwana uulala utulo pa nshita yakuseepa." 
Proverbs10:6 Umololoke alapaalwa, lelo akanwa ka muntu umubifi kafubatila icimfulunganya." 
Proverbs10:7 Ukwibukisha umololoke ala ciba lipalo, lelo ishina lya mubifi lyena iyoo." 
Proverbs10:8 Umuntu wamano alasekelela amafunde mu mutima wakwe, lelo umuntu uulelandafye icilande lande alakandilwapo." 
Proverbs10:9 Umuntu wa myendele isuma ekala umutelelwe, umuntu uwenda mu nshila shabipa awe ena alekatwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Umuntu uushinisha ku linso aletafye icimfulunganya kabili uulandafye icilande lande alakandilwapo. 
Proverbs10:11 Akanwa ka mololoke ala kamfukumfuku kabumi, lelo akanwa ka muntu mubi umubifi kafimba pa buluku." 
Proverbs10:12 Impatila ilenga ulubuli, nomba icitemwiko cena cifimba pa fyabupulumushi fyonse." 
Proverbs10:13 Abamano bena balanda ifyamano, nomba ifipumbu fya bantu fyena kanofye ubwembya ebufisalapusha." 
Proverbs10:14 Abamano basungisha amano yabo, lelo icipuba ca muntu nga cati cilande cailetelafye ishamo." 
Proverbs10:15 Ifyuma fya mukankala e linga lyakwe ilyakosa ilimupokololako, nomba ubupina nabo bonaula abapina." 
Proverbs10:16 Icilambu ca muntu umololoke ala bumi, lelo amalipilo ya muntu mubi ala kukandwa." 
Proverbs10:17 Umuntu uumfwa ifyo balemufunda alekala umumi, nomba umuntu uushisumina ifyo alufyenye, ala ena aleka bambi bambi ukulubilamo." 
Proverbs10:18 Umuntu afimba pa lupato lwakwe alalanda ifyabufi, no muntu uulanda ifyalwambo ala cipubafye." 
Proverbs10:19 Mukulanda ifingi tamubula cilubo, nomba umuntu uwamano alasunga akanwa kakwe." 
Proverbs10:20 Imilandile ya mololoke ni silifa eka eka, nomba ifitontonkanya umubi ala fyena fyafyefye." 
Proverbs10:21 Imilandile ya mololoke ala ifunda abengi, nomba ifipuba fyena fifwilafye pa mulandu wakutumpa kwafiko." 
Proverbs10:22 Amapaalo yakwa Yawe yaletela umuntu ubukankala, kabili talundilapo no bucushi nakalya." 
Proverbs10:23 Icipuba cisanga insansa mukucita icibi, lelo umuntu wamano asansamuka mukwiluka." 
Proverbs10:24 Umuntu mubi aponenwa ne shamo lintu atiinisha, umulungami ena alapeelwa ico akabila." 
Proverbs10:25 Icimwela nga capupa cilolulula umubi, ala abalungama bena baishalilafye umushinsanshiku umo babela." 
Proverbs10:26 Nga filya inungo itapata mu meno, nangu filya fine icushi cikalipa mu menso, efyo cikalipa no muntu uwatuma umunaŋani ukuti amubombeleko cimo." 
Proverbs10:27 Ukuba na katiina kuli Yawe kulenga umuntu ukukokola pa calo, nomba imyaka ya mubifi ikepifiwa." 
Proverbs10:28 Ifilolela umololoke ala ni nsansa sha pe, lelo ukucetekela kwa muntu mubi kwa cimpelesha." 
Proverbs10:29 Yawe alacingilila abololoke abenda mu nshila yakwe, lelo ababifi bena balaloba." 
Proverbs10:30 Abololoke bena tabakatelentenshiwe, lelo ababifi bena tabakakwate ne ncende mu calo." 
Proverbs10:31 Amashiwi ya bakaele yapeela amano, nomba abalanda ifibi, awe bena bakabaputulako ululimi." 
Proverbs10:32 Abololoke bena balishiba ifisuma ifyakulanda, lelo akanwa ka babifi kalandafye ifyakucitapo ifibi." 
Proverbs11:1 Yawe alipata icipimo abantu babomfya bucenjeshi bucenjeshi, lelo ifipimo ifyalungama efintu ena atemwa." 
Proverbs11:2 Ilyo icilumba catangila, ala insoni eshikonkapo, amano yena yasangwa ku baicefya." 
Proverbs11:3 Abantu abakaele balekala bwino pa mulandu wa bukaele bwabo, nomba abashacetekelwa balobela pa bufufuntungu bwabo." 
Proverbs11:4 Ifyuma taficita kantu pa bushiku bwakukandwa, lelo ubololoke bwena bulapususha ku mfwa." 
Proverbs11:5 Ubololoke bwa wakaele bulenga inshila yakwe ukutambalala, lelo imicitile ya mubifi iyine eimonaula." 
Proverbs11:6 Ubololoke bwa bakaele bulabalubulako, lelo abashaba na cishinka bekatwa no lunkumbwa lwabo." 
Proverbs11:7 Umubifi nga afwa, isubilo lyakwe lilapwa, ninshi nefyo alecetekela nafyo fine e mipwile." 
Proverbs11:8 Umuntu umololoke alapusuka ku mafya, lelo amafya yaponena pa mubifi." 
Proverbs11:9 Uushitiina Lesa, ku misosele yakwe onaula umunankwe, lelo umucetekanya upususha umololoke." 
Proverbs11:10 Umuntu mololoke nga ashuka, mu musumba muba insansa, elyo mulaba ukwaula utupundu ilyo ababifi bakandwa." 
Proverbs11:11 Umusumba ulapaalwa nga mwaikala abalungami, lelo ulonaika ku nsoselo sha babifi." 
Proverbs11:12 Icipuba ca muntu cisaalula umunankwe, lelo umuntu wamano ena ekala tondolo." 
Proverbs11:13 Uwa mulomo tasunga nkaama nakalya, lelo umuntu wacishinka alasunga inkaama." 
Proverbs11:14 Icalo icabula ubutungulushi, abantu balonaika, lelo ukucimfya kwaba mukukwata bacilolo abamano abengi." 
Proverbs11:15 Uulaya ukulipilila umubiye inkongole icine cine euculilamo, lelo cawamishapo ukukanaiposa mu mulandu." 
Proverbs11:16 Umwanakashi wacikuku ala alacindamikwa, lelo abaume abankalwe bena banonkafye ifyuma." 
Proverbs11:17 Umuntu waluse alamwenapo ifisuma, lelo umuntu umunkalwe ena alailetelela umwine." 
Proverbs11:18 Umuntu umubifi ena tashukila kasuma nakalya, lelo abalungami balashininkisha ukuti bena bakalambwilwapo." 
Proverbs11:19 Umuntu uubikapofye ukucita ifyalungama alashukila ubumi, nomba uubikapofye ukubifya ena alafwa." 
Proverbs11:20 Yawe ena apata abalosha imitima ku fyabulungani, lelo aba myendele isuma ebo atemwa." 
Proverbs11:21 Cishinkafye abantu ababifi bena bakakandwa, lelo abololoke bena tabakakandweko iyoo." 
Proverbs11:22 Ala ukuyemba kwa mwanakashi mpelwamano kwaba nge cipini ca golide icili ku myona ya nkumba. 
Proverbs11:23 Ififwaya umololoke lyonse filabomba icisuma, lelo ukulolela kwa muntu umubifi kwena kwa cimpelesha." 
Proverbs11:24 Umuntu kuti alepeela peelafye icuma cakwe, ninshi elyo alacililako ubukankala, umbi nao kuti aleumfwila icuma akaso, nomba elyo bacililako mu bupina." 
Proverbs11:25 Umuntu kapekape alamona ishuko, no wafwako bambi nao balamwafwako bambi." 
Proverbs11:26 Abantu balatipwila uubika iŋanu shakwe pakuti akese shitisha pa mutengo uukulu, lelo uushitisha ena balamupaalilapo." 
Proverbs11:27 Umuntu uubikapofye ukufwaya ifisuma ena alacindikwa, lelo uubikapofye ukufwaya ifibi ala fyena efimwalukila." 
Proverbs11:28 Uutetekela mu fyuma fyakwe alailofya umwine, lelo abololoke bena balelema nga mabula ya ku mibundo." 
Proverbs11:29 Umuntu uuleta impatila pa lupwa lwakwe takalilepo kantu nelyo kamo, ne cipuba cisanguka umubomfi wa wamano." 
Proverbs11:30 Ifisabo fya mololoke cimuti cabumi, kabili uyo uupususha imyeo ena wamano." 
Proverbs11:31 Nga cakuti umololoke alapeelelwapo icilingene ne micitile yakwe pano isonde, palibufi uushapetamina Lesa no mubifi, ala nabo bene bakapokelela icibalingile." 
Proverbs12:1 Umuntu uwatemwa ukusalapulwa atemwa amano, lelo uwapata ukusalapulwa, ala ninshi cipubafye." 
Proverbs12:2 Yawe alitemwa umuntu umusuma, lelo apata umuntu uwa mapange yabucenjeshi." 
Proverbs12:3 Ububifi tabukosha muntu iyoo, lelo abololoke baishalilafye abakosa ndi." 
Proverbs12:4 Umukashi wa mibeele isuma alapulamika wiba, nomba uulenga wiba insoni, ena ninshi aba ngo bulwele bwa mu mafupa." 
Proverbs12:5 Amapange ya bololoke yena yalilungama, lelo amano yapanda ababifi yena yabucenjeshi bweka bweka." 
Proverbs12:6 Imilandile ya babifi fiteyo fyakusumya umulopa, lelo imilandile ya bakaele yena yakupususha abalepangilwa." 
Proverbs12:7 Abantu ababifi balafwa ukwabula ukushapo icishibilo, lelo ulupwa lwa bololoke lwena lulabelelela." 
Proverbs12:8 Umuntu balamutasha ukulingana na mano akwata, lelo ifipuba fya bantu filasuulwa." 
Proverbs12:9 Cawamishapo ukuba umuntu wafye uuibombela umwine, ukucila ukulaibepa ukuba umucindami elyo ulecula ku nsala." 
Proverbs12:10 Umuntu umololoke alasakamana ifitekwa fyakwe, lelo umubifi uluse lwakwe bunkalwe." 
Proverbs12:11 Umulimi uubombesha alakwata ifyakulya ifingi, nomba uuposa inshita kufyafye ena ciwelewele ca muntu." 
Proverbs12:12 Umubifi alakumbwa icuma ca balufyengo, lelo umushila wa mololoke ulatwala ifisabo." 
Proverbs12:13 Umuntu umubifi bamwikatila ku milandile yakwe iyibi, lelo umuntu umololoke alapusuka mu bwafya." 
Proverbs12:14 Umuntu alambulwa ukulingana ne misosele yakwe, ee, ku mibombele yakwe alamwenamo icimulingile." 
Proverbs12:15 Iciwelewele ca muntu cilaitunga ukulungika, lelo uwamano omfwa ifyo bamupandako amano." 
Proverbs12:16 Icipuba nga bacicitapo cimo cilasakatuka apopenefye, lelo uwamano taposako mano ku nsele." 
Proverbs12:17 Kambone wacishinka apeela ubunte bwaciine, lelo kambone wabufi wena alenga ulufyengo." 
Proverbs12:18 Amashiwi yacilandelande yalasa umuntu nge fumo, lelo imilandile ya wakaele yena ilondapa." 
Proverbs12:19 Icishinka ala cilabelelela pe, lelo ubufi tabukokola." 
Proverbs12:20 Mu mitima ya bapanga ububifi mubafye ubucenjeshi, lelo abaleta icibote balaba ne nsansa." 
Proverbs12:21 Ishamo taliponena pa bololoke iyoo, lelo abantu ababifi amafya yalabaponena pefye." 
Proverbs12:22 Yawe apata ababufi, lelo ena atemwa abafumacumi." 
Proverbs12:23 Umuntu uwacenjela tailangisha mano yakwe, lelo icipuba cena calasha ubupuba bwaciko." 
Proverbs12:24 Ukuboko kwa ubombesha kulateeka, lelo umunaŋani ena asanguka umusha." 
Proverbs12:25 Isakamika lipwisha umuntu insansa, lelo amashiwi yamutembo yalamusansamusha." 
Proverbs12:26 Umuntu umololoke alapandako ifibusa fyakwe amano, lelo inshila sha babifi shibatwala kukulubantika." 
Proverbs12:27 Umunaŋani ena takatale ashukila ico afwaya nakalya, lelo uwapambana ena alashukila icuma." 
Proverbs12:28 Mu nshila yabololoke emwaba umweo, muli iyi nshila tamusangwa mfwa." 
Proverbs13:1 Umwana wamano alasumina kufyo wishi alemusalapula, lelo uupumya ena tomfwa kufyo balemwebaula iyoo." 
Proverbs13:2 Umuntu musuma alambulwa pa milandile yakwe, lelo insuna ya ncenjeshi ipwafye nga yafyengeleshapo umo." 
Proverbs13:3 Uusunga akanwa kakwe aisungila ubumi, lelo uwasamuna akanwa ena ailetelelafye umwine." 
Proverbs13:4 Umunaŋani ena tamona ico alefwaya, lelo uwapambana ku milimo eumona ifyo afwaya fyonse." 
Proverbs13:5 Umololoke apata ubufi, lelo ababifi baletafye insoni no musebanya." 
Proverbs13:6 Ubololoke busungila umuntu ubucindami, lelo ububifi bwena bulalenga ukuti ababifi balobe." 
Proverbs13:7 Abantu bamo bacita kwati bakankala, lelo bapina abene bene, bambi nabo bacita kwati e balanda, kanshi balikwata ifyuma ifingi nganshi." 
Proverbs13:8 Ifyuma kuti fyalubula ubumi bwa mukankala, lelo umulanda wa muntu tatiina kantu nelyo kamo." 
Proverbs13:9 Abololoke baba ngo lubuuto ululeaka bwino bwinofye, lelo ababifi baba nge cisaniko icileshibantukila." 
Proverbs13:10 Icilumba cena cibushafye ifyongo, lelo amano bucingo ku bayanonka." 
Proverbs13:11 Indalama shakunonkela mu nshila iyibi shilapwa, lelo uukolonganya indalama panono panono shilafulilako." 
Proverbs13:12 Ico umuntu alelolela nga tacicitike, umutima ulatompoka, lelo ukupeelwa icilekabilwa muti wabumi." 
Proverbs13:13 Ukusuula ifyo balekufundako ekuiletelela, lelo uucindika ifunde alalambulwa." 
Proverbs13:14 Amafunde ya bantu abamano ala ni ntulo yabumi, yalapususha umuntu ku fiteyo fya mfwa." 
Proverbs13:15 Amano yalenga umuntu ukucindikwa, lelo inshila ya bashili bacishinka intu yayafya." 
Proverbs13:16 Umuntu uwacenjela abomfya amano, lelo icipuba cena calasha ubupuba bwaciko." 
Proverbs13:17 Inkombe ibi iponena mu bwafya, lelo inkombe yacishinka ileta ukupola." 
Proverbs13:18 Uushifwaya kusalapulwa alaponena mu bulanda elyo ne nsoni, lelo umuntu uusumina ifyo balemusalapula ena alacindikwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Ala tepabusuma ukushukila icintu walekabila, lelo ifipuba fyena tafifwaya kuleka ifyabipa iyoo." 
Proverbs13:20 Umuntu uwenda na bamano nao alakwata amano, nomba nga walaenda ne fipuba awe ninshi waonaika." 
Proverbs13:21 Ishamo likonka uubifya, lelo abololoke balambulwa ubukankala." 
Proverbs13:22 Umuntu musuma alashila na beshikulu ifyuma, lelo ifyuma fya babifi fyena fisungilwa abololoke." 
Proverbs13:23 Ibala lya mulanda kuti lyafumya ifisabo ifingi nganshi, lelo umucishacinani ulabonawila." 
Proverbs13:24 Umufyashi ashitola bwembya apata mwane, lelo uwatemwa mwane untu amusalapula." 
Proverbs13:25 Abololoke balalya no kwikuta, lelo ifumo lya mubifi likala ne nsala." 
Proverbs14:1 Umwanakashi uwamano alakuula iŋanda yakwe, lelo icipuba ca mwanakashi cilaibongolola ku minwe yaciko." 
Proverbs14:2 Umuntu uwenda mu cishinka ena eutiina Yawe, uushaba na myendele isuma ena asuula Yawe." 
Proverbs14:3 Imilandile ya cipuba ilenga umwine ukuiletelela, lelo imilandile ya wamano ilamucingilila." 
Proverbs14:4 Ukushaba ŋombe shakuliminako, ifilyo tafifula iyoo, nomba ukwaba iŋombe shakuliminako ishamaka ekufula ifyakuseepa." 
Proverbs14:5 Kambone wacishinka tabepa bufi iyoo, lelo kambone wabufi ena abepafye lyonse." 
Proverbs14:6 Umuntu uupumya aicushafye takatale amona amano, lelo ukwishiba takwafya ku muntu uwamano." 
Proverbs14:7 Uletaluka ku ciwelewele ca muntu, pantu tacilanda ifyamano mu kanwa kaciko." 
Proverbs14:8 Amano ya wacenjela kutontonkanya pa myendele yakwe, lelo ifipuba fyena fiitunga ukwishiba." 
Proverbs14:9 Ifipuba tafisakamana ukubelelwa luse pa fyabubifi, lelo abakaele balafwaisha ukubelelwa uluse." 
Proverbs14:10 Icikalipa cumfwa umwine ku mutima wakwe, no mweni takuma ku nsansa shauko iyoo." 
Proverbs14:11 Iŋanda ya mubi ilawa, lelo itenti lya mulungami lishalafye umo lyabela." 
Proverbs14:12 Kwaliba inshila iyimoneka kwati eisuma ku muntu, nomba pakulekelesha itwala ku mfwa." 
Proverbs14:13 Muli sekaseka emufuma lilalila, insansa nasho kuti shaleta ubulanda." 
Proverbs14:14 Umuntu uwanenuka mu cisumino akalambwilwapo pa mibeele yakwe, no muntu musuma alalambwilwapo pa mibeele yakwe." 
Proverbs14:15 Imbulwamano yena isuminafye icisumine sumine, lelo uwamano ena alalolekesha apo alenyanta." 
Proverbs14:16 Uwamano alatiina Yawe no kutaluka ku ntulubundi, lelo icipuba cena kuiposamofye tacisakamana iyoo." 
Proverbs14:17 Uwaba ne cipyu acita ifyabupuba, no muntu uucita ifyabucenjeshi alapatwa." 
Proverbs14:18 Imbulwamano shipeelwa ubupuba, lelo abacenjela balapeelwa amano." 
Proverbs14:19 Abantu ababifi balakontama pa cinso ca basuma, na babifi balayolopa pa mpongolo sha bololoke." 
Proverbs14:20 Umulanda alasuulwa na ku bena mupalamano bakwe, nomba umukankala ena atemwikwa na bengi." 
Proverbs14:21 Umuntu uusuulisha umunankwe alabifya, lelo umuntu uulangulukilako abalanda ena alipaalwa." 
Proverbs14:22 Bushe uupanga ifibi tekulubantika alubantikafye? Lelo abapanga ifisuma basanga ukutemwa ne cishinka. 
Proverbs14:23 Mukubombesha monse mwaliba ukumwenamo, lelo ukulandapofye kuleta ubupina." 
Proverbs14:24 Ubukankala bwa wamano e ngala yabo, lelo ifipuba fyena fishibikilwa ku bupuba bwafiko." 
Proverbs14:25 Kambone wacishinka alapususha abantu, lelo kambone wa bufi ni mundetelele." 
Proverbs14:26 Uwakwatila Yawe akatiina alikwata ishintililo ilyakosa, abana bakwe babutukila uko ali." 
Proverbs14:27 Ukukwatila Yawe akatiina e ntulo yabumi yalapususha umuntu ku fiteyo fya mfwa. 
Proverbs14:28 Ubucindami bwa mfumu kukwata abantu abengi, lelo kateeka nga taba na bantu, ninshi tacindama iyoo." 
Proverbs14:29 Umuntu uuteeka umutima e wamano ayengi nganshi, lelo umuntu wacipyu ailangafye ubupuba." 
Proverbs14:30 Umutima wa muntu nga uli umutende, upeela ubumi ku mubili, lelo umufimbila e bulwele ubulya amafupa." 
Proverbs14:31 Umuntu uucusha umulanda cilanga ukuti acusha Kabumba wakwe, lelo uyo onse uulangulukilako abalanda acindika Lesa." 
Proverbs14:32 Ilyo ubucushi bwaisa, ebwipaisha umuntu umubifi, lelo nangu ni mu mfwa abololoke balikwata umwakuuba." 
Proverbs14:33 Umutima wa wacenjela e cifulo cituushamo amano, nomba mu mitima ya fipuba tayeshibikwa nakalya." 
Proverbs14:34 Ubololoke ebusandulula umushobo, lelo ifyabubifi filasebanya abantu abali bonse." 
Proverbs14:35 Umubomfi wamano alitemwikwa ku mfumu, lelo umubomfi uuiletela insoni ena ilamukanda." 
Proverbs15:1 Ukwasuka ukwafuka kubwesha icipyu, lelo ukotoka kulumya ubukali." 
Proverbs15:2 Imilandile ya wamano ilanga ukwishiba, lelo akanwa ka cipuba kabwantailafye ifyakubwantaila." 
Proverbs15:3 Yawe alamona mpanga yonse, alolesha ificita ababifi na basuma." 
Proverbs15:4 Amashiwi yamutembo yaleta ubumi, lelo amashiwi yabi yafupula umutima." 
Proverbs15:5 Icipuba cisuula amafunde yakwa wishi, lelo umuntu uupokelela ukusalapulwa ewacenjela." 
Proverbs15:6 Mu ŋanda ya mololoke mulasungwa ifyuma ifingi nganshi, lelo indalama sha mubifi shileta ubwafya." 
Proverbs15:7 Abamano balasalanganya amano yabo, ifipuba fyena awe nakalya." 
Proverbs15:8 Ilambo lya babifi lilaselausha Yawe ku mukoshi, lelo ipepo lya muntu uwakaele elimusansamusha." 
Proverbs15:9 Yawe alipata imyendele ya bantu ababifi, lelo alitemwa abakonkelela ubololoke." 
Proverbs15:10 Uupatuka mu nshila alolela ukukandwa icabipisha nganshi, umuntu uwapata ukwalululwa akafwa." 
Proverbs15:11 Icalo ca bafwa no bonaushi fyaba pa bwelu pa cinso cakwa Yawe, nga cikansha ifyaba mu mitima ya bantu." 
Proverbs15:12 Uupumya tafwaya kwalululwa, teshako no kwipushako abamano nakalya." 
Proverbs15:13 Umuntu uuli ne nsansa mu mutima alamoneka pa menso, lelo uuli no bulanda umusana ulaputuka." 
Proverbs15:14 Umutima wamano ufwaisha ukwishiba ifyamano, lelo akanwa ka fipumbu kaipakisha ubupumbu." 
Proverbs15:15 Inshiku shonse isha mulanda shalikosa, lelo abekala ne nsansa bena baipakishafye cila bushiku." 
Proverbs15:16 Ukukwata utunono no kukwatila Yawe akatiina kwaliwamishapo, ukucila ukukwata ifyuma ifingi elyo no kulaculilapo." 
Proverbs15:17 Ukutobela umusalu pamo na bakutemwa kwawamishapo, ukucila ukutobela iŋombe iyanona pa bakupata." 
Proverbs15:18 Umuntu uufulwa bwangu alabusha ulubuli, lelo uushifulwa bwangu atalalika ifikansa." 
Proverbs15:19 Inshila ya munaŋani yaba iyasapa ku myunga, lelo iya mulungami yena yaba iyatambala." 
Proverbs15:20 Umwana wamano asansamusha wishi, lelo icipuba ca mwana cilasuula nyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Ubupumbu busansamusha umuntu uwabula amano, lelo umuntu wamano alalungamika imyendele yakwe." 
Proverbs15:22 Amapange tayafikilishiwa ukushili kupandwa amano, lelo ukufulile bampandamano yalafikilishiwa." 
Proverbs15:23 Umuntu uwasuka amashiwi ayalolelemo alasekelela, ishiwi ililandwa pa nshita iyalinga lyaliwama." 
Proverbs15:24 Umuntu wamano akonka inshila iyitwala ku bumi, pakukana tentemukila ku calo ca bafwa." 
Proverbs15:25 Yawe alawisha iŋanda ya wacilumba, lelo alalinda umupaka wakwa mukamfwilwa." 
Proverbs15:26 Yawe apata amatontonkanyo ya babifi, lelo aya basanguluka imitima yalamusansamusha." 
Proverbs15:27 Uwalunkumbwa lwa fyuma aletelela ulupwa lwakwe, lelo uwapata amafisakanwa enda umumi." 
Proverbs15:28 Umuntu uwaololoka umutima alasala ifyakwasuka ifisuma, lelo akanwa ka mubifi kapongololafye ifyabipa." 
Proverbs15:29 Yawe alaitalusha ku babifi, lelo abololoke bena alomfwa amapepo yabo." 
Proverbs15:30 Icinso icimoneka bwino cipeela insansa ku mutima, ne mbila nsuma ipeela ubumi ku mafupa." 
Proverbs15:31 Umuntu uukutika ku mashiwi yabumi ayakumusalapula, akekala pamo na bamano." 
Proverbs15:32 Umuntu uusuula ukumusalapula aisuulafye umwine, lelo uusumina kufyo balemusalapula alasanga amano." 
Proverbs15:33 Ukuba na katiina kuli Yawe ekusambilila amano, elyo ukuicefya ekutangilila umucinshi." 
Proverbs16:1 Abantu balapanga ifyakucita mu mutima, lelo ishiwi lyakusuminisha lifuma ku kanwa kakwa Yawe." 
Proverbs16:2 Fyonse ifyo umuntu acita mu mano yakwe amona ukuti nafilolamo, lelo Yawe ena apima ifili mu mutima wa muntu." 
Proverbs16:3 Ulelekela Yawe fyonse ifyo ulecita, na mapange yobe yakafikilishiwa." 
Proverbs16:4 Conse ico Yawe abumba alicikwatila ico acibumbile, na bacita ifyabubifi alibapekanishisha ubushiku bwakulimunwa." 
Proverbs16:5 Yawe alipatisha bonse abamitima yacilumba, cine cinefye wishibe ici, aba bantu bakakandwa." 
Proverbs16:6 Ukupitila mu kutemwa na bucishinka ifyabubifi filafutilwa, no kupitila mukuba na katiina kuli Yawe umuntu alaitalusha ku fibi." 
Proverbs16:7 Yawe nga amona imyendele ya muntu yamusansamusha, kuti alenga na balwani bakwe bonse ukwaluka bacibusa bakwe." 
Proverbs16:8 Ukukwata utunono mu bololoke kwawamapo, ukucila ukunonka ifyuma ifingi mu lufyengo." 
Proverbs16:9 Mu mutima umuntu alapekanya ifyakucita, lelo Yawe eutantika ifyo ali nokucita." 
Proverbs16:10 Kateeka wa bantu alalanda na maka yakwa Lesa, eco alalungika ilyo alepingula imilandu." 
Proverbs16:11 Yawe afwaya ifyakupiminako fileba ifyalungama, ewapangile na mabwe yakupiminako aya muli tumba." 
Proverbs16:12 Camuselu ku shamfumu ukucita ifyabubifi, pantu ubololoke ebukosha ubuteko." 
Proverbs16:13 Bashamfumu batemwa abalanda ifishinka, no kusekelela abafumacumi." 
Proverbs16:14 Imfumu nga yafulwa cilanga ukuti palefwa umo, lelo umuntu uwamano kuti aitalalikako umutima." 
Proverbs16:15 Pa cinso ca mfumu nga payanguka, palangilila ukuti pali ubumi, no kusansamuka kwaiko kwaba nge mfula ya mu cilala." 
Proverbs16:16 Ala caliwamishapo ukukwata amano ukucila golide, ukusalapo ukwishiba ifintu ukucila silifa." 
Proverbs16:17 Abantu abakaele balataluka ku fibi, uupima umwakwendela asunga ubumi bwakwe." 
Proverbs16:18 Icilumba ecitangilila ukonaika, na mataki eyawisha umuntu." 
Proverbs16:19 Cawamishapo ukuicefya mu mupashi pamo na balanda, ukucila ukwakana ifitapwa na bacilumba." 
Proverbs16:20 Umuntu uumfwa ifyo alefundwa alamona ifisuma, kabili alipaalwa uucetekela muli Yawe." 
Proverbs16:21 Uwaba no mutima wamano etwa uwailuka, kabili imilandile yamutembo yafwa ukufunda." 
Proverbs16:22 Amano yakwiluka, e ntulo yabumi ku bayashukila, lelo ubupuba bwa fipuba ebulenga filekandilwapo." 
Proverbs16:23 Umutima wa muntu wamano ulenga ukucenjela mu misosele yakwe, kabili ne milomo yakwe ikoselesha ukufunda." 
Proverbs16:24 Amashiwi yamutembo yaba ngo luto lwa buci, yalowa na mu kanwa, kabili yaposha na mu mafupa ya muntu." 
Proverbs16:25 Kwaliba inshila iyimoneka kwati eisuma ku muntu, nomba pakulekelesha itwala ku mfwa." 
Proverbs16:26 Insala ni ndiminwa, ala tempulilwa iyoo, e mulandu wine umulimi akosela ukulima." 
Proverbs16:27 Icinangwa ca muntu citeya ifyakucusha bambi, na mashiwi yakwe yaba ngo mulilo uoca." 
Proverbs16:28 Abantu babi balasongelekanya ulubuli, bacita umulomo no konawila abantu bucibusa." 
Proverbs16:29 Umuntu umunkalwe asembeleka umunankwe, kabili amulanga ne mibeele iyishalolamo." 
Proverbs16:30 Umuntu uushinisha umunankwe, ninshi aletontonkanyapo icibi cimo, no unyonga imilomo untu acita icabipa." 
Proverbs16:31 Ukumena imfwi ecilongwe ca mucinshi, ala cilambu ca bumi ubusuma ubwabololoke." 
Proverbs16:32 Ukuba uushifulwa bwangu cawamishapo ukucila ubulamba bwa mpalume ya bulwi, uuinasha umwine awamapo ukucila uupoka umusumba." 
Proverbs16:33 Bapendwila mu ceni pali tumba uo bashimapepo bafwala, lelo Yawe eupingula uko icipendwilo cilewila." 
Proverbs17:1 Ukulalila icimbala na ku matwi tondolo kwawamapo, ukucila ukulalya ifya mabwenge mu ŋanda umwaba ifikansa." 
Proverbs17:2 Umubomfi wamano kuti ateeka umwana uulenga insoni, no kumwakanya ifyabupyani na bana ba ŋanda." 
Proverbs17:3 Ni mu mulilo emo bengulwila silifa mu cikopo, na golide mwilungu, lelo Yawe ewesha umutima." 
Proverbs17:4 Umuntu mubi ateya amatwi ku lyashi lyabufi, no wabufi nao ala ateya amatwi ku basosa ifyabufi." 
Proverbs17:5 Umuntu uususha umulanda cilanga ukuti asusha kabumba wakwe, uusansamukila peshamo lya munankwe, ena akakandilwapo." 
Proverbs17:6 Abakote balacankilwa mu beshikulu babo, elyo abana nabo bacankilwa mu bafyashi babo." 
Proverbs17:7 Imilandile iyacindama te ya bantu abapumbu, no kucila, amashiwi ayabufi tayalinga intungulushi." 
Proverbs17:8 Abantu abapeela amafisakanwa batontonkanya ukuti yalabomba nge cishimba, bena batila kuti yabomba konsefye." 
Proverbs17:9 Umuntu uusuula ku cilubo umunankwe amucita, akosha icitemwiko, uubukulusha imilandu yakale alekanya ifibusa." 
Proverbs17:10 Umuntu uwamano alomfwa ukukalipilwa umukufye umo, icipuba cena pakuti cisalapuke kano batala bacifyampamo imiku umwanda umo (100)." 
Proverbs17:11 Umuntu mubi ena atontonkanyafye palwa cimfulunganya lyonse, e mulandu wine bamutumina inkombe iyabula uluse kukumukalipila." 
Proverbs17:12 Ukukumanya iciswango ca bea ico bapokolola utwana kwalinga, ukucila ukukumanya icipuba mu bupumbu bwaciko." 
Proverbs17:13 Ngo muntu abwesesha ububi pa busuma ubo bamucitile, ena uyu muntu takatalushe ishamo mumwakwe." 
Proverbs17:14 Ifikansa fitampafye panono nga akapunda akali mu mutondo, ala bangilila ilyo ifikansa tafilabapo." 
Proverbs17:15 Ukupeela uwamulandu insambu, no kupeela uwakaele umulandu, efintu fibili ifyo Yawe apatisha." 
Proverbs17:16 Indalama mu minwe ya cipuba bushe shanshi? Pantu ena tasambililemo mano nakalya. 
Proverbs17:17 Icibusa cena citemwafye lyonse, neco munyina abelako kwafwilisha mu nshita shabwafya." 
Proverbs17:18 Icipumbu ca muntu cilaiposa icine mu mulandu wakufutilako umunankwe, nangu ukuumana akapi mukumwimininako ku misha." 
Proverbs17:19 Umuntu uwatemwa ukuumana atemwa ifyabubifi, umuntu uuitutubula lyonse ni mpasase afwaya." 
Proverbs17:20 Umuntu wa mutima watalama tamona ishuko, uyo uulandafye ifyabufi ailetela ubwafya." 
Proverbs17:21 Ukufyala umwana icipuba cileta ubulanda, kabili wishi wa ciwelewele tasansamuka iyoo." 
Proverbs17:22 Umutima uwansansa upeela umutende ku mubili, nomba umupashi uwatitikishiwa ulomika amafupa." 
Proverbs17:23 Umuntu umubi alapoka amafisakanwa mu nkaama, pakuti apondamike ubupingushi." 
Proverbs17:24 Umuntu uwacenjela atonta amenso pa mano, nomba amenso ya cipuba yaya yalelulumba na ku mpela sha calo." 
Proverbs17:25 Iciwelewele ca mwana cifiisha wishi ku mutima, kabili cikalifya nyina uwacifyele." 
Proverbs17:26 Ala te cisuma ukufyenga uwakaele, nangu ukuumina abantu pali bukaele bwabo ala calibipisha." 
Proverbs17:27 Umuntu uwamano alashikatala pakulanda, no wamucetekanya alateeka umutima." 
Proverbs17:28 Ne cipuba cine nga cileikalako tondolo kuti batila camano, nga cilesunga ululimi kuti bacitunga ukuba icacenjela." 
Proverbs18:1 Umuntu uwikala eka acita ifyo atemenwe umwine, ukumupanda amano kumukalifyafye umutima." 
Proverbs18:2 Icipuba tacisakamana kumfwa icintu umo cilolele iyoo, ena afwayafye ukulanda ifili mu mutima wakwe." 
Proverbs18:3 Ukubifya ekubalilapo elyo pakonka ukusuulwa, ifyansoni efibalilapo elyo pakonka umusebanya." 
Proverbs18:4 Amashiwi yafuma mu kanwa ka muntu litenga lya menshi, mumana uwaisula kabili kamfukumfuku kamano." 
Proverbs18:5 Ala tacawama ukuwila ku lubali lwa muntu uubifishe, nelyofye ukufyenga uwakaele." 
Proverbs18:6 Imilandile ya cipuba ileta ukukansana, kabili isonsomba ne mpumo." 
Proverbs18:7 Akanwa ka cipuba kailetelela ukulobelapo, ne casakanwa cakwe citembo ku bumi bwakwe." 
Proverbs18:8 Amashiwi yabukwakwa yalowa ngo twakusasula, yatentemukila munda mukati." 
Proverbs18:9 Umuntu umunaŋani pakubomba imilimo yakwe, alilingana no muntu umonaushi." 
Proverbs18:10 Ishina lyakwa Yawe lupungu ulwakosa, ulo umuntu umololoke abutukilako pakuti apusuke." 
Proverbs18:11 Ifyuma fya mukankala lilinga lyakwe ilyakosa ilyakumupusushako, nga filya fine abena musumba bacetekela mwilinga lyauko." 
Proverbs18:12 Icilumba ecitwala umuntu kukonaika, lelo ukuicefya ekutangilila ukucindama." 
Proverbs18:13 Umuntu uwankula talati omfwikishe euilanga ukuti cipumbufye, kabili ailetelafye insoni." 
Proverbs18:14 Umutima wa muntu eushipikisha mu bulwele, nomba nga watompoka awe ninshi cayafya no kwafya." 
Proverbs18:15 Umuntu wamano alacincila pakufwaisha ukulundapo amano yakwe, na matwi ya wacenjela yafwaya umucetekanya." 
Proverbs18:16 Ubupe bwiswila inshila uupeela, kabili bumutwala pa cinso ca bakalamba." 
Proverbs18:17 Uubalilapo ukulubulula mu cilye amoneka kwati ewalungika, mpakafye shimilandu munankwe nao alubulule no kwipukisha." 
Proverbs18:18 Ukupendula kupwisha ifikansa, elyo no kupatulanya pakati ka bapusene babili." 
Proverbs18:19 Munonko uo mwapusana nankwe cayafyapo ukumunasha, ukucila ne linga lya musumba ilyakosa, ukukansana nankwe fiba nge mipilikisho yakwisalila iŋanda yakwe." 
Proverbs18:20 Ku milandile ya muntu kulenga umuntu ukwikuta, ifisabo fya kanwa kakwe fimulenga ukwikuta." 
Proverbs18:21 Imfwa no bumi fyaba mu maka ya lulimi, na balutemwa ukulubomfya balya ifisabo fyaluko." 
Proverbs18:22 Umuntu uwasanga umukashi ninshi asanga icintu icisuma, apokelela icakusenamina ukufuma kuli Yawe." 
Proverbs18:23 Umulanda alomba ukumulangulukilako, lelo umukankala ena pakwasuka otokafye." 
Proverbs18:24 Limo ifibusa nga fyafula bucibusa bulonaika, lelo kulaba cibusa uukonena ukucila na munonko." 
Proverbs19:1 Umulanda uwa myendele isuma awamapo, ukucila icipuba icaba mwilikandimi." 
Proverbs19:2 Ukupupumina cimo ukwabula ukwishiba takwawama iyoo, ukukanateka umutima kuti waluba inshila." 
Proverbs19:3 Ubupuba bwa muntu bulonaula ubumi bwakwe, elyo kabili umutima wakwe wafulilwa Yawe." 
Proverbs19:4 Bacibusa ba mukankala cani ca ku mutenge, nomba umulanda ifibusa fyonse filamubutuka." 
Proverbs19:5 Kambone wabufi icishinkafye akalimunwa, umuntu uubepa ubufi ala takamone pakupusukila." 
Proverbs19:6 Abantu abengi balaipalamika ku mukankala, kabili no muntu onse uupeela ifyabupe ni cibusa wa bantu bonse." 
Proverbs19:7 Apo umulanda balamukankamba kuli ba lupwa lwakwe bonse, palibufi bacibusa, bena kumubutuka. Nangu engatulukusha shani mukupapata, awe tewakusangapo nelyo umo nakalya." 
Proverbs19:8 Uyo onse uupoka amano atemwa umweo wakwe, no muntu uwatemwisha ukwishiba ifintu asanga ishuko." 
Proverbs19:9 Kambone wabufi icishinkafye akalimunwa, ala uulanda ubufi akaloba." 
Proverbs19:10 Ala tacalinga icipuba ukulaipakisha, palibufi umusha ukuteeka abana ba mfumu." 
Proverbs19:11 Umuntu wamano alailanga ukuba uwamutembo, ecilenga ukumutasha ilyo asuula ku filubo bamubifishe." 
Proverbs19:12 Ukufulwa kwa mfumu kwaba nge cilulumo ca nkalamo, lelo uluse lwaiko lwena lwaba ngo mume pa cani." 
Proverbs19:13 Icipuba ca mwana cishamika wishi, umukashi wa ciwowo ena aba nga menshi ayaletonafye nto nto nto." 
Proverbs19:14 Amayanda ne fyuma filapyanwa ukufuma ku bafyashi, lelo umukashi uwamano ni Yawe eupeelafye." 
Proverbs19:15 Ubulamu bwine bwine buponesha umuntu mu tulo twa mfwa, no munaŋani aponenwa ne nsala." 
Proverbs19:16 Umuntu uusunga amafunde acingilila ubumi bwakwe, lelo uuyasuula mu myendele yakwe euiletela imfwa yakwe." 
Proverbs19:17 Uukumbusukako abalanda ni Yawe eo akongwesha, kabili akamubwesesha fyonse pafyo acitile." 
Proverbs19:18 Salapula umwana obe ilyo kucili isubilo, icikulu wiibika mu fingalenga ukuti afwe." 
Proverbs19:19 Umuntu uufulwa bwangu muleke aifutile imilandu umwine, nga wamupokololako akabwekeshapo, ukamufutile nakabili." 
Proverbs19:20 Ulekutika ku bantu abalekufundako amano, ninshi na iwe wine kuntanshi ukaba na mano." 
Proverbs19:21 Umuntu mu mutima wakwe muba amapange ayengi, lelo ubufwayo bwakwa Yawe ebubelelela." 
Proverbs19:22 Ico umuntu afwaisha citemwiko icishipwa, kabili cawamapo ukuba umupina ukucila uwabufi." 
Proverbs19:23 Ukuba na katiina kuli Yawe kutwala ku bumi, lyena umuntu kuti aikalila ku matwi tondolo, ukwabula ubwafya ukumucena." 
Proverbs19:24 Umunaŋani atumpa iminwe mu mbale, afilwa no kufumyamo ukuti atwale pa kanwa kakwe." 
Proverbs19:25 Nga cakuti wakanda umuntu uupumya, eko ne mbulwamano shingamwenako no kucenjela. Nga wasalapula uwamano, ena kuti ailuka atesha nomo cilolele." 
Proverbs19:26 Uwibila wishi no kutamfya nyina, uyu mwana lisebanya kabili ciwelewele." 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wandi ilyo ukaleka ukukutika ku mafunde, ninshi wataluka na ku mashiwi yamano." 
Proverbs19:28 Kambone wabufi alasuusha ubupingushi, na kanwa ka babifi kapongolola ifyalufyengo." 
Proverbs19:29 Ubupingushi bwabikilwa abamiponto, no kuumwa kulolela inuma sha bawelewele." 
Proverbs20:1 Umwangashi ulafulunganya umuntu, no bwalwa bumulenga ukuba no lubuli, onse uubukonkelela taba na mano." 
Proverbs20:2 Ukufulwa kwa mfumu kwaba nge cibulumo ca nkalamo, uubalamuna imfumu ailetelelafye umwine." 
Proverbs20:3 Ukutaluka ku lubuli kucindamika umuntu, lelo iciwelewele conse cilaituninkishako." 
Proverbs20:4 Umunaŋani acita umulele ukulima pa mibundo, tamona cakulya pa nshita yakuseepa nakalya." 
Proverbs20:5 Amapange ya mu mutima wa muntu litenga lya menshi, nomba umuntu wamano eutapamo." 
Proverbs20:6 Abantu abengi balaitakisha ukuti baba ne citemwiko icishipwa, nomba umuntu uwacishinka nani engamusanga?" 
Proverbs20:7 Umuntu umololoke enda mu bumi bwabukaele, na bamwane abakamukonkapo bena balishuka." 
Proverbs20:8 Ilyo imfumu yatekesha icilye camilandu, ilolulula ububi bonse ku menso yaiko." 
Proverbs20:9 Nani engatila ati, “Ine mu mutima wandi mulifye umwabuuta? Ninsangululwa ku fyabubifi fyandi fyonse.”" 
Proverbs20:10 Ifipimo ifishili fyacishinka kabili no kupima bucenjeshi bucenjeshi, awe ifi fyonse fibili Yawe alifipata." 
Proverbs20:11 Ne misango ya mwaice imonekela ku micitile yakwe, nga cakuti ificitwa fyakwe fisuma nangu iyoo." 
Proverbs20:12 Ala ni Yawe ewatupeela amenso yakumwenako, na matwi yakumfwilako." 
Proverbs20:13 Wilatemwisha utulo kuti limbi waisanga mu bupina, ulekalabana elyo lyena wakulakwata ifyakulya ifingi ne fyakushapo." 
Proverbs20:14 Uushita alainongonya ati, “Tafiweme, tafiweme.” Nomba kabili kutifye cilya aya, alaitakisha pa mutengo ashitilepo." 
Proverbs20:15 Kwaliba golide no tumabwe utwauma umutengo utwingi, lelo akanwa akasosa ifyamano kalansha ukusanga." 
Proverbs20:16 Umuntu uwalaya ukufutilako umweni inkongole shakwe, mupokefye icakufwala cakwe, eco cibe icikatila mulandu pali uyo uushishibikwe bwino." 
Proverbs20:17 Icakulya icapokelwa mu bucenjeshi, ala tepabusuma, nomba kabili panuma ciba kwati ni nsenga wiswishe mu kanwa." 
Proverbs20:18 Tantika amapange yobe ilyo waipushako bambi, nga waya mukulwa inkondo utungululwe na mano." 
Proverbs20:19 Uwa mulomo tasunga nkaama nakalya, kanshi iwe wilaenda na bantu babukwakwa." 
Proverbs20:20 Umuntu uwatipwila abafyashi bakwe, ubumi bwakwe bukapwa nge cisaniko icishima pa nshita kufiitile fititi." 
Proverbs20:21 Ifyuma ifinonkwa mukwangufyanya pakutendeka, fyena tafikwata ishuko pakulekelesha." 
Proverbs20:22 Wilatila auti, “Nkalandula pa bubi bancita.” Iwe lolelafye pali Yawe, eukakupusushako." 
Proverbs20:23 Ala Yawe alipata abantu abapima ifintu bucenjeshi bucenjeshi, kabili ifipimo ifishili fyacishinka fyena tafimusansamusha." 
Proverbs20:24 Apo kanshi ni Yawe eututungulula mu kwenda kwesu, nga nomba umuntu umwine kuti aishiba shani uko alelola?" 
Proverbs20:25 Cilaba citeyo umuntu ukulaya Yawe cimo, ukwabula ukutontonkanya bwino, elyo panuma waisa mukulanguluka." 
Proverbs20:26 Imfumu iyamano ilolululamo abantu imbifi, kabili yabapishapo no mupeto wa kutwilako iŋanu." 
Proverbs20:27 Kampingu wa mu muntu e cisaniko cakwa Yawe, cilafwailisha mukati nankati muli fyonse ifyo engatontonkanya." 
Proverbs20:28 Ukutemwa ukushipwa ne cishinka filinda imfumu, ukupitila mukutemwa icipuna caiko cilacingililwa." 
Proverbs20:29 Ululumbi lwa balumendo maka yabo, kabili imfwi ku mutwe e bucindami bwa bakote." 
Proverbs20:30 Ukumaulwa ne filonda kulafumyapo ukubifya, ne mpumo shiwaminisha mukati ka munda." 
Proverbs21:1 Umutima wa mfumu waba ngo mumana wa menshi mu minwe yakwa Yawe, alatungulula no kutwala uko atemenwe." 
Proverbs21:2 Fyonse ifyo umuntu acita mu nshila yakwe amona ati nafilolamo, lelo Yawe ena apima ifili mu mano ya muntu." 
Proverbs21:3 Ukucita ifisuma ne fyalungama, kulasansamusha Yawe ukucila ukulamutuula amalumbo." 
Proverbs21:4 Amenso ayalolesha bukali bukali, no mutima uwacilumba, fishibilo fya bantu babi, kabili ekulufyanya kwine." 
Proverbs21:5 Ulepekanya bwino ifyo uli nokucita, lyena wakulanonkelamo ifintu ifingi, nomba nga walacita ifintu mu lubilo, cikakupeela ukukanakwata nelyo kamo." 
Proverbs21:6 Ukunonka ifyuma mukubepa ubufi, mwela uulekuukafye kabili citeyo ca mfwa." 
Proverbs21:7 Ababi balailetelela imfwa kulwa bukakashi bwabo, pantu balakaana ukucita ifyalungama." 
Proverbs21:8 Abantu ba milandu inshila bakonka intu yanyongana, lelo imicitile ya bakaele intu yatambalala." 
Proverbs21:9 Cawamapo ukwikala pa cifutu ca pa mutenge wa ŋanda, ukucila ukwikala mu ŋanda imo no mukashi inkakashi." 
Proverbs21:10 Ababifi lyonsefye bafwaya ukucitapo cimo icabipa, bena tabalanga uluse ku bena mupalamano." 
Proverbs21:11 Nga bakanda uwamiya eko imbulwamano shimwena shasambilila no kusambilila. Ilyo bafunda uwamano, aleshibilapo na fimbi." 
Proverbs21:12 Uwaololoka aleshiba iŋanda ya mubifi, no kulenga umubifi ukuwishiwa no kuloba." 
Proverbs21:13 Uucilika mu matwi ilyo abalanda balemulilila, nao wine bambi tabakamusakamane ilyo akalakuuta mutuule." 
Proverbs21:14 Umuntu nga nakufulilwa umupeelepo icintu cimo, walamona no mutima wakwe utalale. Nga waya ne cinasha mulandu kuli shimilandu mubiyo mu bumfisolo, ala cilabwesha icipyu." 
Proverbs21:15 Ilyo paba umulinganya abantu abololoke balasansamuka, lelo ababifi bena balomfwa umwenso." 
Proverbs21:16 Umuntu uufuma mu nshila iyakwiluka, akaisanga ku manda, aletuusha pamo na bafwa." 
Proverbs21:17 Uukonkelela ubwangashi akaba umupina, no watemwisha umwangashi na mafuta takabe umukankala." 
Proverbs21:18 Umubifi asanguka icakulubwilako umololoke, umusangu nao icakulubwilako uwakaele." 
Proverbs21:19 Cawama ukwikala mu matololo, ukucila ukwikala no mukashi wa congo ne cipyu ca cinse." 
Proverbs21:20 Mu ŋanda ya muntu uwamano alasunga bwino ifyakulya na mafuta, lelo icipuba ca muntu cisheta fyonse ifyo cikwete apopene." 
Proverbs21:21 Umuntu uukonkelela ubololoke ne citemwiko icishipwa, e muntu usanga ubumi, ubukankala no bucindami." 
Proverbs21:22 Umuntu uwamano kuti asansa umusumba wa fita ifyabulamba kuti aonaula na malinga ayo bashintamo imitima. 
Proverbs21:23 Umuntu uusunga akanwa no lulimi lwakwe, ena tailetelela iyoo." 
Proverbs21:24 Umuntu wacilumba kabili uwafikansa ishina lyakwe ni mpumya, ena imicitile yakwe ya cilumba icapesha amano." 
Proverbs21:25 Ulunkumbwa elwipaisha umunaŋani, pantu iminwe yakwe ilakaana ukubomba imilimo." 
Proverbs21:26 Ena akasuba konse atontonkanyafye ukupeelwapo na fimbi, lelo umuntu umololoke apeela ngo kufwita, tatana iyoo." 
Proverbs21:27 Ilambo ababifi balekela Yawe lyena lilamuselausha ku mukoshi, palibufi nga balipeelela pepange ilibi." 
Proverbs21:28 Kambone wabufi akalobelela, kabili na onse uukutika ku mashiwi yakwe akalobelela pe." 
Proverbs21:29 Umuntu umubifi alakamuka pakuilanga ukuti e muntu wine wine, lelo umuntu wakaele ena atontonkanyafye pa myendele yakwe." 
Proverbs21:30 Tapali amano, tapali ukwiluka, tapali ukupandwa amano ifingacimfya Yawe." 
Proverbs21:31 Pa bushiku bwa nkondo bapekanya bakabalwe aba ku bulwi, nomba uulenga ukucimfya ni Yawe." 
Proverbs22:1 Ishina ilyacindama lyawamapo ukucila ifyuma ifingi, no mucinshi walicila pali golide na silifa." 
Proverbs22:2 Icintu cimo ico umukankala no mupina bakwata icapalana nici, Yawe, e kabumba wa bonse." 
Proverbs22:3 Umuntu uwamano alamona ubwafya no kubutaluka, lelo imbulwamano yena iyitwalafye mu bwafya, elyo yalalanguluka panuma." 
Proverbs22:4 Ukuicefya no kuba na katiina kuli Yawe fipeela ubukankala no bucindami no bumi. 
Proverbs22:5 Mu nshila ya mubifi mwaba imyunga ne fiteyo, lelo umuntu uwatemwa umweo wakwe alatalukako." 
Proverbs22:6 Ulelanga umwaice inshila yakwendelamo, nelyo akakota takafumemo." 
Proverbs22:7 Abakankala ebateeka abalanda ubusha, elyo uwankongole asanguka umusha wa wamukongwesha." 
Proverbs22:8 Uutanda ulufyengo ailetela impasase, ne nkoto ya cipyu cakwe ikonaulwa." 
Proverbs22:9 Umuntu uukumbusuka ababusu alapaalwa, pantu alakanyako abapina icakulya cakwe." 
Proverbs22:10 Tamfya uupumya ninshi no lubuli lwapwa, ifikansa ne nsele fyatalala." 
Proverbs22:11 Umuntu uwatemwa umutima uwakaele kabili uulanda ne shiwi lyacikuku, ewampana bucibusa ne mfumu." 
Proverbs22:12 Amenso yakwa Yawe eyalinda amano, lelo alafulunganya amashiwi ya ushili wacishinka." 
Proverbs22:13 Umunaŋani atila, “Panse pali nkalamo,” nangu ati, “Ine nga naya mu musebo balenjipaya.”" 
Proverbs22:14 Akanwa ka mwanakashi cilende bucinga ubwashika, umuntu uo Yawe afulilwa euwilamo." 
Proverbs22:15 Ubutumpe bukakatila mu mutima wa mwaice, lelo ubwembya bwakumusalapula kuti bwabutamfyamo." 
Proverbs22:16 Umuntu uucusha abapina pakufusha icuma cakwe, elyo no muntu uupeela abakankala ifyabupe, bonse balola ku bupina." 
Proverbs22:17 Teyamika amatwi, kabili uleumfwa ku mashiwi ya bamano, ulebikako umutima kufyo ndekufunda." 
Proverbs22:18 Pantu cikawama ilyo ukayasunga mu mutima obe, kabili no kulayalanda lyonse pa kanwa kobe." 
Proverbs22:19 Ine ndefwaya ukuti iwe uletetekela Yawe, kanshi ecalenga ukuti lelo nkwebeko ishi nsoselo." 
Proverbs22:20 Bushe nshakulembele insoselo amakumi yatatu (30), insoselo shamano no kukusokako?" 
Proverbs22:21 Neshi nsoselo shakulakufundako ifyacishinka na mashiwi yacine cine, na bakutuma bene nga bakwipusha wakulabasukafye ifyalolamo." 
Proverbs22:22 Wilacusha abapina ico bapinafye, kabili wilafyengelesha abantu mu cilye camilandu ico bashikwete uwakubasoselako." 
Proverbs22:23 Pantu Yawe akabalubulwilako, na bantu ababapoka ifintu nabo Yawe akabapokolola." 
Proverbs22:24 Wilaampana bucibusa na bantu abacipyu, nangu ukwikatana na baotoka." 
Proverbs22:25 Epali wayambula imibeele yabo, no kuilengesha ubumi bobe." 
Proverbs22:26 Wiibika pa bantu abafunkana mu minwe pakusuminishanya, kabili wilaimininako uulekongola no kuba icikatilo ca misha." 
Proverbs22:27 Pantu limbi nga wafilwa inshila yakulipililamo, kuti baisa kupoka umusengele obe wine uo usendamapo." 
Proverbs22:28 Wilaesha kutelula imipaka yakale iya citungu, iyo ifikolwe fyobe fyabikile." 
Proverbs22:29 Bushe tawamona umuntu uwacincila mu milimo? Ala e muntu ukabombela ishamfumu, takabombele abantu yaweyawefye iyoo." 
Proverbs23:1 Nga ulelya icakulya na kateeka, uleishiba bwino ifilyo ifilipo." 
Proverbs23:2 Nga uli ne nsala iyakuluka umulopa, uleteeka umutima." 
Proverbs23:3 Wilapupumina ifyakulya ifiwamishepo ifyo akutebete, pantu limbi kuti emo akuteyeele." 
Proverbs23:4 Wilacululuka pakuti umone ubukankala, nga uli wamano kusuulakofye." 
Proverbs23:5 Ifyuma kuti wakwata nomba waluba napo file, kwati fintu fimenene amapindo no kupupukila mumulu nga kapumpe." 
Proverbs23:6 Wilalya ifyakulya fya muntu wabupapa, wilakumbwa ifyakulya fyakwe ifyawamisha." 
Proverbs23:7 Pantu muntu uutontonkanya lyonse pafyo aposelepo. Kuti akweba ati, “Akulya nokunwa,” nomba ninshi ali nakamo akalemukolola ku mukoshi." 
Proverbs23:8 Ala kuti waluka na kapande ulile, nefyo wacilamulumbanya fyabula na bulole." 
Proverbs23:9 Wilalanda ifintu ku cipuba, pantu ena teti amonemo ubusuma mufyo iwe ulelanda." 
Proverbs23:10 Wilasesha mipaka yakale iya citungu, nangula ukwingila mu mabala ya bakashiwa." 
Proverbs23:11 Pantu Ndubulwila wabo wamaka, akabuula umulandu wabo no kubalubulwilako." 
Proverbs23:12 Ulebika umutima ku mano yakwishiba ifintu, kabili uleteya amatwi kufyo balekufunda." 
Proverbs23:13 Wilafilwa ukukalipila umwaice, ukukapa ubwembya ala tekumwipaya." 
Proverbs23:14 Wilatiina ukumufyapa ubwembya, ala ekupususha umweo wakwe ku calo ca bafwa." 
Proverbs23:15 We mwana wandi umutima obe nga wakwata amano, ninshi na ine nkatemwa icibi." 
Proverbs23:16 No mutima wandi ukanga ne nsansa, ilyo akanwa kobe kakalanda ifyalungama." 
Proverbs23:17 Wilakumbwa ababubifi mu mutima obe, lelo lyonse iwe uleba na katiina kuli Yawe." 
Proverbs23:18 Lyena nga efyo wakulacita, awe ninshi walala washuka, ifintu usubile fikafikilishiwa." 
Proverbs23:19 Umfwa kuno, we mwana wandi ala iwe uleiluka mu fintu, uletungulula umutima obe mu nshila isuma." 
Proverbs23:20 Iwe wilaenda na bacakolwa wa bwalwa, nangu abaikalila ukuipakisha inama." 
Proverbs23:21 Pantu bacakolwa na bakatubi baiposa abene mu bulanda, ukushipula nako kusapwisha umuntu." 
Proverbs23:22 Uleumfwa kuli bawiso abakufyele, iwe tecakwesha kusuula banoko ilyo bakota." 
Proverbs23:23 Icishinka, amano, ubupete, ukusalapuka, ifi fintu efyalinga ukuposelapo indalama, nomba awe tekwesha ukufishitisha iyoo." 
Proverbs23:24 Wishi wa mwana umololoke alasangalala, uwafyala umwana wamano, ee alacankwa." 
Proverbs23:25 Leka bawiso na banoko balecankwa, leka na banoko abakufyele baleanga ne nsansa." 
Proverbs23:26 We mwana wandi ulekonka bwino ifyo ine ndekweba, kabinge ulekonkelela imyendele yandi." 
Proverbs23:27 Umwanakashi cilende no mukashi wa myendele ibi, ala baba ngo bucinga umufwila abantu." 
Proverbs23:28 Bena ala balalilila abantu nga bapupu, kabili ebapusaula na baume abengi." 
Proverbs23:29 Bantu nshi bekala inkumbabulili? Bantu nshi benda balelanguluka mu mitima yabo? Bantu nshi benda no lubuli no kuilishanya? Bantu nshi benda ne filonda ifyabula ukwishiba? Bantu nshi benda na menso ayakashika cee? 
Proverbs23:30 Ala bantu banwesha ubwalwa, abaya mukumfwa ubwalwa basakanyako ifyakunwanwanwa." 
Proverbs23:31 Wilakonkelela bwalwa nangu bwingalamoneka ubusuma, ubwakashika cee, bulebengeshima na mu lukombo lwine, bwaminika bwino na pa mukoshi patalala." 
Proverbs23:32 Pakulekelesha kuti walaumfwa kwati usuminwe ne nsoka, no busungu kwati limbi lifwafwa likusumine." 
Proverbs23:33 Na menso yobe yalamona ifyeni fimbi fimbifye, na mu matontonkanyo mwaisulafye ifyakwelenganya fyeka fyeka." 
Proverbs23:34 Nomba walaumfwa ukusensenunwa kwati untu asendeme ku mulongoti wa cibwato icili pakati ka cibemba. 
Proverbs23:35 Ninshi no kusabaila alesabaila ati, “Ee nabampuma nomba tabancenene, nabantutaula nomba kwena tacilekalipa, nshileumfwa bukali nakalya. Nomba ine nalabuka lilali pakuti nakabili ndeya mukunwa ubwalwa?”" 
Proverbs24:1 Wilakumbwa bantu abalebifya, kabili wilaesha ukubikana nabo bucibusa." 
Proverbs24:2 Pantu imitima yabo yelenganyafye ifimfulunganya, kabili na pa tunwa twabo balandafye ifyakuleta amafya." 
Proverbs24:3 Ala amano eyakuula iŋanda, no mucetekanya eulenga ukuti ikose." 
Proverbs24:4 Kabili kwishiba kwine ekulenga mu miputule ya ŋanda mwisule ifintu, ifintu ifyamutengo ne fyabusaka." 
Proverbs24:5 Umuntu wamano alikwatisha ubulamba, kabili umuntu uwiluka alalundapo amaka." 
Proverbs24:6 Pantu pakutendeka inkondo umuntu afwile atungululwa, kabili pakuti acimfye kano akwata bampandamano abengi," 
Proverbs24:7 Amano yena ala yacila pafyo icipuba cingomfwa, cena tacikwatapo fyakulanda pa mpongolo apali cilye nakalya." 
Proverbs24:8 Umuntu upanga ukulacita ifibi, abanankwe bamwita ukuti cimpatanya icaikele pakati ka nshila." 
Proverbs24:9 Ifitontonkanya ifipuba ala fyabubififye, uutumfya alapatwa ku bantu." 
Proverbs24:10 Nga watompoka ilyo ifintu fyakubipila, ninshi amaka yobe yanono." 
Proverbs24:11 Ulepokololako uo baletintanishisha kukuya mwipaya, ulelubulako abo baletwala ku mfwa." 
Proverbs24:12 Nga walanda ati, “Ala kwena ifwe tatwaishibe nangu cimo,” Ngo ulolesha mu mutima bushe taishiba ici? Ngo ulinda umweo obe bushe taishiba ici? Bushe takalambule umuntu ukulingana ne ficitwa fyakwe?" 
Proverbs24:13 We mwana wandi ulelya ubuci pantu busuma, uluto ulutona mu fipepe lwalilowa mu kanwa." 
Proverbs24:14 Wishibe nokuti amano yalilowa mu mutima obe, nga wayakwata awe ninshi walala washuka, nefyo ulolela tafyakapelele." 
Proverbs24:15 Wilabelamina umololoke pakuti umonawile iŋanda yakwe, wimonawila cifulo cakwe." 
Proverbs24:16 Pantu umololoke nelyo engawa imiku cine lubali, ena akema nakabili, nomba ababifi bena balawila mu mafya." 
Proverbs24:17 Wilasansamuka umulwani obe nga awa, umutima obe wilaanga ne nsansa nga aipununa." 
Proverbs24:18 Epali Yawe amona, kabili cabipa mu menso yakwe, kabili afumya no bukali bwakwe pa muntu uyu." 
Proverbs24:19 Abantu ababifi wilabakwatila cinse iyoo, kabinge tecakwesha ukulabafimbila." 
Proverbs24:20 Pantu umubifi alilala alishamininafye, kabili ne cisaniko ca mubifi cikashima." 
Proverbs24:21 We mwana wandi ulekwatila Yawe akatiina elyo no kutiina imfumu ya calo, lelo abatalamina Yawe pamo ne mfumu wilaampana nabo." 
Proverbs24:22 Pantu kuti batumapo icakupumikisha icakukonaula, kabili nani aishiba ubonaushi ubo bonse babili bengatuma?" 
Proverbs24:23 Ishi nsoselo nasho shalesoswa na bamano. Ukulacita umucishacinani pakuputula umulandu tacawama iyoo. 
Proverbs24:24 Uyo onse uwaebela uubifishe ati, “Uli wakaele,” abantu bonse bakalamutipa, ne mishobo ikamupata." 
Proverbs24:25 Nomba bakaputula wa milandu abalimuna ababifya, bena balapaalwa no kucindikwa ala balacindikwa." 
Proverbs24:26 Ukwasuka ifyacishinka, kwaba ngo kutomona pa milomo." 
Proverbs24:27 Upwishe imilimo ya panse, elyo uuteyanya na mabala yene, nga wapwisha nomba elyo ukuule iŋanda yobe." 
Proverbs24:28 Wilaanguka ukuba kambone pa mwina mupalamano obe nga taushininkishe umulandu, kabinge wilalanda ifyakufyenenkesha umubiyo umulandu." 
Proverbs24:29 Wilasosa auti, “Eya, na ine wine nomba ndemucita nga filya fine ancitile.”" 
Proverbs24:30 Ine nalipitile pa malimino ya munaŋani, pebala lya myangashi ya mbulwamano," 
Proverbs24:31 kabili moneni ninshi na monsefye mwalimena imyunga, na sensele alikula, ne cibumba ca mabwe naco ninshi calibongoloka." 
Proverbs24:32 Awe nalolekesha kufyo namwene na menso yandi, nomba nasambililako cimo pafyo namwene." 
Proverbs24:33 Ukutubilishakofye panono, ukusendamakofye panono, no kuikumbatafye amaboko panono pakuti utuushekofye," 
Proverbs24:34 elyo ubupina bukakwishila ngo mupupu, elintu no kubulwa kukakuwililila nge cipondo icili ne canso." 
Proverbs25:1 Aya e mapinda na yambi ayakwa Solomoni imfumu, ayalembele bacilolo bakwa Hesekia imfumu uwateekele icalo ca Yuda." 
Proverbs25:2 Bucindami bwakwa Lesa umwine ukufisa umulandu, lelo imfumu nasho shilacindikwa pa mulandu wakwesha ukuifwailisha." 
Proverbs25:3 Nga filya fine umulu wasansuka, nangu nga filya fine icalo cashika, efyo ne mitima ya shamfumu yaba, teti umuntu eshibe ifyo shiletontonkanya." 
Proverbs25:4 Fumyamo bamunyela muli silifa, walasangamo icela icawamisha ico kafula apangamo cimo." 
Proverbs25:5 Fumya babifi kwisano lya mfumu, ukamona no buteeko bwaiko bwakulabomba ifyalungama." 
Proverbs25:6 Tecakwesha kuicindamika pa cinso ca mfumu, kabili tecakwesha ukulacita kwati na iwe uli mucindami wa muntu." 
Proverbs25:7 Pantu cawamishapo imfumu ine ukukweba ati, “Nina wise wikale apa apacindeme,” ukucila ukukusebanya pa menso ya ntungulushi ilyo bakufumya apo we mwine waciya iteeka." 
Proverbs25:8 Ico waimwena na menso yobe wilayangufyanya ukucitwala ku cilye, pantu panuma umunobe nga aisa kushinina ubufi, bushe kuti wacitapo shani?" 
Proverbs25:9 Nga uli no mulandu no mubiyo, umfwanenifye nankwe, nomba kwena wilasokolola nkaama shabene." 
Proverbs25:10 Epali bambi baumfwako ukuti iwe kanshi tausunga nkaama, ninshi wasebana wayonawila umucinshi." 
Proverbs25:11 Ishiwi ilyalandwa bwino, lyaba nge cisabo ca golide icibikilwe pa mbale ya silifa." 
Proverbs25:12 Nga filya fyayemba utwakufwala ku matwi utwa golide, kabili ngo tubangili utwa golide uwalopololwa bwino, efyaba ukwebaulwa ku muntu uwamano." 
Proverbs25:13 Ifyaba ukutalala kwa bunga bwa mfula mu nshita yakuseepa, efyaba inkombe iyacishinka ku baitumine, italalika imitima ya abo ibombela." 
Proverbs25:14 Abantu abalaya ifyabupe ifyo bashipeela, baba nga makumbi no mwela ifishileta imfula." 
Proverbs25:15 Uuteka umutima mukulanda kuti anasha kateeka, ululimi ulwanakilila kuti lwatoba ne fupa line." 
Proverbs25:16 Nga wasanga ubuci, lyapofye ubwalinga, nga wacisha mu cipimo ukalukapofye." 
Proverbs25:17 Wilaingila libili libili mu ŋanda ya mubiyo, epali akutendwa akupatilanapo." 
Proverbs25:18 Uulandila umunankwe bukambone bwabufi, aba nge fumo ilyasongoka, ngo lupanga ulwatwa, nangu ngo mufwi uwabulembe." 
Proverbs25:19 Ukutetekela uwabufi pa nshita yabwafya, cimo cine no kushetela ku meno ayalesokona atemwa ukunyantila ku lukasa ulutiinine." 
Proverbs25:20 Ukufuula ifyakufwala ilyo kuli impepo, no kupupila umucele pa cilonda, cimo cine no kwimbila umuntu ulwimbo uulelanguluka." 
Proverbs25:21 Umulwani obe nga ali ne nsala, iwe umupeeleko icakulya, nga ali ne cilaka iwe umupeeleko amenshi yakunwa." 
Proverbs25:22 Pantu mukucita ifi uli nokulapwila umusolilo pa mutwe wakwe, na Yawe nao akakulambwilapo." 
Proverbs25:23 Nga filya fine umwela wa ku kabanga uleta imfula, efyo no lwambo luletela umuntu icipyu." 
Proverbs25:24 Cawamapo ukwikala pa cifutu ca pa mutenge wa ŋanda, ukucila ukwikala mu ŋanda imo no mukashi inkakashi." 
Proverbs25:25 Nga menshi ayatalalisha ayatalalika umuntu ku mukoshi, efyaba ne mbila nsuma iyafuma ku calo icakutali." 
Proverbs25:26 Nga menshi ayafundauka, nangu nge cishima icakoweshiwa, efyaba umuntu umololoke uusuminisha ifishalungama." 
Proverbs25:27 Ukulisha ubuci ukucila mu cipimo takwawama, cimo cine no kuifwaila ululumbi we mwine takwawama." 
Proverbs25:28 Umuntu uufilwa ukukanya umutima wakwe, aba ngo musumba uo basanshile uwaba ne linga ilyabongoloka." 
Proverbs26:1 Caba ngo bunga bwa mfula mu nshita ya lusuba, nangu nge mfula pa nshita yakuseepa, efyaba no kulumbanya icipuba, ala kuicushafye." 
Proverbs26:2 Ifitipu filafilwa ukulya umuntu uwakaele, fipita nga kancelelya akalepupuka, nangu ukufoka nga kamimbi." 
Proverbs26:3 Icikoti calinga ukupindulwilako kabalwe, no mukobelo wa mu kanwa ewakupindulwilako punda, elyo no bwembya ukusalapwilako ifipuba." 
Proverbs26:4 Wilaasuka icipuba umwabela ubupuba bwaciko, epali wapalana naco." 
Proverbs26:5 Uleasuka icipuba umwabela bupuba bwaciko, elyo cingeluka ukuti tacaba na mano." 
Proverbs26:6 Uutuma inkombe iyabula mano alaifyenga umwine, cimo no kuiputula ulukasa we mwine, no kuiletela insoni." 
Proverbs26:7 Ipinda mu kanwa ka fipuba, lyaba ngo kulu kwa cilema ukulelebelafye." 
Proverbs26:8 Ukupeela icipuba ubucindami, cimo cinefye no kukakilila ilibwe mwilekeni." 
Proverbs26:9 Filya fyaba umunga mu minwe yakwa cakolwa, efyaba ipinda ilifuma mu kanwa ka cipuba." 
Proverbs26:10 Uwaingisha icipuba nangu uleipitilafye incito, ninshi aba ngo muntu uulelasa lasa ne mifwi abantu abaleipitilafye." 
Proverbs26:11 Icipuba cilabwekeshapo ukucita icabutumpe cimo cine, caba nge mbwa iyibwelela ku malushi yaciluka." 
Proverbs26:12 Nga wamona uuitunga ukuba uwamano, icipuba kuti wacisubila ukumucila kukwiluka." 
Proverbs26:13 Umunaŋani atila, “Muli inkalamo mu musebo, na pa lubansa pali iciswango icilepitana.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Nga filya fine iciibi cipilibuka mu fyela umo bacikwika, efintu no munaŋani aselebuka pa musengele wakwe." 
Proverbs26:15 Umunaŋani limo abomfya ubulamu icakuti nga atumpika iminwe mu mbale, afilwa no kutwala icakulya pa kanwa kakwe." 
Proverbs26:16 Umunaŋani alaitunga ukuba uwacenjela, ukucila na pa bantu cine lubali abakampuka ukwasuka ifyamano." 
Proverbs26:17 Ukuitumpika mu fikansa ushishibe napo fitampile, cimo cine no kutinta imbwa ku matwi iileipitilafye." 
Proverbs26:18 Nge shilu ililefwinta ifishishi fya mulilo, atemwa imifwi iyabulembe," 
Proverbs26:19 efyaba no muntu uubepa umunankwe ati, “Iyoo mune nali ndesekafye.”" 
Proverbs26:20 Ukwabula inkuni umulilo ulashima, ukushili bukwakwa ulubuli takuba." 
Proverbs26:21 Ifyaba amafito pa musolilo, ne nkuni pa mulilo, efyo no muntu walubuli aba, nao asongela ulubuli." 
Proverbs26:22 Amashiwi yabukwakwa yalowa ngo twakusasula, yatentemukila munda mukati." 
Proverbs26:23 Ukutasha kwa pa kanwafye ilintu umutima uli uubi, cimo cine no kushingwila ifyabengeshima ku mutondo we loba lyafyefye." 
Proverbs26:24 Umuntu walupato talanga lupato pakusembeleka umubiye, lelo mukati ka mutima wakwe emo afisa ububi." 
Proverbs26:25 Nangu asosa amashiwi yakusembeleka, wilasumina pantu mu mutima wakwe mwaba impatilafye sheka sheka." 
Proverbs26:26 Limbi kuti afisa impatila, nomba ububi bwakwe bukasokoloka mu lukuta." 
Proverbs26:27 Uwimba ubucinga no kuwila euwilamo, abantu abakunkulusha amabwe no kufwanta ebo yafwanta." 
Proverbs26:28 Ululimi lwabufi lwapata abo lufyenga. Ala umuntu mwilikandimi ni nkomi ya bantu. 
Proverbs27:1 Wilaitakisha pa fintu ifikabako mailo, pantu ubushiku ubushili bobe tabucilukwa ibaka." 
Proverbs27:2 Leka abantu bambi ebo bakutashe, nomba wiitasha we mwine, leka umweni akulumbanye, wiilumbanya weka iyoo." 
Proverbs27:3 Ilibwe lyalifina no mucanga nao cisendo icafina, lelo icacila pali ifi fibili kusonsomba kwa cipuba." 
Proverbs27:4 Ukufulwa kwabunkalwe, ne cipyu caba nge lyeshi, nomba umufimbila nani engaushipikisha?" 
Proverbs27:5 Caliwamapo ukwebaula umuntu pa bwelu, ukucila ukutemenwa mu bumfisolo." 
Proverbs27:6 Cibusa obe nga akucena muli fimo umucetekele, nomba umulwani obe nga alakukumbatila ninshi lyena ucenjele." 
Proverbs27:7 Uwikwite alasuula no buci, lelo uuli ne nsala ne cintu icalula cilomfwika ukulowa." 
Proverbs27:8 Umuntu uuseulukafye asha ne ŋanda yakwe, ena apala icuni iciseuluka caluba na pa cisansala." 
Proverbs27:9 Amafuta ya kacena kasuma no bubani filasansamusha umutima, na bucibusa ubupansha amano yene yene nabo bulasansamusha." 
Proverbs27:10 Wilalekelesha bacibusa bobe, nangufye bacibusa ba bawiso, wilafwaya munonko ilyo waba mu bwafya. Umwina mupalamano uuli mupepi awamapo ukucila na munonko uuli ukutali." 
Proverbs27:11 We mwana wandi ube na mano, lyena ninshi wakulasansamusha umutima wandi, elyo na ine ningalaasuka bwino abalecita umusaalula kuli ine." 
Proverbs27:12 Umuntu uwamano alamona uko ubwafya bulefuma, no kutaluka atalukako, imbulwamano yena ilungama kulya kwine, elyo panuma yalalanguluka." 
Proverbs27:13 Umuntu uwalaya ukufutilako umweni inkongole shakwe ikatilenimo icakufwala cakwe, eco cibe icikatila mulandu pali uyo uushishibikwe." 
Proverbs27:14 Umuntu uubilikisha lucelocelofye kukuya posha umunankwe amubusha na mu tulo, kuti abantu bamutunga ukuba uwatipwa." 
Proverbs27:15 Umukashi wa fikansa aba nge mfula iyilemima akasuba konse. 
Proverbs27:16 Ukumwalulula cimo no kwesha ukunasha umwela, nangu ukufumbata amafuta ulupi paa." 
Proverbs27:17 Icela cinoona icela cibiye, no muntu anonka amano ku muntu munankwe." 
Proverbs27:18 Uusunga umukunyu alalyako amakunyu, no muntu uusunga shikulu wakwe alacindikwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Nga filya fine impumi imoneka mu cilola, efyo no mutima wa muntu ulanga ifyo aba." 
Proverbs27:20 Nga ifi fine imfwa no bonaushi fishatala afitendwa, efyo no lwinso lwa muntu lwaba ni lumunshisha kalele." 
Proverbs27:21 Ni mu mulilo emo bengulwila silifa mu cikopo, na golide mwilungu, lelo umuntu eshiwa ku malumbo apokelela." 
Proverbs27:22 Nangu wingatwila icipuba mwibende, no kucifungaula nga male ukubomfya umwinshi wakutwilako, awe teti ufumye ubupumbu bwaciko iyoo." 
Proverbs27:23 Cine cine shininkisha ukuti ifitekwa fyobe filesungwa bwino, bikako umutima ku mukuni obe." 
Proverbs27:24 Pantu ifyuma tafibelelela iyoo, no kucindama takushala ku bana ku nkulo ne nkulo umo shikonkanine." 
Proverbs27:25 Ilyo icani icauma cafumishiwapo mwishika lya mpili, no mulemfwe wamenamo elyo ukacilonganye pakulisha ifitekwa," 
Proverbs27:26 ninshi amasako ya mpaanga shobe we muntu ukapikulamo ifyakufwala, kabinge nga washitishapo imbushi kuti washitamo ibala." 
Proverbs27:27 Elyo ukakwata umukaka uwingi uwa mbushi, uwakunwa we mwine na ba mu ŋanda yobe, no wakunwako ababomfi bobe abakashana." 
Proverbs28:1 Abantu ababifi bena balafulumuka na pashili abalebatamfya, abololoke bena bapamafye nge nkalamo." 
Proverbs28:2 Ilyo mu calo mwaba ubusangu bakateeka balafula, nomba umuntu uwaisulamo ukwishiba na mano eutalalika ifikansa." 
Proverbs28:3 Umuntu uteeka abapina ubusha, aba nge mfula yabonaushi iyishisha ifyakulya." 
Proverbs28:4 Abashikonka amafunde ebatasha abantu ababifi, lelo abakonka amafunde bena bakaana ifibi." 
Proverbs28:5 Abantu ababi bena tabaishiba umwalola umulinganya, lelo abapepa Yawe bena balishiba umo fyalola ifi fyonse." 
Proverbs28:6 Umulanda wa myendele isuma, aliwamishapo pa mukankala wa myendele iyibi." 
Proverbs28:7 Umwana uusunga amafunde aleluka, nomba uwenda pamo na bapusaushi asebanya wishi." 
Proverbs28:8 Uumwena ubukankala bwakwe mu lufyengo lwakulila bambi pali nsosela, ifyuma fyakwe afilonganikila umuntu uukumbusukako abalanda." 
Proverbs28:9 Uushifwaya kukonka mafunde, na mapepo yakwe yamuselu." 
Proverbs28:10 Uulanga umuntu uwakaele imisango ibi, akawila mu bucinga bwakwe umwine, nomba aba myendele isuma ebakamona ishuko." 
Proverbs28:11 Umukankala lyonse aitunga ukuba uwamano, nomba umulanda uwamano uwiluka mu fintu, ena aleshiba ifyo baba." 
Proverbs28:12 Ilyo abololoke baba pa cambaso abantu bonse balanga ne nsansa, lelo ababifi nga baba pa cambaso abantu balafisama." 
Proverbs28:13 Uufisa bumpulamafunde bwakwe takatale abelelwa uluse iyoo, nomba uuyebelela ububi bwakwe no kulapila, alabelelwa inkumbu." 
Proverbs28:14 Umuntu uukwatila Yawe akatiina lyonsefye alishuka, umuntu uwaumalala ena alishama alaponena na mu bwafya." 
Proverbs28:15 Nge nkalamo iyilebuluma nangu iciswango ca bea icileimina umuntu, efyaba kateeka umubifi pa bantu abalanda." 
Proverbs28:16 Kateeka uwabula amano alateeka abantu ku kalili, lelo kateeka uwapata ulwinso lwafyuma ena alakokola pa calo." 
Proverbs28:17 Umuntu uo bashinina ubupondo, akaba uwalungulushiwa mpaka ne mfwa. Ee mulekenifye abe." 
Proverbs28:18 Uwenda ne cishinka alapusuka, lelo uushaba na cishinka mu myendele yakwe takokola ukuwa." 
Proverbs28:19 Umulimi uubombesha alakwata ifyakulya ifingi, lelo uuposa inshita kufyafye, awe ena mulanda wapee." 
Proverbs28:20 Umuntu wacishinka alasenaminwa apakalambafye, lelo umuntu uupupumina ukunonka ifyuma mu kampampa, ena alakandwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Akapatulula takawama kalibipa, nomba limo umuntu alacita icintu icishilungeme pa mulandu wa kamokolwafye akamukate." 
Proverbs28:22 Umuntu uwabupapa alapamfiwa ukukwata ifyuma, icakuti teshiba na lintu ubulanda bulemwishilila." 
Proverbs28:23 Uulesalapula umuntu bamutemwa panuma, ukucila uwalulimi ulusembeleka." 
Proverbs28:24 Onse uutila, “Ukwibila wishi nangu nyina tekubifya,” uyo cimo cinefye ne cipondo icabonaushi." 
Proverbs28:25 Umuntu umulili aletafye ulubuli ne mpatila, lelo uutetekela Yawe ena akashuka." 
Proverbs28:26 Umuntu uukonkelela ifya mu mutima wakwe ninshi cipuba, lelo uwenda mu mano ayafumaluka akaikalila ku matwi tondolo." 
Proverbs28:27 Uukumbusukako abalanda, tabulililwa nakalya, lelo uushilolesha pa balanda eo abantu balapisha." 
Proverbs28:28 Ilyo ababifi baba pa cambaso, abantu balafisama, lelo nga baloba, abololoke balabomba bwino." 
Proverbs29:1 Nkosamutwe uushumfwa kukusalapulwa nangu bamwebaula shani, akonaulwa mukwangufyanya ukwabula ukupola." 
Proverbs29:2 Ilyo abololoke bateeka icalo, abantu balacankwa ne nsansa, Ababi nga bateeka abantu balailishanya." 
Proverbs29:3 Umuntu uwatemwa amano aletela wishi insansa, lelo uwatemwa bacilende aposaika indalama ne cuma cakwe." 
Proverbs29:4 Kateeka uuposa amano pakucita umulinganya alateeka icalo mu cibote, nomba nga atemwa amafisakanwa ninshi icalo caonaika." 
Proverbs29:5 Umuntu uusembeleka umubiye, ninshi nao aleiteya iciteyo ku makasa yakwe." 
Proverbs29:6 Umuntu mubi ailetelelafye umwine ku bubi bwakwe, lelo umololoke kuti aimba ulwimbo no kusansamuka." 
Proverbs29:7 Abololoke balasakamana umulinganya pa bapina, lelo ababifi balafilwa ukumfwa umo insambu shalola." 
Proverbs29:8 Abantu abapumya babusha ulubuli mu musumba, lelo abamano batalalika icimfulunganya." 
Proverbs29:9 Uwamano nga aya ku cilye ne cipuba, icipuba cilafulwa no kukalipa, tapaba na mutende." 
Proverbs29:10 Indetamisoka shilapata umuntu wakaele, nomba abololoke bena balasakamana ubumi bwakwe." 
Proverbs29:11 Icipuba cilalanga apapela icipyu caciko, lelo umuntu wamano ena aleesha ukukankatisha icipyu cakwe." 
Proverbs29:12 Nga kateeka alaposa amano ku bufi, na bacilolo bakwe basanguka ababufi." 
Proverbs29:13 Icintu cimo ico umukankala no mupina bakwata icapalana nici, icakuti bonse babili ni Yawe eulenga balemona." 
Proverbs29:14 Kateeka uulangulukila abapina pakupingula imilandu, icipuna cakwe icabufumu cilekalilila." 
Proverbs29:15 Ukukapa abaice no kubasalapula, ala ekubapeela amano, umwaice uo baleka aleicitila umo alefwaila alasebanya nyina." 
Proverbs29:16 Ilyo ababifi babombesha no kufula elyo no bubifi bufulilako mu calo, nomba abamano balamonako uko aba bantu baloba." 
Proverbs29:17 Ulesalapula mwano lyonse, nao akakuletela mutende, pantu akalenga umutima obe ukusansamuka." 
Proverbs29:18 Ukushaba icimonwa abantu balonaika tabengashipikisha, lelo abasunga amafunde bena ebapaalwa." 
Proverbs29:19 Amashiwifye yeka tayasalapula mubomfi, kuti aleumfwa, lelo tafiposako mano nakalya." 
Proverbs29:20 Nga wamona umuntu wabwangu kanwa, icipuba kuti wacisubila ukumucila kukwiluka." 
Proverbs29:21 Nga walela umubomfi mu bulamu ukufuma ku bwaice, pakulekelesha akakupontela." 
Proverbs29:22 Umuntu umukali alabusha ulubuli, no wacipyu afusha ifyabupulumushi." 
Proverbs29:23 Icilumba cilasebanya umuntu, lelo ukuicefya kwena kulacindamika umuntu." 
Proverbs29:24 Uwampana no mupupu aisangula akapondo umwine, limo kuti akandilwapo nga alanda icishinka nelyo naishiba." 
Proverbs29:25 Uutiina abantu citeyo kuli ena, lelo umuntu uutetekela Yawe ena alikwata umwakupusukila." 
Proverbs29:26 Abengi bafwaya ukutemwikwa kuli bakateeka, lelo ni kuli Yawe eko mulinganya ufuma." 
Proverbs29:27 Umololoke alapata uushili wacishinka, umuntu umubifi nao alapata uwakaele." 
Proverbs30:1 Amashiwi yakwa Aguri mwana Yake, umwina Masa aumine imbila atile, “Lesa ine nansha! Awe mwandi ine capwafye!" 
Proverbs30:2 “Ine nine natumpisha pa bantu bonse, kabili nshakwata amano yene yene ayabumuntu." 
Proverbs30:3 Ine nshasambilila na mano yene, nangu ukukwata amano ayakwishiba Uwamushilo." 
Proverbs30:4 Bushe nani uwatala anina ku mulu elyo ayabwelako? Nga nani uwatala afumbatapo umwela mu lupi lwakwe? Nani atala afungila amenshi ya muli bemba pa mfunga ya cakufwala cakwe? Nga nani uwaikasha isonde lyonse mu mpela umo lyapela? Iwe nga walimwishiba ishina lyakwe njebako? No mwana wakwe, nani ishina lyakwe? Ala njebako nga walimwishiba!" 
Proverbs30:5 “Ishiwi lyakwa Lesa lyonse lyaba ilyacishinka, ena ni nkwela, na bonse abafisama muli ena balacingililwa." 
Proverbs30:6 Pa mashiwi yakwe mwilaesha ukulundapo na yambi, epali akukalipila, akushinina nokuti uli wabufi." 
Proverbs30:7 “Ifintu fibili ifyo nakulomba we Yawe, winkaanina ilyo nshilafwa." 
Proverbs30:8 Talusha ubucenjeshi no bufi kuli ine, kabili wileka ine ukuti nkabe umulanda nangu umukankala. Kanshi ulempakofye icakulya ca nshiku shonse." 
Proverbs30:9 Pantu epali nga nakwatisha ifintu limbi nakutalamina, nati nokuti, ‘Nga Yawe nao nani?’ Conse naco ine nga naba umulanda, limbi kuti nalaiba no kusebanya ishina lyakwa Lesa wandi." 
Proverbs30:10 “Wilaesha ukwamba umubomfi pali shikulu wakwe, epali akulapishishapo, no kucula waculilapo." 
Proverbs30:11 Eico kwaliba abantu abalapisha bawishi, abashipaala na banyinabo." 
Proverbs30:12 Eko baba abantu abaimona ukuba abantu abakaele, lelo tabasambwa ku fibi fyabo." 
Proverbs30:13 Eko bali abantu abo amenso yalukuma mu mutwe, abalolesha cilumba cilumba." 
Proverbs30:14 Ni nkulo ya bantu abo ameno yatwa ngo lupanga, ne mibango yabo nge myele, abateeka ababusu na balanda ku munga we fwafwa, ukubalila pa mitwe kabili no kubepaya." 
Proverbs30:15 “Umunsundu waba na bana abanakashi babili, abapunda abati, ‘Leta, leta!’ Kwaba ifintu fitatu ifishikuta nakalya, fine nafyo ifisosa afiti, ‘Epela,’ nifi:" 
Proverbs30:16 Icalo ca bafwa, ifumo ilyaumba, icalo no mushili ifishiikuta amenshi, no mulilo uulebilima uushitila fyafula." 
Proverbs30:17 “Umwana uuseka wishi, uusuula ukubeela nyina, alingilefye ukulobaulwa amenso kuli bamwankole, no kuliwa ku makubi mu mawanga." 
Proverbs30:18 Kwaliba ifintu fitatu ifyampapusha nganshi, fine ifyampesha amano nifi:" 
Proverbs30:19 Kapumpe ifyo alelemba mu mulu, ne nsoka ifyo yenda pa cilibwe, ne cibwato ifyo cenda pali bemba, nefyo umwaume batemwana no mwanakashi." 
Proverbs30:20 “Eficita umwanakashi cilende, kuti alya, awamya na pa kanwa, ati nokuti, ‘Takuli ico ine ndufyenye.’" 
Proverbs30:21 “Kwaliba ifintu fitatu ifitutumya icalo, nangu fine ifyo abantu icalo conse bafilwa ukushipikishako:" 
Proverbs30:22 Umusha uwaisa ba kateeka wa calo, iciwelewele ca muntu ilyo caikuta ifilyo," 
Proverbs30:23 umwanakashi uushatemwikwa lelo alyupwa, elyo na kanakashi uwapoka icupo cakwa nakulu uo abombela." 
Proverbs30:24 “Pano calo paba utuntu tune utwacepesha nganshi, lelo kwena tuntu twacenjela nganshi:" 
Proverbs30:25 Etunyelele, nangu tushakwata bulamba bwine bwine, kwena tulatutila icakulya catuko pa nshita ya lusuba." 
Proverbs30:26 Na bapati, nabo tabakwata bulamba, lelo kwena bekala mu fimabwe ifyasansama." 
Proverbs30:27 Na makanta nangu takwata imfumu, kwena enda natantama ubusaka mu mulongo." 
Proverbs30:28 Na mulinso, kuti umuntu amwikata na mu minwe, lelo kwena alasangwa na mu masano ya shamfumu." 
Proverbs30:29 “Kwaba ifintu fitatu ifyenda ubusaka, fine nafyo ifiinangafye pakwenda nifi:" 
Proverbs30:30 Ni nkalamo iyacila inama shimbi shonsefye ku maka, iyishifulumuka pa cinso ca mulwani nelyo umo," 
Proverbs30:31 na mukolwe, ilyo aletaasa pa nkota, na sawe, elyo ne mfumu iyileenda cilumba cilumba pa bashilika baiko." 
Proverbs30:32 “We muntu ala kale nga walitumpile no kulacita imiya, nangu nga walepanga ukucita ifyabipa, tala nomba tontonkanyako, ufimbe no lupi pa kanwa." 
Proverbs30:33 Pantu nga wapuka umukaka mufuma umukaka uwatikama uwa mafuta, nga watitila umuntu pa myona kuti mwafuma umulopa, kabili nga waimya ubukali, kuti paba ulubuli.”" 
Proverbs31:1 Amashiwi yakwa Lemueli imfumu ya bena Masa, ayo nyina alemucenjeshako." 
Proverbs31:2 “We mwana wandi, we mwana wa mwifumo lyandi, weo nashukilafye ilyo nalaile ifilayo." 
Proverbs31:3 Iwe wilaesha konaula amaka yobe ku banakashi, ala abanakashi balonaula ishamfumu." 
Proverbs31:4 “Tecakwesha, we Lamueli, ala tacalinga bashamfumu ukulanwa umwangashi, nangu intungulushi ukutemwisha ukunwa ifikola umuntu." 
Proverbs31:5 Epali bakolwa, kabili balaba ifyakonkomeshiwa mu fipope, balasuula na ku nsambu sha bantu, babatitikisha." 
Proverbs31:6 Peeleni ubwalwa ku bantu abalefwa, umwangashi ku bali mu macushi." 
Proverbs31:7 Bena leka ebo balenwa, pakuti balelabako ku bulanda bwabo, no kukanaibukisha kabili amacushi yabo." 
Proverbs31:8 “Iwe ulelandila abantu abashingailandila abene. Ulelwila insambu sha bantu bonse abashakwata bakubafwako. 
Proverbs31:9 Ulebasoselako, kabili ulepingula imilandu no mulinganya, shicingilila insambu sha bapina na babusu.”" 
Proverbs31:10 Yangu ifyo cawama ukushukila umwanakashi wine wine pa ŋanda! Pantu ena acindamishapo ukucila utumabwe twa rubi. 
Proverbs31:11 Wiba wakwe amucetekela nganshi, kabili takabulwe icintu cisuma." 
Proverbs31:12 Apo wiba aikalila pano calo, amuletelafye ifintu ifisuma te fibi iyoo." 
Proverbs31:13 Ena afwaya fwaya ubushishi bwa masako ya mpaanga, no bushishi ubwatelela, no kupeka peka ku mulimo wakupikula," 
Proverbs31:14 Ena alafumya icakulya ukutali no kucileta pa ŋanda, nga filya amato ya bashimakwebo yacita." 
Proverbs31:15 Ena abuka bushikushiku, pakuti apekanishishe ulupwa lwakwe icakulya, na pakuti apeele ababomfi bakwe abakashana ifyakaniko fyabo." 
Proverbs31:16 Ena kutala aceceta ibala elyo alishita, kabili mu bukumu buntu asanga alimishamo ne myangashi." 
Proverbs31:17 Ena aba uwaswangana ku milimo, alikosa no kucenjela mukubomba." 
Proverbs31:18 Ena alamwenamo mu milimo yonse intu abomba, kabili icisaniko cakwe caka bushiku bonse." 
Proverbs31:19 Ena ku minwe apikula ubushishi, no kuipikwila insalu shakwe umwine." 
Proverbs31:20 Ena alafwilisha abapina, no kupeelako ababusu." 
Proverbs31:21 Ena tatiina nangu kube impepo shani, pantu bonsefye mumwakwe balikwata ifyakufwala ifyakaba." 
Proverbs31:22 Ena alapikula ifyakufimbana, alafwala ne nsalu ishatelela ne shakashikila." 
Proverbs31:23 Wiba wakwe alicindikwa mu mpongolo, ilyo ekala pamo na bakalamba ba calo." 
Proverbs31:24 Ena alapikula insalu ishatelela ne mishipi, no kulashitisha kuli bashimakwebo." 
Proverbs31:25 Ena alikwata amaka na bantu bonse balamucindika, kabili ena akaba ne nsansa na mu nshiku sha kuntanshi." 
Proverbs31:26 Ne lintu alanda, awe alandafye ifyamano fyeka fyeka, ne milandile yakwe yamutembo." 
Proverbs31:27 Alapikintika lyonse ku milimo ya ba pa ŋanda, kabili talya umukate wa bunaŋani." 
Proverbs31:28 Ena abana bakwe balamucankilwa, na wiba nao alamulumbanya." 
Proverbs31:29 Alasosa ati, “Abanakashi abaupwa bena bengi, ee basuma mufyo bacita, nomba iwe mayo walipulapo pali bonse.”" 
Proverbs31:30 Ala ukuba uwayemba kutumpika umuntu, ukuba imbeka nako kulapwa bwangu, nomba umwanakashi uwakwatila Yawe akatiina ena ewalingafye ukulumbanya." 
Proverbs31:31 Eya, mulemulumbanyafye pa fintu acita. Ena alilinga ukuti abakankala bonse balemucindika pa milimo yakwe pa mpongolo sha musumba." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Amashiwi yakwa Kafundisha mwana Davidi, uwali imfumu mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, ni aya ayakuti," 
Ecclesiastes1:2 “Kuicushafye, ala kuicushafye!” ekusosa kwakwa Kafundisha, “Fyonse tafyakwata nefyo fipilibula. Muli fyonse kuicushafye." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ni finshi umuntu engamwenamo mu milimo yakwe yonse iyo acucutikamo pano isonde?” 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Inkulo shilapita, kabinge paselela shimbi, icalo cena cishalafye pe umo cabela." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Akasuba kalatula, no kuwa kawa, bwangu bwangu kabwelela noko kacitula nakabili." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Umwela pakupuupa ulalola ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, walola na ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Washinguluka, nakabili washinguluka, wabwela uleshinguluka ifyo fine." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Imimana yonse iwila muli bemba, nomba bemba wena tesula iyoo. Amenshi yalabwelela uko imimana yatampila, imimana nayo epakukonkanyapo ukulapita nakabili." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ifintu fyonsefye filatendusha, nako ukutendusha uko we muntu ushingalondolola. Amenso yesu nangu yaloleshe shani, lelo tayatendwa ukulolesha. Amatwi yesu nayo nangu yomfwe shani, lelo tayesula ukumfwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Icalipo, cikabapo na limbi line. Icacitike, cikacitika na limbi line, pantu pano isonde tapaba cipya nakalya." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Nangu bamo bengalatila abati, “Mwe, iseni mutambe ici cintu icipya!” Ala nalyo line nakalyafye, ninshi ico cintu na kale line epo cali, ilyo ifwe tushilafyalwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Apo nomba kushaba muntu uwibukisha ifyaliko kale, na kuntanshi kwine takwakabe uukalaibukisha ifyalaswa fibeko ku bakesa bako." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ine ne Kafundisha nali imfumu ya bena Israeli mu musumba wa Yerusalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nalibikile umutima wandi kukuceceta na mano ifintu fyonse ifyaba pano isonde pakuti mfishibishe. Iye icisendo ukufina ico Lesa atwika pali ifwe fwe bantunse! 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ine pano ndi nalimona fyonsefye ifyaba pano isonde. Mwe, ala fyonsefye kuicushafye! Cabafye kwati kutamfya inshiku." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 We muntu teti ololole icaolobana, nangu teti upende ifintu ifishilipo." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ine pano ndi naletifye nati, “Bonsefye abantangilila pa bufumu bwa muno Yerusalemu, awe mwandi ine nimbacila amano. Ine nimfikapo apo umuntu engapela ukukwata amano, napo engapela ukwishiba ifintu.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Kanshi efyo ine nabikishe umutima kukwishiba amano, elyo no kwishiba ubushilu no bupuba. Elyo kabinge nailuka ukuti kanshi naco cine cimo cinefye no kutamfya inshiku." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Pantu ukukwatisha amano, ekuleta ubulanda. Ukwishibisha ifintu, kulundako ukusakamikwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ine natontonkenye mu mutima wandi ukuti, “Cisuma nalaeshafye ukulaisansamusha, epakuti ndeumfwisha apapela insansa.” Nomba uyu musango, awe nao wine kuicushafye." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ine nalimona ukuti inseko bupubafye, no bwangashi nabo tabubomba akasuma nelyo kamo." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ine nalyeseshe ukulaisansamusha no bwalwa pakuti ne muntu ndepemwinako. Ninshi mu mano yandi ndetilafye, “Ee mwandi, e musango wine wine uo abantu bafwile ukulasansamukilamo pa kashita akanono ako bekala pano isonde.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ine nalibombele imilimo iyikulu nganshi. Nalikuulile amayanda ayandi ne mwine, nalima na mabala ya myangashi." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nalelima amabala, nalima ne fibela fya miti ya fitwalo, umo nalimbile imiti ya misango yonse iya fitwalo." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Nalicitile ne fishiba fya menshi ifyakutapilila imiti iyo nalimine. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ine nalishitile abasha abaume na banakashi, nalikwetepo na basha abafyalilwe kumwandi. Nalikwete iŋombe ne mpaanga ishingi ukucila na pali bonse abantangilile ukwikala muno mu Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Kabili nalitulumanike silifa na golide ne fyuma nalefumya kuli bashamfumu aba mu fyalo naleteeka. Nalikwete iŋomba ishaume ne shanakashi ishakunsansamusha, nalikwete na bakashi abashaupilwe mu bwinga abengi abo umwaume afwile akumbwa ukukwata." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ine nalipuuleme ukucila na pali bambi bonse abantangilile ukwikala muno Yerusalemu, na mano yene ine naliyakwete." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Fyonsefye ifyo ine nalefwaya nalekwata, kabinge ine nshatalile ndekapo cimo icakunsansamusha ciyipitilefye, awe. Umulimo onsefye uo nalebomba, umutima wandi walesekelela, e cilambu nalemwenapo." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Elyo kabinge caisa mu mano yandi icakutontonkanya palwa milimo yonse iyo nabombele, nefyo nacucutike pakuibomba, no kwiluka nailuka ukuti kanshi nayo ine yakuicushafye. E cimo cinefye no kutamfya inshiku, tapaba nelyo cimo ico umuntu engamwenapo pano isonde."
