Isaiah8:9 “Icefyeni imwe mwe mishobo ya benafyalo kabili tiineni, mukafwantaulwa. Kutikeni imwe bonse mwe baikala mu fyalo fyakutali. Pikileni ifyanso fyenu, lelo kwena mukafwantaulwa. Ee, akupekanyeni, lelo kwena mukafwantwa." 
Isaiah8:10 Pekanyeni ifyo muli nokucita, lelo kwena tamwakaficite nakalya. Landeni fyonse ifyo muteyenye ukucita, lelo kwena muleicushafye, pantu Lesa ifwe twaba nankwe.”" 
Isaiah8:11 Yawe alinsokele pa maka ine ne Esaya, kabili alinsokele ukuti nilakonkelela imisango iyo abantu bakwete." 
Isaiah8:12 Alinjebele ati, “Iwe wilakonkelela mufyo abantu balecita, kabili tecakwesha kulatiina ifyo bena baletiina." 
Isaiah8:13 Uleibukishafye ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita, ena wamushilo, kanshi eo uli nokulakwatila akatiina. Ena ekafye eo uli nokulatutuma." 
Isaiah8:14 Ena akaba icifulo icamushilo, nomba ku ba mu mayanda yonse yabili ayakwa Israeli akaba ilibwe ilyo abantu baipununako, no kubalenga ukutalansuka no kuwa. Ku ba mu Yerusalemu, akaba icitembo kabili iciteyo cakwikatwako." 
Isaiah8:15 Kanshi bengi bakulaipununako, no kuwa bakulawa. Bakulawa no kufunika bakulafunika. Ee, bakulaikatwa ku citeyo.”" 
Isaiah8:16 “Ukakilile ubunte ubu, kabili ukonkomeshe amafunde aya mu basambi bandi." 
Isaiah8:17 Yawe aliifisa ku ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo, lelo ine nalimutetekela, no kumulolela ine ndamulolela." 
Isaiah8:18 “Moneni epo ndi, ine pamo na bana abo Yawe ampeela. Yawe umwine wa fita, uo icipuna cakwe icabufumu caba pa lupili lwa Sioni, nifwe abika ukuba ifishibilo kabili nge fyakumwenako kukushinina abena Israeli." 
Isaiah8:19 “Abantu nga balamweba ukwipusha imilandu ku bantu ababuka na bapendula, abalongofyanya pakulanda, nangu abatamantama pakulanda, ubaasuke auti, ‘Bushe abantu teti bepushe Lesa wabo? Mulandu nshi bengalaipushisha imilandu ya bomi ku mipashi ya bafwa?’" 
Isaiah8:20 Ku mafunde na kufyo Lesa amukonkomesha eko muloleshe, nga tabasosa ukulingana nefi ninshi tamwaba ulubuuto muli bena.”" 
Isaiah8:21 Abantu bakalalulumbafye mu calo, ilyo ninshi nabapelelwa, kabili ninshi nabafwa ulushile ku nsala. Pakuba ne insala ifyo, bakafulwa nganshi. No kupunamina kumulu, bakatuka imfumu yabo iyabateeka, bakatuke na Lesa wabo wine. Bakalati bapunamina mumulu," 
Isaiah8:22 elyo kabili balolesha amenso panshi, awe bakamonafye ubucushi bweka bweka ne mfifi no bunkukwa. Bakasunkilishiwa na mu mfifi iyikalamba." 
Isaiah9:1 Lelo takwakabe ukufiitwa nakabili ngefyo cali kale mu nshita shakusuulwa. Kale Lesa alekele cisebane cilya citungu ca luko lwa bena Sebuloni no lwa bena Naftali, nomba kuntanshi akacicindamika ico citungu ukutampilafye mu nshila ya kuli bemba ukulola na ku kabanga mwishilya lya Yordani, na mu citungu ca Galile mwine umwaikala imitundu ya benafyalo." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu abaleenda mu mfifi, nomba nabamona ulubuuto ulukalamba. Abantu abaleikala mu calo ca cinshingwa ca mfwa, nomba ulubuuto nalubasanikila." 
Isaiah9:3 We Yawe walibafushisha ishuko no kukusha umushobo. Baleanga pa cinso cobe, baleanga nga filya fine abantu banga pakuseepa, nangu nga filya fine banga pakwakana ifyuma ifyo batapile." 
Isaiah9:4 Pantu naukontaula ikoli ilyalebafinya, naufunaula ne nkonto iyo baleumwako pa mabeya. Ucimfishe nga filya finefye wacimfishe ifita fya bena Midiani kale." 
Isaiah9:5 Ifimasapato fya bashilika ifyo bafwala mu bulwi, ne nsalu shabo shonse ishali ishakashika cee ku mulopa, fikaba ni nkuni, fikapya mu mulilo." 
Isaiah9:6 Pantu kuli ifwe nakufyalwa umwana. Ifwe natupeelwa umwana umwaume. Ifwe eukalatuteeka. Bakalamwita abati, Kabilo uwacipeshamano, Lesa Wamaka, Shifwe Wape, Cilolo wamutende." 
Isaiah9:7 Amaka yakwe ayabufumu yakalacililakofye, no buteeko bwakwe bukalaba pe ubwa mutelelwe. Eukapyana imfumu Davidi pa bufumu no buteeko bwakwe, akabushimpa mukulungika ifintu no kucita umulinganya, ukutampilafye pali nomba, ukushinta napo inshita ikapwila. Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa maka yonse akacita mu kucincila kwakwe." 
Isaiah9:8 Yawe natuma amashiwi ayakali kuli Yakobo, yakawila pali Israeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Abena Efulemu bonse, na bonse abekala mu musumba wa Samaria bakashininkisha ukuti efyo acitile. Nomba ico baba ne cilumba na bunkosa mitima, bena balesosa abati," 
Isaiah9:10 “Nangu amayanda ya njelwa yawile, te mulandu, ifwe tukapyanikishapo aya mabwe. Nangu imyalo ya mikunyu iputawike, te mulandu, ifwe tukapyanikishapo iyikulu iya keda.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Kanshi, Yawe naimya no kukosha abalwani bakwa Resini kukubalwisha, nalulunkanya abalwani babo pakuti babasanse." 
Isaiah9:12 Abena Siria babelele lwa ku kabanga, Abafilisiti nabo lwa ku masamba, nabasamuna utunwa pakucibula abena Israeli. Ala nalyo line ninshi icipyu cakwa Yawe tacilati cipwe, kabili acilifye napangula ukuboko." 
Isaiah9:13 Nomba abena Israeli, tabalalapila nangu kwena abalimwine, tabalabwelela kuli Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Isaiah9:14 Eico kanshi nomba ni pa bushiku bumofye epo Yawe akalimuna intungulushi sha bena Israeli kumo na bantu bene. Akabaputula imitwe, akabasempeko ne micila." 
Isaiah9:15 Abakalamba na bacindami, e mitwe. Bakasesema abafunda ifyabufi, e micila." 
Isaiah9:16 Intungulushi shalilufya aba bantu mu nshila no kubafulunganya nganshi amano. 
Isaiah9:17 Eico kanshi pa balumendo bonse Yawe takalekepo nangu umo uwakuti akapusuke, kabili takalangulukilepo mukamfwilwa nangufye umo, nangufye kashiwa. Pantu aba abantu bonse balisuula Lesa, kabili babi, ne fintu fyonse ifyo balanda nafyo fine fibi. Ala nalyo line ninshi icipyu cakwa Yawe tacilati cipwe, kabili acilifye napangula ukuboko." 
Isaiah9:18 Ububi bwa bantu bulebilima ngo lubingu lwa mulilo, uloca imyunga na bacilasa. Bulepya ngo mulilo ulelukuma mu mateshi mu mpanga, uulefutumuna ne ntumba ya cushi." 
Isaiah9:19 Yawe umwine wa fita nafulwa, no bukali bwakwe bulebilimina mu calo ngo mulilo kukoca abantu, abantu bene e nkuni nomba, no wakulangulukila munyina takuli." 
Isaiah9:20 Bonsefye mu calo baletola tolafye utwakuti balelya, nomba ukuti insala ipwe, awe cena nakalya. Cila muntu akulalya umunofu wa bana bakwe." 
Isaiah9:21 Manase akalya Efulaimu, na Efulemu akalya Manase, na bonse pamo bakalwisha abena Yuda. Ala nalyo line ninshi icipyu cakwa Yawe tacilati cipwe, kabili acilifye napangula ukuboko." 
Isaiah10:1 Mukacimona imwe, mwe bapanga amafunde ayashalolamo, mwe bashika ifipope ifyakufyengelesha abalanda." 
Isaiah10:2 Mufwaya ukuti abalanda bapokwe insambu shabo shonse, kabili mufwaya ukuti abacuula belapingulwa mu mulinganya. Epakuti mulefinsha bamukamfwilwa, no kulapoka bakashiwa ifyuma fyabo." 
Isaiah10:3 Imwe mukacita shani ubushiku Lesa akamulimuna? Mukacita shani ilyo akamuletela ifyakumulofya ifikatula ukutali? Mukabutukila kuli ani ukwakuti mukaye shina? Nikwi uko mukafisa ifyuma fyenu? 
Isaiah10:4 Imwe mukafwa ku nkondo, atemwa bakalamutintanya pakumusenda muli bunkole. Ala nalyo line ninshi icipyu cakwa Yawe tacilati cipwe, kabili acilifye napangula ukuboko." 
Isaiah10:5 Yawe alisosele ati, “Ukacimona we calo ca Asiria, weo ine njikata mu minwe nge nkonto iyakupaminako abantu abo mfulilwa." 
Isaiah10:6 Nine natumine abena Asiria pakuti basanse umushobo wa bantu abansuula, abankalifya umutima. Nine natumine abena Asiria kukubatapa, kukubebila, na kukubanyantaukapo kwati fisoso balenyantaukapo ifili mu misebo." 
Isaiah10:7 Nomba imfumu ya bena Asiria yena tailuka ukuti nine njituma. Yaba na mapange yambi yambi mu mutima waiko, nayo amapange ayabukali. Yalipanga ukulofya abantu ba mishobo iyingi." 
Isaiah10:8 Yena ilaitakisha aiti, ‘Ine bamushika ba fita fyandi bonse ni mfumu." 
Isaiah10:9 Nine nacimfya umusumba wa Kalino no wa Kakemishi. Nine nacimfya umusumba wa Hamati no wa Apadi. Nine nacimfya umusumba wa Samaria no wa Damasiko wine. 
Isaiah10:10 Nine nalimuna ifyalo filya fipepa utulubi, ne fimpashanya ifyaengwa ifyacila na pali filya ifyaba mu Yerusalemu na mu Samaria ku bwingi." 
Isaiah10:11 Nine naonaula Samaria kumo kwine no tulubi tonse utwalimo, efyo kanshi nkacita na Yerusalemu wine, kumo kwine ne fimpashanya ifyo abantu ababamo bapepa.’ ”" 
Isaiah10:12 Nomba Yawe aletila ati, “Ine nga napwishishisha fyonse ifyo ndebomba pa lupili lwa Sioni na mu Yerusalemu, ine nkashitila imfumu ya Asiria palwa cilumba caiko na pa mataki yaiko," 
Isaiah10:13 pantu ena alailumbanya aiti, “‘Ninefye nacita ifi fyonse, pantu ine ndi wamaka, ndi wamano, kabili nalundapo no kucenjela. Nine napasa imipaka ya mishobo ya bantu, no kutapa ifyuma fyaiko. Nali nga cilume wa ŋombe ilyo nalenyantaula abo bantu." 
Isaiah10:14 Imishobo ya bantu bonse yali kwati cisansala ca koni, nalekusa ifyuma fyabo kwati mani ya koni ndekusa. Nako tekakwesha no kwimyako nangu lipindo lyakako pakundesha, nangu ukwasamuna umulomo wakako pakundilila nakalya.’”" 
Isaiah10:15 Bushe isembe kuti lyasosa ukuti lyalicila uulibomfya? Bushe icela cakucekela imbao calicindama ukucila umuntu uucibomfya? Inkonto ala taisenda muntu, muntu eusenda inkonto, no mutambu tawingaimya uwine nga tapali umuntu uwakuwimya pantu wena cimutifye." 
Isaiah10:16 Kanshi nomba Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alaswa aletele abantu abaina ubulwele bwakondoloka. Kabili mu bucindami bwakwe akatimuna umulilo uukalabilima. 
Isaiah10:17 Yawe uusanikila Israeli akasanguka umulilo. Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli akasanguka ulubingu ulwakoca fyonsefye pa muku umo mpo, imyunga na bacilasa fyalapiila kumo." 
Isaiah10:18 Imitengo umwaba imiti isuma, yonse kumo kwine na mabala yene fikapyafye nakalya nakalya, cikaba nga filya fine ubulwele bwakwipaya umuntu bucita." 
Isaiah10:19 Paleshalafye imiti iyancepela, iyakuti na kaice kuti kapenda." 
Isaiah10:20 Inshita imo ikafika ilyo abena Israeli na ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo abakashalapo bakaleka ukulatetekela umutundu wa bantu uwapene ubalofye. Mu cine cine bakatetekela Yawe, Uwamushilo uwakwa Israeli." 
Isaiah10:21 Bamwana Yakobo abanonofye abakashalapo ebakabwelela kuli Lesa Wamaka. 
Isaiah10:22 Nangu abena Israeli bafulisha ngo musensenga wa mu lulamba lwa bemba, awe banonofye bakabwela, pantu ukuloba kwa bantu ukwapingulwa, kwamaka kabili kwamulinganya." 
Isaiah10:23 Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita akaleta ubonaushi mu calo consefye, nga mulya mwine apangila ukucita." 
Isaiah10:24 Eico Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita akasosa ati, “Mwe bantu bandi, mwe baikala mu Sioni, mwilatiina abena Asiria, nangu bengalamucusha nga filya fyalemucita abena Egupto." 
Isaiah10:25 Pantu pashalafye akashita akanono ninshi ine naleka ukulamufulilwa, elyo ninshi ni bena ebo nkalofya." 
Isaiah10:26 Ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, nine nkabafopaula amembya, nga filya fine nacitile abena Midiani ku cilibwe ca Olebu. Ine nkatambalika umutambu wandi pali bemba nga filya fine nacitile mu Egupto." 
Isaiah10:27 Iyo nshita nga yafika, ine ninshi namulubula imwe ku bena Asiria, ne koli lyabo ninshi lyaleka ukulamufininina pa mabeya yenu. Ili ikoli likonauka no kufuma pa mikoshi yenu.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Ala abalwani balya bali pa Aiati. Nabacilinganya Migiloni. Nabasha ifipe fyabo pa Mikimashi. 
Isaiah10:29 Nabapita pa mupata, balesendama pa Geba. Abantu ba mu mushi wa Rama baleitutuminafye ku mwenso, na bantu ba mu Gibea, umushi umwafyalilwe imfumu Saulo, nabo nababutuka." 
Isaiah10:30 Pundisha we Mwana mwanakashi wa Galimu. Kutikeni mwe bena Laisha. Asukeni mwe bena Anatoti. 
Isaiah10:31 Abena Madimena nababutuka, na bena Gebimu nabafulumukila kumo." 
Isaiah10:32 Abalwani lelo bali mu mushi wa Nobu, balepangila umwana mwanakashi Sioni, ulupili lwine ulwakuulwapo umusumba wa Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Moneni, Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita, alebakunta panshi nge misambo iyo balesaila ku muti. Abakwatishapo icilumba pa banabo na bacindamishapo bena ebalabungulwa no kulambalala panshi." 
Isaiah10:34 Yawe alababungula nge miti, nga filya fine babungula kwisembe imiti iyaba pakati ke teshi, nga filya fine imiti iyawamisha iya ku Lebanoni baitema no kuwa." 
Isaiah11:1 Pakapuka umusambo uuteku pa cishiki cakwa Yese, ukufuma ku mushila wakwe umusambo ukatwala fisabo." 
Isaiah11:2 No Mupashi wakwa Yawe ukekala pali ena, umupashi wamano no wakwiluka ifintu, umupashi wakwishiba ukupingula no wamaka, umupashi wakwishiba no wakatiina kuli Yawe." 
Isaiah11:3 Insansa shakwe shikaba mukukwata akatiina kuli Yawe. Ena takalepingula bantu mu fyakumonafye ku menso, nangu mu fyakumfwa umfwafye iyoo." 
Isaiah11:4 Ena akalaputula imilandu ya balanda mu kulungika, mu mulinganya akapingwila abalanda ba mu calo. Akalimuna isonde ku nkonto ya kanwa kakwe, no kukanda ababifi ku mupu wa milomo yakwe." 
Isaiah11:5 Ubololoke bukaba e mushipi wakwe, ne cishinka cikaba nge lamba lya pa mutima wakwe." 
Isaiah11:6 Imimbulu ikalaikala umutelelwe pamo no mwana wa mpaanga, imbwili shikalalalafye pamo no tubushi. Ifiponti fya ŋombe fikalalilafye pamo ne misepela ya nkalamo, na baice ebakalaficema." 
Isaiah11:7 Iŋombe shikalaliila pamo ne fiswango fya bea, no twana twabo tukalalala umutelelwe pamo. Inkalamo shikalalya icani nge ŋombe." 
Isaiah11:8 Akanya akaleonka kakangala pa bwendo bwa ngoshe, no wasumuka akengisha ukuboko kwakwe pa bwendo bwe fwafwa." 
Isaiah11:9 Pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo tapakaleba nangufye cimo icakucusha umuntu, nangufye ukumonaula, pantu nga filya fine bemba aisula amenshi, efyo na ba pano isonde bakesulamo amano ayakwishiba Yawe." 
Isaiah11:10 Ubushiku bumo bukesa ilyo uyu mushila wakwa Yese ukesa ba uluunga lwa cishibilo ku mishobo ya benafyalo. Abantu ba mishobo bakalongana mu musumba waiko, ukaba icifulo icabucindami." 
Isaiah11:11 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika, Yawe nao ninshi elyo nakabili akasakatuka, no kubwesha abantu bakwe balya bashalapo mu Asiria, na mu Egupto, na mu Patirosi, na mu Kushi, na mu Elamu, na mu Babilonia, na mu Hamati, na balya bashala mu lulamba lwa bemba, na mu fishi fine." 
Isaiah11:12 Yawe akemisha imishobo ya benafyalo uluunga ulwakwishibilako ukuti nomba alelonganya nakabili abena Israeli, na bena Yuda ababa muli bunkole alebafumya nomba mu tupinda tonse tune utwe sonde." 
Isaiah11:13 Ubufuba bwa bena Efulemu bukapwa, na balwani bakwa Yuda bakaloba. Abena Efulemu bakaleka ukufubila abena Yuda, abena Yuda nabo bakaleka ukulafubila abena Efulemu." 
Isaiah11:14 Elyo bonse pamo bakawililila Abafilisiti lubali lwa ku masamba, no kutapa abantu ababela lwa ku kabanga. Bakacimfya abena Edomu na bena Moabu, na bena Amoni bakalabanakila." 
Isaiah11:15 Yawe akemya umwela uwakaba, nao ukakamya bemba wa ku Egupto, no kupatula umumana wa Yufurate mu tumilonga cine lubali, utwakuti no muntu onse alatwabuka panshi ninshi nafwala ne ndyato." 
Isaiah11:16 Ukutampila mu calo ca Asiria kukaba umusebo uwine wine, uo bakapitamo abantu bakwa Yawe abakashalapo muli cilya calo, nga filya fine cali na bena Israeli ilyo bafumine mu calo ca Egupto." 
Isaiah12:1 Muli ubo ubushiku ukemba no kutila, “Ine nakutasha we Yawe. Iwe walitalile wamfulilwa, pali nomba nauntalalika umutima, nauleka no kumfulilwa kabili wankoselesha." 
Isaiah12:2 Icine cine Lesa e pusukilo lyandi, eo nakulatetekela ukwabula ukutiina nelyo cimo. Pantu ni Yawe, cine cinefye ni Yawe eunkosha kabili e lumbo lyandi, kabili ewaisa ba ipusukilo lyandi." 
Isaiah12:3 Mukusekelela ukukalamba mukalatapa amenshi mu fishima fye pusukilo.” 
Isaiah12:4 Kabili muli ubo bushiku mukemba amuti, “Akutoteleni Yawe. Mulekuuta peshina lyakwe. Muleshimikilako na bantu ba mishobo yonse ifyo acita. Mulebebako ukuti ishina lyakwe lyalipulamisha." 
Isaiah12:5 Muleimbila Yawe, pantu ifyo acita fyakupapa. Lekeni abantu bonse aba pano isonde bomfweko uyu mulandu." 
Isaiah12:6 Lekeni bonsefye abaikala mu Sioni bange, no kwimba baleimba, pantu alipulama Uwamushilo uwakwa Israeli, uwaikala pakati kenu.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Ifyo Esaya mwana Amosi amwene palwa musumba wa Babiloni, eifi." 
Isaiah13:1 Ifyo Esaya mwana Amosi amwene palwa musumba wa Babiloni, eifi." 
Isaiah13:2 Pa mulu wa lupili ulushabapo kantu, epo imisheni uluunga ulw kulanga ukuti inkondo nomba yabuuka. Pundilileni abashilika, balembuleni pakuti bese basanse impongolo sha musumba isha bashimucindikwa." 
Isaiah13:3 Ee, Yawe naita abamushilo bakwe, naita ifita fyakwe ifyabulamba pakuti fise fimulimwineko abo afulilwa, ifita ifisekelela mu kucimfya kwakwe." 
Isaiah13:4 Umfweni icongo mu mpili, kwena kabolokoto ke bumba lya bantu ilikalamba, icongo ca bantu ba mishobo, ne ca bantu abafuma mu fyalo fya bashamfumu babo abalelongana. Yawe umwine wa fita alepekanya ifita fyakwe pakuti filwe inkondo." 
Isaiah13:5 Pakwisa filefuma mu fyalo fyakutali ifyaba mu tupinda tonse utwa mpela ya myulu. Yawe alaisa ne filwilo fya cipyu cakwe kukonaula icalo conse. 
Isaiah13:6 Pongomokeni imisowa pantu ubushiku bwakwa Yawe nabupalama! E bushiku ubo Umwine wa maka yonse akacitamo ubonaushi. 
Isaiah13:7 E mulandu wine ukalenga ukuti mu maboko ya bantu mupomponteke, ne mitima ya bantu bonse ikasunguluka." 
Isaiah13:8 Bakalaikankilafye ku mwenso, ubutanshi bwa kutapata fyabekata kwati mwanakashi uukomenwe ne fumo. Bakalaloleshanyafye mwenso mwenso, na pa menso yabo mulilo weka weka." 
Isaiah13:9 Ubushiku bwakwa Yawe buli mupepi, e bushiku ubushakabepo uluse, ubo alaswa alangepo icipyu ca kufulwa kwakwe. Icalo cikasanguka amatololo, na babifi bakaloba." 
Isaiah13:10 Intanda shilya shaba lumo lumo, na shilya shine shatitikana pamo, shonse shikaleka ukubalika. Akasuba nako kakafishiwa pa kutula kwakako, no mweshi nao tawakabalike nakalya." 
Isaiah13:11 Yawe alesosa ati, “Ine nkacita ubonaushi pa calo conse, nkalimuna ababifi bonse palwa fibi fyabo. Nkapwisha amataki ya bantu bonse ababa ne cilumba, nkakanda abantu bonse ababa ne miya no bunkalwe." 
Isaiah13:12 Abakashalapo bakabafye abancepela, nga filya fine golide wine wine uwa ku Ofiri aba uwancepela kabili uwamutengo." 
Isaiah13:13 Ine nkatensha umulu, ne sonde likasunkana apo caikala. Ni pali ubo bwine bushiku, epo ne Yawe umwine wa fita nkalangapo icipyu candi.”" 
Isaiah13:14 Abenafyalo abaikala mu Babiloni bakafulumukila mu fyalo fyabo, bakaya nsale nsale ku bantu babo kwati ni nsebula ishilefulumuka umulunshi, kwati ni mpaanga ishishikwete uwakushicema." 
Isaiah13:15 Bonse abasangwa bakalabapulinkanya ulupanga, na baikatwa bakabepaila ku lupanga." 
Isaiah13:16 Bakalaloleshakofye bulanda bulanda ilyo bakalafwanta panshi utwana twabo pakutwipaya, ilyo bakalatapa amayanda yabo, kabili nelyo bakalabifya na bakashi babo ku maka." 
Isaiah13:17 “Ine ne Yawe nkaluminisha abena Media pakuti bawililile Babiloni. Bena tabaposa mano kuli silifa nangufye kuli golide. 
Isaiah13:18 Bakepaya abalumendo bonse ku mifwi, no tunya twine tabatukwatile luse, nangufye ukulangulukilako utwaice." 
Isaiah13:19 Ubuteeko bwa calo ca Babiloni ubwawamisha pa buteeko bwafyalo bumbi bonse, na bena Kaludea abaikalamo balaitakishishapo, nomba ine ne Lesa nalaswa ngonaule umusumba wa Babiloni, nga filya fine naonawile Sodoma na Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Takwakatale akuba muntu uukekalamo nakabili. Abena Arabia abendauka tabakatale nakabili ababikamo amatenti yabo, takwakatale akuba bakacema abakalacemenamo ifitekwa fyabo." 
Isaiah13:21 Umusumba wa Babiloni walaswa ubefye incende umwakulaikala inama sha mu matololo, umo ifipuululu fyakulapikwila ifisansala. Emo imbuni shakulaikala, emo ne fibushi mabwe fyakulacena." 
Isaiah13:22 Mu mpungu mwakulaumfwika ukulila kwa bacimbwi no kwa bamumbwena mu mayanda ye sano. Inshita yakulimwinapo umusumba wa Babiloni naipalama. Inshiku shauko tashakatantalishiwe iyoo.” 
Isaiah14:1 Yawe akalangulukilako abena Israeli, nakabili akabasala pakuti bakabe abantu abakwefye. Akalenga bakekale nakabili mu calo cabo, na benafyalo bakalaisa mukwikala nabo no kwikatana na ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Abantu ba mishobo iyingi bakabuula abena Israeli, no kubatwala ku calo ico Yawe abapeele, kulya kwine eko na bantu ba iyo mishobo bakalateekwa ubusha, no kulabombela aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. Abaikete kale abena Israeli bunkole, ebo abena Israeli nabo bakekata bunkole, na bena Israeli nomba ebakalateeka abo bantu abalebacusha kale." 
Isaiah14:3 Mu bushiku bulya Yawe akalenga imwe mwe bena Israeli mukaleipemena no kutuusha kukulunguluka no kubomba imilimo iyakosa. 
Isaiah14:4 Ilyo cikaba ifyo, elyo na imwe mukalatumfya imfumu ya Babiloni amuti, “Eya, imfumu yabuluku nomba lwapela. Tayakatale nakabili aicushapo muntu." 
Isaiah14:5 Yawe nakontola inkonto ya babifi, ne nkonto yabufumu iya bakateeka." 
Isaiah14:6 Inkonto iyi eyaleuma imitundu ya bantu mu cipyu no kulabafopola libili libili. Taitalile aileka ukulacusha no bukali imishobo ya benafyalo. 
Isaiah14:7 Awe nomba lino abantu isonde lyonse baleipemena, nabaiikalila ku matwi tondolo, baleaula no tupundu." 
Isaiah14:8 Imiti ya paini ne ya keda iyalepesha iya ku Lebanoni ileanga ne nsansa palwa mfumu iyilobele, nomba takuli nelyo umo uwakuti aleitemaula, pantu imfumu nomba nalupela." 
Isaiah14:9 “Icalo ca bafwa panshi ya calo cileyanga, nacisa kukukusengela pakwisa kobe we mfumu ya Babiloni. Yasakatuka imilungulwa ya abo abafwa kale kukukuposha, bonse abali kale intungulushi pano isonde. Ishamfumu shaima nge milungulwa pa fipuna fyashiko ifyabufumu, shonse shali kale ishamfumu sha mishobo ya benafyalo pano calo." 
Isaiah14:10 Shonse shilekweba ashiti, ‘Nomba nobe wanyala nga ifwe, ala nomba twalingana." 
Isaiah14:11 Abantu baikalile ukulakucindika ne nyimbo sha mu maseese, ala nomba mona uli kuno ku calo ca bafwa. Imititi nomba e musengele obe, ne finsenda nomba e cakufimbana cobe.’" 
Isaiah14:12 “Yangu ifyo wapona ukufuma mu mulu, iwe we mulanga, we lutanda lwa pa macaca! Kale niwe wacimfishe abantu ba mishobo yonse, ala nomba Yawe nakufwankula panshi!" 
Isaiah14:13 Iwe walepanga mu mutima waleti, ‘Nkanina ku mulu, no kuya teeka icipuna candi icabufumu pa mulu wa ntanda shakwa Lesa. Nkaya ikala nge mfumu pa lupili lwakulonganinapo, ulwasansamisha ulwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Isaiah14:14 Ine nkanina apatali no kufika pa mulu wa makumbi. Nkaba ngo Wapulamo.’ 
Isaiah14:15 Tepapa nomba Yawe nakufwinta ku calo ca bafwa ku nindi ukwashika. 
Isaiah14:16 “Abakumona bakulakutamba, bakulakulolekesha no kulaipushanya abati, ‘Bushe uyu muntu teulya apukenye icalo no kululunkanya ifyalo ne shamfumu?" 
Isaiah14:17 Bushe teulya aonawile imisumba, no kusangula isonde lyonse amatololo? Bushe teuyu alekaanya bankole ukubwelelamo kumyabo?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Ishamfumu shonse ishateekele pano isonde shalala mu lulumbi, cila umo alala mu nindi yakwe yine." 
Isaiah14:19 Nomba iwe tawakwatapo nindi, ne citumbi cobe caliposwa kunse kwati ciposwaica kaanwa. Califimbwa ne fitumbi fya bashilika abafwilile mu nkondo, fyonse pamo fyaliposwa mu cilindi ca mabwe, no kushindaila balicishindaila." 
Isaiah14:20 Iwe tawakashiikwe nge fishiikwa ishamfumu shimbi, pantu iwe walyonawile icalo cobe, walipeye na bantu bobe. Mu lupwa lobe ulubi tamwakalumbulwe nelyo umo kukushalapo." 
Isaiah14:21 “Aleni tampeniko ukwipaya abana abaume aba iyi mfumu. Bamwane bali nokufwa pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa fikolwe fyabo. Tapakatale apaba nakabili mwane nangu umo uukateekapo icalo conse nangu ukufushamo imisumba.” 
Isaiah14:22 Yawe umwine wa fita alisosele ati, “Ine nkasansa umusumba wa Babiloni no kuonaulafye nakalya nakalya. Nshakashemo kantu, nshakashemo mwana, nangufye umuntu umbi uwakuti akashalemo alepema.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah14:23 “Nkasangula umusumba ukuba icifulo umwakusangwafye ifipululu, kabili ukaba nga tefwetefwe. Nkapyanga Babiloni ku ceswa cabonaushi, efyasosa Yawe umwine wa maka yonse.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Yawe umwine wa fita alilapile ati, “Cinefye ifyo ine napanga, efili nokucitika. Ifyo ine napingula ukucita, efyo cikaba." 
Isaiah14:25 Ine nkalofya abena Asiria mu calo candi, no kubanyantaulapo mu mpili shandi. Nkapususha abantu bandi kwikoli lya bena Asiria, nkabatuulako ne fipe ifyafina ifyo basenda." 
Isaiah14:26 Efyo ine napanga ukucitila isonde lyonse, no kuboko kwandi ninjimya pakulimuna abantu ba mishobo yonse.”" 
Isaiah14:27 Ee, apo Yawe umwine wa fita apangile ukucita ifi, nga nani uwingamucilima? Apo emishe ukuboko kwakwe, nga nani uwinga kubwesha?" 
Isaiah14:28 Mu mwaka uo imfumu Ahasi yafwilemo, kwatulile amashiwi kuli Lesa ayakuti," 
Isaiah14:29 “Imwe mwe Bafilisiti, inkonto yalemufopaula naikontoka, lelo kwena mwilacankwa pali uyu mulandu, pantu insoka imo ikafyala impini, impini nayo ikafyala insoka yabusungu iikalapupuka." 
Isaiah14:30 Nomba abalanda abene bene ine ne Yawe nkalabasunga, na babusu bakalaikalila ku matwi tondolo. Nomba imwe mwe Bafilisiti, awe nkamuletela icipowe icabipisha, icishakashepo nelyo umo umumi pali imwe." 
Isaiah14:31 “Imwe mwe misumba yonse iya Bafilisiti, pumenipo imisowa, akukuuteni mutuule. Imwe mwe misumba yonse akukankeni ku mwenso. Pantu ulukungu lulya luleisa lulefutumuka, luletula lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, e bumba lya fita umushaba kuwe nelyo umo mu mpuka shaliko." 
Isaiah14:32 Nga kanshi ifwe tukasuka shani inkombe ishatwishila ukufuma ku mushobo wa Bafilisiti? Ifwe tukashebafye ukuti, ‘Ala ni Yawe ewasokola Sioni, na bantu bakwe abacula emo bafisama.’”" 
Isaiah15:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa bena Moabu ni aya. Moabu naonaulwa! Umusumba wa Ari waonaulwa mu nshita ya bushiku. Moabu naonaulwa! Umusumba wa Kiri waonaulwa mu nshita ya bushiku. 
Isaiah15:2 Abena Diboni baya kwitempele lyabo, baya mukulosha pa ncende yakupepelapo bacindika. Abena Moabu balelilila umusumba wa Nebo no wa Medeba, bonse nababeya inkuuso, nababeya ne myefu pakulanga ubulanda." 
Isaiah15:3 Abantu mu misebo nabafwala insalu shabulanda, balelila ifilamba no kulaloosesha mu mansa sha mu musumba na pa mitenge pene." 
Isaiah15:4 Abena Heshiboni na bena Eleale balekuuta, ne nkuuta shabo shileumfwika mpaka na ku Yahasi. Na bashilika bene abena Moabu balekankila kumo ku mwenso, ne misana yabo naiputuka." 
Isaiah15:5 Umutima wandi ulelangulukilako Moabu. Imbutushi shakwe shilebutukila ku mushi wa Soari ukufika na ku Egilati Shelishiya. Bamo baya balelilila mu musebo uwaya ku Luiti, bamo baya balelila nganshi ilyo balefulumukila ku Holonaimu." 
Isaiah15:6 Amenshi aya mu kamana ka Nimurimu nayakama, ne fyani ifyaba mu lulamba lwakako nafyuma, tamushele cani cibishi nakalya." 
Isaiah15:7 Abantu baleabuka umukonko wa Mishingu pakufulumuka, ne fipe fyabo fyonse ifyo banonka no kututila nabasenda." 
Isaiah15:8 Mu mipaka yonse iya Moabu muleumfwika inkuuta. Imisowa ileumfwika na mu mushi wa Egilaimu no wa Bere Elimu. 
Isaiah15:9 Ku mushi wa Diboni amenshi ya mu mumana uwabako yakashike cee ku mulopa, na ine ncili na fimbi ifyabipishapo ukucila ifyo nkacitila abantu ababamo muli Diboni. Imbutushi ishafuma ku Moabu na bonsefye abashalapo mu calo bakepaululwafye nakalya nakalya ku nkalamo." 
Isaiah16:1 Abena Moabu aba mu musumba wa Sela uwaba mu matololo babuulile utwana twa mpaanga, eto batuma ubupe kuli kateeka wa calo cakwa Yuda, ku lupili lwa Mwana mwanakashi wa Sioni." 
Isaiah16:2 Abanakashi abena Moabu amano nayabapela, balifye nge fyuni ifyo batewilile ifisansala. Baleenda endafye pa cabu ca mumana wa Alinoni." 
Isaiah16:3 Balaeba abena Yuda abati, “Mwe, ala twebeniko ifyakucita, pinguleni ifyakuti tucite. Lekeni tutuusheko mu cintelelwe cenu, icintelelwe icafiitisha ilyo akasuba kalanguka pakati ka mutwe. Ala ifwe tuli mbutushi, tufiseni kumo ukwakuti abantu bafilwa ukutumona." 
Isaiah16:4 Lekeni fwe bena Moabu imbutushi twikaleko mu calo cenu. Nemwe muletupokololako kuli balya bantu balefwaya ukutulofya.” Ulufyengo no bonaushi nga fyapwa, na bonse abonaula icalo nga bapwa ukufuma pa calo," 
Isaiah16:5 elyo umo pa bana bakwa Davidi akaba imfumu, ena eukateeka abantu bwino mu cishinka. Ena akalasakamana ukupingula bwangu icilungeme, no kulaposa amano kukumona ukuti umulinganya ulebapo." 
Isaiah16:6 Kwena twalyumfwa ifyo abena Moabu baba ne cilumba, icilumba icikalamba nganshi! Twalishiba ukuti bantu abamataki, abaitutumuna kabili abamiya, lelo kwena amataki yabo yafyefye." 
Isaiah16:7 Abena Moabu bakulaloosha, bonse bakulaloosha Moabu capamo. Bakulaloosha abaume ba mu Kiri Hareseti, nabakungumana." 
Isaiah16:8 Amabala ya ku Heshiboni nayabonsa ne myangashi ya ku Sibuma nayo naibonsa. Bakateeka ba mishobo ya benafyalo nabanyantaula imyangashi iyawamisha iyalefika na ku Yaseri no kwandalala ukufika na mu matololo. Imisambo yaiko yaleandalala no kulola lwa ku masamba yafika na kwishilya lya Bemba Wamfwa. 
Isaiah16:9 Awe nomba nalililako imyangashi ya ku Sibuma, ngefi fine ndelilila Yaseri. Ine ndelukusha ifilamba pa mulandu wa bena Heshiboni na pa mulandu wa bena Eleale, pantu nomba takuli utupundu twa nsansa shakusekelela ukupya kwa fisabo elyo no kulobolola natutalalikwa." 
Isaiah16:10 Mu mabala ayali kale ayafunda, nomba tamuli nelyo umo uulesansamukamo. Mu mabala ya myangashi tamuli nomba nangu umo uulepundamo ne nsansa, nangufye ukwimbamo ulwimbo. Takuli nangu umo uulekama ifitwalo fya myangashi. Ukwaula utupundu nakupwa." 
Isaiah16:11 Ine umutima wandi ulekalipa palwa calo ca Moabu, ine ndelila umusumba wa Kiri Haraseti." 
Isaiah16:12 Abena Moabu nangu baye mukupepa pali shilya ncende shakupepelapo bacindika mu mpili, baleicushafye, nangu baye mukupepa mu mayanda yabo aya mapepo, nakalya tacakabafwe." 
Isaiah16:13 Efyo Yawe asobele kale palwa calo ca Moabu. 
Isaiah16:14 Elyo kabili pali nomba Yawe nalyo alesosa ati, “Pa myaka itatufye, ninshi ifyuma fine fine ifya mu calo ca Moabu fyaloba. Pa bantu abengi ababamo pakashalafye abancepela, nabo bakabafye utufwanda tweka tweka.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa musumba wa Damasiko ni aya. Yawe alisosele ati, “Umusumba wa Damasiko ukawa, tawakabe musumba nakabili iyoo, ukabafye umwina wa fitantala epela." 
Isaiah17:2 Mu misumba ya ku Aroeli tamwakabe abantu. Ikabafye ni ncende umo impaanga ne ŋombe shikalaliila, takwakamoneke ne cakushitiinya." 
Isaiah17:3 Takwakashale ilinga kuli Efulemu, no bufumu bwa musumba wa Damasiko nabo bwine bukapwa. Abena Siria abakashalapo bakaseebana nga bana bakwa Israeli.” Yawe umwine wa fita nasosa." 
Isaiah17:4 “Ubushiku bumo bwalaswa bufike, ilyo ubucindami bwakwa Yakobo bukapwa, no kwina kwakwe kukapwa, akashalafye nga pa kamuti." 
Isaiah17:5 Cikaba nge bala ilyo batimpwilemo imitwe ya ŋanu, no kutoolamo imisonso yaiko, nge bala lya mwishika lya Refaimu, ilyo basoloswetemo imisonso ya ŋanu." 
Isaiah17:6 Mukashalafye abantu abampendwa abakapusukamo, ngo muolifa uo bakuntileko ifitwalo fyonse, no kushakofye ifitwalo fibili nangufye fitatu ifili pa kantongolilo, nangufye ifitwalo fine atemwa fisano ifili ku misambo.” Ee, Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli nasosa." 
Isaiah17:7 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika, elyo abantu bakapilibukila kuli Kabumba wabo, Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Ninshi nomba capwa baleka ukulasakamana ifibumbili fya malambo ifyo abene bakuula. Ninshi nomba basuulilapo ne fintu ifyo baipangila, ifili nge nceshi sha mulungu Ashera, ne fibumbili fine ifyakocelapo ububani." 
Isaiah17:9 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika, ninshi imisumba yabo iyamaka yashala insansalila, kabili ninshi yaba ifibolya nge misumba iyo abena Hifi na bena Amoli bashile insansalila, ilyo bafulumwike abana bakwa Israeli." 
Isaiah17:10 Mwe bena Israeli, mwalilaba kuli Lesa uwamupususha, mwalifilwa ukwibukisha icilibwe cenu ico mufisamamo. Eico nangu mwingalima imyangashi iyalelema, nangu mwalimba imyangashi ya benafyalo," 
Isaiah17:11 elyo ifyo mwalimba lelo, nangu fingapuuka no kubalula iluba pa nshita ya lucelo, awe teti mumonemo nelyo fimo ifyo mwingalobololamo. Ifyakulobolola fikaba ifyafyefye, kuti fyamuletelafye ubucushi no bubi ubushingapwa." 
Isaiah17:12 Abantu ba mishobo iyamaka balebolokota, balecita icongo kwati ni bemba, kwati kupumana kwa matamba ayakalamba ayalulunkene." 
Isaiah17:13 Nangu imitundu ya bantu ishile nailulunkana nga matamba, nomba ilyo Lesa aikalipila yabwelelamo yaya ukutali pakufulumuka. Yaululuka nge misungu iyili pa mpili, yaululuka nge mpimbili ishasendwa kuli kankungwe." 
Isaiah17:14 Pa nshita ya cungulo awe kwaba na kayofi! Kutifye cilya bushilati buce, awe tepakumona muntu nelyo umo! Efyo ciba ku bantu bonse abatapa icalo cesu, Ecakakaniko ca bonse abesa mukutonaula." 
Isaiah18:1 Ukacimona we calo umumfwika icongo cakupupuka kwa mapindo, mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Kushi," 
Isaiah18:2 we utuma inkombe pali bemba, ishishila mu mato ya macinda pa mulu wa menshi. Bwelelenimo imwe mwe nkombe shalubilo, kebeniko abantu ba mutundu wenu uwamaka, balya baba abatali kabili abapukushika imibili, abo na bantu bambi batiina pano isonde, E mushobo uwamaka kabili uucimfya mu nkondo, abo icalo cabo capitamo imimana." 
Isaiah18:3 Umfweni imwe bonse mwe baikala pano isonde, imwe bonse mwe bekashi ba pano isonde. Mukamona uluunga ulwakwishibilako ululi nokulapuupa pa mulu wa mpili. Mukomfwa uko ipenga lilelila." 
Isaiah18:4 Pantu Yawe nanjeba ine ne Esaya ati, “Ine ne Yawe kuno naba ku mulu, ninteeka umutima pakulolesha panshi. Ndecita kwati ni filya ficita akasuba akalececema mu menso pa nshita ya lusuba, kwati ni fubefube ulya abako ilyo kuba icipuki ubushiku pa nshita yakuseepa." 
Isaiah18:5 Pantu nga filya fine ciba ilyo bashilati basabe ifitwalo ku myangashi, ilyo ubuluba bwalukutako, ne fitwalo fyatampa ukulapyako, efyo na balwani bakalofya abena Kushi. Bakabaputaula ukwabula no bwafya, nga filya fine baputaula ku mwele imisambo ya myangashi pa kuitungwila." 
Isaiah18:6 Ifitumbi fya bashilika babo fikashala filele nsale nsale, pakuti ifyuni ne fiswango fikalelya. Ifyuni efikalalya pa nshita ya lusuba, pamwela pena fiswango efikalalya.”" 
Isaiah18:7 Inshita imo ikafika, ilyo Yawe umwine wa fita akalapokelela imituulo, iyafuma kuli balya bantu ababa abatali kabili abapukushika imibili, abo na bantu bambi batiina pano isonde. E mushobo uwamaka kabili uulacimfya mu nkondo, abo icalo cabo capitamo imimana. Bakalaleta ifyabupe ku lupili lwa Sioni, icifulo ukwikala ishina lyakwa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Isaiah19:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa calo ca Egupto ni aya. Moneni Yawe nanina pekumbi ililesensela, aleya ku calo ca Egupto. Utulubi twa mu Egupto tuleitutuminafye ku mwenso pa cinso cakwe, na bena Egupto bene imisana yabo naiputuka." 
Isaiah19:2 Yawe alesosa ati, “Ine nkasongelekanya abena Egupto, munyina akemina munyina no kumulwisha. Umwina mupalamano nao akemina umwina mupalamano wakwe no kumulwisha. Umusumba nao ukalwisha umusumba ubiye. No bufumu nabo bukemina ubufumu bubiye." 
Isaiah19:3 Ine naya kukufulunganya ifyo abena Egupto bapekanya, naya kukubafulunganya na mano yene. Bakulalomba utulubi twabo ne milungulwa ine pakuti ibafwilisheko, bakulaipusha bakabuka babo, no kulaesha ukupandwa amano ku mipashi ya bantu abafwa na ku ngulu." 
Isaiah19:4 Nomba ine nkaleka imfumu imo iyikakashi, kabili iyikali, eyo ikateeke abena Egupto. Nine ne Mfumu Yawe umwine wa fita nasoselapo.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Amenshi ya mu mumana wa Nailo yakalacepelako, ukasuke umumana auma na ndi." 
Isaiah19:6 Imilonga iyaitamo nayo ikalakaminako, no kutampa ukulanunka piipi. Amatete yakoma kumo kwine na macinda," 
Isaiah19:7 pamo pene ne fyani fya mu lulamba lwa Nailo, na pa mawilo ya mumana. Na fyonse ifyaba mu mabala ayalimwa mu lulamba lwa Nailo fikoma, fikasendwe na ku mwela, tapakashale kantu nangu kamo." 
Isaiah19:8 Abalondo bonse abaikalila ukwipaya isabi mu Nailo bakalashinta mu nshiku no kulalanguluka, pantu amalobo yabo na masumbu yabo tayakakwate mulimo." 
Isaiah19:9 Balya bapikula insalu ishawamisha bakalengwe nsoni, na bapikula insalu ishatelela bakafuupuka." 
Isaiah19:10 Bakapikula wa nsalu na balya abacenjela mu fyakupanga panga, nabo bene bakafuupuka no kulalanguluka." 
Isaiah19:11 Kwena intungulushi sha mu musumba wa Soani, ala shalitumpa, na bantu abapandako Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto amano nabo bene tababa na mano. Kuti mwaeba shani Farao ukuti, “Ndi mwana wa bamano ine, umwana wa shamfumu shakale.”" 
Isaiah19:12 Iwe Farao nga abalekupandako amano bali kwi? Bushe kuti bakwebako ifyo Yawe umwine wa fita apanga ukucitila icalo ca Egupto? 
Isaiah19:13 Bacilolo ba mu Soani tababa na mano, ne ntungulushi sha mu Memfisi shalibepaikwa, ne fikolwe abantu bashintililamo fyalenga ukuti abena Egupto balelubantika." 
Isaiah19:14 Ni Yawe ewabapongolwela umupashi wa mano yacimfulumfulu, ecalenga nokuti Egupto aletalansuka muli fyonse ifyo acita, nga filya fine cakolwa awishikana mu malushi yakwe." 
Isaiah19:15 Mu Egupto tamulifye nangu umo uwakuti acitemo cimo pakwafwa icalo, nangufye umukankala atemwa umulanda, nangufye umwaice atemwa umukalamba, awe tamuli nangufye umo nakalya." 
Isaiah19:16 Inshita imo ikafika ilyo abena Egupto bakaba nga banakashi. Bakalaikankilafye ku mwenso pakumona uko Yawe umwine wa fita apangwile ukuboko pakubalimuna. 
Isaiah19:17 Abena Egupto bakalatiina icalo ca Yuda. Kuli onse uo bakalumbwilako icalo ca Yuda akatutuma pa mulandu wakwibukisha ishamo ilyo Yawe umwine wa fita apanga ukubaletela. 
Isaiah19:18 Iyo nshita nga yafika, ululimi lwa Cihibulu elo bakalalanda mu misumba isano iya mu Egupto. Abantu ababamo pakulapa bakalalumbula Yawe umwine wa fita. Umusumba wabo umo ukalaitwa Musumba wa Kasuba." 
Isaiah19:19 Iyo nshita nga yafika, pakati ka calo ca Egupto bakakuulapo ubulambo bwakwa Yawe, na mu mipaka ya calo mukabamo icibumbili cimo ica mabwe, ico bakakuulila Yawe." 
Isaiah19:20 Ifyo fintu efikaba ifibukisho ifyakulenga ukwibukisha ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita aba mu Egupto, epakuti abantu nga basanswa no kukuuta Yawe mutuule, akabatuminapo umo uwakubapusushako no kubacingililako ku balwani babo." 
Isaiah19:21 Yawe akaisokolola umwine ku bena Egupto. Ilyo akacita ifyo, elyo nabo abantu bakeshiba Yawe icine cine, elyo bakalamupepa, no kulamutuula amalambo ne mituulo imbi. Elyo bakalamulaya ifilayo ifine fine, no kulacita ifyo balelaya." 
Isaiah19:22 Yawe nangu akapumaula abena Egupto, iyoo kwena akabondapa. Elyo nabo bakabwelela kuli Yawe, nao elyo akomfwa imipapatile yabo, no kubondapa elyo akabondapa." 
Isaiah19:23 Iyo nshita nga yafika, kukaba umusebo umo uukulu uwakufuma mu Egupto no kuya fika na mu Asiria. Abantu ba muli ifyo fyalo fibili bakalaendeshanya, kabili abantu ba iyo mitundu ibili bakalapepela capamo." 
Isaiah19:24 Iyo nshita nga yafika, icalo ca Israeli cikaba icabutatu ku calo ca Egupto ne ca Asiria kukucindama, ne mitundu iyo itatu iya bantu ikalenga ukuti isonde lyonse likekale ilyapaalwa." 
Isaiah19:25 Yawe umwine wa fita akapaala abantu ba ifyo fyalo ati, “Ine namupaala imwe mwe bena Egupto, mwe bantu bandi. Namupaala na imwe mwe bena Asiria, mwebo ine nabumba. Namupaala na imwe mwe bena Israeli, mwe bantu naisalila.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Sagoni imfumu ya Asiria alipeele Taritani mushika wa fita fyakwe icebo cakusansa Ashidodi umusumba wa Bafilisiti, awe nao mushika ausansa no kuupoka." 
Isaiah20:2 Muli iyo ine nshita Yawe aebele Esaya mwana Amosi ukufuula insalu shabulanda isho alefwala, no kufuula ne nsapato shakwe shine. Esaya nao te mukani, kanshi nao epakulaenda ubwamba, alaendafye ukwabula no kulafwala insapato." 
Isaiah20:2 Muli iyo ine nshita Yawe aebele Esaya mwana Amosi ukufuula insalu shabulanda isho alefwala, no kufuula ne nsapato shakwe shine. Esaya nao te mukani, kanshi nao epakulaenda ubwamba, alaendafye ukwabula no kulafwala insapato." 
Isaiah20:3 Elyo Yawe asosele ati, “Nomba yaba imyaka itatu apo umubomfi wandi Esaya endela ubwamba no kukanafwala nsapato. Ici cintu e cishibilo ca fintu ifikaponena Egupto na Kushi." 
Isaiah20:4 Imfumu ya Asiria ikasenda bankole ubwamba abo ikekata muli ifyo fyalo fibili. Abaice na bakote bene bakalaenda ukwabula insapato, kabili bakalaenda ubwamba, na matako yabo yakabafye pa mbilibili, neco cintu cikaletela abena Egupto insoni." 
Isaiah20:5 Abatetekela icalo ca Kushi, na batakisha palwa calo ca Egupto, bakalaumfwa insoni pantu fikapwa ifyo babikako amano." 
Isaiah20:6 Iyo nshita nga yafika, abantu abekala mu lulamba lwa calo ca Filisiti bakalatilafye, ‘Moneni ifyo caba ku bantu abo kabili twaletetekela ukuti ebakalatupokololako ku mfumu ya ku Asiria. Nga ifwe nomba tukapusukila pi?’”" 
Isaiah21:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa calo ca Babiloni ni aya. Ubonaushi bukatula ku calo icakutiinya, bukesa nga kankungwe uulepita mu ciswebebe ca Negebu." 
Isaiah21:2 Ine ne Esaya nimona icimonwa cimo pa fintu ifyakutiinya icakutila, uwabusangu alesangukila, uwabonaushi aleonaula. Mwe fita fya Elamu, aleni sanseni. Mwe fita fya Media, aleni shingeni imisumba. Lesa alapwisha amacushi ayaletwa na Babiloni." 
Isaiah21:3 Ifyo ine mwene mu cimonwa nafindetela umwenso, awe ifyo ine ŋumfwile nafindetela no bucushi. Ubucushi nabo buli kwati bwa mwanakashi uukomenwe ne fumo." 
Isaiah21:4 Amano yandi nayafulungana, kabili ndeikankilafye ku mwenso. Nalelolela ukuti bwile nsepulepo tunono, nomba kabili nacindetela umwenso." 
Isaiah21:5 Mu cimonwa namwenefye bapekanya amaliila, baansa na pakuti abetilwe bekale. Awe balalya no kunwa balanwa. Elyo apopene umo apunda ati, “Imwe mwe bamushika ba fita, aleni pekanyeni inkwela shenu.”" 
Isaiah21:6 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati, “Kabiye, uyebika malonda umo, umwebe nokuti alekwebako ifyo akulamona." 
Isaiah21:7 Nga amona abantu baleisa pali bakabalwe, baleenda babili babili, na bantu bambi baleisa pali bapunda na pa ngamila, umwebe amwenekeshe bwino.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Malonda nao apunda ati, “Mukwai, ni pano pene pa lupungu epo ine mba lyonse, njiminina pano pene akasuba no bushiku pakulonda.”" 
Isaiah21:9 Ala balya baleisa. Baleisa pali bakabalwe, baleenda babili babili. Na umo nao aisa sosa ati, “Babiloni apokwa, apokwa icine. No tulubi tonse uto balepepa natutobaika, tulelefye panshi.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Mwe bantu bandi, imwe balimutwa nga filya batwa iŋanu, nomba ine namweba amashiwi ayasuma ayo ŋumfwile kuli Yawe umwine wa fita, kuli Lesa wakwa Israeli." 
Isaiah21:11 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa musumba wa Duma, ni aya. Umuntu umo uwa mu calo ca Seiri ambilikisha ati, “Iwe we malonda, bushe ubushiku bwalaca lilali? Njebako apo ubushiku bwalapwila.”" 
Isaiah21:12 Na malonda ayasuka ati, “Ala bwalaswa buce, lelo kwena bwalaila nakabili. Nga ulefwaya ukwipusha nakabili, ubwelefye, wise wipushe.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa calo ca Arabia ni aya. Imwe mwe bena Dedani, mwe benda mu mpuka mu mpuka no kulakuula insakwe mu fiswebebe fya mu calo ca Arabia," 
Isaiah21:14 imwe mulepeelako abantu amenshi abaleisa ne cilaka uko muli. Imwe mwe bantu mwe bekala mu calo ca Tema, mulepako imbutushi icakulya." 
Isaiah21:15 Pantu abantu balefulumuka impanga ishatwa, na ku mifwi iyo balefwaya ukubalashilako. Balefulumuka ubusanso bonse ubwa nkondo." 
Isaiah21:16 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati, “Pa mwakafye umo, ninshi ubukankala bwa mitundu ya bantu ba mu Keda bwapwilililafye." 
Isaiah21:17 Na pebumba lya bantu abacenjela ukuposa imifwi, ababa ifita fine fine ifya mu Keda, awe pakashalafye abampendwa. Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli nasosa.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa mukonko wa Cimonwa ni aya. Nga kanshi cinshi cilecitika? Mulandu nshi abena musumba bonse baninine pa mitenge ya mayanda? 
Isaiah22:2 Mu musumba onse muli akabolokoto, muli icongo ne cimpungili. Abantu bobe abaume abafwile te mu nkondo bafwilile, kabili tabalwileko iyoo." 
Isaiah22:3 Intungulushi shobe shalifulumwike shonse pamo, shalikatwa, shintu ishishaposelepo mufwi nelyo umo. Bonse mwe basangilwe mwaliketwe, nangu mwabutwike abalwani bacili ukutali." 
Isaiah22:4 Awe ndekeni ne mwine mwilandolesha, lekenifye ndile. Mwilaesha kuntalalika iyoo, pantu abantu bandi nabonaulwa." 
Isaiah22:5 Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alipekanya ubushiku ubwacimpungili, ubwacimfulunganya ne cimfundawila mu mukonko wa cimonwa, ubushiku bwakubongolola amalinga, kabili ubwa nkuuta ishakukuuta mutuule mu lupili." 
Isaiah22:6 Abashilika ba mu calo ca Elamu beshile pali bakabalwe nabasenda amata ne mifwi, abashilika ba mu calo ca Kiri nabo beshile nabafwalila inkwela shabo." 
Isaiah22:7 Mu ncende shenu ishawamisha isha mwishika emwiswile amaceleta, na bashilika abendela pali bakabalwe ebeminine pa mpongolo sha musumba wa Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah22:8 Kanshi amalinga ayakupokolwelako Yuda yalibongolweke. Ilyo ico cintu camoneke, elyo imwe mwaloleshe ku fyanso ifyaba mu ŋanda iyaitilwe “Isano lya Mutengo” umo mwafisungila." 
Isaiah22:9 Mwalimwene umo amalinga ya Yerusalemu yabongolweke, mwasunga na menshi mu cishiba ca mwisamba." 
Isaiah22:10 Mwapenda amayanda yonse aya mu Yerusalemu, mwatobapo na yamo pakuti mukwatepo amabwe ayakukuulila cipya cipya amalinga ya musumba." 
Isaiah22:11 Mwaimba icishima lwa mukati ka malinga umwakuti muleikala amenshi ayaletula mu cishiba cakale. Lelo icakuti mupose amano kuli Lesa uwapekanya ifi fyonse ukutula na ku kale, no kulenga ukuti fibepo, awe cena nakalya." 
Isaiah22:12 Eico muli ubo bushiku Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alimwitile imwe pakuti mulelila, muleloosha, mubeye ne nkuso, no kufwala insalu shabulanda." 
Isaiah22:13 Lelo imwe mwaikalilefye ukulasekasekafye no kulasamwa. Mwaipaya impaanga ne ŋombe ishakuti mulye, mwalanwa no mwangashi. Mwalasosa amuti, “Natuipakishe no kunwa tunwe, pantu mailo ninshi twafwa.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Yawe umwine wa fita asuka anjeba ati, “Aba bantu ukushinta napo bakafumina pano calo, awe ine nshakababelele luse pali ubu bubifi. Yawe umwine wa fita nasosa.”" 
Isaiah22:15 Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alinjebele ine ukuya kuli Shebina kangalila, mushika wa kwisano, no kuya mweba ukuti," 
Isaiah22:16 “Bushe iwe uitunga ukuba cinshi? Ni nsambu nshi iwe wakwata ishakuti uleibashila inindi mu cilibwe ca mu kapili, no kuimbila apakulala mu cilibwe icasumbuka?" 
Isaiah22:17 Imilimo iyo iwe ubomba, kwena intu yacindama, lelo Yawe ali nokukwikata no kukusukusa kumbi kumbifye, we muntu uwabulamba." 
Isaiah22:18 “Akakubulunganika nga kafunda, no kukufwintila mu calo icapabuka. Uko kwine eko ukafwila. Ekukashala na maceleta ayo iwe ucankilwa. Iwe nausebanya ne sano lyakwa sokulu." 
Isaiah22:19 Yawe akakufumya pa mulimo obe, ali nokukutelemuna pa cambaso apo iwe watongama.”" 
Isaiah22:20 Yawe umwine epakweba Shebina ati, “Ifyo fintu nga fyacitika, elyo ine nkatuma umuntu umo uwakuya buula umubomfi wandi Eliakimu mwana Hilikiya." 
Isaiah22:21 Eo ine nkesa fwika umwingila obe uwabucilolo, eo nkesa fwika no mushipi obe, no kumupeela amaka yonse ayabucilolo ayo iwe wakwata. Ena akalalela abena Yerusalemu na bena Yuda kwati ni shibo." 
Isaiah22:22 Ine nkapeela kuli Eliakimu imfungulo sha ŋanda yabuteeko iyakwa Davidi. Akalati nga aisulamo, ninshi takuli umbi uwakwisalamo. Conse nga aisalamo, ninshi takuli umbi uwakwisulamo." 
Isaiah22:23 Ine nkamukosha ndii ngo lusunga, akaba uwacindama eo ulupwa lwakwe lukalamwenamo ubucindami." 
Isaiah22:24 Ubucindami bonse ubwa pa lupwa bukabikwa pali ena, ne finshikulula fyonse eo fikalalolekeshako. Bakalapeleela nge nongo nangu inweno isho bakobeka ku lusunga." 
Isaiah22:25 Ilyo cikaba ifyo, ulusunga nangu lukapampaminwa ndii, awe lukanenuka no kupona. Ne fipe fyonse ifikalashinindako nafyo ninshi emyonaikile.” Yawe umwine wa fita nasosa." 
Isaiah23:1 Amashiwi ayasobelwe palwa musumba wa Turi ni aya. Pumenipo imisowa, imwe mwe benda ne fimato fya ku Tashishi pali bemba. Umusumba wenu uwa Turi naonaika, amayanda ya mu musumba wa Turi yashelefye ifitantala, kumo kwine ne cabu cauko. Mwalyumfwilile uyu mulandu ukufuma ku calo ca Saiprasi." 
Isaiah23:2 Kutumaneni mwe baikala pa lulamba lwa bemba, mwe bashimakwebo ba mu musumba wa Sidoni, mwe bayabwishe ifyuma fyenu pali bemba pa menshi ayengi." 
Isaiah23:3 Mwe banonkela mukwenda pali bemba, mwe baletuma abakushita iŋanu ku Shihori, mwe baleshita iŋanu sha mu Egupto, ifisabo fya ku mumana, kabili ni pa Turi epalecitilwa amakwebo ne mishobo ya benafyalo." 
Isaiah23:4 Iwe we musumba wa Sidoni, ala nauseebana, pantu bemba kumo kwine na matenga ya muli bemba mukalamba nafikukaana, filesosa afiti, “Awe ifwe tatwatala atufyalapo bana. Ifwe tatwatala atukushapo abana baume nangufye abanakashi.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Na bena Egupto bene bakacilimukila no kututuma ku mwenso, ilyo bakomfwa ukuti Turi naonaika." 
Isaiah23:6 Pumenipo imisowa, imwe mwe bena Tashishi. Esheni ukufulumukila ku calo ca pa lulamba lwa pali bemba." 
Isaiah23:7 Bushe uyu Turi e musumba wenu uwansansa, ulya basokwele kale na kale, mulya mwalefuma abantu abaleabuka bemba pakuya teeka ifyalo fimbi?" 
Isaiah23:8 Bushe nani apangile ukucita ifi kuli Turi, umusumba wa bashamfumu, uwateekelwe na bashimakwebo abali intungulushi ishacindamisha pa calo?" 
Isaiah23:9 Ala ni Yawe umwine wa fita ewapangile ukucita ifi, pakuti bonse abapwishe icilumba, na pakuti abacindami babo bonse abacefye." 
Isaiah23:10 Ucilinganye icalo cobe ngo mulonga wa Nailo, we Mwana mwanakashi wa Tashishi, pantu nomba takuli cakukulesha." 
Isaiah23:11 Yawe napangwila ukuboko kwakwe pali bemba, naonaula ifyalo fya bashamfumu. Napeela icebo icakonaula imisumba yonse iya malinga, iyo abena Kanani babamo." 
Isaiah23:12 Iwe we Nacisungu mwana Sidoni, ala nacipwa, tawalesansamuka iyoo. Abantu bobe nabasanswa, nangufye balefulumukila ku Saiprasi, nako kwine tabakaye iikalilako ku matwi tondolo." 
Isaiah23:13 Moneni icalo ca bena Kaludea balilobafye bonse nakalya nakalya. Abena Asiria ebalekele inama sha mpanga esho shise mukulaikala mu musumba wa Turi. Bena Asiria ebaishile kuulako impungu pakutebelela umusumba, ebabongolwele na malinga ya musumba wa Turi, no kuusha icibolya." 
Isaiah23:14 Pumenipo imisowa, imwe mwe benda na mato ya ku Tashishi. Umusumba uo mwashintilemo umutima, naonaika." 
Isaiah23:15 Inshita imo ikafika ilyo Turi akalabikwako pa myaka amakumi cine lubali (70), imyaka iyo imfumu imo ifwile yakokolapo pano calo. Iyo myaka amakumi cine lubali nga yapwa, elyo abantu bakalaimba Turi kwati ni cilende abati," 
Isaiah23:16 “Buula iseese lyobe, pitana mu musumba, iwe we kacilende kalabikwako. Ale akulisha iseese bwino, akwimba nakabili inyimbo shobe ishingi, uleke abatemwikwa bobe bakwibukisheko.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Iyo myaka amakumi cine lubali (70) nga yapwa, Yawe akaleka Turi alebomba nakabili umulimo wakwe uwakale uwabusulwishi, Turi wine akalaisulwisha ku fyalo ifya shamfumu shonse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse." 
Isaiah23:18 Lelo indalama isho akalamwenamo bakalashituula kuli Yawe. Tabakaleshitutila kumo iyoo, pantu bonse ababombela Yawe nisho ndalama esho bakalabuula pakushitamo ifyakulya ne fyakufwala ifyo bakalakabila." 
Isaiah24:1 Cenjeleni, Yawe akonaula isonde lyonse, no kulishafye amatololo. Akalifulunganya lyonse, no kusalanganya abantu abaikalamo." 
Isaiah24:2 Cikaba cimo cine kuli bashimapepo na ku bantu bene, kuli bashikulwibo na ku basha babo bene abaume, kuli banakulwibo na ku basha babo bene abanakashi, kuli bakashita na kuli bakashitisha bene, kuli bakakongola na kuli bakakongwesha bene ku bakankala na ku balanda bene." 
Isaiah24:3 Isonde lyonse likonaika, kabili tamwakashale kantu iyoo. Yawe nasosa, no kucita efyo akacita." 
Isaiah24:4 Ala isonde lilekaminwa no kulaumina, icalo conse cileumina no kubonsa, isonde lilelobela pamo no mulu." 
Isaiah24:5 Abantu nabakowesha isonde ku mulandu wakupula amafunde no kulufyanya ifipope fyakwa Lesa, na ku mulandu wakonaula icipangano ico apangana nabo ukuti balecisunga pe" 
Isaiah24:6 Tepapa nomba Lesa natiipwila isonde pakuti lyonaike. Abantu abaikalamo ebailetelele abene. E mulandu wine abantu bakapiila, abakulashalapo abomi bancepelafye." 
Isaiah24:7 Imyangashi ilebonsa, no mwangashi nao nacafya pakuumona. Bonse abalekwata insansa kale, nomba nabafiitwa." 
Isaiah24:8 Insombo shansansa nashileka ukulila, icongo cafyangalo nacipwa, amaseese yansansa nayaleka." 
Isaiah24:9 Abantu nomba tabaleimba nyimbo shansansa pa nshita balenwa umwangashi uukola no bwalwa nabulula ku banwa. 
Isaiah24:10 Fyonse mu musumba filifye icimfulumfulu, amayanda yonse nayesalwa pakulesha abantu ukulaingilamo." 
Isaiah24:11 Abantu balungumenefye mu misebo, balelila umwangashi. Insansa nashipwilililafye pano isonde, ukusamwa kwalwike kubundumana." 
Isaiah24:12 Mu musumba mulifye ifitantala, ne mpongolo shauko nashitobaika." 
Isaiah24:13 Efyo cikaponena imishobo ya bantu bonse isonde lyonse. Cibaka nga filya ciba ilyo ukulobolola ifisabo kupwa, ilyo bakunta ifitwalo ku miolifa yonse, ilyo baswa ne fitwalo fya pakulekelesha ku myangashi." 
Isaiah24:14 Abakapusukapo bakalaimba ne nsansa. Aba ku masamba bakalayawila ululumbi lwakwa Yawe utupundu. 
Isaiah24:15 Na ba ku kabanga nabo bene bakalalumbanya Yawe. Abantu abaikala mu fishi, nabaikala mu lulamba lwa bemba, bakalalumbanya Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli." 
Isaiah24:16 Tukalaumfwa inyimbo ishikalafuma mu mpela ye sonde lyonse, ishakulumbanya ukuti, “Ubucindami ku Mulungami.” Nomba ine natile nati, “Nalupwa, ine nalupwa! Iye ne mulanda! Abasangu bacili balesangukila Yawe, no kufutuka kwabo kwile kulebipilakofye.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Imwe mwe bantu ba pano isonde, ala mwapya, amacinga yalya yalemulolela pamo pene ne fitembo." 
Isaiah24:18 Uulefulumuka icinkunka alewila mu bucinga, no ulepusumukamo mu bucinga aleikatwa ku citembo. Umulu wakulafumfumuna imfula no mufula we sonde lyonse wakulatenta." 
Isaiah24:19 Isonde lyonse lyalepauka, isonde line nalyonaika, lyasunkanishiwa bubi bubi pa maka." 
Isaiah24:20 Isonde lyonse lyakulatalansuka ngo muntu uukolelwe ubwalwa, lyakulasunkana nga kamusakuta ako icimwela cilepukanya. Icalo conse cikontamine panshi kulwa bufibi bwaciko, calaifubula panshi, no kwima tacakatale acima nakabili." 
Isaiah24:21 Muli ubo bushiku, mu mulu mwine, Yawe akalimuna ifita fya mu mulu ifyamusangukila, na pano isonde pene akalimuna na bakateeka ababa pano isonde." 
Isaiah24:22 Lesa akatitikanya pamo ishamfumu shonse mu cimukanda cimo kwati bafungwa. Akashisalila mu cifungo ukushinta napo ikafikila inshita iyakushilimwinapo. 
Isaiah24:23 Pa mweshi pakafiita, akasuba nako kakaleka ukubalika, pantu Yawe umwine wa fita eukaba imfumu iikalateeka mu Yerusalemu pa lupili lwa Sioni, ne ntungulushi sha bantu bakwe shikalatamba ubucindami bakwe." 
Isaiah25:1 We Yawe, ala niwe Lesa wandi, ine nakulakulumbanya kabili nakulatasha ishina lyobe, pantu mu cishinka cobe naucita ifintu ifyakupapa, naufikilishafye bwino bwino ifyo wapangile kale ukuficita." 
Isaiah25:2 Pantu nausangula umusumba umwina wa fitantala, na malinga yauko iwe nauyawisha. Amayanda ya bashamfumu ayo abalwani besu bakuula, awe nomba tayalipo, kabili tayakatale ayakuulwa nakabili." 
Isaiah25:3 Eco na bantu ba mitundu yamaka bakulakulumbanya, eco bakalakutiinina na mu misumba ya bantu ba mishobo iyikali." 
Isaiah25:4 Pantu ni kuli iwe abalanda babutukila, pamo na bantu abashakwata uwakubafwa, ni kuli iwe bashina mu nshita shabwafya. Niwe bobamo imfula ya cimwela, niwe cintelelwe bobamo icipuki ca kasuba. Pantu abantu abakali babasansa nge mfula ye kanda ŋombe iyileuma pa cibumba," 
Isaiah25:5 elyo besa nge cipuki ica mu ciswebebe. Nomba we Yawe nautalalika tondolo abalwani besu, nautalalika akawele ka bantu abakali, nga filya fine icintelelwe ce kumbi citalalika akasuba akabalikisha." 
Isaiah25:6 Pali luno lupili lwa Sioni epo Yawe umwine wa fita akatebeta bwino abantu ba mitundu yonsefye iya pano isonde. Pakaba amaliila aya fyakulya ifyawamisha nganshi, inama ishisuma no mwangashi uwawamisha." 
Isaiah25:7 Ni pano pene epo akafumishapo ne cisalu icafimba abantu aba mitundu yonse, ne cisalu icakupa pa mishobo shonse." 
Isaiah25:8 Yawe akamina no konaula ne mfwa ine umuyayaya. Akakumuna ifilamba mu menso ya bantu bonse, na pesonde ponse akasebulula abantu bakwe insoni. Yawe nasosa umwine." 
Isaiah25:9 Ilyo ifyo fintu fikacitika, elyo abantu bonse bakalatila abati, “Uyu e Lesa wesu, uo twalelolela ukuti atupusushe, e Yawe uyo twaletetekela. Ifwe twalemutetekela, e mulandu wine nomba tuleangila no kulasansamuka, pantu natupususha.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kukatuusha pa lupili lwa Sioni, lelo abena Moabu bena bakanyantaulwapo, nga filya fine impimbili shinyantaulwapo muli citindi uuli mu mukanda." 
Isaiah25:11 Bakalati baimya amaboko yabo, kwati bantu baleeshako ukowa, lelo Yawe ena akalabakumpila amaboko panshi pakubapwisha icilumba." 
Isaiah25:12 Lesa akonaula amalinga yonse aya mu calo ca Moabu, akayawisha, kabili akayalangula panshi no kuyatobaula mu lukungu." 
Isaiah26:1 Pali ubo bushiku abantu ba mu calo ca Yuda bakemba ulwimbo ulu ulwakutila: Ifwe twalikwata umusumba uwamaka. Lesa umwine eucingililako amalinga yauko. 
Isaiah26:2 Isuleniko ifiibi fya pa mpongolo, muleke bengile abantu ba mushobo uucita ifyalungama, umushobo uwatetekela." 
Isaiah26:3 We Yawe, abantu ababikisha amano kuli iwe, kabili abakutetekela, ulabalenga ukwikala mu mutelelwe uwine wine." 
Isaiah26:4 Ala muletetekela Yawe lyonsefye, pantu ni Yawe, cine cinefye ni Yawe umwine e cilibwe cesu ca pe." 
Isaiah26:5 Alacefya abantu bacilumba abaisansabalika, alonaula umusumba wamaka uwasansuka, alawisha amalinga yauko no kuyatobaula mu lukungu." 
Isaiah26:6 Aleka amakasa yaunyantaule, amakasa ya bapina na balanda." 
Isaiah26:7 We Yawe, ulalungika inshila ya bololoke, inshila yabo ulailinganya bwino bwino, pantu uli mulungami." 
Isaiah26:8 Cacine we Yawe, mukukonka amafunde yobe emo tukulolela, kwishina lyobe ne cibukisho cobe ekwalola ukukabila kwa mitima yesu." 
Isaiah26:9 Ine ndakufuluka nganshi pa nshita ya bushiku, icine cine umweo wandi ulakufwaisha; Ilyo ukalubulwisha abekalacalo, elyo bonse bakeshiba ifyo ubololoke bwawama." 
Isaiah26:10 Nangu kwena iwe utentemba abantu ababifi, bena tabeshako ukucita ifyalungama nakalya. Nangufye muli cino calo ca bantu abawamya, awe namo mwine balufyanyamofye, balakaana ukusumina ubufumu bobe ubwalulumbi we Yawe." 
Isaiah26:11 We Yawe nawimya ukuboko kobe, nomba abalwani bobe tabaishiba ukuti iwe ulalimuna. Leka bamoneko ifyo iwe wapimpa pa bantu bobe, epakuti bekatwe ne nsoni. Leka umulilo uo wapekanishisha abalwani bobe uboce." 
Isaiah26:12 We Yawe niwe utuletela umutende, pantu fyonsefye ifyo ifwe tumona mukubomba, niwe ulenga tulefimona." 
Isaiah26:13 We Yawe, we Lesa wesu, nangu imfumu shimbi shalituteekapo, lelo ishina lyobefye elyo tucindika." 
Isaiah26:14 Pali nomba ishamfumu isho shalifwa, tashakabwele kukwisa ikala pano calo nakabili. Imipashi yashiko tayakatubuukile nakalya, pantu iwe walishikanda, no kushonaula walishonaula. Takwaba nangu umo nomba uushibukisha." 
Isaiah26:15 We Yawe naukusha umushobo wesu, na pakucita ifi, nauicindamika, pantu naukusha imipaka ya calo cesu." 
Isaiah26:16 We Yawe, mu kucucutika kwabo emo bakufwaile, nabo epakulakupapata pa nshita walebalimuna." 
Isaiah26:17 We Yawe, walileka tulekulilila, nga filya fikuuta umwanakashi ilyo alecula no kushikitika pakupapa." 
Isaiah26:18 Twali nga fwe baimita no kukomwa amafumo, lelo tatwamwenepo cintu twafyele nakalya, mwelafye weka wafumine. Tatwamonapo ico twabombela isonde nakalya, Tatwacitapo nelyo cimo icakulenga ukupususha." 
Isaiah26:19 Abantu bobe abafwa, bakaba abomi nakabili, ne fitumbi fyabo fikabuuka. Bonse abalala mu nindi shabo bakabuuka, bakalaaula no tupundu. Pantu nga filya fine umume utalalika icalo no kulenga ifimenwa ukupuuka, efyo nobe we Yawe ukabuusha abafwa kale." 
Isaiah26:20 Mwe bantu bandi, aleni ingileni mu mayanda yenu, mwisaleko ne fiibi. Mubelameko pa kashita kanono, cisuke icipyu cakwa Lesa cipwe." 
Isaiah26:21 Pantu Yawe afuma uko ekala, alaisa kukukanda abantu ba pano isonde pa mulandu wa bubifi bwabo. Ubupondo ubwacitika mu bumfisolo pano isonde bwalasokoloka, umushili tawakafise kabili imibili ya bantu abo baipailapo." 
Isaiah27:1 Pali ubo ubushiku Yawe akabuula ulupanga lwakwe ulukulu ulwatwa kabili ulwakosa, no kukanda cishimweshimwe ci Lefiatani, cilya cisoka icifulumuka pakwenda, icisoka cilya ci Lefiatani icifyongana. Akasalipa na cilya cimwansakabinga icaikala muli bemba." 
Isaiah27:2 Pali ubo bushiku Yawe akalaimba palwe bala lyakwe ilisuma ilya mwangashi ati," 
Isaiah27:3 “Nine ne Yawe uulisunga akasuba no bushiku, nine nditapilila lyonsefye. Ndelilindilila epakuti abantu tabalelyonaula." 
Isaiah27:4 Nindeka nomba ukulafulilwa ibala lya myangashi. Nga cakuti mwamena imyunga na bacilasa, ine kuti nafinyantaula no kufyoca fyonse." 
Isaiah27:5 Nomba abalwani ba bantu bandi bena nga balefwaya ukulashina kuli ine, nabese tumfwane nabo ukucita umutende. Ee, nabesefye tukwate nabo icibote.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Pali ubo bushiku Yakobo akashangatisha nge miti ya mishila, Israeli akulakula bwino no kubalula ubuluba, akesusha icalo ku fitwalo." 
Isaiah27:7 Yawe talimuna mu bukali abena Israeli, nga filya acita abalwani babo iyoo, kabili abena Israeli tabafwilwa bantu abengi, nga filya caba ku balwani babo." 
Isaiah27:8 Yawe alilimwine abantu bakwe pakubatamfisha muli bunkole. Alibolwile ne cimwela icikali icitula ku kabanga. 
Isaiah27:9 Ifyabubifi fya bena Israeli bamwana Yakobo tafyakabelelwe luse nakalya, kanofye ilyo abena Israeli bakapwa ukushonaula amabwe yonse aya fibumbili fya malambo. Kabili ifyabubifi fyabo tafyakasendwe, kano bakapwe ukonaula inceshi shonse isha mulungu Ashera, ne fibumbili fya malambo fyonse ifyakufutumwinapo ububani." 
Isaiah27:10 Umusumba wa malinga ushelefye icibolya. Mushelefye swi nga mu matololo. Musangwike nomba emwakucemena iŋombe, emo shilila no kutuushisha. Utumpusa tonse shalipulula." 
Isaiah27:11 Imisambo ya miti nayuma, no kukontoka ilekontoka, abanakashi eyo baleteeba inkuni. Pantu balya bantu tababa na mano, eico na Lesa Kabumba wabo ashabalangulukileko, nangufye ukubabelelako uluse." 
Isaiah27:12 Pali ubo bushiku Yawe umwine ewalaisa pingula abantu bakwe abena Israeli, ukutampilafye ku lutwe lumo ulwa calo, ukuya shintafye na ku lutwe lunankwe, ukutendekelafye ku mumana wa Yufurate, ukuya pelelafye na ku kamana mainsa aka pa mupaka wa calo ca Egupto. Akamulonganya umo umo imwe bamwana Israeli." 
Isaiah27:13 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika, ipenga likalila ilyakwita abena Israeli bonse abalobelele mu calo ca Asiria, na babutukile ku calo ca Egupto. Bakabwela, bakesa mukulapepela Yawe mu Yerusalemu, pa lupili lwakwe ulwamushilo." 
Isaiah28:1 Yalishama amataki ya bacakolwa wa bena Efulemu. Ukucindama kwabo kwile kulepwa, kwati citebo ca maluba ayalebonsa. Walishama umusumba wabo uwabela pa mulu we wanga ilyafunda, umwaikala abantu abanashiwa ku mwangashi." 
Isaiah28:2 Moneni, Yawe alipo na umo uwabulamba, uo alatuma nge mfula ya mabwe, nge cipungufula. Akesa nge cikuku cabonaushi, nge lyeshi ilifimbene ilileisa ulubilo. Kabili akacifuntula panshi na maka." 
Isaiah28:3 Icitebo ca maluba icamataki ica bacakolwa wa bena Efulemu ala cileisa nyantaulwapo. 
Isaiah28:4 Ukucindama kwa musumba wabo kulepwa, ulya uwabela pa mulu we wanga ilyafunda, awe kwalapwa nga makunyu aya bangililapo ukutwala mu mwaka, ayo abantu bamona no kusaba no kuya lyafye lilya line yapya." 
Isaiah28:5 Pali ubo bushiku Yawe umwine wa fita ewalaisa ba kwati e ŋana ya maluba kabili iyalulumbi, iyakuti abantu bakwe abalepusuka baleitakishishapo." 
Isaiah28:6 Abantu abaputula imilandu ya banabo ni Lesa ewaisa balangako umwalola umulinganya, kabili ewaisa kosha na bantu abatamfya abalwani balya besa mukusansa impongolo sha musumba." 
Isaiah28:7 Na bakasesema bene kumo kwine na bashimapepo, nabo bene tepakukolwa ubwalwa kabili balatalansuka pakwenda. Balanwa nganshi umwangashi uukola ne fikola fimbi ifyamaka, icakuti alewishikanafye kulwa kufulungana amano. Bakasesema nabakolwa icakuti balefilwa no kwiluka ifimonwa ifyo Lesa alebalanga. Na bashimapepo bene nabo nabakolwa icakuti balefilwa no kuputula imilandu iyo abantu baleleta uko bali." 
Isaiah28:8 Amatebulo yabo umo bekala nayalamba yonse ku malushi, tapali nangu pamo apashele apasuma." 
Isaiah28:9 Balailishanya abati, “Bushe ulya Esaya abo alefwaya ukufunda, ni bani? Bushe ni bani alelondolwela amashiwi yakwe? Bushe alefunda utunya utusumwike kwibele nangu utwaice utwaleka ukonka?" 
Isaiah28:10 Esaya ena pakufunda aikalilafye ati, ‘Mulecita ifi ne fi, ifunde pefunde, umulingo pa mulingo, akaninini apa, akanini palya.’”" 
Isaiah28:11 Cisuma balya nga tabalefwaya kulaumfwa kuli ine, kanshi ninshi Yawe umwine akabatumine abenafyalo, ababulubusa pakulanda mu ndimi shimbi shimbi, uleke ebo bakese mukulabafunda." 
Isaiah28:12 Nikuli balya bene Lesa atile, “Ici e cifulo cenu icakutuushapo, iseni bonse mwe banaka pakuti mulepemwinako,” lelo bena balikaana ukumumfwa." 
Isaiah28:13 Eico Yawe alanda amashiwi kuli bena ati, “Mulecita ifi ne fi, ifunde pefunde, umulingo pa mulingo, akanini apa akanini palya, pakuti bawe cimfutyanuma pakwenda bafunike, bawile mu citeyo no kubekata bunkole.”" 
Isaiah28:14 Umfweni ifyo Yawe alesosa imwe mwe bantu bacilumba, mwe bateeka aba bantu ba muno Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:15 Imwe mulaitakisha ukuti mwalyumfwana ne mfwa, nokuti imwe mwalipangana ne calo ca bafwa. Imwe mwalishininkisha ukuti icinkunka ilyo cikesa, imwe tacakamukume iyoo, pantu imwe mwaikalila ubufi no bucenjeshi pakuti efyo filemupusushako." 
Isaiah28:16 Kanshi nomba Imfumu Yawe aletila ati, “Moneni ndebika ilibwe mu Sioni, ilibwe limo ilyakosa, ilibwe lya petungi ilyacindamisha ilyakukosha umufula. Onse uwacetekela takafupuke." 
Isaiah28:17 Umulinganya ewalaba umwando uwakupiminako ubutali bwa mufula, no bulungami e kacela ka ku mwando akakupiminako ukololoka kwa mufula. Elyo imfula yacitalawe yena eikapwisha ubufi bwenu bonse ubo mwaikalila, ne lyeshi elikesa senda ifyo mupusukilamo.”" 
Isaiah28:18 Icumfwano cenu ico imwe mwaumfwana ne mfwa, ala cikapwa, ne cipangano ico mwapangana ne calo ca bafwa, ala naco cine tacakeminine. Ilyo icinkunka icabipisha cikesa tamwakashanseko iyoo." 
Isaiah28:19 Lyonsefye ilyo capita cikamwikata, cikalapita umo inshiku shicela. Cikamupukanya akasuba no bushiku. Nga cakuti ifi fintu mwafitesha uko filolele, awe mwakulaisokonenafye ku mwenso." 
Isaiah28:20 Cikaba nge pinda ilyatila, umuntu aleesha ukutambalala pa kamusengele akepi nganshi, no kwesha ukufimbana akalangeti akalifye nga kapiti ku buce." 
Isaiah28:21 Yawe akabilimuka pakulwisha, nga filya fine acitile pa lupili lwa Pelasimu na mwishika ya Gibeoni, epakuti akabombepo cimo ico apanga ukubomba, nangu kwena ico akacitapo cilemoneka ukuba icintu cimbi cimbifye. Kwena akapwisha umulimo wakwe, noyo mulimo, ala wabwile." 
Isaiah28:22 Kanshi imwe mwilaseka amuti fyamipulwe ifyo ine ndemweba. Nga mwalacita ifyo, awe ninshi cikamwafya ukumona umwakupusukila. Ine ninjumfwila uko Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita alepanga ukonaula icalo conse." 
Isaiah28:23 Imwe kutikeni kufyo ine ndesosa, poseniko amano kufyo ine ndemweba." 
Isaiah28:24 Bushe umulimi akonkanyapofye ukulima ukwabula ukubyala? Bushe akonkanyapofye ukusankabula no kulinganya umushila epela? 
Isaiah28:25 Umulimi onse atila nga apwa ukupekanya umushili, elyo abyalamo imbuto ishili nga isha busoshi ne sha mponso. Atandamo bwino bwino iŋanu na male, elyo mu mbali lwa mu mpela abyalamo na masaka." 
Isaiah28:26 Umulimi alishiba bwino ifyakucita, pantu ni Lesa ewamufunda." 
Isaiah28:27 Tabomfya icela icatwa pakupuma inseke sha busoshi, kabili tabomfya umupeto we celeta pakupuma imponso. Inseke sha busoshi bapumina ku kamulando akangwikeko, kabili imponso bapumina ku kamuti akalingile." 
Isaiah28:28 Tonaula ŋanu mukulashipulaula ukwabula ukuleka iyoo. Alishiba ukusokola iŋanu mukupishapo iceleta ukwabula ukushishonaula. 
Isaiah28:29 Amano ayakucita ifi fyonse, ala yatula kuli Yawe umwine wa fita. Ifyo Lesa apekanya, fya mano yeka yeka, kabinge filabombafye bwino lyonse." 
Isaiah29:1 Ukacimona iwe Arieli, iwe Arieli we musumba uo Davidi akuulilemo insakwe. Lekeni papitepo umwaka umo nangu ibili, pakuti ne nshikunkulu shikalamba ne shinono shipwe ukupita," 
Isaiah29:2 ninshi Lesa aisa kukonaula umusumba uwitwa “Arieli.” Kukaba imisowa no kutibinta ifilamba, elintu no musumba wine nomba ukaaluka ubulambo." 
Isaiah29:3 Ni Lesa eukesa tantika ifita fyakwe nge linga pakulibila umusumba, eukesa ushinga no kuusansa eukausansa." 
Isaiah29:4 Nomba iwe we Yerusalemu ukatelentenshiwa, ukalanda ninshi uli panshi, ukufuma mu mushili ishiwi lyobe likomwfika panonofye. Ukaba ngo mulungulwa uuleyakashako ukulandapo fimo pa nshita uli mu mushili, uuletusaila pakulanda pa nshita uli mu lufukutu." 
Isaiah29:5 Iwe Yerusalemu, abalwani bobe bonse abakusansa bakolululwa ngo lukungu, ne fita fyabo ifikali fikolululwa nge misungu. Elyo iwe ukwabula no kwenekela," 
Isaiah29:6 ukapulikilwafye icibulukutu icamaka, ne cinkukuma, ne congo icikalamba, fyatula kuli Yawe umwine wa fita pakwisa kukukupusushako. Akatuma ne cimwela, na kankungwe, no lubingu lwa mulilo ulwakocafye icoce oce." 
Isaiah29:7 Ifita fya bantu ba mishobo yonse ifiwililila umusumba wa Arieli, kumo kwine ne fyanso fyabo ifya nkondo, ne fipe fyabo fine fimbi, emukuti fyonsefye, ala fikongoloka nge ciloto, nangu nge cimonwa ca mu nshita ya bushiku." 
Isaiah29:8 Cikaba ngo muntu uulele utulo kulwa kufwa ulushile, elyo mu tulo alota ukuti nomba alelyapo icakulya, elyo cilya abuuka mu tulo, asanga ukuti ali ne yakuluka umulopa. Nangu cikaba ngo muntu uulefwaya ukufwa kulwa cilaka, elyo mu tulo alalota ukuti nomba alenwa amenshi, elyo cilya aisa santamuka mu tulo kabili asanga ukuti ku mukoshi kucili nakulatauka kulwa cilaka. Efyo cikaba ku bantu aba mishobo yonse abalongana kukuwililila ulupili lwa Sioni." 
Isaiah29:9 Aleni mutiine kabili mupape. Aleni ipofwishenifye mwilamona. Mulekolwafye, lelo te ku mwangashi! Muletalansukafye, nangu mushinwenepo bwalwa ubwalumisha!" 
Isaiah29:10 Pantu Yawe nalenga ukuti imwe muleshipula, pakuti mupone mu tulo utwine twine. Bakasesema alibashibatika amenso, na bakamona babo Lesa alibafimba amenso." 
Isaiah29:11 Umulolele ifimonwa fyonse ifyo kasesema amona, imwe cakulakaana ukulamwebako. Umulolele ifimonwa imwe cikaba kwati ni kalata uwapetwa, uwaisalwa bwino bwino ne nshimbi. Nga wamutwala ku muntu umo uwaishiba ukubelenga pakuti eo akubelengeleko, uyo muntu kuti aya kwebafye ati, “Awe ine nafilwa, pantu kalata alikomenenwa ne nshimbi.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Nga wamutwala ku muntu umo uushaishiba kubelenga, ena kuti aya kwebafye ati, “Awe ine nshaishiba kubelenga.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Yawe aletila ati, “Aba bantu bena batila abati balampepa, kanshi bancindikafye pa tunwa twabo, lelo imitima yabo yataluka nganshi kuli ine. Ifyebo fya bantunse ne fishilano fyabo, efyo bebukishafye ku mutwe, bena e pepo lyabo." 
Isaiah29:14 Kanshi ine nakulabapapusha ilyo nakulakonkanya ukulabalimuna. Abakwatapo amano balesanguka ifipuba, no bucenjeshi bwabo tabwalebombapo kasuma nelyo kamo.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Bakacimona abantu abesha ukulafisa Yawe ifyo bapanga ukucita. Ifyo bapanga ukucita, bena baficitilafye mu mfifi mu bumfisolo, no kutontonkanya ukuti takwaba nelyo umo uubamona, nangu uwishiba ifyo balecita." 
Isaiah29:16 Bena fyonse bafiloshafye mumbi mumbi. Bushe pa ubumba inongo ne bumba line, icacindamapo cinshi? Bushe icintu ico umuntu umo apanga, kuti ecalaeba umuntu uwacipanga aciti, “Ala tewe wa mpanga.” Nangu bushe kuti inongo eyalaeba uwaibumba aiti, “Iwe, awe tawaishiba kantu.”" 
Isaiah29:17 Abantu balasosa ukuti apaba iteshi, teti pakokole kuba ibala, na paba ibala, teti pakokole kuba iteshi. Bushe Lebanoni takalulwe ukuba ibala ilyafunda?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ilyo ubo bushiku bukafika, bankomamatwi bakalaumfwako ilyo bakalabelenga icitabo cimo, ne mpofu isho pa menso pafiita fititi, nasho nomba shikalalolesha." 
Isaiah29:19 Abantu abafyefye na balanda bene bakalashukila nakabili insansa isho Yawe Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli apeela abantu. 
Isaiah29:20 Abankalwe bakaloba, abasaalula Lesa nabo tabakekalilile pe iyoo, na bonse abasekelela mukucita ifyabubifi bakonaulwa no kuloba." 
Isaiah29:21 Lesa akalofya bonse ababepesha abanabo imilandu, akalofya na balya bonse abalesha ukulimuna bampulamafunde, na balya bonse ababepa ubufi pakufyengelesha abantu abakaele mu milandu yabo iyalungama." 
Isaiah29:22 Kanshi nomba efyo Yawe alanda palwa ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo, Lesa uwalubwile Abrahamu, aletila ati, “Mwe bakwa Yakobo, awe tamwakasebane na limbi iyoo, tamwakalefulika menso nakabili kulwa nsoni iyoo." 
Isaiah29:23 Pantu mukalamona abana benu abo ine nkalamupeela, mukalacindika ishina lyandi. Elyo mukalashininkisha nokuti kanshi ine nine Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Yakobo, mukalacindika ne Lesa wakwa Israeli mukulankwatila na katiina." 
Isaiah29:24 Abalubantika bakalakwata amano, na bantu abailishanya apo shicela nabo bene bakalaumfwa insansa ilyo bakalafundwako.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Yawe nasosa ukuti, “Bakacimona abana abatalama. Abo abacitafye ifyo ine nshabeba ukucita, kabili bacita ifipangano ifishilingene no bufwayo bwa Mupashi wandi, ecilenga nokuti balelunda ububifi pa bubifi." 
Isaiah30:2 Bena babutukila ku Egupto pakuti balebafwako, elyo ukwabula nokuti baletala banjipusha nakalya. Bafwaya icalo ca Egupto eco cilebapokololako, e mulandu wine babutukila kuli Farao imfumu ya cilya calo." 
Isaiah30:3 Ala Farao akabalenga ukusebana, no kubutukila ku Egupto pakuti balebafwako nako kwine kukafulungana." 
Isaiah30:4 Pantu nangu inkombe shabo shifikile kale ku musumba wa Soani, no kufika nabafika ku Hanesi mu calo ca Egupto," 
Isaiah30:5 kwena abena Yuda bonse bakekatwe nsoni pakutetekela umutundu wa bantu ababula incito kuli bena, uushingabafwa nangu ukubatuulako kanofye ukubaletela insoni no musebanya." 
Isaiah30:6 “Pa fiswango fya mu matololo ya Negebu, ine ne Lesa ndesobelapo aya mashiwi ayakutila, ‘Inkombe shilapitana mu calo umwafula ifiswango, mulya mwaikala inkalalamo ishilume ne shikota, umwaba ne nsoka ishikali na fishimweshimwe ifipupuka. Shilya nkombe shilasendela ifyuma pali bapunda na pa ngamila napo ifyabupe ifyamutengo, ifyakutwalila umushobo wa bantu uushakabanonkeshe nelyo cimo." 
Isaiah30:7 Ifyo icalo ca Egupto cibafwilishako, awe fintufye ifyabuwelewele. Kanshi nomba ishina lye shobo ilyo nainika Egupto, lishina lya Rahabu mundyafye.’”" 
Isaiah30:8 Lesa alinjebele ine ukuti nembe mu citabo cimo imisango ya bantu, epakuti cibe e cikambone ca pe icakubashinina." 
Isaiah30:9 Pantu abantu pefye balatalamina Yawe, balabepa ubufi, balakaana no kulaumfwa ifyo Yawe alebafunda." 
Isaiah30:10 Balalesha bakamona ukubalondolwela ifimonwa. Beba bakasesema abati, “Imwe mwilatweba fintu ifyacishinka ifitucena iyoo, muletwebafye ifyakutusansamusha. Lekeni fwe bene tulecita ifyo tuleimwena ukuti efyalolamo." 
Isaiah30:11 Ala imwe fumenifye mu nshila, mwilatucinga iyoo. Ifwe mwilatukomya mu congo palwakwa Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Lelo Uwamushilo uwakwa Israeli ena aletila ati, “Pa mulandu wakuti imwe mulasuula ifyo ine mweba, no kwikala mwaikalilafye umucusha no bucenjeshi," 
Isaiah30:13 ala imwe mwalikwata umulandu. Nobu bubi buli kuli imwe nge linga ilitali, ilyaba no mulale ukutula pamulu ukwisa fikafye na panshi, kabili ilyatundama, mukapulikilwafye nalibongoloka." 
Isaiah30:14 Likasansaikafye lyonse kwati ni nongo ye bumba, icakuti tapakashale iciinga icikulu nelyo cimo icingalinga no kulapwilapo umulilo, nangu ukutapilako amenshi mu cishima.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Imfumu Yawe, Uwamushilo uwakwa Israeli, alesosa ukuti, “Mukubwelela kuli ine no kutuusha emo mukapusukila. Nga mwatekanya no kuncetekela, lyena ninshi mwakulakwata amaka. Nomba imwe mulakaana." 
Isaiah30:16 Mwatile, ‘Tukafulumuka abalwani besu pali bakabalwe ba lubilo.’ Ee, mulalungika, akufulumukenifye. Mulatontonkanya ukuti bakabalwe benu ba lubilo nganshi, cisuma, nomba abakumusupila bakamucila imwe ulubilo." 
Isaiah30:17 Imwe abantu benu ikana limo bakulafulumuka ilyo babatiinya ku mulwani wenu umo mpo, na balwani benu basanofye bakamukunkunika imwe bonse ulubilo, mukasuke amushala ngo mulongoti uwaba pa mulu wa lupili, ngo luunga lweka ulwakulapepeeluka pa kapili.”" 
Isaiah30:18 Nangu cakulaba ifyo, Yawe wena akulamulolela imwe pakuti alemupaala. Ena alefwaya ukulamubelelako uluse, pantu pefye Yawe e Lesa uucita ifyalolamo. Ala ishuko lisangwafye mukutetekela Yawe." 
Isaiah30:19 Elyo nao Esaya akonkenyepo ati, “Imwe mwe bena Sioni, mwe baikala mu Yerusalemu, tamwakalelila filamba nakabili iyoo. Yawe akaba no luse nga mwakuuta mutuule. Ilyo akomfwa lyena akamwasuka." 
Isaiah30:20 Kwena nangu Yawe amulenge ukupita mu macushi na mafya nga filya mulya no kunwa cila bushiku, nomba kafundisha akalabapo pakumufunda. Takalefisama iyoo, nemwe ninshi nomba mukalamushimpamo na menso." 
Isaiah30:21 Nga mwalapumba mu nshila, no kulalola ku kulyo nangu ku kuso, mukalaumfwa ishiwi lyakwe lyamweba aliti, ‘Ala inshila ino kuno, eyo mukonke.’" 
Isaiah30:22 Utulubi twenu tulya utwaengelelwako silifa na tulya utwaengelelwako golide, mukatubuula no kuya tuposa nga filya baposa ubusali, mukatila no kuti, ‘Kabiyeni uko, mwe finangwa mwe.’" 
Isaiah30:23 “Na lyonsefye ilyo mukalabyala imbuto mu mabala yenu, Yawe akalaleta imfula iyakushimesha no kukusha ifikalamenamo, namo mukalafuma ifisabo ifine fine. Ne ŋombe shenu shikalakwata incende ishingi umwakuti shikaleliila umulemfwe." 
Isaiah30:24 Bacilume wa ŋombe shenu na bapunda benu, shilya nama muliminako amabala yenu, shikalalya icani icawamisha nganshi kabili icafulisha nganshi." 
Isaiah30:25 Ubushiku imisumba ya malinga ya balwani benu ikapokwa no kwipaululamo abantu abaikalamo, elyo mu mpili shonse na mu tupili tonse mukatumuka imilonga ya menshi." 
Isaiah30:26 Umweshi ukabalika nga kasuba, akasuba nako kakabalikisha ukucilamo. Ulubuuto lwa kako lukaba kwati lwa nshiku cine lubali elwabalikila capamo pa kasuba kamo kene. Ifi fyonse fikacitika ilyo Yawe akakakila no kuundapa ifilonda ifyo aletela abantu bakwe.”" 
Isaiah30:27 Kabili Esaya atile ati, “Mwamona, amaka yakwa Yawe no bucindami bwakwe, filya filemonekela apatali. Umulilo ne cushi efilelanga icipyu cakwe. Ilyo akulalanda, amashiwi yakwe yakulabilima ngo mulilo uuleoca." 
Isaiah30:28 Pakwisa Lesa natuma umwela uuleisa nge lyeshi lya menshi ayakuti yafika na mu mukoshi. Nao ulekumbulula imishobo ya benafyalo ngo kusensa kwa ku lupe, akabakobeka ne ntambo iyakubafulunganya nga ilya bakaka punda." 
Isaiah30:29 “Lelo imwe mwe bantu bakwa Lesa, awe imwe mukalasansamuka, mukalaimba ne nyimbo nga shilya shine mwimba pa nshita ya bushiku, ilyo kuba inshikunkulu iyakucindikamo Lesa. Mwakulasansamuka nga balya bantu benda umulongo, ninshi na bamutolilo balelila pantanshi pakuya ku lupili lwakwa Yawe, icilibwe cakwa Israeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Yawe akaleka abantu bonse bomfwe ishiwi lyakwe ilyakatama, akaleka bomfwe apapela ne cipyu cakwe. Kukaba ulubingu lwa mulilo, no kupanta, ne mfula yacitalawe, ne mfula ya mabwe." 
Isaiah30:31 Abena Asiria bakulaikankilafye ku mwenso ilyo bakomfwa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe, no kumfwisha apapela ubukali bwakwe." 
Isaiah30:32 Lyonse ilyo Yawe akulabalimuna, abantu bakwe nabo elyo bakalisha insombo no kulisha amaseese. Ni Yawe umwine ewalaisa lwisha abena Asiria." 
Isaiah30:33 Ala ni kale bapekanya icininkwa ca mulilo umwakocela imfumu ya Asiria, mu mukanda uwashika kabili uukulu, ne nkuni shaisulamo pa. Ni Yawe eukesa putapo umupu wakwe uwaluma nga maluti uulebilima mukutimuna umulilo.”" 
Isaiah31:1 Bakacimona abaya ku calo ca Egupto pakuti eco cilebafwako. Bena batetekela ifita fya mu Egupto ifishaifulila, ifyendela pali bakabalwe, ne fyendela pa maceleta. Lelo ukutetekela Yawe Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli nangufye ukulamubutukila, awe kwena nakalya." 
Isaiah31:2 Lesa alishiba ifyakucita. Alaleta ifinkunka. Tabweseshamo amashiwi yakwe, alema mukulimuna abatungilila abacita ifyabipa, kumo kwine na balya ababafwilishako mu bubifi bwabo." 
Isaiah31:3 Abena Egupto te balesa iyoo, bantufye. Bakabalwe babo nabo bene ni namafye, te mipashi iyoo. Ilyo Yawe akacitapo cimo, impalume ikatalansuka, noyo ileyafwilishako ikawa na shonse shibili ninshi shikalobelela pamo." 
Isaiah31:4 Yawe nanjeba ine ati, “Nga filya fine inkalamo ileŋaŋina inama iyo ikete, inkalamo iyamaka filya icita nga naikata, taitiina ne congo ce bumba lya bacemi, nangu ukusakamikwa ku kupunda kwabo, efyo na ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nkekila kukulwa pa mulu wa lupili lwa Sioni, takwakabe icintu nangu cimo icikantiinya ilyo nkalapokololako ulupili lwa Sioni." 
Isaiah31:5 Nga filya fine icuni cilelemba pa cisansala pakusunga utwana twaciko, efyo na ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nkacingilila umusumba wa Yerusalemu. Nkaucingilila no kuupokololako, nkaucilila no kuulubula.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Imwe mwe bena Israeli, mwalibifya nganshi no kutalama. Kanshi nomba bweleleni kuli uyo mwapondokela." 
Isaiah31:7 Pantu bulya ubushiku imwe bonse mukaposamo utulubi tushaibipila, uto imwe mwapangila na silifa na golide." 
Isaiah31:8 “Elintu icalo ca Asiria cikonaika ku lupanga, nalo telupanga lwa muntunse iyoo. Abena Asiria bakafulumuka ulupanga, na balumendo babo bakekatwa no kulateekwa ubusha."
