Isaiah31:9 Imfumu yabo ikafulumuka, ninshi ileitutuminafye ku mwenso, na bamushika baiko aba nkondo nabo bakatiina, icakuti nabo bakafulumuke no kusha uluunga lwabo ulwa nkondo. Nine ne Yawe nalanda, neo bapepa mu Sioni umwaka umulilo wandi, mu Yerusalemu umwaba ne lungu lyandi.”" 
Isaiah32:1 Limbi kukesa imfumu imo iyaba no mulinganya, na bacilolo baiko bakalateeka ukwabula ukulacita umucishacinani." 
Isaiah32:2 Nabo umo umo bakaba kwati ebakucingililako abantu ku mwela, kwati ebakupusukilako ku cimwela ca ku kabanga. Bakalaba kwati e milonga ya menshi iyaba mu matololo, kwati e cintelelwe ca cilibwe icishaikulila icaba mu calo icauma ndii." 
Isaiah32:3 Amenso ya bantu abamona yakalalola, na matwi ya bomfwa yakakutika bwino." 
Isaiah32:4 Abo abashiteeka imitima bakalakwata umucetekanya no kulaposa amano kufyo abantu bakalacita, kabili ababulubusa bakalalanda mukushimpa." 
Isaiah32:5 Abantu tabakacindike abapumbu, bakaleka no kulasosa ukuti ababufi e bafumacumi." 
Isaiah32:6 Pantu icipumbu ca muntu cilandafye ifyabupumbu, kabili citontonkanyafye palwa kucita ifintu ifibi. Ifintu ifyo cicita fyonse fyakusaalulafye Lesa, nefyo cisosa fintu fyakubepesha abantu palwakwa Yawe. Kabili tecakutala acipeelako abansala icakulya, nangu ukupeelako abali ne cilaka amenshi nakalya." 
Isaiah32:7 Ububifi bwalibipisha ubo icipumbu cicita, nefyo citeyanya ukucita fintufye fishiweme. Cena mu mutima waciko cipangafye ukulaonaula abalanda ku bufi bwaciko, no kulabafyengelesha mu milandu yabo iyilungeme." 
Isaiah32:8 Lelo umuntu umusuma ena mu mutima wakwe apangafye ukulacita ifintu ifyalolamo, kabili alatwalilila mukulacita ifyalungama." 
Isaiah32:9 Umfweni kuno, mwe banakashi mwe baikala mu bwanalale, mwe bashasakamana nelyo cimo, kutikeni kuli ine." 
Isaiah32:10 Pali nomba muli mu bwanalale, nomba muli uyu mwaka walaisa, awe ninshi imwe mukalalakalakafye. Pantu takwakabe fitwalo fya myangashi ifyakuti mukalesaba nakalya, ne fisabo fya fimuti fimbi nafyo tafyakamoneke." 
Isaiah32:11 Akukankeni ku mwenso imwe mwe baikala mu bwanalale, akusokoneni imwe mwe bashasakamana nelyo cimo. Fuuleni ifyakufwala ifyo mufwele, fwaleni insalu shabulanda mu musana." 
Isaiah32:12 Ikumbateni amaboko pakulanguluka pa mabala ayafunda ayakonaika na pa mabala ya myangashi," 
Isaiah32:13 na palwa myunga iyikalakulila pamo, na pali bacilasa mu mushili wa bantu bandi. Lilileni amayanda yonse umo abantu baleikala ne nsansa, no musumba umwali ukwanga." 
Isaiah32:14 Na kwisano kwine takwakabe muntu uukalaikalako, na mu musumba onse tamwakashale nelyo umo nakalya. Imishi ya malinga kumo kwine ne mpungu ishakulondelapo fikashalafye ifitantala. Bapunda ba mpanga ebakalaendaukamofye, ne mpaanga emo shikalaliila umulemfwe." 
Isaiah32:15 Lelo kwena Lesa akasuka atutumina Umupashi wakwe ukufuma mu mulu, elyo amatololo yakasanguka ayafunda, na mu mabala mukalakula ifisabo ifine fine." 
Isaiah32:16 Mu matololo mukalaikala umulinganya, mwibala ilyafunda mukalaikala ukulungika." 
Isaiah32:17 Mukalaba icibote mu calo pa mulandu wakulungika, no mulinganya ukalenga kukabe umutelelwe uwape." 
Isaiah32:18 Mu mayanda ya bantu banandi mukalaba icibote no mutelelwe, na bantu bene tabakalemonapo icakubasakamika." 
Isaiah32:19 Nangu imitengo ikonaulwa ku mfula yacitalawe no musumba wawishiwa panshi," 
Isaiah32:20 abantu bonse bakalasansamuka nganshi pakushukila amenshi ayengi ayakumesha no kulakusha ifisabo, no kuleka iŋombe na bapunda fileyendelafye no kulailiila." 
Isaiah33:1 Ukacimona iwe we watemwa ukonaula lelo iwe tapaba uwakonaulapo, walishama we ufutuka lelo iwe tabatala abakufutuka. Lelo ukatilafye cilya wapwa ukonaula na iwe bakakonaule, cilyafye wapwisha ukufutuka na iwe bakakufutuke." 
Isaiah33:2 We Yawe, tubeleleko uluse, ala niwefye tutetekela. Wingalatusunga apo shicela, no kulatupusushako mu nshita shabwafya." 
Isaiah33:3 Ilyo iwe utulwilako, abantu ba mitundu imbi balafulumuka, ku kubulukuta kwe shiwi lyobe imishobo ilapashika." 
Isaiah33:4 Ifintu fyabo filalonganikwa, filatapwa no kusendwa filasendwa, abantu bafiwililila nga makanta." 
Isaiah33:5 Yawe alipuulama. Euteeka ne fintu fyonse. Eukapeela umusumba Sioni amano ayakucita ifintu mu mulinganya na yakufilungika. 
Isaiah33:6 Eukalenga nokuti umutundu wa bantu ukaleikalila. Eusunga pe abantu bakwe, no kulabapeela amano ayakwiluka ifintu na yakwishiba ifintu. Icuma cine cine ica Sioni, ala kukwatila Yawe akatiina." 
Isaiah33:7 Umfweni uko impalume sha bantu shilekuuta mutuule. Inkombe ishiletulukushako ukuleta icibote, isho shilelila nganshi." 
Isaiah33:8 Mu misebo namulalwa, tamulepita muntu. Icumfwano nacipwa, ifyo bapangana tafilekonkwa. Takuli muntu nelyo umo uulecindikwa." 
Isaiah33:9 Icalo cileloosha no kucululuka. Imitengo ya ku Lebanoni nayuma, inika ya mufundo iya Sharoni ili kwati matololo, na mu Bashani na pa lupili lwa Kameli amabula yalelokota no kupululuka ku miti." 
Isaiah33:10 Yawe alyebele abantu ati, “Ine nomba nalaima, nomba muli nokuncindika, kabili nomba ndi nokusumbulwa." 
Isaiah33:11 Imwe mwimita imisungu, no kupapa impimbili, no mupu wenu ukamulya ngo mulilo." 
Isaiah33:12 Abantu ba mitundu yonse bakatulumana nge mina ya mito, bakalalota nge myunga iyipile." 
Isaiah33:13 “Lekeni mwe baikala ukutali mumfweko ifyo ine nacita, na mwe bali mupepi musumine amaka yandi." 
Isaiah33:14 Ababifi ba mu Sioni baleikankilafye ku mwenso, abashasakamana ifyakwa Yawe balesokonafye. Baletila abati, ‘Imipingwile yakwa Lesa, awe yabafye ngo mulilo uwaikalilafye ukulaoca. Nga nani pali ifwe uwingapusukako ku mulilo wa uyu musango?’" 
Isaiah33:15 Ala uukapusuka ni uyo uucita ifyalungama, uulanda icishinka, uushaba na lumanimani lwakunonka ifyuma ku balanda kabili uushipoka amafisakanwa, uushifwaya ukumfwako ku bapanga ukwipaya abanabo, uushaposa amano kukufwaya ukucita ifyabipa." 
Isaiah33:16 Uyu muntu eukalaenda ne shuko no kwikala umutelelwe, eukalaikala bwino mu musumba we linga ilyamaka. Ena lyonsefye akalakwata icakulya, na menshi tayakalebula kuli ena iyoo.”" 
Isaiah33:17 Amenso yenu yakalamona imfumu mu kuyemba kwaiko, yakalamona icalo icisuma icaba mpanga yonse." 
Isaiah33:18 Abalemutiinya kale, imwe mukalabebukishafye mu mutima amuti, “Nga balya baletupenda bali kwi? Nga balya bantu baletusonkesha umusonko, bushe nomba bali kwi? Nge nengu nomba shili kwi?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Tamwakalemonapo nakabili abenafyalo aba miya, abakalalanda ifyabula ukwishiba no lulimi ulo imwe mushakaletesha." 
Isaiah33:20 Shiloleshenifye Sioni, uyu musumba uo tucindikamo inshikunkulu shesu ishakulumbanya Lesa. Shitambeni Yerusalemu. Eukaba icifulo icakwikalamo ku matwi tondolo. Yerusalemu akaba nge tenti ilishisela, ilyo impopo shaliko shishabala ashinukulwa, ilyo ne myando yaliko ishabala aiputukapo nelyo limo." 
Isaiah33:21 Yawe emo akalatulangila ubucindami bwakwe. Nefwe tukalaikala mu lulamba lwa mimana iyapabuka iyikulu ne inono, na mu lulamba lwa milonga umushakalepita mato ya balwani." 
Isaiah33:22 Pantu Yawe e kapingula wesu, uwatupeela amafunde. Yawe umwine eukaba imfumu yesu eukalateeka no kulatupusushako." 
Isaiah33:23 Imyando ya mato ya balwani besu naikakuka, icakuti tekuti ikoshe ishinte lya mulongoti, kabili teti fifunguluke ne fisalu ifikola umwela kukwensha amato. Kanshi ne fyuma fyabo fyonse fikatapwa ifingi no kusendwa. Na balemana bene bakapeelwako no kuisendela." 
Isaiah33:24 Pa bantu bonse abaikala mu Sioni tapakabe nelyo umo uukalailishanya palwakulwala, na bantu bonse bakabelelwa uluse ku fibi fyabo." 
Isaiah34:1 Palameni kuno, imwe mwe bantu ba mishobo yonse. Longaneni pakuti mumfweko mwe bantu bonse. Lekeni aba pano isonde bomfwe pamo ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo, isonde lyonse na fyonse ififumamo." 
Isaiah34:2 Yawe nafulilwa abantu ba mishobo yonse kumo kwine ne fita fyabo fyonse. Lesa napingula ukubakanda no kubalofya. 
Isaiah34:3 Ifitumbi fyabo tafyakashiikwe iyoo, fikashalafye pa mbilibili apakuti fikaleibolela no kulapimpinuka, na mu mpili mukakashika na cee ku mulopa wabo." 
Isaiah34:4 Akasuba, no mweshi, ne ntanda, na fyonse ifya mu mulu fikasunguluka. Umulu ukapombwa nge citabo, ne ntanda shikapona kwati mabula yalelukuta ku mwangashi, kabili kwati tupofwa twa makunyu utulepona." 
Isaiah34:5 Asosa ati, “Napekanya ulupanga lwandi mu mulu, nalo nomba lulya lwasansa icalo ca Edomu, lwalasansamo balya bantu abo napingwiliile ukulofya.”" 
Isaiah34:6 Ulupanga lwakwa Yawe lwalakungafye umulopa wabo na mafuta yabo, nafyo fyalaba ku lupanga kwati mulopa na mafuta ya bana ba mpaanga na ya mbushi isho bepeye pakushituula ilambo. Pantu ni Yawe ewalaleka ili lambo mu musumba wa Bosira, ewalaipaulula nganshi abantu mu calo ca Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Abantu pamo pene ne mboo na bacilume ba ŋombe fikepaiwa, ne calo cikakashika cee ku mulopa, no mushili wakulanonokafye ku mafuta." 
Isaiah34:8 E nshita iyo Yawe akapusushishapo Sioni, umwaka wakulandwilapo abalwani bakwe." 
Isaiah34:9 Imimana ya mu Edomu yalasanguka amanenekela, no mushili walasanguka bamunyela abakulaaka umulilo. Icalo conse cakulabilima umulilo nga manenekela." 
Isaiah34:10 Icalo cakulapya ubushiku bonse na kasuba konse, ne cushi tacakaleke nelyo limo ukulafutumukamo. Cikashala icaonaika umukonkanina inkulo, takwakaleba umuntu uwakulapitamo nelyo umo." 
Isaiah34:11 Intitimushi ne fipululu efyakulaikalamo mu calo, ifikoshi na bamwankole efyalaselelamo. Yawe tashemo kantu nangu kamo, mulebafye ngefyo mwali ilyo ifintu fyali tafilakuulwa." 
Isaiah34:12 Tamwaleba mfumu iyakulateeka ico calo ca Edomu, ne ntungulushi shaciko tashalebamo." 
Isaiah34:13 Mu ncende shonse ishaliko isano mwakulalulumuka imyunga, na bakaenya na bacilasa efyakulashinga ne mishi kwati malinga, bamumbwe ne fipuululu efyakulaikalamo." 
Isaiah34:14 Emo inama sha mpanga shakulanyangala no kulaitana. Iciwa ca mu mpanga emo cakulasanga incende iyakwikalamo. 
Isaiah34:15 Emo ifipuululu fyakulapikwila ifisansala, no kulabikilamo amani no kulatotelamo abana, no kulabakushishamo. Emwakulalongana na makubi yonse ayalume na yakota." 
Isaiah34:16 Fwayeni mu citabo icipombwa icakwa Yawe palwa ifi fintu ifipeema. Belengenimo ifyalembwa pali uyu mulandu. Pali ifi fibumbwa fyonse tapabulile nelyo cimo, kabili fyonse fyakulaba fibili fibili, icilume ne cikota. Efyo Yawe akonkomesha ukuti cibe, no Mupashi wakwe wine ewalafilonganya pamo." 
Isaiah34:17 Ni Yawe ewalafyakanya icalo, no kufipeela ifiputulwa fyafiko. E calo icakulaba pe icalo cafiko, no kwikala emo fyakulaikalilila, ukushintafye no mwakulakonkanina inkulo shafiko." 
Isaiah35:1 Kube ukwanga ku matololo na mu mpanga iyaumisha, ifiswebebe nafyo fyange no kubalulamo amaluba." 
Isaiah35:2 Ukubalula nga fyabalula elyo bakalaimba no kulapunda ne nsansa. Icalo icaonaike cikayemba ngo lupili lwa Lebanoni, cikaba ngo lupili lwa Kameli kabili nga mabala ya mufundo ya ku Sharoni. Abantu bonse bakamona ifyo Yawe apulama, bakamona ifyo Lesa aba umukulu nefyo aba no lulumbi." 
Isaiah35:3 Koselesheniko abo mu maboko mwatompoka, nabo mu makufi mwapomponteka bakosheni." 
Isaiah35:4 Bonse abali no mwenso bebeni amuti, “Mwitiina, ikoseleshenifye. Mwamona, ala Lesa wenu ulya aleisa kukumupusushako, ulya aleisa kukumulandwilako pakukanda abalwani benu.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Lyena impofu shakulamona, bankomamatwi nabo bakulaumfwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Abalemana amolu bakulatomboka amabaka nge nsebula, na bacibulu nabo bakulapunda ne nsansa. Pantu amenshi yakulafukauka mu matololo, ne milonga yakulapita mu calo icauma ndii." 
Isaiah35:7 Ulya musensenga uwakabisha walasanguka bemba, na mu calo icauma ndii mwalaba utumfukumfuku twa menshi. Umwikala bamumbwe mukasanguka inika, umwali icani nomba mwakulamena amatete na macinda." 
Isaiah35:8 Kukaba umusebo uukulu, uukalaitwa “Umusebo Wamushilo”. Tamwakalepitamo umuntu uwakowela, ne fipumbu fya bantu tafyakafulunganye abakalaendamo." 
Isaiah35:9 Tamwakaleyangala nkalamo, nangufye ifiswango fimbi fine, awe tafyakalemonekamo. Abalungami bene beka ebakulapita pakubwelela kumwabo." 
Isaiah35:10 Na balubulwa abakwa Yawe bakafika ne nsansa mu Sioni, ninshi baleimba no kulapunda ne nsansa. Ninshi nomba bashukila insansa sha pe, ukucula no kulilishika, awe ninshi nomba kwapwa." 
Isaiah36:1 Mu mwaka walengele ikumi na ine (14), apo Hesekia ateekele icalo ca Yuda, Senakeribu imfumu nkalamba iya bena Asiria alisanshile imisumba ya malinga yonse mu calo ca Yuda, no kuicimfya aliicimfishe." 
Isaiah36:2 Elyo Senakeribu abuula umukalamba wa mpuka ikalamba iya fita fyakwe, Rabushake, pamo ne bumba ilikalamba ilya fita, amukonkomesha ukufuma mu Lakishi, no kuya ku Yerusalemu kukuya tiinya imfumu Hesekia pakuti icimbe. Uyu mukalamba wa fita aya iminina mupepi no mulonga wa cishiba ca pamulu, icaba pa musebo wakuya kwi Bala lyakwa Kasamba ukwalebombela abantu abalecapa insalu." 
Isaiah36:3 Elyo abena Yuda batatu baya ku mukalamba wa fita, umo ni Eliakimu umwana mwaume wakwa Hilikiya, uwali mushika wa kwisano, umbi ni Shebina uwali kalemba mukalamba wa kwisano, umunabo umbi nao ni Yoa umwana mwaume wakwa Asafu, kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo." 
Isaiah36:4 Uyu Rabushake nao epakulabeba ati, “Eba Hesekia ukuti, ifi efyo imfumu nkalamba iya bena Asiria yasosa ukuti, ‘Bushe ni pali cinshi ushintilishe icicetekelo cobe?" 
Isaiah36:5 Bushe iwe uletontonkanya ukuti ukulandaukafye amashiwi yeka yeka auti e mano, nangu maka yakulwa inkondo, mwa? Bushe nani uyo wine washintililamo pakuti iwe unsangukile?" 
Isaiah36:6 Mona, iwe ushintilile pali Egupto, uwaba nge nkoto ye tete iyalepauka iyakuti lilya umuntu ashintililako, yamucena mu minwe. Ifi efyo Farao imfumu ya bena Egupto aba. Kabili efyo acita na kuli bonse abashintilila kuli ena." 
Isaiah36:7 Kabili nga wasosa kuli ine auti, “Ifwe tucetekele pali Yawe Lesa wesu,” bushe teuyo incende shakwe mu tupili ishakupepelamo elyo ne fibumbili fyakwe ifya malambo imfumu Hesekia aonawile? Elyo yaeba abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu aiti, “Muli nokulapepelafye pali ubu bulambo bumo mpo?” ’" 
Isaiah36:8 “Kanshi isa nomba upangane na shikulu, imfumu ya ku Asiria. Ndi nokukupeela bakabalwe amakana yabili (2,000) nga wakwata abantu abakumanina abakuninapo!" 
Isaiah36:9 Kuti wafulumuna shani cilolo umo uwacepesha pali bacilolo bakwa shikulu, ilyo washintilila pa bena Egupto ku maceleta na bashilika ba pali bakabalwe?" 
Isaiah36:10 Bushe iwe uletontonkanya ukuti ine naitendekafye pakwisa sansa icalo no kuconaula, ukwabula ukuti Yawe ansuminishe, mwa? Ala ni Yawe umwine ewanjeba ukwisa sansa cino calo no kuconaula.”" 
Isaiah36:11 Elyo Eliakimu, na Shebina, na Yoa, baeba uyu Rabushake abati, “Twapapata, landa kuli ifwe fwe babomfi bobe mu cilimi ca Ciaramaiki pantu tulomfwa. Wilanda kuli ifwe mu Cihibulu, pantu balya bonse abali pelinga ni kuno balekutika.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Nao Rabushake abankula ati, “Bushe imwe kumo kwine ne mfumu yenu muleti nimwefye mweka imfumu yandi intumineko pakwisa landa iyi milandu yonse, batini? Ala iyoo, ine ndeeba balya bantu bali pelinga, abo pamo na imwe muli nokulya amafi yenu no kunwa imisu yenu!”" 
Isaiah36:13 Elyo uyu Rabushake kabili aiminina aololoka no kubilikisha mu Cihibulu ati, “Umfweni ishiwi lya mfumu nkalamba, imfumu ya ku Asiria! Ifi efyo imfumu yasosa aiti," 
Isaiah36:14 Ilesosa aiti, ‘Imwe mwileka Hesekia amubepe, pantu takwata maka ayakumupususha iyoo." 
Isaiah36:15 Mwileka Hesekia alemusembeleka ukutetekela muli Yawe nga alanda ukuti, “Yawe aletupokolola, uno musumba tawapeelwe mu minwe ya mfumu ya ku Asiria.”" 
Isaiah36:16 Mwimumfwila Hesekia.’ Ifi efyo imfumu ya ku Asiria yasosa ifyakuti, ‘Lekeni tumfwane mu mutende, mwise mucimbefye kuli ine. Awe ninshi, na cila umo pali imwe ali nokulya kwibala lyakwe lya myangashi ne mikunyu, no kunwa amenshi ukufuma mu cishima cakwe," 
Isaiah36:17 mpaka nkese mubuula no kumutwala mu calo icabafye nge calo cenu. Icalo ica ŋanu no mwangashi upya. Icalo ica mikate na mabala ya myangashi. 
Isaiah36:18 Mwileka Hesekia alemubepa pakulamweba ukutila “Yawe aletupokolola!” Bushe kwalibako umulungu wa mushobo uuli onse uwapokololako icalo cauko ukufuma ku kuboko kwa mfumu ya bena Asiria? 
Isaiah36:19 Nge milungu ya ku Hamati, ne ya ku Apadi, pali nomba ili kwi? Ne milungu ya ku Sefafaimu, nayo nomba ili kwi? Bushe yalipokolola Samaria ukufuma mu kuboko kwandi?" 
Isaiah36:20 Bushe mulungu nshi pa milungu ya fyalo ifi fyonse uwatala aupusushako icalo cauko kuli ine? Nga nomba imwe cinshi ico muleelenganishisha ukuti Yawe akapusushako Yerusalemu ku kuboko kwandi?’” 
Isaiah36:21 Lelo abantu baikalafye tondolo ukwabula ukuti bamwasuke, pantu imfumu yalikonkomeshe bonse aiti, “Mwimwasuka.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Elyo Eliakimu mwana Hilikiya uwali mushika wa kwisano, Shebina kalemba mukalamba wa kwisano na Yoa mwana Asafu kalemba wa fyalecitika mu calo, baya kuli Hesekia nabalepula insalu shabo, no kumulondolwela ifyo uyu Rabushake aciba alelanda." 
Isaiah37:1 Ilyo imfumu Hesekia yaumfwile ifi, yalepwile ifyakufwala fyaiko, yafwala insalu shabulanda elyo yaya ingila mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Isaiah37:2 Kabili yabuula Eliakimu mushika wa kwisano, na Shebina kalemba mukalamba wa kwisano, na bakalamba ba bashimapepo, yabatuma na kuli kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi, ninshi bonse nabafwala insalu shabulanda." 
Isaiah37:2 Kabili yabuula Eliakimu mushika wa kwisano, na Shebina kalemba mukalamba wa kwisano, na bakalamba ba bashimapepo, yabatuma na kuli kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi, ninshi bonse nabafwala insalu shabulanda." 
Isaiah37:3 Bamweba ati, “Ifi efyo Hesekia alanda ifyakuti, ‘Buno bushiku, bushiku bwakuculamo, bushiku bwakushobolwamo no bwakumfwamo insoni. Ifwe tulifye ngo mwanakashi uushikwete maka yakupapa ilyo inshita yakupapilapo imufikile." 
Isaiah37:4 Limbi kuti caba ukuti Yawe Lesa obe naumfwa amashiwi ya uyu Rabushake uo shikulu wakwe imfumu ya ku Asiria itumine kukutuka Lesa uwamweo. Elyo na pakuti Yawe Lesa obe akalipe pa mashiwi aya omfwile. Eico pepelako abashele abacili abomi.’ ” 
Isaiah37:5 Ilyo bacilolo ba mfumu Hesekia bafika kuli Esaya," 
Isaiah37:6 nao Esaya ababweseshamo ati, “Kebeni shikulwinwe ukuti ifi efyo Yawe alanda ifyakuti, ‘Wikwata umwenso pafyo umfwile, palwa mashiwi yakuntuka ayo ababomfi ba mfumu ya bena Asiria bakwebele." 
Isaiah37:7 Umfwa, ine ndebika umupashi muli yena uulelenga ukuti yumfwepo fimo ifyamaŋwiŋwi, ifyalalenga nokuti ibwelelemo ku calo caiko, no kuleka eko nkaleka bakaye mwipaila ku lupanga.’”" 
Isaiah37:8 Ilyo uyu Rabushake aumfwa ukuti imfumu yabo naifuma ku Lakishi, abwelelamo no kuya sanga imfumu ilelwa no musumba wa ku Libina." 
Isaiah37:9 Nomba Senakerubi apokelela amashiwi ayakuti Tiraka imfumu ya bena Kushi naifuma mukwisa mulwisha. Pakumfwa aya mashiwi atuma inkombe kuli Hesekia abakuyatila abati," 
Isaiah37:10 “Mwebe Hesekia imfumu ya bena Yuda ukuti, ‘Wileka umulungu washintililamo ukubepe nga watila Yerusalemu tayapeelwe mu minwe ya mfumu ya bena Asiria." 
Isaiah37:11 Mu cacine waliumfwa ifyo imfumu sha ku Asiria shacita ku fyalo fyonse, ukonaulafye fyonse. Elyo bushe iwe niwe walapusuka?" 
Isaiah37:12 Nge milungu ya mishobo iyo iyaonawilwe ku fikolwe fyandi bushe yalibapokolweleko? Imilungu ya Gosani, Harani, Resefu na bantu ba ku Edeni abali mu Teli Asari." 
Isaiah37:13 Ili kwi imfumu ya ku Hamati, imfumu ya ku Apadi, imfumu ya ku musumba wa Sefafaimu nangu uwa ku Hena nangu Ifa?’”" 
Isaiah37:14 Hesekia apokele kalata ukufuma ku nkombe no kubelenga. Elyo aya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe, abuula na kalata, afungulula, abika na pa cinso cakwa Yawe." 
Isaiah37:15 Elyo Hesekia apepa kuli Yawe ati," 
Isaiah37:16 “ We Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, we waikala pakati ka bakerubi. Iwe weka niwe Lesa pa bufumu bonse ubwa pano calo. Niwe wabumbile umulu ne calo." 
Isaiah37:17 Teya ukutwi, we Yawe, kabili umfwa. Isula amenso yobe, we Yawe, no kumona. Umfwa ku mashiwi yonse Senakeribu atumine ayakutuka Lesa uwamweo." 
Isaiah37:18 “Cacine we Yawe ukuti imfumu sha bena Asiria shalofya abantu ba iyi mitundu yonse no konaula ifyalo fyabo. 
Isaiah37:19 Shaliposa imilungu yabo mu mulilo no kuyonaula. Nangu cali ukuti tayali milungu, lelo fyalifye ifya fimiti na mabwe fintu fyapangwa ne minwe ya bantu." 
Isaiah37:20 Kanshi nomba we Yawe, Lesa wesu, tupokololeko ukufuma mu minwe yakwe, pakuti ne shamfumu shonse pano calo shishibe ukuti iwefye weka niwe Lesa.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Elyo Esaya mwana Amosi atuma amashiwi kuli Hesekia ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli asosa ukuti, ‘Pantu wapapata kuli ine pa mulandu wakwa Senakeribu, imfumu ya bena Asiria," 
Isaiah37:21 Elyo Esaya mwana Amosi atuma amashiwi kuli Hesekia ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli asosa ukuti, ‘Pantu wapapata kuli ine pa mulandu wakwa Senakeribu, imfumu ya bena Asiria," 
Isaiah37:22 aya e mashiwi ayo Yawe asosele pali Senakeribu.’ “Nacisungu mwana Sioni akususha no kukutumfya. Umwana mwanakashi wa Yerusalemu apukunya umutwe panuma yobe. 
Isaiah37:23 Ninani uo watukile no kupontela? Nani uo waotokele no kutulumwina amenso? Cine ni ku Wamushilo wakwa Israeli. 
Isaiah37:24 Ukupitila mu nkombe shobe emo utukile Imfumu insele shingi, no kuitutubula uleitutubula auti, ‘Ine ne Senakeribu ku maceleta yandi ayashaifulila eko ninine pa mulu wa mpili na pa mulu wa mpili sha Lebanoni. Nintema imiti iyalepesha iya keda ne miti iyawamisha iya paini, ukuya shintafye na pa lupili ulwalepeshapo na ku mpela ya mitengo iyawamishapo." 
Isaiah37:25 Ninyimba ifishima mu fyalo fya kutali, no kunwa amenshi kulya kwine. Ninkamya imimana yonse iya mu Egupto, ku fitende fya makasa yandi.’" 
Isaiah37:26 “Bushe tawaumfwa ukuti nacipekenye ukufuma kale? Mu nshiku shakale emo napekenye ifi, na ine wine ndecifikilisha na pali nomba, pakuti ulelenga imisumba ya malinga ukuba ifitantala fya mabwe." 
Isaiah37:27 Abantu babo amaka nayapwamo, nabafupuka no kulengwa insoni. Basanguka nge filimwa fya mu mabala, ngo mulemfwe uuteku, kwati cani icilemena pa mutenge, fintu ifyuma ku kasuba lintu tafilakula." 
Isaiah37:28 “Lelo nalishiba uko wikala, naishiba ukwisa kobe, no kufuma kobe, ala iwe ulaitutumuna pali ine." 
Isaiah37:29 Apo iwe waliitutumuna pali ine, no musaalula obe naufika ku matwi yandi, nalabika ubulobo mu myona yobe, elyo no mukobelo wandi mu kanwa kobe. Kabili nalalenga ubwelelemo inshila waishilemo.”" 
Isaiah37:30 Ici ecikaba icishibilo cobe, we Hesekia. Uno mwaka uli nokulya ifyaimenenafye, kabili umwaka wakonkapo ifikatwalako. Lelo mu mwaka walenga itatu ukabyale no kusombola, ukabyale imyangashi no kulya ifisabo fyaiko." 
Isaiah37:31 Kabili abakashalapo mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda, bakengishe imishila panshi nokwisa twala ifisabo pamulu." 
Isaiah37:32 Pantu mu Yerusalemu emukafuma abantu abakashalamo abomi, na pa lupili lwa Sioni pakafuma abakapusuka. Ukupimpa kwakwa Yawe umwine wa fita ekukacita ici." 
Isaiah37:33 “Eico ifi efyo Yawe alanda palwa mfumu ya ku Asiria. ‘Tayakengilemo muli uno musumba nangu ukulasamo umufwi muno. Tayakapalame naikata inkwela ku musumba, nangu ukutulamikako imiina ya maloba pakuushinga." 
Isaiah37:34 Inshila yaishilemo eyo ikabwelelamo. Muli uno musumba mwena tayaingilemo nakalya. Efyalanda Yawe. 
Isaiah37:35 Ndecingilila uno musumba no kuupususha, pa mulandu wandi na pa mulandu wa cilayo ico ine nalaile umubomfi wandi Davidi.’”" 
Isaiah37:36 Awe, malaika wakwa Yawe aya na mu nkambi ya fita fya bena Asiria, aipayamo ifita amakana umwanda umo na makana amakumi cine konse konse na yasano (185,000). Kutifye ulucelo cilya bwaca, awe abantu bamonafye ifitumbi fya bantu filelefye ntangali ntangali." 
Isaiah37:37 Kanshi Senakeribu imfumu ya bena Asiria epakufuma mu nkambi nokubwelelamo. Abwelela ku Ninife eko aya ikala. 
Isaiah37:38 Ubushiku bumo ninshi alepepa mwitempele lya mulungu wakwe Nisroki, abana bakwe abaume, Adarameleki na Sharesa, bamukoma ku lupanga, elyo babutukila ku calo ca ku Aralati. Elyo Esahadoni umwana wakwe umwaume amupyana pa bufumu." 
Isaiah38:1 Mu nshiku shine shilya, Hesekia alwala ubulwele ubwafwaile ukumwipaya. Kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi aya kuli ena amweba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, ‘Ubangililile uipekanye bwino pantu ulefwa, tauli nakupola.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:1 Mu nshiku shine shilya, Hesekia alwala ubulwele ubwafwaile ukumwipaya. Kasesema Esaya mwana Amosi aya kuli ena amweba ati, “Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ati, ‘Ubangililile uipekanye bwino pantu ulefwa, tauli nakupola.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:2 Hesekia nao epakupilibukila ku cibumba, alapapata kuli Yawe ati," 
Isaiah38:3 “Nakulomba we Yawe, ibukisha ifyo nyenda pa cinso cobe mu cishinka na mu bololoke bwa mutima no kucita ifyawama pa cinso cobe.” Elyo kabili Hesekia alalila nganshi, tepakulila mwe." 
Isaiah38:4 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Esaya aliti," 
Isaiah38:5 “Bwelela kuli Hesekia no kuya mweba ukuti Yawe aletila ati, ‘Ine ne Yawe Lesa wa cikolwe cobe Davidi, niŋumfwa ukupapata kobe, kabili nimona ne filamba fyobe. Cisuma, nakulundilako imyaka ikumi limo na isano (15) iyakuti ukekale pano calo." 
Isaiah38:6 Kabili ine nkalakupokololako, no kupokololako uno musumba, ku kuboko kwa mfumu ya calo ca Asiria. Nkacingilila na uno wine umusumba.’ ”" 
Isaiah38:7 Esaya nao asosa ati, “Icishibilo ico Yawe alacita, icakukulanga ukuti alacita ifyo asosele, nici." 
Isaiah38:8 Icinshingwa ici icili pa matabo ayo imfumu Ahasi yapangile, walamona uko Yawe alacibweseshamo kunuma, ciye iminina na petabo ilyalenga ikumi.” Awe icinshingwa caya cilebwelelamo, capita na pa matabo yambi, ukuya shinta na petabo ilyalenga ikumi." 
Isaiah38:9 Hesekia imfumu ya Yuda ilyo apolele ku bulwele bwakwe, pakutotela Lesa yalishikile ulu lwimbo ati," 
Isaiah38:10 “Ilyo nafikile pa mushinku wa bukalamba natile, ‘Bushe nje ku calo ca bafwa, ne myaka yandi yonse iyashalako ipokwe?’" 
Isaiah38:11 Naletilafye awe ine nshakatale mona Yawe nakabili muli cino calo ca bomi, nshakatale nakabili monanapo no muntu pano isonde, nangu ukuba pamo nabo abali pano isonde muli nomba." 
Isaiah38:12 Naletilafye ubumi bwandi bwapela, yaba e mipwile, bwapwa nge tenti lyakwa kacema ilyo baomonona. Bupwile nge nsalu iyo kapikula apombanya, no kuiputula ku cakupikwilako. Naletilafye nati pakuti kawe, awe ninshi Lesa ampwishishisha." 
Isaiah38:13 Nakutile bobuno, ninshi nalyo ndetusailafye, kwati ni nkalamo eile nkokotaula amafupa. Naletilafye nati pakuti buce, awe ninshi Lesa ampwishishisha." 
Isaiah38:14 “Nalelila nga kamimbi, no kuloosha nge nkunda pakuteta. Amenso yandi yalinakile pa mulandu wakulolesha ku mulu. Ninshi ndetilafye, ‘We Yawe, wingampusushako kuli buno bucushi.’" 
Isaiah38:15 “Nga ine finshi ningalandapo, apo we mwine nausosa. Apo niwe we mwine ulengele ifi we Yawe? Nakulaenda uwaicefya imyaka yonse, pa mulandu wa kucushiwa kwa mutima wandi." 
Isaiah38:16 We Yawe, ni kuli ifi fintu abantu bekalila abomi, ala niwefye weka nakulaikalila. Wingamposhafye, uleke ndeikala umumi." 
Isaiah38:17 Pa kucululuka kwandi pakaselela umutende, pantu ku kutemwa kobe wampuswishe ku nindi yabonaushi, kabili ulanjelelako ifibi fyandi fyonse no kufifutatila." 
Isaiah38:18 Ababa ku calo ca bafwa balafilwa ukukulumbanya, abafwa balafilwa ukukutasha, balafilwa no kukutetekela iwe we wacishinka." 
Isaiah38:19 Abomi, abomi bekafye, ebakulumbanya, ngefi fine ine ndecita lelo. Bashibo ebashimikilako abana babo, ifyo iwe waba ne cishinka." 
Isaiah38:20 “Yawe eukampususha. Ifwe twakulakulishisha ifilimba fya nsale, no kulakwimbila pakukulumbanya. Twakulakulumbanya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, inshiku shonse isha myeo yesu.”" 
Isaiah38:21 Pantu Esaya alyebele abantu ukuti bacite icimamantwa ca makunyu, bacikakile na pa cipute icalwalike imfumu pakuti cipole." 
Isaiah38:22 Ninshi Hesekia nao alipwishe ati, “Bushe cishibilo nshi ico ine nalaishibilako ukuti ine nkakwata amaka ayakwenda no kuya ku ŋanda yakwa Yawe?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Pali iyo ine nshita imfumu ya Babiloni, ishina lyaiko ni Merodaki Baladani mwana Baladani, yalyumfwile ifyo imfumu Hesekia yalwele nefyo yapolele. Kanshi nao Melodaki epakutumina Hesekia kalata, abikapo ne fyabupe." 
Isaiah39:2 Hesekia nao atemwa, asekelela ne nkombe, ashilanga fyonse ifyali mu matala yakwe, silifa, golide ne fyanunka ubusuka, amafuta ayasuma, iŋanda ya fyanso fyakwe elyo na fyonse ifyali mu ŋanda yakutulilamo ifyuma. Mwisano lyakwe na mu calo cakwe conse tamwashele nelyo kamo ako Hesekia ashalangile inkombe." 
Isaiah39:3 Elyo Esaya kasesema aya ku mfumu Hesekia no kumwipusha ati, “Ni finshi balya bantu bacisosa, kabili ni kwisa bafumine?” Hesekia nao ayasuka ati, “Bafumine ukutali ku calo ca ku Babiloni?”" 
Isaiah39:4 Kasesema aipusha ati, “Ni finshi bacimona mu ŋanda yobe iya mwisano?” Hesekia ayasuka ati, “Nabamona fyonse ifya mwisano lyandi. Tapashele nangu cimo pa cuma natutila mu matala ico nshibalangile.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Esaya epakweba Hesekia ati, “Umfwa kuno ishiwi Yawe umwine wa fita alekweba." 
Isaiah39:6 Inshita ileisa ilyo ifintu fyonse mu ŋanda yobe iye sano, na fyonse ifyo ifikolwe fyenu fyatutile ukushinta ilelo fili nokusendwa ku Babiloni. Ala takwakashale nangu kamo, efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah39:7 Kabili na pali ba mu lupwa lobe, aba mubili no mulopa obe, abo waifyalila we mwine, bakasendapo bamo no kuya bacita bamutungwi abakubombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni kwisano lyaiko.”" 
Isaiah39:8 Hesekia epakwiluka ukuti pa nshita akakokola pano calo, kanshi ena akulaikalilafye ku matwi tondolo, nao epakwasuka Esaya ati, “Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyo walanda lisuma.”" 
Isaiah40:1 Lesa wenu aletila ati, “Talalikeni abantu bandi imitima, aleni aku batalalikeni." 
Isaiah40:2 Koselesheni Yerusalemu. Mulelanda nankwe no mutembo kwati mulelanda no mwanakashi uulecula. Inshiku sha kucululuka kwakwe nashipwa, mwebeni ukuti nabelelwa uluse ku fyabubifi fyakwe. Ine ne Yawe kwena nalilinganyafye bwino pakumukanda imiku ibili pa fyabubifi fyakwe fyonse.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Umfweni ishiwi ilyo lilebilikisha aliti, “Panshileni Yawe inshila mu matololo. Lungamikeni Lesa wesu umusebo mu ciswebebe." 
Isaiah40:4 Imikonko yonse ishikwe, impili shonse shipaswe kumo kwine no tupili tonse, no tulundulundu twine tulinganishiwe. Apalundumana pabe apatambalala." 
Isaiah40:5 Lyena ninshi ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bukasokoloka, na bantu bonse bakalabumona, efyo Yawe umwine alanda.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Ishiwi lilebilikisha aliti, “Akuuma imbila, iwe Esaya.” Na ine nayasuka nati, “Ni mbila nshi ndebila?” Nalyo lyati, “Uletila auti, ala abantu bonse babafye nge cani, no bucindami bwabo bwaba nga maluba ya mu mpanga." 
Isaiah40:7 Icani ciloma, amaluba nayo yalabonsa, ilyo Yawe apemenapo umupu wakwe. Efyo na bantu baba, nabo bene banakukafye nge cani." 
Isaiah40:8 Icani ciloma, amaluba nayo yalabonsa, lelo ishiwi lyakwa Lesa wesu lyena lilabelelela lyonse.”" 
Isaiah40:9 We wakubila, kanine pa lupili ulutali, kabile ku Sioni imbila nsuma. We wakubila usansule ishiwi, pakubila imbila nsuma mu Yerusalemu. Kalandishefye, witiina iyoo. Kebe imisumba ya mu Yuda, auti, Lesa wenu ulya aleisa." 
Isaiah40:10 Moneni, Imfumu Yawe aleisa mu maka, alecimfya fyonse no kuteeka ku maka ya kuboko kwakwe. Moneni ne cilambu cakwe ali naco, aleisa na bantu bakwe abo alubula." 
Isaiah40:11 Akulasunga impaanga shakwe nga kacema, akulalonganya no twana twa mpaanga mu maboko yakwe, akulatusendela na pa cifuba cakwe, akulatungulula bwino bwinofye ne mpaanga ishileonsha." 
Isaiah40:12 Nani uwingapimina pa lupi lwakwe amenshi ya muli bemba, nangu ukupimina umulu ku cisansa cakwe? Bushe umuntu kuti apimina mu lupe lumo iloba lya pano calo, nangu ukupima impili no tupili pa cipimo cakupiminako?" 
Isaiah40:13 Bushe kwalitala akuba umuntu umo uwaishiba amano yakwa Yawe? Nani uwatala afundako Yawe fimo, nangufye ukumusokako?" 
Isaiah40:14 Nikuli ani uo Lesa apandako amano, pakuti Lesa eshibe ifintu no kufitesha umo filolele? Nangu nani uo Lesa asambililako, pakuti eshibe umwakuficitila?" 
Isaiah40:15 Imishobo ya bantu, Lesa aimonafye nga kalitoni kamo akatona ku mutondo wa menshi, yabafye ngo tulukungu utuli pa cipimo, Ne fyalo fya ku lulamba lwa pali bemba fine afimonafye pepu ngo lukungu ulwapeleka." 
Isaiah40:16 Inama shonse isha mu mitengo ya Lebanoni, awe tashafikapo ku bwingi, ishakuti tulekele Lesa wesu ilambo. Ne miti iyabamo yacepa nganshi iyakuti bengakosesha umulilo pa bulambo." 
Isaiah40:17 Imishobo ya bantu bonse, ala Lesa aimonafye iyafye, kuli ena tekantu iyoo, aimonafye nga pashili nelyo cimo." 
Isaiah40:18 Nani twingapalanyako Lesa? Nani uo Lesa apalako icata? 
Isaiah40:19 Lesa taba nga kalubi akapangwa na kabasa uwacenjela, nangu akapangwa na kafula wa fyela, no kukengulwilako golide, elyo no kupangilako utuminyololo twa silifa." 
Isaiah40:20 Abantu abafilwa ukumona golide na silifa, bena bafwaya icimuti icishibola. Elyo bafwaya kabasa umo uwacenjela, ewabasamo akalubi kamo, no kukekasha bwino pakukateeka pakuti takaleponena panshi." 
Isaiah40:21 Bushe kanshi imwe tamwaishiba? Bushe kanshi tamwaumfwako? Bushe kanshi imwe ukufumafye na ku kale tabamwebako? Bushe kanshi imwe tamwaumfwako ifyo icalo cabumbilwe, mwa?" 
Isaiah40:22 Ala cabumbilwe na ulya waikala pa cipuna cakwe icabufumu pa mulu wa calo, na bantu ba pano panshi bamonekafye baba ngo tupaso kuli ena. Ewayandalika imyulu ngo mutenge kabili aifungulula nge tenti lyakwikalamo." 
Isaiah40:23 Eulimuna abana ba mfumu no kubalenga ukuba abafye, no kulofya bakateeka bamaka kwati tabatalile ababapo." 
Isaiah40:24 Batila cilya balimbwa babafye ngo lulembelya, tabalati bande na mishila, elyo Yawe aimya umwela, awe nabo e myumine, no kuulululwa nge mpimbili kuli kankungwe." 
Isaiah40:25 “Nani uo mwingampashanyako? Nani uwingalingana na ine?” E kwipusha kwa Wamushilo? 
Isaiah40:26 Tambeni umulu, ulolekesheni. Bushe nani abumbile fyonse ifi mulemona? Nani atantika intanda shilya nge bumba lya fita, uushiita shonse mu mashina lumo lumo? Alikwatisha amaka, icakuti tapamoneka nelyo lumo ulushimubeela nangu ulwabulilapo." 
Isaiah40:27 Nga nomba we Yakobo, cinshi ico uilishanishisha? We Israeli uleti, “Yawe taishiba mibeele yandi, Lesa tasakamanako na ku masakamiko yandi.”" 
Isaiah40:28 Bushe kanshi iwe tawaishiba? Bushe kanshi iwe tawaumfwako, mwa? Yawe, ala e Lesa wape, ewabumba isonde lyonse. Ena tanaka, na maka yakwe tayacepelako iyoo. No muntu kuti afilililwafye ukupima amano yakwe." 
Isaiah40:29 Lesa ena eukosha abacepelwa amaka akoselesha na banakile bene. 
Isaiah40:30 Ngefyo na balumendo bene kuti amaka yabacepa, kuti banakuka, kuti balatalansuka, no kuwa kuti bawa." 
Isaiah40:31 Nomba abatetekela Yawe, awe bena amaka yabo yalabwela. Bema na maka nga kapumpe, ilyo babutuka ulubilo, awe bena tabanaka, ilyo benda, nalyo line amaka yabo tayapwa." 
Isaiah41:1 Lesa aletila ati, “Talaleni kutikeni kuno, imwe mwe bantu ba mu fyalo fya kutali ifya ku lulamba lwa bemba. Ipekanyeni mwe benafyalo, twaleni imilandu yenu ku cilye. Mwalaya ilandila mwe bene. ‘Aleni natuile pamo ku cifulo cabupingushi, tuye umfwapo uwalungika.’" 
Isaiah41:2 “Bushe nani uwaimishe ilya mpalume lubali lwa ku kabanga, iyilecimfya mu nkondo konse uko ileya? Bushe nani alenga ukuti ilya mpalume ilecimfya abantu, ilecimfya na bashamfumu bene? Ulupanga lwaiko lulabasantaula no kubolulula ngo lukungu. Imifwi yaiko nayo ibasalanganya nge mpimbili ishilesendwa no mwela." 
Isaiah41:3 Impalume ilabasokota no kubabutusha ukwabula ubwafya, mu tushila umo ashabala apita na makasa yakwe." 
Isaiah41:4 Bushe kwena nani alenga ukuti cileba ifi? Nani uulenga ukuti inkulo sha bantu shilebapo ukutulafye na ku citendekelo? Ala nine ne Yawe, ne waliko na pa citendekelo, nine wine ne Yawe nkabako na ku kupelekesha kwa fintu fyonse." 
Isaiah41:5 “Abantu ba mu fyalo fyakutali na baba mu lulamba lwa bemba, balimona ifyo ine nacita, balikatwa no mwenso, no kukanka balakanka. Kanshi bonse balipalama, balisa kuno." 
Isaiah41:6 Abantu bonse balafwana no kulacincishanya, balakoshanya abati mukose." 
Isaiah41:7 Uwaba kafula alakoselesha uwengulula golide. Uufula bwino akalubi ku nondo nao alacincisha uulekalundikanya ku misomali. Aeba uulekambantanya ati, ‘Cili bwino,’ awe ninshi nomba kwikasha akalubi pa cikalilo, epakukanapona." 
Isaiah41:8 “Nomba iwe we Israeli, we mubomfi wandi, iwe Yakobo niwe uo naisalila ne mwine, imwe nimwe bamwana cibusa wandi Abrahamu." 
Isaiah41:9 Ine nine namufumishe ku mpela ye sonde, nine namwitile pakuti mufume kulya ku lutwe lwa calo ukushailepela. No kumweba nalimwebele nati, ‘Imwe nimwe babomfi bandi.’ Nine namusalile, kabili nshamulekeleshe iyoo." 
Isaiah41:10 Kanshi imwe mwilatiina iyoo, pantu ine ndi nenu. Mwilasakamana iyoo, pantu ine nine Lesa wenu. Nine nakulamukosha, kabili nine nakulamwafwa. Nine nakulamusunga ku kuboko kwandi ukwa kulyo kabili ukwamaka." 
Isaiah41:11 “Abantu abakulamufulilwa bakulasebana, ne nsoni shakulabekata. Abakulamulwisha bakaba nga pashili nangu cimo, kabili bakafwa." 
Isaiah41:12 Imwe mwakulati mwaeshako ukufwaya abalwani benu, awe tamwalebamonapo nakalya. Abakulamubushisha inkondo tabakacite nelyo cimo, bakalobafye." 
Isaiah41:13 Pantu nine Yawe Lesa wenu, uumwikata ku kuboko kwa ku kulyo. Ndemweba nati, ‘Imwe mwilatiina, pantu nine nakulamwafwa.’" 
Isaiah41:14 Imwe mwe tufwanda tumwana Yakobo mwilatiina. Imwe mwe bena Israeli, nangu kwena mwacepesha, ala nine Yawe nakulamwafwa. Ine ne Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli, nine nakulamupusushako." 
Isaiah41:15 Ine nkamucita nge celeta ilyakupuulilako iŋanu, nalyo ilipya, kabili ilya meno ayatwa. Mukalapuula impili no kushishonaulapo, utupili twena tukalafungaika nge loba." 
Isaiah41:16 Mukalashiposa mu mwela, umwela nao ukalashisenda, icikuuku naco cakulashisalanganya. Lelo imwe, awe mukalasansamuka, pantu ine nine Yawe, mukalanumbanya ine ne Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli." 
Isaiah41:17 “Ilyo abantu bandi bakalakabila amenshi, na ku mikoshi yabo ilyo kukaba imilale kulwa cilaka, ine ne Yawe nkalaumfwa uko balempapata, ine ne Lesa wakwa Israeli nshakatale mbalekelesha nakalya." 
Isaiah41:18 Nkacita imilonga pa mulu wa mpili apashaba nangu cimo, nkacita no tumfukumfuku mwishika. Mu matololo nkacitamo ifishiba fya menshi, na mu calo umwauma ndi nkacitamo utumfukumfuku twa menshi." 
Isaiah41:19 Mu ciswebebe nkaleka mukalekula imiti iyo nkalimbamo, ifimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda, ne milombwa, no muetulo, ne miolifa. Mu mawanga namo mukalalulubala imipapa, ne mikula, na paini pamo." 
Isaiah41:20 Epakuti abantu bakaleimwena, no kwishiba bakaleishiba ukuti nine ne Yawe nabomba ifi. Bakalailuka no kumfwikisha ukuti ni Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli ewalenga ukuti ifi fibepo." 
Isaiah41:21 “Ine ne Yawe ne kateeka wakwa Yakobo ndetila nati, Imwe mwe tulubi, mwe milungu ya mitundu ya bantu, aleni leteni imilandu yenu ku cilye. Iseni muilondolwele apo mulefwaila." 
Isaiah41:22 Iseni kuno, mwise musoselepo libela ifikabako kuntanshi. Londolweleni icilye palwa fyakale, pakuti tubikeko amano. Iseni musoselepo libela ifikabako kuntanshi, pakuti tukafishininkishe ilyo fikabako." 
Isaiah41:23 Soselenipo kabela ifikabako kuntanshi, uleke tukashininkishe ukuti kanshi muli milungu. Aleni citenipo cimo icisuma nangufye cimo icibi, icakuti citupapushe, cituletele no mwenso." 
Isaiah41:24 Lelo kwena tapali ico mwaba, ne milimo yenu yafyefye, na bantu bene abamupakata imwe nabo bene fyabunanifye bacita." 
Isaiah41:25 “Ine nkemya umuntu umo ukufuma ku kabanga uwita peshina lyandi. Nkamuleta, akese sansa ukutampila ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Ena akakanda bakateeka kwati untu alekandila iloba, kwati ni na kabumba uulekasawila ibumba." 
Isaiah41:26 Pali imwe, bushe nani uwatwebelepo libela, nangu ukusoselapo kabela ukuti ici cintu cikacitika, icakuti nefwe tuletilafye, ‘Awe cine cine alilungike?’ Ala nakalyafye, tapaba nangu umo uwakuti asoselepo libela, takwaba muntu nelyo umo uwaumfwapo uko imwe mwe tulubi mwalandapo cimo." 
Isaiah41:27 Ala ninefye ne Yawe naebele kabela Sioni imilandu. Nine natumine inkombe iya kuya fisha mu Yerusalemu imbila nsuma iyansansa, ala abantu bobe bali mu nshila." 
Isaiah41:28 Kuti nga nalolesha pa milungu, awe tepakumoneka nelyo umo uwakuti alandepo cimo, tepakumoneka no wakuti asuke ifyo ine ndeipusha." 
Isaiah41:29 Utulubi tonse, ala twabufifye, ne milimo yatuko yafyefye. Ifimpashanya fyabo, mwela weka ne cimfulumfulu.”" 
Isaiah42:1 Yawe aletila ati, “Moneni umubomfi wandi uyu, uo napeela amaka, eo nasala, kabili eo nsekelamo. Nkabika Umupashi wandi pali ena, nao akalacita umulinganya ku mishobo ya benafyalo." 
Isaiah42:2 Takalecita fikansa, takalepunda, takalebilikisha mu misebo." 
Isaiah42:3 Takafunaule itete ilyafwantwa, ne cishishi icilefuuka takacishimye. Ngo wacishinka akalacitila bonse umulinganya wine wine." 
Isaiah42:4 Takasusuke, kabili takanenuke iyoo, mpakafye umulinganya ukabepo pano isonde, pantu ifyalo fya kutali ku lulamba lwa bemba filalolela amafunde yakwe.”" 
Isaiah42:5 Ifi efyasosa Yawe Lesa, uwabumba imyulu no kuifungulula, uwaikasha isonde na fyonse ififumamo, uubika umupu mu bantu ababapo, no bumi kuli bonse abekalapo." 
Isaiah42:6 “ Ine ne Yawe, niwe naita mu bololoke, kabili nkakwikata ku kuboko no kukulinda. Nkakulenga ukuba icipangano ku bantu, kabili ukaba ulubuuto lwa mishobo ya benafyalo." 
Isaiah42:7 Iwe ukaposha impofu, pakuti shikalemona, kabili niwe ukalubula abakakwa mu cifungo, ukafumya abafungwa abaikala mu mfifi ya mu cifungo." 
Isaiah42:8 “Ine nine Yawe e shina lyandi. Eico teti kube umulungu uwingacindama nga ine, nangu akalubi akakuti kalecindikwa nga ine." 
Isaiah42:9 Ifintu ifyo nasobele kale, nomba efilecitika. Nomba ine nakulakwebelapo libela ifintu ifipya, nangufye ilyo fishilati fitampe ukucitika, nakulakweba.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Imbileni Yawe ulwimbo ulupya, mulumbanyeni ukufuma ku mpela sha pano isonde. Akumulumbeni imwe mwe benda pali bemba, akumulumbeni imwe mwe fibumbwa fyonse ifyaba muli bemba. Mwimbileni imwe mwe fyalo fya ku lulamba lwa bemba, na imwe bonse mwe baikalako." 
Isaiah42:11 Amatololo ne misumba iyabamo, nafilelumbanya Lesa, abena Keda nabo bene nabalemulumbanya. Abaikala mu musumba wa Sela nabalemwawila utupundu twansansa, nabalebilikisha amalumbo palya pene pa mulu wa mpili." 
Isaiah42:12 Abaikala mu fyalo fyakutali ku lulamba lwa bemba nabaletotela, nabalelumbanya Yawe." 
Isaiah42:13 Yawe abilingana nge mpalume pakuya kukulwisha, alulunkana nge cita icine cine pakuya ku nkondo. Alapunda pakusansa abalwani no kubalamuna inkondo, no kucimfya eucimfya abalwani bakwe." 
Isaiah42:14 Yawe aletila ati, “Palepa apo naikalilafye tondolo, ukwabula ukuti ndeasuka abantu bandi. Naikele shilili ukwabula ukucitapo icintu. Ine ndeteta ngo mwanakashi uuli pakupapa, ndetusaila no kupemekesa." 
Isaiah42:15 Ine nkasangula impili no tupili ukuba ifiswebebe, nkomya icani ne miti ine. Imimana nkaisangula amawanga, nkakamya ne fishiba ifya menshi." 
Isaiah42:16 Abantu abapofula nkalabensha mu misebo iyo bashatala abendamo, mu nshila bashaishiba nkalabatungula. Imfifi iyo bendamo, nkaisangula ulubuuto, na mu nshila umwaba amabwe nkayafumyamo pakuti bakaleenda umwatambalala. Ifi efintu nkacita, kabili nshakafilekepofye iyoo." 
Isaiah42:17 Bonse abatetekela utulubi, abamona ifimpashanya ukuti e balesa wabo, bena nkababwekeshamo no kubasebanya nganshi.”" 
Isaiah42:18 Yawe aletila ati, “Umfweni kuno, imwe bankomamatwi. Lolekesheni, mwe mpofu mwe." 
Isaiah42:19 Bushe kwalibako umo uwapofula ukucila umubomfi wandi? Bushe kwabako umo uwakoma amatwi ukucila inkombe iyo ine ntuma? Nani apofula nge nkombe yandi? Nani abankomamatwi ngo mubomfi wandi ne Yawe? 
Isaiah42:20 Mwe bena Israeli, mwaliimwenene ifintu ifingi nganshi, lelo imwe tamwafiposako mano nakalya. Mwalikwata amatwi ayakomoka, nomba imwe tamumfwa nelyo panono nakalya." 
Isaiah42:21 “Icinsekesha kabili ico mfwaila ne Yawe mu bulungami bwandi, ni pakuti mulepetamina amafunde yandi no kuyacindika." 
Isaiah42:22 Lelo kwena balimwibila ifintu, imwe mwe bantu bandi, no kumusenda kwati muli fitapwa. Imwe bonse balimucilikila mu ncengo sha mabwe, no kumuposa mu fifungo. Balimusenda kwati muli fitapwa, ukwabula nelyo umo uwakuti alemupokololako, balimusenda nge fyumafye, ukwabula nelyo umo uwakuti alandeko ati, ‘Babwesheni.’" 
Isaiah42:23 “Nani pali imwe uulekutika kuli ifi fintu? Ukutula pali lelo, bushe mwakulabikako amano kufyo mulekutika?" 
Isaiah42:24 Bushe nani aposele Yakobo ku bapupu? Bushe nani aposele Israeli ku bamutapile? Bushe te Yawe, uo twabifisheko. Imwe tamwalefwaya kulacita ifyo alefwaya ukuti mulecita, tamwalefwaya kulakonka amafunde ayo amupeela." 
Isaiah42:25 Kanshi nao epakupongolwela pali imwe icipyu cakwe conse, no kuleka mumfwe ifyo inkondo yakalipa. Icipyu cakwe caile mushinga ngo mulilo mu calo ca Israeli, nomba imwe nokuti mwilukepo akantu, iyoo. Camocele ngo mulilo, lelo tamwaposeleko amano nakalya.”" 
Isaiah43:1 Lelo nomba umfweni ifilesosa Yawe uwakubumba we Yakobo, uwakupanga we Israeli aleti, “Iwe wilatiina iyoo, pantu ine nalikulubula. Ninkwita ishina lyobe, ala uli wandi." 
Isaiah43:2 Ilyo iwe upita mu menshi ayashika, ine ndaba nobe. Ilyo wabuka imimana panshi, amenshi tayakwibisha iwe. Ilyo upita mu mulilo, iwe taubabuka iyoo, ilyo upita mu lubingu lwa mulilo, iwe talukoca nakalya." 
Isaiah43:3 Pantu ne ukupusushako, nine ne Yawe Lesa wenu, ne Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli. Ine nkabuula Egupto, eo nkacita ulusomo lwakukulubwilapo. Kushi pamo na Seba, nabo bene nkabacita insomo mwipunda lyobe." 
Isaiah43:4 Pantu iwe walicindama ku mano yandi, kabili pantu nalikutemwa, Eico nkapeela abaume pakukabulamo iwe, na bantu pakukabushamo umweo obe," 
Isaiah43:5 Kanshi iwe wilatunsha mutima iyoo, pantu ine nakulaba na iwe. Ine nkafumya abana bobe ku kabanga, no kukukolonganya ukufuma ku masamba." 
Isaiah43:6 Ine nkeba aba ku kapinda ka ku kuso nati, ‘Balekeni babwelelemo.’ Na ba ku kapinda ka ku kulyo nkabeba nati, ‘Mwibalesha kuya iyoo.’ Bwesesheni kuno abana bandi abaume ababa mu fyalo fyakutali, babwesesheni kuno abana bandi abanakashi ababa konsefye." 
Isaiah43:7 Bonse abetilwa peshina lyandi, bonse abo napangile ku bucindami bwandi, abo nalengele no kubumba.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Iteni abantu bandi, bese ku cilye. Abo bantu balikwata amenso ayakumwenako, nomba tabamona, balikwata amatwi ayakumfwilako, nomba tabomfwa." 
Isaiah43:9 Longanikeni abantu ba mitundu yonse ku cilye, babe pamo ne mishobo yonse. Ni bani pali bena abasobelapo libela ifyakuntanshi? Ni bani abasoselepo kabela ifilecitika pali nomba? Aleni nabaletepo bakambone babo abakushininkisha ukuti balalungika. Uleke abantu bomfweko no kusumina basumine ukuti cacine." 
Isaiah43:10 Yawe asosa ati, “Mwe bena Israeli, nimwe bakambone bandi, nimwe nasala ukuba umubomfi wandi, epakuti imwe mulenjishiba no kulantetekela, muleshininkisha nokuti ninefye Lesa. Takwabako lesa umbi iyoo, kanofye ine neka, takwatala akuba lesa na umbi uwantangilile, na kuntanshi kwine takwakatale akuba na umbi nakalya." 
Isaiah43:11 Ine wine, nine Yawe, kabili takwaba umupusushi na umbi ukucila pali ine." 
Isaiah43:12 Nine Yawe ne wasoselepo kabela ifili nokucitika, nine wine napususha kabili nine nasalanganya imbila. Takwatala akuba lesa na umbi uwingacitapo ifi. Imwe nimwe bene bakambone bandi ukuti ine ndi Lesa, efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah43:13 Ee ukufumafye ku kale nakale, ine ndi Lesa, teti pabe nangu umo uwingamfyombotoka, teti kubefye nelyo umo uwingalula ifintu ifyo ine ncitile.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli, Yawe kalubula wenu, aletila ati, “Pa mulandu wakupususha imwe, ine nkatuma ifita, fikesa sansa umusumba wa Babiloni, no kusansamuka kwa bena Kaludea konse kukaluka imisowa." 
Isaiah43:15 Ine ndi Yawe, Lesa wenu Uwamushilo. Nine namubumba mwe bena Israeli, kabili ndi mfumu yenu iyamuteeka.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ukuti, “Nalicitile umusebo muli bemba, nao wali ni nshila iyapitile mu menshi ayamaka." 
Isaiah43:17 Emo natwele ne bumba ilya fita ifyalulunkene, ifyendela pa maceleta na pali bakabalwe. Fyatotobele panshi no kunwena, awe no kwima tefyakwimapo nakalya, fyashiminina nga filya fishima inyali." 
Isaiah43:18 “Imwe, mwilaibukisha ifyacitike kale, mwilatontonkanya pa fyapita." 
Isaiah43:19 Bikisheni amano ku fintu ifipya ifyo ine nalacita. No kutampa nafitampa ukulacitika, bushe imwe tamulefimona iyoo? Ine nalapanga umusebo uwakulalanya amatololo pakati, no kucitamo mu ciswebebe imilonga ya menshi." 
Isaiah43:20 Ne nama shine isha mpanga shakulantotela, bamumbwe bakulancindika, pamo pene ne mbuni, pantu nalateyanya amenshi mu matololo, no kucitamo mu ciswebebe imilonga ya menshi, pakuti balenwamo abantu bandi abo ine nasala." 
Isaiah43:21 Aba e bantu abo ine naibumbila ne mwine, kabili ebakulanumbanya.”" 
Isaiah43:22 Yawe aletila ati, “Iwe we Yakobo, awe kwena tene upepa iyoo, we Israeli tene waposako amano nakalya." 
Isaiah43:23 Tamundetela mpaanga sha malambo ishakungocela, amalambo yenu tamuyalosha kukucindika ine iyoo. Imituulo ya cabunga iyo ine namulomba, awe teyakucila maka yenu, kabili ine nshamutendusha mukulamulomba lomba ububani." 
Isaiah43:24 Imwe tamuposa ndalama shenu pakunshitilamo ububani iyoo, kabili tamufikapo ukulansansamusha na mafuta ya nama sha malambo yenu. Imwe mwakoselelafye ukulancusha kulwa bubifi bwenu, no kulamfiisha ku mukoshi ku milandu iyo mucita." 
Isaiah43:25 “Ine wine, nine Lesa uufuuta bumpulamafunde, neco ncitila ifyo, nico efyo ine mfwaya ukucita. Nshakebukishe ifyabubifi fyenu." 
Isaiah43:26 Aleni natuteeke nenu icilye, soseni umulandu wenu. Londololeni umulandu wenu, pakuti munshinine ukuti imwe nimwe mulungika." 
Isaiah43:27 Icikolwe cenu icantanshi calibifishe, abamwimininako nabo bene balibifishe kuli ine." 
Isaiah43:28 Ni pa mulandu uyu nkasebanishisha bashimapepo benu. Kabili nkakukanda iwe we Yakobo, no kuleka usebane we Israeli.”" 
Isaiah44:1 “Umfwa kuno, we Yakobo umubomfi wandi, weo nasala, iwe we Israeli.”" 
Isaiah44:2 Yawe aletila ati, “Nine nakubumba iwe, kabili ndakwafwa ukutulafye ilyo waimitwe. Kanshi iwe wilatunsha mutima iyoo, we Yakobo uli mubomfi wandi, we Yeshuruni uo naisalila." 
Isaiah44:3 Pantu mu calo icauma ndi ine nkaletamo amenshi, na mu matololo ine nkacitamo imilonga ya menshi. Ine nkalapongolwela Umupashi wandi pa bana benu, kabili nkapaala ne finshikulula fyenu." 
Isaiah44:4 Bonse bakalakula nge cani icilokelelwa bwino ne mfula, bakalakula nge mishingu iyaba mupepi ne mimana." 
Isaiah44:5 Umo akatila, ‘Ine ndi muntu wakwa Yawe,’ umbi nao akainika ishina lyakwa Yakobo, umbi nao akalemba pa lupi lwakwe ati, ‘Wakwa Yawe,’ akabikapo ne shina lyabubili ilya Israeli." 
Isaiah44:6 “Ine ne Yawe ne uteeka no kulubula imwe mwe bena Israeli, ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, ndetila nati, ‘Nine Citendekelo, nine Wakupelekesha, ala takwaba Lesa na umbi iyoo, kanofye ine neka.’" 
Isaiah44:7 Nani uuli nga ine? Kaeminine, alande, ailandile, alondolole ubwiminishi bwakwe apo ndi, alondolole ifyacitika ukutula apo nasalile abantu bandi. Kasoselepo kabela ifikabako kuntanshi, kalondolwele libela ifili nokucitika." 
Isaiah44:8 Kanshi mwilatunsha mitima, mwitiina, ngefyo na kale line ine nalimwebelepo, no kumulondolwela libela fyonse ifili nokucitika, kabinge nimwe bakambone bandi. Bushe kwalibako Lesa umbi ukucila pali ine? Awe takwaba Cilibwe cimbi nakalya, ine nshatala ŋumfwapo.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Abantu bonse abapanga utulubi, fipuba fyabantu, no tulubi twine uto aba bantu bacankilwa nganshi nato twine tunangwafye. Abantu abapepa iyi milungu, awe balikutwa, kabili fipubafye, no kusebana bakasebaninapo." 
Isaiah44:10 Umuntu ukwenga icimpashanya ca cela elyo no kulacipepa kwati ni lesa, cine cine mulimo uwakuicushafye." 
Isaiah44:11 Na bantu bonse abacipepa, ninshi nabo bene bakasebana. Abenga no kupanga utulubi, ala bantufye, no kupela epo bapelela. Nabalongane bonse bese ku cilye, uleke bese bekatwe umwenso no kusebana basebane." 
Isaiah44:12 Kafula wa fyela ewakubuula icela cimo, eco alafulila pa mulilo wa malasha. Elyo aikatisha inondo mu minwe alauma ne cela, apangamo akalubi mu musango uo alefwaya kabelemo. Yasuka ne nsala yamwikata, alaumfwa ne cilaka, no kunaka ninshi e minakile, pantu amaka yamupwa." 
Isaiah44:13 Pambi kabasa wa mbao nao ewakubuula icimuti ica mikedari cimo, acipima ubutali, alengapo ne cimpashanya, nomo cili nokupelela, elyo abuula ne fibombelo, alacibasa, ilyo ninshi alekonkafye umo ali ashilile. Asuka acibasa, naco cabafye ngo muntu, no kulamonekafye icisuma ngo muntu, pakuti cibe icalinga mu ŋanda iyakucipepelamo." 
Isaiah44:14 Pambi Kabasa wa mbao kuti aya fwaya ifimuti ifyalepesha ifya keda, efyo aisa bomfya, pambi kuti asala icimuti ca oki, pambi icamwengele umo uwaba mu mutengo. Limbi kuti kabasa wine ewailimbila umwine umuti walepesha, wasuka nao wakula ilyo ulelokelelwa ne mfula." 
Isaiah44:15 Ku cimuti cimo cine, umuntu umo kuti aputulako icakukosesha umulilo, elyo kabili abuula icisheleko, abasamo na kalubi kamo. Kuti aputulako icakukosesha umulilo uwakonta, no wakufumbikamo umukate, elyo kabili abuula icisheleko, apangamo umulungu umo, no kupepa eo alapepa." 
Isaiah44:16 Kanshi ku cimuti cimo cine kuti aputulako icakukosesha umulilo, aocelapo ne nama, alya, no kutemwa atemwa. Ilyo aleonta umulilo, aletifye, “We mulilo nobe ubusuma. Eeya, awe nomba nakangabuka.”" 
Isaiah44:17 Elyo kabili batini abuula icisheleko, apangamo na kalubi kamo. Eko alafukankilako pakukapepa. Alakapapata ati, “Ulempusushako, pantu iwe niwe mulungu wandi.”" 
Isaiah44:18 Kwena aba bantu, iyoo ni mpelwamano, tabaishiba ifyo bacita. Balikutwa, tabamona kantu, ne mitima yabo yalifumbatwa." 
Isaiah44:19 Abantu abapanga utulubi tabatontonkanya nelyo panono nakalya, tabakwata mano ayakumona ukuti, “Icimuti ico ine mputwileko nakoseshako umulilo, na pa mulilo waciko ine nimfumbikapo umukate, ningocapo ne nama, no kulya nindya. Elyo kabili icisheleko, bushe kuti eco ine napangamo icilubi icabunani, icakuti ine ndefukankilako, no kulacipepa, nacofye icimuti?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Cimo cinefye no kulya imito. Amano yabo ayabupuba yabaloshafye kumbi kumbi. Tabeluka nakalya icakuti batile, “Ici cintu njikete mu minwe, bushe tecabufifye.”" 
Isaiah44:21 Yawe aletila ati, “Iwe we Yakobo, uleibukisha ifi fintu. We Israeli uleibukisha ukuti uli mubomfi wandi, nine nakubumba we Israeli pakuti uleba umubomfi wandi, ine nshakakulabeko iyoo." 
Isaiah44:22 Ine nalikubelelako uluse ku bumpulamafunde bobe nabo bwapashika nga filya ikumbi lipashika, ifyabubifi fyobe fyapashika nga fubefube wa lucelo. Kanshi iwe bwelelafye kuli ine, pantu ine nine nakulubula." 
Isaiah44:23 “Iwe we mulu, akwaula utupundu twansansa, pantu Yawe nabomba umulimo wakwe. Akupundeni ne nsansa, mwe ncende shafisama mwisonde. Akupundeni ne nsansa, nemwe mwe mpili, nemwe mwe miti yonse mu mitengo. Pantu Yawe nalubula Yakobo, nalanga ubucindami bwakwe mu Israeli.”" 
Isaiah44:24 Efyasosa Yawe Kalubula obe, kabili uwakubumbile mwifumo. “Nine Yawe uwabumba ifintu fyonse, uwayandalika imyulu eka, uwabumbile isonde ukwabula nangu umo uwakungafwako." 
Isaiah44:25 Nine mfulunganya ifisesema bakasesema babufi, no kupelenganya amano ya bantu ababuka, nine nkanya abamano, no kubalanga ifyo amano yabo yaba ayabupuba." 
Isaiah44:26 Nine mfikilisha ifisobela umubomfi wandi, ilyo ine ntuma inkombe shandi kukusokolola ifyo mpekanya, nga nasosa palwa musumba wa Yerusalemu ukuti, abantu bakesa ikalamo nakabili, nokuti imisumba ya mu calo ca Yuda ikabuukululwa cipya cipya, ninshi nifyo fine, iyi misumba nine nkaikuula umo yaonaike." 
Isaiah44:27 Nine nkamya bemba mukalamba ilyo namweba ukuti akame, kabili nine nkamya ne mimana ine iyipongwelamo." 
Isaiah44:28 Njeba na Sairasi nati, ‘Iwe, uli mucemi wandi, kabili ukalacita fyonse ifyo ine mfwaya ukuti ulecita, niwe ukapeela abantu icebo icakukuula cipya cipya umusumba wa Yerusalemu, kabili ukabeba no kupekanya umufula uwakukuulapo Itempele lyandi.’”" 
Isaiah45:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ku musubwa wakwe Sairasi ukuti, “Niwe naikata ku kuboko kwandi ukwa kulyo pakuti ucimfye imishobo ya bantu, nokuya poka ishamfumu amaka yashiko, ukupankula impongolo sha misumba pantanshi yobe, pakuti tapali uwakwisalako ifiibi." 
Isaiah45:2 Nine wine nkaya ndekupekanishishako umwakuti ukalepita nkaya ndepasa impili no tupili twine. Nkaya ndetobaula impongolo sha mukuba, no kukontaula imipilikisho yashiko iya fyela." 
Isaiah45:3 Nkakupeela ifyuma ifyo batutila umwafisama ne cuma icafiswa mu cifulo icankaama, epakuti ukashininkishe ukuti kanshi ine ndi Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli uwakwita mwishina lyobe." 
Isaiah45:4 Ico ine nakusalila, ni pakuti uletulanyako umubomfi wandi Yakobo, Israeli uo ine nakwita mwishina lyobe. Na iwe ninkusala, ninkucindika apakalambafye, nangu kwena iwe tawanjishiba." 
Isaiah45:5 Ine nine Yawe, takwaba na umbi iyoo, ine nine Lesa, takwaba na umbi iyoo. Ine nakupeela amaka ayo ufwile ukulakwata, nangu kwena iwe tawanjishiba." 
Isaiah45:6 Ico ine nacitila ifi ni pakuti ukufuma ukutula akasuba, ukuya shinta no kuwila akasuba, abantu bonse baleshininkisha ukuti, ninefye Yawe, takwaba na umbi iyoo." 
Isaiah45:7 Ine nine mpanga ulubuuto ne mfifi ine, nine ndeta inshita yamutende kabili ne nshita ya finkunka, nine ne Yawe ncita fyonse ifi." 
Isaiah45:8 “We mulu akuloka ubololoke nge mfula, mwe makumbi akufumfumuneni ubololoke nge mfula, umushili nao wisuke, no kupususha kwine kutwale ifisabo, no bololoke bulekulila capamo, nine ne Yawe nkalenga ukuti ifi fintu ficitike.”" 
Isaiah45:9 “Cabulanda ku uumana na kabumba wakwe. Inongo imo iyilingenefye ne nongo shibiye shonse, bushe kuti eyapama ukulapashanya no waibumba? Bushe ibumba kuti elyalaipusha na kabumba ati ni finshi ulecita? Bushe ico ulepanga ecingatila takwata maboko mwa?" 
Isaiah45:10 Cabulanda ku mwana uwingapama ukweba wishi ati, ‘Cinshi ico mwamfyalile?’ Nangu ukweba banyina ati, ‘Cinshi mwampapile ine?’" 
Isaiah45:11 “Ine ne Yawe, Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli kabili kabumba wakwe, pa fili nokubako ndetila nati, ‘Imwe tamwaba na nsambu ishakunjipusha palwa bana bandi, nangu ukulampeela icebo icakucitapo cimo." 
Isaiah45:12 Ine neka nine nabumba isonde, no kubumba abantu bene abaikalapo. Nine nafungulula imyulu ku maka yandifye, nine nenga ukuti akasuba kalebalika, kumo kwine no mweshi, ne ntanda shine." 
Isaiah45:13 Nine wine nkemya Sairasi pakuti abombepo umulimo umo uwakulungika ifintu ifyo ine napanga mu mutima wandi. Ine nkalamuwamishako inshila shakwe shonse. Eukankuulila cipya cipya umusumba wa Yerusalemu, no kundubwilako abantu bandi ababa muli bunkole. Pali uyu mulimo, awe takapokelelepo amalipilo iyoo, nangu ukulapokelapo icilambu. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:14 Kabili Yawe asosa ati, “Ifyuma fya mu Egupto ne fya mu Kushi, fikaba fyenu, na balya bantu ba mu Saba ababa abatali bakaba basha benu, bakalamukonka panuma, ilyo ninshi bali mu minyololo. Bakalamukunkwila panshi, no kulasaala abati, ‘Cine cine nimwe mweka mwaba na Lesa, nao e Lesa ekafye kabili takwaba na umbi.’”" 
Isaiah45:15 Cine cine uli Lesa uwaifisa, we Lesa wakwa Israeli kabili umupusushi wakwe." 
Isaiah45:16 Abapanga utulubi bonse bakasebana, bakaya ne nsoni nashibekata, bonse bakasebanina capamo" 
Isaiah45:17 Lelo abena Israeli bena Yawe akabapususha, akabapeela ipusukilo lyamuyayaya. Kanshi bena tabakabale abasebana, kabili tabakabale abekatwa na nsoni iyoo ukufika umuyayaya." 
Isaiah45:18 Pantu efyo asosa Yawe uwabumbile umulu, ena e Lesafye. “Nine nabumba isonde no kulilinganya bwino, ewalikasha pa maka. Talibumba pakuti lilebafye amatololo, awe. Ico alibumbila ni pakuti epo abantu baleikala.” Atila, “Nine Yawe takwaba na umbi iyoo.”" 
Isaiah45:19 Atila, “Nshilandila mu bumfisolo iyoo, nangu ukufisama muno umwafiita. Ine nshaebele ukuti abana bakwa Yakobo balemfwaya icifwaye fwaye iyoo, pantu ine ndi Yawe, kabili nanda ifyacishinka, ndeshibisha na bantu ifyalungama.”" 
Isaiah45:20 Yawe aletila ati, “Longaneni kuno, imwe mwe bantu ba mishobo yonse, iseni bonse mwe bapuswikepo. Abashakutuluka ni abo abatandasha utulubi twabo utwa fimuti ilyo baleendauka, abapepa ku milungu iyishakwata amaka yakubapususha." 
Isaiah45:21 Iseni muilondolwele umulandu wenu mu cilye, abakuikaanina nabapandane amano. Bushe kale nani asoselepo kabela ifi fintu, no kufilondolwelapo libela? Bushe teine ne Yawe? Ishiba ukuti tapali Lesa umbi kano ine, umupusushi, kabili umololoke. Ala takwaba Lesa na umbi ukucila pali ine." 
Isaiah45:22 “Kanshi imwe mwe bantu bonse mwe ba pano isonde, bweleleni uko ndi, pakuti mupusuke, pantu ine neka, nine Lesa takwaba na umbi." 
Isaiah45:23 Nalapa, napalifye ine wine, nati, ifyo ine nsosa, ala fyacishinka, kabili nshakabweshe ifyo ine nanda. Napalifye ine wine, abantu bonse bakalaisa mukufukama kuli ine, bakandaya ifilayo no kumpetamina." 
Isaiah45:24 Bonse bakalalanda pali ine abati, ‘Ni muli Yawe eka emwaba ubulungami na maka.’ Lelo bonse abamupata, awe bena bakasebana no kwikatwa insoni ku cinso cakwe." 
Isaiah45:25 Lelo ni muli Yawe emo bamwana Israeli bakabela abakaele, kabili nabo bakalamulumbanya.”" 
Isaiah46:1 Akalubi ketwa Beli nakakontama, na kalya ketwa Nebo nakenama, nomba batulonga pali bapunda, no kusendwa nge fipe pa fitekwa ifishikwete maka." 
Isaiah46:2 Bainama no kukontamina panshi, nabafilwa ukupusushako ifipe, utulubi twine tulya twasendwa muli bunkole pamo nabo." 
Isaiah46:3 “Umfweni kuno, mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo, imwe mwe bantu bonse mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli abashalapo. Mwebo nasungilila ukutula ilyo mwaimitwe, kabili nine musunga ukutula apo mwafyalilwa." 
Isaiah46:4 Ala nine Lesa wenu, no kuba efyo nakulaba, nakulamusunga ukushintafye na ku bukote bwenu, ukushintafye napo ku mitwe yenu kukabuutila tuutu ku mfwi. Nine namubumba, no kumusunga nine wine nakulamusunga. Nine wine nakulamwafwako no kulamupokololako." 
Isaiah46:5 “Nga nani mwingampalanyako, nangu ukuninganyako? Bushe kwalibako umo uwakuti mwampalanyako nangu ukulaninganyako?" 
Isaiah46:6 Abantu balafukumuna golide muli batumba babo, no kulapima silifa wabo pa cipimo. Balafwaya kafula umo, no kumulemba incito iyakubengelako umulungu, elyo batini uo wine eo kabili balafukankilako pakukapepa." 
Isaiah46:7 Balawimya no kuusendela pa mabeya, no kuya ubika apo wikala, tauselapo nakalya. Ukufuma pali ilya ncende teti umone ukuiseshapo nakalya. Elyo umo nangu aupapate shani nakalya tewakwasuka, kabili teti umupususheko ku kucula kwakwe nakalya." 
Isaiah46:8 “Ala muleibukisha uyu mulandu mwe babifi ba bantu mwe, muletontonkanya bwino ifyo ine nacita." 
Isaiah46:9 Muleibukisha ifintu ifyacitike kale, epakuti muleshininkisha ukuti ine nekafye, nine Lesa, nokuti takwaba nelyo umo uo twingalingana nankwe." 
Isaiah46:10 Ukutulafye na ku citendekelo, awe ine ndasoselapo kabela ifili nokubako. Ukutulafye na ku kale, ine ndalondolwelapo libela ifili nokucitika. Ndasosa ukuti ifyo ine mpanga ukucita, ninshi fili nokucitika. Ine ndacita fyonse ifyo ndefwaya ukucita." 
Isaiah46:11 Nketa kapumpe ukufuma ku kabanga, umuntu uukafuma ku calo cakutali. Uyo muntu wakutali eukesa mukucita ifyo ine napanga ukucita. Ifi efyo napekanya, no kucitika efikacitika." 
Isaiah46:12 Umfweni kuno, mwe bantu bakosa imitwe, mwe bantu ababa ukutali no bololoke." 
Isaiah46:13 Ala ubololoke bwandi ine nimbupalamika, tapakokole na kukokola iyoo. Ine nshapose nshita pakupususha abantu bandi. Ine nkapususha Sioni, nkabika ubucindami bwandi pa bena Israeli.”" 
Isaiah47:1 “Isa pano panshi, ikala mu lukungu, we Nacisungu mwana Babiloni. Ikala panshi mu lukungu ukwabula icipuna cabufumu, we Mwana mukashana wa Kaludea. Ukutelela kwa mubili obe nomba kwapwa, takwalemoneka no wakukutentemba nakalya." 
Isaiah47:2 Ale buula impelo, ulepela ubunga. Fuula icitambala ku menso. Pimpula icakufwala cobe, cifike na mu matanta, ale nomba akwabuka imimana." 
Isaiah47:3 Epakuti ushale ubwamba, ne nsoni shikwikate ilyo abantu bakulakutamba. Ine ndelandula, kabili nshashepo umuntu nelyo umo." 
Isaiah47:4 Umulubushi wesu Yawe, umwine wa fita e shina lyakwe, e Wamushilo wakwa Israeli." 
Isaiah47:5 “Iwe kabelame umwafiita, kabili wikalefye tondolo, we Mwana mwanakashi wa bena Kaludea. Nomba iwe abantu tabalekwita namfumu wa mitundu ya bantu iyoo." 
Isaiah47:6 Ine nalifulilwe abantu bandi, nabacitile kwati te bantu bandi, nasuka nabaposa na ku maboko yobe, nobe tawabakwatileko na luse iyoo. Na bakote bene wabacitile ubuluku, no kulenga ikoli lyobe ukubafinina." 
Isaiah47:7 Iwe mu mano yobe waleti, ‘Ine nkabelelela ukuba namfumu pe.’ Tawalesakamana kuli ifi fintu, nangu ukulatontonkanya uko fikapelela ne fikatumbukamo nakalya." 
Isaiah47:8 “Umfwa kuno, iwe we watemwa ukuliila pa calo, iwe utontonkanya ukuti walikala umutelelwe. Iwe ulaitutubula ukuti, ‘Ninefye neka.’ Nokuti, ‘Takwaba na umbi uwaba nga ine.’ Mu mano yobe utila, ‘Nshakatale mba mukamfwilwa, nangu ukufwilwa abana.’" 
Isaiah47:9 Ala ayo mashamo yonse yabili ukapulikilwafye yakuponena, nayo yakakuponenafye pa bushiku bumo bwine, ukufwilwa abana no kuba mukamfwilwa. Yakakuponena umupwilapo, nangu iwe wapanda amanga ayashaifulila, no kukwatisha ifishimba ifyamaka." 
Isaiah47:10 “Iwe wacetekelafye mu kubifya kobe, pantu waletontonkanya ukuti takuli nelyo umo uulekumona. Amano yobe no bucenjeshi bobe fyakutwelefye kumbi kumbi, mu mutima obe iwe waletifye, ‘Ninefye neka,’ nokuti, ‘Takwaba na umbi uwaba nga ine.’" 
Isaiah47:11 Nomba ishamo likakwishila, ukafilwa ukulitandula. Umupamba ukakuponena, ukafilwa ukuutalusha, ubonaushi ubo ushaenekele, bukakupumikisha." 
Isaiah47:12 “Ale akusunga amanga yobe ayashaifulila, kumo kwine ne fishimba fyobe nafyo ifishaifulila, pantu e fintu iwe washangilamo ukutula na ku bukashana bobe. Nakalimo fyena fikakutulanyako, nakalimo fyena efikatiinya abalwani bobe, mwa?" 
Isaiah47:13 Nangu abakukupandako amano bafula shani, nakalya tawakashansheko. Ukaleke bakese bonse abo abalengula intanda no kukweba ifileisa, nabo abalengula imyeshi iyipya iyamoneka yonse, ukamone nga cakuti bakakupusushako ku fintu ifili nokukwishila." 
Isaiah47:14 “Abo bantu bakabafye ngo tupimbili, uto umulilo ukocafye nakalya nakalya. Abo bantu bakafilililwafye ukuipususha abene, pantu ulubingu lwa mulilo lukalumisha. Uyu mulilo tawakabe mulilo wakuti umuntu akangabukeko, takwakabe conto icakuti umuntu ontepo, iyoo." 
Isaiah47:15 Efyo bakaba aba bantu kuli iwe, pantu ebo waikalilafye ukulapandako amano, ebo wacitile nabo amakwebo ukutula ku bwaice bobe. Bonse bakakusha, bonse umo umo bakaya noko balefwaya, tapakashale nangu umo uwakukupusushako nakalya.”" 
Isaiah48:1 “Umfweni kuno, imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo, mwe baitwa abena Israeli, mwe bafyalilwa mu luko lwakwa Yuda. Imwe pakulapa mulalumbula ishina lyakwa Yawe, kabili mulaitakisha palwa kupepa Lesa wakwa Israeli. Lelo kwena imwe ifyo mulanda, awe te fyacishinka, kabili tafilungama iyoo." 
Isaiah48:2 Kwena mulacankwa pakulaita amuti, ‘Ifwe tuli bena musumba wamushilo,’ na pakulatila, ‘Ifwe twashintilila kuli Lesa wakwa Israeli, uwitwa Yawe umwine wa fita.’" 
Isaiah48:3 Kale ine nalesoselapo kabela ifili nokucitika, Akanwa kandi kalisosele, kabili nafilengele fishibikwe, no kupulikilwa mwalepulikilwafye uko ine naficita." 
Isaiah48:4 Pantu ine nalishiba ukuti imwe mwalikosa imitwe, imikoshi yenu yakosa nge cela ne mpumi yenu yaumalala ngo mukuba" 
Isaiah48:5 Kanshi ine epakumwebelapo libela ifi fyonse, no kufilondolwela kabela ilyo tafilabako, epali imwe mwalatila tulubi etulengele ukuti ifi fintu ficitike, epali kabili mwalati, ‘Utulubi twandi etwaficitile. Cimpashanya candi ico nabasa na kalubi kandi ako naenga efilengele ukuti ifi fintu ficitike.’" 
Isaiah48:6 “Ifi ifintu mwalifyumfwile kale, moneni fyalicitika, Bushe tamuli nokusuminafye ukuti ifyo ine nsoselapo libela, fyacishinka? Pali nomba ndemwebelapo ifintu ifipya ifikabako, ifintu ifyafisama ifyo ine nshasokolwele kale." 
Isaiah48:7 Ifi fintu fipya tafyaliko kale iyoo, kabili imwe tamwatala amufyumfwapo ukushinta na lelo. Pantu amufyumfwapo, kuti mwalati, ‘Efintu twaishiba na kale.’" 
Isaiah48:8 Imwe tamwatala amumfwa kabili tamwatala amwishiba bwino, ukutulafye apo mwafyalilwa amatwi yenu tayatala ayakomoka, imwe mwalishibikwa ku busangu bwenu tamuli bakucetekela, mwaitilwe cisanguka ukutula apo mwafyalilwa." 
Isaiah48:9 “Pa mulandu we shina lyandi, ine kanshi ndetala nshikataleko mu kufulwa kwandi, Pa mulandu wa kutashiwa kwandi, ndeshikatalako, no kumulofya ine nshakamulofye imwe iyoo." 
Isaiah48:10 Nga filya fine silifa alopololwa mwilungu lya mulilo, efyo nalopolola na imwe pakumupisha mu macushi ayaba ngo mulilo ku bukali." 
Isaiah48:11 Ico ine ndecitila ifi ni pa mulandu wa ine ne mwine, ine teti ndeke abantu balensaalula no kusuula ishina lyandi, nangu ukuleka umbi eo balelumbanya, awe nakalya, pantu ninefye neka abantu bali nokulalumbanya.”" 
Isaiah48:12 “Umfwa kuno we Yakobo, we Israeli weo ine naita. Ine nine Yawe, nine Citendekelo, kabili nine Wakupelekesha, inefye neka, nine Lesa." 
Isaiah48:13 Maboko yandi yene eyaikasha umufula apaba isonde, ukuboko kwandi ekwayandalika umulu. Ilyo mfiita, filambeela no kwimina pamo." 
Isaiah48:14 “Longaneni bonse, mwise mukutike. Ala tapaba umulungu nangu umo uwasobele ifi fintu. Nine nasosele ukuti uwasalwa wandi umo akawililila umusumba wa Babiloni, pamo na bantu bene abaikalamo abena Kaludea. Akacita ifyo ine mfwaya ukuti acite." 
Isaiah48:15 Ine wine nine nalanda, no kumwita nine wine namwita, nine wine mutungulula, no kuleka aleshuuka mu mulimo wakwe." 
Isaiah48:16 “Kanshi imwe palameni kuno, mumfwe ifyo ine ndesosa. Ukutulafye ilyo natendeke ukubilisha, ine nsosela ifintu pa lwalala, kabili ilyo fyalecitika epo nali. Kanshi nomba Imfumu Yawe ampeela Umupashi wakwe, no kuntuma antuma.”" 
Isaiah48:17 Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli, Yawe, Umulubushi wenu, aletila ati, “Ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu, uumufunda ifyakuti filemuwamina, kabili uumutungula mu nshila iyo muli nokulaendamo." 
Isaiah48:18 Imwe amulabika umutima ku mafunde yandi, ala nga mwaikala ne cibote ngo mumana uupita lyonsefye, no bulungami bwenu nga kuti bwabafye nga matamba aya pali bemba." 
Isaiah48:19 Ubufyashi bobe nga bwafula ngo musensenga uwapeleka uushingapendwa, abana bobe nga bafula ngo tuseke twa mucanga, ne shina lyobe nga talyatala aliputuka, kabili nga teti ndeke balobelele iyoo." 
Isaiah48:20 “Fumeni mu musumba wa Babiloni, butukeni ku bena Kaludea. Akwauleni ne nsansa, salanganyeni uyu mulandu muleti, ‘Yawe nalubula umubomfi wakwe Yakobo.’" 
Isaiah48:21 Ilyo Yawe alepisha abantu bakwe mu matololo, abantu bakwe tabalecula ku cilaka iyoo. Alilengele ukuti amenshi yalefukauka mu cilibwe. Yawe alilepwile icilibwe, amenshi nayo epakutulwila.”" 
Isaiah48:22 Yawe alisosa ati, “Ababi, awe bena tabakamone mutende.”" 
Isaiah49:1 Umfweni kuno, mwe bantu ba mishobo iya kutali, na mwe baikala ku lulamba lwa pali bemba. Yawe alinsalile ine, ilyo nshilati mfyalwe, ukutula munda muli mayo alenjita mwishina." 
Isaiah49:2 Alenga na kanwa kandi ukuti kabe akatwa ngo lupanga, no kunsunga umwinefye ewalensunga mu cintelelwe ca kuboko kwakwe. Ancita ngo mufwi uwatwa, amfisa na mu mucenje wakwe." 
Isaiah49:3 Anjeba no kunjeba ati, “Iwe Israeli uli mubomfi wandi, ukupitila muli iwe nkalanga ubucindami bwandi.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Na ine nalyaswike nati, “Ukubomba ine ndabomba, lelo kwena njakashafye. Nangu ndabombesha nganshi, lelo tapaba ico mwenamo, nakalya.” Lelo kwena uwingampeela insambu, ni Yawe, no kunambula ni Lesa wandi eukanambula pafyo nabomba." 
Isaiah49:5 Na nomba efyo asosa Yawe, uwampangile munda muli mayo, ansonta no kuba umubomfi wakwe, pakuti mbweseshe Yakobo uko ali, na pakuti ndete Israeli ku mwine. Kanshi ine nincindama pa cinso cakwa Yawe, kabili Lesa wandi eunkosha." 
Isaiah49:6 Yawe asosa ati, “Cintu cayanguka ukucita iwe ukuba umubomfi wandi, uwakubukulusha inko shakwa Yakobo ishashalapo, no kubwesha aba mu bena Israeli abo nasunga. Kanshi nalalundapo no kukucita ulubuuto ulwakulasanikila imishobo ya bantu abenafyalo, pakuti ukupususha kwandi kukafike na ku mpela ya pano isonde.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Ifi efisosa Yawe. Kalubula kabili Uwamushilo uwakwa Israeli asosa kuli uyo abantu basuulisha nganshi, uo umushobo wa bantu wapatisha, uo ne shamfumu ishikali shateeka ubusha. Yawe asosa ati, “Ishamfumu shikakumona kabili, shikeminina pakukucindika, intungulushi nasho ilyo shikakumona, nasho shikeminina no kukwinamina pakukucindika, pantu uwakusala ni Yawe munshifutuka, ni Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Yawe alesosa aletila, “Mu nshita yandi yakulanga icikuuku, ine nkakwasuka. Ubushiku bwakupususha nga bwafika, ine nkakulangulukilako. Ine nkalakulinda no kulakusunga, nkakucita ukuba icipangano ku bantu bandi. Nkalenga icalo ukubweseshiwapo, no kwakanya abantu incende shabo ishakwikalamo isho ishaonaulwa." 
Isaiah49:9 Ukeba aba mu fifungo auti, ‘Fumeni.’ Abaikala umwafiita nabo ukabeba auti, ‘Iseni kuno ukwabuuta.’ Mu nshila isho bendamo bakasangamo ifilyo. Bakaba nge mpaanga ishiliila umulemfwe mu tupili." 
Isaiah49:10 Tabakabale abomfwa insala nangu icilaka, akasuba ne cipuki ca mu matololo tafyakaleboca iyoo. Pantu uyo uwabatemwa akalabatungulula, eukalabatwala na ku tumfukumfuku twa menshi." 
Isaiah49:11 Ine nkacita impili shandi shonse ukuba umusebo, nkacitapo no musebo uwatumpuka umwakuti mukalepita abantu bandi." 
Isaiah49:12 Moneni abantu bakafuma ukutali, bamo bakafuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso na ku masamba, na bambi ku Siene lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Akwaula ne nsansa, iwe we mulu, nobe we calo, akwanga, samuna ulwimbo we mpili! Pantu Yawe natalalika abantu bakwe, kabili nalangulukilako abantu bakwe abalecula." 
Isaiah49:14 Lelo Sioni ena atilafye, “Awe ine Yawe alindekelesha. Awe ine alindabako.”" 
Isaiah49:15 “Bushe umwanakashi kuti alabako ku kana kakwe akanya akaleonka? Bushe kuti apata umwana uo aifyalila, batini? Nangu pambi nyina engalabako kuli mwane, nomba, ine nshakatale nkulabako iwe nelyo panono." 
Isaiah49:16 Iwe Yerusalemu, ine tekuti nkulabeko nakalya, pantu ine nalikulemba iwe mu ndupi shandi, ifibumba fyobe fyaba ku cinso candi inshita shonse." 
Isaiah49:17 Abana bobe abalaisa mukulakukuula cipya cipya bali mu nshila, nabakubongolwele no kukonaula balafumamo, no kuya baya." 
Isaiah49:18 Sansula amenso, uloleshe monse monse. Abantu bobe bonse balya baleisa kukulongana, ni mumobe balaisa longana.” Yawe asosa ati, “Napalifye ine ne Mumi, nalapa ukuti iwe ukabafwala nge fyakukobeka ifyamutengo, kabili ukafikaka na mu musana nga nabwinga uufwele ifyabusaka." 
Isaiah49:19 “Icalo cobe icali icaonaika kale, no kushala amatololo kabili icapomonwa, pali nomba awe calacepelelafye pa mulandu wa bantu abalaisa mukulaikalamo. Na bantu abakubongolwele no kukusha icibolya, nomba bakabatamfisha ukutali." 
Isaiah49:20 Abana bobe abafyalilwe muli bunkole ilyo wali mu cililishi, ubushiku bumo bakasuka abakweba abati, ‘Awe ino mpanga naicepesha, tufwaileko impanga na imbi iyakuti ifwe tuleikalamo.’" 
Isaiah49:21 Elyo nomba nobe ukaleiipusha we mwine mu mutima auti. ‘Bushe kwena nani amfyalila aba bana? Ngefyo ine nalifwilwa abana kabili ndi ŋumba, nalifye uo batamfishe kabili balinsuulile, nga nomba uwakusha aba bana, nani? Ine nashelefye neka mpo, nga nomba aba bana uko batula, ni kwi?’”" 
Isaiah49:22 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe, “Ine nkalembula imishobo ya bantu abenafyalo, nkabemisha no luunga lwandi, nabo bakaleta abana bobe abaume pa maboko yabo, na bana bobe abanakashi bakesa nababasunsa pa mabeya." 
Isaiah49:23 Ishamfumu shakulabafye kwati e bashinwe, banamfumu nabo bakulamulelafye nga bana babo. Bakulamwinamina no kulashiba impumi shabo panshi pakumucindika, bakalamyanga no lukungu pa makasa yenu. Elyo nemwe nomba mwakulashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine ndi Yawe, nokuti bonsefye abatetekela ine, awe tabakalengwe nsoni.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Bushe impalume kuti umo aipoka ifyo yatapa? Bushe imfumu iikali kuti umo aya ipokolola bankole baiko? 
Isaiah49:25 Yawe nao epakwasuka ati, “Ee, kanshi iwe we Sioni walamona ukuti efyo calacitika. Ine nalatasha impalume no kuipokolola bankole, nalapoka nefyo imfumu iikali yatapa. Pantu nine nakulalwisha bonse abakulakulwisha, kabili nine wine nakulapususha na bana bobe." 
Isaiah49:26 Nkalenga abakucusha ukulya imibili yabo, Bakakolwa imilopa yabo nga banwene umwangashi. Elyo abantu bonse bakalashininkisha ukuti, kanshi ine ndi Yawe, nine nkupusushako iwe, nokuti nine kulubula, kanshi ine nine Lesa Impalume yakwa Yakobo.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Nga kanshi amapaso yakulekaninapo icupo ayo natamfishepo nyinenwe yali kwi? Nangu nani uo nakwatako inkongole uo namushitisheko? Bushe ilyo namuposele muli bunkole mutila nalimushitishe mwa? Awe iyoo. Imwe mwaposelwe muli bunkole pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyenu. Ni pa mulandu wa bumpulamafunde bwenu eco namutamfishe. 
Isaiah50:2 Cinshi pashasangilwe umuntu nelyo umo ilyo naishile? Cinshi ico imwe mushaleasukila ilyo ine nalemwita? Bushe ukuboko kwandi kwalipipisha ukwakufilwa ukumulubula mwa? Bushe ine nshakwata amaka ayakumupususha? Moneni nangufye ni bemba alakama no kuuma nga namukalipila, kabinge ine nalikwata amaka ayakukamya imimana, ne sabi ilyabamo kuti lyakaminwa lyabola lyanunka na piipi, lyafwa kukubulwa amenshi." 
Isaiah50:3 Ine ndafwika umulu ifyafiita, nabuula ne nsalu shabulanda shaba ecakuufimbako.”" 
Isaiah50:4 Yawe alimfunda ne mubomfi wakwe ifyakusosa, epakuti ndeishiba ishiwi ilyakukoseleshako abanakuka. Alambusha lyonse cila lucelo, aisula na matwi yandi pakuti ŋumfwe ifyo alefunda." 
Isaiah50:5 Yawe alimpeela amano ayakwiluka ifintu, na ine nshakaana, nangu ukufutatuka iyoo." 
Isaiah50:6 Inuma yandi nalipeele ku balempumaula. Amasaya yandi napeele ku balensusaula umwefu. Nshafishile icinso candi ku balentumfya, no kulansaka amate pa menso." 
Isaiah50:7 Pantu ni Mfumu Yawe eungafwa ine nshakasebane nakalya. Eco nalengela impumi yandi ukukosa nge libwe, pantu nalishininkisha ukuti ine nshakasebane nakalya." 
Isaiah50:8 Lesa uwakunandilako ukuti ine ndi wakaele ali mupepi. Nga nani uwingampeela umulandu? Natwiminine nankwe. Aleni natuleya bonse ku cilye. Nandubulwishe uuli no mulandu na ine. 
Isaiah50:9 Ine ni Mfumu Yawe umwine eumpokako. Nga kanshi nani uwinganseka ngo wa mulandu? Bakacucuka bonsefye kwati ni nsalu, no kuliwa bakaliwa ku cipelebesha cilya cipupuka ubushiku." 
Isaiah50:10 Kanshi imwe bonse mwe bakwatila Yawe akatiina, imwe bonse mwe bakonka amashiwi ya mubomfi wakwe, mwe benda umwafiita fitiiti ukwabula no kukwata ulubuuto, muletetekelafye Yawe, kabili muleshintililafye kuli Lesa wakwe." 
Isaiah50:11 Nomba imwe bonse mwe bakosha umulilo, imwe mwe basonteka ifishishi no kucita imyenge. Akwendeni mu cengelo ca mulilo wenu, kabili pakati ka fishishi fya myenge yenu ifyo mwasonteka. Ici eco mukapokelela ukufuma kuli ine, mukalala panshi no kulungulushiwa." 
Isaiah51:1 “Umfweni kuli ine mwe bakonkelela ubololoke, imwe mwe bafwaya Yawe. Ibukisheni icilibwe ico imwe mwatuntukako, no mukanda uo imwe mwaimbwamo." 
Isaiah51:2 Lolesheni kuli shinwe Abrahamu, na kuli Sara uwamufyele. Abrahamu takwetepo mwana ilyo ine namusalile, nomba ine nalimupaalile, namupeela na bana, nafusha no bufyashi bwakwe," 
Isaiah51:3 Cine cine Yawe akalangulukilako umusumba wa Sioni, akalangulukilako bonse abaikala mu fitantala fyauko. Nangu icalo cauko caonaika akacisangula nge bala lya Edeni, Akacita ne mpanga iyaonaika ukuba nge bala lyakwa Yawe, Mukabafye ukwanga ne sansa, ne nyimbo ishakumulumba ne shakumutotela." 
Isaiah51:4 “Umfweni kuli ine, mwe bantu bandi, kutikeni kufyo ine ndesosa mwe luko lwandi. Amafunde yakafuma kuli ine, no bupingushi bwandi bukaba e lubuuto ku bantu ba mishobo." 
Isaiah51:5 Ubulungami bwandi nabupalama, ukupususha kwandi kuli mu nshila. Nine wine nkabateeka abantu ba mishobo, na bantu ba mu fyalo fyakutali ku lulamba lwa bemba, balalolela pakuti nje mbapusushe." 
Isaiah51:6 Inwineni amenso yenu ku mulu, lolesheni na pesonde. Ala umulu ukongoloka nge cushi, ne sonde likapwa nge nsalu ikote, na bekalacalo bonse nabo bakafwa ngo tushishi. Lelo ukupususha kwandi kwena kukabelelela pe, no bulungami bwandi tabwakafilwe iyoo." 
Isaiah51:7 “Umfweni kuno, imwe mwe baishiba ifyalungama, mwe basunga amafunde yandi mu mitima yenu. Imwe mwisakamana umusaalula wa bantu, nangu ifyo balemutuka." 
Isaiah51:8 Pantu abo bantu icipelebesha ca bushiku cikabalya nge nsalu, kabili utushishi tukabalya nga filya tulya amasako. Lelo ubulungami bwandi bwena bukabelelela pe, no kupususha kwandi kukaba ku nkulo ne nkulo.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Buuka, buuka we kuboko kwakwa Yawe no kufwala amaka yobe, buuka nga filya fine walecita mu nshita shakale, mu nkulo sha kale na kale. Bushe teiwe wine waputawile fipimfya fipimfya Rahabu, cilya cishimweshimwe ca muli bemba?"
