Isaiah51:10 Bushe teiwe wine wakamishe amenshi ya muli bemba mwitenga ilyashika, wacita ne nshila mu menshi, pakuti abantu abo walepususha emo bapite pakwabuka." 
Isaiah51:11 Kanshi abantu abo walubula we Yawe bakabwela, bakafika ne nsansa mu Sioni, bakesa baleimba inyimbo, baleaula no tupundu. Ukusekelela no kwanga kwa pe bakafisanga, bakalasansamuka no kwanga pe na pe, tabakabale nakabili abalilishika nangu ukucula iyoo." 
Isaiah51:12 Yawe nakabili aletila ati, “Ine wine nine nsansamusha imwe. Nga nomba kuti imwe mwalatiina shani umuntu umwinakufwa, umwana wa muntu uukomafye nge cani?" 
Isaiah51:13 Kuti mwalaba shani Yawe uwamubumba, uwafungulula umulu, no kwikasha isonde? Cinshi ico imwe lyonse mwaikalila mu mwenso, uwakutiina ubukali bwa bantu abamucusha, abafwaya ukumulofya? Bushe ubukali bwa bantu bamucusha buli kwi?" 
Isaiah51:14 Bankole ababa mu fifungo, balaswa balubuke. Tabakafwile mu nindi, bakalakwata ne fyakulya ifyo bakalakabila ukukwata." 
Isaiah51:15 Pantu ine nine Yawe, Lesa wenu, ine nine nsunkanya bemba, no kulaimya amatamba pakuti yalepooma. Ishina lyandi nine Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Isaiah51:16 Nalibika amashiwi yandi mu kanwa kobe, nakufisa na mu cintelelwe ca kuboko kwandi. Ine ne waandalika imyulu, no kubika umufula we sonde, ne usosa na kuli Sioni nati, ‘Imwe muli bantu bandi.’”" 
Isaiah51:17 Buuka, buuka iwe Yerusalemu, ale ima! Iwe we wanwene ku minwe yakwa Yawe ulukombo lwa cipyu cakwe. Iwe we wafipililefye tonse utwa mu cikombe cakutalansuka, utulenga abantu ukupungushima." 
Isaiah51:18 Pa bana baume bonse abo wafyele tapamoneka nelyo umo uwakukwikatililako pa kuboko. Mu bana baume bonse abo wakushishe tapamoneka nangu wakuti alekutungululako. 
Isaiah51:19 Pa mipamba iyo ibili iyakuponene, nani uwakulililako ubulanda? Pa bonaushi, no kubongoloka, icipowe no lupanga ifyakwishila, nani uwakulangulukilako?" 
Isaiah51:20 Mu finshoko fyonse ifya misebo, namulala bamwano abafwile cipupu, bali nge nsebula ishiketwe mwisumbu. Nabomfwa apapela icipyu cakwa Yawe, apapela ukwebaula kwakwa Lesa wenu." 
Isaiah51:21 Eico umfweni ici mwe bena Yerusalemu mwe balecula, mwe bali abakolwa lelo te mwangashi munwene." 
Isaiah51:22 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe, Lesa wenu, uutulanyako abantu bakwe aleti, “Mona nimpokolola mu minwe yobe ulukombo lwakupungushima. Icikombe ca lukombo lwa cipyu candi, tawakabwekeshepo ukunwamo nakabili iyoo." 
Isaiah51:23 Nimbuula ulu lukombo no kulubika mu minwe ya bamucusha, abamweba ukulambalala panshi pakuti batantalepo, abo abacita inuma shenu ukuba ngo mushili kabili ngo musebo uwakwendaukamo.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Buuka, buuka iwe Sioni, ale ima, ikoseleshefye uleke upalame, nakabili fwala ifyakufwala fyobe ifyayemba. Iwe we Yerusalemu umusumba Wamushilo uwakwa Lesa, ale ipuulamike, pantu abashasembululwa na bakowela tabakatale nakabili abengila pa mpongolo shobe pakwisamo." 
Isaiah52:2 Ima panshi, kunta ulukungu, wikale na pa cipuna cobe icabufumu we Yerusalemu. Kakula iminyololo iyo bakukaka, iwe we nkole umwana mwanakashi Sioni." 
Isaiah52:3 Yawe alemweba ati, “Imwe bamuposele mu busha ukwabula ukuti balombepo kamo. Kanshi muli nokulubulwafye ukwabula ukulipililapo akantu.”" 
Isaiah52:4 Pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe Lesa umwine wa maka yonse ati, “Kale mwe bantu bandi mwaikele mu bweni mu calo ca Egupto, mukulekelesha abena Asiria nabo balamuteeka buluku buluku, ukwabula no mulandu.”" 
Isaiah52:5 Yawe nasosa ati, “Elyo pali nomba cili shani kuli ine pano apo abantu bandi balibasenda muli bunkole ukwabula ukulombapo kamo? Elyo abo bantu bamuteeka imwe, tepakuilumbanya no kulaitutubula, kabili akasuba konse basaalula ishina lyandi no kunsuula." 
Isaiah52:6 Nomba lino lyena, abantu bandi bakeshiba ishina lyandi, ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe uwalandilepo libela, ee nine wine.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Ala yaliyemba pa mpili amakasa ya baleta imbila nsuma, abalanda palwa mutende, abaleta imbila yakupaala abantu, ababila palwe pusukilo line. Abeba abena Sioni abati, “Ala ni Lesa wenu nomba euleteeka.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Umfweni, abalinda umusumba abo balepunda ne nsansa, baleimba na malaila. Pantu baleimwena na menso yabo uko Yawe alebwelela mu Sioni." 
Isaiah52:9 Awileni capamo utupundu, imwe mwe fitantala fya mu Yerusalemu. Pantu Yawe natalalika abantu bakwe, nalubula no musumba wine uwa Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 Yawe nalanga amaka yakwe ayamushilo pa cinso ca nko shonse. Na bantu bonse isonde lyonse nabaimwena ukupususha kwakwa Lesa wesu. 
Isaiah52:11 Endesheni imwe, fumenimo mu ncende ilya, tecakwesha kukumya ku fyakowela iyoo. Imwe mwe bakusenda ifipe fyakwa Yawe isungenifye ifyo fine abasangululwa, mufumemo na mu musumba." 
Isaiah52:12 Uno muku wena tamwaime mu kampampa iyoo, tamwaye nge mbutushi nakalya, pantu Yawe ewakulamutangilila pakwenda, Lesa wakwa Israeli ewakulamulinda na kunuma kwine." 
Isaiah52:13 Yawe aletila ati, “Moneni umubomfi wandi akashuka mufyo akalabomba, akaba umukalamba, akacindikwa kabili akasumbulwa nganshi." 
Isaiah52:14 Lelo kwena abantu abengi balisungwike ilyo bamumwene, pantu imimonekele yakwe yalyonaike ukufuma mu cata ca buntu. Alemonekafye cimbi cimbi kwati te muntu." 
Isaiah52:15 Lelo akacilimusha abantu ba mishobo iyingi, na bashamfumu bene tabakasosepo, bakalapapafye. Pantu bakaimwena ico bashatala abashimikilwapo, bakalaishiba ifintu ifyo bashatala abomfwapo.”" 
Isaiah53:1 “Ngo wingasumina ifi fintu tuleshimika, nani? Nga ni kuli ani uo Yawe asokolwela amaka yakwe?" 
Isaiah53:2 Ala ni Yawe umwine ewafwaile ukuti umubomfi wakwe akulile pa cinso cakwe, ngo muti uuteku uwalulembelya, uwalimbwa apauma ndi, apo imishila yauko ilepula mu mushili pakwanda. Talemoneka uwacindama nangu uwayemba icakuti ifwe tumuposeko amano. Takwetepo busuma bwakumoneka ubwakuti ifwe tulekonkelelako." 
Isaiah53:3 Ifwe twalimusuulile, tatwamuposeleko na mano nakalya. Aliculile no kumfwa ubukali. Ifwe twalimusuulishe icakuti tatwalefwaya na kumulolesha, pantu tatwalemutunga pa buntu kabili tatwamucindike." 
Isaiah53:4 “Cine cine alibuulile amacushi ayo twali nokuposwamo nifwe. Alisendele ubukali ubo ifwe twali nokumfwa. Ifwe twatilefye ni Lesa eumuleteele aya macushi no bulanda, pakuti amulimune." 
Isaiah53:5 Lelo kwena ni pa mulandu wa bumpulamafunde bwesu ecalengele ukuti bamucenaule ifyo, ni pa mulandu wa bubifi bwesu ecalengele ukuti bamupumaule ifyo. Ukulimunwa kwakwe ekwalenga ukuti ifwe tuleikala umutende, impumo shakwe eshalenga ukuti ifwe tuleundapwa." 
Isaiah53:6 Bonsefye ifwe twali nge mpaanga ishaluba, bonse umo umo twailefye ciyeyeye mu nshila shesu. Yawe nao epakuposa ifyabubifi fyesu fyonse pali ena." 
Isaiah53:7 “Balemutintanya, balemucusha, lelo ena tasoseleko nangu ukulandako nakalya. Ali ngo mwana wa mpaanga uubafye tondolo ilyo balemutwala kukumwipaya, ali nge mpaanga iyibafye iyanakilila ilyo kabeya aleibeya, awe nao tewakulandako no kulanda nakalya." 
Isaiah53:8 Balimwikete mu lufyengo, bamupeela umulandu, bamupingula no kumwipaya. Tapali nangu umo uwa mu nkulo yakwe uwasakameneko kufyo balemucita, ilyo bamulofya ukufuma mu calo ca bamweo, tapali abatile, ‘Ni pa mulandu wa bumpulamafunde bwesu epo afyengelwa.’" 
Isaiah53:9 Bapekenye inshinshi yakwe pamo pene ne ntalamisoka, ena epakushiikwa mu nshinshi ya mukankala, nangu kwena ashatalile acitapo ulufyengo nelyo lumo, nangufye ukulanda ubufi mu kanwa kakwe." 
Isaiah53:10 “Kwena ni Yawe ewafwaile umubomfi wakwe afwantwe no kucula icibi, epakuti ukufwa kwakwe kube ilambo ilyakufuta pa bubifi. Kabili akamona ubufyashi bwakwe no kutantalisha inshiku shakwe, kabili ukufwaya kwakwa Yawe kukalenga ifyo apekanya filecitikafye bwino." 
Isaiah53:11 Epakuti amacushi yakwe yonse nga yapwa mu mweo wakwe akasansamuka nakabili. Akashininkisha ukuti kanshi taculilefye apafye. Ni mukwishiba emo umubomfi wandi umulungami akalungamikila abengi, kabili akasenda ne fibi fyabo fyonse." 
Isaiah53:12 E mulandu wine na ine nkamutekela apacindama pakati ka bacindami. Akaakana ne mpalume conse icatapwa. Pantu umwine ewaipeeleshe kukufwa, kabili apendelwe pa mulongo wa bampulamafunde. Lelo ewasendele ifyabubifi fya bengi, no kubapapatilako pali bumpulamafunde bwabo.”" 
Isaiah54:1 “Aula utupundu no kwimba ulwimbo lwansansa, we wabafye iŋumba, eico pali nomba kuti walaimba inyimbo shansansa, we ushatala aufyala umwana. Pantu iwe ukakwatisha abana nangu walekeleshiwa, ukucila na pa mwanakashi uo wiba ashatala asha.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah54:2 “Kushako itenti ilyo wikalamo. Anshika ne fisalu fye tenti lyobe, wishako. Lefyako imyando yaliko, wikashe ne mpopo." 
Isaiah54:3 Pantu ukakushako imipaka yobe ku kuso na ku kulyo, abantu bobe bakapoka nakabili icalo cabo ukufuma ku mishobo ya benafyalo, na mu misumba umo abantu bafulumuka, mukesula abantu pa." 
Isaiah54:4 “Wilatiina, pantu iwe tawakasebane na limbi, tawakakontame pa mulandu wa nsoni iyoo. Ukalabako ku nsoni sha mu bukashana bobe, tawakaleibukisha no bunkukwa ubo waumfwile ubwa bumukamfwilwa." 
Isaiah54:5 Pantu Kabumba obe akaba mwina mobe, ishina lyakwe ni Yawe umwine wa fita. Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli e kalubula obe, ewitwa Lesa kateeka we sonde lyonse." 
Isaiah54:6 Pantu Yawe ewakwita ngo mukashana uwaupwa nomba uo wiba alekelesha, kabili uucushiwa umutima. Akwita ngo mukashi uo umuntu aupile ku bulumendo bwakwe elyo aisa mupata.” Efyo asosa Lesa wenu." 
Isaiah54:7 “Ine nalikushile iwe pa kashita kamo no kukulekelesha, nomba lino nalakubwesha no luse ulwingi." 
Isaiah54:8 Ine nalikufulilwe no kukusha, no kufisa icinso candi kuli iwe pa kashita kamo. Nomba lino lyena ku luse ulwingi ne nkumbu nakulakutemwafye pe, efyo ine ne Yawe ndelanda, ne wakulubula." 
Isaiah54:9 “Pantu ici caba kuli ine nga mu nshiku shakwa Noa, filya fine ine nalapile pa nshita Noa alipo ukukanabunsha icalo nakabili, efyo na nomba nalapa ukukanakufulilwa iwe nakabili. Ine nshakalekushobaula nangu ukulakukanda iyoo." 
Isaiah54:10 Nangu impili shingaseshiwa no tupili twasholomoka, icitemwiko ico ine nakukwatila iwe, awe tacakabale aciseshiwa, ine nakulasunga pe icipangano icakulaikala umutelelwe, efyo ine ne Yawe nalanda, ne wakukwatila uluse.”" 
Isaiah54:11 “Owe, we musumba ulanda, we wasensenunwa ne cimwela, we ushamonapo uwakukutalalikako. Ine nkakukuula cipya cipya na mabwe yamutengo aya tokisi. Mu mifula iyo bakwimikamo ine nkashikamo cipya cipya amabwe yamutengo aya safile." 
Isaiah54:12 Insonshi sha mayanda yobe ine nkashikuulila na mabwe yamutengo aya rubi, impongolo shobe nasho ine nkashipangila na mabwe ayabengeshima, ilinga lyobe nalyo ine nkalikuulila na mabwe ayauma umutengo." 
Isaiah54:13 Abantu bobe abaume bakafundwa kuli Yawe umwine, no mutende wa bana bobe abaume ukafula no kubaletela ishuko ne cibote." 
Isaiah54:14 Mu bololoke emo uli nokushimpwa. Ukalaikalila ku matwi tondolo, pantu takwakabe uukalakucita buluku buluku, nangu ukulakutiinya iyoo, pantu ifi fyonse tafyakapalame kuli iwe." 
Isaiah54:15 Bamo nga bakalakusansa awe ninshi teine nkalalenga iyoo, bonse abakalakulwisha bakalafwilapo." 
Isaiah54:16 “Wamona, ine nine nabumba kafula, uufukuta umuba pakufula ifyanso ifya mulilo ifilingile. Nine nabumba umushilika, uwenda ne fyanso ifyakwipailako no kusansa." 
Isaiah54:17 Lelo ifyanso fyonse ifyo bapanga pakukulwishishako, iwe fikakufilwa, na bonse abakalakulubulwisha, iwe ukalamona umwakubashinina. Aya maka eyakwata ababomfi bandi, kabili ubulungami bwabo ubulenga ukuti balecimfya bwafuma kuli ine.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah55:1 “Imwe bonse mwe bacula ku cilaka, iseni kuno ukwaba amenshi. Nangu imwe mushakwata mpiya, isenifye muleshita icakulya, mulelya. Iseni muleshita umwangashi no mukaka, ukwabula impiya, kabili ukwabula umutengo." 
Isaiah55:2 Nga mulandu nshi mwingalaposela impiya pa fintu ifishili fyakulya? Nga cinshi ico mwingala onawila amalipilo yenu pa fintu ifyo mushingekuta? Mulenkutika, mulecita nefyo ine ndemweba, lyena ninshi mwakulailemena ifyakulya ifine fine." 
Isaiah55:3 “Kutikeni kuno, imwe mwe bantu bandi, iseni kuno, umfweni kuli ine pakuti mushukile ubumi. Ine nalapangana nenu icipangano icakubelelela pe, icipangano cacishinka ico nalaile Davidi ica citemwiko icishipwa." 
Isaiah55:4 Nine nasontele Davidi pakuti abe kambone ku bantu bonse, ukutungulula no kulateeka abantu ba mitundu." 
Isaiah55:5 Kanshi nomba nimwe muketa imishobo ya benafyalo, imishobo ya bantu iyishatala aimwishiba, nayo ikesa ulubilo pakuti ikese ba pamo nenu. Pa mulandu wakwa Yawe Lesa wamushilo uwakwa Israeli, eukalenga ukuti ifi fyonse fikacitike, pantu alimucindamika.”" 
Isaiah55:6 “Fwayeni Yawe pa nshita engasangwa, mulemukuuta pa nshita ali mupepi." 
Isaiah55:7 Imwe mwe babifi lekeni imisango yenu, lekeni ukulapanga ifyabubifi mu mitima yenu. Bweleleni kuli Yawe pantu akamulangulukilako, kabili kuli Lesa wesu pantu alalekelela apakalamba." 
Isaiah55:8 “Pantu ifyo ine ntontonkanya tafyaba ngefyo imwe mutontonkanya iyoo, kabili imibeele yandi ine yaliibela ku mibeele yenu,” efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah55:9 “Ngefi fine umulu wasansuka ukucila icalo, efyo ne mibeele yandi yacila pa mibeele yenu, efyo ne mitontonkanishishe yandi yacila pa mitontonkanishishe yenu." 
Isaiah55:10 “Nga filya fine imfula no bunga bwa mfula fitula mu mulu, kabili tafibwelelamo ukwabula ukusha fyatapilila umushili, no kumeshapo ifitwalo ne mbuto ishakubyala nakabili, no kuletapo icakulya ku bantu," 
Isaiah55:11 efyo na mashiwi yandi yaba ayo ine nanda. Tayabwelela kuli ine ukwabula akantu, lelo yalalenga ukuti ficitike fyonse ifyo ine mfwaya ukucita, no kufikilisha umulimo uyo nayalandile." 
Isaiah55:12 “Ala cine cinefye imwe mukafuma ne nsansa, mu musumba bakamufumyamo umutelelwe. Impili no tupili twine fikapongomoka mu tupundu twansansa, ne miti yonse mu mpanga ikatotela." 
Isaiah55:13 Mulya mwaba imyunga pali nomba, mukalakula ifimuti fya paini, na mulya mwaba kaenya, mukalakula imiti ya umuetulo. Neci cintu cikaba icakuletela Yawe ululumbi, cikaba icishibilo ca pe icishaka fumishiwepo.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Imwe mulecita ubupingushi no mulinganya. Kabili mulecita ifyalungama, pantu ukupususha kwandi nakupalama, kabili ubulungami bwandi buli nokusokololwa." 
Isaiah56:2 Akulaba uwapaalwa umuntu onse uucita ifi fintu, no mwana wa muntu onse uubikako amano no kwikatisha ukucita ifisuma, uucindika lyonse ubushiku bwe Sabata ukwabula ukulacitamo ifyabindwa, elyo no kukanacita ifyabipa nelyo fimo." 
Isaiah56:3 “Umwinafyalo uwaisa ilunda kuli ine ne Yawe elatila ati, ‘Yawe ine akampatulako ku bantu bakwe.’ Mutungwi nao elaesha kusosa ati, ‘Moneni ine nabafye nge cimuti icauma.’" 
Isaiah56:4 Yawe aletila kuli bamutungwi, ‘Imwe nga mwalancindika pakubika imitima yenu ku nshiku shandi ishe Sabata, kabili nga mwalacita nefyo ine mfwaya, mwalasunga bwino ne cipangano candi," 
Isaiah56:5 ninshi ine nkamupeelapo cimo mu ŋanda yandi na mu fibumba fyaiko, icibukisho ne shina ilyawamisha ukucila pa bana abaume na banakashi. Nkamupeela ne shina ilishakalabweko kabili ilishakalobe.’" 
Isaiah56:6 “Imwe mwe benafyalo, mwe baisa ilunda kuli ine ne Yawe, imwe mwe batemwa ishina lyandi, mwe bamombela, mwe babika umutima ku nshiku she Sabata ukwabula ukulacitamo ifyabindwa, mwe basunga bwino ne cipangano candi." 
Isaiah56:7 Imwe nkamuleta ku lupili lwandi ulwamushilo, nkalamusansamusha mu ŋanda yandi iyakupepelamo. Nkalapokelela amalambo yenu ayakoca, pamo pene na malambo yambi ayo mukalantuula pa bulambo bwandi. Pantu iŋanda yandi ikalaitwa iŋanda iyakupepelamo abantu aba mishobo yonse.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa maka yonse, uulonganya bankole abena Israeli. “Nkalonganya na bambi abantu ukusansha pa bantu bandi abo nalonganya kale.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Iseni mwe fiswango fyonse ifya mu mpanga, na imwe mwe fiswango fyonse ifya mu mutengo iseni mubacibaule." 
Isaiah56:10 Pantu intungulushi shonse ishaba no mulimo wakusoka abantu bandi, awe ni mpofufye sheka sheka. Tashaishibapo nelyo kamo. Shabafye nge mbwa shimalonda ishishibosa, ishaikalilafye ukulalala utulo no kulalota, epela, ishatemwa ukulayolwela pa bulele." 
Isaiah56:11 Ishi ntungulushi shaba nge mbwa ishatemwisha ukulya tashiikuta nakalya. Bacemi impelwamano. Bonse umo umo bacitilafye umo balefwaila, cila umo akonkelelafye ubunonshi bwakwe epela." 
Isaiah56:12 Basosa abati, “Iseni, katulete bane umwangashi, natunwenshe no bwalwa ubwaluma, uleke tusansamuke. Nga ni mailo lyena, awe cikacilapo pali lelo ku busuma.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Abantu abololoke balafwa, nomba tapaba nelyo umo uucitontonkanyapo mu mutima wakwe. Abantu abapimpa mukupepa Lesa mu cine balabafumyapo, lelo tapaba uwiluka, nakalya. Pantu ilintu abololoke bafwa, bena balapusukako ku bubifi." 
Isaiah57:2 Abantu abekala imikalile iyalungama, balashukila ne nshita iyakutuusha ilyo bafwa, bena balashukila ukwikala umutelelwe." 
Isaiah57:3 Lelo imwe iseni kuno mulubulule, imwe mwe bana ba mpulumushi shakantu, mwe bufyashi bwa bacende na bacilende." 
Isaiah57:4 Nani uo muleseka imwe? Nani mulesenteka no kufumisha ululimi? Bushe tamuli bana ba bansangukila, ubufyashi bwa bantu babufi?" 
Isaiah57:5 Imwe mwaliba abapimpa ukucita ifyalunkumbwa mwisamba lya fimuti fya oki ifyalelema. Mulatuula na bana benu ilambo mu ncengo sha mabwe, ishaba mupepi ne milonga." 
Isaiah57:6 Emo mutola amabwe ayatelela ayo mucindika ngo tulubi twenu, kabili eto mutemwisha. Muletulwilapo no mwangashi uo muya mukulatuula, mulabikapo ne mituulo ya cabunga. Bushe imwe mutila amuti ine nalitemwa, batini?" 
Isaiah57:7 Imwe muya pa mpili ishasansama epo mwaya bika imisengele yenu, kabili mwanina impili shimo shine mwaya tuulilapo na malambo." 
Isaiah57:8 Ku numa ya fiibi fyenu lwamukati ku maingwe, eko mwaimika utulubi twenu utwacibukisho. Kuli ine mwalifumyako amano, mulafuula ifyakufwala fyenu, muya pa misengele yenu ikulu. Mwapangana nato mwe bene mwatemwa ne misengele yatuko, mwatampa no kulatulengela." 
Isaiah57:9 Imwe mutala mulenda amalendo no kusenda amafuta ya miolifa na fimbipo ifinunka ubusaka, nokuya twalila umulungu Moleki. Imwe mulatuma inkombe shenu ishakuya konse konse, nako ukushailepela, shiya mukulafikafye na ku calo ca bafwa." 
Isaiah57:10 Nangu munaka kulwa kufwaya fwaya imilungu, awe tamutila, “Shi natulekefye tapali ico tulesangamo nakalya.” Amaka nga yabwelelamo mwakonkanyapo, kanshi e mulandu wine imwe mushifupukila." 
Isaiah57:11 Nani uo imwe muletiina no kusakamikwako pakuti mutampe no kulabepa kuli ine. Tamwibukisha na kuli ine nangu ukubikako amano? Bushe imwe nomba namuleka ukulantiina, pa mulandu wakuti palepa apo ine naikalila tondolo, batini?" 
Isaiah57:12 Nomba ine nalasosela pakabalika ifyaba imyendele yenu, ne micitile yenu nomba ifi tekuti fimwafwe nakalya." 
Isaiah57:13 Mwakulati nga mwakuuta mutuule, utulubi twenu uto mwalonganika kanshi nomba etwakulamutulanyako. Lelo kwena umwela eukatuululafye tonse, umupufye eukatusenda. Nomba abafisama muli ine bena bakapyana icalo, no lupili lwandi ulwamushilo lukaba lwabo." 
Isaiah57:14 Kabili cikasoswa ukuti, “Aleni, panseni umusebo uukulu, uwamyeni, mufumyemo na fyonse ifibacilikila inshila.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Pantu efyo asosa uwasansama kabili uwapulama uwabapo pe na pe kabili Uwamushilo. “Ine naikala mu cifulo icasansama kabili icamushilo, kabili njikalamo na bantu abaicefya, abalapila mu mitima yabo, pakupuputula imyeo ya baicefya, no kubuukulusha ubulamba bwa balapila." 
Isaiah57:16 Pantu nshakatwalilile ukubomanya, kabili nshakakalipe lyonse no kutwalilila ukubafulilwa. Pantu kuti bafwa icipupu ku cinso candi abantu abo napeela ubumi no kubabumba." 
Isaiah57:17 Ine nalibafulilwe pa mulandu wakuba no lwinso lwa fyabubifi. Kanshi ine epakubalimuna cipyu cipyu, nabafumyako na mano nafisa ne cinso candi. Nalyo line imitwe yabo yakosele ndi, bakonkenyepofye ukulacita icicitecite." 
Isaiah57:18 Ine nalimona ifyo bacita, lelo kwena nkabondapa. Nkalabatungulula, nkalabafwako, nkalatalalika na bakalaloosha." 
Isaiah57:19 Pa milomo ya bantu bakwe abaloosha nomba pakaba icitwalo cakulumbanya, ine nkaletela bonse icibote, abamupepi na bakutali bene. Kabili ne Yawe nkondapa abantu bandi.”" 
Isaiah57:20 Nomba ababifi bena baba nga bemba uusunkana, uo amatamba yashileka kusunkana, ayemya amatipa no lutikiti." 
Isaiah57:21 “Ababi, awe bena tabakamone mutende.” Efyo asosa Lesa wandi." 
Isaiah58:1 “Iwe pundishafye, wicilikila ishiwi, ikatisha ishiwi nge penga. Ebelapo abantu bandi pa fyakusanguka fyabo, na ku ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo ifyabubifi fyabo." 
Isaiah58:2 Kwena balampepa inshiku shonse, kabili bamoneka abafwaisha ukwishiba ifyo ine naba. Bacita ifi nga bantu abacita ifyalungama, kwati bantu abashasuula ifipope fyakwa Lesa wabo. Balampapata ukuti ine ne Lesa wabo ndebapalama, no kulabapeela ifyebo ifyalolamo.”" 
Isaiah58:3 Abantu batila abati, “Mulandu nshi ifwe ilyo tuleka ukulya, Yawe taposako amano? Nga cinshi cilenga ukuti nelyo twaicefya no kucula ena tasakamanako?” “Nomba ine ne Yawe ndabasuka nati, ‘Ilyo muleka ukulya, icishinkafye imwe mukonkelelafye ifyakumusansamusha mwe bene, kabili elyo mupeelesha na babomfi benu bonse imilimo iyakosa.’" 
Isaiah58:4 Ilyo muleka ukulya, ninshi kwaba ukulatintana, no lubuli pefye, no kulaumana. Ukuleka ukulya ukwa uyu musango, bushe imwe mutila kuti kwalenga ukuti ine naumfwa mu mulu imipapatile yenu, batini?" 
Isaiah58:5 Bushe uyu e musango wakuleka ukulya untu nasala? Ubushiku bumo bushe kuti ebo umuntu aicefyamo? Bushe bushiku bwakukontamafye nge tete, no kusendama pa nsalu shabulanda ne mito? Bushe ici eco mwita ukuleka ukulya? Bushe ubushiku bwa musango uyu ebo Yawe engasekelela?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Bushe teuyu musango wakuleka ukulya uo ine mfwaya? Ukukakula abafyengwa iminyololo, ukukakula inshinga na makoli, ukuleka abo mufyengelesha, no kufumyapo umutitikisha onse pakuti baleikalila." 
Isaiah58:7 Abali ne nsala mulebapako icakulya, mulesekelela mumyenu abalanda abashikwete kwakwikala. Mulefwikako na bantu abo mulemona ukuti balisapula, kabili mwilakaana na kulaafwako abantu benu." 
Isaiah58:8 Awe ninshi lyena icikuuku candi cikabengeshima pali imwe nge mibengelele ya kasuba akaletula, ne filonda fyenu fikalapolafye bwangu. Imicitile yenu iyalolamo ikalamutangilila, no bucindami bwakwa Yawe bukamucingililako na kunuma yenu." 
Isaiah58:9 Lyena mukalati nga mwanjita ne Yawe namwasuka. Mukalati nga mwakuuta mutuule, awe na ine nkalamwasuka nati ndi pano. “Nga mwaleka umucusha, mwaleka no kusontana iminwe, mwaleka no kulalanda ifibi pa banenu," 
Isaiah58:10 nga mwalapeelako abali ne nsala icakulya, no kutulanyako ababusu, awe ninshi imfifi iyo mwabamo ikasanguka ulubuuto, ulukalabalika nga kasuba akali pakati ka mutwe." 
Isaiah58:11 Lyena ninshi ne Yawe nkalamutungulula lyonsefye, no kulamwikusha ifintu ifisuma mu mpanga iyabula amenshi. Lyena ine nkalamukosha no kulamusunga bwino. Mukaba nge bala ilitapililwa bwino, mukaba nga kamfukumfuku ka menshi akashikama." 
Isaiah58:12 Mukalabuukulula ifibolya fyakale, mukalakuula mu mifula yakale nakale. Bakalamwita ukuti ni bakabuukulula wa fibumba ifyabongolweke, ni bakabuukulula wa mayanda ayabongolweke.”" 
Isaiah58:13 Yawe aletila ati, “Nga mwalacindika ubushiku bwe Sabata, mwaleka no kulacitamo ifyabunonshi, nga mwalamona ubushiku bwandi ubwamushilo ukuti ebwakusansamukamo, no kubucindika ngo bushiku bwakwa Yawe icine cine, nga mwalabucindika pakukanalayendamo icende ende, tamulebombamo milimo nangu ukulapumamo ilyashi lyabuwelewele," 
Isaiah58:14 awe ninshi lyena mukalakwata insansa isha kuli Yawe. Kabili nkamusansabalika, nkaleka abantu bakalemucindika isonde lyonse, mukalailemena icalo ico napeele Yakobo icikolwe cenu. Nine ne Yawe nalanda pa kanwa kandi.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Moneni ukuboko kwakwa Yawe takwaipipa ukwakuti kufilwe ukumupususha imwe iyoo, kabili te nkomamatwi uwakuti akaane ukumumfwa ilyo imwe mulekuuta mutuule." 
Isaiah59:2 Ala, ifyabubifi fyenu efyamupaatula kuli Lesa wenu ukubifya kwenu ekulenga alefisa icinso cakwe nokuti alekaana ukumumfwa." 
Isaiah59:3 Amaboko yenu yalikowela ku mulopa wa abo mwafyenga, ne minwe yenu kulwa kubifya. Mulandafye ifya bufi bweka, ne ndimi shenu nasho shisosafye ifyabupondo." 
Isaiah59:4 Nga mwaya ku cilye, tapali uulubulwisha aba mulandu mu cishinka, kabili tapali no ulubulula mu bufumacumi. Bonse bakoselelafye ukubepa ubufi pakuti ebo ciwamine. Ilyo baleya ninshi nabapanga umwakufyengela bambi." 
Isaiah59:5 Batota amani aya mafwafwa, no kupikula amasumbu yakwa tandabube ayashakosa. Uwalyapo limo pa mani yabo ninshi kufwa, kabili nga patobeka limo mutotwa insoka na imbi." 
Isaiah59:6 Ifyo bapikula teti nangu umo afwalwe nge nsalu iyoo, ifyo bapanga ukucita tekuti baifimbeko nakalya. Imilimo yabo yabubififye epela, kabili ifyakucita ulubuli efyaisula mu minwe yabo." 
Isaiah59:7 Amakasa yabo lyonse yabutukila ukucita ifyabipa, kabili tabalindila pakwipaya abantu abakaele nakalya. Amapange yabo mapange yabupondofye, monse umo bapita mushalafye uboni no koomona." 
Isaiah59:8 Bena tabaishiba inshila yamutende iyoo, tamwaba ukucita ifyalungama mu nshila shabo. Inshila isho bapitamo, shintu shashokana, na onse uupita muli isho nshila awe ninshi takamone umutende." 
Isaiah59:9 Twashininkisha ukuti ecalenga ukuti umulinganya ube ukutali na ifwe, kanshi ecalenga nokuti ubololoke bwilamoneka muli ifwe. Ifwe tulafwaya ulubuuto ulwakuti tuleendamo, lelo ni mfififye eibako, nga twati kubutishe elyo twenda mu kafifi nga bashakwata amenso, efyo tuya tulepampanta." 
Isaiah59:10 Tupampantilafye icibumba nge mpofu, tupampantila ku minwe nga bashaba na menso. Tulepulumpunta akasuba pakati, kwati tuli mu calo cabafwa umwafiita fititi." 
Isaiah59:11 Bonse tubuluma nge fiswango fya bea, no kulila tulila nge nkunda. Tulolela ubupingushi ubwalungama, lelo tabumoneka. Tulolela Lesa ukuti ese atupususheko, nomba tapaba nangu cimo icicitikapo." 
Isaiah59:12 We Yawe, ifyakupula amafunde ifyo ifwe twacita kuli iwe, ala fingi. Ifyabubifi fyesu efiletushinina. Cinefye bumpulamafunde bwesu bwaba pali ifwe, nefwe bene natushininkisha ukubifya kwesu." 
Isaiah59:13 Ifwe twalikusangukila we Yawe, twalikufumyako amano, twalikaana no kulakukonka we Lesa wesu. Ifwe tulacusha bambi, no kukusangukila twalikusangukila. Ifyo ifwe tutontonkanya, fyabufifye, nefyo ifwe tulanda, nafyo fine fyabufi." 
Isaiah59:14 Umulinganya ifwe twaliuleka, ne fintu fine ifyalungama tatufyangwako nakalya. Tulafundawila ifyacishinka ilyo tuba mu fisankano, temwakusangamo na mufumacumi iyoo." 
Isaiah59:15 Icishinka nacicepesha, icakuti umuntu umo nga aleka ukubifya awe ninshi uyo muntu apyako. Yawe alamona ifi fyonse, no kufulwa alifulwa pa mulandu wakuti takwaba nelyo umo uucita umulinganya." 
Isaiah59:16 Lesa alasunguka pakumona ukuti takwaba nelyo umo uutulanyako abo balecusha. Kanshi nomba ni Lesa fye umwine ewalasakatuka pakuti abapususheko, no kucimfya akacimfya mukucita ifyalungama." 
Isaiah59:17 Akulafwala ubulungami kwati e cakufwala cakwe icakucinga icifuba. Kabili ku mutwe wakwe akulafwalako ukupususha, nge cimpompo icakuicingililako umutwe. Kabili akulafwala ifyakufwala fyacilandushi kubacusha abanabo, ukululunkana kwakwe akufimbene nga tandabube." 
Isaiah59:18 Akalimuna abalwani bakwe pakulinganya pafyo bacita, akacita icipyu ku balwani bakwe ne cilandushi ku bamusangukila. Akalimuna na bantu bene aba ku lulamba lwa pali bemba." 
Isaiah59:19 Eico abantu bakatiina Yawe ukufuma ku masamba konse, kabili bonsefye bakalatiina no bucindami bwakwa Yawe ukutula ku kabanga konse, pantu akesa nafulumbana ngo mumana uwapongolwa uo icimwela icamaka icakwa Yawe cisunkilisha." 
Isaiah59:20 Yawe aleeba abantu bakwe ati, “Kalubula akesa mu Sioni, akesa lubula abo bonse bamwana Yakobo abalapila pa fyabubifi fyabo." 
Isaiah59:21 “Elyo kabinge ine napangana nabo icipangano icakuti, ine pano ndi, namupeela Umupashi wandi na mashiwi yandi ayo nabika mu kanwa kenu. Kanshi imwe muli nokulayabeela, no kulafundako na bana benu na beshikulu benu ukufuma pali lelo ukushintafye no kukapela inshiku.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah60:1 Ima iwe Sioni, akubengeshima nga kasuba pantu nalwisa ulubuuto lobe, ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bulebengeshimina pali iwe." 
Isaiah60:2 Pantu mona imfifi ikafimba pano isonde, ne kumbi ilyafiitisha likafimba abantu bonse, lelo iwe ulubuuto lwakwa Yawe lukalakubengeshimina, Yawe umucindami iwe eukalaba nobe, no bukata bwakwe bukaba pali iwe." 
Isaiah60:3 Imishobo ya benafyalo ikaileta ku lubuuto lobe, ne shamfumu nasho shikaileta ku kubengeshima kwa lubuuto lobe ulukaba nga kasuba akaletula." 
Isaiah60:4 Sansula amenso, lolesha konse konse, umone. Abantu bobe bonse nabalongana pakuti baleisa uko uli. Bamwano abaume bakulatula ukutali, bamwano abanakashi bakulaisa nabasendwa pa maboko nga bana." 
Isaiah60:5 Iwe wakulati nga walolesha, awe tepakutemwa, wakulabilimafye ku nsansa. Ifyuma fya mishobo ya benafyalo niwe fyakulalungama, ifyuma fyabo filya bapisha pali bemba fikesa kuli iwe." 
Isaiah60:6 Ingamila shakulaisa imilongo, imisepela ya ngamila ukutula ku calo ca Midiani ne ca Efah. Shakulatula ku Sheba pakukuletela golide no bubani. Abantu bakalalumbilisha Yawe pafyo akucitila." 
Isaiah60:7 Impaanga shonse isha ku Keda ne sha ku Nebaiyoti bakashileta kuli iwe pakulashituula ilambo. Shikalatuulwa pa bulambo pakusansamusha ne Yawe, kabili nkacindamika ŋanda yandi iyapulamisha." 
Isaiah60:8 Nga yalya mato yaleshunda nga makumbi, yalya yaleisa nge nkunda ishilebwelela mu citele, bushe mato nshi?" 
Isaiah60:9 Pantu ifyalo fya ku lulamba lwa pali bemba filenindila, ayaletangila ukufika mato ya ku Tashishi, kukuleta abana benu abaume ukufuma mu ncende shakutali, ninshi nabasenda silifa na golide ifyakwisa tuula Yawe Lesa wenu, ku Wamushilo Lesa wakwa Israeli pantu eulengele bamone ukuti Lesa nakucindika." 
Isaiah60:10 Abenafyalo bakabuukulula amalinga yobe, ne shamfumu shabo shikalakubombela. Nangu ine nakulimwine cipyu cipyu, awe nomba lino lyena nakulakukwatila icikuuku, kabili nakulakulangulukilako." 
Isaiah60:11 Inshiku shonse impongolo shobe shikalaba ishaisuka, akasuba no bushiku tashakesalwe, epakuti mishobo ya benafyalo bakaleleta ifyuma fyaiko, ne shamfumu shabo eshikalatangilila mukukucindika." 
Isaiah60:12 Elyo abantu ba mishobo ne shamfumu shabo abakalakaana ukulakubombela, awe bena bakaloba, bakonaulwa umupwilapo." 
Isaiah60:13 Imbao sha mipapa, ne sha mikula, ne sha paini, isha miti iyawamisha iya mu mitengo ya Lebanoni, esho bakaleta pakwisa kukuulilako cipya cipya Yerusalemu, pakwisa emfeshako icifulo candi icamushilo, na pakwisa puulamikilako icifulo ca makasa yandi." 
Isaiah60:14 Abana ba bantu abakucusha, bakesa mukulakwinamina pakukucindika. Bonsefye abakusuulile kale, bakesa mukulafukankila apo uli. Bakalakwita abati, “We musumba wakwa Yawe.” Pambi bakalatila, “Sioni, we musumba wakwa Lesa Wamushilo uwakwa Israeli.”" 
Isaiah60:15 Nangu abantu bakusuulile no kukupata icakuti takwali no walepita mu calo cobe, ine nkakucindamika umuyayaya, inkulo ne nkulo shikalasekelela muli iwe." 
Isaiah60:16 Iwe ukalaonka ibele lya mishobo ya benafyalo pamo ne shamfumu shaiko, nga filya fine nacifyashi asungilila mwane. Elyo ukashininkisha ukuti nine ne Yawe nakupususha, nine ne Lesa ne Mpalume yakwa Yakobo nakulubula." 
Isaiah60:17 Pa mukuba obe, ine nkapyanikishapo golide, pa fyela, ine nkapyanikishapo silifa, pa mbao, ine nkapyanikishapo umukuba, pa mabwe, ine nkapyanikishapo ifyela. Bakateeka bobe tabakalekucusha nakabili iyoo, ine nkaleka bakaleteeka mu bololoke ne cibote." 
Isaiah60:18 Icongo cabuluku tacakaleumfwika nakabili mu calo cobe, ubonaushi tabwakaponene nakabili icalo cobe iyoo. Yawe akalakulinda no kulakucingililako nge linga, ukalamulumbanya pa mulandu wakukupusushako." 
Isaiah60:19 Te kasuba kakalakusanikilako ilyo bukalaca iyoo, te mweshi ukalakusanikilako ilyo bukalaila iyoo. Ala ni Yawe umwine akalakusanikilako pe na pe, ni Lesa umucindami, eukaba ulubuuto lobe." 
Isaiah60:20 Akasuba kakulamubalikilafye lyonse ukwabula ukuwa, no mweshi wakulabalika ukwabula ukufimbwapo. Kabili Yawe akalaba ulubuuto lobe pe na pe, elyo inshiku shakulilishikamo shikapwa." 
Isaiah60:21 Abantu bobe bakalabafye bonse abololoke, bakalakwata ne calo pe. Nine nabashimpamo, nine nababumba, pakuti baleebako na bambi ifyo ine napuulama." 
Isaiah60:22 Nangu ulupwa lobe ulwaba ulwacepeshapo kabili ulwafyefye, awe nalo lwine lukaba umushobo wa bantu uukulu kabili uwamaka. Ifi fintu ine nkaficita bwangu inshita iilingile nga yafika, nine ne Yawe nalanda." 
Isaiah61:1 Umupashi wa Mfumu Yawe waba pali ine, pantu Yawe alinsuba amafuta, pakuti ndebilila abalanda imbila nsuma. Alintuma ukulakoshako abafunshika imitima, no kulabilisha ukulubuka kuli bankole, na palwa kufumya abafungwa mu fifungo." 
Isaiah61:2 Alintuma ine pakuti ndebilisha ukuti inshita nomba naifika iyo Yawe alapusushishapo abantu bakwe, iyo Lesa wesu akalandula pa balwani bakwe. Alintuma ine pakuti ndetalalikako abaleloosha," 
Isaiah61:3 pakuti mu Sioni ndetalalikamo no kulasansamushamo abalelilishika, no kupeela kuli bena ingala yabusuma pa cifulo ca mito, amafuta yakusekelela pe punda lyakuloosha, bafwale no mwingila wakutasha, ukufuula umutima uwatondobala. Baketwa ifimuti fya oki ifyabulungami ifyalimbwa na Yawe umwine, bakulalumbanya na Lesa pa mibombele yakwe." 
Isaiah61:4 Bakulakuula cipya cipya ifibolya fya myaka ishishibantu, no kulabuukulula apaonaike kale, no kulabuukulula imisumba iyaonaike, no kulabuukulula ifitantala fya myaka yakale na kale." 
Isaiah61:5 Abenafyalo bakulamubombela. Bakulamucemenako ne fitekwa, bakulamuliminako na mabala, no kulamusungilako amabala ya myangashi." 
Isaiah61:6 Elyo imwe mwakulaitwa bashimapepo bakwa Yawe, mwakulaitwa ababomfi bakwa Lesa wesu. Imwe mwakulaliila pa fyuma fya mishobo ya benafyalo, kabili mwakulacankilwa mu fyuma fyabo." 
Isaiah61:7 Insoni shenu no kusaluka kwenu nafipwa, mwakulapoka ifyuma ifyafulilako imiku ibili kabili mwakulaiikalila nomba mu cifulo cenu. Ne fyuma fyenu fyakulafulilakofye mu calo cenu, kabili imwe mwakulasansamuka lyonsefye." 
Isaiah61:8 Yawe aletila ati, “Ine nalitemwa umulinganya, nalipata ubupuupu no lufyengo. Ine nkalambula bwino bwino abantu bandi mu cishinka, kabili nkapangana nabo icipangano ca pe." 
Isaiah61:9 Na bana ba mu bufyashi bwabo bakulalumbuka ku mishobo ya benafyalo, bonse abakalabamona bakalashininkisha ukuti aba e bantu abo Yawe apaala.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Nayanga ne nsansa muli Yawe, umutima wandi wakulasansamukila Lesa wandi, pantu ine namfwika icakufwala icakulanga ukuti ine nimpusuka, namfimba umwingila uwakulanga ukuti ndi mololoke. Namfwika icakufwala ca ku mutwe icakwa shibwinga, nga filya shimapepo nao afwala, ndi nga nabwinga uufwele ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya." 
Isaiah61:11 Pantu ngefi fine umushili umesha imbuto no kukusha ifimenene mwibala, efyo ne Mfumu Yawe akalenga ubololoke no kulumbanya fikalecitwa, fikamoneka ku bantu ba mishobo yonse." 
Isaiah62:1 Awe ine, pali iwe we musumba wa Sioni, nshatalalepofye iyoo, ine nshaleke kukulandapo, mpakafye ulubuke we Yerusalemu. Mpakafye ubololoke bobe busame nge mibengelele ya kasuba, no kulubulwa kobe kube ngo mwenge uulesanika ubushiku." 
Isaiah62:2 Abantu ba mishobo bakulamonako ifyo iwe ucita ifyalungama, ne shamfumu shabo shonse shakulatamba ifyo iwe wacindama. Ukalaitwa ishina ilipya ilyo Yawe umwine akakwinika." 
Isaiah62:3 Kuli Yawe, iwe ukaba nge ngala yabufumu iyayemba, ukaba nge citebo cabufumu mu maboko yakwa Lesa obe." 
Isaiah62:4 Abantu nomba tabalekwita “Uwalekeleshiwa,” ne calo cobe tabaleciita “Icaonaulwa,” iyoo. Nomba bakulakwita “kacele wakwa Lesa,” icalo cobe bakulaciita “Icaupwa bwino.” Pantu Yawe alekucankilwa, kabili icalo cobe calaba kwati mwanakashi uwaupwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Pantu nga filya fine umulumendo abuula umukashana uushabala opwa eo aupa, efyo na bana bobe bakakubuula, nga filya shibwinga asekelela pali nabwinga wakwe, efyo na Lesa obe akasekelela pali iwe." 
Isaiah62:6 “Iwe Yerusalemu, pa malinga yobe ine nimbikapo bamalonda, nabo tabakulaikala tondolo ubwaca no bwaila. Bali nokulanjibukisha palwa filayo fyandi, kabili tabakulaesha no kutuusha nakalya." 
Isaiah62:7 Belaleka ine ndeiikalilafye, mpakafye nkakubuukulule iwe Yerusalemu, nkakucite umusumba uwakuti abantu icalo conse bakalelumbanya.”" 
Isaiah62:8 Yawe nalapa umulapo wa kuboko kwakwe ukwa ku kulyo, kabili ukuboko kwakwe ukwamaka atile ati, “Napalifye ine nalapa ukuti ine nshakaleke balwani bakalemuliila icakulya iyoo, na benafyalo ine nshakabaleke bakalemunwena umwangashi wenu uupya uo imwe muculila." 
Isaiah62:9 Lelo imwe mwe balima iŋanu no kushiseepa, nimwe mwakulalya imikate, mwakulalumbanya Yawe. Mwe basaba ifitwalo fya myangashi, nimwe mwakulanwena umwangashi mu mansa sha cifulo candi icamushilo.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu, aleni imeni fumineni pa minshi, kasebeleni abantu benu umusebo abalebwela. Kaciteni icimusebo icikulu, mushulemo na mabwe. Imyeni uluunga pakuti imishobo ya benafyalo beshibe ifi." 
Isaiah62:11 Lekeni beshibe ukuti Yawe alebilikisha ku bantu bonse pano isonde ati, “Mwebe umwana mwanakashi Sioni amuti, ala umupusushi obe aleisa, ne cilambu cakwe ali naco, ala ulya aleisa na bantu abo alubwile." 
Isaiah62:12 Imwe mwakulaitwa ‘Abantu bakwa Lesa abamushilo,’ ‘Abantu abo Yawe alubula.’ Yerusalemu akulaitwa ‘Umusumba uo Yawe atemwa’ ‘Umusumba uo Lesa ashalekelesha.’ ”" 
Isaiah63:1 Nani ulya aletula ku musumba wa Bosira uwa mu calo ca Edomu? Icakufwala cakwe cilifye icakashika ce, afwala ubusaka, alepintauka na maka pakwenda. Ala nine ne Yawe Lesa ne wabulamba kukupususha abantu, ne waisa kukwishibisha abantu ukucimfya kwandi." 
Isaiah63:2 Nga nomba mulandu nshi icakufwala cobe cikashikile, kwati ca muntu uwali alenyantaula ifitwalo fya myangashi mulya umwakukamina?" 
Isaiah63:3 Yawe nao epakwasuka ati, “Nanyantawile umwangashi mu mulimba neka. Ukufuma mu bantu ba mishobo tapali uwali pamo na ine uwakungafwako. Mu bukali bwandi nalibakontawile, nabanyantawile cipyu cipyu, wasuka no mulopa wabo wasabukila ku cakufwala candi, casuka ne cakufwala candi cakantana ku mulopa wabo." 
Isaiah63:4 Pantu ine namwene ukuti inshita nomba yafika iyakulimwinapo abalwani babo, nokuti kabili e nshita ine iyakulubwilapo abantu bandi." 
Isaiah63:5 Naliloleshe pakuti monepo umo uwakungafwako, awe tepakumoneka nelyo umo, calimpapwishe pakumona ifyo tapali wakwafwana nankwe. Eco mu kuboko kwandi mwine emwaishile ukupususha kwandi, mu cipyu candi nasuka nacimfyafye neka." 
Isaiah63:6 Abantu ba mishobo yonse nalibanyantawile bukali bukali, nasuka nabalenga ukutalansuka nga bakolelwe pa mulandu wa cipyu, no mulopa wabo uubapeela ubumi nausumya walapita nga mulamba panshi.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ine nakulashimika ifyo Yawe aba no kutemwa ukwa pe, nakulamulumbanya pa fintu fyonse ifyakupapa ifyo atucitila. Alitusenamina nganshi ifwe fwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, fwe bantu bakwe atebeta ukulingana no kutemwa kwakwe ukukulu, pantu alikwatisha uluse ne cikuuku icishipwa." 
Isaiah63:8 Yawe nao epakusosa ati, “Cine cine aba bantu bandi, bana bandi abashakansangukile pakumbepa iyoo.” Kanshi nao epakuba umupusushi wabo." 
Isaiah63:9 Ku macushi yabo yonse nao aliculileko, kabili malaika uwa pa cinso cakwe alibapuswisheko, Abalubwile pa mulandu wakubatemwa na pa mulandu wa kubalangulukilakofye. Alibemishe no kubapapa nga filya fine na kale line alebasunga." 
Isaiah63:10 Lelo bena balitalamine Yawe, no kumufiisha ku mukoshi pakulenga Umupashi wakwe Uwamushilo ubulanda. Yawe epakubalukila aba umulwani wabo, no kubalwisha alabalwisha." 
Isaiah63:11 Elyo basuka balaibukisha inshiku shakale, ifyo cali ilyo Mose umubomfi wakwa Yawe alipo. Kanshi epakulaipusha abene abati, “Bushe pali nomba ni kwi kwaba Yawe uwatufumishe muli bemba no mucemi wa bantu bakwe? Bushe ni kwi kwaba Yawe uwapeele Mose Umupashi wakwe Uwamushilo?" 
Isaiah63:12 Bushe ni kwi kwaba Yawe uwalebomfya ubulamba bwakwe, no kuleka Mose acite ifintu ifyakupapa, ifyakulekanya bemba pakati pakuti abantu bapite, no kuleka ishina lyakwa Yawe lilelumbuka pe?”" 
Isaiah63:13 Ilyo Yawe abapishishe panshi apauma ndi mu menshi ayashaishikila, awe tapaipunwine nangu umo. Baleendafye nci nci nci nga bakabalwe abaleenda mu matololo," 
Isaiah63:14 baleendafye nge ŋombe ishileya ku nika ku mulemfwe. Umupashi wakwa Yawe ewabalengele ukutuusha. Kanshi efyo we Yawe watungulwile abantu bobe, wailetela no lulumbi ulwine lwine." 
Isaiah63:15 We Yawe, uko ku mulu uko waikala mu cifulo cobe icamushilo, ukufuma ku cifulo icacindama, ala shi wingalatuloleshako amenso. Bushe ukucincila kobe kwaya kwi? Ngo bulamba bobe bwaya kwi? Icilela cobe caya kwi pamo no luse lobe lwine? Ala wilatufumyako mano." 
Isaiah63:16 Pantu iwe niwe Shifwe. Nangu icikolwe cesu Abrahamu tatwishiba, na Israeli nao tatwibukishako, nomba iwe we Yawe niwe Shifwe, umulubushi wesu e shina lyobe ilyakale na kale." 
Isaiah63:17 We Yawe, nga cinshi ico utulekela tulepumba mu nshila shobe? Mulandu nshi utulekela tulekosa imitwe ndi, tulekaana no kulakukwatila akatiina? Bweluluka, loleshafye pa babomfi bobe abakubombela, ishi nko ishaba icacishilano cobe pe." 
Isaiah63:18 Ifwe fwe bantu bobe twaikele mwisano lyobe ilyamushilo inshita inonofye, abalwani besu baisa linyantaula no kulyonaula." 
Isaiah63:19 Iwe uletucitafye kwati tewe watuteeka, kwati tatwatala atuba bantu bobe abetilwa peshina lyobe." 
Isaiah64:1 Nga cinshi ico ushingalepwila umulu no kwisa panonshi? Icakuti ne mpili kuti shalaitentelafye pa cinso cobe. 
Isaiah64:2 Nga filya umulilo ubilima mu cisonso, nefyo ubilausha amenshi peshiko, efyo ulange abalwani bobe ishina lyobe ifyo lyaba, uleke imishobo itutume pa cinso cobe." 
Isaiah64:3 Limbi iwe walishile cita ifintu ifyakutiinya nganshi ifyo ifwe tushaenekele, ilyo waikile panshi, impili shalitentele pa cinso cobe." 
Isaiah64:4 Awe takwatala akuba muntu uwaumfwapo nangu uwailukapo nangu ukumonapo Lesa umo uwaba no bulamba nga iwe, uucitila abantu abamutetekela ifintu ifyaba ngefi." 
Isaiah64:5 Iwe ulasekelela abomfwa insansa mukulacita ifyalungama, abebukisha no kulaikala imikalile iyo iwe ufwaya ukuti baleikalilamo. Nangu iwe watufulilwe pa kubifya kwesu, awe ifwe twabikilepofye ukulabifya. Nangu iwe utufulilwa apakalamba, awe ifwe tulufyanyafye ukutula na ku kale. Nomba tukapusuka shani?" 
Isaiah64:6 Bonsefye pano tupelele, tuli babifi, nangu ifintu ifyawamisha ifyo ifwe tucita, awe nafyo fine fintu fyakowela nge cikolopo. Pa mulandu wa kubifya kwesu ifwe twaba nga mabula ayauma, twaba nga yasendwa ku mwela." 
Isaiah64:7 Pali ifwe, tapaba nelyo umo uukupepa, nangulafye umo uukukuuta mutuule. Pantu iwe walifisa icinso cobe kuli ifwe, no kutusuula iwe walitusuulako pa mulandu wa bubifi bwesu." 
Isaiah64:8 Lelo kwena we Yawe, niwe Shifwe. Ifwe twabafye nge bumba, nobe waba nga na kabumba. Ifwe niwe watubumba." 
Isaiah64:9 Kanshi wilatufulilwa ifi, we Yawe, nangu ukulaibukisha lyonse ububifi bwesu. Uloleshe pali ifwe fwe bantu bobefye, shi wingalatubelelako uluse." 
Isaiah64:10 Imisumba yobe iyamushilo nomba ilifye ifibolya, umusumba wa Sioni naonaika, mu Yerusalemu mwine mushelefye ifipompa." 
Isaiah64:11 Iŋanda yesu iyaba iyamushilo kabili iyalulumbi, iyo ifikolwe fyesu fyalekulumbilamo, awe nayo ine baliyoca ku mulilo. Ne ncende shonse isho ifwe twalecankilwa, awe nasho shalyonaika." 
Isaiah64:12 We Yawe, bushe iwe uletilapo shani pali ifi fyonse? Bushe tawacitepo cimo? Bushe uletulekafye tulecula no kutulengesha ubulanda?" 
Isaiah65:1 Yawe nao epakwasuka, “Naliisokolwele ku bantu abashaleipusha palwa ine, abashalemfwaya ebansanga. Nangu abantu ba uyu mushobo bashalemfwaya, ine nalibaswike nati, ‘Ala epo naba, epo ndi.’" 
Isaiah65:2 Naletambalika amaboko yandi inshiku shonse ku mushobo wa bantu abatalama, nangu bena bandufyanyafye ku mufulo, no kulacitafye ifyo abene batemenwe." 
Isaiah65:3 Bena balankalifya umutima ku mufulo wabo. Bocela amalambo mu mabala yabo, kabili bafutumwina ububani pa bulambo bakuula ne njelwa." 
Isaiah65:4 Baya mukwikala mu nshinshi na mu ncende ishafisama, emo bekala ubushiku bonse no kulacita ifyankaama. Balalya ne minofu ya nkumba, na mu mpoto shabo mubafye umuto wa nama ishakowela." 
Isaiah65:5 Elyo kabili aba bantu bene, ebeba abanabo abati, ‘Ala ifwe muletutaluka, mwilatukumya, pantu ifwe tuli abasanguluka.’ Awe ine ne Yawe teti ntemwe na bantu ba uyu musango, bena baba nge cushi mu myona yandi, mulilo uushatala aushima." 
Isaiah65:6 Moneni umulandu wabo walilembwa kale. Ine ne Yawe nshakalekepofye iyoo, nkabakanda, nkalandula pa fyabubifi fyabo," 
Isaiah65:7 bonse ububifi bwenu no bwa fikolwe fyenu,” efyasosa Yawe. “Pa mulandu bena batuulila amalambo pa mpili, no kumpontela pa tumpili, kanshi na ine nalabakanda ukulingana nefyo bacita.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Lelo kwena ine ne Yawe ndetila nati, “Nga filya abantu bakaana ukonaula ifisansangu fya myangashi umuli ubusuma, kanshi na ine wine efyo nkacita. Nshakalofye bantu bandi bonse iyoo, nkapusushapo abamombela." 
Isaiah65:9 Nkasenamina abana bakwa Yakobo, na ba mu luko lwakwa Yuda ebakaba e bene ba calo candi ica mpili. Abantu bandi abasalwa abamombela, emo bakalaikala." 
Isaiah65:10 Bakalacemena impaanga shabo mu Sharoni, bakalacemena ne ŋombe shabo mwishika lya Ako, umwakutuushisha imikuni ya ŋombe, efyo cikaba kuli abo abamfwaya." 
Isaiah65:11 “Nomba imwe mwe bafumya amano kuli ine ne Yawe, mwe balaba Sioni, ulupili lwandi ulwamushilo, mwe bapepa umulungu Gadi uo batila eupeela ishuko, no mulungu Meni uo batila eupekanya ifikesa citika, awe imwe cikaibela." 
Isaiah65:12 Nkamupekanisha ukwipaiwa mu nkondo, bonsefye mukakontamina panshi no kwipaiwa, pantu imwe mwalekaana ukunjasuka ilyo ine nalemwita, mwalekaana no kumfwa ilyo ine nalemweba. Mwatemwishishepo ukuntalamina, no kusala ukucita ifishinsekesha.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Eico ine ne Yawe namwebelapo imwe ukuti, “Ababomfi bandi ebakalashukila ifyakulya ifingi, lelo imwe mukalaba ne nsala. Ababomfi bandi bakalakwata ifyakunwa nafyo ifingi, nomba imwe mukalaculafye ku cilaka. Imwe mukalaendafye nsoni nsoni, pa nshita ababomfi bandi bena bakalaenda ne nsansa." 
Isaiah65:14 Ababomfi bandi bena bakalaimba inyimbo shansansa, lelo imwe mukalalilafye imisowa kulwa mutima ubukali, mukalaloosha pa mulandu wa kucucutika mu mupashi." 
Isaiah65:15 Abantu bandi abasalwa bakalabuula ishina lyenu, no kulalilumbula nge cilai icakutipwilako bambi. Nine winefye ne Mfumu Yawe nkamwipaya imwe. Abamombela bena ine nkalabeta ishina limbi ilipya." 
Isaiah65:16 Umuntu onse mu calo uukalalomba ipaalo, ine ne Lesa uwacishinka nine winefye akalalomba ukuti mupaale. No muntu onse mu calo uukalalapa, lishina lyandi ine ne Lesa uwacishinka elyo akalalumbula pakulapa. Ala ifinkunka fyakale nafilabikwako, ine nomba nimfifumyako na mano.”" 
Isaiah65:17 “Mwamona, ine ndebumba umulu uupya ne calo naco icipya. Ifyakale fyonse tabakalefibukisha, nangu ukulafitontonkanyapo." 
Isaiah65:18 Imwe lyonsefye muleanga ne nsansa pa fintu ifyo ine ndecita, pantu Yerusalemu umusumba uo ine ndecita wakulabamofye insansa sheka sheka, na bantu bauko bene bakulaba ne nsansa." 
Isaiah65:19 Na ine wine nakulasansamuka icibi pa mulandu wa Yerusalemu, na pa mulandu wa bantu bandi. Tamwaleba wakulukusha filamba, nangufye uwakukuuta mutuule nakalya." 
Isaiah65:20 Tamwakaleba tunya utwakulaikalafye inshiku ishinono ututeku nakalya, bonsefye bakulakota ukucila na pa myaka iyo bali nokufwilapo. Abakulafika pa myaka umwanda (100) utuntulu, awe bakulamonekafye abamaka. Uushalefikako ninshi ena kwishibafye ukuti untu atipwa." 
Isaiah65:21 Abantu bakulaikuulila amayanda, no kwikala emo bakulaikala. Bakulailimina amabala ya myangashi, no kulalya ifitwalo fyaiko." 
Isaiah65:22 Tabakakuule amayanda elyo bambi ebaisa ikalamo iyoo. Kabili tabakalime elyo bambi ebaisa lya awe. Abantu bandi bakulakokola pa calo nge miti. Abasalwa bandi bakulailemena ifintu ifyo bakulaibombela. 
Isaiah65:23 Bakulashuukilamo mu milimo yabo, na bana babo tabaleponenwa na mipamba nakalya. Pantu nine wine ne Yawe nakulabapaala lyonsefye, kumo kwine na bana babo." 
Isaiah65:24 Nomba ilyo tabalati banjite, ine nalibaswike, ilyo bacili balelanda, ninshi nalibomfwile." 
Isaiah65:25 Umumbulu no mwana wa mpaanga fikamba ukulila pamo, ne nkalamo shikalalya icani nge ŋombe, ne nsoka shine shikalalya ulukungu. Pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo, awe tapakabe ubonaushi kabili tapalemoneka kabi nelyo kamo.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah66:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Umulu, e cipuna candi icabufumu, icalo naco epo ine nanyanta amakasa yandi. Nga nomba kanshi ni ŋanda nshi iyo imwe mwingankuulila? Nangu ni pa ncende nshi ningatuushisha?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ala nine wine nabumba fyonse ifi. Fyonsefye, ne mwine nine Yawe. Elyo kwena abantu abaicefya, abalapila, abankwatila akatiina no kupetamina ishiwi lyandi, ine ebo mposako amano." 
Isaiah66:3 “Abantu tepakutemwa ukucita ifyo abene balefwaya. Umuntu uuli onse uwipaya iŋombe no kutuula ilambo, abafye ngo wipaya umuntu. Uwaipaya akana ka mpaanga no kukatuula nge lambo, abafye cimo cine no unyongele umukoshi wa mbwa pakuiipaya no kuileka ilambo. Noyo utuula umutuulo wa cabunga, aba cimo cine ngo uutuulile umulopa wa nkumba. Na onse uwoca ububani, cimo no upakata utulubi. Aba bantu tepakutemwa iyi mipepele yabo iyishaibipila." 
Isaiah66:4 Kanshi na ine wine nakulabatoosha imipamba, no kuleta pali bene ifintu filya fine batiina. Pantu tapali nelyo umo uwanjaswike ilyo ine nalebeta, nangu uwakumfwa ilyo ine nalebeba. Mutemwikwa ukuntalamina, no kulacita ifintu ifishinsekesha." 
Isaiah66:5 “Umfweni kuno ishiwi lyakwa Yawe, imwe mwe bankwatila akatiina, mwe bapetamina ishiwi lyandi ine ne Yawe. Imwe ndemweba nati, abantu benu bamo balimupata, no kumusuula pa mulandu wakuti imwe mwalimpetamina. Imwe balamuwela abati, ‘Twakulamonako ifyo imwe mwakulasansamuka. Yawe nalemulangafye ifyo apuulama, nalemupusushakofye.’ Kwena aba bantu bakasebaninapo." 
Isaiah66:6 Umfweni akabolokoto ako kaba mu musumba, akafuma mwi Tempele. Nine ne Yawe ndebolokota pa nshita ndelimuna abalwani bandi." 
Isaiah66:7 “Umusumba wandi uwamushilo uli ngo mwanakashi uwafyala umwana umwaume apopenefye, ukwabula nokuti atale akomwe ne fumo." 
Isaiah66:8 Bushe kwalitala akuba umuntu uwamonapo nangu ukumfwapo ica uyu musango? Bushe kwalitala akuba umushobo umo uwa bantu uwatampile ukubapo pa bushikufye bumo? Ala Sioni ena akafyala umutundu wa bantu ilyo line akakomwa ne fumo. 
Isaiah66:9 Nine Yawe ulenga ukuti cilepalamina icakuti abantu bandi balefyalilwapo, bushe imwe muleti amuti kuti ine nalekapofye nokuti bafyalwe iyoo, batini?” Efyasosa Lesa wenu." 
Isaiah66:10 “Sansamukeni pamo na Yerusalemu, mwangileni imwe bonse mwe bamutemwa. Akusansamukeni nankwe nomba, imwe bonse mwe balemuloosha." 
Isaiah66:11 Mwakulacankilwa ifisuma fyakwe, nga filya ciba ku kanya akali kwibele lyakwa nyina, mukalaonka no kusansamushiwa, no kuilemena ku filyo ifishaifulila.”" 
Isaiah66:12 Ifi efyasosa Yawe, “Ine nkaletela Yerusalemu umutende wape, ne fyuma fya mishobo ya benafyalo fyakulaisa kuli ena, fyakulafumfumuka nga menshi ya mu mumana uushikama. Mwakulaba nga kana akasungwa na nyina, Yerusalemu akamusendela pa maboko yakwe no kumutentemba bwino." 
Isaiah66:13 Ine nkalamutalalikila imwe mu Yerusalemu, nga filya fine nacifyashi atalalika ka mwane, efyo nkalamutalalikilako." 
Isaiah66:14 Ilyo imwe mukalamona ifi fintu, ala imitima yenu ikalasansamuka, mukalakwatisha amaka no mutende. Elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine ne Yawe ndafwa abampetamina, nokuti kanshi ine ndafokela abalwani bandi." 
Isaiah66:15 “Ine ne Yawe nkeshila mu mulilo, amaceleta yandi yakaba nga kankungwe. Nkesa kukupesha abo ine nafulilwa, no bukali bwandi bukaba ngo lubingu lwa mulilo." 
Isaiah66:16 Abantu bonsefye pa calo abo ne Yawe nkasanga ne milandu, nine ne Yawe nkabalimwina ku mulilo na ku lupanga, no kufwa, bengi bakafwa ku mulandu wa ine ne Yawe." 
Isaiah66:17 “Ine ne Yawe ndetila nati, calapwa, kabili calapwilililafye kuli aba bantu baisangulula, abaya imilongo kukulapepa imilungu mu ncende isho baipekanishisha mu mabala. Calapwilililafye kuli aba bantu abalya iminofu ya nkumba, na bakwindi, ne fyakulya fimbi ifyabunani." 
Isaiah66:18 Ine nalishiba ifyo bena batontonkanya nefyo bacita. Ine nalaisa nonganye abantu ba mishobofye yonse ne ndimi shonse nabo bakesa mona ubucindami bwandi. 
Isaiah66:19 Kabili nkabika icishibilo pakati kabo icakushininkisha ukuti kanshi nine ndebalimuna. Kwena nalaisa shapo bamo, nabo ndebatuma ku bantu ba mishobo ababa mu fyalo fyakutali iya ku lulamba lwa bemba, uko bena bashatala abomfwa palwa lulumbi lwandi, uko bena bashatala abamona ifyo ine nacindama, nefyo ine naba no bulamba. Nako e ku Tashishi, na ku Libya, na ku Ludia uko abantu bacenjelesha ukuposa imifwi, na ku Tubali, na ku calo ca Bagiriki. Ni kuli iyi mishobo ya benafyalo iyo balaya mukulashimikilako ifyo ine nacindama." 
Isaiah66:20 Bakabwesha na banenu bonse, bakabafumya mu mishobo ya bantu bonse, no kwisa batuula ngo bupe kuli ine ne Yawe. Pakwisa ku lupili lwandi ulwamushilo mu Yerusalemu bakabaleta pali bakabalwe, pa maceleta, pa macila, pali bapunda, na pa ngamila. Cikabafye nga filya fine abena Israeli baleta imituulo yabo iya cabunga ku ŋanda yandi ne Yawe, ilyo besa nabasendela mu fipe ifyasanguluka." 
Isaiah66:21 Bamo pali abo bantu, ine ne Yawe nkabacita bashimapepo na bena Levi.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Isaiah66:22 “Ngefi fine umulu upya ne calo cipya ifyo ine ndecita fyakulabelelela ku maka yandi ne Yawe, efyo na bana benu bakulabelelela pamo pene ne shina lyenu." 
Isaiah66:23 Pa nshikunkulu ya kumoneka kwa mweshi onse uupya, na lyonsefye pa bushiku bwe Sabata, abantu ba mitundu yonse bakulaisa muno mu Yerusalemu kukumpepa ine ne Yawe." 
Isaiah66:24 “Pakubwelelamo bakulatamba ifitumbi fya bantu abansangukile. Imitiiti iyakulafilya tayakatale aifwa nakalya, no mulilo uwakulafyoca nao tawakatale aushima iyoo. Kabili bakaba icakuselausha ku bantu ba mitundu yonse.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Amashiwi yakwa Yeremia mwana Hilikiya, uwali umo pali bashimapepo abali mu mushi wa Anatoti mu citungu cakwa Benjamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia pa nshita Yosia umwana wa mfumu Amoni aleteeka icalo ca Yuda, mu mwaka walengele ikumi limo na itatu (13) apo abelele pa bufumu." 
Jeremiah1:3 Nakabili Yawe alilandile kuli Yeremia pa nshita Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia ali pa bufumu bwakuteeka icalo ca Yuda. Elyo ukutula ilyo line alelanda kuli ena inshita ishingi, ukushintafye napo abena Yerusalemu basendelwe muli bunkole, mu mweshi walenga isano, mu mwaka walengele ikumi limo na umo (11) apo Sedekia mwana Yosia abelele pa bufumu bwakuteeka icalo ca Yuda." 
Jeremiah1:4 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ilyo nshilati nkubumbe munda muli noko, ninshi ine nalikwishiba, ilyo iwe ushilati ufyalwe, ine ninshi nalikupatula. Ninshi ine nalikusonta ukuba kasesema ku mishobo ya bantu.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Na ine epakwasukapo nati, “Iyee we Yawe, awe ine nshaishiba kulanda, kabili ine ncilifye umwaice.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Lelo Yawe ena pakunjasuka atifye, “Iwe witila ine ndi mwaice, iwe wakulayafye ku bantu abo ine nakulakutumako, wakulaya mukubeba fyonse ifyo ine nakulakukonkomesha." 
Jeremiah1:8 Tecakwesha kulabatiina iyoo, pantu ine nakulaba nobe pakuti ndekupokololako. Ifi efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah1:9 Elyo kabinge Yawe atambika ukuboko, ankumya pa kanwa, anjeba nokuti, “Mona nomba nabika amashiwi yandi mu kanwa kobe, ayo iwe uli nokulalanda." 
Jeremiah1:10 Mona, pa bushiku bwa lelo ine nakulashika pa bantu ba mishobo, na pa fyalo fya shamfumu ifyalekana lekana. Amaka nakupeela yakunukaula no kubongolola, yakonaula no kulofya, yakukula no kulimba.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Elyo kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti, “Yeremia, bushe cinshi ico wamona?” Na ine nayasuka nati, “Namona umusambo wa muti wa Alumondi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Yawe nao epa kunjasuka ati, “Ee, nifyo fine, walungika, pantu ine ndalolela pakuti mone ukuti ifyo nsosele fyafikilishiwa.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Nakabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti, “Cinshi na cimbi ico wamona?” Na ine nayasuka nati, “Namona inongo ilebilauka, kabili ifutatile ku kapinda ka ku kuso.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Elyo Yawe nao anjeba ati, “Ku kapinda ka ku kuso kwine ekukafuma icinkunka icikesa ponena abantu bonse abekala muli cino calo." 
Jeremiah1:15 Pantu nomba ine ne Yawe nalaita abantu aba mu shamfumu shonse isha ku kapinda ka ku kuso, efyasosa Yawe. Ishamfumu shabo cila imo ikesa teeka icipuna caiko icabufumu pa mpongolo ya musumba wa Yerusalemu, no kwisa shinguluka ilinga lyauko lyonse, no kushinguluka imisumba imbi iya mu calo ca Yuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Efyo nkapingula abantu bandi pa mulandu wa kubifya kwabo no kunsangukila, pakulafutumwina imilungu ububani, no kupepa utulubi uto abene baipangila." 
Jeremiah1:17 “Nomba iwe ima ipekanye, kabiye no kubeba fyonse ifyo ine ndekukonkomesha. Tecakwesha ukubatiina iyoo, pantu ine kuti naisa kutiinya pa cinso cabo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Mona, ubwa lelo nakucita ukuba umusumba we linga, kabili ukuba ulupanda lwa cela, kabili nge linga lya mukuba ilyakulwishanya ne calo conse, kukulwishanya ne shamfumu sha mu Yuda, pamo na bacilolo, na bashimapepo, na bantu bene kumo aba mu calo." 
Jeremiah1:19 Bakakulwisha lelo tabakakucimfye nakalya, pantu ine nakulaba nobe pakuti ndekupokololako.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah2:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Kabiye uye ubile mu matwi ya bena Yerusalemu imbila yandi iyakuti, ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Ine ndebukisha ifyo mwapeteme mu bwaice bwenu, ifyo mwantemenwe kwati ni nabwinga, ilyo mwalenkonka ukupita mu matololo, ukupita mu calo icishatandwamo." 
Jeremiah2:3 Mwe bena Israeli, mwali abantu abamushilo kuli ne Yawe, mwali nge fisabo ifyawamisha ifyo nabalilepo ukulobolola. Bonse abalemucusha, ine nalebapeelelapo umulandu, no kubaletela ifinkunka. Ifi efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Kutikeni kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe, imwe bamwana Yakobo, mwe mikowa yonse iya mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli." 
Jeremiah2:5 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Bushe bubi nshi bashinwe bamwene muli ine, ubwalengele ukuti bampondokele, no kulakonka utulubi utunangwa, basuka nabo bene basangukilamo ifinangwa?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Tabaipwishe nokuti, ‘Nga Yawe ali kwi, uwatufumishe mu calo ca Egupto, no kututungulula mu matololo? Ali kwi uwatutungulula mu calo ca mpili kabili ica miyenge, mu calo icauma ndii, kabili ica mfifi ikalamba, mu calo icishalepitamo muntu, umushaikele muntu nelyo umo?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Nasuka namufisha mu calo icafunda, pakuti muleipakisha ifisabo fyaciko, ne fisuma fimbi ifyabamo. Lelo imwe cilya mwafikamofye, awe mwakowesha ne calo candi, mwalenga icifulo ico namupeele ukuba icamuselu." 
Jeremiah2:8 Bashimapepo nabo ababula nokuti bepushe ati, ‘Nga Yawe ali kwi?’ Abalelondolola amafunde nabo tebakunjishiba nakalya. Bakateeka nabo bansangukila. Bakasesema bandi nabo pakusesema balalumbulafye Baali, no kulakonka utulubi utunangwafye.”" 
Jeremiah2:9 “Kanshi ine namupeela umulandu nakabili, ifi efyasosa Yawe. Ndepeela umulandu ku bana ba bana benu." 
Jeremiah2:10 Kabiyeni ku cishi ca Saiprasi, muye imwena mwe bene, tumeni inengu ku Keda lubali lwa ku kabanga, bayelolekesha, bushe kwena kwalitala akumoneka icintu icaba ngeci?" 
Jeremiah2:11 Bushe kwalitala akubako umushobo umo uwasangukilapo imilungu yabo, nelyo mu cacine ishaba imilungu yacine? Lelo imwe mwe bantu bandi mwalisangukila ubucindami bwandi, no kwalukila ku milungu imbi iyinangwa." 
Jeremiah2:12 Kanshi mwe myulu sungukeni, kabili mupape nganshi no kulanguluka apakalamba pali ici cintu.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah2:13 Imwe mwe bantu bandi mwalicita imilandu iyabipa ibili: Umo wakunsuula, ne ntulo ya menshi ayapeela ubumi. Umbi wakuimbila ifishima mwe bene, nafyo ifya milale ifishingekalamo amenshi." 
Jeremiah2:14 “Bushe Israeli musha? Bushe afyelwe umusha? Cinshi ico abalwani bakwe bamusangwila icakutapa? 
Jeremiah2:15 Abalwani balemubulumina nge nkalamo, kabili baleikatisha nganshi pakubuluma. Icalo cakwe bacisangula icibolya, imisumba yakwe yaocewa, tamwashala nangu umo uwaikalamo nakalya." 
Jeremiah2:16 Abena Memfisi pamo na bena Tapanesi, balimubeya umushishi wa bucindami bwenu." 
Jeremiah2:17 Imwe mwe bena Israeli, bushe teimwe mwe bene mwailetelela ifi fyonse, pa mulandu wakupondokela Yawe Lesa wenu, ilyo alemutungulula mu nshila?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Bushe finshi mwasangamo mukuya ku Egupto, kukunwa amenshi ya mu mumana wa Nailo? Ngeco musuntila ku Asiria, kabili cinshi? Bushe ni kukunwa amenshi ya mu mumana wa Yufurate?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Ala ububi bwenu ebukamukanda imwe, no kufutatuka kwenu ekukamuletelela. Ishibeni no kumona ukuti cintu cabipa kabili cilakalifya umweo, icakusuula Yawe Lesa wenu ukwabula ukumukwatila akatiina.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah2:20 “Imwe mwe bena Israeli, ala ni kale mwafunine ikoli lyenu, mwaputaula ne myando iyamukakile, mwasosa nokuti, ‘Awe ifwe tatwalekubombela.’ Elyo pa tupili tonse ututali, na mwisamba lya miti yonse iyafumba, epo imwe mwalecitila ubulalelale." 
Jeremiah2:21 Imwe namulimbile ngo mwangashi uwawamisha, namubyele ngo lubuto ulusuma pali shonse. Nga cinshi calengele imwe ukumpondokela, pakuti nomba mube ngo mwangashi uwapukuta uwa mpanga?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Pantu nangu mwingasambila ne mito, mwabomfya ne sopo ilingi nganshi, lelo mucili abakowela ku bubi bwenu pa cinso candi.” Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Jeremiah2:23 “Nga nomba imwe kuti mwakaana shani amuti, ‘Awe ifwe tatwaikowesha, awe ifwe tatwatala atupepa imilungu ba Baali?’ Ibukishenifye ifyo mwacitile mwishika, tontonkanyeni pafyo mwacitilemo. Ala imwe mwabafye nge ngamila ikota, iyibutukila uku noku no kuifunshanya." 
Jeremiah2:24 Imwe mwaba nga punda umukota uwa mpanga uwaishibila mu matololo, uutila nga cafikila icakutamfiwa, asumba ubwema mu mwela pakwishiba ukubelele umulume, Awe ninshi tewakupetamika! iyilume yonse iyilemufwaya teti icule pakumusanga, lyonsefye ilyo cifikile icakutamfiwa alasangwa." 
Jeremiah2:25 Lelo imwe mwe bena Israeli mwileka kubutuka mpaka amakasa yenu yafuulwe indyato, nangu ku mikoshi yenu ukulauma ndii. Lelo imwe mutila, ‘Iyoo te mulandu! Tatusakamene. Ifwe twalitemwa abenafyalo, kanshi ifwe ebo twakulakonkelela.’”" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Nga filya fine umupupu akwata insoni nga bamwikata, efyo nemwe bene mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli mukasebana, imwe bonse, ne shamfumu shenu, na bacilolo benu, na bashimapepo benu, na bakasesema benu bene." 
Jeremiah2:27 Mwe beba icimuti amuti, ‘Niwe tata,’ mwe beba ne cilibwe amuti, ‘Niwe wamfyele.’ Ne cikalenga nico imwe mwalimfutatila, mwalikaana no kubwelela uko ndi. Nomba ilyo muponenwa na macushi, lyena mulafwaya ukuti ndeisa mukulamutuulako." 
Jeremiah2:28 Nge milungu yenu iya kwi, ilya mwe bene mwaipangila? Ilyo muleponenwa na macushi, lekeni iyo milungu ilemutuulako. Pantu imwe mwe bena Yuda mwalikwata imilungu iyingi, yafulafye nge fyafula imisumba yenu." 
Jeremiah2:29 “Nga cinshi icilenga muleilishanya kuli ine? Apo imwe bonse mwalimpondokela, ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah2:30 “Naonawile amaka yandi pakukalipila abana benu, lelo bena tabalapile iyoo. Mwaleipaulula bakasesema ku lupanga lwenu kwati ni nkalamo iyalubuuka." 
Jeremiah2:31 “Imwe mwe ba ino nkulo kutikeni bwino kwishiwi ine ne Yawe ndesosa. Mwe bena Israeli, bushe ine nalitala mba nga matololo kuli imwe, nangu nge calo icabamo imfifi iyikalamba mwa? Nga nomba cinshi ico imwe mwe bantu bandi mulesosela amuti, ‘Ifwe nomba tuli bantungwa, twakulaya uko tulefwaya, tatwakulaisa kuli iwe nakabili.’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Bushe umukashana kuti alaba ku fisamo fyakwe ifyakuyemfya, nangu nabwinga bushe kuti alaba ku fyakufwala ifya bunabwinga? Lelo imwe mwe bantu bandi mwalindabako, pa nshiku ishishili shakupenda." 
Jeremiah2:33 “Elyo kabili imwe mwalishiba bwino umwakusangila ifibusa fya pa mbali. Imisango yenu mwaliisambilishako na ku banakashi ababipisha. 
Jeremiah2:34 Ifyakufwala fyenu fyalikantaana ku mulopa wa balanda abakaele, abo mushatalile amubasangilisha balemwibila. Lelo pali ifi fyonse, imwe mutilapofye," 
Jeremiah2:35 ‘Awe ifwe tuli bakaele, icinefye Yawe teti atukalipile.’ Lelo ine ne Yawe, nkamupingula, pantu imwe mutila, ‘Ifwe tapaba icintu twabifya.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Nga cinshi ico imwe mufutukila bwangu bwangu? Ala abena Egupto bakamusebanya, nga filya fine abena Asiria bamusebenye." 
Jeremiah2:37 Nako kwine ku Egupto mukabwelako bulanda bulanda, pantu ine ne Yawe nine nkeene abo imwe mwacetekelamo, eico kanshi imwe tamwakashuke ukupitila muli bena.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Batila abati, “Umuntu nga aleka umukashi wakwe, nao umukashi wakwe afumako, aya upwa na ku mwaume umbi, bushe wiba wapakubala kuti amubwesha? Bushe ninshi ica musango uyu tekukowesha icalo? Ifi efyo iwe we Israeli wacita, ifyakukwata abatemwikwa bobe abengi, bushe cinshi ulefwaila ukubwelela uko ndi” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah3:2 “Shiloleshafye apasansama, uimwene na we mwine! Bushe palishalapo incende imo iyo ushacitilapo ubulalelale? Waleikalila abatemwikwa bobe mu mbali ya nshila, kwati ni filya umwina Arabia alalilila abantu mu matololo. Iwe naukowesha icalo ku lwa bulalelale bobe." 
Jeremiah3:3 E mulandu wine ne mfula ishilelokela, kabili eco ilekanina nokuloboka pa mibundo. Icinso cobe cimoneka nga cilende, ne nsoni nasho tawakwata." 
Jeremiah3:4 Bushe te nombaline walenjita auti, ‘Tata, niwe cibusa ukufuma ku bwaice bwandi," 
Jeremiah3:5 bushe wakulamfulilwa pe na pe? Bushe icipyu cobe cakulatwalililafye?’ Efyo iwe we Israeli usosa, lelo ifyabipa fyobe iwe uficitilafye apo ulefwaila.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Ilyo imfumu Yosia aleteeka icalo ca Yuda, Yawe alandile kuli ine ati, “Bushe nobe walimona ifyo umwanakashi Israeli uwabula icisumino ampondokela? Aya mukunina pa mulu wa tupili, nokuya mwisamba lya miti yonse iyafumba emo alecitila bucilende." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ine mu mano yandi natontonkenye nati, panuma yakucita ifi fyonse akabwelela kuli ine, lelo tabwelele iyoo, kabili Yuda nkashi nankwe uwabula icishinka nao aimwena ifi fintu." 
Jeremiah3:8 Kabili napeele intalantanshi Israeli kalata wakumulekelapo icupo pa mulandu wa bucilende bwakwe bonse, namutamfya no kumutamfya. Nomba namwene intalantanshi inkashi nankwe Yuda takwete katiina, nao ayacita bucilende," 
Jeremiah3:9 ukwabula nokuti alesakamana nakalya. Asuka Yuda akowesha ne calo, alacita bucilende ku mabwe ne fimuti." 
Jeremiah3:10 Lelo nangu cali ifyo inkashi nankwe nao Yuda uwabula icitetekelo nafilwa ukubwela no mutima wakwe onse kuli ine, pantu ukubwela kwakwe cali kubepafye. Ifi efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati, “Israeli uushakwata icitetekelo awamapo ukucila Yuda intalangani ine ine." 
Jeremiah3:12 Kanshi iwe kabiye ku kapinda ka ku kuso, kabile imbila kuli Israeli utile, “Bwelela kuli ine we Israeli we wabula citetekelo. Ifi efyasosa Yawe. Ine nshakakuloleshe bukali bukali iyoo, pantu ine nalikwatisha uluse. Ifi efyasosa Yawe. Ine nshakalekufulilwa lyonsefye nakalya." 
Jeremiah3:13 Icikulu usumine ukuti walikwata umulandu, uwakumpondokela ine ne Yawe, ne Lesa obe. Suminafye ukuti mu miti yonse iyafumba, emo iwe walekumanina na benafyalo, nokuti tawatalile aumfwa kwishiwi lyandi iyoo.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Imwe mwe bana ababula icisumino, ala bweleleni kuli ine, ifi efyasosa Yawe. Pantu ine ndi mwina mwenu. Muli cila mushi nkabuulamo umuntu umo, na muli cila mukowa nkabuulamo abantu babili, nkamuleta na ku Sioni." 
Jeremiah3:15 Elyo nkamupeela abakumucema abaishiba ififwaya umutima wandi, abakalamutungulula na mano no mucetekanya." 
Jeremiah3:16 Ifi efyasosa Yawe. Ilyo mukasanda mu calo, lyena ninshi abantu bakaleka no kulalanda palwa Mbokoshi ya Cipangano icakwa Yawe. Bakaleka no kutontonkanyapo nangu ukwibukishapo iyoo, tabakaleifuluka nangu ukupyanikishapo imbi nakalya." 
Jeremiah3:17 Iyo nshita nga yafika, Yerusalemu bakalamwita abati, icipuna cabufumu icakwa Yawe, na bantu ba mishobo yonse emo bakalalongana pakucindika ishina lyakwa Yawe. Tabakalekonkelela ukumalala kwa mitima yabo iyabubifi." 
Jeremiah3:18 Pali iyo nshita aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda bakakumbinkana pamo na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli, bakalaendela pamo pakufuma ku calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso, no kwisa mu calo ico ine napeele ifikolwe fyenu pakuti cibe icacishilano pe.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 “Elyo nalandile nati, ine nalefwaya ukumucita nga bana abandifye, no kumupeela icalo icisuma, naco icacishilano icawamisha ukucila ne fyalo fya mishobo yonse ifya pano isonde. Ine naletifye mwakulanjita amuti, ‘Tata,’ nokuti tamwakabale amunsangukila no kuleka ukukonka." 
Jeremiah3:20 Nga filya fine umwanakashi intalangani asangukila wiba, efyo nemwe bene mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli mushampetamina.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah3:21 Icongo ico caumfwika pamulu apasansama, ala bena Israeli abo baleloosha, balepapata, pantu imikalile yabo intu yabipa, kabili balilabako na kuli Yawe Lesa wabo." 
Jeremiah3:22 “Bwelenifye imwe bonse mwe babula icisumino, ala ine ndemundapa ku kufutatuka kwenu.” Imwe mwasosa amuti, “Ee, ifwe tuli mukubwelela kuli iwe, pantu niwe Yawe Lesa wesu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Cine cine ukupepa kwa tulubi pa mulu wa tupili, ne ficitika pa mpili, fyonse fyabufifye. Ifwe fwe bena Israeli uutupusushakofye, ni Yawe Lesa wesu." 
Jeremiah3:24 “Ukutula ku bwaice bwesu imilungu ya nsoni eipwisha ifyakulya ifyo bashifwe baleculila, emukuti impaanga, iŋombe, abana abaume na banakashi." 
Jeremiah3:25 Natulala mu nsoni shesu, no kusebana kwesu kutufimbe. Pantu ifwe pamo na bashifwe twalibifya kuli Yawe Lesa wesu, ukutulafye ku bwaice bwesu ukufika na lelo line, kabili twalikaana no kulabeela Yawe Lesa wesu.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 Yawe alelanda ukuti, “Imwe mwe bena Israeli, nga muli nokubwela, bweleleni kuli ine. Nga mwaposa utulubi uto utwabunani no kutufumya pa cinso candi, no kuleka ukulubantika," 
Jeremiah4:2 kabili nga mwalapa mu cishinka, mu bololoke na mu bulungami, mwati, ‘Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo,’ lyena abantu ba mishobo bakalalomba pakuti ine ndebapaala, nabo bene ninshi bakalanumbanya.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Elyo kabili Yawe aeba abena Yuda na bena Israeli ati, “Limeni amabala yenu ayashilalimwa, epakuti mwilabyala imbuto shenu mu myunga." 
Jeremiah4:4 Isembululeni pa mulandu wakwa Yawe, sembululeni imitima yenu, imwe mwe bena Yuda, na imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu. Nga teifyo, ine ninshi nkabilima ngo mulilo ku cipyu, no wakuushimya takwakabe, pa mulandu wa fintu ifibi ifyo imwe mwacita.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 “Ishibisheni abena Yuda no kubilisha mu Yerusalemu mutile, ‘Muye mulelisha amapenga mu calo conse.’ Muleikatisha pakubilikisha muletila, ‘Longaneni pamo, pakuti tubutukile mu misumba ya malinga!’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Imikeni icishibilo icakulangilila inshila iyakuya ku Sioni. Butukileni ukwakupusukila, mwilashingashinga iyoo. Pantu ine ne Yawe Lesa nalaleta icinkunka no bonaushi, ukutula ku kapinda ka ku kuso.”" 
Jeremiah4:7 Inkalamo naibuuka, ifumine umo ibelama, umonaushi wa mishobo nasakatuka. Nafuma kuntu ekala, eshile kukonaula icalo cenu nakalya nakalya. Imisumba ya muno calo cenu ileshala ifitantala, takwamoneke wakwikalamo nakalya." 
Jeremiah4:8 Kanshi imwe fwalenifye insalu shabulanda, pumenipo ne misowa, muleloosha, pantu icipyu icikali ico Yawe atukwatila tacilapwa." 
Jeremiah4:9 “Pali ubo bushiku,” ifi efyasosa Yawe, “Imisana ya bashamfumu ne ya bacilolo ikaputuka. Bashimapepo bakalakankafye ku mwenso, bakasesema nabo amano yakabapela.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Elyo ine nasosa nati, “Yangu we Mfumu Yawe, cine cine walibepa apakalamba aba bantu pamo na bena Yerusalemu. Pantu wasosele auti, ‘Imwe mwakulaikala mu cibote,’ nomba ulupanga ulu lusontele pa mikoshi.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Pali ilya nshita, aba bantu pamo na bena Yerusalemu ine ne Yawe Lesa nkabeba nati, “Ala umwela uwakabisha ulya uletula mu matololo, nao uleishilila imwe mwe bantu bandi. Tawaise mukulamwela nga filya ucita pakwela iŋanu, nangu ukumusangulula iyoo." 
Jeremiah4:12 Ala mwela uwamaka nganshi uwishila peshiwi nakonkomeshe. Eico nomba nine wine ndepingula abantu bandi.” 
Jeremiah4:13 Moneni umonaushi ulya aleisa nga makumbi, amaceleta yakwe aya nkondo yaleisa nga kankungwe. Bakabalwe bakwe balubilo ukucila na bakapumpe. We bulanda nobe! Ala twashama twalaloba!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu, fumyeni ububi mu mitima yenu epakuti mupusuke. Nga mukaleka lilali ukutontonkanya ifibi mu mitima yenu?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Pantu ishiwi lilebilikisha ukufuma mu citungu cakwa Dani, lilesobela ifinkunka ukufuma mu mpili shakwa Efulemu." 
Jeremiah4:16 Lileti, “Sokeniko imishobo ya benafyalo, bilisheni na mu Yerusalemu mutile, ‘Abalwani bali mu nshila, baletula ku calo cakutali, balelwisha imisumba ya muno mu Yuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Balaisa shinga icalo ca Yuda, kwati bantu balelinda ibala, pantu balinsangukila.’” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah4:18 “Mwe bena Yuda nimwe mwe bene mwailetelela pa mibeele yenu, na pa micitile yenu. Uku e kukandwa kwenu. Yangu ifyo kukalipe icakuti kwafika na ku mitima yenu.”" 
Jeremiah4:19 Yangu we bucushi nobe ulakuula, ine ndeinyunsafye ku bukali! Nafwa umutima, umutima wandi tepakukubauka. Ine nimfilwa ukwikala tondolo, pantu niŋumfwa iciunda ce penga ne congo ca nkondo." 
Jeremiah4:20 Ifinkunka filekonkanafye, ne calo conse nacisuka naconaika. Amatenti yandi mpulikilwefye nayonaika, ne nsalu shayako ishakucingako shisantaikile kumo." 
Jeremiah4:21 Bushe ni lilali nkaleka ukulamonako uko balelwa inkondo, no kumfwako uko ipenga lilelila?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Yawe nao epakusosa ati, “Ala abantu bandi balitumpa, ine tabanjishiba nakalya. Bena bana ababulwa amano, balafilwa ukwishiba. Bacenjelafye kukucita ifyabipa, ukucita ifisuma kwena nakalya tabakwishiba.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ine ne Yeremia naliloleshe pa calo, naco califye icimfulumfulu umwabula nelyo cimo, napunamina mu mulu, namo temwakumoneka no lubuuto nakalya." 
Jeremiah4:24 Nalolesha impili, namona shiletenta, utupili nato namona tulepungailafye." 
Jeremiah4:25 Nalolesha namona ukuti takuli bantu, ne fyuni fyonse mu mulu nafipupuka nafiya." 
Jeremiah4:26 Nalolesha namona ukuti icalo icibamo ifitwalo cisangwike amatololo, ne misumba iyabamo nayo ishelefye ifitantala, pantu Yawe alifulilwe apakalamba." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ifi efilesosa Yawe ati, “Icalo consefye nkaconaula no kucisha ifitantala, lelo nshakaconaule conse iyoo." 
Jeremiah4:28 Eico icalo cikaloosha, na mu mulu mukafiita fititi. Pantu ine nindala ninsosa, nshabweshe ifyo nasosele iyoo. Kabili ifyo napangile ukucita, nindala nimpanga, nshapilibule iyoo.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Ilyo bakomfwa icongo ca bantu abendela pali bakabalwe, ne cabaposa imifwi, abantu ba mu misumba yonse bakafulumuka, Bamo bakafulumukila mu mateshi, bambi bakaya nina mu fimabwe. Mu misumba yonse tamwakashale muntu takwakamoneke wakwikalamo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Bushe iwe we wafunshika, finshi ulecita? Nga cinshi ico ulefwalila insalu ishakashika cee? Nga cinshi ico ulefwalila ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya fya golide, no kulashinga penti mu menso yobe? Ala nakalya uleicushafye ukulaiwamya. Abakutemenwe nabakusuula iwe, balefwayafye umweo obe epela." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ine naumfwa inkuuta, nayo nge ya mwanakashi uukomenwe ne fumo ilyabubeli. Kanshi ni nkuuta ya mwana mwanakashi Sioni, aletusailafye pakupema. Aleikupafye no kulatila, “Nafwa ee, we bulanda nobe! Na ine nafwila mu minwe ya fipondo.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu, aleni pitaneni mu misebo ya mu musumba wenu, lolesheni kabili muimwene, mufwaye na mu mansa mwine. Nga mulesangapo umuntu umo uwacishinka kabili uufwaya icine, ninshi Yawe alebelelako aba muno Yerusalemu uluse." 
Jeremiah5:2 Nangu mulanda pakulapa amuti, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo,” nakalya, imwe mulapafye ubufi." 
Jeremiah5:3 We Yawe bushe amenso yobe tayafwaya ukumona icishinka? Walibakandile, nomba tabaumfwile ubukali, walibashonawile, nomba bena bakaana ukuleka imisango yabo. Bena balyumalele, bakaana no kulapila ifibi fyabo." 
Jeremiah5:4 Elyo ine natontonkanya nati, “Aba, bantu abashakwata cuma, na mano tabakwata. Pantu tabaishiba ifyo Yawe afwaya, tabaishiba mafunde yakwa Lesa wabo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Kanshi ine ndeya ku bantu ababatungulula, nje nande nabo, pantu bena balishiba ifyo Yawe afwaya, balishiba na mafunde yakwa Lesa wabo.” Lelo bena no mutima umo, balikaana bonse ikoli lyakulateekwa kuli Yawe, baputaula ne myando." 
Jeremiah5:6 Eico inkalamo ikafumina mu mutengo, no kwisabekata, iciswango cikafumina mu matololo, no kwisa basantaula. Elyo ne mbwili ikabelama kunse ya mishi yabo, no kusantaula abakalafumina panse, pantu bumpulamafunde bwabo nabufulisha, ne miku yakupondokela Lesa nayo naifulisha." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Kuti namubelela shani uluse? Pantu abana benu balimfumyako amano, na pakulapa balumbula imilungu imbi, iyishaba imilungu yacine cine. Ilyo nabapeela ifyakulya nabo nga baikuta, ninshi bena kuya mukucita ubupulumushi, na ku mayanda ya bacita ubupulumushi eko balongana." 
Jeremiah5:8 Baba nga bakabalwe abaina, abalunkumbwa ulukali, ababelamina abakashi ba banabo." 
Jeremiah5:9 Bushe ine teti mbakandilepo pali ifi fintu, mwa?” Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Bushe ine teti nandule pa bantu ba uyu mushobo?”" 
Jeremiah5:10 “Kabiyeni mu mabala yabo aya myangashi no kuyonaula, lelo tekuyonaula yonse nakalya. Putaulenikofye imisambo yabo, pantu aba te bantu bakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah5:11 Pantu aba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda balinsangukila.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe. 
Jeremiah5:12 Abantu balilanda ifyabufi pali Yawe. Balasosa nokuti, “Takatucite nangu cimo. Tatwakaponenwe ne shamo iyoo, tapali ububi bwa lupanga nangu icipowe icikatwishila nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah5:13 Kabili balasosa abati, “Bakasesema babafye ngo mupu, muli bena tamwaba ne shiwi nakalya, muleke nefyo balanda filebacitikila abene.”" 
Jeremiah5:14 Eico Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita alanda ukuti, “Apo bena balanda amashiwi ya ifi, kanshi ine ndi nokulenga amashiwi ayo nkalanda ukuba ngo mulilo mu kanwa kobe, elyo aba bantu bakaba nge nkuni ishakuti ukoce.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ine ndemuletela abantu ba mushobo uukafuma ukutali. Umushobo umo uwamaka, kabili uwakale nakale. Abantu abo imwe mushingomfwa icilimi cabo, tamwakeshibe nefyo balesosa." 
Jeremiah5:16 E bantu abacenjela ukuposa imifwi pakwipaya, kabili bonsefye apo bapela ni mpalume sha bantu." 
Jeremiah5:17 Bakesa onaula ifyo mukasombola ne fyakulya fyenu fimbi. Bakesa onaula abana benu abaume na bana benu abanakashi. Bakesa onaula impaanga shenu pamo ne ŋombe shenu, bakesa onaula imyangashi yenu ne mikunyu yenu. Bakesa onaula imisumba yenu iya malinga ku lupanga, iyo imwe mwashintamo imitima.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Lelo nangu ni muli isho shine nshiku, awe nshakapwishishishe ukonaula abantu bandi iyoo." 
Jeremiah5:19 Ilyo abantu bakakwipusha abati, ‘Nga cinshi ico Yawe Lesa wesu atucitile ifi fyonse?’ Iwe ukabasukefye auti, ‘Ngefi fine imwe mwapondokela Yawe, mwalapepa ne milungu iya benafyalo muli cino calo cenu, efyo na imwe bene mukaya mukulabombela abenafyalo mu calo icishili cenu.’”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Kebe aba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo, kabilishe ku bena Yuda utile," 
Jeremiah5:21 “Kutikeni kuno mwe batumpa kabili mwe mpelwamano sha bantu. Amenso yena mwalikwata, nomba tamumona nelyo panono iyoo. Amatwi nayo mwalikwata, nomba tamumfwa nangu panono nakalya." 
Jeremiah5:22 Bushe cinshi ico imwe mushankwatila akatiina?” Ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Cinshi ico imwe mushikankila ku mwenso pa cinso candi? Ine nine nabika umucanga pakuti uleba umupaka wa bemba, nao umupaka wa pe uo bemba ashingaciluka. Bemba kuti alulumuka, nomba teti auciluke, amatamba kuti yalulunkana, nomba teti yapulemo mu mupaka iyoo." 
Jeremiah5:23 Nomba imwe mwe bantu, mwakwata imitima iyatalama kabili iya busangu. Mwalyalukila kumbi nokuya iciyeyeye." 
Jeremiah5:24 Imwe mu mitima yenu tamusosa nokuti, ‘Shi natuleba na katiina kuli Yawe Lesa wesu, uutuletela imfula pa nshita yaiko, imfula ya pa mibundo ne ya pakulekelesha, uutupeela cila mwaka inshita yonse iyakulobolwelapo ifisabo.’" 
Jeremiah5:25 Nomba imwe ifyabupulumushi fyenu efyalenga ifi fintu ukumutaluka, no bubifi bwenu ebwalenga mwilakwata ifintu ifisuma." 
Jeremiah5:26 “Pali imwe bene mwe bantu bandi epo bali ababifi, ababelama nga bantu abateya ifyakwikatilako ifyuni, kabili nga bantu abateya ifiteyo ifyakwikatilako abantu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Nga filya fine umupalu esusha ifyuni muli kasalanga wakwe, efyo na mu mayanda yabo mwaisula ifyabucenjeshi. Ecalenga ukuti babe abasambashi kabili abakankala." 
Jeremiah5:28 Ecalenga ukuti babe abaina kabili abatelela imibili. Imicitile yabo ibi ileya ilecililakofye, tabapeela bakashiwa insambu shabo, kabili balakana no kubafwako, na balanda bene tababapokololako nakalya."
