Jeremiah5:29 Bushe teti mbalimune pa mulandu wa ifi fintu? Bushe teti nandule pa bantu ababa ngoyu umushobo?” Ifi efyasosa Yawe. 
Jeremiah5:30 “Icintu icabunani, kabili icakupapusha, ecicitike muli cino calo." 
Jeremiah5:31 Bakasesema balesesemafye ifyabufi, bashimapepo nabo batungululafye ngefyo abene baletontonkanya, na bantu bandi nabo efintu batemwa. Nomba imwe mukacita shani pakulekelesha?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 Imwe mwe bena Benjamini, fulumukileni kumo ukwakupusukila! Fulumukeni ukufuma mu Yerusalemu! Lisheni ipenga mu mushi wa Tekoa, imyeni mu mushi wa Beti Akelemu uluunga ulwakwishibilako, pantu icinkunka no bonaushi ubwine bwine fyalatula ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ndi nokonaula umwana mwanakashi Sioni, uwayemba kabili umuteku," 
Jeremiah6:3 Bakacema ne mikuni yabo bakamwishilila, bakesa mushinga na matenti yabo, bonse umo umo bakesa mukulacemena pa ncende imo iyo batemwa." 
Jeremiah6:4 Bakesa tila, “Ipekanyeni kukulwisha Yerusalemu. Imeni, tiye mulwishe ilyo akasuba kali pakati ka mutwe. Awe natucelwa, pantu akasuba kaba mukuwa, ne finshingwa fyaya filelepelako." 
Jeremiah6:5 Imwe iteyanyeni. Tuyelwisha Yerusalemu ubushiku, tonaule na malinga yakwe aya mucingilila.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, “Wisheni imiti, mutuulike imina ya maloba kwilinga ukushinguluka Yerusalemu, uyu musumba ulingile ukulimunwa, pantu muli uyu musumba mwaisulafye ulufyengo." 
Jeremiah6:7 Nga filya fine mu cishima mufukauka amenshi cila nshita no kukanaleka, efyo na mu Yerusalemu namo mufukauka ifibi lyonsefye. Impasase no bonaushi efyumfwika mu musumba, amalwele ne filonda fyakwe fimonekela pa cinso candi pe." 
Jeremiah6:8 Cenjela iwe we Yerusalemu, limbi ine nkakufumyako amano, nkasangula umusumba amatololo, umushakamoneke no muntu uwakwikalamo.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Mu calo ca Israeli tamwakashale nelyo umo, cikabafye nge myangashi iyakuntaulwafye nakalya nakalya, tamwakashale muntu iyo. Ubwekeshepo ukupisha iminwe pa misambo nakabili, kwati mulimi uulesaba imyangashi iyashelemo.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Na ine epakwasukako nati, “Ni bani nalaeba no kusokako, pakuti bomfwe? Baba na matwi ayashasembululwa, balafilwa no kumfwa. Amashiwi yobe we Yawe balakaana ukuyomfwa, ifyo ubeba bafimona nge fyafyefye." 
Jeremiah6:11 Eico icipyu cakwa Yawe ciswile muli ine, nimfilwa no kushipikisha.” “Kanshi ucipongolwele pa baice balya bali mu misebo, na pali shilya mpuka shilongene isha balumendo. Abalume pamo na bakashi babo bene bakasendwa, kumo kwine na bakalamba na bakote bene." 
Jeremiah6:12 Amayanda yabo yakapeelwa kuli bambi, pamo pene na mabala yabo na bakashi babo bene. Pantu ine nalaswa ndimune abantu abekala muli cino calo.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah6:13 “Pantu abakalamba na banono bene, bonse bafwaishafye ukulanonkela ifyuma mu bucenjeshi. Na bakasesema bene kumo kwine na bashimapepo, bonsefye ni ncenjeshi shakantu." 
Jeremiah6:14 Bakakila abantu bandi ifilonda, kwati nalimo tacibipile, balabeba abati, ‘Ala fyonse filifye bwino,’ ilyo fyonse tafili bwino." 
Jeremiah6:15 Bushe baleumfwa insoni, ilyo balecita ifi fintu ifyabunani ifyo ine napatisha? Tenakalyafye, insoni shena ashibalya, kabili bena tabaishiba na kubweshako pa menso nakalya. Kanshi na bena bakawa, nga filya fine bambi bawa, ilyo ine nkabakanda, awe ninshi e milobele baloba.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah6:16 Ifi efyo Yawe alesosa ati, “Keminineni pa masansa, mulolekeshe, mwipushe ukwabela imisebo yakale nakale, mwipushepo umusebo umo uwacila yonse ku busuma. Elyo uyo wine musebo, eo imwe muleendamo, ninshi lyena mwakulaikalila ku matwi tondolo.” Abantu nabo baasuka abati, “Awe ifwe tatwakulaendamo nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Elyo Yawe abeba ati, “Kanshi ine nalasonta bamalonda abakumupandako imwe amano, muleumfwa nga balalisha ipenga.” Lelo bena batila, “Ala ifwe tatwakulaumfwako nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Kanshi Yawe nao epakusosa ati, “Eico, kutikeni kuno imwe mwe bantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo, umfweniko mwe lukuta ifikaponena aba bantu." 
Jeremiah6:19 Umfweni mwe ba pano isonde bonse, ine nalaletela aba bantu icinkunka, naco icakuiletelelafye abene, pantu ifyo ine ndebeba, bena tabafibikako amano iyoo, na mafunde yandi nayo yene baliyasuula." 
Jeremiah6:20 Nga bulya ububani fulankinisenshi bafumya ku Sheba bwanshi kuli ine? Nangu filya fintu finunka ubusaka, ififuma ku fyalo fya kutali fyanshi? Nomba ine nshalepokelela amalambo yabo ayakoca, pantu amalambo yabo ine tayansansamusha nakalya." 
Jeremiah6:21 Eico kanshi ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, moneni, nalabika ifyakuipununako pantanshi ya aba bantu. Bashibo na bana babo abaume bakaipununako, bacibusa babo pamo pene na bena mupalamano bakaloba.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Ifi efyasosa Yawe, “Moneni! Umulongo wa bashilika uli mukwisa, uletula ku calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso, umushobo uukalamba uupekanishiwe ukufuma ku ncende shakutali." 
Jeremiah6:23 Balya baleisa nabaipangasha amata na mafumo yabo, ala bantu abakali, no luse nalo tabakwata nakalya. Ilyo baleenda pali bakabalwe babo, inshindo shabo shumfwika kwati ni bemba euleluluma. Baleisa nge fita mu milongo ya bulwi, kukulwisha iwe, we Mwana mwanakashi wa Sioni.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Abena Yerusalemu nabo epakwasuka abati, “Ala nefwe bene natuyumfwila umulandu, na mu maboko yesu namupomponteka, tuli abasakamana nganshi, tulifye ngo mwanakashi uukomenwe fumo." 
Jeremiah6:25 Tuletiina no kulafumina mu mpanga, nangufye ukulaendauka mu misebo, pantu abalwani nabapikila impanga, ne cintiinya cilifye mpanga yonse.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 “Imwe mwe bantu bandi, fwaleni insalu shabulanda, mulealangana na mu mito pakulanga ubulanda. Pumenipo imisowa, no kuloosha, nga filya fine muloosha umwana mwaume uwafyalwafye umo mpo, pantu umonaushi aleisa mupumikishafye." 
Jeremiah6:27 “Niwe nabika ukuba uwakwesha abantu bandi, pakuti wishibe inshila shabo ne myendele yabo." 
Jeremiah6:28 Bonse bene basangu abaumalala nganshi, kabili bendafye no bukwakwa. Bakosa ndii ngo mukuba, nangufye nge cela, bonsefye apo bapela, awe bantu abaonaika." 
Jeremiah6:29 Nangu bengafukuta umuuba shani pakuti incelo ikabishe, lelo umutofwe tawenguluka nakalya. Umutofwe ulakanininafye ukwengulula, ngefyo ifibi fikaana ukufuma mu bantu bandi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Abantu bandi bene bakulaitwa silifa iyasuulwako, pantu ine ne Yawe nimbasuulako.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah7:2 “Keminine pa mpongolo ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe, uye mukulabila imbila yakwe auti, ‘Umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Yawe imwe mwe bena Yuda bonse, mwe bengilila pali ino mpongolo pakuya kukupepa Yawe.’" 
Jeremiah7:3 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli aletila ati, ‘Imwe wamyeni imyendele yenu ne micitile yenu, lyena ninshi na ine nakulaleka muleikalilila muli ino ncende." 
Jeremiah7:4 Lekeni ukulasumina amashiwi yabufi ayakutila, “Lino Litempele lyakwa Yawe, lino Litempele lyakwa Yawe, ala lino Litempele lyakwa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah7:5 “‘Pantu nga mwawamya imyendele yenu ne micitile yenu, kabili mwaleka ukulafyenga abanenu," 
Jeremiah7:6 mwaleka no kulafyenga abenafyalo, na bakashiwa, na bamukamfwilwa, mwaleka no kulaipaya abakaele muli ino ncende, mwaleka no kulapepa imilungu, pantu uyo musango imwe ukamuletelela." 
Jeremiah7:7 Nga mwafileka, ninshi ine nakulaleka muleikalilila muli cino calo, ico ine napeele ifikolwe fyenu pakuti emo bakaleikala pe na pe." 
Jeremiah7:8 “‘Mwamona, imwe mucetekelafye mu mashiwi ayabufi kabili ayafye." 
Jeremiah7:9 Bushe kuti mwatala mwaiba, mwaipaya abantu, mwacita ubupulumushi, mwalapa ubufi, mwafutumwina Baali ububani, kabili mwapepa ne milungu iyo mushaishiba nefyo yaba." 
Jeremiah7:10 Elyo mwaisa iminina pa cinso candi muli ino ŋanda yandi, iyainikwa peshina lyandi, mwalati nokuti, “Nomba twapusuka,” elyo kabinge mwaya konkanyapo ukulacita ifyabunani ifi fyonse ifyo napata." 
Jeremiah7:11 Bushe imwe mutila ino ŋanda yandi iyapeelwa ishina lyandi yakubelamamo abapupu, batini? Ala ine ndaimwena ifyo imwe mucita.’ Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah7:12 “Muletala mwaya ku musumba wa Shilo, kuli ilya ncende nabalilepo ukusala ukuti epo abantu bandi balempepela, pakuti mwaya imwena mwe bene ifyo ine nacitilepo pa bubi bwa bantu bandi abena Israeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Imwe mulacita ifi fibi fyonse ifyo ine numbwile. Nangu ine ndamusokako libili libili, awe imwe mulakaana ukumfwa, mulakaaninapo no kunjasuka nga ndemwita. Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah7:14 Kanshi nomba ino ŋanda yandi iyo imwe mwashintamo imitima, ine nkaicita fimo fine nga filya nacitile ku Shilo. Muli ino ncende iyo ine namupeela imwe, iyo napeele na bashinwe bene." 
Jeremiah7:15 Nkamutamfya pa cinso candi, nga filya fine nacitile na bamunyinenwe bonse aba mu luko lwakwa Efulemu.”" 
Jeremiah7:16 “Iwe Yeremia, ala wilapapatilako aba bantu. Wilabalililako, nangu ukulabapepelako iyoo, wilabapapatilako uko ndi, pantu ine nshakulakumfwa." 
Jeremiah7:17 Bushe iwe taulemona ifintu balecita mu misumba ya muli cino calo ca Yuda, na mu misebo ya mu Yerusalemu?" 
Jeremiah7:18 Abaice ebaleteba inkuni, abaume ebalekosha umulilo, abanakashi nabo ebalekasa umufuba uwakupangila umulungu imikate, ako abene beta abati, e namfumu wa mu mulu. Kabili aba bantu ebatuula ne milungu imbi umutuulo wa fyakunwa, pakunkalifyafye umutima." 
Jeremiah7:19 Elyo bushe kwena nine bakalifya umutima?” Ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Bailetelelafye abene no kuisebanya.” 
Jeremiah7:20 Eico ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Nkalacita icipyu candi no bukali bwandi pali ino ncende. Abantu kumo kwine ne nama, imiti ya ku mabala kumo kwine ne fisabo fya ku mushili, ala fikabilima ku mulilo, no wakuushimya takwakabe.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, asosa ati, “Mulelyafye amalambo yenu ayakoca pamo na malambo yambi, mulelya inama mwe bene." 
Jeremiah7:22 Pantu ilyo ine nafumishe ifikolwe fyenu mu calo ca Egupto, nshafipeele cebo palwa malambo ayakoca, na palwa malambo yambi yene." 
Jeremiah7:23 Lelo nalibapeele ici cipope icakumbeela, pakuti ine ndeba Lesa wabo, nabo baleba abantu abandifye. Kabili bashinwe ine nalibebele ukulaenda mu mibeele iyo ine nabakonkomeshe, epakuti ifintu fileba bwino uko bali." 
Jeremiah7:24 Nomba bena tebakumbeela nakalya, kabili tebakuposako na mano iyoo. Bena kutalamafye, no kulakonkelela ifya lunkumbwa lwa mitima yabo iyibi, kanshi epakulaya balebipilakofye." 
Jeremiah7:25 Ukufumafye pa bushiku ubo bashinwe bafuminepo mu Egupto ukushinta na pali buno bushiku, ine nabikapofye ukulatuma ababomfi bandi bakasesema." 
Jeremiah7:26 Lelo tamwaumfwile kuli ine nangu ukuposako amano nakalya. Imwe mwakosafye ndii, mwalicila na pa fikolwe fyenu kukubifya." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Kanshi iwe ukabebe aya mashiwi yonse, lelo tabakomfwe iyoo. Ukabete, nomba awe tabakakwasuke iyoo." 
Jeremiah7:28 Eico, iwe ukabebe auti, ‘Umushobo wenu imwe walikaana ukulabeela Yawe Lesa wenu, kabili walikaana ukuti Yawe aleulungika. Imwe icishinka calipwa. Mwalileka no kucilandapo.’" 
Jeremiah7:29 “Akuloosheni imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu, beyeni imishishi, no kuiposa muipose pakulanga ubulanda. Kembileni pa mpili apashaba kantu ulwimbo lwandoosha, pantu ine ne Yawe Lesa nindala nimbakaana kabili ninsuulako kuli aba bantu ba iyi nkulo, pantu icipyu candi cili pali bena." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Pantu abena Yuda nabacita icintu icibi. Utulubi twabo uto ine napatisha, bena etuntu babikile mu ŋanda iyitwa peshina lyandi, no kuikowesha nabaikowesha.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah7:31 “Mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu nabakuulamo ubulambo ubo baleita Tofeti, epakuti epo baleocela abana babo abaume na banakashi pakubaleka ilambo. Tene nabakonkomeshe ukulacita ifi, awe, kabili na ku mano yandi ine tacabako nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah7:32 Ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Eico cenjeleni pantu inshita imo ikafika ilyo cikapwa icakulumbula ishina lya Tofeti, nangu ilya mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu. Ulya mupokapoka ukalaitwa Umupokapoka Wakwipailamo, pantu mu mupokapoka umwaba Tofeti bakashiikamo abantu icakuti ne ncende ikacepe." 
Jeremiah7:33 Ifitumbi fya bantu fikaba e cakulya ca fyuni neca finama fyampanga, no wakufitamfyapo takamoneke nakalya." 
Jeremiah7:34 Mu misumba ya muno calo ca Yuda na mu misebo ine iya mu Yerusalemu, ine nshakaleke mukaleumfwika nakabili utupundu twansansa, nangufye amashiwi ya bashibwinga naya banabwinga. Icalo cikasanguka amatololo.”" 
Jeremiah8:1 “Pali iyo nshita amafupa ya bashamfumu, na ya bacilolo ba mu calo ca Yuda, kumo kwine na ya bashimapepo, na ya bakasesema, na ya bena Yerusalemu bambi bene, yakashulwa mu nindi shabo.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah8:2 “Ayo mafupa bakayashafye insansalila pa kasuba, mu mweshi, na mu lubuuto lwa ntanda shonse isha mu mulu, pantu efintu bena batemenwe, efyo balebombela, efyo balepandako amano, no kupepa efyo balepepa. Amafupa yabo tabakayalonganye pamo no kuyashiika iyoo, yakashalafye ifyo fine pa mushili nga citindi." 
Jeremiah8:3 Na bantu bambi bonse aba iyi nkulo iyabipa, abakashala abaleikala uko ine nkabasalanganya, bakalafwaishapo ukufwa ukucila ukwikala no mweo.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah8:4 “Iwe Yeremia, ubebe ukuti, ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, ‘Umuntu nga awa, bushe teti eme? Umuntu nga aluba, bushe teti abweluluke?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Nga cinshi ico imwe mwe bantu bandi mupumbile inshila? Mulandu nshi imwe mwanjalukila ukwabula ukubweluluka? Imwe mwakonenafye ku bufi bwenu, mwalikaana no kubwelela kuli ine." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ine ndakutikisha nganshi, nomba imwe tamulanda ifyacishinka iyoo. Tapali nelyo umo uulapila ububi bwakwe, tapali nangu umo uwipusha ati, “Bushe ine bubi nshi nacita?” Cila muntu alolafye uko alefwaya, mucitafye nga kabalwe uulefulumbanina ukuli ubulwi." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ngefyo na kabaso wine mu lwelele alishiba inshita yakubwelelapo, ne nkoba, na kamimbi, na pupute, nafyo fine fyalishiba inshita yakubwelelapo. Nomba imwe mwe bantu bandi tamwaishiba amafunde yandi, elyo ne fipope fyandi.’" 
Jeremiah8:8 “Nga kuti mwatila shani, ‘Ifwe tuli bamano, ifwe twaba na mafunde yakwa Yawe?’ Mwamona, utulembelo twa bakalemba babufi natwalula amafunde ukuba ayabufi." 
Jeremiah8:9 Abantu abamano bakalengwa insoni, amano yabo yakapwa, ne fyakucita tabakeshibe. Apo nabasuula ishiwi lyandi, nga kanshi mano nshi bengakwata?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Kanshi ine nomba nkabuula abakashi babo, nkapeele ku baume bambi, na mabala yabo nkapeela bambi. Pantu bonsefye abakalamba na baice, balefwayafye ukulanonkela ifyuma mu bucenjeshi. Na bakasesema bene kumo kwine na bashimapepo bonse benefye ni ncenjeshi shakantu." 
Jeremiah8:11 Bakakila ifilonda fya bantu bandi, kwati nalimo tafibipile, balabeba abati, ‘Ala kuli icibote,’ ilyo ninshi takuli icibote." 
Jeremiah8:12 Bushe baleumfwa insoni ilyo balecita ifi fintu ifyabunani ifyo ine napatisha? Awe nakalya tabakwete insoni, kabili bena tabaishiba no kubweshako pa menso nakalya. Kanshi nabo bene bakawa nga filya fine bambi bawa, ilyo ine nkabakanda, ekukaba ukuloba kwabo.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah8:13 “Ine ne Yawe nkalofya bonse abantu bandi, pantu baba ngo mwangashi uushitwala fitwalo, baba ngo mukunyu uushitwala makunyu, na mabula yauko yaumina kumo. Conse ico nabapeela cikapokololwa.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Abantu bakwa Lesa nabo epakulaipushanya abati, “Nga cinshi twikalilefye? Aleni natufulumukile mu misumba ya malinga, pakuti emo tuyefwila. Yawe Lesa wesu natupingwila ukufwa, natunwensha amenshi umuli umunwena, pantu ifwe twalibifya kuli Yawe." 
Jeremiah8:15 Ifwe twalelolela ukulaikala mu cibote, nomba tapaba icisuma nangu cimo. Twalepembelela inshita yakundapilwapo, nomba kabili tulifye mu bwafya." 
Jeremiah8:16 “Natumfwa uko bakabalwe ba balwani besu balelila, baleumfwika ukufuma ku calo ca bena Dani. Baleti bakabalwe babo nga balila, awe ne calo conse calaitentelafye. Nabesa kukonaula icalo cesu, ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo, beshile kukonaula umusumba wesu, na bantu bene abaikalamo bonse.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Moneni. Ine ndemutumina insoka, nasho ishabusungu, ishishingasungulwa eshalaisa mukulamusumaula.”" 
Jeremiah8:18 Owe, ubulanda ine bwankulila, no mutima wandi naufunshika." 
Jeremiah8:19 Kutikeni ku kulila kwa bantu bandi, ukufuma ku calo icakutali. “Bushe Yawe nomba talimo mu Sioni? Bushe imfumu yakwe tailiko nomba?” “Nga nomba cinshi ico imwe mwalengela ukuti ine mfulwe, pa mulandu wa fimpashanya fya milungu yenu, na palwa tulubi twenu utwafyefye utwa benafyalo?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Abantu nabo epakukuuta abati, “Ala inshita yakulobolwelapo ifisabo yalipitingana, ulusuba nalo nalupwa, lelo ifwe tatwapusuka.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Ine cilenkalipa nganshi mu mutima, pantu abantu bandi baleculisha, ine ndeloosha, na maka nayapwa." 
Jeremiah8:22 Bushe mu calo ca Gileadi umuti walipwamo? Bushe tamwabamo shiŋanga nelyofye umo? Nga mulandu nshi abantu bandi bashundapilwe? 
Jeremiah9:1 Nga caliweme umutwe wandi, auba nge cishima ca menshi, na menso yandi ayaba nge ntulo ya filamba, pakuti abantu bandi abo bepeye nabaloosha bushiku bonse na kasuba konse." 
Jeremiah9:2 Lelo kwena ine kuti natemwishapo ukusangapo incende imo mu matololo, ukwakuti eko naya, pakuti natalukako ku bantu bandi, no kwikala eko naya ikala. Pantu bonsefye ni bacilende, libumba lya basangu." 
Jeremiah9:3 “Bena batintimuna ululimi lwabo ngo ulefona ubuta pakubepa ubufi, ubufi ebufulile ukucila icishinka mu calo. Abantu bandi babikapofye ukulabifya, bakaaninapo no kunjishiba.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah9:4 “Cila umo acenjele ku munankwe, kabili peba nelyo umo uwakucetekela munyina, pantu munyina onse acenjesha munyina, kabili bacibusa bonse balacita ulwambo pali bacibusa babo." 
Jeremiah9:5 Bonse babepanafye ubufi na banabo, tapaba nangu umo uulanda icishinka, balibelesha ukulanda ifyabufi, balibipisha, cabanshishapo no kulapila." 
Jeremiah9:6 Babikapofye ukulabepa ubufi, babikapo no kulacita ifyabucenjeshi, bakaaninapo no kunjishiba.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah9:7 Eico Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Abantu bandi ine ndebengulula ngo mukuba, kabili no kubesha ine ndebesha. Abantu bandi balibifya, nga cimbi cinshi ico ine ningabacita?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Indimi shabo shaba nge mifwi iyabulembe, tepakulanda ifyabucenjeshi. Pakulanda na banabo, pena balandafye pali bucibusa, kanshi ninshi mu nda shabo nabapekanya ifyakubasansa." 
Jeremiah9:9 Bushe ine nshabakande pa mulandu wa ifi fintu? Bushe ine nshalandule abantu ba mushobo uwaba ifi?” Ifi efyasosa Yawe. 
Jeremiah9:10 Elyo ine nasosa nati, “Awe nakulaloosha impili, no kwimba inyimbo shamalilo pa mpanga sha mulemfwe uwakucemenamo ifitekwa mu matololo, pantu mu mpili namuuma, no mulemfwe nao nauma, takuli nelyo umo uulepitamo. Iŋombe tashileumfwika ukulilamo nakalya, ifyuni nafibutukamo pamo pene ne nama shampanga.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Yawe nao epakusosa ati, “Umusumba wa Yerusalemu ine nalausangula umwina wa fitantala, ewalaba incende umwakuti bamumbwe baleikala, ne misumba ya muno mu Yuda yalasanguka amatololo, umushaleikala muntu nelyo umo.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Nani uukwetepo amano ayakutesha umo ici cintu cilolele? Nani uo Yawe alondolwelako, pakuti nao amone ukulondolwelako bambi? Nga mulandu nshi icalo caonaikila nkuma ndi kwati matololo, icakuti takuli nelyo umo uwakupitamo?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Elyo Yawe nao ayasuka ati, “Icilengele ukuti cibe ifi, nico abantu bandi balisuula amafunde yandi ayo ine nabapeela. Tabambeela iyoo, tabacita ifyo ine nabeba ukulacita." 
Jeremiah9:14 Lelo bena bakonka ukumalala kwa mitima yabo, batwalilila nokupepa imilungu ba Baali, nga mulya mwine bashibo babafundile." 
Jeremiah9:15 Eico kanshi ifi efyo nalacita ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, ine ne Lesa wakwa Israeli. Ine nalaliisha abantu bandi ifyalula, nalabanwensha na menshi umuli umunwena." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ine ndebasalanganya ukuya mu bantu ba mishobo iyo bashaishiba, iyo ne fikolwe fyabo fine fishaishibe, kabili nkabemisha inkondo pakuti nkabalofyefye nakalya nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Yawe umwine wa fita alesosa ifi ati, “Ee, iteni abanakashi abakwisa mukulaloosha, iteni abanakashi abaishiba inyimbo shamalilo.”" 
Jeremiah9:18 Abantu nabo bayasukapo abati, “Bebeni bendeshe, bese mukulatwimbila inyimbo shakuloosha, musuke na mu menso yesu mwisule ifilamba paa, na ku nkopyo shesu kuletonafye ifilamba.”" 
Jeremiah9:19 Umfweni imisowa ya bantu mu Sioni abo baleti, “Owe nefwe twaloba ee. Owe nefwe twasebana ee. Ifwe tuli nokusha icalo cesu, amayanda yesu nabayabongolola.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Elyo ine nasosa nati, “Imwe mwe banakashi, ala umfweni ifyo Yawe asosele, poseniko amano ku mashiwi yakwe. Fundeniko abana benu abanakashi umusango wakulooseshamo, fundeniko na bacibusa benu ulwimbo lwa malilo ulwakuti," 
Jeremiah9:21 imfwa itwingilile mu mawindo yesu, naingila na mu mayanda yesu ayacindama. Naipaya abaice mu misebo, naipaya na balumendo mu mansa." 
Jeremiah9:22 Ifitumbi fya bantu fyalaba ntangali ntangali, fyalaba imina mu mabala kwati ni citindi wa ŋombe, kwati ni ŋanu isho baseepele no kushisha kunuma, ukwabula no wakuti ashilonganike. Ifi efyo Yawe anjebele, pakuti na ine mwebeko imwe.”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Kabili ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Uwamano elaitakisha pa mano yakwe, uwamaka nao elaitakisha pa maka yakwe, umukankala nao elaitakisha pa fyuma fyakwe." 
Jeremiah9:24 Lelo umuntu onse uulefwaya ukulaitakisha, aleitakisha pakunjishiba ine, na pakwiluka pa fintu ifyo ine mfwaya. Pantu ine ne Yawe ndalanga ukutemwa ukushipwa mu calo, ndacitamo no mulinganya ne fintu ifyalungama. Ifi fintu efyo ine natemwa,” efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah9:25 Kabili Yawe asosa ati, “Inshita imo ikesa ilyo ine nkakanda abantu bonse abasembululwafye imibili, lelo tabasembululwa imitima nakalya." 
Jeremiah9:26 Aba bantu e bena Egupto, na bena Yuda, na bena Edomu, na bena Amoni, na bena Moabu, na balya bonse abaikala mu matololo nangu na bonse ababeya imishishi pa ntanshi ya mitwe yabo. Aba bonse pamo pene na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli bonse, awe tabasembululwa imitima.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli, umfweni amashiwi ayo Yawe alemweba." 
Jeremiah10:2 Ifi efyo Yawe alesosa ati, “Imwe mwilakonkelela imisango ya mishobo ya benafyalo. Mwilatunsha mitima nga mwalamona ifinjelengwe mu mulu, ifyo imishobo ya benafyalo yena itiina." 
Jeremiah10:3 Imibeele ya aba bantu, yafyefye. Bena batila nga baya tema icimuti cimo mu mutengo, elyo intukushi imo iyacenjela yaisa cibasa ku fibombelo fyaiko." 
Jeremiah10:4 Bacengulwilako silifa na golide, elyo bacikasha pamo ku misomali pakuti tacilepona." 
Jeremiah10:5 Utu tulubi twabafye nge fintiinya, filya babika mu mabala ya fibimbi pakutiinya ifyuni. Kabili tatulanda nakalya, batusendafye pantu tatuyendela nakalya. Kanshi imwe mwilatutiina iyoo, pantu teti tumucitepo kabi, kabili teti tumucitilepo icintu icisuma nelyo cimo.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 “We Yawe, takwaba nelyo umo uwaba nga iwe, uli wabulamba, ishina lyobe likulu kabili walipulama." 
Jeremiah10:7 Nga nani uushingakukwatila akatiina, we Kateeka wa bantu ba mishobo yonse? Niwefye calinga ukulakwatila akatiina. Pa bantu bonse abamano aba mishobo yonse, na pa shamfumu shonse ishateeka ifyalo fyonse, tapaba nelyo umo uwaba nga iwe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Bonse balitumpa, kabili fipubafye. Bushe utulubi utwakubasafye ni finshi twingabafunda?" 
Jeremiah10:9 Utulubi twabo baengulwilako silifa wa ku Tashishi, na golide wa ku Ofili. Ifi fyonse abafibomba ni ntukushifye isha bantu. Utulubi tulafwikwa insalu ishafitulukila ne shakashikila, ishipikulwa na bantufye abacenjela." 
Jeremiah10:10 Nomba Yawe ena ni Lesa wacine cine, ni Lesa Umumi, kabili ewateeka pe na pe. Ena eutila nga afulwa, ninshi ne calo calaitentelafye, abantu ba mishobo yonse balafilwa ukushanshako nga afulwa.”" 
Jeremiah10:11 Ubebe auti, “Imwe mwe bena Israeli, imilungu iyishabumbako mulu ne calo, ala ikonaulwa. Ikaleka no kulamoneka ponsefye pesonde na pesamba lya myulu.”" 
Jeremiah10:12 Ni Yawe ewabumba icalo ku makafye yakwe, ewaikasha isonde lyonse ku mano yakwe, ewaandalika umulu ku kucenjela kwakwe." 
Jeremiah10:13 Eutila nga abulukuta mukupeela icebo, awe ninshi na menshi mu mulu yalaluluma. Eufumya na makumbi ukwapelela isonde lyonse no kuyaleta. Eubyasha ne myele ya nkuba ilyo kuba imfula, eufumya no mwela umo ausungila pakuti ulepupa." 
Jeremiah10:14 Abantu bonse bawelewele, kabili tababa na mano. Bakafula wa golide bonse balomfwa insoni pa tulubi twabo, pantu fimpashanya fya milungu yabufifye, no kupema tafipema nakalya." 
Jeremiah10:15 Finangwafye, kabili imilimo yabuwelewele ala fikonaulwa ilyo Yawe akesa fikanda." 
Jeremiah10:16 Lesa uwaba icakaniko cakwa Yakobo ena taba ifi iyoo, ena ewabumba ifintu fyonse, ewasala na bena Israeli pakuti baleba umushobo uo aisalila umwine. Ne shina lyakwe ni Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah10:17 Imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu, mwe bashingulukwa ku balwani, aleni akukakeni ifipe fyenu mufume mu calo." 
Jeremiah10:18 Pantu ndemusukusa kumbi, ndemufumya muli cino calo, ndemuletela ishamo iline line, kanshi epakuti bakamwikate. Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah10:19 Yangu nalishama pa mulandu wakuicena. Icilonda candi naco tacilefwaya ukupola. Awe ine natilefye bucushi bwandi Mfwile ukushipikisha. 
Jeremiah10:20 Itenti lyandi nalyonaika, ifimyando fyakulimikilako nafyo nafiputaika. Abana bandi abaume nabafumapo, nabayafye bonse tabakabwele. Tapashele nangufye umo uwakwimika nakabili itenti lyandi, tapali nelyo umo uwakukobeka ifisalu fyaliko." 
Jeremiah10:21 “Bakacema balitumpa, bena tabepusha na kuli Yawe. Napali ici tabakwata ne shuko, e mulandu wine umukuni wabo naupashika." 
Jeremiah10:22 Umfweni. Umulandu uyo uwaumfwika. Abantu ba mushobo wa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, abo balebolokota nganshi ifita fyabo fyalaisa sansa imisumba ya muno mu Yuda. Nayo yalaisa shalafye amatololo, yalaisa bafye incende umwakuti bamumbwe emo baleikala.”" 
Jeremiah10:23 “We Yawe nalishiba ukuti takwaba muntunse nelyo umo uuisalila umwine umusango wakwikalilamo, no uleenda apingula umwine ukwakulosha intampulo shakwe." 
Jeremiah10:24 We Yawe, unsalapule, lelo ubomfye uluse lobe. Winsalapula ilyo ukalipe, pantu lyena ninshi kuti naonaika." 
Jeremiah10:25 Ulete icipyu cobe pa bantu ba mishobo yonse abashakusumina, na pa bantu abashacindika ishina lyobe, Aba bantu ebatwipaulwile ifwe fwe bamwana Yakobo, ebatulofeshefye nakalya nakalya, ebonawile ne calo cesu.”" 
Jeremiah11:1 Aya e mashiwi ayafumine kuli Yawe ayo aebele Yeremia ati," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Umfwa kuno amashiwi ya ici cipangano. Webe abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu 
Jeremiah11:3 ukuti ifi efyalanda Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli aletila, ‘Abe uwatipwa umuntufye onse ushibeela amashiwi ya ici cipangano.’" 
Jeremiah11:4 Icipangano cimo cinefye ico napangene ne fikolwe fyenu, ilyo nabafumishe mu calo ca Egupto icali kwati lilungu lya mulilo umo ifikolwe fyenu fyalecula. Ine nalibebele ukulabeela na mashiwi yandi, no kulacita fyonse ifyo nabakonkomeshe, ukuti nga balambeela, ninshi bakaba abantu abandifye, na ine ninshi nkaba Lesa uwabo." 
Jeremiah11:5 Kanshi ine epakufikilisha icilayo ico nalaile ifikolwe fyabo, icakubapeela icalo icikankala icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci, ico bekalamo pali nomba.” Na ine ne Yeremia nayasuka nati, “Ameni, we Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Elyo Yawe kabili anjeba ati, “Kabiye mu misumba ya muno calo ca Yuda, uye na mu misebo ya mu Yerusalemu. Kabilemo imbila yandi, webe abantu ukumfwikisha bwino amashiwi ya ici cipangano, kabili ubebe no kulayakonka." 
Jeremiah11:7 Pantu ilyo ine nafumishe ifikolwe fyabo mu calo ca Egupto, nalibasokele nganshi palwa kubeela amashiwi yandi, ukushinta na lelo ine nabikapofye ukusoka aba abantu." 
Jeremiah11:8 Lelo bena tebakumfwa nangu ukubikako amano nakalya. Bonsefye babikapofye ukumalala imitima no kubifya lyonse. Ine nalibakonkomeshe ukulabeela icipangano, nomba bena balikaana. Kanshi na ine eico mbaletele amashamo yonse ayalembwa mu cipangano.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Elyo Yawe kabili anjeba ati, “Abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu nabansangukila." 
Jeremiah11:10 Nababwelela ku fya bubifi bwa fikolwe fyabo, abakene ukumfwa amashiwi yandi, balekonka nokubombela imilungu imbi. Aba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda balyonaula icipangano ico ine napangene ne fikolwe fyabo." 
Jeremiah11:11 Kanshi nomba ine ne Yawe ndesosa ukuti ndebaletela ifinkunka ifyo bashakafumemo. Bakulati nga bakuuta mutuule, awe na ine nshakulaumfwa nakalya." 
Jeremiah11:12 Elyo abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu bakulaya mukulilila ku milungu iyo bafutumwina ububani. Nomba ilya milungu yakulafilwa ukubapusushako ilyo ifi finkunka filebafikila. 
Jeremiah11:13 Imilungu iyo imwe mwe bena Yuda mwaba nayo, yalinganafye ne misumba yenu ku bwingi. Ne fibumbili ifyansoni ifyo mufutumwinapo Baali ububani ifyo mwakuula, nafyo ku bwingi fyalinganafye ne misebo ya mu Yerusalemu mwine." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Kanshi iwe Yeremia wiesha kupapatilako abo bantu, wiesha ukubalombelako icili conse, pantu nshakulabomfwa ilyo bakulakuuta mu nshita ya kucululuka kwabo.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 Kabili Yawe asosa ati, “Finshi abantu abo ine natemwa, balecita mu ŋanda yandi, ilyo nabobelwa mukucita ifyabipa fyeka fyeka? Bushe baletontonkanya ukuti ukulaya ifilayo no kulatuula amalambo ya nama efingabapusushako ku busanso? Bushe e musango bengapusukilamo, mwa?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Kale ine ne Yawe nalebeta umuti wa muolifa uwalelema amabula, uwakompa ku fitwalo ifisuma, nomba lino lyena ndelepuka nge nkuba, ndeoca amabuula yauko, nkontaule ne misambo ine iyauko." 
Jeremiah11:17 “Ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita ne walimbile aba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda, nomba lino lyena nimpanga ukubasansa. Abene ebailetelele ishamo pa bubi bwabo, ebalengele ukuti ine mfulwe pantu bafutumwina Baali ububani.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Yawe alinsokolwelele amapange yabo, na ine naishiba, anangilila ne fyabipa ifyo balecita" 
Jeremiah11:19 Lelo ine nanakililefye nga kana ka mpaanga ako baletwala kukwipaya, no kwishiba ine nshaishibe ukuti nine balepangila ukucitapo cimo. Balesosa abati, “Mwe aleni natonaule umuti wa fitwalo, tumubungule ngo muti no kumufumya mu calo ca bomi, natumunukule pakuti pekaba nelyo umo uwakuti akalemwibukishako.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 We Yawe umwine wa fita, we ulalinganya pakuputula imilandu, we ulengula umutima na matontonkanyo Leka ine moneko uko ulelandula aba bantu, pantu niwe natuulako umulandu wandi." 
Jeremiah11:21 Eico ifi efyasosa Yawe ku baume ba mu mushi wa Anatoti, abalefwaya ukwipaya Yeremia, balimwebele abati, “Ifwe tulekwipaya ne minwe yesu, nga ulekonkanyapo ukulasesema mwishina lyakwa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Kanshi Yawe umwine wa fita nao epakubalandapo ati, “Ine nkabakanda. Abalumendo babo bakafwa ku nkondo, abana babo abaume na banakashi bakafwa ku cipowe." 
Jeremiah11:23 Ine ndi nokuponesha ububi pa baume ba mu Anatoti pa nshita yakukandwa kwabo, awe tapakabe nelyo umo uukapusukapo.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 We Yawe, iwe lyonse uli mulungami nga naleta umulandu kuli iwe, nomba ine ndi ne cipusho cimo palwa mulinganya. Bushe kwena cinshi ico abantu ababi bakwatila ishuko? Mulandu nshi incenjeshi sha bantu shikalila ku matwi tondolo?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Iwe niwe ubalimba nge miti, nabo bamena imishila, balakula, basuka balatwala ne fitwalo. Ukulanda lyonse balanda pali iwe, nomba waba ukutali ne mitima yabo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Nomba ine we Yawe, walinjishiba, ulamona nefyo ine ncita, walishiba nefyo ine nakutemwa. Lelo aba bantu ubatintanye nge mpaanga isho baletwala kukwipaya, ubapatulule, isuke ne nshita yakubepailapo ifike." 
Jeremiah12:4 Bushe icalo cikafika lilali mukuloosha, no kuma kwa fyani mu mabala yonse? Pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa baikalamo, inama shilefwa, ne fyuni nafyo filefwila kumo, pantu bena basosa ukuti ena takeshibe ifyo tucita." 
Jeremiah12:5 “Nga iwe Yeremia, ilyo ulebutuka na benda panshi, nabo bakulenga ukunaka, nga kuti wacimfya shani bakabalwe? Nga cakuti ulawa mu calo icatambalala, nga nomba cikaba shani ilyo ukaba mu mishitu ya Yordani?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ala na bamunonko bene, aba mu lupwa lobefye, nabo nabakwalukila, bali pamo nabalekulwisha. Kanshi iwe wilabacetekela, nangulafye bengalalanda amashiwi ayasuma kuli iwe.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 “Ine nomba nimfumyako amano ku bantu bandi, ine ninsuulako ku bantu ba mushobo uo ne mwine naisalile. Abantu abo ine natemwa, nimbaposa nomba ku balwani babo." 
Jeremiah12:8 Abantu bandi abo ne mwine naisalila bali nge nkalamo mu mpanga, no kumbulumina bukali bukali, kanshi na ine epakubapata." 
Jeremiah12:9 Bushe te bantu bandi abo ne mwine naisalila, ebali nge kubi ilyo bashingulwike ku fyuni ifiswango? ‘Aleni iseni imwe mwe finama ifya mpanga fyonse, longaneni muipakisheko amaliila.’" 
Jeremiah12:10 Bakacema abengi nabonaula ibala lyandi ilya myangashi, nabanyantaula amabala yandi, icalo candi icawamisha nabacisangula amatololo." 
Jeremiah12:11 Nabacisangula amatololo, na ine ndetambafye ifyo conaike. Icalo conse cisangwike amatololo aya cililishi, no wakusakamanako takuli." 
Jeremiah12:12 Mu milundu yonse iya mu matololo abakonaula nabafika, beshile kukutapa cino calo. Pantu ulupanga lwakwa Yawe luleonaula, tamuli nangu umo uwakuti aiikalile ku matwi tondolo." 
Jeremiah12:13 Abantu bandi bakulatanda iŋanu, nomba myungafye eyo bakulaseepamo, bakulabombesha pa maka, nomba kulaicushafye. Ifisabo fyabo fyakulabaletele nsoni, pa mulandu wa cipyu candi icikali.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Kuli bonse bantu ababi abapalamana na bena Israeli, abo abonaula icalo ico ne mwine napeela abantu bandi abena Israeli, abo bantu ine nkabafumyamo mu fyalo fyabo, bakaba ngo muti uo banukula, nkafumyamo aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda." 
Jeremiah12:15 Abena mupalamano babo ilyo ine nkabatwala kumbi, elyo nkababelelako uluse. Imishobo ya bantu yonse umo umo ine nkaibwesesha mu fifulo ifya mu fyalo fyaiko." 
Jeremiah12:16 Abo bantu nga basekelela ipepo lya bantu bandi, no kulapa nga balalapa abati, ‘Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe uwamweo,’ baleka no kulalapa Baali nga filya fine bafundileko na bantu bandi, ninshi lyena nabo bene bakapeelwa icifulo cimo pamo na bantu bandi." 
Jeremiah12:17 Lelofye abantu ba mushobo umo nga tabakalembeela, awe lyena ninshi nkabafumyamo mu cifulo cabo, no kubalofya nkabalofya.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah13:1 Ifi efyo anjebele Yawe ine ne Yeremia ati, “Kashitepo insalu iyabusaka kabili iyatelela, eyo ukake mu musana, nomba wiesha kuitumpa mu menshi.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Awe na ine nayashita insalu, ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe ankonkomeshe, nakaka na mu musana." 
Jeremiah13:3 Elyo kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine umuku wacibili aliti," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Senda insalu ushitile iyo ufwele, uye ku mumana wa Yufurate uye uifise mu mulale wa cilibwe.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Kanshi na ine epakuya ifisa ku Yufurate, ngefyo Yawe umwine ankonkomeshe." 
Jeremiah13:6 Ilyo papitile inshiku ishingi elyo Yawe anjeba ukubwelela ku Yufurate, kukuya buula ilya nsalu anjebele ukuya fisa." 
Jeremiah13:7 Kanshi na ine epakuya ku Yufurate. Nalafwaya apo nafishile insalu, awe naisanga. Kuti nati ndoleshe, awe namonafye yalyonaika, teyakufwala nakabili iyoo." 
Jeremiah13:8 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Ifi fine efyo ine nkapwisha abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu icilumba cabo icishaikulila. Ifi efyasosa Yawe. 
Jeremiah13:10 Aba bantu babi abakaana ukulabeela amashiwi yandi, abaumalala imitima, abakoselelafye ukulabifya, abapepa imilungu imbi imbi, no kubombela eyo babombela, nabo bene bakaba nga iyi ine insalu iyo umuntu ashingafwala nakabili." 
Jeremiah13:11 Pantu ngefi fine umushipi wakukaka mu musana wa muntu wikata ku mubili, efyo na ine wine mfwaya ukuti aba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli bonse na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda bonse balenjikatisha. Epakuti baleba abantu abandifye, abakulanumbanya no kulancindika, lelo abantu bandi bena tebakumfwa iyoo." 
Jeremiah13:12 “Iwe Yeremia, eba abena Israeli ukuti, Ifi efyasosa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli ati, ‘Mu mitondo yonse besushemo umwangashi.’ Nabo nga bakwasuka abati, ‘Ala twalishiba ukuti mu mitondo yonse tuli nokwisushamo umwangashi.’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Elyo nobe ubebe ukuti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, ine ne Yawe nkanwensha abantu ba muli cino calo umwangashi, mpakafye bakakolwe, emukuti abo nkanwensha ni bashamfumu bamwana Davidi, na bashimapepo, na bakasesema, na bena Yerusalemu bonse." 
Jeremiah13:14 Elyo ine nkabuula bashibo na bana babo nkalebapamanya nge mitondo. Ifi efyasosa Yawe. Ine nshakabalangulukileko, nshakomfwe no bulanda nangufye uluse nakalya, mpaka nkabalofye.’”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Imwe mwe bena Israeli, lekeni icilumba. Muleumfwa bwino no kubikako amano, pantu ni Yawe Lesa eulelanda." 
Jeremiah13:16 Akucindikeni Yawe Lesa wenu, ilyo ashilati alete imfifi, ilyo imwe mushilati muipunune ku mabwe ya mu mpili icungulo bushiku. Pantu ulubuuto ulo imwe mulolela, akalusangula imfifi iyafiitisha fititi kabili iyakutiinya." 
Jeremiah13:17 Nomba nga tamwaumfwe, ninshi nakulalilila mu bumfisolo pa mulandu wa cilumba cenu. Na menso yandi yakulaloosha no kukwitulula ifilamba, pantu bakasenda umukuni wakwa Yawe muli bunkole." 
Jeremiah13:18 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati, “Kebe imfumu iyateeka cino calo, webe na nyina wakwa namfumu, ukuti bafume pa fipuna fyabo ifyabufumu, pantu ifisote fyabo ifyayemba ifyabufumu, fili nokufulika ku mitwe yabo." 
Jeremiah13:19 Imisumba ya mu matololo ya Negebu nabaisalako, takuli no wakuti apeke pakuyamo. Abena Yuda bonse nababasenda muli bunkole, bonsefye nababasenda.”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu, sansuleni amenso mumone. Abalwani benu balya baletula ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Ngo mukuni obe ulya wapeelwe ukusunga, uli kwi? Umukuni wa mpaanga ishisuma isho mwalecankilwamo." 
Jeremiah13:21 Bushe mukatilapo shani ilyo bakamwalukila ku bantu abo mwaletontonkanya ukuti e bacibusa benu, pakuti ebo nomba bakalemuteeka? Ala mukalaumfwa ubukali, nga bulya bwine bumfwa umwanakashi uwakomwa ne fumo." 
Jeremiah13:22 Nga mukalaipusha mwe bene amuti, “Cinshi calenga ukuti ili shamo lituponene?” Ala ni pa mulandufye wa bulungani bwenu ubushaibipila. Ecalenga ukuti insalu shesu bashilepaule pakutufuula, no kucusha imibili yesu." 
Jeremiah13:23 Bushe umwina Kushi kuti ayalula inkanda yakwe? Nangu bushe imbwili kuti yayalula amabala yaiko? Nemwe bene teti mucite icisuma, mwalibelela ukulacita ifyabipa." 
Jeremiah13:24 Yawe asosa ati, “Ala, nkamululula nge misungu, mukolululwa no mwela uukatula mu matololo." 
Jeremiah13:25 Ishamo likamuponena imwe, nge cakaniko ico namulingila, pantu imwe mwalimfumyako amano, mucetekelafye imilungu iyabufi." 
Jeremiah13:26 Ine ne Yawe nkamufula imwe ifyakufwala, no kuleka mukomfwe insoni." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndamonako uko imwe mucita ifintu ifyabunani. Mu tupili na mu mabala, emo imwe mukonkelela imilungu, nga filya ficita umwaume uulekumbwa muka munankwe, nga filya fine ficita sawe uulebobwela. Mukacimona imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu mwe bakowela, bushe ni lilali mukasanguluka?”" 
Jeremiah14:1 Ili e shiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyaishile kuli Yeremia pa mulandu wa cilala ilyakuti," 
Jeremiah14:2 “Icalo ca Yuda cili mu malilo, mu misumba yaciko muli nkumbabulili, abantu baciko balealanganafye panshi kulwa kucula, na mu Yerusalemu mwine muli inkuuta ishabulanda." 
Jeremiah14:3 Abakankala baletuma ababomfi babo kukuya batapilako amenshi, nabo baleti nga baya ku fishima basanga mu fishima tamuli menshi, kanshi nabo balebwelako ne mitondofye yeka umwabula amenshi. Nacibaponya na pa misao, na mano nayapela, bafwelefye imipango." 
Jeremiah14:4 Umushili naulatauka imilale pantu takuli mfula mu calo. Abalimi baikatwe nsoni, bafimba na ku mitwe." 
Jeremiah14:5 Mu mpanga namo insebula naisha akana ako ifyele, pantu tamuli mulemfwe." 
Jeremiah14:6 Bapunda ba mpanga nabo balungemefye ku mpili, baleasasafye nga bamumbwe, na mu menso namufonka, pantu tabalemona fyakulya.”" 
Jeremiah14:7 Elyo nasosa nati, “Nangu ifibi fyesu filetushinina, lelo utupokololekofye we Yawe pa mulandu we shina lyobe. Ifwe tulakusangukila ilingi, ala twalikubifya." 
Jeremiah14:8 Iwe niwefye tusubila ifwe fwe bena Israeli, niwefye utupusushako ilyo twacula. Nga iwe kuti waba shani ngo mulebeshi muli cino calo cesu, ngo mulendo uuletubilishamo pa bushiku bumo?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Nga cinshi ico ubelele ngo muntu uo bapumikishafye, ngo mushilika uushikwete maka yakupusushako abantu? Nga ifyo iwe we Yawe waba pakati kesu, kabili batwitila kwishina lyobe, ala witulekelesha.”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Yawe nao epakulandapo pali aba bantu ati, “Aba bantu balitemwisha ukumbutuka, baya mukululumbafye uko abene balefwaya. E mulandu wine na ine wine mbafumisheko amano. Nakulaibukisha ubulungani bwabo, no kubalimuna nine nkabalimuna pa mulandu wa kubifya kwabo.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Elyo kabili Yawe anjeba ne Yeremia ati, “Iwe tecakwesha kulampapata pakuti ntulanyeko aba bantu." 
Jeremiah14:12 Nangufye balekelepo ukulya, ine nshaumfwe inkuuta shabo, nshaposeko na mano, nangufye bantuule amalambo ayakoca ayasuma, ne mituulo imbi iya cabunga. Ine kubepayafye ku nkondo, na ku cipowe, na ku cikuko.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Elintu na ine ne Yeremia nasosa nati, “We mfumu Yawe, nawishiba ukuti bakasesema baleeba abantu ukuti takwakabe nkondo nangufye icipowe nakalya, pantu baleti iwe walilaya abantu ukuti bakulaikalilafye mu cibote muli cino calo.”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Yawe ena pakunjasuka asosa ati, “Bakasesema bufifye balebepa pakusosa ukuti nine mbebele ifyakulanda. Tene nabatuma, tene nabapeela icebo, nangufye ine ukulanda nabo, awe. Ifimonwa ifyo bena babeba tekuli ine fyatula iyoo, fyabuwelewelefye ifyo balesobela, fintufye ifyo abene belenganya mu mano yabo." 
Jeremiah14:15 Ine ne Yawe ndekwebelapo ifyo ine nalaswa ncite kuli abo bakasesema abasesema mwishina lyandi, nelyo ine nshabatuma, abalanda nokuti tamwakabe nkondo, nangufye icipowe nakalya muli cino calo. Ala ine nkepaya aba bene bakasesema ku nkondo na ku cipowe." 
Jeremiah14:16 Na bantu bene abo bakasesema baebako ifi fintu, nabo bene bakafwa ku nkondo na ku cipowe. Ifitumbi fyabo fikaposwa ntangali ntangali mu misebo ya mu Yerusalemu, takwakamoneke na wakufishiika, nangu abakashi babo na bana babo abaume na bana babo abanakashi. Ee, ine nkabacitapo cimo pa bubifi bwabo." 
Jeremiah14:17 “Iwe Yeremia, landa aya mashiwi ku bantu ayakuti, ‘Amenso yandi yaletibinta ifilamba ubwaca no bwaila, awe ekoko kampelefye ndeloosha, pantu umwana wandi nacisungu, ekutila abantu bandi, nabaponenwa ne shamo iline line, bapaminwe icabipisha nganshi." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ndeti nga naya mu mpanga, ndesangamofye ifitumbi fya bantu abo bepeye mu nkondo. Conse nga naya mu musumba, namo ndesangamofye abantu abaleshikila kulwa cipowe. Bakasesema na bashimapepo kwena balebomba umulimo wabo, nomba tabeshibe icalo ico balebombelamo.’”" 
Jeremiah14:19 We Yawe Lesa, bushe nacipwa naukanininafye abena Yuda? Bushe nacipwa naupata abena Sioni? Bushe kwena cinshi ico watupumine ifi cikali cikali, icakuti natufilwa no kupola? Ifwe twalefwaya ukulaikalila mu cibote, nomba tapaba cisuma nelyo cimo icamonekapo, twalelolela ukupola, nomba twaikalafye mu fyakututiinya." 
Jeremiah14:20 Ifwe twayebelela ububifi bwesu we Yawe, twasumina ne milandu ya fikolwe fyesu yonse. Cine cine ifwe twalikubifya." 
Jeremiah14:21 Pa mulandu we shina lyobe, witusuulakofye iyoo, wisebanya Yerusalemu umwaba icipuna cobe icabufumu icacindamisha. Sunga icipangano ico wapangana na ifwe, wiconaula iyoo." 
Jeremiah14:22 Pa milungu iyafyefye iya benafyalo tapaba nelyo umo uwingaleta imfula, tapaba nelyo umo uwingalenga ukuti imfula ilokeko ukufuma mu mulu. Awe iyoo, ala niwefye we Yawe, we Lesa wesu, niwe ifwe tutetekela, pantu niwe weka ucita ifi fintu." 
Jeremiah15:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine ne Yeremia aliti, “Nangufye Mose na Samwele bengeminina pa cinso candi, no kubapapatilako kuli ine, awe ine teti nangulukileko aba bantu iyoo. Bena ubatamfyefye, ine nshilefwaya na kubamona pano ndi." 
Jeremiah15:2 Nga bakwipusha uko balefwaya ukuya, bebefye ifyo ine nsosele nati, “‘Abali nokufwa ku cikuko, ku cikuko eko bakaye fwila. Abali nokufwa ku nkondo, ni ku nkondo eko bakafwile. Abali nokufwa ku cipowe, ku cipowe eko bakafwile. Abali no kusendwa muli bunkole, ni muli bunkole emo basendwe.’" 
Jeremiah15:3 “Ee, nine ne Yawe mpingwile ifintu fine (4) ifyakubonaula. Bakabepaya ku lupanga, imbwa eshikalatakanya ifitumbi fyabo, ifyuni nafyo fikalalya ifitumbi fyabo elyo ne finama fya mpanga fikalalya ifikalashalako." 
Jeremiah15:4 Abantu bonse aba pano isonde nkalenga bakaleitutuminafye ku mwenso pakumona ifi fintu, pa mulandu wa fintu ifibi ifyo Manase mwana Hesekia alecita mu Yerusalemu pa nshita aleteeka cino calo ca Yuda." 
Jeremiah15:5 “Nga nani uwingamumfwilako uluse imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu? Nga nani uukalamulililako ubulanda? Nga nani uukalakokola ukwiminina apo muli, no kulaipusha nga cakuti muliko bwino?”" 
Jeremiah15:6 Nomba ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, “Namunkaana mwamfumyako na mano. Kanshi na ine epakumubuula no kumukanda, pantu nintendwa ukulashipikisha." 
Jeremiah15:7 Mu mishi yonse iya muli cino calo, ine ndi nokumululula nge misungu ndemulofya imwe mwe bantu bandi, ndeipaya na bana benu, pantu tamwaleka misango yenu iyabipa." 
Jeremiah15:8 Bamukamfwilwa babo nabafula, nabacila na pa musensenga wa kuli bemba ku bwingi. Akasuba pakati nindetela banyina wa balumendo umonaushi, mbapumikishefye pakubaponesha ubucushi, no kubateka mu mwenso uukalamba." 
Jeremiah15:9 Umwanakashi umo uwafyele bamwane cine lubali afwa umutombo, icakuti aletusailafye pakupema, na pa menso pafiitile na fititi, mu nshita iya kasuba, ena akasuba kakwe kaya mukuwa, alifye uwatutubala, na mu mutima cilemukalipa. Nkaleka abalwani babo bakepaye abashelepo.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah15:10 Awe ine nalishama! Nga cinshi ico mayo amfyalile ine? Ine ngumanafye no kubikana ifikansa na bantu bonse aba muli cino calo. Ine nshakongweshapo muntu indalama, kabili ine nshakongolapo ndalama ku muntu, nomba kabili abantu bonse nine baletipwila." 
Jeremiah15:11 Yawe asosa ati, “Cine cine nkakupususha pakuti ukacitepo icisuma. Cine cine nkalenga abalwani bobe bakapapate kuli iwe mu nshita sha macushi no bulanda." 
Jeremiah15:12 Teti pamoneke muntu uwingafuna icela, palibufi nga ni cilya cela cifuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso ico basakanyamo no mukuba.”" 
Jeremiah15:13 Elyo Yawe nao anjeba ati, “Ine nkatuma abalwani abakwisa tapa ifyuma fya bantu bandi apafye, pamo na filya fine batutila, ekubalimuna pa mulandu wa fibi fyabo ifyo bacita muli cino calo." 
Jeremiah15:14 Nkaleka bakalebombela abalwani babo mu calo cimo ico abantu bandi bashaishiba, pantu icipyu candi cilebilima ngo mulilo, kabili tacakatale acileka kubilima iyoo.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Elyo na ine nasosa nati, “We Yawe, iwe walinjishiba, ulenjibukishako, kabili ulentuulako, ulenandwilako na ku balencusha. Wilalindila ukuti bakanjipaye. Ibukisha ukuti ine ala ni pali iwe ntukilwa." 
Jeremiah15:16 Ilyo amashiwi yobe yamfikile naliyasekelele. Ala amashiwi yobe yalindetela nganshi insansa ne shuko mu mutima wandi. Pantu banjitila kwishina lyobe, we Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah15:17 Ine nshatala njikala mwibumba lya bantu abasekasekafye, kabili nshangala na balilafye ifya calo. Kulwa mulimo uo iwe wampeela, ine njikalafye neka, pantu ine walindetela icifukushi nganshi." 
Jeremiah15:18 Nga cinshi ico mbikilepofye ukulacula? Mulandu nshi ifilonda fyandi fishibelele fyakupola? Na cinshi fishakapolele? Bushe ulefwaya ukuba kuli ine nga kamfukumfuku ka bufi, ngo mumana uwakama, mwa?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Elyo Yawe nao ayasuka ati, “Iwe nga wayalukila uko ndi, ine ndekusekelela, no kukucita umubomfi wandi nakabili. Nga walalanda ifintu ifilingile, ifishili fyabuwelewele, ninshi uleba kasesema wandi nakabili. Abantu bakulayalukila kuli iwe, nomba iwe tecakwesha ukwalukila uko bali." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ine nkakucita nge linga ilyamaka ilya mukuba, ilyakukucingililako kuli aba bantu. Bena bakalakulwisha, nomba iwe tabakakucimfye nakalya. Pantu ine nkalaba nobe pakukupokololako no kulakusunga umutende.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah15:21 “Ine nkalakufyombotolako mu minwe ya bantu babi, nkalakulubulako na ku bantu balukakala.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine ne Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Iwe wikopila muli cino calo, wikafyalilamo na bana." 
Jeremiah16:3 Ine nalakwebelapo ifyalaswa fiponene abana abafyalilwa muli cino calo, ifikaponena na banamayo ababapapa na bawishi bene." 
Jeremiah16:4 Bonse bali nokufwa ku malwele ayabipisha. Tapakabe wakubaloosha, no kushiikwa tabashiikwe. Bakulatulumanafye nge mina ya citindi. Bali nokufwa ku nkondo na ku cipowe, ne fitumbi fyabo fikaba e cakulya ca fyuni neca finama fya mpanga.”" 
Jeremiah16:5 Ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Iwe tekwesha kulaingila mu ŋanda umuli icililo. Tecakwesha ukulalangulukilako umuntu nelyo umo. Pantu ine nomba nshabaletele cibote, nimfumyapo amapaalo yandi no kutemwa kwandi kabili nshabacitileko uluse nakalya." 
Jeremiah16:6 Abakankala na balanda bene bali nokufwa muli cino calo, ukwabula no wakubashiika nangufye uwakubaloosha. Tamwabe no wakuitetaula umubili nangufye uwakubeya ulukuuso pakulanga ubulanda." 
Jeremiah16:7 Uulefwilwa tali nakumonapo nelyo umo uwakumuletelako icakulya nangufye icakunwa pakumukoselesha. Nangufye uulefwilwa wishi atemwa nyina, ala nao wine takamonepo nelyo umo uwakumutalalikako umutima." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Kabinge tekwesha kulaingila mu ŋanda umuli amalila, kukulyamo nangu kukunwamo pamo nabo." 
Jeremiah16:9 Umfwikishe ifyo ndesosa ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, ine ne Lesa wakwa Israeli. Ine muno muntu ndebaputukisha utupundu twansansa, na mashiwi yene aya bashibwinga naya banabwinga. Abantu ababa muno muntu bali nokusangwapo no kuimwena abene ifyalabaponena." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Ilyo wakulaeba abantu ifi fyonse, bena bakulakwipusha umulandu uulengele ukuti ine ne Yawe mbakande ifi mu bukali. Bakulakwipusha umulandu uo bacita, bakulakwipusha no bubifi ubo babifya kuli ine ne Yawe Lesa wabo." 
Jeremiah16:11 Elyo iwe ulebasukafye ukuti ine ne Yawe ndetila nati, ‘Icilengele nico ifikolwe fyenu fyalinsangukile, fyalikonkelela imilungu imbi imbi no kulaipepa no kulaibombela. Fyalinsuulile, fyakaana no kulanakila amafunde yandi." 
Jeremiah16:12 Nomba imwe namubipishapo pa fikolwe fyenu. Bonsefye apo mwapela mwalyumalala imitima, muli babi, mwalikaana no kulambeela." 
Jeremiah16:13 Kanshi nomba ine nalamufumyamo muli cino calo, nalamufwinta mu calo cimo ico imwe mushaishiba, ico ne fikolwe fyenu fine fishaishibe. Umo mwine emo mukalabombela imilungu imbi imbi akasuba no bushiku, no luse ine nshakamukwatile nakalya.’”" 
Jeremiah16:14 “Lelo, inshita imo yalafika ilyo kushabe nelyo umo uwakulandapo ati, ‘Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Umumi uwafumishe abena Israeli mu calo ca Egupto.’" 
Jeremiah16:15 Pakulapa ine nomba bakulatilafye, ‘Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Umumi uwafumishe abena Israeli mu calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso, na mu fyalo fimbi fyonse umo ena abasalanganishe.’ Ee, ine nkababwesesha muli cino calo cabo, ico napeele ifikolwe fyabo." 
Jeremiah16:16 “Moneni, ine ndeita abalondo abengi abakwisa ikata aba bantu nga filya fine bekata isabi. Elyo ndeita na balunshi abengi, abakwisa mukulabalunga nge nama mu mpili shonse na mu tupili tonse na mu ncengo sha mabwe mwine.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah16:17 “Ine ndamona fyonsefye ifyo bena bacita. Tapaba nelyo cimo icafisama kuli ine. Ifibi fyabo fyaba pa mulola wandi. 
Jeremiah16:18 Pa bubi bwabo na pa bulungani bwabo ine nkabakandilapo libili. Nabakowesha icalo candi ku tulubi utushakwata bumi nga filya fine ifitumbi fiba. Mu calo ico nabapeela, nabesushamo ifimpashanya fya milungu yabo iyabufi.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 We Yawe, we cubo candi kabili niwe unkosha, ni muli iwe ine mfisama pa nshita ndi mu bwafya. Abantu ba mishobo yonse ni kuli iwe bakesa, bakatula umwapelela icalo conse. Bakesa kuli iwe, bakatila nokuti, “Ifikolwe fyesu, ala milungu yabufi e tulubi bali nato, utunangwafye, na maka tatwakwata nakalya." 
Jeremiah16:20 Bushe umuntunse alikwatapo amaka ayakuipangila imilungu? Kuti aesha, lelo ninshi mu cacine te milungu iyoo.”" 
Jeremiah16:21 “Eico kanshi ine ne Yawe Lesa, nalabeshibisha calimo ubulamba bwandi no lukula lwandi, nabo balashininkisha ukuti kanshi nine Yawe, e shina lyandi.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 Yawe aletila ati, “Imwe mwe bena Yuda, ifibi fyenu nafilembwa ku kalembelo ka cela akabaswa kuli daimondi, nafilembwa mu mitima yenu, na pa nsengo sha fibumbili fya malambo." 
Jeremiah17:2 Ee, abana benu balebukisha ifibumbili fya malambo, ne nceshi ifyo mwakuulila Ashera umulungu uwanakashi, mwisamba lya miti yonse iyalelema, na pa mulu wa tupili," 
Jeremiah17:3 na pa mulu wa mpili ishikulu mu mpanga. Ine nkaleta abalwani benu pakuti bakese mutapa ifyuma fyenu ne fintu ifyo mwatutila. Ne cikalenga, mulandu wa fibi fyenu fyonse ifyo mucita mpanga yonse muli cino calo cenu." 
Jeremiah17:4 Mukafumamo muli cino calo ico ine namupeela ukuti cibe icuma cenu. Kabili nkaleka mukalebombela abalwani benu mu calo ico imwe mushaishiba, pantu ine icipyu cilebilima ngo mulilo uuleyaka lyonse.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Ifi efyo Yawe alanda ifyakuti, “Alitipwa umuntu uufumya amano kuli Yawe, uutetekela mu muntunse, uushintilila ku muntu uuli nokufwa." 
Jeremiah17:6 Umuntu wa uyu musango aba nge cimpusa ca mu matololo, takamonepo icisuma nelyo cimo ilyo cikesa. Akekala mu ncende ishalatauka isha mu matololo, umwaba umushili uwacicelekese, umushingekala umuntu nelyo umo." 
Jeremiah17:7 “Lelo umuntu uutetekela Yawe no kumusumina, awe ena alapaalwa." 
Jeremiah17:8 Ena aba ngo muti uwalimbwa mupepi na menshi, uulosha imishila yauko ku mulonga. Wena tautiina nangu ulusuba lwise, pantu amabula yauko yabafye ayalelema. Nangu takuli mfula, te mulandu iyoo, wena tauleka na kutwala ifitwalo nakalya." 
Jeremiah17:9 “Nani uwingeshiba ifyaba umutima wa muntu? Umutima wa muntu walicila pali fyonse kukuba no bucenjeshi, kabili no kubipisha ewabipishapo." 
Jeremiah17:10 Ine ne Yawe nine nengula ifitontonkanya umuntu, nine njesha no mutima wakwe. Nine nambula umuntu onse, ukulingana ne myendele yakwe, ukulingana ne fintu ifyo acita.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Umuntu uunonkela ifyuma mu musango wabipa, aba nge cuni icilalila no kutota amani ayo cishabikila. Pa fyuma fyakwe akapelwapofye, ilyo ashilati afike pa cimo ca buntu bwine bwine, na pakulekelesha akasangukafye icipuba." 
Jeremiah17:12 Iŋanda yesu iyakupepelamo Lesa, yaba nge cipuna cabufumu icacindama, icaba pa lupili ulutali ukutulafye ku ntendekelo." 
Jeremiah17:13 Yawe eo abena Israeli batetekela, bonse abamusangukila bakasebana. Bakashima nga filya fifuutika amashina ayalembwa mu lufukutu, pantu bena balisangukila Yawe uwaba kamfukumfuku ka menshi ayakubapeela ubumi." 
Jeremiah17:14 We Yawe, wingamposhako, na ine ninshi nalapola, mpusushako, na ine ninshi nalapusuka. Pantu ine niwefye numbanya." 
Jeremiah17:15 Abantu balanjeba ine abati, “Nge shiwi lyakwa Lesa lili kwi, filya fintu Yawe apanga ukutucitila? Uleke lifikilishiwe!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 We Yawe, awe ine nshabutuka imilimo yobe iya kucema, Walishiba teine nakumbilwe ubushiku bwe shamo, kabili walishiba conse icifuma mu kanwa kandi." 
Jeremiah17:17 Wilanenga ukuti ndetiina, pantu ni muli iwe mfisama ilyo nsanswa." 
Jeremiah17:18 Abancusha ine, ebo uletela insoni, lelo ine, awe winenga mbe ne nsoni. Bena ebo utiinyefye, lelo ine, awe wintiinyako. Ale baletele ifinkunka, ubonaule bonse umupwilapo!" 
Jeremiah17:19 Yawe alandile kuli ine ne Yeremia ati, “Keminine pa mpongolo ilya beta ukuti Mpongolo ya bantu, iyo ishamfumu sha muno mu Yuda shipitilapo pakuya mu musumba na pakufumamo, elyo kabili uye na pa mpongolo shimbi shonse isha mu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah17:20 Uye beba ukutila, ‘Umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Yawe mwe bashamfumu ba mu calo ca Yuda nemwe bene mwe bena Yuda bonse na bambi bonse abaikala mu Yerusalemu, abapitila pali ishi mpongolo." 
Jeremiah17:21 Ifi efyasosa Yawe. Mwilasenda icipe icafina pa bushiku bwe Sabata no kulacipisha pa mpongolo sha Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah17:22 Mwilafumya mu mayanda yenu icipe icafina pa bushiku bwe sabata. Pa bushiku bwe Sabata mwilaesha ukulabombapo umulimo nelyo umo, pantu bushiku ubwashila, kanshi muli nokubusungafye nga mulya mwine nakonkomeshe ifikolwe fyenu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Lelo ifikolwe fyenu tafyaumfwile ifyo ine nafyebele, tafyaposeleko na mano nakalya. Fyalitaleme, fyakaana ukulambeela no kulasekelela amafunde yandi.’" 
Jeremiah17:24 “Nomba nga mwaumfwa no kulambela bwino bwino ne Yawe, nga mwaleka ukulapisha icipe icafina pa mpongolo sha uyu musumba pa bushiku bwe Sabata, nga mwaikalafye pa bushiku bwe Sabata, pantu bushiku ubwashila, kabili nga mwaleka ukulabombapo mulimo nelyofye umo," 
Jeremiah17:25 ninshi lyena bashamfumu na bacilolo babo bakulaingilila pa mpongolo sha Yerusalemu, bakulakwata na maka yabufumu ayo Davidi akwete. Ninshi lyena bakulaendela capamo na bena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu mu maceleta na pali bakabalwe, na mu musumba wa Yerusalemu pefye mwakulaisula abantu paa." 
Jeremiah17:26 Na bantu bakulatula mu misumba ya muno calo ca Yuda na mu mishi iyashinguluka Yerusalemu. Bakulatula na mu citungu ca bena Benjamini, na mwishika lya mpili, na pa mpili pene, na ku matololo ya Negebu. Bakulaleta mu ŋanda yandi ne Yawe amalambo ayakoca, na malambo yambi, ne mituulo ya cabunga, no bubani, ne mituulo iyakuntotela." 
Jeremiah17:27 Nomba nga tamulembeela, mulakaana ukulaikalafye pa bushiku bwe Sabata, mulapisha ne fipe ifyafina pa mpongolo sha Yerusalemu pali ubu bushiku, awe ninshi ine nkoca impongolo sha Yerusalemu ku mulilo. Noyo mulilo ukoca amayanda ayacindama aya mu Yerusalemu, takwakamoneke nelyo umo uwakuushimya.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine ne Yeremia aliti: 
Jeremiah18:2 “Kabiye tentemukila ku ŋanda ya ulya uupanga ifye bumba, kulya kwine eko ndeya kwebela amashiwi yandi.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Awe na ine eko naya ku ŋanda yakwa kabumba, namusanga alebomba pa mupeto wakubumbilapo" 
Jeremiah18:4 Nao aletifye inongo iyo abumba, nga amona ukuti taiweme ninshi kuitobaula, akasamo ibumba nakabili, no kubumbamo icintu cimbi ico umwine alefwaya." 
Jeremiah18:5 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Bushe ine teti ncite kuli imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli ngefi fine uubumba alecita kwibumba, atiini? Ngefi fine ibumba liba mu minwe ya uulebumba, efyo na imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli mwaba mu minwe yandi.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah18:7 “Lyonsefye ine kuti napanga ukufulunganya, ukupasa atemwa ukulofya abantu ba mushobo umo, atemwa ubuteeko bwa calo cimo." 
Jeremiah18:8 Nomba abantu ba uyo mushobo, atemwa aba muli ico calo nga baleka ukubifya, ninshi ine kuti nabwesha umutima, teti mbacite icinkunka ico ningapanga ukubacita." 
Jeremiah18:9 Kabili lyonsefye ine kuti napanga ukusalapo abantu ba mushobo umo, no kubakusha, atemwa ukukusha ubuteko bwa calo cimo." 
Jeremiah18:10 Nomba abantu ba uyo mushobo, atemwa aba muli ico calo nga balabifya, balakaana no kulambeela, ninshi ine kuti nalekafye, teti mbacitile ifisuma ifyo ningapanga ukubacitila." 
Jeremiah18:11 Eico kanshi eba abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu ukuti, ifi efyasosa Yawe. ‘Ine ndemupekanishisha icinkunka, kabili nimukwatila amapange ayabi. Eico bwelulukeni ukufuma ku mibeele yenu iyibi, muwamye ne nshila shenu ne micitile yenu.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 Nomba abantu nabo baasukafye abati, ‘Ala nakalyafye. Nga cinshi? Ifwe bonse twakulaicitilafye ifyo tulefwaya, na cila muntu alecitafye ukulingana nefyo umutima wakwe uubi ulefwaya.’”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Eico ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Iwe Yeremia, ipusha imishobo ya benafyalo apo yapela. Bushe kwena icintu ca uyu musango calitala acicitika? Umukashana nacisungu Israeli nacita icintu icishaibipila." 
Jeremiah18:14 Bushe ubunga bwa mfula bulabulwapo, pa fimabwe fya mu mpili sha mu Lebanoni? Utumilonga twa menshi ayatalala ayakonkoloka mu lupili lwa Lebanoni, bushe tulatala twakamapo?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Awe abantu bandi bena ine balindabako, imilungu iyafyefye eyo bena bafutumwina ububani. Ecilenga no kulaipununa mu nshila isho bendamo, Balileka ukulaenda mu nshila shakale ishikulu, bendafye nomba mu tushila twatondo." 
Jeremiah18:16 Icalo cabo balicisangula ukuba icaonaika, icakusekwafye pe. Bonse abapitamo bakuntafye imitwe pakupapa." 
Jeremiah18:17 Ngo mwela uufuma ku kabanga, abantu bandi nkabapashila ku balwani babo. Ine nkabafutatila, nshakabalange icinso candi, ilyo bakaponenwa ne cinkunka.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Abantu nabo balilandile abati, “Mwe, ala natumfwane, uleke tucitepo cimo pali Yeremia. Pantu ifwe tatwakatale atubulililwa bashimapepo abakutufunda amafunde, nangu abantu abamano abakutupandako nefwe amano, nangu bakasesema abakusesema amashiwi yakwa Lesa. Aleni natufwailishepo fimo mufyo alesosa ifyakumupelelapo umulandu, tuleke no kulaumfwa kufyo alelanda.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Kanshi na ine epakusosa nati, “We Yawe, umfwa ifyo ine ndekupapata, umfwa ifyo abalwani bandi balempangila." 
Jeremiah18:20 Bushe ububi e cilambu ca pa busuma, mwa, pakuti bena ine banyimbile ubucinga? Ibukishafye ifyo ine naishile kuli iwe, no kwisa mukulabapapatilako, pakuti iwe utalushe ubukali bobe kuli bena." 
Jeremiah18:21 Kwena uleke nomba abana babo bafwe ku cipowe, leka bafwe ku nkondo. Leka abakashi babo bafwilwe abana babo na balume babo, leka abaume bafwe ku cikuko, na balumendo nabo leka bafwe ku lupanga mu nkondo." 
Jeremiah18:22 Betile abakwisa basansa, uleke babapumikishe pakutapa amayanda yabo, pakuti nomba muleumfwikafye imisowa. Pantu ine nabanyimbila ubucinga ubwakuti ngwilemo, nabanteya ifyakuti banjikatileko." 
Jeremiah18:23 Lelo, we Yawe nawishiba fyonse, nefyo balepanga ukuti banjipaye. Wibabelela luse pa bubi bwabo, wifuuta ifyabubifi fyabo iyoo. Basunkilishe pakuti bawile pa cinso cobe, bacitepo cimo pa nshita iwe ufulilwe.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, “Kabiye kashitepo umutondo umo kuli kabumba wauko. Sendapo abakalamba bamo aba bantu na bashimapepo bamo abakalamba," 
Jeremiah19:2 ufumine pa mpongolo imo iyo baleposako ifiinga, no kuya nabo ku mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu. Uko kwine eko uli nokuya bilila abantu imbila iyo ndi nokukweba ukubila." 
Jeremiah19:3 Elyo ukasose auti, ‘Ala, umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Yawe imwe mwe shamfumu sha muli cino calo ca Yuda, na imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu. Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli. Ine nalaswa ndete muli ino ncende icinkunka icakulawela na mu matwi ya bantu abakulaumfwako." 
Jeremiah19:4 Icalalenga ukuti ncite ifyo, nico abantu bandi nabansangukila, nabakowesha ino ncende mukulalekela imilungu imbi imbi amalambo, imilungu iyo bashatala abeshiba, iyo ne fikolwe fyabo fishatalile afishiba, nangufye ishamfumu sha muno calo ca Yuda. Kabili baisushamo muli ino ncende umulopa wa bakaele," 
Jeremiah19:5 kabili nabakuulilamo Baali ifibumbili fye lambo ifyakocelapo abana babo nge lambo. Kabili ine na ku mano yandi tacatala acibako icakubapeela ifunde nangu icebo icakulaoca abana babo nge lambo. 
Jeremiah19:6 Kanshi ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, inshita imo yalafika ilyo abantu balaleka ukwita ino ncende abati, Tofeti, nangu umupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu. Ino ncende nomba bakulaita abati, Umupokapoka Wakwipailamo." 
Jeremiah19:7 “‘Ni muno mwine emo ine nalaonawila amapange ya bena Yuda naya bena Yerusalemu. Ndeleka abalwani babo babacimfye mu nkondo, no kuleka bawile mu minwe ya bafwaya imyeo yabo. Ndeleka ifyuni ne finama fya mpanga efyo filelya ifitumbi fyabo." 
Jeremiah19:8 Kabili uyu musumba ndeonaula icakuti bonse abakulapitapo baletiina no kulapapa pali fyonse ifyalauponena. Abakamona bakalawela no kuseka. 
Jeremiah19:9 Abantu abaikala muli uyu musumba, ine nalaleka balelya abana babo abaume na banakashi. Bakulalya na banabo kulwa kupelelwa ukwine kwine uko abalwani babo bakalenga basangwemo, pa nshita bakashinguluka umusumba pakufwaya ukubepaya.’”" 
Jeremiah19:10 Elyo Yawe anjeba ukutobaula umutondo pa cinso ca bantu abo twali nabo," 
Jeremiah19:11 anjeba nokuti ine mbebe ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita fyonse atile ati, “Ine nkonaula aba bantu, nkonaula noyu wine umusumba, ngefi fine iwe Yeremia watobaula umutondo, icakuti teti pabe no wakuulundinkanya nakabili iyoo. Na mu Tofeti mwine abantu bakulashiikamo abantu babo abakulafwa, pantu tabakulamona kumbi uko bakulabashiika." 
Jeremiah19:12 Efyo ine ndecita uyu musumba, na bantu bene abaikalamo. Ndeucita nga Tofeti.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah19:13 “Amayanda ya mu Yerusalemu, na mayanda ya bashamfumu ba muno calo ca Yuda, na mayanda yene yonse ayo bafutumwina ububani pa mitenge pakuti bulefutumukila ku fita fyonse fya mu mulu, apo batuulila ne milungu imbi imbi imituulo ya fyakunwa, ala yakakowela nga Tofeti.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Kanshi Yeremia epakufumako ku Tofeti, uko Yawe amutumine kukubila imbila yakwe. Awe aya iminina na mu lubansa lwamukati ulwa ŋanda yakwa Yawe, alaeba na bantu bonse" 
Jeremiah19:15 ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli aletila ati, “Ine nalaletela uno musumba, ne mishi yonse iyaba mumbali, ifinkunka fyonse ifyo nasosele ukuleta, pantu imwe mwe bantu namutalama, tamulefwaya na kulaumfwa ifyo ine ndesosa.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Shimapepo Pashuri mwana Imeri ali kalinda mukalamba wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Nao alyumfwileko uko kasesema Yeremia alesobela ifi fintu. 
Jeremiah20:2 Kanshi Pashuri epakupuma Yeremia, amukaka ne minyololo, amubika na pa mpongolo yakwa Benjamini iyabela lwapa mulu wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah20:3 Ulucelo cilya Pashuri akakula Yeremia iminyololo, Yeremia nao alamweba ati, “Yawe takwinika iwe ishina lya Pashuri iyoo. Ishina lyobe ilyo akwinika lyakuti icakutiinya mpanga yonse." 
Jeremiah20:4 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, ‘Iwe Pashuri, ine nalaswa nkucite icakutiinya kuli we mwine na bacibusa bobe, wakulamonako na menso yobe uko abalwani bobe baleipaya bacibusa bobe bonse ku lupanga. Nalapeela icalo conse ica Yuda ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni, uukabasenda muli bunkole ku Babiloni, no kubepaya ku lupanga." 
Jeremiah20:5 Nkaleka na balwani babo ukwisa tapa ifyuma fyonse ifyaba muli uyu musumba, na mu matuka yonse, na fyonse ifyamutengo ifyabamo, ne fyuma fyonse ifya shamfumu sha muno mu Yuda, ala fyonse bakesa fisenda no kufitwala ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Nobe wine Pashuri pamo no lupwa lobe lonse bakamwikata no kumusenda ku Babiloni. Uko kwine eko ukaya fwila, no kushiikwa pamo na bacibusa bobe bonse abo usesemena ifyabufi.’”" 
Jeremiah20:7 We Yawe, kanshi ine walimbepele, na ine nasuka nabepwa. Iwe walincila amaka, no kuncimfya walicimfya. Bonsefye nine baleseka, no kungwela lyonse." 
Jeremiah20:8 Pantu lyonsefye ine nga ndelanda, awe ninshi ndepunda, ninshi ndebilikisha nati, “We mpasase nobe, kabili we bonaushi nobe ee.” We Yawe, ine lyonsefye abantu balanseka, kabili balinsuula ico nanda amashiwi yobe." 
Jeremiah20:9 Nomba nga nati, “Ine nshakulalumbula Yawe, nangu ukusosela nakabili mwishina lyakwe,” nomba ndomfwa amashiwi yobe, yabilima ngo mulilo mu mutima wandi, uwacilikilwa mu mafupa yandi. Ndesha ukushipikisha, awe ndafilwa." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ine ndeumfwa uko abengi balenyamba, “Icintiinya mpanga yonse!” Balesosa abati, “Kamusoseleleni. Aleni natuye musoselela!” Na bacibusa bandi bene nabo balelolela ukuti ndufyanyepo cimo. Balesosa abati, “Nalimo abantu balaswa bamubepeshepo fimo, elyo nefwe tumwikate, tumupeshe.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Kwena we Yawe waba ku lubali lwandi, uli impalume yandi iyabulamba, eico abalwani bandi bakulatalansukafye, ine bakamfilwa. Bakekatwa ne nsoni ishine shine, pantu ine bakamfilililwafye. Ukusebana kwabo kukabelelela pe, no kulabwa takwakalabwe." 
Jeremiah20:12 We Yawe umwine wa fita, we upituluka mu cishinka ca bantu. We umona ifiba mu mitima yabo na mano yabo. Kanshi leka ine moneko uko ulelandula abalwani bandi, pantu ine umulandu wandi niwe ntulileko." 
Jeremiah20:13 Akwimbileni Yawe! Aleni akulumbanyeni Yawe! Pantu alapususha abalanda ku bantu ababi abalukakala. 
Jeremiah20:14 Bube ubwatipwa ubushiku nafyelwepo. Bwiba ubwapaalwa ubushiku ubo mayo amfyelepo. 
Jeremiah20:15 Natipwe uyo muntu uwasansamwishe tata apakalamba, pakumwishibisha no kumweba ukuti, “Washukila umwana, nao umwana umwaume.”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Uyo muntu kabefye nga ilya misumba, iyo Yawe aonawile ukwabula uluse. Aleumfwafye inkuuta shabulanda pa nshita ya lucelo, ne nkuuta sha nkondo pa nshita akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe," 
Jeremiah20:17 pantu uyo muntu tanjipaile mwifumo, ifumo lyakwa mayo nga elyali inindi yandi, no kufyalwa nga nshatalile mfyalwa iyoo." 
Jeremiah20:18 Nga mulandu nshi ine nafyalilwe? Bushe kanshi ni pakuti ine ndecululukafye no kulilishika, no kufwa no musebanya, mwa?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Yawe alandile kuli Yeremia ilyo Sedekia atumine Pashuri mwana Malikia, na shimapepo Sefania mwana Maaseia, kuli Yeremia kukuya mwipusha abati," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Mukwai, twipushisheniko kuli Yawe, pantu Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni natubushisha inkondo. Nakalimo Yawe kuti atucitilapo icipeshamano cakwe cimo pamo nga kale, no kulenga Nebukadinesa abwelelemo.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Elyo Yeremia ayasuka ati, “Kebe Sedekia" 
Jeremiah21:4 Ifi efyasosa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli ati, ‘Ine ndebwesesha ifyanso fyabulwi ifyo fili mu minwe yenu, ifyo mulelwishishako imfumu ya ku Babiloni, pamo na bena Kaludea abashingulwike amalinga ya musumba. Ne fyanso fya fita fyakwa Sedekia nalafitulika umwina pakati ka musumba." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ne mwine nine nalamulwisha imwe ku kuboko ukwafunguluka kabili ukwamaka, mu bukali, mu cipyu no kufulwa ukukali nganshi." 
Jeremiah21:6 Bonsefye abaikala muli uyu musumba ine ndebepaya, abantu kumo kwine ne nama balefwa ku cikuko icabipisha nganshi." 
Jeremiah21:7 Panuma ya ifi, ine nkapeela Sedekia imfumu ya calo cino ica Yuda, pamo na bacilolo bakwe, pamo pene na bantu abakapusukako ku cikuko na ku nkondo na ku cipowe, mu maboko yakwa Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni na mu maboko ya balwani babo, abalefwaya ukubepaya. Akabakomaula ku lupanga, takashepo nelyo umo nakalya, takabelelepo nelyo umo uluse nangufye ukulangulukilapo umo nakalya.’ Ifi efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Kabili Yawe aeba Yeremia amashiwi na yambi ayakwebako abantu ayakutila, “Umfweni kuno. Ine ne Yawe ndefwaya pali ifi fibili imwe musalepo cimo, musalepo inshila iyalola ku bumi, atemwa musalepo inshila ibiye iyalola ku mfwa." 
Jeremiah21:9 Onsefye uwaikala muli uyu musumba ali nokufwa ku nkondo, atemwa ku cipowe, nangu ku cikuko. Nomba onse uuleya cimba ku bena Kaludea balya bashingulwike uyu musumba, awe ena takafwe akaba nge citapwa ca mu nkondo, alepusukako umumi." 
Jeremiah21:10 Pantu nimpanga ukuti uyu musumba ine nshaupanye iyoo, ndeonaula. Ndelekela imfumu ya ku Babiloni pakuti eyo yoce uyu umusumba nakalya nakalya. Ifi efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 “Nakabili kabiye kalande ku ŋanda yabufumu iya bena Yuda ukuti, umfweni amashiwi yakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah21:12 Imwe mwe ba mu ŋanda yakwa Davidi, ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Imwe ala mulelungika pakupingula imilandu cila lucelo. Mulepokololako abantu abo incenjeshi shakantu shilecenjesha. Pantu nga tamulecita ifyo, ninshi imicitile yenu iyibi ikabilimuna icipyu candi, naco cikapya ngo mulilo uushakamone uwakuushimya." 
Jeremiah21:13 Ine ninkwalukila iwe we musumba wa Yerusalemu, we waikala apasansama pamulu we shika, waba nge cilibwe icalungumana mu nika.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Iwe ulaitutubula ukuti takwaba nangu umo uwingakusansa, nangu uwingapula mu malinga yobe." 
Jeremiah21:14 Nomba ine ne Yawe nkakulimuna ukulingana nefyo iwe ucita. Ine nkoca umulilo mu mpanga yobe, uukocafye fyonse ifyabamo.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah22:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Kabiye ulungame kwisano lya mfumu iyileteeka icalo ca Yuda nokuya yeba iyi mbila iyakuti," 
Jeremiah22:2 ‘Umfwa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe, we mfumu ya bena Yuda, we waikala pa cipuna cakwa Davidi, iwe pamo na bacilolo bobe, kumo kwine na bena Yerusalemu, abengilila pa mpongolo ishi." 
Jeremiah22:3 Ine ne Yawe ndemweba imwe ukulacita ifintu ifyalungama kabili ifyacishinka. Mulepokololako abantu abo incenjeshi shakantu shilecenjesha. Mwilacusha nangu ukucita ulukakala ku benafyalo nangu bakashiwa, nangu bamukamfwilwa, kabili mwilaipaya bakaele muli ino ncende." 
Jeremiah22:4 Nga mwalakonka bwino bwino ifyo ine ndemukonkomesha, awe ninshi bashamfumu abakupyana pa cipuna cakwa Davidi, pamo na bacilolo babo kumo kwine na bantu babo, bakulakonkanya ukulaingilila pa mpongolo she sano mu maceleta na pali bakabalwe." 
Jeremiah22:5 Lelo nga mwakaana ukulambeela, ne Yawe ndemweba ukutila nalapa ukuti, napalifye ine, ili isano likabongoloka, pakashalafye ifitantala.’”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe palwe sano lya mfumu ya bena Yuda. “Imwe, ndemumona nge calo ca Gileadi, ngo lupili lwa ku Lebanoni, lelo kwena ine nkamusangula amatololo, nge mishi umushikala bantu." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ine nkamutumina abakwisa monaula. Bonse bakesa ne fyanso fyabo, bakesa putaula inceshi shonse ishisuma isha miti iyalepesha iya keda, bakesa shiposa na pa mulilo." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Ilyo abantu ba mishobo iyingi bakalapitapo, bakalaipushanya abati, ‘Bushe kwena mulandu nshi walengele ukuti Yawe acite ifi kuli uyu musumba ukalamba?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Nabo elyo bakalaasuka abati, ‘Nico balya bantu balisuulile icipangano cakwa Yawe Lesa wabo, balepepa no kubombela imilungu imbi imbifye.’”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Imwe mwe bena Yuda, mwilaloosha uufwile, nangu ukulila pa mulandu wa mfwa yakwe. Mulilile uyo uulesendwa muli bunkole pantu ena takatale abwela, kabili takamone icalo afyalilwemo." 
Jeremiah22:11 Pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe palwakwa Shalumu mwana Yosia, imfumu ya bena Yuda, uwali imfumu pa cifulo cakwa wishi Yosia uwafumine kuli ino ncende. “Ena takatale abwelela nakalya." 
Jeremiah22:12 Kulya kwine ku calo bamusendele bunkole, no kufwila eko akaya fwila. Cino calo takatale nakabili acishimpamo ilinso.”" 
Jeremiah22:13 Alishama umuntu uukuula isano lyakwe mu nshila ishishalungama, uulundapo ne miputule ya pamulu mu fintu ifyakupokelafye mu bucenjeshi, uulenga abanankwe ukumubombela ukwabula nelyo cimo, ukwabula ukubalipila pa milimo yabo." 
Jeremiah22:14 Alishama umuntu uutila ati, “Ine nalakuula iŋanda yandi iyikulu, mbikepo ne ntunti iya miputule ikulu. Mbikemo na mawindo, ku cibumba nkuulilileko ne mbao isha miti itali iya keda, nshingwilileko ne langi ilyakashika cee.”" 
Jeremiah22:15 Bushe, ukukuula iŋanda iya miti iya keda, nangu iŋanda iyacila shonse ku busuma, bushe iwe uleti ekuba imfumu? Bushe wiso talelya no kunwa pamo nga iwe? Lelo ena alecita umulinganya pamo no bololoke, kabili aleshuka nganshi muli fyonsefye ifyo alecita." 
Jeremiah22:16 Abalanda na bapina alebaputwila bwino imilandu, na fyonse fyalebafye bwino, pantu ukucita ifi ekunjishiba ine. Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah22:17 Nomba amenso yobe no mutima obe fyalolafye kukumwenamo ubunonshi bwabucenjeshi, kukusumya umulopa wa bakaele, no kucita ulufyengo no bunkalwe." 
Jeremiah22:18 Kanshi ifi efyo Yawe asosa palwa mfumu Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia imfumu ya calo ca Yuda ukuti, “Takwakabe nangu umo uukamuloosha nga afwa, nangu uwakutila, ‘Owe munyinane! Owe we nkashi nandi, washa wamposa ee!’ Tapakamoneke wakumulila, nangu uwakupunda ati, ‘Owe mulopwe! Yangu imfumu ee!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Ala akashiikwa nga punda, bakamukulila kunse ya mpongolo sha Yerusalemu, eko no kumuposa bakamuposa.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 Kanine pa lupili lwa Lebanoni epo ulebilikisha, uleke ne shiwi lyobe lyumwike mu Bashani. Ubilikishe ukufuma mu Abarimu, pantu bacibusa bobe bonse nababacimfya." 
Jeremiah22:21 Yawe alikusokele iwe pa nshita wali ne shuko, lelo iwe walikene ukumfwa. Kwena iwe efyo ucita ukutulafye na ku bwaice bobe, taufwaya nangu panono ukulabeela Yawe." 
Jeremiah22:22 Icimwela cikolulula bakacema bobe bonse, bacibusa bobe bakasendwa muli bunkole, elyo ukaba ne nsoni kabili ukasebana, ne cikalenga mulandu wa fibi fyonse ifyo iwe ucita." 
Jeremiah22:23 Iwe we waikala mu ŋanda iyakuulilwa ne miti itali iya keda iyafuma ku Lebanoni, yangu ifyo ukateta, ilyo iwe ukaponenwa na macushi, ukalaumfwa ubukali nga filya ciba ku mwanakashi uukomenwe ifumo." 
Jeremiah22:24 Ilyo Konia mwana Yehoyakimu aleteeka icalo ca Yuda, Yawe amwebele ati, “Napalifye ine ne Mumi, iwe nangu wingabafye nge mbalaminwe yabufumu ku kulyo kwandi, ala kuti nakusotolako," 
Jeremiah22:25 nkakuposa na mu minwe ya bantu abalefwaya ukukwipaya, balya bene bantu iwe utiinisha. Nkakuposa kuli Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni na ku bashilika bakwe abena Kaludea." 
Jeremiah22:26 Iwe pamo na noko ine ndemufwintila ku calo cimbi ico mushafyalilwamo, no kufwila imwe bonse babili eko mukafwila." 
Jeremiah22:27 Imwe tamwakatale amubwelela muli cino calo ico mufuluka ukubwelelako.” 
Jeremiah22:28 “Bushe kanshi ulya muntu Konia ali nge nongo iyitobeke, iyo baposele, iyo umuntu nelyo umo ashingafwaya, mwa? Nga nomba ena pamo na bamwane cinshi ico babafwintile mu calo ico bashaishiba?" 
Jeremiah22:29 “We calo, we calo, we calo we, ala kutika kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah22:30 Ifi efyasosa Yawe. Lemba ukuti uyu muntu takwatapo umwana, umuntu uushakatale ashukapo mu bumi bwakwe. Pantu takakwatepo bana abakashuka, abakwikala pa cipuna ca bufumu bwakwa Davidi, nangu ukuteekapo cino calo ca Yuda.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 “Bakacimona bakacema abo abaleonaula umukuni wa bucemi bwandi no kuusalanganya nsale nsale.” Efyasosa Yawe. 
Jeremiah23:2 Eico ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli alesosa kuli bakacema abasunga abantu bakwe. “Namuleka umukuni wandi ukusalangana, tamuusakamene kabili mulekele ulelulumbafye. Ine nkamukanda pa mulandu wa bubifi mwacita,” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah23:3 “Ne mwine wine nine nomba nkakolonganya umukuni wandi uwashalapo, nkaufumya mu fyalo uko nausalanganishishe, nkaubweseshe na muno mwicinka lyauko. Uli nokusanda no kufulilako mu mpendwa." 
Jeremiah23:4 Nkabika bakacema pakati kashiko abakalashisunga. Ninshi nomba tashakatale ashitiina nakabili nangu kututuma, kabili tapakalube nelyo imo.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah23:5 Kabili Yawe asosa ati, “Cine cine inshiku shileisa, ilyo ine nkemisha Davidi Umusambo uwabololoke, imfumu ikalateeka na mano, nokulacita ifyalungama no mulinganya mu calo." 
Jeremiah23:6 Ilyo yena ikaba pa bufumu, abena Yuda bakapusuka, na bena Israeli bakekala umutelelwe. Iyo mfumu bakalaita ishina abati, ‘Yawe e bulungami bwesu.’" 
Jeremiah23:7 “Ee, ine ne Yawe ndesosa nati, inshita imo ikesa ilyo abantu pakulapa ine bakaleka ukulatila, ‘Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Umumi, uwafumishe abena Israeli mu calo ca Egupto.’" 
Jeremiah23:8 Pakulapa ine lyena bakalatilafye, ‘Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Umumi, uwafumishe aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli mu calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso, na mu fyalo fimbi fyonse umo abasalanganisheko.’ Pantu nomba bakalaikalilafye nakabili mu calo cabo abene.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Pa mulandu wa bakasesema asosa ati, “Ine umutima wandi naulepuka, kabili ndeitutuminafye. Ine ndi ngo muntu uukolelwe, ndi ngo muntu uo umwangashi unashishe. No mulandu ulengele, ala ni Yawe, pa mulandu wa mashiwi yakwe ayamushilo." 
Jeremiah23:10 Pantu muli cino calo mwiswile abantu impulumushi, pa mulandu wa fitipu icalo cileloosha, no mwakucemena ifitekwa namo icani nacuma. Bakasesema babutukila ukubifya, na maka yabo baleya bomfyafye icibomfye bomfye.”" 
Jeremiah23:11 Yawe alesosa ati, “Bakasesema na bashimapepo bene tabasakameneko kuli ine ne Lesa nakalya. Ine ndabamona uko bacita ifintu ifyabipa, na mu ŋanda yandi mwine." 
Jeremiah23:12 Na mu nshila mwine umo bapita mukatelela, kabili mwakulafiita fititi. Nakulaleka baleshelelamo, no kuwa balewa. Ine nalaswa mbaletele icinkunka, pantu inshita yakubalimwinapo naipalama.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Ine ndamona ububi bwa bakasesema ba mu calo ca Samaria. Bena ifyakusesema bafifumya kuli Baali, balilufya na bantu bandi abena Israeli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Nomba muli bakasesema ba mu Yerusalemu, ine nalimonamo icabipisha mu micitile yabo. Balacita ubupulumushi, balabepa no bufi, bena balaluminisha na bantu pakuti balebifya, icakuti tapaba nelyo umo uuleka ifyabubifi. Bonsefye ine ndebamona nga bena Sodoma, na bekalamo balifye nga bena Gomora.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Kanshi ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita pali bakasesema ba mu Yerusalemu ati, “Ine ndebalisha ubulembe, ndebanwesha umunwena, pantu ukutampila kuli aba bakasesema, ukunsuula nakukumana mpanga yonse muli cino calo.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita pakweba abena Yerusalemu ati, “Ala imwe mwilaumfwako kufyo balya bakasesema balesesema, pantu bamupeela isubilo ilyabufi. Ifyo bamweba fyakwelenganyafye abene, te fintu ifyo ine mbeba iyoo." 
Jeremiah23:17 Balya bakasesema bakonkanyapo ukweba abantu abasuula ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ukuti, ‘Yawe asosa ati fyonse fikabafye bwino kuli imwe.’ Na bantu bonse abakonkelela ukumalala kwa mitima yabo ebo bena beba ukuti, ‘Takuli icibi icikamucitikila.’”"
