Jeremiah23:18 Pali balya bakasesema, tapaba nelyo umo uwaishiba inkaama shakwa Yawe nakalya. Tapaba nangula umo uwaumfwako nangu uwailuka amashiwi yakwe, tapaba nelyo umo uwakutikako nangu uwasakamanako kufyo Yawe asosa." 
Jeremiah23:19 Ala icipyu cakwa Yawe cili nge cimwela icimine, cili nga kankungwe uuleshunda, akawila na pa mitwe ya bantu babi." 
Jeremiah23:20 Icipyu cakwa Yawe tacapwe, mpakafye akacite fyonse ifyo apanga ukucita. Mu kuya kwa inshiku abantu bakwe bakasuka bakateshe bwino uyu mulandu." 
Jeremiah23:21 Yawe elyo asosa ati, “Balya bakasesema tene nabatuma iyoo, lelo bena baya balepitanamofye. Ine nshabebapo nelyo fimo, lelo bena pakusesema ninefye balumbula." 
Jeremiah23:22 Abeshiba inkaama shandi, lyena nga kuti balaebako abantu bandi amashiwi yandi, nga kuti balayalulula na bantu pakuti baleke imikalile yabo iyibi, ne micitile yabo iyabipa." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Ine ndi Lesa uwaba mpanga yonse, ine nshaba mu ncende imofye yeka iyoo.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah23:24 “Umuntu teti abelame pamo apo ine ningafilwa ukumumona. Bushe imwe tamwaishiba ukuti ine nalikumana umulu ne sonde batiini?” Efyasosa Yawe. 
Jeremiah23:25 “Ine nalishiba ifilanda bakasesema abasesema ifyabufi mwishina lyandi. Basosa ukuti, ‘Ine nindota, ine nindota.’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Bushe kwena balya bakasesema bakaleka lilali ukulabepa, no kulaelenganya ifintu mu mitima yabo?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Bena batontonkanya ukuti ifiloto ifyo balondolola no kwebana, efikalenga ukuti abantu bakandabeko, nga filya fine ifikolwe fyabo fyalabile ishina lyandi no kulapepa Baali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Leka kasesema uulotelepo iciloto alondolole iciloto cakwefye, nomba kasesema uo ine njebelepo ishiwi lyandi leka asalanganye mu cishinka ishiwi lyandi. Bushe imisungu ne ŋanu nafilingana, mwa?" 
Jeremiah23:29 Bushe ine ishiwi lyandi talyaba ngo mulilo, nangu nge nondo iyitobaula ifimabwe?” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah23:30 “Kanshi nine ne Yawe nati ndelimuna balya bakasesema abebishanya amashiwi, no kulayasalanganya kwati mashiwi yandi." 
Jeremiah23:31 Mona, ne Yawe ndelimuna bakasesema bene balya ababomfya indimi shabo elyo balelanda ukuti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Yawe.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Ine nimfulilwa bakasesema abasesema ifiloto ifyabufi,” efyasosa Yawe. “Balashimikilako abantu bandi ifiloto fyabo, no kubalufya ku bufi bwabo no kupusauka kwabo. Lelo ine tene nabatuma nangu ukubasonta, eico kanshi teti bacitepo nelyo cimo icakwafwilisha abantu,” efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah23:33 Kabili Yawe asosele ati, “Umo mu bantu aba atemwa kasesema umo nangu shimapepo umo, nga akwipusha iwe Yeremia ati, ‘Bushe icisendo cakwa Yawe cinshi?’ Iwe mwasukefye auti, ‘Iwe wine niwe cisendo cakwa Yawe, no kukufuntula alaswa akufuntule panshi.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Kabili nga cakuti kasesema, nangu shimapepo nangu umuntu uuli onse asosa ati, ‘Amashiwi yakwa Yawe, ala cisendo,’ ninshi ine nkamulimuna, nkalimuna na ba mu ŋanda yakwe." 
Jeremiah23:35 Ifi efyo mwakulalanda cila muntu ku munankwe nangu kuli munyina ifyakuti, ‘Bushe Yawe aswikepo finshi’ nangu ‘Bushe Yawe atilepo shani?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Eico nomba mwilabwekeshapo ukusosa amashiwi ayakuti, ‘Amashiwi yakwa Yawe, ala cisendo,’ pantu amashiwi ya muntu yene eyasanguka icisendo, eyalenga no kufulunganya amashiwi yakwa Lesa umumi, Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wesu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Kanshi ifi efyo mwakulalanda kuli kasesema amuti, ‘Bushe Yawe aswikepo finshi,’ nangu ‘Bushe Yawe atilepo shani?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Lelo nga mwalanda ukuti ifi efyasosa Yawe ifyakuti, ‘Amashiwi yakwa Yawe, ala cisendo,’ nomba pa mulandu wakuti mwalanda aya mashiwi ayakuti, ‘Amashiwi yakwa Yawe, ala cisendo,’ ilyo nalimwebele ukukanalanda," 
Jeremiah23:39 cine cinefye ine nkesa bemya, nkabafwintila ukutali, uleke bakafume pa cinso candi. Bonse bene nkabafwintila ukutali kumo kwine no musumba wine, uyo ine nabapeele pamo ne fikolwe fyabo." 
Jeremiah23:40 Kabili ine nkabasebanya, no kubaletela insoni isha pe, isho bashakatale abalaba nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Yawe alinangile imiseke ibili umwali amakunyu, neyo miseke yali pantanshi ye Tempele lyakwa Yawe. Ici cali panuma lintu Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni aikete Yekonia mwana Yehoyakimu, uwaleteeka icalo ca Yuda, pamo ne ntungulushi sha mu Yuda na balebasa ifyakubasabasa na balefula ifyakufulafula, ukubafumya mu Yerusalemu no kubasenda bonse muli bunkole ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah24:2 Mu museke umo mwali amakunyu ayasuma nganshi, yalya yabangililapo ukupya. Nomba mu museke ubiye mwena mwalifye amakunyu ayabi nganshi, ayabola ayo umuntu ashingalya na kulya." 
Jeremiah24:3 Elyo Yawe anjipusha ati, “Yeremia, bushe finshi iwe wamona?” Na ine nayasuka nati, “Makunyu. Ayawemepo yali ayasuma nganshi, na yabipilepo yali ayabipisha nganshi, ayabola ayo muntu ashingalya na kulya.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Kanshi ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli ati, ‘Ndemona ukuti balya ine mfumishe muli cino calo ca Yuda, no kubatwala muli bunkole ku bena Kaludea, bali nga aya makunyu ayasuma." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ine nakulabalinda no kubacitila ifisuma, kabili nkababwesesha na muli cino cine calo. Ine nkabakosha, nshakabonaule iyoo. Nkabalimba, nshakabanukule iyoo." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ine nkabapeela umutima wakwishiba ukuti nine Yawe. Elyo nabo bakaba abantu abandifye, na ine nkaba Lesa uwabofye, pantu bakabwelela kuli ine no mutima wabo onse.’" 
Jeremiah24:8 “Elyo Sedekia imfumu ya cino calo ca Yuda, pamo na bacilolo na bashelemo mu Yerusalemu, abakashala muli cino calo pamo na bekala mu Egupto, bena ine ne Yawe nkabacitafye bonse nga aya makunyu ayabi, ayo umuntu ashingalya na kulya." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ine nkabaponesha ishamo ilyakuti likaletele na bantu ba mishobo yonse iya pano isonde umwenso. Abantu bambi bakalabashobola, bakalabawela no kulabasenteka. Na konsefye uko ine nkabasalanganishisha, bambi bakalabula ishina lyabo elyo bakalelumbula pakutipwila." 
Jeremiah24:10 Nkababushisha inkondo, nkabaponesha icipowe no kubaletela icikuko, mpakafye mwikashala nelyo umo muli cino calo, ico ine nabapeele pamo ne fikolwe fyabo.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Ilyo Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia ateekele icalo ca Yuda, mu mwaka walengele ine uwakuba pa bufumu, Yeremia alipokelele amashiwi kuli Yawe palwa bena Yuda bonse. Uyo wine mwaka ewali uwakubalilapo ilyo Nebukadinesa atampile ukuba imfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah25:2 Kanshi Yeremia nao epakulabilila abena Yuda bonse na bena Yerusalemu bonse imbila iyakuti," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Pa myaka amakumi yabili na itatu (23), ukutulafye mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na itatu (13) apo Yosia mwana Amosi atampile ukuteeka cino calo ca Yuda ukushintafye na lelo, Yawe alalanda kuli ine amashiwi ayo na ine nanda kuli imwe ifyo anjeba, lelo imwe mwalikaana ukumfwa." 
Jeremiah25:3 “Pa myaka amakumi yabili na itatu (23), ukutulafye mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na itatu (13) apo Yosia mwana Amosi atampile ukuteeka cino calo ca Yuda ukushintafye na lelo, Yawe alalanda kuli ine amashiwi ayo na ine nanda kuli imwe ifyo anjeba, lelo imwe mwalikaana ukumfwa." 
Jeremiah25:4 Imwe tamufwaya kumfwa nelyo ukuposako amano, nangu Yawe ena abikapofye ukulamutumina ababomfi bakwe bakasesema bonse." 
Jeremiah25:5 Imwe balimweba ukutila, ‘Pilibukeni umuntu no muntu, muleke imisango yenu iyabipa ne micitile yenu iyibi, pakuti muleikala muli cino calo ico Yawe amupeele pamo ne fikolwe fyenu, pakuti eco muleikwatila pe." 
Jeremiah25:6 Mwilakonka imilungu imbi imbi nangufye ukulaipepa no kulaibombela. Mwilabilimuna ine umutima kulwa kupepa utulubi uto iminwe yenu yapanga. Na ine nshakamuletele ububi.’ 
Jeremiah25:7 Lelo mwalikaana ukumfwa ifyo nsosa ne Yawe. Mwalimbilimuna umutima kulwa tulubi twenu uto iminwe yenu yapanga, utwalenga ukuti muiletelele mwe bene." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Kanshi nomba apo imwe mushifwaya kumfwa amashiwi yandi, ne Yawe umwine wa fita ndeti," 
Jeremiah25:9 ‘Ine nalaita abantu bonse aba ku kapinda ka ku kuso, nalaita no mubomfi wandi Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni. Nalaita abantu ba ilya mishobo pakuti bese basanse cino calo na bekalamo bene, bese basanse na bantu ba mishobo yonse iyaba mumbali yaciko. Nalabalofyafye nakalya nakalya no kubacita icakutiinya ne cakupapa kabili ifibolya ifya pe na pe. Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah25:10 Utupundu twabo utwansansa no twakwanga, ine nkatupwisha. Nkapwisha ne nsansa sha bashibwinga na banabwinga, nkatalalika ne ciunda ca mabwe ayakupelelako, nkashimya no lubuuto lwa fisaniko fyabo." 
Jeremiah25:11 Cino calo conse calashala amatololo umwabula abakwilamo. Na bantu ba iyi mishobo yonse bakabombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni pa myaka amakumi cine lubali (70). 
Jeremiah25:12 Iyo myaka amakumi cine lubali (70) nga yapwa, elyo ine nkalimuna imfumu ya ku Babiloni kumo kwine na bantu ba ulya wine mushobo pa kubifya kwabo. Nkonaula cilya calo ca bena Kaludea no kucisha amatololo pe na pe.’ Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah25:13 ‘Cilya calo nkacicita fyonse ifyo nacipangila, fyonsefye ifyalembwa muli ici citabo ifyo Yeremia aseseme palwa bantu ba mishobo yonse." 
Jeremiah25:14 Pantu abantu ba iyi mishobo nabo bene bakateekwapo ubusha ku bantu ba mishobo imbi iyingi na ku shamfumu ishikalamba, kabili nkabalimuna pakulinganya nefyo bacita nefyo bapanga abene.’”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Ifi efyasosele Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli kuli ine ati, “Buula ulukombo ulu ululi mu minwe yandi ulo njiswishemo icipyu, kanweshemo abantu ba mishobo yonse abo ine nalakutumako." 
Jeremiah25:16 Ilyo balenwamo, bakulatalansuka, na mano yabo yalefulungana pa mulandu wa nkondo iyo nalababushisha.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Awe na ine napoka ulukombo mu minwe yakwa Yawe no kunwesha imishobo yonse iyo antumineko. 
Jeremiah25:18 Naya nweshamo abena Yerusalemu na bantu abaikala mu misumba yonse iya mu calo ca Yuda, kumo kwine ne shamfumu shabo na bacilolo babo bene, pakuti bonaike, bashale insansalila, pakuti bashale ifibolya, icintu icakutiinya, icakuwelwa no kutipwilako." 
Jeremiah25:19 Na bambi abo naile nweshamo ni Farao imfumu ya mu calo ca Egupto, na bacilolo bakwe, ne ntungulushi shakwe, na bena Egupto bonse," 
Jeremiah25:20 na benafyalo bonse abaikelemo. Kabili bambi ni bashamfumu aba mu calo ca Usi, ne shamfumu shonse ishali mu misumba ya mu calo ca Bafilisiti, emukuti imfumu ya mu Ashikeloni, ne ya mu Gasa, ne ya mu Ekironi, ne mfumu ya mu Ashidodi na bashelemo." 
Jeremiah25:21 Na bambi e bena Edomu bonse, na bena Moabu bonse, na bena Amoni bonse," 
Jeremiah25:22 ne shamfumu shonse isha mu Turi, ne sha mu Sidoni, ne shamfumu shonse isha mu fyalo fya lu lulamba lwa Meditelaneani no kwabuka bemba," 
Jeremiah25:23 ne ya mu musumba wa Dedani, ne ya mu musumba wa Tema, ne ya mu musumba wa Busi, nabalya bonse ababeya imisoso." 
Jeremiah25:24 Na shimbi ni shamfumu shonse isha mu Arabia, ne shamfumu shonse isha bantu ba mitundu yonse iyaikala mu matololo," 
Jeremiah25:25 ne shamfumu shonse isha mu calo ca Simuri, ne sha mu calo ca Elami, ne sha mu calo ca Media," 
Jeremiah25:26 ne shamfumu shonse isha ku kapinda ka ku kuso, ishaba mupepi ne shaba ukutali kwine, ukulingana nomo shakonkanine. Abantu ba mishobo yonse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse bali nokunwamo. Na pakulekelesha iyikanwamo ni mfumu ya ku Sheshaki, e ku Babiloni kwine." 
Jeremiah25:27 Sosa kuli bena auti, “Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli aleti, ‘Nweni, mukolwe no kuluka muleluka, musuke muwe, mufilwe no kwima pa mulandu wa nkondo iyo ine nalamubushisha.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 Nga bakaana ukupoka ulukombo mu minwe yobe no kunwamo, iwe ubebefye ukuti ni Yawe umwine wa fita eusosele ukuti, ‘Ala, muli nokunwamofye!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Moneni, apo ine ntendekelepo ukonaula umusumba uwitwa peshina lyandi, bushe imwe muletontonkanya ukuti mulepusukako? Awe nakalya, mukalimunwa, pantu ine ndeleta inkondo ku ba pano isonde bonse.’” Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah25:30 “Iwe Yeremia uli nokusoka aba bantu pakusesema aya mashiwi yandi yonse ayo ine nandile. Uli nokweba aba bantu auti, “Yawe nabuluma mu mulu, nasansula ishiwi lyakwe ukufuma ku cifulo cakwe icamushilo. Nabulumina abantu bakwe, napundisha ngo muntu uulekasa ifitwalo fya myangashi, napundilila bonsefye abekala pano isonde." 
Jeremiah25:31 Iciunda ce shiwi lyakwe cikomfwika no kwapelela isonde, pantu abantu ba mishobo yonse Yawe nabapeela umulandu. Naleta abantu bonse ku cilye kukupingulwa, elyo akepaya ababi ku nkondo.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah25:32 Kabili Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Moneni. Icinkunka cili nokusalangana pa bantu ba mishobo yonse, ne cimwela nacima, ciletula ukwapelela icalo.”" 
Jeremiah25:33 Pali ubo bushiku ifitumbi fya bantu abo Yawe alaswa epaye, fikalalafye ntangali ntangali ukuya shintafye no kwapelela isonde. Tapakamoneke no wakubaloosha, tapakamoneke no wakulonganya ifitumbi fyabo nangufye ukufishiika. Fyakulatulumanafye nge mina ya citindi." 
Jeremiah25:34 Imwe mwe bakacema, ikatisheni imisowa, pundisheni. Mulealangana na mu lukungu mwe ntungulushi sha mukuni. Pantu inshita yakumonawilapo naifika, mwalaonaika nga basukusuku abainisha, mwalatobaika panshi ngo mutondo." 
Jeremiah25:35 Abacemi tabakamone kwakubutukila, intungulushi sha mukuni tashakapusuke." 
Jeremiah25:36 Umfweni ukukuuta kwa bacemi no kulila kwa ntungulushi sha mukuni, pantu Yawe nalofya impanga sha mulemfwe." 
Jeremiah25:37 Ne calo icali icamutelelwe naconaulwa, pa mulandu wa cipyu cakwe icikali." 
Jeremiah25:38 Yawe nafuma mu cifulo cakwe nge nkalamo, ne calo conse cishelefye amatololo, pantu ulupanga lwabonaushi nalubakoma, pa mulandu wa cipyu cakwe icikali." 
Jeremiah26:1 Ilyofye Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia ali pa bufumu ubwakuteeka icalo ca Yuda, ili shiwi lyafumine kuli Yawe aliti," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, keminine mu lubansa lwa mukati ulwa ku ŋanda yandi, na bantu bonse abaletula mu misumba ya muli cino calo ca Yuda, abaleisa kukupepa, ulebeba fyonsefye ifyo ine nakukonkomesha ukubeba. Tecakwesha ukushapo nangu cimo iyoo." 
Jeremiah26:3 Nalimo abantu kuti baumfwa, baleka ne misango yabo iyibi. Nga bacita ifyo, ine ninshi nkabwesha umutima, nshakabaponeshe icinkunka ico napanga ukubaponesha pa mulandu wa micitile yabo iyibi.”" 
Jeremiah26:4 “Ubebe ukutila, ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, ‘Nalamweba ifikacitika nga cakuti tamuleumfwila no kunakila amafunde yandi ayo ine namupeela," 
Jeremiah26:5 kabili nga tamuleposa amano ku mashiwi ya babomfi bandi bakasesema, abo ine nabikapofye ukutuma lyonse, nangu tamwatala amubeela ifyo bamweba." 
Jeremiah26:6 Kanshi nga tamulekonka ifi fintu balemweba, ninshi iyi ŋanda yandi iyakumpepelamo nkaicitafye nga filya fine nacitile ku Shilo. Kabili abantu ba mishobo pano isonde bakalabuula ishina lya uno musumba elyo bakalelumbula pakutipwila.’”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Bashimapepo na bakasesema na bantu bambi bonse balyumfwileko uko Yeremia alesosa fyonse ifi mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. 
Jeremiah26:8 Kutifye cilya Yeremia apwa ukusosa fyonsefye ifyo Yawe amukonkomeshe ukubeba, awe bashimapepo na bakasesema na bantu bene bambi baikata Yeremia, balapunda no kupunda abati, “Iwe ulefwa pali uyu mulandu!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Cinshi ico iwe ulelumbwila ifi mwishina lyakwa Yawe, pakulalanda ukuti eukwebele ukuti ino ŋanda yakwe ikaba nga filya fyaba ku Shilo, nokuti uno musumba ukonaika ukashala amatololo, tamwakabe nelyo umo uukekalamo?” Abantu bonse epakushinga Yeremia mulya mwine mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah26:10 Bacilolo ba mu Yuda bati bomfwe ifi fintu, nabo bafuma kwisano, baya ikala na pa mpongolo ipya iyakwingililapo mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah26:11 Elyo bashimapepo na bakasesema balaeba bacilolo na bantu bambi bonse abati, “Uyu muntu nalinga ukupingula ukufwa, pantu ifyo alelanda, fyakupangilafye uno musumba. Nemwe bene namuyumfwila na matwi yenu.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Yeremia ena epakweba bacilolo bonse na bantu bambi bonse ati, “Ine ni Yawe euntumine ukwisa sobela fyonsefye ifyo imwe mumfwile ifikaponena ino ŋanda yakwe na uno wine musumba." 
Jeremiah26:13 Kanshi imwe muli nokwalula imisango yenu ne micitile yenu, mulebeela na mashiwi yakwa Yawe Lesa wenu. Ninshi lyena Yawe akabwesha umutima, takamuletele icinkunka ico apanga ukumuletela." 
Jeremiah26:14 Elyo ine, awe ndifye mu minwe yenu. Ncitenifye conse ico mulemona ukuti eciweme." 
Jeremiah26:15 Lelo kwena mushininkishepo cimo icakuti nga mwanjipaya, ninshi imwe kumo kwine na bantu ba muli uno musumba mulekwatilapo umulandu uwakunjipaya ine ne wakaele, pantu ni Yawe euntumine ukwisa mweba imwe aya mashiwi mumfwile na matwi yenu.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Elyo bacilolo na bantu bambi baeba bashimapepo na bakasesema abati, “Uyu muntu kwena talingile kufwa iyoo, pantu pakwisa tweba alumbwile Yawe Lesa wesu ukuti cine cine eumutumine.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Elyo abakalamba bamo baima, balaeba abantu abalongenepo abati," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Ilyo Hesekia aleteeka cino calo ca Yuda, kasesema Mika umwina Moresheti alyebeleko abantu bonse ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita fyonse aletila ati, “‘Sioni bakamulima nge bala, Yerusalemu akasanguka umwina wa fitantala, no lupili apaba iŋanda yandi ine ne Lesa lukasapilwa, pakabefye umutengo.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 “Hesekia uwaleteeka cino calo ca Yuda pamo na bantu bene tabaipeye Mika iyoo. Hesekia alitiinine Yawe, alamupapata no kumupapata pakuti amunakilishe. Na Yawe asuka abwesha umutima, akaana no kubaletela icinkunka ico apangile ukubaletela. Nomba ifwe tulefwayafye ukuiletelela fwe bene icinkunka icamaka nganshi.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Kwaliko no muntu umbi mwana Shemaia, ishina lyakwe ni Uria, uwafumine ku musumba wa Kiriati Yarimu, aliseseme pakusobela ishamo ilya uno musumba nelya bantu bene aba muli cino calo ngefyo Yeremia acitile." 
Jeremiah26:21 Ilyo imfumu Yehoyakimu pamo na bashilika baiko bonse na bacilolo baiko bonse baumfwile ifyo Uria alandile, imfumu yafwaile ukumwipaya. Uria ena ati omfwe, aikatwa no mwenso, afulumukila na ku calo ca Egupto." 
Jeremiah26:22 Elyo imfumu Yehoyakimu yatuma Elinatani mwana Akibo pamo na bantu bambi ku Egupto, kukuya buula Uria." 
Jeremiah26:23 Nabo baya fumya Uria mu Egupto, bamuleta na ku mfumu Yehoyakimu, nayo epakumwipaya no lupanga, yaposa ne citumbi cakwe mu nindi ya mu nshinshi ya bapabi." 
Jeremiah26:24 Lelo Yeremia ena ishuko akwete nicofye alipo na umo uwakumusoselako, nao ni Aikamu mwana Shafani, eico ena tapeelwe ku bantu ukuti bamwipaye." 
Jeremiah27:1 Ilyofye Sedekia mwana Yosia atendeke ukulateeka icalo ca Yuda, ili shiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia." 
Jeremiah27:2 Yawe anjeba ati, “Ipangile ikoli ku myando ne fimuti, no kulikakila mu mukoshi obe." 
Jeremiah27:3 Elyo utume amashiwi ku mfumu ya ku Edomu, na ku mfumu ya ku Moabu, ne ya ku Amoni, ne ya ku Turi, ne ya ku Sidoni, ukupitila mu nkombe shashiko isho ishaishile ku Yerusalemu kukumona Sedekia imfumu ya mu Yuda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Ukonkomeshe inkombe pakuti shiye eba imfumu shabo ukutila, ‘Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli. Muye eba bakateeka benu aya mashiwi." 
Jeremiah27:5 Ine ku maka yandi ayashaikulila na ku bulambafye bwandi, nine nabumba isonde na bantu ne nama ishaba mwisonde lyonse. Kabili ine kuti napeela onsefye uo ndefwaya ukupeela." 
Jeremiah27:6 Nomba nine wine mbuulile ifyalo fyonse ifi, no kufipeela ku mubomfi wandi Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni. Nine wine ndekele ne nama shine isha mpanga shilemubombela." 
Jeremiah27:7 Abantu ba mishobo yonse bakulamubombela, bakalabombela na mwane wine umwaume, no mwishikulu wakwe wine, ukushintafye napo abantu ba mishobo yakwe bakacimbila. Elyo ninshi abantu ba mishobo iyingi ne shamfumu ishikalamba bakamucita umusha wabo." 
Jeremiah27:8 “‘Nomba abantu ba mushobo umo, atemwa aba bufumu bwa calo cimo, nga bakaana ukulabombela Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni, nangufye ukulanakila amafunde yakwe, ninshi abantu ba uyo mushobo ine nkabalimuna pakubabushisha inkondo. Nkabaponesha icipowe, no kubaletela icikuko, elyo uyo mushobo nkaulofya ku kuboko kwakwa Nebukadinesa." 
Jeremiah27:9 Kanshi imwe mwilaumfwako kuli bakasesema benu, nangu kuli bakabuka benu, ku belula ifiloto atemwa ku fyakwipusha imipashi ya bantu abafwa, atemwa ku fyamalele yabofye, abamweba ukuti tamwakabombele imfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:10 Ala imwe bamusesemenafye ifyabufi, kabili ebakaleka nokuti bambi bakese mufumyamo mu calo cenu, bakamutwale na kumbi kumbifye. Kwena ine nkamutamfyamo, no kuloba mukalobelapo." 
Jeremiah27:11 Nomba abantu ba mushobo umo nga banakila imfumu ya ku Babiloni no kulaibombela, bena ine ninshi nkabaleka bakaleikalila ku matwi tondolo mu calo cabo. Nkaleka bakalelima ifyakulya, no kulaikalila.’ Ifi efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Aya yene amashiwi yamo yene nalyebeleko imfumu Sedekia iyaleteeka icalo ca Yuda nati, “Iwe ala nakilafye imfumu ya ku Babiloni, akuibombela, ulebombela na bantu baiko, pantu lyena ninshi walaikala umumi." 
Jeremiah27:13 Nga cinshi ico iwe pamo na bantu bobe mwingafwaila ukufwa ku nkondo, atemwa ku cipowe, atemwa ku cikuko? Pantu eifi fine fintu ifyo Yawe apanga ukuletela abantu ba mushobo onse uwakaana ukulabombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:14 Iwe wilaumfwako kuli bakasesema abalekulesha ukubombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni. Ala fyabufifye balesesema kuli iwe. 
Jeremiah27:15 Yawe umwine ewasosa ukuti tewabatuma iyoo, bakubepafye pakulasesema mwishina lyakwe. E mulandu wine Yawe akakutamfisha muno muntu, no kukwipaila pamo na bakasesema abalekubepa mukusesema ifi fyonse.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Elyo kabili nalyebeleko bashimapepo na bantu bambi bonse nati, “Ifi efyasosa Yawe. Ala imwe mwilaumfwako kuli bakasesema benu abalemweba ukuti ifipe fya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe balaswa bafibweshe bwangu ukufuma ku Babiloni pantu bufifye balemubepa." 
Jeremiah27:17 Mwilaumfwako mwe bantu mwe. Imwe akubombelenifye imfumu ya ku Babiloni, epakuti muleikala abomi. Nga mulandu nshi uno musumba wingasangukila amatololo?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Nga ni bakasesema bene bene, kabili nga bali ne shiwi lyakwa Yawe, ninshi kanshi kabese bapapate Yawe pakuti ifipe ifyashalapo mu Yerusalemu mu ŋanda yakwe, ne fipe ifyashalapo mwisano lya mfumu ya cino calo, beleka nafyo bafisende ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita alanda palwa inceshi no musambilo ne fyakutekapo ifipe na fimbipo ifyashele muli uyu musumba. 
Jeremiah27:20 Ifi fipe Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni tayafisendele ilyo yaikete Yekonia mwana Yehoyakimu imfumu ya bena Yuda, no kumusenda mu busha ku Babiloni ukumufumya mu Yerusalemu pamo pene na basambashi bakwe bonse aba mu calo ca Yuda na ba mu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah27:21 Kanshi imwe umfweni ifyo Yawe umwine wa fita Lesa wakwa Israeli alelanda palwa fipe ifyashalapo mu Yerusalemu mu ŋanda yakwe, ne fyashalapo mwisano lya mfumu ya mu Yuda na mu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah27:22 Ifyo fipe bakafibuula, bakafitwala na ku Babiloni no kwikala eko fikekala, ukushintafye napo ine nkafiposelako amano. Lyena elyo ine nkafibwesesha muno mu ncende. Efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Muli uyo wine mwaka, emukuti mu mwaka walengele ine iya buteko bwakwa Sedekia ukuba imfumu ku calo ca Yuda, mu mweshi walenga isano, emo kasesema Hanania mwana Asuri, umwina Gibeoni, alandile kuli ine mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Ni pa cinso ca bashimapepo na bantu bambi bonse epo Hanania anjebele atile," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, atile ati, ‘Ine ne Yawe nimputula ikoli lya mfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah28:3 Pa myaka ibili ninshi nabwesesha muno calo ifipefye fyonse ifyafumine mu ŋanda ifyo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni afumishe kuno no kutwala ku Babiloni. 
Jeremiah28:4 Na Yekonia wine mwana Yehoyakimu uwaleteeka cino calo ca Yuda, nao wine nkamubwesha pamo pene na bankole bonse abo bafumya muli cino calo ca Yuda no kubatwala ku Babiloni. Ala ine nimputula ikoli lya mfumu ya ku Babiloni. Efyasosa Yawe.’”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Elyo nao kasesema Yeremia alaeba kasesema Hanania pa cinso ca bashimapepo, na bantu bambi bonse abaiminine mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe ati," 
Jeremiah28:6 “Ameni, ala na ine wine kwena kuti natemwa. Ndetetekela ukuti efyo Yawe akacita. Ndetetekela ukuti Yawe akafikilisha fyonse ifyo iwe walanda, nokuti ku Babiloni akafumyako ifipe fyonse ifya mu ŋanda yakwe, no kufibwesesha muno calo pamo na bantu bonse abasendwa muli bunkole." 
Jeremiah28:7 Lelo kwena iwe Hanania umfwa ifyo ine nalakweba pamo pene na bantu bambi bonse abaleumfwako. 
Jeremiah28:8 Bakasesema abaliko ilyo ine na iwe wine tushilati tubeko, ala balisobele ukutula na ku kale ukuti kukaba inkondo, ne cinkunka, ne cikuko, ifikeshila ifyalo ifingi ifyateekwa ne shamfumu ishikalamba." 
Jeremiah28:9 Nomba kasesema uulesobela palwa cibote, pakushininkisha ukuti ni Yawe eumutumine, awe ena kanofye ifyo alesobela fyatala fyamoneka.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Elyo Hanania akakula ikoli mu mukoshi wakwa Yeremia, alikontaula no kulikontaula." 
Jeremiah28:11 Kabili Hanania alaeba na bantu bonse ati, “Yawe alesosa ati, ‘Efyo na ine nkakontaula ikoli ilyo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni yakaka mu mikoshi ya bantu ba mishobo yonse. Efyo nkacita nga papita imyaka ibili.’” Awe panuma ya ifi, Yeremia aima aya no kuya." 
Jeremiah28:12 Cilya papita inshita apo Hanania akontawilile ikoli ilyali mu mukoshi wakwa Yeremia kasesema, elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Kabiye kuli Hanania, no kuya mweba amashiwi ayakutila, ‘Yawe nasosa ukuti iwe walikwata amaka ayakukontaula ikoli lya fimuti, lelo ena alepyanikishapo ikoli lya cela." 
Jeremiah28:14 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, asosa ukuti abantu ba iyi mishobo yonse alabakaka ikoli lya cela mu mikoshi yabo, uleke balebombela Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni. Nasosa ukuti ne nama sha mpanga shine nasho shakulabombela Nebukadinesa.’”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Elyo kasesema Yeremia aeba Hanania ati, “Umfwa kuno iwe Hanania. Iwe Yawe tewakutuma iyoo, iwe ulelengafye ukuti aba bantu balesuminafye ifyabufi." 
Jeremiah28:16 Eico kanshi Yawe umwine alesosa ati, ‘Umfwa kuno. Nalaswa nkufumyepo mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse. Iwe walafwa muli uno wine mwaka, pantu niwe ulengele ukuti abantu batalamine Yawe.’”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Muli uyu wine mwaka, mu mweshi uwalenga cine lubali, awe kasesema Hanania afwa no kufwa." 
Jeremiah29:1 Kasesema Yeremia epakulemba kalata ukufuma mu Yerusalemu iyakuya ku bakalamba abashelepo pali bankole, na kuli bashimapepo, na kuli bakasesema, na ku bantu bonse abo Nebukadinesa aikete mu Yerusalemu no kubasenda muli bunkole ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah29:2 Alembele uyu kalata panuma ninshi imfumu Yekonia yalifuma mu Yerusalemu, pamo na nyina wa mfumu, kumo kwine na bamutungwi, ne ntungulushi sha mu calo ca Yuda ne sha mu Yerusalemu, na bantu abacenjela mu fyakubasabasa ne fyakufulafula." 
Jeremiah29:3 Abasendele iyi kalata bali ni Elasa mwana Shafani na Gamalia mwana Hilikiya, abo Sedekia imfumu ya ku Yuda atumine kuli Nebukadinesa uwali imfumu ya ku Babiloni. Ne fyali muli iyi kalata fyali nifi." 
Jeremiah29:4 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita Lesa wakwa Israeli alesosa kuli bonse abo asendele ukufuma mu Yerusalemu no kubatwala na ku Babiloni, alemweba ati," 
Jeremiah29:5 “Mulekuula amayanda ayakwikalamo. Mulelima na mabala, no kulalya ifyo mulelima." 
Jeremiah29:6 Muleupana no kulafyala abana abaume na banakashi. Salileni abana benu abaume abakashana abakuti baleupana nabo, fwaileni na bana benu abanakashi abaume abakubopa, pakuti nabo balefyala abana abaume na banakashi pakuti mulesanduluka, mwilacepelako iyoo," 
Jeremiah29:7 Kabili mulebombafye bwino imilimo iyakuwamya umusumba, uo ine namutwalako muli bunkole. Mulepepa kuli ine pakuti ine ndesenamina uyo musumba, pantu nga wakwata ishuko, nemwe bene ninshi e shuko lyenu.”" 
Jeremiah29:8 Cacine ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita Lesa wakwa Israeli asosa ati, “Mwileka bakasesema na bakabuka abali pakati kenu ukulamubepa. Mwilaumfwa na ku filoto ifyo balota." 
Jeremiah29:9 Bena bamwebafye ifyabufi ilyo basosa ukuti nine mbatumine. Ala ine nshabatuma nakalya.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe. 
Jeremiah29:10 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Ilyo imyaka amakumi cine lubali (70) ikapwa iyo napimina Babiloni, elintu ine nkamuposako amano, kabili elintu ine nkafikilisha ne cilayo candi icakumubwesesha kuno mwenu." 
Jeremiah29:11 Pantu ine nalishiba amapange namukwatila ukumucitila.” Efyasosa Yawe. “Nakwata amapange yakumuletela ishuko teyabubi, lelo mapange yakumupeela isubilo ne shuko kuntanshi." 
Jeremiah29:12 Lyena mukalankuuta. Mukalaisa mukulampepa, na ine nkalamumfwa." 
Jeremiah29:13 Mukamfwaya, no kunsanga mukansanga, nga mwamfwaya ne mitima yenu yonse." 
Jeremiah29:14 Imwe mukansanga, na ine nkamubwesha muli cino calo cenu. Ine nkamufumya mu fyalo fyonse, na mu ncende shonsefye umo namusalanganishisha, nkamulonganika, nkamubwesesha na muli cino calo umo nalekele bamwikate no kumusenda muli bunkole.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah29:15 Imwe mwe bantu mulalanda ukuti uko kwine ku Babiloni mwalikwatako bakasesema abo Yawe amupeela. 
Jeremiah29:16 Ifi efyo Yawe asosa palwa mfumu iyapyana pa cipuna cakwa Davidi, na palwa bantu abekala muli uno musumba, emukuti bamunyinenwe abashasendelweko muli bunkole nga imwe." 
Jeremiah29:17 Cacine ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, “Ine nkababushisha inkondo, nkabaponesha icipowe no kubaletela icikuko, nkabasangulafye nga makunyu ayabola, ayo umuntu ashingalya nakalya." 
Jeremiah29:18 Nkabemisha inkondo ne cipowe ne cikuko, kabili nkabalenga ukuba icakupapa ku fyalo fyonse ifya pano isonde, bakaba abatipwa, abakutiinya, abawelwa, kabili abasebana mukati ka mishobo yonse umo nkabasalanganisha." 
Jeremiah29:19 Neci ni pa mulandu wakuti balikaana ukulakonka amashiwi yandi ayo ine nabikapofye ukulabeba,” efyasosa Yawe, “ayo mbatumina ukupitila mu babomfi bandi bakasesema.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah29:20 Kanshi umfweni amashiwi yakwa Yawe imwe bonse mwe bankole mwebo nalekele bamwikate ukufuma mu Yerusalemu, no kumusenda ku Babiloni," 
Jeremiah29:21 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, pali Ahabu mwana Kolaya, na pali Sedekia mwana Maaseya, abasesema ifyabufi mwishina lyakwa Yawe. Alesosa ati, “Nkabaposa kuli Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni, nao Nebukadinesa akabepaila pa menso yenu." 
Jeremiah29:22 Elyo abantu abo baikata mu Yerusalemu no kubasenda muli bunkole ku Babiloni, ilyo bakalatipwilapo umo, bena bakalatilafye, ‘Yawe iwe nakulimune nga filya fine alimwine Sedekia na Ahabu, abo imfumu ya ku Babiloni yaocele mu mulilo.’" 
Jeremiah29:23 Pa mulandu wakuti balicita ifyamusebanya mu Israeli, ukucita ubupulumushi na bakashi ba bena mupalamano, no kulabomfya ishina lyandi ukulanda amashiwi ayo nshabakonkomeshe. Nomba nalishiba, kabili nine kambone, efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Eba Shemaia umwina Nelamu amashiwi aya. 
Jeremiah29:25 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita Lesa wakwa Israeli aleti, “Iwe Shemaia waitendekefye ukutuma kalata ku bena Yerusalemu bonse, na kuli shimapepo Sefania mwana Maaseya, na kuli bashimapepo bambi bonse, umo walembele auti," 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Yawe niwe Sefania abika pali bushimapepo, Yehoiyada ena alimusha, nomba niwe mubomfi mukalamba mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Kanshi iwe waba no mulimo uwakumona ukuti ishilu lyonse ilileicita nga kasesema, iwe ulelikaka iminyololo, no kulibika mwikoli lya cela." 
Jeremiah29:27 Nga nomba cinshi ico iwe usha cilimina uyo Yeremia umwina Anatoti, uusesemena abantu kwati ni kasesema?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Yeremia alilembela ifwe fwe bali ku Babiloni ukuti tukakokolako nganshi muli bunkole, eico tuli nokulakuula amayanda ayakwikalamo, no kulalima amabala, no kulalya ifyo tulelimako.’”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Shimapepo Sefania nao epakubelengelako kasesema Yeremia uyu wine kalata. 
Jeremiah29:30 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia 
Jeremiah29:31 ukutuma amashiwi kuli bankole bonse abali ku Babiloni, no kubebako amashiwi ayo Yawe umwine alandile pali Shemaia umwina Nelamu ayakutila, “Pantu Shemaia alemweba imwe amashiwi kwati ni kasesema nelyo tene namutuma nakalya, kabili ena nalenga nokuti imwe musuminefye ifyabufi," 
Jeremiah29:32 eico ine ne Lesa ndetila, ala Shemaia nkamukanda, na bamwane bene nkabakandila kumo. Ena takashalepo no mwana nelyo umo uukasangwako kukushuukila ifisuma ifyo ine nkapeela abantu bandi, pantu ewasongelekanya abantu pakuti bansangukile.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah30:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine ne Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli ati, ‘Fyonsefye ifyo ine nkweba, ufilembe mu citabo cimo," 
Jeremiah30:3 pantu inshita yalafika,’ efyasosa Yawe, ‘ilyo ine nalaleka abantu bandi abena Israeli na bena Yuda babwele nakabili. Nalababwesesha muli cino calo ico napeele ifikolwe fyabo, calaba nakabili icabofye.’ Efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Yawe alanda ku bena Israeli na bena Yuda amashiwi ayakuti," 
Jeremiah30:5 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Twaumfwa inkuuta iyakutiinya nganshi, ni nkuuta iyamwenso, teyamutende iyoo." 
Jeremiah30:6 Kanshi nomba taleni kutumaneni, mutontonkanyepo. Bushe umwaume kuti afyalapo umwana? Nga kanshi cinshi ico ndemwena, uko umwaume onse uwamaka naikata amaboko pa mala ngo mwanakashi uuli pakupaapa? Bushe cinshi impumi yonse yalukile no kubutuluka?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Yangu, ubushiku bwatoloto bwalaswa bufike, ubo nshingalinganya ku bushiku ubuli bonse, e nshita yabulanda kuli bamwana Yakobo, lelo kwena bakapusukako.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Ubo bushiku ilyo bukafika, ine nkakontaula amakoli ayaba mu mikoshi yabo, kabili nkaputaula iminyololo, awe ninshi capwa tabakateekwe busha nakabili ku benafyalo." 
Jeremiah30:9 Lelo bena bakalabombela ine ne Yawe, ne Lesa wabo, no kulabombela Davidi uo ine nkasonta ukuba imfumu yabo." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Kanshi Yakobo, we mubomfi wandi, wilatiina. Iwe we Israeli wilatunsha mutima iyoo, pantu ine nkakupususha ukufuma mu fyalo fyakutali, ukufuma mu fyalo umo abana bobe bateekwa bunkole. Efyasosa Yawe. Iwe Yakobo ukabwela, ukesa iikalila na ku matwi tondolo. Ukesa ikala umutelelwe, takwakabe nelyo uumo uukalakutiinya." 
Jeremiah30:11 Pantu ine nkaba nobe kabili nkakupususha, efyasosa Yawe. Nkalofya abantu ba mishobo yonse, kulya ine nakusalanganishishe nomba iwe, awe nshakakulofye nakalya. Ine nkakusalapula no mulinganya, lelo nshakakulekepofye ukwabula ukukukanda.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Ifi efyasosa Yawe, “We Yakobo, ifilaso fyobe tefyakupola nakalya, ifilonda fyobe ifyo wacenwa, te fyakundapwa iyoo." 
Jeremiah30:13 Takwaba nelyo umo uwakukupapatila iwe, takwaba na muti wakuposesha ifilonda fyobe, no musango wakuundapilwamo iwe, awe takuli." 
Jeremiah30:14 Abatemwikwa bobe balikulabako, tabakusakamana nakalya. Ine nakusanshile ngo mulwani obe, iwe nalikukandile buluku, buluku, pantu ifibi fyobe fyalifulishe, no bubifi bobe, bwalikuliishe." 
Jeremiah30:15 Kanshi iwe wilailishanya palwa bucushi bobe, ala ubukali uleumfwa tabwakaleke. Efyo ine nakukanda iwe, pantu ifibi fyobe fyalifulishe, no bubifi bobe, bwalikulishe." 
Jeremiah30:16 Eico bonsefye abalekonaula, nabo bene ine nkabonaula, na balwani bobe bonse bakasendwa muli bunkole. Bonsefye abalekucusha iwe, nabo bene bakacula. Bonsefye abalekutapa iwe, nabo bene bakatapwa." 
Jeremiah30:17 Pantu ine nkaleka ubumi bobe bukapole, ine nkaposha ne filonda fyobe.” Efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pantu bakwita uwaposwa, ‘Sioni, uwabulwa nelyo umo uwakumusakamana.’”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Yawe kabili aletila ati, “Ine nkabwesesha bamwana Yakobo no bunonshi bwa mu matenti yabo, kabili ne ndupwa shabo shonse ine nkashibelelako uluse, no musumba wine ukakuulwa pa citantala cauko, ne sano likemikwa pa ncende yaliko iyakale." 
Jeremiah30:19 Abantu abakekalamo bakalaimba inyimbo shakunumbanya, bakalapunda utupundu twansansa. Nkabasandulula, tabakabe abacepana kabili. Nkabacindamika, tabakasuulwe iyoo." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abana babo bakaba ngefyo bali kale, no lukuta lwabo lukeminina bwino pa cinso candi, Kabili nkakanda bonse abakalabatitikisha." 
Jeremiah30:21 Mu mutundu wabo emukafuma uwakubateeka, na pa bantu babo epakafuma uwakubatungulula. Nkamupalamika, nao akapalama kuli ine, pantu nani uyo uwingampalama palwakwe umwine,” efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah30:22 “Kabili mukaba abantu abandi, na ine nkaba Lesa uwenu.”" 
Jeremiah30:23 “Moneni icimwela cakwa Yawe icilekuka mu cipyu. Cili nga kankungwe uuleshunda, uwalaya pukanya imitwe ya bantu babi." 
Jeremiah30:24 Icipyu icikali cakwa Yawe tacakapwe mpakafye akacite fyonse ifyo apanga ukucita. Ukukapela inshiku abantu bakwe bakasuka bakateshe bwino uyu mulandu.” 
Jeremiah31:1 Yawe aletila ati, “Pali ilya nshita ine nkaba Lesa wa mikowa yonse iya bena Israeli, nabo bakaba abantu abandi.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Abantu abakapusuka ku lupanga, ine nkababelele uluse mu matololo, ilyo abena Israeli bakapeelwa ukutuusha." 
Jeremiah31:3 Ku kale Yawe alemonekela Israeli akatalamukila, no kulamweba ati, ‘Ine nalikutemwisha icitemwiko icishakapwe, na nombaline ncili ninkukwatila icikuku icishipwa." 
Jeremiah31:4 Nkankukuula nakabili, na iwe ukakuulwa, iwe we nacisungu Israeli. Na limbi line ukalalisha insombo shobe, no kucinda ukalacinda na basansamwike." 
Jeremiah31:5 Ukalalima amabala ya myangashi nakabili mu mpili sha Samaria. Abakalalima bakalaipakisha ifikalafuma muli ayo mabala.’ 
Jeremiah31:6 “Ubushiku bumo bukafika ilyo bamalonda bakalapunda pa mpili sha mu calo ca Efulemu abati, “‘Mwe, aleni imeni. Natuleya ku Sioni, kuli Yawe Lesa wesu.’”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Kabili ifi efyasosa Yawe aletila ati, “Imbileni Yakobo ne nsansa ishikalamba, yangileni umushobo uukalamba pali yonse. Imbeni inyimbo, mulumbanye amuti, ‘We Yawe upusushe abantu bobe, ulondole abena Israeli abashalapo.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Moneni ine nkabafumya mu calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso, nkabalonganika ukufuma ukwapelela isonde lyonse, Bakeshila pamo ne mpofu, ne filema fine, na banakashi abali pabukulu, na bali mupepi no kupapa, bakabwela ibumba ilikulu nganshi." 
Jeremiah31:9 Pakubwelela kuno, abantu bandi bakesa balelila, lelo kwena bakesa balepepa ilyo nkalababwesha. Nkesa ndebapisha ku milonga ya menshi, nkesa ndebapisha mu nshila iyatambalala, umo bashakaleipununa nakalya. Pantu ine nine wishi kwa Israeli, na Efulemu e beli lyandi." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Imwe mwe bantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo, umfweni ishiwi lyandi ne Yawe, kabili muye muleebako na bantu ba mu lulamba lwa bemba ukuti, ‘Ine ne wasalangenye abena Israeli, nine wine nkabalonganika, kabili nkalabasunga nga filya fine kacema asunga impaanga shakwe.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 Pantu ine ne Yawe nindubula bamwana Yakobo, nimbapususha ku bantu ba mutundu wamaka ukubacila." 
Jeremiah31:12 Bakesa mukulaimba inyimbo shansansa pa lupili lwa Sioni, kabili bakalacankilwa ne fisuma ifyo ine ne Yawe nkalabapeela, emukuti, iŋanu, umwangashi upya na mafuta, abana ba mpaanga ne ŋombe. Bakaba nge bala ilitapililwa bwino, tabakatale nakabili abekatwa no bulanda iyoo." 
Jeremiah31:13 Elyo abakashana bakalacinda ne nsansa, na balumendo na baume abakote nabo bakalasansamuka. Ine nkabatalalika, ne cililishi cabo nkacalula insansa, nkabasansamusha, ubulanda bwabo ine nkabwalula insansa." 
Jeremiah31:14 Bashimapepo ine nkalabekusha ifilyo ifishaiwamina, na bantu bandi bakalaikuta ku fintu fisuma nkabapeela. Ifi efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Ifi efyasosa Yawe aletila ati, “Mu Rama mwaumfwika ishiwi lileshinshimukila, lyapumuna no musowa. Ni Rakeli euleloosha bamwane. Talefwaya na kutalalikwa nakalya, pantu bamwane tabalipo.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Iwe leka ukulila, futa ne filamba, pantu ukalambwilwapo pafyo wabombele bamwano.” Yawe asosa ati, “Bakabwela ukufuma ku calo ca balwani." 
Jeremiah31:17 Kanshi kuli subilo kuntanshi yobe, bamwano bakabwelela kuno ku calo cabo.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Ndeumfwa, uko Efulemu aleililila ubulanda ati, ‘Naunsalapula nga cilume wa ŋombe uwatalama, na ine ninsalapulwa. Umbweshe, na ine nalabwela pantu iwe niwe Yawe Lesa wandi." 
Jeremiah31:19 Panuma yakulubantika nalilapile, panuma yakwiluka no kwishiba, nayuma na pa cifuba. Naliketwe insoni, no kusebana nalisebene, pantu nali no musebanya wafyo nacitile mu bwaice bwandi.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 “Bushe Efulemu te mwana wandi, kacele wandi, umwana wandi uo natemwisha nganshi? Lyonsefye ilyo numbula ishina lyakwe no kumusoka, ine ndamutontonkanyapo no kumufuluka. Umutima wandi ni pali iwefye waba, awe ine nkakubelelako uluse.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Bika ifishibilo ifyakwishibilako inshila, ukome no lukomo, ishiba bwino umusebo ukulu uo wailemo. Bwela iwe we Israeli nacisungu. Bwelela kuno ku misumba yobe." 
Jeremiah31:22 Bushe ukaleka lilali ukulashingashinga, we mwana mwanakashi uwabula icishinka? Yawe akacitapo icintu cimo icipya pano isonde, icakuti umwanakashi eukacingilako umwaume.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, aletila ati, “Ilyo ine nkabwesesha ukufuma muli bunkole bwabo abantu ba mu calo ca Yuda na mu misumba yaciko, bena bakalalanda nakabili abati, “‘Yawe engalakupaala we incende yamushilo iyo aikalamo, engalakupaala we lupili ulwamushilo.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Abantu bakalaikala muli cino calo ca Yuda mu misumba yonse iyabamo, pamo na balimi na bakacema abakalacemenamo ifitekwa fyabo." 
Jeremiah31:25 Pantu nkakoselesha abanakuka, nkekusha na bantu bonse abatembuka ku nsala.”" 
Jeremiah31:26 Kanshi epakubuka mu tulo no kulolesha no tulo twandi twaliweme kuli ine. 
Jeremiah31:27 “Ine ne Yawe ndesosa ukuti, kukesa inshita imo ilyo mu calo ca Israeli neca Yuda nkesushamo ulubuto lwa bantu ne nama." 
Jeremiah31:28 Nga filya fine natekele umutima pakubanukaula, na pakubawisha, na pakubapasaula, na pakubonaula, na pakubashitila, efyo nkateka umutima na pakubasandulula na pakuba kosha pene. Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah31:29 Muli shilya nshiku, abantu tabakalelanda nakabili abati, “‘Bashibo ebalile bamwelu ba myangashi, nomba kabili ameno ya bana babo yawa ingwishi.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 Lelo bonsefye abakalalya bamwelu ba myangashi, abo bene ebo ameno yabo yakalawa bonse. Umo umo bakalafwila palwa kubifya kwabo abene.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 Yawe aletila ati, “Moneni, inshiku shikesa ilyo ine nkapangana icipangano icipya na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli pamo na ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Cena tacakabe nge cipangano ico napangene na bashibo, pa bushiku nabekete pa maboko pakubafumya mu calo ca Egupto. Bena balisuulile icipangano candi, nangu ine nali ngo mulume kuli bena.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah31:33 “Lelo nomba ici e cipangano ico ine nkapangana na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli ilyo isho nshiku shikapita, cena cikaba ifi. Ine ne Yawe ndesosa nati, nkabika amafunde yandi mu mano yabo, no kuyalemba mu mitima yabo. Elyo ine nkaba Lesa uwabo, nabo bakaba abantu abandi." 
Jeremiah31:34 Takwakabe nangu umo uwakufunda umwina mupalamano munankwe, nangu uwakufunda munyina ati, ‘Ishiba Yawe,’ awe nakalya. Pantu bonse bakanjishiba, ukufumafye ku munono ukufikafye na ku mukalamba,” ifi efyasosa Yawe. “Pantu ine nkababelelako uluse ku fibi fyabo, ne fyabubifi fyabo ine nshalefibukisha nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Ifi efyasosa Yawe uuleta akasuba pakuti kalebalika pa nshita yakako, euleta no mweshi ne ntanda pakuti filesanika pa nshita ya bushiku. Eusunkanya bemba pakuti amatamba yalepoma. Yawe umwine wa fita e shina lyakwe." 
Jeremiah31:36 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Kanofye ifipope fyandi ifi fyonse fikafume pa cinso candi, elyo aba mu lupwa lwa bena Israeli bakaleka ukuba umushobo pa cinso candi.”" 
Jeremiah31:37 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Nga kuti yapimwa imyulu mu mulu, ne mifula ye sonde panshi nga kuti yaishibikwa, lyena kuti afumyako amano ku bena Israeli, pa mulandu wa fintu fyonse ifyo bacita,” efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah31:38 “Inshiku shikesa ilyo umusumba wandi onse ukakuulwa cipya cipya, ukutampilafye ku lupungu lwakwa Hananeli ukuya shinta na ku masamba ku mpongolo ya petungi.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah31:39 “Uko kwine ku masamba eko no mwando wakupiminako ukatula, ukaye na ku lupili lwa Garebu, ukalukile na ku Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Ulya mukonko onsefye uo baposamo ifitumbi ne fisoso, na mabala yonse ayaba ku mulu wa mukonko wa Kidironi, ukuya shintafye na ku mpongolo ya bakabalwe lubali lwa ku kabanga, fikapatwilwa kuli Yawe ukuba ifyamushilo. Umusumba tawakabale aubongololwa nangu ukonaulwa nakabili nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Yawe alandile kuli Yeremia ili shiwi mu mwaka walengele ikumi apo Sedekia atampile ukuba imfumu ya calo ca Yuda, kabili e mwaka wine walengele ikumi na cine konse konse (18) apo Nebukadinesa atampile ukuteeka ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah32:2 Pali iyo ine nshita ninshi ifita fya mfumu ya ku Babiloni nafisansa umusumba wa Yerusalemu, na kasesema Yeremia ninshi balimwisalila kwisano mu lubansa lwa bakalinda ulwali kwisano lya mfumu ya mu Yuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Imfumu Sedekia emo yamufungilile ilyo yamusangile no mulandu uwakusesema no kubila mbila ukuti Yawe nasosa ati, “Ine nalaswa mpeele uno musumba mu minwe ya mfumu ya ku Babiloni, no kupoka ikesa upoka." 
Jeremiah32:4 Nokuti Sedekia imfumu ya cino calo ca Yuda takamone pakupusukila ku bena Kaludea. Akaposwa ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni, bakashimpana nayo amenso, no kulanda nayo pa kanwa." 
Jeremiah32:5 Nokuti Sedekia bakamusenda ku Babiloni, no kwikala eko akekala ukushintafye napo ine ne Yawe Lesa nkamukandila. Nangufye alwishe shani abena Kaludea, ala nakalya aleicushafye. Efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Yeremia nao alilandile ati, “Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine" 
Jeremiah32:7 ‘Hanameli mwana Shalumu nokolume alaswa ese uko uli, kukwisa kwipusha pakuti niwe ushite ibala lyakwe ilyo akwata ku Anatoti, pantu niwe wakwata ne nsambu yakulishita.’”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Ne cacine ukulinganafye nomo Yawe anjebele, awe na umufyala wandi aisa umo ndi mu lubansa lwa bakalinda, anjeba ati, “We, shita ibala lyandi lilya nakwata ku Anatoti mu citungu ca bena Benjamini, pantu iwe uli munyinanefye pakati, kabili niwe wakwata ne nsambu yakulishita ne yakulisunga. Ale shitafye.” Na ine epakwiluka ukuti kanshi eulya mulandu Yawe aciba ankonkomesha." 
Jeremiah32:9 Kanshi na ine epakushita ibala kuli Hanameli umufyala wandi, namulipila ne ndalama isho ampingwile, indalama amashekeli ya silifa ikumi limo na cine lubali (17)." 
Jeremiah32:10 Nalemba na pali kalata ishina lyandi pakushininkisha umulandu, namupeta, naumapo ne nshimbi, naita na bakambone abakusangwako, awe napima ne ndalama pa cipimo." 
Jeremiah32:11 Elyo nabuula bakalata bonse babili abalipo ifyabukwebo bwesu, emukuti umo uwauminwepo inshimbi umwali icumfwano, elyo na kalata mubiye uwalipo amafunde palwa kushitishanya lelo ena tapetelwe iyoo," 
Jeremiah32:12 awe napeela bakalata bonse babili kuli Baruki mwana Neriya, Baruki wine e mwishikulu Maaseia. Namupeelela pa menso ya mufyala wandi Hanameli, na pa menso ya bakambone abalembelepo nabo amashina yabo pali bakalata ba fya bukwebo bwesu, na pa menso ya bena Yuda bonse abaikele panshi mu lubansa." 
Jeremiah32:13 Elyo pa menso yabo bonse naeba Baruki nati," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli ati, ‘Nakupeela icebo icakubuula uyu kalata ominwepo inshimbi uwa bukwebo bwesu no kubuula kalata mubiye ushapetwa uulembelwepo fimo fine, no kuya babika mu kamutondo ke bumba pakuti bakasungwe pa nshita iyitali.’" 
Jeremiah32:15 Pantu Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli nasosa ukuti, ‘Amayanda, ne filime, na mabala ya myangashi, fikalashitwa nakabili muli cino calo.’”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Ilyo ine napwile ukupeela Baruki mwana Neriya bakalata ba fya bukwebo bwesu, nalilumbenye Yawe nati," 
Jeremiah32:17 “We Imfumu Yawe, niwe wabumba imyulu ne calo ku maka yobe na ku bulamba bobe ubushaikulila, iwe tapaba cakukwansha iyoo." 
Jeremiah32:18 Ulabelela abantu amakana na makana uluse, lelo kwena ulalimuna abantu pa mulandu wa kubifya kwa bashibo. Iwe uli Lesa Mukulu, kabili uli Lesa Wamaka, ne shina lyobe niwe Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah32:19 Ifyo iwe upanga ukucita, ala fyakupapa, nefyo iwe ucita, ala fyamaka. Iwe ulamonafye fyonse ifyo abantu bacita, kabili ulabalinganya bonse umo umo pa miikalile yabo na pa micitile yabo." 
Jeremiah32:20 Niwe wacitile ifipeshamano ne finjelengwe mu calo ca Egupto. Na nombaline ucili uleficita ukushinta na pali buno bushiku bwine ku bena Israeli, na ku bantu ba mishobo imbi yonse, icakuti nomba no kwishibikwa nawishibikwa mpangafye yonse." 
Jeremiah32:21 Pakufumya abantu bobe abena Israeli mu Egupto, wacitile ifishibilo ne fipeshamano, ku bulamba bobe na ku kuboko kobe ukwafunguluka, no kutiinya ukukalamba nganshi." 
Jeremiah32:22 Niwe wabapeele ne calo cino icikankala kabili icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci, nga mulya mwine walaile bashibo." 
Jeremiah32:23 Nomba ilyo baishile muli cino calo no kucipoka, bena balikene ukulakuumfwa, balakaana no kulakonka amafunde yobe. Pafyo wabakonkomeshe ukulacita, tabacitilepo nelyo cimo. E mulandu wine walenga nokuti ubaponeshe ifi finkunka fyonse." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Tepapa nomba abena Kaludea nabatulamika ifimina fya maloba ukushinguluka umusumba pakuti baupoke, no kusansa nabausansa. Inkondo ne cipowe ne cikuko efyalalenga ukuti umusumba upokwe ku bena Kaludea abeshile mukuusansa. Nauimwena we Mfumu ukuti fyonsefye ifyo wasosa, awe nomba fyafikila." 
Jeremiah32:25 We Mfumu Yawe, niwe unkonkomeshe ukushita ibala pa menso ya bakambone, nangu kwena abena Kaludea balaswa bapoke uno musumba.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Mona, ine nine Yawe, Lesa wa bantu bonse. Tapaba nangu cimo ico ine ningafilwa ukucita." 
Jeremiah32:28 Kanshi ine ne Yawe efyo nsosa. Nalabuula uno musumba, mpeele Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni, ku bena Kaludea, ebalaupoka." 
Jeremiah32:29 Abena Kaludea abalelwisha uno musumba, balaisa oca. Balaisa ocela kumo kwine na mayanda ayo abantu bandi bankalifishamo umutima pakulafutumwina Baali ububani pa mitenge yayako, no kulatuulilapo imilungu imbi imbi imituulo ya fyakunwa." 
Jeremiah32:30 Umutundu wa bena Israeli na bena Yuda tabacitapo ifintu fimbi kanofye ukucita ifibi pa cinso candi ukufuma ku bwaice bwabo. Abena Israeli ine balankalifya umutima pa mulandu wa tulubi uto bapanga ne minwe yabo. Efyasosa Yawe 
Jeremiah32:31 Uno musumba walinkalifya umutima no kundetela icipyu ukutulafye apo wakuulilwa. Ine nomba mpangilefye ukuonaula," 
Jeremiah32:32 pa mulandu wa fibi fyonse ificitwa na bena Israeli na bena Yuda ifyankalifya umutima. Abaficita ni bashamfumu babo na bacilolo babo, na bashimapepo babo na bakasesema babo, na bantu ba muli cino calo ca Yuda, na bena Yerusalemu bene." 
Jeremiah32:33 Aba bantu ine balimfutatila, bakaana no kundolesha. Nangu ine nabikapofye ukulabafunda, awe bena bakaanininafye ndai ukulaŋumfwa no kuleka imisango yabo iyibi." 
Jeremiah32:34 Na mu ŋanda yakumpepelamo iye shina lyandi iyo bankuulila, namo mwine balibikamo utulubi utwabunani, no kuikowesha balikowesha." 
Jeremiah32:35 Mu mupokapoka wa Beni Hinomu balikuulilamo Baali ifibumbili fye lambo, apakocela abana babo abaume na banakashi pakulabatuula ilambo ku mulungu Moleki. Ine nshabapeela cebo cakucita ifi iyoo, kabili tacatala acisa na mu mano yandi, icakuti ntontonkanye ukuti aba bantu kuti bacitapo icintu cabipisha ifi, no kulenga abena Yuda balebifya.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, alisosele ati, “Yeremia, iwe naweba abantu ukuti inkondo ne cipowe ne cikuko efyalalenga ukuti imfumu ya ku Babiloni ipoke uno musumba, lelo kwena umfwa kuno ifyo ine nalalanda." 
Jeremiah32:37 Ine nkalonganya abantu, nkabafumya mu fyalo fyonse umo nabaposele cipyu cipyu kabili cikali cikali. Nkababwesesha kuno kwine, no kuleka bakaleikalila ku matwi tondolo." 
Jeremiah32:38 Lyena bakalaba abantu abandifye, na ine nkalaba Lesa uwabo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Nkalenga bakalefwayafye no mutima umo icintu cimo ceka mu miikalile yabo, emukuti icakulankwatila akatiina lyonsefye, neci cintu cikalabawamina abene, cikalawamina na bana babo abakalabakonkapo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ine nkapangana nabo icipangano ca pe icakutila, ine nshakatale ndeka ukulabacitila ifisuma. Nkalenga nokuti bakalenkwatila akatiina mu mitima yabo, epakuti nabo bekatala abansangukila nakabili." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ine nkalasansamuka pakubabombela ifisuma, nkabika umutima wandi onse no mweo wandi onse pakubateeka muli cino calo, pakuti emo bakaleikalilila pe.”" 
Jeremiah32:42 Ici ecasosa Yawe ukutila, “Ngefi fine ndetele aba bantu ishamo ilishaikulila, efyo nkabaletela ne fintu fyonse ifisuma ifyo ine mbalaile." 
Jeremiah32:43 Iwe Yeremia nusosa ukuti cino calo cikaba nga matololo umushaikala bantu nangufye inama, nokuti abena Kaludea ebalacipoka, ee, lelo kwena amabala yakalashitwa nakabili muno muntu." 
Jeremiah32:44 Abantu bakalayashita, na pali bakalata bakushitilapo abantu bakalalembapo amashina yabo pakushininkisha umulandu, bakalata bakalapetwa no kulaumwapo ne nshimbi, na bakambone nabo bakalalembapo amashina yabo. Noyu musango ukulacitika mu citungu ca bena Benjamini, na mu mishi iyashinguluka Yerusalemu, na mu misumba iya muli cino calo ca Yuda, na mu mishi ya mu calo ca mpili, na mu mishi ya mwishika lya mpili, na mu mishi ya mu matololo ya Negebu mwine, pantu ine nkabwesesha abantu ishuko muli cino calo cabo.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah33:1 Ilyo Yeremia acili mu cifungo mu lubansa lwa bakalinda, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe yalimwishile umuku wacibili." 
Jeremiah33:2 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe uwapangile isonde, Yawe uwalibumbile nokulibika apo lyaikala, Yawe e shina lyakwe." 
Jeremiah33:3 Lilila kuli ine, na ine ndekwasuka, ndekwebako imilandu ikulu kabili iyankaama, iyo iwe ushaishiba." 
Jeremiah33:4 Pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe, Lesa wa bena Israeli pa mulandu wa mayanda aya muno musumba elyo na ya kwisano lya mu Yuda ayo babongolola pakuipokololako ku babumbilika umushili kwilinga na ku bamulwisha ku lupanga." 
Jeremiah33:5 Abena Kaludea balaisa mukulwisha uno musumba balaisa isushamo ifitumbi fya bantu abo ndi nokwipaya ku bukali ne cipyu candi. Ndi nokufisa icinso candi kuli uno musumba pa mulandu wa fyabubifi ficitikamo. 
Jeremiah33:6 “Lelo kwena nkaundapa no kubweseshamo ubumi. Nkondapa abantu bauko, nkabaletela icibote, no kuleka bakaleikala mu mutelelwe uwine wine." 
Jeremiah33:7 Nkabweseshamo ubunonshi mu calo ca Yuda na mu calo ca Israeli, nkalenga fikabukuluke, fikabe nga filya fine fyali kale." 
Jeremiah33:8 Abantu nkabasangulula ku fyabubifi fyabo ifyo babifishe kuli ine, nkababelelako uluse ku fyabubifi fyabo na kuli bucisanguka bwabo." 
Jeremiah33:9 Kabili uno musumba wa Yerusalemu ukalandetela insansa, no malumbo, no mucinshi. Na bantu ba mishobo yonse pano isonde bakalatiina no kulatutuma ku mwenso, ilyo bakalaumfwa ifintu fisuma ifyo nkalacitila abena Yerusalemu, ne shuko ilyo nkaletela uno musumba.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Cino calo abantu batila cili nga matololo umushikala abantu nangufye inama. Kwena ca cine, mu misumba ya muli cino calo ca Yuda, na mu misebo ya mu Yerusalemu, tamulemoneka muntu nangufye inama nakalya. Lelo muli ishi ncende shonse mukalaumfwika nakabili" 
Jeremiah33:11 utupundu twakwanga no twansansa. Mukalaumfwika na mashiwi ya bashibwinga na ya banabwinga. Ilyo abantu bakalaleta ku ŋanda yandi imitulo yakutotela, amashiwi yabo yakalaumfwika ilyo bakalaimba abati, “‘Toteleni Yawe umwine wa fita, pantu Yawe ena musuma, no kutemwa kwakwe kwa pe na pe.’ Pantu ine nkabweseshamo ubunonshi muli cino calo nga filya nacitile pakutendeka.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah33:12 Kabili Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Muli cino calo icili nga matololo umushikala bantu nangufye inama, ala mu misumba yonse yaciko mukaba nakabili umulemfwe umwakuti bakacema bakalecemena impaanga shabo." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mu mishi ya mu calo ca mpili, mu mishi ya mwishika lya mpili, na mu mishi ya mu matololo ya Negebu, na mu citungu ca bena Benjamini, na mu mishi iyashinguluka Yerusalemu, na mu misumba ya muli cino calo ca Yuda, imikuni ikalapita nakabili mu minwe ya upenda.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah33:14 Kabili Yawe asosa ati, “Inshiku shikesa ilyo ine nkafikilisha icilayo ico nalaile aba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli na ba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 “Muli shilya shine nshiku na pali ilya ine nshita ine nkalenga Umusambo uwaololoka ukufuma ku lupwa lwakwa Davidi. Ena eukalacita ifyalungama, no kuleta umulinganya mu calo conse." 
Jeremiah33:16 Shilya nshiku nga shafika, ninshi abena Yuda balubuka, na bena Yerusalemu ninshi balaikalila ku matwi tondolo. Ne shina ilyo bakalaita umushobo wabo no musumba wabo lyakutila, ‘Yawe e bulungami bwesu.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 Pantu ine ne Yawe nalaya ukuti pefye kukalaba mwana Davidi umo uwakuteeka nge mfumu ya ba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli," 
Jeremiah33:18 kabili pefye kukalaba bashimapepo abena Levi abakwiminina pa cinso candi, no kulantuula amalambo ayakoca ne mitulo ya cabunga na malambo yambi yonse.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, ‘Nga cakuti kuti mwaonaula icipangano candi ku kasuba ne cipangano candi ku bushiku, pakuti akasuba no bushiku fileke ukulabombela pa nshita yafiko," 
Jeremiah33:21 ninshi ne cipangano candi no mubomfi wandi Davidi kuti caonaika, na mwane umwaume uwakumupyana pa bufumu akabula, ne cipangano napangene na babomfi bandi bashimapepo naco cine cikonaika." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ine nkafusha nganshi abana ba mubomfi wandi Davidi, na bashimapepo abena Levi abamombela, icakuti limbi pakubapenda cikabafye kwati muntu uuleeshako ukupenda intanda sha mu mulu, nangufye umusensenga wa mu lulamba lwa bemba.’”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Bushe iwe tauleumfwa ifilelanda abantu ukuti ine ne Yawe nindekelesha abena Israeli na bena Yuda, ishi ndupwa shibili isho ine nasalile? Ecilengele nokuti basuule abantu bandi, baleke no kulabamona ukuti nabo mushobo umo uwa bantu.”" 
Jeremiah33:25 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Mbula kupanga ukucita icipangano ku kasuba no bushiku, no kupeela ifyebo ifyakuti isonde no mulu filekonka," 
Jeremiah33:26 ninshi nkakaana bamwana Yakobo no mubomfi wandi Davidi. Ine nshakasalepo mwana Davidi nelyo umo uwakuti akaleteeka bamwana Abrahamu na bamwana Isaki na bamwana Yakobo. Pantu nkabweseshapo ishuko ku bantu bandi, kabili nkalababelelako no luse.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Amashiwi yakwa Yawe ayaishile kuli Yeremia, ilyo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni pamo ne fita fyakwe, ne fita fya fyalo fyonse fintu Nebukadinesa aleteeka na bantu ba mishobo yonse abo anashishe balelwisha umusumba wa Yerusalemu pamo pene ne misumba iyali mumbali." 
Jeremiah34:2 Ifi efyo asosa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli ati, “Kabiye kuli Sedekia imfumu ya Yuda, no kuya mweba amashiwi ayakuti, ‘Ine ne Yawe ndeleka imfumu ya ku Babiloni ipoke uno musumba, no kuoca.’ Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah34:3 ‘Nobe wine Sedekia tawapusukeko kuli Nebukadinesa. Uleikatwa, uleposwa na kuli Nebukadinesa. Uli nokuloleshanya amenso nankwe, no kulanda nankwe pa kanwa, elyo uli nokuya na ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Lelo, we mfumu Sedekia, umfwa ifyo ine ne Yawe ndelanda pali iwe. Iwe tawafwe ku nkondo iyoo." 
Jeremiah34:5 Iwe ukafwafye imfwa iyamutende. Kabili nga filya fine abantu balefutumuna ububani pakushiika ifikolwe fyobe ifyakutangilile pa bufumu, efintu nobe wine bakakufutumwina ububani pakukushiika. Pakukuloosha abantu bakalalila abati, “Oowe we mfumu yesu washa watuposa ee.”’ Ee, nine ne Yawe nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Kanshi nao kasesema Yeremia epakuya mu Yerusalemu, aya eba na Sedekia imfumu ya calo ca Yuda aya yene mashiwi yonse," 
Jeremiah34:7 ninshi pali iyo ine nshita ne fita fya mfumu ya ku Babiloni filelwisha no musumba. Ifita fyaiko fimbi ninshi nafyo filelwisha Lakishi na Aseka, pantu nayo e misumbafye ibili iyamalinga iyashelepo mu calo ca Yuda." 
Jeremiah34:8 Kabili Yawe alisosele kuli Yeremia, ilyo imfumu Sedekia yapangene na bena Yerusalemu bonse pakuti bapeele abasha babo ubuntungwa." 
Jeremiah34:9 Sedekia aumfwana nabo ukuti umuntufye onse ali nokupeela Umuhibulu munankwe ubuntungwa, emukuti Umuhibulu umusha umwaume atemwa umwanakashi, epakuti peshala nelyo umo uwakuteeka Umuyuda munankwe ubusha." 
Jeremiah34:10 Kanshi abantu bonse pamo ne ntungulushi shabo abapangile ici cipangano epakusuminishanya ukulekamo mu basha babo abaume na banakashi, basuminishanya no kukanabateeka nakabili ubusha. Awe baumfwa, babapeela no buntungwa." 
Jeremiah34:11 Nomba kabili panuma bapilibuka, bababwesha, babapatikisha no kubwelela nakabili mu busha." 
Jeremiah34:12 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah34:13 “Ifi efyo Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli, asosa ati, ‘Ine nalipangene icipangano na bashinwe ilyo nabafumishe mu calo ca Egupto no kubalubula mu busha. No kubeba ine nalibebele ukuti," 
Jeremiah34:14 mu mwaka walenga cine lubali, cila umo pali imwe afwile ukupeela ubuntungwa ku Muhibulu munankwe uwaishitishe mu busha kuli bena. Panuma yakubomba imyaka mutanda, mufwile mwamulekako aya. Lelo bashinwe tabaumfwile kuli ine nangu ukubeela amashiwi yandi nakalya." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ni nombaline mwalapile no kucita icalungama pa cinso candi. Mwalisuminishenye no kubilisha ukupeela Abahibulu banenu ubuntungwa, neci cipangano mwacicitile pa menso yandi mu ŋanda yandi iyo imwe mwankuulila." 
Jeremiah34:16 Nomba kabili mwaisa futuka, no kusuula ishina lyandi. Imwe bonse mwalibwesha abasha benu abaume na banakashi abo mwapeele ubuntungwa bwakuya konse uko balefwaya. Nomba namubapatikisha ukuti babwelele mu busha nakabili." 
Jeremiah34:17 Kanshi ine ne Yawe Lesa ndemweba ukuti ninefye imwe mwatalamine pakukanapeela Abahibulu banenu ubuntungwa. Cisuma, eico ine nomba ine nalamupeela ubuntungwa, nabo buntungwa ubwakufwa ku nkondo atemwa ku cikuko nangu ku cipowe. Nkalenga na bantu ba mishobo yonse pano isonde bakaleitutuminafye ku mwenso pakumona ifyo ine nkamucita imwe. Nine ne Yawe ndemwebelapo." 
Jeremiah34:18 Lelo aba bantu balisuula ici cipangano ico bacitile pa cinso candi, bakaana no kucikonka. Kanshi na ine nomba nkacita aba bantu ngefi fine bacita cilume wa ŋombe uo baputula no kulapita pakati ka fipimfya fibili." 
Jeremiah34:19 Bacilolo ba muli cino calo ca Yuda na ba mu Yerusalemu, na bamutungwi ba kwisano na bashimapepo, na bantu bonse aba muli cino calo, balipangana icipangano, na pakucicita balepita pakati ka fiputulwa fibili ifya cilume wa ŋombe uo bepaya no kumuputula pakati." 
Jeremiah34:20 Ine nkabaposa mu minwe ya balwani babo abafwaya ukubepaya. Ifyuni ne fiswango efikalya ifitumbi fyabo. 
Jeremiah34:21 Sedekia imfumu ya cino calo ca Yuda pamo na bacilolo bakwe, ine nkabaposa mu minwe ya balwani babo abafwaya ukubepaya. Ine nkabaposa ku fita fya mfumu ya ku Babiloni, ifitalile filekele ukulamulwisha." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ine nkafipeela icebo, no kwisa kabili fikeshilila uno musumba. Fikesa usansa, fikaupoke, no kuoca ku mulilo. Imisumba ya muli cino calo ca Yuda ine nkaicita kwati matololo, tamwakekale muntu iyoo. Nine ne Yawe nalanda.’”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Ilyo Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia ateekele icalo ca Yuda, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Kabiye ku ba mu lupwa lwa bena Rekabu, uye landa nabo. Elyo wise nabo, ubengishe na mu muputule umo uwa mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, ubapeeleko no mwangashi, banwe.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Na ine epakuya buula Yasania mwana Yeremia umwana wakwa Habasinia, na bamunyina, na bana bakwe abaume bonse, na bonse aba mu lupwa lwa bena Rekabu," 
Jeremiah35:4 naisa batwala na ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa. Nabengisha na mu muputule wa bamwana Hanani mwana Igidalia, umuntu wakwa Lesa. Uyo muputule wali mupepi no muputule wa bacilolo, pa mulu wa muputule wakwa Maaseya mwana Shalumu, kalinda mulakamba wa pa mpongolo sha ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
Jeremiah35:5 Elyo natekela abena Rekabu inkombo ne mitondo paa iya mwangashi, no kubeba nabeba nati, “Aleni akunweni umwangashi.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Nomba bena baasuka abati, “Awe ifwe tatunwa mwangashi iyoo, pantu icikolwe cesu Yonadabu mwana Rekabu alitukonkomeshe ifwe pamo na bana besu ukukananwa umwangashi inshiku shonse." 
Jeremiah35:7 Alitulesha no kulakuula amayanda, no kulalima amabala, no kulalimba imyangashi, nangufye ukufikwata. Alitukonkomesha ukulaikalafye mu matenti ukufikafye na pa kufwa kwesu, epakuti tuleikalilila pe mu calo umo twikala nga beni." 
Jeremiah35:8 Ifwe tulakonka bwino ici cebo ca cikolwe cesu Yonadabu mwana Rekabu umo atukonkomeseshe. Ifwe tatunwa nelyo limo umwangashi, na bakashi besu bene nabo tabanwa, pamo pene na bana besu abaume na banakashi." 
Jeremiah35:9 Ifwe tatukuula mayanda yakwikalamo, tatwakwata mabala ya myangashi nangu amabala ya filime fimbi ifyakutandamo imbuto." 
Jeremiah35:10 Ifwe twikalafye mu matenti. Ifwe tulabaka nganshi amashiwi yonse ayo icikolwe cesu Yonadabu atukonkomesha. 
Jeremiah35:11 Nomba ili Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni aishile kukulwisha cino calo, elyo twapingushenye ukwisa muno Yerusalemu, pakufulumuka ifita fya bena Kaludea ne fya bena Siria. Kanshi e mulandu wine ulengele ukuti twise twikale muno Yerusalemu.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli asosa ati, ‘Kebe abaume abena Yuda na bantu ba mu Yerusalemu ukuti, bushe tamwasambilileko nangu cimo pakuti mwambe ukulabeela amashiwi yandi, efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah35:14 Mwamona, bamwana Yonadabu mwana Rekabu balisunga icebo icakukananwa umwangashi, no kunwa tabanwa ukushinta na lelo, pantu balanakila icebo ico shibo abakonkomesha. Lelo imwe tamumbeela nakalya, nakansha ine ne wabikapofye ukulamweba ukwabula no kutendwa." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ine ndamutumina libili libili ababomfi bandi bonse bakasesema, nabo balamweba ukuleka imisango yenu iyabipa. Balamweba no kulacita ifisuma. Balamusoka ukukanapepa imilungu imbi imbi, no kukanaibombela, pakuti mumone ukulaikalilila pe muli cino calo ico ine namupeela imwe pamo na bashinwe. Lelo imwe, awe tamufwaya kulaŋumfwa, nangufye ukulamposako amano nakalya." 
Jeremiah35:16 Tamumwene, aba mu lupwa lwakwa Yonadabu mwana Rekabu bena balasunga icebo ico cikolwe cabo cabapeele, nomba imwe tamufwaya kulambeela ine nakalya." 
Jeremiah35:17 Kanshi ine ne Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, ne Lesa wakwa Israeli, ndeti umfweni. Imwe mwe bena Yuda, na imwe bonse mwe bekala mu Yerusalemu, nkamuponesha ifinkunka fyonse ifyo nasosele ukuti nkacita. Neco nkacitila ifyo, nico ine natila ntinti ukulamweba, awe imwe tamumfwa, kabili tamunjasuka nakalya ilyo ine mwita.’”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Nomba Yeremia epakweba aba mu lupwa lwakwa Rakebu ukuti, “Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, asosa ati, ‘Pa mulandu wakuti imwe mulasunga icebo ico Yonadabu icikolwe cenu amukonkomeshe, mulakonka na mafunde yakwe yonse, no kulacitafye fyonse ifyo amukonkomesha," 
Jeremiah35:19 kanshi ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, ne Lesa wakwa Israeli, nalaya ukuti Yonadabu mwana Rekabu akalakwatapo lyonse mwane umo umwaume uwakumombela.’”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Mu mwaka walengele ine apo Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia atampile ukulateeka icalo ca Yuda, ili shiwi lyaishile kuli Yeremia ukufuma kuli Yawe aliti," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Fwayapo icitabo icipombwa cimo, ulembemo fyonse ifyo ine nakweba iwe palwa bena Israeli na bena Yuda na palwa bantu ba mishobo yonse. Ulembemo ifyo ine nakweba, ukutulafye apo natampile ukulanda nobe ilyo Yosia ali imfumu ukushinta na lelo." 
Jeremiah36:3 Abena Yuda nga baumfwa ifinkunka fyonse ifyo ine napanga ukubaponesha, nakalimo lyena kuti baleka imisango yabo iyibi, ninshi na ine kuti nababelelako uluse ku fyabupulumushi fyabo na ku fyabubifi fyabo.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Kanshi Yeremia nao epakwita Baruki mwana Neriya, amweba nokuti alembe fyonse ifyo Yawe aebele Yeremia. Awe nao Baruki epakulalemba amashiwi yonse mu citabo." 
Jeremiah36:5 Elyo Yeremia aeba Baruki ati, “Ine balindesha ukuya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah36:6 Kanshi niwe ndefwaya ukuti ukayemo pa bushiku bwakufunga ukulya, ukaye mukulaikatisha pakubelenga aya mashiwi ayali mu citabo, epakuti bakomfwe fyonsefye ifyo Yawe anjeba ine, umo mwine nkwebele ukuyalemba. Ukaye sala pa ncende pamo apakuti abantu bonse abakaba mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe bakalekumfwa, pamo pene na bena Yuda bonse abakatula mu misumba yabo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Kusuka nakalimo abantu bapapata Yawe, baleka ne misango yabo iyibi, pantu Yawe alipangila aba bantu ukubacitapo cimo mu bukali kabili mu cipyu.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Kanshi nao Baruki mwana Neriya epakuya mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa, abelengela na bantu amashiwi yakwa Yawe ayali mu citabo icipombwa, ukulinganafye nomo kasesema Yeremia amwebele." 
Jeremiah36:9 Ni mu mwaka walengele isano, mu mweshi walenga pabula, apo Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia atampile ukuteeka icalo ca Yuda, abantu bonse abali mu Yerusalemu na bonsefye abafumine mu misumba ya mu Yuda balifungile ukulya ku cinso cakwa Yawe pa nshita iyasontelwe." 
Jeremiah36:10 Elyo nao Baruki alababelengela amashiwi yonse ayali mu citabo icipombwa ayo Yeremia asosa, na bantu bonse balakutika kuli Baruki. Pakubelenga Baruki ali mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa, mu muputule wakwa Gemaria mwana Shafani kalemba wa mfumu. Umuputule wakwe wabelele mu lubansa, lwa pamulu pa mpongolo ipya iyakwingililapo mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikaya mwana Gemaria, uwali mwana wakwa Shafani, ilyo aumfwa uko Baruki apwisha ukubelenga amashiwi yonse ayakwa Yawe ayali mu citabo," 
Jeremiah36:12 atentemukila na kwisano mu muputule wakwa kalemba wa mfumu, umwalongene bacilolo bonse. Mwali Elishama kalemba wa mfumu, na Delaya mwana Shemaiya, na Elinatani mwana Akibo, na Gemaria mwana Shafani, na Sedekia mwana Hanania, na bacilolo bambi bonse." 
Jeremiah36:13 Elyo Mikaya alabashimikilako amashiwi yonsefye ayo aciba omfwile kuli Baruki, ilyo ali alebelengela abantu nabo ninshi baleumfwa." 
Jeremiah36:14 Elyo bacilolo bonse babuula Yehudi mwana Netania, uwali mwana Shelemia, uwali mwana wakwa Kushi, bamutuma kuli Baruki kukuya mweba ukuti ese ne icitabo ico ali alebelengelamo abantu. Awe nao Baruki mwana Neriya abatwalila ne citabo ico ali naco." 
Jeremiah36:15 Elyo bacilolo nabo bamweba abati, “Ikala apa, utubelengeleko na ifwe ifili mu citabo.” Elyo nao Baruki atendeka ukubelenga." 
Jeremiah36:16 Kutifye cilya baumfwa aya mashiwi yonse, awe balaloleshanyafye mwenso mwenso, elyo baeba na Baruki abati, “Uyu mulandu ifwe tuli nokuufisha ku mfumu Yehoyakimu.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Elyo baipusha Baruki abati, “Iwe twebeko, bushe iwe cali shani pakuti ulembe ifi fyonse? Bushe ni Yeremia ewalekweba ifyakulemba?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Nao Baruki abasuka ati, “Ee, ni Yeremia ewalenjeba ukulemba aya mashiwi yonse, na ine epakuyalemba muli ici cine citabo kuli inki.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Elyo bacilolo baeba Baruki abati, “Iwe pamo na Yeremia kabelameni. Mwileka muntu nelyo umo eshibe uko muleya belama.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Bacilolo bashile babika icitabo icipombwa mu muputule wakwa Elishama kalemba wa mfumu, baya na kwisano, baya shimikila ne mfumu amashiwi yonsefye." 
Jeremiah36:21 Elyo imfumu nayo yatuma Yehudi ukuya buula icitabo. Nao aya cibuula mu muputule wakwa Elishama, aisa mukulabelengela ne mfumu na bacilolo abaiminine mupepi nayo." 
Jeremiah36:22 Cali ni mu nshita yampepo, umweshi wa pabula, ninshi imfumu ileonta no mulilo mwisano lyaiko ilyo yalekukilamo mu nshita yampepo." 
Jeremiah36:23 Nomba Yehudi aletifye cilya apwa ukubelenga pa mapepala yatatu nangu yane, imfumu nayo ninshi yayaputulamo ku kamwele, yayaposa na pa mulilo. Yalacitafye ifyo fine casuka ne citabo consefye capwa ukupya." 
Jeremiah36:24 Imfumu na bacilolo baiko bonse nelyo baumfwile umulandu onse, awe tabaiketwe na mwenso, nangu ukulepula ifyakufwala fyabo pakulanga ukuti balapila nakalya." 
Jeremiah36:25 Nangu Elinatani na Delaya na Gemaria bapapete imfumu pakuti ioca icitabo, nakalya tayabaposeleko na mano iyoo." 
Jeremiah36:26 Elyo imfumu yakonkomesha Yerameli umwana wa mfumu, na Seraya mwana Ashrieli, na Shelemiya mwana Abudeli pakuti ebo bekate kalemba Baruki na kasesema Yeremia. Nomba Yawe nao abafisa." 
Jeremiah36:27 Ilyo imfumu yaocele icitabo umwali amashiwi ayo Yeremia aebele Baruki ukulemba, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Fwailapo icitabo cimbi icipombwa, ulembemo na mashiwi yalya yenefye yonse ayali muli cilya citabo ico Yehoyakimu imfumu ya bena Yuda yaocele.”" 
Jeremiah36:29 Elyo Yawe aeba Yeremia ukweba imfumu Yehoyakimu amashiwi na yambi ayakutila, “Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, ‘Iwe walioca icitabo, kabili waliipusha Yeremia ico alembele ukuti imfumu ya ku Babiloni ikesa kukonaula cino calo, no kwisa ipaululamo abantu ababamo kumo kwine ne nama ishabamo." 
Jeremiah36:30 Kanshi ine ne Yawe Lesa ndekweba iwe we Yehoyakimu imfumu ya bena Yuda ukuti, pali bamwano abaume tapakabe nelyo umo uukakupyana pa cipuna cakwa Davidi. Icitumbi cobe cikaposwa panse pa kasuba, na pa mpepo mu nshita ya bushiku." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ine nkakulimuna iwe, nkalimuna na bamwano pamo pene na bacilolo bobe, pa mulandu wa fyabupulumushi ifyo imwe bonse mucita. Imwe pamo pene na bena Yerusalemu na bena Yuda, tamumfwa nakalya, kanshi na ine nomba imwe bonsefye nkamuponesha ifinkunka fyonse ifyo nasosele ukuti nkacita.’”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Elyo Yeremia afwayapo icitabo cimbi, apeela kalemba wakwe Baruki, nao Baruki alembamo amashiwi yonsefye ayo Yeremia alemweba ukulemba. Alembamo amashiwi yalya yene yonsefye ayali muli cilya citabo ico Yehoyakimu imfumu ya bena Yuda yaocele. Yeremia alundamo na mashiwi yambi ayengi aya musango umo wine." 
Jeremiah37:1 Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni alisontele Sedekia mwana Yosia ukuba pa bufumu ubwakuteeka icalo ca Yuda pa malo yakwa Konia mwana Yehoyakimu. 
Jeremiah37:2 Lelo nao wine Sedekia tanakile mashiwi ayo Yawe aleeba kasesema Yeremia ukuya mweba, na bacilolo bakwe na bantu bambi mu calo nabo bene califye cimo cine, tabaleposako na mano nakalya." 
Jeremiah37:3 Elyo imfumu Sedekia yabuula Yehukali mwana Shelemia, na shimapepo Sefania mwana Maaseya, yabatuma kuli kasesema Yeremia. Nabo baya mwipusha abati, “Wingatupapatilako kuli Yawe Lesa wesu.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Pali iyo nshita ninshi Yeremia talaposwa mu cifungo, ninshi acili aleyendelafye no kulapitana mu bantu." 
Jeremiah37:5 Kabili pali iyo ine nshita ninshi ifita fyakwa Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto nafiima, na bena Kaludea abalelwisha umusumba wa Yerusalemu bati bomfwe, awe babwelelamo ukufuma ku Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah37:6 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe, Lesa wakwa Israeli. Kebe imfumu ya bena Yuda iyacikutuma kukwisa njipusha, utile auti, ‘Ifita fyakwa Farao ifili mu nshila kukwisa kutulako, ala fyalabwelelamo kumwabo ku Egupto." 
Jeremiah37:8 Ifita fya bena Kaludea fyena fili nokubwelulukila kuno no kwisa sansa uno musumba, fili no kwisa upoka no kuoca ku mulilo.’" 
Jeremiah37:9 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, mwilaibepa mwe bene no kutontonkanya ati, ‘Abena Kaludea capwa nabalala nabafumako kuno.’ Awe tefyo cili." 
Jeremiah37:10 Iwe nangufye wingacimfya ifita fyonse ifya bena Kaludea ifi filekulwisha, icakuti mwashalafye impondo sheka sheka mu nsakwe shabo, isho shine impondo kuti eshaima shaoca na uno wine musumba ku mulilo.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Ifita fya bena Kaludea fyalifumineko ku musumba wa Yerusalemu, pantu ifita fyakwa Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto fyaishile filepalamina." 
Jeremiah37:12 Kanshi Yeremia nao epakwima mu Yerusalemu, aya ku citungu ca bena Benjamini kukuya pokako icakaniko cakwe na bantu ba mu lupwa lwakwe." 
Jeremiah37:13 Nomba kutifye cilya afika pa mpongolo yakwa Benjamini, umukalamba wa bashilika uwalelondapo palya pene, ishina lyakwe ni Iriya mwana Shelemia kabili e mwishikulu wakwa Hanania, aikata kasesema Yeremia, ati nokuti, “Iwe ulefwaya ukufyukila ku bena Kaludea.”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremia nao ayasuka ati, “Awe iyoo. Ine nshilefyukila ku bena Kaludea nakalya.” Lelo ena tewakumfwa. Aikata Yeremia, amutwala na kuli bacilolo." 
Jeremiah37:15 Bacilolo nabo tepakufulilwa Yeremia, batala bamuma, elyo bamufungilila na mu ŋanda yakwa Yonatani kalemba wa mfumu. Iŋanda yakwe eyo basangwile icifungo." 
Jeremiah37:16 Yeremia bamubikile mu kamuputule ka panshi, no kukokola alikokwelemo inshita iitali." 
Jeremiah37:17 Imfumu Sedekia epakutuma abakuya buula Yeremia no kumuleta kwisano. Elyo kwisano kwine Sedekia aipusha Yeremia mu bumfisolo ati, “Bushe ulipo na fimo ifyo Yawe akutumine ukunjeba?” Apali Yeremia nao ati, “Ee, epo fili.” Akonkanyapo no kukonkanya ati, “Iwe ukaposwa ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Elyo Yeremia aipusha imfumu Sedekia ati, “Bushe kwena mulandu nshi ine nacitile kuli iwe, kuli bacilolo bobe, nangu kuli aba bantu, uwakuti iwe umposelepo mu cifungo?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Nga bakasesema bobe balya bakwebele ukuti imfumu ya ku Babiloni tayakakulwishe, nangu ukulwisha cino calo, bena bali kwi?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Kanshi nomba we mfumu mulopwe, wingomfwa ifyo ine ndekupapata. Kanabesa, ala wimbwesesha ku ŋanda kwa Yonatani kalemba obe, pantu icishinkafye eko nkaya fwila.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Kanshi imfumu Sedekia nayo epakupeela icipope icakwisalila Yeremia mu lubansa lwa bakalinda, emo balamupeelela umukate umo cila bushiku pa nshiku shonse, uwalefuma uko balepangila imikate, ukushintafye napo imikate yapwiliile mu musumba. Kanshi Yeremia nao epakulaikala mu lubansa lwa bakalinda mwine." 
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatiya mwana Matani, na Gedalia mwana Pashu, na Yukali mwana Shelemia, na Pashuri mwana Malikia, aba bonse balyumfwileko ifyo Yeremia aleeba abantu. Yeremia alebeba ukuti," 
Jeremiah38:2 “Yawe alesosa ati, ‘Onsefye uukashala muli uno musumba, akafwa ku nkondo atemwa ku cipowe nangu ku cikuko. Nomba onse uukafumamo no kuya cimba ku bena Kaludea, ena takafwe akaba nge citapwa ca mu nkondo, akashala umumi.’”" 
Jeremiah38:3 Kabili Yeremia alebeba ukuti Yawe alisosa ati, “Uno musumba nkaleka ifita fya mfumu ya ku Babiloni fikaupoke.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Bacilolo nabo epakweba imfumu Sedekia abati, “Uyu muntu Yeremia wakwipayafye, pantu imilandile yakwe yalatompola ifita fya muli uno musumba, yalatompola na bantu bambi bonse abashelepo muli uno musumba. Uyu muntu talefwaya kwafwa bantu nakalya, lelo alefwayafye ubusanso ukubaponena.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Imfumu Sedekia nayo epakusosa ati, “Cisuma, kanshi mucitenipo cimo ico mulefwaya, ine teti muleshe imwe iyoo.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Kanshi nabo epakubuula Yeremia, bamuposa na mu cishima cakwa Malikia umwana wa mfumu, icali mu lubansa lwine ulwa bakalinda. Babomfya intambo pakumwingisha panshi. Lelo mu cishima tamwali menshi iyoo, mwalifye amatipa. Awe emo nao Yeremia abwindila." 
Jeremiah38:7 Nomba mutungwi umo umwina Etiopia, ishina lyakwe ni Ebedimeleki uwalebomba kwisano, aumfwa ukuti nabaposa Yeremia mu cishima. Pali iyo ine nshita ninshi ne mfumu naiteka ne cilye pa mpongolo yakwa Benjamini." 
Jeremiah38:8 Kanshi nao Ebedimeleki epakufuma kwisano, aya pa cilye, alaeba ne mfumu ati," 
Jeremiah38:9 “We mfumu, kanabesa, ici cintu aba bantu bacitile, awe cibi nganshi. Nabaposa kasesema Yeremia mu cishima, kabili emo akafwila ku nsala pantu mu musumba tamuli mukate uushelemo”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Elyo imfumu Sedekia nayo yaeba Ebedimeleki umwina Etiopia ukuti, pa bantu abali palya pene, abuulepo abantu amakumi yatatu (30) abakuya nabo kukufumya kasesema Yeremia mu cishima ilyo ashilati afwe." 
Jeremiah38:11 Kanshi Ebedimeleki epakusenda abantu, aya nabo mu muputule umo uwa kwisano umo balesungila ifyakufwala. Abuulamo insalu ishikote ne fisamu ifyalepauka, afikakila na ku fimyando, aishisha na mu cishima umwali Yeremia." 
Jeremiah38:12 Elyo Ebedimeleki umwina Etiopia aeba Yeremia ati, “Isho insalu ishikote ne fisamu ifyalepauka fibike mu mapa, epakuti ifimyando fikucena.” Nao Yeremia efyo acita," 
Jeremiah38:13 awe nabo balamutintila pamulu ku fimyando, bamufumya na mu cishima. Yeremia nomba epakulasungwafye mu lubansa lwa bakalinda." 
Jeremiah38:14 Imfumu Sedekia yalitumine abakuya buula kasesema Yeremia, no kumuleta apo yali pa mpongolo yabutatu iyakwingililapo mwi Tempele lyakwa Yawe. Elyo imfumu yaeba Yeremia ati, “Ine nalakwipushapo fimo, wiesha kufisapo nelyo cimo kuli ine.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremia nao amwasuka ati, “Ine nga nakweba icishinka, iwe ulenjipaya, conse ine nga nakupandako amano, awe nalyo line tawaumfwe.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Elyo imfumu Sedekia yalapa kuli Yeremia mu bumfisolo ati, “Mu cishinkafye icakwa Yawe Umumi uwatupeela buno bumi, ine nshakwipaye, kabili nshakupose ku bantu abalefwaya ukukwipaya nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Elyo Yeremia aeba Sedekia ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, atile ati, “Iwe Sedekia nga wacimba kuli bamushika ba mfumu ya ku Babiloni, ninshi lyena ukapusuka, ninshi na uno musumba tabakaoce iyoo. Iwe ukapusuka, no lupwa lobe lwine ninshi nalo lukapusuka."
