Jeremiah38:18 Lelo nga wakaana ukucimba kuli bacilolo ba mfumu ya ku Babiloni, awe lyena uno musumba Yawe akaleka abena Kaludea bakaupoke, no kuoca bakaoce, nobe wine tawakamone pakupusukila uko bali.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Imfumu Sedekia nayo yayasuka ati, “Ine ndetiinakofye Abayuda balya bafyukile ku bena Kaludea. Kuti limbi eko bamposa, no kuncusha kuti balancusha.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremia nao ayasuka ati, “Iyoo tabakakuposeko nakalya. Ine nakupapata, iwe beelafye amashiwi yakwa Yawe ayo ine ndekweba, pantu ninshi lyena fyonsefye fikaba bwino kuli iwe, no kupusuka ninshi iwe ukapusuka." 
Jeremiah38:21 Yawe nananga ine mu cimonwa ifikakuponena, kumfwa iwe nga wakaanininafye ukucimba." 
Jeremiah38:22 Wamona. Abanakashi bonse abashala mu ŋanda ya mfumu ya cino calo ca Yuda, balya balebafumya no kulabatwala kuli bamushika ba mfumu ya ku Babiloni. Umfwa ifyo balesosa ilyo baleya, baleti, “‘Ababile ba mfumu nabakubepa kabili nabakucenjesha, no kunasha nabakunasha. Apo nomba utikile mu lutikiti, ababile bobe nabakusangukila.’”" 
Jeremiah38:23 Elyo kabili Yeremia asosa ati, “Abakashi bobe bonse na bamwano, bakabafumya mumobe, no kubatwala ku bena Kaludea, nobe wine tawakapusuke ukufuma ku maboko yabo. Imfumu ya ku Babiloni ikakwikata, no kukusenda muli bunkole, na uno wine musumba ukonaika ku mulilo.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Elyo Sedekia aeba Yeremia ati, “Wileka nelyo umo omfweko ifi twalanda, ninshi nobe wine tawafwe iyoo." 
Jeremiah38:25 Bacilolo nga baumfwa ukuti natulanda nobe, baleisa kwipusha baleti, ‘Twebe ifyo ulandile ku mfumu nefyo imfumu ine isosele. Nga taufishile nangu cimo kuli ifwe, ninshi lyena tatwakwipaye.’" 
Jeremiah38:26 Awe iwe wise ubebefye ukuti, ‘Ine nalepapatafye ku mfumu pakuti imbwesesha ku ŋanda yakwa Yonatani, epali eko naya fwila.’”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Awe na cine bacilolo bonse baisa kuli Yeremia. Balamwipusha, nao abasukilafye umo imfumu yamwebele ukwasuka. Awe bafilwa ne cakucitapo, pantu tapali nelyo umo uwaumfwileko ifyo imfumu Sedekia yalelanda na Yeremia." 
Jeremiah38:28 Nao Yeremia epakulasungwa mulya mwine mu lubansa lwa bakalinda ukushintafye no bushiku bapokele umusumba wa Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah39:1 Mu mwaka walengele pabula apo Sedekia atampile ukuteeka icalo ca Yuda, mu mweshi we kumi, Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni aliishile ne fita fyakwe fyonse, aisa wililila no musumba wa Yerusalemu no kuushinguluka." 
Jeremiah39:2 Mu mwaka walengele ikumi limo na umo (11) apo Sedekia aikalile pa bufumu, pa bushiku bwalenga pabula mu mweshi wabune, elyo na malinga ya ku musumba yabongolweke." 
Jeremiah39:3 Ilyo bapokele Yerusalemu, bamushika bakalamba aba mfumu ya ku Babiloni baliishile bonse, baisa ikala na pa mpongolo ya pakati nankati. Aba bamushika ni Negali Sheleseri umwina Samuga, na Nebo Salisekimu, na Negali Sheleseri umbi, na bamushikapo bambi bonse aba mfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah39:4 Sedekia imfumu ya calo ca Yuda pamo na bashilika bakwe bonse bati bamone ifyo caba, bafulumuka mu musumba pa nshita ya bushiku. Bakonka inshila iyaya kwibala lya mfumu, bapitila pa mpongolo iyabela lwa pakati ka malinga yabili, balola na ku mukonko wa Yordani." 
Jeremiah39:5 Nomba ifita fya bena Kaludea fyakunkunika imfumu Sedekia, fyamwikatila mu mawanga ya Yeriko. Epakumwikata bunkole, bamutwala na kuli Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni, uwali mu mushi wa Ribula mu calo ca Hamati, emo na Nebukadinesa amupingwila umulandu." 
Jeremiah39:6 Ku Ribula kwine eko imfumu ya ku Babiloni yaipaila na bamwana Sedekia abaume, ninshi na Sedekia wine no kumona alemonako. Eko yaipaila na bacilolo bene bonse abena Yuda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Elyo yatonkola na Sedekia amenso, yamukaka ne minyololo ya mukuba, yamutwala na ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah39:8 Pali iyo ine nshita, ninshi abena Kaludea naboca amayanda ya kwisano, na mayanda ya bantu, nababongolola na malinga yene aya ku Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah39:9 Elyo Nebusaradani umukalamba wa fita aikata abantu bambi bonse abashelemo mu musumba, abasenda na muli bunkole ku Babiloni, pamo pene na bambi bonse abaile cimba uko ali." 
Jeremiah39:10 Mu calo ca Yuda Nebusaradani ashamofye abalanda bene bene, abashakwetemo icuma, asha abapeela amabala ya myangashi ne filime fimbi." 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni alyebele Nebusaradani umukalamba wa fita fyakwe ukuti akonkomeshe abantu pa mulandu wakwa Yeremia atile ati," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Kabuule Yeremia, ulemusunga bwino. Tecakwesha kulamucusha iyoo, ulemucitilafye fyonse ifyo alefwaya.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Kanshi nao Nebusaradani pamo na Nebushasubani mushika mukalamba, na Negali Sheleseri nao mushika mukalamba, pamo na bamushika bakalamba bambi bonse aba mfumu ya ku Babiloni," 
Jeremiah39:14 epakutuma abakuya buula Yeremia, nabo baya mufumya na mu lubansa lwa bakalinda. Baeba na Gedalia mwana Aikamu, umwishikulu wakwa Shafani, pakuti eo alemusunga, amufishe na kumwabo umutende. Kanshi nao Yeremia epakulaikala ku bantu." 
Jeremiah39:15 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia ilyo bamufungile mu lubansa lwa bakalinda, no kumweba ati" 
Jeremiah39:16 “Kebe Ebedimeleki umwina Etiopia ukuti ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, ne Lesa wakwa Israeli ndetila nati, ‘Ine te shuko nalaletela uno musumba iyoo, ala lishamofye elyo nalauletela, nga mulya mwine nasosele ukuti efyo nkacita. Ilyo ici cintu cilecitika, iwe Ebedimeleki ulesangwapo, no kuimwena uleimwena na menso yobe." 
Jeremiah39:17 Nomba ine ne Yawe iwe ndekupokololako, tawaposwe ku bantu abo iwe utiina iyoo." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ine ndekupususha, tabakwipaye ku lupanga iyoo, lelo uli nokuba nge citapwa ca mu nkondo, pantu ine walintetekela.’ Nine ne Yawe Lesa nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Yawe alilandile kuli Yeremia, ilyo Nebusaradani mushika mukalamba wa fita amufumishe mu cifungo ku Rama. Ni ku Rama kwine eko batwele Yeremia, ninshi nakakwa iminyololo pamo na bantu bambi bonse aba mu Yerusalemu, na ba mu calo cine ica Yuda abo balesenda bunkole ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah40:2 Kanshi mushika mukalamba uwa fita epakutwala Yeremia eka lubali lumo, alamweba ati, “Yawe Lesa obe alipangile ukonaula cino calo," 
Jeremiah40:3 no kufikilisha nafikilisha ifyo asosele ukuti efyo akacita. Fyonse ifi naficitika, pantu abantu bobe balibifya kuli Yawe, balikaana no kulamubeela." 
Jeremiah40:4 Nomba ine nalakukakula iminyololo ku maboko, no kukuleka nalakulekamo pakuti uleyendela we mwine. Nga ulefwaya tuye bonse ku Babiloni, cili kuli iwe, ine nkalakusungafye bwino. Conse nga taulefwaya ukuti tuye bonse ku Babiloni, naco cili kuli iwe. Wamona, icalo cino conse cikalamba, kuti we mwine wasalapo kumo uko utemenwe. Kuti wayafye konse uko we mwine ulefwaya ukuya.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Eico lintu Yeremia talapilibuka ukwamba ukuya, Nebusaradani epakumweba ati, “Ale kanshi bwelelamo kuli Gedalia mwana Aikamu, mwishikulu Shafani, uo imfumu ya ku Babiloni yalashike pakuti aleteeka imishi ya muli cino calo ca Yuda, pakuti eo muleikala nankwe pamo pene na bantu bambi, atemwa kuti waya ikala kumbi konse uko we mwine umwene ukuti ekukulingile.” Elyo Nebusaradani apeelako Yeremia ubupe, amupeela ne fyakulya, amulekamo no kumuleka pakuti umwine aleya." 
Jeremiah40:6 Yeremia nao epakuya kuli Gedalia mwana Aikamu, eo alaikala nankwe mu Misipa, pamo pene na bantu abashelepo mu calo ca Yuda." 
Jeremiah40:7 Ilyo abakalamba bonse aba fita ifya bena Yuda pamo na bashilika babo abasalanganine mu mpanga baumfwile ukuti imfumu ya ku Babiloni naisonta Gedalia mwana Aikamu ukuba umulashi wa calo, uwakuti alesungako na bantu abaume, banamayo na bana abo abashasendelweko muli bunkole ku Babiloni abantu abali abalanda abene bene mu calo," 
Jeremiah40:8 lyena ninshi baishile kuli Gedalia ku Misipa. Abaishile bali ni Ishimaeli mwana Netania, na Yoanani mwana Karea, na Seraya mwana Tanumeti, na bamwana Efai umwina Netofa, na Yesania umwina Maakayi pamo na bantu babo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Elyo Gedalia mwana Aikamu, mwishikulu Shafani, alapa umulapo wakubalaya, bena pamo na bantu babo, ati, “Napalifye ine, imwe ala mwitiina kucimba ku bena Kaludea. Ikalenifye muno mwine, mulebombela imfumu ya ku Babiloni, ninshi na fyonse fyakulabafye bwino uko muli." 
Jeremiah40:10 Ine pano ndi, nakulaikala muno mwine mu Misipa, nakulamusoselako ku bena Kaludea abakulaisa kuno. Lelo imwe mulonganike umwangashi, ifitwalo na mafuta ya miolifa, mwisushe imitondo yenu, muye mwikale na mu misumba iyo mwe bene mwapoka.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Abena Yuda bambi bonse abali mu calo ca Moabu, na mu ca Amoni na mu ca Edomu na mu fyalo fimbi, ninshi nabo balyumfwa ukuti imfumu ya ku Babiloni yalisuminisha ukuti abena Yuda bamo bashale nabekala mu calo cabo ica Yuda, nokuti yalisonta na Gedalia mwana Aikamu, mwishikulu Shafani, ukuba umulashi wabo." 
Jeremiah40:12 Kanshi abena Yuda aba bonse epakufuma umo basalanganine, babwelela na mu calo cabo ica Yuda. Baisa kuli Gedalia mu Misipa, balalonganya no mwangashi uwingi, ne fitwalo nafyo ifingi." 
Jeremiah40:13 Elyo limbi Yoanani mwana Karea pamo ne ntungulushi sha bashilika abasalanganine mu mpanga, baisa kuli Gedalia mu Misipa." 
Jeremiah40:14 Balamweba abati, “Bushe iwe nawishiba ukuti Baalisi imfumu ya bena Amoni natuma Ishimaeli mwana Netania kukwisa kwipaya?” Lelo Gedalia mwana Aikamu ena tewakuti asumine nakalya." 
Jeremiah40:15 Elyo Yoanani mwana Karea aeba Gedalia mu bumfisolo mu Misipa mwine ati, “Leka nje njipaye Ishimaeli mwana Netania, tapabe nelyo umo uuleishiba uumwipeye. Ngeco twingamulekela ena akwipaye, cinshi? Ici cintu kuti casalanganya abena Yuda bonse abalongana uko uli, kabili na bena Yuda bonse abashalapo muli cino calo, kuti cabaposa mu bwafya.”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Lelo Gedalia mwana Aikamu, ena ayasuka Yoanani mwana Karea ati, “Wiesha kucita ifyo pantu ifyo ulelanda pali Ishimaeli fyabufifye.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Mu mweshi walenga cine lubali, Ishimaeli mwana Netania, mwishikulu Elishama, uwa mu lupwa lwabufumu kabili uwali umo pali bacilolo ba mfumu, alishile ku Misipa pamo na bantu ikumi limo kukumona Gedalia mwana Aikamu. Ilyo balelya icakulya pamo mu Misipa mwine," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishimaeli mwana Netania pamo na bantu ikumi limo abo ali nabo, baima, babuula impanga shabo, baipaya na Gedalia mwana Aikamu, mwishikulu Shafani, uo imfumu ya ku Babiloni yalashike ukulateeka icalo." 
Jeremiah41:3 Kabili Ishimaeli aipaya na bena Yuda bonse abali na Gedalia mu Misipa, aipaila kumo na bashilika abena Kaludea abaliko." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ubushiku bwakonkelepo ukufuma apo baipaile Gedalia, ninshi no kwishibikwa tacilaishibikwa ukuti Gedalia nabamwipaya," 
Jeremiah41:5 awe kwaisa na baume amakumi cine konse konse (80), batula ku Shekemu na ku Shilo na ku Samaria. Baisa nababeya imyefu, nabalepaula ne nsalu shabo, nabaitetaula ne mibili yabo pakulanga ubulanda. Baisa nabasenda imitulo ya cabunga no bubani pakuti bafituule mwi Tempele lyakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishimaeli mwana Netania nao afuma na mu Misipa, aya kukubasengela, ninshi napumapo no musowa. Cilya afika apo bali, abeba ati, “Aleni ingileni, mumonane na Gedalia mwana Aikamu.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Kutifye cilya baingila mu musumba, awe Ishimaeli mwana Netania pamo na bantu bakwe babepaya, baposa ne fitumbi fyabo mu cimukanda cimo." 
Jeremiah41:8 Nomba pali abo bene bantu, bambi ikumi limo bena baeba Ishimaeli abati, “Mukwai, ifwe mwitwipaya. Pantu ifwe natukwata iŋanu na male na mafuta ya miolifa no buci, no kufifisa twalififisa mu mpanga.” Kanshi bena epakubalekafye, ukwabula ukuti abepaye nga banabo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Icimukanda ico Ishimaeli aposelemo ifitumbi fya bantu bonse abo aipeye, cali icikulu. Ni mfumu Asa ewaimbile pakuti emo ileipokolwelako kuli Baasha imfumu ya calo ca Israeli. Ishimaeli aliciswishe ne fitumbi fya bantu abo aipeye." 
Jeremiah41:10 Elyo Ishimaeli mwana Netania abuula abana ba mfumu abanakashi, na bantu bambi abashelepo mu Misipa, abo Nebusaradani mushika mukalamba wa fita aebele Gedalia mwana Aikamu ukuti alebasunga, abasenda bunkole, alungama na ku calo ca bena Amoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Yoanani mwana Karea pamo ne ntungulushi sha fita ishali pamo nankwe, bati bomfwe ubupondo ubwacitile Ishimaeli mwana Netania," 
Jeremiah41:12 awe baimya abantu babo bonse, baya mukumulwisha, baya musanga mupepi ne cishiba icikulu icaba ku Gibeoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Cilyafye bankole bonse abo Ishimaeli asendele bamona Yoanani mwana Karea pamo ne ntungulushi sha fita, awe batemwa nganshi." 
Jeremiah41:14 Kanshi bankole abo Ishimaeli aikete mu Misipa, nabo epakwaluluka babutukila na kuli Yoanani mwana Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Ishimaeli mwana Netania pamo na bantu bakwe cine konse konse bena babutuka, bafulumukila na mu calo ca bena Amoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Elyo Yoanani mwana Karea, na bakalamba ba fita abo ali nabo, basenda abantu bonse abashele muli bunkole ukufuma ku Misipa, abo apokolwele ukufuma kuli Ishimaeli mwana Netania panuma yakusha aipaya Gedalia mwana Aikamu. Pa bantu aba pali abashilika, abanakashi, abaice na bamutungwi abo Yoanani afumishe ku Gibeoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 No kwima baima, kabili batala batubilishako ku Geruti Kimuhamu ukwali mupepi na Betelemu. Elyo kabili balapanga ukuya ku Egupto," 
Jeremiah41:18 pakubutuka abena Kaludea. Baletiina abena Kaludea, pantu Ishimaeli mwana Netania aliipeye Gedalia mwana Aikamu, uo imfumu ya ku Babiloni yasontele ukuba umulashi muli ico calo." 
Jeremiah42:1 Elyo abakalamba bonse aba fita, ukubikapo na Yoanani mwana Karea, na Yesania mwana Hoshaya, baima na bantu bonse, abakalamba na banono," 
Jeremiah42:2 baya eba kasesema Yeremia abati, “Wingomfwa ifyo ifwe tulekweba. Iwe tupapatileko kuli Yawe Lesa obe. Tupapatileko ifwe bonse fwe bashelepo. Kale twali abengi, nomba tushelefye abampendwa, no kuimwena nobe wine nauimwena." 
Jeremiah42:3 Tupapatileko kuli Yawe Lesa obe pakuti atulange inshila iyo tuli nokulolamo, atulange nefyo tuli nokucita.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Kasesema Yeremia nao abasuka ati, “Mwalandafye bwino. Ine nalamupapatilako kuli Yawe Lesa wenu, ngomo mwine munjebele. No kumweba ine nkamwebako fyonse ifyo Yawe akasuka. Ine nshakamufisepo nelyo cimo iyoo.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Kabili abantu baeba Yeremia abati, “Yawe e kambone wesu uwacine cine kabili uwacishinka, eukatushinina ifwe nga tatwakalebeela fyebo fyakwe fyonse ifyo Yawe Lesa obe akakweba ukuti wise utwebe." 
Jeremiah42:6 Nangufye fikabe ifyakutusansamusha atemwa iyoo, te mulandu, ifwe tukalabeelafye Yawe Lesa wesu uo ifwe tulekutumako. Fyonse fikabafye bwino kuli ifwe nga twalabeela Yawe Lesa wesu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Ilyo papitile inshiku ikumi limo, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Kanshi nao Yeremia epakwita Yoanani mwana Karea, na bakalamba bonse aba fita abo ali nabo, aitako na bantu bambi bonse abakalamba na banono." 
Jeremiah42:9 Alabeba ati, “Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli uo mwantumineko pakuya mupapatilako atile ati," 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Imwe nga muleikalilila muli cino calo ca Yuda, ine ninshi nkamukosha, nshakamonaule iyoo, nkamutekamo, nshakamulofye iyoo. Icinkunka ico ine namuletela, awe cilenangulusha." 
Jeremiah42:11 Imwe lekenifye ukulatiina imfumu ya ku Babiloni. Ala mwilatiina iyoo, pantu ine ndi nenu, ine nakulamupusushako no kulamupokololako kuli ena. Nine ne Yawe nalanda." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ine nkamubelelako uluse, nkalenga ne mfumu ine iya ku Babiloni ikamulangulukileko, ikamusuminishe no kulaikala muli cino calo cenu.’" 
Jeremiah42:13 “Nomba imwe mwe bantu nga mwatalamina Yawe Lesa wenu, muletila, ‘Awe ifwe tatulefwaya kulaikala muli cino calo." 
Jeremiah42:14 Tulefwayafye ukuya ikala ku calo ca Egupto uko tushakalelwa nkondo, nangu ukumfwako ipenga ilyakulonganika abantu ku nkondo, uko tushakalecula na ku nsala.’" 
Jeremiah42:15 Nga cakuti mwalalanda ifi, mulandu wenu, lelo kwena imwe mwe bashalapo muno muntu mu Yuda, umfweni ifilesosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, aletila ati, ‘Imwe nga namupanga icine cine ukuya ikala ku Egupto," 
Jeremiah42:16 lyena inkondo ine iyo muletiina, ikamwimina kulya kwine ku Egupto, ne cipowe cine cikamukonka panuma kulya kwine ku Egupto, no kufwila ni ku Egupto kwine mukaya fwila." 
Jeremiah42:17 Abantu bonse abapangile ukuya ikala ku Egupto, bakaya fwa ku nkondo atemwa ku cipowe nangu ku cikuko. Tapakayeshala nelyo umo, tapakabe nelyo umo uukapusukako ku cinkunka ico ine nkaya baponesha.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, aletila ati, ‘Ngefi fine naimine abena Yerusalemu mu bukali bwandi na mu cipyu candi, efyo nemwe bene nkamwimina nga mukaya ku calo ca Egupto. Abantu bambi bakalakuntafye imitwe pakumumona, bakalamuwela, bakalabuula ne shina lyenu elyo bakalelumbula pakutipwila. Cino calo imwe tamwakatale nakabili amucishimpamo ilinso nakalya.’”" 
Jeremiah42:19 Elyo kabinge Yeremia akonkanyapo ati, “Imwe mwe bantu mwe bashalapo muno muntu mu Yuda, Yawe alemulesha ukuya ku Egupto. Na ine wine ne Yeremia ndemusokako" 
Jeremiah42:20 ukuti, ala mwaliiletelele mwe bene, ilyo mwantumine kuli Yawe Lesa wesu, no kulanjeba amuti, ‘Tupapatileko kuli Yawe Lesa wesu. Kabili ukatwebefye fyonse ifyo alefwaya tucite, no kucita efyo tukacita.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Ine lelo nimwebelapo fyonse, nomba imwe fyonsefye ifyo Yawe wesu antumine ukwisa mweba namufikaanininafye ndai." 
Jeremiah42:22 Eico kanshi nomba mushininkishe ukuti ku calo uko mulefwaya ukuya ikala, uko kwine eko mukafwila ku nkondo atemwa ku cipowe nangu ku cikuko.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Ilyo Yeremia apwile ukulaeba abantu bonse amashiwi ayo Yawe Lesa wabo amutumine ukuya beba," 
Jeremiah43:2 elyo Asariya mwana Hoshaya, na Yoanani mwana Karea, na bantu bambi bonse abacilumba, baeba Yeremia abati, “Ulebepafye ubufi iwe. Yawe Lesa wesu takutumine nakalya kukwisa tulesha ukuya ikala ku Egupto." 
Jeremiah43:3 Ni Baruki mwana Neriya eukutunkilefye, epakuti abena Kaludea bakatwikate, bakatwipaye, atemwa bakatusende bunkole ku Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Kanshi Yoanani wine mwana Karea na bakalamba bonse aba fita na bantu bambi bonse, awe bakaana ukumfwa amashiwi yakwa Yawe, bakaana no kulaikala mu calo ica Yuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Elyo Yoanani mwana Karea na bakalamba bonse aba fita basenda abantufye bonse abashelepo mu calo ca Yuda. Basendela kumo kwine na bantu bonse abafumine mu fyalo fya bantu ba mishobo yonse umo basalanganine. 
Jeremiah43:6 Basenda abaume na banakashi na bana, pamo na bana ba mfumu abanakashi. Basendela kumo na bantu bonsefye abo Nebusaradani mushika mukalamba wa fita ashilile Gedalia mwana Aikamu, mwishikulu Shafani, pakuti eo alebasunga. Na kasesema wine Yeremia pamo na Baruki mwana Neriya babasendela kumo." 
Jeremiah43:7 Bakaana ukubeela amashiwi yakwa Yawe, baima, balaya na ku calo ca Egupto, basuka bafika na mu musumba wa Tapanesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Mu Tapanesi mwine ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yeremia aliti," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Fwayapo amabwe yamo ayakulu, uye shiika mu lubansa, mwisamba lya matabo, palya bapitila pakwingila mu ŋanda yabuteeko iyaba muli uno musumba, ilya ifikililamo imfumu yabo Farao, uleke na bena Yuda bamoneko uko uleyashiika." 
Jeremiah43:10 Elyo iwe ubebe ukuti, Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, ati, ‘Ndeyabuula umubomfi wandi Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni. Icipuna cakwe icabufumu ndeisa citeeka pali aya yene mabwe nshiikile, ndeisa citapo ne cintamfu cabufumu." 
Jeremiah43:11 Nebukadinesa akesa cimfya icalo ca Egupto. Abantu abasontelwa ukufwa ku cikuko, Nebukadinesa akalenga bafwe ku cikuko, abasontelwa ukuya muli bunkole, akesa basenda muli bunkole, abasontelwa ukufwa ku nkondo, akesa bepaya ku nkondo." 
Jeremiah43:12 Akesa oca amatempele ya muno Egupto ayo bapepelamo imilungu yabo, elyo utulubi twabo akesa toca, atemwa akesa tusendafye. Nga filya fine kacema atola inda mu fyakufwala fyakwe, efyo ne mfumu ya ku Babiloni ileisa solosota icalo ca Egupto, elyo ikaye ilecinda na malaila pakubwelelamo kumwakwe." 
Jeremiah43:13 Ikesa tobaula inceshi sha mabwe ishamushilo, ishaba kwitempele ilyo bapepelamo akasuba ku Heliopolisi muno mwine mu Egupto. Ileisa oca na matempele ya milungu ya muno Egupto.’”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Yawe alilandile kuli Yeremia palwa bena Yuda bonse abaleikala mu calo ca Egupto mu musumba wa Migidoli no wa Tapanesi, no wa Memfisi na mu citungu ca Patirosi icabeela ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Jeremiah44:2 Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli alisosele ati, “Imwe mwe bena Yuda, mwaliimwena na menso yenu icinkunka ico naletele Yerusalemu, ne misumba imbi yonse iya mu calo ca Yuda. Na nombaline icilifye amatololo, takuli nelyo umo uwikalamo nakalya." 
Jeremiah44:3 Ico ine nacitile ifi, nico abantu abalimo balecita ifyabipa, basuka bankalifya no mutima. Balefutumwina imilungu imbi imbi ububani no kubombela eyo balebombela, nelyo nayo intu bashatalile abeshiba, nangufye nimwe bene, nangufye ifikolwe fyenu fine." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ine nabikilepofye ukulamutumina ababomfi bandi bonse bakasesema, nabo balemulesha ukucita ici cintu icabunani ico ine napatisha." 
Jeremiah44:5 Nomba imwe tamwalefwaya kumfwa nangu ukuposako amano nakalya. Tamwalefwaya kuleka musango wenu uwakufutumwina imilungu imbi imbi ububani. 
Jeremiah44:6 Kanshi na ine epakwimina mu bukali bwandi ne cipyu candi imisumba ya mu Yuda, ne misebo ya mu Yerusalemu, no kuyoca ku mulilo. Ee, yasangukafye amatololo, na bantu bapapafye pakumona ifyo caba ukushinta na lelo." 
Jeremiah44:7 “Kanshi ine ne Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, ne Lesa wakwa Israeli, ndemwipusha umulandu walenga ukuti imwe nomba muiletelele icinkunka icakula ifi. Bushe imwe mulefwaya ukuiletelela ukwakuti mupatukeko ukufuma ku Bayuda abaume na banakashi, abaice no tunya, icakuti pali imwe pekashala nelyo umo, batini?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Ngeco imwe mulenkalifisha cinshi kulwa tulubi twenu, na kulwa kufutumwina imilungu imbi imbi ububani muli cino calo ca Egupto umo mwaisa mukwikala? Bushe pakulacita ifi mulefwayafye ukuilofya mwe bene, icakuti abantu ba mishobo yonse pano isonde bakalemuwela, bakalebuula ne shina lyenu, elyo bakalelumbula pakutiipwila, mwa?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Ifibi fyonse ifyo ifikolwe fyenu fyalecita, ifyo ne shamfumu sha mu Yuda shalecitako pamo na bakashi bashiko, ifyo nemwe bene mwalecitako pamo na bakashi benu mu calo ca Yuda na mu misebo ya mu Yerusalemu, bushe apa pene epo mufilabile, batini?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Elyo ukushinta na nomba imwe mwe bena Yuda tamwalapila nakalya. Tamwankwatila katiina iyoo, kabili tamukonka mafunde yandi ne fipope fyandi, ifyo ine namupeele imwe pamo ne fikolwe fyenu.”" 
Jeremiah44:11 Kanshi ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli ati, “Ine nomba nkamulofya imwe, nkonaula na bena Yuda bonse." 
Jeremiah44:12 Elyo abena Yuda abashalapo, abapangile ukwisa ikala muno Egupto, nkamona umusango wakubalofeshamo bonsefye muno mwine mu Egupto ku nkondo na ku cipowe. Bonsefye abakalamba na banono bene bakafwila muno Egupto, bakafwa ku nkondo atemwa ku cipowe. Abantu bakalapapafye pakumona, bakalabasuula, bakalabawela, bakalabuula ne shina lyabo elyo bakalelumbula pakutiipwila." 
Jeremiah44:13 Abaikala muno calo ca Egupto, ine nkabalimuna nga filya fine nalimwine Yerusalemu, nkababuushisha inkondo, nkabaletela icipowe ne cikuko." 
Jeremiah44:14 Pa bena Yuda abashalapo, abaisa ikala muno mu Egupto, tapakabe uukapusukapo nangu ukashalapo umumi. Tapakamoneke na wakubwelela ku calo ca Yuda, ico bafuluka ukuya ikalamo nakabili. Tapakabe wakubwelelamo kanofye bamo bamo abakuti bafyukilefye.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Abaume bonse abaishibe ukuti abakashi babo balafutumwina imilungu imbi imbi ububani, elyo na banakashi bonsefye abasangilwepo, ukubikapofye na bena Yuda abaikele mu citungu ca Patirosi icaba mu Egupto, nalyo ibumba lya bantu ilikulu nganshi, kanshi abo bantu elyo baeba Yeremia abati," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Ifyo Yawe akutumine iwe ukutweba, ala ifwe twafikaana, tatwafyumfwe napa nakalya." 
Jeremiah44:17 Ifwe twakulacitafye ifyo tukwebele ukuti efyo twakulacita, epela. Umulungu wesu namfumu wa mu mulu, ifwe eo twakulafutumwina ububani, twakulawitulwila ne mituulo ya fyakunwa, nga filya fine na bashifwe, pamo na bashamfumu besu na bacilolo besu balecita mu misumba ya mu calo ca Yuda na mu misebo ya mu Yerusalemu. Pantu lyena twalekwata ifyakulya ifingi, twalekwata ishuko, ne shamo talyaletuponena nakalya." 
Jeremiah44:18 Elyo ukutulafye apo twalekela ukufutumwina namfumu wa mu mulu ububani, no kuwitulwila imituulo ya fyakunwa, awe nomba ifintu fyalitubula, na bantu besu tepakufwa ku nkondo na ku cipowe.”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Abanakashi nabo ebakulundapo amashiwi abati, “Ilyo twalefutumuna ububani no kupanga imikate iyapalanako ne cipasho ca namfumu wa mu mulu, ne lintu twaleufutumwina ububani no kulawitulwila imituulo ya fyakunwa, bushe abalume besu nabo tabaletusuminisha?”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Cilya abantu bonse abaume na banakashi bapwa ukulanda ifi, elyo Yeremia abeba ati," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Palwa ububani ubo imwe mwalefutumuna mu misumba ya mu calo ca Yuda na mu misebo ya mu Yerusalemu, pamo ne fikolwe fyenu ne shamfumu shenu, na bacilolo benu na bantu bene bambi aba mu calo ca Yuda, bushe imwe muletontonkanya ukuti Yawe taishibepo nelyo cimo, atemwa muletila alilabako, batini?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Tepapa ukushinta na lelo icalo cenu calyonaika, tamwaba nelyo umo uwaikalamo. Abantu bambi bapapafye pakumona ifyo cili, ne shina lyaciko elyo balumbula no kubomfya pakutipwila, pantu Yawe asukile afilwa ukushipikisha imyendele yenu ne misango yenu iyabipisha." 
Jeremiah44:23 Ici cinkunka calimuponena imwe, ngefi fine cili ukushinta na pali lelo, pantu imwe mwalefutumwina imilungu imbi imbi ububani, mwalebifya na kuli Yawe Lesa. Mwalekaana no kulanakila amafunde yakwe, ne fyebo fyakwe, ne fipope fyakwe.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Kabinge Yeremia akonkanyapo ukulaeba abantu bonse abaume na banakashi, ati, “Umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Yawe, mwe bena Yuda aba mu Egupto. Lesa umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, asosa ati," 
Jeremiah44:25 ‘Imwe mwe baume, palibufi nga nimwe mwe bakashi babo, mwalicita ifilayo ifine fine kuli kanamfumu ka mu mulu. Mwalilaya ukuti mwakulakafutumwina ububani, no kulaketulwila imituulo ya fyakunwa, nefi fine ifilayo imwe mulafisunga. Cisuma! Aleni akusungishenifye ifilayo fyenu! Akuketulwilenifye ifyakunwa!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Nomba kwena umfweni icilayo ico na ine ne Yawe namulaya imwe mwe bena Yuda, mwe baikala muno mu Egupto. Ala napalifye ine ne Yawe ne we shina ilikulu, nalapa ukuti pali baimwe ine nshakatale ndekapo nelyo umo uwakuti akalebula ishina lyandi, elyo akalelumbula pakulayapo icilayo cimo, ati, “Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Umumi.”" 
Jeremiah44:27 Nakulamuceceta pakuti nkamuletele ishamo, ishuko lyena nakalyafye. Imwe mwe bena Yuda mwe baikala muno mu Egupto, mukafwa ku nkondo atemwa ku cipowe, mpakafye bonse mukapwe." 
Jeremiah44:28 Banono abakapusukako ku mfwa, ebakafuma muno Egupto, no kubwelela ku calo ca Yuda. Lyena elyo abakashalapo pa bena Yuda abaisa ikala muno mu Egupto elintu bakashininkishapo uwalanda ifyacishinka, nga nine atemwa nga nibo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Neci e cishibilo namupeela icakuti ine ne Yawe nkamukandila imwe muno mwine, nokuti icilayo candi icakumulofya imwe cikacitika." 
Jeremiah44:30 Farao Hofula imfumu ya mu Egupto, ine nalamuposa ku balwani bakwe abafwaya ukumwipaya, nalamuposa nga filya fine naposele Sedekia imfumu ya calo ca Yuda kuli Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni, umulwani wakwe uwalefwaya ukumwipaya.’”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Ni mu mwaka walengele ine, apo Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia atampile ukulateeka icalo ca Yuda, emo Baruki mwana Neriya alembele mu katabo kamo amashiwi yonse ayo Yeremia alemweba ukulemba. Elyo kasesema Yeremia aebele Baruki ati," 
Jeremiah45:2 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli kuli iwe we Baruki. 
Jeremiah45:3 Iwe uletila auti, ‘Awe ine nomba naleka. Pantu Yawe nanundilapo amacushi na yambi. Ine ni mfwafye kukuteta, ndefilwa no kumona apakupemwinako.’”" 
Jeremiah45:4 Kanshi Yawe nao epakweba Yeremia ukuti, “Eba Baruki ukutila, ‘Ine ne Yawe ndebongolola ifyo nakuulile, ndenukaula nefyo nalimbile. Ee, efyo nalacita icalofye conse." 
Jeremiah45:5 Elyo iwe Baruki, bushe ulefwaya ukuti ine nkucitilepo fimo ifikulu? Ala wilafwaya ifyo iyoo. Ine nalaletela abantunse bonse ifinkunka, nomba iwe tawakafwe ukaba nge citapwa ca mu nkondo konsefye uko wakulaya. Nine ne Yawe nalanda.’”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyaishile kuli kasesema Yeremia palwa mishobo ya benafyalo. 
Jeremiah46:2 Palwa calo ca Egupto, Yawe alandile pa mulandu wa fita fyakwa Farao Neko, imfumu ya calo ca Egupto, ifyo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni acimfishe ku Kakemishi, mupepi no mumana wa Yufurate, mu mwaka walengele ine apo Yehoyakimu mwana Yosia atampile ukulateeka icalo ca Yuda. Atile ati," 
Jeremiah46:3 “Mwe fita fya bena Egupto, Fwalileni ifyakuipangasha, ikatilileni inkwela shenu, aleni, kalweni nomba inkondo." 
Jeremiah46:4 Pekanyeni bakabalwe benu, ninenipo. Tantameni, fwalileni utumpompo twenu. Buuleni amafumo yenu ayatwa. Fwaleni na malaya yenu aya fyela.”" 
Jeremiah46:5 Elyo kabili Yawe aipusha ati, “Nga nomba kabili finshi filya namona? Abena Egupto balya balafulumuka kulwa mwenso. Abashilika babo naba babweseshamo kunuma. Icintiinya cili mpanga yonse, batonkwele ulubilo ulwine lwine, na kunuma tekwakuceba iyoo." 
Jeremiah46:6 Abalubilo nabafilwa ukwakufulumukila, abashilika nabafilwa ukumona umwakupusukila. Ku mumana wa Yufurate, lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, eko baletalansukila, no kuwa eko balewila." 
Jeremiah46:7 “Nani ulya aletulumana ngo mumana wa Nailo, ulya aletumbana ngo mumana uuleposa ilyeshi?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ala ni Egupto euletumbana ngo mumana wa Nailo, euletulumana ngo mumana uuleposa ilyeshi. Abena Egupto bali baletila abati, ‘Ifwe twalaima, tubunshe isonde lyonse, tulofye imisumba na bantu bene abekalamo." 
Jeremiah46:9 Imeni mwe bakabalwe, akuyeni mwe maceleta. Lekeni abashilika bambe ukuya. Abena Kushi na bena Puti baye ne nkwela. Imyeni na bena Ludi abacenjela ukuposa imifwi.’" 
Jeremiah46:10 “Buno bushiku, e bushiku bwakwa Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, ni lelo alelandula, ni lelo alelimuna abalwani bakwe. Ulupanga lwakwe lwalaipaya apo lulefwaila, no kulenga umulopa upwe kukusuma, pantu Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita aleleka ilambo, lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso aka calo lwa ku mumana wa Yufurate." 
Jeremiah46:11 We nacisungu mwana Egupto kabiye ku Gileadi, eko kafwaye umuti wakukundapa. Waliicusha ukubomfya imiti iingi nganshi, lelo tapaba muti uwingakuposha iwe nakalya." 
Jeremiah46:12 Abantu ba mishobo yonse nabomfwa ifyo imwe musebene, ne sonde liswilefye imisowa yenu. Pantu umushilika aletalansukila ku mushilika mubiye, na bonse babili emiwile.”" 
Jeremiah46:13 Ili e shiwi Yawe aebele kasesema Yeremia, ilyo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni aishile kukulwisha icalo ca Egupto." 
Jeremiah46:14 “Umeni imbila mu mishi ya mu Egupto, bilikisheni mu Migidoli, na mu Memfisi, na mu Tapanesi, mutile, ‘Imeni muipekanye, pantu ulupanga luleshinguluka monse monse kukonaula bonse.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Ngeco Apisi afulumukile cinshi? Cinshi umulungu wenu cilume wa ŋombe ashishanshisheko? Ala ni Yawe eumulimwine. 
Jeremiah46:16 Abashilika benu batalansuka, no kuwa nabawa. Elyo baleebana abati, ‘Imeni natuleya tubwelele ku calo cesu ku bantu besu, uleke tupusukeko ku lupanga lwa balwani.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto mwinikeni ishina ilipya ilyakuti, ‘Uwa congo icingi uupanya inshita iyalinga.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 “Napalifye ine Umumi, efyasosa Imfumu, uwitwa Yawe umwine wa fita, ndeti, ‘Nga filya fine ulupili lwa Tabo lwasansukisha pali shonse, kabili nga filya fine ulupili lwa Kameli lwasansuka mu lulamba lwa bemba, efyo na umo uwakumusansa imwe akesa." 
Jeremiah46:19 Imwe mwe bena Egupto, longeleni calimo ifipe ifyakuya nafyo muli bunkole. Pantu Memfisi alasanguka icibolya, alaonaika, takwakabe na wakwikalamo.’" 
Jeremiah46:20 “Egupto aba ngo musepela wa ŋombe uukota uwaina, lelo utushembele tulemwishilila ukufuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Jeremiah46:21 Ne fita fya malipilo ifyo abena Egupto balemba incito yabushilika pakati kabo, nangu baba nge fiponti fya ŋombe ifyaina, awe nabo bene nalupwa, nababwelelamo ulubilo. Nabo bene nabafilwa ukushanshako, pantu nabubafikila ubushiku bwa finkunka, naibafikila inshita yakukandilwapo." 
Jeremiah46:22 “Abena Egupto pakufulumuka balesakunya nge nsoka, pantu nabafulisha abalwani babo ababeshilile. Abalwani balebasansa na masembe, kwati bantu balesansa inkuni." 
Jeremiah46:23 Abalwani baletemaula umutengo wa mu Egupto, nangu wafumbisha.” Efyasosa Yawe. “Bali imintapendwa, nabacila na pali makanta ku bwingi." 
Jeremiah46:24 Umwana mwanakashi wa Egupto nasebana, nacimba ku bantu abafumine ku kapinda ka ku kuso.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, kabili aletila ati, “Mwalamona ifyo ine nalakanda Amoni, umulungu wa mu musumba wa Tebesi, nalakandila kumo kwine na Farao ne calo ca Egupto, ne milungu ilya ine iyabamo, kumo kwine ne ntungulushi ishabamo. Nalakanda Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto, pamo na bambi bene bonse abashinta umutima muli Farao." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ine ndebaposa ku bafwaya ukubepaya, kuli Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni na kuli bacilolo bakwe. Lelo kwena kuntanshi abantu bakekala nakabili mu Egupto nge nshiku shakale. Nine ne Yawe nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 “Imwe mwe bana ba mubomfi wandi Yakobo, ala imwe mwilatunsha na mitima, imwe mwe bena Israeli, ala imwe mwilatiina iyoo. Pantu ine nkamufumyako kuli ico calo cakutali, nkapususha abana benu ku calo uko baikala bunkole. Mwe bamwana Yakobo mukabwela, mukese ikalila na ku matwi tondolo, mukesa ikala umutelelwe, takwakabe nawakumutiinya nakalya." 
Jeremiah46:28 Mwilatunsha mitima, imwe mwe bana ba mubomfi wandi Yakobo, pantu ine nkaba nenu, efyasosa Yawe. Ine nkalofya umupwilapo abantu ba mishobo yonse abo namuposeleko, nomba imwe nshakamulofye umupwilapo iyoo. Nkalamukanda, lelo mu mulinganya, nshakulamulekafye iyoo ukwabula ukumukanda.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Ilyo Farao imfumu ya mu Egupto ali talati asanse umusumba wa Gasa, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Yeremia palwa Bafilisiti." 
Jeremiah47:2 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Moneni. Amenshi yalya yaletulumana ku kapinda ka ku kuso, yakulapita ngo mumana uuposele. Yalebunsha icalo, ne fintu fyonse ifyabamo, yalebunsha imisumba na bantu bene abaikalamo. Abantu bakulakuta mutuule, abekalacalo bonse bakulalila nganshi." 
Jeremiah47:3 Bakulaumfwa inshindo sha bakabalwe, ne congo ca maceleta, no kukolonkonta kwa mipeto ya maceleta. Bashibo tababweleleko ku bana babo iyoo, pantu mu maboko yabo namupomponteka." 
Jeremiah47:4 Inshita naifika iyakulofeshapo Abafilisiti, iyakucilikilapo Turi na Sidoni, ilya misumba isheleko pakuti ilabafwa. Pantu ine ne Yawe Lesa nalalofya Bafilisiti, abashelepo mu cishi ca Kafito." 
Jeremiah47:5 Abena Gasa nababeya inkuso kulwa bulanda, na bena Ashikeloni balifye tondolo. Imwe mwe Bafilisiti abashelepo, bushe mukaleka lilali ukulaitetaula pakulanga ubulanda?" 
Jeremiah47:6 “Iwe wabilikisha auti: ‘Iyee, we lupanga lwakwa Yawe nobe. Bushe uleleka lilali ukulakomaula? Bwelela mu citubo cobe, emo wikale utuusheko.’" 
Jeremiah47:7 Nga kuti lwatuushako shani, pa nshita lulebomba umulimo, uo ine ne Yawe Lesa ndupeele? Nine ndukonkomeshe ukusansa umusumba wa Ashikeloni, kumo kwine na bantu abaikala mu lulamba lwa bemba.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Palwa calo ca Moabu, Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli, alilandilepo ati, “Bashama abena Nebo, pantu umusumba wabo naonaika. Nabasebanya no kupoka umusumba wa Kiriataimu, ne linga lyauko ilya amaka nabalibongolola, na bantu ababamo nabasebana." 
Jeremiah48:2 Ukulumbuka kwa calo ca Moabu nakupwa. Mu musumba wa Heshiboni abalwani balepanga abati, ‘Mwe, natulofye umushobo wa bena Moabu.’ Mu mushi wa Diboni mwalabafye tondolo, ifita fya balwani fyalawishilila." 
Jeremiah48:3 “Umfweni ifyo abena Holonaimu balekuuta, baleti, ‘We bupondo nobe. We bonaushi nobe.’" 
Jeremiah48:4 Icalo ca Moabu naconaika, inkuuta sha bena Moabu shileumfwika na ku Soa." 
Jeremiah48:5 Umfweni ifyo bele balelila, ilyo baleya mu musebo wapita pa lupili lwa Luiti. Baleumfwa inkuuta palwa bonaushi, ilyo baletentemukila ku Holonaimu." 
Jeremiah48:6 ‘Mwe, mwalafwa, butukishenifye. Mulebutukafye nga filya fibutuka punda wa mpanga mu matololo.’" 
Jeremiah48:7 “Mwe bena Moabu mwashintile imitima mufyo mwacita, na mu fyuma fyenu, nemwe bene nomba mwalaikatwa. Na Kemoshi umulungu wenu walasendwa bunkole, pamo pene na bacilolo bakako na bashimapepo bakako." 
Jeremiah48:8 Umonaushi aleishilila cila musumba, tapapusuke umusumba nelyo umo. Ishika lileonaika kumo kwine ne wanga. Nine ne Yawe ndelanda." 
Jeremiah48:9 Peeleni amapindo kuli Moabu, pantu alefwaya ukupupuka. Imisumba yabo yalabafye ifibolya, takwakabe muntu uukalaikalamo nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah48:10 Atipwa umuntu uubomba umulimo wakwa Yawe mulele mulele. Atipwa umuntu uushipailako ku lupanga lwakwe. 
Jeremiah48:11 Yawe aletila ati, “Ukufuma ku citendekelo, Moabu aikalilafye ku matwi tondolo, aba ngo mwangashi uwaikalilafye, uo bashatala abapungwila mu mitondo imbi, tatala asendwapo muli bunkole. No mulyo wakwe tawatala aupwamo, wabamofye umo wabela." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Kanshi nomba kwalaisa inshiku shimo, ilyo ine ne Yawe nalatuma abakwisa itila icalo ca Moabu nga filya betila umwangashi. Tamwaise shala kantu mu mitondo yaciko iya mwangashi, ne mitondo ine balaisa itobaula." 
Jeremiah48:13 Elyo abena Moabu baleikatwa ne nsoni pa mulandu wakwa Kemoshi umulungu wabo, nga filya fine aba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli baiketwe ne nsoni ku Betele pa mulandu wa mulungu wabo, uo bashintilemo imitima." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Mwe bena Moabu, bushe kuti mwalaitutumuna shani ukuti imwe muli mpalume, ukuti imwe muli baume kukulwa inkondo?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Icalo ca Moabu cili nokonaika pamo pene ne misumba yaciko, na balumendo bene bene ababamo bali nokwipaiwa. Efyasosa mfumu, uwitwa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah48:16 Ishamo lya calo ca Moabu lyapalamina, icalo calaonaikafye bwangu." 
Jeremiah48:17 Akuloosheni aba bantu imwe mwe bapalamana nabo, imwe bonse mwe baishiba ifyo balumbuka. Akutileni, ‘Oowe ifyo ubuteeko bwabo ubwamaka bwapwa ee! Ifyo ubucindami no bulamba bwapwa ee!’" 
Jeremiah48:18 “Imwe mwe baikala mu mushi wa Diboni, fumeni pa fipuna fyenu ifyacindama, ikalenifye panshi mu lukungu. Uwakonaula icalo ca Moabu naisa, nabongolola na malinga yaciko." 
Jeremiah48:19 Mwe baikala mu mushi wa Aroeli, imwe keminineni mu musebo, mulepembela, muleipusha umwaume uulebutuka, no mwanakashi uubutwike, muleti, ‘Finshi ficitike?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Ala icalo ca Moabu nacisebana, pantu naconaika, akulileni no kukuuta! Muye mulebilikisha na mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Alinoni, ukuti icalo ca Moabu cishelefye amatololo." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Inshita naifika iyakupingwilapo imisumba iyaba mu calo icabatama neyi misumba ni Holoni, na Yasa, na Mefati," 
Jeremiah48:22 na Diboni, na Nebo, na Beti Dibulataimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 no musumba wa Kiriataimu, ne misumba ya Beti Gamuli, na Beti Meoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 na Kerioti, no musumba wa Bosira. Inshita naifika iyakupingwilapo ne misumba yonse ya mu calo ca Moabu, iyakutali ne yamupepi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Ubulamba bwa bena Moabu nababupwisha, amaka yabo nayapela. Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Lengeni abena Moabu bakolwe, pantu balintalamina ine ne Yawe. Abena Moabu bakulaalanganafye mu malushi yabo, na bantu bambi bakulabawela." 
Jeremiah48:27 Bushe temwe mwalewela abena Israeli? Bushe mwasangilishe bali pamo na bapupu, icakuti lyonse ilyo mwalebalandapo, mwalekuntafye imitwe pakubasuula?" 
Jeremiah48:28 “Imwe mwe bena Moabu, aleni fumenimo mu misumba yenu. Kabiyeni mukulaikala mu fimabwe. Emo kekaleni nga mukufi uupikula icisansala cakwe mu lucena lwa mabwe." 
Jeremiah48:29 “Abena Moabu, ala tepacilumba mwe. Ifwe twalyumfwa kale ifyo baba ne cilumba ne miya, nefyo abene baitutumuna no kukwatisha amataki, nefyo abene baikusha mu mitima yabo." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ine ne Yawe nalishiba icilumba cabo. Amataki yabo yabuwelewelefye, ne fintu ifyo bacita nafyo fine fyafyefye." 
Jeremiah48:31 Awe kanshi ine kandelooshafye abena Moabu bonse, ndeloosha abena Moabu bonse, ndeloosha na bena Kiri Hareseti bene." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ine nakulaloosha abena Sibuma, ngefyo abena Yaseri bakulabaloosha. We musumba wa Sibuma, iwe waba ngo mwangashi uo imisambo yafika na kwishilya lya Bemba Wamfwa, no kuya shintafye na ku musumba wa Yaseri. Elyo nomba umonaushi nafika mukonaula ifitwalo fya mwangashi obe, ne fisabo fimbi ifyo walobolola." 
Jeremiah48:33 Mu calo ca mufundo ica Moabu, awe nomba tamuli shuko ne nsansa nakalya. Umwakukamina umwangashi tamuli nangu kamo takuli no wakukama umwangashi, nangufye ni nsansa tashumfwika nakalya." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Abena Heshiboni na bena Eleale baleloosha, ne misowa yabo ileumfwika na ku musumba wa Yahasi, na bena Soa nabo baleyumfwa. Ileumfwika na ku mushi wa Holonaimu, ukuya fikafye na ku misokolo ya Egilati Shelishiya, pantu no mumana wa Nimurimu nao naukama." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ine ne Yawe Lesa ndepesha abena Moabu, pakuti cipwe icakutuula amalambo yakoca mu ncende ishasansama ne cakufutumwina milungu yabo ububani. Ee, nine ne Yawe ndelanda." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Eico ine ndelililakofye Moabu, na bantu bene abena Kiri Haleseti, ndi kwati muntu uulelisha ulwimbo lwa malilo muli mutolilo, pantu ifintu fyonse ifyo bali nafyo, nafiloba." 
Jeremiah48:37 Abaume bonse nababeya inkuso ne myefu pakulanga ubulanda. Nabaitetaula bonse ku minwe, kabili bonse nabafwala insalu shabulanda." 
Jeremiah48:38 Pa mitenge ya mayanda yonse aya mu Moabu paleumfwikafye imisowa, na mu mansa shonse misowafye yeka ilimo, pantu ine ningonaula Moabu, kwati mutondo ntobawile uo umuntu nangu umo ashilefwaya. Nine ne Yawe ndelanda." 
Jeremiah48:39 Yangu ifyo icalo ca Moabu caonaika ee! We misowa nobe! Ee, icalo ca Moabu casebana. Nacisanguka icasebana, na bantu ba mishobo yonse iyacishinguluka baleciwelafye.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Pantu ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Mona, kapumpe aletentemukila panshi naansa amapindo yakwe pali Moabu." 
Jeremiah48:41 Bakapoka imisumba, na ilya ine yabako na malinga ayamaka. Pali ubo bushiku imitima ya bashilika abena Moabu ikatiina kwati mutima wa mwanakashi uukomenwe ne fumo." 
Jeremiah48:42 Abena Moabu bakaloba, no mushobo wabo ninshi nao waloba, pantu balinsangukila ne Yawe." 
Jeremiah48:43 Icintiinya, na macinga, ne fiteyo, efilaliliile abena Moabu.” Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Uukafulumuka icintiinya, akawila mu bucinga, uukafumamo mu bucinga, akekatwa ku citeyo, pantu nine napima inshita iyakubalofeshapo abena Moabu. Ifi efyasosa Yawe." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Imbutushi ishishimwene kwakulola, shilya shileesha ukubutukila mu musumba wa Heshiboni. Nomba umusumba wa Heshiboni umwaikele imfumu Sihoni, kabili nao ulebilima ulubingu lwa mulilo. Imipaka ya calo ca bena Moabu naitutaika ku mulilo, kumo kwine no tuntongolilo twa mpili sha batemwa inkondo." 
Jeremiah48:46 We bulanda nobe ku bena Moabu. Abantu abalepepa Kemoshi nabaloba, abana babo abaume na banakashi nababasenda muli bunkole." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Kwena mu nshiku ishikesa nkabweseshamo ubunonshi muli cino calo ca Moabu. Nine ne Yawe Lesa nalanda.” Apa epapwila ubupingushi bwakwa Yawe pali Moabu. 
Jeremiah49:1 Palwa bena Amoni, ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Bushe abena Israeli tabakwata bana baume? Bushe tababa na mpyani shakubapyana? “Nga kanshi cinshi abena Israeli balekele abantu abapepa umulungu Milikomu, ebo bese bapoke icitungu ca bena Gadi, no kwikala emo bese bekale?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Cisuma, lelo kwena kwalaisa inshiku ilyo ine nalaleka abena musumba wa Raba bomfwe inkuuta sha nkondo. Ulya musumba wa bena Amoni walaba icibolya, ne mishi yauko yalatutaika ku mulilo. Elyo abena Israeli nabo balapokolola icalo cabo kuli balya bene babapokele. Nine ne Yawe Lesa ndelanda." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Pumenipo imisowa imwe mwe bena Heshiboni, pantu umusumba wenu Ai nauwa. Akuloosheni imwe mwe banakashi ba mu Raba. Fwaleni insalu shabulanda no kuloosha. Akubutaukeni mukati ka cikulwa, pantu Milikomu umulungu wenu balausenda muli bunkole, pamo pene na bashimapepo bakako na bacilolo bakako." 
Jeremiah49:4 Cinshi ico muleitakishisha pa mulandu wa mawanga yenu? We mwana mwanakashi wabula icishinka, uwacetekela mu bunonshi bobe no kulalanda ati, ‘Bushe nani enganjimina?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 “Cenjeleni, ine nkamuletela umwenso ukufuma kuli bonse abamushinguluka. Imwe bonse bakamufulumuna. Tapakamoneke nelyo umo uwakuti akalonganye abafyuka nakabili iyoo. Nine ne Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita nalanda." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Kwena mu nshiku ishikesa ine nkabweseshamo ubunonshi bwa bena Amoni. Nine ne Yawe nalanda.” 
Jeremiah49:7 Palwa bena Edomu, Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Bushe abekala ku Temani amano nayabapwa, mwa? Bushe shilya ncenjeshi shabo shilefilwa nomba ukulabapandako amano, batini? Bushe amano yashiko nayapwilililafye, mwa?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Imwe mwe bena Dedani, aleni alulukeni, fulumukeni. Kafisameni mu ncengo ishashika. Ine nalaponesha icinkunka pali bamwana Esau, pantu inshita naifika iyakuti ine mbalimwinepo." 
Jeremiah49:9 Nga cakuti abakusombola baisa kuli iwe, bushe tekuti bakushilemo ifitwalo finono? Nangu nga cakuti abapupu baisa ubushiku, bushe tabebafye ifyalinga ifyo balefwaya?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Nomba bamwana Esau, awe ine nimbapokafye tonse, ninsokolola ne ncende isho bafisamamo, kanshi nomba tabalemona na kwakufisama. Abana babo nabaloba pamo pene na bamunyinabo, na bena mupalamano banabo. Tapashele nelyo umo nakalya." 
Jeremiah49:11 Nshileni bakashiwa benu, nine nakulabasunga. Lekeni bamukamfwilwa benu balecetekela ine.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Kabili Yawe asosa ati, “Moneni, nga cakuti abashali nokunwa mu cikombe bali nokunwa, bushe imwe kuti mwashala ukwabula ukukandwa? Ala tamwabutuke ukukandwa, nemwe bene muli nokunwa." 
Jeremiah49:13 Napalifye ine nalapa ukuti umusumba wa Bosira abantu bakulatenshafye imitwe pakumona ifyo walasanguka icibolya. Abantu bambi bakulauwela, bakulabuula ne shina lyauko elyo balelumbula pakutipwila. Ne misumba yonsefye iyaba mumbali ileba ifibolya fya pe. Nine ne Yawe nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Elyo nao Yeremia epakulanda ati, “Ine nimpokelelapo amashiwi ukufuma kuli Yawe. Yawe natuma inkombe imo iyile eba abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo ileti, “‘Mwe, longanikeni ifita, muye sansa icalo ca Edomu. Aleni kacilwisheni!’" 
Jeremiah49:15 Umushobo obe we Edomu ndi nokuucefya, kabili uli nokusuulwa ku bantu ba mishobo yonse." 
Jeremiah49:16 Ubukali bobe ubutiinya abantu, ne cilumba ca mu mutima obe, fyalikubepa. Iwe we waikala mu ncengo sha mu mabwe, no kukuula pa mulu wa mpili apatali, nga filya kapumpe apikwila icisansala pamulu apatali, ala ine nkakutentemushisha panshi ukutula apo pene.” Efyo Yawe umwine alanda." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Icalo ca Edomu calaonaika, icakuti abantu bonse abakulapitamo bakulatiina, bakulaseka no kulakunta imitwe pakumona fyonse ifyalaciponena." 
Jeremiah49:18 Nga filya fine cali kuli Sodoma na Gomora, ilyo ilya misumba yawile kumo kwine ne mishi iyali mumbali, ala efyo calaba na ku calo ca Edomu cine. Tamwakatale amwikalamo umuntu, nangufye umwana wa muntu ukusangwamo. Nine ne Yawe ndelanda." 
Jeremiah49:19 Pakwisa, ine ndeisa nge nkalamo iyalompoka mu mushitu wa Yordani, pakuya ku mulemfwe uko abantu bacemena ifitekwa, elyo mpumikishe abena Edomu, mbafulumune na mu calo cabo. Elyo nkasalapo umo uo ne mwine nkatemwa, pakuti eo akaleteeka abantu ba uyu mushobo. Nga ine uo benganingako nani? Ngo wingandubulwisha ine nani? Mucemi nshi uwingancilima ine?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Kanshi imwe kutikenifye kufyo ine ne Yawe napangila abena Edomu, na kufyo ine ndefwaya ukucita abantu abaikala mu musumba wa Temani. Na bana babo bene bakulabakuluntanya pakubasenda, na bantu bonse bakulapapafye." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ilyo icalo ca Edomu cikawa, calaisa cita umukunto uwalaisa tensha ne sonde lyonse, ne nkuuta sha bantu shakulaumfwika na kuli Bemba Wakashika." 
Jeremiah49:22 Abalwani balasansa umusumba wa Bosira, nga filya fine kapumpe uuli mu mulu apatali ekila paco amona panshi. Pali ubo bushiku imitima ya bashilika ba mu calo ca Edomu bakekatwa umwenso ngo mutima wa mwanakashi uukomenwe ifumo.”" 
Jeremiah49:23 Palwa musumba wa Damasiko, Yawe alanda ati, “Abantu abaikala mu musumba wa Hamati no wa Apadi, amano nayabapela, pantu nabomfwa umulandu uubi. Imitima yabo naima ku mwenso, kwati matamba eyaleima pali bemba, nabafilwa no kutalala." 
Jeremiah49:24 Abena Damasiko amaka yabo nayapwa, balefwayafye ukufulumuka. Baleitutuminafye ku mwenso no kulalanguluka ngo mwanakashi uuli pakupapa." 
Jeremiah49:25 Yangu ifyo ulya musumba uwalumbuka washala icibolya, umusumba uo nasekelamo." 
Jeremiah49:26 Ee, pali ubo bushiku abalumendo ababamo pamo pene na bashilika ababamo, bakabepaila mu misebo ya mu musumba mwine. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ine nkoca amalinga ya musumba wa Damasiko, nkocela kumo kwine na mayanda ya mfumu Beni Hadadi.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Palwa bena Keda, na palwa bakateeka ba musumba wa Hasoli, abo Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni acimfishe, Yawe alanda ukuti, “Aleni imeni, kasanseni abena Keda, kalofyeni abantu ba ku kabanga." 
Jeremiah49:29 Mubatape amatenti yabo, ne fitekwa fyabo, ne fisalu fyabo ifyakucingako mu matenti, ne fintufye fyonse ifyaba mu matenti yabo. Muye senda ne ngamila shabo, muye mukulabapundilila amuti, ‘Lelo icintiinya cilifye mpanga yonse!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Imwe mwe bena Hasoli, ine ne Yawe Lesa ndemusokako ukuti mufulumuke, muye fisama, pantu Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni namupangila imwe, napekanya ne fyakumucitila." 
Jeremiah49:31 “Ine ne Yawe ndetila, mwe bena Babiloni imeni muye lwisha balya bantu baiikalila ku matwi tondolo, abashisakamana kantu nelyo kamo. Umusumba wabo tawakwata mpongolo, nangufye imipilikisho, kabili tawakwata na bakuulonda." 
Jeremiah49:32 Muye tapa ingamila shabo, ne fitekwa fyabo fyonse. Balya bantu babeya inkuso, ine ndebasalanganishisha monse monse, ne finkunka ndebaletela filefuma mpanga yonse. Ee, nine ne Yawe nalanda." 
Jeremiah49:33 “Umusumba wa Hasoli wakulaba pe icibolya, ni bamumbwefye ebakulaikalamo. Takwakabe muntu uukalaikalamo, nangufye uwakusangwamo.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Ilyofye Sedekia atampile ukulateeka icalo ca Yuda, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Yeremia palwa calo ca Elamu." 
Jeremiah49:35 Yawe umwine wa fita alisosele ati “Ine nkepaya abena Elamu, balya bantu abacenjela ukuposa imifwi, abalenga ukuti icalo ca Elamu cikwatishe amaka." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ine nkemya icimwela icikatula monse monse, no kulapukanya abena Elamu, kabili nkalenga bakasalangane konse konse, icakuti tapakashale calo nangu cimo ico bashakayeko." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ine nkabaletela umwenso pakuti bakatiine abalwani babo abafwaya ukubepaya. Nkabalofya mu bukali, nkabakuutilila ne fita ifyakuti fikese balofyafye nakalya nakalya. Nine ne Yawe ndelanda." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ine nkalofya ishamfumu sha mu calo ca Elamu kumo kwine na bacilolo ababamo, elyo nkateekemo ne cipuna candi icabufumu." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Kwena mu nshiku ishikesa ine nkabweseshamo abena Elamu ubunonshi. Ee, nine ne Yawe nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Yawe alyebele kasesema Yeremia palwa musumba wa Babiloni, na palwa calo ca bena Kaludea ati," 
Jeremiah50:2 “Umineni abantu ba mishobo imbila. Salanganyeni umulandu. Imyeni uluunga, bilikisheni no mulandu. Mwiufisa iyoo, soseni amuti, ‘Ala umusumba wa Babiloni ukapokwa. Umulungu Beli nawikatwa insoni, no mulungu Merodaki nao natobaika. Fikasebana ifilubi fya mu Babiloni, filya fimpashanya fyabunani ifyabamo fikatiina.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 “Abantu ba mushobo umo uwabela lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, bakesa wililila icalo ca Babiloni, no kucisha amatololo. Abantu bakabutukamo kumo kwine ne nama, takwakabe umuntu uukekalamo nakalya.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 Yawe aletila ati, “Muli shilya nshiku ilyo iyo inshita ikafika, abena Israeli pamo na bena Yuda bakabwela balelila, bakesa balemfwaya ine ne Yawe Lesa wabo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Bakepusha inshila iyalola ku Sioni, no kulungama eko bakalungama bakalasosa abati, ‘Tuleyeni tuilunde kuli Yawe, no kupangana nankwe icipangano ca pe icishakatale acilabwa.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Abantu bandi baba nge mpaanga ishaluba, isho bakacema balekafye shilelulumba mu mpili. Bendaukafye nge mpaanga ishitila shafuma mu lupili lumo kabili shaya mu lupili lunankwe, shasuka shaluba no kwabela umushi washiko." 
Jeremiah50:7 Bonse abashikumanya, balashisansa. Abalwani babo balalanda abati, ‘Ifwe tatuli na mulandu pantu balibifya kuli Yawe umucemi wabo uwacishinka. Yawe uo ifikolwe fyabo fyasubilemo.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Imwe mwe bena Israeli, fulumukenimo mu Babiloni. Fumenimo mu calo ca bena Kaludea. Nimwe balilenipo ukufumamo ngefyo basawe batangilila umukuni." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ine nalakuwisha ibumba limo ilya bantu ba mishobo iyamaka iyabela lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, pakuti bawililile Babiloni. Abo bantu balaisa shinguluka umusumba, no kuupoka baleupoka. Bena baposa imifwi nga bafundi wa nama abene bene, abashipusa ico bapimine ukulasa." 
Jeremiah50:10 Ne calo cine ica Kaludea calatapwa, na balacitapa balesendafye fyonse ifyo bakulafwaya ukusenda. Nine ne Yawe nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah50:11 “Imwe mwe bena Babiloni, nimwe mwaletapa abantu ba mushobo wandi ine ne Yawe Lesa. Nangu mulecankwa, mulesaamwa, no kulacilauka nge ŋombe iyili ku mulemfwe, atemwa ngo mulume wa kabalwe uulefolela," 
Jeremiah50:12 ala nyinenwe alesebana apakalamba, uwamufyele akekatwa insoni. Umushobo wenu mwe bena Babiloni eulelekeleshako kukucindama, icalo calauma ndi, calaba amatololo umushaba menshi." 
Jeremiah50:13 Pa mulandu wa cipyu candi ine ne Yawe Lesa, awe mu Babiloni tamwaleikala muntu iyoo, calabafye amatololo ayene yene. Abantu bambi bonse abakulapitamo, bakulapapafye, no kulapukanya imitwe pakumona impumo shakwe." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Tantameni, mushinguluke umusumba wa Babiloni, imwe bonse mwe bacenjela ukuposa imifwi, Posenimo imifwi yenu yonse, mwishapo nelyo umo, mulasaule abena Babiloni, pantu balibifya kuli ine ne Yawe." 
Jeremiah50:15 Weleni umusumba, umo monse muli mu mbali yauko. Umusumba wa Babiloni wacimba. Impungu ishabamo shilya shawa. Amalinga yauko yalya yabongoloka. Nine ne Yawe ndelandula abena Babiloni. Kanshi nemwe bene landulenifye, baciteni nga filya fine nabo balecita abantu bambi." 
Jeremiah50:16 Tecakwesha kutandamo mbuto mu calo ca Babiloni, nangu ukuleka abantu balobololemo ifisabo pa nshita yakulobolola. Pa mulandu wa lupanga lwa monaushi cila muntu afulumukile ku bantu bakwe, kabili cila muntu abwelelemo kumwabo.”" 
Jeremiah50:17 “Israeli aba nge mpaanga iyilungwa no kupaswa ku nkalamo. Pakubala ni mfumu ya bena Asiria eyabalilepo ukumonaula, elyo kabili Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni nao aya mutobaula amafupa yakwe." 
Jeremiah50:18 Eico ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, ne Lesa wakwa Israeli, ndelimuna imfumu ya ku Babiloni, ndimune ne calo caiko, nga filya fine nalimwine imfumu ya bena Asiria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ine nkabwesesha Israeli ku calo cakwe. Akalalya icakulya cilya cikula pa lupili lwa Kameli na mu citungu ca Bashani, kabili akalalya na fyonsefye ifyo akalatemwa, filya fintu fikula pa tupili twa mu citungu cakwa Efulemu na mu citungu ca Gileadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ukuti, ‘Muli shilya nshiku, ilyo ilya nshita ikafika, kukafwaikwa ukwishiba ububi bwakwa Israeli nomba tabwakabepo, no bubifi bwakwa Yuda, nomba tabwakasangwepo pantu abantu abo ine nkashapo, nkababelela uluse.’”" 
Jeremiah50:21 “Aleni sanseni abena Merataimu na bena Pekodi. Bepaululeni, mubapeele kukonaulwafye. Citenifye fyonse ifyo ine ndemukonkomesha. Nine ne Yawe ndelanda." 
Jeremiah50:22 Intulubundi sha nkondo shileumfwika mu calo, kabili muli ubonaushi ubwine bwine." 
Jeremiah50:23 Babiloni ali nge nondo iyaletobaula isonde lyonse, elyo ilya nondo ine kabili nomba eikontaike. Yangu ifyo Babiloni alaselausha abantu ba mishobo imbi yonse ku mukoshi!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Imwe mwe bena Babiloni namwikatwa ku citeyo, ico ine namuteyele ukwabula ukuti mwishibe. Tepapo nabamusanga no kumwimwikata mwe balendwisha ine ne Yawe." 
Jeremiah50:25 Ne Yawe ninjisulamo mulya natutila ifyanso fyandi, nimfumyamo ifyanso fya cipyu candi, pantu ine ne Yawe ne Lesa umwine wa fita, ndipo no mulimo umo uwakubomba muli cino calo cenu ica bena Kaludea." 
Jeremiah50:26 Aleni cisanseni monse monse, tulauleni amatala umo batutila iŋanu shabo. Ifyo muletapa mufitulike imina nga filya fine batulamika iŋanu. Peeleni umusumba onse kukonaulwa, mwishamo nangulafye kamo." 
Jeremiah50:27 Ipayeni abashilika babo bonse, babolekenifye ababa nga bacilume ba ŋombe. Ee, abena Babiloni banyanta mwibatabata, inshita naibafikila iyakukandilwapo.”" 
Jeremiah50:28 Imbutushi ishilefulumuka mu calo ca Babiloni no kwisa mu Sioni, umfweni isho shileshimika ifyo Yawe Lesa wesu alandwile abena Babiloni, pafyo baishile cita Itempele lyakwe." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Iteni abacenjela ukuposa imifwi, bese balwishe Babiloni. Itenifye bonse abaishiba ukukana amata. Mushinguluke umusumba, mwileka papusuke nelyo umo. Landuleni abena Babiloni pali fyonse ifyo balecita. Bacitenifye nga filya fine nabo balecita bambi, pantu balacita icilumba kuli ine ne Yawe Lesa, ne Wamushilo wakwa Israeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Kanshi abalumendo ababamo balafwila mu misebo ya mu musumba, na bashilika babo bonse ninshi baloba pali ubo bushiku. Nine ne Yawe ndelanda." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Imwe mwe bena Babiloni mwalikwatisha icilumba, kanshi nomba na ine ne Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita nimwimina. Ubushiku nabwisa, inshita naifika iyakumukandilapo." 
Jeremiah50:32 Imwe mwe bantu ba mushobo wacilumba mwakulatalansuka, no kuwa mwakulawa, na bakumwimyako balebula. Ine ndeoca imisumba yonse, ne fintu fyonse ifyaba mumbali nafyo filetutaika ku mulilo.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Elyo kabili Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Abena Israeli na bena Yuda tepakubacusha. Bonse ababasenda muli bunkole balibakonenamo, tabafwaya na kubalekamo nakalya." 
Jeremiah50:34 Nomba epo naba ne wabulamba, ne wakubalubulako, ne witwa Yawe umwine wa fita. Nine nalabatulanyako, no kuleka abantu baleikalila pano isonde ku matwi tondolo, abena Babiloni bena lishamofye elyo nalabaletela.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 Yawe aletila ati, “Bafwa lelo abena Kaludea. Bafwa lelo abekala ku Babiloni, Bafwa lelo bacilolo wabo, na balya babapandako amano." 
Jeremiah50:36 Balafwa lelo bakabuka babo ababufi, filya fipumbu fya bantu. Bafwa lelo abashilika babo, ala balya baleitutuminafye ku mwenso." 
Jeremiah50:37 Ipayeni bakabalwe babo, monaule na maceleta yabo. Ipayeni abashilika abenafyalo abalwilako abena Babiloni, abo abena Babiloni baingisha incito yakubalwilako, nabo bene nalupwa, balifye nga banakashi. Onauleni ifyuma fyabo ifyo batutila, fitapeni no kufisenda mufisende." 
Jeremiah50:38 Lekeni mu calo mulatauke imilale, kamyenimo imimana yabamo, pantu e calo ca milungu, ifimpashanya ifyalenga ukuti abantu babe amashilu." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Eico kanshi mu musumba wa Babiloni mwakulaikalafye impaka na bamumbwe ne fipululu. Tamwakatale amwikala muntunse nelyo limo, takwakabe muntu uukasangwamo nakabili." 
Jeremiah50:40 Nga filya fine cali ilyo ine naonawile Sodoma na Gomora kumo kwine ne mishi iyali mumbali, efyo nalacita na Babiloni wine. Tamwakatale amwikalamo umuntu, nangufye umwana wa muntu ukusangwamo. Nine ne Yawe Lesa nalanda." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Moneni! Umulongo wa bashilika uli mukwisa, uletula ku calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso, nabo bantu ba mushobo uwamaka, bali ne shamfumu ishingi. Bafumine ukushailepela, beshile kukulwa inkondo." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bali na mata na mafumo, bantu abakali, abashakwata na luse. Inshindo sha bakabalwe babo shileumfwika kwati ni bemba euleluluma. Ifita fyabo nabafitantika bwino kukulwa, fileishilila iwe we Mwana mwanakashi wa Babiloni." 
Jeremiah50:43 Pakumfwa umulandu, imfumu ya mu Babiloni mu maboko mwatalala na tondolo. Yalapukapukafye, no kulalanguluka ngo mwanakashi uuli pakupaapa." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Pakwisa, ine ne Yawe Lesa ndeisa nge nkalamo iyalompoka mu mushitu wa Yordani, pakuya ku mulemfwe uko abantu bacemena ifitekwa, elyo mpumikishe abena Babiloni, mbafulumune na mu musumba wabo. Elyo nkasalapo umo uo ne mwine nkatemwa, pakuti eo akaleteeka abantu ba uyu mushobo. Nga ine uo benganingako nani? Ngo wingandubulwisha ine nani? Mucemi nshi uwingancilima ine?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Kanshi imwe kutikenifye kufyo ine ne Yawe napangila umusumba wa Babiloni, na kufyo ine ndefwaya ukucita icalo ca bena Kaludea. Ee, na bana babo bene bakulabakululula pakubasenda, na bantu bonse bakulapapafye." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ilyo umusumba wa Babiloni walawa, walaisa cita umukunto uwalaisa tensha ne sonde lyonse, na bantu ba mishobo imbi bakulaumfwa inkuuta sha bena Babiloni.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Yawe aletila ati, “Ine nalaswa njimye icimwela icabonaushi icakupupanya Babiloni, pamo pene na bena Lebo Kamai." 
Jeremiah51:2 Nalatuma abenafyalo abakululula Babiloni, nga filya umwela ululula impimbili. Ubo bushiku bwa finkunka nga bwafika, bakabasansa monse monse, no kusha icalo umwabula nelyo kamo." 
Jeremiah51:3 Mwileka abashilika ba bena Babiloni bakane mu mata yabo, nangu ukufwala amalaya yabo aya fyela. Pa balumendo babo mwipanyapo nelyo umo. Peeleni ifita fyabo fyonse kukonaulwa." 
Jeremiah51:4 Lekeni balaswe bafwile na mu calo cabo cine ica bena Kaludea, bafwile na mu misebo ya mu musumba wabo wine uwa Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:5 Ine ne Lesa ne Yawe umwine wa fita nshalekelesha bena Israeli na bena Yuda iyoo, lelo abena Kaludea balibifya kuli ine ne Wamushilo wakwa Israeli.”" 
Jeremiah51:6 Fulumukenimo mu Babiloni. Butukishenifye pakuti mupusuke, pantu epali nemwe mwafwila pa bubi bwa bena Babiloni. Nomba e nshita Yawe alebalandula no kubakanda pakubalinganya pa fintu bacita." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babiloni ali ngo lukombo lwa golide ulo Yawe aikete mu minwe, no kunwenshamo abantu ba pano isonde bonse pakuti bakolwe. Abantu ba mishobo balinwamo umwangashi walimo, na mano yabo nayafulungana." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babiloni awafye mukwangufyanya, no konaika naonaika. Aleni akumuloosheni. Mufwaileniko umuti wakumundapa, nakalimo lyena kuti apola." 
Jeremiah51:9 Elyo abeni abaikalamo nabo epakwasuka abati, “Ifwe nga twalimundapa Babiloni, nomba nao tekuti ondapwe nakalya. Mwe, ala mulekenifye abe, ifwe natwimefye tubwelelemo kumwesu. Pantu ukupingulwa kwakwe kwalifika na ku mulu, kwasumbwilwa na ku makumbi aya pamulu.”" 
Jeremiah51:10 Eya. Tepapa Yawe alitupokokolola. Natuleya, tuye shimikilako na ba mu Sioni ifyo Yawe Lesa wesu atucitila." 
Jeremiah51:11 Aleni noneni imifwi, ikateni nkwela! Yawe nabilimuna imitima ya shamfumu sha ku Media pantu amapange yakwe yakonaulafye Babiloni. Ecili nokuba icilandushi cakwa Yawe, pakuti ailandule pa mulandu wakumonawila Itempele lyakwe." 
Jeremiah51:12 Peeleni icishibilo icakusansa amalinga ya musumba wa Babiloni. Fusheniko abakulinda. Bikeniko bamalonda. Pekanyeni abakubemina. Yawe nabomba ifyo apangile ukucita, nefyo asosele palwa bena Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:13 Mu Babiloni mwaba imimana iyingi, ne fyuma fyatutilwamo nafyo ifingi, awe nomba impela yobe yafika, ubumi bobe nabupwa." 
Jeremiah51:14 Yawe umwine wa fita alilapa ati, “Napalifye ine, nalapa ukuti ine nkaletela Babiloni abantu ababa nga makanta ku bwingi, nabo bakawelesha pakukucimfya.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 Ni Yawe ewabumba icalo ku makafye yakwe, ewaikasha isonde lyonse ku mano yakwe, ewaandalika umulu ku kucenjela kwakwe." 
Jeremiah51:16 Eutila nga abulukuta mukupeela icebo, awe ninshi na menshi mu mulu yalaluluma. Eufumya na makumbi ukwapelela isonde lyonse no kuyaleta. Eubyasha ne myele ya nkuba ilyo kuba imfula, eufumya no mwela umo ausungila pakuti ulepupa." 
Jeremiah51:17 Abantu bonse bawelewele kabili tababa na mano, Bakafula wa golide bonse balomfwa insoni pa tulubi twabo, pantu fimpashanya fya milungu yabufifye, no kupema tafipema nakalya." 
Jeremiah51:18 Finangwafye, kabili imilimo yabuwelewele ala fikonaulwa ilyo Yawe akesa fikanda." 
Jeremiah51:19 Lesa uwaba icakaniko cakwa Yakobo ena taba ifi iyoo, ena ewabumba ifintu fyonse, na bena Israeli e mushobo wakwefye, uwa bantu abo aisala umwine. Ne shina lyakwe ni Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah51:20 Yawe alanda ukuti, “Babiloni, iwe niwe nondo yandi, niwe canso candi icakulwilako inkondo. Niwe nalebolelako abantu ba mishobo, niwe naleonawilako ubuteko bwa shamfumu." 
Jeremiah51:21 Niwe nalepaminako bakabalwe, na baleendelapo bene, niwe nalefwantilako amaceleta, na baleendelapo bene." 
Jeremiah51:22 Niwe naleipailako abaume na banakashi bene, niwe nalebolelako abaume abakote na baice bene, niwe naleipailako abalumendo na bakashana bene." 
Jeremiah51:23 Niwe naleipailako bakacema ne mpaanga shabo shine, niwe naletobawilako abalimi, ne ŋombe shabo shine ishakuliminako. Niwe naleipailako abalashi na bamushika bakalamba.”" 
Jeremiah51:24 Yawe aletila ati, “Mwalamonako uko ine nalalinganya Babiloni na bena Kaludea bene pa fibi fyonse ifyo bacitile mu Sioni pa menso yenu." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Babiloni, iwe waba ngo lupili ulonaula icalo conse, ine nomba nakwalukila, uli mulwani wandi. Ine nkakwikatisha nkakufumya apo pamulu pa fimabwe, ndi nokukuposa panshi, nkakusangule ulupili ulwapya ku mulilo." 
Jeremiah51:26 Pa fitantala fyobe tapakabe uukabuulapo ilibwe lyakukuulila pa cifutu, nangu ilibwe lyakukuulila mu mufula, pantu uli nokubafye icibolya ca pe na pe. Nine ne Yawe Lesa nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah51:27 “Peeleni icishibilo mu calo icakusanshilapo. Lisheni ipenga pakati ka mishobo imbi. Pekanyeni imishobo iyakulwa nankwe, iteniko na bantu abateekwa ne shamfumu ishi, iya ku Ararati, iya ku Mini elyo ne ya ku Ashikenasi, uleke bese nabo kukusansa Babiloni. Sontenipo mushika umo uwakutungulula abakulwisha. Akwiseni na bakabalwe, nabo babefye nga makanta ku bwingi." 
Jeremiah51:28 Mukungule ne shamfumu sha bena Media, pamo na balashi babo na bamushika babo, kumo kwine na bantu ba mu fyalo fyonse ifyo bateeka, pakuti bese balwishe Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:29 Icalo conse ciletenta ku mwenso, pantu ine ne Yawe Lesa ndecita nomba ico napanga ukucita. Icalo ca Babiloni ine ndecisangula amatololo, umushakekale muntu nelyo umo." 
Jeremiah51:30 Ifita fya bena Babiloni fyaleka ukulwa inkondo, filya fyatunkaninafye ku malinga yabo. Ubulamba bwabo nabupwa, nomba balifye nga banakashi. Impongolo sha musumba nashitobaika, na mayanda mu musumba yalya yaleonaika ku mulilo." 
Jeremiah51:31 Uwalubilo abutuka ukufika pa walubilo munankwe, inkombe yabutuka ukufika ku nkombe inankwe, pakuya eba imfumu ya mu Babiloni ukuti umusumba onsefye nabaupoka." 
Jeremiah51:32 Nokuti abalwani nabapoka ifyabu fya pa mumana, naboca ne mpungu sha bamalonda, ne fita fya bena Babiloni amano nayapela." 
Jeremiah51:33 Umwana mwanakashi Babiloni aba ngo mubansa wakupulilapo, pa nshita balepuma iŋanu, lelo pa kashita akanono ali nokulobololwa. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wakwa Israeli nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni nasantaula Yerusalemu no kumucibaula. Alipasanganya umusumba, - kwati aleminsulula ifili mu mutondo. Aminine umusumba kwati ni cishimweshimwe cilecibula. Naikuta ukulingana nefyo alefwaya, no kuposa fimbi ifyo ashalefwaya." 
Jeremiah51:35 “Lekeni ulukakala ulo abena Babiloni bacitile kuli ifwe lube pali bena.” Efyo basose abena Sioni. “Lekeni umulopa wesu ube pa bena Kaludea.” Efyo basose abena Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah51:36 Kanshi Yawe asosa ati, “Moneni, umulandu wenu nine nkamulubwilako, kabili nine nkamulandwilako. Ine nkakamya bemba wabo, nkakamye ne ntulo ya mimana ine iyabamo." 
Jeremiah51:37 Elyo umusumba wa Babiloni ukasanguka icibolya, umukalaikalafye bamumbwe. Abantu bakalati nga balolesha, bakalapukunyafye imitwe nokupapa. Tamwakekale muntu nelyo umo." 
Jeremiah51:38 Abena Babiloni babuluma capamo nge nkalamo, baŋaŋa ngo twana twa nkalamo." 
Jeremiah51:39 Ilyo balekabila ukulya, ine nkabapekanishisha amalila. Nkaleka bakakolwe, bakasansamuke. Bakapone na mu tulo uto bashakatale ababuukamo nakalya." 
Jeremiah51:40 Nkabasenda nga bana ba mpaanga, nga basukusuku, nga basawe, nkabatwale no kwakubepaila. Nine ne Yawe nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 “Owe Babiloni napokwa, umusumba uo abantu bonse pano isonde balumbanya! Yangu ifyo abantu ba mishobo yonse balepukunya imitwe pakumona ifili Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:42 Bemba naimina Babiloni, na matamba yakwe ayaleluluma nayamwibisha." 
Jeremiah51:43 Imisumba ya ku Babiloni ishele ifibolya, ili nga matololo umushisangwa menshi, umushingekala umuntu, umushingapita umwana wa muntu." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ine nalalimuna Beli, cilya cilubi cilesa ca mu Babiloni, nalacipokolola ne fyuma fyaciko ifyabupupu. Imishobo ya benafyalo ninshi capwa, tailecipepa nakabili. Ala amalinga ya mu Babiloni nayabongoloka." 
Jeremiah51:45 “Fulumukenimo imwe mwe bantu bandi. Butukeni bonse, mupusukeko ku cipyu cakwa Yawe icikali." 
Jeremiah51:46 Mwifupuka iyoo, kabili mwilatunsha na mitima ku maŋwiŋwi ayo mumfwa mu calo. Imyaka yonse amaŋwiŋwi yalabako, amaŋwiŋwi palwa mpasase mu calo, na palwa mfumu imo ukuti ilelwisha imfumu mbiye." 
Jeremiah51:47 Eico kanshi mwalamona ukuti inshita imo yalafika, ilyo ine nalalimuna utulubi twa mu Babiloni. Ne calo cakwe conse cili nokwikatwa insoni, na bantu bakwe abakepaiwa bakalambalala mukati ka calo." 
Jeremiah51:48 Elyo fyonse ifyaba mu mulu na pano isonde fyakulayanga ne nsansa, pakumona uko Babiloni acimba ku bantu abatula ku kapinda ka ku kuso no kwisa monaula. Nine ne Yawe Lesa ndelanda." 
Jeremiah51:49 “Babiloni alipaulula abantu ba pano isonde ponse, kanshi nomba nao wine ali nokuwa, pantu ewaipaulula abena Israeli abashaifulila.”" 
Jeremiah51:50 “Mwe bantu bandi mwe baba mu Babiloni, imwe mwe bapuswikeko ku mfwa, aleni akuyeni, mwilashingashinga iyoo! Nangu muli ukutali, mulenjibukishafye ine ne Yawe Lesa wenu, muletontonkanya na palwa musumba wa Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Imwe mulasosa amuti, ‘Ifwe twalisebana no kwikatwa insoni, pa musalula uutwishile, pantu abenafyalo balitupoka incende shamushilo isha mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 “Kanshi ine ne Yawe ndesosa ukuti, ‘Inshita nomba yalafika ilyo utulubi twa mu Babiloni nalatucitapo cimo, ilyo ne ndase shakulaŋonta mu calo cashiko conse." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babiloni nangu enganina mu mulu mumbi mumbi, no kuyakuulamo ilinga ilyamaka, namo mwine kuti natumamo abakuya bongolola.’ Nine ne Yawe nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah51:54 Umfweni inkuuta mu Babiloni, ne congo icikalamba icabonaushi mu calo ca bena Kaludea." 
Jeremiah51:55 Yawe aleonaula Babiloni, no kutalalika ishiwi lyakwe ilyamaka. Amatamba ya balwani bakwe yapoma nga menshi ayengi, yalecita ne congo icikalamba." 
Jeremiah51:56 Ifyakonaula Babiloni fili mukwisa, abashilika abena Babiloni balabekata, na mata yabo yalakontaika. Ni Yawe e Lesa uukanda pa fyabipa. E ulelinganya Babiloni pafyo acita." 
Jeremiah51:57 “Bacilolo ababamo ine nalabapeela ifyakuti fibakole, pamo pene na bamano ababamo, na balashi bene, na bamushika bene, na bashilika bene. Bapone na mu tulo uto bashakatale ababukamo nakalya. Nine ne Mfumu nalanda, ne Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Jeremiah51:58 Amalinga ya Babiloni ayatikamisha yalabongoloka, ne mpongolo shakwe ishalepesha shalaonaika ku mulilo. Ifyo abantu babomba, ala fyafyefye, ifyo abantu ba mishobo yonse batukuta, ala fituutaikafye ku mulilo. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Aya e mashiwi Yeremia kasesema akonkomeshe Seraya mwana Neriya, mwishikulu Maseya, ilyo baile ku Babiloni na Sedekia imfumu ya calo ca Yuda, mu mwaka walengele ine ukufuma apo Sedekia atampile ukulateeka icalo ca Yuda. Seraya ali ni mushika wa pa bulendo." 
Jeremiah51:60 Yeremia alilembele mu katabo kamo ifinkunka fonse ifili nokuponena Babiloni, alilembelemo ne milandu imbi yonse palwa Babiloni." 
Jeremiah51:61 Alyebele Seraya ati, “Nga wafika ku Babiloni, iwe ukaposeko amano kuli aya mashiwi yonse ayalembelwe, kabili ukaye mukulaikatisha pakubelengela abantu." 
Jeremiah51:62 Elyo kabili ukakonkanyepo no kupepa auti, ‘We Yawe, niwe wasosele ukuti uli nokonaula ino ncende, pakuti mwikalaikalafye nelyo cimo icipema, nangufye abantu atemwa inama, nokuti ino ncende ikasanguka amatololo ya pe.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Seraya, iwe nga wapwa ukubelengela abantu amashiwi yonse ayali muli aka katabo, elyo ukabuule akatabo kene, ukakakakile ku libwe limo, ukakapose na pa mumana wa Yufurate," 
Jeremiah51:64 ukatile nokuti, ‘Efyo cikaba na kuli Babiloni. Akaloba, takabukuluke na limbi nakalya, pa mulandu wa finkunka ifyo Yawe alamuletela.’” Pano pene epapela amashiwi yakwa Yeremia." 
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekia ali ne myaka amakumi yabili na umo (21) ilyo atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu, kabili ateekele mu Yerusalemu imyaka ikumi limo na umo (11). Nyina ishina lyakwe ali ni Hamutali, mwana Yeremia uwafumine ku Libina." 
Jeremiah52:2 Sedekia alecita ifintu ifyabipa pa cinso cakwa Yawe, nga filya fine ne mfumu Yehoyakimu yalecita." 
Jeremiah52:3 Ni pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alifulilwe, ecalengele fyonse ifi ficitike kuli Yerusalemu na kuli Yuda, na pakulekelesha abafumya pa cinso cakwe. Nomba Sedekia alisangukile imfumu ya ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:4 Kanshi mu mwaka walenga pabula uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Sedekia, pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo, Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni yaima mukuya lwisha Yerusalemu ne fita fyakwe fyonse. Fyakuula inkambi kunse ya musumba elyo bashingulusha imina ya maloba ne fintu fimbi ifyakubomfya pakupokolola umusumba." 
Jeremiah52:5 Ifita fyashingulwike umusumba ukufika pa mwaka we kumi limo na umo (11) uwa pa bufumu bwakwa Sedekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 Pa bushiku bwalenga pabula mu mweshi walenga bune, insala mu musumba yakulisha icakuti abantu balafilwa no kumona icakulya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Amalinga ya ku musumba epakulabongoloka. Pakumona ifi, imfumu Sedekia na bashilika bonse aba mu musumba bena bafulumuka ubushiku, ninshi na bena Kaludea nabashinguluka umusumba. Bakonka inshila iyalola kwibala lya mfumu, bapitila pa mpongolo iyaba pakati ka fibumba fibili, balola na ku Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Nomba ifita fya bena Kaludea fyakunkunika imfumu Sedekia, mpaka fyamwikatila mu mawanga ya Yeriko, na bashilika bakwe bonse ninshi basalangana ukufuma kuli ena." 
Jeremiah52:9 Fyati fikate imfumu, awe fyaitwala na kuli Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni, ilyo ninshi wena ali ku mushi wa Ribula mu calo ca Hamati, uko kwine eko na Nebukadinesa apingwila Sedekia umulandu." 
Jeremiah52:10 Ku Ribula kwine eko imfumu ya ku Babiloni yaipaila na bamwana Sedekia abaume, ninshi na Sedekia wine no kumona alemonako. Eko yaipaila na bacilolo bonse aba mu calo ca Yuda." 
Jeremiah52:11 Elyo yatonkola Sedekia amenso, yamukaka ne minyololo ya mukuba, yamutwala na ku Babiloni. Mu Babiloni Sedekia aikele mu cifungo ukushintafye no bushiku afwililepo." 
Jeremiah52:12 Pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo mu mweshi walenga isano, mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na pabula (19) apo Nebukadinesa atampile ukuteeka pa bufumu mu Babiloni, elintu Nebusaradani aingile mu musumba wa Yerusalemu. Uyu Nebusaradani ali ni shicilye wa mfumu, kabili ewali mushika mukalamba uwa fita fyaiko." 
Jeremiah52:13 Kanshi Nebusaradani epakoca iŋanda yakwa Yawe, aoca na mayanda ya kwisano, aocela kumo na mayanda yambi yonse. Aocele amayanda ayacindami yonse aya mu Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:14 Ifita fyonse ifya bena Kaludea ifyali no mukalamba wa bakalinda ba mfumu batobaula na malinga ayashingulwike umusumba wa Yerusalemu. 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda wa mfumu asenda muli bunkole abantu bamo abalanda na bonse abashele mu musumba, pamo pene na bantu abafyukile ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni. Asendela kumo na bantu abacenjela mu fyakutukuta tukuta." 
Jeremiah52:16 Lelo Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda ashako abekalacalo bamo abalanda nganshi abakuti balesunga imyangashi elyo no kulalima amabala. 
Jeremiah52:17 Abena Kaludea batobaula inceshi sha mukuba, ne fyakuteekapo ifyashinguluka elyo ne cakusambilamo ca mukuba ifyali mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, basenda no mukuba onse ku Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Kabili basenda imipika, bafosholo, ifyakukushilamo imito, ifyakushimishako nangu ukukushishako ulubuuto, imbale elyo na fyonse ifipe fya mukuba ifyo balebomfya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Jeremiah52:19 Umukalamba wa bakalinda wa mfumu asendafye fyonse ifyapangilwe na golide na silifa, emukuti utubale utunono, ne mbabula, ne mbale ishikulu umwalesumina umulopa wa nama sha malambo, ne fyakukushilapo imito, ne fyakutekapo amalampi, ne mbale sha bubani, ne fyakwitulwilako imituulo ya fyakunwa." 
Jeremiah52:20 Asenda umukuba wa ku nceshi shibili, icakusambilamo ne fimpashanya fya bacilume ba ŋombe ikumi na babili (12) abalecikatilila, ne fyakutekapo ifyashinguluka ifyo Solomoni apangile ifya mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, fyena fyalicililemo ukufina kanshi balifililwe no kufipima." 
Jeremiah52:21 Inceshi shibili shalifye ishapalana, shonse lumo lumo shalepele ukucila amakubiti ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18), na mubufumo shatikeme amakubiti ikumi limo na yabili (12) mukushinguluka, no mutika washiko wali iminwe ine, elyo shalikwete ulupako mukati." 
Jeremiah52:22 Pa mulu wa luceshi lumo pali umutwe wa mukuba uwalepele amakubiti yasano elyo mu mbali ya mutwe mwali umushingo uo baengelelemo amateke ukushinguluka. Uluceshi lubiye pamo na mateke yaluko fyalifye cimo cine. 
Jeremiah52:23 Kwali amateke amakumi pabula na mutanda (96) ayaleselela mumbali, amateke yonse pamo ayashingulwike icapikulwa yali umwanda umo (100)." 
Jeremiah52:24 Kabili Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda asenda Seraya shimapepo mukalamba, Sefania shimapepo wamukonkelepo na bakalinda wa pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe batatu ukuba abafungwa." 
Jeremiah52:25 Ku bashelepo mu musumba, asenda uwaletungulula ifita elyo na bampandamano cine lubali aba kwisano. Asenda na kalemba uwali cilolo mukalamba wa bashilika ba nkondo uwalesunga imilandu ya bulwi elyo na bambi abaume amakumi mutanda (60) abasangilwe mu musumba." 
Jeremiah52:26 Awe Nebusaradani umukalamba wa bakalinda abatwala bonse ku mfumu ya ku Babiloni iyali mu mushi wa Ribula. 
Jeremiah52:27 Kulya kwine ku Ribula, mu calo ca ku Hamati, eko imfumu yabepaila. Kanshi efyo abena Yuda baile muli bunkole, ukutali ne calo cabo." 
Jeremiah52:28 Impendwa ya bantu abo Nebukadinesa asendele muli bunkole eiyi. Mu mwaka walengele cine lubali apo Nebukadinesa abelele pa bufumu, asendelemo Abayuda amakana yatatu na makumi yabili na batatu (3,023)." 
Jeremiah52:29 Mu mwaka walengele ikumi limo na cine konse konse (18) apo Nebukadinesa abelele pa bufumu, mu Yerusalemu asendelemo abantu imyanda cine konse konse na makumi yatatu na babili (832)." 
Jeremiah52:30 Mu mwaka walengele amakumi yabili na itatu (23) apo Nebukadinesa aikalile pa bufumu, Nebusaradani asendele Abayuda imyanda cine lubali na makumi yane na basano (745). Kanshi bonse pamo epa bantu amakana yane ne myanda mutanda (4,600) abo asendele muli bunkole." 
Jeremiah52:31 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu na cine lubali (37) apo basendele Yehoiyakini imfumu ya bena Yuda muli bunkole, pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na busano (25) mu mweshi we kumi limo na ibili (12), emo imfumu Efili Merodaki atendeke ukuteeka pa bufumu bwa bena Babiloni. Abelela Yehoiyakini uluse, amufumya na mu cifungo." 
Jeremiah52:32 Efili Melodaki alemutentemba, alimupeele ne cipuna icacindamisha pa fipuna fya shamfumu shimbi shonse ishali pamo na Yehoiyakini muli bunkole mu Babiloni." 
Jeremiah52:33 Kanshi Yehoiyakini epakufula ifyakufwala fya mu cifungo, elyo na mu nshiku shonse isha bumi bwakwe lyonse alalya kwisano lya mfumu." 
Jeremiah52:34 Inshiku shonse ukushinta napo afwilile, imfumu ya ku Babiloni yalemupeelafye fyonse ifyo alekabila cila bushiku." 
Lamentations1:1 Yangu ifyo we musumba wa Yerusalemu utalele tondolo, umwafulile nganshi abantu kale. We musumba uo abantu bonse pano isonde balecindika, awe nomba iwe uli nga mukamfwilwa. Umusumba uwapulamishe pali yonse nga namfumu, nomba eusangwike nga bantu abakubomba umulasa." 
Lamentations1:2 Umusumba ulelilafye bushiku bonse ngo mwanakashi uwikala inkumbabulili, ne filamba filekonkolokela na pa masaya yakwe. Pa bantu bonse abamutemenwe kale, tapalemoneka nelyo umo uwakumutalalikako. Bonse abo aleumfwana nabo kale nabamufutuka, nomba ebasangwike abalwani bakwe." 
Lamentations1:3 Yuda nabamusenda bunkole mukuya mukucula, nomba asangwike umusha uwine wine. Aleikala bomba mu fyalo fimbi fimbi, talemona na pakupemena nakalya. Nashingulukwa ku balwani, takwete na pakufulumukila." 
Lamentations1:4 Mu misebo yonse iya ku Sioni muli imisowa, takuli na bakuti baleisa ku nshikunkulu ishasalwa. Pa mpongolo sha musumba tapali nelyo umo, bashimapepo baletusailafye pakupema. Abakashana bonse bali mu bulanda ubukulu, no musumba onse uli mu bucushi."
