Lamentations1:5 Abalwani nabapoka umusumba, nomba ebasangwike e bene ba musumba. Abalwani te pakucankwa, pantu Yawe nakulimuna we Yerusalemu pa mulandu wa bwingi bwa bumpulamafunde bobe. Na bana bobe nababasenda muli bunkole, bele balebakunkishafye pakwenda." 
Lamentations1:6 Ululumbi lonse nalupwa ku mwana mwanakashi Sioni. Abana baume ba mfumu abalimo bali nge nsebula, ishifililwe ukusanga umulemfwe, isho abalunshi balebutusha pakushilunga, yasuka na maka yashiko yapwa." 
Lamentations1:7 Mu nshiku sha bulanda na macushi Yerusalemu acili aleibukisha ifintu fyonse ifisuma, fintu akwete kale. Ilyo acimbile ku balwani, takwali nelyo umo uwakumutulanyako nakalya. Abalwani abamucimfishe balemuwelafye, pakumona uko aonaulwa." 
Lamentations1:8 Kwena Yerusalemu alibifya apakalamba nganshi, eico alisanguka uwakowela. Nasuulwa kuli abo abamucindike kale, pantu bamumona alifye ubwamba. Nomba aletusailafye, no kufimba pa menso pa mulandu wa nsoni." 
Lamentations1:9 Ukukowela kwakwe kwalemoneka ku nsalu shakwe, taenekele nakalya ukuti limbi akashama ifi. Ukuwa kwakwe kwakupapa, takuli na wakumutalalikako nakalya. Alepapatafye Yawe aleti, “Wingamona ubulanda bwandi, pantu abalwani nabancimfya.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Abalwani nabamupoka ifyuma fyakwe fyonse. Aleimwena noko abenafyalo baleingila na mu cifulo camushilo mwine, abo Yawe abindile ukulaingila mu lukuta lwakwe." 
Lamentations1:11 Abena Yerusalemu baletusailafye, kulwa kufwaya fwaya umukate. Ifyuma fyabo efyo balekabulamo ifyakulya, pakutifye bapususheko imyeo yabo. “We Yawe wingandoleshako, pantu ine ninsuulwa.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Shilolesheni mwe balepita, bushe tacilemusakamika? Lolesheni no kumona, bushe kwalitala akuba ubucushi ngobu ine naculako? Ala bucushi ubo Yawe aponeshe pali ine mu bushiku bwa cipyu cakwe icikali." 
Lamentations1:13 “Yawe aliponya umulilo ukufuma ku mulu, nao waponena mu mafupa yandi. Nateya amakasa yandi isumbu, no kumbwelulusha kunuma. Nao epakundekelesha, ndifye uwapomponteka akasuba konse." 
Lamentations1:14 “Ifyabubifi fyandi alifikaka nge koli, iminwe yakwe eyafikakenye pamo, afikakila mu mukoshi wandi, fyalenga na maka yandi ukupwa. Imfumu yalimposa ku balwani bandi, abo ine nshingalwa nabo nakalya." 
Lamentations1:15 “Abashilika bonse ababulamba pakati kandi, Imfumu yalibakeene bonse. Yena epakutuma ifita ifyakwisa nsansa, fyaisa ipaya na balumendo bandi. Nacisungu mwana Yuda yalimushonaula, kwati fitwalo fya myangashi baleshonaula mulya bafikamina." 
Lamentations1:16 “Ifi fintu efilengele ukuti ndeloosha, efilengele ukuti ifilamba filepongolokafye mu menso yandi, pantu takuli nelyo umo uwakuntalalikako, takuli nelyo umo uwakunkoseleshako. Abana bandi tabashelepo na kantu, pantu umulwani nacimfya.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Sioni ayansa amaboko yakwe, awe tepakumoneka nelyo umo uwakumutalalikako. Yawe nalenga abena mupalamano bakwa Yakobo ukuba abalwani bakwe, Yerusalemu nomba ali uwakowela ngo busali pakati kabo." 
Lamentations1:18 “Yawe nalungika, pantu nine natalamine ifipope fyakwe. Kwena umfweni kuno mwe bantu bonse, tambeni ifyo ine ndecula. Abakashana bandi na balumendo bandi nababasenda bunkole." 
Lamentations1:19 “Nalitile abatemwikwa bandi, nomba nabo bamfutuka. Bashimapepo bandi na bakalamba bafwilile mu misebo ya mu musumba, ilyo balefwaya fwaya icakulya pakutifye bapusushe imyeo yabo." 
Lamentations1:20 “Wingalolesha we Yawe ifyo ndecula mu mutima wandi, mu mweo wandi ndecushiwa. Tepakulanguluka mu mutima wandi, pa mulandu wa kutalama kwandi. Mu misebo baleipayamo abantu mu bulwi, na mu mayanda mwine namo abantu balefwa ku cikuko." 
Lamentations1:21 “Abantu nabomfwa uko ndeteta no kuilishanya, lelo nshikwete nangu umo uwakuntalalikako nakalya. Abalwani bandi bonse bena balesansamuka, pa mulandu wakuti iwe naundetela ishamo. Leka ubushiku bulya wasobele kale bufike bwangu, uleke nabo bakaculepo nga fino ndecula." 
Lamentations1:22 “We Yawe, nabo ubalubulwishe pa bubifi bwabo bonse, ubakandilepo nabo, ngefi fine na ine unkandile palwa bubifi bwandi bonse. Awe ukuteta kwandi nakucilamo, no mutima wandi naubongoteka.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Yangu we mfifi nobe ulakula, imfifi iyo Imfumu yaposelemo umwana mwanakashi Sioni cipyu cipyu. Naiposa ubucindami bwakwa Israeli, ibuposele panshi ukufuma mu mulu, mu bushiku yafulilwemo tayaibukishe ne cakubikapo amakasa yaiko." 
Lamentations2:2 Imfumu nayonaula imishi yonse iya bamwana Yakobo ukwabula no luse. Naibongolola cipyu cipyu amalinga ayalecingililako Umwana mwanakashi wa Yuda. Nailenga nokuti ubufumu bwakwa Yuda busebane, kumo kwine na bacilolo ba mfumu." 
Lamentations2:3 Ku cipyu caiko Imfumu naipwisha amaka yakwa Israeli ayo alemekelamo, yakene no kwafwako ilyo abalwani baishile muwililila. Pali bamwana Yakobo alebilima ngo lubingu lwa mulilo uloca ifintu fyonse ukushinguluka." 
Lamentations2:4 Imfumu naitinta mu buta kwati mulwani, ukuboko kwaiko ukwa ku kulyo nakuiteyanya. Ipeye bonse abo twalecankilwamo kwati mulwani. Naipongolola icipyu ca bukali bwaiko kwati mulilo, petenti lya mwana mwanakashi Sioni." 
Lamentations2:5 Imfumu isangwike kwati mulwani wabo, nayonaula ne calo ca Israeli, naibongolola amayanda yonse aya kwisano lya mfumu, no konaula amalinga aya misumba yashiko. Naifushisha umwana mwanakashi wa Yuda ukuloosha no bulanda ubwamutatakuya." 
Lamentations2:6 Yawe naonaulafye nakalya nakalya iŋanda yakwe kwati libala naonaula ne cifulo cakwe icakukumaninamo. Nalenga nokuti Sioni alabe ku nshikunkulu shakwe na Masabata. Kabili alifulwa nganshi, icakuti nasuulilapo ne mfumu ya calo na bashimapepo bene." 
Lamentations2:7 Imfumu nomba naifumyako na mano ku bulambo bwaiko, naisuulako na ku cifulo caiko icamushilo. Yalileka na balwani babongolole ifibumba fya mayanda yonse aya kwisano lya mfumu, na mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe emo abalwani balecindila amalaila, kwati ni filya ficitika pa bushiku bwa mutebeto." 
Lamentations2:8 Ni kale Yawe apangile ukubongolola amalinga ya mwana mwanakashi Sioni. Alibuulile umwando, ayapima no kuyapima, kabili tabweseshe no mutima kwipange lyakuyawisha yonse. Alengele aba mu malinga na ba mu mpungu shine ukuloosha pantu bonse baleculila pamo." 
Lamentations2:9 Impongolo nashonaika, shishikeme na mu fibungulubwe, imipilikisho yashiko nayo naikontaika no konaulwa. Imfumu ya musumba na bana baume baiko bali nomba ku benafyalo muli bunkole. Takuli nomba wakufunda amafunde yakwa Lesa, na bakasesema bauko bene tabalemona ne fimonwa fyakwa Yawe." 
Lamentations2:10 Abakalamba ba mu mwana mwanakashi Sioni nomba baleikalafye panshi, no kushinta mu nshiku. Baleikubaika ulukungu ku mitwe, no kufwala insalu shabulanda. Abakashana ba mu Yerusalemu nabo bakontamikefye imitwe panshi." 
Lamentations2:11 Awe ine na mu menso namwingila kulwakulila, no mutima wandi ulekalipa nganshi. Na maka nayapwa, mu mutima mwiswile ubulanda, pa mulandu wakutontonkanya ifyo abantu bandi balecula. Pantu abaice no tunya twine, bonse balefwila mu misebo ya mu musumba ku mulandufye wa lushile." 
Lamentations2:12 Abana nga balelilila kuli banyinabo batila, “Ngo mukate no mwangashi fili kwi?” Ninshi baleipenukilafye mu misebo ya mu musumba, kwati bantu abo balashile, na banyinabo ninshi nababafukatila, pa nshita balesalakata pakuleka umweo." 
Lamentations2:13 Finshi ifyo ine ningalanda pali iwe, ni kuli cinshi ningakupalanyako, we mwana mwanakashi wa Yerusalemu? Cinshi ico ine ningakupalanyako pakuti ningakutalalikako, we nacisungu mwana Sioni. Ubucushi bobe bwalikulisha kwati ni bemba, nani uwingakundapa?" 
Lamentations2:14 Ifimonwa ifyo bakasesema bobe balekwebako, ala fyalifye ifyabufi, kabili ifyafye. Tabalekwebelapo na pa fyabubifi fyobe nakalya pakuti wingalapila no kukanasendwa muli bunkole. Amashiwi balemweba yali yabufi kabili ayakukulufya." 
Lamentations2:15 Bonse abapitapo balakusonta iminwe, balakumpa na ku minwe kulwa kukusuula. Balalisha iminsoli no kulapukunya imitwe, pali we mwana mwanakashi wa Yerusalemu. Pa kukutumfya balesosa abati, “Bushe euno musumba walumbilishiwe ku busuma no kushuka? Bushe euno musumba baletakisha isonde lyonse, mwa?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Abalwani bobe bonse balekuwela, balekusenteka no kusumanya ameno. Baleseka no kulasosa abati “Natukulimuna! Ala ubu e bushiku twalelolela, twasuka nomba twasangwako.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Yawe nasuka nacita ifyo apangile ukucita, nafikilisha ishiwi lyakwe, nga mulya mwine akonkomeseshe kale. Namulofya ukwabula no luse. Nalenga ukuti abalwani bamucimfye, bambe no kulaitakisha, kabili nafusha na maka ku balwani benu." 
Lamentations2:18 Ikatisheni ukulilila Imfumu, iwe we mwana mwanakashi Sioni. Uleke ifilamba fyobe filepita nge milonga akasuba no bushiku. Tecakwesha kuleka ukulila. Wilaleka filamba filekama mu menso yobe." 
Lamentations2:19 Pa nshita ya bushiku buuka wambeko ukulila, pakutendeka kwa nshita ya bushiku. Iwe ulebuuka libili libili no kulalilila Imfumu, ulemulilila no kusosa fyonse ifya ku mutima. Ulepapatilako abana bobe pa bumi bwabo, balya balefwa ulushile mu finshoko fya misebo, ku mulandu wa nsala." 
Lamentations2:20 Shilolesha we Yawe, umone. Bushe kwaliba abantu abo wacushapo ifi? Bushe abanakashi balelya abana babo, abana abo batemenwe nganshi no kulela? Mona bashimapepo na bakasesema, bushe babepailefye mu ŋanda yobe iyamushilo?" 
Lamentations2:21 Abaice na bakote balya batambalele mu misebo, nabafwa. Abalumendo na bakashana bandi abalwani nababepaya ku lupanga. Wabepaya mu bushiku bwa bukali bobe, wabalofya bonse ukwabula no luse." 
Lamentations2:22 Nga filya beta abakwisa ku malila efyo waitile abalwani bandi, pakuti bese mukulantiinya monse monse. Mu bushiku bwabukali ubwakwa Yawe, tapamoneke nelyo umo uwakufulumukapo, nangu uwakushalapo nakalya. Balipaya abana bandi abo naifyalila no kukusha." 
Lamentations3:1 Ine pano ndi, nalishiba ifyo Yawe akanda umuntu. Ine nalipitilako ku cikoti cakwe icikali." 
Lamentations3:2 Alintamfishe no kuleka nalaenda mu cifulo umwafiita fititi umushaba ulubuuto," 
Lamentations3:3 Nine neka alelwisha lyonse, alebwekeshapo libili libili mu nshita yonse iya kasuba." 
Lamentations3:4 Anshilefye imisakalala, namfunaula na mafupa." 
Lamentations3:5 Anjisalile mu cifungo, kabili ndi uwashingulukwa no bulanda ne cililishi." 
Lamentations3:6 Anengele ukulaikala umwafiita fititi, kwati bantu abafwile imyaka ishishibantu." 
Lamentations3:7 Anshingulwishe ilinga ilyakuti ine nafilwa no kufulumukamo, ankaka ne minyololo iyafinisha." 
Lamentations3:8 Nangu napundile no kukuuta mutuule, awe tewakuposako na mano kufyo nalemupapata." 
Lamentations3:9 Nancilikila inshila ku mabwe ayabaswa ayakulu, nalenga inshila yandi ukuba iyashokana." 
Lamentations3:10 Ambelamine nge ciswango ca bea, andalilile nge nkalamo." 
Lamentations3:11 Amfumishe mu musebo, ayansantaula, ansha nefyo fine uwalekeleshiwa." 
Lamentations3:12 Ali akana mu buta bwakwe, alanyandika ne mifwi kwati ndi wakulasapo icandamali." 
Lamentations3:13 Nandasa mu mutima, ku mifwi afumishe mu mufuko wakwe." 
Lamentations3:14 Nsangwikefye icakuwela ku bantu ba mitundu yonse, balenyimbila ne nyimbo sha manshoko akasuba konse." 
Lamentations3:15 Andishishe ifinkolwankolwa, no kunwensha ifyalula." 
Lamentations3:16 Ali alenshiba impumi panshi, nankulaula na meno pa mabwe no kumfumfumya mu lukungu." 
Lamentations3:17 Ine nomba nimpokwa umutende, nindaba nefyo ishuko lyaba." 
Lamentations3:18 Eco ndelandila nati, “Awe ine nomba umucinshi wandi naupwa, ne citetekelo cakulolela pali Yawe naco nacipwa.”" 
Lamentations3:19 Ndeti nga nalatontonkanya pafyo ndecula, na pafyo ndeseuluka, awe na ku mukoshi kwalaselauka, pantu fyonse filulile nge ndusha." 
Lamentations3:20 Ici cintu ecilemfupula umutima lyonsefye no kumponya pa musao. 
Lamentations3:21 Lelo kwena pali cimo ico ndeibukisha, ico cintu ecilenkoseleshako umutima." 
Lamentations3:22 Icakuti icitemwiko cakwa Yawe tacipwa eco tushafwila, ne cikuuku cakwe tacipwa inshiku shonse." 
Lamentations3:23 Apo shicela alalanga cipya cipya icikuuku no luse, pantu wena lyonsefye wacishinka." 
Lamentations3:24 Naisosha ne mwine nati, “Yawe e cumafye ico ine nakwata, epela, kanshi eo ine nakulatetekelafye.”" 
Lamentations3:25 Yawe musuma kuli bonsefye abamutetekela, musuma ku bamufwaya fwaya nokucita ifyo afwaya." 
Lamentations3:26 Kanshi caliwama umuntu ukulateka umutima, ilyo alelolela ukupususha kwakwa Yawe." 
Lamentations3:27 Cisuma nganshi umuntu ukulateka umutima, ilyo alepita mu macushi mu nshita ya bwaice bwakwe." 
Lamentations3:28 Ilyo Yawe aletelapo umuntu ubucushi, aletala aikala eka, no kukutumaninamo pantu ni Yawe eumuletele ubucushi." 
Lamentations3:29 Elailishanya iyoo, ashibe umutwe panshi no kupepa pantu nalimo kucili isubilo." 
Lamentations3:30 Aleke uulefwaya ukumuma pesaya amumefye epakuti esulemo ukusebana. 
Lamentations3:31 Ala Imfumu yaba no luse, tailekelelako ku bantu umuyayaya, iyoo." 
Lamentations3:32 Nangufye pambi ingamukanda, ilamulangulukilako, pantu yalikwata icitemwiko icishipwa." 
Lamentations3:33 Pantu te ku kutemwa kwaiko icushisha nangu ukulenga abantu ubulanda. 
Lamentations3:34 Ukunyantilila ababa mu cifungo pano isonde ponse, awe Imfumu taikufwaya iyoo." 
Lamentations3:35 Ukukanapeela muntu insambu isho Lesa Mukulu umwine amupeela, nako kwine taikufwaya iyoo." 
Lamentations3:36 Ukupondamikila umuntu umulandu mu cilye, naco taifwaya iyoo." 
Lamentations3:37 Nani uwingalandapo cimo, no kucitika cacitika, nga cakuti Imfumu taicisuminishe?" 
Lamentations3:38 Bushe te ku kanwa kakwa Lesa Mukulu ukufuma ishuko nangu ishamo? 
Lamentations3:39 Nga cinshi umuntu umwinakufwa engalailishanishisha, nga akandilwa palwa kubifya kwakwe?" 
Lamentations3:40 Ala natuletontonkanyapo pa mibeele yesu no kuyesha, pakuti tulebwelela kuli Yawe." 
Lamentations3:41 Natulelosha imitima yesu na maboko yesu ku mulu kuli Lesa, tulepapatafye tuleti," 
Lamentations3:42 “We Yawe, ala ifwe twalibifya, kabili twalikusangukila, nobe tawatubelelako na luse iyoo." 
Lamentations3:43 “Waliifimbilisha ne cipyu icikalamba no kutukunkunika, no kutulofya ukwabula no luse." 
Lamentations3:44 Waliifimbilisha ne kumbi ilyatikama, ilyo amapepo yesu yashingapulamo ukufika uko uli." 
Lamentations3:45 Ee, nautusangula icishala kabili ifisoso, mu bantu ba mitundu yonse." 
Lamentations3:46 “Abalwani besu bonse baletutuka, no kulatupoma akawele." 
Lamentations3:47 Ifyakutiinya ne fyakutuwisha nafitutengamina, pamo pene no boni no kulofya kwine.”" 
Lamentations3:48 Mu menso yandi mulekonkoloka ifilamba nga menshi, pa mulandu wa kucula kwa bantu bandi." 
Lamentations3:49 Mu menso yandi tamwaleke kulalukuta filamba, no kufwaya tayalefwaya kuleka iyoo," 
Lamentations3:50 mpakafye we Yawe ku mulu ukatulolekeshepo, no kumona ifyo ifwe tulecula." 
Lamentations3:51 Umutima wandi ulecula, pakumona ukucula kwa bakashana bonse aba mu musumba wandi." 
Lamentations3:52 Abali kale abalwani bandi apabula umulandu, ebalenunga nge cuni." 
Lamentations3:53 Bamposele umutuntulu mu cilindi, bandasa na mabwe ninshi ndi mukati." 
Lamentations3:54 Amenshi nayo yaisa yalafika na ku mutwe, na ine nati nokuti, “Awe mwandi ine nomba lwapela.”" 
Lamentations3:55 Mu cilindi mwine umwashika nganshi, nasukile nakuuta peshina lyobe, we Yawe." 
Lamentations3:56 Nobe waŋumfwa ilyo ndekupapata ukuti umfwe inkuuta yandi, wicilika na matwi yobe kukulila kwandi." 
Lamentations3:57 Wapaleme mupepi na ine ilyo nalekulilila, wanjasuka nokuti, “Witiina!”" 
Lamentations3:58 “Waisa ndubulwilako we Mfumu, no kundubula, wandubula." 
Lamentations3:59 We Yawe, walishiba ifyo ine bamfyenga, ala umputwileko umulandu." 
Lamentations3:60 Walimona ifyo bailandula, walishiba na fyonse ifyo bampangila." 
Lamentations3:61 “We Yawe, naumfwa insele balentuka, nawishiba fyonse ifyo balepanga ukuncita." 
Lamentations3:62 Akasuba konse nine abalwani bandi baleyamba mufyo balesosa no kutotoshanya. 
Lamentations3:63 Mona ilyo bekele nangu ilyo beminine, awe ninefye baleimba mu nyimbo shabo ishakunseka." 
Lamentations3:64 “We Yawe, ale balimune, ukulingana ne fintu bacita." 
Lamentations3:65 Lekafye imitima yabo ikose ndi, no kubatipwila ubatipwile." 
Lamentations3:66 Ala ubakunkunike mu cipyu ca bukali bobe, ubalofye ubafumye na pano isonde, we Yawe.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Yangu ifyo golide apwa ubukankala, ifyo abuma golide uwine wine uwalebengeshima kale yangu ifyo amabwe yamushilo yasalangene, yali ntangali ntangali mu misebo yonse." 
Lamentations4:2 Abalumendo ba mu Sioni abacindeme nga golide wine wine, nomba lino balebacitafye nge nongo she bumba isho babumba ku minwe yabo." 
Lamentations4:3 Ngefyo na bamumbwe bene balonsha utwana twabo ibele, nomba abantu bandi bena, ku bana babo baba abankalwe nge mbuni mu matololo." 
Lamentations4:4 Indimi sha twana twabo utunya shilekakatila ku camfu pa mulandu wa cilaka, utwaice nato tulelombalomba icakulya, nomba uwakuti atupeeleko takuli." 
Lamentations4:5 Abantu abalelya kale ifyakulya ifine fine, nomba ebalefwila mu misebo. Abo bakushishe mu bukankala, nomba ebalepalapala ifyakulya pa fishala." 
Lamentations4:6 Ukukandwa kwa bantu bandi nakucila ukukandwa kwa Sodoma, ulya musumba Lesa aonawile pa kashitafye akanono, kabili takwali no wakubafwako mukubapokololako." 
Lamentations4:7 Bacilolo ba mfumu babuutile ukucila umukaka, kabili ababuutisha ukucila no bunga bwa mfula, bakashike imibili ukucila rubi, kabili abakulungika nga safile." 
Lamentations4:8 Nomba lino, awe tebakwishiba mu misebo, impumi shabo shifiitile fiititi nge mfita, inkanda shabo shumine ku mafupa yabo, kabili shuminine nge nsansu." 
Lamentations4:9 Abafwile ku nkondo bena caliwamapo ukucila abafwile ku cipowe, pantu pakuti bafwe, bena baleondolokafye buce buce mpaka bapwa pa mulandu wakubulwa ifisabo fya ku mabala." 
Lamentations4:10 Nangu abanakashi baba ne cikuku, awe nabo bene basukile balaipika na bana babo, ebo balalya ilintu abantu bandi baleonaika." 
Lamentations4:11 Yawe nalanga apapela icipyu cakwe, epakupongolola icifukushi ca bukali bwakwe. Mu Sioni nasontekamo umulilo, uulengele ukuti no mufula wauko upyefye nakalya nakalya." 
Lamentations4:12 Pali bashamfumu bonse aba pano isonde, nangufye pa bekalacalo bonse, awe tapali nangu umo uwaenekele kale ukuti umuntu umbi umbifye, atemwa umulwani kuti aingilila pa mpongolo sha Yerusalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Nomba lino efyo cicitike pa mulandu wa bubifi bwa bakasesema, ne fyabupulumushi fya bashimapepo, abalesumya umulopa uwakaele, mukati ka musumba." 
Lamentations4:14 Bena balepulumpuntafye mu misebo nga abantu abapofwile, ninshi nabakantana umulopa nganshi, icakuti na bantu bonse balefilwa ukubakumya ku fyakufwala fyabo." 
Lamentations4:15 Abantu nabo ninshi kulabasoweshafye abati, “Tufumineni pano, imwe mwe bakowela! Tutalukeni, mwikesa mwatukumya!” Awe nabo epakufulumuka batampa no kulalulumba. Lelo abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo batila, “Aba teti twikale nabo nakalya!”" 
Lamentations4:16 Ni Yawe umwine ewabapasa, alileka ukubaposako amano. Na bantu bene nabo nomba, nabaleka ukulacindika bashimapepo na bakalamba." 
Lamentations4:17 Twalelolela nganshi abakutwafwa, awe nakalya, twasuka twanakafye. Pa mpungu shesu twalelolelako abantu ba mushobo umo, nabo abashingatupusushako." 
Lamentations4:18 Abalwani besu epakulatulonda nkola nkola, icakuti nefwe twalafilwa ukulapita mu misebo. Nefwe epakuya lulepwa, ne mfwa yesu yapalama, mu cine impela yesu naifika." 
Lamentations4:19 Elyo abalwani besu bali abalubilo nganshi, ukucila bakapumpe mu mulu. Batukunkunika ulubilo pa mpili, baya tuteya ne cofi mu matololo pakuti batwipaye." 
Lamentations4:20 Kateeka wesu uwasubwa na Yawe, uyo ifwe tupeemamo, eo baikatila mu fiteyo fyabo. Ifwe eo twaletontonkanyapo ukuti, “Tukekala mu cintelelwe cakwe pakati ka mishobo.”" 
Lamentations4:21 Akucankwenifye, mulesekesha ne nseko, we mwana mwanakashi wa Edomu, na imwe mwe bekala mu Usi. Kwena nemwe bene ishamo likamwishila, ala mukaba nga bakolelwe ubwalwa, no kutalansuka mukalatalansuka ubwamba." 
Lamentations4:22 We mwana mwanakashi Sioni, ukukanda kobe kukapwa, Yawe takakuleke ukwikalilila muli bunkole. Lelo iwe we mwana mwanakashi wa Edomu, Yawe akalimuna ububifi bobe, akasokolola ne fintu ifyabipa ifyo iwe ucita." 
Lamentations5:1 We Yawe, ibukisha ici cintu icatuponena, loleshafye, umone ifyo ifwe tusebene." 
Lamentations5:2 Abantu bambi bambifye ebatupokele icabupyani cesu, abenafyalo nomba ebaleikala mu mayanda yesu." 
Lamentations5:3 Bashifwe nababepaya ku balwani, ifwe nomba tushelefye bakashiwa, na banyinefwe nabo nomba ni bamukamfwilwa." 
Lamentations5:4 Amenshi yakunwa ayesufye, nomba eyo tuleshita ne ndalama, ne nkuni ishesu, nomba nasho shalwike shakushita." 
Lamentations5:5 Abalwani besu abatubutusha bali pa numa yesu, nangu tunake shani, bena tebakuleka tutuusheko nakalya." 
Lamentations5:6 Twalangile ukucimba ku bena Egupto na ku bena Asiria, pakuti tulelombako icakulya." 
Lamentations5:7 Kwena bashifwe balibifishe, pali ndakai tabalipo iyoo, elyo nomba kabili nifwe twashingwa ulumpyata pa kubifya kwabo." 
Lamentations5:8 Abasha nomba ebaletuteeka, batini, takuli nelyo umo uwakutupokololako nakalya." 
Lamentations5:9 Pakumona icakulya, nomba tuleya mukulacifwaya mu matololo, namo umuli ifipondo." 
Lamentations5:10 Inkanda ya mibili yesu ikabile nge buku, ku mulandu wakucula ne cipowe." 
Lamentations5:11 Balebembuka na banakashi besu ababa mu Sioni kumaka, banacisungu mu mishi ya Yuda nabo balebapatikisha ukulabasumina." 
Lamentations5:12 Pakukulika bacilolo ba mfumu, balebakakila ku maboko yabo, abakalamba tabalebapeela umucinshi iyoo." 
Lamentations5:13 Abalumendo besu balebacusha ukulapela ubunga, utulumendo twesu nato tepakutantalimba ne fifinga fya nkuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Abakote nabaleka ukulalongana pa mpongolo ya musumba, abalumendo nabo nabaleka ukulalisha ifilimba fyabo." 
Lamentations5:15 Imitima yesu tailesansamuka nakalya. Natuleka ukulacinda ifiila, nomba twikalilefye ukulaloosha." 
Lamentations5:16 Icilongwe cesu icabufumu nacifulika ku mutwe ciponene panshi, Awe natushama, ne cilengele kubifya kwesu." 
Lamentations5:17 E mulandu wine ne mitima yesu inakile, eco tulefililwa no kulalolesha bwino." 
Lamentations5:18 Pantu pa lupili lwa Sioni pashelefye icibolya ceka, ni bamumbwefye ebalenyangalapo." 
Lamentations5:19 Kwena iwe we Yawe, ala uli Kateeka wa pe na pe, niwefye ukalateeka ukushinta no kukapela inshiku." 
Lamentations5:20 Nomba mulandu nshi ifwe watulabililako pa nshita iyalepa ifi, kabili cinshi watulekelesesha pa nshita iyalepa ifi?" 
Lamentations5:21 Wingatubweshafye we Yawe, uleke tubwelele kuli iwe, epakuti ifintu fyonse fibefye ngefyo fyali pakubala ntanshi." 
Lamentations5:22 Kanofye nga walitusuulililakofye no kutukaana, kabili kanofye nga walitufulilwa ukucila mu cipimo." 
Ezekiel1:1 Mu mwaka walenga amakumi yatatu (30) mu mweshi walenga bune, pa bushiku bwalenga shisano, ine ne Esekieli nali na bankole banandi abena Yuda mu Babiloni, ku mumana wa Keba. Awe umulu waisuka, namona ne fimonwa fyakwa Lesa." 
Ezekiel1:2 Cali mu mwaka walenga isano ukufuma apo imfumu Yehoiyakini asendelwe muli bunkole, na pa bushiku bwalenga shisano mu mweshi." 
Ezekiel1:3 Kulya ku calo ca bena Kaludea ku mumana wa Keba, eko ine ne Esekieli shimapepo mwana Busi naumfwilile uko Yawe alelanda kuli ine, no kuboko kwakwe kwali pali ine." 
Ezekiel1:4 Awe nalolesha namona umwela uwacikuku ulefuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Namona no mwele wa nkuba wabyata mwikumbi ilikalamba nganshi. Pakati ka mulilo palemoneka icabeeka nge cela. 
Ezekiel1:5 Pakati namwene pali ifyapala ifyamweo fine. Nafyo mukumoneka fyalemoneka ngo muntu. 
Ezekiel1:6 Nomba fyonse cimo cimo fyali ne finso fine na mapindo yane. 
Ezekiel1:7 Amolu yafiko yali ayaololoka, fyali ne mondo kwati ni mondo shakwa cilume wa ŋombe, kabili fyalebengeshima ngo mukuba uwawamishiwa bwino." 
Ezekiel1:8 Kabili mwisamba lya mapindo yafiko mu mbali shonse shine cimo cimo calikwetemo ifisansa nge fya muntu. Ifyamweo fyonse fine fyali ne finso na mapindo. 
Ezekiel1:9 Fyalisuntinkenye amapindo yafiko. Na pakwenda fyaleendelafye pamo ukwabula ukupindulukila nelyo kumo, fyonse fyalelungamafye uko filoseshe ifinso." 
Ezekiel1:10 Ifinso fyafiko fyalemoneka ngefi. Fyonse fine fyali ne cinso ca muntu kuntanshi, kabili lwa ku kulyo fyonse fine fyali ne cinso ca nkalamo, kabili lwa ku kuso lubali fyali ne cinso ca ŋombe, kabili kunuma fyonse cimo cimo fyali ne cinso cakwa kapumpe." 
Ezekiel1:11 Ifi efyali ifinso fyafiko. Kabili fyafungulwile amapindo yafiko ukulosha mumulu. Cila cimo cali na mapindo yabili ayasuntinkene na mapindo ya camweo cibiye ku mbali shonse, kabili na mapindo yabili yafimba umubili waciko." 
Ezekiel1:12 Fyonse cimo cimo fyalungeme uko fyaloseshe amenso, konse uko umupashi walola nafyo eko fyalola, tafyaleyalukila kumbi iyoo." 
Ezekiel1:13 Mu kumoneka kwa ifi fyamweo fyali kwati mulilo wa mafito uuleyaka nangu ifisaniko ifileyaka no kupitana apo fyali, ukuya kuntanshi na kunuma. Umulilo wali wabengeshima kabili mwalefuma ukubyasha kwa nkuba." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ifyamweo fyaleti fyaya kuntanshi fyabwelela kunuma, kwati kubyasha kwa nkuba." 
Ezekiel1:15 Ilyo nalolesha pa fyamweo namona umupeto nawiminina pa mushili lubali ku fyamweo, umupeto umo ku camweo icali ne finso fine." 
Ezekiel1:16 Ifi efyalemoneka ukupangwa kwa mipeto. Imipeto yalebengeshima nge libwe lyamutengo kirisaliti, yonse ine yalemonekafye umusango umo wine, kabili yonse umo yalemoneka kwati yapangilwa mu mupeto unankwe." 
Ezekiel1:17 Imipeto yena pakwenda kulungamafye ukuli konse mu tupinda tune ukulolele imipeto, ukwabula ukupilibukila uku noku." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ifingolongolo fya mipeto fyali ifyasansuka nganshi kabili ifyakusungusha, ne mipeto yonse yashingulwike na menso monse monse." 
Ezekiel1:19 Cilya ifyamweo fyalaenda, imipeto nayo ninshi yalaenda. Nga fyaima panshi, ne mipeto ine ninshi yaima." 
Ezekiel1:20 Konse uko umupashi waleya nafyo eko fyaleya, ne mipeto ninshi kwima pamo nafyo fine, pantu umupashi wa fyamweo wali na mu mipeto ine." 
Ezekiel1:21 Lyonsefye kuti ifyamweo nga fyalaenda nayo yalaenda, atemwa nga fyaiminina nayo yaiminina, atemwa nga fyaima panshi nayo imipeto yaima panshi, pantu umupashi wa fyamweo wali na mu mipeto ine." 
Ezekiel1:22 Icayanshile pa mulu wa mitwe ya fyamweo calemoneka ngo lwelele, naco cali icabengeshima nge cilola kabili icakusungusha." 
Ezekiel1:23 Mwisamba lya lwelele fyalifungulwile amapindo ya fiko no kusuntinkanya ku mapindo ya cinankwe, elyo na cila cimo cali na mapindo yabili ayafimbile umubili." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ilyo ifyamweo fyaleenda, naumfwile iciunda ca mapindo ngo kupooma kwa menshi, kwati lishiwi lya Mwine wa maka yonse, kwati kubolokota kwa fita. Kutifye cilya fyaiminina fyaponya amapindo yafiko." 
Ezekiel1:25 Elyo kwafuma ishiwi pa mulu wa lwelele ulwali pa mulu wa mitwe yafiko, ilintu fyaiminine ninshi nafiponya na mapindo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Pa mulu wa lwelele ulwali pa mulu wa mitwe yafiko pali icintu icalemoneka nge cipuna cabufumu, icapangilwe ne libwe ilya safile, no waikelepo alemoneka ngo muntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ine namwene icalemoneka ngo musana wakwe ukufika ku mutwe alebengeshima nge cela pakati ka mulilo, elyo ukutula mu musana ukushinta na ku makasa yakwe alebeka ngo mulilo. No lubuuto ulwabekesha lwalimushingulwike." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ulubuuto ulwamushingulwike lwali ngo mukolamfula mu makumbi pa bushiku bwa mfula, efyo ubucindami ubwamushingulwike bwalemoneka. Ici camoneke ngo bucindami bwakwa Yawe. Pakumona ifi nawile ubukupeme panshi, elyo naumfwa ishiwi lya umo uulelanda." 
Ezekiel2:1 Atile kuli ine, “We mwana wa muntu ima. Iminina, nande nobe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Ilyo acili alelanda, Umupashi waisa muli ine wanjiminika, kabili naumfwa alenjeba ati," 
Ezekiel2:3 “We mwana wa muntu, ine nalakutuma ku bena Israeli, kuli uyu mushobo uwansangukila, uucili na nomba walinsangukila. Bena na bashibo babafye abansangukila ukushinta na lelo." 
Ezekiel2:4 Abantu ndekutumako ni bankosa mitwe kabili abaumalala imitima. Ukatile kuli bena auti, ‘Ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe alesosa.’" 
Ezekiel2:5 Bena ni bacisanguka, kanshi nga cakuti baya tesha atemwa baya kaana ukumfwa, te mulandu, cikulufye baya ishiba ukuti kasesema umo alibasokele." 
Ezekiel2:6 “Kanshi iwe we mwana wa muntu, wikaya batiina, wikalatiina nefyo bakaya mukulasosa. Bakakushinguluka nga bacilasa ne myunga, ne mikalile yobe ikaba kwati waikala na bakaliŋongo. Nomba iwe tecakwesha kutiina kufyo bakalakweba, wikalatiina na nkanshi isho bakalakutumbila, pantu ni ŋanda ya bacisanguka." 
Ezekiel2:7 Iwe uli nokulabebafye amashiwi yandi, nangu bakayomfwe atemwa iyoo, pantu ni bacisanguka." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Lelo iwe we mwana wa muntu, umfwa ifyo ine ndekweba. Tecakwesha ukunsangukila nga ilya ŋanda ya bacisanguka. Ale asama, ulye ico ine nalakupeela.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Ilyo nati ndoleshe, namonafye ukuboko kulentambika icitabo icipombwa." 
Ezekiel2:10 Nao acipombolola pa menso yandi, na ine namona ukuti konse konse kuntu kwalembwa amashiwi ya misowa, no kuloosha no kushama." 
Ezekiel3:1 Kabili Yawe epakunjeba ati, “Iwe we mwana wa muntu, ale lya ico wapeelwa, ici citabo icipombwa, elyo uleya no kuya landa ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Kanshi na ine epakwasama, nao andisha icitabo icipombwa nalya." 
Ezekiel3:3 Elyo ati nokuti, “We mwana wa muntu, lya icitabo icipombwa no kwikuta, wikute.” Awe na ine nalya, naumfwa mu kanwa calowa kwati buci." 
Ezekiel3:4 Elyo anjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, kabiye nomba ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, uye beba amashiwi yandi." 
Ezekiel3:5 Ine nshilekutuma ku bantu abalanda ululimi lumbi lumbi kabili ulwayafya iyoo, ine ni ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli eko ndekutuma." 
Ezekiel3:6 Nga cakuti nakutuma ku bantu abalanda ululimi lumbi lumbifye kabili ulwayafya, abo na mashiwi yabo tekuti uyateshe, bena nga kuti baya kumfwa." 
Ezekiel3:7 Nomba aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bena, awe tabakaye kumfwa iyoo, pantu na ine wine balikaana ukuŋumfwa. Bonse apo bapela, ni bankosa mitwe, kabili bantu abaumalala imitima." 
Ezekiel3:8 Kanshi na ine nalalenga ukuti wikabanakila, kabili uli nokuba uwaumalala nga filya fine nabo baba." 
Ezekiel3:9 Ine ndekosha impumi yobe ukucila na pelibwe, ukucila na pa nsono. Ala balya ni bacisanguka, wikabatiina iyoo kabili bekakutiinya.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Kabili akonkanyapo ati, “Iwe we mwana wa muntu, ala umfwikishe bwino bwino, kabili usunge mu mutima obe amashiwi yonse ayo ndekweba." 
Ezekiel3:11 Kabiye nomba ku bantu ba mushobo obe abali muli bunkole no kuya beba ifyo ine ndekweba auti, ‘Ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe alesosa,’ nangu bakaye kumfwila atemwa tabakumfwile.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Awe napulikilwafye Umupashi wanjimisha mu mulu, naumfwa ne shiwi limo lilepunda kunuma, kwati cinkukuma icikalamba nganshi kabili icakutiinya, lileti, “Yawe apaalwe na matotelo pa mulandu wa bucindami ubwaba mu cifulo cakwe.”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Naumfwa ne ciunda ca fyamweo uko filepumanya amapindo mu lwelele, ne congo camipeto mumbali cali kwati cinkukuma." 
Ezekiel3:14 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Lesa wanjimishe no kunsenda, nomba pakuya umutima wandi waisulamo ubukali ne cipyu lelo ukuboko ukwamaka ukwakwa Yawe kwali pali ine." 
Ezekiel3:15 Nasuka nafika na kuli bankole abaleikala ku Tele Abibu mupepi na ku mumana wa Keba. Pakati kabo epo ine naikele panshi inshiku cine lubali, ilyo ninshi ncili uwapeshiwa amano." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ilyo isho nshiku cine lubali shapwile, elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti." 
Ezekiel3:17 “We mwana wa muntu, ine nakusonta ukuba kalinda wa ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. Kanshi nga waumfwa ndelanda elyo ulebasoka kufyo ine ndekweba." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ine nga napingula umuntu umubi ukuti, ‘Cine cine iwe uli nokufwa,’ na iwe wakaana ukumusokako pakuti aleke imicitile yakwe iyibi, amone no kwikala umumi, ala ninshi uyo muntu umubi akafwa pa mulandu wa bubi bwakwe, lelo na iwe wine ukapeelelwapo umulandu pa mulopa wakwe." 
Ezekiel3:19 Nomba nga wasoka umuntu umubi, nao akaana ukuleka ububi bwakwe, ninshi uyo umubi akafwa pa mulandu wa bubi bwakwe, lelo iwe ninshi wapususha umweo obe." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Kabili umuntu uwakaele nga aleka ukucita ifyo Lesa afwaya, no kutampa ukulacita ifibi, elyo na ine namuteya icitembo, ninshi nao wine akafwa iwe nga taumusokeleko. Uyo muntu akafwila pa bubi bwakwe, nshakebukishe na fyabulungami ifyo acitile, lelo iwe ukapeelelwapo umulandu pa mulopa wakwe." 
Ezekiel3:21 Nomba nga wasokako umuntu uucita ifyo Lesa afwaya pakuti elabifya, nao akumfwa, talecita na fibi, uyo muntu ninshi akalaikalila umumi, na iwe wine ninshi wapususha umweo obe.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwali pali ine kulya kwine elyo anjeba ati, “Ima, akuya kwiwanga, kulya eko ndeya landa na iwe.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Kanshi na ine epakwima, naya na kwiwanga, awe namona no bucindami bwakwa Yawe nga filya fine nabumwene ku mumana wa keba. Na ine nawa panshi ubukupeme." 
Ezekiel3:24 Elyo Umupashi waisa muli ine nokunjiminika, anjeba ati, “Kabiye kaisalile mu ŋanda mumobe." 
Ezekiel3:25 Kabili iwe we mwana wa muntu, baleya kukaka imyando. Ukakakwa mu myando epakuti ukalefilwa no kufumina ku bantu." 
Ezekiel3:26 Ine ndekulenga ube cibulu epakuti ulefilwa ukusoka abantu, wikalefye tondolo, ufilwe nokubakalipila nangu baba abasangu ba bantu." 
Ezekiel3:27 Nomba ilyo nkalanda na iwe elintu nkakakula ululimi lobe, elyo iwe ukalebeba auti, ‘Ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe alesosa.’ Uyo onse uuli na matwi yakumfwa naomfwe, noyo onse uwakaana ukumfwa mulekefye abe ifyo fine pantu ni bacisanguka ba bantu.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 “Nomba we mwana wa muntu, buula injelwa iyapapatala ubike panshi ulengepo umusumba wa Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel4:2 Ushingulusheko icilindi icashika pakulanga ifyo bautebelele. Uciteko ne cibumbili no kwimika inkambi shakuulwisha. Bika ne mpungu ishakulondelamo ne nsakwe, ne fyakubongolwelako." 
Ezekiel4:3 Buula pani ya cela uibike pakati, iwe kuno lubali, umusumba nao kulya. Elyo uloshe amenso ku musumba pantu umusumba nautebelelwa, niwe wine uutebelele. Ici e cishibilo ukuti efyo cikaba na ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Ale nomba lala kabafu, ulalile lubali lwa ku kuso, elyo uibikepo pa mubili obe no bubifi bwa ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. Wakulalala apo pene no kuculila ububifi bwabo pa nshiku shonse ukalala kabeya." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ine nakupeela impendwa sha nshiku ukulingana ne myaka ya bubifi bwabo. Kanshi ni pa nshiku imyanda itatu na makumi pabula (390) iwe ukalaculila ububifi bwa ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. 
Ezekiel4:6 Ilyo ukapwisha, ukalale kabafu nakabili, lyena ukalalile lubali lwa ku kulyo, elyo no bubifi bwa ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda nabo ukabufute pa nshiku amakumi yane (40), esho nakupeela emukuti ubushiku bumo pa mwaka umo." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Upilibwile icinso cobe ku musumba wa Yerusalemu umone ifyo bautebelele, kabili ukwabula akantu mu minwe yobe, sesemena umusumba ishamo lyauko." 
Ezekiel4:8 Ine nalakukaka imyando pakuti ulefilwa ukupilibukila uku noku, ukushintafye napo shikapwila inshiku shobe ishakucula." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Kanshi nomba buulapo iŋanu na bale, na cilemba ne landa, na male elyo na masaka. Ufisakanye mu cipe cimo no kulafibomfya ukupangamo umukate obe. Pa nshiku imyanda itatu na makumi pabula (390) efyo ukalalya ilyo ukalala kabafu." 
Ezekiel4:10 Pa bushiku bumo ukalalyafye akamokolwa kamo aka mukate akapimwa pa nshita nayo iyapimwa. 
Ezekiel4:11 Kabili pa bushiku bumo ukalanwapofye inkombo shibili isha menshi, e cipimo cobe nakupeela pa nshita nayo iyapimwa epela." 
Ezekiel4:12 Ukalelya ngefyo wingalya icakulya ca bale. Uli nokulabuula amafi ya bantu ayauma, eyo ukalekosesha umulilo, no kocelapo imikate yobe iyapapatala, kabili ukaleleka na bantu bonse balemonako.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Kabili Yawe asosa ati, “Ilyo nkasalanganya abena Israeli mu benafyalo, ala efyo bakalalya ifyakulya ifyakowela.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Kanshi na ine epakuilishanya nati, “Ala iyoo teifyo we Mfumu Yawe, ine nshatala ndya icaifwila, nangu icasantaulwa ku fiswango. Ukutulafye ku bwaice bwandi, awe ine nshatala ndya inama iyakowela.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Lesa epakwasuka ati, “Cabafye bwino, ine nakusuminisha ukuti ukalebomfya citindi wa ŋombe, eo ukaleocela imikate mu cifulo ca mafi ya bantu.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Kabinge alundapo ati, “We mwana wa muntu, ine nkonaula ifyakulya mu matala ya mu Yerusalemu. Mu bulanda bwabo abantu bakalalya icakulya icapimwafye elyo bakalanwa amenshi nayo ayapimwa mukukabila." 
Ezekiel4:17 Bakekala ukwabula icakulya na amenshi, pantu fikacepa. Bakafupuka pa menso ya banabo kabili bakondoloka palwa kubifya kwabo.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 “Nomba we mwana wa muntu, ale buula ulupanga ulwatwa no kulubomfya ngo lwembe, ubeyeleko umushishi obe, pamo no mwefu obe. Ubuule umushishi obe, uupime pa cipimo no kuutulika mu tumina tutatu." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ilyo inshiku sha kutebelela kwa musumba shikapwa, ukaye oca akamwina kamo ku mulilo pakati ka musumba. Akamwina kambi ukakonaule ku lupanga pakushinguluka umusumba. Akamwina kambi aka cipande cabutatu ukakolwile mu mwela, pantu ine nkabakonka no lupanga ulwasomonwa." 
Ezekiel5:3 Ubuulepo umushishi umo, uukake ku cisempe ca nsalu yobe." 
Ezekiel5:4 Kabili ubuulepo umushishi na umbi umo, uupose mu mulilo, uleke upye. Apa pene epakafuma umulilo uukasalanganina ku ba ŋanda yonse iyakwa Israeli.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Mona, Yerusalemu uo nabika pakati nankati ka mishobo ne fyalo fimbi ifyamushinguluka monse monse." 
Ezekiel5:6 Lelo Yerusalemu ena, awe alikaana mu bubi bwakwe ukulasunga amafunde ne fipope fyandi. Alibipisha ukucila ne mishobo ne fyalo fimbi ifyamushinguluka, ena alikaanininafye amafunde yandi kabili alikaana no kukonka ifipope fyandi." 
Ezekiel5:7 Kanshi ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe alesosa. Ubupondamishi bobe bwalicila ne mishobo iyakushinguluka kabili wakaana no kukonka ifipope fyandi nangu ukusunga amafunde yandi. Iwe tawakonka nelyo ifipope fya mishobo iyakushinguluka. 
Ezekiel5:8 Kanshi ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe asosa ati nomba kankwebelepo ukuti na ine nakusangukila Yerusalemu. Kabili ndi nokukukanda pakabalika ninshi ne mishobo ya benafyalo ilemonako. 
Ezekiel5:9 Pa mulandu wa tulubi tobe utwamuselu, nkakulimuna iwe Yerusalemu ifyo nshatala nkulimunapo, kabili nshakatale mbwekeshapo ukucita ico." 
Ezekiel5:10 Eico pa menso yobe Yerusalemu, bashibo bakalalya abana babo, na bana babo nabo bakalya bashibo. Ala nkakukanda iwe, na bakashalapo nabo bene nkabasalanganya mpanga yonse.”" 
Ezekiel5:11 Ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe alesosa ati, “Kanshi napalifye ine ne Mumi, apo walikowesha icifulo camushilo ku fipasho fya bunani ne fintu ifishaibipila ifyo iwe ucita, ine winefye nkafumyapo ishuko lyandi pali iwe. Nkakulimuna nshakakubeleleko uluse nangu ukukulekelela." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ibumba limo pali yatatu ilya bantu bobe likafwila ku cikuko na ku cipowe mukati mwine umo, limbi ilyabubili likafwila kunse ya musumba ku lupanga. Na limbi ilyabutatu nkalisalanganya mpanga yonse." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Elyo ukomfwisha apapela icipyu candi. Nkalanga ubukali bwandi ukushintafye napo cikalinga no mulandu wapwa. Ilyo ifyo fyonse fikafika, lyena ukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine ne Yawe mu bufuba bwandi ubukali nalilandile ukuti nkalimuna bucisanguka bobe mu mulapo." 
Ezekiel5:14 Ine nkakusha icibolya kabili icakuwelwa pakati ka mishobo iyakushinguluka, pa cinso ca bonse abakalapitapo." 
Ezekiel5:15 Ilyo ine nkafulwa no kukufokela bukali bukali pakukulimuna no busungu bwabukali, abantu bonse aba mu mishobo iyakushinguluka ilyo bakalakumona bakalakusalula no kukuwela. Ukaba icakumwenako kabili icintu cimo icakutiinya, nine Yawe nalanda." 
Ezekiel5:16 Ilyo nkaposa imifwi yandi iyikali iya cipowe pali iwe, nkaiposa mukukonaula. Nkakuletela icipowe icikali, kabili nkacilika no kwakufuma ifyakulya." 
Ezekiel5:17 Nkakutumina icipowe, nkakutumina ne fiswango ifyakwipaya bamwano, epakuti ukashale ukwabula abana. Nkakuletela icikuko, ne mpasase no kukwimisha inkondo pakuti bakakwipaye, nine Yawe nalanda.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel6:2 “We mwana wa muntu, lolesha ku mpili sha mu Israeli, kashisesemene amashiwi yandi." 
Ezekiel6:3 Kabili utile, mwe impili sha mu Israeli umfweni ishiwi lya Mfumu Yawe. Ifi efyo ine ne Yawe ndeeba impili no tupili, imikonko na manika, ukuti ine nkesa no lupanga kuli imwe, kukonaula incende ishasansama isho abantu bapepelapo utulubi." 
Ezekiel6:4 Ifibumbili fyenu ifya malambo fikabongololwa, nefyo mufutumwinapo ububani fikatobaulwa, kabili nkakomaula abantu benu pa ntanshi ya tulubi twine." 
Ezekiel6:5 Nkaposa ifitumbi fya bena Israeli ntangali ntangali kuntanshi ya tulubi twabo, nkasalanganya na mafupa yenu mu mbali shonse isha fibumbili fya malambo." 
Ezekiel6:6 Konse uko mukekala, imisumba yonse ikasanguka ifibolya, ne ncende umo bapepela utulubi shikonaika, ifibumbili fyenu ifya malambo fikonaikila kumo kwine no tulubi, ifyo mufutumwinapo ububani fikasansaika, na fyonse ifyo mupanga nafyo fikonaikilila." 
Ezekiel6:7 Abantu benu bakalafwa ntangali ntangali pakati kenu, abakashalapo elyo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Lelo bamo pakati kenu ine nkabapususha, pantu bamo nkaleka bakapusukeko ku lupanga ilyo mukasalanganina mu fyalo fya mishobo imbi." 
Ezekiel6:9 Elyo, kulya kwine ku mishobo ya benafyalo uko bakabasenda bunkole, abakapusukako eko bakalanjibukishisha no kwishiba pafyo bankalifye ku micitile ya mitima yabo iyabupulumushi, pantu balimfumisheko amano, elyo nefyo bali no lwinso lwa tulubi, ine balinsuulile. Kwena bakalaiseka abene pa mulandu wa fibi ne fyabunani ifyo balecita." 
Ezekiel6:10 Bakeshiba ukuti ine nine Yawe, nokuti ifyo ine nabasokele tefyanseko iyoo.”" 
Ezekiel6:11 Ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe alesosa ifyakuti, “Kumpeni mu minwe, inyanyantileni, elyo mutile, ‘Iye!’ Ala ni pa mulandu wa fibi fyonse ne fya bunani fyonse ifyo imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli mwacita efikalenga mukalefwa mu nkondo, ku cipowe na ku cikuko." 
Ezekiel6:12 Abakaba ukutali bakafwa ku cikuko, abakaba mupepi bena bakafwa ku nkondo. Abakashalapo bena bakafwa ku cipowe. Kanshi bakamona ifyo nkapwisha icipyu candi pali bena." 
Ezekiel6:13 Ifitumbi fyabo fikabafye ntangali ntangali pakati ka tulubi twabo, na monsefye mu mbali ya fibumbili fyabo ifya malambo. Fikalala ntangali ntangali pa tupili tonse ututali, na pa mulu wa mpili shonse, na mwisamba lya miti yonse iyalelema, na mwisamba lya fimuti fyonse ifya oki ifikulu, emukuti ponsefye apo balelekela utulubi twabo amalambo ayakoca. Elyo bonse bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine ndi Yawe." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ine nkabatitikisha, nkonaula ne calo cabo. Nkacisangula amatololo, ukutampilafye ku matololo ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, ukuya fikafye na ku musumba wa Ribula, lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Nshakashepo nelyo pamo apo aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli baikala. Lyena elyo bonse bakashininkisha ukuti ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine ilyakuti," 
Ezekiel7:2 “We mwana wa muntu, efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ku calo ca bena Israeli aleti, nomba e mpela, e mpela ya calo mu tupinda tonse tune!" 
Ezekiel7:3 Impela naisa pali imwe, nomba mwalamona ifyo ine mpesha abantu nga nafulwa. Pantu nalamupingula imwe ukulingana nefyo mucita, no kumulimuna pa fyabunani fyenu fyonse ifishaibipila." 
Ezekiel7:4 Nshamupanye, kabili icine cinefye nshamulangulukile iyoo. Nalamulimuna pa micitile yenu pantu ifyabunani fili pakati kenu, epakuti mushininkishe ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe aleti, “Ala mwalaswa muponenwe no busanso ubushatala abumfwikapo, ebwalamwishila imwe." 
Ezekiel7:6 Ala nomba impela yafika, nacipwa. Nomba impela naifika, imwe nomba lwapela." 
Ezekiel7:7 Ubusanso nabwisa pali imwe mwe baikala muli cino calo. Inshita naipalama, ubushiku nabufika. Insansa isho mukwata pa mpili apo mupepela shapwa, nomba palaba utoloto." 
Ezekiel7:8 Tapapite na kashita mwalamona ifyo nalamupesha imwe nga nafulwa no bukali bwandi bulepwila pali imwe. Ndemupingula ukulingana na pafyo mucita. Ndemulimuna pa fyabunani fyenu fyonse ifishaibipila. 
Ezekiel7:9 Nshamupanye, kabili nshamulangulukileko nelyo ukumulekelela iyoo. Nalamulimuna pa mulandu wa fintu ifyabunani ifyo imwe mucita, epakuti mushininkishe ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe, nokuti nine wine ndekanda." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Ubushiku nabufika, nomba bwafika ubushiku ubwe shamo lyobe. Inkonto naipekanishiwa, pa mulandu wakuti icilumba nacikulisha." 
Ezekiel7:11 Ubuluku nabukulisha busangwike inkonto yakukandilako abacita ifyabubifi. Takuli umuntu uukashala, pali ili bumba tapakashale nelyo umo, nangufye icuma nelyo icili conse icacindama." 
Ezekiel7:12 Inshita naisa, no bushiku nabufika. Mwileka uushita asekelele, nangu uushitisha abe no bulanda, pantu icipyu cimine ibumba lyonse." 
Ezekiel7:13 Kashitisha wa mpanga takaipoke nakabili ilyo bonse babili bacili abomi, pantu icimonwa ca pebumba lyonse tacakabweshiwe. Pa mulandu wa kubifya tapali nangu umo uukapususha ubumi bwakwe." 
Ezekiel7:14 “Nangu balishe amapenga elyo na fyonse bafiteyanye, lelo tapabe nelyo umo uwakuya kukulwa inkondo, pantu icipyu candi cili pebumba lyonse." 
Ezekiel7:15 Kunse kuli ulupanga, na mukati namo muli icipowe ne cikuko. Bonse abali mu mpanga balafwa ku lupanga, elyo na bonse abali mu musumba balefwa ku cikuko na ku cipowe." 
Ezekiel7:16 Bamo abakapusuka bakafulumukila ku mpili, no kuya mukulila nge nkunda isha mwishika palwa kubifya kwabo." 
Ezekiel7:17 Bonsefye amaboko yabo yaletompoka, na mu makufi yabo mulepomponteka." 
Ezekiel7:18 Balefwala insalu shabulanda, kabili bakulaikankilafye ku mwenso. Balebeya imishishi ku mitwe yabo, no kulafulika amenso ku nsoni." 
Ezekiel7:19 Silifa wabo bakulauposa mu misebo kwati fyabusali, pantu silifa na golide teti fibe ifyakubapokololako pa bushiku Yawe akaba ne cipyu. Tabakamone ukutuusha ku nsala nangu ukwikuta mu nda shabo. Pantu efintu fyalebatwala kukubifya." 
Ezekiel7:20 Kale baleitakisha pa mulandu wa fyakuyemfya fyabo ifyamutengo ifyo balebomfya ukupangamo ifipasho fyabo no tulubi twabo ifyabunani. E mulandu wine ndeyalwila ukuti ifi fintu fibe ifyabusali. 
Ezekiel7:21 Ine ndeleka abenafyalo ebo bafitape, ndeleka ne mbifi sha bantu mu calo esho shibuule ifyuma fyabo no kufikowesha." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ine ndefumyako icinso candi kuli bena, kabili bakulakowesha iŋanda yandi iyo nacindika, na bapupu bakulaingilamo no kuikowesha." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Pekanyeni iminyololo, pantu mu calo muli ubupondo, na mu musumba mwiswilefye ubuluku." 
Ezekiel7:24 Eco nalaletelamo abantu ababipisha aba mu mishobo ya benafyalo, uleke ebo bese mukulaikala mu mayanda yabo. Nalalenga abantu bamaka baleleka ukuituntumba, elyo bakese abakukowesha incende shabo isho bapepelamo." 
Ezekiel7:25 Ilyo icimfulunganya cilebako, bena bakulafwaya icibote nomba awe tabakacimone iyoo." 
Ezekiel7:26 Amashamo yakulakonkanafye pa yabiye, na maŋwiŋwi pa maŋwiŋwi yabiye. Bakulapapata kasesema pakuti alebebako ifili nokubako. Bashimapepo tabalemona mafunde yakufunda abantu, na bakalamba bene tabalemona ifyakubapandapo amano." 
Ezekiel7:27 Imfumu yakulalooshafye, umwana waiko nao akakupwa ne langulushi lyakupelelwa, na bantu ba mu calo bakulaikankilafye ku mwenso. Ine ndebakanda ukulingana ne fintu ifyo bena bacita, kabili ine ndebapingwilafye ukulingana ne mibeele yabo. Lyena elyo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Mu mwaka uwalengele mutanda, mu mweshi walenga mutanda pa bushiku bwalenga shisano, ilyo nali mumwandi, tulelanda na bakalamba ba bena Yuda abaikele ku mulola wandi, awe napulikilwafye ukuboko kwa Mfumu Yawe kwanjikila." 
Ezekiel8:2 Nalolesha mu mulu, namona cimo icalemoneka ngo muntu. Ukufuma mu musana waciko ukushinta na ku makasa cali ngo mulilo, ukufuma mu musana ukuya pamulu umubili walebengeshima ngo mukuba uwapukushika." 
Ezekiel8:3 Kabili uyo muntu atambalika icalemoneka ngo kuboko, anjikata na ku mushishi wandi uwa ku mutwe. Umupashi wanjimisha pakati ka mulu ne sonde, elyo muli ifyo fine ifimonwa wansenda wantwala na ku Yerusalemu. Waya njishisha lwamukati ku mwinshi wa mpongolo yamukati, iya ku kapinda ka ku kuso mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, palya pabela icilubi icilenga ubufuba." 
Ezekiel8:4 Mulya mwine emo namona ubucindami bwakwa Lesa wakwa Israeli apulama, nga filya fine namumwene mwiwanga mu cimonwa." 
Ezekiel8:5 Lesa epakunjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, lolesha ku kapinda ka ku kuso.” Awe na ine naloleshako, namona mupepi no bulambo ku mwinshi wa mpongolo, kuli icilubi icilenga ubufuba." 
Ezekiel8:6 Elyo anjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, bushe wamona ifyo aba bantu bacita? Tamba ifintu ifyabunani ifyo aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bacita muno. Balintalusha mu ncende yandi iyamushilo. Lelo walamwenapo na fimbi ifyacilapo ku bunani.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Elyo kabili antwala ku mwinshi wa lubansa elyo nalolesha namona ne cipunda mu cibumba. 
Ezekiel8:8 Ati nokuti, “We mwana wa muntu, sonsobola mu cibumba apa.” Na ine epakutulapo, namona umwinshi apakwingilila." 
Ezekiel8:9 Kabili anjeba ati, “Ingilamo, uye tambamo ifintu ifyabubifi ne fyansoni ifyo aba bantu balecitamo.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Kanshi na ine epakwingilamo. Awe ne cacine namonafye pa fibumba konse konse fyalilengwapo ifikulika, ne nama shimbi ishakowela, ne filubi fimbi ifyo aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli balepepa." 
Ezekiel8:11 Nasangamo pantanshi abakalamba amakumi cine lubali (70) aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, na pakati pali na Yasania mwana Shafani. Ninshi cila umo naikatilila ifyo alefutumwinapo ububani, no bubani ninshi bulefutumuka icushi." 
Ezekiel8:12 Epakunjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, bushe wamona ifyo abakalamba ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli balecita muno mu bumfisolo? Bonse balepepela mu mfuba umwaba akalubi ka cila umo. Bena basosa ati, ‘Yawe tatumona iyoo. Yawe alifumyako amano kuli cino calo.’”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Kabili Yawe anjeba ati, “Walamwenapo na fimbi ifyo bacita, ifyabunani ukucila na pali ifi.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Kanshi epakuntwala ku mwinshi wa mpongolo, iyabela ku kapinda ka ku kuso mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, ananga na banakashi abekele, ninshi baleloosha umulungu Tamusi." 
Ezekiel8:15 Elyo anjipusha ati, “Bushe wacimona ici cintu we mwana wa muntu? Walamwenapo na fimbi ifyo bacita ifyabunani.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Kanshi epakuntwala mukati ka lubansa lwa ŋanda yakwa Yawe no mwinshi uwakwingilila mu ncende iyamushilo pakati ka bulambo no mwinshi wine, epo naya sanga abaume ni cikanga amakumi yabili na basano (25). Ninshi nabafutatila Itempele lyakwa Yawe, nabalosha amenso ku kabanga, no kwinamika impumi shabo balepepa akasuba." 
Ezekiel8:17 Nao epakunjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, bushe wacimona ici cimusango? Aba bantu ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda, ala tabakaleke kulacita ifi fintu fyonse ifyabunani ifyo umwene muno. Ebalengele nokuti kube ubuluku mu calo conse cino, no kutwalilila baletwalililafye ukunkalifya umutima. Lelo batila, ‘Tacili mulandu ukalamba, iyoo.’ Lolesha balebika umusambo wa cimuti ku myona yabo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Eico na ine nkabakanda, bakamone apapela icipyu candi. Takuli abo ilinso lyandi likashapo, nshakabalangulukilepo. Nangu bakeshe shani ukumpapata no kupundila mu matwi yandi, ine nshakatale mbomfwa nakalya.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Kabili ine nalyumfwile uko apundile mwishiwi likalamba ati, “Leteni bamalonda ba musumba, aleni iseni kuno. Cila muntu ese ne fyanso mu minwe yakwe.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Awe apopene abaume mutanda batula na ku mpongolo ya pamulu, iyabela ku kapinda ka ku kuso, bonse umo umo baisa ne fyanso ifikali, ninshi balipo no mwaume umo uwafwele insalu ishabusaka kabili ishatelela, wena ninshi nakwata ne fyakulembelako. Awe bonse baisa iminina lubali lwa ku bulambo bwa mukuba." 
Ezekiel9:3 Elyo ubucindami bwakwa Lesa wakwa Israeli bwafuma pa mulu wa bakerubi apo bwali, no kuya ku lubansa lwa ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Yawe epakwitapo uwafwele insalu ishabusaka uwakwete ne fyakulembelako, ati," 
Ezekiel9:4 “Kabiye, kapitane mu musumba onse uwa Yerusalemu, uye ulelemba icishibilo pa mpumi sha bantu bonse abalelanguluka no kulalila pa mulandu wa fyabunani ifi fyonse ifilecitika muli uno musumba.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Kabili naumfwa uko Lesa aleeba abo bambi ati, “Mukonkeni, pitaneni mu musumba, mwipayemo abantu. Tecakwesha kushapo nelyo umo, tekwesha ukulangulukila umuntu iyoo." 
Ezekiel9:6 Mwipayefye bonse abakote, abalumendo, abakashana, na banyinabo kumo kwine na bana babo. Nomba bonse abalembelwe icishibilo pa mpumi shabo, bena mwiesha kubakumyamo. Tampileni kuno kwine ku ncende yandi iyamushilo.” Kanshi nabo epakutampila pa bakalamba abaiminine ku ntanshi ya ŋanda yakwa Yawe." 
Ezekiel9:7 Kanshi epakubeba ati, “Kowesheni ino ŋanda. Mu mansa yaiko isushenimo ifitumbi fya bantu. Aleni kabiyeni.” Kanshi nabo epakutampa ukwipaya abantu mu musumba." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ilyo baleipaya abantu, nashala njimininefye neka. Awe nawa nalosha icinso panshi nalalila nati, “We Mfumu Yawe, bushe kanshi uku ekufulilwa umusumba wa Yerusalemu, ukwakuti walaipayafye aba abena Israeli bonsefye muli cino calo?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Nao anjasuka ati, “Aba mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli na Yuda ala bali no mulandu, pantu balibifya apakalamba. Balipaulula abantu muli cino calo, kabili na muli uno musumba wine mwalisula ulufyengo. Bena batilafye abati, ‘Yawe alifumyako amano kuli cino calo cesu. Yawe tatumona iyoo.’" 
Ezekiel9:10 Eico na ine wine ne Lesa nshashepo nangu umo, nshalangulukilepo muntu iyoo. Ine ndebacitafye ukulingana nefyo cila muntu acita.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Elyo uyo muntu uwafwele insalu ishabusaka, uwakwete ne fyakulembelako, abwela na mashiwi ati, “Napwisha ukubomba ifyo mwali munkonkomeshe.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Ilyo ine nainwine amenso pa lwelele ulwa pa mulu wa mitwe ya bakerubi, nalimwenepo icaba nge cipuna cabufumu icapangwa kwilibwe ilya safile." 
Ezekiel10:2 Elyo Yawe aeba umuntu uwafwele insalu ishabusaka ishatelela ati, “Kabiye mu mipeto ilya iyili mwisamba lya bakerubi, kalapulemo umulilo, wisushe indupi shobe. Elyo uye utandanye mu musumba.” Kabili ilyo ncili ndelolesha nao aingilamo." 
Ezekiel10:3 Nomba ilyo aleyamo, bakerubi baiminine lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo lubali lwe Tempele, elyo ne kumbi lyaisula mu lubansa lwamukati." 
Ezekiel10:4 No bucindami bwakwa Yawe epakulafuma pa mulu wa bakerubi, no kulaya ku mwinshi we Tempele lyakwa Yawe. Ne kumbi lyaisula mwi Tempele icakuti no lubansa lwalabengeshimafye ku mulandu wa bucindami bwakwa Yawe." 
Ezekiel10:5 Iciunda ca mapindo ya bakerubi naco caumfwika na ku lubansa lwa panse, kwati lishiwi lyakwa Lesa Umwine wa maka yonse eulelanda." 
Ezekiel10:6 Cilya Yawe akonkomesha umuntu uwafwele insalu ishabusaka ishatelela ukuya lapula umulilo mu mipeto iyali mwisamba lya bakerubi, nao emo aya, aya iminina lubali lwa mupeto umo." 
Ezekiel10:7 Elyo Kerubi umo aikata pa mulilo uwali apo bali, alapulapo umo aubika na mu ndupi sha muntu uwafwele insalu ishabusaka ishatelela. Nao epakusenda umulilo, afuma no kufuma." 
Ezekiel10:8 Bakerubi bonse umo umo nabakwata mwisamba lya mapindo yabo ifisansa nge fya muntu. 
Ezekiel10:9 Kabili nalolesha namona imipeto ine ku lubali lwa bakerubi, na cila mupeto wali ku lubali lwakwa Kerubi umo. Imipeto yalebengeshima kwati tumabwe twamutengo utwa kirisaliti" 
Ezekiel10:10 Mukumoneka imipeto yonse ine yalifye iyapalana, kwati umo wapangilwa mukati ka mupeto unankwe." 
Ezekiel10:11 Bakerubi bena pakwenda kulungamafye ukuli konse mu tupinda tune ukulolele ifinso fyabo, ukwabula imipeto ukupilibukila uku noku. Bonse pamo bena kulungamafye konse uko imitwe yaloseshe, ukwabula ukwalukila kumbi." 
Ezekiel10:12 Kabili imibili yabo, ne numa shabo, ne minwe yabo, na mapindo yabo, kumo kwine ne mipeto yonse ine, fyonse fyaiswilemo amenso mu mbali shonse." 
Ezekiel10:13 Naumfwile ukuti imipeto baleita abati, “Imipeto iyibutukisha.”" 
Ezekiel10:14 Bakerubi bonse umo umo bali ne finso fine. Icapakubala cali nge cinso icakwa kerubi, icabubili cali nge cinso ca muntu, icabutatu cali nge cinso ca nkalamo ne icabune cali nge cinso cakwa kapumpe." 
Ezekiel10:15 Awe na bakerubi baima, baya na mu lwelele. Eifi fine ifyamweo ifyo namwene na ku mumana wa Keba." 
Ezekiel10:16 Ilyo bakerubi baleya, ninshi baleilafye camumo ne mipeto ine. Baleti nga bafungulula amapindo pakupupuka, ninshi ne mipeto ine kuiila pamo nabo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Kumfwa bakerubi nga baiminina, nayo ninshi yaiminina, ilyo baima ninshi nayo yaima, pantu umupashi wa fyamweo wali mu mipeto." 
Ezekiel10:18 Elyo ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwafumina pa mwinshi wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe, bwaya iminina na pa mulu wa bakerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Ilyo ncilii ndetamba, bakerubi epakufungulula amapindo yabo, bapupukila mu mulu ne mipeto yaimina kumo. Baya iminina pa ŋanda yakwa Yawe, pa mwinshi uwabela lwa ku kabanga, ninshi no bucindami bwakwa Lesa wakwa Israeli buli apo bali pa mulu wabo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Ifi e fyamweo ifyo namwene pesamba lyakwa Lesa wakwa Israeli ku mumana wa Keba. No kushininkisha nomba nashininkisha ukuti e bakerubi bene. 
Ezekiel10:21 Bonse umo bali ne finso fine, na mapindo yane, na mwisamba lya mapindo yabo mwali ifyaba nge fisansa fya muntu." 
Ezekiel10:22 Ifinso fyabo fyali cimo cine na filya fine namwene ku mumana wa Keba. Bonse umo baleya uko baloseshe ifinso fyabo. 
Ezekiel11:1 Umupashi walinjimishe no kuntwala ku mpongolo iyabela lwa ku kabanga ka ŋanda yakwa Yawe. Kulya kwine eko nasangile nabeminina abaume amakumi yabili na basano (25), ninshi pali na Yasania mwana Asuri, na Pelatia mwana Benaya, abo bene babili ebali intungulushi sha bantu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Yawe nao anjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, aba e bantu ababi, abapanda abantu amano ayakucita ifyabipa muli uno musumba." 
Ezekiel11:3 Bena batila abati, ‘Bushe inshita yakukuula amayanda taili mupepi? Pantu uno musumba ulifye nge nongo iyakwipikamo, na ifwe tuli nga inama mukati kaiko. ’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Kanshi iwe we mwana wa muntu, ala sesema pali bena, basesemene.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Elyo Umupashi wakwa Yawe waikile pali ine no kwisa njeba ati, “Ifi efyasosa Yawe. Imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ala ine nalishiba ifyo imwe mulanda, nefyo mutontonkanya ukucita." 
Ezekiel11:6 Imwe mwalipaulula abantu muli uno musumba, na mu misebo yauko mwaisulafye ifitumbi fya bantu." 
Ezekiel11:7 “Eico kanshi ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe ilesosa, aiti, ‘Uno musumba waba ni nongo iyili peshiko, ne nama bantu abo mwaipaulula. Nomba ine nalamutamfyamo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Imwe mulatiina ulupanga, no lupanga elo nalaletamo, efyasosa imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel11:9 Nalamutamfyamo muli uno musumba, nalamuposa mu minwe ya benafyalo pakumukanda." 
Ezekiel11:10 Balamwipaila muno mwine ku lupanga, kabili nkamucitila ubupingushi na mu mipaka ya calo ca Israeli. Lyena elyo mwalashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel11:11 Uno musumba tawabe inongo yenu iyoo nangu imwe ukuba inama muli iyi nongo. Ine nkamucitila ubupingushi mu mipaka ya calo ca Israeli. 
Ezekiel11:12 Epakuti mushininkishe ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe, pantu tamukonka ifipope fyandi nangu ukusunga amafunde yandi. Lelo imwe mukonka imbela sha mishobo iyamushinguluka.’”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Nomba kutifye cilya ndesesema, awe Pelatia mwana Benaya apona panshi, no kufwa afwa. Na ine nakontamika icinso panshi ubukupeme, napunda ne shiwi ilikalamba nati, “Owe, we Mfumu Yawe, bushe walaipayafye abena Israeli bonse ukwabula ukushapo no wakushimika?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine," 
Ezekiel11:15 aliti, “We mwana wa muntu, abantu abekashi ba mu Yerusalemu ebalanda palwa bamunonko na bantu bobe aba muli bunkole, aba mu ŋanda yonse iyakwa Israeli, abati, ‘Yawe alibatamfya, ne calo ici nomba capeelwa kuli ifwe kukuba icuma cesu.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 “Kanshi uye ulande auti, ‘Ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe asosa ifyakuti, nangu nabasalangenye ukutali pakati ka mishobo imbi na pakati ka fyalo, lelo pali ino nshita nine naba icifulo cabo icamushilo mu fyalo umo baya ikala.’" 
Ezekiel11:17 “Kanshi sosa auti, ‘Ifi efintu Imfumu Yawe alesosa ati, nkabalonganya ukufuma mu mishobo na mu fyalo umo nabasalanganishisha no kubabwesesha icalo ca Israeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Bakabwelela muli ici calo kabili bakesa fumyamo fyonse ifyamakankamike no tulubi twamuselu.’ 
Ezekiel11:19 Ine nkabapeela umutima umbi uwaololoka no kubika umupashi uupya muli bena. Nkafumya muli bena umutima wa libwe no kubikamo umutima uwa munofu. 
Ezekiel11:20 Lyena bakalasunga amafunde yandi, no kulanakila ifipope fyandi fyonse bwino bwino. Lyena elyo bakaba abantu bandi, na ine nkaba Lesa wabo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Nomba abantu abatemwa ukulapepa ifimpashanya ifyabunani no tulubi utwamuselu, awe bena nkalabalimuna palwa micitile yabo. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Elyo bakerubi balitampile ukupupuka, ne mipeto ine yabakonka. Ubucindami bwakwa Lesa wakwa Israeli bwali pa mulu wabo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ubucindami bwakwa Yawe epakufumamo mu musumba, bwaya iminina na pa lupili ulwabela lwa ku kabanga ka musumba." 
Ezekiel11:24 Kabili mu cimonwa mwine Umupashi wakwa Yawe wanjimya, ambwekesha na kuli bankole banandi mu calo ca Babiloni, awe ne cimonwa e mipwile." 
Ezekiel11:25 Na ine epakulaebako bankole banandi ifintu fyonse ifyo Yawe anangile. 
Ezekiel12:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel12:2 “We mwana wa muntu, iwe waikala na bantu abasangu. Amenso balikwata, nomba tabamona nakalya. Amatwi balikwata, nomba tabomfwa nakalya, pantu basangu ba bantu." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Kanshi iwe we mwana wa muntu, ale nomba kaka ifipe fyobe, ucite kwati uli mbutushi, elyo wime mu nshita ya kasuba. Uleke bonsefye bakumone uko uleima, bamone noko uleya. Nakalimo baleiluka no kwishiba nangu baba abasangu." 
Ezekiel12:4 Mu nshita ya kasuba ulongele ifipe fyobe pa bwelu, uficite kwati cifulukutu cilya cisenda bankole. Uleke bakumone ilyo uleima icungulo, wise ucite kwati uleya muli bunkole." 
Ezekiel12:5 Ilyo bakulatamba, utule icipunda mu cibumba ca ŋanda yobe, wimye icipe cobe, ucifumishe pa cipunda pene, no kufuma epo ufumine." 
Ezekiel12:6 Uleke bamoneko uko wakulaitwika icipe pa kubeya, wise ufume ilyo pafiita, ufimbe na pa menso, epakuti wiisa mona uko wakulaya. Pantu ndekulenga ukuba icilangililo ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Kanshi na ine epakucita ifyo Yawe ankonkomeshe. Ilyo line nalonga ifipe fyandi mu nshita ya kasuba, naficita kwati cifulukutu icakuya naco muli bunkole. Elyo icungulo cilya pafiita natula icipunda mu cibumba ku minwe yandi, nafumya ne cipe, naitwika na pa kubeya, elyo ninshi no kumona abantu balemonako." 
Ezekiel12:8 Mu nshita ya lucelo kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel12:9 “We mwana wa muntu, bushe aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli abasangu tabakwipwishe ifyo iwe walecita?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Eico iwe ubebe ifyo ine ne Mfumu Yawe nkwebele. Aya mashiwi ayakusoka cilolo uwateeka Yerusalemu, kabili eyakusoka na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bonse abaikalamo." 
Ezekiel12:11 Ubebe ukuti ico cintu iwe ucitile e cishibilo icakubalanga icikabaponena, bakasendwa bunkole, bakabatamfisha na mu fyalo fimbi nge mbutushi." 
Ezekiel12:12 Cilolo wa mfumu uubateeka akasenda icipe cakwe pa kubeya pa nshita kufiitile, pakufyuka akafumina pa cipunda ico bakatula mu cibumba. Akafimba na pa menso pakukanamona icalo uko akalaya." 
Ezekiel12:13 Nomba uyo cilolo, ine nkamuteye isumbu lyandi, no kwikatwa emo akekatwa. Elyo nkamutwala ku musumba wa Babiloni mu calo ca bena Kaludea eko akaya fwila ukwabula ukumona uyo musumba." 
Ezekiel12:14 Bashicilye bakwe, na bamupandako amano, na bamulinda, bonse nkabasalanganishisha monse monse, elyo nabo nkalabasapika pakufwaya ukubepaya." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Ilyo nkabasalanganishisha mu bantu ba mishobo imbi, na mu fyalo fimbi, lyena elyo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kwena nkaleka bamo bamo bakapusukeko ku nkondo, ku cipowe na ku cikuko, epakuti umo mwine mu mishobo ya bantu umo bakekala, uleke bakashininkishe ububi bwa fintu ifyabunani ifyo bacita, kabili epakuti bakeshibe nokuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel12:18 “We mwana wa muntu, ulesokona pa nshita ulelya, kabili ulekanka ku mwenso pa nshita ulenwa amenshi." 
Ezekiel12:19 Webe na bantu bonse mu calo ukuti Imfumu Yawe alesosa aya mashiwi ku bena Yerusalemu, na ku bacili baleikala mu calo ca Israeli. Bebe auti, ‘Mukalasokona pa nshita mukalalya, kabili mukalakanka ku mwenso pa nshita mukalanwa amenshi. Mu calo cenu tamwakashale akantu nangu kamo pa mulandu wa buluku bwa imwe bonse abaikalamo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Imisumba umwaisula abantu paa ikonaulwa, ne calo cikasanguka amatololo. Elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel12:22 “We mwana wa muntu, bushe cinshi ico aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli balandila libili libili ili ipinda palwa calo cabo ilyakutila, ‘Inshita ilepwafye, nokuti fimoneke ifyasobelwa, nakalya.’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Kanshi nomba iwe ubebe auti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe aiti, “Ili ipinda talyakatale alilandwa nakabili mu bena Israeli.”’ Ubebe auti, ‘Inshita naifikila, ne fyasobelwa fyonse balaswa bafishininkishe.’" 
Ezekiel12:24 “Kuba ŋanda yakwa Israeli takwakaleba nakabili ifimonwa fyabufi, nangufye ifyakusesema ififwile ukufulunganya abantu," 
Ezekiel12:25 pantu ine ne Mfumu Yawe nine wine nkalalanda nabo, nefyo nkalabeba fikalacitika. Tacakapose na nshita iyoo. Imwe mwe basangu ba bantu, pa nshita ino ine imwe mucilipo, ine nkacita ifyo napanga ukucita. Nine ne mfumu Yawe nalanda.”" 
Ezekiel12:26 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel12:27 “We mwana wa muntu, aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli balelanda abati, ‘Ifimonwa fyonse na mashiwi ayo iwe usesema, ni palwa fintu ifikabako kuntanshi.’" 
Ezekiel12:28 Kanshi iwe ubebe ukuti ine ne Yawe ndetila nati, ‘Tapali amashiwi yandi ayali nokukokola, pantu fyonse fikacitika. Nine ne Mfumu Yawe nalanda.’”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel13:2 “We mwana wa muntu, kasoke bakasesema ba bena Israeli. Kebe abo bantu abasesema ifyakuituntumbafye, utile, ‘Umfweni imwe ifyo Yawe alesosa!’" 
Ezekiel13:3 “Ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe alesosa. Mwashama, mwe fipumbu fya bakasesema imwe. Mwe bakasesema abakonkelela imipashi iyenu, nangu tamumwene nelyo cimo." 
Ezekiel13:4 Mwe bena Israeli, ala bakasesema benu baba nga bamumbwe abekala mu fibolya." 
Ezekiel13:5 Tabalinda incende apo ilinga lyabo lyabongoloka, nangufye ukukuulililapo nakalya, pakutila ilinga likeminine ilyakosa ilyakwafwilisha aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli pa bushiku bwa bulwi bwakwa Yawe." 
Ezekiel13:6 Ifimonwa fyabo te fyacine, nefyo basobela nafyo fine fyabufifye fyeka fyeka. Balasosa abati, ‘Yawe alesosa ukuti,’ ilyo Yawe ninshi teubatumine. Kabili balalolela pakuti amashiwi yafikilishiwe." 
Ezekiel13:7 Ine ndebeba nati, ‘Imwe ifyo fimonwa mumona, ala fyabufifye, kabili nefyo musobela, nafyo fine fyabufifye fyeka fyeka. Ilyo musosa ati, “Yawe eusosele,” libe ninshi teine nsosele.’" 
Ezekiel13:8 “Kanshi ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe alelanda ati, ‘Pa mulandu wakuti imwe musosafye ifyabufi, no kumona ifimonwa ifyabufi, na ine nomba namwalukila,’ efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel13:9 Nalaswa nkande bakasesema, abo abamona ifimonwa ifyabufi, abasobela ne fyakubepaika abantu. Bena tabakasangwe mu cilye ca bantu bandi, na mashina yabo tayakalembwe pamo na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. Aba bakasesema tabakatale abengila mu calo ca Israeli, elyo mukashininkisha ukuti nine Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Pantu aba bakasesema babepaikafye abantu ilyo babeba ukuti icibote ilyo kanshi takuli icibote. Ilyo abantu bakuula ilinga ne loba lya cisengafwafwa, moneni bakasesema bashingwilako iloba lya mpemba." 
Ezekiel13:11 Eba abashingwilako iloba lya mpemba ukuti ilinga ilyo, ala likabongoloka. Nkamuletela imfula iyine yine. Amabwe ya mfula yakalaponenapo, ne cimwela ica cikuku cikapupapo." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ilyo ilinga likawa elyo abantu bonse bakalaipusha abati, ‘Nge loba lya mpemba ilyo mwashingwilileko, lili kwi?’" 
Ezekiel13:13 “Kanshi ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndesosa nati, ‘Mu cipyu candi, ine nkatuma icimwela ica cikuku, na mu bukali bwandi nkatuma imfula iyine yine iya mabwe pakwisa onaula ilinga." 
Ezekiel13:14 Nkabongolola ilinga ilyo bashingwililako iloba lya mpemba, nkalibongolola ukufikafye na panshi, no kusha imifula yaliko pa mbilibili. Likamubongolokela imwe, no kumwipaya likamwipaya. Lyena elyo bonse bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi nine Yawe.’" 
Ezekiel13:15 “Ilinga likamona apapela icipyu candi, kumo kwine na bashingwililako iloba lya mpemba. Elyo na ine nkamweba nati, ‘Tepapo, ilinga talilipo, na bashingwilileko iloba lya mpemba nabo bene nabaloba.’" 
Ezekiel13:16 Ebalya bene bakasesema ba bena Israeli, abalesesemena Yerusalemu ukuti natumona icibote ilyo kanshi taciliko, efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel13:17 “Nomba we mwana wa muntu, sosa ku bana banakashi aba bantu bobe abasesema ifyakuituntumbafye, kabasoke pafyo balecita." 
Ezekiel13:18 Kabebe ukuti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. Mwashama, mwe banakashi ba bantu mwe. Imwe nimwe mupanga imikano iyakuti mulefwala ku maboko, kabili nimwe mubila ifitambala umwaba ifishimba, ifyakuti mulefwala ku mitwe, pakuti mumone umwakwikatilila imyeo ya bantu. Imwe mufwayafye ukulaikata imyeo ya bantu bandi, pakuti mwe bene munonkelemo fimo." 
Ezekiel13:19 Imwe mulansebanya ku bantu bandi kulwa kufwayafye ukulamwenamo tubale tumo tumo, ne fimokolwa fya mikate fimo fimo. Imwe mulafwaya ukwipaya abantu abashilingile kufwa, mulapususha na bantu abashalinga kwikala pano calo. Imwe, awe mubepaikafye abantu bandi, nabo tepakutemwa ukulaumfwa ifyabufi.’" 
Ezekiel13:20 “Kanshi ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndesosa nati, ‘Ine tepakupata imikano iyo mwikatilako imyeo ya bantu nge fyuni. Ine nkaiputaula ku maboko yenu, no kuleka abantu abo mwaikata imyeo yabo nge fyuni." 
Ezekiel13:21 Ine nkalepaula ifitambala ku mitwe yenu, no kuleka abantu bandi bakapusunsukeko kuli imwe, kabili bekatala ababa mu minwe yenu nge nama shilya balunga. Ee, elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’" 
Ezekiel13:22 “Pantu imwe ku bufi bwenu mulafupula abantu abalungami, abo nshaletela ubulanda. Mulaluminisha na bantu ababifi pakuti beleka myendele yabo iyabipa, epakuti bekapusuka." 
Ezekiel13:23 Kanshi ifimonwa fyenu ifyabufi, awe nomba fyapwa, nefyo musobela ifyakubepa abantu nafyo fine nomba fyapwa. Ine nalapususha abantu bandi kuli imwe, elyo mwalashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Abakalamba bamo bamo aba bena Israeli baliishile kuli ine, baisa ikala pa ntanshi yandi." 
Ezekiel14:2 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli ine aliti 
Ezekiel14:3 “We mwana wa muntu, aba baume balibika utulubi mu mitima yabo, kabili balibika ifyakupunwisha ifibi ku ntanshi yabo. Bushe bena baletontonkanya ukuti ine kuti nabasuka pafyo balenjipusha, mwa?" 
Ezekiel14:4 “Kanshi iwe ubebeko ifyo ine ne Mfumu Yawe nalasosa, ulande auti, ‘Umwina Israeli onsefye uuletunkwa ukulapepa utulubi no kubika ifyakupunwisha ifibi kuntanshi yakwe, uyo muntu nga aya kuli kasesema umo kukwipushako fimo, awe ninshi nine wine ne Yawe nkamwasuka ukulingana no bwingi bwa tulubi twakwe." 
Ezekiel14:5 Nkacita ici pakuti nkanashe imitima ya bena Israeli abansangukila pa mulandu wa tulubi twabo tonse.’ 
Ezekiel14:6 “Kanshi nomba eba aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli ifyo nalanda ukuti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, lapileni, suuleni no kukaana uto tulubi twenu utushaibipila.’" 
Ezekiel14:7 Pantu umwina Israeli umo, nangufye umwinafyalo umo uwikala mu Israeli, nga aipatula kuli ine nangu ansangukila, alakumbwa ukulapepa utulubi mu mutima wakwe, abika ne cakuipununako pa cinso cakwe elyo aya kuli kasesema umo kukwipushako fimo, ena nine wine ne Yawe nkamwasuka." 
Ezekiel14:8 Uyo muntu ine nkamwalukila, nkamucita icilangililo icakuti bambi bakamweneko kabili bakabasuula. Nkamufumya na mu bantu bandi. Elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Elyo uyo muntu nga asembelekapo kasesema umo pakuti amusesemene ifyabufi ninshi nine ne Yawe nasembeleka uyo kasesema. Uyo kasesema nkamwipaya no kumufumya pa bantu bandi abena Israeli. 
Ezekiel14:10 Kasesema wine pamo pene no muntu uwile kukumwipusha, bonse babili ine nkabalimwina capamo pantu bonse ba mulandu." 
Ezekiel14:11 No mulandu nkalacitila ifyo, ni pakuti aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bakaleke ukulansangukila, bakaleke no kulaikowesha nakabili ku fyabubifi fyabo. Lyena bakalaba abantu abandifye, na ine wine nkalaba Lesa wabo. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe nalanda.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti 
Ezekiel14:13 “We mwana wa muntu, icalo cimo nga cacita ifyabubifi pakukanaba ne cishinka, ninshi nkafungulula ukuboko kwandi pali cena no konaula ifilyo fyaciko. Nkaletamo icipowe icikepaya abantu kumo kwine ne fitekwa." 
Ezekiel14:14 Nangufye balya bantu batatu, Noa na Daniele na Yobo bengekala muli ico calo, bukaele bwabo kuti bwapusushafye abene beka, epela. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel14:14 Nangufye balya bantu batatu, Noa na Daniele na Yobo bengekala muli ico calo, bukaele bwabo kuti bwapusushafye abene beka, epela. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Nangufye nga cakuti natuma ifiswango ifyakwipayamo abantu, ne calo casanswa no kusanguka amatololo kabili na bantu balafilwa no kupitamo pa mulandu wafiswango," 
Ezekiel14:16 nangufye balya bantu batatu bengabamo, napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, ala kuti bafilwa ukupusushako nangufye abana babo abo baifyalila abaume nangu abanakashi. Abenefye kuti ebaipususha beka, epela, neco calo kuti cashalafye amatololo." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Nangufye nga cakuti mwaima inkondo muli ico calo elyo nati lekeni ulupanga lwipayemo abantu ne fitekwa fyabo. 
Ezekiel14:18 Kabili nangu balya bantu batatu bengaba muli ici calo, napali ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, teti babe na maka yakupusushapo abana babo nangu bamo, lelo abene beka kuti bapusuka." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Nga natuma icikuko muli ico calo, kabili mu kufulwa kwandi nasumya umulopa no kwipaya abantu abengi ne nama pamo." 
Ezekiel14:20 Nangufye Noa na Daniele na Yobo bengekalamo, napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, ala kuti bafilwa ukupususha nangu abana babo abo baifyalila. Ukuwamyafye kwabo abene, kuti ekwabapususha abene beka, epela." 
Ezekiel14:20 Nangufye Noa na Daniele na Yobo bengekalamo, napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, ala kuti bafilwa ukupususha nangu abana babo abo baifyalila. Ukuwamyafye kwabo abene, kuti ekwabapususha abene beka, epela." 
Ezekiel14:21 “Pantu ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ine nkaletela Yerusalemu ifinkunka fine ifyabipisha, ni nkondo, ne cipowe, ne fiswango, ne cikuko, efikesa ipaulula abantu kumo kwine ne fitekwa fyabo." 
Ezekiel14:22 Lelo kukaba bamo abakapusukako, abana abaume na bana banakashi abakafumishiwamo mu musumba. Aba bakesa uko muli, elyo ilyo mukamona imibeele yabo ne micitile yabo, lyena mukashininkisha ukuti ifinkunka fyonse ifyo ndetele Yerusalemu, kanshi nafilolamo." 
Ezekiel14:23 Mukatalalikwa imitima ilyo mukamona imibeele yabo ne micitile yabo elintu mukeshiba bwino ukuti kanshi umulandu epo waba uwalenga ukuti ncite Yerusalemu ifyo. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.” 
Ezekiel15:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel15:2 “We mwana wa muntu, bushe finshi ifyo umwangashi wacilako umuti umbi onse uwa mu mpanga? Finshi ifyo umusambo wa mwangashi wacilako imiti ya mu mpanga?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Bushe ku cimuti ca mwangashi kuti umuntu apangako icintu cimo? Bushe kuti umuntu apangako ulupanda ulwa kukobekako ifintu fimo? 
Ezekiel15:4 Icimuti ca mwangashi ala cawaminafye ukukosha umulilo. Impela shaciko shibili nga shapya, ninshi pakati cashalafye icishiki. Bushe kuti cabombapo umulimo na umbi?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ilyo icimuti cishilapya, cibafye icabula umulimo. Pali bufi nga capya no kushala icishiki, ninshi lyena cacilako ukuba icabula umulimo." 
Ezekiel15:6 “Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nga filya napeela icimuti ca umwangashi pa fimuti fya mu mpanga kukukosesha umulilo, na ine wine efyo nkacita abena Yerusalemu pakubalimuna." 
Ezekiel15:7 Nkabafumyako amano, nangu bena bakapusuka ku mulilo, lelo nabo bene ni ku mulilo wine bakapya. Ilyo ine nkabafumyako amano, lyena elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel15:8 Apo bena tababa na cishinka, kanshi na ine wine nkasangula icalo cabo ukuba amatololo.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel16:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel16:2 “We mwana wa muntu, sokako Yerusalemu pa mulandu wa fintu ifyabunani ifyo acita." 
Ezekiel16:3 Eba Yerusalemu ukuti Imfumu Yawe alekweba ukuti iwe wafyelwe umwana mwanakashi mu calo ca Kenani. Wiso ali mwina Amoli, na noko nao ali mwina Hiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Ilyo wafyelwe, tabakuputwile umutoto, tabakusambile pakukuwamya, tabakushingile umucele, nangu ukukupomba mu nsalu nakalya." 
Ezekiel16:5 Takwali wakuti akulangulukileko nangu ukukukwatila uluse lwakuti akucitilepo cimo pali ifyo fintu. Ilyo wafyelwe, abantu balikupatile icakuti basukile bakuposa mu mpanga, no kukusha insansalila." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Nomba ilyo ine napitilepo apo wali, namwene ulealanganafye mu mulopa. Nangu iwe walifye umulopa weka weka, awe ine nalikwebele nati, ‘Ba no bumi.’ Nangu iwe walifye umulopa weka weka, awe ine nalikwebele nati, ‘Ba no bumi.’" 
Ezekiel16:7 Kanshi na ine epakulakukusha ngo muti uulekula no kulelema mwibala. Walikulile no kuba umukalamba uwayemba nganshi. Na mabele yobe yasuka yatuntumana, no mushishi obe wasuka walepa, lelo iwe walifye ubwamba ukwabula ifyakufwala." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Limbi ilyo napitilepo nakabili, namwene ukuti inshita nomba naifika iyacitemwiko. Eico na ine epakukufimba icisempe ca nsalu yandi pakuti wiba ubwamba, kabili napanga umulapo no kwingila mu cipangano na iwe, nobe epakuba nomba uwandifye. Nine ne Mfumu Yawe ndelanda." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Nabuula na menshi, nakusamba umulopa, nakusuba na mafuta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Nakufwika ne fyakufwala ifyapikulwa, ne ndyato isha mpapa iyisuma nganshi, ne nsalu ishabusaka ishatelela kabili ne mingila iyaluma umutengo." 
Ezekiel16:11 Nakufwika ne ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya. Nabika amakosa ku maboko yobe no bulungu mu mukoshi obe. 
Ezekiel16:12 Nakupeela ne cakukobeka ku myona yobe, na masikiyo ku matwi yobe, ne ngala iyayemba iya ku mutwe obe." 
Ezekiel16:13 Awe iwe wafwikilwe ifisamo fya golide na silifa, no kulafwala insalu ishatelela kabili ishabusaka. Walalya no mukate uwa bunga ubwapeleka, no buci, na mafuta ya miolifa, wasuka waba imbeka iyine yine, no kusanguka namfumu." 
Ezekiel16:14 Ululumbi lwa kuyemba kobe lwasuka lwafika na ku mishobo ya benafyalo. Ukuyemba kobe kwali ukwafikapo, pantu nine nakuyemfeshe ifyo. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Nomba iwe wacetekelefye mu kuyemba kobe, no kulumbuka kobe kwakutwala ku bulalelale. Wacitile ubulalelale no muntufye onse uulepita." 
Ezekiel16:16 Walabuulapo insalu shobe shimo, no kulashisamika pa ncende ishakupepelapo, palya iwe walecitila bucilende ubushatala abubako, kabili tabwakatale abubako." 
Ezekiel16:17 Walibuula ifisamo ifyakuiyemfya ifya golide na silifa, ifyo ine nakupeela pakuti uleisamika nafyo, iwe efyo wapangamo ifimpashanya ifya baume, pakuti efyo ulecita nafyo ubucende bobe." 
Ezekiel16:18 Kabili walibuula insalu shobe ishapikulwa ubusaka isho ine nakupeela, nobe esho wafimba ifyo fimpashanya, kabili ulafituula na mafuta aya miolifa no bubani, ifyo ine nakupeela." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ine nalikupeela ifyakulya, no bunga ubwapeleka, na mafuta aya miolifa no buci, nomba iwe kabili efyo utuula utulubi pakututemuna. Ifi efyacitike, efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Kabili walibuula bamwano abaume na banakashi abo wamfyalila, iwe ebo watuula ilambo ku tulubi. Cinshi mba ushapelelafye pali bucilende bobe," 
Ezekiel16:21 ukwabula ukumbuulila abana no kubatuula nge lambo lyakoca ku tulubi? 
Ezekiel16:22 Pali iyi nshita yonse iyo waikalila bucilende, awe tawatala awibukisha ifyo wali ku bwaice ilyo wali ubwamba ukwabula ifyakufwala kabili walealanganafye mu mulopa.”" 
Ezekiel16:23 “Washama, iwe washama, efyo asosa Imfumu Yawe, pantu ukulunda pa fibi fyonse ifyo ucita," 
Ezekiel16:24 iwe walikuula incende ishasansama muli cila lubansa lwa musumba apakupepela utulubi no kulacitilapo ubucende. 
Ezekiel16:25 Mu mbali ya misebo yonse walikuula incende ishasansama umo ukowesha ubusuma bobe, pantu umubili obe ulautwala lyonse ku muntu onse uwaisa kuli iwe, bwasuka na bucilende bobe bwalacililako." 
Ezekiel16:26 Abena mupalamano banobe abena Egupto, ingulungani shakantu, iwe ebo usendama nabo, ala bucilende bobe nabucilamo, nabulenga nokuti ine mfulwe." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Eico naimishe ukuboko kwandi pakuti nkukande, nacefyako ne fyakulya nakupimine. Nakuposele ku banakashi ba bena Filisiti abakupata abo waselawishe ku mukoshi palwa myendele yobe iyishaibipila."
