Ezekiel16:28 Wasukile waba cilende na bena Asiria ukwabula ukutendwa, nomba nalyo line umutima obe tawaikele iyoo." 
Ezekiel16:29 Kabili wafusha bucilende bobe na bena Kaludea, ulya mushobo wa bashimakwebo, nalyo line umutima obe tawaikele iyoo." 
Ezekiel16:30 “We wamano ayanakuka, efyasosa Imfumu Yawe, ifyo fyonse ifyo ucita iwe eficita cilende uwakamuka." 
Ezekiel16:31 Mu misebo yonse iwe wakuulilemo incende apakupepela utulubi no kulacitilapo bucilende mu ncende apasansama mu lubansa lonse lwa mu musumba. Kwena walipapusha pantu te ndalama ufwaya muli bucilende nga filya bacilende abaseeka bacita. 
Ezekiel16:32 Iwe wabafye ngo mwanakashi uwasuula wiba, no kulacita ubucende na baume bambi." 
Ezekiel16:33 Cilende onse alalipililwapo pali bucilende bwakwe. Nomba iwe caliibela, pantu iwe niwe upeela abaume bonse abakutemwa ifyabupe, kabili niwe ubatemuna pakuti balefuma mpanga yonse kukwisa mukulasendama nobe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Kwena iwe waliibela kuli bacilende bambi, pantu takwaba mwaume uukusembeleka, kabinge iwe taulipililwapo kantu nakalya, nomba kabili iwe niwe ulebalipila." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Kanshi iwe cilende umfwa ishiwi lyakwa Yawe. 
Ezekiel16:36 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe, pa mulandu wakuti walipongolwele ulunkumbwa lobe, wafuula ne nsalu shobe pakusendama na batemwikwa bobe, no kulaipaya bamwano pakubatuula ilambo ilyakupakisha utulubi," 
Ezekiel16:37 kanshi na ine nomba nkalonganya na bonse abatemwikwa bobe abo watemwa nabo wapata. Nkabaleta bakese kushinguluka, elyo na ine nkakufuula ifyakufwala fyobe, ukashale ubwamba, uleke bakakutambe." 
Ezekiel16:38 Nkakukanda ifikandwa abanakashi bacilende na basumya umulopa. Nkaleta pali iwe ubukali bwa mulopa ne cilandushi ca bukali bwandi ne ca bufuba bwandi. 
Ezekiel16:39 Nkakulubwila mu minwe ya bacibusa obe, nabo bakapasa ifibumbili fyobe, bakonaula ne ncende shobe ishakupepelamo utulubi. Nabo bakakufuula ne fyakufwala fyobe, no kukupoka ne fyakuyemfya fyobe ifyamutengo, no kukusha ubwamba ukwabula ifyakufwala." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Bakakwimisha ibumba lya bantu pakuti bakakupole amabwe, no kukuputaula fipimfya fipimfya ku mpanga shabo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Bakoca amayanda yobe, no kuleka amabumba ya banakashi yatambeko ifyo ulekandwa. Nkakupwisha bucilende bobe, tawakatale nakabili aupeela abatemwikwa bobe ifyabupe." 
Ezekiel16:42 Ninshi ine nomba catalala, no mutima wandi waikala tondolo. Nshakatale mfulwa nakabili, nangu ukukwata ubufuba iyoo." 
Ezekiel16:43 Iwe walilaba ifyo ine nalekutentemba ilyo wali akaice, nomba iwe unsonsombafye pakulacita ifintu ifyo fyonse. Eico na ine wine nkakuleka ukuti ukafute pali ifyo fyonse. Pa fintu fyonse ifyabunani ifyo ucita, nga mulandu nshi kabili walundilapo ne myendele yabulalelale? Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel16:44 “Iwe Yerusalemu, ala abantu bakulakweba ili pinda abati, ‘Ifiba nyina, efiba no mwana umwanakashi.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Cine cine iwe we mukashana walipala noko. Noko alipata wiso, apatila kumo kwine na bamunonko. Iwe uli nkashi kwa nkashi shinobe ishapata bawiba na bana babo bene. Iwe pamo ne nkashi shinobe, mwalikwete nyinenwe uwali umwina Hiti, shinwe nao ali umwina Amoli." 
Ezekiel16:46 “Umukalamba obe nkashi mbiyo ni Samaria, ena pamo na bana bakwe baba lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Umwaice obe nkashi mbiyo ni Sodoma, ena pamo na bana bakwe aikalila lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Ezekiel16:47 Iwe tawapelelafye pakulabakonkelela na pakulapashanya imisango yabo iyabipisha, lelo mu micitile yobe yonse waliisa bipishapo ukubacila." 
Ezekiel16:48 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ifyakuti, icine cine napalifye ine ne Mumi, nkashi mbiyo Sodoma kumo kwine na bana bakwe, awe tatalile abifya ngefi iwe ulebifya kumo kwine na bana bobe." 
Ezekiel16:49 Kanshi ubu ebwali ububifi bwakwa nkashi nobe Sodoma. Ena na bamwane abanakashi baleitakisha pantu balikwatishe ifyakulya, no kulaikala ubwanalale, lelo kwena tabalesakamana kusunga abalanda na babusu." 
Ezekiel16:50 Bali ne cilumba, bali abatalama, kabili balecita ne fintu ifyo ine napata, ecalengele kanshi ukuti na ine mbalofye, no kwishiba nobe wine walishiba." 
Ezekiel16:51 “Ifibi ifyo Samaria alecita fyalicepapo pa fyabubifi ifyo iwe ucita. Iwe walimucila ukucita ifintu ifyabunani, ecalenga nokuti bankashi mbiyo bamonekepo abakaele." 
Ezekiel16:52 Kanshi nomba iwe uli nokumfwa insoni. Pantu ifyabubifi fyobe fyalibipishapo pa fyabubifi fya bankashi mbiyo, icakuti bena bamonekapo abakaele. Kanshi nomba iwe insoni kashikwikate, kausebane, pantu niwe walenga ukuti bankashi mbiyo bamonekepo abololoke.”" 
Ezekiel16:53 Kabili Yawe aebele Yerusalemu ati, “Ine nkabweseshamo Sodoma ubunonshi pamo na bana bakwe abakashana. Nkabweseshamo na Samaria ubunonshi na ena akashuke nakabili pamo na bana bakwe abakashana. Nobe wine Yerusalemu nkalenga ukuti ukashuke nakabili pamo nabo." 
Ezekiel16:54 Ukalaumfwa insoni, kabili ukasebana pakuti nkashi mbiyo shikeshibe ifyo shakucila imisango isuma." 
Ezekiel16:55 Nkashi mbiyo, Sodoma na bana bakwe abakashana pamo na Samaria na bana bakwe abakashana, bakashuka nakabili, kwena nobe wine ukashuka nakabili pamo pene na bana bobe abakashana." 
Ezekiel16:56 Bushe iwe tewe waleseka Sodoma lilya walecita amataki," 
Ezekiel16:57 ilyo ububi bobe bulya ucita bwali tabulasokoloka? Eico nomba balekuseka abana banakashi bakwa Edomu, ku bena mupalamano bonse elyo na ku bana banakashi ba bena Filisiti. Balikusuula na kuli bonse abakushinguluka." 
Ezekiel16:58 Niwe wailetelela we mwine pa mulandu wa fintu ifishaibipila kabili ifyabunani ifyo iwe ucita. Efyasosa Yawe.” 
Ezekiel16:59 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Iwe we Yerusalemu, ine nkakulimuna ukulingana pa fintu ifyo ucita, pantu iwe walisuula ifilayo ifyo walaya kabili walyonaula ne cipangano candi." 
Ezekiel16:60 Nomba kwena ine nkebukisha icipangano ico napangene nobe ilyo wali umwaice, kabili nkapangana nobe icipangano icikabelelela pe." 
Ezekiel16:61 Ukebukisha imyendele yobe no kumfwa insoni, ilyo ukapokelela umukalamba obe nkashi mbiyo pamo pene no mwaice obe nkashi mbiyo. Nkabapeela kuli iwe nga bamwano, lelo te mu cipangano nga cilya twapangana nobe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Nkapangana na iwe icipangano icipya, elyo na iwe ukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel16:63 Ilyo tukawikishanya pamo pa mulandu wa fibi fyonse ifyo iwe ucita, elyo na iwe ukalafibukisha no kwikatwa insoni ishakukanafilandapo pantu walisebana. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel17:2 “We mwana wa muntu pika ubwile no kumina aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli umulumbe," 
Ezekiel17:3 Ubebe auti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. Patile akantu, kale kwaliko kapumpe umo umukulu, uwa mapindo ayakulu. Ali na masako ayasuma kabili ayabalala. Uyo kapumpe aile ku calo ca ku Lebanoni, aya ikata akamusambo ka cimuti ca keda," 
Ezekiel17:4 atimpulapo aka pa kantongolilo atwala na ku calo ca bashimakwebo, no kuya limba mu musumba umo uwa basulwishi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Kabili asenda imbuto shimo isha mu calo mulya, aya shibyala pamo apafunda, ngo mufinsa pa mbali ya menshi ayengi." 
Ezekiel17:6 Awe imbuto shamena, shalakula, no kuba umwangashi uwipi, uwaandala. Imisambo yauko yena yalalola mu mulu kuli kapumpe, ne mishila yauko panshi yalalepa. Kanshi umwangashi nao epakulacita amampanda, ne misambo yauko nayo yalafulilako no kufumba." 
Ezekiel17:7 “‘Kwaliko na kapumpe na umbi, nao umukulu nganshi, na mapindo ayakulu na masako ayengi. Kanshi uyo mwangashi nao epakulalosha imishila yauko kuli uyo kapumpe, kabili eko walosha ne misambo yauko pakuti utapililwe." 
Ezekiel17:8 Uyo mwangashi walimbilwe apafunda, apashalekama menshi, epakuti ulekwata imisambo, uletwala ifitwalo, no kuba umwangashi uwine wine.’" 
Ezekiel17:9 “Ubebe auti ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Bushe uyu mwangashi ukatwalilila ukulaba palya pene apo walimbwa? Bushe tawakashulwe, no kukuntako ifitwalo, no kukontaulako imisambo, pakuleka amabula ayateku yakome? Kabili tacakafwaikwe umuntu uwamaka, nangu abantu abengi pakuunukula." 
Ezekiel17:10 Nangu umwangashi walimbwa, bushe ukatwalilila ukulakula nga baulimbula? Bushe tawakome ilyo umwela wa ku kabanga ukesa pupapo? Bushe tawakomine palya pene apo walekulila?’”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Ipusha abo basangu nga cakuti nabeluka umo ifi fintu filolele. Ubebe ukuti imfumu ya ku Babiloni yaishile ku Yerusalemu, yaisa senda imfumu ya mu Yerusalemu pamo na bacilolo baiko, yabatwala na ku musumba waiko ku Babiloni." 
Ezekiel17:13 Yabuulapo no muntu umo uwa mu lupwa lwa mfumu, eo yapangana nankwe icipangano, yalapa nokuti tayakaconaule. Ilyo ninshi imfumu ya ku Babiloni yalisenda ne ntungulushi isha mu calo," 
Ezekiel17:14 epakuti ubufumu bwabo bucepelwe amaka, bukafilwe no kwimina imfumu ya Babiloni, elyo ne cipangano cilesungwa bwino nga bekale mu cibote." 
Ezekiel17:15 Lelo imfumu ya ku Yerusalemu yatuma inkombe ku Egupto pakuti baye lombako bakabalwe ne fita ifingi. Bushe umuntu wa uyu musango kuti ashuka? Bushe nga acita ifyo teti bamucitepo cimo? Bushe kuti aonaula icipangano ukwabula ukuti bamulimwinepo? 
Ezekiel17:16 “Napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, iyo mfumu ikafwila ku Babiloni, pantu yasuula umulapo, kabili yaonaula ne cipangano ico yapangene ne mfumu ya ku Babiloni, iyamutekele pa cipuna cabufumu." 
Ezekiel17:17 Nangu Farao akwate ifita ifyamaka shani, awe nao wine kuti afilwa ukutuulako imfumu ilyo inkondo yabuka, nangu abena Yuda bengatuntumanika ifibumbili, no kwimba icilindi icashika pakubatebelela icakuti pafwila na bantu abengi." 
Ezekiel17:18 Pantu iyo mfumu yasuula umulapo, kabili yaonaula ne cipangano. Ala teti ipusuke pa mulandu wakucita ifi fintu." 
Ezekiel17:19 “Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, mu cine cine napalifye ine ne Mumi, iyo mfumu ine nkailimuna pa mulandu wakonaula icipangano, ico yalaile no mulapo ukuti ikalacisunga." 
Ezekiel17:20 Iyo mfumu ine nkaiteya isumbu, no kwikatwa ikekatwamo. Nkaisenda no kuitwala ku Babiloni, no kuilimuna eko nkailimwina pa mulandu wakuntalamina." 
Ezekiel17:21 Ifita fyaiko fyonse ifyacenjelesha fikafwa ku nkondo, ne fikapusukako nkafisalanganishisha monse monse. Elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi nine ne Yawe ndemweba.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe aleti, “Ine nkatimpula akamusambo pa kantongolilo ka cimuti ca keda, nkabuulako ne nsongo iyiteku iya pa mpela, nkaye limba pa lupili lumo ulutali." 
Ezekiel17:23 Pa lupili lumo ulwalepesha nganshi mu Israeli epo nkaya limba, ikalemuke, ikalekula. Ikalekwata imisambo no kulatwala ifitwalo, ikaba icimuti icine cine icalepeshapo. Ifyuni fya misango yonse eko fikalaikala, no kulauba mu misambo yaiko." 
Ezekiel17:24 Elyo imiti yonse iya mu mpanga, ikashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe, nokuti nine mputulako imiti iyitali, no kuleka imiti iyipi eyo ilepeshe, nokuti nine nenga imiti ibishi ileuma, no kulenga imiti iyauma ilelemba. Nine ne Yawe nalanda, no kucita efyo ine nkacita.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Bushe lyalola mwi ili pinda ilyo abantu basosa mu calo ca Israeli? Basosa abati, “‘Bashifwe ebalile ifipompo fya myangashi, nomba fwe bana kufyalwa nifwe ameno yawa ingwishi.’”" 
Ezekiel18:3 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Mu cine cine napalifye ine ne Mumi ndetila, ili pinda tamwakalibwekeshepo ukulalilanda nakabili mu Israeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Pantu umweo wa fintu fyonse mweo wandi, umweo wa mufyashi nangufye uwakwa mwane, yonsefye yandi. Umuntu uubifya, ala eukafwa." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Nga cakuti kuliko umuntu uwakaele, uucita ifyalungama kabili umufumacumi," 
Ezekiel18:6 uushipepako utulubi twa ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli pa mpili elyo talyako na malambo ayo balekela imfuba sha mu mpili. Takowesha bamukabene, tasendama na mwanakashi uuli kumpepo." 
Ezekiel18:7 Tacenjelela muntu, nangufye ukumwibila icintu iyoo. Alabwesesha uwa nkongole icikatila mulandu, alapeelako abali ne nsala icakulya, no kufwikako abali ubwamba." 
Ezekiel18:8 Tapokelapo nsonsela pa ndalama isho akongwesha. Alakaana ukucita ifyabipa, alapingwila na bantu bwino bwino ilyo kuba ifikansa." 
Ezekiel18:9 Alanakila ifipope fyandi, no kukonka bwino bwino amafunde yandi. Umuntu wa uyu musango, e muntu wine umololoke, kabili eukekala umumi. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Pambi kuti muntu uyu alikwatapo mwane umwaume uwamisoka, uwipaya na bantu, uucita ifintu ifyo wishi ashatala acitapo." 
Ezekiel18:11 Pambi mwane kuti ena alalyako amalambo ayo balekela mu ncende isho bapepelamo mu mpili, alakowesha na bamukabene." 
Ezekiel18:12 Alatitikisha abalanda, aleba no kwiba, alakaana ukubwesesha uwa nkongole icikatila mulandu, alapepa utulubi no kucita ifyabunani." 
Ezekiel18:13 Alapokelapo insonsela pa ndalama isho alekongwesha. Bushe umuntu wa uyu musango kuti aikala umumi? Awe iyoo, tekuti ekale umumi. Kuti afwa pa mulandu wakucita ifi fintu fyonse ifishaibipila. Kabili mwine winefye ewingailetelela imfwa, no mulopa wakwe ukaba pa mutwe wakwe." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Nomba uyu muntu nao nga alikwata umwana umwaume, ena alakaana ukulakonkelela mukucita ifyabubifi ifyalecita wishi," 
Ezekiel18:15 kabili alakaana ukulapepako utulubi twa ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, alakaana no kulalyako amalambo ayo balekela mu ncende isho bapepelamo mu mpili, alakaana no kukowesha bamukabene," 
Ezekiel18:16 alakaana ukulacusha umuntu nangufye ukulaibila umo. Alabwesesha uwa nkongole icikatila mulandu, alapeelako abali ne nsala icakulya, no kwafwilishako abasapula." 
Ezekiel18:17 Alakaana ukulacita ifyabipa, alakaana ukulapokelapo insonsela pa ndalama isho alekongwesha, alanakila ifipope fyandi, no kulakonka amafunde yandi. Umwana wa uyu musango teti afwile pa bubi bwakwa wishi iyoo, ena mu cishinkafye akekala umumi." 
Ezekiel18:18 Wishi umwine eukafwila pa bubifi bwakwe, pantu eucenjelela bambi, eubebila, no kulacita ifyabipa ku bantu banankwe." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Lelo imwe mulepusha amuti, ‘Nga cinshi ico mwane ashingakandilwa palwa kubifya kwakwa wishi?’ Nico mwane alacita ifyalungama kabili ifisuma. Kabili ena alakonka bwino bwinofye ifipope fyandi fyonse, kanshi e mulandu wine ena akekalila umumi." 
Ezekiel18:20 Uukafwa, ala muntu uubifya. Umwana tali nakukandilwa pa kubifya kwakwa wishi iyoo, nangu wishi tali nakukandilwa pa kubifya kwakwa mwane. Umuntu mulungami akalambwilwapo pa kuwamya kwakwe, no muntu mubi nao akakandilwapo pa kubifya kwakwe umwine." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Nomba, umuntu mubi nga aleka ukubifya, alakonka na mafunde yandi yonse, alacita ifyalungama kabili ifisuma, umuntu wa uyu musango takafwe iyo, akalaikala umumi." 
Ezekiel18:22 Akabelelwa uluse pa fibi fyakwe fyonse, akalaikala umumi pa mulandu wa bulungami bwakwe, takafwe iyo." 
Ezekiel18:23 Ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndeipusha nati, ‘Bushe imwe mutila ine ne Lesa ndasansamuka pakumona umuntu mubi uko alefwa, atini?’ Ala teifyo, ine natemwishapo ukumona uko umuntu mubi alapila, no kwikala umumi." 
Ezekiel18:24 “Nomba umuntu mulungami nga aleka ukuwamya, atampafye ukulabifya, alacita ne fintu ifyabipisha ificitako abantu ababifi, bushe uyu muntu kuti alaikala umumi? Awe iyoo. Ne fisuma fyonse ifyo engacita, teti bebukishepo nelyo cimo. Pa mulandu wakukanaba uwacishinka kabili pa mulandu wa fyabubifi ifyo acita, lyena akafwa." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Nomba imwe mulasosa amuti, ‘Ifyacita Yawe awe tafyalungama.’ Umfweni kuno, imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. Kanshi imwe mutila umusango ine ncitilamo ifintu tawalungama batini? Bushe temisango yenu eishalungama?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Nga cakuti umololoke aleka ukuwamya alacita ifyabubifi, ala ninshi ni pa bubifi bwakwe epo akafwila pantu nacita ububifi." 
Ezekiel18:27 Umuntu mubi nga aleka ukubifya, alacita ifyalungama kabili ifisuma, ninshi uyu muntu napususha ubumi bwakwe." 
Ezekiel18:28 Pantu ninshi namona ububi bwa fintu ifyo alecita, kanshi nao epakufileka. Uyu muntu akekala umumi, takafwe iyoo." 
Ezekiel18:29 Lelo imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli muletila, ‘Ifyo Yawe acita, awe tafyalungama iyoo.’ Bushe kwena ifyo ine ncita tafyalungama batini? Ala misangofye yenu eishalungama." 
Ezekiel18:30 “Kanshi ecalenga mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli ndemwebelapo, ukuti ine ne Mfumu Yawe nkamupingula bonse umo umo ukulingana nefyo mucita. Eico lapileni no kutaluka ku fibi fyonse ifyo mucita, lyena ninshi ifyabubifi fyenu tafyakamuletelele." 
Ezekiel18:31 Lekeni ifibi fyonse ifyakale. Aluleni amano yenu ne mitima yenu. Ngeco mwalafwaila ukufwa cinshi, imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndemweba nati, nshisekela mu mfwa ya muntu nelyo umo. Kanshi imwe lekeni ukubifya. Lapileni mube abomi.”" 
Ezekiel19:1 Ale buula ulwimbo lwandoosha ulwakuloosha abana baume ba mfumu aba bena Israeli. 
Ezekiel19:2 Kabili utile, “Ni nkalamo nshi iyali noko pebumba lya nkalamo? Yalelala pamo ne bumba lya twana twa nkalamo, yalelela tumwane pebumba lya misepela ya nkalamo." 
Ezekiel19:3 Yakushishe umwana umo uyo uwaishile ba inkalamo iyamaka, asuka mwane alaikata na bantu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo nabo baumfwa, nabo bamwimbila ubucinga, no kumwikata emo bamwikatila. Bamulonga na muli cikasalanga, bamutwala na mu calo ca Egupto." 
Ezekiel19:5 “Pakumona ukuti ifyo nankalamo alefwaya fyafulungana, elyo abuulapo kamwane na kambi kamo, akakusha, kasuka nako kaba inkalamo ilume iyamaka." 
Ezekiel19:6 Cilya kafika pa ciimo icakuba inkalamo iyamaka, awe yalaendauka pamo ne nkalamo shibiye. Yasambilila no kutakanya ico ikete mukulunga, nayo yalaikata na bantu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Epakulawisha amalinga yabo, no kulaonaula imisumba yabo. Yalati nga yabuluma, abantu abekala mu calo balaitutuminafye ku mwenso." 
Ezekiel19:8 Elyo abantu ba mishobo ya mu fyalo fya mumbali, balongana kukulwisha iyo nkalamo. Baiteya amasumbu, no kuikata mu bucinga bwabo." 
Ezekiel19:9 Baikoba ku finkobwe fyabo baibika na muli kasalanga, baisenda, baitwala na ku mfumu ya Babiloni. Baiposa na mu cifungo, epakuti icibulumo caiko cikatala acumfwika nakabili pa mpili sha mu Israeli.”" 
Ezekiel19:10 “Noko ali ngo mwangashi mwibala lyobe, uwalimbwa mumbali ya menshi. Ali uwalelema, kabili aletwalisha ifitwalo nganshi, pa mulandu wakuti apo wali pali amenshi ayengi." 
Ezekiel19:11 Imisambo yauko yali iyakosa, iyalinga ukuba inkonto yabukateeka. Umwangashi walikulile no kulepesha ukucila ifimenwa fyonse, kabili walumbuka pa mulandu wakulepesha no kulelema." 
Ezekiel19:12 Nomba abantu bacifukushi bena baya ushula no kuuwisha panshi. Ifitwalo fyauko epakuma kulwa mwela wa ku kabanga. Imisambo yauko iyakosa nayo yakontaika mpaka yauma, yapya na ku mulilo." 
Ezekiel19:13 Nomba walimbwa mu matololo, umwauma ndi, kabili umwabula menshi." 
Ezekiel19:14 Elyo no mulilo wafuma ku musambo umo uukalamba no koca ifitwalo ne misambo imbifye. Awe tawakatale aukwatapo kabili umusambo uwakosa, tawakakwatepo nomba ne nkonto yabufumu nakabili.” Kanshi ulu e lwimbo lwandoosha ulufwile ukwimbwa nge cimbo ca malilo." 
Ezekiel20:1 Mu mwaka walenga cine lubali, pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi mu mweshi wabusano, elyo abakalamba bamo aba bena Israeli baishile pakuti bepusheko ifyo Yawe afwaya. Awe baikala na pa ntanshi yandi." 
Ezekiel20:2 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel20:3 “We mwana wa muntu, eba abakalamba ba bena Israeli auti, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Bushe imwe mwishile kukwipusha ifyo ine mfwaya, batini? Napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, ine nshamusuminishe ukwipushapo nangu cimo palwa ine.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Bushe iwe we mwana wa muntu, teti ubapingule? Bushe teti ubapingule? Ubebelepo ifintu ifyabunani ifyo bashibo bacitile." 
Ezekiel20:5 Kabili bebe auti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe aleti, pa bushiku ilyo nasalile Israeli, ine nalilaile bamwana Yakobo nalundapo no mulapo. Kabili mu Egupto ine naliisokolwele kuli bena, no kubeba nati, “Ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu.”" 
Ezekiel20:6 Ni pa bushiku bwine ubo elyo ine nabalaile, nalundapo no mulapo ukuti nkabafumya mu Egupto no kubatwala mu calo ico ine nabafwaile, icalo icikankala icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci, icacila pa fyalo fimbi fyonse ku busuma." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ine nalibebele ukuposa utulubi twabo utushaibipila uto batemwa, nalibebele no kukanaikowesha ku milungu yabufi iya mu Egupto, pantu ine nine Yawe wenu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Nomba kabili bena bantalamina, bakaana no kuŋumfwila. Bakaana ukuposa utulubi twabo utushaibipila, bakaana no kufumya amano yabo ku milungu yabufi iya mu Egupto. Na ine epakufwaya ukupongolwela icipyu candi pali bena no kufwaya ukubalimuna bukali bukali mulya mwine mu Egupto." 
Ezekiel20:9 Lelo nabweseshe ukuboko kwandi, pantu nga nalilengele ishina lyandi ukusebana pa cinso ca mishobo ya benafyalo iyo abena Israeli baleikala nayo, pantu ni pa cinso cabo epo ine naebele abena Israeli ukuti imwe nkamufumya muno mu calo ca Egupto." 
Ezekiel20:10 “‘Kanshi ecalengele na ine mbafumye mu Egupto no kubatwala mu matololo. 
Ezekiel20:11 Nabapeele ne fipope fyandi, no kulenga beshibe amafunde yandi, pakuti bonse abalekonka ifi fintu emo balemwena ubumi." 
Ezekiel20:12 Kabili nabapeele Amasabata ukuti yabe nge cishibilo ca cumfwano pakati kesu, icakubebukisha ukuti ine ne Yawe nine nabasangula ukuba abamushilo." 
Ezekiel20:13 Lelo abena Israeli balinsangukile na mu matololo mwine. Bapula amafunde yandi, basuula ne fipope fyandi, ifyo bali nokukonka pakumwenamo ubumi. Basuulile na Masabata yandi yene. Na ine epakufwaya ukupongolwela icipyu candi pali bena no kufwaya ukubalimuna bukali bukali mulya mwine mu matololo." 
Ezekiel20:14 Lelo nabweseshe ukuboko kwandi, pantu nga naliiletele ishina lyandi insoni ku bantu ba mishobo abalemonako uko ine nalefumya aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli mu Egupto." 
Ezekiel20:15 Kanshi na ine mu matololo mwine epakulapa ukuti ine nshakabatwale mu calo ico ine nabapeela, icalo icikankala icifumfumukamo umukaka no buci, icacila pa fyalo fimbi fyonse ku busuma." 
Ezekiel20:16 Pantu balisuulile ifipope fyandi, balipulile na mafunde yandi, no kusuulila kumo na Masabata yandi yene. Imitima yabo yatemwishishepo ukulapepa utulubi twabo." 
Ezekiel20:17 “‘Nomba nabalolesha luse luse, nakaana ukubalofya nangu ukubepaya mu matololo mwine." 
Ezekiel20:18 Mu matololo mwine naeba abana babo nati, “Imwe, ala mwilakonkelela fyebo ifyo bashinwe bapangile, mwilakonkelela misango yabo, kabili mwilaikowesha ku tulubi twabo." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu. Mulenakila amafunde yandi, no kulasunga ifipope fyandi." 
Ezekiel20:20 Mulecindika Amasabata yandi, epakuti yaleba icishibilo ca cumfwano cesu, epakuti kabili muleibukisha ukuti ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu.”" 
Ezekiel20:21 “‘Nomba abana babo kabili balinsangukila. Bapula na mu mafunde yandi, bakaana no kulasunga ifipope fyandi bwino bwino, ififwile ukulaletela ubumi bonse abalefikonka. Basuulila kumo na Masabata yandi yene. Na ine epakufwaya ukupongolwela icipyu candi pali bena, no kufwaya ukubalimuna bukali bukali mulya mwine mu matololo." 
Ezekiel20:22 Lelo nabweseshe ukuboko kwandi, pantu nga nalilengele ishina lyandi ukusebana ku bantu ba mishobo abalemonako uko ine nalebafumyamo." 
Ezekiel20:23 Nakabili mu matololo mwine nabwekeshapo no mulapo. Nalapa ukuti ine nkabapashila mu mishobo ya bantu bambi, nkabasalanganishisha mu fyalo fimbi." 
Ezekiel20:24 Ico nacitile ifyo, nico balisuulile ifipope fyandi, balipulile amafunde yandi, balisuulile na Masabata yene, balapepa na tulya twine tulubi twa fikolwe fyabo." 
Ezekiel20:25 Kanshi na ine nomba nalekafye bapoke amafunde ayashali mafunde yene yene, ne fipope ifishali fipope fine fine, ifintu ifishifwile kulaleta ubumi." 
Ezekiel20:26 Nabaleka baleikowesha abene ku mituulo yabo, pakuleka balebuula na bana babo abaume amabeli balebatuula nge lambo ku tulubi. Ico nacitile ifyo, ni pakubakanda na pakubalanga ukuti ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Kanshi iwe we mwana wa muntu, eba aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli auti, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Mu musango umo wine emo na bashinwe bampontele pakunsangukila." 
Ezekiel20:28 Ilyo nabatwele mu calo ico nalaile ukubapeela, ilyo bamwenemo utupili tonse utwasansama, ne miti yonse iyalelema, awe nabo kabili epo balatuulila amalambo. Balenga nokuti mfulwe pa mulandu wa malambo ayo baleocelapo, na pa mulandu wa mituulo ya fyakunwa iyo baletwalapo.’" 
Ezekiel20:29 Na ine epakubepusha nati, ‘Nga shilya ncende shasansama isho muyako, bushe ni ncende sha musango nshi?’ Kanshi ishi ncende shitwa ati ‘Bama’, ukushinta na pali nomba." 
Ezekiel20:30 “Kanshi nomba eba aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli auti, ifi efyasosa Mfumu Yawe ati, ‘Bushe imwe mulandu nshi mucitila ifibi fimo finefye ifyo na bashinwe bene balecita? Cinshi ico imwe mukonkelela utulubi twabo utushaibipila?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Ilyo mucili muletuula imituulo imo ine, no kulatuula abana benu nge lambo lyakoca, mulaikowesha nemwe bene ku tulubi tumo twine ukufika na lino line. Nga kanshi nomba imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ine kuti namusuminisha shani ukuti muleisa kukwipusha ifyo ine mfwaya? Napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, ala ine nshakalemusuminisha ukwisa kukwipusha ifyo ine mfwaya." 
Ezekiel20:32 Imwe mwalipanga mu mitima yenu ukuba nge mishobo ya benafyalo. Imwe mwalipanga ukuba nga bantu bambi abaikala mu fyalo fimbi, abapepa ifimuti na mabwe, lelo imwe, awe tacakabe ifyo nakalya.’" 
Ezekiel20:33 “Napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, ine nkamuteekela ku kuboko kwandi ukwamaka kabili ukwafunguluka elyo ne cipyu icikalamba." 
Ezekiel20:34 Nkamufumya ukufuma mu mishobo, no kumulonganika ukufuma mu fyalo umo mwasalanganine ku kuboko ukwamaka kabili ukwafunguluka elyo ne cipyu icikalamba." 
Ezekiel20:35 Nkamutwala mu ‘Matololo ya bantu ba mishobo,’ kulya kwine eko tukamonana nenu pakumupingula." 
Ezekiel20:36 Nga filya fine mu matololo ya calo ca Egupto napeele bashinwe umulandu, na imwe bene efyo nkamupeela umulandu.” Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Ine nkamupisha mwisamba lya nkonto yandi iyabukacema pakumupenda, kabili nkamubika mu cipangano cimo pakumubwesha." 
Ezekiel20:38 Nkapatulapo bacisanguka muli imwe abo abantalamina. Kwena nkabafumya mu fyalo umo bacili baleikala, nomba nshakaleke bakabwelele mu calo ca Israeli iyoo. Lyena elyo mukeshiba ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel20:39 Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Imwe bonse mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, aleni konkanyenipofye ukulapepa utulubi twenu. Nomba ine ndemweba ukuti kuntanshi mukalaŋumfwila, lyena tamwakabwekeshepo nakabili ukulasaalula ne shina lyandi mukulatuula utulubi twenu imituulo.”" 
Ezekiel20:40 Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo, ulupili ulutali ulwakwa Israeli, mu calo cilya, epo imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bonse mukalantuulila, na ine nkalamusekelela. Palya pene epo nkalafwaya imituulo yenu ne fyabupe fyenu ifyasalwa pamo pene na malambo yenu ayamushilo." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ilyo nkamufumya mu mishobo umo bamusalanganishisha, elyo nkamupokelela ngo bubani ubwanunka ubusaka. Nkamufumya na mu fyalo ifyo mwapashilwemo no kumulonganya elyo nkamulanga ubucindami bwandi ubwamushilo pa cinso ca mishobo ya benafyalo." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ilyo nkamubwesesha mu calo ca Israeli, ico nalapile ukupeela ifikolwe fyenu, elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel20:43 Elyo mukalaibukisha ifintu fyonse ifyabunani ifyo imwe mucita, nefyo muikowesha mwe bene. Ku mikoshi yenu kukalaselauka pa mulandu wa fibi fyonse ifyo imwe mucita." 
Ezekiel20:44 Imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe, ilyo nkamucitila ukulingana no bucindami bwe shina lyandi, tekulingana ne myendele yenu iyibi nangu imisango yenu iyalubana, awe.” Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel20:45 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel20:46 “We mwana wa muntu, pilibukila lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Sesemena no kusoka aba ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, sesemena ku mitengo ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ku Negebu." 
Ezekiel20:47 Landa ku mitengo ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ukuti, ‘Umfwa amashiwi ya Mfumu Yawe ayaleti, mona iwe, ine nalasonteka umulilo, nao walaoca imiti yobe yonse iyibishi ne yauma ine. Tapamoneke cakushimya ulubingu lwauko. Walatampila ku Negebu ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, ukuya shintafye na ku kapinda ka ku kuso, walaya uleocafye ponse." 
Ezekiel20:48 Na bantu bonse balamona ukuti ine ne Yawe nine ngusonteke, nokuti tapamoneke muntu nelyo umo uwakuushimya.’”" 
Ezekiel20:49 Elyo na ine ne Esekieli nasosapo ishiwi nati, “We Mfumu Yawe, ala abantu balalanda pali ine abati, ‘Bushe te milumbefye yeka alelanda?’”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Iwe we mwana wa muntu, ale pilibuka, losha amenso ku Yerusalemu. Shobola incende isho abantu bapepelapo. Elyo sesemena icalo ca Israeli." 
Ezekiel21:3 Kabili landa ku calo ici utile, ‘Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, ine nimufulilwa. Nkasomona ulupanga lwandi mu citubo no kwipaya bonse, abololoke na babifi bene kumo." 
Ezekiel21:4 Nkalaipaya abololoke na babifi bonse pamo, eico ulupanga lwandi lukasomoka mu citubo no kwipaya bonse ukufuma ku kapinda ka ku kuso na ka ku kulyo." 
Ezekiel21:5 Epakuti abantu bonse bakashininkishe ukuti ine ne Yawe nine nsomwene ulupanga lwandi mu citubo, kabili talwakatale alubwelelamo iyoo.’" 
Ezekiel21:6 “Kanshi we mwana wa muntu, akukoloma icikolomo pa menso yabo, ube no mutima uwalanguluka no bulanda ubukalamba nganshi." 
Ezekiel21:7 Nga bakwipusha umulandu ulekolomena, ubasuke auti, ‘Mulandu wa lyashi ilileisa.’ Imitima yabo ikalakubauka ku mwenso uukabekata, na maboko yabo yakatompoka. Amano yabo yakapela, mu makufi yabo mukapomponteka. Ala cili mukwisa, mpakafye cikafikilishiwe.” Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel21:8 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel21:9 “We mwana wa muntu, sesema amashiwi yandi. Eba abantu ukuti ine ne Yawe ndetila nati, “‘Ala ulupanga ulo, ala ulupanga nalunonwa no kuwamishiwa." 
Ezekiel21:10 Nalunonwa pakuti luleipaya, naluwamishiwa pakuti lulepita ngo mwele wa nkuba. “‘Bushe kuti twasekelela shani mu nkonto ya mwana wandi? Pantu ulupanga lwalisuula icimuti ca uyu musango." 
Ezekiel21:11 “‘Ulupanga nalupeelwa ukuwamishiwa, pakuti lufumbatwe bwino. Nalunonwa kabili naluwamishiwa, pakuti iminwe yakwa kakomaula ilufumbate." 
Ezekiel21:12 Kuuta inkuuta, kabili ikatishafye umusowa, iwe we mwana wa muntu, pantu ulu lupanga, ala lwakwipailako abantu bandi, na bana ba mfumu bonse aba bena Israeli. Aba bonse balafwila pamo pene na bantu bandi ku lupanga. Kanshi akuyumaulafye ulupi petanta lyobe ku bulanda" 
Ezekiel21:13 Ukweshiwa kukesa mu cinefye, kabili nga mwakonkanya ukukana alula imisango yenu, bushe ifi fyonse tafyakamuponene?’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Kanshi nomba we mwana wa muntu, sesema. Kumpa ku minwe, uleke ulupanga lukome imiku ibili nangu itatu. Lupanga lwakwipailako, ulupanga lwakwipailako icine cine. Lwakulatula monse monse pakwisa." 
Ezekiel21:15 Epakuti imitima yabo ilekubauka ku mwenso, na balefwa babe abengi. Na pa mpongolo shonse isha musumba, ine ninteyapo ulupanga ulwakulapita ngo mwele wa nkuba ulwakulalolelafye ukwipaya." 
Ezekiel21:16 We lupanga ulwanonwa ulekoma uku noku, ku kulyo na ku kuso. Komena konsefye uko ulepilibukila." 
Ezekiel21:17 Na ine nomba nalaomba amapi, no bukali bwandi bwalapwa. Nine Yawe nalanda.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel21:19 “We mwana wa muntu, kashile inshila shibili umo ulupanga lwa mfumu ya ku Babiloni luli nokwisa pita no lupanga lwaiko. Isho nshila shonse shibili shili nokutampila mu calo cimo cinefye. Ubikepo ne cishibilo pa mampatu ya nshila." 
Ezekiel21:20 Ushile icakulanga ulupanga inshila iyakuya lwisha ku Raba wa bena Amoni na imbi iyakuya lwisha icalo cakwa Yuda no musumba we linga uwa Yerusalemu. 
Ezekiel21:21 Pantu imfumu ya ku Babiloni ikeminina pa mampatu ya musebo apakumanina imisebo ibili kukufwaya ulubuko. Ikapendula ku mifwi, epakuti ishibe inshila iyakukonka. Ikepusha utulubi, ikalengula ne libu lya nama iyo baipaile utulubi." 
Ezekiel21:22 Ala nomba imfumu yaikata ku kulyo umufwi uusontele ku Yerusalemu. Yalaya kukwimikako ifyakututawilako ilinga, yalaita ifita fyaiko pakuti fitampe inkondo. Yalaya imika ifyakututawilako impongolo, ne fyakututawilako ifibumbili, ne fyakwimbilako icilindi icashika pakutebelela umusumba." 
Ezekiel21:23 Kuli bena cikamoneka kwati te cishinka pa mulandu wa cumfwano ico bacita. Nomba akabebukisha pa bubi bwabo no kubasenda bunkole. 
Ezekiel21:24 Ifyo ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndemweba imwe nifi ukuti bumpulamafunde bwenu nabwishibikwa. Bonse nabeshiba ukuti imwe muli no mulandu. Mulalanga ububi bwenu mu fintufye fyonse ifyo imwe mucita. Namukwata umulandu, na ine kanshi nalamuposa ku balwani benu." 
Ezekiel21:25 “Nobe we cilolo we kateeka wa calo ca Israeli, we mubi wa muntu we, nobe wine nomba ubushiku bwalafika ubwakukukanda umupwilapo." 
Ezekiel21:26 Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe, ale fuula icisote cobe icabufumu. Iyo nsalu upombele ku mutwe, ale ifuule. Nomba ifintu fyonse fyaaluka. Abalanda ebo nomba balaba bakateeka. Na bakateeka balaba abalanda." 
Ezekiel21:27 Owe we bonaushi. We bonaushi nobe. Umusumba nalaucita icibolya. Nomba mpaka akasuke akese uo nasala ukuti eo akese cibuula ngo mwine uwacishinka, kuli ena eo nkapeela.”" 
Ezekiel21:28 “We mwana wa muntu, sesema amashiwi yandi. Kafishe amashiwi ayo ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndeeba abena Amoni, abatukaula abena Israeli. Kabebe utile, “‘Ala ulupanga ulo lulefwaya ukwipaya, nalupekanishiwa ukwipailako, no kulabyata ngo mwele wa nkuba.’" 
Ezekiel21:29 Eba abena Amoni ukuti ifimonwa ifyo bamona, ala fyabufi, nokuti ifyo basobela, ala nafyo fine fyabufi. Abena Amoni bantu ababi, kabili ulupanga lwalafika pa mikoshi yabo, no bushiku bumo ubwalabeshilila ebwakukandilwapo umupwilapo." 
Ezekiel21:30 “Bwesesha ulupanga mu citubo caluko. Iwe nkakupingwila mu ncende ine umo wapangilwe, mu calo mwine umo wafyalilwe emo nkakupingwila." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ilyo nkakwimina ngo lubingu lwa mulilo, elyo iwe ukomfwa apapela icipyu candi. Nkakuposa na ku bantu ababa nge fiswango ku bukali, ku bantu abaishiba ukonaula." 
Ezekiel21:32 Iwe ukonaika ku mulilo nge nkuni. Umulopa obe ukasuumina mu calo cobe mwine, takwakamoneke nakabili uukalakwibukisha. Pantu nine ne Yawe nalanda.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel22:2 “We mwana wa muntu, bushe ulefwaya ukupingula umulandu wa musumba? Bushe ulefwaya ukupingula umusumba uwasuuminamo umulopa. Uwebelepo uyu musumba pa mulandu wa fintu fyonse ifyo ucita ifyabunani." 
Ezekiel22:3 Kabili utile, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe aleti, iwe we musumba we uiletela ubupingushi, pantu iwe walipaya abantu bobe abengi, kabili iwe walikowela kukupepa utulubi." 
Ezekiel22:4 Umulandu wakwata wakwipaya abantu, no wakuikowesha ku tulubi uto waipangila we mwine. Eico kanshi ubushiku bwalakwishila, naulenga nokuti inshita yobe ipwe. Eico nkakulenga ukuti ukabe uwasebana ku bantu ba mishobo yonse imbi kabili uwasekwa ku bantu ba mu fyalo fimbi fyonse." 
Ezekiel22:5 Ifyalo fyamupepi ne fyakutali fyakulakupumya pa mulandu wa kuipumbusha kobe, na kulwa cimfulunganya cobe.’" 
Ezekiel22:6 “Mona ifyo aba bacilolo bonse aba bena Israeli babomfya amaka yabo pakwipaya abantu. 
Ezekiel22:7 Muli iwe we musumba tamwaba nelyo umo uucindika abafyashi bakwe. Muli iwe balatitikisha na beni, kabili ulafyenga bamukamfwilwa na bana banshiwa." 
Ezekiel22:8 Taucindika fintu ifyamushilo, kabili tausunga na Masabata yandi." 
Ezekiel22:9 Muli iwe mwaba ababukwakwa abaikalilafye ukusumya umulopa. Ni muli iwe emwaba abaliila pa mfuba sha pa mpili no kucita ifyamuselu. 
Ezekiel22:10 Muli iwe bamo balasendama na bamuka bashibo. Bamo balapatikisha abanakashi pakuti basendame nabo pa nshita abo banakashi bali kumpepo. 
Ezekiel22:11 Bamo balasendama na bamukabene, bambi nabo balakowesha banafyalebo ukwabula ne nsoni, bambi basendama na bankashi shabo abafyalwafye kuli shibo umo wine." 
Ezekiel22:12 Muli iwe abantu bamo balapoka amafisakanwa pakuti basumye umulopa wa muntu. Bamo balakongwesha kaloba no kupokelapo insonsela ukucila mu cipimo ukufuma ku bena mupalamano babo. Kabili mwalindabako ine. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. 
Ezekiel22:13 “Wamona, nakumpa indupi shandi pa mulandu wa bupupu bobe no mulopa wasumya mukati kobe." 
Ezekiel22:14 Ilyo ine nkakukanda, bushe iwe uleti ukayuminishako nangu ukushanshako? Nine ne Yawe ndelanda, no kucita ndi nokucita." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ine abantu bobe nkabasalanganishisha mu mishobo no kubasalanganya mu fyalo fyonse, ne fibi ifyo iwe ucita ine nkafilesha." 
Ezekiel22:16 Iwe ilyo ukakowela pa menso ya bantu ba mishobo, no kwishiba elyo ukeshiba ukuti kanshi nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel22:18 “We mwana wa muntu, aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli ifyo ine mbamona, awe fyanangwafye fyabantu. Baba kwati ni munyela uwasakanamo no mukuba ne lata ne cela no mutofwe, filya fishala mwilungu ilyo silifa alopololwamo." 
Ezekiel22:19 Kanshi na ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndemweba ukutila, ‘Apo mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli mwabafye ifyanangwa fyabantu, ine nkamulonganya bonse pamo mu Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Nga filya fine babika mwilungu silifa no mukuba ne cela no mutofwe ne lata kukufyengulula, efyo nkamulonganika mu cipyu candi no bukali bwandi no kumwengulula nga filya fine umulilo mwilungu wengulula ifintu." 
Ezekiel22:21 Nkamulonganika mu Yerusalemu, nkamukosesha umulilo, no kuputa pali imwa umulilo wa cipyu candi, kabili mukasungulikila mukati." 
Ezekiel22:22 Mukasungulukila mu Yerusalemu nga filya fine silifa asungulukila mwilungu, elyo mukeshiba ukuti nine ne Yawe namuponesha ubukali bwandi.’”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Nakabili ishiwi lyakwe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel22:24 “We mwana wa muntu, eba icalo ukuti mwabafye nge calo umo imfula ishatalile ailoka, umo icipungufula cishatalile aciloka nangu ukusansamo ilyo nabafulilwe." 
Ezekiel22:25 Intungulushi shaba kwati ni nkalamo ishilebuluma pa nshita shiletakaanya inama iyo shikete. Intungulushi shilepaya abantu no kulabapoka indalama ne fyuma fyabo fyonse, shilalenga nokuti abanakashi abengi baleshala bamukamfwilwa." 
Ezekiel22:26 Bashimapepo balonaula amafunde yandi, kabili tabacindika na fintu fyandi ifyamushilo. Tabamona ifyamushilo ifyo fyalekana ne fishili ifyamushilo. Pakufunda tabalekanya ifintu ifikowesha abantu ne fishikowesha, kabili tabasakamana na Masabata yandi yene. E mulandu wine abena Israeli bashincindikila." 
Ezekiel22:27 Abakalamba babuteeko nabo baba nge mimbulu iyiletakanya inama iyo ikete. Balepaya abantu no kusumya umulopa pakuti banonkelepo icuma. 
Ezekiel22:28 Bakasesema nabo tabalandapo pali ubu bubi, babufisa kwati bantu baleshingula iloba ilyabuuta ku cibumba. Ifimonwa fyabo nafyo fyabufifye, nefyo basobela nafyo fine fyabufifye. Baimona kwati bantu abalelanda amashiwi ayafumine kuli ine ne Mfumu Yawe, nelyo nshibebele nelyo kamo." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abekalacalo nabo balacita ulufyengo no bupupu. Balacusha abapina na balanda, balacusha abeni no kukanabacitila icilungeme." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ine nalefwayapo umuntu umo uwakuti akuula cipya cipya icibumba, aiminina na pa cinso candi pa mupokapoka pakuti ewapokololako icalo ku bukali bwandi, no kulenga ukuti niconaula, nomba awe nshamonapo nelyo umo." 
Ezekiel22:31 Kanshi ine ndi nokupongolola icipyu candi pali bena, nkabonaula nga filya ficita umulilo, epakuti nkabalimune pa mulandu wa fintu ifyo bacita. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel23:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel23:2 “We mwana wa muntu, kale kwaliko abanakashi babili abafyelwe inda imo." 
Ezekiel23:3 Baikele mu calo ca Egupto, nomba ilyo bali abakashana, balecita ubulalelale baposele ifisungu fyabo, balebapampanta no kubatonya na mabele ku baume yasuka yakopoka." 
Ezekiel23:4 Uwamukalamba aleitwa Ohola, emukuti e Samaria wine, uwamwaice aleitwa Oliba, emukuti e Yerusalemu wine. Bonse babili nine nabopile, nabo bamfyalila na bana abaume na banakashi." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Nomba Ohola nangu ali mukashi wandi, awe ena akonkanyapofye ukuba cilende, alabilimafye kukutemwisha bacibusa bakwe abaume abena Asiria abali abashilika," 
Ezekiel23:6 abalefwala insalu ishacifufya, bali balashi elyo ne ntungulushi sha fita ishabuteeko. Nabo bonse bali abalumendo abayemba beka abaleendela pali bakabalwe." 
Ezekiel23:7 Ku bena Asiria bonse bashimucindikwa, eko Ohola aipeele ukucita nabo ubulalelale, bwasuka ubulalelale bwakwe bwamutwala na kukuikowesha mukulapepa utulubi twa bena Asiria." 
Ezekiel23:8 Abikilepofye ukulacita bulalelale ubo atampile mu Egupto, umo aposele icisungu cakwe. Abaume balesendama nankwe balemupampanta balemutonya amabele, no kulacitisha nankwe ifyabupusaushi." 
Ezekiel23:9 Kanshi na ine epakumulekamo, pakuti aleyangalila na bacibusa bakwe abena Asiria abo alefwaisha." 
Ezekiel23:10 Nabo basuka bamufuula, bamusha ubwamba, bamupoka bamwane abaume na banakashi, bamwipaya na ku lupanga. Awe na banakashi mpangafye yonse balamulandapo ilyo bamupeseshe." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Nkashi nankwe Oliba nangu amweneko ifyo fyonse, awe wena alicililepo ukuba cimbi cimbifye, no bulalelale bwakwe bwalicilile no bwakwa nkashi nankwe Ohola." 
Ezekiel23:12 Oliba alebilimafye kukutemwisha abena Asiria abali abalashi elyo ne ntungulushi sha fita ishabuteeko, na bashilika abalefwala insalu ishisuma, na bamushika abaleendela pali bakabalwe, aba bonse bali abalumendo abayemba beka beka." 
Ezekiel23:13 Na ine epakumona ukuti awe nao wine ubulalelale bwakwe bwabipisha, balinganafye no wamukalamba ku bubi." 
Ezekiel23:14 Awe bucilende bwakwa Oliba bwalacililakofye asuka alatamba na baume abalengelwe pa cibumba, ifipasho fya bena Kaludea ifyo balengele mwilangi ilyakashika," 
Ezekiel23:15 abaume abali ne mishipi iyakakwa mu misana yabo, ne nsalu ishapombwa ku mitwe yabo. Bonse balemoneka nge ntungulushi sha bashilika abena Babiloni abafuma ku calo ca Kaludea." 
Ezekiel23:16 Kuti nga aloleshapo, awe no mutima munda walabilimafye kukushikumbwa, asuka nomba alatumina ne ntungulushi shine inkombe ku calo ica Kaludea." 
Ezekiel23:17 Abena Babiloni nabo epakulaisa kuli ena ku busanshi bwa citemwiko, na mu lwinso lwabo bamukowesha icakuti pakulekelesha nao asuka abatendwa." 
Ezekiel23:18 Ilyo atwalilile na bucilende bwakwe, aleitakisha pa lwalala pali bucilende bwakwe, alefuula alelangisha no mubili wakwe. Na ine nasukile natendwa, nga filya fine natendelwe nkashi nankwe." 
Ezekiel23:19 Awe nao elyo nomba acilililako ukulacita ubulalelale ubo atampilefye mu Egupto, ilyo ali umukashana." 
Ezekiel23:20 Kulya eko alatemwisha impusaushi sha baume ishali ne mibili ikulu nge ya bapunda, iyaluma ubushinso mukwitulula nge mfalashi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Iwe Oliba, ulefwaya nakabili ukulacita ubulalelale, nga filya walecita ilyo wali umukashana mu Egupto, umo abaume balekutonya amabele no kulakupampanta." 
Ezekiel23:22 “Kanshi we Oliba ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, iwe nautendwa balya bantu watemenwe, nomba ine nkalenga bakakufulilwe, no kukushinga bakese kushinguluka mpangafye yonse." 
Ezekiel23:23 Abena Babiloni na bena Kaludea bonse, abena Pekodi, na bena Shoa, na bena Koa, na bena Asiria bonse, aba bonse bali abalumendo abayemba, bonse bali balashi elyo ne ntungulushi sha fita, abendela pali bakabalwe. Bonse bali abakalamba mu milimo yabuteko kabili abaleendela pali bakabalwe." 
Ezekiel23:24 Pakwisa kusansa bakesa ne fyanso, amaceleta, ne fya mipeto fimbi elyo ne fita ifingi. Pakukushinguluka bakekatilila inkwela ishikalamba ne shinono, no kufwala ifimpompo. Nine nkabeba ukukupingula, nabo bakakupingula ukulingana ne fyebo fyabo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Nkaleka bakakutakanye ku cipyu candi, pantu ine ninkufulilwa. Bakakuteta imyona na matwi, bakepaya na bonse abakashalamo ku lupanga. Bakakupoka bamwano abaume na banakashi, bakaboce na mu mulilo." 
Ezekiel23:26 Bakakulepawila ifyakufwala, no kukufuula ifisamiko ifyayemba." 
Ezekiel23:27 Efyo ine nkakupwisha bucilende bobe, nkakupwisha ne myendele yobe imbi iyabipisha iyo wakwete ilyo wali mu Egupto. Tawakatale nakabili aufuluka nelyo ukwibukisha icalo cabo." 
Ezekiel23:28 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ine nkakutwala ku bantu abo iwe wapata, kabili abo watendwa." 
Ezekiel23:29 Bakakupokafye fyonse ifyo wabombela, elyo kabili bakakushe ubwamba, pantu nabo bene balikupata. Bakakusha ukwabula ukufwala, epakuti ukaseebane pali bucilende bobe. Ubupulumushi bobe na bucilende" 
Ezekiel23:30 efikakuletelela, pantu walekumbwa imishobo pakucita nabo bucilende, twasuka no tulubi twabo twakukowesha." 
Ezekiel23:31 Walikonkelela imisango yakwa nkashi mbiyo, e mulandu wine na ine nkabika ulukombo lwakwa nkashi mbiyo mu minwe yobe.”" 
Ezekiel23:32 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Ukanwena mu lukombo lwakwa nkashi mbiyo, ulukombo ulukulu ulwafonka. Icakuti na bantu bonse bakakuseka no kukupoma akawele, pantu ifyabamo fingi." 
Ezekiel23:33 Ukakolwa no kwikatwa ubulanda, ulukombo lwamasakamiko kabili ulwabonaushi, ulukombo lwakwa nkashi mbiyo Samaria." 
Ezekiel23:34 Kabili ukalunwa no kufipilila, elyo ukalutobe, ne fiiso fyaluko ukasantawileko amabele yobe. Pantu nine Mfumu Yawe nalanda.”" 
Ezekiel23:35 Eico ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Apofye walindaba no kumfutatila, ukaculilapo pa bupusaushi na pali bucilende bobe.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Kabili Yawe alinjebele ati, “We mwana wa muntu, bushe ulefwaya ukupingula Ohola na Oliba? Kanshi iwe bakalipile pa fintu ifyabunani ifyo bacita." 
Ezekiel23:37 Balyobelwa ku bucende no mulopa uli mu minwe yabo, balacita ubucende no tulubi twabo, balipaya abana abaume abo bafyele kuli ine. Balibuula abana bandi no kubatuula ilambo ilyakupakisha utulubi." 
Ezekiel23:38 Teapo peka bapelela iyoo, balilundapo no kukowesha icifulo candi icamushilo, no konaula Amasabata yandi." 
Ezekiel23:39 Batile bashiipaya abana babo pakubatuula ilambo ku tulubi, ubo bwine bushiku balishile no kukowesha cifulo candi icamushilo. Nefi efyo bacita mu ŋanda yandi." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Kabili balitumine inkombe ishakuya ita abaume abali ukutali, awe nabo baisa. Pakusembeleka abaume, abanakashi epakusamba, basuba na mafuta bapenta na ku menso, bafwala ne fyakuisamika ifyamutengo." 
Ezekiel23:41 Baikala na pa musengele uusuma, bapalamika ne tebulo ilyo baanshikepo ubusaka. Babikapo ububani na mafuta ya miolifa, ifintu ifyali fyandi." 
Ezekiel23:42 Uyu mwanakashi ashingulwikwe ne bumba lya bamungulu abalecita icongo, elyo mu matololo mwafumine ibumba lya bacakolwa nabo bafwika na banakashi amakosa ku maboko, ne ngala ishayemba ku mitwe." 
Ezekiel23:43 Na ine epakulanda palwa uyo umwanakashi uo bucilende bwaonaula nati, nabatwalilile ukumubomfya muli bucilende, pantu ena efyo aba." 
Ezekiel23:44 Na baume bacili baleya uko ali, kwati ni kuli cilende baleya. Efyo baya na kuli Ohola na Oliba." 
Ezekiel23:45 Nomba abantu abololoke bakabapeela umulandu kulwa bucende bwabo, na kulwa bupondo bwabo, pantu balacita ubucende no kulaipaisha abantu.”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Kabakuutile ibumba lya bantu, uleke lise libatiinye libatape ne fyuma fyabo." 
Ezekiel23:47 Leka ibumba libatobaule amabwe, no kubasansa no lupanga, bakepaye abana babo abaume na banakashi, no kubocela amayanda yabo." 
Ezekiel23:48 Efyo ine nkapwisha ubupulumushi mu calo no kusoka abanakashi bonse ukukanacita ubucende, ngefi imwe mulecita." 
Ezekiel23:49 Elyo na imwe mwe nkashi shibili, ine nkamulimuna pali bucilende bwenu, na pa bubifi bwenu ubwakupepa utulubi. Lyena mukashininkisha ukuti ine nine Mfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Mu mwaka walengele pabula, pa bushiku ubwalenga ikumi mu mweshi we kumi ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel24:2 “We mwana wa muntu, lemba ifi pa bushiku bwa lelo, ni pali buno bushiku epo imfumu ya ku Babiloni iletampa ukutebelela Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel24:3 Eba ulu uluko lusangu ili pinda utile, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “‘Tekapo umupika pa mulilo, witilemo na menshi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Ubikemo imipusa ya nama, ifiputulwa filya ifyawamisha, ifya kuulu no kuboko. Wisushe inongo na mafupa ayasalwa." 
Ezekiel24:5 Ubuulepo pa fitekwa iyatuulukisha. Uninkulepo no mulilo, uleke umupika ulebilauka, ne mipusa na mafupa nafyo filebilaukila kumo.’" 
Ezekiel24:6 “Kanshi ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe asosa ati, ‘Washama we musumba uusumya umulopa. Umusumba uuli ngo mupika wa ndalawa uushatala aukuuswa. Mupungulemo inama shonse, ukwabula ukushamo nelyo imo." 
Ezekiel24:7 Mwali ubupondo mu musumba uwakusumya umulopa. Umulopa tawalekonkolokela pa mushili apakuti ulukungu lwaushika iyoo, walekonkolokela pa mwalala we bwe." 
Ezekiel24:8 Na ine wine epo ngulekele ube, pakuti ulemoneka, kukwimya icipyu candi pakulandwilapo mu bukali.’" 
Ezekiel24:9 “Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “‘Washama we musumba we usumya umulopa. Na ine ndetulumanika umwina wa nkuni uukalamba." 
Ezekiel24:10 Kanshi leteni inkuni na shimbi. Shitulumane elyo mukoshe umulilo. Ipika bwino inama, ubikemo ne fya cena cisuma uleke na mafupa yapye." 
Ezekiel24:11 Ale nomba tekapo umupika weka weka pa musolilo, uleke upye, ukashike na cee. Elyo indalawa shauko shalasunguluka, no mupika ulebafye nomba uwakushika." 
Ezekiel24:12 Nomba nacifilikwa, pantu indalawa tashapwile shonse iyoo, nangu yatekelwe pa mulilo." 
Ezekiel24:13 Iwe imisango yobe iyabupusaushi yalikukowesha. Nangu ine njesha ukukuwamya, awe ushalafye umo wakowelela. Ukawamishiwafye ilyo ukomfwa apapela icipyu candi.’" 
Ezekiel24:14 Ine ne Yawe nalanda ukuti, ‘Inshita naifika iyakuti ncitepo cimo. Nshalekepofye iyoo, kabili nshalanguluke nangu ukumfwa uluse nakalya. Ndekukanda pafyo iwe ucita na pa mibeele yobe.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel24:15 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel24:16 “We mwana wa muntu, ine ndekupumikisha pakusenda umuntu uo watemwisha nganshi. Kanshi iwe tecakwesha kuilishanyapo, nangu ukupumapo umusowa, nangu ukulukushapo icilamba." 
Ezekiel24:17 Wileka bomfweko uko uleshinshimukila. Wifuula ne cimo ku mutwe, kabili wifuula nsapato shobe pakulanga ukuti uli ne cililo. Wifimba na pa kanwa, kabili wiesha kulya icakulya ico abantu balya pa cililo.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Kanshi na ine ulucelocelo nalandile ku bantu, awe na cine icungulo umukashi wandi afwa no kufwa. Ulucelo ulwakonkelepo nacitilafye umo naebelwe." 
Ezekiel24:19 Elyo abantu banjipusha abati, “Bushe tekuti utulondolwele umo ifi fintu filolele kuli ifwe?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Kanshi na ine epakubasuka nati, “Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyacisa kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel24:21 ‘Landa ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli utile, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ifyakuti, ine nalaswa nkoweshe icifulo candi icamushilo, ishintililo lyenu ilyo mutakishishamo, ilimulenga ukusansamuka pakuimona, kabili ukufuluka kwa mitima yenu. Abana benu abaume na banakashi abashala mu Yerusalemu, bakafwa ku nkondo." 
Ezekiel24:22 Elyo nemwe mukacita ngefi fine ine ncitile. Tamwakafimbe na pa kanwa, kabili tamwakalye cakulya cilya mulya pa cililo." 
Ezekiel24:23 Tamwakafuule ne cimo ku mitwe yenu, kabili tamwakafuule nsapato shenu, tamwakaleshinshimukila, nangufye ukupumapo imisowa. Mukondelapo palwa kubifya kwenu, no kulilishika kukaba pakati kenu." 
Ezekiel24:24 Esekieli akaba icilangililo kuli imwe, mukacitile ngomo mwine acitile. Ilyo ifi fintu fikacitika, elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi nine Mfumu Yawe.’”" 
Ezekiel24:25 Kabili epakunjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, ine nkabapoka iŋanda yandi iyo bashintililamo kabili iyo basansamukilamo ilyo baleitamba no kulaipempula. Kabili nkabapoka na bana babo abaume na banakashi." 
Ezekiel24:26 Ubushiku nkacita ifyo, nga pakapusunsukapo umo, uyo wine ninshi eukesa mushimikila umulandu." 
Ezekiel24:27 Iwe ukalanda neyo ine mbutushi, elyo ukutula pali ubo bwine bushiku nobe tawakatale auba cibulu nakabili. Kanshi iwe ukaba icishibilo, ni kuli iwe bakamwena no kwishibila ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel25:2 “We mwana wa muntu, losha amenso ku bena Amoni, kaseseme pakubakalipila." 
Ezekiel25:3 Kabebe auti, ‘Umfweni amashiwi yakwa Yawe umwine wa maka yonse ayakuti, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, imwe mwalisansamuka pakumona ifyo bakowesha icifulo candi icamushilo. Mwalitemwa pakumona ifyo icalo ca Israeli caonaika, na pakumona uko abena Yuda balesendwa bunkole." 
Ezekiel25:4 Pa mulandu wakuti imwe mwalitemwa, na ine kanshi nkamupeela ku bantu ba mishobo iyaba mu matololo ya ku kabanga nge cikwatwa cabo. Mu calo cenu bakesa kuulamo insakwe, no kwikala emo bakaleikala. Bakesa mukulamuliila ifisabo, no kulamunwena umukaka." 
Ezekiel25:5 Umusumba wenu uwa Raba nkausangula itanga lya ngamila, ne calo cenu conse imwe mwe bena Amoni ine nkacisangula incende iyakucemenamo impaanga, epakuti mukashininkishe ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’" 
Ezekiel25:6 “Pantu ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Imwe mulatota amapi no kulacinda ne nsansa pakuseka icalo ca Israeli no musaalula wa mu mitima yenu yonse." 
Ezekiel25:7 Cisuma, na ine kanshi nomba nkamuposa ku mishobo ya benafyalo, uleke ikamutape fyonse. Nkamulofyafye bonse, epakuti umutundu wenu ukalobe. Lyena elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Pantu abena Moabu na bena Seiri balasosa abati, ‘Moneni aba ŋanda yakwa Yuda baisa linganafye na bantu ba mishobo imbi yonse.’" 
Ezekiel25:9 Cisuma, na ine kanshi nkaleka ikasanswe imisumba iyilinda imipaka ya calo ca bena Moabu, no musumba wabo uwawamisha uwa Beti Yeshimoti, no wa Beti Meoni, no wa Kiriataimu." 
Ezekiel25:10 Nkaleka abantu ba mishobo iyabela mu matololo ya ku kabanga bakacimfye abena Moabu, kumo kwine na bena Amoni, epakuti umushobo wabo ukalobe." 
Ezekiel25:11 Ine nkapesha abena Moabu, elyo nabo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel25:12 Kabili ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Pa mulandu wakuti abena Edomu balandwile pa bena Yuda, no kuiletelela umulandu abene palwa cilandushi cabo," 
Ezekiel25:13 cisuma, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ine nkabalimuna, kabili nkabepaila bonse kumo kwine ne fitekwa fyabo. Icalo cabo ine nkacisangula amatololo, ukutampilafye ku musumba wa Temani ukuya fika na ku musumba wa Dedani, na bantu bakafwa ku nkondo." 
Ezekiel25:14 Abantu bandi abena Israeli ebakanandwilako abena Edomu, bakomfwikishe apapela ubukali bwandi ne cipyu candi. Elyo abena Edomu bakeshiba ifyo ciba ku bantu abo nacitapo icilandushi.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 Kabili ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Pa mulandu wakuti abena Filisiti bacitile icilandushi no kulandula no musaalula mu mitima yabo pa balwani babo, abo bapatana nabo nakale, no kufwaya ukubalofya kumpatilafye," 
Ezekiel25:16 cisuma, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nomba ndelanda ukuti nkabasansa abena Filisiti, no kubalofya nkabalofya. Nkalofya na bena Kereti, na bonsefye abashala mu lulamba lwa bemba." 
Ezekiel25:17 Nkacita kuli bena icilandushi icikalamba no kubakanda apapela icipyu candi. Elyo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe, ilyo nkacita icilandushi pali bena.’”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Mu mwaka walengele ikumi na umo, pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel26:2 “We mwana wa muntu, abantu ba mu musumba wa Turi balalanda ne nsansa abati, ‘Eya umusumba wa Yerusalemu uwaba inshila ya ku makwebo naubongoloka. Impongolo shauko shishelefye pwampwa, apo Yerusalemu acimbile, nomba nifwe twalaba abakankala.’" 
Ezekiel26:3 Cisuma, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Imwe mwe bena Turi, ne mulwani wenu nomba nine. Ine nine nkemya abantu bambi aba mu mishobo iyingi pakuti bakese musansa imwe, bakesa nga filya amatamba ya muli bemba yacita." 
Ezekiel26:4 Bakesa onaula amalinga ya musumba wenu, no kubongolola impungu shenu. Elyo na ine nkasendamofye umushili, mukashalefye umwalala wa cilibwe." 
Ezekiel26:5 Turi akasanguka incende apo abalondo bakalakanika amasumbu yabo, kabili akashalafye ifyo fine muli bemba.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. Abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo ebakatapa Turi," 
Ezekiel26:6 na balya bene abantu abekala ku mulundu bakabepaila ku lupanga. Elyo abena Turi bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe. 
Ezekiel26:7 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nalaswa ndete Nebukadinesa, imfumu ya ku Babiloni, imfumu ya shamfumu, ndemuleta kukusansa Turi. Aletulila ku kapinda ka ku kuso, aleisa ne fita ifingi nganshi pamo na bakabalwe, na maceleta, ne fita ifyendela pali bakabalwe." 
Ezekiel26:8 Abantu abekala mu mishi iyafumamo iyabela pa mulundu, balefwa ku buta. Abalwani baleisa imba icilindi icashika pakulanga ifyo bakutebelele, bacite ne fibumbili, batantike ne nkwela ishakuubamo pakukulwisha iwe Turi." 
Ezekiel26:9 Amalinga yobe balayabongolola ku fyakututawilako, ne mpungu shobe balashibongolola kuli bancinde." 
Ezekiel26:10 Walaisa kungwa no lukungu ulo bakabalwe balaisa mukulafutumuna. Icongo ca bakabalwe babo abatinta ifyakusendelamo ifipe, neca maceleta yene, ala calaisa tenkanya amalinga yobe, ilyo balaisa mukulapitila pa mpongolo sha musumba, uwalaisa shala icibolya." 
Ezekiel26:11 Abendela pali bakabalwe balaisa mukulapitana mu misebo yobe, baleipayamo na bantu bobe ku lupanga. Inceshi shobe ishamaka shalaisa bongololwa." 
Ezekiel26:12 Abalwani bobe balaisa kutapila ifyuma, kumo kwine ne fintu ifyo ushitisha. Balaisa bongolola amalinga yobe na mayanda yobe yene ayacindama. Balaisa sendapo amabwe ne myalo ne fibungulubwe fyonse, bakafiposa na muli bemba." 
Ezekiel26:13 Kanshi ine nalakulesha ukwimba inyimbo shobe shonse, no kulisha amaseese yobe yene." 
Ezekiel26:14 Nalaleka pabefye umwalala we bwe, uwakuti abalondo balekanikapo amasumbu yabo. Iwe we musumba tawakabukululwe nakabili iyoo.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel26:15 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ku bena Turi ati, ‘Bushe abekala mu lulamba lwa bemba tabakatutume pakumfwa icongo ca kuwa kobe no kuteta kwa bacenenwe no kukoma kwa lupanga ifikacitwa kuli imwe?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Ishamfumu shonse ishateeka imishobo ya bantu abendauka pali bemba, shikema pa fipuna fyashiko, shikafuula imingila na malaya ayayemfiwa shikekala panshi no kulaikankilafye ku mwenso. Shikekatwa no mwenso pa mulandu wa fintu ifikakuponena, icakuti shikafilwa no kuleka ukulakanka.’" 
Ezekiel26:17 Pakuloosha shikalakwimbila ulu lwimbo ashiti, “‘Owe ifyo waonaika no kulobela muli bemba, iwe we musumba walulumbi! Abantu bobe bali e bene ba bemba, kabili ebaletiinya na bantu bonse abekala kulya." 
Ezekiel26:18 Ubushiku waonaikamo ifyalo fya ku lulamba lwa bemba fileitutuminafye ku mwenso, na bantu abaikalamo nacibapesha na mano, pakumona ifyo iwe waonaika.’" 
Ezekiel26:19 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Iwe nalakwalula icibolya nga ilya misumba yaonaika, umushaikala muntu. Nalakwibisha petenga pali bemba." 
Ezekiel26:20 Nalakuposa mu nindi umwakuti uleikala pamo na bantu abaliko kale pano calo. Nalakubika panshi mu calo icaonaika, icaba icibolya ca pe, umwakuti uleikala pamo na bafwa. Tawakatale aubwelako pakwisa ikala nakabili na bomi iyoo." 
Ezekiel26:21 Nalakucita icilangililo icakutiinishako bambi, nobe ninshi e milobele waloba. Abantu bakalakufwaya fwaya, nomba tabakatale abakusanga nakalya.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel27:2 “We mwana wa muntu, ale nomba imba ulwimbo ulwakuloosha Turi." 
Ezekiel27:3 Landa pali Tuti, ulya umusumba uwaba mu lulamba lwa bemba, uucita amakwebo na bantu abaikala mu lulamba lonse ulwa bemba. Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “‘Iwe Turi, ulailumbanya pa busuma bobe." 
Ezekiel27:4 Iwe apo waikala ni pali bemba. Abakukuulile bakucitile uwapwililika kukuyemba. 
Ezekiel27:5 Imiti iyo balepwileko imbao ishakukupangilako yafumine ku Seni, umwalo obe baupangile ne cimuti icalepesha ica ku Lebanoni." 
Ezekiel27:6 Ifimuti fya oki ifya ku Bashani efyo babashileko inkafi shobe, itangalalwe lyobe balipangile ne mbao sha paini isha ku cishi ca Saiprasi, nasho bashiikeshe ne fiputusha ifya meno ya nsofu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Insalu shobe ishakukolelako umwela pakwensha shali ishapikulwa kabili ishisuma, nasho shafumine ku Egupto, kabili eshali uluunga lobe ulo walebomfya. Nasho shintu shafumine ku lulamba lwa Elisha, ishacifufya ne shakashikila." 
Ezekiel27:8 Bacoba bobe bantu bafumine mu musumba wa Sidoni no wa Afadi, na bantu bobe abacenjela ebalekwensha iwe we Turi." 
Ezekiel27:9 Abakalamba ba ku Gebali ne ncenshi shabo bali mu bwato mukubomba umulimo wakucilika imilale. Aba mu mato yonse pali bemba balekupempula no kulacita nobe amakwebo.’ 
Ezekiel27:10 “Abashilika ba ku Pesia, na ku Lidia na ku Puti, baishile mukulabombela pamo ne fita fyobe. Balekobeka inkwela shabo ne fisote fyabo mu musumba obe. Ebalengele nokuti ulumbuke." 
Ezekiel27:11 Abashilika ba ku Afadi na ku Heleke ebalelinda amalinga yobe, na bena Gamadi ebalelinda impungu shobe. Balekobeka inkwela shabo ku malinga yobe. Ebalengele nokuti ube uwapwililika kukuyemba." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Mwaleshitishanya amakwebo ya fintu na bena Tashishi. Pa fyuma fyobe ifishaifulila, iwe walemwenapo silifa, ne fyela, na malata, ne mitofwe." 
Ezekiel27:13 Walecita amakwebo mu calo ca Yafani, na mu calo ca Tubali, na mu calo ca Mesheki, na mu fyuma fyobe walekabulamo abasha ne fintu ifya mukuba." 
Ezekiel27:14 Abena Beti Togama balekabula bakabalwe abakubomfya imilimo, na bakwendelapo mu nkondo, pamo pene na bapunda." 
Ezekiel27:15 Walecita amakwebo na bena Rodesi, na bantu ba mu fyalo ifingi ifya mu lulamba lwa bemba. Walebakabusha ifyuma fyobe, pakuti balekupeelelapo ameno ya nsofu na eboni iya mbao." 
Ezekiel27:16 Abena Aramu baleshita ifipe fyobe, pantu walepanga ifingi. Balekuletela utumabwe twamutengo twa tokisi kabili utwafitulukila, ne nsalu ishakashikila, ne shapikulwa mumbali, ne shatelela, na kolali, no tumabwe utukankala utwakashikila utwa rubi. Ifi fintu efyo baleshitamo ifyuma fyobe." 
Ezekiel27:17 “Abena Yuda na bena Israeli nabo bene mwaleshitana nabo ifyuma, bena balekuletela iŋanu ya ku Miniti, na makunyu, no buci, na mafuta ya miolifa, ne fintu ifyanunka ubusaka." 
Ezekiel27:18 Abena Damasiko baleshita ifipe fyobe ifingi, pantu ifyo walepanga fyalifulisha. Balekuletela ubwalwa bwa mwangashi uwalefuma ku Heliboni, na masako ya mpaanga ishabuuta aya ku Saha." 
Ezekiel27:19 Abena Dani na Bagiriki ukufuma ku Usali balekushitisha ne fyela ifyo balefula, ne fintu ifyanunka ubusaka kasia no mumfwemfwe, pakuti nobe ulebashitishako ifyuma fyobe." 
Ezekiel27:20 Abena Dedani baleleta amalangeti yalya bekalapo abendela pali bakabalwe, nabo ni pakuti baleshitamo ifintu fyobe." 
Ezekiel27:21 Abena Arabia na bakateeka ba calo ca Keda, nabo baleisa no twana twa mpaanga, na basukusuku, ne mbushi, pakuti baleshitamo ifyuma fyobe." 
Ezekiel27:22 Bashimakwebo ba ku Sheba na ba ku Rama baleisa ne fintu ifyanunka ubusaka nganshi, na mabwe ayamutengo na golide, nabo efintu baleshitamo ifyuma fyobe." 
Ezekiel27:23 Aba mu musumba wa Harani, no wa Kane, no wa Edeni, na bashimakwebo ba ku Sheba, na ba mu musumba wa Ashuri, no wa Kilimadi, aba bonse mwaleshitishanya nabo ifintu." 
Ezekiel27:24 Mu ncende shenu isha makwebo balekushitisha insalu ishikankala, ishakashikila, ne shapikulwa mumbali, ne fikuutulo ifyakunyantapo ifyabeka kabili ifyamindoloshi, ne myando iyakosa, ne fitabataba ifyamaka." 
Ezekiel27:25 Umulongo wa fimato ifikulu ifya ku Tashishi ewaletunta ifyuma fyobe. “Wali ngo bwato ubuli pali bemba, ubwiswile ifipe paa." 
Ezekiel27:26 Abalekooba bakutwele pakati ka bemba, nomba icimwela ca ku kabanga caisa konawila pakati ka bemba." 
Ezekiel27:27 Ifyuma fyobe fyonse ne fyakukabushanya, ne fyamakwebo fyonse fyalobele muli bemba, pamo na bakooba bobe, bonse abakwensha na bakulungisha, na bashimakwebo bobe na bashilika bonse abo usenda, bonsefye balinwenene nakalya nakalya muli bemba, pa bushiku bwine iwe waonaike." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ku nkuuta iyikalamba iya bakensha wa mato, incende sha mu lulamba shatenta shonse." 
Ezekiel27:29 Na bonse abensha amato, nabafuma mu mato yabo. Aboba amato na bonse ababombela pali bemba, na basha amato bele iminina ku mulundu." 
Ezekiel27:30 Bonse niwe baleloosha nganshi, baleikubaika ulukungu ku mitwe, balealangana na pa fishala pakulanga ubulanda." 
Ezekiel27:31 Nababeya ulukuso pakulanga ubulanda, nabafwala ne nsalu shabulanda. Ilyo balelila, awe imitima yabo te pabukali." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ilyo balelila nokukuloosha, balekuloosesha mu lwimbo abati, ‘Nga nani uwaonawilwe nga Turi, ulya Turi wa pakati ka bemba?’" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ilyo walepatula ifyuma fyobe ifyamakwebo pali bemba, abantu ba mishobo iyingi baleshitako ifyo balefwaya. Ifyuma fyobe ifishaifulila ifyo waleshitisha, ala fyalepulamika ishamfumu." 
Ezekiel27:34 Awe nomba naubongolokela pali bemba, no kwibila nawibila petenga pali bemba. Ifyuma fyobe fibundile pamo na iwe, kumo kwine ne bumba lya bantu abo waleenda nabo." 
Ezekiel27:35 Abantu bonse abaikala mu lulamba lwa bemba bekelefye inkumbabulili pakumona umupamba uukuponene. Ne shamfumu shabo nasho shine shileikankilafye ku mwenso, na pa finso fyabo palifye cimbi cimbi ku mwenso." 
Ezekiel27:36 Bashimakwebo ba mishobo ya benafyalo nabapapa pali iwe, nomba impela yobe naifika iyakutiinya, tawakabepo nakabili.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel28:2 “We mwana wa muntu, eba kateeka wa Turi ukuti, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “‘Mu mutima obe iwe ulaitutumuna ukuti uli mulungu, pantu iwe walikwatisha icilumba. Ulasosa ukuti iwe uli kateeka uwaikala pa cipuna cabulesa mukati ka menshi ya muli babemba. Ala nakalyafye, nangu uitunga ukuba umulungu, mu cine uli muntufye, tauli mulungu iyoo." 
Ezekiel28:3 Bushe kuti wacila Daniele amano, mwa? Bushe takwaba ifyankaama ifyafisama kuli iwe?" 
Ezekiel28:3 Bushe kuti wacila Daniele amano, mwa? Bushe takwaba ifyankaama ifyafisama kuli iwe?" 
Ezekiel28:4 Walinonka ifyuma ifingi ku mano yobe na ku bucenjeshi bobe. Walitutila golide na silifa mu matala yobe. 
Ezekiel28:5 Walicenjela mukucita amakwebo, na mufyo ubomba walifusha icuma. Elyo na pa mulandu wa cuma, walikwata icilumba mu mutima.’" 
Ezekiel28:6 “Kanshi ifi efyo Imfumu Yawe asosa ati, “‘Apo iwe ulaitunga ukuba na mano ngo mulungu," 
Ezekiel28:7 ine nkakuletela abenafyalo umushobo wa bantu abashaba na luse. Bakasomona impanga shabo bakonaula ubusuma bobe na mano yobe, no kukowesha ubucindami bobe." 
Ezekiel28:8 Bakakuposa panshi ku nindi, ukafwa imfwa iyakukwipayafye, bakakushiike na mukati ka menshi ya muli babemba." 
Ezekiel28:9 Ilyo bakesa kwipaya, bushe nakabili ukabwekeshapo ukulaitutubula ukuti iwe uli mulungu, batini? Ilyo ukashingwana ne fipondo, elyo ukamona ukuti uli muntufye, nokuti kanshi tauli mulungu nakalya." 
Ezekiel28:10 Ukafwa ngo ushasembululwa mu minwe ya benafyalo. Pantu nine nandile.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.” 
Ezekiel28:11 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel28:12 “We mwana wa muntu, lilila imfumu ya ku Turi ubulanda. Kayebe ukuti, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “‘Iwe niwe kale abantu balemwenako ifyo umuntu uwapwililika aba. Wali na mano kabili uwayemba nganshi." 
Ezekiel28:13 Waikele mu Edeni mwibala lyakwa Lesa, walefwala utumabwe utukankala utwa misango yonse, utwa rubi, no twa topasi, no twa emeradi, no twa kirisaliti, no twa onikisi, no twa yasipeli, no twa safile, no twa tokisi, no twa bereli. Ifisamo fyobe fyali ifya golide, ifyo fyonse niwe bapangiile ubushiku wabumbilwe." 
Ezekiel28:14 Wasubilwe nga kerubi kalinda, pantu efyo nakupekenye. Waikele pa lupili lwakwa Lesa ulwamushilo, no kwenda waleenda mu tumabwe utwamutengo utwalebalabata." 
Ezekiel28:15 Imibeele yobe tayakwete ububi, ukutula ubushiku wabumbilwemo, mpaka ubushiku batampile ukusanga ububi muli iwe." 
Ezekiel28:16 Mukupekapeka kwa makwebo yobe ayengi wasukile waisulamo ubunkalwe kabili wabifya. Kanshi na ine epakukutamfya pa lupili lwakwa Lesa, we Kerubi kalinda, nakufulumuna na mu tumabwe utwamutengo utwalebalabata." 
Ezekiel28:17 Mu mutima obe waleitakisha pa busuma bobe, no kucindama kobe kwalengele amano yobe ukonaika. Na ine epakukuposa panshi, no kukusha epo nakusha, pakuti ishamfumu eko shimwene, shicenjele." 
Ezekiel28:18 Mu makwebo yobe ayabula icishinka no kubifya apakalamba incende shobe ishamapepo shasuka nasho shakowela. Eico nalengele umulilo ukufuma mu kati kobe, nao wakocafye nakalya nakalya. Nalenga nokuti ushalefye imito yeka yeka panshi, pa menso ya bonse abakumwene." 
Ezekiel28:19 Abantu ba mishobo imbi abakwishiba balepapafye, naufika ku mpela yobe iyabipisha, nacipwa naulala naulobelela.’”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel28:21 “We mwana wa muntu, kaseseme palwa fikaponena Sidoni." 
Ezekiel28:22 Kawebe ukuti ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “‘Ine nomba ndi mulwani obe, we Sidoni, abantu bakalantasha pafyo ine nkakucita. Bakashininkisha ukuti ine nine Yawe ilyo nkalimuna abaikala muli iwe we musumba, pakulanga ifyo ine naba uwamushilo." 
Ezekiel28:23 Nkakuletela icikuko, nkaleka no mulopa obe ukasuumine mu misebo yobe. No lupanga lukafuma konse konse, na bantu bobe bakabepaila mukati kobe. Lyena elyo ukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’”" 
Ezekiel28:24 “Pa mishobo yonse iyashinguluka aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, kabili iyabasuula, awe tapakabe nomba nelyo umo uukalabacusha nangufye ukubekatamo. Elyo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ine nkafumya aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli mu mishobo umo basalanganina, nkababwesesha na kumyabo, elyo ne mishobo yonse ikashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine ndi wamushilo. Aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bakekala mu calo cabo ico napeele umubomfi wandi Yakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Bakalaikalamo ukwabula ukutiina nelyo cimo. Bakalakuulamo amayanda, no kulalimamo imyangashi. Nkakanda abena mupalamano babo bonse ababasuulile, lyena abena Israeli bakalaikalila na ku matwi tondolo. Elyo bakeshiba ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe Lesa wabo.’”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Mu mwaka walengele ikumi, pa bushiku ubwalenga ikumi limo na shibili (12), mu mweshi walenga ikumi, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel29:2 “We mwana wa muntu, kaseseme ukalipile Farao, imfumu ya mu Egupto, useseme na ku bena Egupto bonse." 
Ezekiel29:3 Kamusoke Farao ukuti ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ine ndi mulwani obe nomba, iwe Farao imfumu ya ku Egupto, we cishimweshimwe, we ulala mu mumana. Iwe ulaitakisha auti, “Umumana wa Nailo mumana wandi, nine naupanga.”" 
Ezekiel29:4 Ine nalaswa nkukofye icinkobwe mu nsekete shobe, ndeke ne sabi lya mu mumana obe lilefyantama mu maŋongwa yobe. Elyo nkulompwele na ku mulundu wa mumana wa Nailo, ninshi ne sabi nalifyantama mu maŋongwa yobe." 
Ezekiel29:5 Nkakusha mu matololo, iwe pamo ne sabi lya mu milonga yobe. Ukaponena panshi no kushala insansalila, takwakabe uwakukwimya nangu ukukushiika. Nkakucita icakulya ca nama sha mpanga ne fyuni fya mu lwelele." 
Ezekiel29:6 Elyo abekala mu Egupto bonse bakeshiba ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe. “‘Lelo imwe mwalifye nge nkonto ye tete ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. 
Ezekiel29:7 Ilyo balemwikata mu minwe yabo mwalesantauka, no kubacenaula amabeya yabo. Ilyo bashintilila pali imwe mwalefunika, mwalenga ne myendo yabo ukusokona.’" 
Ezekiel29:8 Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nkamuletela abalwani abakumwipaya ku lupanga, bakesa mwipaya bonse kumo kwine ne fitekwa." 
Ezekiel29:9 Icalo ca Egupto cikasanguka amatololo. Elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’ “Pa mulandu wakuti iwe Farao waleti umumana wa Nailo e cuma cobe, nokuti niwe waupanga." 
Ezekiel29:10 Ala ine nomba ninkwalukila, ninjalukila ne milonga ya Nailo ine. Icalo ca Egupto nkacisangula amatololo kabili icaonaika umushaba kantu ukutula ku musumba wa Migidoli ukuyafye na ku musumba wa Siene, mpaka ukuya shintafye na mu mipaka ya calo ca Kushi." 
Ezekiel29:11 Tamwakatale amumoneka lukasa lwa muntu nangufye ulwa nama. Tamwakekale muntu nangufye inama pa myaka amakumi yane (40). 
Ezekiel29:12 Pa fyalo fyonse ifyo ine nasangula amatololo, icalo ca Egupto cena eco nkacishapo. Imisumba ya mu Egupto ikashala ifibolya pa myaka amakumi yane (40), nafyo ifibolya fikabipisha no kucila imisumba yonse iyaonaika. Abena Egupto nkabasalanganya, bakabutukila mu fyalo fyonse, no kulaikala na bantu ba mishobo imbi." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Imyaka amakumi yane (40) nga yapwa, elyo nkalonganya abena Egupto, nkabafumya mu bantu ba mishobo imbi umo nabasalanganishishe." 
Ezekiel29:14 Nkaleka bakekale mu Egupto, lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, mu ka calo ka Patirosi umo ifikolwe fyabo fyatuntwike. Emo bakakwatila ubufumu ubwacepesha nganshi." 
Ezekiel29:15 Pantu bukasaluka ukucila ubufumu bumbi bonse, kabili tabakatale abateekapo abantu ba mishobo imbi nakalya." 
Ezekiel29:16 Aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli tabakatale nakabili abaposako amano ku bena Egupto, cikabashinina aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli ukuti kanshi balubilefye ilyo babikile amano ku bena Egupto. Kanshi elyo bakeshiba ukuti nine Imfumu Yawe.’”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Mu mwaka walengele amakumi yabili na cine lubali (27), pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi wapakubala, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel29:18 “We mwana wa muntu, Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni nasansa umusumba wa Turi. Abashilika bakwe babombeshe na maka nganshi, icakuti ne mitwe yabo naikusulukako imishishi yonse, na mabeya yabo yonse yakusulukile kumo, lelo imfumu pamo na bashilika baiko bene baicuushishefye, tabamwenepo kantu nakalya." 
Ezekiel29:19 Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nalapeela imfumu Nebukadinesa icalo ca Egupto. Alatapa icalo, asende ne fyuma fyaciko fyonse, e malipilo ya fita fyakwe." 
Ezekiel29:20 Nalamupeela icalo ca Egupto, ekumulambula pa mulimo wakwe, pantu ifita fyakwe filamombela ine.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Ifi fyonse nga fyafikila, ine nkakosha aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, nobe wine Esekieli nkaleka ukalelandila apakuti bonse bakalekumfwa, epakuti bakashininkishe ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel30:2 “We mwana wa muntu sesema kabili utile, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. “‘Loosheni amuti, owee, we bushiku nobe ulashama." 
Ezekiel30:3 Pantu ubushiku nabupalama, ubushiku bwakwa Yawe nabupalama, bwalaba ubushiku bwa cikutika, kabili ubwatoloto ku mishobo ya bantu." 
Ezekiel30:4 Mwalaba inkondo mu calo ca Egupto, ne cililishi mu calo ca Kushi. Balaipayamo abantu abengi mu calo ca Egupto, kabili calatapwa ifyuma fyaciko, no konaula imifula cakuulwapo.’" 
Ezekiel30:5 “Muli iyi nkondo mwalafwamo abashilika aba ku Kushi, na ba ku Puti, na ba ku Lidia, na ba ku Arabia, na ba ku Libya. Mwalafwamo na bantu bandi bene pamo penefye na bena Egupto." 
Ezekiel30:6 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Bonse abapokololako icalo ca Egupto balafwila mu nkondo, ukutampilafye ku Migidoli ukufika ku Siene. Ibumba lyalulumbi ilya fita fya mu Egupto lyalaonaika.’ Efyasosa imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel30:7 Pa fyalo fyonse ifyasanguka amatololo, icalo ca Egupto cena ecalacilapo, ne misumba yaciko yalasangukafye ifibolya fyeka fyeka." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ilyo ndesonteka umulilo mu Egupto, no kwipaya bonse abacipokololako, elyo abantu baleshininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel30:9 “‘Pali bulya bushiku nkatuma inkombe na mato, shikaye tiinya abena Kushi mukubapumikishafye, nabo bakekatwa no mwenso pa bushiku bwakukanda Egupto. Pantu ubo bushiku nabupalama.’" 
Ezekiel30:10 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nkabula Nebukadinesa imfumu ya ku Babiloni, nkamutume kukuya ipaulula cinkupiti wa bantu ba mu Egupto." 
Ezekiel30:11 Ena akaya na bashilika bakwe abakalipisha pakuya onaula icalo. Bakaya sansa icalo ku lupanga, ne fitumbi fikalala ntangali ntangali mu calo." 
Ezekiel30:12 Nkakamya umumana wa Nailo, nkaleka na bantu ababi ebo bakaleteeka icalo ca Egupto. Nkaleka abenafyalo bakese onaula icalo conse ica Egupto pamo na fyonse ifyabamo.’ Nine ne Yawe nalanda." 
Ezekiel30:13 “Ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndesosa ukuti nkonaula utulubi, nkapwishishisha ne milungu yabufi iyaba ku Memfisi. Mu Egupto, ala tamwakatale amuba nakabili umuntu na umbi uwakuteeka icalo, pantu abantu ababamo ine nkabaletela umwenso." 
Ezekiel30:14 Nkonaula Patirosi uwabela mu Egupto lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, no kocamo umusumba wa Soani ulya wabela ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Nkakandamo no musumba ukalamba uwa Tebesi." 
Ezekiel30:15 Umusumba wa Pelusiumu uwakwatisha amalinga yamaka mu Egupto, ine nkauleka ukomfwishe apapela icipyu candi. Nkonaula abantu bonse aba mu Tebesi." 
Ezekiel30:16 Nkoca icalo ca Egupto, no musumba wa Pelusiumu ukashala ulekolomafye. Amalinga ya musumba wa Tebesi yakabongololwa, na mu musumba wa Memfisi mukaba ukulanguluka lyonse." 
Ezekiel30:17 Abalumendo ba mu musumba wa Heliopolisi na ba mu musumba wa Bubasiti bakafwa ku nkondo, na bantu bambi bonse bakasendwa muli bunkole." 
Ezekiel30:18 Mu Tapanesi mukafiita fititi ilyo nkonaula Egupto no kumupwisha ubulamba ubo aleitakishishapo. Mukaba icikutika mu Egupto, na bantu ba mu misumba yonse bakasendwa muli bunkole." 
Ezekiel30:19 Kanshi ifi efyo nkalimuna Egupto, elyo nabo bakeshiba ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na umo (11), pa bushiku bwalenga cine lubali mu mweshi wapakubala, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel30:21 “We mwana wa muntu, ine ninkontola ukuboko kwakwa Farao, imfumu ya Egupto. Takuli nangu umo uwakuti amukakileko, nangu uwakumubikilako akapekesa nakalya, pakuti amone ukupola no kukwata amaka nakabili ayakwikatilako ulupanga." 
Ezekiel30:22 Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ine ndi mulwani wakwa Farao, imfumu ya Egupto. Nalaya mukontola amaboko yakwe yonse yabili, ukuboko kulya kushele ukutuntulu, na kulya kwine kukontweke, no lupanga lwalaya lukuta mu minwe yakwe." 
Ezekiel30:23 Abena Egupto nalaswa mbasalanganishishe mu mishobo na mu fyalo ifyalekana lekana. 
Ezekiel30:24 Elyo nkakoshe na maboko ya mfumu ya ku Babiloni, nkaifyambatike no lupanga lwandi. Lelo Farao ena, awe ndemukontaula amaboko, akaŋonta, no kufwa akafwila pa cinso ca mulwani wakwe." 
Ezekiel30:25 Farao nkamupwisha amaka, imfumu ya ku Babiloni yena nkaikosha. Ilyo ine nkafumbatika imfumu ya ku Babiloni ulupanga lwandi, nayo ikalati nga yalupambula pakulwisha icalo ca Egupto, elyo abantu bonse bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel30:26 Nalaswa nsalanganishishe abena Egupto mu mishobo ne fyalo fya pano isonde. Elyo nabo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’” 
Ezekiel31:1 Mu mwaka walengele ikumi limo na umo (11), pa bushiku bwapakubala mu mweshi wabutatu, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel31:2 “We mwana wa muntu, ala kebe Farao, imfumu ya Egupto, pamo pene na bantu bakwe abafulisha, uyetila auti, “‘Ninani uo ine ningakupashanyako mu bucindami bobe?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Mona iwe ndekupalanya ku muti wa keda uwalepesha ulya ukula mu Lebanoni, ulya wakwata imisambo iyisuma, kabili uwafumba. Umuti uutali, kabili wafika na mu makumbi." 
Ezekiel31:4 Amenshi eyalengele ukuti ulekula, ne mimana iyashika eyaukushishe. Eyaleleta umutonshi apo umuti walekulila, no kulalosha utumilonga twaiko ku miti yonse iya mu mpanga." 
Ezekiel31:5 Pa mulandu wakutapililwa bwino bwino, kanshi nao epakucila imiti imbi yonse ku butali. Imisambo yauko epakulakwata amampanda ayengi, ne misambo yalaandalala pa mulandu wa menshi ayengi." 
Ezekiel31:6 Fyasuka ne fyuni fya misango yonse, fyalapikula ifisansala mu misambo yauko, ne nama sha mpanga shalafyalila mwisamba lyauko, na bantu ba mishobo yonse iyikalamba iya pano isonde balatuusha na mu cintelelwe cauko." 
Ezekiel31:7 Wali umuti uwayemba ku busuma, wali uutali, ne misambo yauko yalyandalele, pantu imishila yauko yaile panshi, ukuya fikafye na pa menshi ayapita mutunta panshi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Mwibala lyakwa Lesa, tamwali umuti wa keda nelyo umo uwalepeshe ukulingana noyo muti. Imiti ya mipapa tayayandalele misambo ukulingana noyo muti, nangufye myengele iyikalamba nayo ine tayakumineko, iyoo. Ala mwibala lyakwa Lesa tamwali umuti uwapuuleme ngoyo muti." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ine nine naupulamike no kuwandalika imisambo. Ne miti yonse mu Edeni, mwibala lyakwa Lesa yaliufimbiile.’" 
Ezekiel31:10 “Kanshi ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Pantu uyo muti walilepele icakuti wafika na mu makumbi, nomba ilyo walepelako elyo walecililako ukulakwata icilumba." 
Ezekiel31:11 Kanshi ine nomba uyo muti naupeele mu minwe ya ntungulushi iya mishobo ya benafyalo, eyo iucitile ukulingana no bubi bwaiko. Naliuposele," 
Ezekiel31:12 na benafyalo nabo abalulunkana baliuwishishe, no kuusha naulambalala apo pene. Imisambo yauko ikakobenkanina mu mpili shonse, na mu mikonko yonse mu calo apo yaponene. Abantu ba mishobo yonse aboba mu cintelelwe cauko bakafumamo, bakaye no kuya."
