Ezekiel31:13 Ifyuni fyonse fikesa tongama pali uyo muti uukawa, ne nama shonse isha mu mpanga shikesa mukulaendauka mu misambo yauko." 
Ezekiel31:14 Eico kanshi ukutula pali nomba, umuti onse nangu ukatapililwe shani, awe takwakabe nelyo umo uukalepa kabili ngoyo muti, ne cilumba icakuti na kantongolilo kauko kakapule mu makumbi. Pantu imiti yonse ili nokufwa, yakulafwafye nga bantu bambi bonse abenakufwa, ala yakulafwa no kuya nabo ku calo ca bafwa.’" 
Ezekiel31:15 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ubushiku uyo muti ukaya ku calo ca bafwa, ine nkaleka amenshi ya mu mimana iyashika ukuuloosha. Nkacilika imimana, nshakaleke ilya mimana iyingi ikalepongwela. Pa mulandu wa uyo muti, ine nkaleta imfifi pa lupili lwa Lebanoni, nkaleka ne miti yonse mu mpanga ikome." 
Ezekiel31:16 Nalengele imishobo yonse ukuti itutume ku ciunda ca kuwa kwauko ilyo nauposele ku calo ca bafwa pamo nabo abaya ku nindi. Elyo imiti yonse iya mu Edeni, ne miti yonse iyapulama iya ku Lebanoni kabili iyitapililwa bwino ikatalalikwa kulya kwine panshi ya calo." 
Ezekiel31:17 Ikaya nankwe ku calo ca bafwa kukwikala pamo na bafwa kale, na bonse abaleikala mu cintelelwe ca uyu muti pakati ka mishobo ya benafyalo bakaya nao ku calo cabafwa, abafwile ku lupanga.’" 
Ezekiel31:18 “Uyo muti, ala ni Farao wine, imfumu ya Egupto, pamo na bantu bakwe abafulisha efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. Mu Edeni tamwali muti uwalepeshe no kupulamisha ngoyo muti. Elyo nomba ukaposwa mu calo ca bafwa pamo pene ne miti ya mu Edeni, kukuya ikala pamo na bantu abashasembululwa, balya abafwile ku lupanga. Ifi efyasosa imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Mu mwaka walenga ikumi limo na ibili (12), pa bushiku bwakutampa umweshi walenga ikumi na ibili (12) ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel32:2 “We mwana wa muntu, kebe Farao, imfumu ya Egupto. Kamwebe amashiwi yandi aya ayakutila, ‘Pa bantu ba mishobo yonse, iwe niwe wabapofye nge nkalamo, lelo kwena iwe wabafye nga cishimweshimwe icikala mu menshi, icifundaukafye mu mumana. Amakasa yobe yalafundaula amenshi no kulamfya imimana.’" 
Ezekiel32:3 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ilyo abantu ba mishobo iyingi bakalongana pamo, ine nkakwikata mwisumbu, nkaleke bakakukululwile na ku mulundu." 
Ezekiel32:4 Nkakufuntwila na pa mulundu, nkakufwanta na panshi, nkaleke ne fyuni fyonse pamo ne nama sha mpanga shonse fikakulye." 
Ezekiel32:5 Icitumbi cobe nkacisalanganya pa mpili, na mafupa yobe yakesule paa mu mawanga, umo yakalalukutila." 
Ezekiel32:6 Umulopa obe ukakumana pa calo, nao ukakupa na pa mpili, mu mikonko monse mukesula iminofu yobe." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ilyo nkakonaula, nkafimba ulwelele no kushimya intanda. Nkafimba amakumbi pa kasuba, no mweshi nao tawakabalike." 
Ezekiel32:8 Nkashimya ifyengelo fyonsefye ifya mu mulu, nkakupa ne mfifi pa calo cobe conse.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Abantu ba mishobo iyingi bakalasakamana ilyo umulandu wakonaika kobe nkausalanganishisha mu fyalo, ifyo iwe ushatala aumfwapo ukuti eko fyaba." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ifyo iwe nkakucita, ala fikasungusha abantu ba mishobo iyingi. Ilyo nkapambula ulupanga lwandi, ishamfumu shikacilimukila kulwa mwenso. Ubushiku iwe ukawa panshi, ishamfumu shonse shikalaikankilafye pa mulandu wakutiina, ukuti nakalimo nasho efyo cikaba." 
Ezekiel32:11 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Iwe ukakumana no lupanga lwa mfumu ya ku Babiloni ikakulimuna." 
Ezekiel32:12 Nkaleka abashilika ba mishobo ikali ababula uluse bakepaye ku lupanga ibumba ilikalamba ilya bantu bobe. Bakapwisha icilumba ca calo ca Egupto, na bantu bonse ababamo bakaloba." 
Ezekiel32:13 Nkalofya ne fitekwa fyaciko ifyaba mu lulamba lwa mimana yaciko. Takwakashale bantu abakufundaula amenshi nakabili, nangufye fitekwa fine ifyakuyafundaula awe nafyo fine takwakabe." 
Ezekiel32:14 Nkaleka amenshi yaciko yakaleikala, yakalelengama, ne mimana ikaleipitilafye tondolo nga mafuta,’ efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ilyo icalo ca Egupto nkacisangula amatololo, no kulofya bonse abaikalamo, elyo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel32:16 “Ala aya mashiwi ndebasoka yakasanguka ulwimbo lwa pa ndosha. Abanakashi ba mishobo ya benafyalo bakalalwimba pakuloosha icalo ca Egupto, kumo kwine na bantu baciko.” Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel32:17 Mu mwaka uwalengele ikumi limo na ibili (12), pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi limo na isano (15), ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel32:18 “We mwana wa muntu, pumapo umusowa uwakuloosha abena Egupto abashaifulila. Senda abena Egupto pamo na bantu ba mishobo iyacindama, ale batwale ku calo capanshi, ubatentemushishe pamo nabo abaya ku calo cabafwa." 
Ezekiel32:19 Elyo uye beba auti, “‘Tepapo, bushe imwe nimwe mwacila bonse ku busuma, batini? Aleni, laleni mu nindi sha bantu abashasembululwa.’" 
Ezekiel32:20 “Bakawila pamo na bantu abakafwila mu nkondo. Moneni ulupanga nalupambulwa ulwakwipailako Egupto na bantu bonse abashaifulila. 
Ezekiel32:21 Kanshi ukufuma ku calo cabafwa impalume shonse isha fita shikalanda palwa bena Egupto pamo na balebafwako abati, ‘Ala aba baisa no kwisa lala pamo na bashasembulwa, abo abafwilile mu nkondo.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Asiria ulya ali palya, ali pakati ka nindi sha bashilika bakwe bonse abafwilile ku lupanga," 
Ezekiel32:23 ne nindi shabo shibikwa pa ncende iyashika iya ku calo ca bafwa. Abashilika bakwe bonse bafwilile mu nkondo, ne nindi shabo shaposa inindi yakwe pakati. E aba bene bashilika bateekele icalo ca bomi ku kalili." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elamu ulya ali palya, ali pakati ka nindi sha bashilika bakwe. Bonse bafwile ku lupanga, ilyo balelwa inkondo. Bonse abacita impasase mu calo ca bomi nabaya ku calo cabafwa ukwabula ukusembululwa. Baya ne nsoni ishiya na bonse abaya ku calo ca bafwa mukonaika." 
Ezekiel32:25 Balipangile Elamu ubusanshi pakati ka bafwile mu nkondo, ne nindi yakwe ili pakati kabo. Na bonse aba, bantu abashasembululwa abafwile ku lupanga. Pa mulandu wakuti impasase balecita shasalangene mu calo ca bomi monse, baya ne nsoni ishiya na bonse abaya ku calo ca bafwa. Babashiika pamo nabo baipeye." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesheki Tubali nao ali palya pakati ka nindi sha bashilika bakwe. Balya bonse bantu abashasembululwa, kabili ni balya bantu bafwile mu nkondo ku lupanga pantu ebalya bantu balecita impasase mu calo ca bomi." 
Ezekiel32:27 Bushe bena tabalala apalala ababulwi abashasembululwa, abo bashiikile pamo ne fyanso fya nkondo, ne mitwe yabo yasaile pa mpanga shabo? No kukandwa kwa pa bubifi bwabo kwaba pa mafupa yabo nangu impasase shacitile aba ababulwi shali mu calo ca bomi." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Eico na iwe wine Farao, uli nokonaika no kuya lala pamo na bashasembululwa, balya abaipaiwe ku lupanga." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edomu nao ali kulya pamo ne shamfumu shakwe na bacilolo bakwe bonse. Bali abashilika abapambana, nomba pali ino nshita balilala kulya ku calo cabafwa, pamo na bantu abashasembululwa abafwilile mu nkondo." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Intungulushi shonse isha ku kapinda ka ku kuso nasho shili kulya kwine, pamo na bena Sidoni bonse. Kale ebaletiinya abantu ba mishobo ku mulandu wa bulamba bwabo, lelo pali nomba baliya ne nsoni kulya ku calo ca bafwa, no kulala eko balala ukwabula ukusembululwa pamo na bafwile ku lupanga." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. Ilyo Farao imfumu ya Egupto akabamona bonse, awe imfwa yakwe ikamutalalika umutima, pamo pene ne mfwa ine iya fita fyakwe fyonse ifyafwilile mu nkondo." 
Ezekiel32:32 Nangu ena namubomfeshe mukusalanganya umwenso mu calo ca bamweo lelo Farao ne fita fyakwe fyonse bali nokuya lala pamo na bashasembulwa abafwile ku nkondo.” Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. 
Ezekiel33:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel33:2 “We mwana wa muntu, eba abantu bobe ukuti ilyo ine nkemya inkondo muli cino calo, na bantu ba ico calo balasalapo umuntu wabo umo pakuti eo abe kalinda wabo," 
Ezekiel33:3 uyo kalinda nga amona uko abalwani balepalama, alisha ipenga pakucenjeshako abantu bonse." 
Ezekiel33:4 Lelo umutu umo nga taposeleko mano nangu omfwile ipenga, ninshi ena umulopa wakwe ukaba pa mutwe wakwe abalwani nga baisa mwipaya." 
Ezekiel33:5 Ninshi ukufwa kwakwe kwakuiletelelafye umwine ku mufulo wakwe, pa mulandu wakukanasakamana ipenga kufyo balemucenjeshako. Pantu akwata amano, nga kuti afulumuka no kupusuka." 
Ezekiel33:6 Nomba kalinda nga amona abalwani uko baleisa, akaana ukuti alishe ipenga pakucenjeshako abantu, ninshi kuti abalwani baisa bapumikisha balofya no bumi bwa umo. Kwena uyu muntu akafwila pa bubifi bwakwe, lelo ni kalinda eo ine nkapeela umulandu, no mulopa wakwe ukaba pa mutwe wakwa kalinda." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Kanshi iwe we mwana wa muntu, ine nomba nakucita kalinda wa ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. Niwe wakulabacenjeshako ifyo ine nakulakweba." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ine nga napingwilapo umubi umo ukufwa, elyo nobe taumusokeleko pakuti alule imisango yakwe, ninshi uyo mubi akafwila pa bubi bwakwe, lelo kwena niwe nkapeelelapo umulandu pa mfwa yakwe." 
Ezekiel33:9 Nomba iwe nga wasoka umuntu mubi, elyo ena akaana ukuleka ukubifya, ninshi akafwilapo pa bubifi bwakwe, lelo iwe ukapususha ubumi bobe.”" 
Ezekiel33:10 “We mwana wa muntu, eba aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli ukuti imwe mulasosa amuti, ‘Ifwe, awe twalifinininwa na bumpulamafunde bwesu ne fyabubifi ifyo twacita. Natuya tulepwilapo pa mulandu wafiko, bushe kuti twaikala shani abomi?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Bebe ukuti napalifye ine ne Mfumu Yawe Umumi ndeti, ‘Ala ine tacinsansamusha ukumona umuntu umubi uko alefwa. Ine nalitemwapo ukumona umuntu umubi uko aleleka ukubifya, pakuti aleikala umumi. Kanshi imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli lekeni imisango yenu iyibi, ala lekeni. Nga mulandu nshi mufwaila ukufwa mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli?’" 
Ezekiel33:12 “We mwana wa muntu, kanshi nomba eba abantu bobe ukuti umuntu umololoke nga abifya, ninshi filya ifisuma ifyo alecita kale tafyakamupusushe iyoo. Umuntu umubi nga aleka ukubifya, ninshi ububi bwakwe ubwakale tabwakamuletelele iyoo. Nao muntu umololoke nga abifya, awe ninshi takaleikala mumi nakalya." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ine nga nalaya ukupeela umuntu mololoke umo ubumi, nomba nao kabili alatetekela ubololoke bwakwe, elyo alabifya kabili, awe ine ninshi pa fisuma fyakwe ifyakale nshakebukishepo nelyo cimo. Akafwilafye pa bubi bwakwe." 
Ezekiel33:14 Nomba ine nga nasoka umubi ukuti ulefwa, nao aleka ukubifya, alacita ifisuma kabili ifyalungama," 
Ezekiel33:15 kanshi ntilefye, abwesha ifikatila mulandu pafyo akongweseshe, abwesha nefyo aibile, emukuti uyo muntu nga aleka ukubifya, alakonka ne fipope ifileta ubumi, ala ninshi takafwe iyoo, akalaikalafye umumi." 
Ezekiel33:16 Ine nkamubelelako uluse ku fibi fyakwe fyonse ifyo acitile kale. Akalaikala umumi ku kuwamya kwakwe na ku kulungika kwakwe. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Lelo abekalacalo banobe balasosa ukuti, ‘Ifyo Yawe acita, awe tafyalolamo.’ Ala nakalyafye, misangofye yabo eishalolamo." 
Ezekiel33:18 Umuntu umololoke nga aleka ukuwamya, atampa no kulabifya, ninshi akafwilapo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Umuntu mubi nao nga aleka ukubifya kwakwe, alawamya no kulalungika, ninshi uyo muntu akapusuka." 
Ezekiel33:20 Lelo imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli mulesosa ukuti ifyo ncita ine ne Yawe Lesa tafyalolamo, mwa? Ala bonsefye imwe ine nkamupingula cila umo ukulingana nefyo mucita.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Mu mwaka walengele ikumi na ibili (12), ninshi tucili muli bunkole, pa bushiku bwalenga shisano mu mweshi walenga ikumi, umuntu umo uwapusumwikemo mu Yerusalemu, aishile njeba ukuti nabapoka umusumba." 
Ezekiel33:22 Nomba icungulo, libe ulya muntu uwapuswike talafika, ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwali pali ine, kabili akakula na kanwa kandi libe talati afike kuli ine ulucelo. Ilyo Yawe akakwile akanwa kandi, nshatalile mba cibulu nakabili." 
Ezekiel33:23 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaisa kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel33:24 “We mwana wa muntu, abantu abaikala mu misumba iyaonaika mu calo ca Israeli, bena balasosa abati, ‘Abrahamu alifye eka lilya apeelwe cino calo. Pali nomba ifwe natufula, kanshi nifwe bene twapeelwa icalo ukuba cesu.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Cisuma bebelepo ukuti ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Imwe mulalya inama iyabamo umulopa. Kabili mulapepa utulubi no kusumya umulopa, bushe imwe nimwe mwingapeelwa icalo?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Mutetekela impanga shenu ishakulwilako. Mulacita ne fyabunani. Mulacita no bucende na bamukabene, bushe imwe nimwe mwingapeelwa icalo?’" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Bebe ukuti, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Napalifye ine ne Mumi ndeti, abashala mu fibolya bakafwa ku lupanga. Abaikala mu mpanga bakabalya ku nama sha mpanga. Abafisama mu malinga na mu ncengo sha mabwe bakafwa ku cikuko." 
Ezekiel33:28 Icalo ine nkacisangula amatololo. Amaka baitakisha, yakapwa. Impili sha mu Israeli shikasapa icakuti takwakalemoneka muntu uukalapitamo." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ilyo nkalimuna abantu palwa kubifya kwabo, no kusangula icalo cabo amatololo, lyena elyo bakashininkisha ukuti ine nine Yawe.’”" 
Ezekiel33:30 “Nomba palwa iwe, we mwana wa muntu, abekalacalo balakulandapo ilyo bakumanina pa fibumba fya musumba, nangu ilyo bali pa minshi ya mayanda yabo. Balashinishanya abati, ‘Natuye umfwako amashiwi yafumine kuli Yawe.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Kanshi abantu besa kuli iwe ngefyo bafwile ukwisa, no kwisa ikala pa ntanshi yobe nga bantu bandi mukumfwa ifyo ulelanda, lelo balafilwa ukuficita. Ku tunwa twabo balanda ukusumina kwati nabakutemwa lelo imitima yabo ikonkamofye ubunonshi." 
Ezekiel33:32 Bena iwe bakumonafye nge ŋomba iyileimba inyimbo ishakutemuna, atemwa ngo muntu uulelisha bwino icilimba. Amashiwi yobe yonse balayomfwa, lelo ukuti baleyakonka, cena calyafya nganshi." 
Ezekiel33:33 Nomba ilyo fikafikila ifyo iwe usosa, na mu cacine fikafikila, lyena elyo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi balikele na kasesema wine wine pakati kabo.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel34:2 “We mwana wa muntu, sesema no kusoka bakacema ba bena Israeli, useseme no kweba bakacema auti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, mwashama imwe mwe bakacema ba bena Israeli, mwe baisakamanafye. Bushe bakacema tabafwile ukusakamana impaanga?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Muipakisha umukaka washiko, mufwala ne nsalu ishabilwa na masako ya mpaanga shine, mulepayapo impaanga ishaina, no kulya mulalya, elyo nomba ukuti muleshisunga, awe kwena nakalya." 
Ezekiel34:4 Imwe tamusunga mpaanga ishishilakosa, tamundapa ishalwala, tamukakila ishileba ne filonda, tamulondola ishilubantika, nangu ukuya mulafwaya ishileluba. Imwe mushitekela mu bukali no buluku, epela." 
Ezekiel34:5 Impaanga shalisalangana, ne fiswango filashikata no kushilya, pa mulandu wakukanaba na bakacema abakushicema." 
Ezekiel34:6 Ala e mulandu wine kanshi impaanga shandi shilulumbilafye pa tupili na pa mpili ishitali. Eco kanshi shasalanganinafye mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse, ukwabula nelyo umo uwakuti asakamaneko, nangufye ukweshako ukushifwaya fwaya.’" 
Ezekiel34:7 “Kanshi nomba imwe mwe bakacema, umfweni ifyo ine ne Yawe nalamweba." 
Ezekiel34:8 Napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, pa mulandu wakuti impaanga shandi tashakwata kacema, shilekatwa no kuliwa ku fiswango elyo kabili na imwe bene mwe bakacema bandi tamweshako na kushilondola, pa mulandu wakuti mwaliisakamana mwe bene ukwabula ukuposa amano ku mpaanga shandi," 
Ezekiel34:9 eico umfweni kuli ine imwe mwe bakacema. 
Ezekiel34:10 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ine nomba nasangukila bakacema, bena nomba baba abalwani bandi. Nkabapoka impaanga shandi, tabakatale abashicema nakabili iyoo. Bena nkabafyombotola impaanga shandi, nshakaleke bakaleshilyapo awe.’" 
Ezekiel34:11 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ine ne Yawe Lesa ndemweba ukuti ine wine nine nkafwaya impaanga shandi, kabili nine wine nkashisunga." 
Ezekiel34:12 Nga filya fine kacema asunga impaanga shakwe ishisalangene, efyo na ine ndi nokusunga impaanga shandi. Nkashipokolola konse uko shasalanganine pali bulya bushiku bwa cikutika ne mfifi." 
Ezekiel34:13 Nkashifumya mu fyalo fya bantu ba mishobo iyalekana lekana. Nkashilonganika, nkashibweseshe na mu calo cashiko. Nkalashicemena mu mpili sha mu Israeli, ku mikonko, na mu ncende shonsefye ishaikalamo abantu." 
Ezekiel34:14 Nkalashicemena umwaba umulemfwe usuma, mu mpili, na ku milonga, na mu ncende shonse isha mulemfwe ishaba mu calo ca mu Israeli. Emo shikalatuushisha mu mulemfwe usuma no kulya icani iciteku ku mpili sha mu Israeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Nine wine nkalacema impaanga shandi, kabili nine wine nkalashifwaila na pakuti shikaletuushisha.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel34:16 “Ine nkaya ndafwaya impaanga ishaluba, nkalalondola ishilelubantika, nkalakakila ishileba ne filonda, nkalaundapa ishilwele, lelo ishatuluka ne shakosa nkashonaula. Nkacema umukuni mu mulinganya." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Kanshi nomba imwe mwe mukuni wandi, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nkapingula pakati ka mpaanga imo ne ibiye, nkapatulula impaanga ku mbushi." 
Ezekiel34:18 Bamo pali imwe balitendwa ukulya umulemfwe uwawamisha, balemenenafye nomba ukulanyantauka pafyo bashilya. Balitendwa ukunwa amenshi ayalengama, balemenenafye nomba ukulayafundaula." 
Ezekiel34:19 Elyo impaanga shandi shimbi bushe eshili nokulalya ifyo imwe mulenyantaukapo, eshili nokulanwa amenshi ayo imwe mulefundaula.’" 
Ezekiel34:20 “Kanshi nomba ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndemweba ukuti ine nkapingula imwe mwe mpaanga ishaina, na imwe mwe shaonda." 
Ezekiel34:21 Impaanga ishishakosoboka imwe mulashituna no kulashipunka ne nsengo shenu pakuti shilefuma pebumba. 
Ezekiel34:22 Nine nkapususha impaanga shandi, nshakaleke bakaleshicusha nakabili. Nkapingula pakati ka mpaanga imo ne ibiye." 
Ezekiel34:23 Nkabuula umubomfi wandi Davidi eo akabe kacema washiko umofye, no kushisunga eo akaleshisunga." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ine ne Yawe nine nkalaba Lesa washiko, no mubomfi wandi Davidi eukalaba kateeka washiko. Efyasosa Yawe." 
Ezekiel34:25 Nkapangana nabo icipangano icakuti icishininkisho ukuti shikalaikala umutelelwe. Mu calo nkafumyamo ifiswango fyonse, pakuti impaanga shandi shikaleiikalila ku matwi tondolo mu ncende umo shikalacemenwa, nangufye shisendame mu mutengo mwine." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Nkalashipaala, nkaleka shikaleikala monse mu mbali ya lupili lwandi ulwamushilo. Nkalashilokesha imfula iyalinga pa nshita shikalaikabila." 
Ezekiel34:27 Imiti ikalatwala ifitwalo, mu mabala mukalaba ifisabo, na bantu bonse umo umo bakalaiikalila mu fifulo fyabo ku matwi tondolo. Ilyo nkaputaula iminyololo iyo bakakako abantu bandi, no kubalubula ku babateeka ubusha, elyo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel34:28 Imishobo ya benafyalo tayakabwekeshepo nakabili ukulabawililila, ne fiswango fine tafyakalebekata nakabili iyoo. Bakalaikala umutelelwe, takwakalemoneka wakubatiinya nakabili." 
Ezekiel34:29 Mu mabala yabo ine nkalameshamo ifisabo ifine fine, na mu calo cabo ine nkapwishamo insala. Abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo tabakabwekeshepo ukubasuula." 
Ezekiel34:30 Elyo abantu bonse bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine ne Yawe nine Lesa wabo, nokuti kanshi aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bantu bandi. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel34:31 “Nimwe mwe mpaanga shandi, umukuni wa mpaanga shandi, muli bantu bandi, na ine ndi Lesa wenu. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel35:2 “We mwana wa muntu, sesema uloshe amenso ku lupili lwa Seiri," 
Ezekiel35:3 kabili usose auti, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “‘Ine ninkwalukila we lupili lwa Seiri, ninkwimisha ukuboko kwandi kabili ndekusangula amatololo umushakabe kantu." 
Ezekiel35:4 Imisumba yobe ine nkaicita ifibolya, na mu calo cobe tamwakekale umuntu. Elyo ukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel35:5 “‘Pa mulandu wakuti wali ne mpatila iyamutatakuya iyakupata abena Israeli, no kuleka babepaye ilyo baponenwe ne shamo, pali ilya nshita ukukandwa pa kubifya kwabo kwakulishe." 
Ezekiel35:6 Kanshi napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, niwe nomba ukafwilapo, tawakamone pakulukuntila. Walikwata umulandu palwa bupondo bobe, no bupondo bobe tawakabukunte." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ulupili lwa Seiri ine nkalusangula amatololo umushakaleba kantu, kabili nkalaipaya na onse uukalapitamo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Pa mpili shobe ine nkafimbapo ifitumbi fya bantu, ne fitumbi fya bantu abakafwa mu nkondo fikakupa pa tupili tobe na mu mawanga na mu mikonko yobe mwine." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ine nkakusangula amatololo ya pe, takwakamoneke nelyo umo uukalaikala nakabili mu misumba yobe. Elyo ukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel35:10 “‘Umushobo wa bena Yuda, no mushobo wa bena Israeli kumo kwine ne fyalo fyabo, iwe walisosele ukuti e fyuma fyobe ifili nokuba mu maboko yobe, nangu ine ne Yawe naba nabo." 
Ezekiel35:11 Kanshi napalifye ine ne Mumi, ne Mfumu Yawe ndeti, ine nomba nkalandula pa cipyu cobe, na pa mufimbila obe, na pa mpatila yobe iyo wakwatila abantu bandi. Elyo nabo bakashininkisha ukuti ine ndekulimwina pafyo wabacitile." 
Ezekiel35:12 Elyo ukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine ne Yawe ndomfwa uko iwe ulanda amashiwi yamusaalula auti, “Mu mpili sha mu Israeli ala tamwaba kantu nangu kamo, kabili shalipeelwa kuli ifwe kukonaulwa.”" 
Ezekiel35:13 Ine ndomfwa amashiwi yobe yonse ayamataki, ayakuti ulanda icilande lande pali ine. Ala ndomfwafye fyonse.’" 
Ezekiel35:14 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ilyo isonde lyonse lileyanga, ine nkakusangula amatololo." 
Ezekiel35:15 Nga filya fine nobe wine wasansamwike pakumona icalo ca bantu bandi aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli uko caonaika, iwe Seiri we calo ca mpili, ala iwe we calo conse ica Edomu, ukashala amatololo. Elyo na bantu bonse bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’”" 
Ezekiel36:1 “We mwana wa muntu, sesema ku mpili sha mu Israeli kabili sosa auti, ‘Owe mwe mpili sha mu Israeli umfweni amashiwi yakwa Yawe.’" 
Ezekiel36:2 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Abalwani bakwa Israeli balacankwa abati, “Eeya. Shilya mpili shakale nomba cuma cesu.” ’" 
Ezekiel36:3 “Nomba sesema kabili utile, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ilyo abantu ba mishobo ya mumbali bapokele no kutapa impili sha mu Israeli, bonse balewela Israeli no kumulandila ifibi pamo no musaalula.’" 
Ezekiel36:4 Kanshi nomba umfweni ishiwi lya Mfumu Yawe. ‘Ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndemweba imwe mwe mpili, na imwe mwe tupili, na imwe mwe mikonko, na imwe mwe mawanga, nemwe mwe ncende ishashala amatololo, na mwe misumba iyashala ifibolya, mwebo abantu ba mishobo ya mumbali yaonawile no kulawela." 
Ezekiel36:5 Ine ne Mfumu Yawe ninkalipila nganshi abantu ba mishobo iyaba mumbali, palibufi Edomu ena eo ncishishepo. Abantu kulwa cilumba cabo ne misuula yabo balipoka icalo candi, ne ncende ishakucemenamo shalisanguka ishabo." 
Ezekiel36:6 “‘Kanshi niwe sesemena icalo ca Israeli amashiwi yandi, impili no tupili, imikonko na mashika, fyebe amashiwi yandi ayo ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndelanda cipyu cipyu kulwa bufuba, pantu filatukwa na bantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ine ne Mfumu Yawe nasumbula ukuboko kwandi no kulapa ukuti bakasebana abantu ba mishobo iyaba mumbali. 
Ezekiel36:8 “‘Mu mpili sha mu Israeli mwena mukalamena imiti nakabili, no kulatwalamo ifitwalo ifyakuti mukalelya imwe mwe bantu bandi abena Israeli, pantu mwalaswa mubwelele bwangu bwangu kumyenu." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ine ndi nenu, nalimusakamana kabili nkamukwatila uluse ndefwaisha ukuti mukalelima umushili wenu, no kulabyalamo imbuto." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ine nkamufusha mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bonse, mukaba abengi. Mukalaikala mu misumba, no kulabuukulula ifibolya." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ine nkafusha abantu, nkafusha ne fitekwa fine. Mukafulilako ukucila ifyo mwali kale, kabinge mukalakwata na bana abengi. Nkaleka mukaleikalamo ngefyo mwaleikalamo kale, kabili nkaleka mukashuuke ifyo mushatalile amushuuka kale. Lyena elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel36:12 Imwe mwe mpili, ala ine nkabweseshamo abantu bandi abena Israeli kuno kuli imwe, pakuti bakalenyanta pa mushili wenu. Mukaba icuma cabo icacishilano, tamwakatale nakabili amwipaya abana babo iyoo.’" 
Ezekiel36:13 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Pantu abantu basosa ukuti imwe mwe mpili mulalya abantu, nokuti imwe mulepaya abana ba mushobo wenu," 
Ezekiel36:14 nomba ukufuma pali lelo imwe tamwakulalya abantu, nangu ukwipaila umushobo wenu abana.’ Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel36:15 ‘Ine nshilefwaya ukuti nakabili mukaleumfwa uko abantu ba mishobo balemutuka no kumuwela. Tamwakatale amusuulwa ku mishobo imbi nakalya, nangu kupunwisha umushobo wenu. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.’”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Nakabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel36:17 “We mwana wa muntu, pa nshita aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli baleikala mu calo cabo, awe balicikowesha ku mikalile yabo na ku micitile yabo. Kuli ine, imyendele yabo yali iyabunani kwati mwanakashi uuli kumpepo." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ine napongolwele icipyu candi pali bena, pantu balisumyamo umulopa mu calo, no kucikowesha pa mulandu wakupepa utulubi." 
Ezekiel36:19 Nalibapeele umulandu palwa mikalile yabo na palwa micitile yabo, no kubasalanganya nalibasalanganishishe mu fyalo fya mishobo ya benafyalo." 
Ezekiel36:20 Elyo kabili konsefye uko baya, nako kwine tabancindika iyoo, pantu abantu balabalandapo abati, ‘Aba bantu mulemona bantu bakwa Yawe, lelo ebalya bantu abo atamfya mu calo ico abapeele.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Ici cintu ine calilenga ukuti nsakamane palwa lulumbi lwandi, pantu aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli balindetele insoni pakati ka mishobo yonse uko baile." 
Ezekiel36:22 “Kanshi nomba iwe Esekieli, eba aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli aya mashiwi ayo ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndebeba nati, ‘Ifyo ine nalaswa ncite, te pa mulandu wa imwe iyoo, ine mpamfiwe palwa lulumbi lwandi, pantu imwe mwalindetela insoni ku mishobo yonse uko mwasalanganine." 
Ezekiel36:23 Nga nalanga abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo ifyo ine naba Uwamushilo, nangula imwe mwandetele insoni kuli bena, lyena bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe,’ efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. Kabili imwe nimwe nkaleka mukeshibishe imishobo ya benafyalo ukuti ine ndi Wamushilo." 
Ezekiel36:24 Pantu ine nkamufumya ku mishobo ya benafyalo, na mu fyalo fimbi fyonse, no kumubwesesha mu calo cenu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ine nkamukana amenshi ayasuma kabili mukasanguluka. Ndi nokumusangulula ku fyakukowesha fyonse na ku tulubi tonse. 
Ezekiel36:26 Ine nkamupeela umutima uupya kabili nkabikamo umupashi uupya muli imwe. Nkafumyamo umutima wa libwe muli imwe no kumupeela umutima wa munofu. 
Ezekiel36:27 Kabili nkabika muli imwe Umupashi wandi, no kumulenga ukukonka ifipope fyandi no kuposa amano kukusunga amafunde yandi." 
Ezekiel36:28 Mukalaikala mu calo ico ine napeele ifikolwe fyenu. Mukaba abantu abandifye, na ine nkaba Lesa uwenu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Nkalamupususha ku fyamukowesha fyonse. Nkalenga ne ŋanu ukulafulisha, epakuti nakabili mwikalaponenwa ne cipowe." 
Ezekiel36:30 Nkalaleka imiti yenu ikaletwalisha ifitwalo, no kulafusha ifisabo mu mabala yenu, epakuti mwikalaponenwa nakabili icipowe icakumuletela insoni ku bantu ba mishobo." 
Ezekiel36:31 Elyo mukalaibukisha imyendele yenu iyibi iyakale, ne micitile yenu iyakale, elyo nomba na mwe bene mukaleipata pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyenu ne fyabunani fyenu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ndefwaya mwishibe bwino ukuti ine nshilecita ifi fintu fyonse pa mulandu wenu iyoo. Ine ndefwayafye muleumfwa insoni, pantu mulaisebanya pa fintu ifyo imwe mucita. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.’" 
Ezekiel36:33 “Kabili ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Pa bushiku nkamusangulula ku fyabubifi fyenu, elyo nkamuleka mukaleikala mu misumba yenu nakabili, no kumuleka mukakuule cipya cipya ifibolya." 
Ezekiel36:34 Bonsefye abapita mu mabala yenu, balamona ifyo yasapilwa, nomba ine nkaleka mukalelimamo nakabili." 
Ezekiel36:35 Elyo bonse bakalalanda abati, “Tambeni icalo icali kale amatololo, moneni nomba ifyo cili kwati libala lya Edeni. Ne misumba iyabongolweke kale no kutapwa, no kushala ifibolya, moneni nomba ifyo baikuulile cipya cipya, no kukuulililako amalinga, nefyo abantu nomba baleikalamo.”" 
Ezekiel36:36 Elyo abantu ba mishobo iyaba mumbali abakashalapo, bakashininkisha ukuti nine ne Yawe nkuulile cipya cipya iyi misumba iyaonaike, no kubukulula amabala ayaonaike. Nine ne Yawe nalanda, no kucita efyo ine nkacita." 
Ezekiel36:37 “‘Kabili ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndesosa ukuti, nakabili nkaleka aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bakalemfwaya, pakuti ndebafwako. Nkaleka abantu babo bakafulishe nge mpaanga." 
Ezekiel36:38 Abantu bakafulisha nge mikuni yakutuula ilambo pa bushiku bwa nshikunkulu ubwasontwa. Efyo imisumba iyaonaike ikesulamo amabumba ya bantu. Elyo abantu bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’” 
Ezekiel37:1 Ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwali pali ine elyo ansenda mu Mupashi wakwe, antwala na mwishika umwaiswile amafupa ya bantu." 
Ezekiel37:2 Elyo Yawe ampisha mwishika, na ine namona ukuti muli amafupa ya bantu ayengi, kabili nayo ayauma umuswalala." 
Ezekiel37:3 Epakunjipusha ati, “We mwana wa muntu, bushe muli aya mafupa kuti mwabwelela ubumi nakabili?” Na ine nayasuka nati, “We Mfumu Yawe, we wishibe niwe.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Elyo anjeba ati, “Sesemena aya mafupa amashiwi yandi. Uyebe auti, ‘Mwe mafupa ayauma umfweni ishiwi lyakwa Yawe." 
Ezekiel37:5 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ku mafupa ati, ine nkamuputilishamo umupu no kumubweseshamo ubumi." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ine nalamubikako imishipa ne minofu elyo ne nkanda ifimbepo. Nalamuputilishamo umupu no kumubweseshamo ubumi. Elyo mwalashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.’” 
Ezekiel37:7 Kanshi na ine epakusesema ngomo bankonkomeseshe. Kuti ilyo ncili ndesesema, awe naumfwafye amafupa yalati mpampampa, yatampa no kulalundikana ifupa pe fupa." 
Ezekiel37:8 Pa nshita ine iyo ndetamba, awe amafupa yaba ne mishipa, kwaba ne minofu, ne nkanda yafimbapo. Lelo tabalepema nakalya." 
Ezekiel37:9 Elyo Yawe anjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, sesemena umwela. Eba umwela ukuti ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Isa we mupu utule mu tupinda tune, wise upupile muli ifi fitumbi pakuti fibe no bumi nakabili.’”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Kanshi na ine epakulasesema ngomo mwine akonkomeseshe. Awe no mupu waingila mu fitumbi, na bantu babuka, baiminina no kwiminina, nalyo ibumba lya bantu ilishaikulila ilya fita." 
Ezekiel37:11 Elyo Yawe alanjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, aya mafupa e bantu bonse aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. Bena batila, ‘Ifwe twalyuma umuswalalala, tatusubila kantu, twalilobelela.’" 
Ezekiel37:12 Kanshi sesemena abantu bandi amashiwi yandi, bebe ukuti ine ne Mfumu Yawe nkesula inindi shabo, nkabafumyamo no kubabwesesha mu calo ca Israeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Inindi shabo isho abantu bandi bashiikwamo, ilyo ine nkashisula no kubafumyamo elyo mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ine nkamuputilishamo Umupashi wandi, nkamubwesesha no bumi, no kuleka mukaleikala mu calo cenu. Elyo no kushininkisha bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe nalanda, ala no kucita efyo ine nkacita. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel37:16 “We mwana wa muntu, ale buula inkonto iya cimuti, lembapo auti, ‘Ubufumu bwakwa Yuda no bwa bana bakwa Israeli abaikatana nankwe.’ Elyo kabili buula inkonto ya cimuti imbi, lembapo auti, ‘Icimuti cakwa Efulemu, icaba cakwa Yosefu, na ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli yonse abaikatana nankwe.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Elyo wikatanye inkonto shonse shibili mu minwe yobe, pakuti shibe kwati ni nkonto imo." 
Ezekiel37:18 Ilyo abanobe balekwipusha umo ici cilolele," 
Ezekiel37:19 ubebe ukuti ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nkabuula iyo nkonto yakwa Yosefu, iyaba mu minwe yakwa Efulemu, iyalembwapo inko sha bena Israeli ishikatana nao, no kuikakatanya pamo neyo nkonto ya bena Yuda. Nkashisangula inkonto imofye, kabili shikasanguka imo mu minwe yandi.’" 
Ezekiel37:20 “Ala iwe ikatanya inkonto isho shibili isho ulembelepofye, leka na bantu bashimone." 
Ezekiel37:21 Bebe ukuti, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Nkafumya abena Israeli mu mishobo ya bena mupalamano umo baya, nkabalonganya pamo, elyo nkababweseshe na mu calo cabo." 
Ezekiel37:22 Nkabakumbinkanya pamo pakuti bakabe umushobo umo winefye mu calo, mu mpili sha Israeli. Bakakwata imfumu imofye iyikalabateeka. Tabakabe nakabili imishobo ibili, kabili no bufumu bwabo tabwakapatukane pabili iyoo" 
Ezekiel37:23 Tabakaleikowesha ku tulubi nakabili, nangu ukulaikowesha ku fyabipa ne ifyamakankamike. Nkalabapususha ku misango yabo yonse iyalelenga ukuti balebifya no kulansangukila. Nkabasangulula, nabo bakalaba abantu abandifye, na ine nkalaba Lesa uwabofye.’" 
Ezekiel37:24 “Umubomfi wandi Davidi eukaba imfumu yabo. Bonse bakakwatafye kacema umo, bakalanakila amafunde yandi no kusunga ifipope fyandi." 
Ezekiel37:25 Bakalaikala mu calo ico napeele umubomfi wandi Yakobo, umo ne fikolwe fyabo fyaleikala. Emo abene bakalaikala pe pamo na bana babo bene, kumo kwine ne finshikulula fyabo fine. Umubomfi wandi Davidi eukalabateeka pe na pe." 
Ezekiel37:26 Nkapangana nabo icipangano icamutende, icikaba icakubelelela pe. Nkabasandulula bakabe abengi, kabili ine nkasonta ne cifulo candi icamushilo mu calo cabo, no kubelelela emo cikabelelela pe." 
Ezekiel37:27 Tukalaikalamo nabo, kabili ine nkalaba Lesa uwabofye, nabo bakalaba abantu abandifye." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ilyo nkasontamo icifulo candi icamushilo icikabelelela pe, elyo imishobo ya benafyalo ikashininkisha ukuti kanshi nine ne Yawe naipatwila ne mwine abena Israeli ukuti babe abamushilo.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Ezekiel38:2 “We mwana wa muntu, sesema uloleshe Gogi pakumukalipila, ulya aba mu calo ca Magogi. E ntungulushi nkalamba iyateeka umushobo wa bena Mesheki no wa bena Tubali. Kamukalipile," 
Ezekiel38:3 no kumweba uye mweba ukuti ifi efyasosa imfumu Yawe ati, ‘We Gogi, we ntungulushi nkalamba ya bena Mesheki na bena Tubali, ninkwalukila, uli mulwani wandi nomba." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ine nkakupilibula, no kukutunga ifinkobwe mu nsekete shobe, pakuti nkakukululule pamo pene ne fita fyobe fyonse. Ine nkakukululula, nkakululula na bakabalwe bobe bonse na bonse abendelapo ne fyanso, ne bumba lyonse ilishaikulila ilya fita, ilyenda ne nkwela na mapanga." 
Ezekiel38:5 Pesia, Kushi na Puti bonse bakaba nobe bakakwata inkwela no tumpompo." 
Ezekiel38:6 Nkakukululwila pamo ne calo ca Gomeri ne fita fyaciko, ne ca Beti Togama ica ku ncende ukutali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso pamo ne fita fyaciko fyonse, elyo na bantu bonse ababa na iwe.’" 
Ezekiel38:7 “Kanshi we Gogi fwalila, upekanye ne fita fyobe fyonse pakuti fikubombele." 
Ezekiel38:8 Panuma ya nshiku ishingi mukalonganikwa. Ilyo pakapita imyaka iyingi, kukaba inshita imo ilyo ine nkakupeela icebo icakusansa icalo cimo, umo abantu baikala umutelelwe ico tamwaba inkondo, ukutulafye apo balonganine ukufuma mu mishobo imbi iyingi no kwisa fika ku mpili sha mu Israeli ishashele amatololo pa nshita ntali. Kwena aba abantu basendelwe ukufuma mu mishobo kabili baikalilafye nomba ku matwi tondolo." 
Ezekiel38:9 Iwe wine pamo ne fita fyobe, na bantu ba mishobo iyingi, mukema nge cimwela pakusansa icalo, kabili mukacikupa nge kumbi.”" 
Ezekiel38:10 Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, “Ndekweba iwe Gogi ukuti ilyo iyo nshita ikafika, iwe ukatampa ukulatontonkanya amapange ayabipa." 
Ezekiel38:11 Ukalapanga ukusansa icalo icakaele, ico abantu baikalilamo ku matwi tondolo, mu mishi iyishakwata amalinga nangu imipindo elyo ne mpongolo ifyakuipokolwelamo abene." 
Ezekiel38:12 Ukatapa abantu abaikala mu misumba iyali kale ifibolya, ebalya bantu bafuma mu mishobo ya benafyalo no kulongana pamo, pantu nomba nabakwata ifitekwa ne fyuma, kabili no kwikala baikala pakati ka calo conse." 
Ezekiel38:13 Abena Sheba, na bena Dedani, na bashimakwebo ba ku Tashishi bakakwipusha abati, ‘Bushe ni kukutapa ifyuma wishile? Ico ulonganikile ifita, bushe ni kukutapa silifa, na golide, ne fitekwa, ne fyuma, elyo ukuya nafyo umupili, mwa?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Kanshi we mwana wa muntu sesemena Gogi amashiwi ayakuti, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Pali bulya bushiku ilyo abantu bandi abena Israeli bakekala mu cibote, bushe cine cine tawakacishibe?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Ukafuma uko kumobe ukutali ukushailepela, ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Ukese ne bumba ilikalamba ilya bashilika abapambana, abakafuma mu mishobo iyingi, bonse bakeshila pali bakabalwe babo." 
Ezekiel38:16 Elyo ukawililile abantu bandi abena Israeli, nga filya fine icimwela cicita pa calo. Ilyo iyo nshita ikafika, ine nkesa kutuma ukusansa icalo candi, epakuti nkalange abantu ba mishobo ifyo ine naba, kabili no kubalanga bumushilo pa cinso cabo ukupitila muli iwe.’" 
Ezekiel38:17 “Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Niwe nalelandapo mu nshita shakale, ilyo nalesobela ku babomfi bandi bakasesema aba mu calo ca Israeli, ukuti inshita imo nkaletapo umuntu umo uwakuti akese wililila icalo ca Israeli." 
Ezekiel38:18 Muli ubo bushiku ilyo Gogi akalwisha icalo ca Israeli, icipyu candi cikema.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel38:19 Pa mulandu wa kupimpa kwandi ne cipyu icikali, nalapa ukuti mukabe icinkukuma icikalamba mu calo ca Israeli." 
Ezekiel38:20 Isabi lya muli bemba, ifyuni fya mu lwelele, ne nama sha mu mpanga shonse, icibumbwa conse icikulika pa mushili, fikalaikankilafye kulwa mwenso, na bantu bonse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse nabo bene cikabafye cimo cine. Impili shikasholomoka, ifipuma fya mpili fikamokaika, na malinga yonse yakawishiwa panshi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Nkaleta amasanso aya misango yonse pakutiinya Gogi. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe. Na bantu bonse bakemina bamunyina ne mpanga. 
Ezekiel38:22 Pakumulimuna ine nkamuletela icikuko, no kusumya umulopa. Nkapongolwela pali Gogi pamo ne fita fyakwe, na bantu ba mishobo iyingi abo akaba nabo, icipungufula, ne mfula ya mabwe, no musolilo, na bamunyela abamulilo." 
Ezekiel38:23 Efyo ine nkalanga ubukulu bwandi nokuti ndi Wamushilo, nkaisokolola ku menso ya mishobo iyingi. Kabili elyo abantu bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “We mwana wa muntu, sesema pakukalipila Gogi utile, ‘Ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ifyakuti, ine ninkwalukila iwe Gogi, we kateeka mukalamba wa bena Mesheki na bena Tubali." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ndi nokukupilibula no kukulosha kumbi, nkakufumya uko ukutali ku kapinda ka ku kuso, nkakufishe na ku mpili sha mu Israeli." 
Ezekiel39:3 Elyo nkakuume ku kuboko kobe ukwa ku kuso pakuti ukaponye ubuta bobe, pamo ne mifwi yobe iyo ukekata ku kulyo nayo ikaponene panshi." 
Ezekiel39:4 Ukafwila pa mpili sha mu Israeli, pamo pene ne fita fyobe na bantu bene aba mishobo imbi abo ukaba nabo. Nkaleka ne fyuni ne fiswango fikalelya ifitumbi fyenu." 
Ezekiel39:5 Mukafwila pa mbilibili mu mpanga pantu nine nalanda, efyasosa Mfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel39:6 Mu calo ca Magogi, na mu lulamba lonse ulwa bemba umo abantu baikalila ku matwi tondolo, ine nkocamo umulilo, elyo na bantu bonse bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe." 
Ezekiel39:7 “‘Nkalenga abantu bandi abena Israeli bakeshibe ishina lyandi ilyamushilo, nshakaleke bakalesebanya nakabili ishina lyandi ilyamushilo iyoo. Elyo ne mishobo ya benafyalo ikashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine ne Yawe, nine Wamushilo uwaba pakati ka bena Israeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Buli mukwisa, cine cine buli nokufika, efyasosa imfumu Yawe. Ubu e bushiku ubo nalelandapo." 
Ezekiel39:9 “‘Abantu abaikala mu misumba ya mu Israeli bakalaima, bakalaya mukulatola ifyanso ifikashala nsale nsale, pakuti bakalefyoca. Inkwela, ne fyakuicingililako, amata ne mifwi, ne nkonto na mafumo, bakaficita icininkwa ca mulilo icikalapya pa myaka cine lubali." 
Ezekiel39:10 Tabakaleteba nkuni mu mpanga ishakukosesha umulilo, nangu ukulatema ifimuti mu mitengo iyoo, pantu ifyanso ifikashala nsale nsale efyo bakalakosesha umulilo. Bakatapa ifyuma ku bantu bene balya ababatapile, elyo bakapokolola ifyuma ku babapokolwele.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel39:11 “Pali ubo bushiku ilyo ifi fyonse fikafika, ine nkapeela Gogi incende mu calo ca Israeli iyakuti akashiikwemo, nayo ikabela mwishika lya balendo, lubali lwa ku kabanga ka bemba, eikacilika inshila ya balendo, pantu emo Gogi akashiikwa pamo ne fita fyakwe fyonse. Ninshi ilyo ishika bakalalita abati, ‘Ishika lya Hamoni Gogi’." 
Ezekiel39:12 Aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli cikasendela imyeshi cine lubali pakuti bakapwishe ukushiika ifitumbi no kusangulula icalo. 
Ezekiel39:13 Abantu bonse mu calo bakalaafwana pakushiika ifitumbi, kabili bakacindikilwapo pa bushiku ine nkacimfya. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel39:14 Ilyo pakapita imyeshi cine lubali, kukaba abantu bamo abakasontwa pakuti bakakonkanyepo ukulapitana mu calo pakushiika ifitumbi fimbi ifikashalamo, epakuti bakamone ukucisangulula." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ilyo abo bantu bakalapitana uku noku, nga basangapo ifupa limo ilya muntu, bakalabikapo icishibilo, epakuti abakushiika baya libuula, no kuya lishiika mwishika lya Hamoni Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Kukaba no mushi umo uukalaitwa Hamona. Awe ninshi ne calo nomba cabafye icasangululwa. 
Ezekiel39:17 “We mwana wa muntu, ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ati, ‘Ita ifyuni fyonse, ne nama shonse isha mpanga konse uko shili, fiite fise ipakishako ilambo lya maliila ilyo ndefipekanishisha. Kwalaba umusamwe uwine wine pa mpili sha mu Israeli apakuti filiile iminofu no kunwa umulopa." 
Ezekiel39:18 Fili no kwisa lya ifitumbi fya bashilika, no kwisa nwa umulopa wa ntungulushi sha pesonde, pantu bonse nalabepaya nga basukusuku, ngo tupaanga, nga basawe, nangu nga bacilume wa ŋombe abaina ukufuma ku Bashani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Pali ili lambo lintu ndefipekanisha, fili no kwisa lya ifyanona no kufimbilwa, no kunwa umulopa wabo mpakafye fikakolwe." 
Ezekiel39:20 Petebulo lyandi fileisa ikutapo bakabalwe na bendelapo, ne mpalume, ne fita fimbi fyonse ifilwa inkondo.’ Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel39:21 “Abantu ba mishobo nkabalanga ifyo ine nacindama, kabili nkabalanga ifyo ine momfya amaka yandi pakupingula no kuboko kwandi uko nkabika pali bena." 
Ezekiel39:22 Ukutula pali bulya bushiku elintu aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli nabo bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe Lesa wabo. 
Ezekiel39:23 Na bantu ba mishobo elyo nabo bakashininkisha ukuti ico aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli basendelwe bunkole ni pa mulandu wa bubifi bwabo, pantu tabali na cishinka kuli ine. Ine nalibafumisheko amano, naleka na balwani babekate, kabili bonse naleka bafwila mu nkondo." 
Ezekiel39:24 Ine nalibalingenye pafyo balecita, pantu bali abakowela kabili abapula amafunde, kanshi na ine epakubafumyako amano.”" 
Ezekiel39:25 Eico ifi efyasosa imfumu Yawe ati, “Kanshi nomba nkabwesha Yakobo ukufuma muli bunkole, kabili nkabelela aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli uluse nakabili, epakuti nkakwatile ishina lyandi ilyamushilo ubufuba." 
Ezekiel39:26 Elyo nakabili bakaleikala mu calo cabo ku matwi tondolo, ukwabula nangu umo uwakubasokosha, lyena bakasuka bakalabe kufyo baisebenye abene pakukanaba ne cishinka." 
Ezekiel39:27 Ilyo nkababwesha ukufuma ku mishobo, no kubalonganika ukufuma mu fyalo fya balwani babo, lyena nkasokolola ubucindami bwandi ukupitila muli bena pa cinso ca mishobo iyingi." 
Ezekiel39:28 Elyo na bantu bandi bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ine nine Yawe, Lesa wabo, pantu nine nabatwele muli bunkole ku mishobo ya benafyalo, elyo kabili nine wine nomba nkabalonganya no kubabwesesha mu calo cabo ukwabula ukushapo nelyo umo." 
Ezekiel39:29 Aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli nshakabasuuleko nakabili iyoo, pantu nkapongolwela Umupashi wandi pali bena.” Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel40:1 Ilyo twali muli bunkole, mu mwaka walengele amakumi yabili na isano (25), pa bushiku bwalenga ikumi ubwakutampa umwaka upya, ninshi e mwaka uwakulenga ikumi na ine (14) apo umusumba wa Yerusalemu waonaikile, pali bulya bwine ubushiku awe ine naumfwafye ukuboko kwakwa Yawe kwaisa pali ine, no kunjimya kwanjimya, kwansenda." 
Ezekiel40:2 Mu cimonwa mwine Lesa antwala mu calo ca Israeli, aya nteka na pa lupili lumo ulutali. Awe namonafye lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso imitande ya mayanda ayali kwati musumba." 
Ezekiel40:3 Nao Lesa eko antwala, namonako no muntu umo uwalebengeshima ngo mukuba. Namona ali no mwando uwa kolokondwe ne tete ilyakupiminako, ninshi naiminina na pa mpongolo." 
Ezekiel40:4 Elyo uyo muntu alanjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, lolekesha bwino. Umfwa kuno, usunge bwino fyonse ifyo ine nalakulanga, pantu e mulandu wine bakuletele kuno. Kabili uli nokwebako aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli fyonse ifyo iwe ulemona.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Ico ine namweneko, Litempele ilyali mukati ke linga. Uyo muntu nao aikete itete ilyalepele amakubiti ayakulu mutanda, cila kubiti uukulu walepele kubiti umo ukulundapo ne cisansa ca lupi. Alapiminako ne cibumba ce linga. Asanga ukuti mu butali ubwakuya pamulu icibumba calepa itete limo, umutika waciko nao waba itete limo." 
Ezekiel40:6 Elyo kabili alungama ku mpongolo iyabelele ku kabanga. Anina amatabo, alapima no mwinshi wa mpongolo, asanga ukuti walepele itete limo ukuya panshi." 
Ezekiel40:7 Umuputule onse uwa bamalonda wali itete limo mubutali elyo ne tete limo mukucilinganya. Pakati ka miputule palepele amakubiti yasano. Umwinshi wa mpongolo uwabelele ukwakwingilila ukulungatana ne Tempele mupepi no muputule wa pa mwinshi wali itete limo. 
Ezekiel40:8 Awe uyo muntu alapima uyo muputule uwapalamishe kwi Tempele," 
Ezekiel40:9 asanga ukuti wali amakubiti cine konse konse, elyo ku mpela ya uyo muputule kwali ifibumba ifyatikeme amakubiti yabili." 
Ezekiel40:10 Kwaliko miputule iya bamalonda itatu iyali konse konse lubali lwa nshila, yonse yali iyalingana ubukulu, no mutika wa fibumba fyaiko, nao wine walifye uwalingana." 
Ezekiel40:11 Kabinge uyo muntu apima inshila mubufumo, asanga ukuti yakula amakubiti ikumi limo. Apakwingilila apo baleisala impongolo pakulile amakubiti ikumi limo na yatatu (13)." 
Ezekiel40:12 Pa miputule yonse iya bamalonda pali lwapantanshi utumalinga utwipi utwalepele kubiti umo. Iyo miputule iya bamalonda, ubukulu bwaiko monse monse yali amakubiti mutanda." 
Ezekiel40:13 Elyo kabili uyo muntu apima ifyo palepele ukufuma kunuma ya muputule umo, ukushinta na ku muputule unankwe ukucilinganya inshila iyakupitilamo, asanga ukuti patalukana amakubiti amakumi yabili na yasano (25)." 
Ezekiel40:14 Kabili apimine ifibumba fya muputule wakwingililapo ukushinguluka mukati, fyali amakubiti amakumi mutanda (60). Apimine ukufika pa muputule wa pa mwinshi ukulungatana no lubansa." 
Ezekiel40:15 Ukutula lwapanse pa mpongolo iyakwingililapo ukuya shinta na pa mpela ya muputule wa pa mwinshi, palepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50)." 
Ezekiel40:16 Mu miputule ya bamalonda yonse pamo ne fibumba fyonse mwali insolokoto kunse na mukati pamo na mu muputule wa pa mwinshi. Pa fibumba fyamukati ifyalungatene ne nshila, palengelwe utuncindu." 
Ezekiel40:17 Uyo muntu kabili antwala mu lubansa lwakunse. Mwali imiputule amakumi yatatu (30) iyakuulilwe ukusuntinkana ne cibumba icashingulwike ulubansa, elyo ulubansa lwine lonse lwali ulwakubatilwa na mabwe ayapapatala bwino." 
Ezekiel40:18 Aya mabwe ayapapatala yalambatikwe ku fibumba fyonse uku noku ukufika ku mpongolo iyali iyalinganaa mubutali na mulufumo. Ulo lubansa lwabelele lwa panshi. 
Ezekiel40:19 Uyo muntu apimine ubutali bwa lubansa ukufuma ku mpongolo ya pesamba no kufika lwakunse ku lubansa lwamukati, amona ukuti palepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100) lwa ku kabanga cimo cine na ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Ezekiel40:20 Elyo kabili apimine ubutali na mu bwipi bwa mpongolo iya ku kapinda ka ku kuso, iyakupitilapo pakuya mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse." 
Ezekiel40:21 Yali ne miputule itatu itatu iya bamalonda iyali ku mbali shonse ishaba malonda. Ifibumba pamo no muputule wa pa mwinshi fyali ifyalingana ne mpongolo yapakubala iyali ku kabanga. Mu butali bwafiko fyonse fyali amakubiti amakumi yasano (50), mubufumo fyonse fyali amakubiti amakumi yabili na yasano (25)." 
Ezekiel40:22 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi, ne nsolokoto shauko, no tuncindu utwalengelwe pa fibumba, fyalifye cimo cine na filya fyali ku mpongolo ya ku kabanga. Kwaliko na matabo cine lubali ayakunininapo pakuya ku mpongolo, no muputule wa pa mwinshi wabelele kumpela ukulungatana no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ukufuma ku mwinshi wa mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso, elyo ukucilinganya ulubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse, kwaliko umwinshi umo uwa mpongolo uwakupitilapo pakuya mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati, uyo mwinshi walifye ngoyo wine wali lubali lwa ku kabanga. Uyo muntu kanshi epakupima ifyo shatalukene isho mpongolo shibili, asanga ukuti pali amakubiti umwanda umo (100)." 
Ezekiel40:24 Kabili alintwele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, ukwabelele impongolo na imbi. Awe nayo alaipima, amona ukuti ilingenefye ne mpongolo shimbi ku bukulu pamo ne miputule yashiko." 
Ezekiel40:25 Mu miputule wa pa mwinshi uwa pali iyo mpongolo mwali insolokoto nga shilya shine shali mu miputule iya pa mpongolo shimbi. Ubutali bwa nshila bwali amakubiti amakumi yasano (50), mubufumo mwena yali amakubiti yabili na yasano (25)." 
Ezekiel40:26 Palipo na matabo cine lubali ayakunininapo pakuya ku mpongolo, no muputule wa pa mwinshi uwabelele kumpela ukulungatana no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse. No tuncindu twalilengelwe pa fibumba fyamukati ifyalungatene ne nshila." 
Ezekiel40:27 Nako kwine kwaliko ne mpongolo iyakupitilapo pakuya mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati iyabelele ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Awe nao alapima ifyo palepele ukufuma ku mpongolo imo ukuya shinta na ku ibiye iyakunse iyabelele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, amona ukuti palepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100)." 
Ezekiel40:28 Kabili alimpishishe pa mpongolo iya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, anyingisha na mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati. Awe alapima ne mpongolo iyabelele lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, amona ukuti ilingenefye ne shinankwe ku bukulu." 
Ezekiel40:29 Ne miputule ya bamalonda, ne fibumba fyamukati no muputule wa pa mwinshi, fyonse fyalingenefye ubukulu na filya fyali ku mpongolo shimbi. Impongolo pamo no muputule waiko uwa pa mwinshi fyali ne nsolokoto mu fibumba fyonse. Ubutali bwafiko bwali amakubiti amakumi yasano (50), mubufumo mwena yali amakubiti amakumi yabili na yasano (25)." 
Ezekiel40:30 Imiputule ya pa mwinshi iyashingulwike ulubansa lwamukati ka mpongolo yali amakubiti amakumi yabili (25) mubutali, mubufumo mwena yali amakubiti yasano (5)." 
Ezekiel40:31 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi walungatene no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse. Palilengelwe no tuncindu pa fibumba fyamukati ifyalungatene ne nshila. Palipo na matabo cine konse konse ayakunininapo pakuya kuli iyo mpongolo. 
Ezekiel40:32 Kabili alimpishishe pa mpongolo ya ku kabanga, antwala na mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati. Awe alapima ne mpongolo, amona ukuti ilingenefye ne shinankwe ubukulu." 
Ezekiel40:33 Ne miputule iya bamalonda, no muputule wa pa mwinshi ne fibumba fine ifyamukati, fyonse fyalingenefye ubukulu na filya fine fyali ku mpongolo shimbi. Impongolo no muputule waiko uwa pa mwinshi fyali ne nsolokoto mu fibumba fyonse. Ne nshila yali amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) mubutali, mubufumo mwena yali amakubiti yabili na yasano (25)." 
Ezekiel40:34 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi walungatene no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse. Palilengelwe no tuncindu pa fibumba fyamukati fyonse fibili, ifyalungatene ne nshila. Palipo na matabo cine konse konse, ayakunininapo pakuya kuli iyo mpongolo." 
Ezekiel40:35 Kabili antwele ku mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Awe alapima ne mpongolo, amona ukuti ilingenefye ne shinankwe ku bukulu." 
Ezekiel40:36 Nako kwine kwali imiputule iya bamalonda, ne fibumba fyamukati ifyalengelwepo utuncindu, no muputule wa pa mwinshi, ne nsolokoto mu fibumba fyonse. Ne nshila iyalipo yali amakubiti amakumi yasano (50) mubutali, mubufumo mwena yali amakubiti amakumi yabili na yasano (25)." 
Ezekiel40:37 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi wa mpongolo walungatene no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse. Pa fibumba fyamukati fyonse fibili palilengelwe utuncindu. Palipo na matabo cine konse konse ayakunininapo pakuya kuli iyo mpongolo. 
Ezekiel40:38 Mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse, mwalimo umuputule umo, pakuyamo kano ukupitila mu muputule wa pa mwinshi uwalungatene no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati. Emo balesambila ifitumbi fya nama isho baleoca pakushituula ilambo." 
Ezekiel40:39 Mu muputule wa pa mwinshi mwali amatebulo yane, uku yabili, noku yabili. Pali ayo yene amatebulo epo baleipaila inama ishakutuula ilambo ilyakoca, nangu umutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi nangu umutuulo wakufuta pa bubifi." 
Ezekiel40:40 Lwa ku cibumba ca panse ica muputule wa pa mwinshi napo pali amatebulo yane, uku yabili, noku yabili. Yabelele lwa mu nshila iyakwishila ku mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Ezekiel40:41 Kanshi mukati ka muputule mwali amatebulo yane, panse napo yane, epa matebulo cine konse konse ayo baleipailapo inama isho bali nokutuula ilambo." 
Ezekiel40:42 Amatebulo yane ayo balepekanishishapo amalambo ayakoca, yapangilwe na mabwe ayasonwa, mubutali ukuya pamulu yalepele kubiti umo, mubufumo na mubutali mwena yali kubiti umo na citika. Ni pali ayo yene amatebulo epo balebika ifibombelo ifyakwipailako inama sha malambo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Kwali ne finkobwe ifyalepele nge cisansa ca lupi, ifyapampamikwe ukushinguluka icibumba. Pali aya yene amatebulo epo balebika inama shonse ishakutuula ilambo." 
Ezekiel40:44 Kunse ya mpongolo yamukati, mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati, lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, mwali imiputule ibili. Umuputule umo waloseshe ku kapinda ka ku kulyo kabili mwalimo no muputule unankwe lubali lwa ku mpongolo ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, wena waloseshe ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Ezekiel40:45 Elyo uyo muntu alanjeba ukuti uyu muputule uuloseshe ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, ewa bashimapepo ababomba mwi Tempele," 
Ezekiel40:46 na ulya uloseshe ku kapinda ka ku kuso, wena ewa bashimapepo ababomba ku bulambo. Aba e bana baume bakwa Sadoki, abo bekafye abena Levi abafwile ukupalamina kuli Yawe mukumubombela." 
Ezekiel40:47 Elyo apimine ulubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati, mubukulu lwali monse monse amakubiti umwanda umo (100). Ubulambo bwali lwa pantanshi ye Tempele." 
Ezekiel40:48 Elyo kabili anyingisha mu muputule uwakwingililamo pakuya mwi Tempele. Awe alapima na pa bwingililo, mubwipi pa mbali shonse shibili palepele amakubiti yasano, kabili mubufumo amakubiti ikumi limo na yane (14), ne fibumba ifyalipo uku noku fyatikeme amakubiti yatatu." 
Ezekiel40:49 Umuputule wa pa mwinshi wali mubutali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20), kabili mubufumo wali amakubiti ikumi limo na yabili (12), kabili walikwete na matabo ikumi limo ayakunininapo pakuyamo. Apakwingilila pali ne nceshi shibili, lumo uku, ulubiye nalo uku." 
Ezekiel41:1 Kabili antwala mu muputule uwamushilo uwakunse, alapima ne nceshi sha fibumba nasho mubufumo shali amakubiti mutanda mu mbali shonse," 
Ezekiel41:2 apakwingilila pali amakubiti ikumi limo mubufumo, kabili umutika wa fibumba fyauko konse konse wali amakubiti yasano. Kabili apima no muputule uwamushilo wine uwakunse, mubutali wali amakubiti amakumi yane (40), na mubufumo wali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20)." 
Ezekiel41:3 Elyo aya mu muputule uwamushilo uwamukati alapima ne nceshi sha fibumba, ifibumba fya pa mwinshi fyena mubufumo fyali amakubiti yabili, apakwingilila napo pali amakubiti mutanda mubufumo, no mutika wa fibumba fya pa mwinshi konse konse wali amakubiti cine lubali." 
Ezekiel41:4 Apima no muputule wamushilo uwamukati, mubutali wali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) na mubufumo wali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) ukucilinganya pa mpela ya muputule wamushilo. Elyo uyo muntu anjeba no kunjeba ati, “Uno muputule e wamushilo icine cine.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Kabili apimine umutika wa cibumba cakunse ice Tempele, naco cali amakubiti mutanda. Elyo ukukonka ico cine cibumba conse ice Tempele, kwaliko umutande wa tumiputule utunono utwashintilileko, ubukulu bwatuko twali ni cikanga amakubiti yane." 
Ezekiel41:6 Imiputule yali ya ntunti shitatu, kabili pali utumiputule amakumi yatatu (30) pa ntunti imo, na pa ibiye na panshi ifyo fine. Umutika wa cibumba walikulileko lwa panshi elyo bashako ulucena apakushintilila ifibumba fya tumiputule twa pa ntunti ya pamulu, ukwabula ukwingisha ifyakushintililapo mu cibumba ce Tempele." 
Ezekiel41:7 Utu tumiputule twali utukuluko pa ntunti ya pamulu ukucila iya panshi. Kanshi icikulwa conse ukushinguluka Itempele cakuulilwe mu musango uwakuti imiputule ya pa ntunti ya pamulu yalikulileko nga mwaninika ukuya pa ntunti ya pamulu. Balikuulileko na matabo ukufuma panshi, ukupita pa ntunti ya pakati ukuya fika na pa ya pamulu." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ine nalimweneko ne cibumbili icashingulwike Itempele. Casanseme itete limo, ekutila amakubiti mutanda, ukucila ulubansa, no kulingana napo bakuulile utumiputule mu mbali ye Tempele." 
Ezekiel41:9 Icibumba cakunse ica uto tumiputule cali no mutika ukulingana pa makubiti yasano. Kwaliko ne ncende imo iyishalipo kantu, iyashingulwike Itempele," 
Ezekiel41:10 ubukulu bwaiko bwali amakubiti amakumi yabili (20). Iyo ncende yabelele pakati ka cibumbili na mayanda ayo bashimapepo balebomfya. 
Ezekiel41:11 Kwaliko ne minshi iyakwingililapo pakuya mu miputule ukufuma pa ncende iyishalipo kantu, umo wabelele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, umbi nao wabelele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Icibumbili icakupitapo icasuntinkene ne ncende apashali kantu cali amakubiti yasano mubufumo ukushinguluka." 
Ezekiel41:12 Kwaliko ne ŋanda imo iyalungatene ne Tempele lubali lwa ku masamba. Mubukulu yali amakubiti amakumi cine lubali (70), mubutali amakubiti amakumi pabula (90). Icibumba caiko catikeme amakubiti yasano." 
Ezekiel41:13 Uyo muntu alipimine Itempele lwakunse, nalyo lyalepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100). Ulubansa pamo ne ŋanda elyo ne fibumba fyaliko fyalepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100)." 
Ezekiel41:14 Ukutula pa mpela ya lubansa, ukupita lwa ku kabanga na pa mwinshi we Tempele, ukuya fika na pa mpela ya iyo ine ncende, napo pene palepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100)." 
Ezekiel41:15 Uyo muntu alipimine ubutali bwa ŋanda iyalungatene no lubansa lwa kunuma ye Tempele, apimina kumo kwine ne fibumba fyaiko konse konse, amona ukuti nako kwine yali amakubiti umwanda umo (100). Umuputule uwakunse, no muputule uwamukati pamo pene no muputule wa pa mwinshi uwalungatene no lubansa," 
Ezekiel41:16 fyena fyonse fyapampaminwemo imbao panshi na ku fibumba, ukuya fikafye na pa nsolokoto. Pa nsolokoto pali ne fyakufimbapo." 
Ezekiel41:17 Pa ncende iyali pamulu lwapanse apakwingilila mu muputule wamushilo uwamukati, elyo na pa fibumba mukukonkana ukushinguluka umuputule wamukati no wakunse wine," 
Ezekiel41:18 palilengelwe bakerubi no tuncindu. Paleti apa ni Kerubi, apa napo kancindu. Bakerubi bonse umo umo bali ne finso fibili fibili." 
Ezekiel41:19 Icinso ca muntu caloleshe lwa ku kancindu ku lubali lumo, elyo icinso ca nkalamo naco caloleshe ku kancindu ku lubali lubiye. Efyalengelwepo ukushinguluka icibumba conse ice Tempele," 
Ezekiel41:20 ukutampila panshi ukuya shinta na pafikile ifiibi, palengelwe bakerubi no tuncindu pa cibumba ca muputule wamushilo uwakunse." 
Ezekiel41:21 Amaingwe ya fiibi ifya muputule wakunse uwamushilo yalepele mubutali, kabili yali ayalingana naya muputule uwamushilo icine cine." 
Ezekiel41:22 Palipo no bulambo ubwa fimuti. Nabo bwalepele amakubiti yatatu ukufuma panshi, mubukulu bwali amakubiti yabili. Babukuulile ne fimuti petungi, panshi na mumbali. Elyo uyo muntu epakulanjeba ati, “Ili e tebulo ilyaba pa cinso cakwa Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Apakwingilila ukuya mu muputule uwakunse uwamushilo pali ifiibi fibili, kabili palipo na fimbi fibili ifyakwingililapo pakuya mu muputule uwamushilo icine cine." 
Ezekiel41:24 Ifyo fiibi fyali ifyaminkubili, ifyaleisukila uku noku." 
Ezekiel41:25 Pa fiibi fya muputule wakunse uwamushilo palengelwe bakerubi no tuncindu, nga filya fine cali na pa fibumba. Elyo kunse kwali no mutenge uwa mbao lwa pantanshi wa muputule wa pa mwinshi." 
Ezekiel41:26 Mu mbali ya uyo muputule wa pa mwinshi mwali insolokoto, na pa fibumba fyauko palilengelwepo utuncindu. No tumiputule utwali mu mbali ye Tempele twalikwete imitenge iya mbao lwa pantanshi." 
Ezekiel42:1 Uyo muntu alintwele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse, elyo antwala na ku miputule iyaloleshanya lubansa lwe Tempele, kabili iyaloleshanya ne linga line ilyakunse lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Ezekiel42:2 Iŋanda ya iyi miputule mubutali yali amakubiti umwanda umo (100), mubufumo mwena yali amakubiti amakumi yasano (50)." 
Ezekiel42:3 Lubali lumo yalungatene no lubansa ulwalepele amakubiti amakumi yabili (20), ukukonka Itempele, lubali lubiye yalungatene no lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse ulwakubatilwe na mabwe ayapapatala. Yali ni ŋanda iya ntunti, iyakuulilwe pa fiputa fitatu ifyatuntikene nga matabo yatatu." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ku ntanshi ya miputule kwali inshila imo iyakupitamo, mu bukulu bwaiko yali amakubiti ikumi limo, mu butali bwaiko amakubiti umwanda umo (100). Iminshi iyakwingililapo yabelele ku kapinda ka ku kuso." 
Ezekiel42:5 Imiputule pa ntunti ya pamulu, yalicepeleko pa miputule iya ntunti ya pakati na pa miputule ya panshi, pantu ifiputa fyaile filecepelako." 
Ezekiel42:6 Imiputule ya pa ntunti yabutatu tayatungililwe ne nceshi nga mayanda yambi, eico yali ayanono ukucila ayali pa ntunti ya panshi na pakati." 
Ezekiel42:7 Ku ŋanda ine kwali na kalilinga kamo akalungatene ne miputule, kalepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50)," 
Ezekiel42:8 no mutande wa miputule ya panshi nao walepele amakubiti amakumi yasano (50). Lelo umutande wa miputule uwali ku lubali lwa muputule wamushilo walepele amakubiti umwanda umo (100). 
Ezekiel42:9 Ku mpela ya ŋanda lubali lwa ku kabanga, uko akalilinga katampile, kwaliko ne minshi iyakupitilapo pakuya mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse." 
Ezekiel42:10 Lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ake Tempele, kwaliko imiputule na imbi iyapalene neyo ine iyibiye, yalungatene ku lubansa lwe Tempele kabili yaloshenye ne linga lyakunse." 
Ezekiel42:11 Pa ntanshi ya miputule palipo inshila imo iyakupitamo, nga ilya ine yali lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Ubutali no bukulu bwaiko bwalingenefye no bwa inankwe, no musango bacitilemo, ne minshi ine iyakufuminapo yalifye cimo cine." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ifyali iminshi yauko, efyali ne minshi iyabelele lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Kwali no mwinshi uwabelele apatampile inshila yakupitamo iyakonkele icibumba icalolele ku kabanga ukwali ukwakwingilila." 
Ezekiel42:13 Elyo uyo muntu alanjeba ati, “Iyi miputule iya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ne ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo iyalosha iminshi pa lubansa lwe Tempele yonse yaba iyamushilo. Bashimapepo abapalamina Yawe emo baliila amalambo ayamushilo nganshi. Pa mulandu wakuti iyi miputule yaba iyamushilo, kanshi emo bashimapepo bakulasungila ifintu ifyamushilo, ifili nge mituulo ya cabunga, umutuulo wakwelelwa pa fyabubifi, pamo ne mituulo yakufuta pa bubifi pantu ici cifulo camushilo." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ilyo bashimapepo baingila mukubomba mu cifulo camushilo, tabali nakufumina pa lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse, kano batala basha muli iyi ine miputule ifyakufwala ifyamushilo ifyo bali bafwele ilyo bacilabombela Yawe. Elyo kabili bali nokulafwala insalu shimbi pakuya ku ncende uko abantu balongene.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Uyo muntu atile ashipwa ukupima incende yamukati ke linga lye Tempele, elyo amfumishe pa mpongolo ya ku kabanga, alapima ulubansa ulwashinguluka ilinga." 
Ezekiel42:16 Abuula itete, alapima lubali lwa ku kabanga, amona ukuti palepele amakubiti imyanda isano (500)." 
Ezekiel42:17 Apima na lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, asanga ukuti kwalepele amakubiti imyanda isano (500)." 
Ezekiel42:18 Kabili apima na lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, asanga ukuti kwalepele amakubiti imyanda isano (500)." 
Ezekiel42:19 Elyo kabili apima na lubali lwa ku masamba, asanga ukuti nako kwalepele amakubiti imyanda isano (500)." 
Ezekiel42:20 Epakupima icibumba icacingilila ku mbali shonse shine ukushinguluka, calepele amakubiti imyanda isano (500), na mubufumo cali amakubiti imyanda isano icalekenye incende iyamushilo ne ishali yamushilo." 
Ezekiel43:1 Uyo muntu kabili alintwele ku mpongolo iyalosha ku kabanga," 
Ezekiel43:2 awe namona no bucindami bwakwa Lesa wakwa Israeli uko buletula ku kabanga. Ishiwi lyakwa Lesa ninshi lileumfwika kwati ciunda ca kupooma kwa menshi, icalo naco ninshi cilebengeshimafye kulwa bucindami bwakwe." 
Ezekiel43:3 Ico cimonwa califye nga cilya namwene ilyo Lesa aishile kukonaula umusumba wa Yerusalemu, kabili califye nga cilya namwene ku mumana wa Keba. Awe na ine epakuwa panshi ubukupeme." 
Ezekiel43:4 No bucindami bwakwa Lesa epakupita pa mpongolo ya ku kabanga, bwaingila na mwi Tempele lyakwe." 
Ezekiel43:5 Kabili Umupashi wanjimya, wantwala mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati, awe namona nokuti ubucindami bwakwa Yawe bwaisula mwi Tempele." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ilyo uyo muntu acili naiminina apo nali, elyo naumfwa umo alelanda kuli ine ukufuma mwi Tempele," 
Ezekiel43:7 anjeba nokuti, “We mwana wa muntu, ala ni muno emwaba icipuna candi icabufumu kabili icifulo icakunyantapo amakasa yandi. Ni muno nakulaikala pe na bena Israeli. Aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli pamo ne shamfumu shabo tabakatale abakowesha ishina lyandi nakabili, pakucita ubucende bwakupepa imilungu, na pakulakuulila ishamfumu shabo ishafwa ifyakushibukishishako." 
Ezekiel43:8 Ishamfumu shabo pakukuula amayanda yashiko, shalepalamika iminshi yabo na maingwe ya fiibi fyabo mupepi ne minshi na maingwe ya fiibi fya ŋanda yandi, icakuti paleshalafye icibumba cimo icaletulekanya. Balekowesha ishina lyandi pakulacita ifintu ifyabunani, ecalengele ukuti na ine mbonaule ku cipyu." 
Ezekiel43:9 Lino lyena bali nokuleka ubucende bwakulapepa imilungu, bali nokonaula na filya bakuulile ishamfumu shabo ishafwa. Nga efyo bacita, awe ninshi na ine nakulaikalilila nabo pe." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Kanshi nobe we mwana wa muntu, ale akulondolwela aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli palwe Tempele, na palwa mikuulile yaliko, uleke bekatwe insoni pa mulandu wa micitile yabo iyabubifi." 
Ezekiel43:11 Nga baikatwa insoni pafyo bacita, elyo ubalondolwele ifyo Itempele lyatantikwa, emukuti ifyo lyapiminwe pakulikuula, ifyaba iminshi iyakwingililamo ne yakufuminamo, ifyo Itempele limoneka, umusango fyonse fyatantikilwamo, kumo kwine na mafunde ne fipope fyaliko fyonse. Ubalembele ifyo fyonse, epakuti abene baleibelengela umusango fyonse fyatantikilwamo, bamone no kulakonka ifipope fyaliko fyonse." 
Ezekiel43:12 Kanshi ifunde palwe Tempele nili, ilyakuti incendefye yonse pa mulu wa lupili, iyashinguluka Itempele, ala ni ncende iyamushilo nganshi. Ili e funde ilye Tempele.”" 
Ezekiel43:13 Ifi e fipimo fya bulambo mu makubiti ayataliko, aya makubiti yalepele kubiti umo ukulundapo ne cisansa ca lupi. Apaimikwe ubulambo bonse pasanswike kubiti umo, mubufumo namo kubiti umo, kwali no mushingo ukushinguluka uwalingene ne cisansa ca lupi. Ifi efyalepele ubulambo ukufuma panshi." 
Ezekiel43:14 Ukutula apo ubulambo bwaimikwe ukufika na mu mushingo wa mwisamba bwali amakubiti yabili ukuya mumulu, mubufumo kubiti umo. Elyo ukufuma mu mushingo wa mwisamba ukufika na mu mushingo wa pamulu palepele amakubiti yane elyo mubufumo kubiti umo." 
Ezekiel43:15 Pamulu epali ishiko ilyo baleocelapo amalambo ilyasanswike amakubiti yane, na pamulu weshiko pene patumpwike insengo shine." 
Ezekiel43:16 Ishiko lya pa bulambo lyali ilyalingana, monse monse lyali amakubiti ikumi limo na yabili mubutali na mubufumo." 
Ezekiel43:17 Incende ya pakati nayo yalilingene mubukulu, monse monse yali amakubiti ikumi limo na yane, no mushingo uwali citika wa kubiti, ne shinte ilyali kubiti umo ukushinguluka. Amatabo ayakuiila pa bulambo yabelele lubali lwa ku kabanga." 
Ezekiel43:18 Elyo alinjebele ati, “We mwana wa muntu, Imfumu Yawe asosa ukutila aya e mafunde bali nokukonka palwa bulambo. Pa bushiku bwine nga bapwa ukukuula ubulambo, pakutuula amalambo yakoca na pakukana umulopa wa nama ishikalatuulwa ilambo," 
Ezekiel43:19 mukapeela umusepela umo uwa ŋombe ilume ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi kuli bashimapepo abena Levi, bamwana Sadoki, abali nokulaisa apo ndi kukumombela. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel43:20 Muli nokubuulapo umulopa wakako, no kuushinga ku nsengo shine ishaba pa mulu wa bulambo, na ku matungi yane aya ncende ya pakati, na ku mishingo yonsefye. Kanshi efyo ukasangulula ubulambo no kubufutilako." 
Ezekiel43:21 Ukabuule cilume wa ŋombe no kuleka ilambo lya mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Ukamubuule ukamoce mu lubansa mwilinga lyakunse pa ncende iyasontwa, kunse ya ncende iyamushilo." 
Ezekiel43:22 “Elyo pa bushiku bwacibili mukabuulepo sawe umo uwabula akalema, mukatuule ilambo lyakwelelwa pa bubifi. Mukabuule no mulopa wakwe mukasangulwileko ubulambo, nga filya fine mukabalilapo ukucita kuli cilume wa ŋombe." 
Ezekiel43:23 Ico nga capwa, elyo mukabuule cilume wa ŋombe umo uwabula akalema, na sukusuku umo nao uwabula akalema," 
Ezekiel43:24 mukafilete fyonse kuli ine ne Yawe. Bashimapepo bakasansapo umucele, no kufituula nge lambo ilyakoca." 
Ezekiel43:25 “Pa nshiku cine lubali muli nokulatuula inshiku shonse sawe umo, na cilume wa ŋombe nao umo, na sukusuku nao umo, ngo mutuulo wakwelelwa pa bubifi. Isho nama shonse shili nokuba ishabula akalema." 
Ezekiel43:26 Pa nshiku cine lubali bashimapepo bali nokufutilako ubulambo no kubusangulula efyo bakandubwila ubulambo pakubupekanya ukulabombelapo imilimo yabuko. 
Ezekiel43:27 Isho nshiku nga shapwa, pa bushiku bwalenga cine konse konse nokuya kuntanshi elyo bashimapepo bali nokutampa ukulalekela pa bulambo amalambo yenu ayakoca, na malambo yenu ayakwampana. Elyo ninshi na ine nkalamusekelela imwe. Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Uyo muntu kabili alintwele ku mpongolo yakunse, lubali lwa ku kabanga ka ncende ye Tempele. Iyo mpongolo yali iyaisalwa," 
Ezekiel44:2 elyo Yawe anjeba ati, “Iyi mpongolo yakulashalafye ifi fine iyaisalwa, tayakatale aiisulwa. Tapakengilile muntu nangu umo, pantu epo naingiliile ine ne Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli. Kanshi ili nokulashalafye iyaisalwa." 
Ezekiel44:3 Nomba kateeka ena eka kuti aikalapo no kulya icakulya pa cinso candi. Ena pakwingila na pakufuma ali nokupitilapo mu muputule wa pa mwinshi uwabela lwa ku mpongolo.” 
Ezekiel44:4 Uyo muntu kabili alimpishishe pa mpongolo iyabela ku kapinda ka ku kuso, antwala na kwi Tempele lubali lwa pantanshi. Awe na ine nalalolesha, namona ne Tempele lyakwa Yawe likumenefye ubucindami bwakwa Yawe. Na ine epakuwa panshi ubukupeme," 
Ezekiel44:5 elyo nao Yawe alanjeba ati, “We mwana wa muntu, teka umutima, kabili uloleshe bwino no kumfwikisha ifyo ndekweba palwa fipope fyonse ifya pe Tempele lyakwa Yawe na mafunde yaliko. Ulemona bwino abafwile ukusuminishiwa ukwingilamo, elyo na bakuleshiwa ukwingila mu ncende yamushilo." 
Ezekiel44:6 “Abo bantu aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli abasangu, ubebe ukuti ine ne Mfumu Yawe nshabaleke nakabili balecita ifintu ifyabunani ngefi bacita." 
Ezekiel44:7 Balikowesha iŋanda yandi pakulaleka abenafyalo abashasembululwa, abantu abashinakila ine, ebo baleingilamo pa nshita balentuula ifyakulya, amafuta no mulopa. Balyonaula ne cipangano candi ku lwa micitile yabo yonse iyabipisha." 
Ezekiel44:8 Mu cifulo cakumombela imilimo yamushilo mu ŋanda yandi, bena basonta abenafyalo ebo balemombela." 
Ezekiel44:9 “Kanshi ine ne Mfumu Yawe ndesosa ukuti umwinafyalo onse uushasembululwa umutima no mubili, tewakwesha kulaingila mu ŋanda yandi, nangula abefye umwinafyalo uwaisa ikala na bena Israeli." 
Ezekiel44:10 “Abena Levi abansangukile pamo na bena Israeli banabo bambi, kabili abapepeleko no tulubi, nabo bene bali nokukandilwapo." 
Ezekiel44:11 Lelo kwena kuti balabomba umulimo wandi mu ŋanda yandi, uwakusunga impongolo, no kulabombamo imilimo imbi. Kuti balaipaya inama isho abantu baleleta pakushoca ilambo, ne shakuleka ilambo ilyakupapatila abantu, kabili bali nokulaba pa ncito iyakubombela abantu." 
Ezekiel44:12 Nomba pa mulandu wakuti ebaletungulula aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli amapepo ayakupepa utulubi, emukuti kanshi ebalebatwala kukulabifya, kanshi na ine nalapa ukuti balifye nokukandwa. Efyasosa imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel44:13 Tabafwile ukulapalama kuli ine nakabili pakumombela umulimo wabo uwa bushimapepo, tabafwile ukulapalama ku mituulo yamushilo iyapeelwa kuli ine, ifintu fyandi ifyaba ifyamushilo icine cine. Bakalaumfwa insoni pa micitile yabo iyabunani." 
Ezekiel44:14 Lelo ine nalabasonta ukulatungulula imilimo ya mwi Tempele no kulacita fyonse ifili nokulabombekamo.” 
Ezekiel44:15 “Nomba, ilyo abena Israeli bambi bansangukile, bashimapepo abena Levi aba mu lupwa lwakwa Sadoki bena balikonkenye ukulamombela bwino mu ŋanda yandi. Kanshi aba bene ebakulamombela, ebakulaisa pa cinso candi kukulantuula amafuta ya malambo no mulopa wayako. Efyasosa imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel44:16 Bena bekafye ebakulaingila mu ŋanda yandi, no kulabomba petebulo lyandi mukumpyungila no kulatungulula amapepo mu ŋanda yandi." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ilyo bakalaingilila pa mpongolo pakuya mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati umwaba iŋanda yandi, bali nokulafwala insalu ishatelela. Tabali nakulafwala nsalu sha masako ya mpaanga pa nshita balebomba umulimo mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati, atemwa mukati ke Tempele." 
Ezekiel44:18 Bakalapomba insalu ishatelela ku mitwe yabo, no kufwala bakaputula abamukati aba nsalu ishatelela. Tabafwile ukufwala icili conse icikabalenga ukupiba ilibe." 
Ezekiel44:19 Pakufumina ku bantu abali mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyakunse, bali nokulatala bafuula ifyakufwala ifyo bali balebombelamo umulimo mu ŋanda yandi, no kufisha mu miputule iyamushilo. Bali nokulafwala insalu shimbi, epakuti insalu shabo ishamushilo tashisangulwile abantu ababakumya." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Bashimapepo tabali nakulabeya ulukuso, nangu ukulaleka imishishi yabo ilelepesha. Pa kubeya bali nokulaipifyakofye ukulingana ne cipimo icilingile." 
Ezekiel44:21 Bashimapepo tabali nakulanwa umwangashi ilyo baleingila mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati. 
Ezekiel44:22 Bashimapepo tabali nakulaupa mukamfwilwa nangu umwanakashi uo balekana na wiba. Bali nokulaupafye umukashana umwina Israeli uushatala akuma ku mwaume, nangu ukuupa namfwilwa uwali muka shimapepo." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Bashimapepo bali nokulafunda abantu pakuti abantu baleishiba ifintu ifyamushilo ne fishili fyamushilo, na pakuti baleishiba ifikowesha abantu ne fishibakowesha." 
Ezekiel44:24 Nga kwalabuka ifikansa, ni bashimapepo ebali nokulaputula umulandu, na pakuputula baleuputula ukulingana na mafunde yandi. Bashimapepo bali nokulacindika inshikunkulu shonse ishakumpepamo, ukulingana ne fipope fyandi na mafunde yandi, kabili bali nokulasunga Amasabata yandi ayamushilo." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Bashimapepo bekalakumya citumbi ca muntu, pantu kuti balaikowesha, kanofye ninshi nga citumbi cakwa wishi nangu nyina, atemwa ica mwana wabo umwaume nangu mwanakashi, atemwa ica bamunyinabo nangu ica bankashi yabo abashaupwa, lyena kuti baikowesha." 
Ezekiel44:26 Nga umo aikowesha mu nshila iyi, ali nokusangululwa. Nga apwa ukusangululwa, pali nokupita inshiku cine lubali," 
Ezekiel44:27 elyo ninshi aye mu lubansa lwa mwilinga lyamukati umwaba iŋanda yandi. Atuule no mutuulo wakwe uwakwelelwa pa bubifi, awe ninshi lyena kuti alabomba imilimo nakabili mu ŋanda yandi." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Pa bena Israeli ni bashimapepofye beka ebashalekwatako impanga iyakuba icikwatwa cabo. Ne cikwatwa cabo nine winefye ne Lesa. Belapeelwako icuma icakuti baleikwatila, ne mwine wine nine nakulaba icuma cabo icakuti baleikwatila." 
Ezekiel44:29 Imituulo ya cabunga, ne mituulo iyakwelelwa pa bubifi, ne mituulo iyakufuta pa bubifi eyakulaba ifyakulya fya bashimapepo, kabili ebali nokulabuula ifintu fyonse ifyo abantu bakulampatwila mu calo ca Israeli." 
Ezekiel44:30 Bashimapepo ebakulabuula ifisabo fyonse ifyakubalilapo ifyawamisha, ne fintu fyonse ifyakulatuulwa kuli ine. Bali nokulapeelako bashimapepo ubunga ubwapeleka ubwakubalilapo, epakuti ipaalo lyandi lileba mu mayanda yabo." 
Ezekiel44:31 Bashimapepo belalyako cuni icaifwila, nangufye inama iyaifwila, atemwa iyaipaiwa ne nama inankwe." 
Ezekiel45:1 “Ilyo mukalaakanya inko shonse imo imo impanga nge cikwatwa, mukampatwilako ine ne Yawe Lesa icitungu cimo icikaba icamushilo. Mubutali cili nokulepa amakubiti amakana amakumi yabili na yasano (25,000), mubufumo mwena amakubiti amakana amakumi yabili (20,000). Incende yonse ikalaba iyamushilo." 
Ezekiel45:2 Muli ico citungu muli nokubamo incende imo iyalingana ubukulu monse monse amakubiti imyanda isano (500), eikabamo icifulo camushilo ice Tempele. Elyo mu mbali yaiko monse monse mukashala ulubansa ulukafunguluka amakubiti amakumi yasamo (50)." 
Ezekiel45:3 Ukufuma pali iyo ncende kukapimwa incende imo, mubutali ikabe amakubiti amakana amakumi yabili na yasano (25,000), mubukulu mwena amakubiti amakana ikumi limo (10,000). Mukati emukaba icifulo icamushilo, ikaba ni ncende iyamushilo icine cine." 
Ezekiel45:4 E citungu cikaba icamushilo mu calo, icapatwilwa bashimapepo ababombela ne Yawe mu cifulo camushilo kabili abapalama kuli ne Yawe kukuntumika. Emukaba amayanda yabo, kabili eikaba incende iyamushilo iyikabamo iŋanda yandi iyamushilo." 
Ezekiel45:5 Kabili mukaba incende na imbi, nayo ine ikabe amakubiti amakana amakumi yabili na yasano (25,000) mubutali, mubufumo mwena amakubiti amakana ikumi limo (10,000). Iyo ncende eikaba iya bena Levi abakalabomba imilimo mwi Tempele, emukuti emukaba imishi yabo iyo bakalaikalamo." 
Ezekiel45:6 Kabili kuli nokuba icitungu cimbi icakukuulamo umusumba, cili nokulepa mubufumo amakubiti amakana yasano (5,000) na mubutali mwena amakubiti (25,000). Ico citungu cili nokubeela lubali lwa citungu icamushilo, kabili ico citungu ecikaba ica ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli bonse." 
Ezekiel45:7 “Kateeka ali nokukwatako impanga ku mbali shonse shibili isha citungu ca mu ncende yonse iyamushilo na ku cikwatwa ca musumba. Cili nokuba mumbali pa ncende iyamushilo ne ya musumba mukulola ku lubali lwa ku masamba, elyo lubali lwa ku kabanga. Ukutula ku mupaka wa ku kabanga ukuya na ku wa ku masamba, cili nokulinganafye ubukulu nge fitungu fimbi ifikakwatako inko sha bena Israeli." 
Ezekiel45:8 Kanshi e citungu ico kateeka akakwatako nao mu calo ca Israeli. Bakateeka abo nsonta tabakalecusha abantu kabili, lelo bakalaleka inko sha ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli nabo bakaleikwatila ifitungu mu calo.”" 
Ezekiel45:9 Imfumu Yawe alisosele ati, “Imwe mwe bakateeka ba bena Israeli, awe mwabifya pafula. Lekeni ubukakashi bwenu no mucusha wenu. Akuciteni ifyalungama, kwateni no mulinganya. Mwikabwekeshapo nakabili ukulatamfya abantu bandi mu mpanga shabo. Nine ne Mfumu Yawe ndemwebelapo." 
Ezekiel45:10 Bonsefye muli nokulakwata ifipimo ifyaba bwino. Muli nokulapiminako icipimo ca efa icalinga, ne cipimo ca bafa icalinga." 
Ezekiel45:11 Efa na bafa fifwile ukuba ifyalingana. Babafa ikumi ebalingana na homeri umo, elyo na ba efa ikumi ebalingana na homeri umo. Homeri e cipimo ecakulisha pali fyonse kabili ecakulingako." 
Ezekiel45:12 Kanshi ifipimo fyenu fili nokulaba ifi, indalama ishekeli limo ikalingane na magera amakumi yabili (20). Amashekeli amakumi yabili (20) ukubikapo amashekeli amakumi yabili na yasano (25) elyo ukubikapo na yambi ikumi limo na yasano (15) eyo yakalingane ne ndalama ya mina imo." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Kanshi ici e cipimo ca mutuulo uyu uukankala uo muli nokulatuula. Pali homeri umo uwa ŋanu shenu ishasokolwa, muli nokulatuulapo akaputulwa kamo akalenga mutanda. Pali homeri umo uwa bale yenu iyatwiwa, muli nokulatuulapo akaputulwa kamo akalenga mutanda." 
Ezekiel45:14 Amafuta yakutuula ayakupimina mu bafa, yakaba cipimo capekumi ica mafuta ukufuma mu cipimo ca kori umo, umwingila babafa ikumi limo nangu ukulingana na homeri umo, pantu babafa ikumi limo eyalingana na homeri umo." 
Ezekiel45:15 Ku fitekwa fya bena Israeli, pa mpaanga imyanda ibili muli nokulatuulapo imo. Muli nokulaleta imituulo ya cabunga, ne mituulo ya fyakoca ne yakwampana, epakuti mulefuta pa fyabubifi fyenu. Efyasosa imfumu Yawe." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Abantu bonse mu calo, bali nokulatwala uyo mutuulo ukankala kuli kateeka wa mu Israeli." 
Ezekiel45:17 Elyo uyo kateeka nao eukalaba no mulimo uwakumona palwa nama ishikalaba nokulaocewa pakushileka ilambo, eukalamona na palwa mituulo ya cabunga ne ya fyakunwa, ifikalatuulilwako uluko lonse ulwa bena Israeli, pa nshikunkulu shonse, na pa kusefya ukumoneka kwa mweshi upya onse, na pa nshiku shonse ishe Sabata. Kanshi uyo kateeka eukalamona palwa mituulo ya pa fyabubifi, na palwa mituulo ya cabunga, na palwa mituulo ya malambo ayakoca, na palwa mituulo yakwampana, e mituulo iyakufuta pa fibi fya ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli.”"
