Daniel11:21 “Imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso iyikakonkapo yena ikaba imfumu iyibi, ishakalinge na kuteeka abantu. Yena ikesa pumikishafye abantu, no kupoka ubufumu mu bucenjeshi." 
Daniel11:22 Ifita ifikaicilima ikafipasanganya, ikafyonawila kumo kwine na cilolo wa cipangano." 
Daniel11:23 Nangu iyo mfumu ikateekafye akamushobo ka bantu akanono, kwena ubufumu bwaiko bukakulilako, pantu ikalacita ubucenjeshi ubwakumfwana na bantu ba mitundu imbi." 
Daniel11:24 Mukupumikisha ikasansa icitungu cimo icikankala nganshi ica mu calo, ico yaleumfwana naco kale, no kucitamo ifintu ifyo ifikolwe fyaiko fishabalile aficita. Ifyuma ifyo ikatapamo, ne fya bene ifyo ikebamo pa nshita ya nkondo, ikafipeelaika abantu abakalaikonka. Ikalapanga ukusansa imisumba ya malinga, nomba ni pa nshita inono." 
Daniel11:25 “Ikapama ukwimya ibumba ilikalamba ilya fita pakuya lwisha imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, lelo kwena nayo ine imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ikapekanya ifita ifingi kabili ifyamaka ifyakulwa ne mfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso. Lelo iyo mfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo tayakashangileko, pantu abantu baiko bakaisangukila." 
Daniel11:26 Abalya ne mfumu ifya kwisano ebakayonaula. Ibumba lyonse ilya fita fyaiko likapashika, ne fita fyaiko ifingi fikafwa mu nkondo." 
Daniel11:27 Elyo isho imfumu shibili shikalila petebulo limo, lelo mu mitima yashiko shikalapingilana, kabili shikalalandafye ifyakubepana. Tashakashuke mufyo shikapanga ukucita, pantu ninshi inshita iyapimwa tailafika." 
Daniel11:28 Imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ikabwelelamo ku calo caiko, ikasenda fyonse ifyo ikatapa mu nkondo. Ikabwelela ku calo caiko ninshi ilepanga ukonaula icipangano camushilo. Lelo kwena ikatala yashala yabacitapo cimo ico itemenwe, elyo ikabwelelemo ku calo caiko." 
Daniel11:29 “Limbi kuntanshi ikabwelelako nakabili kukuya sansa icalo ca ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, nomba tacakabe ngefyo caleba kale." 
Daniel11:30 Pantu lyena aba ku Kitimu bakaya na mato yabo kukuya icincintila, nayo ikayatiina no kubwelelamo. Ikabwela ne cipyu no kwisa fulilwa abantu bakwa Lesa. Ikesa esha ukonaula icipangano icamushilo, pantu ikesa konkelela amano ya bantu abakasangukila icipangano camushilo." 
Daniel11:31 Ifita fyaiko fimo fikesa kowesha Itempele lyakwa Lesa, kumo kwine na malinga yaliko. Fikalesha na malambo ayatulwa inshiku shonse, fikabikamo ne cintu icabunani kabili icabonaushi." 
Daniel11:32 Iyo mfumu ikalacita amano pakusembeleka abantu abakalasuula icipangano camushilo, nomba abantu abaishiba Lesa awe bena bakashala umo bakosela ndi, no kukanya bakalakanya ne mfumu ine." 
Daniel11:33 Abamano ba muli abo bantu, bakalapandako abengi amano. Nomba pa kashita kamo, pali abo bantu bamo bakafwa ku nkondo, bamo bakafwa ku mulilo, bambi bakafwila muli bunkole, bambi bakafwila mukutapwa." 
Daniel11:34 Ilyo bakacula, kukamoneka abakubakoseleshako panono, lelo kwena abengi bakaikumika uko bali mu bucenjeshi." 
Daniel11:35 Abamano bamo bamo bakaipununa no kuwa, lelo cikalenga ukuti balopololwe, basangululwe kabili bawamishiwe ilyo inshita icilipo, pantu impela ikesa pa nshita iyo Lesa umwine apima." 
Daniel11:36 “Imfumu ikalacitilafye umo ilefwaila. Ikalaitakisha no kuisansabalika ukuti yena yalicila pa milungu yonse, ikalalanda na mashiwi ayakusuula Lesa Mukulu wine. Yena ikatwalilila ukushuka, mpakafye inshita yabukali ikapwe pantu ifyo Lesa apanga ukucita, fili nokucitika." 
Daniel11:37 Iyo mfumu yena ikasuulilapo ne milungu ya fikolwe fyaiko, ikasuulilapo no mulungu wine uo abanakashi batemwa. Emukuti ikasuulilapo ne milungu yonsefye, pantu ikaisansabalika ukucila iyi milungu yonse." 
Daniel11:38 Pa malo ya iyo milungu, ikapyanikilapo umulungu umo uwakulinda imisumba ya malinga, uo ifikolwe fyaiko fishaishibe. Yena e mulungu uo ikalatuula golide, na silifa, no tumabwe twamutengo, ne fintu fimbi ifikankala ifyo ikakwata." 
Daniel11:39 Abenafyalo abakalapepa uyo mulungu, ebo imfumu ikapeela umulimo uwakulinda amalinga yaiko, na bakaisumina ukuti e mfumu yabo ebo ikapeela imilimo imbi iyacindamisha, no kubalambula impanga iyakuti emo bakaleikalila nge cilambu." 
Daniel11:40 “Ilyo ubufumu bwaiko bukalasumbila ukupwa, elyo imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo ikaya sansa imfumu mbiye iya ku kapinda ka ku kuso, lelo nayo imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ikemya amaceleta, ne fita fya pali bakabalwe na mato ayengi, no kulwisha pa maka imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Imfumu ya ku kapinda ka ku kuso ikengilila ifyalo kwati lyeshi, no kufipupanya ikafipupanya." 
Daniel11:41 Ikengilila ne calo icawamisha pali fyonse, no kwipaululamo abantu amakana na makana. Lelo icalo ca bena Edomu, ne ca bena Moabu, ne ntungulushi sha bena Amoni, fyena fikapusukako." 
Daniel11:42 Ikasansa ifyalo ifingi, ne calo ca Egupto cine tacakapusukeko." 
Daniel11:43 Mu Egupto ikasendamo ifyuma ifyafiswa ifya golide ne fya silifa, kumo kwine ne fintu fimbi ifyamutengo ifyabamo. Ikacimfya na bena Libya na bena Kushi." 
Daniel11:44 Nomba intulubundi sha ku kabanga ne sha ku kapinda ka ku kuso shikaitiinya, kanshi ikalalwisha inkondo cipyu cipyu, no kulaipaya abantu abengi." 
Daniel11:45 Ikabika amatenti yaiko ayakulu kabili ayacindama pakati uku ni bemba, uku nako lupili ulwayemba kabili ulwamushilo. Awe no kufwa epo ikafwila, ukwabula nelyo umo uwakuti ayafweko.”" 
Daniel12:1 “We Daniele, pali iyo nshita akafika kateeka mukalamba uwitwa Mikaeli uulinda abantu bobe. Kukaba inshita yabulanda ubwabipisha ubushabala abumoneka ukufumafye apo imishobo ya bantu yatendekele ukubapo. Ni muli iyi nshita emo abantu bobe bonse abo amashina yabo yalembwa mu citabo cakwa Lesa bakapusuka." 
Daniel12:2 Cinkupiti wa bantu pali balya abalala utwamfwa bakashukuka. Bamo ku mweo wamuyayaya, bambi ni kukuba ne nsoni pamo no kusekwa umuyayaya." 
Daniel12:3 Lelo abamano bakalabengeshima ngo lubuuto lwa mu mulu, na balya abafundile abantu ukucita ifyabulungami bakalabeka nge ntanda." 
Daniel12:4 Nomba we Daniele isala no kukakatika icitabo icipombwa ukufika ku nshita ilintu ifintu fikapwilapo. Abantu abengi bakasabanta uku noku, na mano yakafulilako.”" 
Daniel12:5 Elyo ne Daniele namwene abantu babili nabeminina umo ku bushilya bwa mumana na umbi ku bushilya bubiye. 
Daniel12:6 Elyo umuntu uwaiminine akatalamukila abilikisha uwafwele insalu ishatelela uwali ku mulu wa mumana ati, “Bushe ni nshita nshi ikapitapo pakuti ifi fintu ifyakupapa fikafikilishiwe?”" 
Daniel12:7 Elyo umubiye uwafwele insalu ishatelela uwali ku mulu wa menshi ya mumana, aimishe amaboko yakwe mu mulu no kulapa Lesa wa pe ati, “Ala kwashalafye umwaka umo, imyaka ibili na umbi pakati, kabili ilyo bakapwisha ukusansaula amaka ya bantu bamushilo elyo ifi fyonse fikafikilishiwa.”" 
Daniel12:8 Pa mulandu wakuti nelyo naleumfwa ifyo uyo muntu alelanda nshaleiluka, namwipwishe nati, “Mukwai, bushe finshi fikatumbuka muli ifi fintu?”" 
Daniel12:9 Nao atile, “Daniele, kabiye pantu ayo mashiwi nayesalilwa no kukakatikwa ukufika ku nshita iyo ifintu fikapwilapo." 
Daniel12:10 Abantu abengi bakasangululwa, bakawamishiwa no kulopololwa, lelo ababifi bakatwalililafye ukubify. Ababifi tabakeluke iyoo, lelo abamano bena bakeluka." 
Daniel12:11 “Ukufuma pa nshita amalambo yakaleshiwa ukupeelwa ilyo icabunani icilenga ubonaushi cikemikwa, pakapita inshiku ikana limo ne myanda ibili na makumi pabula (1,290)." 
Daniel12:12 Balishuka abantu abakashipikisha inshiku ikana limo ne myanda itatu na makumi yatatu na shisano (1,335)." 
Daniel12:13 Lelo iwe Daniele kabiye. Ukafwa, lelo ukashukuka pakuti ukapoke cilambu cobe ilintu ikafika inshita iyo ifintu fikapwilapo.”" 
Hosea1:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Hosea mwana Beri pa nshita icalo ca Yuda caleteekwa ne shamfumu Usia, Yotamu, Ahasi na Hesekia, nelyo Yeroboamu mwana Yoashi ateekele icalo ca Israeli." 
Hosea1:2 Ilyo Yawe atampile ukulanda amashiwi kuli Hosea, Yawe amwebele ati, “Upa umwanakashi impulumushi ukafyalemo abana ba mu bupulumushi, pantu abantu bandi nababa impulumushi kabili nabansangukila, ine ne Yawe.”" 
Hosea1:3 Kanshi nao Hosea epakuupa umwanakashi umo, ishina lyakwe ni Gomeri mwana Dibulaimu. Asuka aba na pabukulu, apapa no mwana umwaume." 
Hosea1:4 Yawe aeba Hosea ati, “Mwinike ishina lya Yesireli, pantu tapakokole ninshi ine nalimuna imfumu ya bena Israeli pa mulandu wa bupondo ubo Yehu wishi acitile kuli Yesireli. Ine nalaswa ndofye ubufumu bwa bena Israeli." 
Hosea1:5 Pali ilya ine nshita, ine ninshi napwisha amaka ya fita fya bena Israeli mwishika lya Yesireli.”" 
Hosea1:6 Kabili Gomeri aimita apapa umwana na umbi, wena umwanakashi. Yawe aeba Hosea ati, “Mwinike ishina lya Lo Ruhama, emukutila munshilangulukilwa, pantu ine nomba nshakalangulukileko nakabili aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, kabili nshakababeleleko uluse nakabili iyoo." 
Hosea1:7 Abena Yuda bena nkabalangulukilako, ine ne Yawe Lesa wabo nkabapususha, lelo kwena pakubapususha ine nshakemye nkondo iyoo, nshakabomfye lupanga, nangufye amata ne mifwi, nangufye bakabalwe na babendelapo bene, lelo nkabapususha ku maka yandi ne mwine.”" 
Hosea1:8 Ilyo Gomeri asumwine mwane Loruhama, nakabili aba pabukulu. Asuka apapa no mwana umwaume na umbi." 
Hosea1:9 Yawe nao aeba Hosea ati, “Mwinike ishina lya Lo-Ami, emukuti te bantu bandi, pantu mwe bena Israeli nomba tamuli bantu bandi iyoo, na ine wine nomba nshili Lesa wenu iyoo.”" 
Hosea1:10 Nangu cibe ifyo abena Israeli bakafula ngo musensenga wa mu lulamba lwa bemba, uushingapimwa nangufye ukupendwa. Nomba palya casoselwe palwa bena ukuti, “Imwe tamuli bantu bandi iyoo,” lelo ilyo lyena akalabeba ati, “Imwe muli bana bandi ine ne Lesa Umumi.”" 
Hosea1:11 Abena Yuda bakakumbinkana pamo na bena Israeli. Abene ebakalaisontela intungulushi imofye iyakubateeka, nakabili bakafula, no kushuka bakalashuka mu calo cabo. Ubo bushiku bwakwa Yesireli bukaba ubukalamba." 
Hosea2:1 Usose kuli bamunonko abaume auti, “Mwe bantu bandi, ” na kuli bankashi yobe utile, “Mwebo nalangulukila. ”" 
Hosea2:2 Mwe bana bandi, aleni landeni kuli nyinenwe, mulande nankwe, pantu nomba te mukashi wandi, elyo na ine nshili mulume wakwe. Muleke afumye ubupulumushi bwakwe pa menso yakwe, no bulalelale pakati ka mabele yakwe." 
Hosea2:3 Nga talekele, ninshi ine nkamufuula akashale ubwamba, nga filya fine ali ilyo afyelwe. Nkamucita nga matololo, nkamubika mu calo icaumisha, no kumuleka akafwe ku cilaka." 
Hosea2:4 Bamwane ine nshakabakwatile uluse, pantu bana ba mu bupulumushi," 
Hosea2:5 Nyinabo tali wacishinka, uwalebemita aliisebanya umwine. Aletila ati, “Ine nakulaya ku batemwikwa bandi, pantu bena balampeelako icakulya na menshi, na masako ya mpaanga ne nsalu ishisuma ishatelela, na mafuta ya muolifa, ne cakunwa ica mwangashi.”" 
Hosea2:6 Eico ine nkasaka imyunga mu nshila yakwe. Nkamukuulililako ilinga, ilyakuti akafilwe no kufumamo." 
Hosea2:7 Akalabutukila ku batemwikwa bakwe, nomba akalafilwa ukubasanga. Akalabafwaya fwaya, nomba takalebamona nakalya. Akasuka akatilefye, “Awe kambwelelefye ku mulume wandi uwapakubala, pantu kuli ena nalikeleko bwino ukucila pafyo njikele ino nshita.”" 
Hosea2:8 Ulya mwanakashi taishiba ukuti nine nalemupeela iŋanu, no mwangashi na mafuta. Nine nalemupeelesha silifa na golide, uo alebomfya pakupepa Baali." 
Hosea2:9 Kanshi inshita yakulobolola ifisabo nga yafika, ine nkamupoka iŋanu shandi no mwangashi wandi, Nkamupoka amasako yandi aya mpaanga, ne nsalu shandi ishisuma ishatelela, isho ali nokufwala pakukanaba ubwamba." 
Hosea2:10 Ine nomba nkasokolola ifya nsoni shakwe pa menso ya batemwikwa bakwe. Takwakabe nelyo umo uukamupokololako mu minwe yandi. 
Hosea2:11 Ine nkamupwisha insansa shilya akwata pa nshikunkulu shonse isha pa mwaka, ne sha pa kumoneka kwa mweshi, ne sha pa bushiku bwe Sabata, ne sha mitebeto yakwe yonse iya mapepo." 
Hosea2:12 Ine nkamonawila imyangashi ne mikunyu, iyo asosa ati, “E cilambu abatemwikwa bandi bampeela.” Amabala yakwe aya myangashi naya mikunyu ine nkayasangula iteshi, ne nama sha mpanga emo shikalalya." 
Hosea2:13 Nkamulimuna ukulingana pa nshiku isho andabileko, ilyo alefutumwina imilungu ba Baali ububani, no kulaisamika ifisamo ne mbalaminwe pakuya alesapika abatemwikwa bakwe, no kulaba kuli ine, nine ne Yawe nalanda." 
Hosea2:14 Kanshi ulya mwanakashi ine nkamusembeleka no kumutwala mu matololo, emo nkaya landa kuli ena amashiwi yamutembo." 
Hosea2:15 Ine nkamubwesesha amabala yakwe aya myangashi, ne shika lya Ako akausangula impongolo iyakulolelapo ifisuma. Emo akalanjasukila nga filya fine alenjasuka ilyo ali umukashana, pa nshita afumine mu calo ca Egupto." 
Hosea2:16 Efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa bushiku bulya, ukalanjita ati, ‘Mulume wandi,’ tawakalenjita nakabili ati, ‘Shikulu wandi,’ iyoo." 
Hosea2:17 Nkafumya mu kanwa kakwe amashina ya imilungu ba Baali, ine nshakaleke akalelumbula amashina yaiko nakabili iyoo." 
Hosea2:18 “Muli bulya bushiku, ine nkabapangila icipangano ne nama sha mpanga, ne fyuni fya mu lwelele, ne fikulika panshi. Nkafumya mu calo ifyanso fyonse ifili nge mpanga na mata, elyo ne nkondo ine, epakuti abantu bandi bakaleikala umutelelwe." 
Hosea2:19 “Nkakukobekela ukuba uwandi umuyayaya, nkakukobekela mu bololoke no mulinganya, mu citemwiko icishipwa na mu luse." 
Hosea2:20 Ine nkakukobekela ukuba uwandi mu cishinka, na iwe ukeshiba Yawe." 
Hosea2:21 “Pa bushiku bulya, nkaasuka,” efyasosa Yawe. “Nkaasuka imyulu, imyulu nayo ikaasuka isonde." 
Hosea2:22 Isonde nalyo likaasuka iŋanu, imyangashi ne miolifa. Fyonse nafyo fikaasuka Yesireli" 
Hosea2:23 Abantu bandi ine nkabateeka mu calo, nkalenga nokuti bakaleshuka. Nkalalangulukilako abo naleita ‘Loruhama,’ emukutila munshilangulukilwa. Na balya betwa, ‘Loami,’ emukuti te bantu bandi, ine nomba nkalabeta nati, ‘Mwe bantu bandi,’ nabo pakwasuka bakalati, ‘We Lesa wesu.’”" 
Hosea3:1 Yawe asosele kuli ine ati, “Kabiye nakabili, uye utemwe umwanakashi uwatemwikwa no mwaume umbi kabili uucili alecita ubupulumushi. Iwe ulemutemwafye ngefi fine na ine ne Yawe ncili ndetemwa abena Israeli, nangu kwena batwala amano yabo ku milungu iyo batemwa ukulatuula ifimamantwa fya fitwalo fya myangashi.”" 
Hosea3:2 Kanshi na ine epakulipila indalama amashekeli ya silifa ikumi limo na shisano (15) pakumushita, nalundapo na matepe amakumi yane (40) aya bale." 
Hosea3:3 No kumweba namweba nati, “Iwe nomba wakulaikala na ine inshiku ishingi, kabili tecakwesha ukulacita ubupulumushi, nangu ukukwata umwaume wa pambali, na ine efyo nkaba kuli iwe”" 
Hosea3:4 Pantu abena Israeli bali nokwikala inshiku ishingi ukwabula imfumu nangu kateeka, ukwabula ukutuulapo amalambo nangu ukukuula inceshi shakupepelapo, nangu icakufwala ca bashimapepo ica efodi nangufye ukukwata utulubi utwakupendwilako." 
Hosea3:5 Lelo kwena panuma, elyo abana bakwa Israeli bakabwela kuli Yawe Lesa wabo, na kuli Davidi imfumu yabo. Lyena bakalakwatila Yawe akatiina, no kulashukila ifyabupe fyakwe ifisuma mu nshiku shakupelekesha." 
Hosea4:1 Kutikeni kwishiwi lyakwa Yawe imwe mwe bena Israeli, pantu Lesa ali pakumupeela umulandu imwe bonse mwe bekala mu calo. Tamukwete icishinka, tamukwete uluse elyo tamukwete no kwishiba Lesa mu calo." 
Hosea4:2 Abantu balelapa, no kubepa ubufi, baleipayana, baleiba ifintu, balecita no bupulumushi, ubuluku na buntalamisoka bulefulilakofye." 
Hosea4:3 E mulandu wine no mushili uleumina ndi, na baikalamo bene eco balefwila, e mulandu wine ne nama shine shilefwila kumo kwine ne fyuni fya mu lwelele, ne sabi lya muli bemba." 
Hosea4:4 Yawe aletila ati, “Mwilaleka muntu nelyo umo alepeela abantu umulandu, nangufye ukulabalubulwisha. Pantu abo ine ndepeela umulandu, nimwe bene bashimapepo." 
Hosea4:5 Imwe mulalufyanya mu nshita ya kasuba, bakasesema nabo balufyanya pamo na imwe mu nshita ya bushiku. Ine nkalofya umutundu wenu uwa bwina Israeli." 
Hosea4:6 “Abantu bandi baleonaika pa mulandu wakukanaishiba. Pa mulandu wakuti namukaana ukwishiba na ine nimfumyako amano kuli bushimapepo bwenu, kabili pantu imwe namusuula amafunde yandi ine ne Lesa wenu, kanshi na ine nshakebukishe abana benu." 
Hosea4:7 Ukulingana nefyo bashimapepo balefulilako, efyo no kubifya kwabo kwalefulilako. Bakabushenye ubucindami bwabo ne fyansoni." 
Hosea4:8 Ukubifya kwa bantu ekulebaletela ubukankala, e mulandu wine bafwaila ukuti abantu balebifya ukucila." 
Hosea4:9 Ala ifyo cikaba ku bantufye efyo cikaba na kuli bashimapepo, bonse nkabakandila pa myendele yabo, nkalinganya pa micitile yabo iyabipa.”" 
Hosea4:10 “Mukalalya nomba tamwakaleikuta nakalya. Mukacita ubupulumushi, nomba tamwakalesanda, pantu namufumya amano kuli ine ne Yawe, mulekonkelelafye imilungu." 
Hosea4:11 Umwangashi wakale no mwangashi upya, filapoka abantu bandi amano." 
Hosea4:12 Bena baleya ku cimuti pakuti eco cilebapandako amano. Inkonto eilebebako ifyo balefwaya ukwishiba. Pantu umupashi wabucilende naubalufya, nabafuma na kuli Lesa wabo ukuya mukucita bucilende." 
Hosea4:13 Pa mpili epo balelekela amalambo, na pasansama epo batuula imituulo ya fyakoca. Mwisamba lya fimuti fya oki ne miti ya popula nangu mulemba, emo balefutumwina ububani, pantu emwaba ifintelelwe ifisuma. E mulandu wine abana benu abanakashi babelele bacilende, na banafyalenwe balecitila ubupulumushi." 
Hosea4:14 Lelo kwena ine nshakakande abana benu abanakashi ilyo bacita bucilende, nangu banafyalenwe ilyo bacita ubucende. Pantu abaume bene ebaya kuli bacilende, no kwipaila amalambo pamo na bacilende ba mu mfuba, eico abantu abashiluka bakaloba." 
Hosea4:15 “Nangu imwe mwe bena Israeli mulecita bucilende, imwe mwilenga abena Yuda babe no mulandu. Imwe mwe bena Yuda mwilaya ku Giligali, kabili mwilaya na ku Beti Afeni, kabili imwe mwilaya mukulalapako amuti, ‘Mu cishinkafye cakwa Yawe Umumi.’" 
Hosea4:16 Apo abena Israeli baumalala ngo musepela wa ŋombe, kuti ine nalabacema shani ngo twana twa mpaanga, utwakuti ndecemena mu nika iyapabuka?" 
Hosea4:17 Abena Efulemu nabakonena mu tulubi tulesa, kanshi balekeni babe." 
Hosea4:18 Nangu umwangashi naupwa bena batwalililafye mukucita bucilende, bakateeka babo batemwishapo ukulacita ifintu ifyamusebanya." 
Hosea4:19 Umwela ukali ukabolula nge mfula ya cikuuku, no tulubi uto balepepa tukabaletelafye insoni." 
Hosea5:1 “Imwe bashimapepo, umfweni kuno. Kutikeni nemwe mwe bena Israeli. Umfweni kuno nemwe mwe ba mu lupwa lwabufumu. Ubu ubupingushi buli pali imwe, Pantu nimwe mwali nge citeyo ku Misipa, kabili mwali nge sumbu ilyo bateya pa lupili lwa Tabo." 
Hosea5:2 Abansangukila bonse nabatwalilila ukwipaya, eico bonsefye nkabalimuna." 
Hosea5:3 Ine nalishiba ifyo abena Efulemu nefyo abena Israeli baba, teti bamfise kantu nelyo kamo. We Efulemu wacita ubucende pakuntalamina, kabili we Israeli waliikowesha we mwine." 
Hosea5:4 “Ifibi ifyo abena Israeli bacita efilebalesha ukubwelela kuli Lesa wabo. Pantu baba no mupashi wabucilende, tabasakamanako na kuli Yawe nakalya." 
Hosea5:5 Icilumba ca bena Israeli ecikabashinina, ifibi fyakwa Efulemu na Israeli efikabaletelela, efikaletelela na bena Yuda bene." 
Hosea5:6 “Nelyo balesenda impaanga shabo ne ŋombe shabo pakuya mukulashituula ilambo kuli Yawe, awe baleicushafye, balefilwa ukumona Yawe pantu nabafutatila." 
Hosea5:7 Abantu tababa na cishinka kuli Yawe, bafyala abana mu bulalelale. Kanshi nomba imitebeto yakusefya umweshi upya ikabonaula kumo kwine na mabala yabo." 
Hosea5:8 “Lisheni intandala mu Gibea, lisheni ipenga mu Rama, Ku Beti Afeni ikatisheni inkuuta ya nkondo. Mwe bena Benjamini, akuyeni kukulwa inkondo." 
Hosea5:9 Ubushiku bwakukanda, Efulemu akashala icibolya, mu nko shonse isha bena Israeli ndesosa ifikacitika.”" 
Hosea5:10 Yawe aletila ati, “Intungulushi sha bena Yuda shaba nga balya abaseshanya amabwe ayapatulula imipaka. Ndi nokupongolwela icipyu candi pali bena kwati lyeshi lya menshi." 
Hosea5:11 Efulemu alacushiwa no kunyantililwa mu bupingushi, pantu akonkelela ifyabuwelewele." 
Hosea5:12 Kuli Efulemu naba nge cishishi icilya insalu, na ku ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda naba nge cilonda icishipola." 
Hosea5:13 Ilyo Efulemu amwene ifyo amalwele yamwikete, na Yuda nao ilyo amwene icilonda cakwe, elyo Efulemu aile ku Asiria kukupapata imfumu nkalamba iyateekele icalo pakuti imwafwilisheko, nomba nayo kabili yafilililwafye ukumuposha no kumundapa ifilonda." 
Hosea5:14 Pantu ine nkaba nge nkalamo kuli Efulemu. Ngo musepela wa nkalamo ku ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda. Nkabatakanya nkaye no kuya, nkabasenda, takwakamoneke nelyo umo uwakubapokololako." 
Hosea5:15 Elyo nkabwelela ku cifulo candi, mpakafye bakasumine ifilubo fyabo, no kufwaya icinso candi, mukucucutika kwabo bakamfwaya ne mitima yabo yonse.”" 
Hosea6:1 Abantu balandile abati, “Mwe, ala natubwelele kuli Yawe. Ena natutakanya lelo akatuposha, natucenaula lelo akatundape ifilonda." 
Hosea6:2 Pa nshiku shibili mukamona akatupuputula, na pa bushiku bwalenga shitatu akatwimya, nefwe twakulaikala abomi pa cinso cakwe." 
Hosea6:3 Natuicefyefye, tupose na mano kuli Yawe. Cine cinefye akesa uko tuli nga kasuba akaletula. Cishinkafye akesa uko tuli nge mfula yakuloboka, elyo kabili akesa kuli ifwe nge mfula yakulekelesha.”" 
Hosea6:4 Yawe nao alibaswike ati, “Iwe we Efulemu, na iwe we Yuda, bushe ine mucite shani? Ukuntemwa kwenu imwe takukokola nakalya, kuulukafye nga fubefube, kupwafye lucelocelo ngo mume." 
Hosea6:5 Eico nalimuputawile utupimfya kuli bakasesema, no kumwipaya ku mashiwi ya mu kanwa kandi, ubupingushi bwandi bwabyashishe pali imwe nge nkuba." 
Hosea6:6 Ala ine mfwaya mulentemwa pe, te malambo yenu mfwaya iyoo, mfwaya mulenjishiba ne Lesa ukucila ilambo lyakoca." 
Hosea6:7 “Nomba balyonawile icipangano nga Adamu, tabakwete ne cishinka kuli ine." 
Hosea6:8 Mu musumba wa Gileadi mwaisula bancita fibi, abakantaikwa umulopa." 
Hosea6:9 Nga filya ifipondo filalilila abantu, eficita na mabumba ya bashimapepo. Na mu musebo wakuya ku Shekemu, emo bashimapepo bepaila abantu, ala imicitile yabo yalibipa nganshi." 
Hosea6:10 Mu ŋanda yakwa Israeli ine ndamona ifintu ifyabunani ifyo bacitako Efulemu acita bucende mukupepa utulubi, na Israeli tepakuikowesha." 
Hosea6:11 “Elyo nobe we Yuda, ine ninkuteyanishisha inshita iyakulobolola.” Ilyo lyonse nkafwaya nkabwesesha abantu bandi ishuko," 
Hosea7:1 “Kabili lyonse ilyo ine mfwaya ukuundapa abena Israeli, awe ine monafye ububifi bwa bena Efulemu, ne micitile iyabipa iya bena Samaria ilasokoloka. Balacenjeshanya, abapupu balatula amayanda no kwibamo ifintu, ifipondo nafyo filasansa abantu mu musebo." 
Hosea7:2 Mu mano yabo tabatontonkanya nangu panono ukuti, ine ndebukisha imicitile yabo yonse iyabubifi, pantu ububifi bwabo nabubashinguluka, no kubumona ine ndebumona.”" 
Hosea7:3 “Abantu balasansamusha imfumu yabo ku bucenjeshi bwabo ububi, balasansamusha na bacilolo bene ku bufi bwabo." 
Hosea7:4 Bonsefye ni mpulumushi sha bantu. Ubukali bwabo bupya ngo mulilo wa cakufumbikilamo umukate, uyo kapanga wa mukate tasonkeleshapo ukufuma apo akashile umufuba mpaka watutumuka." 
Hosea7:5 Ubushiku bumo ilyo imfumu ya calo yalesefya inshikunkulu, abantu balilengele ukuti ikolwe pamo na bacilolo baiko, no kubafye nge fipuba pa mulandu wakunwensha umwangashi." 
Hosea7:6 Ilyo abantu balebapangila, imitima yabo yalebilima ngo lubingu lwa mulilo. Mu cifuba cabo mwakabile bushiku bonse kulwa cipyu cabo, elyo ulucelo icipyu cabo calabilima ngo lubingu." 
Hosea7:7 Epakulaipaya bakateeka babo, pa nshita imitima yabo ilebilima ku cipyu. Ishamfumu shabo epakulakonkanyafye ukushipaya, ukwabula nelyo imo iyakumpapata pakuti ine njipokololeko nakalya.”" 
Hosea7:8 “Efulemu batobenkana ne mishobo ya benafyalo. Efulemu kapapatu ka mukate akapile ulubali lumo. 
Hosea7:9 Abeni nabamupoka amaka ukwabula ukwishiba. Teshibe nokuti mu mutwe wakwe muli mfwi nakalya. 
Hosea7:10 Kanshi icilumba ecileletelela abena Israeli. Nangu caba ifi, awe bena tebakubwelela uko ndi, nangu ukumfwaya, ine ne Yawe Lesa wabo." 
Hosea7:11 Abena Efulemu baba nge nkunda iyishakwata mano kabili iyatumpa, babutukila ku calo ca Egupto pakuti eco cibapokololeko, no kuya ku calo ca Asiria." 
Hosea7:12 Lelo ilyo baleya, ine nakulabateya isumbu, nakulabaponya panshi ngo tuni twa mu lwelele, nakulabalimuna pafyo balecita." 
Hosea7:13 “Ala nabashama pa mulandu wakufuma uko ndi. Bakaloba pantu nabansangukila. Ine nalefwaya ukubalubula, nomba balelanda ifyabufi pali ine." 
Hosea7:14 Tabalempapata ne mitima yabo yonse iyoo, nangu balendilila ilyo basendeme pa misengele yabo. Ilyo balomba iŋanu no mwangashi upya, balaitetaula imibili nga benafyalo. Aba bantu, awe tepakuntalamina." 
Hosea7:15 Nangu nine mbakansha no kubakosha, awe bena kunsangukilafye." 
Hosea7:16 Tabafwaya ukubwelela kuwapulamo, baumalala ngo buta ubwaonaika. Intungulushi shabo bakashipaya ku lupanga, pantu shilanda mataki mataki. Pali ici bakabaseka nganshi mu calo ca Egupto.”" 
Hosea8:1 Yawe alisosele ati, “Lisha ipenga ilyakwishibisha abantu ukuti inkondo yafika. Abalwani baisa mukusansa icalo candi nga bakapumpe. Abantu bandi nabonaula icipangano ico ine napangene nabo, nabatalamina na mafunde yandi." 
Hosea8:2 Nelyo abena Israeli balilila kuli ine abati, ‘We Lesa wesu, ifwe tuli bantu bobe.’" 
Hosea8:3 Abena Israeli balisuula ifintu ifisuma, E mulandu wine na balwani babo bakulabasupila." 
Hosea8:4 “Abantu bandi abenefye beka ebasonta ishamfumu shakubateeka ukwabula no kulanjipusha. Abene ebaisalila intungulushi, ukwabula nokuti ine ndebasuminisha. Balibuula silifa wabo na golide wabo, eo bapangamo utulubi, nato kabili utwakubonaulafye." 
Hosea8:5 Ine nalipata cilya ciponti ca golide, ico mupepa mwe bena Samaria. Ine nalibafulilwa nganshi. Bushe ni lilali bakaba abasanguluka imitima?" 
Hosea8:6 Ni kabasa umo umwina Israeli ewapanga cilya cilubi ca ciponti, naco te cilesa nakalya. Cilya ciponti ca golide ico abantu bapepa mu Samaria, ala cikasansaika." 
Hosea8:7 “Abena Israeli baletandafye umwela, lelo kwena bakaseepa kankungwe. Iŋanu mwibala tashapakule, eico tekuti mufume bunga ubwakupangamo umukate. Nangufye shipakule, shipye, abenafyalo kuti ebalashilya." 
Hosea8:8 Abena Israeli ala balibamina, nomba balifye nga bantu ba mishobo imbi yonse iya benafyalo, kwati fyanangwa fya bantu, ifyabula incito." 
Hosea8:9 Bataleme nga bapunda wa mpanga, abalelolafye kumbi kumbi. Balebutukila ku calo ca Asiria pakuti baye bapokololako. Abena Efulemu balelipila abantu ba mitundu imbi pakuti ebo balebapokololako." 
Hosea8:10 Nelyo balelipila abenafyalo, ine nomba nkabalonganika pamo, Tapapite na nshita, balayamba ukonaika, pa nshita imfumu ya ku Asiria yakulabateeka buluku buluku." 
Hosea8:11 “Nelyo abena Efulemu balefusha ifibumbili fya malambo, pakuti epo baletulila imitulo yakupapata pa fibi fyabo, awe elintu balecililako ukulafusha ifibumbili fyakubifishamo." 
Hosea8:12 Nangu aba bantu ine nabalembela amafunde ayashaifulila, bena bayamonafye yambi yambi." 
Hosea8:13 Pa fyabupe fyandi ifya malambo, balepayapo inama no kuilya, lelo ine ne Yawe nshibekelwamo, Nomba ine ne Yawe nkebukisha ububi bwabo, no kubakanda pa fyabubifi fyabo, kabili bakabwelelamo ku calo ca Egupto." 
Hosea8:14 “Abena Israeli nabalaba Kabumba wabo nabakuula na mayanda ye sano, na bena Yuda nabakuula imisumba ya malinga, Cisuma, ine nkaposa umulilo uwakwisa oca imisumba yabo, no koca amalinga ya misumba ayakosa.”" 
Hosea9:1 Mwe bena Israeli mwilasekelela. Mwilaanga pamo nge mishobo ya benafyalo, pantu tamwaba abacishinka kuli Lesa wenu, kabili namutemwa na malipilo yabucilende mu fipulilo fyonse ifya ŋanu." 
Hosea9:2 Icipulilo ne cakukaminamo umwangashi tafyakabaliishe, no mwangashi upya ukababula." 
Hosea9:3 Abena Efulemu bakaleka ukulaikala muli cino calo cakwa Yawe, bakabwelela ku calo ca Egupto, bakaya mukulalya ifyakulya ifyakowela mu calo ca Asiria." 
Hosea9:4 Bakaleka ukutuula imituulo ya mwangashi kuli Yawe, kabili na malambo yabo tayakamusekeshe. Icakulya ico bakalalyako cikaba nga filya fine icakulya ca pa malilo ciba. Icakulya cabo bakalacililafye insala, tabakalebuulapo icakuya tuula mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa." 
Hosea9:5 Bushe finshi mukalacita pa nshikunkulu shenu ishasontwa, na pa nshiku shakucindika Yawe?" 
Hosea9:6 Ilyo icinkunka cikesa, bakapashika. Abena Egupto ebakabalonganya, abena Memfisi ebakabashiika. Ifyuma fyabo ifya silifa fikasapilwa, na pa matenti yabo pakamena ifyani ne myunga." 
Hosea9:7 Ala inshita yakubakandilapo naifika, inshita yakulinganya pafyo bacita nayo naifika. Nga cacitika, elyo mwe bena Israeli mukeshiba, pantu ububifi bwenu nabufulisha, no kutalama nakukulisha. Imwe mumona kasesema icipuba ca muntu, mumona nokuti umuntu uwakwata Umupashi wakwa Lesa lishilufye." 
Hosea9:8 Kasesema e malonda wa bena Efulemu, abantu bakwa Lesa wandi. Nomba konsefye uko apitila, balemuteya iciteyo. Muno mwine mu calo cakwa Lesa, emo abantu bapata kasesema." 
Hosea9:9 Abantu balifye cimbi cimbi ku bubi, balifye nga filya cali mu nshiku sha ba mu Gibea. Lesa akebukisha ifyabupulumushi fyabo, no kubakandila pa fyabubifi fyabo." 
Hosea9:10 Ilyo nasangile abena Israeli cali kwati nasangile apali imyangashi mu matololo. Ilyo nasangile ifikolwe fyenu cali kwati namona ifitwalo fyantanshi ku mukunyu mu mwaka wantanshi wauko. Nomba ilyo bafikile ku Baali Peori, bena balitampile ukulapepa Baali, bwangu bwangu babipabipafye ngo tulubi twine uto batemenwa." 
Hosea9:11 Ukucindama kwakwa Efulemu kukapupuka nge cuni icapupuka no kuya, tabakalefyala abana nakabili iyoo, abakashi babo bakaleka ukuba pabukulu, tabakaleimita nakalya." 
Hosea9:12 Nangu nga cakuti balafyalapo abana, abo bana nkalabepaya, nshakaleshapo nelyo umo uwakuti akalekula. Ilyo ine nkabafutatila, ala bakashama icine cine." 
Hosea9:13 Abana bakwa Efulemu ifyo mwene baletwalwa mukusantaulwa, Efulemu euli nokusenda abana bakwe abaume mukuyabepaya." 
Hosea9:14 Ubapeele we Yawe, nomba ni finshi walabapeela? Ubapeelefye amafumo ayashifyala, na mabele ayauma ayashonsha." 
Hosea9:15 Yawe alisosele ati, “Ububi bonse ubwa bena Israeli, bwatampile ku Giligali, eko na ine natampile ukubapata. Ine nkabafulumunamo mu ŋanda yandi pa mulandu wa micitile yabo ibi. Nshakabatemwe nakabili iyoo, intungulushi shabo shonse shalinsangukila." 
Hosea9:16 Abena Efulemu bali ngo muti uwalokota uo imishila yauko yumine, uulefilwa no kulatwala ifitwalo. Nga cakuti balafyala abana, ine abo bana batemwisha nkalabepaya.”" 
Hosea9:17 Lesa uo ine mombela akatamfya abantu bakwe, pantu bena balikaana ukulamumfwa. Bakalalulumbafye mu mishobo ya benafyalo." 
Hosea10:1 Abena Israeli baba ngo mwangashi uwayanda uutwalisha ifisabo. Batila nga balacililako ukushuka, ninshi elyo balacililako ukulafusha ifibumbili fya malambo. Ifintu nga fyalafulilako mu calo cabo, ninshi nabo elyo balacililako ukuwaminisha inceshi shakupepa." 
Hosea10:2 Mu mitima yabo tamwaba cishinka, eico bali nokukandilwapo pa bubi bwabo. Yawe umwine eukabongolola ifibumbili fyabo ifya malambo, ne nceshi shabo shine isho bapepa eukashonaula." 
Hosea10:3 Aba bantu tabakakokole ukulaishinina abene, “Awe nomba tatukwete mfumu yakututeeka, pantu tatwakwete katiina kuli Yawe. Nomba nangu line atukwata imfumu yakututeeka, bushe finshi ingatubombela?”" 
Hosea10:4 Balanda amashiwi ya cisosesose, imilapo yabufi eyo bapangilako ifipangano, Ulufyengo elupyanine pa mulinganya, nalo lulekulilakofye nge fyani ifibaba, filya fikula mu mikolwa ye bala." 
Hosea10:5 Abaikala mu musumba wa Samaria bakalakanka ku mwenso, kabili bakalaloosha pa mulandu wakonaika kwa ciponti ca golide, ico bapepa ku Beti Afeni. Abantu pamo na bashimapepo ba aka kene kalubi bakalakaloosha. Bakalalila nganshi abalesekelela mu bucindami bwakako ubusendelwe." 
Hosea10:6 Bakakasenda, bakakatwala ku calo ca Asiria, no kuya katuula ku mfumu nkalamba iyateeka icalo. Abena Efulemu bakasebana, abena Israeli bakekatwa ne nsoni pa mulandu wa kalubi kabo." 
Hosea10:7 Imfumu ya ku Samaria na bena musumba bene bakasendwa, bakaya baleelela pa menshi kwati kapapala ka cimuti." 
Hosea10:8 Incende sha bubifi isho bacindika, isho shine abena Israeli bapepelamo utulubi shikonaulwa. Muli isho ncende mukamena imyunga ne fyani pa malambo pene. Abantu bakalalilila impili abati, “Tufiseniko!” no tupili bakalatulilila abati, “Twilikisheniko!”" 
Hosea10:9 Yawe alisosele ati, “Imwe mwe bena Israeli, ukutulafye apo mwabifishe mu musumba wa Gibea, awe na nombaline tamulaleka ukulabifya kuli ine. Kanshi nomba mukashingwana ne nkondo nga filya fine cali ku babifi mu Gibea mwine." 
Hosea10:10 Ilyo nkafwaya, elyo nkesa mukukanda aba bana balufyengo, imishobo ya benafyalo ikalongana no kubalimuna pa filubo fyabo fibili." 
Hosea10:11 “Efulemu, kale ali ngo musepela wa ŋombe uyo banasha no kubelesha, uwatemwa ukulanyantaula iŋanu apo bashipulila. Awe ine nomba nimpanga ukumufwika ikoli mu mukoshi wakwe uusuma, Yuda nao akulakula pulao, Yakobo ena akulakula icela cakusankabwilako." 
Hosea10:12 Tandeni ubulungami pakuti mukaseepe icitemwiko icishipwa Limeni ibala lipya, pantu inshita yakufwaya Yawe naifika, mpaka akese no kumuletela ubulungami." 
Hosea10:13 Nomba imwe mubyalafye ububi, no kulobololamo ishamo, mulyamo ne fisabo ifyo ububi bwenu buletapo. “Apo imwe mwashinta imitima mu maceleta yenu, na mu bwingi bwa fita fyenu," 
Hosea10:14 kanshi inkondo ikabuukila abantu benu, na malinga yenu yonse yakonaika. Cikaba nga filya fine imfumu Shalimani yaonawile mu nkondo umusumba wa Beti Abeli, yaipaululamo na bana kumo kwine na banyinabo." 
Hosea10:15 Efyo cikaba na kuli imwe mwe bantu baba mu Betele, pa mulandu wa bubi bwenu ubushaikulila. Lintufye bulya bushiku bwine bukesa imfumu iyamuteeka ikafwa no kufwa.”" 
Hosea11:1 Yawe alisosele ati, “Ilyo Israeli ali umwaice ine nalimutemenwe, kabili naitile umwana wandi umwaume ukufuma mu Egupto." 
Hosea11:2 Nomba ilyo ine nacililemo ukubeta, nabo elyo bacililemo ukulantaluka. Balalekela na imilungu ba Baali amalambo, balafutumwina no tulubi ububani." 
Hosea11:3 Kwena nine nalangilile abena Efulemu ukwamba ukwenda, nine nalebalela, lelo bena tabaishibe ukuti nine nalebaposha." 
Hosea11:4 Nalebatungulula ku fikakilo fyaluse, na ku myando ya citemwiko, nine nafumishe ikoli mu mikoshi yabo, no kubasunga nine mbasunga." 
Hosea11:5 “Bakabwelela ku calo ca Egupto, bakateekwa ne calo ca Asiria, pantu balikaana ukubwelela kuli ine." 
Hosea11:6 Mu misumba yabo mukaba inkondo, iyikonaula ifishimbi fya pa mpongolo ishabamo, no kubonaula pa bubi bwa mapange yabo." 
Hosea11:7 Abantu bandi balikonenwa mukufwaya ukuntaluka eico balipeelwa kwikoli. Kanshi nangu bengapepa shani kuli ine tekuti mbakakule ikoli iyoo. 
Hosea11:8 “Bushe ine kuti nakusha shani, we Efulemu? Ngakuti ine nakuposelekesha shani, we Israeli? Bushe ine kuti nakulofya, nga filya nalofeshe umushi wa Adima? Nangu ukukucita nga filya nacitile umusumba wa Seboimu? Awe mu mano yandi ine calikaana, pantu umutima wandi ulakubauka pa mulandu wakukutemwisha iwe." 
Hosea11:9 Ine nshakakufokele mu cipyu, awe nshakonaule nakabili we Efulemu, pantu ine ndi Lesa, nshili muntu iyoo, nine ne Wamushilo pakati kenu, nshakese mukumulofya nakalya." 
Hosea11:10 “Bakakonka Yawe ilyo akabuluma nge nkalamo, Cine Yawe akabuluma elyo abana bakwe bakesa baletutuma ukufuma ku masamba." 
Hosea11:11 Pakufuma mu calo ca Egupto, bakangufyanya no kwisa nge fyuni, pakufuma mu calo ca Asiria, bakendesha no kwisa bwangu bwangufye nge nkunda. Na ine nkababika mu fifulo fyabo. Nine ne Yawe nalanda." 
Hosea11:12 “Efulemu alembepa ubufi, aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli nabo bacita ubucenjeshi. Yuda nao acili alentalamina ine ne Lesa, aletalamina ine ne Wamushilo uwacishinka. ”" 
Hosea12:1 “Abena Efulemu batamfya umwela, basupila umwela wa ku kabanga akasuba konse, Bacililakofye ukulakwata ubucenjeshi no lufyengo. Balapangana icumfwano na bantu ba mu calo ca Asiria, mu makwebo yabo batwala amafuta ya miolifa ku Egupto." 
Hosea12:2 Yawe ali nokupeela Yuda umulandu, kabili napanga ukukanda Yakobo pa myendele yakwe, no kulandula pa micitile yakwe." 
Hosea12:3 Ninshi nyinabo acili nabemita, Yakobo aikete Esau Mpundu munankwe ku citende. Ilyo Yakobo akulile, nalyo balishombweke na Lesa." 
Hosea12:4 Kabili alilwile na malaika, asuka acimfya malaika, epakulila apapata ukuti malaika amupaale. Lesa alikumenye Yakobo ku Betele, no kulanda nankwe kulya kwine," 
Hosea12:5 ala ni Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita, Yawe e shina lyakwe ilyaishibikwa." 
Hosea12:6 Kanshi nomba imwe, bweleleni kuli Lesa wenu, mulekwata icitemwiko no mulinganya. Kabili lyonse mulelolela pali Lesa.”" 
Hosea12:7 Kabili Yawe alisosele ati, “Abena Efulemu balinganafye na bamakwebo ababomfya ifipimo fyabufi, balitemwa no kucenjesha abanabo." 
Hosea12:8 Balalanda abati, ‘Ifwe tuli bakankala, natunonka ifyuma. Mu milimo yandi iyabunonshi, tabakasangemo ubupulumushi nangu ifyabubifi.’" 
Hosea12:9 “Ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu ne wamufumishe ku Egupto. Ine nkaleka nakabili mukaleikala mu nsakwe, nga filya caleba mu nshiku shasontwa ishakusefya." 
Hosea12:10 Nine nalelanda kuli bakasesema, no kulabalanga ifimonwa ifingi. Nine nalesoka abantu bandi mu milumbe iyalandile bakasesema." 
Hosea12:11 “Abantu balapepa utulubi ku Gileadi, na bantu abatupepa bakalobelapo. Ku Giligali balatuulako amalambo ya bacilume wa ŋombe ku tulubi, kanshi ifibumbili fyabo ifya malambo fikatulumana imina ya mabwe mu mikolwa ya mu mabala yabo.”" 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo abutukile ku calo cabatama ica Aramu, Israeli abombele ukuupa umwanakashi, acemene impaanga pakulipila impango." 
Hosea12:13 Yawe alitumine kasesema umo pakulubula Israeli mu busha bwa mu Egupto, kabili Yawe abomfeshe uyu wine kasesema ukumusunga." 
Hosea12:14 Efulemu, awe tepakukalifya Yawe umutima. Alingilefye ukufwa pa mulandu wakuleta imisoka. Lesa akabalimuna pa mulandu wakukanamucindika." 
Hosea13:1 Ilyo Efulemu alelanda, baletutuma bonse, pantu aba mu calo ca Israeli balimucindike. Lelo aisa ba no mulandu uwakupepa Baali, no kufwa afwa." 
Hosea13:2 Na nombaline bacili balekonkanyapofye ukubifya, balepanga ifipasho fya milungu ifya cela, bacili balebuula silifa wabo no kulapangamo utulubi utwakupepa, tonse utwapangwa na bafundi ba fyakufulafula. Kuli aba bantu ekwalandwa amashiwi yakuti, balafyompa utuombe ku milomo yabo pakushituula amalambo." 
Hosea13:3 Ala kanshi aba bantu bakongoloka nga fubefube, bakakuntika ngo mume uupwa ku nshita ya lucelo. Bakaba nge misungu iyulululwa ku mwela pa cipulilo, bakongoloka nge cushi icilefuma pa nsolokoto." 
Hosea13:4 Yawe aletila ati, “Ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu, nine namufumishe ku calo ca Egupto. Tamwakwatapo Lesa na umbi nakalya, kanofye ine neka. Ine neka nine mupusushi wenu." 
Hosea13:5 Nine nalemusunga ilyo mwali mu matololo, umwakaba umushaba menshi." 
Hosea13:6 Nomba cilya mwalya ifyo namupeele, awe mwaikuta, kabili mwakwata ne cilumba, no kundaba ine mwandabako." 
Hosea13:7 Cisuma, kanshi ine nomba nkamwimina nge nkalamo, nkamulalilila mu nshila nge mbwili." 
Hosea13:8 Nkamufukukila nge ciswango ca bea ico bapokolwele utwana. Nkamusansa no kumulepaula, epo nkamucibawila nge nkalamo, nkamusantaula nga filya fine ficita iciswango." 
Hosea13:9 “Nkamukanda imwe mwe bena Israeli, pantu namunsangukila ine ne kafwa wenu." 
Hosea13:10 Nga nomba imfumu yenu iyakumupususha ili kwi? Intungulushi shenu kuti shamupokololako shani, isho mwalombele ukuti, ‘Tupeeleni imfumu ne ntungulushi?’" 
Hosea13:11 Ala ine ni ku cipyu namupeelele imfumu iyakumuteeka, kabili naifumishepo ku cifukushi." 
Hosea13:12 Iwe we Efulemu, umufulo obe walilembwa, ifibi fyobe fyalisungwa mu citabo." 
Hosea13:13 Nyina nakomwe fumo, nomba kamwane takakwete amano, pantu kena lilya kali mupepi no kufyalwa, nomba takalefwaya ukufuma munda." 
Hosea13:14 “Ala ine nshakabalubule ku calo ca bafwa. Nshakabapususheko ku mfwa nakalya. We mfwa we, ale icikuko cobe cili kwi? We calo ca bafwa we, ale ulubola lobe luli kwi? Ine nomba naleka ukulabalangulukilako." 
Hosea13:15 Nangufye balulubale nga matete, nakalyafye, ine ne Yawe nkemya umwela wakaba uwa ku kabanga, umwela ukatula ku matololo, ukesakamya intulo sha mimana yabo kumo kwine ne fishima fyabo. Ukesa senda ne fintu fyabo fyonse ifyamutengo ifyo batutila." 
Hosea13:16 Abena musumba wa Samaria bakalimunwa pa mulandu wakuntalamina ine ne Lesa wabo. Bakafwa ku nkondo, utwana twabo pakutwipaya bakalatunyankula panshi, na bakashi babo abakaba pabukulu bakalabatumbula amafumo pakubepaya.”" 
Hosea14:1 Mwe bena Israeli, ala bweleleni kuli Yawe Lesa wenu. Ububi bwenu ebwalenga ukuti muletalansuka, no kuwa mulewa." 
Hosea14:2 Bweleleni kuli Yawe, ne fyakuya landa pakumupapata nifi. Muyetila amuti, “Wingatubelelako uluse ku fibi fyesu fyonse, umfwa nefyo tulekupapata, pakuti ifwe tulekupeela amalumbo ya tunwa twesu, nge lambo lya fiponti fya ŋombe." 
Hosea14:3 Abena Asiria tabakwata maka yakutupusushako, amaceleta ya nkondo kuti yafilwa ukulatupokololako. Utulubi uto twaipangila, tatwakabwekeshepo nakabili ukulatweba atuti, ‘Imwe nimwe Lesa wesu,’ Twashininkisha ukuti niwefye we Yawe ulangulukilako abana banshiwa." 
Hosea14:4 “Ine nkalungika ubupondamishi bwabo, nakulabatemwa no mutima wandi onse, ine nomba naleka ukubafulilwa." 
Hosea14:5 Nakulamima pali Israeli, nga filya umume ucita, nabo bakulabengeshima nga maluba ayapakula. Bakulashangila mu calo nge miti iyakosa iya keda ku Lebanoni, iyo imishila yaya panshi." 
Hosea14:6 Utumisambo twakwe tukapuka, no kuyemba kwakwe kulamoneka nge miolifa. Akalanunkila bwino nge miti ya keda iya ku Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Bakabwela mukwikala mu cintelelwe candi. Bakulalulubala nge bala lya ŋanu, no kulasanduluka nge bala lya myangashi. Bakulalumbuka ngo mwangashi wa ku Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 We Efulemu, bushe mulimo nshi utulubi tukwete kuli ine? Ine ndomfwa amapepo yobe, no kukusunga ndakusunga, naba ngo mulemu uwalelema, ni kuli ine ekutula ishuko lyobe lyonse.”" 
Hosea14:9 Abamano bali nokwishiba umo ifi filolele, elyo abamucetekanya nabo bakeluka pali ifi fyonse. Inshila shakwa Yawe shintu shalungama na balungami emo benda. Lelo ababifi bena balafilwa ukushikonka." 
Joel1:1 Aya e mashiwi yakwa Yawe ayaishile kuli Yoeli mwana Petueli, ayakuti:" 
Joel1:2 Umfweni kuno, imwe mwe bakalamba, kutikeni kuno na imwe bonse mwe baikala mu calo. Bushe kwalitala akumoneka icintu ica uyu musango apo mwafyalilwa, nangu bushe calitalile acimoneka ilyo bashinwe baliko?" 
Joel1:3 Muleshimikilako abana benu, pakuti nabo bakashimikileko abana babo, abana babo nabo bakashimikileko abana babo." 
Joel1:4 Ala ifintu ifyo makanta ulya aputaula ashileko, efyo makanta ulya atebelela aishile lyako. Ifyo makanta ulya atebelela ashileko, efyo makanta ulya atolauka aishile lyako. Ifyo makanta ulya atolauka ashileko, efyo makanta ulya apwishishisha aishile lya." 
Joel1:5 Shibukeni imwe mwe bacakolwa nokulila. Pumenipo imisowa, imwe mwe banwa umwangashi, pantu nomba uyu mwangashi uwalowa tauli nokubako nakabili ku milomo yenu." 
Joel1:6 Pantu makanta uwingi nakupa icalo candi, kwati fita fya nkondo. Elyo uyu wine makanta tepamaka, kabili tewakupenda ku bwingi. Ameno yakwe yaba kwati meno ya nkalamo, na meno yakusuminako kwati ya nkalamo iyikota." 
Joel1:7 Uyu makanta naonaula imishila yandi iya myangashi, nakontaula imikunyu yandi. Nashetaula ifipande fya miti no kuiwisha panshi, ne misambo yaiko ishelefye tutu." 
Joel1:8 Loosha nga filya umukashana uushabala opwa afwala insalu shabulanda pakuloosha imfwa ya mulumendo uwamukobekela. 
Joel1:9 Takushele umutuulo wa cabunga nangu uwa fyakunwa, uwakutuula mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe, eico bashimapepo ababomfi bakwa Yawe baleloosesha." 
Joel1:10 Pantu mu mabala tamushele nelyo kamo. Umushili nao uleloosha, pantu iŋanu nashonaika. Umwangashi upya naukama, ne miti yakwengako amafuta nayo nayuma." 
Joel1:11 Kwateni insoni, imwe mwe balimi, na imwe mwe balima imyangashi. Pumenipo imisowa pa mulandu wa ŋanu na bale, pantu ifisabo ifyakulobololako fyonse nafyonaika." 
Joel1:12 Imishila ya myangashi nayuma, imikunyu nayo naibonsa, elyo imiteke, utuncindu na maapo, ne miti yonse iya mwibala nayuma. Ne nsansa ku bana ba bantu nasho nashipwa." 
Joel1:13 Mwe bashimapepo fwaleni insalu shabulanda, mwe babomfi abatuula amalambo pa bulambo bwakwa Lesa mulilishefye. Kengileni mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa no kubucesha emo mubuceshe, ninshi namufwala ne insalu shabulanda, mwe babomfi bakwa Lesa wandi, pantu umutuulo wa cabunga no wa fyakunwa tafilemoneka ifyakutuula mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wenu." 
Joel1:14 Konkomesheni abantu ukuti bafunge ukulya, iteni ulukuta lonse lwise lukwate ukulongana kwamushilo. Longanikeni abakalamba na bonse abaikala mu calo, ukuti baye mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe Lesa wenu, emo baye mukulilila kuli Yawe." 
Joel1:15 Yangu ubushiku! Pantu ubu bushiku bwakwa Yawe buli mupepi, ubo Umwine wa maka yonse akesa onawilapo fyonsefye." 
Joel1:16 Bushe ifyakulya fyesu tafisendelwe, kabili tuimwenenefye na menso yesu? Bushe tafyapwa insansa ne cimwemwe mu ŋanda yakwa Lesa wesu?" 
Joel1:17 Imbuto nashuminina mu mushili ushilokelelwa ku mfula, amayanda yakubikamo ifyakulya nayonaika. Na matala yene umushaba kantu nayabongoloka, pantu takuli imbuto ishakubikamo, shonse nashuma." 
Joel1:18 Yangu ifyo ifinama filelila ku nsala! Amabumba ya ŋombe yalelaka lakafye, pantu umwakuya shicemena tamuli mulemfwe, ne mikuni ya mpaanga nayo ileculila kumo." 
Joel1:19 Ni kuli iwe we Yawe ndelilila, pantu umulilo naonaula ifyani fyakucemenamo ifya mu mpanga, no lubingu naloca imiti yonse iya mu mabala." 
Joel1:20 Ne nama sha mu mpanga nomba shilelililafye kuli imwe, pantu amenshi nayakama mu tumimana, no mulilo naoca ifyani fyakucemenamo ifya mu mpanga." 
Joel2:1 Lisheni ipenga mu Sioni, mulishe kamangu pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo. Muleke bonse abaikala mu calo bekatwe umwenso, pantu ubushiku bwakwa Yawe buli mukwisa, kabili buli mupepi." 
Joel2:2 Bukaba ubushiku bwa mfifi, nayo iyafiita fititi, ubushiku bwa makumbi ne mfifi iyikalamba nganshi. Nga filya amacaca yakupa pa mulu wa mpili, efyo ibumba ilikalamba ilya fita ifyakosa likesa. Takwatala akumoneka icintu ca uyu musango ukufuma ku nshita ya ku kale, na kuntanshi kwine tacakatale acimoneka nakabili." 
Joel2:3 Ku ntanshi yabo fyonse fyaonaulwa ku mulilo ulepya. Kunuma yabo ilyo bapita kwashala fititi kwati lubingu lwa mulilo locele. Ilyo tabalapita, icalo cilemoneka kwati ni mwibala lya Edeni, nomba cilya bapita, impanga yashala ilemoneka ngo mupile umupya no konaulwa. Kabili tabashamo nelyo kamo." 
Joel2:4 Imimonekele yabo yaba kwati ni bakabalwe, nga bakabalwe ba nkondo ababutuka ulubilo." 
Joel2:5 Ilyo baletolauka pa mulu wa mpili, bapanga icongo kwati maceleta, nangu kwati cani icauma icilepya ku mulilo. Kwati libumba ilikalamba ilya fita ilileiteyanya kukulwa inkondo." 
Joel2:6 Abantu aba mitundu yonse balekatwa umwenso ilyo bamona uko fileisa, ninshi na pa finso pawa." 
Joel2:7 Basansa kwati fita fya nkondo, banina ifibumba kwati bashilika. Na pakwenda onse kulungamafye apo alolele, takuli kwalukila nangu kumo." 
Joel2:8 Takuba nelyo umo uwakupunka umubiye iyoo. Cila umo alolafye apo alungeme, ukwabula ukusakamana ku fyanso ifilefwintwa, ne milongo yabo taiputuka." 
Joel2:9 Nga balasansa umusumba, bacilukila pa mulu wa malinga. Balanina mu mayanda pa mulu wa mitenge, no kulaingilila pa nsolokoto kwati ni mpupu." 
Joel2:10 Isonde lilatenkana pakumona uko baleisa, no mulu ulatenta. Akasuba no mweshi fyafiita fititi, ne ntanda nasho shaleka ukubeka." 
Joel2:11 Yawe asansule shiwi ku ntanshi ya fita fyakwe, iyee umulalo uyu ubukulu. Ifita ifinakila amafunde yakwa Yawe tefyakupenda ku bwingi. Yangu, we bushiku bwakwa Yawe nobe ulakula ee, kabili ulatiinya. Nga nani uwingashipikishamo?" 
Joel2:12 Yawe asosa ati, “Kanshi na nombaline bweleleni kuli ine ne mitima yenu yonse, mukufunga ukulya na mukulila ifilamba no kuloosha.”" 
Joel2:13 Pakulanga ubulanda, lepuleni imitima yenu, tefyakufwala iyoo. Bweleleni kuli Yawe Lesa wenu, pantu aba uwacikuku kabili uwaluse, tafulwa bwangu kabili aba no kutemwa ukukalamba, takokola nokubwesha umutima." 
Joel2:14 Nga ni nani engeshiba nga cakuti Yawe Lesa wesu kuti abwesha umutima, no kutushila ipaalo pakutupeela ifisabo. Pantu lyena ninshi kuti twakwata umutuulo wa cabunga, no wa cakunwa ifyakwa Yawe Lesa wesu." 
Joel2:15 Lisheni ipenga mu Sioni, konkomesheni abantu ukuti bafunge ukulya, iteni ulukuta lonse lwise lukwate ukulongana kwamushilo." 
Joel2:16 Longanikeni abantu pamo, sangululeni ulukuta. Iteni abakalamba, longanikeni na baice, mulonganye no tunya twine utwa kwibele. Shibwinga na nabwinga bafume mu muputule wabo, nabo bene beseko." 
Joel2:17 Lekeni bashimapepo ababombela Yawe bekale pakati ka mpongolo no bulambo epo balelilila, baletila, “Langulukila abantu bobe we Yawe, belelako abantu bobe uluse. Wileka ifwe fwe cikwatwa cobe tusebane, na bantu ba mishobo batusuule. Nga cinshi ico abenafyalo bengalatuwelela, no kutwipusha abati, ‘Awe, nga Lesa wabo ali kwi?’”" 
Joel2:18 Elyo Yawe akakwata ubufuba pa calo cakwe, no kulangulukila abantu bakwe." 
Joel2:19 Elyo pakwasuka abantu bakwe, Yawe akabeba ati, “Nomba nalamutumina iŋanu, umwangashi upya, elyo na mafuta. Kabili mwakulaikuta, na ine nshakaleke nomba ukuti imishobo ya benafyalo ikamusebanye." 
Joel2:20 “Nalatalusha umulwani wa ku kapinda ka ku kuso ukufuma kuli imwe, ndemutamfisha mu calo icauma umushaba kantu. Ulya atangila pantanshi, ndemutamfisha muli bemba wa ku kabanga, ulya nao akonka panuma, ndemutamfisha muli bemba wa ku masamba, mpaka pakeme icena icanunka pipi.” Cinefye alicita ifintu ifikulu nganshi." 
Joel2:21 Iwe we calo leka ukutiina! Sekelela no kusansamuka pantu Yawe alicita ifintu ifikulu nganshi. 
Joel2:22 Na imwe mwe nama sha mu mpanga mwitiina, pantu umulemfwe naumena mu mpanga. Imiti naitwala ifitwalo, imikunyu ne myangashi nayo naitwala nganshi." 
Joel2:23 Na imwe mwe bena Sioni sansamukeni, sansamukeni muli Yawe Lesa wenu. Pantu mu bulungami namuletela imfula ya mainsa iya pakutendeka, nalenga ne mfula iyingi ukuloka nga filya cali kale, imfula ya pakutendeka elyo ne yakulekelesha." 
Joel2:24 Apakupumina iŋanu pakaba imina iyikulu, ne fikamino fikesula umwangashi elyo na mafuta." 
Joel2:25 “Ndi nokumubwesesha ifya pa myaka yonse iyo makanta alilemo ifisabo fyenu. Makanta ulya aputaula, ulya atebelela, ulya atolauka na ulya apwishishisha, ifita fyandi ifikalamba ifyo natumine kukulwisha imwe." 
Joel2:26 Kanshi nomba mwakulakwata ifilyo ifingi, ifyakuti mulelya nokwikuta. Mukambe no kulumbanya ishina lyakwa Yawe Lesa wenu, uwabomba pali imwe ifintu ifyakupapa. Na imwe mwe bantu bandi nomba tamwakatale amwikatwa insoni nakalya." 
Joel2:27 Elyo mwe bena Israeli mukeshiba ukuti kanshi ine naba pakati kenu, nokuti ine ne Yawe nine Lesa wenu, takwaba na umbi. Mwe bantu bandi, nomba tamwakatale amwikatwa insoni nakalya." 
Joel2:28 “Pa numa ya ifi fintu, ine ne Yawe nkapongolwela Umupashi wandi pa bantu bonse, elyo abana benu abaume na bana benu abanakashi bakalasesema amashiwi yandi, abakote benu bakalalota ifiloto, na bana benu abalumendo bakalamona ifimonwa." 
Joel2:29 Mu nshiku shilya, cinefye nkapongolwelapo Umupashi wandi na pa babomfi bandi bene abaume na banakashi." 
Joel2:30 “Nkalanga ifinjelengwe mulya mu mulu na pano isonde. Kukaba umulopa no mulilo ne ntumba ya cushi. 
Joel2:31 Akasuba kakafiita fititi, no mweshi nao ukakashika ngo mulopa, ilyo ninshi tabulafika ubushiku bukalamba ubwakutiinya ubwakwa Yawe." 
Joel2:32 Lelo abantu bonse abakalilila peshina lyakwa Yawe ebakapusuka. Pantu mu lupili lwa Sioni na mu Yerusalemu emukesa ikala abalepusuka, ukulingana nefyo Yawe alanda. Pantu abakapusuka bakaba ni abo Yawe aita.”" 
Joel3:1 “Pantu mu nshiku shine shilya, kabili pa nshita ine ilya, elyo nkabwesesha abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu ishuko lyabo." 
Joel3:2 Kabili elintu nkalonganika imishobo ya benafyalo yonse, no kubaleta mwishika lya Yehoshafati. Emo nkabalubulwisha bonse pali fyonse ifyo bacita ku bantu bandi abena Israeli ababa icikwatwa candi. Pantu ebabasalanganishishe mu fyalo fimbi ifya benafyalo, basha bayakana ne calo candi ica Israeli." 
Joel3:3 Iyi ine imishobo eyalependula pakwakana bantu bandi. Yaleshitisha abalumendo pakuti ikwatilepo bacilende, kabili yaleshitisha abakashana pakuti inwenepo umwangashi." 
Joel3:4 Nakuba ni cinshi ico imwe muli kuli ine, mwe bena Turi na bena Sidoni, na imwe bonse mwe ba mu ncende sha Bafilisiti? Bushe pali cimo ico mulefwaila ukucita icilandushi kuli ine? Nga efyo mulefwaya, ine nine nalalenga icilandushi ukuti cimwalukile bwangu bwangu mwe bene." 
Joel3:5 Imwe nimwe mwanjibila silifa na golide, no kunsendela ifintu ifyamutengo, mwaya fibika na mu matempele yenu umo mupepela." 
Joel3:6 Imwe nimwe mwashitisha abantu ba mu calo ca Yuda na ba mu Yerusalemu ku Bagiriki, mwaleka nokuti babatwale ukutali ne calo cabo." 
Joel3:7 Lelo ine nomba nalabasalapula, bafume mu fyalo umo mwabashitisha. Na imwe nomba nalamucita nga filya fine nemwe mwabacitile." 
Joel3:8 Nalashitisha abana benu abaume na bana benu abakashana ku bena Yuda. Nabo abena Yuda bakabashitisha ku bena Seba, umutundu wa bantu abaikala kumbi kumbifye ukushailepela. Pantu ne Yawe nine ndelanda.”" 
Joel3:9 Bileni imbila ku mishobo amuti, “Iteyanyeni kukulwa inkondo yamushilo. Pekanyeni abakulwa nkondo. Lekeni ifita fyonse fipalame mupepi. Fyonse fiye mukusansa." 
Joel3:10 Mubuule inkasu shenu ishakuliminako, mufulemo ifyanso ifyakulwilako, buuleni ne fikwakwa fyenu mufulemo amafumo. Ne mbulwamaka ya muntu ine nayo itile, ‘Na ine ndi mpalume.’" 
Joel3:11 Endesheni ukwisa, imwe mwe mishobo yonse iyashinguluka, mwise mulongane kulya. Wishe ne mpalume shobe ishamaka we Yawe." 
Joel3:12 Imishobo yonse naime, ise mwishika lya Yehoshafati, pantu palya pene epo nkekala pakupingula imishobo yonse iyashinguluka." 
Joel3:13 Eico bomfyeni icikwakwa no kuseepa, pantu inshita yakulobolola naifika. Iseni mwise mukandile. Ifyakukaminamo umwangashi nafisula, ne fyakubikamo filepala pantu ububi bwa iyi mishobo nabubipisha nganshi,”" 
Joel3:14 Abantu amabumba na mabumba, bali mwishika lyakuputwilamo imilandu, pantu ubushiku bwakwa Yawe nabupalama, mwishika lyakuputwilamo imilandu." 
Joel3:15 Akasuba no mweshi fyafiita fititi, ne ntanda nasho shaleka ukubeka." 
Joel3:16 Yawe apunda ne shiwi likalamba pa lupili lwa Sioni, no kupanta kwakwe kwaumfwika mu Yerusalemu, elyo umulu ne sonde fyalatenta. Lelo muli Yawe emo abantu boba pantu alacingilila, e shintililo lya bantu bakwe abena Israeli." 
Joel3:17 “Elyo imwe mwe bena Israeli, muli nokwishiba ukuti ine nine Yawe Lesa wenu, naikala mu Sioni pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo. Na Yerusalemu akulaba uwamushilo, takwakabe abenafyalo abalwani abakapitamo nangu ukumucimfya nakabili." 
Joel3:18 Ilyo bulya bushiku bukafika, mu mpili mukalafuma umwangashi uwalowa, na mu tupili utunono tonse mukalakonkoloka umukaka. No tumikonko twa tumimana tonse utwa mu Yuda tukalapitamo amenshi, na mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe mukafuma akamfukumfuku ka menshi, ayakalatapilila ifimuti fya akasia mwishika lya Shitimu." 
Joel3:19 Icalo ca Egupto cili nokonaika, ne calo ca Edomu cili nokonaika cikashalefye amatololo, pa mulandu wa buluku ubo bacitile ku bena Yuda, no kusumya umulopa wa balya bantu abakaele." 
Joel3:20 Lelo mu Yuda mukaba abakwikalamo umuyayaya, na mu Yerusalemu bakalaikalamo umwakonkanina inkulo shabo." 
Joel3:21 Nine nkalandula pa mulopa wa bantu bandi abo baipeye, pantu nshilalandula pa mulopa babasumishe. “Ine ne Yawe naikala mu Sioni!”" 
Amos1:1 Amashiwi ayasosele Amosi, uwali umo pali bakacema abafumine ku Tekoa, pafyo amwene pa bena Israeli ninshi kwashala imyaka ibili ukuti icinkukuma cikalamba cise. Cali e nshita Usia ateekele icalo ca Yuda, elyo Yeroboamu mwana Yoashi nao e nshita ateekele icalo ca Israeli." 
Amos1:2 Amosi alisosele ati, “Yawe uyo alebuluma mu Sioni, ishiwi lyakwe ilyo lilepanta mu Yerusalemu nge nkuba. Bakacema umo bacemena ifitekwa namuma, na pa lupili lwa Kameli icani nacifoota.”" 
Amos1:3 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa fyabubifi fitatu nelyo ifili fine ifya bena Damasiko, cine cinefye ine nshakafumyepo ubupingushi, pantu pakupuma abena Gileadi, babapumina ku fipulilo fya cela." 
Amos1:4 Na ine nomba nkaposa umulilo pa ŋanda ya mfumu Hasaeli, nkoca na malinga ayo imfumu Beni Hadadi yakuula." 
Amos1:5 Nkonaula impongolo sha mu musumba wa Damasiko, nkalofya kateeka ulya aikala mwishika lya Afeni, na ulya aikala aleteeka mu Beti Edeni. Abantu ba mu calo ca Siria bakabasenda bunkole, no kubatwala ku Kiri. Ee, nine Yawe nalanda.”" 
Amos1:6 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa fyabubifi fitatu nelyo fine ifya bena Gasa, cine cinefye ine nshakafumyepo ubupingushi, pantu bena balisendele muli bunkole abantu mu mishi ne misumba yonse, elyo no kuya bashitisha ku bantu ba mu calo ca Edomu." 
Amos1:7 Ee, na ine nomba nkaposa umulilo pa malinga ya musumba wabo uwa Gasa, nkoca ne misumba yabo iyamalinga." 
Amos1:8 Nkalofya kateeka ulya aikala mu musumba wa Ashidodi, na ulya aikala mu musumba wa Ashikeloni. Nkonaula no musumba wa Ekironi, na Bafilisiti abakashalapo bonsefye bakafwa. Nine Imfumu Yawe nalanda.”" 
Amos1:9 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa fyabubifi fitatu nelyo fine ifya bena Turi, cine cinefye ine nshakafumyepo ubupingushi, pantu bena balisendele muli bunkole abantu mu mishi ne misumba yonse, babatwala na mu calo ca Edomu. Tabaibukishe ukusunga icabwananyina ico bapangene nabo nakalya." 
Amos1:10 Na ine nomba nkaposa umulilo pa malinga ya musumba wabo uwa Turi, nkoca na mayanda ayakosa yalya yabamo.”" 
Amos1:11 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa fyabubifi fitatu nelyo fine ifya bena Edomu, cine cinefye ine nshakafumyepo ubupingushi, pantu bena balesenda ulupanga no kulasupila bamunyinabo abena Israeli, ukwabula nokuti balebalangulukilako nakalya. Bena icipyu cabo calebilimafye ngo lubingu lwa mulilo, tebakufwaya na kucinashako nakalya." 
Amos1:12 Na ine nomba nkaposa umulilo mu musumba wa Temani, nkoca ne misumba ya malinga iya ku Bosira.”" 
Amos1:13 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa fyabubifi fitatu nelyo fine ifya bena Amoni, cine cinefye ine nshakafumyepo ubupingushi, pantu ilyo balefwaya ukukushako umupaka wa calo cabo, bena mu nkondo, pakwipaya abanakashi ba mu Gileadi abali pabukulu, balebatumbulafye." 
Amos1:14 Na ine nomba nkaposa umulilo pa malinga ya musumba wabo uwa Raba, nkoca na mayanda ayakosa yalya ayabamo. Ubushiku bakalalwa, mukaba ukupunda mu musumba, ukulwa kukasalangana nge cimwela ca cikuuku." 
Amos1:15 Imfumu yabo iyabateeka ikasendwa bunkole, ikaya pamo na bacilolo baiko. Nine Yawe nalanda.”" 
Amos2:1 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa fyakubifya fitatu nelyo fine ifya bena Moabu, cine cinefye ine nshakafumyepo ubupingushi, pantu bena balyocele amafupa ya mfumu iyaleteeka icalo ca Edomu, mpakafye yashikisa." 
Amos2:2 Na ine nomba nkaposa umulilo mu calo ca bena Moabu, nkoca ne misumba ya malinga ilya yaba ku Kerioti. Abena Moabu bakafwila mu cimfulunganya, mu nkuuta sha bulwi, ne ciunda ce penga." 
Amos2:3 Ine nkalofya kateeka wa calo ca Moabu, nkepaya na bacilolo bakwe bonse. Ee, nine Yawe nalanda.”" 
Amos2:4 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa fyabubifi fitatu nelyo fine ifya bena Yuda, cine cinefye ine nshakafumyepo ubupingushi, pantu bena balisuula amafunde yakwa Yawe, balikaana no kulasunga ifipope fyakwe. Balibepwa ku milungu ilya iyabufi, iyo ne fikolwe fyabo fyalecindika." 
Amos2:5 Na ine nomba nkaposa umulilo mu calo ca Yuda, nkoca na mayanda ayakosa yalya ayaba mu musumba wabo uwa Yerusalemu.”" 
Amos2:6 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Pa fyabubifi fitatu nelyo fine ifya bena Israeli, cine cinefye ine nshakafumyepo ubupingushi, pantu abantu bashitisha abololoke pali silifa, na babusu pa nsapato shibili." 
Amos2:7 Banyantaula pa mitwe ya balanda, kwati ni pa lukungu lwa mushili, no kufumya mu nshila abantu abo bacusha. Bashibo pamo na bana babo abaume baya kuli bacilende bamo bene, efyo basebanya ishina lyandi ilyamushilo." 
Amos2:8 Mu ncende shonse umo bapepela, basendama pa nsalu sha cikatilamulandu. Mu ŋanda ya mulungu wabo emo banwena umwangashi, uo balipilisha abantu ababakongola indalama." 
Amos2:9 “Lelo kwena nalilofeshe abena Amoli pa cinso ca bena Israeli, balya bantu abali abalunduka nge miti ya keda iyalepesha, no kukwatisha ulukula nge fimuti fya oki. Nalofeshe ifitwalo fyabo pamulu, nalofya ne mishila yabo panshi." 
Amos2:10 “Nine wine namufumishe mu calo ca Egupto, namupisha na mu matololo pa myaka yonse ilya amakumi yane (40), nasuka namupeela ne calo ca bena Amoli." 
Amos2:11 Pa bana benu abaume, nalisalilepo bamo abakuba bakasesema ba mashiwi yandi, na bakuti babe Abanasiliti, emukuti abatuulwa kuli ine ne Lesa. Mwe bena Israeli, kaaneni nga teifyo. Nine Yawe ndelanda." 
Amos2:12 Nomba imwe mwatampile ukulapatikisha Abanasiliti ukulanwa umwangashi, mwalaeba na bakasesema amuti, ‘Lekeni ukulasesema amashiwi yakwa Lesa.’" 
Amos2:13 “Eico ine nomba, nkamutitikisha panshi, mukatotobela nge celeta ilileingila panshi kulwa kufinininwa ne ŋanu." 
Amos2:14 Ala nangufye abakwatisha ulubilo, tabakabutunge, na bantu ababulamba, amaka yabo yakapwa, na bashilika abamaka bakafilwa ukuipusushako." 
Amos2:15 Abacenjela ukuposa imifwi, tabakamone pakwiminina, abakwatisha ulubilo, tabakapusuke, na bendela pali bakabalwe nabo bakafilwa ukuipusushako." 
Amos2:16 Ubo bushiku abashilika balya abashipa nganshi bakafulumuka ubwamba. Nine Yawe nalanda.” 
Amos3:1 Imwe mwe bena Israeli, umfweni amashiwi ayo Yawe alelanda pali imwe, pa mutundu wenu onse mwebo afumishe mu calo ca Egupto, aletila ati," 
Amos3:2 “Pa bantu ba mitundu yonse iya pano isonde, ala nimwefye mweka ine naishiba. E mulandu wine kanshi ine ndemukandila pa fyabupulumushi fyenu fyonse." 
Amos3:3 “Bushe abantu babili kuti baendela pamo ukwabula ukuti batale bomfwane? 
Amos3:4 Bushe inkalamo kuti yalaibuluminafye mu mutengo, nga taiketepo inama? Bushe umusepela wa nkalamo kuti walaibuluminafye mu lucengo, nga tawiketepo cimo?" 
Amos3:5 Bushe icuni kuti caikila panshi apali iciteyo, umuntu nga taposelepo ubukompo? Bushe ulukose kuti lwaifwampukilafye ukwabula ukuti cimo cikumye kuli namunsanki?" 
Amos3:6 Ipenga nga lyalila mu musumba umo, bushe teti litiinye abantu ababamo? Icinkunka nga caponena umusumba umo, bushe ninshi te Yawe aciletele?" 
Amos3:7 “Cine cinefye Yawe pakucitapo cimo, alatala asokolwelako ababomfi bakwe bakasesema ifyo alepanga ukucita." 
Amos3:8 Inkalamo iyo ilebuluma, nani uushiletiina? Yawe uyo alelanda, nani uushingasesema amashiwi yakwe?”" 
Amos3:9 Bilikisheni abantu balya baikala mu mayanda ayakosa aya mu musumba wa Ashidodi, na ya mu calo ca Egupto, mutile, “Iseni mulongane pa mpili sha Samaria, iseni muimwene icimfulunganya ubukulu icilimo, no lufyengo ulo abantu balecitamo.”" 
Amos3:10 Yawe alesosa ati, “Aba bantu tabasakamana ukulacita ifyalungama nakalya, mu mayanda yabo ayacindama balisushamo ifintu ifyo beba, nefyo bapokela ku lukakala.”" 
Amos3:11 Eico ifi efyasosa Imfumu Yawe ukuti, “Ala, abalwani bakalibila icalo cabo, bakonaula amalinga ayo baipokolwelamo, bakabatapa na mayanda yabo ayacindama.”" 
Amos3:12 Kabili Yawe aletila ati, “Nga filya fine kacema apokololakofye amolu yabili, nangu icipandwa ca kutwi ku kanwa ka nkalamo, efyo na bena Israeli bakapusuka, balya baikala mu Samaria, mu fifutu fya fyakusendamapo no kusaila pa misao iyanaka." 
Amos3:13 “Umfweni kuno, kabili musoke aba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo,” efyasosa Imfumu Yawe, Lesa umwine wa fita aleti," 
Amos3:14 “Ubushiku ubo nkakandamo abena Israeli palwa bubifi bwabo, ine nkonaula ifibumbili fya malambo ifyaba mu Betele. Insengo shilya shaba ku bulambo ine nkashikontaula, nasho shikalukutila na panshi." 
Amos3:15 Nkonaula na mayanda yalya bekalamo pa nshita ya pamwela, na yalya bekalamo pa nshita ya lusuba. Yakabongoloka yalya mayanda bayemfya na meno ya nsofu, na mayanda yonse ayakulu yakonaika. Nine Yawe nalanda.”" 
Amos4:1 Umfweni kuno, imwe mwe banakashi ba mu musumba wa Samaria, mwe batuluka nge ŋombe sha mu Bashani, mwe bacusha abalanda, no kulacita abapina icicitecite, mwe bakonkomesha abalume benu pakuti balemuletelako ifyakunwa." 
Amos4:2 Yawe nalapa ati, “Napalifye ine ne Wamushilo, ine nalapa ukuti inshiku shikesa ilyo imwe bakalamukululwila ku finkobwe pakumusenda, bonsefye umo umo mukaba nge sabi iliketwe ku cinkobwe." 
Amos4:3 Bakalamukululula no kumufumisha pa cipunda ca mwilinga, bonse imwe mukalamonako noko bakalamusenda ku Hamoni. Nine Yawe nalanda.”" 
Amos4:4 Imfumu Yawe alisosele ati, “Imwe mwe bena Israeli, akuyeni ku Betele muye munsangukile. Akuyeni ku Giligali, muye cishapo ukunsangukila. Inshiku shonse ulucelo mulesenda inama ishakuya tuula ilambo, kabili lyonsefye panuma ya nshiku shitatu muletuula icekumi." 
Amos4:5 Konkanyenipofye ukulatuula umukate wenu uwatutumuka pakuntotela ine ne Lesa, muleitakisha na pa fyabupe fyakuitemenwa ifyo muleta mwe bene. Mulealasha, pantu ifi efyo mwatemwa ukucita, imwe mwe bena Israeli.”" 
Amos4:6 “Nine naponeshe icipowe mu misumba yenu yonse, pakuti mubulwe icakulya. Lelo imwe mwalikene ukubwelela uko ndi. Nine Yawe ndelanda." 
Amos4:7 Ilyo ifisabo fyenu fyasumbile ukupya, pa myeshi itatu ine nalileseshe imfula ukufilokelela. Nalokeshe imfula pa musumba umo, pa musumba ubiye pena nakaana. Ibala limo lyalelokelelwa ne mfula, ilibiye lyena iyoo lyasuka no kuma lyauma." 
Amos4:8 Ilyo abantu balekabila amenshi, baleendauka mu misumba imbi kukufwayako amenshi, nomba nako kwine tayalefulako ayakuti balenwa. Nalyo line imwe mwalikene ukubwelela uko ndi. Nine Yawe ndelanda." 
Amos4:9 “Inshita ishingi nalionawile amabala yenu ne filime fyenu, nafyonawile pakuleta icipuki no kufufuma, makanta nao alile imikunyu ne miolifa yonse. Awe nalyo line imwe mwalikene ukubwelela uko ndi. Nine Yawe ndelanda." 
Amos4:10 “Nine namuletele icikuko, nga cilya naletele icalo ca Egupto. Nalipeye mu nkondo abana benu abalumendo, na balya bene baleendela pali bakabalwe. Mu nsakwe shenu imwe mwalepuyafye ku cena ca fitumbi fya bantu. Nakalya, nalyo line imwe mwalikene ukubwelela uko ndi. Nine Yawe ndelanda." 
Amos4:11 “Ine ne Lesa nine nalofeshe abanenu bamo, nga filya fine naonawile umusumba wa Sodoma no wa Gomora. Abapuswikepo pali imwe bali nge cishishi ca mulilo ico nasompwele peshiko. Awe nalyo line imwe mwalikene ukubwelela uko ndi. Nine Yawe ndelanda." 
Amos4:12 “Kanshi mwe bena Israeli ine nomba nalaswa mukande, aleni fwalileni pakushingwana na ine ne Lesa wenu, pantu ine efyo nalaswa mucite imwe.”" 
Amos4:13 Ala ni Lesa ewabumba impili, kabili ewalenga umwela. Ewebako no muntu ifyo alepanga ukucita, eulenga ukuti buleca kabili buleila. Ewateeka ne sonde lyonse apo lyapela. Ewitwa Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita." 
Amos5:1 Imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, umfweni luno lwimbo lwa malilo ulo ine ne Amosi nalamwimbila." 
Amos5:2 Umukashana nacisungu Israeli nawa panshi, takeme nakabili iyoo. Bamushile mu mpanga yakwe, ukwabula nelyo umo uwakumwimyako." 
Amos5:3 Imfumu Yawe aletila ati, “Pa bashilika ikana limo (1,000) abema mu musumba umo, pakabwelafye abashilika umwanda umo (100), epela, na pa bashilika umwanda umo (100) abema mu musumba ubiye, pakabwelafye abashilika ikumi limo (10) epela, ku ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli.”" 
Amos5:4 Yawe aleeba aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli ati, “Imwe mulemfwaya, epakuti lyena muleenda abomi." 
Amos5:5 Mwilaesha kulamfwaila ku Betele, mwilaya ku Giligali, mwilaya kukumpepela ku Beresheba iyoo, pantu Giligali akasendwa bunkole, na Betele akonaika.”" 
Amos5:6 Kanshi imwe mwe bena Israeli, mulefwaya Yawe, epakuti lyena muleenda abomi. Pantu nga tamucitile ifyo, ninshi akemina iŋanda yakwa Yosefu ngo lubingu lwa mulilo. Nao umulilo ukoca abena Betele, tapakamoneke no wakuushimya nakalya." 
Amos5:7 Pantu umulinganya imwe mulawalula icakukalifya, elyo kabili ubololoke ulabunyantilila." 
Amos5:8 Ni Yawe ewabumba intanda, ishitwa Pileiyadesi ne shitwa Olioni. Eusangula imfifi ukuba amacaca, eusangula inshita ya kasuba ukuba inshita ya bushiku. Ewita amenshi ya muli bemba no kuyabuula, alayasansa mpanga yonse pesonde. Yawe e shina lyakwe." 
Amos5:9 Eonaula bonse abamaka mukwangufyanya, euwisha ne misumba yabo iya malinga." 
Amos5:10 Imwe mwe bantu mulapata umuntu onsefye uulanda bwino mu cilye, no muntu onsefye uusosamo ifyacishinka." 
Amos5:11 Imwe mulacusha abalanda, mulabapokolola ne ŋanu shabo. Kanshi nomba tamwakekalemo mu mayanda yenu ayasuma ayamabwe ayo mulekuula, kabili tamwakanweko ku fitwalo fya myangashi iyo mulelimba mu mabala yenu ayasuma." 
Amos5:12 Ala ine nalishiba ifyo ulufyengo lwenu lwakulisha, nefyo ifyabubifi fyenu fyafulisha. Mulacusha abantu abololoke, mulapokelela na mafisakanwa, Mulafyengelesha na balanda mu cilye camilandu." 
Amos5:13 Eco uwamano ekala tondolo mu nshita shabipa ngeshi, ico ni nshita ya bubi." 
Amos5:14 Mulefwaya ukucita ifisuma, lekeni ukulacita ifibi, ninshi lyena mwakulaenda abomi. Ninshi ne Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita nakulaba nenu icine cine ngomu mwine mulesosela." 
Amos5:15 Mulepata ifyabipa, muletemwafye ifisuma, mulecita umulinganya pakuputula imilandu mu filye. Nakalimo lyena Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita akamulangulukilako imwe mwe bakwa Yosefu mwe bashalapo." 
Amos5:16 Kanshi Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Mu misebo yonse iya mu musumba mukaba imisowa, na mu mansa shonse inkuuta ishakuililila ubulanda. Mukalainusha abalimi pakuti nabo bese kukuloosha, mukalaitako na balya mulipila abacenjela ukwimba inyimbo sha malilo." 
Amos5:17 Mu mabala yonse aya myangashi mukaba imisowa. Ifi fyonse fikacitika, pantu ine nalaswa njise kukumukanda. Nine Yawe nalanda.”" 
Amos5:18 Mwashama imwe mwe bafuluka ubushiku Yawe ali nokufika. Pali ubo bushiku, bushe fisuma nshi imwe mukashukilapo? Pa bushiku bwakwa Yawe, ala kukafiitafye fititi, takwakabe ulubuuto nakalya." 
Amos5:19 Cikaba ngo muntu uwakuti cilya afulumuka inkalamo, kabili akumana ne ciswango ca bea. Atemwa ngo muntu uwakuti cilya abwelela mumwakwe, ati kanshintilile ku cibumba, awe kabili e misuminwe ku nsoka." 
Amos5:20 Ubushiku Yawe akesa kukabafye imfifi, takwakabe ulubuuto nakalya. Ubo bushiku kukaba imfifi iyine ine, takwakabuute nangu panono nakalya." 
Amos5:21 Yawe aletila ati, “Ala ine nimpata no kusuula inshikunkulu shenu, nintendwa ne filonganino fyenu ifya mapepo." 
Amos5:22 Ilyo mwakulandetela amalambo yenu ayakoca, ne mitulo yenu iya cabunga, awe ine nomba nshalefisekelela, nshalepokelela nomba ne nama shenu isho ishaina, isho muntuula imituulo yakwampana." 
Amos5:23 Lekeni no kulanyimbila inyimbo shenu isha congo, ine nomba nshilefwaya ukumfwa ku ciunda ca maseese yenu" 
Amos5:24 Lekeni umulinganya ulebapo pe nga menshi ya mu mulonga uupita, no busuma bwenu bulebelelela ngo mumana uushatala aukamapo." 
Amos5:25 “Imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ilyo mwali mu matololo pa myaka amakumi yane (40), imwe tamwalentuula amalambo ne mituulo iyoo." 
Amos5:26 Lelo mwasenda Sakuti imfumu yenu na Kaiwani umulungu wenu, ifilubi fyenu ifyo mwapashanya ku ntanda, ifyo mwe bene mwaipangila." 
Amos5:27 Eico na ine nkamusenda bunkole, ku fyalo fimbi ukutali ukucila na ku Damasiko. Nine Yawe nalanda, ne witwa Lesa umwine wa fita.”" 
Amos6:1 Mwashama imwe mwe baikala mu Sioni ubwanalale, na imwe mwe baikalila ku matwi tondolo pa lupili lwa Samaria, na imwe mwe bacindami, mwebo babutukilako abantu ba uno mushobo ukalamba uwa bwina Israeli." 
Amos6:2 Kabiyeni, muye tamba umusumba wa Kaline, elyo muye tamba Hamati ulya musumba walulumbi. Kabinge mutentemuke, muye tamba na Gati, ulya musumba wa Bafilisiti. Ifyalo ifyalimo iyo misumba, bushe efyawamisha ukucila ubufumu bwenu? Bushe icalo cabo calicila icalo cenu ku bukulu?" 
Amos6:3 Imwe mwe batalushisha ukutali ubushiku mukakandwa, elyo ulubali lumo mulapalamika inshita yakwikalilapo ku kalili." 
Amos6:4 Mukacimona imwe mwe basendama pa masanshi aya bikwako ameno ya nsofu, mwe bayolwela apanaka lukutu, mwe balya abana ba mpaanga ba ku mukuni na bana ba ŋombe ba kwitanga." 
Amos6:5 Imwe mwalitemwa ukushika inyimbo, nga filya fyalecita imfumu Davidi, elyo no kulashimba pa maseese." 
Amos6:6 Imwe munwa umwangashi inkombo pa, kabinge musuba na mafuta aya kacena kawamisha, ukwabula no kulalanguluka palwa konaika kwa calo cakwa Yosefu nakalya." 
Amos6:7 Eico imwe nimwe mukabalilapo ukusendwa bunkole, na maliila ya mu nshikunkulu shenu no kwangala kwenu konse kukapwa." 
Amos6:8 Imfumu Yawe nalapa ati, “Napalifye ine wine ne Yawe, Lesa umwine wa fita, nalapa ukuti nintendwa icilumba ca bena Yakobo, kabili nimpata na malinga yabo ayacindama. Ine nkaleka abalwani bakapoke umusumba wabo, bakasende na fyonsefye ifyabamo.”" 
Amos6:9 Mu ŋanda imo nga mukashalamo abaume ikumi limo (10), ala nabo bene bakafwa bonse." 
Amos6:10 Umuntu wa mu lupwa lwa bantu abafwile, akalati nga aisa mu ŋanda kukubuula icitumbi ca muntu wakwe uufwile, pakuti aye acoce, elyo akalaipusha onsefye uukabelamamo ati, “Bushe kucili na bambi abali umo?” Uyo muntu uubelememo nga ayasuka ati, “Awe.” Elyo kabili akatila, “Iwe talalafye tondolo. Ala twilalumbula ishina lyakwa Yawe.”" 
Amos6:11 Apo Yawe napeela icipope, lyena akabongolola amayanda ayakulu, no kushonaula ayanono." 
Amos6:12 Bushe bakabalwe kuti babutuka ulubilo pa fimabwe? Bushe abantu kuti balima bemba kuli pulao? Ngefyo imwe umulinganya muusangwile ubusungu, imilandu iyalungama imwe muisangwile iyabufi." 
Amos6:13 Imwe mulaitakisha pa mulandu wakupoka umushi wa Lo Deba. Mulasosa amuti, “Twalikwete ubulamba pakupoka umushi wa Kanaimu ukuti ube uwesu.”" 
Amos6:14 Yawe, Lesa umwine wa fita, umwine nasosa ati, “Cisuma, imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, ine nalaswa mukutilile ifita fya benafyalo ifyakwisa poka cino calo. Ee, fikalamuteeka ku kalili, ukutampila ku Lebo Hamati ukuya shintafye na kwishika lya Araba.”" 
Amos7:1 Imfumu Yawe alinangile ine icintu cimo mu cimonwa. Namwene Yawe alebumba makanta nao umwingi, abantu ninshi balipwa kale ukutulikila imfumu ya calo ifyani fya musangulo, ninshi ne fyani fimbi fyalitampa nakabili ukulapuuka." 
Amos7:2 Muli ico cimonwa, awe namona makanta nao alyafye fyonse ifyalepuuka mu calo. Na ine epakusosa nati, “We Yawe, napapata, belelako abantu bobe uluse. Nga nomba abantu bobe balepusuka shani? Tumwana Yakobo, ala tunono, kabinge tufwanda twa bantu.”" 
Amos7:3 Yawe nao epakubwesha umutima, Yawe ati nokuti, “Cilya cintu wali wamona, tacakacitike iyoo.”" 
Amos7:4 Imfumu Yawe kabili alinangile ine icintu cimbi mu cimonwa. Namwene Imfumu Yawe alepekanya umulilo uwakoca abantu bakwe. Uyo mulilo nao epakulabilima panshi apashika pesamba, kabili watampa no kulaoca umulundu." 
Amos7:5 Na ine epakusosa nati, “We Mfumu Yawe, leka napapata. Nga nomba abantu bobe balepusuka shani? Tumwana Yakobo, ala tunono, kabinge tufwanda twa bantu.”" 
Amos7:6 Yawe nao epakubwesha umutima, Imfumu Yawe ati nokuti, “Ici cintu naco cine tacacitike iyoo.”" 
Amos7:7 Yawe kabili alinangile ine icintu cimbi mu cimonwa. Namwenemo Yawe naiminina ku cibumba cimo ico abantu balekuula, ninshi balecipima na ku mwando wa bakakula uwakupiminako. Kanshi Yawe nao alikete umwando, no kulapima ico cibumba." 
Amos7:8 Elyo Yawe anjipusha ati, “Amosi, bushe finshi ulemona?” Na ine nayasuka nati, “Mwando wakupiminako.” Elyo nao ati, “Ee, eo ine ndebomfya pakulanga abantu bandi abena Israeli ukuti babafye nge cibumba icatundama. Ine nomba nshabweshe mutima nakabili pafyo napanga ukubakanda." 
Amos7:9 “Incende shikonaika isho bamwana Isaki bapepelamo. Incende shamushilo ishaba muno mu calo ca Israeli shikaba ifitantala. “Ine nkabalwisha ku lupanga pakupwisha ubufumu ubo bapyana aba mu lupwa lwa mfumu Yeroboamu.” 
Amos7:10 Amasiya shimapepo wa mu Betele, alitumine amashiwi kuli Yeroboamu imfumu ya bena Israeli ati, “Amosi alekupangila pa menso ya bena Israeli. Imilandile yakwe, awe ikonaula icalo cino pantu na bantu nabafilwa ukushipikisha ku fyebo fyakwe." 
Amos7:11 Amosi alesosa ati, ‘Yeroboamu akafwa ku nkondo, abena Israeli nabo bakabafumya muli cino calo cabo, no kubatwala muli bunkole kumbi kumbifye.’”" 
Amos7:12 Elyo Amasiya aeba Amosi ati, “Iwe kamona, awe fyatala fyafula. Fuma kuno, bwelelamo ku calo ca Yuda, eko ukaye ikala no kulamwenamo ifyakulya fyobe, no kulasesema kulya kwine amashiwi yakwa Lesa." 
Amos7:13 Tecakwesha nakabili ukulasesemena kuno ku Betele, pantu kuno ni ncende yamushilo iya mfumu ya calo, e kwitempele uko bonse bapepela.”" 
Amos7:14 Nao Amosi epakwasuka Amasiya ati, “Ine nshili kasesema nangu mwana kasesema iyoo. Ine naleteeka impaanga, kabili nalesunga ne bala lyandi ilya mikunyu." 
Amos7:15 Nomba Yawe alimfumya pa mulimo wandi uwakusunga impaanga, alinkonkomesha ati, ‘Kabiye, ulepitana mu bantu bandi abena Israeli, ulebasesemena na mashiwi yandi.’" 
Amos7:16 Kanshi iwe Amasiya umfwa kuno ifyo Yawe alesosa. “Iwe wanjeba ukuleka ukusesema ishamo ilikaponena abena Israeli, no kuleka ukwebaula aba ŋanda yakwa Isaki." 
Amos7:17 “Kanshi apo iwe walanda ifi, Yawe alekweba ati, “‘Iwe umukashi obe akaba cilende muli uno wine musumba, na bamwano bakafwa mu nkondo. Ne citungu cobe pakucakana, bakalacipimina ku mwando, na we mwine wine ukafwila mu calo ca benafyalo. Abena Israeli nabo bakabafumya muli cino calo cabo, no kubasenda bunkole.’”" 
Amos8:1 Kabili Imfumu Yawe alinangile ine icintu cimbi mu cimonwa. Namwenemo umuseke uwa fitwalo ifyapya mu lusuba. 
Amos8:2 Elyo Yawe anjipusha ati, “Amosi, bushe finshi ulemona?” Na ine nayasuka nati, “Museke wa fitwalo ifyapya.” Elyo Yawe asosa ati, “Ala nomba capwa, abantu bandi abena Israeli balaloba. Ine nshabweshe mutima nakalya pafyo napanga ukubakanda." 
Amos8:3 Shilya nyimbo abanakashi bemba kwi Tempele, shikaaluka imisowa pali ubo bushiku. Ifitumbi fya bantu fikabafye ntangali ntangali mpanga yonse. Mu calo cino mukatalala tondolo.” Efyasosa Imfumu Yawe." 
Amos8:4 Umfweni kuno, imwe mwe banyanyantilila ababusu, mwe besha ukulofya abalanda muli cino calo." 
Amos8:5 Imwe mulasosa amuti, “Bushe ni lilali umweshi upya ukapwa, pakuti fwe bene tuleshitisha ifisabo fyesu? Bushe ubushiku bwe Sabata bulepwa lilali, pakuti fwe bene tutampe ukushitisha iŋanu? Twakulaninika umutengo, twakulabomfya ifipimo fyabufi no kulafitelula, pakuti tulecenjesha abo tuleshitishako." 
Amos8:6 Twakulashita abalanda mu ndalama, ukukabula ababusu ne nsapato, no kushitisha iŋanu ishishili bwino.”" 
Amos8:7 Yawe nalapa pa cilumba cakwa Yakobo ati, “Napalifye ine, nalapa ukuti ine nshakatale ndaba ifibi fyenu ifyo imwe mucita." 
Amos8:8 Kanshi nomba kukaba icinkukuma, imwe bonse muli cino calo mukaloosha. Icalo conse cikatenta, cikatumbana no kuifubula panshi ngo mumana wa Nailo, ulya waba mu calo ca Egupto." 
Amos8:9 “Pali ubo bushiku ine nkawisha akasuba ilyo kakaba pakati ka mutwe, nkaleta ne mfifi pa calo ilyo akasuba kaciliko akatuntulu. Nine ne Mfumu Yawe ndelanda." 
Amos8:10 Inshikunkulu shenu ine nkashisangula amalilo, ne nyimbo shenu shonse ishansansa ine nkashisangula inyimbo shabulanda. Nkalenga mukafwale insalu shabulanda, mukabeye inkuso pakulanga ubulanda. Mukaba nga bafyashi abaleloosha umwana wabo umwaume uwabafye umo mpo. Ubo bushiku bukaba ubwabulanda nganshi ukufikafye na pa mpela." 
Amos8:11 “Nine Imfumu Yawe ndelanda ukutila, inshita imo ikafika ilyo ine nkaleta icipowe mu calo cino. Mwe bantu mukalaumfwa insala, nomba nayo tayakabe nsala yakufwaya icakulya iyoo. Mukalaumfwa icilaka, nomba naco tacakabe cilaka cakufwaya amenshi iyoo. Mukalaumfwa insala yakufwaya ukulapokelela amashiwi kuli ine ne Yawe." 
Amos8:12 Mukalaendauka, mukalati mwatula ku kapinda ka ku kuso, mwalola ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, kabili mwatula ku kabanga, mwatentemukila ku masamba. Konsefye mukalafwayako ukupokelela amashiwi kuli ine ne Yawe, nomba nakalya mukalaicushafye." 
Amos8:13 Ubo bushiku abakashana ababa imbeka, na balumendo ababulamba, bakalasenukafye kulwa cilaka." 
Amos8:14 Imwe mwe bantu, mwe balumbula amashina ya tulubi twa mu Samaria pakulapa amuti, ‘Napalifye umulungu wa ku Dani,’ nangu, ‘Napalifye umulungu wa ku Beresheba,’ ala mukawa, no kubuuka tamwakatale amubuuka nakalya.”" 
Amos9:1 Ine nalimwene Yawe naiminina ku bulambo, anjeba nokuti, “Ale uma pa mulu wa nceshi, uleke umufula usunkane, uwishishe ne nceshi shonse pa mitwe ya bantu bonse abalongenemo, na baleshalapo ine nkabepaya ku lupanga. Ala tapakafulumuke nangu umo, kabili tapakapusuke nelyo umo nakalya." 
Amos9:2 Nangu bakemba umwimba uwakuya fika ku calo ca bafwa, nakalyafye, ine nkabakulululamo. Nangula bakanina mu mulu, ala namo mwine nkabeshisha panshi." 
Amos9:3 Nga bakafisama pa lupili lwa Kameli, napo pene nkaya bafwayapo no kubekata nkabekate. Nga bakabelama petenga lya bemba kulwakuntiina, napo pene nkapeela icisoka ca muli bemba icebo icakubasumaula." 
Amos9:4 Abalwani babo nga ebakabasenda bunkole, ine nkakonkomesha abalwani babo ukubepaya ku lupanga, nkatonta amenso yandi pali bena pakubaletela ishamo, te shuko iyoo.”"
