Amos9:5 Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita nga akumya icalo, icalo cilasunguluka, ninshi na bekalacalo bonse balaloosha. Icalo conse cilatumbana ngo mumana wa Nailo, kabili no kukama ngo mumana wa Nailo ulya waba mu calo ca Egupto." 
Amos9:6 Yawe alikuula amayanda yakwe mu mulu, no kushimpa imifula yayako pano isonde. Ewita amenshi ya muli bemba, no kuyabuula, alayasansa mpanga yonse pano calo. Ishina lyakwe ni Yawe." 
Amos9:7 Yawe alesosa ati, “Imwe mwe bena Israeli, bushe tamwabafye cimo cine nga bena Kushi kuli ine? Bushe teine namufumishe ku calo ca Egupto, nga filya fine nafumishe Abafilisiti mu Kafito, na bena Siria ku calo ca Kiri?" 
Amos9:8 Moneni, amenso ya Mfumu Yawe atontele pali ubu bufumu ububifi, ala ine nkabupwisha mpanga yonse pano isonde. Lelo kwena nshakalofye bonse aba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo iyoo.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Amos9:9 “Ine nkapeela icebo, elyo nkapukanya aba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, mukati ka mishobo ya bantu bambi, nga filya fine bapuka sefa pakunyunga, takwakabe akalusakalabwe akakaponena panshi." 
Amos9:10 Ababifi bonse ababa pakati ka bantu bandi, bena bakafwa ku nkondo, balya balanda abati, ‘Ala Lesa takatuponeshe ifinkunka nakalya.’”" 
Amos9:11 Yawe alisosele ati, “Ubushiku bumo bukafika ubo ine nkabukululamo ubufumu bulya bwakweteko Davidi, ubwaba nomba kwati ni ŋanda iyabongoloka. Ine nkawamya cipya cipya icitantala cabuko no kububukulula. Nkaikuula cipya cipya nga filya fine yali kale," 
Amos9:12 epakuti abena Israeli bakapoke icalo ca bena Edomu icashalako, bakacimfye na bantu ba mitundu yonse abali kale abantu bandi. Nine ne Yawe ndelanda, ne ukalenga ukuti ici cintu cikacitike.”" 
Amos9:13 Yawe aletila ati, “Moneni, inshiku shikesa ilyo iŋanu shikalafulisha, icakuti pa nshita bakalapwa ukushiseepa, ninshi ne nshita yakulima shimbi naifika, ilyo ne fitwalo fya myangashi fikalafulisha, icakuti pa nshita bakalapwa ukufiswa, ninshi ne nshita yakutwalilapo fimbi naifika. Mu mpili mukalafuma mwangashi upya, na mu tupili mwine ukalakonkolokamo." 
Amos9:14 Abantu bandi abena Israeli, ine nkababwesesha muli cino calo cabo. Bakabukulula imisumba yabo iyaonaika, no kwikala emo bakalaikala. Bakala limbamo imyangashi no kulanwa umwangashi, bakalalimamo amabala no kulalyamo ifikalakulamo." 
Amos9:15 Nkalimba abena Israeli mu calo cabo, tabakatale abanukulwa kabili mu calo ico ine nabapeela. Nine Yawe Lesa wenu nalanda.”" 
Obadiah1:1 Icimonwa cakwa Obadia. Ifi efyasosa Yawe palwa bena Edomu. Yawe atumine inkombe yakwe mu mishobo ya bantu, no kumfwa ifwe natumfwa uko inkombe ilebilikisha aiti, “Imeni. Twendeni, tuye bushisha abena Edomu inkondo.”" 
Obadiah1:2 Yawe asosa kuli Edomu aleti, “Mona, ndekucefya pakati ka mishobo uleba uwasuulwa apakalamba." 
Obadiah1:3 Icilumba ca mu mutima obe calakubepa, iwe we waikala mu ncengo sha mabwe. Weo amayanda yobe yatongama pa mulu wa mpili, ulasosa mu mutima obe auti, ‘Nga nani uukantentemushisha panshi?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Nangu wingalelemba mumulu apatali kwati ni kapumpe, no kupikula icisansala cobe pa ntanda, ala ine nkakutentemushisha panshi ukutula apo pene. Efyasosa Yawe." 
Obadiah1:5 “Bushe te busanso ububi bwakwishila? Nga cakuti abapupu balekwishila, ifipondo fyakusansa inshita ya bushiku, bushe tabebafye ifyalinga ifyo balefwaya! Nangu nga cakuti abakusombola baisa kuli iwe, bushe tekuti bakushilemo ifitwalo finono!" 
Obadiah1:6 Lelo we Esau bali nokukushafye nakalya nakalya, ne cuma conse ico wafisa baletapa no kusenda." 
Obadiah1:7 Bonse abo waleumfwana nabo balekutamfisha ku mupaka, Ifibusa fyonse filekucenjesha no kukucimfya. Abo walelya nabo pamo ebakuteyamine, lelo iwe tawaishibepo nangu cimo.”" 
Obadiah1:8 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Muli bulya ubushiku, nkonaula abantu abakwata mano mu Edomu, abantu abakwata ukwishiba aba mu mpili shakwa Esau." 
Obadiah1:9 Impalume sha mu Temani shili nokutiina, na bonse aba mu mpili shakwa Esau bali nokumukomaula mu bushiku bwakwipaiwa." 
Obadiah1:10 “Pantu iwe walefyenga no kwipaya bamunonko abena Yakobo, eco ukekatilwa ne nsoni, no kulobelela umuyayaya." 
Obadiah1:11 Pali bulya bushiku iwe waleloleshakofye, ilyo abalwani abenafyalo baleonaula impongolo sha bamunonko. Nobe wine mwalingenefye ku bubi na balya bene abenafyalo, abaletapa ifyuma mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, abalefipendula pakufyakana." 
Obadiah1:12 Iwe nga tawalesansamuka ilyo bamunonko baleshama. Iwe nga tawaleanga ilyo abena Yuda baleonaika, nangu ukusekelela ilyo bali mu bucushi." 
Obadiah1:13 Iwe nga tawaingile mu musumba wa bantu bandi, pali bulya ubushiku basanshilwe. Iwe nga tawabasekele palwa kucula kwabo, pali bulya ubushiku basanshilwe. Iwe nga tawailebebila ifyuma fyabo, pali bulya ubushiku basanshilwe." 
Obadiah1:14 Iwe nga tawalelolela pa masansa ya nshila, pakucilikila bamunonko abalefwaya ukufulumuka abalwani babo. Bamunonko abalepusumuka ku balwani pali bulya bushiku bwa macushi, iwe nga tawalebekata no kubatwala ku balwani babo." 
Obadiah1:15 “Ubushiku bwakwa Yawe buli mupepi, ubwakupingula imishobo yonse. Ifyo iwe Edomu wacitile kuli bambi, efyo nobe ukacitilwa. Nefyo wacitile fikakubwelela we mwine." 
Obadiah1:16 Nga filya fine wanwene pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo, efyo ne mishobo imbi yonse ikatwalilila ukunwa. Yena ikalanwa no kulapungaila, ikaba kwati tayatalile aibako." 
Obadiah1:17 “Lelo pa lupili lwa Sioni pakaba bamo abakapusuka, ulupili lukaba ni ncende iyamushilo. Aba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo bakalubula icalo cabo ico babapokolwele kale." 
Obadiah1:18 Iŋanda yakwa Yakobo ikaba mulilo uoca, iŋanda yakwa Yosefu ikaba lubingu ulwaaka, nomba iŋanda yakwa Esau ikapya nge mpimbili. Nga filya umulilo oca impimbili ishauma, takwakabe umwina Esau nelyo umo uukashalapo. Efyasosa Yawe." 
Obadiah1:19 “Abena Israeli aba mu matololo ya Negebu bakapoka ulupili lwakwa Esau. Na ba mwishika lya mpili sha Yuda nabo bakapoka icalo ca Bafilisiti. Bakapoka icalo ca Efulemu ne calo ca Samaria, na bena Benjamini bakapoka icalo ca Gileadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Ifita fya bena Israeli ifyaba muli bunkole fikapoka icalo ca Kenani ukuya fikafye na ku Salefati. Na bena Yerusalemu abali muli bunkole mu Sefaradi bakapoka imisumba ya mu matololo ya Negebu. 
Obadiah1:21 Abena Israeli abacimfya bakanina ulupili lwa Sioni pakuteeka ulupili lwakwa Esau. No bufumu bukaba bwakwa Yawe.” 
Jonah1:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yona mwana Amitai aliti," 
Jonah1:2 “Ima kabiye ku Ninife kuli ulya musumba ukalamba, uye ushobaule abantu abalimo, pantu ububi bwabo nabwishibikwa kuli ine.”" 
Jonah1:3 Lelo Yona apanga ukufyukila ku Tashishi pakufulumuka Yawe. Aima, aya ku Yopa, eko aya sanga ubwato ubwali nokuya ku Tashishi, alipila ne fyalwendo, apatama no kupatama ukuya nabo ku Tashishi pakuti afulumuke Yawe." 
Jonah1:4 Lelo Yawe aimya umwela uukali nganshi pali bemba, paima icimwela icikalamba nganshi pali bemba icakuti no bwato bwalafwaya no kubunda." 
Jonah1:5 Bacoba wa bwato umwenso wabekata, elyo cila muntu alakuuta mutuule ku mulungu wakwe. Batampa no kuposa ifipe pali bemba pakuti ubwato bwangukeko. Lelo Yona ena aikile mu muputule wa panshi no kuya pona mu tulo utwine twine mukati ka bwato." 
Jonah1:6 Mushika wa bwato aya mweba ati, “Iwe, bushe utu tulo twa musango nshi? Buuka. Nobe akupepa ku mulungu obe. Nalimo kuti watulangulukilako, watupusushako ku mfwa.”" 
Jonah1:7 Elyo bacoba balaebana abati, “Mwe, endesheni muleke tupendule, twishibe uwalenga ukuti uyu mupamba utuponene.” Awe balapendula, cawila Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Elyo bamwipusha abati, “Twebe, bushe uwalenga uyu mupamba ukuti utuponene nani? Bushe mulimo nshi iwe ubomba? Ufumine kwi? Ku calo kumwenu ni kwi? Uli mutundu nshi?”" 
Jonah1:9 Nao abasuka ati, “Ine ndi Muhibulu, kabili ine mpepa Yawe Lesa wa mu mulu, uwabumba bemba no mushili.”" 
Jonah1:10 Awe bacoba umwenso wabekata nganshi pali aya mashiwi, bamwipusha abati, “Kanshi ico ucitile ni cinshi?” Kwena balishibe ukuti alefwaya ukufulumuka Yawe, pantu efyo abebele." 
Jonah1:11 Elyo bamwipwishe abati, “Kanshi cinshi twalakucita pakuti bemba atalale?” Pantu icimwela cilecililakofye ububi." 
Jonah1:12 Nao epakubasuka ati, “Ala mbuulenifye mumpose muli bemba, mwalamona bemba alatalala no kutalala. Pantu nimona ukuti nine nalenga ici cimwela icikalamba nganshi ukuti cimwimine.”" 
Jonah1:13 Bacoba ba bwato baesha na maka nganshi ukuti bafishe ubwato ku mulundu, awe bafilililwafye pantu icimwela calicilileko ububi." 
Jonah1:14 Epakulakuuta kuli Yawe abati, “We Yawe, twapapata wileka tufwile pa mulandu wa wakwipaya uyu muntu, witupeelelapo no mulandu pa mulopa uyu nga cakuti wakaele, pantu niwe we Yawe ucitile ico we mwine utemenwe.”" 
Jonah1:15 Ne cacine epakwikata Yona bamuposa na muli bemba, awe apopene na bemba atalalafye tondolo." 
Jonah1:16 Awe bacoba ba bwato pakumona ica uyu musango, batiina Yawe apakalamba, epakutuula Yawe ilambo, balaya ne filayo." 
Jonah1:17 Yawe epakuteyanya icisabi icikalamba icakumina Yona. Na Yona apwile inshiku shitatu akasuba no bushiku mu nda ya cisabi. 
Jonah2:1 Elyo Yona apepele kuli Yawe Lesa wakwe ilyo ali mu nda ya cisabi ati," 
Jonah2:2 “Mu kupelelwa kwandi nalilile kuli Yawe, nao anjasuka. Nalilile ninshi ndi mu nda ya ku calo ca bafwa, ne shiwi lyandi walyumfwa." 
Jonah2:3 Pantu wamposele muli bemba uwashika, pakati nankati ka menshi. Amenshi yeka yeka eyanshingulwike, na matamba yobe yonse yalempita pamulu." 
Jonah2:4 Na ine epakutila, ‘Iwe nauntamfya pa cinso cobe. Kanshi Itempele lyobe ilyamushilo ine nkalimona shani nakabili?’" 
Jonah2:5 Amenshi nayanjibisha, yalepita na pamulu, ine ndekafilafye. Itenga elinshingulwike, icani ca muli bemba nacintabilila na ku mutwe." 
Jonah2:6 Nintotobela mwisamba lya mpili, njile ku calo uko imipilikisho nainjisalila, lelo iwe we Yawe Lesa wandi, naufumya umweo wandi mu nindi." 
Jonah2:7 “Ilyo ndi mupepi no kuleka umweo, elyo naibukisha iwe we Yawe, ne pepo lyandi lyafika uko uli, mwi Tempele lyobe ilyamushilo." 
Jonah2:8 “Abapepa ifilubi ifyabuwelewele, bena balileka ukukupetamina." 
Jonah2:9 Lelo ine kwishiwi ilyakutotela nakulakutuula ne lambo, no kucita fyonse ifyo nalaile. Ala niwe we Yawe uupususha abantu.”" 
Jonah2:10 Elyo Yawe aeba icisabi, naco epakuya lukila Yona ku mulundu." 
Jonah3:1 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Yona umuku wabubili aliti," 
Jonah3:2 “Ima, kabiye ku Ninife kuli ulya musumba ukalamba, kabile imbila iyo nalakweba.”" 
Jonah3:3 Yona epakwima, alaya na ku Ninife ukulingana ne shiwi Yawe amwebele. Umusumba wa Ninife wali ukalamba nganshi, pakulalanya pakati kupwisha inshiku shitatu." 
Jonah3:4 Kanshi Yona epakutendeka no kuya mu musumba, aenda ulwendo lwa bushiku bumo, alabila imbila aleti, “Kwashalafye inshiku amakumi yane (40), ninshi Ninife aonaulwa.”" 
Jonah3:5 Abantu ba mu Ninife cilya baumfwa, awe basumina Lesa. Nabo babila ne mbila yakuti baleke ukulya, bafwale ne nsalu shabulanda, bonsefye ukutendekela ku bakankala ukufika na ku balanda bene." 
Jonah3:6 Ilyo imfumu ya mu Ninife yaumfwa, yaima pa cipuna caiko, yafuula ne cakufwala cabufumu, yafwala ne nsalu shabulanda, yaikala na mu mito." 
Jonah3:7 Nayo yapeela icebo, yacisabankanya na mu Ninife monse aiti, “Umfweni icipope icifumine ku mfumu na bacilolo baiko. Peba nelyo umo uwakulya akantu. Abantu bonse, kumo kwine ne nama, iŋombe ne mpaanga, peba uwakulya nangu ukunwa amenshi." 
Jonah3:8 Mwe bantu bonse, fwaleni nsalu shabulanda kumo kwine ne fitekwa, mulekuuta inkuuta ikalamba kuli Lesa. Kabili cila muntu aleke imibeele yakwe iyabipa ne fyongo ifyo alecita." 
Jonah3:9 Nani eshibe, nalimo kuti Lesa abwesha umutima, aleka icipyu cakwe icikali, ninshi nefwe twapusukako kukufwa.”" 
Jonah3:10 Lesa ati amone ifyo abantu bacita nefyo baleka imibeele yabo iyabipisha, Lesa epakubwesha umutima, kabili tabacitile ubonaushi ubo apangile ukubacitila." 
Jonah4:1 Lelo Yona ena ici cintu tacamusekeshe iyoo, afulilwe nganshi." 
Jonah4:2 Epakupepa kuli Yawe ati, “We Yawe, bushe tefyo ine nalandile ilyo ncili ku calo kumwesu ukuti efyo cikaba? E mulandu wine nafyukile bwangu bwangu ukuya ku Tashishi, pantu nalishibe ukuti iwe uli Lesa wacikuuku, waba no luse, taufulwa bwangu, walifulisha icitemwiko icishipwa, kabili ulabwesha umutima ilyo ufwile ukukanda." 
Jonah4:3 Ecalenga nomba we Yawe, poka umweo wandi, pantu ukufwa kwawamapo ukucila ukuba umumi.”" 
Jonah4:4 Yawe nao epakumwasuka ati, “Bushe nauwamya pakufulwa ifi mwa?”" 
Jonah4:5 Elyo Yona afumina kunse ya musumba lwa ku kabanga, aya ikala na panshi. Akuulako ne nsakwe iyakuubamo, alapembelela ukuti amone icalaponena umusumba." 
Jonah4:6 Elyo Yawe ateyanya akamuti ka mwangashi, akamesha nako akamuti kafubilila pa mutwe wakwa Yona pakuti pabe icintelelwe icakuubamo, pakuti no mutima wakwe ushikimane. Awe Yona atemwa nganshi pakumona akamuti." 
Jonah4:7 Lelo ubushiku ubwakonkapo ilyo akasuba katula, Lesa ateyanya icinsenda, acituma naco caisa lya ishinte lya kamuti, awe kauma no kuma." 
Jonah4:8 Ilyo akasuba kasansama, Lesa ateyanya umwela uwakaba, na kasuba kalamoca pa mutwe wakwe. Yona abongoteka no kubongoteka ku cipuki, alafwaya no kufwa. Asosa no kusosa ati, “Awe, no kufwa kwawamapo ukucila ukuba umumi.”" 
Jonah4:9 Lelo Lesa nao amwasuka ati, “Bushe wawamya ukufulwa pa mulandu wa kamuti, mwa?” Yona nao ayasuka ati, “Ee, cacine nininga ukufulwa, no kufwa kwawamapo.”" 
Jonah4:10 Elyo Yawe aeba Yona ati, “Iwe ulelangulukilafye akamuti ako iwe ushameseshe nangu ukukusha. Akene kaimenenefye pa bushiku bumo, kabili no kuma kayuminafye pa bushiku bumo." 
Jonah4:11 Pali bufi ine, bushe nshili na kulangulukila Ninife, uyu musumba ushaikulila, umwaba abantu ukucila pa makana umwanda umo na makumi yabili (120,000) abashaishiba ukulekanya ukwabela ukuboko kwa kulyo no kwabela ukuboko kwa kuso, kabili umwaba ne fitekwa ifyafulisha nganshi?”" 
Micah1:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Mika, uwaikele mu mushi wa Moresheti, pa nshita Yotamu ateekele icalo ca Yuda, na pa nshita Ahasi nao akonkelepo ukuciteeka, na pa nshita Hesekia nao aciteekelepo. Yawe alisokolwelele Mika ifi fintu palwa musumba wa Samaria na palwa musumba wa Yerusalemu mu cimonwa." 
Micah1:2 Umfweni kuno imwe mwe bantu ba mitundu yonse. Kutikeni imwe bonse mwe baikala pano isonde. Lekeni Imfumu Yawe amushinine imwe. Umfweni Imfumu iyilelanda ukufuma mwi Tempele lyaiko ilyamushilo. 
Micah1:3 Moneni, Yawe ulya alefuma mwisano lyakwe ilyamushilo, alaika, alenyantaula na pa mulu wa mpili sha pano calo." 
Micah1:4 Ilyo akulapitapo, impili shakulasunguluka nge pula ilili ku mulilo, ne mipokapoka yakulalepuka kwati menshi ayalefumfumuka mu kapili ku mutentemuko." 
Micah1:5 Ifi fyonse filecitika pantu abakwa Yakobo balipula amafunde, kabili ni pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fya bena Israeli. Bushe kwena cinshi calenga ukuti abakwa Yakobo balebifya ifi? Ala musumba wine uwa Samaria. Nge calenga ukuti abantu ba mu calo ca Yuda balepepa utulubi, bushe cinshi? Ala musumba wine uwa Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:6 E mulandu wine kanshi Yawe alesosela ati, “Umusumba wa Samaria ine nkausangula umupili wa fitantala mu mpanga, nkausangula incende iyakulimamo imyangashi. Amabwe ayo bakuulila umusumba, ine nkayakunkulushisha mu mukonko, ne mifula yauko ine nkaisha pa mbilibili." 
Micah1:7 Tulya tulubi utwabamo utwamutengo tukasansaika tonse, ne mituulo yauko yonse ikapya, ifimpashanya fyonse ifya milungu yabo bakafyonaula. Ifintu ifyo batuula mu musumba fyafumine ku banakashi bacilende, eico nkalenga bambi nabo bakafibomfye ukupeela amalipilo ku banakashi bacilende.”" 
Micah1:8 Elyo Mika nao asosa ati, “Ine nakulaililila ubulanda, no kuloosha pa mulandu wa ici cintu. Ine nshakulafwala nsapato, kabili nakulaendafye ubwamba pakulanga ubulanda. Nakulabosa nga mumbwe no kulalosha nge ntitimushi." 
Micah1:9 Impumo sha bena Samaria teshakupola iyoo, nashifika na ku bena Yuda, efyo nabo bali nokulacula. Uboni nabufika na ku mpongolo sha musumba wa Yerusalemu wine, umwaikala abantu bandi.”" 
Micah1:10 Mwishimikilako balwani besu mu Gati, mwileka balemonako uko imwe mulelila. Imwe mwe bena Beti Leafula, mulealanganafye mu lukungu pakulanga ubulanda." 
Micah1:11 Imwe mwe ba mu mushi wa Shafiri muleya muli bunkole, muleyafye ubwamba ne nsoni nashimwikata. Abaikala mu musumba wa Sanani tabakafumemo mu musumba wabo. Ilyo mukomfwa uko abena Beteseli baleloosha, mukeshibefye ukuti tekwakuyashina iyoo." 
Micah1:12 Abena Maroti balenyongolokafye ku bukali, balelolela ukupemwinako, pantu Yawe napalamika icinkunka ku musumba wa Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:13 Imwe mwe baikala mu musumba wa Lakishi, kakileni bakabalwe ku maceleta no kubutuka. Imwe nimwe mwalenga umwana mwanakashi Sioni alebifya, pantu muli imwe mwali ukupepa utulubi ku bena Israeli." 
Micah1:14 Kanshi nomba imwe muli nokupeela umushi wa Moresheti Gati, ifyabupe fyakushalikana pamo. Umushi wa Akisibu ukasangwa ukuti, ewalebepaika ishamfumu sha mu calo ca Israeli." 
Micah1:15 Imwe mwe bena Maresha, nkamuposa ku mulwani umo uukapoka umushi wenu. Imfumu iyateeka icalo ca Israeli ikafulumuka, ikaya fisama na mu lucengo lwa Adulamu." 
Micah1:16 Beyeni imishishi pakuloosha abana benu abo mwatemwisha, ku mitwe yenu kwishala mishishi. Lekeni imitwe yenu ibefye nge mitwe ya makubi, pantu bakamupoka abana, bakabasenda na bunkole." 
Micah2:1 Bashama abantu abapanga ukucita ifyabipa, pa nshita balele pa misengele yabo. Batilafye cilya bwaca, ninshi bena kucita ifyabipa ifyo bali bapangile ukucita, pantu cili mu maka yabo ukucita fyonse ifyo balefwaya." 
Micah2:2 Nga mabala balekumbwa, ninshi bena kuyapoka. Nga mayanda balefwaya, ninshi bena kuyapoka. Umuntu bena kumwibila iŋanda yakwe, no kucululusha ulupwa lwakwe, bamwibila ne fyuma fyakwe fyacishilano." 
Micah2:3 Eico Yawe alesosa ati, “Ine nomba ndeteyanya ukumuletela imwe ifinkunka, tamwakamone na pakulukuntila nakalya. Imwe mukakumana ne nshiku, lyena elyo mukaleka no kulaenda cilumba cilumba." 
Micah2:4 Iyo nshita nga yafika, abantu bakamushikila ulwimbo lwakumushokesha, pakulwimba bakalalumbula ifyo cikamuponena. Bakalatila abati, ‘Ala nabatupokolola fyonsefye. Yawe natupoka icalo cesu. Apeele na bantu abatusendele bunkole.’”" 
Micah2:5 Eico ilyo inshita ikafika iyakubweseshapo abantu bakwa Yawe icalo cabo, takwakabe wakwakanya impanga nelyo umo pali imwe ukubomfya ukupendula nakalya." 
Micah2:6 Bakasesema wabo balanda ukuti, “Wilasesema ifi kuli ifwe, iyoo! Umuntu tafwile ukusesema pali ifi fintu, ifwe tatwakalengwe nsoni nakalya.”" 
Micah2:7 Bushe kuti mwasosa ifi imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo? Bushe Mupashi wakwa Yawe nafulwa? Bushe cine cine kuti acita icintu ca uyu musango? Abantu abacita ifyalungama, bushe Yawe talanda nabo amashiwi ayamutembo?" 
Micah2:8 Yawe nao epakwasukapo ati, “Lelo imwe mwimina abantu bandi kwati balwani mulesansa. Abantu abaleipitilafye imwe mulabapoka ifyakufwala fyabo, abantu abashiipekenye ku bulwi." 
Micah2:9 Imwe mulatamfya abanakashi ba bantu bandi mu mayanda yabo ayo abene batemwa, na bana babo mulabapoka amapaalo ayo ine nabapeela aya pe nape." 
Micah2:10 Aleni imeni, akuyeni, muno tamuli ncende iyakuti imwe muleikalamo ubwanalale iyoo. Pantu ifibi fyenu efiletelele ino ncende pakuti yonaulwe." 
Micah2:11 Nga kwaisa umuntu wabufi kabili incenjeshi, nao alanda ati, ‘Ine nalasesema ukuti imwe muli nokukwata umwangashi pamo no bwalwa ubwingi.’ Umuntu uwa musango uyu ena kuti bamupokelela no kufwaya abe kasesema wabo." 
Micah2:12 “Nomba ine mu cishinkafye nkamulonganya pamo, imwe bonse mwe bakwa Yakobo. Mwe bena Israeli, mwe bashalapo, cine nkamulonganya, nkamulonganya pamo nge mpaanga ishilebwelela mwicinka. Mu calo cenu mukesula abantu pa, cikaba nge ncende umo impaanga shikalakupa pakushicema.”" 
Micah2:13 Yawe eukabatungulwila inshila, no kubafumya muli bunkole. Bakonaula impongolo sha mu musumba, no kufuma bakafume, bakaleya no kuya. Imfumu yabo ikatangilila abantu, Yawe umwine, eukabatungulwila inshila." 
Micah3:1 Ine nalisosele nati, “Umfweni kuno imwe mwe ntungulushi sha bakwa Yakobo, mwe bakateeka ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli. Bushe teimwe mulingile ukwishiba umulinganya?" 
Micah3:2 Imwe mwalipata ifisuma, mwatemwafye ifyabipa. Mulafunda inkanda sha bantu bandi abomi, mwashinsula ne minofu ku mafupa yabo." 
Micah3:3 Mulalya iminofu ya bantu bandi, mwafundulula ne nkanda shabo. Mwatobaula na mafupa yabo, mwayaputula kwati yakubika mu cakwipikamo, kwati ni nama iyileipikwa mu mpoto.”" 
Micah3:4 Inshita imo ikafika ilyo bakalakuuta Yawe mutuule, nomba nao takalebaasuka nakalya. Akafisa ne cinso cakwe kuli bena pali iyo nshita, takaleumfwa mapepo yabo pa mulandu wa micitile yabo iyabipa." 
Micah3:5 Ifi efyasosa Yawe ati, “Abantu bandi tepakubepwa kuli aba bakasesema. Ilyo bakwete ifyakulya, balasesema icibote, lelo abashibapeeleko kantu bena balababushisha inkondo." 
Micah3:6 Eico bushiku bwenu nabupwa tamwakulakwatapo ne fimonwa, imfifi eyalamuponena, akasuba kakawila bakasesema, no lubuuto lukasanguke mfifi." 
Micah3:7 Kanshi abasobela ifyakuntanshi bakabaseka, elyo ababuka nabo bakalengwa insoni. Bonse bakatalalafye tondolo, pantu Lesa talebasuka nakalya.”" 
Micah3:8 Nomba ine Yawe alimpeelesha amaka, alimpelesha no Mupashi wakwe, alimpeela na mano ayamulinganya. Alilenga nokuti ndeshipa pakwebelapo abakwa Yakobo pa bucisanguka bwabo, na bena Israeli pa bubifi bwabo." 
Micah3:9 Umfweni kuno, mwe ntungulushi sha ba ŋanda yakwa Yakobo, na imwe bakateeka ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, imwe mwalipata umulinganya, mulafulunganya ifintu fyonse ifyalungama." 
Micah3:10 Mwe bakuula Sioni ku mulopa walufyengo, umusumba wa Yerusalemu ku bubifi." 
Micah3:11 Bakateeka ba musumba bauteekelafye mukupokelela amafisakanwa, bashimapepo ababamo pakulondolwela abantu amafunde yakwa Lesa, ninshi kano bena batala balipililwapo. Bakasesema pakwebako abantu ifyo Lesa abasokolwela, nabo ninshi kano batala bamwenapo ulupiya. Elyo bonsefye balaimona ukuti Yawe aba nabo. Balasosa nokuti, “Ala ifwe tafyakatuponene ifinkunka nakalya, pantu Yawe aba na ifwe.”" 
Micah3:12 Kanshi imwe nimwe bene mukalenga ukuti Sioni bakamulima nge bala, nimwe bene mukalenga ukuti Yerusalemu akasanguke umwina wa fitantala, nokuti pa lupili apaba iŋanda yakwa Lesa pakasapilwe, pakabefye umutengo." 
Micah4:1 Mu nshiku shakulekelesha, ulupili ulwaimininapo iŋanda yakwa Yawe lukaba e cibinda pa mpili shonse. Elukalepesha ukucila impili shimbi shonse, na bantu ba mishobo yonse elo bakalabutukilako." 
Micah4:2 Abantu aba mishobo iyingi bakesa nokusosa abati, “Iseni, tuleyeni tuye nina ulupili lwakwa Yawe. Tuye ku ŋanda yakwa Lesa wakwa Yakobo, pakuti aye atufundeko ifyo tuli nokulacita, epakuti tuleenda mu nshila shakwe.” Pantu amafunde yakwa Yawe yakatula mu Sioni, kabili ishiwi lyakwe likafuma mu Yerusalemu." 
Micah4:3 Ena eukapingula imishobo iyingi, kabili no kukalulula abantu ba mishobo iyamaka, iyaba mupepi ne yaba ukutali, bakasuke bakabuule impanga shabo no kushifulamo bapulao ne nkasu, bakabuule na mafumo yabo, no kufulamo ifikwakwa. Ne mishobo ninshi yaleka no kulalwa inkondo, ninshi yaleka no kulaipekanya ukuya ku nkondo." 
Micah4:4 Abantu bonse umo umo bakalaikalila ku matwi tondolo, mwisamba lya miti ya myangashi ne mikunyu. Takwakabe na wakubatiinya nakalya, pantu Yawe umwine wa fita nasosa." 
Micah4:5 Nangu abantu ba mishobo yonse baleendela mwishina lya milungu yabo no kulaipepa, lelo ifwe twakulaendela mwishina lyakwa Yawe Lesa wesu no kulamunakila pe na pe." 
Micah4:6 Yawe aletila ati, “Pali bulya bushiku nkalonganya ifilema fyonse, no kubwesha abacili muli bunkole, na bantu abo nalimuna." 
Micah4:7 Abantu abalemana nkabacita ukuba abantu bandi abashalapo, elyo abo bapatula kumwabo, ine nkabalenga ukuba umushobo uwamaka. Na ine ne Yawe nkalabateekela pa lupili lwa Sioni ukutampafye ilyo line, ukufika no kukapela inshiku." 
Micah4:8 Na iwe we lupungu ulwakulondelapo impaanga, we lupili lwa Mwana mwanakashi wa Sioni, ubufumu bobe bukakubwelela nga filya wali kale. Bukateeka bukesa ku Mwana mwanakashi wa Yerusalemu.”" 
Micah4:9 Nga mulandu nshi ulepundila ifi pakuloosha? Bushe nico ushakwata imfumu? Bushe bacilolo bobe nabafwa, pakuti ubukali bwise pali iwe ngo mwanakashi uukomenwe ne fumo?" 
Micah4:10 Iwe we Mwana mwanakashi wa Sioni akuipotafye, uleteta ngo mwanakashi uuli pakupapa, pantu nomba walafumamo muno mu musumba, uye ikala na mu mpanga. Ukaya na ku calo ca Babiloni, kulya eko Yawe akaya kupusushishako, eko akakulubula ku maka ya balwani benu." 
Micah4:11 Nomba, abantu ba mishobo iyingi nabalongana kukwisa kulwisha iwe. Baletila abati, “Natukoweshe Sioni. Natulolesheko uko uyu musumba uleshalafye umupili wa fitantala.”" 
Micah4:12 Kwena abantu ba iyi mitundu tabeshibe icili mu mano yakwa Yawe. Tabeshibe ukuti ico abalonganikile pamo ni pakuti abalimune, nga filya fine abantu balonganika imisonso ya ŋanu pamo pakuti batwe." 
Micah4:13 Yawe aletila ati, “Iwe we Mwana mwanakashi wa Sioni, ala ima, kakande abalwani bobe. Ine nalakucita uwamaka nga cilume wa ŋombe uwaba ne nsengo sha fyela na mabondo ya mukuba. Wakulapamaula abantu ba mishobo iyingi.” Ifintu fyonse ifyo bapokele ku lukakala mwakulafipeela kuli Yawe, ifyuma fyabo fyonse mukafituula ku Mfumu umwine we sonde lyonse." 
Micah5:1 Imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu, longanikeni ifita, ifita ifyaba mu musumba, pantu abalwani nabatushinguluka. Balasansa kateeka wa cino calo ca Israeli no kumuma pesaya ku nkoto." 
Micah5:2 Lelo iwe Betelemu Efulata, nangu waba akamushi akacepeshapo pa ndupwa shakwa Yuda, awe kwena ni muli iwefye emukafuma umo uwa kuli ine uuli nokwisa mukulateeka icalo ca Israeli, uo intuntuko yakwe yaba iyakale nakale, iya myaka ya pe na pe." 
Micah5:3 Eico kanshi Yawe akatala akalekeleshe abantu bakwe, ikasuke inshita ikafike iyo akapapilapo uuli nokupapa uyo mwana umwaume. Lyena abekalacalo banankwe abakaba muli bunkole, elyo bakabwela, bakese ba pamo na bamunyinabo abena Israeli." 
Micah5:4 Elyo nao akeminina no kulacema abantu bakwe na maka ayakwatako Yawe, mu bucindami bwe shina lyakwa Yawe Lesa wakwe. Na bantu bakwe bakalaikala mu cibote, na bantu pesonde ponse bakalasumina ubufumu bwakwe." 
Micah5:5 Kabili eukaba umutende wabo. Ilyo abena Asiria bakasansa icalo cesu no kutobaula amalinga ya misumba yesu, ifwe tukabatumina impalume shesu ishabulamba nganshi, nasho shikabafye cine lubali ne ntungulushi cine konse konse, esho shikaye balwisha." 
Micah5:6 Ebakaya teeka icalo ca Asiria ku lupanga, ne calo cakwa Nimurodi ku lupanga ulwasokolwa. Eukatupusushako ku bena Asiria ilyo bakasansa icalo cesu, ilyo bakapalamina mu mipaka yesu." 
Micah5:7 Abakwa Yakobo abakashalapo bakekala pakati ka mishobo iyingi, bakaba ngo mume uwafuma kuli Yawe, nge mfula iyilelokela pa cani iishilolela umuntu kabili tailindila muntu ukuyeba." 
Micah5:8 Abakwa Yakobo bamo bakashala nabekala pamo na bantu ba mishobo iyingi, pakati ka bantu abengi, lelo kwena nangu bakalaikala nabo, abakwa Yakobo bakalaba nge nkalamo ilefwaya icakulya mu mutengo, ngo musepela wa nkalamo uuli apo balecemena impaanga. Uwakuti nga wafukukila impaanga, awe ninshi kushisantaula, ukwabula nelyo umo uwakuti ashipokololeko." 
Micah5:9 Bakalwisha no kucimfya abalwani babo bonse, no kubalofya bakabalofyafye bonse." 
Micah5:10 Yawe aletila ati, “Pali iyo nshita ine nkamupoka bakabalwe benu, kabili nkonaula na maceleta yenu." 
Micah5:11 Nkonaula imisumba iyaba muli cino calo cenu, nkabongolola na malinga yenu yonse." 
Micah5:12 Nkonaula na manga yenu yonse, kabili nshakashepo kabuka nelyo umo." 
Micah5:13 Nkonaula utulubi twenu ne nceshi sha mabwe ishamushilo isho imwe mupepa. Tamwakatale nakabili amupepa ifintu ifyo mwapanga ne minwe yenu. 
Micah5:14 Nkabongolola inceshi sha mulungu Ashera ishaba muli cino calo cenu, nkonaula ne misumba yenu." 
Micah5:15 Ine nkalandula mu bukali no kufulwa, pa micitile ya bantu ba mishobo yonse iyakaana ukulambeela.”" 
Micah6:1 Umfweni ifyo Yawe alelanda pa bena Israeli. Ima ulubulule pa cinso ca mpili, uleke impili no tupili twine tumfweko ifyo iwe ulesosa." 
Micah6:2 Imwe mwe mpili, mwe mifula ya pe iyaikasha isonde lyonse, umfweniko uko Yawe alelubulwisha. Yawe ala napeela abantu bakwe umulandu, alelubulwisha abena Israeli." 
Micah6:3 Yawe aletila ati, “Bushe kwena finshi ifyo ine namucita imwe mwe bantu bandi? Bushe ine namukalifya shani imwe imitima? Aleni njasukeni." 
Micah6:4 Ine nalimufumishe mu calo ca Egupto. Namulubula na mu busha. Natuma Mose, na Aroni, na Miriamu, pakuti balemutungulula imwe." 
Micah6:5 Mwe bantu bandi, ibukisheni ifyo Balaki imfumu ya bena Moabu apangile ukumucita, mwibukishe nefyo Balamu mwana Beori ayaswike Balaki. Ibukisheni ifintu ifyalecitika mu nshila, ukutampila mu Shitimu ukuya fika ku Giligali. Muleibukisha ifi fintu pakuti muleshininkisha ificitwa fyakwa Yawe ifyalungama.”" 
Micah6:6 Bushe finshi ifyo ine ningatwalila Yawe wa mu mulu, ilyo ndeya kukupepa Lesa umucindami? Bushe ndesenda ifiponti fya ŋombe ifya mwaka umo, ifyakuya mukumulekela ilambo ilyakoca?" 
Micah6:7 Bushe Yawe kuti atemwa nga namutwalila basukusuku amakana na makana, no kulamwitulwila amafuta ya miolifa ayakuti yalapita ngo mulonga? Bushe kuti namutuula umwana wandi umwaume uwe beli pakufuta pa fyabubifi fyandi, icisabo ca mubili wandi pa lubembu lwa mweo wandi?" 
Micah6:8 Awe iyoo, we muntu, Yawe alikwebelapo ifintu ifyawama. Bushe ni finshi afwaya ukuti iwe ulecita? Uli nokulacita umulinganya, ukutemwa ukulanga uluse, kabili uli nokulaicefya mukulamubeela." 
Micah6:9 Yawe uyo alebilikisha abena musumba ati, “Ukulakwatila Yawe akatiina, e mano. Umfweni kuno imwe mwe balongana mu musumba." 
Micah6:10 Bushe kuti nalaba ifikwatwa wanonkele mu bufufuntungu we mubifi? Babomfya ifipimo ifyabufi, icintu ico ine napata." 
Micah6:11 Bushe ine kuti nabelela shani abo bantu uluse, ababomfya amasekelo yabufi, abapimina ku mufuko wa mabwe ya bucenjeshi?" 
Micah6:12 Abakankala ba mu musumba baba no buluku, elyo na bantu ababamo babufi, ne ndimi shabo shilanda ifyabucenjeshi." 
Micah6:13 Kanshi ine nomba natampako ukulamukanda imwe, no kulamulofya pa mulandu wa fyabubifi fyenu." 
Micah6:14 Ukulya kwena mwakulalya, nomba tamwaleikuta nakalya, mwakulaumfwafye insala mu nda shenu. Ilyo mwatutila ifyo mwanonka pakufipususha, tamwakulamona apakufitutila nakalya. Ifyo mwakulapusushapo, ine nkafyonaula mu nkondo." 
Micah6:15 Mwakulatanda iŋanu shenu, nomba tamwakulaseepamo akantu. Mwakulaenga amafuta ya miolifa, nomba mwakulafilwa ukuyabomfya. Mwakulakama umwangashi, nomba mwakulafilwa ukuunwa." 
Micah6:16 Imwe mukonkelelafye imisango ibi iya mfumu Omuri ne micitile yakwa mwane imfumu Ahabu. Imwe mwakonkanyapofye ukulakonka imisango yashiko, Kanshi na ine imwe ndemuponesha ishamo iline line, na bantu bambi bonse bakulamuwela. Konsefye aba mishobo bakulamuwela ububi.”" 
Micah7:1 Awe ine nalishama mwe! Ndi ngo muntu uukolonganika ifisabo mu lusuba, pa nshita yakusota mwibala, ilyo tamuba fitwalo fya myangashi ifyo ningalya, ilyo takulaba ikunyu lyantanshi nangu limo ilyo nkabila nganshi." 
Micah7:2 Muli cino calo tamushele muntu wacishinka nelyo umo nakalya, tamushele nelyo umo nakalya uupetamine Yawe. Abaume bonse balalalililapo umo uwakuti bepaye, bonsefye bene balunga abanabo, no kubawikisha mwisumbu lyabo." 
Micah7:3 Bonsefye ni ncenjeshi shakantu kukucita ifyabipa. Bacilolo balomba ifyabupe ku bantu na baputula imilandu balomba amafisakanwa. Umuntu uwamaka asosa ukupeelwa ifyo alefwaya, bonse kumfwana umwakucitila." 
Micah7:4 Muli abo uwawamishapo aba nga nkololo, no wacishinka wabo aba nge linga lya myunga. Ubushiku nabwisa ubo bakalinda wabo baletiina, ubushiku ubo Lesa akakandamo abantu. Ino e nshita ya cimfulunganya cabo." 
Micah7:5 Tecakwesha kulacetekela mwina mupalamano obe, wilacetekela munobe. Ulecenjela kufyo uleeba nangu mukashi obe." 
Micah7:6 Muno nshiku umwana umwaume alecita wishi nge cipuba, umwana umwanakashi alesuula nyina, umwanakashi uwaupwa alesuula nyinafyala, ala nomba abalwani abo umuntu akwata, bantu ba mu lupwa ulwakwefye." 
Micah7:7 Nomba ine nakulalolela Yawe. Nakulatetekela Lesa uukampusushako. Ala Lesa wandi ine akaŋumfwa. 
Micah7:8 Abalwani bandi belasamwa pali ine pantu nangu ngwile, ine nkema. Nangu njikele mu mfifi, Yawe ine akandetela ulubuuto." 
Micah7:9 Apo ine nalibifya kuli Yawe, kanshi nakulashipikishafye pali nomba ilyo alenkalipila. Pakulekelesha akampokololako, no kundubulwilako umulandu wandi. Akamfumisha panse pa lubuuto, nkaimwena ubulungami bwakwe." 
Micah7:10 Abalwani bandi nabo bakamonako, elyo ne nsoni shikabekata, abalwani bandi bena balentumfya abati, “Nga Yawe Lesa obe aba kwi?” Nkamonako uko balecimba, noko balenyantaulwapo nga filya banyantauka mu matipa ayali mu misebo." 
Micah7:11 Imwe mwe bena Yerusalemu, ubushiku bumo bukafika, ubwakukuula cipya cipya amalinga ya musumba. E bushiku mukakushako ne mipaka ya calo cenu." 
Micah7:12 Pali bulya bushiku abantu bakabwelela kuli iwe, bakafuma ku calo ca Asiria na ku misumba ya mu Egupto, ukutula ku calo ca Egupto no kuya ku mumana, bakesa ukutula kuli bemba no kuya kuli bemba, ukutula ku lupili no kuya ku lupili." 
Micah7:13 Lelo kwena isonde lyonse likasanguka amatololo, pa mulandu wakubifya kwa bantu abaikalapo." 
Micah7:14 We Yawe, wingalacema abantu bobe ku nkoto yobe, pantu bena cikwatwa cobe, mukuni obe, bantu abaikala beka mu mpanga iyashingulukwa ne calo ica mufundo. Wingaleka baleya, baye mukulya mu citungu ca mufundo ica Bashani neca Gileadi, nga filya fine balecita kale." 
Micah7:15 Nkamulanga ifipeshamano, nga filya fine nacitile ilyo namufumishe mu calo ca Egupto." 
Micah7:16 Abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo bakaimwena, imisana yabo ikaputuka nangu bakwatisha ubulamba. Bakabika ulupi pa tunwa twabo, na matwi yabo yakakoma." 
Micah7:17 Bakalamyanga iloba nge nsoka, no kulakulika nge fibumbwa ifikulika pa mushili. Bakesa baletutuma ukufuma mu misumba ya malinga yabo, bakaba no mwenso pakwalukila kuli Yawe, Lesa wesu, kabili bakatiina nganshi pa mulandu obe." 
Micah7:18 Mulungu nshi uwalingana na iwe, uulekelela ifyabubifi fya bantu, no kubelela abantu uluse pali bumpulamafunde, pa bashalako ku bacikwatwa cakwe? Ena tafwaya ukutwalilila ukufulwa pe, pantu alitemwa ukubelela uluse." 
Micah7:19 Ali nokubwekeshapo ukutucitila inkumbu, ali nokunyantawila ifyabubifi fyesu panshi ya makasa yakwe. Apose ne fyabubifi fyesu, petenga ilyashika pali bemba." 
Micah7:20 Uli nokulanga icishinka kuli Yakobo, no kutemwa kobe ukushipwa kuli Abrahamu, nga filya fine walapile kale ku fikolwe fyesu ukuti efyo ukalabacitila." 
Nahum1:1 Muli ici citabo emwaba amashiwi aya pa fintu ifyo Nahumu umwina Elikoshi amwene mu cimonwa palwa musumba wa Ninife. 
Nahum1:2 Yawe ni Lesa uwakwata ubufuba kabili alalandula, Yawe alalandula kabili aisulamo icipyu, Yawe alalandula pa balwani bakwe, Yawe alafulilwa abalwani bakwe icabipisha." 
Nahum1:3 Yawe tafulwa bwangu, lelo kabili alikwatisha ubulamba, tekuti alekefye abantu ababi ukwabula ukubakanda. Yawe apita mu cimwela icacikuuku na kankungwe, amakumbi e lukungu ulo amakasa yakwe yafutumuna." 
Nahum1:4 Alakalipila bemba no kumulenga ukukama, alakamya ne mimana imbi yonse. Ifimena mu Bashani pamo ne fimena pa lupili lwa Kameli filoma, na maluba ya mu lupili lwa Lebanoni nayo yalabonsa." 
Nahum1:5 Impili shilatenta pa cinso cakwa Yawe, utupili twena tulasunguluka. Ilyo amoneka, isonde lyonse lilatenkana, isonde na bantu bonse abekalapo balasunkana." 
Nahum1:6 Yawe nga afulwa, nani uwingashanshako? Nani uwingapusukako ku bukali ne cipyu cakwe? Icipyu cakwe ciba ngo lubingu lwa mulilo, cilalepaula ne fimabwe pa cinso cakwe." 
Nahum1:7 Yawe, ala musuma, e linga umo abantu bafisama ilyo bali mu mafya, kabili acingilila bonse aboba muli ena." 
Nahum1:8 Abalwani bakwe ena abapumikishafye nge lyeshi ilyamaka, elyo no kubalofyafye nakalya nakalya, kabili akatamfisha abalwani bakwe mu cifulo icamfifi." 
Nahum1:9 Bushe imwe bubi nshi mulepanga ukucitila Yawe? Ala imwe akamulofyafye nakalya nakalya. Ena tashingwana na balwani bakwe libili iyoo. 
Nahum1:10 Nge myunga iyakobana, kabili nga bakolelwe umwangashi wabo wine, efyo mukatutaika ku mulilo nge mpimbili ishauma." 
Nahum1:11 Muli iwe we musumba wa Ninife emwafuma umuntu umo, uwa mapange ayakucita ifibi kuli Yawe, uupanda amano mu fyabubifi." 
Nahum1:12 Nomba Yawe ifyo aleeba abantu bakwe nifi, aleti, “Nangu abena Asiria baba no bulamba shani, kabinge nangu bafula shani, ala bakalobafye bonse. Nangu ine namusalapula imwe mwe bantu bandi, iyoo nomba nshakabwekeshepo kumusalapula na limbi." 
Nahum1:13 Nomba nkakontaula ikoli ilyo bamubika mu mukoshi, nkaputaula ne minyololo iyo imwe bamukaka.”" 
Nahum1:14 Yawe napeela icipope pa bena Ninife ati, “Ala bakalabikwako, pantu tabakakwate abakubapyana. Ine nkonaula utulubi utwabaswa no tulubi utwakwenga, utwaba mu mayanda umo bapepela imilungu yabo. Ine ndeimbila abena Asiria inindi, pantu baliba abasebana.”" 
Nahum1:15 Lolesheni pa mulu wa mpili, epo yali amakasa ya uleleta imbila nsuma, uulebila amashiwi yamutende. Mwe bena Yuda, aleni akusefyeni inshikunkulu, mupeele na Lesa ifyo mwalaya ukumupeela. Abantu babi tabakabale abawililila icalo cenu nakabili, pantu nabalobelelafye nakalya nakalya." 
Nahum2:1 Uwakukusansa aleisa kuli iwe we musumba wa Ninife. Lindeni amalinga yenu mwe bena musumba. Lenguleni inshila. Fwalileni, kalabaneni, longanyeni ifita fya nkondo." 
Nahum2:2 Pantu Yawe alebweseshapo ululumbi lwakwa Yakobo, nga filya fyaba ululumbi lwakwa Israeli. Nangu abalwani baishile bakufya, no konawila kumo ne misambo ya myangashi yabo." 
Nahum2:3 Abashilika abalesansa imwe bali ne nkwela ishakashika, ne fyakufwala ifyo bafwele, nafyo fintu fyakashika ce. Amaceleta yabo aya fyela yabengeshima ngo mulilo, ilyo batantama pakuti batampe inkondo. Bakabalwe babo nabo balya balesumpaukila." 
Nahum2:4 Amaceleta yalya yalulunkanina mu misebo, yalebutaukafye mu mansa shonse, yalemoneka nge myenge ileaka, na pakupitana yalebyata nge myele ya nkuba." 
Nahum2:5 Baita ifita ifyasobolwa, fyaya filetalansuka pakuya. Ifita filya fyabutukila kwilinga kukuya lisansa, fyaimikako ne fyakubamo pa nshita filebongolola ilinga." 
Nahum2:6 Impongolo ishabela ku mumana shilya shaisulwa, kwisano abantu bali no mwenso." 
Nahum2:7 Namfumu ulya basenda bunkole, ababomfi bakwe abanakashi baleshinshimukila, balelukusha ne filamba nge nkunda, baleyombawilafye pakuililila ubulanda." 
Nahum2:8 Abantu balya baomoka mu Ninife, kwati menshi yapongwela, ilintu babongolola icishiba ico bayabikamo. Bamo abo balepunda abati, “Iminineni imwe! Lekeni ukufulumuka!” Nomba abantu nabo tapali no ulebweluluka nakalya." 
Nahum2:9 Batapeni silifa. Batapeni na golide wine. Pantu mu musumba mwatuntumana ifyuma imina ne mina, ifyuma ifyamutengo ifyalekana lekana." 
Nahum2:10 Eya, umusumba wa Ninife bautapa, baubongolola no kuonaula. Abantu bafwilefye icipense pense, mu makufi namupomponteka, imisana naiputuka, na pa menso palifye cimbi cimbi." 
Nahum2:11 Bushe nomba uli kwi umwimba uwakwikalako inkalamo, na lulya lucengo shalelishishako utwana twashiko? Uko inkalamo shalenyangala pamo no twana twashiko, no kulaikalila ku matwi tondolo, ukwabula nelyo cimo icakushitiinya." 
Nahum2:12 Iyilume yaleti nga yaipaya inama, yasantawilako iyikota no twana, na mu mwimba mwaisulafye imipusa ya nama." 
Nahum2:13 Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Moneni, ine nimwalukila. Nalaoca amaceleta yenu. Inkondo eikalofya utwana twenu utukalamo, na ine nkamupoka fyonse ifyo mwatapile bambi. Pano isonde ponse tapakatale apomfwika nakabili amashiwi ya nkombe shenu nakalya.”" 
Nahum3:1 Washama we musumba wa fipondo, umwafulisha ubucenjeshi ne fyuma ifyakutapa, we ushibulwa bakusansa." 
Nahum3:2 Umfweni ifikoti ifyo filelulamo, imipeto ya maceleta iyo ilekolonkontamo, ne nshindo sha bakabalwe isho shileumfwikamo, na maceleta yalya yaleimauka." 
Nahum3:3 Abendela pali bakabalwe balya bafulumbana, impanga shilya shilebeka, amafumo nayo yalya yalebengeshima. Ifitumbi filya fyalala imina ntangali ntangali, nafyo mintapendwa, na bantu eko baleipununa." 
Nahum3:4 Ne cilengele, nico ubulalelale bwalifulisha mu Ninife, umwaba imbeka sha banakashi bacilende, abacenjela ku miti ya cisense, abasembeleka abantu aba mishobo, no kulabatemuna ku miti yabo iya cisense." 
Nahum3:5 Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Moneni, ine nimwalukila, Ine nalamufuula, mushalefye ubwamba, nalaleka na bantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo balemutamba, ne shamfumu shonse shiletamba insoni shenu." 
Nahum3:6 Ine ndemusebanya imwe, ndemukantaika no busali. Nkamucita icakutambwa ku bantu." 
Nahum3:7 Abantu bonse abakulamumona bakulashintukila. Bakulatifye, ‘Yangu ifyo abena Ninife bali e. Nomba kwena nani uwingabalangulukilako?’ Awe teti pamoneke nelyo umo uwingatemwa ukubatalalikako.”" 
Nahum3:8 Iwe we musumba wa Ninife, bushe walicila umusumba wa Tebesi ku busuma? Ngefyo Tebesi nao wine ali mu lulamba lwa mumana wa Nailo, kabili washingulwikwe na Nailo wine uwali nge linga ilyakuipokolwelako. Amenshi eyali nge cibumba ca musumba." 
Nahum3:9 Icalo ca Kushi ne calo ca Egupto, emwali amaka yauko ayapelele pelelefye. Abena Puti, na bena Libia baleumfwana na bena Tebe." 
Nahum3:10 Nomba abena Tebe nabo bene balibekete no kubasenda bunkole. Mu finshoko fya misebo ya mu Tebe emo utwana twabo baletunyankwila pakutwipaya. Abacindami abalimo babasendele mu minyololo, balecita ukupendula pakwakana abakankala babo kubabekete." 
Nahum3:11 Nemwe bene mwe bena Ninife mukawa nga bantu abakolelwe ubwalwa. Mukafulumuka abalwani benu no kufisama. 
Nahum3:12 Amalinga yenu yonse yakabafye nge mikunyu iliko amakunyu ayapya, icakuti umo nga apukunyako, ninshi ne fitwalo kulalukutila mu kanwa kakwe." 
Nahum3:13 Abashilika benu balifye nga banakashi, ne calo cenu tacikwete fyakuicingililako ku balwani benu. Imipilikisho ya mpongolo sha musumba wenu naitutaika ku mulilo." 
Nahum3:14 Aleni bangilileni ukutapa amenshi ilyo abalwani benu bashilati bamulibile. Kosheni amalinga yenu. Akukandileni iloba ilyakutamamo amatafwali, fwayeni ifikombola." 
Nahum3:15 Nangu mucite ifyo, ala nalyo line mukatutaika ku mulilo, atemwa mukafwa ku nkondo. Mukapwa nge fisabo ifyo makanta alile. Musande nga yensa, mufyalane nga makanta." 
Nahum3:16 Mwalifyala bashimakwebo abacila ne ntanda ku bwingi. Ndakai tabalipo, baliya, baya nga makanta uwansa amapindo yakwe no kupupukila kumbi panuma yakupulula no kulya fyonse." 
Nahum3:17 Bacilolo benu bafula nga makanta, na bamushika benu nga makanta umwingi ulya uwikala ku fibumba ubushiku ilyo kuli impepo. Uwakuti cilya akasuba kabalika, ninshi apupuka, ukwabula nelyo umo uwakwishiba uko ele." 
Nahum3:18 Iwe we mfumu we wateeka icalo ca Asiria, ala abalashi bobe nabafwa, bacilolo bobe abacindami nacipwa nabapona mu tulo uto bashakatale ababuukamo. Abantu bobe basalanganine pa mpili, takuli nelyo umo uwakubalonganya nakalya." 
Nahum3:19 Iwe teti kumoneke umuti uwakuti waposha ifilonda fyobe nakalya, ifilaso fyobe naficilamo, te fyakundapwa iyoo. Bonsefye abaleumfwako ifyo iwe cili, ala bakulaombafye indupi kulwa nsansa, pantu takwaba nelyo umo nakalya uo iwe ushateeka ku kalili." 
Habakkuk1:1 Amashiwi ayo Lesa asokolwele kuli kasesema Habakuku mu cimonwa ni aya. 
Habakkuk1:2 We Yawe, bushe nkafika lilali mukulomba ukuti ungafwe, lelo tauŋumfwa iyo? Nangu nakuuta kuli iwe nati “Ubuluku!” lelo taupususha?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Bushe cinshi ico ulekele ndetamba imicitile iyabipa? Na iwe uleloleshafye pa mafya. Ubonaushi no buluku efyo ndemonafye, kabili nakwima ifikansa elyo no lubuli." 
Habakkuk1:4 Pantu amafunde tayali na maka, no mulinganya takuli nakalya. Abantu ababi ebaletitikisha abololoke, eco no bupingushi bulifye ubwapondama." 
Habakkuk1:5 Elyo Yawe ayaswike ati, “Lolesheni imishobo ya benafyalo, mupape pa fintu ifyo muleimwena mwe bene. Ine nalacitapo cimo mu nshiku shenu ico imwe mushasumine nelyo mwalacumfwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Naco nici. Ine nalaimya abena Kaludea, balya bantu bakalipisha kabili abakalabana. Ala balenda, baya balecilinganya isonde lyonse pakuti bapoke ifyalo fimbi ifishili fyabo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Bantu abatiinya kabili abakutiina, ifyo bapingula fiyebafye ifine, no kucindama kwabo kuiletafye ukwine." 
Habakkuk1:8 Bakabalwe babo balicila pa mbwili ku lubilo, ku bukali balicila imimbulu iya cungulo. Abendela pali bakabalwe babo batula ukutali, bakabalwe babo balabutukisha. Besa nabafoka nga bakapumpe abalefwaya ukwikata fimo." 
Habakkuk1:9 Ifita fishila ukucimfya no buluku, abantu balafitiina pantu fisa nge cimwela ca mu matololo. Bankole abo fikata, ala mintapendwa." 
Habakkuk1:10 Abena Babiloni tepakusuula ishamfumu shimbi, kabili tepakuseka intungulushi shimbi. Kuli bena takwaba na musumba we linga nakalya, bena batulikakofye imina ya maloba, no kupoka ninshi nabaupoka." 
Habakkuk1:11 Ninshi elyo bafulumbana nga kankungwe, no kuya ninshi e miile. Ebalya bantu bamona ubulamba bwabo kwati e mulungu wabo, kanshi fipondo.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 We Yawe, bushe tewe wabako ukufumafye ku citendekelo. Niwe Lesa wandi, we wamushilo wandi, tatwakafwe iyoo. We Yawe, niwe wasala abena Babiloni kukucita ubupingushi. We cilibwe icasansuka, niwe wabapeela no bulamba pakuti baletukanda." 
Habakkuk1:13 Ala amenso yobe yaliwamisha, teti uyalekefye yalelolekesha ifyabipa, kabili tekuti iwe uletambakofye uko abantu balelufyanya. Nga nomba cinshi icakuti iwe wikalefye tondolo, pa nshita ababifi balelofya abantu ababacila mu bololoke?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Ngakuti walacita shani abantu kwati lisabi, kwati fishishi ifishakwata na wakufitungulula?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Abena Babiloni baleikata abantu kwati lisabi balefwampula ku malobo. Balebakulila mu masumbu, baleaula no tupundu pa bupalu bwabo." 
Habakkuk1:16 E mulandu wine aba bantu bapepela amasumbu yabo, no kulayafutumwina ububani, pantu mu masumbu yabo balamwenamo ifintu ifisuma nganshi ne fyakulya ifyakubasansamusha." 
Habakkuk1:17 Bushe kwena bakulakonkanyapofye ukulaikata no kufumya mwisumbu lyabo, no kulalofya abantu ba mishobo imbi ukwabula no luse, mwa?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ine ne Habakuku nalanina ku lupungu lwandi ulo nondelapo, uleke ndelolela ifyo Yawe akanjeba ukusosa, nefyo akanjasuka pafyo njilishenye." 
Habakkuk2:2 Yawe nao epakwasuka ifi ati, “Ifyo ine nalakusokolwela, walafilemba bwino bwino pa mabwe ayapapatala, kabili inkombe ya kulabelengela abantu yangufyanye ukupitamo." 
Habakkuk2:3 Filembefye, pantu inshita icilipo pakuti fikacitike. Inshita iyo tayakakokole kufika, nefyo ine ndekulanga fikacitika icine cine. Nga caba kwati cakokola, te mulandu, iwe ulelolelafye, pantu cikacitika ukwabula ukukokola iyoo." 
Habakkuk2:4 “Lemba ici icakutila, onse uushatambalala umutima wakwe takapusuke, lelo umololoke ena akulaba umumi pa mulandu wa citetekelo cakwe. ”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Kabili ngefyo umuntu uukolelwe umwangashi abepwa no kufulunganishiwa, cimo cine na baba ne cilumba. Tabekala panshi nakalya, baba no lunkumbwa nge calo cabafwa kabili baba nge mfwa imunshikuta, tabatendwa nakalya. Eco balonganikila imishobo yonse no kwikata abantu bonse pakuti balebalila pa mitwe." 
Habakkuk2:6 Cine cine abantu abaiketwe bakalukila abalebacimfya, bakalebatuka insele no kulabasuula. Bakalabeba abati, “Imwe mubuula ifintu ifishili fyenu, mwashama imwe. Bushe imwe mukaleka lilali ukulanonkela ifyuma mukucenjelela abalemukongola indalama?”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Imwe ala mukapulikilwafye bamwimina ku bankongole. Ala bakamwimina no kumutiinya icakuti mukaleitutuminafye ku mwenso. Ee, na imwe bakamutapa ifintu." 
Habakkuk2:8 Imwe mwalitapa ifintu fya bantu ba mishobo iyingi, kanshi abantu bonse abashalapo nomba nabo nimwe bakatapa ifintu, pantu imwe mwalipaulula abantu ku buluku mu fyalo fyonse, mwalibonawila ne misumba yabo." 
Habakkuk2:9 Alishama uunonkela aba ŋanda yakwe ifyuma fya mu lufyengo, pakuti abe uwa pamulu, epakuti aleikala bwino ukwabula ifibi ukumuponena." 
Habakkuk2:10 Ifyo mupanga ukulacita, efisebanya ulupwa lwenu, kabili muiletelelafye ilyo mulofya abantu ba mishobo iyingi." 
Habakkuk2:11 Na mabwe yene ayo bakuulila amayanda yakalamulilila imisowa, ne ciunda cayako cikalatula na mu myalo ine." 
Habakkuk2:12 Mwalishama imwe mwe bakuulila umusumba mukusumya umulopa, kabili ulufyengo lwenu elwalenga nokuti imwe mukuule." 
Habakkuk2:13 Bushe te Yawe umwine wa fita uwapingula ukuti ukucucutika kwa bantu ba mishobo imbi kukonaikilafye mu mulilo? Nokuti abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo babombela icafye? 
Habakkuk2:14 Pantu abantu ba pano isonde ponse bakakwatisha amano ayakwishiba ifyo Yawe acindama, nga filya fine amenshi yaisula muli bemba." 
Habakkuk2:15 Mwashama imwe mwe banwesha abanenu ifikola, mulapatikisha abanenu ukunwamo mu nkombo shenu basuka bakolwa, elyo nomba mwalabalengela ico bashele ubwamba." 
Habakkuk2:16 Kuntanshi nimwe nomba mukasebaninapo, ukucindama kwenu kukapwa. Nimwe nomba mukanwa, no kushala ubwamba. Yawe akamunweshamo mu lukombo ululi ku kuboko kwakwe ukwa kulyo, no kucindama kwenu kukapwa, ni nsonifye nomba esho mukalaumfwa." 
Habakkuk2:17 Ubuluku mwacitile mu Lebanoni, nomba nimwe bukalukila. Mwalipayamo inama ishalimo, nomba inama nasho shikalamutiinya apakalambafye. Ico cikabela ifyo, nico imwe mwalipaulula abantu, no kucusha abantu ba mu fyalo fyonse, mwalibonawila ne misumba yabo." 
Habakkuk2:18 Nga kalubi nako ka mulimo nshi? Kantufye akapangwa no muntu, akashingamona no kumweba imwe ifyacishinka. Umuntu uukapanga, nao aicushafye pakulakatetekela, nako kene akalubi umulungu uo batiina kalafilwa no kulanda." 
Habakkuk2:19 Mwalishama imwe mwe balaeba icimuti icabaswafye amuti, “Buuka!” Nangu ilibwe ilishilanda amuti, “Alamuka!” Bushe kuti akalubi ekafundapo umuntu cimo? Nangu kengelelwako silifa nangu golide, ala nakalya takapema, takakwata bumi iyoo." 
Habakkuk2:20 Nomba Yawe wena aba mwi Tempele lyakwe ilyamushilo. Abantu bonse aba pano isonde nabaleikala tondolo pa cinso cakwe. 
Habakkuk3:1 Ipepo lyakwa kasesema Habakuku, ukukonka icinanda ca Shigionoti." 
Habakkuk3:2 We Yawe, ine nalyumfwa ululumbi lobe, no mwenso ine walinjikata pa fintu ifyo we Yawe wacita. Uficite nakabili muno nshiku shesu, no kufilenga ukwishibikwa mu nshita shesu. Nangu watufulilwa, uletubelelakofye uluse." 
Habakkuk3:3 Lesa afumine ku calo ca Temani, Uwamushilo alefuma ku lupili lwa Parani. Ubucindami bwakwe nabukupa umulu, na mu calo conse mwiswile ukumutatakula." 
Habakkuk3:4 Aisa alebengeshima nga kasuba akaletula, mu minwe yakwe mulefuma imibengelele, emwafisama ubulamba bwakwe." 
Habakkuk3:5 Atangisha ukutuma icikuko, ne cinkunka cakonkapo mu nkasa shakwe." 
Habakkuk3:6 Aleti nga aiminina, ninshi isonde lyalatenta, aleti nga alolesha, ninshi abantu ba mishobo yonse balaikankilafye ku mwenso. Impili shakale na kale shalabongoloka, no tupili twakale na kale ninshi twalatobaika. Ne mibeele yakwe yaba ifyo yali na kale." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ine nacimona uko abena Kushani bacitiina, noko abena Midiani bacilatutuma ku mwenso." 
Habakkuk3:8 We Yawe, bushe mimana yali yalenga ukuti ufulwe? Bushe milonga ufulilwe? Bushe ni bemba ewali alenga ukuti ulebilimafye ku cipyu, ilyo wacilaendela pali bakabalwe na pa maceleta yobe ayakucimfya?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Wacibuula ubuta bobe, wasomona ne mifwi mu mucenje obe. Walepula no mushili ku mimana." 
Habakkuk3:10 Impili shali shileitentelafye ku mwenso pakukumona, mu mulu mwali mulefumfumuka amenshi. Amatenga yali yalepoma, na matamba yali yaleimina na mu mulu." 
Habakkuk3:11 Akasuba no mweshi fyali filifye shika mu mulu, pa mulandu wa kubyata kwa mifwi yobe iyacilaŋwintuka, na pa mulandu wa kubalabata kwe fumo lyobe ilyabekesha." 
Habakkuk3:12 Wacilinganya isonde lyonse mu cipyu, wanyantaula imishobo ya benafyalo mu bukali." 
Habakkuk3:13 Wacisa kukupususha abantu bobe, kukupususha imfumu yobe iyo wasuba. Naunyantaula intungulushi ya ŋanda ya babifi, naushula no mufula waiko onse mpaka pebwe." 
Habakkuk3:14 Mushika wa fita fyakwe, naumulashila kwifumo lyakwe line, ilyo ifita fyakwe fyali fifulumbene nga kankungwe kukwisa mpasa, nafyo fyaciba fileyanga nga bantu abepaila abalanda mu bumfisolo." 
Habakkuk3:15 Waciba ulenyanta pali bemba na bakabalwe bobe, na menshi ayamaka yaciba yalepashika." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ilyo naumfwa ifi fyonse, umutima wandi watutuma, ne milomo yandi yalatentafye pakumfwa ishiwi. Amafupa yandi yaumina, na mu molu mwalasokona. Lelo ine nakulalolela tondolo mpaka ilyo ubo bushiku bukesa, ubwakukanda abantu abatusansa." 
Habakkuk3:17 Nangufye imikunyu tailebalula, ne myangashi nayo tailetwala, nangufye ku miolifa takuleba fitwalo, na mu mabala namo tabalelobololamo akantu, nangufye impaanga shifwe shani, ne ŋombe shibulemo mu matanga," 
Habakkuk3:18 awe ine nakulasekelela muli Yawe, nakulacankilwa Lesa, pantu ena e mulubushi wandi." 
Habakkuk3:19 Imfumu Yawe eumpeela amaka. Eulenga ukuti ine nyende bwino nge nsebula, eulenga ukuti ine ndeenda pamulu pa mpili ishasansama. Kuli kembisha mukalamba, kubomfya ifilimba fya nsale." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe ilyaishile kuli Sefania mwana Kushi uwali mwana Gedalia, na Gedalia nao ali ni mwana Amaria, uwali mwana wa mfumu Hesekia, pa nshita Yosia umwana wa mfumu Amoni ateekele icalo ca Yuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Yawe alisosele ati, “Ine nkonaula ifintu fyonse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse," 
Zephaniah1:3 nkalofya abantu bonse, ne nama shonse, ne fyuni fyonse, ne sabi line lyonse. Imbifi shikatulumana umwina ilyo nkalofya abantunse mpanga yonse pano isonde lyonse.” Nine ne Yawe ndelanda." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ine nkakanda abena Yuda na bonse abekala mu Yerusalemu. Nkonaula fyonse ifyashalamo ifyalola kukupepa Baali, nkalofya na mashina ya basenshi naya bashimapepo bene ababombela Baali." 
Zephaniah1:5 Nkalofya bonse abaya pa mitenge no kulapepelapo ifita fya mu mulu, Bafukama no kumpepa ine ne Yawe, lelo babuula ishina lya mulungu Moleki elyo balumbula pakulapa." 
Zephaniah1:6 Nkalofya bonse abansangukila, abashimfwaya ne Yawe, abashisa uko ndi pakuti ndebapandako amano.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Ubushiku bwakwa Yawe nabupalama, eico ikaleni tondolo pa cinso ca Mfumu Yawe. Yawe alepekanya ilambo kabili nasangulula abo aita." 
Zephaniah1:8 Yawe aletila ati, “Pali ubo bushiku ubwe lambo lyandi, ine nkakanda intungulushi na bana ba mfumu, na bonse bene abakonka imisango ya benafyalo." 
Zephaniah1:9 Pali ubo ubushiku nkakanda bonse abaciluka pa mwinshi ilyo baleingila, abesusha iŋanda ya milungu yabo ifintu ifyabuluku no lufyengo.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 Yawe asosa ati, “Pali ubo bushiku mukomfwa inkuuta ku Mpongolo Yesabi iyaba mu Yerusalemu. Mukomfwa imisowa yalatula ku ciputulwa cabubili ica musumba, mukomfwa no mukunto uukalamba mu mpili." 
Zephaniah1:11 Ilyo mukomfwa ifi fintu mukapumepo imisowa imwe mwe baikala mu citente ca mushika wa musumba, pantu bashimakwebo bonse bakafwa, bonse abacita amakwebo ya silifa bakonaika." 
Zephaniah1:12 Pali iyo inshita ine nkabuula ifisaniko, nkaye ndelengula umusumba wa Yerusalemu. Nkalimuna abantu abashasakamanapo nelyo cimo, abekala mu busali bwabo, abatontonkanya abati, ‘Awe Yawe takacitepo icintu icisuma nelyo cimo nangufye icibi iyoo,’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Ala ifyuma fyabo fikatapwa, na mayanda yabo yakabongololwa. Amayanda ayo balekuula, tabakayekalemo nakalya, ne myangashi iyi balelima tabakanweko mwangashi waiko nakalya.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Ubushiku ubukalamba ubwakwa Yawe nabupalama, nabupalama kabili buleisa mukwangufyanya. Umfweni, inkuuta pa bushiku bwakwa Yawe iyikaba iyikali, impalume ya bulwi ikapundila kulya kwine." 
Zephaniah1:15 Bulya bushiku bukaba ubushiku bwabukali, ubushiku ubwakumanama no bucushi, ubushiku ubwakucucutika, no bonaushi, ubushiku ubwa mfifi no bulanda, ubushiku ubwa makumbi kabili no kufitisha." 
Zephaniah1:16 Ubushiku ubwakulisha ipenga ne nkuuta sha bulwi, pa kuwisha imisumba ya malinga kabili ne mpungu sha petungi." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ine nkaletela abantu ubulanda, kabili bakalaenda nge mpofu, pantu balibifya kuli Yawe. Umulopa wabo ukapongololwa ngo lukungu ne fitumbi fyabo nga citindi." 
Zephaniah1:18 Nangu ni silifa wabo na golide wabo takakwate maka yakubapusushako, pali bulya bushiku ubwa cipyu cakwa Yawe. Isonde lyonse likapya mu mulilo wa bufuba bwakwe, pantu akaleta impela ukwabula ukwenekela kuli bonse abekala mwisonde." 
Zephaniah2:1 Longaneni pamo, longaneni pamo, mwe mushobo uwabula insoni mwe," 
Zephaniah2:2 ilyo inshita iyapimwa tailafika, kabili ilyo bulya bushiku tabulamululula nge misungu, ne cipyu icikali icakwa Yawe tacilamuponena, ilyo ubushiku bwakwa Yawe ubwabukali tabulamufikila." 
Zephaniah2:3 Fwayeni Yawe imwe bonse mwe baicefya pano calo, mwe bacita ifyo akonkomesha. Fwayeni ubulungami, fwayeni ukuicefya, nakalimo lyena kuti mwamona umwakuuba pa bushiku bwa cipyu cakwa Yawe." 
Zephaniah2:4 Mu Gaza tamwakashale umuntu nangu umo, kabili Ashikeloni akashala icibolya. Bakatamfyamo abena Ashidodi ilyo akasuba kafika pakati ka mutwe. Ekironi nao akanukulwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Mwashama imwe mwe bekala mu lulamba lwa bemba, yangu mwe bena Kereti. Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe nalimwimina imwe, yangu we Kenani, icalo ca Bafilisiti. “Ine nkakonaula, kabili tamwakashale nelyo umo.”" 
Zephaniah2:6 Icalo ca mu lulamba lwa bemba, umo abena Kereti bekala, cikasanguka impanga ya bakacema na macinka ya mpaanga shabo." 
Zephaniah2:7 Cikaba cuma ca bakashalapo aba mu ŋanda yakwa Yuda. Kulya eko bakasanga umulemfwe umwakucemena, icungulo bakasendama mu mayanda ya ku Ashikeloni. Pantu Yawe Lesa wabo akabasakamana, no kubabwesesha ishuko lyabo." 
Zephaniah2:8 Nalyumfwa insele shakwa Moabu, kabili no kuseka kwa bena Amoni. Abo abaletuka abantu bandi, no kulaitakisha mu calo cabo." 
Zephaniah2:9 “Eico, napalifye ine ne Mumi,” efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wa bena Israeli ati, “Cine cine Moabu akaba nga Sodoma, abena Amoni nabo bakaba nga Gomora, incende ya bakaenya no mwina wa mucele na matololo umuyayaya. Abantu bandi abakashalapo ebakabatapa, na bakapusuka mu mushobo wandi ebakapyana icalo cabo.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Aya e malipilo ya cilumba cabo, pantu baletukana no kuseka abantu bakwa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Zephaniah2:11 Yawe akaba uwakutiinya ilyo akonaula imilungu yonse iyaba pano isonde. Imishobo ya mu fyalo fyonse ikamupepa, umuntu onse mu calo cakwe." 
Zephaniah2:12 Na imwe mwe bena Kushi, ulupanga lwandi elukamwipaya." 
Zephaniah2:13 Yawe akatambalika ukuboko kwakwe lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso pakonaula Asiria, akasha Ninife icibolya ceka ceka icauma ndi nga matololo." 
Zephaniah2:14 Imikuni ya mpaanga, imbushi ne ŋombe efikalalalamo ne fibumbwa fya misango yonse. Imikanga ne nkoba fikekala mu fituntu fya nceshi, ifipululu fikalalila mu nsolokoto, na bamwankole pa matabo ya minshi, pantu imbao sha keda shikapanguluka." 
Zephaniah2:15 Uyu musumba uwaleikalila umutelelwe, uwaletila mu mutima wauko auti, “Ala ine nine winefye takwaba na umbi.” Yangu ifyo wasanguka icibolya, icifulo ca nama sha mpanga. Bonse abapitapo balaikumuna no kupukanya imitwe." 
Zephaniah3:1 Walishama we musumba uwatalama, uwakowela kabili uunkalwe." 
Zephaniah3:2 Taumfwa kabili taupokelela na mafunde nakalya. Taucetekela Yawe nangu ukupalama kuli Lesa wauko. 
Zephaniah3:3 Intungulushi ishabamo ni nkalamo ishilebuluma, abapingushi ababamo baba nge mimbulu iyabuuka, iyishishako ifupa lyakukolokotako ulucelo." 
Zephaniah3:4 Bakasesema bauko ni bacilande lande, tababa na cishinka. Bashimapepo bauko balikowesha ifintu ifyamushilo, no kucita ubuluku ku mafunde yakwa Lesa." 
Zephaniah3:5 Lelo Yawe uwaba mu musumba, acitamofye ifyabololoke, tatala acitamo ulufyengo. Cila lucelo acitila abantu bakwe umulinganya, ubwaca no bwaca tafilwa, iyoo. Lelo abantu ababifi bena bakonkanyapofye ukulabifya ukwabula ne nsoni." 
Zephaniah3:6 Yawe aletila ati, “Ine nalilofya imishobo ya bantu, nalyonaula ne mpungu shabo shine, imisebo yabo yalibuma tapaba na upitamo, Imisumba yabo yalyonaika, tamwaba bantu, tamwashala wakwikalamo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Naletila nati, ‘Nomba abantu bakulantiina, no kulapokelela amafunde yandi, kabili tabakalabe imiku iyo nabalimuna.’ Nomba nakalya, bwangu bwangufye batampa ukulaenda mu myendele yabo iyabubifi pamo nga kale.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 Eico Yawe aletila ati, “Cisuma mulolelefye. Mulolele ubushiku nkesa mukulubulwisha abantu. Pantu ine nalipanga ukulonganya imishobo, ne shamfumu sha mu fyalo ifyalekana lekana, no kupongolwela pali bena icipyu candi conse, no bukali bonse ubwa kufulwa kwandi. Isonde lyonse likabilima, no kupya ku mulilo wa kufulwa kwandi." 
Zephaniah3:9 Elyo nkapilibula imisosele ya bantu ba mishobo yonse, pakuti bonse bakalepepa ishina lyakwa Yawe, no kumubombela no mutima umo." 
Zephaniah3:10 Abantu bandi abampepa, abasalanganina kwishilya lya mimana ya mu Kushi, nabo bakalandetela ifya bupe." 
Zephaniah3:11 Mu bushiku bulya, we musumba, tawakabe na nsoni mu fyabubifi fyonse ifyo wacita kuli ine, pantu nkafumya mukati kobe abamataki na bacilumba, mukaleka no kulaitutumuna pa lupili lwandi ulwamushilo." 
Zephaniah3:12 Lelo muli iwe nkashamofye abantu abafuuka, kabili abanakilila, abakalacetekela kwishina lyandi ne Yawe." 
Zephaniah3:13 Abakashalamo mu bena Israeli tabakalecita ulufyengo, kabili tabakalelanda ubufi, tabakalelanda ifyabucenjeshi mu tunwa twabo. Bakalashuka no kuikalila ku matwi tondolo, ukwabula nangu umo uwakubatiinya.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Imba ne nsansa we Mwana mwanakashi wa Sioni. Aula utupundu we Israeli. Sangalala no kusamwa no mutima obe onse, we Mwana mwanakashi wa Yerusalemu." 
Zephaniah3:15 Yawe nafumyapo ifyo akupingwile, nafumyapo na balwani bobe bonse. Yawe, Imfumu ya bena Israeli, aba mukati kobe, kanshi tawakatale autiina icintu nelyo cimo." 
Zephaniah3:16 Mu bushiku bulya bakasosa mu Yerusalemu abati, “Witiina we Sioni, witompoka mu maboko yobe." 
Zephaniah3:17 Yawe Lesa obe ali mukati kobe, impalume iyaba na maka yakupususha. Akasansamukila muli iwe, no kukutalalika ku citemwiko cakwe, kabili akakusekelela mu nyimbo no tupundu," 
Zephaniah3:18 nga pa nshita ya nshikunkulu iyasontwa.” Yawe asosa ati, “Nkatalusha ishamo kuli iwe, kabili tawakatale ausebana nakabili." 
Zephaniah3:19 Mona inshita ikesa ilyo nkemina bonse abakucusha, nkapususha bonse abalemana, no kubwesha bonse ababa muli bunkole kuno mwabo. Nkapwisha umusebanya wabo, ne nko shonse pano isonde shikalabalumbanya no kubacindamika." 
Zephaniah3:20 Inshita ikesa ilyo nkamulonganya, nkamubwesesha kuno mwenu. Nkamupeela ubucindami no lulumbi, mu fyalo fyonse umo balemusebanya. Nkamubwesesha ishuko lyenu ku cinso cenu nakabili.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Haggai1:1 Pa bushiku ubwakutampa umweshi uwalenga mutanda, mu mwaka walengele ibili apo Dariusi abelele imfumu nkalamba iya calo ca Pesia, elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Hagai. Ili ishiwi lyali lyakuya eba umulashi wa calo uwaleitwa Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli, no kuya ebako shimapepo mukalamba Yoshua mwana Yehosadaki." 
Haggai1:2 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Aba bantu balesosa ukuti inshita tailafika iyakukuulilapo iŋanda yandi.”" 
Haggai1:3 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Hagai aliti," 
Haggai1:4 “Bushe ino ni nshita iyakuti imwe muleikala mu mayanda ayakuulwa ubusaka, mwakupako ne mbao ku fibumba ilintu ine iŋanda yandi ilifye icitantala?”" 
Haggai1:5 Eico kanshi Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Ala muletontonkanya bwino pa micitile yenu." 
Haggai1:6 Mutila mwatanda imbuto ishingi elyo mwalobololamofye tunono. Mulakwata icakulya nomba tacifikapo icakuti muleikuta. Mulakwata umwangashi uwakunwa nomba taufikapo ukupwisha icilaka. Mulafwala ifyakufwala nomba tafifikapo icakuti filemukafya imibili. Kabili uubombela amalipilo, ifyo alipilwa afibika mwitumba ilyatulika.”" 
Haggai1:7 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita alesosa aleti, “Muletontonkanyapo bwino pa micitile yenu." 
Haggai1:8 Aleni kanshi nomba imeni, kabiyeni ku mpili muye fwayako ifimuti. Nkuulileni cipya cipya iŋanda yandi, na ine emo nkalasansamukila no kuilangamo ifyo ine nacindama ne Yawe." 
Haggai1:9 Imwe mwalesubila ukulalobolola ifisabo ifingi, nomba mwalemonamofye utunono. Kabili ilyo mwaleleta utusabo ku mushi, ine naletululula. Mulandu nshi nalecitila ifyo? Mulandu wakuti iŋanda yandi ne Yawe umwine wa fita yabafye icitantala, pa nshita imwe bonse umo umo mulepekapeka pakukuula cila muntu iŋanda yakwe." 
Haggai1:10 E mulandu wine imyulu ileseshe imfula ukuloka, no mushili nao wakaana ukumesha ifyakulya." 
Haggai1:11 Nine naleta icilala pa calo, na pa tupili na mu mabala ya ŋanu, na mu mabala ya myangashi, na mu mabala ya miolifa, na ponsefye apalimwa ifisabo. Na bantu bene nine nabaletela icilala, kumo kwine ne fitekwa na pali fyonse ifyo mufwaya ukubomba.”" 
Haggai1:12 Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli, na shimapepo mukalamba Yoshua mwana Yehosadaki, na bantu bonse abashelepo, epakumfwa no kubeela ishiwi lyakwa Yawe Lesa na mashiwi yakwa kasesema Hagai inkombe yakwa Yawe Lesa wabo. Na bantu epakukwatila Yawe akatiina." 
Haggai1:13 Elyo Hagai inkombe yakwa Yawe aeba abantu amashiwi yakwa Yawe ayakutila, “Ine ne Yawe nakulaba nenu, efyasosa Yawe.”" 
Haggai1:14 Yawe epakwimya umutima wakwa Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli, umulashi wa calo ca Yuda, no mutima wakwa Yoshua shimapepo mukalamba mwana Yehosadaki, ne mitima ya bantu bonse abashelepo. Epakutampa ukubomba umulimo wakukuula iŋanda yakwa Yawe umwine wa fita, Lesa wabo." 
Haggai1:15 Bautampile pa bushiku bwalengele amakumi yabili na shine (24), mu mweshi walenga mutanda, mu mwaka walenga ibili apo Dariusi abelele imfumu nkalamba iya calo ca Pesia." 
Haggai2:1 Pa bushiku bwalengele amakumi yabili na bumo (21), mu mweshi walenga cine lubali muli uyo wine mwaka, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Hagai aliti." 
Haggai2:2 “Eba Serubabeli mwana Shealitieli, umulashi wa calo ca Yuda, na shimapepo mukalamba Yoshua mwana Yehosadaki, na bantu abashalapo bonse ukuti ine ne Yawe ndetila nati," 
Haggai2:3 ‘Bushe apo muli, pacilipo bamo abaleibukisha ifyo iŋanda yandi iyakale yacindeme? Bushe iyi ŋanda mulekuula, imwe muleimona shani? Bushe mu menso yenu, tailemoneka nge yafyefye?" 
Haggai2:4 Lelo kwena iwe Serubabeli kosa, efyo nasosa ne Yawe. Shipa nobe we shimapepo mukalamba Yoshua, mwana Yehosadaki, koseni na imwe mwe bantu bonse ba cino calo, efyo nasosa ne Yawe. Akubombeni umulimo, pantu ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita ndi nenu." 
Haggai2:5 Ilyo mwafumine mu calo ca Egupto, ine nalimulaile ukuti nkalaba nenu pe. Umupashi wandi waba mukati kenu, kanshi imwe mwilatiina iyoo.’”" 
Haggai2:6 Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, “Tapakapite na nshita, ninshi natensha nakabili umulu ne sonde, na bemba no mulundu wine." 
Haggai2:7 Ninshi ine napukanya na bantu ba mishobo yonse ne fisuma fyabo fyonse fikesa kuno nkese isusha ne ŋanda iyo ine ifyuma pa. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda. 
Haggai2:8 Silifa yandi na golide wine wandi. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda. 
Haggai2:9 Iyi ŋanda yandi iyipya ikacindama ukucila iyakale. Emo ine nkalapeela abantu bandi ishuko no mutende. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.” 
Haggai2:10 Pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shine (24), mu mweshi walenga pabula, mu mwaka walengele ibili apo Dariusi abelele imfumu nkalamba iya calo ca Pesia, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Hagai." 
Haggai2:11 Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, “Kepushe bashimapepo, bushe ifunde liletila shani?" 
Haggai2:12 Umuntu umo nga abuulapo umupusa wa nama pa nama iyamushilo iyo batuulile ilambo, elyo aukakila mu nsalu yakwe, no kusenda asenda. Elyo ilya nsalu nga yakumya ku mukate, ku fyaipikwa, nangu ku mwangashi, ku mafuta ya miolifa, atemwa ku cakulya cimbi conse, bushe ico cakulya kuti naco cine caba icamushilo?” Bashimapepo nabo bayasuka abati, “Iyoo.”" 
Haggai2:13 Elyo Hagai abepusha ati, “Nga nomba umuntu umo nga nakowela pa mulandu wakukumya icitumbi ca muntu, elyo uyo muntu akumya kuli ifyo fyakulya, bushe ninshi nafyo fine fyakowela?” Bashimapepo nabo bayasuka abati, “Ee, nafikowela nomba.”" 
Haggai2:14 Elyo Hagai abeba ati, “Yawe alesosa ukuti na bantu ba uno mushobo efyo nabo bene baba, efyo fyaba ne fintu fine ifyo bacita, ne fintu fine ifyo batuula pa bulambo, ala nafyo fine fintu fyakowela." 
Haggai2:15 “Ala muletontonkanyapo bwino pa fintu ukufuma lelo no kuya kuntanshi. Tontonkanyeni ilyo mushilatampa kukuula Itempele lyandi, cali shani?" 
Haggai2:16 Umuntu nga aya pa mwina wa ŋanu uwa fipimo amakumi yabili (20), alesangapofye ifipimo ikumi limo. No waisa ku cakukaminamo umwangashi ukuti atapulemo ifipimo amakumi yasano (50), kutapulamofye amakumi yabili (20) epela." 
Haggai2:17 Ala nine Yawe nalemonawila fyonse ifyo mwaleesha ukulima, nine naletuma no mutonshi uwalelenga ukuti filefufuma, ne mfula yacitalawe iya mabwe iyalefisantaula, nomba nalyo line imwe tamwalelapila no kubwelela kuli ine nakalya. Efyasosa Yawe." 
Haggai2:18 Nomba pali buno bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shine (24), muli uno mweshi walenga pabula apo mwapwila ukukuula umufula we Tempele lyandi ne Yawe, muletontonkanyapo bwino pa fintu ifilemucitikila." 
Haggai2:19 Tamuli iŋanu ishishele mu matala yenu, imyangashi tailatwala, pamo pene ne mikunyu, ne miteke, ne miolifa. Nomba ukufuma pali lelo ine nakulamupaala,”" 
Haggai2:20 Pali ubo bwine bushiku bwalengele amakumi yabili na shine (24), muli uyo wine mweshi, ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Hagai nakabili aliti," 
Haggai2:21 “Kebe Serubabeli umulashi wa calo ca Yuda, ukuti ine nalaswa ntenshe umulu ne sonde." 
Haggai2:22 Ndewisha ifipuna fya shamfumu no konaula amaka ya shamfumu sha benafyalo. Nkapenuna amaceleta na bantu bene abendelapo, bakabalwe bakafwa, na bantu abendelapo bakalaipayana abene." 
Haggai2:23 Pali ubo bushiku, ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nkakubuula iwe Serubabeli we mubomfi wandi, we mwana mwaume wakwa Shealitieli. Ala niwefye ine ne Yawe nsalile kabili ndi nokukucita kwati ni nindaminwe yandi iya cikatilo. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.”" 
Zechariah1:1 Mu mweshi wa cine konse konse mu mwaka walengele ibili apo Dariusi abelele imfumu nkalamba iya calo ca Pesia, elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Sakaria mwana Berekia, mwana Ido ilyakuti," 
Zechariah1:2 “Ine ne Yawe nalifulilwe bashinwe nganshi. 
Zechariah1:3 Eico nomba ndemweba ukuti ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, ‘Bwelulukileni kuli ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita, na ine wine ne Yawe umwine wa fita ninshi nalabwelulukila uko muli.’" 
Zechariah1:4 Mwilaba nga bashinwe, abo bakasesema bakale balekonkomesha amashiwi yandi ne Yawe umwine wa fita, pakuti baleke imisango yabo ibi ne mikalile yabo ibi. Lelo bashinwe bena tebakuŋumfwa nangufye ukumbeela nakalya. Efyo nasosa ne Yawe." 
Zechariah1:5 Tepapa, nga nomba bashinwe bali kwi? Nga bakasesema bushe nabo balabelelela batini?" 
Zechariah1:6 Lelo amashiwi yandi ne fipope fyandi, ifyo naebele ababomfi bandi bakasesema pakuti bafifishe kuli bashinwe, kwena fyalibekete imitima. Basukile balapila, no kusumina basumina ukuti ee, nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita mbalimwine ukulingana ne myendele ne micitile yabo, ngomo napangile ukubalimwina.”" 
Zechariah1:7 Mu mwaka walengele ibili apo Dariusi abelele imfumu, pa bushiku bwalenga amakumi yabili na shine (24), mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo na umo (11), umweshi wine uo baleita Shebati, elintu ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli kasesema Sakaria mwana Berekia, mwana Ido." 
Zechariah1:8 Pa nshita ya bushiku nalikwete icimonwa, namwene umuntu ali pali kabalwe umo uwakashika. Ilyo ninshi eminine mu miti ya muetulo iyali mu kamupokapoka kamo, na pa numa yakwe pali bakabalwe abakashika, abamabala mabala, na babuuta." 
Zechariah1:9 Na ine namwipusha nati, “Mukwai, nga bakabalwe aba banshi?” Malaika uo twalelanda nankwe nao anjasuka ati, “Nalakulondolwela umo aba bakabalwe balolele.”" 
Zechariah1:10 Elyo umuntu uwaiminine mu miti ya muetulo asosa ati, “Yawe natuma aba bantu abali pali bakabalwe, ukuya mukulonda isonde lyonse.”" 
Zechariah1:11 Nabo epakubwesesha amashiwi kuli malaika wakwa Yawe uwaiminine mu miti ya muetulo abati, “Natupitana pano isonde ponse, twaya sanga napatalala tondolo, pali cibote.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe asosa ati, “We Yawe umwine wa fita, nomba yaba imyaka amakumi cine lubali (70) apo wafulilwa umusumba wa Yerusalemu, ne misumba imbi iya mu calo ca Yuda. Bushe ni lilali ukailangulukilako?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Elyo pakwasuka malaika uo twalelanda nankwe, Yawe amwasukafye amashiwi ayasuma, ayakumuteeka umutima." 
Zechariah1:14 Malaika uo twalelanda nankwe nao epakunjeba ukuti ine njime, nje ndebila imbila iyakuti Yawe umwine wa fita aletila, “Ine nalikwatila Yerusalemu na Sioni ubufuba ubukalamba." 
Zechariah1:15 Abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo abaikalafye ubwanalale, awe bena nalibafulilwa apakalambafye, pantu ine naletifye cilya nanashako ukufulilwa abantu bandi, ninshi abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo nabo elyo bacishamo ukulalufyanya abantu bandi." 
Zechariah1:16 Eco nomba ine mbwelulukile pakuti ncitile umusumba wa Yerusalemu uluse nakabili, ne ŋanda yandi ikakuulwa cipya cipya. No mwando wakupiminako ukatintwa pali Yerusalemu.” Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Zechariah1:17 Kabinge malaika anjeba ukuti nje ndebila imbila nati, “Yawe umwine wa fita alesosa ukuti mu misumba yandi mukafulisha nakabili ifintu fisuma, nokuti nakabili nkalangulukilako Sioni, nokuti nkabwekeshapo nakabili ne mwine ukuteeka Yerusalemu.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Mu cimonwa ine nainwine amenso yandi elyo namona insengo shine. 
Zechariah1:19 Elyo naipusha malaika uo twalelanda nankwe nati, “Bushe ishi shine insengo shalola mwi?” Nao anjasuka ati, “Ishi nsengo, e cishibilo ca buteko bwa shamfumu shine ishasalangenye abena Yuda, na bena Israeli, na bena Yerusalemu.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Elyo Yawe ananga bakafula wa fyela bane abali ne nondo. 
Zechariah1:21 Na ine nati, “Bushe beshile kukucita nshi?” Nao anjasuka ati, “Ishi nsengo eshatubawile no kusalanganya abena Yuda, icakuti tapali nangulafye umo uwaleinuna umutwe wakwe. Nomba aba bakafula beshile bena kukutiinya na kukunukula insengo sha mishobo ya benafyalo, pantu eshatakenye icalo ca Yuda no kusalanganyamo abantu baciko.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Mu cimonwa na cimbi, ine nainwine amenso no kumona umuntu ali no mwando umo uwakupiminako." 
Zechariah2:2 Na ine namwipusha nati “Waya kwi?” Nao anjasuka ati, “Naya kukupima umusumba wa Yerusalemu, pakuti mone ifyo wakula mubufumo, nefyo walepa.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Malaika uo twalelanda nankwe cilya ati aleya, malaika umbi aisa ku mubiye, elyo malaika uo twalelanda nankwe aeba malaika mubiye ati," 
Zechariah2:4 “We, butuka, kebe ulya mulumendo ali no mwando wakupiminako auti, ‘Ala umusumba wa Yerusalemu tawakalebako malinga iyoo, pantu abantu abakalaikalamo bakafulisha ne ŋombe shine shikafulishamo." 
Zechariah2:5 Pantu Yawe nalaya ukuti umwine wine eukaba nge linga lya mulilo ilikashinguluka umusumba pakuusunga, nokuti umwine wine eukalaikalamo no bucindami bwakwe bonse.’”" 
Zechariah2:6 “Iseni, Iseni, mufulumuke mu calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso, pantu nine namusalanganishishe mu tupinda tune utwa myulu.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Zechariah2:7 “Isa we Sioni, fulumuka we waikala mu mwana mwanakashi wa Babiloni.”" 
Zechariah2:8 Yawe umwine wa fita nanjeba amashiwi ayakuya eba abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo iyatapile abantu bakwe ukuti, “Umuntu onsefye uwikata mu bantu bandi ine ne Yawe, ala ninshi akumya pa mboni ya linso lyandi." 
Zechariah2:9 Ine wine nine nkamulwisha imwe, nimwe nomba mukatapwa ku bantu bene abali kale abasha benu. Ilyo ici cintu cikacitika, ala elyo abantu bonse bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi ni Yawe umwine wa fita ewantumine.”" 
Zechariah2:10 Yawe aletila ati, “Akwaula utupundu ne nsansa iwe we mwana mwanakashi Sioni, pantu ine naisa kukwikala pakati kenu.”" 
Zechariah2:11 Pali ilya nshita abantu ba mishobo iyingi bakesa kuli Yawe no kuba abantu abandi. Ine nkalaikala pakati kenu, nemwe mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi ni Yawe umwine wa fita ewantumine uko muli." 
Zechariah2:12 Nakabili Yawe akekatila Yuda nge cuma icakwefye icacishilano ica mu calo icamushilo, na Yerusalemu eukaba umusumba wakwe uo akatemwisha pali yonse." 
Zechariah2:13 Mwe bantu bonse talaleni tondolo pa cinso cakwa Yawe, pantu nakakamuka mu cifulo cakwe icamushilo." 
Zechariah3:1 Elyo malaika anangile shimapepo mukalamba Yoshua uwaiminine lubali kuli malaika wakwa Yawe, kabili ananga na Satana uwaiminine nao ku kulyo kwakwa Yoshua pakuti amusoselele." 
Zechariah3:2 Elyo Yawe alaeba Satana ati, “Yawe nakulimune iwe Satana! Ee, Yawe uwasala Yerusalemu nakulimune! Uyu muntu Yoshua alifye nge cishishi ico basompwele peshiko.”" 
Zechariah3:3 Yoshua ninshi naiminina lubali kuli malaika, ninshi nafwala ne nsalu ishalamba." 
Zechariah3:4 Elyo malaika aeba abaiminine pa cinso cakwe ati, “Aleni fuuleni uyu muntu insalu shakwe ishalamba.” Elyo apilibukila kuli Yoshua ati, “Wamona, ine nakufumisha ifibi fyobe, nalakufwika nomba insalu ishawamisha.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Elyo nasosa nati, “Mupombeni insalu iyisuma ku mutwe wakwe.” Kanshi nabo epakupomba ne nsalu iyawamisha ku mutwe wakwe, ninshi na malaika wakwa Yawe naiminina apo pene." 
Zechariah3:6 Elyo malaika wakwa Yawe akonkomesha Yoshua 
Zechariah3:7 ukuti Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Iwe nga walabeela amafunde yandi, walabomba imilimo iyo ine nakupeela, ninshi niwe wakulaba kateeka wa ŋanda yandi, niwe wakulayangalila ne mansa sha ŋanda yandi, kabili nkakupeela ne cifulo ne nsambu shakuba pamo naba beminine pano." 
Zechariah3:8 Kanshi umfweni kuno we Yoshua, we shimapepo mukalamba, pamo na banobe abekala nobe, imwe nimwe cishibilo icakwishibilako ifikabako. Ine nkaletapo umubomfi wandi uwitwa Umusambo." 
Zechariah3:9 Mwamona ilibwe ili limo mpo ilyo ine nabika pa cinso cakwa Yoshua, nalyo lili na menso cine lubali. Nine ne mwine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalalembapo ifilembo, na pa bushiku bumo bwinefye mpo ine nkafumya ububi muli cino calo." 
Zechariah3:10 Ubo bushiku nga bwafika, imwe bonse mukalaitana na bena mupalamano banenu, mukalaikala mu masamba ya myangashi ne ya mikunyu. Nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Malaika uo twalandile nankwe pakubala, alishile nakabili, no kwisa ncilimusha kwati muntu uo babuusha mu tulo." 
Zechariah4:2 Elyo anjipusha ati, “Finshi wamona?” Na ine namwasuka nati, “Namona icakutekapo ifisaniko, naco cilifye ica golide eka eka, ndemona no lunweno lwa mafuta pa mulu waciko, ne fisanikapo cine lubali. Ifisaniko fyonse cimo cimo fyakwete imipaipi cine lubali umwakubika ifikwi fyakusanika." 
Zechariah4:3 Lubali lwaciko kuli imiti ya miolifa ibili, umo lubali lwa ku kulyo ulwa lunweno, uubiye nao lubali lwa ku kuso.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Elyo na ine naipusha malaika uwalelanda na ine nati, “Mukwai, bushe ifi fintu filolele mwi?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Nao malaika uwalelanda na ine anjasuka ati, “Bushe kanshi tawishibe, mwa?” Na ine nati, “Awe mukwai nshishibe.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Malaika alinjebele ukuya fisha ili shiwi lyakwa Yawe kuli Serubabeli ilyakuti, “Te ku maka nangu ku bulamba cikacitika iyoo, lelo ni ku Mupashi wandi.” Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita" 
Zechariah4:7 “Niwe ani we lupili ulukalamba? Ku cinso cakwa Serubabeli iwe ukabatama nge wanga. Kabili eukabikako ne libwe lyapakulekelesha, ilyo ninshi na bantu bakalapunda abati, ‘Eya. Lesa napaale. Lesa napaale.’”" 
Zechariah4:8 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe na limbi lyaishile kuli ine aliti. 
Zechariah4:9 “Serubabeli natampa ukukuula umufula wa ŋanda yandi, no kupwisha eukapwisha. Ilyo ikapwa, elyo abantu bandi bakashininkisha ukuti kanshi nine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nakutumine uko bali." 
Zechariah4:10 Nomba nani uwingasuula ifintu finono ifikacitika pali ubo bushiku? Abantu bakasansamuka pakumona ifyo Serubabeli ali no mwando wakukuulila mu minwe yakwe.” Malaika alinjebele ati, “Ifisaniko ifi cine lubali, e menso cine lubali ayakwa Yawe, ayo amwenako isonde lyonsefye.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Elyo na ine namwipusha nati, “Nga ilya imiti ya miolifa ibili iyili ku cakutekapo ifisaniko uku noku, nayo yanshi?" 
Zechariah4:12 Nga ilya imisambo ibili iya muolifa ileitulwila amafuta mu mipaipi yabili aya golide, umo nayo amafuta yalekonkoloka, bushe nayo yanshi?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Nao anjipusha ati, “Bushe kanshi tawishibe, mwa?” Na ine nati, “Awe mukwai nshishibe.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Elyo nao ati, “Aba bantu babili ebo Imfumu umwine we sonde lyonse asuba amafuta no kuipatwila pakuti eo balebombela.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Kabili naliloleshe, lyena namonafye icitabo icipombwa cilelelemba mu mulu." 
Zechariah5:2 Elyo malaika anjipusha ati, “Finshi wamona?” Na ine namwasuka nati, “Namona uko icitabo icipombwa cilelelemba mu mulu, naco cili amakubiti amakumi yabili (20) mubutali, mubufumo mwena cili amakubiti ikumi limo.”"
