Zechariah5:3 Nao epakunjeba ati, “Pali cilya citabo epalembelwe icitipu icakulapisha icalo conse. Lubali lumo ulwa citabo palembelwe ukuti umupupu onsefye bakamutamfyamo mu calo, na lubali lubiye ulwa citabo palembelwe ukuti umuntu onsefye uulapa ubufi bakamutamfya." 
Zechariah5:4 Yawe umwine wa fita alesosa ukuti, ‘Nalatuma ici icitipu, kabili cakulalungama mu ŋanda ya mupupu onse, na mu ŋanda ya muntu onse uulapa ubufi mwishina lyandi. Cakulaba mu ŋanda yakwe, cikasuke icitipu cikailofye nakalya nakalya, imbao shaiko na mabwe yaiko.’”" 
Zechariah5:5 Malaika uo twalelanda nankwe na pakubala alishile pantanshi, alanjeba ati, “Inuna amenso yobe, no kumona ukuti ni cinshi ici cileisa.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Na ine namwipusha nati, “Ngeci ni cinshi?” Nao ayasuka ati, “Ala museke euleisa, e cishibilo ca bubi ubwakumana abantu ba mu calo conse.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Pa museke pene ninshi pali ne nkupiko iya mutofwe. Pa nshita ndetamba, namona ne nkupiko baifumyapo, awe namona no mwanakashi naikala mu museke mwine." 
Zechariah5:8 Malaika ati nokuti, “Uyu mwanakashi, e cishibilo ca bubi bwine.” Elyo malaika alatininkisha umwanakashi wine ulya mu museke, akupikapo ne nkupiko, nayo iyafina." 
Zechariah5:9 Na ine napunamina mu mulu, namona na banakashi bambi babili baleisa, balepupukila apo ndi, ninshi bali na mapindo kwati mapindo yakwa kabaso. Awe baisa imisha no museke mu lwelele." 
Zechariah5:10 Elyo ine naipusha malaika uo twalelanda nankwe nati, “Nikwi baletwala umuseke?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Nao asuka ati, “Ni kukuya ukuulila iŋanda mu calo ca Babilonia. Iyo ŋanda nga yapwa, bakakuula na apakuteka umuseke wine.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Kabili nainwine amenso no kumona icimonwa na cimbi. Uyo muku wena namwene amaceleta yane yalefuma pakati ka mpili shibili isha mukuba. 
Zechariah6:2 Iceleta lyapakubala ni bakabalwe abakashika ebalelitinta, ilyabubili ni bakabalwe abafiita ebalelitinta." 
Zechariah6:3 Ilyabutatu ni bakabalwe ababuuta ebalelitinta, ilyabune lyena ni bakabalwe abamabala mabala ebalelitinta. Aba bakabalwe bonsefye bali abamaka." 
Zechariah6:4 Elyo malaika uo twalelanda nankwe namwipusha nati, “Mukwai nga aya maceleta yanshi?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Nao malaika anjasuka ati, “Iyi e myela ine iya ku mulu, iyilefuma pa cinso ca Mfumu umwine we sonde lyonse." 
Zechariah6:6 Iceleta lilya lili na bakabalwe abafiita, lileya lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, ilili na bakabalwe ababuuta, lilungeme ku calo ca ku masamba, lilya lili na bakabalwe abamabala mabala lilungeme ku calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kulyo.”" 
Zechariah6:7 Bakabalwe ilyo bamoneke, bena balifye abakalabana pakuya kukulonda isonde. Malaika nao epakubeba ati, “Aleni akuyeni, kalondeni isonde.” Kanshi nabo epakuya mwisonde lyonse." 
Zechariah6:8 Elyo kabinge malaika anjita ati, “Wamona, balya bele lubali lwa ku calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso, ebatalalike Umupashi wandi mu calo ca ku kapinda ka ku kuso.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli ine aliti. 
Zechariah6:10 “Iwe Sakaria, ukaye buula silifa na golide ukufuma kuli bankole Helidai, na Tobiya, na Yedaia, abo babwelele muli bunkole mu calo ca Babiloni, na pali ubo bwine bushiku ukaye ku ŋanda yakwa Yosia mwana Sefania." 
Zechariah6:11 Ukaye buula silifa na golide ukapangemo ingala yabufumu, ukafwike na shimapepo mukalamba Yoshua mwana Yehosadaki." 
Zechariah6:12 Ukamwebe ukuti ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita ndesosa nati, ‘Ala euyu muntu etwa Umusambo. Musambo akakulila apa pene ali, na ine wine ne Yawe eukankuulila cipya cipya Itempele lyandi." 
Zechariah6:13 Eukankuulila Itempele lyandi ine ne Yawe, kabili akacindama nge mfumu ya calo, akalateeka na bantu bakwe. Akakwatapo shimapepo umo uukalaiminina ku cipuna cakwe icabufumu, bonse babili bakalaumfwana no kulabombela capamo mu mutelelwe.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Iyo ngala yabufumu eikaba icibukisho mwi Tempele lyakwa Yawe, icakwibukishishako Helidai, na Tobiya, na Yedaia, na Yosia, na Heni wine mwana Sefania.”" 
Zechariah6:15 Abantu abaikala ukutali, bakesa mukulaafwilishako ukukuula cipya cipya Itempele lyakwa Yawe. Ilyo likapwa ukukuulwa, elintu mukashininkisha ukuti kanshi Yawe umwine wa fita ewantumine kuli imwe. Neci cintu cikacitika imwe nga mwalakonka bwino ifyo Yawe Lesa wenu alemukonkomesha." 
Zechariah7:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe lyaishile kuli Sakaria mu mwaka walengele ine apo Dariusi abelele pa bufumu. Cali ni pa bushiku bwalenga shine ilyo umweshi walenga pabula watampile, umweshi wine uo baleita Kisilefu." 
Zechariah7:2 Abantu ba mu mushi wa Betele kanshi balitumine Sharese na Regemu Meleki na bantu babo kukuya papata kuli Yawe. 
Zechariah7:3 Baisa kukwipushako bashimapepo na bakasesema bakwa Yawe umwine wa fita abati, “Bushe tuli nokubikapofye ukulaloosha no kulafunga ukulya mu mweshi walenga busano nga fintu tucita lyonse mu myaka iyi yapita?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Elyo ishiwi lyakwa Yawe umwine wa fita lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Zechariah7:5 “Ipusha abantu bonse mu calo, ebako na bashimapepo bene, ukuti, ‘ilyo muleleka ukulya ne lintu muleloosha mu mweshi walenga cisano no walenga cine lubali, pa myaka yonse iyi amakumi cine lubali (70) iyapita, awe ukuleka ukulya kwenu takwalelola kukucindika ine iyoo." 
Zechariah7:6 Ilyo mulelya ne lintu mulenwa, mulefwayafye ukulaipakisha mwe bene, epela.’" 
Zechariah7:7 Bushe aya te mashiwi Yawe asosele ukupitila muli bakasesema bantanshi ilyo mu Yerusalemu ne misumba iyashinguluka baikele ku matwi tondolo kabili mu bunonshi, ninshi na bantu balikala mu Negebu na mu calo ca mpili?”" 
Zechariah7:8 Nakabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe umwine wa fita lyaishile kuli Sakaria ilyakutila," 
Zechariah7:9 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, ‘Ine ndemukonkomesha imwe ukulaputula imilandu no mulinganya wine wine. Muleba ne cikuuku no luse ku banenu." 
Zechariah7:10 Mwilacusha bamukamfwilwa na bakashiwa na beni abenafyalo abaikala uko muli, mwilacusha na balanda bene. Kabili mwilapanga mu mitima yenu ukulacushanya.’”" 
Zechariah7:11 Lelo kwena abantu nabo kwitolo balakaana ukulaumfwa, bena babafye abaumalala, no kukanaposako amano kuli ifi fyonse." 
Zechariah7:12 Imitima yabo balayumika ndi nge libwe, tebakufwaya na kulaumfwa, nangu ukulasakamana kufyo Yawe umwine wa fita alebafunda, ilyo aletuma Umupashi wakwe kuli bakasesema bantanshi, pakuti balesesema amashiwi yakwe ukutulafye na ku kale. Kanshi Yawe umwine wa fita nao epakulafulwa nganshi." 
Zechariah7:13 Yawe umwine wa fita epakusosa ukuti, “Lilya naitile tabaleumfwa, kanshi nabo ilyo baitile nshabomfwile." 
Zechariah7:14 Lelo nabasalangenye kuli kankungwe mu mishobo yonse iya benafyalo, bantu abo bashaishibe nabo tababeshibe. Efyo ne calo panuma cashele amatololo icakuti takwali umuntu uwakuyamo nangu ukufumamo. Ifi efyo balengele ici icalo icali icisuma ukushala amatololo.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe umwine wa fita lyaishile kuli ine aliti," 
Zechariah8:2 “Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, ‘Nalikwatila Sioni ubufuba ubukalamba, ecilenga nokuti ndemufulilwa apakalamba nganshi.’" 
Zechariah8:3 “Ifi efyo Yawe asosa ati, ‘Ine nkabwelela ku Sioni no kwikala mu Yerusalemu emo nkalaikala. Lyena Yerusalemu akalaitwa umusumba wacishinka, no lupili lwandi ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita lukalaitwa ulupili lwamushilo.’" 
Zechariah8:4 Kabili Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, ‘Mu mansa sha mu Yerusalemu nakabili mukalaikala abakote abaume na banakashi, ilyo ninshi bakongamine ku nkonto shabo pa mulandu wakukotesha." 
Zechariah8:5 Na mu misebo yauko mukalaisula paa utulumendo no tukashana utukalayangalamo.’ 
Zechariah8:6 “Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, ‘Nangu pali iyo nshita ico cintu cikamoneka icipeshamano ku bantu ba uyu mutundu abakashalapo, awe kuli ine tacakabe cipeshamano nakalya.’ Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Zechariah8:7 “Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, ‘Ine nkapususha abantu bandi, nkabafumya mu fyalo fya ku kabanga, na mu fyalo fya ku masamba," 
Zechariah8:8 nkababwesha, bakese ikala na mu Yerusalemu. Bakaba abantu abandifye, na ine nkaba Lesa uwabofye. Nkalabateeka bwino ne cishinka no bulungami.’”" 
Zechariah8:9 Ifi efyo asosa Yawe umwine wa fita ati, “Kosheni amaboko imwe mwe bomfwa muli shino nshiku amashiwi ya bakasesema, ukufuma pa bushiku babikile umufula wa ŋanda yakwa Yawe umwine wa fita, pakuti Itempele likulwe" 
Zechariah8:10 Ilyo iyo nshita tayali tailafika, tabalepeela abantu amalipilo nangu amalipilo ya pa fitekwa. Na bantu balefilwa ukulabomba imilimo yabo pa mulandu wakutiina abalwani babo, pantu ine nalelwikanya abantu bonse." 
Zechariah8:11 Nomba pali ino nshita, mwe bantu mwe bashelepo, ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita nomba nshakulamucita ngefyo nalemucita kale.” Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita" 
Zechariah8:12 “Imwe mwakulaibyalila imbuto ku matwi tondolo. Imyangashi yenu yakulatwala ifitwalo, no mushili nao wakulamesha ifisabo, kwakulaba ne mfula iyingi. Ifi fyonse efyo ine nakulamupeela imwe mwe bantu mwe bashelepo nge cabupyani cenu." 
Zechariah8:13 Mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda na imwe mwe ba ŋanda yakwa Israeli, kale abenafyalo balebuula ishina lyenu, elyo balelumbula pakutipwila bambi. Nomba ine nkamupususha, muli nokuba abapaalwa. Kanshi imwe shipenifye, mwilatiina iyoo, lelo lekeni amaboko yenu yakose.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Ilyo ifikolwe fyenu fyankalifye umutima, ine nalipangile ukufiponesha ifinkunka, no kubwesha nshabweseshe mutima iyoo.” Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Zechariah8:15 “Eico nomba muli shino nshiku nimpanga ukulasenamina abena Yerusalemu na ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda. Kanshi mwilatunsha na mitima iyoo. 
Zechariah8:16 Ifyo imwe muli nokulacitafye nifi. Mulelanshanya ifyacishinka. Mu filye muleputulamo imilandu no mulinganya wine wine uwakuletapo icibote. 
Zechariah8:17 Mwilapanga mu mitima yenu ukucusha abanenu. Mwilalapa bufi, pantu ifi fyonse ine nalifipata.” Efyo Yawe alanda." 
Zechariah8:18 Kabili ishiwi lyakwa Yawe umwine wa fita lyaishile kuli ine ilyakuti," 
Zechariah8:19 “Ukuleka ukulya uko imwe mucita mu mweshi walenga ine, na mu mweshi walenga isano, na mu mweshi walenga cine lubali elyo na mu mweshi walenga ikumi limo, kukalaba inshikunkulu shakusansamuka no kwangamo ku ba ŋanda yakwa Yuda. Kanshi imwe muletemwafye ifyacishinka no kulaikala umutelelwe.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Kabili ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Kukaba inshita imo ilyo abantu abengi bakalaisa kuno Yerusalemu, pamo na bantu abakalatula mu misumba iyingi." 
Zechariah8:21 Aba mu musumba umo bakalaeba aba mu musumba ubiye abati, ‘Bane twendeni bonse capamo kukupepa Yawe, natuye papata Yawe umwine wa fita pakuti atupaaleko. Na ine wine ndeya.’" 
Zechariah8:22 Kanshi abantu ba mishobo iyingi kabili iyamaka bakalaisa kuno Yerusalemu kukupepa Yawe umwine wa fita, no kumupapata pakuti alebapaalako.”" 
Zechariah8:23 Ifi efyo Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Muli shilya nshiku abenafyalo ikumi limo ukufuma ku mishobo ya ndimi ishalekana lekana shonse, bakalaisa ku Muyuda umo ninshi nabekata ku cakufwala cakwe no kulamweba abati, ‘Tulefwaya tuye nobe, pantu ifwe twalyumfwa ukuti Lesa aba na imwe.’”" 
Zechariah9:1 Ishiwi lyakwa Yawe eili ilyakutila, Yawe napingula ukukanda icalo ca Hadiraki kabili uku kukanda kukesa ikala mu musumba wa Damasiko. Pantu umwine wa calo consefye ni Yawe, ngefi fine aba umwine wa nko sha bena Israeli." 
Zechariah9:2 Icalo ca Hamati icapakana ne calo ca Hadiraki, naco cine cakwe, no musumba wa Turi no wa Sidoni umwafulisha bafundi nao wine wakwe," 
Zechariah9:3 Turi walikwata ilinga lyamaka mu musumba mwine mwatuntumana silifa kwati mina ya maloba, na golide kwati mina ya fisoso fya mu misebo." 
Zechariah9:4 Nomba Yawe ena akafumyamofye fyonse ifyaba mu musumba wa Turi. Akonaula amaka ya bena Turi pali bemba, no musumba wine ukapya ku mulilo." 
Zechariah9:5 Aba mu Ashikeloni bakalaimwena na menso yabo no mwenso ukabekata. Aba mu musumba wa Gasa nabo bakacula nganshi. Efyo na ba mu Ekironi cikaba, pantu ifyo basubila tabakafimone nakalya. Imfumu ya mu Gasa ikaloba, no musumba wa Ashikeloni ukashala icibolya." 
Zechariah9:6 Abantu ba mitundu imbi ebakalaikala mu musumba wa Ashidodi, elyo abena Filisiti nkabapwisha icilumba cabo." 
Zechariah9:7 Tabakalelya nakabili inama iyabamo umulopa, nangufye ifyakulya fimbi ifyabindwa. Bonse abakashalapo bakaba cimo cinefye na bantu bakwa Lesa wesu, bakaba ngo lupwa lumo ulwa luko lwakwa Yuda. Abena Ekironi bakaba cimo cinefye na bena Yebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Lyena, ine ne Yawe nkalasunga icalo candi, nkalalesha ne fita fya benafyalo ukulapitamo. Nshakaleke imfumu iyikali ikalecusha nakabili abantu bandi, pantu nalimona ifyo abantu bandi balecula." 
Zechariah9:9 Sansamuka iwe we mwana mwanakashi Sioni. Akwaula utupundu iwe we mwana mwanakashi Yerusalemu. Mona imfumu yobe ilya ileisa uko uli, iyalungama kabili iyacimfya, intu iyaicefya kabili iyileendelafye pali punda, pa musepela, umwana wa punda." 
Zechariah9:10 Mu calo cakwa Efulemu ine nkafumyamo amaceleta ya nkondo, na mu musumba wa Yerusalemu nkafumyamo bakabalwe abakulwilapo inkondo, na mata yakulwilako mu nkondo nayo yakakontaulwa. Imfumu yenu ikaletela abantu ba mishobo ya benafyalo icibote, ubuteko bwaiko bukatula kuli bemba umo ukuya fika na kuli bemba mubiye, ukutula ku mumana wa Yufurate, ukuya fika no kwapelela isonde lyonse." 
Zechariah9:11 Nomba pa mulandu wa mulopa wa cipangano candi ico napangene nenu, ine nomba nalalubula abantu benu abafungwa, nalabafumya mu cilindi umushaba amenshi yakunwa." 
Zechariah9:12 Bwelelenimo imwe ku musumba we linga, mwe bafungwa ababa ne subilo, lelo line namweba ukuti ine nkamulambwilapo libili pali fyonsefye ifyo mwaculile." 
Zechariah9:13 Pantu ine nimpeteka Yuda ngo buta bwandi, nimubikapo ngo mufwi imwe mwe bena Efulemu. Ndekusongela bamwano abaume we Sioni, kukulwisha bamwano abaume we Girisi. Ndekupambula ngo lupanga lwa mpalume." 
Zechariah9:14 Yawe akamonekela pa mulu wa bantu bakwe, akalafwinta imifwi ikalabyata nge myele ya nkuba. Yawe umwine wa fita akalisha ipenga, akatula ku kapinda ka ku kulyo, akesa aleendela mu cimwela ca cikuku." 
Zechariah9:15 Yawe umwine wa fita akacingilila abantu bakwe, nabo bakacimfya abalwani babo no kubonaula na mabwe ya fyakufwintila. Bakanwa umulopa wa balwani babo nokupundisha kwati bantu bakolelwe umwangashi. Bakesula ngo mulopa uli mu lunweno uwe lambo ulya basansa mu mpela sha bulambo." 
Zechariah9:16 Kanshi ilyo ubo bushiku bukafika, Yawe akapususha abantu bakwe, nga filya fine kacema apususha impaanga shakwe. Nabo bakalabengeshima mu calo cakwe, nge fisamo ifyamutengo filya fibengeshima mu ngala yabufumu." 
Zechariah9:17 Yangu ifyo bakalamoneka ubusuma no kuyemba. Iŋanu shikalenga abalumendo balekula na maka, no mwangashi upya ukalenga abakashana balekula abayemba." 
Zechariah10:1 Pa mibundo mulelomba imfula kuli Yawe. Ni Yawe euleta amakumbi, eupeela ne mfula ku bantu, no kulamesha ifintu mu mabala ya muntu onse." 
Zechariah10:2 Utulubi twakupendwilako pa ŋanda tusosa ifyabufi, Bakabuka nabo bufifye babepa, balongola ifiloto ifyabufi, bacushafye abantu pakubeba ukuti baleteka imitima. Kanshi e mulandu wine abantu bendelafye icendende nge mpaanga ishaluba. Abantu balacula, pantu tabakwata kacema." 
Zechariah10:3 “Ine nimfulilwa bakacema, no kubakanda nalaswa mbakande bakateeka. Pantu Yawe umwine wa fita akalasunga aba ŋanda yakwa Yuda, bakaba nga bakabalwe abamaka abakulwilapo inkondo." 
Zechariah10:4 Ku Yuda ekukafuma umo uwakuba nge libwe lya petungi, no wakuba ngo lupopo ulwakwikasha itenti, uwakuba ngo buta bwakulwilako inkondo, emukafuma intungulushi shimbi shonse." 
Zechariah10:5 Abena Yuda bakacimfya kwati bashilika abalenyantauka pa balwani babo, kwati balenyantauka mu mitapashi ili mu misebo. Bakalwa inkondo pantu Yawe aba nabo, bakacimfya na balya bene balwani bendela pali bakabalwe." 
Zechariah10:6 “Ine nkapeela aba ŋanda yakwa Yuda amaka, nkapususha aba ŋanda yakwa Yosefu. Nkababwesesha kuno kumwabo, pantu ine nimbalangulukilako. Bakaba kwati ine nshabalulile, apo ine nine Yawe Lesa wabo, kanshi nkalabasuka." 
Zechariah10:7 Abena Efulemu bakaba nge mpalume, bakalasansamuka nga bantu abanwene umwangashi. Abana babo bakamona, no kusansamuka nabo bakalasansamuka, bakalanga ne nsansa pakumona ifyo baampana na Yawe." 
Zechariah10:8 “Ine nkabetila mu munsoli, kabinge nkabalonganya pamo, pantu ine nkabalubula, nkabafusha nga filya fine bafulile kale." 
Zechariah10:9 Nangu ine nabasalanganishisha mu mishobo ya benafyalo, lelo kwena bakulanjibukisha mulya mwine baba mu fyalo fya kutali. Bakapusuka pamo na bana babo, no kubwelela bakabwela bonse." 
Zechariah10:10 Nkabafumya mu calo ca Egupto no kubalonganya ukufuma mu calo ca Asiria. Nkababwesesha ku Gileadi na mu Lebanoni mwine, mu calo mukabula na pakwikala." 
Zechariah10:11 Bakabuka bemba uwayafya, na matamba pali bemba yakatalala. Amatenga yonse aya mu mumana wa Nailo yakakama. Icilumba ca bantu ba mu Asiria cikapwa, na maka ya nkonto ya bufumu bwa mu Egupto yakapita." 
Zechariah10:12 Nine ne Yawe nkalakosha abantu bandi, na mwishina lyandi emo bakalaendela.” Efyasosa Yawe." 
Zechariah11:1 Isula ifibi fyobe iwe we calo ca Lebanoni, uleke imiti yobe iyalepesha iya keda ipye ku mulilo." 
Zechariah11:2 Akuloosheni mwe miti ya paini, pantu ilya miti ya keda naiwa, akuloosheni imwe mwe fimuti fya oki ifya mu calo ca Bashani, pantu umutengo wenu nabautemaula." 
Zechariah11:3 Umfweni bakacema abo baleloosha, pantu umulemfwe wabo uusuma naonaika. Umfweni inkalamo isho shilebuluma, pantu nayonaika amateshi ya ku Yordani uko shikala." 
Zechariah11:4 Ifi efyasosa Yawe Lesa wandi ati, “Iwe akucema impaanga isho balaswa baleipaya." 
Zechariah11:5 Abashita impaanga balashipaya ukwabula ukupeelelwapo umulandu. Abashishitisha, no kusosa balasosa abati, ‘Yawe apaalwe na matotelo, pantu nomba ifwe tuli bakankala.’ Ala na bantu bene abashicema tabashilangulukilako nakalya.”" 
Zechariah11:6 Yawe aletila ati, “Ine nomba nshakatale nakabili nangulukilako abekala muli cino calo. Abantu bonsefye umo umo ine nkaleka intungulushi yabo atemwa imfumu yabo eyo ikabateeke ku kalili. Isho ntungulushi shikonaula icalo, na ine wine nshakabapokololeko uko shili iyoo.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Elyo nacemena bashimakwebo impaanga isho bali nokulaipaya. Nafwaya ne nkonto shibili, imo nalaita Cikuuku, ibiye nayo nalaita Ukwampana. Awe na ine nalacema ne mpaanga." 
Zechariah11:8 Natamfishe bakacema batatu mu mweshi umo, kanshi na ine epakutendwa impaanga, nasho shamfulumuka." 
Zechariah11:9 Elyo nasosa nati, “Awe ine nomba imwe nshalemusunga nakabili iyoo. Mwe sho bali nokwipaya, kabamwipayefye. Mwe shili nokuloba, lobenifye. Muleke ne shikashalapo shilelya imibili ya shibiye.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Epakubuula ne nkonto yandi iyaleitwa Icikuuku, naikontolamo fibili pakonaula icipangano ico ine napangana na bantu ba mishobo yonse." 
Zechariah11:11 Kanshi pali ubo bwine bushiku, ne cipangano emyonaikile. Abalecusha impaanga nabo balendolesha, no kushininkisha elyo nomba bashininkisha ukuti kanshi lishiwi lyakwa Yawe." 
Zechariah11:12 Na ine epakubeba nati, “Imwe nga mwamona ukuti nacilolamo, ninshi kanshi ndipileni amalipilo yandi. Nga tacilolelemo, ninshi kanshi amalipilo kayabefye.” Awe nabo epakundipila indalama sha silifa amakumi yatatu (30)." 
Zechariah11:13 Yawe nao anjeba ati, “Isho ndalama, kashipose kuli kabumba wa nongo, eshintu bena bamwene ukuti e mutengo uuningilefye bwino, mwa.” Kanshi na ine epakubuula isho ndalama sha silifa amakumi yatatu (30), awe naya shiposa mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe kuli kabumba wa nongo." 
Zechariah11:14 Elyo kabili nabuula inkonto inankwe Ukwampana, nayo naikontolamo fibili pakonaula ubwananyina bwa bena Yuda na bena Israeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Elyo Yawe kabili anjeba ati, “Ipekanye, ucite kwati uli kacema, lino lyena ucite kwati ni kacema uwaba iciwelewele ca muntu." 
Zechariah11:16 Ine nkasonta umuntu umo mu calo uukalacema impaanga shandi, lelo kwena takalesakamana kulapokololako impaanga ishilesanswa, takalefwaya ne shileluba nakalya, takaleundapa ne shilecenwa, nangu ukulaliisha ishileshalapo. Ena abingilefye ukulalyapo ishainisha, no kulashisotaulako imondo." 
Zechariah11:17 “Ala ashama uyu kacema iciwelewele ca muntu, pantu nalekelesha impanga. Ulupanga lwingamukoma ku kuboko, na pa linso lyakwe ilya ku kulyo. Ukuboko kwakwe kube ukwaumina, na menso yakwe yakapofula.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Yawe alisobele ishiwi lyakwe palwa calo ca Israeli. Ifi efyasosa Yawe uwaandalika umulu, uwabumba ne isonde, uwapanga no mupashi wa muntu mu nda yakwe. Eulesosa ati," 
Zechariah12:2 “Ine nkacita Yerusalemu ngo lukombo lwa fikola, abantu ba mishobo imbi iyashinguluka Yerusalemu bakanwamo, no kupungaila bakalapungaila ku lwakukolwa. Ilyo bakatebelela umusumba wa Yerusalemu, ne misumba imbi yonse iya mu calo ca Yuda nayo bakaitebelela no kuilwisha." 
Zechariah12:3 Iyo nshita nga yafika, ilyo abantu ba mishobo yonse iya pano isonde bakakumbinkana no kuwililila umusumba wa Yerusalemu, ine nkaucita nge cilibwe icafinisha, na bantufye bonse abakeshako ukucimya, imisana yabo ikafunaika nganshi." 
Zechariah12:4 Pali bulya bushiku ine ne Yawe nkapupanya bakabalwe babo bonse, nkapenya na bonse abakalaendelapo.” Efyasosa Yawe. “Aba ŋanda yakwa Yuda nkalabalinda, lelo bakabalwe ba balwani babo bena ine nkabapofusha amenso." 
Zechariah12:5 Elyo intungulushi sha bena Yuda shikalaebana mu mitima ashiti, ‘Ala ni Yawe umwine wa fita eutukosha ifwe fwe bantu bakwe, fwe baikala muno Yerusalemu.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Pali bulya bushiku ine nkacita indupwa sha bena Yuda shikabe ngo mulilo uuleyaka mu mutengo umo, nangu mwibala limo umuli imyanshi ya ŋanu iilepya. Abena Yuda aba ebakalofya abantu ba mitundu yonse iyaba mupepi ku kulyo nangu ku kuso. Nomba abena Yerusalemu bena bakashala nabekalilila pa ncende yabo.”" 
Zechariah12:7 Yawe akabalilapo ukupususha amayanda ya bena Yuda, epakuti umucinshi wa ba ŋanda yakwa Davidi pamo no wa bena Yerusalemu wikacila umucinshi uo na bena Yuda bakakwata." 
Zechariah12:8 Pali bulya bushiku Yawe akalacingililako abena Yerusalemu, icakuti no tufwanda twabo twine tukaba no bulamba nga bulya bwine bwakweteko Davidi. Aba ŋanda yakwa Davidi ebakalabatungulula nga Lesa wine, kwati ni malaika wakwa Yawe alebatungulula." 
Zechariah12:9 Pali bulya bushiku ine nkatampa ukulalofya abantu ba mishobo yonse abakalawililila umusumba wa Yerusalemu. 
Zechariah12:10 “Nomba pa ba ŋanda yakwa Davidi na pali bonse abaikala mu Yerusalemu nkapongolwelapo umupashi wakukwatisha uluse no wakupapata. Bakandolesha, pali uyo bapulinkanyamo icanso, bakamuloosha nga filya fine baloosha umwana mwaume uwabafye umo mpo. Bakamuloosha kwati bantu bafwililwe umwana wabo umwaume uwe beli." 
Zechariah12:11 Pali bulya bushiku mu musumba wa Yerusalemu mukaba imisowa iyikalamba, nga ilya ine yumfwika mwiwanga lya Megido, ilyo abantu baloosha Hadadi Rimoni." 
Zechariah12:12 Indupwa shonse mu calo shikalaloosha ulu lweka, ulu nalo lweka. Ulupwa lwa ba ŋanda yakwa Davidi abaume bakalaloosha beka, abakashi babo nabo beka. Ulupwa lwa ba ŋanda yakwa Natani abaume bakalaloosha beka, abakashi babo nabo beka." 
Zechariah12:13 Ulupwa lwa ba ŋanda yakwa Levi abaume bakalaloosha beka, abakashi babo nabo beka. Ulupwa lwa ba ŋanda yakwa Shimei abaume bakalaloosha beka, abakashi babo nabo beka." 
Zechariah12:14 Na mu ndupwa shimbi shonse lumo lumo ishashala, abaume bakalaloosha beka, abakashi babo nabo beka.”" 
Zechariah13:1 “Ubushiku bulya nga bwafika intulo ikapongwela amenshi aya kamfukumfuku, ayo aba ŋanda yakwa Davidi na bena Yerusalemu bakasambamo ifibi fyabo ne fyakowela fyabo." 
Zechariah13:2 “Pali bulya bushiku ine nkalofya amashina ya tulubi mu calo, tamwakabe nelyo umo uukalayebukisha nakabili iyoo.” Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita. “Na bakasesema babufi nabo nkabafumyamo, nkapwishamo ne cikonkelelo cakufwaya umupashi wa fyakowela mu calo." 
Zechariah13:3 Elyo umo nga akakonkanyapo ukusesema, wishi na nyina abamufyalilila bakamweba abati, ‘Ulefwafye iwe, pantu iwe uleitunga ukulandila mwishina lyakwa Yawe, kanshi fyabufifye ulelanda.’ Elyo nga abwekeshapo ukusesema, ninshi wishi na nyina abamufyalilila ebakumupulinkanyamo icanso pa mulandu wakusesema ifyabufi." 
Zechariah13:4 “Pali bulya bushiku bakasesema bonse bakekatwe nsoni palwa fimonwa fyabo ilyo basesema nangu ukufwala ifyakufwala fya bukasesema, pakubepa ukuti ni kasesema." 
Zechariah13:5 Kasesema onse akalatilafye, ‘Awe ine nshili kasesema, ndi mulimifye. Ine ukulima eko nakulilamo ukutulafye na ku bwaice bwandi.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Umo akalati nga aipushapo kasesema umo ati, ‘Nga kanshi ifyo fibala fili pa mubili obe, wafikwata shani?’ Nao akalaasukafye ati, ‘Bancenene ku ŋanda ya bacibusa wandi.’”" 
Zechariah13:7 “Ale we lupanga lwandi, sansa kacema wandi, sansa umuntu twaampana nankwe.” Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita. “Ipaya kacema, uleke ne mpaanga shisalangane, na ine nalasansapo utwana utunono.”" 
Zechariah13:8 Efyasosa Yawe. “Na mu calo consefye ifiputulwa fibili fikonaulwa no kuloba, lelo iciputulwa cimo cikashala mu calo." 
Zechariah13:9 Iciputulwa cikashalapo eco ine nkaposa mu mulilo, no kuciwamya nga filya fine bengulula silifa mu mulilo, no kuciwaminisha nga golide. Bakalalumbula ishina lyandi pakunkuuta, na ine nkalabasuka. Nkalabeba nati, ‘Imwe muli bantu abandifye,’ nabo bakalatila, ‘We Yawe, niwe Lesa wesu.’”" 
Zechariah14:1 Ubushiku bwakwa Yawe bukafika ilyo ifyo bakamutapa bakalafyakanina pa menso yenu. 
Zechariah14:2 Nkalonganya abantu ba mishobo yonse, pakuti bakese wililila umusumba wa Yerusalemu. Nabo bakaupoka, bakatapa ifyuma fya mu mayanda, bakolungana na banakashi ku maka. Citika wa bantu bakabasenda muli bunkole, abakashalapo bena tabakabafumye mu musumba iyoo." 
Zechariah14:3 Elyo Yawe nao nomba akema no kuya lwisha iyo mishobo, nga filya fine alecita na kale mu nshiku sha bulwi." 
Zechariah14:4 Pali bulya ubushiku lyena akeminina pa lupili lwa Miolifa, lulya lwalungatana no musumba wa Yerusalemu lubali lwa ku kabanga. No lupili lwa Miolifa lukalepuka pakati, ukutula ku kabanga ukulola na ku masamba, pakaba umukonko uukalamba nganshi. Icipande cimo ica lupili cikaselela ku kapinda ka ku kuso, icinankwe naco ku kapinda ka ku kulyo." 
Zechariah14:5 Pakupusuka imwe mukapita muli uyo wine umukonko uukashinta ku lubali lwa Aseli. Mukafulumuka nga filya fine ifikolwe fyenu fyafulumwike ilyo kwaishile icinkukuma pa nshita imfumu Usia yaleteeka icalo ca Yuda. Elyo Yawe Lesa wandi akesa moneka pamo na bamushilo bakwe bonse. 
Zechariah14:6 Pali bulya ubushiku takwakabe mpepo nangufye icikutuma, kabili tabwakele iyoo." 
Zechariah14:7 Kukabafye ulubuuto lwa kasuba inshita yonse, takwakabe ubushiku nelyo akasuba, lelo ku nshita ya cungulo kukaba ulubuuto. Ni Yawe ekafye ewaishiba ilyo ubo bushiku bukafika." 
Zechariah14:8 Pali bulya ubushiku nga bwafika mu musumba wa Yerusalemu mukalafuma amenshi ayamweo, yamo yakalaya kuli bemba ulubali lwa ku kabanga, yambi nayo yakalalola kuli bemba ulubali lwa ku masamba. Ayo menshi yakalapitafye mu mainsa na mu lusuba." 
Zechariah14:9 Elyo nomba ninshi ni Yawe e mfumu ya pesonde lyonse, ninshi nomba ekafye ewalaba Yawe, ne shina lyakwe lyekafye elyo nomba abantu bakalalumbula." 
Zechariah14:10 Icalo conse icashinguluka umusumba wa Yerusalemu cikaba icabatama nga ku Araba, ukutendekelafye ku Geba lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kuso, ukuya shintafye na ku Rimoni lubali lwa ku kapinda ka ku kulyo. Lelo umusumba wa Yerusalemu ukaba uwasansama ukucila ne calo icaba mu mbali yauko. Umusumba ukatula ku mpongolo yakwa Benjamini, ukuya fika na ku mpongolo ya petungi, palya pabelele impongolo yapakubala, elyo kabinge ukufuma ku lupungu lwakwa Hananeli, ukuya fika na palya balekamina imfumu ya calo umwangashi." 
Zechariah14:11 Abantu bakalaikalila mu musumba ku matwi tondolo, takwakabe nakabili uukalapangila ukonaula umusumba wa Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah14:12 Abantu ba mishobo yonse abalwishishe umusumba wa Yerusalemu, Yawe akabaletela icikuko icabipisha pamo ngeci. Imibili yabo ikalabola ilyo ninshi nabeminina pa makasa yabo, na menso yabo yakalabola mu fikumbi fya yako, ne ndimi shabo shine shikalabolela kumo mu tunwa twabo." 
Zechariah14:13 Iyo nshita Yawe akapelenganya amano ya bantu abakalwisha Yerusalemu. Bakalaba no mwenso icakuti bonse umo umo bakalaikatanapo no munabo umo, no kulashomboka nankwe." 
Zechariah14:14 Abena Yuda nabo bakaiposamo no kuya lwa ku Yerusalemu. Ifyuma fya bantu ba iyo mishobo iyashinguluka yonse, ifili nga golide, silifa ne fyakufwala ifingi, abena Yuda bakafilonganya no kufitapa bakafitapa." 
Zechariah14:15 Ico cine cikuko ecikalaipaya na bakabalwe, ne mfalashi, ne ngamila, na bapunda, ne fitekwa fyonse ifikalaba mu nkambi sha balwani babo." 
Zechariah14:16 Ilyo abalwani bakacimba, elyo aba mishobo bonse abakashalapo bakalaya imyaka yonse ku Yerusalemu, kukupepa Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita, na kukusefya inshikunkulu ya Nsakwe." 
Zechariah14:17 Umushobo wa bantu umo pano isonde uukalakaana ukuya ku Yerusalemu kukupepa Imfumu Yawe umwine wa fita, awe wena ninshi mu calo cauko tamwakaleloka imfula nakalya." 
Zechariah14:18 Abena Egupto nga balakaana ukulaisako no kubuulamo ulubali ninshi nabo bene bakaponenwa ne cikuko, ico Yawe akalaletela abantu ba mishobo yonse umo umo, abakalakaana ukulaya kukucindika inshikunkulu ya Nsakwe." 
Zechariah14:19 Efyo abena Egupto bakalalimunwa pamo na bantu ba mishobo imbi yonse abakalakaana ukulaya kukusefya inshikunkulu ya Nsakwe. 
Zechariah14:20 Pali bulya ubushiku pa tunyenjele uto bakabalwe bakalafwala, pakalalembwa amashiwi yakutila, “Kabalwe uyu wamushilo kuli Yawe.” Ne nongo sha mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe nasho shine shikaba ishamushilo, nga filya fyaba inweno shilya shikala pa ntanshi ya bulambo." 
Zechariah14:21 Inongo shonse isha mu musumba wa Yerusalemu, ne sha mu calo ca Yuda, bakashipatwila Yawe umwine wa fita. Na bantu bonse abakalaisa kukutuula amalambo, bakalabuulapo shimo no kulaipikilamo inama ishikalatuulwa amalambo. Kanshi iyo nshita nga yafika, tamwakalemoneka nakabili shimakwebo mu ŋanda yakwa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Malachi1:1 Aya e mashiwi yakwa Yawe ayo atumine Malaki ukuya eba abena Israeli. 
Malachi1:2 Yawe alesosa ati, “Ala ine nalimutemwa imwe mwe bena Israeli. Nomba imwe mulanjipusha amuti, ‘Nga watutemwa shani?’” Nao Yawe asosa ati, “Bushe Esau taali munyina Yakobo? Nomba ine nalitemwapo Yakobo," 
Malachi1:3 lelo Esau ena nalimupata. Icalo ca mpili icakwa Esau ine naliconaula, nalicisangula ukuba icalo umwakuti muleikalafye bamumbwe.”" 
Malachi1:4 Abena Edomu, emukuti bamwana Esau, nga balatila abati, “Nangu batonawila imishi, ala ifwe tukaikuula cipya cipya.” Yawe umwine wa fita alanda ukuti, “Nangu bakuule cipya cipya, ine nkafibongolola nakabili. Abantu bambi bakalabeta abati, ‘Bantu ba calo cibi,’ nokulati, ‘Bantu ba mutundu uo Yawe afulilwa pe.’" 
Malachi1:5 Ico cintu mukalacimona na menso yenu, mukalati nokuti, ‘Kanshi Yawe alailanga ukuti wabulamba na kunse ya mipaka ya calo ca bena Israeli.’”" 
Malachi1:6 Imwe bashimapepo, Yawe umwine wa fita alemweba ati, “Umwana alacindika wishi, no mubomfi alatiina shikulu wakwe. Kanshi apo ine ndi shinwe, nga nomba imwe cinshi mushincindikila? Apo ine ndi shikulwinwe, nga nomba cinshi imwe mushintiinina? Mwe bashimapepo mwalisuula ishina lyandi. Elyo kabili mulanjipusha amuti, ‘Nga ifwe twasuula shani ishina lyobe?’" 
Malachi1:7 “Ukunsuula kwenu nico pa bulambo bwandi imwe mutuulapo ifyakulya ifyakowela. Lelo kabili mulanjipusha amuti, ‘Nga ifwe tukaana shani ukulakucindika?’ “Pantu mulalanda ukuti, ‘Itebulo lyakwa Yawe talyacindama.’" 
Malachi1:8 Ilyo imwe muleta inama iyapofula pakwisa ituula ilambo kuli ine, bushe imwe mutila amuti mulalungika, batini? Ilyo imwe muleta inama iyalemana nangu iyilwele, bushe imwe mutila amuti mulalungika, mwa? Nga mwatwalila umulashi wenu inama ya uyo musango, bushe kuti aya temwa no kumusekelela imwe?” Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Malachi1:9 Eico nomba papateni pakuti Lesa atubeleleko uluse. Pantu nga mwaisa ne mituulo ya musango uyu mu maboko yenu, nga akaana ukumusekelela ninshi kuluba kwenu mwe bene. Ifi efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Malachi1:10 Yawe umwine wa fita aleti, “Ine kuti natemwa nganshi nga cakuti umunenu umo shimapepo aisalako ifiibi fye Tempele lyandi, pakuti tamuleisamo kukulakosha umulilo wacikoshekoshe pa bulambo bwandi. Ine nshimutemenwe imwe iyoo, ne mitulo yenu ine nshakulaipokelela ukufuma kuli imwe nakalya." 
Malachi1:11 Ishina lyandi lili nokucindikwa mu mishobo yonse, ukufuma ukutulila akasuba ukushinta noko kawila. Konsefye bakalamfutumwina ububani, kabili bakalantuula ne fyabupe ifyawamisha. Bonsefye bakalacindika ishina lyandi. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita ndelanda." 
Malachi1:12 Lelo imwe mulalisuula pakusosa ukuti itebulo lyandi lyalikowela kabili tamucindika ne cakulya ico imwe mutuulapo. 
Malachi1:13 Mulasosa amuti, ‘Yaba. Awe ifwe uyu mulimo naututendusha,’ ninshi mulensola ne misolo. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita ndelanda. “Ilyo mwaleta inama ishacenwa, ne shalemana, nangu ishalwala, no kushituula nga malambo yenu, bushe imwe mutila amuti kuti efyo nalapokelela ine pano ndi, batini? Nine Yawe umwine wa fita ndelanda." 
Malachi1:14 Ashama umuntu utila pakuntuula ilambo aisa ne nama iyalemana, ilyo pebumba lya fitekwa fyakwe nakwatapo inama imo iyisuma iyo alaya ukuntuula. Pantu ine ndi Mfumu nkalamba, na bantu ba mishobo yonse balikwatila ishina lyandi akatiina. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.”" 
Malachi2:1 Yawe Lesa umwine wa fita alanda ati, “Ine nomba ndemukonkomesha imwe mwe bashimapepo." 
Malachi2:2 Nga mwalakaana ukuŋumfwa kabili nga mwakaana ukulacindika ishina lyandi mu mitima yenu, ninshi ine ndi nokumulapisha. Ninshi ndi nokulapisha ne fintu fisuma fine ifyo imwe mushukila mu mulimo wenu uwa bushimapepo. Na mu cine nimfilapisha kale, pantu imwe tamuposako amano kukuncindika." 
Malachi2:3 “Moneni, ine nkakalipila abana benu, nkamukantaika ubusali pa mpumi shenu, ubusali bwa nama shine isho mutuula amalambo, nkamuposa na kumbi ilyo ninshi namukantana nafyo." 
Malachi2:4 Elyo mukashininkisha ukuti nine nakonkomesha aya mashiwi, pakuti icipangano candi ico napangana na Levi cilesungwa pa maka. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda." 
Malachi2:5 Ilyo ine napangene na Levi icipangano candi, icipangano ca mweo no mutende, no kumupeela nalimupeele epakuti alencindika. Awe nao alancindika, alakwatila ishina lyandi akatiina." 
Malachi2:6 Talefunda fyabufi iyoo, alefundafye ifyalungama. Ali uwacishinka, kabili uwa myendele yamutende pa menso yandi, aletalusha na bantu abengi ku fyabubifi." 
Malachi2:7 “Pantu shimapepo ewaba no mulimo wakulanga abantu amano yene yene ayakunjishiba ine ne Lesa. Abantu bali nokulaya kuli shimapepo pakuya mukulasambililako ifyo ine mfwaya, pantu ena e nkombe yandi ine ne Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Malachi2:8 Nomba imwe mwe bashimapepo, awe mwalipatuka mu nshila iyalungama. Imifundile yenu nailenga ukuti abengi balebifya. Imwe namonaula icipangano ico ine napangene na Levi. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita ndemwebelapo." 
Malachi2:9 Kanshi nomba na ine nalaleka abantu bonse bamusuule kabili mube abafye, pantu imwe tamukonka inshila shandi, kabinge mulacita no mucishacinani ilyo mufunda abantu amafunde yandi.”" 
Malachi2:10 Bushe ifwe bonse tatwaba na Shifwe umo wine? Bushe te Lesa umofye mpo uwatubumba? Nga nomba mulandu nshi tushumfwanina, icakuti twalasuulilapo ne cipangano ico Lesa apangene ne fikolwe fyesu?" 
Malachi2:11 Mwamona, abena Yuda balisangukila Lesa, balicita ne cintu icabunani mu calo ca Israeli, na mu musumba wa Yerusalemu mwine. Abena Yuda balikowesha ne cifulo camushilo ico Yawe umwine atemwisha. Balyupa abanakashi abapepa imilungu ya benafyalo." 
Malachi2:12 Umuntu onse uucita ica musango uyu, nangu abe shani, Yawe engamulofyafye, epakuti ekatala nakabili aba wa mu mutundu wakwa Yakobo, ekatala nakabili aba pamo na bantu abatuula Yawe umwine wa fita imituulo." 
Malachi2:13 Kabili na cimbi ico imwe mucita, nici. Nimwe mulila ifilamba icakuti mwabomfya no bulambo bwakwa Yawe. Mulaloosha no kulashinshimukila pa mulandu wakuti Yawe alileka ukuposako amano ku malambo yenu nangu ukupokelela imituulo yenu ne nsansa, iyo mumutuula ku minwe yenu." 
Malachi2:14 No kwipusha mulepusha amuti, “Bushe kwena cinshi calenga?” Ala nico alishiba ukuti imwe mwalisangukila abakashi benu abo mwaupile mucili abalumendo. Ebo mwayampene nabo, nomba kabili mwalyonaula icilayo ico mwalayene nabo, nangu mwalaile Lesa ukuti ebo mwakulayampana nabo." 
Malachi2:15 Bushe te Lesa amucitile umubili umo no mweo umo pamo pene nabo? Ngeco afwaya bushe cinshi? Ala ni pakuti tulekwata abana abakuba icine cine abantu bakwa Lesa. Kanshi muleisunga mu mitima yenu, pelaba nelyo umo uwakusangukila umukashi wakwe uo aupile acili umulumendo." 
Malachi2:16 Yawe Lesa wakwa Israeli alesosa ati, “Ine nalipata ukulekana mu cupo, pantu umo nga acita ifyo, ninshi afyenga umukashi wakwe. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita ndelanda. Kanshi muleisunga mu mitima yenu, mwilasangukila bakashi benu.”" 
Malachi2:17 Imilandile yenu imwe naitendusha Yawe. Lelo imwe muleipusha amuti, “Nga ifwe tumutendwishe shani?” Ala nico mulanda amuti, “Yawe amona abantu bonse abacita ifyabipa ukuti basuma, na mu cacine alibatemwa.” Kabinge nico mwipusha amuti, “Bushe Lesa uulungika ifintu, aba kwi?”" 
Malachi3:1 Yawe umwine wa fita alesosa ati, “Moneni, ine nkatuma inkombe yandi iyakuntangilila, iyakumpekanishisha inshila. Ala Imfumu iyo mufwaya, mukapulikilwafye yaisa kwi Tempele lyaiko. Inkombe iyo imwe mufuluka, ikesa kukulumbilisha icipangano candi.”" 
Malachi3:2 Elyo nomba bushe nani akesa shanshako mu bushiku akafika? Nani akapusuka ilyo akesa moneka? Pantu ena akesa ba ngo mulilo wa mwilungu umo bengulwila ifyela, akesa ba nge sopo ilyamaka ilyakusambila." 
Malachi3:3 Akesa mukulalubulwisha ngo muntu uuleengulula no kuwaminisha silifa. Akesa wamya bamwana Levi nga filya fine bawaminisha silifa na golide. Elyo nabo nomba bakalatuula Yawe imituulo iya mu bololoke. 
Malachi3:4 Imituulo iyo abena Yuda na bena Yerusalemu bakalatuula Yawe, elyo nao nomba akalasekelamo nga filya fine caleba kale mu myaka yakale." 
Malachi3:5 Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “E mulandu ine nkesa kukumulubulwisha imwe, nkesa shinina bwangu bwangufye abantu ababuka, abacita ubucende, abalapa ubufi, abacenjelela ababomfi pakubalipila amalipilo yabo, abafyenga bamukamfwilwa na bana banshiwa, abafyenga na beni abenafyalo, kabili abashankwatila akatiina.”" 
Malachi3:6 Yawe umwine wa fita aletila ati, “Cine cine ine ne Yawe nshifutuka iyoo. E mulandu wine imwe bamwana Yakobo mushalobela." 
Malachi3:7 Ukufuma ku nshita ya fikolwe fyenu, imwe mwalipula mu mafunde yandi, tamuyakonka nakalya nga filya fine ne fikolwe fyenu fyalecita. Kanshi imwe bweleleni kuli ine, na ine ndi nokubwelela kuli imwe.” Lelo imwe mulepusha amuti, “Nga kuti twacita shani pakubwelela uko uli?”" 
Malachi3:8 Eico na ine ndemwipusha nati, “Bushe umuntu kuti acenjesha ine ne Lesa? Ala nakalya, lelo kwena imwe mulancenjesha. Muncenjesha shani? Ni mukukanaleta icapekumi, na mukukanaleta imituulo." 
Malachi3:9 Mwashama imwe bonsefye, pantu umushobo wenu onsefye apo wapela ulancenjesha." 
Malachi3:10 Akuleteni ku ŋanda yandi umutuulo uutuntulu uwa capekumi, epakuti icakulya cilebamo mu ŋanda yandi. Aleni njesheni ne Yawe umwine wa fita, mumone nga nshakamwiswile amatala ya mulu, no kumupongolwela ifintu ifingi ifyakuti na pakubika pakabule." 
Malachi3:11 Nshaleleka makanta ukuti alemonawila ifisabo iyoo, ne fimuti fya myangashi mu mabala yenu tafyakalelukusha ifisabo fyaiko.” Efyasosa Yawe umwine wa fita." 
Malachi3:12 “Elyo na bantu ba mishobo yonse bakulatilafye, ‘Awe imwe mwalishuka,’ pantu mu calo cenu mukalaba insansa. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda.”" 
Malachi3:13 Yawe aletila ati, “Ifyo imwe mulanda pali ine, filankalifya umutima. “Lelo imwe mulanjipusha amuti, ‘Nga finshi ifyo ifwe tukulandapo?’" 
Malachi3:14 Nico imwe mutila amuti, ‘Ukubombela Lesa, awe kuicushafye. Nga finshi ifyo ifwe tumwenamo mukulasunga amafunde yakwa Yawe umwine wa fita, na mukulaenda abafiitwa pakumulanga ukuti tulelanguluka pafyo tubifishe?" 
Malachi3:15 Ukulingana nefyo ifwe tumona, tutila abacilumba balipaalwa. Elyo abacita ifyabubifi nabo balishuka, elyo abesha Lesa nabo balapusumuka.’”" 
Malachi3:16 Elyo abantu abakwatile Yawe akatiina balasoshanya, ninshi Yawe nao alekutika, aleumfwa nefyo balelanda. Elyo icitabo icipombwa icacibukisho calembelwe pa cinso cakwa Yawe ica mashina ya bantu abamukwatile akatiina no kucindika ishina lyakwe." 
Malachi3:17 Elyo Yawe umwine wa fita asosa ati, “Aba bena ebakaba abantu bandi abo nacindamika. Ubushiku ine nkabombapo cimo, bakaba abandifye. Ine nkabalangulukilako, nga filya fine umuntu alangulukilako umwana wakwe uumubombela." 
Malachi3:18 Elintu nakabili mukashininkisha ifyo abantu abololoke baibela ku bantu ababifi, ifyo abantu abamombela baibela ku bantu abashimombela ine ne Lesa.”" 
Malachi4:1 Yawe umwine wa fita alanda ati, “Moneni ubushiku bumo bukesa, umukalapya umulilo uukali nganshi ngo wa mwilungu. Abantu bonse abacilumba na bonse abacita ifyabipa bakabilima nge mpimbili. Bakapya no kulungula icakuti takwakashaleko umushila nangu umusambo." 
Malachi4:2 Nomba imwe mwe bacindika ishina lyandi, ulubuuto lwabulungami lukasanikila pali imwe nge mibengelele ya kasuba akaletula, no kumuletela ukupola. Imwe mukalubuka no kulacilauka nge fiponti fya ŋombe ifyo baiswila mwitanga." 
Malachi4:3 Pali ubo bushiku ilyo nkacita ifi fintu, imwe mukacimfya abantu ababifi no kubanyantaukapo, cikaba kwati ni mu mito mulenyanta. Nine Yawe umwine wa fita nalanda." 
Malachi4:4 “Kanshi imwe muleibukishafye amafunde ya mubomfi wandi Mose, muleibukisha ifipope na mafunde ifyo ine namukonkomeshe pa lupili lwa Holebu, pakuti efyo imwe mwe bena Israeli bonse mulekonka." 
Malachi4:5 “Moneni ilyo ubo bushiku bukalamba kabili ubwakutiina ubwakwa Yawe bushilati bufike, nkatala nkatume kasesema Eliya." 
Malachi4:6 Kabili akesa pilibwila imitima ya bashibo ku bana babo, ne mitima ya bana kuli bashibo, epakuti ine nshishile lapisha no konaula icalo cenu.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Kanshi ilyo mukamona umupamba wabonaushi uo kasesema Daniele alandapo uli mwi Tempele, ‘uulebelenga naeluke’," 
Luke3:25 mwana Matatia, mwana Amosi, mwana Nahumu, mwana Esili, mwana Nagai,"
